Genesis24:61 Lacen Labeka ki lwak aŋecane gua, gucako wot, guito wi kinaga kun gilubo kor laco meno; kit meno latic meno ocako wot ki Labeka, kun gidok i yo tugi." 
Genesis24:62 Icaka onoŋo obino oa ki Beerlakai-roi; i kare meno onoŋo en bedo i Negeb. 
Genesis24:63 Ka Icaka ocito woko i bar ka lwodo lok otyeno; ci otiŋo waŋe malo, oneno kinaga ka bino." 
Genesis24:64 Ka Labeka otiŋo waŋe malo, oneno Icaka, ci olor woko ki i wi kinaga, opye piny." 
Genesis24:65 Owaco ki latic ni, “Meno laco mene ma loka ca, ma woto i bar kun bino ka romo kwedwa-ni?” Latic ogamo ni. “En aye laditta-ni.” Labeka okwanyo boŋo oumme kwede." 
Genesis24:66 Latic otito bot Icaka lok ducu ma otimme. 
Genesis24:67 Icaka okelo Labeka i kema, ci obedo kwede, odoko dakone, kun mare bene. Kit meno cwiny Icaka ocako kwe ki i ŋe to pa minne." 
Genesis25:1 Abraim dok onyomo dako mukene, ma nyiŋe Ketula," 
Genesis25:2 En onywalle Jimran, Yokocan, Medan, Midian, Icibak ki Cua." 
Genesis25:3 Yokocan onywalo Ceba ki Dedan; litino awobe pa Dedan gin ene: Accurim, Letucim ki Leummim." 
Genesis25:4 Litino awobe pa Midian gin aye Epa, Eper, Kanok, Abida ki Eldaa. Gin ducu likwayo pa Ketula," 
Genesis25:5 Abraim omiyo jamine ducu bot Icaka. 
Genesis25:6 Ento litino awobe pa monne ma aŋeca Abraim opoko botgi mot bene, i kare ma pud en kwo; ci ocwalogi woko cen nia ki ka ŋet wode Icaka. Gudok tuŋ wokceŋ i lobo mudok tuŋ nyaŋo," 
Genesis25:7 Man aye wel nino me kwo pa Abraim; oromo mwaka miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye abic. 
Genesis25:8 Abraim oomo cwinye me agikkine, ci oto woko, ma mwakane doŋ dit, dano muteggi, ma doŋ oti, ci odok bot lutugi." 
Genesis25:9 Awobene Icaka ki Icmael guyiko kome i boro lyel ma i Makpela, ma i poto pa Epron wod pa Jokar, ma Lakit, tuŋ wokceŋ me Mamre," 
Genesis25:10 i poto ma yam Abraim owilo ki bot jo Kit. Giyiko Abraim kenyo, kacel ki dakone Cara." 
Genesis25:11 Lubaŋa ocako miyo gum ki Icaka ki i ŋe to pa wonne Abraim, Icaka ocako bedo i Beer-lakai-roi," 
Genesis25:12 Man aye likwayo pa Icmael wod pa Abraim, ma Agar aŋeca pa Cara, anyira Ejipt, onywalo ki Abraim." 
Genesis25:13 Man nyiŋ litino awobe pa Icmael, kun lubo kit ma ginywalogi kwede: Nebayot, en latin kayo pa Icmael; ki Kooar, Adbeel, Mibcam," 
Genesis25:14 Micima, Duma, Maca," 
Genesis25:15 Adad, Tema, Jetur, Napic ki Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Man, aye awobe pa Icmael, nyiŋgi ene, kun lubo gaŋgi, ki kabedogi; gin luker apar wiye aryo macalo rokgi tye." 
Genesis25:17 Icmael yam ori wi lobo mwaka miya acel ki pyeradek wiye abiro; ci oomo cwinye me agikkine, oto woko, odok bot lutugi." 
Genesis25:18 Kabedogi yam ocakke nia ki Kavila nio wa i Cur mukemo tuŋ Ejipt ma dok tuŋ Aciria; en obedo i kabedone pat kun pyem ki utmegine ducu. 
Genesis25:19 Man aye likwayo pa Icaka, wod pa Abraim: Abraim onywalo Icaka," 
Genesis25:20 Icaka onyomo dakone Labeka kun onoŋo tye ki mwaka pyeraŋwen; Labeka yam nya pa Becweri ma jo Aram, ma i lobo Paddan-aram, lamin Laban ma jo Aram." 
Genesis25:21 Icaka ocako lego Lubaŋa pi dakone, pien onoŋo lalur; ci Rwot ocwako kor legane, ka dakone Labeka ogamo ic" 
Genesis25:22 I kare ma litino gubedo ka twomme ki i iye, en owacci, “Ka ce gitimme kit meno, man nyuto gin aŋo?” Ci ocito ka penyo dog Rwot." 
Genesis25:23 Ka Rwot otitte ni, “Rok aryo aye gitye i ii, jo meno aryo-nu kingi bipokke woko ki i ii; acel bibedo oteka makato lawote, latin matidi aye biloyo latin kayo.”" 
Genesis25:24 Ka kare me gonnyene oromo, ci litino rudi gunen i iye." 
Genesis25:25 Onywalo latin kayo ma kome kwar, kome ducu obedo ki yer calo boŋo yer; omiyo gicako nyiŋe ni Ecau." 
Genesis25:26 Lacen dok ginywalo ominne, kun ciŋe omako opuny tyen Ecau, omiyo gicako nyiŋe ni Yakobo. I kare ma ginywalo litino-nu onoŋo Icaka ditte doŋ romo mwaka pyerabicel." 
Genesis25:27 Awobe meno ka gudoŋo, ci Ecau obedo oken makwiri, ladwar i tim, Yakobo obedo lamwolo, kun bedo mere i kema mot." 
Genesis25:28 Icaka yam maro mere Ecau, pien onoŋo bedo ka camo ciŋe; ento Labeka dok onoŋo maro mere Yakobo." 
Genesis25:29 I kare ma Yakobo tye ka tedo dek ŋor, ci Ecau oa ki i tim, odwogo ma kec obwoye woko," 
Genesis25:30 Ecau olego Yakobo ni, “Miya dek ŋor mubok-ki acam, kec obwoya woko.” Pi lok meno omiyo gilwoŋo nyiŋe ni Edom." 
Genesis25:31 Yakobo owacce ni, “Koŋ icatta dit me anywallini.”" 
Genesis25:32 Ecau ogamo ni, “An acok to woko; dit me anywalli kono konnye tye kwene?”" 
Genesis25:33 Yakobo ogamo ni; “Koŋ icak ki kwoŋŋa kwoŋ.” Mumiyo en okwoŋŋe kwoŋ, ci ocato dit me anywalline woko bot Yakobo." 
Genesis25:34 Ka Yakobo omine kwon ki dek ŋor, ka ocamo, omato pii i wiye, ci oa malo, ocako wot ocito woko. Ecau ocayo dit me anywalline kit meno." 
Genesis26:1 Kec dok opoto i lobo aye, ma pat ki kec ma yam koŋ opoto i kare pa Abraim ca. Ka Icaka ocitoi -Gerar, bot Abimelek kabaka Piliciti." 
Genesis26:2 Ci Rwot onen bote kun wacce ni, “Pe icit i lobo Ejipt; ber ibed i lobo ma abititti." 
Genesis26:3 Koŋ ibed i lobo man, an bene abibedo kwedi, abimiyi gum; pien lobo man ducu abimiyo boti ki bot likwayi, dok abicobo kwoŋ ma yam akwoŋo bot woru Abraim." 
Genesis26:4 Abimiyo likwayi nya mapol macalo lwak lakalatwe me polo, abimiyo likwayi lobo man ducu; dok rok ducu ma wi lobo gibilimo gumgi ki i komgi;" 
Genesis26:5 pien yam Abraim oworo doga, kun cobo cikka ki gin ma aciko ducu.”" 
Genesis26:6 Icaka obedo i Gerar. 
Genesis26:7 Ka jo kunnu gupenye lok kom dakone, en ogamo ni, “En lamera”; pien olworo waco ni, “Dakona”, kun tamo ni, “Wek wegi lobo pe guneka woko pi Labeka”; pien onoŋo nen mwonya mada." 
Genesis26:8 Ka doŋ odikke kunnu kare malac, ci Abimelek kabaka pa jo Piliciti oneno Icaka ki i waŋ dirica ka obedo ka tuko ki dakone Labeka." 
Genesis26:9 Abimelek ocako lwoŋo Icaka owacce ni, “Nen, man dakoni; piŋo in kono nene iwacci, ‘En lamera’?” Icaka odokke iye ni, “Pien onoŋo atamo ni, Wek pe guneka woko pire." 
Genesis26:10 Abimelek ogamo ni, “Itimowa kuman piŋo? Ka nene dano mo obuto ki dakoni, kono ikelo bal i komwa nono.”" 
Genesis26:11 Abimelek ocako juko lwakke ducu, kun waco ni, “Dano mo ka ogudo kom laco man, nyo dakone, gibineke woko.”" 
Genesis26:12 Icaka ocoyo poto i lobo meno; ci okayo cam ma dodo tyen miya i mwakanu. Rwot aye omiye gum," 
Genesis26:13 dano-nu odoko lalonyo, obedo ka medde ki limo jami, nio ka odoko twon lalonyo." 
Genesis26:14 Olimo lim madwoŋ makwo, dyaŋi ki dyegi, ci gaŋŋe opoŋ ki lwak dano, omiyo nyeko omako jo Piliciti i kome." 
Genesis26:15 Onoŋo jo Piliciti gujuko waŋ it guculo woko ducu ki lobo, ma con lutic pa wonne aye yam gukwinyo i kare pa wonne Abraim." 
Genesis26:16 Abimelek ocako waco ki Icaka ni, “Doŋ koŋ ia woko ki botwa, pien itek ikatowa woko.”" 
Genesis26:17 Ci Icaka oa woko ki botgi, ocito, ogony otiro i nota me Gerar, ci obedo iye." 
Genesis26:18 Icaka dok ocako golo waŋ pii ma yam gikwinyo i kare pa wonne Abraim; pien yam koŋ jo Piliciti guju kogi woko i kare ma doŋ wonne Abraim oto woko-ni; ci dok ocako ‘lwoŋo nyiŋgi kit ma yam wonne, olwoŋogi’ kwede," 
Genesis26:19 Ento lutic pa Icaka gutyeko kwinyo waŋ it i nota-nu, ci gunoŋo iye waŋ it maloŋo," 
Genesis26:20 Lukwat pa jo Gerar gucako da ki lukwat pa Icaka, kun giwaco ni, “Pii man mewa.” Mumiyo en ocako nyiŋ waŋ pii meno ni. Ecek,” ni pien gubedo ka da iye kwede." 
Genesis26:21 Ka doŋ okwinyo waŋ it mukene, dok gucako da pi eno bene; mumiyo olwoŋo ni Citna." 
Genesis26:22 Dok oa woko ki kunnu, okwinyo dok waŋ it mukene aye. Pe doŋ daa obedo tye pi meno; mumiyo olwoŋo nyiŋe ni Rekobot, kun waco ni, “Pien tin doŋ Rwot oyabowa kabedo malac, doŋ wabinya i lobe-ni.”" 
Genesis26:23 Ka oa woko ki kunnu odak i Beer-ceba. 
Genesis26:24 Rwot dok oen bote i dyewor meno, ma wacce ni “An Lubaŋa pa woru Abraim; pe ilwor, pien atye kwedi, abimiyi gum, dok abimiyo likwayi nya mapol pi laticca Abraim.’" 
Genesis26:25 Omiyo ocano keno tyer pi Rwot kunnu, ci olwoŋo iye nyiŋ Rwot; ci oguro kemane kunnu. Luticpa Icaka dok gukwinyo waŋ it kunnu." 
Genesis26:26 Abimelek ocito bote, oa ki i Gerar, kacel ki Akujat lamiye tam, ki Pikol ladit lawimony mere," 
Genesis26:27 Ci Icaka owaco botgi ni, “Wunwubino bota pi lok aŋo, ma wun kono wudaga, dok yam doŋ wuryema ki i lobowu?”" 
Genesis26:28 Gin gugamo ni, “Wan waneno atir ni Lubaŋa tye kwedi, mumiyo wawacci, wek kwoŋ obed i kin in ki wan, wek waket gicikke ki in," 
Genesis26:29 wek pe ibitimwa marac, macalo wan bene yam pe wagudo komi, pe bene watimo gin mo marac i komi, ento tim maberre keken, dok bene waryemi woko ia ki i kinwa ki kuc. Kombeddi in aye ŋat ma Rwot omiyo gum.”" 
Genesis26:30 Ci otedogi karama, ka gucamo, gumato." 
Genesis26:31 Gua malo odiko con, ci gukwoŋo kwoŋ ŋat man ki lawote; ka doŋ Icaka olwokogi i yo tugi, gua, gupokke kwede ki kuc." 
Genesis26:32 I nino meno bene kikome en aye lutic pa Icaka gubino bote, gutitte lok kom waŋ it ma gityeko kwinyone, kun giwacce ni, “Watyeko noŋo pii.”" 
Genesis26:33 Ocako nyiŋe ni Ciba, mumiyo nyiŋ gaŋ meno gilwoŋo ni Beer-ceba nio wa onyoo." 
Genesis26:34 Ka Ecau doŋ ditte romo mwaka pyeraŋwen, onyomo monne, Judit nya pa Beeri, jo Kit, ki Bacemat nya pa Elon, jo Kit bene." 
Genesis26:35 Gumiyo cwercwiny madwoŋ bot Icaka ki Labeka. 
Genesis27:1 Ka Icaka doŋ oti, ki waŋe bene doŋ ocido woko ma doŋ pe neno piny, ci olwoŋo latin kayone Ecau, owacce ni, “Latinna.” En ogamo ni, “Ana ene.”" 
Genesis27:2 Ci owacce ni, “Nen, an doŋ ati woko, pe aŋeyo nino ma abito iye." 
Genesis27:3 Doŋ ikwany jami dwarri, ki jurani ki atummi, kat doŋ i tim, wek icidwarra lee," 
Genesis27:4 wek icella riŋo makur, kit ma amaro-ni, ci ikella, wek doŋ acam ciŋi, ka doŋ alammi gum ma peya ato.”" 
Genesis27:5 I kare ma Icaka tye ka lok ki wode Ecau-ni, onoŋo Labeka bene winyo. Ka Ecau okato ocito ka dwaro lee i tim, wek ekel riŋo," 
Genesis27:6 Labeka owaco ki wode Yakobo ni, “Abedo ka winyo woru ka loko ki omeru ni," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Cikella riŋo, wek icella riŋo makur, wek doŋ acam ciŋi, ka doŋ alammi gum i nyim Rwot ma peya ato.’" 
Genesis27:8 Mumiyo latinna, worra doga i lok ma aciki-ni," 
Genesis27:9 Wot icit i kin dyegi, icikella litino dyegi aryo ma komgi bulubulu. Wek an ayub riŋone makur ki woru, kit ma en maroni," 
Genesis27:10 wek iter ki woru ocam ciŋi, wek olammi gum ma peya oto.”" 
Genesis27:11 Ento Yakobo ogamo dog minne kun wacce ni “Nen ba, omera Ecau kome ki yer, an: koma pe ki yer." 
Genesis27:12 Gwok nyo ka wora biboŋa, ci abinen macalo acito ka nyware, miyo bicena, pe bilamma gum.”" 
Genesis27:13 Minne ogamo doge kun waco ni, “Wek cenni opot i koma, latinna; worra doga keken, Ber iwot, icikelgi bota.”" 
Genesis27:14 En ocito, okelogi bot minne, ka minne ocelo riŋo makur, kit ma wonne maro-ni." 
Genesis27:15 Ka Labeka okwanyo ginaruka pa wode Ecau, ma en yam ruko maberre-ni, ma noŋo tye i ot bot minne, ci oruko ki Yakobo wode matidi-ni." 
Genesis27:16 Ocako boyo laa litino dyegi-nu ki bade ducu, ki ŋute bene ka ma yer pe iye;" 
Genesis27:17 ka otiŋo riŋo me ocelo makur-ri, ki kwon ma omyeno, omiyo i ciŋ wode Yakobo." 
Genesis27:18 En odonyo kwede bot wonne, owacce ni, “Aba”; en oye ni, “An atye en do; in aŋa ce, latinna?”" 
Genesis27:19 Yakobo ogamo dog wonne ni, “An Ecau, latin kayoni. Atyeko timo kit ma nakanen ititta-ni; doŋ i cukke, ia malo wek icam ciŋa, ka doŋ ilamma gum.”" 
Genesis27:20 Icaka owaco ki wode ni, “In onoŋo riŋo oyotoyot ma rom man niŋniŋ, latinna?” En ogamo ni, “Pien Rwot Lubaŋani omiyo gum okaya oyot.”" 
Genesis27:21 Dok Icaka owaco bot Yakobo ni, “Koŋ inyik cok bota kany, wek aboŋ komi, latinna, wek aŋe ka in latinna Ecau kikome ada nyo pe.”" 
Genesis27:22 Ka Yakobo ocako nyiko cok bot wonne Icaka; oboŋo kome, ci owacci, “Dwani dwan Yakobo, ento badi en aye bad Ecau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Ci doŋ pe omedo ki ŋene, pien onoŋo bade ki yer macalo bad ominne Ecau. Ka ocako lamme gum kun waco ni," 
Genesis27:24 “In ada latinna Ecau kikome?” En odok iye ni, “An kikoma.”" 
Genesis27:25 Ka dok owacce ni, “Kel cam bota cok, wek doŋ acam ciŋ latinna, ka doŋ alammi gum.” Ci oketo cam i nyime, ka ocamo; dok okelle koŋo vino, omato bene." 
Genesis27:26 Ka dok wonne Icaka owacce ni, “Bin cok, wek inot lema, latinna.”" 
Genesis27:27 Ci onyiko cok bote, ka onoto leme; ka ocako ŋweyo ŋwec ginarukane, ka olamme gum, kun wacce ni, “Nen, ŋwec kom woda kur macalo poto ma Rwot omiyo gum kome!" 
Genesis27:28 Lubaŋa omiyi toyo ma luk a ki i polo, ki lobo ma ceko cam mapek." 
Genesis27:29 Lwak jo mapol obed luticci, ki rok mapol bene giryebbe piny i nyimi. In aye ibed ladit ma loyo omegi, litino pa meni ducu giryebbe piny i nyimi. Cen obed i kom dano ducu ma biceni, dok gum obed i kom jo ducu ma bilammi gum!”" 
Genesis27:30 Ka doŋ Icaka otyeko lamo gum ki Yakobo okato woko manok nia ki i nyim wonne Icaka, ominne Ecau ocako dwogo nia ki ka dwarre." 
Genesis27:31 En bene ocelo riŋo makur, okelo bot wonne. Owaco ki wonne ni, “Wore, doŋ icukke, ia malo, wek icam ciŋ latinni, ka wek doŋ ilamma gum.”" 
Genesis27:32 Wonne Icaka owacce ni, “In aŋa doki?” Ogamo ni, “An a wodi do, latin kayoni, Ecau do.”" 
Genesis27:33 Kom Icaka ocako myel matek twatwal, kun waco ni, “Aŋa ma nakanen koŋ odwaro lee, okella-ni, ma doŋ atyeko camone woko ducu, ma onoŋo peya idwogo-ni, dok atyeko lamma gum woko do, gum doŋ bidebo gire i kome.”" 
Genesis27:34 Ka Ecau owinyo lok pa wonne, ocako tokke ki cwar koko madit, magwa bene, kun waco bot wonne ni, “Lamme gum bene do, aya abana!”" 
Genesis27:35 En dok owacce ni, “Omeru obino, obwola, ci doŋ otyeko buyo gummi woko.”" 
Genesis27:36 Ecau owacce ni, “Pe gicako nyiŋe Yakobo atir? Nen, en doŋ oridde ka laro jamina kiryo kulu. Okwoŋo buyo dit anywillina, doki nen, in bene dok otyeko buyo gumma woko.” Dok omedde ki waco lok ni, “In nene pe igwoko gum pira ce?”" 
Genesis27:37 Icaka ogamo dog Ecau ni, “Nen, doŋ atyeko keto en me bedo rwodi otum, ki omege ducu atyeko miyogi me bedo luticce; amiye wa kal ki koŋo vino ducu gubed me pito en. Gin aŋo ma dok abimiyi ba, latinna?”" 
Genesis27:38 Ecau dok owaco bot wonne ni, “Onoŋo itye ki gum acel keken bo, wora? Lamma gum, lamma gom mo bene do, aya abana.” Ecau otiŋo wiye malo ka koko." 
Genesis27:39 Wonne Icaka ocako gamo lokke ni, “Nen, ibibedo bor ki lobo ma ceko cam mapek, dok ibibedo bor ki toyo ma luk a ki malo i polo." 
Genesis27:40 Ibikwo meri ki lak pala lucwanni, ibibedo latic pa omeru; ento i kare ma ibijemo i kome, ci ibituro rii okol ma oriyo i ŋutini.”" 
Genesis27:41 Ecau ocako kwero ominne pi gum ma wonne olamo i kome-ni. Ecau opiro lok i cwinye ni, “Kare me to pa wora doŋ onyiko cok; en aye abineko iye omera Yakobo bene.”" 
Genesis27:42 Ento ka gitito ki Labeka lok pa latin kayone Ecau, en ocwalo dano, olwoŋo Yakobo wode matidine, owacce ni, “Nen, omeru Ecau obedo ma cwinye yom kun oyubbe me neki." 
Genesis27:43 Mumiyo in iwor doga, latinna; a malo, ilwi, iriŋ woko bot omera Laban i Karan." 
Genesis27:44 Koŋ icibed kuunu, nio waŋ ma kiniga pa omeru opye;" 
Genesis27:45 wek wiye koŋ owil i gin ma yam itimo i keme-ni; ka doŋ abicwalo dano ka omi ki kunnu. Piŋo wun aryo ducu myero wurweny woko ki i waŋa lawaŋacel?” 
Genesis27:46 Ka Labeka dok owaco bot Icaka ni, “An doŋ kwona ool woko ki kit kwo pa mon Kit. Ka dok Yakobo bene binyomo anyira Kit ma rom ki mon ma gitye i lobo-ni, ci doŋ kwona konyo aŋo?”" 
Genesis28:1 Ka Icaka olwoŋo Yakobo, ci olamme gum, ka ocike ni, “In doŋ pe inyom dako mo ki i kin anyira me Kanaan." 
Genesis28:2 Ber ia, icit Paddan-aram i ot pa kwaru Becweri ma won meni; en aye inyom iye nya pa Laban ma omin meni kikome." 
Genesis28:3 Lubaŋa Matweroducu omiyi gum, omiyi inya mapol, wek ibed lwak rok mapol." 
Genesis28:4 Dok omi gum pa Abraim opot i komi, ki i kom likwayi, wek icam lobo ma ibedo iye-ni macalo welo, ma yam Lubaŋa omiyo ki Abraim!”" 
Genesis28:5 Kit meno Icaka ocwalo Yakobo, ocito i Paddan-aram bot Laban, wod pa Becweri me Aram, ma omin Labeka ma min Yakobo ki Ecau." 
Genesis28:6 Ecau oneno ni Icaka doŋ otyeko lamo gum i kom Yakobo, ka dok ocwale wa i Paddan-aram wek onyom dako ki kunnu, dok i kare ma olamme gum ocike ni, “In pe inyom nyako mo ki i kin Lukanaan,”" 
Genesis28:7 dok Yakobo bene oworo dog wonne ki minne, ci ocito i Paddan-aram." 
Genesis28:8 Ka Ecau oneno ni kit pa anyira Kanaan pe yomo cwiny wonne Icaka," 
Genesis28:9 ci ocito bot jo Icmael, onyomo iye dako, omedo i kom mere ma con ca. Onyomo Makalat ma nya pa Icmael wod pa Abraim, ma lamiŋ Nebayot." 
Genesis28:10 Yakobo oa ki, Beer-ceba, ci odok tuŋ Karan." 
Genesis28:11 Ka oo i kabedo mo, obuto kenyo i dyewor meno, pien onoŋo ceŋ doŋ opoto woko. Ka otiŋo got acel mo ki i kin wadi, opyelo piny, oteno ki wiye, ci onino woko i kabedo meno," 
Genesis28:12 Lek obino i wiye, oneno rwom ma gijeŋo tere ocuŋ piny i ŋom, kun wiye gijeŋo oo wa i polo; ka oneno lumalaika pa Lubaŋa kun gilor piny, ka dok giito gidok malo." 
Genesis28:13 Oneno Rwot ocuŋ tuŋ ka wiye malo, kun waco ni, “An a Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwaru Abraim, ki Lubaŋa pa Icaka; abimiyi lobo ma ibuto iye-ni, abimiyo boti ki bot likwayi;" 
Genesis28:14 dok likwayi gibibedo ma rom ki apwa ‘me lobo, dok wubimedde wuromo yo tuŋ potoceŋ ki tuŋ wokceŋ, ki yo tuŋ acam ki tuŋ acuc bene; dok i kom in ki i kom likwayi en aye kaka ducu ma wi lobo bilimo iye gumgi." 
Genesis28:15 Nen, an atye kwedi, abigwoki ka ma ibiwoto iye ducu, dok abidwoki cen wa i lobo man; pe abiweki ata nio waŋ ma acobo gin ma atyeko i okone boti-ni.”" 
Genesis28:16 Ka Yakobo oco woko ki i waŋ nino, ci owacci, “Rwot tye i kabedo-ni ada; onoŋo an kara pe aŋeyo.”" 
Genesis28:17 Ci lworo ocako make, kun wacci, “Kabedo man kara lik kuman! Man ot pa Lubaŋa kikome, man aye dog gaŋ me polo.”" 
Genesis28:18 Yakobo oa malo odiko con, otino got ma oteŋo ki wiye-ni, ci ocibo wek obed wir, ka oonyo moo i wiye." 
Genesis28:19 Ocako nyiŋ kabedo meno ni Betel; ento nia wa con onoŋo nyiŋ kabedo meno gilwoŋo ni Luj. 
Genesis28:20 Yakobo ocako kwoŋo kwoŋ kun waco ni, “Ka Lubaŋa bibedo kweda, kun gwoka i yo man ma awoto iye-ni, ka dok bimiya kwon me acama, ki boŋŋi me aruka," 
Genesis28:21 ka ce abidwogo wa i ot pa wora ki kuc, ci Rwot doŋ bibedo Lubaŋana," 
Genesis28:22 ki got man bene, ma acibo me bedo wir, bidoko ot pa Lubaŋa: ki gin ducu ma ibimina, an bene abimini dul acel me aparre.”" 
Genesis29:1 Yakobo dok omedde ki wotte, ka oo i lo bo pa jo ma tuŋ wokceŋ," 
Genesis29:2 Ka obedo ka neno piny, ci oneno waŋ pii i dye bar, lwak romi gubuto piny dul adek ma gicok i ŋet waŋ pii; pien romi gimato pii i waŋ it meno. Got ma giumo ki doge bene dwoŋ:" 
Genesis29:3 ka romi ducu doŋ gugurre, gucokke kunnu, ka lukwat gitorre, giloro got woko cen ki i dog waŋ pii, ka gimiyo romi gimato, ka dok giloro got, gidwoko cen, giumo ki dog waŋ pii kakare." 
Genesis29:4 Yakobo openyogi ni, “Utmega, wun wua ki kwene?” Gugamo ni, “Wan waa ki i Karan.”" 
Genesis29:5 Owaco botgi ni, “Wun mono wuŋeyo Laban wod pa Nakor?” Gugamo ni, “Waŋeyo en.”" 
Genesis29:6 Owaco botgi ni, “En tye maber kono?” Gugamo ni, “En tye maber gire. Nen, nyare Lakeri ka bino ki romigi ca!”" 
Genesis29:7 En ogamo ni, “Nen, tipo peya olokke do, man peya kare me guro lim kacel; ber wumi pii ki romi, ci dok wuciti, wukwagi aye,”" 
Genesis29:8 Ento gin gutitte ni, “Wan pe watwero miyogi, waŋ ma lim ducu gucokke, gugurre kacel, ka doŋ gicwalo got woko cen ki i dog waŋ pii, ka doŋ wamiyoromi pii.”" 
Genesis29:9 Ka onoŋo en tye ka lok kwedgi, ci Lakeri ocoro ki romi pa wonne, ma onoŋo kwayogi." 
Genesis29:10 Ka Yakobo oneno Lakeri nya pa Laban, nya pa omin minne, ki romi pa nerone Laban, Yakobo okato ci ocwalo got woko cen ki i dog waŋ pii, ka ocako mi yo romi pa nerone Laban gumato pii." 
Genesis29:11 Ci Yakobo onoto lem Lakeri, kun kok matek." 
Genesis29:12 Yakobo otito ki Lakeri ni, en e wat pa wonne kikome, en e wod pa Labeka; ci en oriŋo, ocito otito ki wonne." 
Genesis29:13 Ka Laban owinyo lok kom Yakobo wod pa laminne, ci oriŋo ocito ka ŋolo wiye; okwako kore, onoto leme bene, ka ocako tere wa i ode. Yakobo oyeko lok magi ducu kikore bot Laban," 
Genesis29:14 ka Laban owacce ni, “In ada i cogona dok i riŋo koma bene!” Ci obedo kwede dwe acel." 
Genesis29:15 Laban ocako waco bot Yakobo ni, “Pien in i watta, doŋ ibitina tic nono bo? Ber ititta, imito aculli gin aŋo?”" 
Genesis29:16 Onoŋo Laban tye ki anyirane aryo; nyiŋ nyare maditte Lea, ki nyiŋ matidine Lakeri." 
Genesis29:17 Lea onoŋo wane kiŋiŋic, ento Lakeri nen mwonya muliŋŋe," 
Genesis29:18 Yakobo onoŋo maro Lakeri: ci owacci, “Abitini tic mwaka abiro pi Lakeri, nyari matidi-ni.”" 
Genesis29:19 Laban ogamo ni, “Onoŋo bedo ber ka amiyo en boti, kato ma kono amiyo bot dano mukene; bed bota.”" 
Genesis29:20 Yakobo otiyo pi Lakeri mwaka abiro; kare meno obedo macalo nino manok mo ki bot Yakobo, pien onoŋo iye omaro Lakeri mada." 
Genesis29:21 Yakobo openyo Laban ni, “Doŋ imiya dakona wek abed kwede, pien kare doŋ oromo.”" 
Genesis29:22 Laban otedo karama ci olwoŋo iye dano ducu ma gitye i kabedo meno. 
Genesis29:23 Ci okelo nyare Lea bot Yakobo otyeno, ocako bedo kwede." 
Genesis29:24 Laban omiyo aŋecane Jilpa bot nyare Lea wek okonye. 
Genesis29:25 Ka odiko ma piny oru, Yakobo oneno kara gimiye Lea. Yakobo owaco ki Laban ni, “Itima kuman piŋo? Onoŋo pe abedo ka tic boti pi Lakeri? Ibwola kuman piŋo?”" 
Genesis29:26 Laban ogamo ni, “Pe gitimo kuman i lobo tuwa kany, pe gimiyo nyako matidi aye kwoŋo ger ki maditte." 
Genesis29:27 Koŋ ityek’ cabit pi man acel-li, ci dok wabimiyi giri mukene bene, ka ibitina tic mwaka abiro mukene.”" 
Genesis29:28 Yakobo otimo kit meno; ocobo cabit pa Lea, ka Laban omiye nyare Lakeri me bedo dakone." 
Genesis29:29 Laban dok omiyo aŋecane Bila bot nyare Lakeri wek okonye. 
Genesis29:30 Yakobo ocako bedo ki Lakeri bene; cwinye omaro Lakeri makato Lea, dok omedde otiyo tic bot Laban mwaka mukene abiro." 
Genesis29:31 Ka Rwot oneno ni gidag Lea, ci oyabo iye; ento Lakeri ocuŋ ma pe nywal." 
Genesis29:32 Lea ogamo ic, onywalo latin laco, ci ocako nyiŋe Reuben, kun waco ni, “Pien Rwot oneno aromana; koni olo doŋ cwara bimara.”" 
Genesis29:33 Dok ogamo ic, ci onywalo latin laco, owacci, “Pien Rwot owinyo ni gidaga, omiyo dok omiya latin man bene”; ci ocako nyiŋe ni Cimeon." 
Genesis29:34 Lacen dok ogamo ic, onywalo latin laco, owacci, “Cwara doŋ bidwogo i koma, pien doŋ anywalle awobe adek kulu”; mumiyo gicako nyiŋ latin-nu Levi." 
Genesis29:35 Dok ogamo ic, onywalo latin laco, owacci, “Man aye kare ma abipako iye Rwot”; mumiyo ocako nyiŋ latin Juda; ci koŋ ocuŋ woko." 
Genesis30:1 Ka Lakeri oneno ni pe enywalo latin mo ki Yakobo, ci nyeko omake kom laminne. Ka owaco bot Yakobo ni, “Miya litino; ka pe, ci adene woko.”" 
Genesis30:2 Kiniga omako Yakobo i kom Lakeri, kun wacce ni, “Iketa adoko Lubaŋa bo, ma en ogeni nywalli?”" 
Genesis30:3 Lakeri ogamo ni, “Aŋecana Bila en do, doŋ ibed kwede, wek onywal latin mo ma kakara, wek an bene anoŋ litino mogo ki tuŋ bote.”" 
Genesis30:4 Ci omiyo aŋecane obedo dakone, Yakobo ocako bedo kwede," 
Genesis30:5 Bila ogamo ic, onywalo latin laco ki Yakobo." 
Genesis30:6 Lakeri owaco ni, “Lubaŋa otyeko ŋolla kop, owinyo ki dwana bene, ci omiya gira latin laco”; omiyo ocako nyiŋe Dan." 
Genesis30:7 Bila aŋeca pa Lakeri dok ogamo ic, onywalo latin laco ki Yakobo me aryone." 
Genesis30:8 Lakeri dok owacci, “Ka me lweny doŋ alwenyo matek wan ki lamera, ci aloye”; mumiyo ocako nyiŋ latin Naputali." 
Genesis30:9 Ka Lea bene oneno ni doŋ ecun woko, ma pe enywalo litino, ci otiŋo aŋecane Jilpa, omiyo ki Yakobo wek obed dakone." 
Genesis30:10 Aŋeca pa Lea bene onywalo latin laco ki Yakobo. 
Genesis30:11 Lea owacci, “Gum maber!” Mumiyo ocako nyiŋe Gad." 
Genesis30:12 Jilpa aŋeca pa Lea dok onywalo latin laco ki Yakobo me aryone," 
Genesis30:13 Lea owacci, “An koma gum! Pien mon gibilwoŋa ni lagumkom”; mumiyo en ocako nyiŋ latin ni Acer." 
Genesis30:14 I kare me kayo ŋano, Reuben ocito i poto, ci onoŋo iye yat nyodo, ci okelogi wa bot minne Lea. Ka Lakeri olego Lea ni, “Alegi, imiya yat nyodo pa wodi mogo do.”" 
Genesis30:15 Ento en ogamo ni, “In imayo cwara woko ki bota, itamo ni lokke tidi ce? Man dok imito ni ikwany yat nyodo pa woda woko bene?” Lakeri ogamo ni, “En tin obut kwedi dyewor ma ka yat nyodo pa wodi.”" 
Genesis30:16 Ka Yakobo odwogo nia ki i tim otyeno, Lea okato ocito ka ŋolo wiye iyo, owacce ni, “Myero tin idony i oda; pien atyeko wilo in ki yat nyodo pa woda.” Ci ocito obuto ki Lea i dyewor meno." 
Genesis30:17 Lubaŋa owinyo lega pa Lea, ci ogamo ic, onywalo latin laco me abicce ki Yakobo." 
Genesis30:18 Lea owacci, “Lubaŋa doŋ oculo waŋ miyo aŋecana bot cwara”; mumiyo ocako nyiŋe Icakar." 
Genesis30:19 Lea dok ogamo, oyac, onywalo latin me abicelle ki Yakobo." 
Genesis30:20 Lea dok owacci, “Lubaŋa doŋ omiya mot me lim keny mabeco; cwara doŋ biketta deyo, pien doŋ atyeko nywalle litino co abicel kulu”; mumiyo ocako nyiŋe Jabulon." 
Genesis30:21 Lacen dok onywalo nyare, ci ocako nyiŋe Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Lubaŋa doŋ ocako po i kom Lakeri, dok owinyo legane bene, ka oyabo iye." 
Genesis30:23 Ci ogamo, onywalo latin laco, kun wacci, “Lubaŋa otyeko kwanyo lewic woko ki i’ koma”;" 
Genesis30:24 ci ocako nyiŋe Yucepu, kun wacci, “Myero Rwot dok omedda latin laco mo acel!”" 
Genesis30:25 Ka Lakeri otyeko nywalo Yucepu, ci Yakobo owaco bot Laban ni, “Doŋ icwala wek adok paco i lobo tuwa." 
Genesis30:26 Miya monna ki litinona ma yam atiyo pigi boti-ni, wek doŋ aciti; in bene iŋeyo gin ma atiyo boti do.”" 
Genesis30:27 Laban ogamo ni, “Ka iye, ci koŋ alokki gin mo; pien atyeto ci aniaŋ ni Rwot omiya gum pi in." 
Genesis30:28 Ber ititta gin ma imito amini me mucarani, ci abimini.”" 
Genesis30:29 Yakobo owacce ni, “In kikomi iŋeyo kit ma atiyo ki ticci, ki kit ma agwoko kwede limmi." 
Genesis30:30 Pien yam ma peya abino onoŋo limmi nok mo, nen doŋ gumedde madwoŋ mukato; Rwot obedo ka mini gum ka ma adok iye ducu. Ento an abinoŋo lim ma tuŋ bota awene?”" 
Genesis30:31 En ogamo ni, “Gin aŋo ma abimini?” Yakobo ogamo ni, “In pe ibimiya gin mo wacel. Ka ibiye, tima gin macalo man, an abimedde ka kwayo limmi, ki gwokogi bene." 
Genesis30:32 Wek tin acit awot i kin limmi ducu, wek ayer ki i kingi romi ma gubedo aciri aciri ki ma abacabac, ki litino romi macol ducu, kacel ki dyegi ma gubedo abacabac ki ma aciri aciri; meno gin aye gibibedo mucarana." 
Genesis30:33 Kit meno leŋ cwinya binen lacen, ka ibibino ka ŋiyo kom mucarana. Ka ibinoŋ o dyegi ma komgi pe aciri aciri ki abacabac, ki litino romi ma pe gicol gitye i kin mega, meno gibikwano ni ma gikwalo.”" 
Genesis30:34 Ci Laban ogamo ni, “Ber, wek obed kit ma iwaco-ni.”" 
Genesis30:35 Ento i nino meno Laban okoyo nyogi dyegi ma gubedo kitana kitana, ki ma abacabac, ki megi dyegi ma gubedo aciri aciri ki abacabac, ma kitartar ducu, ki litino romi ducu macol, oketo i cin awobene." 
Genesis30:36 Opoko kingi woko ki Yakobo ma borre romo wot me nino adek kulu; Yakobo odoŋ ka kwayo lim pa Laban mudoŋŋe," 
Genesis30:37 Yakobo ocako jako jaŋ pobo madyak ki yaa ki ogali, ci oŋweko pokgi, wek kom kedi onen ŋwalaŋwala." 
Genesis30:38 Oketo kedi ma onweko komgi, opyelogi i nyim romi i weer pii, ka ma gionyo iye pii, ka ma lim cito iye ka mato pii, pien nyogine giyito megine ka gibino ka mato pii." 
Genesis30:39 Ka giyitogi i nyim kedi, omiyo ginywalo litino ma akolakol, ki ma aciri aciri ki ma abacabac." 
Genesis30:40 Yakobo dok opoko litino romi pat, oloko waŋ lim ka neno gin ma akolakol ki lwak lim pa Laban macolle ducu, ka opoko dul limme pat kun pe dok ribogi ki pa Laban." 
Genesis30:41 I kare ma nyogi yito megine matego, ci Yakobo pyelo kedi i weer pii i nyim romi, wek oyitte i nyim kedi," 
Genesis30:42 ento ka megine magorogoro aye giyitogi, en pe pyelo kedi i nyimgi; pienno lim magoro ducu pa Laban, mategone ducu pa Yakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Kit meno laco meno odoko lalonyo madwoŋ, ma tye ki lwak lim, ki lwak aŋeca ki lwak opiine, ki lwak kinaga ki kana." 
Genesis31:1 Yakobo obedo ka winyo kun awo be pa Laban giwaco ni, “Yakobo doŋ otero lim pa wonwa woko ducu, olimo lonyo nia ki i kom lim pa wonwa.”" 
Genesis31:2 Yakobo oneno ni waŋ Laban oballe woko i kome, pe dok nene maber kit macon." 
Genesis31:3 Rwot owaco bot Yakobo ni, “Doŋ idok i lobo pa kwarowu bot lutuwu, an abibedo kwedi.”" 
Genesis31:4 Yakobo olwoŋo Lakeri ki Lea i bar olet ka ma limme tye iye," 
Genesis31:5 ci owaco botgi ni, “An aneno waŋ wonwu ocido woko i koma, pe doŋ nena maber kit macon. Ento Lubaŋa pa wora yam tye kweda." 
Genesis31:6 Wun wuŋeyo ni atyeko tic bot wonwu ki tekka ducu; 
Genesis31:7 ci en obedo ka bwola, kun loko mucarana atata tyen apar kulu, ento Lubaŋa pe oye en otimo gin mo marac i koma," 
Genesis31:8 Ka owaco ni, ‘Lim ma abacabac bibedo meri me mucarani,’ ci lim ducu ginywal mubedo abacabac keken. Ka dok oloko doge ni, ‘Lim ma gibedo akolakol gin aye bibedo meri me mucarani,’ ci lim ducu dok ginywal akolakol." 
Genesis31:9 Meno aye kit ma Lubaŋa okwanyo kwede lim pa wonwu ci omiyogi bota. 
Genesis31:10 “I kare ma megine giyitogi, atiŋo waŋa malo ki i waŋ lek, ci aneno nyogi ma gitigo megine komgi obedo akolakol ki abacabac ki opukopuk." 
Genesis31:11 Lamalaika pa Lubaŋa owacca i waŋ lek ni,. ‘Yakobo’, an agamo ni, ‘An a ene!’" 
Genesis31:12 Ci owacca ni, ‘Tiŋ waŋi malo wek inen, nyogi ducu ma gitigo megine-ni gubedo akolakol ki abacabac ki opukopuk; pien atyeko neno kit ma Laban timi kwede." 
Genesis31:13 An Lubaŋa me Betel, ka ma yam iwiro iye wir ki moo, ka ikwoŋo iye kwoŋ bota-ni, Doŋ ia malo, icit woko cen ki i lobe-ni, idok i lobo ma ginywali iye ca.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Lakeri ki Lea gugamo ni, “Tye dok dul lim mo nyo ginaleya mo ma dok odoŋ piwa i ot pa wonwa?" 
Genesis31:15 Pe doŋ en nenowa macalo lurok ata? Doŋ otyeko catowa woko, tye ka camo bene lim ma gimiyo piwa woko." 
Genesis31:16 Lim ducu ma doŋ Lubaŋa otyeko kwanyo ki bot wonwa doŋ mewa ki pa litinowa; doŋ gin ducu ma Lubaŋa owacci aye itim.” 
Genesis31:17 Yakobo oa, oketo awobene ki monne i wi kinaga," 
Genesis31:18 oleko limme ducu, ma yam olimo i Paddan-aram; ci ocako wot me dok i lobo Kanaan bot Icaka." 
Genesis31:19 Laban onoŋo ocito ka ŋolo yer kom romine, ci Lakeri okwalo cal lubaŋa ki i ot pa, wonne." 
Genesis31:20 Yakobo obwolo Laban La-aram, pe otitte pi wotte." 
Genesis31:21 Olwi ki lwak lim ducu ma yam tye kwede, ka ocako wot, oŋolo kulu Euprate, ci okemo lobo godi me Gilead." 
Genesis31:22 Ka nino okato adek kulu, ci gitito bot Laban ni, “Yakobo doŋ otyeko lwi, ocito woko.”" 
Genesis31:23 En ogwarre ki lutugi, gutwarre, gulubo kore; ka guwoto nino abiro, ci gudiŋo kore cokcok i kin godi me Gilead." 
Genesis31:24 Ento Lubaŋa obino bot Laban La-aram i waŋ lek, kun wacce ni, “Gwokke, pe icilok lok mo maber nyo marac bot Yakobo.”" 
Genesis31:25 Laban omako Yakobo iyo. Onoŋo doŋ otyeko gony woko i lobo godi, ci Laban ki lutugi gugony i lobo godi meno me Gilead." 
Genesis31:26 Laban ocako lok ki Yakobo ni, “Itimo kuman piŋo, ma ibwola kit man, doŋ itiŋo anyirana, ilwi kwedgi, macalo iyakogi ayaka ki pala lucwan-ni?" 
Genesis31:27 Piŋo ilwi woko alwiya i muŋ ali, kun iumo waŋa ma pe ititta gin mo, ma kono nene aciki ki yomcwiny ki wer ki ajaa ki opuk?" 
Genesis31:28 Piŋo pe iweko aciko litinona kun anoto lem anyirana? Man itimo gin me caro a tika. 
Genesis31:29 Onoŋo atwero timi marac; ento Lubaŋa pa woru oloko kweda tin i dyewor, ocika ni ‘Gwokke pe icilok lok mo maber nyo’ marac bot Yakobo.’" 
Genesis31:30 Man doŋ ia icako wot woko, pien pi ot pa woru’ odoko mitti mada; ento dok ikwalo ki cal lubaŋana me ŋo kono?”" 
Genesis31:31 Yakobo ogamo dog Laban ni, “Onoŋo abedo ki lworo, abedo ka tamo ni gwok nyo ibimayo anyirani woko ki bota." 
Genesis31:32 Ka ibinoŋo cal lubaŋani bot ŋatti mo kany, ŋat meno pe bikwo. Cim koni jamini ma inoŋo tye bota kany i nyim utmegiwa ci ikwany idok giri kwede, “Onoŋo Yakobo pe oŋeyo ni Lakeri aye ma okwalogi." 
Genesis31:33 Kit meno Laban ocako donyo i kemapa Yakobo, ki i kema pa Lea, ki i kema pa mon aŋeca aryo-nu ducu, ci pe omedo ki nonogi; ka okato woko ki i kema pa Lea, dok odonyo i kema pa Lakeri." 
Genesis31:34 I kare meno onoŋo Lakeri otiŋo lubaŋa-nu, ci orwakogi i kom me bedo i wi kinaga; ci obedo i wigi. Laban oŋiyo jami ma i kema ducu, pe omedo ki noŋogi." 
Genesis31:35 Lakeri owaco bot wonne ni, “Laditta, pe kiniga omaki i koma ka ineno ni pe atwero a malo i nyimi, pien atye ki kit pa wan mon.” Kit meno Laban oyenyo cal lubaŋane kwe, pe omedo ki noŋogi." 
Genesis31:36 Kiniga omako Yakobo, ocako da ki Laban, kun waco bot Laban ni, “Balla doŋ tye kwene kaa? Atimo bal aŋo, mumiyo ilubo kora twatwal-li?" 
Genesis31:37 Kadi bed iyenyo i kin jamina ducu, kit gin aŋo ma inoŋo i kom jami ducu ma oa i odi? Kel iket kany i nyim utmegini ki utmegina, wek guŋol kop i kin wan aryo-ni." 
Genesis31:38 An abedo kwedi mwaka pyeraryo; pe i megi romini ki megi dyegini mo opoto, pe bene acamo nyok romoni mo." 
Genesis31:39 Lim ma ŋuu aye omwodo pe akelo riŋone boti, an aye aculo gira; lim ma gikwalo i dyeceŋ ki i dyewor ipenyo bota." 
Genesis31:40 Yam abedo kit meno, kun ceŋ waŋa dyeceŋ, koyo neka dyewor, pe aketo nino mo i waŋa," 
Genesis31:41 I lwak mwaka pyeraryo ma abedo kwedi i odi-ni, atiyo boti mwaka apar wiye aŋwen pi anyirani aryo-ni, ki mwaka abicel pi limmi, ibedo ka loko mucarana tyen apar kulu." 
Genesis31:42 Ka ce Lubaŋa pa wora, Lubaŋa pa Abraim ma Icaka bene lworo, pe obedo tuŋ bota, kono tin icwala adok tuwa ki ciŋa noŋo adada. Lubaŋa oneno twon aromana, ki tic ma atiyo ki ciŋa ci tin dyewor bene ojuki.’ ”" 
Genesis31:43 Laban ogamo kun dok iye bot Yakobo ni, “Anyira man gin anyirana, ki litino bene gin litinona, lim bene gin limma, ki gin ma ineno-ni gin ducu limma. Ento abitimo gin aŋo tin i kom anyirana-ni, nyo i kom litinogi ma gunywalo?" 
Genesis31:44 Doŋ ibin wek waket gicikke i kin in ki an, me bedo caden i kin in ki an.”" 
Genesis31:45 Ci Yakobo otino got ocibo wek obed wir. 
Genesis31:46 Ka Yakobo owaco bot utmegine ni, “Wucok got”, ci gucoko got, guguro kacel, ka gucamo cam i ŋet odur got meno," 
Genesis31:47 Laban ocako nyiŋ kabedo meno ni Jegarcaduta; ento Yakobo ocako nyiŋe ni Galeed. 
Genesis31:48 Laban owacci, “Odur man en aye caden i kin in ki an tin.” Mumiyo ocako nyiŋe Galeed." 
Genesis31:49 Ocako nyiŋ wir meno ni Mijpa, pien owacci, “Rwot ogwok kin an ki in, ka kinwa doŋ bipokke woko." 
Genesis31:50 Ka ibiketo giŋi marac i kom anyirana, nyo ka dok ibinyomo mon mukene, idodogi i kom anyirana, kadi ŋatti mo pe tye kwedwa, ber ipo ni Lubaŋa en aye caden i kin in ki an,”" 
Genesis31:51 Ci Laban dok owaco bot Yakobo ni, “Nen odur man, ki wir ma atyeko cibo i kin in ki an." 
Genesis31:52 Odur man aye caden, ki wir bene en caden, an pe abikato ka ŋet odur man pi cito boti, in bene pe ibikato ka ŋet odur man ki wir man pi cito bota, ni pi tim marac." 
Genesis31:53 Lubaŋa pa Abraim, Lubaŋa pa Nakor, Lubaŋa pa wongi, obed laŋolkop i kinwa.” Kit meno Yakobo okwoŋo kwoŋ ki nyiŋ Lubaŋa ma wonne Icaka lworo," 
Genesis31:54 Yakobo otyero gitum i wi got, kun olwoŋo iye utmegine ducu ka camo cam kwede, ci gucamo gubuto kunnu i wi got." 
Genesis31:55 Ka piny oru odiko con, Laban oa, onoto lem likwaye ki lem anyirane, olamo gum i komgi, ci opokke kwedgi odok i gaŋŋe.’" 
Genesis32:1 Yakobo omedde ki wotte ci lumalaika pa Rwot guromo kwede. 
Genesis32:2 Ka Yakobo onenogi, owacci, “Man mony pa Lubaŋa!” Mumiyo olwoŋo nyiŋ kabedo-nu ni Makanaim." 
Genesis32:3 Yakobo ocwalo lukwena bot ominne Ecau ma tye i lobo Ceir, i lobo pa jo Edom." 
Genesis32:4 Opwonyogi ni, “Wubiwaco bot laditta Ecau kit man: Laticci Yakobo owacci, ‘Doŋ atyeko bedo bot Laban abedo nio wa i kare-ni," 
Genesis32:5 Atye ki twoni ki lwak kana, ki lwak lim, ki lwak opii ki lwak aŋeca; acwalo kwena boti laditta wek anoŋ pwoc mo ki tuŋ boti.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Ka lukwena gudwogo bot Yakobo, guwacce ni, “Wao bot omeru Ecau, en obebino ka jolo wii i yo, kacel ki jo miya aŋwen.”" 
Genesis32:7 Lworo omako Yakobo matek kome bene oryaŋŋe woko; ci opoko kin jo ma onoŋo gitye kwede, ki dyegi ki dyaŋi, ki kinaga, dul aryo," 
Genesis32:8 kun tamo ni “Ka Ecau obino olwenyo i kom dul man acel-li otyeko woko, ci dul acel mudoŋ ca bibwot.”" 
Genesis32:9 Yakobo olego ni, “Ai Lubaŋa pa kwara Abraim, Lubaŋa pa wora Icaka, ai Rwot in ma yam iwacca ni, ‘Doŋ idok tuwu bot kakawu, an abitimi maber,’" 
Genesis32:10 an pe amyero kadi matidi mo ki mar meri ducu ma pe lokke, ki ada meri ducu ma inyuto i kom an laticci; pien con aŋolo kulu Jordan ma kun atye ki odoona keken, ci kombeddi doŋ apokke dul aryo kulu." 
Genesis32:11 Alegi ni ilara ki i ciŋ omera, lara ki i ciŋ Ecau; pien alwore, gwok nyo obebino ka nekowa ducu mon ki litinogi." 
Genesis32:12 Ento yam onoŋo ‘iwaco ni, ‘Abitimi ber, abimiyo likwayi bedo macalo kweyo ma i dog nam, ma pe kwanne pi dwoŋŋe.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 En obuto kenyo i nino meno, okwanyo dul lim mogo ma yam tye kwede ocwalo bot ominne Ecau," 
Genesis32:14 megi dyegi miya aryo ki nyogi dyegi pyeraryo, megi romi miya aryo ki nyogi romi pyeraryo," 
Genesis32:15 megi kinaga ma ginyeto cakgi pyeradek ki litinogi, megi dyaŋi pyeraŋwen ki twoni apar, megi kana pyeraryo ki twoni kana apar." 
Genesis32:16 Otiŋo man ducu, omiyo i ciŋ luticce, kun gilekogi dul ki dul patpat. Ociko luticce ni, “Wun wukat i nyima, wek kinwu obed mabocoboco ka wutye ka lekogi.”" 
Genesis32:17 Ociko latel yo ni, “Ka omera Ecau oromo kwedi, ce openyi ni, ‘Wun jo pa aŋa? Wucito kwene? Lim man ma i nyimwu-ni pa aŋa?’" 
Genesis32:18 Ibiwacce ni, ‘Lim pa laticci Yakobo; gin aye mot ma ocwalo bot laditte Ecau; en bene pud odoŋ ceŋ i newa.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Omedde ki pwonyo dano me aryo ki me adekke, ki gin ducu ma gileko lim, ocikogi ni, “Wubiloko lok ma romrom bot Ecau ka wuromo kwede," 
Genesis32:20 ka wubiwacce ni, ‘Dok bene laticci Yakobo aye odoŋ cen i ŋewa.’ ” Onoŋo otamo ni, “Wek akwe cwinye ki mot ma ocito anyim-mi, ci lacen olo abineno waŋe twal, dok en bene gwok doŋ bijola.”" 
Genesis32:21 Kit meno mot okwoŋo nyime, kun en kikome obuto i gony i dyewor meno." 
Genesis32:22 I dyewor meno en oa malo, ci okwanyo monne aryo, aŋecane aryo, kacel ki litinone apar wiye acel, owoto oŋolo kwedgi kulu Jabok i waŋ wat apara." 
Genesis32:23 Okwanyogi, omiyo guŋolo kulu, kacel ki lim ma ‘en tye kwede ducu." 
Genesis32:24 Yakobo ka odoŋ kene, laco mo obino, ocako rette kwede nio wa kwarpiny." 
Genesis32:25 Ka laco meno oneno ni pe doŋ etwero loyo Yakobo, ci otwomo awaŋ-macce; ci em Yakobo otuk owil woko lacuno ma en rette kwede." 
Genesis32:26 Owacce ni, “Weka doŋ aciti, pien piny doŋ mito ru woko.” Ento Yakobo ogamo ni, “Pe abiweki, nio waŋ ma koŋ ilamma gum.”" 
Genesis32:27 En ogamo ni, “Nyiŋi kono aŋa?” En owacci, “Yakobo.”" 
Genesis32:28 Ci dok owacce ni, “Nia tin nyiŋi doŋ pe gibilwoŋo ni Yakobo, ento ni Icrael, pien ibedo ka lweny ki Lubaŋa, dok ki dano bene, ci imedo ki loyo.”" 
Genesis32:29 Yakobo dok openye ni, “Alegi ni itucca nyiŋi do.” En owacce ni, “Ipenyo nyiŋa kono piŋo?” Omiye gum ka kenyo." 
Genesis32:30 Ci Yakobo ocako nyiŋ kabedo meno ni, Peniel, kun wacci, “Pien atyeko neno Lubaŋa waŋ ki waŋ, ento pud akwo gira aye.”" 
Genesis32:31 Ceŋ otucce i Peniel kun doŋ woto ma komo akoma pi eme ma otuk owil woko-ni. 
Genesis32:32 Omiyo wa i kare man Luicrael gikwero riŋo puc me bam ma tye i awaŋ-mac, pien Lubaŋa otwomo me Yakobo i ler awaŋ-mac," 
Genesis33:1 Ka Yakobo otiŋo waŋe malo, ci oneno ka Ecau bino, kacel ki jone miya aŋwen, Ocako poko litino i kin Lea ki Lakeri ki bot aŋecane aryo-ni." 
Genesis33:2 Ocwalo aŋeca ki litinogi anyim, ka dok Lea ki litinone, ka doŋ Lakeri ki Yucepu gucoko korgi ducu." 
Genesis33:3 En kikome obolle, ocito anyim, kun woto ryebbe piny tyen abiro nio ka oo kwede cok bot ominne." 
Genesis33:4 Ento Ecau otokke ki ŋwec, oriŋo ka mote, ci opoto okwako kore, ka omako ŋute, onoto leme, ci gucako koko." 
Genesis33:5 Ka dok Ecau otiŋo waŋe malo, ci oneno lwak mon ki litinogi, owacci, “Maca kono jo mene ma gibino-ni?” Yakobo ogamo ni, “Meno aye gin litino ma Lubaŋa omiyo ki laticci pi kicane.”" 
Genesis33:6 Ka aŋeca gunyiko cok, kacel ki litinogi, ci guryebbe piny;" 
Genesis33:7 Lea bene kit meno kacel ki litinone ka gunyiko cok ci guryebbe piny; me agikkine Yucepu ki Lakeri gunyiko cok, gin bene guryebbe piny." 
Genesis33:8 Ecau owacci, “Lwak man ma arwatte kwedgi ducu, te lokke aŋo?” Yakobo ogamo ni, “Wek anen maber-ber i nyim laditta.”" 
Genesis33:9 Ento Ecau owacci, “An atye ki ma roma, omera; wek lim man ducu gubed meri.”" 
Genesis33:10 Yakobo ogamo ni, “Aa, pe. Alegi ni, ka ineno an ayomo cwinyi, ci ber igam mot ma amiyi ki ciŋa-ni; pien ada, ka aneno waŋi, rom ki ma aneno waŋ Lubaŋa, pi kit cwiny maber ma ijola kwede-ni." 
Genesis33:11 Alegi igam mot ma amiyo gikelo boti-ni, pien Lubaŋa doŋ onyuto kicane i koma, dok bene atye ki mera ma roma.” Obedo ka ride ki lok meno, nio ka oye, ogamo motte." 
Genesis33:12 Lacen Ecau owacci, “Wek doŋ wanywaku yo kacel, kun atelo nyimi.”" 
Genesis33:13 Ento Yakobo ogamo ni, “Laditta, iŋeyo ni litino pud peya guteggi, dok atye ka gwoko romi ki dyaŋi ma pud gidoto litinogi; ka wamiyogi wot malac, bibwoyogi woko, kadi bed pi nino acel, lim ducu gibito woko." 
Genesis33:14 Wek in laditta iwot, icit anyim i nyim laticci, kun an alubo kori motmot, muporo wot pa lim mutella yo, ki wot pa litino, nio ka abio boti i Ceir.”" 
Genesis33:15 Ecau ogamo ni, “Wek awek boti jo mogo ma abino kwedgi-ni.” Ento en owacci, “Gimitte piŋo? Laditta, tima ber, wek doŋ obed kit meno.”" 
Genesis33:16 Kumeno Ecau ocako wot i nino meno me dok i Ceir. 
Genesis33:17 Yakobo owoto odok mere tuŋ Cukot, ogero ode pire kene dok oguro dwol dyaŋine. Mumiyo nyiŋ kabedo meno gilwoŋo ni Cukot." 
Genesis33:18 Lacen Yakobo oo ki kuc i gaŋ me Cekem, ma tye i lobo Kanaan, kun oa ki i Paddan-aram; oguro kemane i nyim gaŋ," 
Genesis33:19 Dul-latin lobo ma oguro iye kema-ni, owilo ki bot litino pa Kamor, ma won Cekem, ki wellim ma romo miya acel." 
Genesis33:20 Ocano keno tyer kunnu, ci olwoŋo ni El-Eloe-Icrael." 
Genesis34:1 Dina nya pa Lea, ma onywalo ki Yakobo, ocito ka limo mon ma i lobo meno." 
Genesis34:2 Cekem wod pa Kamor ma Lakiv, laker me lobo meno, ka onene, ci omake tektek obuto kwede, omiye lewic." 
Genesis34:3 Cwinye omaro Dina nya pa Yakobo; omaro nyako, kun loko kwede mot mupye," 
Genesis34:4 Cekem oloko ki wonne Kamor ni, “Nyomma nyako man, obed dakona.”" 
Genesis34:5 Yakobo owinyo ni otyeko ronyo nyare Dina; ento onoŋo awobene gitye ki limme i olet. Yakobo odiyo cwinye, oliŋ gire mot, nio ka gudwogo," 
Genesis34:6 Kamor won Cekem ocito bot Yakobo ka penyo keny. 
Genesis34:7 Ka awobe pa Yakobo guwinyo lok meno, gua ki i olet, gudwogo, ci gukeco, kiniga omakogi, pien otimo gin ma pe myero i Icrael, pi buta ki nya pa Yakobo, pien kit tim macalo meno pe myero otimme." 
Genesis34:8 Kamor oloko kwedgi kun waco ni, “Tipo kom woda doŋ omaro nyawu; alegowu, wuwek en onyom nyawu, obed dakone." 
Genesis34:9 Wek nyomme obed i kinwa kwedwu; wumi anyirawu botwa, wun bene wunyom anyirawa, wuter." 
Genesis34:10 Wun wubibedo kwedwa, wubibedo i lobo-ni macalo wumito; wubed iye wucat iye wilwu, wek wulim iye lim.”" 
Genesis34:11 Cekem bene owaco kit meno bot won nyako ki omegine, ni, “Ber wujol kennya, abikelo botwu lim ducu ma wuŋolla." 
Genesis34:12 Wuŋolla wel lim kit ma wumito ducu ki me ayal, abikolo lim kit ma wubiwacca; ento wumiya anyom nyako-ni obed dakona.”" 
Genesis34:13 Awobe pa Yakobo gugamo dog Cekem ki wonne Kamor kun gibwologi abwola, pien oronyo lamingi Dina." 
Genesis34:14 Guwaco botgi ni, “Pe watwero tiyo iye gin mo, ento miyo laminwa bot dano ma pe giliro, meno bikelo lewic i komwa." 
Genesis34:15 Tye yo acel keken; ka otimme, ci miyo waye, en ene: ka wudoko macalo wan, ka dano acel acel ma laco i kinwu olirre." 
Genesis34:16 Miyo wan doŋ wabimiyowu anyirawa, ki wan bene doŋ wabinyomo anyirawu; ci doŋ wabibedo i kinwu macalo wat acel." 
Genesis34:17 Ento ka pe wuwinyo lokwa, ka wukwero Lirre, ci wakwanyo nyawa, waa, wacito giwa.”" 
Genesis34:18 Lokgi oyomo cwiny Kamor ki wode Cekem. 
Genesis34:19 Latin awobi orune ka timo woko cut, pien onoŋo cwinye yom i kom nya pa Yakobo, Onoŋo yam giwore makato jo ducu ma i ot pa wonne." 
Genesis34:20 Kit meno Kamor ki wode Cekem gucito i dog gaŋgi, ci guwaco bot jo me gaŋgi ni," 
Genesis34:21 “Jo man gimer kwedwa; waweku gin gubed i lobo, gucat wilgi iye; nen, lobo-ni tye malac ma romogi; wuwek wanyom anyiragi, wek wami gin bene gunyom anyirawa," 
Genesis34:22 Tye lok acel ma bimiyo giye bedo i kinwa, en aye bedo wat acel, ka laco acel acel i kinwa bilirre, kit macalo gin gilirre." 
Genesis34:23 Pe limgi, ki lonyogi ki lwak lee ma tye i ciŋgi ducu gibidoko limwa? Ber waye lokgi wek gubed kwedwa.”" 
Genesis34:24 Ci jo ducu ma guwok ki i dog gaŋ guwinyo lok pa Kamor ki wode Cekem; co ducu ki acel acel gulirre, lwak ducu ma guwok ki i dog gaŋ meno." 
Genesis34:25 Ka nino okato adek, ma doŋ bur okwok, ci awobe pa Yakobo aryo, Cimeon ki Levi, omegi Dina, gukwanyo pala lucwan, gucito, guturo ki donyo i gaŋ ma pe wegine giŋeyo, ci guneko co woko ducu." 
Genesis34:26 Ka guneko Kamor ki wode Cekem ki pala lucwan, ci gukwanyo Dina woko ki i ot pa Cekem, gucito kwede." 
Genesis34:27 Awobe pa Yakobo gucorre i gaŋ pa luto, guyako iye jamigi pi ronyo lamingi." 
Genesis34:28 Guyako dyegigi ki dyaŋigi, ki lwak kana, ki jami ducu ma tye i gaŋ ki ma tye i potti bene." 
Genesis34:29 Guyako lwak lonyogi ducu, ki litinogi ducu ki mon megi, ki jami ma i odigi ducu, gutero matwal." 
Genesis34:30 Ci Yakobo owaco bot Cimeon ki Levi ni, “Wun wukelo ayela i koma, wumiyo nyiŋa odoko ŋwe lituny i kin wegi lobo-ni, Lukanaan ki Luperiji, An lwakka nok mo, ka ce gucokke kacel me lweny kweda, gibityeka woko liweŋ, an kacel ki oda ducu.”" 
Genesis34:31 Ento gugamo ni, “Myero doŋ gubed ki laminwa macalo lakwele bo?”" 
Genesis35:1 Lubaŋa owaco bot Yakobo ni, “A woko icit i Betel, wek ibed kunnu; dok ican keno tyer kunnu ka ma yam an anen iye boti i kare ma iriŋo ilwi woko ki bot omeru Ecau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Omiyo Yakobo owaco bot jo ma i ode ki jo ducu ma gibedo bote ni, “Wubol lwak cal lubaŋa pa lurok ma wutye kwedgi i kinwu-ni, wulonnye kenwu, wulok ginarukawu;" 
Genesis35:3 ka doŋ waayu, wacitu woko wa i Betel, wek acit acan keno tyer pi Lubaŋa ma yam ogamo doga i nino ma yam can odiŋani, ma obedo kweda i kabedo ducu ma awoto iye.”" 
Genesis35:4 Gumiyo ki Yakobo cal ducu, ki agit ma noŋo tye i itgi bene; ci cal lubaŋa pa lurok ma gitye kwede Yakobo oyikogi piny i te yat kworo ma yam tye cok ki Cekem." 
Genesis35:5 Ka gitye ka wot, lworo ma oa ki bot Lubaŋa opoto i kom wegi gaŋi ma tye cok kwedgi, omiyo pe gulubo kor awobe pa Yakobo." 
Genesis35:6 Yakobo otiro i Luj ma en aye Betel, ma tye i lobo Kanaan, en kacel ki lwak dano ducu ma yam gitye kwede." 
Genesis35:7 Ocano keno tyer kunnu, olwoŋo nyiŋ kabedo meno ni El-betel pien onoŋo Lubaŋa yam onen iye bote i kare ma olwi oriŋo woko ki bot ominne." 
Genesis35:8 Debola lapidi pa Labeka oto woko, ci giyike i te yat kworo ma i ŋet Betel; mumiyo nyiŋ kabedo meno gilwoŋo ni Alon-bakut." 
Genesis35:9 Lubaŋa dok onyutte bot Yakobo i kare ma en oa ki i Paddan-aram, ci omiye gum." 
Genesis35:10 Lubaŋa owacce ni, “Nyiŋi Yakobo; pe dok gibilwoŋo nyiŋi ni Yakobo, ento nyiŋi doŋ bibedo Icrael.” Omiyo nyiŋe odoko Icrael." 
Genesis35:11 Lubaŋa dok owacce ni, “An Lubaŋa Matwero-ducu; nywal, inya; rok ki lwak rok mapol bia i komi, ki luker bene gibia ki i komi." 
Genesis35:12 Lobo ma yam amiyo ki Abraim ki Icaka abimiyo boti, ka dok abimiyo lobo bot likwayi ma gibilubi.”" 
Genesis35:13 Lubaŋa ocako a ki i kabedo ka ma yam oloko iye kwede-ni odok malo. 
Genesis35:14 Ci Yakobo ocibo wii i kabedo ka ma oloko iye kwede-ni, ocibo iye wir got; oonyo gityer amata i keme, ka oliyo moo i kome." 
Genesis35:15 Yakobo ocako nyiŋ kabedo ma Lubaŋa oloko iye kwede-ni ni Betel. 
Genesis35:16 Gumedde ki wot nia ki i Betel: i kare ma pud Eprat kiborbor, mwoc Ogoyo Lakeri, ci nyodone obedo tek," 
Genesis35:17 Ka doŋ nyodone obedo tek, dako lacolo owacce ni, “Pe ilwor; tin doki ibinywalo latin laco mukene.”" 
Genesis35:18 I kare ma en to ma cwinye cok ka tum, ocako nyiŋ latinne ni. Benoni; ento wonne ocako nyiŋe ni Benjamin." 
Genesis35:19 Lakeri oto woko kit meno, ci giyike i yo ma cito Eprat, ma en aye Beterekem." 
Genesis35:20 Yakobo ocibo wir got i wi lyel pa Lakeri; meno wir lyel pa Lakeri ma pud tye ocuŋ kunnu nio wa i kare man. 
Genesis35:21 Icrael omedde ki wotte, ogony i ŋe lubele me Eder ma wiye ocudo malo." 
Genesis35:22 I kare ma Icrael tye i lobo meno, ci wode Reuben otimo caro, obuto ki ci-wonne Bila ma aŋeca; ci wonne owinyo pire bene. Yakobo yam tye ki awobene apar wiye aryo," 
Genesis35:23 Litino awobe pa Lea gin aye Reuben, latin kayo pa Yakobo, Cimeon, Levi, Juda, Icakar ki Jabulon." 
Genesis35:24 Litino awobe pa Lakeri gin aye Yucepu ki Benjamin. 
Genesis35:25 Litino awobe pa Bila, aŋeca: pa Lakeri, gin aye Dan ki Naputali." 
Genesis35:26 Litino awobe pa Jilpa, aŋeca pa Lea, gin aye Gad ki Acer. Meno gin aye litino awobe pa Yakobo ma ginywalogi i Paddan-aram." 
Genesis35:27 Yakobo obino bot wonne Icaka i Mamre, i Kiriat-arba, en aye Kebron ka ma yam Abraim ki Icaka gubedo iye." 
Genesis35:28 Icaka yam ori wi lobo mwaka miya acel ki pyeraboro," 
Genesis35:29 Icaka oomo cwinye me agikkine, oto woko ci odok oto, lutugi, dano muteggi, ma doŋ oti; ci awobene Ecau ki Yakobo guyiko kome." 
Genesis36:1 Man-aye likwayo pa Ecau, en Edom." 
Genesis36:2 Ecau onyomo anyira Kanaan: Ada nya pa Elon Lakit, Okolibama nya pa Ana, wod pa Jibeon Lakiv," 
Genesis36:3 ki Bacemat nya pa Icmael, lamin Nebayot," 
Genesis36:4 Ada onywalo ki Ecau Erifaji; Bacemat onywalo Reuel; 
Genesis36:5 ki Okolibama onywalo Jeuc, Jalam ki Kora; meno aye litino awobe ma ginywalo ki Ecau i lobo Kanaan." 
Genesis36:6 Ecau otero monne ki litino awobene ki anyirane, ki lwak jo ducu ma en tye kwede, ki limme, lee mere ducu ki lonyone ducu ma olimogi ki i lobo Kanaan, odak kwedgi i lobo mukene kun opokke ki ominne Yakobo." 
Genesis36:7 Onoŋo gin ducu gitye ki lim madwoŋ, ma pe doŋ romogi bedo kacel: pien lobo ma onoŋo gibedo iye pe romo me kwayo limgi," 
Genesis36:8 Omiyo Ecau odak obedo i lobo godi me Ceir; Ecau en aye Edom. 
Genesis36:9 Likwayo pa Ecau won jo Edom ma i lobo godi me Ceir gin ene. 
Genesis36:10 Man aye nyiŋ litino awobe pa Ecau: Erifaji wod pa Ada ma, dako pa Ecau, ki Reuel wod pa Bacemat dako pa Ecau." 
Genesis36:11 Litino awobe pa Erifaji gin Teman Omar Jepo, Gatam ki Kenaj." 
Genesis36:12 Timna yam en dako pa Erifaji, wod pa Ecau, ma aŋeca; onywalo Amalek ki Erifaji. Man gin aye litino awobe pa Ada, dako pa Ecau." 
Genesis36:13 Man gin aye litino awobe pa Reuel: Nakat, Jera Cama ki Mija. Man aye litino awobe pa Bacemat dako pa Ecau," 
Genesis36:14 Man aye litino awobe pa Okolibama nya pa Ana wod pa Jibeon, dako pa Ecau; onywalo ki Ecau awobe magi: Jeuc, Jalam ki Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Magi aye litino awobe pa Ecau ma rwodi. Litino awobe pa Erifaji latin ka yo pa Ecau gin ene: rwot Teman rwot Omar, rwot Jepo, rwot Kenaj:" 
Genesis36:16 rwot Kora, rwot Gatam rwot Amalek; magi aye rwodi pa’ Erifaji ma i lobo Edom; gin aye awobe pa Ada," 
Genesis36:17 Magi aye litino awobe pa Reuel wod pa Ecau: rwot Nakat, rwot Jera rwot Cama ki rwot Mija; meno aye ‘rwodi pa Reuel ma i lobo Edom; gin aye litino awobe pa Bacemat, dako pa Ecau," 
Genesis36:18 Magi aye litino awobe pa Okilibama dako pa Ecau: rwot Jeuc rwot Jalam ki rwot Kora: meno gin aye rwodi ma Okolibama nya pa Ana, dako pa Ecau, onywalo." 
Genesis36:19 Gin aye litino awobe pa Ecau, en aye Edom; meno aye gin rwodigi." 
Genesis36:20 Magi aye awobe pa Ceir Lakori, ma gin wegi lobo-nu: Lotan, Cobal, Jibeon, Ana," 
Genesis36:21 Dicon, Ejer ki Dican; magi aye rwodi pa jo Kori, litino awobe pa Ceir ma i lobo Edom." 
Genesis36:22 Litino awobe pa Lotan gin aye Kori ki Eman; ki lamin Lotan en Timna. 
Genesis36:23 Magi aye litino awobe pa Cobal: Alvan, Manakat, Ebal, Cepo ki Onamo" 
Genesis36:24 Magi aye litino awobe pa Jibeon: Aiya, ki Ana; en aye Ana ma yam onoŋo waŋ pii amuro ma tye i tim, i kare ma en tye ka kwayo lwak kana pa wonne Jibeon." 
Genesis36:25 Magi aye Ilitno pa Ana: Dicon ki Okolibama, nya pa Ana." 
Genesis36:26 Magi aye litino awobe pa Dicon: Kemdan, Eciban, Itran ki Keran." 
Genesis36:27 Magi aye litino awobe pa Ejer: Bilan, Jaavan ki Akan." 
Genesis36:28 Magi aye litino awobe pa Dican: Uj ki Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Magi aye rwodi pa jo Kori: rwot Lotan, rwot Cobal, rwot Jibeon, rwot Ana," 
Genesis36:30 rwot Dicon, rwot Ejer ki rwot Dican; meno aye rwodi pa jo Koti, kit ma calo kakagi tye kwede i lobo Ceir." 
Genesis36:31 Magi aye luker ma guloyo lobo Edom, ma onoŋo pud peya kabaka mo oloyo jo Icrael." 
Genesis36:32 Bela wod pa Beor onoŋo loyo Edom, nyiŋ gaŋ kalle gilwoŋo ni Dinkaba." 
Genesis36:33 Ka Bela oto, ci Jobab wod pa Jera me Bojra oleyo ka tyene." 
Genesis36:33 Ka Bela oto, ci Jobab wod pa Jera me Bojra oleyo ka tyene." 
Genesis36:34 Ka Jobab oto, ci Kucam mua ki i lobo pa jo Teman oleyo ka tyene." 
Genesis36:34 Ka Jobab oto, ci Kucam mua ki i lobo pa jo Teman oleyo ka tyene." 
Genesis36:35 Ka Kucam oto, ci Adad wod pa Bedad oleyo ka tyene. En con olwenyo, oloyo jo Midian ma gitye i lobo Moab; nyiŋ gaŋ kalle gilwoŋo Avit." 
Genesis36:36 Ka Adad oto ci Camla me Macireka oleyo ka tyene. 
Genesis36:37 Ka Camla oto, ci Caul me Rekobot ma tye i dog kulu Euprate oleyo ka tyene." 
Genesis36:38 Ka Caul oto, ci Baal-kanan wod pa Akbor oleyo ka tyene." 
Genesis36:39 Ka Baal-kanan wod pa Akbor oto, ci Kadar oleyo ka tyene; nyiŋ gaŋ kalle gilwoŋo Pau. Nyiŋ dakone Meketabel, nya pa Matred, nya pa Mejakab." 
Genesis36:40 Magi aye nyiŋ rwodi ma tuŋ bot Ecau, macalo doggolagi tye kwede, ki kabedogi, ma lubo nyiŋgi: rwot Timna, rwot Alva, rwot Jetet," 
Genesis36:41 rwot Okolibama rwot. Ela rwot Pinon," 
Genesis36:42 rwot Kenaj, rwot Teman, rwot Mibjar," 
Genesis36:43 rwot Magdiel ki rwot Iram; magi aye rwodi pa jo Edom, en aye Ecau, ma kwaro pa jo Edom, kit ma yam gibedo kwede i kabedogi, i lobo ma odoko megi." 
Genesis37:1 Yakobo obedo i lobo ma yam koŋ wonne obedo iye-ni, lobo me Kanaan." 
Genesis37:2 Man aye lok me tekwaro pa Yakobo. Ka Yucepu doŋ ditte oromo mwaka apar wiye abiro, onoŋo doŋ kwayo lim kacel ki omege; en obedo ki litino awobe pa Bila ki Jilpa, mon pa wonne; Yucepu okelo lok maraco i komgi bot wongi." 
Genesis37:3 Yakobo onoŋo maro Yucepu makato litinone ducu pien onoŋo en latin ma ginywalo ka wi tiyone; okwone kanyi mabor ma bade boco. 
Genesis37:4 Ento ka omegine ‘guneno ni wongi maro en makato gin ducu, cwinygi ocako kwere woko, pe gitwero lok kwede maber." 
Genesis37:5 Ka Yucepu oleko lek, ci otito bot omegine, ci gumedde ameda ki kwere." 
Genesis37:6 En otito botgi ni, “Koŋ wuwiny kit lek ma aleko-ni:" 
Genesis37:7 nen ba, i kare ma wabedo ka tweyo larita i poto, ci nen, laritana oa malo ocuŋ atir; ci laritawu gugurre, gurume dyere, ka giryebbe piny bot laritana.”" 
Genesis37:8 Omegine gugamo ni, “In ada ibiloyowa? In aye doŋ ibiloyo wiwa?” Gumedde ki kwere doŋ marac pi lekke ki pi lokke." 
Genesis37:9 Dok oleko lek mukene, dok otito ki omegine aye, kun wacci, “Nenu ba, dok aleko lek mukene aye. Nen, ceŋ ki dwe ki lakalatwe apar wiye acel gubedo ka ryebbe piny i nyima.”" 
Genesis37:10 Ka otito bot wonne ki bot omegine, wonne ocoke, ojuke matek, kun wacce ni, “Meno kit lek aŋo ma ileko kumene-ni? An ki meni ki omegini wabibino, ci wapoto waryebbe piny i nyimi ada?”" 
Genesis37:11 Nyeko omako omegine i kome ento wonne okano lok meno i cwinye. 
Genesis37:12 Ka omegine gucito ka kwayo lim pa wongi ma cok ki Cekem," 
Genesis37:13 ci Icrael owaco bot Yucepu ni, “Omegini pe gitye ka kwat i ŋet Cekem? Bin wek aori icit botgi.” En ogamo doge ni, “An a ene”." 
Genesis37:14 Ci owacce ni, “Koŋ, icinen ka omegini gitye maber, kacel ki lim bene, ka idwokka lok doki.” Ka ocwale nia ki i nota me Kebron, ci ocito wa i Cekem." 
Genesis37:15 Laco mo onoŋe ka woto juŋŋe atata i olet; laco meno openye ni, “In ibeyenyo aŋo?”" 
Genesis37:16 En ogamo ni, “Abeyenyo omegina. Alegi ititta ka ma gitye iye ka kwayo limgi.”" 
Genesis37:17 Laco meno owacce ni, “Doŋ gutyeko a woko, pien awinyo ka giwaco ni, ‘Wacitu wa i Dotan’” Yucepu ocako lubo kor omegine, ka onoŋogi i Dotan." 
Genesis37:18 Ka gunene ki ka mabor, ma onoŋo peya oo botgi cok, ci guyubo lok i kome me neke," 
Genesis37:19 kun giloko kekengi ni, “Lalek eno bino-nu," 
Genesis37:20 Wubin tin wa neke woko, wek wabole i bur mo kany; ci wabitito ni, ‘ŋuu mo aye omake, omwode woko’, wek wanen kit ma lekke-nu bicobbe kwede.”" 
Genesis37:21 Reuben owinyo yub meno, ci olare ki i ciŋgi, kun wacci, “Pe wan aye waneke.”" 
Genesis37:22 Reuben owacogi dok ni, “Pe giony remone mo; wubole woko i bur man ma tye i tim kany, ento pe wuket ciŋwu i kome.” Onoŋo en oyubbe me kwanye woko ki i ciŋgi pi dwoke bot wonne." 
Genesis37:23 Ka Yucepu oo bot omegine, ci gupoto i kome, gulunyo boŋo kanyine woko, kanyi mabor ma bade boco ma onoŋo oruko-ni;" 
Genesis37:24 ci gumake, gutere gubole woko i bur. Bur meno onoŋo pii pe iye." 
Genesis37:25 Lacen gubedo piny ka cam; ka gutiŋo wangi, ci guneno lwak jo Icmael ma gua i Gilead, ki lwak kinaga ma gutiŋo yec odok, moo yat too ki murra, ma giwoto gicito kwede i Ejipt," 
Genesis37:26 Juda dok owaco ki omegine ni, “Konyo aŋo ka waneko ominwa dok wamuno tone woko?" 
Genesis37:27 Wubin wek wacatu en bot jo Icmael, pe wan aye waneke ki ciŋwa, pien en ominwa, remowa kikome.” Ci omegiŋe guworo doge." 
Genesis37:28 Jo Midian ma lucatwil gubino kenyo; ci guywayo Yucepu woko ki i bur, gucate woko bot jo Icmael, kun giwile ki cekel me ryal pyeraryo; ci gutero Yucepu wa i Ejipt." 
Genesis37:29 Ka Reuben odwogo i dog bur, ci oneno Yucepu doŋ pe i bur, ci cwinye ocwer ocako yeco boŋone woko." 
Genesis37:30 Ka odok cen bot omegine, owacogi ni “Awobi-ni doŋ pe do; man abidok kwene ba?”" 
Genesis37:31 Ka gukwanyo kanyi pa Yucepu, ci guneko dyel, ka guluto kanyi i remo;" 
Genesis37:32 ka gukelo kanyi mabor ma bade boco bot wongi, kun giwaco ni, “Wan wanoŋo man; koŋ iŋi, ka nyo kanyi pa wodi onyo pe.”" 
Genesis37:33 Ka oŋiyo, ci owacci, “Man kanyi pa woda do; ŋuu doŋ omwode woko do; adada Yucepu doŋ ŋuu okido woko matitino do.”" 
Genesis37:34 Yakobo bene cwinye ocwer, ocako yeco boŋone, ci otweyo boŋo cola i pyere, obedo ka koko wode pi kare malac," 
Genesis37:35 Awobene ducu ki anyirane gua malo gucito ka kweyo cwinye; okwero ni pe gikwe cwinye, kun wacci, “Aa pe, abilubo kor latinna i lyel ki koko.” Wonne obedo ka koke kit meno." 
Genesis37:36 Ci jo Midian gucato Yucepu woko i Ejipt bot Potipar, ladit tic pa Parao, ma loyo askari Lukur-piny," 
Genesis38:1 I kare meno Juda oa woko ki bot omegine, ocito odak bot laco mo ma i Adulam, ma nyiŋe Kira," 
Genesis38:2 Juda oneno nya pa Lakanaan mo ma nyiŋe Cua; ci onyomo, ka obedo kwede." 
Genesis38:3 Ci ogamo ic, onywalo latin laco, wonne ocako nyiŋe Er." 
Genesis38:4 Dako dok ogamo, onywalo latin laco, ocako nyiŋe Onan." 
Genesis38:5 Dok ogamo ic aye, onywalo latin laco, ocako nyiŋe Cela, Latin meno en onywalo i Kejib." 
Genesis38:6 Juda onyomo nyako ma nyiŋe Tamar ki wode Er ma latin kayone. 
Genesis38:7 Ento Er latin kayo pa Juda yam onoŋo dano marac i nyim Rwot, ci Rwot oneke woko." 
Genesis38:8 Ci Juda owaco bot Onan ni, “Dony i wi ci-omeru, ci ibed kwede macalo won ot, wek inywal kwede wi omeru.”" 
Genesis38:9 Ento Onan oŋeyo ni litino pe bibedo mere; pi meno ka odonyo i wi ci-ominne, ci onyeto kodine piny, wek pe enywal kwede wi ominne." 
Genesis38:10 Gin ma otimo pe oyomo cwiny Rwot, ci oneke woko bene," 
Genesis38:11 Juda dok owaco bot ci-wode Tamar ni, “Koŋ doŋ ibed macalo daa-to i ot pa woru, nio waŋ ma woda Cela bidoŋo”, pien onoŋo lworo ni gwok bito woko, macalo omegine. Kit meno Tamar odok obedo i ot pa wonne." 
Genesis38:12 Ka kare okato, ci dako pa Juda ma nya pa Cua-ni oto woko. Ka cwiny Juda doŋ opye, ci ocito i Timna bor luŋol yer romine, onywako yo ki lareme Kira ma La-adulam." 
Genesis38:13 Ka gitito bot Tamar ni, “Kwaru okato obecito i Timna ka ŋolo yer rom ine”," 
Genesis38:14 ci olunyo boŋo cola me dalako woko, ka oumme ki kitambara, odwalo ki kome woko ducu, ka ocito obedo kwede i dogcel me Enaim, ma okemo yo me Timna; pien onoŋo oneno ni kadi bed Cela doŋ oteggi, ento peya gimiye ni olake." 
Genesis38:15 Ka Juda onene, ci otamo ni gwok dako lakwele mo, pien onoŋo en oumo waŋe woko ducu," 
Genesis38:16 Ka ocito bote ka ma obedo iye i ŋet yo, owacce ni, “Bin wek abed kwedi,” kun pe ŋeyo ni ci-wode. En ogamo ni, “Ibimiya gin aŋo kono, ka wek ibin ibed kweda?”" 
Genesis38:17 En odok iye ni, “Abikwanyo latin dyel ki i kin dyegina, acwalli.” Dako-nu ogamo ni, “Ibijeno gin aŋo bota, ka doŋ ibicwalla?”" 
Genesis38:18 Ogamo ni, “In imito ajeŋŋi gin aŋo?” En odok iye ni, “Agit meri, ki tolli, ki odooni ma tye i ciŋi-ni.” Ci otiŋo omiyogi ducu bote, ka odonyo obedo kwede, ci dako-nu oyac kwede." 
Genesis38:19 Dako oa okato ocito gire woko, olunyo boŋo kitambara ma oumme kwede-ni, ka doŋ oruko boŋo cola me dalako." 
Genesis38:20 Ka Juda ocwalo La-adulam ma lareme pi terre latin dyel, wek odwokke jami ma yam ojeŋo bot dako-nu, pe omedo ki noŋo kome." 
Genesis38:21 Obedo ka penyo jo ma i kabedo-nu ni, “Dako mo ma lakwele-ni tye kwene, ma onoŋo yam bedo i ŋet yo Enaim?” Guwacce ni, “Lakwele mo pe obedo kany.”" 
Genesis38:22 Ka odok cen bot Juda, ci owacce ni, “Pe amedo ki noŋo dako-nu; ki jo ma i kabedo meno bene guwacci, ‘Lakwele mo pe yam obedo kunnu.’ ”" 
Genesis38:23 Juda ogamo ni, “Wek doŋ oter jami-nu obed mere, giwek nyerowa; nen, acwalo latin dyel man, ci noŋo kome aye oloyi.”" 
Genesis38:24 Ka dwe adek okato, ci gitito ki Juda ni, “Ci-wodi Tamar obedo ka timme kwele kwele, ci doŋ oyac woko ki tim kwelene-ni.” Juda owacci, “Wukele woko, wek giwaŋe woko.”" 
Genesis38:25 Ka gitye ka kele woko, ci en ocwalo lok bot kwarone, ni “Won jami man en aye ayac kwede.” Dok onwoyo aye ni, “Alegi ŋi inigi, Agit, ki tol ki odoo-nu jami pa aŋa kaa?”" 
Genesis38:26 Juda oŋiyogi, ci otuco kun waco ni, “Dako man kite atir makata woko, pien pe amedo ki miyo en bot woda Cela.” Pe bene omedo ki bedo kwede." 
Genesis38:27 Ka kare me gonnyene oromo, ci onen ni litino rudi tye i iye." 
Genesis38:28 Ka mwoc doŋ ogoye, latin ocwalo ciŋe woko, ci lacolo otweyo uci makwar i ciŋe, kun wacci, “Man aye okwoŋo katti woko.”" 
Genesis38:29 Ka doŋ oŋunyo ciŋe, odwoko cen, nen, ominne aye dok okatti woko, ci dako-nu owacci, “In doŋ ituro ki baro dye ic, ikatti woko niŋniŋ?” Mumiyo gicako nyiŋe Perej." 
Genesis38:30 Ka lacen ominne dok ginywalo kun uci makwar-tye i ciŋe; ci gicako nyiŋe jera. 
Genesis39:1 Gitero Yucepu woko i Ejipt, ci Potipar ladit tic pa Parao, ma loyo askari lukur-piny, ma Laejipt, owilo en woko ki bot jo Icmael ma gutere kunnu-ni." 
Genesis39:2 Rwot yam tye ki Yucepu, ci odoko lakomegum; ocako bedo gire i ot pa laditte ma Laejipt;" 
Genesis39:3 ci laditte bene oneno ni Rwot tye kwede, pien Rwot omiyo gin ducu ma en tiyo bedo maber." 
Genesis39:4 Cwiny Potipar obedo, yom i kom Yucepu, ci odoko laticce. Ocako kete obedo ladit ma loyo ode ki jamine ducu." 
Genesis39:5 Nia i kare meno ma okete obedo ladit ma loyo ode, ki lalo jamine ducu, Rwot ocako miyo gum obedo i ot pa Laejipt meno pi Yucepu; gum pa Rwot opoto i kom jami ma yam tyekwede ducu, ma i ot ki ma i poto-gu." 
Genesis39:6 Ci Potipar omiyo jami ducu i te loc pa Yucepu; pi bedo kwede omiyo doŋ pe paro gin mo, kono pi cam keken ma en camo-ni. Onoŋo Yucepu nen mabulobulo, dok mwonya matek." 
Genesis39:7 Lacen dako pa laditte cwinye ocako pyette i kom Yucepu, ci owacce ni, “Wabut kwedi.”" 
Genesis39:8 Ento en okwero woko, ci owaco bot ci-laditte ni, “Nen ba, pi bedona kany omiyo laditta pe doŋ paro pi gin mo ma tye i ot-ti, dok otyeko keto gin ducu ma etye kwede i ciŋa." 
Genesis39:9 En pe doŋ tye ki dit makato an i ot man, pe tye gin mo ma dok okano ma peya omiyo i ciŋa, kono in keken, pien in i dakone. An dok acorre ka tiyo bal madit marac kuman niŋniŋ, kun atimo wa bal i kom Lubaŋa kulu?”" 
Genesis39:10 Kadi bed dako meno obedo ka bito Yucepu jwijwi, pe omedo ki winyo lokke, pe oye buto kwede, kadi bedo kwede." 
Genesis39:11 Ento ka nino mo acel owec, ma, onoŋo laco mo pe i ot, ka Yucepu odonyo i ot ka tiyo ticce," 
Genesis39:12 ci dako-nu omake ki boŋone, kun wacci, “But kweda.” Ento Yucepu omwomme oweko boŋone i ciŋe, okato gire woko ki i ot." 
Genesis39:13 Ka dako-nu oneno en oweko boŋone i ciŋe, omwomme gire oka-to woko ki i ot," 
Genesis39:14 ci olwoŋo co ma gibedo i ode, ci otittigi ni, “Nenu, ladit-ti okelo Laibru-ni kany me nywarowa; obino bota i ot ni ebut kweda kulu, ci atokke adaŋŋe ki koko matek," 
Genesis39:15 Ka oneno ni atiŋo dwana malo kun agorre matek ki koko, ci otenyo ginarukane bota, ci omwomme oka-to woko ki i ot.”" 
Genesis39:16 Ci opyelo boŋone ka ŋete nio ka won ot odwogo paco. 
Genesis39:17 Otitte kit lok acel-lu, kun waco ni, “Opii Laibru-ni ma ikelo i kinwa obino bota i ot ka nywara;" 
Genesis39:18 ento ka atiŋo dwana oyotoyot kun adaŋŋe, ci oweko ginarukane bota, omwomme gire woko ki i ot.”" 
Genesis39:19 Ka Potipar owinyo lok ma dakone olokke, ni, “Man en aye kit ma opiini otima kwede”, ci kiniga omake matek mada." 
Genesis39:20 Ocako mako Yucepu, oketo i mabuc, i kabedo ma gitweyo iye lumabuc pa kabaka, ci obedo i mabuc kunnu." 
Genesis39:21 Ento Rwot onoŋo tye ki Yucepu, ci onyutte mar mere ma pe lokke, ci omiyo en oyomo cwinylagwok ot mabuc." 
Genesis39:22 Lagwok mabuc omiyo twer ki Yucepu me gwoko lumabuc ducu ma gitye i mabuc; gin ducu ma gitiyo kunnu, en aye loyo." 
Genesis39:23 Lagwok ot mabuc pe doŋ tamo pi gin mo ma oketo i ciŋ Yucepu, pien oŋoŋo Rwot tye kwede; gin ducu ma en tiyo, Rwot omiyo iye gum." 
Genesis40:1 Ka kare okato, latyer koŋo vino pa kabaka me Ejipt ki lated mugatine gubalo i nyime." 
Genesis40:2 Kiniga’ omako Parao i kom ludito ticce aryo-nu, ladit latyer koŋo vino ki ladit me tedo mugati," 
Genesis40:3 ci oketogi i ot pa ladit ma loyo askari lukur-piny po gwokogi, i ot mabuc ma Yucepu bene gitweye iye-ni." 
Genesis40:4 Ladit ma loyo askari lukur-piny oketogi i ciŋ Yucepu, en okurogi; ka gitweyogi i ot kol kare mo." 
Genesis40:5 Ci guleko lek i nino acel, latyer koŋo vino ki lated mugati pa kabaka me Ejipt, ma gitweyogi i ot mabuc; ŋat acel acel oleko gire lekke, kun lek acel acel tye ki tyen lokke." 
Genesis40:6 Ka Yucepu obino botgi odiko, ci onenogi kun gitye ki cwercwiny." 
Genesis40:7 Ci openyo ludito tic aryo pa Parao ma gitye kwede i ot kol i ot pa laditte, ni, “Tin waŋwu oballe woko piŋo?”" 
Genesis40:8 Gugamo ni, “Tin waleko lek, ci pe tye dano mo ma gonyowa te lekke.” Yucepu owacogi ni, “Pe Lubaŋa gire aye lagony tere? Koŋ wutitta lekke mono.”" 
Genesis40:9 Ci latyer koŋo vino ocako tito lekke bot Yucepu, kun wacce ni, “I waŋ lekka onoŋo olok tye i nyima," 
Genesis40:10 olok onoŋo tye ki jaŋe adek; ka pud oluro me keto: ture, ci onyak, olugo ocek woko." 
Genesis40:11 Ka amako kikopo pa Parao i ciŋa, ci aŋolo nyige, abiyo i kikopo, ka amiyo kikopo i ciŋ Parao.”" 
Genesis40:12 Yucepu ogamo, owacce ni, “Man aye te lekke: jaŋe adek-ki, meno nino adek;" 
Genesis40:13 i nino me adekke Parao bitiŋi ci dwoki i dog ticci, ci dok’ ibimiyo kikopo pa Parao i ciŋe kit macon ca, kit macalo con i kare ma in latyer koŋo vinone," 
Genesis40:14 Ento ber ipo pira ka doŋ idok i dog ticci; alegi ni in bene itima ber do, itit pira bot Parao, wek gigonya woko ki i ot man," 
Genesis40:15 Pien yam gikwala akwala ki i lobo pa jo Ibru; man bene dok giketa kany i ot kol noŋo ma pe abalo gin mo.” 
Genesis40:16 Ka ladit me tedo mugati oneno ni gigonyo te lek maber, en owaco ki Yucepu ni, “An bene onoŋo aleko lekka: onoŋo adodo aduku adek i wiya." 
Genesis40:17 I aduku mamalone ca onoŋo tye iye lwak kit gin ma gitedo ducu pi Parao, ento winyo obedo ka camogi woko ki i aduku ma tye i wiya-ni.”" 
Genesis40:18 Yucepu ogamo ni, “Man aye te lekke: aduku adek en aye nino adek;" 
Genesis40:19 i nino me adekke Parao bitiŋi malo, ci biŋabi i kom yat, ka winyo gibicamo riŋo komi woko.”" 
Genesis40:20 Ka nino adek oromo, en aye nino ma ginywalo iye Parao, ci otedo karama ki luticce ducu, ci Parao okelo ladit latyer kono yino kacel ki ladit lated mugati i nyim luticce." 
Genesis40:21 Odwoko ladit latyer koŋo vino i dog ticce me tyero koŋo vino, ci otiŋo kikopo pa Parao omiyo i ciŋe;" 
Genesis40:22 ento oŋabo: ladit lated mugati malo i kom yat kit ma nene Yucepu ogonyo kwede te lekgi. 
Genesis40:23 Ento ladit latyer koŋo vino pe omedo ki po pi Yucepu, wiye owil woko i kome matwa!’" 
Genesis41:1 Ka mwaka okato aryo kulu, Parao oleko lek ni onoŋo ecuŋ i ŋet kulu Nail," 
Genesis41:2 ci nen, dyaŋi abiro ma komgi pilpii ma gucwe, gubedo ka camo lum tiro." 
Genesis41:3 Dyaŋi mukene abiro dok gukatti woko ki i kulu Nail ma komgi omok, gujony woko liŋok, ma gulubo korgi, ka gucuŋ ka ŋet dyaŋi meno, ma gitye i ŋet kulu Nail." 
Genesis41:4 Dyaŋi ma komgi omok, ma gujony woko linok-ki gucamo dyaŋi ma komgi pilpil mucwe-ni woko. Ci Parao oco woko ki i waŋ nino." 
Genesis41:5 Ka dok onino, ci dok oleko lek mukene me aryone, oneno wit kal abiro ma ocek oluŋŋe, mabeco, ma gujany i kom tyen kai acel." 
Genesis41:6 Dok i ŋegi oneno wit kal abiro ma gulot gujany ma walgi atati, ma gubwarre woko pi yamo malyet mua ki tuŋ wokceŋ." 
Genesis41:7 Ci wite abiro ma waŋgi atati-ni gumwonyo wit kal ma ocek oluŋŋe, ma waŋgi ŋaraŋara-nŋ woko. Ka Parao dok oco woko ki i waŋ nino, onoŋo ni dok eleko lek aye." 
Genesis41:8 Cwinye obedo ka cwer odiko con; ci ocwalo kwena olwoŋo lutyet ki luryeko ma i Ejipt ducu. Parao otitogi lekke, ento ŋat mo pe onen ma otwero gonyo ki Parao te lekke." 
Genesis41:9 Ladit latyer koŋo vino owaco ki Parao ni, “Apo rocca tin." 
Genesis41:10 I kare ma Parao okeco i kom luticce, ci otweya i ot kol kacel ki ladit lated mugati i ot pa ladit ma loyo askari lukur-piny," 
Genesis41:11 wan ducu waleko lek i dyewor acel-lu, en ki an, waleko lek ma tyen lokgi patpat," 
Genesis41:12 Latin Ibru mo onoŋo tye kwedwa, ma obedo latic pa ladit ma loyo askari lukur-piny, Ka yam watitte, ci ogonyowa te lekwa, kun gonyo te lek pa ŋat acel acel kit ma lekke tye kwede." 
Genesis41:13 Kit ma en ogonyo te Lekwa, ci otimme kumeno; an gidwoka i dog ticca, ento lated mugati giŋabo malo i kom yat.”" 
Genesis41:14 Ci Parao ocwalo kwena gilwoŋo Yucepu, gikelo woko aruya ki i ot kol; olyelo wiye, ka oloko boŋone, ci ocito odonyo bot Parao." 
Genesis41:15 Parao owaco bot Yucepu ni, “An onoŋo aleko lek, ento ŋatti mo pe onoŋŋe ma twero gonnya te lekke; abedo ka winyo ka giloko i komi ni ka iwinyo lek mo, ci itwero gonyo tere.”" 
Genesis41:16 Yucepu ogamo dog Parao ni, “Meno pe a ki iiya; Lubaŋa aye bidok iye ki Parao lok me kuc.”" 
Genesis41:17 Ci Parao owaco bot Yucepu ni, “Nen, iwaŋ lekka onoŋo acuŋ i ŋet kulu Nail;" 
Genesis41:18 ci dyaŋi abiro mucwe ma komgi pilpil gukatti woko ki i kulu Nail, gubedo ka camo lum tiro." 
Genesis41:19 Ka dok dyaŋi mukene abiro bene gukatti woko gulubo korgi ima gigoro, komgi omok ma gujony woko linok, kit ma yam peya aneno i lobo me Ejipt ducu." 
Genesis41:20 Ci dyaŋi ma komgi omok ma gujony woko linok-ki gucamo dyaŋi abiro mucwe-ni woko; 
Genesis41:21 ento kadi bed gucamogi woko, pe nene ni gucamogi, pien onoŋo pud gujony woko linok ma rom aroma ki kit ma nene gitye kwede. Ci aco woko ki iwaŋ nino." 
Genesis41:22 Dok aneno ki i waŋ Lekka wit kal abiro ma gujany i kom tyen kal acel, ma wangi ŋaraŋara mabeco;" 
Genesis41:23 ka dok wite abiro muner ma wangi atati, ma gubwarre woko pi yamo malyet mua i tuŋ wokceŋ, gulot gudoŋo i ŋegi;" 
Genesis41:24 ci wite ma waŋgi atati-ni gumwonyo wite abiro mabeco-ni. Ci atito bot lutyet, ento pe tye ŋatti mo ma twero gonnya tere.”" 
Genesis41:25 Yucepu ogamo dog Parao owaco ni, “Lek pa Parao en lek acel; Lubaŋa doŋ onyuto ki Parao gin ma en bitiyo." 
Genesis41:26 Dyaŋi abiro mabeco-ni nyuto mwaka abiro, ki wit kal abiro mabeco bene nyuio mwaka abiro; lek aryo-nu te lokgi acel." 
Genesis41:27 Dyaŋi ma komgi otuk, ma gujony woko liŋok-ki ma dok gukatti woko gulubo korgi-ni, ki wit kal abiro mubwarre woko pi yamo malyet mua i tuŋ wokceŋ ca, meno nyuto mwaka abiro me kec." 
Genesis41:28 Tye kit macalo doŋ atito ki Parao, Lubaŋa onyuto ki Parao gin ma en bitiyo." 
Genesis41:29 Mwaka abiro bibedo ma cam bicek madwoŋ twatwal i lobo ducu me Ejipt," 
Genesis41:30 ento i ŋegi dok bibino mwaka abiro me kec, ma wi dano biwil woko i lwak camgi ma guceko i lobo Ejipt. Kec bineko lobo woko libok;" 
Genesis41:31 ki lonyo cam madwoŋ-ŋi pe binene ni yam tye i lobo pi lok pa kec ma bilubone, pien kec meno bibedo gwa matek." 
Genesis41:32 Lek pa Parao mudodde aryo-ni nyuto ni lok man Lubaŋa aye omoko, dok bimiyo timme i kare ma cok-ki." 
Genesis41:33 “Mumiyo i kare man myero Parao oyer dano ma nen kwiri, maryek, ci oket en olo lobo Ejipt ducu." 
Genesis41:34 Dok ber Parao omedde ka keto ludito ma guloyo lobo, wek gubed ka jogo dul acel me abic me cam ma ocek i lobo Ejipt i kin mwaka abiro ma piny ocek-ki." 
Genesis41:35 Gin gubed ka guro cam ma ocek i mwaka mabeco ma cam bicek iye-ni, wek gigwok kal i te twero pa Parao, gikan me agwoka i gaŋi ducu." 
Genesis41:36 Cam meno obed dero kec me agwoka ma gigwoko i lobo Ejipt pi kec ma bipoto mwaka abiro, wek kec pe onek lobo.”" 
Genesis41:37 Tam man Parao oneno ni ber, kacel ki luticce ducu." 
Genesis41:38 Parao owaco ki luticce ni, “Watwero noŋo dano mukene macalo man, ma Cwiny pa Lubaŋa tye kwede bene?”" 
Genesis41:39 Ci Parao owaco bot Yucepu ni, “Macalo Lubaŋa doŋ otyeko nyutti man ducu-ni, pi meno pe doŋ tye dano mo ma nen kwiri, maryek macalo in." 
Genesis41:40 In aye doŋ ibiloyo oda, ki lwakka ducu gibitiyo kun gilubo gin ma iciko; kono nyo lok ma dok i kom komker keken, en aye bimiyo abedo dit makati.”" 
Genesis41:41 Parao dok owaco bot Yucepu ni, “Nen, doŋ atyeko keti me loyo lobo Ejipt ducu.”" 
Genesis41:42 Ci Parao okwanyo agitte ma olunyo ki i ciŋe, orwako i ciŋ Yucepu, dok oruke ki ginaruka me boŋo camanini maber, ka dok obolo nyor jabu i ŋute;" 
Genesis41:43 ka omiyo en oriŋo ki gadigadine me aryone, kun dano gidaŋŋe i nyime ni, “Rumu coŋwu!” Ci oketo en me loyo lobo Ejipt ducu kit meno." 
Genesis41:44 Parao dok omedde lok ki Yucepu kun wacce ni, “An Parao; ka in pe iye, ci pe bibedo ŋatti mo ma bitiŋo ciŋe kadi tyene i lobo ducu me Ejipt.”" 
Genesis41:45 Ci Parao ocako nyiŋ Yucepu ni Japeŋat-panea; ci omiye Acenaci nya pa Potipera ajwaka me On me bedo dakone. Ci Yucepu ocako wot orumo lobo Ejipt ducu. 
Genesis41:46 Yucepu onoŋo doŋ mwaka me ditte romo pyeradek i kare ma donyo i tic pa Parao kabaka me Ejipt. Yucepu okato woko ki i nyim Parao, ci owoto orumo lobo Ejipt ducu." 
Genesis41:47 Cam ocek i lobo madwoŋ twatwal otyeko mwaka abiro," 
Genesis41:48 ci ocoko cam ducu ma ocek i mwaka abiro-ni i kare ma lo bo Ejipt oceko cam madwoŋ, ci okano cam i dero kec i gaŋi ducu; i gaŋ acel acel en okano cam mua i potti murumo kenyo." 
Genesis41:49 Yucepu okano lwak cam madwoŋ i dero kec; cam obedo dwoŋ ma rom ki kweyo ma i dog nam, nio ka oweko pimone pien pe twero pimme." 
Genesis41:50 Ma mwaka kec peya oromo, onoŋo Yucepu doŋ tye ki litino awobe aryo, ma Acenaci nya pa Potipera ajwaka me On onywalo kwede." 
Genesis41:51 Yucepu ocako nyiŋ latin kayone ni Manace, kun wacci, “Pien Lubaŋa doŋ omiyo wiya owil woko ki i kom aromana ducu ki i kom jo ducu me ot pa wora.”" 
Genesis41:52 Nyiŋ latin me aryone ocako ni Epraim, ni, “Pien Lubaŋa omiya anywal i lobo ma abedo iye ki aroma.”" 
Genesis41:53 Ka mwaka abiro ma cam obedo ka cek iye madwoŋ twatwal i lobo Ejipt doŋ ogik," 
Genesis41:54 ci mwaka abiro me kec ocakke, kit ma yam Yucepu owaconi. Kec opoto i lobo ducu; ento i lobo Ejipt ducu onoŋo cam tye." 
Genesis41:55 Ka cam doŋ otum woko i lobo Ejipt ducu pi kec mupoto, dano gucako koko pi cam bot Parao; ci ‘Parao owaco bot jo Ejipt ducu ni, “Wucit bot Yucepu wutim gin ma owacciwu.”" 
Genesis41:56 Ka kec opoto oromo lobo Ejipt ducu, ci Yucepu ocako yabo dog dero kec ducu, ocato cam bot jo Ejipt, pien onoŋo kec doŋ lyet twatwal i lobo Ejipt." 
Genesis41:57 Lobo ducu gucako mol i Ejipt bot Yucepu ka wilo kal, pien onoŋo kec doŋ lyet twatwal i wi lobo ducu." 
Genesis42:1 Ka Yakobo owinyo ni kal tye i Ejipt, owaco bot awobene ni, “Piŋo wubedo ka nenne anena?”" 
Genesis42:2 Ka owaco botgi ni, “Nen, an awinyo ni kal tye i Ejipt; wucit wuwilliwa kai kunnu, wek wabedu kwo, pe wato kl kec.”" 
Genesis42:3 Mumiyo omegi Yucepu apar gucito i Ejipt ka wilo kal. 
Genesis42:4 Ento Yakobo pe ocwalo Benjamin, omin Yucepu, kacel ki omegine ca, pien obedo ka lworo ni gwok dok gibitime rac bene." 
Genesis42:5 Kit meno awobe pa Icrael gucito ka wil i kin jo mukene ma gicito kunnu, pien onoŋo kec oromo lobo Kanaan ducu." 
Genesis42:6 I kare meno onoŋo Yucepu odoko laloyo maber i lobo Ejipt; en obedo ka cato kal bot lwak me lobo meno. Ci omegi Yucepu bene gubino, gupoto piny aryeba cwiny i nyime, kun gukulo wangi i ŋom." 
Genesis42:7 Ka Yucepu oneno omegine, ci oŋeyogi cut, ento obedo gwa i komgi, macalo gin Lurok ata, kun gerre agera ni, “Wun wua ki kwene?” Gugamo ni, “Waa ki i lobo Kanaan, wabino ka wilo cam.”" 
Genesis42:8 Kit-meno Yucepu oŋeyo omegine, ento gin pe gumedo ki ŋeye," 
Genesis42:9 Yucepu ocako po lek ma yam oleko i komgi-ni; dok owaccigi ni, “Wun lurot piny do, wun wubino ka neno lobo-ni ka kabedo mo tye noŋo.”" 
Genesis42:10 Gugamo ni, “Pe kumeno Laditwa, wan luticci wabino giwa ka wilo cam." 
Genesis42:11 Wan ducu awobe pa ŋat acel, wan jo ma iwa leŋ, wan pe lurot piny.”" 
Genesis42:12 Owaccigi ni, “Pe ya, wun wubino mewu ka neno kabedo mo ma tye nono.”" 
Genesis42:13 Gugamo dok ni, “Wan ducu wan omego apar wiye aryo, ma awobe pa laco acel ma tye i lobo Kanaan; ci ominwa matidine odoŋ bot wonwa, ki acel aye doŋ pe.”" 
Genesis42:14 Yucepu owaco ki gin ni, “Doŋ kara tye kit ma awacowu, ni wun lurot piny." 
Genesis42:15 Pi lok meno, wun doŋ gibinenowu maber kit man: macalo Parao tye makwo-ni, wun pe doŋ wubia woko i kabedo-ni, ka ominwu matidi-ni pe obino kany." 
Genesis42:16 Wucwal ŋat acel i kinwu, wek en ocikel ominwu, kun noŋo wun pud wudoŋ kany i mabuc, wek lokwu koŋ ginen maber, ka wun wutye ki ada i iwu. Ka pe, macalo Parao tye makwo-ni, wun lurot piny i ada.”" 
Genesis42:17 Ci oketogi ducu i mabuc pi nino adek. 
Genesis42:18 Ka nino adek oromo, ci Yucepu owaco botgi ni, “Wutim kit man ci wubikwo, pien alworo Lubaŋa:" 
Genesis42:19 ka wun jo ma iwu leŋ, wuwek ŋat acel aye gitwe odoŋ i mabuc, wek jo mukene gucit paco guter kal ki jo ma paco pi larogi ki kec," 
Genesis42:20 ka wucikel ominwu matidi-ni bota; miyo binen ni lokwu doŋ tye ada, ci pe wubito.” Ci gutimo kit meno." 
Genesis42:21 Gucako lok gigi kekengi ni, “I adane, wan woroco i kom ominwa, pien waneno cwercwinye, ka yam bako doge botwa, ci pe wamedo ki winyone; mumiyo tin can man opoto i komwa bene.”" 
Genesis42:22 Reuben owacogi ni, “Yam pe atittiwu ni pe wutim bal mo i kom latin ca? Ento wun pe wumedo ki winyo, en aye mumiyo gipido pi remone i komwa-ni.”" 
Genesis42:23 Pe gumedo ki niaŋ ni Yucepu winyo lokgi-ni, pien onoŋo Iadum aye tye i kingi." 
Genesis42:24 Ka oa woko ki botgi ci ocako koko; ka odok botgi obedo ka lok kwedgi. Omako Cimeon ki i kingi ci otweyo ki i nyimgi. 
Genesis42:25 Yucepu ociko ni doŋ gipik kal opoŋ kicaa megi, ka dok gidwok lim pa dano acel acel gipik i kicaane, dok gumi botgi peke me wotgi. Man ducu gitimo botgi." 
Genesis42:26 Ka gutweyo kal i ŋe kanagi, ci gucako wot." 
Genesis42:27 Ka ŋat acel oyabo dog kicaane i kabedo ma gibuto iye-ni, wek emi cam ki kanane, ci oneno lim giketo i dog kicaane." 
Genesis42:28 Ocako waco ki omegine ni, “Limma gidwoko kakare. Nen, tye i kicaana ene.” Ka guwinyo, ci cwinygi opoto nirim, gubedo ka cabbe kekengi ki myelkom kun giwaco ni, “Lubaŋa timowa kuman piŋo?”" 
Genesis42:29 Ka gudwogo bot wongi Yakobo i lobo Kanaan, gutitte gin ducu ma otimme i komgi, kun giwaco ni," 
Genesis42:30 “Dano ma ladit me lobo-nu obedo ka lok ki gero i komwa, olokowa wadoko lurot piny." 
Genesis42:31 Ento wan watitte ni, ‘Wan jo ma iwa leŋ, wan pe lurot piny." 
Genesis42:32 Wan omego apar wiye aryo ma wonwa acel. Ominwa acel aye doŋ pe, ki acel matidine tye odoŋ bot wonwa i lobo Kanaan.’" 
Genesis42:33 Ci dano meno, ladit me lobo-nu, owaco botwa ni, ‘Man aye miyo abinian ni wun jo ma iwu leŋ: wuwek ominwu acel odoŋ bota, wuter kal me laro kec i pacowu, wek wuciti." 
Genesis42:34 Wucikel ominwu matidini bota, ci doŋ abiŋeyo ni wun pe lurot piny, ento wun jo ma iwu leŋ, ci doŋ abimiyo ominwu i ciŋwu, dok wubicato wil i lobo-ni.’ ”"
