Genesis42:35 Ka gitye ka onyo kal ma i kicaa megi, ci dano acel acel onoŋo lim ma nene oboyo tye i kicaane. Ka gin ki wongi guneno lim ma giboyo, ci lworo omakogi matek." 
Genesis42:36 Wongi Yakobo owaco ni, “Wutyeko litinona woko do. Yucepu doŋ pe, Cimeon bene doŋ pe, dok wumito tero Benjamin; man ducu canne poto i wiya.”" 
Genesis42:37 Reuben ocako waco bot wonne ni, “Ibineko litino awobena aryo-ni ducu ka ineno pe adwoko en paco boti. Miya acit kwede, ci abikelo en paco boti.”" 
Genesis42:38 Ento en ogamo, okwero woko ni, “Woda pe bicito kwedwu kunnu, pien ominne doŋ oto mere woko, en kene aye odoŋ, Ka gin marac dok otimme i kome i wotwu-ni, ci wubitero lwar wiya i lyel ki cwercwiny.”" 
Genesis43:1 I kare ma kec doŋ lyet twatwal i lobo," 
Genesis43:2 dok kal ma gikelo ki i Ejipt doŋ gucamo otum woko, wongi owaco botgi ni, “Wudok kunnu, wuciwil ki wan cam mo manok.”" 
Genesis43:3 Juda ogamo doge ni, “Dano ca ocikowa matek kun waco ni, ‘Pe wubineno waŋa ka ominwu pe i kinwu.’" 
Genesis43:4 Ka icwalo ominwa owoto kwedwa, ci wabicito kunnu ka willi cam;" 
Genesis43:5 ento ka pe icwalo en, pe wabicito kunnu, pien dano ca owacowa ni, ‘Pe wubineno waŋa ka ominwu pe i kinwu.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Icrael owacci, “Piŋo wutima marac kuman? Piŋo dok wutito ki dano ca ni wutye ki ominwu mukene?”" 
Genesis43:7 Gudok iye ni, “Dano ca openyowa ki lwak peny mapol i komwa ki i kom kakawa, kun waco ni, ‘Wonwu pud tye makwo? Ominwu mukene tye?’ Wan wadok iye i kom gin ma openyo; wan onoŋo watwero ŋeyo niŋniŋ ni en biwacci, ‘Wukel ominwu kany”?”" 
Genesis43:8 Juda owaco bot wonne Icrael ni, “Mi latin i ciŋa, cwale wawot kwede, ci wabia wacito, wek wabed kwo, pe wato, wan kacel ki in ki litinowa bene." 
Genesis43:9 An abicuŋ pire; ibipenya pire. Ka ce pe abikelo en boti i kare ma adwogo, akete i nyimi, ci wek an aye abed won alii matwal;" 
Genesis43:10 pien ka nene pe wagalle, kono man doŋ wawirre kunnu kiryo.”" 
Genesis43:11 Ci wongi Icrael dokowaco botgi ni, “Ka doŋ myero obed kumeno ba, doŋ wutim kit man: wuter nyig yadi mogo ma wuyero me lobo-ni i kicaawu, wuter mot ki dano-nu, moo makur manok ki moo kic, odok yat ki murra, nyig otitimo ki yaa." 
Genesis43:12 Dok wuter lim ma romo culo wil tyen aryo; wutiŋ lim ma nene gidwoko giketo i dog kicaawuni; gwok nyo yam wigi owil awila. 
Genesis43:13 Wuter ki ominwu, wek wua, wucit dok bot dano-nu;" 
Genesis43:14 ber Lubaŋa Matwero-ducu aye omi kica omak dano-nu i komwu, wek ocwal ominwu mukene ca ki Benjamin. Ka gityeko litinona woko, doŋ gityeka arumo do!”" 
Genesis43:15 Ci gutero mot, ki wel lim ma dodo tyen aryo, kacel ki Benjamin; gua gucito i Ejipt, gucuŋ i nyim Yucepu." 
Genesis43:16 Ka Yucepu oneno ni Benjamin tye i kingi, ci owaco bot lakan jamine me ot ni, “Kel jo-nu i ot, ka inek riŋo iyubi, pien gin koni gibicam kweda dyeceŋ.”" 
Genesis43:17 Dano meno otiyo kit ma Yucepu ocike, okelo jo-nu i ot pa Yucepu." 
Genesis43:18 Lworo omako omegine ka giterogi i ot pa Yucepu, guwaco ni, “Man pi lok me lim, ma nene gidwoko giketo i dog kicaawa i kare mukwoŋo ca. Mumiyo gikelowa i ot-ti, wek enoŋ lok i komwa, emakwa, wek wadok opiine, ka dok ema lwak kanawa woko.”" 
Genesis43:19 Pi meno gucito bot lakan jami me ot pa Yucepu, guloko kwede ki i doggola," 
Genesis43:20 guwacce ni, “Laditta, wan wabino kany ka wilo cam i kare mukwoŋo ca;" 
Genesis43:21 ka wao i kabedo ma wabuto iye-ni, wagonyo dog kicaawa, ci wanoŋo lim tye i dog kicaa pa ŋat acel acel ma i kinwa, limwa ducu onoŋo tye ki berre; en watyeko dwogo kwedeni," 
Genesis43:22 ka dok wabino ki lim me wilo cam, Pe waŋeyo ŋat ma oketolimwa i kicaawa.”" 
Genesis43:23 En ogamo ni, “Wuywe ma cwinywu opye mot, pe lworo omakwu. Lubaŋa ma Lubaŋa pa wonwu en aye gwok nyo okano ki wun lim i kicaawu; an mera agamo limwu.” Ci ocito okelo Cimeon botgi." 
Genesis43:24 Dano meno oterogi i ot pa Yucepu, omiyogi pii me lwoko tyengi, ka dok omiyo cam ki kanagi." 
Genesis43:25 Guyubo motgi me atyera bot Yucepu ka bidwogo i dyeceŋ, pien guwinyo ni gibicam kunnu." 
Genesis43:26 Ka Yucepu odwogo paco, gutero motgi bote i ot, guryebbe piny i nyime." 
Genesis43:27 Openyogi ka gitye maber, kun waco ni, “Wonwu tye maber, ladit mo muti ma nene wuloko pire-ni pud tye makwo?”" 
Genesis43:28 Gugamo ni, “Laticci ma wonwa tye maber, pud tye makwo.” Gukulo wigi piny, guryebbe i nyime," 
Genesis43:29 Ka otiŋo waŋe malo ci oneno ominne Benjamin, latin pa minne, owacci, “Man aye ominwu matidi-ni bo, ma nene wutitta pire-ni? Lubaŋa omini gum, latinna!”" 
Genesis43:30 Yucepu okato woko oyot, pien onoŋo cwinye pukke pi ominne, ocito oyenyo ka ma myero ekok iye. Ci odonyo ka koko i kicikane." 
Genesis43:31 Ka olwoko waŋe, ci okatti woko kun diyo cwinye, owacci, “Doŋ gitok cam.”" 
Genesis43:32 Gitoko camme kene pat, ki megi bene pat, ki pa Luejipt ma yam gicamo kwedgi bene pat kakengi, pien Luejipt pe gicamo kacel ki jo Ibru, bedo me kwer ki bot Luejipt." 
Genesis43:33 Gubedo piny i nyime, latin kayo macalo dit me anywalline tye kwede ki latin matidine kit macalo por me tidine tye kwede; ci gucako bedo ka nenne kekengi kun giuro," 
Genesis43:34 Gipoko botgi cam kun gitoko a ki i meja pa Yucepu, ento pa Benjamin gipoko mere ododo pa omegine tyen abic kulu. Kit meno gimato, gibedo kwede ki yomcwiny." 
Genesis44:1 Yucepu ociko lakan jami me ot ni, “Pik cam opoŋ kicaa pa jo-nu, mabup, ma gitwero tino; dok iket lim pa ŋat acel acel i dog kicaane," 
Genesis44:2 ci iket kikopona, kikopo ryal-li, i dog kicaa pa latin matidi-ni, kacel ki limme me wilo kal.” En otimo kit macalo Yucepu owacce." 
Genesis44:3 Ka piny doŋ oru maleŋ, ci gicwalo jo-nu gukato woko kacel ki kanagi." 
Genesis44:4 Ka guwoto manok nia ki i gaŋ, Yucepu owaco ki lakan jamine ni, “Doŋ ilub kor jo-nu; ka imakogi, ci iwac botgi ni, ‘Piŋo wuculo gin maber ki gin marac? Piŋo wukwalo kikopo ryal mera woko?" 
Genesis44:5 Pe rwoda mato ki kikopo meno? Dok pe en aye tyeto kwede bene? Wutimo rac mada.’ ” 
Genesis44:6 Ka omakogi i yo, ci owacogi lok meno." 
Genesis44:7 Gugamo doge ni, “Lok aŋo mumiyo in laditwa iloko lakit lok meno? Wan luticci pe myero watim lakit tim macalo meno!" 
Genesis44:8 Nen ba, lim ma nene wanoŋo i dog kicaawa, wadwoko cen boti nia wa ki i lobo Kanaan; dok wan myero wakwal ryal nyo jabu ki i ot pa laditwa niŋniŋ?" 
Genesis44:9 Ka ce gibinoŋo tye bot ŋat mo i kinwa, wek en aye oto, wan bene wabibedo opiini laditwa.”" 
Genesis44:10 En ogamo ni, “Wuwek koŋ doŋ obed kit ma wuwaco-ni: ŋat ma gibinoŋo kikopo bote aye bibedo opiina, jo mukene bal bibedo pe i komgi.”" 
Genesis44:11 Ŋat acel acel ocako cibo yecce piny oyotoyot, ŋat acel acel oyabo dog kicaane," 
Genesis44:12 Ka oyenyo dog kicaa nia ki kom pa ladit nio wa kom latin, ci ginoŋo kikopo i dog kicaa pa Benjamin," 
Genesis44:13 Gucako yeco boŋŋigi pi cwercwiny, gin ducu gutweyo yec i ŋe kanagi, gudok i gaŋ." 
Genesis44:14 Ka Juda ki omegine gudok i ot pa Yucepu, gunoŋo en pud tye kenyo; gupoto, guryebbe piny i nyime," 
Genesis44:15 Yucepu owacogi ni, “Wun wutimo kit tim macalo man piŋo ce? Wun pe wuŋeyo ni dano macalo an-ni ŋeyo tyet?”" 
Genesis44:16 Juda ogamo kun waco ni, “Wan wabidok iye lok aŋo, ladit? Wabigamo lok aŋo kono? Wabikwanyo bal i komwa kekenwa niŋniŋ? Lubaŋa otyeko noŋo bal i komwa; nen, wan wadoko opiini, laditwa, wan ducu kacel ki ŋat ma ginoŋo kikopo bote-ni.’" 
Genesis44:17 Ento en ogamo ni, “An pe atwero timo kit eno! Ento ŋat ma ginoŋo kikopo bote-ni, aye bibedo opiina; ento ki tuŋ botwu wun wudok mewu bot wonwu ki kuc.”" 
Genesis44:18 Juda ocako cito bote, owacce ni, “Alegi laditta, wek an alok lok mo kwedi, pe iwek kinigani obed Lyet i koma, pien in irom ki Parao kikome." 
Genesis44:19 Ladit, in yam ipenyowa ni, ‘Wun wutye ki wonwu, onyo omegiwu?" 
Genesis44:20 Wan wagamo dogi ni, ‘Watye ki wonwa, dano muti doŋ, ki ominwa matidine latin me tiyone. Ominne aye oto woko, en aye odoŋ latin acel i kor minne; wonne bene maro en.’" 
Genesis44:21 Ka dok iwaco botwa ni, ‘Wukel en bota, wek aket waŋa i kome.’" 
Genesis44:22 Wan watito boti ni, ‘Latin awobi-nu pe twero weko ka ŋet wonne; ka ce opokke woko ki wonne, ci wonne to woko.’" 
Genesis44:23 Ento in onoŋo iwaco botwa ni, ‘Ka ominwu matidi-ni pe obino kany kacel kwedwu, pe dok wubineno waŋa.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Ka wadok paco bot wonwa ladit, ci watitte lokki ducu." 
Genesis44:25 Ka wonwa owaco ni, ‘Wuwot dok wuciwil ki wan cam mo manok’," 
Genesis44:26 wan wawacce ni, ‘Pe watwero dok Ka ominwa rmatidi-ni bicito kwedwa, ci wabidok kunnu, pien pe wabineno waŋ dano ca, ka ominwa matidi-ne pe i kinwa.’" 
Genesis44:27 Ci wora owacowa ni, ‘Wun wuŋeyo ni dakona onywalo litino awobe aryo;" 
Genesis44:28 acel oweka woko, ci yam awacci, Ada ŋuu okide woko, pe dok amedo ki nene matwal." 
Genesis44:29 Ka dok wukwanyo man woko ki bota, ce gin marac bipoto i kome, ci wubitero lwar wiya i lyel ki: cwercwiny.’" 
Genesis44:30 “Mumiyo ka an adok bot wora;: ma latin awobi-ni pe i kinwa, macalo kwone ocuŋ i kom latin awobi-ni," 
Genesis44:31 ka oneno ni latin awobi-ni pe i kinwa, ci en bito woko. Miyo wabitero lwar wi wonwa i lyel ki cwercwiny." 
Genesis44:32 An nene acuŋ pi latin awobi man bot wora, kun awacce ni, ‘Ka pe abidwoko en boti, an abibedo won alii i nyim wora i kare me kwona ducu.’" 
Genesis44:33 Mumiyo kombeddi alegi ni ber iye an opiini, adoŋ ma ka latin awobi man, abed opiini, ladit; wek latin man odok paco kacel ki omegine." 
Genesis44:34 Pien atwero dok paco bot wora niŋniŋ, ka pe latin-ni tye kweda? Alworo neno gin marac ka poto i kom wora.”" 
Genesis45:1 Yucepu diyo cwinye doŋ oloye woko ki i nyim lwak ducu ma gucuŋ ka ŋete, ci odaŋŋe ni, “Wumi dano ducu gua woko ki bota, guciti.” Kit meno ŋatti mo yam pe odoŋ bote i kare ma en nyutte kekene bot omegine." 
Genesis45:2 Ocako koko matek ma Luejipt bene giwinyo, ki jo ma i gaŋ kal pa Parao bene guwinyo." 
Genesis45:3 Yucepu owaco bot omegine ni, “An a Yucepu; wora mono pud tye makwo?” Ento omegine pe gitwero gamo doge, pien tipo komgi oto woko i nyime." 
Genesis45:4 Yucepu owaco bot omegine ni, “Alegowu, wubin bota cok.” Gucito cok bote. Owacogi ni, “An aye ominwu Yucepu, ma yam wucato i Ejipt." 
Genesis45:5 Pe doŋ wubed ki cwercwiny, pe cwinywu owaŋ i komwu kekenwu pi cato an kany; pien Lubaŋa aye yam ocwala kany i nyimwu, wek akony kwowu," 
Genesis45:6 Pien kec doŋ obedo i lobo pi mwaka aryo; pud dok odoŋ mwaka abic ma pur ki kac bibedo pe. 
Genesis45:7 Lubaŋa ocwalo an i nyimwu wek agwok ki wun jo ma bidoŋ wi lobo, ki pi gwoko ki wun jo mapol ma gibibwot makwo." 
Genesis45:8 Pien wun aye yam pe wucwala kany, ento Lubaŋa gire; omiyo an adoko won Parao, ki lalo ode ducu ki lalo lobo Ejipt ducu." 
Genesis45:9 Wutim oyot, wucit bot wora, wuciwacce ni, ‘Latinni Yucepu owaco kuman ni, Lubaŋa oketa abedo laloyo i Ejipt ducu; bin bota kany, pe dok iru." 
Genesis45:10 Ibibedo i lobo Gocen, ibibedo cok kweda, in ki litinoni ki litino pa litinoni ducu, ki dyegini ki dyani-gu ki gin ma itye kwedgi ducu." 
Genesis45:11 Abipito in kunnu pien pud dok odoŋ mwaka me kec mukene abic i anyim; wek in ki jo ma i paconi, ki gin ma it ye kwedgi ducu pe wubed lucan.’" 
Genesis45:12 Iyo, kombeddi waŋjwu oneno, ki waŋ omera Benjamin bene oneno ni an kikoma aye aloko kwedwu ki doga," 
Genesis45:13 Myero wun wucitit bot wora kit deyona ducu ma atye kwede i Ejipt, ki gin ducu ma doŋ wuneno. Wucit oyot, wek wukel wora kany.”" 
Genesis45:14 Ocako poto i ŋut ominne Benjamin ki koko, ki Benjamin bene okok i ŋute," 
Genesis45:15 Ka onoto lem omegine ducu kun kok; ka doŋ lacen omegine gucako boko lok kwede. 
Genesis45:16 Ka lok owinnye wa ki i ot pa Parao ni, “Omegi Yucepu gubino”, pire oyomo cwiny Parao ki luticce matek." 
Genesis45:17 Parao owaco bot Yucepu ni, “Wac bot omegini ni, ‘Wutim kit man, wutwe yec i ŋe kanawu, wudok cen i lobo Kanaan;" 
Genesis45:18 wutiŋ wonwu ki jowu, wek wubin bota; abimiyowu gin mabeco ma tye i lobo Ejipt, wucicamo moo ma i lobo-ni.’" 
Genesis45:19 “Dok icikgi ni, ‘Wutim kit man: Wuter gadigadi nia ki i lobo Ejipt kany pi litinowu matino ki pi mon mewu, wek wukel wonwu obin." 
Genesis45:20 Pe wupar pi jamiwu, pien gin mabeco ma tye i lobo Ejipt ducu mewu.’ ”" 
Genesis45:21 Awobe pa Icrael gutiyo kit meno; Yucepu omiyogi gadigadi kit macalo Parao ociko, ka dok omiyogi peke me wotgi." 
Genesis45:22 Omiyo botgi ducu ŋat acel acel boŋŋi mabeco me aruka i nino madito, ento bot Benjamin omiyo cekel me ryal miya adek ki ruk mabeco abic me nino madito." 
Genesis45:23 Ocwalo bot wonne jami macalo man: Kana apar ma guyene ki jami mabeco ma oa ki i Ejipt, ki megi kana apar ma guyeyo kal, ki cam, ki peke me wot pa wongi." 
Genesis45:24 Ka doŋ ocako cwalo omegine gucito. Ka doŋ gia ocikogi ni, “Pe wubed ka da iyo.”" 
Genesis45:25 Ka gua woko ki i Ejipt, ci gudwogo i lo bo Kanaan bot wongi Yakobo," 
Genesis45:26 Ka gutitte ni, “Yucepu pud tye makwo, en aye laloyo i lobo Ejipt ducu”; ci tipo kome oto woko lirut, pien onoŋo peya oye lokgi." 
Genesis45:27 Ento ka doŋ gutitte lok kom Yucepu ducu, kit ma ocikogi kwede, ka dok pi neno lwak gadigadi ma Yucepu ocwalo pi tiŋo en, ka tipo kom wongi ocako dwogo." 
Genesis45:28 Ka Icrael ocako lok ni, “Doŋ otum, woda Yucepu kara pud tye makwo; abiwot acito ka nene ma pud peya ato.”" 
Genesis46:1 Icrael ocako wot ki jami ma yam en tye kwedgi ducu; ka obino i Beer-ceba, ci otyero gitum bot Lubaŋa pa wonne Icaka." 
Genesis46:2 Lubaŋa oloko ki Icrael i waŋ lek dyewor kun lwoŋe ni, “Yakobo, Yakobo.” En ogamo ni, “An a ene.”" 
Genesis46:3 Owacce ni, “An Lubaŋa, Lubaŋa pa woru; pe ilwor cito i Ejipt, pien abimiyi idoko rok madit kunnu." 
Genesis46:4 Abicito kwedi wa i Ejipt, abidwoki cen bene; doki i kare ma ibito, ciŋ Yucepu biumo waŋi.”" 
Genesis46:5 Yakobo ocako wot ki i Beer-ceba, kun awobene gutiŋe, kacel ki litinogi matino, ki mongi, i gadigadi ma Parao ocwalo me tinogi." 
Genesis46:6 Gutero limgi makwo ki jamigi ma yam gulimo ki i lobo Kanaan, gucito kwede i Ejipt; gutero Yakobo ki litinone ki likwaye ducu." 
Genesis46:7 En owoto i Ejipt ki awobene ki anyirane ducu, wa ki likwaye ma co ki ma anyira." 
Genesis46:8 Man aye nyiŋ likwayo pa Icrael ma gucito i Ejipt: Yakobo ki awobene. Reuben, latin kayo pa Yakobo," 
Genesis46:9 ki awobe pa Reuben, aye Kanok, Pallu, Kejeron ki Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 Awobe pa Cimeon aye Jemuel, Jamin, Okad, Jakin, Jokar ki Caul, ma awobi pa dako Lakanaan," 
Genesis46:11 Awobe pa Levi aye Gercon, Kokat ki Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Awobe pa Juda aye Er, Onan, Cela, Perej ki Jera, ento Er ki Onan guto woko i lobo Kanaan; awobe pa Perej aye Kejeron ki Kamul." 
Genesis46:13 Awobe pa Icakar aye Tola, Puwa, Iob, ki Cimron." 
Genesis46:14 Awobe pa Jabulon aye Cered, Elon ki Jaleel." 
Genesis46:15 Meno aye awobe pa Lea ma en onywalo ki Yakobo i Paddan-aram, kacel ki nyare Dina; wel litino awobene ki anyirane giromo pyeradek wiye adek." 
Genesis46:16 Awobe pa Gad aye Jipion, Kagi, Cuni, Ejibon, Eri, Arodi ki Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Awobe pa Acer aye Imna, Iciva, Icivi, Beria ki Cera ma lamingi. Awobe pa Beria aye Keber ki Malkiel." 
Genesis46:18 Meno aye litino awobe pa Jilpa, ma Laban omiyo bot Lea; en onywalo ki Yakobo litino apar wiye abicel." 
Genesis46:19 Awobe pa Lakeri dako pa Yakobo aye Yucepu ki Benjamin. 
Genesis46:20 Yucepu onywalo Manace ki Epraim ki i lobo Ejipt, ma Acenaci, nya, pa Potipera ajwaka me On aye onywalogi." 
Genesis46:21 Awobe pa Benjamin aye Bela, Beker, Acibel, Gera, Naaman, Eki, Roc, Mupim, Kupim ki Arud." 
Genesis46:22 Meno aye awobe pa Lakeri ma en onywalo ki Yakobo, litino ducu apar wiye aŋwen." 
Genesis46:23 Awobi pa Dan aye Kucim. 
Genesis46:24 Awobe pa Naputali aye Jajeel, Guni, Jejer ki Cilem." 
Genesis46:25 Meno aye likwayo pa Bila ma Laban yam omiyo ki nyare Lakeri; en onywalo ki Yakobo litino ducu abiro. 
Genesis46:26 Jo ducu ma tuŋ bot Yakobo ma yam ocito kwedgi i Ejipt, ma gin yam litinone ki likwaye kikome, ma pe gikwano iye mon pa litino awobene onoŋo giromo jo pyerabicel wiye abicel;" 
Genesis46:27 ki litino awobe ma nene Yucepu onywalogi ki i Ejipt, nene gin awobe aryo; pienno jo ducu ma tuŋ bot Yakobo ma gucito i Ejipt giromo pyerabiro." 
Genesis46:28 Yakobo ocwalo Juda anyim bot Yucepu, wek onyuttigi yo ma cito i Gocen; ci guo i lobo Gocen," 
Genesis46:29 Yucepu oyubo gadigadine me cito ka rwatte ki wonne Icrael i Gocen; ka ocito, onyutte kekene bote, ka opoto i ŋute kun kok kwede pi kare mo malac." 
Genesis46:30 Icrael owaco bot Yucepu ni, “Tin to doŋ obin, pien doŋ aneno waŋi, aniaŋ ni pud ikwo ada.”" 
Genesis46:31 Yucepu owaco ki omegine ki jo ma i ot pa wonne ni, “Abidok ka tito ki Parao, abiwacce ni, ‘Omega ki jo ma i ot pa wora, ma yam gitye i lobo Kanaan, doŋ gutyeko bino bota;" 
Genesis46:32 gin lukwat, pien gin yam lukwat dyaŋi; dok gin gubino ki dyegigi ki dyani-gu, ki gin ducu ma gitye kwede.’" 
Genesis46:33 Ka ce Parao olwoŋowu, ka openyowu ni, ‘Wun wutiyo tic aŋo?’" 
Genesis46:34 wun wudok iye ni, ‘Wan luticci wan lukwat dyaŋi nia ka tinowa nio kwede wa onyoo, wan kacel ki kwarowa’, wek wubed i Gocen, pien bedo me kwer bot Luejipt me bedo ki lakwat mo.”" 
Genesis47:1 Yucepu ocito ka tito bot Parao ni, “Wora ki omega, ki dyegigi ki dyaŋi-gu ki jamigi ducu gutyeko bino ki i lobo Kanaan; kombeddi doŋ gitye i lobo Gocen.”" 
Genesis47:2 Okwanyo jo abic ki i kin omegine, oterogi, onyutogi bot Parao." 
Genesis47:3 Parao openyo omegine ni, “Wun wutiyo tic aŋo?” Gin guwaco bot Parao ni, “Wan luticci wan lukwat macalo kwariwa.”" 
Genesis47:4 Ka guwaco bot Parao ni, “Wan doŋ wabino ka bedo i lobo-ni; pien ka kwayo limwa aye pe, pien onoŋo kec doŋ Lyet twatwal i lobo Kanaan; kombeddi walegi ni, wek wabed i lobo Gocen.”" 
Genesis47:5 Parao owaco bot Yucepu ni, “Woru ki omegini doŋ gubino boti." 
Genesis47:6 Lobo Ejipt tye boti, ket woru ki omegini i lobo maberre, wek gubed i lobo Gocen; ka iŋeyo i kingi jo makwiri, ci iketgi gubed ludito ma gwoko limma.”" 
Genesis47:7 Lacen Yucepu okelo wonne Yakobo, okete i nyim Parao, ci Yakobo olamo gum i kom Parao." 
Genesis47:8 Parao owaco bot Yakobo ni, “In mono doŋ iri wi lobo mwaka adi kaa?”" 
Genesis47:9 Yakobo owaco bot Parao ni, “An doŋ ari wi lobo mwaka miya acel ki pyeradek macalo labedo. Ento mwaka ma ari kwede pud nok, dok opoŋ ki can, peya rom ki mwaka pa kwarina ma gubedo kwede macalo lubedo.”" 
Genesis47:10 Yako bo olamo gum i kom Parao, ka doŋ okato woko ki i nyime." 
Genesis47:11 Yucepu omiyo ki wonne ki omegine kabedo i lobo Ejipt, i ŋom maberre, i Ramcec, kun miyogi lobo wek obed megi, kit macalo Parao ociko," 
Genesis47:12 Yucepu ocako poko cam ki wonne, ki omegine ki bot jo ducu me ot pa wonne, kun lubo wel jo ma tye botgi." 
Genesis47:13 I kare meno onoŋo cam doŋ pe i lobo ducu; pien onoŋo kec doŋ Lyet twatwal, omiyo jo ma i lobo Ejipt ki i lobo Kanaan kec obwoyogi woko," 
Genesis47:14 Yucepu ocoko cente ducu ma yam tye i lobo Ejipt ki i lobo Kanaan, ma yam dano guwilo ki cam; ci otero i ot pa Parao," 
Genesis47:15 Ka cente doŋ otum woko ki i lobo Ejipt ki i lobo Kanaan bene, ci jo Ejipt ducu gubino bot Yucepu, guwaco ni, “Miniwa cam; myero wato ki i komi ma ineno piŋo? Pien centewa doŋ otum woko.”" 
Genesis47:16 Yucepu ogamo ni, “Wumiya lim makwo, ci an abimiyowu cam aloko ki dyaŋwu, ka limwu me cente doŋ otum woko.”" 
Genesis47:17 Gucako kelo limgi makwo bot Yucepu, aguragura, romi, dyaŋi ki kana; ci Yucepu olokogi ki cam, I mwaka meno opoko botgi cam pi ‘lwak lim makwo ma gukelo." 
Genesis47:18 Ka mwaka meno doŋ otum, ci gubino bote i mwaka ma lubone, kun giwacce ni, “Wan pe doŋ wakano lok mo boti, laditwa, centewa doŋ watyeko woko ducu; ki lim makwo doŋ odoko pa laditwa; gin mo pe ma odoŋ i nyim laditwa, kono komwa ki lobowa keken." 
Genesis47:19 Myero wato ki i komi ma inenowa piŋo, wan kacel ki lobowa? In iwilwa ki cam kacel ki lobowa, wan kacel ki lobowa wabibedo opii pa Parao; dok imiwa kodi wek wabed makwo, pe wato, wek lobo pe odoŋ noŋo.”" 
Genesis47:20 Kit meno Yucepu owilo lobo ducu me Ejipt obedo pa Parao; pien Luejipt ducu gucato pottigi woko, pi kec ma onoŋo doŋ Lyet twatwal. Lobo odoko pa Parao;" 
Genesis47:21 oloko dano ducu gubedo opii, nia i agikki lobo Ejipt tuŋ cel, nio tuŋ cel." 
Genesis47:22 Lobo pa ajwagi keken aye pe giwilo, pien ajwagi onoŋo gitye ki camgi ma a ki i ciŋ Parao; onoŋo gubedo ka camo gin ma Parao miyogi, mumiyo pe gucato lobogi." 
Genesis47:23 Yucepu dok owaco bot lwak ni, “Nen, i kare man atyeko wilowu ki lobo mewu me bedo pa Parao. Kombeddi doŋ wugam kodi ma wubicoyo i lobo." 
Genesis47:24 I kare me kac wubimiyo acel me abic bot Parao, ki dul aŋwen me abic bibedo mewu, pi kodi me acoya i pottiwu, ki pi camwu, ki jo ma i pacowu, ki cam pa litinowu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Gugamo ni, “Doŋ ityeko laro kwowa, wek berwa onen i nyimi, ladit, wan wabibedo opii pa Parao.”" 
Genesis47:26 Pi lok man Yucepu oketo odoko cik i lobo Ejipt, pud tye nio wa onyoo, ni, Parao myero oter dul acel me abic; lobo pa ajwagi keken aye pe odoko pa Parao." 
Genesis47:27 Jo Icrael gubedo i lobo Ejipt, i lobo Gocen; gunoŋo iye lim, gumedde, gunya mapol." 
Genesis47:28 Yakobo obedo i lobo Ejipt mwaka apar wiye abiro; kit meno nino pa Yakobo, mwaka me kwone ducu, oromo miya acel ki pyeraŋwen wiye abiro." 
Genesis47:29 Ka kare me to pa Icrael doŋ onyiko cok, ci olwoŋo wode Yucepu, owacce ni, “Ka doŋ berra onen boti, ci irwak ciŋi, odony ki piny i te ema, icikke kweda ki gen ki ada ni, pe ibiyika i Ejipt," 
Genesis47:30 ento wek acibut kacel ki’ kwarina; tiŋa woko ki i Ejipt, ci iciyika i kabedo ma giyikogi iye.” En ogamo ni, “Abitiyo kit ma doŋ iwaco-ni.”" 
Genesis47:31 Dok owaco ni, “Kwoŋŋa kwoŋ,” ci ocako kwoŋo kwoŋ, Lacen Icrael okulo wiye piny i wi kitandane." 
Genesis48:1 Lacen gitito bot Yucepu ni, “Nen, woru kome lit;” ci otero litino awobene aryo, Manace ki Epraim," 
Genesis48:2 Ka gitito ki Yakobo ni, “Wodi Yucepu obino boti,” ci Icrael ocukke oa malo, obedo i wi kitanda." 
Genesis48:3 Yakobo owaco bot Yucepu ni, “Lubaŋa Matwero-ducu yam onen bota i Luj i lobo Kanaan, omiya iye gum," 
Genesis48:4 owacca ni, ‘Nen, abimiyi inya imedde mapol, dok abimiyi idoko rok mapol, abimiyo lobo man bot likwayi ki jo ma bilubogi obed megi matwal.’" 
Genesis48:5 Awobeni aryo-ni ma inywalogi i lobo Ejipt ma onoŋo peya abino boti i Ejipt, meno mera gira; Epraim ki Manace gibibedo litinona, macalo Reuben ki Cimeon bene." 
Genesis48:6 Litino ma ginywalogi ki i ŋegi bibedo meri, ento gibikwanogi ki nyiŋ omegigi i kare ma gipoko lobo me bedo ginaleyagi." 
Genesis48:7 Pien ka yam aa ki i Paddan, me cwercwiny Lakeri otona woko i lobo Kanaan i waŋayo, munoŋo Eprat pud kiborbor; ci ayiko en i yo ma cito Eprat, en aye Beterekem.”" 
Genesis48:8 Ka Icrael oneno awobe pa Yucepu, ci owacci, “Man kono jo mene?”" 
Genesis48:9 Yucepu ogamo dog wonne ni, “Gin litino awobena, ma Lubaŋa omiya ki kany.” Ka owacci, “Kelgi bota kany, wek alam gum i komgi.”" 
Genesis48:10 I kare meno onoŋo Yako bo doŋ oti, waŋe ocido woko, ma pe doŋ neno piny. Ka Yucepu okelogi cok bote, ci onoto lemgi ka okwakogi ki bade." 
Genesis48:11 Icrael owaco bot Yucepu ni, “Onoŋo yam atamo ni pe dok abineno waŋi; nen, ka Lubaŋa dok omiyo aneno wa litinoni bene.”" 
Genesis48:12 Yucepu odirogi cen manok ki ka coŋe; oryebbe piny, okulo wiye-i ŋom." 
Genesis48:13 Yucepu otero gin aryo ducu, omako Epraim ki ciŋe tuŋ lacuc mukemo ciŋ Icrael ma lacam, ki Manace omako ki ciŋe tuŋ lacam ma okemo cin Icrael malacuc, odirogi cok bote." 
Genesis48:14 Icrael otino ciŋe malacuc oketo i wi Epraim, ma latin matidi, ki ciŋe malacam oketo i wi Manace, kun ogwenyo ciŋe, pien Manace aye onoŋo latin kayo." 
Genesis48:15 Olamo gum i kom Yucepu kun waco ni, “Lubaŋa ma yam kwarowa Abraim ki Icaka gubedo ka lubo cikke, Lubaŋa ma obedo ka kwayo an i kare me kwona ducu nio wa i nino man," 
Genesis48:16 lamalaika ma yam olara ki i gin marac, omi gum botawobe-ni; wek gilwoŋ nyiŋa pigi, ki nyiŋ kwarowa Abraim ki Icaka; gudoŋ, gudok lwak mapol i wi lobo.”" 
Genesis48:17 Ka Yucepu oneno ni wonne ogwenyo ciŋe malacuc aye dok oketo i wi Epraim, pe opwoyo; ci ocako kwanyo ciŋ wonne ki i wi Epraim wek elok eket i wi Manace," 
Genesis48:18 Yucepu owaco bot wonne ni, “Pe kit meno, wora, pien man aye latin kayo, ket ciŋi malacuc i wiye.”" 
Genesis48:19 Ento wonne okwero woko, kun wacci, “An aŋeyo ya latinna, aŋeyo; en bibedo rok, en bene bibedo madit, ento ominne matidi bibedo dit makato en, likwaye bidoko lwak rok mapol.”" 
Genesis48:20 Olamo gum i komgi i nino meno, kun wacci, “Icrael bilamo gum ki nyiŋwu, ni, ‘Lubaŋa omiyi ibed macalo Epraim ki Manace’;” kit meno oketo Epraim i nyim Manace." 
Genesis48:21 Icrael owaco bot Yucepu ni, “Nen, an doŋ acok to, ento Lubaŋa bibedo kwedwu, dok bidwokowu i lobo pa kwarowu." 
Genesis48:22 Kor got ma yam ayako ki i ciŋ jo Amor ki pala lucwan ki atero, doŋ atyeko miyo boti makato pa omegini.”" 
Genesis49:1 Yakobo olwoŋo awobene, ci owacogi ni, “Wucokke kacel, wek atittiwu gin ma bitimme i komwu i kare ma anyim." 
Genesis49:2 Wugurre wek wuwiny, wun litino awobe pa Yakobo, wuwiny wonwu Icrael." 
Genesis49:3 “Reuben, in aye latin kayona, in i kerona, ma akwoŋo nywalo ki tekona, in aye iloyo omegini ki wakke ki tek kom." 
Genesis49:4 Icorre macalo pii, pe ibiloyogi matwal, pien iito wa i wi kitanda pa woru; ipyedde iye, iito i wi kabutona!" 
Genesis49:5 “Cimeon ki Levi gin omego; pala lucwangi aye gi-lwenygi magwa. 
Genesis49:6 Tipona, pe icit i kacokkegi; in, cwinya, pe iribbe kwedgi i gurregi; pien guneko lwak dano ki kiniga dok gitoŋo odon twoni dyaŋi akaka." 
Genesis49:7 Gicen kinigagi, pien ger; gicen akemogi, pien gwa! Abipoko kingi aketogi i kin jo pa Yakobo abikeyogi woko i dye Icrael." 
Genesis49:8 “Juda, omegini gibipaki; ciŋi bimako ŋut lukworri: litino pa woru gibiryebbe piny i nyimi." 
Genesis49:9 Juda en latin labwor: ia ki ka mwodo lee, latinna, ci iito malo. En onyono piny, obuto calo labwor, macalo min labwor; aŋa ma bituge?" 
Genesis49:10 Odoo-ker pe bia ki bot Juda, tal-ker bene pe bia ki ka tyene, nio ka rwode kikome bibino: en aye rok ducu biworo doge." 
Genesis49:11 En tweyo latin kanane i kom yat olok, tweyo wod kana i kom olok maberre, en lwoko ginarukane ki koŋo vino ki boŋone i pig olok;" 
Genesis49:12 koŋo vino bimiyo waŋe lokke doko makwar, cak biloko lake doko matar." 
Genesis49:13 “Jabulon bibedo i dog nam en bibedo waŋ wat me mel, waŋ lobone bibedo wa i Cidon." 
Genesis49:14 “Icakar en kana matek, buto i dye anok romi;" 
Genesis49:15 oneno ka yweyone tye maber, ki lobone bene tye maber; onyoco gwoke piny ka tiŋo yec, odoko opii ma gidiyo i tic matek." 
Genesis49:16 “Dan biŋolo kop i kom jone macalo ŋat acel i kin kaka me Icrael. 
Genesis49:17 Dan bibedo twol ma i ŋet yo lacocodo ma iyo,’ ma bitoŋo opuny aguragura miyo labed i wiye poto ataro." 
Genesis49:18 Akuro lar meri, ai Rwot." 
Genesis49:19 “Gad mony bipoto i kome ento en binyono opuny tyengi. 
Genesis49:20 “Acer camme bibedo moo, en bikelo cam mamit muporo cam pa luker." 
Genesis49:21 “Naputali en labwo til ma gituko, ma iye olil ki lok" 
Genesis49:22 “Yucepu en jaŋ yat ma nyak, jaŋe ginyak madwoŋ i ŋet waŋ it; jaŋe gilak i kom cel." 
Genesis49:23 Wegi atero gilwenyo i kome ki gero, gibaye, giruce matek;" 
Genesis49:24 ento atumme cuŋ mot lilin, ciŋe odoko mit pi ciŋ Twon Oteka pa Yakobo, pi nyiŋ Lakwat, en Got pa Icrael," 
Genesis49:25 pi Lubaŋa pa woru ma bikonyi, pi Lubaŋa Matwero-ducu ma bi miyi gum; gum ma a malo i polo, gum ma a i kut matut muyarre i te lobo, gum ma a i tuno ki gum ma a i mego." 
Genesis49:26 Gum pa abani dwoŋ, loyo gum pa godi ma ri nakanaka, ki jami mabeco ma i wi cere ma bedo matwal; gubed i wi Yucepu, ki i tur nyime, en ma yam opokke woko ki i kin omegine." 
Genesis49:27 “Benjamin en orudi mager, camo lee ma oneko odiko, dok poko lim ma en oyako otyeno.”" 
Genesis49:28 Magi aye kaka pa Icrael apar wiye aryo; man aye lok ma wongi oloko kwedgi i kare ma en lamo gum i komgi, kun lamo gum i kom ŋat acel acel kit macalo gumme tye kwede." 
Genesis49:29 Ci doŋ ocikogi kun waco botgi ni “An doŋ abito adok bot jona; be; wubiyika bot kwarina i boro ma tye i poto pa Epron Lakit," 
Genesis49:30 i boro meno ma tye i Makpela, tuŋ wokceŋ me Mamre, i lobo Kanaan, ma yam Abraim owilo kacel ki poto, ki bot Epron Lakit, odoko mere me kabedo me yik." 
Genesis49:31 Kunnu yam giyiko iye Abraim ki dakone Cara; kunnu bene giyiko iye Icaka ki dakone Labeka; an bene dok ayiko Lea kunnu; 
Genesis49:32 poto meno ki boro ma tye iye yam giwilo ki bot jo Kit.” 
Genesis49:33 Ka Yakobo otyeko ciko litino awobene, ci odolo tyene malo i wi kitanda, oomo cwinye me agikkine, oto odok bot lutugi." 
Genesis50:1 Yucepu ocako poto i nyim wonne, okok ki pig waŋe kun noto leme," 
Genesis50:2 lacen ociko luticce ma ludaktar pi wiro kom wonne ki yat ma talo kom, ci ludaktar guwiro kom Icrael;" 
Genesis50:3 kun wirone otyeko nino pyeraŋwen, en aye nino ma mitte ka giwiro kom dano ki yat latal kom. Luejipt gukoko Yakobo nino pyerabiro." 
Genesis50:4 Ka nino me kwero cola doŋ otum, ci Yucepu oloko ki jo pa Parao, kun wacci, “Alegowu ni, ka wuneno kombeddi ni bedona botwu kany oyomo cwinywu, ci wuwac lokke bot Parao, kun wuwacce ni," 
Genesis50:5 wora omiya akwoŋo kwon kun waco ni, ‘An doŋ acok to: wubiyika i Lyel ma yam an ki koma aye akwinyo i lobo Kanaan.’ Mumiyo alegi ni, itima ber, wek aciyik wora, ka adwogi.”" 
Genesis50:6 Parao ogamme ni, “Ber iwot giri, iciyik woru, kit macalo en omiyo ikwoŋo akwoŋa-ni.”" 
Genesis50:7 Ci Yucepu ocito ka yiko wonne, ocito ki lwak lutic pa Parao ducu, ludoŋo me ode, ki ludoŋo ducu me lobo Ejipt," 
Genesis50:8 kacel ki jo ducu me ot pa Yucepu, ki omegine, ki jo me ot pa wonne. Litinogi keken ki lwak dyaŋigi ki dyegigi aye gudoŋ i lobo Gocen." 
Genesis50:9 Yucepu ocito ki lwak gadigadi ki wegi aguragura, owoto ki lwak jo mapol twatwal." 
Genesis50:10 Ka guo i laro moyo ma i Atad, ma tye loka Jordan ci gukok kunnu ki cwercwiny ki kumo madwoŋ; Yucepu okwero cola pa wonne nino abiro." 
Genesis50:11 Ka wegi lobo-nu ma gin Lukanaan, guneno kwero cola ma i laro moyo i Atad, ci guwaco ni, “Mankwero cola me cwercwiny madwoŋ bot Luejipt.” Pi meno nyiŋ kabedo meno gilwoŋo ni, Abel-micraim; tye loka Jordan." 
Genesis50:12 Awobene gutimo i kome kit ma nene en ocikogi kwede," 
Genesis50:13 pien awobene gutero kome i lobo Kanaan, ci guyiko kome i boro ma i poto ma tye i Makpela i tuŋ wokceŋ me Mamre, ma yam Abraim owilo, kacel ki poto, bot Epron Lakit, wek obed mere me kabedo me yik," 
Genesis50:14 Ka doŋ otyeko yiko wonne, ci Yucepu odok i Ejipt kacel ki omegine, ki jo ducu ma nene ocito kwedgi ka yiko wonne." 
Genesis50:15 Ka omegi Yucepu guneno ni wongi doŋ otyeko to woko, ci gutamo ni, “Gwok nyo Yucepu doŋ bicako kwerowa woko, biculo kwor ma yam watime kwede marac-ci i komwa.”" 
Genesis50:16 Omiyo gucako cwalo kwena bot Yucepu kun giwaco ni, “Yam woru ocikowa ki cik man ma onoŋo peya oto, ni," 
Genesis50:17 ‘Wuwac bot Yucepu ni, alegi itim kica bot omegini pi tim aranyi ki pi bal ma gutimo i komi, pien gutimo tim aranyi i komi ada.’ Doŋ kombeddi walegi itimwa kica pi tim aranyiwa, pien wan waworo Lubaŋa pa woru.” Yucepu okok ka guloko kwede." 
Genesis50:18 Omegine bene gucito ci guryebbe i nyime kun giwaco ni, “Nen, wan doŋ luticci.”" 
Genesis50:19 Ento Yucepu odok iye botgi ni, “Pe wulwor, an atye ma ka Lubaŋa bo?" 
Genesis50:20 Ki tuŋ botwu yam wuyubbe pi timo gin marac i koma, ento Lubaŋa oyubo pi tiyo gin maber, ma omiyo jo mapol gubedo kwo, macalo gitye kwede wa kombeddi." 
Genesis50:21 Pi meno pe wubed ki lworo mo; abipitowu ki litinowu ducu.” Kit meno ojiŋo cwinygi kun kweyo igi. 
Genesis50:22 Kit meno Yucepu obedo i Ejipt, en ki jo me ot pa wonne, ori mwaka miya acel ki apar." 
Genesis50:23 Yucepu oneno litino pa Epraim, nio wa i kom likwaye me adekke; litino pa Makir wod pa Manace en omiyo gubedo mere bene." 
Genesis50:24 Yucepu owaco bot omegine ni, “An doŋ acok to; ento Lubaŋa bilimowu, dok en bikwanyowu woko ki i lobo man, bidwokowu ka ma yam okwoŋo iye bot Abraim ki Icaka ki bot Yakobo.”" 
Genesis50:25 Yucepu omiyo litino pa Icrael gukwoŋo kwoŋ kun waco ni, “Lubaŋa bilimowu, ci wubiiino cogona woko ki kany.”" 
Genesis50:26 Yucepu oto, ma mwaka me ditte romo miya acel ki apar; guwiro kome ki yat latal-kom, lacen gupyelo kome i canduk me yik i Ejipt." 
Exodus1:1 Man aye nyiŋ awobe pa Icrael ma yam gubino i Ejipt kacel ki Yakobo, kun ŋat acel acel bino ki jo nia i ode:" 
Exodus1:2 Reuben, Cimeon, Levi, Juda," 
Exodus1:3 Icakar, Jabulon, ki Benjamin," 
Exodus1:4 Dan ki Naputali, Gad ki Acer." 
Exodus1:5 Litino pa Yakobo ducu giromo pyerabiro, kun onoŋo Yucepu doŋ tye i Ejipt." 
Exodus1:6 Ci Yucepu oto, ki omege ki yalwak ke ducu." 
Exodus1:7 Ento likwayo pa Icrael gunya gumedde mapol; gunya, gudoko matek twatwal, ci gupoŋo lobo woko." 
Exodus1:8 Ka kabaka manyen oloyo Ejipt, ma yam pe ŋeyo Yucepu," 
Exodus1:9 ci ocako waco ki lwak ke ni, “Nenu, jo Icrael doŋ gidwoŋ twatwal, dok gitek, giloyowa woko." 
Exodus1:10 Wubin wek watimugi ki ryeko, wek pe gunya twatwal; pien ka mony bipoto i komwa, ci giribbe ki lumerokwa ka lweny i komwa, ci giriŋo woko, giweko lobowa.”" 
Exodus1:11 Pi meno guketo ludito ma loyo tic me romogi, ki tic madwoŋ; ci gugero ki Parao gaŋ kal ma nyiŋgi Pitom ki Ramcec, me kano cam." 
Exodus1:12 Ento ka gimedo can i komgi, gin bene ginya, gimedde, gipoŋo lobo malac, ci Luejipt gubedo ki lworo i kom jo Icrael." 
Exodus1:13 Pienno girido jo Icrael ki tic magwa," 
Exodus1:14 ma omiyo kwogi obedo ki peko pi tic matego me nyono lobo ki goyo matafali, ki kit tic ducu me poto; i dog ticgi ducu giridogi ki tic magwa." 
Exodus1:15 Ka dok kabaka me Ejipt oloko bot lucol-mon pa jo Ibru, ma ŋat acel nyiŋe Cipira ki mukene Pua, owaco ni," 
Exodus1:16 “Ka wutye ka colo mon jo Ibru, ka wunenogi ma pud gitye i wi kom me nywal, ka latin laco, ci wubineko woko; ka latin nyako, ci wuwek makwo.”" 
Exodus1:17 Ento lucolo yam lworo Lubaŋa, ci pe, gutiyo kit ma kabaka me Ejipt ocikogi ento guweko litino co makwo," 
Exodus1:18 Mumiyo kabaka me Ejipt dok olwoŋo lucolmon, ci owaco botgi ni, “Wutimo kuman piŋo, ma wuweko litino co makwo-ni?”" 
Exodus1:19 Lucol-mon guwaco bot Parao ni, “Pien mon jo Ibru pe girom ki mon Ejipt, pien komgi rom, miyo ginywal woko ma noŋo lacol-mon peya obino botgi,”" 
Exodus1:20 Mumiyo Lubaŋa otimo lucol-mon ber; dano gunya gudoko matek twatwal. 
Exodus1:21 Pien lucolmon gulworo Lubaŋa, Lubaŋa omiyogi gudoko mego." 
Exodus1:22 Parao dok ociko lwakke ducu ni, “Latin laco acel acel ma jo Ibru gunywalo wubibolo woko i kulu Nail, ento wubiweko litino anyira ducu gibedo makwo.”" 
Exodus2:1 Laco mo ma ladoggola pa Levi ocito onyomo nyako mo ma nya pa Levi. 
Exodus2:2 Dako-nu ogamo ic, ci onywalo latin laco. Ka dako oneno ni latinne ber twatwal, ci okane woko dwe adek." 
Exodus2:3 Ka doŋ pe twero kanne, ci otiŋo aduku ma gicweyo ki togo, ci opuyo ki odok yat; opyelo iye latin, otero oroyo i dye aluga ma i ŋet kulu." 
Exodus2:4 Laminne ocuŋ ki cen pi ŋeyo gin ma bitimme i kome. 
Exodus2:5 Ka nya pa Parao obino ka lwok i kulu, ci anyirane guwoto gurabo ŋet kulu; en oneno aduku ki i kin aluga, ocwalo aŋecane ka omone." 
Exodus2:6 Ka oelo wiye, ci oneno iye latin; ci nen, latin okok. Kica omake i kome, ci owacci, “Man latin pa jo Ibru.”" 
Exodus2:7 Laminne owaco ki nya pa Parao ni, “Acit alwoŋ lapidi mo ki i kin mon Ibru, wek opitti’ latin bo?”" 
Exodus2:8 Nya pa Parao ogamo ni, “Citi.” Kit meno nyako-nu ocito olwoŋo min latin." 
Exodus2:9 Ci’ nya pa Parao owacce ni, “Cit ki latin man, ci icipitta; an abiculli mucarani.” Kit meno min latin otero latin, opito." 
Exodus2:10 Ka doŋ latin odoŋo, ci otere bot nya pa Parao, odoko wode ocako nyiŋe Moses kun waco ni, “Pien aywayo ki i pii.”" 
Exodus2:11 Ka Moses doŋ odoŋo, ci i niŋo mo acel en owoto bot lutugi, oneno pekogi. Ka oneno Laejipt mo ka goyo Laibru mo, ma ŋat acel i kin lutugi," 
Exodus2:12 ci oneno piny tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi, pe oneno ŋatti mo, ci oneko Laejipt meno, okane woko i kweyo," 
Exodus2:13 Ka dok orwone, ka odok, nen jo Ibru aryo dok gubedo ka lweny, ci owaco bot latim bal ni, “Piŋo igoyo lawoti?”" 
Exodus2:14 Ogamo ni, “Aŋa muketi me bedo laker ki laŋolkop i komwa? In imito neka macalo ineke Laejipt-ti?” Ci lworo omako Moses kun tamo ni, “Ada lok man oŋene woko.”" 
Exodus2:15 Ka Parao owinyo lok man, ci omito neko Moses. Ento Moses oriŋo olwi woko ki bot Parao, obedo i lobo Midian; ci obedo piny i ŋet waŋ pii." 
Exodus2:16 Onoŋo yam ajwaka pa jo Midian tye ki anyirane abiro; gubino gutwomo pii, ci gupoŋo weer ki pii me amata pa lim pa wongi." 
Exodus2:17 Lukwat gubino guryemogi woko; ento Moses oa ci okonyogi, omiyo limgi gumato pii." 
Exodus2:18 Ka gudwogo wongi Reuel, en owacci, “Piŋo wudwogo con?”" 
Exodus2:19 Gugamo ni, “laEjipt mo aye olarowa ki bot lukwat en, aye otwomowa pacoii, dok omiyo lim omato.”" 
Exodus2:20 Reuel owaco ki anyirane ni“En tye kwene? Piŋo wuweko laco meno odoŋ woko? Wulwoŋe wek ocam kwon.” 
Exodus2:21 Moses oye bedo bot dano meno, en omiyo nyare Jipola Moses." 
Exodus2:22 Ci onywalo latin laco, ocako nyiŋe Gercom, kun waco ni, “An labedo i lobo pa lurok.”" 
Exodus2:23 I lwak kare meno ducu, kabaka Ejipt oto iye woko, ci jo Icrael gubedo ka cur pi bedo opii, kun gikok gimito kony; ci kokogi pi bedo opii owinnye bot Lubaŋa." 
Exodus2:24 Ka Lubaŋa owinyo cur megi, ci opo pi gicikkene ki Abralm ki Icaka, ki Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Lubaŋa oneno jo Icrael, ci oŋeyo kit bedogi." 
Exodus3:1 Ka yam Moses tye ka kwayo lim pa won dakone, Yecero, ma ajwaka pa jo Midian, ci otero limme i tim ma yo tuŋ potoceŋ, owoto kwede wa i Koreb, ma got pa Lubaŋa," 
Exodus3:2 Lamalaika pa Rwot onen bote i leb mac ma i dye caka; oneno caka tye ka lyel mac pe gin mo waŋ," 
Exodus3:3 Moses owacci, “Abiŋak wek anen gin ma nen madit-ti ki piŋo caka-ni pe waŋ woko.”" 
Exodus3:4 Ka Lubaŋa oneno ni en oŋak ka nenone Lubaŋa olwoŋe ki i caka, ni, “Moses! Moses!” En ogamo ni, “An a ene.”" 
Exodus3:5 Ci Lubaŋa owacce ni, “Pe inyik cok kany. Luny war woko ki i tyeni, pien kabedo ma icuŋ iye-ni noŋ maleŋ.”" 
Exodus3:6 Ka owacce ni, “An Lubaŋa pa woru Lubaŋa pa Abraim, Lubaŋa pa Icaka ki Lubaŋa pa Yakobo.” Moses okano waŋe woko, pien onoŋo lworo neno Lubaŋa." 
Exodus3:7 Rwot dok owacci, “Doŋ atyeko neno atwom pa jona i Ejipt, ka dok awinyo kokogi i kom ludito ma loyo ticgi." 
Exodus3:8 Ci doŋ alor piny ka larogi ki iciŋ jo Ejipt, ki kwanyogi woko ki i lobo meno, wek akelgi i lobo maber, malac, lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic, i kabedo pa jo Kanaan, jo Kit, jo Amor, jo Periji, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc." 
Exodus3:9 Ci nen, koko pa jo Icrael doŋ owinnye wa bota, dok aneno kit uno ma jo Ejipt giunogi kwede." 
Exodus3:10 Bin, abicwali bot Parao wek ikwany jona, likwayo pa Icrael, ki i Ejipt.”" 
Exodus3:11 Ento Moses owaco bot Lubaŋa ni, “An aŋa ma aromo cito bot Parao, ki kwanyo likwayo pa Icrael woko ki i Ejipt?”" 
Exodus3:12 Lubaŋa ogamo ni, “Ento an aye abibedo kwedi; man aye bibedo lanyut boti, ma nyuto ni an aye acwali: ka doŋ ityeko kwanyo jona woko ki i Ejipt, ci wubiworo Lubaŋa i kom got man.”" 
Exodus3:13 Moses owaco bot Lubaŋa ni, “Ka acito bot jo Icrael, awaco botgi ni, ‘Lubaŋa pa kwarowu ocwala botwu,’ ce ka gupenya ni, ‘Nyiŋe aŋa?’ ci abiwaco botgi nio?”" 
Exodus3:14 Ci Lubaŋa owaco ki Moses ni, “ATYE MA ATYE.” Ka dok owacci, “Wac lok man bot jo Icrael ni, ‘ATYE aye ocwala botwu.’ ”" 
Exodus3:15 Lubaŋa dok onwoyo waco bot Moses ni, “Wac man bot jo Icrael, ni, ‘Rwot, ma en Lubaŋa pa kwarowu, Lubaŋa pa Abraim, Lubaŋa pa Icaka, Lubaŋa pa Yakobo, ocwala botwu.’ Man aye nyiŋa matwal, wubipo i koma, wun ki likwayowu ducu, kit man." 
Exodus3:16 Cit icok ludoŋo pa jo Icrael kacel, ka iwac botgi ni, ‘Rwot, ma en Lubaŋa pa kwarowu, Lubaŋa pa Abraim, pa Icaka ki pa Yakobo, otyeko nen bota, kun waco ni, Aciko waŋa ka nenowu, ki kit ma gitimowu kwede i Ejipt;" 
Exodus3:17 doŋ acikke ni abikwanyowu woko ki i atwom ma wutye kwede i Ejipt, adwokowu i lobo pa jo Kanaan, jo Kit, jo Amor, jo Periji, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc, i lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic.’" 
Exodus3:18 Ci gin gibiworo dogi; in ki ludoŋo pa jo Icrael wubicito bot kabaka me Ejipt, ci wuwacce ni ‘Rwot, ma en Lubaŋa pa jo Ibru, oromo kwedwa, ci kombeddi walegi ni, wek wawot i tim, wot ma romo nino adek, wek watyer gitum bot Rwot Lubaŋawa.’" 
Exodus3:19 Aŋeyo ni kabaka me Ejipt pe biye wun wucito nio ka giruye ki bad matek. 
Exodus3:20 Mumiyo abiryeyo bada, ci abipwodo jo Ejipt ki taŋo ducu ma abitiyo kunnu; ci lacen en biye wucito." 
Exodus3:21 Dok abimiyo jo man ginoŋo gum i nyim jo Ejipt, wek ka wubicito, pe wucit ki ciŋwu nono," 
Exodus3:22 ento dako acel acel bikwayo dako wadi, ki dako ma labedo i ode, kun lego atego ryal ki atego jabu, ki boŋo bene ma wubiruko i kom awobewu ki anyirawu; kit meno miyo wubiyako jo Ejipt.”" 
Exodus4:1 Moses ogamo ni, “Ento nen, pe gibiye lokka, pe gibiwinyo doga bene, pien gibiwacci, “Rwot gire pe onen boti.”" 
Exodus4:2 Rwot owacce ni, “Meno gin aŋo ma i ciŋi-nu?” Ogamo ni, “Odoo.’" 
Exodus4:3 Ci owacce ni, “Bol piny i ŋom.” Ci ka obolo piny i ŋom, olokke odoko twol; Moses oriŋo woko cen." 
Exodus4:4 Ento Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Rye ciŋi imak ki tuŋ yibe.” Oryeyo ciŋe, omako; ci olokke odoko odoo ki i ciŋe," 
Exodus4:5 Rwot owaco ni, “Man bimiyo giye ni Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarogi, Lubaŋa pa Abraim, pa Icaka, ki pa Yakobo, otyeko nen boti.”" 
Exodus4:6 Ci Rwot owacce ni, “Rwak ciŋi i kori.” Orwako ciŋe i kore; ka okwanyo woko, ci nen, ciŋe orugo matar macalo pee." 
Exodus4:7 Rwot dok owacce ni, “Rwak ciŋi i kori.” Ci dok orwako ciŋe i kore; ka okwanyo woko, nen, ciŋe odok kakare macalo kome mukene ducu." 
Exodus4:8 Lubaŋa dok owaco ni, “Ka pe gibiye lokki, nyo pe gibiparo bene pi lanyut mukwoŋo-ni, ci gibiye lanyut malacen." 
Exodus4:9 Ka bene pe gibiye lanyut man aryo-ni ducu, ki kwero winyo dogi, ci ibitwomo pii ki i kulu Nail, ionyo i lobo ka ma otwo; ci pii ma itwomo ki i Nail bidoko remo ki i lobo ma otwo-ni.”" 
Exodus4:10 Ento Moses owaco bot Rwot ni, “Ai Rwoda, an ladwal nia wa con, kadi wa i kare ma ibedo ka lok kweda. Onoŋo atye ma aywayo lok mot, leba dwalle woko.”" 
Exodus4:11 Rwot dok owacce ni, “Aŋa ma oketo dog dano? Aŋa ma miyo dano bedo Iato-dog, nyo ladiŋ-it, ma neno piny nyo lawaŋe-oto? Pe an aye atiyo, ma a Rwot-ti?" 
Exodus4:12 Pi meno doŋ iciti, abibedo ki dogi, abipwonyi ki gin ma ibiloko.”" 
Exodus4:13 Ento en dok ogamo ni, “Ai, Rwoda, alegi ni icwal ŋat mukene.”" 
Exodus4:14 Ci kiniga: pa Rwot otugge i kom Moses kun wacci, “Aron pe tye kunnu, ma omeru-ni, ma Lalevi? An aŋeyo en lebe loko atir, ci nen, en obebino ka rwatte kwedi; ka en bineni, ci cwinye bibedo yom." 
Exodus4:15 In ibilok kwede, ki keto lok i doge, an abibedo ki dogi, ki doge bene, ci abipwonyowu ki gin ma wubitiyo." 
Exodus4:16 En aye bilok ki lwak maka in; en bibedo maka dogi, dok in ibibedo macalo Lubaŋa bote." 
Exodus4:17 Ibicito ki odoo man i ciŋi, ma ibitiyo ki lanyut magi.”" 
Exodus4:18 Moses ka odok bot Yecero, ma won dakone, ci owacce ni, “Alegi wek koŋ adok bot omega ma i Ejipt, wek anen ka pud gitye makwo.” Ci Yecero ogamo dog Moses ni, “Cit ki kuc.”" 
Exodus4:19 Rwot owaco bot Moses i Midian ni, “Dok cen wa i Ejipt; pien jo ma yam mito neki doŋ guto woko ducu.”" 
Exodus4:20 Kit meno Moses okwanyo dakone ki awobene, oketogi i wi kana, ci owoto, odok cen i lobo Ejipt, kun omako odoo pa Lubaŋa i ciŋe." 
Exodus4:21 Rwot oloko bot Moses ni, “Ka doŋ ityeko dok cen i Ejipt, nen ni itiyo i nyim Parao taŋo ducu ma atyeko keto i ciŋi-ni; ento abijiŋo cwinye doko nwaŋ, ma pe biye dano woto." 
Exodus4:22 In ibiwaco bot Parao ni, ‘Rwot owaco kit man ni, Icrael aye latin kayona," 
Exodus4:23 ci awacci ni, Wek latinna ocit ka tic bota; ka ikwero kome ni pe ociti, nen, abineko latin kayoni woko.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 I kabutogi i yo en aye Rwot oromo ki Moses kun mito neke woko. 
Exodus4:25 Ci Jipola okwanyo got mabit, oliro ki kom latin awobine, ogudo ki tyen Moses kun wacce ni, “Ada, in i cwa remo!”" 
Exodus4:26 Ci Rwot oweke gire. Oloko ni, “In i cwara pi remo,” me lirre-nu." 
Exodus4:27 Rwot owaco bot Aron ni, "" cit i tim, wek icirom ki Moses.” Ci oromo kwede wa i te got pa lubaŋa ka onoto leme." 
Exodus4:28 Ci Moses otito bot Aron lok ducu ma Rwot owacce, ma ocwalle kwede, ki lanyut ducu ma ociko ni oti kwede." 
Exodus4:29 Ci Moses ki Aron gucito, gucoko ludoŋo pa jo Icrael ducu" 
Exodus4:30 Ci Aron oloko lok ducu ma Rwot oloko bot Moses, ci onyuto lanyut ducu i nyim dano." 
Exodus4:31 Dano guye; ka guwinyo ni Rwot otyeko limo jo Icrael dok otyeko neno atwomgi ci gukulo wigi piny, guworo Lubaŋa" 
Exodus5:1 Lacen Moses ki Aron gucito bot Parao, guwacce ni, “Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco kit man ni, ‘Wek jona guciti, wek gukwer nino madit i tim.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Ento Parao ogamoni “Rwot en aŋa, ma myero awiny doge ci awek Icrael owot-ti? An pe aŋeyo Rwot meno, dok bene pe abiweko jo Icrael woto!”" 
Exodus5:3 Gin dok guwacce ni “Lubaŋa pa jo Ibru oromo kwedwai walegi ni iwek wan waciti, wawot wot me nino adek, ka tyero gitum bot Rwot Lubaŋawa, wek pe en opt i komwa ki two gemo marac nyo pala lucwan.”" 
Exodus5:4 Ento Parao ma kabaka me Ejipt owaco botgi ni, “Moses wun ki Aron, piŋo wukwanyo dano woko ki i dog ticgi? Wun wudok i dog tic" 
Exodus5:5 Ka dok owacci, “Nen, dano odoko dwoŋ woko i lobo, wun kono umiyo giywe i dog ticgi.”" 
Exodus5:6 I nino meno ociko ludito ma loyo tic pa lwak, ki lunyampara, ni," 
Exodus5:7 “Pe dok wumedde kelogi lum ocwici me goyo matafali kit macon, wek gin aye gucit ka tweyone." 
Exodus5:8 Ento wel matafali ma yam gigoyo-ni wuwek gumedde kwede, pe wudwok welle piny; pien gin luwackom, mumiyo gikok ni, ‘Wek wacit i tim ka tyero gitum bot Lubaŋawa.’" 
Exodus5:9 Wumi tic mapek wek co gubed i dog tic pe guket cwinygi i lok goba.” 
Exodus5:10 Kit meno ludito ma loyo lunyampara pa lwak gucito guwaco bot dano ni, “Parao owaco kit man ni, ‘Wan pe dok wabikelliwu lum ocwici." 
Exodus5:11 Wun doŋ wucit kikomwu, wuyeny ka ma wutwero noŋo lum ocwici; ento ticwu pe gibidwoko welle piny.”’" 
Exodus5:12 Kit meno dano guket i lobo Ejipt ducu ka coko reŋ kal me ocwici. 
Exodus5:13 Ludito ma loyo tic giruyogi kun giwacci, “Wucob ticwu, kit me nino ducu, kit macalo yam lum ocwici tye-ni.’," 
Exodus5:14 Ki lunyampara pa jo Icrael, ma ludito ma loyo tic pa Parao oketogi me neno tic-ci, gubedo ka pwodogi kun gipenyogi ni, “Piŋo pe wucobo tic me goyo matafali tin, kit macon?”" 
Exodus5:15 Ka lunyampara pa jo Icrael gucito gukok bot Parao ni, “Piŋo itimowa kit man, ladit?" 
Exodus5:16 Pe doŋ gikelo lum ocwici botwa, ento giwacowa ni, ‘Wugo matafali!’ Nen, ka gipwodowa, ladit; ento bal tye i kom lwakki!”" 
Exodus5:17 Ento en ogamo ni, “Wun luwackom, wun luwackom; en mumiyo wuwaco ni, ‘Wuwek wacit ka tyero gitum bot Rwot.’" 
Exodus5:18 Wucit kombeddi ka tic. Pe gibimiyowu lum ocwici mo, dok bene wubigoyo matafali ma rom ki wel macon.”" 
Exodus5:19 Lunyampara pa jo Icrael guneno ni doŋ gitye marac, ka giwacogi ni, “Wun pe wubidwoko wel matafali piny kit me nino ducu.”" 
Exodus5:20 Giromo ki Moses ki Aron ma onoŋo yam gitye ka kurogi, ka gia gidwogo ki bot Parao;" 
Exodus5:21 guwaco botgi ni, “Rwot onenwu dok oŋolliwu kop, pien wun wumiyo nyiŋwa odoko ŋwe lituny i nyim Parao ki luticce, dok wumiyo pala lucwan i ciŋgi me nekowa.”" 
Exodus5:22 Moses olokke bot Rwot, owacce ni, “Ai Rwot, itimo jo-ni marac kuman piŋo? Icwala ka ŋo kaa?" 
Exodus5:23 Nia ma abino bot Parao, ma aloko kwede pi nyiŋi, en ocako timo jo-ni marac cut, in bene peya ilaro joni wacel.”" 
Exodus6:1 Ento Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Tin doŋ ibineno gin ma abitimo i kom Parao; en bicwalogi woko ki bade matek, ci ryemogi woko ki i lobone ki tek.”" 
Exodus6:2 Lubaŋa owaco bot Moses ni, “An a Rwot." 
Exodus6:3 Yam anen bot Abraim, bot Icaka ki bot Yakobo, kun giŋeyo ni an Lubaŋa Matwero-ducu, ento pe amiyo guŋeyo ni nyiŋa aye Rwot." 
Exodus6:4 An yam amoko gicikkena kwedgi bene, pi miyo botgi lobo Kanaan, en aye lobo ma yam gubedo iye lubedo-ni." 
Exodus6:5 Dok bene atyeko winyo cur pa jo Icrael ma jo Ejipt olokogi gudoko opii-ni, an bene doŋ atyeko po gicikkena." 
Exodus6:6 Wac bot jo Icrael ni, an a Rwot, abikwanyowu woko ki i peko ma jo Ejipt keto i komwu, abilarowu ki i opii megi, abikokowu woko ki ciŋa ma aryeyo, ki pi kop madito ma abiŋolo i wigi." 
Exodus6:7 Abiterowu me bedo jona, dok an abibedo Lubaŋawu; wun wubiŋeyo ni an a Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma akwanyowu ki i kom peko ma jo Ejipt giketo i komwu." 
Exodus6:8 Ci abikelowu i lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire ni abimiyo bot Abraim, ki Icaka ki Yakobo, abimiyo botwu obed lobowu; an a Rwot.”" 
Exodus6:9 Moses oloko kit meno bot jo Icrael; ento pe guwinyo lok pa Moses, pien cwinygi oballe woko pi tic me opii mukato kare." 
Exodus6:10 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Exodus6:11 “Cit idony bot Parao, kabaka me Ejipt, ci ititte ni owek jo Icrael gua woko ki i lobone.”" 
Exodus6:12 Ento Moses owaco bot Rwot ni, “Nen, jo Icrael pe guwinyo lokka, ci Parao biwinyo lokka niŋniŋ, ma an a dano ma dogga pe leŋ-ŋi?”" 
Exodus6:13 Ento Rwot oloko ki Moses ki Aron, ocikogi bot jo Icrael, ki bot Parao, kabaka me Ejipt pi kwanyo jo Icrael woko ki i lobo Ejipt." 
Exodus6:14 Man aye ludito wi kaka i odi pa kwarogi: litino awobe pa Reuben, latin kayo pa Icrael gin ene: Kanok, Pallu, Kejeron ki Karmi; meno aye doggola pa Reuben." 
Exodus6:15 Litino awobe pa Cimeon gin ene: Jemuel, Jamin, ŋkad, Jakin, Jokar ki Caul, awobi pa dako Lakanaan; meno aye doggola pa Cimeon." 
Exodus6:16 Man aye nyiŋ litino awo be pa Levi, kun lubo yalwakgi: Gercon, Kokat ki Merari; wel mwaka me kwo pa Levi oromo miya acel ki pyeradek wiye abiro." 
Exodus6:17 Litino awobe pa Gercon gin ene: Libni ki Cimei, macalo doggolagi tye kwede." 
Exodus6:18 Litino awobe pa Kokat gin ene: Amram, Ijar, Kebron ki Ujiel; wei mwaka me kwo pa Kokat oromo miya acel ki pyeradek wiye adek." 
Exodus6:19 Litino awobe pa Merari gin ene: Makali ki Muci. Meno aye doggola pa Lulevi, kun lubo yalwakgi." 
Exodus6:20 Amram onyomo Yokobedi lamiŋ wonne, ci onywalo Aron ki Moses; wel mwaka me kwo pa Amram oromo miya acel ki pyeradek wiye abiro." 
Exodus6:21 Litino awobe pa Ijar gin ene: Kora, Nepeg ki Jikri." 
Exodus6:22 Litino awobe pa Ujiel gin ene: Micael, Elijapan ki Citri." 
Exodus6:23 Aron onyomo Eliceba nya pa Aminadab, lamin Nakucon, ci onywalo Nadab, Abiu, Eleajar ki Itamar." 
Exodus6:24 Litino awobe pa Kora gin ene: Elkana ki Abiacap; meno aye doggola pa jo pa Kora. 
Exodus6:25 Eleajar, wod pa Aron, onyomo dako ma i kin anyira pa Putiel, ci onywalo Finekaci. Meno aye ludito wi kaka ma i odi pa Lulevi, macalo doggolagi tye kwede." 
Exodus6:26 Man gin aye Aron ki Moses ma Lubaŋa owaco botgi ni, “Wukwany jo Icrael woko ki i lobo Ejipt ki bucagi.”" 
Exodus6:27 Gin aye yam guloko ki Parao kabaka me Ejipt pi kwanyo jo Icrael woko ki ‘i lobo Ejipt; man aye Moses ki Aron meno. 
Exodus6:28 I kom nino ma Rwot oloko iye ki Moses i lobo Ejipt," 
Exodus6:29 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “An a Rwot; tit bot Parao kabaka me Ejipt lok ducu ma awaccini.”" 
Exodus6:30 Ento Moses owaco bot Rwot ni, “Nen, doga pe leŋ; Parao biwinya niŋni,ŋ?”" 
Exodus7:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Nen aketi macalo Lubaŋa bot Parao, ki omeru Aron bibedo lanebini." 
Exodus7:2 In ibiloko lok ducu ma aciko boti; ci omeru Aron bitito bot Parao pi weko jo Icrael gua woko ki i lobone. 
Exodus7:3 Ento abijiŋo cwiny Parao doko nwaŋ, abimedo lwak lanyut ki taŋo i lobo Ejipt." 
Exodus7:4 Parao pe biwinyo lokki; abiketo ciŋa i kom Ejipt, ci abikwanyo monnya, jona, ma gin aye likwayo pa Icrael, ki i Ejipt, pi kop madito ma abiŋolo i wiye." 
Exodus7:5 Jo Ejipt gibiŋeyo ni an a Rwot, ka abiryeyo ciŋa i kom lobo Ejipt pi kwanyo jo Icrael woko ki i kingi.”" 
Exodus7:6 Moses ki Aron gutimo kit ma Rwot ocikogi. 
Exodus7:7 Moses onoŋo mwaka me ditte romo pyeraboro, ki pa Aron pyeraboro wiye adek, i kare ma gubedo ka lok ki Parao-ni." 
Exodus7:8 Rwot dok oloko ki Moses ki Aron ni," 
Exodus7:9 “Ka Parao owaco botwu ni, ‘Wunyut ada mewu pi tiyo taŋo,’ ci ibiwaco ki Aron ni, ‘Kwany odooni, ibol piny i nyim Parao, wek olokke odok twol.’”" 
Exodus7:10 Kit meno Moses ki Aron gucito bot Parao gutiyo kit ma Rwot ocikogi kwede; Aron obolo odoone piny i nyim Parao ki luticce, ci olokke odoko twol." 
Exodus7:11 Ci Parao olwoŋo jo ma luryeko ki lutal, ma gin lutyet ma i Ejipt, gin bene gutimo ma rom meno ki ryekogi." 
Exodus7:12 Pien ŋat acel acel obolo odoone piny, ci gulokke gudoko twol, ento odoo pa Aron omwonyogi woko ducu." 
Exodus7:13 Ento cwiny Parao pud obedo tek aye, pe omedo ki winyogi kit ma Rwot owaco-ni," 
Exodus7:14 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni, “Cwiny Parao odoko nwaŋ, okwero weko dano ocito." 
Exodus7:15 Cit odiko bot Parao macalo en cito i dog kulu-ni; cit ikur en i ŋet kulu, mak odoo i ciŋi, ma yam olokke odoko twol-li." 
Exodus7:16 Ci ibiwacce ni, ‘Rwot Lubaŋa pa jo Ibru ocwala boti, kun waco ni, Wek jona guciti, wek guti bota i tim, dok nen, in peya iworo doga." 
Exodus7:17 Ci Rwot doŋ owaco kuman ni, Pi lok man bimiyo iŋeyo ni an a Rwot: nen, abigoyo pii ma tye i kulu Nail ki odoo ma tye i ciŋa-ni, ci pii bilokke doko remo," 
Exodus7:18 ci rec ma i Nail gibikato woko, kulu Nail bilokke doko ma ŋwe coo, dok jo Ejipt cwinygi bikwero mato pii ma i kulu Nail woko.’’’" 
Exodus7:19 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Wac ki Aron ni ‘Kwany odooni ci irye ciŋi i wi pii me Ejipt, i wi kulugi, i wi kulu akwinyagi, i wi kabedo ducu ka ma pii opoŋ iye, wek gulokke gudok remo; wek remo orom i lobo Ejipt ducu ki atabo weer ducu, ki i agulu godi ducu.’ ”" 
Exodus7:20 Moses ki Aron gutimo macalo Rwot ocikogi. Aron otiŋo odoone malo ki i nyim Parao ki luticce; ci ogoyo ki pii ma i kulu Nail, ci pii ducu ma i kulu Nail olokke odoko remo." 
Exodus7:21 Rec ma i kulu Nail gucako to woko, ci kulu Nail odoko ŋwe coo; pienno jo Ejipt pe doŋ gitwero mato pii ma i kulu Nail; dok remo oromo i lobo Ejipt ducu." 
Exodus7:22 Ento lutyet me Ejipt bene gutimo ma rom meno ki ryekogi; omiyo cwiny Parao odoko nwaŋ aye, okwero winyogi woko, kit ma Rwot owaco-ni." 
Exodus7:23 Parao olokke odok i ode, kun pe cwinye paro kadi pi man." 
Exodus7:24 Jo Ejipt ducu gubedo ka kwinyo pii me amata i ŋet kulu Nail, pien pe doŋ gitwero mato pii ma i kulu Nail." 
Exodus7:25 Ka nino okato abiro nia ma Rwot ogoyo kulu Nail. 
Exodus8:1 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni, “Cit idony bot Parao, ci iwacce ni Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘Wek jona guciti wek guti bota." 
Exodus8:2 Ento ka ikwero wekogi ni guciti, ci nen, abicoro gemo ogwal i loboni ducu." 
Exodus8:3 Ogwal bicorre limuk i kulu Nail ma gibibino wa i odi bene ki i kicikani, ki i wi kitandani ki i odi pa luticci, ki pa lwakki, ki i keno tedoni, ki otako lanywaŋ mokoni." 
Exodus8:4 Ogwal bipye wa i komi ki i kom lwakki ki i kom luticci ducu.’” 
Exodus8:5 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni, “Wac bot Aron ni, ‘Doŋ irye ciŋi ki odooni i wi kulu ducu, i wi kulu akwinya, ki i wi kut, wek ogwal ocorre i lobo Ejipt!’”" 
Exodus8:6 Aron oryeyo cine i wi pii ducu ma i Ejipt. Ogwal obino ci oumo wi lobo Ejipt woko. 
Exodus8:7 Ento lutyet bene gutimo ma rom meno ki ryekogi, ci gukelo lwak ogwal bene i lobo Ejipt." 
Exodus8:8 Lacen Parao olwoŋo Moses ki Aron, owacci, “Leg Rwot wek okwany ogwal woko ki i koma ki i kom lwakka; ci abiweko dano gicito ka tyero gitum bot Rwot.”" 
Exodus8:9 Moses owaco bot Parao ni, “Ber in aye icika kare ma aleg iye piri, pi luticci ki pi lwakki, wek ogwal oto otum woko i komi ki i odini, wek odon ma i kulu Nail keken.”" 
Exodus8:10 Ci ogamo ni, “Diki adika-ni.” Moses owacci, “Obed kit macalo iwaco-ni, wek in iŋe ni pe tye ŋatti mo macalo Rwot Lubaŋawa-ni," 
Exodus8:11 Ogwal bia woko ki boti, ki i odini, ki i kom luticci ki lwakki; gibiweko ma i kulu Nail keken.”" 
Exodus8:12 Ci Moses ki Aron gukato woko ki bot Parao. Moses okok pi ogwal bot Rwot, kit macalo onoŋo oye ki bot Parao." 
Exodus8:13 Rwot otiyo kit ma Moses owaco-ni; ogwal ocako to woko Ki i odi i dyekal ki i potti ducu. 
Exodus8:14 Gucoko gugurogi lipim, lobo okwok woko maŋwe." 
Exodus8:15 Ento ka Parao oneno yamo dok ‘okuto kore, ci cwinye odoko nwaŋ pe dok owinyogi, kit ma Rwot owacom." 
Exodus8:16 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni, “Wac bot Aron ni, “Tin odooni malo ci igo ki apwa ma i lobo wek odok nyoggi ma biromo i lobo Ejipt ducu.’ ”" 
Exodus8:17 Ci gitimo kit meno; Aron otiŋo ciŋe malo ki odoone, ci ogoyo ki apwa ma i lobo, ci nyoggi obino i kom dano ki lee ducu." 
Exodus8:18 Lutyet gutemo ki ryekogi wek nyoggi obin, ento pe gutwero. Pienno nyoggi oromo kom dano ki lee ducu." 
Exodus8:19 Ci guwaco bot Parao ni, “Man lwet cin Lubaŋa.” Ento cwiny Parao obedo nwaŋ, pe omedo ki winyogi, kit ma Rwot owaco-ni." 
Exodus8:20 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni, “A malo odiko con, icikur Parao, macalo en cito i dog kulu-ni, ci iwacce ni, ‘Rwot owaco kuman ni, Wek jona guciti, wek guti bota." 
Exodus8:21 Ento ka pe iweko jona gucito, ci nen, abicoro lwaŋo limuk i komi ki i kom luticci ki i kom lwakki, ki i odini; i odi pa jo Ejipt ducu lwaŋo bicore iye limuk, wa i kom lobo ma gucuŋ iye." 
Exodus8:22 Ento i nino meno abipoko lobo Gocen pat, en aye kabedo pa jona, wek pe lwaŋo ocorre iye limuk; wek wune ni, an a Rwot ma atye i dye lobo." 
Exodus8:23 Kit meno abipoko kin jona ki joni. Lanyut man bitimme diki.’” 
Exodus8:24 Ci Rwot otiyo kit meno; omiyo lwak lwaŋo ocorre limuk i ot pa Parao ki i odi pa luticce; i lobo Ejipt ducu lwaŋo obalo lobo woko. 
Exodus8:25 Lacen Parao olwoŋo Moses ki Aron, owacci, “Wucit, wutyer gitum bot Lubaŋawu i lobowa-ni," 
Exodus8:26 Ento Moses ogamo ni, “Pe watwero timone kit meno; pien wabityero gitum bot Lubaŋawa ma bedo me kwer bot Luejipt. Ka watyero gitum ma obedo me kwer bot Luejipt ma kun gineno ki waŋgi, pe gibicelowa ki got-ti?" 
Exodus8:27 Wan myero wawot i tim wot me nino adek pi tyero gitum bot Rwot Lubaŋawa kit macalo en aye bicikowa kwede.” 
Exodus8:28 Omiyo Parao ogamo ni, “Abiwekowu wucito ka tyero gitum bot Lubaŋawu i tim; ento pe wubiwot ka mabor. Wuleg pira aye.”" 
Exodus8:29 Ka Moses owaco ni, “Nen, akato woko ki boti, ci abilego Rwot wek lwak lwaŋo oa woko ki i komi, Parao, ki i kom luticci, ki i kom lwakki diki; ento, ladit, pe dok ibwolwa pi kwero ye lwak cito ka tyero gitum bot Rwot.”" 
Exodus8:30 Kit meno Moses okato woko ki bot Parao, ci olego Rwot." 
Exodus8:31 Rwot otiyo kit ma Moses olego-ni, ci okwanyo lwak lwaŋo woko kii kom Parao, ki i kom luticce, ki i kom lwakke, pe acel mo odoŋ," 
Exodus8:32 Ento cwiny Parao odoko nwaŋ tyen man bene, pe oweko lwak gucito." 
Exodus9:1 Ka Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni, “Cit bot Parao, ci iwacce ni, ‘Rwot, Lubaŋa pa jo Ibru, owaco kuman ni, Wek jona guciti, wek guti bota." 
Exodus9:2 Ka ikwero ye gin gucito, ma pwod ijiŋ i komgi," 
Exodus9:3 nen, ciŋ Rwot bipoto ki two owaa malik i kom limwu makwo ma gitye i olet, i kom aguragura ki kana-gu, ki kinaga-gu, ki dyaŋi, ki dyegi-gu." 
Exodus9:4 Ento Rwot bipoko kin lim pa jo Icrael ki pa jo Ejipt, ci lim pa jo Icrael pe bito kadi ki acel mo,’ ”" 
Exodus9:5 Rwot onyuto kare kun wacci, “Rwot bitiyo gin man i lo bo diki.”" 
Exodus9:6 Orwone Rwot otiyo gin meno; lim pa jo Ejipt ducu guto woko, ento lim pa jo Icrael pe oto kadi ki acel mo." 
Exodus9:7 Ka Parao ocwalo dano, ci nen, lim pa jo Icrael pe oto kadi ki acel mo. Ento cwiny Parao odoko nwaŋ; pe oweko lwak gucito." 
Exodus9:8 Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni, “Wujob buru poŋ ciŋwu ki i ruk-keno mac, wumi Moses oony malo ki i nyim Parao," 
Exodus9:9 Ci bidoko apwa ma duny i lobo Ejipt ducu, ci bikwoto lwak odeke i kom dano wa i kom lee ducu ma burre bityer doko lwak bur ma oromo i lo bo Ejipt ducu.”" 
Exodus9:10 Ci gujobo buru ki i keno, gucuŋ kwede i nyim Parao, ci Moses oonyo malo, ci okwoto odeke ma tyer doko lwak bur i kom dano ki i kom lee." 
Exodus9:11 Cuŋ i nyim Moses oloyo lutyet woko pi odeke, pien odeke okwoto wa kom lutyet bene ki kom jo Ejipt ducu." 
Exodus9:12 Ento Rwot ojino cwiny Parao odoko nwaŋ, okwero winyogi woko kit ma Rwot owaco bot Moses." 
Exodus9:13 Ka Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni, “A malo odiko con, icicuŋ i nyim Parao, iwacce ni, ‘Rwot, Lubaŋa pa jo Ibru, owaco kuman ni, Wek jona guciti, we guti bota." 
Exodus9:14 Pien tyen man abicwah gemo mera ducu i cwinyi, ki i kor luticci ki i kom lwakki wek i ŋe ni p tye ŋatti mo ma rom ki an i wi lobe ducu," 
Exodus9:15 Kono aryeyo ciŋa apwodi k lwakki ducu ki two gemo magwa, kono tin atyekowu woko ki i lobo;" 
Exodus9:16 enu aweko in makwo pi lok man, wek anyut tekka boti, wek nyiŋa oywek i lobo ducu." 
Exodus9:17 In pwod it ye ka nyatt i kom lwakka, pe iye wekogi citc" 
Exodus9:18 Nen, diki i kare man abicoro lwal pee mapek poto i lobo, ma yam peyi otimme nia ma lobo Ejipt gibedo iye nio wa koni." 
Exodus9:19 Mumiyo cwal kwena kom beddi, wek icok limmi ki gin mer ducu ma tye woko i olet igwokgi i ot pien pee bipwodo dano ducu ki le ma gudoŋ woko i tim ma pe gikelog paco, ci gibito woko.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Jo ma i ki: lutic pa Parao ma gulworo lok p/; Rwot, gumiyo lwak opiigi ki Iimgali guriŋo gularo odi;" 
Exodus9:21 ento jo ma pe guwinyo lok pa Rwot guweko opiig ki limgi i olet. 
Exodus9:22 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Rye ciŋi malo tuŋ polo, wek pee opot i Iobo Ejipt ducu, i kom dano ki lee ki ginapiti ducu ma i poto, oromo i lobo Ejipt ducu.’" 
Exodus9:23 Ka Moses otiŋo odoone mali tuŋ polo; ci Rwot omiyo polo omor, pee ocorre i lobo, ma kine orubbe ki mac, ci Rwot omiyo pee ocwer oromro lobo Ejipt ducu." 
Exodus9:24 Pee omedde ki ma i ma lyel wil i dye pee, pee mapek ma peya otimme i lobo ducu me Ejipt nia i kare ma rok ocakke iye." 
Exodus9:25 Pee opwodo gin ducu ma tye i poto, gin ma yam tye i lobo Ejipt ducu, dano ki lee; pee opwodo ginapita ducu ma tye i poto" 
Exodus9:26 Lobo Gocen keken ka ma jo Icrae tye iye-ni, en aye pee obedo pe kunnu." 
Exodus9:27 Ci Parao ocwalo kwena olwoyo Moses ki Aron, ci owaco botgi ni “Atyeko poto i bal tyen man; Rwot lokke tye kakare, ento an ki lwakka watimo marac." 
Exodus9:28 Wuleg Rwot pier mor kot ki cwer pa pee doŋ oromo abiwekowu wucito, pe doŋ wubidikki kany.”" 
Exodus9:29 Moses owacce ni. “Ka akato woko i ŋe gaŋ, ci abiryeyo ciŋa cut bot Rwot ci mor kot bigik, ki pee bene bibedo pe, wek wun wuŋe ni lobo-i pa Rwot gire." 
Exodus9:30 Ento in ki luticc aŋeyo ni peya wulworo Rwot Lubaŋa. 
Exodus9:31 (Obira ki cayiri pee obalogi woko pien onoŋo cayiri otyeko nok ki obira bene ocako turo. 
Exodus9:32 Ento,ŋano matar ki ŋano makwar pee pe obalogi, pien gicoyogi lacen i mwaka.)" 
Exodus9:33 Moses okato woko ki i gaŋ nia ki bot Parao, oryeyo ciŋe bot Rwot; ci mor kot ki pee ogik woko, kot pe dok ocwer i lobo." 
Exodus9:34 Ento ka Parao oneno ni kot ki mor kot doŋ ogik, en dok opoto i bal aye, omiyo en kacel ki luticce cwinygi odoko nwaŋ." 
Exodus9:35 Kit meno cwiny Parao obedo nwaŋ, ci okwero weko jo Icrael gucito, macalo Lubaŋa yam oloko ki i dog Moses." 
Exodus10:1 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni, “Cit bot Parao; pien ajino cwinye odoko nwaŋ, ki cwiny luticce, wek anyut lwak lanyut mera man i kingi," 
Exodus10:2 wek in itit i it litinoni ki likwayi kit macalo abedo ka tuko ki jo Ejipt kit ma iya mito-ni ki kit lanyut ma atiyo i kingi; wek wun wuŋe ni an a Rwot.” 
Exodus10:3 Kit meno Moses ki Aron gucito gudonyo bot Parao, guwacce ni, “Rwot Lubaŋa pa jo Ibru owaco kuman ni, ‘In ibikwero bedo ki mwolo i nyima pi kare ma rom mene? Wek jona guciti, wek guti bota." 
Exodus10:4 Pien ka ikwero ni jona pe guciti, ci nen, diki abikelo lwak bonyo i loboni," 
Exodus10:5 giumo lobo woko lipuk, pe tye ŋatti mo ma bineno lobo; ci gibicamo gin ma pee oŋoyo botwu, ka dok gibicamo yadiwu ducu ma doŋo i poto." 
Exodus10:6 Gibipono i odini ki i odi pa luticci ducu ki i odi pa jo Ejipt ducu; bibedo gin ma yam wegiwu ki kwariwu pe guneno nia i nino na giketogi wi lobo nio wa i nino man.” Ka olokke ci okato woko ki bot Parao. 
Exodus10:7 Ci Lutic pa Parao guwacce ni, “Laco man bibedo owic botwa pi kare ma rom mene? Wek jo-nu guciti, wek guti bot Rwot Lubaŋagi: in peya iŋeyo ni Ejipt oballe woko ”" 
Exodus10:8 Omiyo gidwoko Moses ki Aron bot Parao; ci owaco botgi ni, “Doŋ wucit, wuti bot Rwot Lubaŋawu; ento jo mene ma gibicito?”" 
Exodus10:9 Ci Moses ogamo ni, “Wan wabicito ki litinowa, ki luditowa wabicito ki awobewa ki anyirawa; wabigwarre ki lwak limwa ducu matino ki madito, pien myero wakwer nino madit bot Rwot.”" 
Exodus10:10 Ci owaco botgi ni, “Rwot obed kwedwu ka abiweko wun ki litinowu wucito! Nen wun iwu kirungula, wutye ki kop i iwu," 
Exodus10:11 Pe twerre, co ma i kinwu aye gucit ka miyo woro bot Rwot; pien meno aye gin ma cwinywu pyette iye.” Ci giryemogi woko ki i nyim Parao." 
Exodus10:12 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni, “Rye ciŋi i wi lobo Ejipt wek bonyo obin obed i lobo Ejipt, ocam gin mutwi i lo bo ducu ma yam pee onoyo.”" 
Exodus10:13 Kit meno Moses’ otiŋo odoone i wi lobo Ejipt, ci Rwot ocwalo yamo oa tuŋ wokceŋ okodo i lobo dyeceŋ meno ducu ki i dyewor benebene; ka oo odiko ci yamo mua wokceŋ okelo bonyo." 
Exodus10:14 Ci bonyo ocorre i lobo Ejipt ducu, ci obuto, ori i lobo ducu me Ejipt, lwak bonyo mumukke madwoŋ ma yam pe tye, ma dok pe binen." 
Exodus10:15 Pien oumo lobo woko lipuk, ma lobo ocido woko licuc, ci gucamo gin mutwi ducu ma i lobo ki nyig yadi ducu ma yam pee onoyo; gin madyak mo pe odoŋ, kadi yat, kadi gin mutwi ma i poto ma i lobo Ejipt ducu." 
Exodus10:16 Ka Parao dok olwoŋo Moses ki Aron pi oyoto, owaco ni, “Atyeko timo bal i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu, ki i komwu." 
Exodus10:17 Mumiyo tin wutima kica, man doŋ alegowu kicel enni, dok wuleg Rwot Lubaŋawu wek okwany to man woko i koma.”" 
Exodus10:18 Ci Moses okato woko ki bot Parao, olego Rwot." 
Exodus10:19 Rwot omiyo yamo okodo matek nia ki tuŋ potoceŋ, otiŋo bonyo ocorogi woko wa i Nam Makwar; bonyo mo acel pe odon i lobo Ejipt," 
Exodus10:20 Ento Rwot ojiŋo cwiny Parao odoko nwaŋ, pe oweko jo Icrael gucito." 
Exodus10:21 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni, “Rye ciŋi malo tuŋ polo, wek piny ocid woko Licuc i lo bo Ejipt, piny ma ocido woko ma dano winyo wa i kome.”" 
Exodus10:22 Ci Moses oryeyo ciŋe malo tuŋ polo, ci piny ocido woko matek licuc ma oromo lobo Ejipt pi nino adek;" 
Exodus10:23 pe ginenne kekengi, pe ŋatti mo a malo ki i kabedone pi nino adek; ento ka ma jo Icrael bedo iye onoŋo piny leŋ mere." 
Exodus10:24 Ka Parao olwoŋo Moses, ci owacce ni, “Cit wuti bot Rwot; litinowu bene myero gucit kwedwu; ento wuwek limwu matino ki madito gudoŋ i newu.”" 
Exodus10:25 Ento Moses ogamo ni, “In bene myero imiwa gitum ki gityer me awaŋa, wek watyer bot Rwot Lubaŋawa." 
Exodus10:26 Limwa makwo myero gin bene gucit kwedwa; pe oboŋ tyen mo bidoŋ i ŋewa, pien myero wakwany mogo i kingi me miyo ki woro bot Rwot Lubaŋawa, dok pe waŋeyo gin ma myero wati kwede bot Rwot, nio ka wabio wa kunnu.”" 
Exodus10:27 Ento Rwot ojiŋo cwiny Parao odoko nwaŋ, pe oweko gucito," 
Exodus10:28 Parao dok owacce ni, “A woko ki bota; gwokke keni aye, pe inen waŋa doki; pien i nino ma ibineno iye waŋa en aye ibito iye bene,”" 
Exodus10:29 Moses ogamo ni, “Pe dok abineno waŋi kit macalo iwaco.”" 
Exodus11:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Pud odoŋ gemo acel ma abikelo i kom Parao ki i kom Ejipt; lacen biweko wun wua ki kany wucito; ka biwekowu ni wuciti, biryemowu woko magicel." 
Exodus11:2 Lok kombeddi i it lwak, laco acel acel oleg laco wadi ma ka ŋete, ki dako acel acel bene oleg dako wadi ma ka ŋete, wek omiye atego ryal ki atego jabu.”" 
Exodus11:3 Ci Rwot omiyo dano gunoŋo gum i nyim jo Ejipt. Dok bene Moses yam obedo dano madit twatwal i lobo Ejipt, wa i nyim lutic pa Parao ki i nyim lwak ducu." 
Exodus11:4 Moses owaco ni, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, I cwiny dyewor abiwot i dye Ejipt;" 
Exodus11:5 ci litino kayo ducu ma i lobo Ejipt gibito woko, nia i kom latin kayo pa Parao ma bedo i wi komkerre-ni, nio kwede i kom latin kayo pa aŋeca ma tye ka rego; wa litino kayo pa limgi makwo ducu." 
Exodus11:6 Koko bibedo malik mada ma oromo i lobo Ejipt ducu, kit ma yam peya otimme, dok pe bitimme matwal." 
Exodus11:7 Ento i kom jo Icrael ducu, dano onyo lee, kadi gwok pe bigweyo; wek wune ni Rwot opoko kin jo Ejipt ki jo Icrael." 
Exodus11:8 Luticci ducu gibibino bota, gibiryebbe piny i nyima, kun giwaco ni, ‘A woko, ki lwak ma gilubi ducu.’ Ci i ŋe meno, abicito woko gira.” Ci okato woko ki bot Parao ki kiniga madwoŋ." 
Exodus11:9 Ka dok Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Parao pe biwinyi; wek taŋona omedde orom i lobo Ejipt.”" 
Exodus11:10 Moses ki Aron gutiyo taŋo meno ducu i nyim Parao; ento Rwot ojino cwiny Parao odoko nwaŋ, pe oweko jo Icrael gucito woko ki i lobone," 
Exodus12:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses Aron ki i lobo Ejipt ni," 
Exodus12:2 “Dwe man aye bibedo dwewu mukwo bibedo dwewu mukwoŋo i mwaka. 
Exodus12:3 Tit bot lwak jo Icrael ducu ni, i k nino dwe apar me dwe man, dano a acel bikwanyo latin romo, mac doggola pa kwarogi tye kwede, la romo acel pi ot acel acel." 
Exodus12:4 Ka ot mo tidi, ma pe romo tyeko riŋo latin ror ci won ot meno ki ladoggolane ma ode cok kwede gibikwanyo, ma romo wel dano ma gitye kwede. Wubikwanyo latin romo ma oporo kit ma dano acel camo kwede." 
Exodus12:5 Latin romowu obed ma kome pe ki mwonyo, nyok ma ditte romo mwaka acel ma wukwanyo ki kin romi nyo ki i kin dyegi," 
Exodus12:6 Wugwok nio wa i nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen me dwe-ni ka lacen, ka lwak jo Irael ducu gucokke kacel, gibineko romigo otyeno." 
Exodus12:7 Guter remo manok, gucwiny i kom okar me doggola ryoryo, ki i kom rii wiye malo i dog odi ma gicamo iye-ni." 
Exodus12:8 Gucam riŋo i dyewor meno, ma gibulo abula; gucam ki mugati ma tobi pe iye, ki pot dek mogo makec." 
Exodus12:9 Pe wumwod mo manumo, nyo ma gitedo ki pii, ento gibul abula, wiye kacel ki tyene ki jam iye." 
Exodus12:10 Pe wuwek gin mo odoŋ nio odiko; ka gin mo odoŋ nio odiko, ci wubiwaŋo woko." 
Exodus12:11 Wubicamo kit man: wubitweyo pyerwu, wuruko war i tyenwu, ki odoo i ciŋwu; wubicamo aruya. En aye Kato (Paska) Rwot." 
Exodus12:12 Pien abibaro dye lobo Ejipt i dyewor meno, abineko litino kayo ducu ma i lobo Ejipt, pa dano ki pa lee; ci abiŋolo kop i kom lubaŋa ducu pa jo Ejipt; an a Rwot." 
Exodus12:13 Remo bibedo lanyut mewu, i kom odi ma wutye iye; ka aneno remo, ci abikato lamalo ka wiwu. Pe gemo mo bipoto i komwu ma binekowu, i kare ma abipwodo iye lobo Ejipt.”" 
Exodus12:14 “Nino man bibedo nino me poyo pe wiwu ma wubigwoko me bedo nino madit bot Rwot; wubikwero wun ki likwayowu obed cik matwal: 
Exodus12:15 Wubicamo mugati ma pe girubo rye tobi pi nino abiro; i kom nino mukwoŋo wukwany tobi ki i ot, wuony woko. Ka ŋatti mo bicamo mugati ma tobi tye iye, nia i nino mukwoŋo nio wa i nino me abiro, dano-nu waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin jo Icrael." 
Exodus12:16 I kom nino mukwoŋo wubibedo iye ki gurre maleŋ; ki i nino me abirone bene wubibedo iye ki gurre maleŋ; pe gibitiyo tic mo i nino meno ducu; ento gin ma dano ducu camo, meno aye wuyubi," 
Exodus12:17 Wubikwero nino madito me Mugati ma Tobi Pe Iye, pien i kom nino meno kikome yam akwanyo iye bucawu ki i lobo Ejipt; mumiyo wubikwero nino meno, wun ki likwayowu ducu, obed cik matwal." 
Exodus12:18 I dwe mukwoŋo, i kom nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen otyeno, wubicamo mugati ma pe girubo iye tobi, nio wa i nino dwe pyeraryo wiye acel otyeno," 
Exodus12:19 Pe ginoŋ tobi mo i odiwu i kom nino abiro-ni; pien ka ŋatti mo bicamo gin ma girubo iye tobi, dano meno waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin lwak pa jo Icrael, kadi bed en labedo nyo anywalli me lobo," 
Exodus12:20 Pe wubicamo gin mo ma girubo iye tobi; ka ma wubibedo iye ducu wubicamo mugati ma tobi pe iye.” 
Exodus12:21 Moses olwoŋo ludoŋo pa jo Icrael ducu, owaco botgi ni, “Wuyer litino romi muporo doggolawu, ci wunek latin romo me Kato (Paska)," 
Exodus12:22 Wukwany dog anyero, wulut i remo ma tye i becen, wucwiny i kom rii doggola ki i kom okar me doggola ryoryo, kun wuluto i remo ma tye i becen-ni; dok ŋatti mo i kinwu pe okat woko ki i doggola ode nio wa odiko," 
Exodus12:23 pien Rwot bikato cito ka neko jo Ejipt. Ka en bineno remo i kom rii doggola, ki i kom okar me doggola, ci Rwot bikato donyo i odiwu ka nekowu." 
Exodus12:24 Wugwok lok man obed cik piwu ki pi likwayowu matwal. 
Exodus12:25 Ka wubio i lobo ma Rwot bimiyowu, macalo yam ociko, ci wubilubo kit tic man," 
Exodus12:26 Ka litinowu gibipenyowu ni, ‘Kit tic man te lokke aŋo?’" 
Exodus12:27 ci wubiwacogi ni, ‘Man gitum me Kato (Paska) pa Rwot, pien yam okato lamalo i wi odi pa jo Icrael i Ejipt, i kare ma oneko jo Ejipt, ci obwoto odiwa.’ ” Ci dano gukulo wigi piny, guworo Lubaŋa." 
Exodus12:28 Jo Icrael gucito gutimo kit meno; macalo Rwot ociko Moses ki Aron, gutimo kit meno." 
Exodus12:29 I cwiny dyewor, Rwot oneko litino kayo ducu ma i lobo Ejipt: okwoŋo ki i kom latin kayo pa Parao ma yam obedo i komkerre, oo kwede wa i kom latin kayo pa ŋat ma giyako ma tye i ot kol, ki litino kayo pa lim makwo ducu." 
Exodus12:30 Parao oa malo i dyewor, en ki luticce ducu ki jo Ejipt ducu; koko obedo malik mada i Ejipt, pien pe odoŋ ot mo ma dano pe oto iye." 
Exodus12:31 Parao olwoŋo Moses ki Aron ki i dyewor, ci owaco ni “Wua, wucit woko ki i kin lwakka, wun kacel ki jo Icrael ducu; wuciti, wuti bot Rwot, kit macalo wuwaco-ni." 
Exodus12:32 Wucit ki romiwu ki dyaŋiwu kit macalo wuwaco-ni, wucit giwu; wulamma gum bene!”" 
Exodus12:33 Jo Ejipt gubedo ka ruyo dano pi cwalogi woko ki i lo bo pi oyotoyot; gubedo ka lok ni, “Wato doŋ, watum woko ducu.”" 
Exodus12:34 Kit meno omiyo dano gutiŋo moko ma peya girubo iye tobi, gutweyo otako lanywaŋne ki boŋo umgi, gutiŋo kwede i wi gwokgi." 
Exodus12:35 Jo Icrael gutiyo kit macalo nene Moses ocikogi, gubedo ka lego atego ryal ki atego jabu, ki boŋo, ki bot jo Ejipt." 
Exodus12:36 Rwot omiyo gunoŋo gum i nyim jo Ejipt, ci gubedo ka miyogi gin ma gulego. Guyako jo Ejipt kit meno." 
Exodus12:37 Jo Icrael gucako wotgi nia ki i Ramcec nio i Cukot; co ma guwoto ki tyengi guromo alip miya abicel, ma pe iye mon ki litino." 
Exodus12:38 Ki lwak kwa rok murubbe bene gucito kwedgi, ki lwak lim makwo mapol twatwal, romi-gu ki i wi doggola lamalo, pe biye lanek dyani-gu." 
Exodus12:39 Ci gutedo capat ki moko ma gunyobo i otako laboŋo tobi ma gutero i kare ma gua ki i Ejipt, pien onoŋo pe girubo iye tobi; pien gibedo ka cwalogi wo ko ki tek nia ki i Ejipt, kun pe doŋ gitwero dikke, pe bene guyubo peke megi." 
Exodus12:40 Kare ma jo Icrael gubedo kwede i Ejipt oromo mwaka miya aŋwen ki pyeradek. 
Exodus12:41 I agikki me mwaka miya aŋwen ki pyeradekke, i kom nino meno kikome, en aye mony ducu pa Rwot omol iye oa woko ki i lobo Ejipt," 
Exodus12:42 En aye obedo dyewor ma Rwot okuro iye kare me kwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt, dyewor meno en aye dyewor ma jo Icrael, gin ki likwayogi ducu, gikuro iye Rwot" 
Exodus12:43 Ci Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni, “Man aye cik ma maka Kato (Paska): pe Larok mo bicamo;" 
Exodus12:44 ento opii ducu ma yam giwilo ki lim bicamo ka onoŋo doŋ gityeko lirogi. 
Exodus12:45 Labedo mo nyo lapakaca mo pe bicamo. 
Exodus12:46 Wubicamo ki i ot acel; pe wubikato ki riŋo mo woko nia ki i ot, cogone bene pe gibituro iye." 
Exodus12:47 Lwak jo Icrael ducu gibikwero nino man," 
Exodus12:48 Ka larok mo bedo i kinwu ce mito kwero Kato (Paska) bot Rwot, wek koŋ gilir kom co ducu ma tye bote, ka doŋ onyik cok ka lubo kite; eh doŋ bedo macalo anywalli me lobo. Ento dano ma pe giliro pe camo," 
Exodus12:49 Cik bibedo acel pi anywalli ki pi lurok ma bedo i kinwu.” 
Exodus12:50 Ci jo Icrael ducu gutimo kit meno; macalo yam Rwot ociko Moses ki Aron, gutimo kit meno." 
Exodus12:51 I kom nino meno kikome aye yam Rwot okwanyo iye mony pa jo Icrael woko ki lobo Ejipt ki bucagi. 
Exodus13:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Exodus13:2 “Kwer litino kayo ducu gubed mega; gin ducu ma okwoŋo yabo ic i kin jo Icrael, pa dano ki pa lee bene, ducu mera.”" 
Exodus13:3 Moses owaco ki lwak ni, “Wupo nino man, ma wua iye woko ki i Ejipt i ot me opii, pien Rwot okwanyowu woko ki i kabedo man pi bade matek; pe wubicamo mugati ma tobi tye iye." 
Exodus13:4 Tin wun doŋ wubecito woko, i dwe me Abib," 
Exodus13:5 Ka Rwot bikelowu i lobo pa jo Kanaan, jo Kit, jo Amor, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc, ma yam okwoŋo pire bot kwarowu ni ebimiyowu, lobo ma mol cak ki moo k ic, wubilubo kit tic man i dwe-ni." 
Exodus13:6 Wubicamo mugati ma tobi pe iye pi nino abiro; i kom nino me abirone en aye wubikwero iye nino madit bot Rwot. 
Exodus13:7 Mugati ma pe girubo iye tobi wa tobi bene pe binen botwu i lobowu ducu. 
Exodus13:8 I nino meno ibitito bot latinni ni, ‘Man obedo tye pi gin ma yam Rwot otimo pira i kare ma aa wo ko ki i Ejipt.’" 
Exodus13:9 Man bibedo lanyut i ciŋi, dok bibedo i dye tur nyimi, me poyo wii, wek cik pa Rwot obed i dogwu; pien Rwot okwanyowu woko ki i Ejipt pi bade matek," 
Exodus13:10 Pi neno wugwok cik man i kare ma giciko-ni mwaka ki mwaka. 
Exodus13:11 “Ka Rwot bikelowu i lobo p Kanaan, macalo yam okwoŋo be ki bot kwarowu ni ebimiyowu," 
Exodus13:12 wubi yeko litino ducu mukwoŋo yabo ic gubed pa Rwot. Litino kayo pa limwu ducu ma twonne gibibedo pa Rwot. 
Exodus13:13 Latin kayo pa kana ibikoko ki i romo, nyo ka pe ikoko, ci ibituro woko. Latin dano acel acel ma i kin litinowu, ma latin kayo, wubikokone bene." 
Exodus13:14 I kare me anyim, ka latinni bipenyi ni, ‘Man kono te lokke aŋo?’ ci ibiwacce ni, ‘Rwot yam okwanyowa woko ki i Ejipt ki bade matek, i ot me opii." 
Exodus13:15 Pien con ka Parao okwero woko matek ni pe waciti, Rwot oneko litino kayo ducu ma i Ejipt, litino kayo pa dano ki litino kayo pa lim makwo. Mumiyo atyero bot Rwot twon ducu ma gukwoŋo yabo ic; ento akoko awobena ma litino kayo ducu.’" 
Exodus13:16 Bibedo macalo kedo i ŋut ciŋi, nyo gin me atweya i dye tur nyimi; pien Rwot yam okwanyowa woko ki i Ejipt ki matek.”" 
Exodus13:17 Ka Parao oweko dano gucito, ci Lubaŋa pe otelo wigi i yo ma dok tuŋ lobo pa Lupiliciti, kadi bedi yam yone cok; pien Lubaŋa owacci, “Ka dano gurwatte ki mony, ci cwinygi biballe woko gidok woko cen i Ejipt.”" 
Exodus13:18 Ento Rwot otelo wi dano kun rabo kwedgi piny i yo ma dok tun lim mukemo Nam Makwar. Ci jo Icrael gua woko ki i lobo Ejipt ma guyubbe ki jami lweny. 
Exodus13:19 Moses okwanyo cogo pa Yucepu ocito kwede; pien yam Yucepu omiyo jo Icrael gukwoŋo kwoŋ matek, kun waco ni, “Lubaŋa bilimowu; myero wutin cogona nia ki kany, kwede.”" 
Exodus13:20 Gua Cukot, gugony i Etam i dog tim," 
Exodus13:21 Rwot otelo nyimgi i dyeceŋ ki pol mucuŋ macalo wir me nyutogi yo, ki i dyewor telo nyimgi ki mac mucuŋ macalo wir me menyo piny wek gubed ka wot dyeceŋ ki dyewor;" 
Exodus13:22 wir me pol dyeceŋ ki wir me dyewor, kun pe a woko i nyim dano." 
Exodus14:1 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni," 
Exodus14:2 “Tit ki jo Icrael gudok cen ki ŋegi, wek gugony i nyim Pi-akirot i kin Migdol ki nam, i nyim Baal-jepon; wubigony mukemo en i ŋet nam." 
Exodus14:3 Pien Parao bilok pi jo Icrael ni, ‘Gin pud gitye ka dwalle atata i lobo; tim pud otweyogi woko.’" 
Exodus14:4 Abijiŋo cwiny Parao doko nwaŋ, ci en biryemo korgi, ci abinoŋo deyo i kom Parao ki monnye ducu; miyo jo Ejipt gibiŋeyo ni an a Rwot.” Ci gutimo kit meno." 
Exodus14:5 Ka gitito bot kabaka me Ejipt ni jo Icrael gutyeko riŋo gulwi woko, ci Parao kabaka me Ejipt ki luticce guloko cwinygi i komgi kun giwacci, “Man watimo gin aŋo ma waweko jo Icrael gua woko ki i dog ticwa, gucito woko-ni?”" 
Exodus14:6 Kit meno ocako yubo gadigadine me lweny, oywayo wi monnye," 
Exodus14:7 ci otero gadigadi ma oyero miya abicel, ki gadigadi pa jo Ejipt mukene ducu kacel ki ludito luwigi ducu." 
Exodus14:8 Ci Lubaŋa ojiŋo cwiny Parao kabaka me Ejipt odoko nwaŋ, oryemo kor Jo Icrael macalo yam gutwarre magwa, gucito woko-ni." 
Exodus14:9 Jo Ejipt guryemo korgi, aguragura pa Parao ducu ki lwak gadigadi, ki wegi aguragura ki monnye ducu, ci gumakogi ka ma gugony iye i ŋet Pi-Kakirot, ma i nyim Baal-jepon," 
Exodus14:10 Ka Parao odiŋo korgi cok, jo Icrael gutiŋo waŋgi, ci nen, jo Ejipt gitye ka lubo korgi; ci gubedo ki lworo madwoŋ. Jo Icrael gukok matek bot Rwot," 
Exodus14:11 kun guwaco bot Moses ni, “Pien ineno ni Lyel pe i Ejipt mumiyo ikelowa kany wek wato woko i dye tim? Doŋ itimowa gin aŋo, pi kwanyowa woko ki i Ejipt?" 
Exodus14:12 Pe yam walokki man i Ejipt ni, ‘Doŋ iwek yelowa, wek doŋ wat i ki jo Ejipt’? Twora kono yam watiyo ki jo Ejipt, makato ma wato woko i dye tim ata,”" 
Exodus14:13 Ci Moses owaco bot lwak ni, “Pe wulwor wucuŋ matek, ci wubineno kit ma Rwot bilarowu kwede tin; pien jo Ejipt ma tin wunenogi-ni pe doŋ wubinenogi matwal." 
Exodus14:14 Rwot bilweny piwu, wun wubed mewu mot apira.”" 
Exodus14:15 Rwot openyo Moses ni, “Ikok bota piŋo? Tit bot jo Icrael guwot anyim."
