Exodus14:16 Tin odooni malo, ci irye ciŋi i wi nam, ipok iye woko, wek jo Icrael guwok i dye nam i lo bo mutwo." 
Exodus14:17 Abijiŋo cwiny jo Ejipt doko nwaŋ, wek gin bene gulub korwu, ci abinoŋo deyo i kom Parao kacel ki monnye, ki gadigadine, ki wegi aguragurane," 
Exodus14:18 Jo Ejipt gibiŋeyo ni an a Rwot, ka doŋ atyeko limo deyo i kom Parao ki gadigadine, ki wegi aguragurane.”" 
Exodus14:19 Ka lamalaika pa Lubaŋa ma yam woto i nyim mony pa jo Icrael oa odok ocego ŋegi; ki wir me pol bene oa ki inyimgi, odok ocun i ŋegi." 
Exodus14:20 I obino oridde i kin mony pa jo Ejipt ki mony pa jo Icrael, Pol ocego kunnu ki mutu macol; ci dyewor meno ducu mony tun cel pe orwayo cok ki lawote nio ka piny oru." 
Exodus14:21 Moses oryeyo cine i wi nam; Rwot odanyo dye nam woko, odiro pii woko wa ceŋ ki yamo matek mua wokceŋ mukodo i dyewor ducu, omiyo nam odoko lobo mutwo, ki i pii opokke woko." 
Exodus14:22 Jo Icrael guwot o i dye nam i lobo mutwe, pii otiŋŋe odoko kicika yo tuŋ ciŋgi acuc ki yo tuŋ acam." 
Exodus14:23 Jo Ejipt guryemo korgi, ci gudonyo i korgi i dye nam; aguragura pa Parao ducu, ki gadigadine, ki wegi aguragurane," 
Exodus14:24 I kare ma gikuro rupiny, Rwot onoŋo tye i wir me mac ki me pol kun neno mony pa jo Ejipt. Obano kom mony pa jo Ejipt woko," 
Exodus14:25 kun mako lawala me gadigadigi woko, mumiyo guywaŋe mot. Ci jo Ejipt guwacci, “Wek wariŋu walwiyu woko ki i nyim jo Icrael; pien Rwot tye ka lweny i kom jo Ejipt pigi.”" 
Exodus14:26 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni “Rye ciŋ i i wi nam, wek pii odwog cel kom jo Ejipt, i kom gadigadigi, ki I kom wegt aguraguragi.”" 
Exodus14:27 Kit meno Moses otiŋo ciŋe i wi nam, dwogo cen kun mol i kit m ma piny tye ka ru-ni. Jo Ejipt gucorre i iye, ci Rwot orido wi jo i dye nam." 
Exodus14:28 Ka pii odwogo gadigadi ki wegi aguragura Parao ducu ma yam gulul i nam-mi; pe tye ŋat mo a acel ma obwot i kingi. 
Exodus14:29 Ento jo Icrael gu mutwo ki i dye nam, kur kieikagi yo tun ciŋgi aew acam." 
Exodus14:30 Kit meno Rwot yam olaro jo Icrael ki i ciŋ jo Ejipt i nino meno, ci jo Icrael guneno kom jo Ejipt ma guto i dog nam." 
Exodus14:31 Ka jo Icrael matek ma Rwot otimo i ki ci dano gudworo Rwot; omiyo guye Rwot ki laticce Moses. 
Exodus15:1 Moses ki jo Icrael guwero wer man bot Rwot kun giwaci ni, “Abiwero wer bot Rwot, pien otuc ki loc me deyo; obolo aguragura ki lait i wiye woko i nam," 
Exodus15:2 Rwot aye tekka ma akoro ki wer, en odoko Lalarra. Man aye Lubaŋana, abipako en Lubaŋa pa wora, abikoro nyiŋe." 
Exodus15:3 Rwot en oteka lweny: nyiŋe Rwot," 
Exodus15:4 “En obolo gadigadi pa Parao ki monnye ducu i nam; twoni ma oyerogi gumwony piny i Nam Makwar. 
Exodus15:5 Pii matut oumo wigi woko; gulwiny woko i te kut macalo got. 
Exodus15:6 Ciŋi malacuc, ai Rwot, won deyo ki tek, ciŋi malacuc, ai Rwot, ŋido lumerok i woko." 
Exodus15:7 Pi deyoni madit ireto lukworri piny; icwalo akemoni, owaŋogi woko macalo ren kal." 
Exodus15:8 Yweyo me umi otiŋo pii malo, pii mamol otiŋŋe malo likuŋ; pii matut odille likiŋ i cwiny nam." 
Exodus15:9 Lumerok guwacci, ‘Abiryemo korgi, amakogi, abipoko gin ma ayako, cwinya biyen kwede, abiwoto pala lucwanna, ciŋa bityekogi woko.’" 
Exodus15:10 Ento in ikuto yamoni, ci nam omwonyogi woko; gumwony i te pii madwoŋ macalo odoo olek." 
Exodus15:11 Aŋa ma calo in, ai Rwot, ki i kin lwak lubaŋa-ni? Aŋa ma calo in, ma ladeyo ki maleŋ? Kom myel i gin me deyo ma itiyo, itimo ginaura," 
Exodus15:12 In yam iryeyo ciŋi malacuc, ci lobo omwonyogi woko." 
Exodus15:13 “Pi marri ma pe lokke itelo wi jo ma yam ikokogi, pi tekki igwokogi, ikelogi i kabedoni maleŋ," 
Exodus15:14 Lwak doŋ guwinyo pire ci komgi omyel; atiba opoto i kom Lupiliciti. 
Exodus15:15 I kare-nu cwiny rwodi me Edom oŋabbe aŋaba; lworo oonyo koyo i kom ludito me Moab; kom jo Kanaan ducu oto woko lirut. 
Exodus15:16 Lworo ki myelkom opoto i komgi, pi tek me badi omiyo gucuŋ, guliŋ macalo got, nio ka joni gukato ki ka netgi, ai Rwot, nio ka jo ma iwilogi gukato." 
Exodus15:17 Ibiterogi i lobo, ibipitogi i kom got meri, i kabedo ma iketo me bedo kabedoni, ai Rwot, i kabedo maleŋ, ai Rwot, ma yam ciŋi omoko." 
Exodus15:18 Rwot bibedo kabaka nakanaka.” 
Exodus15:19 Pien ka aguragura pa Parao ki gadigadine ki wegi aguragurane gucako donyo i nam, ci Rwot odwoko pii me nam cen i komgi; ento jo Icrael guwoto i lobo mutwo i dye namo" 
Exodus15:20 Ci Miriam, lanebi ma dako, lamiŋ Aron, okwanyo ajaa i ciŋe; ci mon ducu gukwanyo ajaa gumol kwede i kore ki myel." 
Exodus15:21 Miriam ocakogi wer ni: “Wuwer bot Rwot, pien otuc ki loc me deyo; obolo aguragura ki lait i wiye woko i nam.”" 
Exodus15:22 Moses dok otelo wi jo Icrael guwoto anyim nia ki i Nam Makwar gucito i tim me Cur; guwoto i tim wot me nino adek ci pe gunoŋo pii. 
Exodus15:23 Ka guo i Mara, ci mato piine oloyogi, pien piine onoŋo kec; mumiyo gilwoŋo ni Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Ci dano gubedo ka ŋur i kom Moses, kun giwacci, “Wabimato aŋo?" 
Exodus15:25 En okok bot Rwot, Rwot onyutte yat mo; obolo i pii, ci pii odoko mamit. Rwot oketogi cik kunnu, ki lok ma en oŋolo, otemo cwinygi kunnu," 
Exodus15:26 kun waco ni, “Ka wubiworo dog Rwot Lubaŋawu ki cwinywu ducu, ma wuyito gin ma nen atir i waŋe, dok wugwoko lok ma en ociko kun wumako cikke ducu, ci pe abikelo two mo i komwu ma yam aketo i kom jo Ejipt; pien an a Rwot lacanwu.”" 
Exodus15:27 Ka dok gubino i Elim, ka ma yam tye iye waŋ it apar wiye aryo, ki otit pyerabiro; ci gugony i ŋet pii-nu." 
Exodus16:1 Gua woko ki i Elim, ci lwak jo Icrael ducu gucorre i tim Cin, ma tye i kin Elim ki Cinai, i nino dwe apar wiye abic me dwe me aryone nia ma doŋ gua woko ki i Ejipt." 
Exodus16:2 Lwak jo Icrael ducu gunur i kom Moses ki Aron i tim," 
Exodus16:3 kun giwaco botgi ni, “Kono nene Rwot aye onekowa ki cine i lobo Ejipt, ka ma yam wabedo i ŋet agulu riŋo, ma wacamo kwon yeŋowa; ento in ikelowa wa i kany ka neko lwak man ducu ki kec.”" 
Exodus16:4 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni, “Nen, abicwalo kwon cwer botwu nia ki i polo; ci dano gibikato woko cokone kun gicoko ma romo pi nino acel acel, wek koŋ anengi kwede, ka nyo gibilubo cikka nyo pe." 
Exodus16:5 I kom nino me abicelle ma noŋo gitye ka yubo ma gukelo-ni, dok bimedde madwoŋ ma rom ki ma gicoko nino acel acel-li kiryo.”" 
Exodus16:6 Kit meno Moses ki Aron guwaco bot jo Icrael ni, “Tin otyeno wubineyo ni Rwot aye yam okwanyowu ki i lobo Ejipt," 
Exodus16:7 ki odiko bene wubineno deyo pa Rwot, pien otyeko winyo ka wuŋur i kom Rwot. Pien waŋ aŋagi ma wuŋur i komwa-ni?" 
Exodus16:8 Ci Moses owacci, “Ka Rwot omiyo riŋo acamawu tin otyeno, ka dok omiyo kwon ma yenowu odiko, waŋ kono aŋagi? Pien Rwot otyeko winyo ŋuro ma wuŋur kwede i keme-ni. Ŋurowu pe tye i komwa, ento i kom Rwot gire.”" 
Exodus16:9 Moses owaco bot Aron ni, “Wac ki lwak jo Icrael ducu ni, ‘Wubin cok i nyim Rwot, pien otyeko winyo nurowu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:10 Ka yam tye ka lok ki lwak jo Icrael ducu guneno tuŋ tim, ci nen, deyo pa Rwot onen i pol." 
Exodus16:11 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Exodus16:12 “Doŋ atyeko winyo ŋuro pa jo Icrael; wac botgi ni, “Tin wi otyeno wubicamo riŋo, ki odiko wubicamo kwon ma yenowu: miyo wubineyo ni an a Rwot Lubaŋawu.’ ”" 
Exodus16:13 I kare me otyeno aluru gubino gucorre, guumo gony woko; dok i odiko toyo oluk oumo ŋet gony woko." 
Exodus16:14 Ka toyo doŋ oo woko, ci gin mo odoŋ piny ma oŋidde matitino macalo pok rec, kun oŋidde matitino macalo bwoyo pee ma opune i lobo." 
Exodus16:15 Ka jo Icrael guneno, ci guloko kekengi ni, “Man gin aŋo?” Pien yam peya guniaŋ kite. Ci Moses owaco botgi ni, “Man aye kwon ma Rwot omiyo botwu me acama." 
Exodus16:16 Man aye gin ma Rwot ociko: ŋat acel acel ocok mere ma romo acamane. Wujob ma romo agwata moko kwon acel pi dano acel acel muporo wei dano ma ŋat acel acel tye kwede i kemane.” 
Exodus16:17 Jo Icrael gutimo kit meno; jo mogo gucoko madwoŋ, jo mogo gucoko manok." 
Exodus16:18 Ento ka guporo ki agwata moko kwon, ci ŋat ma ocoko madwoŋ pe mo odoŋ bote, ki ma ocoko manok pe mo orem, pien ŋat acel acel ocoko ma romo acamane." 
Exodus16:19 Moses owaco botgi ni, “Pe ŋatti owek mo odoŋ nio odiko.”" 
Exodus16:20 Ento pe guwinyolok pa Moses; mukene guweko dulle mogo odoŋ nio wa odiko, ci ocako nywal kwidi, okwok maŋwe, ci kiniga omako Moses i komgi." 
Exodus16:21 Gubedo ka cokone odiko odiko, kun ŋat acel acel coko ma oromo acamane; ento ka cen odoko lyet ci mee woko." 
Exodus16:22 I kom nino me abicelle gucoko kwon madwoŋ ma dodo ma yam-mi tyen aryo, ma romo agwata moko kwon aryo aryo. Ka lutel wi lwak ducu gubino gutito lokke bot Moses," 
Exodus16:23 en owaco botgi ni, “Rwot yam ociko kit man ni, ‘Diki en aye nino me yweyo mot, en cabit maleŋ pa Rwot. Wubul gin ma wumito bulone, ci wuted gin ma wumito tedone, ki ma odonne wukan, wugwok nio wa odiko.’ ”" 
Exodus16:24 Kit meno gukano, gugwoko nio wa odiko macalo Moses ocikogi pe omedo ki kwok maŋwe, kwidi pe iye bene;" 
Exodus16:25 Moses owacci, “Wucam tin, tin aye cabit pa Rwot. Tin wubinono i bar." 
Exodus16:26 Wubicoko nino abicel; ento i kom nino me abirone, ma en aye cabit, pe bibedo tye.”" 
Exodus16:27 I kom nino me abiro jo mukene gucito woko ka jobone, pe gunoŋo gin mo." 
Exodus16:28 Ci Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Wubikwero lubo lok ma aciko, ki cikka ducu, nio wa awene?" 
Exodus16:29 Nen ba! Rwot otyeko miyowu cabit, mumiyo i nino me abicel en omiyowu kwon ma romo nino ariyo. Myero dano acel acel obed mot i kabedone, wek dano mo pe owek kabedone ocit woko i nino me abiro.”" 
Exodus16:30 Kit meno dano ducu guywe mot i nino me abiro. 
Exodus16:31 I kare meno jo me ot pa Icrael gulwoŋo nyiŋe ni manna. Onoŋo nen macalo nyig koo matar, ma mit malim, macalo nyim kic." 
Exodus16:32 Moses owacci, “Rwot ociko kit man ni, ‘Wek gigwok ma romo agwata moko kwon acel wa i kare pa likwayowu, wek gunen kit kwon ma yam apitowu kwede i tim, i kare ma yam akwanyowu iye woko ki lobo Ejipt.’”" 
Exodus16:33 Moses owaco Aron ni, “Kwany abino, ci iony manna ma romo agwata moko kwon kacel, iket i nyim Rwot, wek obed me agwoka wa i kare pa likwayowu.”" 
Exodus16:34 Macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses, kit meno Aron oketo manna i nyim canduk lok me caden, wek obed me agwoka," 
Exodus16:35 Jo Icrael gucamo manna gutyeko kwede mwaka pyeraŋwen kulu, nio ka guo i lobo ma giromo bedo iye; gucamo manna nio ka guo i waŋ lobo Kanaan." 
Exodus16:36 Agwata moko kwon ma yam gipimo kwede i kar onoŋo romo acel me abic me debe. 
Exodus17:1 Lwak Jo Icrael ducu gua woko ki i tim Cin kun giwoto gikobo macalo Rwot ociko, ci gugony Repidim; ento pii amata pa dano obedo pe." 
Exodus17:2 Mumiyo dano gukeco i kom Moses, guwacci, “Miniwa pii me amata.” Moses ogamo doggi ni, “Piŋo wukeco i koma? Piŋo wuomo i Rwot?”" 
Exodus17:3 Ento orwo pii oneko dano, ci dano gubedo ka ŋur i kom Moses kun giwacci, “Piŋo yam ikwanyowa woko ki i Ejipt ka nekowa ki Litinowa ki limwa ki orwo pii?”" 
Exodus17:4 Omiyo Moses okok bot Rwot ni, “Abitimo jo man niŋniŋ? Gin doŋ gutyeko yubbe me cela woko ki got.”" 
Exodus17:5 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Kat wa i nyim lwak, kwany ludoŋo mogo pa jo Icrael, icit kwedgi; dok ikwany odoo ma yam igoyo ki Nail, mak i ciŋi, iwot kwede." 
Exodus17:6 Nen, abicuŋ i nyimi, i kom pata got ma i Koreb; ci ibigoyo pata got, ci pii bia ki iye, wek lwak gumati.” Moses otimo kit meno i nyim ludoŋo pa Icrael." 
Exodus17:7 Olwono nyiŋ kabedo meno ni, Maca ki Meriba, pien jo Icrael gukeco i kome, dok pien guomo i Rwot kun giwaco ni, “Rwot mono tye i kinwa nyo pe?”" 
Exodus17:8 Jo Amalek gubino gulwenyo ki jo Icrael i Repidim. 
Exodus17:9 Moses owaco bot Yocwa ni, “Yer co ma i kinwa, ci icit icilweny ki jo Amalek; diki abicuŋ i wi got ki odoo pa Lubaŋa i ciŋa.”" 
Exodus17:10 Ci Yocwa otimo kit ma Moses otitte, olwenyo i kom jo Amalek; ci Moses ki Aron ki Kur gucito malo i wi got." 
Exodus17:11 Ka Moses obedo ka tiŋo ciŋe malo, ci Icrael giloyo; ento ka obedo ka dwoko ciŋe piny, jo Amalek giloyo." 
Exodus17:12 Ento ka ciŋ Moses ojony woko, ci gikwanyo got gikette piny, ka en obedo i wiye, ci Aron ki Kur gitiŋo ciŋe malo, ŋat acel tuŋ cel kit ŋat acel tuŋ mukene; kit meno ciŋse obedo mutiŋŋe malo nio ka cen opoto." 
Exodus17:13 Ci Yocwa ojwero Amalek ki jone ki pala lucwan. 
Exodus17:14 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Co lok man i buk obed me lapo wic, ci ikwan i it Yocwa matek, ni, An abijwayo Amalek woko ki i tam pa dano ducu ma gitye piny i te polo.”" 
Exodus17:15 Ka Moses ocano keno tyer, olwoŋo ni, Rwot aye benderana," 
Exodus17:16 kun waco ni, “Cinwa omako bendera pa Rwot! Rwot bilweny ki Amalek kare ducu.”" 
Exodus18:1 Yecero, ma ajwaka pa jo Midian, won dako pa Moses, yam owinyo gin ducu ma Lubaŋa obedo ka tiyo pi Moses ki pi jo Icrael, kit ma Rwot okwanyo jo Icrael ki i Ejipt," 
Exodus18:2 Onoŋo Yecero, won dako pa Moses, ogamo Jipola dako pa Moses, i kare ma Moses odwoko en bote," 
Exodus18:3 kacel ki awobene aryo. Nyiŋ awobi acel Gercom, pien yam owacci, “Abedo labedo i lobo pa lurok.”" 
Exodus18:4 Nyiŋ mukene Eliejer, pien yam owacci, “Lubaŋa pa wora aye okonya, ci olara ki i pala lucwan pa Parao.”" 
Exodus18:5 Ka Yecero, won dako pa Moses, obino ki awobene ki dakone bot Moses i tim, ka ma yam gugony iye i te got pa Lubaŋa," 
Exodus18:6 ŋat acel mo otito bot Moses ni, “Nen, won dakoni Yecero obebino boti ki dakoni kacel ki awobene.”" 
Exodus18:7 Ci Moses okato ocito ka jolo won dakone, ci oryebbe i nyime, onoto leme; ka gucako motte kekengi kun gipenyo kit bedogi, ka gudonyo i kema," 
Exodus18:8 Ka Moses otito ki won dakone gin ducu ma yam Rwot otimo i kom Parao ki i kom jo Ejipt pi jo Icrael, ki peko ma gubedo kwede i korayo, ki kit ma yam Rwot olarogi kwede." 
Exodus18:9 Ci cwiny Yecero obedo yom pi gin ducu ma Rwot yam otiyo bot jo Icrael, pi kit ma olarogi kwede ki i ciŋ jo Ejipt." 
Exodus18:10 Ci Yecero owacci, “Gipwo Rwot ma olarowu ki i cin jo Ejipt ki i cin Parao." 
Exodus18:11 Kombeddi doŋ aŋeyo ni, Rwot dit makato lubaŋa mukene ducu, pien olaro dano ki i ciŋ jo Ejipt, ma yam gubedo ka ronyogi-ni.’" 
Exodus18:12 Ka Yecero won dako pa Moses otyero gitum awaŋa, ki gitum mukene, bot Lubaŋa; ci Aron obino ki ludoŋo ducu pa jo Icrael ka camo kwon kacel ki won dako pa Moses i nyim Lubaŋa." 
Exodus18:13 Orwone Moses obedo ka ŋolo kop pa dano, ci dano gucuŋ i nyim Moses nia odiko con nio wa otyeno." 
Exodus18:14 Ka won dako pa Moses oneno gin ducu ma en obedo ka timo pi dano, ci owacci, “Itiyo ki dano ku man piŋo? Piŋo ibedo keni, kun dano ducu gucuŋ gurumi woko nia odiko nio wa otyeno?”" 
Exodus18:15 Moses owaco bot won dakone ni, “Pien dano gibino bota pi penyo dog Lubaŋa," 
Exodus18:16 Ka gitye ki lok alara, ci gibino bota, an aŋolo kop i kin dano ki lawote, kun amiyo giŋeyo cik pa Lubaŋa ki ŋolle.”" 
Exodus18:17 Won dako pa Moses owacce ni, “Gin ma in itiyo pe kakare." 
Exodus18:18 In kacel ki lwak wubiol woko, pien ticce pek obwoyo komi woko, in pe itwero tyekone keni." 
Exodus18:19 Doŋ iwiny doga; abimini ryeko, dok Lubaŋa obed kwedi! In ibibedo lakwena pa dano i nyim Lubaŋa, ki pi tero kopgi bot Lubaŋa." 
Exodus18:20 Ibipwonyogi cik ki kit ŋolone, kun imiyo giŋeyo lubone ki kit ma myero giti kwede." 
Exodus18:21 Ento in iyer dano makwiri ki i kin lwak, jo ma nen ni gilworo Lubaŋa, jo ma gigenogi, ma gikwero lim me wilo loyo kop matan: ci iket jo meno gulo lwak, gubed lulo jo alip, ki jo miya, ki jo pyerabic, ki jo apar." 
Exodus18:22 Wek guŋol kop ki dano kare ducu; gukel boti lok maditone keken; ento lok ducu matitino guŋol ki kunnu; ci doŋ gibiyweyo kori, dok gibinywako tiŋo peko meno kwedi." 
Exodus18:23 Ka itiyo kit man ma Lubaŋa bene ociki kwede kit man, ci ibitwero cirone, ki lwak man ducu bene gibidok i kabedogi ki kuc.”" 
Exodus18:24 Moses owinyo dog won dakone, otimo gin ducu ma owacce." 
Exodus18:25 Moses ocako yero jo makwiri ma i kin jo Icrael ducu, oketogi gudoko lutel wi lwak, lulo jo alip, ki jo miya, ki jo pyerabic, ki jo apar." 
Exodus18:26 Gubedo ka ŋolo kop i kare ducu; pido matego aye gikelo bot Moses, ento lok ducu matitino giŋolo ki kunnu." 
Exodus18:27 Ka Moses olwoko won dakone odok, ci en omedde anyim nio i lobo tugi." 
Exodus19:1 I kom por dwe me adekke nia guo i tim Cinai i kom nino meno. 
Exodus19:2 Ka gua woko ki i Repidim ci gubino i tim Cinai, gugony i tim; jo Icrael gugony kunnu i nyim got." 
Exodus19:3 Ka Moses oito malo bot Lubaŋa, ci Rwot olwone ki i got, kun waco ni, “Ibiwaco ki jo me ot pa Yakobo kit man kun itito ki jo Icrael ni, Rwot owaco ni," 
Exodus19:4 ‘Doŋ wutyeko neno gin ma atimo i kom jo Ejipt, kit macalo yam atiŋowu ki bwom ocur, akelowu bota," 
Exodus19:5 Pienno ka wubiworo doga, kun wumako gicikkena, ci wubibedo jona kikome i kin rok ducu; pien lobo ducu mera." 
Exodus19:6 Wubibedo ker ma lwakke ajwagi ma an aye aloyo, wubibedo rok maleŋ.’ Meno aye lok ma ibiloko bot jo Icrael.”" 
Exodus19:7 Kit meno Moses obino olwoŋo ludoŋo pa lwak, ci oketo lok meno Rwot owaco-ni i nyimgi." 
Exodus19:8 Ci lwak ducu gugamo lawaŋ acel ni, “Gin ducu ma Rwot owaco, wabitiyo.” Ci Moses odwoko lok pa lwak bot Rwot." 
Exodus19:9 Rwot owaco ki Moses ni, “Nen, an abibino boti i pol mapek, wek lwak guwiny aloko kwedi, wek guye in matwal.” Ka Moses otito lok pa lwak bot Rwot," 
Exodus19:10 ci Rwot owaco bot Moses “Cit bot dano, ilonygi tin ki diki, gulwok boŋogi," 
Exodus19:11 wek i nino me adekke onoŋ guyubbe; pien i nino adekke, an Rwot abilor piny i wi got Cinai i nyim lwak ducu." 
Exodus19:12 In ibitoŋo waŋaco me poko ka ma lwak bicuŋ iye, kun itito ki lwak ni, ‘Wugwokke, pe wuit malo i wi got, pe gugud waŋacone bene; dok ka ŋat mo ogudo kom got, gibineko woko." 
Exodus19:13 Pe ciŋ mo bugudo kome, ento gibicelo ki got nyo ki atero; kadi bed lee nyo dano, pe bikwo. Ka dwan obute bikok nakanaka, ci gibiito malo i kor got.”" 
Exodus19:14 Ci Moses olor piny nia ki wi got ocito bot lwak ka olonyo lwak; ci gulwoko boŋogi. 
Exodus19:15 Ka owaco bot lwak ni, “I nino adekke noŋo doŋ wuyubbe; pe wubed cok ki mon.”" 
Exodus19:16 I kom nino me adekke odiko piny obedo ka mor ma noŋo lutkot wil awila, pol mapek oumo wi got, ci obute okok maloŋo twatwal, omiyo jo ducu ma gubedo i gony komgi omyel." 
Exodus19:17 Lacen Moses okelo lwak woko ki i gony ka rwatte ki Lubaŋa; gucuŋ piny ma jo Icrael gua ki i lobo Ejipt i te got. 
Exodus19:18 Yito oboyo kom got Cinai woko, pien onoŋo Lubaŋa olor Piny i kome ki mac; yitone oduny cito malo macalo yito mac lawaŋ agulu, got ducu oyeŋŋe matek." 
Exodus19:19 Ka dwan obute medde ki koko maloŋo, Moses bedo ka lok Lubaŋa gamo doge ki mor kot." 
Exodus19:20 Rwot olor piny i wi got Cinai, i wi lacol got Rwot olwoŋo Moses ki malo i wi locol got, ci Moses ocito malo kunnu." 
Exodus19:21 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Lor piny, ijuk lwak, wek pe gucerre pi neno Rwot, miyo lwak jo mapol gibito." 
Exodus19:22 Dok imi ajwagi ma gibino cok bot Rwot, gulonnye kekengi, wek Rwot pe otugge i komgi.”" 
Exodus19:23 Ci Moses ogamo ni, “Lwak pe gibiito malo i wi got Cinai; pien in kikomi aye icikowa, kun iwaco ni, ‘Toŋ waŋaco orum got ci iket obed kwer.’’’" 
Exodus19:24 Rwot owacce ni, “Lor piny, icibin malo wun ki Aron; ento pe iwek ajwagi ki lwak gucerre me bino bota, wek pe atugge i komgi.”" 
Exodus19:25 Kit meno Moses olor piny bot lwak, otito botgi." 
Exodus20:1 Lubaŋa oloko lok man ducu kun waco ni," 
Exodus20:2 “An a Rwot Lubaŋani, ma yam akwanyi woko ki i lobo Ejipt, i ot me opii." 
Exodus20:3 “Pe ibed ki lubaŋa mukene kono an kena. 
Exodus20:4 “Pe iti cal apayani mo, nyo cal gin ma tye malo i polo, nyo ma tye piny i wi lobo, nyo gin ma tye i pii ma i te lobo." 
Exodus20:5 Pe iryebbe piny i nyimgi, pe iworgi; pien an aye a Rwot Lubaŋani, an Lubaŋa ma lanyeko. Aketo can i kom likwayo pi bal pa kwarogi nio wa i yalwak me adek ki me aŋwen pa jo ma gikwera," 
Exodus20:6 ento abinyuto mar ma pe lokke i kom jo alip ki alip ma gimara, ma gimako cikka." 
Exodus20:7 “Pe ilwoŋ nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋani me noŋo; pien Rwot bimiyo kop loyo dano ma lwoŋo nyiŋe me noŋo. 
Exodus20:8 “Po pi nino me cabit, ikwer obed maleŋ." 
Exodus20:9 Ibitic matek nino abicel, kun itiyo iye ticci ducu;" 
Exodus20:10 ento nino me abirone en aye cabit pa Rwot Lubaŋani. I nino meno pe igud iye tic mo, in kikomi, nyo wodi, nyo nyari, kadi opiini, kadi aŋecani, kadi dyaŋŋi, kadi labedo ma bedo i kinwu;" 
Exodus20:11 pien i nino abicel aye Rwot yam otiyo iye polo ki nam ki jami ducu ma tye iye, ci oywe i kom nino me abiro; mumiyo Rwot omiyo gum i kom nino me abiro, olonyo obedo maleŋ." 
Exodus20:12 “Wor woru ki meni, wek iri pi kare malac i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋani bimiyo boti." 
Exodus20:13 “Pe ineki. 
Exodus20:14 “Pe itim abor. 
Exodus20:15 “Pe ikwal gin mo. 
Exodus20:16 “Pe ibed caden me goba i kom lawoti. 
Exodus20:17 “Cwinyi pe opukke i kom ot pa lawoti; cwinyi pe opukke i kom dako pa lawoti, kadi opiine nyo aŋecane, nyo twonne, nyo kanane, nyo kadi gin mo ma lawoti tye kwede.”" 
Exodus20:18 I kare meno ka dano guneno piny mor ki lutkot ma bedo ka wil awila, ki dwan obute ki yito muboyo kom got, ci lworo omakogi, komgi omyel. Gucuŋ ki cen ka mabor," 
Exodus20:19 ci guwaco bot Moses ni, “In aye ilok kwedwa, ci wabiwinyo; ento pe iwek Lubaŋa aye olok kwedwa; miyo wato.”" 
Exodus20:20 Ci Moses owaco bot lwak ni, “Pe wulwor; pien Lubaŋa obino ka temo cwinywu, wek wubed ki lworo i kome, wek pe wubal.”" 
Exodus20:21 Ci lwak gucuŋ ki cen ka mabor, kun Moses cito cok ki pol macol licuc ka ma Lubaŋa tye iye." 
Exodus20:22 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Wac bot jo Icrael kit man ni, ‘Wun doŋ wuneno piwu kenwu ni Rwot otyeko lok kwedwu ki i polo." 
Exodus20:23 Pe wubitiyo cal lubaŋa me ryal me nywako bedo kacel kweda, pe wubitiyo cal lubaŋa me jabu bene piwu kenwu." 
Exodus20:24 Wutina keno tyer ki lobo, wutum iye gitum awaŋa ki gityer lakwecwiny, romiwu ki twoniwu; i kabedo ducu ma aketo iye nyina me po, abibino iye ka miyowu gum lobo ki" 
Exodus20:25 Ka ibitiyo keno tyerra ki got, pe ican ki got ma gipayo; pien ka iketo iye giticci me payone, ci noŋo ipyedde i kome." 
Exodus20:26 Dok pe wuit ki rwom i keno tyerra, miyo komwu binen ka wuito.’" 
Exodus21:1 “Magi aye cik ma ibiketo i nyim lwak. 
Exodus21:2 Ka iwilo opii ma en Laibru, en bitic boti pi mwaka abicel i mwaka me abirone gibigonye woko laboŋo lim mo me kok, bicito gire," 
Exodus21:3 Ka yam obino en kene, ci en bicito en kene; ka obino ma onyomo, ci bicito ki dakone." 
Exodus21:4 Ka rwode aye onyomme dako ce onywalle awobe ki anyira, dako ki litinone gibidoŋ bot rwode, ci en bicito gire kene." 
Exodus21:5 Ento ka opii meno oloko atir ni, ‘An amaro rwoda, ki dakona ki litinona; pe abicito,’" 
Exodus21:6 ci rwode bitere bot Lubaŋa, ci bitere wa i ŋet kika, nyo i kom okar me doggola; ka rwode bituco ite ki atero; ci doŋ en bitic bote matwal." 
Exodus21:7 “Ka dano mo ocato nyare woko, macalo aŋeca, aŋeca meno pe gibigonyo macalo opii," 
Exodus21:8 Ka en pe oyomo cwiny rwode, ma yam oyere-ni, en myero oye ni gikoke ki lim; ento pe bibedo ki twero me cate bot dano mo ma larok, pien obwole noŋo." 
Exodus21:9 Ka yam oyere pi wode, ci en myero ogwoke macalo gwoko nyare." 
Exodus21:10 Ka ce binyomo dakone mukene gire, pe ojwik camme, kadi boŋone, pe oteny en woko ata." 
Exodus21:11 Ka pe ocobo gin magi adek ducu, dako gibigonyo laboŋo lim mo me kok, laboŋo culo lim mo." 
Exodus21:12 “Ka ŋatti mo ogoyo dano, ce oto, gibineke wako." 
Exodus21:13 Ento ka yam pe obuto okiye, ento Lubaŋa omiyo ciŋe orwatte i kome, ci abiyero kabedo mo ma en biriŋo laro iye." 
Exodus21:14 Ento ka dano mo ocako lweny i kom gat mo me akaka me nekone woko ki ryeko, ci wubikwanye woko ki i kom keno tyerra, gineko woko." 
Exodus21:15 “Ka ŋatti mo ogoyo wonne nyo minne gibineke woko. 
Exodus21:16 “Ka ŋatti mo ekwalo dano, kadi ka ocato bot ŋatti mo nyo ginoŋo bote, gibineke woko." 
Exodus21:17 “Ka ŋatti mo oceno wonne nyo minne gibineke woko. 
Exodus21:18 “Ka jo mogo gubedo ka da, ce ŋat acel ocelo lawote ki got nyo odoŋo ki ciŋe ci pe oto, ento obedo ka twor labuto," 
Exodus21:19 lacen ka dano meno ocukke oa malo kun woto komo ki odoo, kop pe biloyo ŋat ma ogoye-ni, ento bicul pi balo kare me ticce, dok bimiyo en caŋ maber." 
Exodus21:20 “Ka ŋatti mo ogoyo opiine nyo aŋecane ki odoo ce oto woko cut, I gibiketo can i kome." 
Exodus21:21 Ento ka opii meno obedo kwo pi nino acel nyo aryc pe gibiketo can mo i kome; pien op meno obedo gire limme. 
Exodus21:22 “Ka co gitye ka lweny, ci ŋat acel ciŋe ocer i kom dako ma iye odoŋo, ce iye opoto woko, ma can pe onen iye’ dano ma ogoyo dako-nu biculo kwor pi wei ma won dako biŋolone, kun culo ki kit ma laŋolkop oŋolo." 
Exodus21:23 Ka can onen iye, ci gibiculo kwo ki kwo" 
Exodus21:24 waŋ ki waŋ, lak ki lak, ciŋ ki ciŋ tyen ki tyen," 
Exodus21:25 waŋo ki mac ki waŋo ki mac, ret ki ret, goco ki goco." 
Exodus21:26 “Ka ŋatti mo ogoyo waŋ opiine nyo waŋ aŋecane, ce oloyo oneko woko, ci bigonyo opii meno nyo aŋeca meno, weko cito gire pi waŋe-nu." 
Exodus21:27 Ka otwomo omuko lak opiine nyo aŋecane ci bigonyo opii meno nyo aŋeca meno weko cito gire pi lake-nu," 
Exodus21:28 “Ka twon mo ocobo dano ki tuŋe nyo dako, ce oneko woko, ci twon meno gibicelo woko ki got, dok riŋone bene pe gibicamo; ento kop pe biloye rwode." 
Exodus21:29 Ento ka kit twoŋ meno onene ni yam cobo dano ki tune con, dok yam doŋ giciko rwode pire ci ento pe omedo ki gwokone, ce oneko dano nyo dako mo, ci twon meno gibicelo woko ki got, ki rwode bene gibineke woko." 
Exodus21:30 Ka giŋolle cul, ci biculo lim ducu me koko kwone ma giŋolle." 
Exodus21:31 Ka ocobo awobi pa dano mo, nyo nyare, gibitic kwede i kit cik acel-lu." 
Exodus21:32 Ka twon ocobo opii mo, nyo aŋeca mo, ci rwode bimiyo cekel me ryal pyeradek ki ladit pa opii meno, ki twon bene gibicelo woko ki got." 
Exodus21:33 “Ka ŋatti mo oweko wi bur twolo nyo ka ŋatti mo okwinyo bur ci pe oumo wiye woko, ce twon nyo kana mo opoto iye," 
Exodus21:34 ci won bur biculone; en bimiyo lim bot rwode, ci riŋone bibedo mere." 
Exodus21:35 “Ka twon pa ŋatti mo otwomo mukene, ce oneko woko, ci gibicato makwo-ni woko, gipoko limme; ki twon ma gineko-ni riŋone bene gipoko woko." 
Exodus21:36 Nyo ka kite onene ni yam en twon ma lacob lim wadi atata, rwode bene pe ogwoko, en biculo twon ki twon wadi, ma gineko-ni bibedo mere." 
Exodus22:1 “Ka ŋatti mo akwalo twon mo nyo romo mo, ce oneko woko nyo ocato woko, ci biculo twoni abic pi twon acel, ki romi aŋwen pi romo acel, En biculo waŋe; ka gire mo pe, ci gibicate woko, wek gicul kwede lim ma ekwalo." 
Exodus22:2 Ka lim makwo ma gikwalo ginoŋo bot lakwalone makwo, kadi bed twon nyo kana nyo romo, ci biculo ma dodo kiryo." 
Exodus22:3 “Ka lakwo ginoŋo ka turo ot, ce gigoyo gineko woko, ci pe gibiculo remo pa lato; ento ka ce ginone iye ma ceŋ doŋ otuc, ci gibiculo kwor pi remone." 
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 “Ka ŋatti mo omiyo limme makwo gucamo poto cam nyo poto olok, nyo owekogi ocodo tol, ci gucamo poto pa dano mo, ci en biculone ki mere mabecone ma i potone ki i poto olokke." 
Exodus22:6 “Ka mac ocako waŋ ce ogamo okuto, ci owaŋo kal ma giduro nyo kal ma peya gikayo, nyo owaao poto ducu otyeko woko, ci lacwiny mac biculone ducu." 
Exodus22:7 “Ka ŋatti mo omiyo lim me akana bot lawote, nyo jami me agwoka, ka gikwalo woko ki i ot pa dano meno, ka dok lakwo meno ginoŋo, ci biculo ma dodo kiryo." 
Exodus22:8 Ka pe ginoŋo lakwo, ci won ot bicito cok bot Lubaŋa, pi nyuto ka en kikome aye oketo ciŋe i kom jami pa lawote, nyo pe." 
Exodus22:9 “Ka bal mo opoto, kadi bed pi twon, pi romo, pi boŋo, nyo pi kit gin mo murwenyo ka ŋat acel mo otuco ni, ‘Man aye en,’ ci kop ma i kin jo meno gibiketo i nyim Lubaŋa; ŋat ma Lubaŋa oŋolo kop oloye biculo lawote lim ma dodo kiryo." 
Exodus22:10 “Ka ŋatti mo omiyo kana nyo twon nyo romo nyo lee mo me akana bot lawote, ce oto woko nyo gigoyo nyo giryemo orwenyo woko, ma ŋatti mo pe oneno," 
Exodus22:11 ci en bikwon ki nyiŋ Rwot, wek ginen ka pe en kikome aye oketo ciŋe i kom jami pa lawote; rwode myero oye kwon meno, en pe biculone." 
Exodus22:12 Ento ka gikwalo ki bote, ci en biculo rwode." 
Exodus22:13 Ka ŋuu aye om wodo, ci en okel gin me moko lokke; ci en pe biculo gin ma ŋuu aye omwodo," 
Exodus22:14 “Ka ŋatti mo oomo lim makwo bot lawote, ce gigoyo nyo oto woko, ma rwode pe tye, ci myero ocul waŋe atir." 
Exodus22:15 Ka onoŋo rwode bene tye, ci pe biculo waŋe: ka yam obino pi awak, ci cul me awak biromo. Cik mapapat ma mako kit ki dini" 
Exodus22:16 “Ka ŋatti mo obito nyako mo ma peya oneyo co, ma pe gitoŋo keny i kome, ce obedo kwede, ci myero okol lim me keny me nyome, ci oter obed dakone." 
Exodus22:17 Ka wonne okwero woko matek pi nyare, ci en biculo wei lim ma romo nyomo nyako ma peya oneyo co." 
Exodus22:18 “Pe iwek dako ma latal obed makwo. 
Exodus22:19 “Ŋat ma obuto ki lee ce ginek woko. 
Exodus22:20 “Ŋat ma otumo gitum bot Iubaŋa mo, ma pe bot Rwot, gibidyere woko me aneka." 
Exodus22:21 “Pe itim labedo ma bedo i kinwu marac, nyo pe iune bene, pien yam wun bene wubedo lubedo i lobo Ejipt." 
Exodus22:22 Pe wuket giŋi kom daa-to mo nyo latin kic mo. 
Exodus22:23 Ka iketo giŋi komgi, ce gukok bota, ci abiwinyo kokogi ada." 
Exodus22:24 Akemo bimaka matek, ci abinekowu ki pala lucwan, ci monwu bene gibidoko mon-to ki litinowu bene gibidoko litino kic," 
Exodus22:25 “Ka imiyo danona mo ma bedo i kinwu omako limmi ma en lacan, pe ibed kwede macalo labanyani, dok pe ipeny magoba mo ki bote." 
Exodus22:26 Ka lawoti ojeŋo boŋone boti, ci ber idwokke ma ceŋ peya opoto;" 
Exodus22:27 pien giumme eno keken, boŋo ma umo kome; en dok bibuto ki gin aŋo? Ka en okok bota, ci abiwinyo, pien an lakica." 
Exodus22:28 “Pe iyet Lubaŋa, nyo pe icen ladit ma loyo wun lwak." 
Exodus22:29 “Pe igalle ki tyero jami ma ikayo opoŋo deroni kacel ki yino ki mooni bene, “Ibityero litino awobe kayo, imiyogi bota." 
Exodus22:30 Ibikelo twoni meri ki nyogi romi bene kit meno, Gubed ki megigi nino abiro, ka ibimiyogi bota i kom nino me aborone," 
Exodus22:31 “Wubibedo jo maleŋ ma gikwerogi pira: pienno pe wucam riŋo ma ŋuu omwodo i t im; wubol woko ki gwogi. 
Exodus23:1 “Pe irwe lok ma iwinyo awinya ata; pe iribbe ki dano marac ka kelo lok goba me keto can i kom dano. 
Exodus23:2 Pe ilub lwak ma gitiyo gin marac, Ka i lok me pido pe ilokke ilub kor lwak pi balo ŋolo kop atir," 
Exodus23:3 kadi dworo kor lacan i pidone. 
Exodus23:4 “Ka irwatte ki twon pa lamoneni, nyo kanane, ma orwenyo, dwok bote." 
Exodus23:5 Ka ineno kana pa ŋat ma dagi obuto piny ma yec obwoyo, pe iwek ata, konye akonya." 
Exodus23:6 “Pe ibal te pido pa danoni ma lacan wek lok oloye. 
Exodus23:7 Pe idony i lok goba: pe inek dano ma kite atir ma pe ki bal, pien pe abiye labalo loyo kop." 
Exodus23:8 Pe igam lim lawil loyo kop, pien lim lawil loyo kop miyo jo ma neno piny waŋgi umme woko, ci balo te pido pa dano ma lokke tye atir." 
Exodus23:9 “Pe iun larok ma bedo i kinwu, pien wun bene wuŋeyo cwiny lubedo, pien wun bene wubedo lubedo i Ejipt." 
Exodus23:10 “Ibicoyo potoni ci icoko cam ma ocek iye pi mwaka abicel. 
Exodus23:11 Ento i mwaka me abirone ibiweko ywe, okanne roc, wek arupinnye lucan ma i kinwu gunoŋ ginacama; ci ma obwotte lee tim bicamone. Ibitimo kit meno ki poto olokki ki poto jeitunini bene," 
Exodus23:12 “Ti ticci nino abicel, ento i kom nino me abirone ibiywe, wek twon ki kanani gunoŋ yweyo, dok wek latin pa aŋecani ki labedo boti guom ki kero komgi." 
Exodus23:13 Wumak gin ducu ma awaco botwu, dok pe wutuc nyiŋ lubaŋa, mukene; lok ma kit enno pe giwiny a ki i dogi." 
Exodus23:14 “Ibikwero nino madito bota tyen adek i mwaka acel acel. 
Exodus23:15 Ibikwero ni madito me Mugati ma Tobi Pe Iye, macalo yam aciko. Ibicamo mugati tobi pe iye pi nino abiro, i kare ma giciko, i dwe me Abib, pien meno aye dwe ma yam ia iye ki i Ejipt. Dano mope obin i nyima ki ciŋe noŋo," 
Exodus23:16 Ibikwc ronino madito me wi mwaka, pi c: mukwoŋo cek pi tic me ciŋi, i kom cam ma icoyo i poto; ki nino madito me nyonone i dero i agikki me mwaka, doŋ icoko gin ma ocek i poto pi ticci," 
Exodus23:17 Co ma boti ducu gibibino i nyim Rwot Lubaŋa tyen adek i mwaka," 
Exodus23:18 “Pe ityer remo me gitumma kacel ki mugat i ma tobi tye iye; pe iwek dwolo mo me kwero nino madito bota obed nio wa odiko. 
Exodus23:19 “Cam mukwoŋo cek i potoni me wi mwaka myero ikel i ot pa Rwot Lubaŋani, “Pe ited riŋo latin dyel ki cak pa minne. Gicwalo lamalaika pa Rwot pi telo nyim dano" 
Exodus23:20 “Nen, acwalo lamalaika i nyim pi gwokowu i yo, ki me kelowu i kabe ma yam ayubo piwu," 
Exodus23:21 Wugwokke wek wuwiny doge, pe wujem i kor pien kica pe bimake i komwu ka wuba pien nyiŋa tye iye." 
Exodus23:22 “Ento ka wuwinyo doge ki cwinywu ducu, kun wutiyo k it ma awa botwu ducu, ci abibedo lamerok lumerokwu ki lamone pa lumonewu" 
Exodus23:23 “Ka lamalaikana bitelo nyimwu terowu bot jo Amor, jo Kit, jo Per jo Kanaan, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc, abijwa: gi woko." 
Exodus23:24 Pe wuryebbe i nyim lubaŋagi pe wuworgi, pe wulub kit tic Ento wubimuko calgi woko ducu, dok wubiŋido wir jogigi woko." 
Exodus23:25 Wubiwc Rwot Lubaŋawu, ci abimiyo gum i kom kwonwu ki i kom piiwu; abikwanyo two woko ki i kinwu." 
Exodus23:26 i-lobowu-nu lim pe bibwogo litinogi, dako ma lalur bibedo pe; abicobo nino me kwowu ducu kakare," 
Exodus23:27 Abicwalo lworo i koma i nyimwu, abibaŋo rok ducu ma wubiromo kwedgi; abimiyo lumerokwu giriŋo giloko ŋegi botwu." 
Exodus23:28 Abicoro pino jobi i nyimwu i kom jo Kiv, jo Kanaan ki jo Kit, wek oryemgi woko ki i nyimwu." 
Exodus23:29 Pe abiryemogi woko ki i nyimwu i mwaka acel, miyo lobo bidoŋ noŋo, ci gin tim bimedde mapol, yelowu." 
Exodus23:30 Abiryemogi woko ki i nyimwu motmot, nio ka wunya, wucamo lobo." 
Exodus23:31 Abiketo waŋ lobowu obed nia ki i Nam Makwar nio i nam pa Lupiliciti ki nia ki i tim nio i kulu Euprate. Dok abimiyo wegi lobo-nu i ciŋwu, wun bene wubiryemogi woko ki i nyimwu." 
Exodus23:32 Pe wuket gicikke mo kwedgi, kadi bot lubaŋagi." 
Exodus23:33 Pe gubed i lobowu, miyo wubitimo bal i koma; pien ka wubiworo lubaŋagi, ci bidoko owic botwu.”" 
Exodus24:1 Dok Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Bin malo bota kany, in ki Aron, Nadab ki Abiu, ki ludoŋo pa jo Icrael pyerabiro, wuwora ki ka mabor." 
Exodus24:2 Moses keken aye binyiko cok bota. Jo mukene pe gibinyiko cok, dok lwak bene pe gibibino kwede malo.”" 
Exodus24:3 Moses ocito otito ki lwak lok ducu ma Rwot owaco, ki cikke ducu. Lwak ducu gugamo ki dwan acel kun giwaco ni, “Lok ducu ma Rwot owaco wabiti yo.”" 
Exodus24:4 Moses ocoyo lok ducu ma Rwot owaco. Oa malo odiko con, ocano keno tyer i te got, ki wir apar wiye aryo, muporo wel kaka pa jo Icrael apar wiye aryo." 
Exodus24:5 Ci ocwalo awobe pa jo Icrael, ma gutyero gitum awaŋa dok gutumo twoni bot Rwot me gityer lakwecwiny," 
Exodus24:6 Lacen Moses okwanyo nucu remo, oonyo i weer, ki nucu remo ocoro i kom keno tyer." 
Exodus24:7 Ka dok okwanyo buk me gicikke, ci okwano bot lwak, guwinyo. Ci gugamo ni, “Gin ducu ma Rwot owaco wabitiyo, dok wabiworo doge bene,”" 
Exodus24:8 Ka Moses dok otiŋo remo, ocoro i kom lwak, kun wacci, “Nen remo me gicikke ma Rwot oketo kwedwu, ma lubo lok magi ducu.”" 
Exodus24:9 Ka Moses ki Aron, Nadab ki Abiu, ki ludoŋo pa jo Icrael pyerabiro-ni gucito malo," 
Exodus24:10 ci guneno Lubaŋa pa Icrael. Gin mo obedo ka tyene macalo kidi capir ma bulu ma gipeto, ma ryeny macalo polo kikome." 
Exodus24:11 Ento Lubaŋa pe ogudo kom ludoŋo pa Icrael ki ciŋe; guneno Lubaŋa, ci gucamo dok gumato pii bene." 
Exodus24:12 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Bin bota malo i wi got, ci ikura kunnu, Abimini kidi ma apada, kacel ki cik ki ginacika ma acoyo me pwonyo lwak.”" 
Exodus24:13 Ci Moses oa malo, kacel ki Yocwa ma lakonye, ka ocito i wi got pa Lubaŋa." 
Exodus24:14 Owaco ki ludoŋo ni, “Wubed wukurwa kany, nio ka dok wadwogo botwu, Nen, Aron ki Kur gudoŋ botwu; ka ŋat mo tye ki lok mo, oter botgi.”" 
Exodus24:15 Ka Moses cito malo i wi got, ci pol oumo got woko." 
Exodus24:16 Deyo pa Rwot obedo i kom got Cinai, ci pol oumo kema pi nino abicel. I kom nino me abirone, Rwot olwoŋo Moses ki i dye pol." 
Exodus24:17 I kare meno deyo pa Rwot onen bot jo Icrael macalo mac arum i wi got," 
Exodus24:18 Ka Moses odonyo i dye pol, ocito malo i wi got; ci Moses obedo i wi got nino pyeraŋwen, dyeceŋ ki dyewor." 
Exodus25:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Exodus25:2 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni gujogga gityer, ci gugam gityer pa dano ducu ma gukelo ma cwinygi opwoyo." 
Exodus25:3 Man aye kit gityer ma wubigamo ki botgi: jabu, ryal, mola;" 
Exodus25:4 uci ma bulu, ki ma lamar lamar, ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini maberre; yer dyegi," 
Exodus25:5 laa nyogi romi ma ginyoŋo, laa dyegi; bao yat okuto lalwii:" 
Exodus25:6 moo me mac tara, aŋwece me yubo moo wir ki pi odok eceta ma ŋwe kur;" 
Exodus25:7 litino kidi onik litino kidi me wel me amwona i kom jabu pi epod ki kicaa kor. 
Exodus25:8 Ber gu yubba kabedo maleŋ wek abed i kingi 
Exodus25:9 Wuti gin ducu kun wulubo kit cal ma abinyutti, ma dok i kom timo kema ki jami ma giketo iye ducu." 
Exodus25:10 “Gibipayo canduk ki bao yat lalwii; borre obed futi aŋwen, ki lacce futi aryo, ki borre tuŋ malo futi aryo." 
Exodus25:11 Mwon kome woko ki jabu ma giliyo maber, mwon iye ki ŋeye bene. Lul doge ducu irum woko ki jabu." 
Exodus25:12 Ti agit me jabu aŋwen pire, iketgi i kom tyene aŋwen: ket agit aryo tuŋ cel ki aryo mukene tuŋ cel." 
Exodus25:13 Ti tal me yat lalwii, imwon komgi woko ki jabu." 
Exodus25:14 Rwak tal i agit ducu ma tye i but canduk, me tiŋo canduk." 
Exodus25:15 Tal gibibedo i agit ma i kom canduk-ki matwal, pe gibiwotogi woko." 
Exodus25:16 Kidi ma apada ma gicoyo iye lok me caden ma amiyi-ni ibiketogi i canduk. 
Exodus25:17 Dok ibitiyo kom mekica kijabu ma giliyo maber; borre obed futi aŋwen, ki lacce futi aryo." 
Exodus25:18 Ti cal lukerubi aryo ki jabu kun itetogi ki nyol, i kom agikki kom me kica aryo ducu." 
Exodus25:19 Ti cal lakerubi acel i agikkine tuŋ cel; ki acel i agikkine tuŋ cel; ti cal lukerubi kun gikubbe i kom me kica-ni i agikkine aryo ducu. 
Exodus25:20 Lukerubi gibiyaro bwomgi malo me umo kom me kica ki bwomgi, kun waŋgi kemo lawote; waŋ Lukerubi binen kun kemo kom me kica." 
Exodus25:21 Ibicibo kom me kica cuŋ i wi canduk, ci iket lok me caden ma abimiyo boti-ni i canduk." 
Exodus25:22 An abirwatte kwedi kunnu, ci abilok kwedi ki malo i wi kom me kica, ki i kin lukerubi ma gitye malo i wi canduk lok me caden-ni, kun aloko kwedi i kom cik ducu ma abimiyi pi jo Icrael." 
Exodus25:23 “Ti meja ki bao yat lalwii; borre obed futi adek, ki lacce futi acel ki nucu, ki borre tuŋ malo futi aryo." 
Exodus25:24 Mwon kome woko ki jabu ma giliyo maber, dok ilul doge ducu, irum woko ki jabu," 
Exodus25:25 Ket riine ma lacce rom ki dye ciŋ, ilul dog rii ki jabu orum woko." 
Exodus25:26 Dok itim agit me jabu aŋwen pire, ci imwon agit i twoke aŋwen ducu, i tyene aŋwen," 
Exodus25:27 Agit bibuto i kom rii, ci ibirwako iye tal me latin meja." 
Exodus25:28 Ti tal ki jabu; gibitiŋo meja ki tal meno. 
Exodus25:29 Dok iti caanine, ki ata bone me odok eceta, ki cupane ki werre me liyo gityer amate ibitimogi ki jabu ma giliyo mabe" 
Exodus25:30 Ibicano mugati me aketa i nyima i wi meja jwijwi. 
Exodus25:31 “Dok ibitiyo okar-mac ki jabu m giliyo maber. Tedi okar-mac ki bolle gibiteto ki nyol; kikopone, en aye wen ki ature ducu, gibikubbe kwede kacel." 
Exodus25:32 Jaŋe bibedo abicel ma gujany guryey gukaco ŋete ryoryo, jaŋ okar-mac ade ma guryeyo i bute tuŋ cel, ki jaŋ okai mac cadek ma guryeyo i tuŋ mukene-ni." 
Exodus25:33 I kom jaŋe tuŋ cel bibedo iye kikop adek ma gitimo macalo tur yaa, ku; acel acel tye ki wene ki ature, ki i kor jaŋe tuŋ mukene bene bibedo iy kikopo adek ma gitimo macalo tu yaa, kun acel acel tye ki wene ki ature jaŋe abicel ducu ma guryeyo gukac okar-mac-ci gibibedo kit meno." 
Exodus25:34 Ka dok i kom okar-mac kikome-ni bibedi iye kikopo aŋwen ma gitimo macalo tu yaa, ki wengi ki aturegi," 
Exodus25:35 ki wene ma; okubbe i kom okar-mac-ci i te jaŋe abicel ma’ guryeyo ryoryo i kom okar mac. 
Exodus25:36 Wengi ki jaŋgi gubed ma gu kubbe kacel, kun kome ducu bedo jabi ma giliyo maber ma giteto ki nyol" 
Exodus25:37 Ci doŋ ibitiyo pire mac laput abiro gicib mac laput malo i wiye wek omen: kabedo ma i nyime. 
Exodus25:38 Magacce ki caanine bibedo me jabu ma giliyo maber. 
Exodus25:39 Giyub okar-mac kacel ki jami tic magi ducu ki jabu ma giliyo maber ma pekke romo ratili miya acel. 
Exodus25:40 Dok ber inen ni itimogi i kit cal ma gibenyutti ki i wi got-ti. 
Exodus26:1 “Doki ibitiyo kema ki boŋo cuka apar me boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre, ki uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar; ibicweyo iye cal lukerubi ma gitiyogi ki diro" 
Exodus26:2 Bor boŋo cuka acel acel obed ms romo yadi apar wiye aŋwen, ki lac me boŋo cuka acel acel obed ma romo yat lalwii, ci imwon komgi woko ki yadi aryo; boŋo cuka ducu gibibedc marom," 
Exodus26:3 Boŋo cuka abic gibiribog kacel, ki boŋo cuka abic mukene bene gibiribogi kacel," 
Exodus26:4 Kwo waŋ jarara ma bulu i dog boŋo cuka me dul mukwoŋo me agikk i; ka dok ibikwoyo waŋ jarara i dog boŋo cuka me dul me aryone me agikk i, ma rom ki wadi." 
Exodus26:5 Kwo waŋ jarara pyerabic i dog boŋo cuka acel acel, ki waŋ jarara pyerabic i dog cuka me aryone kun waŋ jarara bikemme ki wadi." 
Exodus26:6 Ibitiyo jarara gol me jabu pyerabic me ribo dog boŋo cuka i kom lawote pi golo wad i wek kema obed mukubbe kacel likiŋ. 
Exodus26:7 “Ibit iyo cuka me yer dyegi me laum wi kema; ibitimo cuka apar wiye acel. 
Exodus26:8 Bor cuka acel acel obed ma romo yadi apar wiye abic, ki lac me cuka acel acel obed ma romo yadi aryo; cuka apar wiye acel-li ducu gubed marom." 
Exodus26:9 Ibiribo cuka abic kacel pat kengi, ki cuka abicel bene ibiribo pat kengi, dok cuka me abicelle ibibamo idolo iye aryo i nyim kema." 
Exodus26:10 Kwo waŋ jarara pyerabic i dog cuka me dul mukwoŋo me agikki, ka dok ikwo waŋ jarara pyerabic i dog cuka me dul me aryone me agikk i." 
Exodus26:11 “Dok ibitiyo lagol me mola me aroya i waŋ jarara, irib ki kema, wek obed mukubbe kacel likiŋ," 
Exodus26:12 Dul cuka me kema ma odon, en nucu cuka mudoŋŋe, bipyelle i ŋe kema." 
Exodus26:13 Futi acel ki nucu tuŋ cel ki futi acel ki nucu tuŋ cel bene, en bor me cuka mudoŋŋe, bipyelle i but kema tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi me umone." 
Exodus26:14 Dok ikwo laa romo ma ginyoŋo, ki laa dyegi me umo wi kema." 
Exodus26:15 “Ibitiyo guti me bao yat lalwii, ma ocun atir, pi kema." 
Exodus26:16 Bor gut i obed futi apar wiye abic ki lacce futi aryo, i kom guti acel acel." 
Exodus26:17 Wek tyene aryo i kom guti acel acel, me kubogi kacel; ibitiyo guti me kema ducu kit meno," 
Exodus26:18 Ibitiyo guti me kema, guti pyeraryo i tuŋ acuc;" 
Exodus26:19 dok ibitiyo tedi tergi me ryal ma romo pyeraŋwen pi guti pyeraryo-nu, tedi tere aryo pi guti acel pi tyene aryo, ki tedi tere aryo pi guti mu kene pi tyene aryo," 
Exodus26:20 Ki pi kema tuŋ me aryone, ma tuŋ acam, obed guti pyeraryo," 
Exodus26:21 ki tedi tergi me ryal ma romo pyeraŋwen, tedi tere aryo pi guti acel, ki tedi tere aryo pi guti mukene." 
Exodus26:22 Ki pi ne kema ma tuŋ potoceŋ bene iti guti abicel. 
Exodus26:23 Ti guti aryo me twok kema ma i ŋeye; 
Exodus26:24 gibipoko kingi ki tuŋ piny ento giribo doggi ki tuŋ wrgi malo i kom agut mukwoŋo; gin aryo ducu gibibedo kit meno, ci twoke bibedo aryo." 
Exodus26:25 Guti bibedo aboro, ki tedi tergi me ryal, tedi tergi apar wiye abicel, tedi tere aryo pi guti bao acel, ki tedi tere aryo pi gut i bao mukene." 
Exodus26:26 “Dok ibitiyo rii me bao yat lalwii abic pi guti me kema tuŋ cel," 
Exodus26:27 ki rii bao abic pi guti me kema tuŋ mukene, ki rii bao abic pi guti me kema me ŋeye tuŋ potoceŋ," 
Exodus26:28 Rii bao ma i dyere, ma ŋolo kor guti ari, bia ki i agikk i tuŋ cel nio i agikki tuŋ mukene," 
Exodus26:29 Ibimwono kom guti woko ki jabu, dok ibitiyo agit me rwako iye rii bao, ibimwono rii bao bene ki jabu," 
Exodus26:30 Gur kema i kit ma yam ginyutti i wi got. 
Exodus26:31 “Ibikwoyo boŋo kicika ki uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre; gibicweyo iye cal lukerubi ki tic me diro." 
Exodus26:32 Ibiŋabo i kom wir aŋwen me bao yat lalwii ma gimwono komgi woko ki jabu, ma tye iye gol jabu, ma ocuŋ i kom tedi tergi me ryal aŋwen." 
Exodus26:33 Ŋab boŋo kicika ki jarara lagolle. Kel canduk lok me caden kunnu ki i boŋo kicika, ci boŋo kicika bipoko kin kabedo maleŋ ki kabedo maleŋ makato ducu." 
Exodus26:34 Ka doŋ iket kom me kica i wi canduk me cik i kabedo maleŋ makato ducu. 
Exodus26:35 Ket meja ki woko i ŋe boŋo k icika, ki okar-mac iket tuŋ acuc me kema, ma okemo meja; ibiketo meja tuŋ acam." 
Exodus26:36 “Dok ikwo boŋo cuka Laum doggola me kema ki uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre, ma gidero maber." 
Exodus26:37 Ti wir abic me boŋo cuka laum doggola ki bao yat lalwii, ci imwon komgi woko ki jabu; golgi bibedo me jabu, dok ibiliyo tedi tergi me mola abic," 
Exodus27:1 “Ibitiyo keno tyer ki bao yat lalwii; borre obed futi abiro ki nucu ki lacce futi abiro ki nucu. Bor keno tyer ki lacce bibedo ma rom, ki borre tuŋ malo bibedo futi aŋwen ki nucu," 
Exodus27:2 Ibitimo ten keno i kom twoke aŋwen ducu; ten keno ducu gibikubbe kacel kwede, dok ibimwono kome woko ki mola." 
Exodus27:3 Ibiyubo lajob burune, ki akwaya latokke, ki becen, ki gin lacob riŋo, ki weer lawaŋ mac; jami tic meno ducu ibiyubogi ki mola." 
Exodus27:4 Yub keikeine bene me obwo mola, dok i twok obwo mola aŋwen-ni iket iye agit aŋwen me mola." 
Exodus27:5 Ibiketo i te rii me keno tyer wek obwo obut i kor keno tyer. 
Exodus27:6 Dok itim tal me keno tyer, tal me yat lalwii, ci ibimwono komgi woko ki mola." 
Exodus27:7 Ibirwako tal donyo i agit ducu, wek tal orine i keno tyer tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi me latiŋŋe." 
Exodus27:8 Ibitiyo keno tyer ma iye twolo, ki bao; ti macalo yam ginyutti i wi got," 
Exodus27:9 “Ibitiyo dyekal me kema. I tuŋ acuc me dyekal gibiŋabo iye boŋo cuka camanini ma giwiyo maberre, ma borre tuŋ cel romo yadi pyerabic." 
Exodus27:10 Wir bibedo pyeraryo, ki tedi tergi bene pyeraryo, me mola, ento gol me wir ki otacgi ducu gubed me ryal," 
Exodus27:11 Ki tuŋ acam bene borre obed kit meno, kunnu bene gibiŋabo iye cuka ma borre romo yadi pyerabic; wir obed pyeraryo ki tedi tergi pyeraryo, me mola, ento gol me wir ki otacgi ducu gubed me ryal." 
Exodus27:12 Ki bute ma tuŋ potoceŋ dyekalle bene gibiŋabo iye boŋo cuka ma borre romo yadi pyeraryo wiye abic; wir obed apar ki tedi tergi bene obed apar," 
Exodus27:13 Lac dyekal ma tuŋ nyime ma tuŋ wokceŋ biromo yadi pyeraryo wiye abic. 
Exodus27:14 Gibiŋabo boŋo cuka i ŋet doggaŋ tuŋcel ma romo yadi abiro ki nucu; wir obed adek ki tedi tergi adek," 
Exodus27:15 Ki tuŋ mukene bene gibiŋabo iye boŋo cuka ma romo yadi abiro ki nucu; wirgi obed adek ki tedi tergi adek. 
Exodus27:16 Doggaŋ me dyekal gibiumo ki boŋo cuka ma lacce romo yadi apar ma gitiyo ki uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre, ma gidero maber; bibedo ki wir aŋwen ki tedi tergi aŋwen," 
Exodus27:17 Wir murumo dyekal ducu bibedo iye otac me ryal; golgi bibedo me ryal, ki tedi tergi me mola." 
Exodus27:18 Bor me dyekal biromo yadi pyerabic, ki lacce yadi pyeraryo wiye abic, ki borre tuŋ malo futi abiro ki nucu; gibiŋabo iye boŋo cuka camanini ma giwiyo maberre; tedi te wir bibedo me mola." 
Exodus27:19 Jami tic ducu ma i kema ma konyo kwa tic ducu, kacel ki teke lagurre ducu, ki teke ma orumo dyekal ducu bibedo me mola." 
Exodus27:20 “Dok ibiciko jo Icrael ducu gukel moo me nyig jeituni ma giodo, giliyo maleŋ, me menyo piny, wek giket mac laput obed ka lyel nino ducu ma pe to." 
Exodus27:21 Aron ki awbene gucan mac olyel i nyim Rwot nia otyeno nio odiko, kun giketo i kema me rwatte, ki woko i ŋe boŋo kicika ma i nyim canduk lok me caden. Man bibedo cik ma jo Icrael bigwoko matwal, wa i kare pa likwayogi ducu." 
Exodus28:1 “Kel omeru Aron cok boti kacel ki awobene, gua woko ki i kin jo Icrael, wek guti bota tic me ajwagi; gin ene: Aron ki awobe pe Aron, Nadab ki Abiu, Eleajar ki Itamar." 
Exodus28:2 Ibikwoyo boŋŋi maleŋ pi omeru Aron, me deyo dok mamwonya." 
Exodus28:3 Dok ibiwaco bot jo makwiri ducu, ma apoŋo cwinygi ki kwiri, ni gukwo boŋo aruka pi Aron me kwero en pi tic me bedo, ajwakana." 
Exodus28:4 Man aye boŋŋi aruka ma gibikwoyo: kicaa kor, epod, jor, kanyi ma giŋweko kome, kitambara adwala me wic ki kitambara latwe pyer; myero gikwogi gubed boŋŋi aruka maleŋ pi omeru Aron ki awobene pi ticgi me bedo ajwagina." 
Exodus28:5 “Gibigamo jabu, uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre." 
Exodus28:6 Gibikwoyo epod ki jabu ki uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre, ma gikwoyo ki diro." 
Exodus28:7 Bibedo ki gin wi gwoke aryo ma gikubo i doge ryoryo, wek okubbe kacel." 
Exodus28:8 Ceme ma i kome ma latwene ma gicweyo ki diro bibedo kit tic acel-lu, me jami acel-lu, en aye me jabu, uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre." 
Exodus28:9 Ibikwanyo litino kidi onik aryo, igor nyiŋ awobe pa Icrael i komgi," 
Exodus28:10 nyiŋ awobe abicel i kom kidi onik acel, ki nyiŋ awobe mudoŋŋe abicel i kom kidi onik mukene-ni, kun ilubo kit dito me anywalligi." 
Exodus28:11 Macalo ladiro goro kom kidi, in bene ibigoro nyiŋ awobe pa Icrael i kom kidi aryo-nu: ibimwonogi i kom jabu ma giŋweko kome ki diro ma okwa ko tere." 
Exodus28:12 Ci doŋ ibiketo litino kidi aryo meno i gin wi gwok epod, gubed kidi me po pi awobe pa Icrael; Aron bitiŋo nyiŋgi i wi gwoke aryo ducu me po pigi i nyim Rwot," 
Exodus28:13 Tim gin lakwak tere ki jabu ma giŋweko kome ki diro; 
Exodus28:14 dok itim nyor aryo me jabu ma giliyo maber ma giminogi macalo tol; ka imwon tol nyor meno i kom gin lakwak tere. 
Exodus28:15 “Dok ibikwoyo kicaa kor me ŋolo kop ki tic me diro; ibitiyo macalo tic i kom epod; ibitimo ki jabu, ki uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre," 
Exodus28:16 Ibibano iye aryo ma borre ki lacce rom ki dye ciŋ acel. 
Exodus28:17 Ci ibimwono iye litino kidi me wel ma guryeyo tyen aŋwen.I tyeŋ mukwoŋo gibiketo iye cadiuc, topaj ki kabankel:" 
Exodus28:18 tyen me aryone obed emeradi, capir ki dayaman;" 
Exodus28:19 tyen me adekke obed jacint, agat ki ameticito;" 
Exodus28:20 ki tyen me aŋwenne obed berul, onik ki jacipa; gibimwonogi i jabu ma giŋweko ki diro." 
Exodus28:21 Litino kidi ducu bibedo apar wiye aryo ma nyiŋ awobe pa jo Icrael gigoro i komgi; gibibedo macalo kidi ma gigoro me agit, kun acel acel tye ki nyiŋ ma gigoro i kome muporo kaka apar wiye aryo." 
Exodus28:22 Tim bene nyor aryo ki jabu ma giliyo maber ma giminogi macalo tol, me tweyo kicaa kor;" 
Exodus28:23 ibitimo agit me jabu aryo, pi kicaa kor, ci iket agit aryo-nu i kom dog kicaa kor aryo." 
Exodus28:24 Dok irwak tol jabu aryo-nu odony i agit aryo ma gitye i kom kicaa kor-ri," 
Exodus28:25 ki dog tol aryo-nu ibimwonogi i kom gin lakwak tere aryo me jabu ma giŋweko ki diro-ni, me tweyo kicaa kor i gin wi gwok epod tuŋ nyime." 
Exodus28:26 Dok itim agit me jabu aryo, ci iketgi i twok kicaa kor aryo ducu i kom doge ma tuŋ iye ma cok ki epod." 
Exodus28:27 Tim agit jabu mukene doki, ci ikubgi i gin wi gwok epod aryo anyim tuŋ tere, ka ma okubbe tuŋ malo i wi ceme me epod ma gicweyo ki diro." 
Exodus28:28 Gibitweyo kicaa kor ki agitte i kom agit me epod ki tol ma bulu, wek gitwe obut opyelle i wi ceme me epod ma gicweyo ki diro, wek kicaa kor pe ogonnye woko ki i kom epod," 
Exodus28:29 Wek Aron otiŋ nyiŋ awobe pa Icrael i kicaa kor me ŋolo kop i pal cwinye i kare me donyo i kabedo maleŋ nino ducu, wek obed me po i komgi i nyim Rwot." 
Exodus28:30 I kicaa kor me ŋolo kop ibiketo iye Urim ki Tumim; gin bene gibibedo i pal cwiny Aron i kare ma en donyo i nyim Rwot; kit meno Aron bitiŋo ŋolo kop pa jo Icrael i pal cwinye nino ducu i nyim Rwot. 
Exodus28:31 “Dok ibitimo jor me epod ma kome ducu obedo bulu. 
Exodus28:32 Gituc doge obed twolo i dyere pi rwako wic; gibicweyo kun gidolo doge macalo dog boŋo aruka ma gidolo, orumo wo ko likiŋ, wek pe oyeci." 
Exodus28:33 I dog boŋo ibiluno iye gin muporo okwer pomegranat munyak ma gikwoyo ki uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, orum dog jor ducu, kun iŋobo kingi ki olan me jabu;" 
Exodus28:34 olaŋ jabu ki okwer pomegranat orum dog jor ducu kun gigwennye agwenya. 
Exodus28:35 Aron biruko ka donyo ka tic, ci dwan olan bikok winnye i kare ma en donyo i kabedo maleŋ i nyim Rwot, ki i kare ma en kato woko, wek pe oto." 
Exodus28:36 “Ibitimo akwaya jabu ma giliyo maber, ci igor i ko me macalo agora i kom agit, ni, ‘Maleŋ pi Rwot.’" 
Exodus28:37 Ci ibitweyo irido i kom kitambara adwala me wic-ci ki tol ma bulu; ibiketo i nyim kitambara adwala me wic," 
Exodus28:38 Gibiketo cun i tur nyim Aron, ci Aron bitiŋo alii me bal pi jami maleŋ ma jo Icrael gityero me bedo motgi maleŋ; bicuŋ i tur nyime jwijwi, wek Rwot ogamgi." 
Exodus28:39 “Ibicweyo kanyi ki boŋo camanini maberre ma giŋweko kome, itim kitambara me adwala i wic ki boŋo camanini maberre, ci itim bene kitambara me latwe pyer ma gidero maber." 
Exodus28:40 “Pi awobe pa Aron ibikwoyo kanyi ki kitambara latwe pyer, ki gitok matino; ibitimogi obed me deyo ki mamwonya." 
Exodus28:41 Ibirukogi i kom omeru Aron kacel ki awobene, ibiwirogi ki moo me ketogi i dog tic, pi kwerogi pi tic maleŋ, wek guti bota tic me ajwagi." 
Exodus28:42 Dok ibikwoyo pali boŋo camanini pigi me umo komgi nia i pyergi nio i emgi. 
Exodus28:43 Aron ki awo bene birukogi i kare me donyo i kema me rwatte, nyo i kare ma gicito cok ki keno tyer pi tic i kabedo maleŋ; wek pe gutiŋ alii me bal, miyo gito woko, Man bibedo cik matwal bote ki bot likwaye ma bilube." 
Exodus29:1 “Man aye gin ma ibitimo i komgi ka ikwerogi, wek guti bota tic me ajwagi. Kwany wod twon acel ki nyogi romi aryo ma mwonyo pe i komgi," 
Exodus29:2 ki mugati ma tobi pe iye, ki capat ma tobi pe iye ma girubo ki moo, ki capat marep ma gireyo moo i komgi; ibitimogi ki moko ŋano ma pwotte." 
Exodus29:3 Ibiketogi i aduku acel, ci ikelogi ki aduku-nu, ka ikel, bene wod twon ki nyogi romi aryo." 
Exodus29:4 Ibikelo Aron ki awobene i nyim doggola kema me rwatte, ci ilwok komgi woko ki pii." 
Exodus29:5 Ibikwanyo boŋŋi aruka, ci iruko Aron ki kanyi, ki jor me epod, ki epod, ki kicaa kor, ci itwe pyere ki ceme me epod ma gicweyo ki diro;" 
Exodus29:6 ibidwalo kitambara adwala i wiye, ka iketo lakukana maleŋ cuŋ i wi kitambara adwala," 
Exodus29:7 Ka ibikwanyo moo me wir, iwiro kwede," 
Exodus29:8 Ka dok ibikelo awobene, irukogi ki kanyi," 
Exodus29:9 ci ibitweyo pyergi ki kitambara, ka itwe gitok matino i wigi; ci tic me ajwagi bibedo megi pi cik ma bibedo matwal. Ibiketo Aron ki awobene i dog ticgi kitmeno." 
Exodus29:10 “Dok ibikelo twon i nyim kema me rwatte, ci Aron ki awobene gibiketo ciŋgi i wiye," 
Exodus29:11 ka doŋ ibineko wod twon-nu i nyim Rwot, ki i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Exodus29:12 Ibigwelo remo twon, ci ireyo remone i kom ten keno aŋwen me keno tyer ki lwet ciŋi; ki remo mudoŋŋe ibionyo i te tedi keno tyer." 
Exodus29:13 Ibikwanyo dwolo ducu ma oumo jam iye, ki okene ma i kom cwiny, ki olaŋ aryo ki dwolo ma tye i komgi, ci iwaŋgi woko i wi keno tyer," 
Exodus29:14 Ento riŋo wod twon-nu ki pyenne ki wee iye-gu, ibiwaŋo awaŋa ki mac wa i ŋe gony; en aye gitum me bal." 
Exodus29:15 “Ka man otum ci ibikwanyo nyok romo acel imiyo Aron ki awo bene giketo ciŋgi i wiye 
Exodus29:16 ci ibineko nyok romo, ibijolo remone, ci icoro remone i kom keno tyer irumo kwede kome ducu." 
Exodus29:17 Dok ibinido riŋo nyok romo matitino ci ilwoko jam iye, ki tyene ducu, ci iketogi i kom riŋo ma giŋido-ni, kacel ki wiye," 
Exodus29:18 ibiwaŋo riŋo nyok romo woko ducu ki berre i wi keno tyer; en aye gitum awaŋa bot Rwot; en aye gin ma ŋwece kur me layom cwiny, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot." 
Exodus29:19 “Ka lacen dok ibikwanyo nyok romo mukene; ci Aron ki awobene gibiketo ciŋgi i wiye," 
Exodus29:20 ci ibineko nyok romo, igwelo remone ci ireyo i ogwilo it Aron malacuc, ki i ogwilo it awo bene malacuc, ki i kom twon nyig tyengi malacuc, ci ibicoro remo mudoŋŋe i kom keno tyer irumo kwede kome ducu," 
Exodus29:21 Ka ibikwanyo remo manok ma i wi keno tyer, ki moo wir, ci ikirogi i kom Aron ki i kom boŋŋi arukane, ki i kom awobene ki i kom boŋŋi aruka pa awobene, ci en ki boŋŋi arukane gibibedo maleŋ, kacel ki awobene ki boŋŋi arukagi bene." 
Exodus29:22 “Dok bene ibikwanyo dwolo nyok romo, ki moo yibe, ki dwolo ma oumo jam iye, ki okene ma i kom cwiny, ki olaŋ aryo kacel ki dwolo ma tye i komgi, ki em tun lacuc, (pien obedo nyok romo me keto dano i dog tic)," 
Exodus29:23 ki mugati acel ki capat acel ma girubo iye moo, ki capat marep acel ma i aduku me mugati ma tobi pe iye ma tye i nyim Rwot;" 
Exodus29:24 ci ibiketogi ducu i dye ciŋ Aron ki i dye ciŋ awo bene bene, wek gikwatgi me bedo gityer akwata i nyim Rwot." 
Exodus29:25 Ka dok ikwany woko ki i ciŋgi, iwaŋgi woko i wi keno tyer me ameda i kom gitum awaŋa, obed gin ma ŋwece kur ma yomo cwiny Rwot; en aye gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot." 
Exodus29:26 “Dok ibikwanyo gok nyok romo me keto Aron i dog ticce, ci ikwat me bedo gityer me akwata i nyim Rwot; en aye bibedo waŋ wat ma tuŋ boti," 
Exodus29:27 Dok ibikwero gok me gityer me akwata, ki em me waŋ wat pa ajwagi, ma gikwato, ma gityero nia ki i kom nyok romo me keto dano i dog tic, pien en aye pa Aron ki pa awobene," 
Exodus29:28 Bibedo waŋ wat pa Aron ki pa awobene ma myero jo Icrael gumi botgi dikdik, pien en aye waŋ wat pa ajwagi ma jo Icrael myero gutyer nia ki gitumgi me gityer lakwecwiny, en aye gityergi bot Rwot." 
Exodus29:29 “Boŋŋi aruka pa Aron maleŋ ducu bibedo pa likwaye ma bilube; gibiruko i komgi ka giwirogi ki moo, me ketogi i dog tic." 
Exodus29:30 Latin awobi ma bileyo kakare i t ic me bedo ajwaka birukogi tyeko kwede nino abiro, i kare ma en ci to i kema me rwatte ka tic i kabedo maleŋ." 
Exodus29:31 “Ibitero riŋo nyok romo me ketogi i dog tic, ci itedo i kabedo mo maleŋ;" 
Exodus29:32 ci Aron ki awobene gibicamo riŋo nyok romo-nu ki mugati ma tye i aduku, i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Exodus29:33 Gibicamo jami meno ma gitiyo kwede me lakwany bal pi ketogi i dog tic ki kwerogi pi tic maleŋ, ento jo mukene pe gibicamone, pien gin jami maleŋ." 
Exodus29:34 Ka riŋo mo me ketogi i dog tic, nyo mugati mo, odoŋ nio odiko, ci ibiwaŋo mudoŋ-ŋi awaŋa ki mac; pe dok gibicamo, pien leŋ," 
Exodus29:35 “Ibitimo i kom Aron ki awobene kameno, kit macalo aciki kwede ducu; ibitiyo tic me ketogi i dog ticgi pi nino abiro;" 
Exodus29:36 dok ibityero twon acel pi gitum me bal nino ducu me lakwany bal. Dok ibitumo gitum me bal pi keno tyer, ka itimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome, dok ibiwire ki moo pi kwerone." 
Exodus29:37 Ibitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kom keno tyer, ibikwere pi nino abiro, miyo keno tyer doko maleŋ maka to; gin ducu ma bigudo ke no tyer bidoko maleŋ," 
Exodus29:38 “Magi aye gin ma ibityero i wi keno tyer: nyogi romi aryo ma ditogi romo mwaka acel acel en aye ibityerogi nino ducu," 
Exodus29:39 Ibityero nyok romo acel odiko ki nyok romo acel ibityero otyeno. 
Exodus29:40 Kacel ki romo mukwoŋo-ni ibityero moko kwon mapwotte ma romo agwata acel ma girubo ki moo nyig jeituni ma giodo aoda ma romo cupa aryo ki nucu, ki vino ma romo cupa aryo ki nucu, me bedo gityer amata." 
Exodus29:41 Nyok romo mukene ibityero otyeno, kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amatane, macalo me odiko, pi bedo gin ma ŋwece kur ma yomo cwiny, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot." 
Exodus29:42 Bibedo gitum awaŋa me nino ducu ma wubityero wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu, i doggola kema me rwatte i nyim Rwot, ka ma abirwatte iye kwedwu, pi lok kwedwu kunnu." 
Exodus29:43 Abirwatte ki jo Icrael kunnu, ci deyona bilonyogi gibedo maleŋ;" 
Exodus29:44 abikwero kema me rwatte ki keno tyer; ka dok abikwero Aron ki awobene pi t icgi bota me bedo ajwagi. 
Exodus29:45 Dok abibedo i kin jo Icrael, abibedo Lubaŋagi." 
Exodus29:46 Gin giŋeyo ni an a Rwot Lubaŋagi, ma yam akwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt wek abed i kingi; an a Rwot Lubaŋagi." 
Exodus30:1 “Ibitiyo keno tyer me waŋo odok eceta; ibitiyo ki bao yat lalwii. 
Exodus30:2 Borre obed futi acel ki nucu, ki lacce bene futi acel ki nucu; borre ki Lacce bibedo marom, Borre tuŋ malo obed futi adek; ten keno aŋwen ducu bene gubed ma gukubbe kacel kwede." 
Exodus30:3 Ibimwono kome woko ki jabu ma giliyo maber, wiye ki bute ducu, ki ten keno aŋwen ducu; dok ibilulo doge ducu, irumo woko ki jabu." 
Exodus30:4 Ibitimo agit me jabu aryo pire; ibiketo agit ki piny i te doge ma ilulo-ni, kun agit acel acel okemme ki wadi tun cel, ci ibirwako iye tal me tinone," 
Exodus30:5 Ibitiyo tal ki bao yat lalwii, ibimwono komgi woko ki jabu." 
Exodus30:6 Ibiketo keno tyer man i nyim oono kicika ma umo canduk lok me caden, i nyim kom me kica ma i wi canduk lok me caden, ka ma abirwatte iye kwedi." 
Exodus30:7 Ci Aron biwaŋo iye odok eceta ma ŋwece kur. Nino ducu ka en yubo mac laput odiko, ci biwaŋone;" 
Exodus30:8 dok ka Aron keto mac laput malo otyeno, ci biwaŋone, Kit meno gibiwaŋo odok eceta nino ducu i nyim Rwot, wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu." 
Exodus30:9 Pe wubityero iye odok eceta mo ata, kadi gitum awaŋa, kadi gityer me moko kwon; dok pe wuony iye gityer amata." 
Exodus30:10 Aron myero otim gin lakwany bal i kom ten keno aŋwen ducu ma i kome i mwaka acel kicel; en bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome ki remo me gitum me bal me lakwany bal i mwaka acel kicel wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu: en aye gin maleŋ makato bot Rwot.” 
Exodus30:11 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni 
Exodus30:12 “Ka icako kwaŋo wei jo Icrael, ci ŋat acel acel bimiyo gin lakok kwone kene bot Rwot ka ikwaŋogi, wek two gemo pe opot i komgi ka ikwaŋogi," 
Exodus30:13 Dano acel acel ka ikwano welle bimiyo gin man: nucu cekel me kabedo maleŋ (cekel acel rom ki gera pyeraryo); nucu cekel meno bibedo gityer bot Rwot. 
Exodus30:14 Dano ducu ki acel acel ma doŋ gikwano welle, cakke i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo ki makato, bimiyo gityer bot Rwot." 
Exodus30:15 Lalonyo pe bimiyo madwoŋ, dok lacan bene pe bimiyo matidi ma pe rom ki nucu cekel, i kare me miyo gityer bot Rwot me lakwany bal ki i komwu." 
Exodus30:16 Ibigamo lim me lakwany bal ki bot jo Icrael, i biketo pi tic me kema me rwatte, wek obed me po pi jo Icrael i nyim Rwot pi kwanyo bal ki i komwu.”" 
Exodus30:17 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni 
Exodus30:18 “Dok ibitiyo otako mola, ki tedi tere bene me mola, obed me lwok. Ibicibo cuŋ i kin kema me rwatte ki keno tyer; ka doŋ ibionyo iye pii;" 
Exodus30:19 en aye ka ma Aron ki awo bene gibilwoko iye ciŋgi ki tyengi. 
Exodus30:20 I kare ma gicito i kema me rwatte, nyo ka gicito cok ki keno tyer ka tic iye, me waŋo gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot, koŋ gibilwokke ki pii, wek pe guto." 
Exodus30:21 Gibilwoko ciŋgi ki tyengi wek pe guto; bibedo cik botgi matwal, bote ki bot likwaye, wa i kare pa likwayogi ducu.”" 
Exodus30:22 Dok Rwot omedde owaco bot Moses ni," 
Exodus30:23 “Kwany aŋwece mabecone makato: murra maliyo ma romo cekel miya abic, cinamon ma ŋwece mit ma romo cekel miya aryo ki pyerabic, ma en aye nucune, lum ma ŋwece kur ma roma miya aryo ki pyerabic," 
Exodus30:24 kaciya cinamon miya abic, ma gipimo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ, ki moo jeituni ma romo cupa apar." 
Exodus30:25 Man aye ibitimo ki moo maleŋ me wir ma girubo i kit macalo larub moo ma ŋwe kur rubo kwede; bibedo moo wir maleŋ," 
Exodus30:26 Ibiwiro ki kema me rwatte ki canduk lok me caden," 
Exodus30:27 ki meja ki jami ticce ducu, ki okar-mac tara ki jami ticce ducu, ki keno me odok eceta," 
Exodus30:28 ki keno tyer me gitum awaŋa ki jami ticce ducu, ki otako lwok ki tedi tere." 
Exodus30:29 Ibikwerogi wek gubed jami maleŋ makato; gin ducu ma bigudo komgi bidoko maleŋ. 
Exodus30:30 Dok ibiwiro Aron ki awobene, me kwerogi wek guti bota tic me ajwagi." 
Exodus30:31 Dok ibiwaco ki jo Icrael ni, ‘Man aye bibedo moona maleŋ me wir, wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu." 
Exodus30:32 Pe gibionyo i kom dano mo ata, pe wubitiyo mukene ma girubo macalo en; en moo maleŋ, bibedo maleŋ botwu bene." 
Exodus30:33 Dok ŋat ma birubo macalo meno, nyo ŋat ma biwiro i kom dano mo ata, waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Kwany aŋwece makur, citakte ki onika ki galbanu, aŋwece makur, ki odok luban ma giliyo maber, (pekgi ducu obed marom)" 
Exodus30:35 ci itim ki odok eceta maleŋ ma, giliyo maber, ma girubo i kit macalo larub gin ma ŋwe kur rubo kwede, ci ipwor iye kado." 
Exodus30:36 Mukene ibiluro iŋido matitino twatwal, ci iket mogo i nyim canduk lok me caden ma i kema me rwatte ka ma abirwatte iye kwedi; bibedo botwu gin maleŋ makato." 
Exodus30:37 Pe wubitimo piwu kenwu odok eceta ma irubo macalo meno; bibedo gin maleŋ bot Rwot ki tuŋ botwu. 
Exodus30:38 Ŋat ma birubo gin me aŋweya macalo meno, waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi.”" 
Exodus31:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Exodus31:2 “Nen, atyeko lwoŋo nyiŋ Bejalel wod pa Uri, ma wod pa Kur, ma i kaka pa Juda." 
Exodus31:3 Doŋ atyeko poŋo en ki Cwiny pa Lubaŋa, ki kwiri me tic, ki niaŋ matut, ki ŋec, ki kit tic ducu me diro," 
Exodus31:4 pi roto cal manyen me tic diro mapatpat, me tic ki jabu, ki ryal, ki mola," 
Exodus31:5 ki pi ŋolo litino kidi me wel me amwona i kom jabu, ki pi payo bao, ki pi tiyo kit tic ducu me diro." 
Exodus31:6 Dok nen, atyeko keto Okoliab bene kacel ki en, ma wod pa Akicamak, ma i kaka pa Dan; dok atyeko miyo kwiri me tic bot jo ducu makwiri, wek guti gin ducu ma aciko boti-ni:" 
Exodus31:7 kema me rwatte, ki canduk lok me caden, ki kom me kica ma i wiye, ki jami ma i kema ducu," 
Exodus31:8 meja ki jami ticce, okar-mac me jabu ma giliyo maber ki jami ticce ducu, keno tyer me odok eceta," 
Exodus31:9 keno tyer me gitum awaŋa ki jami ticce ducu, otako lwok ki tedi tere," 
Exodus31:10 boŋŋi aruka ma gitiyo mabeco, boŋŋi aruka maleŋ pa ajwaka Aron, ki boŋŋi aruka pa awobene pi ticgi me bedo ajwagi," 
Exodus31:11 moo wir ki odok eceta ma ŋwece kur pi kabedo maleŋ. Gibitiyo kit macalo doŋ aciki kwede ducu.” 
Exodus31:12 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Exodus31:13 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, ‘Wubigwoko cabitta, pien en aye lanyut ma tye i kin an ki wun wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu, wek wuŋe ni an a Rwot, ma alonyowu wubedo maleŋ." 
Exodus31:14 Wugwok cabit, pien nino-nu leŋ botwu; ka ŋatti mo opyedde i kome, myero gineke woko. Ka ŋat ma otiyo iye tic mo, dano meno waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi," 
Exodus31:15 Wubitiyo tic nino abicel, ento nino me abiro en aye cabit me yweyo mot, nino maleŋ bot Rwot; ŋat ma otiyo tic mo i cabit gibineko woko." 
Exodus31:16 Pi meno myero jo Icrael gugwok cabit wa i kare pa likwayogi ducu, macalo gicikke ma bedo matwal." 
Exodus31:17 En aye lanyut matwal i kin an ki jo Icrael, ni, Rwot yam otiyo polo ki lobo nino abicel, oywe mot i nino me abiro, oomo iye kero kome.’ ”" 
Exodus31:18 Ka Lubaŋa doŋ otyeko lok ki Moses i wi got Cinai, ci omiye kidi ma apada aryo me lok me caden, kidi ma apada aryo ma Lubaŋa ocoyo ki ciŋe." 
Exodus32:1 Ka lwak guneno ni Moses doŋ ori, pe dwogo piny ki i wi got, ci gucokke gugurre kengi bot Aron, kun giwacce ni, “A malo, itim ki wan lubaŋa, ma gibitelo wiwa; pien Moses man, ma en aye dano ma yam okwanyowa woko ki i lobo Ejipt, pe doŋ waŋeyo gin mutimme i kome.”" 
Exodus32:2 Ci Aron owaco botgi ni, “Wukwany agit me jabu ma gitye i it monwu ki awobewu ki anyirawu, wukelgi bota.”" 
Exodus32:3 Kit meno lwak ducu gukwanyo agit me jabu ki i itgi woko, gukelo bot Aron." 
Exodus32:4 En ogamo jabu ki i ciŋgi, ci oteto ki nyol me lino kome, ci otimo cal wod twon ma giliyo aliya, ci guwaco ni, “Man aye lubaŋawu, wun jo Icrael, ma yam okwanyowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt!”" 
Exodus32:5 Ka Aron oneno kit man, ci ocako caŋo keno tyer i nyime; ka ocako tucone ka maleŋ kun waco ni, “Diki bibedo kwero nino madit bot Rwot.”" 
Exodus32:6 Ci gua malo odiko con, gutyero gitum awaŋa mapol, ka gukelo tyergi me lakwecwiny; ci lwak gubedo piny gucamo ka gumato, ci gua malo ka tuko." 
Exodus32:7 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Lor piny; pien joni ma yam ikwanyogi ki i lobo Ejipt guballe woko." 
Exodus32:8 Guweko kit ma yam acikogi kwede woko oyotoyot, gutimo pigi kengi cal wod twon ma giliyo aliya, gucako worone ki miye gitum, dok giwacci, ‘Man aye lubaŋawu, wun jo Icrael, ma yam okwanyowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt!’”" 
Exodus32:9 Ci Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Atyeko neno jo man, ci nen, gin jo ma nutgi tek:" 
Exodus32:10 mumiyo kombeddi doŋ iweka gira, wek akemo omaka matek i komgi, arid wigi woko; ento in abimiyi idoko rok madit.”" 
Exodus32:11 Ento Moses obako doge bot Rwot Lubaŋane kun waco ni, “Ai Rwot, piŋo akemo omaki matek i kom lwakki, ma yam in ikwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt ki tek madwoŋ ki badi matek." 
Exodus32:12 Piŋo iweko jo Ejipt giwacci, ‘Oterogi marac akaka me tyekogi i kin godi kuca, ki pi rido wigi woko ki i wi lobo.’ Lok akemoni mager-ri woko, dok inut i kom gin marac ma imito timo i kom lwakki." 
Exodus32:13 Po i kom Abraim, Icaka ki Icrael luticci, ma yam in kikomi aye, ikwonne ki nyiŋi kekeni botgi. Yam iwaco botgi ni, ‘Abimiyo wunya mapol macalo lakalatwe me polo; ki lobo man ducu, ma yam aciko pire, abimiyo bot likwayowu, ma gibileyone ma twal.’’’" 
Exodus32:14 Ci Rwot onut i kom gin marac ma yam en otamo ni ebitimo i kom lwakke. 
Exodus32:15 Moses olokke, olor piny ki i wi got kun tye ki kidi ma apada aryo me lok me caden i ciŋe; kidi magi gicoyo tuŋ igi ki ŋegi bene, gicoyo tuŋ cel ki tuŋ ŋegi ducu." 
Exodus32:16 Kidi meno ma apada Lubaŋa aye otiyo, ki coc bene Lubaŋa aye ocoyo, ma gigoro i kom kidi meno ma apada." 
Exodus32:17 Ka Yocwa owinyo dwan lwak ma giwo, ci owaco bot Moses ni, “Woo me lweny tye i gony.”" 
Exodus32:18 Ento Moses ogamo ni, “Meno pe woo me loyo lweny, dok pe koko pa jo ma giloyogi, ento an awinyo dwan me wer aye.”" 
Exodus32:19 Ka en obino cok ki gony, ma oneno twon ki myel, ci akemo omako Moses matek; obolo kidi aryo ma apada ma tye i ciŋe-ni piny, otyerogi woko i te got." 
Exodus32:20 Ci okwanyo cal wod twon ma gitimo-ni owaŋo woko i mac, orego woko mayom, oonyo i pii, omiyo jo Icrael gumato." 
Exodus32:21 Moses openyo Aron ni, “Lwak man gutimi niŋniŋ, mumiyo ikelo bal madit i komgi-ni?”" 
Exodus32:22 Aron ogamo ni, “Pe iwek akemo omaki matek, laditta; in iŋeyo ni lwak man cwinygi okemo gin marac." 
Exodus32:23 Pien gin guwacca ni, “Tim ki waŋ lubaŋa, ma gibitelo wiwa; pien Moses man, ma en aye dano ma yam okwanyowa woko ki i lobo Ejipt, pe doŋ waŋeyo gin mutimme i kome.’" 
Exodus32:24 Ci awaco botgi ni, ‘Dano acel acel ma tye ki jabu ogony woko’; ci gimiya, aonyo i mac, ci cal wod twon man oa ki iye." 
Exodus32:25 Ka Moses oneno ni lwak wigi oteŋ woko, (pien Aron aye omiyo wigi oteŋ, kun oweko lewic omakogi i kin lukworgi)," 
Exodus32:26 ci Moses ocuŋ i doggaŋ me gony, owaco ni, “Aŋa ma tye tuŋ bot Rwot? Obin bota.” Ci awobe pa Levi ducu gucokke kacel bote." 
Exodus32:27 Ci owaco botgi ni, “Rwot Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael owaco kuman ni ‘Dano acel acel oket pala lucwanne i lakŋete, wek ocit kwede i dye gony kun wirre kwede dok i doggaŋ tuŋ cel ki tuŋ cel, orum iye, kun ŋat man neko ominne, ŋat man neko latugi, ki ŋat man neko lawote.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 Awobe pa Levi gutiyo kit macalo Moses ocikogi; ci gineko lwak dano i nino meno ma guromo co alip adek. 
Exodus32:29 Moses owaco ni, “Tin wun wukette kenwu i dog tic pa Rwot, kun ŋat acel acel omiyo wode ki ominne me bedo gityer, wek omiwu gum tin.”" 
Exodus32:30 Orwone Moses owaco bot lwak ni, “Wun wutimo bal madit; kombeddi abicito malo bot Rwot, gwok nyo abikwanyo bal woko ki i komwu.”" 
Exodus32:31 Kit meno Moses odok bot Rwot, owaco ni, “Maa do, lwak man gutimo bal, madit; gutimo lubaŋa me jabu pigi kengi." 
Exodus32:32 Ento koni, ka ibitimogi kica i kom balgi, ci timgi; nyo ka pe, ci alegi ni, ijwa nyiŋa woko ki i bukki ma icoyo.”" 
Exodus32:33 Ento Rwot owaco ki Moses ni, “Ŋat ma obalo i nyima en aye abijwayo nyiŋe woko ki i bukka," 
Exodus32:34 Ento doŋ icit kombeddi, icitel wi lwak, itergi i kabedo ma yam alokki pire-ni; nen, lamalaikana bitelo nyimi. Ento i kare ma abilimogi, an aye abiketo can i komgi pi bal man.”" 
Exodus32:35 Ci Rwot ocwalo gemo opoto i kom lwak, pien gutimo cal wod twon ma Aron otiyo." 
Exodus33:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Wua woko ki kany, in ki lwak ducu ma yam ikwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt, pi terogi i lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire bot Abraim, Icaka, ki Yakobo, kun acikogi ni, abimiyo bot likwayogi." 
Exodus33:2 Dok abicwalo lamalaika i nyimgi, ci abiryemo jo Kanaan woko, ki jo Amor, jo Kit, jo Periji, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc." 
Exodus33:3 Cit malo i lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic; ento an pe abicito kwedwu kunnu, wek pe arid wiwu woko iyo, pien wun jo ma nutwu tek.”" 
Exodus33:4 Ka lwak giwinyo lok man marac-ci, ci gukumo; pe tye dano mo ma orukke me deyo." 
Exodus33:5 Pien onoŋo Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, ‘Wun wu jo ma ŋutwu tek; kono ka acito kwedwu kunnu pi kare manok mo, kono arido wiwu woko cut. Kombeddi doŋ wuluny ruk me deyowu woko ki i komwu, wek aŋe gin ma abitimo i komwu.’ ”" 
Exodus33:6 Mumiyo jo Icrael gulunyo ruk me deyogi woko, nia ki i te got Koreb ki cito kwede anyim." 
Exodus33:7 I kare meno Moses obedo ka tero kema, ci guro woko i ne gony, ka mabor ki gony; ci olwoŋo ni, kema me rwatte. Ci ŋat ma yenyo Rwot cito woko i kema me rwatte, ma tye woko i ŋe gony." 
Exodus33:8 I kare ducu ma Moses kato cito woko i kema me rwatte, lwak ducu gia malo, kun ŋat acel acel cuŋ i nyim dog kemane, ka neno kor Moses nio ka odonyo wa i kema." 
Exodus33:9 Ka Moses odonyo i kema, ci wir me pol dwogo piny cuŋ i doggola kema me rwatte, ci Rwot loko ki Moses." 
Exodus33:10 Ka lwak dano ducu guneno wir me pol ma ocuŋ i dog kema, ci dano ducu gia malo, giworo Lubaŋa, kun ŋat acel acel tye i dog kemane." 
Exodus33:11 Kit meno Rwot yam loko ki Moses waŋ ki waŋ, macalo dano loko ki lareme, Ka Moses odok i gony, Yocwa wod pa Nun, latin awobi ma lakony en, yam doŋ i kema." 
Exodus33:12 Moses owaco bot Rwot ni, “Nen, in onoŋo iwacca ni, ‘Kwany jo man woko;’ ento pe imiya aŋeyo ŋat ma ibicwalo acito kwede. Ento iwacci, ‘Aŋeyo in ki nyiŋi, ki in bene iyomo cwinya.’" 
Exodus33:13 Koni doŋ alegi, ka onoŋo ayomo cwinyi, nyutta kiti, wek aŋeyi, anoŋ gum ki boti. Dok itam bene ni, rok man gin aye lwakki.”" 
Exodus33:14 Ci Rwot ogamo ni, “An kikoma abiwot kwedi, abimiyi iywe mot.”" 
Exodus33:15 Dok owacce ni, “Ka in kikomi pe ibicito kweda, ci pe ikwanywa woko ki kany." 
Exodus33:16 Pien binene niŋniŋ ni anoŋo gum ki boti, an kacel ki lwakki? Pe pi in ma iwoto kwedwa-ni mumiyo waŋen pat? An, kacel ki lwakki, wapat ki jo mukene ducu ma gitye i wi lobo.”" 
Exodus33:17 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Abitiyo gin man ma iwaco-ni kikome; pien iyomo cwinya, dok aŋeyo in ki nyiŋi.”" 
Exodus33:18 Moses ogamo ni, “Alegi inyutta deyoni.”" 
Exodus33:19 Rwot ogamo ni, “Abimiyo berra ducu kato ki i nyimi, ka dok abituco nyina ni, ‘A Rwot’; abinyuto berra bot ŋat ma abinyuto berra bote, dok abitimo kica bot ŋat ma abitimo kica bote.”" 
Exodus33:20 Rwot dok owaco ni, “Ento pe ibineno waŋa; pien dano pe neno waŋa ci bedo kwo.”" 
Exodus33:21 Ci Rwot owacci, “Nen, kabedo mo tye ka ŋeta ka ma ibicuŋ iye i kom got." 
Exodus33:22 Ka deyona bikato ki kenyo, ci abiketi i kin got ma obar, ci abiumi woko ki ciŋa nio ka akato otum;" 
Exodus33:23 ka doŋ abikwanyo ciŋa woko, ci ibineno neya; ento waŋa pe ibinenone.”" 
Exodus34:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Tyeŋ kidi ma apada aryo macalo mukwoŋo ca, ci abicoyo i komgi lok ma nene acoyo i kom kidi mukwoŋo-ni, ma yam ityero woko-ni," 
Exodus34:2 Bed ma iyubbe odiko, ci ibin malo odiko i wi got Cinai, icuŋ i nyima i wi got." 
Exodus34:3 Pe ŋatti mo bibino kwedi malo, pe ŋatti mo onen i wi got ducu; romi ki dyaŋi pe gucam nyim got.”" 
Exodus34:4 Ci Moses otyeŋo kidi aryo ma apada macalo mukwoŋo ca; ci oa malo odiko con, oito i wi got Cinai, kit macalo Rwot ocike, otero kidi ma apada ma omako i-ciŋe." 
Exodus34:5 Ci Rwot olor piny i pol, ocuŋ kacel kwede kunnu, ci otuco nyiŋe." 
Exodus34:6 Rwot okato ki i nyime kun tucce ni, “Rwot, Rwot, Lubaŋa ma lakica dok maro dano, kiniga pe make oyot, marre ma pe lokke dwoŋ, en lagen mada." 
Exodus34:7 En gwoko mar ma pe lokke pi jo alip ki alip, kun weko rocgi, ki tim aranyigi ki balgi. En pe kwanyo kop i kom lubalo, ento keto can i kom likwayogi ki i kom likwayo pa likwayogi nio i yalwak me adek ki me aŋwen.”" 
Exodus34:8 Moses orune oyot, okulo wiye piny i ŋom, oworo Lubaŋa." 
Exodus34:9 Owaco ni. “Koni doŋ ka ayomo cwinyi, ai Rwot, alegi in Rwot iwot kwedwa, kadi bed waŋ jo ma ŋutwa tek; itimwa kica pi rocwa ki balwa, imiwa wabed lwakki.”" 
Exodus34:10 Rwot dok owaco ni, “Nen aketo gicikke. Abitiyo gin me aura’ mapol i nyim lwakki ducu, ma yam peya otine i lo bo ducu nyo i rok mo; ci jo ducu ma wubedo i kingi gibineno tic pa Rwot; abitiyo kwedwu gin ma kelo atiba i kom dano." 
Exodus34:11 “Gwok lok ma aciki iye tin. Nen, abiryemo jo Amor woko ki i nyimi, ki jo Kanaan, jo Kit, jo Periji, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc." 
Exodus34:12 Gwokke pe iket gicikke mo ki jo ma bedo i lobo-nu, wek pe odok owic i kinwu." 
Exodus34:13 Ento wumuk keno jogigi woko, wuret wir jogigi piny, wutoŋ yadi ma gipito ka ma giworo iye jok ma dako ma gilwoŋo Acera." 
Exodus34:14 Pe myero wuwor lubaŋa mukene, pien Rwot, ma nyiŋe Lanyeko, en Lubaŋa ma lanyeko." 
Exodus34:15 Gwok iket gicikke mo ki jo ma bedo i lobo-nu: pien ka giworo lubaŋagi ki tim kwele kwele, nyo gityero gitum bot lubaŋagi, ce ŋatti mo olwoŋi, miyo ibicamo gin ma en otumo." 
Exodus34:16 Dok ka inyomo anyiragi ki awobeni, ce anyiragi gitimo abor pi woro lubaŋagi, ci miyo awobeni bene giworo lubaŋagi ki tim kwele kwele." 
Exodus34:17 “Pe iti cal lubaŋa mo me nyonyo aliya piri keni. 
Exodus34:18 “Ibikwero nino madito me Mugati ma Tobi Pe Iye, Ibicamo mugati ma tobi pe iye pi nino abiro macalo yam acikowu, i kare ma giciko, i dwe me Abib; pien yam ia woko ki i lobo Ejipt i dwe me Abib." 
Exodus34:19 “Litino kayo ducu mega, litino twonini, litino kayo me dyaŋi ki me romi." 
Exodus34:20 Latin kayo pa kana ibikoko ki latin nyok romo, nyo ka pe ikoko, ci itur ŋute woko. Litino kayo ducu ma gin litino awobeni ibikokogi. Dano mo pe obin i nyima ki ciŋe noŋo." 
Exodus34:21 “Ibitic nino abicel, ento i nino me abiro ibiywe iye; wa i kare me pur ki i kare me kac bene ibiywe." 
Exodus34:22 Ibibedo ki nino madit me kwero agikki cabit abiro, en aye wi mwaka me kayo naŋo mukwoŋo cek; ki nino madito me nyonone i dero i tum mwaka," 
Exodus34:23 Joni ma co ducu gibibino i nyim Rwot Lubaŋa, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, tyen adek i mwaka acel." 
Exodus34:24 Pien abiryemo lurok woko ki i nyimi, abimiyo waŋ loboni bedo malac; ŋatti mo bene pe bibedo ki miti i kom loboni i kare ma ibiwot ka nen i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu tyen adek i mwaka acel acel." 
Exodus34:25 “Pe ityer remo me gitumma kacel ki tobi; pe giwek gitum me nino madit me Kato (Paska) obed nio wa odiko," 
Exodus34:26 “Cam mukwoŋo cek i potoni me wi mwaka myero ikel i ot pa Rwot Lubaŋani, “Pe ited riŋo latin dyel ki cak pa minne.”" 
Exodus34:27 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Co lok magi; pien doŋ acikke kwedwu, in ki jo Icrael, ki gicikke ma lubo lok magi ducu.”" 
Exodus34:28 En obedo kunnu kacel ki Rwot nino pyeraŋwen, dyeceŋ ki dyewor, kun pe camo dok pe mato pii bene. Ci ocoyo lok me gicikke i kom kidi ma apada, gin aye cik apar-ri," 
Exodus34:29 Ka lacen Moses olor piny ki i wi got Cinai, ma omako kidi ma apada aryo me lok me caden i ciŋe. I kare ma en lor piny ki wi got, onoŋo Moses pe ŋeyo ni tur nyime tye ka ryeny, pien onoŋo obedo ka lok ki Lubaŋa." 
Exodus34:30 Ka Aron ki jo Icrael ducu guneno Moses, ci nen, tur nyime obedo ka ryeny; ci gulworo cito bote cok." 
Exodus34:31 Ento Moses olwoŋogi; ci Aron ki lutel wi lwak ducu gucako dok bote, Moses oloko kwedgi." 
Exodus34:32 Ka lacen jo Icrael ducu gucito bote cok, ocako miyogi cik ducu ma Rwot otitte i wi got Cinai," 
Exodus34:33 Ka doŋ Moses otyeko lok kwedgi, ci umo tur nyime ki boŋo;" 
Exodus34:34 ento i kare ducu ma Moses cito i nyim Rwot ka lok kwede, kwanyo boŋo woko ki i tur nyime, nio wa ka dwogone; ka okatti woko ci tito ki jo Icrael lok ma gicike kwede," 
Exodus34:35 Ka jo Icrael gineno tur nyim Moses, gineno ni del tur nyim Moses ryeny; ci Moses dok umo tur nyime woko ki boŋo, nio ka dok cito ka lok kwede." 
Exodus35:1 Moses ocoko lwak jo Icrael ducu, owaco botgi ni, “Man aye gin ma Rwot ociko ni wutim." 
Exodus35:2 Wuti tic nino abicel, ento i nino me abirone wubed ki cabit maleŋ me yweyo mot bot Rwot; ŋat ma otiyo iye tic mo gibineke woko," 
Exodus35:3 Pe wubimoko mac i pacowu ducu i nino me cabit.” 
Exodus35:4 Dok Moses owaco bot lwak jo Icrael ducu ni, “Man aye gin ma Rwot ociko ni,"
