Exodus35:5 wujog gityer pa Rwot ki i kinwu; ŋat ma cwinye aye opwoyo wek en okel gityer bot Rwot: jabu, ryal ki mola;" 
Exodus35:6 uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre; yer dyegi," 
Exodus35:7 laa nyogi romi ma ginyoŋo, laa dyegi; bao yat okuto lalwii;" 
Exodus35:8 moo me mac, aŋwece me yubo moo wir ki pi odok eceta ma ŋwece kur;" 
Exodus35:9 litino kidi onik ki litino kidi me wel me amwona i kom jabu pi epod ki pi kicaa kor. 
Exodus35:10 “Dok jo ducu ma i kinwu makwiri i tic gubin guti jami ducu ma Rwot ociko pigi: guti kema," 
Exodus35:11 kemane ki laum wiye, golle ki gutine, riine, wirre ki tedi tere;" 
Exodus35:12 canduk me cik ki talle, kom me kica ki boŋo kicika me laumme;" 
Exodus35:13 meja ki talle ki jami ticce ducu, ki mugati me aketa i nyim Lubaŋa;" 
Exodus35:14 okar-mac ki jami ticce ki laputte, ki moo me macce;" 
Exodus35:15 keno tyer me odok eceta ki talle, ki moo wir, ki odok eceta ma ŋwece kur, ki boŋo cuka laum doggola, me doggola me kema;" 
Exodus35:16 keno tyer me gitum awaŋa, kacel ki keikeine me mola, ki talle ki jami ticce ducu, ki otako lwok ki tedi tere;" 
Exodus35:17 boŋo cuka me anaba ma larum dyekal, ki wirre ki tedi tere, ki boŋo cuka laum doggaŋ me dyekal;" 
Exodus35:18 teke me terro kema ki teke me dyekal ki tol lacikgi; 
Exodus35:19 boŋŋi aruka ma gitiyogi mabeco me tic kwedgi i kabedo maleŋ, ki boŋŋi aruka maleŋ pi ajwaka Aron, ki boŋŋi aruka pa awobene pi tic megi me bedo ajwagi.”" 
Exodus35:20 Ci lwak jo Icrael ducu gua woko ki i nyim Moses. 
Exodus35:21 Ka gucako dwogo, kun ŋat acel acel oyubbe ki gin ma cwinye olyetto pire, ki ŋat acel acel ma iye pwoyo, okelo gityer bot Rwot me timo ki kema me rwatte, ki pi ticce ducu, ki pi boŋŋi aruka maleŋ," 
Exodus35:22 Ci gubino, co wa ki mon; jo ducu ma cwinygi aye opwoyo gukelo jarara, ki agit me it, ki agit ciŋ, ki mola ŋut ciŋ, ki kit jabu ducu, kun dano acel acel emo gityer me jabu bot Rwot," 
Exodus35:23 Dano ducu ma tye ki uci ma bulu, nyo ma lamar lamar, nyo makwar, nyo boŋo camanini maberre, nyo yer dyegi, nyo laa nyogi romi ma ginyoŋo, nyo laa dyegi, ducu gukelogi." 
Exodus35:24 Dano acel acel ma romo kela gityer me ryal, nyo mola, gukelo me gityer bot Rwot; ki dano ducu ma tye ki bao yat okuto lalwii ma romo kit tic ducu gukelo bene," 
Exodus35:25 Ki mon ducu makwiri i tic gubedo ka wiyo uci ki ciŋgi, gucako kela uci ma guwiyo ma bulu, ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre." 
Exodus35:26 Ci mon ducu ma cwinygi olyetto pi kwiri me tic guwiyo yer dyegi. 
Exodus35:27 Ki lutel wic bene gukelo litino kidi onik, ki litino kidi me wei me amwona i kom jabu, pi epod ki pi kicaa kor," 
Exodus35:28 ki aŋwece, ki moo me mac ki pi moo wir, ki pi odok eceta ma ŋwece kur," 
Exodus35:29 Jo Icrael ma co ki ma mon ducu ma yam cwinygi opwoyo pi kelo gin mo pi tic ma onoŋo Rwot ociko Moses ni oti, gukelo gityer ma igi opwoyo bot Rwot." 
Exodus35:30 Ci Moses owaco bot jo Icrael ni, “Nen, Rwot otyeko lwoŋo nyiŋ Bejalel wod pa Uri, ma wod pa Kur, ma i kaka pa Juda;" 
Exodus35:31 dok otyeko poŋo en ki Cwiny pa Lubaŋa, ki kwiri me tic, ki niaŋ matut, ki ŋec, ki k it tic ducu me diro," 
Exodus35:32 pi roto cal manyen me tic diro mapatpat, me tic ki jabu, ki ryal ki mola," 
Exodus35:33 ki pi ŋolo litino kidi me wel me amwona i kom jabu, ki pi payo bao, pi tiyo kit tic ducu me diro." 
Exodus35:34 Dok omiye cwiny me pwony, en kacel ki Okoliab wod pa Akicamak, ma i kaka pa Dan," 
Exodus35:35 En otyeko poŋogi ki kwiri me tiyo kwa tic ducu me diro, ki me roto cal tic manyen me tic diro, ki me dero boŋo ki uci ma bulu, ki ma lamar lamar, ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre, ki me cweyo boŋo, ki me tiyo kwa t ic ducu, ki me roto cal manyen me tic diro mapatpat." 
Exodus36:1 “Bejalel ki Okoliab ki jo ducu ma kwiri i tic, ma Rwot oketo kwiri me tic i igi, ki niaŋ matut, me ŋeyo ki me tiyo tic ducu me tic i kabedo maleŋ, gibitiyo kun gilubo kit ducu ma yam Rwot ociko.”" 
Exodus36:2 Moses olwoŋo Bejalel ki Okoliab ki jo ducu ma kwiri i tic, ma Rwot onoŋo oketo kwiri me tic i igi, dano ducu ma cwinygi olyetto pi bino ka tic;" 
Exodus36:3 ci gugamo ki bot Moses mot ducu ma jo Icrael gutyero pi tic i kom kabedo maleŋ, Pud onoŋo gimedde ameda ki kelo gityer ma igi opwoyo odiko odiko." 
Exodus36:4 Pien lukwiri tic ducu ma gitiyo kwa tic mo ma i kom kabedo maleŋ gubino, kun ŋat acel acel oa ki i dog tic ma en tiyo," 
Exodus36:5 ci guwaco bot Moses ni, “Dano doŋ gukelo madwoŋ mukato ma yam mitte pi tic ma Rwot ocikowa ni wati.”" 
Exodus36:6 Kit meno omiyo Moses ocwalo cik, lokke gitito oromo i gony ducu ni, “Pe dok laco mo kadi dako mo otim gin mo me gityer pi kabedo maleŋ.” Ci gijuko dano pe dok gukelo;" 
Exodus36:7 pien jami ma gukelo onoŋo doŋ oromo tiyo tic ducu, ki makato bene." 
Exodus36:8 Jo ducu ma kwiri i tic ma yam gitye i kin lutic gutiyo kema ki boŋo cuka apar, ma gitiyogi ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre, ki uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, kun gicweyo iye cal lukerubi ma gitiyogi ki diro." 
Exodus36:9 Bor boŋo cuka acel acel onoŋo oromo yadi apar wiye aŋwen, ki lacce romo yadi aryo; boŋo cuka ducu gubedo marom." 
Exodus36:10 Oribo boŋo cuka abic kacel, ki abic mu kene bene oribo kacel kit meno." 
Exodus36:11 Ci okwoyo waŋ jarara ma bulu i dog boŋo cuka me dul mukwoŋo mugikoni, ka dok okwoyo waŋ jarara i dog boŋo cuka me dul me aryone mugiko-ni, ma rom ki wadi," 
Exodus36:12 Okwoyo waŋ jarara pyerabic i dog boŋo cuka acel, ki waŋ jarara pyerabic i dog boŋo cuka me aryone, kun waŋ jarara kemo wadi." 
Exodus36:13 Dok otiyo jarara gol me jabu pyerabic, ci oribo dog boŋo cuka ki jarara gol-li; ci kema obedo mukubbe kacel likiŋ." 
Exodus36:14 Dok otiyo boŋo cuka me yer dyegi bene me laum wi kema; otimo cuka apar wiye acel," 
Exodus36:15 Bor pa cuka acel acel romo yadi apar wiye abic, lac pa cuka acel acel romo yadi aryo; boŋo cuka apar wiye acel-li ducu girom." 
Exodus36:16 Oribo cuka abic kacel pat kengi, ki cuka abicel bene kacel pat kengi." 
Exodus36:17 Okwoyo waŋ jarara pyerabic i dog cuka me dul mukwoŋo mugiko-ni, dok okwoyo jarara pyerabic me dul mukene mugikoni." 
Exodus36:18 Otiyo jarara gol me mola pyerabic me ribo dog kema kacel, wek obed mukubbe kacel likiŋ," 
Exodus36:19 Dok okwoyo laa nyogi romi ma ginyoŋo, ki laa dyegi, me umo wi kema." 
Exodus36:20 Dok otiyo guti me bao ‘yat lalwii, ma ocuŋ atir pi kema." 
Exodus36:21 Bor pa guti obedo futi apar wiye abic, ki lacce futi aryo, i kom guti acel acel." 
Exodus36:22 Guti acel acel obedo ki tyene aryo me kubogi kacel; otiyo guti me kema ducu kit meno. 
Exodus36:23 Otiyo guti me kema kit man: guti pyeraryo i tuŋ acuc. 
Exodus36:24 Ka dok otiyo tedi tere me ryal ma romo pyeraŋwen me kubo iye guti pyeraryo-nu; tedi tere aryo aryo pi guti acel acel, pi tyene aryo." 
Exodus36:25 Ka dok pi kema tuŋ me aryone, ma tuŋ acam, otiyo guti pyeraryo" 
Exodus36:26 ki tedi tere me ryal ma romo pyeraŋwen, tedi tere aryo aryo pi guti acel acel." 
Exodus36:27 Ki pi ne kema, ma tuŋ porocen, en otiyo guti abicel." 
Exodus36:28 Ka dok otiyo guti aryo me twok kema ma i ŋeye. 
Exodus36:29 Gipoko kingi ki tuŋ piny, ento giribo doggi ki tuŋ wigi malo i kom agit mukwoŋo; otiyo aryo ma kit meno pi twoke aryo." 
Exodus36:30 Yam tye guti aboro ki tedi tergi me ryal; tedi tergi obedo apar wiye abicel; i te guti acel acel bedo iye tedi tere aryo. 
Exodus36:31 Otiyo rii me bao yat lalwii abic pi guti me kema tuŋ cel," 
Exodus36:32 ki rii bao abic pi guti me kema tuŋ cel, ki rii bao abic pi guti me kema me ŋeye tuŋ potoceŋ." 
Exodus36:33 Ka dok otiyo rii bao ma i dyere ma oa ki i agikki tuŋ cel nio wa i agikki tuŋ cel ma oŋolo kor guti ari. 
Exodus36:34 Ci omwono kom guti woko ki jabu, ka otiyo agit me jabu me rwako bao iye; ki rii bao bene omwono komgi woko ki jabu." 
Exodus36:35 Ka dok otiyo boŋo kicika me uci ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre; otiyo ma gicweyo iye lukerubi ki tic me diro." 
Exodus36:36 Otiyo pire wir aŋwen me bao yat lalwii, ci omwono komgi woko ki jabu; golgi obedo me jabu, ci oliyo tedi tergi me ryal aŋwen." 
Exodus36:37 Dok onyo boŋo cuka me laum doggola me kema ki uci ma bu lu ki lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre, ma gidero maber." 
Exodus36:38 Dok otiyo wirre abic, ki golgi, Omwono wigi woko, ki otacgi bedo me jabu, ento tedi tergi abic obedo me mola." 
Exodus37:1 Bejalel opayo canduk ki bao yat lalwii; borre obedo futi aŋwen, ki lacce futi aryo, ki borre tuŋ malo futi aryo." 
Exodus37:2 Omwono iye ki ŋeye woko ki jabu ma giliyo maber, ka olulo doge ducu, orumo woko ki jabu," 
Exodus37:3 Ci oliyo agit me jabu aŋwen pi twoke aŋwen ducu, agit aryo pi tuŋ cel ki agit aryo mukene pi tuŋ cel." 
Exodus37:4 Ka dok otiyo tal me yat lalwii, omwono komgi woko ki jabu," 
Exodus37:5 ka orwako tal i agit ma tye i but canduk-ki me tiŋo canduk. 
Exodus37:6 Dok otimo kom me kica ki jabu ma giliyo maber; borre obedo futi aŋwen, ki lacce futi aryo." 
Exodus37:7 Ka otiyo lukerubi aryo me jabu ma otetogi ki nyol. Otiyogi i agikki kom me kica ryoryo ducu," 
Exodus37:8 lakerubi acel i agikki tuŋ cel, ki lakerubi acel i agikkine tun cel; otiyo lukerubi kun gikubbe i kom kom me kica i agikkine aryo ducu." 
Exodus37:9 Lukerubi guyaro bwomgi malo i wiye, guumo wi kom me kica ki bwomgi, kun waŋgi kemme ki wadi; waŋ lukerubi nen ma okemo kom me kica." 
Exodus37:10 En dok otiyo meja ki bao yat lalwii; borre obedo futi adek ki lacce futi acel ki nucu, ki borre tuŋ malo futi aryo." 
Exodus37:11 Omwono kome woko ki jabu ma giliyo maber, ci olulo doge ducu orumo woko ki jabu." 
Exodus37:12 Oketo riine tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi ducu, ma lacce rom ki dye ciŋ, ci olulo doge ducu orumo woko ki jabu." 
Exodus37:13 Oliyo agit aŋwen me jabu pire, ci omwono agit i twoke aŋwen ducu i kom tyene aŋwen." 
Exodus37:14 Agit giketo cok i kom rii, me rwako tal latin meja." 
Exodus37:15 Otiyo tal ki bao yat lalwii me tiŋo meja, omiwono komgi woko ki jabu." 
Exodus37:16 Otiyo jami me jabu ma giliyo maber me aketa i wi meja, caanine ki atabone me odok eceta, ki weerre, ki cupane me liyo gityer amata," 
Exodus37:17 En dok otiyo okar-mac ki jabu ma giliyo maber. Tedi okar-mac ki bolle oteto ki nyol; kikopone, en aye wene ki ature ducu, obedo ma gukubbe k acel kwede." 
Exodus37:18 Jaŋe onoŋo tye abicel ma gujany guryeyo gukaco i Jete ryoryo; jaŋ okar-mac adek ma guryeyo i bute tun cel, ki jaŋ okar-mac adek ma guryeyo i bute tuŋ cel, ki jaŋ okar-mac adek ma guryeyo i tuŋ mukene-ni." 
Exodus37:19 I kom jaŋe tuŋ cel obedo iye kikopo adek ma gitimo macalo tur yaa, kun acel acel tye ki wene ki ature, ki i kom jaŋe tuŋ mukene bene obedo iye kikopo adek ma gitimo macalo tur yaa, kun acel acel tye ki wene ki ature; jaŋe abicel ma guryeyo gukaco okar-mac-ci gubedo kit meno." 
Exodus37:20 Ka dok i kom okar-mac kikome-ni onoŋo tye iye kikopo aŋwen ma gitiyo macalo tur yaa, ki wengi ki aturegi," 
Exodus37:21 ki wene ma okubbe i kom okar-mac-ci i te jaŋe abicel ma guryeyo ryoryo i kom okar-mac. 
Exodus37:22 Wengi ki jaŋgi obedo ma gukubbe kacel, kun kome ducu obedo me jabu ma giliyo maber ma giteto ki nyol." 
Exodus37:23 Otiyo mac laputte abiro, ki magacce, ki caanine ki jabu ma giliyo maber," 
Exodus37:24 Oyubo okar-mac ki jami ticce ducu ki jabu ma giliyo maber ma pekke oromo ratili miya acel. 
Exodus37:25 Otiyo keno tyer me waŋo odok eceta ki yat lalwii; borre obedo futi acel ki nucu, ki lacce bene futi acel ki nucu; obedo ma twoke aŋwen ma rom, Borre tuŋ malo oromo futi adek; obedo ki ten keno aŋwen ma gukubbe i kome." 
Exodus37:26 Omwono kome woko ducu ki jabu ma giliyo maber, wiye ki bute ki ten keno ducu; olulo doge ducu orumo woko ki jabu." 
Exodus37:27 Otiyo agit me jabu aryo oketogi i te doge ma gilulo-ni, kun agit acel okemme ki wadi tuŋ cel, me rwako iye tal me tiŋone." 
Exodus37:28 Otiyo tal ki bao yat lalwii, omwono komgi woko ki jabu." 
Exodus37:29 Otiyo moo maleŋ me wir bene, ki odok eceta ma ŋwece kur ma giliyo maber, ma girubo kit macalo larub gin ma ŋwe kur timo-ni." 
Exodus38:1 Dok otiyo keno tyer me gitum awaŋa ki bao yat lalwii; borre obedo futi abiro ki nucu, lacce bene futi abiro ki nucu, obedo ki twoke aŋwen ma rom, borre tuŋ malo oromo futi aŋwen ki nucu," 
Exodus38:2 Otimo ten keno aŋwen ducu; ten keno aŋwen ducu gubedo ma gukubbe kacel kwede, dok omwono kome woko ki mola." 
Exodus38:3 Otiyo jami tic me keno tyer ducu, otako, ki akwaya latokke, ki becen, ki lacob riŋo, ki weer Iawau mac; otiyo jami tic meno ducu ki mola." 
Exodus38:4 Dok oyu bo keikei pi keno tyer, me obwo mola ma oketo i te riine, ki i kore." 
Exodus38:5 Oliyo agit aŋwen pi twoke aŋwen me keikeimola, me rwako iye tal me tinone," 
Exodus38:6 Otiyo tal ki bao yat lalwii, ci omwono komgi woko ki mola." 
Exodus38:7 Orwako tal odonyo i agit ma tye i but keno tyer-ri me latiŋŋe; otiyo ma iye twolo, ki bao." 
Exodus38:8 En dok otiyo otako mola ki tedi tere bene me mola; otiyo ki madara pa mon ma lutic ma gitiyo i doggola kema me rwatte," 
Exodus38:9 Otimo dyekal me kema; i tuŋ acuc me dyekal giŋabo iye boŋo cuka camanini ma giwiyo maberre ma borre tuŋ cel romo yadi pyerabic," 
Exodus38:10 Wirre onoŋo giromo pyeraryo, ki tedi tergi me mola gubedo pyeraryo, ento gol me wir ki otacgi ducu gubedo me ryal." 
Exodus38:11 Ki tuŋ acam bene borre oromo yadi pyerabic, ki wirre pyeraryo ki tedi tergi pyeraryo me mola; ento gol me wir ki otacgi ducu gubedo me ryal." 
Exodus38:12 Ki bute ma tuŋ potoceŋ bene giŋabo iye boŋo cuka ma borre romo yadi pyeraryo wiye abic; wirre gubedo apar, ki tedi tergi bene apar; gol me wir ki otacgi ducu gubedo me ryal." 
Exodus38:13 Nyime tuŋ wokceŋ onoŋo romo yadi pyeraryo wiye abic. 
Exodus38:14 Boŋo ma giŋabo i ŋet doggola tuŋ cel onoŋo romo yadi abiro ki nucu; wirre gubedo adek, ki tedi tergi adek." 
Exodus38:15 I ŋete tuŋ mukene bene kit meno; i ŋet doggaŋ tunŋi ki tuŋŋi giŋabo iye boŋo cuka ma romo yadi abiro ki nucu; wir gubedo adek ki tedi tergi adek. 
Exodus38:16 Boŋo cuka ducu ma giŋabo i doggaŋ me dyekal onoŋo gubedo boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre. 
Exodus38:17 Tedi te wir ducu onoŋo gibedo me mola, ento gol me wir ki otacgi gu bedo me ryal; gimwono wigi bene ki ryal, ki wir ducu ma i dyekal giketo iye otac ryal." 
Exodus38:18 Boŋo cuka laum doggaŋ me dyekal gidero kome maber ki uci ma bulu, ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre, kun borre romo yadi apar, ki borre tuŋ malo romo futi abiro ki nucu, ma rom ki boŋo cuka me aŋaba me dyekal." 
Exodus38:19 Wirre gubedo aŋwen, ki tedi tergi aŋwen me mola; golgi gubedo me ryal, ki wigi gumwono woko ki ryal, ki otacgi bene gubedo me ryal." 
Exodus38:20 Teke lagur kema ducu ki teke ma orumo dyekal ducu gubedo me mola. 
Exodus38:21 Man aye weI jami ma gitiyo ki kema, en aye kema lok me caden, macalo gikwanogi i kare ma Moses ociko, ma yam obedo pi tic pa jo Levi, kun ladit wi ticgi en aye Itamar wod pa Aron ma ajwaka-ni," 
Exodus38:22 Bejalel wod pa Uri ma wod pa Kur, ma i kaka pa Juda, otiyo jami ducu ma Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Exodus38:23 Onoŋo tiyo kacel ki Okoliab wod pa Akicamak, ma i kaka pa Dan, dano ma ladiro, ma larot cal tic manyen, ki lader jami ki uci ma bulu, ki lamar lamar, ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre." 
Exodus38:24 Jabu ducu ma gitiyo kwede pi tic i kabedo maleŋ, ki jabu ducu ma oa i gityer, pekke onoŋo romo talanta pyeraryo wiye aboŋwen, ki cekel miya abiro ki pyeradek, kun giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ," 
Exodus38:25 Ki ryal ma oa ki bot lwak ma gikwano onoŋo pekke romo talanta miya acel ki cekel alip acel, ki miya abiro ki pyerabiro wiye abic, kun giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ," 
Exodus38:26 Onoŋo dano acel acel okelo beka acel, (en aye nucu cekel me kabedo maleŋ), pi dano acel acel ma yam gikwano welgi, cakke i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo ki dok kwede malo, jo alip miya abicel ki adek, ki miya abic ki pyerabic." 
Exodus38:27 Talanta miya acel me ryal onoŋo obedo me aliya pi tedi te wir me kabedo maleŋ, ki pi tedi te wir me boŋo kicika; tedi tere ma romo miya acel gua ki i kom talanta miya acel, en aye talanta acel pi tedi te wir acel acel." 
Exodus38:28 Ki cekel alip acel ki miya abiro ki pyerabiro wiye abic, otimo ki gol me wir ducu, omwono wigi ducu, dok otiyo ki otacgi." 
Exodus38:29 Mola ma gimiyo onoŋo talanta pyerabiro, ki cekel alip aryo ki miya aŋwen." 
Exodus38:30 Otiyo ki tedi te wir me doggola kema me rwatte, ki ke no tyer me mola, ki keikei me mola, ki jami tic ducu me keno tyer," 
Exodus38:31 ki tedi te wir ma orumo dyekal, ki tedi te wir me doggaŋ me dyekal, ki teke me guro kema, ki teke ma orumo dyekal." 
Exodus39:1 Gikwoyo boŋŋi aruka ma gitiyo mabeco ki uci ma bulu ki lamar lamar, ki makwar pi tic i kabedo maleŋ, gikwoyo boŋŋ i maleŋ pi Aron macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Exodus39:2 Otiyo epod ki jabu ki uci ma bulu ki lamar lamar ki makwar ki camanini ma giwiyo maberre. 
Exodus39:3 Gipado jabu woko marep ki nyol, giliro odoko macalo tol me dero boŋo, kacel ki uci ma bulu, ki ma lamar lamar, ki makwar ki me dero ki boŋo camanini ma’ giwiyo maberre, ki tic me diro." 
Exodus39:4 Gukwoyo gin wi gwok epod, gikubo i doge ryoryo." 
Exodus39:5 Ceme ma i kome ma gicweyo ki diro, me latwene, gikwoyo ki jami lakite acellu, ki kit tic acel-lu bene, ki jabu, ki uci ma bulu, ki ma lamar lamar ki makwar ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre: macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses.’" 
Exodus39:6 Giyubo litino kidi onik, gimwonogi i kom jabu ma giŋweko ki diro, ma doŋ gigoro komgi macalo ladiro goro kom kidi, muporo nyiŋ awobe pa lcrael." 
Exodus39:7 Omwonogi i kom gin wi gwok me epod, wek gubed kidi me po pi awobe pa lcrael, macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Exodus39:8 Otimo kicaa kor ki tic me diro, macalo tic i kom epod, ki jabu ki uci ma bulu, ki ma lamar lamar, ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre." 
Exodus39:9 Obedo ma twoke aŋwen marom; gibano i kicaa kor aryo; ka doŋ gibano iye aryo, ci borre bedo rom ki lac cin acel, ki lacce bene rom ki lac cin acel," 
Exodus39:10 Gumwono iye litino kidi me wel ma guryeyo i tyenŋ aŋwen. Tyen mukwoŋo obedo cadiuc, topaj ki kabankel:" 
Exodus39:11 i tyen me aryone giketo iye emeradi’ capir ki dayaman; 
Exodus39:12 i tyeŋ me adekke giketo jacint, agat ki ameticito;" 
Exodus39:13 ki i tyen me aŋwenne giketo berul, onik ki jacipa; gimwonogi i jabu ma giŋweko ki diro." 
Exodus39:14 Litino kidi gubedo apar wiye aryo, muporo nyiŋ awobe pa Icrael; gubedo macalo kidi ma gigoro me agit, kun kidi acel acel gigoro iye nyiŋ, muporo kaka apar wiye aryo." 
Exodus39:15 Dok gutimo nyor me jabu ma giliyo maber, ma giminogi macalo tol," 
Exodus39:16 Dok gutimo gin lakwak tere aryo me jabu giŋweko ki diro, ki agit me jabu aryo, ci gukwoyo agit aryo-nu i dog kicaa kor aryo bene;" 
Exodus39:17 ka dok gurwako tol jabu aryo-nu odonyo i agit aryo ma gitye i dog kicaa kor-ri. 
Exodus39:18 Gumwono dog tol aryo-nu ducu i kom gin lakwak tere aryo ma giŋweko ki diro-ni, gutweyo kwede i kom gin wi gwok me epod." 
Exodus39:19 Dok gutimo agit aryo me jabu, ci gukwoyogi i twok kicaa kor aryo ducu, i doge ma tuŋ iye ma cok ki epod." 
Exodus39:20 Ci gutimo agit me jabu aryo gukubogi i gin wi gwok epod aryo anyim tuŋ tere, ka ma okubbe tuŋ malo i wi ceme me epod ma gicweyo ki diro-ni." 
Exodus39:21 Ci gutweyo kicaa kor ki agitte i kom agit ma i dog epod ki tol ma bulu, wek obut opyelle i kom ceme me epod ma gicweyo ki diro-ni, wek kicaa kor pe ogonnye woko ki i kom epod; macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses," 
Exodus39:22 Dok otimo jor me epod ma gicweyo kome ducu ki uci ma bulu. 
Exodus39:23 Otuco dog jor obedo twolo macalo dog boŋo aruka, ma gidolo doge orumo woko likiŋ wek pe oyeci." 
Exodus39:24 I dog jor guluno iye gin muporo okwer pomegranat munyak, ma gikwoyo ki uci ma bulu, ki ma lamar lamar, ki makwar, ki boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre," 
Exodus39:25 Dok gutimo olaŋ me jabu ma giliyo maber, ci gikwoyo olaŋ giŋobo kin okwer pomegranat orumo dog jor woko, onobo kin okwer pomegranat ducu;" 
Exodus39:26 olaŋ ki okwer pomegranat orumo dog jor ducu kun gigwennye agwenya, i dog jor me aruka i dog tic; macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses," 
Exodus39:27 Dok gutimo kanyi ma gicweyo ki boŋo camanini maberre, ki pali me boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre, pi Aron ki awobene," 
Exodus39:28 ki kitambara me adwala i wic me boŋo camanini maberre ki gitok matino me boŋo camanini maberre, ki pali me boŋo camanini ma giwiyo maberre," 
Exodus39:29 ki k itambara me latwe pyer me boŋo camarum ma giwiyo maberre, ki uci ma bulu, ki ma lamar lamar, ki makwar, ma gidero maber; macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses," 
Exodus39:30 Dok gutimo akwaya jabu me lalukana maleŋ ki jabu ma giliyo maber, gigoro kome macalo agora i kom agit ni, “Maleŋ pi Rwot.”" 
Exodus39:31 Gutweyo tol ma bulu i kome wek gitwe girid kwede i kom kitambara adwala me wic-ci; macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses. 
Exodus39:32 Yam gutyeko tic i kom kema, en kema me rwatte, kit meno; jo Icrael gutyeko tic ducu macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses; gutimo kit meno." 
Exodus39:33 Gukelo kema bot Moses, kema ki jami ticce ducu, lwak golle ki gutine ki riine wirre ki tedi tergi;" 
Exodus39:34 laa nyogi romi ma ginyoŋo, kicika me laumme;" 
Exodus39:35 canduk lok me caden, ki tal latiŋŋe, ki kom me kica;" 
Exodus39:36 meja ki jami ticce ducu, ki mugati me aketa i nyim Lubaŋa;" 
Exodus39:37 okar-mac me jabu ma giliyo maber, ki lwak laputte ma giketo malo i wiye, ki jami ticce ducu, ki moo me mac;" 
Exodus39:38 ke no tyer me jabu, moo me wir, ki odok eceta ma ŋwece kur, ki boŋo laum doggola me kema;" 
Exodus39:39 keno tyer me mola, ki tal latiŋŋe, ki jami ticce ducu; otako lwok ki tedi tere;" 
Exodus39:40 boŋo cuka me aŋaba me rumo dyekal, wirre ki tedi tergi ki boŋo laum doggaŋ me d yekal, ki lwak tol lacikgi ki lwak teke lagurgi; jami me tic kwedgi i kema, pi kema me rwatte;" 
Exodus39:41 ki boŋŋi aruka ma gitiyo mabeco me tic i kabedo maleŋ, bomji aruka maleŋ pi ajwaka Aron, ki boŋŋi aruka pi awobene pi ticgi me bedo ajwagi." 
Exodus39:42 Macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses, jo Icrael gutiyo gutyeko tic ducu kit meno," 
Exodus39:43 Moses oneno tic ducu, ci nen, gutiyo tic kikome; macalo Rwot onoŋo ociko, gutiyo tic ducu kakare. Ci Moses olamo gum i komgi." 
Exodus40:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Exodus40:2 “I nino dwe acel i dwe mukwoŋo, cak guro iye kema, en kema me rwatte." 
Exodus40:3 Ket iye canduk lok me caden, ci iŋab boŋo kicika me laum kom canduk." 
Exodus40:4 Ka doŋ iter iye meja, ican iye jami ducu kikore, ka dok ikel okar-mac ci icib laput malo i wiye," 
Exodus40:5 Dok iket keno tyer me jabu me waŋo odok eceta i nyim canduk lok me caden, ci iŋab boŋo cuka laum doggola me kema." 
Exodus40:6 Ket keno tyer me gitum awaŋa i nyim doggola me kema, en kema me rwatte;" 
Exodus40:7 iket otako lwok ocuŋ i kin kema me rwatte ki keno tyer, ci iony iye pii." 
Exodus40:8 Dok iŋab boŋo cuka me dyekal irum woko ducu, ci iŋab boŋo cuka me laum doggaŋ me dyekal." 
Exodus40:9 K waŋy moo wir, iwir ki kema ki lwak jami ducu ma gitye iye, kun ikwero en ki jami ma giketo iye ducu gubed maleŋ." 
Exodus40:10 Dok bene wir keno tyer me gitum awaŋa ki moo, ki jami ticce ducu; kwer keno tyer, ci bidoko maleŋ makato." 
Exodus40:11 Wir moo bene i kom otako lwok ki tedi tere ikwergi. 
Exodus40:12 Ka doŋ ibikelo Aron ki awobene i doggola kema me rwatte, ci ilwok komgi ki pii." 
Exodus40:13 Ka doŋ iruk Aron ki boŋŋi aruka maleŋ, ci iwire ki moo, ikwere wek oti bo ta tic me ajwaka." 
Exodus40:14 Ka dok ikel awobene bene, irukgi ki kanyi," 
Exodus40:15 iwirgi ki moo macalo iwiro wongi-ni, wek guti bota tic meajwagi: wirogi ki moo bimiyo gibedo ajwagi matwal wa i kare pa likwayogi ducu.”" 
Exodus40:16 Moses otimo kit meno kit ma yam Rwot ocike kwede ducu; otimo ducu kit meno," 
Exodus40:17 I dwe mukwoŋo, i mwaka me aryone, i nino dwe mukwoŋo aye giguro iye kema." 
Exodus40:18 Moses oguro kema: oryeyo tedi tere; ocibo iye guti, ka orwako iye rii bao, oilo wir malo," 
Exodus40:19 Ka dok oyaro boŋo opeto i wi kema, oketo laum kema, opeto i wiye, macalo yam Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Exodus40:20 Ka dok otero lok me caden oketo i canduk, ka orwako tal i kor canduk, oketo kom me kica i wi canduk;" 
Exodus40:21 ka otero canduk i kema, onabo boŋo kicika malo me laumme, ci oumo kom canduk lok me caden woko, macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses," 
Exodus40:22 Ka dok oketo meja i kema me rwatte, i kema tuŋ acam, ki woko i ŋe boŋo kicika ma oumo canduk-ki" 
Exodus40:23 ka dok ocano mugati i nyim Ii wot macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses. 
Exodus40:24 Ka dok oketo okar-mac i kema me rwatte tuŋ acuc me kema kun okemme ki meja," 
Exodus40:25 ka ocibo laput malo i nyim Rwot; macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses. 
Exodus40:26 Ka dok oketo keno tyer me jabu i kema me rwatte i nyim boŋo kicika," 
Exodus40:27 ci owaŋo odok eceta ma ŋwece kur i wiye; macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses. 
Exodus40:28 Dok onabo boŋo cuka me laum doggola me kema. 
Exodus40:29 Ka dok oketo keno tyer me gitum awaŋa cok ki doggola kema me rwatte, ka ocako tyero iye gitum awaŋa, ki gityer me moko kwon; macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Exodus40:30 Ka dok oketo otako lwok i kin kema me rwatte ki keno tyer, oonyo iye pii me lwok;" 
Exodus40:31 en aye ka ma Moses ki Aron ki awobene gilwoko iye tyengi. 
Exodus40:32 Ka gicito i kema me rwatte, dok ka ginyiko cok ki keno tyer, ci gilwokke, macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses:" 
Exodus40:33 Oguro dyekal orumo kema ki keno tyer, ci onabo boŋo cuka laum doggaŋ me dyekal, Kit meno Moses otyeko tic kakare," 
Exodus40:34 Lacen pol obino, oumo wi kema me rwatte woko, ci deyo pa Rwot opoŋo i kema." 
Exodus40:35 Moses onoŋo pe twero donyo i kema me rwatte, pien pol oboyo kom kema me rwatte woko, dok deyo pa Rwot opoŋo i kema." 
Exodus40:36 I kare me wotgi ducu, ka pol owarre woko ki i wi kema, ci jo Icrael gicako wot anyim;" 
Exodus40:37 ento ka pol pe owarre woko, ci pe gimedde ki wotgi anyim, gikuro nio i nino ma owarre woko," 
Exodus40:38 I kare me wotgi ducu pol pa Rwot umo wi kema dyeceŋ, ki mac bedo iye dyewor, ma kun jo ducu me ot pa Icrael gineno." 
Leviticus1:1 Rwot olwoŋo Moses ci oloko kwede ki i kema me rwatte kun waco ni," 
Leviticus1:2 “Lok bot jo Icrael kun iwaco botgi ni, Ka dano mo i kinwu kelo tyer mo bot Rwot, wubikelo gityerwu me lim makwo ma wukwanyo ki i kin dyaŋi nyo ki i kin romi ki dyegi." 
Leviticus1:3 “Ka ce dano mo okwanyo gityerre me gitum awaŋa ki i kin dyaŋi, en bityero twon ma kome pe ki mwonyo; en bityero i doggola kema me rwatte, wek Rwot ogame," 
Leviticus1:4 En biketo ciŋe i wi gitum awaŋa, ci Lubaŋa bigamone pire me lakwany bal ki i kome," 
Leviticus1:5 En bineko twon meno i nyim Rwot ci awobe pa Aron ma gin aye ajwagi gibityero remo; gibicoro remo i kom keno tyer ma tye i doggola kema me rwatte kun rumo kome ducu," 
Leviticus1:6 En biyaŋo gitum awaŋa, biŋido woko matitino," 
Leviticus1:7 ka awobe pa ajwaka Aron gibimoko mac i wi keno tyer, kun gicano yen i mac kikore." 
Leviticus1:8 Ci awobe pa Aron ma gin aye ajwagi gibicano riŋo ma giŋido-ni kikore, kacel ki wic ki dwolo, i wi yen ma tye i mac ma i wi keno tyer;" 
Leviticus1:9 ento jam iye ki tyene ducu gibilwokogi ki pii. Ajwaka biwaŋo woko ducu ki berre i keno tyer obed gitum awaŋa, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, en gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Leviticus1:10 “Ka ce okwanyo gityerre me gitum awaŋa ki i kin romi nyo dyegi, en bityero nyok ma kome pe ki mwonyo." 
Leviticus1:11 En bineko i nyim Rwot, yo tuŋ acam me keno tyer; awobe pa Aron ma gin aye ajwagi gibicoro remo i kom keno tyer rumo kome ducu," 
Leviticus1:12 En biŋido woko matitino, kacel ki wic ki dwolone, ci ajwaka bicanogi kikore i wi keno tyer;" 
Leviticus1:13 ento jam iye ki tyene ducu gibilwokogi ki pii. Ajwaka bityero ducu ki berre kun waŋo i keno tyer; en aye gitum awaŋa, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, en gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Leviticus1:14 “Ka ce gityerre bot Rwot obedo winyo me gitum awaŋa, ci en bikelo amam nyo litino akuri me gityerre." 
Leviticus1:15 Ajwaka bikelone i keno tyer ci dwoyo ŋute, ka waŋo woko i wi keno tyer," 
Leviticus1:16 En bikwanyo lacukone ki yece ci onyogi i ŋet keno tyer tuŋ wokceŋ ka ma gionyo iye buru; 
Leviticus1:17 biyecone ki bwome, ento pe bipoko iye. Ajwaka biwaŋo i keno tyer, i wi yen ma tye i mac; en aye gitum awaŋa, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Leviticus2:1 “Ka ŋatti mo okelo gityer me moko kwon me atyera bot Rwot, gityer mere bibedo moko kwon mapwotte. En bionyo iye moo, ci keto iye odok luban," 
Leviticus2:2 ka en bikelo bot awobe pa Aron ma gin aye ajwagi. Ajwaka bijobo moko kwon mapwot-ti poŋ ciŋ acel, kacel ki moo ki odok luban mere ducu; ci ajwaka biwaŋo man i wi keno tyer obed gin me po i kome; en gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Leviticus2:3 Gin ma odoŋ ki i kom gityer me moko kwon bibedo pa Aron ki awobene; en aye gin maleŋ makato me gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot. 
Leviticus2:4 “Ka ityero gityer me moko kwon ma gitedo i keno, bibedo capat ma tobi pe iye me moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo, nyo capat marep ma tobi pe iye ma gireyo moo i komgi." 
Leviticus2:5 Ka ce gityer meri obedo gityer me moko kwon ma gitedo i otako nyonyo, bibedo moko kwon mapwotte ma tobi pe iye, ma girubo ki moo;" 
Leviticus2:6 ka ocek ibinido iye matitino ci ionyo iye moo; en aye gityer me moko kwon. 
Leviticus2:7 Ka ce gityer meri obedo gityer me moko kwon ma gitedo i cupuriya, ibitedo ki moo ki moko kwon mapwotte." 
Leviticus2:8 Gityer me moko kwon ma gitimo ki jami magi ibikelo bot Rwot; ka doŋ gityero bot ajwaka, ci en bikelo i wi keno tyer." 
Leviticus2:9 Ki i kom gityer me moko kwon ajwaka bikwanyo iye gin me po, biwaŋo i wi keno tyer obed gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Leviticus2:10 Gin ma odoŋ ki i kom gityer me moko kwon bibedo pa Aron ki awobene; en aye gin maleŋ makato me gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot. 
Leviticus2:11 “Gityer me moko kwon ma gikelo bot Rwot pe wuted ki tobi; pien pe wubiwaŋo tobi nyo moo kic me bedo gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot. 
Leviticus2:12 Wutwero kelogi bot Rwot pi gityer me wi mwaka, ento pe wubityerogi i wi keno tyer me bedo gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Leviticus2:13 Ibiketo kado i gityer me moko kwon meri ducu; pe ibiweko kado me gicikke pa Lubaŋani bedo pe i gityer me moko kwon meri; myero ityer kado kacel ki gityer meri ducu. 
Leviticus2:14 “Ka ityero gityer me moko kwon me wi mwaka bot Rwot, ibityero wit bel manyen ma gicoto, gicelo ki mac." 
Leviticus2:15 Ibiketo moo ki odok luban i kome; en aye gityer me moko kwon. 
Leviticus2:16 Ajwaka biwaŋo bel mogo ma gieoto, kacel ki moo ki odok luban mere ducu, obed gin me po i kome; en aye gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot." 
Leviticus3:1 “Ka dano mo tyero gitum me gityer lakwecwiny, ka tyero lim ma okwanyo ki i kin dyaŋi, ma twon nyo ma roya, en bityero i nyim Rwot ma kome pe ki mwonyo." 
Leviticus3:2 En biketo ciŋe i wi gityerre, ci bineko i doggola kema me rwatte; awobe pa Aron ma gin aye ajwagi gibicoro remo i kom keno tyer kun rumo kome ducu." 
Leviticus3:3 En bityero gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot ma okwanyo ki i kom gitum meno me gityer lakwecwiny, en aye dwolo ma oumo jam iye, ki dwolo ducu ma tye i kom jam iye," 
Leviticus3:4 ki olaŋ aryo ducu ki dwolo ma tye i komgi ma tye i pyere, ki okene ki i kom cwiny, ma en bi kwanyo woko kacel ki olaŋ aryo." 
Leviticus3:5 Awobe pa Aron biwaŋo i wi keno tyer i wi gitum awaŋa ma tye i wi yen ma i mac; en aye gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Leviticus3:6 “Ka gityerre bot Rwot me gityer lakwecwiny obedo lim ma okwanyo ki i kin romi, ma nyok nyo ma bwoŋ romo, en bityero ma kome pe ki mwonyo." 
Leviticus3:7 Ka en tyero latin romo me gityerre, en bityero i nyim Rwot," 
Leviticus3:8 biketo ciŋe i wi gityerre, ka doŋ neko woko i nyim kema me rwatte; ci awobe pa Aron gibicoro remone i kom keno tyer kun rumo kome ducu." 
Leviticus3:9 Lacen en bityero gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot ma okwanyo ki i kom gitum meno me gityer lakwecwiny, en aye dwolone, ki moo yibe oluu, kun giŋolo cok ki i oguro cogo ŋeye, ki dwolo ma oumo jam iye," 
Leviticus3:10 ki olan aryo ducu, ki dwolo ma tye i komgi ma tye i pyere, ki okene ma i kom cwiny ma en bikwanyo woko kacel ki olaŋ aryo." 
Leviticus3:11 Ci ajwaka biwaŋo woko i wi keno tyer, obed cam ma gityero ki mac bot Rwot." 
Leviticus3:12 “Ka ce gityerre obedo dyel, en bityero i nyim Rwot," 
Leviticus3:13 biketo ciŋe i wiye, ka doŋ neko woko i nyim kema me rwatte; awobe pa Aron gibicoro remone i kom keno tyer rumo kome ducu." 
Leviticus3:14 Lacen en bityero jami magi ma okwanyo ki i kome gubed gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot, en aye dwolo ma oumo jam iye, ki dwolo ducu ma i kom jam iye," 
Leviticus3:15 ki olaŋ aryo ducu, ki dwolo ma i komgi ma tye i pyere, ki okene ma i kom cwiny ma en bikwanyo woko kacel ki olan aryo." 
Leviticus3:16 Ajwaka biwaŋogi i wi keno tyer obed cam ma gityero ki mac, ma ŋwece kur. Dwolo ducu bedo pa Rwot." 
Leviticus3:17 Bibedo cik matwal nio wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu, wa i kabedo ma wubedo iye ducu, ni, pe wucam dwolo nyo remo.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus4:2 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, Ka dano mo obalo ma pe otimo akaka, i kom gin ma yam Rwot ociko ni pe gitim, ce otimo acel mo i kingi," 
Leviticus4:3 ka ce ajwaka ma giwiro ki moo aye obalo, kun okelo bal i kom lwak, myero en otyer bot Rwot wod twon ma kome pe ki mwonyo pi bal ma en otimo, obed gitum me bal." 
Leviticus4:4 En bikelo wod twon i doggola kema me rwatte i nyim Rwot, biketo ciŋe i wi twon ci neko woko i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus4:5 Ajwaka ma giwiro bikwanyo remo twon manok, tero i kema me rwatte;" 
Leviticus4:6 ajwaka biluto lwet ciŋe i remo ci kiro remo tyen abiro i nyim Rwot, i nyim boŋo kicika ma umo kabedo maleŋ." 
Leviticus4:7 Ajwaka bireyo remo mukene i kom ten keno aŋwen me keno tyer me odok eceta ma ŋwece kur ma tye i kema me rwatte i nyim Rwot; remo twon mudonge en bionyo woko i te tedi keno tyer me gitum awaŋa ma tye i doggola kema me rwatte. 
Leviticus4:8 En bikwanyo dwolo ducu ki i kom twon me gitum me bal, dwolo ma oumo jam iye, ki dwolo ducu ma tye i kom jam iye," 
Leviticus4:9 ki olaŋ aryo ducu ki dwolo ma tye i komgi ma tye i pyere, ki okene ki i kom cwiny ma en bikwanyo woko kacel ki olaŋ aryo," 
Leviticus4:10 kit macalo gikwanyo ki i kom twon me gityer lakwecwiny; ci ajwaka biwaŋogi woko i wi keno tyer me gitum awaŋa. 
Leviticus4:11 Ento pyen twon ki riŋone ducu, kacel ki wiye ki tyene ki jam iye ki wee iye," 
Leviticus4:12 en bitero woko ki berre wa i ŋe gony i kabedo ma olony ka ma gionyo iye buru, ci biwaŋo i wi yen ki mac; i kabedo ka ma gionyo iye buru en aye gibiwaŋo iye." 
Leviticus4:13 “Ka lwak jo Icrael ducu gutimo bal ma pe gutimo akaka, ce lokke pe oŋene i nyim kacokke, kun gitiyo gin mo acel i kom gin ducu ma yam Rwot ociko ni pe gitim, ci gutiŋo alii;" 
Leviticus4:14 ka bal ma gutimo-ni doŋ onene, ci kacokke myero otyer wod twon me gitum me bal kun gikelo i nyim kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus4:15 Ludoŋo pa lwak gibiketo ciŋgi i wi twon i nyim Rwot, ci gibineko twon i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus4:16 Ajwaka ma giwiro bitero remo twon manok i kema me rwatte: 
Leviticus4:17 ajwaka biluto lwet ciŋe i remo ci kiro tyen abiro i nyim Rwot i nyim boŋo kicika. 
Leviticus4:18 En bireyo remo mukene i kom ten keno aŋwen me keno tyer ma tye i kema me rwatte i nyim Rwot; remo mudoŋŋe en bionyo woko i te tedi keno tyer me gitum awaŋa ma tye i doggola kema me rwatte. 
Leviticus4:19 En bikwanyo dwolone ducu ki i kome ci wano woko i wi keno tyer. 
Leviticus4:20 En bitiyo ki twon man kit ma onoŋo otiyo ki twon me gitum me bal; ajwaka bitimo gin me lakwany bal ki i komgi ci Rwot biweko balgi. 
Leviticus4:21 Ci ajwaka bitero twon woko Wa i ŋe gony, biwaŋo kit macalo owaŋo ki twon mukwoŋo-ni; en aye gitum me bal pa lwak mucokke." 
Leviticus4:22 “Ka laloc mo aye obalo ma pe otimo akaka, kun otiyo gin mo acel i kom gin ducu ma yam Rwot Lubaŋane ociko ni pe gitim, ci otiŋo alii," 
Leviticus4:23 ka gimiyo en oŋeyo bal ma en otimo-ni, ci en bikelo dyel pi gityerre, nyok ma kome pe ki mwonyo." 
Leviticus4:24 Biketo ciŋe i wi dyel, ci neko i kabedo ma gineko iye gitum awaŋa i nyim Rwot; co aye gitum me bal." 
Leviticus4:25 Ajwaka bigwelo remo me gitum me bal ki lwet ciŋe, ci reyo i kom ten keno aŋwen me keno tyer me gitum awaŋa; remo mudoŋŋe en bionyo woko i te tedi keno tyer me gitum awaŋa." 
Leviticus4:26 En biwaŋo dwolone ducu i wi keno tyer, macalo dwolo me gityer lakwecwiny; kit meno ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome pi balle, ci Rwot biweko balle." 
Leviticus4:27 “Ka ŋat mo acel ma i kin lwak obalo ma pe otimo akaka, kun otiyo gin mo acel i kom gin ducu ma yam Rwot ociko ni pe gitim, ci otiŋo alii," 
Leviticus4:28 ka gimiyo en oneyo bal ma en otimoni, ci en bikelo dyel pi gityerre, bwonne ma kome pe ki mwonyo, pi balle ma en otimo-ni." 
Leviticus4:29 En biketo ciŋe i wi gitum me bal, ci neko gitum me bal i kabedo ma gineko iye gitum awaŋa," 
Leviticus4:30 Ajwaka bigwelo temo ki lwet ciŋe, ci reyo ‘i kom ten keno aŋwen me keno tyer; remo mudoŋŋe en bionyo woko i te tedi keno tyer." 
Leviticus4:31 En bikwanyo dwolone ducu macalo gikwanyo dwolo ki i gityer lakwecwiny, ajwaka biwaŋo i wi keno tyer obed gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot; kit meno ajwaka bitimo gin me i akwany bal ki i kome, ci Rwot biweko balle." 
Leviticus4:32 “Nyo ka en mito kelo latin romo me gityerre pi gitum me bal, en bikelo bwonne ma kome pe ki mwonyo." 
Leviticus4:33 Biketo ciŋe i wi gitum me bal, ci neko i kabedo ma gineko iye gitum awana-ni," 
Leviticus4:34 Ajwaka bigwelo remo me gitum me bal ki lwet ciŋe, bireyo i ten keno aŋwen me keno tyer me gitum awaŋa; remo mudoŋŋe en bionyo woko i te tedi keno tyer." 
Leviticus4:35 En bikwanyo dwolone ducu macalo gikwanyo dwolo latin romo ki i gityer lakwecwiny, ajwaka biwaŋo i wi keno tyer i kom gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot; kit meno ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome pi bal ma en otimo-ni, ci Rwot biweko balle." 
Leviticus5:1 “Ka dano mo obalo kun owinyo lam ma gilamo i kom lwak ni dano myero gutuc lok ma giŋeyo, ma kun en caden ma oneno nyo oniaŋ lokke, ce pe otuco, bal bidok i wiye." 
Leviticus5:2 Nyo ka dano mo ogudo kom gin ma gikwero, kadi bed kom lee tim ma keni muto, ma gikwero; nyo kom lee ma paco ma keni muto, ma gikwero, nyo kom gin ma nya ma corre limuk ma keni muto, ma gikwero, kun pe oneyo, en bene odoko keni, noŋo otiŋo alii." 
Leviticus5:3 Nyo ka ogudo gin me kwer ma i kom dano, kit gin mo-ni makwer ma twero miyo dano doko keni, kun pe oneyo, ka doŋ oniaŋ iye, noŋo otiŋo alii." 
Leviticus5:4 Nyo ka dano mo okwono kwon laboŋo tamo tere pi timo gin mo marac nyo maber, kit kwon ma dano kwoŋo kun pe gitamo tere, kun pe oniaŋ iye, ka doŋ oniaŋ iye ci bitiŋo alii, ka otimo lok mo acel i kom magi." 
Leviticus5:5 Ka ŋat mo otiŋo alii, ka otimo lok acel mo i kom magi, ci myero otuc bal ma en otimo," 
Leviticus5:6 okel gitumme me tiŋo alii bot Rwot pi bal ma en otimo-ni, bwon romo nyo bwon dyel, obed gitum me bal; ci ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome pi balle." 
Leviticus5:7 “Ento ka noŋo latin romo oloye, ci en bikelo amam aryo nyo litino akuri aryo bot Rwot me gitumme me tiŋo alii pi bal ma otimo; acel obed pi gitum me bal, acel pi gitum awaŋa." 
Leviticus5:8 Bikelogi bot ajwaka, ci ajwaka bikwoŋo tyero acel me gitum me bal. Bidwoyo ŋute turo woko, ento pe biputo wiye," 
Leviticus5:9 ci bikiro remo manok me gitum me bal i but keno me tyer, remo mudoŋŋe en bibiyo cwer i te tedi keno tyer; en aye gitum me bal." 
Leviticus5:10 Lacen bityero me aryone me gitum awaŋa macalo giciko; kit meno ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome pi bal ma en otimo-ni, ci Rwot biweko balle." 
Leviticus5:11 “Ento ka noŋo amam aryo nyo litino akuri aryo oloye, ci bikelo agwata moko kwon acel me moko mapwotte me gityer mere pi bal ma otimo, obed gitum me bal. Pe bionyo iye moo pe biketo rye odok luban, pren obedo gitum me bal." 
Leviticus5:12 Bikelo bot ajwaka, ci ajwaka bijobo poŋ ciŋ acel obed gin me po i kome, biwaŋone i wi keno tyer, i wi gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot; en aye gitum me bal." 
Leviticus5:13 Kit meno ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome pi bal ma otimo pi lok mo acel i kom magi, ci Rwot biweko balle. Mudoŋŋe bibedo pa ajwaka, macalo gitimo i kom gityer me moko kwon.”" 
Leviticus5:14 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus5:15 “Ka dano mo oturo cik pa Lubaŋa kun otimo bal ma pe otimo akaka i kom mot mo maleŋ ma myero en omi bot Rwot, en bikelo gitumme me tiŋo alii bot Rwot, nyok ma kome pe ki mwonyo ma okwanyo ki i kin romi i wel ma iŋolo i cekel me ryal kun ilubo cekel me kabedo maleŋ, obed gitum me tiŋo alii." 
Leviticus5:16 Dok en biculo waŋ gin ma en obalo iye i kom mot maleŋ, kun medo iye acel me abic, ci miyo bot ajwaka. Ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome ki nyok romo me gitum me tiŋo alii, ci Rwot biweko balle." 
Leviticus5:17 “Ka dano mo obalo kun otiyo gin mo acel i kom gin ducu ma yam Rwot ociko ni pe gitim, kadi bed pe oneyo, noŋo otiŋo alii, ci bal bidok i wiye." 
Leviticus5:18 En bikelo bot ajwaka nyok ma kome pe ki mwonyo ma okwanyo ki i kin romi, i wei ma iŋolo, obed gitum me tiŋo alii. Ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome pi bal ma opoto iye ma pe me akaka, ci Rwot biweko balle." 
Leviticus5:19 En aye gitum me tiŋo alii, noŋo en otiŋo alii i nyim Rwot.”" 
Leviticus6:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus6:2 “Dano twero balo kun oturo cik pa Rwot, macalo ka obwolo lawote i kom gin ma con okano bote, nyo ojeŋo bote, nyo ka omayo jamine, nyo oburo lawote," 
Leviticus6:3 nyo onoŋo gin ma orwenyo ci oloko iye lok goba, kun okwoŋo iye kwoŋ me goba; nyo otimo gin mo acel i kom gin ducu ma dano gitimo ci gibalo kwede." 
Leviticus6:4 Ka ŋat mo obalo kumeno ce otiŋo alii, en bidwoko waŋ gin ma omayo-ni, nyo gin ma en otero me bura, nyo gin ma onoŋo gikano: bote, nyo gin ma orwenyo ma en onoŋo," 
Leviticus6:5 nyo gin mo-ni ma en okwoŋo iye kwoŋ me goba. Bidwoko ducu ki berre, dok bimedo acel me abic i kome, ci miyo bot won jami i nino ma en tyero iye gitumme me tiŋo alii." 
Leviticus6:6 En bikelo gitumme me tiŋo alii bot Rwot, nyok ma kome pe ki mwonyo ma okwanyo ki i kin romi, i wel ma iŋolo, wek obed gitum me tiŋo alii; bikelo bot ajwaka." 
Leviticus6:7 Ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome i nyim Rwot, ci Rwot biweko balle i kom gin mo-ni i kom gin ducu ma dano twero tiyo ma miyo etiŋo alii.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus6:9 “Cik Aron ki awobene ni, Man aye cik me gitum awaŋa, Gitum awaŋa bibedc i keno tyer dyewor benebene nio wa odiko, kun mac bedo ka lyel iye nakanaka." 
Leviticus6:10 Ajwaka biruko boŋo arukane boŋo camanini, ci ruko pali camaninine i pyere, ka bijobo buru ma odon ka mac doŋ owano gitum awaŋa woko, ci keto i ŋet keno tyer." 
Leviticus6:11 Ka doŋ en bilunyo boŋŋine woko ruko boŋŋi mukene, ci tero buru woko wa i ne gony i kabedo ma olony." 
Leviticus6:12 Mac ma i wi keno tyer bibedo ka lyel nakanaka, pe myero oto. Ajwaka biwaŋo iye yen odiko ki piny ma ru, bicano gitum i wiye kikore, dok biwaŋo dwolo bene i wiye me gityer lakwecwiny." 
Leviticus6:13 Mac bibedo ka Lyel i wi keno tyer nakanaka, pe myero oto." 
Leviticus6:14 “Man aye cik me gityer me moko kwon. Awobe pa Aron gibityerone i nyim Rwot, i nyim keno me tyer," 
Leviticus6:15 ŋat acel bijobo moko kwon mapwot-ti poŋ ciŋ acel ki i gityer me moko kwon, kacel ki moone ki odok luban ma i kom gityer me moko kwon, ci wano i wi keno tyer obed gin me po i kome, gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Leviticus6:16 Ma odoŋŋe Aron ki awobene gibicamo; gibicamo ma tobi pe iye i kabedo mo maleŋ, i dyekal me kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus6:17 Pe gibitedo capatte ki tobi. Atyeko miyo botgi me bedo dul megi me gityer mera ma giwaŋo ki mac; en gin maleŋ makato, macalo gitum me bal ki gitum me tiŋo alii." 
Leviticus6:18 Co ducu ma i kin likwayo pa Aron gitwero camo dul man ma gikwanyo ki i kom gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot; en cik ma bibedo matwal wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu. Ŋat ma ogudo bidoko maleŋ.” 
Leviticus6:19 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus6:20 “Man aye gityer ma Aron ki awobene gibityero bot Rwot i nino ma giwire iye ki moo: agwata moko kwon acel me moko mapwotte, obed gityer me moko kwon me kare ducu; bityero nucune odiko ki nucune otyeno." 
Leviticus6:21 Gibitedo ki moo i otako nyonyo; ibikelo ma doŋ girubo maber, ma noŋo inido matitino macalo gityer me moko kwon, ityer obed gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Leviticus6:22 Ajwaka ma oa ki i kin awobe pa Aron ma gibiwiro ki moo me leyo kakare bityero bot Rwot pi cik ma bibedo matwal; gibiwaŋo ducu ki berre. 
Leviticus6:23 Gityer me moko kwon pa ajwaka gibiwaŋo woko ducu ki bene; pe gibicamo.” 
Leviticus6:24 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni 
Leviticus6:25 “Wac bot Aron ki awo bene ni, Man aye cik me gitum me bal. I kabedo ma gineko iye gitum awana-ni, en aye gibineko iye gitum me bal i nyim Rwot; en gin maleŋ makato." 
Leviticus6:26 Ajwaka ma otyero pi bal en aye bicamone; gibicamo i kabedo mo maleŋ, i dyekal me kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus6:27 Gin ducu ma ogudo riŋone bidoko maleŋ; ka remone okir i kom ginaruka, ibilwoko gin ma remo okir i kome-ni i kabedo mo maleŋ." 
Leviticus6:28 Agulu lobo ma gitedo iye gibineko woko; ento ka gitedo i weer mola, ci gibirudo kome, gilako ki pii." 
Leviticus6:29 Co ducu ma i kin ajwagi gitwero camone; en gin maleŋ makato. 
Leviticus6:30 Ento gitum me bal pe gibicamone tekke ka remone gitero i kema me rwatte pi timo gin lakwanybal i kabedo maleŋ; gibiwaŋo woko awaŋa ki mac. 
Leviticus7:1 “Man aye cik me gitum me tiŋo alii. En gin maleŋ makato; 
Leviticus7:2 i kabedo ma gineko iye gitum awana-ni en aye gibineko iye gitum me tino alii, ci gibicoro remone i kom keno tyer rumo kome ducu." 
Leviticus7:3 Gibityero dwolone ducu, moo yibe, dwolo ma oumo jam iye," 
Leviticus7:4 olan aryo ducu ki dwolo ma i komgi ma tye i pyere, ki okene ma tye i kom cwiny ma en bikwanyo woko kacel ki olan aryo," 
Leviticus7:5 Ajwaka biwaŋogi i wi keno tyer obed gin ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot; en aye gitum me tiŋo alii. 
Leviticus7:6 Co ducu ma i kin ajwagi gitwero camone; gibicamo i kabedo mo maleŋ; en gin maleŋ makato. 
Leviticus7:7 Gitum me tiŋo alii rom ki gitum me bal, cikgi tye acel; ajwaka ma otimo kwede gin lakwany bal, en aye biterone." 
Leviticus7:8 Dok ajwaka ma otyero gitum awaŋa pa ŋat mo bitero pyen me gitum awaŋa ma en otyero-ni. 
Leviticus7:9 Gityer me moko kwon ducu ma gitedo i keno, ki mukene ma gitedo i cupuriya nyo i otako nyonyo, bibedo pa ajwaka ma otyero-ni." 
Leviticus7:10 Gityer me moko kwon ducu, ma girubo ki moo, nyo ma noŋone, bibedo pa awobe pa Aron ducu; ŋat man bitero ma rom ki lawote." 
Leviticus7:11 “Man aye cik me gityer lakwecwiny ma ŋat mo bityero bot Rwot. 
Leviticus7:12 Ka en tyero pi miyo pwoc, ci bityero, kacel ki gityer me pwoc, capat ma tobi pe iye ma girubo ki moo, capat marep ma tobi pe iye ma gireyo moo i komgi, ki capat ma tobi pe iye me moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo maber ki moo." 
Leviticus7:13 En bityero bene capat me mugati ma girubo iye tobi kacel ki gitumme me gityer lakwecwiny. 
Leviticus7:14 I kom magi en bityero capat acel ki i kom gityer acel acel obed gityer bot Rwot; meno bibedo pa ajwaka ma ocoro remo me gityer lakwecwiny. 
Leviticus7:15 Riŋo me gitumme me gityer lakwecwiny pi miyo pwoc gibicamo i nino ma en otyero iye; en pe biweko mo doŋ nio odiko. 
Leviticus7:16 Ento ka gityerre obedo gityer me cobo kwoŋ, nyo gityer mo ma iye opwoyo, gibicamo i nino ma en otyero iye, dok mudoŋŋe gitwero camo orwone," 
Leviticus7:17 Ento riŋo mo me gitum mere ma odon i nino me adekke myero giwaŋ awaŋa ki mac," 
Leviticus7:18 Ka gicamo riŋo mo me gitum mere me gityer lakwecwiny i nino me adekke, Lubaŋa pe bigamo ŋat ma otyero-ni, dok pe gibikwaŋo ni en otyero gin mo, Bibedo gin me kwer: ŋat ma ocamo, bal bidok i wiye." 
Leviticus7:19 “Riŋo ma ogudo kom gin mo ma gikwero pe gibicamo; gibiwaŋone awaŋa ki mac. Jo ducu ma olonnye gitwero camo riŋo," 
Leviticus7:20 ento ka ŋat mo ocamo riŋo me gityer lakwecwiny pa Rwot ma onoŋo en odoko keni, dano meno waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi," 
Leviticus7:21 Ka ŋat mo ogudo kom gin mo ma gikwero, kadi bed gin me kwer ma i kom dano, nyo lee ma gikwero, nyo kit gin mo-ni me kwer ma keni, ka dok camo kwede riŋo me gityer lakwecwiny pa Rwot, dano meno waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus7:23 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, Pe myero wucam kit dwolo ducu, kadi me twon, kadi me romo nyo me dyel." 
Leviticus7:24 Dwolo geŋ lee ma oto kene, ki dwolo lee ma ŋuu omwodo gitwero tic kwede i yo mukene ducu, ento pe gibicamo kadi ki acel." 
Leviticus7:25 Dano ducu ma ocamo dwolo lee mo ma gityero kwede gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot, wane birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi." 
Leviticus7:26 Dok pe wubicamo remo gin mo ducu, kadi bed me winyo nyo me lee, ka ma wubedo iye ducu," 
Leviticus7:27 Dano ma ocamo remo gin mo, waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi.”" 
Leviticus7:28 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus7:29 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, ŋat ma otyero gitumme me gityer lakwecwiny myero okel gityer mere ma okwanyo iye me amiya bot Rwot. Ki i kom gityer mere me lakwecwiny," 
Leviticus7:30 en bikelo gire ki ciŋe gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot; en bikelo dwolo ki gok, wek gikwat gok obed gityer me akwata i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus7:31 Ajwaka biwaŋo dwolo i wi keno tyer, ento gok bibedo pa Aron ki awobene," 
Leviticus7:32 Em malacuc wubimiyo bot ajwaka obed gityer mere ma oa ki i kom gitum me gityer lakwecwiny; 
Leviticus7:33 ŋat ma i kin awobe pa Aron ma otyero remo me gityer lakwecwiny, ki dwolone, bitero em malacuc obed waŋ watte." 
Leviticus7:34 Pien gok ma gikwato, ki em ma gityero, atyeko kwanyogi woko ki bot jo Icrael ki i kom gityergi me lakwecwiny, amiyogi bot ajwaka Aron ki bot awobene, ma myero jo Icrael gumi botgi dikdik." 
Leviticus7:35 Man aye waŋ wat pa Aron ki pa awo bene ma a ki i kom gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot, ma yam gikwero obed megi i nino ma yam gikelogi wek guti bot Rwot macalo ajwagi." 
Leviticus7:36 Rwot yam ociko ni jo Icrael gubed ka miyo botgi i kare ma yam giwirogi ki moo; man bibedo waŋ watgi matwal nio wa i kare pa likwayogi ducu.” 
Leviticus7:37 Man aye cik me gitum awaŋa, me gityer me moko kwon, me gitum me bal, me gitum me tiŋo alii, me keto ajwaka i dog tic, ki me gitum me gityer lakwecwiny," 
Leviticus7:38 ma yam Rwot ociko ki Moses i wi got Cinai i nino ma yam ociko iye jo Icrael ni gukel gityer megi bot Rwot, i tim Cinai." 
Leviticus8:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus8:2 “Ter Aron kacel ki awobene, ki boŋŋi arukagi, ki moo wir, ki twon me gitum me bal, ki nyogi romi aryo, ki aduku me mugati ma to bi pe iye;" 
Leviticus8:3 ci icok lwak ducu kacel i doggola kema me rwatte.” 
Leviticus8:4 Moses otiyo kit macalo Rwot ocike; ci lwak gucokke i doggola kema me rwatte. 
Leviticus8:5 Moses owaco bot lwak ni, “Man aye gin ma Rwot ociko ni giti.”" 
Leviticus8:6 Ci Moses okelo Aron ki awobene olwokogi ki pii. 
Leviticus8:7 Oruko Aron ki kanyi, otweyo pyere ki kitambara latwe pyer, ka dok oruke ki jor, oketo epod i kome, otweyo pyere ki ceme me epod ma gicweyo ki diro, otweyo, orido kwede i kome," 
Leviticus8:8 Oketo kicaa kor i kore, ka dok oketo Urim ki Tumim i kicaa kor." 
Leviticus8:9 Odwalo kitambara me adwala i wiye, ka otweyo akwaya jabu i kom kitambara me wic i nyime, me bedo lalukana maleŋ: macalo yam Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Leviticus8:10 Moses okwanyo moo wir ci owiro ki kema ki jami ducu ma, tye iye, okwerogi." 
Leviticus8:11 Okiro moo i kom keno tyer tyen abiro, ci owiro keno tyer ki jami ticce ducu ki moo, kacel ki otako lwok ki tedi tere, pi kwerogi," 
Leviticus8:12 Oonyo moo i wi Aron, owire kwede pi kwerone," 
Leviticus8:13 Moses dok okelo awobe pa Aron, orukogi ki kanyi, otweyo pyergi ki kitambara latwe pyer, ka otweyo gitok matino i wigi, macalo yam Rwot ociko ki Moses," 
Leviticus8:14 Lacen okelo twon me gitum me bal, ci Aron ki awobene guketo ciŋgi i wi twon me gitum me bal." 
Leviticus8:15 Moses oneko, ogwelo remone ci oreyo i kom ten keno aŋwen me keno tyer ki lwet ciŋe orumo kome ducu, olonyo kwede keno tyer, okwero pi kwanyo bal ki i kome." 
Leviticus8:16 Dok Moses okwanyo dwolo ducu ma i kom jam iye, ki okene ma i kom cwiny, ki olaŋ aryo ki dwologi ducu, owaŋogi i wi keno tyer." 
Leviticus8:17 Ento riŋo twon-nu ki pyenne ki wee iye owaŋo awaŋa ki mac woko wa i ŋe gony, macalo yam Rwot ociko ki Moses," 
Leviticus8:18 Ka man otum, okelo nyok romo me gitum awaŋa, ci Aron ki awobene guketo ciŋgi i wi nyok romo." 
Leviticus8:19 Moses oneko, ocoro remone i kom keno kyer kuy rumo kome ducu." 
Leviticus8:20 Ka doŋ giŋido ruŋo nyok romo woko, Moses owaŋo wiye ki riŋo ma giŋido-ni ki dwolone." 
Leviticus8:21 Jam iye ki tyene ducu gilwoko ki pii lacen Moses owaŋo riŋo nyok romo woko ducu ki berre i wi keno tyer obed gitum awaŋa, gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot, macalo yam Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Leviticus8:22 Lacen okelo nyok romo mukene, en nyok romo me keto dano i dog tic, ci Aron ki awobene guketo ciŋgi i wi nyok romo." 
Leviticus8:23 Moses oneko, ogwelo remone ci oreyo i ogwilo it Aron malacuc, ki i kom twon nyig ciŋe malacuc, ki i kom twon nyig tyene malacuc." 
Leviticus8:24 Gikelo awobe pa Aron ci Moses oreyo remo i ogwilo itgi malacuc, ki i kom twon nyig ciŋgi malacuc, ki i kom twon nyig tyengi malacuc; ka Moses ocoro remo i kom keno tyer kun rumo kome ducu." 
Leviticus8:25 Lacen okwanyo dwolo, ki moo yibe, ki dwolo ducu ma i kom jam iye, ki okene ma tye i kom cwiny, ki olaŋ aryo ducu kacel ki dwologi, ki em malacuc." 
Leviticus8:26 Ka okwanyo capat acel ma tobi pe iye ki i aduku me mugati ma tobi pe iye ma tye i nyim Rwot, ki capat acel me mugati ma girubo ki moo, ki capat acel marep, oketogi i wi dwolo ki i wi em malacuc." 
Leviticus8:27 Oketo magi ducu i dye cin Aron ki i dye cin awobene, okwatogi me bedo gityer me akwata i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus8:28 Lacen Moses okwanyogi ki i ciŋgi, owaŋogi woko i wi keno tyer kacel ki gitum awaŋa, obed gityer me keto dano i dog tic, gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot." 
Leviticus8:29 Moses okwanyo gok, okwato me bedo gityer akwata i nyim Rwot; en aye obedo waŋ wat pa Moses ma oa ki i kom nyok romo me ketogi i dog tic, macalo yam Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Leviticus8:30 Moses okwanyo moo wir ki remo man ok ma i wi keno tyer, okiro i kom Aron ki i kom boŋŋi arukane, ki i kom awo bene ki boŋŋi arukagi; kit meno okwero Aron ki boŋŋi arukane, ki awobene ki boŋŋi arukagi, gudoko maleŋ." 
Leviticus8:31 Moses owaco bot Aron ki awobene ni, “Wuted riŋo i doggola kema me rwatte, wucam ki kunnu, kacel ki mugati ma tye i aduku me gityer me ketowu i dog tic, macalo yam aciko kun awaco ni, ‘Aron ki awobene aye gibicamone.’" 
Leviticus8:32 Riŋo ki mugati ma odoŋ myero wuwan awaŋa ki mac," 
Leviticus8:33 Pe wubikato woko ki i doggola kema me rwatte pi nino abiro, nio ka kare me ketowu i dog tic ocobbe kakare, pien ketowu i dog tic bitero nino abiro." 
Leviticus8:34 Gin ma gibedo ka tiyone tin, yam Rwot ociko ni gitim me lakwany bal ki i komwu." 
Leviticus8:35 Wun wubibedo i doggola kema me rwatte pi nino abiro, kun wulubo gin ma Rwot ociko, wek pe wuto; pien gicika kit meno.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Aron ki awobene gutiyo gin ducu ma Rwot yam ociko ki i dog Moses. 
Leviticus9:1 I nino me aborone Moses olwoŋo Aron ki awobene ki ludoŋo pa jo Icrael," 
Leviticus9:2 ci owaco bot Aron ni, “Kwany wod twon, pi gitum me bal, ki nyok romo pi gitum awaŋa, ma pe komgi ki mwonyo ducu, wek ityergi i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus9:3 Dok iwac bot jo Icrael ni, ‘Wukwany nyok dyel pi gitum me bal, wod twon ki latin romo ma ditogi mwaka acel acel ma pe komgi ki mwonyo ducu, pi gitum awaŋa," 
Leviticus9:4 ki twon ki nyok romo pi gityer lakwecwiny, me atuma i nyim Rwot, ki gityer me moko kwon ma girubo ki moo; pien Rwot binen botwu tin.’ ”" 
Leviticus9:5 Gukelo gin ma Moses ociko i nyim kema me rwatte; ci lwak ducu gunyiko cok, gucuŋ i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus9:6 Moses owaco ni, “Man aye gin ma Rwot ociko ni wuti, ci deyo pa’ Rwot binen botwu.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Moses dok owaco bot Aron ni, “Nyik cok ki keno tyer, wek ityer gitum me balli ki gitum awaŋani, ci itim gin lakwany bal ki i komi ki i kom lwak. Dok ikel gityer pa lwak itim gin lakwany bal ki i komgi macalo yam Rwot ociko.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Aron ocako nyiko cok kt keno tyer ci oneko wod twon me gitum me bal ma onoŋo tye pire kikome. 
Leviticus9:9 Ka awobe pa Aron gumiyo remo bote, en oluto lwet cine i remo ci oreyo kom ten keno aŋwen me keno tyer, ka oonyo remo i te tedi keno tyer." 
Leviticus9:10 Ento dwolo ki olan aryo ki okene ma tye i kom cwiny ma okwanyo ki i kom gitum me bal en owaŋo woko i wi keno me tyer, macalo yam Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Leviticus9:11 Riŋone ki pyenne en owano awaŋa ki mac woko i ne gony. 
Leviticus9:12 Ka oneko gitum awaŋa, ci awobe pa Aron gumiyo remo bote, en ocoro i kom keno tyer kun rumo kome ducu." 
Leviticus9:13 Ka dok gumiyo gitum awaŋa bote i kit ma giŋido kwede, kacel ki wic ci en owanogi i wi keno tyer." 
Leviticus9:14 En olwoko jam iye ki tyene ducu, ci owanogi i wi keno tyer kacel ki gitum awaŋa." 
Leviticus9:15 Ka man otum, otyero gityer pa lwak, Okwanyo dyel me gitum me bal ma onoŋo tye pi lwak, ci oneko, otyero pi bal, macalo gitum me bal mukwono." 
Leviticus9:16 Ka dok omiyo gitum awaŋa, otyero kun lubo cik." 
Leviticus9:17 Ka otyero gityer me moko kwon, ojobo poŋ ciŋe, owaŋo i wi keno tyer, omedo i kom gitum awaŋa me odiko." 
Leviticus9:18 Oneko twon ki nyok romo bene en gitum me gityer lakwecwiny ma onoŋo tye pi lwak. Awobe pa Aron gumiyo remo bote, ci en ocoro i kom keno tyer kun rumo kome ducu." 
Leviticus9:19 Ka dok gumiye dwolo me twon ki me nyok romo, ki moo yibe, dwolo ma oumo jam iye, olan aryo, ki okene ki i kom cwiny." 
Leviticus9:20 Guketo dwolo i wi gok, ci owaŋo dwolo i wi keno tyer," 
Leviticus9:21 ento gok ki em malacuc Aron okwato me bedo gityer akwata i nyim Rwot, macalo Moses ociko." 
Leviticus9:22 Ka doŋ Aron otiŋo ciŋe malo tuŋ bot lwak, ci olamo gum i komgi, ci olor piny nia ki ka tyero gitum me bal ki gitum awaŋa ki gityer lakwecwiny ducu." 
Leviticus9:23 Lacen Moses ki Aron gudonyo i kema me rwatte; ka gukatti woko, ci gulamo gum i kom lwak, ci deyo pa Rwot onen bot lwak ducu." 
Leviticus9:24 Ka mac oa ki i nyim Rwot obino owaŋo gitum awaŋa ki dwolo ma i wi keno tyer, otyeko woko ducu. Ka lwak ducu oneno gudaŋŋe ki woo, gupoto piny aryeba ic." 
Leviticus10:1 Nadab ki Abiu, awobe pa Aron, ŋat acel acel okwanyo atabo weerre me waŋo odok eceta, oketo iye mac, ka oketo iye odok eceta, ci gutyero mac mapat i nyim Rwot, kit mac ma yam pe ocikogi kwede." 
Leviticus10:2 Ka mac oa ki i nyim Rwot, owaŋogi woko, ci guto woko ki i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus10:3 Ka Moses owaco bot Aron ni, “Man aye gin ma Rwot owaco, ni, ‘Abinyutte kekena i kin jo ma gitye cok kweda ni aleŋ, dok gibiketo deyo i koma i nyim lwak ducu.’ ” Ci Aron oliŋ gire mot." 
Leviticus10:4 Ka Moses olwoŋo Micael ki Elijapan, awobe pa Ujiel omin won Aron, owaco botgi ni, “Wunyik cok, wutiŋ omegiwu ki i nyim kabedo maleŋ, wutergi woko i ne gony.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Ci gunyiko cok, gutiŋogi ki kanyigi, guterogi woko i ne gony, kit macalo Moses owaco." 
Leviticus10:6 Moses owaco bot Aron ki bot Eleajar ki Itamar ma gin awobene ni, “Pe wugony yer wiwu oket ata lijayi, dok pe wuyec ginarukawu, wek pe wuto, dok wek kiniga pe opol i kom lwak ducu, Ento utmegiwu, jo ducu me ot pa Icrael, gitwero kok pi to ma mac pa Rwot okelo," 
Leviticus10:7 Pe wukat woko ki i doggola ke ma me rwatte, wek pe wuto, pien moo wir pa Rwot tye i komwu.” Ci gutiyo kit ma Moses owaco botgi." 
Leviticus10:8 Rwot oloko ki Aron kun waco ni," 
Leviticus10:9 “Pe imat koŋo yiŋo nyo gin ma mero dano, in kacel ki awobeni, ka onoŋo wucito i kema me rwatte, wek pe wuto; meno bibedo cik matwal nio wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu." 
Leviticus10:10 Myero wupok kin jami maleŋ ki jami ma pe leŋ, ki kin gin ma keni ki gin ma olony," 
Leviticus10:11 Dok wubipwonyo jo Icrael ki cik ducu ma Rwot ocikogi kwede ki i dog Moses,”" 
Leviticus10:12 Ci Moses owaco bot Aron, ki bot Eleajar ki Itamar, awobene ma yam gudoŋ, ni, “Wukwany gityer me moko kwon ma odoŋ ki i kom gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot, ci wucam ma to bi pe iye, i ŋet keno tyer, pien en gin maleŋ makato." 
Leviticus10:13 Myero wucam ki i kabedo mo maleŋ, pien en aye waŋ watti ki waŋ wat pa awobeni ma a ki i kom gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot; pien yam gicika kit meno." 
Leviticus10:14 Ento gok ma gikwato ki em ma gityero wubicamo i kabedo mo ma olony, in ki awobeni ki anyirani kacel, pien gimiyogi gubed waŋ watti ki waŋ wat pa awobeni, ma a ki i kom gityer lakwecwiny pa jo Icrael." 
Leviticus10:15 Em ma gityero ki gok ma gikwato-ni gibikek kacel ki gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac ma en aye dwolo, wek gikwat i nyim Rwot me gityer akwata. Bibedo meri ki pa awobeni kacel kwedi; en cik ma bibedo matwal, macalo yam Rwot ociko.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Ka Moses openyo mot pi dyel me gitum me bal, ci onoŋo ni doŋ giwaŋo woko. Akemo omake i kom Eleajar ki Itamar, awobe pa Aron ma con gudoŋŋi, owaco ni," 
Leviticus10:17 “Piŋo pe wucamo gitum me bal ki i kabedo maleŋ? Pien en gin maleŋ makato ma gimiyowu wek wutin bal pa lwak, pi timo gin lakwany bal ki i komgi i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus10:18 Nenu, wa remone pe gukelo i tyelo i kabedo maleŋ. Yam myero wucam ki i kabedo maleŋ, macalo yam aciko.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Aron ogamo dog Moses ni, “Nen, tin gutyero gitum me bal ki gitum awanagi i nyim Rwot, ci gin macalo man doŋ opoto i koma, Ka kono abedo ka camo gitum me bal tin, kono obedo myero i waŋ Rwot?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Ka Moses owinyo lok meno, ci iye okwe." 
Leviticus11:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni," 
Leviticus11:2 “Wuwac bot io Icrael ni, Man aye gin makwo ma wutwero camo ki i kin lee ducu ma tye i wi lobo." 
Leviticus11:3 Lee ducu ma oboŋ tyengi akara, ma kin tyengi opokke, ma nyamo omen, ma i k in lee ducu wutwero camone." 
Leviticus11:4 Ento lee ma nyamo omen nyo ma oboŋ tyengi akara ma pe wubicamo gin ene: Kinaga kadi en nyamo omen, ento obon tyene pe akara; pienno bedo keni botwu, wubikwerone." 
Leviticus11:5 Ki oduka nyamo omen, ento oboŋ tyene pe akara; pienno bedo keni botwu, wubikwerone." 
Leviticus11:6 Ki apwoyo bene kadi en nyamo omen, ento oboŋ tyene pe akara; pienno bedo keni botwu, wubikwero." 
Leviticus11:7 Ki opego, kadi oboŋ tyene akara, kin tyene opokke, ento pe nyamo omen; pienno bedo keni botwu, wubikwero." 
Leviticus11:8 Pe wucam rinogi, pe wugud wa komgi ma oto bene; gin bedo keni botwu, wubikwerogi." 
Leviticus11:9 “Magi aye wutwero camogi ki i kin gin ducu ma bedo i pii. Gin ducu ma bedo i pii ma tye ki kiŋa ŋegi ki pok komgi, ma i nam ki ma i kulu ducu, wutwero camogi." 
Leviticus11:10 Ento gin ducu ma tye i nam ki i kulu ducu ma pe ki kiŋa ŋegi ki pok komgi i kin gin ma corre limuk i pii ki i kin gin makwo ma bedo i pii, bedo gin me kwer botwu." 
Leviticus11:11 Gibibedo me kwer botwu; pe wubicamo riŋogi, dok komgi mutone bene bedo me kwer botwu." 
Leviticus11:12 Gin ducu ma i pii ma pe ki kiŋa ŋegi ki pok komgi bedo me kwer botwu," 
Leviticus11:13 “Magi aye gin ma bibedo me kwer botwu ki i kin winyo; pe gibicamogi, gin gibedo me kwer: ocur, acut, koga," 
Leviticus11:14 okwata, ocecu ki kit kwagi ducu;" 
Leviticus11:15 agak ki kit kwagi ducu; 
Leviticus11:16 udu, tebu, wetwet, olwilwit ki kit kwagi ducu;" 
Leviticus11:17 tula, alwinya, adyeladyel," 
Leviticus11:18 lagweno kulu, kikuŋ, ki ocur madito," 
Leviticus11:19 acebe, ogoro ki kit kwagi ducu; ki putput, ki olik." 
Leviticus11:20 “Kwidi ducu ma tye ki bwomgi, ma giwoto ki tyengi aŋwen, bedo me kwer botwu." 
Leviticus11:21 Ento i kin kwidi ma tye ki bwomgi, ma giwoto ki tyengi aŋwen, wutwero camo gin ma tye ki tyengi mabocone ma gipye kwede i wi lobo." 
Leviticus11:22 Wutwero ca mo magi i kingi: bonyo ki kit kwagi ducu; ocenne ki kit kwagi ducu, labari ki kit kwagi ducu; ki otwoŋo ki i kit kwagi ducu," 
Leviticus11:23 Ento kwidi mukene ducu ma gitye ki bwomgi, ma gitye ki tyengi aŋwen, gibedo-me kwer botwu." 
Leviticus11:24 “Magi gin ma bimiyo wudoko keni; ŋat ma ogudo kom mutone bibedo keni nie wa otyeno. 
Leviticus11:25 Ŋat ma ot iŋo dul komgi mo muto-ni bilwoko boŋŋine ci bibedo keni nio wa otyeno. 
Leviticus11:26 Lee ducu ma oboŋ tyene akara, ento kin tyene pe opokke, nyo ma pe nyamo omen, bedo keni botwu; ŋat ma ogudo komgi bibedo keni." 
Leviticus11:27 Ki lee ducu ma woto ki opany tyengi, i kin lee ducu ma giwoto ki tyengi aŋwen, bedo keni botwu. Ŋat ma ogudo kom mutone bibedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus11:28 Dok ŋat ma ot iŋo kom mutone bilwoko boŋŋine ci bibedo keni nio wa otyeno; gin bedo keni botwu, wubikwerogi." 
Leviticus11:29 “Man aye gin ma bedo keni botwu ki i kin gin ma nya ma corre limuk i wi lobo: oculi, oyoo adeŋ, lagwe lakaka ki kit kwagi ducu," 
Leviticus11:30 laromo ot, ŋec, lagwe kweyo, ki laŋogo." 
Leviticus11:31 Man aye gin makeni botwu ki i kin gin ducu ma gicorre limuk; ŋat ma ogudo komgi ka guto bibedo keni nio wa otyeno," 
Leviticus11:32 Ka mo i kingi ma doŋ oto opoto i kom jami mo-ni, jami-nu bibedo keni, kadi weer, nyo boŋo aruka, nyo laa, nyo kicaa, jami mo keken ma gitiyo kwede pi kit tic mo-ni; myero giket i pii, ci bibedo keni nio wa otyeno, ka doŋ bibedo ma olony." 
Leviticus11:33 Dok ka mo i kingi opoto i agulu, nyo atabo nyo kit gin mo macalo meno ma gicweyo ki lobo, gin ducu ma tye iye bibedo keni, agulu nyo atabo-gu wubineko woko." 
Leviticus11:34 Ginacama mo ma gicamo ma tye iye, ma gionyo iye pii, bibedo keni; ki ginamata ma gimato ki i agulu-ni nyo atabo-gu bibedo keni," 
Leviticus11:35 Jami ducu ma dul komgi mo muto-ni opoto i kome bibedo keni, kadi keno nyo tuk keno gibimuko woko; gin gudoko keni, ci gibibedo keni botwu." 
Leviticus11:36 Kadi bed kumeno, waŋ it nyo bur taŋi me jolo pii bibedo ma olony; ento gin ducu ma ogudo kom mutone bibedo keni." 
Leviticus11:37 Ka dul komgi muto-ni opoto i kom kodi mo me acoya, ma gibicoyo, kodi-nu bibedo ma olony;" 
Leviticus11:38 ento ka onoŋo gionyo pii i kom kodinu, ce dul komgi mo muto-ni opoto i kome, ci bedo keni botwu." 
Leviticus11:39 “Ka lee mo ma gicamo oto woko, ŋat ma ogudo geŋŋe bibedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus11:40 Ŋat ma ocamo geŋ meno bilwoko boŋŋine ci bibedo keni nio wa otyeno. Dok ŋat ma otiŋo geŋ-ŋu bilwoko boŋŋine, ci bibedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus11:41 “Gin ducu ma nya ma corre limuk i wi lobo gin aye gin me kwer; pe gibicamone. 
Leviticus11:42 Gin ducu ma woto kun ywane ki iye, ki gin ducu ma woto ki tyengi aŋwen, nyo ma tye ki lwak tyengi mapol, gin ducu ma nya ma corre limuk i wi lobo pe wubicamogi, pien gin aye gin me kwer." 
Leviticus11:43 Pe wulokke wudok gin me kwer pi gin mo-ni ma nya ma corre limuk; dok pe wuballe wudok keni pigi. 
Leviticus11:44 Pien an a Rwot Lubaŋawu; pi meno wulonnye kekenwu wubed maleŋ, pien an aleŋ. Pe wuballe wudok keni pi gin mo ma corre limuk ma lak i wi lobo." 
Leviticus11:45 Pien an aye a Rwot ma akwanyowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt, wek abed Lubaŋawu; mumiyo wubed jo maleŋ, pien an aleŋ.”" 
Leviticus11:46 Man aye cik ma otiko lee ki winyo ki gin makwo ducu ma kwan i pii, ki gin ducu ma corre limuk i wi lobo," 
Leviticus11:47 wek dano gupok kin gin ma keni ki gin ma olony, ki kin gin makwo ma gitwero camo ki gin makwo ma pe gitwero camo." 
Leviticus12:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus12:2 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, Ka dako ogamo ic ce onywalo latin laco, en bibedo keni pi nino abiro; bibedo keni macalo i kare me two kwer." 
Leviticus12:3 I nino me aborone en aye gibiliro iye del kom nyim latin me co. 
Leviticus12:4 Dako dok bimedde pi nino pyeradek wiye adek wek olonnye pi remo me kwerre; pe bigudo gin mo maleŋ, pe bicito i ot pa Lubaŋa, nio ka kare me lonnyene otum." 
Leviticus12:5 Ento ka onywalo latin nyako, en bibedo keni macalo i kare me two kwer pi cabit aryo; dok bimedde pi nino pyerabicel wiye abicel wek olonnye pi remo me kwer mere." 
Leviticus12:6 “Ka kare me lonnyene otum, ka nyo pi awobi nyo pi nyako, dako bikelo latin romo ma ditte romo mwaka acel bot ajwaka i doggola kema me rwatte pi gitum awaŋa, ki latin akuri, nyo amam, pi gitum me bal." 
Leviticus12:7 Ajwaka bityero i nyim Rwot, bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kom dako, ci doŋ bilonnye ki i remone ma ocwer. Man aye cik ma mako dako ma onywalo latin laco nyo ma nyako." 
Leviticus12:8 Ka noŋo latin romo oloye, en bitero amam aryo, nyo litino akuri aryo, acel pi gitum awaŋa, acel pi gitum me bal: ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome, ci doŋ bedo ma olonnye.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni," 
Leviticus13:2 “Ka dano mo del kome okwot, nyo orugo, nyo orobo, ci odoko two me dobo i del kome, ci myero gikele bot ajwaka Aron, nyo bot ŋat acel i kin awobene ma gin aye ajwagi." 
Leviticus13:3 Ajwaka biŋiyo two ma orobo i del kome-ni; ci ka yer ma i del kome ma orobo-ni odoko lwar matar, dok ka twone onen ni ogolle matut ma okato del kome, ci meno two dobo, Ka ajwaka doŋ oniyo kome, ci bituco ni, kome ki keni," 
Leviticus13:4 Ento ka del kome-ni orobo matar kun nen ni pe ogolle matut okato del, dok ka yer ma tye iye bene pe olokke odoko lwar, ci ajwaka bitweyo dano ma latwo-ni i ot pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus13:5 I nino me abirone ajwaka dok biŋiyo kome, ci ka onen bote ni two doŋ ocuŋ, pe onya omedde i del kome, ci ajwaka bimedo tweyo dano-nu i ot pi nino abiro mukene." 
Leviticus13:6 I nino me abirone ajwaka dok biŋiyo kome, ci ka two ma orobo kome-ni doŋ ojwik woko, dok two pe on ya omedde i del kome, ci ajwaka bituco ni kome pe ki keni; orugo aruga noŋo. Dano-nu myero olwok boŋŋine ci bibedo ma olony." 
Leviticus13:7 Ento ka ce kome ma orugo-ni onya omedde i delkome, ma doŋ onoŋo onyutte kene bot ajwaka pi lonnyene, ci en myero dok obin i nyim ajwaka," 
Leviticus13:8 Ajwaka biŋiyo, ci ka onoŋo ni kome ma orugo-ni doŋ onya omedde i del kome, ajwaka bituco ni kome ki keni, meno two dobo." 
Leviticus13:9 “Ka dano mo two dobo omako gibikele bot ajwaka. 
Leviticus13:10 Ajwaka biŋiyo, ci ka del kome mo tye ma okwot ma okwor matar, ma otyeko loko yer odoko lwar, dok bur odet manyen ka ma okwot-ti," 
Leviticus13:11 meno noŋo two dobo ma yam ori i del kome. Ajwaka bituco ni kome ki keni; pe bitweyone i ot, pien kome ki keni." 
Leviticus13:12 Ka dobo ocorre i del kome, ma two dobo oromo del kom dano ma latwo-ni, nia i wiye nio wa i tyene, ma ajwaka twero neno ducu," 
Leviticus13:13 ci ajwaka biŋiyo. Ka dobo oromo kome ducu, ci ajwaka bituco ni olony i kom two meno; noŋo kome ducu okwor matar, kome pe ki keni." 
Leviticus13:14 Ento ka bur odet ma nen i kome, ci kome bibedo ki keni," 
Leviticus13:15 Ajwaka biŋiyo bur mudet manyen-ni, ci bituco ni kome ki keni; bur mudet manyen bedo keni, meno two dobo." 
Leviticus13:16 Fnto ka ce bur mudet manyen-ni dok olokke odoko matar, ci bidwogo bot ajwaka." 
Leviticus13:17 Ajwaka biŋiyo kome, ci ka two odoko matar, ajwaka bituco ni latwo kome pe ki keni; en doŋ olonnye." 
Leviticus13:18 “Ka ŋatti i mo odeke okwot i del kome, ci ocaŋ obone woko," 
Leviticus13:19 ka ce lacen dok ojer okwot i waŋ odeke-nu ma okwor matar, nyo orobo matar kun bedo makwarkwar, ci myero ginyut bot ajwaka." 
Leviticus13:20 Ajwaka biŋiyo, ci ka onen ni ogolle matut okato del kom, ki yer bene odoko lwar, ajwaka bituco ni kome ki keni: meno two dobo ma otyer i waŋ odeke." 
Leviticus13:21 Ento ka ajwaka oniyo, ci yer ma tye iye pe lwar, dok pe ogolle matut ma okato del kom, ento doŋ ojwik woko, ci ajwaka bitweyo dano-nu i ot pi nino abiro," 
Leviticus13:22 Ka onya omedde i del kome, ci ajwaka bituco ni kome ki keni, pien meno two." 
Leviticus13:23 Ento ka ce waŋe ma orobo-ni ogik i kabedo acel ma pe on ya omedde, meno po yo waŋ odeke keken, ci ajwaka bituco ni kome pe ki keni." 
Leviticus13:24 “Nyo ka dano mo mac owaŋo, opwaco del kome, ce bur odet manyen i waŋ ka ma opwac-ci, ci orobo matar kun obedo makwarkwar, nyo okwor matar," 
Leviticus13:25 ci ajwaka biŋiyo, Ka yer ma i waŋe odoko lwar, dok onen ni ogolle matut, okato del kom, meno two dobo otyer i waŋ ka ma opwac-ci. Ajwaka bituco ni kome ki keni; meno two dobo." 
Leviticus13:26 Ento ka ajwaka oniyo, ci yer ma i wane ma orobo-ni pe lwar, dok pe ogolle matut ma okato del kom, ento ojwik woko, ci ajwaka bitweyo dano-nu i ot pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus13:27 I nino me abirone ajwaka biŋiyo; ka tye ka nya medde i del kome, ci ajwaka bituco ni kome ki keni; meno two dobo," 
Leviticus13:28 Ento ka ce waŋe ma orobo-ni ogik i kabedo acel ma pe onya omedde i del kome, ento ojwik woko, meno gin ma okwot i waŋ ka ma opwac keken; ajwaka bituco ni ko me pe ki keni, pien meno waŋ po yo ka ma mac owaŋo." 
Leviticus13:29 “Ka laco mo nyo dako mo two tye i wiye nyo i yer tike," 
Leviticus13:30 ajwaka biŋiyo twone. Ka onen ni ogolle matut okato del kom, dok yer ma tye iye odoko ocwakocwak, dok ojwer woko, ci ajwaka bituco ni kome ki keni; meno two akukuc, en dobo me wic nyo me yer tik." 
Leviticus13:31 Ka ajwaka oniyo two akukuc, ka onen ni ogolle matut okato del kom, kun yer macol pe iye, ci ajwaka bitweyo dano meno ma tye ki two akukuc i ot pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus13:32 I nino me abirone ajwaka bi niyo twone; ka akukuc pe on ya omedde, dok pe tye iye yer ma obedo ocwakocwak, dok akukuc pe onen ni ogolle matut okato del kom," 
Leviticus13:33 ci dano-nu bilyelo wiye woko, ento pe bilyelo ka ma obedo akukuc-ci. Ajwaka bimedo tweyo dano meno i ot pi nino abiro mukene." 
Leviticus13:34 I nino me abirone ajwaka biŋiyo akukuc; ka akukuc pe onya omedde i del kome, kun nen ni pe ogolle matut okato del kom, ci ajwaka bituco ni ko me pe ki keni. En bilwoko boŋŋine ci bibedo ma olony." 
Leviticus13:35 Ento ka ce akukuc onya omedde i del kome i ŋe lonnyene," 
Leviticus13:36 ci ajwaka biŋiyo kome, Ka akukuc omedde i del kome, ajwaka pe dok oyeny yer ma obedo ocwakocwak; kome ki keni." 
Leviticus13:37 Ento ka onen bote ni akukuc doŋ ocuŋ, dok yer macol tye olot iye, akukuc doŋ ocaŋ woko, en doŋ olonnye; ajwaka bituco ni kome pe ki keni." 
Leviticus13:38 “Ka laco mo nyo dako mo del kome orobo, kome oonyo ma okwor matar," 
Leviticus13:39 ajwaka biŋiyo. Ka del kome orobo, kome oonyo ma pe okwor matar twatwal, noŋo del ko me oonyo odugo aduga keken; kome pe ki keni," 
Leviticus13:40 “Ka yer wi laco mo otal oo woko, en bedo lawiye otal, ento kome pe ki keni." 
Leviticus13:41 Dok ka laco mo yer olwer woko ki i tur nyime nyo i teŋ wiye, en bedo ma wiye otal i tur nyime, ento kome pe ki keni." 
Leviticus13:42 Ento ka tye two mo i wiye nyo i tur nyime mutal-li ma orobo matar kun obedo makwarkwar, meno two dobo aye ma ocorre i wiye ma otal-li, nyo i tur nyime ma otal-li." 
Leviticus13:43 Ajwaka biŋiyo kome: ci ka two ma okwoto wiye mutal-li nyo tur nyime mutal-li obedo matar makwarkwar, kun nen calo two dobo ma i del kom dano," 
Leviticus13:44 en dano ma ladobo, ko me ki keni. Ajwaka myero otuc ni kome ki keni; twone tye i wiye." 
Leviticus13:45 “Ladobo ma tye ki two dobo myero oruk boŋŋi ma oket, bigonyo yer wiye ket ata lijayi, ci umo del doge mamalo woko, ka daŋŋe ni, ‘Koma ki keni, koma ki keni.’" 
Leviticus13:46 En bibedo keni pi kare ducu me twone; kome ki keni. En bibedo i kabedone kene, woko i ŋe gony." 
Leviticus13:47 “Ka ce two dobo tye i kom ginaruka mo, kadi bed me boŋo yer romo nyo boŋo camanini," 
Leviticus13:48 i kom uci ma atirre nyo i kom uci ma ariine, nyo i kom laa, nyo i kom gin mo ma gitiyo ki laa," 
Leviticus13:49 ka two nen atworo-atworo nyo makwarkwar i kom boŋo, i kom uci ma atirre nyo i kom uci ma ariine, nyo i kom gin mo ma gitiyo ki laa, meno two dobo, myero ginyut bot ajwaka." 
Leviticus13:50 Ajwaka biŋiyo two meno, ci bitweyo wi jami ma two tye iye-ni pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus13:51 I nino me’ abirone en biŋiyo two-nu. Ka two onya omedde i ginaruka, i kom uci ma atirre nyo i kom uci ma ariine, nyo i kom laa, kadi bed laa ma giyubo pi kit tic mo, meno aye dobo ma ŋuno jami; jami-nu keni," 
Leviticus13:52 Ajwaka biwaŋo ginaruka meno, kadi bed two tye i kom uci ma atirre nyo i kom uci ma ariine, i boŋo yer romo nyo i boŋo camanini, nyo i kom gin mo ma gitiyo ki laa, pien meno two dobo ma nuno jami; gibiwaŋo woko awaŋa ki mac." 
Leviticus13:53 “Ka ajwaka oniyo, ce two pe onya omedde i ginaruka, i kom uci ma atirre nyo i kom uci ma ariine, nyo i kom gin mo ma gitiyo ki laa," 
Leviticus13:54 ci ajwaka biciko ni gilwok jami ma two tye iye-ni, ci bimedo tweyo wiye pi nino abiro mukene." 
Leviticus13:55 Dok ajwaka biŋiyo jami ma two tye iye-ni i ne lwokogi. Ka raŋi pe olokke ka ma two tye iye-ni, kadi bed two pe onya omedde, jami-nu keni; wubiwaŋo woko awaŋa ki mac, kadi bed two oŋuno tuŋ ŋeye nyo tuŋ iye." 
Leviticus13:56 “Ento ka ce ajwaka oniyo, ci two pe nen twatwal i ne lwokone, en biyeco dul meno woko ki i kom ginaruka, nyo ki i kom laa, ki i kom ucine ma atirre nyo i kom uci ma ariine." 
Leviticus13:57 Lacen ka two dok onen i kom ginaruka-nu, nyo i kom ucine ma atirre nyo i kom uci ma ariine, nyo i kom gin mo ma gitiyo ki laa, noŋo tye ka nya medde; gin ma two tye iye-ni wubiwano woko awaŋa ki mac." 
Leviticus13:58 Ento ginaruka, kadi bed uci ma atirre nyo uci ma ariine, nyo gin mo ma gitiyo ki laa, ma two oa i kome ka ilwoko, myero gilwok tyen me aryo, ci bibedo ma olonnye.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Man aye cik ma mako two dobo ma i kom ginaruka me boŋo yer romo nyo boŋo camanini, i kom uci ma atirre nyo i kom uci ma ariine, nyo i kom gin mo ma gitiyo ki laa, pi ŋolo ka olony nyo keni." 
Leviticus14:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus14:2 “Man aye bibedo cik ma mako ladobo i nino me lonnyene. Gibikele bot ajwaka," 
Leviticus14:3 ci ajwaka bikato woko i ŋe gony ka niyo kome. Ka two dobo doŋ ocaŋ woko ki i kome," 
Leviticus14:4 ci ajwaka biciko ni gikel winyo makwo aryo ma olony, te lokke ni, winyo ma gitwero camogi, ki yat cedar, uci makwar, ki anyero, pi dano ma gimito lonyo-ni." 
Leviticus14:5 Ajwaka biciko ni gitwom pii ma mol, giony i otako, ci ginek winyo acel ki malo i wi pii meno." 
Leviticus14:6 En bimako winyo makwo kacel ki yat cedar ki uci makwar-ri ki anyero, ci lutogi kacel ki winyo makwo i remo winyo ma onoŋo gineko ki malo i wi pii mamol-li." 
Leviticus14:7 Bikiro remo i kom dano ma gimito lonyo i kom dobo-ni tyen abiro; lacen bituco ni en doŋ olonnye, ci biweko winyo makwo-ni tuk dok woko i tim." 
Leviticus14:8 Ci dano ma obino pi lonnye bilwoko boŋŋine, bilyelo yer kome ducu, ka lwoko kome ki pii, ci bibedo ma olonnye. I ŋe meno en doŋ cako bino i gony, ento bibuto woko i ne kemanepi nino abiro." 
Leviticus14:9 I nino me abirone bilyelo yer wiye ducu, dok bilyelo yer tike ki yer pyen waŋe ki yer kome ducu. Ka dok bilwoko boŋŋine, bilwoko kome ki pii, ci doŋ bedo ma olonnye." 
Leviticus14:10 “Dok i nino me aborone en bitero litino nyogi romi aryo ma komgi pe ki mwonyo, ki bwoŋ romo ma ditte romo mwaka acel, ki gityer me moko kwon ma romo agwata adek, moko mapwotte ma girubo ki moo, ki moo ma romo cupa acel." 
Leviticus14:11 Ajwaka ma lonyo en-ni bitero dano ma gilonyo-ni, cibo kacel ki jamine i nyim Rwot i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus14:12 Ajwaka bikwanyo nyok romo acel, bityero me gitum pi alii, kacel ki cupa moo acel-lu, ci kwatogi me bedo gityer akwata i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:13 Bineko latin romo-nu i kabedo ma gineko iye gitum pi bal ki gitum awaŋa, i kabedo maleŋ, pien gitum me alii rom ki gitum me bal, ducu bedo pa ajwaka; en gin maleŋ makato." 
Leviticus14:14 Ajwaka bigwelo remo me gitum me alii, bireyo i ogwilo it dano ma gilonyo-ni, malacuc, ki i kom twon nyig ciŋe malacuc, ki i twon nyig tyene malacuc." 
Leviticus14:15 Ka ajwaka bikwanyo moo ma romo cupa acel-li, bitono manok i dye ciŋe malacam," 
Leviticus14:16 ka luto lwet ciŋe malacuc i moo ma i dye ciŋe malacam-mi, ci kiro moo ki nyig ciŋe tyen abiro i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:17 Moo ma odon i ciŋe ajwaka bireyo i ogwilo it daŋo ma gilonyo-ni malacuc, ki i twon nyig cine malacuc, ki i twon nyig tyene malacuc, i kom remo me gitum me alii." 
Leviticus14:18 Moo ma odoŋ i ciŋ ajwaka en bidunyo i wi dano ma gilonyo-ni, ka ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:19 Ajwaka bityero gitum me bal me kwanyo bal ki; kom dano ma gimito lonyo keni ma i keme-ni. Lacen en bineko gitum awaŋa," 
Leviticus14:20 ci ajwaka bityero gitum awaŋa kacel ki gitum me moko kwon i wi keno tyer, Kit meno ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome, ci doŋ bilonnye."
