Leviticus14:21 “Ento ka en lacan ma noŋo meno ducu oloye, en bikwanyo latin nyok romo acel obed gitum me alii me akwata, pi kwanyo bal ki i kome, ki agwata moko kwon acel me moko mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon, ki moo ma romo cupa acel;" 
Leviticus14:22 dok amam aryo nyo litino akuri aryo, macalo en romo noŋone; acel bibedo gitum me bal, acel bibedo gitum awaŋa," 
Leviticus14:23 I nino me aborone en bikelo bot ajwaka pi lonnyene i doggola kema me rwatte i nyim Rwot. 
Leviticus14:24 Ajwaka bikwanyo latin romo me gitum me alii, kacel ki moo ma romo cupa acel-li, bikwatogi me bedo gityer akwata i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:25 Ka dok bineko latin romo me gitum me alii; ci ajwaka bigwelo remo me gitum me alii, bireyo i ogwilo it dano ma gilonyo-ni malacuc, ki i twon nyig ciŋe malacuc, ki i twon nyig tyene malacuc." 
Leviticus14:26 Ka ajwaka bitono moo manok i dye ciŋe malacam," 
Leviticus14:27 ci bikiro moo ma i dye ciŋe malacam-mi tyen abiro i nyim Rwot ki nyig ciŋe malacuc. 
Leviticus14:28 Ka ajwaka bireyo moo ma i ciŋe malacuc i ogwilo it dano ma gilonyo-ni, ki i twon nyig ciŋe malacuc, ki i twon nyig tyene malacuc, ka ma gireyo iye remo me gitum me alii." 
Leviticus14:29 Moo ma odoŋ i ciŋe ajwaka bidunyo i wi dano ma gilonyo-ni, me lakwany bal ki i kome i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:30 I kom amam nyo litino akuri ma en romo noŋone," 
Leviticus14:31 en bityero acel pi gitum me bal, acel pi gitum awaŋa, kacel ki gityer me moko kwon; ci ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kom dano ma gilonyoni, i nyim Rwot." 
Leviticus14:32 Man aye cik ma mako dano ma tye ki two dobo, ma pe romo noŋo gityer ducu ma giciko pi lonnyene.”" 
Leviticus14:33 Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni," 
Leviticus14:34 “Ka doŋ wuo i lobo Kanaan ma abimiyowu me bedo mewu, ka ce aketo two dobo i ot mo i lobo ma abimiyowuni," 
Leviticus14:35 ci won ot bicito tito bot ajwaka kun waco ni, ‘I oda nen calo tye iye kit two mo.’" 
Leviticus14:36 Ajwaka biciko ni gicok jami, gikel woko wek ot odoŋ ma iye nono ma noŋo peya en ajwaka odonyo iye ka ŋiyo two, wek pe gituc ni jami ducu ma tye i ot bedo keni; lacen ajwaka bidonyo ka ŋiyo ot." 
Leviticus14:37 En biŋiyo two; ka ce twone tye i kor ot kun omido ma obedo atworo atworo, nyo omido makwarkwar, ka nen ni odonyo wa matut i kor ot," 
Leviticus14:38 ci ajwaka bikato woko ki i ot meno, cito i doggolane, cego dog otte woko pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus14:39 I nino me abirone ajwaka dok dwogo ci neno. Ka two onya omedde i kor ot," 
Leviticus14:40 ci ajwaka biciko ni gimuk matafali got ma two omido iye-ni, gibolgi woko i ne gaŋ i kabedo ma pe olony." 
Leviticus14:41 Dok bimiyo gicwero i ot rumo woko ducu, lobo ma gicwero i kor ot-ti gibionyo woko i ne gaŋ i kabedo ma pe olony." 
Leviticus14:42 Ka dok gibikelo matafali got mukene, giketogi i kabedo ma gikwanyo iye godi-ni, ka dok gikelo lobo mukene, ci gipuyo ki ot meno." 
Leviticus14:43 “Ka two dok otuc i ot meno, ma onoŋo doŋ gityeko muko godi woko, dok gicwero kor ot, gipuyo odoco," 
Leviticus14:44 ci ajwaka dok bidok ka nenone. Ka two onya omedde i ot aye, meno two dobo ma ŋuno kor ot; ot-ti keni." 
Leviticus14:45 Gibimuko ot meno gireto woko piny, godine ki baone ki lobo ma gipuyo kwede ducu, gibiterogi woko i ŋe gaŋ i kabedo ma pe olony." 
Leviticus14:46 Dano ma odonyo i ot meno ma onoŋo gicego woko-ni bibedo keni nio wa otyeno 
Leviticus14:47 Dano ma obuto piny i ot meno bilwoko boŋŋine; dok ŋat ma ocamo i at-tu bilwoko boŋŋine," 
Leviticus14:48 “Ento ka ajwaka obino, oŋiyo ot ce onoŋo two pe onya omedde nia ma gipuyo-ni, ci ajwaka bituco ni otte pe keni, pien twone doŋ ocaŋ." 
Leviticus14:49 Pi lonyo ot, en bikwanyo litino winyo aryo, kacel ki yat cedar ki uci makwar ki anyero." 
Leviticus14:50 Gibitwomo pii ma mol i otako, ci en bineko winyo acel ki malo i wi pii meno." 
Leviticus14:51 Bimako yat cedar ki anyero ki uci makwar, kacel ki winyo makwo, ci lutogi i remo winyo ma onoŋo gineko malo ki i wi pii mamol-li, ci kiro kom ot tyen abiro." 
Leviticus14:52 Kit meno en bilonyo ot ki remo winyo, kacel ki pii mamol-li, ki winyo makwo, ki yat cedar, ki anyero ki uci makwar-ri," 
Leviticus14:53 ci biweko winyo makwo tuk dok woko i tim i ne gaŋ. Kit meno en bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kom ot, ci bibedo ma olony.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Man aye cik ma mako two dobo ducu: pi two akukuc," 
Leviticus14:55 pi two dobo ma i kom ginaruka nyo i kom ot," 
Leviticus14:56 nyo pi gin ma okwot, nyo orugo, nyo orobo del kom dano," 
Leviticus14:57 pi nyuto ka obedo keni nyo ma olony. Man aye cik ma mako dobo," 
Leviticus15:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni," 
Leviticus15:2 “Wuwac bot jo Icrael ni, Ka laco mo kome cwer tut, cwer tutte miyo kome bedo ki keni." 
Leviticus15:3 Dok man aye cik ma mako dano ma kome ki keni pi cwer tut, ka nyo kome mol tut, nyo ka tut ma cwer i kome ocony, noŋo kome ki keni." 
Leviticus15:4 Kitanda ducu ma dano ma kome cwer tut obuto iye bibedo keni, ki gin ducu ma en obedo iye bibedo keni." 
Leviticus15:5 Ŋat ma ogudo kom kitandane myero olwok boŋŋine, olwok kome ki pii, ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus15:6 Ŋat ma obedo i kom gin ma dano ma kome cwer tut obedo iye bilwoko boŋŋine, lwoko kome ki pii, ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus15:7 Ŋat ma ogudo kom dano ma kome cwer tut-ti bilwoko bomji ne, lwoko kome ki pii, ci bedo kem nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus15:8 Ka ŋat ma kome cwer tut oŋulo laa i kom dano mo ma olony, dano-nu bilwoko boŋŋine, lwoko kome ki pii, ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus15:9 Kom mo me bedo i wi kinaga ma dano ma kome cwer tut obedo i wiye bibedo keni. 
Leviticus15:10 Ka ŋat ma ogudo gin mo ma en obedo nyo obuto iye, bibedo keni nio wa otyeno; ki ŋat ma otiŋo jami meno bilwoko boŋŋine, bilwoko kome ki pii, ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno," 
Leviticus15:11 Ka dano ma kome cwer tut ogudo kom dano mo ma onoŋo pe olako ciŋe ki pii, dano-nu bilwoko boŋŋine, lwoko kome ki pii, ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus15:12 Ka dano ma kome cwer tut ogudo kom agulu mo, ci agulune gibineko woko, ki jami macalo weer bao ducu gibilako komgi ki pii." 
Leviticus15:13 “Ka dano mo ma kome cwer tut kome doŋ olony, ci bikwano nino abiro pi lonnyene, ka bilwoko boŋŋine, lwoko kome i pii mamol, ci bedo ma ko me pe ki keni." 
Leviticus15:14 I nino me aborone en bitero amam aryo nyo litino akuri aryo, bibino i nyim Rwot i doggola kema me rwatte, bimiyogi bot ajwaka." 
Leviticus15:15 Ajwaka bityerogi, acel me gitum me bal, acel me gitum awaŋa; kit meno ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome i nyim Rwot pi kome ma obedo ka cwer tut-ti." 
Leviticus15:16 “Ka laco mo kodi me co ne omol i kome, en bilwoko kome ducu ki pii, ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus15:17 Ginaruka nyo pyen ducu ma kodine me co omol i kome myero gilwok ki pii, ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus15:18 Ka laco obuto ki dako ci kodi me co odonyo i kome, gin aryo ducu gibilwoko komgi ki pii, ci gibibedo keni nio wa otyeno," 
Leviticus15:19 “Dako ma remo mol ki i kome i kit me nino ducu bibedo ki kwerre pi nino abiro; dano ducu ma ogudo kome bibedo keni nio wa otyeno," 
Leviticus15:20 Gin ducu ma en obuto iye i kare ma tye ki kwer bibedo keni, ki gin ducu ma en obedo iye bibedo keni." 
Leviticus15:21 Ŋat ma ogudo kitandane myero olwok boŋŋine, olwok kome ki pii, ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno," 
Leviticus15:22 Ŋat ma ogudo kom gin ma en obedo iye bilwoko boŋŋine, lwoko kome ki pii, ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus15:23 Kadi bed kitanda nyo gin mo ma en obedo iye, dano ma ogudo bibedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus15:24 Ka laco mo obuto kwede, ce kwerre ogudo kome, en bibedo keni pi nino abiro, dok kitanda ducu ma danonu obutoiye bibedo keni." 
Leviticus15:25 “Ka dako mo remo mol ki i kome pi nino mapol, ma pe i i kare me two kwerre keken, nyo ka remone mol ma okato kare me two kwerre, en bimedde bedo keni pi kare ducu ma remone mol; en bibedo keni macalo i kare me two kwer." 
Leviticus15:26 Kitanda ducu ma en obuto iye, i kare ducu ma remone mol-li, bibedo bote macalo kitanda me two kwerre; dok gin ducu ma en obedo iye bibedo keni, macalo bedo keni i kare me two kwer." 
Leviticus15:27 Ŋat ma ogudo jami magi bibedo keni; myero olwok boŋŋine olwok kome ki pii, ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Leviticus15:28 Ento ka dako kome doŋ olony i kom kwerre, en bikwano nino abiro, lacen en bibedo ma kome pe ki keni." 
Leviticus15:29 I nino me aborone en bitero am am aryo nyo litino akuri aryo, bikelogi bot ajwaka i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus15:30 Ajwaka bityero acel me gitum me bal, acel me gitum awaŋa; kit meno ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome i nyim Rwot pi remone ma omol ma omiyo en bedo keni." 
Leviticus15:31 “Myero wumi jo Icrael gugwokke i kom gin ma miyogi bedo keni kit meno, wek pe guto ma gitye keni pi balo kemana ma tye i kingi,”" 
Leviticus15:32 Man aye cik ma mako laco ma kome cwer tut ki ma kodi me co omol i kome ma omiyo en odoko keni," 
Leviticus15:33 ki dako bene ma two two kwer; man aye cik ma mako dano ducu, laco nyo dako, ma kome cwer tut nyo remo, ki laco bene ma obuto ki dako ma kome ki keni." 
Leviticus16:1 Rwot oloko bot Moses i kare ma doŋ awobe pa Aron aryo gutyeko to, pien onoŋo gunyiko cok i nyim Rwot ci guto woko." 
Leviticus16:2 Ci Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Tit ki omeru Aron ni pe obed ka donyo nino ducu i kabedo maleŋ ma boŋo kicika oumo i nyim kom me kica ma tye i wi canduk: wek pe oto; pien abinen i wi kom me kica i po!." 
Leviticus16:3 Ento Aron bidonyo i kabedo maleŋ ki gin magi: bidonyo iye ki wod twon pi gitum me bal, ki nyok romo pi gitum awaŋa," 
Leviticus16:4 En biruko kanyi maleŋ me boŋo camanini, biruko pali boŋo camanini i kome, bitweyo pyere ki kitambara boŋo camanini, ka tweyo kitambara adwala i wiye; man aye gin boŋŋi aruka maleŋ. En bilwoko kome ki pii, ka doŋ birukogi." 
Leviticus16:5 Dok en bigamo ki bot lwak jo Icrael nyogi dyegi aryo pi gitum me bal, ki nyok romo acel me gitum awaŋa." 
Leviticus16:6 “Aron bityero twon obed gitum me bal ma otiko en, kun timo gin lakwany bal ki i kome ki i kom jo ma i ode." 
Leviticus16:7 Dok en bikelo dyegi aryo-nu, biketogi i nyim Rwot i doggola kema me rwatte." 
Leviticus16:8 Ci Aron bibolo kwir i kom nyogi dyegi aryo-nu, kwir acel pi Rwot ki kwir mukene pi Ajajel," 
Leviticus16:9 Aron bikelo dyel ma kwir pa Rwot opoto i kome-ni bityero me bedo gitum me bal. 
Leviticus16:10 Ento dyel ma kwir pa Ajajel opoto i kome-ni gibikelo makwo i nyim Rwot pi timo gin lakwany bal i kome, wek gicwale woko ceŋ i tim bot Ajajel." 
Leviticus16:11 “Aron bityero twon me bedo gitum me bal ma otiko en kun timo gin lakwany bal ki i kome ki i kom jo ma i ode; bineko twon obed gitum me bal ma otiko eno 
Leviticus16:12 En bikwanyo atabo weer me waŋo odok eceta ma opoŋ ki lodi mac ma okwanyo ki i wi keno tyer ma i nyim Rwot, ki odok eceta ma ŋwece kur ma giluro matitino poŋ ciŋ aryo, ci bikelone i tyelo ka ma boŋo kicika oumo-ni." 
Leviticus16:13 Bionyo odok eceta ma ŋwece kur-ri i mac ma i nyim Rwot, wek yito me odok eceta ma ŋwece kur-ri oduny macalo pol oum kom me kica ma bedo i wi canduk lok me caden, wek pe oto." 
Leviticus16:14 Ka dok bikwanyo remo twon manok, ci kiro ki lwet ciŋe i kom kom me kica tuŋ nyime, dok bikiro remo ki lwet ciŋe tyen abiro piny i nyim kom me kica." 
Leviticus16:15 “Ka man otum, bineko dyel me gitum me bal ma onoŋo tye pi lwak, ci kelo remone i tyelo ma boŋo kicika oumo-ni, ci timo remone kit ma otimo ki remo twon-ni; bikiro i wi kom me kica ki i nyim kom me kica." 
Leviticus16:16 En bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kom kabedo maleŋ kit meno, pi keni pa jo Icrael, ki pi tim aranyigi ki balgi ducu. Dok bitimo kit meno bene ki kema me rwatte ma bedo kwedgi i dye keni megi ducu." 
Leviticus16:17 I kare ma en donyo i kabedo maleŋ ka timo gin lakwany bal, dano mo pe obed i kema me rwatte, nio ka doŋ okato woko ma otyeko timo gin lakwany bal ki i kome ki i kom jo ma i ode, ki i kom jo Icrael mucokke ducu." 
Leviticus16:18 Lacen en bikato woko i nyim keno me tyer ma tye i nyim Rwot, ci timo gin lakwany bal ki i kome. Bikwanyo remo twon, ki remo dyel, ci reyo i kom ten keno aŋwen me keno tyer, rumo kome ducu." 
Leviticus16:19 Ka dok bikiro remo iye ki lwet ciŋe tyen abiro kun lonyo, kwero doko maleŋ pi kwanyo keni pa jo Icrael ducu ki i kome," 
Leviticus16:20 “Ka doŋ otyeko timo gin lakwany bal ki i kom kabedo maleŋ, ki kema me rwatte, ki keno tyer, en bikelo dyel makwo." 
Leviticus16:21 Aron biketo cine aryo ducu i wi dyel, kun tuco i kome bal ducu ma jo Icrael gutimo, ki tim aranyigi ki kwa balgi ducu, Biketogi i wi dyel-lu, ci cwale woko kwede i tim, kun dano mo ma doŋ giyero aye tero." 
Leviticus16:22 Dyel bitiŋo balgi ducu i kome, cito kwede wa i t im ata; ci dano-nu bigonyo dyel cito woko i tim." 
Leviticus16:23 “Aron dok bidonyo i kema me rwatte, bilunyo boŋŋi camanini woko ma onoŋo oruko i kare ma en cito i kabedo maleŋ-ŋi, ci wekogi kunnu." 
Leviticus16:24 Ka bilwoko kome ki pii i kabedo mo maleŋ, ka ruko boŋŋine i kome, ci katti woko, tyero gitum awaŋane, ki gitum awaŋa pi lwak, ci timo gin lakwany bal ki i kome ki i kom lwak." 
Leviticus16:25 Dwolo me gitum awaŋa en biwaŋo woko i wi keno tyer. 
Leviticus16:26 Ŋat ma otero dyel, ocwalo bot Ajajel, bilwoko boŋŋine, lwoko kome ki pii, ka lacen bibino i gony," 
Leviticus16:27 Twon me gitum me bal ki dyel me gitum me bal, ma onoŋo gitero remogi i kabedo maleŋ ka timo gin lakwany bal, gibiterogi woko wa i ŋe gony; pyengi ki riŋogi ki wee igi gibiwaŋo woko ki mac." 
Leviticus16:28 Ŋat ma owaŋo bilwoko boŋŋine, lwoko kome ki pii, ka lacen en bibino i gony." 
Leviticus16:29 “Man bibedo cik matwal botwu, ni, i dwe me abiro, i nino dwe me aparre, wubikumo ki toncwiny. Pe wubitiyo tic mo, kadi anywalli me lobo, kadi labedo ma bedo i kinwu." 
Leviticus16:30 Pien i nino meno aye gibitimo iye gin lakwany bal ki i komwu me lonyowu; myero wubed ma wulonnye i nyim Rwot ki i kom balwu ducu. 
Leviticus16:31 En aye bedo botwu cabit me yweyo mot, ci wubikumo ki toncwiny; man aye cik ma bedo matwal." 
Leviticus16:32 Ajwaka ma giwiro ki moo ka giketo en i dog ticce me bedo ajwaka, kun leyo kaka wonne, bitimo gin lakwany bal, kun ruko boŋŋi aruka maleŋ me boŋo camanini." 
Leviticus16:33 En bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kom kabedo maleŋ, dok bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kom kema me wratte ki i kom keno tyer, Ka dok bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kom ajwagi, ki i kom jo ducu mucokke." 
Leviticus16:34 Man bibedo cik botwu matwal, ni, myero gitim gin lakwany bal ki i kom jo Icrael i mwaka acel kicel, pi balgi ducu.” Ci Moses otimo kit ma Rwot ocike kwede." 
Leviticus17:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus17:2 “Wac bot Aron ki awobene ki bot jo Icrael ducu ni, Man aye gin ma Rwot ociko." 
Leviticus17:3 Ka dano mo me ot pa Icrael oneko twon nyo lat in romo nyo dyel ki i dye gony, nyo ka oneko woko ki i ne gony," 
Leviticus17:4 kun pe okelo i doggola kema me rwatte me tyerone obed mot pa Rwot i nyim kema pa Rwot, ci gibikwano alii me remo i wi dano meno, Pi oyo remo, waŋ dano meno birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi." 
Leviticus17:5 Man giciko wek jo Icrael gukel gitumgi ma gibedo ka nekogi i dye bar; gikelgi bo! Rwot, bot ajwaka, i doggola kema me rwatte, ginekgi me bedo gityer lakwecwiny bot Rwot," 
Leviticus17:6 Ajwaka bikiro remone i wi keno tyer pa Rwot i doggola kema me rwatte, biwaŋo dwolo obed gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Leviticus17:7 Pe doŋ gibitumo gitumgi bot jogi ma calo nyogi oyima ma gitye ka worogi ki tim kwele kwele. Man bibedo cik botgi matwal wa i kare pa likwayogi ducu. 
Leviticus17:8 “Ci ibiwaco ki gin ni, Dano mo me ot pa Icrael, nyo ki i kin lubedo ma bedo i kingi, ma otyero gitum awaŋa, nyo gitum mo" 
Leviticus17:9 ma pe okelo i doggola kema me rwatte pi tumo bot Rwot, dano meno waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi." 
Leviticus17:10 “Ka dano mo me ot pa Icrael, nyo ki i kin lubedo ma bedo i kingi, ocamo remo mo, abiketo waŋa i kom dano meno ma ocamo remo-ni, dok abimiyo waŋe rwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi," 
Leviticus17:11 Pien kwo pa riŋo tye i Temo; an doŋ atyeko miyone botwu i wi keno tyer pi kwanyo bal ki i kom tipowu pien remo aye gin ma kwanyo bal, pi kwo ma tye iye-ni," 
Leviticus17:12 En mumiyo awaco bot jo Icrael ni, Dano mo i kinwu pe ocam remo." 
Leviticus17:13 Dano mo bene ki i kin jo Icrael, nyo ki i kin lubedo ma bedo i kingi, ma omako lee nyo winyo mo ma gicamo, ka en owoto ka dwar, bionyo remone woko piny i ŋom, ci umo woko ki lobo." 
Leviticus17:14 “Pien kwo pa lee-gu ducu en aye remone; mumiyo awaco ki jo Icrael ni Pe wucam remo pa gin mo, pien kwo pa gin makwo ducu en remone; ŋat ma ocamo wane birwenyo woko." 
Leviticus17:15 Dok ka dano mo ocamo geŋ ma oto kene, nyo lee ma ŋuu omwodo, kadi anywalli me lobo, kadi labedo, bilwoko boŋŋine, lwoko kome ki pii, ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno, ka doŋ bedo ma olony." 
Leviticus17:16 Ento ka pe olwoko boŋŋine, nyo pe olwoko kome, ci bal bidok i wiye.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus18:2 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, An a Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Leviticus18:3 Pe wubitimo macalo gitimo i lobo Ejipt ma yam wubedo iye-ni; pe bene wubitimo kit macalo gitimo i lobo Kanaan ka ma atye ka terowu iye-ni. Pe wulub cikgi. 
Leviticus18:4 Myero wuti gin ma aciko, wumak cikka, wulubi. An a Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Leviticus18:5 Pi meno, wubimako cikka ki gin ma aŋolo ducu, Pi timo k it meno dano bikwo; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus18:6 “Dano mo pe onyik cok ki dako ma watgi me bedo kwede, An a Rwot." 
Leviticus18:7 Pe ibibedo ki meni, pien miyo iketo lewic i kom woru; en aye meni, pe ibiketo lewic i kome," 
Leviticus18:8 Pe ibibedo ki ci-woru; pe, iket lewic i kom woru kumeno," 
Leviticus18:9 Pe ibibedo ki lameru ma nya pa woru nyo nya pa meni, kadi ma ginywalo paco nyo ma ginywalo ka mukene." 
Leviticus18:10 Pe ibibedo ki nya pa wodi nyo nya pa nyari, pien miyo ikelo lewic i komi keni." 
Leviticus18:11 Pe ibibedo ki nya pa ci-woru ma woru aye onywalo, pien en lameru kikome." 
Leviticus18:12 Pe ibibedo ki wayu, pien en wat ma i ot pa woru kikome." 
Leviticus18:13 Pe ibibedo ki lamiŋ meni, pien en wat ma i ot pa meni kikome." 
Leviticus18:14 Pe ibibedo ki ci-omin woru, pe ibinyiko cok ki dakone, pien en ci-omin woru," 
Leviticus18:15 Pe ibibedo ki ci-wodi, pien en dako pa wodi, pe ibibedo kwede." 
Leviticus18:16 Pe ibibedo ki ci-omeru, ma omeru aye bedo kwede." 
Leviticus18:17 Pe ibibedo ki dako mo, ka idodo ki bedo ki nyare; pe ibitero nya pa wode, nyo nya pa nyare, me bedo kwede." 
Leviticus18:18 Pe ibinyomo yweri obed nyek laminne, kun ibedo kwede ma lammne pud KWO." 
Leviticus18:19 “Pe ibinyiko cok ki dako me bedo kwede i kare ma en tye ki kwer, ma peya olonnye." 
Leviticus18:20 Pe ibibuto ki dako pa lawoti me bedo kwede, miyo ijerre kekeni," 
Leviticus18:21 Pe ibityero latinni mo me awaŋa ki mac bot jok Molek, pe ibipyedo nyiŋ Lubaŋani kulu; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus18:22 Pe ibibuto ki laco macalo ibuto ki dako; meno tim gwok. 
Leviticus18:23 Pe ibibuto ki lee mo ma ipyedde kwede kekeni, kadi dako mo pe opyedde i kom lee mo me buta kwede; meno tim kipyeda," 
Leviticus18:24 “Pe wupyedde kekenwu i kom gin ducu, pien rok ducu ma atye ka ryemogi woko ki i nyimwu-ni gubedo ka pyedde kekengi i komgi;" 
Leviticus18:25 mumiyo lobo opyedde woko, omiyo aketo can i kome pi balle, ci lobo oŋoko jo ma gibedo iye woko." 
Leviticus18:26 Ento wun myero wumak cikka ki lok ducu ma aŋolo, kun pe wutimo gin mo i kom kipyeda magi ducu, kadi anywalli me lobo, kadi larok mo ma bedo i kinwu." 
Leviticus18:27 Pien tim kipyeda meno ducu wegi lobo-ni gubedo ka timone, jo ma yam gukwoŋo nyimwu, mumiyo lobo gipyedo woko," 
Leviticus18:28 Pe wutim tim kipyeda, wek lobo pe oŋokwu woko ka wutimo tim kipyeda i kome, macalo con oŋoko kwede rok ma okwoŋo nyimwu-ni." 
Leviticus18:29 Pien jo ducu ma gutimo gin mo i kom kipyeda magi, jo ma gitimo-ni waŋgi birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi." 
Leviticus18:30 Wumak gin ma aciko, ni, pe wunyebbe i kit me timo kipyeda macalo yam ginyebbe ka timone i nyimwu, pe wubed ka pyedde kekenwu ki kit tim macalo meno; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus19:2 “Wac bot lwak jo Icrael ducu ni, Myero wubedjo maleŋ, pien an Rwot Lubaŋawu aleŋ," 
Leviticus19:3 ŋat acel acel ma i kinwu owor minne ki wonne, doki wugwok cabitta ducu; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu," 
Leviticus19:4 Pe wulokke wudok bot cal lubaŋa-gu, pe wutim lubaŋawu me nyonyo aliya piwu kenwu; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Leviticus19:5 “Ka wutyero gitum mewu me gityer Lakwecwiny bot Rwot, wubityero i kit ma miyo Lubaŋa ye gamowu." 
Leviticus19:6 Myero wucam i nino ma wutumo iye, nyo orwone; ma odoŋ nio wa i nino me adekke gibiwaŋo awaŋa ki mac." 
Leviticus19:7 Ka ce dok pud gicamo i nino me adekke, ci bedo gin me kwer; pe doŋ gibiye gamone," 
Leviticus19:8 ŋat ma ocamo-ni bal bidok i wiye, pien opyedo gin maleŋ pa Rwot; dano meno waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi." 
Leviticus19:9 “Ka wukayo cam ma ocek i lobowu, pe wuka woko ducu nio wa i ŋet potowu, pe dok wubed ka beko obote ma odoŋ i kare me kac," 
Leviticus19:10 Pe wupwon nyig olokwu wugwer ducu, pe bene wucok nyige ma opoto piny i poto olokwu; wubiwekogi pi konyo lucan ki lubedo; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Leviticus19:11 “Pe wukwal kwo, pe wunyebbe ka bwolo dano, pe wulok lok goba i kinwu kekenwu." 
Leviticus19:12 Pe wukwoŋ kwoŋ i nyina ki goba, ma miyo wupyedo nyiŋ Lubaŋawu; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:13 “Pe ibur lawoti, pe ima jamine. Pe igalle ki mucara pa lapakaca mo dyewor kulu nio wa odiko." 
Leviticus19:14 Pe iyet ladiŋit, pe iket gin mo i yo ma twomo tyen latowaŋ, ento lwor Lubaŋani; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:15 “Pe wuŋol kop aleŋa; pe idwor kor lacan, pe idwor dano madit, ento ŋol kop atir i kom lawoti." 
Leviticus19:16 Pe ibed ka wirre i kin lutuwu ka kwoto’ nyiŋgi, pe ikel lok mo ma kelo to i kom lawoti; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:17 “Pe ikwer omeru ki i cwinyi, ento juk lawoti ajuka, wek balle pe odok i wii." 
Leviticus19:18 Pe icul kwor, pe ibed ki akeca i kom lutuwu; ento mar lawoti macalo imarre keni; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:19 “Wumak cikka. Pe iye limmi onywal ki kit lee mukene; pe ico kit kodi aryo mapatpat i poto acel; pe iruk boŋo ma gicweyo ki kit uci aryo mapatpat. 
Leviticus19:20 “Ka laco mo obuto ki dako ma aŋeca ma ŋat mukene mito nyomo, ma peya gikoko gigonyo woko ki i opii, gibilaro koppe. Pe gibinekogi, pien dako onoŋo pe lone kene." 
Leviticus19:21 Laco bikelo gitum me aliine bot Rwot i doggola kema me rwatte, nyok romo me gitum me tiŋo alii." 
Leviticus19:22 Ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kome i nyim Rwot ki nyok romo me gitum me tiŋo alii, pi bal ma en otimo-ni, ci Lubaŋa biweko balle," 
Leviticus19:23 “Ka doŋ wuo i lobo-nu, ce wupito iye kwa yadi ducu me acama, myero wuŋe ni gijuko ni nyige peya gicamo; gibijukowu camone pi mwaka adek." 
Leviticus19:24 I mwaka me aŋwenne nyige ducu bibedo maleŋ, gibityero me lapak Rwot." 
Leviticus19:25 Ento i mwaka me abicce wutwero camo nyige, wek yadiwu gunyak ki wun nyiggi madwoŋ; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Leviticus19:26 “Pe wucam riŋo mo ma tye ki remo i kome. Pe wutyet tyet, pe wubed luyer war." 
Leviticus19:27 Pe wuko yer te wiwu, pe wulyel teŋ yer tikwu." 
Leviticus19:28 Pe wutoŋ komwu pi kwero cola, pe wuked kedo mo i komwu; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:29 “Pe imi nyari odok lapyeda pi timo kwele, weko lobo balle woko ki tim kwele, bimiyo lobo poŋ ki tim kipyeda." 
Leviticus19:30 Wugwok cabitta, wuwor kabedona maleŋ; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:31 “Pe wulokke wudok bot lukor tipo ki megi jogi, pe wucit ka yenyogi, miyo wupyedde kekenwu pi gin; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Leviticus19:32 “A malo i nyim dano ma wiye obuk lwar, wor dano ma doŋ guti, dok ilwor Lubaŋani: an a Rwot." 
Leviticus19:33 “Ka labedo mo obedo: kwedi i lobowu, pe wutime marac." 
Leviticus19:34 Labedo ma obedo kwedwu bibedo macalo latin anywalli i kinwu, ibimare macalo imarre keni; pien wun bene yam wubedo lubedo i lobo Ejipt; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Leviticus19:35 “Pe wutim rac ‘i ŋolo kop, nyo i pimo bor me gin mo, nye pekke, nyo ditte," 
Leviticus19:36 Wubed ki mijan ma pi mo kakare, kidi lapim pek muromo kakare, aduku lapim bel muromo kakare ki agulu lapim moo muromo kakare; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu ma con akwanyowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt." 
Leviticus19:37 Wugwok cikka ki gin ma aciko ducu, wucobi; an a Rwot.”" 
Leviticus20:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus20:2 “Wac bot Icrael ni, Dano mo ma i kin jo Icrael, nyo labedo ma bedo i kin jo Icrael, ma omiyo latinne mo bot jok Molek gibineko woko; lwak gibicele woko ki got." 
Leviticus20:3 An kikoma abiketo waŋa i kom dano meno, abimiyo waŋe rwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi, pien omiyo latinne bot jok Molek, kun obalo kwede kabedona maleŋ, dok opyedo nyina maleŋ," 
Leviticus20:4 Ka lwak pe guyabo wangi i kom dano meno kun en miyo latinne mo bot Molek, ce pe gumedo ki neko en," 
Leviticus20:5 ci abiketo waŋa i kom dano meno ki i kom doggolane abimiyo waŋe rwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi, en kacel ki jo ducu ma gilube pi woro jok Molek ki tim kwele kwele." 
Leviticus20:6 “Ka dano mo olokke odok bot lukor tipo ki megi jogi kun lubogi pi tim kwele kwele, abiketo waŋa i kom dano meno, abimiyo waŋe rwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi." 
Leviticus20:7 Wulonnye kekenwu wubed maleŋ, pien an a Rwot Lubaŋawu," 
Leviticus20:8 Wugwok cikka wucobgi, pien an a Rwot ma alonyowu wudoko maleŋ," 
Leviticus20:9 Dano mo ma oceno wonne nyo minne gibineko woko; en otyeko ceno wonne nyo minne, remone dok i wiye." 
Leviticus20:10 “Ka dano mo otimo abor ki dako pa lawote, laco ki dako ma gutimo abor-ri gibinekogi woko." 
Leviticus20:11 Dano ma obuto ki ci-wonne, noŋo oketo lewic i kom wonne; gibineko gin aryo ducu, remogi dok i wigi." 
Leviticus20:12 Ka dano mo obuto ki ci-wode, gibineko gin aryo ducu, pien gutimo k ir, remogi dok i wigi." 
Leviticus20:13 Ka dano mo obuto ki laco macalo dako, gin aryo ducu gutimo gwok, gibinekogi woko, remogi dok i wigi." 
Leviticus20:14 Ka dano mo onyomo dako ci ododo ki bedoki minne bene, meno kipyeda; gibiwaŋogi woko ki mac, en ki gin mon aryo ducu, wek kipyeda pe obed i kinwu." 
Leviticus20:15 Ka dano mo obuto ki lee, gibineko woko, dok wubineko lee meno bene," 
Leviticus20:16 Ka dako mo onyiko cok ki lee ce obedo kwede, wubineko dako-nu ki lee meno; gibinekogi woko, remogi dok i wigi." 
Leviticus20:17 “Ka dano mo otero laminne, kun nya pa wonne nyo nya pa minne, ce en oneno nyime, ki nyako bene oneno kome, meno lok me lewic atika, wangi birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi. En obedo ki laminne, bal bidok i wiye." 
Leviticus20:18 Ka dano mo obuto ki dako ma tye ki kwer, ci obedo kwede, noŋo en pe oworo remo pa dako ma cwer, dako bene lewic pe omako pi remone ma cwer-ri; gin aryo ducu wangi birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi." 
Leviticus20:19 Pe ibed ki lamiŋ meni nyo lamiŋ woru, pien meno noŋo ibedo ki watti; balgi bidok i wigi." 
Leviticus20:20 Ka dano mo obuto ki ci-omin wonne, obedo kwede, meno no no oketo lewic i kom omin wonne; balgi bidok i wigi, gibito laboŋo latin mo." 
Leviticus20:21 Ka dano mo obedo ki ci-ominne, meno otimo kir; noŋo okelo lewic i kom ominne; gibito laboŋo latin mo," 
Leviticus20:22 “Pi meno wumak cikka ducu, ki gin ma aŋolo ducu, wucobgi, wek lobo ma atye ka terowu iye-ni pe onokwu woko." 
Leviticus20:23 Wun pe wulub kit pa lurok ma atye ka ryemogi woko i nyimwu-ni; pien gin gutimo gin magi ducu, mumiyo iya okwerogi woko." 
Leviticus20:24 Ento atyeko waco botwu ni, ‘Wubileyo lobogi, abimiyo botwu me bedo mewu, lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic.’ An a Rwot Lubaŋawu ma apokowu woko ki i kom rok mukene." 
Leviticus20:25 Mumiyo myero wupok kin lee ma gilony ki lee makeni, ki i kin winyo makeni ki winyo ma gilony. Pe wuballe wudok gin me kwer pi lee, nyo pi winyo, nyo pi gin mo ma corre i wi lobo, ma an doŋ atyeko pokone woko pat, ni obed keni botwu," 
Leviticus20:26 Wubed jo maleŋ pira, pien an Rwot aleŋ, doŋ atyeko pokowu woko ki i kom rok mukene ducu, wek wubed jona." 
Leviticus20:27 “Laco nyo dako mo ma lakor tipo nyo ma min jok gibineko woko; gibicelo woko ki got, remogi bidok i wigi.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Lok ki ajwagi, awobe pa Aron, iwac botgi ni, ŋatti mo i kingi pe oballe odok keni pi gudo kom dano muto ma i kin lutugi," 
Leviticus21:2 kono nyo watgi keken ma cok kwede, macalo minne, wonne, wode, nyare, ominne," 
Leviticus21:3 nyo laminne ma peya oneyo co, En pud cok kwede, pien peya tye ki cware; en twero balle pire doko keni." 
Leviticus21:4 Kadi bed en won gaŋ i kin lutugi, myero pe oballe odok keni, miyo bedo kipyeda." 
Leviticus21:5 Ajwagi pe gulyel wigi, pe gulyel teŋ yer t ikgi, pe guton komgi." 
Leviticus21:6 Gubed jo maleŋ pi Lubaŋagi, pe gupyed nyiŋ Lubaŋagi, pien gin aye gityero gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot, en cam pa Lubaijagi; pienno myero gubed jo maleŋ." 
Leviticus21:7 Pe gunyom dako ma lakwele, nyo ma doŋ tye ki meye, Gin pe gunyom dako ma cware oryemo pien ajwaka en dano maleŋ bot Lubaŋane." 
Leviticus21:8 Wubigwoke obed maleŋ pi ticce, pien en tyero cam pa Lubaŋawu; en bibedo maleŋ botwu, pien an a Rwot ma alonyowu wubed maleŋ, an bene aleŋ," 
Leviticus21:9 Ka nya pa ajwaka mo odoko lapyeda pi timo kwele, noŋo opyedo wonne; gibiwane woko ki mac." 
Leviticus21:10 “Ajwaka madit i kin omege, ma en aye gionyo moo wir i wiye, ma onoŋo gikwere wek oruk boŋŋi aruka me ticce, myero pe ogony yer wiye oket ata lijayi, pe oyec ginarukane;" 
Leviticus21:11 pe odony i ot ka ma kom dano muto tye iye, pe oballe odok keni, kadi bed pi wonne nyo minne." 
Leviticus21:12 Pe okat woko nia ki i kabedo maleŋ, wek pe opyed kabedo maleŋ pa Lubaŋane, pien moo wir ma yam gikwere kwede bot Lubaŋane tye i kome; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus21:13 En myero onyom nyako ma peya oneyo co," 
Leviticus21:14 Pe onyom daa-to, nyo dako ma cware oryemo, nyo dako ma doŋ tye ki meye, nyo dako ma lakwele; en onyom anyira tugi ma peya oneyo co," 
Leviticus21:15 wek pe opyedde i kom litinone i kin lutugi; pien an a Rwot ma alonye obed maleŋ.” 
Leviticus21:16 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni 
Leviticus21:17 “Wac bot Aron ni, i kare pa likwayo wu ducu, lakwaru mo ma kome ki mwonyo pe onyik cok ka tyero cam pa Lubaŋane," 
Leviticus21:18 Pien dano ma ko me ki mwonyo pe binyiko cok bota, macalo dano ma latowan, nyo laŋolo, nyo ŋat ma waŋe ki poyo, nyo ma tyene nyo bade tuŋcel laŋabu," 
Leviticus21:19 nyo ŋat ma tyene otur, nyo ma bade otur," 
Leviticus21:20 nyo dano ma kore oruŋŋe, nyo dano muran, nyo ma waŋe ocor, nyo ma twoyo gwenyo nyo nyac, nyo ma gidino mane." 
Leviticus21:21 Dano mo i kin likwayo pa ajwaka Aron ma kome ki mwonyo pe onyik cok ka tyero gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot; tekke kome ki mwonyo, pe binyiko cok ka tyero cam pa Lubaŋane," 
Leviticus21:22 En twero camo cam pa Lubaŋane, jami maleŋ makato, ki jami maleŋŋe;" 
Leviticus21:23 ento pe binyiko cok ki boŋo kicika, pe bibino cok ki keno tyer, pien kome ki mwonyo, wek pe opyed kabedona ducu maleŋ-ŋi, pien an a Rwot ma alonyogi gubed maleŋ.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Moses oloko kit meno bot Aron ki awo bene ki bot jo Icrael ducu. 
Leviticus22:1 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus22:2 “Tit ki Aron ki awobene ni gugwokke i kom gin maleŋ pa jo Icrael ma gudyero bota, wek pe gupyed nyina maleŋ-ŋi; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus22:3 Wac botgi ni, ‘I kare pa likwayowu ducu, ka ŋatti mo ma i kin likwayowu onyiko cok ki gin maleŋ ma jo Icrael gudyero bot Rwot-ti ma kun kome ki keni, dano meno waŋe birwenyo woko ki i nyima; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus22:4 Dano mo i kin likwayo pa Aron ma ladobo, nyo ma kome cwer tut, pe ocam gin maleŋ nio ka ko me olony. Ŋatti mo ma ogudo kom gin ma odoko keni pi gudo kom dano muto, nyo dano ma kodi me co mere omol i kome," 
Leviticus22:5 nyo dano ma ogudo gin ma lak alaka ma twero miyo en doko keni, nyo ma ogudo dano ma kenine twero kobo i kome, nyo kwa gin mo ma twero miyo en doko keni;" 
Leviticus22:6 dano ma ogudo gin macalo meno bibedo keni nio wa otyeno, dok pe bicamo gin maleŋ ka peya olwoko kome ki pii," 
Leviticus22:7 Ka ceŋ doŋ opoto, ci bibedo ma olony, lacen en twero camo gin maleŋ, pien en aye camme," 
Leviticus22:8 En pe ocam geŋ lee ma oto kene, nyo lee ma ŋuu omwodo, wek pe oballe kwede odok keni; an a Rwot.’" 
Leviticus22:9 Gumak gin ma aciko, wek bal pe odok i wigi, ma miyo gibito ka gipyedde i kom gin ma aciko; an a Rwot ma alonyogi gubed maleŋ." 
Leviticus22:10 “Dano ata pe ocam gin maleŋ. Dano ma labedo bot ajwaka, nyo lapakaca, pe ocam gin mo maleŋ." 
Leviticus22:11 Ento ka ajwaka owilo opii ki lim, ma odoko calo gipinnye, en twero camo, ki opii ma ginywalogi i ode bene gitwero camo camme." 
Leviticus22:12 Ka dano mo mukene onyomo nya pa ajwaka, nyare-nu aye pe doŋ bicamo gin maleŋ ma gityero." 
Leviticus22:13 Ento ka nya pa ajwaka odoko daa-to, nyo cware oryemo, kun pe tye ki latin mo, ci odwogo i ot pa wonne macalo yam obedo iye ma pud tidi, twero camo cam pa wonne; ento dano ata pe ocam." 
Leviticus22:14 Ka dano mo ocamo gin mo maleŋ ma pe ocamo akaka, en bimedo acel me abic i kom welle, ci culo waŋ gin meno maleŋ bot ajwaka." 
Leviticus22:15 Ajwagi pe gupyed jami maleŋ pa jo Icrael ma gityero bot Rwot," 
Leviticus22:16 wek bal ki alii pe odok i wigi pi camo jamigi maleŋ; pien an a Rwot ma alonyogi gubed maleŋ.” 
Leviticus22:17 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni 
Leviticus22:18 “Wac bot Aron ki awo bene ki bot ‘jo Icrael ducu ni, Ka ŋat mo ma i ot pa Icrael, nyo labedo mo ma i Icrael, miyo gityer mere, kadi obed me cobo kwoŋ, nyo gityer ma iye opwoyo ma otyero bot Rwot me gitum awaŋa," 
Leviticus22:19 ka wubikelo wod twon, nyo nyok romo, nyo nyok dyel ma kome pe ki mwonyo, Lubaŋa biye gamone." 
Leviticus22:20 Ento pe wutyer gin mo ma kome ki mwonyo, pien pe gibiye gamone piwu." 
Leviticus22:21 Ka dano mo okelo gityer lakwecwiny bot Rwot, pi cobo kwoŋ nyo pi gityer ma iye opwoyo, ma okwanyo ki i kin dyani nyo i kin romi nyo dyegi, gibigamo ma komgi becone; komgi pe obed ki mwonyo mo." 
Leviticus22:22 Lee ma wane oto, nyo ma tyene otur, nyo ma oŋol, nyo ma kome cwer tut, nyo ma anoli omako, nyo kit two macalo meno, pe wutyer bot Rwot, pe wumigi me bedo gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot i wi keno tyer." 
Leviticus22:23 Wutwero kelo twon nyo nyok romo ma kome obedo alwaya nyo ma aduno obed gityer ma iwu opwoyo, ento pe gibigamone pi cobo kwoŋ." 
Leviticus22:24 Pe wutyer bot Rwot lee mo ma gidino mane, nyo ginyoto woko, nyo gikayo, nyo gikwanyo woko, pe wutum lee ma kit meno i lobowu." 
Leviticus22:25 Dok pe wutyer lee mo macalo meno ma wuwilo ki bot larok obed cam pa Lubaŋawu, Pe gibigamogi piwu, pien komgi ki mwonyo pi bal ma tye i komgi-ni.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus22:27 “Ka ginywalo wod twon nyo romo nyo dyel, koŋ obed bot minne pi nino abiro; nia i nino me aborone gibiye gamone me bedo gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot." 
Leviticus22:28 Kadi bed minne min dyaŋ nyo min romo, pe gibir omo neko minne ki latinne i nino acel." 
Leviticus22:29 Ka ce wutumo gityer me pwoc bot Rwot wutum i kit ma miyo giye gamowu. 
Leviticus22:30 Gicam i nino meno kikome; pe wuwek mo odoŋ nio wa odiko; an a Rwot. 
Leviticus22:31 “Kit meno wugwok cikka ducu, wucobgi; an a Rwot." 
Leviticus22:32 Pe wupyed nyiŋa maleŋ, ento jo Icrael myero guŋe ni an aleŋ; an a Rwot ma alonyowu wubed maleŋ,’" 
Leviticus22:33 ma ceŋ akwanyowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt wek abed Lubaŋawu; an a Rwot.” 
Leviticus23:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus23:2 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, Nino madito ma Rwot ocikogi, ma wubituco pigi ni gubed gurre maleŋ, nino madito ma an aciko, gin ene." 
Leviticus23:3 Wubitiyo tic nino abicel, ento i nino me abirone en ceŋ cabit me yweyo mot, en aye gurre maleŋ, Pe wuti iye tic mo; en aye ceŋ cabit pa Rwot ka ma wubibedo iye ducu." 
Leviticus23:4 “Magi aye nino madito ma Rwot ociko, gin gurre maleŋ ma wubituco pigi i kare ma Rwot ociko pigi." 
Leviticus23:5 I dwe mukwono i nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen otyeno, en aye Kato (Paska) pa Rwot." 
Leviticus23:6 I kom nino dwe apar wiye abic me dwe acel-lu en nino madit pa Rwot me Mugati ma Tobi Pe tye; wubicamo mugati ma tobi pe iye pi nino abiro.’ 
Leviticus23:7 I kom nino mukwoŋone wubibedo iye ki gurre maleŋ; pe wuti iye tic mo matek. 
Leviticus23:8 Ento wubityero gityer ma giwa-ŋo ki mac bot Rwot pi nino abiro; i Dino me abirone wubibedo ki gurre maleŋ, pe wuti iye tic mo matek.’”" 
Leviticus23:9 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus23:10 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, Ka doŋ wuo i lobo ma abimiyowu, ka wukayo iye kac, ci wubikelo wic larita cam me wi mwaka bot ajwaka." 
Leviticus23:11 En bikwato wic larita cam i nyim Rwot, wek oye gamowu; ajwaka bikwato i nino ma lubo cabit." 
Leviticus23:12 I nino ma wubikwato iye wic larita-ni, en aye wubityero iye latin nyok romo ma ditte romo mwaka acel, ma kome pe ki mwonyo, obed gitum awaŋa bot Rwot." 
Leviticus23:13 Gityer me moko kwon ma wutyero kacel kwede bibedo moko kwon mapwotte ma romo agwata aryo, ma girubo ki moo, ma gibityero kun giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot obed gin ma nweee kur me yomo cwiny. Gityer amatane bibedo vino ma romo cupa aryo kt nucu." 
Leviticus23:14 Pe wucam mugati, pe wumwod nyig bel ma gicelo nyo manumo, nio wa i nino meno kikome, waŋ ma wukelo gityer pa Lubaŋawu; meno bibedo cik matwal wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu, ikabedo ducu ma wubibedo iye." 
Leviticus23:15 “Ka doki wubikwano cabit abiro kulu kun wucako ki nino ma lubo cabit, en aye nino ma wutyero iye wic larita cam me gityer akwata." 
Leviticus23:16 Wukwan nino pyerabic nio i nino ma lubo cabit me abirone, ka doŋ wucak kelo gityer me moko kwon kai manyen bot Rwot." 
Leviticus23:17 Wubikelo ki i kabedowu mugati aryo me akwata ma gitedo ki moko ma romo agwata aryo; gibitedogi ki moko mapwotte ma onoŋo girubo iye tobi, gubed wi mwaka ma gityero bot Rwot." 
Leviticus23:18 Dok wubikelo litino romi abiro kacel ki mugati meno ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, ma komgi pe ki mwonyo, ki wod twon acel ki nyogi romi aryo. Gibibedo gitum awaŋa bot Rwot, kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata mutikogi; gin gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Leviticus23:19 Dok wubityero nyok dyel acel obed gitum me bal, ki litino nyogi romi aryo ma ditogi mwaka acel acel gubed gityer Lakwecwiny." 
Leviticus23:20 Ajwaka bikwatogi kacel ki mugati me wi mwaka gubed gityer akwata i nyim Rwot, kacel ki litino nyogi romi aryo-nu; gibibedo maleŋ bot Rwot, pi ajwaka." 
Leviticus23:21 I nino meno kikome wubibedo ki gurre maleŋ ma wutito pire ka maleŋ; pe wuti iye tic mo matek. Meno bibedo cik matwal wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu, i kabedo ducu ma wubibedo iye." 
Leviticus23:22 “Ka wukayo cam ma ocek i lobowu, pe wuka woko ducu nio wa i ŋet potowu, pe dok wubed ka beko obote ma odoŋ i kare me kac. Wubiwekogi pi konyo lucan ki lubedo; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni 
Leviticus23:24 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, I dwe me abiro, i nino dwe acel, wubikwero iye nino me yweyo mot, nino me po ma gituco pire ki koko gwara, nino me gurre maleŋ." 
Leviticus23:25 Pe wuti iye tic mo matek, dok wubityero iye gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot.”" 
Leviticus23:26 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus23:27 “I nino dwe apar me dwe man me abiro-ui en aye bedo nino me Kwanyo Bal. Bibedo botwu nino me gurre maleŋ; wubikumo ki toncwiny, dok wubityero gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot." 
Leviticus23:28 Pe wuti tic mo i nino meno, pien en aye nino me kwanyo bal, pi timo gin lakwany bal ki i komwu i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Leviticus23:29 Ŋat ma pe okumo ki toncwiny i nino meno wane birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi. 
Leviticus23:30 Ŋat ma otiyo tic mo i nino meno abineko woko wek pe obed i kin lutugi. 
Leviticus23:31 Pe wuti iye tic mo; meno bibedo cik matwal wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu, i kabedo ducu ma wubibedo iye." 
Leviticus23:32 En aye bibedo botwu cabit me yweyo mot, ci wubikumo iye ki toncwiny, i nino dwe aboŋwen cakke otyeno nio wa orwone otyeno en aye wubiywe mot.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus23:34 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, I nino dwe apar wiye abic me dwe man me abiro-ni en aye bibedo acakki me nino madito pa Rwot, kare me Bolo, ci tyeko nino abiro." 
Leviticus23:35 I kom nino mukwoŋo wubibedo iye ki gurre maleŋ; pe wuti iye tic mo matek. 
Leviticus23:36 Wubityero gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot pi nino abiro. I nino me aborone wubibedo iye ki gurre maleŋ, ma wubityero iye gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot; meno cokke madit me woro Lubaŋa, pe wuti iye tic mo matek." 
Leviticus23:37 “Magi aye nino madito ma Rwot ociko, ma wubitito ki lwak ni gin aye kare me gurre maleŋ, pi tyero bot Rwot gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, gitum awaŋa, gityer me moko kwon, gitum mukene, ki gityer amata, kun acel acel bedo ki ninone ma otike," 
Leviticus23:38 kun wumedogi i kom ceŋ cabit pa Rwot me kare ducu, ki i kom mot mewu, i kom gityer mewu ducu me cobo kwoŋ, ki i kom gityerwu ducu ma iwu opwoyo ma wumiyo bot Rwot." 
Leviticus23:39 “I kom nino dwe apar wiye abic me dwe me abiro, ka doŋ wucoko cam ma ocek i lobo, wubikwero nino madito pa Rwot pi nino abiro; nino mukwoŋo bibedo nino me yweyo mot, ki nino me aborone bene bibedo nino me yweyo mot." 
Leviticus23:40 I nino mukwoŋo wubicoko iye nyig yat mabecone, ki jaŋ otit, ki jaŋ yat muluk, ki yat oget ma i ŋet kulu; ci wubibedo ki yomcwiny i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu pi nino abiro." 
Leviticus23:41 Wubikwero nino madito man pa Rwot pi nino abiro mwaka ki mwaka; meno bibedo cik matwal wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu; wubikwerone i dwe me abiro. 
Leviticus23:42 Wubibedo i bolo pi nino abiro; litino anywalli ducu ma i Icrael bibedo i bolc," 
Leviticus23:43 wek likwayowu guŋe ni, yam amiyo jo Icrael gubedo i bolo i kare ma akwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu.”" 
Leviticus23:44 Kit meno Moses otito bot jo Icrael pi nino madito ducu ma Rwot ociko pigi. 
Leviticus24:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus24:2 “Cik jo Icrael gukel boti moo me nyig jeituni ma giodo aoda, giliyo maber, me mac tara, wek giket mac laput obed ka lyel nino ducu ma pe to." 
Leviticus24:3 Aron myero ocaŋ mac olyel jwijwi i nyim Rwot nia otyeno nio odiko, ki woko i ŋe boŋo kicika ma umo canduk lok me caden, i kema me rwatte; meno bibedo cik matwal wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu." 
Leviticus24:4 En bicano laput kakare i wi okar-mac me jabu ma giliyo maber i nyim Rwot jwijwi. 
Leviticus24:5 “Dok ibikwanyo moko mapwotte, ibitedo kwede capat apar wiye aryo, kun i capat acel acel bedo iye agwata moko aryo." 
Leviticus24:6 Ibicanogi latyeŋ aryo kun iryeyogi abicel abicel i wi meja me jabu ma giliyo maber-ri. 
Leviticus24:7 I kom tyen acel aoel ibiketo iye odok luban ma giliyo maten, wek obed gin me po i kom mug ati-nu, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot." 
Leviticus24:8 I ceŋ cabit ducu Aron biryeyogi jwijwi i nyim Rwot kun gamo ki bot jo Icrael; en gicikke ma bedo matwal. 
Leviticus24:9 Bibedo pi Aron ki awobene: gibicamo i kabedo mo maleŋ, pien en gin maleŋ makato ma gimiye ki i kin gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot ma myero gimi bote dikdik.’ ”" 
Leviticus24:10 Ceŋ mo wod pa nya jo Icrael mo ma wonne onoŋo Laejipt, okato woko i kin jo Icrael, ci ocako lwenyo ki dano mo ma Laicrael i gony." 
Leviticus24:11 Wod pa nya jo Icrael meno ocako yeto nyiŋ Lubaŋa kun ceno bene, ci gitere bot Moses: Nyiŋ minne Celomit, nya pa Dibri, ma i kaka pa Dan." 
Leviticus24:12 Ci gikete i ot kol, nio ka Rwot binyuto botgi gin ma en mito." 
Leviticus24:13 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus24:14 “Kel ŋat ma oceno cen woko i ŋe gony, jo ducu ma guwinyo lokke guket ciŋgi i wiye, ci wek lwak ducu gucele woko ki got." 
Leviticus24:15 Ka dok iwac ki jo Icrael ni, ŋat ma oceno Lubaŋane, balle bidok i wiye." 
Leviticus24:16 Ŋat ma oyeto nyiŋ Rwot gibineko woko; lwak ducu gibicele woko ki got; labedo kacel ki anywalli me lobo, ka oyeto Nyiŋ meno gibineke woko." 
Leviticus24:17 Ŋat ma oneko dano gibineke bene. 
Leviticus24:18 Ŋat ma oneko loo biculo acula; kwo giculo ki kwo. 
Leviticus24:19 Ka ŋat mo oketo ŋolo i kom lawote, en bene gibitime kit meno;" 
Leviticus24:20 turo cogo giculo ki turo cogo, waŋ giculo ki waŋ, lak giculo ki lak; kit macalo oketo ŋolo i kom dano mo-ni, en bene gibiketo ŋolo i kome." 
Leviticus24:21 Ŋat ma oneko loo biculo acula; ŋat ma oneko dano gibineke woko. 
Leviticus24:22 Cik bibedo acel pi labedo ki pi anywalli me lobo; pien an a Rwot Lubaŋawu.” 
Leviticus24:23 Moses ocako lok ki jo Icrael, ci gutero dano ma oceno cen woko i ŋe gony, gucele woko ki got. Kit meno jo Icrael gutiyo kit ma Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Leviticus25:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses i wi got Cinai ni," 
Leviticus25:2 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, Ka doŋ wuo i lobo ma abimiyowu-ni, lobo bigwoko cabit pa Rwot." 
Leviticus25:3 Wubicoyo pottiwu mwaka abicel, wubiŋolo kin jaŋ olokwu mwaka abicel, wubicoko nyige;" 
Leviticus25:4 ento mwaka me abirone en aye bibedo cabit me yweyo mot pi lobo, en cabit pa Rwot; pe wubicoyo pottiwu, pe wubiŋolo kin jaŋ olokwu." 
Leviticus25:5 Gin ma otwi kene i okaŋ pe wubikayo, pe wubicoko nyig olokwu ma pe wuŋolo kin jaŋe; bibedo mwaka me yweyo mot pi lobo." 
Leviticus25:6 Cabit man me lobo bimiyowu cam, in ki opiini ki aŋecani ki lapakacani ki labedo ma bedo boti." 
Leviticus25:7 Pi lim mewu makwo bene, ki pi lee ducu ma gitye i lobowu, gin ma cek iye ducu bedo me acamagi." 
Leviticus25:8 “Dok ibikwano cabit abiro me mwaka bene, mwaka abiro tyen abiro; kare meno me cabit abiro me mwaka bibedo mwaka pyeraŋwen wiye aboŋwen." 
Leviticus25:9 I mwaka meno ibimiyo gwara kok maloŋo i kom nino dwe apar me dwe me abiro; i nino me kwanyo bal en aye wubimiyo gwara kok romo lobowu ducu. 
Leviticus25:10 Wubikwero mwaka me pyerabic obed maleŋ, kun wutito i lobowu ducu ni kuc tye pi jo ducu ma bedo iye, En aye bibedo kare me jubili mewu, ma noŋo ŋat acel acel i kinwu dok gire i dul lobone, dok ŋat acel acel i kinwu bidok i doggolagi." 
Leviticus25:11 Mwaka me pyerabicce aye bibedo jubili mewu; pe wubicoyo iye kodi, pe wubikayo gin ma otwi kene, pe wubicoko nyig olok ma pe wuŋolo kin jaŋe." 
Leviticus25:12 Pien obedo jubili, bibedo maleŋ botwu; wubicamo gin ma oa ki i poto." 
Leviticus25:13 “I mwaka man me jubili-ni ŋat acel acel i kinwu bidok i dul lobone. 
Leviticus25:14 Ka icato lobo mo bot lawoti, nyo iwilo lobo mo ki bote, pe wubed ka bune kekenwu." 
Leviticus25:15 Ka iwilo ki bot lawoti, welle biporo wel mwaka mulubo jubili; en bicato boti kun poro wel mwaka ma ibinoŋo iye cam." 
Leviticus25:16 Ka mwaka pud odoŋ mapol, ibimedo wel ma iculo, ka mwaka doŋ odoŋ manok, ci ibidwoko welle piny, pien gin ma en tye ka cato boti en aye mwaka me cam ma bia iye." 
Leviticus25:17 Pe wubune kekenwu, ento wulwor Lubaŋawu; pien an a Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Leviticus25:18 “Pi meno wubilubo cikka, wubigwoko gin ma aŋolo, wubicobone, wek wubed ma lobo okwe mot." 
Leviticus25:19 Pien lobo biceko cam, wubicamo, wubiyen kwede, ci wubibedo ma piny okwe mot." 
Leviticus25:20 Ka ce wuwacci, ‘Wabicamo mono gin aŋo i mwaka me abiro-nu, ka ce pe wacoyo kodi, dok pe wacoko camwa ma a iye?’" 
Leviticus25:21 An’ abiciko gumma poto i komwu i mwaka me abicelle, wek onyak nyige ma romo pi mwaka adek kulu," 
Leviticus25:22 Ka wucoyo potowu i mwaka me aborone, noŋo pud wutye ka camo cam macon ca; nio wa i mwaka me aboŋwen i kare ma cam doŋ ocek, gikayo, noŋo pud wucamo en macon ca." 
Leviticus25:23 Lobo pe gibicato me atera woko matwal, pien lobona gira; pien wun wuwelo, dok wun lubedona." 
Leviticus25:24 I lobo ducu ma bibedo mewu wubiye ni giwar lobo. 
Leviticus25:25 “Ka ce omeru odoko lacan, ce ocato lobone mo ci watgi macok aye bibino ka waro lobo meno ma ominne ocato woko-ni." 
Leviticus25:26 Ka dano meno pe tye ki watgi mo ma twero warone, ce en kikome odoko lalonyo, ka onoŋo gin ma romo warone," 
Leviticus25:27 wek en okwan wel mwaka nia i kare ma ocato, ocul bot dano ma owilo-nu wel ma pud odon, ci potone bidok i ciŋe," 
Leviticus25:28 Ento ka pe tye ki lim ma romo dwokone i ciŋe, ci poto ma ocato-nu bidoŋ i cin lawilone nio ka mwaka me jubili oromo; gibidwoko potone i kare me jubili, bidok i ciŋe." 
Leviticus25:29 “Ka dano mo ocato ode ma tye i gaŋ madit ma gicelo ki cel, en twero warone ma peya mwaka acel oromo; bibedo ki twer me warone kadi pi mwaka kulu." 
Leviticus25:30 Ka pe giwaro ma peya mwaka acel oromo, ci ot meno ma tye i gaŋ madit ma gicelo-ni gibimoko ni doŋ bedo pa ŋat muwilo-ni matwal, wa i kare pa likwayone ducu; pe gibidwoko i kare me jubili." 
Leviticus25:31 Ento odi ma i caro ata ma pe gicelo ki cel ma orumogi gibikwanogi kacel ki potti ma i caro; gitwero warogi, dok gibidwokogi ceŋ i kare me jubili." 
Leviticus25:32 “I gaŋi pa Lulevi odi ma i gaŋi ma gimiyogi me bedo megi-ni Lulevi gitwero warogi i kare ducu. 
Leviticus25:33 Ka ce ŋat mo i kin Lulevi pe owaro, ci ot ma gicato i gaŋ mo ma omiyogi obed megi bidok bot rwode i kare me jubili, pien odi ma i gaŋ pa Lulevi meno jami megi ma gimiyogi i kin jo Icrael." 
Leviticus25:34 Ento olet ma orumo gaŋi megi pe gicato; meno lobogi matwal. 
Leviticus25:35 “Ka ce omeru ma bedo ka ŋeti odoko lacan ma pe twero konnye kekene, in ibikonye; en bibedo boti macalo weloni nyo labedo." 
Leviticus25:36 Pe igam lim mo me magoba ki bote nyo pe imed wiye, ento lwor Lubaŋani, wek omeru obed kwo ki ka ŋeti," 
Leviticus25:37 Pe ibimiyo en mako banya boti wek inoŋ iye magoba, pe imiye cam wek odwok boti kun omedo wiye." 
Leviticus25:38 An a Rwot Lubaŋawu ma yam akwanyowu ki i lobo Ejipt wek amiwu lobo Kanaan, abed Lubaŋawu." 
Leviticus25:39 “Ka omeru ma bedo ka ŋeti odoko lacan, ci ocatte boti kekene, pe ibimiyo en tiyo boti macalo opii;" 
Leviticus25:40 en bibedo boti macalo lapakaca nyo labedo. En bitic boti nio wa i mwaka me jubili; 
Leviticus25:41 ka lacen en bia woko ki boti, en kacel ki litinone bene. Bidok cen i doggolane, bidok i lobo pa kwarogi." 
Leviticus25:42 Pien gin luticca ma yam akwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt; pe gibicatogi me bedo opii. 
Leviticus25:43 Pe ibiloyo en ki loc magwa, ento ibilworo Lubaŋani," 
Leviticus25:44 “Lok i kom opiini ki aŋecani ma ibibedo kwedgi; itwero wilo opii ki aŋeca ki bot lurok ma orumo ka ŋetwuni. 
Leviticus25:45 Wutwero wilo ki i kin lubedo ma bedo botwu, dok ki i kin doggolagi ma bedo botwu, ma ginywalogi i lobowu; gibidoko limwu." 
Leviticus25:46 Wutwero miyogi bot litino awobewu ma bilubowu, gubed ginaleyagi matwal. Wutwero miyogi gibedo opiiwu, ento omegiwu ma jo Icrael pe wubiloyogi kit meno kun ŋat man loyo wadi ki loc magwa." 
Leviticus25:47 “Ka welo mo nyo labedo mo ma tye boti odoko lalonyo, kun omeru ma tye ka ŋete odoko lacan, ci ocatte kekene bot welo nyo labedo ma tye boti-ni, nyo ocatte bot wat ma i doggola pa welo meno," 
Leviticus25:48 ka doŋ otyeko catte, ci gitwero koko; ŋat mo ma i kin omege twero koke woko." 
Leviticus25:49 Nyo omin wonne nyo latin pa omin wonne twero koke, nyo watgi mo ma i doggolagi twero koke; nyo ka en odoko lalonyo, ci kokke gire kene." 
Leviticus25:50 En bikwano wel kacel ki ŋat ma con owile-nu, kun cako i mwaka ma yam owile iye nio wa i jubili, Wel me gonye bibedo ma poro wel mwaka; kare ma en obedo kwede bot rwode gibikwano macalo kare pa lapakaca." 
Leviticus25:51 Ka ce mwaka pud odoŋ mapol, en biculo lim me koke ma oporo ki wel mwaka, kun kwanyo ki i kom wel lim ma yam giwile kwede." 
Leviticus25:52 Ka pud odoŋ mwaka manok mo i mwaka me jubili, en bikwano wel ki dano ma owile-nu; ci biculo lim me koke ma oporo wel mwaka me ticce ma pud odon." 
Leviticus25:53 En bibedo bot rwode macalo lapakaca ma giculo mwaka ki mwaka; pe gibiloye ki loc magwa kun in ineno. 
Leviticus25:54 Ka ce pe gikoke i kit yo meno, ci gibigonye i mwaka me jubili, en kacel ki litinone bene." 
Leviticus25:55 Pien jo Icrael gin aye lutic ma tuŋ ciŋa; gin aye luticca ma yam akwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu. 
Leviticus26:1 “Pe wutim piwu kenwu cal lubaŋa mo, pe wucib cal apaya nyo wir jok mo, pe wucib got mo ma gigoro cal i kome ocuŋ i lobowu pi ryebbe i nyime, pien an a Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Leviticus26:2 Wubigwoko cabitta dok wubiworo ot mera maleŋ; an a Rwot. 
Leviticus26:3 “Ka wubilubo cikka kun wugwoko gin ma aciko ducu, wucobo kakare," 
Leviticus26:4 an abimiyowu kot ma cwer i karene, lobo biceko cam, yadi ma i poto binyako nyiggi." 
Leviticus26:5 Kare me dino kalwu bidikke olo wa i kare me pwono otok, pwono olok bene bidikke nio wa i kare me coyo kodi. Wubicamo cam ma romowu, doŋ, ci wubibedo i lobowu ma piny okwe mot." 
Leviticus26:6 Abimiyo kuc bedoi lobo, wubibuto piny, dano ma miyowu lworo bibedo pe. Abikwanyo ŋuu woko ki i lobo, pala lucwan pe biwok ki i lobowu," 
Leviticus26:7 Wubiryemo lumerok mewu, gibito i nyimwu ki palawu." 
Leviticus26:8 Jo abic ki i komwu gibiryemo jo miya kulu, jo miya ki i komwu biryemo jo alip apar; lumerokwu gibito i nyimwu ki’ palawu." 
Leviticus26:9 Abiparo piwu, abimiyo wunywal, wunya, dok abimoko gicikkena kwedwu." 
Leviticus26:10 Wubicamo cam macon i derowu pi kare malac, wubionyo maconne woko wek kabedo odoŋ pi manyenne." 
Leviticus26:11 Abiyubo kabedona i kinwu, tipo koma pe bikwerowu," 
Leviticus26:12 Abibedo ka wot i kinwu, abibedo Lubaŋawu, wun bene wubibedo jona," 
Leviticus26:13 An a Rwot Lubaŋawu ma yam akwanyowu ki i lobo Ejipt wek pe wubed opiigi; aturo rii okol ma giriyo i ŋutwu, amiyowu wutirre, wuwot atir." 
Leviticus26:14 “Ento ka pe wubiwinya, ka pe wubilubo cik magi ma aketo ducu," 
Leviticus26:15 ka ce wucayo cikka, ka iwu okworo gin ma aŋolo, ma miyo pe wubicobo gin ma aciko ducu, enro wuturo gicikkena," 
Leviticus26:16 ci abitimowu kit man: abimiyo lworo poto i komwu atura, ki aona opiyo, ki aburu ma coro wanwu kun balo komwu woko. Dok wubicoyo kodiwu noŋo, pien lumerok gibicamo." 
Leviticus26:17 Abiketo waŋa i komwu, merok bigoyowu ki i nyimgi; jo ma gidagwu aye gibiloyowu; dok wubiriŋo ata ma kun ŋat mo pe ma ryemo korwu." 
Leviticus26:18 Ka pe wuwinyo lokka kadi bed atimo kumeno, ci abimedde ki keto can i komwu tyen abiro pi balwu." 
Leviticus26:19 Abituro tek me wakkewu woko, abimiyo polo bedo tek macalo nyonyo, ki lobowu bene bedo tek macalo mola," 
Leviticus26:20 Wubityeko tek komwu nono pien lobowu pe biceko cam, ki yadi bene pe gibinyako nyiggi." 
Leviticus26:21 “Ka wun wukemo an marac, ma pe wuwinyo lokka, ci abimedde ki kelo two mapek i komwu, ma romo lwak balwu tyen abiro." 
Leviticus26:22 Dok abicwalo ŋuu me tim i kinwu, ma bimako litinowu, ma bityeko lim makwo ma i ciŋwu, ci bijwikowu wudoko jo manok, wa yowu birido woko." 
Leviticus26:23 “Ka pe wujukke, wudwogo bota pi kit can meno, kun pud wukemo an marac aye," 
Leviticus26:24 an bene abikemowu marac, ci an ki koma abipwodowu tyen abiro pi balwu." 
Leviticus26:25 Abikelo pala lucwan i komwu me lacul kwor me balo gicikkena, Ka wugurre i gaŋwu, abicwalo two gemo magwa i kinwu, ci gibimiyowu i ciŋ lumerokwu." 
Leviticus26:26 Ka abikwanyo cam ma wukwo kwede woko, ci mon apar gibitedo mugatiwu i keno acel, dok gibipokowu mugati kun gipimowu apima; ka wubicamo; pe biyeŋowu." 
Leviticus26:27 “Ka pe wuwinyo lokka kadi bed atimo kumene, ento pud wukemo an marac," 
Leviticus26:28 ci an bene abikemowu malyet, kun an kikoma aketo can i komwu tyen abiro pi balwu." 
Leviticus26:29 Wubicamo riŋo kom litino awobewu ki riŋo kom anyirawu. 
Leviticus26:30 Abituro waŋ jogiwu ma i wi godi, abitoŋo keno tyerwu me odok eceta, kun abolo komwu ma oto i kom kom muto me cal lubaŋawu, ci tipo koma bikwerowu woko." 
Leviticus26:31 Abijwero gaŋwu woko ducu, abimiyo kabedowu ducu maleŋ doŋ noŋo, pe dok abiŋweyo ginwu ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny." 
Leviticus26:32 Abineko lobowu woko, wek lumerokwu ma bibedo iye gubed ki ur pire." 
Leviticus26:33 Abikeyowu i kin lurokbci abiwoto pala lucwan ki i akura me lubo nkorwu, miyo lobowu bidoŋ noŋo cut, ki gaŋiwu bene gibidoŋ obur." 
Leviticus26:34 “I kare meno lobo bikwero cabitte pi kare ducu ma noŋo pud giweko ata-ni, kun wun pud wutye i lobo pa lumerokwu. I kare meno lobo biywe, kun noŋo tye ka kwero karene me yweyo mot macalo i ceŋ cabit." 
Leviticus26:35 Pi kare ma pud giweko ata-ni koŋ biywe, ki yweyo ma naka yam en pe onoŋo i cabitwu i kare ma onoŋo wun wubedo iye." 
Leviticus26:36 Jo ma i kinwu ma bidoŋ abicwalo lworo i cwinygi i lobo pa lumerokgi, miyo gibiriŋo dwan pot oboke keken ma yamo yeno. Gibiriŋo macalo ŋat ma riŋo pala lucwan, ci gibipoto piny kun ŋat mo pe ma ryemo korgi." 
Leviticus26:37 Gibiyokke kekengi ŋat man i kom lawote, macalo giriŋo lak pala lucwan, kadi bed ŋat mo pe ma ryemo korgi: pe wubibedo ki twero me cun i nyim lumerokwu." 
Leviticus26:38 Wubitum woko ki i kin lurok, lobo pa lumerokwu bicamo komwu woko ducu." 
Leviticus26:39 Jo ma i kinwu ma bidoŋ, komgi bilwal woko i lobo pa lumerokwu pi bal megi; dok pi bal pa kwarogi bene komgi bilwal woko macalo gin." 
Leviticus26:40 “Ento ka gibituco balgi ki bal pa kwarogi pi tim roro ma gutimo i koma, dok pi kemo an marac," 
Leviticus26:41 ma omiyo an bene akemogi marac kun aterogi i lobo pa lumerokgi; ka gibedo jo ma gulirre i cwinygi, pe i komgi keken, ci gidoko mwol ma giculo ka waŋ balgi," 
Leviticus26:42 ka doŋ abipo pi gicikkena ma acikke ki Yakobo, abipo pi gicikkena ki Icaka ki gicikkena ki Abraim, dok abipo pi lobogi." 
Leviticus26:43 Ento lobo bidoŋ ma gin jona pe iye, bigwoko cabitte ducu ma kun noŋo pud giweko woko ata ma dano pe iye. Ci gibiculo ka waŋ balgi, pien gubedo ka cayo gin ma aciko, dok tipo komgi okwero cikka." 
Leviticus26:44 Ento kadi bed kumeno, ka pud noŋo gitye i lobo pa lumerokgi, pe abieayogi, tipo koma pe bikwerogi ma romo miyo atyekogi woko liweŋ kun aturo gicikkena kwedgi, pien an a Rwot Lubaŋagi," 
Leviticus26:45 Pi gin weko abipo pi gicikkena ma acikke ki kwarogi ma yam akwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt ma rok ducu gineno, wek abed Lubaŋagi; an a Rwot.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Magi aye cik ki gin ma Rwot oŋolo, ki cik ma en oketo i kin en ki jo Icrael i wi got Cinai ki i dog Moses." 
Leviticus27:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Leviticus27:2 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, Ka dano mo okwoŋo kwoŋ ma pire tek ma otiko kom dano bot Rwot, ma myero in iŋol welle," 
Leviticus27:3 ci wel ma iŋolo pi laco ma mwaka me ditte romo pyeraryo o-wa i pyerabicel bibedo cekel me ryal pyerabic, ma giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ," 
Leviticus27:4 Ka ce dano meno ma kwon otiko obedo dako, ci ibiŋolo wel me cekel pyeradek." 
Leviticus27:5 Ka mwaka me ditte romo abic o wa i pyeraryo, ibiŋolo pi laco cekel pyeraryo, pi dako cekel apar." 
Leviticus27:6 Ka ce ditte romo dwe acel o wa i mwaka abic, ibiŋolo cekel me ryal abic pi laco, cekel me ryal adek pi nyako." 
Leviticus27:7 Ka mwaka me ditte romo pyerabicel nyo makato, ibiŋolo cekel apar wiye abic pi laco, pi dako apar." 
Leviticus27:8 Ka ce dano mo lacan twatwal, ma pe twero miyo wel ma iŋolle, ci en bitero dano ma gikwoŋo pire-ni i nyim ajwaka ci ajwaka aye biŋolle wel, kun lubo gin ma dano ma okwoŋo kwoŋ-ŋu twero noŋone." 
Leviticus27:9 “Ka ce kwoŋ otiko lee mo ma gityero me bedo gityer bot Rwot, lee ducu ma kit meno ma dano miyo bot Rwot bedo maleŋ." 
Leviticus27:10 En pe bilokone woko ki gin mukene, nyo gwenyo loko ki wadi mo, maberre ki maracce, nyo maracce ki maberre; nyo ka en oloko lee mo ki lee wadi, ci gin aryo ducu ma gilokogi-ni gibibedo maleŋ." 
Leviticus27:11 Ka ce obedo lee mo ma keni, ma pe gityero me bedo gityer bot Rwot, ci dano meno bitero lee-nu i nyim ajwaka." 
Leviticus27:12 Ajwaka biŋolo welle, kadi lee-nu ber kadi rac; macalo in ajwaka iŋolo welle, ci bicuŋ kit meno." 
Leviticus27:13 Ento ka en mito kokone woko, en bimedo acel me abic i kom welle." 
Leviticus27:14 “Ka dano mo onyero ode obed maleŋ bot Rwot, ci ajwaka biŋolo welle, ka ber ka rac; ka ajwaka oŋolo welle, ci bicuŋ kit meno." 
Leviticus27:15 Ka ce ŋat ma odyero ode-ni mito warone woko, en bimedo acel me abic i kom welle ci bidok bote." 
Leviticus27:16 “Ka dano mo odyero but lobone bot Rwot ki i kom lobo ma oleyo ki bot kwarone, ci ibiŋolo welle kun poro kodi ma gitwero coyo iye; ka romo coyo iye kodi cayiri guniya adek, Gibiŋolo iye cekel me ryal pyerabic." 
Leviticus27:17 Ka en odyero potone i mwaka me jubili, ci bicuŋ i wel kikome ma iŋolo," 
Leviticus27:18 Ento ka odyero potone lacen i ŋe jubili, ajwaka biŋolo wel-lim ma myero gicul iye kun poro wel mwaka ma pud odoŋ nio i mwaka me jubili, ci wel ma yam inolo-ni gibidwoko piny." 
Leviticus27:19 Ka ce dano ma odyero peto-ni mito warone woko, en bimedo acel me abic i kom welle, ci bidoŋ i cine." 
Leviticus27:20 Ento ka en pe mito waro po to-nu, nyo ka otyeko cato poto woko bot dano mukene, pe doŋ gibiwarone matwal," 
Leviticus27:21 Poto meno ka gigonyo i jubili bibedo maleŋ pi Rwot, macalo poto ma gikwero matwal; ci ajwaka aye doŋ bibedo rwode." 
Leviticus27:22 “Ka odyero bot Rwot poto mo ma owilo awila, ma pe dul lobo ma oleyo ki bot kwarone," 
Leviticus27:23 ajwaka biŋolo wene nio i mwaka me jubili, ci dano-nu bimiyo wel ma giŋolo i nino meno wek obed maleŋ pi Rwot." 
Leviticus27:24 Ci i mwaka me jubili poto bidok i ciŋ ŋat ma yam giwilo ki bote-ni, en ŋat ma poto-nu obedo mere kun oleyo ki bot kwarone." 
Leviticus27:25 Wel ducu ma giŋolo bilubo cekel me kabedo maleŋ, kun cekel acel romo gera pyeraryo." 
Leviticus27:26 “Ento litino kayo pa lee dano pe twero dyero, pien litino kayo ducu gibedo pa Rwot; kadi bed twon nyo romo, meno pa Rwot gire." 
Leviticus27:27 Ka lee ma keni, en biwilone ki boti i wel ma iŋolo, kun medo acel me abic i wiye; nyo ka pe gikoko, gibicatone acata i wel ma iŋolo." 
Leviticus27:28 “Ento gin ducu ma onoŋo gidyero i ciŋ Rwot matwal, ma dano mo odyero i ciŋ Rwot matwal ki i kin gin ma tye bote, kadi dano nyo lee nyo poto ma oleyo ki bot kwarone, pe gibicato kadi ki warone; gin ducu ma gidyero iciŋ Rwot matwal bedo gin maleŋ makato pi Rwot." 
Leviticus27:29 Dano mo-ni ma gidyero iciŋ Rwot matwal, ma myero ginek woko ki i kin dano, pe gitwero kokone; gibineke woko aneka." 
Leviticus27:30 “Acel me apar ducu mua i lobo, kadi bed kodi ma ocek i poto nyo nyig yat ma onyak, meno jami pa Rwot gire, gin maleŋ pa Rwot." 
Leviticus27:31 Ka dano mo mito koko gin mo i kom gin me aparre, en bimedo dul acel me abic i wiye." 
Leviticus27:32 Dul acel me apar pa dyaŋi ki romi nyo dyegi ducu, lee me aparre ducu i kin lim ducu ma kato i te odoo pa lakwat, meno bibedo maleŋ pi Rwot." 
Leviticus27:33 Rwode pe bipenyo ka ber nyo rac, dok pe bi koko kun gwenyo ki wadi mo; ka giloko, ci gin aryo ducuma gilokogi-ni gibibedo maleŋ; pe gibikokogi akoka.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Magi aye cik ma yam Rwot ociko ki Moses pi jo Icrael ki i wi got Cinai. 
Numbers1:1 Rwot oloko ki Moses i tim Cinai; i kema me rwatte, i kom nino dwe mukwoŋo me dwe me aryo, i mwaka me aryone nia i kare ma doŋ gua woko ki i lobo Ejipt. Owacci," 
Numbers1:2 “Kwan wel lwakjo Icrael ducu, kun ilubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi kit ma Wel nyiŋgi tye kwede, kun ikwano co ducu ki acel acel," 
Numbers1:3 cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo Icrael ducu ma romo cito ka lweny; wubikwanogi wun ki Aron ki bucagi." 
Numbers1:4 Dok wubibedo ki dano acel ma oa ki i kaka acel acel, ma ŋat acel acel bibedo ladit wi kaka ki i ot pa kwarogi," 
Numbers1:5 Man gin aye nyiŋ jo ma gibicuŋ ka konyowu: Jo pa Reuben, Elijur wod pa Cedeur;" 
Numbers1:6 jo pa Cimeon, Celumiel wod pa Juricadai;" 
Numbers1:7 jo pa Juda, Nakucon wod pa Aminadab;" 
Numbers1:8 jo pa Icakar, Netanel wod pa Juar;" 
Numbers1:9 jo pa Jabulon, Eliab wod pa Kelon;" 
Numbers1:10 i awobe pa Yucepu, jo pa Epraim, Elicama wod pa Amikud, jo pa Manace, Gamaliel wod pa Pedajur;" 
Numbers1:11 jo pa Benjamin, Abidan wod pa Gideoni;" 
Numbers1:12 jo pa Dan, Akiejer wod pa Amicadai;" 
Numbers1:13 jo pa Acer, Pagiel wod pa Okoran;" 
Numbers1:14 jo pa Gad, Eliacap wod pa Deuel;" 
Numbers1:15 jo pa Naputali, Akira wod pa Enan,”" 
Numbers1:16 Man gin aye dano ma giyero ki i lwak, ma gin aye lutel wi kaka pa kwarogi, gin ludito ma i kaka pa jo Icrael." 
Numbers1:17 Moses ki Aron gukwanyo jo meno ma doŋ gikwano nyiŋgi-ni," 
Numbers1:18 ci i kom nino mukwoŋo me dwe me aryo gucoko lwak ducu kacel. Gin gunyuto watgi kun gilubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, kit ma wel nyiŋgi tye kwede, cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo dok kwede malo, ki acel acel," 
Numbers1:19 macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses. En okwanogi i tim Cinai kit meno, Welgi ene:" 
Numbers1:20 Jo pa Reuben, latin kayo pa Icrael. Ka gikwano wel likwayone kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:21 wel jo ma i kaka pa Reuben oromo alip pyeraŋwen wiye abicel, ki miya abic." 
Numbers1:22 Jo pa Cimeon. Ka gikwano wel likwayone kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:23 wel-jo ma i kaka pa Cimeon oromo alip pyerabic wiye aboŋwen, ki miya adek." 
Numbers1:24 Jo pa Gad. Ka gikwano wel likwayo ne kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma mwaki me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:25 wel jo ma i kaka pa Gad oromo alip pyeraŋwen wiye abic, ki miya abicel ki pyerabic." 
Numbers1:26 Jo pa Juda. Ka gikwano wel likwayo ne kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:27 wel jo ma i kaka pa Juda oromo alip pyerabiro wiye aŋwen, ki miya abicel." 
Numbers1:28 Jo pa Icakar. Ka gikwano wel likwayone kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:29 Wel jo ma i kaka pa Icakar oromo alip pyerabic wiye aŋwen, ki miya aŋwen." 
Numbers1:30 Jo pa Jabulon. Ka gikwano wel likwayone kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:31 wel jo ma i kaka pa Jabulon oromo alip pyerabic wiye abiro, ki miya aŋwen." 
Numbers1:32 Jo pa Yucepu, jo pa Epraim. Ka gikwano wel likwayone kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:33 wel jo ma i kaka pa Epraim oromo alip pyeraŋwen, ki miya aŋwen." 
Numbers1:34 Jo pa Manace. Ka gikwano wel likwayone kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:35 wel jo ma i kaka pa Manace oromo alip pyeradek wiye aryo, ki miya aryo." 
Numbers1:36 Jo pa Benjamin. Ka gikwano wel likwayone kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, co ducu cakke ki I kom jo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:37 wel jo ma i kaka pa Benjamin oromo alip pyeradek wiye abic, ki miya aŋwen." 
Numbers1:38 Jo pa Dan. Ka gikwano wel likwayone kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:39 wel jo ma i kaka pa Dan oromo alip pyerabicel wiye aryo, ki miya abiro." 
Numbers1:40 Jo pa Acer. Ka gikwano Wel likwayone kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:41 wel jo ma i kaka pa Acer oromo alip pyeraŋwen wiye acel, ki miya abic." 
Numbers1:42 Jo pa Naputali. Ka gikwano Wel likwayone kun gicoyo nyiŋgi ki acel acel ma lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi, co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma giromo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:43 Wel jo ma i kaka pa Naputali oromo alip pyerabic wiye adek, ki miya aŋwen." 
Numbers1:44 Meno gin aye jo ma gikwano welgi, ma yam Moses ki Aron gukwano, kun lutel wi Icrael gukonyogi, jo apar wiye aryo, ma ŋat acel acel ocuŋ pi ot pa kwarogi," 
Numbers1:45 Kit meno wel jo Icrael ducu ma gikwano kun gilubo odi pa kwarogi, nia ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo dok kwede malo, jo Icrael ducu ma romo cito ka lweny," 
Numbers1:46 welgi ducu onoŋo oromo alip miya abicel ki adek, ki miya abic ki pyerabic noŋo." 
Numbers1:47 Ento jo pa Levi pe gikwano welgi kacel kwedgi kun gilubo kaka pa kwarogi," 
Numbers1:48 pien onoŋo Rwot owaco ki Moses ni," 
Numbers1:49 “Wel kaka pa Levi aye pe ikwan, pe ibikwano welgi i kin jo Icrael;" 
Numbers1:50 ento ket jo pa Levi gubed ludito ma loyo tic i kema lok me caden, gulo jamine ducu, wa gin ducu ma tye iye. Gin aye bitiŋo kema ki jami ma tye iye ducu, gibitic iye, dok gibiguro kema me butogi rumo kema pa Lubaŋa," 
Numbers1:51 Ka kema bicako wot, ci gin Lulevi aye gibiputo woko; dok ka gibiguro kema, Lulevi aye gibigurone. Ka ce dano mo ata onyiko cok ki kema, gibineko woko." 
Numbers1:52 Jo Icrael gibiguro kemagi ki dog buca monygi, dano acel acel ki dog gonygi, ki dano acel acel i te benderane." 
Numbers1:53 Ento jo pa Levi gibiguro kemagi rumo kema lok me caden, wek akemo pe opot i kom lwak jo Icrael; jo pa Levi gibigwoko kema lok me caden.”" 
Numbers1:54 Jo Icrael gutimo kit meno gutiyo gin ducu kit ma onoŋo Rwot ociko ki Moses. 
Numbers2:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni," 
Numbers2:2 “Jo Icrael gibiguro kemagi ŋat acel acel i te benderane, kun gitye ki lanyut me odi pa kwarogi; gibiguro kemagi kun doggi tiko kema me rwatte tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi ducu." 
Numbers2:3 Jo ma biguro kemagi yo tuŋ wokceŋ, ka ma ceŋ tuc ki iye-ni, gibibedo jo ma i te bendera pa Juda, kun gilubo buca monygi; latel wi jo pa Juda aye Nakucon ma wod pa Aminadab," 
Numbers2:4 ma gikwano wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyerabiro wiye aŋwen, ki miya abicel." 
Numbers2:5 Jo ma biguro kemagi ma cok kwede gibibedo kaka pa Icakar; latel wi jo pa Icakar aye Natanel ma wod pa Jura," 
Numbers2:6 ma gikwano wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyerabic wiye aŋwen ki miya aŋwen," 
Numbers2:7 Ka dok kaka pa Jabulon; latel wi jo pa Jabulon aye Eliab ma wod pa Kelon," 
Numbers2:8 ma gikwano wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyerabic wiye abiro, ki miya aŋwen." 
Numbers2:9 Wel jo ducu ma i gony pa Juda, i bucagi, oromo alip miya acel ki pyeraboro wiye aŋwen, ki miya aŋwen. Ka wot ocakke, gin aye gibitelo yo." 
Numbers2:10 “Ki yo tuŋ acuc en aye bendera me gony pa jo pa Reuben bicuŋ iye, kun gilubo buca monygi; latel wi jo pa Reuben aye Elijur ma wod pa Cedeur," 
Numbers2:11 ma gikwano Wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyeraŋwen wiye abicel, ki miya abic." 
Numbers2:12 Jo ma biguro kemagi ma cok kwede gibibedo kaka pa Cimeon; latel wi jo pa Cimeon aye Celumiel ma wod pa Juricadai," 
Numbers2:13 ma gikwano Wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyerabic wiye aboŋwen ki miya adek. 
Numbers2:14 Ka dok kaka pa Gad; latel wi jo pa Gad aye Eliacap wod pa Reuel," 
Numbers2:15 ma gikwano wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyeraŋwen wiye abic, ki miya abicel ki pyerabic." 
Numbers2:16 Wel jo ducu ma i gony pa Reuben, i bucagi, oromo alip miya acel ki pyerabic wiye acel, ki miya aŋwen ki pyerabic. Ka wot cakke, gin aye gibimol me aryone." 
Numbers2:17 “Lacen kema me rwatte bicako wot, kacel ki gony pa jo Levi, i dye gony ducu. Kit ma giguro ki kemagi gibicako wotgi kikore kit meno, kun dul acel acel tye ki kabedone, kun gilubbe aluba bendera ki bendera." 
Numbers2:18 “Ki yo tuŋ potoceŋ bendera pa jo Epraim bicuŋ iye, kun gilubo buca monygi; latel wi jo pa Epraim aye Elicama ma wod pa Amikud," 
Numbers2:19 ma gikwano wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyeraŋwen, ki miya aŋwen," 
Numbers2:20 Jo ma biguro kemagi ma cok kwede gibibedo kaka pa Manace; latel wi jo pa Manace aye Gamaliel ma wod pa Pedajur," 
Numbers2:21 ma gikwano wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyeradek wiye aryo, ki miya aryo." 
Numbers2:22 Ka dok kaka pa Benjamin; latel wi jo pa Benjamin aye Abidan ma wod pa Gideoni," 
Numbers2:23 ma gikwano wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyeradek wiye abic, ki miya aŋwen." 
Numbers2:24 Wel jo ducu ma i gony pa Epraim, i bucagi, oromo alip miya acel ki aboro, ki miya acel. Gin gibimol me adekke." 
Numbers2:25 “Ki yo tuŋ acam bendera pa jo pa Dan bicuŋ iye, kun gilubo buca monygi; latel wi jo pa Dan aye Akiejer ma wod pa Amicadai," 
Numbers2:26 ma gikwano wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyerabicel wiye aryo, ki miya abiro." 
Numbers2:27 Jo ma biguro kemagi ma cok kwede gibibedo kaka pa Acer; latel wi jo pa Acer en aye Pagiel ma wod pa Okoran," 
Numbers2:28 ma gikwano wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyeraŋwen wiye acel, ki miya abic." 
Numbers2:29 Ka dok kaka pa Naputali; latel wi jo pa Naputali aye Akira ma wod pa Enan," 
Numbers2:30 ma gikwano wel dano ma i buca monnye oromo alip pyerabic wiye adek, ki miya abicel." 
Numbers2:31 Wel jo ducu ma i gony pa Dan oromo alip miya acel ki pyerabic wiye abiro, ki miya abicel. Gin gibimol me agikkine, kun gilubbe aluba bendera ki bendera.”" 
Numbers2:32 Meno aye jo Icrael kit ma gikwanogi kwede, kun lubo dog odi pa kwarogi; jo ducu ma i gonygi ducu ma gikwanogi i buca monygi onoŋo guromo alip miya abicel ki adek, ki miya abic ki pyerabic noŋo." 
Numbers2:33 Ento jo pa Levi pe gikwano i kom jo Icrael, macalo Rwot onoŋo ociko ki Moses." 
Numbers2:34 Jo Icrael yam gutiyo kit meno. Kit ma Rwot con ociko ki Moses ducu, guguro kemagi kit meno i te benderagi, gucako wot bene gumol kit meno, ŋat acel acel ki doggolane, macalo dog odi pa kwarogi tye kwede." 
Numbers3:1 Magi aye likwayo pa Aron ki Moses i kare ma Rwot obedo ka lok ki Moses i wi got me Cinai. 
Numbers3:2 Magi aye nyiŋ awobe pa Aron: Nadab latin kayone ki Abiu, Eleajar ki Itamar;" 
Numbers3:3 meno aye nyiŋ awobe pa Aron, gin aye ajwagi ma giwirogi ki moo, ma Moses yam okwerogi pi tiyo tic me bedo ajwagi." 
Numbers3:4 Ento Nadab ki Abiu guto i nyim Rwot i kare ma gutyero mac mapat i nyim Rwot i tim Cinai, kit mac ma yam pe ocikogi kwede; gin pe gubedo ki litino. Mumiyo Eleajar ki Itamar gutiyo tic pa ajwagi i kare ma wongi pud kwo." 
Numbers3:5 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers3:6 “Kel kaka pa Levi cok, ci iketgi i nyim ajwaka wek guti bote." 
Numbers3:7 Gibicobo tic mapatpat pire ki pi lwak ducu i nyim kema me rwatte, dok gibitiyo tic pi jo Icrael kun gitiyo ticgi i kema." 
Numbers3:8 Gin aye gibigwoko jami ducu ma i kema me rwatte, dok gibitiyo tic pi jo Icrael kun gitiyo ticgi i kema." 
Numbers3:9 Ibimiyo Lulevi bot Aron ki awobene; gityeko miyogi bote matwal kun gikwanyogi woko ki i kin jo Icrael. 
Numbers3:10 Ci ibiketo Aron ki awo bene, gibitiyo ticgi me bedo ajwagi; ento ka ŋat mo mukene onyiko cok, gibineke woko.”" 
Numbers3:11 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers3:12 “Nen, doŋ atyeko kwanyo jo pa Levi ki i kin jo Icrael ma ka litino kayo ducu mukwono yabo ic i kin jo Icrael. Jo pa Levi aye gibibedo jona," 
Numbers3:13 pien litino kayo ducu mera. I nino ma yam aneko iye litino kayo ducu ma i lobo Ejipt ca, en aye akwero iye litino kayo ducu ma i Icrael gubed mera, pa dano ki pa lee; gibibedo mera; an a Rwot.”" 
Numbers3:14 Rwot owaco bot Moses ki i tim Cinai ni," 
Numbers3:15 “Kwan wel likwayo pa Levi, kun ilubo dog odi pa kwarogi, ki doggolagi; ibikwano co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo dwe acel dok kwede malo.”" 
Numbers3:16 Kit meno Moses okwano welgi kit ma Rwot owaco-ni, macalo yam ocike-ni." 
Numbers3:17 Magi aye awobe pa Levi ma giyeko nyiŋgi: Gercon, Kokat ki Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Magi aye nyiŋ awobe pa Gercon kun lubo doggolagi: Libni ki Cimei. 
Numbers3:19 Awobe pa Kokat kun lubo doggolagi gin aye Amram, Ijar, Kebron ki Ujiel." 
Numbers3:20 Awobe pa Merari kun lubo doggolagi gin aye Makali ki Muci. Meno aye doggola pa Lulevi, kun lubo dog odi pa kwarogi." 
Numbers3:21 Jo pa Gercon aye doggola pa jo pa Libni ki doggola pa jo pa Cimei; meno aye doggola pa jo pa Gercon. 
Numbers3:22 Welgi ka gikwano wel co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo dwe acel dok kwede malo oromo alip abiro, ki miya abic." 
Numbers3:23 Doggola pa jo pa Gercon yam giguro kemagi i ŋe kema yo tuŋ potoceŋ," 
Numbers3:24 kun Eliacap wod pa Lael obedo ladit ki i ot pa kwaro pa jo Gercon. 
Numbers3:25 Tic pa likwayo pa Gercon i kema me rwatte obedo me gwoko kema; en aye kema kikome ki laum wiye, boŋo cuka laum doggola me doggola kema me rwatte," 
Numbers3:26 boŋo cuka me anaba me larum dyekal, boŋo cuka laum doggola me dyekal ma orumo kema ki keno tyer, ki lwak tol lacikgi; dog tic ducu ma mitte pi jami magi." 
Numbers3:27 Jo pa Kokat aye doggola pa jo pa Amram, ki doggola pa jo pa Ijar, ki doggola pa jo pa Kebron, ki doggola pa jo pa Ujiel; meno aye doggola pa jo pa Kokat." 
Numbers3:28 Welgi ka gikwano Wel co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo dwe acel dok kwede malo oromo alip aboro, ki miya abicel ma gitiyo ticgi i kabedo maleŋ," 
Numbers3:29 Doggola pa jo pa Kokat yam giguro kemagi i ŋet kema yo tuŋ acuc," 
Numbers3:30 kun Elijapan wod pa Ujiel obedo ladit ki i ot pa kwaro me doggola pa jo. Kokat. 
Numbers3:31 Ticgi obedo me gwoko canduk, meja, okarmac, keno tyer, jami me kabedo maleŋ ma ajwagi gitiyo kwedgi ducu, ki boŋo kicika; dog tic ducu ma mitte pi jami magi," 
Numbers3:32 Ladit ma loyo ludito ducu pa Lulevi obedo Eleajar wod pa ajwaka Aron. En onoŋo loyo jo ma gitiyo ticgi i kabedo maleŋ," 
Numbers3:33 Jo pa Merari aye doggola pa jo pa Makali ki doggola pa jo pa Muci; meno aye doggola pa jo pa Merari. 
Numbers3:34 Welgi ka gikwano Wel co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo dwe acel dok kwede malo oromo alip abicel, ki miya aryo." 
Numbers3:35 Ladit ki i ot pa kwarogi ma i doggola pa jo Merari obedo Juriel wod pa Abikail. Gin yam giguro kemagt i ŋet kema yo tun acam," 
Numbers3:36 Tic ma gimiyo bot likwayo pa Merari obedo me gwoko lwak guti me kema, lwak riine, lwak wirre lwak tedi tere ki gin ma okemo ticce ducu; dog tic ducu ma mitte pi jami magi ducu." 
Numbers3:37 Ka dok lwak wir ducu ma gurumo dyekal, ki tedi tergi ki lwak teke lagurgi, ki lwak tolle." 
Numbers3:38 Jo ma yam giguro kemagi i nyim kema yo tuŋ wokceŋ, i nyim kema me rwatte ka ma cen tuc iye-ni, gin aye Moses ki Aron ki awobene. Gin onoŋo gityeko ketogi i dog tic ma i kabedo maleŋ, pi tiyo tic ducu ma mitte pi jo Icrael; ka ŋat mo mukene onyiko cok, myero ginek woko." 
Numbers3:39 Wel jo Levi ducu ma yam gikwano, ma Moses ki Aron gukwano welgi pi lubo cik pa Rwot, kun lubo doggolagi, co ducu cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo dwe acel dok kwede malo, oromo alip pyeraryo wiye aryo." 
Numbers3:40 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Kwan wel litino kayo ducu ma co ki i kin jo Icrael, cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo dwe acel dok kwede malo; kwan welgi kun ilubo nyiŋgi," 
Numbers3:41 An a Rwot; ibikwanyo jo pa Levi gubed mera ma ka litino kayo ducu ma i kin jo Icrael; dok iter lim makwo pa jo Levi ma ka litino kayo ducu ma i kin lim makwo pa jo Icrael.” 
Numbers3:42 Kit meno Moses okwano Wel litino kayo ma i kin jo Icrael ducu, macalo Rwot ocike." 
Numbers3:43 Litino kayo ducu ma co, macalo wel nyiŋgi tye, cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo dwe acel dok kwede malo, ka gikwano welgi onoŋo guromo alip pyeraryo wiye aryo, ki miya aryo ki pyerabiro wiye adek." 
Numbers3:44 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni 
Numbers3:45 “Kwany jo pa Levi gubed ma ka litino kayo ducu ma i kin jo Icrael, dok iter lim makwo pa jo Levi ma ka limgi; jo pa Levi gibibedo jona; an a Rwot." 
Numbers3:46 Pi koko litino kayo miya aryo ki pyerabiro wiye adek ma i kin jo Icrael ma gudoŋ ma wel pa jo pa Levi orem woko pigi-ni," 
Numbers3:47 ibigamo cekel abic abic pi dano acel acel; ibigamo kun ilubo cekel me kabedo maleŋ, ma cekel acel romo gera pyeraryo-ni." 
Numbers3:48 Lim meno ma gikoko kwede wel jo ma gudoŋ-ŋi ibimiyo bot Aron ki awo bene.” 
Numbers3:49 Mumiyo Moses ogamo lim me kok ki bot jo mudoŋ, ma wel pa jo Levi orem me kokogi;" 
Numbers3:50 ci ogamo lim ryal ki bot litino kayo pa jo Icrael ma romo cekel alip acel, ki miya adek pi pyerabicel wiye abic, kun lubo cekel me kabedo maleŋ." 
Numbers3:51 Moses omiyo lim meno me kok bot Aron ki awobene, kit ma Rwot owaco-ni, macalo Rwot yam ociko ki Moses." 
Numbers4:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni," 
Numbers4:2 “Kwan wellikwayo pa Kokat ma i kin likwayo pa Levi, kun ilubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi,"
