Numbers4:3 cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeradek o wa i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyerabic, jo ducu ma giromo donyo i dog tic pi tiyo tic ma i kema me rwatte." 
Numbers4:4 Man aye tic ma likwayo pa Kokat gibitiyo i kema me rwatte: gibitic i kom jami maleŋ makato. 
Numbers4:5 Ka gony doŋ bicako wot, Aron ki awobene bidonyo i kema ka kwanyo boŋo kicika, ci giumo kwede canduk lok me caden," 
Numbers4:6 Ka dok gibiumo wiye ki laa dyel, lacen gibiyaro boŋo ma bulu i kom meno, ka doŋ gibirwako talle iye." 
Numbers4:7 Gibipeto boŋo ma bulu i kom meja me mugati me aketa i nyim Rwot, ka doŋ gibiketo caani i wiye, ki atabo me odok eceta, ki weer, ki cupa me onyo gityer amata; mugati ma gicano i nyim Rwot jwijwi bene obed i wiye." 
Numbers4:8 Lacen gibiyaro boŋo makwar i wiye, ci meno gibiumo ki laa dyel laumme, ka doŋ gibirwako talle iye." 
Numbers4:9 Ka dok gibikwanyo boŋo ma bulu, ci giumo ki okarmac, kacel ki laputte, ki magacce, ki caanine’ ki atabo moone ducu ma gitiyo kwede ticce;" 
Numbers4:10 ci gibiboyo en ki jami ticce ducu ki laa dyel laumme, ka doŋ gibipyelo i wi tal latiŋŋe." 
Numbers4:11 Gibiyaro boŋo ma bulu i kom keno tyer me jabu, ka dok gibiumo kome ki gin ma gikwoyo ki laa dyel, ka doŋ gibirwako talle iye." 
Numbers4:12 Gibikwanyo jami tic ducu ma gitiyo kwedgi i kabedo maleŋ, gibiboyogi ducu ki boŋo ma bulu, ka doŋ gibiumogi ki gin ma gikwoyo ki laa dyel, ci gibipyelo i wi tal latingi." 
Numbers4:13 Gibijobo buru mac ma i keno me tyer woko, gibiyaro boŋo ma lamar lamar i wiye;" 
Numbers4:14 ka dok gibiketo iye jami tic ducu me keno tyer, ma gitiyo kwede tic i kome, weer lawaŋ mac, gin lacob riŋo, akwaya latokke ki becen, jami tic ducu me keno tyer; ka dok gibiyaro i kome laa dyel laumme, lacen gibirwako talle." 
Numbers4:15 Ka Aron ki awobene doŋ gutyeko umo kabedo maleŋ ki jami ma i kabedo maleŋ ducu i kare ma giputo gony, lacen likwayo pa Kokat doŋ gibibino ka tinogi, ento pe gugud kom jami maleŋ ducu, wek pe guto. Magi aye jami me kema me rwatte ma likwayo pa Kokat gibitiŋo." 
Numbers4:16 “Eleajar wod pa Aron aye biloyo moo tara, ki odok eceta ma ŋwece kur, ki gityer me moko kwon me nino ducu, ki moo wir, kun dok loyo kom kema ducu ki lwak jami ducu ma bedo iye, en aye kabedo maleŋ kikome ki jami ticce.”" 
Numbers4:17 Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni," 
Numbers4:18 “Pe iwek doggola ducu me kaka pa jo pa Kokat guto gutum woko ki i kin jo pa Levi," 
Numbers4:19 ento ber itimgi kit mau wek gubed makwo, ma pe guto i kare ma gibino cok ki jami maleŋ makato-ni: Aron ki awobene aye bidonyo ka nyutogi tic pa ŋat acel acel ki yec ma gibitiŋo," 
Numbers4:20 ento gin pe bidonyo iye ka neno kom jami maleŋ kadi matidi mo, wek pe guto.”" 
Numbers4:21 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers4:22 “Kwan wellikwayo pa Gercon bene, kun ilubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi;" 
Numbers4:23 ibikwano welgi cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeradek o wa i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyerabic, jo ducu ma giromo donyo i dog tic pi tiyo tic i kom kema me rwatte." 
Numbers4:24 Man en aye dog tic ma doggola pa Gercon ducu gibitiyo, me tiyo tic ki me tino yec:" 
Numbers4:25 gibitiŋo boŋo cuka me kema, ki kema me rwatte ki laum wiye, kilaa dyel ma giumo kwede wiye malo," 
Numbers4:26 ki boŋo cuka me anaba me rumo dyekal, ki boŋo laum doggaŋ me dyekal ma orumo kema ki keno tyer, ki lwak tol lacikgi, ki jami tic ducu ma gitiyo kwedgi iye; gibitiyo tic ducu ma mitte i kom jami magi." 
Numbers4:27 Tic pa likwayo pa Gercon ducu gibitiyo kit ma Aron ki awo bene gicikogi i kom jami ducu ma gibitinone, ki i kom gin ducu ma gibitiyone; dok in aye ibipoko yecgi ducu botgi me agwoka," 
Numbers4:28 Man en aye tic pa doggola ducu pa likwayo pa Gercon ki i kema me rwatte; dog ticgi bibedo i te loc pa Itamar wod pa ajwaka Aron. 
Numbers4:29 “Likwayo pa Merari ibikwano welgi kun ilubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi; 
Numbers4:30 ibikwano welgi cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeradek o wa i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyerabic, jo ducu ma giromo donyo i dog tic pi tiyo tic i kema me rwatte." 
Numbers4:31 Magi aye gin ma gimiyo botgi me atiŋa, ma en aye ticgi ducu ki i kema me rwatte: lwak guti me kema, ki riine, ki lwak wirre ki lwak tedi tere," 
Numbers4:32 ki wir ducu ma orumo dyekal, ki tedi tergi ducu, ki lwak teke lagurgi ki tol lacikgi, ki lwak jami ticgi ducu ki gin ma okemo tic ducu. Ibipoko botgijami ma gimito ni gutiŋ kun inyuto ki nyiŋgi," 
Numbers4:33 Man aye tic pa doggola ducu pa likwayo pa Merari, en aye dog ticgi ducu ki i kema me rwatte; bibedo i te loc pa Itamar wod pa ajwaka Aron.”" 
Numbers4:34 Moses ki Aron ki lutel wi lwak gukwano wel likwayo pa Kokat, kun lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi," 
Numbers4:35 cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeradek o wa i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyerabic, jo ducu ma giromo donyo i dog tic, pi tiyo tic i kema me rwatte;" 
Numbers4:36 welgi ma gikwano kun lubo doggolagi oromo alip aryo, ki miya abiro ki pyerabic." 
Numbers4:37 Meno aye wel doggola ducu pa jo pa Kokat, jo ducu ma gutiyo tic i kema me rwatte, ma Moses ki Aron gukwano welgi, macalo Rwot ociko ki i dog Moses." 
Numbers4:38 Man wel likwayo pa Gercon ma gikwano welgi kun lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi," 
Numbers4:39 cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeradek o wa i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyerabic, jo ducu ma giromo donyo i dog tic, pi tiyo tic i kema me rwatte;" 
Numbers4:40 welgi ma gikwano kun lubo doggolagi oromo alip aryo, ki miya abicel ki pyeradek." 
Numbers4:41 Meno aye Wel doggola ducu pa likwayo pa Gercon, jo ducu ma gutiyo tic i kema me rwatte, ma Moses ki Aron gukwano welgi, macalo Rwot ociko ki i dog Moses," 
Numbers4:42 Man wel likwayo pa Merari ma gikwano welgi kun lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi," 
Numbers4:43 cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeradek o wa i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyerabic, jo ducu ma giromo donyo i dog tic, pi tiyo tic i kema me rwatte:" 
Numbers4:44 welgi ma gikwano kun lubo doggolagi oromo alip adek, ki miya aryo." 
Numbers4:45 Meno aye jo me doggola pa likwayo pa Merari ma gikwanogi, ma Moses ki Aron gukwano welgi, macalo Rwot ociko ki i dog Moses." 
Numbers4:46 Jo ducu ki i kin jo pa Levi ma gikwano welgi, ma Moses ki Aron ki lutel wi Icrael gukwanogi kun lubo doggolagi ki dog odi pa kwarogi" 
Numbers4:47 cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeradek o wa i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyerabic, jo ducu ma giromo donyo i dog tic pi tiyo tic mapatpat ki pi tiŋo yec i kema me rwatte" 
Numbers4:48 jo ma i kingi ma gikwano welgi guromo alip aboro, ki miya abic ki pyeraboro." 
Numbers4:49 Macalo Rwot yam ociko kun wok ki i dog Moses ci gimiyogi ticgi kit meno, ŋat acel acel i dog ticce me tiyo tic nyo me tiŋo yec; gikwano welgi kit meno, macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses," 
Numbers5:1 Rwot owaco ki Moses ni," 
Numbers5:2 “Cik jo Icrael gucwal ludobo ducu gua woko ki i gony, ki dano acel acel ma kome cwer tut, ki dano acel acel ma odoko keni pi gudo kom dano muto." 
Numbers5:3 Wubicwalo co wa ki mon bene, kun wucwalogi woko ki i gony, wek pe gubal gonygi ma an abedo iye-ni odok keni.”" 
Numbers5:4 Jo Icrael gutiyo kit meno, ci guryemogi woko i ŋe gony; macalo Rwot con owaco bot Moses, jo Icrael gutiyo kit meno." 
Numbers5:5 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers5:6 “Wac ki jo Icrael ni, Ka ce laco mo nyo dako mo otimo bal mo ma dano timo kun ginayo waŋ Rwot, ce otiŋo alii," 
Numbers5:7 en bituco bal mere ma otimo-ni; ka dok en biculo waŋ gin marac ma otimo; bimedo iye acel me abic, ci miyo bot dano ma en otimo marac-ci." 
Numbers5:8 Ento ka dano meno watte mo pe ma myero giculle waŋ gin marac-ci, ci giculo Waŋ gin marac meno bot Rwot pi ajwaka, kun gibamo i kom nyok romo me kwanyo bal ma gitimo kwede gin lakwany bal ki i kome." 
Numbers5:9 Gityer ducu, nyo jami ducu maleŋ pa jo Icrael ma gikelo bot ajwaka bibedo mere." 
Numbers5:10 Jami maleŋ ma dano acel acel okelo bibedo mere; gin ducu ma dano mo omiyo bot ajwaka bibedo mere.” 
Numbers5:11 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers5:12 “Wac ki jo Icrael ni, Ka dako pa laco mo waŋe olal, ci otimo kir i kom cware," 
Numbers5:13 ka laco-mo obuto kwede, ce cware pe oneyo, ma dako ojerre kekene kun lokke okanne woko, dok pe tye caden mo ma moko lok kom dako-nu, pien pe ginoŋe iye;" 
Numbers5:14 ka cwiny me nyeko omako laco, kun nyeko omake i kom dakone ma ojerre kekene-ni, nyo ka cwiny me nyeko omako laco, kun nyeko omake i kom dakone, kadi bed dako pe ojerre kekene," 
Numbers5:15 ci laco bitero dakone bot ajwaka, kun tero gityer ma gimito pi dakone, agwata moko kwon acel me moko cayiri; pe bionyo moo i kome, pe biketo iye odok luban, pien meno gityer me moko kwon me nyeko, en gityer me moko kwon me lapo wic, ma bimiyo gipo pi bal meno." 
Numbers5:16 “Ajwaka bikelo dako cok, ci cibo i nyim Rwot." 
Numbers5:17 Ka dok ajwaka bitero pii maleŋ ki otako, ci jobo apwa ma i dye ot me kema, onyo i pii." 
Numbers5:18 Ka ajwaka bicibo dako i nyim Rwot, bigonyo yer wi dako wek oket ata lijayi, ci keto gityer me moko kwon me lapo wic i cinŋ, ma en aye gityer me moko kwon me nyeko. Ajwaka bimako pii makec me ceno dano i ciŋe." 
Numbers5:19 Ka ajwaka bimiyo dako-nu kwoŋo kwoŋ, kun waco ni, ‘Ka laco mo pe obuto kwedi, ka pe iŋak woko, kun ijerre kekeni ma it ye i te twero pa cwari, ci gin marac mo pe otimi pi pii man makec me ceno dano-ni," 
Numbers5:20 Ento ka ce waŋi olal woko, ma pud it ye i te twero pa cwari, ka ijerre kekeni, ci laco mo ma pe cwari obuto kwedi," 
Numbers5:21 ci (ajwaka bimiyo dako-nu kwoŋo kwoŋ ma kelo ceno dano kun waco ki dako-nu ni,) Rwot omi in idok ŋat ma giceno ki dano, kun dano gikwoŋo akwoŋa ki nyiŋi i kin lutuwu, i kare ma Rwot bitweyo nyodoŋi woko ci miyo ii bene deŋ woko;" 
Numbers5:22 wek pii man me ceno dano ocit i cin ii, omi ii odeŋ, ci otwe nyodoŋi woko.’ Dako bigamo ni, ‘Amen, Amen.’" 
Numbers5:23 “Lacen ajwaka bicoyo lok me ceno dano-ni i karatac, ka dok lwoko vinone woko ki pii makee-ci," 
Numbers5:24 ci bimiyo dakonu mato pii makec ma giceno ki dano-ni, ci pii me ceno dano bidonyo i iye, miyo iye mwode matek." 
Numbers5:25 Ka dok ajwaka bikwanyo gityer me moko kwon me nyeko woko ki i cin dako-nu, ci kwato gityer me moko kwon i nyim Rwot, tero i keno tyer." 
Numbers5:26 Ka ajwaka bijobo moko me gityer poŋ ciŋ acel obed gin me po i kome, biwaŋo i wi keno tyer; ka dok lacen en bimiyo dako-nu mato pii." 
Numbers5:27 Ka doŋ omiyo omato pii, ka ce onoŋo en otyeko jerre kekene kun otimo kir i kom cware, ci pii me ceno dano bidonyo i iye, miyo iye mwode matek; iye biden woko, nyodoŋe bitwene woko, dako-ni bidoko ŋat ma giceno dano ki nyiŋe i kin lutugi." 
Numbers5:28 Ento ka dako-nu pe ojerre kekene, ma bal mo pe i kome, gin marac mo pe bitimo, ci en binywalo litino." 
Numbers5:29 “Man aye cik ma mako lok me nyeko, ka dako ma tye i te twero pa cware noŋo wage olal, ci ojerre kekene," 
Numbers5:30 nyo ka cwiny me nyeko omako laco mo, kun nyeko omake i kom dakone; en bicibo dako i nyim Rwot, ci ajwaka bitiyo i kom dako kun lubo cik man ducu." 
Numbers5:31 Laco pe bibedo ki bal mo, ento bal bidok i wi dako ka obalo.”" 
Numbers6:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers6:2 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, Ka laco mo nyo dako mo okwoŋo kwoŋ ma pire tek, kwoŋ me bedo ajula pa Lubaŋa, ci okone gire kene pi bedo dano pa Rwot," 
Numbers6:3 en bikone gire kene kun pe mato koŋo vino nyo gin ma mero dano; pe bimato kono mawac ma oa i kom vino nyo i kom gin mo ma mero dano; pe bimato pig nyig olok, kadi camo nyige madyak nyo mutwone." 
Numbers6:4 I kare ducu ma en okone iye gire kene, pe bicamo gin mo ma oa i kom olok, kadi nyige matino ma i iye, wa odune." 
Numbers6:5 “I kare ducu ma noŋo en okwoŋo pire ni ebikone gire kene, lyedi pe bigudo wiye; bibedo dano maleŋ o wa i kare ma en okone iye pi bedo dano pa Rwot doŋ otum; biweko yer wiye lot maboco ma pe giŋolo." 
Numbers6:6 “I kare ma en okone iye gire kene pi bedo dano pa Rwot, pe binyiko cok i kom dano muto." 
Numbers6:7 Pe biballe doko keni kadi pi wonne nyo minne, nyo ominne, nyo laminne ka ce guto, pien gin ma nyuto konene kene pi bedo dano pa Lubaŋa pud tye i wiye." 
Numbers6:8 I kare ducu me konene kene en bibedo maleŋ pi Rwot. 
Numbers6:9 “Ka dano mo oto atura ka ŋete, ma miyo wiye ma okwero-ni odoko keni, en bilyelo wiye i nino me lonnyene; bilyelo i nino me abirone." 
Numbers6:10 I kom nino me aborone en bitero amam aryo nyo litino akuri aryo bot ajwaka i doggola kema me rwatte. 
Numbers6:11 Ajwaka bityero acel pi gitum me bal ki acel pi gitum awaŋa, kun timo gin lakwany bal ki i kom dano-nu, pien onoŋo obalo pi gudo kom dano muto. En bikwero wiye i nino meno kikome," 
Numbers6:12 ci kone gire pi bedo dano pa Rwot pi karene me kone kene, dok bikelo wod romo ma ditte mwaka acel obed gitum me tiŋo alii; ento kare mukwono ca noŋo oballe noŋo, pien yer wiye ma okwero-ni odoko keni." 
Numbers6:13 “Man aye cik ma mako dano ma ajula pa Lubaŋa ka karene me kone kene doŋ otum. Gibikele i doggola kema me rwatte," 
Numbers6:14 ci en bityero motte bot Rwot, wod romo acel me mwaka acel, ma kome pe ki mwonyo, pi gitum awaŋa, ki bwon romo acel ma ditte mwaka acel ma kome pe ki mwonyo pi gityer lakwecwiny," 
Numbers6:15 kacel ki aduku me mugati ma tobi pe iye, capat me moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo, ki capat marep ma tobi pe iye ma gireyo moo i komgi, ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata mutikogi." 
Numbers6:16 “Ajwaka bikelogi i nyim Rwot, ci tyero gitum me balle ki gitum me tiŋo alii." 
Numbers6:17 Ka dok bityero nyok romo obed gityer Lakwecwiny bot Rwot, kacel ki aduku mugati ma tobi pe iye. Ka dok ajwaka bityero gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amatane." 
Numbers6:18 Dano ma ajula pa Lubaŋa bilyelo yer wiye me kone kene i doggola kema me rwatte, ci bikwanyo yer wiye me bedo ajula-ni, keto i mac ma tye i te gityer lakwecwinynyi." 
Numbers6:19 Ajwaka bikwanyo bat nyok romo ka doŋ gitedo, ki capat acel ma tobi pe iye, ki i aduku, ki capat marep acel ma tobi pe iye, biketogi i dye cin ajula, ka doŋ olyelo yer wiye me kone kene." 
Numbers6:20 Ajwaka bikwatogi me bedo gityer me akwata i nyim Rwot; gin aye waŋ wat maleŋ pa ajwaka, kacel ki gok ma gikwato-ni ki em ma gityero; lacen ajula doŋ twero mato koŋo vino," 
Numbers6:21 “Man aye cik ma mako ajula ma okwoŋo kwoŋ. Gityerre bot Rwot bibedo ma oporo kwoŋŋe ma okwoŋo me bedo ajula pa Lubaŋa, ma en miyo kacel ki gin ma en romo noŋone: wek en oti ma oporo kwoŋ ma yam okwoŋo, kun lubo cik ma mako konene kene me bedo ajula.”" 
Numbers6:22 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers6:23 “Wac bot Aron ki awobene ni, Wubilamo gum i kom jo Icrael kit man: ibiwaco botgi ni," 
Numbers6:24 Rwot omini gum, ogwoki;" 
Numbers6:25 Rwot oneni ki waŋ me kica, otimi ber" 
Numbers6:26 Rwot tiŋ waŋe i komi omini kuc. 
Numbers6:27 Gibiketo nyiŋa i kom jo Icrael kit meno, ci an abimiyogi gum.”" 
Numbers7:1 Ka Moses otyeko guro kema, owiro ki moo dok okwero kacel ki jamine ducu. Ka dok owiro keno tyer ki moo bene, okwero kacel ki jami ticce ducu." 
Numbers7:2 I kare meno lutel wi Icrael, ma gin ludito kaka ki i odi pa kwarogi, lutel wi kaka ma giloyo wi jo ma yam gikwano welgi-ni," 
Numbers7:3 gutyero gityer megi, gukelo i nyim Rwot. Gumiyo gadigadi abicel ma gitye ki gin umo wigi, ki twoni apar wiye aryo; lutel wic aryo aryo gumiyo gadigadi acel acel, ci ŋat acel acel omiyo twon acel; gutyerogi ki i nyim kema." 
Numbers7:4 Rwot dok owaco ki Moses ni," 
Numbers7:5 “Gam jami-ni woko ducu ki botgi wek giti kwedgi tic ma i kema me rwatte, ci imigi bot Lulevi, macalo dog tic ma ŋat acel acel tye kwede.”" 
Numbers7:6 Omiyo Moses ogamo gadigadi ducu ki twoni, ci omiyogi bot Lulevi," 
Numbers7:7 Gadigadi aryo ki twoni aŋwen omiyo bot likwayo pa Gercon, ma oporo dog ticgi;" 
Numbers7:8 ka dok gadigadi aŋwen ki twoni aboro omiyo bot likwayo pa Merari, ma oporo dog ticgi, kun gitye i te loc pa Itamar wod pa ajwaka Aron." 
Numbers7:9 Ento pe omiyo gin mo bot likwayo pa Kokat, pien yam giketogi i dog tic me gwoko jami maleŋ ki me tinogi i wi gwokgi," 
Numbers7:10 Ci lutel wic gutyero gityer me kwero keno tyer i kom nino meno ma giwiro iye ki moo-ni; lutel wic gutyero gityergi i nyim keno tyer. 
Numbers7:11 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Gibityero gityergi kun latel wic acel acel tyero mere i ninone, pi kwero keno me tyer.”" 
Numbers7:12 Ŋat ma otyero gityerre i nino mukwoŋo en aye Nakucon wod pa Aminadab, ma i kaka pa Juda." 
Numbers7:13 En otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal acel ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:14 Ka doki atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki odok eceta; 
Numbers7:15 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel, ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:16 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:17 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel. Man aye gityer ma Nakucon wod pa Aminadab otyero." 
Numbers7:18 I nino me aryone Netanel wod pa Juar, ma en aye latel wi jo pa Icakar otyero gityer." 
Numbers7:19 Pi gityerre en otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal acel ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:20 Ka doki atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki odok eceta; 
Numbers7:21 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel, ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa:" 
Numbers7:22 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:23 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, Man aye gityer ma Netanel wod pa Juar otyero." 
Numbers7:24 I nino me adekke obedo kare pa Eliab wod pa Kelon, ma en aye latel wi jo pa Jabulon." 
Numbers7:25 Pi gityerre en otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal acel ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:26 Ka doki atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki o dok eceta; 
Numbers7:27 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel, ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:28 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:29 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel. Man aye gityer ma Eliab wod pa Kelon otyero." 
Numbers7:30 I nino me aŋwenne obedo kare pa Elijur wod pa Cedeur, ma en aye latel wi jo pa Reuben." 
Numbers7:31 Pi gityerre en otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal acel ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki mo ko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:32 Ka doki atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki odok eceta; 
Numbers7:33 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel, ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:34 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:35 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, Man aye gityer ma Elijur wod pa Cedeur otyero." 
Numbers7:36 I nino me abicce obedo kare pa Celumiel wod pa Juricadai, ma en aye latel wi jo pa Cimeon." 
Numbers7:37 Pi gityerre en otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal acel ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:38 Ka doki atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki odok eceta; 
Numbers7:39 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel, ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:40 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:41 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, Man aye gityer ma Celumiel wod pa Juricadai otyero." 
Numbers7:42 I nino me abicelle obedo kare pa Eliacap wod pa Deuel, ma en aye latel wi jo pa Gad." 
Numbers7:43 Pi gityerre en otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal acel ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:44 Ka doki atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki odok eceta; 
Numbers7:45 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel, ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa:" 
Numbers7:46 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:47 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, Man aye gityer ma Eliacap wod pa Deuel otyero." 
Numbers7:48 I nino me abirone obedo kare pa Elicama wod pa Amikud, ma en aye latel wi jo pa Epraim," 
Numbers7:49 Pi gityerre en otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal acel ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon," 
Numbers7:50 ka doki atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki odok eceta; 
Numbers7:51 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel, ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:52 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:53 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel. Man aye gityer ma Elicama wod pa Amikud otyero." 
Numbers7:54 I nino me aborone obedo kare pa Gamaliel wod pa Pedajur, ma en aye latel wi jo pa Manace." 
Numbers7:55 Pi gityerre en otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal acel ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:56 Ka doki atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki odok eceta; 
Numbers7:57 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel, ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:58 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:59 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel. Man aye gityer ma Gamaliel wod pa Pedajur otyero." 
Numbers7:60 I nino me aboŋwenne obedo kare pa Abidan wod pa Gideoni, ma en aye latel wi jo pa Benjamin." 
Numbers7:61 Pi gityerre en otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal acel ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:62 Ka doki atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki odok eceta; 
Numbers7:63 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:64 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:65 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel. Man aye gityer ma Abidan wod pa Gideoni otyero." 
Numbers7:66 I nino me aparre obedo kare pa Akiejer wod pa Amicadai, ma en aye latel wi jo pa Dan." 
Numbers7:67 Pi gityerre en otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:68 Ka doki atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki odok eceta; 
Numbers7:69 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel, ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:70 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:71 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel. Man aye gityer ma Akiejer wod pa Amicadai otyero." 
Numbers7:72 I nino me apar wiye acel obedo kare pa Pagiel wod pa Okoran, ma en aye latel wi jo pa Acer." 
Numbers7:73 Pi gityerre en otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:74 Ka dok atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki odok eceta; 
Numbers7:75 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel, ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:76 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:77 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel. Man aye gityer ma Pagiel wod pa Okoran otyero." 
Numbers7:78 I nino me apar wiye aryo obedo kare pa Akira wod pa Enan, ma en aye latel wi jo pa Naputali." 
Numbers7:79 Pi gityerre en otyero caani me ryal acel ma pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen me ryal ma pekke cekel pyerabiro, ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ; gin aryo ducu igi opoŋ ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers7:80 Ka dok atabo me jabu acel ma pekke cekel apar ma opoŋ ki odok eceta; 
Numbers7:81 wod twon acel, nyok romo acel, ki wod romo acel me mwaka acel pi gitum awaŋa;" 
Numbers7:82 nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal; 
Numbers7:83 ka doki pi gityer lakwecwiny otyero twoni aryo, nyogi romi abic, nyogi dyegi abic, ki litino nyogi romi abic ma ditogi mwaka acel acel. Man aye gityer ma Akira wod pa Enan otyero." 
Numbers7:84 Man aye obedo gityer me kwero keno tyer, ma gityero i kom nino ma giwiro iye ki moo, ma oa ki bot lutel wi Icrael: caani me ryal apar wiye aryo, becen me ryal apar wiye aryo, ki atabo me jabu apar wiye aiyo," 
Numbers7:85 kun caani me ryal acel acel pekke romo cekel miya acel ki pyeradek, ki becen acel acel pekke romo cekel pyerabiro, mumiyo ryal me jami-nu ducu pekke oromo cekel alip aryo, ki miya aŋwen ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ," 
Numbers7:86 Atabo me jabu onoŋo tye apar wiye aryo, ma odok eceta opoŋo igi, kun atabo acel acel pekke romo cekel apar ka giporo ki cekel me kabedo maleŋ, mumiyo jabu me atabo ducu oromo cekel miya acel ki pyeraryo." 
Numbers7:87 Lim makwo ducu pi gitum awaŋa giromo twoni apar wiye aryo, nyogi romi apar wiye aryo, ki litino nyogi romi apar wiye aryo ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, kacel ki gityer me moko kwon mutikogi; ki nyogi dyegi apar wiye aryo pi gitum me bal." 
Numbers7:88 Lim makwo ducu pi gityer lakwecwiny giromo twoni pyeraryo wiye aŋwen, nyogi romi pyerabicel, nyogi dyegi pyerabicel, ki litino nyogi romi ma ditogi mwaka acel acel pyerabicel. Meno aye obedo gityer me kwero keno tyer, ma gityero ka doŋ gityeko wirone ki moo." 
Numbers7:89 I kare ma Moses ocito i kema me rwatte ka lok iye ki Rwot, owinyo dwan ma tye ka lok kwede-ni ka a ki malo i wi kom me kica ma i wi canduk lok me caden-ni, kun winnye ki i kin lukerubi aryo, ma kun loko kwede." 
Numbers8:1 Rwot owaco ki Moses ni," 
Numbers8:2 “Wac bot Aron ni, Ka icibo laput malo, laput abiro-ni bimenyo kabedo ma i nyim okar-mac.”" 
Numbers8:3 Ci Aron otimo kit meno; ocibo mac laputte malo wek gumeny kabedo ma i nyim okarmac, macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Numbers8:4 Man aye kit tic ma gitiyo kwede okar-mac, gitiyo ki jabu ma giteto ki nyol. Nia ki i tedi tere o kwede wa i kom cal aturene onoŋo gitiyo kun giteto ki nyol; Moses otiyo okar-mac kun lubo kit cal ma Rwot onoŋo onyuto bote." 
Numbers8:5 Rwot owaco ki Moses ni," 
Numbers8:6 “Kwany Lulevi woko ki i kin jo Icrael, ci ilonygi." 
Numbers8:7 Ibitimogi kit man pi lonyogi: kir pii me lwoko bal i komgi, ci wek gin gulyel komgi woko ducu ki lyedi, gulwok boŋŋigi, gulonnye kekengi," 
Numbers8:8 Lacen wek gin gukwany wod twon kacel ki gityer me moko kwon mutike, me moko kwon mapwote ma girubo ki moo, ka doki in ibikwanyo wod twon mukene pi gitum me bal." 
Numbers8:9 Ka doŋ ibitero Lulevi i nyim kema me rwatte, kun icoko lwak jo Icrael ducu kacel." 
Numbers8:10 Ka itero Lulevi i nyim Rwot, jo Icrael gibiketo ciŋgi i wigi," 
Numbers8:11 ka Aron bityero Lulevi i nyim Rwot gubed gityer akwata ma oa ki bot jo Icrael, wek gubed ka tiyo tic pa Rwot." 
Numbers8:12 Ka dok Lulevi gibiketo ciŋgi i wi twoni, ci ibityero acel pi gitum me bal, ki acel pi gitum awaŋa bot Rwot, pi kwanyo bal ki i kom Lulevi." 
Numbers8:13 Ibitero Lulevi i nyim Aron ki awo bene, ci ibityerogi gubed gityer akwata bot Rwot." 
Numbers8:14 “Ibipoko Lulevi woko ki i kin jo Icrael kit meno, ci Lulevi doŋ bibedo jona." 
Numbers8:15 Ka doŋ lacen Lulevi gibidonyo ka tiyo tic ma i kema me rwatte, ka doŋ ityeko lonyogi kun ityerogi macalo gityer akwata." 
Numbers8:16 Pien gityeko miyogi bota matwal ki i kin jo Icrael; atyeko kwanyogi pira kena ma ka litino ducu mukwoŋo yabo ic, ma litino kayo pa jo Icrael ducu." 
Numbers8:17 Pien litino kayo ducu ma i kin jo Icrael gin mera, pa dano ki pa lee bene; yam akwerogi gubed mera i nino ma aneko iye litino kayo ducu ma i lobo Ejipt." 
Numbers8:18 Ci doŋ atyeko kwanyo jo pa Levi me leyo ka tyengi, gin litino kayo ducu ma i kin jo Icrael." 
Numbers8:19 Dok atyeko miyo Lulevi bot Aron ki awobene me mot, kun gia woko ki i kin jo Icrael pi tiyo tic i kema me rwatte pi jo Icrael, dok pi kwanyo bal ki i kom jo Icrael, wek gemo mo pe opot i kom jo Icrael pi nyiko cok ki kabedo maleŋ.”" 
Numbers8:20 Moses ki Aron ki lwak jo Icrael ducu gutiyo kit meno i kom Lulevi; kit ducu ma yam Rwot ociko ki Moses i kom Lulevi-ni, jo Icrael bene gutimo i komgi kit meno." 
Numbers8:21 Lulevi gulonnye kekengi i kom balgi; gulwoko boŋŋigi; ka Aron otyerogi macalo gityer akwata i nyim Rwot, ci Aron otimo gin lakwany bal ki i komgi wek gubed ma gulony." 
Numbers8:22 Lacen Lulevi gudonyo ka tiyo ticgi i kema me rwatte me konyo Aron ki awobene; kit ma onoŋo Rwot ociko ki Moses i kom Lulevi, gitimogi kit meno." 
Numbers8:23 Rwot owaco ki Moses ni 
Numbers8:24 “Man aye lok ma mako Lulevi: jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo wiye abic ki dok kwede malo gibidonyo ka cobo dog ticgi ma gitiyo pi kema me rwatte. 
Numbers8:25 Ka mwaka me ditogi oromo pyerabic, ci doŋ gibiweko ticgi ma gitiyo, pe doŋ gibitic matwal." 
Numbers8:26 Ento gibikonyo omegigi ma i kema me rwatte wek gugwok cik ma mako ticgi, ento pe gibitiyo tic kikome. Ibitimo Lulevi kit meno pi lok ma dok i kom ticgi.”" 
Numbers9:1 Rwot oloko ki Moses i tim Cinai i dwe mukwoŋo me mwaka me aryone ma onoŋo doŋ gua woko ki i lobo Ejipt kun wacce ni," 
Numbers9:2 “Jo Icrael myero gukwer nino madit me Kato i kare ma giciko. 
Numbers9:3 I nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen me dwe man otyeno, i kare ma giciko, en aye wubikwero iye; wubikwero kun wulubo cikke ducu ki lok ducu ma giciko i kome.”" 
Numbers9:4 Kit meno Moses ociko jo Icrael ni gukwer nino madit me Kato. 
Numbers9:5 Ci gukwero nino me Kato i dwe mukwono, i nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen, otyeno i tim Cinai; kit ducu ma yam Rwot ociko ki Moses, jo Icrael bene gutimo kit meno." 
Numbers9:6 Onoŋo tye jo mogo ma gudoko keni pi gudo kom dano muto, mumiyo pe gitwero kwero nino madit me Kato i nino meno. Gucito bot Moses ki Aron i nino meno;" 
Numbers9:7 ci jo meno guwacce ni, “Wan doŋ wadoko keni pi gudo kom dano muto; piŋo gigenowa pe watyer gityer pa Rwot i kin jo Icrael i kare ma giciko?”" 
Numbers9:8 Moses owaco botgi ni, “Koŋ wukur wek koŋ awiny gin ma Rwot biciko i komwu.”" 
Numbers9:9 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni. 
Numbers9:10 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, Kadi bed ŋatti mo i kinwu, nyo i kin likwayowu, odoko keni pi gudo kom dano muto, nyo otiŋo wot mabor, en pud twero kwero Kato pa Rwot." 
Numbers9:11 Gibikwero i dwe me aryo, i nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen, otyeno; gibicamo iye mugati ma tobi pe iye ki dek mogo makec." 
Numbers9:12 Pe gibiweko gin mo doŋ nio odiko, cogone mo pe gibituro; gibikwero kun gilubo cik ducu ma mako nino me Kato." 
Numbers9:13 Ento dano ma olony, ma pe ocito ka wot mo, ento dok oweko kwero nino madit me Kato, dano meno waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi, pien onoŋo pe otyero gityer pa Rwot i kare ma giciko; dano meno balle bidok i wiye." 
Numbers9:14 Ka larok mo obedo i kinwu, ka en kwero Kato pa Rwot, en bitiyo kun lubo cik me nino me Kato ki gin ma giciko iye. Wubibedo ki cik acel pi labedo ki pi anywalli me lobo.”" 
Numbers9:15 I kom nino ma giguro iye kema pa Lubaŋa, en aye pol obino, oboyo kom kema woko, en kema lok me caden; otyeno oumo wi kema ma nen macalo mac nio wa odiko." 
Numbers9:16 Ci obedo kwede kit meno jwijwi; pol umo wiye dyeceŋ, ki gin macalo mac umo dyewor." 
Numbers9:17 Ka ce pol owarre woko ki i kema, ci jo Icrael gicako wot anyim; i kabedo ka ma pol ocuŋ iye, jo Icrael giguro iye kemagi." 
Numbers9:18 Jo Icrael gicako wot pi cik pa Rwot, dok pi cik pa Rwot giguro kemagi; ka ce pol pud oumo wi kema pa Rwot, ci gin bene pud gibedo i gonygi." 
Numbers9:19 Ka pol omedde ki umo wi kema lwak nino mapol, jo Icrael bene gimedde ki gwoko cik ma mako tic pa Rwot kun pe gidak." 
Numbers9:20 I kare mukene pol umo wi kema pi nino mo manok, ci pi lubo cik pa Rwot gin bene gibedo i gony megi-nu kit meno; dok pi lubo cik pa Rwot miyo gidak." 
Numbers9:21 I kin mukene pol bedo cakke otyeno nio wa odiko; ka odiko pol owarre woko ki i wiye, ci gicako wot; nyo ka omedde ori pi nino acel ki dywor acel, kare ma pol owarre iye-ni, en aye gicako iye wot bene." 
Numbers9:22 Kadi bed ori i wiye pi nino aryo, nyo dwe acel, nyo pi kare mo malac, ka ce pol pud omedde ki umo wi kema, kun bedo kenyo, ci jo Icrael bene koŋ gibedo i gonygi kun pe gidak; ento ka owarre woko, ci gin bene gicako wot." 
Numbers9:23 Pi lubo cik pa Rwot miyo giguro kemagi, dok pi lubo cik pa Rwot miyo gidak, kun gigwokocik ma mako tic pa Rwot kit ma yam Rwot ociko ki i dog Moses." 
Numbers10:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers10:2 “Yub tum aryo me ryal ma ibitetogi ki nyol, ci ibitic kwedgi me lwoŋo lwak ki pi cako wot." 
Numbers10:3 Ka gikuto tum aryo ducu, ci lwak ducu gibicokke kacel boti i doggola kema me rwatte," 
Numbers10:4 Ento ka gikuto tum acel keken, ci lutel wic, ma gin ludito ma i kaka ducu pa jo Icrael, gibicokke kacel boti." 
Numbers10:5 Ka wukuto okok maloŋo kicel, ci gony ma yo tun wokceŋ gibicako wot." 
Numbers10:6 Ka wukuto okok maloŋo tyen me aryone, ci gony ducu ma yo tun acuc gibicako wot. Gibikuto tum kok maloŋo me cako wot anyim." 
Numbers10:7 Ento ka wumito coko lwak kacel wubikuto, ento pe wukut okok maloŋo," 
Numbers10:8 Awobe pa Aron, ma gin aye ajwagi, gibikuto tumo Cik me kuto tum bibedo botwu cik matwal nio wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu." 
Numbers10:9 Ka wucito i mony ka lweny ki lukworwu ma gidiyowu i lobowu, ci wubimiyo oduru mony kok kun wukuto tum, wek Rwot Lubaŋawu opo piwu ci olarwu ki bot lukworwu." 
Numbers10:10 I nino ma cwinywu yom iye bene, ki i nino madito ma gicikowu pigi, ki i kare me por dwe ducu, wubikuto iye tum i wi gitum awaŋa mewu, ki i wi gitum mewu me gityer lakwecwiny; gibikutogi wek Lubaŋa opo piwu; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu.”" 
Numbers10:11 I mwaka me aryone, i dwe me aryone, i kom nino dwe pyeraryo, pol ocako warre woko ki i wi kema lok me caden," 
Numbers10:12 omiyo jo Icrael gucako wot, gua woko ki i tim Cinai kun giwoto, gikobo; ci pol ocito ocuŋ wa i tim Paran." 
Numbers10:13 Gudak tyen man mukwoŋo kit ma Rwot yam ociko ki Moses. 
Numbers10:14 Bendera me gony pa jo pa Juda aye gutelo yo ki buca monygi ducu; lawimonygi aye Nakucon wod pa Aminadab. 
Numbers10:15 Lawimony me kaka pa Icakar obedo Natanel wod pa Juar," 
Numbers10:16 ki lawimony me kaka pa Jabulon obedo Eliab wod pa Kelon. 
Numbers10:17 Ka kema pa Rwot doŋ giputo, ci likwayo pa Gercon ki likwayo pa Merari ma gitiŋo kema, gucako wotgi." 
Numbers10:18 Ki bendera me gony pa jo pa Reuben ocako wot ki buca monygi ducu; lawimonygi obedo Elijur wod pa Cedeur 
Numbers10:19 Lawimony me kaka pa Cimeon obedo Celumiel wod pa Juricadai. 
Numbers10:20 Lawimony me kaka pa Gad obedo Eliacap wod pa Deuel. 
Numbers10:21 Dok jo pa Kokat gucako wot, kun gitiŋo jami maleŋ ducu; kema onoŋo doŋ giguro ocuŋ ma peya guo." 
Numbers10:22 Ka dok bendera me gony pa jo pa Epraim ocako wot ki buca monygi ducu; lawimonygi obedo Elicama wod pa Amikud. 
Numbers10:23 Lawimony me kaka pa Manace obedo Gamaliel wod pa Pedajur. 
Numbers10:24 Lawimony me kaka pa Benjamin obedo Abidan wod pa Gideoni. 
Numbers10:25 Lacen bendera me gony pa jo pa Dan ocako wot ki buca monygi ducu, kun gicoko ŋe gony ducu; lawimony megi obedo Akiejer wod pa Amicadai," 
Numbers10:26 Lawimony me kaka pa Acer obedo Pagiel wod pa Okoran," 
Numbers10:27 Lawimony me kaka pa Naputali obedo Akira wod pa Enan. 
Numbers10:28 Man aye onoŋo kit wot pa jo Icrael, ma lubo buca monygi, i kare ma gimol me cako wot." 
Numbers10:29 Moses owaco bot Kobab wod pa Reuel ma Lamidian, won dakone, ni, “Wan wacako wot wadak i kabedo ma Rwot cen owaco pire ni ebimiyowa-ni. Ber iwot kwedwa, ci wabitimi maber.”" 
Numbers10:30 Ento Kobab owacce ni, “An pe abicito; abidok i lobo tuwa ki bot lutuwa.”" 
Numbers10:31 Moses ogamo ni, “Alegi, pe iwekwa, pien in iŋeyo ni wabigony i tim, ci ibibedo botwa ma ka wanwa." 
Numbers10:32 Dok ka ibiwoto kwedwa, gin maber ducu ma Rwot bitimo i komwa, wan bene wabitimi kit meno.”" 
Numbers10:33 Gucako a woko ki i nyim got pa Rwot, ci gutiŋo wot me nino adek; ci canduk me gicikke pa Rwot owoto otelo yo nyimgi wot me nino adek pi yenyo kabedo me yweyogi," 
Numbers10:34 kun pol pa Rwot woto lamalo ka wigi ki i dyeceŋ, i kare ducu ma gicako wot nia ki i gonygi." 
Numbers10:35 Kare ducu ka canduk cako wot, ci Moses waco ni, “Doŋ ia malo, ai Rwot imi lumerok meri guket woko ata; wek jo ma dagi gurin woko ki i nyimi.”" 
Numbers10:36 Ka doŋ ocun ka yweyo, ci en dok waco ni, “Doŋ idwog cen, ai Rwot, bot lwak doggola mapol mada ma i Icrael.”" 
Numbers11:1 Dano gubedo ka lok ki akeca pi can ducu ma gitye iye, ci Rwot owinyo; ka Rwot otyeko winyone, kiniga omake, ci mac pa Rwot opoto, olyel i kingi, owaŋo kabedo mogo ma i ŋet gony." 
Numbers11:2 Lwak gukok bot Moses, ci Moses olego Rwot, ka mac ocako pye." 
Numbers11:3 Mumiyo nyiŋ kabedo meno gilwoŋo ni, Tabera, pien mac pa Rwot olyel i kingi." 
Numbers11:4 I kare meno lwak jo a ta ma gitye i kingi cwinygi opukke matek, omiyo jo Icrael bene gucako koko doki, kun giwaco ni, “Lutuwa, aŋa ma bimiyowa riŋo me acamawa?" 
Numbers11:5 Pud wapo pi rec ma yam wacamo nono i Ejipt, ki pi okwer ki okono ki kituŋgulu maboco ki kituŋgulu matino ki kituŋgulu matikki;" 
Numbers11:6 ento i kare-ni kero komwa doŋ peke, dok gin mo bene doŋ peke, kono nyo manna man ma waneno keme-ni.”" 
Numbers11:7 Onoŋo manna nen macalo nyig koo, dok bene nen macalo odok yat ma gilwoŋo bedola." 
Numbers11:8 Dano gicito ka jobone, ka girego ki kidi nyo giodo ki pany, ka gitedo ki agulu, nyo gitimo ki capatine; ka gicamo, mitte rom ki mit pa capat ma gitedo ki moo." 
Numbers11:9 Ka toyo oluk i dye gony ki i dyewor, ci manna bene poto piny." 
Numbers11:10 Moses owinyo ka dano gikok i doggolagi ducu, kun gat acel acel tye i dog kemane; ci kiniga omako Rwot matek, Moses bene cwinye pe obedo yom." 
Numbers11:11 Moses owaco bot Rwot ni, “Piŋo itima marac kuman? Piŋo an pe anoŋo gum mo i nyimi, mumiyo in doŋ iketo peko pa lwak man ducu i koma?" 
Numbers11:12 Onoŋo an aye abedo min lwak man ducu bo? An aye yam anywalogi bo, mumiyo Iwaco bota ni atiggi i kora, macalo lapidi tiŋo latin ma pud dot, atergi i lobo ma yam ikwoŋo pire ni ibimiyo bot kwarogi?" 
Numbers11:13 Ni kono abinoŋo riŋo kwene me amiya ki lwak dano man ducu? Pien gibedo ka kok i nyima kun giwaco ni, ‘Miniwa riŋo wek wacam.’" 
Numbers11:14 An pe atwero tigo lwak dano man pira kena; yecce pek mukato kare. 
Numbers11:15 Ka ibedo ka tima kit man, ci ber ineka woko magicel, ka anoŋo gum mo i nyimi, wek pe abed ka neno can kuman.”" 
Numbers11:16 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Cokka jo pyerabiro ki i kin ludoŋo pa jo Icrael, ma igeyo ni gin ludoŋo ki i kin lwak ki ludito ma loyogi; ci ikelgi i kema me rwatte, wek gucuŋ kunnu kacel kwedi." 
Numbers11:17 An abilor piny abino ka lok kwedi kunnu; ci abikwanyo cwinya mo ma tye i komi-ni, abiketo i komgi; miyo gibinywako tigo peko pa lwak kacel kwedi, wek in pe doŋ ibed ka tinone piri keni." 
Numbers11:18 Wac bot lwak ni, ‘Wulonnye kekenwu wubed maleŋ pi nino ma diki, ci wubicamo riŋo; pien wubedo ka kok i it Rwot kun wuwaco ni, “Aŋa ma bimiyowa riŋo me acamawa? Pien yam onoŋo watye maber giwa i Ejipt.” Pi meno Rwot bimiyowu riŋo ci wubicamo." 
Numbers11:19 Pe wubicamo pi nino acel keken, nyo nino aryo, nyo abic, nyo apar, nyo pyeraryo," 
Numbers11:20 ento wubicamo pi dwe acel kulu, nio ka bikatti woko ki i umwu, nio ka ocido cwinywu woko, pien wutyeko kwero Rwot ma bedo i kinwu-ni kun wukok i nyime ki pig waŋwu, wuwaco ni, “Piŋo yam waa woko ki i Ejipt?”’”" 
Numbers11:21 Ento Moses ogamo ni, “Jo ma abedo i kingi welgi romo alip miya abicel, co ma giwoto ki tyengi, ci in iwaco ni, ‘Abimiyogi riŋo wek gucam pi dwe kulu!’" 
Numbers11:22 Myero ginek lwak lim makwo, romi ki dyani-gu, wek oromgi? Nyo lwak rec ducu ma, tye i nam gibicoko kacel pigi, wek oromgi?”" 
Numbers11:23 Rwot ogamo dog Moses ni, “Cin Rwot aye doŋ odoko cek bo? Ibineno tin ka ce lokka bicobbe boti kakare nyo pe.”" 
Numbers11:24 Moses okato woko ka tito ki dano lok ma Rwot owaco; ci ocoko jo pyerabiro ki i kin ludoŋo pa jo Icrael, oketogi gurumo kema me rwatte." 
Numbers11:25 Ka Rwot olor piny ki pol, ci oloko kwedgi, okwanyo cwinye mo ma tye i kom Moses, oketo i kom ludoŋo pyerabiro. Ka cwiny pa Lubaŋa opoto i komgi, ci gucako lok macalo lunebi. Ento pe dok gumedde ki timo kit meno." 
Numbers11:26 Onoŋo jo aryo gudoŋ cen i gony, acel nyiŋe Eldad ki mukene nyiŋe Medad, ci cwiny pa Lubaŋa opoto i komgi. Onoŋo gitye i kin jo ma yam gicoyo nyiŋgi-ni, ento pe gukato woko gucito i kema me rwatte, mumiyo gubedo ka lok macalo lunebi i dye gony." 
Numbers11:27 Latin awobi mo oriŋo otito bot Moses ni, “Eldad ki Medad gitye ka lok macalo lunebi i dye gony.”" 
Numbers11:28 Ci Yocwa wod pa Nun, ma onoŋo obedo lakeny pa Moses cakke wa i tinone, owacci, “Moses, laditta, jukgi woko.”" 
Numbers11:29 Ento Moses owaco bote ni, “In nyeko omaki pira ce? Kono jo pa Rwot ducu gubedo lunebi, kono ber mada, wek Rwot oony cwiny mere i komgi!”" 
Numbers11:30 Ci Moses ki ludoŋo pa jo Icrael gudok i gony. 
Numbers11:31 Ka Rwot omiyo yamo okodo, ci okelo lwak aluru nia ki i nam, ci gupoto piny i ŋet gony. Lacce romo wot me nino acel ki tuŋcel, dok ki tuŋ mukene bene lacce romo wot me nino acel ma orumo gony ducu, opoŋo piny ma romo futi adek kulu." 
Numbers11:32 Dano gutwarre ka cokogi i nino meno dyeceŋ ki dyewor benebene, ki orwone bene. Jo ma gucoko manok keken gucoko muromo guniya pyeradek; ci gucako moyone murumo gony." 
Numbers11:33 I kare ma riŋone pud omoko i kin lakgi, ma peya gucamo otum, kiniga omako Rwot i kom dano, ci opwodo lwak ki two gemo mapek." 
Numbers11:34 Mumiyo nyiŋ kabedo meno gulwoŋo ni, Kibrot-atava, pien jo ma kecgi dwoŋ giyikogi kunnu." 
Numbers11:35 Nia ki i Kibrotatava lwak gutiŋo wot me cito Kajerot, ci gutiro gubedo kunnu." 
Numbers12:1 Onoŋo Moses onyomo dako mo ma nya jo Kuc, ci Miriam ki Aron gucako loko lok akeca i kom Moses pi dako-nu." 
Numbers12:2 Gubedo ka waco ni, “Rwot obedo ka lok ki dog Moses kene bo? Pe obedo ka lok ki dogwa bene?” Ci Rwot owinyo yo." 
Numbers12:3 Moses onoŋo yam mwol matek, mwol makato dano ducu ma onoŋo yam gitye i wi lobo-ni," 
Numbers12:4 Cutcut Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ki Miriam ni, “Wukat woko, wun adek ducu, wubin i kema me rwatte.” Gin adek ducu gukato woko." 
Numbers12:5 Ci Rwot olor piny ki wir me pol, ocuŋ i dog kema me rwatte, ka olwoŋo Aron ki Miriam. Gin aryo ducu gukato anyim." 
Numbers12:6 Ci owacci, “Wuwiny lokka. Ka ce tye lanebi mo i kinwu, an Rwot aweko en neya ki i ginanyuta, aloko kwede ki i waŋ lek." 
Numbers12:7 Ento bot laticca Moses pe bedo kit meno; pien atyeko keto oda ducu i ciŋe," 
Numbers12:8 Abedo ka lok kwede waŋ ki waŋ, ka maleŋ atyer, pe agoŋo lok; en neno kit ma Rwot cal kwede, Piŋo pe wulworo loko lok akeca i kom laticca Moses?”" 
Numbers12:9 Kiniga omako Rwot i komgi, ci ocito woko." 
Numbers12:10 Ka pol owarre woko ki i wi kema me rwatte, ci nen, kom Miriam orugo woko cut, okwor matar macalo pee. Ka Aron olokke yo tuŋ bot Miriam, oneno kome orugo woko matar" 
Numbers12:11 ci owaco bot Moses ni, “Ai, laditta, pe iket can i komwa pien watimo lok me miŋo, doŋ wabalo." 
Numbers12:12 Pe iwek en obed macalo latin ma ginywalo ma doŋ oto, ma riŋo kome nucune doŋ oballe woko ma pud oa aaya ki i minne.”" 
Numbers12:13 Moses okok bot Rwot ni, “Caŋe ba, ai Lubaŋa, abako doga boti do.”" 
Numbers12:14 Ento Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Ka nene wonne aye onoŋo oŋulo laa i waŋe keken, kono pe en obedo ki lewic pi nino abiro? Wek koŋ gitweye woko i ŋe gony pi nino abiro, ka lacen gibikele doŋ i gony.”" 
Numbers12:15 Kit meno gitweyo Miriam woko i ne gony pi nino abiro; ci lwak pe gumedo ki dak ka mo nio waŋ ma gimiyo Miriam odwogo woko i gony," 
Numbers12:16 Ka doŋ lacen dano gucako wot nia ki i Kajerot, ci gugony i tim Paran gubedo iye." 
Numbers13:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers13:2 “Cwal dano gucit gurot lobo Kanaan ma abimiyo bot jo Icrael. Cwal dano acel ki i kaka acel acel pa kwarogi, kun dano acel acel bedo latel wic i kingi.”" 
Numbers13:3 Moses ocwalogi ki i tim me Paran, kit macalo Rwot ociko; gin ducu onoŋo gin ludito i kin jo Icrael." 
Numbers13:4 Nyiŋi ene; i kaka pa Reuben Camua wod pa Jakur; 
Numbers13:5 i kaka pa Cimeon Capat wod pa Kori; 
Numbers13:6 i kaka pa Juda Kaleb wod pa Jepune; 
Numbers13:7 i kaka pa Icakar Igal wod pa Yucepu; 
Numbers13:8 i kaka pa Epraim Kocea wod pa Nun; 
Numbers13:9 i kaka pa Benjamin Palti wod pa Rapu; 
Numbers13:10 i kaka pa Jabulon Gadiel wod pa Codi; 
Numbers13:11 i kaka pa Yucepu, en aye kaka pa Manace, Gadi wod pa Cuci;" 
Numbers13:12 i kaka pa Dan Amiel wod pa Gemali; 
Numbers13:13 i kaka pa Acer Cetur wod pa Mikael; 
Numbers13:14 i kaka pa Naputali Nabi wod pa Vopci; 
Numbers13:15 i kaka pa Gad Geuel wod pa Maki. 
Numbers13:16 Meno aye nyiŋ jo ma Moses ocwalogi ka roto lobo. Moses ocako nyiŋ Kocea wod pa Nun ni Yocwa. 
Numbers13:17 Moses ocwalogi ka roto lobo Kanaan kun waco botgi ni, “Wucit i Negeb kuca ca, wuit malo wa i lobo godi,”" 
Numbers13:18 wek wunen kit ma lobo-nu tye kwede, ka ce jo ma bedo iye jo matego nyo jo magoro, ka ce ginok nyo gipol," 
Numbers13:19 ka ce lobo ma gibedo iye-ni ber nyo rac, ka ce gaŋi ma gibedo iye tye apero nyo girumo ki cel matego," 
Numbers13:20 ka ce lobone ceko cam nyo pe ceko, ka ce yadi tye i lo bone nyo pe. Wucam co ki i cwinywu, ci wudwog ki nyig yadi mogo mucek i lo bo kunnu.” Kare ma gin gucito onoŋo obedo kare ma nyig olok cako cek iye." 
Numbers13:21 Kit meno gucito ka roto piny nia ki i tim Jin o wa i Rekob, ma cok ki yo ma donyo i Kamat." 
Numbers13:22 Gucito nio wa i Negeb ka guo kwede i Kebron; ci Akiman, Cecai ki Talmai likwayo pa Anak onoŋo gitye kunnu, (Kebron onoŋo gigero ori mwaka abiro ma peya gigero Joan ma i Ejipt.)" 
Numbers13:23 Lurot piny guo wa i nota me Ecikol, ci guŋolo jaŋ tuga nyig olok acel ma olugo, gutiŋo ki tal mabor kun jo aryo aye gulebo, dok gukelo ki nyig okwer pomegranat ki nyig oduru." 
Numbers13:24 Kabedo meno yam gilwoŋo ni nota me Ecikol, pien jo Icrael guŋolo iye jaŋ tuga nyig olok." 
Numbers13:25 I ŋe nino pyeraŋwen gudwogo ki ka roto piny ma i lobo-nu. 
Numbers13:26 Gudwogo bot Moses ki Aron ki lwak jo Icrael ducu ma i tim Paran, i Kadec; gukelo lok ki kunnu botgi ki bot lwak ducu, dok gunyuto botgi gin mucek i lo bo-nu." 
Numbers13:27 Gutito ki Moses ni, “Wacito i lobo ma icwalowa iye; lobone mol cak ki moo kic, man aye nyig yadine ma wakelo-ni." 
Numbers13:28 Kun kono jo ma gibedo i lobo-nu jo matego, gaŋgi bene gigoyo ki cel matego, dok gidito twatwal; medo ki meno, waneno iye likwayo pa Anak." 
Numbers13:29 Jo Amalek gibedo megi i lobo ma i Negeb; jo Kit, jo Jebuc ki jo Amor gibedo i lobo godi; jo Kanaan gibedo i lobo murabo dog nam, ki murabo dog Jordan.”" 
Numbers13:30 Kaleb ojuko dano guliŋ woko i nyim Moses ci owacci, “Wan watugi cito kunnu magicel, wek wacamu woko; pien wan waromo loyogi.”" 
Numbers13:31 Ento dano ma yam gunywako kwede wot kunnu guwacci, “Wan pe waromo ette me cito i kom jo meno, pien gitego, gikatowa woko.”" 
Numbers13:32 Ci gukelo lok marac ma obalo cwiny jo Icrael woko i kom lobo ma guroto-ni, kun giwacci, “Lobo ma wawoto wabaro iye-ni, waroto ducu, lobone camo jo ma gibedo iye woko; dok jo ducu ma wanenogi iye kunnu jo ma komgi pek madito." 
Numbers13:33 Dok waneno twoni oluma kunnu, likwayo pa Anak ma kwarogi ducu twoni oluma. Wan giwa watino warom ki otwoŋo mamwa, dok myero wanen kumeno ki tun botgi.”" 
Numbers14:1 Lwak ducu gucako daŋŋe matek, ci dano gukok ki pig wangi dyewor benebene." 
Numbers14:2 Jo Icrael ducu gubedo ka nur i kom Moses ki Aron, ci lwakgi ducu guwaco botgi ni, “Kono nene wato giwa ki i Ejipt, kono ber! Nyo kono nene wato ki i tim kany!" 
Numbers14:3 Piŋo Rwot okelowa i lobo man wek ginekwa woko ki pala lucwan? Monwa ki litinowa gibiyakogi woko bene; kono nene pe obedo ber ka wadok giwa cen i Ejipt?” 
Numbers14:4 Ci gucako lok kekengi ni, “Wek wayeru laditwa mo, wek wadoku cen i Ejipt.”" 
Numbers14:5 Moses ki Aron gupoto piny aryeba ic i nyim lwak jo Icrael ma gucokke ducu. 
Numbers14:6 Ci Yocwa wod pa Nun ki Kaleb wod pa Jepune ma yam gitye i kin jo ma guroto lobo-nu guyeco boŋŋigi kekengi pien cwinygi ocwer. 
Numbers14:7 Guwa, bot lwak jo Icrael ducu ni, “Lobo ma yam wawoto wabaro iye, waroto, wanono ni lobone ber makato ducu." 
Numbers14:8 Ka i Rwot obedo yom i komwa, en biterowa i lobo-nu, ci miyo i cinwa, en aye lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic." 
Numbers14:9 Ento pe wujem i kom Rwot; dok pe wulwor wegi lobo-nu, pien gin kwon me acamawa mere. Gin mo ma geŋo ŋegi doŋ pe, dok Rwot tye tuŋ botwa; pe wulworgi.”" 
Numbers14:10 Ento lwak ducu guwacci, gicelgi acela ki got. Ka dok deyo pa Rwot onen i kema me rwatte i nyim jo Icrael ducu." 
Numbers14:11 Ci Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Jo man gibicaya pi kare ma rom mene? Gibikwero ye an pi kare ma rom mene, kadi bed atiyo lwak lanyut ducu ma rom man i kingi?" 
Numbers14:12 Abipwodogi ki two gemo, abitwonogi lobo ma nene myero obed me aleyagi, dok abimiyo in idoko rok madit mada ki matek makatogi.”" 
Numbers14:13 Ento Moses owaco bot Rwot ni, “Jo Ejipt dok gibiwinyo pire bene, pien in aye yam itiŋo jo man ki tekki ikwanyogi woko ki i kingi," 
Numbers14:14 dok gibitito bot jo ma gibedo i lobo man, Doŋ gityeko winyo ni in Rwot it ye i dye jo man, dok ni in Rwot aye gibedo ka neni waŋ ki waŋ, ki pol meri obedo ka cuŋ ka wigi, dok ibedo ka wot i nyimgi i wir pol dyeceŋ ki i wir mac dyewor." 
Numbers14:15 Ka ineko jo man woko lawaŋe acel, ci lurok ma giwinyo ywekani gibiwacci," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Onoŋo tero jo man i lobo ma yam okwoŋo pire ni ebimiyo botgi-ni doŋ oloyo Rwot woko, en mumiyo onekogi woko i dye tim-mi.’" 
Numbers14:17 Kombeddi alegi ni, wek tek pa Rwot obed madit kit macalo yam iciko kun iwacci," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Rwot kiniga pe mako oyot, mar mere ma pe lokke dwoŋ; en weko bal ki tim aranyi pa dano, ento pe kwanyo kop i kom lubalo. En keto can i kom likwayo ki i kom Likwayo pa likwayogi pi bal pa kwarogi nio i yalwak me adek ki me aŋwen.’" 
Numbers14:19 Alegi ni itim kica ki joni man pi rocgi, macalo in marri ma pe lokke dwoŋ twatwal-li, kit ma ibedo ka weko balgi cakke wa ki i Ejipt nio koni.”" 
Numbers14:20 Rwot ogamo ni, “Doŋ atimo kica botgi kit macalo iwaco-ni." 
Numbers14:21 Ento ada, macalo atye kwo-ni, dok macalo deyo pa Rwot bipono lobo ducu-ni, akwoŋo ni," 
Numbers14:22 i kom jo ma guneno deyona ki lwak lanyut ma yam atiyo i Ejipt ki i tim, ento ma gubedo ka omo iya ma doŋ odoko tyen apar kulu, ma pe guwinyo doga bene, pe tye ŋat mo i kingi" 
Numbers14:23 ma bineno lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire bot kwarogi ni abimiyogini; pe tye ŋat mo i kin jo ma gicaya ma bineno. 
Numbers14:24 Ento laticca Kaleb abitero i lobo ma yam ocito iye-ni, ci Likwaye bicamo, pien en tye ki cwiny mapat, dok en tye ka lubo gin ma amito ducu kakare atir." 
Numbers14:25 Jo Amalek ki jo Kanaan gibedo i nota ducu; pi meno wun diki wulokke wucak wot wudok tun tim i yo ma kemo Nam Makwar.” 
Numbers14:26 Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ki bot Aron ni," 
Numbers14:27 “Lwak man marac-ci gibiweko ŋuro i koma awene? Doŋ atyeko winyo lwak nuro ma jo Icrael gitye ka ŋuro kwede i koma. 
Numbers14:28 Wac botgi ni an Rwot awacci, ‘Macalo atye makwo-ni, gin ma doŋ wuwaco ma awinyo ki ita abitiyo botwu." 
Numbers14:29 Komwu muto biradde piny i dye tim man. I kin jo ma gikwanogi-ni, ma yam gikwano welgi cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo dok kwede malo, ma gubedo ka nur i koma-ni," 
Numbers14:30 pe acel mo bio i lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire ni abimiyogi bedo iye; kono Kaleb wod pa Jepune ki Yocwa wod pa Nun keken aye gibio. 
Numbers14:31 Ento litinowu ma wuwacci gibiyakogi wokoni, gin aye abiterogi kunnu, gin aye gibiŋeyo lobo ma wun wucayo-ru." 
Numbers14:32 Wun aye komwu muto biradde piny i dye tim man. 
Numbers14:33 Litinowu gibibedo lukwat i tim mwaka pyeraŋwen kun gineno can pi tarwaŋwu atata, nio ka kom danowu ma oto me agikkine obuto i dye tim." 
Numbers14:34 Wubineno can pi balwu mwaka pyeraŋwen, muporo wel nino ma yam wuroto ki lobo-ni, nino pyeraŋwen, mwaka acel pi nino acel acel, ci wubineyo ni iya oarre woko i komwu.’" 
Numbers14:35 An a Rwot ma doŋ aloko; ada abitiyo man i kom lwak man marac-ci ducu ma guribbe me pyem kweda; gibitum woko i dye tim kany, gibito megi kunnu.”" 
Numbers14:36 Jo ma yam Moses ocwalo ka roto lobo-ni, ma yam gudwogo ci gumiyo lwak ducu guŋur i kom Rwot pi lok marac ma gutito i kom lobo-nu," 
Numbers14:37 jo-nu guto woko ki two gemo i nyim Rwot. 
Numbers14:38 Ento Yocwa wod pa Nun ki Kaleb wod pa Jepune aye gudoŋ ma gikwo ki i kin lwak dano ma gucito ka roto lobo-ni. 
Numbers14:39 Moses otito lok meno ducu bot jo Icrael, ci dano gukok matek." 
Numbers14:40 Ci gua malo odiko con, gucito guito malo wa i lacol me lobo godi, kun giwaco ni, “Nen, wan doŋ watye kany co do, doŋ wabicito wa i kabedo ma Rwot ociko pire; pien doŋ wabalo.”" 
Numbers14:41 Ento Moses owaco botgi ni, “Piŋo wun koni wuturo cik ma Rwot oketo? Pien meno pe bitwerre wacel." 
Numbers14:42 Pe wucit kunnu, wek pe lumerokwu guradwu woko piny, pien Rwot pe tye i kinwu." 
Numbers14:43 Jo Amalek ki jo Kanaan gitye i nyimwu kunnu, pala lucwangi bityekowu woko; pien wun wukwero lubo kor Rwot, miyo Rwot pe bibedo kwedwu.”" 
Numbers14:44 Ento gin guette ni gimito ito malo wa i lacol lobo godi ca, kadi bed canduk me gicikke pa Rwot, ki Moses bene, pe gua woko ki i gony." 
Numbers14:45 Ci jo Amalek ki jo Kanaan ma gibedo i lobo godi kunnu gulor piny, guloyogi, ci guryemogi nio wa i Korma." 
Numbers15:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers15:2 “Wac ki jo Icrael ni, Ka doŋ wuo i lobo ma wubibedo iye, ma abimiyowu-ni," 
Numbers15:3 ce wutyero dyaŋ nyo romo bot Rwot obed gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, nyo gitum awaŋa, nyo kit gitum mukene, nyo gityer me cobo kwoŋ, nyo gityer ma ic opwoyo, nyo ka tyero i ninowu madito ma giciko wek obed gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot," 
Numbers15:4 ci ŋat ma okelo gityerre myero otyer bot Rwot bene moko kwon mapwotte ma romo agwata acel ma girubo ki moo ma romo cupa aryo ki nucu, obed gityer me moko kwon." 
Numbers15:5 Dok wubikelo yino me gityer amata pi gitum awaŋa nyo gitum mukene ducu ma romo cupa aryo ki nucu pi romo acel acel. 
Numbers15:6 Nyo ka pi nyok romo wubikelo moko kwon mapwotte ma romo agwata aryo ma girubo ki moo ma romo cupa adek pi gityer me moko kwon. 
Numbers15:7 Pi gityer: amata wubikelo yino ma romo cupa adek obed gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot. 
Numbers15:8 Ka wuyubo twon pi gitum awaŋa, nyo pi gitum mukene, nyo pi cobo kwon, nyo pi gityer lakwecwiny ma wutyero bot Rwot," 
Numbers15:9 ci myero wutyer kacel ki twon moko kwon mapwotte ma romo agwata adek ma girubo ki moo ma romo cupa abic obed gityer me moko kwon," 
Numbers15:10 Pi gityer amata wubityero koŋo vino ma’ romo cupa abic obed gityer ma giwaŋo ki’ mac, gin ma ŋwece kur meyomo cwiny Rwot." 
Numbers15:11 “Gibitiyo kit meno pi twon acel acel, nyo pi nyok romo acel acel, nyo pi wod romo nyo latin nyok dyel acel acel." 
Numbers15:12 Ducu bilubo Wel lim ma wukelo me atyera; wubitiyo kit meno i komgi acel acel macalo welgi, tye." 
Numbers15:13 Anywalli ducu me lobowu gibitiyo kit meno ka gityero gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac obed gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot. 
Numbers15:14 Ka larok mo odoko labedo i kinwu, nyo: ŋat mo ma bibedo i kinwu wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu, ka en mito tyero gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac obed gin ma ŋwece kurme ‘yomo cwiny Rwot, en bene bitime kit-mawun wutimo-ni." 
Numbers15:15 Pi lwak mucokke cik bibedo acel piwu ki pi larok ma odoko labedo i kinwu; meno bibedo cik matwal nio wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu; labedo bibedo ma rom ki wun i nyim Rwot. 
Numbers15:16 Cik bibedo acel ki ŋolo kop bene acel pi wun ki pi lurok ma gibedo i kinwu.” 
Numbers15:17 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers15:18 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, Ka doŋ wuo i lobo ma atye ka terowu iye-ni," 
Numbers15:19 ka wucamo cam ma ocek i lobe-nu, wubityero gityer bot Rwot." 
Numbers15:20 I kom moko kwon me kal manyen mukwoŋo cek’ wubityero capat lakoto obed gityer; wubityero macalo wutyero gityer ma wukwanyo ki i kom kal ma wudino. 
Numbers15:21 Wubimiyo gityer bot Rwot ki i kom moko kwoti me kal manyen mukwoŋo cek nio wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu. 
Numbers15:22 “Ento ka ce wuroco, kuli pe wumako cik magi ducu ma Rwot yam ociko ki Moses," 
Numbers15:23 ki gin ducu ma Rwot ocikowu kwede ki i dog Moses, nia wa i nino ma yam Rwot okwoŋo miyo iye cik, medde kwede wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu;" 
Numbers15:24 ka ce dano guroco ma pe gubalo akaka, kun lwak pe ŋeyo gin mo iye, ci lwak ducu bityero wod twon acel me gitum awaŋa obed gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot, ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata mutike macalo cik tye, kacel ki nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal." 
Numbers15:25 Ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal ki i kom lwak jo Icrael ducu, ci Rwot biweko balgi; pien onoŋo pe gubalo akaka dok gukelo gityergi, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot, ki gitumgi me bal, i nyim Rwot pi balgi ma pe gutimo akaka." 
Numbers15:26 Gibiweko bal pa lwak jo Icrael ducu, kacel ki pa lurok ma gibedo i kingi, pien onoŋo bal meno omako lwak ducu." 
Numbers15:27 “Ka ce dano acel mo aye obalo ma pe otimo akaka, ci en bityero bwoŋ dyel ma ditte romo mwaka acel pi gitum me bal." 
Numbers15:28 Ci ajwaka bitimo gin lakwany bal i nyim Rwot pi dano-nu ma opoto i bal ma pe otimo akaka, pi kwanyo bal ki i kome, ci Rwot biweko balle." 
Numbers15:29 Wubibedo ki cik acel pi dano ma obalo ma pe otimo akaka, kadi bed en anywalli pa jo Icrael nyo labedo ma bedo i kingi." 
Numbers15:30 Ento ka dano mo otimo bal mo me tekwic, kadi bed anywalli me lobo nyo labedo, noŋo doŋ ocayo Rwot; dano meno waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin lutugi." 
Numbers15:31 Noŋo ocayo lok pa Rwot, oturo cikke, pi meno dano meno wane birwenyo woko magicel; balle bidok i wiye.”" 
Numbers15:32 I kare ma jo Icrael gitye i tim, ci gunoŋo dano mo ma coko yen riddo i ceŋ cabit." 
Numbers15:33 Jo ma gunoŋe ka en coko yen riddo-ni gukele bot Moses ki Aron ki bot lwak ducu. 
Numbers15:34 Gukete i ot kol, pien peya ginyuto botgi gin ma myero gutim i kome." 
Numbers15:35 Ci Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Dano meno gibineke woko. Lwak ducu gibicele ki got woko i ŋe gony.”" 
Numbers15:36 Lwak ducu gukele woko i ŋe gony, gucele ki got guneke woko, kit macalo Rwot onoŋo ociko ki Moses." 
Numbers15:37 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers15:38 “Lok ki jo Icrael ci icikgi ni gukwo jira i twok dog boŋŋigi, wa i kare pa likwayogi ducu, dok i kom jira ma i twok dog boŋo acel acel guket iye tol ma bulu." 
Numbers15:39 Bibedo botwu jira dog boŋo ma wuneno kome wek wupo cik pa Rwot ducu, wulubgi, kun pe wulubo tamwu kenwu ki gin ma wuneno, ma wumaro lubo pi mitiwu kenwu." 
Numbers15:40 Kit meno miyo wubipo cikka ducu, wubicobo, miyo wubibedo jo maleŋ pi Lubaŋawu." 
Numbers15:41 An a Rwot Lubaŋawu ma yam akwanyowu ki i lobo Ejipt wek abed Lubaŋawu; an a Rwot Lubaŋawu.” 
Numbers16:1 Kora wod pa Ijar, ma wod pa Kokat, wod pa Levi, kacel ki Datan ki Abiram awobe pa Eliab ki On wod pa Pelet, ma gin adek ducu gubedo likwayo pa Reuben," 
Numbers16:2 gutero dano ci gucito kwedgi i kom Moses, kacel ki lwak dano ma i kin jo Icrael, lutel wi lwak miya aryo ki pyerabic ma giyero ki i kin lwak mucokke, jo ma ginene mada," 
Numbers16:3 Gucokke kacel i kom Moses ki Aron ci guwaco botgi ni, “Mewu doŋ okato kare! Pien jo magi ducu gin lwak maleŋ, gin ducu ki acel acel Rwot bene tye i kingi. Ci piŋo wun wukette kenwu malo twatwal makato lwak pa Rwot ducu?”" 
Numbers16:4 Ka Moses owinyo, opoto aryeba ic," 
Numbers16:5 Ci owaco bot Kora ki lwakke ducu ni, “Diki odiko Rwot aye binyuto danone ki ŋat maleŋ i kinwa, ci bimiyo en nyiko cok bote; ŋat ma en oyero aye en bimiyo nyiko cok." 
Numbers16:6 Doŋ wutim kit man: wukwany weer me waŋo odok eceta, Kora ki lwakke ducu." 
Numbers16:7 Diki wuket mac iye, ci wuket iye odok eceta i nyim Rwot, ci dano ma Rwot oyero aye bibedo maleŋ, Wun mewu dok okato kare, wun likwayo pa Levi!”" 
Numbers16:8 Moses dok owaco bot Kora ni, “Doŋ koŋ wuwiny ya, wun likwayo pa Levi." 
Numbers16:9 Wun wubwono man ni gin matidi mo, ma Lubaŋa pa Icrael aye opokowu woko ki i kom lwak jo Icrael ci okelowu cok bote pi tiyo tic i kema pa Rwot, kun wun aye wucun i nyim lwak ka tic pigi?" 
Numbers16:10 En doŋ okelowu ka ma cok kwede wun kacel ki utmegiwu ducu ma gin likwayo pa Levi, ci dok pud wuyenyo yo me doko ajwagi aye?" 
Numbers16:11 Wun wubedo ka jemo i kom Rwot, mumiyo wun ki lwakwu ducu wucokke kacel-li. Aron kono gin aŋo mumiyo wuŋur i kome-ni?”" 
Numbers16:12 Moses dok ocwalo dano pi lwoŋo Datan ki Abiram ma awobe pa Eliab; ento gin guwacci, “Pe wabicito kunnu." 
Numbers16:13 Pud ibwono man ni gin matidi mo, ma ikwanyowa woko ki i lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic-ci, ma it ye ka nekowa kwede i tim-mi? Myero in dok ikette keni me bedo laker ma loyowa?" 
Numbers16:14 Dok bene peya ikelowa i lobo mo ma mol cak ki moo kic, peya imiyowa potti mogo ma waleyo, nyo potti olok, ci kombeddi doŋ imito umo wanwa woko. Wan pe wabicito kunnu.”" 
Numbers16:15 Kiniga omako Moses matek ci owaco bot Rwot ni, “Pe iye gityergi. An peya akwanyo kadi kanagi acel mo ki botgi, pe atimo gin marac i kom ŋat mo i kingi.”" 
Numbers16:16 Lacen Moses owaco bot Kora ni, “In ki lwakki wubed tye i nyim Rwot diki, in ki gin ki Aron," 
Numbers16:17 kun noŋo ŋat acel acel i kinwu omako atabo weerre me waŋo odok eceta. Wuket iye odok eceta, ci ŋat acel acel okel atabo weerre i nyim Rwot, atabo weer miya aryo ki pyerabic; in bene ki Aron, ŋat man ki atabo weerre.”" 
Numbers16:18 Ŋat acel acel ocako kwanyo atabo weerre, ci guketo mac i igi, ka guketo odok eceta iye, ci gucuŋ i dog kema me rwatte, kacel ki Moses ki Aron," 
Numbers16:19 Kora ocoko lwak jo ducu ci gucuŋ ma gukemme ki Moses ki Aron i doggola kema me rwatte. Ci deyo pa Rwot onen bot lwak ducu. 
Numbers16:20 Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni," 
Numbers16:21 “Wun wupokke kenwu ki i kin lwak man, wek anekgi atyekgi woko kombeddi.”" 
Numbers16:22 Ento gin gupoto piny aryeba ic ci guwacci, “Ai Lubaŋa, Lubaŋa ma won tipo kom jo ducu, pi bal pa dano acel keken miyo kiniga maki i kom lwak ducu?”" 
Numbers16:23 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers16:24 “Cik lwak ni gua woko ki ka ma jo pa Kora, Datan ki Abiram gibedo iye.”" 
Numbers16:25 Moses oa ocito bot Datan ki Abiram, ci ludoŋo pa jo Icrael gulubo kore." 
Numbers16:26 Owaco bot lwak ni, “Alegowu ni, wua wupokke ki i ŋet kema pa jo magi ma giraco-ni, pe wugud kom jamigi mo, wek pe gijwerwu woko kacel kwedgi pi bal megi ducu.”" 
Numbers16:27 Omiyo dano gua woko ki i ŋet kema pa Kora, Datan ki Abiram; ci Datan ki Abiram gukatti woko gucuŋ i dog kemagi kacel ki mongi ki awobegi ki litinogi matino." 
Numbers16:28 Moses owacci, “Man aye gin ma bimiyo wuŋeyo ni Rwot onoŋo ocwala ka tiyo tic man ducu, pe abedo ka tiyone pira kena." 
Numbers16:29 Ka ce jo man gibito i kit ma dano gito kwede jwijwi-ni, nyo kit keckom ma poto i kotn dano ducu en aye bipoto i komgi, ci pe noŋo Rwot aye ma ocwala." 
Numbers16:30 Ento ka Rwot oketo gin mo manyen, ce lobo onamo doge omwonyogi woko ducu, lwakgi ki jamigi ducu, miyo gilor piny i bur Lyel ma pud gikwo, ci wubineyo ni, jo ma gubedo ka cayo Rwot.”" 
Numbers16:31 Ka otyeko waco lok meno ducu, ci nom ma gucuŋ iye obar oyabbe woko," 
Numbers16:32 lobo oŋamo doge omwonyogi woko, kacel ki jo me odigi, ki lwakjo pa Kora ducu ki jamigi ducu liweŋ," 
Numbers16:33 Kit meno gin ki lwakgi ki jamigi ducu gulor piny i bur Lyel ma gikwo; ci lobo oumo wigi woko gurwenyo woko ki i kin lwak. 
Numbers16:34 Jo Icrael ducu ma gurumogi-ni guriŋo woko ka guwinyo kokogi kun giwacci, “Wek lobo pe dok omwonywa bene!”" 
Numbers16:35 Ka dok mac bene oa ki bot Rwot, owaŋo jo meno miya aryo ki pyerabic ma gubedo ka tyero odok eceta-ni, otyekogi woko." 
Numbers16:36 Ka Rwot dok owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers16:37 “Cik Eleajar wod pa ajwaka Aron ni okwany atabo weer me waŋo odok eceta woko ducu ki i mac ma Lyel-li, oony mac ma i igi-ni ka mabor, pien gin jami maleŋ." 
Numbers16:38 Atabo weer pa jo meno ma balgi okelo can me to i komgi-ni myero gipadgi woko malac ki nyol gudok laum wi keno tyer; pien onoŋo yam doŋ gityerogi wo ko i nyim Rwot mumiyopudginjami maleŋ. Ci gibibedo lanyut bot jo Icrael.” 
Numbers16:39 Kit meno Eleajar okwanyo atabo weer me mola ma yam jo ma mac owanogi-ni gutyero, ci gipadogi gudoko laum wi keno tyer," 
Numbers16:40 wek obed gin me poyo wi jo Icrael, wek ŋat mo ma pe ajwaka, ma pe lakwar Aron, pe onyik cok ka wano odok eceta i nyim Rwot, wek pe odok macalo Kora ki lwakke, kit ma Rwot owaco bot Eleajar ki i dog Moses." 
Numbers16:41 Ento orwone lwak jo Icrael ducu dok gucako ŋur i kom Moses ki i kom Aron kun giwaco ni, “Wun aye wuneko jo pa Rwot woko.”" 
Numbers16:42 Ka lwak gu tyeko cokke i kom Moses ki Aron, gulokke mŋ kema me rwatte; ci, nen, pol oumo ko me woko, deyo pa, Rwot ocako nen." 
Numbers16:43 Moses ki Aron gucito i nyim kema me rwatte," 
Numbers16:44 ci Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers16:45 “Wua woko ki i kin lwak man wek atyekgi woko kombeddi.” Gupoto piny aryeba cwiny," 
Numbers16:46 ci Moses owaco bot Aron ni, “Kwany atabo, weerri me waŋo odok eceta, iket iye mac ma itoko ki i keno tyer, ci iket iye odok eceta, itiŋ iter bot lwak oyotoyot, icit itim gin lakwany bal ki i komgi, pien kiniga doŋ ocako bino kun oa ki bot Rwot, two gemo doŋ bicakke.”" 
Numbers16:47 Aron okwanyo atabo weer kit ma Moses owaco, cut, oriŋo kwede i dye lwak; ci, nen, two gemo onoŋo doŋ ocakke i kin dano. Oketo odok eceta i atabo weer, ocako timo gin lakwany bal ki i kom lwak." 
Numbers16:48 Ocuŋ i kin jo muto ki jo makwo, ci two gemo oaik woko." 
Numbers16:49 Jo ma two gemo onekogi guromo alip apar wiye aŋwen ki miya abiro, kun pe giribo iye jo ma guto i alii pa Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Aron odok cen bot Moses i dog kema me rwatte ka two gemo doŋ ogik woko. 
Numbers17:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers17:2 “Lok ki jo Icrael ci igam odoo ki botgi, odoo acel pi dog ot pa kwarogi acel acel. Gam ki bot lutel wigi ducu, ma oporo dog odi pa kwarogi, odoo ducu apar wiye aryo. Co nyiŋ dano acel acel i kom odoone," 
Numbers17:3 ci ico nyiŋ Aron i kom odoo pa likwayo pa Levi; pien ludito wi kaka ki i dog odi pa kwarogi gibibedo ki odoogi acel acel. 
Numbers17:4 Ibicibogi i kema me rwatte i nyim canduk lok me caden ka ma arwatte iye kwedwu-ni. 
Numbers17:5 Ci odoo pa dano ma abiyero en aye bilot. Meno aye abinoŋo iye yo me juko jo Icrael ma gibedo ka nur i koma-ni.” 
Numbers17:6 Moses oloko ki jo Icrael, ci lutel wigi ducu gukelo odoo bote, odoo acel pi lutel wigi acel acel, ma oporo wel odi pa kwarogi, odoo apar wiye aryo; odoo pa Aron bene onoŋo tye i kin odoogi." 
Numbers17:7 Ci Moses ocibo odoo ducu i nyim Rwot i kema lok me caden. 
Numbers17:8 Orwone Moses odonyo i kema lok me caden; ci, nen, odoo pa Aron ma ocuŋ pi dog ot pa Levi-ni aye olot woko, ocako kico bolo olaŋ, ci oturo ture onyako nyig yaa mucek." 
Numbers17:9 Ka Moses okelo odoo ducu nia ki i nyim Rwot, otero bot jo Icrael ducu, guneno, ci dano acel acel okwanyo odoone." 
Numbers17:10 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Dwok odoo pa Aron i nyim canduk lok me caden kakare, wek gigwok obed lanyut pi jo mujemo, wek ijuk ki nurgi atata i koma, ogik woko, wek pe to opot i komgi.”" 
Numbers17:11 Moses otimo kit ma Rwot ocike kwede. 
Numbers17:12 Ci jo Icrael guwaco bot Moses ni, “Nen ba, watum woko do, keckom opoto i komwa omiyo wato, wato woko." 
Numbers17:13 Jo ducu ma gibino cok, ma gibino cok ki kema pa Rwot, gito woko. Wan ducu myero wato woko bo?”" 
Numbers18:1 Ci Rwot owaco bot Aron ni, “In ki awobeni kacel ki jo me ot pa kwarowu wubitiŋo alii me bal pi kabedo maleŋ, dok in kacel ki awobeni wubitiŋo alii me bal pi ticwu me bedo ajwagi." 
Numbers18:2 In ibikelo utmegini ma i kaka, pa Levi cok kacel kwedi, ma en aye kaka pa woru, wek guribbe kwedi, gukonyi ma noŋo in ki awobeni wutye ka tic i nyim kema lok me caden." 
Numbers18:3 Gin gibibedo kwedwu i dog ticwu, dok gibitiyo tic ducu ma miite i kema; ento pe gibicito cok i kom jami ducu ma i kabedo maleŋ, pe gibinyiko cok ki keno tyer, wek pe to opot i kom gin ki wun." 
Numbers18:4 Gibinywako tic kwedwu i kema me rwatte pi tic ducu ma i kema; pe ŋat mukene mo bibino botwu cok. 
Numbers18:5 Wun wubitiyo tic ma i kabedo maleŋ, ki tic i kom keno tyer, wek kiniga pe dok opot i kom jo Icrael." 
Numbers18:6 Nen, doŋ akwanyo utmegiwu, gin Lulevi, ki i kin jo Icrael; gin gitye macalo mot ma gimiyowu, gin aye jo ma gimiyo bot Rwot pi tiyo tic i kema me rwatte," 
Numbers18:7 In ki awobeni keken wubitiyo ticwu me bedo ajwagi i lok ducu ma kemo kom keno tyer nyo ma tye i tyelo ma boŋo kicika oumo-ni. Amiyowu tic me bedo ajwagina macalo mot ma amiyo botwu; ka ŋat mo ata obino cok, gibineke woko.”" 
Numbers18:8 Rwot dok owaco bot Aron ni, “Nen, doŋ atyeko miyo i ciŋi gityer ducu ma gimiyo bota, jami maleŋ ducu ma jo Icrael gikelo. Atyeko miyogi gubed waŋ wat ma tuŋ boti, ki bot awobeni me bedo waŋ wat ma myero gimi botgi dikdik." 
Numbers18:9 Magi aye gibibedo meri ki i kom jami maleŋ maka to ma pe giwaŋo ki mac: gityer ducu ma jo Icrael gimiyo bota, gityer me moko kwon ducu gitum me bal ducu, gitum me tino alii ducu; gibibedo maleŋ makato piri ki pi awobeni." 
Numbers18:10 Wubicamo i kabedo mo maleŋ makato; cowu ducu gitwero camo; tye maleŋ piwu. 
Numbers18:11 Man bene mewu: gin ducu ma gikwanyo ki i kom motgi me bedo gityer akwata; atyeko miyogi botwu ki bot awobewu ki anyirawu obed waŋ watwu me dikdik. Jo ducu ma i odi ma gulonnye gitwero camo. 
Numbers18:12 Moo mabecone ducu, yino mabecone ducu ki bel maberre ducu, mot ducu ma gimiyo bot Rwot me wi mwaka doŋ amiyo botwu." 
Numbers18:13 Cam ducu mukwoŋo cek i lobogi ma gikelo bot Rwot bibedo mewu; dano ducu ma i odi ma olonnye twero camo. 
Numbers18:14 “Gin ducu ma i Icrael ma gidyero i cin Rwot bibedo mewu. 
Numbers18:15 “Litino ducu ma, gikwoŋo nywalogi, kadi bed dano nyo lee, ma gityero bot Rwot bibedo mewu, Ento litino kayo ducu pa dano gibikokogi akoka ki lim, ki litino kaye pa lee ma keni ma pe gicamo bene gibikokogi akoka." 
Numbers18:16 Gibikokogi ka ditogi romo dwe acel. Wel me kokogi ibimoko ni obed cekel me ryal abic, kun lubo cekel me kabedo maleŋ ma romo gera pyeraryo." 
Numbers18:17 Ento latin kayo pa dyaŋ nyo pa romo nyo pa dyel pe gibikoko; gin gileŋ, Ibikiro remogi i kom keno tyer, dok ibiwaŋo dwologi obed gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot." 
Numbers18:18 Rinogi bibedo mewu, macalo gok ma gik Wato ki em malacuc bene mewu." 
Numbers18:19 Gityer maleŋ ducu ma jo Icrael gimiyo bot Rwot doŋ amiyo botwu ki bot awobewu ki anyirawu obed waŋ: watwu me dikdik. Man aye gicikke ma gimoko ki kado i nyim Rwot matwal piri ki pi likwayu.” 
Numbers18:20 Rwot dok owaco bot Aron ni, “Pe wubilimo ginaleya mo nyo dul lobo mo i kin jo Icrael; an ki koma aye abedo ginaleyawu." 
Numbers18:21 “Bot Lulevi atyeko miyogi dul acel me apar i kom jami pa jo Icrael me bedo megi pi culo ticgi ma gitiyo, ticgi ma i kema me rwatte." 
Numbers18:22 Dok nia tin jo Icrael pe gibinyiko cok ki kema me rwatte, wek pe gunoŋ bal ma kelogi to." 
Numbers18:23 Ento Lulevi keken aye gibitiyo tic ma i kema me rwatte, gin aye gibibedo lubalo ka gin mo orocce iye. Bibedo cik matwal nio wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu; dok pe gibileyo dul lobo mo i kin jo Icrael." 
Numbers18:24 Pien dul acel me apar ma a ki bot jo Icrael, ma gimiyo obed gityer bot Rwot, atyeko mi yo bot Lulevi me ginaleyagi; mumi yo aloko i komgi ni, pe gibibedo ki dul lobo mo me aleyagi i kin jo Icrael.”" 
Numbers18:25 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers18:26 “Dok iwac bot Lulevi ni, ‘Ka wugamo dul acel me apar ki bot jo Icrael, ma atyeko miyo botwu obed mewu, wun dok wubimiyo gityer ma a ki iye bot Rwot, dul acel me apar ki i kom dul acel me apar ma gikelo botwu." 
Numbers18:27 Gityerwu man gibikwano piwu macalo wumiyo ki i kom bel ma wudino ki i kom koŋo olokma oa ki i nyig olokwu ma wubiyo. 
Numbers18:28 Kit meno wun bene wubimiyo gityer bot Rwot ki i kom dul acel me apar ducu ma wubigamo ki bot jo Icrael; wubikwanyo gityer pa Rwot ki i kome, wumiyo bot ajwaka Aron." 
Numbers18:29 Mot ducu ma gimiyo botwu en aye wubikwanyo iye gityer ducu ma myero bot Rwot, ki i kom mabecone ducu, ci bedo gin ma gikwero wek obed maleŋ.’" 
Numbers18:30 Mumiyo ibiwaco bot Lulevi ni, ‘Ka doŋ wutyero mabecone woko, ci mudoŋŋe bibedo mewu macalo oa ki i laro dino belwu nyo i ka biyo nyig olokwu." 
Numbers18:31 Wutwero camo i kabedo ducu, wun ki jo ma i odiwu; pien en aye giculowu kwede pi ticwu i kema me rwatte." 
Numbers18:32 Pe wubinoŋo iye bal mo, tekke wutyeko kwanyo mabecone pi gityer. Ento pe wupyed jami maleŋ ma jo Icrael gimiyo, wek pe wuto.’ ”" 
Numbers19:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni," 
Numbers19:2 “Man en cik ma an Rwot aye aciko: Cik jo Icrael ni gukel boti roya makwar maberre ma kome pe ki mwonyo, ma peya gitiyo kwede me pur." 
Numbers19:3 Ibimiyo bot ajwaka Eleajar ci gibitero woko i ŋe gony, ka doŋ gibineko i nyim Eleajar." 
Numbers19:4 Ajwaka Eleajar bigwelo remone ki lwet cine, ci kiro remone tyen abiro mukemo nyim kema me rwatte." 
Numbers19:5 Gibiwaŋo kom roya woko ma kun en neno; pyene ki riŋone ki remone ki cete, gibiwaŋone ducu." 
Numbers19:6 Dok ajwaka bikwanyo yat cedar ki anyero ki uci makwar ci bibologi i dye mac ma waŋo riŋo roya-ni. 
Numbers19:7 Ka dok ajwaka bilwoko boŋŋine ki pii, lwoko kome ki pii, ka doŋ lacen bidok i gony; ci ajwaka bibedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Numbers19:8 Ŋat ma onoŋo owano roya-ni bene bilwoko boŋŋine, lwoko kome ki pii, ci bibedo keni nio wa otyeno." 
Numbers19:9 Ci dano mo ma olony, ma pe kome ki keni aye bijobo buru roya-ni, ci biketo i kabedo mo ma olony, woko ki i ŋe gony, Gibikano pi lwak jo Icrael pi yubo pii me lwoko kwer; meno gitimo pi kwanyo bal." 
Numbers19:10 Ŋat ma ojobo buru bene bilwoko boŋŋine ci bedo keni nio wa otyeno. Man bibedo cik matwal bot jo Icrael ki bot Lurok ma bedo i kingi. 
Numbers19:11 “Ŋat ma ogudo kom dano mo ma oto bibedo keni pi nino abiro. 
Numbers19:12 Bilonynye kekene i ki pii me lwoko kwer i nino me adekke ki i nino me abiro miyo bibedo ma olony. Ento ka pe olonnye kekene i nino me adekke ki i nino me abiro, ci pe doŋ bibedo ma olony." 
Numbers19:13 Dano mo-ni ma ogudo kom dano muto, ce pe olonnye kekene, noŋo obalo kema pa Rwot, omiyo odoko keni. Dano meno waŋe birwenyo woko ki i kin jo Icrael. En bedo keni pien pii me lwoko kwer peya gionyo i kome, miyo keni mere pud tye i kome." 
Numbers19:14 “Ka dano oto i kemawu mo cik tye kit man: dano acel acel ma donyo i kema meno, ki dano ducu ma gubedo iye ka dano-nu oto, gibibedo keni pi nino abiro." 
Numbers19:15 Dok agulu nyo atabo-gu ducu ma i kema ma pe giumo wigi bedo keni. 
Numbers19:16 Dano mo ka tye i tim ce ogudo kom dano ma gineko ki pala Lucwan, nyo kom dano mo ma oto kene, nyo cogo dano mo, nyo lyel ma giyiko iye dano, bibedo keni pi nino abiro," 
Numbers19:17 Pi lonyo dano ma odoko keni kit meno gibikwanyo buru mo i kom buru roya ma yam gineko me kwanyo bal, gibiketo i otako, ci gimedo iye pii ma mol." 
Numbers19:18 Dano mo ma olony bikwanyo anyero ci luto i pii-nu, kiro i kom kema ki i kom jami ducu ma tye iye, ki i kom dano ducu ma onoŋo gitye kenyo. Gibitimo kumeno bene pi ŋat ma ogudo cogo-ni nyo ma ogudo kom dano ma gineko nyo ma oto kene, nyo ma ogudo lyel ma giyiko iye dano." 
Numbers19:19 Dano ma olony bikiro pii meno i kom dano ma keni i nino me adekke ki i nino me abiro, En bilonyo dano ma keni-ni i nino me abirone, dok dano-nu bilwoko boŋŋine, lwoko kome ki pii, ci otyeno noŋo en doŋ olony." 
Numbers19:20 “Ento ka dano mo onoŋo tye keni, ce pe olonnye kekene, dano meno waŋe birwenyo woko ki i dye lwak pa Lubaŋa, pien noŋo obalo kabedo maleŋ pa Rwot omiyo odoko keni, En bedo keni pien pii me lwoko kwer noŋo pe gionyo i kome," 
Numbers19:21 Meno bibedo cik botwu matwal. Ŋat ma okiro pii me lwoko kwer bilwoko boŋŋine; ki ŋat mo ma ogudo pii me lwoko kwer bibedo keni nie wa otyeno. 
Numbers19:22 Gin ducu ma dano ma keni-ni ogudo bibedo keni; ŋat ma ogudo jami-nu bene bibedo keni nie wa otyeno.” 
Numbers20:1 Jo Icrael ki lwakgi ducu guo i tim Jin i dwe mukwoŋo, ci gutiro i Kadec, gubedo iye. Miriam oto kenyo, giyike bene kenyo." 
Numbers20:2 Pii onoŋo pe tye me amata pa lwak, ci gucokke kacel i kom Moses ki Aron." 
Numbers20:3 Gukeco i kom Moses kun giwacci, “Kono yam wato woko i kare ma utmegiwa guto i nyim Rwot-ti, kono ber," 
Numbers20:4 Piŋo nene ikelo lwak pa Rwot i tim ata kany, wek wato woko, wan kacel ki limwa?" 
Numbers20:5 Piŋo nene imiyo waa woko ki i Ejipt, ikelowa i kabedo man marac-ci? Pe kabedo ma ceko bel, kadi wa oduro nyo olok nyo okwer pomegranat; pii mo bene pe me amata.”" 
Numbers20:6 Moses ki Aron gua woko ki i nyim lwak, gucito doggola kema me rwatte, gupoto piny iryeba cwiny. Ci deyo pa Rwot onen botgi," 
Numbers20:7 Rwot owaco ki Moses ni," 
Numbers20:8 “Kwany odoo ki i nyim canduk lok le caden, ci igur lwak kacel, wun ki meru Aron, ci iwac ki pata got ki i nyim lwak ni owek piine okatti woko. Kit meno ibikelo pii pigi nia ki i pata got wek lwak gumati, ki limgi bene.”" 
Numbers20:9 Moses okwanyo odoo woko ki i nyim Rwot kit macalo ocike kwede. 
Numbers20:10 Moses ki Aron gucoko lwak kacel i nyim pata got, ci Moses owaco botgi ni, “Doŋ wuwiny ba, wun lujemo-ni. Wumito ni wan wakel pii nia ki i pata got man piwu?”" 
Numbers20:11 Ci Moses oti;mo ciŋe malo, ogoyo pata got ki odoone tyen aryo kulu; ci pii ocorre limayi, lwak gumato, ki limgi makwo bene," 
Numbers20:12 Ento Rwot owaco bot Moses ki Aron ni, “Pien wun pe wuye an, kun pe wunyuto ki i nyim jo Icrael ni an aleŋ, pi meno wun pe doŋ wubitero lwak man i lobo ma abimiyogi-ni.”" 
Numbers20:13 Man en aye pii me Meriba, ka ma jo Icrael gukeco iye i kom Rwot ci en onyutte kene ni eleŋ i kingi-ni." 
Numbers20:14 Moses ocwalo lukwena ma gicito bot kabaka me Edom nia ki i Kadec ci guwacci, “Omeru Icrael owaco kuman ni, In iŋeyo can madito ducu ma opoto i komwa:" 
Numbers20:15 kit ma yam kwarowa guwoto kwede i Ejipt, ma wabedo i Ejipt pi kare malac, ci jo Ejipt gutimowa magwa, wan ki kwarowa ducu." 
Numbers20:16 Ka yam wakok bot Rwot, en owinyo dwanwa, ocwalo lamalaika, okwanyowa woko ki i Ejipt. Ci kombeddi watye doŋ i Kadec, i gaŋ ma doŋ cok ki waŋ lobowu." 
Numbers20:17 Ber wuwek wawok ki i lobowu. Pe wabiŋak wawok ki i poto mo, nyo i poto olok, pe wabimato pii ma i waŋ it, Wabimol ma walubo gudo madit-ti pa Kabaka, pe wabiŋak wadok yo tun acuc nyo tuŋ acam, nie ka wawok wakato waŋ lobowu.”" 
Numbers20:18 Ento jo Edom guwaco ni, “Pe wubiwok ki i lobowa, mi yo wan aye wabino i komwu ki pala lucwan.”" 
Numbers20:19 Jo Icrael gugamo ni, “Wabiwok i gudo madit keken. Ka wamato piiwu mo, wan nyo limwa makwo, wabiculo wane. Wek wawok wakat ki tyenwa keken, lok mo mukene pe.”" 
Numbers20:20 Jo Edom dok guwacci, “Pe wubiwok ki i lobowa.” Ci jo Edom gubino ka lweny i komgi ki lwak co mapol ki mony matek." 
Numbers20:21 Kit meno jo Edom gukwero miyo jo Icrael kato kun giwok ki i lobogi; omiyo jo Icrael gua gulokke, guceyo yo mukene."
