Numbers20:22 Lwak jo Icrael ducu gua ki i Kadec, gubino i te got Kor." 
Numbers20:23 Rwot owaco bot Moses-ki Aron i te got Kor, i waŋ lobo Edom, ni," 
Numbers20:24 “Aron aye doŋ bito, bidok bot lutugi; en pe bidonyo i lobo ma amiyo bot jo Icrael, pien yam wujemo i kom cikka i dog pii me Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Ter Aron ki wode Eleajar, icit kwedgi malo i wi got Kor," 
Numbers20:26 iluny boŋo tic pa Aron ducu ki i kome, ci iruk ki wode Eleajar, pien Aron doŋ bidok bot lutugi, en bito ki kunnu.”" 
Numbers20:27 Moses otiyo kit ma Rwot ocike kwede, Guito malo i wi got Kor kun lwak ducu gineno." 
Numbers20:28 Moses olunyo bone tic pa Aron woko ducu, ci oruko kwede wode Eleajar, Aron oto woko ki kunnu i wi got. Lacen Moses ki Eleajar gulor woko piny ki i wi got," 
Numbers20:29 Ka lwak jo Icrael ducu guneno ni Aron doŋ oto, ci gukoke nino pyeradek." 
Numbers21:1 Ka kabaka me Arad, ma en Lakanaan ma bedo i Negeb, owinyo ni jo Icrael gibibino ki i yo Atarim, ci olwenyo komgi, oyako jo mogo woko ki i kingi." 
Numbers21:2 Ci jo Icrael gukwoŋo kwoŋ bot Rwot kun giwaco ni, “Ka ibimiyo jo man i cinwa ada, ci wan wabidyerogl i ciŋi, wabijwero gaŋigi woko liweŋ.”" 
Numbers21:3 Rwot owinyo lega pa jo Icrael, omiyo guloyo Lukanaan, ci gin gudyerogi i cin Rwot kacel ki gaŋigi, gujwero woko; mumiyo nyiŋ kabedo meno gilwoŋo ni Korma." 
Numbers21:4 Jo Icrael gua ki i te got Kor, gucako lubo yo ma cito i Nam Makwar, kun girabo lobo Edom. Ci cwiny dano oballe woko ma gitye iyo," 
Numbers21:5 gucako loko lok akeca i kom Lubaŋa ki, i kom Moses kun giwaco ni, “Piŋo wukwanyowa woko ki i Ejipt wek wato i tim? Cam pe, pii bene pe, owinywa ocido woko ki cam ma konnye pe-ni.”" 
Numbers21:6 Rwot ocwalo twol ma kwirgi kec i kom lwak, ci gucako toŋo dano; jo Icrael guto mapol." 
Numbers21:7 Dano gubino bot Moses, guwaco ni, “Doŋ watyeko balo, pien waloko lok akeca i kom Rwot ki i komi. Leg Rwot wek okwany twol woko ki i kinwa.” Ci Moses olego pi lwak." 
Numbers21:8 Rwot owaco ki Moses ni, “Tet cal twol ma kwirre kec-ci, iket iŋab malo i kom tal; ci dano ducu ma twol otoŋo, ka oneno kome, ci bedo kwo.”" 
Numbers21:9 Kumeno Moses oteto twol mola, oŋabo malo i wi tal; ci ka twol otoŋo dano mo en neno kom twol mola, ci kwo." 
Numbers21:10 Jo Icrael gucako wot, ci gugony i Obot." 
Numbers21:11 Dok gua woko ki i Obot, gugony i Iye-abarim, i tim ma okemo Moab, yo tuŋ wokceŋ," 
Numbers21:12 Dok gua ki kunnu, gumedo wot, gugony i nota me Jered." 
Numbers21:13 Gua ki kunnu, gumedo wot, gugony loka kulu Amon, ma tye i dye tim, ma oa wa i waŋ lobo pa jo Amor, Amon en aye waŋ lobo pa jo Moab, ma i kin Moab ki jo Amor." 
Numbers21:14 En aye ka ma giwaco i Buk me Lweny pa Rwot ni, “Waeb ma i Cupa, ki nota me Amon ducu," 
Numbers21:15 ki luŋ me nota mapol ma oyarre nio wa i kabedo ma gilwoŋo ni Ar, ojeŋŋe wa i waŋ lobo me Moab.”" 
Numbers21:16 Gua ki kunnu, gubino i Beer. En aye waŋ it ma yam Rwot owaco iye bot Moses ni, “Cok lwak kacel, wek ami pii botgi.”" 
Numbers21:17 I kare meno jo Icrael guwero wer man ni, “Gunnye malo, in waŋ it! Wakoro ki wer!" 
Numbers21:18 Man waŋ it ma luker gukwinyo, ma twoni ma i lwak gugolo matut ki tal ker ki odoogi.” Ka dok gua i dye tim, gucito i Matana" 
Numbers21:19 Nia i Matana gucito Nakaliel, ki nia ki kunnu gucito Bamot." 
Numbers21:20 Nia ki kunnu gucito i nota ma otoŋŋe i lobo Moab, i te lacol got Piciga, ma neno piny tuŋ tim aroo." 
Numbers21:21 Jo Icrael gucwalo lukwena bot Cikon, kabaka pa jo Amor, ma giwaco ni," 
Numbers21:22 “Ber iwek wawok ki i lobowu, Pe wabiŋak wawok ki i poto mo, nyo i poto olok, pe wabimato pii ma i waŋ it. Wabimol ma walubo gudo pa Kabaka madit-ti nio ka wawok wakato waŋ lobowu.”" 
Numbers21:23 Ento Cikon pe oye ni jo Icrael guwok ki i lobone. Ocoko jone ducu, ogurogi kacel, ci ocito ka lweny i kom jo Icrael i tim. Ka oo i Jakaj, ocako lweny i kom jo Icrael." 
Numbers21:24 Ento jo Icrael guneko jone mapol ki pala lucwan, ci gucamo lobogi cakke ki i kulu Amon o kwede wa i Jajer ma tye i waŋ lobo pa jo Ammon." 
Numbers21:25 Jo Icrael gumako gaŋi ducu pa jo Amor, gucako bedo iye, i Kecbon ki i gaŋi matino ducu ma i ŋete." 
Numbers21:26 Kecbon onoŋo obedo gaŋ kai pa Cikon kabaka pa jo Amor. Cikon yam con koŋ olwenyo i kom kabaka pa jo Moab ci okwanyo lobone woko ducu ki i oiŋe nio wa i Amon. 
Numbers21:27 Mumiyo lurot wer giwaco ni, “Wubin i Kecbon, gaŋ kai pa Cikon! Wek giger odoco, giyub ocuŋ matek." 
Numbers21:28 Pien mac yam oa ki i Kecbon, olyel matek kun oa ki i gaŋ kal pa Cikon. Owaŋo gaŋ Ar pa jo Moab, ma gin rwodi me wi godi me Amon." 
Numbers21:29 Can madwoŋ opoto i komi, in Moab! Wuto wutum woko do, wun lwak pa Kemoc! Jok Kemoc omiyo awobene guriŋo gularo komgi, oweko anyirane giyako gitero i ciŋ Cikon kabaka pa jo Amor." 
Numbers21:30 Kit meno likwayogi gityeko woko nia ki i Kecbon nio wa i Dibon. Wajwero piny woko nio ka mac oryeyo piny wa i Medeba.” 
Numbers21:31 Kit meno jo Icrael gubedo i lobo pa jo Amor. 
Numbers21:32 Ka dok Moses ocwalo dano ka roto Jajer. Gumako gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, ci guryemo jo Amor ma gibedo kunnu." 
Numbers21:33 Ka gulokke, gudok yo tuŋ Bacan. Ci Og kabaka me Bacan ocorre ka lweny i komgi, en ki lwakke ducu, ci lweny ogeto i Edrei." 
Numbers21:34 Ento Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Pe ilwore; pien atyeko miye i ciŋi, en ki lwakke ducu, ki lobogi bene. Ibitimo en kit ma itimo i kom Cikon kabaka pa jo Amor ma yam obedo Kecbon.”" 
Numbers21:35 Kit meno jo Icrael guneko Og ki awobene ducu, gujwero lwakke ducu nid waŋ ma ŋat acel mo pe odoŋ mubwot makwo; ci gucamo lobogi woko." 
Numbers22:1 Jo Icrael dok gucako wot ci guguro kemagi i lobo aroo me Moab loka Jordan mukemo Jeriko. 
Numbers22:2 Balak wod pa Jipor oneno gin ducu ma jo Icrael gutimo i kom jo Amor. 
Numbers22:3 En kacel ki jo Moab gubedo ki lworo madwoŋ i kom jo Icrael, pien gipol mada, mumiyo lworo oloco kom jo Moab woko." 
Numbers22:4 Ci jo Moab guwaco ki ludoŋo pa jo Midian ni, “Lwak jo man gibijwerowa woko ki gin ma orumowa ducu, macalo twon dyaŋ ma camo lum ki i bar tyeko woko.” Pienno Balak wod pa Jipor ma onoŋo obedo kabaka me Moab i kare meno," 
Numbers22:5 ocwalo lukwena bot Balaam wod pa Beor i Petor ma cok ki kulu Euprate i lobo Amau ka Lwoŋe kun giwaco ni, “Nen, rok mo gubino ma gua ki i Ejipt, guumo lobo woko lipuk; kombeddi doŋ gubedo ma gukemo lobowa." 
Numbers22:6 Tim ber ibin wek icen jo-ni woko pira, pien gitek gikata woko. Gwok nyo miyo abitwero loyogi, aryemogi woko ki i lobo kany; pien aŋeyo ni ŋat ma ilego gum kome, kome bedo gum, ki ŋat ma iceno doŋ giceno.”" 
Numbers22:7 Kit meno ludoŋo me Moab ki ludoŋo me Midian gucako wot ki lim me tyet i ciŋgi, Gucito bot Balaam, gutitte lok me kwena ma Balak ocwalo," 
Numbers22:8 En owaco ki gin ni, “Tin wubut kany, ci abidwoko lok botwu kit ma Rwot biloko bota.” Kit meno ludito pa jo Moab gubedo bot Balaam." 
Numbers22:9 Ci Lubaŋa obino bot Balaam, owaco ni, “Jo mene ma gitye boti-ni?”" 
Numbers22:10 Balaam owaco ki Lubaŋa ni, “Balak wod pa Jipor, ma kabaka me Moab, en aye ocwalla kwena ma kun waco ni," 
Numbers22:11 ‘Nen, rok mo gubino ma gua ki i Ejipt, ci guumo lobo woko lipuk. Tim ber ibin wek icen jo-ni woko pira; miyo gwok nyo abitwero lweny kwedgi ci aryemogi woko.’ ”" 
Numbers22:12 Lubaŋa owaco ki Balaam ni, “In pe ibiwot kwedgi; pe ibiceno jo meno, pien gin jo ma gimiyogi gum con.”" 
Numbers22:13 Ka Balaam oa malo odiko, ci owaco ki ludito pa Balak ni, “Wudok giwu i lobowu; pien Rwot otyeko kwero ni pe acit kwedwu.’" 
Numbers22:14 Mumiyo ludito pa jo Moab gua gudok bot Balak, guwaco ni. “Balaam okwero bino kwedwa woko.”" 
Numbers22:15 Balak dok omedde ki cwalo ludito jo mapol makato gin ca, ki dano ma giŋene makato jo ma gukwoŋo ca." 
Numbers22:16 Gin gucito bot Balaam, guwaco bote ni, “Balak wod pa Jipor owaco kuman ni, ‘Pe iwek gin mo ogeŋi bino bota;" 
Numbers22:17 pien ada abiketti deyo madit, dok gin ducu ma ibiwacca abitiyo.’’’" 
Numbers22:18 Ento Balaam odok iye ki lutic pa Balak ni, “Kadi bed Balak onoŋo omiya ryal ki jabu ducu ma i ode, pe atwero kalo wi cik pa Rwot Lubaŋana pi tiyo gin mo matidi nyo madit." 
Numbers22:19 Doŋ alegowu ni wun bene tin wubed kany wek aŋe gin ma Rwot dok biwacca.” 
Numbers22:20 Ci Lubaŋa obino bot Balaam i dyewor meno owaco bote ni, “Ka jo meno gubino ka lwoni, ci ia malo icit kwedgii ento gin ma aciko boti aye ibitiyone.’" 
Numbers22:21 Kit meno Balaam oa malo odiko con, otweyo del kom kanane, ocito ki ludito pa jo Moab." 
Numbers22:22 Ento kiniga omako Lubaŋa pi citone; ci lamalaika pa Rwot ocuŋ woko i yo macalo lamerokke. Balaam onoŋo oito i wi kana, ki luticce aryo onoŋo gitye kwede." 
Numbers22:23 Ci kana oneno lamalaika pa Rwot kun ocuŋ i dye gudo, kun noŋo owoto pala lucwanne, omako i cine, Kana olokke, oa woko ki i gudo, ocito i poto. Balaam ogoyo kana omiyo odok woko i yo gudo." 
Numbers22:24 Ci lamalaika dok ocuŋ i yo ka mo madiŋ ma i kin poto olok ma gigeŋo ki cel got tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi. 
Numbers22:25 Ka dok kana oneno lamalaika pa Rwot, ci oyokke ki cel got, odiyo tyen Balaam i kom cel, omiyo en dok ogoye aye." 
Numbers22:26 Ka dok lamalaika pa Rwot omedde ki wot anyim ci ocuŋ tuŋ lacuc nyo tuŋ acam 
Numbers22:27 Ka kana oneno lamalaika pa Rwot, obuto woko piny ka tyen Balaam, ci kiniga omako Balaam, ogoyo kana ki odoone." 
Numbers22:28 Ka doŋ Rwot oyabo dog kana ci owaco bot Balaam ni, “An atimo gin aŋo i komi mumiyo igoya tyen adek kulu-ni?”" 
Numbers22:29 Ci Balaam owaco ki kana ni, “Pien ibedo ka nywara. Kono atye ki pala i ciŋa, kono aneki kwede woko.”" 
Numbers22:30 Ci kana owaco ki Balaam ni, “An pe a kanani ma ibedo i koma kare me kwoni ducu nio wa onyoo? Onoŋo yam koŋ anyebbe ka timo kit man i komi?” En ogamo ni, “Pe.”" 
Numbers22:31 Lacen Rwot oyabo waŋ Balaam, ci oneno lamalaika pa Rwot ka ocun i dye yo ma omako pala lucwan i ciŋe; ci Balaam okulo wiye piny, opoto piny aryeba cwiny," 
Numbers22:32 Lamalaika pa Rwot owaco bote ni, “Piŋo igoyo kanani tyen adek kulu? Nen, an abino anyim ka juki, pien wotti akaka-ni pe oyomo cwinya." 
Numbers22:33 Kana onena ci olokke aa woko ki i nyima tyen adek kulu. Kono en pe onoŋo olokke oa woko ki bota, kono onoŋo doŋ aneki woko tin ada, kun aweko en makwo.”" 
Numbers22:34 Ci Balaam owaco bot lamalaika pa Rwot ni, “Doŋ abalo, pien onoŋo pe aŋeyo ni icuŋ i yo pi lweny i koma. Mumiyo ka ce otimme marac ma pe ipwoyo, ci abidok cen ki ŋeya.”" 
Numbers22:35 Ento lamalaika pa Rwot ogamo dog Balaam ni, “In doŋ icit ki jo meno; ento gin ma aciki aye ibiloko.” Pienno Balaam omedde ki wot kacel ki ludito pa Balak." 
Numbers22:36 Ka Balak owinyo ni Balaam doŋ obino, ci ocito ka romo kwede i gaŋ me Moab ma i waŋ lobo ma kulu Amon opoko, wa i waŋ lobo kikome." 
Numbers22:37 Ka Balak owaco bot Balaam ni. “An yam pe acwalo kwena ka lwoŋi? Piŋo pe nene ibino bota? An pe atwero keto deyo i komi?” 
Numbers22:38 Balaam ogamo ni, “Nen doŋ abino boti. Kombeddi an atye ki twero me loko gin mo boti? Lok ma Rwot biketo i doga, en aye myero aloki.”" 
Numbers22:39 Balaam ocito gin ki Balak, ci gucito i Kiriat-kujot." 
Numbers22:40 Ka Balak ocako tumo twoni ki romi opoko riŋo ocwalo bot Balaam ki ludito ma yam gitye kwede," 
Numbers22:41 Orwone Balak otero Balaam ocito kwede malo wa i Bamot-baal, ci Balaam oneno jo Icrael ma gitye cok ki kunnu." 
Numbers23:1 Balaam owaco bot Balak ni, “Ber icanna keno tyer abiro kany, ci ikella twoni abiro ki romi bene abiro.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balak otiyo kit ma Balaam ociko-ni; ci Balak ki Balaam gubedo ka tyero twon acel ki nyok romo acel i wi keno tyer acel acel. 
Numbers23:3 Ci Balaam owaco bot Balak ni, “Cuŋ kany i ŋet gitum awanani-ni, ci an abicito kunnu. Gwok nyo Rwot bibino ka rwatte kweda, ci gin ducu ma en binyutta abititti.” Ci ocito malo i wi got ka ma yadi pe iye." 
Numbers23:4 Ci Lubaŋa orwatte ki Balaam. Balaam owaco bote ni, “Doŋ atyeko yubo keno tyer abiro, dok atyero twon acel ki nyok romo acel i wi keno tyer acel acel.”" 
Numbers23:5 Ci Rwot oketo lokke i dog Balaam kun waco bote ni, “Dok cen bot Balak ci iwac kit man.”" 
Numbers23:6 Odok cen ci onoŋo Balak pud ocuŋ ka ŋet gitum awaŋane kacel ki ludito pa jo Moab ducu. 
Numbers23:7 Balaam ocako lokke kun loko macalo lanebi. Owacci, “Balak okela ki i Aram, kabaka me Moab ooma ki i wi godi ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ: ‘Bin wek icenna jo pa Yakobo. Bin ikec i kom jo Icrael!’" 
Numbers23:8 Abiceno niŋniŋ ka Lubaŋa pe oceno? Akeco i kome niŋniŋ ka Rwot pe okeco i kome? 
Numbers23:9 Anenogi ki i wi pata got mabor, abedo ka nenogi ki i wi cere. Nen, gin lwak ma gibedo ka kengi, pe guribbe kacel ki rok mu kene ducu." 
Numbers23:10 Aŋa ma kwano jo pa Yakobo ma gipol macalo apwa-ni? Aŋa ma kwano jo Icrael ma gipol mada kuman? Wek an ato kit to pa jo-ni ma kitgi atir-ri! Agikki kwona obed macalo megi!” 
Numbers23:11 Ci Balak owaco ki Balaam ni, “Gin aŋo ma doŋ itimo tuŋ bota? Akeli kany ka ceno lumerokka, ci nen, in ilamo gum komgi keken.”" 
Numbers23:12 Odok iye ni, “Myero agwokke ka loko gin ma Rwot oketo i doga.”" 
Numbers23:13 Balak dok owaco bote ni, “Bin doŋ kweda i kabedo mukene ka ma iromo nenogi iye. Ibineno jo ma gitye cok keken, pe ibinenogi ducu; ci icengi pira ki kunnu.”" 
Numbers23:14 Ci otere i poto pa Jopim wa i lacol got Piciga. Ocano keno tyer abiro kunnu, ci otyero twon acel ki nyok romo acel i wi keno tyer acel acel." 
Numbers23:15 Ci Balaam owaco bot Balak ni, “cuŋ kany ka ŋet gitum awaŋani, kun an arwatte ki Rwot kuca.”" 
Numbers23:16 Ci Rwot orwatte ki Balaam, oketo lok i doge kun waco ni, “Dok cen bot Balak, ci iwac kit man.”" 
Numbers23:17 Odok bote ci onoŋo Balak pud ocuŋ ka ŋet gitum awaŋane ki ludito pa jo Moab kacel kwede. Balak openye ni, “Rwot doŋ oloko niŋo?”" 
Numbers23:18 Balaam ocako lokke kun loko macalo lanebi. Owacci, “A malo, Balak, ci iwiny; winy an ya, in wod pa Jipor." 
Numbers23:19 Lubaŋa pe dano, ma twero loko goba; en I pe wod pa dano, ma myero onen ki tamme. Ka doŋ owaco lok mo, ci pe bitiyone? Ka onoŋo oloko, ci pe cobo kakare?" 
Numbers23:20 Nen ya, alimo cik me miyo gum; ka Lubaŋa omiyo gum, pe atwero dwokone cen," 
Numbers23:21 Pe aneno can mo ma bipoto i kom Yakobo; pe aneno aroma mo ma bibedo bol jo Icrael. Rwot Lubaŋagi tye kwedgi, awinyo ka gidaŋŋe gijolo kabakagi." 
Numbers23:22 Lubaŋa okwanyogi ki i Ejipt, kerone calo kero pa jubi," 
Numbers23:23 Lugaga mo pe ma loko can i kom Yakobo, gi-tyet mo pe ma mako kom Icrael Koni doŋ gibiwaco lok i kom Yakobo ki Icrael ni, ‘Lubaŋa otimo gin madit kuman!’" 
Numbers23:24 Nen lwak meno! Gia malo macalo min labwor, gitiŋŋe macalo labwor ma pe buto piny nio ka emwodo lee ma omako, ci mato remo pa dano ma onekogi.”" 
Numbers23:25 Ci Balak owaco bot Balaam ni, “Ka pe iye cenogi, myero pe dok ilam gum komgi aye.”" 
Numbers23:26 Ento Balaam odok iye ki Balak ni, “Yam pe awaco boti ni, ‘Gin ducu ma Rwot ocika kwede, meno aye myero ati’?”." 
Numbers23:27 Ci Balak owaco bot Balaam ni, “Koni doŋ ibin, abiteri i kabedo mukene; gwok Lubaŋa biye ni icengi ki kunnu.”" 
Numbers23:28 Balak dok otero Balaam i wi lacol got Peor ma neno piny tuŋ tim aroo. 
Numbers23:29 Ci Balaam owaco bot Balak ni, “Canna bene keno tyer abiro kany, ikella twoni abiro ki nyogi romi abiro.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balak otiyo kit ma Balaam owaco-ni, ci otyero twon acel ki nyok romo acel i wi keno tyer acel acel." 
Numbers24:1 Balaam, onoŋo doŋ oniaŋ ni Rwot mito miyo gum kom jo Icrael, mumiyo pe dok ocito ka yenyo tyet kit ma onoŋo ocito i kare mukeneni, ento oloko waŋe oneno yo tuŋ tim." 
Numbers24:2 Ka Balaam otiŋo waŋe malo, ci oneno jo Icrael ma guguro kemagi kaka man pat, kaka man pat. Cwiny pa Lubaŋa obino i kome," 
Numbers24:3 ci ocako lokke kun loko macalo lanebi. Owacci, “Man lok pa Balaam wod pa Beor, lok pa twon laco ma wane doŋ giyabo," 
Numbers24:4 lok pa ŋat ma winyo gin ma Lubaŋa owaco, ki ma neno gin ma Won Twer Ducu nyuto bote, kun opoto piny ento waŋe bedo twolo," 
Numbers24:5 Kemawu nen maber kuman, wun jo pa Yakobo, gonywu ber kuman, wuti jo Icrael!" 
Numbers24:6 Nen calo nota ma oryene mabor, macalo pott i ma gipuro i ŋet kulu; cal ki yadi ma ŋwece kur ma Rwot opito,’ nyo yadi cedar maobakke i ŋet pii." 
Numbers24:7 Pii bipoŋ libic i agulugi kare ducu, likwayogi bibedo rom’ ki pii ma mol madwoŋ; kabakagi bibedo dit makato Agag, gibiketo deyo mamalo mada i kom kerre." 
Numbers24:8 Lubaŋa ma kerone calo kero pa jubi okwanyogi woko ki i Ejipt. Icrael bicamo lurok ma lukworre, bituro cogogi, biŋido matinotino; bicelogi pil ki aterone." 
Numbers24:9 Onyono piny, obuto calo labwor, macalo min labwor; aŋa ma bituge? Gum obed i kom jo-ducu ma bilamo gum i kom Icrael, cen opot i kom dano ducu ma bicene.”" 
Numbers24:10 Kiniga omako Balak matek i kom Balaam, Odoŋo ciŋe ci owaco bot Balaam ni, “Alwoiji ka ceno lumerokka, ci nen, ni doŋ ilego gum komgi odoko tyen adek kulu." 
Numbers24:11 Pi meno in doŋ iriŋ woko oyot idok doŋ gaŋ, Yam awacci abiketo deyo i komi ada, ento Rwot doŋ ogeni woko ki i limo deyo mo ki bota.”" 
Numbers24:12 Balaam ogamo dog Balak, owacci, “Yam atito ki lukwenani’ ma yam icwalogi bota ni," 
Numbers24:13 ‘Kadi bed Balak omiya-ryal ki jabu ducu ma i ode, pe atwero turo cik pa Rwot pi timo gin mo kadi ber kadi rac kit ma an aye amito; gin ma Rwot biwaco keken aye abiwaco.’ ”" 
Numbers24:14 Lacen Balaam owaco bot Balak ni, “Kombeddi, nen, an doŋ abidok woko bot lutuwa. Bin wek koŋ ami iŋe gin ma jo me rok man bitimo i kom joni i kare ma tye anyim.”" 
Numbers24:15 Ci ocako lokke kiin loko macalo lanebi, Owacci, “Man lok pa Balaam wod pa Beor, lok pa twon laco ma waŋe doŋ giyabo," 
Numbers24:16 lok pa ŋat ma winyo gin ma Lubaŋa owaco, ŋat ma tye ki ŋec mua ki but En Mamalo Twal, ma neno gin ma Won Twer Ducu nyuto bote, kun opoto piny ento waŋe bedo twolo:" 
Numbers24:17 Anene, ento pe kombeddi, anene, ento pe tye cok. Lakalatwe bibino kun a ki bot Yakobo, odoo ker bia ki i Icrael; bityero tur nyim jo Moab, bituro wi jo ducu ma gimaro woo me lweny." 
Numbers24:18 En bimayo lobo pa jo Edom. Jo Ceir ma lukworre en bimayo lobo ki botgi, kun jo Icrael gitye ka lweny ki tek." 
Numbers24:19 Jo pa Yakobo gibiloyo loc; jo mubwot i gaŋ pa jo Moab gibinekogi woko liweŋ.’ 
Numbers24:20 Ka dok oneno tuŋ not jo Amalek, oloko macalo lanebi kun waco ni, “Jo Amalek yam gutelo wi rok mukene ducu, ento i agikki gibityekogi woko matwal.”" 
Numbers24:21 Dok oneno tuŋ bot jo Keni, oloko macalo lanebi kun waco ni, “Kabedowu biri nakanaka, ka-larrewu gigero i pata got;" 
Numbers24:22 ento wun jo Kain gibiyakowu, wubitum woko. Jo Aciria gibiterowu i opii pi kare ma rom mene?”" 
Numbers24:23 Dok oloko macalo lanebi kun waco ni, “Magi dok jo mene do ma gucokke yo tuŋ acam?" 
Numbers24:24 Lukwaŋ mel gibibino ma gua ki yo tuŋ Caiprac, gibiyelo jo Aciria ki jo Eber matek; gin bene gibinekogi gityekogi woko matwal.”" 
Numbers24:25 Lacen Balaam oa malo odok cen ka ma en bedo iye; ki Balak bene ocito woko. 
Numbers25:1 I kare ma jo Icrael gubedo i Citim, gucako timo abor i kom anyira Moab." 
Numbers25:2 Anyira Moab gubedo ka lwoŋo jo Icrael ka ma gitumo iye gitum bot jogigi, ci jo Icrael gucamo riŋo ma gityero dok guryebbe i nyim jogigi." 
Numbers25:3 Kit meno jo Icrael guribbe kengi ki jok Baal me Peor, cikiniga omako Rwot i komgi," 
Numbers25:4 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Kwany ludito ducu ma i kin lwak, idegi i wi yat malo i dyeceŋ i nyim Rwot, wek kiniga pa Rwot mager-ri oa woko i kom jo Icrael.”" 
Numbers25:5 Mumiyo Moses owaco ki luŋolkop pa jo Icrael ni, “ŋat acel acel ma i kinwu onek jo me kakane ma guribbe kekengi ki jok Baal me Peor.”" 
Numbers25:6 Dano mo i kin jo Icrael obino ki nya jo Midian otero i gaŋgi, kun Moses ki lwak jo Icrael ducu gineno, kun onoŋo gitye ka koko i nyim doggola kema me rwatte," 
Numbers25:7 Ka Finekaci wod pa Eleajar ma wod pa ajwaka Aron oneno, en oa malo, oweko lwak, omako toŋ," 
Numbers25:8 ocito olubo kor Laicrael wa i kicika ma i tyelo, ci ocobo gin aryo ducu, Laicrael ki dako-nu, ocobo igi pii. Kit meno omiyo two gemo oa woko ki i kom jo Icrael." 
Numbers25:9 Ento onoŋo jo ma two gemo onekogi guromo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen. 
Numbers25:10 Ci Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers25:11 “Finekaci wod pa Eleajar ma wod pa ajwakana Aron otyeko doŋ dwoko akecana cen ki i kom jo Icrael, pien nyeko ma omaka omako wa en bene ki i kingi, omiyo nene pe atyeko jo Icrael woko pi nyekona." 
Numbers25:12 Pi meno in iwac bote ni, atyeko miyo bote gicikkena me kuc." 
Numbers25:13 En kacel ki Likwaye ma bilube gibibedo i tic me bedo ajwakana matwal pi gicikke man ma aketo kwedgi, pien nene nyeko omake pi Lubaŋane, ci otimo gin lakwany bal ki i kom Jo Icrael.”" 
Numbers25:14 Nyiŋ Laicrael ma gineko kacel ki nya jo Midian obedo Jimri wod pa Calu, ma ladit wi kaka i ot pa kwarogi i kin jo pa Cimeon." 
Numbers25:15 Nyiŋ dako ma nya jo Midian ma gineko-ni Kojibi nya pa Jur ma yam ladit wi kaka i ot pa kwarogi i kin jo Midian. 
Numbers25:16 Ci Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers25:17 “Cit doŋ magwa i kom jo Midian, ilweny i komgi;" 
Numbers25:18 pien gin gupoto i komwu magwa pi bwolowu kun gimiyo wupoto i bal i lok pa jok me Peor, ki i lok pa Kojibi nya pa rwot ma i kin jo Midian ma lamingi i kare ma two gemo opoto pi lok pa jok me Peor.”" 
Numbers26:1 I ŋe two gemo Rwot owaco bot Moses ki ajwaka Eleajar wod pa Aron ni," 
Numbers26:2 “Kwan Wel jo Icrael ducu, cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo dok kwede malo, kun ilubo dog odi pa kwarogi, jo Icrael ducu ma romo cito ka lweny.”" 
Numbers26:3 Ci Moses ki ajwaka Eleajar guloko ki ludito i lobo aroo me Moab i ŋet Jordan ma cok ki Jeriko ni, “Wukwan Wel dano cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo dok kwede malo,” macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses. Jo Icrael ma yam gua ki i lobo Ejipt gubedo jo magi:" 
Numbers26:4  
Numbers26:5 Jo me kaka pa Reuben ma obedo latin kayo pa Yakobo ma nyiŋe mukene Icrael-li gin ene: Likwayo pa Kanok, Pallu," 
Numbers26:6 Kejeron ki Karmi," 
Numbers26:7 Meno aye doggola pa jo pa Reuben; welgi ducu oromo alip pyeraŋwen wiye adek, ki miya abiro ki pyeradek." 
Numbers26:8 Likwayo pa Pallu gin aye Eliab," 
Numbers26:9 ki awobene Nemuel, Datan ki Abiram, Magi aye Datan ki Abiram ma lwak guyero ma gupyem ki Moses ki Aron kun gibedo i kin lwak pa Kora i kare ma gujem i kom Rwot." 
Numbers26:10 Lobo oŋamo doge omwonyogi woko ci guto kacel ki Kora i kare ma mac owaŋo dano miya aryo ki pyerabic, otyekogi woko, ci nyiŋgi odoko lok aboka me juko dano." 
Numbers26:11 Ento awobe pa Kora pe guto. 
Numbers26:12 Jo me kaka pa Cimeon gin ene: likwayo pa Nemuel, Jamin, Jakin," 
Numbers26:13 Jera ki Caul. 
Numbers26:14 Meno aye doggola pa jo pa Cimeon; welgi ducu oromo alip pyeraryo wiye aryo, ki miya aryo." 
Numbers26:15 Jo me kaka pa Gad gin ene: likwayo pa Jepon, Kagi, Cuni," 
Numbers26:16 Ojini, Eri," 
Numbers26:17 Arod ki Areli," 
Numbers26:18 Meno aye doggola pa jo pa Gad; welgi ducu oromo alip pyeraŋwen, ki miya abic," 
Numbers26:19 Kaka pa Juda, Er ki On an ma awobe pa Juda yam guto con i lobo Kanaan." 
Numbers26:20 Doŋ jo me kaka pa Juda gin ene: Likwayo pa Cela, Perej ki Jera," 
Numbers26:21 ki pa Kejeron ki Kamul ma awobe pa Perej. 
Numbers26:22 Meno aye doggola pa jo pa Juda; welgi ducu oromo alip pyerabiro wiye abicel ki miya abic. 
Numbers26:23 Jo me kaka pa Icakar gin ene: likwayo pa Tola, Puwa," 
Numbers26:24 Jacub ki Cimron. 
Numbers26:25 Meno aye doggola pa jo pa Icakar; welgi ducu oromo alip pyerabicel wiye aŋwen, ki miya adek." 
Numbers26:26 Jo me kaka pa Jabulon gin ene: likwayo pa Cered, Elon ki Jaleel." 
Numbers26:27 Meno aye doggola pa jo pa Jabulon; welgi ducu oromo alip pyerabicel, ki miya abic." 
Numbers26:28 Jo me kaka pa Yucepu gin aye likwayo pa Manace ki Epraim," 
Numbers26:29 Kaka pa Manace. Makir wod pa Manace onywalo Gilead. 
Numbers26:30 Jo pa Gilead gin ene; likwayo pa Iejer, Kelek" 
Numbers26:31 Aciriel, Cekem," 
Numbers26:32 Cemida ki Keper. 
Numbers26:33 Jelopekad wod pa Keper onywalo anyira keken, awo bene pe, Nyiŋ anyirane Makala, Noa, Kogla, Mirika ki Tiŋa." 
Numbers26:34 Meno aye doggola pa jo pa Manace; welgi ducu oromo alip pyerabic wiye aryo, ki miya abiro." 
Numbers26:35 Jo me kaka pa Epraim gin ene: likwayo pa Cutela, Beker, Takan," 
Numbers26:36 ki pa Eran ma wod pa Cutela. 
Numbers26:37 Meno aye doggola pa jo pa Epraim; welgi oromo alip pyeradek wiye aryo, ki miya abic. Meno ducu gubedo Likwayo pa Yucepu." 
Numbers26:38 Jo me kaka pa Benjamin gin ene: likwayo pa Bela, Acibel, Akiram," 
Numbers26:39 Cepupam, Kupam," 
Numbers26:40 ki pa Arud ki Naaman ma awobe pa Bela. 
Numbers26:41 Meno aye doggola pa jo pa Benjamin; welgi ducu oromo alip pyeraŋwen wiye abic, ki miya abicel." 
Numbers26:42 Jo me kaka pa Dan gin ene: likwayo pa Cukam," 
Numbers26:43 Doggola ducu pa likwayo pa Cukam Wel danogi oromo alip pyerabicel wiye aŋwen, ki miya aŋwen," 
Numbers26:44 Jo me kaka pa Acer gin ene: likwayo pa Imna, Icivi ki Beria," 
Numbers26:45 ki pa Keber ki Malkiel ma awobe pa Beria. 
Numbers26:46 Nya pa Acer nyiŋe obedo Cera. 
Numbers26:47 Meno aye doggola pa jo pa Acer; welgi ducu oromo alip pyerabic wiye adek, ki miya aŋwen." 
Numbers26:48 Jo me kaka pa Naputali gin ene: likwayo pa Jajeel, Guni," 
Numbers26:49 Jejer ki Cilem. 
Numbers26:50 Meno aye doggola pa jo pa Naputali; welgi ducu oromo alip pyeraŋwen wiye abic, ki miya aŋwen." 
Numbers26:51 Wel jo Icrael ducu oromo alip miya abicel ki acel, ki miya abiro ki pyeradek." 
Numbers26:52 Ci Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers26:53 “Ibipoko lobo i kin kaka magi obed me aleyagi kun ilubo wel nyiŋgi ma gicoyo. 
Numbers26:54 Ibimiyo dul lobo malac bot kaka maditone ki dul lobo manok bot kaka matino; dul lo bo me aleyagi gibipoko ma oporo wel dano ma i kaka mo-ni. 
Numbers26:55 Lobo gibipoko ki bolo kwir kun lubo kaka pa kwarogi. 
Numbers26:56 Gibilimo lobo me aleyagi muporo dit pa kaka acel acel kun lubo kit ma kwir opoto kwede.” 
Numbers26:57 Jo me kaka pa Levi gin aye doggola pa Gercon, Kokat ki Merari," 
Numbers26:58 kacel ki likwayo pa Libni, Kebron, Makali, Muci ki Kora, Kokat onywalo Amram," 
Numbers26:59 ma dakone obedo Yokobedi nya pa Levi ma onywalo i Ejipt. Yokobedi onywalo Aron ki Moses ki lam ingi Miriam ki Amram," 
Numbers26:60 Aron onywalo Nadab, Abiu, Eleajar ki Itamar," 
Numbers26:61 ento Nadab ki Abiu guto woko i kare ma gutyero mac mapat i nyim Rwot, kit mac ma yam pe ocikogi kwede." 
Numbers26:62 Gikwano wel jo Levi ducu ma co, cakke i kom jo ma ditogi romo dwe acel dok kwede malo, Welgi oromo alip pyeraryo wiye adek: ento welgi yam pe gikwano i kin jo Icrael, pien pe gipoko botgi dul lobo mo me aleyagi i kin jo Icrael." 
Numbers26:63 Meno gin aye jo ma Moses ki ajwaka Eleajar gukwanogi i lobo aroo me Moab i ŋet Jordan, ma cok ki Jeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Ento pe tye ŋat mo acel i kingi ki i kin jo ma yam Moses ki ajwaka Aron gukwanogi i kare ma gukwano wel jo Icrael i tim me Cinai ca. 
Numbers26:65 Onoŋo yam Rwot owaco pigi bot Moses ni, “Gibito woko i tim,” ci dano mo pe odoŋ ki i kingi, kono nyo Kaleb wod pa Jepune ki Yocwa wod pa Nun keken aye gudoŋ." 
Numbers27:1 I kare meno anyira pa Jelopekad gubino bot Moses. Jelope kad obedo wod pa Keper, wod pa Gilead, ma wod pa Makir, wod pa Manace; gin aye jo me doggola pa Manace wod pa Yucepu. Nyiŋ anyiranu Makala, Noa, Kogla, Mirika ki Tiŋa." 
Numbers27:2 Gin gubino gucuŋ i nyim’ Moses ki ajwaka Eleajar, ki i nyim lutel wic ki lwak jo Icrael ducu i doggola kema me rwatte, ci guwacci," 
Numbers27:3 “Wonwa yam oto woko i tim, En yam pe tye i kin lwak jo ca ma gujemo i kom Rwot, i lwak pa Kora, ento oto mere pi balle kene gire; yam pe onywalo awobe," 
Numbers27:4 Pi lok aŋo miyo gikwanyo nyiŋ wonwa woko ki i kin doggolane? Ni pi litino co ma pe onywalo-ni bo? Wuminiwa walim dul lobo mo i kin omegi wonwa.” 
Numbers27:5 Moses otero lok me kokogi i nyim Rwot. 
Numbers27:6 Ci Rwot owaco ki Moses ni. 
Numbers27:7 “Lok pa anyira pa Jelopekad tye atir. Ibipoko lobo botgi i kin omego pa wongi obed me aleyagi, wek gule dul lobo ma myero obed pa wongi." 
Numbers27:8 Dok iwac bot jo Icrael ni, ‘Ka laco mo oto ma pe onywalo wode mo, ci wubimiyo ginaleyane bot nyare." 
Numbers27:9 Ka nyare mo pe, ci wubimiyo bot omegine." 
Numbers27:10 Ka ominne mo pe, ci wubimiyo bot omegi wonne," 
Numbers27:11 Ka omin wonne mo pe ci wubimiyo ginaleyane bot watgi macok ma i doggolagi, ci bidoko mere. Man aye bibedo cik bot jo Icrael, ki lok ma doŋ giŋolo, macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses.’ ”" 
Numbers27:12 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Cit malo i wi got man me Abarim, icinen lobo ma abimiyo bot jo Icrael." 
Numbers27:13 Ka doŋ ineno, ci in bene doŋ ibito, idok bot lutuwu, macalo yam omeru Aron odok botgi-ni;" 
Numbers27:14 pien yam wujemo i kom lokka i tim Jin i kare ma lwak okeco i koma ca, kun pe wunyuto ni an aleŋ i nyimgi, i waŋ pii kunnu.” (Man aye pii me Meriba ma cok ki Kadec i tim Jin.)" 
Numbers27:15 Moses olego Rwot kun wacci," 
Numbers27:16 “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa ma loyo tipo kom jo ducu, tim ber iket dano mo me loyo lwak," 
Numbers27:17 wek owirre i kingi macalo laditgi, dok otel nyimgi ka ma gibicito iye ducu, wek lwakki pe gubed macalo romi ma lakwatgi pe.”" 
Numbers27:18 Ci Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Kwany Yocwa wod pa Nun, dano ma tye ki cwiny, en aye iket ciŋi i kome." 
Numbers27:19 I mi en ocuŋ i nyim ajwaka Eleajar ki i nyim lwak ducu, ci ibicike pi ticce i nyimgi ducu." 
Numbers27:20 Dok imine twerri mogo, wek lwak jo Icrael ducu gubed ka woro doge." 
Numbers27:21 En bicuŋ i nyim ajwaka Eleajar ma en aye bipenyo lok ma Rwot oŋolo kun tiyo ki Urim i nyim Rwot; kit meno en kacel ki lwak Jo Icrael ducu gibitiyo gin ducu kun gilubo lok pa Eleajar.”. 
Numbers27:22 Moses otiyo kit ma Rwot ocike kwede; okwanyo Yocwa, omiyo ocuŋ i nyim ajwaka Eleajar i nyim lwak ducu," 
Numbers27:23 ci oketo ciŋe i wiye, ocike pi ticce, macalo Rwot ocike kwede." 
Numbers28:1 Rwot owaco not Moses ni," 
Numbers28:2 “Cik jo Icrael kun iwaco botgi ni, ‘Myero wunen ni wukelo bota gityerra i kare ma giciko, en aye camma me gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac me bedo gin ma ŋwece kur ma yomo cwinya.’" 
Numbers28:3 “Dok iwac botgi ni, Man aye gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac ma wubityero bot Rwot: litino nyogi romi aryo ma ditogi mwaka acel acel ma komgi pe ki mwonyo, i nino acel acel, obed gitum awaŋa me nino ducu." 
Numbers28:4 Wubityero latin romo acel odiko, ki latin romo mukene wubityero otyeno," 
Numbers28:5 kacel ki moko kwon mapwotte ma romo agwata acel ma girubo ki moo nyig jeituni ma giodo aoda ma romo cupa aryo ki nucu pi gityer me moko kwon. 
Numbers28:6 Meno aye gitum me nino ducu ma yam giciko pire i wi got Cinai obed gin ma ŋwece kur, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot." 
Numbers28:7 Gityer amata mutike bibedo koŋo vino ma romo cupa aryo ki nucu pi latin romo acel acel; wubiliyo koŋo vino makec me gityer amata i kabedo maleŋ i nyim Rwot. 
Numbers28:8 Latin romo mukene wubityero otyeno kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata kit macalo wutimo ki gityer me odiko; bibedo gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, gin ma ŋwece kur me yo mo cwiny Rwot." 
Numbers28:9 “I kom nino me cabit wubityero nyogi romi aryo ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, ma komgi pe ki mwonyo, ki moko kwon mapwotte ma romo agwata aryo, ma girubo ki moo pi gityer me moko kwon, ki gityer amata mutike." 
Numbers28:10 Man aye gitum awaŋa me nino me cabit acel acel ma wubimedo i kom gitum awaŋa me nino ducu ki gityer amata mutike. 
Numbers28:11 “I acakki dwe ducu en aye wubityero iye gitum awaŋa bot Rwot: litino twoni aryo, nyok romo acel ki litino nyogi romi abiro ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, ma komgi pe ki mwonyo;" 
Numbers28:12 kacel ki moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo ma romo agwata adek pi twon acel acel, agwata aryo pi nyok romo acel-li" 
Numbers28:13 ki agwata acel pi latin romo acel acel; bibedo gitum awaŋa ma ŋwece kur me yo mo cwiny, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot." 
Numbers28:14 Gityer amata mutikogi bibedo koŋo vino ma romo cupa abic pi twon, cupa adek pi nyok romo, ki cupa aryo ki nucu pi latin romo. Man aye gitum awaŋa me dwe acel acel tyeko kwede dwe ducu ma i mwaka," 
Numbers28:15 Dok bene wubityero nyok dyel acel bot Rwot pi gitum me bal; wubimedo i kom gitum awaŋa me nino ducu ki gityer amatane," 
Numbers28:16 “I nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen me dwe mukwoŋo en aye nino madit me Kato (Paska) pa Rwot. 
Numbers28:17 Dok i kom nino dwe apar wiye abic me dwe acel-lu en aye nino madit; wubicamo mugati ma tobi pe iye pi nino abiro. 
Numbers28:18 I kom nino mukwoŋone wubibedo iye ki gurre maleŋ; pe wuti iye tic mo matek. 
Numbers28:19 Ento wubityero iye gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, gitum awaŋa bot Rwot: litino twoni aryo, nyok romo acel, ki litino nyogi romi abiro ma ditogi mwaka acel acel; wunen ni komgi pe ki mwonyo," 
Numbers28:20 Wubityero bene gityer me moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo. Wumi ma romo agwata adek pi twon acel acel, agwata aryo pi nyok romo," 
Numbers28:21 ki agwata acel pi latin romo acel acel. 
Numbers28:22 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel bot Rwot pi gitum me bal me kwanyo bal ki i komwu. 
Numbers28:23 Wubityero gitum magi kun wumedo ki gitum awaŋa me odiko, ma en gitum awaŋa me nino ducu." 
Numbers28:24 Wubityero cam me gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac, gin ma ŋwece kur me yo mo cwiny Rwot, kit meno pi nino abiro ki piny maru; wubityero kun wumedo ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu ki gityer amata mutike." 
Numbers28:25 I nino me abirone wubibedo ki gurre maleŋ: pe wuti iye tic mo matek. 
Numbers28:26 “I kom nino me tyero cam me wi mwaka, ma wukelo iye gityer me moko kwon kai manyen bot Rwot i ninowu madit me’ kwero agikki cabit abiro, wubibedo iye ki gurre maleŋ. Pe wuti iye tic mo matek," 
Numbers28:27 ento wutyer iye gitum awaŋa, gin ma ŋwece kur me yo mo cwiny Rwot: litino twoni aryo, nyok romo acel, ki litino nyogi romi abiro ma ditogi mwaka acel acel;" 
Numbers28:28 kacel ki gityer me moko kwon mapwotte ma’ girubo ki moo, Wumi ma romo agwata adek pi twon acel acel, agwata aryo pi nyok romo," 
Numbers28:29 ki agwata acel pi latin romo acel acel. 
Numbers28:30 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel pi kwanyo bal ki i komwu. 
Numbers28:31 Wubityerogi kacel ki gityer amata mutikogi kun wumedo ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu. Wunen ni komgi pe ki mwonyo. 
Numbers29:1 “I nino dwe acel me dwe me abiro wubibedo iye ki gurre maleŋ; pe wuti iye tic mo matek. En aye nino ma wubimiyo gwara kok iye," 
Numbers29:2 dok wubityero iye gitum awaŋa, gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot: wod twon acel, nyok romo acel ki litino nyogi romi abiro ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, ma komgi pe ki mwonyo;" 
Numbers29:3 kacel ki gityer me moko mapwotte ma girubo ki moo mutikogi, agwata adek pi wod twon, agwata aryo pi nyok romo" 
Numbers29:4 ki agwata acel pi latin romo acel acel. 
Numbers29:5 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal me kwanyo bal ki i komwu. 
Numbers29:6 Meno ducu wubityero kun wumedo ki gitum awaŋa me por dwe ki gityer me moko kwon mutike, ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu ki gityerre me moko kwon, ki gityer amatagi kit ma cikgi tye. Gibibedo gin ma ŋwece kur ma yomo cwiny, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot." 
Numbers29:7 “I nino dwe apar me dwe me abiro wubibedo ki gurre maleŋ, kun wukumo iye ki toncwiny; pe wuti iye tic mo," 
Numbers29:8 ento wutyer gitum awaŋa bot Rwot, gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwinye: wod twon acel, nyok romo acel ki litino nyogi romi abiro ma ditogi mwaka acel acel; wunen ni komgi pe ki mwonyo." 
Numbers29:9 Wumi bene gityer me moko kwon mapwotte ma girubo ki moo, agwata adek pi wod twon, agwata aryo pi nyok romo," 
Numbers29:10 ki agwata acel pi latin romo acel acel. 
Numbers29:11 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal ma gimedo ki gitum me bal me lakwany bal, ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu, ki gityer mere me moko kwon, ki gityer amata mutikogi ducu," 
Numbers29:12 “I nino dwe apar wiye abic me dwe me abiro wubibedo ki gurre maleŋ; pe wuti iye tic mo matek. Wubikwero nino madito me woro Rwot pi nino abiro. 
Numbers29:13 Wubityero gitum awaŋa i nino man mukwoŋo-ni, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac wek obed gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot: litino twoni apar wiye adek, nyogi romi aryo ki litino nyogi romi apar wiye aŋwen ma ditogi mwaka acel acel; gubed ma komgi pe ki mwonyo." 
Numbers29:14 Wubimiyo gityer me moko kwon mutikogi, moko mapwotte ma girubo ki moo ma romo agwata adek pi twoni apar wiye adek ki acel acel, agwata aryo pi nyogi romi aryo pi acel acel," 
Numbers29:15 ki agwata acel pi litino romi apar wiye aŋwen pi acel acel. 
Numbers29:16 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal ma gimedo ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu, ki “gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata mutike." 
Numbers29:17 “I nino me aryone wubimiyo litino twoni apar wiye aryo, nyogi romi aryo ki litino nyogi romi apar wiye aŋwen ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, ma komgi pe ki mwonyo," 
Numbers29:18 kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata pi twoni ki nyogi romi ki litino romi ma lubo welgi, macalo cik tye." 
Numbers29:19 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal ma gimedo ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu, ki gityer me moko kwon mere ki gityer amata mutikogi ducu." 
Numbers29:20 “I nino me adekke wubimiyo litino twoni apar wiye acel, nyogi romi aryo ki litino nyogi romi apar wiye aŋwen ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, ma komgi pe ki mwonyo," 
Numbers29:21 kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata pi twoni ki nyogi romi ki litino romi ma lubo welgi, macalo cik tye." 
Numbers29:22 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal ma gimedo ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu, ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata mutike." 
Numbers29:23 “I nino me aŋwenne wubimiyo litino twoni apar, nyogi romi aryo ki litino nyogi romi apar wiye aŋwen ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, ma komgi pe ki mwonyo," 
Numbers29:24 kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata pi twoni ki nyogi romi ki litino romi ma lubo welgi, macalo cik tye." 
Numbers29:25 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal ma gimedo ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu, ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata mutike." 
Numbers29:26 “I nino me abicce wubimiyo litino twoni aboŋwen, nyogi romi aryo ki litino nyogi romi apar wiye aŋwen ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, ma komgi pe ki mwonyo," 
Numbers29:27 kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata pi twoni ki nyogi romi ki litino romi ma lubo welgi, macalo cik tye." 
Numbers29:28 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal ma gimedo ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu, ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata mutike." 
Numbers29:29 “I nino me abicel wubimiyo litino twoni aboro, nyogi romi aryo ki litino nyogi romi apar wi ye aŋwen ma ditogi mwaka acel acel ma komgi pe ki mwonyo," 
Numbers29:30 kacel pi gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata pi twoni ki nyogi romi ki litino romi ma lubo welgi, macalo cik tye," 
Numbers29:31 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal ma gimedo ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu, ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata mutike." 
Numbers29:32 “I nino me abiro wubimiyo litino twoni abiro, nyogi romi aryo ki litino nyogi romi apar wiye aŋwen ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, ma komgi pe ki mwonyo," 
Numbers29:33 kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata pi twoni ki nyogi romi ki litino romi ma lubo welgi, macalo cik tye." 
Numbers29:34 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal ma gimedo ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu, ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata mutike." 
Numbers29:35 “I nino me aborone wubibedo iye ki cokke madit me woro Lubaŋa; pe wuti iye tic mo matek," 
Numbers29:36 ento wutyer iye gitum awaŋa, gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac wek obed gin ma ŋwece kur me yomo cwiny Rwot: twon acel, nyok romo acel ki litino nyogi romi abiro ma ditogi mwaka acel acel, ma komgi pe ki mwonyo," 
Numbers29:37 kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata pi twon ki nyok romo ki litino romi ma lubo welgi, macalo cik tye," 
Numbers29:38 Wubityero bene nyok dyel acel pi gitum me bal ma gimedo ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu, ki gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata mutike." 
Numbers29:39 “Meno aye gin ma wubityero bot Rwot i ninowu madito ma giciko, kun wumedo iye gityerwu me cobo kwon ki gityer mu kene ma iwu opwoyo, pi gitumwu me awaŋa, gityer me moko kwon ki me amata, dok pi gityerwu me lakwecwiny.”" 
Numbers29:40 Moses otito ki jo Icrael lok ducu ma Rwot ocike kwede," 
Numbers30:1 Moses owaco bot ludito wi kaka pa jo Icrael ni, “Man gin ma Rwot ociko," 
Numbers30:2 ni, Ka laco mo okwoŋo kwoŋ mo bot Rwot, nyoocikke pi lok mo kun olamme kekene otwene kene ki cikke me timo gin mo-ni, myero pe otur cikkene, ento myero ocob kakare kit ma owaco kwede." 
Numbers30:3 “Nyo ka nyako mo okwoŋo kwoŋ mo bot Rwot, otwene kwede ki cikke me timo gin mo-ni ma kun tye i paco pa wonne i kare ma pud tidi." 
Numbers30:4 Ce wonne owinyo pi kwoijne ki cikke ma otwene kwede kekene, ci pe omedo ki waco iye lok mo bote, ci kwon ducu ma en okwono ki cikke ducu ma otwene kwede kekene bimoko i kome matwal." 
Numbers30:5 Ento ka ce wonne ojuke woko i nino ma owinyo iye lokke-ni, ci kwoŋ pa nyako-nu ki lok ma otwene kwede ke kene pe bimoko i kome; Rwot bene bitimme kica, pien onoŋo wonne ogeŋo woko." 
Numbers30:6 “Ka ce ginyomo nyako mo ma noŋo okwoŋo kwon nyo otwene kekene ki cikke kun oloko laboŋo tamo tere," 
Numbers30:7 ce cware owinyo pire, ci pe omedo ki waco iye lok mo bote i nino ma owinyo iye-ni, ci kwoŋŋe ki cikke ma otwene kwede kekene bimoko i kome matwal." 
Numbers30:8 Ento ka ce cware ojuke woko i nino ma owinyo iye lokke-ni, ci cware bikwanyo kwoŋ meno woko ki i kome, nyo lok mo ma onoŋo otwene kwede kekene kun oloko laboŋo tamo tere; Rwot bene bitimme kica." 
Numbers30:9 “Ka ce daa-to nyo dako ma cware oryemo okwoŋo kwoŋ, ci lok ducu ma en otwene kwede kekene bimoko i kome," 
Numbers30:10 “Ka dako mo okwoŋo kwoŋ nyo otwene kekene ki cikke ma doŋ ginyomo woko," 
Numbers30:11 ce cware owinyo pire ci pe omedo ki waco iye lok mo bote, dok pe ojuke, ci kwoŋ ducu ma en okwoŋo, ki cikke ducu ma otwene kwede, bimoko i kome." 
Numbers30:12 Ento ka ce cware ogeno woko i nino ma owinyo pire-ni, ci lok ducu ma dako-nu oloko ma mako kwoŋ ma okwoŋo nyo cikke ma otwene kwede pe bimoko, pien cware doŋ ogeŋo woko: Rwot bene bitimme kica iye." 
Numbers30:13 Kwoŋ ducu ma dako okwoŋo nyo ma otwene kwede me keto aroma i kome kekene, cware twero moko, dok cware twero geŋo woko." 
Numbers30:14 Ento ka cware pe owaco lok mo bote, obedo ka liŋ aliŋa nino ducu, miyo en moko kwede kwoŋ pa dakone ducu ki cikke ducu ma otwene kwede kekene, pien pe owaco lok mo bote i nino ma owinyo iye pire-ni." 
Numbers30:15 Ento ka ori ma pe ogeno woko oyotoyot, ci bal pa dakone bidok i wiye ka pe ocobo.”" 
Numbers30:16 Meno aye cik ma Rwot ociko ki Moses ma mako Laco ki dakone ka okwono kwon, ki won nyako ki nyare ka okwoŋo kwoŋ i kare ma en pud tidi, ma noŋo pud tye i paco pa wonne." 
Numbers31:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers31:2 “Doŋ icul kwor pa jo Icrael i kom jo Midian; lacen doŋ ibito, idok bot lutuwu.”" 
Numbers31:3 Ci Moses owaco ki lwak ni, “Wumi lumony ma gitye i kinwu gurukke ki jami lwenygi, wek gucit ka lweny i kom jo Midian, gucul kwor pa Rwot i komgi." 
Numbers31:4 Wucwal dano alip acel mua ki i kaka acel acel ma i Icrael gucit i lweny.” 
Numbers31:5 Kit meno ginoŋo dano alip apar wiye aryo ma gurukke pi lweny mua ki i lwak doggola mapol mada ma i Icrael, dano alip acel mua ki i kaka acel acel." 
Numbers31:6 Moses ocwalogi woko ka lweny, kacel ki Finekaci wod pa ajwaka Eleajar ma omako jami maleŋ pa Lubaŋa ki tum me goyo oduru." 
Numbers31:7 Gulwenyo i kom jo Midian macalo Rwot ociko ki Moses, ci guneko co megi ducu." 
Numbers31:8 Luker abic pa jo Midian onoŋo tye i kin dano ma ginekogi; nyiŋgi Evi, Rekem, Jur, Kur ki Reba. Dok guneko Balaam wod pa Beor bene ki pala lucwan." 
Numbers31:9 Jo Icrael guyako mon ki litino pa jo Midian, gutero woko; dok gumayo limgi makwo madito ki matino ducu, ki jamigi ducu." 
Numbers31:10 Gaŋigi ducu i kabedo mapatpat ma gin gibedo iye, ki gonygi ducu, guwaŋo woko ki mac," 
Numbers31:11 ci gutero jami ducu ma guyako nyo gumayo, dano wa ki lee-gu, gucito kwede," 
Numbers31:12 gukelo bot Moses ki ajwaka Eleajar ki bot lwak jo Icrael, i gonygi ma i lobo aroo me Moab i ŋet Jordan, ma cok ki Jeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Moses ki ajwaka Eleajar ki lutel wi lwak ducu gucito woko ka rwatte kwedgi i ue gony. 
Numbers31:14 Ci kiniga omako Moses i kom ludito me mony, i kom lulo dano alip ki lulo dano miya ma gudwogo ki ka tero dano i mony." 
Numbers31:15 Moses owaco botgi ni, “Man wuweko mon ducu gudoŋ makwo piŋo?" 
Numbers31:16 Nen, mon-ni aye yam gulubo tam pa Balaam ci gumiyo jo Icrael guŋayo waŋ Rwot i lok i kom jok Peor ca, mumiyo two gemo opoto i kom lwak pa Rwot." 
Numbers31:17 Kombeddi doŋ wunek litino co woko ducu ma i kin litinogi, dok wunek mon ducu ma doŋ otyeko ŋene ki co." 
Numbers31:18 Ento litino anyira ducu ma peya gubuto ki co wugwokgi makwo gubed mewu. 
Numbers31:19 Koŋ wubut woko i ne gony pi nino abiro. Jo ducu ma i kinwu ma guneko dano, ki jo ducu ma gugudo kom dano muto myero wulonnye kekenwu, kacel ki dano ma wuyakogi, i nino me adekke ki i nino me abirone." 
Numbers31:20 Wulony boŋŋi aruka ducu, gin ducu ma gitiyo ki laa, nyo ma gicweyo ki yer dyegi, ki jami ducu ma gitiyo ki bao nyo ki yat.”" 
Numbers31:21 Ajwaka Eleajar owaco bot lulweny ma onoŋo gucito i mony ni, “Man aye cik ma giketo, ma yam Rwot ociko ki Moses:" 
Numbers31:22 Jami ma obedo jabu, nyo ryal, nyo mola, nyo nyonyo, nyo koc, nyo racac keken," 
Numbers31:23 gin ducu ma mac pe balo, wubimiyo wok kato ki i mac ci bilony woko. Ento kadi bed kumeno, pud dok gibilonyo ki pii me lwoko kwer; ci gin ducu ma mac balo woko wubimiyo wok kato ki i pii." 
Numbers31:24 Myero wulwok bonniwu i nino me abirone, ci doŋ wubibedo ma wulony; ka lacen wubibino i gony.”" 
Numbers31:25 Rwot owaco ki Moses ni," 
Numbers31:26 “Doŋ ikwan wel jami ma giyako ki i mony, dano ki lee bene; wukwan ki ajwaka Eleajar ki ludito kaka ma i ot pa kwarogi ma i kin lwak." 
Numbers31:27 Ci ipok jami ma giyako i mony i dul aryo, tuŋ cel pi lulweny ma gucito i mony, tuŋ cel pi lwak ducu." 
Numbers31:28 Dok ijog ajog pa Rwot ki bot lulweny ma gucito i mony kun ikwanyo acel i kom miya abic ki i kom dano, ki twoni, ki kana, ki romi ki dyegi." 
Numbers31:29 Kwany ki i kom nucu ma megi, ci imi bot ajwaka Eleajar obed gityer bot Rwot." 
Numbers31:30 I kom nucu ma tuŋ bot jo Icrael ibikwanyo iye acel i kom pyerabic ki kom dano, ki twoni, ki kana, ki romi nyo dyegi, ki i kom lim makwo ducu, ci imi bot Lulevi ma gigwoko kema pa Rwot.”" 
Numbers31:31 Ci Moses ki Eleajar gutiyo kit ma Rwot ociko ki Moses. 
Numbers31:32 Jami ma lulweny guyako, ma odoŋ, onoŋo obedo romi alip miya abicel ki pyerabiro wiye abic," 
Numbers31:33 dyaŋi alip pyerabiro wiye aryo," 
Numbers31:34 kana alip pyerabicel wiye acel," 
Numbers31:35 ki dano alip pyeradek wiye aryo ma gin ducu aye anyira ma peya gubuto ki co. 
Numbers31:36 Nucune ma gipoko bot jo ma gucito i mony obedo romi alip miya adek ki pyeradek wiye abiro, ki miya abic;" 
Numbers31:37 romi ma gijogo pi Rwot guromo miya abicel ki pyerabiro wiye abic. 
Numbers31:38 Dyaŋi guromo alip pyeradek wiye abicel; dyaŋi ma gijogo pi Rwot guromo pyerabiro wiye aryo. 
Numbers31:39 Kana gubedo alip pyeradek, ki miya abic; gin ma gijogo pi Rwot guromo pyerabicel wiye acel." 
Numbers31:40 Dano guromo alip apar wiye abicel; dano ma gijogo pi Rwot guromo pyeradek wiye aryo," 
Numbers31:41 Moses omiyo dul ma gijogo me gityer pa Rwot bot ajwaka Eleajar, macalo Rwot ocike." 
Numbers31:42 Nucu ma gipoko ki jo Icrael, ma Moses opoko pat ki maca pa jo ma yam gucito i mony," 
Numbers31:43 wek obed pi lwak, obedo romi alip miya adek ki pyeradek wiye abiro, ki miya abic," 
Numbers31:44 dyaŋi alip pyeradek wiye abicel," 
Numbers31:45 kana alip pyeradek, ki miya abic," 
Numbers31:46 ki dano alip apar wiye abice!’ 
Numbers31:47 I kom nucu man ma obedo pi lwak Moses okwanyo iye acel ki i kom pyerabic, i kom dano ki i kom lee, ci omiyogi bot Lulevi ma gigwoko kema pa Rwot, macalo Rwot ocike kwede." 
Numbers31:48 Ka doŋ ludito ma giloyo lumony ducu, lulo dano alip ki lulo dano miya, gubino bot Moses." 
Numbers31:49 Guwacci, “Wan luticci watyeko kwano Wel lumony ma gitye i te locwa, ci onen ni pe tye dano acel mo ma orwenyo ki i kingi." 
Numbers31:50 Ci doŋ wakelo gityerwa bot Rwot, gin ma dano acel acel onoŋo i lweny, jami me jabu, mola bad, atego ŋut ciŋ, agit ciŋ ki tiko nut, pi kwanyo bal ki i komwa i nyim Rwot.”" 
Numbers31:51 Moses ki ajwaka Eleajar gugamo jabu meno ki botgi; gin ducu obedo jami me deyo kom ma gitiyo ki diro 
Numbers31:52 Jabu ducu ma lulo dano alip ki lulo dano miya gutyero bot Rwot pekke oromo makato ratili miya aŋwen," 
Numbers31:53 Onoŋo lulweny ducu guyako jami, ŋat acel acel pire kene." 
Numbers31:54 Moses ki ajwaka gugamo jabu ki bot ludito wi mony, gutero i kema me rwatte obed gin me poyo wi Rwot i kom jo Icrael." 
Numbers32:1 Jo me kaka pa Reuben ki pa Gad gubedo ki lwak lim makwo mapol twatwal. Ka guneno lobo Jajer ki lobo Gilead obedo lobo maber twatwal me kwat," 
Numbers32:2 ci gucito bot Moses ki ajwaka Eleajar ki bot lutel wi lwak, guwaco ni," 
Numbers32:3 “Gaŋi magi, Atarot, Dibon, Jajer, Nimra, Kecbon, Eleale, Cebam, Nebo ki Beon" 
Numbers32:4 ma i lobo ma yam Rwot oloyo i nyim lwak jo Icrael, lobogi ber twatwal me kwat; ci wan luticwu-ni watye ki lim madwoŋ." 
Numbers32:5 Ka in bene ipwoyo tamwa-ni, ci iye lobo man gimi botwa obed mewa, pe doŋ iterwa waŋol loka Jordan.”" 
Numbers32:6 Ento Moses owaco bot jo pa Gad ki pa Reuben ni, “Omegiwu gibicito ka lweny kun wun wubedo kany bo?" 
Numbers32:7 Piŋo wumito balo cwiny jo Icrael, ni pe gucit loka ca i lobo ma yam Rwot omiyo botgi?" 
Numbers32:8 Kwarowu bene yam koŋ gutimo kit meno i kare ma acwalogi ki i Kadec-bamea pi neno lobo. 
Numbers32:9 Pien ka gucito malo wa i nota me Ecikol, ka guneno lobo, ci gubalo cwiny jo Icrael woko, ni pe gucit i lobo ma Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo botgi." 
Numbers32:10 Ci kiniga omako Rwot i komgi i nino maca. Okwono kwon kun waco ni," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Ada, pe tye ŋat mo ki i kin jo ma yam gua ki i Ejipt, cakke ki i kom jo ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo dok kwede malo ma bineno lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire ni abimiyo bot Abraim ki Icaka ki Yakobo, pien pe gubedo ka lubo gin ma amito ducu kakare," 
Numbers32:12 Pe tye ŋat mo ma bineno, kono nyo Kaleb wod pa Jepune ma jo Keniji, ki Yocwa wod pa Nun, pien gin aye gubedo ka lubo gin ma amito ducu kakare.’" 
Numbers32:13 Kiniga omako Rwot i kom jo Icrael i kare ca, ci omiyo gubedo ka wirre i tim atata gutyeko mwaka pyeraŋwen kulu, nio ka yalwak ma yam gutimo rac i nyim Rwot gutum woko." 
Numbers32:14 Ci nen, wun bene dok wua malo kun wuleyo ka wegiwu, wun litino pa lubalo, miyo wubimedo dok kiniga pa Rwot doko mager t kom jo Icrael!" 
Numbers32:15 Pien ka wuweko luba gin ma en mito kombeddi, ci en dok bitenyo lwak man woko i tim ata; kit meno wubimiyo lwak man ducu to tum woko.’ ”" 
Numbers32:16 Ka gin dok gubino bote kun giwaco ni, “Wabigero dwol ma wagero ki gweŋ pi romiwa, ki gaŋi pi mon ki litinowa." 
Numbers32:17 Ento wan wabiruko jami Iwenywa, kun wayubbe pi telo wi jo Icrael anyim, nio ka wabiterogi i kabedogi, kun noŋo monwa ki litinowa gibedo i gaŋi gogo ma wacelo matek pi dano ma gibedo i lobo-ni." 
Numbers32:18 Pe wabidwogo i pacowa nio waŋ ma jo Icrael gutyeko noŋo ginaleyagi ki acel acel ducu. 
Numbers32:19 Wan pe wabinywako leyo lobo kacel kwedgi i ne kulu Jordan ki tuŋ kunnu ducu, pien ginaleya ma me wa doŋ watyeko noŋone i loka Jordan kany ma tuŋ wokceŋ.”" 
Numbers32:20 Omiyo Moses dok owaco botgi ni, “Ka ce wubitimo kit meno, ka ce wubiruko jami Lwenywu wucito anyim ka lweny i nyim Rwot," 
Numbers32:21 kun dano acel acel i kinwu ma romo lweny kato loka Jordan i nyim Rwot, nio ka Rwot otyeko ryemo lumerokke woko ki i nyime, ci ber." 
Numbers32:22 Ka Rwot doŋ otyeko loyo lobo-nu, ci lacen wubidwogo giwu kun banya mo pe i komwu bot Rwot nyo bot jo Icrael, ci lobo man wubicamo bedo mewu i nyim Rwot." 
Numbers32:23 Ento ka pe wutimo kit meno, ci nen, noŋo wutimo bal i kom Rwot. Myero wune ni, balwu bimiyo wutiŋo alii ma bidwarowu." 
Numbers32:24 Wuger gaŋi pi mon ki Litinowu, ki dwol pi romiwu; ento wucob gin ma wuwaco-ni.”" 
Numbers32:25 Jo Gad ki jo Reuben gudok iye bot Moses ni, “Wan aye luticci; wabitiyo kit macalo in laditwa iciko ducu." 
Numbers32:26 Litinowa ki monwa ki romiwa ki limwa makwo ducu gibidoŋ kany i gaŋi ma i Gilead. 
Numbers32:27 Ento wan ducu ma waruko jami lweny wabikato waŋolo loka ca ka lweny i nyim Rwot kit macalo in laditwa iciko-ni.” 
Numbers32:28 Kit meno Moses omiyo cik ma makogi bot ajwaka Eleajar ki bot Yocwa wod pa Nun, ki bot ludito ki i odi pa kwarogi ma i kaka ducu pa jo Icrael." 
Numbers32:29 Owaco botgi ni, “Ka jo Gad ki jo Reuben ma doŋ gurukke pi lweny i nyim Rwot gibikato giŋolo kwedwu loka Jordan, dok ka wun wuloyo lobonu woko, ci wubimiyo botgi lobo Gilead obed megi." 
Numbers32:30 Ento ka pe bigikato loka ca kacel kwedwu kun gurukke me lweny, ci gibinywako camo lobo Kanaan kacel kwedwu.”" 
Numbers32:31 Jo pa Gad ki pa Reuben gudok iye ni, “Wabitimo kit ma Rwot doŋ oloko botwa, ladit." 
Numbers32:32 Wabikato Loka ca i nyim Rwot, wacito i lobo Kanaan kun warukke me lweny, miyo lobo ma loka Jordan kany bidoŋ i ciŋwa ci bedo me aleyawa.”" 
Numbers32:33 Mumiyo Moses omiyo bot jo Gad ki jo Reuben ki bot nucu kaka pa Manace wod pa Yucepu lobo ma yam obedo pa Cikon kabaka pa jo Amor ki Og abaka me Bacan, lobo ducu ma gin yam guloyo, kacel ki gaŋi ducu ma i lobo-nu ki lobo ma i ŋetgi ducu." 
Numbers32:34 Jo Gad gugero Dibon, Atarot, Aroer," 
Numbers32:35 Atarot-copan, Jajer, Jogbea," 
Numbers32:36 Bet-nimra ki Bet-aran, gin ducu gaŋi ma gicelo ki cel gogo, ki dwol pi romigi." 
Numbers32:37 Jo Reuben gugero Kecbon, Eleala, Kiriataim," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo ki Baal-meon (magi giloko nyiŋgi woko) ki Cibma; ci gucako nyiŋ mukene pi gaŋi ma gugero-ni," 
Numbers32:39 Jo pa Makir wod pa Manace gucito i lobo Gilead, gumako gumayo woko ki bot jo Amor ma onoŋo gitye kunnu." 
Numbers32:40 Ci Moses omiyo Gilead bot jo pa Makir wod pa Manace, gucako bedo iye." 
Numbers32:41 Jair me kaka pa Manace ocito omako gaŋi matino mapol, ocako nyiŋgi ni, Kavot-jair." 
Numbers32:42 Dok Noba ocito omako Kenat ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, ci ocako nyiŋe Noba, macalo nyiŋe kikome." 
Numbers33:1 Jo Icrael yam guwoto kun gikobo ki wotgi kit man, i kare ma gua woko ki i lobo Ejipt ki bucagi kun Moses ki Aron gitelo wigi." 
Numbers33:2 Yam Moses obedo ka coyo nyiŋ kabedo acel acel i kare ma gua ki iye, macalo Rwot ociko, Nyiŋ kabedo ki kit ma gukobo ki wotgi en ene:" 
Numbers33:3 Jo Icrael gua woko ki i Ramcec i nino dwe apar wiye abic me dwe mukwoŋo, i nino ma lubo nino madit me Kato (Paska), Gua gucito woko ki wayu kun jo Ejipt ducu gineno." 
Numbers33:4 Noŋo jo Ejipt gitye ka yiko litino kayogi ma onoŋo Rwot ogoyo oneko woko, ocobo kwede kop ma oŋolo i kom lubaŋa ducu pa jo Ejipt." 
Numbers33:5 Kit meno jo Icrael gua ki i Ramcec, gugony i Cukot." 
Numbers33:6 Gua ki i Cukot, gugony i Etam ma tye i dog tim." 
Numbers33:7 Gua ki i Etam, ci gulokke gudok cen i Piakirot ma yo tuŋ wokceŋ me Baaljepon; ci gugony i nyim Migdol." 
Numbers33:8 Gua ki i Pi-akirot guwok gukato i dye nam, guo i tim. Guwoto wot me nino adek i dye tim me Etam, ci gugony i Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Gua ki i Mara, gubino i Elim. I Elim yam tye iye waŋ it apar wiye aryo, ki otit pyerabiro; ci gugony kunnu." 
Numbers33:10 Gua ki i Elim, gugony i ŋet Nam Makwar," 
Numbers33:11 Gua ki i ŋet Nam Makwar, gugony i tim Cin." 
Numbers33:12 Gua ki i tim Cin, gugony i Dopka," 
Numbers33:13 Gua ki i Dopka, gugony i Aluc," 
Numbers33:14 Gua ki i Aluc, gugony i Repidim ka ma pii amata pa dano obedo pe," 
Numbers33:15 Gua ki i Repidim gucito wa i te got Kor. Ka pud gitye i yo me cito kunnu gugony i kabedo magi: tim Cinai," 
Numbers33:16 Kibrot-atava," 
Numbers33:17 Kajerot," 
Numbers33:18 Ri tma," 
Numbers33:19 Rimmon-perej," 
Numbers33:20 Libna," 
Numbers33:21 Rica," 
Numbers33:22 Keelata," 
Numbers33:23 got Ceper," 
Numbers33:24 Karada," 
Numbers33:25 Makelot 
Numbers33:26 Takat 
Numbers33:27 Tera 
Numbers33:28 Mitka 
Numbers33:29 Kacimona," 
Numbers33:30 Mocerot," 
Numbers33:31 Bene-jaa-kan," 
Numbers33:32 Kor-agidgad. 
Numbers33:33 Jotibata," 
Numbers33:34 Abrona," 
Numbers33:35 Ejion-geber," 
Numbers33:36 tim me Jin, en aye Kadec" 
Numbers33:37 lacen gugony i te got Kor, i dog waŋ lobo me Edom." 
Numbers33:38 Ajwaka Aron oito malo i wi got Kor kit ma Rwot ociko, ci oto woko kunnu, i mwaka me pyeraŋwenne nia ma jo Icrael gua ki i lobo Ejipt, i nino mukwoŋo me dwe me abic," 
Numbers33:39 onoŋo Aron doŋ tye ki mwaka me ditte miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye adek i kare ma en oto ki i wi got. 
Numbers33:40 Ci kabaka me Arad, ma en Lakanaan ma bedo i Negeb i lobo owinyo pi bino pa jo Icrael." 
Numbers33:41 Ka gua ki i te got Kor gugony i kabedo magi: Jalmona," 
Numbers33:42 Punon," 
Numbers33:43 Obot," 
Numbers33:44 Iye-abarim ma i lobo Moab," 
Numbers33:45 Dibon-gad," 
Numbers33:46 Almon-Diblataim. 
Numbers33:47 Gua ki i Almon-diblataim gugony i dye godi Abarim, i nyim got Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Gua ki kunnu, gugony i lobo aroo me Moab i ŋet Jordan ma cok ki Jeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Guguro kemagi i ŋet Jordan cakke i Bet-jecimot o kwede wa Abelcitim i bar aroo me Moab," 
Numbers33:50 I lobo aroo me Moab i ŋet Jordan ma cok ki Jeriko Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers33:51 “Cik jo Icrael ni, Ka wuŋolo kulu Jordan wukato i lobo Kanaan," 
Numbers33:52 ci wubiryemo jo ma gibedo i lobo meno woko ducu ki i nyimwu; wubibalo got megi ducu ma gigoro cal i komgi, ki cal jogigi me nyonyo ma giliyo aliya, dok wubimuko waŋ jogigi ma i wi godi," 
Numbers33:53 Wubicamo lobo-nu, wubibedo iye, pien atyeko miyo botwu ni obed mewu." 
Numbers33:54 Wubilimo lobo me aleyawu kun gipoko ki bolo kwir ma lubo kit ma doggolawu tye kwede, Wubimiyo dul lobo malac bot kaka maditone ki dul lobo manok bot kaka matino. Ka ma kwir opoto iye i kom dano mo, en aye bedo mere; wubilimo lobo me aleyawu kun lubo kaka pa kwarowu." 
Numbers33:55 Ento ka pe wuryemo jo ma gibedo i lobo-nu woko ki i nyimwu, ci gin jo meno ma wuwekogi gudoŋŋi gibibedo macalo atero mabit me cobo waŋwu ki okuto me cobo lakŋetwu, ci gibiyelowu i lobo ka ma wubibedo iye-ni," 
Numbers33:56 Ci abitimo i komwu kit ma onoŋo atamo ni abitimo i komgi.” 
Numbers34:1 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers34:2 “Cik jo Icrael kun iwaco botgi ni, Ka wudonyo i lobo Kanaan, ma en aye lobo ma gibimiyowu obed mewu me aleyawu, waŋ apokki me lobowu bibedo k it man:" 
Numbers34:3 Wan lobowu yo tuŋ acuc bicakke i tim me Jin ci rabo ŋet lobo Edom. Bia ki tuŋ agikki nam me Kado ma tuŋ wokceŋ," 
Numbers34:4 ka doŋ bilokke dok tuŋ acuc ka ma giito iye malo i Akrabim, ka dok kato kwede wa i Jin, ki agikkine bibedo i ŋet Kadec-bamea yo tuŋ acuc, Ka dok bicito medde kwede nio wa i Kajar-adar, ka kato cito kwede i Ajimon," 
Numbers34:5 Ka waŋ lobo cako lokke ki i Ajimon cito wa i nota ora me Ejipt; ci wane bigik i dog nam," 
Numbers34:6 “Waŋ lobo ma yo tuŋ potoceŋ bibedo Nam Madit; dog namme bibedo waŋ lobowu ma yo tuŋ potoceij. 
Numbers34:7 “Man aye bibedo waŋ lobowu ma yo tuŋ acam: bia ki i Nam Madit ci bicito atir o wa i kom got Kor. 
Numbers34:8 Nia ki i kom got Kor bicito atir wa i yo ma donyo i Kamat, ci cito wa i Jedad;" 
Numbers34:9 ka dok bimedde cito wa i Jipron, ka bigik i Kajar-enan, Man aye bibedo waŋ lobowu ma yo tuŋ acam." 
Numbers34:10 “Waŋ lobowu ma yo tuŋ wokceŋ bicakke ki i Kajar-enan cito atir o wa i Cepam. 
Numbers34:11 Ka waŋ lobo bilor dok tuŋ piny nia ki i Cepam o kwede wa i Ribla ma i ŋet Ain yo tuŋ wokceŋ. Ka dok bilor piny cito o kwede i kor got me nam me Kineret yo tuŋ wokceŋ," 
Numbers34:12 Ka dok bilor piny wa i Jordan, ka bigik i nam me Kado, Meno aye bibedo lobowu, ki waŋ apokkine ma orumo ducu.”" 
Numbers34:13 Moses dok ociko jo Icrael kun waco ni, “Man aye lobo ma wubileyo kun gipoko ki bolo kwir, ma yam Rwot ociko ni gimi bot kakawu aboŋwen ki nucu;" 
Numbers34:14 pien kaka pa Reuben ki kaka pa Gad gutyeko gamo ginaleyagi kun lubo dog odi pa kwarogi, kacel ki nucu kaka pa Manace bene," 
Numbers34:15 Gutyeko gamo lobogi loka Jordan mukemo Jeriko, yo tuŋ wokceŋ, ka ma ceŋ tuc ki iye-ni.”" 
Numbers34:16 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers34:17 “Man aye nyiŋ dano ma gibipoko botwu lobo me ginaleyawu: ajwaka Eleajar ki Yocwa wod pa Nun. 
Numbers34:18 Dok wubikwanyo latel wic acel ki i kaka acel acel wek gupok lobo me aleyawu. 
Numbers34:19 Magi aye nyiŋ lutel; pi kaka pa Juda, Kaleb wod pa Jepune." 
Numbers34:20 Pi kaka pa Cimeon, Cemuel wod pa Amikud." 
Numbers34:21 Pi kaka pa Benjamin, Elidad wod pa Kicion," 
Numbers34:22 Pi kaka pa Dan, Buki wod pa Jogli." 
Numbers34:23 Pi likwayo pa Yucepu, pi kaka pa Manace, Kaniel wod pa Epod;" 
Numbers34:24 ki i kaka pa Epraim, Kemuel wod pa Ciptan," 
Numbers34:25 Pi kaka pa Jabulon, Elijapan wod pa Pamak." 
Numbers34:26 Pi kaka pa Icakar, Paltiel wod pa Ajan." 
Numbers34:27 Pi kaka pa Acer, Akiud wod pa Celomi." 
Numbers34:28 Pi kaka pa Naputali, Pedael wod pa Amikud." 
Numbers34:29 Magi aye dano ma Rwot ociko ni gupok lobo me aleya pa jo Icrael ki i lobo Kanaan.’ 
Numbers35:1 I lobo aroo me Moab ma i ŋet Jordan mukemo Jeriko Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers35:2 “Cik jo Icrael ni gumi ki Lulevi gaŋi me bedogi ki i koni lobo ma gibilimo me aleyagi; dok myero wumi botgi lobo ma orumo gani-nu obed me oletgi. 
Numbers35:3 Gani-nu bibedo pa Lulevi me bedogi, ki olet ma i ŋetgi bibedo pi kwayo dyaŋigi ki limgi makwo ducu." 
Numbers35:4 Lobo ma wubimiyo bot jo Levi pi oletgi lacce biromo yadi miya abic cakke ki i cel me gaŋ tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi kun rumo gaŋ ducu. 
Numbers35:5 Wubipimo dul lobo ma latwoke aŋwen ma romrom; bor me twoke acel acel bibedo yadi alip acel, kun gaŋ bedo i dyere." 
Numbers35:6 Wubimiyo bot Lulevi gaŋi abicel me laro lunek dano ka ma wubiweko lunek riŋo iye, dok wubimiyo botgi gaŋi mukene pyera ŋwen wiye aryo wumedo i kom meno," 
Numbers35:7 Kit meno gaŋi ducu ma wubimiyo bot Lulevi biromo pyeraŋwen wiye aboro, kacel ki oletgi." 
Numbers35:8 Gaŋigi wubimiyo botgi kuti wukwanyo ki i kom lobo ma jo Icrael gibigamo; wubikwanyo mabup ki bot kaka madito, dok ki bot kaka matinone wubikwanyo manok, kun kaka acel acel miyo gaŋine mogo bot Lulevi muporo lobo ma ogamo me ginaleyane.”" 
Numbers35:9 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Numbers35:10 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, Ka doŋ wuŋolo kulu Jordan, wukato i lobo Kanaan," 
Numbers35:11 ci wubiyero gaŋi mogo wek gubed gaŋi me laro lunek dano, wek dano ma pe guneko dano akaka gurhj gular iye komgi." 
Numbers35:12 Gaŋi magi bibedo me laro lanek dano ki bot lacul kwor, wek lanek dano mo pe oto nio ka ocuŋ i nyim lwak wek giŋol koppe," 
Numbers35:13 Wubiyero gaŋiwu abicel," 
Numbers35:14 adek loka Jordan tuŋ wokceŋ ki adek i lobo Kanaan, gubed gaŋi me laro lunek dano." 
Numbers35:15 Gaŋi magi abicel-li gibibedo me laro kom pi jo Icrael ki pi welowu ki pi lubedo ma gibedo i kinwu, wek ka ŋat mo oneko dano kun pe oneko akaka oriŋ olar iye kome." 
Numbers35:16 “Ento ka ogoyo dano ki nyonyo mo oreto piny ci oto woko, meno en lanek; gibineke woko." 
Numbers35:17 Ka ce ocelo dano ki kidi ma omako i ciŋe, ma romo neko dano, ci ocelo oto woko, meno aye lanek; gibineke woko." 
Numbers35:18 Nyo ka ogoyo ki yat ma omako i ciŋe, ma romo neko dano, ci oto woko, meno en lanek; gibineke woko." 
Numbers35:19 Wat macok pa lato kikome aye bineko lanek dano woko; ka oromo kwede, ci neke woko." 
Numbers35:20 Ka ŋat mo obako dano ocobo pil pi mone, nyo otokke i kome ci obayo ocobo woko, kun noŋo okiye ak iya, ci oto woko," 
Numbers35:21 nyo ka odoŋe ki ciŋe pi mone ma tye i kingi ci oto woko, ŋat ma ocobe nyo ma odoŋe-ni gibineko woko; meno en lanek. Wat macok ki Lato kikome aye bineko lanek dano woko, ka oromo kwede," 
Numbers35:22 “Ento ka ce obako ci ocobe oyotoyot ma tyen mone mo pe, nyo otokke i kome ci obayo ocobo ma pe okiye akiya," 
Numbers35:23 nyo ocele ki kidi ma romo neko dano ma noŋo pe onene, ci oto woko kadi yam pe en lamerokke, dok onoŋo pe opiro timo en marac," 
Numbers35:24 ci lwak myero oŋol kop i kin lanek ki wat pa lato ma lacul kwor remo kun lubo cik magi. 
Numbers35:25 Lwak myero olar lanek dano ki i cin wat pa lato ma lacul kwor remo-ni, ci dwoko lanek i gaŋ me laro lunek dano ka ma yam oriŋo olaro-ni. En bibedo kunnu matwal, nio ka ajwaka madit ma giwiro ki moo maleŋ i kare-nu otyeko to woko." 
Numbers35:26 Ento ka i kare mo lanek dano ocito okato woko i ŋe waŋ apokki me gaŋ me laro kome ka ma yam oriŋo iye-ni," 
Numbers35:27 ci lacul kwor remo pa lato onoŋo kome owee, kun tye woko i ŋe waŋ apokki me gaŋ me laro kome, ce lacul kwor remo pa lato oneko lanek-ki, pe gibikwano alii me remo i wiye." 
Numbers35:28 Pien dano meno myero obed i gaŋ me laro kom nio i kare ma ajwaka madit bito iye; ento i ŋe to pa ajwaka madit lanek dano twero dok cen i pacone. 
Numbers35:29 Meno ducu bibedo cik botwu wa i kare pa likwayowu ducu, i kabedo ducu ma wubibedo iye. Cik ma mako lucaden ki lim me kok" 
Numbers35:30 “Ka ce dano mo oneko dano, ci gibineko lanek woko pi lok pa lucaden; ento pe gibineko dano mo pi lok ma lacaden acel keken otito." 
Numbers35:31 Dok pe wubigamo lim me koko kwo pa lanek dano mo ma balle romo to; gibineke aneka. 
Numbers35:32 Dok pe wugam lim me kok mo pi dano ma oriŋo olaro gaŋ me laro lunek dano, wek giyene odwog obed i lobone ma noŋo ajwaka madit peya oto." 
Numbers35:33 Pe wubinyobo lobo ma wubibedo iye-ni; pien remo nyobo lobo woko, dok pe tye gin mo ma twero kwanyo bal ki i lobo pi remo ma oo iye-ni, kono remo pa lanek dano meno kek en aye kwanyo." 
Numbers35:34 Pe wubimiyo lo bo ma wubedo iye, ma an bene abedo iye i dyewuni, odok keni; pienan a Rwot ma abedo i kin jo Icrael.”" 
Numbers36:1 Ludito kaka pa kwarogi ma i doggola pa Gilead wod pa Makir ma wod pa Manace ma i doggola pa Yucepu gubino cok, ci guloko i nyim Moses ki ludito kaka mukene." 
Numbers36:2 Guwaco ni, “Laditwa, Rwot yam ociki ni imi lobo me aleya bot jo Icrael kun gibolo kwir; ci yam ociki ni imi ginaleya pa ominwa Lyel Jelopekad bot anyirane," 
Numbers36:3 Ento ka ce awobe ma i kaka mukene gunyomogi ki i kin jo Icrael ata, ci miyo lobogi gi bi kwanyo woko ki i kom ginaleya pa kwarogi, gimedo i kom lobo pa kaka ma anyirane doŋ tye iyeni; meno miyo gibijwiko lobowa woko ma yam gipoko botwa ki kwir." 
Numbers36:4 Dok ka kare me jubili pa jo Icrael oromo, ci lobogi gibimedo i kom lobo pa kaka ma anyira gitye iye-ni matwal, ci miyo lobowa me aleya bijwik woko.”" 
Numbers36:5 Moses ociko jo Icrael kit man, kun cikke oa ki bot Rwot, ni, “Lok me kaka pa likwayo pa Yucepu tye atir." 
Numbers36:6 Doŋ man aye cik ma Rwot omiyo ma okemo kom anyira pa Lyel Jelopekad, ni, ‘Wek gin gunyomme ki dano ma gitamo ni ber, tekke ka ginyomogi i doggola mo ma i kaka pa kwarogi." 
Numbers36:7 Lobo ma gimiyo bot jo Icrael me aleyagi pe gibilokone nia i kaka man dok i kaka mukene; pien dano acel acel ma i kin jo Icrael bimoko matwal i kom ginaleya ma i kaka pa kwarogi. 
Numbers36:8 Dok ka nyako mo oleyo dul lobo mo ma i kaka mo ma i kin jo Icrael, ci en binyomme ki dano mo ma i doggola mo ma i kaka pa kwarogi, wek dano acel acel ma i kin jo Icrael obed ki lobone ma oleyo ki bot kwarone." 
Numbers36:9 Kumeno, pe gibiloko ginaleya mo nia ki i kaka mo-ni dok i kaka mukene, ento kaka acel acel pa jo Icrael bimoko gire i lobo me ginaleyane kikome.’ ”" 
Numbers36:10 Anyira pa Jelopekad gutimo kit ma Moses ocikogi kwede. 
Numbers36:11 Makala, Tiŋa, Kogla, Mirika ki Noa, ma gin aye anyira pa Jelopekad, gunyomme ki awobe pa omegi wongi." 
Numbers36:12 Ginyomogi i doggola pa jo pa Manace wod pa Yucepu, omiyo lobo me aleyagi obedo i kaka me doggola pa wongi, pe gikobo woko." 
Numbers36:13 Meno ducu aye gin lok ma Rwot ociko ki ma oŋolo ki i dog Moses bot jo Icrael i lobo aroo me Moab i ŋet kutu Jordan ma okemo Jeriko. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Man aye lok ma yam Moses ŋroko bot jo Icrael ducu ki i loka Jordan i dye tim, i Araba mukemo Cup, i kin Paran ki Topel, Laban, Kajerot ki Di-jabu," 
Deuteronomy1:2 Nia ki i Koreb nio wa i Kadec-bamea onoŋo romo wot me nino apar wiye acel ki i yo ma wok i lobo godi me Ceir. 
Deuteronomy1:3 I mwaka me pyeraŋwenne, i nino dwe mukwoŋo me dwe me apar wiye acel, en aye Moses oloko iye ki jo Icrael i kom cik ducu ma Rwot yam omiye ma mako komgi." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Oloko kwedgi i kare ma doŋ otyeko loyo Cikon kabaka pa jo Amor ma yam bedo i Kecbon, ki Og kabaka me Bacan ma yam bedo i Acitarot ki i Edrei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Moses omine pi gonyo te cik man ki i loka Jordan, i lobo Moab, kun waco ni," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Rwot Lubaŋawa owaco botwa ki i Koreb ni, ‘Doŋ wubedo kare malac twatwal i te got man." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Wulokke, wucak wot, wucit i lobo godi pa jo Amor, ki bot jo ma gicok kwedgi ducu ma i Araba, bot jo ma i lobo godi ki i pwor got, ki i Negeb ki i lobo murabo dog nam. Wucit i lobo Kanaan, ki i Lebanon nio wa i kulu madit, en kulu Euprate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Nen, atyeko keto lobo-nu i nyimwu; wucit iye, wucam obed mewu, kit ma yam Rwot okwoŋo bot kwarowu, bot Abraim, bot Icaka ki bot Yakobo, ni ebimiyo botgi ki bot likwayogi ma bilubogi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “I kare meno yam amedde ki wacciwu ni, ‘An pe atwero tiŋowu kena;" 
Deuteronomy1:10 Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ omiyo wunya mapol, mumiyo tin, nen, wun wupol macalo lwak lakalatwe me polo." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Myero Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarowu doŋ omedwu wudok mapol tyen alip makato ma koni wutye-ni, dok ominiwu gum, macalo yam ocikowu kwede-ni!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 An kena atwero tiŋo yec mapek ma wuketo i koma-ni niŋniŋ, ki ciro kecowu?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Wuyer dano ma luryeko, jo makwiri muteggi, muporo wel kakawu ducu, ci abiketogi gubed ludito ma loyowu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Ci wun yam wudokka iye ni, ‘Lok ma ilokkiwa-ni ber, myero wati.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Pienno akwanyo ludito wi kakawu, jo maryek, muteggi, ci aketogi gubedo lulo jo alip, lulo jo miya, lulo jo pyerabic ki lulo jo apar, ki ludito mukene muporo kakawu ducu," 
Deuteronomy1:16 I kare meno aciko luŋolkopwu ni, ‘Wuwiny pido ma i kin omegiwu, ci wuŋol kop atir i kin dano mo ki ominne, nyo ki larok mo ma bedo bote." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Ka wuŋolo kop, pe wudwor kor dano mo; wuwiny lok pa dano matidi ma rom ki pa dano madit, Pe wulwor waŋ dano mo, pien ŋolo kop tye bot Lubaŋa. Ka lok mo tek, loyowu, wukel bota, abiwiniyo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 I kare ca yam acikowu i kom gin ducu ma myero wutim. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Yam wacako wot, waa woko ki i Koreb, wacito wabaro dye tim meno ducu malac ki malik ma yam wuneno, i yo ma kemo lobo godi pa jo Amor, kit ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawa ocikowani; ci wabino wa i Kadec-bamea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ci awacciwu ni, ‘Wun doŋ wuo i lobo godi pa jo Amor en, ma Rwot Lubaŋawa bimiyowa," 
Deuteronomy1:21 Nen, Rwot Lubaŋawu oketo lobo-nu i nyimwu; wucit wucam obed mewu, macalo Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarowu yam ocikowu; pe wulwor, cwinywu pe ocid woko.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Ci wun ducu wubino bota cok, wuwaco ni, ‘Wek wacwal dano i nyimwa wek gurot lobo, ka gudwok lok botwa i kom yo ma myero wacitu iye, ki i kom gaŋi ma wabio iye.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Yam aneno ni lokke ber, ci akwanyo jo apar wiye aryo ki i kinwu, dano acel ki i kaka acel acel." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Gin gulokke, guito i lobo godi, guo i nota me Ecikol, guroto ducu." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ci gukwanyo nyig yadi mogo mucek i lobo-nu, gumako ki ciŋgi, guo kwede botwa, dok gudwoko lok botwa bene kun giwaco ni, ‘Lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawa tye ka miyowa-ni ber.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Ento yam wun wukwero cito kunnu, ci wujemo woko i kom cik pa Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Wubedo ka ŋuro i kemawu, kun wuwaco ni, ‘Pien Rwot yam dag wanwa en aye gin mumiyo okwanyowa woko ki i lobo Ejipt, wek omiwa i cin jo Amor, gutyekwa woko liweŋ." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Wan wabecito kwene kaa? Utmegiwa gumiyo cwinywa oŋabbe aŋaba pi waco ni, “jo maca gidoŋo dok giboco gikatowa woko; gaŋi megi bene gidito, dok gugoyo cel matek ma o wa i polo; dok bene waneno kunnu likwayo pa jo Anak.”" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Ci an dok awacciwu ni, ‘Pe atiba opot i komwu, pe wulworgi." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Rwot Lubaŋawu ma tye ka telo nyimwu-ni, en aye bilweny piwu ma rom ki gin ducu ma yam otimo piwu i Ejipt ma wuneno ki waŋwu," 
Deuteronomy1:31 wa ki i dye tim bene, ka ma wuneno iye kit ma Rwot Lubaŋawu otiŋowu kwede, macalo dano ma otiŋo wode, kun timo kumeno i yo ducu ma wuwoto iye nio ka wuo kwede i kabedo man.’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Ento kadi bed aloko kumeno, wun wukwero geno Rwot Lubaŋawu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 ma yam obedo ka telliwu yo wek eyeny kabedo ma wubiguro iye kemawu. Dyewor en woto i mac ki dyeceŋ woto i pol pi nyutowu yo ma wucito iye. 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Ka yam Rwot owinyo lok ma wuloko ducu, ci kiniga omake, okwoŋo kwoŋ ni," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Pe tye ŋat mo ma i kin yalwak man marac-ci ma bineno lobo maber ma yam akwoŋo pire ni abimiyo bot kwarowu," 
Deuteronomy1:36 kono Kaleb wod pa Jepune keken. En aye binenone, dok abimiyo bote ki bot litinone lobo ma yam en onyono ki tyene, pien en obedo ka lubo gin ma Rwot mito ducu kakare.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Kiniga yam omako Rwot wa i koma bene piwu, owacci, ‘In bene pe ibio kunnu." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Yocwa wod pa Nun ma tiyo boti-ni, en aye bicito iye. Cuk cwinye, pien en aye doŋ bimiyo jo Icrael gileyo lobo ca." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Dok litinowu ma wun wuwacci gibiyakogi woko-ni, litinowu ma kombeddi peya giŋeyo gin maber ki marac-ci, gin aye gibicito iye; abimiyone botgi, gibicamo, bibedo megi." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Ento wun giwu wulokke, wucak wot i dye tim yo tuŋ Nam Makwar.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Wun dok wugamo doga kun wuwaco ni, ‘Wan doŋ wabalo i nyim Rwot; wabicito ka lweny kit macalo Rwot Lubaŋawa ocikowa.’ Dano acel acel i kinwu otwene ki jami lwennye, kun wutamo ni bedo yot me cito i lobo godi," 
Deuteronomy1:42 Ci Rwot owacca ni, ‘Wac botgi ni, Pe wucit kunnu, pe wulweny, pien an pe atye i dyewu, weko lumerokwu biloyowu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Yam aloko botwu, ci wukwero, pe wuwinyo; ento wujemo woko i kom cik pa Rwot, wuette, wuito malo wa i lobo godi." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Ci jo Amor ma gibedo i lobo godi kunnu gubino i komwu, guryemo korwu macalo kic, gudatowu piny i Ceir nio wa i Korma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Wudwogo, wukok i nyim Rwot; ento Rwot pe owinyo kokowu, pe ociko ite i lokwu." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Mumiyo wubedo i Kadec pi kare malac, pi kare ma wubedo kwede kunnu." 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Yam walokke, wawoto i tim, i yo ma dok tuŋ Nam Makwar, kit macalo Rwot ocika; ci wabedo ka rabo ŋet lobo godi me Ceir pi mwaka mapol." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Ka dok Rwot owacca ni," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Wubedo ka rabo ŋet lobo godi man kare malac, doŋ oromowu; wulokke wudok yo tuŋ acam." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Ci icik lwak ni, Wun doŋ wucok ka wok ki i lobo pa utmegiwu likwayo pa Ecau ma gibedo i Ceir, ci gibibedo ki lworo i komwu. Myero wugwokke mada," 
Deuteronomy2:5 pe wucak lweny i komgi, pien pe abimiyowu dul lobogi mo, pe kadi ma tyenwu romo cuŋ iye, pien atyeko miyo lobo godi me Ceir bot Ecau obed mere." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Wubiwilo cam botgi ki lim wek wucam; dok pii amatawu bene wubiwilo botgi ki limo 
Deuteronomy2:7 Pien Rwot Lubaŋawu obedo ka miyowu gum i kom tic ducu ma ciŋwu otiyo; en ŋeyo kit ma wuwok wukato kwede i dye tim man malac-ci. Rwot Lubaŋawu obedo kwedwu i lwak mwaka man ducu pyeranwen-ni, ma can gin mo pe omakowu.’" 
Deuteronomy2:8 Mumiyo wacito waa ki ka ŋet utmegiwa likwayo pa Ecau ma gibedo i Ceir, kun walubo yo me Araba mua ki i Elat ki Ejiongeber. “Ci walokke, wacito i yo ma kemo tuŋ tim me Moab." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Ka Rwot dok owacca ni, ‘Pe icit magwa i kom jo Moab, pe icak lweny i komgi, pien pe abimiyi dul lobogi mo obed mewu, pien atyeko miyo Ar bot likwayo pa Lot obed megi.’" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Yam jo Emim aye gukwoŋo bedo kunnu; gin rok madit, gipol bene, jo maboco macalo jo Anak." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Jo man gikwanogi i kin jo Repaim bene macalo jo Anak, ento jo Moab lwonogi ni jo Emim." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Ki jo Kori bene yam gukwoŋo bedo i Ceir, ento likwayo pa Ecau aye gucamo lobogi, gutyekogi woko liweŋ ki i nyimgi, guleyo kabedogi, macalo jo Icrael gutimo ki lobo ma odoko megi, ma Rwot omiyogi-ni.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 ‘Doŋ wua malo kombeddi, wuŋol nota ora me Jered.’ Kit meno yam wacito, waŋolo nota ora me Jered." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Nia i kare ma waa ki i Kadec-bamea nio ka waŋolo nota ora me Jered onoŋo oromo mwaka pyeradek wiye aboro, nio kwede i kare ma yalwak meno ducu, ma en aye jo ma lulweny, doŋ guto gutum woko ki i gony, kit ma yam Rwot okwoŋo kwede kwoŋ i komgi-ni." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Pien onoŋo yam ciŋ Rwot tye i komgi likiŋ pi tyekogi woko ki i gony, nio ka gutum woko ducu." 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Kit meno ka yam jo ducu ma lulweny guto gutum woko ki i kin lwak," 
Deuteronomy2:17 ci Rwot owacca ni," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Tin doŋ ibikato ki i waŋ lobo Moab kun iwok ki i Ar. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Ka doŋ inyiko cok i nyim likwayo pa Ammon, pe icit magwa i komgi, pe icak lweny i komgi, pien pe abimiyi dul lobo mo pa jo Ammon obed mewu, pien atyeko miyone woko bot likwayo pa Lot obed megi.’" 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Meno bene gilwoŋo ni lobo pa jo Repaim. Jo Repaim aye yam gukwoŋo bedo kenyo, ento jo Ammon lwoŋogi ni jo Jamjummim," 
Deuteronomy2:21 Gin yam gubedo rok madit, ma gipol bene, giboco macalo jo Anak; ento Rwot otyekogi woko liweŋ ki i nyimgi, ci jo Ammon gucamo lobogi, guleyo kabedogi," 
Deuteronomy2:22 kit ma yam Rwot otimo pi likwayo pa Ecau ma gibedo i Ceir, i kare ma otyeko jo Kori woko ki i nyimgi, ci likwayo pa Ecau gucamo lobogi, guleyo kabedogi, pud gibedo iye wa tin." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Dok jo Avi bene ma yam gubedo i gaŋgi matino nio wa i Gaja, jo Kaptor aye, ma yam gubino gua ki i Kaptor, gucamo lobogi, guleyo kabedogi.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 ‘Wua malo, wucak wot, wucit wuŋol nota me Amon. Nen, atyeko miyo Cikon i ciŋwu, ma en aye dano me Amor, kabaka me Kecbon, kacel ki lobone; wucak camone, ma wucako doŋ lweny i kome." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Tin abicako keto atiba ki lworo piwu i kom rok ma tye piny i te polo ducu. Ka giwinyo lok i komwu, komgi bimyel, gibinyonne woko piwu matek.’" 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Mumiyo acwalo lukwena nia ki i tim me Kedemot bot Cikon kabaka me Kecbon ki lok me kuc, kun awacce ni," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Ber iwek awok akat ki i loboni; abicito alubo gudo keken, pe Abiŋak adok yo tuŋ acuc nyo tuŋ acam," 
Deuteronomy2:28 Ibicatta cam me acama ma awilo ki lim, dok ibimiya pii bene me amata ma awilo ki lim. Wek awok akat ki tyena keken," 
Deuteronomy2:29 kit macalo likwayo pa Ecau ma gibedo i Ceir, ki jo Moab ma gibedo i Ar yam gutimo, nio ka aŋolo Jordan akato wa i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawa bimiyowa.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 Ento Cikon kabaka me Kecbon pe oye ni wawok ki i lobonie; pien Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyo cwinye obedo tek ki adunone obedo nwaŋ, wek emi en i ciŋwu, macalo otimme-ni." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Ci Rwot owacca ni, ‘Nen, doŋ acako miyo Cikon ki lobone i ciŋi: cak doŋ camone wek wule lobone obed mewu.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Ka dok Cikon ocorre obino i komwa, en ki lwakke ducu ka lweny i Jakaj." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Ci Rwot Lubaŋawa omiyo en i cidwa, waloyo en ki awobene ki lwakke ducu." 
Deuteronomy2:34 I kare meno wamayo gaŋine madito ducu, wajwerogi woko liweŋ, co wa ki mon ki litino, pe waweko ŋat mo odoŋ." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Watero lim makwo keken wayako odoko mewa, kacel ki jami ma wayako ki i gaŋi ma wamayogi-ni." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Nia ki i Aroer ma tye i dog nota me Amon, ki nia ki i gaŋ ma tye i nota nio wa i Gilead, pe onen gaŋ mo ma gigero ma malo twatwal ma mayone oloyowa; Rwot Lubaŋawa omiyogi ducu i ciŋwa." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Lobo pa likwayo pa Ammon keken yam pe wunyiko cok kwede, en aye lobo ducu ma i dog kulu Jabok, ki gaŋi ma i lobo godi, ki ka ma Rwot Lubaŋawa ojukowa pire-ni ducu." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Ka dok walokke, wacito malo i yo ma dok i Bacan; ci Og kabaka me Bacan ocorre obino i komwa, en ki lwakke ducu, ka lweny i Edrei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Ento Rwot owacca ni, ‘Pe ilwore; pien atyeko miyo en ki lwakke ducu kacel ki lobone i ciŋi; ibitimo en macalo yam itimo i kom Cikon kabaka pa jo Amor, ma yam bedo i Kecbon.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Kit meno Rwot Lubaŋawa omiyo Og kabaka me Bacan i ciŋwa bene, ki lwakke ducu; ci waloye, wanekogi nio ka danone mo pe odoŋ," 
Deuteronomy3:4 I kare meno wamako gaŋine madito ducu; pe tye gaŋ mo ma pe wamayo ki botgi, gaŋi pyerabicel kulu, i lobo me Argob ducu ma i te ker pa Og i Bacan." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Lwak gaŋi man ducu onoŋo gigoyogi ki cel matek mutiŋŋe malo likuŋ, ma gitye ki doggaŋgi ma gicego ki rii, ma pe gikwano iye lwak gaŋi matitino mapol ma pe gicelogi ki cel."
