Deuteronomy3:6 Wajwerogi woko liweŋ, macalo yam watimo i kom Cikon kabaka me Kecbon; wajwero gaŋi ducu, co wa ki mon ki litino." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Ento lim makwo ducu ki jami ma wayako ki i gaŋi watero odoko mewa. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Kit meno i kare ca wakwanyo lobo meno ki i cin luker aryo pa jo Amor ma yam gitye loka Jordan, nia ki i nota me Amon nio wa i kom got Kermon." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Jo me Cidon gilwoo Kermon ni, Cirion, ento jo Amor gilwoŋo ni Cenir.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 Yam wamako gaŋi ducu ma i wi cere, kacel ki lobo Gilead ducu ki Bacan, nio kwede wa i Caleka ki Edrei, ma gin aye gaŋi ma i te ker pa Og i lobo Bacan." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Pien Og kabaka me Bacan en aye yam odoŋ kene ki i kin jo Repaim ma yam odoŋ, Nen, kitandane yam obedo ki tanda nyonyo; pud tye i Raba pa jo Ammon, Borre romo yadi aŋwen ki nucu ki lacce yadi aryo, ka gipimo ki yadi me nino ducu-ni.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “I kare meno, i kare ma wacamo lobo ma kenyo, amiyo lobo bot jo pa Reuben ki jo pa Gad, kun waŋe cakke ki i Aroer, ma i dog nota me Amon, kacel ki nucu lobo godi me Gilead ki gaŋi madito ducu ma tye iye." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Lobo Gilead mudoŋŋe, ki lobo Bacan ducu, en aye lobo Argob ducu, ma yam obedo i te ker pa Og, yam amiyo bot nucu kaka pa jo Manace. (Lobo Bacan meno ducu gilwoŋo ni lobo pa jo Repaim." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Jair, ma jo Manace, yam otero lobo ducu me Argob, en aye Bacan, nio wa i waŋ apokki me lobo pa jo Gecur ki pa jo Maaka, ci ocako nyiŋ gaŋine ki nyiŋe kene ni Kavot-jair, macalo pud tye wa onyoo.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Ci amiyo lobo Gilead bot Makir; 
Deuteronomy3:16 ‘ki bot jo pa Reuben ki jo pa Gad amiyo lobo ma a ki i Gilead cito kwede wa i nota me Amon, kun waŋ lobone obedo cwiny kulu, nio kwede wa i kulu Jabok, ma en aye waŋ lobo pa jo Ammon." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Amiyogi Araba bene, ma Jordan aye waŋ apokkine, nia wa i nam me Kineret nio kwede i nam me Araba, en aye nam me Kado ma tye i pwor got me Piciga, ma tuŋ wokceŋ." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Dok yam acikowu i kare meno kun awacci, ‘Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ otyeko miyowu lobo man wucam obed mewu, Oteka lwenywu ducu myero gukat loka ca i nyim omegiwu jo Icrael kun noŋo guruko jami lwenygi;" 
Deuteronomy3:19 ento monwu ki litinowu matino ki limwu makwo, (pien aŋeyo ni wutye ki lim madwoŋ), gin gibidoŋ i gaŋi madito ma doŋ amiyo botwu-ni," 
Deuteronomy3:20 nio ka Rwot doŋ omiyo omegiwu ka yweyo, kit ma omiyowu ka yweyo-ni, ma doŋ gin bene gucamo lobogi ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyogi loka Jordan. Lacen wubidwogo, kun ŋat acel acel dwogo i dul lobone ma doŋ amiyowu-ni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:21 I kare meno bene yam aciko Yocwa ni, ‘In doŋ ityeko neno ki waŋi gin ducu ma Rwot Lubaŋawu otiyo i kom luker meno aryo-nu; Rwot dok bitimo kit meno i kom ker ducu ma wubio iye ka wukato loka ca," 
Deuteronomy3:22 Pe wulworgi, pien Rwot Lubaŋawu aye tye ka lwenyo piwu.’" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Yam abako doga bot Rwot i kare meno kun awaco ni," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Ai Rwot Lubaŋawa, in pud icako acaka me nyuto bota, an laticci, kit dit meri ki twero me badi, Lubaŋa mo pe i polo nyo i wi lobo ma twero tiyo kit tic matek twatwal macalo in itimo!" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Wek koŋ acit anen lobo maber ca ma loka Jordan, lobo godi maber-ri, ki Lebanon bene.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Ento yam kiniga omako Rwot i koma piwu, pe omedo ki winya. Rwot owacca ni, ‘Wek meno doŋ rommi; pe dok inwo loko lok meno bota." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Cit iit malo i wi got Piciga, ci itiŋ waŋi malo inen yo tuŋ potoceŋ, ki tuŋ acam ki tuŋ acuc ki tuŋ wokceŋ, inen ducu ki waŋi, pien pe ibiŋolo Jordan man." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ento in icik Yocwa, icuk cwinye, imiye tek; pien en aye bikato loka ca kun telo wi lwak man, ci bimiyogi camo lobo ma ibineno-ni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Mumiyo wamedde ka bedo i nota mukemo Bet-peor. 
Deuteronomy4:1 “Kombeddi wun jo Icrael wuwiny cik ki kop ma giŋolo ma atye ka pwonyowu kwede, wucobgi, wek wubed makwo, wucit wuo i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarowu tye ka miyowu, wucam obed mewu." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Pe wumed lok mo i kom cik ma acikowu kwede-ni, pe wukwany lok mo woko ki i kome, wek wugwok cik pa Rwot Lubaŋawu ma acikowu kwede ducu." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Yam wuŋeno ki wanwu gin ma Rwot otimo i Baalpeor; pien yam Rwot Lubaŋawu okwanyo i kinwu jo ducu ma gulubo jok Baal me Peor, onekogi woko;" 
Deuteronomy4:4 ento wun jo ma yam wumoko i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu matek-ki pud wutye makwo ducu wa tin. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Nenu, doŋ atyeko pwonyowu ki cik mapatpat ki gin ma Rwot oŋolo, macalo Rwot Lubaŋana ocika kwede, wek wulubgi i lobo ma wucok donyo iye me camone-ni." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Wugwokgi, wucobgi, pien meno aye bibedo ryekowu ki ŋeyo pinywu i nyim rok mukene, Gin ka giwinyo lwak cik man ducu gibiwacci, ‘Adada, rok man madit-ti tye ki ryeko, dok gin lwak ma giŋeyo piny.’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Pien pe tye rok mukene madit ma lubaŋagi bedo cok kwedgi macalo Rwot Lubaŋawa bedo cok kwedwa i kare ducu ma wakok bote. 
Deuteronomy4:8 Dok tye rok madit mo ma tye ki lwak cik ki kop ma giŋolo atir ma rom ki cik man ma tin aketo i nyimwuni ce? 
Deuteronomy4:9 “Ento myero wunen maber ni wugwokke kenwu ki cwinywu ducu, wiwu pe owil i kom gin ma wuneno ki waŋwu, wek pire pe oa woko ki i cwinywu i kare me kwowu ducu. Wutit bot litinowu ki likwayowu wek guŋe" 
Deuteronomy4:10 kit ma yam wucuŋ kwede i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu i Koreb, ci i nino meno Rwot owacca ni, ‘Cok lwak kacel bota, wek ami guwiny lokka, gupwony lworo an pi kare ducu ma gibedo kwede i wi lobo-ni, dok gin bene gupwony ki litinogi.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Ci yam wubino cok, wucuŋ i te got ma onoŋo got tye ka waŋ ki mac ma oo wa i polo, i dye colpiny ki pol ma ocido licuc." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Ci Rwot yam oloko kwedwu ki i dye mac. Yam wuwinyo dwan ŋat ma loko, ento pe wuneno kom gin mo; wuwinyo dwan keken." 
Deuteronomy4:13 En yam otitowu pi gicikkene ma en ocikowu ni wucobi, en aye cik apar ma en ocoyogi i kidi aryo ma apada." 
Deuteronomy4:14 I kare meno Rwot ocika ni apwonywu ki cik ducu ki gin ma en oŋolo ducu, wek wulubgi i lobo ma wubicito loka ca ka camoneni." 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Myero doŋ wugwokke kenwu matek. Yam pe wuneno kom mo i kare ma Rwot oloko iye botwu i Koreb ki i dye mac ca; 
Deuteronomy4:16 pi meno wugwokke wek pe wuballe pi payo cal mo piwu kenwu, kadi cal kom gin mo-ni muporo laco nyo dako," 
Deuteronomy4:17 nyo muporo lee mo ma tye i wi lobo, nyo winyo mo ma tuk ki bwome i dye yamo," 
Deuteronomy4:18 nyo gin mo ma lak alaka i nom, nyo rec mo ma bedo i pii ma i te lobo." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Dok wugwokke wuwek tiŋo waŋwu malo i polo; miyo ka wuneno iye cen ki dwe ki lwak lakalatwe, ma gin ducu mony ma i polo, ci cwinywu biterowu ka ryebbe piny i nyimgi ka worogi, kun noŋo Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyogi bot rok ducu ma gitye piny i te polo." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Ento yam Rwot okwanyowu ci okelowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt, en lobo ma obedo calo buk mac me teto nyonyo ma otwak me waŋowu, wek wubed jone kikome macalo i kare man." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Dok bene yam kiniga omako Rwot i koma piwu, ci okwono kwon ni an pe abiŋolo Jordan, pe abidonyo i lobo maber ma Rwot Lubaŋawu tye ka miyowu me aleyawu," 
Deuteronomy4:22 An myero ato woko ki i lobo man, pe myero aŋol loka Jordan; ento wun aye wubiŋolo wukato loka ca pi camo lobo ca maber-ri." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Wugwokke wek wiwu pe owil i kom gicikke pa Rwot Lubaŋawu ma yam en oketo kwedwu ci miyo wutiyo cal apaya muporo kom gin mo ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu ociko ni pe wutim. 
Deuteronomy4:24 Pien Rwot Lubaŋawu en mac ma waŋo piny woko, en Lubaŋa ma lanyeko." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Ka doŋ wunywalo litino ki likwayo, ma doŋ wudikke i lobo ca, ka ce wuballe kekenwu pi tiyo cal apaya muporo kom gin mo-ni, kun wutimo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma miyo kiniga omake," 
Deuteronomy4:26 alwoŋo polo ki lobo gubed caden botwu tin i kom lok man ni, wubito wutum woko oyotoyot ki i lobo ma doŋ wucok ŋolo Jordan ka camone; pe wubiri iye kare malac, ento gibityekowu woko liweŋ." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Dok Rwot biketowu woko ata i kin rok mapatpat, ci wubidoŋ ma welwu nok twatwal i dye lurok ka ma Rwot biryemowu wucito iye." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Ki kunnu wubiworo iye lwak lubaŋa mapol ma gipayo calgi ki bao nyo ki got, gin ma gitiyo ki ciŋ dano, ma pe gineno piny, pe giwinyo lok bene, kadi cam, kadi ŋweyo piny." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Ento ki kunnu en aye wubicako yenyo Rwot Lubaŋawu ci wubinoŋe, ka wuyenyo kore ki cwinywu ducu ki tipowu ducu." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ka piny oloyowu, ma doŋ gin meno ducu opoto i komwu i kare me lacen, wubilokke wudwogo cen bot Rwot Lubaŋawu, ci wubiworo doge." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Pien Rwot Lubaŋawu en Lubaŋa ma lakica: pe bitenyowu ata, pe bityekowu woko, wiye pe biwil i kom gicikke ma yam oketo ki kwarowu, ma yam okwoŋo pire botgi." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Koŋ wupeny nino ma yam con ca, ma yam okwoŋo nyimwu cakke i kom nino ma yam Lubaŋa oketo iye dano i wi lobo-ni, ci wupeny kite nia i agikki polo tuŋ cel o kwede i agikkine tuŋ cel, ka yam nyo gin madit macalo man koŋ otine, nyo yam koŋ giwinyo pire ka mo." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Yam koŋ tye rok mo ma guwinyo dwan lubaŋa mo ma loko kun lokke a ki i dye mac, kit ma yam wun wuwinyo, ci pud gubedo makwo?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Nyo yam koŋ lubaŋa mo otemo cito ka kwanyo rok mo pire kene ki i kin rok mukene, kun otemo cwinygi i yo mapol, ki lanyut ki taŋo ki lweny, pi bade matek ki ciŋe ma oryeyo ki pi gin ma kelo lworo madwoŋ, ma rom ki gin ducu ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu otimo i lobo Ejipt kun wuneno ki waŋwu?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Yam ginyuto botwu wek wuŋe ni Rwot aye Lubaŋa; pe tye mo mukene doki. 
Deuteronomy4:36 Oweko wuwinyo dwane ma a ki i polo pi tiro kitwu; dok onyutowu macce madit i wi lobo, ka dok wuwinyo lokke ki i dye mac." 
Deuteronomy4:37 En yam omaro kwarowu, oyero likwayogi ma gunywalo, ci okwanyowu woko ki i Ejipt pi tekke madwoŋ, ma en kikome tye kwedwu," 
Deuteronomy4:38 kun ryemo rok madito ki matego makatowu ki i nyimwu pi kelowu i lobogi, wek omiwu lobogi wucam obed mewu macalo i kare man." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Myero doŋ wuŋe tin, dok wuket i cwinywu, ni Rwot aye Lubaŋa ma tye malo i polo ki piny i wi lobo; pe tye mo mukene." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Pi meno wumak cikke ki gin ma ociko ducu ma tin acikowu kwede, wek nyimwu obed leŋ, ki nyim litinowu ma bilubowu bene obed leŋ, wek wuri pi kare malac i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu tye ka miyowu-ni matwal.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 I kare meno Moses opoko gaŋi adek pat yo tuŋ wokceŋ loka Jordan," 
Deuteronomy4:42 wek lunek dano guriŋ iye gular komgi; wek ŋat ma noŋo pe oneko lawote me akaka, kun noŋo mone mo pe i kingi i kare mukato, onoŋ ka laro kwone pi riŋo laro gaŋ mo i kin gaŋi meno." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Gin ene: Bejer ma i tim ma bedo cerecere pi jo pa Reuben, Ramot i Gilead pi jo pa Gad ki Golan i Bacan pi jo pa Manace." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Man aye cik ma yam Moses oketo i nyim jo Icrael; 
Deuteronomy4:45 man aye gin lok me caden ducu, ki cik ki gin ma giŋolo ducu-ma yam Moses oloko bot jo Icrael i kare ma doŋ gua woko ki i Ejipt." 
Deuteronomy4:46 Oloko botgi ki i loka Jordan, i nota ma okemo Bet-peor, i lobo pa Cikon kabaka pa jo Amor ma yam bedo i Kecbon, ma yam Moses ki jo Icrael guloyo ka doŋ gua woko ki i Ejipt." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Gucamo lobone ki lobo pa Og kabaka me Becan, gin luker aryo pa jo Amor ma yam gubedo loka Jordan tuŋ wokceŋ." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Waŋ lobone ocakke ki i Aroer ma i dog nota me Amon ocito kwede wa i got Cirion, ma en aye Kermon," 
Deuteronomy4:49 kacel ki Araba ducu ma i tuŋ wokceŋ me Jordan o kwede wa i nam me Araba ma i pwor got me Piciga. 
Deuteronomy5:1 Moses olwoŋo jo Icrael ducu ci owaco botgi ni, “Wun jo Icrael, wuwiny cik ducu ki gin ma giŋolo ma aloko tin ma wuwinyo ki itwu; myero wupwonygi dok wugwokke wek wulubgi." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Yam Rwot Lubaŋawa oketo gicikke kwedwa i Koreb. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Rwot yam pe oketo gicikke man ki kwarowa, ento ocikke kwedwa wan jo ducu ma watye kany tin makwo-ni," 
Deuteronomy5:4 Rwot yam oloko kwedwu waŋ ki waŋ i te got ki i dye mac," 
Deuteronomy5:5 ma kun an acuŋ i kin Rwot ki wun i kare meno kun atito botwu lok pa Rwot; pien yam wubedo ka lworo mac, ci pe wumedo ki ito malo wa i wi got. En yam owaco ni," 
Deuteronomy5:6 “‘An a Rwot Lubaŋani ma yam akwanyi woko ki i lobo Ejipt, i ot me opii." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “‘Pe ibed ki lubaŋa mukene, kono an kena." 
Deuteronomy5:8 “‘Pe iti cal apayani mo, nyo cal gin mo ma tye malo i polo, nyo gin ma tye piny i wi lobo, nyo gin ma tye i pii ma i te lobo." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Pe iryebbe piny i nyimgi, pe iworgi; pien an aye a Rwot Lubaŋani, an Lubaŋa ma lanyeko, Aketo can i kom likwayo pi bal pa kwarogi nio i yalwak me adek ki me aŋwen pa jo ma kwera," 
Deuteronomy5:10 ento anyuto mar ma pe lokke i kom jo alip ki alip ma gimara, ma gimako cikka." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “‘Pe ilwoŋ nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋani me nono; pien Rwot bimiyo kop loyo dano ma lwoŋo nyiŋe me noŋo. 
Deuteronomy5:12 “‘Gwok nino me cabit, ikwer obed maleŋ, kit ma yam Rwot Lubaŋani ociki." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Ibitic matek pi nino abicel, kun itiyo iye ticci ducu;" 
Deuteronomy5:14 ento nino me abirone en aye cabit pa Rwot Lubaŋani. I nino meno pe igud iye tic mo, in kikomi, nyo wodi, nyo nyari, kadi opiini nyo aŋecani, kadi twonni nyo kanani nyo dyaŋŋi mo ducu, kadi labedo ma bedo i gaŋwu, wek opiini ki aŋecani guywe macalo in." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Myero ipo ni, yam in ibedo opii i lobo Ejipt, ci Rwot Lubaani okwanyi woko ki kunnu ki twero me bade ki ciŋe ma oryeyo; mumiyo Rwot Lubaŋani ociki ni igwok nino me cabit." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “‘Wor woru ki meni, macalo Rwot Lubaŋani ociki, wek iri i lobo, dok wek ibed ma nyimi leŋ, i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋani bimiyo boti." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “‘Pe ineki. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “‘Pe itim abor. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “‘Pe ikwal gin mo," 
Deuteronomy5:20 “‘Pe ibed caden me goba i kom lawoti. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “‘Cwinyi pe opukke i kom dako pa lawoti, pe ipar ot pa lawoti, kadi potone, nyo opiine, nyo aŋecane, nyo twonne, nyo kanane nyo kadi gin mo ma lawoti tye kwede.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Rwot yam oloko lok man bot jowu mucokke ducu kun loko ki dwan maloŋo ki i dye mac ki pol ki colpiny ma ocido licuc; pe dok omedo iye lok mukene. Yam en ocoyo lok man ducu i kom kidi aryo ma apada, omiyogi bota." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Ka yam wuwinyo dwan man ma a ki i dye colpiny, kun got tye ka waŋ ki mac, wubino bota cok, ludito wi kakawu ducu, ki ludoŋo mewu." 
Deuteronomy5:24 Ci wuwacci, ‘Nen, Rwot Lubaŋawa doŋ onyutowa deyone ki ditte, dok watyeko winyo dwane bene ka katti ki i dye mac; doŋ tin waneno ka Lubaŋa loko ki dano ci dano pud kwo." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Doŋ piŋo myero wato kombeddi? Pien mac man madit bityekowa woko; ka pud wamedde dok ka winyo dwan Rwot Lubaŋawa ma loko kwedwa-ni, ci wabito woko." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Aŋa ma i kin jo ducu ma gitye ki kom ma yam koŋ owinyo dwan Lubaŋa makwo ma loko ki i dye mac, kit ma wan wawinyo-ni, ci pud gubedo makwo?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 In inyik cok, iwiny lok ducu ma Rwot Lubaŋawa biloko, ci itit botwa lok ducu ma Rwot Lubaŋawa biloko boti; wan wabiwinyo ci walubo.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Rwot yam owinyo lokwu ma wuloko bota-ni; ci Rwot owacca ni, ‘Atyeko winyo lok pa jo man ma guloko bota; lok ma guwaco ducu guloko maber." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Kono yam gibedo jwijwi ki cwiny macalo meno, me lwora ki me gwoko cikka ducu, wek nyimgi obed leŋ kacel ki pa litinogi matwal, kono ber!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Cit iwac botgi ni, “Doŋ wudok i kemawu.”" 
Deuteronomy5:31 Ento in icuŋ cok ka ŋeta kany, ci abititti lok ducu ma aciko, ki lwak cik ki gin ma aŋolo ducu ma ibipwonyogi kwede, wek gulubgi i lobo ma atye ka miyogi me bedo megi.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 Doŋ wun wugwokke wek wulub gin ma Rwot Lubaŋawu ocikowu kwede; pe wuŋak wudok-yo tuŋ acuc nyo tuŋ acam. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Wuwot kun wulubo yo ducu ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu ocikowu kwede, wek wubed makwo, wek yo nyimwu obed leŋ, wek wuri pi kare malac i lobo ma wubicamo doko mewu." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Man aye lok ma giciko, ki lwak cik ki gin ma Rwot oŋolo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu ocika ni apwonywu kwede, wek wulubgi i lobo ma wubicito loka ca ka camone," 
Deuteronomy6:2 wek wulwor Rwot Lubaŋawu, wun kikomwu ki likwayowu, kun wugwoko cikke ducu ki lok ducu ma en ociko ma atye ka cikowu kwede, nino ducu me kwo mewu, wek wuri i wi lobo pi kare malac." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Pi meno, wun jo Icrael wuwiny, wugwokke wek wulubgi, wek nyimwu obed leŋ, wek wunya bene mapol, kit ma Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarowu yam owaco botwu i lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic-ci." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Wuwiny, wun jo Icrael: Rwot Lubaŋawa en Rwot acel." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Mar Rwot Lubaŋani ki cwinyi ducu, ki tiponi ducu ki tekki ducu." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Lok magi ducu ma acikowu kwede tin-ni wubiketo i cwinywu; 
Deuteronomy6:7 dok wubipwonyo litinowu kwedgi matek. Wulok lok i komgi ma wubedo i odiwu, ki ka wutye ka wot i yo, ka wubuto piny ki ka wua malo." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Wutwe i ŋut ciŋwu obed lanyut; wutwe bene i dye tur nyimwu. 
Deuteronomy6:9 Dok wubicoyo i kom okar doggola me odiwu, ki i dog gaŋwu." 
Deuteronomy6:10 “I kare ma Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ otyeko kelowu i lobo ma yam okwoŋo pire bot kwarowu Abraim ki Icaka ki Yakobo, ni ebimiyowu, ma tye iye gaŋi madito ma gibeco, ma yam pe wun aye wugerogi," 
Deuteronomy6:11 ki odi ma gupoŋ ki jami ducu ma gibeco ma yam pe wun aye wupoŋo igi, ki bur pii ma gikwinyogi ma pe wun aye wukwinyo, ki poto olok ki poto jeituni ma pe wun aye wupito; ka doŋ wucamo wuyeŋ," 
Deuteronomy6:12 ci ber wugwokke wek wiwu pe owil woko i kom Rwot ma yam okwanyowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt, i ot me opii." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Wulwor Rwot Lubaŋawu, wuti pi en, wukwoŋ kwoŋwu ki nyiŋe," 
Deuteronomy6:14 Pe wulub kor lubaŋa mukene ducu, macalo lwak lubaŋa pa rok mapatpat ma birumowu dyere," 
Deuteronomy6:15 pien Rwot Lubaŋawu ma tye i kinwu-ni en Lubaŋa ma lanyeko; wek kiniga pe omak Rwot Lubaŋawu i komwu, miyo en bityekowu woko liweŋ ki i wi lobo." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Pe wuom i Rwot Lubaŋawu, macalo yam wuomo kwede iye i Maca." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Wuket cwinywu ka gwoko lok ducu ma Rwot Lubaŋawu ociko, ki lokke me caden, ki cikke ducu ma en ocikowu kwede." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Dok wubitiyo gin ma nen atir dok maber i waŋ Rwot, wek nyimwu obed leŋ, wek wucit wucam lobo maberri ma yam Rwot okwoŋo pire ni ebimiyo bot kwarowu," 
Deuteronomy6:19 kun wuryemo lukworwu woko ducu ki i nyimwu, macalo Rwot yam owaco." 
Deuteronomy6:20 “I kare me anyim, ka latinni bipenyi ni, ‘Lok man me caden kono te lokke aŋo, ki lwak cik ducu ki gin ma giŋolo ma Rwot Lubaŋawa ocikowa kwede-ni?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 ci ibiwaco ki latinni ni, ‘Wan yam onoŋo wabedo opii pa Parao i Ejipt, ci Rwot okwanyowa ki i Ejipt pi twero me bade." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Yam Rwot onyuto lwak lanyut ki taŋo madito dok malit twatwal i kom lobo Ejipt ki i kom Parao ki i kom jo ma i ode ducu ma waneno ki waŋwa," 
Deuteronomy6:23 Okwanyowa woko ki kunnu wek ekelwa wa kany, eminiwa lobo ma yam okwoŋo pire ni ebimiyo bot kwarowa." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Rwot yam ocikowa ni walub cik magi ducu, dok ni walwor Rwot Lubaŋawa wek wabed maber nakanaka, wek en ogwokwa wabed makwo, macalo koni watye-ni." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Ka wagwokke wek wacob lok man ducu ma gicikowa kwede ki i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawa, macalo en yam ocikowa kwede, miyo wabedo jo ma kitwa atir.’" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Rwot Lubaŋawu tye ka terowu i lobo ma wubidonyo iye ka camone me bedo mewu, dok en biryemo rok mapol woko ki i nyimwu, jo Kit, jo Girgac, jo Amor, jo Kanaan, jo Periji, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc, gin rok ducu abiro ma gidito dok gitego makatowu." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Ka Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyogi i ciŋwu ci wuloyogi, ci myero wudyergi i ciŋ Rwot, wujwergi woko liweŋ, Pe wuket gicikke mo kwedgi, pe wutimgi kica." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Pe wunyomme kwedgi kun wumiyo anyirawu bot awobegi nyo wunyomo anyiragi ki awobewu. 
Deuteronomy7:4 Pien gibiloko cwinyawobewu woko, pe dok gibilubo kora, ento gibiworo lubaŋa mogo mukene; ci miyo kiniga mako Rwot i komwu, en bityekowu woko oyot." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ento wubitimogi kit man: wubimuko keno jogigi woko, wubinido wir jogi woko, wubitoŋo yadi ma gipito ka ma giworo iye jok ma dako ma gilwoŋo Acera, ki waŋo cal apayagi ki mac." 
Deuteronomy7:6 “Pien wun aye wudoko jo maleŋ pi Rwot Lubaŋawu, Rwot Lubaŋawu otyeko yerowu ki i kin rok ducu ma tye i wi lobo wubed jone kikome." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Gin mumiyo mar pa Rwot Lubaŋawu omoko i komwu ci oyerowu, pe ni wun aye welwu dwoŋ makato rok mukene, pien onoŋo wun yam wunok i kin rok ducu." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Rwot yam okwanyowu woko ki twero me bade, okokowu ki i ot me opii ki i ciŋ Parao kabaka me Ejipt pien en marowu, dok tye ka cobo kwoŋ ma yam en okwoŋo bot kwarowu." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Myero doŋ wuŋe ni, Rwot Lubaŋawu en Lubaŋa kikome, Lubaŋa ma genne, ma gwoko gicik kene, dok gwoko mar mere ma pe lokke bot jo ma gimare ki ma gimako lok ma en ociko ducu, nio wa i yalwak alip kulu." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Dok eo culo kwor i kom jo ma gikwere kikomgi, kun nekogi woko. En pe bijalo dano ma okwere; biculo kwor i kom dano meno kikome." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Pi meno wugwokke wek wulub lok ma en ociko ki cik ducu ki gin ma en oŋolo ducu ma acikowu kwedetin. 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Pien wun wuwinyo cik magi ma giŋolo, kun wugwokogi dok wucobogi, miyo Rwot Lubaŋawu bene bigwoko gicikkene kwedwu, ki mar mere ma pe lokke ma yam en okwoŋo pire bot kwarowu." 
Deuteronomy7:13 En bimarowu, bimiyowu gum, dok bimiyo wunya mapol; bimiyo gum i kom litino ma wubinywalo ki i kom gin ma bicek i potowu, kalwu ki koŋo vinowu ki moo mewu, kacel ki litino ma dyaŋiwu ki romiwu binywalo, i lobo ma yam en okwoŋo pire bot kwarowu ni ebimiyowu." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Gibimiyowu gum makato rok ducu; pe binen laco mo nyo dako mo ma bibedo lalur i kinwu nyo i kin limwu makwo. 
Deuteronomy7:15 Rwot bikwanyo kit two ducu woko ki i kinwu; pe biketo i komwu two mo i kin two maraco me Ejipt ma wun wuŋeyo-ni, ento biketogi i kom jo ducu ma kwerowu." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Wun bene wubityeko rok ducu ma Rwot Lubaŋawu biketogi i ciŋwu; kica pe omakwu i komgi. Pe wubiworo lubaŋagi, pien bidoko owic botwu." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Ka ilwodo lok ki i cwinyi ni, ‘Rok magi ducu gin gidito makato an, abicamogi niŋniŋ?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 pe ibibedo ki lworo mo i komgi, ento ibipo gin ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu otiyo i kom Parao ki i kom jo Ejipt ducu." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Ibipo kit ma yam otemo kwede cwinygi ki tic madito kun ineno ki waŋi, kacel ki lanyut ki taŋo mapol, ki twero me bade ki ciŋe ma oryeyo, ma Rwot Lubaŋawu yam okwanyi kwede woko ki kunnu; Rwot Lubaŋawu bitiyo kit meno i kom rok ducu ma ibedo ka lworogi-ni." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Dok bene Rwot Lubaŋawu bicoro pino jobi i kingi, nio waŋ ma jo ma yam gudoŋ, ki jo ma gikanne woko ki boti doŋ ginekogi woko," 
Deuteronomy7:21 Pe atiba omaki i komgi, pien Rwot Lubaŋawu tye i kinwu, ma en Lubaŋa madit ma ryaŋo kom dano." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Rwot Lubaŋawu bijero rok magi woko ki i nyimwu motmot; pe wutwero tyekogi ducu oyotoyot, miyo gi-tim bimedde mapol, ma okato komwu woko." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Ento Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyogi i ciŋwu, ci bibaŋogi woko matek twatwal, nio ka wutyekogi woko." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Dok en bimiyo lukergi i ciŋwu, ci wubimiyo nyiŋgi rwenyo woko piny i te polo. Pe binen dano mo ma bicuŋ ka lweny i komwu, nio ka wutyekogi woko." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Cal lubaŋagi ma gipayo apaya wubiwaŋogi woko ki mac. Pe wubiparo ryal ki jabu ma gimwono i komgi pe wubikwanyo me bedo mewu, wek pe odok owic me makowu; pien meno aye gin me kwer mada ki bot Rwot Lubaŋawu," 
Deuteronomy7:26 Pienno pe ibikelo gin me kwer i odi, miyo odi doko gin ma gilamo kome, macalo eno Myero ikwer woko adada, ica pire woko matwal; pien gin ma doŋ gilamo kome me aneka." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Cik ducu ma atye ka cikowu kwede tin-ni ber, wunen ni wulubo gi, wek wubed makwo, wunya mapol, wucit wucam lobo ca ma yam Rwot okwoŋo pire ni ebimiyo bot kwarowu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Dok myero wupo kom yo ducu ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu otelowu iye i tim pi mwaka pyeraŋwen, wek emi wudok mamwol, kun temo iwu wek eŋe gin ma tye i cwinywu, ka nyo wubimako cikke, nyo pe." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Kit meno en omiyo wudoko mamwol, dok omiyo kec onekowu, ci opitowu ki manna ma onoŋo yam pe wuŋeyo, kadi wa kwarowu bene yam pe guŋeyo; wek oniaŋwu ni, dano pe kwo ki kwon keken, ento dano kwo ki lok ducu ma a ki i dog Rwot." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Boŋŋi arukawu yam pe guti gutum woko ki i komwu, tyenwu bene yam pe okwot, i kin mwaka pyeraŋwen kulu." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Doŋ myero wuŋe ki i cwinywu ni, Rwot Lubaŋawu tye ka tiro kitwu macalo dano tiro kwede kit latinne." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Pi meno, wugwok cik ducu pa Rwot Lubaŋawu, kun wuwoto ma wulubo yone dok kun wulwore." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Pien Rwot Lubaŋawu tye ka terowu i lobo maber, ma opoŋ ki lwak nota ora ma igi ki pii, ki waŋ it ki waŋ pii maloŋo, ma gimol ki i nota ki i wi godi." 
Deuteronomy8:8 En lobo ma ceko ŋano ki cayiri, ki ma ceko olok ki oduro ki okwer pomegranat, lobo ma moo jeituni ki moo kic dwoŋ iye." 
Deuteronomy8:9 En lobo ma wubicamo iye cam mabup laboŋo can gin mo, ka ma gin mo pe birem iye botwu; en lobo ma gweŋŋe bedo nyonyo, ka ma wubikwinyo iye mola ki i cere." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Wubicam wubiyen, ci wubipwoyo Rwot Lubaŋawu pi lobo maber ma omiyowu-ni." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Wugwokke kekenwu wek pe wiwu owil woko i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu, kun pe doŋ wugwoko lok ma en ociko; ki gin ma oŋolo, ki lwak cikke ducu ma atye ka cikowu kwede tin;" 
Deuteronomy8:12 wek wiwu pe ocak doko dito ka doŋ wucamo, wuyeŋ, ma doŋ wugero odi mabeco ma wubedo iye," 
Deuteronomy8:13 dok ka dyaŋiwu ki romiwu doŋ onya mapol, ki ryalwu ki jabuwu omedde madwoŋ, ki jami ducu ma wutye kwedgi doŋ onya omedde madwoŋ," 
Deuteronomy8:14 Pe wiwu owil woko i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma yam okwanyowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt, ki i ot me opii ca," 
Deuteronomy8:15 ma yam otelo wiwu wuwok kwede i tim malac ki malik bene, ma tye iye lwak twol ma kwirgi kec, ki oton, ki lobo ma orwo pii mako iye dano, ma pii pe iye-ni, ci en okelowu pii mua ki i pata got." 
Deuteronomy8:16 En bene opitowu i tim ki manna ma yam kwarowu pe giŋeyo, wek elokwu wudok mwol, kun temo ki cwinywu, wek otimwu ber lacen." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Wugwokke wuwek Lwodo lok ki i cwinywu ni, “Tek koma ki twero me bada gira aye omiyo alimo lonyo man.’" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Wun wubipo i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu, pien en aye ma miyowu tek me limo lonyo; wek en omok gicikkene ma yam okwoŋo pire bot kwarowu, macalo pud tye wa kombeddi." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Ka ce wiwu owil woko i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu, ci wucako lubo kor lwak lubaŋa mukene, ki tiyo botgi ki ryebbe piny i nyimgi, atitowu atyer tin ni, wubito wutum woko liweŋ." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Wubito wutum woko macalo lurok ma Rwot tye ka miyogi to gitum woko ki i nyimwu-ni, pien pe wumedo ki woro dog Rwot Lubaŋawu," 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Wuwiny, wun jo Icrael; wubikato loka Jordan tin, wek wucit ka camo lobo pa rok madito ki matego makatowu, ki gaŋi bene madito, ma gigoyo iye cel matek ma o wa i polo," 
Deuteronomy9:2 rok madit ma giboco, likwayo pa jo Anak, ma wuŋeyogi, ma yam doŋ wuwinyo nyiŋgi kun giwaco ni, ‘Aŋa ma twero cuŋ i nyim likwayo pa Anak?’" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Pi meno myero wuŋe lok man tin ni, Ŋat ma tye ka wot i nyimwu macalo mac ma waŋo piny en aye Rwot Lubaŋawu; en aye bityekogi, en aye bitayogi woko ki i nyimwu, miyo wubiryemogi woko, wumiyo gito gitum woko oyot, macalo Rwot owaco botwu-ni." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Ka doŋ Rwot Lubaŋawu otyeko ryemogi woko ki i nyimwu, pe wulwod lok ki i cwinywu ni, ‘Pi an ma abedo ma kita atir en aye omiyo Rwot okela ka camo lobo-ni”; kun kono pi bal maraco ma rok meno ducu gitimo aye omiyo Rwot biryemogi woko ki i nyimwu." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Pe wubicito ka camo lobogi pi kitwu ma atir, nyo pi leŋ iwu, ento pi bal maraco ma rok meno ducu gitimo en aye omiyo Rwot Lubaŋawu biryemogi woko ki i nyimwu, dok wek ecob lok ma yam okwoŋo bot kwarowu Abraim ki Icaka ki Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 “Myero doŋ wune ni, pe pi kitwu ma atir en aye omiyo Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu lobo man maber-ri wek wucam; pien wun jo ma ŋutwu tek." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Ber wupo, dok bene wiwu pe owil kit ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu obedo ki akemo i ‘tim. Nia wa i nino ma yam wua iye ki i lobo Ejipt, o kwede wa i kare ma wuo i kabedo-ni, wubedo lujemo i kom Rwot." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Kadi wa i Koreb wumiyo Rwot obedo ki akemo, ci yam Rwot kiniga omake i komwu twatwal, omiyo onoŋo cok ka tyekowu woko." 
Deuteronomy9:9 I kare ma yam aito malo i wi got ka gamo kidi aryo ma apada-ni, kidi me gicikke ma yam Rwot oketo kwed wu, ci abedo i wi got, ari nino pyeraŋwen dyeceŋ ki dyewor kun pe acamo dok pe amato pii bene." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Ci Rwot omiya kidi aryo ma apada ma Lubaŋa onoŋo ocoyo ki ciŋe, kun ocoyo i komgi lwak lok ducu ma yam Rwot obedo ka loko i wi got ki i dye mac, i nino ma yam lwak ocokke iye ca," 
Deuteronomy9:11 Ka nino pyeraŋwen ki dyewor pyeraŋwen doŋ okato, Rwot omiya kidi meno aryo ma apada, gin kidi me gicikke." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Ka dok Rwot owacca ni, ‘A malo, icit ilor piny ki kany oyot, pien joni ma yam ikelogi ki i Ejipt gutyeko balle woko, Gulokke, gubarre woko oyot nia ki i yo ma yam acikogi kwede, gutimo gigi cal jabu ma giliyo aliya.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Rwot dok omedde ki lok kun wacca ni, ‘Atyeko neno jo man, ci nen, gin jo ma ŋutgi tek." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Weka gira, weka doŋ atyekgi woko liweŋ; abijwayo nyiŋgi woko ki i te polo, ci abimiyo in idoko rok matek twatwal ki madit makatogi.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 Ci alokke, alor piny ki i wi got, kun got tye ka waŋ ki mac. Onoŋo amako kidi apada aryo me gicikke ki ciŋa aryo ducu." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ka aneno, ci nen, wutyeko timo bal i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu, Onoŋo wutimo giwu cal wod twon ma giliyo aliya, kun wulokke, wubarre woko oyot ki i yo ma yam Rwot ocikowu kwede-ni." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Ci ame ko kidi aryo ma apada ca, abologi woko piny ki i ciŋa aryo ducu, atyerogi woko ki i wanwu," 
Deuteronomy9:18 Lacen abuto aryeba cwiny i nyim Rwot nino pyeraŋwen dyeceŋ ki dyewor kit ma con ca; pe acamo, pe amato pii bene, pi lwak bal ducu ma wubedo ka timone, kun wutimo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot ma omiyo kiniga omake." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Pien onoŋo lworo omaka pi kiniga pa Rwot ki akecane malyet i komwu ma onoŋo cok ka tyekowu woko. Ento Rwot owinya wa i kare meno bene. 
Deuteronomy9:20 Kiniga yam omako Rwot i kom Aron bene matek, omiyo onoŋo doŋ cok ka neke wo ko; ento i kare ca alego pi Aron bene," 
Deuteronomy9:21 Dok akwanyo balwu, en aye wod twon ma wutimo-ni, ci awaŋo woko ki mac, aodo, arego woko mapwot, nio ka odoko apwa; ci aonyo apwane i kulu ma mol piny a ki i wi got." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Dok bene yam i Tabera, ki i Maca ki i Kibrot-atava wubedo ka mi yo Rwot bedo ki akemo." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Ka yam Rwot ocwalowu nia ki i Kadec-bamea kun waco ni, ‘Wucit, wucam lobo ma doŋ amiyowu-ni’, ci wujemo woko i kom cik pa Rwot Lubaŋawu; yam pe wugene, pe wuworo doge." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Wun wubedo lujemo i kom Rwot nia wa i nino ma yam acako ŋeyowu iye-ni. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Kit meno abuto aryeba cwiny i nyim Rwot nino pyeraŋwen dyeceŋ ki dyewor, pien onoŋo Rwot owaco ni emito tyekowu woko." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ci yam alego bot Rwot ni, ‘Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, pe ityek lwakki woko, ma gin aye gipinnyi ma yam ikokogi pi ditti, ma ikwanyogi woko ki i Ejipt pi twero me badi," 
Deuteronomy9:27 Ber ipo i kom luticci Abraim, Icaka ki Yakobo. Pe ibed ka paro pi tek ŋut pa rok man, nyo pi timgi maraco, nyo pi balgi," 
Deuteronomy9:28 wek jo me lobo ma yam ikwanyowa ki iye-ni pe gubed ka waco ni,. Pien onoŋo terogi i lobo ma yam ocikke pire botgi doŋ oloyo Rwot woko, dok pien onoŋo yam kara dag wangi, en aye omiyo okwanyogi woko, wek enekgi woko i dye tim," 
Deuteronomy9:29 Pien gin aye lwakki, gin gipinnyi, ma doŋ ikelogi woko ki tekki madwoŋ ki pi ciŋi ma iryeyo.’" 
Deuteronomy10:1 I kare meno Rwot owacca ni, ‘Muk kidi ma apada aryo, ipagi macalo mukwoŋo ca; ci ibin bota i wi got malo, dok ipa canduk me bao." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Abicoyo i kom kidi ma apada-nu lok ma yam tye i kom kidi ma apada mukwoŋo ma yam ityero woko ca, ci ibiketogi i canduk.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 Kit meno atimo canduk ki bao yat lalwii, ci amuko kidi ma apada aryo, apayo ma rom ki macon ca, aito malo i wi got kun amako kidi ma apada aryo-nu i ciŋa." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Rwot ocoyo i kom kidi-nu macalo yam okwoŋo coyo, gin cik apar ma yam oloko ki wun i wi got ki i dye mac i nino ma yam wucokke iye ca; ci Rwot omiyogi bota," 
Deuteronomy10:5 Lacen alokke, alor piny ki i wi got, ci aketo kidi ma apada aryo-nu i canduk ma yam apayo-ni; gin pud gitye ene, kit ma yam Rwot ocika kwede." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Jo Icrael gua ki i Beerot Benejaakan, guo Mocera. Aron oto ki kunnu, giyike bene kunnu; ci wode Eleajar oleyo ka tyene i tic me bedo ajwaka pa Lubaŋa." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Gua ki kunnu, guwoto guo i Gudugoda, ki nia ki i Gudugoda guo Jotibata, en aye lobo ma tye iye lwak nota ora ma igi ki pii." 
Deuteronomy10:8 I kare meno en aye Rwot ocako poko kaka pa Lulevi pat, gubed lutiŋ canduk me gicikke pa Rwot, gucuŋ i nyim Rwot kun gitiyo bote, dok gulam gum i nyiŋe, nio wa i nino man." 
Deuteronomy10:9 En gin mumiyo jo pa Levi pe gitye ki dul lobo mo nyo ginaleya mo i kin omegigi; Rwot aye ginaleyagi, kit macalo Rwot Lubaŋawu yam owaco botgi.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Yam abedo i wi got macalo i kare mukwoŋo ca, abedo nino pyeraŋwen dyeceŋ ki dyewor; ci Rwot dok owinya i kare meno bene, omiyo Rwot pe dok mito tyekowa woko." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Lacen Rwot owacca ni, ‘A malo, imed wotti kun itelo wi lwak, wek gudony, gucam lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire bot kwarogi ni abimiyogi.’" 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Doŋ kombeddi, wun jo Icrael, gin ma Rwot Lubaŋawu mito ki botwu en ene keken ni, wulwor Rwot Lubaŋawu ki cwinywu ducu ki tipowu ducu," 
Deuteronomy10:13 dok wugwok gin ducu ma en ociko ki cik mapatpat ma acikowu kwede tin wek wubed doŋ maber. 
Deuteronomy10:14 Nen, Rwot Lubaŋawu aye rwot me polo, ki polo ma malo makato ducu, ki lobo ki jami ma tye ducu liweŋ." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Ento kadi bed kumeno, Rwot oketo cwinye i kom kwarowu, omarogi, oyero likwayogi ma gulubogi, ma gin aye wun, ki i kin rok ducu macalo wa i kare man," 
Deuteronomy10:16 Pienno, wubed jo ma gulirre wa i cwinygi, pe wubed jo ma ŋutgi tek," 
Deuteronomy10:17 Pien Rwot Lubaŋawu aye Lubaŋa pa lubaŋa ducu ki Rwot pa rwodi. En Lubaŋa madit, ma tye ki tek, ma ryaŋo kom dano; pe dworo kor dano mo, pe giwilo ki lim." 
Deuteronomy10:18 En ŋolo kop pa litino kic atir, ki pa mon to, dok maro lubedo bene, miyogi cam ki boŋŋi," 
Deuteronomy10:19 Wun bene myero wumar lubedo, pien yam wubedo lubedo i lobo Ejipt." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Wulwor Rwot Lubaŋawu; wuti bote kun wumoko i kome matek, dok wukwoŋ kwoŋwu ki nyiŋe keken." 
Deuteronomy10:21 En aye ma myero wupake; en Lubaŋawu ma yam otimo botwu tim man ducu madito ki ma ryano kom dano, ma waŋwu doŋ oneno-ni." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Kwarowu yam gucito i Ejipt kun gin jo pyerabiro keken; ci tin Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ omiyo wunya mapol macalo lwak lakalatwe me polo. 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Mar Rwot Lubaŋani, lub cikke i kare ducu, cik mapatpat ma oketo ki oŋon me cikke ki lok ma en oŋolo ducu," 
Deuteronomy11:2 Tin doŋ wutam, (pien pe atye ka lok ki litinowu ma yam pe giŋeyo dok ma pe guneno), wutam kit ma Rwot Lubaŋawu opwonyowu kwede pi tiro kitwu, wutam pi ditte ki bade matek ki ciŋe ma oryeyo-ni," 
Deuteronomy11:3 ki lwak lanyut ki ticce ma otiyo i Ejipt i kom Parao kabaka me Ejipt ki i kom lobone ducu; 
Deuteronomy11:4 ki gin ma otimo i kom mony pa jo Ejipt ki i kom aguraguragi ducu ki gadigadigi, ki kit ma yam omiyo pii me Nam Makwar omwonyogi woko i kare ma giryemo korwu-ni, ki kit ma Rwot otyekogi woko kwede nio wa i kare man," 
Deuteronomy11:5 Dok wutam gin ma yam otimo i komwu i tim nio ka wubino wuo i kabedo man; 
Deuteronomy11:6 wupo bene gin ma en otiyo i kom Datan ki Abiram ma awobe pa Eliab wod pa Reuben; ki kit ma yam lobo oŋamo kwede doge ci omwonyogi woko ki jo ma i otgi ducu ki kemagi ducu; 
Deuteronomy11:7 pien wutyeko neno ki wanwu tic madito ma Rwot yam otiyo ducu. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Wumak cikka ducu ma acikowu kwede tin-ni, wek wubed ki tek me cito i lobo ma wubicito loka ca ka camone obed mewu, wucam," 
Deuteronomy11:9 dok wek wuri pi kare malac i lobo ma yam Rwot okwoŋo pire bot kwarowu, ni ebimiyogi wa ki likwayogi bene, en lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Pien lobo ma wubidonyo iye ka camone-ni pe rom ki lobo Ejipt ka ma yam wua iye-ni, ka ma yam wucoyo iye kodiwu ka dok wubaro waŋ piine ki tyenwu, macalo poto dek ma gicamo pote-ni." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Ento lobo ma wucito loka ca ka camone obed mewu obedo lobo godi ki nota-gu, ma mato pii kot ma cwer a ki i polo;" 
Deuteronomy11:12 en aye lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu gwoko; waŋ Rwot Lubaŋawu bedo i kome nino ducu, nia i acakki mwaka o wa i agikki mwaka ducu." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Ka wubilubo cikka ducu ma acikowu kwede tin-ni, ni wumar Rwot Lubaŋawu, wuti bote ki cwinywu ducu ki tipowu ducu," 
Deuteronomy11:14 ci en bimiyo kot cwer i lobowu i karene, i poto kot ki kot oro-gu, wek wucek kalwu ki koŋo vinowu ki moowu." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Dok en bimiyowu lum i oletwu me cam pa lim makwo, miyo wubinoŋo, cam ma yeŋowu." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Wugwokke wek pe gibwolwu, miyo wulokke: wubarre woko, wutiyo bot lwak lubaŋa mukene, wuworogi bene," 
Deuteronomy11:17 miyo kiniga mako Rwot i komwu, ci geŋo polo, juko kot pe cwer, miyo lobo pe ceko cam, ci wuto wutum woko oyotoyot ki i lobo maber ma Rwot bimiyowu-ni." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Wubiketo lok magi ducu i cwinywu ki i tamwu; wubitweyogi i ŋut ciŋwu obed me lanyut, dok gubed me atweya i dye tur nyimwu," 
Deuteronomy11:19 Wupwony litinowu ki lok magi, wubed ka lok komgi ka wubedo i odiwu, ka wutye ka wot i yo, ka wubuto piny ki ka wua malo." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Dok wuco lok magi i yat doggola odiwu, ki i dog gaŋwu," 
Deuteronomy11:21 wek wun ki likwayowu wuri pi mwaka mapol i lobo ma yam Rwot okwoŋo pire bot kwarowu ni ebimiyogi pi kare ducu ma polo pud bibedo malo ka wi lobo. 
Deuteronomy11:22 Ka ce wubigwokke wek wulub cik man ducu ma atye ka cikowu kwede ni wulubi, kun wumaro Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma wulubo yone ducu, ma wucuŋ i kome matek," 
Deuteronomy11:23 ci Rwot biryemo rok mukene woko ducu ki i nyimwu, miyo wucamo lobo pa rok madito ki matego makatowu." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Kabedo ducu ma tyenwu binyono bibedo mewu; ci lobo ma wubiloyo bibedo nia wa i tim nio wa i Lebanon, ki nia wa i Kulu, ma en aye kulu Euprate, nio wa i nam ma yo tuŋ potoceŋ." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Pe tye dano mo ma bicuŋ i nyimwu; Rwot Lubaŋawu biketo lworo ki atiba piwu i kom lobo ducu ma tyenwu binyonone, kit ma yam ocikowu kwede-ni," 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Nen, tin aketo i nyimwu gum ki ceno dano:" 
Deuteronomy11:27 gum bibino ka ce wulubo cik pa Rwot Lubaŋawu ma atye ka cikowu kwede tin-ni," 
Deuteronomy11:28 ci ceno dano bi bino ka ce pe wulubo cik pa Rwot Lubaŋawu, ento noŋo wulokke, wubarre woko nia ki i yo ma acikowu kwede tinni ci dok wulubo kor lubaŋa mukene ma yam pe wuŋeyo," 
Deuteronomy11:29 Ka Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ okelowu i lobo ma wubicito iye ka camone-ni, ci wubiketo gum obed i kom got Gerijim, ki ceno dano bibedo i kom got Eba!." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Gin godi-nu gitye loka Jordan, ma but piny yo tuŋ potoceŋ, tuŋ ka ma ceŋ poto iye-ni, i lobo pa jo Kanaan ma gibedo i Araba, ma okemo Gilgal, ma ka ŋet yadi kworo me More;" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Wubiŋolo Jordan, wukato loka ca ka camo lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu. Ka doŋ wucamo, ma wubedo iye," 
Deuteronomy11:32 ci wugwokke wek wulub cik ki oŋon me cikke ducu ma doŋ aketo i nyimwu tin-ni. 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Magi gin aye cik ki oŋon me cik ma wubimako matek kun wulubogi i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarowu bimiyowu obed mewu, pi kare ducu ma wubibedo iye i wi lobo-ni." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Wubibalo kabedo ducu liweŋ ka ma yam rok ducu ma ubigamo lobogi giworo iye lubaŋagi, ma gitye malo i wi godi mabocone ducu ki i wi cere ki i waŋ ayweya ma i te yadi ma potgi oluk." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Wumuk keno jogigi woko ducu, wuŋid wir jogi megi woko matitino, wuwaŋ yadi ma gicomo i ŋom pi woro jok ma dako ma gilwoŋo Acera, wutoŋ cal lubaŋa apaya-gi woko ducu, wunek nyingi woko ki i kabedo meno." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Pe wubitimo kit meno i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu," 
Deuteronomy12:5 ento wubipenyo dog Rwot Lubaŋawu i kabedo ma en biyero ki i kin kakawu ducu pi keto iye nyiŋe wek obed pacone. 
Deuteronomy12:6 Kenyo aye wubicito iye, kenyo en aye wubitero iye gitum awaŋa ki gitum mewu ducu, ki dul acel me apar, ki gityer mapatpat ma wubimiyo, gityer me cobo kwoŋ, ki gityer ma iwu opwoyo, ki litino kayo pa dyaŋiwu ki pa romi ki dyegiwu." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Wubicamone ki kunnu i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu, ci cwinywu bibedo yom, wun ki jo ma i odiwu ducu, i kom gin ducu ma wubiketo iye ciŋwu, ma onoŋo Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyowu iye gum." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Pe wubitimo kunnu kit ma watye ka timo kany i kare-ni, ma dano acel acel tye ka tiyo gin ducu ma en tamo ni tye atir;" 
Deuteronomy12:9 pien peya wuo i kabedo me yweyowu, i lobo ma wubileyo, ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Ento ka doŋ wukato loka Jordan, ma wubedo i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋa bimiyo me aleyawu, ka doŋ omiyo wuywe ki i lweny i kom lumerokwu ma gurumowu dyere-ni, ci doŋ wubibedo ma piny okwe mot." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Rwot Lubaŋawu biyero kabedo ka ma en biketo iye nyiŋe bedo iye; kenyo en aye wubikelo iye gin ducu ma acikowu-ni: gitum awaŋawu ki gitum mukene ducu, ki dul acel me apar, ki gityer mapatpat ma wubimiyo, ki gityer me cobo kwon ducu ma wukwono me miyogi bot Rwot." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Ci cwinywu bibedo yom i nyim Rwot, wun ki awobewu ki anyirawu, opiiwu ki aŋecawu ducu, ki Lulevi ma tye i gaŋiwu, pien gin Lulevi pe gibipokogi dul lobo mo nyo kabedo mo i kinwu me aleyagi." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Gwokke wek pe ityer gitum awaŋani i kabedo mo ma ineno; 
Deuteronomy12:14 ento ibityerone ki i kabedo ma Rwot biyero ki i kakawu mo acel. Ibityero gitum awaŋani ducu kunnu, dok ibitiyo gin ducu ma aciki-ni ki kunnu." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Ento wutwero neko lee me acamawu ki i gaŋiwu ducu kit ma cwinywu mito, muporo gum ma Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyowu. Dano ma kome ki keni twero camo, ki dano ma olony, macalo gicamo riŋo abur nyo til." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Remone keken aye pe wubicamo; wubionyo woko piny i ŋom, macalo pii." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Pe myero wucam dul acel me apar me kalwu, nyo me koŋo vinowu nyo me moo jeituniwu ki i gaŋiwu, kadi litino kayo pa dyaŋiwu nyo pa romi ki dyegiwu, nyo gityer me cobo kwoŋwu ma wukwoŋo, nyo gityer mewu ma cwinywu opwoyo, nyo gityer mo ma wumiyo." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Ento wubicamo ki i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu i kabedo ma en biyero, in ki wodi ki nyari, ki opiini, ki aŋecani, ki Lulevi ma i gaŋwu; dok cwinyi bibedo yom i nyim Rwot Lubaŋani pi gin ducu ma ibiketo iye ciŋi." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Gwokke pe ibwot Lulevi ata i kare ducu ma ibedo i lobowu-ni. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Ka Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ oyabo waŋ lobowu obedo malac, kit ma yam ocikke kwede botwu, ce iwacci, ‘Abicamo riŋo,’ pien onoŋo itye ki miti iye, ci itwero camo riŋo kit ma cwinyi mito." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Ka ce kabedo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu biyero me keto iye nyiŋe tye ka mabor ki ka ma itye-ni, ci itwero neko dyaŋŋi nyo romoni ma Rwot omiyo boti, macalo doŋ aciki; itwero camo ki i gaŋŋi kit ma cwinyi mito." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Itwero camone kit ma gicamo riŋo abur ki til; kadi wa dano ma kome ki keni twero camone kacel ki dano ma olony. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Cuŋ matek i man keken ni, pe icam remone, pien remo en aye kwo; pienno pe ibicamo kwo kacel ki riŋone." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Pe ibicamone, ibionyo woko i ŋom macalo pii." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Pe ibicamone, wek nyimi obed leŋ, in kacel ki litinoni ma bilubi, ka ce ibedo ka tiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋ Rwot." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Ento jamini maleŋ ducu ma myero imi, ki gityer me cobo kwoŋ, ibikwanyo icito kwede i kabedo ma Rwot biyero." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Ibityero gitum awaŋani ducu, riŋone ki remone, i wi keno tyer pa Rwot Lubaŋani; remo me gitummi ducu gibionyo woko i kom keno tyer pa Rwot Lubaŋani, ento riŋone ibicamo." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Gwokke wek ilub lok magi ducu ma aciki kwede-ni, wek nyimi obed leŋ nakanaka, in ki likwayi ma bilubi, ka ce itiyo gin ma nen maber ki ma atir i waŋ Rwot Lubaŋani." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Ka Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ otyeko lurok woko ki i nyimwu ma wucito ka camo lobogi-ni, ma doŋ wucamo lobogi, wubedo iye," 
Deuteronomy12:30 myero wugwokke wek pe wumok i owic pi lubo kitgi, i kare ma doŋ gityekogi woko ki i nyimwu. Dok pe wubed ka penyo lok i kom lubaŋagi, kun wuwacci, ‘Rok man yam giworo lubaŋagi niŋniŋ? wek an bene aworgi kit meno.’" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Pe ibitimo kumeno i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu, pien gibedo ka timo gin me kwer ducu ma Rwot dagi pi woro lwak lubaŋagi; giwaŋo wa awobegi ki anyiragi ki mac macalo gitum me woro lubaŋagi." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Gin ducu ma acikowu kwede myero wugwokke ka lubone; pe wubimedo wiye nyo wukwanyo mogo woko. 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Ka ce lanebi mo onen i kinwu, nyo lalek lek mo, miyo wu lanyut nyo taŋo mo," 
Deuteronomy13:2 ka ce lanyut nyo taŋo ma otitti pire-ni otimme kakare, ce en owacci, ‘Wek doŋ walub kor lubaŋa mukene,’ ma yam pe iŋeyo, ‘wacak worogi,’" 
Deuteronomy13:3 pe iwiny dog lanebi meno, lalek meno; pien noŋo Rwot Lubaŋawu tye ka temo cwinywu wek eŋe ka wumaro Rwot Lubaŋawu ki cwinywu ducu ki tipowu ducu." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Wulub kor Rwot Lubaŋawu kun wulworo en dok wugwoko cikke ducu; wuwor doge, wuti bote kun wucuŋ i kome matek." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Ento nyo lalek meno wubineko woko, pien opwonyo dano ki jemo i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma yam okwanyowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt, okokowu ki i ot me opii, ci en bimiyo wuweko yo ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu ociko ni wulubi. Kit meno miyo wubijwero gin marac woko ki i kinwu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Ka ce omeru mo ma wod pa meni, nyo wodi, nyo nyari, nyo damaroni kikome, nyo laremi ma imaro ki kwoni ducu, obiti i muŋ kun wacci, ‘Wek wacit ka woro lubaŋa mogo mukene,’ ma noŋo in kikomi nyo kwarowu yam pe guŋeyo," 
Deuteronomy13:7 lubaŋa pa rok ma gurumowu dyere-ni, kadi ma gitye ka ma cok kwedwu nyo gitye ka mabor, nia i agikki lobo tuŋ cel cito kwede i agikkine tuŋ cel," 
Deuteronomy13:8 pe iye doge, pe iwiny lokke, pe kica omaki i kome, pe imuŋ lokke;" 
Deuteronomy13:9 ento ibineke woko. Ciŋi aye bikwoŋo poto i kome me neke, lacen ciŋ lwak ducu bipoto i kome." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Ibicele ki got ineko woko, pien obedo ka yenyo yo me kwanyi woko ki bot Rwot Lubaŋawu ma yam okwanyowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt, ki i ot me opii." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Ci jo Icrael ducu gibiwinyo pire, ci gibilworo, miyo pe gibinwoyo timo bal marac macalo meno i kinwu." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Gwok nyo i gaŋ mo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu me bedo iye wubiwinyo ni 
Deuteronomy13:13 jo mogo ma kitgi raco, ma gin jowu kikome, guywayo tam pa jo ma bedo i gaŋ meno kun giwacci, ‘Wubin wacitu ka woro lubaŋa mukene,’ ma yam pe wuŋeyo," 
Deuteronomy13:14 Myero wupeny lokke kun wuyenyo tere motmot; ka ce onen ni lokke otimme ada, ma gimoko ni lok me kwer macalo meno otimme i kinwu," 
Deuteronomy13:15 ci wubineko jo ma gibedo i gaŋ meno woko ki pala lucwan, wujwerogi woko ducu liweŋ, Jo ducu ma tye iye, ki lim makwo bene ma tye iye, myero gutum woko ki pala lucwan." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Wubicoko jami ma wuyako-ni ducu, wugurogi i dyekal ka maleŋ, ci wubiwaŋo gaŋ meno ki jami ducu ma tye iye woko ki mac, obed gitum ma giwaŋo ducu ki berre bot Rwot Lubaŋawu. Bibedo wi odur matwal; pe dok gibigero iye gaŋ mo." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Gin mo ma gidyero bot Rwot pe wubiweko doŋ i ciŋwu, wek Rwot okwany kinigane mager twatwal-li woko. Bitimowu kica kun nyuto cwiny me kica i komwu, ci miyo wunya mapol kit ma yam okwoŋo kwede bot kwarowu-ni," 
Deuteronomy13:18 ka ce wuworo dog Rwot Lubaŋawu, wumako cikke ducu ma acikowu kwede tin-ni dok wutiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋe." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Wun aye litino pa Rwot Lubaŋawu: pe wubiŋolo komwu kenwu nyo Lyelo tur nyimwu pi kwero cola. 
Deuteronomy14:2 Pien wun aye jo maleŋ pa Rwot Lubaŋawu; en Rwot aye yam oyerowu ki i kin rok ducu ma tye i wi lobo wek wubed jone kikome. 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Pe wubicamo gin mo me kwer. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Magi aye gin lee ma wutwero camogi: dyaŋ, romo, dyel," 
Deuteronomy14:5 til, abur, ruda, dyel me tim, jubi, pura, ki romo ma i godi." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Lee ducu ma oboŋ tyengi akara, ma kin tyengi opokke aryo, ma nyamo omen ki i kin lee ducu wutwero camogi." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ento lee ma ginyamo omen nyo ma oboŋ tyengi akara ma pe wubicamo gin ene; kinaga, apwoyo ki oduka, Gin ginyamo omen ento kin tyengi pe akara; pienno gibedo keni botwu." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Ki opego bene, pien kadi oboŋ tyene akara ento pe nyamo omen, en bene bedo keni botwu. Pe wucam riŋogi, pe wugud wa komgi ma oto bene." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Magi aye wutwero camogi ki i kin gin ducu ma bedo i pii: gin ducu ma tye ki kiŋa ŋegi ki pok komgi wutwero camogi; 
Deuteronomy14:10 ento gin ma pe ki kiŋa ŋegi ki pok komgi pe wubicamogi, pien gibedo keni botwu." 
Deuteronomy14:11 Wutwero camo winyo ma gilony ducu," 
Deuteronomy14:12 ento magi aye pe wubicamogi: ocur, acut, koga," 
Deuteronomy14:13 agoga, okwata ki kit kwagi ducu;" 
Deuteronomy14:14 agak ki kit kwagi ducu; 
Deuteronomy14:15 udu, tebu, awewet, olwilwit ki kit kwagi ducu;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 tula matino ki tula madoŋo, lagweno kulu," 
Deuteronomy14:17 kikuŋ ki ocur madito ki alwinya," 
Deuteronomy14:18 acebe ki ogoro ki kit kwagi ducu; ki putput ki olik. 
Deuteronomy14:19 Ki kwidi ducu ma bwomgi tye gibedo keni botwu; pe wubicamogi. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Gin ducu ma bwomgi tye ma gilony wutwero camogi. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Pe wubicamo geŋ lee mo muto kene; wutwero miyo bot labedo mo ma bedo i gaŋiwu, wek en aye ocam, nyo wutwero cato bot larok mo owil; pien wun aye rok maleŋ pa Rwot Lubaŋawu, “Pe wuted riŋo latin dyel ki cak pa minne." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Wubimiyo dul acel me apar me jami ma wuceko i poto, ma a i poto mwaka ki mwaka." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Dok wubicamo dul acel me apar me kalwu ki i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu i kabedo ka ma en biyero ci keto nyiŋe bedo iye, ki dul acel me apar me koŋo vinowu ki moowu, ki litino kayo pa dyaŋiwu ki pa romi ki dyegiwu; wek wupwony lworo Rwot Lubaŋawu jwijwi." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Ka ce wutye ka mabor twatwal ma miyo pe wutwero kelo dul acel me apar i kare ma Rwot omiyowu iye gum-mi, pien kabedo ma Rwot oyero me keto iye nyiŋe odoko bor kwedwu," 
Deuteronomy14:25 ci wubicato woko wek wunoŋ cente, ci wutweyo lim meno wucito kwede i kabedo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu oyero-ni," 
Deuteronomy14:26 Wubitic ki lim meno pi kit gin ducu ma cwinywu mito, macalo me wilo twoni, nyo romo nyo koŋo vino nyo koŋo makecce, ki gin ducu ma cwinywu mito, ci wubicamo ki kunnu ki yomcwiny i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu, in ki jo ma i odi ducu." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Dok pe wubitenyo Lulevi ma gitye i gaŋwu ata, pien pe gipokogi dul lobo mo nyo gin mo me aleyagi kacel kwed wu." 
Deuteronomy14:28 “I agikki mwaka adek adek wubikelo iye dul acel me apar me gin ducu ma wuceko i mwaka-nu, wukano i gaŋiwu madito." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Ci Lulevi ma pe ki dul lobo nyo ka mo ma guleyo i kinwu, ki lubedo, ki litino kic, ki mon to ma i gaŋiwu ducu, gin ducu gibibino ka cam kwedwu giyeŋ; wek Rwot Lubaŋawu omiwu gum i kom gin ducu ma ciŋwu otiyo." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “I agikki mwaka abiro abiro wubiweko banya bot dano ma twal. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Man aye kit me weko banya: lami banya biweko banya me lim matwal ki bot dano ma yam omako banyane-ni; pe bipido banyane bot lawote matwal ma ominne, pien doŋ gityeko tito ki dano pi weko banya matwal kit ma Rwot ociko-ni." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Itwero pido larok ocul banyani; ento kwany cwinyi woko i kom banya ma omeru ma Laicrael omako boti. 
Deuteronomy15:4 Ento lacan mo pe doŋ bibedo i kinwu, pien Rwot bimiyowu gum i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu wucam me aleyawu matwal," 
Deuteronomy15:5 ka ce wubiworo dog Rwot Lubaŋawu kun wugwokke wek wulub cikke ducu ma acikowu kwede tin. 
Deuteronomy15:6 Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu gum kit ma yam ocikke kwede botwu-ni. Wubimiyo rok mapol mako banya botwu, ento wun pe wubimako banya mo; dok wubiloyo rok mapol, ento gin pe gibiloyowu." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Ka tye dano mo ma lacan i kinwu, i kin omegiwu ma gitye i gaŋ mo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu, pe cwinyi obed tek, pe ijuk ciŋi woko i kom ominwu-nu ma lacan-ni." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Ento ikonye, imiye mako banya ma romo cobo gin ma en mito ducu, kadi bed gin aŋo." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Ber igwokke wek tam marac mo pe obed i cwinyi ma miyo iwacci, ‘Mwaka me abiro, ma en aye mwaka me weko banya matwal, doŋ cok,’ ci waŋi cido woko i kom omeru ma lacan-ni miyo pe doŋ imiye gin mo. Meno miyo en cako kok i komi i nyim Rwot, ci doko bal i komi." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Ka imiye gin mo, ber imiye ma cwinyi leŋ matwal, cwinyi pe waŋ pi gin ma imiye-ni: pien Rwot Lubaŋani bimiyi gum i kom tic ducu ma itiyo, ki i kom gin ducu ma ciŋi ogudo." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Lucan pe gibitum woko i lobowu, mumiyo aciki ni, ibiyabo ciŋi malac bot omeru ki jo ma piny oloyogi, ki bot lucan ma i lobowu." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Ka ce gicato boti omeru mo, laco ma Laibru nyo dako ma Laibru, ci iwilo obed opiini nyo aŋecani, en bitiyo tic boti pi mwaka abicel. I mwaka me abirone ibiweke a woko ki boti cito gire ki kuc," 
Deuteronomy15:13 Ka igonye wek ociti, pe, ibiweko en cito ki ciŋe nono." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Ibimiye cito ki jami mapolpol, romi ki dyegi, bel ki koŋo vino, ma lubo kit ma Rwot Lubaŋani omiyi kwede gum." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Ibipo ni yam ibedo opii i lobo Ejipt, ka ma Rwot Lubaŋani okoki ki iye; en gin mumiyo tin aciki kumeno." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Ento ka en owacci, ‘An pe abia woko ki boti,’ pien en mari ki jo ma i odi ducu, pien obedo kwedwu maber," 
Deuteronomy15:17 ci ibikwanyo atero, ituco ki ite i doggola, ci doŋ bibedo opiini matwal. Ki aŋecani bene ibitimo kit meno." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Pe ibitamo ni tek twatwal me weke a woko ki boti, pien obedo ka tic boti pi mwaka abicel kulu kun ticce dodo tic pa ‘Lapakaca kiryo pi wel manok mo. Ka itimo kit meno, Rwot Lubaŋani bimiyi gum i tic ducu ma itiyo." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Litino kayo ducu ma ginywalogi i kin dyaŋini nyo romi ki dyegini ibikwero komgi i nyim Rwot Lubaŋani, Pe ibitiyo tic mo ki litino kayo pa dyaŋini, pe ibiŋolo yer kom litino, kayo pa romini." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Ibicamo riŋone kacel ki jo ma i Odi, i nyim Rwot Lubaŋani mwaka ki mwaka ki i kabedo ma Rwot biyero." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Ento ka kome ki mwonyo, ka tyene oŋol, nyo waŋe oto, nyo tye ki kit mwonyo mo marac i kome, pe ibitumo bot Rwot Lubaŋani." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Wubicamo ki i gaŋwu ki kunnu; dano ma kome ki keni twero camo kacel ki dano ma olony, macalo riŋo abur ki til." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Remone keken aye pe wubicamo; wubionyo woko piny i ŋom macalo pii. 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Wugwok dwe me Abib, wukwer iye nino madit me Kato pi woro Rwot Lubaŋawu, pien i dwe me Abib yam Rwot Lubaŋawu okwanyowu iye woko ki i Ejipt dyewor." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Wubikwanyo gitum me Kato ki i kin romiwu nyo i kin dyaŋiwu, wutumo bot Rwot i kabedo ma en biyero, ka ma en biketo nyiŋe bedo iye." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Pe wubicamo mugati ma girubo iye tobi; ento wubicamo mugati ma tobi pe iye pi nino abiro pi po pi atwom ma yam wubedo kwede; pien yam wua ki i lobo Ejipt rucurucu; mumiyo ibipo pi nino ma yam wua kwede ki i lobo Ejipt pi kare me kwowu ducu. 
Deuteronomy16:4 Tobi mo pe myero onen botwu i lobowu ducu pi nino abiro; kadi wa riŋo mo ma ityero me gitum wi otyeno i nino mukwoŋone pe bidoŋ nio wa odiko. 
Deuteronomy16:5 Pe wubityero gitum me Kato ki i gaŋ mo ma i kin gaŋiwu ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu; 
Deuteronomy16:6 ento wubityero ki i kabedo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu biyero, ka ma en biketo nyiŋe bedo iye, Wubityero gitum me Kato kunnu wi otyeno ma ceŋ cito ka poto-ni, i ca wa ma yam wua kwede ki i Ejipt." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Wubitedo wucamo i kabedo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu biyero; ci odiko wubia wudok i kemawu. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Wubicamo mugati ma tobi pe iye pi nino abicel; i kom nino me abirone wubibedo iye ki cokke madit pi woro Rwot Lubaŋawu; pe wubitiyo iye tic mo. 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Wubikwano cabit abiro cakke ki i kare ma wukwoŋo keto iye pala kac i ŋut kal mucuŋ i poto. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Ka dok wubibedo ki nino madit me kwero agikki cabit abiro i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu kun wumiyo gityer ma iwu opwoyo; wubimiyo muporo gum ma Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyowu. 
Deuteronomy16:11 Ibibedo ki yomcwiny i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu, in ki wodi ki nyari ki opiini ki aŋecani, ki Lulevi ma gibedo i gaŋwu, ki lubedo ki litino kic ki mon-to ma tye i kinwu, ki i kabedo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu biyero, ka ma en biketo iye nyiŋe bedo iye," 
Deuteronomy16:12 Wubipo ni yam wubedo opii i Ejipt, ci wubigwoko cik magi ducu matek." 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Wubikwero nino madito me Bolo pi nino abiro, i kare ma doŋ wukayo cam ducu wudino woko wutero paco, kacel ki pig olok ma doŋ wukayo wubiyo woko." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Wubibedo ki yomcwiny ka wukwero nino madito-ni, in ki wodi ki nyari, opiini ki aŋecani, kacel ki Lulevi ki lubedo, litino kic ki monto ma gibedo i gaŋiwu." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Wubikwero kare man pi nino abiro i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu ki i kabedo ma en biyero; pien Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu gum i cam ducu ma wuceko ki i kom tic me ciŋwu ducu, ma miyo wubibedo ki yomcwiny keken:" 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Co ducu ma i kinwu myero gubin i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu tyen adek i mwaka acel acel ki i kabedo ma en biyero: i nino madito me Mugati ma Tobi Pe Iye, i nino madit me kwero cabit abiro, ki i nino madito me Bolo. Pe gubin i nyim Rwot ki ciŋgi noŋo;" 
Deuteronomy16:17 dano acel acel bimiyo mot macalo en twero muporo kit gum ma Rwot Lubaŋawu omiye. 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Wubiketo luŋolkop ki ludito i gaŋiwu ducu ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu, ma oporo kakawu; gin myero guŋol ki lwak kop ma atir." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Pe wubal te pido pa dano ma lokke tye atir; pe wuket apokapoka mo i kin dano; pe giwilwu ki limo Ka giwilo dano ki lim miyo laryeko doko lawaŋeoto ci balo te pido pa jo ma lokgi tye atir. 
Deuteronomy16:20 Wuŋol kop atir keken, wuŋol kop atir, wek wubed makwo, wule lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “I kare ma wubicano keno tyer pi Rwot Lubaŋawu, pe wubipito yat mo i ŋete pi woro jok ma dako ma gilwoŋo Acera." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Dok pe wubicibo wir got mo cuŋ me awora; en aye gin ma Rwot Lubaŋawu okwero matek. 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Pe wubitumo bot Rwot Lubaŋawu twon nyo romo nyo dyel mo ma kome ki mwonyo, nyo ma tye ki kit ŋolo mo, pien meno aye bedo me kwer bot Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Gwok nyo gibinoŋo dano mo i gaŋ mo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu, laco nyo dako, ma otimo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot Lubaŋawu pi taro gicikkene," 
Deuteronomy17:3 ce ocito ka woro lwak lubaŋa mukene, nyo ceŋ nyo dwe nyo gin mo ma i kin mony me polo ci oryebbe piny i nyimgi, ma en aye gin ma Rwot ociko ni pe myero gitim." 
Deuteronomy17:4 Ka doŋ gitito lokke botwu ci wuwinyo, wubipenyo lokke motmot, Ka ce lokke tye ada ma ŋene atir ni gin me kwer macalo meno otimme i Icrael," 
Deuteronomy17:5 wubikelo laco meno nyo dako meno ma otimo bal marac-ci i dog gaŋ, ci wubicelo ki got wuneko woko." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Dano meno gineko pi lok pa lucaden aryo nyo adek; dano mo pe gibineko pi lok pa lacaden acel keken. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Dok ciŋ lucaden aye bikwoŋo poto i kom dano meno me neke, ka lacen ciŋ lwak bipoto i kome. Kit meno miyo wubijwero gin marac woko ki i kinwu," 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Ka ce pido mo onen i kinwu ma ŋolone oloyowu, macalo poko kin kit nek mapatpat, nyo lok kom twer ma dano mo-ni tye kwede i nyim cik, nyo lok kom ret ma dano mo oketo i kom lawote, kit pido mo ma twero nen i gaŋiwu ma ŋolone tek loyowu, ci wubia wucito i kabedo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu oyero-ni." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Wubicito bot ajwagi ma Lulevi, ki bot laŋolkop ma tye ka tic i kare meno, wubipenyogi ci gibititowu kit ŋolle." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Wubilubo kit ma gitito botwu i kabedo ma Rwot biyero; wubigwokke wek wuti kit gin ducu ma gicikowu kwede," 
Deuteronomy17:11 Wubitiyo kun wulubo kit pwony ducu ma gipwonyowu kwede, muporo kit ŋol ma gin guŋolo. Pe wubikwero lubo lok ma gin guŋolo, ento wubilubo kun pe wuŋak woko yo tuŋ acuc nyo tuŋ acam." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Dano ma lanywar ma okwero woro dog ajwaka ma ocuŋ ka tic i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu, nyo dog laŋolkop, dano meno bito; kit meno miyo wubijwero gin marac woko ki i kinwu." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Lwak ducu gibiwinyo pire, ci miyogi lworo, miyo ŋat mo pe dok bitimo tim anywar macalo meno." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “I kare ma doŋ wuo i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu, ma doŋ wucamo wubedo iye, gwok nyo wubiwacci, ‘Waket kabaka me loyowa, kit ma rok ducu ma gurumowa tye kwedeni.’" 
Deuteronomy17:15 Doŋ ka wuketo kabaka ma loyowu myero wunen ni obedo dano ma Rwot Lubaŋawu oyero. Myero obed ŋat mo i kin utmegiwu; pe wuket larok olowu ma pe rokwu kikome. 
Deuteronomy17:16 En pe obed ka coko lwak aguragura pire kene, pe omi lwak odok cen i Ejipt pi wilo aguragura, pien Rwot yam owaco botwu ni, ‘Pe wubidok cen kunnu matwal.’" 
Deuteronomy17:17 Pe onyom mon mapol, miyo ŋako cwinye woko; pe bene ocok lonyo madwoŋ pire kene." 
Deuteronomy17:18 “Ka doŋ obedo i wi komkerre, ci bicoyo lok me cik man ducu i buk kun kwanyo lokke ki i buk ma ajwagi ma Lulevi gwoko-ni." 
Deuteronomy17:19 En bibedo kwede ci bedo ka kwanone pi kare me kwone ducu, wek opwony lworo Rwot Lubaŋane pi gwoko lok ducu ma tye i cik man ki lubo gin ducu ma Rwot ociko," 
Deuteronomy17:20 wek pe obed ka wakke i cwinye ni edit ekato omegine, dok pe oŋak owek cik woko, pe odok yo tuŋ acuc nyo yo tuŋ acam, wek omedde bedo i kerre nakanaka, en ki likwaye i Icrael." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Ajwagi ma Lulevi, wa kaka pa jo Levi ducu, pe gibilimo dul lobo mo nyo ginaleya mo i kin jo Icrael. Gibicamo gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot ki gin ducu ma myero dano gumi bot Rwot." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Pe gibileyo dul lobo mo i kin utmegigi, pien Rwot aye ginaleyagi kit ma yam ocikogi kwede." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Man aye bibedo waŋ wat pa ajwagi ma lwak gibimiyo botgi: Jo ma gityero gitum, kadi bibedo twon nyo romo, gibimiyo riŋo bat bot ajwaka, ki cwake aryo ki apika." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Kal ki koŋo vino ki moo mewu me wi mwaka, ki yer romo ma gikwoŋo nyarone, wubimiyo bot ajwaka;" 
Deuteronomy18:5 pien Rwot Lubaŋawu yam oyero jo Levi ki i kin kakawu ducu wek gucuŋ ka tic i nyim Rwot, gin ki likwayogi matwal." 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Ka ce Lalevi mo oa ki i gaŋwu mo ma i lobo Icrael ducu, ka ma yam en bedo iye, ci bino i kabedo ma Rwot biyero, en twero bino kit ma cwinye mito," 
Deuteronomy18:7 ci bitic i nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋane macalo Lulevi luwote ducu ma gicuŋ ka tic kunnu i nyim Rwot. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Gibilimo waŋ wat me acamagi ducu marom, medo ki lim ma Lalevi mo-ni olimo ki i jami pa kwarone ma ocato." 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Ka doŋ wuo i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu, pe wubipwonyo lubo kit tim me kwer pa lurok ma kunnu," 
Deuteronomy18:10 Pe ginoŋ ŋat mo i kinwu ma owaŋo wode nyo nyare me gityer, nyo dano mo ma odoko latyet, nyo latyet ki ajaa, laŋi i dyel, latal," 
Deuteronomy18:11 lakot piny, lakor tipo, min jok nyo lapeny dog tipo pa lato." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Ka dano mo timo gin ma kit me-no ci en bedo me kwer bot Rwot; pien pi timo gin me kwer ma kit meno miyo Rwot Lubaŋawu biryemo rok meno ducu woko ki i nyimwu. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Wun myero wubed laboŋo bal mo i komwu i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu; 
Deuteronomy18:14 rok magi ducu ma wubicamo lobogi-ni giwinyo dog lutyet ki ajaa ki lutyet mukene ducu, ento wun aye Rwot Lubaŋawu pe ye ni wutim kumeno." 
Deuteronomy18:15 “Rwot Lubaŋawu bicwalo lanebi mo macalo an, ma a ki i kin utmegiwu; wubiwinyo en" 
Deuteronomy18:16 I nino ma yam wucokke iye i Koreb wubako dogwu bot Rwot Lubaŋawu kun wuwacci, ‘Pe dok awiny dwan Rwot Lubaŋawa, nyo anen kom mac madit-ti, wek pe ato.’" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Ci Rwot owaco bota ni, ‘Gutimo ber pi waco lok meno ducu ma guwaco-ni." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Abicwalo botgi lanebi mo macalo in ma oa ki i kin utmegigi. Abiketo lokka i doge, ci en biwaco bot lwak lok ducu ma abicike kwede." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ka ce dano mo okwero winyo lokka ma en biwacone i nyiŋa, ci an aye abipenyo dog dano-nu wek aket can i kome." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ento ka lanebi mo ocorre ki wiye ka waco lok mo i nyiŋa ma onoŋo pe an aye acike ni oloki, nyo ma loko i nyiŋ lubaŋa mukene, lanebi meno bito.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Ka ce iloko ki i cwinyi ni, ‘Wabiŋeyo lok ma Rwot pe owaco niŋniŋ mo no?’" 
Deuteronomy18:22 ci agamo kit man ni, ‘Ka ce lanebi mo oloko i nyiŋ Rwot ce lokke-nu pe otimme nyo pe obedo me ada, meno nyuto ni lokke pe Rwot aye owaco.’ Lanebi meno ocorre ki wiye kene ki lokke gire, pienno pe myero wubed ka lwore." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “I kare ma Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ otyeko lurok woko ma en bimiyo lobogi botwu-ni, ma doŋ wucamo lobogi ci wubedo i gaŋigi ki i odigi ducu," 
Deuteronomy19:2 ci wubipoko gaŋi adek woko pat i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ omiyowu me bedo mewu. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Wubiyubo yo gudo dok wubipoko dye lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu i dul adek wek okony ŋat ma oneko dano me riŋo iye wek olar iye kome. 
Deuteronomy19:4 “Man aye lok me konyo kom lanek dano. Ka dano mo pe oneko lawote akaka, ma yam mone mo pe i kingi, myero en oriŋ kunnu wek olar kome," 
Deuteronomy19:5 Labolle ka dano mo ocito i buŋa ki lawote mo ka toŋo yen, ce otiŋo latoŋ me toŋo ki yen me areta piny ci latoŋ oput woko ki i purre, ogoyo lawote oneko woko, en myero oriŋ olar kome i gaŋ mo acel ma i kin gaŋi meno." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Ka pe kumeno, miyo lacul kwor remo ka kinigane olyetti biryemo kor lanek, mako woko iyo, pien noŋo piny bor, ci cobo neko woko. Ento dano macalo meno pe romo aneka, pien pe onoŋo mone mo tye i kingi i kare macon," 
Deuteronomy19:7 en gin mumiyo acikowu pi poko gaŋi adek pat. 
Deuteronomy19:8 I kare ma Rwot Lubaŋawu oyabo waŋ lobowu omedo malac kit ma yam okwoŋo kwede bot kwarowu, ma doŋ ominiwu lobo ducu ma yam ociko ni ebimiyo bot kwarowu," 
Deuteronomy19:9 dok ka ce wubigwoko cik man ducu ma acikowu kwede tin-ni, ni wumar Rwot Lubaŋawu, wulub yone ducu i kare ducu, ci dok wubimedo gaŋi mukene adek i kom maca," 
Deuteronomy19:10 Kit meno pe gibionyo remo pa dano mo ma pe ki bal i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu me aleyawu, ci miyo alii me to pe bedo i wiwu." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Ento ka dano mo iye dag lawote, ce obuto okure i yo, ci olwenyo i kome, ocobo omedo ki neko woko, ka laco meno oriŋo olaro i gaŋ mo i kin gaŋ adek-ki," 
Deuteronomy19:12 ci ludoŋo me tuŋ pa lanek-ki gibicwalo dano giome ki kunnu, gimiye i ciŋ lacul kwor remo, wek gineke woko." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Kica pe bimakowu i kome, ento myero wulwok alii me to pa dano ma pe ki bal woko ki i Icrael kit meno, wek ariya mo obed pe i nyimwu." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Pe ibikobo got ma poko waŋ lobo pa lawoti ma yam ludoŋo gutyeko pokone ki i lobo ma ibileyo bot kwarowu i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu me bedo mewu. 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Lacaden acel pe miyo pido loyo dano mo pi kit bal mo nyo kit tim marac mo ma onoŋo otimo; ento kop biloyo dano pi lok pa lucaden aryo nyo adek. 
Deuteronomy19:16 Ka ce lacaden ma lagoba odoto dano mo ni otimo bal," 
Deuteronomy19:17 ci gin lupido aryo ducu gibicito i nyim Rwot, ki i nyim ajwagi pa Lubaŋa ki luŋolkop ma gitye i dog tic i kare meno." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Luŋolkop gibipenyo lokke mot. Ka ce lacaden ma lagoba odoto ominne ki adot me atoŋa 
Deuteronomy19:19 ci gibiketo can i kome ma rom ki can ma nene en mito ni giket i kom ominne-ni: kit meno miyo wubijwero tim marac woko ki i kinwu. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Jo mukene gibiwinyone, miyo gilworo, miyo ŋat mo pe dok bitimo tim marac macalo meno," 
Deuteronomy19:21 Kica pe bimakowu i kome; kwo gibiculo ki kwo, waŋ ki waŋ, lak ki lak, bad ki bad, tyen ki tyen." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “I kare ma wubicito ka monyo lumerokwu, ka ce wuneno gin tye ki lwak aguragura ki gadigadi lweny, dok monygi bene dit makato mewu, pe wubed ki lworo i komgi,’ pien Rwot Lubaŋawu bibedo kwedwu, en ma yam okwanyowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Ka doŋ wurwayo cok ka lweny, ci ajwaka pa Lubaŋa bikato anyim ka lok ki lwak." 
Deuteronomy20:3 Biwaco botgi ni, ‘Wun jo Icrael wuwiny, tin doŋ wurwayo cok ka lweny i kom lumerokwu: cwinywu pe oryaŋŋe, pe wulwor, komwu pe omyel, atiba pe omakwu i komgi;" 
Deuteronomy20:4 pien Rwot Lubaŋawu aye bicito kwedwu ka lweny piwu i kom lumerokwu ci bimiyo wuloyogi.’ 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Lacen ludito mony gibilok ki dano kun giwacci, “Tye laco mo kany ma ogero ode ci peya okwero me donyo iye? Wek en odok cen paco, wek pe oto i lweny ci miyo dano mu kene aye dok bikwero ode," 
Deuteronomy20:6 Tye laco mo kany ma opito poto olokke ci peya ocamo nyige? Wek en odok paco, wek pe oto i lweny ci miyo ŋat mukene aye camo nyig olokke." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Tye laco mo kany ma otoŋo keny i kom dako ci peya obedo kwede? Wek en odok paco, wek pe oto i lweny ci miyo laco mukene aye bedo kwede.’" 
Deuteronomy20:8 ‘Ludito mony dok gibimedde ki lokgi bot lwak kun giwacci, ‘Tye laco mo kany ma lalworo ma kome obaŋŋe woko? Wek en odok woko paco, pien bimiyo jo mukene cwinygi ryaŋŋe woko: macalo en-ni.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Ka doŋ ludito gutyeko lokgi bot lwak, ci doŋ gibiyero lutel wi mony." 
Deuteronomy20:10 “I kare ma wurwayo cok ka lweny i kom gaŋ mo, koŋ wumi dwan me kuc i kome." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Ka jo me gaŋ meno gidok iye botwu ki dwan me kuc ce giyabo dog gaŋgi botwu, ci jo ducu ma binoŋŋe iye wubiketo tic muroni i wigi miyo gibedo macalo opiiwu." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Ento ka gukwero jolo lokwu me kuc, ce gucako lweny i komwu, ci monywu birumo gaŋ meno," 
Deuteronomy20:13 Ka Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyogi i ciŋwu, ci wubineko co ducu ki pala lucwan," 
Deuteronomy20:14 ento mon ki litino matino ducu ki limgi makwo, ki jami ma i gaŋ-gu ducu gibibedo me ayakawu, wubiyako wuterogi bedo mewu, ci wutwero tic ki jami ma wuyako ki bot lumerokwu, ma Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyo botwu." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Wubitimo gaŋi ducu ma tye ka mabor kwedwu kit meno, ma pe gaŋi pa lurok ma gibedo kanynyi." 
Deuteronomy20:16 “Ento gaŋi pa rok magi ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyo lobogi botwu obed mewu-ni pe wubiweko gin mo doŋ iye makwo; 
Deuteronomy20:17 wubijwerogi woko ducu liweŋ, gin aye jo Kit, jo Amor, jo Kanaan, jo Periji, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc, macalo Rwot Lubaŋawu yam ocikowu kwede;" 
Deuteronomy20:18 wek gin pe gubed ka pwonyowu ki timo gin me kwer ma gubedo ka timo me woro lwak lubaŋagi, ma bimiyowupoto i bal i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Ka ce wurumo gaŋ mo pi kare malac, kun wulwenyo i kome me makone, pe wubitoŋo yadi ma i ŋete woko ducu ki latoŋwu, Wutwero camo nyiggi ento pe wutoŋ yadi wuret woko piny, Yadi bene ma gitye i lum gudoko dano bo wek monywu orumgi olweny i komgi?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Ento yadi ma wuŋeyo ni pe gicamo nyiggi aye wubityekogi woko kun wutoŋogi wureto woko piny wek wuger ki cel matek me lweny i kom gaŋ ma tye ka lweny i komwu-ni, nio ka opoto i ciŋwu," 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Ka ce ginoŋo dano mo gineko i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu me bedo mewu, kun kome obuto i tim ata, ci pe giŋeyo ŋat ma oneke," 
Deuteronomy21:2 ci ludoŋowu ki luŋolkopwu gibibino kunnu, gibiporo bor piny nio wa i gaŋi ma orumo kom dano ma gineko-ni." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Ludoŋo ma i gaŋi ma cok ki kom dano ma gineko-ni gibikelo roya ma peya otiyo tic mo, ma peya oywayo kweri dyaŋ." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Gibitero roya wa i nota kulu mo ma piine mol kare ducu, i kabedo mo ka ma yam peya gipuro, ma pe gicoyo iye kodi. Gibituro ŋut roya woko ki i nota kunnu;" 
Deuteronomy21:5 ci ajwagi ma gin likwayo pa Levi gibinyiko cok, pien yam Rwot Lubaŋawu oyerogi pi tic bote ki me lamo gum i nyiŋ Rwot, gin bene myero gutyek lok ducu me pido ki me bwami." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Ludoŋo me gaŋ meno ma cok ki ka ma ginoŋo iye kom dano ma gineko-ni gibilwoko ciŋgi malo i wi kom roya ma gituro nute i ŋota-ni," 
Deuteronomy21:7 ci gilamo doggi kun giwacci, ‘Ciŋwa pe ooyo remo pa dano man, waŋwa bene pe oneno ka gineke." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Ai Rwot, tim kica ki jo Icrael ma gin aye joni ma yam ikokogi-ni, pe iket alii me remo pa dano man ma pe ki bal-li i dye lwakki Icrael, ento itimgi kica pi bal me to man.’" 
Deuteronomy21:9 Wubilwoko alii me remo ma pe ki bal woko ki i kinwu kit meno, ka ce wutiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋ Rwot." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Ka wucito ka lweny i kom lumerokwu, ce Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyogi i ciŋwu ci wuyakogi wutero obedo dano alimawu," 
Deuteronomy21:11 gwok nyo ibineno dako mo mamwonya i kin jo ma iyakoni ci cwinyi mare matek kun imito ni ikwany odok dakoni. 
Deuteronomy21:12 Ka tye kumeno ci ibitere paco wa i odi. En koŋ bilyelo wiye ki ŋolo Lwete," 
Deuteronomy21:13 ci lunyo boŋone woko ma imake kwede me bedo opii, ruko mukene; ci bibedo i odi kun koko wonne ki minnne dwe acel kulu, ka lacen itwero bedo kwede macalo cware, ci en doŋ bibedo dakoni." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Ka inen cwinyi pe mare twatwal ci ibiweko en cito gire mot ka ma en bimito; ento pe ibicato woko giwilo ki lim, pe ibitime macalo aŋeca, pien noŋo ityeko lanye woko." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Ka laco mo tye ki mon aryo, acel dako ma gimaro ki acel ma pe gimaro, ci gin mon aryo ducu ginywalo litino ka latin kayo obedo wod pa dako ma en pe maro-ni," 
Deuteronomy21:16 i kare ma laco-ni poko lim me aleya ki awobene, pe omi bot latin kayo pa dako ma gimaroni dullim muporo dit pa latin kayo ma ka miyo bot latin kayone kikome ma wod pa dako ma en pe maro-ni," 
Deuteronomy21:17 Ento en bituco ni latin kayo en aye pa dako ma pe gimaro-ni, ci bimiye lim ma dodo dul aryo ma i kom jamine ducu ma en tye kwede; en acakki kero kome, dit me bedo latin kayo aye mere gire." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Ka dano mo tye ki wode ma ŋute nwaŋ dok lajemo, ma pe winyo dog wonne ki minne, kadi bed gijuye matek, pe winyogi," 
Deuteronomy21:19 ci wonne ki minne gibimake gitere wa i dog gaŋ bot Ludoŋo me gaŋ meno ma en bedo iye-ni," 
Deuteronomy21:20 Ci gibiwaco bot ludoŋo ma i gaŋgi-nu ni, ‘Latin awobiwa man ŋute nwaŋ dok lajemo, pe winyo dogwa, en lacarcar dok lamero koŋo matek.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Ci dano ducu me gaŋ meno gibicele woko ki got nio ka oto. Kit meno miyo wubijwero gin marac woko ki i kinwu; jo Icrael ducu gibiwinyo ci miyo gilworo. 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Ka dano mo otimo bal ma romme noŋo can me to ci gineke woko, ma giŋabe malo i wi yat," 
Deuteronomy21:23 ci pe gibiweko kome bedo i wi yat dyewor. Wubiyiko kome i nino meno kikome, pien dano ma giŋabo i wi yat bedo dano ma Lubaŋa ceno; pe wubinyobo lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu me aleyawu." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Ka ineno dyaŋ nyo romo pa omeru ma orwenyo woko ata, ci pe ikwer miyo kony; dwokgi cen bot omeru." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Ka ce en pe bedo cok kwedi, nyo ka pe iŋeye, ibitero lee-nu paco ci bibedo boti nio ka wonne oyenyo, ka doŋ ibidwokone bote." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Kanane bene ibitimo kit meno, ki boŋone nyo kit jami mo keken pa omeru ma orwenyo ki bote ma in inoŋo; pe ikwer miyo kony." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Ka inoŋo kana pa omeru nyo dyaŋŋe ma opoto piny i ŋet yo, pe inen anena; kony omeru ki tiŋone malo." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Dako pe oruk ginaruka pa co, dok laco bene pe oruk ruk pa mon, pien dano ma otimo kumeno bedo me kwer bot Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Ka ce icob i kom ot winyo mo ma tye i wi yat nyo piny i nom, ma litino tye iye, nyo toŋe, ki minne bene oumo wi litinone nyo obuto i wi toŋe, pe ibimako minne kacel ki litinone," 
Deuteronomy22:7 Ibiweko minne tuk cito, ento ibicoko litino icito kwede, wek ariya mo pe onen i nyimi ento ibed kwo pi kare malac." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Ka ce igero ot manyen, ibigoyo wi ot meri irumo woko, wek pe ikel bal me oyo remo lodi, ma noŋo ŋat mo obut opoto piny ki i wiye." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Pe ibicoyo poto olokki ki kit kodi mapatpat aryo, miyo gin ducu ma ocek iye myero giter i ot pa Lubaŋa, gin ma icoyo iye wa ki nyig olok bene." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Pe ibitweyo dyaŋ ki kana kacel me ywayo kweri dyaŋ. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Pe ibiruko boŋo ma gicweyo ki uci yer romo kacel ki uci camanini. 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Ibikwoyo jira aŋwen i twok boŋo ma iume kwede-ni. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Ka laco mo onyomo nyako ce obedo kwede, ka iye okwere woko," 
Deuteronomy22:14 ci otoŋo doge ki lok me lewic ma obalo nyiŋ nyako woko marac kun waco ni, ‘Anyomo nyako man ci ka anyiko bote cok pe anoŋo gin ma nyuto atir ni peya ocodo co,’" 
Deuteronomy22:15 won latin dako-nu ki minne gibikelo boŋo ma nyuto atir ni latin dako-nu peya ocodo co bot ludoŋo ma i gaŋ meno ka ma gicokke iye i dog gaŋ," 
Deuteronomy22:16 Ci won latin dako-nu biwaco bot ludoŋo ni, ‘Amiyo nyara o ot laco man ci onyomo ka dok okwero en woko." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Ci, nen, okelo lok me lewic i kome kun waco ni pe enoŋo gin ma nyuto atir ni nyara peya ocodo co, Koŋ wunen, man en aye gin ma nyuto atir ni nyara peya ocodo co.’ Ci biyaro bone-nu i nyim ludoŋo ma i gaŋ meno." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Ludoŋo gibitero laco-nu gigoyo," 
Deuteronomy22:19 giŋolle cul me cekel me ryal miya acel. Gibimiyo limme bot won nyako, pien laco-nu obalo nyiŋ nya jo Icrael ma peya ocodo co. Ci bibedo dakone, pe biryeme woko matwal pi kare me kwone ducu." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Ento ka lokke ada ni, gin mo pe ginoŋo ma nyuto atir ni latin dako-nu peya ocodo co," 
Deuteronomy22:21 ci jo ma i gaŋ meno gibicele ki got gineko woko, pien otimo gin ma pe myero i Icrael pi codo co ki i ot pa wonne. Wubijwero tim marac woko ki i kinwu kit meno." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Ka ginoŋo laco mo obuto ki dako pa laco mukene, gin aryo ducu gibito, laco ma obuto ki dako, ki dako bene. Kit meno miyo wubijwero gin marac woko ki i kinwu." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Ka tye nyako mo ma peya oŋeyo laco, ma gitoŋo keny i kome ce laco mo oromo kwede i dye gaŋ ka obuto kwede," 
Deuteronomy22:24 ci wubitero gin aryo ducu woko i dog gaŋ, wucelogi ki got wunekogi woko, latin dako-nu pien pe ogoyo oduru kadi onoŋo tye i dye gaŋ, dok laco bene pi mako dako pa lawote ki tek. Kit meno miyo wubijwero tim marac woko ki i kinwu." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Ento ka laco mo orwatte ki nyako mo ma gitoŋo keny i kome i dye tim ce omake tektek obuto kwede, ci laco ma obuto kwede-ni aye bito." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Pe wubitimo gin mo i kom nyako, pien en pe ki bal mo ma romo keto can me to i kome. Lok man rom ki pa laco mo ma olwenyo i kom lawote ci oneke woko." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Laco-nu obino i kom nyako-nu i dye tim ci kadi bed en ogoyo oduru noŋo ŋat mo pe kunnu ma lare. 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Ka laco mo orwatte ki nyako mo ma peya gitoŋo keny i kome ce omake tektek obuto kwede, ka gimakogi," 
Deuteronomy22:29 ci laco ma obuto kwede-ni bimiyo lim me luk bot won nyako ma romo cekel pyerabic, ci nyako-nu bidoko dakone, pien omake ki tek; pe biryeme woko matwal pi kare me kwone ducu." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Laco mo pe obed ki ci-wonne, pe oket lewic i kom wonne kumeno." 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Dano ma gidino mane nyo ma giŋolo kome me co woko pe bidonyo i cokke pa Rwot. 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Latin luk pe bidonyo i cokke pa Rwot; kadi wa likwaye me aparre acel mo pe bidonyo i cokke pa Rwot. 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Dano mo pa jo Ammon nyo pa jo Moab pe bidonyo i cokke pa Rwot; kadi wa likwayogi me aparre ŋat acel mo ki i komgi pe bidonyo i cokke pa Rwot matwal," 
Deuteronomy23:4 pien gin yam gukwero jolowu ki kwon ki pii i kare ma wua woko ki i Ejipt, dok bene yam gukelo Balaam wod pa Beor ki i Petor ma i Mecopotamia ci guwilo ki lim wek ocenwu." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Ento Rwot Lubaŋawu pe owinyo dog Balaam; oloko lok me cenowu odoko me kelo gum i komwu, pien Rwot Labanawu onoŋo marowu." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Pe wutim gin mo ma kelligi kuc ki berbedo matwal, pi kare me kwo mewu ducu." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Pe ii okwer Laedom mo, pien en omeru. Pe ii okwer Laejipt mo, pien yam in labedo i lobone." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Litinogi ma giliywalo ma likwayogi me adekke gitwero donyo i cokke pa Rwot. 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Ka wucito ka lweny ki lumerokwu, ma pud wutye i gony, myero wugwokke i kom gin maraco ducu." 
Deuteronomy23:10 “Ka tye laco mo i kinwu ma odoko keni pi gin ma otimme bote dyewor, ci en bicito woko i ne gony, bedo kunnu." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Ento ka piny oyuto bilwoko kome ki pii, ci ka ceŋ opoto en twero dwogo i gony," 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Wubiyubo kabedo mo woko i ŋe gony ka ma wubicito ka konnye iye. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Wubed ki tir i kin jami lwenywu; ci ka inyoŋo ka konnye ibikwinyo bur ki tir-ru, ka ilokke iumo wi coronni woko." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Pien Rwot Lubaŋawu woto limo dye gonywu pi larowu ki pi ryemo lumerokwu woko ki i nyimwu, mumiyo dye gonywu myero obed maleŋ wek en pe onen gin mo ma keni ci miyo en lokke wekowu woko." 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Pe ibidwoko opii mo bot rwode ka ce en oriŋo rwode olaro boti. 
Deuteronomy23:16 En bibedo i kinwu i kabedo mo ma en oyero ki i kin gaŋiwu, ka ma iye mito; pe wubiune." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Kit me timo kwele me woro jogi obed peke i kin anyira Icrael, dok kit me timo kwele ki awobe mukene pi woro jogi obed peke ki i kin awobe Icrael."
