Deuteronomy23:18 Pe wubikelo lim ma ginoŋo pi tim kwele nyo pi tim caro macalo gwok i ot pa Rwot Lubaŋawu macalo cul me cobo kwoŋwu mo; pien gin ducu jami me kipyeda i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu. 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Pe ibimiyo omeru ma dano me Icrael mako banya boti me ciliŋ nyo me cam pi limo magoba, kadi banya me gin mo ma kelo magoba." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Itwero mako magoba i kom banya ma imiyo bot dano me rok mukene, ento pe i kom banya ma imiyo bot omeru ma Laicrael. Ka ilubo cik man ci miyo Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyi gum i kom gin ducu ma ibitiyo i lobo ma doŋ wucok donyo iye me camone-ni." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Ka ikwoŋo kwoŋ mo bot Rwot Lubaŋani, pe ibed ka galle ki cobone; pien Rwot Lubaŋawu bipenyi pire ada, ci bibedo bal boti ka pe iculo." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Ka pe ikwoŋo kwoŋ, bal mo pe boti." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Ento tekke imine ka kwoŋo kwoŋ mo bot Rwot Lubaŋawu, myero igwokke mada ka cobo lok ma okatti ki i dogi." 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Ka iwok ki i dye poto olok pa lawoti, itwero camo nyige mabup macalo imito, ento pe ibipiko mogo i kicaani." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Dok ka iwok ki i poto pa lawoti ma kal Ocuŋ iye, itwero jako wite ki ciŋi, ento pe ibiketo pala kac i ŋut kal mucuŋ i poto pa lawoti." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Ka laco mo onoŋo dako ce onyomo, ka dakone pe yomo cwinye pien onoŋo roc mo i kome, laco twero coyo waraga me keto nyom, miyo i ciŋe, ryeme kwede woko ki i ode, ci dako-ni a woko ki i ode." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Ento ka laco mukene onyome," 
Deuteronomy24:3 ce cware ma lacen-ni bene pe mite ci coyo waraga me keto nyom, miyo i ciŋe ci ryeme kwede woko ki i ode, nyo ka cware me aryone oto woko," 
Deuteronomy24:4 ci cware mukwoŋo ma yam oryeme woko pe dok owar en me bedo dakone ma onoŋo en doŋ oballe pi doko dako pa ŋat mukene, pien kit tim macalo meno bedo me kwer i nyim Rwot, wun pe wubikelo bal i kom lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyo botwu me aleyawu." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Ka laco mo pud onyomo nyen, pe bicito woko kacel ki mony, dok pe gibicwale i dog tic mo; en bibedo paco mot pi mwaka acel, wek obed ki yomcwiny gin ki dakone ma onyomo-ni," 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Dano mo pe omi gijeŋ bote min kidi rego nyo nya kidi rego; meno rom ki kwanyo kwo pa dano me ajeŋa. 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Ka ŋatti mo ginoŋo okwalo dano mo ki i kin omege jo Icrael, ce otimo en kit ma gitimo ki opii, nyo ocate woko, ci lakwo meno gibinekone woko; kit meno miyo wubijwero tim marac woko ki i kinwu." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “I kom two dobo wubed ka gwokke matek kun wutimo gin ducu kit ma ajwaka ma Lalevi bititowu; kit ma yam acikogi kwede, wubigwokke ka tiyo kit meno." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Wupo gin ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu otiyo i kom Miriam ki i yo ma onoŋo wua ki i Ejipt. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Ka lawoti mo omako banya mo boti, pe ibicito i ode ka omo gin ma en jeŋo boti." 
Deuteronomy24:11 In ibicuŋ ki woko, ci dano ma omako banya boti-ni bikelo gin ma ojeŋo boti ki woko." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Ka en dano ma lacan, pe ibibuto ki gin ma en ojeŋo boti." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Ka ceŋ mito poto, in ibidwoko bote gin ma ojeŋo-ni wek en obut ki boŋone kun lammi gum; ci bimiyo Rwot Lubaŋawu bineni macalo dano ma kite atir." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Pe ibiburo lapakacani mo ma lacan ma piny oloyo, kadi en bed omeru ma Laicrael nyo dano mo ma i kin lubedo ma gibedo i lobowu, i gaŋiwu," 
Deuteronomy24:15 Ibimiye mucarane i nino ma otiyo iye-ni ma onoŋo ceŋ peya opoto, pien en lacan, en bedo ka paro pire; wek en pe okok i komi bot Rwot ci bedo bal i komi." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Won latin pe gibineko pi bal pa wode, nyo latin bene pe gibineko pi bal pa wonne; dano acel acel gibineko pi balle kikome." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Pe ibal te pido pa labedo mo nyo pa latin kic wek lok oloye, pe iter boŋo pa daa-to me ajeŋa boti." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Ento ibipo ni yam ibedo opii i lobo Ejipt ci Rwot Lubaŋawu okoki woko ‘ki i kunnu, en gin mumiyo aciko ni itim kit meno." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Ka ikayo cam i potoni, ce wii owil ki larita bel mo iweko odoŋ i poto, pe idok cen ka omone; doŋ bibedo pi labedo ki latin kic ki daa-to; wek Rwot Lubaŋawu omii gum i kom tic ducu ma ibitiyo." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Ka ce igoyo yat jeitunini pi coko nyige, pe idok ibek obote; doŋ bibedo pa labedo ki latin kic ki daa-to." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Ka icoko nyig olok ki i potoni, pe idok cen ka beko obote; doŋ bibedo pa labedo ki latin kic ki daa-to." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Ibipo ni yam ibedo opii i lobo Ejipt, engin mumiyo aciko ni itim kumeno." 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Ka laro kop mo tye ikin dano, ka gubino ka ma gipido iye, ce luŋolkop guŋolo kop i kingi kun gituco dano ma pe ki bal, ka giŋolo kop loyo latim bal," 
Deuteronomy25:2 ka dano ma labalo romo agoya, ci laŋolkop miyo en buto piny ci gigoye ki i nyime ki wel odoo muporo kit balle." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Wel odoo twero bedo pyeraŋwen, ento pe okat kenyo, wek pe gigoye ki lwak goco makato meno miyo wucayo ominwu." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Pe itwe dog twon ka tye ka nyono bel me dinone. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Ka ce omego aryo gibedo kacel ce ŋat acel i kingi oto woko ma pe ki wode mo, pe wubiye dano ma welo ma pe ladoggolagi oter dako pa lato. Omin cware aye bilako dako-nu," 
Deuteronomy25:6 ci bedo kwede doko dakone wek onywal kwede litino ka wi ominne, wek nyiŋ ominne pe orweny woko ki i Icrael." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Ento ka laco pe mito lako ci-ominne, ci ci-ominne bicito ka ma ludoŋo me, gaŋ gucokke iye ci wacci, ‘Ywera okwero nywalo wi ominne wek nyiŋe pe orweny woko ki i kin jo Icrael; en pe oye cobo tic pa ywero i koma.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Ka ludoŋo ma i gaŋgi gibilwoŋo laco-nu ci giloko kwede. Ka ce en pud medde ki lokke kun wacci, ‘An pe amito lake,’" 
Deuteronomy25:9 ci-ominne bicito cok bote i nyim ludoŋo ci lunyo war woko ki i tyene, ka ŋulo laa i wane kun wacci, ‘Laco ma okwero nywalo litino ka wi ominne gibitimo kit meno.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Ki nyiŋ dogggolane gibilwoŋo i Icrael ni, ‘Doggola pa dano ma gilunyo war woko ki i tyene.’" 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Ka ce co gitye ka lweny kekengi, ka dako pa ŋat acel onyiko cok ka laro cware ki i ciŋ dano ma tye ka goye-ni, ce ocwalo ciŋe omako kom me co pa laco-ni," 
Deuteronomy25:12 ci ibitoŋo ciŋ dako iŋolo woko, ma kica pe maki i kome." 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Pe ibed ki kidi aryo me pimo jami i kicaani, mapekke ki mayotte." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Pe ibed ki lapor jami aryo i odi, maditte ki matidine." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Ibibedo ki kidi lapim pek pa jami maberre ma romo kakare, ki agwata lapor jami maberre ma romo kakare, wek iri pi kare malac i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Jo ducu ma gitimo gin macalo meno, ki jo ducu ma pe gitiyo gin ma tye atir, gibedo me kwer bot Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Wupo gin ma yam jo Amalek gutimo i komwu i yo i kare ma wua woko ki i Ejipt," 
Deuteronomy25:18 kit ma yam gulwenyo kwede i komwu i yo ca, i kare ma onoŋo wuder, ma komwu ducu oloc woko, kit ma gin guŋolo kwede wi jo ma gudoŋ i ŋewu ma gi goro; gin yam pe gulworo Lubaŋa wacel." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Ka ce Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ omiyo wuywe ki lweny ki merokwu ducu ma orumowu dyere-ni, ki i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyo wucamo me aleyawu, ci wubijwayo jo Amalek woko ki i tam pa dano ducu ma gitye piny i te polo. Wukan lok man i cwinywu." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “I kare ma doŋ wuo i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu me aleyawu, ma doŋ wucamo lobo wubedo iye," 
Deuteronomy26:2 ibikwanyo dul mo i kom gin mukwoŋo cek i kom kit cam ducu ma ikayo ki i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu omii, ibiketo i aduku icito kwede i kabedo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu biyero ka ma biketo nyiŋe bedo iye." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Ibicito bot ajwaka pa Lubaŋa ma tye ka tic i kare meno, iwacce ni, ‘Tin atuco bot Rwot Lubaŋana ni atyeko o i lobo ma yam Rwot okwoŋo pire bot kwarowa ni ebimiyo botwa.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 Ci ajwaka bigamo aduku ki i ciŋ, ci keto piny i nyim keno tyer pa Rwot Lubaŋawu," 
Deuteronomy26:5 “Ci ibidok iye ki i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu ni, ‘Kwarowa yam dano me lobo Aram, ma lamal gaŋ ata. Yam olak ocito wa i Ejipt obedo kunnu ma welgi nok mo; ki kunnu en odoko rok madit ki matek munya mapol." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Jo Ejipt gubedo ka timowa magwa marac twatwal, ma giunowa, giketowa i tic matego me opii." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Ka yam wakok bot Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarowa, ci Rwot owinyo dogwa, oneno kit ma giunowa kwede, ki aroma ticwa, ki atwomwa." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Rwot okwanyowa woko ki i Ejipt pi twero me bade, ki ciŋe ma oryeyo, ki tim ma okelo lworo madwoŋ, ki lwak lanyut ki taŋo." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Okelowa wa i kabedo man, omiyowa lobo-ni, en lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Ci doŋ inen ka tin akelo wi mwaka mua i poto ma imiyo bota; ai Rwot.’ Ka doŋ iketo aduku piny i nyim Rwot Lubaŋani, ci iryebbe piny iwore." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Cwinyi bibedo yom pi jami mabeco ducu ma Rwot Lubaŋani omiyo boti ki bot jo me odi; ci ibimiyo Lulevi ki lubedo ma gibedo i kinwu bene cwinygi obed yom kacel kwedwu. 
Deuteronomy26:12 “I mwaka me adekke, ma en aye mwakame miyo dul acel i kom apar, ibimiyo dul acel me apar me kit cam ducu ma ocek i potoni bot Lulevi, lubedo, litino kic ki mon-to wek gin bene gubed ki cam ma romogi i gaŋiwu ducu. Ka doŋ ityeko miyone botgi," 
Deuteronomy26:13 ci ibiwaco bot Rwot Lubaŋani ni meno, ‘Doŋ atyeko kobo jami maleŋ woko ki i oda, amiyo woko bot Lulevi, lubedo, litino kic ki mon-to kun alubo cikki ducu ma imiyo bota. Pe aturo cikki mo, pe bene wiya owil i komgi." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Pe acamo gin mo i kom dul acel me apar i kare ma atye ka kwero cola, pe akobo gin mo ki i oda ma onoŋo koma ki keni, pe atyero mogo bot tipo pa lato mo; doŋ aworo dogi, in Rwot Lubaŋana, atyeko tiyo gin ducu kit ma yam icika kwede," 
Deuteronomy26:15 Nen piny ki i kabedoni maleŋ-ŋi, nia ki i polo, ci imi gum i kom joni Icrael ki i kom lobo ma imiyowa kit ma yam ikwoŋo kwede bot kwarowa, en lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic.’" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Tin Rwot Lubaŋawu ociko ni wulub cik magi ki gin ma en oŋolo ducu, mumiyo wubigwokke mada ka lubogi ki cwinywu ducu ki tipowu ducu." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Tin doŋ wutuco lok i kom Rwot ni en aye Lubaŋawu, dok ni wubilubo yone ducu kun wugwoko cikke ki gin ma en ociko ducu, dok wubiworo doge." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Dok tin Rwot otuco lok i komwu ni wun aye wu jone kikome," 
Deuteronomy26:19 dok en bipilo wiwu makato rok ducu ma yam en oketo; gibipake piwu, nyiŋe biywek piwu, en bilimo deyo i komwu, dok otuco ni wun wubibedo rok maleŋ pi Rwot Lubaŋawu,” kit ma yam owaco ni.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Moses ki ludoŋo pa jo Icrael guciko lwak kun giwacci, “Wu mak cik ducu ma wacikowu kwede tin," 
Deuteronomy27:2 Dok i kom nino ma wuŋolo iye kulu Jordan pi donyo i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu, wubicibo iye kidi madito ci wupuyo komgi ki opuyu." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Wubicoyo lok me cik magi ducu i kare ma wukato wudonyo i lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu, en aye lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic, kit ma Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarowu, yam ocikowu kwede-ni." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Ka wuŋolo loka Jordan, wubicibo kidi-nu gicuŋ i kom got Ebal, kit ma tin acikowu kwede, dok wubipuyo komgi woko ki opuyu." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Wubicano keno tyer kunnu pi Rwot Lubaŋawu, keno tyer ma gicano ki got; pe gitiŋ nyonyo mo me payo komgi." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Wubitumo gitum awaŋa i wi keno-nu bot Rwot Lubaŋawu," 
Deuteronomy27:7 ka dok wubityero iye gityer lakwecwiny ma wubicamone ki kunnu, ci cwinywu bibedo yom i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu," 
Deuteronomy27:8 Wubicoyo lok me cik man ducu i kom kidi ma wubicibogi kunnu maber ma kwanone yot.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 Moses ki ajwagi ma Lulevi guwaco ki jo Icrael ducu ni, “Wuliŋ mot, wuwiny, wun jo Icrael. I nino ma tin aye wudoko iye lwak pa Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Mumiyo doŋ wuwor dog Rwot Lubaŋawu kun wumako cik mere ki gin ma en ociko ducu ma acikowu kwede tin-ni.” 
Deuteronomy27:11 Moses ociko lwak i nino meno kikome kun wacci," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Ka doŋ wutyeko kato loka Jordan, jo magi gibicuŋ i wi got Gerijim ka gilamo gum i kom lwak: jo Cimeon, Levi, Juda, Icakar, Yucepu ki Benjamin;" 
Deuteronomy27:13 ki jo magi gibicuŋ i wi got Ebal i kare ma giceno dano: jo Reuben, Gad, Acer, Jabulon, Dan ki Naputali," 
Deuteronomy27:14 Ci Lulevi gibiwaco lok man bot jo Icrael ducu ki dwan maloŋo ni. 
Deuteronomy27:15 “‘Cen opot i kom dano ma otiyo cal Jok apaya mo nyo cal jok nyonyo ma giliyo aliya ma gin me kwer bot Rwot, ma ladiro otiyo ki ciŋe ci ocibo me awora i muŋ.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “‘Cen opot i kom dano ma pe woro wonne ki minne.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:17 “ ‘Cen opot i kom dano ma okobo got ma poko waŋ lobo pa lawote woko.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:18 “ ‘Cen opot i kom ‘dano ma opaŋo wi lawaŋeoto oweko yo.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:19 “ ‘Cen opot i kom dano ma obalo te pido pa labedo, nyo pa latin kic, nyo pa daa-to oweko lok oloye.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “ ‘Cen opot i kom dano ma obuto ki ci-wonne, pien oketo lewic i kom wonne.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “ ‘Cen opot i kom dano ma obuto ki lee mo.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:22 “Cen opot i kom dano ma obuto Ki laminne, kadi nya pa wonne, kadi nya pa minne.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “ ‘Cen opot i kom dano ma obuto ki marone.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:24 “ ‘Cen opot i kom dano ma oneko lawote i muŋ ali.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:25 “ ‘Cen opot i kom dano ma giwilo ki lim me Labal te pido pa dano ma pe obalo, miyo gineke nono.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Cen opot i kom dano ma pe moko lok ducu me cik man kun lubogi.’ Lwak ducu gibigamo ni, ‘Amen.’" 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Ka wubiworo dog Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma wugwokke ka lubo cikke ducu ma acikowu kwede tin-ni, ci Rwot Lubaŋawu bipilo wiwu makato rok ducu ma wi lobo-ni," 
Deuteronomy28:2 ci miyo gum man ducu bipoto i komwu ci moko i komwu ka ce wuworo dog Rwot Lubaŋawu. 
Deuteronomy28:3 Wubibedo ki gum i gaŋiwu dok wubibedo ki gum ipottiwu. 
Deuteronomy28:4 Gum bibedo i kom litino ma wubinywalogi, ki i kom cam ma bicek i pottiwu; i kom litino dyaŋiwu ki i kom litino romiwu ki dyegiwu." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Gum bibedo i kom adukuwu ma wuyeyo ki cam i kare me kac, gum bibedo i kom otakowu me myeno kwon." 
Deuteronomy28:6 Gum bipoto i komwu ka wudonyo i ot, ci gum bipoto i komwu ka wukato woko." 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Rwot biloyo lumerokwu ducu ma bibino ka lweny i komwu, miyo wubinekogi woko ki i nyimwu. Gibimol ka lweny i komwu ki i yo acel, giriŋo giket woko i yo abiro." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “Rwot Lubaŋawu biciko gum poto i kom derowu ducu, ki i kom gin ducu ma wubitiyo; bimiyowu gum i lobo ma en bimiyo botwu-ni." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Rwot bimokowu me bedo lwakke maleŋ kit ma yam okwoŋo kwede botwu’, ka ce wumako cik pa Rwot Lubaŋawu, kun wulubo yone ducu." 
Deuteronomy28:10 “Jo ma i wi lobo ducu gibineno ka gilwoŋowu ki nyiŋ Rwot, ci gibilworowu." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Rwot bimiyo wulony ki lwak jami mapol; bimiyo wunywalo litino mapol bimiyo limwu makwo nya madwoŋ ma pottiwu bene ceko cam mabup. 
Deuteronomy28:12 Rwot biyabo polo piwu, ma en ot kano limme maber, ci miyo kot cwer i lobowu i karene, ci miyo gum i kom tic ducu ma wutiyo. Jo me rok mapol gibimako banya botwu ento wun pe wubimako banya mo.”" 
Deuteronomy28:13 Rwot bimiyo wubedo jo ma telo nyim, pe jo ma coko ter; wubibedo ka cito anyim ma pe doŋ wudok cen, tekke wubedo ka lubo cik pa Rwot Lubaŋawu ma acikowu kwede tin-ni kun wugwokke ka cobogi maber," 
Deuteronomy28:14 ma pe wulokke wukwero lubo lok ducu ma acikowu kwede tin ci wuŋak wudok yo tuŋ acuc nyo tuŋ acam pi lubo kor lubaŋa mukene ki pi worogi. 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Ka ce pe wuworo dog Rwot Lubaŋawu nyo pe wugwokke ka lubo lok ma en ociko ducu ki cikke ma acikowu kwede tin-ni, ci lwak cen magi ducu bipoto i komwu ci moko i komwu." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Cen bibedo i komwu i gaŋiwu dok cen bibedo i komwu i pottiwu. 
Deuteronomy28:17 Cen bibedo i kom adukuwu ma wuyeyo ki cam i kare me kac, cen bibedo i kom otakowu me myeno kwon." 
Deuteronomy28:18 Cen bibedo i kom litino ma wubinywalogi, ki i kom cam ma bicek i pottiwu, i kom litino dyaŋiwu ki i kom litino romiwu ki dyegiwu." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Cen bibedo i komwu ka wudonyo i ot, ci cen bibedo i komwu ka wukato woko." 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Ka ce wubwoto Rwot, ma wubedo ka tiyo gin marac, ci Rwot bicwalo cen i komwu bibaŋowu woko ci bijukowu i gin ducu ma wutemo tiyone nio ka wuto wutum woko oyotoyot." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Rwot bimiyo two gemo marac poto i komwu nio ka bityekowu woko ki i lobo ma wubicito iye ka camone. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Rwot bipwodowu ki two aona opiyo, ki aburu ki two akwota, ki lyeto madwoŋ; bicwalo oro malyet mada, ci miyowu kal mubwarre ki mupur woko." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Polo ma tye ka wiwu bibedo macalo mola, ki piny ma ka tyenwu bibedo tek macalo nyonyo." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Rwot bimiyo apulu ki apwa aye cwer ma ka kot i lobowu kun a ki malo duny i komwu nio ka otyekowu woko. 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Rwot bimiyo lumerokwu giloyowu woko. Wubilubo yo acel ka wucito ka lweny i komgi, ka wuriŋo wuket i yo abiro ki i nyimgi. Lworo bimako ker ducu ma wi lobo pi gin ma bitimme i komwu." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Komwu muto-ni bibedo cam pa winyo ducu me polo, ki pa lee timgu; pe bibedo dano mo ma ryemogi." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Rwot bipwodowu ki odeke kit ma yam otimo i kom jo Ejipt, ki bur adola ki nyac ki gwenyo, ma caŋone biloyowu:" 
Deuteronomy28:28 Rwot bipwodowu ki two apoya ki to-waŋ-gu, dok bibaŋo tamwu woko." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Wubipanne apana i dyeceŋ macalo lawaŋoto paŋŋe i colpiny, pe wubilimo gum mo i wot mewu ducu; gibibedo ka unowu ki yako jamiwu jwijwi, dano ma bikonyowu bibedo pe," 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Ibitoŋo keny i kom nyako, ci ŋat mukene aye bibuto kwede; ibigero ot ci pe ibibedo iye; ibipito poto olok ci pe ibicamo nyige." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Gibineko twonni i nyimi ma ineno ci pe ibibilo riŋone; gibimayo kanani ki i nyimi gitero woko ki tek, pe gibidwokone boti, gibimiyo romini bot lumerokki, ŋat mo ma konyi bibedo pe," 
Deuteronomy28:32 Awobeni ki anyirani gibimiyogi bot jo me rok mukene ma kun waŋi nenogi ci piny loyi i komgi matal, pe ibibedo ki twero me geŋogi wot." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Rok mo ma yam pe iŋeyo aye bicamo gin ma ocek i potoni pi tic matek ducu ma iyelle iye. Gibiuni auna keken, gibidiyi piny jwijwi," 
Deuteronomy28:34 miyo ibibaŋŋe woko pi gin ma ineno ki waŋi. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Rwot bipwodi ki odeke mudet i coŋi ki i tyeni ma caŋone biloyo dano; odeke bimwono komi woko liweŋ cakke i tyeni o kwede wa i wii. 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Rwot biterowu kacel ki kabakawu ma wuketo me loyowu i rok mukene ma yam peya wuŋeyo kadi wa kwarowu bene pe guŋeyo; wubiworo lwak lubaŋa mukene kunnu ma gipayo calgi ki bao nyo ki got. 
Deuteronomy28:37 Wubidoko gin ma kelo lworo i kin rok ducu ka ma Rwot biterowu iye, ci gibitiyo ki nyiŋwu macalo carolok ki lok aboka:" 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Ibitiŋo lwak kodi madwoŋ itero i poto, ento ibicoko iye cam matidi mo, pien bonyo bicamo, tyeko woko." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Ibipito potti olok, iyubo maber, ento pe ibimato kono vinone, dok pe ibicoko nyige, pien kwidi bicamogi woko ducu." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Ibibedo ki yadi jeituni i dye loboni ducu, ento pe ibiwirre ki moone, pien nyige bio woko piny." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Ibinywalo awobe ki anyira, ento pe gibibedo joni, pien gibiterogi woko i opii." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Yadini ducu ki gin ma ocek i potoni bonyo aye bicamone woko. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Lubedo ma gibedo i kinwu gibidoko dito giloyowu, dok wigi bibedo doŋo i komwu, ento wun wubimedde ki doko jo matitino mogo." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Gin aye dok bimiyo wumako banya botgi, wun pe wubimiyo gimako banya ki botwu. Gin aye gibibedo jo ma telo nyim, wun wubicoko ter." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Lwak cen man ducu bipoto i komwu kun lubo korwu, makowu, nio ka bityekowu woko, pien onoŋo wukwero winyo dog Rwot Lubaŋawu, pe wulubo cikke ki gin ma yam ocikowu kwede ducu," 
Deuteronomy28:46 Can magi gibibedo lanyut ki taŋo botwu ki bot likwayowu matwal," 
Deuteronomy28:47 pien yam pe wutiyo bot Rwot Lubaŋawu ki yomcwiny pi lwak jami ma en omiyowu-ni. 
Deuteronomy28:48 Pienno wubitic ki lumerokwu ma Rwot bicwalo ka lweny i komwu. Kec ki orwo pii binekowu, wubibedo munero ma can jami ducu omakowu, ci Rwot biriyo okol nyonyo i ŋutwu nio ka otyekowu woko ducu." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Rwot bikelo rok mo i komwu mua ki ka mabor, nia wa ki i agikki lobo, ma gidwir macalo ocur ma tuk, en aye rok mo ma pe wuŋeyo lebgi." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Gin rok ma waŋgi tek ma pe biparo pi woro jo, muti, kadi wa timo kica i kom jo matino." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Gibicamo litino dyaŋiwu woko, ki cam mucek i potowu nio ka gityekowu woko; pe kalwu mo doŋ, nyo koŋo vino nyo moo, gibiweko kadi wa litino dyaŋiwu ki litino romi ki dyegiwu, miyo wubito woko liweŋ," 
Deuteronomy28:52 Gibirumowu woko i gaŋiwu ducu nio ka cel maboco ki gogo ma wugenoni gupoto woko piny ki i lobowu ducu; monygi birumowu woko i gaŋiwu ducu ma oromo dye lobowu ducu ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyowu. 
Deuteronomy28:53 “Wubicamo riŋo kom litinowu, en aye riŋo kom awobewu ki anyirawu ma Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyo botwu, i kare ma girumo gaŋwu woko, i kare me can madwoŋ ma lumerokwu gibiketo i komwu." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Laco ma yam kome okwe mot ki kuc waŋe bicido woko i kom camme miyo twono ominne woko, ki dakone ma en maro, ki litinone mogo ma pud gudoŋ;" 
Deuteronomy28:55 pe biye ni ŋat mo i kingi onywak camo kwede riŋo kom litinone ma en tye ka camone, pien pe tye ‘gin mo mudoŋ bote, i kare me rumo gaŋ ki i kare me can madwoŋ ma lumerokwu gibiketo i komwu i gaŋiwu ‘ducu." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Dako bene ma yam kome okwe mot ki kuc, ma yam lworo keto tyene piny i ŋom pien yam gigwoke mada, waŋe bicido woko i kom cware ma en maro, ki i kom wode ki nyare," 
Deuteronomy28:57 bitwonogi byero ma okatti ki i kin tyene ki riŋo kom litino ma en onywalo, pien bicamogi ki i muŋ pi can jami ducu, i kare me rumo gaŋ ki i kare me can madwoŋ ma lumerokwu gibiketo i komwu i gaŋ mewu ducu." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Ka pe wugwokke ka lubo lok ducu ma i cik man ma gicoyo i buk man wek wubed ka lworo nyiŋ me deyo ki mapek pa Rwot, Lubaŋawu," 
Deuteronomy28:59 ci Rwot dok bikelo atwom madit i komwu ki i kom likwayowu, en atwom malik ma bedo nakanaka, ki two magwa ma ri nakanaka." 
Deuteronomy28:60 En bikelo i komwu kit two ducu pa jo Ejipt ma yam wubedo ka lworogi; twone biniaŋ i komwu matek," 
Deuteronomy28:61 Dok kit two ducu ki kit atwom ducu ma pe gicoyogi i buk man me cik Rwot aye bikelogi i komwu, nio ka otyekowu woko liweŋ." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Kadi onoŋo yam wunya mapol macalo lwak lakalatwe me polo, gibiweko welwu doŋ manok mo, pien pe wubedo ka woro dog Rwot Lubaŋawu." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Kit ma yam cwiny Rwot obedo yom i komwu omiyo otimowu maber-ri dok omiyo wunya mapol, kit meno bene cwiny Rwot dok bibedo yom pi kelowu topiny ma bityekowu woko liweŋ; ci bikwanyowu woko ki i lobo ma doŋ wucok donyo iye ka camone." 
Deuteronomy28:64 “Rwot bikeyowu woko ata i kin rok ducu, cakke i agikki lobo tuŋ cel o kwede i agikkine mukene tuŋ cel. Wubiworo lwak lubaŋa mukene kunnu ma gipayo calgi ki bao nyo ki got, ma yam pe wuŋeyo kadi wa kwarowu bene pe guŋeyo." 
Deuteronomy28:65 I kin lurok magi pe wubinoŋo iye kuc mo, dok pe wubinoŋo iye ka yweyo tyenwu, ento Rwot bimiyo cwinywu myel kunnu, wanwu bimyeno, tipo komwu bito woko lirut." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Cwinywu biŋabbe aŋaba pi kwowu me anyim; wubibedo ki lworo madwoŋ dyewor ki dyeceŋ, ma pe wutye ki gen mo i kwowu." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Odiko wubiwacci, ‘Kono nene obedo otyeno!’ dok otyeno wubiwacci, ‘Kono nene obedo odiko!’ pi lworo madwoŋ i cwinywu pi gin ma tye anyim ma waŋwu bineno." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Dok Rwot bidwokowu cen i Ejipt kun giterowu i mel, wubidok i wot ma yam aciko ni pe dok wubinwoyone-ni. Wubimine kekenwu kunnu bot lumerokwu kun wucatte ni giwilwu wubed opiigi ki anecagi, ento dano mo pe ma biwilowu.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Man aye lok me gicikke ma yam Rwot ociko ki Moses ma oketo i kingi ki jo Icrael i lobo Moab, ma omedo i kom gicikke ma yam oketo i kingi i wi got Koreb." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Moses olwoŋo jo Icrael ducu ci owaco botgi ni, “Doŋ wutyeko neno gin ducu ma yam Rwot otiyo i lobo Ejipt ma wuneno ki waŋwu, gin ma en otimo i kom Parao ki i kom luticce ki i kom lobone ducu." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Wun yam wuneno ki waŋwu kit ma Rwot otemo kwede cwinye ki lwak, lanyut ki taŋo madito." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Ento Rwot peya omiyowu cwiny me niaŋ, nyo waŋ me neno, nyo it me winyo nio wa onyoo." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Doŋ atelo wiwu i dye tim mwaka pyeraŋwen ma boŋowu pe guti ki i komwu, ki war tyenwu bene pe guti woko ki i tyenwu." 
Deuteronomy29:6 I kare meno onoŋo pe wutye ki kwon me acama, pe wumato koŋo vino nyo kono makecce; meno aye oweko wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot Lubaŋawu," 
Deuteronomy29:7 Ka doŋ wuo i kabedo-ni, ci Cikon kabaka me Kecbon ki Og kabaka me Bacan gubino ka romo kwedwa i lweny, ento waloyogi woko," 
Deuteronomy29:8 ci wamayo lobogi woko wamiyo obedo ginaleya pa jo pa Reuben, ki pa jo pa Gad, ki pa nucu kaka pa Manace." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Pi meno myero wugwokke ka lubo lok ducu me gicikke man, wek gumkom omakwu i kom gin ducu ma wutiyo." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Tin wun ducu wucuŋ i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawu: ludito wi kakawu, ludoŋowu, ludito ticwu ki co ducu pa jo Icrael," 
Deuteronomy29:11 litinowu ki mon mewu ki lubedo ma gibedo i gonywu ma gin aye lubar yenwu ki lutwom piiwu. 
Deuteronomy29:12 Wucuŋ kany wek wun ducu wukwoŋŋe pi donyo i gicikke man ma Rwot Lubaŋawu oketo i kinwu ki en tin," 
Deuteronomy29:13 wek en omi wubed jone tin, wek en obed Lubaŋawu, kit ma yam ocikke kwede botwu-ni, ki kit ma yam olwoŋo kwede bot kwarowu Abraim, Icaka ki Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Pe aketo kwoŋ man ki gicikke man kwedwu keken," 
Deuteronomy29:15 ento okwako wa dano ma pe gitye kany kwedwa tin ma rom ki wan ducu ma wacuŋ kany i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawa tin. 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Wun wuŋeyo kit ma yam wabedo kwede i lobo Ejipt, kit ma wawoto wabino kwede kun wawok ki i dye rok mapol;" 
Deuteronomy29:17 dok wuneno gin me kwer ma gitye kwede ducu, cal lubaŋagi me bao ki me got, me ryal ki me jabu;" 
Deuteronomy29:18 Wugwokke wek laco mo nyo dako mo, nyo doggolawu mo, nyo kakawu mo pe onen i kinwu ma cwinye olokke oa woko i kom Rwot Lubaŋawa, ci okobo ocito ka woro lubaŋa mogo pa rok meno ducu, wek i kinwu pe onen iye dano mo ma rom ki lwit yat ma nyako kwir ki nyige makec." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Gwok nyo dano macalo meno ka owinyo kwoŋ man ki gicikke man ci lamo gum i kome kene i cwinye kun wacci, ‘An gira abibedo ki kuc, kadi bed cwinya nwaŋ ma alubo yona kena.’ Kit meno miyo gijwero gin maber ki gin maracce woko kacel." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Rwot pe bitimo dano macalo meno kica, ento kiniga pa Rwot ki nyekone aye bidunyo yito i kome, ki lok me ceno dano ma gicoyo i buk man bimoko i kome matwal, Rwot bijwayo nyiŋe woko ki i te polo." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Rwot bipoko en woko kene ki i kin kaka pa jo Icrael ducu, ci bolo can mapek i kome ma rwatte ki lok ducu me ceno dano ma i gicikke ma gicoyo i buk man me cik." 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Dok likwayowu ma gibilubowu, litinowu ma gibileyo ka tyenwu, ki lurok ma gua ki i lobo mabor, ka gibineno lwak aroma ducu ma opoto i lobowu ki lwak two ma Rwot omiyo omako dano," 
Deuteronomy29:23 dok ka gibineno lobowu ducu mac obalo, kun odoŋ gweŋ calfa ma mac olenyo, ki kado keken, ma pe gicoyo iye kodi mo, ma gin mo pe doŋo iye, ma lum pe lot iye, lobo muballe woko ma rom ki Codom ki Gomora ki Adma ki Jeboim, ma yam Rwot obalo woko ki kiniga ki akecane," 
Deuteronomy29:24 ada, ka guneno man ducu gibiwacci, ‘Piŋo Rwot otimo lobo-ni kit man? Lyeto me kiniga madwoŋ ma rom manni te lokke aŋo?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Ci dano gibigamo ni, ‘Gin mumiyo otimo kit meno pien guweko lubo gicikke pa Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarogi woko, ma ocikke iye kwedgi i kare ma okwanyogi woko ki i Ejipt," 
Deuteronomy29:26 ci guyeŋ gucito ka woro lwak lubaŋa mukene ki ryebbe piny i nyimgi, lwak lubaŋa ma onoŋo yam pe giŋeyo, ma yam pe gimiyo botgi me awora;" 
Deuteronomy29:27 mumiyo kiniga omako Rwot i kom lobo man, ma okelo iye lwak lok ducu me ceno dano ma gicoyo i buk man." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Rwot oputo lwitgi woko ki i lobogi pi kinigane ki akecane ki akemone madwoŋ, ka obayogi woko wa i lobo mukene, macalo tye kwede wa onyooni.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Rwot Lubaŋawu tye ki muŋŋe; ento gin ma doŋ oyabo omiyo botwa doŋ bedo mewa ki pa likwayowa matwal, wek walub lok ducu ma i cik man." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Ka gin man ducu doŋ opoto i komwu, gum ki lok me ceno dano ma atyeko ketone i nyimwu-ni, ka wupo pire ki i kin rok ducu ka ma Rwot Lubaŋawu yam ocwalowu iye-ni" 
Deuteronomy30:2 ce wudwogo cen bot Rwot Lubaŋawu, wun ki likwayowu, ci wucako woro doge i lok ducu ma acikowu kwede tin-ni ki cwinywu ducu ki tipowu ducu," 
Deuteronomy30:3 ci Rwot Lubaŋawu bidwoko gum mewu botwu; en dok bicokowu woko ki i kin rok ducu ka ma yam okeyowu iye-ni. 
Deuteronomy30:4 Kadi wa jowu ma obayogi ka mabor wa i agikki te polo, Rwot Lubaŋawu bicokogi woko ki kunnu; en biomowu woko ki kunnu." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Rwot Lubaŋawu bikelowu i lobo ma yam kwarowu gucamo-ni wek wun bene wucam obed mewu. Lubaŋa-bimiyo wubedo ki lwak lonyo mabeco, kun wunya mapol makato kwarowu." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyo wubedo jo mulirre i cwinywu, wun ki likwayowu bene, wek wumar Rwot Lubaŋawu ki cwinywu ducu ki tipowu ducu wek wubed makwo." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Rwot Lubaŋawu biketo lok magi me ceno dano I kom lumonewu ki lumerokwu ma guunowu," 
Deuteronomy30:8 ci wun dok wubiworo dog Rwot kun wugwoko cikke ducu ma acikowu kwede tin-ni. 
Deuteronomy30:9 Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyo wubedo ki jami mabeco madwoŋ mada ma wubinoŋo pi ticwu; wubibedo ki litino mapol, limwu makwo binya mapol bene, potowu biceko cam mabup, pien cwiny Rwot dok bibedo yom pi miyowu lonyo ki jami mabeco, kit ma yam cwinye obedo yom i kom kwarowu-ni," 
Deuteronomy30:10 Ka ce wubiworo dog Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma wugwoko cikke ki gin ma ociko ducu ma gicoyo i buk man me cik, ka ce wudwogo cen bot Rwot Lubaŋawu ki cwinywu ducu ki tipowu ducu, ci Lubaŋa bimiyowu gum man." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Pien cik ma acikowu kwede tin-ni pe tek twatwal ma cobone loyowu, dok pe tye ka mabor kwedwu." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Pe tye wa i polo, ma kono omiyo wuwacci, ‘Aŋa ma bicito ka omone botwa ki malo i polo kuca, wek okel botwa ka wek wawiny lokke’ walubi?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Dok pe tye wa loka nam, ma kono omiyo wuwacci, ‘Aŋa ma bicito piwa wa loka nam kuca, wek okel botwa ka wek wawiny lokke walubi?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Ento lokke tye cok kwedwu; wumako doŋ i cwinywu, ci wubedo ka tucone ki dogwu, miyo wutwero lubone." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Nen maber ni, tin atyeko keto i nyimwu kwo ki lonyo ki to ki keckom." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Ka ce wuworo cik pa Rwot Lubaŋawu ma ocikowu kwede tin-ni, wek wumar Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma wulubo yone kun wugwoko cikke ki gin ma en ociko nyo oŋolo ducu, ci wubikwo dok wubinya mapol, dok Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyowu gum i lobo ma wubidonyo iye ka camone-ni." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Ento ka ce cwinywu odok cen ka ryebbe i nyim lubaŋa mukene ki tiyo botgi ma wukwero winyo dog Rwot," 
Deuteronomy30:18 atuco atir botwu tin ni wubito wutum woko; pe wubiri pi kare malac i lobo ma wubecito iye loka Jordan ka camone-ni. 
Deuteronomy30:19 Alwoŋo polo ki lobo me bedo lucaden i komwu tin, ni, atyeko keto i nyimwu kwo ki to, gum ki lok me ceno dano; mumiyo wuyer kwo wek wun ki likwayowu wubed makwo," 
Deuteronomy30:20 ma kun wumaro Rwot Lubaŋawu, wuworo doge ci wumoko i kome matek; en aye kelo kwo botwu, ci miyo wuri pi kare malac, wek wubed i lobo ma yam Rwot okwoŋo pire bot kwarowu Abraim, Icaka ki Yakobo ni ebimiyogi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Moses dok omedde ki waco lok magi bot jo Icrael ducu. 
Deuteronomy31:2 Owaco botgi ni, “An mwaka me ditta doŋ romo miya ki pyeraboro tin, ci pe doŋ aromo wot ki dwogo kit ma iya mito. Rwot otyeko waco bota ni pe abikato loka Jordan." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Rwot Lubaŋawu kikome aye doŋ bitelo nyimwu wa loka ca. En bityeko rok magi woko ducu ki i nyimwu, ci wubicamo lobogi; ki Yocwa aye doŋ bikato loka ca ka telo wiwu kit ma doŋ Rwot owaco-ni." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Rwot bitimogi kit ma yam otimo i kom Cikon ki Og ma luker pa jo Amor ki i kom lobogi i kare ma otyekogi kwede woko-ni. 
Deuteronomy31:5 Rwot bimiyo gipoto i ciŋwu, wun wubitimogi ma lubo cik ducu ma atyeko cikowu kwede-ni." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Wubed oteka ma cwinywu nwaŋ; pe wulwor, pe atiba opot i komwu pigi, pien Rwot Lubaŋawu aye biwot kwedwu, pe bibwotowu ata, pe biwekowu wudoŋ kenwu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Lacen Moses olwoŋo Yocwa ci owaco bote ki i nyim jo Icrael ducu ni, “Bed oteka ma cwinyi nwaŋ, pien ibicito ki lwak man wa ilobo ma yam Rwot okwoŋo pire bot kwarogi ni ebimiyogi-ni; in aye ibimiyo gicamo doko megi." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Rwot aye bi telo nyimi, en bibedo kwedi, pe bibwoti ata, pe biweki keni. Pe ilwor, cwinyi pe opoti.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Moses ocoyo cik man ducu ci omiyo bot ajwagi ma gin likwayo pa Levi, ma yam gitiŋo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot, ki bot ludoŋo ducu pa jo Icrael," 
Deuteronomy31:10 Ocikogi ni, “I ŋe mwaka abiro abiro, i kare ma giciko pire ni obed mwaka me weko banya, i nino me Bolo," 
Deuteronomy31:11 ma noŋo jo Icrael ducu gubino i nyim Rwot Lubaŋagi i kabedo ma en biyerone, wubikwano iye cik man i nyim jo Icrael ducu wek guwiny." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Wugur lwak kacel, co wa ki mon ki litino, ki lubedo ma gibedo i gaŋiwu, wek guwiny ci gupwony lworo Rwot Lubaŋawu, gugwokke ka lubo lok ducu me cik man," 
Deuteronomy31:13 ka wek litinogi ma peya guŋeyo lokke guwiny ci gupwony lworo Rwot Lubaŋawu, i kare ducu ma wubedo i lobo ma wucito iye loka Jordan ka camone-ni.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Dok Rwot owaco ki Moses ni, “Nen, nino ma ibito iye doŋ onyiko cok. Lwoŋ Yocwa ci wucuŋ kwede i kema me rwatte wek acike.” Ci Moses ki Yocwa gucito gucuŋ i kema me rwatte," 
Deuteronomy31:15 Rwot ocako nen i kema ki wir me pol; ci wir me pol ocuŋ okemo doggola me kema. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Nen, in doŋ icok cito ka yweyo bot kwarowu; ci lwak man gibitwaro gicito ka woro lubaŋa mogo ma welo ki tim kwele kwele, i lobo ma gicto ka bedo iye i kingi-ni. Gibibwota woko dok gibituro gicikkena ma atyeko ketone i kinwa wan kwedgi." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Dok kiniga bi maka i komgi i kare meno, ci abitenyogi woko ma akano waŋa woko pe anenogi, miyo gibityekogi woko liweŋ, Gin maraco-gu ki lwak ayela mapol bipoto i komgi, mumiyo i kare meno gibiwacci, ‘Gin mumiyo can man opoto i komwa, pien Lubaŋawa doŋ pe tye i kinwa.’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Abikano waŋa woko i kare meno adada pi lwak balgi ducu ma gubedo ka timo, pien gudok woko cen bot lwak lubaŋa mukene." 
Deuteronomy31:19 Kombeddi doŋ ico wer man wek ipwony ki jo Icrael. Ket wer man i doggi, wek obed cadenna i kom jo Icrael." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Pien ka akelogi i lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic ma yam akwoŋo pire ni abimiyo bot kwarogi, ka gucamo ci guyeŋ gucwe kwede, ci gibidok cen bot lubaŋa mogo mukene. Gibiworogi ma kun gicaya woko, gituro gicikkena," 
Deuteronomy31:21 Dok ka gin maraco mapol ki lwak ayela mapol opoto i komgi, ci wer man bicuŋ i nyimgi me bedo caden botgi, pien likwayogi pud gibiwero, wigi pe biwil iye. Pien aŋeyo tam ma gutyeko yubone ma onoŋo peya aterogi i lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire ni abimiyogi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Moses ocoyo wer meno i nino meno kikome, ocako pwonyo ki jo Icrael." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Ka Rwot ociko Yocwa wod pa Nun kun waco bote ni, “Bed oteka ma cwinyi nwaŋ, pien in aye ibitero likwayo pa Icrael i lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire ni abimiyogi-ni, ci an abibedo kwedi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Ka yam Moses otyeko coyo lok me cik man ducu i buk nio ka otum woko ducu," 
Deuteronomy31:25 ci ociko Lulevi ma gitiŋo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot," 
Deuteronomy31:26 owacci, “Wugam buk man me cik, wuket i ŋet canduk me gicikke pa Rwot Lubaŋawu, wek obed kunnu me bedo caden i komwu." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Pien aŋeyo kit jemowu ki kit ma ŋutwu nwaŋ kwede ducu, Nen, ka tin dok wujemo i kom Rwot ma an pud atye kwedwu ma akwo, ci jemowu bibedo dwoŋ ma rom mene ka doŋ ato woko?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Wumi ludoŋo ma i kakawu ducu ki ludito ticwu gugurre kacel ka doŋ awac lok magi guwiny. ka doŋ alwoŋ polo ki lobo wek obed caden i komgi. 
Deuteronomy31:29 Pien aŋeyo adada ni, Ka doŋ ato, wubitimo tim aranyi; ci wubilokke, wubibarre woko ki i yo ma acikowu kwede. Gum marac bipoto i komwu i kare me anyim, pien wubitimo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot kun wumiyo kiniga make ki gin ma wutiyo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Moses okwano lok ma i wer man nio ka otyeko ducu, kun lwak jo Icrael ducu ma gugurre kacel gubedo ka winyone:" 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Wucik itwu, wun polo ducu, an doŋ abiloko; wek lobo bene owiny lok ducu ma i doga," 
Deuteronomy32:2 Lubaŋa omi pwonnya ocwer macalo kot, omi lokka oton macalo toyo, macalo kot ma ŋido i kom lum alita macalo kot ma wo i kom doo." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Pien abituco nyiŋ Rwot. Wutit dit pa Lubaŋawa! 
Deuteronomy32:4 “En aye Got, ma ticce ducu cobbe kakare; gin ducu ma en tiyo tye atir. En Lubaŋa ma lagen, ma pe ki bal mo; kite atir, gin ma en timo ducu tye maber." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Gutimo tim aranyi i kome; pe doŋ gin litinone, pien komgi ki mwonyo; gin aye yalwak muŋak mugom woko." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Wun mono dok wuculo Rwot kit meno, wun jo mamiŋ ki rok ma pe ki ryeko? Pe en aye wonwu ma oketowu? Pe en aye lacwec ma omiyo wutye makwo?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Po i kom kare ma yam con ca, tam pi lwak mwaka pa yalwak macon. Peny woru, ci binyutti maber, ki ludoŋowu bene gibititti." 
Deuteronomy32:8 I kare ma En Mamalo Twal yam omiyo ki rok ducu ginaleyagi, i kare ma opoko kin litino pa dano, yam opoko waŋ lobo pa rok acel acel kun lubo wei awobe pa Lubaŋa." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Pien lwak pa Rwot gin aye dulle, jo pa Yakobo aye gipiny ma gipoko bote." 
Deuteronomy32:10 “Yam onoŋo Yakobo i dye tim aroo, i lobo kweyo marac ma dano pe iye; okwake ki bade kun gwoke maber ogwoke macalo toŋ waŋe kikome." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Macalo ocur ma pwonyo litinone ki tuk kun teŋo bwome ma oyaro ka wigi, yaro bwome, jologi kwede, ci tiŋogi ki kono lacar madito," 
Deuteronomy32:12 Rwot kene aye yam telo wi jone, kun onoŋo lubaŋa pa lurok mo pe ka ŋete." 
Deuteronomy32:13 “Omiyo guriŋo i wi cere mutiŋŋe malo i lobo, opitogi ki cam mucek i poto; omiyogi doto moo kic ma noŋŋe i wi got, ki noto moo yaa mucek i dye pata got matek." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Omiyogi boto cak lukulu pa dyaŋi, ki mato cak ma libo bene pa dyegigi; gucamo moo litino romi ki nyogi romi, ki riŋo dyaŋi me Bacan ki riŋo dyegi, kacel ki moko ŋano mabecone twatwal, gumato kono vino makwar me pig olok." 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Ento Jecurun ocwe matek, ma loyone tek; jo pa Rwot gucwe ma komgi pek, muliŋŋe. Gubwoto Lubaŋa ma Lacwecgi woko, gucayo Got mularogi-ni." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Guworo lubaŋa ‘ma welo-gu mumiyo nyeko omake, guŋeto cwinye ki tim marac me kwer omiyo kiniga omake." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Gutumo tum bot jogi ma pe gin lubaŋa, bot lubaŋa mogo ma yam pe giŋeyo, bot lubaŋa mogo manyen ma obino lacen ma yam kwarogi pe gulworo," 
Deuteronomy32:18 Gin pe guparo Got ma onywalogi-ni, wigi owil woko i kom Lubaŋa ma Wongi-ni," 
Deuteronomy32:19 “Rwot oneno ci ocayogi woko, pien awobene ki anyirane guŋeto cwinye." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Owacci, ‘Abikano waŋa woko ki botgi, wek dok anen kit ma gibitum kwede; pien gin yalwak muŋak woko ata, gin litino ma pe lugen." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Gumiyo nyeko omaka i kom gin ata ma pe lubaŋa; guŋeto cwinya ki cal jogi acweyagu. An bene abimiyo nyeko makogi i komji ata; abimiyo rok mo mamiŋ ŋeto cwinygi," 
Deuteronomy32:22 Pien kinigana doŋ omoko mac woko, doŋ tye ka waŋ wa i te bur matut melyel, kun waŋo lobo ki gin ma ocek iye ducu, ka dok cwinyo mac waŋ wa te guti me godi." 
Deuteronomy32:23 “‘Abicoko can aguro i wigi; abityeko aterona woko i komgi. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Kec aye bimiyo gijony liŋok, dok awaŋogi ki lyeto ki two gemo maraco atyekogi woko liweŋ; abicwalo lak ŋuu i komgi ki kwir pa gin ma lak alaka i ŋom." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Pala lucwan bityekogi woko i tim, lworo bibedo wa i kicika ot; pala bityeko litino co ki anyira, litino ma dot wa ki jo ma wigi ki lwar." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Kono awacci, “Abikeyowu woko ka ma boco, abimiyo nyiŋgi pe doŋ gipo iye i kin dano,”" 
Deuteronomy32:27 ento alworo lumerok wek pe guŋet cwinya, wek lumonegi pe guter marac, pe guwacci, “Waloyogi giwa, ciŋ Rwot pe otimo gin mo.”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Pien gin aye rok ma gikwiya yubo lok, niaŋ lok bene loyogi woko," 
Deuteronomy32:29 Ka nene giryek, kono giniaŋ lok man, kono giŋeyo agikki me kwogi." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Dano acel ryemo jo alip kulu, jo aryo twaro jo alip apar, ka Gotgi aye pe omiyogi woko bot lukworgi, ka Rwot pe otenyogi woko?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Pien gotgi pe rom ki Gotwa, lubaŋagi pe tek ma rom ki mewa; wa merokwa bene giye lok man." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Lukworwa girom ki jo Codom ki Gomora, gical ki olok marac ma nyige kec; girom ki koŋo vino ma girubo ki kwirtwol," 
Deuteronomy32:33 ki kwir twol golla mager-ri. 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Man aye gin ma akano, ma agwoko i ot kano limma." 
Deuteronomy32:35 An aye abiculo kwor, abiculo waŋe lacen. Akuro kare ma tyengi bicer; pien nino me to-pinygi doŋ cok, bipoto i komgi atura." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Pien Rwot bimiyo jone loyo kop, kica bimake i kom luticce ka oneno tekgi doŋ otum woko, ma dano mo pe odoŋ kadi opii nyo ŋat ma lone kene." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Ci bipenyogi ni, ‘Lwak lubaŋawu doŋ gitye kwene kaa, ki got ma yam wuriŋo wularo iyeni?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Jogi ma yam camo moo me gitumwu doŋ tye kwene, ki lumat koŋo vino me gityer amatawu? Wek doŋ gua malo ka konyowu, wek gin aye gubed jo ma gwokowu!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 “‘Tin doŋ wunen ni, an aye a ene, an kena, lubaŋa mukene pe ka ŋeta, An aye aneko dok an aye amiyo kwo; an aye aketo ret dok acaŋo burre, dok pe tye ŋat mo ma laro dano ki i ciŋa." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Atiŋo ciŋa malo acimo polo ci akwoŋo kwon man ni, Macalo an Lubaŋa ma abedo kwo matwal-li," 
Deuteronomy32:41 ka ce apako pala lucwanna ma mil amila, ce aryeyo ciŋa pi ŋolo kop ci abiculo kwor i kom lumonena, abiketo can i kom jo ma gidaga." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Abimiyo aterona mer ki remo, pala lucwanna bicamo riŋo mabup, biyeŋ ki remo jo ma ginekogi ki ma gimakogi, bitoŋo wi lutel pa lumerok.’" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Wupake wun rok ducu kacel ki lwakke, pien en culokwor remo pa luticce; en culo kwor i kom lumonene pi kwanyo bal woko ki i lobopa jone.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Moses okwano wer man ducu wek lwak guwiny, en kacel ki Yocwa wod pa Nun." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Ka Moses otyeko waco lok magi ducu bot jo Icrael ducu ci owaco botgi ni," 
Deuteronomy32:46 “Wuket i cwinywu lok ducu ma awaco botwu tin-ni, wek wuketgi gubed cik ma mako litinowu bene, wek gugwokke ka lubo lok ducu me cik man." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Lok magi pe lok ma tere pe; gin aye kwowu kikome. Pi gwoko cik magi miyo wubiri pi kare malac i lobo ma wucito iye loka Jordan ka camone-ni.” 
Deuteronomy32:48 I nino meno kikome Rwot owaco bot Moses ni," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “It malo i wi got man me Abarim, got Nebo, ma tye i lobo Moab mukemo Jeriko, wek inen lobo Kanaan ma abimiyo bot jo Icrael obed megi." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Ibito i wi got ka ma iito iye-ni wek idok bot lutuwu, macalo omeru Aron yam oto i wi got Kor ci odok bot lutugi;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 pien yam wuŋayo waŋa woko ki i dye jo Icrael, i dog pii me Meribakadec i tim me Jin; yam pe wuwora i nyim jo Icrael macalo an Lubaŋa maleŋ." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Pienno ibineno lobo-nu ki cen i nyimi kuca, ento pe ibicito kunnu, i lobo ma abimiyo ki jo Icrael.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Man aye lamo gum pa Moses ma dano pa Lubaŋa-ni, ma yam olamo i kom likwayo pa Icrael ma onoŋo peya oto," 
Deuteronomy33:2 Moses olamo ni, “Rwot yam obino oa ki i wi got Cinai, ci otuc ki i Ceir wa i komwa cut, kun ryeny ki i wi got Paran. Obino ma oa ki i kin jo maleŋ alip ki alip, ki leb mac ma lyel tuŋ cine malacuc." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Ada, en maro jone, gwoko jone maleŋ ducu i cine, Pi meno waryebbe ka tyene kun en bedo ka pwonyowa," 
Deuteronomy33:4 ki cik ma yam Moses oketo i komwa me bedo me aleya pa lwak pa Yakobo. 
Deuteronomy33:5 Kit meno Rwot odoko kabaka i Jecurun i kare ma ludito ma gitelo wi lwak gucokke, ma kaka pa jo Icrael ducu gugurre kacel." 
Deuteronomy33:6 I kom kaka pa Reuben Moses olamo gumkit man, “Wek Reuben obed makwo, pe oto, kadi bed jone nok.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Olamo gum i kom kaka pa Juda kit man, “Ai Rwot, winy dwan Juda, kele wa paco bot jone. In aye ilweny pire ki ciŋi, ikonye ka lwenyo i kom lumonene.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 I kom kaka pa Levi olamo ni, “Mi ki Levi Tumim meri, miye Urim meri pien en lwori. En aye dano ma yam iomo iye i Maca, en aye ŋat ma yam itemo i ŋet pii me Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Yam owaco i kom wonne ki minne ni, ‘Pe aparo pigi’; opokke woko ki omegine, dok pe oneyo wa litinone. Pien jo pa Levi gumako lokki, gulubo gicikkeni bene." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Gibipwonyo jo pa Yako bo ki lok ma iŋolo, gibipwonyo cikki bot jo Icrael; gibiwaŋo odok eceta i nyimi, gibityero gitum ma giwaŋo woko ducu ki berre i wi keno tyerri." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Ai Rwot, mi gum i kom gipinygi, dok igam tic ma gitiyo ki ciŋgi, Nyon pyer lumonegi piny, ma gin aye jo ma daggi, wek pe dok gutub i komgi.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 I kom kaka pa Benjamin olamo ni, “Dano ma Rwot maro-ni bedo ki kuc, Rwot Mamalo Twal gwoke kare ducu, tino en malo i wi gwoke.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 I kom kaka pa Yucepu olamo ni, “Rwot omi gum opot i kom lobone, ki mot mabeco ma a malo ki i polo, ki mua ki i kut matut ma oyarre i te lobo." 
Deuteronomy33:14 Omine nyig yadi mabeco ma nyak ki cen, ki lonyo me cam ma cek ki dwene;" 
Deuteronomy33:15 Omine cam ma cek mabeco i kom godi muri mada, ki mubakke i wi cere ma bedo matwal;" 
Deuteronomy33:16 omine mot mabeco me nom ki lonyone, ki gum pa Labedo i caka mulyel mac. Wek gum magi ducu gupot i kom Yucepu, i wi dano mubedo laker i kin omegine." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Ditte ki deyone bibedo rom ki pa wod twon me kayo, tune aryo ducu tye macalo tuŋ twon ma i tim." 
Deuteronomy33:18 I kom kaka pa Jabulon olamo ni, “Cwinyi obed yom, in Jabulon, ka ikato woko; ki in Icakar ka ibedo i kemani." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Gibilwoŋo rok ducu wek gucit i wi gotgi, gibityero gitum muporre kunnu, pien lim ma tye i nam obedo megi, kacel ki lonyo ma gikano i kweyo.” En aye bitwomo kwede rok mapol, bicobogi ducu nio wa i agikki lobo; tune aye jo Epraim ma gikato alip apar, ki jo Manace ma giromo alip mapol-li.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 I kom kaka pa Gad olamo ni, “Gum opot i kom dano ma oyabo i lobo pa Gadmalac! Gad obuto piny macalo min labwor, en yeco bat lee, dano wiye." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Oyero lobo maberre ni obed mere, pien onoŋo gikano lobo pa lawimony kunnu, Obino bot ludito wi lwak, otimo gin ma tye atir i nyiŋ Rwot, ocobo gin ma Rwot ociko kacel ki jo Icrael.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 I kom kaka pa Dan olamo ni, “Dan aye latin labwor ma kirre nia ki i Bacan.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 I kom kaka pa Naputali olamo ni, “Bed ki lonyo ma rommi, in Naputali, gum pa Rwot obed kwedi madwoŋ, nam ki lobo ma tun acuc obed meri.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 I kom kaka pa Acer olamo ni, “Acer olim gum madit makato litino ducu; wek cwiny omegine ducu omare; wek olwa tyene ki moo." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Laceg dog gaŋŋi obed nyonyo ki mola; bed ki tekkomi nio wa ka toni. 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Pe tye ‘ŋat mo’ macalo Lubaŋawu, wun jo Jecurun, ma ito pol bino kwede ka konyowu, kun baro dye polo ki doyone." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Lubaŋa ma bedo nakanaka-ni en aye kabedowu, ciŋe tye ki tuŋ piny ma tiŋowu kwede malo. Oryemo lumerok woko ki i nyimwu kun wacci, “Tyekgi woko liweŋ.”" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Icrael yam obedo ki kuc kit meno, waŋ it pa Yakobo obedo kene i lobo me kai ki koŋo vino; iyo, polo miyo toyo ton piny kunnu." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Cwinyi yom kuman, Icrael! Aŋa mono ma calo in kaa? In i rok ma yam Rwot olaro, Rwot aye kwot ma gwokowu, ki pala lucwan ma kelowu wayu! Lumerokwu gibibino botwu kun gimwolle amwola; ento wun wubinyonogi woko piny.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Moses oa ki i lobo aroo me Moab, ocito i wi got Nebo, oito wa i wi lacol me got Piciga ma okemo Jeriko, ci Rwot onyutte lobo ducu. Onyutte lobo Gilead ducu nio kwede wa i Dan," 
Deuteronomy34:2 ki lobo Naputali ducu, ki lobo pa jo Epraim ki Manace, ki lobo Juda ducu nio kwede wa yo tuŋ potoceŋ," 
Deuteronomy34:3 ki Negeb kacel ki lobo bar-gu, ma en ayenota me Jeriko, ma gaŋ me yadi otit, ‘ki nio kwede wa i Joar." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Rwot owaco bot Moses ni, “Man aye lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire bot Abraim ki Icaka ki Yakobo, ni abimiyone bot likwayogi. Doŋ aweki ineno lobone ki waŋi, ento pe ibikato loka ca.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Moses latic pa Rwot oto kit meno ki i lobo Moab, kit ma yam Rwot owaco-ni," 
Deuteronomy34:6 ci Rwot oyike ki kunnu i nota ma i lobo Moab ma okemo Bet-peor; ento pe tye dano, mo ma oneyo kabedo ma oyike iye nio wa onyoo." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Moses onoŋo mwaka me ditte romo miya acel ki pyeraryo ka oto. Onoŋo waŋe peya ocor, ki kome bene onoŋo pud tek." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Jo Icrael gukoko Moses ki i lobo aroo me Moab pi nino pyeradek, ci doŋ kare me koko ki kumo pi Moses otum woko." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Yocwawod pa Nun yam opoŋ ki cwiny me ryeko, pien onoŋo yam Moses oketo ciŋe i kome; mumiyo jo Icrael gubedo ka woro doge, kun gilubo kit ma yam Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Lanebi mo mukene pe dok onen macalo Moses, ma yam Rwot nene kwede waŋ ki waŋ." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Pe tye ŋat mo ma rom kwede ma obedo ka tiyo lwak lanyut ki taŋo ducu ma Rwot ocwale kwede i lobo Ejipt, ma otiyo i kom Parao ki luticce ducu ki lobone ducu." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Pe tye lanebi mo mukene ma obedo ki twer madwoŋ ma rom ki mere pi tiyo kit tic madito ki ma kelo lworo madwoŋ kit ma yam Moses obedo ka tiyone ki i nyim jo Icrael ducu-ni. 
Joshua1:1 Ka Moses latic pa Rwot doŋ oto woko, Rwot owaco bot Yocwa wod pa Nun ma lakony pa Moses ni," 
Joshua1:2 “Laticca Moses doŋ oto woko; pienno in aye doŋ ia malo, iciŋol loka Jordan man, in ki lwak jo-ni ducu, wucit wa i lobo ma abemiyo botgi-ni, ma abimiyo bot gin jo Icrael." 
Joshua1:3 Kabedo ducu ma tyenwu binyono abimiyo botwu, kit ma yam aciko ki Moses." 
Joshua1:4 Cakke wa i tim ki i Lebanon kany o kwede wa i kulu madit, en aye kulu Euprate, lobo ducu pa jo Kit nio wa i Nam Madit ma yo tuŋ potoceŋ, ducu bibedo lobowu," 
Joshua1:5 Pe tye dano mo ma bicuŋ i nyimi i kare me kwoni ducu. Kit ma yam abedo ki Moses, abibedo kwedi kit meno; pe abibwoti, pe abitenyi ata." 
Joshua1:6 Bed oteka ma cwinyi nwaŋ, pien ibimiyo rok man leyo lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire bot kwarowu ni abimiyo botgi." 
Joshua1:7 Ento bed oteka ma lacwinye nwaŋ, bed ma igwokke ka lubo cik ma yam laticca Moses ociki kwede i gin ma itiyo ducu; pe iŋak idok yo tuŋ acuc nyo yo tuŋ acam, wek ibed ki gum maber i kabedo ducu ma ibicito iye." 
Joshua1:8 Buk man me cik pe bia ki i dogi, ento ibibedo ka Iwodone i cwinyi dyeceŋ ki dyewor, wek igwokke ka lubo gin ducu ma gicoyo iye-ni, Kit meno bimiyo nyimi bedo maleŋ, ka dok ticci ducu bicobbe kakare." 
Joshua1:9 An doŋ atyeko ciki ba. Bed oteka ma cwinyi nwaŋ; pe komi omyel, pe cwinyi oryaŋŋe, pien Rwot Lubaŋani tye kwedi ka ma iwoto iye ducu.”" 
Joshua1:10 Yocwa ociko ludito ma giloyo lwak ni," 
Joshua1:11 “Wuwot i dye gony ka ciko lwak ni, ‘Wuyub camwu; pien odoŋ nino adek ci wucito ka ŋolo loka kulu Jordan, wucito iye ka camo lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyo botwu me bedo mewu.’ ”" 
Joshua1:12 Yocwa dok owaco bot jo Reuben, jo Gad ki nucu kaka pa Manace ni," 
Joshua1:13 “Wupo lok ma yam Moses latic pa Rwot ocikowu kwede kun wacci, ‘Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ otyeko miyowu kabedo me yweyowu, en doŋ omiyowu lobo man.’" 
Joshua1:14 Monwu ki litinowu ki dyaŋiwu gibidoŋ i lobo ma yam Moses omiyo botwu i ŋe Jordan kany; ento oteka lweny ma gitye i kinwu ducu gibikato loka ca ki jami lwenygi ducu i nyim omegigi pi konyogi," 
Joshua1:15 nio ka Rwot omiyo yweyo bot omegiwu macalo omiyo botwu-ni, ci gin bene gicamo lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyogi. Ka doŋ wubidok i lobo ma mewu-ni, ci doŋ wubibedo iye matwal, en aye lobo ma yam Moses latic pa Rwot omiyo botwu i ŋe Jordan kany ma tuŋ wokceŋ.”" 
Joshua1:16 Ci gugamo dog Yocwa ni, “Gin ma doŋ iciko ducu wabitiyo, dok ka ma icwalowa iye ducu wabicito." 
Joshua1:17 Kit macalo yam waworo dog Moses i lok ducu-ni, wabiworo dogi bene kit meno. Rwot Lubaŋa keken aye obed kwedi, kit ma yam obedo ki Moses!" 
Joshua1:18 Dano mo ka okwero lokki ce ojemo i kom cikki ki gin ducu ma iciko, gibineke woko. In aye ibed oteka ma cwinyi nwaŋ.”" 
Joshua2:1 Yocwa wod pa Nun ocwalo jo aryo nia ki i Citim i muŋ ka roto piny kun waco botgi ni, “Wucit ka neno lobo, makatone aye Jeriko.” Ka gucito, ci gutiro i ot pa dako ma lakwele ma nyiŋe Rakab, gubuto kunnu." 
Joshua2:2 Gitito pigi bot kabaka me Jeriko ni, “Nen, jo Icrael mogo gubino kany ka roto piny.”" 
Joshua2:3 Ci kabaka me Jeriko ocwalo kwena bot Rakab ma kun wacce ni, “Kel dano ma gubino boti kany, dano ma gudonyo i odi-ni, pien gubino ka roto lobowa ducu.”" 
Joshua2:4 Ento dako-nu onoŋo otero jo aryo-nu okanogi woko, ci en ogamo ni, “Ada, jo-nu gubino bota, ento onoŋo pe aŋeyo ka ma gua iye." 
Joshua2:5 I kare ma dog gaŋ gicok lorone woko, ma piny col-li, jo-nu gukato woko, ci ka ma gucito iye aye pe aŋeyo. Wuryem korgi oyotoyot, ci wubimakogi iyo,”" 
Joshua2:6 kun onoŋo oterogi i wi ot malo, ci okanogi i kin tol tworo ma ocano kikore i wi ot kunnu." 
Joshua2:7 Kit meno dano gucako ryemo korgi i yo ma kemo kulu Jordan nio kwede wa i waŋ wat. Ka luryem korgi gukato woko, ci dog gaŋ giloro woko cut." 
Joshua2:8 I kare ma jo-nu peya gubuto piny, en ocito botgi i wi ot," 
Joshua2:9 ci owaco botgi ni, “Aŋeyo ni Rwot otyeko miyowu lobo man, lworo bene otyeko makowa piwu, ki jo ma gibedo i lobo-ni komgi oonyo koyo woko piwu," 
Joshua2:10 pien wawinyo kit ma Rwot otwoyo ki pii me Nam Makwar woko i nyimwu i kare ma wua woko ki i Ejipt, ki gin ma wutiyo i kom luker aryo pa jo Amor ma yam gibedo loka Jordan tuŋ kany, gin aye Cikon ki Og, ma wujwerogi woko liweŋ-ŋi." 
Joshua2:11 I kare ma wawinyo pire-ni cwinywa ocako ŋabbe aŋaba cut, tipo kom dano oto woko lirut piwu, pien Rwot Lubaŋawu aye Lubaŋa ma tye malo i polo ki piny i wi lobo bene." 
Joshua2:12 Kombeddi doŋ wukwoŋŋa kwoŋ ki nyiŋ Rwot ni, kit macalo atyeko timowu maber-ri, wun bene wubitimo jo me ot pa wora maber, ci wumiya lanyut ma moko adane," 
Joshua2:13 wek wular kwo pa wora ki pa maa, ki pa omegina ki lumegina, ki jo ducu ma gitye botgi, wek wular kwowa wawek to.”" 
Joshua2:14 Jo meno gugamo ni, “Wan aye wabito ma ka wun. Ka pe wubitito gin ma watimo kany-nyi, ci wan wabitimowu maber ki gen madwoŋ ka Rwot bimiyowa lobo-ni.”" 
Joshua2:15 Lacen dako-nu omiyo gukato woko ki i waŋ dirica ma noŋo en cwalogi piny ki tol, pien onoŋo ode gigero okubbe i kom cel murumo gaŋ-ŋi, omiyo en yam bedo i kom cel." 
Joshua2:16 Ci en ocikogi ni, “Koŋ wucit wa i kin godi, wek luryem korwu pe gurwatte kwedwu iyo. Koŋ wukanne kunnu pi nino adek, nio ka luryem korwu gudwogo; ka lacen wun doŋ wucit giwu.”" 
Joshua2:17 Jo-nu guwaco bote ni, “Pe wabibedo ki bal mo i kom kwoŋ man ma imiyo wakwoŋo boti-ni." 
Joshua2:18 Nen ba, ka monywa obino i lobo-ni, ci ibitweyo tol man makwar-ri i waŋ dirica ma imiyo wakato woko kun wawok ki iye-ni. Ci ibilwono woru ki meni ki omegini ki jo ma i ot pa woru ducu, icokogi i ot boti kany." 
Joshua2:19 Ka ŋat acel mo okato gire woko ki i doggola odi ocito i gudo, bal me remone bidok i wiye, wan pe wabibedo ki bal mo iye," 
Joshua2:20 Ento ka ce itito gin ma watimo kany-nyi, ci pe wabibedo ki bal mo pi kwoŋ ma imiyo wakwoŋo-ni.”" 
Joshua2:21 Dako ogamo ni, “Doŋ obed kumeno kit macalo wuloko-ni.” Ka ocwalogi gucito, ci en otweyo tol makwar-ri i waŋ dirica ode." 
Joshua2:22 Ka gucito ci guwoto atir wa i godi, gubedo kunnu pi nino adek, nio ka luryem korgi gudok woko; lulub korgi gubedo ka yenyogi kwe i waŋayo, ci pe gumedo ki noŋogi," 
Joshua2:23 Jo aryo-nu gulor piny ki i wi godi, gukato loka ca ci gucito bot Yocwa wod pa Nun, gutito bote lok ducu ma otimme i komgi." 
Joshua2:24 Ka dok guwaco bot Yocwa ni, “Adada Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo lobo meno ducu i ciŋ wa; dok nen ni jo ducu ma gibedo i lobo-nu piwa oneko komgi woko lirut.”" 
Joshua3:1 Yocwa oa malo odiko con ci otiŋo wot kun a ki i Citim, kacel ki jo Icrael ducu, guo kwede wa i dog kulu Jordan, gubuto kenyo ma peya gukato loka tuŋ ca." 
Joshua3:2 Ka gutyeko kunnu nino adek, ci ludito guwoto i dye gaŋ" 
Joshua3:3 kun giciko lwak ni, “Ka doŋ wuneno ajwagi ma Lulevi doŋ gutiŋo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot Lubaŋawu, ci wun bene doŋ wubicako wot, wua ki i kabedowu wulubo kore," 
Joshua3:4 wek wuŋe yo ma wubilubo-ni, pien yam peya wulubo yo meno. Ento kinwu ki canduk pa Rwot aye obed ma oŋadde; ber kinwu opokke ma romo yadi alip acel kulu, pe wunyik cok bote.”" 
Joshua3:5 Ci Yocwa ociko lwak ni, “Wulonnye kekenwu wek wubed maleŋ, pien diki Rwot bitiyo jami taŋo i kinwu.”" 
Joshua3:6 Yocwa owaco bot ajwagi ni, “Doŋ wutiŋ canduk me gicikke, wukat kwede i nyim lwak.” Gutiŋo canduk me gicikke, gucito kwede wa i nyim lwak." 
Joshua3:7 Rwot owaco bot Yocwa ni, “Tin doŋ acako miyo ibedo dano madit ki i nyim ‘jo Icrael ducu, wek guŋe ni, kit ma yam abedo ki Moses, abibedo kwedi bene kit meno," 
Joshua3:8 Ibiciko ajwagi ma gitiŋo canduk me gicikke ni, ‘Ka doŋ wuo i dog pii me Jordan, ci wubicuŋ mot i kulu Jordan.’”" 
Joshua3:9 Ci Yocwa owaco bot lwak ni, “Wubin kany ka winyo lok pa Rwot Lubaŋawu.”" 
Joshua3:10 Ka dok owaco ni, “Kombeddi doŋ wubiŋeyo ni Lubaŋa makwo tye i kinwu, dok ni en biryemo jo magi woko ki i nyimwu ada, jo Kanaan, jo Kit, jo Kiv, jo Periji, jo Girgac, jo Amor ki jo Jebuc." 
Joshua3:11 Canduk me gicikke pa Rwot me lobo ducu doŋ biŋolo kulu Jordan ki i nyimwu. 
Joshua3:12 Koni doŋ wukwany dano apar wiye aryo ki i kin kaka pa jo Icrael, dano acel pi kaka acel acel." 
Joshua3:13 I kare ma tyen ajwagi ma gutiŋo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot, ma Rwot me lobo ducu-ni, bicuŋ i pii me Jordan, ci pii me Jordan biŋol woko ma pe doŋ mol; pii ma mol a ki malo yo tuŋ cel-li bigut gurre kacel.”" 
Joshua3:14 Kit meno lwak gua ki i kemagi gucako wot pi ŋolo loka Jordan kacel ki ajwagi ma gutiŋo canduk me gicikke ma gutelo kwede nyim lwak. 
Joshua3:15 Noŋo pii me kulu Jordan poŋ woko libyeny o wa i wi tura mwaka ki mwaka pi kare malac i kare me kac. Ka doŋ ajwagi ma gutiŋo canduk me gicikke-ni guo i Jordan, guluto tyengi i pii ma i doge-ni," 
Joshua3:16 ci pii ma mol piny ma a ki tuŋ malo-ni ogut ocuŋ woko ma opoŋ otiŋŋe malo likuŋ ma ojer wa i Adam, en gaŋ ma cok ki Jaretan. Pii mogo ma mol kemo nam me Araba, ma Nam me Kado-ni, kingi ducu oŋol woko, ci lwak gukato loka tuŋcel, mukemo Jeriko." 
Joshua3:17 I kare ma jo Icrael ducu gimol gikato ki i lobo mutwo-ni, onoŋo ajwagi ma gutiŋo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot-ti gucuŋ i dye Jordan, nio ka rok ducu otyeko kato loka Jordan." 
Joshua4:1 Ka lwak ducu gutyeko kato loka Jordan, ci Rwot owaco bot Yocwa ni," 
Joshua4:2 “Kwany dano apar wiye aryo ki i kin lwak, dano acel pi kaka acel acel," 
Joshua4:3 ci icikgi ni, ‘Wukwany godi apar wiye aryo ki kany ki i dye Jordan, ki i kabedo ma tyen ajwagi ocuŋ iye-ni, wutiŋ wukat kwedgi wa loka ca, ci wuketgi piny i kabedo ma wucibuto iye tin-ni.’ ”" 
Joshua4:4 Yocwa olwoŋo dano apar wiye aryo ki i kin jo Icrael ma nene en oyerogi, ma laco acel oa ki i kaka acel acel." 
Joshua4:5 Owaco botgi ni, “Wukat wucit wa i nyim canduk me gicikke pa Rwot Lubaŋawu ma i dye Jordan-ni, dano acel acel otiŋ iye got oket i wi gwoke, muporo wel kaka pa jo Icrael ducu," 
Joshua4:6 wek gubed me lanyut i kinwu, I kare me anyim ka waŋ mo litinowu gibipenyowu ni, ‘Godi magi kono nyuto gin aŋo?’" 
Joshua4:7 Wun wubitito botgi ni, pii me Jordan yam iye opokke oŋol wo ko ki i nyim canduk me gicikke pa Rwot, i kare ma en ŋolo Jordan kato kwede loka ca-ni. Kit meno godi magi bibedo gin me po bot jo Icrael.”" 
Joshua4:8 Jo Icrael gutiyo kit ma Yocwa ocikogi kwede. Gutiŋo godi apar wiye aryo ki i dye Jordan, muporo wel kaka pa jo Icrael, kit ma nene Rwot otito bot Yocwa-nii gutiŋo gucito kwedgi loka ca, wa i kabedo ma gicibuto iye-ni, ci guketogi piny kunnu." 
Joshua4:9 Yocwa ocibo godi apar wiye aryo-nu i dye Jordan, i kabedo ka ma tyen ajwagi ma gutiŋo canduk me gicikke ocuŋ iye; pud gitye kunnu wa onyoo," 
Joshua4:10 Pien onoŋo ajwagi ma gutiŋo canduk-ki gucuŋ kenyo i dye Jordan nio ka gin ducu ma nene Rwot ociko Yocwa ni otit bot lwak otum, ma rom ki cik ma yam Moses ocikoki Yocwa-ni. Lwak ducu gumol oyotoyot wa loka ca," 
Joshua4:11 Ka lwak ducu gumol gukato loka ca, ci canduk ki’ ajwagi bene gukato loka i nyim lwak." 
Joshua4:12 Jo pa Reuben ki pa Gad ki nucu kaka pa Manace onoŋo guruko jami lwenygi gutelo kwede nyim lwak jo Icrael kit ma yam Moses ocikogi kwede-ni. 
Joshua4:13 Jogi ma gurukke me lweny guromo alip pyeraŋwen, ci gukato loka ca I nyim Rwot ka lweny i lobo bar me Jeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Rwot omiyo Yocwa obedo dano madit i nyim jo Icrael ducu; ci lwak guwore Wa i kare me kwone ducu kit ma yam giworo ki Moses," 
Joshua4:15 Rwot owaco bot Yocwa ni," 
Joshua4:16 “Cik ajwagi ma gitiŋo canduk me caden doŋ gua woko ki i Jordan.” 
Joshua4:17 Yocwa ociko ajwagi ni, “Doŋ wua woko ki i Jordan.”" 
Joshua4:18 Ka ajwagi ma gutiŋo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot gua woko ki i dye Jordan gukato wi tura;” ma tyengi ocako nyono lobo ma wi tura mutwo-ni, ci pii me Jordan ocorre odwogo cen i kabedone, opoŋo piny obyennye wa i wi tura kit ma yam ca," 
Joshua4:19 Lwak gua woko ki i Jordan gukato wi tura i nino dwe apar me dwe mukwono, ci gutoŋo gonygi i Gilgal i waŋ lobo Jeriko ma tuŋ wokceŋ," 
Joshua4:20 Ki godi apar wiye aryo ma gutiŋo ki i Jordan, Yocwa ocibogi i Gilgal." 
Joshua4:21 Ci owaco bot jo Icrael ni, “I kare me anyim, ka ‘likwayowu gupenyo wegigi ni, ‘Godi magi kono nyuto gin aŋo?’" 
Joshua4:22 ci wubitito bot litinowu ni, ‘Jo Icrael yam gumol gukato ki i Jordan kany ma lobone otwo woko.’" 
Joshua4:23 Pien Rwot Lubaŋawu omiyo pii me Jordan otwo odwon woko piwu nio ka wumol wukato loka kany, kit ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu otiyo ki Nam Makwar-ri, ma yam omiyo piine otwo odwon woko piwa nio ka wamol wakato loka tuŋcel," 
Joshua4:24 wek rok ducu ma wi lobo-ni guŋe atir ni ciŋ Rwot tye ki tek; wek wubed ka lworo Rwot Lubaŋawu matwal.” 
Joshua5:1 Ka luker pa jo Amor ducu ma gibedo loka Jordan ma tuŋ potoceŋ, ki luker pa jo Kanaan ducu ma gitye i dog nam, guwinyo ni Rwot otyeko dwono pii me Jordan otwo woko pi jo Icrael nio ka gumol gukato loka tuŋcel, ci cwinygi ocako ŋabbe aŋaba, ki tipo komgi oto woko, pi lworo jo Icrael." 
Joshua5:2 I kare meno Rwot owaco bot Yocwa ni, “Tim pala kidi lela mabitte ci ilir ki jo Icrael tyen me aryone.”" 
Joshua5:3 Ci Yocwa otimo pala kidi lela mabitte, oliro ki jo Icrael i Gibea-aralot," 
Joshua5:4 Man aye tyen lok mumiyo Yocwa olirogi: lwak co ducu ma gua ki i Ejipt, lulwenygi ducu, onoŋo gutyeko to woko ki i tim i kare ma doŋ gutyeko a woko ki i Ejipt." 
Joshua5:5 Jo ma gua ki kunnu onoŋo yam gilirogi, ento jo ducu ma ginywalogi ki i wanayo ma onoŋo doŋ gua woko ki i Ejipt, gubedo ma pe gilirogi," 
Joshua5:6 Pien JO Icrael gubedo ka wot i tim mwaka pyeraŋwen, nio ka jo me rokgi ducu, co ducu ma lumony ma yam gua ki i Ejipt, guto gutum woko, pien onoŋo pe gubedo ka woro dog Rwot. Rwot yam okwoŋo ni pe ebiye ni gin gunen lobo ma yam okwono bot kwarogi ni ebimiyo botgi, en aye lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic." 
Joshua5:7 Kit meno jo ma Yocwa oliro gubedo litinogi ma Rwot omiyo gudoŋo guleyo ka tyengi; pien onoŋo gubedo ma pe gilirogi, pe gilirogi ki i waŋayo." 
Joshua5:8 Ka liro jo Icrael doŋ otum, ci gubedo i gony nio ka gucan." 
Joshua5:9 Rwot owaco bot Yocwa ni, “Tin doŋ akwanyo lewic me lobo Ejipt woko ki i komwu,” mumi yo nyiŋ kabedo-nu pud gilwoŋo ni Gilgal wa onyoo." 
Joshua5:10 I kare ma jo Icrael gitye i gony me Gilgal gukwero nino madit me Kato i nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen otyeno i bar me Jeriko. 
Joshua5:11 Orwone ki i ŋe kwero Kato, i nino meno kikome, gucako camo cam ma ocek i lobo-nu, capat ma tobi pe iye ki bel ma gicelo," 
Joshua5:12 I nino meno ma gucamo iye cam ma ocek ki i lobo-nu en aye nino ma manna bene, ogik iye; jo Icrael pe dok gumedde ki camo manna matwal, ento doŋ gubedo ka camo cam ma ocek i lobo Kanaan i mwaka meno." 
Joshua5:13 Ka Yocwa onyiko cok ki Jeriko, otiŋo wane malo oneno piny, ci oneno dano mo ocuŋ i nyime ma onoŋo owoto pala lucwan omako i ciŋe. Yocwa ocito bote, openye ni, “In itye tuŋ botwa nyo tuŋ bot lumerokwa?”" 
Joshua5:14 En ogamo ni, “Pe; ento an aye lawimony pa Rwot ma tin doŋ abino.” Yocwa oryebbe piny i ŋom, owore, ci owaco bote ni, “Ladit, an laticci, icika ki lok aŋo?”" 
Joshua5:15 Lawimony pa Rwot owaco bot Yocwa ni, “Luny war woko ki i tyeni, pien kabedo ma icuŋ iye-ni kabedo maleŋ.” Ci Yocwa otimo kit meno." 
Joshua6:1 I kare meno onoŋo Jeriko gicego woko matek twatwal pi lworo jo Icrael; dano mo pe kato woko, ki dano mo pe donyo i iye." 
Joshua6:2 Rwot owaco bot Yocwa ni, “Nen, doŋ atyeko miyo Jeriko i ciŋi kacel ki kabakane ki twoni oteka lwennye." 
Joshua6:3 Wubiwot wurumo gaŋ; lulweny ducu gibiwot kun girumo gaŋ tyen acel. Wubitiyo kit meno tyeko nino abicel," 
Joshua6:4 kun ajwagi abiro bimako obute me tuŋ romi gitelo kwede nyim canduk me gicikke, I nino me abirone wubiwot wurumo gaŋ tyen abiro kun ajwagi gikuto obute." 
Joshua6:5 Ka doŋ gikuto tuŋ nyogi romi, ka doŋ wuwinyo dwan obute maloŋo-ni, ci lwak ducu gibidaŋŋe ki dwangi maloŋo mapek; cel gogo me gaŋ bimuk, poto woko piny ducu, ci lwak gibicorre gicito iye kun dano acel acel kemo nyime atir.”" 
Joshua6:6 Ci Yocwa wod pa Nun olwoŋo ajwagi, owaco botgi ni, “Wutiŋ canduk me gicikke. Ajwagi abiro gumak obute tuŋ nyogi romi gutel kwede nyim canduk pa Rwot.”" 
Joshua6:7 Ka dok owaco ki lwak ni, “Wuwot anyim, wuwot wurum gaŋ, wumi jo ma guruko jami lwenygi gukat wa i nyim canduk pa Rwot.”" 
Joshua6:8 Kit ma Yocwa ociko ki lwak-ki, ajwagi abiro gumako obute tuŋ nyogi romi abiro ci gutelo kwede nyim Rwot kun gicito anyim kacel ki canduk me gicikke pa Rwot ma lubo korgi." 
Joshua6:9 Lumony gutelo nyim ajwagi ma gikuto obute-ni, ci lugwok ŋec gulubo kor canduk, kun obute gikuto gimedde kwede ameda." 
Joshua6:10 Ento Yocwa ociko lumony ni, “Pe wubidaŋŋe ki woo, kadi wa dwanwu pe biwinnye, wa lok mo pe bia ki i dogwu, o kwede wa i nino ma abicikowu ni doŋ wudaŋŋe ki woo; ka doŋ wubidaŋŋe.”" 
Joshua6:11 Kit meno Yocwa omiyo canduk pa Rwot ocako wot me rumo gaŋ, kun rumo tyen acel keken. Lacen gudok i gony, gubuto kunnu." 
Joshua6:12 Yocwa dok oa malo odiko con, ki ajwagi bene gucako tiŋo canduk pa Rwot." 
Joshua6:13 Ajwagi abiro gumako obute tuŋ nyogi romi abiro gukato kwede i nyim canduk pa Rwot, kun gimedde ki kuto obute nakanaka. Lumony gutelo nyimgi, ki lugwok ŋec gulubo kor canduk, kun ajwagi gikuto obute nakanaka." 
Joshua6:14 I nino me aryone guwoto gurumo gaŋ tyen acel ci gudok i gony, Gubedo ka rumo gaŋi kit meno otyeko nino abicel." 
Joshua6:15 I kom nino me abirone gua malo kwarpiny, guwoto gurumo gaŋ kit ma yam ca tyen abiro; i nino meno keken aye gurumo iye gaŋ tyen abiro." 
Joshua6:16 I kom tyen me abirone en aye ajwagi gucako kuto iye obute, ka Yocwa owaco bot lumony ni, “Wudaŋŋe, wuwo, pien Rwot doŋ omiyo gaŋ man botwu." 
Joshua6:17 Ento gaŋ man ki gin ducu ma tye iye gibidyerogi bot Rwot ci gibijwero woko ducu. Rakab ma lakwele-ni keken, ki jo ducu ma gitye i ode, aye gibidoŋ makwo, pien en yam okano lurot-piny ma wacwalo kunnu." 
Joshua6:18 Ento wun aye wugwokke kekenwu i kom gin ducu ma gidyero me ajwera woko, pe dok wukwany gin mo ki i kom gin ma wudyero-ni, miyo gony pa jo Icrael doko me ajwera woko ducu, ci kelo ayela i kome," 
Joshua6:19 Ento ryal ki jabu ducu ki jami me mola-gu ki me nyonyo gu, gin ducu jami maleŋ pa Rwot; gibiterogi i ot kano lim pa Rwot.”" 
Joshua6:20 Kit meno lumony gudaŋŋe ki woo ki ajwagi gukuto tum obute, Tekki lumony guwinyo dwan obute ci gutugi daŋŋe ki woo matek, ci cel me gaŋ omuk opoto woko piny ducu, ka doŋ lumony gudonyo i gaŋ kun dano acel acel woto tiko nyime atir, gumako gaŋ woko." 
Joshua6:21 Gujwero co wa ki mon, litino ki ludoŋo ducu, ki dyaŋi ki romi ki kana-gu; gin ducu gutum woko kun gineko ki pala lucwan." 
Joshua6:22 Ci Yocwa owaco bot jo aryo ma yam guroto lobo ni, “Wucit i ot pa dako ma lakwele-ni, wukele woko ki jone ducu, kit ma yam wukwoŋo boteni,”" 
Joshua6:23 Kit meno awobe ma yam guroto lobo gudonyo i ot, gukelo Rakab woko kacel ki wonne ki minne ki omegine ki jone ducu. Gutero ludoggolane ducu, guketogi woko i ŋe gony pa jo Icrael." 
Joshua6:24 Lacen lumony guwaŋo gaŋ woko ki mac, ki gin ducu ma tye iye; ento guweko ryal ki jabu ki jami me mola ki me nyonyo-gu, guketogi i ot ma gikano iye lim pa Rwot." 
Joshua6:25 Ento Rakab ma lakwele-ni ki jo me ot pa wonne kacel ki jone ducu, Yocwa owekogi makwo. Gibedo i kin jo Icrael nio wa onyoo, pien Rakab yam okano lukwena ma Yocwa onoŋo ocwalogi ka roto Jeriko." 
Joshua6:26 I kare meno Yocwa omiyo dano gukwoŋo kwoŋ i nyim Rwot kun wacci, “Cen opot i kom dano ma bitiŋŋe pi gero gaŋ man me Jeriko doki. Latin kayone bito, ci gibiketo gutine i wiye; wode ma cogone bito, ci gibicibo dog gaŋ i wiye.”" 
Joshua6:27 Kit meno Rwot obedo ki Yocwa, omiyo nyiŋe oywek oromo lobo ducu." 
Joshua7:1 Ento jo Icrael guŋayo waŋ Rwot i lok ma mako jami ma onoŋo gidyero bote. Akan wod pa Karmi, wod pa Jabdi, wod pa Jera ma i kaka pa Juda okwanyo jami mogo ma gidyerogi bot Rwot, omiyo kiniga omako Rwot i kom jo Icrael." 
Joshua7:2 Yocwa ocwalo dano ki i Jeriko me cito wa i Ai ma cok ki Bet-awen, i ŋet Betel yo tuŋ wokceŋ, owaco botgi ni, “Wucit ka roto lobo kuca:’ Jo-nu gucito guroto Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Ka gudwogo bot Yocwa ci gutito bote ni, “Pe iwek mony ducu gucit kunnu, ento wek dano alip aryo nyo adek gucit ka lweny i kom Ai; pe imi mony ducu guyelle gucit kunnu, pien jo ma tye kunnu ginok mo.”" 
Joshua7:4 Mumiyo dano alip adek ki i kin lumony aye gucito kunnu; ci guriŋo woko ki i nyim jo Ai. 
Joshua7:5 Jo Ai guneko jo pyeradek wiye abicel ki i kingi’; guryemo korgi cakke ki i dog gaŋ o kwede wa i Cebarim, ci gunekogi i kor got kunnu. Ci cwiny jo Icrael oballe woko, tekgi okwe woko macalo pii." 
Joshua7:6 Yocwa oyeco boŋone woko, opoto piny aryeba cwiny i nyim canduk pa Rwot nio wa otyeno, en ki Ludoŋo pa jo Icrael, kun gionyo apwa i wigi." 
Joshua7:7 Ci Yocwa owacci, “Maa do, ai Rwot Lubaŋa, piŋo ikelo lwak man loka Jordan kany pi miyowa i cin jo Amor wek gutyekwa woko? Twora yam waye giwa bedo loka Jordan kuca!" 
Joshua7:8 Ai Rwot, ka man dok awaco lok aŋo, ma jo Icrael doŋ gutyeko loko ŋegi woko i nyim lumerokgi-ni?" 
Joshua7:9 Pien jo Kanaan ki jo ducu ma gibedo i lobo-ni ka gibiwinyo pire, gibicorre girumowa woko dyere, gijwayo nyiŋwa woko ki i wi lobo. Ci gin aŋo mono ma dok ibitiyo pi nyiŋi madit-ti?”" 
Joshua7:10 Rwot owaco bot Yocwa ni, “A malo, piŋo ipoto aryeba cwiny kit man?" 
Joshua7:11 Jo Icrael gutimo bal. Gutyeko turo gicikkena ma yam acikogi kwede. Gukwanyo jami mogo ma yam gidyerogi-ni, gukwalo woko, guŋinnye kwede, guketo i kin jamigi," 
Joshua7:12 En aye lok mumiyo jo Icrael pe gitwero cuŋ i nyim lumerokgi; gin mumiyo guloko ŋegi ki i nyim lumerokgi noŋo gin kikomgi gudoko gin me ajwera woko, Pe doŋ abimedde ki bedo kwedwu, nio waŋ ma wukwanyo jami ma gidyerogi woko ki i kinwu." 
Joshua7:13 A malo wek ilony lwak gubed maleŋ kun iwaco ni, ‘Diki myero wulonnye kekenwu wubed maleŋ, pien Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco kuman ni, “Jami ma gidyero tye i kinwu, wun jo Icrael. Pienno pe wutwero cun i nyim lumerokwu nio waŋ ma wukwanyo jami ma gidyerogi woko ki i kinwu.”" 
Joshua7:14 Diki odiko gibikelowu i nyim Rwot kaka ki kaka, ci kaka ma Rwot okwanyo gibibino cok doggola ki doggola; doggola ma Rwot okwanyo bibino ot ki ot; ki ot ma Rwot okwanyo dano ma tye iye gibibino ki acel acel." 
Joshua7:15 Ŋat ma gikwanyo ma tye ki jami ma gidyero-ni gibiwaŋo woko ki mac, en kacel ki jone ki jamigi ducu, pien oturo gicikke pa Rwot, dok otimo gin me lewic i Icrael.’ ”" 
Joshua7:16 Kit meno Yocwa oa malo odiko con, okelo jo Icrael cok i nyim Rwot kaka ki kaka, ci gukwanyo kaka pa Juda aye." 
Joshua7:17 Okelo jo pa Juda, ‘ci gikwanyo doggola jo pa Jera. Okelo doggola pa Jera kun kelo dano ma iye ki acel acel, ka dok gikwanyo Jabdi." 
Joshua7:18 Ka dok okelo dano ma i ode ki acel acel, ci gikwanyo Akan wod pa Karmi, likwayo pa Jera ma i kaka pa Juda." 
Joshua7:19 Yocwa owaco bot Akan ni, “Woda, mi deyo bot Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael kun ituco balli. Titta kombeddi gin ma itimo; pe imuŋŋa.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akan ocako dok iye ki Yocwa ni, “Ada, abalo i nyim Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, man aye gin ma atiyo:" 
Joshua7:21 ka aneno boŋo maber mua ki i Cinar ki i kin jami ma giyakoni, ki cekel me ryal miya aryo, ki dul jabu ma pekke romo cekel pyerabic, pigi obedo mitta, ci akwanyogi. Nen, akanogi i ŋom i kemana, ryal tye piny i tergi.”" 
Joshua7:22 Yocwa ocwalo lukwena ci guriŋo i kema pa Akan, gunoŋo jami-nu gikano i kema, kun ryal tye i tere piny." 
Joshua7:23 Gukwanyogi woko ki i kema, gukelogi bot Yocwa ki jo Icrael ducu, ci guketogi piny i nyim Rwot." 
Joshua7:24 Ci Yocwa ki jo Icrael ducu gukwanyo Akan lakwar Jera kacel ki ryal ki boŋo ca ki dul jabu, ki awo bene ki anyirare, ki twoni dyaŋine, ki kanane ki romine, ki kemane ki jami ma en tye kwede ducu, gutero wa i nota me Akor." 
Joshua7:25 Yocwa owacci, “Piŋo ikelo ayela i komwa? Tin doŋ Rwot bikelo ayela i komi.” Ci jo Icrael ducu gucelogi ki got. Guwaŋo jamigi ki mac, ci gucelogi ki got." 
Joshua7:26 Lacen gucano got i kome madwoŋ likuŋ ma pud tye wa onyoo, ci kiniga pa Rwot malyet-ti okwe woko. Pienno nyiŋ kabedo-nu pud gilwoŋo ni nota me Akor nio wa onyoo." 
Joshua8:1 Rwot owaco bot Yocwa ni, “Pe ilwor, cwinyi pe opoti. Ter jo ma lulweny ducu kacel kwedi, doŋ wutugi a, wucit wa i Ai. Nen, doŋ atyeko miyo kabaka me Ai i ciŋi, ki lwakke ducu ki gaŋŋe ki lobone." 
Joshua8:2 Ibitimo Ai ki kabakane kit macalo itimo i kom Jeriko ki kabakane-ni; ento jamine ma giyako, ki limme makwo, wubitero bedo mewu, Mi dano gubut gukanne i ŋet gaŋ yo tuŋ ŋeye.”" 
Joshua8:3 Yocwa oa malo ki jo ma lulweny ducu pi cito ka lweny i kom Ai. Oyero twoni matego ma oteka lweny alip pyeradek ci ocwalogi ki i dyewor. 
Joshua8:4 Ocikogi ni, “Wubibuto wukanne i ŋet gaŋ yo tuŋ ŋeye, Pe wucit ka mabor ki gaŋ, ento wun ducu wubed ma wuterre," 
Joshua8:5 ci an ki jo ducu ma gitye kweda wabinyiko cok ki gaŋ, Ka ce jo kunnu gubino woko ka lweny i komwa, ci wan wabiriŋo woko ki i nyimgi," 
Joshua8:6 miyo gin gibibino woko ka ryemo korwa nio ka gin ducu gukato woko ki i gaŋ, pien gibitamo ni wariŋo woko ki i nyimgi kit ma yam watimo-ni, Ka wan watye ka riŋo woko ki i nyimgi," 
Joshua8:7 wun doŋ wubia malo ki ka ma wubuto wukanne iye-ni, ci wutugi mako gaŋ woko cut, pien Rwot Lubaŋawu bimiyo i ciŋwu," 
Joshua8:8 Ka doŋ wutyeko mako, wubiwaŋo woko ki mac; kit meno wubicobo gin ma Rwot ociko. Nen, doŋ acikowu en.”" 
Joshua8:9 Yocwa ocwalogi woko kit meno, ci guwoto ka ma gicikanne iye-ni, Gubuto i kin Betel ki Ai, i ŋet Ai yo tuŋ potoceŋ; ento Yocwa obuto kacel ki lwak i dyewor meno." 
Joshua8:10 Odiko con Yocwa oa malo ocoko mony, ocako cito i nyim jo Ai kacel ki ludoŋo pa Icrael." 
Joshua8:11 Jo ma lulweny ducu ma gitye kwede gucito gunyiko cok ki gaŋ, gutoŋo gony i ŋet Ai yo tuŋ acam, kun nota tye i kingi ki Ai." 
Joshua8:12 Yocwa otero dano ma romo alip abic oketogi gubuto gukanne i kin Betel ki Ai i ŋet Ai yo tuŋ potoceŋ. 
Joshua8:13 Guketo mony i kabedogi kit meno kun gony madit tye i nyim gaŋ yo tuŋ acam ki dul mukanne tye i ŋe gaŋ yo tun potoceŋ. Yocwa obuto i nota i dyewor meno. 
Joshua8:14 Ka kabaka me Ai oneno man, ci en ki lwakke ducu, dano me gaŋ meno, gurune gucito gulor piny odiko con i luŋ mukemo Araba ka lweny i kom jo Icrael; ento kabaka pe ŋeyo ni jo mogo gubuto gukanne woko i ŋe gaŋ," 
Joshua8:15 Yocwa ki jo Icrael guporo ŋwec ki i nyimgi ni doŋ giryemogi woko, kun giriŋo gidok yo tuŋ tim," 
Joshua8:16 Gilwoŋo dano ducu ma i gaŋ gucokke kacel ka lubo korgi, ka guryemo kor Yocwa gucito ka mabor ki gaŋ." 
Joshua8:17 Dano acel mo pe odoŋ i Ai nyo i Betel ma pe okato woko i kor jo Icrael. Gubwoto dog gaŋ odoŋ ma twolo pi ryemo kor jo Icrael. 
Joshua8:18 Ka doŋ Rwot ociko Yocwa ni, “Tir toŋ alwiro ma tye i ciŋi-ni malo, ikem ki Ai, pien abimiyo woko i ciŋi.” Yocwa otiro toŋ alwiro ma tye i ciŋe-ni malo, okemo ki gaŋ." 
Joshua8:19 Oyotoyot jo ma gukanne-ni gua malo ki i kabedogi tekke Yocwa oryeyo cine malo, ci gutwarre guriŋo gudonyo i gaŋ, gumako woko, ka gurune gucwinyo mac me wano gaŋ woko." 
Joshua8:20 Ka jo Ai guneno yo ŋegi, ci nen, yito mac ma waŋo gaŋ tye ka duny mutiŋŋe wa malo i polo; ci ŋwec me riŋo yo tuŋŋi nyo tuŋŋi oloyogi woko, pien onoŋo jo ma guriŋo gudok yo tuŋ tim-mi gulokke gudwogo cen i kom luryem korgi." 
Joshua8:21 Ka doŋ Yocwa ki jo Icrael ducu guneno ni jo ma gubuto aŋec-ci doŋ gumako gaŋ woko, ki yito mac ma waŋo gaŋ bene doŋ duny cito malo, ci gudwogo cen ka neko jo Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Jo mukene gua ki i gaŋ gulwenyo bene i kom jo Ai; kit meno onoŋo jo Icrael gurumogi dyere, jo mukene ki yo tuŋcel ki jo mukene yo tuŋ mukene. Jo Icrael gunekogi nio ka pe gubwoto dano acel mo mudoŋ makwo nyo muriŋo obwot." 
Joshua8:23 Ento gumako kabaka me Ai makwo, gutero bot Yocwa." 
Joshua8:24 Ka jo Icrael doŋ gutyeko neko jo Ai ducu ma ginoŋogi i bar nyo i tim ka ma guryemo iye korgi-ni, nio ka gunekogi ducu ki pala lucwan, mo pe odoŋ, ci jo Icrael ducu gulokke gudok i gaŋ, guneko dano mudoŋ iye ki pala lucwan." 
Joshua8:25 Jo ducu ma guto i nino meno, co ki mon, guromo alip apar wiye aryo, jo Ai ducu." 
Joshua8:26 Yocwa pe odwoko ciŋe piny ma noŋo oryeyo otiro ki toŋ alwiro-ni, nio waŋ ma gijwero jo ma gibedo i Ai woko Liweŋ." 
Joshua8:27 Kono nyo lim makwo ki jami mogo ma giyako ki i gaŋ meno aye jo Icrael gutero obedo megi, macalo lok ma yam Rwot ociko ki Yocwa." 
Joshua8:28 Kit meno Yocwa owaoŋ Ai woko, oweko odoŋ odur ma odurre lipim matwal, kit ma tye kwede wa onyoo-ni." 
Joshua8:29 Odeyo kabaka me Ai, oŋabo malo i wi yat o wa otyeno. Ka ceŋ doŋ cito ka poto, Yocwa ociko dano ci gukwanyo kome woko ki i kom yat, gubolo piny i dog gaŋ ka ma gidonyo kwede i gaŋ-ŋi, ka gucano got i kome madwoŋ Likun, ma pud tye kenyo o kwede wa i kare man." 
Joshua8:30 Yocwa ocano keno tyer i wi got Ebal pi Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael," 
Joshua8:31 kit ma yam Moses Latic pa Rwot ociko ki jo Icrael. Olubo lok ma gicoyo i buk me cik pa Moses ni, “Wucan keno tyer ki got ma pe gipayo komgi, ma danomo pe otiŋo nyonyo i kome.” En aye gutyero iye gitum awaŋa bot Rwot, ci gutumo gityer lakwecwiny," 
Joshua8:32 Ci Yocwa ocoyo kopi me cik pa Moses i kom godi kunnu ki i nyim jo Icrael kun lubo kit ma yam Moses ocoyo. 
Joshua8:33 Ci jo Icrael ducu, lubedo ki anywalli, kacel ki ludoŋo ki ludito tic ki luŋolkopgi, gin ducu gucuŋ i get canduk pa Rwot tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi ki i nyim ajwagi ma Lulevi ma gutiŋo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot. Nucu dano gucuŋ i nyim got Gerijim ki nucu dano gucuŋ i nyim got Ebal, kit ma Moses latic pa. Rwot okwono cikogi kwede kit ma myero gilam kwede gum i kom jo Icrael." 
Joshua8:34 Ka lacen Yocwa okwano lok ducu ma i cik, wa lok me lamo gum ki lok me ceno dano ducu kikore macalo yam gicoyo ducu i buk me cik," 
Joshua8:35 Lok acel mo pe odoŋ i kom lok ducu ma Moses yam ociko ma Yocwa pe okwano i nyim kacokke pa jo Icrael ducu, kacel ki mon ki litino ki lubedo ma gibedo i kingi." 
Joshua9:1 Ka luker ducu ma nene gitye loka Jordan i lobo godi ki i lobo ma i pwor ma orabo ŋet Nam Madit mukemo Lebanon, ki jo Kit, jo Amor, jo Kanaan, jo Periji, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc guwinyo lok man," 
Joshua9:2 gucokke kacel pi lweny i kom Yocwa ki jo Icrael. 
Joshua9:3 Ento ka jo ma gibedo i Gibeon guwinyo gin ma Yocwa otimo i kom Jeriko ki i kom Ai," 
Joshua9:4 ci gin ki tuŋ botgi gutiyo ki ryeko mamalo mada. Guyubo peke me wot ki kicaa muti me atweya i wi kanagi, ki opiru kono ma guti woko, ma oyec atata ma gidabogi bene," 
Joshua9:5 ki war tyengi muti ma gidabogi, ki boŋŋi arukagi muti woko; ki pekegi ducu obedo mutwo woko, opuro woko bene," 
Joshua9:6 Gucito kwede bot Yocwa i gony ma i Gilgal, ci guwaco bot Yocwa ki bot jo Icrael ni, “Wan wabino ma waa ki i lobo mabor; pienno walegi ni icikke kwedwa kombeddi.”" 
Joshua9:7 Ento jo Icrael guwaco bot jo Kiv ni, “Gwok nyo wubedo i kinwa, ci dok watwero cikke kwedwu niŋniŋ?”" 
Joshua9:8 Guwaco bot Yocwa ni, “Wan doŋ luticci.” Ci Yocwa openyogi ni, “Wun kono wu jo kwene kaa? Dok bene wua ki kwene mono?”" 
Joshua9:9 Gugamo doge ni, “Wan waa ki i lobo mabor mada, ladit, pi nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋawu ma wawinyo gitito pire, ki pi gin ducu ma yam otimo i lobo Ejipt,"
