Joshua9:10 ki pi gin ducu ma en otimo i kom luker aryo pa jo Amor ma yam gitye loka Jordan ca, Cikon kabaka me Kecbon ki Og kabaka me Bacan ma yam bedo i Acitarot." 
Joshua9:11 Ci ludoŋowa ki jo ducu ma gibedo i lobowa guwaco botwa ni, ‘Wumak peke me wot i ciŋwu wek wucirwatte kwedgi, ci wuwac botgi ni, Wan luticwu, wek doŋ wacikke kwedwu.’" 
Joshua9:12 Kwonwa ene; wakwanyo ma onoŋo pud lyet i kare ma wa-a ki pacowa me acama i yo i nino ma wacako bino botwu-ni, ento kombeddi, nen, tye ma doŋ otwo dok opuro woko bene." 
Joshua9:13 Wa opiru koŋo vino ducu onoŋo pud ginyen i kare ma wapiko koŋo vino i igi-ni; doŋ wunen ba ka guyec woko. Ki ginarukawa ki war mewa doŋ guti woko pi wot man mabor-ri.’ 
Joshua9:14 Ludito gugamo pekegi gucamo, ma pe koŋ gupenyo dog Rwot." 
Joshua9:15 Ci Yocwa oturo ki yubo lok me kuc i kingi, ocikke kwedgi pi wekogi makwo; lutel wi lwak bene gukwoŋo kwoŋ botgi." 
Joshua9:16 Ka nino okato adek nia ki i kom nino ma gucikke kwedgi, lacen guwinyo ni jo-nu gitye kacel kwedgi kun gibedo i dyegi." 
Joshua9:17 Jo Icrael gucako wot ci guo i gaŋgi i nino me adekke. Gunoŋo gaŋ magi, Gibeon, Kepira, Beeroth ki Kiriat-jearim," 
Joshua9:18 Ento jo Icrael pe doŋ gunekogi, pien lutel wi lwak onoŋo doŋ gutyeko kwoŋe botgi i nyiŋ Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael. Ci lwak ducu gucako ŋur i kom lutel wi lwak-ki." 
Joshua9:19 Ento lutel wi lwak ducu guwaco bot lwak ducu ni, “Watyeko doŋ kwoŋo kwoŋ botgi i nyiŋ Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, pienno kombeddi pe doŋ watwero gudo komgi." 
Joshua9:20 Doŋ wabitimogi kit man; wabiwekogi gubed makwo wek pe wakel kiniga pa Lubaŋa i komwa pi kwoŋ ma doŋ wakwoŋo botgi-ni.” 
Joshua9:21 Ci guwaco bot lwak ni, “Wuwek gubed makwo, ento gibibedo lubar yen ki lutwom pii pi lwak ducu.’" 
Joshua9:22 Yocwa olwoŋogi ci owaco botgi ni, “Piŋo wubwola kun wuwaco ni, ‘Wan watye ka mabor kwedwu,’ kun kono wutye i dyewa?" 
Joshua9:23 Pienno kombeddi doŋ gicenowu woko; pi kare ducu wubibedo opii, lubar yen ki lutwom pii i ot pa Lubaŋana.”" 
Joshua9:24 Gugamo dog Yocwa ni, “Pien onoŋo doŋ gitito botwa lok me ada, ladit, ni Rwot Lubaŋa yam ociko laticce Moses pi miyowu lobo man ducu, dok ociko ni myero wujwer jo ma gibedo i lobo man woko ki i nyimwu; omiyo walworowu matek twatwal, en aye omiyo watimo man pi laro kwowa." 
Joshua9:25 Ci doŋ kombeddi in aye doŋ inen giri. Doŋ watye i ciŋi, in doŋ itim gin ma ineno ni ber dok oporre me atima i komwa.’" 
Joshua9:26 Otimogi kit man, olarogi ki i ciŋ jo Icrael, pe ginekogi." 
Joshua9:27 Ento cakke i nino meno Yocwa oketogi me bedo lubar yen ki lutwom pii pi lwak ki pi keno tyer pa Rwot, medde kwede o wa i kare man, i kabedo ma Rwot biyero." 
Joshua10:1 Adoni-jedek kabaka me Jerucalem owinyo kit ma Yocwa otyeko mako kwede Ai, ki kit ma ojwero woko liweŋ kun tiyo i kom Ai ki kabakane kit ma otyeko tiyo i kom Jeriko ki kabakane, owinyo bene kit ma jo Gibeon guyubo kwede lok me bedo ki jo Icrael ki kuc, doŋ gitye bene i kingi." 
Joshua10:2 Ci lworo omake matek twatwal, pien onoŋo Gibeon gaŋ madit ma rom ki gaŋ kaL kulu, dok onoŋo dit makato Ai, ki jo ma gibedo iye gubedo twoni matego." 
Joshua10:3 Mumiyo Adoni-jedek kabaka me Jerucalem ocwalo kwena bot Kokam kabaka me Kebron, Piram kabaka me Jarmut, Japia kabaka me Lakic ki Debir kabaka me Eglon kun wacci," 
Joshua10:4 “Wubin bota, wukonya, wubin walwenyu i kom jo Gibeon, pien doŋ guyubo lok me bedo ki kuc i kingi ki Yocwa: ki jo Icrael.”" 
Joshua10:5 Ci luker pa jo Amor abic-ci gucoko monygi, gucito kacel ki lulwenygi ducu, gutoŋo gony cok ki Gibeon, gucako lweny i kome." 
Joshua10:6 Ci jo Gibeon gucwalo kwena bot Yocwa wa i gony ma i Gilgal kun giwaco ni, “Pe ikwany ciŋi woko ki i komwa, wan luticci; bin botwa oyotoyot wek ilarwa. Konywa pien luker ducu pa jo Amor ma gibedo i lobo godi-ni gucokke ka monyowa.”" 
Joshua10:7 Mumiyo Yocwa oa ki i Gilgal ocito kunnu kacel ki lumony ducu ki twoni oteka lweny ducu. 
Joshua10:8 Ci Rwot owaco bot Yocwa ni, “Pe ilwor, pien atyeko miyogi i ciŋi. Pe tye dano mo ma bicuŋ i nyimi.”" 
Joshua10:9 Yocwa orune obino i komgi oyotoyot, kun oa ki i Gilgal owoto kwede dyewor benebene." 
Joshua10:10 Ci Rwot oonyo atiba lworo i kom jo-nu i nyim jo Icrael, omiyo gunekogi ki cwar nek madit twatwal i Gibeon; guryemo korgi i yo ma dok yo tuŋ malo ma kemo Bet-koron, kun ginekogi o kwede wa i Ajeka ki i Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 I kare ma giriŋo i nyim jo Icrael ma gilor kwede i luŋ me Bet-koron, Rwot ocako coro lwak gweŋi madito i komgi mua ki i polo o kwede wa i Ajeka, ci merok guto mapol; pee meno oneko lwak merok mapol makato dano ma jo Icrael gunekogi ki pala lucwan." 
Joshua10:12 I nino ma Rwot omiyo iye jo Amor i ciŋ jo Icrael, Yocwa oloko bot Rwot i nyim jo Icrael kun wacci, “In cen, cuŋ mot i wi Gibeon, ki in dwe, cuŋ i nota me Aijalon.”" 
Joshua10:13 Ci ceŋ ocuŋ mot atir, ki dwe bene obedo mot, nio ka jo Icrael guculo kwor i kom lumerokgi. Lok man gicoyo i buk pa Jacar. Ceŋ ocuŋ mot i dye polo, pe orune me poto woko oyot ma cok romo nino acel kulu." 
Joshua10:14 Nino mo yam peya obedo kit man nia wa i kare macon o kwede wa i kare man, ma Rwot owinyo iye dog dano; pien onoŋo Rwot aye obedo ka lweny pi Icrael." 
Joshua10:15 Lacen Yocwa ki jo Icrael ducu gudok cen i gony me Gilgal. 
Joshua10:16 Luker meno abic guriŋo, gukanne woko i boro ma i ŋet Makeda." 
Joshua10:17 Ci gitito bot Yocwa ni, “Luker abic-ci ginoŋogi gukanne i boro ma i ŋet Makeda.”" 
Joshua10:18 Yocwa owacci, “Wulor dog boro woko ki kidi madoŋo, ci wuket dano gubed cok ka kurogi." 
Joshua10:19 Ento wun pe wubed kunnu abeda, wuciryem kor lumerokwu, wulweny i kom jo mudoŋ cen i ŋegi, pe dok wuwek gudony i gaŋigi; pien Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ otyeko miyogi i ciŋwu.”" 
Joshua10:20 Ka Yocwa ki jo Icrael gutyeko neko lukworgi madwoŋ twatwal, nio ka guyweyogi woko ducu, ki jo ma gubwotte noŋo gudonyo i gaŋgi ma gicelo ki cel gogo," 
Joshua10:21 ci lwak ducu gudok cen bot Yocwa ma onoŋo tye i gony i Makeda; pe doŋ tye dano mo ma loko lok mo me lweny i kom jo Icrael. 
Joshua10:22 Yocwa dok owacci, “Doŋ wuyab dog boro woko, ci wukwany luker abic-ci ki i boro, wukelgi bota kany.”" 
Joshua10:23 Gutimo kit meno; gukwanyo luker abic-ci ki i boro gukelogi bote, kabaka me Jerucalem, kabaka me Kebron, kabaka me Jarmut, kabaka me Lakic ki kabaka me Eglon." 
Joshua10:24 Ka doŋ gikwanyo luker-ru woko, gikelogi bot Yocwa, Yocwa olwoŋo jo Icrael ducu, ci owaco bot ludito mony ma yam gucito kwede ni, “Wubin cok, wuket tyenwu i ŋut luker abic-ci.” Gubino cok, guketo tyengi i ŋutgi." 
Joshua10:25 Yocwa dok owaco botgi ni, “Pe wulwor, pe cwinywu opoti; wubed oteka ma cwinywu nwaŋ, pien Rwot bitimo lumerokwu ducu ma wubilwenyo kwedgi kit meno.”" 
Joshua10:26 Ka doŋ Yocwa ocobogi onekogi woko, ka oŋabo komgi malo i wi yadi abic, gulyerre i wi yadi nio wa otyeno." 
Joshua10:27 Ento i kare ma ceŋ doŋ mito poto, Yocwa ociko, ci gikwanyogi woko ki i wi yadi, gibologi i boro ma nene gukanne iye-ni, ci giloro dog boro woko ki godi madito ma pud gitye kunnu nio wa onyoo." 
Joshua10:28 Yocwa omako Makeda i nino meno, oneko jo Makeda ki kabakagi ki pala lucwan, ojwerogi woko liweŋ, pe oweko iye dano mo ma obwot; otimo kabaka me Makeda kit ma yam otimo kwede kabaka me Jeriko-ni." 
Joshua10:29 Yocwa oa woko ki i Makeda, okato ocito i Libna kacel ki jo Icrael ducu, olwenyo i kome," 
Joshua10:30 Rwot dok omiyo gaŋ, meno kacel ki kabakane i cin jo Icrael. Guneko jo Libna ducu ki pala lucwan, i kom dano ducu ma tye iye pe guweko acel mo mubwot; gutimo kabaka me kunnu kit ma nene gutimo kwede kabaka me Jeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Yocwa oa woko ki i Libna, okato ocito wa i Lakic kacel ki jo Icrael ducu, ci obuto orumo woko likiŋ ka olwenyo i kome." 
Joshua10:32 Rwot omiyo Lakic i ciŋ jo Icrael ci Yocwa omako woko i nino me aryone, oneko jo Lakic woko ki pala lucwan, dano ma tye iye ducu, kit ma nene otimo i kom Libna-ni." 
Joshua10:33 Koram kabaka me Gejar obino ka konyo jo Lakic, ci Yocwa olwenyo i kome, oneke kacel ki jone ducu, pe oweko dano mo obwot." 
Joshua10:34 Yocwa dok oa woko ki i Lakic okato ocito i Eglon kacel ki jo Icrael ducu; obuto orumo woko likiŋ ci olwenyo i kome. 
Joshua10:35 Gumako woko i nino meno, guneko jo Eglon ki pala lucwan, gujwero dano ducu ma gitye iye woko liweŋ, kit ma nene gutimo i kom Lakic." 
Joshua10:36 Yocwa dok oa woko ki i Eglon, ocito wa i Kebron kacel ki jo Icrael, olwenyo i kome," 
Joshua10:37 omako woko oneko jo Kebron woko ki pala lucwan kacel ki kabakane ki gaŋi ducu ma i ŋete. Guneko dano ducu ma tye iye, pe guweko mo acel obwot. Yocwa ojwero woko liweŋ kacel ki dano ‘ma gitye iye ducu, kit ma nene otimo i kom Eglon." 
Joshua10:38 Yocwa ki jo Icrael ducu gulokke gudwogo cen i kom Debir, gulwenyo i kome," 
Joshua10:39 gumako woko kacel ki kabakane ki gaŋi ma i ŋete ducu, gunekogi woko ki pala lucwan. Yocwa ojwero dano ducu ma gitye iye woko liweŋ, pe oweko iye dano acel mo mubwot. Otimo Debir ki kabakane kit ma nene otimo i kom Kebron ki i kom Libna ki kabakane." 
Joshua10:40 Yocwa oloyo lobo-nu ducu kit meno, lobo godi ki Negeb ki pwor got ki luŋ ki lukergi ducu, pe oweko gin mo makwo obwot. Ojwero gin makwo woko ducu liweŋ kit ma yam Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael ociko-ni." 
Joshua10:41 Yocwa oloyogi cakke i Kadec-bamea o kwede wa i Gaja, kacel ki lobo Gocen ducu o wa i Gibeon." 
Joshua10:42 Omako luker-ru ducu ki lobogi ducu lawaŋacel, pien Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael aye noŋo obedo ka lweny pi Icrael." 
Joshua10:43 Lacen Yocwa odok cen kacel ki jo Icrael i gony ma i Gilgal. 
Joshua11:1 Ka Jabin kabaka me Kajor owinyo pire, ci ocwalo kwena bot Jobab kabaka me Madon, ki bot kabaka me Cimron ki kabaka me Akicap," 
Joshua11:1 Ka Jabin kabaka me Kajor owinyo pire, ci ocwalo kwena bot Jobab kabaka me Madon, ki bot kabaka me Cimron ki kabaka me Akicap," 
Joshua11:2 ki bot luker ma gitye yo tuŋ acam i lobo godi, ki i Araba i ŋet nam me Kinerot yo tun acuc, ki i lobo ma i pwor, ki i Napot-dor ma yo tun potoceŋ," 
Joshua11:3 bot jo Kanaan ma yo tun wokceŋ ki tun potoceŋ, ki bot jo Amor, jo Kit, jo Perej, jo Jebuc ma i lobo godi, ki jo Kiv ma i te got Kermon i lobo Mijpa." 
Joshua11:4 Luker meno ducu gubino ki buca monygi ducu, mony madwoŋ ma welgi rom ki kweyo me dog nam, ki lwak aguragura ki gadigadi lweny mapol." 
Joshua11:5 Gutoro monygi ducu kacel, ci gubino” gugony kacel i ŋet pii me Merom pi lweny i kom jo Icrael." 
Joshua11:6 Rwot owaco bot Yocwa ni, “Pe lworo omaki i komgi, pien diki ca onyoo noŋo doŋ amiyogi i ciŋ-jo Icrael, noŋo doŋ gunekogi woko ducu. Wubitoŋo odoŋ aguraguragi ducu, wuwaŋo gadigadi lwenygi woko ki mac.”" 
Joshua11:7 Yocwa ocito opoto i komgi atura ki lwak monnye ducu ki i ŋet pii me Merom, olwenyo kwedgi." 
Joshua11:8 Ci Rwot omiyogi i ciŋjo Icrael, gulwenyo i komgi matek, guryemo korgi o kwede wa i Cidon Maditte ki i Micrepot-maim, yo tun potoceŋ ki wa i nota me Mijpe yo tuŋ wokceŋ kun ginekogi weŋ ma acel mo pe guweko obwot." 
Joshua11:9 Yocwa otimogi kit ma nene Rwot ocike kwede; otoŋo odoŋ aguraguragi ducu, owaŋo gadigadi lwenygi woko awaŋa." 
Joshua11:10 Ka man otum, Yocwa odok cen ka mako Kajor, oneko kabakane ki pala lucwan. I kare ca onoŋo Kajor aye gaŋ madit ma loyo lwak ker meno ducu." 
Joshua11:11 Jo Icrael guneko jo ma onoŋo gitye iye ducu ki pala lucwan, gujwerogi woko liweŋ, pe guweko gin mo makwo obwot; ci guwaŋo Kajor woko." 
Joshua11:12 Kit meno Yocwa omako luker meno ducu, ki gaŋigi, onekogi woko ki pala lucwan, omedo ki jwerogi woko liweŋ macalo gin ma gidyero bot Rwot, kit ma Moses latic pa Rwot onoŋo ocike kwede-ni," 
Joshua11:13 Ento jo Icrael pe guwaŋo gaŋi ma gigero i wi lobo ma gitoro malo macalo got-ti, kono Kajor keken aye Yocwa owaŋo woko." 
Joshua11:14 Jo Icrael guyako gaŋi meno ducu, gutero lim makwo ki jami ma guyako obedo megi; ento guneko dano woko ducu ki pala lucwan nio ka gutyekogi woko ducu, pe guweko gin mo makwo obwot." 
Joshua11:15 Kit macalo Rwot yam ociko ki laticce Moses, Moses bene ociko ki Yocwa kit meno, ci Yocwa oketo i tic; otiyo gin ducu ma yam Rwot ociko ki Moses, pe oweko cik mo odoŋ ma pe ocobo kakare." 
Joshua11:16 Yocwa omako lobo meno ducu kit meno, lobo godigodi, ki Negeb ducu, lobo Gocen, pwor got. Araba ki lobo godi me Icrael ki lobo pwor-gu ma i ŋete," 
Joshua11:17 cakke wa i kom got Kalak ka ma lobo otiŋŋe odok kwede tuŋ Ceir, o wa i Baal-gad ma i nota Lebanon ma i te got Kermon. Omako lukergi ducu, onekogi woko." 
Joshua11:18 Yocwa obedo ka lweny ki luker meno pi kare malac. 
Joshua11:19 Pe tye gaŋ mo ma oyubo lok me kuc ki jo Icrael, kono nyo jo Kiv ma gibedo i Gibeon keken; gaŋi ducu gumakogi ki lweny," 
Joshua11:20 pien Rwot aye obedo ka miyo cwinygi obedo tek wek gubin ka lweny i kom jo Icrael ka wek gujwergi woko liweŋ ma pe kica mako dano mo i komgi, ento ginekgi woko, mo pe odoŋ, kit ma yam Rwot ociko ki Moses." 
Joshua11:21 I kare meno bene Yocwa ocito ka jwero jo Anak woko ki i lobo godi; ojwerogi ki i Kebron, Debir ki Anab, i lobo godi me Juda ki me Icrael; ojwerogi woko liweŋ kacel ki gaŋigi ducu." 
Joshua11:22 Pe guweko jo Anak mo obwot, ki i lobo pa jo Icrael; kono nyo i Gaja keken ki i Gat ki i Acidod, kunnu aye jo Anak mogo gudoŋ iye." 
Joshua11:23 Yocwa omako lobo ducu kit meno, kit macalo yam Rwot oloko bot Moses; lacen omiyo bot jo Icrael me bedo ginaleyagi i kakagi, ma lubo kit ma kwir omakogi kwede, ci lobo doŋ ocako ywe, lweny doŋ obedo pe." 
Joshua12:1 Magi aye nyiŋ luker ma i lobo-nu ma jo Icrael guloyogi ci gumako lobogi ma i loka Jordan yo tuŋ wokceŋ, gucamo odoko megi, cakke wa i kulu Amon o kwede wa i got Kermon, kacel ki Araba ducu ma yo tuŋ potoceŋ:" 
Joshua12:2 en aye Cikon kabaka pa jo Amor ma yam bedo i Kecbon kun loyo kwede lobo cakke wa i Aroer ma tye i dog nota me kulu Amon, dok cakke ki i dye nota-nu o kwede i kulu Jabok ma waŋ lobo pa jo Ammon, en aye nucu lobo Gilead;" 
Joshua12:3 kacel ki Araba o wa i nam me Kinerot tuŋ wokceŋ ki tuŋ yo mukemo Bet-jecimot o wa i nam me Araba, ma en aye nam me Kado, cito kwede wa i pwor got Piciga." 
Joshua12:4 Ka doki Og kabaka me Bacan, en aye ŋat acel ma yam odoŋ ki i kom jo Repaim, ma yam bedo i Acitarot ki i Edrei." 
Joshua12:5 En yam loyo got Kermon ki Caleka ki Bacan o kwede wa i waŋ lobo pa jo Gecur ki jo Maaka, ki nucu lobo Gilead o wa i waŋ lobo pa Cikon kabaka me Kecbon." 
Joshua12:6 Moses ma latic pa Rwot yam oloyogi kacel ki jo Icrael; ci Moses latic pa Rwot omiyo lobogi bot jo pa Reuben ki jo pa Gad ki nucu kaka pa Manace obed megi. 
Joshua12:7 Magi aye luker ma i lobo-nu ma yam Yocwa ki jo Icrael guloyogi loka Jordan yo tuŋ potoceŋ, cakke ki i Baal-gad i nota me Lebanon o wa i got Kalak ka ma lobo otiŋŋe odok kwede yo tuŋ Ceir, Yocwa omiyo lobogi bot jo Icrael me bedo megi kun gipoko ma lubo kwir ma gibolo," 
Joshua12:8 i lobo godi, ki i lobo ma i nota, i Araba, i lobo ma i pwor got, i tim, i Negeb ki i lobo pa jo Kit, jo Amor, jo Kanaan, jo Periji, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc; nyiŋgi ene:" 
Joshua12:9 kabaka me Jeriko, kabaka me Ai ma tye i ŋet Betel;" 
Joshua12:10 kabaka me Jerucalem, kabaka me Kebron;" 
Joshua12:11 kabaka me Jarmut, kabaka me Lakic;" 
Joshua12:12 kabaka me Eglon, kabaka me Gejer;" 
Joshua12:13 kabaka me Debir, kabaka me Geder;" 
Joshua12:14 kabaka me Korma, kabaka me Arad;" 
Joshua12:15 kabaka me Libna, kabaka me Adulam;" 
Joshua12:16 kabaka me Makeda, kabaka me Betel;" 
Joshua12:17 kabaka me Tapua, kabaka me Keper;" 
Joshua12:18 kabaka me Apek, kabaka me Apek ma i Caron;" 
Joshua12:19 kabaka me Madon, kabaka me Kajor;" 
Joshua12:20 kabaka me Cimronmeron, kabaka me Akicap;" 
Joshua12:21 kabaka, me Taanak, kabaka me Megido;" 
Joshua12:22 kabaka me Kedec, kabaka me Jokneam ma i Karmel;" 
Joshua12:23 kabaka me Dor ma i Napat-dor, kabaka me Goyim ma i Galilaya;" 
Joshua12:24 ki kabaka me Tirija; gin ducu guromo pyeradek wiye acel. 
Joshua13:1 I kare ma Yocwa doŋ oti woko, ma mwaka me ditte doŋ dwoŋ, Rwot owaco bote ni, “In doŋ iti woko ma mwaka me ditti doŋ dwoŋ, ento pud lobo odoŋ mabup ma myero obed mewu." 
Joshua13:2 Magi aye nyiŋ lobo ma pud gudoŋ: lobo pa jo Pilciti ducu ki berre, ki lobo pa jo Gecur ducu." 
Joshua13:3 (Lobo meno ducu gikwano ni pa jo Kanaan, cakke wa i Cikor ma i ŋet Ejipt yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede i yo tuŋ acam o wa i waŋ lobo me Ekron; tye i te loc pa rwodi abic pa jo Piliciti, rwodi me Gaja, Acidod, Acikelon, Gat ki Ekron.) Pud odoŋ lobo ducu pa jo Ayi bene" 
Joshua13:4 yo tuŋ acuc; ka doki lobo ducu pa jo Kanaan cakke ki i Me-ara pa jo Cidon cito kwede wa i Apek ma i waŋ lobo pa jo Amor; 
Joshua13:5 ki lobo pa jo Gebal, ki Lebanon ducu ma tuŋ kunyaŋo, cakke ki i Baal-gad ma i te got Kermon o kwede i yo ma donyo i Kamat." 
Joshua13:6 An ki koma abiryemo woko ki i nyim jo Icrael jo ducu ma gibedo i lobo godi, cakke ki i Lebanon o kwede i Micrepot-maim, en aye jo Cidon ducu. In aye ipok lobo-ni bot jo Icrael ki bolo kwir wek obed ginaleyagi, kit ma yam aciki kwede-ni," 
Joshua13:7 Kombeddi doŋ ipok lobo man obed me aleya pa kaka aboŋwen mudoŋ ki pa nucu kaka pa Manace.” 
Joshua13:8 Nucu kaka mukene pa jo Manace, kacel ki jo pa Reuben ki jo pa Gad onoŋo doŋ gutyeko gamo ginaleyagi ki i loka Jordan tuŋ wokceŋ, kit macalo Moses latic pa Rwot omiyo botgi," 
Joshua13:9 cakke ki i Aroer ma tye i dog nota me kulu Amon ki gaŋ ma tye i dye nota-nu, kacel ki abami me Medema o wa i Dibon;" 
Joshua13:10 ki gaŋi ducu pa Cikon kabaka pa jo Amor ma yam obedo ka loc i Kecbon o kwede i waŋ apokki lobo pa jo Ammon; 
Joshua13:11 ki lobo Gilead bene, ki lobo pa jo Gecur ki jo Maaka, got Kermon ducu, ki lobo Bacan ducu o wa i Caleka;" 
Joshua13:12 ki ker ducu pa Og ma gaŋ kalle yam gubedo Acitarot ki Edrei i lobo Bacan. En kene aye yam odoŋ ki i kin jo Repaim; kabaka aryonu Moses oloyogi, oryemogi woko." 
Joshua13:13 Ento jo Icrael pe guryemo jo Gecur ki jo Maaka; jo Gecur ki jo Maaka pud gibedo i dye jo Icrael o wa onyoo. 
Joshua13:14 Kaka pa Levi keken aye Moses pe omiyo botgi lobo mo me aleya; gityer ma giwaŋo ki mac bot Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael aye gubedo ma ka ginaleyagi, kit ma Rwot yam owaco bote-ni." 
Joshua13:15 Moses yam omiyo ginaleya bot kaka pa jo pa Reuben muporo dogolagi ducu. 
Joshua13:16 Pienno waŋ lobogi ocakke ki i Aroer ma tye i dog nota kulu Amon, ki gaŋ ma tye i dye nota-nu, okwako lobo abami ducu ma orabo ŋet Medeba;" 
Joshua13:17 kacel ki Kecbon ki gaŋine ducu ma guryeyo wi abami kunnu, Dibon, Bamot-baal, Bet-baalmeon," 
Joshua13:18 Jakaj, Kedemot, Mepat," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriataim, Cibma, Jeret-cakar ma gigero i wi got ma i dye nota," 
Joshua13:20 Betpeor, pwor got Piciga, ki Bet-jecimot," 
Joshua13:21 meno aye gaŋi ducu ma gitye i wi abami, ki ker ducu pa Cikon kabaka pa jo Amor ma gaŋ kalle yam tye i Kecbon, ma yam Moses olwenyo kwede oloyo woko, kacel ki ludito pa jo Midian ma gubedo i lobo-nu i te loc pa Cikon; nyiŋgi aye Eyi, Rekem, Jur, Kur ki Reba," 
Joshua13:22 Balaam wod pa Beor bene, ma Latyet, obedo i kin jo ma jo Icrael gunekogi ki pala lucwan." 
Joshua13:23 Kulu Jordan obedo waŋ lobo pa jo Reuben. Meno aye obedo ginaleya pa jo pa Reuben ma oporo wel doggolagi, meno aye gaŋigi ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua13:24 Moses omiyo ginaleya bot jo pa Gad bene muporo wel doggolagi. 
Joshua13:25 Lobogi obedo Jajer ki gaŋi me lobo Gilead ducu, ki nucu lobo pa jo Ammon o wa i Aroer ma tye i ŋet Raba, yo tuŋ wokceŋ," 
Joshua13:26 cakke ki i Kecbon cito kwede wa i Ramat-mijpe ki Betonim, dok cakke ki i Makanaim cito kwede i waŋ lobo me Lo-debar," 
Joshua13:27 kacel ki Bet-aram, Bet-nimra, Cukot ki Japon, gaŋi ma i nota, en aye lobo mudoŋ ki i kom ker pa Cikon kabaka me Kecbon. Waŋ lobogi obedo kulu Jordan cito kwede wa i but nam me Kineret tuŋ acuc, loka Jordan tuŋ wokceŋ," 
Joshua13:28 Meno aye obedo ginaleya pa jo pa Gad muporo wel doggolagi, meno aye gaŋigi ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua13:29 Moses omiyo ginaleya bot nucu kaka pa. Manace bene; opoko bot nucu kaka pa Manace muporo wel doggolagi. 
Joshua13:30 Lobogi ocakke ki i Makanaim, okwako lobo Bacan ducu, en aye ker pa Og kabaka me Bacan ducu liweŋ, ki gaŋi me Jair ducu ma gitye i Bacan, gaŋi pyerabicel," 
Joshua13:31 ki nucu lobo Gilead, kacel ki Acitarot ki Edrei ma gin aye gaŋ kal pa Og i lobo Bacan. Meno ducu gipoko bot jo pa Makir wod pa Manace, pi nucu kaka pa jo Makir muporo wel doggolagi," 
Joshua13:32 Meno aye ginaleya ma yam Moses opoko i lobo aroo me Moab ma loka Jordan tuŋ wokceŋ mukemo Jeriko. 
Joshua13:33 Ento ki tun bot jo Levi Moses pe omiyogi ginaleya mo; onoŋo Rwot Lubaŋagi aye obedo ginaleyagi, kit ma yam owaco botgi-ni." 
Joshua14:1 Magi aye ginaleya ma jo Icrael gulimo ki i lobo Kanaan, ma jo magi aye gupoko botgi: ajwaka Eleajar, Yocwa wod pa Nun ki ludito kaka ma i odi pa kwarogi." 
Joshua14:2 Ginaleyagi gipoko ki bolo kwir kit ma yam Rwot ociko bot Moses ni myero gipok kwede bot kaka aboŋwen ki nucu mudoŋ-ŋi," 
Joshua14:3 Moses onoŋo yam opoko lobo aleya bot kaka aryo ki nucu ki i loka Jordan. Jo Levi keken aye pe gimiyo botgi lobo mo me aleyagi. 
Joshua14:4 Likwayo pa Yucepu onoŋo gupokke i kaka aryo, jo Manace ki jo Epraim; ento pe gimiyo dul lobo mo bot jo Levi me aleyagi; gimiyogi gaŋi me bedogi keken ki olet me kwayo dyaŋigi ki Limgi mukene makwo." 
Joshua14:5 Jo Icrael gupoko lobo i kingi kun gitiyo kit ma onoŋo Rwot ociko ki Moses. 
Joshua14:6 I kare meno jo pa Juda gubino bot Yocwa i Gilgal, ci Kaleb wod pe Jepune ma jo Keniji owaco bote ni, “In iŋeyo gin ma yam Rwot ociko bot Moses ma dano pa Lubaŋa-ni, ma ociko ki i Kadec-bamea, lok ma dok i komi ki i koma." 
Joshua14:7 Onoŋo doŋ mwaka me ditta romo pyeraŋwen i kare ma Moses latic pa Lubaŋa ocwala ki i Kadec-bamea pi roto lobo, ci adwogo ki lok kit ma yam tye kwede i cwinya." 
Joshua14:8 Utmegiwa ma yam gucito kweda-ni gumiyo cwiny lwak oŋabbe aŋaba, ento an yam alubo gin ma Rwot Lubaŋana mito ducu kikore." 
Joshua14:9 Moses okwoŋo kwoŋ i nino meno kun wacci, ‘Adada, lobo ma yam inyono ki tyeni bibedo ginaleyani ki pa likwayi matwal, pien ibedo ka lubo gin ma Rwot Lubaŋana omito ki cwinyi ducu.’" 
Joshua14:10 Kombeddi nen ka Rwot pud ogwoka atye makwo wa onyoo kit ma yam owaco-ni, odoko doŋ mwaka pyeraŋwen wiye abic a kwede wa i kare ca ma Rwot owaco iye lok man bot Moses, ma onoŋo jo Icrael pud gitye ka wirre i tim kuca; kombeddi doŋ inen, mwaka me ditta doŋ oromo pyeraboro wiye abic." 
Joshua14:11 Ento koma pud tek wa i kare man ma rom ki i kare ma yam Moses ocwala kwede ca; i kare-ni tek koma pud rom ki tek koma macon ca, pud aromo lweny, aromo cito ka mo-ni ci adwogo bene." 
Joshua14:12 Pienno miya lobo-ni ma bedo lobo godi, ma yam Rwot owaco pire i kare ca. Yam iwinyo i kare meno ni jo Anak gitye kunnu kun gitye ki cog gaŋigi madito ma girumogi woko ki cel matego; ka gwok nyo Rwot bibedo kweda ci abiryemogi woko kit macalo Rwot yam owaco.”" 
Joshua14:13 Yocwa olamo gum i kome, ci omiyo Kebron bot Kaleb wod pa Jepune wek obed ginaleyane." 
Joshua14:14 Kit meno Kebron odoko ginaleya pa likwayo pa Kaleb wod pa Jepune ma jo Keniji o wa onyoo, pien obedo ka lubo gin ma Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael mito ducu kikore." 
Joshua14:15 Nyiŋ Kebron okwoŋo bedo Kiriat-arba, dok Arba meno yam obedo dano madit makato ducu ki i kin jo Anak. Ci lobo doŋ oywe, lweny obedo pe." 
Joshua15:1 Dul lobo ma gipoko bot kaka pa jo Juda ki bolo kwir muporo doggolagi obedo yo tuŋ acuc cok ki waŋ lobo pa jo Edom, i tim Jin ci ogik i Negeb tuŋ acuc." 
Joshua15:2 Waŋ lobogi yo tuŋ acuc ocakke i agikki nam me Kado ki i wen nam ma okemo tuŋ acuc; 
Joshua15:3 ka dok ocito kwede yo tuŋ acuc ka ma giito iye malo i Akrabim, ka okato wa i Jin, ocito kwede malo i ŋet Kadec-bamea yo tuŋ acuc, orabo ŋet Kejeron o wa i Adar, ka dok olokke odok kwede Karka." 
Joshua15:4 Ka dok okato ocito i Ajimon, oo i nota ora me Ejipt, ka ogik i dog nam Meno aye waŋ lobogi yo tuŋ acuc." 
Joshua15:5 Waŋ lobogi yo tuŋ wokceŋ aye nam me Kado o ka ma kulu Jordan gik iye. Waŋ lobo yo tuŋ acuc ocakke i wen nam ka ma Jordan ogik iye," 
Joshua15:6 ka dok cito Bet-kogla, kato kwede i ŋet Bet-araba yo tuŋ acam, o wa i got ma Boan wod pa Reuben ocibo." 
Joshua15:7 Ka dok cito malo Debir kun oa ki i nota me Akor, kemo kwede yo tuŋ acam, ka doŋ lokke ka kemo Gilgal ma i nyim kor got ka ma giito iye malo i Adumim ma i ŋet nota ora yo tuŋ acuc, Ka doŋ kato cito wa i pii me En-cemec ci gik kwede i En-rogel." 
Joshua15:8 Ki kunnu waŋ lobo lubo nota pa wod pa Kinom i kor got pa jo Jebuc yo tuŋ acuc (en aye Jerucalem). Ka dok waŋ lobo cito malo i wi got ma okemo nota pa Kinom yo tuŋ potoceŋ, i agikki luŋ me Repaim yo tuŋ acuc," 
Joshua15:9 ci medde kun a ki i wi got cito i waŋ pii me Neputoa, kato kwede wa i gaŋi ma i got Epron, ci lokke mano yo tuŋ Baala (en aye Kiriat-jearim);" 
Joshua15:10 ka oa ki i Baala ci gono cito kun kemo tuŋ potoceŋ o kwede i got Ceir, kato kwede i kor got Jearim yo tuŋ acam (en aye Kecalon). Ka dok cito piny i Bet-cemec, kato kwede i ŋet Timna." 
Joshua15:11 Waŋ lobo a ki kunnu cito i kor got ma i ŋet Ekron tuŋ acam, ka dok lokke cito Cikeron, kato kwede wa i got Baala, cito i Jabneel; ka dok gik woko i dog nam" 
Joshua15:12 Waŋ lobo yo tuŋ potoceŋ lubo dog Nam Madit ki Waŋ watte. Meno aye waŋ lobo ducu mukwako lobo pa jo Juda ma oporo doggolagi. 
Joshua15:13 Kaleb wod pa Jepune yam gimiyo dul lobo i kin jo pa Juda, kit ma onoŋo Rwot ociko ki Yocwa. Yocwa omiye Kiriat-arba, en aye Kebron. Arba obedo kwaro pa jo Anak." 
Joshua15:14 Ci Kaleb oryemo likwayo adek pa Anak ma yam tye kunnu, gin Cecai, Akiman ki Talmai." 
Joshua15:15 Oa ki kunnu ocito olwenyo i kom jo ma gibedo Debir. Nyiŋ Debir yam obedo Kiriat-ceper," 
Joshua15:16 Ci Kaleb owacci, “Ka ŋatti mo olwenyo i kom Kiriat-ceper ce oloyo, ci abimiye nyara Akaca obed dakone.”" 
Joshua15:17 ‘Otiniel wod pa Kenaj omin Kaleb aye oloyo, ci Kaleb omiye nyare Akaca obedo dakone." 
Joshua15:18 Ka nyako ocito bot cware, ci odiye ni openy poto mo bot wonne. Opye piny ki i wi kanane ci Kaleb openye ni, “Imito gin aŋo?”" 
Joshua15:19 Nyare ogamo ni, “Miya mot mo. Macalo doŋ iketa wa i lobo Negeb, dok imiya waŋ it mo bene.” Kaleb omiye Waŋ it ma tuŋ malo ki waŋ it ma tuŋ piny bene;" 
Joshua15:20 Man aye ginaleya pa jo me kaka pa Juda ma oporo doggolagi. 
Joshua15:21 Gaŋigi ma obedo ka ma lobogi ogik iye yo tuŋ acuc i Negeb, ma dok yo tuŋ waŋ lobo pa jo Edom gin ene: Kabeel, Eder, Jagur," 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dimona, Adada," 
Joshua15:23 Kedec, Kajor, Itnan," 
Joshua15:24 Jip, Telem, Bealot," 
Joshua15:25 Kajor-kadata, Keriot-kejeron, ma en aye Kajor," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Cema, Molada," 
Joshua15:27 Kajar-gada, Kecmon, Betpelet," 
Joshua15:28 Kajar-cual, Beer-ceba, Bijiotia," 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Iyim, Ejem," 
Joshua15:30 Eltolad, Kecil, Korma," 
Joshua15:31 Jiklag, Madmana, Cancana," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaot, Cilim, Ain ki Rimmon; gin ducu gaŋi pyeraryo ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:33 Gaŋigi ma obedo i pwor gin ene: Ectaol, Jora, Acna," 
Joshua15:34 Janoa, Enganim, Tapua, Enam," 
Joshua15:35 Jarmut, Adulam, Coko, Ajeka," 
Joshua15:36 Caaraim, Aditaim, Gedera, ki Gederotaim; gaŋi apar wiye aŋwen ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:37 Jenan, Kadaca, Migdal-gad," 
Joshua15:38 Dilean, Mijpe, Jokteel," 
Joshua15:39 Lakic, Bojkat, Eglon," 
Joshua15:40 Kabon,” Lamam. Kitlic," 
Joshua15:41 Gederot, Bet-dagon, Naama ki Makeda; gaŋi apar wiye abicel ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:42 Libna, Eter, Acan," 
Joshua15:43 Ipta, Acna, Nejib," 
Joshua15:44 Keila, Akijib ki Mareca; gaŋi aboŋwen ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:45 Ekron ki gaŋi madito ki matinone ma i ŋete; 
Joshua15:46 dok cakke ki i Ekton cito kwede i dog nam gaŋi ducu ma gibedo yo tuŋ Acidod ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi. 
Joshua15:47 Acidod kacel ki gaŋi madito ki matino ma i ŋete; Gaja ki gaŋi madito ki matino ma i ŋete cito wa i nota ora me Ejipt ki Nam Madit ki waŋ watte. 
Joshua15:48 I lobo godi, Camir, Jatir, Coko," 
Joshua15:49 Dana, Kiriat-cana, en aye Debir," 
Joshua15:50 Anab, Ectemo, Anim," 
Joshua15:51 Gooen, Kolon ki Gilo; gaŋi apar wiye acel ki gaŋi matino ma i netgi," 
Joshua15:52 Arab, Duma, Eean," 
Joshua15:53 Janim, Bettapua, Apeka," 
Joshua15:54 Kumta, Kiriat-arba, en aye Kebron, ki Jior; gaŋi aboŋwen ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:55 Maon, Karmel, Jip, Juta," 
Joshua15:56 Jejreel, Jokdeam, Janoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kain, Gibea ki Timna; gaŋi apar ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:58 Kalkul, Bet-jur, Gedor," 
Joshua15:59 Maarat, Bet-anot ki Eltekon; gaŋi abicel ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriat-baal, en aye Kiriat-jearim, ki Raba; gaŋi aryo ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:61 Ka dok i tim, Bet-araba, Midin, Cekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibcan ma gilwoŋo ni gaŋ me Kado, ki En-gedi; gaŋi abicel ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua15:63 Ento jo Jebuc, ma gin aye jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem, jo Juda pe guryemogi woko ki i lobogi, mumiyo jo Jebuc gunywako bedo kacel ki jo Juda i Jerucalem o kwede wa onyoo." 
Joshua16:1 Waŋ lobo pa likwayo pa Yucepu ma gipoko ki bolo kwir ocakke ki i kulu Jordan i ŋet Jeriko, oweko pii me Jeriko odoŋ tuŋ wokceŋ, ocito tuŋ tim, kun oa ki i Jeriko ocito wa i lobo godi me Betel;" 
Joshua16:2 oa ki i Betel ocito Luj, ka okato ocito Atarot ma i lobo pa jo Arki;" 
Joshua16:3 dok okato kwede yo tuŋ piny ma yo tuŋ potoceŋ, i lobo pa jo Japuleti, oo i lobo ma i ŋet Bet-koron Mapiny, ocito Gejer, ka ogik kwede i nam" 
Joshua16:4 Meno-aye obedo ginaleya pa likwayo pa Yucepu, jo Manace ki jo Epraim." 
Joshua16:5 Lobo pa jo Epraim muporo doggolagi obedo kit man: waŋ lobogi yo tuŋ wokceŋ ocakke i Atarot-adar ocito kwede i Bet-koron Mamalo; 
Joshua16:6 Oa ki kunnu okemo yo tuŋ nam, oo i Mikmetat yo tuŋ acam; ka dok olokke okemo Taanat-eilo yo tuŋ wokceŋ, orabo ŋete okato kun weko ‘Janea bene yo tuŋ wokceŋ." 
Joshua16:7 Oa ki i ŋet Janoa ocito Atarot ki Naara, ogudo Jeriko, ocito ogik kwede i kulu Jordan" 
Joshua16:8 Waŋ lobo dok ocakke Tapua okemo yo tuŋ potoceŋ o kwede i nota ora ma nyiŋe Kana ka ogik kwede i nam Meno aye ginaleya pa jo Epraim muporo wel doggolagi," 
Joshua16:9 kacel ki gaŋi mogo ma gikoyo pi jo Epraim’ i dye lobo pa jo Manace, gaŋi meno ducu ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua16:10 Ento jo Epraim pe guryemo jo Kanaan woko ma gibedo i Gejer, mumiyo jo Kanaan gibedo i dye jo Epraim o wa onyoo, ento gudoko opiigi me tiyo tic matek." 
Joshua17:1 Dok gibolo kwir me poko dul lobo pa jo Manace, pien en aye latin kayo pa Yucepu. Yam onoŋo gimiyo Gilead ki Bacan bot Makir won Gilead, latin kayo pa Manace, pien onoŋo en lalweny." 
Joshua17:2 Ka dok gibolo kwir pi poko lobo bot jo me kaka pa Manace ma pud Odoŋ muporo doggolagi ducu, doggola pa Abiejer, Kelek, Aciriel, Cekem, Keper ki Cemida; gin aye likwayo ma co pa Manace wodpa Yucepu." 
Joshua17:3 Jelopekad wod pa Keper onywalo anyira keken, awobene pe. Nyiŋ anyirane Makala, Noa, Kogla, Mirika ki Tirja." 
Joshua17:4 Gin gubino i nyim ajwaka Eleajar ki Yocwa wod pa Nun, ci guwacci, “Rwot yam ociko Moses ni myero gimi ginaleya botwa kacel ki utmegiwa.” Mumiyo Yocwa omiyogi ginaleya kacel ki omegi wongi, kit ma Rwot onoŋo ociko-ni." 
Joshua17:5 Kit meno jo pa Manace gugamo dul lobo apar medo i kom Gilead ki Bacan ma loka Jordan tuŋ wokceŋ," 
Joshua17:6 pien anyira pa Manace bene dok gulimo ginaleya kacel ki awobene. Lobo Gilead onoŋo doŋ gimiyo bot likwayo mukene pa Manace. 
Joshua17:7 Waŋ lobo pa jo Manace ocakke ki i Acer ocito kwede Mikmetat ma tye i ŋet Cekem yo tuŋ wokceŋ. Ka dok ocito, yo tuŋ acuc o kwede En-tapua." 
Joshua17:8 Lobo Tapua obedo bot jo Manace, ento gaŋ Tapua kikome ma i waŋ lobo pa jo Manace onoŋo gimiyo bot jo Epraim." 
Joshua17:9 Waŋ lobo dok ocito wa i nota ora Kana. Gaŋi ma tye kunnu i ŋet kulu-nu yo tuŋ acuc gimiyogi bot jo Epraim, kadi bed gitye i dye gaŋi pa jo Manace. Waŋ lobo pa jo Manace orabo ŋet kulu-nu yo tuŋ acam ocito kwede i nam" 
Joshua17:10 Lobo ma yo tuŋ acuc obedo pa jo Epraim ki lobo ma tuŋ acam obedo pa jo Manace, kun nam aye obedo waŋ lobogi yo tuŋ potoceŋ. Lobo pa jo Manace orwatte ki lobo pa jo Acer yo tuŋ acam, ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ orwatte ki lobo pa jo Icakar." 
Joshua17:11 Ento i lobo pa jo Icakar ki jo Acer jo Manace gubedo ki gaŋi magi: Bet-cean ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, ki Ibleam ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete; gimiyogi bene dano ma gibedo i Dor ki En-dor ki i gaŋi matino ma i netgi, ki dano ma gibedo i Taanak ki Megiddo ki i gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi. (Me adekke obedo Napat.)" 
Joshua17:12 Ento gamo gaŋi meno loko doko megi oloyo jo Manace woko; jo Kanaan gucerre gumedo ki bedo i lobo kunnu. 
Joshua17:13 Ento lacen ka jo Icrael gudoko tek, guketogi i tic muroni, pe guryemogi woko ducu liweŋ." 
Joshua17:14 Kaka pa Yucepu guloko bot Yocwa kun giwaco ni, “Piŋo imiyo gibolo kwir piwa tyen acel keken, mumiyo walimo dul lobo acel keken me bedo ginaleyawa? Wan watye ki lwak dano madwoŋ mada, macalo Rwot doŋ obedo ka miyowa gum o wa onyoo.”" 
Joshua17:15 Yocwa ogamo ni, “Ka wutye ki lwak dano mapol, ci wucit i buŋa wucijwer dul lobo mo ma i lobo pa jo Perej ki jo Repaim, kit macalo lobo godi pa jo Epraim pe romowu-ni.”" 
Joshua17:16 Ento jo me kaka pa Yucepu gugamo ni, “Lobo godi pe biromowa; dok bene jo Kanaan ma gibedo i bar gitye ki gadigadi nyonyo me lweny, Jo Kanaan ma gibedo Bet-cean ki i gaŋi matino ma i ŋete ki gin ma gibedo i nota me Jejreel bene.”" 
Joshua17:17 Yocwa dok owaco bot likwayo pa Yucepu, jo Epraim ki jo Manace, ni, “Wun wutye ki lwak dano madwoŋ mada, dok wutye ki tek madwoŋ bene; pienno pe wubibedo ki dul lobo acel keken." 
Joshua17:18 Lobo godi aye bibedo mewu, kadi obedo buŋa; wubijwero woko wucamo doko mewu o kwede wa i agikki waŋ lobo; pien wubiryemo jo Kanaan woko, kadi bed gitye ki gadigadi nyonyo me lweny, dok kadi bed gin jo matego.”" 
Joshua18:1 Lacen jo Icrael gucokke i Cilo, ci guguro kema me rwatte kunnu, Onoŋo gityeko loyo lobo woko ducu," 
Joshua18:2 ento pud odoŋ kaka abiro ma peya gipoko dul lobo mo botgi me aleyagi. 
Joshua18:3 Mumiyo Yocwa owaco bot jo Icrael ni, “Wubibedo ka juŋŋe o kwede wa awene ma pe wucito ka camo lobo ma Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarowu doŋ omiyo botwu-ni?" 
Joshua18:4 Wukwany dano adek ki i kaka acel acel wek gucit guwirre i lobo-ni ducu, guco lok i kome kun gipo ni bibedo ginaleya pa kakagi, ka dok gudwog bota." 
Joshua18:5 Myero gipok i dul abiro, kun noŋo jo Juda pud bimedde ki bedo i lobogi ma yo tuŋ acuc, jo pa Yucepu bene bibedo i megi ma yo tuŋ acam." 
Joshua18:6 Wubicoyo lok i kom lobo kun wunyuto kit ma lobo tye kwede i dul acel acel i kom dul abiro-nu, wukel gin ma wucoyo-ni bota, ci abibolo kwir piwu kany i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawa," 
Joshua18:7 Jo pa Levi pe gibilimo dul lobo mo i kinwu, pien ginaleyagi aye ticgi me bedo ajwagi pa Rwot; dok jo Gad, jo Reuben ki nucu kaka pa Manace gutyeko limo ginaleyagi loka Jordan yo tuŋ wokceŋ, ma Moses latic pa Rwot omiyo botgi.”" 
Joshua18:8 Jo meno ma gucito ka coyo lok i kom lobo gucako wotgi, ci Yocwa ocikogi kun waco ni, “Wucit wuciwirre ka coyo kit ma lobo-ni tye kwede, ka wudwog bota; ci abibolo kwir piwu kany i Cilo ki i nyim Rwot.”" 
Joshua18:9 Jo-nu gucito ka wirre i lobo-nu, kun gicoyo lok i kom gaŋ acel acel i buk ma lubo dul lobo abiro ma gupoko iye. Lacen gudwogo cen bot Yocwa i gony ma i Cilo," 
Joshua18:10 ci Yocwa obolo kwir pigi i Cilo ki i nyim Rwot. Opoko lobo bot jo Icrael ki kunnu, kun kaka acel acel limo dullobone." 
Joshua18:11 Dul lobo ma kwir okwanyo pi kaka pa Benjamin muporo doggolagi obedo kit man. Lobo ma gimiyo botgi obedo i kin lobo me kaka pa Juda ki me kaka pa Yucepu," 
Joshua18:12 Ki yo tuŋ acam waŋ lobogi ocakke i kom kulu Jordan, ka ocito malo wa i kor got ma i get Jeriko yo tug acam, ka ocito kwede obaro kin lobo godi ma yo tuŋ potoceŋ, ka ogik kwede i tim me Bet-awen." 
Joshua18:13 Ki kunnu waŋ lobogi ocito yo tuŋ acuc kun kemo Luj nio wa i kor got ima i jet Luj, en aye Betel, ka jog ocito Atarot-adar, kun wok ki i wi got ma tye i get Bet-koron Mapiny yo tuŋ acuc." 
Joshua18:14 Ka dok waŋ lobo olokke omano ŋe got ma okemo Bet-koron yo tuŋ acuc kun kato i ŋet got cito kemo yo tuŋ acuc o kwede i Kiriat-baal, ma en aye Kiriat-jearim, ma gaŋ pa kaka pa Juda, ci ogik kunnu. Meno waŋ lobo ma tun potoceŋ." 
Joshua18:15 Ki yo tuŋ acuc waŋ lobo ocakke ki i agikki gag Kiriat-jearim ocito kwede yo tun piny nio i waŋ pii me Neputoa; 
Joshua18:16 ka dok ocito i waŋ agikki got ma okemo nota pa wod pa Kinom ma tye i agikki nota me Repaim yo tuŋ acam. Ka dok ocito piny kun lubo nota pa Kinom ma i ŋet kor got pa jo Jebuc yo tuŋ acuc o kwede En-rogel. 
Joshua18:17 Ka dok olokke odok yo tuŋ acam wa i En-cemec, Ki kunnu dok ocito Gelilot ma i nyim kor got ka ma giito iye malo i Adumim; ka, dok cito i got ma Boan wod pa Reuben ocibo," 
Joshua18:18 ka okato kwede ocito yo tuŋ acam ma orabo kwede kor got me Bet-araba, ocito wa i Araba." 
Joshua18:19 Ka dok orabo ŋet kor got me Bet-kogla kun wok yo tuŋ acam, ocito ogik i wen nam me Kado ma i but nam yo tuŋ acam ka ma kulu Jordan gik iye-ni, Meno aye waŋ lobo yo tuŋ acuc;" 
Joshua18:20 kulu Jordan aye obedo waŋ lobogi yo tuŋ wokceŋ, Meno aye ginaleya pa jo Benjamin ma oporo doggolagi, ki waŋ lobo ducu mukwako lobogi." 
Joshua18:21 Gaŋi pa jo Benjamin muporo doggolagi gin ene; Jeriko, Bet-kogla, Emek-kejij," 
Joshua18:22 Bet-araba. Jemaraim, Betel," 
Joshua18:23 Avim, Para, Opra," 
Joshua18:24 Keparammoni, Opni, Geba, gaŋi apar wiye aryo ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi;" 
Joshua18:25 Gibeon, Rama, Beerot," 
Joshua18:26 Mijpe, Kepira, Moja," 
Joshua18:27 Rekem, Irpeel, Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 Jela, Elep, Jebuc, ma en aye Jerucalem, Gibea ki Kiriat-jearim, gaŋi apar wiye aŋwen ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi. Meno aye ginaleya pa jo Benjamin muporo doggolagi ducu." 
Joshua19:1 Kwir ma gibolo me aryone opoto i kom Cimeon, pi kaka pa jo Cimeon muporo doggolagi; ginaleyagi obedo i dye lobo ma gimiyo bot jo me kaka pa Juda." 
Joshua19:2 Ginaleya pa jo Cimeon obedo gaŋ magi: Beer-ceba, Ceba, Molada," 
Joshua19:3 Kajar-cual, Bala, Ejem," 
Joshua19:4 Eltolad, Betul, Korma," 
Joshua19:5 Jiklag, Betmarkabot, Kajar-cuca," 
Joshua19:6 Bet-lebaot ki Caruken, gagi apar wiye adek ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi;" 
Joshua19:7 En-rimmon, Eter, ki Acan, gaŋi aŋwen ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi," 
Joshua19:8 kacel ki lwak pacci ducu ma orumo ŋet gaŋi-nu o kwede wa Baalat-beer, ma gilwogo bene ni Rama me Negeb. Meno aye obedo ginaleya pa jo Cimeon ma oporo doggolagi." 
Joshua19:9 Ginaleya pa jo Cimeon obedo dul ma gipoko ki i kom ginaleya pa jo Juda; onoŋo dullobo ma gipoko bot jo Juda obedo lac mada ma obwono komgi woko, mumiyo jo Cimeon gulimo ginaleyagi i dyegi." 
Joshua19:10 Kwir ma gibolo me adekke opoto i kom kaka pa jo Jabulon muporo doggolagi ducu, ci lobo me ginaleyagi oo wa i Carid." 
Joshua19:11 Wag lobogi owoto yo tun potoceg oo wa i Mareal, ka ogudo kwede Dabecet ki nota ora ma i ŋet Jokneam yo tun wokceŋ." 
Joshua19:12 Cakke ki i Carid bene waŋ lobone mukene mukemo wokceŋ ma yo tuŋ kunyaŋo ocito oo wa i waŋ lobo me Kiclot-tabor," 
Joshua19:13 ka ocito kwede Dabera, ka oo i Japia. Ka oa ki kunnu okato yo tuŋ wokceŋ oo kwede Gat-keper ki Etkajin, ka ocito Rimmon ci olokke odok Nea." 
Joshua19:14 Waŋ lobo yo tun acam ogom woko ocito Kanaton ci ogik i nota Iptakel. 
Joshua19:15 Medde i kom meno gubedo ki Katat, Nakalal, Cimron, Iddat ki Beterekem; gubedo ki gaŋi apar wiye aryo ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:16 Meno aye ginaleya pa jo Jabulon ma oporo doggolagi, gaŋi magi ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:17 Kwir ma gibolo me aŋwenne opoto i kom Icakar pi kaka pa jo Icakar muporo doggolagi. 
Joshua19:18 I lobogi onoŋo tye iye gaŋi magi: Jejreel, Kecuiot, Cunem," 
Joshua19:19 Kaparaim, Sion, Anakarat," 
Joshua19:20 Rabit, Kicion, Ebej," 
Joshua19:21 Remet, Enganim, En-kada, Bet-pajej." 
Joshua19:22 Waŋ lobogi ogudo Tabor bene, Cakajuma ki Bet-cemec, ci ogik i kulu Jordan. Gaŋigi ducu obedo apar wiye abicel, ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:23 Meno aye ginaleya pa jo Icakar muporo doggolagi, gaŋi magi ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:24 Kwir ma gibolo me abicce opoto i kom kaka pa jo Acer muporo doggolagi," 
Joshua19:25 Lobogi onoŋo tye iye gaŋi magi: Kelkat, Kali, Beten, Akicap," 
Joshua19:26 Alam melek, Amad ki Mical. Waŋ lobogi ogudo Karmel yo tuŋ potoceŋ, ki Cikor-libnat;" 
Joshua19:27 lacen olokke odok tuŋ wokceŋ ocito Bet-dagon, ci ogudo lobo pa jo Jabulon ki nota Iptakel yo tuŋ acam i Bet-emek ki Neiel. Waŋ lobo ma yo tuŋ acam ocito Kabul," 
Joshua19:28 Ebron, Rekob, Kamon ki Kana ci oo wa i Cidon Maditte;" 
Joshua19:29 lacen olokke ocito Rama oo kwede Turo ma gicelo ki cel gogo-ni, ci olokke ocito Koca ka ogik i dog nam. Gaŋigi mukene obedo Makalab," 
Joshua19:30 Umma, Apek ki Rekob, ducu pyeraryo ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:31 Meno aye ginaleya pa jo Acer muporo doggolagi, gaŋi magi ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:32 Kwir ma gibolo me abicel opoto i kom kaka pa jo Naputali muporo doggolagi. 
Joshua19:33 Waŋ lobogi ocakke i Kelep i te yat kworo ma i Jaananim owok ki i Adami-nekeb ki Jabneel, ocito wa i Lakun ka ogik kwede i kulu Jordan." 
Joshua19:34 Ki kunnu waŋ lobo olokke okemo yo tuŋ potoceŋ ocito Ajinot-tabor, oa ki kunnu ocito Kukok; kumeno ogudo lobo pa jo Jabulon yo tuŋ acuc, lobo pa jo Acer yo tuŋ potoceŋ ki kulu Jordan yo tuŋ wokceŋ." 
Joshua19:35 Gaŋigi ma gicelo ki cel gogo obedo Jidim, Jer, Kammat, Rakat, Kineret," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Rama, Kajor," 
Joshua19:37 Kedec, Edrei, En-Kajor," 
Joshua19:38 Yiron, Migdalel, Korem, Bet-anat ki Bet-cemec: Gaŋigi ducu obedo apar wiye aboŋwen ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:39 Meno aye ginaleya pa jo Naputali ma oporo doggolagi, gaŋi magi ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:40 Kwir, ma gibolo me abiro opoto i kom kaka pa jo Dan muporo doggolagi." 
Joshua19:41 I lobo me ginaleyagi onoŋo tye iye gaŋi magi Jora, Ectaol, Ir-cemec," 
Joshua19:42 Caalahin, Aijalon, Itla," 
Joshua19:43 Elon, Timna, Ekron," 
Joshua19:44 Elteke, Gibeton, Baalat," 
Joshua19:45 Jekud, Bene-barak, Gat-rimmon," 
Joshua19:46 Mejarkon ki Rakon ki lobo ma i nyim Jopa. 
Joshua19:47 Ento ka lobo pa jo Dan orwenyo woko ki i ciŋgi, gucito gulwenyo i kom gaŋ mo ma nyiŋe Lecem, gumayo, guneko dano ma gubedo iye ducu ki pala lucwan, guloko gaŋ meno odoko megi, gucako bedo iye. Guloko nyiŋ Lecem gucako ni, Dan macalo nyiŋ kwarogi Dan." 
Joshua19:48 Meno aye ginaleya pa jo Dan ma oporo doggolagi, gaŋi magi ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua19:49 Ka doŋ gutyeko poko lobo i dul mapatpat me bedo ginaleyagi, jo Icrael gumiyo dul lobo bot Yocwa wod pa Nun obed ginaleyane i kingi." 
Joshua19:50 Gumiyo bote gaŋ ma en olego ki botgi kit ma Rwot ocikogi kwede, en aye Timnatcera ma i lobo godi pa jo Epraim. En dok ogero gaŋŋ eodoco ci obedo iye." 
Joshua19:51 Meno aye ginaleya ma ajwaka Eleajar ki Yocwa ki ludito kaka ma i odi pa kwarogi gupoko bot jo Icrael i Cilo i nyim Rwot i doggola kema me rwatte kun gibolo iye kwir; gutyeko poko lobo kit meno. 
Joshua20:1 Rwot dok owaco bot Yocwa ni," 
Joshua20:2 “Wac bot jo Icrael ni, ‘Wu yer gaŋi me laro lunek dano ma yam aloko pigi botwu ki i dog Moses," 
Joshua20:3 wek lunek ma pe guneko dano akaka, nyo ma pe gupiro pi nekone apira, guriŋ gular iye komgi. Gaŋi magi bibedo me laro lanek dano ki bot lacul kwor remo." 
Joshua20:4 Lanek biriŋo laro gaŋ mo i kingi, ci bicuŋ i nyim dog gaŋ ma gidonyo kwede-ni wek otit lokke bot ludoŋo me gaŋ meno. Ka gin gibi tere wa i gaŋ, gimine kabedo mo, ci en bibedo kwedgi kunnu." 
Joshua20:5 Ka ce wat macok pa lato ma lacul kwor remo-ni olubo kore, pe gibimiyo lanek meno i ciŋgi, pien pe oneko lawote ma onoŋo opiro pi nekone apira, dok onoŋo en yam pe tye ki kit mone mo i kome i ‘kare macon ca." 
Joshua20:6 En bibedo i gaŋ meno nio ka bicuŋ i nyim kacokke wek giŋol koppe, ci bikuro nio wa i kare ma ajwaka madit ma onoŋo tye ka tic i kare meno otyeko to. Lacen en twero dok i gaŋŋe wa tugi kikome, i gaŋ ma yam en oa ki iye i kare ma oriŋo olaro kome-ni.’ ”" 
Joshua20:7 Ci jo Icrael guyero gaŋi magi, gukwerogi pi tic man: Kedec ma i Galilaya i lobo godi pa jo Naputali, Cekem i lobo godi pa jo Epraim, ki Kiriat-arba, en aye Kebron, i lobo godi pa jo Juda." 
Joshua20:8 Ki loka Jordan ma i ŋe Jeriko yo tuŋ wokceŋ guyero Bejer ma i tim ma bedo cerecere i lobo pa jo Reuben, Ramot ma i Gilead i lobo pa jo Gad, ki Golan ma i Bacan i lobo pa jo Manace." 
Joshua20:9 Meno aye gaŋi ma giyerogi pi kaka pa jo Icrael ducu kacel ki welo ma lubedo i kingi, wek lanek dano ma pe oneko akaka oriŋ olar iye kome, wek pe oto i ciŋ lacul kwor remo nio waŋ ma ocuŋ i nyim kacokke." 
Joshua21:1 Ludito wi kaka pa kwaro pa Lulevi gubino bot ajwaka Eleajai ki Yocwa wod pa Nun ki ludito wi kaka pa jo Icrael mukene ducu. 
Joshua21:2 Gubino botgi i Cilo i lobo Kanaan, guwaco botgi ni, “Rwot yam ociko ki i dog Moses ni myero gimi botwa gaŋi me bedowa kacel ki lobo ma i ŋetgi me olet-gu pi kwayo limwa makwo.”" 
Joshua21:3 Ci jo Icrael gulubo cik pa Rwot, gumiyo gaŋi magi bot Lulevi kacel ki lobo me oletgi kun gikwanyo ki i kom ginaleyagi:" 
Joshua21:4 Kwir okwoŋo poto i kom jo Kokat ci Lulevi ma likwayo pa ajwaka Aron gulimo gaŋi apar wiye adek ki bot jo Juda, jo Cimeon ki jo Benjamin kun onoŋo giyerogi ki bolo kwir." 
Joshua21:5 Jo Kokat mudoŋŋe gulimo gaŋi apar ki bot jo Epraim, jo Dan ki nucu kaka pa jo Manace muporo doggolagi." 
Joshua21:6 Jo Gercon gulimo gaŋi apar wiye adek ki bot jo Icakar, jo Acer, jo Naputali ki nucu kaka pa Manace ma i Bacan muporo doggolagi." 
Joshua21:7 Jo Merari gulimo gaŋi apar wiye aryo ki bot jo Reuben, jo Gad ki jo Jabulon muporo doggolagi." 
Joshua21:8 Gaŋi magi ki lobo olet ma i ŋetgi jo Icrael gumiyo bot jo Levi kun gibolo kwir, kit macalo Rwot yam ociko ki i dog Moses." 
Joshua21:9 Gaŋi ma gulimo ki bot kaka pa Juda ki Cimeon," 
Joshua21:10 gaŋi ma gimiyo bot likwayo pa Aron, ma gin aye doggola acel i kin jo Kokat ma Lulevi-ni nyiŋgi ene." 
Joshua21:11 Kwir okwoŋo poto i komgi ci gimiyo botgi Kiriat-arba, en aye Kebron, ma i lobo godi me Juda, kacel ki lobo olet ma orume dyere. Arba obedo kwaro pa jo Anak." 
Joshua21:12 Ento potti ducu ma i ŋet gaŋ meno, ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete yam onoŋo gimiyogi woko bot Kaleb wod pa Jepune me bedo mere." 
Joshua21:13 Gimiyo Kebron ki lobo olet ma i ŋete bot likwayo pa ajwaka Aron, en aye gagŋ me laro lunek dano, Libna ki lobo olette," 
Joshua21:14 Jatir ki olette, Ectemoa ki olette," 
Joshua21:15 Kolon ki olette, Debir ki olette," 
Joshua21:16 Ain ki olette, Juta ki olette, Bet-cemec ki olette, gaŋi aboŋwen mua ki bot kaka aryo-nu." 
Joshua21:17 Ka doki gimiyo botgi gaŋi magi mua ki bot jo Benjamin: Gibeon, Geba," 
Joshua21:18 Anatot ki Almon, gaŋi aŋwen ki olet ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua21:19 Gaŋi ducu ma gimiyo bot likwayo pa ajwaka Aron gubedo apar wiye adek, kun gaŋ acel acel tye ki lobo me olet i ŋete." 
Joshua21:20 Lulevi me doggola mogo pa jo Kokat mudoŋ gulimo gaŋi magi ma i lobo pa jo Epraim: 
Joshua21:21 Cekem, gaŋ me laro lunek dano ma i lobo godi me Epraim, ki olette, Gejer ki olette," 
Joshua21:22 Kibjaim ki olette, Bet-koron ki olette, gaŋi aŋwen," 
Joshua21:23 Ki bot kaka pa Dan gulimo Elteke, Gibeton," 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon ki Gat-rimmon, gagi aŋwen ki olet ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua21:25 Ki bot nucu kaka pa Manace gulimo Taanak ki Gat-rimmon ki olet ma i ŋetgi. 
Joshua21:26 Kumeno gaŋi ducu ma gimiyo bot doggola mukene pa jo Kokat gubedo apar, kun gaŋ acel acel tye ki lobo olet i ŋete," 
Joshua21:27 Jo Gercon ma doggola mukene pa Lulevi gulimo gaŋi aryo ki bot nucu kaka pa Manace, gin aye Golan ma i Bacan ma gaŋ me laro lunek dano ki olet ma i ŋete, ki Be-eciterot ki olette." 
Joshua21:28 Ki bot jo Icakar gulimo Kicion, Oaberat," 
Joshua21:29 Jarmut ki En-ganim, gaŋi aŋwen ki olet ma i netgi." 
Joshua21:30 Ki bot jo Acer gulimo Mical, Abdon," 
Joshua21:31 Kelkat ki Rekob, gaŋi aŋwen ki olet ma i ŋeti," 
Joshua21:32 Ki bot jo Naputali gulimo Kedec i Galilaya, gaŋ me laro lunek dano, Kamot-dor ki Kartan, gaŋi adek ki olet ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua21:33 Kumeno gaŋi ducu ma gimiyo bot doggola mapatpat pa jo Gercon obedo apar wiye adek, kun gaŋ acel acel tye ki lobo olet i ŋete." 
Joshua21:34 Lulevi mukene, ma gin aye doggola pa jo Merari, gulimo ki bot jo Jabulon Jokneam, Karta," 
Joshua21:35 Dimna ki Nakalal, gaŋi aŋwen ki olet ma i ŋetgi," 
Joshua21:36 Ki bot jo Reuben gulimo Bejer, Jakaj," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemot ki Mepat, gaŋi aŋwen ki olet ma i netgi." 
Joshua21:38 Ki bot jo Gad gulimo Ramot ma i Gilead ma gaŋ me laro lunek dano, Makanaim," 
Joshua21:39 Kecbon ki Jajer, gaŋi aŋwen ki olet ma i ŋetgi." 
Joshua21:40 Gaŋi ducu ma gimiyo bot doggola mapatpat pa jo Merari, en aye bot doggola pa Lulevi mudoŋŋe, obedo apar wiye aryo." 
Joshua21:41 Gaŋi ducu pa Lulevi ma gitye i dye lobo pa jo Icrael gubedo pyeraŋwen wiye aboro, ki oletgi." 
Joshua21:42 Gaŋ acel acel onoŋo tye ki lobo olet ma orume dyere; gaŋigi ducu gubedo kit meno. 
Joshua21:43 Kit meno Rwot omiyo bot jo Icrael lobo ducu ma yam okwoŋo pire ni ebimiyo bot kwarogi-ni; gucamo lobone kit meno, ci gubedo iye," 
Joshua21:44 Rwot omiyogi yweyo i kabedogi ducu kit ma yam okwoŋo bot kwarogi; pe lamerokgi acel mo ocun i nyimgi, pien Rwot onoŋo omiyo lumerokgi ducu i ciŋgi." 
Joshua21:45 Lok mabeco ducu ma yam onoŋo Rwot ociko ki jo Icrael ocobbe kakare, pe onen lok mo ma pe otimme." 
Joshua22:1 Lacen Yocwa olwoŋo jo Reuben, jo Gad ki nucu kaka pa Manace," 
Joshua22:2 ci owaco botgi ni, “Wutyeko cobo gin ducu ma yam Moses latic pa Rwot ocikowu kwede, dok wubedo ka woro doga bene i lok ducu ma acikowu kwede." 
Joshua22:3 Pe wubwoto utmegiwu i lwak kare man ducu o kwede wa onyoo, ento wuketo cwinywu ka lubo lok ma Rwot Lubaŋawu ocikowu kwede." 
Joshua22:4 Kombeddi Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ otyeko miyo yweyo bot utmegiwu kit ma yam ocikogi kwede-ni; pienno wun doŋ wulokke wudok cen i pacowu ka ma lobo ma yam wucamo odoko mewu tye iye, i lobo ma yam Moses latic pa Rwot omiyo botwu loka Jordan." 
Joshua22:5 Ber wugwokke ka lubo cik ki lok ducu ma yam Moses latic pa Rwot ocikowu kwede, ni, wumar Rwot Lubaŋawu, kun wulubo yone ducu ki lok ma en ociko, wumok i kome Iikiŋ kun wutiyo bote ki cwinywu ducu ki tipo komwu ducu.”" 
Joshua22:6 Kit meno Yocwa ocikogi kun lamo gum i komgi, ka ocwalogi kwede tugi, ci gudok i pacogi." 
Joshua22:7 Onoŋo Moses yam omiyo dul lobo bot nucu kaka pa Manace i Bacan, ento nucu kakane mukene Yocwa aye omiyo ‘lobo botgi ma ka ŋet utmegigi ma i lobo ma loka Jordan yo tuŋ potoceŋ, I kare ma Yocwa ocwalogi i pacogi, olamo gum i komgi," 
Joshua22:8 kun waco botgi ni, “Doŋ wudok cen i pacowu ki lonyo madwoŋ, ki lwak lim makwo mapol, ki ryal, jabu, mola, nyonyo ki boŋŋi-gu, wucit wupok jami ma wuyako ki bot lukworwu i kinwu ki utmegiwu.”" 
Joshua22:9 Kit meno jo Reuben, jo Gad ki nucu kaka pa Manace gucako dok i pacogi; gupokke woko ki jo Icrael i Cilo ma tye i lobo Kanaan, gucito i lobo Gilead, en aye lobogi kikome ma yam gulimo, kit ma Rwot onoŋo ociko ki Moses." 
Joshua22:10 Ka guo i Gelilot i ŋet kulu Jordan, ma tye i lobo Kanaan, ci jo Reuben, jo Gad ki nucu kaka pa Manace gucano keno tyer i ŋet Jordan, keno tyer madit mada." 
Joshua22:11 Ci jo Icrael guwinyo lok ni, “Jo Reuben, jo Gad ki nucu kaka pa Manace gucano keno tyer i waŋ lobo me Kanaan, i Gelilot ma i ŋet Jordan mukemo lobo pa jo Icrael.”" 
Joshua22:12 Ka jo Icrael guwinyo pire, ci lwak jo Icrael ducu gucokke i Cilo ka yubo lweny i komgi." 
Joshua22:13 Jo Icrael gucwalo Finekaci wod pa ajwaka Eleajar bot jo Reuben, jo Gad ki nucu kaka pa Manace i lobo Gilead," 
Joshua22:14 kacel ki rwodi apar. Gucwalo rwot acel ki i kaka acel acel pa jo Icrael, kun rwot acel acel obedo ladit ma loyo doggola mo i kin kaka pa jo Icrael." 
Joshua22:15 Ka doŋ guo bot jo Reuben, jo Gad ki nucu kaka pa Manace ma i lobo Gilead, ci guwaco botgi ni," 
Joshua22:16 “Lwak pa Rwot ducu guwaco botwu kit man ni, ‘Man kit robo dog aŋo ma wutimo i kom Lubaŋa pa Icrael-li, mumiyo wulokke woko wuweko lubo kor Rwot, wucano keno tyer piwu kenwu, wucako jemo woko i kom Rwot?" 
Joshua22:17 Bal ma otimme i Peor pud pe oromowu ce, ma yam two gemo opoto pire i kom lwak pa Rwot? Pud peya walonnye i kom bal meno wa onyoo," 
Joshua22:18 ci dok pud wumedde ki weko lubo kor Rwot i kare man? Ka ce dok wujemo woko i kom Rwot tin, ci diki kiniga bimake i kom lwak jo Icrael ducu." 
Joshua22:19 Ento koni ka lobowu obedo keni, ci wudok cen i lobo pa Rwot ka ma kema pa Rwot ocuŋ iye-ni, wuyer dul lobo mo i kinwa kunnu wek wubed iye; ento pe dok wujem i kom Rwot aye, nyo pe wulokwa wadok lujemo pi cano keno tyer mukene ma dok pat ki keno tyer pa Rwot Lubaŋawa kikome." 
Joshua22:20 Akan wod pa Jera yam pe oŋayo waŋ Rwot ce pi lok ma dok i kom jami ma onoŋo gidyerogi woko bot Rwot, ci omiyo akemo opoto i kom lwak jo Icrael ducu? Dok en pe oto kene pi ballenu.’ ”" 
Joshua22:21 Jo Reuben jo Gad ki nucu kaka ka Manace gudok iye bot ludito wi doggola pa jo Icrael ni," 
Joshua22:22 “Rwot aye Lubaŋa ma loyo lubaŋa ducu! Rwot aye Lubaŋa ma loyo lubaŋa ducu! En ŋeyo, dok en weko Icrael bene ŋeyo! Ka ce man otimme pi jemo nyo pi ŋayo waŋ Rwot, ci tin pe wubwotwa makwo." 
Joshua22:23 Ka ce wacano keno tyer pi weko lubo kor Rwot, nyo ka ce wacano pi tyero iye gitum awaŋa, nyo gityer me moko kwon, nyo gityer lakwecwiny, ci wek Rwot kikome aye ocul kwor i komwa." 
Joshua22:24 Pe kumeno gire, ento wan onoŋo watimo pi lworo pi kare ma bibino anyim, pien likwayowu gibiwaco bot likwayowa ni, ‘Wun wuwaco ni Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael obedo Lubaŋawu niŋniŋ?" 
Joshua22:25 Rwot doŋ otyeko keto kulu Jordan obedo waŋ lobo i kin wan ki wun; pienno wun jo Reuben ki jo Gad pe wutye ki waŋ pok mo i kom Rwot.’ Lok macalo meno bimiyo likwayowu gijuko likwayowa, ci miyo giweko woro Rwot woko." 
Joshua22:26 En “aye lok mumiyo wawaco ni, ‘Wek wacanu keno tyer, pe pi gitum awaŋa nyo pi tumo iye gitum mo," 
Joshua22:27 ento watim me bedo caden i kin wan ki wun, ki i kin yalwak ma bilubowa i anyim, ma nyuto ni wan bene waworo Rwot ki gitum awaŋa ki gitum mukene ki gityer lakwecwiny ina watyero i nyime; wek likwayowu pe guwac bot likwayowa i kare ma bibino anyim ni, “Wun pe wutye ki waŋ pok mo i kom Rwot.?”" 
Joshua22:28 Onoŋo watamo ni, ka giloko botwa kit meno, nyo bot likwayowa i kare me anyim, ci wabidok iye ni, ‘Nen kit keno tyer ma yam kwarowa gucano muporo keno tyer pa Rwot kikome. Pe gucano pi gitum awaŋa nyo pi tyero kit gitum mo, ento me bedo caden i kin wan ki wun.’" 
Joshua22:29 Wanonoŋo pe wayubbe pi jemo i kom Rwot wacel, nyo me weko lubo kor Rwot i kare man pi cano keno tyer me tumo gitum awaŋa, nyo me tyero gityer me moko kwon nyo kadi kit gitum mo me ameda i kom keno tyer pa Rwot Lubaŋawa ma i nyim kemane-ni!”" 
Joshua22:30 Ka ajwaka Finekaci ki rwodi ma luwi lwak, ki ludito kaka ma i Icrael ma onoŋo gitye kacel kwede guwinyo lok pa jo Reuben, jo Gad ki jo Manace ma gudbk iye-ni, ci cwinygi obedo yom mada." 
Joshua22:31 Finekaci wod pa ajwaka Eleajar owaco bot jo Reuben, jo Gad ki jo Manace ni, “Tin doŋ waniaŋ atir ni, Rwot tye i dyewa, pien wun pe wutimo man pi robo dog Rwot; kombeddi doŋ wutyeko laro jo Icrael woko ki i cin Rwot.”" 
Joshua22:32 Lacen Finekaci wod pa ajwaka Eleajar ki rwodi ducu gua ki bot jo Reuben ki jo Gad ma i lobo Gilead, gudok i Kanaan bot jo Icrael ma tye kunnu, ci gudwoko lok botgi." 
Joshua22:33 Lok ma gudwoko botgi oyomo cwiny jo Icrael mada, ci gupwoyo Lubaŋa, pe dok gumedde ki loko me cito ka lweny i komgi nyo pi balo lobo ma jo Reuben ki jo Gad gibedo iye-ni woko." 
Joshua22:34 Jo Reuben ki jo Gad gucako nyiŋ keno tyer ma gucano ni, Caden, pien guwaco ni, “Man aye bedo me caden i kin wan ki wun ma moko ni, Rwot en aye Lubaŋa.”" 
Joshua23:1 Ka kare okato malac ma Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo yweyo bot jo Icrael i kom lumerokgi ducu ma yam orumogi dyere-ni, onoŋo Yocwa doŋ oti woko, mwaka me ditte doŋ dwoŋ." 
Joshua23:2 Olwoŋo jo Icrael ducu, ki ludoŋogi, ludito wigi, luŋolkopgi ki ludito ticgi ducu, ci owaco botgi ni, “Ao kombeddi doŋ ati woko, mwaka me ditta doŋ dwoŋ." 
Joshua23:3 Wun doŋ wutyeko neno gin ducu ma Rwot Lubaŋawu otiyo piwu i kom rok magi ducu, pien Rwot Lubaŋawu aye obedo ka lweny i komgi piwu," 
Joshua23:4 Nen ka doŋ atyeko poko rok mapatpat ma, pud gudoŋ i kinwu me bedo ginaleya pa kakawu, kacel ki rok ducu ma yam doŋ aloyogi woko, cakke ki i Jordan o kwede wa i Nam Madit ma yo tuŋ potoceŋ." 
Joshua23:5 Rwot Lubaŋawu bidirogi woko cen kun ryemogi woko ki i nyimwu, ci wubicamo lobogi kit ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu ocikke kwede botwu-ni," 
Joshua23:6 Pienno wucuŋ matek kun, wulubo gin ducu ma gicoyo i buk me cik pa Moses, pe wuŋak wudok yo tuŋ acuc nyo yo tuŋ acam." 
Joshua23:7 Pe wunyebbe ki bedo kacel ki lurok ma pud gudoŋ i kinwu-ni, pe wutuc nyiŋ Iubanagi, pe wukwoŋ kwoŋ mo ki nyiŋ lubaŋagi, pe wuworgi, pe wuryebbe i nyimgi," 
Joshua23:8 Ento wumok likiŋ i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu kit ma wubedo ka timone o kwede wa onyoo-ni. 
Joshua23:9 Rwot doŋ otyeko ryemo rok madito ki matego woko ki i nyimwu; ŋat mo peya onen ma obedo ki twero me cuŋ i nyimwu. 
Joshua23:10 Dano acel mo ki i kinwu romo ryemo jo alip kulu, pien Rwot Lubaŋawu aye tye ka lweny piwu kit ma yam owaco botwu-ni." 
Joshua23:11 Doŋ ba, myero wugwokke matek, wunen ni wumaro Rwot Lubaŋawu;" 
Joshua23:12 pien ka wudok cen kun wuribbe ki lurok ma gudoŋ i kinwu, ka ce wucako nyomme kwedgi kun wunyomo anyiragi ka dok gin bene ginyomo anyirawu," 
Joshua23:13 ci wuŋe atir ni, Rwot Lubaŋawu pe dok bimedde ki ryemo lumerokwu woko ki i nyimwu; ento gin aye gibidoko macalo owic ki layutta me cikowu, ki odoo gayi me jwato pyerwu ki okuto me cobo waŋwu, nio ka wubito wutum woko ki i lobo man maber ma Rwot Lubaŋawu doŋ omiyo botwu-ni," 
Joshua23:14 “Kombeddi an doŋ atye cok ka lubo yo ma gin me wi lobo ducu mol ci to iye-ni, wun bene wuŋeyo ki i cwinywu wa ki tipo komwu ducu ni, gin mabeco ducu ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu ociko piwu gin ducu gucobbe kakare, pe tye acel mo ma pe otimme," 
Joshua23:15 Ento kit ma yam Rwot Lubaŋawu ocobo lok ducu mabeco ma yam ociko piwu-ni, kit meno bene Rwot dok bikelo gin ducu maraco i komwu, nio ka, bityekowu woko ki i lobo man maber ma en omiyo botwu-ni," 
Joshua23:16 ka ce wuturo gicikke pa Rwot Lubaŋawu ma yam ocikowu kwede kun wucito ka woro lubaŋa mogo mukene, wuryebbe i nyimgi. Kiniga bimako Rwot i komwu, ci wubito wutum woko oyotoyot ki i lobo man maber ma en omiyo botwu.”" 
Joshua24:1 Lacen Yocwa dok ocoko kaka pa jo Icrael ducu kacel i Cekem; olwoŋo ludoŋo ki luwi lwak, luŋolkop ki ludito tic ma i Icrael ducu, ci gubino guryeyo i nyim Lubaŋa." 
Joshua24:2 Yocwa owaco bot lwak ducu ni, “Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco kuman ni, ‘Kwarowu yam con gubedo i lobo ma loka kulu Euprate, ci gubedo ka woro lubaŋa mogo mukene. Ŋat acel i kingi obedo Tera ma won Abraim ki Nakor." 
Joshua24:3 An yam akwanyo kwarowu Abraim woko ki i lobo ma loka kulu Euprate, ci atelo wiye awok kwede i lobo Kanaan ducu, dok amiyo likwaye gunya mapol. Amiyo bote Icaka," 
Joshua24:4 dok amiyo bot Icaka litinone Yakobo ki Ecau. Amiyo lobo godi me Ceir bot Ecau me bedo mere, ento Yakobo ki litinone gucito megi wa i Ejipt," 
Joshua24:5 Ka dok acwalo Moses ki Aron, ci ayelo jo Ejipt ki gemo mapol ki kit gin ducu ma atimo i kingi; ka lacen akwanyowu woko ki kunnu." 
Joshua24:6 Akwanyo kwarowu woko ki i Ejipt ci wuo wa i dog nam: io Ejipt guryemo kor kwarowu ki gadigadi lweny ki aguragura o kwede wa i dog Nam Makwar. 
Joshua24:7 Ka kwarowu gukok bot Rwot, en oketo piny macol i kin wun ki jo Ejipt, ka dok odwoko nam cen i komgi ci omwonyogi woko ducu. Yam wuneno ki waŋwu gin ma atimo i kom jo Ejipt, dok wubedo i tim pi lwak kare malac," 
Joshua24:8 “‘Ka dok akelowu i lobo pa jo Amor ma gubedo loka Jordan tuŋcel. Gulwenyo kwedwu ento amiyogi i ciŋwu; wumako lobogi wucamo odoko mewu, ci atyekogi woko ki i nyimwu." 
Joshua24:9 I ŋe meno Balak wod pa Jipor, kabaka me Moab, otiŋŋe olwenyo i kom jo Icrael; ka dok ocwalo kwena olwoŋo Balaam wod pa Beor ni obin wek ocenwu woko," 
Joshua24:10 ento an pe awinyo dog Balaam, mumiyo en dok olamo gum i komwu; kit meno alarowu woko ki i ciŋ Balak." 
Joshua24:11 Wukato loka Jordan, wubino i Jeriko, ci jo Jeriko gulwenyo i komwu, kacel ki jo Amor, jo Periji, jo Kanaan, jo Kit, jo Girgac, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc, ento amiyogi ducu i ciŋwu." 
Joshua24:12 I kare meno acoro pino jobi i nyimwu pi ryemo luker pa jo Amor aryo ducu woko ki i nyimwu; pe wun aye wuloyogi ki pala lucwanwu nyo atumwu," 
Joshua24:13 Amiyo botwu lobo ma yam pe wutiyo iye gin mo, ki gaŋi ma yam pe wun aye wugerogi, ci wubedo iye; wutye ka camo nyig olok ki nyig jeituni ma yam pe wupitogi.’" 
Joshua24:14 “Pi meno doŋ wulwor Rwot, wuti bote ki lencwiny ki gen madwoŋ, Wubol woko lwak lubaŋa ma yam kwarowu gubedo ka worogi i lobo ma loka kulu Euprate ki i lobo Ejipt wek doŋ wuwor Rwot." 
Joshua24:15 Ka pe wumito woro Rwot, ci tin doŋ wuyer ŋat ma wubitiyo bote, ka nyo wubiyero lubaŋa ma yam kwarowu gutiyo botgi i lobo ma loka kulu Euprate, nyo lubaŋa pa jo Amor ma wubedo i lobogi-ni; ento an gira ki jo ma i oda ducu wabitiyo bot Rwot.”" 
Joshua24:16 Lwak gudok iye ni, “Wan pe wabedo ki tam mo me bwoto Rwot pi tiyo bot lubaŋa mukene," 
Joshua24:17 pien Rwot Lubaŋawa aye yam okwanyowa kacel ki kwarowa ki i lobo Ejipt, ki i ot kol me bedo opii. Otiyo lwak lanyut madito kun wan waneno, ogwokowa i yo ducu ma wawoto iye ki i kom rok ducu ma wakato wawok i kingi-ni," 
Joshua24:18 Rwot oryemo rok meno ducu woko ki i nyimwa, gin jo Amor ma yam gubedo i lobo-ni, mumiyo wan wabitiyo bot Rwot, pien en aye Lubaŋawa.”" 
Joshua24:19 Ento Yocwa dok owaco bot lwak ni, “Pe wutwero tiyo bot Rwot, pien en Lubaŋa maleŋ, en Lubaŋa ma lanyeko. Pe bitimowu kica i kom tim aranyiwu ki balwu," 
Joshua24:20 Ka ce wubwoto Rwot kun wutiyo bot lubaŋa mogo pa lurok, ci en bilokke ka timowu marac ci tyekowu woko, kadi bed yam koŋ onoŋo otimowu maber.”" 
Joshua24:21 Lwak gugamo dog Yocwa ni, “Pe kumeno; wan giwa wabitiyo bot Rwot.”" 
Joshua24:22 Yocwa dok owaco bot lwak ni, “Wun aye wudoko caden i komwu kekenwu, pien doŋ wutyeko yero Rwot kun wuwacci wubitiyo bote keken.” Lwak gugamo ni, “Wan aye caden giwa.”" 
Joshua24:23 Yocwa owaco botgi ni, “Wubol lubaŋa pa lurok ducu ma gitye i kinwu woko, wek wulok cwinywu odwog i kom Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael.”" 
Joshua24:24 Lwak guwaco bot Yocwa ni, “Wabitiyo bot Rwot Lubaŋawa, dok wabiworo doge.”" 
Joshua24:25 Kit meno Yocwa oketo gicikke ki lwak i nino meno, ci omiyo botgi cik mapol i Cekem i nino meno kun nyuto kit ma myero gulub ki cik mapatpat ducu." 
Joshua24:26 Yocwa ocoyo lok magi ducu i buk me cik pa Lubaŋa; ci okwanyo got madit, ocibo ocuŋ kunnu i te yat kworo ma i kabedo maleŋ pa Rwot." 
Joshua24:27 Yocwa dok owaco bot lwak ducu ni, “Nenu, got man aye bibedo caden i komwa, pien otyeko winyo lok pa Rwot ducu ma en owaco botwa; mumiyo en bedo lacaden i komwu wek pe dok wukwer Lubaŋawu.”" 
Joshua24:28 Ka meno otum Yocwa ociko lwak ci guket woko kun ŋat acel acel odok i lobo ma oleyo-ni," 
Joshua24:29 Ki i ŋe lok meno ducu Yocwa wod pa Nun ma latic pa Rwot oto woko ma onoŋo mwaka me ditte oromo miya acel ki apar. 
Joshua24:30 Guyiko kome i lobone kikome, i ginaleya ma yam gimiyo bote, i Timnat-cera i lobo godi pa jo Epraim i ŋet got Gaac, yo tuŋ acam." 
Joshua24:31 Jo Icrael gutiyo bot Rwot i kare pa Yocwa ducu ki i kare pa ludoŋo ducu ma yam gudoŋ ka Yocwa doŋ oto, gin jo ma guŋeyo tic ducu ma yam Rwot otiyo pi jo Icrael." 
Joshua24:32 Cogo kom Yucepu ma onoŋo jo Icrael yam gukelo ki i Ejipt giyiko i Cekem i dullobo ma yam Yakobo owilo ki bot awobe pa Kamor ma won Cekem; owilo ki dullim miya acel. Dul lobo-nu odoko ginaleya pa likwayo pa Yucepu matwal’ 
Joshua24:33 Ka Eleajar wod pa Aron bene oto, ci giyiko kome i Gibea, i gaŋ pa wode Finekaci ma yam onoŋo gimiyo bote i lobo godi pa jo Epraim." 
Judges1:1 Ka Yocwa doŋ oto, jo Icrael gucako penyo dog Rwot ni, “Aŋa ma bikwoŋo cito piwa ka lweny i kom jo Kanaan?”" 
Judges1:2 Ci Rwot ogamo ni, “Jo Juda aye gibicito; nen, atyeko miyo lobo-ni i ciŋgi.”" 
Judges1:3 Jo Juda guwaco bot utmegigi jo Cimeon ni, “Wubin wunywak kwedwa wot i lobo ma gipoko botwa ki kwir-ri, wek walweny i kom jo Kanaan, Wan bene wabinywako kwedwu wot kit meno i lobo ma gipoko botwu,” Mumiyo jo Cimeon gudto kwedgi." 
Judges1:4 Ka jo Juda gucito kunnu, Rwot omiyo jo Kanaan ki jo Periji i ciŋgi, ci guloyo dano alip apar i Bejek," 
Judges1:5 Gurwatte ki Adoni-bejek kabaka me Bejek i gaŋŋe kunnu, gulwenyo i kome, ci guloyo jo Kanaan ki jo Periji." 
Judges1:6 Adoni bejek oriŋo woko, ento gulubo kore, gumake, guŋolo twoni ciŋe woko, ki twoni tyene," 
Judges1:7 Adoni-bejek owacci, “Yam luker pyerabiro ma giŋolo twoni ciŋgi ki twoni tyengi gubedo ka coko ŋide cam i te mejana; kit ma yam atimo i komgi-ni, Lubaŋa oculla kit meno.” Gitere i Jerucalem, ci oto kunnu." 
Judges1:8 Ka dok jo Juda gulwenyo i kom Jerucalem, gumako woko, guneko jo ma tye iye ki pala lucwan, ka guwaŋo woko ki mac." 
Judges1:9 Ka lacen jo Juda dok gucito ka lweny i kom jo Kanaan ma gibedo i lobo godi, ki i Negeb, ki i pwor got." 
Judges1:10 Jo Juda gucito bene ka lweny i kom jo Kanaan ma gibedo i Kebron, ci guloyo Cecai, Akiman ki Talmai. Gaŋ ma koni gilwoŋo ni Kebron, yam nyiŋe obedo Kiriat-arba." 
Judges1:11 Ka gua ki kunnu, gucito ka lweny i kom jo ma gibedo i Debir. Nyiŋ Debir yam obedo Kiriat-ceper." 
Judges1:12 Ci Kaleb owacci, “Ka ŋatti mo olwenyo i kom Kiriat-ceper ce omako, ci abimiye nyara Akaca obed dakone.”" 
Judges1:13 Otiniel wod pa Kenaj, ma omin Kaleb matidine, aye omako, ci Kaleb omiye nyare Akaca obedo dakone." 
Judges1:14 Ka nyako ocito bot cware, ci odiye ni openy poto mo bot wonne. Opye piny ki i wi kanane ci Kaleb openye ni, “Imito gin aŋo?”" 
Judges1:15 Nyare ogamo ni, “Miya mot mo; macalo doŋ iketa wa i lobo Negeb, dok imiya waŋ it mo bene.” Kaleb omiye waŋ it ma tuŋ malo ki waŋ it ma tuŋ piny bene," 
Judges1:16 Likwayo pa jo Keni, ma jo pa oc Moses, gucito kacel ki jo Juda kun gia ki i gaŋ Otit, gucito wa i tim me lobo Juda ma tye i Negeb ma cok ki Arad; gucito, gubedo kacel ki jo Amalek." 
Judges1:17 Jo Juda gucito kacel ki utmegigi jo Cimeon, ci guloyo jo Kanaan ma gibedo i Jepat, Gudyero gaŋ meno i ciŋ Rwot, gujwero woko; mumiyo nyiŋ gaŋ meno gilwoŋo ni Korma." 
Judges1:18 Juda dok omako Gaja ki lobo ma i ŋete, Acikelon ki lobo ma i ŋete ki Ekron ki lobo ma i ŋete," 
Judges1:19 Rwot obedo ki Juda, mumiyo ocamo lo bo godi odoko mere; ento ryemo jo ma gibedo i bar oloye, pien onoŋo gitye ki gadigadi lweny me nyonyo." 
Judges1:20 Kebron gimiyo bot Kaleb, kit ma yam Moses ociko-ni; en oryemo likwayo pa Anak adek woko ki kunnu." 
Judges1:21 Ento jo Benjamin pe guryemo jo Jebuc ma gibedo i Jerucalem, mumiyo jo Jebuc gunywako bedo i Jerucalem kacel ki jo Benjamin o kwede wa onyoo." 
Judges1:22 Jo me ot pa Yucepu bene gucito ka lweny i kom Betel, ci Rwot obedo kwedgi." 
Judges1:23 Gucwalo lurot-piny i Betel, meno aye gaŋ ma yam gilwoŋo ni Luj." 
Judges1:24 Ka lurot-piny guneno dano mo ka bino kun oa ki i gaŋ, guwacce ni, “Nyut botwa yo me donyo i gaŋ ba, ci wabitimi maber.”" 
Judges1:25 En onyuto botgi yo me donyo i gaŋ, ci guneko dano ina gitye iye ki pala lucwan; ento guweko laco meno ki ludoggolane gucito." 
Judges1:26 Dano meno ocito i lobo pa jo Kit, ogero iye gaŋ, ocako nyiŋe ni Luj; meno aye obedo nyiŋe o kwede wa onyoo." 
Judges1:27 Jo Manace pe guryemo jo ma gibedo i Bet-cean ki i gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, kadi jo ma gibedo i Taanak, Dor, Ibleam ki Megido ki i gaŋi matino ma i netgi; ento jo Kanaan gucerre ci gubedo i lobo-nu." 
Judges1:28 Ka jo Icrael gudoko tek, ci gudiyo gin jo Kanaan ki tic muroni, ento pe guryemogi woko ducu." 
Judges1:29 Jo Epraim pe guryemo jo Kanaan ma gubedo i Gejer, ento jo Kanaan gubedo i kingi i Gejer." 
Judges1:30 Jo Jabulon pe guryemo jo ma gibedo i Kitron, kadi jo ma gibedo i Nakalol; ento jo Kanaan gubedo i kingi, ci guketogi i tic muroni." 
Judges1:31 Jo Acer pe guryemo jo ma gibedo i Akko, kadi jo ma gubedo i Cidon, Aklab, Akijib, Kelba, Apik ki Rekob." 
Judges1:32 Ento jo Acer gubedo i kin jo Kanaan ma gin wegi lobo-nu, pien pe guryemogi woko." 
Judges1:33 Jo Naputali pe guryemo jo ma gibedo i Bet-cemec ki Bet-anat, ento gubedo i kin jo Kanaan ma gin wegi lobo-nu. Kadi bed kumeno, guketo jo Bet-cemec ki Bet-anat i tic muroni." 
Judges1:34 Jo Amor gudiyo jo Dan, gudwokogi wa i lobo godi, pe guye ni gucit i bar." 
Judges1:35 Jo Amor gucerre gubedo i got Kerec, i Aijalon ki i Calabim. Ento jo me ot pa Yucepu gubedo ka diyogi matek, ci guketogi i tic muroni." 
Judges1:36 Waŋ lobo pa jo Amor ocakke ka ma giito iye malo i Akrabim, oa ki i Cela ocito malo." 
Judges2:1 Lamaika pa Rwot oa ki i Gilgal ocito i Bokim, ci owacci, “Yam akwanyowu ki i Ejipt, ci akelowu wa i lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire ni abimiyo bot kwarowu. Yam awacci, ‘Pe abituro gicikkena kwedwu matwal," 
Judges2:2 wun bene pe wuket gicikke mo i kinwu ki jo ma gibedo i lobo man. Wubimuko keno jogigi woko.’ Ento wun pe wulubo cikka Man doŋ wutimo aŋo? 
Judges2:3 Kombeddi doŋ awaco ni, pe doŋ abiryemogi woko ki i nyimwu; gibidoko lumonewu, ki lubaŋagi bibedo owic me makowu.”" 
Judges2:4 Ka lamalaika pa Rwot oloko lok meno bot jo Icrael ducu, jo Icrael guwo ki koko." 
Judges2:5 Gucako nyig kabedonu ni Bokim ci gutumo gitum bot Rwot kunnu. 
Judges2:6 Ka Yocwa ociko lwak ci guket woko kun gat acel acel ocito i lobo ma ginaleyane ka camone. 
Judges2:7 Jo Icrael gutiyo bot Rwot i kare pa Yocwa ducu ki i kare pa ludoŋo ducu ma yam gudoŋ ka Yocwa doŋ oto, gin jo ma guneno tic madito ducu ma yam Rwot otiyo pi jo Icrael." 
Judges2:8 Yocwa wod pa Nun ma latic pa Rwot oto woko ma noŋo mwaka me ditte oromo miya acel ki apar," 
Judges2:9 Guyiko kome i lobone kikome, i ginaleya ma yam gimiyo bote i Timnat-kerec i lobo godi pa jo Epraim i ŋet got Gaac, yo tuŋ acam." 
Judges2:10 Ci yalwak meno ducu guto, gudok bot kwarogi, ka dok yalwak mukene olubogi ma pe gigeyo Rwot, kadi tic ma yam en otiyo pi jo Icrael." 
Judges2:11 Jo Icrael gucako timo gin ma nen marac i wag Rwot pi woro jogi ma nyiŋgi Baal. 
Judges2:12 Gubwoto Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarogi woko, ma yam okwanyogi ki i lobo Ejipt, ci gucako lubo kor lubaŋa mukene ki i kin lwak lubaŋa pa rok mapatpat ma orumogi dyere-ni; guryebbe i nyimgi, gumiyo kiniga omako Rwot.;" 
Judges2:13 Gubwoto Rwot woko, guworo jogi Baal mapatpat ki jogi ma mon-gu." 
Judges2:14 Pienno kiniga omako Rwot i kom jo Icrael ci omiyogi i ciŋ Iuyak-jamigi, ma gubedo ka yako jamigi, Dok omiyogi woko i te twero pa lumerokgi ma orumogi dyere, omiyo pe doŋ gitwero cuŋ i nyim lumerokgi," 
Judges2:15 Ka ma gicito iye ducu i kare-nu, ciŋ Rwot onoŋo tye i komgi likiŋ pi timogi rac, kit ma yam Rwot owaco-ni, kun lubo kit ma Rwot onoŋo okwoŋo botgi; ci piny orem kwedgi woko." 
Judges2:16 Rwot ocako keto luŋolkop ma gularo jo Icrael ki i twero pa jo ma yam giyako jamigi-ni. 
Judges2:17 Ento pe guworo dog luŋolkopgi; gubedo ka woro lubaŋa mogo mukene ki tim kwele kwele ki ryebbe i nyimgi, Gulokke gubarre woko oyot ki i yo ma yam kwarogi gulubo. Kwarogi onoŋo yam gulubo cik pa Rwot, ento gin pe gulubo cikke." 
Judges2:18 I kare ducu ma Rwot omiyo botgi Laŋolkop mo, ci Rwot obedo ki laŋolkop meno; obedo ka larogi ki i ciŋ lumerokgi pi kare pa Laŋolkop meno ducu. Kica yam mako Rwot i komgi kare ki kare ka gicur i kom jo ma unogi kun gidiyogi ki tek." 
Judges2:19 Ento ka laŋolkop mo oto woko, ci gitarre, gidok cen ka timo tim maraco makato kwarogi ducu, kun gilubo kor lubaŋa mogo mukene, giworogi kun giryebbe piny i nyimgi; pe gibwoto timgi mo, kadi wa kit ducu ma gibedo ka lubo pi nwaŋ ŋutgi-ni." 
Judges2:20 Mumiyo kiniga omako Rwot i kom jo Icrael, ci owacci, “Jo man guturo gicikkena ma yam acikke kwede ki kwarogi, dok gukwero woro doga." 
Judges2:21 Pi meno cakke tin an pe doŋ abiryemo rok mo woko ki i nyimgi ma i kin lwak rok mapatpat ma yam Yocwa oto oweko-ni," 
Judges2:22 wek atem ki cwiny jo Icrael, anen ka gibigwokke kun gilubo yo pa Rwot macalo kwarogi yam gugwokke iye, nyo pe.”" 
Judges2:23 Kit meno Rwot oweko rok meno ducu gubedo, pe oryemogi woko ducu lawaŋacel, dok pe omiyogi i te twero pa Yocwa." 
Judges3:1 Magi aye rok ma Rwot oweko gudoŋ i lobo me temo kwede cwiny jo Icrael, makato ducu dano ma i Icrael ducu ma peya gulwenyo lweny mo i Kanaan." 
Judges3:2 Owekogi pi lok man keken wek yalwak ma i Icrael ducu gunyebbe ki lweny, wek en opwonygi ki lweny, makato ducu jo ma yam pe guŋiyo kwede." 
Judges3:3 Magi aye rok ma Rwot oweko gudoŋ: rwodi pa jo Piliciti abic, jo Kanaan ducu, jo Cidon ki jo Kiv ma yam gibedo i godi me Lebanon, cakke ki i got Baal-kermon o kwede wa i yo ma donyo i Kamat," 
Judges3:4 Gin aye gubedo me temo cwiny Luicrael pi ŋeyo ka gibilubo cik pa Rwot ducu ma yam en ociko bot kwarogi ki i dog Moses. 
Judges3:5 Kit meno jo Icrael gubedo i dye jo Kanaan, jo Kit, jo Amor, jo Periji, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc." 
Judges3:6 Gucako nyomo anyiragi, gin bene gumiyo anyiragi bot awobegi, gunyomo; ci gucako woro lwak lubaŋagi." 
Judges3:7 Jo Icrael gutimo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot, kun wigi owil woko i kom Rwot Lubaŋagi, guworo jogi Baal mapatpat ki Aciterot-gu." 
Judges3:8 Pienno omiyo kiniga omako Rwot i kom jo Icrael, ci omiyogi woko i cin Kucan-ricataim kabaka me Mecopotamia. Jo Icrael gutiyo bot Kucan-ricataim mwaka aboro." 
Judges3:9 Ento ka jo Icrael gukok bot Rwot, en omiyogi dano ma olarogi, en Otiniel wod pa Kenaj, ma omin Kaleb matidine." 
Judges3:10 Cwiny pa Rwot obino i kome, ci obedo ka ŋolo kop i Icrael. Ka ocito ka lweny, Rwot omiyo Kucan-ricataim kabaka me Mecopotamia i ciŋe, obwoyo Kucan-ricataim woko," 
Judges3:11 Kit meno omiyo lobo oywe pi mwaka pyeraŋwen, ci lacen Otiniel wod pa Kenaj oto." 
Judges3:12 Jo Icrael dok gutimo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot, ci Rwot omiyo tek bot Eglon kabaka me Moab me lweny i kom jo Icrael, pien onoŋo gutimo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot." 
Judges3:13 Eglon ocoko jo Ammon ki jo Amalek, ocito kwedgi, oloyo jo Icrael, omayo gaŋ Otit woko," 
Judges3:14 Jo Icrael gutiyo bot Eglon kabaka me Moab pi mwaka apar wiye aboro kulu. 
Judges3:15 Ento ka jo Icrael gukok bot Rwot, en omiyogi dano ma olarogi, en Ekud wod pa Gera ma jo Benjamin, dano ma lacam. Jo Icrael gumiyo en aye otero mucorogi bot Eglon kabaka me Moab." 
Judges3:16 Ekud oteto pala lucwanne ma lake bit ryoryo ma borre oromo futi acel ki nucu, ci orwako i te boŋone, otweyo i kom eme tuŋ lacuc," 
Judges3:17 ocito otero mucoro bot Eglon. Eglon onoŋo obedo dano ma ocwe mada. 
Judges3:18 Ka Ekud otyeko miyo mot me mucoro bot kabaka, ocwalo dano ma gutiŋo mot meno gucito woko." 
Judges3:19 Ento en kikome, ka oo i godi ma gipayo apaya ma cok ki Gilgal, olokke odok cen, owacci, “At ye ki lok mo me muŋ ma gicwala kwede boti, kabaka.” Kabaka ociko ni, “‘Wuliŋ koŋ!” Ci lwak luticce ducu ma gucuŋ i nyime gukato woko," 
Judges3:20 Ka Ekud obino bote, onoŋo en obedo kene i kicikane manic ma malo i wi ot. Ekud owacci, “Atye ki kwena ma oa ki bot Lubaŋa ma akelo boti,” ci kabaka oa malo ki i wi komme." 
Judges3:21 Ekud oroyo ciŋe ma lacam, omako pala lucwan, owoto ki i eme ma tuŋ lacuc, ocobo ki i kabaka." 
Judges3:22 Lak pala odonyo wa ki lokke, ci moo iye opuyo lak pala woko. Pe owoto pala lucwan woko ki i i kabaka, dok wee iye okatti woko." 
Judges3:23 Ekud okato woko ki ka ma gidonyo kwede i ot-ti, ci oloro doggola me kicika me wi ot ka ma kabaka tye iye-ni, otweyo woko." 
Judges3:24 Ka en doŋ ocito woko, ci lutic gubino. Ka guneno ni doggola me kicika ‘ma i wi ot doŋ gitweyo woko, ci gubedo ka tamo ni, “Laditwa tye ka konnye i ot matidi ma i kicika manic-ci.”" 
Judges3:25 Gubedo ka kurone nio ka doggi otwo woko; ento ka en pud ori kun pe oyabo doggola me kicika me wi ot, gukwanyo layab, guyabo kwede, ci nen, rwotgi obuto i dye ot ma doŋ oto," 
Judges3:26 Ma pud gigalle, Ekud olwi oriŋo woko, okato wa i ŋe godi ma gipayo apaya ca, oriŋo olaro Ceira," 
Judges3:27 Ka doŋ oo kunnu, okuto tum i lobo godi me Epraim; ci jo Icrael gucito kwede gua ki i lobo godi, kun en telo wigi," 
Judges3:28 Owaco botgi ni, “Wulub kora, pien Rwot doŋ omiyo lumerokwu, jo Moab, i ciŋwu.” Gucito kwede, gumako waŋ wat me Jordan me geŋo jo Moab: pe guye dano acel mo oŋolo kulu." 
Judges3:29 I kare meno guneko jo Moab ma mito romo alip apar, ma gin ducu twoni co matego; acel mo pe obwot." 
Judges3:30 Kit meno gutayo jo Moab woko i nino meno, Gubedo i te loc pa jo Icrael ci lobo oywe pi mwaka pyeraboro," 
Judges3:31 Ŋat mulubo kore en Camgar wod pa Anat ma oneko jo Piliciti miya abicel ki dim lalek dyaŋ; en bene olaro jo Icrael. 
Judges4:1 Jo Icrael dok gutimo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot ma Ekud doŋ oto woko," 
Judges4:2 ci Rwot omiyogi i ciŋ Jabin kabaka mo pa jo Kanaan ma yam obedo ka loc i Kajor. Lawimonnye nyiŋe Cicera, ma bedo i Karocet pa Lurok." 
Judges4:3 Jo Icrael dok gukok bot Rwot ni okonygi, pien onoŋo Jabin tye ki gadigadi lweny me nyonyo miya aboŋwen, ci obedo ka uno jo Icrael matek pi mwaka pyeraryo," 
Judges4:4 I kare meno Debora, lanebi ma dako ma cware Lapidot, aye obedo laŋolkop pa jo Icrael." 
Judges4:5 En bedo i te otit pa Debora, ma tye i kin Rama ki Betel ma i lobo godi me Epraim, ci jo Icrael gibino bote wek en oŋol kopgi," 
Judges4:6 Debora ocwalo kwena, olwoŋo Barak wod pa Abinoam ki i Kedec i lobo pa jo Naputali, owacce ni” “Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael ociko in ni, ‘Cit icok joni i wi got Tabor kun ikwanyo jo alip apar ki i kaka pa Naputali ki kaka pa Jabulon." 
Judges4:7 Abiywayo Cicera, lawimony pa Jabin, akelo ka romo kwedi i dog kulu Kicon kacel ki gadigadi lwennye ki buca monynye ducu, ci abimive i ciŋi.’’’" 
Judges4:8 Barak owaco bot Debora ni, “Ka in aye ibicito kweda, ci abicito; ento ka in pe ibicito kweda, an pe abicito.”" 
Judges4:9 Debora ogamo ni, “An abicito kwedi ada; ento wot ma icito iye-ni deyone pe bibedo meri, pien Rwot bimiyo Cicera i cin dako.” Ci Debora oa, owoto ki Barak wa i Kedec." 
Judges4:10 Barak olwoŋo jo Jabulon ki jo Naputali ki i Kedec, ci jo alip apar gucito bote gulubo kore; ki Debora bene ocito kacel kwedgi." 
Judges4:11 I kare meno onoŋo Keber ma jo Keni opokke woko ki bot jo Keni mukene-ni ma gin likwayo pa Kobab ma jo pa oc Moses, ci onoŋo oguro kemane ka mabor i ŋet yat kworo ma i Jaananim, ma cok ‘ki Kedec." 
Judges4:12 Ka gitito bot Cicera ni Barak wod pa Abinoam ocito i got Tabor," 
Judges4:13 ci Cicera olwoŋo wegi gadigadi nyonyone ducu ma giromo miya aboŋwen, ki jo ducu ma gitye bote, ni gua ki i Karocet pa Lurok gubin i kulu Kicon." 
Judges4:14 Debora owaco bot Barak ni, “A malo, pien tin aye nino ma Rwot omiyo iye Cicera i ciŋi. Rwot aye bitelo nyimi.” Kit meno Barak ocako lor piny ki i wi got Tabor kacel ki dano alip apar ma gilubo kore." 
Judges4:15 Ci Rwot obwaŋo kom Cicera ki wegi gadigadine ducu, kacel ki monnye ducu i nyim Barak, ci guto ki pala lucwan. Ento Cicera opye woko piny ki i gadigadine, oriŋo woko ki tyene," 
Judges4:16 Barak olubo kor gadigadi ki monygi o wa i Karocet pa Lurok; mony pa Cicera ginekogi woko ducu ki pala lucwan, pe dano acel mo odoŋ." 
Judges4:17 Cicera oriŋo ki tyene nio wa i kema pa Yayeri, dako pa Keber ma jo Keni; pien yam onoŋo kuc tye i kin Jabin kabaka me Kajor ki jo me ot pa Keber ma Lakeni." 
Judges4:18 Yayeri okatti woko ka jolo wiye ci owaco bote ni, “Lokke idwog-kany, laditta, pe ilwor.” Kit meno omiyo Cicera odok bote wa i kemane, ci dako oume woko ki boŋo." 
Judges4:19 Cicera owaco bote ni, “Koŋ imiya pii mo manok me amata, pien orwo pii tye ka neka.” Dako oyabo dog opiru cak, omiyo en omato, ka dok oume woko," 
Judges4:20 Ka Cicera dok owaco bote ni, “Cun i doggola kema. Ka ŋat mo obino ce openyi ni, ‘Ŋatti mo tye kany?’ wacci, ‘Pe.’ ”" 
Judges4:21 Ento Yayeri dako pa Keber okwanyo loc lagur kema, ka dok omako nyol i cine, ocito bote mot, oguro loc i tur nyime tuŋcel, nio ka otuc pil wa i nom, pien onoŋo onino matek pi olo. Kit meno omiyo oto." 
Judges4:22 Ci nen, ka Barak obedo ka lubo kor Cicera. Yayeri ocito woko ka jolo wiye ci owacci, “Bin, wek anyutt i dano ma it ye ka yenyone-ni.” Odonyo i kemane, ci onoŋo Cicera oto woko, obuto piny kenyo kun loc ocuŋ i tur nyime." 
Judges4:23 Kit meno Lubaŋa otayo Jabin kabaka me Kanaan ki i nyim jo Icrael i nino meno," 
Judges4:24 ci jo Icrael gumedde ki diyo Jabin kabaka me Kanaan matek nio ka gutyeke woko. 
Judges5:1 Debora ki Barak wod pa Abinoam guwayo wer akero i nino meno ni," 
Judges5:2 “Luwimony gutelo wi Icrael, dano gubino ma gudyero komgi kekengi; wupwo Rwot!" 
Judges5:3 “Wuwiny, wun luker! Wuter itwu, wun luloc! Abiywayo akero bot Rwot abiwero ki dwan mamit bot Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael."
