Judges5:4 “Rwot, i kare ma ikato woko ki i Ceir, i kare ma icoro la ki i dye lobo Edom, lobo ocako yeŋŋe, polo bene ocwero pii; ada do, pol ocako cwer," 
Judges5:5 Godi guyemje ki i nyim Rwot, Cinai oyeŋŋe kuca ki i nyim Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
Judges5:6 “I kare pa Camgar wod pa Anat, ki i kare pa Yayeri, luwot gubedo pe i yo gudo, jo ma giwoto ka mo giwirre i yo matino." 
Judges5:7 Dano gutum woko ki i Icrael i kin paco, gutum, gutum woko do, nio ka in Debora ibino, ituc ma in i mego i Icrael." 
Judges5:8 I kare ma guyero lubaŋa mogo manyen, ci mony oo wa i dog gaŋ, Kwot mo, nyo toŋ, yam onen mono i kin io Icrael alip pyeraŋwen?" 
Judges5:9 Cwinya olwodo lok i kom luwimony pa Icrael ma gudyero komgi i kin lwak. Wupwo Rwot! 
Judges5:10 “Wun lubed i wi kana makwar-ri ma wuumo komgi ki boŋŋi me bedowu, ki wun luwot ki tyenwu iyo, wutit lokke ba." 
Judges5:11 Wuwiny dwan luwer ka ma gitwomo iye pii; kunnu gipako kit ma Rwot oloyo ki mony, kit ma danone ma ikin gaŋ guloyo ki lukworgi i Icrael. “I kare-nu jo pa Rwot gucito piny wa i dog gaŋ." 
Judges5:12 “Deborawe, co woko, co woko! Co woko, co woko, icak wer! A malo, Barak, itel wi opiini ma iyako, in wod pa Abinoam!" 
Judges5:13 Ludito mudoŋ gucako wot, jo pa Rwot gucito ka lwenypire i kom oteka." 
Judges5:14 Jo Epraim gucito gubino i nota, i korwu wunjo Benjamin ki lutuwu; luwimonypajo Makir gubino piny, lumak odoo ker gua i Jabulon." 
Judges5:15 Rwodi pa jo Icakar gubino ki Debora. Jo Icakar gucuŋ matek i kom Barak; gutwarre i nota i kore. Ento jo me kaka pa Reuben gubedo ki guŋ-ic. 
Judges5:16 Piŋo ibedo i dye dwol romi ka winyo nyamulere ma gikuto i kor lim? Jo me kaka pa Reuben gubedo ki guŋ-ic. 
Judges5:17 Gilead odoŋ loka Jordan; gin aŋo mumiyo Dan obedo mere i mel? Acer obedo mere mot i dog nam, obedo otoyo toke i Waŋ watte." 
Judges5:18 Jo Jabulon aye lwak ma gudyero komgi i to; ki jo Naputali bene i wi cere ma i dye bar. 
Judges5:19 Luker gubino, gulwenyo, luker me Kanaan gulwenyo matek i kare-nu i Taanak, i ŋet pii me Megido, ento pe gunoŋo lonyo me ayaka." 
Judges5:20 Lakalatwe gulwenyo ki i polo, gulwenyo i kom Cicera kun gilubo gergi," 
Judges5:21 Kulu Kicon oterogi woko, wi biamwonyi mager-ri, Kicon mager-ri. Abimedo ki woto anyim ki tekka ducu!" 
Judges5:22 “Aguragura gimoro piny ki oboŋ tyengi, kun gipye, gikirre kwede; aguragurane gipye, gikirre," 
Judges5:23 “Lamalaika pa Rwot owacci, gicen Meroj, gicen lubedo iye matek, pien pe guriŋo i oduru pa Rwot, pi konyo Rwot ki lweny i kom oteka." 
Judges5:24 “Yayeri gimiye gum makato mon ducu, dako pa Keber Lakeni; i kin mon ducu ma bedo i kema kome gum." 
Judges5:25 Olego pii, dok omiye cak, okelle cak lukulu i awal maber ma ma oporre pi rwot." 
Judges5:26 Omako loc kema i ciŋe, ciŋe malacuc otiŋo nyol pa lutic; Ogoyo wi Cicera, otyero, ocanyo, otuco tur nyime pil," 
Judges5:27 Okulle piny, opoto, obuto lilwe ka tyene; okulle ka tyene, opoto; opoto oto ka ma okulle iye-ni." 
Judges5:28 “Dako opiro wane ki i waŋ dirica min Cicera okiyo ki i waŋ ot, owacci, ‘Piŋo gadigadine pe odwogo oyot? Piŋo tyen gadigadine pe mor, bino oyot?’" 
Judges5:29 Mon ma luryeko gudok iye, en bene ogamo doge kene, ni," 
Judges5:30 ‘Gunoŋo lim, gitye ka pokone, anyaka acel pi twon acel acel, nyo dodo aryo; boŋo manwala nwala pi Cicera, ma giyako, boŋo manwala nwala ma gidero, boŋŋi aryo ma gidero me abola i ŋuta.’" 
Judges5:31 “Lumerokki ducu myero gutum woko kit meno, ai Rwot! Ento luremi gubed macalo cen ma tuc ki kerone.” I ŋe meno lobo oywe pi mwaka pyeraŋwen." 
Judges6:1 Jo Icrael gutimo gin ma nen marac i nyim Rwot; ci Rwot omiyogi i ciŋ jo Midian pi mwaka abiro. 
Judges6:2 Jo Midian gubwoyo jo Icrael woko, mumiyo jo Icrael guyubo ka-kannegi i kin godi, dok guyubo borogi ki kabedo ma gicelo matek, pi lworo jo Midian." 
Judges6:3 I kare ducu ma jo Icrael gicoyo kodi, ci jo Midian ki jo Amalek ki jo ma tun wokceŋ gicorre gibino ka monyogi." 
Judges6:4 Gitoŋo gonygi cok kwedgi, gibalo cam ma i potogi o kwede ka ma cok ki Gaja, kun pe giweko cam mo doŋ ma konyo jo Icrael, kadi wa romo nyo twon nyo kana." 
Judges6:5 Gibino ki limgi makwo, ki kemagi; kun gibino macalo bonyo, ma kwanogi ki kwaŋo wei kinagagi loyo dano; ka gibino gibalo lobo woko liweŋ." 
Judges6:6 Kit meno jo Midian gumiyo piny orem ki jo Icrael woko, oweko jo Icrael gukok bot Rwot ni okonygi." 
Judges6:7 I kare ma jo Icrael gukok bot Rwot pi aroma pa jo Midian," 
Judges6:8 ci Rwot ocwalo lanebi botgi. Owaco botgi ni, “Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco kit man ni, Yam atelo wiwu akwanyowu ki i Ejipt ki i ot kol me bedo opii." 
Judges6:9 Yam alarowu ki i ciŋ jo Ejipt ki i ciŋ jo ma gubedo ka unowu ducu; aryemogi woko ki i nyimgi kun amiyo lobog botwu," 
Judges6:10 I kare ca awaco botwu ni, ‘An aye a Rwot Lubaŋawu: pe wubilworo lwak lubaŋa pa jo Amor ma wubedo i lobogi-ni.’ Ento pe wumedde ka woro doga.”" 
Judges6:11 I kare meno lamalaika pa Rwot obino obedo i te kworo ma tye i Opra, gaŋ pa Yoaci ma jo Abiejer. Onoŋo wode Gideon tye ka dino ŋano i bur biyo olok wek jo Midian pe gunen." 
Judges6:12 Lamalaika pa Rwot onen bote, owaco bote ni, “Rwot tye kwedi, in twon oteka lweny.”" 
Judges6:13 Ci Gideon owaco bote ni, “Tima kica ba, ladit. Ka Rwot tye kwedwa, piŋo lok magi ducu opoto i komwa? Lwak tic ducu me aura ma yam Rwot otiyo, ma kwarowa gutitowa pire-ni, doŋ tye kwene? Giwacci yam Rwot aye okwanyowa ki i lobo Ejipt, ento kombeddi Rwot doŋ obolowa woko, omiyowa i ciŋ jo Midian.”" 
Judges6:14 Ci Rwot olokke tuŋ bote, owacce ni, “Cit ki tek komi-ni, icilar jo Icrael ki i ciŋ jo Midian. An kikoma aye acwali.”" 
Judges6:15 Gideon ogamo doge ni, “Tima kica ba, Rwot. An atwero laro jo Icrael niŋniŋ? Nen, kakawa tye matidi mo i kin jo Manace, dok an aye latin matidine ki i doggolawa.”" 
Judges6:16 Ci Rwot owaco bote ni, “Ento an aye abibedo kwedi; dok ibineko jo Midian ducu macalo obedo dano acel keken.”" 
Judges6:17 Gideon owaco ni, “Ka doŋ anoŋo gum ki boti, doŋ imiya ‘anyut mo ma moko ni in aye iloko kweda." 
Judges6:18 Tim ber, pe ia woko ki kany nio ka abino boti kun akelo ki motta me aketa i nyimi.” Ogamo ni, “Abibedo nio ka idwogo.”" 
Judges6:19 Gideon ocito i ode, otedo latin dyel mo, ki capat ma tobi pe iye ma otedo ki moko kwoŋ ma oromo debe aryo. Oketo riŋo i aduku, oonyo pige i agulu, ka okelo bot lamalaika pa Rwot i te kworo, oketo i nyime." 
Judges6:20 Lamalaika pa Rwot owaco bote ni, “Kwany riŋo ki capat ma to bi pe iye-ni, iketgi i kom pata got man, ka ionyo pige i wiye.” Gideon otimo kit meno." 
Judges6:21 Ka doŋ lamalaika pa Rwot ocwalo odoo ma tye i ciŋe, omiyo wiye ogudo riŋo ki capat ma tobi pe iye-ni. Ci mac olyel, oa ki i pata got, owaŋo riŋo ki capat ma tobi pe iye-ni woko. Lacen lamalaika pa Rwot orwenyo woko ki i waŋe." 
Judges6:22 Mumiyo Gideon oniaŋ ni lamalaika pa Rwot; ci owacci, “Maa do, ai Rwot Lubaŋa! Pien doŋ aneno lamalaika pa Rwot waŋ ki waŋ.”" 
Judges6:23 Ento Rwot owaco bote ni, “Kuc obed boti. Pe ilwor; pe ibito.”" 
Judges6:24 Ci Gideon ocaŋo keno tyer kunnu pi Rwot, ocako nyiŋe ni, Rwot aye kuc. Pud tye, ocun i Opra, gaŋ pa jo Abiejer, wa onyoo." 
Judges6:25 I dyewor meno Rwot owaco bote ni, “Kwany twon pa woru, twon me aryone ma mwaka me ditone oromo abiro, ci imuk keno tyer pa jok Baal ma tye bot woru woko, itoŋ yat ma gicomo i ŋete pi woro jok ma dako ma gilwoŋo ni Acera." 
Judges6:26 Ci icuŋ keno tyer pi Rwot Lubaŋani i wi lobo ma gitoro ma otinne malo, kun icaŋo got kikore. Ka doŋ ikwany twon me aryone, ityer me gitum awaŋa; yat me awora ma ibitoŋo ireto woko piny-nyi bidoko yen me waŋo gitum.”" 
Judges6:27 Kit meno Gideon otero jo apar ki i kin luticce, otimo kit ma Rwot ocike kwede; ento pi lworo lutugi ki jo ma i gaŋ kunnu pe otiyo dyeceŋ, otiyo dyewor," 
Judges6:28 Ka dano ma i gaŋ gua malo odiko con, ci nen, keno tyer pa jok Baal gimuko woko, ki yat me awora ma ka ŋete bene gitoŋo woko, ki twon me aryone gityero woko i wi keno tyer ma gicaŋo-ni." 
Judges6:29 Gucako lok kekengi ni, “Aŋa mono ma otimo kuman-ni?” Lacen ka doŋ gutyeko yenyo kore kun gipenyo dano, ci guwacci, “Gideon wod pa Yoaci aye otimo kuman-ni.”" 
Judges6:30 Ci jo ma i gaŋ meno guwaco bot Yoaci ni, “Kel wodi wo ko wek gineke, pien omuko keno tyer pa Baal woko, dok otoŋo yat me awora ma ka nete-ni.”" 
Judges6:31 Ento Yoaci owaco bot jo ducu ma guryeyo cok i kome ni, “Wun wubilweny pi Baal bo? Wun wubicun i kome? Ŋat ma bilweny pire gibineko woko ki odiko-ni. Ka en aye lubaŋa, wek en olweny gire kene, pien keno tyerre doŋ gimuko woko.”" 
Judges6:32 Pi meno gicako nyiŋ Gideon ni Jerubaal i nino meno, ma te lokke ni, “Wek Baal olweny kwede,” pien omuko keno tyerre woko." 
Judges6:33 Ka doŋ jo Midian ducu ki jo Amalek ki jo ma tuŋ wokceŋ gucokke, guŋolo kulu Jordan ci gugony i nota me Jejreel." 
Judges6:34 Ento Cwiny pa Rwot obino i kom Gideon; okuto tum ci jo Abiejer gucokke i kore. 
Judges6:35 Ci ocwalo kwena oromo kin jo Manace ducu, gin bene gucokke i kore, Ka dok ocwalo kwena bot jo Acer, jo Jabulon ki jo Naputali; ci gucito ka rwatte kwedgi." 
Judges6:36 Ci Gideon owaco bot Lubaŋa ni, “Ka ce ibilaro jo Icrael ki ciŋa kit ma iwaco-ni ba," 
Judges6:37 nen, aketo yer romo piny i laro moyo eno Ka ce toyo opoŋ i yer romo keken, kun i nom ducu otwo woko, ci abiŋeyo ni ibilaro jo Icrael ki ciŋa, kit macalo iwaco-ni.”" 
Judges6:38 Ci obedo kit meno, Ka oa malo odiko con, obiyo yer romo, oliyo toyo ki i yer romo ma opoŋo awal kwoŋ woko." 
Judges6:39 Ka dok Gideon owaco bot Lubaŋa ni, “Pe kiniga omaki i koma, Wek dok alok tyen man acel-li. Wek dok atem ki yer romo kicel. Alegi ni, wek yer romo keken aye obed ma otwo, ento toyo oluk i kom nom ducu ma kenyo.”" 
Judges6:40 Ci Lubaŋa otimo kit ennu i dyewor meno; onoŋo yer romo keken aye otwo, ento ŋom ducu toyo oluk iye." 
Judges7:1 Jerubaal, ma en aye Gideon, ki jo ducu ma onoŋo gitye bote gua malo odiko con, ci gugony i ŋet waŋ pii me Karod. Gony pa jo Midian onoŋo tye i nyimgi yo tuŋ acam, i ŋet got More ki i nota." 
Judges7:2 Rwot owaco bot Gideon ni “Jo ma gitye kwedi-ni gipol mada ki tuŋ bota. Ka abimiyo jo Midian i ciŋgi gibiwakke ginwette i koma ni meno’ ‘Ciŋa kikoma gire aye olara.’ 
Judges7:3 Pi meno kombeddi doŋ itit bot lwak ni, ‘Ŋatti mo ma lworo omako, ma kome myel ber odok i gaŋŋe.’ ” Kit meno Gideon oomo cwinygi, ci dano alip pyeraryo wiye aryo gudok woko, ki dano alip apar gudoŋ." 
Judges7:4 Rwot dok owaco bot Gideon ni “Lwak pud pol mada; tergi i dog pii ci abitemo cwinygi ki kunnu. Ŋat ma abiwacci, ni, ‘Dano man bicito kwedi’ en aye bicito kwedi; ki ŋat ma abiwacel ni, ‘Dano man pe bicito kwedi,’ en pe bicito kwedi.”" 
Judges7:5 Kit meno Gideon otero dano i dog pii; ci Rwot owaco bote ni, “Dano acel acel ma gamo pii ki lebe macalo gwok gamo kwede ibiketo en cuŋ kene; ki ŋat ma orumo coŋe piny ka mato pii bene kit meno.”" 
Judges7:6 Ci wei dano ma gugamo pii kun giketo ciŋgi i doggi oromo miya adek; ento lwak jo mudoŋ ducu gurumo coŋgi ka mato pii. 
Judges7:7 Rwot owaco bot Gideon ni, “An abilarowu ki jo miya adek ma gugamo pii ki i ciŋgi-ni, pi miyo jo Midian i ciŋwu. Doŋ iwek jo mukene-ni ŋat acel acel odok gire i pacone.”" 
Judges7:8 Gideon ogamo abino pa lwak wo ko ki i ciŋgi wa ki tumgi; ci ocwalo jo Icrael mudoŋ, kun dano acel acel cito i kemane. En odoŋ ki jo miya adek-ki, kun gony pa jo Midian tye piny i nota," 
Judges7:9 I dyewor meno Rwot owaco bote ni, “A malo, icit ilweny i kom gony pa jo Midian, pien doŋ atyeko miyone i ciŋi," 
Judges7:10 Ento ka ilworo cito piny kunnu, ci icit i gonygi kacel ki laticci Pura." 
Judges7:11 Ibiwinyo gin ma jo-nu giloko, ci lacen cwinyi bilimo tek me cito ka monyo gonygi.” Ocito piny ki laticce Pura, ci guo i agikki gony ka ma lumony gubuto iye." 
Judges7:12 Jo Midian, jo Amalek ki jo ducu ma gua wokceŋ onoŋo guryeyo gonygi i nota ma gumoo calo lwak bonyo; ki kinagagi bene welgi pe kwanne, gipol macalo kweyo me dog namo" 
Judges7:13 Ka Gideon oo, dano mo ocako tito lek mo bot lawote, kun waco ni, “Nen, aleko lek mo; mugati me cayiri ma oluŋŋe opoto i gony kun lor alora, obino kwede wa i kom kema, ci oreto kema woko piny, oloko ataro, kema opyelle woko piny,”" 
Judges7:14 Lawote ogamo ni, “Man pala lucwan pa Gideon wod pa Yoaci, Laicrael; en ennu kikome. Lubaŋa otyeko miyo jo Midian ki lwak monygi ducu i ciŋe.”" 
Judges7:15 Ka Gideon owinyo kit ma gitito kwede lek ki kit ma gigonyo kwede tere, ci omiyo woro bot Lubaŋa. Lacen odwogo kwede i gony pa jo Icrael, ci owacci, “Wua malo, pien Rwot doŋ omiyo mony pa jo Midian woko i ciŋwu.”" 
Judges7:16 Opoko kin jo miya adek-ki lwak buca mony adek, ka omiyo tum i ciŋgi ducu, ki abino ma igi noŋo, ki mac raa i abino ducu." 
Judges7:17 Ka doŋ ocikogi ni, “Wunena, ci wun bene wutim kit ma an atimo ka doŋ ao iŋet gony cok." 
Judges7:18 Ka akuto tum, an kacel ki jo ma atye kwedgi ducu, ci wun bene wukut tum murumo gony ducu kun wudaŋŋe ni, ‘Pi Rwot ki pi Gideon!’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Gideon ki jo miya acel ma gitye bote guo i ŋet gony cok ki cwiny dyewor ma onoŋo pud giketo Lukur-piny aketa; ci gucako kuto tum ki tyero abino ma tye i ciŋgi ducu. 
Judges7:20 Buca mony adek ducu gukuto tumgi, gutyero abinogi woko ci gumako mac raa i ciŋgi malacam ki tum me akuta i ciŋgi malacuc, kun gidaŋŋe kwede ni, “Pala lucwan pi Rwot ki pi Gideon!”" 
Judges7:21 Dano acel acel ocuŋ mot i kabedone ma gurumo gony ducu, ci mony pa jo Midian guriŋo woko ducu; gucako daŋŋe gurigo kwede woko." 
Judges7:22 Ka dano miya adek ca gitye ka kuto tumgi, Rwot oloko pala lucwan pa jo. Midian i kom lutugi kekengi ki i kom monygi ducu. Monygi oriŋo o wa i Bet-cita, ma yo tuŋ Jerera, ki o kwede wa i waŋ lobo me Abel-mekola i ŋet Tabat." 
Judges7:23 Gilwoŋo jo Icrael ki i Naputali, ki i Acer wa ki i Manace ducu, ci guryemo kor jo Midian." 
Judges7:24 Gideon ocwalo kwena i lobo godi ducu me Epraim kun waco ni, “Wubin, wulweny i kom jo Midian, wukurgi i waŋ wat ducu o wa i Bet-bara ki i Jordan bene.” Kit meno gilwoŋo jo Epraim ducu ci gumako waŋ wat ducu o wa i Bet-bara ki Jordan bene." 
Judges7:25 Gumako luker pa jo Midian aryo, Oreb ki Jeeb; ci guneko Oreb i pata got pa Oreb, ki Jeeb guneko i bur biyo olok pa Jeeb. Lacen gukelo wi Oreb ki Jeeb loka Jordan bot Gideon." 
Judges8:1 Jo Epraim guwaco bot Gideon ni, “Itimowa kuman piŋo? Nen pe ilwoŋowa ka onoŋo icito ka lweny i kom jo Midian.” Ci gugerre i kome matek." 
Judges8:2 Ento en owaco botgi ni. “Gin aŋo ma tin atimo ma giporo ki wun kulu? Pe gwero kor olok pa Epraim ber makato olok ducu ma Abiejer opwono? 
Judges8:3 Lubaŋa omiyo luker pa jo Midian i ciŋwu, Oreb ki Jeeb, ci gin aŋo ma abedo ka timo ma porre ki wun?” Ka oloko kit meno, ci kinigagi ocako dok cen i kome." 
Judges8:4 Ka Gideon obino i Jordan, okato loka ca, en kacel ki dano miya adek ma gitye bote-ni. Komgi oloc woko, ento pud giryemo kor jo Midian." 
Judges8:5 Omiyo owaco bot jo me Cukot ni. “Alegowu wumi mugati bot dano ma gilubo kora-ni, pien komgi doŋ oloc woko, dok atye ka ryemo kor Jeba ki Jalmuna ma luker pa jo Midian.”" 
Judges8:6 Ento rwodi ma i Cukot gugamo ni, “Jeba ki Jalmuna doŋ gitye i ciŋi bo, ma weko wamiyo mugati bot joni?”" 
Judges8:7 Gideon ogamo ni, “Ber yo, ka Rwot omiyo Jeba ki Jalmuna i ciŋa, ci abipwodo komwu ki okuto me tim ki okuto laŋo.”" 
Judges8:8 Ka oa woko ki kunnu, ci ocito i Penuel, ci dok oloko kwedgi laki te acel-lu. Jo me Penuel bene guwacce lok ma rom ki kit ma jo Cukot gudok iye bote." 
Judges8:9 Ci owaco bot jo ma i Penuel ni, “Ka adwogo kany ki kuc, abimuko ot man ma ocudo malo-ni woko.”" 
Judges8:10 I kare meno onoŋo Jeba ki Jalmuna gitye i Karkor, kacel ki monygi ma romo jo alip apar wiye abic, gin jo ducu ma yam gubwot ki i kom mony ducu pa jo me tuŋ wokceŋ. Onoŋo doŋ gineko jogi ma romo alip miya acel ki pyeraryo ma gin wegi lweny ki pala lucwan." 
Judges8:11 Gideon olubo yo ma jo ma gibedo i kema gimaro wok ki iye ma wok ki i ŋet Noba ki Jogbea yo tuŋ wokceŋ, ci olwenyo ki monygi ma gutoyo tokgi ata." 
Judges8:12 Jeba ki Jalmuna guriŋo woko ci oryemo korgi, omako gin luker pa jo Midian aryo ducu, oonyo kwede atiba i kom monygi ducu." 
Judges8:13 Lacen Gideon wod pa Yoaci odwogo ki i lweny kun lubo yo ma giito iye i Kerec. 
Judges8:14 Omako awobi mo ma Lacukot, openye, ci awobi-ni ocone nyiŋ rwodi ki ludoŋo me Cukot ducu, ma giromo dano pyerabiro wiye abiro." 
Judges8:15 Gideon obino boŋo me Cukot, owaco botgi ni, “Doŋ wunen Jeba ki Jalmuna ma yam wunala pigi kun wuwaco ni, ‘Jeba ki Jalmuna doŋ gitye i ciŋi bo, ma weko wamiyo mugati bot joni ma komgi oloc woko-ni?’ ”" 
Judges8:16 Ci omako ludoŋo ma i gaŋ meno, ka okwanyo okuto me tim ki okuto laŋo, opwodo kwede jo Cukot." 
Judges8:17 Ka dok omuko ot ma ocudo malo ma i Penuel, ka oneko ki jo ma i gaŋ meno woko." 
Judges8:18 Ka dok owaco bot Jeba ki Jalmuna ni, “Jo ma yam wunekogi i Tabor onoŋo gubedo kit dano aŋo?” Gudokke iye ni. “Kit ma it ye kwede-ni, gin bene onoŋo gitye kit meno; ŋat acel acel i kingi onoŋo nen calo awobi pa kabaka.”" 
Judges8:19 Gideon ogamo ni, “Gin omegina kikome, awobe pa maa. Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, kono yam pe wunekogi, kono pe anekowu bene.”" 
Judges8:20 Ka dok owaco bot wode Jeter ma latin kayone ni, “A malo, inekgi woko.” Ento latin awobi pe owoto pala lucwanne, pien lworo omake; onoŋo pud tidi mo." 
Judges8:21 Ci Jeba ki Jalmuna guwaco ni, “In aye ia malo kikomi, ipot i komwa; pien kit ma laco tye kwede, tek kome bene tye kit meno.” Mumiyo Gideon oa malo oneko Jeba ki Jalmuna woko, ci okwanyo mola cal dwe ma yam giruko i nut kinagagi." 
Judges8:22 I ŋe meno jo Icrael guwaco bot Gideon ni, “Doŋ ibed lalocwa, in kikomi, ki wodi ki likwayi bene, pien ityeko larowa ki i ciŋ jo Midian.”" 
Judges8:23 Ento Gideon owaco botgi ni, “An pe abiloyowu, ki woda bene pe biloyowu; Rwot aye biloyowu gire.”" 
Judges8:24 Ka dok Gideon owaco botgi ni, “Wek alegwu gin mo acel. Ber ŋat acel acel omiya mola it me jabu ma oyako. (Onoŋo lumerokgi gitye ki jabu me aruka i it, pien onoŋo gin Io Icmael.)" 
Judges8:25 Gugamo ni, “Wabimiyo ki yomcwiny.” Gupeto ginaruka piny, ci dano acel acel obolo iyemolaiŋabu ma oyako." 
Judges8:26 Pek me jabu me aruka i it ma en olego-ni oromo cekel alip acel ki miya abiro, ma pe giribo iye mola cal dwe, ki mola aruka ma ryeny aryenya, ki boŋŋi aruka ma lamar lamar ma luker me Midian aye giruko, dok ma pe giribo iye mola ma gitweyo i nut kinagagi." 
Judges8:27 Gideon otimo ki epod, ocibo i gaŋŋe Opra, ci jo Icrael ducu guworo ki tim kwele kwele, mumiyo odoko owic me ciko Gideon ki jo me ode." 
Judges8:28 Kit meno jo Icrael guloyo jo Midian, pe doŋ guilo wigi malo matwal. I kare pa Gideon lobo oywe woko pi mwaka pyeraŋwen," 
Judges8:29 Jerubaal, ma en aye Gideon wod pa Yoaci, ocito, obedo i ode." 
Judges8:30 Onoŋo Gideon tye ki awobene pyerabiro ma gin nyodone kikome, pien onoŋo tye ki moo mapol." 
Judges8:31 Obedo ki dakone ma aŋeca bene ma bedo i Cekem. Dako-nu onywalo kwede latin ma laco ci Gideon ocako nyiŋe Abimelek. 
Judges8:32 Gideon wod pa Yoaci oto ma doŋ oti woko maber, ci giyike i lyel pa wonne Yoaci i Opra ma gaŋ pa jo Abiejer." 
Judges8:33 Ka Gideon doŋ oto, cutcut jo Icrael gulokke doki, gucako woro jogi Baal mapatpat ki tim kwete kwele, ci guketo Baal-berit me bedo lubaŋagi," 
Judges8:34 Jo Icrael pe doŋ gupo i kom Rwot Lubaŋagi, ma yam olarogi ki i ciŋ lumerokgi yo tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi;" 
Judges8:35 dok pe gubedo ki cwiny maber bot litino pa Jerubaal, ma en aye Gideon, pi gin ducu maber ma yam otimo pi jo Icrael." 
Judges9:1 I kare meno Abimelek wod pa Jerubaal ocito i Cekem bot jo pa neyone ci otito botgi, ki bot jo ma i doggola pa minne ducu ni," 
Judges9:2 “Wuwac lok wek jo ma i gaŋ me Cekem ducu guwiny ni, ‘Mene maber ki botwu? Myero awobe pa Jerubaal ma giromo pyerabiro ducu gubed lulowu, nyo myero ŋat acel aye olowu?’ Ento wupo ni, an a cogowu, dok a riŋo komwu.”" 
Judges9:3 Jo paneyone guloko lok meno ducu pire, kun gimiyo jo Cekem ducu guwinyo; ci cwinygi olokke ka lubo kor Abimelek, pien guwacci, “En aye ominwa.”" 
Judges9:4 Gimiyo bote lim ryal pyerabiro ma gikwanyo ki i ot pa Baalberit. En aye Abimelek obedo ka culo kwede jo ma kitgi atata ma lubwami ma guribbe i kome. 
Judges9:5 Ocito i gaŋ pa wonne i Opra, oneko omegine awobe pa Jerubaal, jo pyerabiro, ki i kom pata got mo acel. Ento Yocam wode matidine aye odoŋ, pien onoŋo okanne woko." 
Judges9:6 Lacen jo Cekem ducu gubino gucokke kacel, kacel ki jo Bet-millo ducu, ci gucito guketo Abimelek me bedo kabaka i ŋet kworo ma i Cekem ma wir jok ocuŋ i ŋete-ni." 
Judges9:7 Ka gitito lokke bot Yocam, en ocito ocuŋ malo i wi got Gerijim, odaŋŋe matek kun waco botgi ni. “Koŋ wuwiny lokka, wun jo Cekem, wek Lubaŋa bene owiny dogwu." 
Judges9:8 I nino mo acel lwak yadi gucito ka wiro moo ker i kom kabakagi. Guwaco bot yat jeituni ni, ‘In aye ilowa.’" 
Judges9:9 Ento yat jeituni ogamo doggi ni, ‘Abiweko moona mabup-pi ma gimiyo kwede deyo bot lubaŋa ki bot dano, acit alyerre i wi yadi bo?’" 
Judges9:10 Yadi dok guwaco bot oduro ni, ‘In aye ibin ilowa.’" 
Judges9:11 Ento oduro ogamo doggi ni, ‘Abiweko nyiga mamit-ti ki mabeco-ni, acit alyerre i wi yadi bo?’" 
Judges9:12 Ka yadi guwaco bot olok ni, ‘In aye ibin ilowa.’" 
Judges9:13 Ento olok ogamo doggi ni, ‘Abiweko kono vinona ma yomo cwiny lubaŋa ki dano-ni, acit alyerre i wi yadi bo’?" 
Judges9:14 Ka dok yadi ducu guwaco bot abelwinyo ni, ‘In aye ibin ilowa.’" 
Judges9:15 Ci abelwinyo owaco bot yadi ni, ‘Ka wutye ka wira ki moo me bedo kabakawu ki cwiny me ada, ci doŋ wubin, wunon ka-larre i te tipona; ento ka pe kumeno, ci wek mac oa ki bot abelwinyo owan yadi cedar me Lebanon woko.’" 
Judges9:16 “Doŋ apenyowu ba. I kare ma wuketo Abimelek me bedo kabaka, yam wutiyo ki cwiny me ada, kun iwu leŋ? Yam wutimo Jerubaal maber mono, kacel ki jo me ode, ma rwatte ki ticce macon ca?" 
Judges9:17 Pien ada, wora olwenyo piwu kun odyero kome, olarowu ki iciŋ jo Midian," 
Judges9:18 ci tin wutwarre ka lweny i kom ot pa wora, wuneko awobene woko ma giromo pyerabiro ki i kom, pata got acel-lu, dok wuketo Abimelek ma wod pa aŋecane me bedo kabaka ma loyo Cekem pi bedo watwu." 
Judges9:19 Pi meno, ka wutiyo ki Jerubaal ki jo me ode ki cwiny me ada tin kun iwu leŋ, ci wubed ki yomcwiny i kom Abimelek, en bene cwinye obed yom i komwu." 
Judges9:20 Ento ka pe kumeno, wek mac obin oa ki bot jo Cekem ki Bet-millo, owan Abimelek woko.”" 
Judges9:21 Ka Yocam oriŋo gire woko, olaro kome, ci ocito wa i Beer, pi lworo ominne Abimelek." 
Judges9:22 Abimelek oloyo jo Icrael pi mwaka adek. 
Judges9:23 Lacen Lubaŋa ocwalo cwiny marac i kin Abimelek ki jo Cekem, ci jo Cekem gucako tim me robo dog i kom Abimelek." 
Judges9:24 Kit meno tim bwami ma yam gitimo i kom awobe pa Jerubaal ma romo pyerabiro ca opoto i kom Abimelek ma omingi-ni ma yam onekogi, wek alii me remogi obed i kome ki i kom jo Cekem ma yam gumiye tekcwiny me neko omegine." 
Judges9:25 Jo Cekem guketo dano gubuto ka kure i yo i wi godi. Jo-nu gubedo ka yako jo ducu ma guwokgukato ki i ŋetgi i yo kunnu; ci Abimelek owinyo Jokke. 
Judges9:26 I kare meno Gaal wod pa Ebed odako kacel ki lutugi, gubino i Cekem, ci jo Cekem gugene," 
Judges9:27 Gucito i poto, gupwono nyig olokgi, gunyono, gubiyo pige, guyubo nino madit, gudonyo kwede i ot pa lubaŋagi, gucamo, gumato kun giyeto Abimelek." 
Judges9:28 Gaal wod pa Ebed owacci, “Abimelek kono aŋa? Wan jo Cekem wan ana-gi? Lok aŋo kono ma miyo waworo en? Wod pa Jerubaal ki Jebul laticce yam pe guworo jo pa Kamor ma won Cekem? Piŋo myero wabed ka woro en?" 
Judges9:29 Kono jo kany tye i te locca, kono akwanyo Abimelek woko. Kono awaco bot Abimelek ni, ‘Med monnyi ci ikatti woko!’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Ka Jebul ma lalo gaŋ meno owinyo lok pa Gaal wod pa Ebed, ci kiniga omake cut." 
Judges9:31 Ocwalo kwena bot Abimelek i Aruma kun waco bote ni, “Nen, Gaal wod pa Ebed ki lutugi gubino i Cekem, gitye ka rubo gaŋ woko pi lweny i komi." 
Judges9:32 Pi meno wua woko, in kacel ki jo ma tye boti, ibut ikurgi i poto." 
Judges9:33 Odiko ka ceŋ pud tuc atuca-ni, a woko con, ipot i kom gaŋ, Ka en ki jo ma tye bote gubino ka lweny i komi, ci in doŋ itimgi ka komgi owee.”" 
Judges9:34 Abimelek ki jo ma gitye kwede ducu gua i dyewor, gucito gubuto pi lweny i kom Cekem kun noŋo opoko buca monnye i dul aŋwen," 
Judges9:35 Gaal wod pa Ebed okato woko, ocuŋ ka ma gidonyo kwede i dog gaŋ; ci Abimelek ki dano ma gitye bote gua ki ka ma gubuto iye ka kurogi-ni." 
Judges9:36 Ka Gaal oneno jo-nu, owaco bot Jebul ni, “Nen dano ca ma gibino gilor piny ki i wi godi!” Ento Jebul owaco ni, “In ibeneno meri tipo godi macalo dano-ni.”" 
Judges9:37 Gaal dok owacci, “Nen, dano gitye ka lor piny ki i dye lobo malo ca, kun buca acel bino a ki i yo tuŋ te Kworo Waŋ Ayweya ca.”" 
Judges9:38 Jebul dok owaco bote ni, “Dogi dok tye kwene tin, in ma yam iwacci, ‘Abimelek kono aŋa, wek wawore?’ Meno pe gin jo ma in icayogini? Koŋ ikat woko kombeddi, icilweny kwedgi.”" 
Judges9:39 Ci Gaal ocito kun telo wi, mony pa jo Cekem, ocako lweny i kom Abimelek." 
Judges9:40 Abimelek ocako ryeme, ci oriŋo olaro kome. Jo mapol gupoto ma ret omakogi, o wa i dog gaŋ," 
Judges9:41 Abimelek odok obedo Aruma; ci Jebul oryemo Gaal ki lutugi woko, pe dok gubedo i Cekem." 
Judges9:42 Orwone dano dok gucito i potogi, ci gitito pire bot Abimelek." 
Judges9:43 Ocito ki jone, opokogi i buca adek, ci gubuto gukuro yo poto. Oneno dano gibino gia ki i gaŋ, ci oa opoto i komgi, onekogi woko." 
Judges9:44 Abimelek ki dul dano ma gitye bote gucorre anyim, gucuŋ i dog gaŋ ka ma gidonyo ki iye-ni, kun buca aryo mukene-ni gicorre i kom jo ducu ma grtye I poto, ginekogi woko." 
Judges9:45 Abimelek olwenyo i kom gaŋ meno dyeceŋ benebene, omako woko, oneko jo ma gitye iye, omuko odi woko liweŋ, opworo kado i ŋom." 
Judges9:46 Ka jo ducu ma gibedo Migdalcekem guwinyo lokke, ci gudonyo i kicika ma gigolo piny ma i ot pa jokgi El-berit." 
Judges9:47 Ci gitito bot Abimelek ni, jo ducu me Migdal-cekem gucokke kacel." 
Judges9:48 Abimelek ocito i wi got Jalmon, en kacel ki jo ducu ma gitye bote, ci Abimelek omako laton i cine, ocito otoŋo kwede riddo yen, otino i wi gwoke ci owaco bot jo ma gitye kwede ni, “Kit ma wuneno atimo-ni, wun bene wutim oyot kumene.”" 
Judges9:49 Kit meno dano acel acel otono riddo yen, olubo ki kor Abimelek, Guketo i wi kabedo matek ma gigolo piny-nyi, gucwinyo mac i kom jo-nu, mumiyo dano ducu ma gubedo i Migdal-cekem guto woko, ma mito romo ka alip acel, co wa ki mon." 
Judges9:50 Abimelek dok ocito Tebej, oguro woko, omako." 
Judges9:51 Yam tye ot matek ma ocudo malo i dye gaŋ meno, ci lwak dano ma i gaŋ ducu guriŋo gularo iye, co ducu wa ki mon, ci gucego wigi woko iye, gucito malo wa i dan ot ma ocudo malo-ni." 
Judges9:52 Ento Abimelek ocito i ot ma ocudo malo-ni, ocako lweny i kome, ci onyiko cok ki doggolane wek eciwan woko ki mac." 
Judges9:53 Ci dako mo obayo lakidi rego madit, ocelo wi Abimelek, otyero, obaro cogo wiye woko." 
Judges9:54 Oyotoyot olwoŋo awobi ma tiŋo jami lwennye, owaco bote ni, “Wot pala lucwanni, ineka woko, wek dano pe guwacci, ‘Dako mamwa-ni aye oneke.’’’ Awobi-nu ocobo kome pil, oneke woko." 
Judges9:55 Ka jo Icrael guneno ni Abimelek oto woko, ci guket, kun dano acel acel dok i gaŋŋe," 
Judges9:56 Kit meno Lubaŋa oculo waŋ bal ma Abimelek otimo i kom wonne pi neko omegine pyerabiro. 
Judges9:57 Dok Lubaŋa odwoko tim pa jo Cekem maracce ducu i wigi, omiyo lok pa Yocam wod pa Jerubaal ma ocenogi kwede ocobbe i komgi kakare." 
Judges10:1 Ki i ŋe Abimelek dano ma dok olaro jo Icrael en aye Tola wod pa Puwa, wod pa Dodo, ma jo Icakar. En yam bedo i Camir ma i lobo godi me Epraim." 
Judges10:2 Obedo ka ŋolo kop i Icrael pi mwaka pyeraryo wiye adek. Ka oto, giyike i Camir." 
Judges10:3 Dano ma olubo kore en aye Jair ma Lagilead. En obedo laŋolkop i Icrael pi mwaka pyeraryo wiye aryo. 
Judges10:4 En yam tye ki awobene pyeradek ma giwoto ki kanagi pyeradek. Dok gibedo ki gaŋigi pyeradek bene ma pud gilwoŋo ni Kavot-jair o wa onyoo, ma grtye i lobo Gilead." 
Judges10:5 Ka Jair oto, ci giyike i Kamon." 
Judges10:6 Jo Icrael dok gutimo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot kun giworo jogi Baal mapatpat ki jogi ma mon-gu, ma gin lubaŋa pa jo Ciria, jo Cidon, jo Moab, jo Ammon ki jo Piliciti; gubwoto Rwot woko, pe dok giwore." 
Judges10:7 Pienno kiniga omako Rwot i kom jo Icrael, ci omiyogi i ciŋ jo Piliciti ki jo Ammon." 
Judges10:8 Jo-nu guninyo jo Icrael guunogi matek i mwaka meno. Gubedo ka uno jo Icrael ducu ma gibedo loka Jordan i lobo pa jo Amor ma tye i lobo Gilead pi mwaka apar wiye aboro kulu. 
Judges10:9 Jo Ammon guŋolo kulu Jordan ka lweny i kom jo Juda bene, ki jo Benjamin ki jo me doggola pa Epraim, mumiyo piny orem ki jo Icrael woko atika." 
Judges10:10 Lacen jo Icrael gukok bot Rwot kun giwaco ni, “Doŋ wabalo i komi, pien wabwoto Lubaŋawa woko, waworo jogi Baal mapatpat.”" 
Judges10:11 Ci Rwot owaco bot jo Icrael ni, “Yam pe an aye alarowu ki bot jo Ejipt, jo Amor, jo Ammon ki jo Piliciti?" 
Judges10:12 Jo Cidon bene ki jo Amalek ki jo Maon yam giunowu, ento i kare ma yam wukok bota, alarowu ki i ciŋgi." 
Judges10:13 Kadi bed kumeno, pud wubwota woko aye, wuworo lwak lubaŋa mukene. Pienno an pe dok abimedde ki larowu." 
Judges10:14 Wucit wukok bot lwak lubaŋa ma yam wuyero-ni, Wek gin aye gularwu ki i kare ma piny orem kwedwu.”" 
Judges10:15 Ento jo Icrael guwaco bot Rwot ni, “Wapoto i bal: in itim i komwa kit ma imito, ento walegi ilarwa tin.”" 
Judges10:16 Ci gubolo lwak Iubana pa lurok ma i kingi-ni woko, gucako woro Rwot; ci Rwot cwinye oton matek pi atwom ma jo Icrael gubedo kwede." 
Judges10:17 I kare meno jo Ammon guywayo mony, gugony i Gilead, ci jo Icrael gucokke kacel, gugony i Mijpa." 
Judges10:18 Ludito pa jo Gilead gucako lok kekengi ni, “Dano mene ma bicako lweny i kom jo Ammon? En bibedo lalo wi jo ma gibedo i Gilead ducu.”" 
Judges11:1 I kare meno Jeputa ma Lagilead obedo twon oteka lweny. Wonne nyiŋe Gilead, ento minne obedo dako ma lakwele." 
Judges11:2 Dako pa Gilead ma dakone kikome onywalo awobe bene. Ka awobe pa dako-nu gudoŋo, ci guryemo Jeputa woko, kun giwaco bote ni, “In pe ibileyo gin mo ma i ot pa wonwa, pien in i wod pa dako mukene.”" 
Judges11:3 Ci Jeputa oriŋo omegine woko, obedo gire i lobo Tob. Lwak jo mogo ma kitgi obedo atata aye gucokke bote ci en cito ka mony kwedgi." 
Judges11:4 Ka kare doŋ okato, jo Ammon gucako lweny i kom jo Icrael." 
Judges11:5 Ka meno otimme, ci ludoŋo pa jo Gilead gucito i lobo Tob ka omo Jeputa." 
Judges11:6 Guwaco bote ni, “Bin ibed latel wi monywa, wek walweny ki jo Ammon.”" 
Judges11:7 Ento Jeputa owaco botgi ni, “Yam wukwera woko, wuryema woko ki i ot pa wora. Ka dok tin wubino bota piŋo ma doŋ wutye ki can-ni?”" 
Judges11:8 Ci ludoŋo pa jo Gilead guwaco bot Jeputa ni, “Meno aye gin mumiyo tin wadwogo boti, ni, wek icit kwedwa ka lweny i kom jo Ammon, ibed ladit ma loyo jo ducu ma gibedo i Gilead.”" 
Judges11:9 Ci Jeputa owaco botgi ni, “Ka wudwoka paco pi lweny ki jo Ammon, ka ce Rwot omiyogi i ciŋa, ci abibedo ladit ma loyo wiwu.”" 
Judges11:10 Ludoŋo me Gilead guwaco bot Jeputa ni, “Rwot aye bibedo lacaden i kinwa; dok wabitiyo kit ma iwaco-ni i ada.”" 
Judges11:11 Kit meno Jeputa odok cen ki ludoŋo me Gilead, ci lwak gukete me bedo lalo wigi ki latel wi monygi. Jeputa onwoyo lok ma yam owaco ducu i nyim Rwot ki i Mijpa." 
Judges11:12 Ci Jeputa ocwalo lukwena bot kabaka pa jo Ammon kun waco ni, “An abalo gin aŋo boti, mumiyo ibino ka lweny ki lobona-ni?”" 
Judges11:13 Kabaka pa jo Ammon ogamo dog lukwena pa Jeputa ni, “Pien i kare ma jo Icrael gua ki i Ejipt gumayo lobona woko, cakke wa i kulu Amon o kwede wa i kulu Jabok ki i Jordan; ber tin wudwok lobona bota mot ki kuc.”" 
Judges11:14 Jeputa dok ocwalo lukwena bot kabaka pa jo Ammon," 
Judges11:15 kun waco bote ni, “Jeputa owaco kit man ni, Jo Icrael yam pe gumayo lobo pa jo Moab kadi lobo pa jo Ammon," 
Judges11:16 ento i kare ma gua ki i Ejipt, jo Icrael guwok gubaro gigi i dye tim o wa i Nam Makwar, ka gucito i Kadec." 
Judges11:17 Lacen jo Icrael gucwalo lukwena bot kabaka me Edom ma guwaco ni, ‘Ber iwek wawok wakat ki i loboni.’ Ento kabaka me Edom okwero winyo. Dok gucwalo kwena bot kabaka me Moab bene, en pe oye. Kit meno omiyo jo Icrael gubedo gigi i Kadec." 
Judges11:18 Ka dok guwoto gubaro dye tim, gurabo lobo Edom ki lobo Moab araba, ka guo kwede i ŋet lobo Moab yo tuŋ wokceŋ, ci gugony loka kulu Amon tuŋcel, Ento pe gudonyo i lobo Moab, pien Amon aye waŋ lobo pa jo Moab." 
Judges11:19 Jo Icrael dok gucwalo kwena bot Cikon, kabaka pa jo Amor, ma gaŋ kalle Kecbon. Jo Icrael guwaco bote ni, ‘Ber iwek wawok wakat ki i loboni, wacit i lobowa.’" 
Judges11:20 Ento Cikon iye ogun i kom jo Icrael, omiyo pe oye ni guwok gukat ki i loboner-omiyo Cikon ocoko jone ducu, ogurogi kacel, gugony i Jakaj, ci olwenyo i kom jo Icrael," 
Judges11:21 Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael omiyo Cikon ki lwakke ducu i cin jo Icrael, ci guloyogi. Kit meno jo Icrael gucamo lobo pa jo Amor ducu ma yam gibedo i lobo-ni, odoko megi." 
Judges11:22 Gucamo lobo pa jo Amor ducu cakke ki i kulu Amon o kwede wa i Jabok, ki dok cakke ki i tim o wa i Jordan." 
Judges11:23 Kit meno Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael oryemo jo Amor woko ki i lobogi ki i nyim jone Icrael, ci in dok imito ile kaka-gi bo?" 
Judges11:24 Wun myero wucam lobo ma lubaŋawu Kemoc omiyowu me acama, ento wan wabicamo lobo ducu ma Rwot Lubaŋawa otyeko ryemo jo iye ki i nyimwa." 
Judges11:25 In aye iber makato Balak wod pa Jipor, kabaka me Moab? En yam otubbe i kom jo Icrael? Nyo en yam ocako lweny i komgi?" 
Judges11:26 I kare ma jo Icrael gubedo i Kecbon ki i gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, ki i Aroer ki i gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, ki i gaŋi ducu ma i dog kulu Amon pi mwaka miya adek kulu, piŋo yam pe imayogi woko i kare ca?" 
Judges11:27 Kit meno an gira pe atimo bal mo i komi; in giri aye itima rac pi cako lweny i koma. Rwot ma Laŋolkop aye ber oŋol kop i kin jo Icrael ki jo Ammon tin.” 
Judges11:28 Ento kabaka pa jo Ammon pe oketo cwinye i kom kwena ma Jeputa ocwalo bote. 
Judges11:29 Ci Cwiny pa Rwot obino i kom Jeputa, omiyo obaro dye Gilead ki Manace, okato kwede wa i Mijpa ma i lobo Gilead. Ki kunnu en dok okato kwede i kom jo Ammon," 
Judges11:30 Jeputa onoŋo okwoŋo kwoŋ bot Rwot kun waco ni, “Ka ibimiyo jo Ammon i ciŋa," 
Judges11:31 ci ŋat ma okatti woko ki i doggola oda ma bino ka rwatte kweda ma doŋ adwogo ma aloyo jo Ammon, en aye bibedo pa Rwot ci abimiye me bedo gitum awaŋa.”" 
Judges11:32 Kit meno Jeputa oŋolo loka kulu i kom jo Ammon ka lweny kwedgi, ci Rwot omiyogi i ciŋe." 
Judges11:33 Onekogi cakke ki i Aroer o kwede wa i lobo ma cok ki Minit, gaŋi pyeraryo madito, ki o wa i Abel-keramim, kun ginekogi matek twatwal. Kit meno Lubaŋa omiyo jo Icrael guloyo jo Ammon." 
Judges11:34 Ka Jeputa odwogo cen i pacone i Mijpa, nen, nyare okato woko ka rwatte kwede ki ajaa ki myel. Nyare en acel keken, pe tye ki wode nyo nyare mo mukene." 
Judges11:35 Ka oneno nyare, oyeco boŋone woko pi cwercwiny kun wacci, “Maa do, nyara! Ituro tekka woko do, iketa i cwar can madwoŋ kuman, pien onoŋo doŋ atiŋo doga bot Rwot ma doŋ pe atwero loko kwonna.”" 
Judges11:36 Ci nyare owaco bote ni, “Wora, ka onoŋo itiŋo dogi bot Rwot ba, ci doŋ itima kit ma itiŋo ki dogi-ni, pien Rwot doŋ oculo kwor i kom jo Ammon ma lumerokki-ni.”" 
Judges11:37 Dok oloko ki wonne, owacci, “Koŋ itima man; weka abedi pi dwe aryo, wek koŋ acit awirre i kor godi, wek acikok akum pi tidina, an kacel ki luwota, pien abito ma peya ginyoma.”" 
Judges11:38 Ogamo ni, “Citi”, ocwalo nyare pi dwe aryo. Nyako ocito, en ki luwote, ci gukok i wi godi kun gikumo pi tidine." 
Judges11:39 Ka dwe aryo-nu otum, odwogo cen bot wonne, ci otime kit ma yam okwoŋo-ni. Nyare yam pe obedo ki meye mo, Ci lok-ki odoko kit ki bot jo Icrael." 
Judges11:40 Anyira Icrael yam gicito ka kumo pi nya pa Jeputa ma Lagilead nino aŋwen i mwaka acel acel. 
Judges12:1 Jo Epraim guywayo mony, guŋolo loka, guo i Japon, guwaco bot Jeputa ni, “Piŋo icito ka lweny i kom jo Ammon, ci pe ilwoŋowa wacito kwedi? Wabiwaŋo wii woko i odi.”" 
Judges12:2 Jeputa ogamo doggi ni, “An ki lwakka yam wabedo ki mone madit ki jo Ammon, ento ka alwonowu, wun pe wulara ki i ciŋgi," 
Judges12:3 Ka aneno ni pe wutwero lara, ci adyero koma aŋolo loka ca i kom jo Ammon, ci Rwot omiyogi i ciŋa, Piŋo tin dok wubino bota ka lweny i koma?”" 
Judges12:4 Ci Jeputa ocoko jo Gilead ducu, olwenyo ki jo Epraim, ci jo Gilead guloyo jo Epraim. Onoŋo jo Epraim guwacci, “Wun jo Gilead ma wubedo i kin jo Epraim ki Manace, wun giwu jo Epraim aye ma yam wuriŋo wularo komwu.”" 
Judges12:5 Mumiyo jo Gilead gumako waŋ wat ducu me kulu Jordan pi geŋo jo Epraim. Ka dano mo i kin jo Epraim ma oriŋo olaro kome owacci, “Wek aŋol akat loka ca,” ci jo Gilead giwaco bote ni, “In i jo Epraim?” Ka ogamo ni, “Pe,”" 
Judges12:6 ci giwaco bote ni, “Koŋ iwac Cibolet,” ci en wacci, “Sibolet,” pien pe twero lwonone maber matir; ci gimake, gineke woko i waŋ wat kunnu. Jo Epraim guto ma romo alip pyeraŋwen wiye aryo i nino meno." 
Judges12:7 Jeputa obedo laŋolkop i Icrael pi mwaka abicel, Ka Jeputa ma Lagilead oto, ci giyike i gaŋŋe ma i Gilead." 
Judges12:8 Dano ma olube me bedo laŋolkop i Icrael obedo Ibijan, dano me Beterekem." 
Judges12:9 En yam tye ki awobene pyeradek, ki anyira pyeradek. Omiyo anyirane ginyomogi i kaka mukene, dok okelo anyira ma i kaka mukene pyeradek pi awo bene. Obedo ka ŋolo kop i Icrael pi mwaka abiro." 
Judges12:10 Ka Ibijan oto, ci giyike i Beterekem." 
Judges12:11 Ci Elon Lajabulon dok olubo kore, obedo laŋolkop i Icrael. Obedo ka ŋolo kop i Icrael pi mwaka apar." 
Judges12:12 Ka Elon Lajabulon oto, ci giyike i Aijalon i lobo pa jo Jabulon." 
Judges12:13 Ki I ŋeye dok Abudon wod pa Ilel ma Lapiraton aye obedo laŋolkop i Icrael. 
Judges12:14 Yam tye ki awobene pyeraŋwen ki likwaye pyeradek ma giwoto ki kanagi pyerabiro. Obedo ka ŋolo kop i Icrael pi mwaka aboro. 
Judges12:15 Ka dok Abudon wod pa Ilel ma Lapiraton oto, ci giyike i Piraton ma i lobo Epraim, i lobo godi pa jo Amalek." 
Judges13:1 Jo Icrael dok gutimo gin ma nen marac i Waŋ Rwot, ci Rwot omiyogi i ciŋ jo Piliciti pi mwaka pyeraŋwen." 
Judges13:2 Yam tye laco mo i Jora ma i kaka pa jo Dan, nyiŋe Maŋoa. Dakone onoŋo lalur, pe tye ki latin mo." 
Judges13:3 Lamalaika pa Rwot onen bot dako, ci owaco bote ni, “Nen, in lalur ma pe it ye ki latinni mo. Ento ibiyac, ibinywalo latin laco." 
Judges13:4 Pi meno myero igwokke, pe imat koŋo vino nyo gin ma mero dano, dok pe icam gin mo ma keni;" 
Judges13:5 pien, nen, ibiyac, ci ibinywalo latin ma laco. Pe lyedi bigudo wiye, pien bibedo ajula pa Lubaŋa cakke ki i kare ma ginywale, dok en bicako laro jo Icrael ki i ciŋ jo Piliciti.”" 
Judges13:6 Dako ocito otito bot cware ni, “Dano pa Lubaŋa obino bota kun waŋe nen calo waŋ lamalaika pa Lubaŋa; neno lik twatwal. Pe apenye ka ma oa iye, en pe otitta nyiŋe." 
Judges13:7 Ento owaco bota ni, ‘Nen, ibiyac inywalo latin laco; pi meno pe imat koŋo vino nyo gin ma mero dano, pien latin-nu bibedo ajula pa Lubaŋa cakke ki i kare ma ginywale o kwede wa i nino me tone.’ ”" 
Judges13:8 Maŋoa olego Rwot kun waco ni, “Ai Rwot, alegi ba, wek dano pa Lubaŋa ma ne ne icwalo-ni odwog botwa, wek opwonywa ki gin ma myero wati i kom awobi ma gibinywalo-ni.”" 
Judges13:9 Lubaŋa owinyo koko pa Maŋoa, ci lamalaika pa Lubaŋa obino bot dako doki ma en obedo i poto; ento cware Maŋoa onoŋo pe tye kacel kwede." 
Judges13:10 Dako oriŋo oyotoyot, otito bot cware ni, “Dano ma nene onen bota i kare ca dok onen bota kombeddi.”" 
Judges13:11 Maŋoa oa ocito kun lubo kor dakone. Ka obino bot dano-nu, ci owacce ni, “In aye i dano ma yam oloko ki dakoni’?” Ogamo ni, “An.”" 
Judges13:12 Ci Maŋoa owacci, “Ka lokki doŋ ocobbe kakare, kit kwo pa awobi-ni bibedo niŋniŋ, dok en bitiyo kit gin aŋo?’ ”" 
Judges13:13 Lamalaika pa Rwot owaco bot Maŋoa ni, “Gin ducu ma doŋ awaco bot dako en ogwoki." 
Judges13:14 Pe ocam gin mo ma oa i kom olok, pe omat koŋo vino nyo gin ma mero dano, pe ocam gin mo ma keni; ento olub gin ducu ma yam acike iye.”" 
Judges13:15 Maŋoa owaco bot lamalaika pa Rwot ni, “Wek koŋ wagali man ok ba, pi yubo latin dyel mo piri.”" 
Judges13:16 Ento lamalaika pa Rwot owaco bot Maŋoa ni, “Kadi bed igala, pe abicamo camwu. Ento ka ibiyubo gitum awaŋa, ci doŋ itum bot Rwot.” Onoŋo Maŋoa pe ŋeyo ni en lamalaika pa Rwot." 
Judges13:17 Ci Maŋoa openyo Lamalaika pa Rwot ni, “Nyiŋi aŋa, wek ka lokki ocobbe kakare wamiyi deyo?’ ”" 
Judges13:18 Lamalaika pa Rwot owacce ni, “Piŋo ipenyo nyiŋa, kun nyiŋa obedo me aura twatwal?”" 
Judges13:19 Manoa otero latin dyel kacel ki gityer me moko kwon, ci otyero i kom pata got bot Rwot ma ticce me aura-ni." 
Judges13:20 Ka leb mac olyel ocito malo tuŋ polo ki i wi keno tyer, ci lamalaika pa Rwot oito malo i leb mac me keno tyer-ri kun Manoa ki dakone gineno; ci gupoto piny aryeba ic." 
Judges13:21 Lamalaika pa Rwot pe dok onen bot Manoa ki dakone tyen mukene, mumi yo Manoa oniaŋ ni en lamalaika pa Rwot." 
Judges13:22 Ci Manoa owaco bot dakone ni, “Wan wabito ada, pien waneno Lubaŋa.”" 
Judges13:23 Ento dakone ogamo doge ni, “Ka onoŋo Rwot oyubbe me nekowa, kono pe ogamo gitum awaŋa ki gityer me moko kwoŋ ki i ciŋwa, dok kono pe onyuto botwa lok magi ducu, kadi tuco lok macalo magi.”" 
Judges13:24 Ka dako onywalo wode, ci ocako nyiŋe Samson. Ci awobi-nu odoŋo kun Rwot miye gum." 
Judges13:25 Cwiny pa Rwot ocako tic i kome i Gony pa Dan ma i kin Jora ki Ecitaol.’ 
Judges14:1 Samson ocito Timna, ci oneno nyako mo kunnu ma anyira jo Piliciti." 
Judges14:2 Ka odwogo cen, ci otito bot wonne ki minne ni, “Aneno nyako mo i kin anyirajo Piliciti i Timna; ber wunyomma obed dakona.”" 
Judges14:3 Ento wonne ki minne guwaco bote ni, “Nyako mo pe i kin lwak anyira ma tuwu ce, nyo i kin rokwa ducu, en aye omiyo icito ka kelo dako ki i kin jo Piliciti ma pe gulirre-ni?” Ento Samson ogamo dog wonne ni, “Ber wunyomma nya-nu, pien mwonya twatwal.”" 
Judges14:4 Wonne ki minne onoŋo pe guŋeyo ni lokke oa bot Rwot; pien onoŋo obeyenyo tyen alii mo i kom jo Piliciti. I kare meno jo Piliciti giloyo jo Icrael. 
Judges14:5 Samson ocito Timna ki wonne ki minne. Ka oo i potti olok ma i Timna, ci latin labwor omor i kome." 
Judges14:6 Cwiny Rwot obino opoto i kome ki tek, ci oyeco kom labwor, obaro iye woko macalo yeco latin dyel, kun pe tye ki gin mo i ciŋe. Ento pe otito gin ma en otimo-ni bot wonne nyo minne." 
Judges14:7 Ka ocito kunnu, oloko ki nyako ca, ci oyomo cwinye matek." 
Judges14:8 Ka kare okato manok, odok kunnu ka omo dakone, ci oŋak ocito ka neno kom labwor ma oneko-ni, Ci nen, lwak kic odonyo i kom labwor, moo kic bene tye." 
Judges14:9 Ototo ki ciŋe, ka opyelo i dye ciŋe kun camo woto kwede. Ka oo kwede bot wonne ki minne, omiyogi mogo, gin bene gucamo. Ento pe otito botgi ni etoto ki i kom labwor ma oneko-ni." 
Judges14:10 Lacen wonne ocito bot dako-nu, ci Samson otedo karama kunnu, pien latin awobi yam timo kit ennu." 
Judges14:11 Ka jo kunnu gunene, gukelo bote jo pyeradek wek gubed kwede." 
Judges14:12 Samson owaco botgi ni, “Wek koŋ awacciwu koc lit: ka wubigonyo tere i kin nino abiro-ni me karama, ma wunoŋo tyen lokke, ci an abiminiwu boŋŋi camanini pyeradek, ki boŋŋi mabeco pyeradek bene e aruka i nino madito." 
Judges14:13 Ento ka Wo tyen lokke oloyowu, ci wun aye wubimina boŋŋi camanini pyeradek, ki boŋŋi mabeco pyeradek bene me aruka i nino madito.” Guwacce ni, “Wac koc litti, wek koŋ wawiny mono.”" 
Judges14:14 Owaco botgi ni, “Lacam dano oa iye cam, latekkom oa iye gin ma lim.” Gutyeko nino adek ma pe gitwero gonyo tyen koc lit meno." 
Judges14:15 I nino me aŋwenne guwaco bot dako pa Samson ni, “Bit cwari, wek otit botwa tyen koc litte. Ka pe, ci wawaŋi woko ki mac wa ki jo me ot pa woru bene. Wun wulwoŋowa; kany pi yako jamiwa woko bo?”" 
Judges14:16 CI dako pa Samson ocako kok i nyime kun waco bote ni, “In idaga giri, pe imara. Iwaco koc lit bot lutuwa kun pe ititta te lokke.” Ogamo doge ni, “Nen, yam pe atito bot wora wa maa bene, ci in aye doŋ abititti bo?”" 
Judges14:17 Dako obedo ka kok bote pi nino abiro, kit ma karama obedo kwede; ci i kom nino me abirone otito bot dakone, pien onoŋo doŋ odiye matek. Dako ocito otito koc lit bot lutugi," 
Judges14:18 mumiyo jo me gaŋ meno guwacce tyen koc litte ma peya cen opoto i kom nino me abirone, kun giwacci, “Gin aŋo ma lim makato moo kic? Gin aŋo ma tek makato labwor?” En owaco botgi ni, “Kono yam pe wubedo ka pur ki royana, kono pe wugonyo tyen koc litta.”" 
Judges14:19 Ci Cwiny pa Rwot obino opoto i kome ki tek. Ocito i Acikelon, oneko dano pyeradek ma i gaŋ meno, oyako jamigi, omiyo boŋŋigi mabeco me aruka i nino madito bot jo ma gugonyo koc lit-ti, ci odok i paco pa wonne ki akemo madwoŋ." 
Judges14:20 Ci gimiyo dako pa Samson bot lawote ma onoŋo obedo ka ŋete i kare me nyom," 
Judges15:1 Ka kare okato manok, i kare ma gikayo iye naŋo, Samson ocito ka limo dakone ki latin dyel mo, ci owacci, “Abidonyo bot dakona i kicikane.” Ento won dako pe oye en odonyo." 
Judges15:2 Owacci, “Onoŋo atamo mera ada ni ityeko kwere woko, mumiyo doŋ amiye woko bot lawoti. Laminne matidi dok ber kato en. Ber ibed kwede ma kakare.”" 
Judges15:3 Ento Samson owaco botgi ni, “Tin pe abibedo labal ka atimo gin marac i kom jo Piliciti.”" 
Judges15:4 Samson ocito omako lwak too miya adek, ci oriyo raa. Oloko too omiyo yibgi okemme ki wadi, otweyo raa i kin yibgi aryo aryo." 
Judges15:5 Ka oewinyo mac i kom raa, ci oweko too gucito kwede i poto naŋo pa Lupiliciti ma peya gikayo-ni. Mac owaŋo wic larita ma gigurogi woko, ki naŋo ma peya gikayo, wa ki potti jeituni bene," 
Judges15:6 Ka Lupiliciti gupenyo ni, “Man aŋa ma otimo?” ci giwacci, “Samson ma cwar dako pa Latimna aye otimo, pien gikwanyo dakone, gimiyo bot lawote.” Mumiyo jo Piliciti gubino, guwaŋo anyaka ki wonne woko ki mac." 
Judges15:7 Ci Samson owaco botgi ni, “Ka ce wutimo kit meno, ci akwoŋo akwoŋa botwu ni abiculo kwor i komwu, ka doŋ abiweko lobo bedo.”" 
Judges15:8 Ocako datogi ki ton, onekogi matek; lacen ocito obedo i boro got ma i Etam." 
Judges15:9 Jo Piliciti gubino, gugony i Juda, ci gumonyo Leki." 
Judges15:10 Jo Juda guwacci, “Piŋo wun wubino ka monyowa?” Ci gugamo ni, “Wabino ka tweyo Samson, wek watim en kit ma en otimowa-ni.”" 
Judges15:11 Jo Juda alip adek gucito i boro got ma i Etam, guwaco ni, “In pe iŋeyo ni jo Piliciti aye gitye ka loyowa? Ci itimowa kuman mono piŋo?” Ogamo doggi ni, “Kit ma gutimo i koma-ni, an bene atimogi kumene.”" 
Judges15:12 Guwacce ni, “Wan wabino ka tweyi, wek wamiyi i ciŋ jo Piliciti.” Samson owaco botgi ni, “Koŋ wukwoŋna kwoŋ ni pe wun aye wubineka wun kikomwu.”" 
Judges15:13 Gugamo ni, “Pe; wan wabitweyi atweya keken, ci wabimiyi i ciŋgi.” Ci gutweye ki tol aryo manyen, gukele woko ki i boro got," 
Judges15:14 Ka oo i Leki, Lupiliciti gubino ka romo kwede kun gidaŋŋe, ci Cwiny pa Rwot obino opoto i kome ki tek, tol ma gitweyo ki ciŋe odoko calo tol obira ma mac owaŋo, opoto ome woko ki i ciŋe," 
Judges15:15 Ocop i kom cogo cwak kana manyen, owoto ciŋe, okwanyo, ci oneko kwede dano alip kulu." 
Judges15:16 Ci Samson owaco ni, “Pi cogo cwak kana odurre kom wadi lipimpim; ki cogo cwak kana aneko kwede co alip.”" 
Judges15:17 Ka otyeko loko lokke, obolo cogo cwak kana ma i ciŋe-ni piny, ci gicako nyiŋ kabedo-nu ni, Ramat-leki." 
Judges15:18 Lacen orwo pii oneke matek, ci okok bot Rwot kun waco ni, “ityeko larowa matek kit man ki ciŋa, Rwot ci dok ata kombeddi ki orwo pii? Doŋ apot i ciŋ jo ma pe gilirogi bo?”" 
Judges15:19 Ci Lubaŋa obaro waŋ got matwolo ma yam tye i Leki, pii onyette ki iye. Ka omato, ci cwinye odwogo, olimo tek doki. Pienno nyiŋ kabedo-nu gilwoŋo ni, En-akore; pud tye i Leki waonyoo." 
Judges15:20 Samson obedo laŋolkop i Icrael i kare pa jo Piliciti pi mwaka pyeraryo. 
Judges16:1 I nino mo Samson ocito Gaja, ci oneno lakwele mo, ocito odonyo bote." 
Judges16:2 Gitito bot jo Gaja ni, “Samson obino kany,” ci gurumo kabedo-nu woko, gubuto gukure i dog cel me gaŋ meno dyewor benebene. Guliŋ woko litik i dyewor meno, kun gikwilo lok ni, “Weku wakure nio wa kwar piny, ka doŋ wabineke.”" 
Judges16:3 Ento Samson obuto kunnu o wa i cwiny dyewor, ci ba malo i cwiny dyewor, omako dog cel me gaŋ-ŋu, ki pagi wirre aryo ducu, oputogi woko ki pal gwoke, ki rii me cegone ki jamine ducu, otiŋogi woko, oterogi wa i wi got ma i nyim Kebron." 
Judges16:4 Lacen dok omaro dako mo ma i nota me Corek, ma nyiŋe Delila." 
Judges16:5 Ci rwodi pa jo Piliciti gubino bot dako, guwaco bote ni, “Bit en mot, wek inoŋ ka ma tek kome madwoŋ-ŋi ocuŊ iye, ka dok wabiloye ki yo aŋo, wek watweye, wabwoye; ci wan ki acel acel wabimini lim ryal alip acel ki miya acel.”" 
Judges16:6 Ci Delila ocako waco bot Samson ni, “Opwoyo ititta ka ma tek komi madwoŋ-ŋi ocuŋ iye do, ki kit ma myero gitweyi kwede, wek gibwoyi.”" 
Judges16:7 Samson owaco bote ni, “Ka ce gitweya ki tol atum abiro, manyenne, ma pe otwo, ci abidoko goro macalo dano mukene ducu.”" 
Judges16:8 Rwodi pa Lupiliciti gukelo tol atum manyen abiro ma peya otwone, ci Delila otweyo ki Samson woko." 
Judges16:9 Onoŋo dako-nu tye ki jo mukanne i kicika ma i tyelo me kiye. Owaco bot Samson ni, “Samson, Lupiliciti gubino i komi!” Ento en ocodo tol atum woko ducu, macalo tol tworo ma ogudo mac. Kit meno ka ma tek kome ocuŋ iye pe omedo ki nene," 
Judges16:10 Ci Delila owaco bot Samson ni, “Nen ka ibwola ba, ilokka giri lok goba. Opwoyo ititta kit ma myero gitweyi kwede do.”" 
Judges16:11 Ci dok owaco bote ni, “Ka ce gitweya ki tol ma peya gitiyo kwedgi, ci abidoko goro macalo dano mukene ducu.”" 
Judges16:12 Delila okwanyo tol manyen, otweye kwede, ci owacce ni “Samson, Lupiliciti gubino i komi!” Koŋ onoŋo dano gukanne i kicika ma i tyelo ka kiye, Ento Samson ocodo tol woko ki i ciŋe macalo uci me kwoyo boŋo," 
Judges16:13 Ka Delila dok owaco bot Samson ni “Pud ibwola aye o wa onyoo, kun ilokka goba. Titta kit ma myero gitweyi kwede mono.” Ci owacceni, “Ka ce imako dog yer wiya abiro, icweyo irwako i boŋo ma it ye ka cweyoni, igoyo ki yat ma lacwe-boŋo goyo ki uci ma orwako wek omok matek, ci abidoko goro macalo dano mukene ducu.”" 
Judges16:14 Kit meno ka doŋ onino, Delila omako dog yer wiye abiro, ocweyo kun orwako i boŋo ma etye ka cweyo, ogoyo ki yat wek omok iye matek. Ci owaco ni, “Samson, Lupiliciti gubino i komi!” Ento en oco ki i waŋ nino owoto yat, oputo kwede yat cweyo boŋo, ki boŋo ma i kome ma gitye ka cweyone." 
Judges16:15 Lacen dako owaco bote ni, “Itwero waco niŋniŋ ni imara kun noŋo pe igena ki cwinyi ducu? Man doŋ ibwola tyen me adekke, kun pe ititta ka ma tek komi madwoŋ-ŋi ocuŋ iye.”" 
Judges16:16 Ka dako obedo ka dide matek ki lokke nino ki nino, kun lokke ki tek, omiyo cwinye obelle me to woko." 
Judges16:17 Ci otito bot dakone gin ducu ma tye i cwinye, kun wacce ni, “Lyedi peya ogudo wiya, pien abedo ajula pa Rwot cakke ki i kare ma ginywala iye. Ka ce gilyelo yer wiya, ci tek koma biweka woko, abidoko goro, abedo macalo dano mukene ducu.”" 
Judges16:18 Ka Delila oneno ni doŋ otyeko titte lok ma i cwinye ducu, ocwalo kwena olwoŋo rwodi pa jo Piliciti kun wacci, “Wubin koŋ doŋ k icel-li, pien doŋ otitta lok ma i cwinye ducu.” Rwodi pa jo Piliciti gubino kun gikelo ki lim bene i ciŋgi." 
Judges16:19 Delila omiyo Samson onino i coŋe, ci gilwoŋo laco mo omiye olyelo dog yer wiye abiro-ni woko, Ci dako ocako time malitlit, ci tek kome oa woko ki i kome." 
Judges16:20 Ka dako owaco ni, “Samson, Lupiliciti gubino i komi!” ci oco woko ki i waŋ nino kun tamo ni, “Abikato woko i kit macon ca, ateŋogi woko ki i koma.” Onoŋo pe ŋeyo ni Rwot otyek o a woko ki i kome," 
Judges16:21 Lupiliciti gumake, gukolo waŋe woko, gutere Gaja. Gutweye ki atego mola, obedo ka rego bel i mabuc." 
Judges16:22 Ento yer wiye ocako lot doki i ŋe lyelone. 
Judges16:23 I kare mo rwodi pa Lupiliciti gucokke ka tyero gitum madwoŋ bot Dagon ma lubaŋagi ma cwinygi yom, pien gubedo ka waco ni, “Lubaŋawa doŋ omiyo lamerokwa Samson i ciŋwa.”" 
Judges16:24 Ka lwak gunene, gupako lubaŋagi-ni kun giwacci, “Lubaŋawa doŋ omiyo lamerokwa i cinwa ma lanek pinywa, ma otyeko lwak jowa mapol.”" 
Judges16:25 Ka cwinygi doŋ yom, ci guwacci, “Gilwon Samson wek otuk tuko mo ogal ki wanwa.” Kit meno gilwoŋo Samson ki i ot mabuc, ci obedo ka tuko i nyimgi, Ci giweko en ocuŋ i kin wir ot aryo." 
Judges16:26 Samson owaco bot awobi ma peye ni, “Wek koŋ aboŋ kom wir ma ot ocuŋ iye-ni, wek ajeŋŋe i komgi.”" 
Judges16:27 Onoŋo ot opoŋ ki co ki mon, ki rwodi ducu pa Lu piliciti onoŋo gitye kunnu. Malo i wi ot bene onoŋo tye co ki mon alip adek ma gubedo ka neno ka Samson tye ka tuko." 
Judges16:28 Ka doŋ Samson okok bot Rwot kun waco ni. “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, po pira, alegi ba do, ci imiya tekkom doki tyen man acel-li. Ai Lubaŋa alegi iwek acul kwor i kom jo Piliciti pi waŋa aryo-ni lawaŋacel.”" 
Judges16:29 Ci Samson omako wil ot aryo ma i dyere ma ot ocuŋ i komgi-ni, otyelle ki tekke ducu, ojenne i komgi, kun ciŋe malacuc omako wir acel, ki ciŋe malacam omako mukene." 
Judges16:30 Ka doŋ Samson owacci, “Wek doŋ ato kacel ki jo Piliciti.” Ci okulle ki tekke ducu, omiyo ot opoto i kom rwodi ki i kom lwak ma gitye iye-ni. Kit meno, jo ma onekogi i kare me tone obedo pol makato jo ma yam onekogi ma pud en kwo." 
Judges16:31 Omegine ki kakagi ducu gubino, gutiŋo kome, gukelo lyel ci guyiko i kin Jora ki Ectaol, i lyel pa wonne Manoa. Obedo laŋolkop i Icrael pi mwaka pyeraryo," 
Judges17:1 Yam tye dano mo i lobo godi me Epraim ma nyiŋe Mika. 
Judges17:2 Owaco bot minne ni, “Lim ryal alip apar wiye acel ma yam gikwalo ki boti-ni, ma yam iloko iceno iye dano-ni, kun an bene awinyo, nen, ryal-lu tye bota, an aye yam akwanyo.” Minne ogamo ni. “Rwot omiyi gum, latinna.”" 
Judges17:3 Odwoko lim ryal alip apar wiye acel bot minne, ci minne owaco ni, “An kikoma adyero ryal man bot Rwot pi woda me timo cal apaya ki cal ryal ma giliyo aliya; ci kombeddi doŋ omiyo adwoko boti.”" 
Judges17:4 Mika dok odwoko lim bot minne, ci minne okwanyo lim ryal miya aryo, omiyo bot latet ryal, en otiyo ki cal apaya ma gimwono kome ki ryal, ki cal ryal ma giliyo aliya, ci giketo i ot pa Mika." 
Judges17:5 Laco man, Mika, onoŋo tye ki ot woro Lubaŋa i gaŋŋe, ci otiyo epod ki cal lubaŋa, oketo wode acel me bedo ajwakane." 
Judges17:6 I kare meno onoŋo kabaka pe i Icrael; dano acel acel tiyo gin ma en tamo ni tye atir. 
Judges17:7 I kare meno onoŋo tye latin laco mo ma bedo i Beterekem, i lobo Juda. En onoŋo Lalevi ci bedo kunnu macalo welo." 
Judges17:8 En odak oa woko ki i Beterekem ma i Juda wek ecibed i kabedo mo ma ebinoŋo, Ka owoto, ci oo i lobo godi me Epraim, i gaŋ pa Mika." 
Judges17:9 Mika openye ni, “In ia ki kwene?” Ogamo ni” “An Lalevi me Beterekem ma i Juda, abibedo i kabedo mo ma abinoŋone.”" 
Judges17:10 Ci Mika owaco bote ni, “Bed doŋ bota, wek ibed wora ki ajwakana, ci abimini litn ryal apar mwaka ki mwaka, ki boŋŋi me aruka, dok abigwoki.”" 
Judges17:11 Lalevi oye bedo bote; ci latin laco meno ocako bedo kwede macalo ŋat acel i kom litinone. 
Judges17:12 Mika oketo Lalevi me bedo ajwakane, ci obedo i gaŋ pa Mika." 
Judges17:13 I kare-nu Mika owacci, “Kombeddi doŋ aŋeyo ni Rwot bibedo kweda maber, pien doŋ atye ki Lalevi me bedo ajwakana.”" 
Judges18:1 I kare meno onoŋo kabaka mo pe i Icrael. Dok i kare meno jo ma i kaka pa Dan gubedo ka yenyo kabedo me bedo ginaleyagi, wek gubed iye, pien onoŋo peya gunoŋo dul lobo mo me aleya i kin kaka me Icrael." 
Judges18:2 Kit meno jo Dan gucwalo dano abic makwiri ki i kin doggolagi ducu, gua ki i Jora ki Ectaol pi roto lobo ki tatone maber, kun giwaco botgi ni, “Wuciti ka tato lobo maber.” Ci gubino i lobo godi me Epraim, i gaŋ pa Mika, gubuto kunnu." 
Judges18:3 Ka onoŋo gitye i gaŋ pa Mika, ci guŋeyo dwan Lalevi matidi-ni, guŋak gucito bote, gupenye ni, “Aŋa mono ma okeli wa kany? Itimo aŋo i kabedo-ni? Ibedo kany piŋo mono?”" 
Judges18:4 Owaco botgi ni, “Mika aye obedo ka tima kuman, kuman; dok en aye cula gire, ci adoko ajwakane.”" 
Judges18:5 Ci gulege ni, “Koŋ ipeny dog Lubaŋa, wek wane ka wotwa ma wacito iye-ni bibedo maber.”" 
Judges18:6 Ajwaka owaco botgi ni, “Wucit ki kuc. Rwot bigwokowu i wot ma wucito iye-ni.”" 
Judges18:7 Ci jo abic-cu gucito guo i Laic, ci guneno jo ma gitye kenyo, kit ma gibedo kwede mot i kit bedo pa jo Cidon, ma gibedo mot gutoyo ki tokgi ata, dok ni pe gin mo orem botgi i wi lobo, ento gitye gigi ki lonyo madwoŋ. Dok onoŋo gitye ka mabor ki bot Jo Cidon, pe gimer ki ŋatti mo." 
Judges18:8 Ka gudwogo bot omegigi i Jora ki Ectaol, omegigi gupenyogi ni, “Wukelo kit lok aŋo?”" 
Judges18:9 Gugamc ni, “Wua, wek wacitu i komgi, pien waneno lobo ca, lobone ber twatwal. Pe wumito timo iye gin mo? Pe wugalle ka cito kunnu ka donyo iye, ki camo lobone woko," 
Judges18:10 Ka wubicito, ci wubituc i kom jo ma gutoyo tokgi ata. Lobone lac; ada Lubaŋa otyeko miyone woko i ciŋwu, kabedone tye iye gin ducu ma mitte i wi lobo.”" 
Judges18:11 Ci jo miya abicel ma i kaka pa Dan gukwanyo jami lwenygi, gua ki i Jora ki Ectaol," 
Judges18:12 gukato, gugony i Kiriat-jearim i Juda, Pi lok meno omiyo kabedo-nu gilwoŋo Gony pa Dan o wa onyoo. Nen, tye i ŋet Kiriaŋearim, yo tuŋ potoceŋ." 
Judges18:13 Lacen gukato gucito i lobo godi me Epraim, ci gubino i gaŋ pa Mika." 
Judges18:14 Ka doŋ jo abic-cu ma yam onoŋo gucito ka roto lobo Laic guwaco bot omegigi ni, “Wuneyo mono ni i odi kany tye iye epod, cal lubaŋa, cal apaya ki cal me ryal ma giliyo aliya? Kombeddi doŋ wutam gin ma wubitimo.”" 
Judges18:15 Ci guŋak gucito kunnu, guwoto i ot pa latin Lalevi ma i paco pa Mika, ci gupenye ka en tye maber." 
Judges18:16 Jo Dan miya abicel gumako jami lwenygi, gucuŋ kwede i dog gaŋ ka ma gidonyo iye-ni," 
Judges18:17 ci jo abic ca ma yam gucito ka roto lobo-ni gucito gudonyo i ot, gukwanyo cal apaya ki epod, ki cal lubaŋa, ki cal me ryal ma giliyo aliya, kun ajwaka ocuŋ i dog gaŋ kacel ki jo miya abicel ma gumako jami lwenygi," 
Judges18:18 Ka jo-nu gudonyo i ot pa Mika, gukwanyo cal apaya, ki epod, ki cal lubaŋa ki cal me ryal ma giliyo aliya, ci ajwaka openyogi ni, “Wutimo gin aŋo mono?”" 
Judges18:19 Gugamo doge ni, “Liŋ mot, um dogi woko ki ciŋi, ci ibin kacel kwedwa, ibed wonwa ki ajwakawa. Hamo ni bedo ber ka ibedo ajwaka i ot pa dano acel, nyo ibedo ajwaka i doggola nyo i kaka kulu ma i Icrael?”" 
Judges18:20 Cwiny ajwaka obedo yom; otero epod ki cal lubaŋa ki cal apaya, owoto kwedgi i dye lwak." 
Judges18:21 Kit meno gulokke gucako wot, kun gicwalo litino ki lim makwo ki jamigi ducu i nyimgi." 
Judges18:22 Ka doŋ gucito ma oŋado ki paco pa Mika, jo ma gibedo i gaŋ ma cok ki gaŋ pa Mika onoŋo guriŋo i oduru, gumako jo Dan iyo," 
Judges18:23 Gudaŋŋe bot jo Dan, ci gin gulokke, guwaco bot Mika ni, “Aŋo mutimi mumiyo ibino ki lwak macalo man?”" 
Judges18:24 Ogamo ni, “Wukwanyo lubaŋana ma apayo, ki ajwakana, wucito kwede woko, doŋ adoŋ ki gin aŋo? Ka dok wupenya akaka ni, ‘Aŋo mutimi?’”" 
Judges18:25 Emo jo Dan gugamo ni, “Pe iwek dwani owinnye i kinwa, miyo kiniga mako jowa ci gipoto i komwu, gineki ki jo paconi ducu.”" 
Judges18:26 Ci jo Dan gucito gigi woko. Ka Mika oneno ni gitek pe eromo loyogi, en bene odok paco." 
Judges18:27 Jo Dan gutero jami ma yam Mika opayo; ki ajwakane ma yam tye bote, guo kwede wa i Laic, bot jo ma gubedo mol ma gutoyo tokgi ata, gunekogi ki pala lucwan, guwaŋo gaŋgi woko ki mac." 
Judges18:28 Dano mo pe ma oriŋo oduru ka larogi, pien onoŋo gitye bor ki Cidon, dok yam pe gumer ki ŋatti mo, Onoŋo gitye i nota ma cok ki Bet-Rekob. Jo Dan gugero gaŋ meno odoco, gubedo iye." 
Judges18:29 Ci gucako nyiŋ gaŋ ni, Dan, macalo nyiŋ Dan ma kwarogi, ma yam Icrael onywalo. Ento yam con nyiŋ gaŋ-ŋu gilwoŋo ni Laic." 
Judges18:30 Jo Dan gucibo cal ma gutero-ni me aworagi. Ci Yonacan lakwar Gercom ma wod pa Moses, ki likwaye, gubedo ajwagi i kaka pa Dan o wa i kare ma gitero jo Icrael i opii." 
Judges18:31 Cal ma yam Mika opayo obedo kunnu pi kare ducu ma ot pa Lubaŋa obedo i Cilo. 
Judges19:1 I kare meno ma onoŋo-kabaka pud pe i Icrael, yam tye Lalevi mo ma bedo i lobo godi me Epraim macalo welo, i kabedo mo ma tye teŋe i lum ka mabor. Okwanyo nya jo Beterekem ma i Juda me bedo dakone ma aŋeca," 
Judges19:2 Ka dakone okeco i kome, ci oa woko ki bote, odok i ot pa wonne i Beterekem ma i Juda, obedo kunnu pi dwe aŋwen," 
Judges19:3 Lacen cware oa ocito ka lubo kore kunnu, wek elok kwede mot, edwog kwede gaŋ, Owoto ki laticce ki kana aryo, ci obino i ot pa won nyako. Ka won nyako onene, obino ka jole ki yomcwiny," 
Judges19:4 Ci won dakone odiye, omiyo obedo kunnu pi nino adek; gubedo ka camo cam ki mat, kun en buta kunnu." 
Judges19:5 I nino me aŋwenne gua malo con, ci en oyubbe pi wot. Ento won nyako owaco bot cwar nyare ni, “Koŋ igal dogi ki latin kwoŋ mo, ka lacen doŋ wuwoti.”" 
Judges19:6 Jo aryo-nu gubedo gucamo ki mat kacel, ci won nyako owaco bot laco-nu ni, “Ber ibut kany tin, wek koŋ cwinyi opye mot.”" 
Judges19:7 Ka laco-nu oa malo me wot, won nyako dok ojuke, omiyo dok obuto kunnu." 
Judges19:8 I nino me abicce doŋ oa malo odiko con me cako wot; ci won nyako owacci, “Koŋ igal dogi ki gin mo; ibed nio ka piny okwe.” Kit meno gin aryo ducu gucamo cam." 
Judges19:9 Lacen laco-nu ki dakone ki laticce gua malo me cako wot. Won dakone owaco bo te ni, “Nen, piny doŋ mito yuto woko, ber wubut kany do, Nen ka piny doŋ oyuto woko ayuta, but kany wek koŋ cwinyi opye mot, ci diki wubia odiko con, wucako wot me cito paco.”" 
Judges19:10 Ento laco-nu pe dok oye buto kunnu. Oa, ocako wot, ci oo i nyim Jebuc, ma en aye Jerucalem. Onoŋo en tye ki kana aryo ma doŋ gitweyo kom me bedo i wigi, kun dakone tye kwede kacel." 
Judges19:11 Ka doŋ gitye cok ki Jebuc, onoŋo piny doŋ oyuto woko, ci laticce owaco bote ni, “Wek wanak i gaŋ man pa jo Jebuc, wabut kunnu tin.”" 
Judges19:12 Ento rwode ogamo ni, “Pe wabidok bot lurok ma pe gin jo Icrael; ento wabikato wacito Gibea.”" 
Judges19:13 Ci owaco bot laticce ni, “Bin wek wacit i kabedo mo mukene, wabut i Gibea nyo i Rama.”" 
Judges19:14 Gukato gucito gigi, ci cen opoto woko ma gitye cok ki Gibea, ma gaŋ pa jo Benjamin," 
Judges19:15 Guŋak kunnu pi wot buto i Gibea. Ka gudonyo iye, Lalevi ocito obedo piny i dye gaŋ ka maleŋ: ento dano mo pe oterogi i ode wek gubut bote," 
Judges19:16 Ka lacen dano mo ma oti obino kun oa ki ka tic i potone. Dano-nu tugi tye i lo bo godi me Epraim; onoŋo en labedo i Gibea, wegi gaŋ kikomgi gin jo Benjamin," 
Judges19:17 Otiŋo waŋe oneno dano ca ma lawot ma obedo i dye gaŋ ka maleŋ, openye ni, “Icito kwene? la ki kwene?”" 
Judges19:18 Lalevi ogamo ni, “Waa ki i Beterekem ma i Juda, wadok i lobo godi me Epraim ka mo tene i lum ka mabor ka ma an abedo iye. Onoŋo acito i Beterekem ma i Juda-ni, kombeddi abedok gaŋ; ento ŋatti mo pe otera i ode." 
Judges19:19 Watye ki reŋ kal ki cam pa kanawa, wa ki kwoŋ ki koŋo vino ma romowa, an ki aŋecana ki awobi-ni ma konya; gin mo murem peke.”" 
Judges19:20 Ci dano muti-ni ogamo ni, “Kuc obed i komi; abicobo gin ma wumito ducu; ento pe wubut wo ko i dye gaŋ aye,”" 
Judges19:21 Kit meno ocako tere i ot, ci omiyo cam ki kana. Gin gulwoko tyengi, ka gucamo, gumato," 
Judges19:22 Ka gitye ka yomo cwinygi, ci nen, jo ma i gaŋ meno ma lutim aranyi gurumo ot woko, gugoyo doggola kun giwaco bot ladit ma won ot ni, “Kel dano ma obino i odi-ni woko, wek wanene kwede.”" 
Judges19:23 Won ot okato woko, ocito botgi, owaco botgi ni, “Pe kumeno, utmega, pe wutim tim marac kit meno; pien dano man doŋ odonyo i oda, pe wutim tim man me aranyi." 
Judges19:24 Nen, nyara tye ene ma peya oneyo co, ki aŋeca pa laco-ni bene. Wek akelgi woko kombeddi, wuronygi kun wutimogi kit ma wumito; ento i kom dano man pe wutim aranyi i kome.”" 
Judges19:25 Ento jo-nu pe gumedo ki winyone, mumiyo Lalevi omako dakone ci ocwalo woko i ciŋgi, Guronye, gutiyo kwede kit ma igi mito i dyewor benebene nio wa odiko, guweke ka piny doŋ mito ru." 
Judges19:26 Ka te piny oyabbe, dako-nu obino opoto piny i doggola ot pa laco ma rwode tye bote-ni, nio ka piny odoko leŋ." 
Judges19:27 Rwode oa malo odiko, oyabo doggola, okato woko pi medo wotte. Ci nen, dako tye obuto i doggola me ot, kun ciŋe tye i doggola." 
Judges19:28 Owaco bot dako ni, “A malo wek waciti,” ento pe ogamo doge. Ci otiŋo kom dakone muto oketo i wi kana; lacen oa ocito kwede i gaŋŋe," 
Judges19:29 Ka doŋ odonyo i ode, okwanyo pala, omako kom dakone muto-ni, oŋido woko i dul ma romo apar wiye aryo, ocwalo i lobo pa jo Icrael ducu." 
Judges19:30 Jo ducu ma guneno guwacci, “Gin macalo man yam peya otimme, peya yam onen, cakke i kare ma yam jo Icrael gua ki i Ejipt, o wa onyoo; wutam, wupor lokke, ci wuloki.”" 
Judges20:1 Jo Icrael ducu gukatti woko, cakke wa i Dan o kwede i Beer ceba, medo ki lobo Gilead bene, ci lwak ocokke bot Rwot i Mijpa ki cwiny acel." 
Judges20:2 Rwodi pa lwak ducu ma i kaka ducu pa jo Icrael gucuŋ i dye jo pa Lubaŋa ma gucokke, co alip miya aŋwen ma gilwenyo ki pala lucwan, ma giwoto ki tyengi." 
Judges20:3 Jo Benjamin bene guwinyo ni jo Icrael mukene gucito i Mijpa. Jo Icrael guwacci, “Tit botwa kit ma tim aranyi man otimme kwede.”" 
Judges20:4 Ci Lalevi ma cwar dako ma gineko-ni owacci, “Nino mo acito i Gibea pa jo Benjamin, an ki dakona, wek abut iye." 
Judges20:5 Ci jo Benjamin gubino i koma, gurumo ot ma atye iye i dyewor kun gimito neka; ci guronyo dakona, omedo ki to woko." 
Judges20:6 Atero dakona muto-ni aŋido kome woko, acwalo dul kome oromo lobo ducu ma jo Icrael guleyo odoko megi; pien gitimo kipyeda ki tim me aranyi i Icrael." 
Judges20:7 Nen ba, wun jo Icrael, wun ducu, wupor lokke ki kany, wumi tamwu.”" 
Judges20:8 Lwak ducu gutwarre malo lawaŋacel kun giwaco ni, “Wan ducu pe ŋat acel mo bidok i kemane, dano acel mo pe bidok i ode." 
Judges20:9 Ento kombeddi wabitimo jo Gibea kit man: wabicito i komgi kun gikwanyo dano ki kwir. 
Judges20:10 Dok wabikwanyo dano apar i kom jo miya ki i kom kaka ducu ma i Icrael, ki dano miya acel i kom jo alip, ki dano alip i kom jo alip apar, wek gukel cam pi lwak, wek gubin gucul kwor i kom Gibea pa jo Benjamin pi bal aranyi ma gutimo i Icrael.”" 
Judges20:11 Kit meno jo Icrael ducu gucokke ka lweny i kom gaŋ meno, ma guribbe ki cwiny acel." 
Judges20:12 Ci kaka ducu ma i Icrael gucwalo jo i dye kaka pa Benjamin ducu kun giwaco ni, “Kit tim aranyi aŋo ma otimme i kinwu-ni?" 
Judges20:13 Kombeddi doŋ wumi jo meno ciŋwa, lutim aranyi ma i Gibea, wek wanekgi woko, wajwer kwede gin marac woko ki Icrael.” Ento jo Benjamin pe gumedo ki winyo dog utmegigi jo Icrael." 
Judges20:14 Ci jo Benjamin gua ki i gaŋgi, gucokke i Gibea me cito ka lweny i kom jo Icrael." 
Judges20:15 I nino meno ka jo Benjamin gukwano jo mua ki i gaŋgi, guromo jo alip pyeraryo wiye abicel ma gilwenyo ki pala lucwan, ma pe gikwano iye jo me Gibea kikome ma gucoko co miya abiro ma giyerogi ayera." 
Judges20:16 I kin jo meno ducu onoŋo tye co miya abiro ma giyerogi ma gin ciŋgi Lacam; ŋat acel acel i kingi bayo lagwen celo yer wic cut, pe bayo piny." 
Judges20:17 Jo Icrael ducu ma pe gikwano iye jo Benjamin guromo co alip miyaaŋwen ma gilwenyo ki pala lucwan; gin jo meno ducu onoŋo gin jo ma guŋiyo ki lweny. 
Judges20:18 Jo Icrael gua gucito Betel, gupenyo dog Lubaŋa ni, “Aŋa i kinwa ma bikwoŋo cito ka lweny i kom jo Benjamin?” Ci Rwot owacci, “Jo Juda aye gibikwoŋo cito.”" 
Judges20:19 Ci jo Icrael gua odiko con, gugony ma gikemo Gibea." 
Judges20:20 Gucito ka lweny i kom jo Benjamin, guryeyo ki tyen i nyim Gibea me lweny i komgi." 
Judges20:21 Jo Benjamin gukatti woko ki i Gibea, guneko jo Icrael ma romo jo alip pyeraryo wiye aryo i nino meno." 
Judges20:22 Ci jo Icrael gucito, gukok i nyim Rwot o wa otyeno. Ka dok gupenyo dog Rwot ni, “Wan dok wacit ka lweny i kom utmegiwa, jo Benjamin?” Rwot owacci, “Wucit, wulweny i komgi.” Mumiyo jo Icrael gucamo co, ci dok guryeyo i tyen i kabedo ma onoŋo guryeyo iye i nino mukwoŋo-ni," 
Judges20:23  
Judges20:24 Kit meno jo Icrael gurwayo cok i kom jo Benjamin i nino me aryone. 
Judges20:25 Jo Benjamin gukatti woko ki i Gibea i nino me aryone, guneko jo alip apar wiye aboro ki i kin jo Icrael; gin ducu gubedo jo ma lulweny ki pala lucwan." 
Judges20:26 Ci dok jo Icrael gucito Betel ki monygi ducu, gukok; ci gubedo piny kunnu i nyim Rwot, guri kec i nino meno owa otyeno. Gutumo gitum awaŋa bene ki gityer lakwecwiny i nyim Rwot." 
Judges20:27 Jo Icrael dok gupenyo dog Rwot,’ pien canduk me gicikke pa Lubaŋa onoŋo tye kunnu i kare meno," 
Judges20:28 kun Finekaci wod pa Eleajar ma wod pa Aron aye tiyo i nyime i kare meno, Gupenyo ni, “Pud dok wacito ka lweny i kom utmegiwa jo Benjamin aye, nyo wawek lweny doŋ ogik woko?” Rwot owacci, “Wuciti, pien diki abimiyogi i ciŋwu.”" 
Judges20:29 Kit meno jo Icrael guketo dano gubuto gurumo Gibea woko. 
Judges20:30 Ci jo Icrael gucito ka lweny i kom jo Benjamin i nino me adekke, gutiŋo mony i kom Gibea kit ma yam ca." 
Judges20:31 Jo Benjamin gukatti woko i kom jo Icrael, ci gumol woko wa i ne gaŋ. Gucako neko jo Icrael kit ma yam ca ki i yo gudo, i yo me cito Betel ki i yo mukene bene ma cito Gibea, wa ki i bar bene, dano ma mito romo ka pyeradek." 
Judges20:32 Mumiyo jo Benjamin guwacci, “Gutwarre, guriŋo woko i nyimwa kit ma yam ca.” Ento jo Icrael guwacci, “Wek koŋ warin woko, wek waywagi woko ki i gaŋ o wa i yo gudo.”" 
Judges20:33 Ci jo Icrael ducu gutwarre woko ki i kabedogi, guryeyo i Baaltamar; ki jo Icrael ma yam gubuto gukanne ka kurogi i ŋet Gibea tuŋ potoceŋ gutwarre wo ko ki i kabedogi." 
Judges20:34 Jo alip apar ma giyerogi ki i kin jo Icrael ducu gubino i kom Gibea, ci lweny odoko tek; ento jo Benjamin pe guŋeyo ni to pacogi doŋ onyiko cok," 
Judges20:35 Rwot omiyo jo Icrael guloyo jo Benjamin; ci jo Icrael gujwero jo Benjamin ma romo alip pyeraryo wiye abic ki mi ya acel i nino meno, gin ducu jo ma lulweny ki pala lucwan." 
Judges20:36 Pienno jo Benjamin guneno ni doŋ guloyogi. Jo Icrael gujer, guweko kabedo ki jo Benjamin, pien gigeno jo ma giketo gubuto i ŋet Gibea-ni." 
Judges20:37 Ci jo ma gubuto ka kurogi-ni gurune ci gucorre i kom Gibea, guneko jo ducu ma i gaŋ woko ki pala lucwan." 
Judges20:38 Onoŋo jo Icrael ki jo mubuto gurumo gaŋ guyubo lanyut ni, ka doŋ gumiyo yito mac oduny ocito malo ki i gaŋ," 
Judges20:39 ci jo Icrael gibidwogo cen ka lweny, Jo Benjamin gucako lweny ki neko jo Icrael pyeradek kun giwacci, “Ada ya, watye ka loyogi macalo i lweny mukwoŋo ca,”" 
Judges20:40 Ento ka lanyut ocako duny ki i gaij, yito mac ma ocuŋ macalo wir, jo Benjamin guneno yo ŋegi: ci nen, gaŋgi ducu tye ka waŋ duny malo o wa i polo," 
Judges20:41 Ci jo Icrael gulokke, gudwogo, omiyo kom jo Benjamin obaŋne woko, pien guneno ni to pacogi doŋ onyiko cok." 
Judges20:42 Pi meno guloko ŋegi bot jo Icrael gidok i yo tuŋ tim ata. Ento lweny onukogi woko, ka dok jo Icrael ma gumol gukatti woko ki i gaŋ bene gutyekogi woko ki i dyere kunnu." 
Judges20:43 Gujwero jo Benjamin woko, guryemo korgi guradogi woko piny laboŋo ywe o kwede tuŋ ka ma okemo Gibea yo tuŋ wokceŋ." 
Judges20:44 Jo Benjamin ma romo alip apar wiye aboro guto woko, gin ducu oteka lweny." 
Judges20:45 Jo mukene gulokke guriŋo yo tuŋ tim ata o wa i got Rimmon; dok gineko jo alip abic ki i komgi ma gitoŋogi gireto woko piny i yo gudo. Ci guryemo korgi matek nio wa Gidom, guneko jo alip aryo." 
Judges20:46 Jo Benjamin ducu ma gineko ma oradde piny i nino meno guromo alip pyeraryo wiye abic ma lulweny ki pala lucwan; gin ducu oteka lweny. 
Judges20:47 Ento jo miya abicel gulokke guriŋo gularo yo tuŋ tim wa i got Rimmon, gubedo i got Rimmon pi dwe aŋwen." 
Judges20:48 Jo Icrael dok gudwogo cen ka lweny i kom jo Benjamin, gunekogi ki pala lucwan, dano ki lee ki gin ducu ma ginoŋo; gaŋi ducu ma ginoŋo giwaŋo woko ki mac." 
Judges21:1 Onoŋo jo Icrael yam gukwoŋo kwoŋ i Mijpa ni, “Pe dano mo ki i kinwa bimiyo nyare me anyoma bot jo Benjamin.”" 
Judges21:2 Ci lwak gubino i Betel, gubedo kunnu i nyim Lubaŋa o wa otyeno, gutiŋo dwangi malo ki koko matek," 
Judges21:3 kun giwaco ni, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, piŋo lok man otimme i Icrael, ma tin wi kaka acel doŋ pe i Icrael?”" 
Judges21:4 Ka dok orwone lwak gua odiko con ka caŋo keno tyer kunnu, ki tyero gitum awaŋa ki gityer lakwecwiny." 
Judges21:5 Ci jo Icrael guwacci, “I kin kaka me Icrael ducu jo mene ma yam pe gubino i kare ma wacokke bot Rwot?” Pien onoŋo gukwoŋo kwoŋ madit ni, “Ka dano mo pe obino bot Rwot i Mijpa gibineke woko.”" 
Judges21:6 Kica omako jo Icrael i kom utmegigi jo Benjamin kun giwaco ni, “Kaka acel doŋ waŋe orwenyo woko tin ki i kin jo Icrael." 
Judges21:7 Wabitimo niŋniŋ pi noŋo mon pi jogi ma gudoŋ, ma doŋ watyeko kwoŋo kwoŋ i nyiŋ Rwot ni, pe wabimiyo nyarwa mo botgi me anyoma-ni?”" 
Judges21:8 Mumiyo guwacci, “Jo mene ma i kin kaka ma i Icrael ma yam pe gubino bot Rwot i Mijpa?” Ci gunoŋo ni i kare ma gucokke dano acel mo pe obino i gony ma oa ki i Jabec-Gilead," 
Judges21:9 Pien i kare ma gikwano dano, dano acel mo pe onen ma oa ki bot jo ma bedo i Jabec-gilead." 
Judges21:10 Pienno lwak gucwalo twoni co ma lulweny alip apar wiye aryo kun gicikogi ni, “Wucit wunek jo ma bedo i Jabec-gilead ki pala lucwan, wa mon ki litino." 
Judges21:11 Wubitimo kit man: co ducu ki mon ducu ma yam gubuto ki laco wubijwero woko liweŋ.” 
Judges21:12 I kin jo me Jabec-Gilead gunoŋo anyira miya aŋwen ma peya gubuto ki co, gukelogi i gony ma i Cilo, ma tye i lobo Kanaan." 
Judges21:13 Ka doŋ lwak ducu gucwalo lok bot jo Benjamin ma gitye i got Rimmon kun giloko botgi lok me kuc. 
Judges21:14 Jo Benjamin gudwogo i kare meno ci gumiyo botgi anyira me Jabec-Gilead ma guwekogi makwo-ni; ento pe guromogi ducu. 
Judges21:15 Kica omako lwak i kom jo Benjamin, pien onoŋo Rwot oketo ariya i kom kaka me Icrael ducu." 
Judges21:16 Ka dok ludoŋo me lwak guwacci, “Wabitimo niŋniŋ pi noŋo mon pi dano mudoŋ, ma doŋ gityeko mon ma i kin jo Benjamin woko ducu-ni?”" 
Judges21:17 Ci guwacci, “Luleyo myero nonne pi jo Benjamin ma gubwot, wek kaka mo pe gijwa woko ki Icrael." 
Judges21:18 Ento pe watwero miyo anyirawa botgi me bedo mongi.” Pien yam jo Icrael gukwoŋo kwoŋ ni, “Gicen ŋat ma omiyo dako mo bot jo Benjamin.”" 
Judges21:19 Pi meno guwacci, “Nen, tye nino madit me woro Rwot ma bedo mwaka ki mwaka i Cilo.” Cilo onoŋo tye i ŋet Betel yo tuŋ acam, cok ki yo gudo ma a ki Betel cito Cekem; ka it ye Lebona, Ci lo tye yo tuŋ acuc." 
Judges21:20 Guciko jo Benjamin ni, “Wucit wubut i potti olok, wukur dano," 
Judges21:21 ci wuki. Ka ce anyira Cilo gibino ka myel, ci wubin, wumakgi woko, kun dano acel acel mako dakone ki i kin anyira Cilo, ci wucit kwedgi wa i lobo Benjamin." 
Judges21:22 Ka ce wegigi nyo omegigi gibino ka laro lokke botwa, ci wabiwaco botgi ni, ‘Wutim ber wumigi botwa; pien yam pe wakelo anyira ki i mony ma romogi ducu, wun bene pe wumiyo mogo botgi; kono wumiyogi botgi, kono wuroco.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Jo Benjamin gutimo kit meno; gutero mongi ma oporo welgi, ma gumako ki i kin lumyel, gutiŋo yo, gucito, gudok i lobo ma yam guleyo-ni, ka gugero gaŋgi odoco, gubedo iye." 
Judges21:24 Jo Icrael guket woko ki kunnu i kare meno; ŋat acel acel odok i kakane ki i doggolane. Guket, gucito woko ki kenyo, kun dano acel acel ci to i lobo ma yam oleyo." 
Judges21:25 I kare meno onoŋo kabaka pe Icrael; dano acel acel tiyo gin ma co tamo ni tye atir. 
Ruth1:1 I kare ma luŋolkop giloyo lobo-ni onoŋo kec tye i lobo, ci laco mo me Beterekem ma i Juda ocito i lobo Moab, obedo kunnu, en ki dakone ki awobegi aryo." 
Ruth1:2 Nyiŋ laco meno Elimelek, ki nyiŋ dakone Naomi; nyiŋ awobegi aryo-ni Malon ki Kilion. Yam gin jo Eprata; gaŋgi Beterekem ma i Juda. Gucito i lobo Moab, gubedo kunnu." 
Ruth1:3 Ento Elimelek ma cwar Naomi oto woko, ci dako odoŋ ki awobene aryo-ni." 
Ruth1:4 Gin gunyomo anyira Moab; nyiŋ acel gilwoŋo ni Orupa ki nyiŋ mukene Ruth. Gubedo kunnu kine ka mwaka apar; 
Ruth1:5 lacen Malon ki Kilion guto woko, gin aryo ducu, mumiyo dako odoŋ kene laboŋo awobene aryo-nu ki laboŋo cware bene." 
Ruth1:6 En ocako a woko ki i lobo Moab wek edok cen ki mon pa awo bene aryo ducu, pien onoŋo owinyo ki i lobo Moab ni Rwot doŋ otyeko limo jone, omiyogi cam." 
Ruth1:7 Kit meno en oa woko ki i kabedo ma onoŋo gitye iye-ni ki mon pa awobene, gucako lubo yo ma dok i lobo Juda," 
Ruth1:8 Ento Naomi owaco bot mon wote ni, “Wudok cen, ŋat acel icel odok gire i ot pa minne. Rwot otimwu maber, kit ma wun wutimo jona ma waŋgi orwenyo woko ki bota, kacel ki an bene," 
Ruth1:9 Rwot omiwu wunoŋ ot, wek ŋat acel acel i kinwu obed gire i ot pa cware.” Onoto lemgi me cikogi, ci gucako kok matek." 
Ruth1:10 Guwacce ni, “Pe kumeno; wan wabidok kwedi wa bot jowu.”" 
Ruth1:11 Ento Naomi owacci, “Wudok cen, anyirana, wubicito kweda piŋo? Pud dok atye ki litino co i iya ma myero gudok cogwu?" 
Ruth1:12 Wudok cen, lnyirana, citu giwu, pien an doŋ ati, pe aromo bedo ki cwara mo, Dok kono awacci, pud ageno ni atwero nywalo litino, kadi abed ki cwara mo i dyewor man, kadi anywalo awo be," 
Ruth1:13 kono wun wuye kurogi nio ka gudoŋo mono? Wun kono wubikwero gero co? Pe kumeno, anyirana, pien toncwiny dwoŋ i cwinya mada piwu, pi kipwola ma Rwot omiyo opoto i koma-ni.”" 
Ruth1:14 Dok gucako kok matek ki dwangi maloŋo; lacen Orupa onoto lem daane ocike kwede, ento Ruth ocerre i kore matwal." 
Ruth1:15 Naomi owacce ni, “Nen, nyeki otyeko dok cen bot lutugi ki bot lubaŋane; dok Cen i kor nyeki.”" 
Ruth1:16 Ento Ruth owacci, “Pe ibed ka lega ni aweki, nyo ni adok cen awek lubo kori; pien ka ma in icito iye, an bene abicito iye; ka ma ibuto iye, an bene abibuto iye; jo tuwu gibibedo jo tuwa bene, dok Lubaŋani bibedo Lubaŋana," 
Ruth1:17 Ka ma ibito iye, an bene abito iye, gibiyika kunnu. Myero Rwot oket can i koma kit meno ki makato bene, ka to kikome aye bipoko an kwedi.”" 
Ruth1:18 Ka Naomi oneno ni en atyeko moko tamme me cito kwede, pe doŋ oloko gin mo." 
Ruth1:19 Kit meno mon aryo-nu gucako wot nio ka guo wa i Beterekem, Ka guo i Beterekem, ci gaŋ ducu orubbe woko pigi. Ci mon gucako wacci, “Man en aye Naomi?”" 
Ruth1:20 En owaco botgi ni. “Pe dok wulwoŋa ni, Naomi. Wulwoŋa ni Kipwola, pien Won Twer Ducu okelo kipwola i koma." 
Ruth1:21 Yam acito ma abup, Rwot omiyo adwogo cen ma alam. Piŋo wulwoŋa ni Naomi ma Rwot ouna-ni, Woti Twer Ducu bketa i can mapek?”" 
Ruth1:22 Kit meno odwogo cen, ki Ruth ma ci-wode kacel kwede, ma con odwogo nia ki i lobo Moab. Guo i Beterekem i kare ma gicako kayo bel cayiri." 
Ruth2:1 Naomi con tye ki wat ma ladoggola pa cware, dano ma lalonyo ma i doggola pa Elimelek, ma nyiŋe Boaj." 
Ruth2:2 Ruth ma anyira Moab owaco ki Naomi ni, “Wek acit i poto acibek wit cayiri ki i kor dano mo ma biparo pira.” Ci en owaco ni, “Cit, nyara.”" 
Ruth2:3 Ocito i poto ka beko kor lukac, ci ocob i kom poto pa Boaj ma ladoggola pa Elimelek," 
Ruth2:4 Ci nen, Boaj oa ki i Beterekem, obino owaco ki lukac ni, “Rwot obed kwedwu.” Gudok iye ni, “Rwot omiyi gum.”" 
Ruth2:5 Boaj dok openyo latic ma loyo lukac ni, “Man nya pa aŋa?”" 
Ruth2:6 Ci latic ma loyo lukac ogamo ni, “Man nya jo Moab, ma yam odwogo ki Naomi ki i lobo Moab," 
Ruth2:7 Ci en openya ni, ‘Alegi, wek abek korgi, kun abeko ki i kin larita ma i kor lukac.’ Kit meno en obino kun tiyo medde kwede nia wa odiko con nio wa onyoo, kun pe ywe kadi matidi mo,”" 
Ruth2:8 Ci Boaj owaco ki Ruth ni, “Koŋ iwiny, nyara, pe doŋ icit ibed i poto mukene, nyo pe iwek poto man, ento bed cocok ki anyirana." 
Ruth2:9 Ket waŋi i kom poto ma gitye ka kayo-ni, bed ka lu bo korgi. Doŋ atyeko ciko awobe ni pe gugud komi. Dok ka orwo pii neki, ci cit ka ma agulu pii tye iye, icimat pii ma awobe gutwomo-ni.”" 
Ruth2:10 Ruth oguŋo oryebbe piny, owacce ni, “Piŋo luguma okaya i nyimi, omiyo iparo pira ma an larok ata-ni?”" 
Ruth2:11 Ento Boaj ogamo ni, “Gin ducu ma ibedo ka tiyone pi daani nia ma cwari oto ca gibedo ka titta ducu kikore, ki kit ma iweko kwede woru ki meni ki lobo tinoni pi bino i rok ma yam pe iŋeyo." 
Ruth2:12 Rwot myero oculli gin ma doŋ itiyo maber-ri! Rwot ma en Lubaŋa pa Icrael ka ma iriŋo ilaro i te bwome-ni, omiyi mot muromo maber!”" 
Ruth2:13 Ruth ogamo ni, “Rwoda, in kica omaki i koma, pien doŋ ityeko kweyo cwinya woko pi lok ki aŋecani lok me kica, kadi bed an pe a ŋat acel i kom lwak aŋecani.”" 
Ruth2:14 I kare me cam Boaj dok owacce ni, “Bin kany, wek icam kwon mo, igwe ki koŋo vino,” Kit meno Ruth ocako nywako bedo ki lukac, ci Boaj omiye cayiri ma gicelo acela. En ocamo nio ka oyen, ci oweko mogo odoŋ." 
Ruth2:15 Ka en oa malo ka beko cam, Boaj ociko awobe kun waco ni, “Wuwek en obeki wa i kin larita, pe wule wiye." 
Ruth2:16 Dok bene wuwot wi te mogo wo ko ki i kom larita, ci wuwek en obeki, kun pe wucoko wiye.”"
