Ruth2:17 Kit meno en obeko cam i poto nio wa otyeno, ci odino bel cayiri ma obeko-ni woko; omito romo debe aryo," 
Ruth2:18 Ci otiŋo ocito kwede i gaŋ, onyuto bot daane gin ma ebeko; dok ocako kelo cam ma odoŋ ma onoŋo en doŋ oyen, omiyo ki daane." 
Ruth2:19 Ci daane openye ni. “Tin ibeko kwene? Itiyo kwene? Gum obed i kom ŋat ma oparo piri-ni.” En otito ki daane ŋat ma etiyo bote-ni kun wacci, “Nyiŋ dano ma tin atiyo bote-ni aye Boaj.”" 
Ruth2:20 Ci Naomi owaco ki ci-wode ni, “Myero Rwot omiye gum, Rwot ma kicane peya otenyo jo makwo ki jo muto-ni.” Dok Naomi owacce ni, “Dano meno aye omegiwa macok ma romo laki,”" 
Ruth2:21 Ci Ruth ma anyira Moab owacci, “Medo ki meno, dok owacca bene ni, ‘In ibinywako bedo ki luticca nio ka gutyeko kayo kacca ducu.’ ”" 
Ruth2:22 Ci Naomi owaco ki ci-wode Ruth ni, “Man ber, nyara, ka ibecito kacel ki anyirane, wek pe jo gubed ka gudo komi i poto mukene.”" 
Ruth2:23 Kit meno en obedo ki anyira pa Boaj kun beko cam nio ka kayo bel cayiri ki ŋano otum, kun obedo kacel ki daane." 
Ruth3:1 Daane Naomi dok owacce ni, “Nyara, pe myero ayennyi ot, wek ibed maber?" 
Ruth3:2 Boaj ma onoŋo ibedo ki anyirane-ni en aye ladoggolawa. Nen ba, en bipyeto cayirine tin otyeno i laro moyo," 
Ruth3:3 Ber in ilwokke, iwirre ki moo, irukke ki boŋŋini mabeco-ni, ci icit kunnu wa i laro. Ento pe inyutte kekeni bo te nio ka otyeko cam ki mat-gu." 
Ruth3:4 Lacen ka doŋ obuto piny, in inen ka ma obuto iye-ni, ci icit iye, iel tuŋ ka tyene, ibut iye; ci en bititti gin ma ibitiyo.”" 
Ruth3:5 Ruth ogamo ni, “Abitiyo gin ma iwaco ducu.”" 
Ruth3:6 Kit meno Ruth ocako cito wa i laro moyo, ci otiyo kit ma daane otitte-ni kikome." 
Ruth3:7 Ka Boaj otyeko camo cam ki mat-gu, ma kun cwinye yom, ocito obuto Ka ŋet cayiri ma giguro kacel. Ci Ruth okwalle ocito mot, oelo tuŋ tyene, obuto piny," 
Ruth3:8 Ki i cwiny dyewor laco ocako po; ka olokke, ci nen, dako mo obuto ka tyene!" 
Ruth3:9 Owacci, “In aŋa?” Ogamo ni, “An a Ruth, aŋecani. Yar dog boŋoni, iuma kwede, pien in aye imyero ka lako an.”" 
Ruth3:10 En owacce ni, “Rwot omiyo gum, nyara; man inyutta berri madit makato macon, pien pe icito i kor awobe matino, ma lucan nyo ma lulonyo." 
Ruth3:11 Ci tin, nyara, pe doŋ ilwor, pien abitimo piri gin ducu ma ilego-ni, pien lutuwa ma i gaŋ-ŋi giŋeyo kit berri." 
Ruth3:12 Me adane an aye a watwu macok, ento tye omegiwa ma dok cok makato an ma romo lako in." 
Ruth3:13 Koŋ ibut i dyewor man, ci diki odiko ka ce omegiwa mukene aye bilaki, wek en olaki; ento ka omegiwa mukene-ni pe mito laki, macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, ci an abilaki ma ka en. Doŋ ibut piny nio wa odiko.”" 
Ruth3:14 Obuto piny ka tyene nio wa odiko, ento oa woko con ma piny pud ribiribi; ci Boaj ociko ni, “Pe ŋatti mo one ni dako man obino wa i laro moyo.”" 
Ruth3:15 Ci owacci, “Kel boŋo ma iruko-ni, iyar iye.” Oyaro iye, ci Boaj opimo cayiri agwata moko abicel, ocibo i wiye, ci en ocito kwede gaŋ," 
Ruth3:16 Ka en obino bot daane,’ daane openye ni, “Wotti obedo niŋniŋ, nyara?” Ci otitte gin ducu ma laco meno otimo i kome," 
Ruth3:17 kun waco ni, “En omiya cayiri agwata moko abicel kun wacci, ‘Pe myero idok bot daani ki ciŋi noŋo.’ ”" 
Ruth3:18 Ci daane odok iye ni, “Nyara, koŋ ikur nio ka iniaŋ" 
Ruth4:1 Boaj ocito i dog gaŋ, obedo piny kunnu. Ci nen, lalako ma Boaj oloko pire-ni okato akata. Boaj owacci, “Bin, omera, ibed piny kany,” ci obino obedo piny," 
Ruth4:2 Ci Boaj okwanyo ludoŋo me gaŋ meno apar, owaco botgi ni, “Wubed piny kany,” ci gubedo piny." 
Ruth4:3 Lacen owaco ki dano ma en lalako-ni ni, “Naomi, ma doŋ odwogo cen nia ki i lobo Moab, tye ka cato but dul lobo mo yam pa ominwa Elimelek." 
Ruth4:4 Pienno omiyo atamo ni koŋ atitti, kun awacci, In iwil ki i nyim jo man ma gibedo kany-nyi, ki i nyim ludoŋowa-ni. Ka ce ibikokone, ci koki; ento ka pe, ci titta wek aŋe, pien pe tye ŋat mo ma myero okoki, kono in, ci an aye alubi.” Ogamo ni, “An abikokone.”" 
Ruth4:5 Boaj dok owacci, “I nino ma iwilo iye dul lobo meno ki bot Naomi, noŋo in iwilo wa ki Ruth ma anyira Moab bene, ma dako pa lato-ni, pi dwoko nyiŋ lato i kom ginaleyane.”" 
Ruth4:6 Mumiyo lalako owacci, “An pe atwero koko ne pira, miyo abalo ginaleyana woko. In ikoki; doŋ ajalo twerona me kokone boti, pien an pe atwero kokone.”" 
Ruth4:7 Man aye kit macon ma yam gitimo i Icrael i kare me koko dul lobo, nyo loko ki dul mukene: pi moko lok mo-ni, con ‘dano acel lunyo warre woko, ci miyo ki ŋat mukene; meno aye yam obedo lok me caden i Icrael." 
Ruth4:8 Ka lalako dok owaco ki Boaj ni, “In aye iwil,” ci olunyo warre woko," 
Ruth4:9 Boaj owaco ki ludoŋo ki bot lwak ducu ni, “Wun aye wucaden ma moko ni, atyeko wilo jami ducu ma yam pa Elimelek, ki jami ducu ma yam pa Kilion, ki jami ducu ma yam pa Malon nia ki i ciŋ Naomi." 
Ruth4:10 Ki Ruth anyira Moab bene ma yam dako pa Malon doŋ atyeko warone woko wek obed dakona, pi dwoko nyiŋ lato i kom ginaleyane, wek nyiŋ lato pe gijwa woko ki i kin utmege, nyo ki i dog gaŋ ka ma ginywalo iye-ni. Tin wun aye wucaden.”" 
Ruth4:11 Ci jo ducu ma yam gitye i dog gaŋ kacel ki ludoŋo guwacci, “Wan aye lucaden. Rwot omi dako meno ma bino i odi-ni obed macalo Lakeri ki Lea, ma gin aryo ducu gutiŋo wi ot pa Icrael malo. Myero ibed matek i Eprata, nyiŋi bene oywek i Beterekem," 
Ruth4:12 odi bene obed rom ki ot pa Perej ma yam Tamar onywalo ki Juda, pi litino ma Rwot bimiyi ma a ki i latin dako-ni.”" 
Ruth4:13 Kit meno Boaj otero Ruth, odoko dakone. Odonyo obedo kwede, ci Rwot omiyo ogamo ic, onywalo latin laco." 
Ruth4:14 Mon guwaco ki Naomi ni, “Doŋ gipwo Rwot ma pe oweki ibedo laboŋo wat macok kwedi tin. Wek nyiŋe oywek i Icrael!" 
Ruth4:15 En biroco kwoni odoco, dok bikuri ka iti; pien ci-wodi ma mari, ma pire tekki makato awobe abiro-ni, en aye onywale.”" 
Ruth4:16 Naomi otiŋo latin, opyelo i kore, ci odoko lapidine." 
Ruth4:17 Mon wadi gucako nyiŋe, kun giwacci, “Ginywalo ki Naomi latin laco.” Ci gucako nyiŋe ni Obed; en aye obedo won Yece, ma won Daudi." 
Ruth4:18 Man aye likwayo pa Perej: Perej onywalo Kejeron," 
Ruth4:19 Kejeron onywalo Ram, Ram onywalo Aminadab," 
Ruth4:20 Aminadab onywalo Nakucon, Nakucon onywalo Calmon," 
Ruth4:21 Calmon onywalo Boaj, Boaj onywalo Obed," 
Ruth4:22 Obed onywalo Yece, Yece onywalo Daudi." 
1Samuel1:1 Yam tye dano mo i Ramataimjopim ma i lobo godi me Epraim nyiŋe Elkana wod pa Jerokam, ma wod pa Eliu wod pa Toku, ma en aye wod pa Jupi ma jo Epraim." 
1Samuel1:2 Onoŋo tye ki mon aryo; nyiŋ ŋat acel Anna, ki nyiŋ dako mukene Penina. Penina onoŋo tye ki litino, ento Anna onoŋo litinone peke." 
1Samuel1:3 Dano man yam a ki i gaŋŋe mwaka ki mwaka ci cito ka woro Rwot me mony ki ka tyero gitum i Cilo, ka ma onoŋo tye iye awobe pa Eli aryo, Kopuni ki Finekaci, ma gin ajwagi pa Rwot." 
1Samuel1:4 I nino ma Elkana tyero iye gitumme-ni, en miyo dul riŋo bot dakone Penina ki bot awo bene ki anyirane ducu." 
1Samuel1:5 Ento kadi bed en maro Anna mada en bedo ka miyo bote dul acel keken’, pien Rwot onoŋo otweyo iye woko, pe nywal." 
1Samuel1:6 Nyeke bedo ka ŋeto iye marac ki cwero cwinye, pien Rwot otweyo iye woko, pe nywal." 
1Samuel1:7 Kit tim meno obedo ka timme mwaka ki mwaka; i kare ducu ma Anna cito kunnu i ot pa Rwot, nyeke bedo ka ŋeto iye. Yam miyo Anna bedo ka koko, ci pe camo." 
1Samuel1:8 I nino mo acel cware Elkana openye ni, “Anna, ikok piŋo? Piŋo pe icamo? Cwinyi cwer piŋo? An pe ayomo cwinyi makato awobe apar?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Ka doŋ gutyeko camo cam ki mat i Cilo, ci Anna oa malo. I kare-nu onoŋo ajwaka Eli obedo i wi komme i ŋel okar doggola me ot pa Rwot." 
1Samuel1:10 Anna onoŋo cwinye cwer matek, ci ocako lego Rwot kun kok matek twatwal." 
1Samuel1:11 Okwoŋo kwoŋ kun waco ni, “Ai Rwot me mony, ka ce ibineno aroma ma aŋecani tye kwede, kun ipo pira, ma wii pe wil i koma, ce imiya latin laco ci abitiŋo am iyo bot Rwot pi kare me kwone ducu, dok lyedi mo bene pe bigudo wiye.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Ka en pud omedde ki lega i nyim Rwot, Eli obedo ka neno doge," 
1Samuel1:13 Anna obedo ka lega ki i cwinye, kun del doge aye yeŋŋe, ento dwane pe winnye; mumiyo Eli otamo ni en dako ma lamero." 
1Samuel1:14 Ci Eli owaco bote ni, “Ibimer pi kare ma rom mene? Juk mero ki koŋo yinoni-ni woko,”" 
1Samuel1:15 Ento Anna odok iye ni, “Pe kumeno, rwoda, An a dako ma cwercwiny aye oneka woko, Pe amato koŋo yino nyo gin ma mero dano, ento abe do ka yako lok ma iiya woko i nyim Rwot." 
1Samuel1:16 Pe iloka abed dako ma kile rac, pien gin ma abedo’ ka loko-ni ducu dwoŋŋe parra ki cwercwinya,”" 
1Samuel1:17 Ci Eli odok iye ni, “Wot ki kuc. Lubaŋa pa Icrael myero oye legani ma ikelo bote-ni.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Anna ogamo ni, “Wek gum okaya i nyimi, ladit,” Ka okato ocito woko, ocako cam, ci waŋe odoko leŋ," 
1Samuel1:19 Gupuk woko odiko con, gucito ka woro Rwot; ka lacen gudok paco tugi i Rama. Elkana obedo ki dakone Anna, ci Rwot ogamo lega pa Anna," 
1Samuel1:20 Anna ogamo iye, Ka kare oromo, onywalo latin laco, ci ocako nyiŋe Camuel, pien Dwacci, “Alego alega ki bot Rwot.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Elkana ki jo ma i ode ducu dok gucito ka tyero gitum me mwaka bot Rwot, ki pi cobo kwoŋŋe." 
1Samuel1:22 Ento Anna pe ocito, Owaco bot cware ni, “Ka latin doŋ obwoto deto cak, abitere, wek ocinen i nyim Rwot, obed kunnu doŋ matwal.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Cware Elkana ogamo ni, “Tim gin ma ineno ni ber; koŋ doŋ ikur waŋ ma obwoto dot. Ento Rwot aye ocob lokke kakare.” Ci Anna odoŋ ka doto latinne, nio ka oweko doto cak," 
1Samuel1:24 Ka doŋ wode obwoto dot ci otere, kacel ki twon ma ditte romo mwaka adek, ki moko kwon ma romo debe aryo, ki opiro koŋo vino, ci okele i ot oa Rwot ma i Cilo, kun onoŋo latin pud tidi." 
1Samuel1:25 Guneko twon, ka gutero latin bot Eli," 
1Samuel1:26 Ci Anna owaco bote ni, “A rwoda, tika ipo i koma? An aye a dako ma yam ocuŋ i nyimi kany kun alego Rwot-ti." 
1Samuel1:27 Yam alego pi latin man, ci Rwot oye legana ma akok kwede bote." 
1Samuel1:28 Mumiyo an adyero en woko i ciŋ Rwot pi kare me kwone ducu; doŋ adyere woko i cin Rwot en.” Ci guworo Rwot kunnu. 
1Samuel2:1 Anna olego bene kun wacci, “Aum ki yomcwiny pi Rwot; tekka omedde woko pi Rwot. Doga nyedo lok i kom lumerokka, cwinya yom pien in Rwot ilara." 
1Samuel2:2 “Pe tye ŋatti mo maleŋ macalo Rwot, ŋatti mo pe, kono in keken; got mo pe ma rom ki Lubaŋawa." 
1Samuel2:3 Pe wumedde ka lok ki wakke twatwal, pe lok me nyatte okatti ki i dogwu; pien Rwot aye Lubaŋa won ŋec, en pimo gin ducu ma dano timo." 
1Samuel2:4 Atum pa twoni doŋ gituro, jo magoro gudoko lutekkom." 
1Samuel2:5 Jo ma yam giyeŋ gudoko lutic me noŋo cam, ento kec doŋ pe bot jo ma yam kec nekogi, Lalur onywalo litino abiro, ento megi awobe mapol doŋ odoko goro." 
1Samuel2:6 Rwot neko dano dok cero woko bene, tero i lyel dok dwoko makwo." 
1Samuel2:7 Rwot miyo can, dok miyo lonyo; en lanyo dano dok pilo wiye." 
1Samuel2:8 En ilo lucan woko ki i apwa, dok tiŋo jo ma piny obwoyogi kwanyogi woko ki i wi odur, wek gubed kacel ki rwodi, gunoŋ kabedo me deyo. Rwot aye won wir ma teno lobo, ocibo lo bo ocuŋ i wigi." 
1Samuel2:9 “Rwot bigwoko tyen jone ma gene; ento lutim aranyi gibirido wigi woko i piny macol; pien dano pe loyo lweny pi tek kome. 
1Samuel2:10 Lulweny i kom Rwot gibininyogi woko; en bimor i komgi ki i polo macalo mor kot. Rwot biŋolo kop wa i agikki lobo ducu; en bimiyo tek bot kabakane, bipilo wi lakerre ma giwiro ki moo,”" 
1Samuel2:11 Ka Elkana odok i gaŋŋe i Rama, latin odon ka tic bot Rwot i te loc pa ajwaka Eli." 
1Samuel2:12 Onoŋo awobe pa Eli kitgi raco; pe giparo pi Rwot wacel. 
1Samuel2:13 Kit ma yam ajwagi gitiyo kwede i kom lwak i kare-nu onoŋo tye kit man: ka dano mo otyero gitum, ci latic pa ajwaka bino ma pud gitye ka tedo riŋo, ma omako lacob riŋo ma lake okarre adek." 
1Samuel2:14 Ci rwako i otako, nyo i atabo, nyo i cupuriya, nyo i agulu. Rino ducu ma lacob riŋo ocobo okelo woko bedo pa ajwaka. Yam gubedo ka timo kit meno i Cilo i kom jo Icrael ducu ma gibino iye." 
1Samuel2:15 Dok bene latic pa ajwaka yam bino ma moo dwolo peya giwaŋo, ci waco bot dano ma tyero gitumme ni, “Mi riŋo bot ajwaka me abula, pien en pe ye gamo riŋo ma doŋ gitedo, kono manumone keken.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Ka ce dano-nu owacce ni, “Koŋ iwek giwan dwolo, ka doŋ ikwany madit kit ma imito-ni,” ci latic gamo ni, “Pe kumeno; myero imi kombeddi. Ka pe, ci abikwanyo ki tek.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Kit meno bal pa awo be-nu obedo dit twatwal i nyim Rwot, pien jo-nu gubedo ka cayo gityer pa Rwot acaya," 
1Samuel2:18 Camuel obedo ka tic i nyim Rwot ma onoŋo pud tidi, kun tweyo epod boŋo camanini i pyere." 
1Samuel2:19 Minne kwoyo kanyi matidi mwaka ki mwaka ci tero bote ka en cito kacel ki cware ka tyero gitum me mwaka. 
1Samuel2:20 Ci. Eli lego gum i kom Elkana ki dakone kun wacci, “Lubaŋa omi inoŋ litino ki i kom dako man ma ka latin ma en odyero bot Rwot-ti;” ka lacen gidok paco tugi." 
1Samuel2:21 Rwot dok olimo Anna ci Anna ogamo ic, onywalo litino awobe adek ki anyira aryo. Ci latin man Camuel odoŋo i nyim Rwot." 
1Samuel2:22 I kare-nu onoŋo Eli doŋ oti mada. Obedo ka winyo kit ma awobene tiyo kwede i kom jo Icrael ducu, ki kit ma gibuto ki mon ma gitiyo i doggola kema me rwatte." 
1Samuel2:23 Owaco botgi ni, “Piŋo wutimo gin macalo meno? Pien abedo ka winyo ki bot lwak ducu pi gin maraco ma wutimo." 
1Samuel2:24 Pe kumeno, litinona; lok ma awinyo i komwu ma lwak pa Rwot gunyayo oromo piny-nyi pe ber." 
1Samuel2:25 Ka dano mo obalo i kom dano wadi, ci Lubaŋa biteko kingi. Ento ka dano obalo i kom Rwot, aŋa ma twero bako doge pire?” Ento gin yam pe giworo dog wongi, pien onoŋo Rwot mito ni enekgi woko." 
1Samuel2:26 Ci latin man Camuel omedde ki doŋo, kun yo mo cwiny Rwot kacel ki dano." 
1Samuel2:27 Dano pa Lubaŋa mo obino bot Eli, owaco bote ni, “Rwot owaco kit man ni, ‘Yam anyutte kekena boŋo me ot pa kwaru i kare ma gitye i Ejipt, ma gubedo opii i ot pa Parao." 
1Samuel2:28 Yam ayere ki i kin kakawu ducu ma i Icrael wek obed ajwakana, ocit cok ki keno tyerra, obed ka waŋo odok eceta, ki ruko epod i nyima. Ci yam amiyo bot jo me ot pa kwaru gityer ducu pa jo Icrael ma giwaŋo ki mac." 
1Samuel2:29 Piŋo dok wucayo gitumma ki gityerra ma yam aciko? Dok piŋo iworo litinoni makato an, pi weko gicwe ki dul mabeco twatwal ki i kom gityer ducu ma jona Icrael gityero.’" 
1Samuel2:30 Pi meno Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael otuco atyer ni, ‘Yam aciko ni, jo me odi ki jo me ot pa kwaru gibimedde ta tiyo ticgi i nyima matwal’; ento kombeddi Rwot otuco atyer ni, ‘Lok me cikke meno pire obotti woko ki bota, pien jo ma giketo deyo i koma an bene abiketo deyo i komgi, ento jo ma gicaya pe abiketo cwinya i komgi." 
1Samuel2:31 Nen, kare bibino ma abituro iye tekki woko ki tek me ot pa kwaru, wek dano mo muti pe obed i odi." 
1Samuel2:32 Ka can doŋ opoto i komi, nyeko bimaki i kom jo Icrael pi lonyo ducu ma gibinoŋo, kun dano mo muti pe bibedo i odi matwal." 
1Samuel2:33 Danoni mo ma abiweko doŋ i ŋet keno tyerra, wane bicor woko ki koko, kun cwinye ton; likwayowu ducu dano binekogi woko ki pala lucwan." 
1Samuel2:34 Gin ma bipoto i kom awobeni aryo. Kopuni ki Finekaci, en aye bibedo lanyut boti; gin aryo ducu gibito i nino acel." 
1Samuel2:35 Dok abiketo ajwaka ma lagen pira kena ma ticce birwatte ki lok ma tye i cwmya ki i tamma, Abigerre ot matek atika, ci en biri i dog ticce nakanaka i nyim danona ma giwiro ki moo." 
1Samuel2:36 Dok ka dano mo odoŋ ki i odi, bibino ka bako doge bote pi nucu lim mo, nyo kwon mo kun wacci, Tim ber, iketa i kabedo mo pa ajwaka, wek acam latin kwon mo.’" 
1Samuel3:1 I kare meno onoŋo Camuel tye ka tic pi Rwot i te loc pa Eli. Onoŋo lok pa Rwot bino kicel kicel keken, ginanyuta ma Rwot cwalo macalo lek pe nen ata." 
1Samuel3:2 I kare meno onoŋo waŋ Eli ocido woko, pe doŋ neno piny, I nino mo onoŋo obuto piny ka ma en buto iye," 
1Samuel3:3 kun mac tara pa Lubaŋa pud lyel, dok kun Camuel obuto piny i ot pa Rwot ka ma canduk pa Lubaŋa bedo iye-ni," 
1Samuel3:4 Ci Rwot olwoŋo ni, “Camuel! Camuel!” Camuel ogamo ni, “An atye ene!”" 
1Samuel3:5 Ci oriŋo bot Eli owaco ni, “An atye ene, ibedo ka lwoŋa.” Ento Eli ogamo ni, “An pe alwoŋi, cibut piny doki.” Camuel odok obuto piny." 
1Samuel3:6 Ci Rwot dok olwoŋo ni, “Camuel! Camuel!” Ci Camuel oa ocito bot Eli, owaco ni, “An atye ene, ibedo ka lwoŋa.” Eli ogamo ni, “An pe alwoŋi, latinna, cibut piny doki.”" 
1Samuel3:7 I kare-nu onoŋo Camuel peya ŋeyo Rwot, onoŋo Rwot peya oyabo lokke bote." 
1Samuel3:8 Ci Rwot dok olwoŋo Camuel tyen me adekke, ci Camuel dok oa ocito bot Eli kun waco ni, “An atye ene, ibedo ka lwoŋa.” Ci Eli oniaŋ ni Rwot aye obedo ka lwoŋo awobi-nu," 
1Samuel3:9 mumiyo Eli owaco bot Camuel ni, “Cibut piny. Ka ce dok olwoŋi, ci ibiwaco ni, ‘Rwot, wac lokki. An laticci, atye ka winyone.’’’ Kit meno Camuel odok obuto piny i kabutone." 
1Samuel3:10 Rwot obino ci ocuŋ cok kun lwoŋo kit ma olwoŋo i kare ca ni, “Camuel! Camuel!” Ci Camuel ogamo ni, “Rwot, wac lokki. An laticci, atye ka winyone.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Dok Rwot owaco bot Camuel ni, “Nen ba, an doŋ atye cok ka tiyo gin mo i Icrael ma bimiyo dano ducu ma winyo komgi bito lirut." 
1Samuel3:12 I nino meno abicobo gin ducu ma yam aloko i kom ot pa Eli, cakke i acakkine o wa i agikki," 
1Samuel3:13 An doŋ atito bote ni abiketo can i kom jo me ode matwal pi gin ma guroco ma en ŋeyo wa con, pien litinone gubedo ka yeto Lubaŋa kun en pe jukogi." 
1Samuel3:14 Mumiyo akwoŋo kwoŋ bot jo me ot pa Eli ni, pe tye gitum mo nyo gityer mo ma bikwanyo bal ki i kom jo me ot pa Eli matwal.”" 
1Samuel3:15 Camuel obuto nio wa odiko, ci ocako yabo doggola me ot pa Rwot. Onoŋo en lworo tito bot Eli lok ma Lubaŋa onyuto bote." 
1Samuel3:16 Ento Eli olwoŋe kun waco ni “Camuel, latinna.” Camuel ogamo ni, “An atye ene.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Ci Eli openye ni, “Rwot otitti lok aŋo? Pe imuŋŋa lokke. Lubaŋa myero oket can i komi kit meno ki makato bene, ka ce imunna lok mo i kom lok ducu ma en otito boti.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Kit meno Camuel otitte lok ducu, kun pe omuŋo lok mo bote. Eli ogamo ni, “En aye Rwot; wek otim gin ma oneno ni ber.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Camuel omedde ki doŋo kun onoŋo Rwot tye kwede, Rwot pe oweko lok mo ma Camuel owaco obut opoto piny i nom ma pe ocobbe kakare." 
1Samuel3:20 Ci jo Icrael ducu cakke ki i Dan o wa i Beer-ceba guŋeyo ni, Camuel doŋ gimoko me bedo lanebi pa Rwot." 
1Samuel3:21 Rwot omedde ki nen doki i Cilo, ka ma yam onoŋo onyutte iye bot Camuel kun tito lokke bote." 
1Samuel4:1 Ci lok ma Camuel bedo ka loko cito romo lobo Icrael ducu. I kare meno jo Icrael gucito ka lweny ki jo Piliciti, ci gutoŋo gony i Ebenejer, ki jo Piliciti gutoŋo gonygi i Apek." 
1Samuel4:2 Jo Piliciti gurye ki tyen ka lweny i kom jo Icrael. Ka mony ogeto matek, ci jo Piliciti guloyo jo Icrael, guneko jo ma mito romo alip aŋwen i bar lweny." 
1Samuel4:3 Ka lumony gudwogo i gony, ludoŋo pa jo Icrael guwacci, “Piŋo Rwot aye jo Piliciti guloyowa tin? Wek wacikel canduk me gicikke pa Rwot ki i Cilo, wek en Rwot obin obed i dyewa, olarwa ki i ciŋ lumerokwa-ni.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Ci lwak gucwalo dano Cilo, gukelo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot me mony ki kunnu, ma Rwot bedo-i wi komkerre malo ka wi lukerubi-ni, kun awobe pa Eli, Kopuni ki Finekaci, bene onoŋo gubino kacel ki canduk me gicikke pa Lubaŋa," 
1Samuel4:5 Ka canduk me gicikke pa Rwot obino i gony, jo Icrael ducu guwo ki daŋŋe matek, omiyo lobo bene omor." 
1Samuel4:6 Ka jo Piliciti guwinyo woo ki daŋŋe, ci guwacci, “Woo man madit ma a ki i gony pa jo Ibru-ni te lokke aŋo?” Ka guŋeyo ni canduk pa Rwot otyeko bino i gony pa jo Icrael," 
1Samuel4:7 ci jo Piliciti gubedo ki lworo, pien gubedo ka waco ni, “Lubaŋagi doŋ oo i gonygi.” Ci guwacci, “Oii, watum woko ba! Gin macalo man yam peya otimme." 
1Samuel4:8 Oii, watum woko ba! Aŋa ma bilarowa ki i ciŋ lubaŋa magi matek-ki? Meno gin aye lubaŋa ma yam gupwodo jo Ejipt ki lwak can mapol i tim." 
1Samuel4:9 Wucam co, wuka lakwu matek macalo co, wun jo Piliciti, wek pe wudok opii pa jo Ibru kit ma gin gubedo kwede opiiwu-ni. Wuka lakwu matek macalo co, ci wulweny.”" 
1Samuel4:10 Kit meno jo Piliciti gucako lweny, ci guloyo jo Icrael. Jo Icrael guriŋo woko, kun dano acel acel riŋo laro pacone. Nek obedo dwoŋ twatwal, pien Luicrael guto kunnu ma romo jo alip pyeradek ma woto ki tyengi." 
1Samuel4:11 Ki canduk pa Lubaŋa bene giyako woko; ki awobe pa Eli aryo, Kopuni ki Finekaci, ginekogi woko bene." 
1Samuel4:12 Dano mo ma Labenjamin oriŋo oa ki i waŋ mony, obino i Ci lo i nino meno kikome, ma boŋŋine oyec woko, wiye bene ojuko ki ŋom," 
1Samuel4:13 Ka en oo, onoŋo Eli obedo i wi komme i ŋet yo ka kuro lok, pien onoŋo cwinye oŋabbe aŋaba pi canduk pa Lubaŋa, Ka dano-nu obino odonyo i gaŋ, otito lokke, ci gaŋ ducu omor ki koko." 
1Samuel4:14 Ka Eli owinyo dwan ma mor ki koko-ni, owacci, “Man woo me ŋo?” Ka dano-nu orune, obino otito bot Eli." 
1Samuel4:15 Onoŋo Eli ditte romo mwaka pyeraboŋwen wiye aboro, ki wane bene ocor woko, omiyo doŋ pe neno piny." 
1Samuel4:16 Dano-nu owaco bot Eli ni, “An aye aa ki i waŋ mony, ariŋo aa ki i mony tin.” En ogamo ni, “Ci doŋ obedo niŋniŋ, latinna?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Lakellok-ki ogamo owacci, “Jo Icrael guriŋo woko ki i nyim jo Piliciti, dok bene gineko jo tuwa madwoŋ twatwal, ki canduk pa Lubaŋa bene giyako woko.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Ka otuco lok i kom canduk pa Lubaŋa, ci Eli opoto ataro ki i wi komme ma obedo kwede i ŋet dog gaŋ; ci ŋute otur, oto woko, pien onoŋo doŋ oti mada, dok kome dit. Obedo laŋolkop i Icrael pi mwaka pyeraŋwen." 
1Samuel4:19 I kare-nu ci-wode ma dako pa Finekaci onoŋo iye odoŋo, cok nywal. Ka owinyo lok ni canduk pa Lubaŋa doŋ giyako woko, dok ni kwarone ki cware guto woko, oturre piny, onywal, pien onoŋo mwoc ogoyo." 
1Samuel4:20 I kare ma en mito to woko, mon ma gucuŋ ka ŋete guwaco bote ni, “Pe ilwor, pien inywalo latin awobi.” Ento en pe ogamo doggi, pe oketo iye cwinye bene." 
1Samuel4:21 Ci ocako nyiŋ latin ni, Ikabod, kun wacci, “Deyo otyeko a woko ki i Icrael!” pien canduk pa Lubaŋa doŋ giyako woko, ki pi kwarone bene ki pi cware." 
1Samuel4:22 Dok owacci, “Deyo oa woko ki i Icrael, pien canduk pa Lubaŋa doŋ giyako woko.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Ka jo Piliciti guyako canduk pa Lubaŋa, gutiŋo ki i Ebenejer, gutero Acidod." 
1Samuel5:2 Ka dok jo Piliciti gukobo canduk pa Lubaŋa, gutero i ot pa jokgi Dagon, ci gucibo ka ŋet cal Dagon," 
1Samuel5:3 Orwone ka jo Acidod gua malo odiko con, ci nen, cal Dagon tye opoto aryeba cwiny i nyim canduk pa Rwot. Ci gutiŋo cal Dagon, gudwoko kakare," 
1Samuel5:4 Ento orwone doki ka gua odiko con, ci nen, cal Dagon tye opoto aryeba i nyim canduk pa Rwot. Wi cal Dagon ki bade ryoryo oŋun woko, opoto i kom larii doggola; cal Dagon odoŋ ma kome odul." 
1Samuel5:5 Man aye mumiyo ajwagi pa Dagon ki jo ducu ma gidonyo i ot pa Dagon pe dok ginyono larii doggola me ot pa Dagon ma i Acidod wa onyoo. 
1Samuel5:6 Ciŋ Rwot opoto mapek i kom jo Acidod ma omiyogi lworo madwoŋ; dok Rwot omiyogi akwota bur lebba, ki i lobo ma i ŋete ducu," 
1Samuel5:7 Ka jo Acidod guneno kit ma piny tye kwede, guwacci, “Canduk pa Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael pe obed i kinwa, pien ciŋe opoto mapek i komwa, ki i kom Dagon ma lubaŋawani.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Mumiyo gucwalo kwena, ci gucoko rwodi pa jo Piliciti ducu kacel kun giwacci, “Wabitimo canduk pa Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael niŋniŋ?” Ci gudok iye ni, “Wek canduk pa Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael giter wa i Gat.” Ci gutero canduk pa Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael kunnu." 
1Samuel5:9 Ento ka doŋ gitero kunnu, ci ciŋ Rwot opoto i kom gaŋ meno, obano komgi woko. Ci otimo jo Gat malit, omiyo akwota bur Lebba ocorre i kom litino wa ki ludito." 
1Samuel5:10 Dok gucwalo canduk pa Lubaŋa i Ekron. Ka canduk pa Lubaŋa oo i Ekron, ci jo Ekron gukok matek ni, “Gukelo canduk pa Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael kany me nekowa woko wa ki rokwa ducu.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Ci dok gicwalo lok, gucoko rwodi pa jo Piliciti ducu kacel kun giwacci, “Wucwal canduk pa Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael woko, wek odok gire i kabedone, wek pe obed ka nekowa kacel ki rokwa ducu.” Pien onoŋo to me nino ducu doŋ obano kom dano ma i gaŋ-ŋu ducu. Cin Rwot opoto kunnu mapek," 
1Samuel5:12 kun jo ma pe guto gubedo ki akwota bur lebba maraco i komgi. Ci koko me gaŋ meno oo wa malo i polo. 
1Samuel6:1 Canduk pa Rwot obedo i lobo pa jo Piliciti pi dwe abiro. 
1Samuel6:2 Lacen jo Piliciti gulwoŋo ajwagi ki lutyet ci guwacci, “Wabitimo canduk pa Rwot niŋniŋ? Wutit botwa kit gin ma myero wami ma wabidwoko kwede canduk i kabedone.”" 
1Samuel6:3 Ci guwacci, “Ka wucwalo canduk pa Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael;: pe wucwal nono, ento atikane wudwok ki gitum me tiŋo alii. Ci doŋ wubican ci wubinian gin mumiyo Rwot pe okwanyo ciŋe woko ki i komwu.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Gugamo ni, “Kit gin aŋo ma wabidwokke me gitum me tiŋo alii?” Gudok iye ni, “Cal jabu abic ma oporo kit akwota bur lebba, ki cal oyoo adeŋ abic muporo wel rwodi pa Lupiliciti; pien kit two gemo acel-lu onoŋo omakowu ducu, ki rwodiwu bene." 
1Samuel6:5 Pienno myero wutet cal akwota bur lebba ki cal oyoo adeŋ ma gitye ka tyeko lobowa woko-ni ki kela deyo i kom Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael; ci gwok nyo en bikwanyo cine woko ki i komwu, ki i kom lubaŋawu ki lobowu," 
1Samuel6:6 Pe wumi cwinywu obed tek kit macalo yam jo Ejipt ki Parao cwinygi obedo tek kwede. 
1Samuel6:7 Kombeddi doŋ wucikwany gadigadi manyen, ki megi dyaŋi aryo ma ginyeto ma yam peya gitiyo kwedgi me pur, ci wutwe dyaŋi i nyim gadigadi me ywayone, ento wuter litino dyaŋi paco, pe gubed kacel ki megigi." 
1Samuel6:8 Ci wukel canduk pa Rwot wuket i wi gadigadi, ci wuket cal jabu ma wuteto-ni i canduk mukene ka ŋete, ma wubidwoko bo te macalo tyer me tiŋo alii. Ka doŋ wucwal, ociti." 
1Samuel6:9 Ci doŋ wunen kore; ka ce ocito okemo yo tugi, wa i Bet-cemec, ci Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael aye okelo can man madit i komwa; ento ka pe kit meno ci miyo waneyo ni pe ciŋe aye ma obedo ka pwodowa; meno otimme i komwa pi keckom.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Jo-nu gutimo kit meno; gukwanyo megi dyaŋi aryo ma ginyeto, gutweyogi i nyim gadagadi, ci guloro wi litinogi woko paco." 
1Samuel6:11 Ci gucibo canduk pa Rwot i wi gadigadi, kacel ki canduk mukene ki cal oyoo adeŋ ma giteto ki jabu, ki cal akwota bur lebbagi." 
1Samuel6:12 Dyaŋi gucito gukemo yo atir ma dok yo tuŋ Bet-cemec, kun lubo yo ger madit. Giwoto kun gikok, pe gumedo ki dok yo tuŋ acuc nyo yo tuŋ acam, kun rwodi pa jo Piliciti gilubo korgi, nio ka guo kwede wa i waŋ lobo me Betcemec." 
1Samuel6:13 Onoŋo jo Bet-cemec gitye ka kayo nanogi i nota. Ka gutiŋo wangi ci guneno canduk pa Rwot, cwinygi obedo yom pi nenone." 
1Samuel6:14 Gadigadi obino wa i poto pa Yocwa ma Labet-cemec, ci ocuŋ kenyo, Onoŋo kidi madit tye kenyo; ci gubaro gadigadi woko me yen, gutyero dyaŋi me gitum awaŋa bot Rwot." 
1Samuel6:15 Ka dok Lulevi gutero canduk pa Rwot ki canduk mukene ma onoŋo tye ka ŋete-ni, ka ma onoŋo tye iye cal jabu, ci guketogi i wi kidi madit-ti. Ci jo Bet-cemec gutyero gitum awaŋa ki gitum mukene mogo bot Rwot i nino meno." 
1Samuel6:16 Ka rwodi pa jo Piliciti abic-ci guneno kite, ci gudok Ekron i nino meno." 
1Samuel6:17 Cal akwota bur lebba me jabu ma jo Piliciti gudwoko bot Rwot me gityer me tino alii obedo kit man; acel pa jo Acidod, acel pa jo Gaja, acel pa jo Acikelon, acel pa jo Gat, acel pa jo Ekron." 
1Samuel6:18 Gucwalo cal oyoo adeŋ me jabu bene muporo wei gaŋ ducu pa jo Piliciti ma rwodigi abic ‘loyo-ni, gaŋi ma gicelogi ki cel matego, wa ki gaŋi matitino ma pe girumogi ki cel, Kidi madit ma yam giketo canduk pa Rwot ka ŋete-ni en aye caden o wa i nino man; pud tye i poto pa Yocwa Labetcemec." 
1Samuel6:19 Rwot oneko jo Bet-cemec mogo, pien guŋiyo i canduk pa Rwot. Oneko jo pyerabiro i kingi, ci dano gukumo, pien Rwot onekojo mapol i kingi." 
1Samuel6:20 Ka dok jo Bet-cemec guwacci, “Aŋa ma twero cuŋ i nyim Rwot ma Lubaŋa maleŋ-ŋi? Dok ka bia ki botwa, ci bicito bot jo mene?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Pi meno gucwalo lukwena bot jo ma gibedo i Kiriat-jearim, kun giwaco ni, “Jo Piliciti doŋ gudwoko canduk pa Rwot. Wubin, wuter botwu kunnu.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Ci jo Kiriat-jearim gucito guomo can duk pa Rwot, gutero i ot pa Abinadab ma i wi got. Ci gukwero wode Eleajar pi gwokone." 
1Samuel7:2 Canduk pa Rwot obedo i Kiriajearim pi kare malac ma mito romo mwaka pyeraryo, ci jo me otpa Icrael ducu gucako dwogo bot Rwot ki kumo." 
1Samuel7:3 Ci Camuel owaco bot jo Icrael ni, “Ka doŋ wudwogo bot Rwot ki cwinywu ducu, ci doŋ wubol lwak lubaŋa pa lurok ki cal jogi ma mon-gu woko ki i kinwu, wek cwinywu okem bot Rwot atir kun wuworo en keken, cien bilarowu ki i ciŋ jo Piliciti.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Kit meno jo Icrael gubolo lwak cal jok Baal ki cal jogi ma mon-gu ma tye botgi-ni woko, ci gucako woro Rwot keken." 
1Samuel7:5 Camuel dok owacci, “Wucok jo Icrael ducu i Mijpa ci abilego piwu bot Rwot.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Mumiyo dano gucokke i Mijpa ka dok gutwomo pii ci guonyo piny i nyim Rwot macalo gityer, ci guri kec i nino meno kun giwacci, “Watimo bal i nyim Rwot.” Dok Camuel oŋolo kop pa jo Icrael pigi i Mijpa," 
1Samuel7:7 I kare meno ka jo Piliciti guwinyo ni jo Icrael gucokke i Mijpa, ci rwodi pa jo Piliciti gucito ka lweny i kom jo Icrael. Ka jo Icrael guwinyo, ci gubedo ki lworo i kom jo Piliciti." 
1Samuel7:8 Ci jo Icrael guwaco bot Camuel ni, “Pe iwek koko piwa bot Rwot Lubaŋawa wek olarwa ki i ciŋ jo Piliciti.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Camuel okwanyo latin romo ma pud dot, otyero bot Rwot obed gitum ma giwaŋo ki berre. Ka Camuel okok kwede bot Rwot pi jo Icrael, ci Rwot owinyo kokone." 
1Samuel7:10 I kare ma Camuel tye ka tyero gitum awaŋa, jo Piliciti gucako bino cok ka lweny i kom jo Icrael; ento Rwot omor macalo mor kot ki dwan madit i nino meno i kom jo Piliciti, obano komgi woko; ci jo Icrael guryemogi woko ki i nyimgi." 
1Samuel7:11 Jo Icrael gumol woko ki i Mijpa, guryemo kor jo Piliciti, gurwadogi woko nio wa i te Bet-kar." 
1Samuel7:12 Lacen Camuel okwanyo got, ocibo ocuŋ i kin Mijpa ki Jecana, ci ocako nyiŋe Ebenejer, kun owacci, “Rwot obedo ka konyowa o wa kany.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Guloyo jo Piliciti kit meno; pe dok gudonyo i lobo pa jo Icrael. Rwot obedo ka lweny i kom jo Piliciti i kare pa Camuel ducu," 
1Samuel7:14 Gaŋi ducu ma yam jo Piliciti gumayo woko ki bot jo Icrael gidwokogi bot jo Icrael, cakke wa i Ekron o kwede i Gat. Jo Icrael gularo lobogi ki i ciŋ jo Piliciti i kare-nu. Kuc onoŋo tye i kinjo Icraelkijo Amor bene," 
1Samuel7:15 Camuel oŋolo kop pa jo Icrael i kare me kwone ducu," 
1Samuel7:16 Yam woto kun wirre i kin Betel ki Gilgal ki Mijpa mwaka ki mwaka kun ŋolo kop pa jo Icrael i kabedo meno ducu," 
1Samuel7:17 Ka doŋ lokke dok Rama, pien gaŋŋe onoŋo tye kunnu. En ŋolo kop pa jo Icrael kunnu bene, dok ocano keno tyer pi Rwot kunnu." 
1Samuel8:1 I kare ma Camuel doŋ oti woko, oketo awobene gubedo luŋolkop pa jo Icrael." 
1Samuel8:2 Nyiŋ wode me kayone Joel, ki nyiŋ wode me aryone Abija; vam gubedo luŋolkop ki i Beer-ceba,’" 
1Samuel8:2 Nyiŋ wode me kayone Joel, ki nyiŋ wode me aryone Abija; vam gubedo luŋolkop ki i Beer-ceba,’" 
1Samuel8:3 Ento awobene pe gulubo kite; gubwoto woko, gudok ka yenyo lim. Gubedo ka gamo lim me wilo loyo kop, kun gibalo te pido pa dano woko." 
1Samuel8:4 Ci ludoŋo pa jo Icrael ducu gucokke kacel bot Camuel i Rama," 
1Samuel8:5 guwaco bote ni, “Nen ba, in doŋ iti woko, dok awobeni pe gilubo kiti. In iket kabaka piwa wek en aye olowa, macalo tye i rok mukene ducu.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Ento lok meno pe oyomo i Camuel ka guwacci, “Miniwa kabaka wek en aye olowa.” Ka Camuel ocako lego Rwot." 
1Samuel8:7 Ci Rwot owaco bot Camuel ni, “Winy dog lwak i gin ducu ma guwaco boti; pien gin pe gukwero in, ento gukwero an, ni pe abed kabaka ma loyogi." 
1Samuel8:8 Kit tim ducu ma gubedo ka timone i koma cakke i nina ma yam akwanyogi iye ki i Ejipt o kwede wa tin, ma gibwoto an gidok ka woro lubaŋa mukene, gitye ka timone i komi bene kit meno," 
1Samuel8:9 Koni doŋ koŋ iwiny doggi; lok acel keken, ber ilok kwedgi kun inyuto botgi atyer kit ma kabaka ma biloyogi bibedo kwede.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Kit meno Camuel otito lok pa Rwot ducu bot lwak ma gulego kaba ka ki bote," 
1Samuel8:11 Owacci, “Man aye bibedo kit ma kabaka biloyowu kwede; en bitero awobewu ci ketogi i gadigadine me lweny, ki me bedo wegi aguragurane, ki jo ma riŋo i nyim gadigadine." 
1Samuel8:12 Dok en biketo ludito wi monnye ma loyo dano alip, ki ma loyo dano pyerabic, ki jo mukene pi puro potone ki pi kayo kacce, ki pi teto jami lwennye ki jami kom gadigadine." 
1Samuel8:13 En bitero anyirawu ka rubo moo ma ŋwece kur, ki pi tedo cam ki pi tedo mugati." 
1Samuel8:14 En bi mayo pottiwu mabecone woko, ki poto olokwu ki poto jeituni, bitiŋo mi yo bot luticce." 
1Samuel8:15 Bikwanyo dul acel me apar me kalwu ki me olokwu, ci tiŋo miyo bot ludito ticce ki bot luticce mukene." 
1Samuel8:16 Bitero opiiwu ki aŋecawu, ki dyaŋiwu ki kanawu mabecone, ci biketogi ka tiyo ticce." 
1Samuel8:17 En bitero dul acel me apar me romiwu ki dyegiwu, ci doŋ wubibedo opiine." 
1Samuel8:18 I kare meno wubikok giwu i kom kabakawu, ma wun aye wuyero piwu kenwu; ento Rwot pe bidok iye botwu i nino meno.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Ento dano gukwero winyo dog Camuel, guwaco bote ni, “Pe; wan wabibedo ki kabaka ma loyowa," 
1Samuel8:20 wek wan bene wabed macalo rok mukene ducu, wek kabakawa aye olowa, ci okat anyim pi telo wiwa ki ka lweny piwa i mony.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Ka Camuel otyeko winyo lok pa lwak ducu, ci odwoko lokke bot Rwot." 
1Samuel8:22 Ka Rwot dok owaco bot Camuel ni, “Winy doggi, imigi kabaka,” Camuel dok owaco bot jo Icrael ni; “Doŋ wuciti, ŋat acel acel odok i gaŋŋe.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Yam tye dano mo ma Labenjamin ma nyiŋe Kic, wod pa Abiel, ma wod pa Jeror, wod pa Bekorat, wod pa Apia, ma Labenjamin, dano ma lalonyo." 
1Samuel9:2 Onoŋo tye ki wode ma nyiŋe Caulo, awobi ma oputte ma mwonya, ma pe tye dano mo ma i kin jo Icrael ducu ma mwonya makato en; odono mabor makato dano ducu cakke ki i wi gwoke dok kwede malo," 
1Samuel9:3 I kare mo megi kana pa Kic won Caulo gurwenyo, ci Kic owaco bot wode Caulo ni, “Ter latic mo acel, ci wua wucit ka yenyo kana.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Ka gukato guwok i lobo godi me Epraim, ci gubaro dye lobo Calica, pe gunoŋo komgi. Ka dok gukato guwok i lobo Caalim, ento pe onoŋo gitye kenyo, Ka dok gukato gubaro dye lobo Benjamin, ento pe gunonogi." 
1Samuel9:5 Ka guo i lobo Jup, Caulo owaco bot latic ma onoŋo gitye kwede-ni ni, “Bin wadok cen, wek wora pe ocak paro piwa, kun weko paro pi kana.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Ento en odok iye ni, “Nen, dano pa Lubaŋa tye i gaŋ man, en dano ma giworo; gin ducu ma en waco bedo me ada, Wek koŋ wacit kunnu; gwok en bitito botwa lok mo i kom wot ma watye iye-ni.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Ento Caulo owaco bot laticce ni, “Ka wacito bote, wabiterre gin aŋo? Pien kwon doŋ otum woko ki i kicaawa, dok mot mo pe ma wabitero bot dano pa Lubaŋa ca,”" 
1Samuel9:8 Laticce dok ogamo doge ni, “Nen kany, atye ki dul acel me aŋwen me cekel me ryal; abimiyo bot dano pa Lubaŋa wek onyut botwa yo,”" 
1Samuel9:9 (I kare pa jo Icrael macon, ka dano mo yam ci to ka penyo dog Lubaŋa ci wacci, “Bin, wek wacit bot lanen-piny;” pien dano ma gilwoŋo ni lanebi i kare man, yam con gilwoŋo ni dano ma neno piny.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Ci Caulo owaco bot laticce ni, “Iwaco maber, Bin wek waciti.” Kit meno gucako ci to i gaŋ ka ma yam dano pa Lubaŋa tye iye-ni." 
1Samuel9:11 I kare ma giito kor got pi donyo i gaŋ ci gurwatte ki anyira ma gicito ka twomo pii, ci gupenyogi ni, “Lanenpiny tye kany?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Gugamo ni, “En tye. Nen, tye i nyimwa ca, Wurune oyot; pud obino i gaŋ kombeddi, pien tin dano tye ka tyero gityer i kabedo me woro Lubaŋa ma tye i wi got." 
1Samuel9:13 Ka wucito, wudonyo i gaŋ, ci wunono kome cut, ma noŋo peya ocito ka cam i wi got. Pien dano peya gibicam ka en peya obino, nio ka en olego gum i kom gitum; ka doŋ jo ma gilwonogi gicako cam. Wun doŋ wuciti, ci wubirwatte kwede oyotoyot.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Kit meno gumedde ki ito malo wa i gaŋ, Ka gitye ka donyo i gaŋ, ci guneno Camuel; tye ka bino tun botgi kun onoŋo obecito i kabedo ma i wi got-ti." 
1Samuel9:15 Onoŋo Rwot onyuto lok bot Camuel ma pud onoŋo Caulo odon ki nino acel me bino bote kun wacci," 
1Samuel9:16 “Diki ka onyoo abicwalo boti dano mo ma oa ki i lobo pa jo Benjamin, ci ibiwiro en ki moo wek obed laker ma loyo jona Icrael. En bilaro jona ki i ciŋ jo Piliciti; pien atyeko neno aroma pa jona, kokogi doŋ oo bota.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Ka Camuel oneno Caulo, Rwot otito bote ni, “Man aye dano ma onoŋo atitti pire-ni. En aye biloyo lwakka.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Ka Caulo doŋ oo cok bot Camuel i dog gaŋ, openye ni, “Titta ba, ot pa lanenpiny tye kwene?”" 
1Samuel9:19 Camuel ogamo ni, “An aye lanen-piny. Cit itel nyima nio i kabedo me woro Lubaŋa ma i wi got, pien ibicam kweda kacel tin, ka odiko abiweki icito, dok abititti lok ducu ma tye i cwinyi," 
1Samuel9:20 Lok i kom kana ma gurwenyo okato nino adek-ki, pe cwinyi obed ka paro pigi, pien gityeko nonogi. Gin ma pire mit i Icrael-li ducu pa aŋa? Pe gin ducu meri? Gin ducu pe me ot pa woru?”" 
1Samuel9:21 Caulo ogamo ni, “An gira Labenjamin, ma kakawa tidi twatwal i kin jo Icrael. Doggolawa onyono anyona ki i kin doggola ducu pa jo Benjamin. Ci piŋo ilokka lok ma rom meno?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Camuel otero Caulo ki laticce, okelogi i kicika, ka omiyogi kabedo me dito makato jo ma gilwonogi ducu, ma giromo jo pyeradek." 
1Samuel9:23 Ci Camuel owacobot latedo ni, “Kel wan pok ma nanen amini, kun aciki ni iket pat-ti.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Latedo okwanyo em ki bam, aciba i nyim Caulo, ci Camuel owaco bot Caulo ni, “Nen, gin ma gikano piri gityeko cibone i nyimi. Cam; pien onoŋo gikano piri nio wa i kare ma giciko, wek icam kacel ki welo.” Kit meno Caulo ocamo kacel ki Camuel i nina-nu," 
1Samuel9:25 Ka doŋ gulor gudwogo piny ki i kabedo ma i wi got, ci gucito i gaŋ. Gipeto kabuto pa Caulo malo i wi at, ci obuto piny, onino wako." 
1Samuel9:26 Kate piny oyabbe, Cainuel olwoŋo Caulo ma onoŋo pud tye malo i wi at kun wacci, “A malo, wek doŋ alwoki, iciti.” Caulo aa malo, ci en ki Camuel gucito i yo gin aryo, Camuel owiro Caulo me bedo kabaka" 
1Samuel9:27 Ka onoŋo gitye ka lor piny, ma doŋ guo i agikki gaŋ, Camuel owaco bot Caulo ni, “Wac ki laticci ni okat ocit i nyimwa, Ka doŋ okato anyim, ci icuŋ kany manok, wek amiyi iŋe lok pa Lubaŋa.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Ci Camuel okwanyo kicere me moo, oonyo i wi Caulo, amate kun noto leme ci owacci, “Rwot doŋ oonyo moo i komi wek ibed laker ma loyo lwakke jo Icrael. In ibiloyo lwak pa Rwot, ci ibilarogi ki i ciŋ lumerokgi ma gurumogi-ni. Man aye bibedo gin ma nyuto bati ni Rwot doŋ owiri me bedo laker ma loyo gipinnye:" 
1Samuel10:2 Ka ibia wako ki bata tin, ci ibirwatte ki co aryo i ŋet lyel pa Lakeri ma i Jelja, i lobo Benjamin, Gibiwaco bati ni, ni, ‘Kana ma ibedo ka yenyogi-ni doŋ ginoŋogi, dok kombeddi cwiny woru doŋ aa wako ki i kom kana, doŋ tye ka paro piwu kun baka doge ni, “Atim gin aŋo pi woda-ni?”," 
1Samuel10:3 Dok ibimedde ka wot anyim ka laki kenya, ci ibio i te kworo me. Tabor; ci co adek ma gicito i Betel bot Lubaŋa gibirwatte kwedi kunnu, kun ŋat acel otiŋo litino dyegi adek, ŋat acel otiŋo mugati adek, ŋat acel otiŋo opiru koŋo vino." 
1Samuel10:4 Gin gibimoti, ci gibimini mugati aryo, in ibigamo, ki i ciŋgi." 
1Samuel10:5 Ka lacen ibio i Gibea-eloim, ka ma cel gogo mony pa jo Piliciti tye iye-ni, Ka ibidonyo i gaŋ kunnu, ibirwatte ki lwak lunebi ma gibino gilor piny kun gia ki i kabedo me woro Lubaŋa ma i wi got, ma gitye ki dano ma gigoyo naŋa ki ajaa ki nyamulere ki opuk ma gitelo kwede nyimgi, kun lunebi giwoto ki tito lok pa Lubaŋa," 
1Samuel10:6 Ci Cwiny pa Rwot bibino i komi ki tek, ci ibicako tito lok pa Lubaŋa kacel kwedgi, ci ibilokke idoko dano mapat." 
1Samuel10:7 Ka lanyut meno ducu doŋ otimme i komi ci doŋ icak timo gin ma ciŋi orwatte kwede, pien noŋo Lubaŋa tye kwedi." 
1Samuel10:8 In icit ikwon nyima i Gilgal; nen, abibino bati ka tyero gitum awaŋa ki gityer lakwecwiny lbikuro nino abiro nio ka abio bati ka nyu to bati gin ma myero iti.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Ka Caulo oloko ŋeye pi weka Camuel, Lubaŋa omine kit cwiny mapat; ci lanyut meno gutimme ducu i nino meno," 
1Samuel10:10 Ka guo i Gibea, ci nen, lwak lunebi gurwatte kwede; ci Cwiny pa Lubaŋa obino i kome ki tek, ci ocako tito lok pa Lubaŋa i kingi," 
1Samuel10:11 Ka jo ma yam gineye guneno kit ma en tito kwede lok pa Lubaŋa kacel ki lunebi, ci dano gucako lok kekengi ni, “Gin aŋo ma opoto i kom wod pa Kic? Caulo bene doŋ tye i kin lunebi?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Ci dano mo me kunnu ogamo ni, “Onoŋo wongi kono aŋa?” Mumiyo odoko carolok abola ni, “Caulo bene doŋ tye i kin lunebi?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Ka doŋ otyeko tito lok pa Lubaŋa ci ocito i kabedo me woro Lubaŋa ma i wi got," 
1Samuel10:14 Omin won Caulo openyo en ki laticce ni, “Onoŋo wucito wa kwene?” Ci ogamo ni, “Wacito ka yenyo kana; ka waneno ni pe gibinoŋŋe, ci wacito wa bot Camuel.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Ci omin won Caulo dok owacci, “Koŋ itit bota gin ma Camuel owaco boti mono.”" 
1Samuel10:16 Ci Caulo owaco bot omin wonne-ni ni, “Otito botwa atir ni kana doŋ ginoŋo.” Ento pe otito lok me camo ker ma onoŋo Camuel oloko bote-ni," 
1Samuel10:17 I kare-nu Camuel olwoŋo lwak ocokke kacel bot Rwot i Mijpa. 
1Samuel10:18 Ka owaco bot ŋo Icrael ni, “Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco kit man ni, ‘Yam akwanyo jo Icrael ki i Ejipt, alarowu ki i ciŋ jo Ejipt ki i ciŋ Luker ducu ma gubedo ka unowu.’" 
1Samuel10:19 Ento tin wutyeko kwero Lubaŋawu wo ko ma bedo ka larowu ki i can ki ayelawu ducu, ci doŋ wuwacci, ‘Pe kumeno; ento imiwa kabaka ma biloyowa.’ Doŋ wubin wucun i nyim Rwot kun wurye kaka ki kaka ki doggola ki doggola.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Camuel okelo kaka ma i Icrael ducu cok, ci kwir okwanyo kaka pa Benjamin." 
1Samuel10:21 Okelo kaka pa Benjamin cok doggola ki doggola, ci kwir okwanyo doggola pa jo Matri. Ka lacen doŋ okelo doggola pa jo Matri cok ki acel acel, ci kwir okwanyo Caulo wod pa Kic, Ento ka gibedo ka yenye, pe ginoŋo kome," 
1Samuel10:22 Mumiyo gucito, gupenyo dog Rwot doki ni, “Dano-nu tika obino kany?” Ci Rwot ogamo ni, “Nen, tye okanne i kin jami.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Guriŋo gucito, guomo en ki kunnu, Ka ocuŋ i dye lwak, nen, odono mabor makato dano ducu, cakke ki i wi gwoke dok kwede malo," 
1Samuel10:24 Ci Camuel owaco bot lwak ducu ni, “Doŋ wuneno ŋat ma Rwot oyero-ni? Pe tye ŋatti mo i kin wun lwak ducu ma cal kwede.” Ci lwak ducu gudaŋŋe ki woo ni, “Kabaka obed kwo nakanaka!”" 
1Samuel10:25 Camuel dok otito bot lwak kit cik ma myero me aluba ka kaba ka biloyogi; ci ocoyogi i buk, ka opyelo i nyim Rwot, Lacen Camuel ocwalo lwak woko ducu, wek ŋat acel acel odok i pacone," 
1Samuel10:26 Caulo bene odok i pacone i Gibea. Jo mo go ma twoni oteka bene gucito kwede, gin jo ma Lubaŋa ogudo cwinygi," 
1Samuel10:27 Ento jo mogo ma kitgi obedo atata guwacci, “Dano-ni bilarowa niŋniŋ?” Gubedo ka caye, pe gumedo ki tero mot mo bote." 
1Samuel11:1 Ka dwe acel doŋ okato, Nakac ma jo Ammon ocito orumo gaŋ me Jabec-gilead ki monnye; ci jo ducu ma i Jabec guwaco bot Nakac ni, “Ber icikke kwedwa, ci wabidoko luticci.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Ento Nakac ogamo doggi ni, “Abicikke kwedwu kit man: abikolo wanwu tuŋ acuc woko ducu, wek aket ki lewic i kom jo Icrael ducu.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Ludoŋo ma i Jabec gugamo kun giwacci, “Koŋ imiwa nino abiro wek wacwal lukwena i lobo Icrael ducu, Ka pe onen ŋatti mo ma larowa, ci wabimine kenwa boti.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Ka lukwena gubino i Gibea i gaŋ pa Caulo, gutito lokke bot lwak; ci lwak ducu guwo ki koko matek." 
1Samuel11:5 I kare meno onoŋo Caulo oa ki i poto, obedo ka lubo ŋe twoni pur, ci owacci, “Aŋo mutimme? Piŋo dano tye ka koko?” Ci gititte lok kom jo Jabec," 
1Samuel11:6 Ka Caulo owinyo lokke, ci Cwiny pa Lubaŋa obino ki tek i kome, kun kiniga omake madwoŋ," 
1Samuel11:7 Okwanyo twoni pur aryo, otoŋogi, matitino, ci ocwalo ‘I cin lukwena oromo kwede i lobo Icrael ducu kun giwaco ni, “Dano mo ma pe obino olubo kor Caulo ki Camuel, gibitimo twon purre kit menol” Lworo omako dano matek pi Rwot, mumiyo gumol gubino ki cwiny acel." 
1Samuel11:8 Ka Caulo oryeyo lwak i Bejek, okwanogi, ci jo Icrael guromo alip miya adek, ki jo Juda guromo alip pyeradek." 
1Samuel11:9 Ci guwaco bot lukwena ma gubino botgi ni, “Wuwac bot jo Jabec-gilead ni, ‘Dikki ka cen odoko lyet gibilarowu.’ ” Ka lukwena ‘gucito gutito bot jo Jabec, cwinygi obedo yom matek," 
1Samuel11:10 En aye omiyo jo Jabec guwaco bot jo Ammon ni, “Wabimine kenwa di ki i ciŋwu, ci wubitimowa kit ma wumito ducu.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Orwone Caulo opo ko mony i buca adek; ci gucoro i dye gony pa jo Ammon kwarpiny, gucako nekogi o wa i dyeceŋ, Jo ma gubwotte guket woko, pe inoŋo jo aryo ma gudoŋ kacel." 
1Samuel11:12 Ka otum, lwak owaco bot Camuel ni, “Aŋagi ma yam owacci, ‘Caulo aye biloyowa bo?’ Gikel jo-nu wek wanekgi woko.”" 
1Samuel11:13 Ento Caulo ogamo ni, “Pe tin gineko iye dano mo, pien tin aye Rwot olaro jo Icrael.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Ka Camuel dok owaco bot lwak ni, “Wubin, wacitu i Gilgal, wek wacikweru ker odoco kunnu.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Mumiyo lwak ducu gucito i Gilgal, ci guketo Caulo me bedo kabaka i nyim Rwot kunnu. Gutyero gityer lakwecwiny kunnu i nyim Rwot, ci Caulo ki jo Icrael ducu cwinygi obedo yom mada." 
1Samuel12:1 Camuel owaco bot jo Icrael ducu ni, “Nen, doŋ atyeko winyo dogwu i lok ducu ma wuwaco bota; doŋ amiyowu kabaka me loyowu." 
1Samuel12:2 Koni doŋ wunen, kabaka tye ka telo wiwu. An doŋ ati woko ma wiya ki lwar; dok, wunen, awobena bene gitye kwedwu. Abedo ka tic i nyimwu cakke wa ka tinona o kwede wa onyoo." 
1Samuel12:3 An atye ene, wutit lok ma mako koma i nyim Rwot ki i nyim lakerre ma giwiro ki moo, Aŋa ma akwanyo twonne? Aŋa ma akwanyo kanane? Nyo aŋa ma abumo jamine? Aŋa ma yam aburo? Nyo aŋa ma yam agamo lim me wilo loyo kop ki i ciŋe me laum waŋa? Wutit lok ma mako koma, ci abidwoko waŋe botwu.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Gugamo ni, “In yam pe ibumo jamiwa mo, kadi burowa, nyo gamo jami mo ki i ciŋ dano mo.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Ci owaco botgi ni, “Rwot aye lacaden i komwu, ki lakerre ma giwiro ki moo bene aye lacaden tin ma moko ni, pe wunono gin mo i ciŋa.” Gugamo ni, “En aye caden.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Camuel dok owaco bot lwak ni, “Rwot aye caden ma yam oyero Moses ki Aron ci okwanyo kwarowa woko ki i Ejipt." 
1Samuel12:7 Mumiyo kombeddi doŋ wucuŋ mot, wek apid kop i komwu i nyim Rwot i kom tim ducu ma Rwot olarowu kwede, ma yam otimo piwu ki pi kwarowu." 
1Samuel12:8 Ka yam Yakobo ki jone gucito i Ejipt, ci jo Ejipt gubwoyogi ki tek, mumi yo kwarowu gukok bot Rwot. Ka doŋ Rwot ocwalo Moses ki Aron ma gukwanyo kwarowu ki i Ejipt ci gumiyogi gubedo i kabedo man." 
1Samuel12:9 Ento wigi ocako wil i kom Rwot Lubaŋagi woko; ci omiyogi i ciŋ Cicera ma lawimony pa Jabin, kabaka me Kajor, ki i ciŋ jo Piliciti, ki i ciŋ kabaka me Moab, ci gucako lweny i komgi." 
1Samuel12:10 Ci gukok bot Rwot kun giwacci, ‘Wan doŋ wabalo, pien wabwoto Rwot woko, waworo jogi Baal ki jogi ma mon-gu, Ento doŋ ilarwa ki i cin lukworwa, ci wabiworo in keken.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Ka dok Rwot ocwalo Jerubaal ki Barak, ki Jeputa ki Camuel, olarowu ki i ciŋ lumerokwu tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi, ci wubedo mot ki kuc." 
1Samuel12:12 Lacen ka wuneno ni Nakac kabaka pa jo Ammon obino ka lweny i komwu, ci wuwaco bota ni, ‘Pe kumeno; ento kabaka aye biloyowa,’ ma onoŋo Rwot Lubaŋawu aye kabakawu." 
1Samuel12:13 Kombeddi doŋ wunen kabakawu ma wuyero-ni, ma yam wupenya pireni. Nen, Rwot doŋ oketo kabaka ma loyowu." 
1Samuel12:14 Ka ce wubilworo Rwot ci wutiyo bote kun wuwinyo doge, ma kun pe wujemo nyo wukwero cik pa Rwot woko, dok ka wun ki kabakawu ma loyowu-ni ce wubilubo kor Rwot Lubaŋawu, ci bibedo ber." 
1Samuel12:15 Ento ka’ ce pe wubiwinyo dog Rwot, nyo wujemo ma wukwero cik pa Rwot woko, ci ciŋ Rwot bipoto i komwu ki i kom kabakawu," 
1Samuel12:16 Kombeddi wun doŋ wucuŋ mot wek wunen kit gin madit ma Rwot bitiyo i nyimwu," 
1Samuel12:17 Kare-ni kare me kayo ŋano; pe kumeno? Doŋ an abilego Rwot wek ocwal kot ma mor kun cwer kwede, ci wubineyo dok wubineno kit ma balwu dit kwede ma wutimo i nyim Rwot pi penyo pi kabaka piwu kenwu.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Kit meno Camuel olego Rwot, ci Rwot ocwalo kot ma mor kun cwer kwede i nino meno; mumiyo lwak ducu gubedo ki lworo madwoŋ mada i kom Rwot ki i kom Camuel." 
1Samuel12:19 Ci lwak ducu guwaco bot Camuel ni, “Ladit, leg piwa bot Rwot Lubaŋani wek pe wato, pien wapoŋo wi bal wa ki tim marac man me penyo pi kabaka piwa kenwa.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Ci Camuel owaco bot lwak ni, “Pe wulwor, Wutyeko timo gin maraco magi ducu, ento pe dok wulokke wubarre woko ki ka lubo kor Rwot, ento doŋ wuti bot Rwot ki cwinywu ducu." 
1Samuel12:21 Pe wulokke wubarre woko wudok ka lubo kor gin atata ma pe konyo, ma pe laro dano mo, pien gin atata." 
1Samuel12:22 Pien Rwot pe bibolo lwakke woko ata, pi nyiŋe madit-ti keken, pien yomcwiny oa ki i i Rwot ma oketowu me bedo jone kikome," 
1Samuel12:23 Dok bene ki tuŋ bota pe myero atim bal bot Rwot me weko lego piwu; dok abipwonyowu kit me lubo yo atir ki maber. 
1Samuel12:24 Wulwor Rwot keken, dok wuti bote ki gen madwoŋ ki cwinywu ducu; pienno wubedo ka tamo kit gin madito ma yam Rwot obedo ka tiyone piwu." 
1Samuel12:25 Ento ka pud wumedde ka timo tim maraco, ci gibijwerowu woko, wun kacel ki kabakawu.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Caulo onoŋo tye ki mwaka kare ma ocamo ker ci oloyo jo Icrael pi mwakaiye aryo. 
1Samuel13:2 Caulo oyero jo Icrael alip adek; jo alip aryo gubedo bote i Mikmac ki i lobo godi me Betel, ki alip acel gubedo bot Yonacan i Gibea i lobo Benjamin. Jo mudoŋ ocwalogi paco, ni ŋat acel acel odok i kemane," 
1Samuel13:3 Yonacan oloyo jo Piliciti i cel gogo monygi mo ma tye i Geba, ci jo Piliciti guwinyo pire. Caulo okuto tum okwanne oromo lobo ducu kun wacci, “Wek jo Ibru ducu guwiny.”" 
1Samuel13:4 Ci jo Icrael ducu guwinyo ka giwaco ni, Caulo oloyo jo Piliciti i cel gogo monygi, dok bene ni, nyiŋ jo Icrael odoko nwe lituny bot jo Piliciti. Ci gilwoŋo lwak gucokke bot Caulo i Gilgal." 
1Samuel13:5 Jo Piliciti gurwayo ka lweny ki jo Icrael ki gadigadi lweny alip pyeradek, ki wegi aguragura alip abicel, ki lwak mony madwoŋ macalo kweyo me dog nam, Gubino guguro gonygi i Mikmac ma tye i ŋet Bet-awen yo tun wokceŋ." 
1Samuel13:6 Ka jo Icrael guneno ni doŋ gidinogi matek ma doŋ gitye marac twatwal, ci dano gukanne i boro ki i bur, ki i kin godi ki i lyel ki i bur pii-gu." 
1Samuel13:7 Jo mogo guŋolo kulu Jordan, gucito wa i lobo Gad ki Gilead, Onoŋo Caulo pud tye i Gilgal, ci lwak ducu gilubo kore ki myelkom." 
1Samuel13:8 Okuro pi nino abiro ma onoŋo Camuel ociko-ni; ento Camuel pe obino i Gilgal, ci lwak ocako ket woko ki bot Caulo." 
1Samuel13:9 Mumiyo Caulo owacci, “Wukella gitum awaŋa kany, ki gityer lakwecwiny.” Ci otyero gitum awaŋa." 
1Samuel13:10 Ka onoŋo pud otyeko tyero gitum awaŋa, ci nen, Camuel oturo kibi no cut. Ka Caulo okato woko ka rwatte kwede ki mote," 
1Samuel13:11 Camuel owaco bo te ni, “Ibedo ka timo gin aŋo?” Caulo ogamo ni, “Ka aneno ni dano gucako ket woko ki bota, dok bene pe ibino i nino ma onoŋo iciko-ni, kun jo Piliciti doŋ gurwayo woko cok ki Mi kmac," 
1Samuel13:12 ci atamo ni, ‘Jo Piliciti doŋ gibipoto i koma ki i Gilgal kany, ma peya ataŋo ciŋa akwayo Rwot;’ ci doŋ aturre pira kena ka tyero gitum awaŋa.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Ci Camuel owaco bot Caulo ni, “Itimo gin me miŋo keken. In pe igwoko cik pa Rwot Lubaŋani ma yam ociki kwede; kono onoŋo igwoko, kono Lubaŋa omoko kerri me loyo Icrael matwal." 
1Samuel13:14 Ento kombeddi kerri doŋ pe bicuŋ; Rwot doŋ otyeko yero dano ma bitimo gin ma cwinye mito. Dok Rwot oketo en me bedo laker ma loyo lwakke, pien in pe igwoko gin ma Rwot yam ociki kwede.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Ci Camuel oa malo, oa ki i Gigal ocito i Gibea i lobo pa jo Benjamin. Caulo okwano wel dano ma gitye bote, ci guromo miya abicel." 
1Samuel13:16 Caulo ki wode Yonacan ki jo ma gitye bote gubedo i Geba i lobo pa jo Benjamin, ento jo Piliciti gugony i Mikmac." 
1Samuel13:17 Luyak gua ki i gony pa jo Piliciti buca mony adek; buca acel odok yo tuŋ Opra ma i lobo Cual," 
1Samuel13:18 buca mukene odok yo tuŋ Bet-koron, ki buca mukene odok yo tuŋ waŋ lobo ma neno piny i nota Jeboim ma yo tuŋ tim ata." 
1Samuel13:19 I kare-nu latet mo pe inoŋo i lobo Icrael ducu, pien yam jo Piliciti guwacci, “Pe wawek jo Ibru gutet pala lucwangi nyo tonigi pigi kengi.”" 
1Samuel13:20 Ento ŋat acel acel ki i kin jo Icrael obedo ka cito bot jo Piliciti ka twero lak kweri dyanne, nyo kweri kidima, nyo laton nyo pala kacce." 
1Samuel13:21 Ci giŋolo gikok bedo dul aryo me adek me cekel pi lak kweri dyaŋ ki pi kidima, ka dok acel me adek me cekel pi twero lak latoŋ ki pi como dim." 
1Samuel13:22 Kit meno omiyo i kare me lweny pala lucwan nyo toŋ pe ginoŋo i Ciŋ dano mo ki i kin jo ma gitye bot Caulo ki Yonacan. Ento Caulo ki wode Yonacan onoŋo gitye ki megi. 
1Samuel13:23 Ci jo ma gitye i cel gogo mony pa jo Piliciti gumol gukato woko, gucito i waŋ apidin me Mikmac me gwokone." 
1Samuel14:1 I nino mo acel Yonacan wod pa Caulo owaco bot awobi ma tino jami lwennye ni, “Bin wek wakat bot mony ma i cel gogo pa jo Piliciti ma tye loka ca-ni.” Ento pe otito bot wonne." 
1Samuel14:2 Onoŋo Caulo bedo i agikki gaŋ me Gibea i te yat okwer pomegranat ma yam tye i Migron. Onoŋo jo ma gitye kwede giromo miya abicel," 
1Samuel14:3 kacel ki Akija wod pa Akitub, omin Ikabod wod pa Finekaci ma wod pa Eli. En aye obedo ajwaka pa Rwot i Cilo ma ruko epod. Lwak pe guneye ni Yonacan ocito." 
1Samuel14:4 I waŋ apidin ma Yonacan obedo ka yenyo yo me kato kwede i kom mony ma i cel gogo pa jo Piliciti-ni, onoŋo tye iye got ma oculle tuŋcel ki got ma oculle tuŋ mukene bene, Nyiŋ got acel Bojej ki nyiŋ mukene Cene." 
1Samuel14:5 Got acel ocuŋ oculle yo tuŋ acam i nyim Mikmac, ki mukene yo tuŋ acuc i nyim Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Yonacan owaco bot awobi ma tiŋo jami lwennye ni, “Bin wek wakat bot mony ma i cel gogo pa jo-ni ma pe giŋeyo Lubaŋa; gwok Rwot bitiyo gin mo piwa kunnu, pien pe tye gin mo ma geŋo Rwot laro dano kadi gipol kadi ginok.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Latin jami lwennye owaco bote ni, “Tim gin ducu ma cwinyi oteri iye. Nen, an atye kacel kwedi; kit macalo cwinyi otamo kwede, mera bene kit meno,”" 
1Samuel14:8 Yonacan dok owaco ni, “Wabiwok wakato bot jo ca, ci wabinyutte kenwa botgi." 
1Samuel14:9 Ka ce guwacci, ‘Wukur nio ka wao botwu,’ ci wabicun giwa mot i kabedowa, pe wabiito malo botgi," 
1Samuel14:10 Ento ka guwacci, ‘Wubin malo botwa kany,’ ci wabiito malo kunnu, pien noŋo Rwot doŋ otyeko miyogi i ciŋwa. Meno aye bibedo lanyut botwa.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Kit meno gin aryo ducu gunyutte kekengi bot mony pa jo Piliciti ma tye i cel gogo; ci jo Piliciti guwacci, “Nen, jo Ibru gubebino ca, tye ka kato woko ki i bur ma gukanne iye.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Ci co me mony ma i cel gogo gulwoŋo Yonacan ki latin jami lwennye kun giwacci, “Wubin malo botwa, ci wabinyuto gin mo botwu.” Yonacan owaco bot latin jami lwennye ni, “Bin ilub kora, pien Rwot otyeko miyogi i ciŋ jo Icrael.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Ka doŋ Yonacan ocako ito malo kun ci to kobo ‘ki ciŋe ki tyene, ki latin jami lwennye lubo kore. Yonacan otoŋo Lupiliciti ci gupoto woko piny i nyime, kun latin jami lwennye obedo ka nekogi ki i kore." 
1Samuel14:14 I nek meno mukwoŋo-ni ma Yonacan ki latin jami lwennye gutimo, guneko dano pyeraryo macalo kweri dyaŋ ma ŋolo dye poto ma romo nucu eka." 
1Samuel14:15 Dano gutwarre ki lworo madwoŋ i gony pa jo Piliciti, ki jogi ma gitye woko i bar, ki mony ma i gogo, kadi wa luyak bene komgi omyel. Lobo oyeŋŋe, ci lworo mutwaro dano odoko madwoŋ twatwal." 
1Samuel14:16 Ka lukur-piny pa Caulo ma i Gibea i lobo Benjamin guneno lwak jo Piliciti guket gigwennye atata, gidok tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi," 
1Samuel14:17 ci Caulo owaco bot lwak ma gitye bote ni, “Koŋ wukwan dano wek wanen aŋa ma okato woko ki botwa.” Gukwano dano, ci nen, Yonacan ki latin jami lwennye onoŋo gipe kunnu." 
1Samuel14:18 Ci Caulo owaco bot Akija ni, “Kel canduk pa Lubaŋa kany.” Pien onoŋo canduk pa Lubaŋa woto kacel ki jo Icrael i kare meno," 
1Samuel14:19 I kare ma Caulo obedo ka lok ki ajwaka-ni, woo obedo ka medde ameda i gony pa jo Piliciti, mumiyo Caulo owaco bot ajwaka ni, “Wek doŋ obedi.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Caulo ki jo ducu ma gitye kwede gucako wayo, ci gucito gudonyo ka lweny. Ci nen, dano acel acel i kin jo Piliciti co bo lawote ki pala lucwanne; kom dano obaŋŋe woko twatwal." 
1Samuel14:21 Jo Ibru ma yam con gubedo bot jo Piliciti, ma yam gumol gucito kwedgi i gonygini, gin bene gulokke gudwogo i kom jo Icrael ma gitye kacel ki Caulo ki Yonacan." 
1Samuel14:22 Kit meno wa jo Icrael ma yam onoŋo gukanne i kin godi me lobo Epraim, ka guwinyo ni jo Piliciti gitye ka riŋo woko, gin bene guryemo korgi matek ka lweny i komgi." 
1Samuel14:23 Rwot olaro jo Icrael i nino meno; ci lweny omedde wa i ne Bet-awen. 
1Samuel14:24 Can dok opoto i kom jo Icrael i nino meno; pien Caulo okwoŋo kwoŋ ki dano kun wacci, “Cen opot i kom dano mo ma ocamo cam ma peya piny oyuto, ma noŋo pud atye ka culo kwor i kom lukworra.” Kit meno pe onen ŋatti mo ma obilo cam." 
1Samuel14:25 Ci dano ducu gucorre gudonyo i buŋa, gunoŋo moo kic opoto i ŋom." 
1Samuel14:26 Ka dano gudonyo i buŋa, ci nen, moo kic tye ka ton piny. Ento dano mo pe oketo cine i doge, pien lwak obedo ka lworo kwon ma gikwono-ni." 
1Samuel14:27 Ento Yonacan onoŋo pe owinyo ka wonne kwoŋo kwoŋ kun ciko ki dano. Kit meno en oluto iye wi odoo ma onoŋo tye i ciŋe, ci orwako i peda kic, orwako ciŋe i doge; ci waŋe ocako gony woko." 
1Samuel14:28 Ŋat acel ma i lwak owacci, “Woru ociko dano kun kwoŋo kwoŋ matek ni, ‘Cen obed i kom dano ma ocamo cam i nino man.’” Onoŋo kec obwoyo dano woko." 
1Samuel14:29 Yonacan ogamo ni, “Wora okelo can i lobo. Nen kit ma waŋa ogony kwede pien atyeko bilo moo kic man manok." 
1Samuel14:30 Kono pe obedo ber twatwal kono dano gucamo tin ki kuc gin ma guyako ki bot lumerokgi? Pien kombeddi pud peya gineko jo Piliciti mapol.” 
1Samuel14:31 Gineko jo Piliciti i nino meno cakke ki i Mikmac o wa i Aijalon. Onoŋo kec obwoyo dano mada; 
1Samuel14:32 ci dano gucako mwomme i kom I im ma giyako, ci gumako romi ki twoni ki roci-gu guradogi woko piny, ci lwak gucako mwodo riŋone kacel ki remo." 
1Samuel14:33 Ka gitito bot Caulo ni, “Nen, dano gubalo i nyim Rwot pi mwodo riŋo ki remo,” ci en ogamo ni, “Wutimo me dwalo dog! Wulor kidi madit tuŋ bota kany.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Caulo dok owacci, “Wuket wurom kin dano kun wuwaco botgi ni, ‘Dano acel acel okel twonne nyo romone, wunekgi kany wek wucam, Pe dok wubal i nyim Rwot pi mwodo riŋo ki remo.’ ” Pi meno dano acel acel okelo twonne i wor meno ci gunekogi kunnu." 
1Samuel14:35 Caulo ocano keno tyer pi Rwot; en aye keno tyer mukwoŋo ma en ocano pi Rwot. 
1Samuel14:36 Caulo dok owacci, “Wek walubu kor jo Piliciti i dyewor, waciyakugi nio ka piny oru. Pe waciweku dano mo odoŋ i komgi.” Dano gugamo ni, “Tim gin ma ineno ni berri.” Ento ajwaka owacci, “Weku koŋ wanyiku cok bot Lubaŋa kany.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Caulo openyo dog Lubaŋa ni, “Myero acilub kor jo Piliciti? Ibimiyogi i ciŋ jo Icrael?” Ento Lubaŋa pe odokke iye i nino-nu." 
1Samuel14:38 Caulo owacci, “Wubin kany, wun lutel wi lwak ducu, wek wuiŋi wuniaŋ kit ma bal obino kwede tin." 
1Samuel14:39 Pien macalo Rwot ma lalar jo Icrael tye makwo-ni, kadi ka bal tye i kom woda Yonacan, ci en bito ada.” Ento pe natu mo odokke iye ki i kin lwak." 
1Samuel14:40 Dok owaco bot jo Icrael ducu ni, “Wun wubiwalle wubedo tuŋcel, ki an ki Yonacan wabiwalle wabedo tuŋcel.” Ci lwak guwaco bot Caulo ni, “Tim gin ma ineno ni berri.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Mumiyo Caulo owacci, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, piŋo tin pe idok iye bota, laditta? Ka ce bal man tye i koma nyo i kom Yonacan ma woda-ni, ai Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, mi Urim, Ento ka bal man tye i kom joni Icrael, ci imi Tumim.” Ci kwir omako Yonacan ki Caulo, kun lwak obwot." 
1Samuel14:42 Caulo dok owacci, “Bolu kwir i kin an ki woda Yonacan,” ci kwir opoto omako Yonacan," 
1Samuel14:43 Caulo dok owaco bot Yonacan ni, “Titta gin ma itimo,” ci Yonacan otito bote ni, “Abilo moo kic manok ki i wi odoo ma onoŋo amako i ciŋa-ni, An doŋ atye ene, abito doŋ.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Caulo owacci, “Lubaŋa myero oket can i koma kit meno ki makato bene ka pe gineki woko, Yonacan.”" 
1Samuel14:45 Ento lwak gugamo dog Caulo ni, “Yonacan bi to doŋ ada, ma otiyo matek me kelo ki Icrael loc man madit-ti? Pe twero timme! Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, yer wi ye mo acel pe bipoto i ŋom, pien obedo ka tic kacel ki Lubaŋa i nino man,” Kit meno lwak gularo Yonacan, pe omedo ki to." 
1Samuel14:46 Caulo oweko ryemo kor jo Piliciti, ci odok cen; ki jo Piliciti bene gudok woko i kabedogi." 
1Samuel14:47 Ka Caulo doŋ otyeko camo ker pa jo Icrael me bedo kabaka, obedo ka lweny i kom lumerokke ducu ma gurume. Olwenyo i kom jo Moab, jo Ammon, jo Edom, i ‘kom luker me Joba ki i kom jo Piliciti. Ka ma olokke odokiye ducu, onekogi marac." 
1Samuel14:47 Ka Caulo doŋ otyeko camo ker pa jo Icrael me bedo kabaka, obedo ka lweny i kom lumerokke ducu ma gurume. Olwenyo i kom jo Moab, jo Ammon, jo Edom, i ‘kom luker me Joba ki i kom jo Piliciti. Ka ma olokke odokiye ducu, onekogi marac." 
1Samuel14:48 Obedo ka lweny matek, oloyo wa jo Amalek, ci olaro Jo Icrael ki i ciŋ jo ma yam gibedo ka yakogi." 
1Samuel14:49 Caulo yam tye ki awobene Yonacan, Icivi, Malkicua. Niŋ anyirane ene: latin nyako mukwoŋo nyiŋe Merab, nyiŋ matidine Mikal." 
1Samuel14:50 Nyiŋ dako pa Caulo onoŋo’ Akinoam, nya pa Akimaj. Nyiŋ ladit wi monnye onoŋo Abneri wod pa Ner, ma omin won Caulo." 
1Samuel14:51 Kic en aye won Caulo, ki Ner ma won Abneri-ni onoŋo en aye wod pa Abiel." 
1Samuel14:52 Lweny obedo magwa i kom jo Piliciti i kare pa Caulo ducu. Ka Caulo oneno dano mo ma oteka lweny, ci kelo, bedo kwede cok." 
1Samuel15:1 Camuel owaco bot Caulo ni, “Rwot yam ocwala ka wiri ki moo ker me bedo kabaka ma loyo jo Icrael, mumiyo tin ber iwiny lok pa Rwot." 
1Samuel15:2 Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, ‘Abiketo can i kom jo Amalek pi gin ma yam gutimo i kom jo Icrael, pien yam gulwenyo kwedgi ma gitye iyo, i kare ma gua ki i Ejipt." 
1Samuel15:3 Cit ilweny ki jo Amalek, idyergi i ciŋ Rwot, ijwergi woko liweŋ ki gin ducu ma gitye kwede. Pe kica omaki i komgi, ento inen co wa ki mon, litino wa ki gin ma pud dot, twoni ki romi, kinaga wa ki kana-gu.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Caulo olwoŋo dano ka lweny, ci okwanogi i Telaim. Jo ma giwoto ki tyengi onoŋo giromo alip miya aryo, ki jo pa Juda alip apar." 
1Samuel15:5 Ka Caulo obino i nyim gaŋ pa jo Amalek, ci obuto i nota, okurogi iye." 
1Samuel15:6 Dok Caulo owaco bot jo Keni ni, “Wua, wucit woko ki i kin jo Amalek, wek pe atyekwu woko kacel kwedgi; pien yam kica omakowu i kom jo Icrael ducu i kare ma gua woko ki i Ejipt.” Mumiyo jo Keni gua woko ki i kin jo Amalek." 
1Samuel15:7 Caulo oloyo jo Amalek cakke ki i Kavila o kwede wa i Cur ma cok ki lobo Ejipt yo tuŋ wokceŋ. 
1Samuel15:8 Omako Agag kabaka pa jo Amalek otere makwo, ci odyero jo-nu, ojwerogi woko ki pala lucwan." 
1Samuel15:9 Ento Caulo ki lwak kica omakogi i kom Agag, ci guweko en kacel ki romi mogo ma gibeco, ki twoni, ki roci mucwe, ki litino romi-gu, ki jami mukene ma gibeco ducu, pe guye ni myero gijwergi woko liweŋ, Gin ducu ma gicayo, ki gin maracone, gin aye gujwerogi woko." 
1Samuel15:10 Ka doŋ lok pa Rwot obino bot Camuel ni," 
1Samuel15:11 “Atyeko ŋut pi miyo Caulo bedo kabaka, pien obarre woko ki ka lubo kora odok woko cen, pe ocobo cikka.” Ci kiniga omako Camuel, obedo ka kok bot Rwot dyewor benebene." 
1Samuel15:12 Camuel oa odiko con pi rwatte ki Caulo. Ka gitito bot Camuel ni, “Caulo doŋ owoto i Karmel, ocibo gin me po pire kene, ci olokke okato anyim, ocito wa i Gilgal," 
1Samuel15:13 Ka Camuel oo bot Caulo, ci Caulo owaco bote ni, “Gum pa Rwot obed i komi. Atyeko cobo cik pa Rwot.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Camuel owacci, “Man dok kit koko romi aŋo ma awinyo ki ita-ni, ki koko dyaŋi ma awinyoni?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Caulo owacci, “Gikelogi ki bot jo Amalek, pien dano gunoyo romi ki dyaŋi mabecone me gitum bot Rwot Lubaŋani; ki mudoŋŋe wajwerogi woko ducu liweŋ.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Ento Camuel owaco bot Caulo ni, “Liŋ! Abititti gin ma Rwot otito bota tin dyewor.” Caulo ogamo ni, “Doŋ itit bota do.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Camuel owacci, “Kadi inen i waŋi kekeni ni itidi, pe in aye iloyo kaka ducu ma i Icrael? Rwot yam owiri ki moo me bedo kabaka pa jo Icrael." 
1Samuel15:18 Rwot ocwali kun waco boti ni, ‘Cit icidyerra jo Amalek ma lubalo, ijwergi woko ducu liweŋ.’" 
1Samuel15:19 Piŋo yam pe iworo dog Rwot? Piŋo icorre i kom gin ma giyako, ki timo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Caulo owaco bot Camuel ni, “Atyeko woro dog Rwot. Acito ka ma gicwala iye, akelo Agag kabaka me Amalek, dok ajwero jo Amalek woko ducu liweŋ." 
1Samuel15:21 Ento dano gukwanyo romi ki twoni ki i kin gin ma giyako, gukwanyo gin mabecone ki i kin jami ma onoŋo gidyero me ajwera woko liweŋ, gutero wek gubed gitum bot Rwot Lubaŋani i Gilgal.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Camuel ogamo ni, “Cwiny Rwot bedo yom i gitum awaŋa ki gityer-gu ma rom ki kit ma cwinye bedo yom kwede ka giworo doge? Nen, woro dog Rwot ber kato gitum, winyo cik ber kato dwolo nyogi romi ma giwaŋo me gityer," 
1Samuel15:23 Pien jemo rom ki bal me tyet, tekwic rom ki bal me woro cal jogi. Macalo in ikwero winyo lok pa Rwot, en doŋ okwero in me bedo kabaka.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Caulo owaco bot Camuel ni, “Apoto i bal, pien akalo wi cik pa Rwot ki wi lokki, pien onoŋo alworo lwak, aworo doggi." 
1Samuel15:25 Doŋ kombeddi alegi ni itima kica i kom balla, ci wadok kwedi wek aciwor Rwot.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Camuel ogamo dog Caulo ni, “Pe abidok kacel kwedi, pien ityeko kwero lok pa Rwot woko, ki Rwot bene otyeko kwero in me bedo kabaka pa jo Icrael.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Ka Camuel olokke me cito woko, Caulo omako dog kanyine, ci oyec woko." 
1Samuel15:28 Camuel owaco bote ni, “Rwot doŋ oyeco ker pa Icrael woko ki boti tin, doŋ otyeko miyone bot lawoti ma en ber makato in." 
1Samuel15:29 Lubaŋa ma en Deyo pa Icrael pe bi loko goba, kadi ŋut bene; en pe dano ma kono oŋut-ti.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Caulo owacci, “Apoto i bal; ento tin koŋ iket deyo i koma i nyim ludoŋo pa lwakka ki i nyim jo Icrael, wek wadok kwedi, aciwor Rwot Lubaŋani.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Mumiyo Camuel odok cen olubo kor Caulo, ci Caulo oworo Rwot." 
1Samuel15:32 Camuel dok owacci, “Kella Agag, kabaka pa jo Amalek, bota kany.” Agag ocako bi no bote ma tipo kome pe kun wacci, “Lit me to doŋ peke.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Camuel owacci, “Kit ma yam pala lucwanni omiyo mon gudoŋ laboŋo litinogi-ni, kit meno meni bene bibedo laboŋo latin i kin mon wadi.” Ka doŋ Camuel oŋido Agag woko matitino i nyim Rwot i Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:34 Lacen Camuel odok i Rama; Caulo ocito mere i ode i Gibea pa Caulo. 
1Samuel15:35 Camuel pe omedo ki neno Caulo o wa i nino me tone, ento Camuel obedo ka kumo pi Caulo. Ci Rwot oŋut pi keto Caulo me bedo kabaka pa jo Icrael." 
1Samuel16:1 Rwot owaco bot Camuel ni, “Cwinyi bikumo pi Caulo pi kare ma rom mene, kun an doŋ atyeko kwero en me bedo kabaka pa jo Icrael? Pik moo i tuŋ dyaŋ, ci iciti. Abiori bot Yece ma jo Beterekem, pien anoŋo kabaka pira kena i kin awobene.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Camuel ogamo ni, “Abiwot kunnu niŋniŋ? Ka Caulo biwinyone, bineka woko.” Rwot owaco bote ni, “Cit ki roya kun iwacci, ‘Abino ka tyero gitum bot Rwot.’" 
1Samuel16:3 Ci ilwoŋ Yece obin i ka tumo gitum. An abinyutti gin ma myero iti. Ibiwiro pira dano ma abituco nyiŋe boti.” 
1Samuel16:4 Camuel otimo kit ma Rwot ocike-ni, ocito i Beterekem. Ludoŋo ma i gaŋ meno gucito ka jolo wiye kun komgi myel. Guwacci, “Ibino ki kuc bo?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Ogamo ni, “Abino ki kuc. Abino ka tyero gitum bot Rwot. Wulonnye kekenwu wubed maleŋ, ka wubin kacel kweda ka tyero gitum.” Olonyo Yece ki awobene gubedo maleŋ ci olwoŋogi i ka tyero gitum." 
1Samuel16:6 Ka gubino, Camuel oneno kom Eliab ci otamo ni, “Ada, ŋat ma Rwot biwiro ki moo tye i nyime.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Ento Rwot owaco bot Camuel ni, “Pe ibed ka neno ber me kome nyo kit borre, pien atyeko kwere woko; pien Rwot pe neno piny kit ma dano neno-ni, Dano neno kome ki woko, ento Rwot neno cwinye.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Yece dok olwoŋo Abinadab, oweko en okato ki i nyim Camuel; ci Camuel owacci, “Kadi man bene Rwot pe oyero.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Yece dok oweko Cama okato ki ka ŋete; Camuel dok owacci, “Kadi man bene pe Rwot oyero.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Yece omiyo awobene abiro ducu gukato i nyim Camuel. Ci Camuel owaco bot Yece ni, “Rwot pe oyero jo-ni.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Dok openyo Yece ni, “Awobeni ducu gitye kany?” Ogamo ni, “Matidine aye pud odoŋ; ento en tye ka kwayo romi,” ci Camuel owaco bot Yece ni, “Cwal kwena giome; pien pe wabibedo piny nio ka en oo kany.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Ocwalo kwena, ci gikele. Otuc ma kome kwar, waŋe mwonya ma neno ber. Rwot owacci, “Doŋ ia malo, iwire ki moo, pien man aye en.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Camuel okwanyo tuŋ dyaŋ ma moo tye iye, owiro Daudi ki moo ki i dye omegine. Ci Cwiny pa Rwot obino i kom Daudi ki tek cakke i nino meno. Lacen Camuel oa odok i Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 I kare meno Cwiny pa Rwot oa woko ki i kom Caulo, ci cen marac ma oa ki bot Rwot opoto i kome, obedo ka lanye." 
1Samuel16:15 Lutic pa Caulo guwaco bote ni, “Nen ba, cen marac ma oa ki bot Lubaŋa opoto i komi, obedo ka lanyi," 
1Samuel16:16 Laditwa, ber icikwa wan luticci ma watye kany-nyi wek waciyeny dano mo ma ladiro goyo opuk; ci ka cen marac ma a ki bot Lubaŋa opoto i komi, en bigoyo opuk, mi yo ibedo maber.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Mumiyo Caulo ociko luticce ni, “Wun wuciyennya dano mo ma ŋeyo goyo opuk maberre, ci wukel en bota.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Ŋat acel i kin awobene ogamo ni, “Nen ba, aneno wod pa Yece ma Labeterekem ma ladiro goco. En laco ma oteka ma oniyo ki lweny, ma iye olil i lok, ma nen mwonya, dok Rwot tye kwede.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Mumiyo Caulo ocwalo lukwena bot Yece kun waco bote ni, “Cwalla wodi Daudi ma lakwat romi-ni.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Yece okwanyo kana me yeyo mugati, ki opiro koŋo vino, ki latin dyel, ci ocwalogi bot Caulo kacel ki wode Daudi." 
1Samuel16:21 Ka Daudi ocito bot Caulo ci ocako ticce, Caulo ocako mare matek twatwal, ka odoko lamak jami lwennye." 
1Samuel16:22 Caulo ocwalo kwena bot Yece kun waco bote ni, “Wek Daudi obed doŋ ka tiyo tic bota, pien aneno ticce, oyomo cwinya.”" 
1Samuel16:23 I kare ducu ma cen marac ma a ki bot Lubaŋa opoto i kom Caulo, ci Daudi kwanyo opuk, cako goyone, miyo Caulo bedo maber, doko dano, ci cen marac a woko ki i kome." 
1Samuel17:1 I kare meno jo Piliciti gucoko monygi kacel pi lweny. Gucokke i Coko i lobo pa Juda, ci gugony i kin Coko ki Ajeka, i Epec-damim." 
1Samuel17:2 Caulo ki jo Icrael gucokke kacel, gugony i nota Ela, ci gurye ki tyen me lweny i kom jo Piliciti." 
1Samuel17:3 Lupiliciti gucuŋ i wi got tuŋcel, ki Luicrael gucuŋ i wi got tuŋ mukene, kun nota tye i kingi." 
1Samuel17:4 Ci twon oita lweny mo obino oa ki i gony pa Lupiliciti ma nyiŋe Goliac, dano me Gat. Borre kato ka futi aboŋwen," 
1Samuel17:5 Oruko otaŋ mola i wiye, dok oruko koti mola lagen kore; pek pa koti molane onoŋo romo ratili miya acel ki pyerabic." 
1Samuel17:6 Oruko mola mukwako tyene, kun okacce ki toŋ alwiro mola wi gwoke." 
1Samuel17:7 Bol tonne mito rom ki rii yat me cweyo boŋo; lak toŋŋe pekke romo ratili apar wiye aboŋwen, kun lamak kwotte otelo nyime." 
1Samuel17:8 En ocuŋ ci odanne matek i wi mony pa jo Icrael ma gurye i tyen ni, “Kaa wubino ma wurye i tyen pi lweny piŋo? Pe an Lapiliciti? Pe wun lutic pa Caulo bo? Wuyer danowu mo acel, wek en olor piny obin bota." 
1Samuel17:9 Ka en twero lweny kweda ce oneka, ci wan wabibedo luticwu; ento ka an aye aloye, ce aneke, ci wun wubibedo luticwa pi tiyo tic botwa.”" 
1Samuel17:10 Lapiliciti meno dok owacci, “Ataro mony pa jo Icrael ma tin gurye i tyengi! Wumiya dano mo wek walweny kwede kacel.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Ka Caulo ki jo Icrael ducu guwinyo lwak lok pa Lapiliciti-nu, ci cwinygi oballe woko, gubedo ki lworo madwoŋ twatwal." 
1Samuel17:12 Daudi obedo wod pa dano mo me Eprata ma gaŋŋe Beterekem i lobo Juda; nyiŋe Yece, yam tye ki awobene aboro. I kare pa Caulo, onoŋo en doŋ oti woko, mwaka me ditte doŋ dwoŋ." 
1Samuel17:13 Onoŋo awobe pa Yece adek muteggine gulubo kor Caulo i mony, Nyiŋ awobene adek ma gucito i mony-nyi gin ene: Eliab ma latin kayo, ki ma olube Abinadab, ki me adekke Cama," 
1Samuel17:14 Daudi aye matidine; jo muteggi adek-ki gulubo kor Caulo," 
1Samuel17:15 ento Daudi obedo ka wirre bot Caulo, ka dok paco ka kwayo romi pa wonne i Beterekem." 
1Samuel17:16 Lapiliciti obedo ka bino anyim ci cuŋ kunnu odiko ki otyeno pi nino pyeraŋwen. 
1Samuel17:17 Yece owaco bot wode Daudi ni, “Ber iter nyig bel ma gicelo acela-ni bot omegini, ma romo agwata adek, kacel ki mugati man apar, itiŋ itergi oyot bot omegini ma i gony ca." 
1Samuel17:18 Dok iter cak mutwo muluŋŋe-ni apar bot laditgi me mony ma loyo dano alip, Nen kit ma omegini tye kwede, ci imak gin mo idwog kwede ki botgi.”" 
1Samuel17:19 I kare-nu onoŋo Caulo ki omegi Daudi wa ki jo Icrael ducu gubedo i nota Ela, kun gilwenyo ki jo Piliciti." 
1Samuel17:20 Daudi oa odiko con oweko rorru bot lagwokone, ci ocako wot otero cam ma giyubo kit macalo Yece ocike kwede oo i gony ma onoŋo mony doŋ cito ka rye i tyen, kun giwayo me lweny." 
1Samuel17:21 Ci jo Icrael ki jo Piliciti gurwayo cok ka romo; mony okemme ki mony wadi. 
1Samuel17:22 Daudi oweko jami i ciŋ lagwok jami, ocito i ka ryeyo i mony, ci omoto omegine ducu." 
1Samuel17:23 Ka pud tye ka lok kwedgi, ci twon oita mony Lapiliciti me Gat ma nyiŋe Goliac otuc ka maleŋ i nyim mony pa jo Piliciti ma guryeyo, kun loko lok ma’ rom ki macon ca, ci Daudi owinyo lokke." 
1Samuel17:24 Jo Icrael ducu guriŋo laco meno woko ka gunene, ci gubedo ki lworo matek." 
1Samuel17:25 Lwak jo Icrael guwacci, “Wuneno dano man ma obino-ni? Ada, en obino ka taro jo Icrael. Ka ŋat mo oneko, kabaka bimiye doko lalonyo madit, dok bimine nyare bene obed dakone, dok bimiyo jo me ot pa wonne pe doŋ giculo mucoro.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Daudi owaco bot jo ma gucuŋ ka ŋete ni, “Gin aŋo ma gibitimo ka dano mo oneko Lapiliciti-ni, okwanyo kwede cac woko ki i Icrael? Lapiliciti ma pe ŋeyo Lubaŋa-ni aŋa mono, ma myero obed ka taro Lubaŋa makwo-ni?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Lwak dok gudokke iye lakite acel-lu ni, “Gibitimo dano ma oneko-ni kit meno,”" 
1Samuel17:28 Ka Eliab omin Daudi maditte owinyo ka loko ki dano, kiniga omake i kome ci owacci, “Piŋo ibino? Iweko romiwa manok-ki i tim bot aŋa? Aŋeyo etteni ki keccwinyi; ibino kany ka neno lweny.”" 
1Samuel17:29 Daudi ogamo ni, “Atimo gin aŋo kombeddi? Pud aloko aloka keken.”" 
1Samuel17:30 Oloko ŋeye oneno ka mukene dok oloko lakite acel-lu, Dano ducu dok gudokke iye kit mukwoŋo-ni." 
1Samuel17:31 Ka lok ma Daudi obedo ka lokoneni owinnye, gutito bot Caulo; ci Caulo ocwalo kwena olwoŋe." 
1Samuel17:32 Daudi owaco bot Caulo ni “Pe iwek cwiny dano mo opoti pi Lapiliciti-nu, ladit; an abicito ka lweny kwede.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Caulo owaco bot Daudi ni, “In pe itwero cito ka lweny ki Lapiliciti man, pien in pud latin awobi.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Ento Daudi ogamo dog Caulo ni, “Ladit, abedo ka kwayo romi pa wora. Ka yam labwor mo obino, nyo ŋuu mukene, ce omako latm romo mo ki i kin romiwa," 
1Samuel17:35 aryemo kore ci agoyo, alaro latin romo, akwanyo woko ki i doge. Ka ce otokke otiŋŋe i koma, apoto amako yer tike, agoyo aneko woko." 
1Samuel17:36 Ladit, aneko labwor ki ŋuu mukene mapol. Lapilicitini ma pe ŋeyo Lubaŋa bibedo ma rom ki ŋat acel i kingi. Nen, en doŋ otaro nmony pa Lubaŋa makwo woko.”" 
1Samuel17:37 Daudi dok owacci, “Rwot yam olara ki i lwet ciŋ labwor ki ŋuu mukene: bilara bene ki i ciŋ Lapiliciti man.” Caulo owaco bot Daudi ni, “Citi. Rwot aye obed kwedi!”" 
1Samuel17:38 Caulo oruko Daudi ki jami lwennye, oruko otan mola i wiye, ka oruke ki koti mola." 
1Samuel17:39 Daudi otweyo pala lucwan pa Cauloi wi jami lwennye, otemo wot kwede me noŋo, pien pe oniyo wot kwede. Ci owaco bot Caulo ni “An pe atwero wot ki man ducu pien pe aŋiyo kwede.” Olunyogi woko," 
1Samuel17:40 ka okwanyo odoone omako i ciŋe, ci oyero litino gweni abic muluŋŋe mapwot ki i laora kulu, opikogi i opiro kwatte, ma en kicaane; omako latandiyone i ciŋe, ka onyiko cok bot Lapiliciti." 
1Samuel17:41 Lapiliciti obino onyiko cok ki Daudi ki latin kwotte i nyime. 
1Samuel17:42 Ka Lapiliciti oneno kom Daudi, ci otuki cayone woko, pien onoŋo pud latin awobi, kome kwar, dano ma neno mwonya." 
1Samuel17:43 Owaco bot Daudi ni, “An adoko gwok bo, mumiyo ilima ki odoo-ni?” Ka ocako ceno Daudi ki nyiŋ lwak lubaŋane," 
1Samuel17:44 Lapiliciti dok owaco bot Daudi ni, “Bin bota ci abimiyo riŋo komi bot winyo me polo ki bot ŋuu ma i tim.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Daudi bene owaco bot Lapiliciti ni, “In ibino bota ki pala lucwan ki toŋ ki toŋ alwiro, ento an abino boti i nyiŋ Rwot me mony, i nyiŋ Lubaŋa me mony pa jo Icrael ma ibedo ka tarone-ni." 
1Samuel17:46 Tin Rwot bimiyo in i ciŋa, abireti woko piny, ci aŋolo wii woko; dok abimiyo kom lumony pa Lupiliciti ma guto tin bot winyo me polo ki bot ŋuu ma wi lobo, wek lobo ducu oneni, Lubaŋa tye i Icrael," 
1Samuel17:47 dok wek lwak man guŋe ni, Rwot pe laro dano ki pala lucwan kadi ki toŋ, pien lweny Rwot aye ma loyo gire, ci en bimiyowu i ciŋwa.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Lapiliciti oa obino ka romo ki Daudi, ci Daudi oriŋo oyotoyot i nyim mony ma orye i tyen pi romo ki Lapiliciti." 
1Samuel17:49 Orwako ciŋe i opirone, okwanyo lagwen, obayo, ocelo tur nyim Goliac. Lagwen odonyo woko i tur nyime ci opoto piny aryeba cwiny." 
1Samuel17:50 Kit meno Daudi oloyo Goliac ki latandiyo ki lagwen, ocelo, oneko woko. Pala lucwan onoŋo pe i ciŋ Daudi." 
1Samuel17:51 Oriŋo, ocuŋ i wi Goliac, owoto pala lucwan pa Goliac ki i akurane, oneke kwede, ka oŋolo kwede wiye woko. Ka jo Piliciti guneno ni twon oita monygi oto, ci guriŋo woko." 
1Samuel17:52 Lwak jo Icrael ki Juda gutwarre ‘ki oduru gulubo kor jo Piliciti nio wa i Gat, ki i dog gaŋ me Ekron. Omiyo Lupiliciti ma ret omakogi gupoto woko i dog yo cakke ki i Caaraim o wa i Gat ki Ekron." 
1Samuel17:53 Lacen jo Icrael gucako dwogo cen ki ka ryemo Lupiliciti, ci guyako gonygi." 
1Samuel17:54 Daudi okwanyo wi Goliac okelo i Jerucalem, ento oketo jami lwennye I kemane." 
1Samuel17:55 Ka Caulo oneno ka Daudi cito ka lweny ki Goliac, ci openyo Abneri ma ladit wi monnye ni, “Abneri, latin awobi-ni wod pa aŋa?” Abneri ogamo doge ni, “Macalo in ikwo-ni, kabaka, pe aŋeyo.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Kabaka dok owacci, “Peny pi awobi-ni, ni en wod pa aŋa?”" 
1Samuel17:57 Ka Daudi odwogo ki ka neko Lapiliciti, ci Abneri okwanye otere i nyim Caulo, ki wi Goliac i ciŋe." 
1Samuel17:58 Caulo openye ni, “In wod pa aŋa, latin awobi?” Daudi odok iye ni, “An a wod pa laticci Yece ma Labeterekem.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Ka doŋ Daudi otyeko lok ki Caulo, ci tipo kom Yonacan omoko i kom Daudi matek, omare macalo tipo kome kene." 
1Samuel18:2 Caulo otero Daudi i nino meno, pe dok oweke odok i gaŋ pa wonne." 
1Samuel18:3 Yonacan dok oketp gicikke ki Daudi, pien onoŋo mare macalo tipo kome kene," 
1Samuel18:4 Olunyo jorre woko ki i kome, omiyo bot Daudi kacel ki jami lwennye, wa pala lucwanne bene ki atum aterone ki del pyere." 
1Samuel18:5 Ka ma Caulo ooro Daudi iye ducu co cito, tiyo maber, mumiyo Caulo okete oloyo jo me mony. Ket man oyomo cwiny lwak ducu, dok oyomo cwiny lutic pa Caulo bene." 
1Samuel18:6 Ka onoŋo gidwogo i gaŋ paco, i kare ma Daudi dwogo ki ka ma oneko iye Lapiliciti-ni, ci mon gumol woko ki i gaŋi ducu ma i Icrael ma kun giwero, gimyelo pi jolo kabaka Caulo ki ajaa, ki wer me waya pi yomcwiny, ki jami agoya me wer." 
1Samuel18:7 I tukogi mon giwero kun gileyo aleya ni, “Caulo oneko mere dano alip, ento Daudi oneko alip apar.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Lok man ocwero cwiny Caulo, kiniga omake matek twatwal. Owacci, “Ma gubedo ka waco ni Daudi oneko alip apar, ki tuŋ bota giwaco ni alip keken, gin aŋo mukene ma en dok twero limo? Man odon camo ker.”" 
1Samuel18:9 Cakke i kare meno, Caulo neno Daudi agaya." 
1Samuel18:10 Orwone cen marac oturo ki poto i kom Caulo, ci obedo ka po ki lok i ode, kun onoŋo Daudi goyo opuk i kit me nino ducu. Caulo onoŋo tye ki toŋŋe i ciŋe," 
1Samuel18:11 ci obaye ki toŋ, pien obedo ka tamo ni, “Wek acob Daudi, adi woko i kor ot.” Ento Daudi oloye tyen aryo," 
1Samuel18:12 Caulo obedo ka lworo Daudi, pien Rwot tye kwede, ento Rwot onoŋo oa woko ki bot Caulo." 
1Samuel18:13 Caulo okwanyo Daudi woko ki i nyime, okete me bedo ladit lalo dano alip; ci obedo ka telo nyim lwak ka gicito i mony." 
1Samuel18:14 Gin ducu ma Daudi tiyo en cobo maber, pien Rwot tye kwede," 
1Samuel18:15 Ka Caulo oneno ni gin ducu ma Daudi tiyo cobo maber twatwal, ci obedo ka lwore." 
1Samuel18:16 Ento Jo Icrael ki jo Juda ducu gumaro Daudi pien obedo ka telo rryimgi ka ma giwoto iye ducu. 
1Samuel18:17 Caulo dok owaco bot Daudi ni, “Atye ki nyara madit Merab ene; abimiye boti obed dakoni. Bed oteka lwennya keken, kun ilwenyo matek pi Rwot.” Caulo onoŋo tamo ni, “Wek ciŋa pe opot i kome, wek ciŋ jo Piliciti aye opot i kome.”"
