1Samuel18:18 Daudi owaco ni, “An aŋa, ki kwarina jo mene, ki doggola pa kwaragi gin aŋa-gi i kin jo Icrael, ma miyo abedo cwar nya pa kabaka-ni?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Ento i kare ma kono gimi Merab nya pa Caulo bot Daudi, dok gimiyo bot Adriel ma jo Mekola pi bedo dakone." 
1Samuel18:20 Mikal nya pa Caulo dok omaro Daudi, Ka gitito bot Caulo, lokke oyomo iye." 
1Samuel18:21 Caulo onoŋo otamo ni, “Wek amiye bot Daudi, wek obed owic me make, wek ciŋ jo Piliciti aye opot i kome.” Mumiyo Caulo dok owaco bot Daudi tyen me aryo ni, “In doŋ ibibedo cwar nyara.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Caulo oloko ki luticce bene, ocikogi ni, “Wulok ki Daudi i muŋ ni, ‘Nen, cwiny kabaka yom i komi, ki luticce ducu gimari; doŋ ibed cwar nya pa kabaka.’ ”" 
1Samuel18:23 Lutic pa kabaka guwacce lok meno ducu. Daudi ogamo ni, “Lok me doko cwar nya pa kabaka nen botwu ni tidi mono, kun an lacan, peya aywek?”" 
1Samuel18:24 Lutic pa Caulo gutito bote lok ma Daudi odwoko. 
1Samuel18:25 Dok Caulo owaco lok ni, “Wubiwaco bot Daudi ni, ‘Kabaka pe mito lim me nyom. En mito del kom nyim jo Piliciti me co miya acel, wek icul kwor i kom lumerok pa kabaka.’’’ Onoŋo Caulo otamo ni, jo Piliciti aye myero gunek Daudi." 
1Samuel18:26 Ka luticce gutito lok man bot Daudi, bedo cwar nya pa kabaka oyomo cwinye. Ma peya kare ma gimoko okato, ocito ki lwakke," 
1Samuel18:27 oneko jo Piliciti miya aryo, odwogo ki del kom nyimgi me co, omiyogi bot kabaka kun mo pe orem, wek odok cwar nya pa kabaka. Caulo omiye nyare Mikal me bedo dakone." 
1Samuel18:28 Ento ka Caulo oneno dok oniaŋ maber ni Rwot tye ki Daudi, dok ni jo Icrael ducu gimare," 
1Samuel18:29 lworo omako Caulo i kom Daudi makato yam con, mumiyo Caulo obedo lamerok pa Daudi i kare ducu." 
1Samuel18:30 Rwodi pa jo Piliciti dok gubino ka lweny, ci i kare ducu ma gibino, noŋo Daudi loyogi maber makato lutic pa Caulo mukene ducu, ma omiyo nyiŋe oywek matek." 
1Samuel19:1 Caulo ocako loko ki wode Yonacan ki luticce ducu ni myero gunek Daudi woko. Ento cwiny Yonacan wod pa Caulo onoŋo maro Daudi matek. 
1Samuel19:2 Yonacan otito bot Daudi ni, “Wora tye ka yenyo yo me neki woko; pienno myero igwok komi diki odiko, bed ma ikanne keni i muŋ." 
1Samuel19:3 An abicito i bar, acuŋ i ŋet wora ka ma ikanne iye-ni, ci abiloko piri bot wora; ka aniaŋ lok mo, ci abitito boti.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Yonacan oloko pi Daudi mamit bot wonne Caulo kun waco ni, “Kabaka, pe itim bal i kom laticci Daudi, pien pe otimo bal mo i komi, obedo ka timmi tic ducu mabeco." 
1Samuel19:5 Yam odyero kwone, oneko Goliac ma Lapiliciti, ci Rwot omiyo jo Icrael oloyo loc madit. Yam ineno, cwinyi obedo yom iye. Piŋo imito timo bal kun ioyo remo pa dano ma pe ki bal, pi neko Daudi noŋo laboŋo tere?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Caulo owinyo dog wode Yonacan, ci okwoŋo kwoŋ ni, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, pe doŋ gibineko.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Yonacan olwoŋo Daudi, otito bote lok meno ducu, ci okelo Daudi bot Caulo, obedo i nyime kit macon." 
1Samuel19:8 Lweny dok ocakke. Daudi ocito olwenyo ki jo Piliciti, onekogi mapol, omiyo guriŋo woko." 
1Samuel19:9 I kare meno cen marac dok oa ki bot Rwot opoto i kom Caulo, i kare ma en obedo i ode ki toŋŋe i ciŋe, kun Daudi tye ka goyo opuk." 
1Samuel19:10 Caulo oyubbe woko me guro Daudi i kor ot ki toŋ; ento Daudi oneyo waŋ Caulo woko, omiyo Caulo ocobo kor ot ki toŋŋe. Daudi onno, obwot gire." 
1Samuel19:11 I dyewor meno Caulo ocwalo lukwena ka kuro Daudi i ode, wek enek woko odiko, Ento Mikal dako pa Daudi owaco bote ni, “Ka tin dyewor pe igwoko komi, ci gibineki woko diki.’" 
1Samuel19:12 Kit meno Mikal ocwalo Daudi owok ki i waŋ dirica oriŋo woko obwot gire. 
1Samuel19:13 Mikal okwanyo cal apaya opyelo i wi kitanda pa Daudi, ka oketo laten wic me yer dyegi opyelo ka wiye, ka oumo woko ki boŋo." 
1Samuel19:14 Ka’ Caulo ocwalo lukwena me omo Daudi, Mikal owacci, “Kome lit,’" 
1Samuel19:15 Caulo dok ocwalo lukwena ka neno Daudi kun waco ni, “Wutine ki kitanda wukel bota, wek aneke woko.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Ka lukwena gudonyo i kicika, ci nen, cal apaya aye tye i wi kitanda, ki laten wic me yer dyegi ka wiye." 
1Samuel19:17 Caulo openyo Mikal ni “Piŋo ibwola kit man iweko lamerokka ocito?” Mikal odok iye bot Caulo ni, “Owacca ni, ‘Wek aciti;” ka pe, ci aneki woko.’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 I kare-nu Daudi oriŋo ci obwot gire, ocito bot Camuel i Rama, otitte gin ducu ma Caulo otimo i kome. Ci en kacel ki Camuel gucito gubedo i Nayot." 
1Samuel19:19 Dok gitito bot taulo ni, “Daudi tye i Nayot i Rama.’" 
1Samuel19:20 Caulo dok ocwalo lukwena ka omo Daudi. Ka lukwena pa Caulo guneno lwak lunebi ma gitito lok pa Lubaŋa, kun Camuel ocuŋ ka telo wigi, ci Cwiny pa Lubaŋa opoto i kom lukwena pa Caulo, gin bene gucako tito lok pa Lubaŋa macalo lunebi.”" 
1Samuel19:21 Ka gitito lokke bot Caulo, ci dok ocwalo lukwena mukene. Gin bene gucako tito lok pa Lubaŋa kit macalo lunebi gitito-ni. Caulo dok ocwalo lukwena tyen me adekke, gin bene gutito lok pa Lubaŋa aye." 
1Samuel19:22 Ka lacen Caulo kikome ocito i Rama, obino ka ma waŋ pii madit tye iye ma tye i Ceku-ni, ci openyo ni, “Camuel ki Daudi gitye kwene?” Ŋat acel owacci, “Gitye i Nayot, i Rama.”" 
1Samuel19:23 Caulo oa ki kunnu, ocito i Nayot ma i Rama. Cwiny pa Lubaŋa obino opoto i kome bene, obedo ka wot kun tito lok pa Lubaŋa macalo lanebi, kun woto oo kwede wa i Nayot ma ‘i Rama." 
1Samuel19:24 En bene ocako lunyo boŋone woko, otito lok pa Lubaŋa macalo lanebi i nyim Camuel. Obuto munero i nino meno dyeceŋ ki dyewor benebene. Mumiyo giwacci, “Caulo bene tye i kin lunebi?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Daudi olwi oriŋo woko ki i Nayot ma i Rama, ocito bot Yonacan owacci, “An atimo gin aŋo? Aroco gin aŋo? Abalo gin aŋo i nyim woru mumiyo en mito neka-ni?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Yonacan ogamo ni, “Meno pe twero timme! Pe myero ito. Nen; wora pe tiyo gin mo madit nyo matidi ma pe otito bota; ci lok aŋo ma miyo wora munna lok man? Pe tye kit meno.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Ento Daudi odok iye ni, “Woru ŋeyo maber ni doŋ ayomo cwinyi; dok’ en tamo ni, ‘Pe giwek Yonacan one lok man, wek pe obed ki kumo.’ Ento me adane, macalo Rwot tye makwo, dok macalo tiponi bene tye makwo-ni, an ki to kinwa doŋ cok.”" 
1Samuel20:4 Yonacan dok owaco bot Daudi ni, “Gin ducu ma iwaco abitiyo piri.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Daudi ogamo dog Yonacan ni, “Nen, dwe diki por; pe myero bedo ki kabaka i dog cam oloya. Ento wek koŋ aciti, acikanne woko i bar nio Wa i nino me adekke wi otyeno." 
1Samuel20:6 Ka woru openyo pira, ci iwac ni, ‘Daudi openya matek ni giyene me cito wa i gaŋgi Beterekem oyoto, pien timo gitum tye ma bedo kunnu i doggolagi mwaka ki mwaka.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Ka ce ogamo ni, ‘Ber!’ ci abibedo maber; ento ka obedo ki kiniga, ci ber iŋe ni tim marac doŋ otyeko mo ko i cwinye." 
1Samuel20:8 Mumiyo in itima ber, pien doŋ iketo gicikke maleŋ i kin in ki an. Ento ka roc mo tye i koma, ci in kikomi aye ineka. Piŋo iweko apoto i ciŋ woru?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Yonacan ogamo ni, “Pe twero timme i komi! Ka ce aŋeyo ni tim marac doŋ otyeko moko i cwiny wora, ci pe atito boti?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Daudi dok owaco bot Yonacan ni, “Aŋa mono ma doŋ bititta ka woru ogammi lok taro?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Yonacan owaco bot Daudi ni, “Bin wek wacit i bar.” Ci gin aryo ducu gucito i bar." 
1Samuel20:12 Yonacan owaco bot Daudi ni, “Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael obed caden i kinwa! Ka doŋ atyeko ŋeyo tam pa wora, diki ka onyoo, nyo i nino me adekke, nen, ka tamme ber i komi in Daudi, ci abicwalo lok atito boti," 
1Samuel20:13 Ento ka wora mito timi marac, Rwot myero oket can i koma kit meno ki makato bene ka pe atito lokke boti ci acwali woko cen wek icit giri maber. Rwot aye obed kwedi kit ma yam obedo ki wora-ni." 
1Samuel20:14 Ka ce pud atye makwo, ci ibed kweda ki mar pa Rwot ma pe lokke-ni, wek pe ato." 
1Samuel20:15 Dok pe ikwany marri woko ki i kom jo me oda matwal. Ka ce Rwot bikwanyo lumerokki ducu ki i lobo," 
1Samuel20:16 pe iwek gicikkewa wan kwedi gitur. Ka ce gituro, Rwot biculo kwor i komi.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Ci Yonacan dok omiyo Daudi okwoŋo kwoŋ kun ocikke kwede pi mare, pien Yonacan onoŋo maro Daudi kit ma maro kwede tipo kome kekene." 
1Samuel20:18 Yonacan dok owaco bot Daudi ni, “Dwe por diki. In doŋ ibibedo pe, kom bedoni bidoŋ noŋo," 
1Samuel20:19 I nino me adekke gibipenyi matek; in doŋ icit, i kabedo ma yam ikanne iye i kare ma lok gilaro ci ibed i ŋet got ma giguro-ni," 
1Samuel20:20 An abibayo atero adek ka ŋete ma nen calo abecelo gin mo," 
1Samuel20:21 Nen, abicwalo latin awobi kun awacci, ‘Cit ka yenyo atero.’ Ka ce awaco bot latin awobi-nu ni, ‘Nen, atero tye tuŋ boti kany, putgi woko,’ ci in ibidwogo, pien macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, noŋo gin mo pe ma timi marac," 
1Samuel20:22 Ento ka awaco bot awobi ni, ‘Nen atero tye wa i nyimi kuca,’ ci pe idwogi, pien noŋo Rwot aye ocwali woko cen." 
1Samuel20:23 Dok lok ma in ki an watyeko lokone, nen, Rwot tye i kin in ki an matwal.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Kumeno Daudi okanne woko i bar, Ka dwe opor, ci kabaka obedo piny ka cam." 
1Samuel20:25 Obedo i komme me nino ducu ma cok ki kor ot, ka Yonacan bedo kemo kabaka, ki Abneri dok bedo ka ŋet Caulo, ento kabedo pa Daud i tye noŋo." 
1Samuel20:26 Caulo pe oloko iye gin mo i nino meno, pien otamo ni, “Gin mo opoto i kome, omiyo pe etye ma elonnye, pe tye ma elonnye ada.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Ento i nino me aryone, orwone i nino mulubo por dwe, kom bedo pa Daudi obedo noŋo, ci Caulo ocako penyo wode Yonacan ni, “Piŋo wod pa Yece pe obino ka cam, cakke wa laworo ki tin bene?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonacan ogamo dog Caulo ni, “Daudi openya matek ni giyene me cito Beterekem." 
1Samuel20:29 Olego ni, ‘Wek aciti, pien jo me doggolawa gitye ka tumo gitum i gaŋ, omera ociko ni abed kunnu. Kombeddi, ka gum omaka i nyimi, ci wek aciti, acinen omegina.’ Pi lok meno omiyo en pe obino i dog cam boti, kabaka.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Kiniga otugi mako Caulo i kom Yonacan cut. Owaco bote ni, “In i wod pa dako ma ŋute oteŋ, ma lajemo; pe Onoŋo an doŋ aŋeyo ni cwinyi otyeko maro wod pa Yece, ma lewicce bimaki giri, ma lewicce bimako wa meni bene?" 
1Samuel20:31 Pien Kitma wod pa Yece bedo kwede i wi lobo-ni, kadi in nyo kerri pe bimoko matwal. Pienno cwal dano wek okele bota, pien en bi to ada.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Yonacan ogamo dog wonne Caulo ni, “Gibineke woko pi gin aŋo? Otimo gin aŋo?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Ento Caulo obaye ki toŋ, mumiyo Yonacan oŋeyo ni cwiny wonne otyeko moko pi neko Daudi," 
1Samuel20:34 Yonacan oa woko ki i dog cam ki kiniga madwoŋ, ci pe dok ocamo cam mo i nino dwe me aryone, pien cwinye obedo ka kumo pi Daudi, pien wonne onoŋo oyeto Daudi." 
1Samuel20:35 Orwone Yonacan ocito i bar ka ma ocikke iye ki Daudi, kacel ki latin awobi mo." 
1Samuel20:36 Owaco bot awobine ni, “Rin iciput atero, ma abibayo-ni.” Ka awobi-nu oberiŋo, ci obayo atero ocuŋ wa i nyime." 
1Samuel20:37 Ka latin awobi-nu oo ka ma Yonacan obayo iye atero-ni, Yonacan olwoŋo awobi-nu kun wacci, “Atero tye wa i nyimi kuca.”" 
1Samuel20:38 Dok olwoŋo awobi-nu kun wacci, “Rune itim oyoto, pe iru!” Awobi pa Yonacan ocoko atero ducu, odwogo kwedgi bot laditte." 
1Samuel20:39 Ento awobi pe oneyo iye gin mo; kono Yonacan ki Daudi aye giŋeyo lokke. 
1Samuel20:40 Yonacan omiyo jamine ducu bot awobine, ocike ni, “Doŋ icit, idwokgi wa gaŋ.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Ka awobi ocito, ci Daudi otugi a malo ki i ŋet got ma giguro-ni, opoto i ŋom aryeba cwiny, okulo wiye piny k idek, Gucako noto lemgi kekengi ki mot me mar, ka gukok ki pig waŋgi kekengi ento Daudi aye obedo ki kumo madwoŋ." 
1Samuel20:42 Yonacan dok owaco bot Daudi ni, “Cit giri ki kuc, macalo doŋ watyeko kwoŋo kwoŋ kekenwa i nyiŋ Rwot, kun wawacci, ‘Rwot bibedo i kin an ki in, ki i kin likwaya ki likwayi matwal.’ ” Ka lacen Daudi oa opokke kwede, ci Yonacan odok i gaŋ." 
1Samuel21:1 Daudi ocito i Nob bot Akimelek ma ajwaka pa Lubaŋa, Akimelek obino ka jolo wi Daudi ki myelkom kun penye ni, “Piŋo it ye keni ma ŋat acel mo pe kacel kwedi?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Daudi ogamo dog ajwaka Akimelek ni, “Kabaka ocika ki lok mo kun waco bota ni, ‘Pe iwek ŋatti mo one lok ma acwali pire-ni, ki lok ma aciki kwede.’ Pienno doŋ acikke ki jona pi kabedo ma abirwatte iye kwedgi." 
1Samuel21:3 Kombeddi it ye ki gin aŋo i ciŋi? Miya mugati abic, nyo gin mo keken ma tye boti.”" 
1Samuel21:4 Ajwaka odok iye bot Daudi ni, “Pe tye mugati mo me nino ducu-ni i ciŋa, ento atye ki mugati maleŋ, Ka ce gin awobeni gupokke woko ki mon i kin kare-ni, atwero mini.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Daudi ogamo dog ajwaka ni, “Me adane, mon gipokke woko kwedwa kare ducu ka wacito ka mo, ki kom awobe gibedo leŋ kadi bed wot me nino ducu. Pe myero komgi obed leŋ makato tin ma wacito i lok ma pire tek-k i?”" 
1Samuel21:6 Kit meno ajwaka omine mugati maleŋ; pien onoŋo mugati mo pe bote, kono mugati me aketa i nyim Lubaŋa keken, en aye gikwanyo ki i nyim Rwot, ma gidwoko waŋe ki mugati manyen ma pud lyet i nino meno kikome ma gikwanyo-ni." 
1Samuel21:7 Laco mo ma i kin lutic pa Caulo onoŋo tye kunnu i nino meno, obedo ka dikke i nyim Rwot, Nyiŋe Doeg, Laedom, ma ladit pa lukwat pa Caulo." 
1Samuel21:8 Daudi dok owaco bot Akimelek ni, “Itye ki pala lucwan nyo toŋ mo kany? Pe akelo kadi pala lucwan kadi wa jami lweny mo, pien or pa kabaka obedo rucurucu.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Ajwaka ogamo kun wacci, “Pala lucwan pa Goliac ma Lapiliciti ma yam ineko i nota Ela tye kany, Nen, tye ma giboyo kome woko ki boŋo giketo i ŋe epod. En ene; ka imito terone, ter do, pien mukene pe, ennu keken tye kany.” Daudi owacci, “Pe tye mo ma rom ki meno; mina do.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Daudi oa woko ki kunnu i nino meno kun riŋo ki bot Caulo, ocito bot Akic, kabaka me Gat." 
1Samuel21:11 Lutic pa Akic guwaco bote ni, “Man aye Daudi ma kabaka me lobo-ni. Yam giwere kun mon gimyelo kwede ma giwero ni, Taulo oneko mere dano alip, ento Daudi oneko alip apar.’ ”" 
1Samuel21:12 Daudi okano lok meno i cwinye, ci obedo ki lworo madwoŋ i kom Akic, kabaka me Gat," 
1Samuel21:13 Oloko kit bedone i nyimgi pi lworo, ocako banne woko i ciŋgi macalo lapoya, obedo ka goro kom kika me doggola ma i dog gaŋ, kun oweko laa doge mol i tike." 
1Samuel21:14 Akic owaco bot luticce ni, “Nenu, laco-ni lapoya; piŋo dok wukelo bota kany?" 
1Samuel21:15 An can lupoya omaka bo, mumiyo wukelo laco man ka nyuto apoyane i nyima? Wumito laco man odony wa i oda?”" 
1Samuel22:1 Daudi oa woko ki kunnu, ocito i boro got ma tye Adulam. Ka omegine guwinyo pire, ki jo mukene me doggola pa kwarogi, gucito bote." 
1Samuel22:2 Wa ki dano ducu ma can odiŋogi ki dano ma gucamo banya, ki dano ma piny oloyogi, gucokke botgi, en odoko ladit ma loyogi, obedo ki dano ma cok romo miya aŋwen." 
1Samuel22:3 Daudi oa ki kunnu, ocito i Mijpe ma i lobo Moab. Owaco bot kabaka me Moab ni, “Alegi iwek wora ki maa gubed boti, nio ka abiŋeyo gin ma Lubaŋa bitiyo i koma.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Owekogi bot kabaka me Moab, ci gubedo kwede i kare ducu ma Daudi tye ka kanne i godi." 
1Samuel22:5 Lanebi Gad dok owaco bot Daudi ni, “Pe ibed ka kanne i godi, A woko, icit i lobo Juda.” Mumiyo Daudi oa woko ki kunnu, ocito i buŋa Keret." 
1Samuel22:6 Caulo onoŋo bedo i Gibea, i te yat anaŋa ma i kabedo mutiŋŋe malo. Cen mo ka obedo kunnu ki toŋŋe i ciŋe, kun luticce ducu gucuŋ cok kwede, owinyo ni ginoŋo kom Daudi ki jo ma gitye kwede." 
1Samuel22:7 Owaco bot luticce ma gucuŋ i ŋete ni, “Tin wuwiny, wun jo pa Benjamin, Wutamo ni wod pa Yece bimiyo poto me apura bot ŋat acel acel i kinwu, ki poto olok? En biketowu ducu wubedo lulo dano alip nyo lulo dano miya," 
1Samuel22:8 mumiyo wun ducu wupiro lok i koma? Pe tye ŋat mo mutito bota ni woda ocikke ki wod pa Yece. Pe tye ŋat mo ma cwinye cwer pira. Ŋat mo pe mutitta ni woda orubo cwiny dano ma yam laticca wek oliba, macalo i nino man.”" 
1Samuel22:9 Doeg ma Laedom ogamo doge ki ka ma ocuŋ iye ka ŋet lutic pa Caulo, owacci, “An aye aneno wod pa Yece ka ocito Nob bot Akimelek wod pa Akitub," 
1Samuel22:10 ci Akimelek openyo dog Rwot pire, dok omiye cam, ki pala lucwan pa Goliac ma Lapiliciti.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Kabaka ocwalo kwena pi lwoŋo ajwaka Akimelek wod pa Akitub ki ludoggola pa kwarone ducu, gin ajwagi pa Lubaŋa ducu ma gitye i Nob; ci gin ducu gubino bot kabaka," 
1Samuel22:12 Caulo owaco ni, “Doŋ iwiny, in wod pa Akitub.” En ogamo ni, “An atye ene, rwoda.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Caulo openye ni, “Piŋo wupiro lok i koma, in ki wod pa Yece, dok imine cam ki pala lucwan, ka ipenyo dog Rwot pire, omiyo obino ka lweny i koma ki ka liba, macalo en tye ka timo i kare-ni?”" 
1Samuel22:14 Akimelek ogamo dog ka baka ni, “Kabaka, aŋa ma i kin luticci ma lagen macalo Daudi, ma obedo oru bene, dok ladit pa lugwok kwoni, dano ma giworo mada i odi!’" 
1Samuel22:15 Tin aye tyen mukwono ma apenyo kwede dog Lubaŋa pire? Pe kumeno, ladit kabaka, Pe itam lok mo marac i koma nyo i kom jo me doggola pa kwarona, Pe aŋeyo lok mo wacel i kom lok ma iwaco-ni.”" 
1Samuel22:16 Kabaka owacce ni, “Ibito ada, Akimelek, in kacel ki jo me doggolawu ducu.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Ci kabaka owaco bot dano ma gigwoke ma gucuŋ cok kwede ni, “Wunek ajwagi pa Rwot woko, pien guribo ciŋgi ki Daudi. Giŋeyo ni olwi woko, ci pe gutito bota.” Ento lutic pa ka baka gukwero gudo kom ajwagi pa Rwot." 
1Samuel22:18 Kabaka dok owaco bot Doeg ma Laedom ni, “In aye inek ajwagi-ni.” Ci Doeg ma Laedom oneko ajwagi ducu. I nino meno oneko dano pyeraboro wiye abic ma giromo ruko epod me boŋo camanini ma ajwagi pa Lubaŋa giruko-ni." 
1Samuel22:19 Caulo dok omiyo gineko dano ducu ma i Nob ma gaŋ pa ajwagi; gityekogi woko ducu ki pala lucwan, co wa ki mon, litino ki litino lukere ma pud dot, kacel ki twoni dyaŋi ki kana ki romi-gu," 
1Samuel22:20 Ento ŋat acel ki i kin awobe pa Akimelek wod pa Akitub obwot, nyiŋe Abiatar. Oriŋo olubo kor Daudi," 
1Samuel22:21 ci otito bote ni, Caulo otyeko neko ajwagi pa Rwot woko." 
1Samuel22:22 Daudi owaco bot Abiatar ni, “Onoŋo yam aŋeyo lokke wa i nino ma aneno Doeg ma Laedom kunnu. I nino-nu yam aniaŋ ni bitito bot Caulo ada. An aye akelo to man i kom doggola pa kwarowu." 
1Samuel22:23 Doŋ ibed kweda, pe ilwor, pien ŋat ma mito neka noŋo mito neki bene. Ka ibedo kweda abigwoki maber.”" 
1Samuel23:1 I kare ca gitito bot Daudi ni “lo Piliciti gitye ka lweny i kom jo Keila, gitye ka yako kalgi woko ki i laro moyo,”" 
1Samuel23:2 Pienno Daudi openyo dog Rwot ni, “Acit ilweny i kom jo Piliciti meno?” Rwot ogamo dog Daudi ni, “Cit icilweny i kom jo Piliciti wek ilar jo Keila.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Ento jo pa Daudi guwaco bote ni, “Nen, kany i Juda wabedo ki lworo madwoŋ, Pe bedo rac mada ka dok wacito i Keila ka lweny ki mony pa jo Piliciti?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Ci Daudi dok openyo dog Rwot. Rwot owaco bote ni, “A malo, icit i Keila pien abimiyo jo Piliciti i ciŋi.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Daudi kijone gucito i Keila, gulwenyo i kom jo Piliciti, gudwogo cen ki dyaŋigi, ma onoŋo guneko lwak jo mapol i komgi. Daudi olaro jo Keila kit meno." 
1Samuel23:6 Ka Abiatar wod pa Akimelek oriŋo bot Daudi i Keila, ocito ki epod i ciŋe." 
1Samuel23:7 Dok gitito bot Caulo ni Daudi doŋ ocito i Keila. Caulo ogamo ni, “Lubaŋa doŋ otyeko miye woko i ciŋa, pien odonyo i gaŋ ma tye ki doggola ma gicego ki rii, ci oloro iye wiye kekene.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Caulo olwoŋo lwak ducu ka lweny wek gucit i Keila ka rumo wi Daudi ki jone kunnu. 
1Samuel23:9 Daudi oniaŋ ni Caulo tye ka piro lok marac i kome, ci owaco bot ajwaka Abiatar ni, “Kel epod kany.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Ci Daudi olego ni, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, awinyo ni Caulo tye ka yenyo yo me bi no Keila wek etyek gaŋ man woko pira." 
1Samuel23:11 Ci doŋ apenyo ni, jo Keila gibimiya i ciŋ Caulo? Caulo bibino, kit ma awinyoni? Ai Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, abako doga boti, titta ba,” Rwot owaco bote ni, ‘En bibino.’’’" 
1Samuel23:12 Daudi dok openyo ni, “Jo Keila gibimiya ki jona i cin Caulo?” Rwot ogamo ni, “Gibimiyi bote.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Ci Daudi ki jo ma gitye bote ma giromo miya abicel gua woko ki i Keila, guket, gucito ka ma giromo wot iye. Ka dok gitito bot Caulo ni, Daudi doŋ oriŋo woko ki i Keila, ci pe doŋ ocito kunnu." 
1Samuel23:14 Daudi obedo i kakannene i dye tim, i lobo godi ma i tim Jip. Caulo obedo ka yenye jwijwi, ento Lubaŋa pe omiye i ciŋe." 
1Samuel23:15 Daudi obedo ki lworo pien onoŋo Caulo tye ka yenye me aneka. I kare ca onoŋo. Daudi obedo i Korec ma tye i tim Jip," 
1Samuel23:16 ci Yonacan wod pa Caulo obino bote, ojiŋo cwinye i nyiŋ Lubaŋa kun waco bote ni," 
1Samuel23:17 “Pe ilwor, pien ciŋ wora pe bipoto i komi. Ibibedo kabaka ma loyo Icrael, an abibedo lalub kori. Wora Caulo bene ŋeyo kumeno.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Ci gin aryo ducu geketo gicikkegi i nyim Rwot. Lacen Daudi odoŋ i Korec, ci Yonacan odok paco." 
1Samuel23:19 Jo Jip gucito bot Caulo i Gibea, guwaco bote ni, “Daudi tye i kakannene i kinwa, i Kortec, i kom got Kakila ma i Jecimon yo tuŋ acuc." 
1Samuel23:20 In kabaka bin doŋ, kit macalo cwinyi mito bino-ni, ci wan aye wabimiye i ciŋi.”" 
1Samuel23:21 Caulo ogamo ni, “Rwot aye omiwu gun pien kica omakowu i koma." 
1Samuel23:22 Wun wucit ka penyo kakare maber wek wuŋe kabedo ma en bedo iye, ki ŋat munene kunne; pien gitta ni en kwiri mada." 
1Samuel23:23 Koŋ wucinen, wuŋi kabedo ducu ma en maro kanne iye, wek wudwog ma donŋ wuniaŋ atir. Ka doŋ abicito kunnu kacel kwedwu. Tekke en tye i lobo man ka mo, ci abiyenye ki i kin kaka ducu ma gitye i Juda.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Ci gua gukwoŋo nyim Caulo gucito i Jip. I kare-nu onoŋo Daudi ki jone gitye i Maon, i Araba cok ki Jecimon, yo tuŋ acuc." 
1Samuel23:25 Caulo ocito kacel ki jone ka yenye, ento gitito bot Daudi, omiyo ocito obedo i luŋ matut i kin godi ma i tim Maon. Ka Caulo owinyo pire, ci olubo kor Daudi wa kunnu." 
1Samuel23:26 Caulo woto rabo ŋet luŋ tuŋcel kun Daudi ki jone onoŋo girabo ŋet luŋ tuŋcel. Daudi orune me a woko ki ka ŋet Caulo, pien onoŋo jo pa Caulo ginyiko cok ki Daudi ki jone wek gimakgi woko." 
1Samuel23:27 Ci lakwena mo dok obino bot Caulo ma wacci, “Rune ibin oyoto, pien jo Piliciti gubino ka monyo lobo.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Caulo oa woko ki ka lubo kor Daudi, ociko ka lweny ki jo Piliciti; mumiyo gicato nyiŋ kabedo-nu ni, Got me Pokke." 
1Samuel23:29 Daudi oa ki kunnu, ocito obedo i En-gedi i kakannene." 
1Samuel24:1 Ka Caulo odwogo ki ka lubo kor jo Piliciti, ci gitito bote ni, “Daudi tye i tim En-gedi.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Caulo ocoko dano alip adek ma giyerogi ki i kin jo Icraelducu, ci ocito kwedgi ka yenyo Daudi i nyim godi Ladyel-tim." 
1Samuel24:3 Ocito ka ma dwol romi tye tye i ŋet yo, ka ma boro bene tye iye; ci Caulo oŋak woko i boro ka konnye. Onoŋo Daudi ki jone bene gitye i boro meno, wa i tyelone." 
1Samuel24:4 Jo pa Daudi guwacce ni, “Tin aye nino ma yam Rwot owacci pire ni, ‘Nen abimiyo lamerokki i ciŋi, in doŋ ibitime kit ma imito.’ ” Daudi oa malo okwalle, ci oŋolo dog boŋo jor pa Caulo." 
1Samuel24:5 Lacen cwiny Daudi opoto, pien oniaŋ ni etimo bal." 
1Samuel24:6 Ci owaco bot jone ni, “Lubaŋa okwero ni pe atim kit gin macalo man i kom rwoda ma en dano ma Rwot owiro; pe myero aket ciŋa i kome, pien Rwot doŋ owire woko.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Daudi ojuko jone ki lok meno, ci pe oye ni gulweny i kom Caulo. Caulo oa molo, oa woko ki i boro got, omedde ki wotte." 
1Samuel24:8 Lacen Daudi bene oa malo, ocito i dog boro, olwoŋo Caulo kun wacci, “Rwoda ki kabakana!” Ka Caulo oneno ŋeye, ci Daudi okulo wiye piny i ŋom, omiye woro." 
1Samuel24:9 Daudi owaco bot Caulo ni, “Laditta, piŋo ibedo ka winyo lok pa jo ma ŋiwaco ni atye ka yenyi wek atimi rac?" 
1Samuel24:10 Nen, ka tin Rwot omiyi i ciŋa i boro man, kun onoŋo jo mukene guwaco bota ni aneki woko. Ento an aye aweki omiyo ibwot. Awacci pe atwero keto ciŋa i komi, rwoda, pien in dano ma Rwot owiro." 
1Samuel24:11 Doŋ inen, wora, nen dog jorri i ciŋa en. Nen, aŋolo dog jorri ci pe aneki. Myero doŋ iŋe dok inen atir ni, pe atye ki gin mo marac nyo roro mo i cwinya. Pe atimo bal mo i komi, kadi ka itye ka yenya ma imito neka woko." 
1Samuel24:12 Ber Rwot aye oŋol kop i kin an ki in, ber Rwot aye ocul kworra i komi; ento ciŋa pe bigudo komi." 
1Samuel24:13 Kit ma carolok pa ludoŋo wacci, ‘Bal nywalo bal wadi;’ ento pe abiketo can i komi." 
1Samuel24:14 In kabaka pa Icrael kulu ibino ka lubo kor aŋa? Ilubo kor gwok muto, kor ladep mamwa-ni!" 
1Samuel24:15 Peinno Rwot aye doŋ obed laŋolkop en oŋol i kin an ki in, onen kite, dok opid ma kakara, wek olara ki i ciŋi.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Ka Daudi otyeko waco lok meno ducu bot Caulo. Caulo openyo ni, “Meno dwani bo, Daudi, latinna?” Ci ocako koko kun waco bot Daudi ni," 
1Samuel24:17 “In cwinyi leŋ kato cwinya woko, pien itima maber kun an atimi marac." 
1Samuel24:18 Tin doŋ inyuto woko ka maleŋ kit ma itima kwede maber, en aye omiyo pe ineka i kare ma Rwot omiya woko i ciŋi." 
1Samuel24:19 Ada, ka dano mo onoŋo kom lamerokke owee, ci biweko bwot ma pe opoto i kome? Myero Rwot omini mot maber, kit macalo tin itimo kwede i koma-ni." 
1Samuel24:20 Tin doŋ aŋeyo ada ni, in ibibedo kabaka, dok ker me Icrael bimoko matek i ciŋi." 
1Samuel24:21 Doŋ ikwonna kwoŋ ki nyiŋ Rwot ni, pe ibijwero likwayo ma gilubo ŋeya woko, dok pe ibijwayo nyiŋa woko ki i doggola pa kwara.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Daudi okwoŋo kwoŋ kit ma Caulo omito-ni, Lacen Caulo odok paco, ento Daudi ki jone gudok i kakannegi." 
1Samuel25:1 Ka Camuel oto, ci jo Icrael ducu gucokke, gukumo pire, ci giyike i gaŋŋe ma i Rama. Lacen Daudi dok oa ocito i tim Paran." 
1Samuel25:2 Laco mo onoŋo tye kunnu i Maon, ma tiyo ticce i Karmel. Lacone lalonyo mada; tye ki romi alip adek ki dyegi alip acel. I kare ca en obedo ka ŋolo yer romine i Karmel." 
1Samuel25:3 Nyiŋ laconu Nabal, ki nyiŋ dakone Abigail. En dako ma ŋeyo piny mada, dok mwonya bene, ento cware aye lakolo dok ger. Doggolane jo Kaleb." 
1Samuel25:4 Ka Daudi owinyo ki i tim ni Nabal tye ka ŋolo yer romine," 
1Samuel25:5 ci ocwalo awobe apar bote. Ocikogi ni, “Wucit i Karmel bot Nabal, wucwal motta bote," 
1Samuel25:6 wuwac bote ni, ‘Daudi omoti, owacci, kuc obed i komi, omera, ki i kom jo me odi, ki jo ducu ma gitye boti." 
1Samuel25:7 Awinyo ni it ye ka ŋolo yer romini. I kare ducu ma lukwatti gubedo i Karmel wabedo kacel kwedgi. Pe watimogi marac, dok bene gin mo pe oloyogi." 
1Samuel25:8 Peny awobeni, ci gibititti. Pienno wek awobena gunoŋ gum boti tin, pien gubino i nino me camo karama, Alegi imi botgi gin ma itwero noŋo pigi ki pira, an wodi Daudi.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Ka awobe pa Daudi guo kunnu, guwaco lok meno ducu bot Nabal ma ka-ka Daudi; ci gubedo ka kurone." 
1Samuel25:10 Nabal odok iye bot lutic pa Daudi ni, “Daudi en aŋa? Aŋa ma wod pa Yece-ni? I kare man tye lwak lutic mapol ma gutenyo luditogi." 
1Samuel25:11 Ci an dok akwany mugatina ki piina, ki riŋo ma aneko pi luŋol yer romina, ami bot dano mo ata ma gua ka ma pe aneyoni?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Pi lok meno awobe pa Daudi gulokke gudok woko cen ci gutito lok man ducu bote," 
1Samuel25:13 Daudi owaco bot jone ni, “Dano acel acel otwe pala lucwanne!” Ci dano acel acel otweyo pala lucwanne ki Daudi bene otweyo mere. Jo miya aŋwen gucito i kor Daudi, kun jo miya aryo gudoŋ ka kuro jami." 
1Samuel25:14 Ento awobi mo acel otito bot Abigail dako pa Nabal ni, “Nen, Daudi ocwalo lukweria ki i tim gubino ka moto laditwa; ci en otugge i komgi magwa," 
1Samuel25:15 kun kono jo-nu giber i komwa, pe wabedo ki can mo, ki gin mo pe orem botwa i kare ma watye i bar kwat, i kare ducu ma wawoto kacel kwedgi," 
1Samuel25:16 Gin aye gubedo celwa dyewor ki dyeceŋ bene i kare ducu ma wabedo ka kwayo romi. 
1Samuel25:17 Ber in aye iŋe lok-ki, wek inen gin ma myero itim, pien can bipoto i kom laditwa ki i kom jo me ode ducu; en tye ki gero keken, ma dano mo pe twero lok kwede.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Abigail oa malo liwic, okwanyo mugati miya aryo, opiru kono vino aryo, riŋo romi abic ma gitedo, nyig bel ma gicelo aduku abic, tuga olok mutwone miya acel ki poki otini miya aryo, ci oketogi i wi kana wek gutiŋ." 
1Samuel25:19 Owaco bot awobene ni, “Wucit wutel nyima, abibino alubo korwu.” Ento pe otito lokke bot cware Nabal," 
1Samuel25:20 Oito i wi kana, ocako wot, ci olor piny ka ma got ocego iye piny. Ci nen, Daudi ki lwakke bene gitye ka lor piny gikemo en, ci en oromo kwedgi." 
1Samuel25:21 Onoŋo Daudi owacci, “Kara ada abedo ka gwoko lim pa laco-ni i tim noŋo, ma kun jamine mo pe orwenyo i kom wadigi. En otima marac kun an atime maber." 
1Samuel25:22 Lubaŋa myero oket can i koma kit meno ki makato bene, ka ce diki odiko aweko laco acel mo obwot ki i kom jo ma en tye kwedgi-ni.”" 
1Samuel25:23 Ka Abigail oneno Daudi, ci orune, olor woko piny ki i wi kanane, opoto i ŋom aryeba ic i nyim Daudi, okulo wiye piny." 
1Samuel25:24 Oryebbe piny ka tyene kun wacci, “Wek bal obed i koma keken Laditta. Alegi ni wek koŋ alok kwedi mot, laditta, iwiny lokka," 
1Samuel25:25 Pe ibed ka tamo lok pa Nabal ma lagikome-ni, pien kit ma nyiŋe tye kwede, kite bene tye kit meno, Nabal aye nyiŋe, miŋo bene oniaŋ woko i kome. An onoŋo pe aŋeyo, ladit, pe aneno kom awobe ma icwalogi." 
1Samuel25:26 Kombeddi, laditta, macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, ki tipo komi bene tye makwo-ni, doŋ inen ba, Rwot otyeko juki woko ni pe icitiŋ alii me remo kun iculo kwor ki ciŋi kikome. Wek lumerokki ki jo ma gimito timi marac gubed macalo laditta Nabal." 
1Samuel25:27 Doŋ igam mot ma luticca gukelo boti, rwoda, wek gimi bot awobe ma gilubo kori." 
1Samuel25:28 Tima kica pi balla, ladit; pien Rwot bimiyo odi cuŋ matek, pien it ye ka lwenyo pi Rwot, bal mo pe gibinoŋo i komi i kare me kwoni ducu." 
1Samuel25:29 Kadi jo mapol gubin ka lubo kori kun gimito neki woko, gibinoŋo kwoni giboyo kome woko i kin boc pa jo makwo ma Rwot Lubaŋani aye gwokogi. En bibayo kwo pa lumerokki wo ko macalo labaa latandiyo." 
1Samuel25:30 I kare ma Rwot doŋ otiyo i komi gin ducu maber ma oloko i komi-ni, laditta, ma doŋ oket i me bedo laker ma loyo jo Icrael," 
1Samuel25:31 ci doŋ pe ibibedo ki gin mo ma miyo ikumo, kadi tam marac mo ma obino pien yam ioyo remo noŋo, nyo iculo kworri in kikomi. I kare ma Rwot bitimi ber, ci ipo pira, ladit.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Daudi owaco bot Abigail ni, “Gipwo Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ma tin ocwali ka rwatte kweda-ni!" 
1Samuel25:33 Gipwoyi mulii, gum obed i komi, pi ryekoni maber, mumiyo ijuka tin, omiyo pe atiŋo alii me oyo remo, ki pi culo kworra kekena ki ciŋa kikome!" 
1Samuel25:34 Ada, kit ma Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael tye makwo-ni, en doŋ ojuka, pe atimi marac. Kono in pe irune ibino irwatte kweda, me adane kono tin laco mo acel pe obwot ki bot Nabal.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Daudi ogamo gin ma Abigail okelo, ci owaco bote ni, “Cit giri ki kuc idok i odi. Atyeko winyo dogi, dok ajolo legani.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Abigail ka odwogo bot Nabal, onoŋo tye ka camo karamane i ode, ma rom ki karama pa kabaka kulu. Cwinye obedo yom matek pien onoŋo omer woko twatwal, omiyo Abigail pe otito lok mo bote nio ka piny oru." 
1Samuel25:37 Odiko ka koŋo vino doŋ owarre woko ki i waŋe, en otito lok ducu bote. Kom Nabal oto woko lirut, kome ojiŋ woko matek calo got." 
1Samuel25:38 Ka nino okato apar, ci Rwot ogoyo Nabal oto woko." 
1Samuel25:39 Ka Daudi owinyo ni Nabal doŋ oto woko, ci owacci, “Gipwo Rwot ma oculo kworra pi anywar ma yam alimo ki bot Nabal, dok ojuka pe atimo bal mo. Rwot odwoko bal pa Nabal i wiye gire!” Ci Daudi ocwalo kwena me cako cunane i kom Abigail wek obed dakone," 
1Samuel25:40 Ka lutic pa Daudi guo bot Abigail i Karmel, ci guwaco bote ni, “Daudi ocwalowa boti ni wacit kwedi wek icibed dakone.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Abigail oa malo ci oryebbe piny i ŋom, owacci, “Nen, an aŋecane me Lwoko tyen luticce.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Orune oito i wi kanane, ocako wot i kor lukwena pa Daudi kacel ki anyirane abic ma konye, ci odoko dakone." 
1Samuel25:43 Onoŋo Daudi onyomo Akinoam me Jejreel bene, ci gin aryo ducu gubedo monne." 
1Samuel25:44 Ento onoŋo Caulo otyeko kwanyo nyare Mikal ma dako pa Daudi, omiyo bot Palti wod pa Laic ma bedo i Gallim." 
1Samuel26:1 Jo Jip dok gubino bot Caulo i Gibea, guwaco bo te ni, “Daudi tye okanne i wi got Kakila i Jecimon yo tuŋ wokceŋ.”" 
1Samuel26:2 Caulo oa ocito i tim Jip ki jo Icrael ma giyerogi ma romo alip adek; gucito ka yenyo Daudi i tim Jip. 
1Samuel26:3 Caulo ogony i wi got Kakila ma tye i ŋet gudo i Jecimon yo tuŋ wokceŋ; ento onoŋo Daudi tye mere i tim. Ka oneno Caulo olubo kore wa i tim," 
1Samuel26:4 ocwalo lurot-piny kunnu, ci gumoko atir ni Caulo obino ada." 
1Samuel26:5 Daudi oa obino i kabedo ka ma Caulo ogony iye, oneno kabedo ma Caulo obuto iye kacel ki Abneri wod pa Ner ma ladit ma loyo monnye. Caulo onoŋo obuto i kabedo ma gigeŋo ŋete, kun mony ogure dyere." 
1Samuel26:6 Ci Daudi owaco bot Akimelek ma Lakit, ki Abicai ma omin Joab wod pa Jeruya ni, “Aŋa ma bicito kacel kweda i gony bot Caulo?” Abicai ogamo ni; “An aye abicito kacel kwedi.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Daudi ki Abicai gucito i gony pa Caulo i nino meno, Caulo onoŋo obuto i kabedo ma gigeŋo ŋete, ki toŋŋe ocuŋ ka ŋete ma giguro i nom. Abneri ki lumony gubuto gugu re dyere." 
1Samuel26:8 Abicai owaco bot Daudi ni, “Tin Lubaŋa omiyo lamerokki i ciŋi, Wek doŋ aneke woko kombeddi kun aguro woko ki toŋ pil wa i nom kicel keken; pe abicobo kiryo.”" 
1Samuel26:9 Ento Daudi owaco bot Abicai ni, “Wek nekone obedi. Aŋa ma twero keto ciŋe i kom dano ma Rwot owiro ci pe bitiŋo alii?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Dok owacci, “Kit macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, Rwot aye bipwode gire; nyo ka nino me tone biromo, nyo bicito i mony ka mo, ci to ki kunnu." 
1Samuel26:11 Rwot pe ye ni aket ciŋa i kom dano ma en owiro. Ento ber waput toŋŋe ma tye ka wiye-ni, ki opoko piine, wek wacit woko.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Kit meno Daudi ocako puto toŋ pa Caulo, ka otino opoko piine ma onoŋo tye ka wiye, ci gucito woko. Dano mo pe onenogi nyo oneyo gin mutimme, ŋatti mo bene pe oco ki i waŋ nino; pien gin ducu gunino woko ki nino mapek mua ki bot Rwot, opoto i komgi ducu." 
1Samuel26:13 Daudi obaro dye nota, okato tuŋcel, ci ocuŋ ki ka mabor i wi got, ma kingi lac." 
1Samuel26:14 Ci Daudi ocako lwoŋo mony pa Caulo ki Abneri wod pa Ner kun waco ni, “Abneri, pe igamo doga ce?” Abneri ogamo ni, “In aŋa ma ilwoŋo kabaka-ni?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Daudi owaco bot Abner ni, “Pe in laco ce? Aŋa ma rom kwedi i Icrael? Ci piŋo pe ibedo ka gwoko laditti ma kabaka-ni? Pien dano mo obino wa botwu ka neko rwodi woko ki i kinwu," 
1Samuel26:16 Gin ma itimoni pe ber wacel. Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, myero gineki woko, pien pe ibedo ka gwoko laditti, ma en aye dano ma Rwot owiro. Kombeddi doŋ inen ka ma toŋ pa kabaka tye iye, ki opoko piine ma onoŋo tye ka wiye-ni!”" 
1Samuel26:17 Caulo oneyo dwan Daudi woko ci owacci, “Man aye dwani, Daudi, latinna?” Daudi ogamo ni, “En aye dwana, laditta, kabaka.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Daudi dok owacci; “Piŋo ibedo ka lubo kora, laditta? An mono atimo gin aŋo? Atiŋo kit alii aŋo?" 
1Samuel26:19 Kombeddi doŋ iwiny lokka, laditta kabaka. Ka ce Rwot aye opiyo in i koma, ci wek en ogam gityer, ento ka dano aye gupiyo in, ci wek gicengi woko ki i nyim Rwot, pien gutyeko ryema woko wek pe anywak bedo kwedgi i lobo ma Rwot omiyo botwa me aleya-ni, kun giwacci, ‘Cit woko icitii ki lubaŋa mukene-gu.’" 
1Samuel26:20 Kombeddi pe iwek remona ocwer i ŋom i lobo pa lurok ka mabor ki i nyim Rwot; pien kabaka me Icrael obino ka lubo kora kun mito neka woko, macalo dano ma dwaro anyeri i kin godi.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Caulo dok ogamo ni, “Atimo rac, Doŋ idwog cen, Daudi, latinna, pe doŋ abitimi rac matwal, pien kwona tin obedo me wel i nyimi. Nen, abedo ka nyuto minona, omiyo aŋak ka mabor twatwal.”" 
1Samuel26:22 Daudi ogamo ni, “Tonni doŋ ennu, kabaka! Wek ŋat acel ki i kin awobe obin kany ka omone." 
1Samuel26:23 Rwot culo dano ki acel acel kit ma cwinye atir kwede ki ma lubo kit genne; pien tin doŋ Rwot omiyi i ciŋa, ci an pe atiŋo ciŋa aketo i komi pien in dano ma Rwot owiro," 
1Samuel26:24 Kit macalo tin kwoni obedo me wel i nyima-ni, kit meno kwona bene myero obed me wel i nyim Rwot, dok myero en aye olara i aromana ducu.”" 
1Samuel26:25 Caulo dok ogamo dog Daudi ni, “Gum obed i komi, Daudi, latinna! Ibitiyo gin mapol, dok ibiloyogi ducu maber.” Ci Daudi ocito gire, ki Caulo bene odok i kabedone," 
1Samuel27:1 Daudi olwodo lok ki i cwinye ni, “An ba, olo Caulo biketo ciŋe i koma i nino mo keken ci neka woko cut, Pienno yo mu kene pe, myero alwi ariŋ acit woko wa i lobo pa jo Piliciti; ci cwiny Caulo bia woko i koma, pe doŋ biyenya ki i waŋ lobo pa jo Icrael, miyo abilaro kwona ki i cine.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Daudi ocako a woko ki kunnu, en ki jone miya abicel ma onoŋo gitye bote, ci gucito bot Akic wod pa Maok, kabaka me Gat." 
1Samuel27:3 Daudi obedo ki Akic i Gat, en ki lwakke ducu, kun dano acel acel ocito ki jo me ode. Daudi onoŋo otero monne aryo, Akinoam me Jejreel ki Abigail me Karmel, ma yam obedo dako pa Lyel Nabal." 
1Samuel27:4 Ka gitito bot Caulo ni Daudi doŋ oriŋo woko wa i Gat, ci pe dok obedo ka yenyo kore matwal." 
1Samuel27:5 Daudi dok owaco bot Akic ni, “Ka bedona boti oyomo cwinyi, ci gimiya kabedo mo ma i kin gaŋi ma i lobo-ni wek abed iye kunnu, Piŋo an laticci abedo kwedi kacel i gaŋ kaili?”" 
1Samuel27:6 Akic omiye Jiklag, mumiyo Jiklag odoko gaŋ pa luker me Juda nio wa onyoo." 
1Samuel27:7 Kare ma Daudi obedo kwede i lobo pa jo Piliciti oromo mwaka acel ki dwe aŋwen," 
1Samuel27:8 I kare-nu Daudi ki, jone gubedo ka monyo mony i kom jo Gecur, jo Girij ki jo Amalek ma gin aye wegi lobo kunnu cakke wa con, guo kwede i Cur wa ki i Ejipt," 
1Samuel27:9 Ka Daudi omonyo lobo-nu, pe oweko laco mo kadi dako mo odoŋ makwo; oyako romi, dyaŋi, kana, kinaga wa ki boŋŋi ka odwogo kwede bot Akic." 
1Samuel27:10 Ka Akic openye ni, “Tin icito ka monyo jo mene?” Daudi ogamo ni, “Amonyo lobo Negeb ma tye i lobo Juda,” nyo ni, “Alwenyo i kom Negeb pa jo Jeramel,” nyo ni, “Amonyo Negeb pa jo Keni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Daudi pe oweko laco mo nyo dako mo obwot makwo, pien onoŋo olworo ni, “Miyo gibitito lok ma i komwa, ni, ‘Daudi otimo gin munyo.’’’ Meno aye obedo kite i kare ma obedo kwede i lobo pa jo Piliciti." 
1Samuel27:12 Akic obedo ka geno Daudi kun tamo ni, “Jo tugi doŋ gidage matek twatwal, pienno en doŋ bibedo laticca matwal.”" 
1Samuel28:1 I kare meno jo Piliciti guoto monygi pi lweny i kom jo Icrael. Akic owaco bot Daudi ni, “Ber iŋe ni in ki joni wubicito ka mony kacel kwedwa.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Daudi ogamo dog Akic ni, “Ber matek, laditta, doŋ ibiŋeyo gin ma atwero tiyone.” Akic dok owaco bot Daudi ni, “Abiketi ibedo lagwok kwona matwal.”" 
1Samuel28:3 I kare meno onoŋo Camuel doŋ oto woko. Jo Icrael ducu gukumo pire ci guyike i Rama i gaŋŋe kikome. Caulo yam koŋ onoŋo oryemo lukor tipo ki megi jogi woko ki i lobone. 
1Samuel28:4 Jo Piliciti gucokke ci gutoŋo gonygi i Cunem, Caulo bene ocoko jo Icrael ducu ci gin gutoŋo gonygi i Gilboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Ka Caulo oneno mony pa jo Piliciti, ci obedo ki lworo, cwinye ocako myel matek." 
1Samuel28:6 Ka Caulo openyo dog Rwot, Rwot pe odokke iye lok mo, kadi wa, ki lek-gu, nyo ki Urim, nyo ki lok pa lunebi." 
1Samuel28:7 Ci Caulo owaco bot luricce ni, “Koŋ wuyennnya dako mo ma lakor tipo, wek acit bote, acipeny doge.” Luticce guwacce ni, “Lakor tipo tye wa i En-dor.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Caulo oloko kite woko mapat, pien oruko ginaruka mapat, ci ocako wot ki jone aryo, Gucito guo bot dakonu dyewor. Caulo owaco bote ni, “Ber ikorra tipo, Mi jokki okella dano mo ma abituco nyiŋe boti.’" 
1Samuel28:9 Dako-nu ogamo doge ni, “Iŋeyo gin ma Caulo otiyo, kit ma oryemo kwede lukor tipo ki megi jogi-gu woko ki i lobone, Ci piŋo in dok ibino ka cika ki owic lamak kwona wek ineka woko?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Ento Caulo okwoŋo kwoŋ bo te ki nyir; Rwot kun wacci, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, pe can mo bipoto i komi pi lok man,”" 
1Samuel28:11 Ci dako-nu ogamo ni, “Abikelo aŋa boti?” Caulo ogamo ni, “Kella Camuel.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Ka dako-nu oneno: kom Camuel, ci odaŋŋe ki dwan matek, owaco bot Caulo ni, “Ibwola piŋo? In i Caulo kikome.”" 
1Samuel28:13 Kabaka owaco bot dako ni, “Pe ibed ki lworo, Ineno kom aŋo kaa?” Dako ogamo ni, “Aneno tipo mo obebino kun katti a ki piny i ŋom.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Caulo dok openyo ni, “Kite nen niŋniŋ mono?” Ogamo ni, “Dano ma oti aye obebino-ni; oumo kome woko ki jor.” Ci Caulo oniaŋ ni en aye Camuel kikome, okulo wiye piny oryebbe i nyime." 
1Samuel28:15 Camuel ocako lok ki Caulo ni, “Piŋo iyela kit man, idwoka dok woko?” Caulo ogamo ni, “Can aye tye odiŋa matek; pien jo Piliciti gitye ka lweny i koma, Lubaŋa bene otenya woko ata, Pe doŋ dokka iye kit lok mo, kadi wa lok pa lunebi, kadi wa lek-gu doŋ pe. En aye omiyo alwoŋi wek ititta gin ma myero atim.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Camuel ogamo ni, “Piŋo dok ipenyo an ma Rwot doŋ oweki woko-ni, odoko lamerokki?" 
1Samuel28:17 Rwot doŋ otimo i komi kit ma yam ocika kwede ci an bene atito lokke boti wa con ca, Rwot doŋ oyeco kerri woko okwanyo ki i ciŋi, ci doŋ otyeko miyone woko bot lawoti, en aye Daudi." 
1Samuel28:18 In yam pe iworo dog Rwot, pe icobo kiniga magwa pa Rwot i kom jo Amalek; en gin mumivo Rwot tye ka timi kit man i kare-ni." 
1Samuel28:19 Rwot bimiyo jo Icrael ki-in bene i ciŋ jo Piliciti; di ki in ki awobeni wubibedo kacel kweda. Rwot bimiyo mony pa jo Icrael i ciŋ jo Piliciti.” 
1Samuel28:20 Caulo otugi poto woko piny i ŋom, ci obuto piny Iibat pi lworo ma omake matek pi lok pa Camuel. Tipo kome oto woko lirut, pien onoŋo pe ocamo cam mo i dyeceŋ ki dyewor meno ducu." 
1Samuel28:21 Dako-nu ocito bot Caulo cok, oneno kome doŋ obaŋŋe woko, ci owaco bote ni, “Nen ba ladit, an doŋ awinyo dogi, adyero pi kwona woko pi timo gin ma iwacca." 
1Samuel28:22 In bene, ladit, doŋ iwiny doga. Wek koŋ aket latin cam mo i nyimi icam, ka wek dok ilim kero pi wotwu.”" 
1Samuel28:23 En okwero woko kun wacci, “Pe abicam.” Ento luticce gubako doggi bote kacel ki dako-nu, ci owinyo lokgi, ocako a malo ki i ŋom obedo i wi kitanda," 
1Samuel28:24 Dako-nu onoŋo tye ki latin roya mo ma ocwe i ode. Ocako nekone woko oyotoyot, ka ojobo moko kwon, onywaŋo, otedo mugati ma tobi pe iye." 
1Samuel28:25 Oketo i nyim Caulo ki luticce ci gucamo, ka gua woko i dyewor meno gucito." 
1Samuel29:1 Jo Piliciti gucoko monygi ducu i Apek; ki jo Icrael gutoŋo gonygi i ŋet waŋ it ma tye i Jejreel. 
1Samuel29:2 Rwodi pa jo Piliciti gumol gukato ki jogi miya miya ki alip alip, ki Daudi ki jone bene gumol gukato lacen kacel ki Akic." 
1Samuel29:3 Ludito mony pa jo Piliciti gupenyo ni, “Jo Ibru gitimo gin aŋo kany?” Akic ogamo doggi kun wacci, “Man aye Daudi ma yam latic pa Caulo kabaka me Icrael. Otyeko doŋ bedo kweda pi kare malac mada. Cakke ki i nino ma olaro bota o kwede wa onyoo peya anoŋo roc mo i kome.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Ento ludito mony pa jo Piliciti gubedo ki kiniga i kom Akic; guwacce ni, “Cwal laco meno odok paco. Myero odok cen i kabedo ma yam imiyo bote, En pe bicito kwedwa i mony, miyo en bilokke doko lamerokwa ki kunnu, Ka nyer-ri mito dok ribbe ki laditte bitimo aŋo? Pe neko jowa, coko wigi tero bo te?" 
1Samuel29:5 Man aye Daudi kikome, ma yam giwere kun mon gimyelo kwede ma giwero ni, ‘Caulo oneko mere dano alip, ento Daudi oneko alip apar.’ ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Akic olwoŋo Daudi, owaco bote ni, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni in ibedo dano ma ageno. An aneno ni ber iwot kacel kwedwa i mony, pien pe anoŋo gin mo marac i komi cakke ki i nino ma ibino iye bota o wa onyoo. Ento pe cwiny rwodi oniaŋ i komi." 
1Samuel29:7 Pienno ber itugi dok cen cut. Dok cen ki kuc keken, wek pe imi cwiny rwodi pa Lupiliciti obed ka cwer.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Daudi owaco bot Akic ni, “Ento an atimo gin aŋo? Gin aŋo ma inoŋo i koma laditta, cakke wa i nino ma adonyo kwede i dog ticci nio koni, ma miyo pe acito ka lweny ki lumerokki, rwoda kabaka?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akic dok omedo dok iye ki Daudi ni, “Aŋeyo maber ni bal mo pe i komi; ki i nyima in icalo lamalaika pa Lubaŋa, Ento ludito monywa gutyeko waco ni, in pe ibicito kwedwa i mony," 
1Samuel29:10 Kombeddi doŋ itugi a ki odiko-ni, kacel ki joni ma iloyogi ma gubino kwedi. Cak wot ki odiko-ni, a woko ki kany oyotoyot tekke piny leŋ ma romo wot.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Daudi ocako a woko odiko con ki jone, ci odok i lobo pa jo Piliciti. Ento jo Piliciti gucito i Jejreel." 
1Samuel30:1 Daudi ki jone guo i Jiklag i nino me adekke, ci gunoŋo jo Amalek gumonyo Negeb ki Jiklag. Guloyo Jiklag woko, guwaŋo woko ki mac," 
1Samuel30:2 dok guyako mon ducu ki jami ducu ma tye kunnu, wa dano ducu matino ki madito. Pe guneko dano mo, ento guterogi makwo, gucito kwedgi woko." 
1Samuel30:3 Ka Daudi ki jone guo i gaŋ ci gunoŋo tye ka waŋ awaŋa, dok mongi ki awobegi ki anyiragi ducu giterogi woko," 
1Samuel30:4 gucako wo ki koko, nio ka tek me koko otum woko." 
1Samuel30:5 Mon pa Daudi aryo-nu bene giterogi woko, Akinoam me Jejreel ki Abigail me Karmel, dako pa Lyel Nabal." 
1Samuel30:6 Piny oloyo Daudi woko matek, pien jone bene gubedo ka lok pi cele woko ki got, pien cwinygi ducu obedo kec matek kun dano acel acel tamo pi awo bene ki anyirane. Ento Daudi olimo tekcwiny ki bot Rwot Lubaŋane." 
1Samuel30:7 Daudi owaco bot ajwaka Abiatar wod pa Akimelek ni, “Kella epod.” Ci okelo bot Daudi." 
1Samuel30:8 Daudi openyo dog Rwot ni, “Aryem kor mony man? Abimakogi woko iyo?” Rwot odokke iye ni, “Ryem korgi, pien ibimakogi woko i yo ada, dok ibilaro jowu.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Daudi ocako wot ki jone miya abicel-li kacel kwede. Ka guo i kulu Becor, ci jo ma doŋ guol ma pe gitwero ŋolo kulu gudoŋ kenyo, gubedo iye." 
1Samuel30:10 Ento Daudi omedde ka ryemo kor jo Amalek ki jone miya aŋwen kacel kwede, kun jo miya aryo ma komgi oloc, ma ŋolo kulu oloyogi gudoŋ cen." 
1Samuel30:11 Gunoŋo Laejipt mo i dye bar ci gukele bot Daudi, Gucako mine mugati ocamo, ka gimiye pii amata omato," 
1Samuel30:12 dok gimiye nucu poki oduro mutwone ki tuga olok aryo mutwone. Ka doŋ otyeko cam ci cwinye odwogo; pien onoŋo pe ocamo cam mo kadi wa pii bene pe omato pi nino adek dyeceŋ ki dyewor," 
1Samuel30:13 Lacen Daudi ocako penye ni, “In kono i dano pa aŋa? la ki kwene?” En ogamo ni, “An wod jo Ejipt, latic pa La-amalek mo. Laditta otenya woko ata, pien onoŋo two aye omaka, ma ari kwede nino adek mukato-ni." 
1Samuel30:14 Wan wamonyo Negeb pa jo Keret, ki pa jo Juda, ki Negeb pa jo Kaleb, ka dok wawaŋo Jiklag woko.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Daudi openye ni, “In ibitera bot mony meno?” Awobi-nu ogamo ni, “Kwoŋŋa kwoŋ ki nyiŋ Lubaŋa kun iwaco ni pe ibineka, dok pe ibidwoka i ciŋ laditta, ci abiteri bot monygi.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Otero Daudi kunnu, ci ononogi guket woko ata i kabedo meno ducu kun gicamo, gimatte ki myel-gu, ma cwinygi yom pi lwak jami ma giyako madwoŋ ki i lobo pa jo Pilciti ki i lobo Juda." 
1Samuel30:17 Daudi opoto i komgi kwarpiny, olwenyo kwedgi nio wa otyeno. Dano mo i komgi pe obwot makwo, kono nyo awobe miya aŋwen ma guito wi kinagani, guriŋo kwede woko." 
1Samuel30:18 Daudi oyako gin ducu ma jo Amalek onoŋo guyako, olaro bene monne aryo ducu." 
1Samuel30:19 Gin mo pe orwenyo kadi wa gin matidi nyo maditte; awobe ducu wa anyira ducu ki jami ma giyako ducu, ki gin mo keken ma jo-nu gutero, Daudi odwokogi ducu cen." 
1Samuel30:20 Omayo wa dyegi ki romi ki dyaŋi ducu, ci jone guleko lim meno ducu i nyimgi kun giwacci, “Man aye lim ma Daudi oyako.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Ka Daudi odwogo bot jo miya aryo-ni ma yam komgi oloc woko ma pe doŋ gitwero lubo kore, ma onoŋo giwekogi i dog kulu Becor-ni, ci jo-nu gukato ka jolo Daudi ki lwak ma gucito kwede-ni. Ka Daudi onyiko cok, en bene omotogi," 
1Samuel30:22 Ci jo maraco ducu ki lutim aranyi ma i kin lwak ma gucito ki Daudi guwacci, “Jo-ni pe gucito kwedwa, pienno wan pe wabimiyogi gin mo i kom jami ma wayako wadwogo kwede-ni. Wek dano acel acel oter dakone ki litinone ci guciti.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Ento Daudi ogamo ni, “Pe wubitimo kit meno, utmegina, ki gin ma Rwot omiyo botwa. En aye obedo ka gwokowa, ci otiŋo mony ma gubino ka monyowa, omiyogi i ciŋwa." 
1Samuel30:24 Aŋa ma twero ye lokwu i kom lok man? Kit ma gipoko ki jami bot dano ma ocito i mony-nyi, gibipoko bot dano mudoŋ ka gwoko jami bene kit meno, Gibipoko bot dano ducu ma rom.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Meno odoko cik matwal cakke i kare meno, ma jo Icrael gibedo ka lubo nio wa onyoo." 
1Samuel30:26 Ka Daudi odwogo i Jiklag, ci ocwalo dul jami ma giyako-ni bot lureme ma gin ludoŋo pa jo Juda kun wacci, “Motwu ene ma wayako ki bot lumerok pa Rwot.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Ocwalo jami pi jo ma i Betel, ki i Ramot ma i Negeb, i Jatir," 
1Samuel30:28 i Aroer, i Cipmot, i Ectemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 ki i Rakal, bot jo ma bedo i gaŋi pa jo Jeramel ki pa jo Keni," 
1Samuel30:30 bot jo ma i Korma, Boracan, Atak," 
1Samuel30:31 Kebron ki i lwak kabedo ducu ma yam Daudi ki jone guwok ki iye. 
1Samuel31:1 I kare meno jo Piliciti gulwenyo i kom Icrael. Jo Icrael guriŋo woko ki i nyim jo Piliciti, ci ginekogi i wi got Gilboa." 
1Samuel31:2 Jo Piliciti guriŋo gudiŋo kor Caulo ki awobene, ci guneko Yonacan, Abinadab ki Malkicua, gin ducu awobe pa Caulo." 
1Samuel31:3 Lweny ogeto matek i kor Caulo, ‘ci wegi atero gucele woko, guketo ret i kome marac mada." 
1Samuel31:4 Caulo owaco bot latin jami lwennye ni, “Wot pala lucwanni woko, icoba kwede pil, wek jo ma pe giliro-ni, ma pe giŋeyo Lubaŋa, pe gubin i koma gucoba, mi yo giyarre i koma,” Ento latin jami lwennye pe oye, pien lworo omake matek, omiyo Caulo okwanyo pala lucwanne kikome opoto ogurre kwede kekene." 
1Samuel31:5 Ka latin jami lweny oneno ni Caulo doŋ oto, en bene opoto ogurre kene ki pala lucwanne, onywako to kwede kacel." 
1Samuel31:6 Kit meno Caulo ki awobene adek-ki, ki latin jami lwennye, ki lwakke ducu guto woko lawaŋacel i nino acel." 
1Samuel31:7 Ka jo Icrael ma onoŋo gitye loka nota tuŋcel, ki jo mukene ma onoŋo gitye loka Jordan, guneno ni mony pa jo Icrael guriŋo woko, dok ni Caulo ki awobene ginekogi woko, ci guriŋo guweko gaŋigi woko; ci jo Piliciti gubino gucako bedo i gani-nu." 
1Samuel31:8 Orwone jo Piliciti gupuk odiko ka lunyo boŋŋi ki i kom jo ma ginekogi, ci gunoŋo kom Caulo ki kom awobene adek-ki i kom got Gilboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Guŋolo wi Caulo woko, ka gulunyo jami lwennye ki i kome, ci gucwalo kwena oromo i lobo pa jo Piliciti ducu, pi tero lok me yomcwiny bot jogigi ki bot lwakgi ducu." 
1Samuel31:10 Guketo jami lweny pa Caulo i ot pa jokgi ma dako ma gilwoŋo ni Acitarot, ka dok guguro kome i kom cel murumo gaŋ me Bet-can." 
1Samuel31:11 Ento ka jo ma gibedo i Jabec-gilead guwinyo gin ma jo Piliciti gutimo i kom Caulo," 
1Samuel31:12 ci oteka lwenygi ducu gua, gucito guwoto dyewor benebene, gukwanyo kom Caulo ki kom awo bene woko, gugonyo woko ki i kom cel me Bet-can, guo kwedgi wa i Jabec, ci guwaŋo komgi woko kunnu," 
1Samuel31:13 Lacen gukwanyo cogogi, guyiko i te yat anana ma tye i Jabec, ci guri kec pi nino abiro." 
2Samuel1:1 ``Ka Caulo doŋ oto, ma Daudi bene odwogo ki ka neko jo Amalek, Daudi odikke nino aryo i Jiklag," 
2Samuel1:2 I nino me adekke laco mo obino kun oa ki i gony pa Caulo, ma boŋone oyec woko, wi ye bene ojuko ki ŋom, Ka obino bot Daudi, ci oryebbe piny, owore." 
2Samuel1:3 Daudi openye ni, “la ki kwene?” Ogamo ni, “An abwot ki i gony pa jo Icrael.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Daudi dok openye ni, “Ci doŋ kunnu tye niŋniŋ? Titta,” Ogamo ni, “Dano guriŋo woko ki i waŋ mony, ci gineko lwak jo mapol, giradogi woko piny; Caulo ki wode Y onacan bene guto,”" 
2Samuel1:5 Daudi dok openyo awobi ma otitte lok-ki ni, “In kono iŋeyo niŋniŋ ni Caulo ki wode Yonacan bene guto woko?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Awobi-nu ogamo ni, “Onoŋo atye kunnu i wi got Gilboa ci acob i kom Caulo ma ojeŋŋe ki toŋŋe, kun gadigadi lweny ki wegi aguragura bene gudiŋo kore," 
2Samuel1:7 Ka obolo waŋe i ŋeye, onena, ci olwoŋa, An agamo ni, ‘An atye ene.’" 
2Samuel1:8 Openya ni, ‘In aŋa?’ Agamo ni, ‘Anjo Amalek.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Dok owacca ni, ‘cuŋ ka ŋeta, icuda woko, pien to doŋ waŋo koma, ento pud akwo.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Ci acuŋ ka ŋete, acude woko, pien onoŋo doŋ aniaŋ ni pe doŋ twero bedo kwo ma doŋ opoto woko piny-nyi, Ci akwanyo lalukana ma onoŋo tye i wiye, ki ogul ma tye i ŋut ciŋe, doŋ akelogi boti, laditta, gin ene,”" 
2Samuel1:11 Daudi ocako mako boŋŋine kene, oyecogi woko pi cwercwiny ma omake, Jo ma gitye kwede bene gutimo kit meno." 
2Samuel1:12 Gubedo ka kumo ki koko ki ri kec pi Caulo ki pi Yonacan, ki pi lwak pa Rwot ki pi jo me ot pa Icrael, gukok nio wa otyeno, pien gityekogi woko ki pala lucwan," 
2Samuel1:13 Daudi dok owaco bot awobi ma otito lokke ni, “In mono ia ki kwene?” Ogamo ni, “An latin pa labedo mo ma jo Amalek,”" 
2Samuel1:14 Daudi owacce ni, “Piŋo pe koŋ ilworo tiŋo ciŋi pi neko dano ma Rwot owiro?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Daudi olwoŋo ŋat acel i kin awobe orobone, owacce ni, “Cit ipot i keme.” Ci oneko woko," 
2Samuel1:16 Daudi owaco bot La-amalek ni, “Remoni aliine bedo i wii, pien dogi aye okelo lok i komi kun iwacci, ‘Aneko dano ma Rwot owiro-ni.’ ”" 
2Samuel1:17 Daudi okoko Caulo ki wode Yonacan ki wer man me koko," 
2Samuel1:18 ci owacci, myero gipwony ki jo Juda. Lokke gicoyo i buk pa Jacar. Okoko ni," 
2Samuel1:19 “Icrael do, deyoni gibalo woko i wi cere mutiŋŋe! Twoni oteka gupoto wokokuman!" 
2Samuel1:20 Pe itit pire i Gat, pe ituc pire i yo me Acikelon; miyo anyira pa jo Piliciti gium kwede, miyo anyira pa jo ma pe giŋeyo Lubaŋa giwakke," 
2Samuel1:21 “Wun godi me Gilboa, toyo pe obed i komwu, kot pe doŋ myero ocwer i cerewu! Pien kwot pa otekawa olannye kunnu, kwot pa Caulo pe doŋ gijwayo ki moo," 
2Samuel1:22 “Atum pa Yonacan pe yam dwogo paco ma pe ooyo remo pa dano; pala lucwan pa Caulo yam pe dwogo nono ma pe onywanne ki moo kom oteka. 
2Samuel1:23 “Caulo ki Yonacan luyomewiny dano, jo ma gimaro! I kare me kwo ki i kare me to gin pe gupokke, Gin ludwiro makato ocur, gubedo lutekkom makato labwor," 
2Samuel1:24 “Wun anyira me Icrael, wukok Caulo, ma yam rukowu ki boŋo makwar, ma dero ginarukawu ki jabu." 
2Samuel1:25 “Twoni oteka gupoto woko kuman ki i dye mony! “Yonacan gineko opoto piny i WI cere mutiŋŋe," 
2Samuel1:26 Omera Yonacan, piny orem kweda woko i komi do! Mar meri i koma yam obedo me aura, kato mar pa dako woko." 
2Samuel1:27 “Twoni oteka guto woko kuman! Jami lwenygi gitenyo woko ata.” 
2Samuel2:1 Lacen Daudi openyo dog Rwot ni, “An doŋ acit abed i gaŋ mo ma i Juda?” Ci Rwot ogamo ni, “Citi,” Daudi dok openyo ni, “Abicito i gaŋ mene?” Rwot owacce ni, “I Kebron.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Ci Daudi ocito i Kebron, ki monne aryo bene, Akinoam me Jejreel ki Abigail ma yam dako pa lyel Nabal me Karmel." 
2Samuel2:3 Otero benejone ma yam gitye kwede, kun tero dano acel acel ki jo ma i ode ducu; ci gubedo i gaŋ me Kebron." 
2Samuel2:4 Ci jo Juda gucito kunnu, guwiro Daudi me bedo kabakagi ma loyo jo me ot pa Juda. Ka gitito bot Daudi ni, “Jo me Jabec-gilead aye guyiko kom Caulo,”" 
2Samuel2:5 ci Daudi ocwalo lukwena bot jo me Jabec-gilead, owaco botgi ni, “Rwot omi gumme opot i komwu, pien wunyuto mar madwoŋ i kom laditwu Caulo, pi yiko kome." 
2Samuel2:6 Kombeddi Rwot doŋ onyut botwu mar mere ma pe lokke, ma genne! An bene abitimowu maber pi kit tim man," 
2Samuel2:7 Doŋ wuliŋ komwu, wubed oteka lweny, pien laditwu Caulo doŋ oto woko, ki jo Juda gutyeko wira me bedo kabakagi.”" 
2Samuel2:8 I kare meno Abneri wod pa Ner, ma lawimony pa Caulo, okwanyo Icbocet wod pa Caulo otero i Makanaim," 
2Samuel2:9 ci okete me bedo kabaka ma loyo lobo Gilead, Acer, Jejreel, Epraim ki Benjamin wa lobo Icrael ducu," 
2Samuel2:10 Icbocet wod pa Caulo onoŋo mwaka me ditte oromo pyeraŋwen ma en cako loyo jo Icrael, ci oloyogi pi mwaka aryo. Ento jo me ot pa Juda gubedo i te ker pa Daudi." 
2Samuel2:11 Kare ma Daudi obedo kwede kabaka kun loyo ot pa Juda i Kebron oromo mwaka abiro ki dwe abice!. 
2Samuel2:12 Abneri wod pa Ner ki lutic pa Icbocet wod pa Caulo gua ki i Makanaim gucito i Gibeon. 
2Samuel2:13 Ki Joab wod pa Jeruya ki lutic pa Daudi gucito gurwatte kwedgi i kut me Gibeon, ci gubedo piny, kun ŋat acel bedo loka kut tuŋcel ki ŋat acel bene bedo loka kut tuŋcel." 
2Samuel2:14 Abneri owaco bot Joab ni, “Wek koŋ litino orobo gua malo, gutuk i nyimwa.” Joab ogamo ni, “Wek gua malo do,”" 
2Samuel2:15 Ci gua gukato loka tuŋcel kun gikwano welgi, jo apar wiye aryo ma tuŋ bot Benjamin ki Icbocet wod pa Caulo, ki lutic pa Daudi bene apar wiye aryo." 
2Samuel2:16 Ci ŋat acel acel ocako mako wi lakworre, ka cobo bute pil ki pala lucwan, ka gin ducu girwomo poto piny lawaŋacel; omiyo kabedo meno gilwoŋo ni Kelkatajurim, ma tye i Gibeon," 
2Samuel2:17 Ci lweny obedo gwa matek i nino meno; lutic pa Daudi guloyo lwak pa Abneri ki jo Icrael woko. 
2Samuel2:18 Awobe pa Jeruya adek ducu onoŋo gitye kunnu, Joab ki Abicai ki Acael. Onoŋo Acael dwir calo til ma i tim." 
2Samuel2:19 En oryemo kor Abneri, kun riŋo ke mo en atir, pe lokke yo tuŋ acuc nyo yo tuŋ acam." 
2Samuel2:20 Ka Abneri olokke oneno yo ŋeye, owacce ni, “Meno in Acael?” Ogamo ni, “Meno an yo,”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abneri ocike ni, “Lokke idok yo tuŋ acuc nyo yo tuŋ acam, wek imak latin orobo mo ci iyak jamine.” Ento Acael pe oye weko kore," 
2Samuel2:22 Abneri dok onwoyo ci ko Acael ni, “Lokke idok ka mukene, pe ibed ka lubo kora, Lok aŋo ma mi yo acobo in areti woko piny-nyi? Ka aneki ci abitiŋo waŋa me neno waŋ omeru Joab niŋniŋ?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Ento Acael pe oye weko kore, omiyo Abneri ocobo iye ki dim toŋŋe, ci dim otuc wa i ŋeye pi!. Otugi poto kenyo, ci oto ki kenyo bene, Dano ducu ma guo i kabedo ka ma Acael oto iye-ni, gibino ci gicuŋ mot laliŋ." 
2Samuel2:24 Ento Joab ki Abicai gubedo ka ryemo kor Abneri; guo wa i got Amma i kare ma ceŋ doŋ mito poto, Got meno onoŋo orine yo tuŋ Gia, i yo ma cito i tim me lobo Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:25 Jo pa Benjamin gucokke kacel i kor Abneri, gudoko buca acel, ci gucuŋ i wi got kunnu." 
2Samuel2:26 Abneri ocako lwoŋo Joab kun wacci, “Pala lucwan bibedo ka camo dano nakanaka ce? Pe iŋeyo ni agikkine bibedo rac mukato kare? Ibiryemo korwa pi kare ma rom mene ka wek doŋ ijuk lwak guwek ryemo kor omegigi?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Joab ogamo ni, “Macalo Lubaŋa tye makwo-ni, kono pe iwaco dogi, kono lwak guryemo kor omegigi nio kwede wa diki ada.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Ci Joab okuto tumme, ci lwak gucuŋ woko, pe dok gumedde ki lubo kor jo’ Icrael, kadi wa lweny bene doŋ ogik woko kumeno," 
2Samuel2:29 Abneri ki jone gucako wot i dyewor meno guwoto dyewor benebene, kun giwok ki i Araba, ka guŋolo kwede kulu Jordan, guwoto nakanaka cakke odiko nio wa dyeceŋ guo kwede i Makanaim." 
2Samuel2:30 Joab oweko lubo kor Abneri, odok woko cen. Ka ocoko lwak ogurogi kacel, ci ginoŋo lutic pa Daudi ma doŋ wangi orwenyo woko giromo apar wiye aŋwen, kacel ki Acael bene." 
2Samuel2:31 Ento lutic pa Daudi onoŋo guneko jo Benjamin ma gin aye lwak pa Abneri ma romo dano miya adek ki pyerabicel. 
2Samuel2:32 Joab ki jone gutiŋo kom Acael, guyiko i lyel pa wonne ma onoŋo tye i Beterekem, Ka gudwogo ki kunnu, guwoto dyewor benebene, nio ka piny oru botgi wa i Kebron." 
2Samuel3:1 Lweny obedo i kin jo me ot pa Caulo ki lwak pa Daudi pi kare malac, kun ker pa Daudi doŋo medde ameda ki tek, ento ot pa Caulo jwik ajwika dok kwede piny kun goro bene,." 
2Samuel3:2 Litino awobe pa Daudi ma onywalogi i Kebron gin ene: latin kayone aye Ammon, minne Akinoam me Jejreel;" 
2Samuel3:3 me aryone Kileab, minne Abigail dako pa lyel Nabal me Karmel; me adekke Abcalom, minne Maaka ma nya pa Talmai kabaka me Gecur;" 
2Samuel3:4 me aŋwenne Adoniya, minne Kagit; me abicce Cepatia, minne Abital;" 
2Samuel3:5 ki me abicelle Itream, minne Egla, ma dako pa Daudi. Gin ducu Daudi onywalogi i Kebron." 
2Samuel3:6 I kare ma lweny tye i kin ot pa Caulo ki lwak pa Daudi, Abneri omedde odoko dano matek i kin jo me ot pa Caulo." 
2Samuel3:7 Onoŋo Caulo yam obedo ki dako ma aŋecane ma nyiŋe Rijpa, nya pa Aiya, ci Icbocet ma wod pa Caulo-ni ocako kelo lok i kom Abneri ni obedo ki ci-wonne." 
2Samuel3:8 Kiniga omako Abneri matek pi lok pa Icbocet, omiyo owacci, “An aye a gwok pa jo Juda bo? I kare man abedo ka nyuto mar madwoŋ i kom ot pa woru Caulo, ki i kom omegine ducu ki lureme ducu, pe ya am iyi i ciŋ Daudi bene ci tin doŋ icika pi balo wi dako man!" 
2Samuel3:9 Lubaŋa myero oket can i koma kit meno ki makato bene, ka ce pe acobo kwoŋ ma yam Rwot okwoŋo i kom Daudi," 
2Samuel3:10 pi kwanyo ker woko ki i ot pa Caulo, ki pi moko ker pa Daudi wek olo Icrael ki Juda ducu, cakke wa ki i Dan nio kwede i Beer-ceba.”" 
2Samuel3:11 Icbocet pe dok ogamo dog Abneri ki lok mukene, pien obedo ka lwore," 
2Samuel3:12 Abneri ocwalo lukwena bot Daudi i Kebron kun waco bote ni, “Lobo mono tye i ciŋ aŋa doki? Ket gicikke kweda, ci nen, ciŋa bidok yo tuŋ boti pi kelo lobo Icrael ducu boti.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Daudi ogamo ni, “Meno ber, abiketo gicikke kwedi; ento gin mukwoŋo ma amito ki tuŋ boti tye kit man; peya ibineno waŋa, nio waŋ ma ikelo Mikal nya pa Caulo, bota, ibino kwede ka ibino ka nena.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Daudi dok ocwalo lukwena bot Icbocet wod pa Caulo kun waco ni, “Miya dakona Mikal ma yam anyomo ki del kom nyim jo Piliciti me co miya acel.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Icbocet ocwalo dano okwanyo dako wo ko ki bot cware Paltiel wod pa Laic," 
2Samuel3:16 Paltiel olubo kor dakone kun kok pire nio kwede wa i Bakurim. Ka lacen Abneri ojuke ni odok cen, ci laco-nu odok cen." 
2Samuel3:17 Abneri ocako yubo lok ki ludoŋo pa jo Icrael kun wacci, “Nen, cakke wa i kare ma okato ca wubedo ki miti me keto Daudi obed kabaka ma loyowu." 
2Samuel3:18 Doŋ wutim ba, pien Rwot yam ociko pi Daudi kun wacci, ‘Abimiyo laticca Daudi aye bilaro jo Icrael ki i ciŋ jo Piliciti ki i ciŋ lumerokgi ducu.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abneri owaco bot jo pa Benjamin bene kit meno, ci lacen ocito i Kebron ka tito bot Daudi kit lok ducu ma jo Icrael kacel ki jo ducu me ot pa Benjamin gutamo ni ber doŋ gitim." 
2Samuel3:20 Ka Abneri oo bot Daudi i Kebron ki jo pyeraryo, ci Daudi otedo karama pi Abneri ki jo ma en tye kwedgi ducu." 
2Samuel3:21 Ci Abneri otito bot Daudi ni, “Koni doŋ amito dok cen, ci abicoko jo Icrael ducu aketogi i ciŋi, rwoda kaba ka, wek guket gicikke kwedi, ka doŋ icak loyo lwak ducu kit ma cwinyi mito.” Kit meno Daudi ocwalo Abneri ocito, kun dok gire ki kuc," 
2Samuel3:22 Ki iŋe wot pa Abneri, Joab ki lutic pa Daudi gudwogo ki i mony, gukelo lwak jami mapol ma guyako. Ento onoŋo Abneri doŋ pe bot Daudi i Kebron, pien Daudi onoŋo otyeko cwale ocito woko, ocito ki kuc," 
2Samuel3:23 Ka Joab odwogo kacel ki lumony ducu ma onoŋo ocito kwede, gitito bo te ni, “Abiner wod pa Ner obino kany bot kabaka, ci kabaka oweko en ocito woko, ocito ki kuc.”" 
2Samuel3:24 Joab ocito bot kabaka owacce ni, “In ibedo ka timo gin aŋo? Nen ba, Abneri obino boti, ci piŋo icwale odok woko cen, omiyo en doŋ ocito woko?" 
2Samuel3:25 In mono pe iŋeyo ni Abneri wod pa Ner obino ka bwoli, wek ene ka ma icito iye ducu ki gin ducu ma itiyo?”" 
2Samuel3:26 Ka Joab oa woko ki i nyim Daudi, ci ocwalo lukwena i kor Abneri, gudwogo kwede cen nia ki i waŋ pii me Cira, ento Daudi pe oneyo iye lok mo." 
2Samuel3:27 Ka Abneri odwogo cen, oo i Kebron, Joab otere woko cen i dog gaŋ macalo mito lok kwede i muŋ, ci otugi cobo iye ki kunnu, oto woko. Oneke pi culo kwor remo pa ominne Acael." 
2Samuel3:28 Ka Daudi owinyo pire, owacci, “An ki kerra ducu pe watye ki alii mo wacel i nyim Rwot pi to pa Abneri wod pa Ner." 
2Samuel3:29 Aliine opot gire i kom Joab, ki i kom jo me ot pa wonne, Ot pa Joab kare ducu pe myero obed laboŋo dano mo iye ma kome cwer tut, nyo ladobo, nyo dano ma bwoc, nyo dano ma gineko ki pala lucwan, nyo dano ma lakec cam!”" 
2Samuel3:30 Joab ki ominne Abicai guneko Abneri kit meno, pien yam oneko omingi Acael i mony ma obedo i Gibeon." 
2Samuel3:31 Daudi dok owaco bot Joab ki lwak ducu ma gitye kwede ni, “Wuyec ginarukawu, wutwe boŋo cola i pyerwu, wek wukum i nyim Abneri.” I kare ma giyiko kom Abneri Daudi ma kabaka-ni olubo kor kitarane." 
2Samuel3:32 Giyiko i Kebron, ci kabaka odaŋŋe ki koko matek i wi lyelle, ki lwak ducu bene gukok." 
2Samuel3:33 Kabaka okoko Abneri kun wacci, “Abneri myero oto kit ma lamiŋ to-ni mono?" 
2Samuel3:34 Badi yam pe gitweyo woko do; kit ma dano kome wee i nyim latim bwami, in bene komi owee kit meno do.” Ci lwak ducu dok gunwoyo koke." 
2Samuel3:35 Lwak ducu gubino ka bito Daudi wek ocam kwon ma piny pud dyeceŋ, ento Daudi okwono kwon kun wacci, “Lubaŋa myero oket can i koma kit meno ki makato bene, ka ce abilo kwon mo ma ceŋ peya opoto!”" 
2Samuel3:36 Ci lwak guniaŋ lok ma i cwinye, omiyo cwinygi okwe; pien kit gin ducu ma kabaka tiyo yomo cwiny lwak ducu." 
2Samuel3:37 Kit meno omiyo lwak ducu guniaŋ i nino meno ni pe kabaka aye ma omiyo ni ginek Abneri wod pa Ner. 
2Samuel3:38 Kabaka owaco, bot luticce ni, “Wun pe wuŋeyo ni oteka madit ma lawimony doŋ oto woko tin ki i Icrael?" 
2Samuel3:39 An adoko nyap woko i kare man, kadi an kabaka ma giwiro. Awobe pa Jeruya gin aye guketa i peko, Rwot myero ocul kwor i kom latim marac muporo kit bwamine!” @" 
2Samuel4:1 Ka Icbocet wod pa Caulo owinyo ni Abneri doŋ gineko woko i Kebron, ci kome oto woko lirut, ki cwiny jo Icrael bene oballe woko," 
2Samuel4:2 I kare meno onoŋo Icbocet tye ki lutel wi buca monnye aryo; nyiŋ ŋat acel Baana ki nyiŋ mukene: Rekab. Gin ducu awobe pa Rimmon ma jo Benjamin, gaŋ tugi Beerot. Beerot gikwano bot jo Benjamin." 
2Samuel4:3 Jo Beerot kikome guriŋo gularo i Gitaim, ci gudoko lubedo kunnu nio wa i kare man." 
2Samuel4:4 Yonacan wod pa Caulo yam tye ki wode mo ma tyene okwe woko. I kare ma gikelo lok ki i Jejreel i kom gin mutimme i kom Caulo ki Y onacan, onoŋo en doŋ ditte romo mwaka abic. Ci lapidine otiŋe, oriŋo kwede woko, ci latin opoto woko piny i kare ma co tye ka ŋwec matek-ki, omiyo odoko Laŋolo; nyiŋe Mepibocet." 
2Samuel4:5 Awobe pa Rimmon ma jo Beerot, Rekab ki Baana, gua ci gucito ki i cwiny dyeceŋ malyet-ti, gucito wa i ot pa Icbocet i kare ma en tye ka yweyo i dyeceŋ." 
2Samuel4:6 Onoŋo lagwok doggola obedo ka pyeto nano, ci nino omako waŋe, onino woko; omiyo Rekab ki ominne Baana gulwitte gudonyo." 
2Samuel4:7 Ka gudonyo i ot, gunoŋo Icbocet obuto i ot butone i wi kitandane, ci gucobo, guneko woko, ka guŋolo wiye. Gutiŋo wiye, gulubo kwede yo Araba dyeworwor," 
2Samuel4:8 ci gukelo wi Icbocet bot Daudi i Kebron, guwaco bot kabaka ni, “Wi Icbocet wod pa Caulo doŋ wakelo ene, wod pa Caulo ma lamerokki ma yam mito neki, Rwot doŋ oculo kworri tin, rwotwa, i kom Caulo ki i kom litinone.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Ento Daudi ogamo dog Rekab ki ominne Baana, awobe pa Rimmon ma jo Beerot ni, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, ma yam olaro kwona ki i ciŋ lumerokka ducu," 
2Samuel4:10 i kare ma yam dano mo obino otitta lok ni, ‘Nen ba, Caulo doŋ oto woko,’ ma onoŋo en tamo ni ekella lok maber, ci an amake aneke woko i Jiklag; meno aye obedo mot ma amiyo bote pi lok ma okelo-ni." 
2Samuel4:11 Ento lok man doŋ dit makato ducu, ka ce lutim aranyi doŋ guneko dano ma cwinye leŋ ki i ode i wi kitandane, ci wutamo ni an pe abiculo kworre i komwu, atyekowu wo ko ki i wi lobo?”" 
2Samuel4:12 Ci Daudi ociko litino orobone, guneko jo-nu woko, guŋolo cing: ki tyengi woko, ka gunabo komgi i ŋet kulu me Kebron. Ento gukwanyo wi Icbocet, guyiko Lyel pa Abneri i Kebron." 
2Samuel5:1 Kaka ducu ma i Icrael gucokke gubino bot Daudi i Kebron, ci guwacci, “Nen ba, wan aye wacogo komi ki riŋo komi." 
2Samuel5:2 I kare macon ca, ma onoŋo Caulo aye kabaka ma loyowa, in aye yam itelo wi jo Icrael ka gicito ka lweny, idwokowa pa co bene, Rwot bene ne ne owaco boti ni, ‘In aye ibibedo lakwa lwak ka jo Icrael, dok ibibedo laker ma loyogi.’ ”" 
2Samuel5:3 Kit meno ludoŋo pa jo Icrael ducu gubino bot kabaka i Kebron, Kabaka Daudi oketo gicikke kwedgi i Kebron i nyim Rwot, ci guwiro Daudi obedo kabaka ma loyo jo Icrael." 
2Samuel5:4 Daudi ocako locce ma onoŋo mwaka me ditte romo pyeradek, ci obedo ka loc pi mwaka pyeraŋwen," 
2Samuel5:5 oloyo jo Juda i. Kebron pi mwaka abiro ki dwe abicel, dok oloyo jo Icrael ki jo Juda ducu ki i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyeradek wiye adek," 
2Samuel5:6 Kabaka ki lwakke gucito i Jerucalem ka lweny i kom jo Jebuc ma gibedo i lobo kunnu, Gin onoŋo guwaco bot Daudi ni, “In pe ibidonyo kany. Ka ibino, ci luŋolo ki lutowan aye gibiryemi woko ki cen.” Onoŋo gitamo ni Daudi pe twero donyo kunnu," 
2Samuel5:7 Ento Daudi ocito omayo gogo me Cion woko, ci odoko gaŋ kalle," 
2Samuel5:8 I nino meno Daudi owacci, “Dano ducu ma gimito neko jo Jebuc gudony ki i waŋ otul pii, gucak lweny i kom luŋolo ki lutowaŋ-ŋu ma tipo koma okwerogi-ni.” En gin mumiyo giwacci, “Lutowaŋ ki luŋolo pe gibidonyo i ot pa Lubaŋa.’" 
2Samuel5:9 Daudi ocako bedo i cel go go kunnu, ci olwoŋo ni, Gaŋ kai pa Daudi. Daudi ogero gaŋ madit orumo wo ko likiŋ cakke ki i Millo," 
2Samuel5:10 Daudi omedde odoko dit twatwal, pien onoŋo Rwot ma Lubaŋa me mony tye kwede." 
2Samuel5:11 Kiram kabaka me Turo ocwalo kwena bot Daudi kun miyo bao yat cedar, ki lupac bene ki lupa-godi me gero ode en Daudi." 
2Samuel5:12 Omiyo Daudi oniaŋ ni, Rwot otyeko moko en me bedo kabaka ma loyo Icrael, dok ni Rwot omiyo kerre obedo ki deyo madwoŋ pi pilo wi jone Icrael." 
2Samuel5:13 Daudi dok omedde ki kwanyo mon aŋeca ki mon anyoma ki i Jerucalem ki i kare ma doŋ oa woko ki i Kebron, ci onywalo awobe ki anyira mukene." 
2Samuel5:14 Magi aye nyiŋ awobe pa Daudi ma onywalogi i Jerucalem: Cobab, Natan, Solomon," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibar, Elicua, Nepeg, Japia," 
2Samuel5:16 Elicama, Eliada ki Elipelet." 
2Samuel5:17 I kare ma jo Piliciti guwinyo ni Daudi doŋ gityeko wiro ki moo, odoko kabaka ma loyo jo Icrael, ci gucokke ducu gucito ka yenye; ento Daudi owinyo pigi ci odonyo woko i cel gogo." 
2Samuel5:18 Jo Piliciti gumol gubino ci guket guromo i nota Repaim woko. 
2Samuel5:19 Daudi openyo dog Rwot ni, “Ber acit ka lweny i kom jo Piliciti? Ibimiyogi i ciŋa?” Rwot ogamo dog Daudi ni, “Citi, pien abimiyo jo Piliciti i ciŋi ada.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Daudi ocito wa i Baal-perajim, oloyogi kunnu, ci owacci, “Rwot obaro dye lumerok woko ki i nyima, macalo lalele mucorre.” Mumiyo nyiŋ kabedo meno gilwoŋo ni, Baal-perajim." 
2Samuel5:21 Jo Piliciti gutenyo cal jogigi kenyo, Daudi ki lwak ke gutiŋo gutero woko." 
2Samuel5:22 Jo Piliciti dok gudwogo, gumol guket i nota Repaim ducu." 
2Samuel5:23 Ka Daudi dok openyo dog Rwot, ci ogamo ni, “Pe ibicito atir. Ber icit iman ne monygi ma odoŋ cen ca, wek ipot i komgi ki ka ma okemo yadi owak." 
2Samuel5:24 Ka ce iwinyo woo macalo lwak dano ma gitye ka dorre i wi yadi owak, ci rune anyim oyot, noŋo Rwot doŋ bitelo nyimwu pi neko mony pa jo Piliciti woko ducu.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Daudi otiyo kit meno kit macalo Rwot ocike kwede, ci oneko jo Piliciti cakke ki i Geba o kwede wa i Gejer." 
2Samuel6:1 Daudi dok ocoko lulweny mabeco ma giyerogi ki i kin jo Icrael ma giromo alip pyeraŋwen," 
2Samuel6:2 Ci Daudi ocako a ki jone ducu ma gitye kwede, gucito i Baale-juda ka omo canduk pa Lubaŋa, ma gilwoŋo ki nyiŋ Rwot me mony ma bedo wi komkerre malo ka wi lukerubi," 
2Samuel6:3 Gutiŋo canduk i wi gadigadi manyen, ci gukelo woko ki i ot pa Abinadab, ma gaŋŋe onoŋo tye i wi got-ti, Uja ki Akio, ma gin awobe pa Abinadab, aye gubedo ka leko twoni ma ywayo gadigadi manyen-ni" 
2Samuel6:4 ma gitiŋo ki canduk pa Lubaŋa, kun Akio aye telo nyime." 
2Samuel6:5 Daudi ki jo me ot pa Icrael ducu gubedo ka yarre ki myel ki yomcwiny i nyim Lubaŋa ki kero komgi ducu, ki wero wer, ki go yo opuk ki nana ki ajaa ki bul ki atego agoya-gu." 
2Samuel6:6 Ka guo i laro moyo pa Nakon, ci Uja ocwalo ciŋe, ogudo kom canduk pa Lubaŋa, omako kome, pien onoŋo twoni gucato," 
2Samuel6:7 ci kiniga omako Lubaŋa i kom Uja, oneke woko ki kunnu, pien onoŋo oketo ciŋe i kom canduk; ci oto woko ki kunnu i ŋet canduk pa Lubaŋa," 
2Samuel6:8 Kiniga omako Daudi pien Rwot otugge i kom Uja; mumi yo kabedo-nu gilwoŋo ni Perej-uja nio wa onyoo. 
2Samuel6:9 Daudi obedo ki lworo i kom Rwot i nino meno; owacci, “Canduk pa Rwot doŋ gibitero bota niŋniŋ?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Kit meno omiyo Daudi okwero tero canduk pa Rwot i gaŋ kalle; ento oŋak kwede woko, otero i ot pa Obededom ma jo Gat." 
2Samuel6:11 Canduk pa Rwot obedo i ot pa Obed-edom pi dwe adek; ci Rwot omiyo gum bot Obed-edom ki jo ma i ode ducu. 
2Samuel6:12 Ka gitito bot Daudi ni, “Rwot omiyo gum i kom jo ma i ot pa Obededom ki gin ducu ma tye bote, pi canduk pa Lubaŋa, omiyo Daudi ocito ka omo canduk ki i ot pa Obed-edom ci okelo i gaŋ kalle ma cwinye yom matek." 
2Samuel6:13 Ka jo ma gutiŋo canduk pa Rwot gudako tyengi ki wot tyen abicel, ci Daud i otumo twon ki romo mucwe bot Rwot:" 
2Samuel6:14 Lacen ocako myel i nyim Rwot ki tipo kome ducu, kun noŋo otweyo pyere ki epod me boŋo camanini," 
2Samuel6:15 Kit meno Daudi ki jo me ot pa Tcrael ducu gukelo canduk pa Rwot i Jerucalem ki waya ki kuto bila. 
2Samuel6:16 Ka canduk pa Rwot obino i gaŋ kal pa Daudi, ci Mikal ma nya pa Caulo obolo wane ki i waŋ dirica, ci oneno ka Daudi pye kirre ki myel i nyim Rwot; ci obedo ka caye ki i cwinye." 
2Samuel6:17 Gukelo canduk pa Rwot wa paco, ci gucibo i kabedone, ma en kema ma Daudi onoŋo oguro pire. Daudi ocako tyero gitum awaŋa mapol ki gityer lakwecwiny i nyim Rwot." 
2Samuel6:18 Ka Daudi otyeko tyero gitum awana-gu ki gityer lakwecwiny, ci olamo gum i kom lwak i nyim Rwot me mony." 
2Samuel6:19 Lacen opoko cam bot lwak ducu, bot jo Icrael ma gucokke ducu, co wa ki mon. Dano acel acel gimiye mugati acel, riŋo mucekke, ki poki olok mutwo. Ka lwak gucako ket, kun ŋat acel acel dok i gaŋŋe." 
2Samuel6:20 Ka Daudi odok cen ka lamo gum i kom jo ma i ode, Mikal nya pa Caulo okato woko ka jole, ci owaco bote ni, “Kabaka me Icrael tin oketo deyo i kome kene ba! Pe tin obumo kome i waŋ aŋeca magi ducu! Kabaka obedo macalo ŋatti mo ma lamalgaŋ ata ma lewic pe mako, ma pe obumo wa kome bene.”" 
2Samuel6:21 Daudi ogamo dog Mikal ni, “An abedo ka myel i nyim Rwot, ma oketo an abedo kabaka ma ka woru, kun aloyo ode ducu. En oketa abedo laker ma loyo jo Icrael, ma lwak pa Rwot. Abimyelo myel ki yomcwiny i nyim Rwot." 
2Samuel6:22 An amito abed yot makato man, wek abed ginanyerani; ento aŋeca ma iloko i komgi-ni aye dok gibiketo deyo i koma makato.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Mikal nya pa Caulo pe onywalo latin mo, nio ka oto." 
2Samuel7:1 I kare ma doŋ kabaka Daudi obedo i ode, ma onoŋo Rwot omiye yweyo i kom lumerokke ma gurume dyere-ni," 
2Samuel7:2 owaco bot lanebi Natan ni, “Nen ba, an doŋ abedo i ot bao cedar, ento canduk pa Lubaŋa pud bedo i kema.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Natan odok iye bot kabaka ni. “Cit iciti gin ducu ma tye i cwinyi, pien Rwot tye kwedi.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Ento i dyewor acel-lu en aye lok pa Rwot obino kwede bot Natan ni," 
2Samuel7:5 “Cit icitit bot laticca Daudi ni Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘In imito gerra ot me bedona?" 
2Samuel7:6 An peya abedo i ot mo cakke ki i kare ma yam akwanyo jo Icrael ki i Ejipt o kwede wa onyoo-ni, ento gibedo ka wirre kweda kun abedo i kema." 
2Samuel7:7 I lwak kabedo ducu ma abedo ka wirre iye ki jo Icrael ducu, onoŋo yam koŋ aloko lok mo bot luŋolkop pa jo Icrael, ma acikogi pi kwayo lwak ka jo Icrael, kun awacci, “Piŋo pe koŋ wugerra ot mo me bao cedar?”," 
2Samuel7:8 Mumiyo ibiwaco bot laticca Daudi ni, ‘Rwot me mony owaco k it man ni, An yam akwanyo in ki ka kwat i olet, ka ma ibedo iye ka leko romi, wek ibed laker ma loyo jona jo Icrael." 
2Samuel7:9 Dok abedo ka Ionne kwedi i kabedo ma icito iye ducu, abedo ka jwero lumerokki woko ki i nyimi. An dok abimiyo nyiŋi ywek ma rom ki nyiŋ jo madito ma i wi lobo-ni." 
2Samuel7:10 Dok abimiyo kabedo ki jona jo Icrael, ci abiketogi iye, wek doŋ gubed i kabedogi kikome, ma pe doŋ giyelogi matwal, wa lulweny magwa bene pe dok bipoto i komgi i kare mo, kit ma con ca," 
2Samuel7:11 cakke ki i kare ma yam aketo iye luŋolkop ma guloyo jona jo Icrael; doŋ abimiyo iywe ki lweny i kom lumerokki ducu. Dok Rwot otyeko tuco boti ni en ebimiyo jo ma i odi gibedo mapol,." 
2Samuel7:12 Ka kareni oromo ma doŋ ibuto kacel ki kwariwu-ni, ci abimiyo wodi mo ma in kikumi inywalo bedo madit, ci abimoko kerre bedo matek." 
2Samuel7:13 En aye bigero ot pi nyiŋa, an abimoko komkerre bedo matwal." 
2Samuel7:14 An abibedo wonne, ki en bibedo woda. Ka ce otimo bal, ci abipwode ki odoo pa dano, ki kit goco pa awobe pa dano." 
2Samuel7:15 Ento pe abikwanyo mar mera ma pe lokke woko ki i kome, kit ma yam akwanyo ki i kom Caulo, ma yam aryemo woko ki i nyima-ni," 
2Samuel7:16 Odi ki kerri bimoko i nyima nakanaka; ki komkerri bene bimoko matwal.’” 
2Samuel7:17 Natan otito lok magi ducu bot Daudi, ki kit ginanyuta ma onen bote ducu." 
2Samuel7:18 Lacen Daudi ocito obedo piny i nyim Rwot i kema ma Rwot bedo iyeni, ci owacci, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, an aŋa, oda bene kono gin aŋo, mumiyo ikonya nio wa onyoo-ni?" 
2Samuel7:19 Ento in pud ibwono kony man ni tidi ki tuŋ boti, ai Rwot Lubaŋa ibedo ka lok i kom dano ma i oda kit ma gibibedo kwede pi kare malac ma tye anyim, inyuto bota kit ma likwaya gibibedo kwede i anyim, ai Rwot Lubaŋal" 
2Samuel7:20 An Daudi dok abiwacci kit lok aŋo? In iŋeyo an, ai Rwot Lubaŋa ma an laticci-ni." 
2Samuel7:21 Itiyo gin madit magu ducu pi lubo lok ma yam iloko pi mitti keni, wek an laticci anen ki waŋa." 
2Samuel7:22 In idit mada, ai Rwot Lubaŋa; pe tye ŋatti mo macalo in, pe tye Lubaŋa mo, kono in keken, kit ma yam wawinyo ki itwani." 
2Samuel7:23 Rok mene ma i wi lobo ma rom ki joni jo Icrael, ma yam in Lubaŋa icito ka kokogi ki i opii wek gubed joni wek nyiŋi oywek pigi, pi tim madito ma itimo ma miyo lworo, ki pi ryemo rok mukene mapol woko ki i nyimgi, kacel ki lubaŋagi?" 
2Samuel7:24 In ityeko moko lwakki jo Icrael wek gubed joni nakanaka; dok in, ai Rwot, idoko Lubaŋagi," 
2Samuel7:25 “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, kombeddi doŋ imok lok ma yam iwaco i koma ki i kom jo ma i oda matwal, ci doŋ itim kit ma iwaco-ni." 
2Samuel7:26 Kumeno dano gibidworo nyiŋi nakanaka kun giwacci, ‘Rwot Lubaŋa me mony aye Lubaŋa ma loyo jo Icrael,’ ki ot pa laticci Daudi bimoko i nyimi matwal." 
2Samuel7:27 Ai Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, in aye inyuto tammi bota, an laticci, kun iwacci ibimiyo oda bedo madit; en gin mumiyo an laticci alirrio tekcwiny me kelo lega man i nyimi." 
2Samuel7:28 Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, in aye Lubaŋa, lokki bedo me ada, ci in doŋ ityeke cikke me timo gin man maber pira." 
2Samuel7:29 Pi meno, alegi ni imi gum i kom jo ma i oda, wek gumedde ameda ki bedo i nyimi nakanaka; pien in, ai Rwot Lubaŋa, doŋ iwaco, dok pi lokki me gum miyo likwaya gibibedo ki gum nakanaka.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Lacen Daudi dok otayo jo Piliciti, ocako loyogi, dok omayo Meteg ama ki i ciŋgi." 
2Samuel8:2 Daudi dok otayo jo Moab, ka opimogi ki tol, kun omiyo gubuto piny i nom. Opimo tol aryo me aneka ki tol acel me aweka makwo. Ci jo Moab gubedo i te loc pa Daudi, kun giculo mucoro bote." 
2Samuel8:3 Daudi dok otayo Adadejer wod pa Rekob kabaka me Joba, ma onoŋo ocito ka roco kerre odoko tek i dog kulu Euprate." 
2Samuel8:3 Daudi dok otayo Adadejer wod pa Rekob kabaka me Joba, ma onoŋo ocito ka roco kerre odoko tek i dog kulu Euprate." 
2Samuel8:4 Daudi omako wegi aguragurane alip acel ki miya abiro, ki askari ma giwoto ki tyengi alip pyeraryo. Oŋolo odoŋ tyen aguragura ma yam ywayo gadigadi lwenygi, ento oweko mogo manok odoŋ ma romo ywayo gadigadi miya acel." 
2Samuel8:5 Ka jo Ciria me Damaciko gubino ka konyo kor Adadejer me Joba, Daudi oneko jo Ciria alip pyeraryo wiye aryo." 
2Samuel8:5 Ka jo Ciria me Damaciko gubino ka konyo kor Adadejer me Joba, Daudi oneko jo Ciria alip pyeraryo wiye aryo." 
2Samuel8:6 Daudi oketo lumony i cel gogo i lobo Ciria ma i ŋet Damaciko; ci jo Ciria ma gitye kunnu gubedo i te loc pa Daudi kun giculo mucoro bote. Rwot obedo ka miyo tek me bwoyo lobo bot Daudi ka ma en cito iye ducu. 
2Samuel8:7 Daudi oyako lwak kwodi me jabu ma yam lutic pa Adedejer tinogi, ci oterogi i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel8:8 Dok kabaka Daudi oyako lwak jami mapol me mola ki i Beta ki Berotai, ma yam obedo gaŋi pa Adadejer." 
2Samuel8:9 I kare ma Toi kabaka me Kamat owinyo ni Daudi otyeko tayo mony pa Adadejer woko ducu liweŋ," 
2Samuel8:10 ci Toi ocwalo wode Joram bot Daudi ka mote, ki pi pwoye pi lweny i kom Adadejer ki pi loyo en woko; pien yam Adadejer obedo ‘ka lweny ki Toi tyen mapol. Joram onoŋo obino ki jami me ryal ki jabu ki mola-gu;" 
2Samuel8:11 jami meno bene kabaka Daudi odyerogi bot Rwot, kacel ki ryal ki jabu mukene ma en odyero ma oyakogi ki bot rok ducu ma en otayogi," 
2Samuel8:12 bot jo Edom, jo Moab, jo Ammon, jo Piliciti ki jo Amalek, kacel ki jami ma oyako ki bot Adadejer wod pa Rekob, kabaka me Joba.’" 
2Samuel8:12 bot jo Edom, jo Moab, jo Ammon, jo Piliciti ki jo Amalek, kacel ki jami ma oyako ki bot Adadejer wod pa Rekob, kabaka me Joba.’" 
2Samuel8:13 Daudi olimo yweka pi tekke kekene. I kare ma doŋ en tye ka dwogo, oneko jo Edom alip apar wiye aboro i nota me Kado." 
2Samuel8:14 Oketo lumony i cel gogo i Edom, oromo i lobo Edom ducu, ci jo Edom gubedo i te loc pa Daudi. Rwot omiyo Daudi obwoyo lobo ka ma ocito iye ducu." 
2Samuel8:15 Daudi oloyo jo Icrael ducu kit meno; dok obedo ka ŋolo kop atir dok kakare i kom lwakke ducu: 
2Samuel8:16 Joab wod pa Jeruya obedo ladit me mony; ki Yekocapat wod pa i Akilud obedo laco lok ma timme.
