2Samuel8:17 Jadok wod pa Akitub ki Akimelek wod pa Abiatar gubedo ajwagi; Ceraya obedo karan; 
2Samuel8:18 Benaya wod pa ekoyada obedo ladit ‘ma loyo jo Keret ki jo Pelet; ki awobe pa Daudi gubedo ajwagi. 
2Samuel9:1 Daudi openyo ni. “Tye ŋati mo ma odoŋ ki i ot pa Caulo, wek anyut cwinyme mar i kome pi Yonacan?”" 
2Samuel9:2 I kare meno latic pa Caulo mo ma nyiŋe’ Jiba onoŋo tye kenyo. Gilwoŋo en gikelo bot Daudi, ci kabaka openye ni, “In aye liba bo?” Ogamo ni, “An do, ladit.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Kabaka openyo ni, “Pe tye ŋatti mo ma odoa ki i ot pa Caulo, wek anyut cwiny me mar pa Lubaŋa i kome?” Jiba owaco bot kabaka ni, “Wod pa Yonacan pud tye, ento tyene aye okwe woko.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Kabaka openyo ni, “En kono tye kwene?” Jiba ogamo ni, “En bedo i ot pa Makir wod pa Amiel, i Lo-debar.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Ci kabaka ocwalo dano giome ki i Lodebar. 
2Samuel9:6 Ka Mepibocet wod pa Yonacan ma wod pa Caulo obino bot Daudi, ci opoto oryebbe piny omiye woro. Daudi owacce ni, “Mepibocet!” En ogamo ni, “An laticci en do.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Daudi owaco bote ni, “Pe ibed ki lworo mo. An abinyutti cwiny me mar pi woru Yonacan, abidwoko boti lobo ducu ma yam pa kwaru Caulo, dok ibicam i wi mejana jwijwi.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Ci Mepibocet dok omiye woro kun wacci, “An kono aŋa, ma miyo itamo pi gwok muto macalo an-ni?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Daudi dok olwoŋo Jiba latic pa Caulo, ci owacce ni, “Jami pa Caulo ki jo ma i ode ducu atiŋo amiyo bot Mepibocet." 
2Samuel9:10 In ki awobeni ki luticci wubipuro potone ducu, wek cam ocek iye, wek wod pa laditti onon iye ginacama. Ento en Mepibocet wod pa laditti bicam i wi mejana jwijwi.’ Onoŋo Jiba tye ki awobene apar wiye abic, ki luticce pyeraryo;" 
2Samuel9:11 Jiba owaco bot kabaka ni, “An abitiyo kit ma icika ducu, ladit kabaka.” Kit meno Mepibocet ocako cam i wi meja pa Daudi ma rom ki ŋat acel mo i kin awobe pa kabaka." 
2Samuel9:12 Mepibocet onoŋo tye ki wode mo matidi ma nyiŋe Mika. Ci jo ducu ma gibedo i ot pa Jiba gudoko lutic pa Mepibocet. 
2Samuel9:13 Mepibocet ocako bedo i Jerucalem, pien obedo ka cam jwijwi i wi meja pa kabaka. Onoŋo tyene aryo ducu okwe woko." 
2Samuel10:1 Ka man otum, kabaka me Ammon oto, ci wode Kanun oleyo ka tyene." 
2Samuel10:2 Daudi owacci, “Abinyuto cwiny me mar bot Kanun wod pa Nakac, kit ma yam wonne onyuto kwede cwiny me mar beta-ni,” Mumiyo Daudi ocwalo luticce ka kweyo cwiny Kanun pi to pa wonne, ci lutic pa Daudi guo i lobo pa jo Ammon." 
2Samuel10:3 Ento rwodi pa jo Ammon guwaco bot laditgi Kanun ni, “In itamo ni Daudi ocwalo lukwe cwinyi pi keto deyo i kom woru? Daudi mono pe ocwalo luticce ka niyo gaŋ ki ka roto kite ducu, wek etur woko?”" 
2Samuel10:4 Kit meno omiyo Kanun omako lutic pa Daudi, ci olyelo yer tik ŋat acel acel woko tuŋ cel, ka dok Oŋolo dye boŋogi i kom pyergi, ka ocwalogi kwede woko." 
2Samuel10:5 Ka gitito pire bot Daudi, ocwalo dano ka jologi, pien onoŋo gitye ki lewic madwoŋ twatwal. Ci kaba ka owacpi, “Koŋ wubed i Jeriko, nio ka yer tikwu otwi olot, ka doŋ wudwog kany.”" 
2Samuel10:6 Ka jo Ammon guneno ni pigi odoko ŋwe marac bot Daudi, ci gucwalo dano ka wilo jo Ciria ma i Betrekob, ki jo Ciria ma i Joba, gukelo askari alip pyeraryo ma giwoto ki tyengi, ki kabaka me Maaka ma obino ki dano alip acel, ki jo Tob ma giromo alip apar wiye aryo." 
2Samuel10:6 Ka jo Ammon guneno ni pigi odoko ŋwe marac bot Daudi, ci gucwalo dano ka wilo jo Ciria ma i Betrekob, ki jo Ciria ma i Joba, gukelo askari alip pyeraryo ma giwoto ki tyengi, ki kabaka me Maaka ma obino ki dano alip acel, ki jo Tob ma giromo alip apar wiye aryo." 
2Samuel10:7 Ka Daudi owinyo pigi, ci ocwalo Joab kacel ki buca mony pa twoni oteka lweny ducu." 
2Samuel10:8 Ci jo Ammon gubino gurwayo cok ka gurye i dogcel; ci jo Ciria me Joba ki me Rekob, ki jo Tob ki jo Maaka gupokke kengi, gurye i dye bar." 
2Samuel10:8 Ci jo Ammon gubino gurwayo cok ka gurye i dogcel; ci jo Ciria me Joba ki me Rekob, ki jo Tob ki jo Maaka gupokke kengi, gurye i dye bar." 
2Samuel10:9 Ka Joab oneno mony okacce woko ryoryo, tuŋ nyime ki yo tuŋ ŋeye bene, ci oyero ŋo Icrael ma oyita lweny, ocako ryeyogi gukemo jo Ciria." 
2Samuel10:10 Oketo jo mudoŋŋe bot ominne Abicai, gin bene guryeyo gukemo jo Ammon." 
2Samuel10:11 Joab owacci, “Ka ce jo Ciria gubedo tek i koma, ci ibikonya; ento ka jo Ammon aye gubedo tek i komi, ci an abibino ka konyi." 
2Samuel10:12 Bed oteka ma cwinyi nwaŋ, wek walweny lweny me co pi lutuwa, ki gaŋi pa Lubaŋawa, Rwot bene otim gin ma oneno ni ber.”" 
2Samuel10:13 Kit meno Joab ki jo ma gitye kwede ducu gurwayo cok ka lweny i kom jo Ciria; ci jo Ciria guriŋo woko ki i nyime. 
2Samuel10:14 Ka jo Ammon guneno jo Ciria guriŋo woko, ci gin bene gucako riŋo woko ki i nyim Abicai, gudonyo i gaŋ. Ci Joab oa woko ki i ka lweny i kom jo Ammon, odok i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel10:15 Ka jo Ciria guneno jo Icrael guloyogi, gucako cokke kacel." 
2Samuel10:16 Ka Adadejer ocwalo kwena, ci gukelo jo Ciria ma gitye loka kulu Euprate; gucako bino i Kelam, kacel ki Cobak ma lawimony pa Adadejer ma obedo latel wigi." 
2Samuel10:17 Ka gitito pigi bot Daudi, ci en bene ocoko jo Icrael ducu, Oŋolo kwedgi kulu Jordan, ka ocito wa i Kelam. Jo Ciria gurwayo i kom Daudi, gulwenyo i kome." 
2Samuel10:18 Ento jo Ciria gucako riŋo woko ki i nyim jo Icrael; Daudi oneko jo Ciria ma romo riŋo ki gadigadi lweny miya abiro, ki wegi aguragura alip pyeraŋwen, Gucobo bene Cobak lawimony pa jo-nu, ci oto woko ki kunnu." 
2Samuel10:19 Ka luker ma gubedo i te loc pa Adadejer guneno ni jo Icrael gutyeko loyogi woko, ci guketo kuc i kingi ki jo Icrael, gubedo i te locgi. Kit meno jo Ciria gucako bedo ki lworo, pe dok gumedde ki konyo jo Ammon." 
2Samuel11:1 I dog oro ma en aye kare ma luker gicito kwede ka mony, Daudi ocwalo Joab ki luticce ki jo Icrael ducu, ci guneko jo Ammon, guyako pacogi woko, ka gurumo gaŋ me Raba, kun Daudi odon mere paco i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel11:2 I kare me dyeceŋ abwora, ka Daudi oa malo ki i kabutone, ci ocako wot malo i wi ot pa kabaka, Ka obolo wane oneno dako mo ma tye ka lwok, kun kome nen ma mwonya twatwal." 
2Samuel11:3 Daudi ocwalo dano wek enian i kom dako-nu, Ci ŋat acel owacci, “Meno aye Batceba nya pa Eliam, ma dako pa Uria ma Lakit.”" 
2Samuel11:4 Daudi ocwalo lukwena ci gukwanyo dako, gutero bot Daudi, Daudi obedo kwede, I kare-nu en pud olwoko kwer monne alwoka. Lacen dako odok i ode," 
2Samuel11:5 Dako-nu ogamo ic: ocwalo kwena otito lokke bot Daudi ni, “Doŋ atye ki remo.”" 
2Samuel11:6 Kit meno Daudi ocwalo lok bot Joab, kun wacci, “Cwalla Uria ma jo Kit.” Joab ocwalo Uria bot Daudi." 
2Samuel11:7 Ka Uria oo bote, Daudi openyo gin ma Joab tye ka tiyone, ki kit ma dano gubedo kwede, ki kit ma mony tye ka wot kwede." 
2Samuel11:8 Lacen Daudi owaco bot Uria ni, “Koŋ doŋ icit i odi, icilwok tyeni.” Ka Uria okato woko ki i ot pa kabaka, kabaka ocwalo mot i kore." 
2Samuel11:9 Ento Uria obuto i ŋet doggola pa kabaka kacel ki lutic pa laditte, en pe ocito i ode." 
2Samuel11:10 Ka gitito pire bot Daudi, ni, “Uria pe ocito gire in ode,” Daudi owaco bot Uria ni, “In pe ia ki ka wot ce? Ci piŋo pe koŋ icito wa i od i?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Uria ogamo dog Daudi ni, “Canduk pa Lubaŋa ki jo Icrael ki Juda gibedo i bolo kunnu, ki laditta Joab ki luticce ducu gibuto woko i tim, ka an aye dok acii i oda kuca ka cam ki ka mat ki ka bedo ki dakona? Macalo it ye makwo-ni, ki tipo komi tye makwo-ni, pe atwero tiyo lok macalo meno.”" 
2Samuel11:12 Daudi owaco bot Uria ni, “Tin dok koŋ ibed kany, ci diki doŋ aweki icito.” Omiyo Uria dok obedo i Jerucalem i nino meno, ki orwone bene." 
2Samuel11:13 Daudi olwoŋe, ci ocamo ka omato i nyime, ci Daudi omiyo en omer woko. I dyewor meno eh dok ocito obuto i kabutone kacel ki lutic pa laditte; pe ocito i ode." 
2Samuel11:14 Daudi ocoyo waraga bot Joab odiko, ci omiyo bot Uria me atera." 
2Samuel11:15 I waraga meno ocoyo ni, “Ket Uria anyim ka ma lweny gwa iye, ci wujer, wudwog cen ki ŋeye, wuweke kunnu, wek gicobe, oto woko.”" 
2Samuel11:16 I kare ma Joab orumo gaŋ, otugi keto Uria ka ma en ŋeyo ni oteka lweny gitye iye." 
2Samuel11:17 Jo ma i gaŋ meno gubino gulwenyo i kom Joab, ci lutic pa Daudi mogo ginekogi woko. Uria ma Lakit bene gineko woko." 
2Samuel11:18 Joab ocwalo kwena otito bot Daudi gin ducu ma otimme i waŋ lweny. 
2Samuel11:19 Joab ociko lakwena ma ocwalo kunnu kit man ni, “Ka doŋ ityeko tito bot kabaka lok ducu mutimme i waŋ lweny," 
2Samuel11:20 ka ce kiniga omako kabaka ce openyi ni, ‘Piŋo wunyiko cok wa i kom gaŋ ka lweny iye kunnu? Pe onoŋo wuŋeyo ni gibicelowu ki malo i wi cel?" 
2Samuel11:21 Aŋa ma yam oneko Abimelek wod pa Jerubecet? Pe dako mo aye obayo lakidi rego madit ocele kwede ki malo i wi cel, omiyo en oto woko i Tebej? Piŋo wunyiko cok i kom cel?’ Ka owaco kit man, ci in dok ibiwacce ni, ‘Laticci Uria ma Lakit bene oto woko.’ ”" 
2Samuel11:22 Lakwena ocito, obino otito bot Daudi gin ducu ma Joab ocwale kwede," 
2Samuel11:23 Lakwena otito bot Daudi ni, “Merok olwenyo i komwa magwa, gucorre i komwa i dye bar, ento wajerogi, wadwokogi cen wa i dog gaŋ." 
2Samuel11:24 Ci wegi atero gucako celowa ki malo i wi cel, guneko luticci mogo woko; wa laticci Uria bene gineko woko.”" 
2Samuel11:25 Daudi ogamo dog lakwena ni, “Ibiwaco bot Joab kit man ni, ‘Pe ibed ka paro lok meno, pien pala lucwan neko dano tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi. Wek mony olweny matek i kom gaŋ meno, ci imak woko, iret woko piny.’ Ci ititte ni myero oka lake matek.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Ka dako pa Uria owinyo ni gineko cware woko, ci ocako koko cware." 
2Samuel11:27 Ka kwero cola otum, Daudi ocwalo kwena ci okelo Batceba i ode, odoko dakone, onywalo kwede latin laco. Ento gin ma Daudi otimo pe oyomo cwiny Rwot." 
2Samuel12:1 I kare meno Rwot ocwalo lanebi Natan bot Daudi, ci ocito otito bote ni, “Jo aryo yam gubedo i gaŋ mo, acel lalonyo, acel lacan." 
2Samuel12:2 Lalonyo onoŋo tye ki lwak romi ki dyaŋi mapol; 
2Samuel12:3 ento lacan onoŋo obedo ki bwoŋ romone acel loko ma onoŋo owilo. Ci odoŋo ki i ciŋe kacel ki litinone; romone obedo ka camo ŋide camme, kun mato pii i kikopone, dok buta bene wa i kore, obedo macalo nyare," 
2Samuel12:4 I kare mo lawot obino bot dano ma lalonyo-ni, ci en pe oye kwanyo limme mo ma i kin romone kikome me tedo welone ma obino boteni, ento dok okwanyo romo pa dano ma lacan-ni, en aye otedo pi welo ma obino bote-ni.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Kiniga omako Daudi i kom lalonyo meno matek; ci owaco bot Natan ni, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, dano ma otimo kit meno ber ginek woko." 
2Samuel12:6 Dok en biculo waŋ romo meno tyen aŋwen, pien otimo kumeno, ma pe otimo kica.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Natan owaco bot Daudi ni, “In aye i dano meno kikome. Ci Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco ni, ‘Yam awiro in ki moo me bedo kabaka ma loyo Icrael. Alaro in ki i ciŋ Caulo," 
2Samuel12:8 ci amiyo ot pa laditti i ciŋi, ki monne ducu amiyogi i kori, dok amiyo boti ot pa Icrael ki pa Juda. Ka ce meno ducu pud ibwonogi, kono nene ameddi makato meno," 
2Samuel12:9 In icayo lok pa Rwot piŋo, ki tiyo gin marac i nyime? Nen, ityeko neko Uria ma Lakit-ti woko ki pala lucwan, ka dok ikwanyo dakone woko odoko dakoni. In aye ineko en woko ki pala lucwan pa jo Ammon." 
2Samuel12:10 Pala lucwan doŋ pe biweko odi, pien ityeko cayo an pi kwanyo dako pa Uria Lakit me bedo dakoni.’" 
2Samuel12:11 Rwot dok owaco kit man ni, ‘Nen, abimiyo gin marac poto i komi ma bia ki i odi kikome; dok abikwanyo monni ki i nyimi, ci amiyogi bot lawoti, ci en bibuto ki monni i dyeceŋ ka maleŋ," 
2Samuel12:12 In itiyo i muŋ, ento an abitiyo man atyer i nyim jo Icrael ducu, ki i dyeceŋ bene.’ ”" 
2Samuel12:13 Daudi ogamo dog Natan ni, “An atiyo bal i kom Rwot.” Ci Natan owaco bot Daudi ni, “Rwot doŋ otyeko jwayo balli woko, pe doŋ ibito." 
2Samuel12:14 Ento pi kit tim man nyuto atir ni ityeko cayo Rwot ibito. Ento pi kit tim man nyuto atir ni ityeko cayo Rwot marac adada; pi lok meno latin ma ginywalo-ni bito woko.” 
2Samuel12:15 Lacen Natan odok i ode. Ci Rwot omiyo two ocelo latin ma dako pa Uria onywalo ki Daudi, ci two ori i kome." 
2Samuel12:16 Daudi obedo ka bako doge pi latin bot Lubaŋa, kun ri kec bene; odonyo i ot obuto piny i ŋom dyewor benebene," 
2Samuel12:17 Ludoŋo ma i ode gucuŋ ka ŋete pi tiŋe woko malo ki i ŋom, ento en okwero woko, pe ocamo cam mo kwedgi." 
2Samuel12:18 I nino me abirone latin oto woko. Lutic pa Daudi gulworo tito pi to pa latin, pien gutamo ni, “I kare ma latin pud kwo waloko kwede, pe owinyo dogwa. Ci watwero wacce niŋniŋ ni latin otyeko to woko? Gwok nyo bitimme marac kekene.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Ento Daudi ka oneno luticce gitye ka kwilo lok kacel, ci oniaŋ ni latin doŋ oto woko. Owaco bot luticce ni, “Latin doŋ oto woko ce?” Gugamo ni, “En doŋ oto.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Ci Daudi ocako a woko ki i ŋom, olwokke, owiro kome ki moo, ka oloko boŋŋine bene. Okato woko ocito i ot pa Rwot, oworo Lubaŋa; ka dok okato woko ocito i ode kikome. Ka openyo pi cam, guketo cam i nyime ci ocamo." 
2Samuel12:21 Luticce guwaco bote ni, “Man kit gin aŋo ma itiyo, ladit? In ibedo ka ri kec ki ka koko pi latin ma onoŋo pud kwo; ento ka latin doŋ oto woko, ci doŋ ia malo icako camo cam.”" 
2Samuel12:22 Daudi ogamo ni, “I kare ma latin pud tye makwo-ni, abedo ka ri kec ki ka koko pi latin kun atamo ni, ‘Aŋa mono ma ŋeyo ka nyo kica bimako Rwot i koma, wek latin pe oto?’" 
2Samuel12:23 Ento kombeddi doŋ latin otyeko to woko; pud dok ari kec piŋo kono? An dok atwero dwoko en cen bo? Wayi an aye doŋ abicito bote yo, ento en pe dok bidwogo bota.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Daudi okweyo cwiny dakone Batceba, ci obedo kwede. Onywalo kwede latin laco, ocako nyiŋe Solomon. Rwot bene omaro latin-nu." 
2Samuel12:25 Ocwalo lanebi Natan, ci ocako nyiŋ latin ni Jedidia, pi Rwot." 
2Samuel12:26 I kare meno Joab obedo ka lweny i kom Raba, ma en gaŋ pa jo Ammon, ci omako gaŋ piine." 
2Samuel12:27 Ocwalo lukwena bot Daudi ka wacce ni, “Abedo ka lweny i kom Raba, atyeko mako gaŋ piine bene." 
2Samuel12:28 In doŋ icok lwak mudoŋŋi kacel, ci ibin irum gaŋ man wek imak woko, wek pe an aye amaki, miyo gilwoŋo ki nyiŋa.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Kit meno Daudi ocoko lwak kacel ci ocito kunnu kwedgi i Raba, olwenyo i kome ci omako woko." 
2Samuel12:30 Daudi okwanyo lalukana me jabu ki i wi Milkom ma jokpa jo Ammon. Pekke romo ratili miyaacel, got me wel bene onoŋo tye iye, ci gicibo i wi Daudi. Daudi Odwogo ki jami ma giyako i gaŋ-ŋu madwoŋ twatwal." 
2Samuel12:31 Dok okelo dano ma giyakogi ki i gaŋ meno, oketogi ka tic ki mucumeno ki cururu nyonyo ki latoŋ-gu, ka dok oketigi ka tic matek me waŋo matafali; en obedo ka timo dano ma i gaŋi pa jo Ammon kit meno. Lacen Daudi ki lwak ducu gudok cen i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel13:1 Abcalom onoŋo tye ki laminne mamwonya twatwal ma nyiŋe Tamar. Ci Amnon wod pa Daudi ocako maro nyako-nu. 
2Samuel13:2 Amnon obedo ki miti madwoŋ i kome; pi paro lamininne Tamar ocako kelle two. Onoŋo Tamar pud latin nyako ma peya oŋeyo laco dok Amnon oneno ni pe etwero noŋo kare me bedo kwede. 
2Samuel13:3 Ento Amnon onoŋo tye ki lareme mo ma nyiŋe Jonadab, wod pa Cimea ma omin Daudi. Jonadab aye dano mo maryek twatwal." 
2Samuel13:4 Openyo Amnon ni, “Wod pa kabaka, gin aŋo mono ma jonyo in jwijwi-ni? Pe ititta lokke ce?” Amnon ogamo ni, “An amaro Tamar ma lamiŋ omera Abcalom.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Jonadab owaco bote ni, “But piny i wi kitandani, ipor two. Ka woru Daudi obino ka limo twoni, ci iwacce ni, ‘Wek lamera Tamar aye obin omiya cam ka wek acam, kun en yubo ki i nyima, ma aneno, ka dok acamo ki i ciŋe.’ ”" 
2Samuel13:6 Kit meno Amnon ovako buto piny kun poro two. Ka kabaka obino ka limo two, ci Amnon olego kabaka kun wacci, “Alegi iwek lamera Tamar aye obin oted capat mogo aryo ki i nyima, ka wek acam ki i ciŋe.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Daudi ocwalo lok paco bot Tamar kun wacci, “Cit i ot pa omeru Amnon, wek iciyubbe cam kunnu.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Mumiyo Tamar ocito wa i ot ca ominne Amnon, ci otedo capat ki i nyime. Ka capat ocek," 
2Samuel13:9 ci otiŋo otako woko, oloko capat ocibo i nyim Amnon wek ocam. Ento Amnon okwero camo. O wacci, “Gicwal dano ducu woko weŋ ki i nyima.” Kit meno dano ducu gucito gua woko ki i nyime." 
2Samuel13:10 Ka Amnon dok owaco bot Tamar ni, “Kel cam wa i tyelo bota kany, wek acak camone ki i ciŋi.” Tamar otero capat ma otedo-nii tyelo bot ominne Amnon." 
2Samuel13:11 Ento ka Tamar okelo cam ka ma cok kwede wekocam, ci oa malo opoto i kome kun wacce ni, “Bin wek ibut kwede, lamera.”" 
2Samuel13:12 Tamar oagmo ni, “Pe kumeno, omera, pe imaka tektek, pien kit tim macalo ma peya onen i Icrael kulu. Pe itim tim me miŋo kit man." 
2Samuel13:13 Ci an mono, abitero lakit lewic-ci wa kwene? In bene ibibedo ŋat mutimo tim me kipyeda i Icrael kulu. Alegi ni, ipeny kabaka; en pe bikwero i koma.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Ento Amnon pe owinyo lokke; dok obedo ki tek makato nyako-nu, ci omake ki tek, obedo kwede." 
2Samuel13:15 Lacen Amnon ocako kwero Tamar ki kwer madit twatwal; dok kweroen obedo madit makato mar ma yam omare kwede. Amnon owacce ni, “Doŋ ikat woko iciti.”" 
2Samuel13:16 Ento Tamar owacce ni, “Pe kumeno, omera. Cwala woko tektek aye dok rac makato tim kipyeda ma doŋ itimo i koma-ni.” Amnon pe omedo ki winyo lokke." 
2Samuel13:17 Olwoŋo awobi ma tiyo bote, owacce ni, “Cwal dako-ni woko ki i nyima, ci irwak lalor doggola iceg woko ki i yo ŋeye.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Onoŋo Tamar oruko boŋo gomci mabor ki bade bene boco, pien meno aye kit ruk pa anyira pa kabaka ma peya giŋeyo co. Latic pa Amnon ocwalo Tamar woko, oloro doggola ocego woko ki i yo ŋeye." 
2Samuel13:19 Tamar ocako onyo buru i wiye, la oyeco gomci ma oruko-ni, okwako wiye ki ciŋe, ocito kwede kun kok matek." 
2Samuel13:20 Abcalom openya laminne ni, “Omeru Amnon obedo kwedi co? Kombeddii doŋ iliŋ mot, lamera. En obedo Abcalom ki cwercwiny madwoŋ kun bedo kene." 
2Samuel13:21 Ka kabaka Daudi owinyo lok meno ducu, obedo ki kiniga madwoŋ." 
2Samuel13:22 Abcalom pe omedo ki loko lok mo bot Amnon maber nyo marac, ento cwinye okwero Amnon matek pi mako laminne ki tek." 
2Samuel13:23 Ka doŋ mwaka okato aryo, Abcalom obedo ki lunyar yer romine i Baalkajor ma cok ki Epraim, ci olwoŋo awobe pa kabaka ducu me bino iye." 
2Samuel13:24 Ocito wa bot kabaka owacce ni, “Nen, atye ki lunyar yer romina, Alego in kabaka ki Tuticci wubin wucit iye kacel kweda.”." 
2Samuel13:25 Ento kabaka owaco bot Abcalom ni, “Pe ku meno, latinna, pe iwek wan ducu wacit kunnu, miyo wacikelli peko.” Abcalom odiye ki tek, ento pe oye cito kunnu, olamme gum keken." 
2Samuel13:26 Abcalom dok owacci, “Ka doŋ pe icito, alegi iwek Amnon ma omera aye ocit kwedwa.” Kabaka ogamo ni, “Piŋo imito ni en bene ocit kwedwu?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Ento Abcalom odiye ki tek, mumiyo lacen oweko Amnon ocito kwede, ki awobe pa kabaka ducu," 
2Samuel13:28 Abcalom ociko luticce ni. “Wunen maber ka doŋ cwiny., Amnon edoko yom ki koŋo vino. Ka ce doŋ awacciwu ni ‘Wucob Amnon,’ ci doŋ wuneke woko. Pe wulwor iye gin mo, pien an aye acikowu. Wubed ma cwinywu nwaŋ, Wubed twoni lweny matego.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Lutic pa Abcalom guneko Amnon kit ma ocikogi kwede, Awobe pa kabaka mukene ducu gutwarre malo ki ŋwec, ci ŋat acel acel opye i wi kanane oriŋo kwede woko." 
2Samuel13:30 Lok okwoŋo o bot Daudi ma pud peya guo paco ni, “Abcalom oneko awobe pa kabaka woko ducu liweŋ, ma cel mo pe obwot.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Kabaka oa malo, ocako yeco boŋŋine woko pi cwercwiny, obuto piny i nom. Lutticce ma gucuŋ ka ŋete bene guyeco boŋŋigi woko," 
2Samuel13:32 Ento Jonadab wod pa Cimea omin Daudi, owacci, “Laditta, pe ibed ka tamo ni gineko litino awobeni woko ducu. Amnon kene aye gineko. Gineko pi cik pa Abcalom, pien omoko lok man i cwinye cakke ki i kare ma Amnon omako iye laminne Tamar tektek-ki," 
2Samuel13:33 Kombeddi, rwoda kabaka, pe ibed ka tamo ni awobeni ducu doŋ guto woko; Amnon kene aye oto,”" 
2Samuel13:34 Abcalom oriŋo woko. Ci awobi ma kuro piny otiŋo waŋe oneno piny, ci nen, lwak dano gibino ki i yo ma a ki i Koronaim kun girabo ŋet got." 
2Samuel13:35 Jonadab dok owaco bot kabaka ni, “Doŋ inen ba, litino awobeni doŋ gitye ka bino kit macalo awacci-ni. Lokka doŋ ocobo kakare.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Ka doŋ otyeko waco lokke, ki i ŋeye cut, awobe pa kabaka gutuc paco. Gucako daŋŋe ki koko, ci kabaka bene wa ki luticce ducu gukok matek twatwal." 
2Samuel13:37 Ento Abcalom oriŋo woko, ocito bot Talmai wod pa Amikud, kabaka me Gecur. Daudi obedo ka koko pi wode pi nino mapo!." 
2Samuel13:38 Kit meno Abcalom oriŋo ocito i Gecur, obedo kunnu mwaka adek." 
2Samuel13:39 Lacen ka cwiny kabaka doŋ okwe pi to pa Amnon, cwinye ocako pido pi Abcalom." 
2Samuel14:1 I kare meno. Joab wod pa Jeruya onoŋo doŋ otyeko niaŋ maber ni cwiny kabaka tye ka pido pi Abcalom. 
2Samuel14:2 Ci Joab ocwalo kwena i Tekoa ka omo dako mo ma laryeko ma tye kunnu. Ka obino ci owacce ni, “Ber ipor koko, dok iruk ginaruka me cola. Pe iwir komi ki moo, ento bed macalo dako ma obedo ka koko lato pi kare malac," 
2Samuel14:3 ka icit kwede bot kabaka, icilok kwede kit man.” Kumeno Joab opiko dako-nu ki lok." 
2Samuel14:4 Ka dako me Tekoa obino bot kabaka, ci oryebbe piny i ŋom, omiye woro, kun wacci, “Konya, ai kabaka.”" 
2Samuel14:5 Kabaka owacce ni, “Gin aŋo ma tye ka yeli?” Dako-nu ogamo ni, “Ada, an a dalako; cwara doŋ oto woko." 
2Samuel14:6 Onoŋo atye ki awobe aryo, ci ceŋ mo gubedo ka da kekengi i poto, ma latek kingi peke; ci ŋat acel ogoyo wadi oneko woko." 
2Samuel14:7 Ci kaka ducu gutwarre gubino i koma, gucako lok ni, ‘Kel dano ma ogoyo ominne oneko woko-ni, wek wanek woko.’. Nen, gimito neko laleyo woko, pi culo kwor pa ominne. Kit meno gimito neko dog macca mudoŋŋi, ci doŋ pe giweko gin mo pi nyiŋ cwara, en doŋ pe bibedo ki danone mo ma doŋ i wi lobo.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Kabaka owaco bot dako-nu ni, “Dok wa i odi, ci abicwalo cik ma mako lok komi.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Dako me Tekoa dok owaco bot kabaka ni, “Aliine opot i koma, laditta kabaka, ki i kom ot pa wora. Wek alii mo pe opot i kom kabaka ki i kom kom kerre.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Kabaka ogamo ni, “Ka ce ŋatti mo owacci lok mo, ci ikel en bota, ci doŋ en pe bigudo komi matwal.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Dako-nu ogamo ni, “Ladit kabaka, tim ber ikwon i nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋani, kun iwacci, Lacul kwor remo pa lato owek neko woda obedi, wek latinna pe oto doki.” Kabaka ogamo ni, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, yer wi wodi mo pe bipoto i ŋom.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Dako-nu dok owaco ni, “Alegi ni iwek dok alok lok mo acel boti, laditta kabaka.” Kabaka ogamo ni, “Waci.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Dakonu owacci, “Piŋo cwinyi oteri ka tiyo gin marac i kom lwak pa Lubaŋa? Pi kit ŋol ma iŋolo-ni omiyo in kabaka iŋolo kop i komi keni ni oloyi, pien pe idwoko latin ma giryemo woko-ni paco." 
2Samuel14:14 Wan ducu wabito woko, wan wacalo pii ma okir piny i ŋom, ma pe dok gitwero gurone kacel. Ento Lubaŋa pe twero kwanyo kwa pa ŋat mo ma yenyo yo wek danone ma giryemo pe giryem woko matwal." 
2Samuel14:15 An abino kany ka lok kwedi, laditta kabaka pien dano gumiya lworo, omiyo atamo ni, ‘Abilok ki kabaka; gwok kabaka bitiyo iye gin mo i kom lok ma alego dok bicobone." 
2Samuel14:16 Pien kabaka biwinyo, ci bilaro laticce ki i ciŋ dano ma gimito jwayo an kacel ki woda woko ki i lobo pa Lubaŋa.’" 
2Samuel14:17 Dok onoŋo atamo ni, ‘Lok pa laditta kabaka bimiyo cwinya kwe.’ Pien in, laditta kabaka, irom ki lamalaika pa Lubaŋa ma poko kin lok maber ki maracce. Rwot Lubaŋani obed kwedi.”" 
2Samuel14:18 Kabaka dok ogamo dog dako-nu ni, “Pe imuŋŋa lok ducu ma apenyi kwede.’ Dako-nu ogamo ni, “Lok ba, laditta kabaka.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Kabaka openye ni, “Wun wuribo dogwu ki Joab i kom lok man ducu?” Dako-nu ogamo kun wacci, “Lok me adane, kit ma it ye makwo-ni, laditta kabaka, dano pe twero lokke yo tuŋ acuc nyo yo tuŋ acam i kom lok ma in kabaka ipenyoni, Laticci Joab aye ociko an; en kikome aye oketo lok magi ducu i doga," 
2Samuel14:20 Laticci Joab otimo man wek tam manyen obin. Ento in, laditta kabaka, ryekoni rom ki ryeko pa lamalaika pa Lubaŋa, pien iŋeyo gin ducu ma timme i wi lobe-ni.’" 
2Samuel14:21 Lacen kabaka owaco bot Joab ni, “Nen ba, tin ajolo lokki. Ber icit iciom latin man Abcalom, idwok en paco.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Ci Joab opoto oryebbe piny i ŋom omiyo woro, olamo gum i kom kabaka: Joab owacci, “Tin an laticci doŋ aŋeyo ni ayomo cwinyi, laditta kabaka, pien ityeko jolo gin ma alego boti.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Joab ocito i Gecur, oomo Abcalom okele paco i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel14:24 Ento kabaka ociko ni, “Wek en koŋ obed ki cen i ode, pe obin i nyima kany.” Ci Abcalom obedo gire ki cen i ode, pe omedo ki bino i nyim kabaka." 
2Samuel14:25 I kare-nu pe tye ŋatti mo ma giboro mwonyane makato Abcalom ki i lobo Icrael ducu; kome mwonya cakke ki i tyene nio wa i cwiny dye wiye, kome ducu nen mwonya matek." 
2Samuel14:26 En yam ŋolo yer wiye i tum mwaka ducu; ka oneno ni yer wiye doŋ odoko pek, ci doŋ ŋolo woko. Ka ce olyelo yer wiye, en pimo ki mijan pa kabaka, ci pekke kato ratili adek ki nucu." 
2Samuel14:27 Abcalom onoŋo tye ki litino awobe adek ki nyako acel ma nyiŋe Tamar; nyako-nu bene mwonya matek. 
2Samuel14:28 Abcalom obedo i Jerucalem pi mwaka aryo ma pe cito i nyim kabaka. 
2Samuel14:29 Lacen ocwalo kwena bot Joab wek otere bot kabaka, ento Joab pe omedo ki cito bote. Dok ocwalo kwena tyen me aryone, Joab dok pe ocito bote." 
2Samuel14:30 Ci Abcalom owaco bot luticce ni, “Nen, poto pa Joab tye cok ki mera, ocoyo bel cayiri iye. Wucit wuwaŋ woko.’" 
2Samuel14:31 Joab oa ocito bot Abcalom, odonyo i ode, ci openye ni, “Piŋo luticci guwaŋo potona woko?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Abcalom ogamo dog Joab ni, “Abedo ka cwalo lok boti ni ibin kany wek acwali bot kabaka, wek ipenye ni, ‘Piŋo aa woko ki i Gecur. Kono nene abedo gira kunnu.’ Kombeddi amito cito i nyim kabaka. Ka roc mo tye i koma, wek en oneka woko.’" 
2Samuel14:33 Joab ocito bot kabaka, owacce lokke, ci kabaka olwoŋo Abcalom. Abcalom ocito bot kabaka, oryebbe piny i nyime, ci kabaka ojole onoto leme." 
2Samuel15:1 I ŋe meno Abcalom ocako noŋo gadigadine ki aguragura me ywayone, ki dano pyerabic ma’ giriŋo i nyime." 
2Samuel15:2 Obedo ka a malo odiko con jwijwi, ci cuŋ i ŋet yo i dogcel me Jerucalem. Ka oneno dano mo ma okelo lok me alara bot kabaka, en lwoŋo dano-nu ci waco bote ni, “In ia ki gaŋ mene?” Ka ce dano meno owaco ni, “An aa ki i Icrael i kaka munyo,”" 
2Samuel15:3 ci Abcalom waco bote ni, “Nen ba, lokki nen mit dok tye atir, ento ŋatti mo pe tye ma kabaka oketo ma biwinyo lokki.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Abcalom dok waco ni, “Kono yam giketo an aye abedo laŋolkop i lobo-ni, kono ber twatwal! Kono ŋat ma tye ki lokke nyo pidone tugi bino bota, ci aŋolle kop matir cut.”" 
2Samuel15:5 I kare ducu ka dano bino ryebbe piny ka miye woro, ci en cwalo ciŋe kwako ki dano-nu, ci mote ki mot me mar." 
2Samuel15:6 Abcalom obedo ka timo jo Icrael ducu kit meno ka gibino ka pidogi bot kabaka; ci oywayo cwiny jo lerael ducu odwoko i kome. 
2Samuel15:7 I agikki me mwaka me aŋwenne, Abcalom openyo kabaka ni, “Alegi wek acit Kebron ka cobo kwoŋŋa ma yam akwoŋo bot Rwot," 
2Samuel15:8 Pien yam akwoŋo kwoŋ, ladit, i kare ma abedo i Gecur i lobo Ciria kun awacci, ‘Ka Rwot odwoka tuwa i Jerucalem ada, ci abicito ka miye woro.’’’" 
2Samuel15:9 Kabaka ogamo ni, “Ber icit ki kuc.” Ci Abcalom ocito i Kebron." 
2Samuel15:10 Ento Abcalom ocwalo lukwena i muŋ ci guwoto gurumo i kaka pa jo Icrael ducu, kun en ciko ni, “Ka tekke wuwinyo dwan tum okok, ci wuwacci, ‘Abcalom doŋ odoko kabaka i Kebron!’”" 
2Samuel15:11 Abcalom ocito ki dano ma gua ki i Jerucalem ma giromo miya aryo ma olwonogi macalo welo. Gin gucito ata ma pe giŋeyo tere. 
2Samuel15:12 I kare ma Abcalom tye ka tyero gitum, ocwalo kwena olwoŋo Akitopel ma jo Gilo, ma lami-tam pa Daudi, ci en oa ki i gaŋgi Gilo, obino. Ci piro lokgi omedde matek, lwak gubedo ka medde bot Abcalom ameda." 
2Samuel15:13 Kwena obino bot Daudi ma wacce ni, “Cwiny jo Icrael odak woko ka lubo kor Abcalom.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Daudi owaco bot jo ducu ma gitye kwede i Jerucalem ni, “Wutugi a wek warinu woko. Ka pe wurune wacito woko oyoto, ci dano mo pe bibwot ki i ciŋ Abcalom, miyo bipoto i komwa, ci bikelo can madwoŋ i komwa. En bineko dano ma i gaŋ tyeko woko ki pala lucwan.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Ci lutic pa kabaka guwaco bote ni, “Nen ba, wan luticci watye ka kuro gin ducu ma in imoko.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Kabaka ocito woko ki jo ma i ode ducu i kore, ento oweko mon aŋeca ma giromo apar ka gwoko ot." 
2Samuel15:17 Kabaka ocito woko ki lwak ducu i kore; ci ocuŋ cok ki ot me agikkine. 
2Samuel15:18 Luticce ducu gumol gukato ki i nyime; ki jo Keret ducu, ki jo Pelet ducu ki jo Gat miya abicel ma yam gulubo kore nia ki i Gat; gin ducu gumol gukato ki i nyim kabaka." 
2Samuel15:19 Kabaka owaco bot Itayi, dano me Gat, ni, “Piŋo in bene icito kweda? Dok cen icibed ki kabaka manyen; pien in larok ma ia woko ki i lobowu." 
2Samuel15:20 Pud ibino abina laworo maca, ka an tin dok amiyi ibed ka wirre ka mal ata kwedwa? Nen, an abiwoto ka ma pe aŋeyo. Dok cen, ikwany omegiwu gudok kwedi. Myero Rwot omi marre ma pe lokke, ma genne, obed i komwu.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Ento Itayi odok iye bot kabaka ni, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, dok macalo in kabaka it ye makwo-ni, kabedo ducu ma ibibedo iye, laditta, kadi bed to kadi bed kwo, an bene abibedo kunnu.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Daudi owaco bot Itayi ni, “Doŋ ikat wacit kacel,” ci Itayi me Gat okato kacel ki jone ducu ki litinone matino ma gitye bote ducu." 
2Samuel15:23 Dano ducu gubedo ka koko matek i kare ma jo pa Daudi gikato ka netgi, Kabaka Oŋolo laora kulu Kidron, ci lwak ducu gukato gukemo yo tim." 
2Samuel15:24 Ka Abiatar obino, ci Jadok bene otugi bi no ki jo Levi ducu, ma gutiŋo canduk me gicikke pa Lubaŋa. Guketo canduk pa Lubaŋa piny, nio ka lwak ducu gumol ki i gaŋ, gukato woko." 
2Samuel15:25 Kabaka owaco bot Jadok ni, “Tiŋ canduk pa Lubaŋa, idwok cen i gaŋ, Ka ce alimo gum bot Rwot, ci abidwogo paco ci dok aneno kome ki ka ma en bedo iye." 
2Samuel15:26 Ento ka Rwot owacci pe etye ki yomcwiny mo i koma, ci nen, an doŋ atye ene, wek en doŋ otim i koma gin ducu ma en neno ni ber ki tuŋ bote.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Kabaka dok owaco bot ajwaka Jadok ni, “Nen ba, wudok i gaŋ, wun ki Abiatar ki awobewu aryo, Akimaj ma wedi-ni ki Yonacan wod pa Abiatar." 
2Samuel15:28 Abikurogi ki i waŋ wat ma i tim, nio ka lok bia ki botwu ma miya ŋec mogo.”" 
2Samuel15:29 Kit meno Jadok ki Abiatar gutiŋo canduk pa Lubaŋa, gudok kwede cen i Jerucalem, ci gubedo kunnu." 
2Samuel15:30 Ento Daudi ocako ito malo i wi got Jeituni. En ito malo ki koko, ki tyene noŋo, ma oumo wiye; ki jo ma gitye kwede ducu guumo wigi, ma giwoto kun gikok." 
2Samuel15:31 Ka dok gitito bot Daudi ni, “Akitopel bene tye i kin lupir lok ki Abcalom,” Daudi olego Rwot ni, “Ai Rwot, alegi imi tam ma Akitopel miyo obed lok me minmin.’" 
2Samuel15:32 Daudi oito malo, oo i wi got ka ma giworo iye Lubaŋa, Ci nen, Kucai ma La-arki otuc, obino ka rwatte kwede ma kanyine oyec woko, ki ma ojuko wiye ki ŋom." 
2Samuel15:33 Daudi owacce ni, “In ka iwoto kweda ibimiya peko," 
2Samuel15:34 Ento ber idok i gaŋ ci iwac bot Abcalom ni, ibibedo laticce, kit ma yam ibedo laticca i kare ma an abedo kabaka. Ci’ in aye ibibalo tam ma Akitopel miyo bote." 
2Samuel15:35 Jadok ki Abiatar ajwagi pa Lubaŋa gibibedo kwedi kunnu. 
2Samuel15:36 Awobegi aryo bene gitye kunnu, Akimaj wod pa Jadok ki Yonacan wod pa Abiatar. Ibicwalla lok ducu ma iwinyo, wok ki botgi.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Kit meno Kucai ma larem Daudi obino i Jerucalem ki i kare ma Abcalom donyo kwede i gaŋ," 
2Samuel16:1 Ka Daudi okato cwiny wi got manok, ci Jiba laticpa Mepibocet orwatte kwede kun tye ki kana aryo ma gitweyo kom me bedo i wigi, dok guyeyo mugati miya aryo, tuga olok mutwo miya acel, nyig yat mucek i oro miya acel ki opiro koŋo vino acel." 
2Samuel16:2 Kabaka openyo Jiba ni, “Ikele jami-ni me ŋo?” Jiba ogamo ni, “Akelo kana pi konyo jo ma i odi, kabaka, wek gubed i wigi me wotgi, ki mugati me acama pa awobeni, ki koŋo vino me amata pa jo ma komgi oloc i tim.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Kabaka dok openye ni, “Latin pa Laditti Caulo tye kwene?” Jiba ogamo dog kabaka ni, “Aweko en tye odoŋ i Jerucalem; pien en tye ka tamo ni, tin doŋ jo me ot pa Icrael gibidwoko ker pa wonne i ciŋe.’" 
2Samuel16:4 Kabaka owaco bot Jiba ni, “Nen ba, jami ma yam pa Mepibocet ducu tin doŋ gudoko meri.” Jiba ogamo ni. “An doŋ apoto aryebbe piny i nyimi, wek amedde ki noŋo gum i nyimi, laditta kabaka.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Ka kabaka oo i Bakurim, ci laco mo obino bote, dano me ot pa Caulo, Nyiŋe Cimei wod pa Gera, En woto bino kun ceno dano’ medde kwede ameda," 
2Samuel16:6 kun celo Daudi ki got-gu, wa lutic pa kabaka ducu, ki lwak ducu, ki twoni lweny ducu ma gitye i ŋet Daudi yo tuŋ lacuc ki yo tuŋ lacam." 
2Samuel16:7 Cimei obedo ka ceno dano kunwacci, “Wot iciti, wot iciti, in lao remo, in dano ma kite peke!" 
2Samuel16:8 Rwot doŋ oculo kwor i komi pi oyo remo i ot pa Caulo ma koni it ye ka loc makakare. Rwot doŋ otiŋo ker omiyo woko i ciŋ wodi Abcalom. Neri ka to-piny doŋ opoto i komi, pien in i dano ma lao Remo.”" 
2Samuel16:9 Abicai wod pa Jeruya owaco bot kabaka ni, “Piŋo gwok muto-ni’ bedo ka ceni, laditta kabaka? Wek akat i kome aciŋol wiye woko.”" 
2Samuel16:10 Ento kabaka ogamo ni, “An alaro aŋo kwedwu, wun awobe pa Jeruya? Ka ce en tye ka ceno an ma onoŋo Rwot aye ocike ni, ‘Cit icen Daudi,’ ci aŋa ma dok biwacci, ‘Piŋo itimo kit meno?’ ”" 
2Samuel16:11 Daudi dok owaco bot Abicai ki luticce ducu ni, “Nen ba, woda aye mito neka, ci Labenjamin man pe doŋ bimito neka makato? Wuwek en obedi, wek obed ka cena gire, pien Rwot aye ocike." 
2Samuel16:12 Gwok nyo Rwot aye bineno kit atwom ma tye i koma, ci Rwot aye biculla ki gin maber ma ka cen ma gicena kwede tin.”" 
2Samuel16:13 Kit meno Daudi ki lwak ke gulubo yo gucito gigi; kun kono Cimei woto rabo ŋet got ma woto porre ki Daudi, kun woto cene kwede, ka bayo got celo ki kome, ka onyo apwa bene i kome." 
2Samuel16:14 Kabaka ki jo ducu ma gitye kwede guwoto guo i dog kulu Jordan ma guol matek, ci kabaka ocako jiŋ maber ki kenyo." 
2Samuel16:15 Abcalom ki lwak ke ducu, ma gin jo Icrael, gubino gucorre i Jerucalem kacel ki Akitopel." 
2Samuel16:16 Ka Kucai ma La-arki, ma larem Daudi, obino bot Abcalom, Kucai owaco bot Abcalom ni, “Kabaka obed kwo nakanaka. Kabaka obed kwo nakanaka!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Abcalom owaco bot Kucai ni, “Meno aye yo me nyuto mar bot laremi bo? Piŋo pe icito kacel kilaremi?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Kucai owaco bot Abcalom ni, “Pe kumeno, pien ka ŋat ma Rwot ki lwak man kacel ki jo Icrael ducu gutyeko yerone, an abibedo danone dok abibedo kwede bene," 
2Samuel16:19 An dok abitiyo bot aŋa? Pe myero abed bot wode kikome? Kit ma yam abedo ka tic bot woru-ni, abitic boti bene kit meno,”" 
2Samuel16:20 Abcalom dok owaco bot Akitopel ni, “Ŋolla ryeko ba; doŋ wabitimo gin aŋo?”" 
2Samuel16:21 Akitopel owaco bot Abcalom ni, “Doŋ itugi cito bot mon aŋeca pa woru, ma owekogi ka gwoko ot-ti. Ci jo Icrael ducu gibiwinyo ni, in piri doŋ odoko uwe bot woru, miyo jo ducu ma gitye tuŋ boti komgi biyarre woko ki tek.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Kit meno giguro kema pi Abcalom malo i wi ot, ci Abcalom ocako donyo i, wi moo aŋeca pa wonne ma Jo Icrael ducu gineno." 
2Samuel16:23 I kare meno tam ducu ma Akitopel miyo nen calo lok pa Lubaŋa kikome. Tam me ryeko ma Akitopel miyo nen ber kit meno bot Daudi wa bot Abcalom bene. 
2Samuel17:1 Akitopel dok owaco bot Abcalom ni, “Wek ayer dano alip apar wiye aryo, wek an kikoma acak wot me lubo kor Daudi tin, i dyewor." 
2Samuel17:2 Abio bote ma noŋo pud ooI woko, ma tamme bene goro; wek atugi bano kome woko, ci jo ma gitye bote ducu gibiriŋo woko. Abineko en kabaka keken," 
2Samuel17:3 ci abidwoko lwak ducu boti, macalo nyako ger ma bino paco bot cware, Tye dano acel keken ma imito neko, ci lwak ducu gibibedo ki kuc.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Tam meno me ryeko oyomo cwiny Abcalom ki ludoŋo pa jo Icrael ducu. 
2Samuel17:5 Abcalom dok owacci, “Wulwomja Kucai La-arki bene, wek wawinyu bene gin ma en biwaco.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Ka gilwoŋo Kucai, obino bot Abcalom, ci Abcalom owacce ni, “Akitopel owaco kuman kuman, wabitic ki kit tamme-ni? Ka pe, ci in iwaci.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Kucai owaco bot Abcalom ni, “Tam ma Akitopel okeloni pe ber.”" 
2Samuel17:8 Kucai dok omedde ki lokke ni, “In iŋeyo maber ni, woru ki jone ducu gin lulweny matego, gin gitwoni ma lugero magwa, macalo ŋuu ma ger pi litinone ka gimako i tim. Dok pud amedo ni, woru oyita lweny, en pe twero buto ki lwak kacel i dyewor," 
2Samuel17:9 Nen ba, kadi wa kombeddi en tye mukanne woko i bur kaikene, nyo i kabedo mo kunnu. Ka ce owinnye ni jo mogo ginekogi woko ki i lweny mukwoŋo-ni, ka dano mo owinyo biwacci, gibedo ka neko dano ma gubedo ka lubo kor Abcalom." 
2Samuel17:10 Ci kadi bed dano mo yam oteka lweny, ma cwinye nwaŋ macalo cwiny labwor, cwiny me lworo bimiyo kome to woko lirut; pien jo Icrael ducu giŋeyo ni woru oyi ta lweny, ki jone ma gitye bote ducu gin oteka lweny." 
2Samuel17:11 Ento an amiyo tamma kit man ni, wek jo Icrael ducu gucokke boti, cakke ki i Dan nio wa i Beer-ceba, wek gubed mapol ma rom ki kweyo ma i dog nam, in kikomi bene icit kwedgi ka lweny." 
2Samuel17:12 Kit meno miyo wabipoto i kome ki i kabedo mo ma kome binoŋŋe iye, ci wabicorre i kome macalo toyo ma poto luk i ŋom: ci en kikome ki jo ducu ma gitye kwede ŋatti mo acel i kingi pe bibwot." 
2Samuel17:13 Ka ce oriŋo woko odonyo i gaŋ mo, ci jo Icrael ducu gibikelo tol girumo ki gaŋ meno, gicako ywayo gicoro woko wa i nota; kadi wa kidi laliŋliŋ mo pe gibinoŋo mudoŋ kunnu.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Ci Abcalom ki lwak ducu ma i Icrael gugamo ni, “Tam ma Kucai La-arki omiyo-ni aye ber makato pa Akitopel.” Pien onoŋo Rwot yam doŋ oketo ni, gibibalo te tam pa Akitopel woko kadi bed ber twatwal, ka wek Rwot oket can mapek i kom Abcalom. Gimiyo ŋec bot Daudi ci obwot woko" 
2Samuel17:15 Lacen Kucai dok otito lok bot ajwaka Jadok ki Abiatar ni, “Akitopel onoŋo omiyo tam me ryeko bot Abcalom ki Ludoŋo pa jo Icrael kuman; ki an bene dok amiyo tamma knman." 
2Samuel17:16 Kombeddi doŋ wucwal kwena oyotoyot bot Daudi wutitte ni, tin pe dok obut i waŋ wat ma i tim, ento oa woko oyoto okat wa loka ca, wek pe mony omak kabaka ki jo ma en tye kwedgi onekgi woko ducu.”" 
2Samuel17:17 I kare meno onoŋo Yonacan ki Akimaj gubedo ka kuro lok i En-rogel. Kunnu aŋeca mo wirre iye jwijwi ka tero lok botgi, ka gikwano lokke gitero gitito bot Daudi; ento gigwokke ma komgi pe nen ka gidonyo i gaŋ." 
2Samuel17:18 Ento latin awobi mo waŋe ocob i komgi ci onenogi, ocito otito pigi bot Abcalom. Gin aryo ducu gurune gucito i paco pa dano mo ma i Bakurim ma onoŋo tye ki waŋ itte i dyekalle, ci gudonyo gulutte iye." 
2Samuel17:19 Dakone otiŋo laum dog waŋ it opeto oumo ki wiye, ka okelo kai omoyo i wiye; pe tye dano mo ma ŋeyo," 
2Samuel17:20 Ka lutic pa Abcalom gubino ci gudonyo i gaŋ meno bot dako, ci gupenye ni, “Akimaj ki Yonacan gitye kwene?” Dako-nu owaco botgi ni, “Doŋ gityeko kato nota ora ma pii tye iye-ni woko.” Ka gubedo ka yenyo korgi ci pe gumedo ki nonogi, lacen gudok woko cen i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel17:21 Ka jo-nu doŋ gucito, ci Akimaj ki Yonacan gukato woko ki i waŋ it, gucito gutito lok ducu bot kabaka Daudi, Guwaco bote ni, “A woko ki kany oyot wek iŋol kulu ikat loka ca; pien Akitopel aye omiyo tamme kit man kun mi yo tamme i komi.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Daudi otugi a malo cut, kacel ki lwak ducu ma gitye kwede, ci guŋolo loka kulu Jordan, Kwarpiny pe tye dano acel mo ma odoŋ ma pe oŋolo loka kulu Jordan." 
2Samuel17:23 Ka Akitopel oneno ni tamme me ryeko-ni pe giye lubone, otweyo kom bedo i wi kanane, oito i wiye oriŋo kwede i gaŋŋe. Ka oyubo ode ducu maber, ci ocito odene woko, ci oto woko cut, giyiko i lyel pa wonne." 
2Samuel17:24 Daudi ocito i Makanaim. Ci Abcalom oŋolo loka kulu Jordan kacel ki jo Icrael ducu," 
2Samuel17:25 I kare meno onoŋo Abcalom oketo Amaca aye dok obedo ladit ma lawimony ma ka Joab. Amaca aye wod pa laco mo ma nyiŋe Itra ma La-icmael, ma onyomo Abigal nya pa Nakac, ma lamin Jeruya ma min Joab." 
2Samuel17:26 Jo Icrael kacel ki Abcalom gugony i lobo Gilead. 
2Samuel17:27 Ka Daudi obino i Makanaim, ci Cobi wod pa Nakac ma gaŋgi Raba, gaŋ pa jo Ammon, ki Makir wod pa Amiel ma gaŋgi Lo-debar, ki Baŋilai ma jo Gilead ma gaŋgi Rogelim," 
2Samuel17:28 gukelo ki tanda buto mapol, ki becengu, agulu-gu, nano bel cayiri, moko kwon, bel ma gicelo, muraŋa ki nor-gu," 
2Samuel17:29 moo kic, cak lukulu, romi, cak mutwo ma giyubo ki cak dyaŋ, ci gumiyo bot Daudi ki lwak ke wek gucam, pien gutamo ni kec obedo ka neko lwak, omiyo komgi oloc woko, orwo ii bene onekogi i tim." 
2Samuel18:1 Daudi oniyo lwak ma tye bote, oketo ludito ma giloyo wi mony pi dano alip ki dano miya." 
2Samuel18:2 Ci ocwalo mony okato woko, dul acel me adek obedo i te twero pa Joab, dul acel me adek i te twero pa Abicai wod pa Jeruya ma omin Joab, ki dul acel me adek i te twero pa Itayi dano nie Gat. Kabaka owaco bot jone ni, “An kikoma bene abicito kacel kwedwu.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Ento dano gugamo ni, “Pe ibikato icito kwedwa. Pien ka wariŋo woko, ci gin pe gibiparo piwa; kadi bed nucu dano oto, pe giparo piwa. Ento in kikomi aye piri tek ma rom ki pi jo alip apar; pienno myero ibed ka cwalowa kony ma a ki i gaŋ man.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Kabaka owaco botgi ni, “Gin ducu ma wuneno maberre en aye abitiyo.” Kit meno kabaka ocuŋ i ŋet doggaŋ kun lumony ducu gimol gikato ki i dulgi, jo miya miya ki jo alip alip." 
2Samuel18:5 Kabaka ociko Joab ki Abicai ki Itayi ni, “Macalo an a wonne, awacci, wutim ber ki latin awobi-nu, en Abcalom.” Ci lwak ducu guwinyo ka kabaka ociko ludito wi mony pi Abcalom." 
2Samuel18:6 Kit meno mony okato woko i tim ka lweny ki jo Icrael; ci gucako lweny i buŋa me Epraim. 
2Samuel18:7 Lumony pa Daudi guloyo jo Icrael, ci neko dano obedo madit i nino meno; guneko dano ma romo alip pyeraryo kulu." 
2Samuel18:8 Lweny oromo i lobo ducu, dok kadi wa buŋa bene oneko dano otyeko woko, makato pala lucwan." 
2Samuel18:9 Ka Abcalom otugi rwatte ki lumony pa Daudi, kun en tye ka ŋwec ki kanane, ci kana oriŋo ocorre kwede i te kworo madit ma jaŋe oluk oculle woko. Wi Abcalom orwakke omoko woko ‘i kin jaŋ kworo, ci kana oweke kun Lyerre i kin polo ki lobo, kana ma en oito i wiye-ni obedo ka medde ki ŋwec." 
2Samuel18:10 Ka dano mo onene ci otito bot Joab ni, “Nen, aneno Abcalom tye ka lyerre malo i wi yat kworo.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Joab owaco bot dano mutitte lok-ki ni, “Iwacci ŋo? Ineno kome? Ci piŋo pe icobo ireto woko piny i nom? Kono itimo kumeno, kono cwinya obedo yom i komi, amiyo mot boti ma romo dul ryal apar, ki del pyer bene.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Ento laco-nu ogamo dog Joab ni, “Kadi ciŋa tiŋ dul ryal ma pekke alip acel kulu, pe atwero tiŋo ciŋa aketo i kom wod pa kabaka. Wan bene wawinyo ka kabaka ciko in ki Abicai ki Itayi ni, ‘Macalo an a wonne, awacci wugwok latin awobi-nu en Abcalom.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Dok bene ka nene atimo bwami ce aneke woko, (kun kono pe tye gin mo ma kabaka pe ŋeyo), kadi in kikomi bene iwene iye woko.’" 
2Samuel18:14 Joab ogamo ni, “Pe abibalo kare ma rom man ka lok kwedi.’ Ci okwanyo toni adek i ciŋe, ocobo kor Abcalom i adunone ki gin adek ducu, ma onoŋo tye olyerre i wi kworo makwo." 
2Samuel18:15 Lacen awobe apar ma gin lutin jami lweny pa Joab gubino gurumo Abcalom gucobo guneko woko. 
2Samuel18:16 Joab okuto tum, mony ducu odwogo woko cen ki ka ryemo kor jo lerael; pien Joab doŋ ojukogi woko." 
2Samuel18:17 Gutiŋo kom Abcalom gubolo i te bur matut ma i buŋa, guyweko lwak godi madwoŋ gutoro i wiye, Ci jo Icrael guket woko, kun dano acel acel dok i gaŋŋe." 
2Samuel18:18 Onoŋo Abcalom yam ocibo wir got ocuŋ i nota pa Kabaka, pien obedo ka wacci, “An pe atye ki woda mo me po nyiŋa.’ Ocako nyiŋ” wir meno ki nyiŋe kene, ci pud gilwoŋo ni got me po Abcalom nio wa onyoo." 
2Samuel18:19 Akimaj wod pa Jadok owacci, “Wek ariŋ ater lok bot kabaka, aciwacce ni, ‘Rwot doŋ otyeko lari ki i ciŋ lumerokki.’" 
2Samuel18:20 Joab ogamo ni, “Pe ibitero lok tin. Ibitero i nino mukene, ento tin pe ibitero lok mo, pien wod pa kabaka aye doŋ oto woko.’" 
2Samuel18:21 Joab owaco bot dano mo me lobo Kuc ni, “Rin icitit bot kabaka gin ma doŋ ineno.’ Lakuc okulo wiye i nyim Joab, ka ocako ŋwec." 
2Samuel18:22 Akimaj wod pa Jadok dok openyo Joab ni, “Gin ma mito timme myero otimme i koma, ento wek an bene ariŋ i kor Lakuc.” Joab ogamo ni, “Imito riŋo kunnu piŋo ce, latinna? Nen, pe ibinoŋo iye mot mo pi tero lok man,”" 
2Samuel18:23 Akimaj dok owacci, “Gin ma mito timme onen. An abirino.” Joab owacce ni, “Rin do.” Akimaj ocako riŋo i kora yo ma i yo bar, ci okato Lakuc woko ki ŋwec." 
2Samuel18:24 I kare meno onoŋo Daudi obedo piny i kin doggaŋ me iye ki en me wokoni, kun lakur-piny onoŋo oito malo i wi ot ma i wi doggaŋ, ma cok ki cel ma orumo gaŋ-ŋi. Ka lakur-piny otiŋo waŋe ka neno piny, ci oneno dano mo ka riŋo bino en kene." 
2Samuel18:25 Lakur-piny odanne owaco bot kabaka. Kabaka ogamo ni, “Ka ce en tye kene, ci tye ki lok ma okelo.’ Dano ca omedde ki ŋwec bino kwede cok." 
2Samuel18:26 Lakur-piny dok oneno dano mukene ka riŋo bino. Ci odaŋŋe bot dano ma i doggaŋ ni, “Dano mukene dok tye ka bino ki ŋwec, en kene!” Kabaka owacci, “En bene obekelo lok mo.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Lakur-piny owacci, “Atamo ni, laŋwec mutelo yo-ni nen calo Akimaj wod pa Jadok.” Kabaka owacci, “En dano maber, en obebino ki lok mabeco.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Akimaj odaŋŋe matek ni, “Kabaka, piny tye maber.” Ci okulo wiye piny i nyim kabaka oryebbe kwede piny i ŋom kun waco ni, “Pwoc obed bot Rwot Lubaŋani, ma doŋ olari ki i ciŋ dano ma gutiŋo ciŋgi ka lweny i komi, laditta kabaka.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Kabaka openyo ni, “Lok mo marac pe i kom awobina Abcalom?” Akimaj ogamo ni, “I kare ma Joab cwala ki lok, awinyo woo madwoŋ ki yo neya, ento pe doŋ aniaŋ i gin mutimme-ni.’" 
2Samuel18:30 Kabaka owacci, “Koŋ ilokke icuŋ ki kenyo.” Ci olokke ocun mot." 
2Samuel18:31 Nen, Lakuc bene obino, ci otugi wacci, “Akelo lok maber bot laditta kabaka! Pien Rwot otyeko lari ki i tek pa jo ducu ma onoŋo gutiŋo lweny i komi.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Kabaka openyo Lakuc ni, “Lok mo pe marac i kom latinna Abcalom?” Lakuc ogamo ni, “Lumerokki ki jo ducu ma gutiŋŋe ka lweny i komi marac-ci gubed macalo latin awobi-ni, laditta kabaka.’" 
2Samuel18:33 Cwiny kabaka opoto lirim, ci oa malo oito malo i kicika ma tye i ot ma i wi doggaŋ, ocako koko kun woto kwede, ma koko wode ni, “A woda Abcalom, woda Abcalom! Kono nene an aye ato ma kakari do! Oii Abcalom, woda, woda do!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Gitito bot Joab ni kabaka tye ka koko ki ka kun o pi Abcalom. 
2Samuel19:2 Kit meno loyo mony me nino-nu olokke odoko me kumo’ palwak ducu, pien lwak ducu guwinyo i nino meno ni, “Cwiny kabaka tye ka ton pi wode.”" 
2Samuel19:3 Ci dano gubedo macalo jo ma mony aye oryemogi, pien gikwalle akwala ka gidonyo kwede i gaŋ ki lewic i nino meno." 
2Samuel19:4 Kabaka oumo wane woko, obedo ka koko ki dwan maloŋo ni, “Ai woda Abcalom, ai Abcalom, woda, woda do!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Joab odonyo i ot bot kabaka Daudi, owaco bote ni, “In tin i mako luticci ducu ki lewic, ma gin aye tin gularo kwoni, ki kwo pa awobeni ki anyirani, ki kwo pa monni ki mon aŋecani ducu," 
2Samuel19:6 In kara imaro jo ma dag waŋi, idag jo ma gimari. Tin doŋ inyuto woko ka maleŋ ni, ludito wi monnyi ki luticci ducu pe gitye ki kony mo boti. Tin doŋ aniaŋ atir ni, kono nene Abcalom aye obwot makwo, kun wan wato woko ducu, kono tin cwinyi obedo yom maka to." 
2Samuel19:7 Ber ia malo kombeddi, ikat woko wek icilok ki luticci lok mabeco, pien akwoŋo ki nyiŋ Rwot ni, ka pe iye kato woko, ci pe dano mo tin bidoŋ boti i dyewor man; dok man aye bibedo rac boti makato can madoŋo ma ilimo ducu cakke ki ka tinoni nio kwede wa onyoo.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Kabaka otugi a malo cut, ocito obedo i kabedone i doggaŋ, Ci gitito bot lwak ducu ni, “Nen, kabaka tye obedo i doggaŋ.” Ci dano ducu gucako bino i nyim kabaka, Onoŋo jo Icrael guriŋo woko ducu, kun dano acel acel odok i gaŋŋe:" 
2Samuel19:9 Dano ducu gubedo’ ka pyein ki i kaka ma i Icrael ducu, kun gipyem ni, “Kabaka aye yam olarowa ki i cin lumerokwa, dok en aye olarowa ki i cin jo Piliciti. I kare-ni en doŋ oriŋo oweko lobowa pi lworo Abcalom." 
2Samuel19:10 Ento Abcalom ma yam wawiro ki moo wek olowa-ni doŋ oto woko i mony. Ci piŋo pe doŋ giloko iye lok mo kombeddi pi dwoko kabaka paco?” 
2Samuel19:11 Ka lok ma jo Icrael ducu gubedo ka waco oo bot kabaka Daudi, ocwalo kwena bot Jadok ki ajwaka Abiatar kun wacci, “Wuwac bot ludoŋo pa jo Juda ni, ‘Piŋo wun aye wudoŋ cen ka gidwoko kabaka paco i ode?" 
2Samuel19:12 Nen, wun aye utmega, wun aye wucogo na ki riŋo koma; ci piŋo wun aye dok wudoŋ cen ka gidwoko kabaka paco?’" 
2Samuel19:13 Dok wuwac bot Amaca ni, ‘In giri ibedo watta. Lubaŋa myero oket can i koma kumeno ki maka to, ka pe in aye idoko ladit ma loyo monnya ma ka Joab, cakke tin cito kwede anyim.’ ”" 
2Samuel19:14 Kumeno omiyo dano ducu ma i Juda gumoko i kom Daudi ki cwiny acel, ci gucwalo lok bote ni, “Doŋ idwog cen, in kacel’ ki luticci ducu.”" 
2Samuel19:15 Mumiyo kabaka ocako dwogo cen oo i kulu Jordan. Ci jo Judagubino i Gilgal ka jolo wiye ki ka dwoko kabaka cen loka kulu Jordan. 
2Samuel19:16 Cimei wod pa Gera, ma jo ‘Benjamin, dano me Bakurim, en bene orune obino kacel ki jo Juda ka jolo kabaka Daudi," 
2Samuel19:17 kun bino ki jo” Benjamin ma romo alip acel. Ki Jiba “ma, latic ma loyo ot pa Caulo, ki awo bene apar wiye abic, ki luticce pyeraryo, gin bene gucorre i kulu Jordan ci gutuc i nyim kabaka." 
2Samuel19:18 Gukato ki i waŋ wat pi kelo dano pa kabaka loka kulu, ki pi tiyo gin ducu ma kabaka mito, Ka Cimei wod pa Gera obino, ci opoto piny i nyim kabaka i kare ma kabaka doŋ mito ŋolo Jordan," 
2Samuel19:19 Owaco bot kabakani, “Kabaka, pe imak balla i cwinyi, pe ibed ka po i kom gin ma yam atimo i komi marac, laditta kabaka, i kare ma ia kwede i Jerucalem. Pe iket lokke i cwinyi." 
2Samuel19:20 An laticci aŋeyo maber ni atimo bak Pienno, nen an doŋ tin abino, dok an aye akwoŋo bino ki i kin dano me ot pa Yucepu ka joli.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Abicai wod pa Jefuya ogamo ni, “Pe gibineko Cimei woko pi lok mari, pien yam obedo ka ceno dano ma Rwot owiro?”" 
2Samuel19:22 Ento Daudi ogamo ni, “Gin aŋo ma alaro kwedwu, wun awobe pa Jeruya, ma wun bene tin wulokke wudoko lumerokka? Tin dok gibineko dano i kin jo Icrael? Tin aye doŋ aniaŋ atir ni, an kabaka ma loyo jo Icrael.’" 
2Samuel19:23 Kabaka dok owacci, “In Cimei pe ibito.” Ci okwoŋŋe kwoŋ lamok lokke." 
2Samuel19:24 Mepibocet wod pa Caulo bene obino ka jolo kabaka. Obino ma pe oŋolo Lwet tyene-gu, dok pe okido yer tike, pe ojwero bene wek obed maleŋ, pe olwoko wa boŋŋine cakke ki i kare ma kabaka oriŋo kwede nio i kare me dwogone ki kuc." 
2Samuel19:25 Ka oa ki i Jerucalem obino ka jolo kabaka, kabaka openye ni, “Mepibocet, piŋo yam pe icito kweda?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Mepibocet ogamo ni, “Laditta, laticca aye obwola. Onoŋo awaco hote ni, ‘Twenakom bedo i wi kanana, wek abed iye,’ acit kacel ki kabaka.’ Pien tyena okwe woko." 
2Samuel19:27 En ocoko lok me goba i koma owaco boti, laditta kabaka. Ento in icalo lamalaika pa Lubaŋa, mumiyo in itim gin ma ineno ni ber." 
2Samuel19:28 Onoŋo yam jo ma i ot pa wora ducu kwogi okemo to keken ki i nyimi, ento in iketa i kin dano ma gicamo i wi mejani. Doŋ kit gin aŋo ma myero dok akok iye boti?”" 
2Samuel19:29 Kabaka ogamo ni, “Piŋo ibedo ka titta lok i komi twatwal? An doŋ atyeko ŋolo atir ni, wun ki Jiba wubipoko lobo.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Mepibocet owacci, “Kabaka, ka kumeno keken, ci wek en oter ducu, macalo in laditta kabaka doŋ idwogo paco ki kuc-ci.”" 
2Samuel19:31 I kare-nu Barjilai ma Lagilead bene obino ma oa ki i Rogelim; ci olwoko kabaka oo kwede i dog kulu Jordan, wek enol kwede loka tuŋcel." 
2Samuel19:32 Baŋilai onoŋo doŋ oti woko, mwaka me ditte doŋ romo pyeraboro. En aye yam obedo ka miyo cam bot kaba ka i kare ma kabaka tye i Makanaim, pien onoŋo en lalonyo mada." 
2Samuel19:33 Kabaka owaco bot Baŋilai ni, “Bin wakat kwedi loka ca, abigwoki i Jerucalem.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Baŋilai owaco bot kabaka ni, “An pud adoŋ ki mwaka adi me bed ona wi lobo, ma miyo dok acito wa i Jerucalemmi?" 
2Samuel19:35 I kare man an ditta doŋ romo mwaka pyeraboro. An pud dok atwero poko kin gin ma yomo cwinya nyo ma pe yomo cwinya? Pud dok abilo mit pa cam ma acamo, nyo gin ma amato? An pud dok atwero winyo wer ma co nyo mon giwero? Ci lok aŋo ma miyo amedo peko i komi, laditta kabaka?" 
2Samuel19:36 Abinywako yo kwedi manok me lwoki nio ka iŋolo loka kulu Jordan. Dok piŋo icula ki mot macalo meno? 
2Samuel19:37 Doŋ alego ni, wek adok cen i gaŋŋa, acit ato ki kunnu, i ŋet lyel pa wora ki maa. Ento atye kany ki laticci Kimkam; wek en aye ocit oŋol kwedi kulu, ci icitim en kit ma ineno ni ber.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Kabaka ogamo ni, “Kimkam biwot kweda loka ca, ci abitimo en kit ma ineno ni ber yo tuŋ boti; ki gin ducu ma imito ki tuŋ bota abitiyone piri.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Ka lwak ducu guŋolo Jordan, ci k ibaka bene oŋolo. Lacen kabaka ocik Baŋilai ki mot me mar, ka olamme gum; ci Baŋilai odok i pacone. Jo Juda ki jo Icrael gupyem pi kabaka" 
2Samuel19:40 Kabaka ocito i Gilgal, ki Kimkam bene onywako wot kwede. Ki lwak ma i Juda ducu ki nucu jo Icrael bene gunywako wot kacel ki kabaka." 
2Samuel19:41 Jo Icrael ducu gubino bot kabaka, guwaco bote ni,’ “Piŋo utmegiwa ma i Juda gukwalo in kabaka woko akwala, kacel ki jo ma i odi ducu, ci gukelowu loka kulu Jordan in Daudi ki lwakki ducu?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Lwak ma i Juda gugamo dog jo Icrael ni, “Pien kabaka aye watwa macok, ci piŋo kiniga makowu i kom lok macalo man, Onoŋo doŋ wacamo ciŋ kabaka bo? Nyo en doŋ otyeko miyowa mot mo bo?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Jo Icrael dok gudok iye bot jo Juda ni, “Wan watye ki dul apar i te ker man, ki i te loc pa Daudi wan wadwoŋ wakatowu. Ci piŋo wun aye dok wucayowa? Pe myero nene wan aye wakwoŋ waco pi dwoko kabaka paco?” Ento jo pa Juda lokgi obedo gwa makato lok pa jo Icrael." 
2Samuel20:1 I kare meno onoŋo tye dano mo marac mada ma nyiŋe Ceba wod pa Bikri ma Labenjamin. Ocako kuto kum kun wacci, “Wan pe watye ki waŋ pokwa mo i kom Daudi, pe watye ki dul mo i kom latin pa Yece; Wun jo Icrael, dano acel acel odok i kemane!”" 
2Samuel20:2 Kit meno jo Icrael gutwarre wo ko guweko Daudi, gucako lu bo kor Ceba wod pa Bikri. Ento jo Juda gubedo ka lubo kor kabakagi ma cwinygi omoko i kome, cakke ki i Jordan o kwede i Jerucalem." 
2Samuel20:3 Ka Daudi oo i ode ma i Jerucalem, okwanyo mon aŋeca apar ma onoŋo owekogi ka gwoko ode-ni, ci oketogi i ot ma gigwokogi iye kun en miyo cam botgi, ento pe omedo ki bedo kwedgi. Kit meno giloro wigi woko i ot nio wa i ka togi, kun gibedo macalo mon-to." 
2Samuel20:4 Kabaka dok owaco bot Amaca ni, “Cilwoŋ jo ma i Juda ducu gubin bota i kin nino adek-ki, in kikomi bene ibed tye kany.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Amaca ocito ka lwoŋo jo ma i Juda, ento odikke okato nino ma giciko-ni woko." 
2Samuel20:6 Daudi owaco bot Abicai ni, “Ceba wod pa Bikri bitimowa marac twatwal makato Abcalom. Cit ki danona wutugi ryemo kore, wek pe oma gaŋi mogo ma gicelo ki gogo, miyo bikelowa ayela.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Jo ma gulubo kor Abicai obedo Joab ki jo Keret ki jo Pelet, ki twoni oteka lweny ducu. Gucito gua ki i Jerucalem pi ryemo kor Ceba wod pa Bikri." 
2Samuel20:8 Ka doŋ guo i got mo madit ma i Gibeon, ci Amaca otuc i komgi. Onoŋo Joab orukke ki boŋo me askari, kun otweyo del pala lucwan i pyere, ma orwako pala lucwan i akurane. Ka en ocito anyim, ci pala opoto piny." 
2Samuel20:9 Joab openyo Amaca ni, “It ye maber bo, omera?” Ka Joab omako yer tik Amaca ki ciŋe malacuc ka omoto kun noto leme." 
2Samuel20:10 Ento Amaca pe oneno kom pala ma tye i ciŋ Joab. Joab ocobo iye, cin iye ocako wukke piny; pe dok onwoyo cobone tyen me aryo, ci oto woko. Ci Joab ki ominne Abicai guryemo kor Ceba wod pa Bikri." 
2Samuel20:11 Dano pa Joab mo ocuŋ ka ŋet Amaca ci owacci, “Ŋat ma cwinye omaro Joab, ki ma cwinye tye i kom Daudi, olub kor Joab.”" 
2Samuel20:12 Amaca obuto kun pwodde nenne kwede piny i remone i ŋet gudo. Tek dano mo oo kenyo, ka oneno, ci koŋ cuŋ. Ka dano pa Joab oneno lwak ducu koŋ gicuŋ, ci obino otŋo Amaca woko ki i gudo otero i lum, ci obolo boŋo mo i kome." 
2Samuel20:13 Ka doŋ gikwanyo kome woko ki i gudo lwak gucako mol gilubo kor Joab pi ryemo kor Ceba wod pa Bikri. 
2Samuel20:14 Ceba ocito kun baro kin kaka ducu ma i Icrael nio wa i Abel ma i ŋet Betmaaka; ci jo Bikri ducu gucokke, gulubo tamme." 
2Samuel20:15 Ci jo ducu ma gulubo kor Joab gucito gurumo gaŋ ma Ceba tye iye, en Abel ma i ŋet Bet-maaka. Gucako toro cel lobo orumo gaŋ woko, cel meno gitoro otenne wa i kom cel gogo me gaŋ, Dok gubedo ka twomo cel me gaŋ me amuka woko." 
2Samuel20:16 Dako mo ma laryeko odaŋŋe ki i gaŋ ni “Wuwiny ya! Wuwiny ya! Wuwac bot Joab koŋ obin kany, wek koŋ alok kwede mono.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Joab ocito cok bote ki dako-nu openyo ni, “In aye Joab bo?” Ogamo ni, “An do.” Dako-nu owacce ni, “Koŋ iwiny lokka, ladit.” Ogamo ni, “At ye ka winyone.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Dako-nu dok owacci, “Carolok macon wacci, ‘Wek gupeny dog jo Abel”; miyo giyubo lok tum mupye." 
2Samuel20:19 An gat acel i kom jo ma gimito kuc, ki jo ma lugen i Icrael. In imito balo gaŋ man woko ma en aye mego i Icrael kulu; piŋo ityeko lwak pa Rwot woko?”" 
2Samuel20:20 Joab ogamo ni, “Pe kumeno gire, pe kumeno; pe abino ka tyeko gaŋ nyo ka balone woko." 
2Samuel20:21 Lok meno pe ada. Ento dano mo ma i lobo godi me Epraim ma gilwoŋo Ceba wod pa Bikri aye otiŋo ciŋe i kom kabaka Daudi. Wumiwa en keken, ci abia aweko gaŋwu woko.” Dako-nu odok iyi bot Joab ni, “Nen ba, gibibolli wiye wok ki i wi cel.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Dako-nu ocito bot jo-nu ducu ki ryekone. Ci guŋolo wi Ceba wod pa Bikri woko, gubolo woko bot Joab. Joab okuto tum, ci mony oket woko oweko gaŋ, kun dano acel acel dok i pacone. Ki Joab bene odok i Jerucalem bot kabaka." 
2Samuel20:23 I kare-nu onoŋo Joab aye ladit ma loyo mony pa jo Icrael ducu; ki Benaya wod pa Yekoyada aye loyo jo Keret ki jo Pelet. 
2Samuel20:24 Adoram aye onoŋo ladit ma loyo tic muroni; ki Yekocapat wod pa Akilud onoŋo laco lok ma timme. 
2Samuel20:25 Ceva obedo karan, ki Jadok ki Abiatar gubedo ajwagi pa Lubaŋa;" 
2Samuel20:26 ki Ira ma jo Jair obedo ajwaka pa Daudi. 
2Samuel21:1 Kec opo to i kare pa Daudi mwaka ki mwaka pi mwaka adek. Mumiyo Daudi openyo dog Rwot, ci Rwot owacce ni, “Tye alii me remo i kom Caulo ki i kom jo me ode, pien oneko jo Gibeon.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Kabaka olwoŋo jo Gibeon ni gubin bote. Jo Gibeon pe gin jo Icrael kikome, ento gin jo Amor ma yam odon, Onoŋo yam JO Icrael gukwoŋo kwoŋ ni pe gibinekogi, ento kadi bed kumene, Caulo otemo nekogi woko, pien nyeko omake pi jo Icrael ki jo Juda." 
2Samuel21:3 Daudi openyo jo Gibeon ni, “Gin aŋo ma myero atim piwu? Dok abiculo kwor meno i kit yo aŋo, ka wek doŋ wulam gum i kom lwak pa Rwot?”" 
2Samuel21:4 Jo Gibeon guwacce ni, “Lok ma i kinwa ki Caulo ki jo me ode pe lok ma gitwero tyekone ki culo limo Kadi wa wan bene pe myero wanek dano mo ma i Icrael.” Daudi ogamo ni, “Wun doŋ wuwacci, atimmiwu kit gin aŋo?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Guwaco bot kabaka ni, “Dano ma obedo ka nekowa, ma en aye oyubo pi tyekowa woko wek pe wabed ki kabedo mo i lobo ma Icrael loyo-ni," 
2Samuel21:6 wek gimi botwa awobene abiro, wek wagurgi woko guŋabbe malo i nyim Rwot ki i Gibeon i kom got pa Rwot.” Ci kabaka ogamo ni, “Abimiyogi.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Ento kabaka oŋoyo Mepibocet wod pa Yonacan wod pa Caulo oweko odon, pien yam gukwoŋo kwoŋ i nyim Rwot ma tye i kingi, en Daudi ki Yonacan wod pa Caulo." 
2Samuel21:8 Kabaka okwanyo awobe aryo ma mingi nyiŋe Rijpa nya pa Aiya, ma onywalogi ki Caulo, nyiŋgi Armoni ki Mepibocet; ki awobe abic pa Merab ma nya pa Caulo, ma en onywalo ki Adriel wod pa Baŋilai ma jo Mekola." 
2Samuel21:9 Omiyogi ducu i cin jo Gibeon, ci gugurogi guŋabogi malo i wi got i nyim Rwot. Gin abiro ducu guto woko lawaŋacel. Ginekogi i nino ina gikwoŋo kayo iye kac, i nino ma gicako kayo iye bel cayiri." 
2Samuel21:10 Ka Rijpa nya pa Aiya okwanyo boŋo cola, oyaro i wi got me butone, ci ori kunnu cakke i acakki kayo kac nio ka kot ocako cwer i komgi ki i polo. Pe oweko winyo mo opye i komgi dyeceŋ, kadi wa ŋuu mo pe oo i komgi dyewor." 
2Samuel21:11 Ka gitito bot Daudi kit gin ma dako aŋeca pa Caulo, Rijpa nya pa Aiya, obedo ka timone," 
2Samuel21:12 Daudi ocito okwanyo cogo pa Caulo ki pa Yonacan ki bot jo Jabec-gilead, ma yam onoŋo gukwalo komgi ki i dye gaŋ me Bet-can ka ma yam Lupiliciti guŋabogi malo i kare ma Lupiliciti guneko iye Caulo i wi got Gilboa." 
2Samuel21:13 Okwanyo cogo pa Caulo ki pa wode Yonacan otero, ka gucoko cogo pa jo abiro ma gigurogi bene." 
2Samuel21:14 Guyiko cogo pa Caulo ki pa wode Yonacan i lobo Benjamin i Jela, i lyel pa wonne Kic; ci gutiyo gucobo kit ma kabaka ociko ducu. Ka lacen Lubaŋa ocako winyo lega pa dano ma gilego pi lobo." 
2Samuel21:15 Jo Piliciti dok gubedo ka lweny ki jo Icrael, ci Daudi ocito kunnu kacel ki jone, gucako lweny ki jo Piliciti. I kare mo Daudi ocako ol woko," 
2Samuel21:16 ka Icbibenob ma ŋat’ acel i kin likwayo pa twoni oluma-ni obino ma tye ki tonne ma pekke romo cokcok ratili apar kulu, dok otweyo del pyere ma tye iye pala Lucwan manyen. Oa otirre, i kom Daudi wek enek woko." 
2Samuel21:17 Ento Abicai wod pa Jeruya omwomme oriŋo ka lare ci ocobo Lapiliciti oneko woko. I ŋe meno jo pa Daudi gucike i nyiŋ Rwot ni, “In pe dok ibibino kacel kwedwa i mony mo, miyo ibineko mac tara pa Icrael woko.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Lacen “lweny ‘dok ocakke i kom jo Piliciti ma i Gob; ci Cibekai Ina Lakucat oneko Cap woko ma ŋat acel i kin likwayo pa twoni oluma-ni. 
2Samuel21:19 Ka lweny dok ocakke i kom Lupiliciti ma i Gob, ci Elkanan wod pa Jair, ma jo Beterekem, oneko Goliac ma jo Gat, ma bol toŋŋe rom ki rii yat me cweyo boŋo," 
2Samuel21:20 Lweny dok obedo i Gat ka ma tye iye dano mo ma oputte mabor liwawo, ma tye ki nyig ciŋe abicel, ki nyig tyene bene abicel, tuŋ ryoryo ducu, omiyo nyig Iwe te ducu romo pyeraryo wiye aŋwen, En bene obedo lakwar twoni oluma-nu." 
2Samuel21:21 Ka okatti ka nywaro jo Icrael ki ŋalane, ci Yonacan wod pa Cimei ma omin Daudi oneke woko." 
2Samuel21:22 Gin jo aŋwen-nu ducu gubedo likwayo pa twoni oluma ma yam bedo i Gat. Gin ducu Daudi ki jone guryekogi woko 
2Samuel22:1 Daudi owero lok ma i wer man bot Rwot i kare ma Rwot olare iye ki i ciŋ lumerokke ducu, ki i ciŋ Caulo bene." 
2Samuel22:2 Owero kit man ni, “Rwot aye gotta, en cel gogona matek, en lalarra." 
2Samuel22:3 En Lubaŋana, ki gotta, ariŋo alaro bote; en gwoka macalo kwot, en kalarrena matek; en gaŋ gogona ka ma ariŋo alaro iye, en lalarra; in aye ilara ki i lweny magwa." 
2Samuel22:4 Akok bot Rwot, ci en lara ki ciŋ lukworra. Pi meno myero gipak Rwot," 
2Samuel22:5 “Biamwonyi me to otwagge oruma woko dyere, kulu ma piine ger ma neko dano ocorre woko i wiya limuk." 
2Samuel22:6 Tol lyel odwala woko, owic me to bene orine woko i nyima." 
2Samuel22:7 “I kare ma atye ki can akok bot Rwot; akok gira bot Lubaŋana. Owinyo dwana ki i ot mere maleŋ, kokona pi kony odonyo i ite." 
2Samuel22:8 “Cutcut lobo oyeŋe ma morre pe twerre, te godi bene ducu guyegge woko ma giyeŋŋe matek, pien kiniga onoŋo omako Lubaŋa." 
2Samuel22:9 Yito oduny okatti ki i ume, mac ma waŋ malyet okatti ki i doge ma lodine bene olyel, olyelmatek mada." 
2Samuel22:10 Oywayo polo odwoko cen, ci olor obino piny,’ kun piny macol mapek oryene i te tyene." 
2Samuel22:11 Oito i wi lakerubi ci otuk kwede, kome onen i dye yamo," 
2Samuel22:12 Oketo piny macol orume dyere, kemane obedo pol mapek mupoŋ ki pii." 
2Samuel22:13 Lodi mac ma lyel okatti, onen i piny ma ryeny maleŋ ki i nyime." 
2Samuel22:14 Rwot omiyo polo omor, dwan ŋat Mamalo Twal owinnye." 
2Samuel22:15 Obayo aterone, okeyo lumerok woko; omiyo lutkot owil, ci orwadogi woko piny," 
2Samuel22:16 Dye nam opokke, tere onen, guti me te lobo bene odoŋ twolo, i kare ma Rwot ojukogi, i kare ma okutogi ki yweyo ma okatti ki i ume." 
2Samuel22:17 “Rwot ocwalo cine piny ki i polo, ci omaka, oywaya okela woko ki i pii matut." 
2Samuel22:18 Olara ki i cin lakworra matek, olara ki i ciŋ jo ma gidaga, pien onoŋo gitek mada giloya woko." 
2Samuel22:19 Gupoto i koma i kare ma can obwoya matek, ento Rwot aye obedo ka konya." 
2Samuel22:20 Okwanya woko okela i kabedo malac; olara pien onoŋo ayomo cwinye. 
2Samuel22:21 “Rwot omiya bakacic pien oneno ni kita atir, oculla muporo leŋcwinya;" 
2Samuel22:22 pien abedo ka lubo cik pa Rwot, pe apokke woko ki bot Lubaŋa pi bal mo." 
2Samuel22:23 Alubo cikke ducu, pe aŋak aweko gin ma en ociko." 
2Samuel22:24 Pe atimo bal mo i nyime, dok agwokke mada pe atim obal alii mo." 
2Samuel22:25 Mumiyo Rwot omiya bakacic pien oneno ni kita atir, oculla muporo leŋcwinya ma abedo kwede i nyime." 
2Samuel22:26 “Rwot, in lagen bot jo ma lugen; bot ŋat maber ma pe ki bal inyutte bote bene calo ŋat maber ma pe ki bal." 
2Samuel22:27 Cwinyi leŋ i kom jo ma cwinygi leŋ, ento iger i kom dano ma tamme ogom." 
2Samuel22:28 Ilaro jo mamwol, ento jo ma luwakke idwokogi woko piny." 
2Samuel22:29 Iyo, in aye ibedo mac tarana, ai Rwot; Lubaŋana aye menya ki i colpiny," 
2Samuel22:30 Iyo, atwero tyeko buca mony kulu ka ikonya; pi teko pa Lubaŋana miyo apye akalo wi cel." 
2Samuel22:31 Lubaŋa man, gin ducu ma co tiyo tye atir, lok pa Rwot ma en cikke me tiyo bedo ada; en tye macalo kwot pa jo ducu ma giriŋo gilaro bote." 
2Samuel22:32 “Aŋa ma Lubaŋa, kono Rwot kene? Aŋa ma got, pe Lubaŋawa aye keken gire?" 
2Samuel22:33 Lubaŋa man aye ka-larrena matek, en aye ma omiyo awoto ki kuc." 
2Samuel22:34 Oketo tyena obedo macalo tyen til, ociba malo ka ma acuŋ iye matek." 
2Samuel22:35 En pwonyo ciŋa pi lweny, mumiyo atwero gomo wa atum mola." 
2Samuel22:36 Doŋ ityeko miya kwot me larri, kony ma in imiya omiyo adoko dit." 
2Samuel22:37 Imiya kabedo malac ka ma awoto iye ducu, omiyo tyena pe ocer." 
2Samuel22:38 Aryemo kor lukworra ci anekogi woko; pe alokke adok cen nio ka atyekogi ducu. 
2Samuel22:39 Atyekogi woko, acobogi woko pil, ci gupoto piny ka tyena; pe doŋ gitwero a malo." 
2Samuel22:40 In aye iruka ki tek pi lweny; imiyo lulweny i koma guto gutum woko ka tyena. 
2Samuel22:41 Imiyo lumerokka guloko ŋeg bota, imiyo atyeko jo ma gidaga woko." 
2Samuel22:42 Guciko wangi, ento ŋat mo pe ma olarogi, gukok bot Rwot, ento en pe ogamo doggi." 
2Samuel22:43 Adinogi woko gudoko macalo apwa me ŋom; abologi woko macalo coto ma tye i yo gudo-gu," 
2Samuel22:44 “Yam ilara ki i kom rok mapol ma gilwenyo kweda; iketa abedo ladit ma loyo rok ducu; jo ma yam pe aŋeyogi gudoko jona ma an aye aloyogi," 
2Samuel22:45 Lurok gubino bota ma gimwolle amwola; cutcut ka giwinyo pira ci gilubo cikka. 
2Samuel22:46 Tekcwiny orwenyo woko ki botgi, gua ki ka ma gukanne iye gubino ma komgi myel amyela." 
2Samuel22:47 “Rwot tye kwo; gipwo gotta, gipil wi Lubaŋa ma en lalarra." 
2Samuel22:48 En Lubaŋa ma omiya aculo kwor i kom lukworra, dok ma obwoyo rok mapol, omiyo gubedo i te locca;" 
2Samuel22:49 ci olara ki i cin lumerokka. In ipilo wiya makato lukworra, ilara ki i ciŋ lulweny ma lubwami." 
2Samuel22:50 “Pi meno abikori i kin lurok, ai Rwot, dok abiwero wer me pako nyiŋi," 
2Samuel22:51 Lubaŋa miyo deyo me loc bot kabakane, dok nyuto mar mere ma pe lokke i kom danone ma en oyero ka giwiro, bot Daudi ki likwaye ducu matwal.”" 
2Samuel23:1 Man aye lok ma Daudi oloko me agikkine: Lok pa Daudi wod pa Yece, lok pa dano ma gipilo wiye twatwal, dano ma Lubaŋa pa Yakobo owiro, lawer jabuli mamit i Icrael." 
2Samuel23:2 “Cwiny pa Rwot aye miyo aloko, lokke winnye ki ileba." 
2Samuel23:3 Lubaŋa pa Icrael oloko, Lubaŋa ma obedo got matek pa Icrael owacca ni, Ka dano mo loyo lwak maber, kun loyo ma lworo Lubaŋa," 
2Samuel23:4 deyone nen i komgi macalo ceŋ ma ryeny odiko, macalo ceŋ ma ryeny odiko ma pol pe, dok bedo calo kot ma twiyo lum i wi lobo." 
2Samuel23:5 Iyo, oda pe ocuŋ kit meno kacel ki Lubaŋa? Pien otyeko keto gicikke kweda ma bedo nakanaka, ma oyubo kikore, dok bigwoko maber. En bimiyo gin ma konya ki gin ma amito medde ameda." 
2Samuel23:6 Ento jo ma pe gilworo Lubaŋa ducu gicalo okuto ma gibolo woko, ma dano pe twero mako ki cine noŋo." 
2Samuel23:7 Dano ma gudo komgi makogi ki nyonyo nyo bol toŋ ci mac aye wanogi tyeko woko.” 
2Samuel23:8 Magi aye nyiŋ twoni oteka lweny ma yam gibedo bot Daudi: Jocebbacebet ma jo Takemon, en aye ladit pa jo adek-ki. En yam okato ki tonŋe i kom dano miya aboro ci onekogi woko ducu lawaŋacel," 
2Samuel23:9 Ŋat ma lubo en ki i kin twoni lweny adek-ki aye Eleajar wod pa Dodo ma jo Akoki. En obedo kacel ki Daudi i kare ma gicayo jo Piliciti ma gucokke ka lweny kunnu, ci jo Icrael guriŋo gujer ki ŋegi." 
2Samuel23:10 Ci en Eleajar ocako neko jo Piliciti nio waŋ ma ciŋe ojony omoko i kom pala lucwanne. Rwot omiyo loc obedo dit twatwal i nino meno, Lacen jo Icrael gudwogo cen ka lubo kore, ento gubino pi lunyo jami ki ginaruka-gu i kom dano ma ginekogi keken." 
2Samuel23:11 Twon oteka lweny ma olube aye Cama wod pa Agee ma jo Karar. I kare ca jo Piliciti dok gucokke kacel i Leki ka ma poto ŋor tye iye, ci mony dok oriŋo jo Piliciti woko." 
2Samuel23:12 Ento Cama ocamo co, ocuŋ i dye poto nor pi laro, ocako ‘neko jo Piliciti, ci Rwot dok omiyo loc obedo dit twatwal." 
2Samuel23:13 I kare ma gikayo kac jo adek ki i kin jo pyeradek-ki gucako wot, ci gucito bot Daudi i boro got ma tye Adulam; onoŋo buca mony pa jo Piliciti ogony i nota Repaim." 
2Samuel23:14 I kare nu onoŋo Daudi tye i kakannene, dok cel gogo pa lumony pa jo Piliciti onoŋo tye i Beterekem." 
2Samuel23:15 Daudi oloko ki miti madwoŋ ni, “Kono ŋatti mo ocito ka twomo pii amata ki i waŋ it me Beterekem ma tye cok ki dog gaŋ ca, omiya amati, kono ber mada!”" 
2Samuel23:16 Ci twoni lweny adek-ku gucito gubaro dye gony pa jo Piliciti, gutwomo pii ki i waŋ it me Beterekem ma tye cok ki dog gaŋ ci gukelo bot Daudi. Ento Daudi pe omato; otino oliyo i nyim Rwot pi gityer amata," 
2Samuel23:17 kun wacci, “Pe kumeno, ai Rwot. An pe myero atim kit man, An dok am at remo pa dano ma gudyero komgi-ni?” En aye lok mumiyo pe omato pii-nu. Twoni lweny adek-ku yam autimo kit meno," 
2Samuel23:18 Abicai omin Joab, wod pa Jeruya, onoŋo en ladit i kin jo pyeradek-ki. Otiŋo toŋŋe olwenyo i kom jo miya adek ci onekogi woko ducu, mumiyo nyiŋe oywek ma mito romo jo adek ca," 
2Samuel23:19 Pienno olimo yweka madit makato ki i kom jo pyeradek-ki, ci odoko ladit me WI monygi; ento pe olimo rwom pa jo adek ca," 
2Samuel23:20 Benaya wod pa Yekoyada obedo twon oteka ma i Kabjeel, latim tim madito. En oneko awobe aryo ma gin twoni labwor me Moab. En bene olor odonyo i bur ci oneko iye labwor i kare ma pee ocwer mapek." 
2Samuel23:21 Ka dok oneko Laejipt mo, dano mamwonya, Laejipt meno onoŋo tye ki toŋŋe i ciŋe, ento en Benaya ocito bote ki odoone, oyuto toŋ woko ki i ciŋ Laejipt, ka oneke kwede woko ki toŋŋe-nu," 
2Samuel23:22 Benaya wod pa Yekoyada otimo gin madito kit meno, omiyo nyiŋe olimo yweka madit ma mito rom ki twoni lweny adek-ki." 
2Samuel23:23 Nyine oywek i kin jo pyeradek-ki, ento pe olimo rwom pa jo adek ca, Daudi oketo en obedo ladit pa jo ma gwoko en kabaka." 
2Samuel23:24 Acael ma omin Joab bene yam tye i kin jo pyeradek-ki; ki Elkanan wod pa Dodo me Beterekem," 
2Samuel23:25 Cama me Karcd, Elika me Karod," 
2Samuel23:26 Kelej ma jo Palti, Ira wod pa Ikec me Tekoa," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiejer me Anatot, Mebunai ma Lakucat," 
2Samuel23:28 Jalmon ma jo Akoki, Makarai me Netopa," 
2Samuel23:29 Keleb wod pa Baana me Netopa, Itayi wod pa Ribai me Gibea pa jo Benjamin," 
2Samuel23:30 Benaya me Piraton, Kidai ma bedo i nota ora me Gaac," 
2Samuel23:31 Abialbon me Arba, Ajimavet me Bakurim," 
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba me Caalbon ma wod pa Jacen, Yonacan," 
2Samuel23:33 Cama ma jo Karar, Akiam wod pa Carar ma jo Karar," 
2Samuel23:34 Elipelet wod pa Akacbai me Maaka, Eliam wod pa Akitopel me Gilo," 
2Samuel23:35 Kejero me Karmel, Parai ma jo Arbi," 
2Samuel23:36 Igal wod pa Natan me Joba, Bani ma jo Gad," 
2Samuel23:36 Igal wod pa Natan me Joba, Bani ma jo Gad," 
2Samuel23:37 Jelek ma jo Ammon, Nakarai me Beerot, ma latin jami lweny pa Joab wod pa Jeruya," 
2Samuel23:38 Ira ma jo Itri, Gareb ma jo Itri." 
2Samuel23:39 Uria ma jo Kit: gin ducu pyeradek wiye abiro. 
2Samuel24:1 Kiniga dok omako Rwot i kom jo Icrael, ci opiyo Daudi i komgi kun owaco ni; “Cit ikwan wei jo Icrael ki Juda.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Kit meno kabaka owaco bot Joab ki ludito wi mony ducu ma gitye bo te ni, “Wucit ka kwano dano i kin kaka ducu ma i Icrael, cakke i Dan nio kwede wa i Beer-ceba, kun wukwano dano ducu.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Ento Joab ojuko kaba ka kun owacce ni, “Myero Rwot Lubaŋani aye omed wel lwak tyen miya kulu, kun in kabaka ineno ki waŋi, ento piŋo cwinyi mito kwano dano kit man, laditta kaba ka?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Ento lok pa kabaka obedo tek makato pa Joab ki pa ludito wi mony ducu, omiyo Joab ki ludito wi mony gukato woko ki i nyim kabaka, gucito ka kwano wel jo Icrael." 
2Samuel24:5 Guŋolo loka kulu Jordan, ci gucako kwano dano cakke ki i Aroer ki i gaŋ ma tye i dye nota, ci gukemo Gad, guo kwede wa i Jajer." 
2Samuel24:6 Ka gumedde wa i Gilead ki i Kadec ma i lobo pa jo Kit; ka guo kwede i Dan, gulokke gudok yo tuŋ Cidon," 
2Samuel24:7 ka, gumedde kwede wa i gaŋ gogo me Turo ki i gaŋi ducu pa jo Kiv ki jo Kanaan; ka dok gucito kwede i Negeb me Juda kun giwok ki i Beer-ceba," 
2Samuel24:8 Ka gurumo ki lobo ducu, ci guo kwede i Jerucalem ma onoŋo otero dwe aboŋwen ki nino pyeraryo." 
2Samuel24:9 Ka Joab omiyo wel dano ma okwano-ni bot kabaka, i Icrael onoŋo tye iye oteka lweny ma wegi pala lucwan alip miya aboro, ki i Juda alip miya abic." 
2Samuel24:10 Ka Daudi okwano wel dano otum, ci cwinye ocako poto, Obako doge bot Rwot kun wacci, “Abalo twon bal mo madit pi gin ma doŋ atimo. Ento, ai Rwot, kombeddi doŋ alegi ni ikwany roc man woko ki i koma, pien atimo lok me miŋo twatwal.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Ka doŋ Daudi oa malo odiko con, ci lok pa Rwot obino bot lanebi Gad, ma lanenpiny ma konyo Daudi. Rwot owacci," 
2Samuel24:12 “Cit iciwac bot Daudi ni, ‘Rwot owaco kuman ni, Amiyi lok adek; in ikwany acel i kingi wek ami opot i korrii.’’’" 
2Samuel24:13 Kit meno Gad obino bot Daudi, otitte lok meno kun wacce ni, “Imito kec aye opot i lobowu otyek mwaka adek? Nyo imito lumerok guryemwu wek wuriŋ i nyimgi pi dwe adek kulu? Nyo two gemo aye opot i lobowu otyek nino adek? In koŋ itam wek inoŋ kit ma abidok iye bot Rwot ma ocwala boti-ni, ka wek adwokke lok.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Daudi owaco bot Gad ni, “An doŋ adonyo i twon can madit ma pe wacce. Wek wapot i ciŋ Rwot, pien kicane dwoŋ; ento pe apot i cin dano.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Rwot ocwalo two gemo opoto i kom jo Icrael cakke odiko nio kwede i nino ma ociko-ni. Dano guto cakke ki i Dan o kwede wa i Beer-ceba ma romo alip pyerabiro kulu. 
2Samuel24:16 I kare ma lamalaika pa Rwot ma tye ka neko dano oryeyo ciŋe okemo Jerucalem wek etyek woko, ci Rwot oŋut i kom gin man marac, Ojuko lamalaika kun waco ni, “Man doŋ oromo; doŋ ikul ciŋi piny.” Onoŋo lamalaika pa Rwot tye i ŋet laro moyo pa Arauna ma jo Jebuc," 
2Samuel24:17 Ka Daudi oneno kom lamalaika ma tye ka neko lwak ki, ci owaco bot Rwot ni, “Nen, atyeko tiyo bal, atimo roc madit; ento lwak romi man gutimo kit roc aŋo? Alegi ni, wek ciŋi opot i koma ki i kom jo me ot pa wora keken.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Gad dok obino bot Daudi i ŋino meno, owacce ni, “Doŋ icit ka ca no keno tyer pi Rwot i laro moyo pa Arauna ma jo Jebuc.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Daudi ocito kunnu kit ma Rwot ocike kwede pi lok pa Gad. 
2Samuel24:20 Arauna obolo wane piny ci oneno kabaka ki luticce ka gibino gikemo en atir, ci ocito omiyo woro bot kabaka kun oryebbe piny i nyime." 
2Samuel24:21 Arauna openyo ni, “Piŋo ibino bota tin, laditta kabaka?” Daudi ogamo ni, “Abino ka wilo laro moyoni wek acan iye keno tyer pi Rwot wek two gemo oke woko ki i kom lwak.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna owaco bot Daudi ni, “Laditta kabaka in iter larona, ityer iye gin ma ineno ni ber. Twon me gitum awaŋa bene ene, ki opam me dino bel ki rii nut twoni gubed me yen," 
2Samuel24:23 Magi ducu an Arauna amiyo boti, kabaka.” Arauna dok owaco bot kabaka ni, “Rwot Lubaŋani aye ogam motti.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Ento kabaka ogamo dog Arauna ni, “Pe kumeno, Abiwilogi ki boti awila, aculo ki lim; pien pe atwero tyero gitum awaŋa mo bot Rwot Lubaŋana ma, pe awilo ki, limma.” Kit meno Daudi owilo laro moyo ki twoni bene, oculo cekel me ryal pyerabic," 
2Samuel24:25 Daudi ocano iye keno tyer pi Rwot, ka otyero gitum awaŋa, ki gityer lakwecwiny, Pienno Rwot owinyo bako-dog pa lwak pi lobogi, ci two gemo oke woko ki i lobo Icrael." 
1Kings1:1 I kare ma kabaka Daudi doŋ oti twatwal, ki mwaka me ditte bene dwoŋ, kadi bed gium kome ki lwak boŋŋi mapol, pe winyo lyeto mo i kome." 
1Kings1:2 Luticce guwaco hote ni, “Ladit kabaka, giyeny nyako mo matidi gikel boti, wok omur kori, ogwoki bene, Wek en obut i kori, ladit kabaka, omiyi lyeto.”" 
1Kings1:3 Guyenyo nyako mo mamwonya ki i lobo Icrael ducu, ci gunoŋo Abicagi anyira Cunam, gukele bot kabaka." 
1Kings1:4 Nyako meno onoŋo mwonya mada. Otugi doko lagwok kabaka cut, kun tiyo tic ducu; ento kabaka pe oloko odoko dakone." 
1Kings1:5 I kare meno Adoniya wod pa Kagit oŋwette ki dwoŋ wiye kene kun wacci, “Abibedo kabaka.” Ocako yubo gadigadi lweny ki wegi aguragura, ki co pyerabic, oketogi me riŋo i nyime." 
1Kings1:6 Yam wonne pe ocwero cwinye i kare mo ducu pi penye ni, “Piŋo itimo gin munyo-ni!” En odoŋo nia kome mwonya mada ma neno mit; yam minne onywalo olubo ŋe Abcalom." 
1Kings1:7 En oyubo lok ki Joab wod pa Jeruya ki ajwaka Abiatar, ci gulubo kor Adoniya gukonye." 
1Kings1:8 Ento ajwaka Jadok, Benaya wod pa Yekoyada, lanebi Natan, ki Cimei ki Rei ki oteka lweny pa Daudi yam pe gitye bot Adoniya." 
1Kings1:9 Adoniya otyero romi ki twoni ki lim ma gucwe bot Lubaŋa i nyim got Twol ma tye i ŋet En-rogel, ka olwoŋo iye omege ducu ma awobe pa kabaka ki ludito ducu ma i Juda ma gitiyo bot kabaka." 
1Kings1:10 Ento pe olwoŋo lanebi Natan, kadi Benaya, kadi twoni oteka lweny pa Daudi, kadi wa ominne Solomon." 
1Kings1:11 Natan owaco bot Batceba min Solomon ni, “In peya iwinyo ni Adoniya wod pa Kagit otyeko doko kabaka ma rwotwa Daudi bene pe ŋeyo lok mo iye?" 
1Kings1:12 Iyo, koŋ doŋ ibin wek amiyi ryeko, ka wek alar kwoni ki kwo pa wodi Solomon." 
1Kings1:13 Cit oyot bot kabaka Daudi, iwacce ni, ‘Yam ikwoŋo kwoŋ bota, ladit, kun iwacci, woda Solomon aye bicamo kerri, en aye bibedo i wi komkerri, Piŋo Adoniya aye odoko kabaka?’" 
1Kings1:14 I kare ma noŋo pud it ye ka lok ki kabaka-ni, an bene abibino i kori ka moko lokki.”" 
1Kings1:15 Batceba ocito bot kabaka wa i kicikane. Onoŋo kabaka doŋ oti twatwal, kun Abicagi anyira Cunam obedo ka tic i kome." 
1Kings1:16 Batceba okulo wiye oryebbe piny me woro kabaka. Kabaka openye ni, “Gin aŋo ma cwinyi mitoni?”" 
1Kings1:17 Batceba ogamo ni, “Rwoda, yam ikwoŋo kwoŋ bota ki nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋani kun iwacci, Solomon ma woda aye bicamo kerri, en aye bibedo i wi komkerri." 
1Kings1:18 Kombeddi nen ba, Adoniya aye odoko kabaka, kadi bed in rwoda pe iŋeyo iye gin mo," 
1Kings1:19 Otyeko tyero twoni ki lim ma oewe-gu ki lwak romi mapol twatwal, olwoŋo awobe pa kabaka ducu, ki ajwaka Abiatar, ki Joab ladit me mony bene; ento pe olwoŋo laticci Solomon." 
1Kings1:20 Rwoda kabaka, kombeddi waŋ jo lerael ducu gineno boti pi tito botgi ŋat ma bibedo i wi komkerri ka in doŋ ipe." 
1Kings1:21 Gwok nyo kare biromo ma noŋo in rwoda kabaka ito woko, iywe kacel ki kwariwu, ci an ki woda Solomon aye gibinenowa macalo wan luba!.”" 
1Kings1:22 I kare ma Batceba tye ka lok ki kabaka-ni, lanebi Natan bene obino i ot." 
1Kings1:23 Giwaco bot kabaka ni, “Lanebi Natan bene tye kany.” Ka Natan odonyo i ot, oryebbe i nyim kabaka kun okulo wiye piny i ŋom." 
1Kings1:24 Owacci, “Rwoda kabaka, onoŋo in iwacci, ‘Adoniya aye bileyo ka tyena, en aye bibedo i wi komkerra’?" 
1Kings1:25 Gin mumiyo apenyo, pien en doŋ ocito woko, otyero twoni ki lim ma ocwe, ki romi mapol twatwal, olwoŋo awobe pa kabaka ducu, ki Joab ladit me mony, ki ajwaka Abiatar. Nen, gin gitye ka cam ki mat i nyime kun giwacci, ‘Kabaka Adoniya obed kwo nakanaka!’" 
1Kings1:26 Ento an ma laticci, ki ajwaka Jadok, ki Benaya wod pa Yekoyada, ki laticci Solomon, en pe olwoŋowa." 
1Kings1:27 Lok man in rwoda kabaka aye imiyo otine kece, kun pe itito botwa wan luticci aŋa ma bibedo i wi komkerri ka in doŋ ipe?”" 
1Kings1:28 Kabaka Daudi ogamo ni, “Lwoŋ Batceba obin bota.” Ci Batceba obino bot kabaka, ocuŋ i nyime." 
1Kings1:29 Kabaka okwono kwon kun wacci, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, ma yam okoko kwona ki iciŋ lukworra," 
1Kings1:30 macalo yam akwoŋo kwoŋ boti ki nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael kun awacci, ‘Wodi Solomon aye bileyo ka tyena, en aye bibedo i wi komkerra me leyo kakara,’ tin doŋ abiketo i tic.”"
