1Kings1:31 Batceba okulo wujc oryebbe piny oworo kaba ka kun wacci, “Myero rwoda kabaka Daudi obed kwo matwal!”" 
1Kings1:32 Kabaka Daudi dok owacci, “Wulwon ajwaka Jadok obin bota, ki Benaya wod pa Yekoyada ci gubino bot kabaka." 
1Kings1:33 I Kabaka owaco botgi ni, “Wucit ki askarina, wuket woda Solomon i wi kanana kikome, ci wutere i Gikon." 
1Kings1:34 Wumi ajwaka Jadok ki lanebi Natan guwire kunnu ki moo me bedo kabaka me Icrael, lacen wukut tum kun wuwacci, ‘Kabaka Solomon obed kwo nakanaka!’" 
1Kings1:35 Ka wun doŋ wubilubo kore, ka en bino ci bedo i wi komkerra; pien en aye bibedo kabaka kakara, an doŋ atyeko kete me bedo laloc i wi Icrael ki i wi Juda bene,”" 
1Kings1:36 Benaya wod pa Yekoyada ogamo dog kabaka ni, “Amen, Myero Rwot Lubujani rwoda kabaka omok lok ma iwaco-nu," 
1Kings1:37 Kit ma Rwot yam obedo kwedi, rwoda kabaka, en dok obed ki Solomon bene kit meno, omi komkerre obed dit makato meri.”" 
1Kings1:38 Ajwaka Jadok ki lanebi Natan, ki Benaya wod pa Yekoyada, ki jo Keret ki jo Pelet, gucito guketo Solomon obedo i wi kana pa kabaka Daudi, ka gukelo kwede i Gikon." 
1Kings1:39 Ajwaka Jadok okwanyo moo ma i tun romo ma onoŋo okwanyo ki i kema pa Rwot, owiro ki Solomon ki kunnu, Lacen gikuto tum, ci lwak ducu gugamo ni, “Kabaka Solomon obed kwo nakanaka!”" 
1Kings1:40 Dano gucako mol i kore kun gikuto nyamulere-gu ma cwinygi yom adada, omiyo lobo mito bar woko likwak pi dwangi." 
1Kings1:41 Adoniya ki welone ducu guwinyo i ŋe tyeko karamagi. Ka Joab owinyo dwan tum ci openyo ni, “Woo madit ma i gaŋ kai-Ii nyuto aŋo?”" 
1Kings1:42 I kare ma en pud tye ka lok, Yonacan wod pa ajwaka Abiatar otuc, ci Adoniya owacce ni, “Dony, pien in dano ma gigeno, myero ikel lok maber.”" 
1Kings1:43 Yonacan ogamo dog Adoniya ni, “Pe kumeno, ladit, pien rwotwa kabaka Daudi doŋ otyeko keto Solomon me’ bedo kabaka." 
1Kings1:44 Ocwalo ajwaka Jadok, ki lanebi Natan, ki Benaya wod pa Yekoyada, ki jo Keret ki jo Pelet, guketo Solomon obedo i wi kana pa kabaka." 
1Kings1:45 Ajwaka Jadok ki lanebi Natan gutyeko wire ki moo i Gikon me bedo kabaka; gucito nia ki kunnu ma cwinygi yom, en aye omiyo woo tye i gaŋ kal, Man aye dwan ma wuwinyo-ni." 
1Kings1:46 Solomon doŋ obedo i wi komker," 
1Kings1:47 dok bene lutic pa kabaka gucito ka pwoyo rwotwa, kabaka Daudi, kun giwacci, ‘Lubaŋani omi nyiŋ Solomon oywek mada makato meri, dok omi komkerre obed dit makato komkerri!’ Ci kabaka okulle piny i wi kitandane," 
1Kings1:48 owaco bene ni, ‘Gipwo Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ma otyeko keto ŋat acel ki i kin litinona obedo i wi komkerra tin, ma kun aneno ki waŋa.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Lwak welo pa Adoniya ducu komgi ocako myel, ci gutwarre, ŋat acel acel okemo yone kene," 
1Kings1:50 Adoniya ocako lworo Solomon, ci oa ocito, omako ten keno me keno tyer." 
1Kings1:51 Gitito pire bot Solomon kun giwacci, “Nen, Adoniya doŋ lwori, kabaka Solomon, pien ocito omako ten keno me keno tyer kun wacci, ‘Waŋ ma kabaka Solomon okwoŋo kwoŋ bota ni pe ebineka, an laticce, ki pala lucwan, ci abia.’’’" 
1Kings1:52 Solomon owacci, “Ka ebibedo dano ma genne, pe yer wiye mo bipoto piny; ento ka rac mo onen i kome, ci bito.”" 
1Kings1:53 Kit meno kabaka ocwalo dano ci gukwanyo Adoniya woko ki i kom keno tyer, ci ocito oworo kabaka Solomon, Solomon owaco bote ni, “Cit wa i odi.”" 
1Kings2:1 Ka kare me to pa Daudi onyiko cok ci ociko Solomon kun wacci," 
1Kings2:2 “An doŋ acok cito ka lubo yo ma jo me lobo ducu lubo-ni. Bed matek, nyutte ni in laco." 
1Kings2:3 Mak cik pa Rwot Lubaŋani kun iwoto i yone, ma ilubo lok ma en ociko ducu, dok omiyo botwa obed lok me caden, kit ma gicoyo kwede i buk pa Moses, wek ibed ki gum i kom gin ducu ma itiyo, ki ka ma idok iye ducu." 
1Kings2:4 Rwot omok lokke ma yam oloko i komi, ma owacci, ‘Ka ce awobeni gibigwoko kitgi maber, kun gibedo dano ma gin lugen i nyima ki cwinygi ducu ki tipo komgi ducu, ci pe ibibedo laboŋo daponi mo ma bibedo i wi komker me Icrael!’" 
1Kings2:5 “Ento in iŋeyo gin ma yam Joab wod pa Jeruya otiyo i koma, kit ma otimo ki ludito mony pa jo Icrael aryo-ni. Abneri wod pa Ner ki Amaca wod pa Jeter, ma en onekogi wo ko pi culo kwor i kare me kuc pi remo ma yam oo i mony macon ca. En omiyo remo pa jo ma gipe ki bal onyobo del pyera ki war tyena bene." 
1Kings2:6 In itim muporo ryekoni; ento pe iwek lwar wiye ocit i lyel ki kuc. 
1Kings2:7 Ento bed maber ki awobe pa Baŋilai ma jo Gilead, wek gubed i kin dano ma gicamo i wi mejani; gin bene yam gubedo maber kweda kumeno i kare ma gunona ka ariŋo omeru Abcalom." 
1Kings2:8 Dok bene pud it ye ki Cimei wod pa Gera ma Labenjamin ma gaŋgi Bakurim. En yam obedo ka lamo an ki cen marac twatwal i kare ma onoŋo acito i Makanaim; ento ka obino ka rwatte kweda i dog kulu Jordan, ci akwoŋo kwon bote ki nyiŋ Rwot kun awacci, pe abineke ki pala lucwan." 
1Kings2:9 Iyo, pe ibed kwede macalo en pe tye ki bal mo, In laryeko, ibiŋeyo kit ma ibitime kwede, ibitero lwar wiye i lyel ki remo.”" 
1Kings2:10 Lacen Daudi oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyike i gaŋ kalle." 
1Kings2:11 Kare ma Daudi oloyo kwede jo Icrael oromo mwaka pyeraŋwen; obedo ka loc i Kebron pi mwaka abiro, ka dok i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyeradek wiye adek." 
1Kings2:12 Kit meno Solomon obedo i wi komker pa wonne Daudi, ci kerre omoko matek." 
1Kings2:13 Adoniya wod pa Kagit obino bot Batceba ma min Solomon. Batceba openye ni, “Ibino ki kuc?” Ogamo ni, “Abino ki kuc.”" 
1Kings2:14 Dok owacci, “At ye ki gin mo ma amito wacci.” Batceba ogamo ni, ‘“‘Wac do,”" 
1Kings2:15 Adoniya owacci, “Iŋeyo ni ker yam mera, dok jo Icrael oye ni alogi; ento ker dok olokke odoko pa, omera, pien onoŋo Rwot aye omiye." 
1Kings2:16 An atye ki peny mo acel me penyi kwede; pe ikwer doga.” Batceba ogamo ni, “Wac do.”" 
1Kings2:17 Ci owacci, “Alegi ipennya kabaka Solomon, pien en pe bikwero dogi, en omiya Abicagi ma Laeunam wek obed dakona.”" 
1Kings2:18 Batceba ogamo ni, “Ber matek; abitito lokki bot kabaka.”" 
1Kings2:19 Batceba ocito bot kabaka Solomon pi lok kwede pi Adoniya. Kabaka oa malo pi jole, okulle piny bot minne; ka obedo i wi komkerre, ka dok gikelo kom pi min kabaka bene, ci obedo i ŋete tuŋ acuc," 
1Kings2:20 Batceba owacci, “At ye ki peny mo acel ma apenyi kwede; pe ikwer.” Kabaka ogamo doge ni, “Peny pennyinu, maa; pien pe abikwero dogi.”" 
1Kings2:21 Minne owacci, “Wek Abicagi ma Laeunam gimi bot Adoniya obed dakone.”" 
1Kings2:22 Kabaka Solomon ogamo dog minne ni, “Piŋo ipenyo ni gimi Abicagi ma Laeunam bot Adoniya? Peny wa pi kerra bene ducu; pien en omera maditte, en onoŋo tye ki ajwaka Abiatar ki Joab wod pa Jeruya ka ŋete.”" 
1Kings2:23 Ci kabaka Solomon okwoŋo kwoŋ ki nyiŋ Rwot kun wacci, “Lubaŋa oket can i koma kit meno ki makato ka ce lok man pe amiyo Adoniya oculo ki kwone!" 
1Kings2:24 Kombeddi, macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, ma doŋ omoko kerra, ma oketa i wi komker pa wora Daudi, ma oketa adoko kabaka, dok omiyo jo me oda gicuŋ matek kit ma yam ociko-ni, Adoniya tin gibinekone woko.”" 
1Kings2:25 Kabaka Solomon ocwalo Benaya wod pa Yekoyada, ci Benaya ocobo Adoniya oreto woko piny, oneko woko." 
1Kings2:26 Kabaka dok owaco bot ajwaka Abiatar ni, “Cit i Anatot, i paconi, pien imyero ki to. Ento peya abineki i kare-ni, pien yam ibedo ka tiŋo canduk pa Rwot Lubaŋa i nyim wora Daudi, dok pien yam iribbe ki wora ka neno can madwoŋ.”" 
1Kings2:27 Ci Solomon okwanyo Abiatar woko ki i tic me bedo ajwaka pa Rwot. Lok pa Rwot ma yam oloko i Cilo ma mako jo me ot pa Eli ocobbe kit meno. 
1Kings2:28 Ka Joab owinyo gin mutimme, oriŋo olaro i kema pa Rwot, omako ten keno me keno tyer; pien Joab onoŋo obedo ka konyo Adoniya, kadi bed yam pe okonyo Abcalom," 
1Kings2:29 Ka gitito pire bot kabaka Solomon ni, “Joab oriŋo olaro i kema pa Rwot, tye wa i ka ŋet keno tyer,” Solomon ocwalo Benaya wod pa Yekoyada kun wacci, “Cit icobe iret woko piny.”" 
1Kings2:30 Ci Benaya ocito i kema pa Rwot, owacce ni, “Kabaka ociko ni ikat woko.” Joab ogamo ni, “Pe, abito ki kany.” Benaya dok otero lok bot kabaka kun wacci, “Joab dok owaco kuman-ni, ka dok odokka iye kit man.”" 
1Kings2:31 Kabaka odok iye bote ni, “Tim kit ma en owaco-ni, cob iret woko piny. Ci ibiyike woko, wek gikwany alii woko ki i koma ki i kom ot pa wora pi remo pa dano ma yam Joab onekogi laboŋo bal mo ma gin gutimo." 
1Kings2:32 Rwot bidwoko tim me oyo remo meno i wiye kikome, pien en yam opoto i kom twoni aryo ma cwinygi atir ma gibeco gikato en, ci onekogi woko ma wora Daudi pe ŋeyo en aye Abneri wod pa Ner ma lawimony ma loyo mony pa jo Icrael, ki Amaca wod pa Jeter ma lawiwmony ma loyo mony pa jo Juda." 
1Kings2:33 Alii me togi bidok i wi Joab ki i wi likwaye matwal; ento ki bot Daudi ki bot likwaye ki jo me ode ducu, ki bot komkerre, kuc ma a ki bot Rwot bibedo iye nakanaka.”" 
1Kings2:34 Benaya wod pa Yekoyada ocito kunnu, ocobo Joab oreto woko piny oneko woko; ci giyike i pacone kikome ma tye i dye tim." 
1Kings2:35 Kabaka oketo Benaya wod pa Yekoyada me bedo ladit ma loyo mony ma ka Joab, dok oketo Jadok me bedo ajwaka pa Lubaŋa ma ka Abiatar." 
1Kings2:36 Lacen kabaka ocwalo kwena ka lwoŋo Cimei, owaco bote ni, “Ger odi piri keni i Jerucalem, ibed iye kunnu, pe ia ki kunnu icit i kabedo mukene." 
1Kings2:37 Ento i nino mo keken ma icito iye woko, ma iŋolo iye nota ora Kidron, ci myero iŋe atir ni ibito iye; alii me toni bidok gire i wii.”" 
1Kings2:38 Cimei ogamo dog kabaka ni, “Lok ma iwaco-ni ber, rwoda kabaka; abitimo kit ma iwaconi.” Ci Cimei obedo i Jerucalem pi kare malac." 
1Kings2:39 Ka mwaka adek okato, opii aryo pa Cimei guriŋo woko bot Akic wod pa Maaka, ma kabaka me Gat. Ka gitito bot Cimei ni, “Opiini gitye i Gat bot Akic.”" 
1Kings2:40 Cimei oa, otweyo kom me bedo i ŋe kana, ci ocito i Gat bot Akic ka yenyo kor opiine. Ka ononogi, odwokogi cen ki i Gat." 
1Kings2:41 Ka gitito bot Solomon ni Cimei otyeko a woko ki i Jerucalem, ocito wa i Gat ka olokke odwogo," 
1Kings2:42 kabaka ocwalo dano ka lwoŋo Cimei, ci, owaco bote ni, “Yam pe amiyo ikwoŋo kwon i nyiŋ Rwot, kun ajuki matek ma awacci, ‘ŋe atir ni, i nino ma ibicito iye woko i kabedo mo mukene, ibito’? Ci in igamo doga ni, ‘Lok ma iwaco-ni ber; abilubo.’" 
1Kings2:43 Ci piŋo nene pe doŋ igwoko kwoŋŋi ma ikwoŋo i nyim Rwot, ki cik ma yam aciki kwede?”" 
1Kings2:44 Kabaka dok owaco bot Cimei ni, “In iŋeyo ki i cwinyi kit tim maraco ducu ma yam itimo i kom wora Daudi; Rwot bene bidwoko tim maraco meno poto i wii kikome." 
1Kings2:45 Ento an abibedo ki gum, ci komker pa Daudi bimoko matwal i nyim Rwot.”" 
1Kings2:46 Kabaka dok ociko Benaya wod pa Yekoyada; ci okato woko ocobo Cimei oreto woko piny oneko woko. Kumeno ker omoko matek i ciŋ Solomon. 
1Kings3:1 Solomon oribbe ki Parao kabaka me Ejipt kun onyomo nyare; ci otero nya pa Parao i gaŋ kai pa Daudi nio ka doŋ otyeko gero ode kikome ki ot pa Rwot, ki cel ma orumo Jerucalem." 
1Kings3:2 Ento lwak gubedo ka tyero gitum i kabedo me woro Lubaŋa ma i wi godi, pien onoŋo peya gigero ot mo pi nyiŋ Rwot." 
1Kings3:3 Solomon yam omaro Rwot, kun lubo cik pa wonne Daudi, ento onoŋo pud tumo gitum dok Waŋo odok eceta i kabedo me woro Lubaŋa ma i wi godi." 
1Kings3:4 I nino mo acel kabaka ocito i Gibeon ka tumo gitum kunnu, pien meno aye kabedo me woro Lubaŋa maditte. Solomon yam obedo ka tyero gitum awaŋa alip acel kulu i wikeno tyer kunnu." 
1Kings3:5 Rwot onyutte bot Solomon i Gibeon i wag let dyewor, ci owacci “Peny gin ma abimiyo boti.”" 
1Kings3:6 Solomon ogamo ni, “In yam inyuto mar meri madwoŋ ma pe lokke bot wora Daudi ma laticci, pien obedo ka kwo i nyimi ki gen madwoŋ ki tim ma atir, ma cwinye leŋ; in bene igwoko mar meri madit ma pe lokke pire, dok ityeko miyo wode obedo i wi komkerre i kareni." 
1Kings3:7 Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, kombeddi doŋ iketa, an laticci, adoko kabaka ma ka wora Daudi, kadi bed pud an latin, ma peya aŋeyo loyo dano." 
1Kings3:8 An doŋ atye i kin joni ma yam iyero, rok madit ma pe kwanne, ma welgi pe ŋene pi polgi." 
1Kings3:9 Ber in Rwot imiya cwiny me ryeko me loyo lwakki, wek aŋe poko kin gin maber ki gin marac; aŋa ma twero loyo rok man madit-ti?”" 
1Kings3:10 Rwot cwinye obedo yom i kom Solomon pi peny man. 
1Kings3:11 Lubaŋa owaco bote ni, “Pien ipenyo kit man, ma pe ilega ni ami iri i wi lo bo nakanaka, pe ilego lonyo, kadi pi kwo pa lumerokki, ento ilego ni gimiyi cwiny me ryeko me poko gin ma tye atir," 
1Kings3:12 abitiyo kit ma iloko-ni. Nen, doŋ amiyi ryeko ki cwiny me poko kin lok mapatpat kit ma peya onen i kom dano mo nia wa con, dok bene ŋat macalo in pe binen ki i ŋeyi." 
1Kings3:13 Dok abimiyi gin ma pe ilego bene, abimiyi lonyo ki deyo, wek kabaka mo pe obinen ma gibiporo ki in pi kwoni ducu." 
1Kings3:14 Ka ce ibilubo yona kun imako cikka ki lok ma aciko ducu, kit ma yam woru Daudi olubo-ni, abimedo kwoni ri i wi lobo kare malac.”" 
1Kings3:15 Ka Solomon oco, ci onoŋo ni kara ebedo ka leko lek. Ka obino i Jerucalem, ocuŋ i nyim canduk me gicikke pa, Rwot, otyero gitum awaŋa ki gityer lakwecwiny, ci otedo karama pi luticce ducu." 
1Kings3:16 I kare meno mon aryo ma lukwele gubino bot kabaka, gucuŋ i nyime." 
1Kings3:17 Dako acel owacci, “Ai rwoda, dako man ki an wabedo i ot acel, ci an anywalo latinna ma onoŋo en tye i ot kweda." 
1Kings3:18 Dok i ne nino adek cakke i kare ma agonnye kwede, en bene onywal; dano mo onoŋo pe tye kwedwa i ot, onoŋo watye wan aryo keken." 
1Kings3:19 Ci dako man obuto i kom latinne i dyewor, omiyo latin oto." 
1Kings3:20 En oa malo ki i dyewor, ci otiŋo woda woko ki ka neta; ma onoŋo an anino woko, ka opyelo i kore, ka dok opyelo kom wode muto-ni i kora." 
1Kings3:21 Ka oo odiko, ci aa malo ka doto latinna; ci nen, anoŋo doŋ oto woko, Ka abedo ka niyo kome, nen, pe en aye latinna ma anywalo-ni.”" 
1Kings3:22 Ento dako mukene-ni owacci, “Pe kumeno; latin makwo-ni: aye mera, latin muto-ni meri.” Dako mukwoŋo-ni owacci, “Pe, latin muto-ni aye meri, latin makwo-ni aye mera.” Gubedo ka lok kumeno i nyim kabaka." 
1Kings3:23 Kabaka dok owacci, “Man wacci, ‘Man makwo-ni aye latinna, latinni en oto-ni”; mu kene gamo ni, ‘Pe; ento muto-ni aye latinni, makwo-ni aye mera.’ ”" 
1Kings3:24 Kabaka dok owacci, “Kella pala lucwan.” Ci gikelo pala lucwan i nyim kabaka." 
1Kings3:25 Kabaka ociko ni, “Gipok i latin makwo-ni aryo, wek gimi dul acel bot dako acel, ki dulle tuŋcel bot lawote.”" 
1Kings3:26 Ci dako ma wode tye makwo-ni owaco bot kabaka ni, “A, rwoda, mi latin makwo-ni hote, pe inek aneka,” pien cwinye tye ka cwer pi latinne. Ento mukene-ni ogamo ni, “Gipok iye wek pe doŋ obed mera nyo meri.”" 
1Kings3:27 Kabaka ogamo lokgi owacci, “Mi latin makwo bot dako mukwoŋo-ni. Pe ginek woko, en aye min latin-nu.”" 
1Kings3:28 Ka jo Icrael guwinyo k it kop ma kabaka onolo-ni, ci gubedo ki lworo i kom kabaka; pien guniaŋ ni ryeko pa Lubaŋa tye i iye, omiyo oŋolo kop atir." 
1Kings4:1 Kabaka Solomon obedo kabaka ma loyo jo Icrael ducu. 
1Kings4:2 Dano magi aye gubedo ludito wi ticce: Ajaria wod pa Jadok obedo ajwaka pa Lubaŋa; 
1Kings4:3 Elikorep ki Akija ma awobe pa Cica gubedo lukarani, Yekocapat wod pa Akilud obedo laco lok ma timme;" 
1Kings4:4 Benaya wod pa Yekoyada obedo ladit me mony; Jadok ki Abiatar gubedo ajwagi pa Lubaŋa; 
1Kings4:5 Ajaria wod pa Natan obedo ladit ma loyo lulo dul lobo; Jabud wod pa Natan obedo ajwaka ki larem kabaka; 
1Kings4:6 Akica obedo ladit ma gwoko gaŋ kai; ki Adoniram wod pa Abda obedo ladit ma loyo tic muroni," 
1Kings4:7 Solomon obedo ki lulo dul lobo apar wiye aryo ma giloyo wi Icrael ducu, ma ticgi obedo me coko cam pi kabaka ki jone ducu; dano acel acel miyo cam tyeko dwe acel i mwaka." 
1Kings4:8 Nyiŋgi ene: Ben-kur onoŋo loyo lobo godi me Epraim; 
1Kings4:9 Ben-deker onoŋo loyo Makaj, Caalbim, Bet-cemec ki Elon-bet-kanan;" 
1Kings4:10 Ben-keced oloyo Arubot ki Coko ki lobo Keper ducu; 
1Kings4:11 Ben-abinadab oloyo Napat-dor ducu. (Onoŋo dakone obedo Tapat ma nya pa Solomon.) 
1Kings4:12 Baana wod pa Akilud oloyo Taanak, Megido ki Bet-cean ducu ma tye ka ŋet Jaretan ma i luŋ me Jejreel, ki cakke i Bet-cean nio i Abel-mekola ki nio kwede wa ka ŋet Jokmeam tuŋcel;" 
1Kings4:13 Ben-geber oloyo Ramot-gilead, ki gaŋi matino pa Jair wod pa Manace ma gitye i lobo Gilead, kacel ki lobo Argob ma i Bacan ma tye iye gaŋi madito pyerabicel ma gicelo ki cel, ma dogcelgi gicego ki rii mola;" 
1Kings4:14 Akinadab wod pa Iddo oloyo Makanaim; 
1Kings4:15 Akimaj oloyo lobo Naputali. En onoŋo onyomo Bacemat ma nya pa Solomon. 
1Kings4:16 Baana wod pa Kucai oloyo Acer ki Bealot; 
1Kings4:17 Yekocapat wod pa Parua oloyo lobo Icakar; 
1Kings4:18 Cimei wod pa Ela oloyo lobo Benjamin; 
1Kings4:19 Geber wod pa Uri oloyo dul lobo Gilead ma yam obedo lobo pa Cikon kabaka pa jo Amor ki pa Og kabaka me Bacan. Dok onoŋo tye lalo lobo acel ma loyo lobo Juda. 
1Kings4:20 Jo Juda ki jo Icrael yam gidwoŋ ma rom ki kweyo ma i dog nam; gubedo ka cam ki ka mat ki yomcwiny. 
1Kings4:21 Solomon obedo ka loyo ker mapatpat ducu cakke ki i kulu Euprate nio wa i lobo pa jo Piliciti, ki nio wa i lobo Ejipt. Jo me ker meno gubedo ka tyero mot bot Solomon kun gitiyo bote i kare me kwone ducu." 
1Kings4:22 Cam ma gimiyo bot Solomon pi nino acel acel onoŋo romo moko kwon mapwotte guniya miya acel, moko kwon mukene guniya miya aryo," 
1Kings4:23 twoni mucwe apar, dyaŋi pyeraryo ma gikwayogi i-olet, romi miya acel, ma pe iribo iye til ki bure ki abur, ki gweni mucwe." 
1Kings4:24 En onoŋo bwoyo lobo ducu cakke ki i kulu Euprate dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, en aye cakke ki i Tipica nio wa i Gaja, kun loyo ki luker ducu cakke ki i kulu Euprate dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ; obedo ki kuc i kabedo ducu murumo lobone." 
1Kings4:25 Juda ki Icrael bene gubedo mot ki kuc cakke ki i Dan nio kwede wa i Beer-ceba, kun dano acel acel bedo gire i te olokke ki i te odurone i kare pa Solomon ducu." 
1Kings4:26 Solomon obedo ki kabedo me gwoko aguragurane ma giromo gwoko iye aguragura alip pyeraŋwen pi ywayo gadigadine me lweny, ki lulweny alip apar wiye aryo ma giriŋo ki aguragura." 
1Kings4:27 Lulo dul lobo mapatpat gubedo ka miyo cam bot kabaka Solomon ki pi jo ducu ma gicito ka cam bote, kun dano acel acel miyo i dwene; pe gimiyo gin mo rem." 
1Kings4:28 Ki bel cayiri bene ki Teŋ kal pi cam pa aguragura ki pi aguragura madwirre gitero ducu i kabedo ma gimitogi iye, kun ŋat acel acel kelo kit ma giciko." 
1Kings4:29 Lubaŋa omiyo Solomon obedo ki ryeko ki niaŋ matut mada; tamme lac ma rom ki kweyo ma oyarre i dog namo 
1Kings4:30 Kit meno ryeko pa Solomon okato ryeko pa jo ducu ma yo’ tuŋ wokceŋ, wa ki ryeko pa jo Ejipt ducu." 
1Kings4:31 En onoŋo ryek makato jo mu kene ducu, en laryeko makato Etan ma jo Jera, ki Eman, ki Kalkol ki Darda ma gin awobe pa Makol; ci nyiŋ Solomon oywek oromo i rok ducu ma orumogi." 
1Kings4:32 En bene obolo carolok ma romo alip adek; ki wer ma en ocako oromo alip acel ki abic. 
1Kings4:33 Oloko i komi yadi ocako ki i kom yat cedar ma tye i Lebanon nio kwede wa i kom anyero ma twi doŋo i kom cel got; oloko i kom lee tim bene, ki i kom winyo-gu, ki i kom gin ma lakalaka piny-gu, ki i kom rec-gu:" 
1Kings4:34 Ci dano ma i rok ducu gubino ka winyo ryeko pa Solomon, dok gua ki bot luker ducu ma i wi lobo, ma guwinyo pi ryekone." 
1Kings5:1 Kiram kabaka me Turo ocwalo luticce bot Solomon ka owinyo ni giwire ki moo me bedo kabaka me leyo ka tyen wonne, pien Kiram obedo ka maro Daudi nia wa con." 
1Kings5:2 Ci Solomon ocwalo lok bot Kiram ni," 
1Kings5:3 “Iŋeyo ni wora Daudi pe yam ogero ot pi nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋane, pien lweny ki mony pa lumerok ma gurume omiyo gerone oloye, nio ka Rwot omiyo en oloyogi ducu," 
1Kings5:4 Ento i kare-ni Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ omiya yweyo i kabedo ducu; i kare-ni lamonewa mo doŋ pe, kadi wa peko mo." 
1Kings5:5 Pienno omiya atamo pi gero ot pi nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋana, kit ma yam Rwot owaco bot wora Daudi ni, ‘Wodi ma abiketo i komkerri aye bigero ot pi nyiŋa.’" 
1Kings5:6 Iyo, doŋ icik pi toŋŋa lwak yadi cedar me Lebanon. Luticca bene gibiribbe ki luticci, an abiculli lim me mucara pa luticci kit ma iyubo; pien iŋeyo ni pe tye dano mo ma i kinwa ma ŋeyo tono yadi macalo jo Cidon.”" 
1Kings5:7 Ka Kiram owinyo lok pa Solomon lokke okweyo cwinye matek twatwal, ci owacci, “Gipwo Rwot Lubaŋa i kare man, ma doŋ omiyo bot Daudi wode ma laryeko me bedo Lalo rok man madit twatwal-li.”" 
1Kings5:8 Kiram ocwalo lok bol Solomon kun wacci, “Atyeko winyo kwena ma icwalo bota; an atye ma aterre atera pi tiyo gin ducu ma imito 325 i kom lok ma dok kom bao yat cedar ki bao yat ciprec." 
1Kings5:9 Luticca aye gibikelone i dog nam nia ki i Lebanon; ka doŋ wabitweyo bao kacel ci gibikwan i wi pii macalo bwoda nio kwede i kabedo ma ibinyutta, ka doŋ wabigonyo kingi wo ko ka in doŋ ibigamogi ki kunnu; ci ibimiya cam pi jo ma i oda kit ma abimito kwede.”" 
1Kings5:10 Kiram ocwalo lwak bao cedar ki ciprec bot Solomon kit ma en mito-ni," 
1Kings5:11 ci Solomon ocako miyo bot Kiram naŋo ma nyige ma romo guniya alippyerabicel me acama pa jone ma i ode, ki moo nyig jeituni ma giodo ma romo debe ahp pyeraŋwen. Solomon obedo ka miyo jami magi ducu bot Kiram mwaka ki mwaka," 
1Kings5:12 Rwot obedo ka miyo ryeko bot Solomon kit ma yam ocikke kwede; ci kuc obedo i kin Kiram ki Solomon; gin aryo guketo gicikke i kingi. 
1Kings5:13 Kabaka Solomon ocako muroni pi tiyo tic matek i lobo Icrael ducu; girono dano alip pyeradek pi tic muroni. 
1Kings5:14 Ocwalogi i Lebanon, kun cwalogi ki alip apar apar dwe ki dwe pi leyo dog tic pa luwotgi. Gibedo i Lebanon dwe acel, dok gibedo paco tugi dwe aryo; Adoniram en aye ladit ma loyo lutic muroni ducu." 
1Kings5:15 Solomon onoŋo tye ki lutin yec alip pyerabiro, ki jo ma gipayo godi ma i lobo godi ma giromo alip pyeraboro," 
1Kings5:16 ka dok imed iye ludito ma giloyo dog tic alip adek ki miya adek ma Solomon oketo, ma gin lulo lwak ma gitiyo tic." 
1Kings5:17 Gimuko godi madoŋo me wei, kit ma kabaka ociko, me keto guti me te ot ki godi ma gipayo mabeco." 
1Kings5:18 Kit meno lugedo pa Solomon ki pa Kiram, kacel ki jo Gebal, gubedo ka payo godi ki yu bo bao ki godi me gero ot." 
1Kings6:1 Lacen ka mwaka okato miya aŋwen ki pyeraboro cakke ki i kare ma jo Icrael gua iye ki i lobo Ejipt, i mwaka me aŋwenne me ker pa Solomon me loyo jo Icrael, i dwe Jib, ma en aye dwe me aryone, en aye Solomon ocako gero iye ot pa Rwot." 
1Kings6:2 Ot ma kabaka Solomon ogero pi Rwot onoŋo borre romo futi pyerabo ŋwen, ki lacce futi pyeradek ki borre tuŋ malo romo futi pyeraŋwen wiye abic." 
1Kings6:3 Kicika ot ma i doggola me donyo, ma i nyim kicika me dye ot, borre romo futi pyeradek, ma rom ki lac me ot kikome, ki lac me kicika ma i nyim ot romo futi apar wiye abic." 
1Kings6:4 Oketo lwak dirica ot ki frem ma giketo odonyo i iye. 
1Kings6:5 Ogero gedo mukene ki woko ma orumo kicika ot ducu, en aye orumo dye ot, ki kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo; ci oketo iye kicika odi matino ma orumo ot ducu." 
1Kings6:6 Kicika odi matino ma piny lacgi romo futi abiro ki nucu, kicika odi ma i dyere lacgi romo futi aboŋwen, ki me adekke lacgi romo futi apar ki nucu; pien noŋo ojwiko kicika ot ki woko kun bwoto ka ma rii me kicika odi matino buto iye, wek rii pe odony i kicika kor ot kikome." 
1Kings6:7 I kare ma gigero ot, gibedo ka gero ki godi ma giyubo woko cut ki i bur gweŋ ka ma gipayogi iye; mumi yo i kare ma gitye ka gero ot pa Lubaŋa-ni, nyol ki laton ki jami tic ducu me nyonyo pe giwinnye i ye wacel." 
1Kings6:8 Doggola me donyo i kicika odi matino ma tye piny onoŋo tye yo acuc ka idonyo i ot, ci gidonyo i grofa ma i dyere kun giito ki rwom, ka dok gia ki i grofa ma i dyere giito i me adekke." 
1Kings6:9 Kit meno Solomon ogero or ci otyeko. Ogoyo dan ot ki rii yat cedar ma gipeto ki bao cedar bene. 
1Kings6:10 Ogero gedo mukene ki woko ma orumo ot ducu. Grofane acel acel borre ki malo romo futi abiro ki nucu; gikubo i kom ot kikome ki rii bao cedar. 
1Kings6:11 I kare-nu lok pa Rwot obino bot Solomon ma waco ni," 
1Kings6:12 “Pi ot ma it ye ka gerone, ka ce ibilubo cikka, kun ilubo kit ma aciko ducu, kun itiyo kwede, ci abimiyo lokka moko i kin an ki in, kit ma yam aloko kwede bot woru Daudi." 
1Kings6:13 Dok abibedo i kin jo Icrael, pe abibwoto jona jo Icrael.”" 
1Kings6:14 Solomon ogero ot kit meno ci otyeko. 
1Kings6:15 Ki i i ot oguro kor kicika ot ki bao yat cedar, cakke ki i dye ot piny nio kwede wa i kwori dan ot; opeto kicika ot me i ot ki bao kumeno, dok opeto dye ot piny ki bao ciprec." 
1Kings6:16 Dok ogero kicika ot ma i tyelo ki bao yat cedar, cakke kii dye ot piny nio kwede wa i kwori dan ot, kun bor me ot romo futi pyeradek. Ogero man ki i i ot wek obed kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo, en aye kabedo maleŋ makato ducu." 
1Kings6:17 Ci kicika maditte, ma en aye dye ot ma i nyim kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo-ni, borre romo futi pyerabicel." 
1Kings6:18 Bao cedar ma i i ot gigoro iye cal, cal keno munyak ki cal ature. I ot ducu obedo bao cedar keken, ma kom got pe nen." 
1Kings6:19 Oyubo kabedo maleŋ i i ot, i tyelo ot kikome, me keto canduk me gicikke pa Rwot." 
1Kings6:20 Kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo-ni borre romo futi pyeradek, ki lacce futi pyeradek, ki borre tuŋ malo bene romo futi pyeradek; omwono kome woko ducu ki jabu ma giliyo maber. Otiyo bene keno tyer me bao cedar." 
1Kings6:21 Solomon omwono i ot woko ki jabu ma giliyo maber, dok oketo nyor jabu ma oŋolo dye ot arii i nyim kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo, ka omwono kome woko ki jabu." 
1Kings6:22 Omwono kom ot woko ducu ki jabu, nio ka kom ot ducu otum maber. Ki keno tyer ma i kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo bene en omwono kome woko ducu ki jabu." 
1Kings6:23 Ka dok opayo cal lukerubi aryo ki yat jeituni, oketogi i kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo; lakerubi acel acel borre romo futi apar wiye abic." 
1Kings6:24 Ki bwom lakerubi muyarre, bwome acel romo futi abiro ki nucu, ki bwome mukene bene romo futi abiro ki nucu; cakke i kom lano wi bwome tuŋcel nio wa i lano wi bwome tuŋ mukene lacgi romo futi apar wiye abic." 
1Kings6:25 Lukerubi aryo ducu bocogi rorom, ki komgi bene rom." 
1Kings6:26 Bor kom lakerubi acel acel romo futi apar wiye abic. 
1Kings6:27 Oketo Lukerubi aryo ducu i kicika ma i tyelo ot-ti, kun bwom lukerubi aryo ducu guyaro woko wek bwom ŋat acel ogud kom kicika ot tuŋcel, ki bwom lakerubi me aryone bene ogud kom kicika ot tuŋ mukene-ni; ki bwomgi mukene lano wigi rwatte ki i dye ot." 
1Kings6:28 Ci omwono kom lukerubi woko ki jabu. 
1Kings6:29 Ogoro cal i kor kicika ot orumo woko ducu, cal lukerubi, ki cal yadi otit, ki cal ature; ogoro cal i kor kicika ot ma i tyelo ki kicika maditte bene." 
1Kings6:30 Dok omwono dye ot ki jabu, i kicika ma i tyelo ki i kicika maditte bene." 
1Kings6:31 Doggola me donyo i kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo otiyo kikane aryo ki bao yat jeituni; rii me doggola ki okar doggola ryoryo gubedo latwoke abic. 
1Kings6:32 Oumo kom kika aryo me bao jeituni-ni ki cal lukerubi ma gigoro, ki cal yadi otit, ki cal ature. Omwono komgi woko ki jabu, ka olilo jabu i kom cal lukerubi ki i kom cal yadi otit ducu." 
1Kings6:33 Otiyo bene okar doggola me bao yat jeituni pi doggola me donyo i kicika maditte; otiyo latwoke aŋwen. 
1Kings6:34 Ka dok otiyo kika aryo ki bao yat ciprec; bao kika aryo-nu ducu gibanne abana. 
1Kings6:35 Ogoro cal lukerubi i komgi, ki cal yadi otit, ki cal ature. Omwono kom kika woko ki jabu ma oreyo, ka olilo mapwot i kom cal ma gigoro i komgi." 
1Kings6:36 Ogero dyekal ma i dyere ki godi apa ya latyeŋ adek, ki bao yat cedar tyeŋ acel." 
1Kings6:37 Onoŋo giketo guti me te ot pa Rwot i mwaka me aŋwen, i dwe Jib," 
1Kings6:38 ka dok i mwaka apar wiye acelle, i dwe Bul, ma en aye dwe me aboro-ni, en aye gityeko iye tic i kom ot ducu, kun onoŋo gityeko tic ducu iye kit ma onoŋo yam giporo kwede, Gerone otero mwaka abiro." 
1Kings7:1 Solomon dok ogero ode kikome pi mwaka apar wiye adek, ka otyeko ode ducu kakare." 
1Kings7:2 Ogero ot ma gicako nyiŋe Buŋa me Lebanon. Borre romo futi miya acel ki pyerabic, lacce romo futi pyerabiro wiye abic, ki borre tuŋ malo romo futi pyeraŋwen wiye abic; gigero ot-te ocuŋ i wi lwak wir yat cedar muryeyo latyeŋ adek, ki rii bao cedar ma giriyo i wigi." 
1Kings7:3 Dok giguro bao cedar me umo wi rii ma giriyo i wi wir pyeraŋwen wiye abic, ma guryeyo apar wiye abic i tyeŋ acel acel." 
1Kings7:4 Dok giketo frem me wan dirica ma guryeyo latyeŋ adek, kun dirica gikemme ki luwotgi ma guryeyo latyeŋ adek-ki." 
1Kings7:5 Doggola ducu ki dirica ducu gitiyogi latwoke aŋwen, kun dirica kemo dirica wadgi i tyeŋ adek." 
1Kings7:6 Dok otiyo ot mukene ma oketo iye wir mapol. Borre romo futi pyerabiro wiye abic, ki lacce romo futi pyeraŋwen wiye abic; dok tye ki latin of ma i doggola me donyo, ma oryeyo iye wir bene, ki bolo ma tye i nyime." 
1Kings7:7 Ka dok ogero ot mukene pi komker ka ma en biŋolo iye kop, en kicika me ŋolo kop kikome. Giguro bao cedar giumo kwede kom kicika ot, i i ot, cakke ki i dye ot piny nio kwede wa i kwori dan ot." 
1Kings7:8 Dok ode kikome ma en bedo iye, ma tye i dyekal mukene ma i ne ot ŋolo kop, gigero lakite acel-lu. Solomon dok ogero ot macalo odi mukene-nu pi nya pa Parao ma en onyomo-ni." 
1Kings7:9 Odi magi ducu gigerogi ki godi me wel ma gipayogi muporo kit por ma gimito, kun gibaro ki mucumeno, kun gipayo ŋegi ki igi gubed mapwot, cakke ki i kom guti te ot nio kwede wa i kom godi ma giriyo i wiye, doko cakke ki i dyekal me ot pa Rwot nio kwede wa i dyekal madit." 
1Kings7:10 Guti te ot obedo godi mabeco me wel, godi madoŋo mada ma ditogi romo futi apar wiye aryo ki apar wiye abic." 
1Kings7:11 I wi guti te ot bene giketo iye godi me wel ma gipayogi muporo kit por ma gimito, kacel ki bao cedar." 
1Kings7:12 Cel me dyekal madit bene giryeyo iye godi apaya latyeŋ adek ma gurumo dyekal woko, ki bao yat cedar tyeŋ acel. Cel me dyekal ma i iye ma tye i nyim ot pa Rwot bene onoŋo tye kit meno, ki kicika ot ma i doggola me donyo i ot pa Rwot bene." 
1Kings7:13 Kabaka Solomon ocwalo kwena ci gikelo Kiram ki i Turo. 
1Kings7:14 En onoŋo wod pa daa-to mo ma i kaka pa Naputali, wonne aye dano me Turo ma ladiro tic me teto jami mola. Kiram dano ma laryeko mada, ma ladiro tic bene, ma opit pi tiyo gin ducu ma dok i kom tic ki mola. Obino bot: kabaka Solomon, ci otiyo ticce ducu." 
1Kings7:15 Oliyo wir mola aryo. Wir acel acel borre romo futi pyeraryo wiye abiro. Gipimo kore ki tol ci ditte oromo futi apar wiye aboro, kun iye twolo, kome ducu kinoŋ ma romo nyig cin aŋwen," 
1Kings7:16 En dok otiyo lalukana wigi ki mola ma giliyo me aketa i wi wir aryo ducu. Lalukana acel acel borre romo futi abiro ki nucu. 
1Kings7:17 Dok otiyo obwo aryo ma gikedogi ki nyor pi lalukana aryo ducu ma gitye i wi wir; otiyo obwo acel pi lalukana acel, ki acel pi lalukana mukene bene.’" 
1Kings7:18 Otiyo cal okwer pomegranat bene kit meno, Ka otiyo, ci odwalogi i kom nyor latyeŋ aryo i kom obwo me laum kom lalukana ma gicibo i wi wir; otimo lalukana mukene bene kit meno." 
1Kings7:19 Lalukana ma gitye i wi wir ma i kicika ot ma i doggola-ni bocogi romo futi abicel, ma gitiyo calo ature lena." 
1Kings7:20 Giketo lalukana aryo ducu i wi wir aryo, i wi doge ma gilulo ma ka ŋet obwo ma giumo kwede-ni; onoŋo tye iye cal okwer pomegranat miya aryo, ma gidwalo latyeŋ aryo; ki lalukana mukene bene tye ki mere ma rom meno." 
1Kings7:21 Ocibo wir i nyim kicika ot ma i doggola me donyo i ot pa Lubaŋa. Oketo wir acel yo tuŋ acuc, ci ocako nyiŋe Jakin, ka dok oketo wir mukene yo tuŋ acam, ci ocako nyiŋe Boaj." 
1Kings7:22 Giketo cal ature lena i wi wir aryo ducu. Tic i kom wir otum kumeno. 
1Kings7:23 Kiram dok otiyo nam ki mola ma giliyo. Otwodde aduno ma lacce romo futi apar wiye abic cakke i doge tuŋcel nio i doge tuŋ mukene; borre tuŋ malo romo futi abiro ki nucu. Gipimo doge ki tol ci oromo futi pyeraŋwen wiye abic. 
1Kings7:24 Ki i te doge ki piny tye iye cal keno munyak ma orumo kom nam ducu, ma romo futi pyeraŋwen wiye abic; cal keno giryeyo latyeŋ aryo. I kare ma giliyo nam, giliyo ki cal keno i kome lawaŋacel." 
1Kings7:25 Gicibo nam ocuŋ i wi cal twoni dyaŋi apar wiye aryo. Giketo twoni adek gineno yo tuŋ acam, ki adek gineno yo tuŋ potoceŋ, adek gineno yo tuŋ acuc, ki adek gineno yo tuŋ wokceŋ. Gicibo nam ocuŋ i kom cal twoni-nu kun ŋegi ducu odok tuŋ iye." 
1Kings7:26 Kome kinoŋ ma romo incic adek; doge gitiyo macalo dog kikopo, ma rom ki ature lena; dok piine romo debe alip aŋwen." 
1Kings7:27 Dok otiyo litino gadigadi apar me mola, Acel acel borre futi abicel, lacce bene futi abicel, ki borre tuŋ malo futi aŋwen ki nucu." 
1Kings7:28 Man aye kit ma gitiyo kwede gadigadi matino-ni: gipeto mola ma apada i bute ducu, ma okubbe ki rii mola." 
1Kings7:29 I kom mola ma apada ma okubbe ki rii mola-ni gigoro iye cal labwor, ki cal twoni dyaŋi, ki cal lukerubi, Rii mola bene gidero doggi ki cal nyor mudwalle ka wi labwor ki dyaŋi, ki ka tyengi bene." 
1Kings7:30 Latin gadigadi acel acel obedo ki lawala mola aŋwen ki bolti me mola. Ka dok i twoke aŋwen ducu tye iye laten otako. Laten-ni giliyo aliya kun gidwalo cal nyor i butgi. 
1Kings7:31 Doge onamme ki i i gin muluŋŋe ma ocuŋ malo, kun borre romo futi acel ki nucu. Doge-ni otwodde atwoda macalo gitiyo tedi te gin mo-ni, tutte romo futi aryo ki incic mogo. Doge-ni gidero kun gigoro iye cal, dok mola apada ma gipeto i kom litino gadigadi-ni obedo latwoke aŋwen, pe otwodde atwoda." 
1Kings7:32 Lawala aŋwen tye i te mola apada-ni; bolti pa lawala gukubbe ki gadigadi; bor pa lawala romo futi aryo ki incic mogo. 
1Kings7:33 Gitiyo lawalane macalo lawala me gadigadi lweny; boltigi, ki doggi, ki cilligi, ki abbugi giliyogi aliya." 
1Kings7:34 Giketo latyelle aŋwen i twoke aŋwen ma i kom gadigadi acel acel; latyelle ducu okubbe kacel ki gadigadi. 
1Kings7:35 Ki i wi gadigadi giketo iye gin muluŋŋe ma borre tuŋ malo romo incic aboŋwen; dok tuŋ wi gadigadi latyelle ki mola ma apadane gukubbe kacel kwede. 
1Kings7:36 I kom latyelle ki i kom mola ma apada gigoro iye cal lukerubi, ki cal labwor-gu, ki cal yadi otit, ka ma romo gorone, ki cal nyor mudwalle i ŋetgi." 
1Kings7:37 Kiram otiyo kit gadigadi macalo meno apar; gin ducu giliyogi marom, kun ditogi rom, calgi bene rom." 
1Kings7:38 Ka dok otiyo otako mola apar, kun otako acel acel gitwero onyo iye pii ma romo debe pyeraboro. Otako mola acel acel lacce romo futi abicel. Otiyo otako mola acel acel me aluta i gadigadi mola apar ducu." 
1Kings7:39 Oryeyo gadigadi abic i ŋet ot pa Lubaŋa yo tuŋ acuc, ki abic yo tuŋ acam ka oketo nam i twok ot ka ma bute yo tuŋ acuc ki bute yo tuŋ wokceŋ gurwatte iye." 
1Kings7:40 Kiram dok otiyo lwak agulu ki akwaya Latokke ki becen-gu. Kit meno otyeko tic ducu ma i kom ot pa Rwot pi kabaka Solomon. 
1Kings7:41 Otiyo wir aryo, ki lalukana aryo ma oluŋŋe macalo agulu ma giketo i wi wir, ki obwo aryo me umo kom lalukana aryo ma oluŋŋe ma obedo i wi wir-ri." 
1Kings7:42 Dok otiyo cal okwer pomegranat miya aŋwen pi obwo aryo-nu, kun cal okwer pomegranat giryeyo latyeŋ aryo i kom obwo acel acel me umo kom lalukana aryo ma oluŋŋe ma obedo i wi wir," 
1Kings7:43 Dok otiyo litino gadigadi apar ki otako mola apar ma giluto i gadigadi; 
1Kings7:44 ki nam acel, ki cal twoni dyaŋi apar wiye aryo ma giketo nam ocuŋ i komgi." 
1Kings7:45 Lwak agulu ducu, ki akwaya latokke-gu, ki becen-gu, jami magi ducu ma i ot pa Rwot, ma Kiram otiyogi pi kabaka Solomon, obedo me mola ma gijwane maleŋ." 
1Kings7:46 Kabaka omiyo giliyo mola meno i pwor kulu Jordan, ka ma lobo agulu tye iye, i kin Cukot ki Jaretan," 
1Kings7:47 Solomon oweko jami-ni ducu ma pe gipimo pekgi, pien onoŋo jami dwoŋ twatwal, omiyo pek me mola ma gitiyo kwede pe giŋeyo." 
1Kings7:48 Kit meno bene Solomon omiyo gitiyo jami ducu ma mitte i ot pa Rwot, gin ene: keno tyer me jabu, meja me jabu pi mugati me aketa i nyim Rwot." 
1Kings7:49 Okar-mac me jabu ma giliyo maber ma guryeyogi i nyim kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo, abic yo tuŋ acuc ki abic yo tuŋ acam; ki lwak cal ature ki laput-gu, ki boyi lakar mac, ducu me jabu;" 
1Kings7:50 ki kikopo-gu, magac-gu, becengu, atabo me odok aceta ki weer me waŋo mac, ducu me jabu ma giliyo maber; ki pata jabu ma giketo i kom kika me donyo i kicika ma i tyelo, en aye kabedo maleŋ makato ducu, ki i kom kika me kicika maditte ma i ot pa Lubaŋa." 
1Kings7:51 Tic ducu ma kabaka Solomon otiyo i kom ot pa Rwot otum kit meno, Solomon dok okelo iye jami ducu ma yam wonne Daudi odyerogi bot Rwot; okelo ryal ki jabu ki jami mukene-gu ducu, okanogi i ot kano lim ma i ot pa Rwot." 
1Kings8:1 Solomon ocoko ludoŋo pa jo Icrael ki ludito wi kaka ducu, ma gin aye rwodi kaka ma i doggola pa kwarogi ma i kin jo Icrael, ci gubino i nyim kabaka Solomon i Jerucalem pi kwanyo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot ki i gaŋ kal pa Daudi ma gilwoŋo ni Cion." 
1Kings8:2 Lwak jo Icrael ducu gucokke bot kabaka Solomon i kare me kwero nino madito me dwe Etanim, ma en aye dwe me abiro." 
1Kings8:3 Ci ludoŋo ducu pa jo Icrael gubino, ka ajwagi pa Lubaŋa gucako tino canduk." 
1Kings8:4 Gutero canduk pa Rwot, ki kema me rwatte, kacel ki jami maleŋ ducu ma yam tye i kema; ajwagi ki Lulevi guterogi." 
1Kings8:5 Kabaka Solomon ki lwak jo Icrael ducu ma gucokke bote-ni gin ducu gitye kacel kwede i nyim canduk, kun gitumo lwak romi ki twoni-gu mapol ma welgi pe kwanne dok pe nene bene." 
1Kings8:6 Kit meno ajwagi gukelo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot wa i kabedone, i kabedo maleŋ me ot pa Lubaŋa, ma en aye kabedo maten makato ducu-m, CI guketo piny i te bwom Lukerubi." 
1Kings8:7 Pien Lukerubi guyaro bwomgi ka wi kabedo me canduk wek Lukerubi guum wi canduk woko, kacel ki tal latiŋŋe ducu," 
1Kings8:8 Tal latiŋŋe onoŋo giboco, omiyo wigi nen ki i kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo-ni, ento onoŋo pe gitwero nenogi ki woko; dok pud gitye kunnu wa onyoo." 
1Kings8:9 Gin mo onoŋo pe i canduk, kono kidi aryo ma apada keken ma yam Moses oketo iye i Koreb, ka ma yam Rwot oketo iye gicikke ki jo Icrael, i kare ma gia ki-i lo bo Ejipt." 
1Kings8:10 Ka ajwagi gukato woko ki i kabedo maleŋ, ci pol obino opoŋo i ot pa Rwot woko;" 
1Kings8:11 pienno omiyo ajwagi pe gitwero cuŋ ka tiyo ticgi, pi pol meno pien deyo pa Rwot noŋo opoŋo i ot pa Rwot woko." 
1Kings8:12 Ci Solomon owacci, “Rwot yam oketo cen i polo, ento en owacci ebedo i pol macol licuc." 
1Kings8:13 Agerri doŋ ot ma ocudo malo, wek obed kabedoni ma ibedo iye matwal.”" 
1Kings8:14 Ka dok kabaka olokke, ci olamo gum i kom lwak jo Icrael ma gucokke ducu, kun jo Icrael ma gucokke-ni gucuŋ mot." 
1Kings8:15 Kabaka owacci, “Gipwo Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ma doŋ ciŋe otyeko cobo gin ma yam oloko ki doge bot wora Daudi-ni, kun owacci," 
1Kings8:16 ‘Nia wa i kare ma akwanyo jona jo Icrael ki i Ejipt, peya ayero gaŋ mo ma i kaka ma i Icrael ducu pi gero iye ot mo, wek nyiŋa obed iye; ento ayero mera Daudi wek olo lwakka jo Icrael.’" 
1Kings8:17 I kare-nu onoŋo wora Daudi obedo ki tam i cwinye me gero ot pi nyiŋ Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
1Kings8:18 Ento Rwot aye owaco bot wora Daudi ni, ‘Kit macalo onoŋo doŋ tam tye i cwinyi me gero ot pi nyiŋa, itimo ber pi keto lok meno i cwinyi," 
1Kings8:19 Ento pe in aye dok ibigerra ot; wodi ma ibinywalo aye bigero ot pi nyina.’ 
1Kings8:20 Ci Rwot doŋ otyeko cobo gin ma en ociko; pien an doŋ atyeko leyo ka tyen wora Daudi, an doŋ abedo i wi komker pa Icrael, kit ma yam Rwot ociko-ni, dok atyeko gero ot pi nyiŋ Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
1Kings8:21 Doŋ atyeko keto iye kabedo pa canduk pa Rwot ma tye iye gicikke ma Rwot con oketo ki kwariwa, i kare ma kwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt.”" 
1Kings8:22 Solomon dok ocuŋ i nyim keno tyer pa Rwot ki i nyim lwak jo Icrael ma gucokke ducu, otaŋo ciŋe malo okemo polo." 
1Kings8:23 Ci owacci, “Ai Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, pe tye Lubaŋa mo macalo in, kadi malo i polo nyo piny i wi lobo, ma tye ka gwoko gicikkene macalo in, ma inyuto mar meri ma pe lokke bot luticci ma gibedo ka lubi ki cwinygi ducu." 
1Kings8:24 Ibedo ka lubo gin ma yam itito bot wora Daudi; iyo gin ma yam iloko ki dogi, icako doŋ tiyo i kare man ki ciŋi, ci icobo ducu maber." 
1Kings8:25 Ai Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, doŋ ilub gin ma yam iciko bot laticci Daudi ma wora, kun iwacci, ‘Pe ibibedo laboŋo danoni mo ma bibedo i wi komker me Icrael, tekke awobeni gugwoko kitgi maber, kun gibedo ki kit kwo i nyima kit ma in ibedo kwede i nyima-ni.’" 
1Kings8:26 Ai Lubaŋa pa Icrael, kombeddi mi lokki doŋ omok matek, kit ma yam iloko bot wora Daudi ma laticci." 
1Kings8:27 “Ento Lubaŋa bibedo i wi lobo-ni ada? Nen, kadi polo bene kulu ma malone twatwal-li pe romo in me bedo iye, ci ot ma agero-ni tidine rom mene kono!" 
1Kings8:28 Kadi bed kit meno, an alegi iwiny legana, an Laticci, ki kit ma abako kwede doga, ai Rwot Lubaŋana; winy koko ki lega ma atye ka lego i nyimi tin." 
1Kings8:29 Waŋi aye iwek obed twolo dyewor ki dyeceŋ benebene me neno yo tuŋ bot ot man, en aye kabedo ma yam iwaco pire ni, ‘Nyiŋa bibedo kunnu,’ wek ibed ka winyo legana ma akelo boti kun alokke akemo kabedo man," 
1Kings8:30 Dok iwiny legana ki lega pa joni jo Icrael i kare ma wabako dogwa, ma walego wakemo kabedo man atir; iyo in doŋ ibed ka winyo bako doga ki i polo ka ma ibedo iye-ni; ci ka doŋ ityeko winyone, doŋ iwek balwa." 
1Kings8:31 “Ka ce dano mo otimo bal i kom wadi mo, ci gimiye okwoŋo kwoŋo pire, ka obino ce okwoŋo kwoŋo ki i nyim keno tyerri ma i ot man," 
1Kings8:32 ci in Lubaŋa iwiny ki i polo, ci iti gin ma mitte. Ŋol kop pa laticci-ni, imi kop olo dano mutino alii, kun iketo gin ma en otimo i’ wiye kene, dok imi dano ma pe obalo olo kop kun itime ber ma oporo leŋcwinye." 
1Kings8:33 “Ka ce mony pa lumerok guloyo joni jo Iorael pi balgi ma gutimo i komi, ka ce guŋut, gudwogo boti, ci gucako tuco nyiŋi, ma gilego in ka gibako doggi boti i ot man," 
1Kings8:34 ci in iwinygi ki i polo, iwek bal pa joni jo Icrael, ka dok idwokgi cen wa i lobo ma yam imiyo bot kwarogi." 
1Kings8:35 “Ka ce polo ocegge woko, ma kot mo pe ocwer pi lakit balgi mo i komi, ka ce lwakki gucako lega kun gikemo in i kabedo man, kun gituco nyiŋi, ka guŋut ci gubwoto balgi woko i kare ma iketo can i komgi-ni," 
1Kings8:36 ci in Lubaŋa iwinygi ki i polo, iwek balgi, gin joni jo Icrael, dok ipwonygi ki kit yo maber ma myero gulubi; ci doŋ imi kot ocwer i loboni-ni ma yam imiyo bot lwakki obed megi." 
1Kings8:37 “Ka ce kec opoto i lobo, ka kono two gemo opoto, nyo ka bel obwarre nyo odoko ocone, nyo ka bonyo opoto nyo okwil obino, ka ce merok pa joni orumogi woko i gaŋgi mo, nyo kadi bed kit gemo aŋo, nyo kit two mo-ni," 
1Kings8:38 ka ce lwakki gucako lego nyo bako doggi boti, kadi bed dano acel kok boti, nyo joni jo Icrael ducu, kun dano acel acel ŋeyo kit atwom ma i cwinye, ka ce otano cine okemo ot man;" 
1Kings8:39 ci in Lubaŋa iwinygi ki i polo ka ma ibedo iye-ni, iwek balgi, ci iti gin ma mitte. Tim dano acel acel kit ma iŋeyo kwede cwinye, ma rwatte ki kit kwone ducu, pien in aye, in keni, iŋeyo kit cwiny pa dano ducu." 
1Kings8:40 Meno bimiyo gibedo ka lwori nino ducu ma gibedo iye i lobo ma yam imiyo bot kwarowa. 
1Kings8:41 “Obed kit meno bene ka ce larok mo, ma pe joni jo Icrael, obino kany ma oa ki i lobo mo mabor, kun obino pi yweka me nyiŋi;" 
1Kings8:42 pien gibiwinyo pi nyiŋi madit-ti, ki pi twero me badi ki kit ma iryeyo ki ciŋi pi konyo joni, Ka ce larok mo obino ce ocako lega ma okemo ot man," 
1Kings8:43 ci in Lubaŋa iwiny ki i polo ka ma ibedo iye-ni, itim kit gin ducu ma larok-ki okok kwede i nyimi, wek rok ma wi lobo ducu guŋe nyiŋi, galwori, kit ma lwakki jo Icrael gilwori-ni, dok wek guŋe maber ni, ot man ma agero-ni gilwoŋo ki nyiŋi keken." 
1Kings8:44 “Ka ce lwakki gucito ka lwenyo ki lumerokgi i kabedo mo ducu ma icwalogi iye, ka ce gukelo legagi boti in Rwot ma gukemo gaŋ man ma in iyero, ki ot man ma agero pi nyini-ni," 
1Kings8:45 ci in iwiny legagi ki bako doggi ki i polo, ikony korgi ka ineno lokgi tye atir." 
1Kings8:46 “Ka ce gutimo bal i komi, pien pe tye dano mo ma pe balo, ka ce kiniga omaki i komgi, ci imiyogi i ciŋ lamerok mo ma oyakogi ci oterogi i opii wa i lobo pa lumerokgi, ka mabor nyo ka macok, iwiny legagi," 
1Kings8:47 Ka cwinygi otamo lok ki i lobo ma giterogi iye i opii-ni, ce guŋut ci gubako doggi boti ki i lobo ma gitye iye i ciŋ luyakgi, kun gikok ni, ‘Wabalo, wanak woko ata, wati yo lwak bal-gu mapol’," 
1Kings8:48 ka ce guŋut ki tamgi ducu ki cwinygi ducu i lobo pa lumerokgi ma yam oterogi i opii-ni, kun doŋ gilego i nyimi ma gukemo lobogi ma yam imiyo bot kwarogi, ki gaŋ ma nene iyero, ki ot man ma agero pi nyiŋi;" 
1Kings8:49 ci in Lubaŋa iwiny legagi ki bako doggi ki i polo ka ma ibedo iye-ni, ci iye konyo korgi ka ineno lokgi tye atir," 
1Kings8:50 Dok iwek bal pa joni ma gubalo i komi pi tim aranyigi ducu ma gibalo kwede i nyimi, imi kica omak jo ma yam guterogi i opii-ni, kica ocak makogi i komgi." 
1Kings8:51 Pien gin aye lwakki kikome, gin joni kikome ma yam ikwanyogi ki i Ejipt, ma obedo calo buk mac me teto nyonyo ma otwak me wanogi." 
1Kings8:52 Wek waŋi onen kit bako dog pa laticci, ki bako dog pa lwakkijo Icrael, cik iti i komgi i kare ducu ma gikok boti." 
1Kings8:53 Pien yam dok ikoyogi pat ki i kin rok ma wi lobo ducu wek gubed joni kikome, kit ma yam ituco lokke ki i dog laticci Moses i kare ma yam ikwanyo kwarowa ki i Ejipt, ai Rwot Lubaŋa.”" 
1Kings8:54 Ka doŋ Solomon otyeko lego lega meno ducu kacel ki bako doge-gu i nyim Rwot, ci oa malo ki i nyim keno tyer pa Rwot ka ma onoŋo orumo iye coŋe, kun otaŋo ciŋe malo okemo polo." 
1Kings8:55 Ka doŋ ocuŋ, ci olamo gum i kom jo Icrael ma gucokke ducu kun daŋŋe ki dwane maloŋo ma waco ni." 
1Kings8:56 “Gipwo Rwot ma doŋ omiyo jone jo Icrael guywe, kit ma yam ociko ducu! I kom lok ducu mabeco ma yam ociko ki i dog laticce Moses, pe tye lok mo acel ma pe ocobo kakare." 
1Kings8:57 Rwot Lubaŋawa obed kwedwa kit ma yam obedo ki kwarowa-ni; pe obwotwa, pe otenywa ata," 
1Kings8:58 wek olok cwinywa odwok i kome. Kit meno wabilubo yone ducu, kun wagwoko lok ma en ociko, ki cikke ducu ma yam ociko ki kwarowa." 
1Kings8:59 Wek lok ma doŋ aloko ducu, ma abako ki doga i nyim Rwot-ti, obed cok i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawa dyeceŋ ki dyewor, wek en otim pira ma an laticee-ni, ki pi lwakke jo Icrael, gin ma tye atir i nino acel acel." 
1Kings8:60 Meno bimiyo rok ma wi lobo ducu ŋeyo ni, Rwot aye Lubaŋa kene; mukene peke." 
1Kings8:61 Wun wubed ki leŋic i kom Rwot Lubaŋawa, wulub cik ma en oketo, kun wugwoko lok ma en ociko ducu macalo wutiyo tin-ni.”" 
1Kings8:62 Ka dok kabaka ki jo Icrael ducu gucako tyero gitum i nyim Rwot. 
1Kings8:63 Solomon otyero gityer lakwecwiny bot Rwot ma romo twoni dyaŋi alip pyeraryo wiye aryo, ki romi alip miya acel ki pyeraryo. Kabaka kacel ki jo Icrael ducu gukwero ot pa Rwot kit meno." 
1Kings8:64 I nino meno bene kaba ka okwero kabedo ma i cwiny dyekal ma tye i nyim ot pa Rwot-ti, Otyero kunnu gitum awaŋa ki gityer me moko kwon ki moo dwolo me gityer lakwecwiny, pien keno tyer mola ma i nyim Rwot-ti onoŋo tidi twatwal, pe romo keto iye gitum awaŋa kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki dwolo me gityer lakwecwiny-gu." 
1Kings8:65 Kit meno Solomon okwero nino madito i kare meno, kacel ki jo Icrael ducu. Onoŋo lwak gucokke mapol kun gua wa i yo ma donyo i Kamat nio wa i laora kulu me Ejipt, ci gubedo i nyim Rwot Lubaŋawa pi nino abiro." 
1Kings8:66 I kom nino me aborone Solomon ocwalo lwak gudok woko tugi. Lwak gupwoyo kabaka, ci gudok i pacogi ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, ma igi okwe pi gin ducu mabeco ma Rwot otimo pi laticce Daudi ki pi lwakke jo Icrael." 
1Kings9:1 Ka Solomon otyeko gero ot pa Rwot, ki ode en kabaka, ki odi mukene ducu ma onoŋo en mitogi," 
1Kings9:2 ci Rwot dok onen bote tyen me aryone, kit ma yam onen bote i Gibeon ca." 
1Kings9:3 Rwot owacce ni, “Atyeko winyo legani, ki bako dogi ma iketo i nyima; atyeko lonyo ot man ma igero-ni obed maleŋ, aketo iye nyina wek obed iye matwal; dok waŋa ki cwinya bikemo kunnu nino ducu." 
1Kings9:4 Ki ma tuŋ boti, ka ce ibibedo ki kit kwo i nyima ma yam woru Daudi obedo kwede-ni, kun ii Ien dok cwinyi atir, ce ka itiyo gin ma aciko ducu kun igwoko cik ma aketo," 
1Kings9:5 ci an Lubaŋani abimoko komkerri me loyo jo Icrael matwal, kit ma yam aciko bot woru Daudi-ni kun awaco bote ni, ‘Pe ibibedo laboŋo danoni mo ma bibedo i wi komker me Icrael.’" 
1Kings9:6 Ento ka ce in nyo likwayi wunak wuweko lubo kora, ma wukwero mako lok ma aciko ki cik ma aketo i nyimwu, ce wukobo woko ka tiyo bot lubaŋa mogo mukene kun wuworogi," 
1Kings9:7 ci miyo abityekojo Icrael woko ki i lobo ma yam amiyo botgi-ni; dok abikwanyo waŋa woko, pe doŋ aneno ot man, ma doŋ alonyo bedo maleŋ pi nyina-ni; miyo nyiŋ jo Icrael bi doko carolok ki lok aboka i kin rok ducu." 
1Kings9:8 Ot man bi doko obur ma odurre lipim; miyo dano ducu ma gibikato ka ŋete gibiuro ki jwat kun giwacci, ‘Kit lok aŋo ma omiyo Rwot otimo lobo-ni ki ot man ki tim macalo man?’" 
1Kings9:9 Ka dok gibiwacci, ‘Pien gubwoto Rwot Lubaŋagi ma yam okwanyo kwarogi ki i lobo Ejipt, ci gukobo i te loc pa lubaŋa mogo mukene, dok gubedo ka worogi ma kun gitiyo botgi bene; en aye lok mumiyo Rwot omiyo can opoto i komgi magwa-ni.’ ”" 
1Kings9:10 Gero odi aryo-ni ma Solomon ogero, gin aye ot pa Rwot ki ot pa kabaka, otero mwaka pyeraryo kulu," 
1Kings9:11 kun Kiram kabaka me Turo obedo ka miyo bot Solomon bao yat cedar ki bao yat ciprec, ki jabu bene kit ma en mito ducu. Lacen ka doŋ otum Solomon omiyo bot Kiram gaŋi pyeraryo ma i lobo Galilaya." 
1Kings9:12 Ento i kare ma Kiram oa ki i Turo ocito ka neno gaŋi ma Solomon omiyo bote-ni, oneno gaŋine pe guyomo cwinye." 
1Kings9:13 Kiram owaco bot Solomon ni, “Omera, man kono kit gaŋi aŋo ma imiya-ni?” Kit meno omiyo lobone gilwoŋo ni Kabul nio wa onyoo." 
1Kings9:14 Kiram onoŋo yam ocwalo bot Solomon jabu ma romo talanta miya acel ki pyeraryo. 
1Kings9:15 Man aye lok i kom tic muroni ma kabaka Solomon omiyo girono pi gero ot pa Rwot, ki ode kikome, ki Millo, ki cel me Jerucalem, kacel ki gaŋi magi, Kajor, Megido ki Gejer." 
1Kings9:16 Onoŋo Parao kabaka me Ejipt yam ocito omako Gejer ka owaŋo woko ki mac, ka dok oneko Lukaanan ma gibedo’ i gaŋ meno ci omiyo bot nyare ma Solomon onyomo, wek obed mot me nyommegi;" 
1Kings9:17 ci Solomon ogero Gejer odoco, Girono bene dano pi gero Betkoron Mapiny," 
1Kings9:18 kacel ki Baalat, Tamar ma tye i tim me lobo Juda," 
1Kings9:19 ki gaŋi ducu me kano cam ma yam Solomon tye kwedgi, ki gaŋi me gadigadine me mony, gaŋi pa lulweny ma giriŋo ki aguragurane, ki kit gedo ducu ma Solomon omito gerogi i Jerucalem ki i Lebanon ki i lobo ma en loyo ducu." 
1Kings9:20 Likwayo pa jo ma pe gin jo Icrael ma yam gubwot ci gudoŋ i lobo ki i kom jo Amor, jo Kit, jo Perej, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc," 
1Kings9:21 ma jwerogi woko liweŋ yam oloyo jo Icrael, gin aye Solomon oketo tic muroni i wigi macalo gin opii, kit macalo tye-ni nio wa onyoo." 
1Kings9:22 Ento Solomon pe omiyo jo Icrael tiyo tic macalo opii: gin gubedo askarine, ki ludito ticce, ludito wi mony, lukapten, ludito ma loyo gadigadi lweny, ki lulweny ma riŋo ki aguragura." 
1Kings9:23 Ludito pa Solomon ma giloyo dog tic ducu onoŋo giromo miya abic ki pyerabic; gin aye giloyo lwak ducu ma gitiyo tic ducu. 
1Kings9:24 Nya pa Parao odak woko ki i gaŋ kai pa Daudi, okobo i ode kikome ma Solomon ogero pire; ka dok lacen Solomon ogero Millo." 
1Kings9:25 Solomon obedo ka tyero gitum awaŋa ki gityer lakwecwiny tyen adek i mwaka acel acel, kun tyerogi i wi keno tyer ma otiyo pi Rwot-ti, ka dok wano odok eceta i nyim Rwot. Solomon otyeko tic me gero ot pa Rwot kit meno." 
1Kings9:26 Kabaka omiyo gipayo lwak mel i Ejion-geber, ma tye cok ki Elot i dog Nam Makwar i lobo Edom." 
1Kings9:27 Kiram ocwalo luticce ma gin lunam ma guŋiyo ki tic i nam wek guwot ki mel meno kacel ki jo pa Solomon. 
1Kings9:28 Gucito i Opir ka omo jabu ki kunnu; gukelo ma romo talanta miya aŋwen ki pyeraryo ci gudwogo kwede gumiyo bot kabaka Solomon. 
1Kings10:1 I kare meno kabaka ma dako me Ceba owinyo pi yweka pa Solomon, ci obino bote ka temo iye ki peny matego." 
1Kings10:2 Obino i Jerucalem ki lwak jo madito ma gicom i kore, kacel ki kinaga-gu ma giyeyo aŋwece, ki jabu madwoŋ twatwal, ki litino godi me wel, Ka obino bot Solomon, ci otitte lok ducu ma onoŋo tye i cwinye." 
1Kings10:3 Solomon odok iye i pennye ducu; pe onoŋo tye lok mo wacel ma okanne ki bot kabaka, ma tucone oloye." 
1Kings10:4 Ka kabaka ma dako me Ceba oneno ryeko pa Solomon ducu, ki ot ma en ogero," 
1Kings10:5 ki cam ma i wi mejane, ki kit kabedo pa luditone, ki tic pa luticce ducu, ki boŋŋigi, ki lutin kikopo-gu, ki gitum awaŋa ma en tyero i ot pa Rwot, ci tam otum woko ki i cwinye." 
1Kings10:6 ‘Owaco bot kabaka ni, “Lok ducu ma i komi ma yam gitero bota ki i lobona, ki lok i kom ryekoni bene, onoŋo lokke tye kakare;" 
1Kings10:7 ento yam pe aye lok ma gitero bota, nio ka abino aneno ki waŋa. Nen, pe gititta kadi wa nucune kulu, pien ryekoni ki lonyoni kato lok dog ma gitero bota." 
1Kings10:8 Monni gitye ki yomcwiny kuman! Luticci ducu gitye ki yomcwiny ma rom mene, ma gibedo ka cuŋ i nyimi jwijwi ka winyo lok me ryekoni!" 
1Kings10:9 Gipwo Rwot Lubaŋani ma cwinye opwoyo in ci oketi i wi komker me Icrael! Pien Rwot omaro Icrael matwal, en aye mumiyo oketi ibedo kabaka, wek ibed ka ŋolo kop atir dok kakare.”" 
1Kings10:10 En omiyo bot Solomon jabu madwoŋ ma romo talanta miya acel ki pyeraryo, ki lwak aŋwece mapatpat madwoŋ twatwal, ki lwak litino godi me wel, Aŋwece pe dok obino madwoŋ ma rom meno ma kabaka ma dako me Ceba omiyo bot Solomon." 
1Kings10:11 Dok bene mel ma Kiram kelo ki jabu ma i Opir okelo bao me yat almug madwoŋ twatwal, ki lwak godi matino me wel," 
1Kings10:12 Kabaka otiyo ki bao yat almug pi jeijo kor ot pa Rwot ki kor ot pa kabaka. Otiyo kwede opuk bene ki nana pa luwer. Kit bao me almug macalo meno pe dok obino i lobo, pe dok onen, nio wa onyoo." 
1Kings10:13 Kabaka Solomon omiyo bot kabaka ma dako me lobo Ceba jami ducu ma cwinye omito, omiye gin ducu ma openyo, omedo ki gin ma en Solomon oyubo pi miyo bote muporo lonyone. Kit meno kaba ka me Ceba ocako wot me dok i lobone kacel ki luticce ducu." 
1Kings10:14 Lwak jabu ma obino bot Solomon i mwaka acel acel pekke onoŋo cok romo ratili alip pyerabiro," 
1Kings10:15 ma pe giribo iye ma obino ki tuŋ bot lucat-wil me paco ki me lobo ma woko, ki ma oa ki bot luker me lobo Arabia ki bot lulo dul lobo mapatpat me lo bo Icrael." 
1Kings10:16 Kabaka Solomon otiyo kwodi madoŋo miya aryo me jabu, ma gitetogi ki nyol; i kom kwot acel acel odonyo iye jabu ma pekke cok romo ratili pyeraryo." 
1Kings10:17 Dok otiyo kwodi matinone miya adek ma gitetogi ki nyol, kun kwot acel acel giteto ki jabu ma pekke cok romo ratili abicel. Kabaka oketogi i ot ma gilwoŋo ni Buŋa me Lebanon." 
1Kings10:18 En dok otiyo komker madit me lak lyec, ci omwono kome woko ki jabu ma giliyo maber," 
1Kings10:19 Komker meno onoŋo tye ki rwomme abicel, ki i ŋe komker giketo iye cal wi wod twon. Ka ŋete tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi giketo iye ka teno cin dano, ki cal labwor aryo gucuŋ ka ŋet bad kom me teno ciŋ tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi." 
1Kings10:20 Onoŋo tye bene cal labwor apar wiye aryo ma gucuŋ i agikki rwom abicel-li, tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi tye komker mo ma yam gitiyo ma cal ki meno i te ker ducu." 
1Kings10:21 Jami ducu ma yam kabaka Solomon mato kwede onoŋo me jabu keken, wa jami ducu ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot Buŋa me Lebanon obedo me jabu ma giliyo maber. Pe tye iye jami me ryal mo acel, pien i kare pa Solomon pe tye ŋatti mo ma otamo pi ryal ni obedo gin mo." 
1Kings10:22 Onoŋo co tye ki lwak mel madonone ma giwoto i nam kacel ki mel pa Kiram. Mel man madoŋo-ni ma gilwoŋo ni mel me Tarcic yam dwogo cen ka mwaka okato adek adek kun gikelo jabu ki ryal ki lak lyec-gu, ki ayom-gu ki gunya-gu," 
1Kings10:23 Kabaka Solomon obedo dit makato luker ma wi lobo ducu pi lonyone ki pi ryekone. 
1Kings10:24 Dano me lobo ducu gubedo ka yenyo kit yo me neno wan Solomon, ki pi winyo kit ryekone ma Lubaŋa oketo i cwinye-ni." 
1Kings10:25 Dano acel acel tero motte bote, kun gitero jami me ryal ki me jabu-gu, ki ginaruka-gu, ki odok murra, ki aŋwece, ki aguragura ki kanagu mwaka ki mwaka." 
1Kings10:26 Solomon ocoko gadigadi lweny ki lulweny ma giriŋo ki aguragura. Obedo ki gadigadi lweny alip acel ki miya aŋwen, ki wegi aguragura alip apar wiye aryo, Oketo mogo i kingi i gaŋi me gadigadi lweny, ki mukene gubedo bote i Jerucalem." 
1Kings10:27 Kabaka Solomon Omiyo ryal odoko gin malam ma rom ki gweŋ-gu i Jerucalem, dok okelo yadi cedar mapol ata ma rom ki olam ma i bar Cepela." 
1Kings10:28 En yam limo aguragura ma a ki i Ejipt ki Kuc; lucat-wil pa kabaka gamogi ki i Kuc i wel lim ma onoŋo giyubo. 
1Kings10:29 Gadigadi lweny ma gia ki i Ejipt welgi onoŋo romo cekel me ryal miya abicel, ki aguragura acel welle cekel miya acel ki pyerabic; ka dok lucat-wil pa kabaka catogi’ bot luker ducu pa jo Kit ki bot luker me Ciria." 
1Kings11:1 Kabaka Solomon obedo ka maro mon mapol: ma anyira rok mapatpat, Onyomo nya pa Parao, ki anyira Moab, ki anyira Ammon, ki me Edom ki me Cidon ki pa jo Kit-gu." 
1Kings11:2 Onyomogi ki i rok ma yam Rwot ojuko jo Icrael i komgi kun waco ni, “Pe wubinyomo anyiragi, kadi wa gin bene pe gibinyomo anyirawu, pien ada miyo giloko cwinywu dok cen ka lubo lubaŋagi.” Ento Solomon cwinye omaro anyira-nu matek," 
1Kings11:3 En obedo ki mon miya abiro ma gin ducu anyira pa luker, ki mon mukene ma aŋeca miya adek; ci monne guloko cwinye woko ada." 
1Kings11:4 Ka Solomon doŋ oti woko, ci monne guloko cwinye odok i kom lubaŋa mogo mukene, omiyo pe obedo ki leŋic i kom Rwot Lubaŋane, kit ma yam wonne Daudi obedo kwede." 
1Kings11:5 Solomon ocako lubo kit pa jok ma dako pa jo Cidon ma nyiŋe Acitoret, ki jok kipyeda pa jo Ammon ma gilwoŋo Milkom." 
1Kings11:6 Kit meno Solomon otiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot, pe doŋ tiyo gin ma Rwot mito ki cwinye ducu, kit ma yam wonne Daudi otiyo-ni." 
1Kings11:7 Solomon dok ogero wan jok me woro Kemoc ma jok kipyeda pa jo Moab, ki me woro Molek ma jok kipyeda pa jo Ammon; oketo wan jogigi i wi got ma i ŋet Jerucalem yo tuŋ wokeen." 
1Kings11:8 Obedo ka timo kit meno pi monne ducu me rok mukene ma giwaŋo odok eceta dok gityero gitum bot lubaŋagi. 
1Kings11:9 Rwot okeco i kom Solomon, pien onoŋo cwinye doŋ oweko Rwot Lubaŋane woko, ma yam onen bote tyen aryo-ni," 
1Kings11:10 ma yam bene ociko Solomon i kom lok man kun waco bote ni pe olub kor lubaŋa mukene; ento en pe omako cik ma Rwot omiye-ni. 
1Kings11:11 Omiyo Rwot owaco bot Solomon ni, “Kit macalo cwinyi tye kit man, ma ikwero mako gicikkena ki cik ma aketo ma aciki kwede, an doŋ abimayo kerri woko, amiyo bot laticci," 
1Kings11:12 Ento pi woru Daudi miyo pe abitimo i kare-ni, ento abimayo woko ki i ciŋ wodi." 
1Kings11:13 Kadi bed kumeno, pe abikwanyo kerri woko ducu, ento abimiyo kaka acel bot wodi, pi nyiŋ laticca Daudi, ki pi Jerucalem ma yam ayero.”" 
1Kings11:14 Rwot okelo merok i kom Solomon, Adad ma jo Edom ma obedo wat pa Luker me Edom." 
1Kings11:15 Onoŋo yam i kare ma Daudi obedo i Edom, Joab ma ladit me mony ocito kunnu pi yiko kom dano ma gineko, ci oneko co woko ducu ma i Edom." 
1Kings11:16 I kare ca Joab ki jo Icrael gubedo kunnu dwe abicel kulu, nio ka gutyeko co ma i Edom woko ducu." 
1Kings11:17 Ento Adad oriŋowoko kacel ki jo Edom mogo ma gin Lutic pa wonne. I kare meno onoŋo Adad pud tidi. 
1Kings11:18 Gua woko ki i Midian gucito i Paran, ci gukwanyo co mogo ki i Paran gucito kwedgi i Ejipt bot Parao kabaka me Ejipt. Parao omiyo ot bot Adad ki cam, wa ki lobo bene." 
1Kings11:19 Adad olimo gum madwoŋ ki bot Parao, Parao dok omiye onyomo ywere ma Lamiŋ dakone kikome ma daker-ri, ma nyiŋe Tapanec." 
1Kings11:20 Lamiŋ Tapanec onywalo latin laco ki Adad, nyiŋe Genubat, ci Tapanec omiyo Genubat odono i ot pa Parao kun bedo kacel ki awobe pa Parao." 
1Kings11:21 Ento ka Adad owinyo ki i Ejipt ni Daudi doŋ oto, ma giyike kacel ki kwarine, ki Joab ma ladit me mony bene otyeko to woko, ci Adad openyo Parao ni, “Wek doŋ aa woko ki boti, adok doŋ i lobowa.”" 
1Kings11:22 Parao openye ni, “Gin aŋo ma pe inoŋo kany ma, ormyo imito dak woko i lobo tuwu-ni?” Adad ogamo ni, “Koŋ iwek acit mono.”" 
1Kings11:23 Lubaŋa dok okelo merok mukene bot Solomon. Okelo Rejor ma wod pa Eliada, ma onoŋo yam oriŋo woko ki bot rwode Adadejer kabili ma Joba." 
1Kings11:23 Lubaŋa dok okelo merok mukene bot Solomon. Okelo Rejor ma wod pa Eliada, ma onoŋo yam oriŋo woko ki bot rwode Adadejer kabili ma Joba." 
1Kings11:24 En ocoko dano mapol ma gibedo bote, ci odoko ladit me buca mony pa luyak ki i ŋe nek ma Daudi onekogi kwede, Gucito i Damaciko, gubedo kunnu, ci guketo en obedo kabaka i Damaciko." 
1Kings11:25 En obedo Lamerok pa jo Icrael i kare pa Solomon ducu, obedo ka timo tim aranyi kit ma yam Adad timo-ni. Obedo ka loyo lobo Ciria, kun cwinye dagjo Icrael." 
1Kings11:26 Dano mukene ma otiŋo ciŋe i kom kabaka Solomon obedo Jeroboam wod pa Nebat, ma jo Epraim me Jereda. En yam obedo latic pa Solomon; minne nyiŋe Jerua ma nene cware oto." 
1Kings11:27 Jeroboam otiŋo ciŋe i kom kabaka pi tyen lok man. I kare ca onoŋo Solomon obedo ka gero Millo dok ocego wan cel me gaŋ kal pa wonne Daudi ka ma yam gimuko woko-ni. 
1Kings11:28 Jeroboam onoŋo tye ki kero kome ki kwiri bene. Ka Solomon oneno ni en latin awobi ma kome mit i tic, ci omiye dit me loyo tic muroni ducu pa jo me ot pa Yucepu." 
1Kings11:29 I kare mo ma Jeroboam oweko Jerucalem okato woko, ci lanebi Akija ma Lacilo orwatte kwede iyo, kun onoŋo Akija oruko boŋo manyen. Gin aryo onoŋo girye kengi i dye tim." 
1Kings11:30 Ci Akija olunyo boŋo manyen ma oruko i kome-ni, oyeco iye dul apar wiye aryo." 
1Kings11:31 Ka ocako lok ki Jeroboam, owacci, “Gam dul boŋo apar-ri iter obed meri, pien Rwot Lubaŋa me Icrael owaco kuman ni. ‘Nen, an acok mayo ker woko ki i ciŋ Solomon, ci abimiyo kaka apar i ciŋi." 
1Kings11:32 Ento en bidoŋ ki kaka acel pi nyiŋ laticca Daudi, ki pi Jerucalem ma yam ayero-ni, en aye gaŋ ma yam ayero ki i kin kaka ma i Icrael ducu." 
1Kings11:33 Pien Solomon doŋ otyeko bwota woko, ocako woro gire Acitoret ma jok ma dako ma jo Cidon giworo-ni, ki Kemoc ma jok pa jo Moab, ki Milkom majok pa jo Ammon. En pe doŋ tye ka lubo kora, pe dok tiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋa, pe dok mako cik ma aketo, pe doŋ lubo cikka kit ma yam wonne Daudi olubo-ni." 
1Kings11:34 Ento pe abikwanyo ker woko ducu ki i cine kikome; abimiyo en bedo laloc i kare me kwone ducu, pi laticca Daudi ma yam ayero, ma yam gwoko cikka ki cik ma aketo ducu." 
1Kings11:35 Ento abikwanyo ker woko ki iciŋ wode, abimiyo boti, gin kaka apar-ri ducu." 
1Kings11:36 Ci abimiyo kaka mo acel bot wode, wek laticca Daudi obed ki mac tara i nyima jwijwi i Jerucalem, i gaŋ ma yam ayero me keto iye nyiŋa." 
1Kings11:37 Abiketo in Jeroboam ibedo kabaka me Icrael, ci ibiloyo gin ma cwinyi mito ducu." 
1Kings11:38 Ka ce ibiwinyo cikka ma aciki kwede, ce ilubo yona, kun itiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋa, pi gwoko cikka ki gin ma aciko ducu kit ma yam laticca Daudi ogwoko-ni, ci abibedo kwedi; an aye abimiyo odi cuŋ matek atika, kit ma yam atimo pi Daudi-ni, dok abimiyo jo Icrael i ciŋi." 
1Kings11:39 Abiketo can i kom likwayo pa Daudi, ento canne pe bibedo matwal.’ ”" 
1Kings11:40 Solomon otemo neko Jeroboam ento Jeroboam oa woko, oriŋo i Ejipt bot Cicak kabaka me Ejipt, ci obedo gire i Ejipt nio ka Solomon oto." 
1Kings11:41 Lok kom Solomon mudoŋŋe ducu, ki gin ducu ma yam otiyo, ki ryekone, gityeko coyone ducu i buk me kwo pa Solomon." 
1Kings11:42 Kare ma Solomon oloyo kwede jo Icrael ducu kun bedo i Jerucalem oromo mwaka pyeraŋwen. 
1Kings11:43 Solomon oto ci oywe kacel ki kwarine, ka giyiko i gaŋ kal pa wonne Daudi. Rekoboam ma wode aye oleyo ka tyene." 
1Kings12:1 Rekoboam ocito i Cekem, pien onoŋo jo Icrael ducu gumol gucito i Cekem ka keto en me bedo kabaka." 
1Kings12:2 Ka Jeroboam wod pa Nebat owinyo pire, ci oa ki i Ejipt odok cen; pien onoŋo Jeroboam pud tye i Ejipt ka ma yam oriŋo iye kabaka Solomon." 
1Kings12:3 Gicwalo lukwena ka lwone, ci Jerobaom ki lwak jo Icrael ma gucokke ducu guwaco bol Rekoboam ni," 
1Kings12:4 “Woru oketo yec mapek i komwa. In doŋ ilok tic matego ma woru omiyowa, ki yec mapek ma en oketo i komwani obed mayot, ci wan wabibedo luticci.”" 
1Kings12:5 Rekoboam ogamo ni, “Koŋ wudok cen wubed kunnu nino adek, ka dok wudwog bota kany.” Ci lwak gudok cen." 
1Kings12:6 Kabaka Rekoboam ocako poro lok ki ludoŋo muteggi, ma yam gicuŋ i nyim wonne ka miye tam i kare ma en pud kwo, ci openyogi ni, “Wun wumiya kit tam aŋo wek adok iye bot lwak man?”" 
1Kings12:7 Gin guwacce ni, “Ka ce tin imito bedo latic pa lwak man kun itiyo pi konyogi, iloko botgi lok mabeco i kare ma ibidok iye i penygi, ci gin bene gibibedo luticci matwal.”" 
1Kings12:8 Ento en obwoto lam pa ludoŋo muteggi woko, ocako dok poro lok ki awobe ma yalwakke, ma gicuŋ i nyime," 
1Kings12:9 Openyogi ni, “Wun wumiya kit tam aŋo wek adok iye ki lwak man ma gupenyo ni, ‘Wek yec ma woru oketo i komwa mapek-ki obed yot.”?”" 
1Kings12:10 Ci awobe ma yalwakke guwacce ni, “Ibidok iye bot lwak ma gupenyi kit man ni, ‘Woru yam omiyo yecwa odoko pek, ento in imi obed yot botwa’; in ibidok iye ki gin kit man ni, ‘Nyig ciŋa kinoŋ makato pyer wora." 
1Kings12:11 Doŋ abitiyo kit man: wora yam oketo yec mapek i komwu, an doŋ abimedo bedo mapek; wora yam pwodowu ki del anino, an abipwodowu ki yib otoŋ.’ ”" 
1Kings12:12 Jeroboam ki lwak ducu gubino bot Rekoboam i kom nino me adekke, kit ma onoŋo kabaka ocikogi," 
1Kings12:13 Kabaka odok i peny pa lwak ki gero, pien oweko tam ma ludoŋo muteggi gumiye." 
1Kings12:14 Oloko kwedgi kit ma awobe guyubo kun wacci, “Wora yam omiyo yecwu odoko pek, ento an abimedo bedo mapek. Wora yam pwodowu ki del anino an abipwodowu ki yib otoŋ.”" 
1Kings12:15 Gin mumiyo kabaka pe owinyo lok pa lwak, pien Rwot aye omiyo okwero, wek lokke ocobbe kakare ma yam en oloko bot Jeroboam wod pa Nebat kun ocwalo Akija ma jo Cilo ocito otito bote-ni," 
1Kings12:16 Ka jo Icrael guneno ni kabaka pe owinyogi, ci lwak gudok iye bote ni, “Wan watye ki ‘wan po kwa aŋo i kom Daudi? Pe watye ki dul mo i kom latin pa Yece. Wun jo Icrael wudok i kemawu! In Daudi, doŋ inen odi keni.” Ci jo Icrael gupokke woko gudok i pacogi." 
1Kings12:17 Ento Rekoboam pud loyo jo Icrael ma gibedo i gaŋi ma i Juda," 
1Kings12:18 Kabaka Rekoboam ocwalo Adoram botgi, ladit ma loyo t ic muroni, ci jo Icrael ducu gucele ki got, guneke woko, Kabaka Rekoboam orune oito i gadigadi lwennye oriŋo kwede woko i Jerucalem." 
1Kings12:19 Kit meno-jo Icrael gujemo woko i kom luker me ot pa Daudi cakke ki i kare-nu nio kwede wa onyoo. 
1Kings12:20 Ka jo Icrael guwinyo ni Jeroboam odwogo, ci gucwalo kwena gulwoŋe, ci obino bot lwak ma gucokke, lwak gukete me bedo kabaka ma loyo jo Icrael ducu, Pe tye ŋatti mo ma dok olubo kor ot pa Daudi, kono kaka pa Juda keken." 
1Kings12:21 Ka Rekoboam odwogo cen Jerucalem, ocoko jo ma giyero ki i kaka pa Juda ducu ki i kaka pa Benjamin, twoni lweny alip miya acel ki pyeraboro, pi lweny ki jo me ot pa Icrael wek gudwok ker bot Rekoboam wod pa Solomon," 
1Kings12:22 Ento lok pa Rwot obino bot dano pa Lubaŋa ma nyiŋe Cemaya kun wacci," 
1Kings12:23 “Wac bot Rekoboam wod pa Solomon ma kabaka me Juda, ki bot jo ducu me ot pa Juda, ki jo pa Benjamin, ki bot jo mukene ducu ni," 
1Kings12:24 ‘Rwot owaco ku man ni, Wun pe wubicito ka lweny i kom lutuwu ma gin jo Icrael. Wek dano acel acel odok cen i pacone, pien lok man oa ki bota.’’’ Gin ducu guwinyo lok pa Rwot, ci gudok cen i pacogi, kit ma Rwot owaco-ni." 
1Kings12:25 Jeroboam ogero gaŋ Cekem i lobo godi me Epraim, ci obedo kunnu; ka dok oa ki kunnu ocito ogero gaŋ Penuel." 
1Kings12:26 Ka dok ocako lwodo lok ki i cwinye ni, “Kit ma tye-ni, ker bidok woko cen i ot pa Daudi." 
1Kings12:27 Pien ka ce lwak gibedo ka wirre ka tyero gitum wa i Jerucalem ka ma ot pa Rwot tye iye-ni, ci miyo cwiny lwak man bidok woko i kom rwotgi Rekoboam ma kabaka me Juda, ci miyo gibineka woko ka gidok bot Rekoboam kabaka me Juda.”" 
1Kings12:28 Kit meno kabaka ocako yubo lok ci otiyo cal litino twoni aryo me jabu, ka owaco bot lwak ni, “Wun doŋ wubedo ka wirre wa i Jerucalem twatwal, meno doŋ oromowu, Doŋ wunen lubaŋawu, wun jo Icrael, ma yam gukwanyowu woko ki i lo bo Ejipt.”" 
1Kings12:29 Jeroboam oketo cal wod twon acel i Betel, ka dok oketo acel i Dan." 
1Kings12:30 Lok man odoko bal, pien jo Icrael gucako mol gicito bot wod twon acel ma tye i Betel, ki bot mukene ma tye i Dan," 
1Kings12:31 Jeroboam dok ogero odi me woro Lubaŋa i wi godi, kun keto iye ajwagi ma okwanyogi ki i kin lwak ata, ma pe gin jo Levi." 
1Kings12:32 Dok oketo nino madit obedo i dwe me aboro, i kom nino dwe apar wiye abic, ma rom ki nino madit ma bedo i Juda-ni, ci ocako tyero gitum i kom ke no tyer. Obedo ka tiyo kit meno i Betel, kun tyero gitum bot cal litino twoni ma en otiyo-ni. Dok oketo i Betel ajwagi ma okwanyo ki i kabedo me woro Lubaŋa i wi godi ma en oyubo-ni," 
1Kings12:33 Oito i keno tyer ma en otiyo i Betel i dwe me aboro, i nino dwe apar wiye abic, i nino ma cwinye otamo-ni; oketo nino madit pi jo Icrael, dok oito bene i keno tyer ka wano odok eceta," 
1Kings13:1 Dano pa Lubaŋa mo oa ki i Juda ma Rwot ocwalo ki lokke wa i Betel, ka ma Jeroboam onoŋo ocuŋ iye ka ŋet keno tyer ka waŋo odok eceta." 
1Kings13:2 Dano meno ocako lok ki gero kun tito lok pa Lubaŋa i kom ke no tyer. Owacci, “Ai keno tyer, keno tyer, Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘Nen ba, gibinywalo latin laco i ot pa Daudi ma nyiŋe Yocia. Ajwagi me kabedo me woro Lubaŋa ma i wi godi ma gibedo ka waŋo odok eceta i komi en binekogi woko i komi macalo gitum, ki cogo pa dano bene gibiwaŋogi i komi.’ ”" 
1Kings13:3 Omiyo lanyut i nino meno kun wacci, “Man aye bibedo gin ma nyuto ni Rwot aye oloko lok man: Gibimuko keno tyer-ri woko, ki buru ma i wiye-ni gibionyo woko piny.”" 
1Kings13:4 Ka kabaka Jeroboam owinyo lok ma dano pa Lubaŋa owaco kun loko ki gero i kom 338 keno tyer ma i Betel, oryeyo cine ki i ner keno tyer kun wacci, “Wumak dano-nu woko.” Ci bade ma oryeyo pi cimo dano-nu otugi tal woko cut, ma dolone wek odwog cen oloye woko." 
1Kings13:5 Ki keno tyer bene otugi muk woko, ki buru bene otugi ukke woko piny nia ki i wi keno tyer. Kumeno lanyut me lok pa Rwot ma dano pa Lubaŋa otito-ni ocobo kakare," 
1Kings13:6 Jeroboam owaco bot dano pa Lubaŋa ni, “Leg Rwot Lubaŋani kombeddi, wek odwok cwinye, ka doŋ ileg pira, wek bada odolle odwog i koma kakare.” Dano pa Lubaŋa olego Rwot, ci bad kabaka odolle odwogo cen kakare, obedo kit ma con ca," 
1Kings13:7 Kabaka owaco bot dano pa Lubaŋa ni, “Bin doŋ wacit paco, wek iciywe kunnu, ci abimiyi mot mo me pwoc.”" 
1Kings13:8 Ento dano pa Lubaŋa ogamo dog kabaka ni, “Kadi bed imiya nucu jami ma i odi kulu, pe abiye donyo i odi wan kwedi. Dok pe abicamo kwon kadi wa mato pii-gu i kabedo man;" 
1Kings13:9 pien Rwot ocika kit meno kun wacci, ‘In pe ibicamo kwon kadi wa mato pii-gu kunnu, dok pe ibidwogo ki yo ma icito kwede kunnu.’ ”" 
1Kings13:10 Kit meno en okwanyo yo mukene; pe odok cen ki yo ma ocito kwede i Betel-li. 
1Kings13:11 Onoŋo tye lanebi mo ma oti woko ma bedo i Betel. Awobene gucito gutitte gin ducu ma dano pa Lubaŋa otiyo i Betel i nino meno; ki lok ma oloko bot kabaka bene gutito bot wongi. 
1Kings13:12 Ci wongi openyogi ni, “En kono okwanyo yo mene?” Awobene gunyutte yo ma dano pa Lubaŋa ma oa i Juda-ni odok kwede cen." 
1Kings13:13 Ci owaco bot awobene ni; “Wutwena kom me bedo i wi kana,” Gutwene kom me bedo i wi kanane, ci en obedo i wiye." 
1Kings13:14 Ocita i kor dano pa Lubaŋa-nu, onoŋe obedo i te yat kworo. Owaco bote ni, “In aye i dano pa Lubaŋa ma oa i Juda-ni?” Ogamo ni, “An do!”" 
1Kings13:15 Dok owacce ni, “Bin wacit paco kacel kweda ka camo kwon.”" 
1Kings13:16 Dano pa Lubaŋa ogamo ni, “Pe myero adok kwedi cen, nyo donyo kwedi i ot, dok pe abicamo kwon kwedi kadi wa mato pii-gu i kabedo man;" 
1Kings13:17 pien lok pa Rwot obino bota ma ocika ni. ‘In pe ibicamo kwon kadi wa mato pii-gu kunnu, dok pe ibidwogo ki yo ma icito kwede kunnu.’ ”" 
1Kings13:18 Lanebi muti ca ogamo doge ni, “An bene lanebi macalo in, dok lamalaika owacca lok pa Rwot kun wacci, ‘Cit icidwog ki lanebi ca paco, en obin kacel kwedi wa i odi wek ocam kwon ka omat pii-gu.’’’ Ento noŋo en obedo ka bwolo dano ca abwola," 
1Kings13:19 Dano ca odok cen kacel kwede, ci ocamo kwon i ode, ka omato pii-gu," 
1Kings13:20 kare ma gubedo ka cam wi meja, lok pa Rwot obino bot lanebi muti ca ma omiyo lawote odwogo cen i ode," 
1Kings13:21 Ocako lok ki gero bot dano pa Lubaŋa ma oa ki i Juda kun wacci, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘In pe iworo dog Rwot, pe imako cik ma Rwot Lubaŋani ociki kwede," 
1Kings13:22 ento iye dwogo wako cen, dok ibedo ka camo kwon bene ki mato pii-gu i kabedo ma awacct m pe myero icam iye kwon kadi wa mato pii-gu. Pi meno pe gibiyiko komi i Lyel pa kwariwu.’ ”" 
1Kings13:23 Ka doŋ gityeko cam ki mat, won ot otweyo kom me bedo i wi kanane pi lanebi ma en omiyo odwogo cen." 
1Kings13:24 Ka dano meno ocito, labwor mo orwatte kwede i yo, ci omake oneke woko. Kome obuto i yo kun kana ocun ka ŋete, ki labwor bene ocun ka ŋet kom dano-nu." 
1Kings13:25 Dano ma gukato ka ŋete guneno kom dano ma obuto i yo, ki labwor ma ocuŋ ka ŋet kom dano-ni. Gubino gutito pire i gaŋ ma lanebi muti bedo iye-ni." 
1Kings13:26 I kare ma lanebi ma omiyo dano ca odwogo cen-ni owinyo pire, ci owacci, “Meno aye dano pa Lubaŋa ma pe oworo lok pa Rwot-ti; omiyo Rwot omiye i ciŋ labwor ma okaye oneke woko-ni, kit macalo Rwot oloko kwede bote.”" 
1Kings13:27 Ci owaco bot awobene ni, “Doŋ wutwe kom i wi kana,” ci gutweyo kom i wi kana." 
1Kings13:28 Ocito onoŋo kom dano-nu gibolo iyo, kun kana ki labwor gucuŋ ka ŋet kome. Labwor bene pe omwodo kome, pe okayo kana bene," 
1Kings13:29 Lanebi muti-ni otino kom dano pa Lubaŋa-ni, oketo i wi kanane, ci okelo kome i gaŋŋe, wek gukum pire ka guyiko kome." 
1Kings13:30 Lanebi meno oyiko kom dano pa Lubaŋa i lyeŋe kikome; ci gukumo pire kun giwacci, “Can madit opoto i komi do, omera!”" 
1Kings13:31 Ka doŋ gityeko yiko kome, ci lanebi-nu ociko awo bene ni, “Ka an doŋ ato, ci wuyika i lyel ma giyiko iye kom dano pa Lubaŋa-ni, wuket cogona ka ŋet cogone." 
1Kings13:32 Pien lok ma en ogerre kwede matek-ki onoŋo lok pa Rwot ma oloko i kom keno tyer ma i Betel, ki i kom odi ducu ma i kabedo me woro Lubaŋa ma gitye i gaŋi ma i Camaria. Lokke ducu bicobbe kakare ada.”" 
1Kings13:33 I ne lok man mutimme-ni Jeroboam pe omedo ki weko kite maraco-ni. En dok omedde ki keto ajwagi me tic i kabedo me woro Lubaŋa ma i wi godi ma okwanyogi ki i kin lwak ata, Tekke onoŋo ŋat ma mito keken, ci kwere me bedo ajwaka cut, ci keto i ka woro Lubaŋa ma i wi godi-ni." 
1Kings13:34 Kit tim man aye odoko bal i kom jo me ot pa Jeroboam, mumiyo ode gikwanyo woko nio ka gityeko woko liweŋ ki i wi lobo man," 
1Kings14:1 I kare meno two omako Abija wod pa Jeroboam. 
1Kings14:2 Jeroboam owaco bot dakone ni, “Cit iruk boŋŋi mapat wek pe ŋatti mo one ni in i dako pa Jeroboam, ci icit i Cilo. Akija ma lanebi-ni tye kunnu, en aye yam owaco bo ta ni abibedo kabaka ma loyo lwak man," 
1Kings14:3 Ber iter mugati apar, ki capat bene, ki agulu moo kic, wek icit kwede bote, ci en birirti gin ma bitimme i kom latin.”" 
1Kings14:4 Dako pa Jeroboam otimo kit meno, Ocito i Cilo ci ka doŋ oo kunnu ocito i ot pa Akija. Onoŋo Akija pe doŋ twero neno piny, pien wane doŋ ocor woko pi tiyone." 
1Kings14:5 Rwot owaco bot Akija ni, “Nen ba, dako pa Jeroboam tye ka bino boti. Obebino ka penyo dogi pi two pa wode, pien two omako malit.” Ci Rwot otito bote lok ducu ma myero owac bot dako-nu, Ka dako meno obino, onoŋo olokke odoko macalo dako mua ki ka mukene." 
1Kings14:6 Ento ka Akija owinyo kor tyene i kare ma en obino kwede i doggola-ni, ci otugi jole ni, “Dony ba, in dako pa Jeroboam. Piŋo ilokke idoko macalo dako mua ki ka mukene? Rwot ocika ki lok mapek i komi." 
1Kings14:7 In idok icitit bot Jeroboam ni, Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco kuman ni, ‘An yam apilo wii aketi kwede i dit, ma kun akwanyi ki i kin lwak, ci aketi ibedo lalo lwakka ma gin jo Icrael." 
1Kings14:8 Yam amayo ker woko ki i ot pa Daudi, amiyo boti; ento in pe ibedo macalo laticca Daudi ma yam omako cikka ducu, kun lubo kora ki cwinye ducu, dok tiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋa keken." 
1Kings14:9 In aye doŋ itiyo bal ma okato jo ducu ma gukwoŋo nyimi, kun itiyo lwak lubaŋa piri keni, ki cal lubaŋa aliya-gu ma omiyo kiniga emaka, dok ityeko bola woko yo ŋeyi." 
1Kings14:10 Pienno abiketo can i kom jo me odi, in Jeroboam, abineko co ducu ma i odi ma ‘i lobo Icrael, opii wa ki anywalli, Abijwero jo ma i odi ducu atyeko woko liweŋ, kit macalo dano wano cet dyaŋ nio ka owano okur woko liweŋ-ŋi." 
1Kings14:11 Danoni ducu ma gibito i gaŋ, gwogi aye bimwodo komgi; ento dano ma gibito i dye tim ata, winyo aye bicamogi, an Rwot aye doŋ atyeko loko kit meno.’" 
1Kings14:12 “In dako doŋ ia, icit i odi, Ka ce tyeni odonyo i gaŋ, ci latin bito woko." 
1Kings14:13 Jo Icrael ducu gibikumo pire, ka giyiko kome, En kene aye gibiyiko kome i Lyel ki i kin jo pa Jeroboam pien en kene aye i kin jo me ot pa Jeroboam ma Rwot Lubaŋa me Icrael onoŋo k it gin mo i kome ma oyomo cwinye." 
1Kings14:14 Rwot bikwanyo dano mo mukene ma bibedo kabaka ma loyo jo Icrael, en aye dano ma bityeko ot pa Jeroboam woko i kare man. Lacen aŋo doki?" 
1Kings14:15 Rwot bipwodo Icrael nio wan ma kome myel calo lagada ma kwan i wi pii. En biputo jo Icrael woko ki i lobo man maber-ri ma yam omiyo bot kwarigi, ci bikeyogi woko ata loka kulu Euprate, pien gumiyo kiniga omako Rwot pi payo cal jok ma dako ma gilwoŋo Acera." 
1Kings14:16 Rwot bibwoto Icrael woko pi bal pa Jeroboam ma en obalo, ka dok omiyo jo Icrael bene gubalo-ni.”" 
1Kings14:17 Dako pa Jeroboam oa ocako wot me cito i Tiŋa. Ka en oo i doggola ot ci latin otugi to woko cut. 
1Kings14:18 Jo Icrael ducu guyiko kome, ka dok gukumo pire kit ma yam Rwot owaco, ma laticce lanebi Akija oloko lokke." 
1Kings14:19 Lok kom Jeroboam mudoŋŋe ducu, ki kit ma olwenyo kwede i mony-gu, ki kit locce ducu, gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Icrael." 
1Kings14:20 Kare ma Jeroboam obedo kwede ka loc oromo mwaka pyeraryo wiye aryo; ci oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine. Wode Nadab aye oleyo ka tyene." 
1Kings14:21 I kare meno Rekoboam wod pa Solomon obedo ka loyo lobo Juda. Rekoboam ocamo ker ma noŋo mwaka me ditte romo pyeraŋwen wiye acel, obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka apar wiye abiro, Jerucalem aye gaŋ ma yam Rwot oyero ki i kin kaka ma i Icrael ducu pi keto iye nyiŋe. Nyiŋ min Rekoboam Naama, ma anyira Ammon." 
1Kings14:22 Jo Juda gutiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot, ci gumiyo nyeko omake pi balgi ma gutiyo, ma okato bal ma yam kwarigi gutiyo ducu," 
1Kings14:23 Gugero wan jogigi i wi godi, gucibo wir jogi-gu ki cal jok ma dako ma gilwoŋo Acera i wi godi mabocone ducu, ki i wan ayweya ma pote oluk-gu." 
1Kings14:24 I lobogi onoŋo tye bene awobe ma lutim kwele i kom awo be wadgr i wan jogi. Lwak gutiyo kit tim kipyeda ducu ma rom ki bal pa rok ma yam Rwot oryemogi wo ko ki i nyim jo Icrael-li. 
1Kings14:25 I mwaka me loc pa Rekoboam me abicce en aye Cicak kabaka me Ejipt obino iye ka lweny i kom Jerucalem. 
1Kings14:26 Oyako jami ma gikano i ot lim pa Rwot, ki jami ma gikano i ot lim pa kabaka, Oyako jami woko ducu, oyako ki kwodi jabu ma yam Solomon otiyogi." 
1Kings14:27 Kabaka Rekoboam dok otiyo kwodi mukene ma kakagi; otiyo kwodi mola ci omiyogi i ciŋ ludito pa Lugwok kabaka, ma gigwoko doggola ot pa kabaka." 
1Kings14:28 I kare ducu ma noŋo kabaka cito i ot pa Rwot, lugwok en gimako kwodi, ka dok gidwokogi kakagi i ot kicika pa lugwok kabaka." 
1Kings14:29 Lok kom Rekoboam mudoŋŋe, ki gin ma en otiyo ducu gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Juda." 
1Kings14:30 Lweny obedo i kin Rekoboam ki Jeroboam kare mapol. 
1Kings14:31 Rekoboam oto oywe kacel ki kwarine ci giyike kacel ki kwarine i gaŋ kal pa Daudi. Nyiŋ minne Naama ma anyira Ammon, Wode Abijam aye oleyo ka tyene." 
1Kings15:1 I mwaka me apar wiye aboro me loc pa Jeroboam wod pa Nebat en aye Abijam ocako loyo iye jo Juda. 
1Kings15:2 Obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka adek. Nyiŋ minne Maaka ma nya pa Abicalom. 
1Kings15:3 En otimo kit bal ducu ma wonne ma otelo nyime yam obedo ka timogi; pe obedo ki leŋic i kom Rwot Lubaŋane kit ma yam kwarone Daudi obedo kwede. 
1Kings15:4 Kadi bed kumeno, Rwot Lubaŋane omiye obedo ki mac tara i Jerucalem pi Daudi, kun omiyo wode oleyo ka tyene, dok omiyo Jerucalem ocuŋ matek." 
1Kings15:5 Rwot otiyo man pien Daudi yam otiyo gin ma nen atir i wan Rwot, pe oweko lubo gin ma yam Rwot ociko i kare me kwone ducu, ento oroco i lok kom Uria ma Lakit keken." 
1Kings15:6 Onoŋo lweny tye i kin Rekoboam ki Jeroboam i kare me kwone ducu. 
1Kings15:7 Lok kom Abijam mudoŋŋe ducu, ki gin ma en otiyo ducu, gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Juda, Lweny obedo i kin Abijam ki Jeroboam,"
