1Kings15:8 Abijam oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyike i gaŋ kal pa Daudi. Wode Aca aye oleyo ka tyene." 
1Kings15:9 I mwaka me pyeraryo me loc pa Jeroboam kaba ka me Icrael en aye Aca ocako loyo iye jo Juda. 
1Kings15:10 Obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyeraŋwen wiye acel. Nyiŋ minne Maaka ma nya pa Abicalom. 
1Kings15:11 Aca otiyo gin ma nen atir i wan Rwot kit ma kwarone Daudi yam otiyo-ni," 
1Kings15:12 Oryemo woko ki i lobone awobe ma lutim kwele i kom awobe wadgi i wanjogi kadok okwanyo cal jogi ducu ma yam kwarine gutiyo. 
1Kings15:13 Oryemo wa minne Maaka woko, pe oye ni omed bedo daker, pien onoŋo Maaka omiyo gitine cal me kipyeda pi Acera ma jok ma dako; ci Aca otoŋo cal jokke onido woko, ci owaŋo woko i laora kulu Kidron." 
1Kings15:14 Ento waŋ jogi ma i wi godi pe gimuko woko. Kadi bed kumeno, Aca obedo ki leŋic i kom Rwot pi kare me kwone ducu." 
1Kings15:15 Okelo i ot pa Rwot mot ma yam wonne odyero bot Lubaŋa, kacel ki mere kikome bene ma odyero, ryal ki jabu ki weer-gu." 
1Kings15:16 Lweny obedo i kin Aca ki Baaca kabaka me Icrael pi kare me kwogi ducu," 
1Kings15:17 Baaca kabaka me Icrael otiŋo lweny i kom Juda, ci ogero gaŋ Rama, wek ogeŋ dano mo pe okat woko ki i lobo Juda nyo donyo iye bot Aca kabaka me Juda." 
1Kings15:18 Aca okwanyo jami ducu me ryal ki me jabu ma onoŋo odoŋ i ot kano lim pa Rwot, ki jami ma i ot kano lim pa kabaka, omiyogi i cin luticce. Ocwalogi bot Ben-adad wod pa Tabrimmon, wod pa Kejion kabaka me Ciria ma bedo i Damaciko, kun waco bote ni," 
1Kings15:19 “Wek waket gicikke i kinwa an ki in, kit ma yam bedo i kin kwara ki kwaru. Nen ba, an doŋ acwalli ryal ki jabu me mot; ber icit itur gicikkewu ki Baaca kabaka me Icrael, wek en oa woko ki i lobona.”" 
1Kings15:20 Ben-adad owinyo dog kabaka Aca, ocwalo ludito wi monnye ka lweny i kom gaŋi pa jo Icrael, ci omayo ŋon, Dan, Abel-bet-maaka ki lobo Kinerot ducu, ki lobo pa jo Naputali ducu," 
1Kings15:21 Ka Baaca owinyo pire, ci obwoto gero Rama woko, odok obedo i Tiŋa." 
1Kings15:22 Kabaka Aca olwoŋo jo Juda ducu kun ociko ni ŋatti mo pe odoŋ, ci guyweko godi ki bao ma i Rama ducu, ma onoŋo Baaca obedo ka gero ki Rama-ni; ci kabaka Aca ocako gero kwede gaŋ Geba ma i lobo pa jo Benjamin, ki Mijpa." 
1Kings15:23 Lok kom Aca mudoŋŋe ducu, tekke ducu ki gin ducu ma en otiyo, ki gaŋi ma ogerogi, giryeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Juda. Ento two aye omako tyene i kare ma en doŋ oti," 
1Kings15:24 Aca oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyike kacel ki kwarine i gaŋ kai pa kwarone Daudi, Yekocapat ma wode aye oleyo ka tyene." 
1Kings15:25 Nadab wod pa Jeroboam ocako loyo Icrael i mwaka me aryo me loc pa Aca kabaka me Juda, oloyogi pi mwaka aryo." 
1Kings15:26 Otiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot, pien obedo ka lubo kit pa wonne, ki balle ma en omiyo jo Icrael bene gubalo-ni." 
1Kings15:27 Baaca wod pa Akija ma i dog ot pa Icakar opiro lok kofi Nadab, ci ocobe oneke weoko i Gibeton ma gaŋ pa jo Piliciti. Onoŋo Nadab ki jo Icrael ducu gurumo gaŋ Gibeton woko." 
1Kings15:28 Baaca oneko Nadab i mwaka me adek me loc pa Aca kabaka me Juda, ci oleyo ka 341 tyene." 
1Kings15:29 Ka otyeko doko kabaka, oneko jo me dog ot pa Jeroboam woko ducu, pe oweko dano mo obwot i kingi, nio ka orido wi Jeroboam woko ducu, kit ma yam Rwot owaco ki i dog laticce Akija me Cilo," 
1Kings15:30 Can meno opoto pi bal pa Jeroboam ma yam obalo-ni, ma en omiyo jo Icrael bene gubalo, dok pien omiyo kiniga omako Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
1Kings15:31 Lok kom Nadab mudoŋŋe ducu, ki gin ducu ma en otiyo, gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Icrael." 
1Kings15:32 Lweny obedo i kin Aca ki Baaca kabaka me Icrael pi kare me kwogi ducu. 
1Kings15:33 I mwaka me adek me loc pa Aca kabaka me Juda en aye Baaca wod pa Akija ocako loyo iye jo Icrael ducu ki i Tiŋa, ci obedo ka loc pi mwaka pyeraryo wiye aŋwen," 
1Kings15:34 Otiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot, pien obedo ka lubo kit pa Jeroboam, ki balle ma en omiyo jo Icrael bene gubalo-ni." 
1Kings16:1 Lok pa Rwot obino bot Yeko wod pa Kanani ma lokke okemo kom Baaca, kun wacci," 
1Kings16:2 “I kare ma apilo wii aketi kwede i dit, ma kun akwanyi ki i apwa ci aketi ibedo latel wi jona jo Icrael, icako lubo kit pa Jeroboam, imiyo jona jo Icrael bene gudoko lubalo, mumiyo kiniga omaka pi balgi ducu," 
1Kings16:3 Nen ba, abiyweyo in Baaca woko liweŋ ki jo me odi ducu, dok abimiyo odi bedo calo ot pa Jeroboam wod pa Nebat." 
1Kings16:4 Danoni ducu ma gibito i gaŋ, gwogi aye bimwodo komgi, ento dano ma gibito i dye tim ata, winyo aye bicamogi.”" 
1Kings16:5 Lok kom Baaca mudoŋŋe ducu, ki gin ma en otiyo, ki tekke, gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Icrael." 
1Kings16:6 Baaca oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyike i Tiŋa. Ela ma wode aye oleyo ka tyene." 
1Kings16:7 Lok pa Rwot obino bot lanebi Yeko wod pa Kanani ma okemo Baaca ki jo ma i ode pi lok aryo, pi gin ma otimo ma nen marac i wan Rwot, kun orruyo kmiga omako Rwot i kome pi gin ma otiyo ma rom ki tim pa jo me ot pa Jeroboam, ento doki pien oneko jo me ot pa Jeroboam woko ducu." 
1Kings16:8 I mwaka ma pyeraryo wiye abicel me loc pa Aca kabaka me Juda en aye Ela wod pa Baaca ocako loyo iye jo Icrael ki i Tiŋa, ci obedo ka loc pi mwaka aryo." 
1Kings16:9 Ento laticce Jimri, ma ladit ma loyo nucu gadigadi lwennye, opiro lok i kome. I kare ma Ela tye i Tiŋa en obedo ka mat ci omer woko i ot pa Aŋa ma lalo jami ma i ode ma i Tiŋa." 
1Kings16:10 Jimri odonyo i ot, ocobo Ela otugi neko woko cut, i mwaka me pyeraryo wi ye abiro me loc pa Aca kabaka me Juda, ci Jimri oleyo ka tyene," 
1Kings16:11 Ka Jimri ocako loyo lobo, tekke obedo i wi komkerre, ci otugi neko jo me ot pa Baaca woko liweŋ; pe oweko latin laco mo makwo ma i doggolagi, kadi wa i kin lureme." 
1Kings16:12 Jimri oneko jo me ot pa Baaca otyeko woko ducu kit meno, kit ma lok pa Rwot owaco-ni ma yam obino i dog lanebi Yeko ma okemo kom Baaca," 
1Kings16:13 pi bal pa Baaca ducu ki pi bal pa Ela ma wode, ma gin gubalo ka dok omiyo jo Icrael bene gubalo-ni, kun gimiyo kiniga omako Rwot Lubaŋa me Icrael pi cal jogi ma giworogi." 
1Kings16:14 Lok kom Ela mudoŋŋe ducu, ki gin ducu ma en otiyo, gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Icrael." 
1Kings16:15 I mwaka me pyeraryo wiye abiro me loc pa Aca kaba ka me Juda en aye Jimri obedo ka loc i Tiŋa pi nino abiro, Onoŋo mony pa jo Icrael gutoŋo gonygi ma gikemo Gibeton ma gaŋ pa jo Piliciti," 
1Kings16:16 ci lumony guwinyo ki i gonygi ni Jimri opiro lok, oneko kabaka woko. En aye lok mumiyo jo Icrael ducu guketo Omri ma ladit me mony aye odoko kaba ka ma loyo Icrael i nino meno i kare ma gitye i gony kunnu." 
1Kings16:17 Omri oa woko ki i Gibeton ki jo Icrael ducu kacel kwede, ci guwoto gurumo gaŋ Tiŋa." 
1Kings16:18 Ka Jimri oneno ni mony doŋ omako gaŋ woko, ci owoto i gogo me ot pa kabaka, owano ot i wiye kene, oto iye." 
1Kings16:19 Oto pi balle ma otiyo dok pi tiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot kun lubo kit pa Jeroboam ki balle ma co omiyo jo Icrael gubalo-ni. 
1Kings16:20 Lok kom Jimri mudoŋŋe ducu, ki lok ma en opiro, gityeko co yo ne i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Icrael." 
1Kings16:21 I kare meno onoŋo jo lerael gupokke woko dul aryo; nucu lwak tuŋcel aye gudok i kom Tibni wod pa Ginat pi keto en me bedo kabakagi, ki nucu tuŋcel gupokke gudok i kom Omri." 
1Kings16:22 Ento lwak ma gudok i kom Omri guloyo lwak ma gudok i kom Tibni wod pa Ginat; kit meno Tibni oto woko, ci Omri odoko kabaka." 
1Kings16:23 I mwaka pyeradek wiye acel me loc pa Aca kabaka me Juda en aye Omri ocako loyo iye jo Icrael, ci obedo ka loc pi mwaka apar wiye aryo, kun oloyo mwaka abicel i Tiŋa." 
1Kings16:24 Owilo got me Camaria ki bot Cemer ki lim ryal ma romo talanta aryo, ka ogero iye gaŋ gogo matek, ocako nyiŋe Camaria, macalo nyiŋ Cemer ma yam obedo won got meno." 
1Kings16:25 Omri otiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot, otiyo gin marac makato jo ma gutelo nyime ducu." 
1Kings16:26 Obedo ka lubo kit pa Jeroboam wod pa Nebat ducu, ki bal ducu ma en omiyo jo Icrael gubalo, kun gimiyo kiniga omako Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael pi cal jogigi." 
1Kings16:27 Lok kom Omri mudoŋŋe ducu, ki gin ma en otiyo, ki tekke ducu, gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Icrael." 
1Kings16:28 Omri oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyike i Camaria; Akab ma wode aye oleyo ka tyene." 
1Kings16:29 I mwaka me pyeradek wiye aboro me loc pa Aca kabaka me Juda en aye Akab wod pa Omri ocako loyo iye jo Icrael, ci obedo ka loc i Camaria pi mwaka pyeraryo wiye aryo." 
1Kings16:30 Akab wod pa Omri otiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot makato jo ma gutelo nyime ducu. 
1Kings16:31 Dok macalo en otamo ni lubo kit bal pa Jeroboam wod pa Nebat obedo gin manok mo, omiyo en onyomo Jejebel ma nya pa Etibaal kabaka pa jo Cidon, dok en bene ocito kunnu oworo jok Baal kun oryebbe i nyime." 
1Kings16:32 Ogero ot pi jok Baal i Camaria, ocano keno tyer iye." 
1Kings16:33 Akab ocibo cal jok ma dako ma gilwoŋo Acera, dok otiyo gin ma omiyo kiniga omako Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael makato luker me Icrael ducu ma gutelo nyime," 
1Kings16:34 I karene aye Kiel, dano me Betel, ogero iye Jeriko odoco. Abiram ma latin kayone okwoŋo to ci oketo gutine i wiye, ci wode matidine oto, ma nyiŋe Cegub, ka giketo dog gaŋ i wiye, macalo lok ma Rwot yam oloko ki i dog Yocwa wod pa Nun." 
1Kings17:1 I kare meno Elia Laticbe, ma gaŋgi Ticbe ma i Gilead, owaco bot Akab ni, “Macalo Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael tye makwo-ni, ma an acuŋ i nyime, i mwaka ma bino-ni toyo bibedo peke kadi wa kot bene, nio ka doga aye dok biloko.”" 
1Kings17:2 Lok pa Rwot obino bot Elia ni," 
1Kings17:3 “A woko ki kany, idok yo tun wokceŋ, icikanne i ŋet laora kulu Ketit ma i ne kulu Jordan tun wokceŋ," 
1Kings17:4 Ibimato pii ma i kulu-nu, dok atyeko ci ko winyo agak ma gibipiti kunnu.”" 
1Kings17:5 Elia ocito kit ma Rwot owacce-ni, ocito obedo i ŋet laora kulu Kerit ma i ne kulu Jordan yo tuŋ wokceŋ." 
1Kings17:6 Agak gutero kwon ki riŋo-gu bote i odiko, ka dok otyeno bene guterre kwon ki riŋo. En obedo ka mato pii i kulu Kerit." 
1Kings17:7 Lacen pii ma i kulu otwo woko, pien kot doŋ pe cwer i lobo." 
1Kings17:8 Lok pa Rwot dok obino bot Elia ni," 
1Kings17:9 “A malo, icil wa i Jarepat, ma cok ki Cidon, ici bed kunnu, Atyeko ciko dako mo kunnu ma cware oto ma bimiyi cam.”" 
1Kings17:10 Elia oa malo ocito i Jarepat. Ka oo cok ki dog gaŋ, nen, daa-to mo tye ka coko yen riddo. Elia olwone kun waco bote ni, “Cikella pii mo i agwata wek amati.”" 
1Kings17:11 Ka dako ocako wot me kela pii, ci dok olwone, owacce ni, “Cikella kwon mo man ok i ciŋi.”" 
1Kings17:12 Dako ogamo ni, “Macalo Rwot Lubaŋani tye makwo-ni, pe atye ki kwon mo ma amyeno, ento atye ki moko kwon poŋ ciŋ acel keken ma odon i abino, ki moo tedo manok mo i atabo moo; man atye ka coko yen riddo mogo wek adok kwede ka acited pira ki pi woda, ka wek doŋ wacam ci wato kwede.”" 
1Kings17:13 Elia ogamo ni, “Pe ilwor, cit icitim kit ma iwaco-ni; ento koŋ idolla kwon manok ikella, ka dok lacen icidol piri ki pi wodi." 
1Kings17:14 Pien Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael ocika kuman ni, ‘Moko kwon pe bitum woko i abino, moo pe birem woko i atabo, nio ka Rwot ocwalo kot ocwer i lobo.’ ”" 
1Kings17:15 Dako-nu ocito otedo kit ma Elia owacce-ni, ci dako-nu ki Elia ki jo ma i ode ducu gubedo ka camone pi nino mapol," 
1Kings17:16 kun moko kwon pe tum ki i abino, moo bene pe rem i atabo, kit ma Rwot owaco ki dog Elia-ni," 
1Kings17:17 Lacen ki i ŋe man, latin pa dako ma min ot meno two omako, ci twone omedde malit mada, nio ka pe doŋ ywe-gu," 
1Kings17:18 Dako-nu owaco bot Elia ni, “Itima rac kuman piŋo, in dano pa Lubaŋa? Ibino bota ka poyo wi balla macon, omiyo balla oneko woda woko do!”" 
1Kings17:19 Elia owaco bot dako-nu ni, “Miya wodi kany.” Ci otino latin woko ki i kore, ocito kwedei kicika ma malo ka ma en buto iye, opyelo latin i wi kabutone kikome." 
1Kings17:20 Ocako kok bot Rwot ni, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋana, in aye dok ikelo can i kom daa-to ma abedo bote-ni pi neko wode?”" 
1Kings17:21 Ci Elia oryene i kom latin kidek, kun kok kwede bot Rwot ni, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋana, wek tipo kom latin man odwog cen i kome ba,”" 
1Kings17:22 Rwot owinyo koko pa Elia, omiyo tipo kom latin odwogo cen i kome, ka cwinye odwogo," 
1Kings17:23 Elia otiŋo latin ki i kicika ma malo, okele piny i ot, omiyo bot minne, owacci, “Nen, wodi tye makwo ene.”" 
1Kings17:24 Dakonu owaco bot Elia ni, “Ai rwoda, kombeddi doŋ aŋeyo atir ni in i dano pa Lubaŋa, dok Jok pa Rwot ma iwaco ki dogi bene me ada.”" 
1Kings18:1 Ka kare okato malac, ci lok pa Rwot dok obino bot Elia, i mwaka me adekke, ma wacci, “Cit icinyutte kekeni bot Akab; an doŋ abicwalo kot i lobo.”" 
1Kings18:2 Elia ocito ka nyutte bot Akab. I kare-nu onoŋo kec doŋ dwoŋ i Camaria. 
1Kings18:3 Akab olwoŋo Obadia ma ladit ma loyo jami ma i ode-ni. Onoŋo Obadia woro Rwot matek twatwal. 
1Kings18:4 I kare ma yam Jejebel tye ka neko lunebi pa Rwot, Obadia otero lunebi miya acel kulu, okanogi i boro, opo ko kingi pyerabic pyerabic, opitogi ki kwon ki pii-gu." 
1Kings18:5 Akab owaco bot Obadia ni, “Wot icit i dye lobo ducu ka ma waŋ pii tye iye, wa ki i nota ducu; gwok nyo wabinono iye lum wek walar aguragura ki kana madonone gubed makwo, wek leewa mogo pe guto woko.”" 
1Kings18:6 Gucako poko lobo ma ŋat acel acel i kingi biwot iye; ci Akab ocito mere tuŋcel en kene, ki Obadia bene odok yo tuŋcel en kene," 
1Kings18:7 I kare ma Obadia tye ka wot iyo, nen, Elia otuc, orwatte kwede, Obadia otugi ŋeye woko cut, opoto piny aryeba cwiny kun wacci, “Man aye in kikomi Elia, rwoda?”" 
1Kings18:8 Elia ogamo ni, “Iyo an kikoma. Ento cit icitit bot rwodi ni Elia tye kany.”" 
1Kings18:9 Obadia ogamo ni, “An abalo kit bal aŋo boti, rwoda? Piŋo imito miya i ciŋ Akab wek oneka?" 
1Kings18:10 Macalo Rwot Lubaŋani tye makwoni, pe tye rok mo nyo ker mo ma rwoda Akab pe ocwalo iye dano ka yenyi, Ka gudwoko lok ni, ‘Elia pe tye kany,’ en koŋ miyo ladit me rok meno nyo me ker meno kwoŋo kwoŋ ma nyuto ni pe gunoni kunnu," 
1Kings18:11 Ci in dok iwacci, ‘Wot icit bot rwodi icititte ni Elia tye kany.’" 
1Kings18:12 Ki i neya ma noŋo doŋ acito woko, Cwiny pa Rwot bitini woko ci teri ka ma pe aŋeyo. Pienno, ka acito atito bot Akab, ka ce pe ginoŋo komi, en bi neka woko, kadi bed abedo ka woro Rwot cakke ka tinona." 
1Kings18:13 Peya gititti ce, rwoda, kit gin ma abedo ka tiyone i kare ma Jejebel tye ka neko lunebi pa Rwot? Yam akano lunebi pa Rwot miya acel kulu i boro, kun apoko kingi pyerabic pyerabic, ci abedo ka miyogi kwon ki pii-gu." 
1Kings18:14 Ka in dok iwacci, ‘Wot itit bot rwodi ni Elia tye kany,’ man miyo en neka woko.”" 
1Kings18:15 Elia ogamo ni, “Macalo Rwot me mony tye makwo-ni, ma an acuŋ i, nyime, abinyuto koma bo te tin i nyime.”" 
1Kings18:16 Obadia ocito ka rwatte ki Akab, otitte, ci Akab ocito ka rwatte ki Elia." 
1Kings18:17 Ka Akab oneno kom Elia, owaco bote ni, “Man en in kikomi, in ma layel Icrael-li?”" 
1Kings18:18 Elia ogamo ni, “An pe ayelo Icrael; in aye it ye ka yelone, in ki jo me doggola pa woru, pien ibwoto lubo cik pa Rwot woko, icako lubo kor Baal-gu." 
1Kings18:19 Kombeddi icwal kwena wek icok jo Icrael ducu i nyima i wi got Karmel. Cok ki lunebi pa jok Baal bene mi ya aŋwen ki pyerabic-ci, ki lunebi pa Acera ma jok ma dako-ni ma gitye ka cam i wi meja pa Jejebel,”" 
1Kings18:20 Akab ocwalo kwena bot jo Icrael ducu, ci ocoko lunebi pa Baal ducu i wi got Karmel." 
1Kings18:21 Elia ociro cok bot lwak ci owaco bot dano ni, “Wun mono wubicabbe atara i cwinywu nio kwede wa awene? Ka ce Rwot aye Lubaŋa, ci wulub en keken; ento ka Baal, ci wutugi lubo en cur.” Emo lwak pe gudokke iye lok mo," 
1Kings18:22 Elia dok owaco bot lwak ni, “An kena aye pud adoŋ ki i kom lunebi pa Rwot, kun lunebi pa Baal gitye miya aŋwen kulu ki pyerabic," 
1Kings18:23 Wek gikel twoni aryo botwa kany, Wek lunebi pa Baal guyer twon acel obed megi, gunek ci guŋid woko, gucan riŋone i wi yen i wi keno tyer, ento pe gumok iye mac mo, Ki an bene abiyubo twon acel, abicano riŋone i wi yen, pe amoko iye mac mo," 
1Kings18:24 Wun wubed ka lwoŋo nyiŋ; lubaŋawu, ki an bene abilwono nyiŋ Rwot; ci lubaŋa ma bidok iye ki cwalo mac, en aye Lubaŋa ada.” Lwak ducu gugamo ni, “Iloko mamit.”" 
1Kings18:25 Elia dok owaco bot lunebi pa Baal ni, “Wun wuyer twonwu acel wek wucak yubone; wun aye wukwoŋ, pien wupol, ento pe wumok iye mac mo,”" 
1Kings18:26 Lunebi pa Baal gukwanyo twon ma gimiyogi-ni, guyubo, gulwoŋo iye nyiŋ Baal, cakke odiko nio kwede wa i cwiny dyeceŋ, kun giwacci, “Ai Baal, dokkiwa iye do ya!” Ento dwan mo pe ma winnye, ki ŋatti mo ma dokkigi iye bene peke, Gubedo ka myel ma girumo kwede keno tyer ma gucano-ni." 
1Kings18:27 Elia ocako cayogi i dyeceŋ kun wacci, “Wudaŋŋe matek, pien en aye lubaŋa. Gwok nyo pud iye tye ka Lwodo lok, nyo pud ocito woko, nyo tye i wotte ka mo, nyo pud onino, ci myero koŋ wucoye woko ki i waŋ ninone.”" 
1Kings18:28 Ka dok gudaŋŋe matek, kun giŋolo komgi kekengi ki pala lucwan ki atero-gu macalo kitgi tye kwede; guŋolle nio ka remo komgi ocako cwer kun mol i komgi." 
1Kings18:29 Gubedo ka daŋŋe matek ka cwiny dyeceŋ okato kun gidaŋŋe adaŋa, nio wa i cawa me tyero gityer me otyeno, ento piny oliŋ litik; ŋat ma dok iye botgi peke, ki ŋat ma paro pigi bene peke." 
1Kings18:30 Lacen Elia owaco bot lwak ducu ni, “Wubin doŋ bota cok kany,” ci lwak ducu gucito bote cok, En ocako yubo keno tyer pa Rwot ma yam gimuko gireto woko piny-nyi," 
1Kings18:31 Okwanyo godi apar wiye aryo muporo wel kaka pa awobe pa Yakobo ima yam lok pa Rwot obino bote kun wacci, “Nyiŋi bibedo Icrael.”" 
1Kings18:32 Ocano keno tyer ki godi meno pi nyiŋ Rwot. Okwinyo bur orumo ŋet keno tyer, ma ditte romo awal kodi aryo." 
1Kings18:33 Ka otyeko caŋo yen kikore, ci oŋido riŋo twon, ocano i wi yen. Owacci, “Doŋ wutwom pii ma romo abino aŋwen, ka wuony piine i wi gitum awaŋa, ki i kom yen-gu.”" 
1Kings18:34 Ka dok owacci, “Dok wumed onyo iye pii”; ci gunwoyo onyo pii tyen me aryone, Dok owacci, ‘“‘Wumed tyen me adekke”; ci gumedo tyen me adekke." 
1Kings18:35 Pii obedo ka mol kun rumo keno tyer, opoŋ i bur woko ducu." 
1Kings18:36 Ka cawa me tyero gityer me otyeno doŋ oromo, lanebi Elia onyiko cok i kom keno tyer, owacci, “Ai Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Abraim, pa kaka ki pa Icrael, wek tin doŋ oneŋe atir ni in aye Lubaŋa i Icrael, dok ni an abedo laticci, ci atiyo man ducu pi lok ma iwaco bota." 
1Kings18:37 Dokka iye, ai Rwot, dokka iye, wek lwak man one atir ni, in Rwot aye in Lubaŋa keni, dok ni ityeko dwoko cwinygi i komi.”" 
1Kings18:38 Ci mac oa ki bot Rwot opoto piny, owaŋo gitum awaŋa woko ducu liweŋ, ki yen-gu, ki godi-gu, ki apwa, ka dok onaŋo pii woko ma onoŋo opoŋo bur-ri." 
1Kings18:39 Ka lwak ducu guneno, gupoto woko piny aryeba cwiny, kun giwacci, “Rwot aye Lubaŋa; Rwot aye Lubaŋa.”" 
1Kings18:40 Elia owaco bot lwak ni, “Wumak lunebi pa Baal ducu, pe wuwek mo obwoti.” Gimakogi woko ducu, ci Elia oterogi piny i laora kulu Kicon, onekogi woko kunnu." 
1Kings18:41 Elia owaco bot Akab ni, “Cit doŋ ka cam ki ka mat, pien dwan kot ma mito cwer doŋ mor winnye.”" 
1Kings18:42 Akab ocito woko ka cam ki ka mat, Elia ocito malo i wi got Karmel, okulo wiye piny i ŋom, orwako wiye i kin coŋe." 
1Kings18:43 Owaco bot laticce ni, “Cit koŋ icinen yo tuŋ nam.” Ka ocito woko oneno, ci owacci, “Gin mo pud peke.” Elia dok owacce ni, “Cit doki tyen abiro.”" 
1Kings18:44 I kom tyen me abirone laticce owacci, “Aneno latin pol mo otinne ki i nam, tidi rom ki cin dano keken.” Elia dok owacci, “Cit bot Akab, iciwacce ni, ‘Yub gadigadini idok gaŋ wek kot pe ogeni wot.’ ”" 
1Kings18:45 Polo ocako cido woko ki pol oyotoyot twatwal, kun yamo kodo, ci kot ocako cwer madwoŋ. Akab oito wi gadigadine odok i Jejreel." 
1Kings18:46 Ento Rwot onoŋo odiyo Elia ki ciŋe, omiyo otweyo pyere oriŋo kwede i nyim Akab nio kwede wa i dog gaŋ me Jejreel." 
1Kings19:1 Akab otito bot dakerre Jejebel gin ducu ma Elia otiyo, ki kit ma oneko kwede lunebi pa jok Baal ducu ki pala lucwan." 
1Kings19:2 Jejebel ocwalo lakwena bot Elia kun wacce ni, “Ka pe di ki ka onyoo atyeko kwoni woko, kit ma ityeko kwede kwo pa lunebina woko-ni, ci lubaŋana myero guket can i koma kit meno ki makato bene.”" 
1Kings19:3 Lworo omako Elia, omiyo oriŋo woko olaro kwone, ocito i Beer-ceba ma i lobo Juda, oweko laticce kunnu." 
1Kings19:4 Ento en aye ocito kene i tim, kun owoto wot me nino acel kulu, Ocito obedo i te yat laywe mo, olego Rwot ni, “Doŋ otum, ai Rwot, tin doŋ ikwany kwona woko; pien an pe aber akato kwarina ducu.”" 
1Kings19:5 Obuto woko piny otugi nino woko i te yat laywe meno, Ci nen, lamalaika ogudo kome, owaco bote in, “Elia, a malo wek icam.”" 
1Kings19:6 Ka oa oneno piny, oneno capat ma gitedo i kom got malyet, ki pii i abino tye ka wiye. Ocako camone ka dok omato pii, ka dok obuto piny." 
1Kings19:7 Lamalaika pa Rwot dok odwogo bote tyen me aryone; ogudo kome kun dok owacce ni, “Elia, a malo wek icam, ka dok imat pii, pien wotti pud dit mada.”" 
1Kings19:8 Elia oa malo, ocamo dok omato pii, ci olimo tek mua i cam meno omiyo omedde ki wot ci oo kwede wa i Koreb ma got pa Lubaŋa-ni. Owoto pi nino pyeraŋwen dyeceŋ ki dyewor." 
1Kings19:9 Ka oo kunnu, odonyo i boro mo, obedo iye. Lok pa Rwot obino bote kun waco bote nii “Itimo gin aŋo kany, Elia?”" 
1Kings19:10 Ogamo ni, “Nyeko obedo ka maka mada pi Rwot, ma Lubaŋa me mony; pien jo Icrael gubwoto gicikkeni woko, dok gumuko keno tyerri woko ducu, guneko lunebini woko ki pala Lucwan-gu, An aye doŋ adoŋ kena, dok bene gimito neka woko.”" 
1Kings19:11 Dok Rwot owaco bote ni, “Wot icit anyim, icuŋ i wi got i nyim Rwot.” Ci nen, Rwot oka to ka ŋete kun yamo madwoŋ mager tye ka baro godi, dok ŋido lela matitino i nyim Rwot; ento Rwot onoŋo pe i yamo-nu. Ki i ŋe yamo oyenyen obino, ento onoŋo Rwot pe tye i oyenyen meno." 
1Kings19:12 Ki i ŋe oyenyen mac obino, ento Rwot pe tye i mac. Ki i ŋe mac dwan matidi mo obino," 
1Kings19:13 Ka Elia owinyo, oumo waŋe ki boŋone, ci ocito kwede ocuŋ i dog boro. Nen, dwan obino bote ma waco bote ni, “Itimo gin aŋo kany, Elia?”" 
1Kings19:14 Elia ogamo ni, “Nyeko aye obedo ka maka mada pi Rwot, Lubaŋa me mony; pien jo Icrael gubwoto gicikkeni woko, dok gumuko keno tyerri woko ducu, guneko lunebini ki pala Iucwan-gu, ci an aye doŋ adoŋ kena, dok bene gimito neka woko.”" 
1Kings19:15 Rwot owacce ni, “Wot idok cen kun ilubo yo ma cito i tim Damaciko. Ka io kunnu, ibiwiro Kajael wek obed kabaka me Ciria." 
1Kings19:16 Ka dok ibiwiro Yeko wod pa Nimci obed kabaka me Icrael; ka dok Elica wod pa Capat me Abel-mekola ibiwiro me bedo lanebi ma bileyo kakari. 
1Kings19:17 Dano ma bibwot ki pala lucwan pa Kajael, Yeko binekone; dok dano ma bibwot ki pala lucwan pa Yeko, Elica binekone." 
1Kings19:18 Ento abibwoto dano alip abiro i Icrael, jo ducu ma peya gurumo coŋgi i nyim jok Baal, ma doggi bene pe gunoto lem cal Baal pi nyuto woro bote.”" 
1Kings19:19 Elia oa woko ki kunnu, ocito onoŋo Elica wod pa Capat. Elica tye ka pur kun tye ki kweri dyaŋ apar wiye aryo ma guryeyo i nyime, ma twoni pur giywayogi aryo aryo; en kikome aye tye ki me apar wiye aryone. Elia okato ki ka ŋete, obolo boŋone i kome." 
1Kings19:20 Elica otugi weko twonine woko, ocako ŋwec i kor Elia kun wacci, “Wek koŋ acicik wora ki maa, ka doŋ adwogo alubo kori.” Elia ogamo ni, “Dok giri cen do, an kono atimo kit gin aŋo i komi?”" 
1Kings19:21 Elica oweko lubo kor Elia, odok cen, ogonyo twonine aryo onekogi woko, ka otedo riŋogi ki rii ŋutgi ma ka yen, opoko bot dano ma gitye kunnu, ci gucamo. Ka doŋ oa ocito ka lubo kor Elia, ocako konye macalo laticce." 
1Kings20:1 Ben-adad ma kabaka pa jo Ciria ocoko monn-ye ducu, ogu rogi kacel, kun luker pyeradek wiye aryo bene gitye kwede, ki lwak aguragura ki gadigadi lweny-gu, Otero monynye orumo Camaria woko ocako I weny i kome." 
1Kings20:2 Ocwalo lukwena i gaŋ bot Akab kabaka me Icrael ka wacce ni, “Ben-adad owaco kumanni," 
1Kings20:3 ‘Ryalli ki jabuni ducu mera; ki monni ma gibeco-ni ki litinoni bene ducu mera.’ 
1Kings20:4 Kabaka me Icrael ogamo ni “Ai kabaka, in i rwoda, an a danoni, kacel ki jami ma atye kwedgi ducu.’" 
1Kings20:5 Lukwena dok gudok kunnu tyen me aryone, guwacci, “Ben-adad owaco kuman ni, ‘Yam acwalo lok kun awacci imiya ryal ki jabuni, ki monni ki litinoni." 
1Kings20:6 Doŋ di ki i kin cawa man abicwalo luticca boti, gibiyenyo i odi ki i odi pa luticci, ci gibimako gin ducu ma yomo cwinygi, giyako, gitero woko.’ ”" 
1Kings20:7 Kabaka me Icrael olwoŋo ludoŋo me lobone ducu, owaco botgi ni, “Koŋ wunen kit ma dano man tye ka yenyo kwede kolo. Ocwalo lok bota ni amiye monna ki litinona, ki ryal ki jabu-gu, ci peya akwerre lok mo,”" 
1Kings20:8 Ludoŋo ducu ki lwak ducu gugamo ni, “Pe itam kom lokke-nu, pe iye bene.”" 
1Kings20:9 Mumiyo kabaka owaco bot lukwena pa Ben-adad ni, “Wun wuwac bot rwoda kabaka ni, ‘Gin ma ikwoŋo mitone ki bota abimiyone ducu, ento man aye pe atwero ye.’” Lukwena gudok ka tero lokke." 
1Kings20:10 Ben-adad ocwalo lok owaco bote ni, “Abiloko Camaria doko apwa, ento apwane pe biromo lwak dano ma abibino kwede, wek ŋat acel acel ojob poŋ ciŋe, Ka pe kumeno, lubaŋawa myero guket can i koma kit meno ki makato bene.”" 
1Kings20:11 Kabaka me Icrael ogamo ni, “Dano ma pud tye ka tweyo jami lweny i pyere peya wakke ma rom ki dano ma doŋ obelunyo jamine woko.”" 
1Kings20:12 Ben-adad owinyo lok man kun tye ka mato konone ki luker ma gitye ka gony i bolo. Owaco bot lwakke ni, “Doŋ wucak ryeyo ki tyeŋ i kabedowu,” ci guryeyo ki tyeŋ i kabedogi pi lweny i kom gaŋ Camaria." 
1Kings20:13 Lanebi mo obino cok bot Akab kabaka me Icrael ci owaco bote ni, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, Ityeko neno lwak man madwoŋ? Tin abimiyogi i ciŋi, miyo ibiŋeyo atir ni an a Rwot.”" 
1Kings20:14 Akab ogamo ni. “En bitiyo ki jo mene?” Ogamo ni, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, en bitiyo ki awobe ma gikonyo tulo dul lobo acel acel.” Akab dok omedde ki peny ni, “Aŋa ma bicako lweny?” Lanebi ogamo ni, “In.”" 
1Kings20:15 Akab olwoŋo awobe ma gikonyo lulo dul lobo mapatpat; onoŋo giromo miya aryo ki pyeradek wiye aryo. Ka dok oryeyo jo Icrael ducu i ŋegi, ma giromo dano alip abiro." 
1Kings20:16 Lwak gumol gukato woko ki i dyeceŋ, kun Ben-adad tye mere ka mato koŋo ma omer ki kono i bolo bedone, en kacel ki luker pyeradek wiye aryo-nu ma gucokke ka konye-ni," 
1Kings20:17 Lukony pa ludito ma giloyo dullobo ducu gin aye gukwoŋo kato woko. Ben-adad ocwalo lurot-piny ci gudwoko lok ni, “Lwak dano gitye ka mol gikato woko ki i Camaria.”" 
1Kings20:18 Kabaka ogamo ni, “Ka ce gubino pi yubo lok me kuc, wumakgi amaka makwo; kadi bed gubino ka lweny bene wumakgi makwo.”" 
1Kings20:19 Lukony pa ludito ma giloyo dul lobo gumol woko ducu ki i gaŋ, ci lwak mony gulubo korgi." 
1Kings20:20 Dano acel acel oneko dano mukemo nyime. Jo Ciria gucako riŋo woko, kun jo Icrael giryemo korgi; ento Ben-adad kabaka me Ciria obwot, pien oriŋo woko ki aguragura kacel ki wegi aguragura mogo." 
1Kings20:21 Ci kabaka me Icrael okato woko, omako lwak aguragura ki gadigadi lweny mapol, kun neko jo Ciria ki nek madit twatwal." 
1Kings20:22 Lanebi dok obino bot kabaka me Icrael ci owaco bote ni, “Ber imed monnyi obed matek, kun itamo maber pi gin ma myero itim, pien jo Ciria dok gibidwogo i dog oro ka cako lweny i komi.”" 
1Kings20:23 Lutic pa kabaka me Ciria guwaco bote ni, “Jo man lubaŋagi lubaŋa me wi godi, omiyo gin yam tek, guloyowa; ento wek dok walweny kwedgi ki i dye bar, ci wan aye wabibedo tekmakatogi." 
1Kings20:24 Wamiyiryeko kit man: Kwany luker ducu woko ki i ka ticgi, wek iket ludito ma loyo mony ma kakagi." 
1Kings20:25 Dok iywa mony mukene ma rom ki mony ma doŋ gityekogi woke-ni, Cok aguragura ki gadigadi lweny ma welgi rom ki gin macon ca, ci wek walweny ki jo Icrael i dye bar, ci wabibedo matek makatogi.” En owinyo doggi, otiyo kit ma guwaconi." 
1Kings20:26 Ben-adad ocoko mony pa jo Ciria i dog oro, ci gutiro i Apek pi lweny ki jo Icrael." 
1Kings20:27 Jo Icrael bene guryeyo monygi, ci gutiŋo mony i kom jo Ciria, ma guyubbe ki camgi bene. Jo Icrael guyubo gonygi i nyim lumerokgi macalo lwak dyegi manok ma gipokogi i dul aryo ‘keken, ento jo Ciria gupoŋo lobo woko." 
1Kings20:28 Dano pa Lubaŋa dok obino cok ci owaco bot kabaka me Icrael ni, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, Pien jo Ciria gubedo ka waco ni, ‘Rwot en Iubana me godi, pe lubaŋa me nota-gu,’ en aye lok mumiyo abimiyo monygi madit-ti i ciŋi, ci ibiŋeyo atir ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
1Kings20:29 Mony aryo ducu gugony gukemme ki mony pa lumerokgi pi nino abiro kulu, ci lweny ocakke i nino me abirone. Jo Icrael guneko askari pa jo Ciria ma giwoto ki tyengi ma romo alip miya acel kulu i kom nino meno acel-lu." 
1Kings20:30 Jo mudoŋŋe guriŋo gularo gaŋ Apek, ci cel murumo gaŋ dok opoto i kom jo mapol ma gudoŋŋe ma giromo alip pyeraryo wiye abiro. Ben-adad bene oriŋo kunnu, odonyo i kicika ma i tyelo ot mo ma i gaŋ kunnu." 
1Kings20:31 Luticce guwacce ni, “Nen ba, watyeko winyo ni luker ma i ot ker me Icrael gin lukica. Wek koŋ waruk boŋo cola i pyerwa ki tol-gu ma watweyo i wiwa wacit kwede bote en kabaka me Icrael, ci gwok nyo en pe bineki.”" 
1Kings20:32 Gutweyo pyergi ki boŋo cola, ki tol i wigi ducu, gucito kwede bot kabaka me Icrael. Guwaco bote ni, “Laticci Ben-adad owacci, ebako doge boti ber iweke, pe doŋ ineke.” Kabaka ogamo ni, “En pud tye makwo bo? En omera.”" 
1Kings20:33 Onoŋo jo-nu gitye ka yenyo Lanyut mo wek guniaŋ kit ma piny tye kwede. Ka guwinyo nyiŋ man, “omera”, ci gugamo oyotoyot ni, “Iyo, omeru Ben-adad.” En dok owacci, “Wucit wukele.” Ben-adad obino bote, ci kabaka Akab otine i gadigadine." 
1Kings20:34 Ben-adad owacce ni, “Gaŋi ma yam wora oyako ki, bot woru abidwokogi ducu i ciŋi: ka dok in bene itwero bedo ki dukani me cato wil i Damaciko kit ma yam wora obedo kwede i Camaria.” Akab ogamo ni, “Abibwoti icito pi lok ma iciko-ni.” Kit meno oketo gicikke kwede, ci obwote ocito." 
1Kings20:35 Laco mo ma i kin lwak pa lunebi owaco bot lawote ni, “Amito igoya malit,” kun Rwot aye onoŋo ocike kumeno. Ento lawote okwero goye." 
1Kings20:36 Ka dok owacce ni, “In pe iworo lok pa Rwot. Pi meno, nen ba, ka ce ibia ki bota kombeddi, labwor mo bineki woko cut.” Ka dano meno oa woko ki bote, ci labwor orwatte kwede, oneke woko cut," 
1Kings20:37 Lanebi dok onoŋo dano mukene, owaco bote ni, “Amito igoya malit,” ci laco meno otugi goye cut, ogoye oketo ret i kome bene." 
1Kings20:38 Lanebi-nu ocito, obedo ka kuro kabaka Akab i ŋet yo, kun oloko kit kome woko pi umo waŋe woko ki kitambara ma otweyo iye." 
1Kings20:39 Ka kabaka obekato, odaŋŋe bote kun wacci, “An laticci acito i mony, ci adonyo wa i dyere ka ma lweny tye malyet. Ci nen, askari mo odwogo ki dano mo ma okelo bota ci ocika ni, ‘Gwokka dano man. Ka ce iweko orwenyo woko pi tyen lok mo, ci in aye ibito ma kakare, nyo ibiculo ki talanta acel me ryal.’" 
1Kings20:40 Kit meno, kit ma abedo ka yelle kany ki kuca-ni, ladit, omiyo en ocito gire woko.” Kabaka me Icrael owacce ni, “Gibiŋolo koppi kit meno; in kikomi aye ityeko ŋolone.”" 
1Kings20:41 Dano-nu okwanyo kitambara woko oyotoyot ki i waŋe, ci kabaka otugi ŋeyo cut ni en ŋat acel i kin lunebi." 
1Kings20:42 Dano-nu owaco bot kabaka ni, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, Pien in ityeko bwoto dano ma onoŋo an aciko ni myero ginek woko, pienno gibineko in ma kakare, gibineko lwakki bene ma ka lwakke.”" 
1Kings20:43 Kabaka me Icrael odok gaŋ, oo i Camaria ki toncwiny ma wane oballe woko." 
1Kings21:1 Onoŋo Nabot me Jejreel tye ki poto olokke i Jejreel i ŋet cel pa Akab kabaka me Camaria. 
1Kings21:2 Lacen i ŋe lok mutimme-ni, Akab openyo Nabot ni, “Ber imiya poto olokki obed mera, wek apit iye dekka, pien tye cok ki oda; ci abimiyi poto olok mukene ma kakare, maber makato en-nu, nyo ka ce imito abiculo welle ki lim.”" 
1Kings21:3 Ento Nabot ogamo dog Akab ni, “Pe twerre; Rwot pe twero ye ni ami lobo pa kwariwa boti.”" 
1Kings21:4 Akab odok i ode ki kiniga ma waŋe oballe woko pi lok ma Nabot me Jejreel owaco bote-ni; pien onoŋo odok iye bo te ni pe ebimiyo lobo ma eleyo ki bot kwarine. Kabaka ocito obuto piny wi kitandane kun oloko waŋe neno woko, pe ocamo cam mo bene." 
1Kings21:5 Ento ka dakone Jejebel obino bote, openye ni, “Cwinyi ton pi lok aŋo ma ogeŋi wa cam-mi?”" 
1Kings21:6 Akab otitte ni, “Pien nane aloko ki Nabot me Jejreel kun apenye ni omiya poto olokke wek awil ki lim, nyo kono ka en mito ci abimiye poto olok mukene ma kakare. Ci en okwero woko, owacci pe ebimiya poto olokke.”" 
1Kings21:7 Dakone Jejebel ogamo ni, “Pe in aye i loyo Icrael kombeddi bo? A malo icam, wek cwinyi obed mayom. An aye abimiyi poto olok pa Nabot me Jejreel.”" 
1Kings21:8 Ci Jejebel ocoyo waraga ki nyiŋ Akab, omwono kun odiyo agit pa Akab i kom odok; ci ocwalo waraga bot ludoŋo ki ludito mukene ma gibedo bot Nabot i gaŋŋe." 
1Kings21:9 Waragane onoŋo ocoyo kit man ni, “Wucik pi kare me ri kec, ci wucib Nabot obed wi kom me dito i kin lwak." 
1Kings21:10 Ka doŋ wukel lutim aranyi aryo gucuŋ kun gikemo nyime atir, wek gukel kop i kome kun giwacci, ‘In iceno Lubaŋa ki kabaka.’ Ka doŋ wutere woko, wucele ki got wuneke woko.”" 
1Kings21:11 Jo ma i gaŋŋe, ludoŋo ki ludito mukene ma gibedo i gaŋŋe, gutimo kit ma Jejebel ocwalo kwede lok botgi." 
1Kings21:12 Guciko kare me ri kec, ka guketo Nabot i wi kom me dito i kin lwak." 
1Kings21:13 Lubwami aryo gubino gucuŋ gukemo nyime. Gukelo kop i kom Nabot ki i nyim lwak ducu kun giwacci, “Nabot oceno Lubaŋa ki kabaka bene.” Ka gutere woko i ŋe gaŋ, gucele ki got guneke woko." 
1Kings21:14 Ka gucwalo kwena bot Jejebel pi titte ni, “Nabot doŋ gityeko celone woko ki got; doŋ oto.”" 
1Kings21:15 Ka Jejebel owinyo ni Nabot doŋ gicelo woko ki got gineko woko, owaco not Akab ni, HA malo, icam poto olok pa Nabot me Jejreel, ma yam okwero miyone boti wek iwil ki lim-mi; kombeddi Nabot doŋ pe, doŋ oto.”" 
1Kings21:16 Ka Akab owinyo ni Nabot doŋ oto woko, oa malo ocito i poto olok pa Nabot i Jejreel ka camone woko cut." 
1Kings21:17 Lok pa Lubaŋa dok obino bot Elia ma Laticbe ma waco bote ni," 
1Kings21:18 “A malo, icit irwatte ki Akab kabaka me Icrael ma tye i Camaria. Nen, en tye i poto olok pa Nabot." 
1Kings21:19 Ibiwaco bote ni Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘Ineko dano woko ka dok icamo wa potone bene?’ Dok ibiwacce ni, ‘I kabedo ka ma gwogi gunano iye remo pa Nabot, en aye in bene gwogi binano iye remoni.’ ”" 
1Kings21:20 Akab owaco bot Elia ni, “In doŋ inoŋa bo, in lamerokka-ni?” Elia ogamo ni, “An doŋ anoŋi, pien in aye imiyo komi kekeni pi tiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot." 
1Kings21:21 Nen, abikelo can i komi; abiyweyo in woko liweŋ, abineko co woko ducu ma tye boti in Akab, ma i lobo Icrael, opii wa ki anywalli." 
1Kings21:22 Abimiyo odi bedo calo ot pa Jeroboam wod pa Nebat, ma rom bene ki ot pa Baaca wod pa Akija, pi kiniga ma imiyo omaka, dok pien imiyo jo Icrael gubalo." 
1Kings21:23 Dok Rwot owaco lok i kom Jejebel bene kit man ni, ‘Gwogi aye bimwodo kom Jejebel woko i lobo ma i ŋet Jejreel.’" 
1Kings21:24 Dano ma wat pa Akab ma oto i gaŋ, gwogi aye bimwodo komgi, ento dano ma gibito i dye tim ata, winyo aye bicamogi.”" 
1Kings21:25 Pe tye dano mo ma yam omiyo kome kekene pi tiyo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot macalo Akab, ma dakone Jejebel odiye iye ki tek." 
1Kings21:26 Otimo bal me kipyeda marac twatwal pi lubo kor jogi-gu, macalo jo Amor yam gutimo, ma Rwot oryemogi woko ki i nyim jo Icrael-li." 
1Kings21:27 Ka Akab owinyo lok meno, ci oyeco boŋŋine woko, oruko boŋo cola cut i kome, obedo ka wot ma kome odem woko." 
1Kings21:28 Lok pa Rwot dok obino bot Elia ma Laticbe ma waco bo te ni," 
1Kings21:29 “In mono ineno kit ma Akab obedo kwede ka mwolle i nyima? Pien en doŋ omwolle kene i nyima, pe abikelo can i karene kikome; ento i kare pa wode aye abikelo can i kom jo me ode.”" 
1Kings22:1 Jo Ciria ki jo Icrael gubedo mot laboŋo lweny mo i kingi pi mwakaadek. 
1Kings22:2 Ento i mwaka me adekke Yekocapat kaba ka me Juda ocito ka limo kabaka me Icrael. 
1Kings22:3 Kabaka me Icrael owaco bot luticce ni, “Wun mono atika pe wuŋeyo ni Ramot-gilead mewa? Wan waliŋ woko ata, ma pe koŋ wacikwanyo woko ki i ciŋ kabaka me Ciria?”" 
1Kings22:4 Ka dok olokke openyo Yekocapat ni, “In bene ibicito kwedwa ka lweny i kom gaŋ Ramot-gilead?” Yekocapat ogamo dog Akab, kabaka me Icrael, kun wacce ni, “An ki in wan acel. Lwakka aye lwakki, ki aguragurana gin aguragurani bene,”" 
1Kings22:5 Yekocapat owaco bot kabaka me Icrael ni, “Koŋ ikwon penyo lok ki bot Rwot wek wawiny doge.”" 
1Kings22:6 Kabaka Akab ocoko lwak lunebi ducu kacel, ci gucokke miya aŋwen, Owaco botgi ni, “Acit ka lweny i kom Ramot-gilead, nyo pe aciti?” Lunebi gugamo ni, “Tugi cito cut, kabaka, pien Rwot bimiyo i ciŋi.”" 
1Kings22:7 Ento Yekocapat dok owaco ni, “Lanebi mo mukene pa Rwot pe kany, wek koŋ dok wapeny doge?”" 
1Kings22:8 Kabaka me Icrael ogamo dog Yekocapat ni, “Pud tye dano mo ma omyero wapenye wek wawiny dog Rwot ki bote, en Mikaya wod pa Imla; ento cwinya dage matek, pien peya otitta kit lok mo maber, en titta lok maracce keken.” Yekocapat ogamo ni, “Pe kumeno, kabaka, wek lok kit meno obedi.”" 
1Kings22:9 Kabaka me Icrael olwoŋo ladit mo ci owacce ni, “Cit icikel Mikaya wod pa Imla oyotoyot.”" 
1Kings22:10 Onoŋo Akab kabaka me Icrael ki Yekocapat kabaka me Juda gubedo wi komkergi ma guruko jor kergi mabeco; gubedo kwede i laro moyo me dino bel ma i ŋet dogcel ma gidonyo kwede i Camaria, kun lunebi ducu gitye ka tito lok i nyimgi," 
1Kings22:11 Jedekia wod pa Kenaana oyubo cal tuŋ lee ki nyonyo ci owacci, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, ibitwomo jo Ciria kit man macalo dyaŋ twomo wadi ki rune, nio ka ityekogi woko ducu.”" 
1Kings22:12 Lunebi ducu gutito lok ma kit meno kun giwacci, “Tugi cito i Ramot-gilead, kabaka ci ibiloyo; Rwot bimiyo i ciŋi.”" 
1Kings22:13 Lakwena ma ocito ka lwoŋo Mikaya-ni obino owacci, “Nen ba, Mikaya, lok pa lunebi ducu obedo me cuko cwiny kabaka; pienno wek lokki bene obed ma romki megi, lokki bene obed lok me cuko cwiny.”" 
1Kings22:14 Mikaya ogamo doge ni, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, gin ducu ma Rwot owacca, en aye abilokone.”" 
1Kings22:15 Ka Mikaya oo bot kabaka, kabaka openye ni, “Wacit ka lweny i kom Ramot-gilead, nyo pe waciti?” Ogamo ni, “Tugi cito cut, ci ibiloyo; Rwot bimiyo i ciŋi, kabaka.”" 
1Kings22:16 Ento kabaka dok owaco ni, “An mono abiciki i nyiŋ Lubaŋa tyen adi ni ilokka lok me ada keken i nyiŋ Rwot?”" 
1Kings22:17 Ci Mikaya owacci, “Aneno jo Icrael ducu guket woko lijayi i wi godi, macalo romi ma gipe ki lakwat. Dok Rwot bene owacci, ‘Jo-ni laditgi peke; wek ŋat acel acel odok gire i pacone ki kuc.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Kabaka me Icrael owaco bot Yekocapat ni, “An pe onoŋo awacci ni, Mikaya pe bitito lok mo maber ma otika, ento bitito maracce?”" 
1Kings22:19 Mikaya ogamo ni, “Pi meno koŋ dok iwiny lok pa Rwot mono. Abedo ka neno Rwot ma obedo i wi komkerre, kun lwak mony me polo ducu gucuŋ ka ŋete yo tuŋ bade malacuc ki yo tuŋ bade malacam." 
1Kings22:20 Rwot owacci. ‘Aŋa mono ma bibito Akab, wek ocit oto i Ramot-gilead?’ Ci giwaco lok mapatpat." 
1Kings22:21 Lacen kit cwiny mo obino, okato anyim ocuŋ i nyim Rwot kun wacci, ‘An aye abibito.’" 
1Kings22:22 Rwot openye ni, ‘Ibibite niŋniŋ?’ Ogamo ni, ‘Abicito ci abibedo cwiny ma lagoba kun aloko ki i dog lunebine ducu.’ Rwot ogamo ni ‘In ibibite, ci biye lokki. Doŋ icitim kumeno.’" 
1Kings22:23 Kombeddi doŋ inen ka Rwot doŋ otyeko keto cwiny ma lagoba i dog lunebini magi ducu; Rwot doŋ otyeko ciko pi kelo lok marac i komi.” 
1Kings22:24 Jedekia wod pa Kenaana ocito bot Mikaya cok, odoŋo leme ki cine, ci owacci, “Cwiny Rwot dok oa ki i koma niŋniŋ ka okobo oloko boti?”" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaya owaco ni, “Meno ibiniaŋ iye i nino ma ibidonyo i kicika ma i tyelo wek ikanne iye.”" 
1Kings22:26 Kabaka me Icrael owacci, “Wumak Mikaya woko, wudwoke cen bot Amon ma laloyo me gaŋ, ki bot Yoaci wod pa kabaka." 
1Kings22:27 Iciwaco botgi ni, ‘Kabaka owaco kuman ni, Wuket dano man i mabuc, dok wumiye ocam cam me mabuc, mugati ki pii keken, nio ka abidwogo paco ki kuc.’”" 
1Kings22:28 Mikaya ogamo ni, “Ka ce idwogo paco ki kuc, ci pe Rwot aye oloko ki i doga.” Dok owacci, “Wun rok ducu doŋ wuwiny!”" 
1Kings22:29 Kit meno kabaka me Icrael ki Yekocapat kabaka me Juda gucito i Ramot-gilead. 
1Kings22:30 Kabaka me Icrael owaco bot Yekocapat ni, “An abirukke macalo dano mo ata ka doŋ acito ka lweny, ento in iruk jorri me ker.” Kabaka me Icrael orukke macalo dano mo ata, ka ocito kwede i mony." 
1Kings22:31 Onoŋo kabaka me Ciria otyeko ciko ludito mony pyeradek wiye aryo ma giloyo gadigadine me lweny ni, “Pe wulweny ki dano mo matidi nyo madit, kono kabaka me Icrael keken.”" 
1Kings22:32 Ka ludito mony guneno Yekocapat, guwacci, “Meno aye kabaka me Icrael kikome.” Gulokke ka lweny i kome, ci Yekocapat ocako daŋŋe ki mwoc." 
1Kings22:33 Ka ludito mony me gadigadi lweny guniaŋ ni pe en kabaka me Icrael, gulokke gudok woko cen gubwoto lubo kore." 
1Kings22:34 Ento dano mo otelo atumme ocelo ata, ci ocelo kwede kabaka me Icrael atura. Atero obaro kin nyonyo me geŋo kore ki nyonyc mukene me geŋo kome ma obedo macalo pok rec. Kabaka owaco bot laryem gadigadine ni, “Lokke idok cen wek ikwanya woko ki i wan lweny, pien ret otyeko maka woko.”" 
1Kings22:35 Lweny odoko malyet i nino meno, dok lutic pa Akab gubedo ka jeŋo kome i gadigadine kun wane okemo jo Ciria nio wa otyeno, ka oto. Remo me wan rette omol piny i te gadigadi," 
1Kings22:36 I kare ma cen doŋ cok poto, dano gucako daŋŋe kun dwangi oromo dye mony ducu ni, “Dano acel acel odok i gaŋŋe. Dano acel acel odok wa i lobone!”" 
1Kings22:37 Kabaka Akab oto kit meno, ci gitero kome i Camaria, giyiko kunnu." 
1Kings22:38 Gulwoko kom gadigadine i kut me Camaria, ci gwogi gunaŋo remone, ki lukwele bene gulwokke iye, kit ma Rwot owaco-ni." 
1Kings22:39 Lok kom Akab mudoŋŋe ducu, ki gin ducu ma en otiyo, ki ot ma en ogero ma odeyo ki lak lyec, ki lwak gaŋi ducu ma en ogero, gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Icrael." 
1Kings22:40 Kit meno Akab oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine. Wode Akajia aye oleyo ka tyene." 
1Kings22:41 Yekocapat wod pa Aca ocako loyo jo Juda i mwaka me aŋwen me loc pa Akab kabaka me Icrael. 
1Kings22:42 Yekocapat ocamo ker ma onoŋo mwaka me ditte romo pyeradek wiye abic, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyeraryo wiye abic. Nyiŋ minne Ajuba ma nya pa Cilki," 
1Kings22:43 Yekocapat obedo ka lubo kit pa wonne Aca ducu; pe olokke oweko lubo kore, Obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen atir i wan Rwot. Ento wan jogi ma i wi godi pe gimuko woko; dano pud gityero gitumgi i wan jogi, dok giwaŋo iye odok eceta." 
1Kings22:44 Yekocapat oketo kuc bene i kin en ki kabaka me Icrael. 
1Kings22:45 Lok kom Yekocapat mudoŋŋe ducu, ki tekke, ki kit ma olwenyo kwede gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Juda." 
1Kings22:46 Ki awobe ma lutim kwele i kom awobe wadgi i wan jogi ma yam pud odoŋ i kare pa wonne Aca, en oryemogi woko ki i lobone." 
1Kings22:47 I kare ca onoŋo kabaka pe i Edom. Lawaŋ kabaka me Juda aye obedo macalo kabakagi. 
1Kings22:48 Yekocapat omiyo gipayo lwak mel madoŋo me cito i Opir pi omo jabu-gu; ento pe gucito, pien mel gutur woko ducu i Ejion-geber." 
1Kings22:49 Lacen Akajia wod pa Akab owaco bot Yekocapat ni, “Wek luticca gucit kacel ki luticci i melli,” ento Yekocapat okwero gire woko," 
1Kings22:50 Yekocapat oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyike kacel ki kwarine i gaŋ kai pa Daudi. Wode Jekoram aye oleyo ka tyene." 
1Kings22:51 Akajia wod pa Akab ocako loyo jo Icrael ki i Camaria i mwaka me apar wiye abiro me loc pa Yekocapat kabaka me Juda, ci obedo ka loyo jo Icrael pi mwaka aryo," 
1Kings22:52 Obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot, kun bedo ka lubo kit pa wonne ki kit pa minne, ki kit pa Jeroboam wod ‘Pa Nebat, ma yam omiyo jo Icrael gubalo." 
1Kings22:53 Oworo jok Baal, otiyo bote, dok omiyo kiniga omako Rwot Lubaŋa me Icrael kun lubo kit ducu ma yam wonne otiyo kwede." 
2Kings1:1 I kare ma Akab oto, jo Moab gucako jemo woko i kom Icrael." 
2Kings1:2 I kare-nu Akajia opoto piny ki i waŋ dirica ki i kicikane mamalo ma i Camaria, odoko two ma obuto kwede piny; omiyo ocwalo lukwena, kun waco botgi ni, “Wucit wucipeny dog Baaljebub, lubaŋa pa jo Ekron, ni nyo abicaŋ ki two man.”" 
2Kings1:3 Ento lamalaika pa Rwot owaco ki Elia ma Laticbe ni, “A malo, wek icit icirom ki lukwena pa kabaka me Camaria” ci iwac botgi ni, ‘Wutimo kuman ni Lubaŋa mo pe i Icrael, mumiyo wucito ka penyo dog Baal-jebub, ma lubaŋa pa jo Ekron-ni?’" 
2Kings1:4 Pi kit tim man, Rwot owacci, ‘In pe ibia malo ki i wi kitanda ma ibuto iye-ni, ento ibito woko adada.’ ” Elia ocako cito woko." 
2Kings1:5 Lukwena gudok bot kabaka, ci openyogi ni, “Piŋo wudwogo cen?”" 
2Kings1:6 Gugamo ni, “Dano mo obino oromo kwedwa i yo, ci owacowa ni, ‘Wudok cen bot kabaka ma oorowu-ni, wuciwacce ni, Rwot owaco kuman ni, Itimo kuman ni Lubaŋa mo pe i Icrael, mumiyo icwalo ni gipeny dog Baaljebub, ma lubaŋa pa jo Ekron-ni? Pi kit tim man, omiyo in pe ibia malo ki i wi kitanda ma ibuto iye-ni, ento ibito woko adada.’’’" 
2Kings1:7 En openyogi ni, “Dano ma orwatte kwedwu-ni obedo niŋniŋ ma olokowu lok magi-ni?”" 
2Kings1:8 Gugamo ni, “En oruko ginaruka ma obedo yeryer, kun otweyo pyere ki del.” Ci ogamo ni, “Meno en Elia Laticbe.”" 
2Kings1:9 Kabaka dok ocwalo ladit me mony ma loyo jo pyerabic kacel, ki jone pyerabic. En ocito bot Elia, ma onoŋo obedo malo i wi got, ci owacce ni, “Ai dano pa Lubaŋa, kabaka owacci, ‘Ilor piny.’ ”" 
2Kings1:10 Ento Elia ogamo dog ladit me mony ma loyo jo pyerabic-ci ni, “Ka an aye a dano pa Lubaŋa, wek mac oa ki malo i polo owaŋ in woko kacel ki joni pyerabic-ci ducu.” Ci mac oa malo ki i polo owaŋo en ki jone pyerabic-ci ducu." 
2Kings1:11 Kabaka dok ocwalo ladit me mony ma loyo jo pyerabic kacel ki jone pyerabic. Ocito bot Elia owacce ni, “Ai dano pa Lubaŋa, man aye cik pa kabaka ni, ‘Ilor piny oyotoyot.’’’" 
2Kings1:12 Ento Elia odok iye ki gin ni, “Ka ce an a dano pa Lubaŋa, wek mac aa ki malo i polo opot i komwu owaŋwu woko ducu, in kacel ki joni pyerabicci.” Ci mac pa Lubaŋa oa ki malo i polo owaŋo en ki jone pyerabic-ci ducu." 
2Kings1:13 Kabaka dok ocwalo ladit me mony me adekke ma loyo dano pyerabic, kacel ki jone. Ci ladit me adekke ma loyo jo pyerabic ocito. Ka oo, ci opoto orumo coŋe piny i nyim Elia, obako doge bote ni, “Ai dano pa Lubaŋa, alegi ni, pe ineka kacel ki joni pyerabicci, piwa obed tek ki in," 
2Kings1:14 Pien, nen, mac oa ki i polo ci obino piny, owaŋo ludito mony aryo mukwoŋo-ni ducu kacel ki jogi ma giloyo pyerabic-ci; ento in iwek, pi kwena obed tekki.”" 
2Kings1:15 Lamalaika pa Rwot owaco bot Elia ni, “Lworo pe omaki i kome, Lor piny icit kwede.” Omiyo en ocito owoto kacel kwede bot kabaka," 
2Kings1:16 ci owacce ni, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘Pien icwalo lukwena ka penyo dog Baal-jebub, lubaŋa pa jo Ekron, itimo kumeno ni Lubaŋa pe i Icrael bo, mumiyo ipenyo doge-ni? En aye lok mumi yo pe ibia ki i wi kitandani ma it ye iye-ni, ento in ibito woko adada.’ ”" 
2Kings1:17 Akajia oto woko kit macalo Rwot oloko ki i dog Elia-ni, Jekoram ma ominne aye odoko kabaka ma oleyo ka tyene, i mwaka me aryo me loc pa Tekoram wod pa Yekocapat, kabaka me Juda, pien onoŋo Akajia pe tye ki wode mo." 
2Kings1:18 Lok kom Akajia mudoŋŋe ducu, ma en otiyo, gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Icrael." 
2Kings2:1 I kare ma Rwot doŋ mito tero Elia woko i polo ki lapiru, onoŋo Elia ki Elica gitye i wotgi nia ki i Gilgal." 
2Kings2:2 Elia owaco bot Elica ni, “Alegi ni koŋ ibed kany; pien Rwot otyeko cwala woko wa i Betel.” Ento Elica ogamo ni, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, macalo in kikomi bene itye makwo-ni, an pe abibwoti.” Kit meno gucako wot wa i Betel." 
2Kings2:3 Lwak lunebi ma yam gitye i Betel gucito bot Elica guwacce ni, “In mono iŋeyo ni tin Rwot bikwanyo rwodi ki boti ci tero woko?” En ogamo ni, “Iyo, aŋeyo lokke; doŋ Wuliŋ mot.”" 
2Kings2:4 Elia owacce ni, “Elica, alegi ni koŋ ibed kany, pien Rwot otyeko cwala woko wa i Jeriko.” Elica ogamo ni, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, dok macalo in bene kikomi it ye makwoni, an pe abibwoti.” Kit meno gubino wa i Jeriko," 
2Kings2:5 Lwak lunebi ma gitye i Jeriko gubino bot Elica cok, guwacce ni, “In mono iŋeyo ni tin Rwot bi kwanyo rwodi ki boti ci tero woko?” En ogamo ni. “Iyo, aŋeyo lokke; doŋ Wuliŋ mot.”" 
2Kings2:6 Elia dok owacce ni, “Alegi ni koŋ ibed kany; pien Rwot ocwala wa i Jordan.” En ogamo ni, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, dok macalo in bene kikomi it ye makwo-ni, pe abibwoti.” Kit meno gin aryo ducu gumedde ki wot kacel." 
2Kings2:7 Lwak lunebi pyerabic bene guwoto kacel kwedgi, ci gucuŋ ki cen ka mabor ki gin, ka pud gin aryo ducu gucuŋ i dog Jordan," 
2Kings2:8 Elia okwanyo boŋone kikome, odolo woko, ogoyo ki pii, ci pii iye opokke woko aryo tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi nio ka gin aryo ducu gukato ki i nom mutwo," 
2Kings2:9 Ka gutyeko ŋolo loka tuŋcel, Elia owaco bot Elica ni, “Leg gin ma abitimo piri, ma peya gikwanya woko ki boti.” Elica owacci, “Alegi, imiya ale kit cwinyi-ni adod tyen aryo.”" 
2Kings2:10 Elia ogamo ni, “Ilego gin matek; ento ka ce ibedo ka neno an i kare ma gitiŋa nia ki boti-ni, ci bibedo boti kit meno; ento ka ce pe inena, ci pe bibedo kit meno,”" 
2Kings2:11 Ka onoŋo pud giwoto kun giloko, ci nen, gadigadi me mac ki aguragura opoko kingi gin aryo-ni woko, Elia ocako ci to woko malo i polo ki lapiru madit-ti," 
2Kings2:12 Elica oneno ci okok ni, “Wora, wora do! gadigadi pa Icrael ki wegi aguragurane!” Pe dok omedo ki neno kome. En omako boŋone kikome oyeco woko i dul aryo." 
2Kings2:13 Ka okwanyo boŋo pa Elia ma opoto piny mua ki i kome-ni, odok kwede cen ci ocuŋ i dog Jordan." 
2Kings2:14 Okwanyo boŋo pa Elia ma opoto ki i kome-ni, ocako goyo ki pii, kun wacci, “Rwot Lubaŋa pa Elia tye kwene?” Ka otyeko goyo pii, ci pii iye opokke yo tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi; Elica owoto i dyere, oŋolo loka kulu." 
2Kings2:15 Ka lwak lunebi ma onoŋo gitye i Jeriko guneno en okato loka tuŋ botgi, ci guwacci, “Cwiny ma yam tye i kom Elia otyeko gamo Elica.” Gubino ka romo kwede, ci guguŋo piny i nyime." 
2Kings2:16 Giwacce ni, “Nen, wan luticci watye ki jo matego pyerabic. Walego icwalgi gucit ka yenyo rwodi; gwok nyo Cwiny pa Rwot otiŋe ci obole woko wa i got nyo i nota-gu.” En ogamo ni, “Pe wubicwalogi.”" 
2Kings2:17 Ento ka gubedo ka dido en nio ka lewic omake, owacci, “Wucwalgi.” Ci gucwalo jo pyerabic; gubedo ka yenyo Elia pi nino adek ci pe gunoŋo kome," 
2Kings2:18 Gudwogo bot Elica i kare ma en pud tye i Jeriko, ci owaco botgi ni, “An pe nene awacciwu ni, Pe wuciti?”" 
2Kings2:19 Jo ma i gaŋ meno guwaco bot Elica ni, “Nen ba, gaŋ man tye-i kabedo maber ma yomo cwiny, kit ma in laditwa ineno-ni, Ento piine aye rac, ki lobone bene mi yo i mon poto woko.’" 
2Kings2:20 En owacci, “Wukella awal kwon manyen, ci wuony iye kado.” Ci gucako kelone bote." 
2Kings2:21 En ocito wa i wan pii ci oonyo iye kado-nu, kun wacci, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, An doŋ atyeko yubo wan pii man odoko maleŋ; pe doŋ bikelo to, pe miyo i mon poto.”" 
2Kings2:22 Kit meno pii ocako doko maleŋ nio wa onyoo, kit macalo yam Elica olokoni." 
2Kings2:23 En ocito wa i Betel; i kare ma en tye ka wot i wanayo, litino awobe gua ki i gaŋ gubino gucako nyware, kun giwacci, “Cit malo, lawiye otal: Cit malo, lawiye otal.”" 
2Kings2:24 Ka olokke onenogi, ocenogi i nyiŋ Rwot. Ci ŋuu ma mon aryo gukatti ki i buŋa ci gukilo kom awobe pyeraŋwen wiye aryo." 
2Kings2:25 Ka oa ki kunnu ci ocito wa i got Karmel, ka oa ki kunnu odok i Camaria." 
2Kings3:1 I mwaka me apar wiye aboro me ker pa Yekocapat kabaka me Juda, en aye Jekoram wod pa Akab ocamo iye ker me loyo Icrael i Camaria, ci obedo ka loc pi mwaka apar wiye aryo." 
2Kings3:2 Otiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot, kadi pe obedo marom ki pa wonne ki pa minne, pien koŋ omuko wir me woro Baal ma yam wonne otiyo-ni." 
2Kings3:3 Ento en bene pe oweko kit bal pa Jeroboam wod pa Nebat, ma omiyo jo Icrael gubalo-ni; en pe oweko lubone." 
2Kings3:4 I kare meno onoŋo Meca kabaka me Moab tye ki romi ma gunya mapol; en yam bedo ka miyo romi alip miya acel bot kabaka me Icrael, ki yer nyogi romi alip miya acel, mwaka ki mwaka." 
2Kings3:5 Ento ka Akab oto, ci kabaka me Moab ojemo woko i kom kabaka me Icrael." 
2Kings3:6 Omiyo kabaka Jekoram otiŋŋe oa ki i Camaria i kare meno, ci ocoko jo Icrael ducu pi lweny." 
2Kings3:7 Ka ocito ci ocwalo lok bot Yekocapat kabaka me Juda ni, “Kabaka me Moab ojemo woko i koma; ibicito ka lweny kweda i kom jo Moab?” En ogamo ni, “Abicito, an ki in wan acel, lwakka gin aye lwakki, ki aguragurana gin aye aguragurani bene.”" 
2Kings3:8 Dok owacci, “Wabiwot walubo yo mene?” Jekoram ogamo ni, “Wabilubo yo makemo i tim me Edom.”" 
2Kings3:9 Kit meno kaba ka me Icrael ocako cito kacel ki kabaka me Juda ki kabaka me Edom. Ka gubedo ka gono piny pi wot me nino abiro, pii mo pe ononne pi mony kadi pi lee ma gimol i korgi ki yec." 
2Kings3:10 Kabaka me Icrael owacci, “Maa do! Rwot doŋ okelo luker magi adek-ki pi miyogi i ciŋ jo Moab.”" 
2Kings3:11 Yekocapat owacci, “Lanebi pa Lubaŋa mo pe kany, wek wapeny dog Rwot ki bote?” Ci ŋat acel i kom lutic pa kabaka me Icrael ogamo ni, “El ica wod pa Capat aye tye kany, ma yam liyo pii i ciŋ Elia-nu." 
2Kings3:12 Yekocapat owacci, “En tye ki lok pa Rwot.” Ci kabaka me Icrael ki Yekocapat ki kabaka me Edom gucito wa bote." 
2Kings3:13 Elica owaco bot kabaka me Icrael ni, “An atimmi gin aŋo? In icit bot lunebi pa woru ki lunebi pa meni.” Ento kabaka me Icrael owacce ni, “Pe kumeno; pien Rwot aye olwoŋo luker magi adek-ki pi miyogi woko i ciŋ jo Moab.”" 
2Kings3:14 Elica ogamo ni, “Macalo Rwot me mony tye makwo-ni, ma atiyo pire-ni, kono nene pe aparo pi Yekocapat kabaka me Juda, kono pe abolo waŋa i komi, kadi wa neno in," 
2Kings3:15 Ento wukella lago-opuk.” Ka lagoopuk ocako goyone, ci tek pa Rwot oyido i kome." 
2Kings3:16 Owacci, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘Abimiyo laora kulu man mutwe-ni pii poŋ iye.’" 
2Kings3:17 Pien Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘Wun pe wubineno yamo ki kot-gu, ento laora kulu aye pii bipoŋ iye, ci wubimato, wun, ki dyaŋiwu ki leewu.’" 
2Kings3:18 Man gin mayot ki bot Rwot; en bimiyo jo Moab bene i ciŋwu," 
2Kings3:19 ci wubiloyo gaŋi ma girumo ki cel gogo, ki gaŋi ducu ma ŋene, wubireto yadi mabeco ducu, wubiculo wan pii woko ducu, wubalo lobo maber-ri kun wucoro iye godi.”" 
2Kings3:20 Orwone i kare me odiko, i kom cawa me tyero gitum, nen, pii obino oa ki yo tuŋ Edom, nio ka pii opoŋo lobo woko ducu." 
2Kings3:21 Ka jo Moab ducu guwinyo ni luker gubino ka lweny i komgi, ci gulwoŋo jo ducu ma gitwero ruko jami lweny i komgi, cakke i kom jo matino nio kwede wa i kom ludito, ci guryeyo i wan lobo." 
2Kings3:22 Ka gua malo odiko con, ci cen oryeny i kom pii, jo Moab guneno pii ma okemogi nen calo remo." 
2Kings3:23 Guwacci, “Man remo; luker gubedo ka lweny kacel, ci gunekke woko kekengi. Iyo, jo Moab, wucak yako jami?”" 
2Kings3:24 Ento ka gubino i gony pa jo Icrael, ci jo Icrael ducu gutwarre malo ka lweny i kom jo Moab, ci guriŋo woko ki i nyimgi; gumedde anyim ki neko jo Moab ma giriŋo-ni." 
2Kings3:25 Gumako gaŋi woko, ki potti mabeco ducu bene dano acel acel obolo iye got, nio ka godi opoŋo pmy woko; guculo wan pii woko ducu gureto yadi mabeco ducu; nio ka godi keken aye odoŋ i Kir-karecet, ci lucel latandiyo gurumo gaŋ meno nio ka guloyo." 
2Kings3:26 Ka kabaka me Moab oneno ni mony doŋ ogeto marac i kome ci ocito ki wegi pala lucwan miya abiro pi baro dye mony, ma okemo kabaka me Edom; ci pe gutwero." 
2Kings3:27 En omako wode maditte ma onoŋo bileyo ka tyene-ni, ci otyero en me bedo gitum awaŋa i kom cel murumo gaŋ. Omiyo akemo madwoŋ opoto i kom io Icrael; ci gua gudok cen i lobogi." 
2Kings4:1 I kare meno dako mo acel ma i kin mon pa lunebi ocito okok bot Elica ni, “Cwara ma laticci oto woko; in bene iŋeyo ni laticci yam lworo Rwot, ento won banya obino ka mako litino awobena aryo wek gubed opiine.”" 
2Kings4:2 Elica owacce ni, “Abitimmi kit gin aŋo? Titta; gin aŋo ma it ye kwede i odi?” En ogamo ni, “Pe atye ki gin mo i ot, ladit, kono nyo ablrtomoo aye tye.”" 
2Kings4:3 Dok owacce ni, “Cit woko ka lego agulu pa luwoti ducu, ikel ma igi noŋo, kel mapolpol." 
2Kings4:4 Ka idony i ot, ci ilor doggola iceg wii ki wi litino awobeni woko i ot, ka iony moo i lwak agulu meno ducu; ka ce acel acel opoŋ, ci iket ocuŋ cen.”" 
2Kings4:5 Dako-nu ocito ci oloro doggola, ocego wiye ki wi litino awobene aryo; ka en tye ka onyo moo i igi ci gin gikelo agulu mukene bote." 
2Kings4:6 Ka agulu ducu opoŋ woko, ci owaco bot wode ni, “Kella agulu mukene.” Ogamo ni, “Mukene doŋ peke.” Moo ocako gik woko ma pe dok mol." 
2Kings4:7 En obino otito bot dano pa Lubaŋa, en ogamo ni, “Cit icicat moo wek icul banyani woko, ci wek in ki litino awobeni wukonnye ki mudoŋŋe.”" 
2Kings4:8 I nino mo acel Elica ocito wa i Cunem ka ma dako mo ma lalonyo bedo iye; ci dako-nu olege ni ocam bote. Lacen i kare ducu ma en wok ki kenyo, en ŋak koŋ ca mo kunnu." 
2Kings4:9 Dako-nu owaco bot cware ni, “Nen ba, aniaŋ atika ni dano man en dano maleŋ pa Lubaŋa, ma en bedo ka wirre i yowa jwijwi." 
2Kings4:10 Wek wagerre latin kicika mo i wi ot, ci waket iye kitanda mo pire ki meja, ki kom, ki mac tara, ce ka en bino botwa, wek ocit obed iye.”" 
2Kings4:11 I nino mo acel, en ocito kunnu ci odonyo i kicika ocako ywe iye." 
2Kings4:12 Owaco bot laticce Gikaji ni, “Cilwonna Lacunem man.” Ka olwone, ci ocuŋ i nyime." 
2Kings4:13 Owacce ni, “Wacce ni, Nen, ibedo ki ayela man ducu piwa; gin aŋo ma myero atimmi? In it ye ki lok mo ma imito atit bot kabaka nyo ladit ma loyo mony?” En ogamo ni, “An abedo gira i kin lutuwa.”" 
2Kings4:14 Elica openyo ni, “Dok gin aŋo ma gitim pire?” Gikaji ogamo ni, “En pe tye ki wode mo, ki cware bene doŋ oti woko.”" 
2Kings4:15 Owacce ni, “Lwoŋe.” Ka olwoŋe, en ocuŋ i doggola." 
2Kings4:16 Ci owacce ni, “I mwaka ca ka onyoo, ka kare oromo, ci ibitiŋo wodi i kori.” En ogamo ni, “Pe kumeno, rwoda, ai dano pa Lubaŋa; pe ibwol aŋecani ba.”" 
2Kings4:17 Ento dako-nu ogamo ic, ci onywalo wode i kare meno kikome, i mwaka ma olubo-ni, kit macalo yam Elica owaco bote." 
2Kings4:18 Ka latin odoŋo, ci i nino mo acel ocito bot wonne i kin lukac," 
2Kings4:19 ci owaco bot wonne rii, “Ai, wiya do, wiya do!” Wonne owaco bot laticce ni, “Tiŋ itere bot minne.”" 
2Kings4:20 Ka otine ci otere bot minne. Latin obedo i em minne nie i dyeceŋ abwora, ci oto woko." 
2Kings4:21 Ci dako oa ocito opyelo i wi kitanda pa dano pa Lubaŋa-ni, ka oloro wiye woko i ot, ci ocito woko." 
2Kings4:22 Olwoŋo cware, owacci, “Cwalla laticci mo acel ki kana mo acel, wek acit bot dano pa Lubaŋa oyot, ka adwogi.”" 
2Kings4:23 Ogamo ni, “Piŋo icito wa bote tin? Pien dwe peya opor, kadi cabit bene pudi.” En ogamo ni, “Bibedo ber.”" 
2Kings4:24 Gitweyo kom i ŋe kana, ci dako owaco bot laticce ni, “Wek kana oriŋ, pe icuŋ nio ka awacci.”" 
2Kings4:25 En ocako a ocito bot dano pa Lubaŋa wa i got Karmel. Ka dano pa Lubaŋa oneno en bino, owaco bot laticce Gikaji ni, “Nen, Lacunem loka ca;" 
2Kings4:26 riŋ oyot icirom kwede, ci ipenye ni, Itye maber? Cwari tye maber? Latin tye maber?” Dako-nu ogamo ni, “Tye maber.”" 
2Kings4:27 Ka obino i wi got bot dano pa Lubaŋa, ci opoto omako tyene. Gikaji obino ka cwale woko cen. Ento dano pa Lubaŋa ojuke ni, “Wek en obedi, pien tye ki can madwoŋ i cwinye; ento Rwot okano lokke woko bota, pe otitta.”" 
2Kings4:28 Dako owacci, “An yam alegi pi latin laco mo, rwoda? Yam pe awacci, pe ibwola?”" 
2Kings4:29 Elica owaco bot Gikaji ni, “A malo, itwe pyeri, ci ikwany odoona imak i ciŋi, wek iciti. Ka iromo ki dano mo, pe imote; ka dano mo omoti, pe igam doge; cit iciket odoona ipyel i wan latin.”" 
2Kings4:30 Min latin dok owacci, “Kit macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, macalo in bene it ye makwo-ni, pe abibwoto in,” En bene oa ocako lubo kor dako-nu." 
2Kings4:31 Gikaji ocito mere anyim, ci oketo odoo i wan latin, ento gin mo pe otimme kadi wa kit gin ma nyuto ni kwo. Omiyo odok cen ka romo kwede iyo, ci otitte ni, “Latin peya oco.”" 
2Kings4:32 Ka Elica obino i ot, oneno latin obuto i wi kitandane ma oto woko." 
2Kings4:33 En odonyo oloro doggola woko i wigi gin aryo, ocako lego Rwot." 
2Kings4:34 Dok oa malo ocito obuto i kom latin, kun keto doge i dog latin, ki waŋe bene oketo i waŋ latin, ki bade bene opyelo i bad latin, kun ryene i kome, ci kom latin odoko lyet," 
2Kings4:35 Dok oa malo, ocako woto kun wirre i dye ot tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi, ka oryene i kome; latin ocako jiro tyen abiro, ci oyabo waŋe," 
2Kings4:36 Ka olwoŋo Gikaji owacce ni, “Lwoŋ Lacunem man,” Ocito olwoŋe. Ka obino bote, ci owacci, “Gam wodi eno,”" 
2Kings4:37 Dako-nu obino opoto ka tyene, orumo coŋe piny i nom; ci otiŋo latinne ocito woko." 
2Kings4:38 Elica dok ocito i Gilgal i kare ma kec tye i lobo. Ka yam lwak lunebi gubedo i nyime, owaco bot laticce ni, “Cib agulu madit i keno, wek ited dek ki lwak lunebi-ni.”" 
2Kings4:39 Ŋat acel ocito i poto ka ŋwedo dek, ci onoŋo agaba me tim, opwono nyige poŋ kanyi ma odolo, ci obino onwero oketo i agulu dek kun pe ŋeyo kitgi." 
2Kings4:40 Ka gitoko wek jo-nu gucam, ka gitye ka camo dek-ku, ci gudamje matek ni, “Ai dano pa Lubaŋa, yat to aye tye i agulu-ni!” Ci camone oloyogi woko." 
2Kings4:41 Elica ogamo ni, “Wukel moko kwon.” Ci oonyo i agulu, kun wacci, “Tok dek ki jo-nu gucam.” Ci gin marac mo pe dok onen i agulu." 
2Kings4:42 Laco mo onoŋo oa ki i Baal-calica, okelo kwon me wi mwaka bot dano pa Lubaŋa, mugati cayiri pyeraryo, ki wit kal manyen i kicaane. Elica owacci, “Mi ki jo-nu wek gucam.”" 
2Kings4:43 Ento laticce ogamo ni, “Man abiketo i nyim jo miya acel-li niŋniŋ?” En onwoyo waco ni, “Migi bot jo-nu, wek gucam, pien Rwot aye owaco kuman ni, ‘Gibicamo ci giweko mogo doŋ.’ ”" 
2Kings4:44 Ci oketo i nyimgi, Gucamo, guweko mogo odoŋ, kit macalo Rwot owaco-ni." 
2Kings5:1 Naaman, ladit me mony me Ciria, en yam dano madit i nyim rwode dok ma giworo, pien Rwot omiyo Ciria obedo ka loyo lweny pi Naaman. En yam twon oteka lweny madit, ento onoŋo en ladobo." 
2Kings5:2 I kare-nu onoŋo mony pa jo Ciria oyako latin nyako mo ki i lobo Icrael, ci odoko aŋeca pa dako Naaman." 
2Kings5:3 En owaco bot min ot ni, “Kono nene rwoda tye cok ki lanebi ma tye i Camaria ca, kono ocaŋo two dobone woko.”" 
2Kings5:4 Kit meno omiyo Naaman ocito otito bot kabaka ni, “Aŋeca ma oa ki i lobo Icrael owaco kuman.”" 
2Kings5:5 Kabaka me Ciria ogamo ni, “Cit doŋ, an abicwalo waraga bot kabaka me Icrael.” En ocako cito, otero ryal ma romo talanta apar, ki jabu ma romo cekel alip abicel, ki boŋŋi me nino madito apar." 
2Kings5:6 Okelo waraga bot kabaka me Icrael, ma kwanne calo man ni, “Ka waraga man oo boti, ber iŋe ni acwalo laticca Naaman boti, wek in ican two dobone.”" 
2Kings5:7 Ka kabaka me Icrael okwano waraga-nu, ci oyeco boŋone kun wacci, “An aye Lubaŋa bo, ma neko dano ka dok cero woko-ni, en aye omiyo dano man ocwalo lok bota pi caŋo two dobo pa laco man? Koŋ wutam, ka dok wunen ni en tye ka yenyo kolo i koma.”" 
2Kings5:8 Ento ka Elica ma dano pa Lubaŋa lwoŋo nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋane, ka kwato owinyo ni kabaka me Icrael oyeco boŋone woko, ci ocwalo lok bot kabaka kun wacci, “Piŋo iyeco boŋoni woko? Wek en obin bota kombeddi, wek oneni lanebi tye i Icrael.”" 
2Kings5:9 Kit meno Naaman ocito bote ki aguragurane ducu ki gadigadi monnye, ci ocuŋ i doggola ot pa Elica." 
2Kings5:10 Elica ocwalo kwena bote kun wacci, “Cit icilwokke i kulu Jordan tyen abiro, ci komi biroc dok kakare, dok komi bilony.”" 
2Kings5:11 Ento kiniga omako Naaman, ocako cito woko kun wacci, “Nen, onoŋo atamo ni en bikato woko wa bota, ka cun, lwoŋo nyiŋ Rwot Lubuŋane, ka kwato ciŋe i koma ka ma lit-ti, ka caŋo two dobo woko." 
2Kings5:12 Kulu Abana ki Parpar ma gitye i Damaciko pe gibeco makato lwak pii ma tye i Icrael ducu? Kono nene pe alwokke i piigi ci koma bedo leŋ?” Ocako lokke ci ocito woko ki akeca madwoŋ. 
2Kings5:13 Ento luticce gucito bote cok, guwacce ni, “Wora, ka nene lanebi owacci pi tiyo gin mo madit, kono pe itiyo? Man do twara ka owacci ni, ‘Lwokke, wek komi olony.’ ”" 
2Kings5:14 En ocako cito ci olutte i kulu Jordan tyen abiro, kit ma dano pa Lubaŋa owaco-ni; ci kome ocako roc odok kakare macalo kom latin lakere, ci olonnye." 
2Kings5:15 En odok bot dano pa Lubaŋa, en ki lwakke ducu, obino ci ocuŋ i nyime, owacci, “Nen, an doŋ aŋeyo ni Lubaŋa mo pe i lobo ducu, kono i Icrael keken; ci ber doŋ igam mot pa laticci.”" 
2Kings5:16 Elica owacci, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, ma atiyo pire-ni, pe abigamo gin mo.” Naaman obedok a diyo en ni ogam, ento Elica okwero woko." 
2Kings5:17 Naaman dok owacci, “Ka ikwero, ci alegi ni, wek gimi bota lobo ma kana aryo gitwero yeyo, pien nia tin, rwoda, pe abityero gitum awaŋa nyo gitum mukene bot lubaŋa mo, kono bot Rwot keken." 
2Kings5:18 Pi lok man Rwot myero otima kica: ka ce laditta bicito jwijwi i ot pa Rimmon ka worone kunnu, ma kun noŋo ojeŋo cine i bada, ki an bene noŋo akulle piny kekena i ot pa Rimmon, ka ce onoŋo akulle kekena i ot pa Rimmon, ci Rwot myero otima kica i kom lok man.”" 
2Kings5:19 En owacce ni, “Doŋ icit ki kuc.” Ento ka Naaman owoto ocito ka ma borbor, manok mo," 
2Kings5:20 ci Gikaji latic pa Elica ma dano pa Lubaŋa-ni owacci, “Nen, ka rwoda oweko Naaman Laciria-ni, pe omedo ki gamo gin ma okelo-ni ki i cine, Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, abiriŋo i kore, wek anoŋ gin mo ki bote.”" 
2Kings5:21 Kit meno Gikaji ocako lubo kor Naaman. Ka Naaman oneno ŋatti mo ma riŋo i kore, ci opye piny ki i wi gadigadine pi rwatte kwede kun penyo ni, “Lok mo tye?”" 
2Kings5:22 En ogamo ni, “Lok mo peke. Rwoda ocwala ka wacci ni, ‘Kombeddi awobe aryo mogo ma gin lunebi gubino bota ma gua wa i lobo godi me Epraim; alego ni, imi botgi talanta me ryal ki boŋo aryo me nino madito.’’’" 
2Kings5:23 Naaman ogamo ni, “Ber igam talanta aryo.” Dok orido en matek, omiyo otweyo talanta aryo me ryal i kicaa aryo, ki boŋo aryo me mno madito, ci omiyo luticce aryo guyeyo, gutiŋo gutelo nyim Gikaji." 
2Kings5:24 Ka oo i wi got, ci okwanyo woko ki i ciŋgi, ocako ketogi i ot; ka ocwalo jo meno woko, ci gucito." 
2Kings5:25 Ka odonyo i ot, ocuŋ nyim rwode, Elica openye ni, Gikaji In ibedo kwene?” En ogamo doge ni, “Laticci pe ocito ka mo.”" 
2Kings5:26 Ento Elica owacce ni, “Tipo koma ocito kwedi wa i kare ma laco meno odwogo boti nia ki i wi aguragura pi rwatte kwedi. Meno pe en aye kare ma myero giga miye lim ki ginaruka-gu, ki poto jeitum ki poto olok, ki romi ki twoni-guiki opii ki aneca-gu." 
2Kings5:27 Pienno dobo pa Naaman bikobo i komi ki i kom likwayi matwal.’ Kit meno en okato woko ki i nyime ma ladobo, ma kome oruko woko matar macalo pee." 
2Kings6:1 I kare-nu lwak pa lunebi gukok bot Elica ni, “Nen, kabedo ma wabedo iye i te locci-ni tidi mo, pe romowa." 
2Kings6:2 Wek waciti wa i Jordan wek dano acel acel onoŋ yat ki kunnu, wek wayub kabedowa kunnu.” Elica ogamo ni. “Citu.”" 
2Kings6:3 Dano mo acel ma kingi owacci, “Kono obedo ber ka in icito kwedwa wan luticci.” Ogamo ni, “Abicito.”" 
2Kings6:4 En ocako cito kwedgi. Ka guo I Jordan, gutoŋo lwak yadi woko." 
2Kings6:5 Ento ka dano mo acel tye ka togo yat, latoŋŋe oput woko opoto i pii, ci odaŋŋe’ matek ni, “Maa do, rwoda! Pien alego bot dano mo.”" 
2Kings6:6 Dano pa Lubaŋa owacci, “Opoto ki kakwene?” Ka onyutte kakare,’ ci otoŋo yat mo, obolo i pii kunnu, omiyo latoŋ ocako kwan wi pii." 
2Kings6:7 Owacce ni, “Kwany woko.’ Ocwalo bade okwanyo woko." 
2Kings6:8 I kare mo ka kabaka me Ciria tye ka lweny i kom Icrael, Obedo ka yubo lok ki luticce kun wacci, “Ka gonnya bibedo ka munyo.’" 
2Kings6:9 Ento dano pa Lubaŋa ocwalo lok bot kabaka me Icrael ni, “Ber igwokke pe iwok ki ka munyo, pien jo Ciria gubecito wa kunnu.’" 
2Kings6:10 Kabaka me Icrael ocako cwalo dano i kabedo ma dano pa Lubaŋa otitte-ni. En obedo ka konye kit meno, omiyo olaro kome tyen mapolpol." 
2Kings6:11 Cwiny kabaka me Ciria obedo ka cwer mada pi lok meno; omiyo olwoŋo luticce openyogi ni, “Wunyutta dano ma tye i kinwa ma dotowa bot kabaka me Icrael.’" 
2Kings6:12 Laticce mo acel owacce ni. “Dano mo pe, rwoda kabaka; ento Elica ma lanebi ma tye i Icrael-li, en aye tito lok ma iloko wa i kicika butoni bot kabaka me Icrael.’" 
2Kings6:13 En ogamo ni, “Cit iciyeny ka ma en tye iye, wek acwal dano ka make.” Gititte ni, “Nen, en tye wa i Dotan.’" 
2Kings6:14 Kabaka ocako cwalo lwak aguragura ki gadigadi lweny ki mony madit; ci gucito wa kunnu i dyewor, gurumo gaŋ woko." 
2Kings6:15 Ka latic pa dano pa Lubaŋa oa malo odiko con ci okato woko nen, mony ki aguragura ki gadigadi lweny orumo gaŋ woko ducu. Laticce owacci, “Maa do, rwoda! Man watimo aŋo?”" 
2Kings6:16 En ogamo ni, “Pe ilwor, pien jo ma tye tuŋ botwa dwoŋ, makato jo ma tye tuŋ botgi.’" 
2Kings6:17 Elica ocako lega, kun lego ni, “Ai Rwot, alegi, yab waŋe wek onen.’ Rwot ocako yabo waŋ latin awobi meno, ci oneno; nen aguragura opoŋo wi got woko ki gadigadi lweny me mac ma orumo Elica woko dyere." 
2Kings6:18 Ka Luciria gucito ka lweny i kome, Elica olego Rwot, kun wacci, “Alegi ni doŋ imi wan jo magi ocor woko.’ Rwot ocako miyo wangi ocor woko kit macalo Elica olego-ni." 
2Kings6:19 Elica owaco botgi ni, “Man pe yo, man bene pe gaŋ; wulub kora, abiterowu bot dano ma wuyenyo-ni.” Ci oterogi wa i Camaria." 
2Kings6:20 Ka gudonyo i Camaria, Elica olego Rwot ni, “Ai Rwot, doŋ iyab wan jo magi, wek gunen piny.” Rwot ocako yabo wangi, ci guneno piny; ci nen, onoŋo gitye wa i dye Camaria." 
2Kings6:21 Ka kabaka me Icrael onenogi ci openyo Elica ni, “Wora, abinekogi woko? Abinekogi woko?”" 
2Kings6:22 En ogamo ni, “In pe ibinekogi. In itwero neko jo ma doŋ iyakogi ki pala lucwanni ki atummi? Ket cam ki pii i nyimgi, wek gucam, gumat, ka gucak cito wa bot rwotgi.”" 
2Kings6:23 En oyubogi cam madwoŋ; ka doŋ gucamo, gumatol ci ocwaloai gudok bot rwotgi. Jo Ciria pe dok gudwogo ka monyo lobo Icrael matwal." 
2Kings6:24 Lacen Ben-adad kabaka me Ciria ocoko monnye ducu, ocito, orumo Camaria." 
2Kings6:25 Onoŋo kec bene dwoŋ i Camaria ci gurumo woko likiŋ, nio ka wi kana gicato giwilo ki cekel me ryal pyeraboro, ki kello bakuli acel giwilo ki cekel me ryal abic." 
2Kings6:26 I kare ma kabaka me Icrael woto kato ki i wi cel, dako mo odaŋŋe ki lok bote, kun wacci, “Konya, rwoda, kabaka!”" 
2Kings6:27 En ogamo ni, “Ka Rwot pe okonyi, ci an abinoŋo gin ma akonyi kwede kwene? Binonne ki i laro moyo nyo ka ma gidino iye koŋo vino bo?”" 
2Kings6:28 Kabaka ocako penyo en ni, “Gin aŋo ma yeli?” Dako-nu ogamo ni. “Dako man owacca ni, ‘Miwa wodi wek tin wacam, ka diki doŋ wacam woda.’" 
2Kings6:29 Pienno omiyo watedo woda, wacamo, ci orwone awaco ki dako-nu, ‘Miwa wodi, wek wacam’; ento en okano wode woko.”" 
2Kings6:30 Ka kabaka owinyo lok pa dako-nu, ci oyeco boŋŋine woko ducu, ki i kare ma en kato ki i wi cel-li, kun dano gineno, ci nen, en oruko boŋo cola ki i te boŋone ma i kome-ni." 
2Kings6:31 En owacci, “Myero Lubaŋa oket can i koma kumeno, ki makato bene, ka ce wi Elica tin pe gitoŋo woko.”" 
2Kings6:32 Onoŋo Elica tye obedo i ode, ki ludoŋo bene onoŋo gubedo kwede. I kare meno onoŋo kabaka oa ocwalo lakwena mua ki i nyime; ento ma pud peya lakwena oo bot Elica, en otugi waco bot ludoŋo ni, “Wun wuneno kit ma lanek man ocwalo kwede dano me toŋo wiya woko? Wunen ka lakwe-na-nu obino, ci wulor doggola woko, wumak doggola matek. Meno pe obot tyen rwode ma winnye bino ki i ŋeyeni?”" 
2Kings6:33 I kare ma en pud loko kwedgi, kabaka obino bote owacce ni, “Ayela man oa ki bot Rwot! Piŋo amedde ka kuro Rwot ‘kuman?”" 
2Kings7:1 Elica owacce ni, “Winy lok pa Rwot: Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘Diki ka onyoo moko kwon mapwotte adita acel gibicato ki cekel acel, ki cayiri adita aryo gibicato pi cekel acel ki i dog gaŋ me Camaria.””" 
2Kings7:2 Ladit me askari ma kabaka jeŋo ciŋe i kome, ogamo dog dano pa Lubaŋa ni, “Ka ce Rwot kikome aye biyabo wan dirica ki i polo, ci meno bitimme?” Elica ogamo ni, “In ibineno ki waŋi, ento pe ibicamone.”" 
2Kings7:3 I kare-nu onoŋo tye jo aŋwen ma ludobo ma gibedo i dog gaŋ; gubedo ka pennye kekengi ni, “Piŋo wabedo kany nio ka wato?" 
2Kings7:4 Kadi wawac ni, ‘Wek wadonyu i gaŋ,’ kec bene tye i gaŋ, wabito ki kunnu; ka wabedo kany, wato woko bene. Doŋ wubin, wacitu kombeddi wa i gony pa jo Ciria. Ka pe gunekowa ci wabikwo, ka gunekowa ci wabito.”" 
2Kings7:5 Gucako a ma piny pud ribiribi, gucito wa i gony pa jo Ciria; ento ka guo i dog gony pa jo Ciria nen, dano mo pe kunnu." 
2Kings7:6 Pien Rwot omiyo jo Ciria guwinyo dwan lwak gadigadi lweny, ki pa aguragura, ki dwan mony madwoŋ, omiyo gubedo ka lok kekengi ni, “Nen, kabaka me Icrael owilo mony pa kabaka pa jo Kit ki luker me Ejipt, gubino i komwa.”" 
2Kings7:7 Omiyo gutwarre woko ki ŋwec ma piny pud ribiribi gularo kwogi, ci guweko kemagi, ki aguraguragi, ki kanagi, i gony ki berre, guriŋo gularo kwogi." 
2Kings7:8 Ka ludobo meno guo i dog gony, gudonyo i kema mo, gucamo, gumato, ci gutiŋo ryal mogo ki jabu ki bonni-gu, gucito gukanogi woko; ka dok gudwogo cen, gudonyo i kema mukene bene, gutiŋo jami ma tye iye, gucito gukano." 
2Kings7:9 Ka dok guloko kekengi ni, “Gin ma watimo-ni pe ber. Tin aye nino me lok maber; ka waliŋ nio ka piny odoko leŋ, ci can bipoto i komwa; doŋ wubin, wacitu wacitit bot jo ma i ot pa kabaka.”" 
2Kings7:10 Ci gucito gulwoŋo lugwok dog gaŋ, gutito botgi ni, “Wan wacito wa i gony pa jo Ciria, nen, dano mo pe onen nyo owinnye kunnu, gin mo pe, kono lwak aguragura ki lwak kana keken ma gitweyogi, ki kema bene tye ma giwekogi ki berre.”" 
2Kings7:11 Lugwok dogcel gudaŋŋe matek, ci gitito pire bot jo pa kabaka." 
2Kings7:12 Kabaka ocako a malo i dyewor, owaco bot luticce ni, “Abitittiwu kit ma jo Ciria guyubbe kwede ‘ka lweny i komwa. Gin giŋeyo ni watye ki kec; omiyo guweko gony gucito woko ka kanne wa i bar kun gitamo ni, ‘Ka ce gukatti woko ki i gaŋ ci wabimakogi makwo ka wadonyo i gaŋ.’ ”" 
2Kings7:13 Laticce mo acel owacci, “Koŋ giwcal jo mogo ki aguragura abic ki i kin mewa mudoŋ, pien jo ma gidoŋ kany gibito macalo lwak jo Icrael ducu ma doŋ guto gutum woko-ni; wek koŋ wacwalgi ci wanen kite.”" 
2Kings7:14 Gucako kwanyo jo aryo ma luriŋ ki aguragura, kabaka ocwalogi i kor mony pa jo Ciria kun wacci, “Wucit wunen.”" 
2Kings7:15 Gucito gulubo korgi wa i Jordan; nen guweko jami i korgi ki ginaruka-gu ki lwak jami ma jo Ciria gubolo pi laro komgi. Lukwena gudwogo gutito bot kabaka. 
2Kings7:16 Lwak gumol woko, guyako gony pa jo Ciria, ci adita acel me moko kwon mapwotte gicato pi cekel acel, ki adita aryo me cayiri pi cekel acel, kit ma yam Rwot owaco-ni." 
2Kings7:17 I kare meno onoŋo kabaka oketo ladit me askari ma en jeŋo ciŋe i kome me bedo lagwok dog gaŋ; dano gunyono en ki tyengi i dog gaŋ, ci oto woko, kit ma dano pa Lubaŋa owaco i kare ma kabaka ocito bote-ni." 
2Kings7:18 Pien ka dano pa Lubaŋa nene owaco bot kabaka ni, “Adita aryo me cayiri gibiwilo ki cekel acel, ki adita me moko kwon mapwotte pi cekel acel, di ki ka onyoo ki i dog gaŋ me Camaria,”" 
2Kings7:19 ladit me askari ogamo dog dano pa Lubaŋa ni, “Ka ce Rwot kikome aye biyabo wan dirica ki i polo, ci jami ma kit meno bitimme?” En ogamo ni, “In kikomi ibineno ki waŋi, ento pe ibicamone.”" 
2Kings7:20 Ci otimme i kome kit meno, pien dano gunyone ki tyengi ki i dog gaŋ ci oto woko." 
2Kings8:1 I kare meno Elica owaco ki dako ma yam ocero latinne ni, “A woko wek icit ki jo ma i odi icibed ka mo ma itwero ducu; pien Rwot ociko pi kec, ci bipoto i lobo pi mwaka abiro.”" 
2Kings8:2 Dako-nu ocako a woko ci otiyo kit macalo dano pa Lubaŋa owaco-ni; ocito ki jo ma i ode ci obedo i lobo pa jo Piliciti mwaka abiro. 
2Kings8:3 Ka mwaka abiro otum, dako-nu ocako dwogo nia ki i lobo pa Jo Piliciti, okato ocito bot kabaka ka koko pi ode ki pi lobone." 
2Kings8:4 I kare-nu onoŋo kabaka tye ka lok ki Gikaji ma latic pa dano pa Lubaŋa, kun wacce ni, “Titta gin madito ducu ma doŋ Elica otyeko tiyo.”" 
2Kings8:5 Ka onoŋo obetito bot kabaka kit ma Elica ocero ki dano muto-ni, nen, dako ma en ocero wode-ni okok bot kabaka pi ode ki pilobone. Ci Gikaji owacci, “Rwoda, kabaka, man en aye dako, ki wode bene ene, ma Elica ocero-ni.”" 
2Kings8:6 Ka kabaka openyo dako-nu, ci en otitte, omiyo kabaka okwanyo dano mo madit pire, kun wacci, “Dwok jami ma yam pa dako-nu ducu bote, kacel ki jami ma ocek i pottine nia wa i kare ma en obwoto ki lobone nio kwede wa onyoo.”" 
2Kings8:7 I kare meno El ica ocito i Damaciko. Ben-adad kabaka me Ciria onoŋo two; ka onoŋo gititte pire ni, “Dano pa Lubaŋa obino kany,”" 
2Kings8:8 kabaka owaco bot Kajael ni, “Kwany mot icit kwede ka jolo wi dano pa Lubaŋa, ci ipeny dog Rwot ki bote, kun ipenye ka abicar, ki i two man.”" 
2Kings8:9 Kit meno Kajael ocako cito ka jolo wiye, otero ki mot bene, kit kwa jami ducu mabeco ma tye i Damaciko, ma kinaga pyeraŋwen guyeyo. Ka ocito ocuŋ i nyime, owacci, “Wodi Ben-adad ma kabaka me Ciria ocwala boti, kun wacci, ‘Abicaŋ i two man?’" 
2Kings8:10 Elica owacce ni, “Cit iciwacce ni, ‘In ibican adada’; ento Rwot otyeko nyuto bota ni en bito woko adada.”" 
2Kings8:11 En ociko waŋe i kom Kajael kun gaye kwede, nio ka lewic omako, ci dano pa Lubaŋa ocako koko." 
2Kings8:12 Kajael openyo ni, “Rwoda, dok ikok piŋo kaa?” En ogamo ni, “Pien aŋeyo tim marac ma ibitime ki jo Icrael; ibiwaŋo gaŋi gogogi woko ki mac, ibineko co matino woko ki pala lucwan, kun inyoto litino lukere woko, dok mongi ma giyac gibiryeko igi woko.”" 
2Kings8:13 Kajael ogamo ni, “Laticci odoko gin aŋo, ma en gwok ma mwa-ni, ci twero tiyo gin madit ma rom meno kulu?” Elica odok iye ni, “Rwot otyeko nyutta ni, in aye ibibedo kabaka me Ciria.”" 
2Kings8:14 En ocako a woko ki bot Elica, ci ocito wa bot rwode. Rwode openye ni, “El ica owaco boti lok aŋo?” En owacci, “En otitta ni in ibicaŋ adada.”" 
2Kings8:15 Orwone en okwanyo taulo, oluto i pii ci oyaro i waŋe, nio ka oto kwede. Kajael oleyo ka tyene." 
2Kings8:16 I mwaka me abic me ker pa Joram wod pa Akab kabaka me Icrael, en aye Jekoram wod pa Yekocapat kabaka me Juda ocako iye loc." 
2Kings8:17 Ocamo ker ma onoŋo mwaka me ditte pyeradek wiye aryo, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka aboro." 
2Kings8:18 Obedo ka lubo kit pa luker me Icrael, kun tiyo kit macalo jo me ot pa Akab gutiyo, pien dakone nya pa Akab. Obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot." 
2Kings8:19 Ento Rwot pe omito tyeko Juda woko ducu, pi laticce Daudi, kit ma con ocikke bote ni ebimiye bedo ki mac tara, en ki likwaye matwal." 
2Kings8:20 I karene en aye jo Edom gujemo iye woko i kom loc pa Juda, ci guketo kabakagi pigi kengi." 
2Kings8:21 Joram okato loka Jair kacel: ki gadigadi lwennye ducu, ci oa woko i dyewor, ci en ki ludito ma giloyo gadigadi lwennye gulwenyo i kom jo Edom ma gurume dyere-ni; ento monnye oriŋo odwogo woko paco." 
2Kings8:22 Omiyo Edom ojemo woko i kom loc pa Juda nio wa onyoo. Ka dok Libna bene ocako jemo woko i kare-nu. 
2Kings8:23 Lok kom Joram mudoŋŋe ducu, ki gin ma yam otiyo ducu, gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa Luker me Juda." 
2Kings8:24 Joram oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, dok giyike kacel ki kwarine i gaŋ pa Daudi; Akajia ma wode aye oleyo ka tyene." 
2Kings8:25 I mwaka me apar wiye aryo me loc pa Joram wod pa Akab, kabaka me Icrael, Akajia wod pa Jekoram, kabaka me Juda, ocako camo iye ker." 
2Kings8:26 Akajia onoŋo ditte romo mwaka pyeraryo wiye aryo ka ocamo ker, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka acel. Minne nyiŋe Atalia; en yam lakwar Omri kabaka me Icrael." 
2Kings8:27 Akajia bene obedo ka lubo kit pa jo me ot pa Akab, obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot, kit macalo jo me ot pa Akab obedo ka tiyone, pien onoŋo jo paoce ot pa Akab." 
2Kings8:28 En ocako cito gin ki Joram wod pa Akab ka lweny ki Kajael kabaka me Ciria wa i Ramot-gilead, ci jo Ciria guketo ret i kom Joram." 
2Kings8:29 Kabaka Joram odwogo ka mado rette i Jejreel, en aye waŋ ret ma jo Ciria guketo i kome ki i Rama, i kare ma en olwenyo i kom Kajael kabaka me Ciria. Akajia wod pa Jekoram kabaka me Juda ocito ka limo Joram wod pa Akab i Jejreel, pien onoŋo kome lit." 
2Kings9:1 Elica olwoŋo ŋat acel i kin lwak pa lunebi ci owacce ni, “Twe pyeri, ci ikwany cupa moo man imak i ciŋi, icit kwede wa i Ramot-gilead." 
2Kings9:2 Ka io kunnu, ci iciyeny Yeko wod pa Yekocapat, wod pa Nimci; cit iciwacce oa woko ki i kin luwote, ci itel wiye itere i kicika ma i tyelo." 
2Kings9:3 Ka ikwany cupa moo, iony i wiye, kun iwacci, ‘Rwot owaco kuman ni, Awiro in me bedo kabaka ma loyo Icrael.’ Ka doŋ iyab doggola ci ilwi woko; pe ibed kunnu.”" 
2Kings9:4 Latin awobi meno ma lanebi-ni ocako wot i Ramot-gilead. 
2Kings9:5 Ka ocito oo, nen, onoŋo ludito me mony gubedo i kacokke ka laro lok, ci owaco ni, “At ye ki kwena mo boti, ai ladit me mony.” Yeko ogamo ni, “Ibino bot aŋa ki i kinwa kany?” En ogamo ni, “Abino boti, ai ladit me mony.”"
