2Kings25:21 Kabaka me Babilon ocako nekogi woko ducu; onekogi i Ribla ma i lobo Kamat. Jo Juda yam gikwanyogi woko ki i lobogi giterogi i opii kit meno. 
2Kings25:22 Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon oketo Gedalia wod pa Akikam ma wod pa Capan me loyo jo mudoŋ i lobo Juda, ma yam owekogi gubwot." 
2Kings25:23 Ka ludito me mony ducu ma i kin gaŋi guwinyo ni kabaka me Babilon otyeko keto Gedalia me bedo laloyo, ci gubino ki lwakgi bot Gedalia wa i Mijpa. Nyiŋgi ene: Icmael wod pa Netania, Yokanan wod pa Karea, Ceraya wod pa Tankumet ma jo Netopa, ki Jajania wod pa jo Maaka." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia ocako kwoŋo kwoŋ botgi ki bot lwakgi ducu kun wacci, “Pe wulwor ludito tic pa jo Kaldaya. Wubed i lobo, wuti bot kabaka me Babilon, ci wubibedo maber laboŋo ayela mo,”" 
2Kings25:25 Ento i dwe me abiro, Icmael wod pa Netania, wod pa Elicama, ma tye i kaka pa luker, obino kacel ki jo apar, ci gulwenyo ki Gedalia, guneko woko, kacel ki Lujudaya ki jo Kaldaya ma gitye kwede i Mijpa." 
2Kings25:26 Lacen lwak ducu, jo matino ki jo madito, ki ludito me mony gua gucito wa i Ejipt, pien gulworo jo Kaldaya." 
2Kings25:27 I kare me mwaka pyeradek wiye abirone nia ma gitero kwede Yekoyakin kabaka me Juda i opii, i dwe me apar wiye aryo, i kom nino dwe pyeraryo wiye abiro, en aye Evil-merodak, kabaka me Babilon, otimo kica ki Yekoyakin kabaka me Juda, ogonye woko ki i mabuc, i mwaka ma en ocamo iye ker." 
2Kings25:28 Obedo ka lok kwede mot maber, oketo en obedo i kom madit makato ducu ma i kin kom pa luker ma onoŋo gibedo kwede i Babilon." 
2Kings25:29 Kit meno omiyo Yekoyakin olunyo boŋo mabuc mere woko, obedo ka cam i wi meja pa kabaka jwijwi, pi kare me kwone ducu." 
2Kings25:30 Pi miye gin me konye kwede, kabaka dok obedo ka miye lim me tic kwede jwijwi, nino ducu me kwo mere." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adam onywalo Ceji, Ceji onywalo Enoci, Enoci onywalo Kenan;" 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenan onywalo Maalalel, Maalalel onywalo Jared;" 
1Chronicles1:3 Jared onywalo Enoka, Enoka onywalo Metucela, Metucela onywalo Lamek;" 
1Chronicles1:4 Lamek onywalo Nua, Nua onywalo Cem, Kam ki Yafeci," 
1Chronicles1:5 Litino awobe pa Yafeci aye Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Mecek ki Tirac," 
1Chronicles1:6 Litino awobe pa Gomer aye Acikenaj, Dipat ki Togarma," 
1Chronicles1:7 Litino awobe pa Javan gin Elica, Tarcic, Kitim ki Rodanim," 
1Chronicles1:8 Litino awobe pa Kam gin aye Kuc, Ejipt, Put ki Kanaan," 
1Chronicles1:9 Litino awobe pa Kuc aye Seba, Kavila, Cabta, Raama ki Cabteka, Litino awo be pa Raama gin aye Ceba ki Dedan," 
1Chronicles1:10 Kuc onywalo mere Nimulodi; en aye okwoŋo’ bedo oteka i wi lobo. 
1Chronicles1:11 Likwayo pa Ejipt gin aye jo Lud, jo Anam, jo Leab, jo Naptuk," 
1Chronicles1:12 jo Patruc, jo Kacluk ki jo Kaptor, ma gin aye kaka ma jo Piliciti gua ki i komgi." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaan onywalo Cidon, latin kayone, ki Ket ma likwaye gilwoŋo ni jo Kit." 
1Chronicles1:14 Likwayo mu kene pa Kanaan gin aye jo Jebuc, jo Amor, jo Girgac," 
1Chronicles1:15 jo Kiv, jo Arki, jo Cin," 
1Chronicles1:16 jo Arvad, jo Jemar ki jo Kamat," 
1Chronicles1:17 Litino awo be pa Cem gin aye Elam, Acur, Arpakcad, Lud, Aram, Uj, Kul, Geter ki Mecek." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpakcad onywalo Cela, Cela onywalo Eber," 
1Chronicles1:19 Eber onywalo litino awobe aryo; acel nyiŋe Peleg, pien i karene aye gipoko iye lobo, ki nyiŋ ominne onoŋo Yokotan," 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokotan onywalo Almodad, Celep, Kajarmavet, Jera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Adoram, Ujal, Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 Obal, Abimael, Ceba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Opir, Kavila ki Jobab; magi ducu gin litino awobe pa Yokotan." 
1Chronicles1:23 Opir, Kavila ki Jobab; magi ducu gin litino awobe pa Yokotan." 
1Chronicles1:24 Cem onywalo Arkpacad, Arpakcad onywalo Cela, Cela onywalo Eber;" 
1Chronicles1:25 Eber onywalo Peleg, Peleg onywalo Reu, Reu onywalo Cerug;" 
1Chronicles1:26 Cerug onywalo Nakor, Nakor onywalo Tera;" 
1Chronicles1:27 Tera onywalo Abram, meno aye Abraim," 
1Chronicles1:28 Litino awobe pa Abraim gin aye Icaka ki Icmael. 
1Chronicles1:29 Litino pa Icmael gin ene: Nebayof ma latin kayone, ki Kedar, Adbeel, Mibcam," 
1Chronicles1:30 Micima, Duma, Maca, Adad, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetur, Napic ki Kedema. Jo magi ducu aye ‘litino awobe pa Icmael." 
1Chronicles1:32 Litino awobe pa Ketula ma obedo dako pa Abraim ma aŋeca gin ene: en onywalo Jimran, Yokocan, Medan, Midian, Icibak ki’ Cua, Litino awobe pa Yokocan gin aye Ceba ki Dedan," 
1Chronicles1:33 Litino awobe pa Midian gin aye Epa, Eper, Kanok, Abida ki Eldaa, Magi ducu aye likwayo pa Ketula." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abraim onywalo Icaka, Litino awobe pa Icaka gin aye Ecau ki Icrael." 
1Chronicles1:35 Litino awobe pa Ecau aye Erifaji, Reuel, Jeuc, Jalam ki Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Litino awobe pa Erifaji aye Teman, Omar, Jepi, Gatam, Kenaj, Timna ki Amalek." 
1Chronicles1:37 Litino awobe pa Reuel gin Nakat, Jera, Ca ma ki Mija." 
1Chronicles1:38 Litino awobe pa Ceir aye Lotan, Cobal, Jibeon, Aŋa, Dicon, Ejer ki Dican," 
1Chronicles1:39 Litino awobe pa Lotan aye Kori ki Komam; lamiŋ Lotan aye Timna," 
1Chronicles1:40 Litino awobe pa Co bal gin aye Alian, Manakat, Ebal, Cepi ki Onam, Litino awobe pa Jibeon aye Aiya ki Aŋa," 
1Chronicles1:41 Latin awobi pa Aŋa aye Dicon, Litino awobe pa Dicon aye Kamram, Eciban, Itran ki Keran," 
1Chronicles1:42 Litino awobe pa Ejer aye Bilan, Jaavan ki Jaakan, Litino awobe pa Dican aye Uj ki Aran." 
1Chronicles1:43 Magi aye luker ma guloyo lobo Edom ma onoŋo pud peya kabaka mo oloyo jo Icrael: Bela wod pa Beor ma nyiŋ gaŋ kalle Dinkaba. 
1Chronicles1:44 Ka Bela oto, ci Jobab wod pa Jera me Bojra oleyo ka tyene." 
1Chronicles1:44 Ka Bela oto, ci Jobab wod pa Jera me Bojra oleyo ka tyene." 
1Chronicles1:45 Ka Jobab oto, ci Kucam mua ki i lobo pa jo Teman oleyo ka tyene." 
1Chronicles1:45 Ka Jobab oto, ci Kucam mua ki i lobo pa jo Teman oleyo ka tyene." 
1Chronicles1:46 Ka Kucam oto, ci Adad wod pa Bedad oleyo ka tyene. En aye yam olwenyo ki jo Midian, ci oloyogi i lobo Moab; nyiŋ gaŋ kalle aye Avit." 
1Chronicles1:47 Ka Adad oto, ci Camla me Macireka oleyo ka tyene." 
1Chronicles1:48 Ka Camla oto, Caul me Rekobot ma tye i dog kulu Euprate oleyo ka tyene." 
1Chronicles1:49 Ka Caul oto, ci Baal-kanan wod pa Akbor oleyo ka tyene." 
1Chronicles1:50 Ka Baal-kanan oto, ci Adad oleyo ka tyene; nyiŋ gaŋ kalle Pai. Nyiŋ dakone Meketabel nya pa Matred, ma nya pa Mejakab." 
1Chronicles1:51 Ci Adad oto woko. Rwodi ma i Edom gin ene: Timna, Alia, Jetet," 
1Chronicles1:52 Okolibama, Ela, Pinon," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenaj, Teman, Mibjar," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magdiel ki Iram; magi aye rwodi ma i Edom. 
1Chronicles2:1 Magi aye litino awobe pa Icrael: Reuben, Cimeon, Levi, Juda, Icakar, Jabulon," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Yucepu, Benjamin, Naputali, Gad ki Acer." 
1Chronicles2:3 Litino awobe pa Juda gin aye Er, Onan ki Cela. Jomagi adek-ki Bat-Cua ma nya jo Kanaan aye onywalogi. Er ma en aye latin kayo pa Juda obedo dano marac i wan Rwot, omiyo Rwot oneke woko." 
1Chronicles2:4 Juda dok onywalo Perej ki Jera ki Tamar ma ci-wode; litino awobe pa Juda gin ducu abic. 
1Chronicles2:5 Litino awobe pa Perej gin aye Kejeron ki Kamul. 
1Chronicles2:6 Litino awobe pa Jera aye Jimri, Etan, Eman, Kalkol ki Dara, gin ducu abic." 
1Chronicles2:7 Latin awobi pa Karmi en aye Akar, layel Icrael, ma yam obalo i kom jami ma gidyero bot Rwot." 
1Chronicles2:8 Wod pa Etan obedo Ajaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Litino awobe pa Kejeron ma en onywalo gin aye Jeramel, Ram ki Kelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ram onywalo Aminadab, Aminadab onywalo Calma," 
1Chronicles2:11 Calma onywalo Boaj," 
1Chronicles2:12 Boaj onywalo Obed, Obed onywalo Yece," 
1Chronicles2:13 Yece onywalo Eliab ma latin kayone, me aryone Abinadab, me adekke Cimea," 
1Chronicles2:14 me 385 aŋwenne Netanel, me abicce Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 me abicelle Ojem, me abirone Daudi." 
1Chronicles2:16 Lumegigi gin aye Jeruya ki Abigail. Litmo awobe pa Jeruya gin Abicai, Joab ki Acael, gin adek." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigail onywalo Amaca; won Amaca obedo Jeter ma jo Icmael. 
1Chronicles2:18 Kaleb wod pa Kejeron onywalo Jeriot ki dakone Ajuba. Litino awobe pa Ajuba gin aye Jecer, Cobab ki Ardon." 
1Chronicles2:19 Ka Ajuba oto, Kaleb onyomo Eprat ma onywalo Kur." 
1Chronicles2:20 Kur onywalo Uri, Uri onywalo Bejalel." 
1Chronicles2:21 Lacen Kejeron obedo ki nya pa Makir ma won Gilead. Onyomo ma onoŋo mwaka me ditte romo pyerabicel; dako meno onywalo Cegub. 
1Chronicles2:22 Cegub onywalo Jair ma yam obedo ki gaŋine pyeraryo wiye adek i lobo Gilead. 
1Chronicles2:23 Ento jo Gecur ki jo Aram gumayo gaŋi pa Jair ki bot wegine, kacel ki Kenat ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, gaŋi ducu pyerabicel. Jo magi ducu gin likwayo pa Makir ma won Gilead." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ka Kejeron doŋ oto, ci Kaleb obedo ki Eprata ma ci-wonne dako pa Kejeron, ci onywalo kwede Acikur ma ocako gaŋ Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Litino awobe pa Jeramel ma latin pa Kejeron gin aye Ram ma latin kayone, ki Buŋa, Oren, Ojem ki Akija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jeramel onoŋo tye ki dakone mukene bene ma nyiŋe Atara; en aye min Onamo 
1Chronicles2:27 Litino awobe pa Ram ma latin kayo pa Jeramel gin aye Naaj, Jamin ki Eker." 
1Chronicles2:28 Litino awobe pa Onam gin aye Camai ki Jada. Litino awobe pa Camai aye Nadab ki Abicur. 
1Chronicles2:29 Nyiŋ dako pa Abicur obedo Abikail; en aye onywalo Aban ki Molid. 
1Chronicles2:30 Litino awobe pa Nadab gin aye Celed ki Apaim. Celed oto ma pe ki latin mo. 
1Chronicles2:31 Latin awobi pa Apaim aye Ici. Latin awobi pa Ici aye Cecan. Latin awobi pa Cecan en aye Aklai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Litino awobe pa Jada ma omin Camai gin aye Jeter ki Yonacan; Jeter oto ma pe ki latin mo. 
1Chronicles2:33 Litino awobe pa Yonacan gin aye Pelet ki Jaja. Jo magi ducu gin likwayo pa Jeramel. 
1Chronicles2:34 Cecan yam pe ki litino awobe; onywalo anyira keken. Ento Cecan onoŋo tye ki opiine ma Laejipt ma nyiŋe Jara. 
1Chronicles2:35 Cecan omiyo nyare mo bot opiine Jara, ci onywalo kwede Atai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai onywalo Natan, Natan onywalo Jabad." 
1Chronicles2:37 Jabad onywalo Eplal, Eplal onywalo Obed," 
1Chronicles2:38 Obed onywalo Yeko, Yeko onywalo Ajaria." 
1Chronicles2:39 Ajaria onywalo Kelej, ki Kelej onywalo Eleaca," 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleaca onywalo Cicimai, ki Cicimai onywalo Calum." 
1Chronicles2:41 Calum onywalo Jekamia, Jekamia onywalo Elicama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Litino awobe pa Kaleb ma omm Jeramel gin ene: Meca ma latin kayone obedo won Jip. Latin awobi pa Jip aye Mareca ma won Kebron. 
1Chronicles2:43 Litino awobe pa Kebron aye Kora, Tapua, Rekem ki Cema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Cema onywalo Rakam ma won Jorkeam, Rekem onywalo Camai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Latin awobi pa Camai en aye Maon; Maon onywalo Beŋur. 
1Chronicles2:46 Kaleb obedo ki dako ma aŋeca bene ma nyiŋe Epa; en aye onywalo Karan, Moja ki Gajej; Karan bene obedo ki wode ma nyiŋe Gajej." 
1Chronicles2:47 Litino awobe pa Jadai gin aye Regem, Yocam, Gecan, Pelet, Epa ki Caap." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka ma dako pa Kaleb ma aŋeca onywalo Ceber ki Tirkana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Dako meno bene dok onywalo Caap ma ocako gaŋ Madmana, ki Ceva ma ocako gaŋi Makbena ki Gibea, Akaca obedo nya pa Kaleb." 
1Chronicles2:50 Jo man ducu gin likwayo pa Kaleb. Litino awobe pa Kur ma latin kayo pa Eprata gin aye Cobal ma ocako gaŋ ma gilwoŋo Kiriat-jearim," 
1Chronicles2:51 Calma ma ocako Beterekem, ki Karep ma ocako Bet-gader." 
1Chronicles2:52 Likwayo pa Cobal ma ocako Kiriat-jearim gin aye jo Karoe ki nucu pa jo Menukot. 
1Chronicles2:53 Doggola pa jo Kiriat-jearim ducu gin aye jo Itri, jo Put, jo Cumat ki jo Micra; jo Jora ki jo Ectaol bene gua ki i kom jo meno." 
1Chronicles2:54 Likwayo pa Calma ma ocako gaŋ Beterekem gin aye jo Netopa, jo Atrotbet-joab, nucu pa jo Manakat, ki jo Jora." 
1Chronicles2:55 Doggola pa lukaran bene ducu ma gibedo i Jabej gin aye jo Tira, io Cimea ki jo Cuka. Magi aye jo Keni ma gunyomme ki jo ma i dog ot pa Rekab." 
1Chronicles3:1 Magi aye litino awobe pa Daudi ma en onywalo i Kebron: latin kayone aye Amnon, ma minne obedo Akinoam me Jejreel; me aryone Daniel, ma minne obedo Abigail me Karmel;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Magi aye litino awobe pa Daudi ma en onywalo i Kebron: latin kayone aye Amnon, ma minne obedo Akinoam me Jejreel; me aryone Daniel, ma minne obedo Abigail me Karmel;" 
1Chronicles3:2 me adekke obedo Abcalom, ma minne Maaka ma nya pa Talmai kabaka me Gecur; me aŋwenne Adoniya, ma minne Kagit;" 
1Chronicles3:3 me abicce Cepatia, ma minne Abital; me abicelle Itream, ma minne Egla." 
1Chronicles3:4 Daudi onywalo jo abicelli i Kebron, ka ma yam obedo ka loc iye pi mwaka abiro ki dwe abicel. Ka dok obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyeradek wiye adek." 
1Chronicles3:5 Dano magi en onywalogi i Jerucalem: Cimea, Cobab, Natan ki Solomon; gin aŋwen-ni ducu mingi Bat-cua ma nya Amiel." 
1Chronicles3:6 Ka dok onywalo Ibar, Elicama, Elipelet," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nepeg, Japia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elicama, Eliada ki Elipelet, gin aboŋwen." 
1Chronicles3:9 Magi ducu gin litino awobe pa Daudi, ma pe gikwano iye litino pa mon aŋecane; ki lamingi en aye Tamar." 
1Chronicles3:10 Likwayo pa Solomon gin ene: en onywalo wode Rekoboam, ma wode Abija, ma wode Aca, ma wode Yekocapat," 
1Chronicles3:11 ma wode Joram, ma wode Akajia, ma wode Yoaci," 
1Chronicles3:12 ma wode Amajia, ma wode Ajaria, ma wode Yocam," 
1Chronicles3:13 ma wode Akaj, ma wode Kejekia, ma wode Manace," 
1Chronicles3:14 ma wode Amon, ma wode Yocia," 
1Chronicles3:15 Litino awobe pa Yocia gin aye Yokanan ma latin kayone, me aryone Yekoyakim, me adekke Jedekia me aŋwenne Calum." 
1Chronicles3:16 Likwayo pa Yekoyakim gin ene: en onywalo wode Yekonia, ma wode Jedekia." 
1Chronicles3:17 Ka dok litino awobe pa Yekonia ma yam gitere i opii-ni gin ene: Cealtiel," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malkiram Pedaya, Cenajar, Jekamia, Kocama ki Nedabia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Litino awobe pa Pedaya gin aye Jerubabel ki Cimei. Litino awobe pa Jerubabel aye Meculam ki Anania, ma lamingi aye Celomit;" 
1Chronicles3:20 ki Kacuba, Okel, Berekia, Kacadia ki Jucab-keced, gin abic." 
1Chronicles3:21 Likwayo pa Anania gin ene: en onywalo Pelatia ki Jecaya, ma wode Repaya, ma wode Aman, ma wode Obadia, ma wode Cekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Latin awobi pa Cekania aye Cemaya, Ki litino awobe pa Cemaya gin aye Katuc, Igal, Baria, Nearia ki Capat, gin abicel." 
1Chronicles3:23 Litino awobe pa Nearia gin aye Elioenai, Kijikia ki Ajrikam, gin adek." 
1Chronicles3:24 Litino awo be pa Elioenai gin aye Kodavia, Eliacib, Pelaya, Akub, Yokanan, Delaya ki Anani, gin abiro." 
1Chronicles4:1 Litino awobe pa Juda aye Perej, Kejeron, Karmi, Kur ki Cobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaya ma wod ‘pa Cobal onywalo Jakat, Jakat onywalo Akumai ki Lakad. Meno aye doggola pa jo Jora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Magi aye litino awobe pa Etam: Jejreel, Icima ki Idibac; nyiŋ lamingi obedo Kajelelponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penuel ocako gaŋ Gedor, ki Ejer ocako gaŋ Kuca. Magi aye litino awobe pa Kur ma obedo latin kayo pa minne Eprata; en aye ocako Beterekem." 
1Chronicles4:5 Acikur ma ocako gaŋ Tekoa, yam tye ki mon aryo, Kela ki Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara onywalo Akujam, Keper, Temeni ki Akactari. Meno aye litino awobe pa Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Litino awobe pa Kela gin aye Jeret, Ijar ki Etanan." 
1Chronicles4:8 Koj onywalo Anub ki Jobeba; jo me doggola pa Akarkel ma wod pa Karum ducu gubedo likwaye. 
1Chronicles4:8 Koj onywalo Anub ki Jobeba; jo me doggola pa Akarkel ma wod pa Karum ducu gubedo likwaye. 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabej onoŋo giworo maka to omegine ducu. Minne ocako nyiŋe Jabej kun wacci, “Pien anywale ki arem madwoŋ.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabej okok bot Lubaŋa me Icrael kun wacci, “Tim ber, imiya gum ci imi wan lobona obed malac. Bed kweda, igwoka i kom gin marac ducu wek pe otima malit.” Ci Lubaŋa oye gin ma en olego." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelub ma omin Cuka onywalo Mekir, Mekir onywalo Eciton." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eciton onywalo Bet-rapa, Pacea ki Tekina ma ocako gaŋ ma gilwoŋo Ir-Nakac, Magi aye jo Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Litino awobe pa Kenaj gin aye Otiniel gin ki Ceraya. Litino awobe pa Otiniel aye Katat ki Meonatai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonatai onywalo Opra, ki Ceraya onywalo Joab ma ocako nota pa lutic diro. Gin mumiyo gilwoŋo kit meno, pien gin ducu lutic diro." 
1Chronicles4:15 Litino awobe pa Kaleb ma wod pa Jepune gin aye Iru, Ela ki Naam. Latin awobi pa Ela aye Kenaj." 
1Chronicles4:16 Litino awobe pa Jekalelel gin aye Jip, Jipa, Tiria ki Acarel." 
1Chronicles4:17 Litino awobe pa Ejra gin aye Jeter, Mered, Eper ki Jalon. Mered onyomo Bitia ma nya pa Parao; en ogamo ci onywalo nyare Miriam ki litino awobe aryo, Camai ki Iciba ma ocako gaŋ Ectemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Ki dakone ma Lajuda Mered dok onywalo Jered ma ocako gaŋ Gedor, Keber ma ocako gaŋ Coko, ki Jekutiel ma ocako gaŋ Janoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Litino awobe pa dako pa Kodia ma lamiŋ Nakam gunywalo jo magi, Keila ma obedo kwaro pa jo Garmi, ki Ectemoa ma obedo kwaro pa jo Maaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Litino awobe pa Cimon gin aye Amnon, Rina, Ben-kanan ki Tilon. Litino awobe pa Ici gin aye Joket ki Ben-joket." 
1Chronicles4:21 Likwayo pa Cela ma wod pa Juda aye Er ma ocako gaŋ Leka, Laada ma ocako gaŋ Mareca, ki doggola pa lucwe boŋo camanini ducu ma gibedo i Bet-acibea;" 
1Chronicles4:22 ki Jokim, ki jo Koceba, ki Yoaci, ki Carap ma yam obedo laloc i Moab ka dok odwogo obedo i Beterekem. (Meno lok macon twatwal.)" 
1Chronicles4:23 Jo-nu aye lucwe agulu, ki jo ma gubedo i Netaim ki i Gedera. Onoŋo gibedo kunnu kacel ki kabaka pi tiyo ticce." 
1Chronicles4:24 Litino awobe pa Cimeon gin aye Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Jera ki Caul." 
1Chronicles4:25 Caul onywalo wode Calum, ma wode Mibcam, ma wode Micima." 
1Chronicles4:26 Litino awobe pa Micima gin aye wode Kamuel, ma wode Jakur, ma wode Cimei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Cimei onoŋo tye ki awobene apar wiye abicel ki anyirane abicel; ento omegine pe gubedo ki litino mapol, kadi wa ludoggolagi ducu pe gunya mapol ma rom ki jo Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Gin yam gibedo i Beer-ceba, Molada, Kajar-cual," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bila, Ejem, Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 Becweri, Korma, Jiklag," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bet-markabot, Kajar-cucim, Bet-biri ki Caaraim. Magi aye obedo gaŋigi nio wa i kare me loc pa Daudi." 
1Chronicles4:32 Kabedo mukene ma gin gubedo iye gin aye Etam, Ain, Rimmon, Token ki Acan, gagi ducu abic," 
1Chronicles4:33 kacel ki gagi matino ma orumo gagi man ducu nio kwede wa i Baalat, Magi aye kabedogi, dok gin aye gubedo ki buk me tekwarogi." 
1Chronicles4:34 Mecobab, Jamlek, Joca ma wod pa Amajia," 
1Chronicles4:35 Joel, Yeko ma wod pa Jocibia, wod pa Ceraya, ma wod pa Aciel," 
1Chronicles4:35 Joel, Yeko ma wod pa Jocibia, wod pa Ceraya, ma wod pa Aciel," 
1Chronicles4:36 Elionia, Jaakona, Jecokaya, Acaya, Adiel, Jecimiel, Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 Jija wod pa Cipi ma wod pa Alon, wod pa Jedaya, wod pa Cimri, ma wod pa Cemaya," 
1Chronicles4:38 jo magi ducu ma gicoyo nyiŋgi malo-ni gin aye lutel me doggolagi. Dog odi pa kwarogi onya madwoŋ," 
1Chronicles4:39 ci gucako wot nio wa i yo ma donyo i Gerar, kun girabo dog nota yo tuŋ wokceŋ pi yenyo ka kwayo romigi ki dyegigi." 
1Chronicles4:40 Gunoŋo kakwat maber kunnu ma lum olot iye madwoŋ, lobone bene lac ma obedo mot ki kuc. Jo ma gukwoŋo bedo kunnu aye jo Kam." 
1Chronicles4:41 Jo meno ma gicoyo nyingi-ni guo kunnu i kare pa Kejekia kabaka me Juda, ci guneko jo Kam woko, kacel ki jo Meuni ma gunoŋo kunnu, gutyekogi woko liweŋ nio wa i kare-ni, Kit meno guleyo kabedogi woko, pien onoŋo ka kwayo romigi ki dyegigi tye kunnu maber." 
1Chronicles4:42 Jo mogo ma i kingi, jo Cimeon ma giromo miya abic, gucito wa i got Ceir kun gitye ki jo magi ma lutel wigi: Pelatia, Nearia, Repaya ki Ujiel ma gin litino awobe pa Ici." 
1Chronicles4:43 Guneko jo Amalek ma yam guriŋo ci gubwot ma gudoŋ kunnu, ci gucako bedo kunnu nio wa onyoo." 
1Chronicles5:1 Man lok kom likwayo pa Reuben ma latin kayo pa Icrael. En aye latin kayo, ento otimo kir pi bedo ki ci-wonne. Pi meno ditte me ‘anywalli gimiyo bot litino awobe pa Yucepu wod pa Icrael, pe doŋ gicoyo nyiŋe i buk me tekwaro ma lubo kit ma ginywale kwede." 
1Chronicles5:2 Dok kadi bed Juda yam obedo oteka i kin omegine, dok laker bene ononne ki i kin likwaye, ento dit me anywalli onoŋo tye bot Yucepu." 
1Chronicles5:3 Litino awobe pa Reuben ma latin kayo pa Icrael gin aye Kanok, Pallu, Kejeron ki Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Litino awobe pa Joel gin ene: wode obedo Cemaya, ma wode Gog, ma wode Cimei," 
1Chronicles5:4 Litino awobe pa Joel gin ene: wode obedo Cemaya, ma wode Gog, ma wode Cimei," 
1Chronicles5:5 ma wode Mika, ma wode Reaya, ma wode Baal," 
1Chronicles5:6 ma wode Beera ma yam Tiglat-pilecer kabaka me Aciria otero woko i opii; en yam obedo ladit pa jo Reuben. 
1Chronicles5:7 Lukakagi yam gicoyo tekwarogi kun lubo yalwakgi ki doggolagi, gin ene: laditgi Jeyel, ki Jekaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 ki Bela wod pa Ajaj ma wod pa Joel; en yam bedo i Aroer, ma lobone oo wa i Nebo ki Baal-meon." 
1Chronicles5:8 ki Bela wod pa Ajaj ma wod pa Joel; en yam bedo i Aroer, ma lobone oo wa i Nebo ki Baal-meon." 
1Chronicles5:9 En yam obedo bene yo tuŋ wokceŋ ma lobone o wa i dog tim ma i ŋet kutu Euprate tuŋ kany, pien onoŋo doŋ limgi onya madwoŋ i lobo Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:10 I kare pa Caulo gubedp ka lweny ki jo Agri ci gunekogi, ka gucako bedo i kemagi i lobo ducu ma i ŋet lobo Gilead yo tuŋ wokceŋ," 
1Chronicles5:11 Likwayo pa Gad gubedo i lobo Bacan nio kwede wa i Caleka, kun gukemme ki jo Reuben." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel obedo laditgi, me aryone Capamo Janai ki Capat bene gubedo i Bacan." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joel obedo laditgi, me aryone Capamo Janai ki Capat bene gubedo i Bacan." 
1Chronicles5:13 Lukakagi gupokke i doggola mapatpat ma kwarogi obedo Mikael, Meculam, Ceba, Jorai, Jakan, Jia ki Eber, gin abiro." 
1Chronicles5:14 Magi aye gubedo likwayo pa Abikail wod pa Kuri, ma wod pa Jaroa, wod pa Gilead, wod pa Mikael, wod pa Jecicai, wod pa Jado, wod pa Buj." 
1Chronicles5:15 Aki wod pa Abdiel ma wod pa Guni, en aye obedo ladit ma loyo dog odi pa kwarogi." 
1Chronicles5:16 Gin gubedo i Gilead, i Bacan ki i gaŋi ma i lobo meno, ki i kakwat ducu ma i lobo Caron, nio wa i waŋ lobo kikome," 
1Chronicles5:17 Jo magi ducu gicoyo nyiŋgi i buk me tekwaro i kare pa Yocam kabaka me Juda, ki i kare pa Jeroboam kabaka me Icrael." 
1Chronicles5:18 Jo pa Reuben, jo pa Gad, ki nucu kaka pa Manace yam gitye ki twoni oteka lweny ma gitye ki kwotgi ki pala lucwangi, ma gutelo atumgi bene, ma gin oyita lweny, dano alip pyeraŋwen wiye aŋwen, ki miya abiro ki pyerabicel ma guyubbe pi lweny." 
1Chronicles5:19 Gulwenyo ki Jekur, Napic ki Nodab, ma gin jo Agri," 
1Chronicles5:20 Lubaŋa okonyogi ka lweny kwedgi, pien gukok bote i kare ma gilwenyo, ci en oye legagi pien onoŋo gigene, ci omiyo jo Agri ki lwakgi ducu i ciŋgi," 
1Chronicles5:21 Guyako limgi makwo ma romo kinaga alip pyerabic kulu, romi alip miya aryo ki pyerabic, ki kana alip aryo, kacel ki dano alip miya acel ma guyakogi makwo." 
1Chronicles5:22 Guneko jo mapol, pien mony meno obedo mony pa Lubaŋa. Ci gubedo i lobo pa jo-nu nio wa i kare ma giterogi i opii." 
1Chronicles5:23 Jo me nucu kaka pa Manace gubedo i lobo meno. Gubedo mapol mada cakke ki i lobo Bacan nio kwede wa i Baal-kermon, Cenir ki got Kermon" 
1Chronicles5:24 Magi aye ludito wi kaka ma i odi pa kwarogi: Eper, Ici, Eliel, Ajriel, Jeremia, Kodavia ki Jadiel, twoni oteka lweny ma nyiggi oywek, ma gin aye ludito i odi pa kwarogi." 
1Chronicles5:25 Ento gu,nayo waŋ Lubaŋa pa kwarogi, gubedo ka woro lubaŋa pa jo me lobo meno ki tim kwele kwele-gu, gin jo ma onoŋo Lubaŋa otyekogi woko ki i nyimgi," 
1Chronicles5:26 Pi meno Lubaŋa opiyo Pul kabaka me Aciria, ma en aye Tiglat-Pilecer kabaka me Aciria, ci oterogi i opii, gin jo Reuben, jo Gad ki nucu kaka pa jo Manace. Oterogi wa i Kalak, Kabor, Kara ki i kulu Gojan, pud gitye kunnu nio wa onyoo." 
1Chronicles6:1 Litino awobe pa Levi gin aye Gercom, Kokat ki Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Litino awobe pa Kokat aye Amram, Ijur, Kebron ki Ujiel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Litino pa Amram aye Aron, Moses ki Miriam. Litino awobe pa Aron gin aye Nadab, Abiu, Eleajar ki Itamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleajar onywalo Finekaci, Finekaci onywalo Abicua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abicua onywalo Buki, Buki onywalo Uji," 
1Chronicles6:6 Uji onywalo Jerakia, Jerakia onywalo Merayot," 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayot onywalo Amaria, Amaria onywalo Akitub," 
1Chronicles6:8 Akitub onywalo Jadok, Jadok onywalo Akimaj," 
1Chronicles6:9 Akimaj onywalo Ajaria, Ajaria onywalo Yokanan," 
1Chronicles6:10 Yokanan onywalo Ajaria, ma en aye obedo ajwaka ma tiyo i ot pa Lubaŋa ma yam Solomon ogero i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles6:11 Ajaria onywalo Amaria, Amaria onywalo Akitub," 
1Chronicles6:12 Akitub onywalo Jadok, Jadok onywalo Calum," 
1Chronicles6:13 Calum onywalo Ilkia, Ilkia onywalo Ajaria," 
1Chronicles6:14 Ajaria onywalo Ceraya, Ceraya onywalo Yekojadak." 
1Chronicles6:15 Yekojadak gitero woko i opii i kare ma Rwot omiyo Nebukadnejar otero jo Juda ki jo Jerucalem i opii. 
1Chronicles6:16 Litino awobe pa Levi aye Gercom, Kokat ki Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Magi aye nyig litino awobe pa Gercom: Libni ki Cimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Litino awobe pa Kokat gin aye Amram, Ijar, Kebron ki Ujiel." 
1Chronicles6:19 Litino awobe pa Merari aye Makali ki Muci. Magi aye doggola pa jo Levi, ma lubo kwarogi." 
1Chronicles6:20 Likwayo pa Gercom gin ene: en onywalo wode Libni, ma wode Jakat, ma wode Jima," 
1Chronicles6:21 ma wode Joa, ma wode Iddo, ma wode Jera, ma wode Jeaterai."

1Chronicles6:24 ma wode Takat, ma wode Uriel, ma wode Ujia, ma wode Caul."

1Chronicles6:27 ma wode Eliab, ma wode Jerokam, ma wode Elkana."

1Chronicles6:30 ma wode Cimea, ma wode Kagia, ma wode Acaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Magi aye jo ma Daudi oketogi me loyo tic me wer i ot pa Lubaŋa, i ge kare ma gitero canduk pa Rwot giketo obedo iye." 
1Chronicles6:32 Ticgi obedo me wer i nyim kema, ma en aye kema me rwatte, nio wa i kare ma Solomon doŋ ogero ot pa Rwot i Jerucalem; gubedo ka tiyo ticgi kun gilubo cik ma gimiyogi." 
1Chronicles6:33 Magi aye nyig dano ma gitiyo tic meno, ki nyig likwayogi. Likwayo pa Kokat gin ene: Eman ma lawer, ma wod pa Joel, wod pa Camuel,"

1Chronicles6:34 wod pa Elkana, wod pa Jerokam, wod pa Eliel, wod pa Toa,"

1Chronicles6:36 wod pa Elkana, wod pa Joel, wod pa Ajaria, wod pa Jepania,"

1Chronicles6:38 wod pa Ijar, wod pa Kokat, wod pa Levi, wod pa Icrael;" 
1Chronicles6:39 ki ominne Acap ma yam Cuŋ ka gete tuŋ bade malacuc, en aye Acap ma wod pa Berekia, wod pa Cimea,"

1Chronicles6:44 Omegigi ma likwayo pa Merari yam gicuŋ tuŋ lacam; gin ene: Etan wod pa Kici, wod pa Abdi, wod pa Maluk," 
1Chronicles6:45 wod pa Kacabia, wod pa Amajia, wod pa Ilkia," 
1Chronicles6:46 wod pa Amji, wod pa Bani, wod pa Cemer," 
1Chronicles6:47 wod pa Makali, wod pa Muci, wod pa Merari, wod pa Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Yam giketo omegigi mukene ma gin Lulevi me tiyo tic ducu ma i kema, ma en aye ot pa Lubaŋa." 
1Chronicles6:49 Ento Aron ki awobene aye gityero gityer i wi keno tyer me gitum awaŋa, ki i keno tyer me waŋo odok eceta. Gin aye onoŋo gitiyo tic ducu ma i kabedo maleŋ makato ducu, ki tic me kwanyo bal ki i kom jo Icrael, kit ma Moses latic pa Lubaŋa yam ociko kwede ducu." 
1Chronicles6:50 Magi aye likwayo pa Aron: en onywalo wode Eleajar, ma wode Finekaci, ma wode Abicua," 
1Chronicles6:51 ma wode Buki, ma wode Uji, ma wode Jerakia," 
1Chronicles6:52 ma wode Merayot, ma wode Amaria, ma wode Akitub," 
1Chronicles6:53 ma wode Jadok, ma wode Akimaj." 
1Chronicles6:54 Magi aye kabedo ma likwayo pa Aron ma i doggola pa jo Kokat yam gubedo iye, ma oporo kit bedogi ki wan lobogi, kit ma kwir opoto kwede:" 
1Chronicles6:55 yam gimiyo botgi Kebron ma i lobo Juda, kacel ki olet ma orumo ducu;" 
1Chronicles6:56 ento potti ducu ma tye pi gaŋ meno, ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, onoŋo gimiyogi woko bot Kaleb wod pa Jepune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Ka dok likwayo pa Aron gimiyo botgi Kebron ma en aye gaŋ me laro lunek dano, Libna ki olette bene, Jatir, Ectemoa ki olette," 
1Chronicles6:58 Kilen ki olette, Debir ki olette," 
1Chronicles6:59 Acan ki olette, ki Bet-cemec ki olette." 
1Chronicles6:60 Ka dok gimiyo botgi gaŋi magi ma gikwanyo ki i lobo me kaka pa Benjamin: Geba ki olette, Alemet ki olette, Anatot ki olette. Kumeno gaŋi ma i doggolagi ducu onoŋo giromo apar wiye adek." 
1Chronicles6:61 Jo Kokat mudoŋ gimiyo botgi gaŋi apar ma gipokogi ki kwir, ma gikwanyogi ki bot nucu kaka pa Manace." 
1Chronicles6:62 Jo Gercom gimiyo botgi gaŋi apar wiye adek macalo doggolagi tye, ma gikwanyo ki i kaka pa Icakar, Acer, Naputali ki Manace i lobo Bacan." 
1Chronicles6:63 Jo Merari gimiyo botgi gaŋi apar wiye aryo macalo doggolagi tye, ma gikwanyo ki i kaka pa Reuben, Gad ki Jabulon." 
1Chronicles6:64 Kit meno jo Icrael gumiyo gaŋi bot jo Levi kacel ki oletgi ducu, wek gubed iye." 
1Chronicles6:65 Gumiyo botgi gllŋi ma gicoyo nyiŋgi malo-ni ma gikwanyogi ki bot kaka pa Juda, Cimeon ki Benjamin kun gibolo kwir." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ka dok doggola mogo pa likwayo pa Kokat gimiyo botgi gaŋi ma gikwanyo ki bot kaka pa Epraim. 
1Chronicles6:67 Gimiyo botgi Cekem ma en aye gaŋ me laro lunek dano ma i lobo godi me Epraim, ki olette, Gejer ki olette," 
1Chronicles6:68 Jokmeam ki olette, Bet-koron ki olette," 
1Chronicles6:69 Aijalon ki olette, Gat-Rimmon ki olette," 
1Chronicles6:70 Ka dok doggola pa jo Kokat mudoŋŋe ducu gimiyo botgi gaŋi magi ma gikwanyo ki bot nucu kaka pa Manace: Aner ki olette, Bileam ki olette." 
1Chronicles6:71 Jo pa Gercom gimiyo botgi gaŋi magi ma gikwanyo ki bot nucu kaka pa Manace: Golan ma i Bacan ki olette, Acitarot ki olette;" 
1Chronicles6:72 ka dok gaŋi magi ma gikwanyo ki bot kaka pa Icakar: Kedec ki olette, Daberat ki olette," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramot ki olette, Anem ki olette;" 
1Chronicles6:74 ka dok gaŋi magi ma gikwanyo ki bot kaka pa Acer: Macal ki olette, Abudon ki olette," 
1Chronicles6:75 Kukok ki olette, Rekob ki olette;" 
1Chronicles6:76 ka dok gaŋi magi ma gikwanyo ki bot kaka pa Naputali: Kedec ma i Galilaya ki olette, Kamon ki olette, Kiriataim ki olette." 
1Chronicles6:77 Jo pa Merari mudoŋ gimiyo botgi gaŋi magi ma gikwanyo ki bot kaka pa Jabulon kun gibolo kwir: Rimmono ki olette, Tabor ki olette;" 
1Chronicles6:78 ka dok i loka kulu Jordan yo tuŋ wokceŋ ma cok ki Jeriko gimiyo botgi gaŋi magi ma gikwanyo ki bot kaka pa Reuben: Bejer ma i tim aroo kacel ki olette, Jaja ki olette," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemot ki olette, Mepaat ki olette;" 
1Chronicles6:80 ka dok gaŋi magi ma gikwanyo ki bot kaka pa Gad: Ramot ma i Gilead ki olette, Makanaim ki olette," 
1Chronicles6:81 Kecbon ki olette, Jajer ki olette." 
1Chronicles7:1 Litino awobe pa Icakar aye Tola, Puwa, Jacub ki Cimron, gin aŋwen." 
1Chronicles7:2 Litino awobe pa Tola aye Uji, Repaya, Jeriel, Jamai, Ibcam ki Cemuel, Gin aye ludito kaka pa jo Tola ki i odi pa kwarogi ma gubedo twoni oteka lweny i yalwakgi. I kare pa Daudi welgi oromo alip pyeraryo wiye aryo ki miya abicel." 
1Chronicles7:3 Latin awobi pa Uji aye Ijrakia. Litino awobe pa Ijrakia aye Mikael, Obadia, Joel ki Icia, gin abic, ma gin ducu jo madito." 
1Chronicles7:3 Latin awobi pa Uji aye Ijrakia. Litino awobe pa Ijrakia aye Mikael, Obadia, Joel ki Icia, gin abic, ma gin ducu jo madito." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ka dok onoŋo tye lwak buca mony pa lulweny ma gicoyo nyiŋgi ma lubo yalwakgi ma i dog odi pa kwarogi; welgi obedo alip pyeradek wiye abicel, pien onoŋo gitye ki mon mapol ki litino awobe mapol." 
1Chronicles7:5 Lukakagi ma i doggola pa Icakar ducu onoŋo giromo twoni oteka lweny alip pyeraboro wiye abiro ma gicoyo nyiŋgi i buk me tekwarogi. 
1Chronicles7:6 Litino awobe pa Benjamin gin aye Bela, Beker ki Jediael, gin adek." 
1Chronicles7:7 Litino awobe pa Bela aye Ejibon, Uji, Ujiel, Jerimot ki Iri, gin abic, ma gin ducu ludito wi kaka ma i odi pa kwarogi, twoni oteka lweny, I kare ma yam gicoyo nyiŋgi i buk me tekwaro, welgi oromo alip pyeraryo wiye aryo ki pyeradek wiye aŋwen." 
1Chronicles7:8 Litino awobe pa Beker gin aye Jemira, Yoaci, Eliejer, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremot, Abija, Anatot ki Alemet; jo magi ducu gin awobe pa Beker." 
1Chronicles7:9 Yam gicoyo nyiŋgi i buk me tekwaro ma lubo yalwakgi, kun gin ludito wi kaka i odi pa kwarogi, twoni oteka lweny; welgi onoŋo romo alip pyeraryo ki miya aryo." 
1Chronicles7:10 Latin awobi pa Jediael aye Bilan. Litino awobe pa Bilan aye Jeuc, Benjamin, Ekud, Kenaana, Jetan, Tarcic ki Akicakar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Magi ducu likwayo pa Jediael ma gin ludito kaka i odi pa kwarogi, twoni oteka lweny; welgi oromo alip apar wiye abiro ki miya aryo ma guyubbe pi lweny." 
1Chronicles7:12 Cupim ki Kupim gin aye litino awobe pa Ir, Kucim obedo latin awobi pa Aker." 
1Chronicles7:13 Litino awobe pa Naputali gin aye Jajiel, Guni, Jejer ki Calum, gin aye likwayo pa Bila," 
1Chronicles7:14 Litino awo be pa Manace aye Aciriel ki Makir ma obedo won Gilead. Gin aryo ducu dako aŋecane ma anyira jo Aram aye onywalogi. 
1Chronicles7:15 Makir onyomo dako ki Kupim ki Cupim bene. Nyiŋ laminne aye Maaka. Nyiŋ wode me aryone Jelopekad. Jelopekad onywalo anyira keken. 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka ma dako pa Makir onywalo wode ma ocako nyiŋe Perec; nyiŋ ominne Cerec. Litino awobe pa Perec aye Ulam ki Rakem. 
1Chronicles7:17 Latin awobi pa Ulam aye Bedan. Magi gin likwayo pa Gilead wod pa Makir, ma wod pa Manace." 
1Chronicles7:18 Kamoleket ma lamiŋ Gilead onywalo Icikod, Abiejer ki Makala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Litino awobe pa Cemida gin aye Akian, Cekem, Liki ki Aniam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Likwayo pa Epraim gin aye Cutela ma wode Bered, ma wode Takat, ma wode Eleada, ma wode Takat," 
1Chronicles7:21 ma wode Jabad, ma wode Cutela. Litino awobe mukene pa Epraim aye Ejer ki Elead ma jo Gat ma gin wegi lobo-nu guneko woko i kare ma awo be-nu gucito ka yako dyaŋigi," 
1Chronicles7:22 Wongi Epraim obedo ka kokogi pi kare malac, dok omegine bene gubino ka kweyo cwinye." 
1Chronicles7:23 Lacen Epraim obedo ki dakone ci dako ogamo, onywalo wode. Wonne ocako nyiŋe Beria, pien onoŋo can opoto i ode," 
1Chronicles7:24 Nyare obedo Ceera; en aye ogero gaŋ Bet-koron mapiny ki mamalone bene, ki Ujen-Ceera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Wod pa Beria aye Repa ma wode Recep, ma wode Tela, ma wode Takan," 
1Chronicles7:26 ma wode Ladan ma wode Amikud, ma wode Elicama," 
1Chronicles7:27 ma wode Nun, ma wode Yocwa."

1Chronicles7:29 ka dok i wan lobo pa jo Manace, Bet-cean ki gaŋi ma i ŋete, Taanak ki gaŋi ma i ŋete, Megido ki gaŋi ma i ŋete, Dor ki gaŋi ma i ŋete, Likwayo pa Yucepu wod pa Icrael yam gubedo i kabedo magi." 
1Chronicles7:30 Litino awobe pa Acer gin aye Imna, Iciva, Icivi, Beria ki Cera ma lamingi." 
1Chronicles7:31 Litino awobe pa Beria gin aye Keber ki Malkiel ma ocako gaŋ Bir-jait. 
1Chronicles7:32 Keber onywalo Japulet, Gomer, Kotam ki Cua ma lamingi." 
1Chronicles7:33 Litino awobe pa Japulet aye Racak, Bimal ki Acivat. Magi gin Iiiino pa Japulet."

1Chronicles8:39 Litino awobe pa ominne Ecek gin ene: Ulam ma latin kayone, me aryone Jeuc, me adekke Elipelet." 
1Chronicles8:40 Litino awobe pa Ulam yam gin twoni oteka lweny, wegi atum, ma litino awobegi ki likwayogi pol mada, gin ducu miya acel ki pyerabic. Jo magi ducu gin jo pa Benjamin." 
1Chronicles9:1 Yam gicoyo nyiŋ jo Icrael ducu i buk me tekwarogi, ma gicoyogi i buk pa Luker me Icrael. Jo Juda yam giterogi i opii i Babilon pien onoŋo guŋayo waŋ Lubaŋa." 
1Chronicles9:2 Jo ma gukwono dwogo cen ka bedo i dul lobo ma yam gimiyo botgi i gaŋigi gin aye jo Icrael kacel ki ajwagi pa Lubaŋa, Lulevi, ki lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa," 
1Chronicles9:3 Jo mogo me kaka pa Juda, Benjamin, Epraim ki Manace gucako bedo i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles9:4 Gin aye Utai wod pa Amikud, ma wod pa Omri, wod pa Imri, wod pa Bani ki i kin likwayo pa Perej ma wod pa Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Dok i kin likwayo pa Cela, Acaya ma latin kayo ki litino awobene." 
1Chronicles9:6 Ki i kin likwayo pa Jera, Jeuel ki lukakagi, gin miya abicel ki pyeraboŋwen noŋo." 
1Chronicles9:7 Ki i kin jo Benjamin Calu ma wod pa Meculam, wod pa Kodavia, wod pa Kacenua," 
1Chronicles9:8 Ibneya wod pa Jerokam, Ela wod pa Uji ma wod pa Mikri, ki Meculam wod pa Cepatia ma wod pa Reuel, wod pa Ibinija," 
1Chronicles9:9 kacel ki lukakagi ma lubo yalwakgi, dano miya aboŋwen ki pyerabic wiye abicel. Gin ducu ludito kaka i odi pa kwarogi." 
1Chronicles9:10 Ajwagi pa Lubaŋa ma gudwogo cen ma gubedo i Jerucalem gin aye Jedaya, Jekoyarib, Jakin" 
1Chronicles9:11 ki Ajaria wod pa Ilkia ma wod pa Meculam, wod pa Jadok, wod pa Merayot, wod pa Akitub, ma en aye ladit ma loyo ot pa Lubaŋa;" 
1Chronicles9:12 ki Adaya wod pa Jerokam ma wod pa Packur, wod pa Malkija; ki Maacai wod pa Adiel ma wod pa Jakajera, wod pa Meculam, wod pa Mecilemit, wod pa Imer;" 
1Chronicles9:13 kacel ki lukakagi bene ma gin tudito kaka i odi pa kwarogi, gin dano alip acel ki miya abiro ki pyerabicel, jo makwiri twatwal i kom tic i ot pa Lubaŋa." 
1Chronicles9:14 Lulevi ma gudwogo cen ma gubedo i Jerucalem gin aye Cemaya wod pa Kacub, ma wod pa Ajrikam, wod pa Kacabia, wod pa Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 ki Bakbakar, Kerec, Galal, ki Matania wod pa Mika ma wod pa Jikri, wod pa Acap;" 
1Chronicles9:16 ki Obadia wod pa Cemaya ma wod pa Galal, wod pa Jedutun; kacel ki Berekia wod pa Aca wod pa Elkana ma obedo i kin gaŋi pa jo Netopa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Lugwok-doggola ot pa Lubaŋa ma gubedo i Jerucalem gin aye Calum, Akub, Talmon, Akiman ki lukakagi, ma Calum aye laditgi." 
1Chronicles9:18 Nio wa i kare meno onoŋo gubedo lugwok-doggola ot pa Lubaŋa ma kabaka wok ki iye, yo tuŋ wokceŋ. Magi aye lugwokdoggola gaŋ pa Lulevi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Calum wod pa Kore, ma wod pa Ebiacap, wod pa Kora, kacel ki lukakagi ma i dog ot pa kwarogi, likwayo pa Kora, gin aye lugwok dog kema, kit macalo kwarogi yam gubedo ludito ma giloyo gony pa Rwot kun gigwoko doggola me donyo." 
1Chronicles9:20 I kare macon onoŋo Finekaci wod pa Eleajar en aye obedo ladit ma loyogi; onoŋo Rwot tye kwede. 
1Chronicles9:21 Jekaria wod pa Mecelemia en aye onoŋo lagwok-doggola ma donyo i kema me rwatte," 
1Chronicles9:22 Jo magi ducu ma yam giyerogi me bedo lugwok-doggola onoŋo giromo dano miya aryo ki apar wiye aryo, Gicoyo nyiŋgi i buk me tekwarogi ki i gaŋgi. Onoŋo kabaka Daudi ki Camuel ma lanen-piny yam gumoko kwarogi i dog tic man, pien gubedo dano ma gigenogi twatwal." 
1Chronicles9:23 Kit meno gin ki likwayogi gubedo ludito tic ma loyo doggola ot pa Rwot, en aye ot me kema pa Rwot, macalo lukur-piny." 
1Chronicles9:24 Lugwok-doggola giketogi i kabedo aŋwen, yo tuŋ wokceŋ, yo tuŋ potoceŋ, yo tuŋ acam ki yo tuŋ acuc." 
1Chronicles9:25 Lukakagi ma i gaŋigi myero gubin pi nino abiro kare ki kare me bedo kwedgi; 
1Chronicles9:26 pien lugwok-doggola madito gibedo kunnu kare ducu, gin aye Lulevi ma giloyo kicika odi matinone ki odi kano lim ma i ot pa Lubaŋa," 
1Chronicles9:27 Odi butogi girumo ot pa Lubaŋa, pien tic me kuro piny obedo megi, gin bene gigwoko layab me yabo ot odiko odiko," 
1Chronicles9:28 Jo mogo i kingi onoŋo gigwoko jami ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Lubaŋa; i kare ducu ma gidwokogi ki ma gikwanyogi woko, gikwanogi." 
1Chronicles9:29 Jo mukene i kingi giketogi me loyo jami ma bedo i ot pa Lubaŋa, ki jami tic maleŋ ducu, dok giloyo bene moko mapwotte, ki koŋo Yiŋo, ki moo, ki odok eceta, ki an wece." 
1Chronicles9:30 Jo mukene ma gin litino pa ajwagi giyubo jami me aruba pi aŋwece. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matitia, dano acel ma i kin Lulevi, ma en latin kayo pa Calum ma jo Kora, en aye obedo lalo tic me tedo mugati ma apada-ni, pien en dano ma genne." 
1Chronicles9:32 Lukakagi mogo ma gin jo Kokat giloyo mugati ma giketo i nyim Rwot; ticgi obedo me yu bone cabit ki cabit. 
1Chronicles9:33 Magi aye luwer, ma gin ludito kaka i odi pa kwarogi; yam gibuto i kicika odi matinone ma i ot pa Lubaŋa, ma pe gitiyo tic mukene, pien yam gibedo i dog tic dyeceŋ ki dyewor." 
1Chronicles9:34 Magi aye ludito kaka i odi pa kwarogi ma i kaka pa Lulevi, ma lubo yalwakgi, gin aye ludito ma yam gibedo i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles9:35 Jeyel ma won Gibeon yam bedo i Gibeon; nyiŋ dakone Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 latin awobine me kayo en Abudon, ka dok Jur, Kic, Baal, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedor, Akio, Jeker, ki Miklot;" 
1Chronicles9:38 Miklot aye won Cimeam, Jo magi bene yam gubedo ma gukemme ki lukakagi ma gibedo i Jerucalem, kacel ki lukakagi." 
1Chronicles9:39 Ner onywalo Kic, Kic onywalo Caulo, Caulo onywalo Yonacan, Malkicua, Abinadab ki Ecibaal;" 
1Chronicles9:40 Yonacan onywalo Meribaal, Meribaal onywalo Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Litino awobe pa Mika gin aye Piton, Melek, Takrea ki Akaj." 
1Chronicles9:42 Akaj onywalo Jara, Jara onywalo Alemet, Ajimavet ki Jimri. Jimri onywalo Moja," 
1Chronicles9:43 Moja onywalo Binea; ma wode Repaya, ma wode Eleaca, ma wode Ajel." 
1Chronicles9:44 Ajel yam tye ki litino awobe abicel, ma nyiŋgi ene: Ajrikam, Bokeru, Icmael, Cearia, Obadia ki Kanan. Jo magi aye litino awobe pa Ajel." 
1Chronicles10:1 I kare meno jo Piliciti gulwenyo i kom Icrael. Jo Icrael guriŋo woko ki i nyim jo Piliciti, ci ginekogi i wi got Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Jo Piliciti guriŋo gudiŋo kor Caulo ki awo bene, ci guneko Yonacan ki Abinadab ki Malkicua, gin ducu awobe pa Caulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Lweny ogeto matek i kor Caulo, ci wegi atero gucele woko, guketo ret i kome," 
1Chronicles10:4 Caulo owaco bot latin jami lwennye ni, “Wot pala lucwanni woko, icoba kwede pil, wek jo ma pe gilirogini, ma pe giŋeyo Lubaŋa pe gubin i koma, miyo giyarre i koma.” Ento latin jami lwennye pe oye, pien lworo omake matek, omiyo Caulo okwanyo pala lucwanne kikome ci opoto ogurre kwede kekene." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ka latin jami lwennye oneno ni Caulo doŋ oto woko, ci en bene opoto ogurre kene ki pala lucwanne, oto woko." 
1Chronicles10:6 Kit meno Caulo ki awobene adek-ki kacel ki jo me ode ducu, guto woko lawaŋacel," 
1Chronicles10:7 Ka jo Icrael ducu ma onoŋo gitye i nota guneno ni mony pa jo Icrael guriŋo woko, ki Caulo ki awobene ginekogi woko, ci guriŋo guweko gaŋigi woko; ci jo Piliciti gubino gucako bedo i gani-nu." 
1Chronicles10:8 Orwone jo Piliciti gubino ka lunyo boŋŋi ki i kom jo ma ginekogi, ci gunoŋo kom Caulo ki kom awobene adek-ki i kom got Gilboa," 
1Chronicles10:9 Gulunyo jami lweny pa Caulo ki i kome, gucito kwede, wa ki wiye bene ma gutoŋo, ka gucwalo kwena oromo i lobo pa jo Piliciti ducu pi tero lok me yomcwiny bot jogigi ki bot lwakgi ducu." 
1Chronicles10:10 Guketo jami lweny pa Caulo i oŋogigi; ka dok guguro wiye i ot jok Dagon. 
1Chronicles10:11 Ento ka jo Jabec-gilead ducu guwinyo gin ma jo Piliciti gutimo i kom Caulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 ci oteka lwenygi ducu gua, gukwanyo kom Caulo woko ki kom awobene, guterogi wa i Jabec, Ka guyiko cogogi i te yat kworo ma tye i Jabec, ci guri kec pi nino abiro." 
1Chronicles10:13 Caulo oto pien pe obedo lagen; oŋayo waŋ Rwot woko, pe otiyo gin ma Rwot ociko, dok owoto ka tyet bot lakor tipo pi yero nyime," 
1Chronicles10:14 ma pe openyo dog Rwot. Pienno omiyo Rwot oneke woko, ci okwanyo ker omiyo bot Daudi ma wod pa Yece." 
1Chronicles11:1 Lacen jo Icrael ducu gucokke bot Daudi i Kebron, ci guwacci, “Nen ba, wan aye wa cogo komi ki riŋo komi." 
1Chronicles11:2 I kare macon ca, wa i kare ma onoŋo Caulo aye kabaka ma loyowa, in yam itelo wi jo Icrael ka gicito ka lweny, idwokowa paco bene, Rwot Lubaŋani bene nene owaco boti ni, ‘In aye ibibedo lakwa lwakka jo Icrael, dok ibibedo laker ma loyogi.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Kit meno ludoŋo pa jo Icrael ducu gubino bot kabaka i Kebron. Kabaka Daudi oketo gicikke kwedgi i Kebron i nyim Rwot, ci guwiro Daudi obedo kabaka ma lo yo jo Icrael, kit ma yam Rwot oloko ki i dog Camuel." 
1Chronicles11:4 Daudi ki jo Icrael ducu gucito i Jerucalem, ma en aye Jebuc, ka lweny i kom jo Jebuc ma gibedo i lobo kunnu," 
1Chronicles11:5 Jo ma gibedo i Jebuc onoŋo guwaco bot Daudi ni, “In pe ibidonyo kany.” Ento Daudi ocito omayo gogo me Cion woko, ci odoko gaŋ kalle." 
1Chronicles11:6 Daudi owacci, “Dano ma bikwoŋo neko jo Jebuc, en aye bibedo ladit ma lawimony.” Ci Joab wod pa Ceruya okwono ito kunnu ci en odoko laditgi." 
1Chronicles11:7 Daudi ocako bedo i cel gogo, mumiyo gilwoŋo ni, Gaŋ kai pa Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Daudi ogero gaŋ madit orumo woko likiŋ, cakke ki i Millo; Joab ogero odi mukene ma i gaŋ ma yam oballe." 
1Chronicles11:9 Daudi omedde odoko dit twatwal, pien onoŋo Rwot me mony aye tye kwede." 
1Chronicles11:10 Magi gin aye ludito ki i kin twoni oteka lweny pa Daudi, jo ma yam gumiyo kony matek i kerre, kacel ki jo Icrael ducu, ci guketo en me bedo kabaka, kit ma onoŋo Rwot yam oloko i kom Icrael." 
1Chronicles11:11 Man aye lok kom twoni oteka lweny pa Daudi: Jacobeam ma jo Kakmon en aye ladit pa jo adek-ki; en yam okato ki toŋŋe i kom jo miya adek, ci onekogi woko ducu lawaŋacel." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ŋat ma lubo en ki i kin twoni oteka rweny acel-ki en aye Eleajar wod pa Dodo ma jo Akoki. 
1Chronicles11:13 En obedo kacel ki Daudi i Pac-dammim i kare ma jo Piliciti gucokke ka lweny kunnu. Poto onoŋo tye kunnu ma cayiri ocek iye mabup, ci lwak ocako riŋo woko ki i nyimjo Piliciti." 
1Chronicles11:14 Ento en ocamo co ci ocuŋ i dye poto pi laro, ocako neko jo Piliciti, ci Rwot olarogi ki loc madit twatwal." 
1Chronicles11:15 Jo adek ki i kin ludito pyeradek-ki gulor piny wa i got ka ma Daudi bedo iye i boro Adullam; onoŋo mony pa jo Piliciti ogony i nota Repaim. 
1Chronicles11:16 I karenu onoŋo Daudi tye i kakannene, ki cel gogo pa Lupiliciti onoŋo tye i Beterekem," 
1Chronicles11:17 Daudi oloko ki miti madwoŋ ni, “Kono ŋatti mo ocito ka twomo pii ki i wan it Beterekem ma tye cok ki dog gaŋ ca, omiya amati, kono ber mada!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ci twoni lweny adek-ku gucito gubaro dye gony pa jo Piliciti, gutwomo pii ki i wan it Beterekem ma tye cok ki dog gaŋ ca, ci gukelo bot Daudi. Ento Daudi pe omato; otiŋo oliyo piny i nyim Rwot pi gityer amata," 
1Chronicles11:19 kun wacci, “Pe obed kumeno ki i nyim Lubaŋana, an pe myero atim kit man. An aye dok amato remo pa jo-ni? Pien gukelo pi dyero komgi.” En aye lok mumiyo pe omato pii meno. Twoni lweny adek-ku yam gutimo kit meno." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abicai omin Joab onoŋo ladit i kin jo pyeradek-ki. Otiŋo toŋŋe olwenyo i kom jo miya adek ci onekogi woko ducu, ma omiyo nyiŋe oywek ma mito rom ki jo adek ca." 
1Chronicles11:21 Pienno olimo yweka madit ki i kom jo pyeradek-ki, ci odoko ladit wi monygi; ento pe olimo rwom pa jo adek ca." 
1Chronicles11:22 Ki Benaya wod pa Yekoyada obedo twon oteka ma i Kabjeel, latim gin madito; en oneko awobe aryo ma gin twoni labwor me Moab. En bene olor odonyo i bur ci oneko iye labwor i kare ma pee ocwer mapek," 
1Chronicles11:23 Ka dok oneko Laejipt mo, dano ma kome pek ma borre romo futi abiro ki nucu. Laejipt meno onoŋo tye ki toŋŋe i ciŋe ma rom ki rii yat lacwe boŋo; ento en Benaya ocito bote ki odoone, ci oyuto toŋ woko ki i cin Laejipt, ka oneke kwede woko ki toŋŋe-nu." 
1Chronicles11:24 Benaya wod pa Yekoyada otimo gin madito kit meno, omiyo nyiŋe olimo yweka madit ma mito rom ki twoni lweny adek-ki." 
1Chronicles11:25 Nyiŋe oywek i kin jo pyeradek-ki, ento pe olimo rwom pa jo adek ca. Daudi oketo en obedo ladit pa jo ma gwoko en kabaka." 
1Chronicles11:26 Twoni oteka lweny ma i kin lumony gin aye Acael ma omin Joab, Elkanan wod pa Dodo me Beterekem," 
1Chronicles11:27 Camot me Karod, Kelej ma jo Palti," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira wod pa Ikec me Tekoa, Abiejer me Anatot," 
1Chronicles11:29 Cibekai ma Lakucat, Ilai ma jo Akoki," 
1Chronicles11:30 Makarai me Netopa, Keled wod pa Baana me Netopa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai wod pa Ribai me Gibea pa jo Benjamin, Benaya me Ptraton," 
1Chronicles11:32 Kurai ma bedo i nota ora me Gaac, Abiel me Arba," 
1Chronicles11:33 Ajimavet me Bakarum, Eliaba me Caalbon," 
1Chronicles11:34 Kacem ma jo Gijon, Yonacan wod pa Cage ma jo Karar," 
1Chronicles11:35 Akiam wod pa Cakar ma jo Karar, Elipal wod pa Ur," 
1Chronicles11:36 Keper ma jo Mekerat, Akija ma jo Pelon," 
1Chronicles11:37 Kejero me Karmel, Naarai wod pa Eiibai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Joel omin Natan, Mibkar wod pa Agri," 
1Chronicles11:38 Joel omin Natan, Mibkar wod pa Agri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Jelek ma jo Ammon, Nakarai me Beerot ma latin jami lweny pa Joab wod pa Jeruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira ma jo Itri, Gareb ma jo Itri," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria ma jo Kit, Jabad wod pa Aklai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina wod pa Cija ma jo pa Reuben, ma ladit i kin jo pa Reuben, en aye obedo ki jone pyeradek bene;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Kanan wod pa Maaka ki Yocapat ma Lamitini," 
1Chronicles11:44 Ujia ma jo Acitera, Cama ki Jeyel ma awobe pa Ketam me Aroer," 
1Chronicles11:45 Jediael wod pa Cimri ki ominne Joka, ma Latiji," 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliel ma jo Makavi, ki Jeribai ki Jocavia ma awobe pa Elnaam, ki Itima ma jo Moab," 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliel ki Obed, ki Jaciel ma jo Mejoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Jo magi yam gubino bot Daudi i Jiklag, i kare ma piny odiyo ma doŋ pe twero wot ka mo pi Caulo wod pa Kic; gin aye onoŋo gitye i kin twoni oteka ma gubedo ka konye i lweny." 
1Chronicles12:2 Gin wegi atum; gin yam gicelo atero nyo gibayo kidi kadi ki ciŋgi ma lacuc ki lacam bene. Gin onoŋo jo pa Benjamin, ma i kaka pa Caulo-gi." 
1Chronicles12:3 Laditgi obedo Akiejer, ka dok Yoaci gin aryo ducu litino pa Cema me Gibea; ka dok Jejiel ki Pelet ma awobe pa Ajimavet; ki Beraka, Yeko me Anatot." 
1Chronicles12:4 Icmaya me Gibeon, twon oteka ma i kin jo pyeradek ca, en ladit ma loyo jo pyeradek-ku; Jeremia, Jakajiel, Yokanan, Jojabed me Gedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 Elujai, Jerimot, Bealia, Cemaria, Cepatia ma jo Karup;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elkana, Icia, Ajarel, Joejer ki Jacobeam, ma gin jo pa Kora," 
1Chronicles12:7 ki Joela ki Jebadia, gin awobe pa Jerokam me Gedor." 
1Chronicles12:7 ki Joela ki Jebadia, gin awobe pa Jerokam me Gedor." 
1Chronicles12:8 Oteka ma guŋiyo ki lweny ma i kin jo pa Gad gugwarre gucito bot Daudi i kakannene ma i tim, oyi ta ma giŋeyo lweny ki kwot ki toŋ, ma wangi nen calo wan labwor, ma gidwir calo til ma i godi." 
1Chronicles12:9 Gin ene: Ejer ma laditgi, me aryone Obadia, me adekke Eliab," 
1Chronicles12:10 me aŋwenne Micimana, me abicce Jeremia," 
1Chronicles12:11 me abicelle Atai, me abirone Eliel," 
1Chronicles12:12 me aborone Yokanan, me aboŋwenne Elijabad," 
1Chronicles12:13 me aparre Jeremia, me apar wiye acelle Makibanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Jo Gad magi ducu gin ludito ma loyo mony; ludito matinone giloyo jo miya, ki maditone loyo jo alip." 
1Chronicles12:15 Magi gin aye jo ma yam guŋolo Jordan i dwe mukwono, i kare ma onoŋo piine opoŋ woko Libyeny nio wa i tura ci guryemo jo ma gitye i nota ducu, ma yo tuŋ wokceŋ ki yo tuŋ potoceŋ." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ka dok jo pa Benjamin mogo, ki pa Juda, gubino bot Daudi i kakannene." 
1Chronicles12:17 Daudi okato woko ka jolo wigi, kun waco botgi ni, “Ka ce wubino bota ki cwiny me wat pi konya, ci abibedo kwedwu ki yomcwiny. Ento ka ce wubino ka umo waŋa wek wumiya bot lumerokka, kadi bed an cwinya leŋ, ci Lubaŋa pa kwarowa myero onen ci oŋol gire.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Ci Cwiny pa Lubaŋa obino i kom Amacai, ma en aye ladit pa jo pyeradek ca, ci owacci, “Wan wa lwakki, in Daudi, wabibedo kwedi, in wod pa Yece. Kuc, kuc obed kwedi, kuc bene obed i kom lukony in! Pien Lubaŋani aye tye ka konyi.” Daudi ojologi, ci oketogi gubedo ludito me buca monnye." 
1Chronicles12:19 Jo pa Manace mogo gulokke bot Daudi i kare ma obino ki jo Piliciti ka lweny i kom Caulo. Kadi bed kumeno en pe omedo ki konyogi pien ludito pa jo Piliciti guyubo lok i kome, ci guryeme woko, kun giwacci, “Ka ce bidok bot laditte Caulo, ci doŋ wato oke.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Jo pa Manace ma gudonyo bote i kare ma en cito i Jiklag gin ene: Adina, Jojabad, Jediael, Mikael, Jojabad, Eliu ki Jiletai, ma gin aye ludito ma loyo jo alip ma i Manace." 
1Chronicles12:21 Gukonyo Daudi ki lweny i kom buca mony pa luyak; pien onoŋo gin ducu twoni oteka lweny ma ludito me mony," 
1Chronicles12:22 Dano gibino ka konyo Daudi nino ki nino, nio ka gudoko cwar mony madit, ma rom ki mony pa Lubaŋa." 
1Chronicles12:23 Magi gin aye wel dul buca mony ma guruko lweny ma yam gubino bot Daudi i Kebron pi dwoko ker pa Caulo i ciŋe, kit ma yam Rwot owaconi." 
1Chronicles12:24 Jo pa Juda ma wegi kwot ki toŋ onoŋo giromo alip abicel ki miya aboro ma guruko lweny. 
1Chronicles12:25 Ki jo pa Cimon ma twoni oteka lweny alip abiro ki miya acel. 
1Chronicles12:26 Jo pa Levi alip aŋwen ki miya abicel. 
1Chronicles12:27 Ka dok Yekoyada ma loyo jo me ot pa Aron obino ki jo alip adek ki miya abiro. 
1Chronicles12:28 Jadok latin awobi ma twon oteka obino ki ludito wi mony pyeraryo wiye aryo ma i dog ot pa wonne kikome. 
1Chronicles12:29 Jo pa Benjamin ma lukaka pa Caulo gubino ma romo alip adek; jo mapol ki i komgi yam gubedo ka cwako kor ot pa Caulo nio wa i kare meno. 
1Chronicles12:30 Jo pa Epraim gubino ma romo alip pyeraryo ki miya aboro, ma gin oteka lweny ma nyiŋgi oywek i dog odi pa kwarogi." 
1Chronicles12:31 Jo ma i nucu kaka pa Manace gubino ma romo jo alip aboro ma giyerogi ki nyiŋgi wek gubin ka keto Daudi kabaka. 
1Chronicles12:32 Jo pa Icakar, jo ma onoŋo giŋeyo kare dok giŋeyo gin ma myero Icrael oti, gubino ki ludito miya aryo ki lukakagi ducu ma i te locgi." 
1Chronicles12:33 Jo pa Jabulon gubino ki jo ma gunyebbe ki lweny ma romo alip pyerabic, ma gurukke pi lweny ki jami lwenygi ducu pi konyo Daudi ki cwinygi acel." 
1Chronicles12:34 Jo pa Naputali gubino ki ludito wi mony ma romo alip acel ma gitye ki danogi alip pyeradek wiye abiro ma gutiŋo kwot ki toŋ. 
1Chronicles12:35 Jo pa Dan gubino ki jo alip pyeraryo wiye aboro ki miya abicel ma guyubbe pi lweny. 
1Chronicles12:36 Jo pa Acer gubino ki jo ma gunyebbe ki lweny ma romo alip pyeraŋwen, ma doŋ guyubbe pi lweny." 
1Chronicles12:37 Jo pa Reuben, jo pa Gad ki nucu kaka pa Manace ma gua loka Jordan gubino ma romo alip miya acel ki pyeraryo ma gurukke ki jami lwenygi ducu." 
1Chronicles12:38 Lulweny magi ducu gurwayo ma guryeyo kikore, gubino kwede wa i Kebron ki cwiny mukemo keto Daudi kabaka ma loyo Icrael ducu; kit meno jo Icrael ducu mudoŋŋe gubedo ki cwiny acel me keto Daudi kabaka." 
1Chronicles12:39 Ci gubedo ki Daudi kunnu pi nino adek kun gicamo, gimato bene, pien onoŋo utmegigi gutyeko yubbe pigi." 
1Chronicles12:40 Dok jo ma gicok kwedgi bene, ma gua wa ki i lobo Icakar ki Jabulon ki Naputali gucom ki cam ma giketo i wi kana, ki kinaga, ki kana madito ki twoni-gu; gukelo lwak moko kwon madwoŋ, ki poki otini, ki dog tuga olok mutwo-gu, ki koŋo vino, ki moo-gu, ki twoni ki romi, pien onoŋo yomcwiny tye i Icrael." 
1Chronicles13:1 Daudi yam oyubo lok ki ludito ma loyo buca mony me jo alip ki buca mony me jo miya, ki ludito ma i dul acel acel." 
1Chronicles13:2 Ci Daudi oloko ki kacokke pa jo Icrael ducu kun wacci, “Ka ce bedo ber botwu, ma Rwot Lubaŋawa bene mito, ci wacwalu kwena orom kin utmegiwa ma gudoŋ i lobo Icrael ducu, kacel ki ajwagi ki Lulevi ma i gaŋi ma gitye ki lobo me kakwatgi, wek gubin gucokke kacel botwa." 
1Chronicles13:3 Ka wek doŋ wakelu canduk pa Lubaŋawa botwa, pien i kare pa Caulo yam watenyo woko ata.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Ci kacokke ducu oye ni gitim kit meno, pien lokke onen atir bot lwak ducu." 
1Chronicles13:5 Daudi ocoko jo Icrael ducu cakke ki i Cikor ma i Ejipt nio wa i yo ma donyo i Kamat, pi kelo canduk pa Lubaŋa ki i Kiriat-jearim." 
1Chronicles13:6 Daudi ki jo Icrael ducu gucito i Baala, ma en aye Kiriat-jearim ma tye i Juda, ka omo canduk pa Lubaŋa woko ki kunnu, en aye canduk ma gilwoŋo ki nyiŋ Rwot ma bedo i wi komker malo ka wi lukerubi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ci gutiŋo canduk pa Lubaŋa i wi gadigadi manyen, gukelo woko nia ki i ot pa Abinadab, ci Uja ki Akio gubedo ka Leko twoni ma ywayo gadigadi." 
1Chronicles13:8 Daudi ki jo Icrael ducu gubedo ka yarre ki myel ki yomcwiny i nyim Lubaŋa ki kero komgi ducu, ki wero wer-gu, ki goyo opuk-gu ki nana-gu ki ajaa-gu, ki atego agoya-gu ki tum-gu." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ka guo i laro moyo pa Kidon, Uja ocwalo cine pi mako kom canduk, pien onoŋo twoni gucato." 
1Chronicles13:10 Ci kiniga omako Rwot i kom Uja, ci oneke woko pien onoŋo oketo ciŋe i kom canduk; oto woko kunnu i nyim Lubaŋa," 
1Chronicles13:11 Ci kiniga omako Daudi, pien Rwot otugge i kom Uja; mumiyo kabedo-nu gilwoŋo ni Perej-uja nio wa onyoo." 
1Chronicles13:12 Daudi obedo ki lworo i kom Lubaŋa i nino meno; owacci, “Abikelo canduk pa Lubaŋa wa paco bota niŋniŋ?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Kit meno omiyo Daudi pe otero canduk wa i gaŋ kal pa Daudi, ento onak kwede woko i ot pa Obed-edom ma jo Gat." 
1Chronicles13:14 Canduk pa Lubaŋa obedo i ot pa Obed-edom pi dwe adek; ci Rwot omiyo gum ‘bot Obed-edom ki jone ducu. 
1Chronicles14:1 Kiram kabaka me Turo yam ocwalo kwena bot Daudi, kun miyo bao yat cedar ki lupa-godi bene ki lupa-bao me gero ot pa Daudi." 
1Chronicles14:2 Omiyo Daudi oniaŋ ni Rwot otyeko moko en me bedo kabaka ma loyo Icrael, dok ni otyeko miyo kerre obedo ki deyo madwoŋ pi pilo wi jone jo Icrael." 
1Chronicles14:3 Daudi dok omedde ki nyomo mon i Jerucalem, ci onywalo awobe ki anyira mukene." 
1Chronicles14:4 Magi aye nyiŋ litino ma onywalogi i Jerucalem. Camua, Cobab, Natan, Solomon," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibar, Elicua, Elpelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nepeg, Japia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elicama. Beeliada ki Elipelet. 
1Chronicles14:8 Ka jo Piliciti guwinyo ni Daudi doŋ gityeko wire odoko kabaka ma loyo jo Icrael ducu, ci jo Piliciti ducu gucito ka yenyo Daudi; ento Daudi owinyo pigi, okato woko ka lweny i komgi." 
1Chronicles14:9 Onoŋo jo Piliciti gubino gumonyo nota Repaim. 
1Chronicles14:10 Daudi ocako penyo dog Lubaŋa ni, “Ber acit ka lweny i kom jo Piliciti? Ibimiyogi i ciŋa?” Rwot ogamo doge ni, “Citi, abimiyogi i ciŋi.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Daudi ocito wa i Baal-perajim, ci oloyogi kunnu, ci owacci, “Lubaŋa otyeko baro dye lumerok woko ki ciŋa, macalo lalele mucorre.” Mumiyo nyiŋ kabedo meno gilwoŋo ni, Baal-perajim." 
1Chronicles14:12 Jo Piliciti gutenyo cal jogigi kenyo, ci Daudi ociko pi wanogi woko." 
1Chronicles14:13 Jo Piliciti dok gudwogo gumonyo nota meno. 
1Chronicles14:14 Ka Daudi dok openyo dog Lubaŋa, ci Lubaŋa ogamo ni, “Pe ibicito i komgi atir. Wot iman ŋegi ci ipot i komgi ki ka ma okemo yadi owak." 
1Chronicles14:15 Ka ce iwinyo kor tyen dano ma gitye ka wot lirukruk ma winnye wa i wi yadi owak, ci doij icit ka lweny, pien Lubaŋa doŋ obetelo nyimwu pi neko mony pa jo Piliciti woko.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Daudi otiyo kit ma Lubaŋa ocike kwede, ci guneko mony pa jo Piliciti nia ki i Gibeon nio wa i Gejer." 
1Chronicles14:17 Nyiŋ Daudi oywekoromo lobo ducu, ci Rwot omiyo lworo omako rok ducu i kom Daudi." 
1Chronicles15:1 Daudi ogero odine i gaŋ kai pa Daudi, ci oyubo kabedo pi canduk pa Lubaŋa, ocako guro kema pire." 
1Chronicles15:2 Daudi dok owacci, “Dano mukene pe bitiŋo canduk pa Lubaŋa, ento Lulevi keken, pien Rwot yam oyerogi pi tino canduk pa Rwot ki pi tiyo bote matwal.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Daudi ocoko jo Icrael ducu otorogi i Jerucalem, pi kelo canduk pa Rwot i kabedone ma yam oyubo pire." 
1Chronicles15:4 Ci Daudi ocoko litino awobe pa Aron ki Lulevi kacel, gin ene:" 
1Chronicles15:5 i kin likwayo pa Kokat, Uriel ma laditgi, kacel ki utmegine miya acel ki pyeraryo;" 
1Chronicles15:6 i kin likwayo pa Merari, Acaya ma laditgi, kacel ki utmegine miya aryo ki pyeraryo;" 
1Chronicles15:7 i kin likwayo pa Gercon, Joel ma laditgi, kacel ki utmegine miya acel ki pyeradek;" 
1Chronicles15:7 i kin likwayo pa Gercon, Joel ma laditgi, kacel ki utmegine miya acel ki pyeradek;" 
1Chronicles15:8 i kin likwayo pa Elicapan, Cemaya ma laditgi, kacel ki utmegine miya aryo;" 
1Chronicles15:9 i kin likwayo pa Kebron, Eliel ma laditgi, kacel ki utmegine pyeraboro;" 
1Chronicles15:10 i kin likwayo pa Ujiel, Aminadab ma laditgi, ki utmegine miya acel ki apar wiye aryo." 
1Chronicles15:11 Daudi dok olwoŋo ajwagi Jadok ki Abiatar, ki Lulevi magi, Uriel, Acaya, Joel, Cemaya, Eliel ki Aminadab," 
1Chronicles15:11 Daudi dok olwoŋo ajwagi Jadok ki Abiatar, ki Lulevi magi, Uriel, Acaya, Joel, Cemaya, Eliel ki Aminadab," 
1Chronicles15:12 ci owaco botgi ni, “Wun aye ludito kaka ma i dog odi pa kwarowu ma jo pa Levi; wulonnye kekenwu wubed maleŋ, wun kacel ki utmegiwu, wek wukel canduk pa Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, i kabedo ma atyeko yubone pire." 
1Chronicles15:13 I kare mukwono ca onoŋo Rwot Lubaŋa otugge i komwa, pien pe wun aye onoŋo wutino i kare-nu, pien pe yam wapenyo doge i kit ma cik mito.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Kit meno ajwagi ki Lulevi gulonnye kekengi pi kelo canduk pa Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
1Chronicles15:15 Lulevi gucako tiŋo canduk pa Lubaŋa, gulebo ki talle i wi gwokgi, kit ma yam Moses ocikogi kwede, macalo Rwot owaco." 
1Chronicles15:16 Daudi dok ociko ludito pa Lulevi pi yero utmegigi wek gubed luwer ma gibigoyo jami wer maloŋo, naŋa ki opuk ki atego agoya-gu, me tino dwan malo ki yomcwiny." 
1Chronicles15:17 Kit meno Lulevi gucako yero Eman wod pa Joel, ka dok Acap wod pa Berekia ki i kin utmegine. I kin likwayo pa Merari guyero utmegigi magi, Etan wod pa Kucaya;" 
1Chronicles15:17 Kit meno Lulevi gucako yero Eman wod pa Joel, ka dok Acap wod pa Berekia ki i kin utmegine. I kin likwayo pa Merari guyero utmegigi magi, Etan wod pa Kucaya;" 
1Chronicles15:18 ka dok guyero utmegigi ma i dul me aryo, gin aye Jekaria, Jajiel, Cemiramot, Jekiel, Uni, Eliab, Benaya, Maaceya, Matitia, Elipeleku ki Mikneya, ki lugwok-doggola Obed-edom ki Jeyel." 
1Chronicles15:19 Luwer magi Eman, Acap ki Etan ticgi obedo me goyo atego mola;" 
1Chronicles15:20 Jekaria, Ajiel, Cemiramot, Jekiel, Uni, Eliab, Maaceya ki Benaya ticgi obedo me goyo nana i kit me Alamot;" 
1Chronicles15:21 ento Matitia, Elipeleku, Mikneya, Obed-edom, Jeyel ki Ajajia gin ticgi obedo me telo wer ki opuk i kit me Ceminit." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenania, ma en aye latelwer pa Lulevi, ticce me nyuto kit me wer pien en aye niaŋ maber." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekia ki Elkana yam gin lugwok-doggola me canduk pa Lubaŋa," 
1Chronicles15:24 Cebania, Jocapat, Netanel, Amacai, Jekaria, Benaya ki Eleajar, ma gin ducu ajwagi, ticgi me kuto tum i nyim canduk pa Lubaŋa, Obed-edom ki Jekia gin bene gubedo lugwok-doggola me canduk pa Lubaŋa." 
1Chronicles15:25 Kit meno Daudi ki ludoŋo pa jo Icrael, ki ludito ma loyo jo alip, gucako wot me omo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot nia ki i ot pa Obed-edom ma cwinygi yom matek." 
1Chronicles15:26 Gucako tumo twoni abiro ki nyogi romi abiro, pien Lubaŋa okonyo Lulevi ma gutiŋo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot." 
1Chronicles15:27 Daudi onoŋo orukke ki jor me camanini maberre, macalo Lulevi ducu ma gutiŋo canduk pa Lubaŋa, kacel ki luwer, ki Kenana ma latel-wer pa luwer ducu; Daudi onoŋo otweyo pyere ki epod me camanini." 
1Chronicles15:28 Yam jo Icrael ducu gukelo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot kit meno, ma giwayo ma rwatte ki koko bila, ki tum, ki atego agoya-gu, kun giwero ki nana ki opuk-gu maloŋo." 
1Chronicles15:29 Ka canduk me gicikke pa Rwot obino wa i gaŋ kai pa Daudi, ci Mikal ma nya pa Caulo obolo wane woko ki i wan dirica oneno kabaka Daudi ka myelo ma cwinye yom, ci obedo ka cayo en ki i cwinye." 
1Chronicles16:1 Gukelo canduk pa Lubaŋa wa paco, gucibo i kema ma yam Daudi oguro pire; gucako tyero gitum awaŋa ki gityer lakwecwiny i nyim Lubaŋa." 
1Chronicles16:2 Ka Daudi otyeko tyero gitum awaŋa-gu ki gityer lakwecwiny, ci ocako lamo gum i kom lwak i nyiŋ Rwot." 
1Chronicles16:3 Lacen ocako poko jami ki jo Icrael ducu, co wa ki mon; dano acel acel gimiye mugati acel, ki riŋo anida, ki poki olok mutwone." 
1Chronicles16:4 Dok oketo Lulevi mogo pi bedo lutic i nyim canduk pa Rwot, pi lwoŋo nyiŋ Lubaŋa, pi pwoyo en ki pi pako Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
1Chronicles16:5 Acap aye laditgi, ki me aryone ma lube obedo Jekaria, Jeyel, Cemiramot, Jekiel, Matitia, Eliab, Benaya, Obed-edom ki Jeyel, gin aye lugo nana ki opuk. Acap onoŋo goyo atego agoya," 
1Chronicles16:6 ki Benaya ki Jakajiel ma ajwagi gin aye lukut tum teretere i nyim canduk me gicikke pa Rwot. 
1Chronicles16:7 I kare meno en aye nino ma Daudi okwono ciko ni Acap ki utmegine gubed ka wero wer me pwoyo Rwot, kit man:" 
1Chronicles16:8 Wumi pwoc bot Rwot, wulwon nyiŋe, wumi ticce oneŋe i rok ducu!" 
1Chronicles16:9 Wuwer bote wer me pako en, wutit ticce me aura ducu!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Wuket deyo i kom nyiŋe maleŋ; jo ma yenyo Rwot cwinygi obed yom! 
1Chronicles16:11 Wubin bot Rwot wek wunon tek ki bote, wubed i nyime nakanaka." 
1Chronicles16:12 Wupo kom tic me aura ma en otiyo ducu, ginaura ma yam otiyo ki kop ma oŋolo," 
1Chronicles16:13 wun likwayo pa Abraim ma yam laiicce, wun litino pa Yakobo ma en oyerowu." 
1Chronicles16:14 En aye Rwot Lubaŋawa; kop ma en oŋolo romo i lobo ducu. 
1Chronicles16:15 En cwinye omoko i kom gicikkene ma bedo nakanaka, i kom lok ma yam ociko, pi yatwak alip ki alip," 
1Chronicles16:16 en gicikke ma oketo ki Abraim, ki lok ma yam okwoŋo ki Icaka," 
1Chronicles16:17 ma omoko odoko cik bot Yakobo, wek obed gicikke ki Icrael matwal," 
1Chronicles16:18 kun wacci, “Abimiyo lobo Kanaan botwu, obed lobo me aleyawu.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 I kare ma pud gin nok, ma welgi tidi, ma pud gin lubedo i lobo-nu," 
1Chronicles16:20 ma giwirre i kin rok mapatpat, ma gia i te ker acel, gikobo i rok mukene," 
1Chronicles16:21 Lubaŋa pe oye ŋat mo odiyogi; ojuko luker mapol pigi kun wacci," 
1Chronicles16:22 “Pe wugud kom jo ma an awirogi, pe wutim lunebina marac!”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Wuwer bot Rwot, wun lobo ducu! wutit pi larre nino ducu." 
1Chronicles16:24 Wutuc deyone bot lurok, wutit ticce me aura bot rok ducu!" 
1Chronicles16:25 Rwot aye dit, myero gipake twatwal, myero gilwore makato lubaŋa mukene-gu ducu." 
1Chronicles16:26 Pien lubaŋa pa lurok ducu gin cal jogi apaya, ento Rwot aye oketo polo." 
1Chronicles16:27 Deyo ki dit tye bote, tek ki yomcwiny tye ka ma en bedo iye." 
1Chronicles16:28 Wun kaka me rok ducu, wumi deyo bot Rwot, wumi deyo ki tek bot Rwot!" 
1Chronicles16:29 Wumi deyo bot Rwot muporo nyiŋe; wukel gityer, wubin wa i nyime! Wuwor Rwot ki boŋo maleŋ;" 
1Chronicles16:30 komwu omyel i nyime, wun lobo ducu; ada, lobo ocuŋ matek ma pe yeŋŋe." 
1Chronicles16:31 Polo iye obed yom lobo bene obed ma cwinye yom, dano guwac i kin lurok ni, “Rwot tye ka loc!”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Wek nam omor, ki gin mupoŋ iye, poto bene oum, ki jami ducu ma tye iye!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Yadi ma i buŋa ducu gibiwer ki yomcwiny i nyim Rwot, pien obebino ka ŋolo kop i kom lobo." 
1Chronicles16:34 Wumi pwoc bot Rwot, pien en ber; mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka!" 
1Chronicles16:35 Wuwac bene ni, “Larwa, ai Lubaŋa lalarwa, icokwa ci ilarwa ki i kin lurok, wek wapwo nyiŋi maleŋ, waum ka wapaki." 
1Chronicles16:36 Gipwo Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, nia con ki con nio nino ma pe tum!” Lwak ducu gugamo ni, “Amen!” ci gupako Rwot." 
1Chronicles16:37 Daudi oweko Acap ki utmegine i nyim canduk me gicikke pa Rwot wek gubed ka tic kunnu i nyim canduk pa Rwot kit ma mitte kwede i nino acel acel," 
1Chronicles16:38 ka dok Obed-edom ki utmegine pyerabicel wiye aboro, kun Obed-edom wod pa Jedutun ki Koca gubedo lugwok-doggola." 
1Chronicles16:39 Dok oweko ajwaka Jadok ki utmegine ma gin ajwagi wa i nyim kema pa Rwot i ka woro Lubaŋa i wi got ma tye i Gibeon," 
1Chronicles16:40 pi tumo gitum awaŋa bot Rwot i wi keno tyer me gitum awaŋa, kun lubo lok ducu ma gicoyo i cik pa Rwot ma yam ociko ki io Icrael." 
1Chronicles16:41 Ki Eman ki Jedutun gunywako tic kwedgi, kacel ki jo mukene ma yam giyerogi ki nyiŋgi pi miyo pwoc bot Rwot pi mar mere ma bedo nakanaka." 
1Chronicles16:42 Eman ki Jedutun onoŋo gitye ki tura ki atego agoya pi wer agoya, ki jami agoya mukene ma gigoyo i kare me wero wer maleŋ, Litino awobe pa Jedutun yam giketogi pi gwoko doggola ot pa Rwot." 
1Chronicles16:43 Ci lwak ducu guket, dano acel acel odok i ode, ki Daudi bene odok i pacone ka lamo gum i kom jone." 
1Chronicles17:1 I kare ma doŋ Daudi obedo i ode, ocako waco bot lanebi Natan ni, “Nen ba, an doŋ abedo i ot baorcedar, ento canduk me gicikke pa Rwot pud bedo i kema.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Ci Natan odok Iye bot Daudi ni, “Tigin ducu ma tye i cwinyi, pien Lubaŋa tye kwedi.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Ento i dyewor acel-lu lok pa Rwot dok obino bot Natan ni," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Cit icitit bot laticca Daudi ni Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘In pe ibigerra ot me bedo." 
1Chronicles17:5 Pien peya abedo i ot mo nia wa i kine ma atelo iye wi Icrael nio kwede wa onyoo-ni, ento abedo ka kobo nia ki i kema man nio wa i kema mukene, ki nia ki i kabedo man nio wa i kabedo mukene." 
1Chronicles17:6 Kabedo ducu ma abedo ka wirre iye ki jo Icrael ducu, an yam koŋ aloko lok mo bot luŋolkop me Icrael ma yam acikogi pi kwayo lwakka kun awacci, “Piŋo pe koŋ wugerra ot mo me bao cedar?’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:7 Koni doŋ ibiwaco ki laticca Daudi ni, ‘Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, an yam akwanyi ki kakwat i olet, ka ma ibedo ka leko iye romi, wek ibed laker ma loyo jona jo Icrael;" 
1Chronicles17:8 dok abedo ka loŋŋe kwedi i kabedo ma icito iye ducu, abedo ka jwero lumerokki woko ki i nyimi. Dok abimiyo nyiŋi ywek, ma rom ki nyiŋ jo madito ma i wi lobo-ni." 
1Chronicles17:9 Dok abimiyo kabedo ki jona jo Icrael; ci abiketogi iye, wek doŋ gubed i kabedogi kikome, ma pe doŋ giyelogi matwal, wa lulweny magwa bene pe dok bipoto i komgi i kare mo, kit ma con ca," 
1Chronicles17:10 ma nia wa i kare ma con aketo luŋolkop ma guloyo jona jo Icrael; ci abitayo lumerok meri ducu. Ento atucci ni. Rwot bimiyo odi bedo madit. 
1Chronicles17:11 Ka kareni oromo me yweyo kacel ki kwarini, ci abiketo lakwaru mo ma bilubi bedo dit, ma ŋat acel i kom likwayi kikomi, ci abimoko kerre bedo matek." 
1Chronicles17:12 En aye bigerra ot, an abimoko komkerre bedo matwal." 
1Chronicles17:13 Abibedo wonne, ki en bibedo woda; pe abikwanyo mar mera ma pe lokke ki i kome, kit ma yam akwanyo ki i kom ŋat mutelo nyimi-ni." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ento abimoko en i oda ki i kerra matwal; ki komker mere bene bimoko matwal.’ ” 
1Chronicles17:15 Natan otito bot Daudi kit lok magi ducu, ki kit ginanyuta ma onen bote ducu." 
1Chronicles17:16 Lacen Kabaka Daudi ocito obedo piny i nyim Rwot, ci owacci, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, an aŋa, oda kono gin aŋo, mumiyo ikonya nio wa onyoo-ni?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Pud ibwono kony man ni tidi ki tuŋ boti, ai Lubaŋa; ibedo ka lok i kom oda kit ma bibedo kwede pi kare malac ma tye anyim, dok inyutta bene likwaya ma anyim, ai Rwot Lubaŋa." 
1Chronicles17:18 An Daudi dok abiwacci kit lok aŋo i kom deyo ma imiyo bota? Pien in ineya, an ma abedo laticci-ni." 
1Chronicles17:19 Pira keken, ai Rwot, dok pi cwinyi giri keni, omiyo itiyo gin madito magu ducu, pi miyo gin madito ducu ma kit man onene." 
1Chronicles17:20 Pe tye ŋatti mo macalo in, ai Rwot, dok pe tye Lubaŋa mo, kono in keken, kit ma yam wawinyo ki itwa-ni." 
1Chronicles17:21 Rok mene ma wi lobo ma rom ki joni jo Icrael, ma yam Lubaŋa ocito ka kokogi wek gubed jone, wek nyiŋi oywek pigi, pi tiyo gin madito ma miyo dano lworo, ki pi ryemo rok mapol kacel ki lubaŋagi i nyim lwakki, ma yam in ikokogi ki i Ejipt?" 
1Chronicles17:22 In ityeko miyo lwakki jo Icrael gudoko joni nakanaka; dok in, ai Rwot, yam idoko Lubaŋagi," 
1Chronicles17:23 Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, kombeddi doŋ imok lok meri ma yam iwaco i koma ki i kom jo ma i oda matwal, ci doŋ itim kit ma ityeko waco-ni," 
1Chronicles17:24 Mok lok ma iwaco-ni, wek nyiŋi obed me adwora nakanaka kun giwacci, ‘Rwot Lubaŋa me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, en aye Lubaŋa ma loyo Icrael,’ ki ot pa laticci Daudi bimoko i nyimi matwal." 
1Chronicles17:25 Pien in, Lubaŋa, ityeko nyuto bota ni ibimiyo oda bedo madit; mumiyo an laticci alimo tekcwiny me kela lega man i nyimi." 
1Chronicles17:26 Ai Rwot, in aye Lubaŋa, ci in doŋ ityeko cikke me timo gin man maber pira." 
1Chronicles17:27 Pi meno, mi gum i kom dano ma i oda ki yomcwiny, wek likwaya gumedde ameda ki bedo i nyimi nakanaka; pien gin ma in imiyo gum, gumme bedo nakanaka, ai Rwot.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Lacen Daudi dok otayo jo Piliciti, ocako loyogi, ci omayo Gat ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete ki i ciŋ jo Piliciti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Daudi dok otayo jo Moab, ci jo Moab gudoko luticce, kun giculo mucoro bote." 
1Chronicles18:3 Daudi dok otayo Adadejer kabaka me Joba, ma yo tun Kamat, ma yam ocito ka cibo got me po en i dog kulu Euprate." 
1Chronicles18:3 Daudi dok otayo Adadejer kabaka me Joba, ma yo tun Kamat, ma yam ocito ka cibo got me po en i dog kulu Euprate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Daudi omako gadigadi lwennye alip acel, ki wegi aguragura alip abiro, ki askari ma giwoto ki tyengi alip pyeraryo oŋolo odoŋ tyen aguraguragi ducu ma yam giywayo gadigadi Lwenygi, ento oweko mogo manok odoŋ ma romo ywayo gadigadi miya acel." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ka jo Ciria me Damaciko gubino ka konyo kor Adadejer kabaka me Joba, Daudi oneko jo Ciria alip pyeraryo wiye aryo." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ka jo Ciria me Damaciko gubino ka konyo kor Adadejer kabaka me Joba, Daudi oneko jo Ciria alip pyeraryo wiye aryo." 
1Chronicles18:6 Daudi oketo lumony i cel gogo i lobo Ciria ma i te loc me Damaciko; ci jo Ciria gudoko lutic pa Daudi, kun giculo mucoro bote. Rwot obedo ka miyo tek me bwoyo lobo bot Daudi ka ma yam ocito iye ducu." 
1Chronicles18:7 Daudi oyako lwak kwodi me jabu ma yam lwak pa Adadejer tinogi, ci oterogi i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles18:8 Daudi oyako lwak mola mapol ki i gaŋi magi, Tibat ki Kun, ma onoŋo yam gaŋi pa Adadejer. Man aye mola ma yam Solomon otiyo kwede nam me mola, ki wir, ki agulu mola-gu." 
1Chronicles18:9 Ka cen Tou kabaka me Kamat owinyo ni Daudi otyeko tayo mony pa Adadejer woko ducu liweŋ," 
1Chronicles18:10 ci ocwalo wode Adoram bot kabaka Daudi ka mote, ki pi pwoyo en pi lweny i kom Adadejer ki pi loyo en woko; pien yam Adadejer obedo ka lweny ki Tou tyen mapol. Dok ocwalo lwak jami mapol me jabu, ki me ryal ki me mola-gu;" 
1Chronicles18:11 jami meno bene kabaka Daudi yam odyerogi bot Rwot, kacel ki ryal ki jabu ma yam oyakogi nia ki i rok ducu, nia wa i lobo Edom, Moab, ki bot jo Ammon ki jo Piliciti ki jo Amalek." 
1Chronicles18:12 Dok Abicai wod pa Jeruya oneko jo Edom alip apar wiye aboro i nota me Kado. 
1Chronicles18:13 Ci oketo lumony i cel gogo i Edom; ci jo Edom ducu gudoko lutic pa Daudi. Rwot omiyo Daudi obwoyo lobo ka ma yam ocito iye ducu. 
1Chronicles18:14 Daudi oloyo jo Icrael ducu kit meno; obedo ka ŋolo kop atir dok kakare i kom lwakke ducu. 
1Chronicles18:15 Joab wod pa Jeruya obedo ladit me mony; ki Yekocapat wod pa Akilud obedo laco lok ma timme; 
1Chronicles18:16 Jadok wod pa Akitub ki Akimelek wod pa Abiatar gubedo ajwagi; Cavica obedo karan," 
1Chronicles18:17 ki Benaya wod pa Yekoyada obedo ladit ma loyo jo Keret ki jo Pelet; ki awobe pa Daudi gubedo ludito ma loyo tic pa kabaka. 
1Chronicles19:1 Ka man otum, Nakac kabaka pa jo Ammon oto woko, ci wode oleyo ka tyene," 
1Chronicles19:2 Daudi owacci, “Abinyuto cwiny me mar bot Kanun wod pa Nakac, kit ma yam wonne onyuto cwiny me mar bota-ni.” Mumiyo Daudi ocwalo lukwena bote ka kweyo cwinye pi to pa wonne, Lutic pa Daudi guo bot Kanun i lobo pa jo Ammon ka kweyo cwinye," 
1Chronicles19:3 Ento rwodi pa jo Ammon guwaco bot Kanun ni, “In itamo ni Daudi ocwalo lukwe cwinyi pi keto deyo i kom woru? Daudi mono pe ocwalo luticce ka ŋiyo piny, ki ka turo gaŋ, ki pi roto lobo ducu?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Kit meno omiyo Kanun omako lutic pa Daudi, ci olyelo yer tikgi, ka dok oŋolo dye boŋogi i kom pyergi, ka ocwalogi kwede woko; ci gucito." 
1Chronicles19:5 Ka gitito bot Daudi pi jo meno, ci ocwalo dano ka jologi, pien onoŋo gitye ki lewic madwoŋ twatwal. Ci kabaka owacci, “Koŋ wubed i Jeriko, nio ka yer tikwu otwi olot, ka doŋ wudwog kany.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Ka jo Ammon guneno ni pigi odoko ŋwe marac bot Daudi, ci Kanun ki jo Ammon gucwalo ryal ma romo talanta alip acel ka wilo gadigadi lweny ki wegi aguragura ki bot jo Mecopotamia, wa ki i lobo Arammaaka, ki i Joba." 
1Chronicles19:6 Ka jo Ammon guneno ni pigi odoko ŋwe marac bot Daudi, ci Kanun ki jo Ammon gucwalo ryal ma romo talanta alip acel ka wilo gadigadi lweny ki wegi aguragura ki bot jo Mecopotamia, wa ki i lobo Arammaaka, ki i Joba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Ci guwilo gadigadi lweny alip pyeradek wiye aryo, ki kabaka me Maaka bene, ma onoŋo obino ki monnye, ogony i nyim Medeba. Jo Ammon bene gucokke ki i gaŋigi, gubino ka lweny." 
1Chronicles19:8 Ka Daudi owinyo pigi, ci ocwalo Joab kacel ki mony pa twoni oteka lweny ducu." 
1Chronicles19:9 Ci jo Ammon gubino gurwayo cok ka guryeyo i dog gaŋ; luker ma gubino guryeyo kengi, i dye bar. 403" 
1Chronicles19:10 Ka Joab oneno mony okace woko ryoryo, tuŋ nyime ki yo tuŋ ŋeye bene, ci oyero jo Icrael ma oyita lweny, ocako ryeyogi gukemo jo Ciria;" 
1Chronicles19:11 oketo jo mudoŋŋe bot ominne Abicai, gin bene guryeyo gukemo jo Ammon." 
1Chronicles19:12 Joab owacci, “Ka ce jo Ciria gubedo tek i koma, ci ibikonya, ento ka jo Ammon aye gubedo tek i komi, an abikonyi." 
1Chronicles19:13 Bed oteka ma cwinye nwaŋ, wek walweny pi lutuwa, ki pi gaŋi pa Lubaŋawa, Rwot bene otim gin ma oneno ni ber.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Kit meno Joab ki jo ma gitye kwede ducu gurwayo cok ka lweny i kom jo Ciria; ci jo Ciria guriŋo woko ki i nyime. 
1Chronicles19:15 Ka jo Ammon guneno jo Ciria guriŋo woko, ci gin bene gucako riŋo woko ki i nyim Abicai omin Joab, gudonyo wa i gaŋ, Ci Joab obino i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles19:16 Ento ka jo Ciria guneno jo Icrael guloyogi, gucwalo lukwena ci gukelo jo Ciria ma gitye loka Euprate, kacel ki Copak ma lawimony pa Adadejer ma latel wigi." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ka gitito pigi bot Daudi, ci en bene ocoko jo Icrael ducu oŋolo kwedgi kulu Jordan, ci obino i komgi, oryeyo monnye orwayo i komgi. Ka Daudi doŋ oryeyo monnye, orwayo kom jo Ciria, gucako lweny kwede." 
1Chronicles19:18 Jo Ciria gucako riŋo woko ki i nyim Icrael; Daudi oneko jo Ciria ma romo riŋo ki gadigadi lweny alip abiro, ki askari ma woto ki tyengi alip pyeraŋwen, ka dok oneko Copak ladit me monygi bene," 
1Chronicles19:19 Ka lutic pa Adadejer guneno jo Icrael gutyeko loyogi woko, ci guketo kuc i kingi ki Daudi, ci gudoko luticce. Kit meno jo Ciria pe dok gubedo ki miti me konyo jo Ammon i kare mo," 
1Chronicles20:1 I dog oro ma en aye kare ma luker gicito kwede ka mony, Joab ocako telo wi mony, guneko lobo pa jo Ammon woko, ka dok gubino gurumo gaŋ Raba. Ento Daudi yam odon i Jerucalem. Joab olwenyo i kom Raba, ci oloyo." 
1Chronicles20:2 Ci Daudi okwanyo lalukana me jabu ki i wi kabakagi; pekke romo ratili miya acel, got me wei bene onoŋo tye iye. Ci gicibo i wi Daudi. Dok okelo jami ma giyako i gaŋ meno madwoŋ twatwal." 
1Chronicles20:3 Dok okelo jo ma giyakogi ki i gaŋ meno, ci oketogi ka tic ki mucumeno ki cururu nyonyo ki latoŋ-gu, Daudi obedo ka timo jo ma i gaŋi pa jo Ammon ducu kit meno. Ci Daudi ki lwak ducu gucako dok cen wa i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles20:4 Lacen lweny dok ocakke i kom jo Piliciti ma i Gejer; ci Cibekai ma Lakucat oneko Cipai woko, ma onoŋo en ŋat acel ma i kin likwayo pa twon oluma-ni; yam giloyo jo, Piliciti kit meno." 
1Chronicles20:5 Ka lweny dok ocakke i kom jo Piliciti; ci Elkanan wod pa Jair oneko Lami ma omin Goliac ma jo Gat, ma bol toŋŋe rom ki rii yat lacwe boŋo." 
1Chronicles20:6 Lweny dok obedo i Gat ka ma tye iye dano mo ma oputte mabor liwawo, ma tye ki nyig ciŋe abicel, ki nyig tyene bene abicel, tuŋ ryoryo ducu, ci nyig Lwete ducu romo pyeraryo wiye aŋwen; en bene yam lakwar twoni oluma-nu," 
1Chronicles20:7 Ka okatti ka nywaro jo Icrael ‘ki ŋala, ci Yonacan wod pa Cimea ma omin Daudi oneko en woko." 
1Chronicles20:8 Jo man gin likwayo pa twoni oluma ma i Gat; gin ducu Daudi kacel ki luticce gutyekogi woko," 
1Chronicles21:1 Catan ocuŋ ka lweny i kom Icrael, ocako piyo Daudi pi kwano wel jo Icrael." 
1Chronicles21:2 Kit meno Daudi owaco bot Joab ki ludito me mony ducu ni, “Wucit ka kwano wei jo Icrael, cakke ki i Beer-ceba nio kwede wa i Dan, ci wudwok lokke bota, wek aŋe welgi.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Ento Joab ojuko Daudi kun owaco ni, “Myero Rwot Lubaŋa aye omed wei lwak tyen miya kulu, kit ma doŋ gidwoŋ-ŋi! Pe gin ducu lwakki, rwoda kabaka, gin ducu luticci, rwoda. Ci piŋo imito lakit tim macalo man i Piŋo imito kela bal i kom Icrael?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Ento lok pa kabaka obedo tek makato pa Joab. Omiyo Joab oa ocito orumo lobo Icrael ducu, ka odwogo kwede cen i Jerucalem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Ka Joab ocako miyo wel lwak ma okwano-ni bot Daudi. Jo Icrael ducu ono ŋo giromo milion acel ki alip miya acel ma gin wegi pala lucwan, ki i Juda giromo alip miya aŋwen ki pyerabiro ma gin wegi pala lucwan."
