1Chronicles21:6 Ento Joab pe okwano wel jo pa Levi ki pa Benjamin, pien onoŋo cwiny Joab dag cik pa kabaka." 
1Chronicles21:7 Ento cwiny Lubaŋa pe obedo yom i kom lok meno; ocako neko jo Icrael. 
1Chronicles21:8 Ci Daudi ocako bako doge bot Lubaŋa kun waco ni, “Abalo twon bal mo madit pi gin ma doŋ atyeko tiyone. Kombeddi doŋ alegi, ikwany roc pa laticci woko; pien atimo lok man me miŋo twatwal.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Rwot ocako lok ki Gad, ma lanen pa Daudi, kun wacci," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Cit iciwac bot Daudi ni, ‘Rwot owaco kuman ni, Amiyi lok adek; in ikwany acel ki i kingi, wek ami opot i komi.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Kit meno Gad obino bot Daudi ci otitte lok meno ni, “Rwot owaco kuman ni ‘Kwany acel ma imitone!" 
1Chronicles21:12 Imito kec opot pi mwaka adek; nyo lumerokwu oryemwu pi dwe adek, kun ginekowu ki pala lucwan; nyo pala pa Rwot aye opot i loboni ki two gemo pi nino adek kulu, kun lamalaika pa Rwot neko jo ma i lobo Icrael tyeko woko ducu?’ In doŋ itam kit lok ma abidok kwede bot ŋat ma ocwala boti-ni.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Daudi owaco bot Gad ni, “An doŋ adonyo i twon can madit ma pe wacce; wek apot i cin Rwot, pien kicane dwoŋ; ento pe apot i cin dano.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Kit meno Rwot ocako cwalo two gemo opoto i kom Icrael; ci jo Icrael guto ma romo co alip pyerabiro. 
1Chronicles21:15 Ci Lubaŋa ocwalo lamalaika i kom Jerucalem pi tyekone woko; ento ka doŋ mito tyekone, ci Rwot oneno, ci onut i kom gin marac man, ci ojuko lamalaika ma lanek piny-nyi woko, kun wacci, “Man doŋ oromo, doŋ ikul ciŋi piny.” Lamalaika pa Rwot onoŋo ocuŋ i ŋet laro moyo pa Oman ma jo Jebuc." 
1Chronicles21:16 Ka Daudi otiŋo waŋe malo ci oneno lamalaika pa Rwot ocuŋ i kin lobo ki polo, kun ciŋe owoto pala lucwan otiŋo i kom Jerucalem. Ci Daudi ki ludoŋo ducu, gucako ruko boŋo cola, gupoto kwede piny aryeba cwiny." 
1Chronicles21:17 Daudi owaco bot Lubaŋa ni, “Pe an aye yam aciko pi kwano wel lwak? An aye yam abalo atyeko tiyo roc madit twatwal, ento lwak romi man, gutimo kit roc aŋo? Alegi ni, wek ciŋi opot i koma ki i kom ot pa kwara keken; pe iwek two gemo opot wa i kom lwakki.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Lamalaika pa Rwot dok ociko Gad ni owac ki Daudi wek ocit ka caŋo keno tyer pi Rwot i laro moyo pa Oman ma jo Jebuc. 
1Chronicles21:19 Daudi ocito kunnu pi lok pa Gad, ma onoŋo oloko kit ma Rwot ocike kwede." 
1Chronicles21:20 I kare-nu onoŋo Oman tye ka dino ŋano; ka olokke ci oneno lamalaika, awobene aŋwen ma yam gitye kwede gukanne woko." 
1Chronicles21:21 Ka Daudi woto cito bot Oman, ci Oman oneno; ka oneno Daudi ci oa ki i laro ocito bot Daudi, omiye woro kun oryebbe piny i nyime," 
1Chronicles21:22 Daudi owaco bot Oman ni, “Miya kabedo man me laro moyo wek acan iye keno tyer pi Rwot, miya awil pi welle kikome, wek two gemo oke woko i kom lwak.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Omao owaco bot Daudi ni, “Ber iter; wek in, rwoda kabaka, ityer iye gin ma ineno ni ber; nen amiyo twon me gitum awaŋa, ki opam ladin bel me yen, ki nyig ŋano me gityer me moko kwon; amiyogi ducu.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Ento kabaka Daudi ogamo dog Oman ni, “Pe kumeno, ento abiwilo i welle kikome; pe abityero jamini ma pe mera bot Rwot, pe abimiyo gitum awaŋa ma pe awilo ki Limma.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Kit meno Daudi ocako miyo bot Oman cekel me jabu miya abicel ma gipimo pekgi pi wilo kabedo-nu," 
1Chronicles21:26 Ci Daudi ocako caŋo keno tyer pi Rwot kunnu, ka otyero gitum awaŋa ki gitum lakwecwiny-gu, ocako lwoŋo iye nyiŋ Rwot, ci Rwot odok iye ki mac ma oa i polo ma obino i kom keno tyer me gitum awaŋa." 
1Chronicles21:27 Rwot ociko lamalaika, ci orwako pala lucwanne i akurane. Daudi oyero kabedo pi ot pa Lubaŋa" 
1Chronicles21:28 I kare meno, ka Daudi oneno ni Rwot otyeko dokke iye ki i laro moyo pa Oman ma jo Jebuc, ci obedo ka tyero gitumme ducu kunnu." 
1Chronicles21:29 Pien kema pa Rwot ma Moses yam oti yo i tim, ki keno tyer me gitum awaŋa bene onoŋo pud gitye wa i kabedo me woro Lubaŋa i wi got ma tye Gibeon;" 
1Chronicles21:30 ento Daudi yam pe cito kunnu ka penyo dog Rwot Lubaŋa, pien obedo ka lworo pala lucwan pa lamalaika pa Rwot." 
1Chronicles22:1 Daudi dok owacci, “Ot pa Rwot Lubaŋa bibedo kany, ki keno tyer me gitum awaŋa pi jo Icrael bene bibedo kany.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Daudi ociko pi coko lurok ma onoŋo gibedo i lobo Icrael, ci oketo lupa-godi ka yubo godi ma gipayogi mabeco pi gero ot pa Lubaŋa," 
1Chronicles22:3 Daudi dok okano lwak nyonyo madwoŋ me yubo mucumar pi guro kika me dog gaŋ, ki okol latwe bao, ki lwak mola madwoŋ ma pekke pe pimme," 
1Chronicles22:4 ki lwak bao cedar ma welle pe kwanne, pien jo Cidon ki jo Turo gukelo bot Daudi bao cedar madwoŋ twatwal." 
1Chronicles22:5 Pien Daudi yam owacci, “Latinna Solomon pud tidi, peya tye ki ŋec mo, dok ot ma gibigero pi Rwot myero obed me deyo makato ducu, wek ywekane ki deyone orom lobo ducu; mumiyo an aye ayubo kit gerone.” Pienne Daudi ocako yubo lwak jami madwoŋ twatwal ma pud kwo." 
1Chronicles22:6 Ka dok olwoŋo wode Solomon, ociko en pi gero ot pa Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
1Chronicles22:7 Daudi owaco ki Solomon ni, “Woda, onoŋo abedo ki tam i cwinya pi gero ot mo pi nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋa." 
1Chronicles22:8 Ento lok pa Rwot yam obino bota kun wacci, ‘In doŋ ityeko oyo lwak remo mapol, dok ibedo ka Lwenyo lweny madito-gu; pe ibigero ot mo pi nyina, pien ityeko oyo lwak remo madwoŋ i nyima ki i wi lobo." 
1Chronicles22:9 Nen ba, ibinywalo latin laco; en bibedo ki kuc, abimiye kuc ma lumerokke ducu pe gibiyele; pienno nyiŋe bibedo Solomon, dok abimiyo kuc ki yweyo bot Icrael i karene," 
1Chronicles22:10 En aye bigero ot pi nyiŋa, En bibedo woda, ki an abibedo wonne, dok abimoko komkerre bedo i Icrael matwal.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 Iyo latinna, Rwot obed kwedi, wek ityek gero ot pa Rwot Lubaŋani, kit ma yam oloko kwede i komi-ni." 
1Chronicles22:12 Atikane, Rwot aye myero omiyi ryeko ki niaŋ matut, wek ibed ka lubo cik pa Rwot Lubaŋani ka en doŋ omiyi dit me loyo Icrael." 
1Chronicles22:13 Dok ibilimo gum ka ce ibedo ka gwoko kit cik ducu ki ŋol ducu ma cen Rwot ociko ki Moses pi jo Icrael. Bed oteka ma cwinyi nwaŋ. Pe ilwor; cwinyi pe opoti. 
1Chronicles22:14 Nen an doŋ ayelle mada’ ci doŋ atyeko yubo jami magi pi ot pa Rwot: jabu ma romo talanta alip miya acel, ryal ma romo talanta milion acel, ki mola ki nyonyo ma pekke pe pimme, pien gidwoŋ twatwal; ka dok ayubo bao ki got-gu, In dok imed mu kene i komgi." 
1Chronicles22:15 Dok it ye ki lwak lutic mapol: I upa-godi, lugedo ki godi, lupac ki ludiro tic ducu ma welgi pe kwanne, ki jo ma gikwiri i ticgi," 
1Chronicles22:16 ma gitiyo ki jabu, ki ryal-gu, ki mola ki nyonyo-gu, Doŋ ia malo icak tic cut! Rwot “obed kwedi.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Daudi dok ociko ludito ma i Icrael ducu pi konyo wode Solomon kun wacci," 
1Chronicles22:18 “Rwot Lubaŋa tye kwedwu? Dok pe en aye omiyowu kuc i kabedo ducu? En aye otyeko miyo wegi lobo-ni i ciŋa; dok lobo doŋ gitayo ki i nyim Rwot ki i nyim lwakke. 
1Chronicles22:19 Iyo, kombeddi doŋ wuket tamwu ki cwinywu ka yenyo Rwot Lubaŋawu. Doŋ wutwarre malo wuciger kabedo maleŋ pa Rwot Lubaŋa, ka wek canduk me gicikke pa Rwot ki jami pa Lubaŋa maleŋ-gu ducu gikelgi wa i ot ma doŋ gigero pi nyiŋ Rwot.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Ka Daudi doŋ oti ma mwakane doŋ dwoŋ, ci ocako keto wode Solomon obedo kabaka ma loyo Icrael. Lwak dul pa Lulevi ki ajwagi ki dog ticgi" 
1Chronicles23:2 Daudi ocoko ludito ma i Icrael ducu, kacel ki ajwagi ki Lulevi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Gikwano Lulevi ducu ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeradek dok kwede malo, ci wel co ducu oromo alip pyeradek wiye aboro." 
1Chronicles23:4 Daudi owacci, “Jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen ki i komgi gibiketogi ka tic i ot pa Rwot; jo alip abicel gibibedo jagi ki luŋolkop;" 
1Chronicles23:5 jo alip aŋwen gibibedo lugwok-doggola, ki jo alip aŋwen gibipako Rwot ki jami wer ma yam atiyo pi pake kwede.”" 
1Chronicles23:6 Ci Daudi opokogi i dul muporo awobe pa Levi, Gercom, Kokat ki Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Litino awobe pa Gercom gin aye Ladan ki Cimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Litino awobe pa Ladan gin aye Jekiel ma laditgi, ki Jetam ki Joel, gin adek." 
1Chronicles23:8 Litino awobe pa Ladan gin aye Jekiel ma laditgi, ki Jetam ki Joel, gin adek." 
1Chronicles23:9 Litino awobe pa Cimei gin aye Celomot, Kajiel ki Karan, gin adek. Magi gin aye ludito kaka pa Ladan ma i odi pa kwarogr," 
1Chronicles23:10 Litino awobe pa Cimei gin aye Jakat, Jina, Jeuc ki Beria. Jo aŋwen-nu gin aye litino awobe pa Cimei." 
1Chronicles23:11 Jakat aye onoŋo ladrtgi, ki me aryone Jija; ento Jeuc ki Beria pe gunywalo awobe mapol, mumiyo gikwanogi macalo dog ot ma kwarogi acel." 
1Chronicles23:12 Litino awobe pa Kokat gin aye Amram, Ijar, Kebron ki Ujiel, gin aŋwen." 
1Chronicles23:13 Litino awobe pa Amram gin aye Aron ki Moses. Aron gibolle tic me kwero jami maleŋ makato, wek en ki litino awobene guwan odok eceta i nyim Rwot matwal, dok guti bote, gulam gum i nyiŋe matwal." 
1Chronicles23:14 Ento litino awobe pa Moses ma dano pa Lubaŋa yam gikwanogi i kin kaka pa Levi. 
1Chronicles23:15 Litino awobe pa Moses gin aye Gercom ki Eliejer. 
1Chronicles23:16 Litirro awobe pa Gercom: Cebuel aye laditgi. 
1Chronicles23:17 Litino awobe pa Eliejer: Rekabia aye laditgi. Eliejer pe onywalo litino awobe mukene, ento Rekabia onywalo litino awobe mapol mada." 
1Chronicles23:18 Litino awobe pa Ijar, Celomit aye laditgi." 
1Chronicles23:19 Litino awobe pa Kebron gin aye Jeria ma laditgi, ki me aryone Amaria, me adekke Jakajiel, ki me aŋwenne Jekameam." 
1Chronicles23:20 Litino awobe pa Ujiel gin aye Mika ma laditgi, ki me aryone Icia." 
1Chronicles23:21 Litino awobe pa Merari gin aye Makali ki Muci. Litino awobe pa Makali gin aye Eleajar ki Kic," 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleajar oto ma pe onywalo awobe, onywalo anyira keken; ento ludoggolagi ma awobe pa Kic aye gunyomogi." 
1Chronicles23:23 Litino awobe pa Muci gin aye Makali, Eder ki Jeremot, gin adek." 
1Chronicles23:24 Magi aye litino awobe pa Levi ma i odi pa kwarogi, ma gin ludito kaka ma i odi pa kwarogi kit ma yam gicoyogi kwede, ma lubo wei ki nyiŋ dano ki acel acel ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo dok kwede malo, ma gibedo ka tiyo tic i ot pa Lubaŋa." 
1Chronicles23:25 Pien Daudi onoŋo owacci, “Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael doŋ omiyo kuc ki jone; en doŋ bedo: i Jerucalem matwal." 
1Chronicles23:26 Pi meno Lulevi pe doŋ gimitogi pi tiŋo kema pa Rwot, kadi jami mo ma gitiyo kwede.”" 
1Chronicles23:27 Pi lok ma Daudi oloko me agikkine omiyo gicoyo wel Lulevi ma ditogi romo mwaka pyeraryo ki dok kwede malo," 
1Chronicles23:28 En dok owacci, “Ticgi bibedo me konyo awobe pa Aron ka tic i ot pa Rwot, kun gigwoko dyekal ki kicika odi matinone, gilonyo jami maleŋ ducu, dok gitiyo kit tic mu kene ducu ma i ot pa Lubaŋa." 
1Chronicles23:29 Dok ikonyo bene ki kela mugati ma giketo i nyim Rwot, ki moko kwon me gityer me moko kwon, ki capat mareppe ma tobi pe iye, ki gityer me moko kwon ma gitedo i otako nyonyo, ki gityer me moko kwon ma girubo ki moo, ki gin pimo pek ki dwoŋ pa jami mapatpat," 
1Chronicles23:30 Gin gibicuŋ ka miyo pwoc ki pak bot Rwot odiko odiko, ki otyeno otyeno bene kumeno," 
1Chronicles23:31 ki i kare ducu ma gityero gitum awaŋa bot Rwot i cen cabit, ki i por dwe, ki i nino maditogu, gibicuŋ i nyim Rwot kare ducu, kun gilubo wel jo ma giciko." 
1Chronicles23:32 Gibigwoko kema me rwatte ki kabedo maleŋ kit meno, dok gibikonyo utmegigi, awobe pa Aron, i ticgi ma i ot pa Rwot.”" 
1Chronicles24:1 Dul pa likwayo pa Aron gin ene. Litino awobe pa Aron gin aye Nadab, Abiu, Eleajar ki Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:2 Ento Nadab ki Abiu guto i kare ma wongi pud kwo, litinogi bene pe, mumi yo ‘Eleajar ki Itamar gudoko ajwagi pa Lubaŋa." 
1Chronicles24:3 Ci Daudi opokogi muporo dog ticgi ma giyerogi iye, kun jo ma gukonye gin aye Jadok ma i kin likwayo pa Eleajar, ki Akimelek ma i kin likwayo pa Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:4 Doŋ macalo ginoŋo jo madito mapolle i kin likwayo pa Eleajar makato ma i kin likwayo pa Itamar, gupoko ludito kaka ma i dog odi pa kwarogi apar wiye abicel pi likwayo pa Eleajar, ki ludito kaka ma i odi pa kwarogi aboro pi likwayo pa Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:5 Gipokogi ki bolo kwir, marom, pien ludito me kabedo maleŋ ki ludito pa Lubaŋa yam gubedo i kin likwayo pa Eleajar ki i kin likwayo pa Itamar bene," 
1Chronicles24:6 Cemaya wod pa Netanel ma Lalevi, ma obedo karan, yam ocoyo nyiŋgi ki i nyim kabaka, ki’ i nyim rwodi, ki ajwaka Jadok, ki Akimelek wod pa Abiatar, ki ludito kaka ma i odi pa kwaro pa ajwagi ki pa Lulevi; yam guyero dog ot pa kwarogi acel pi Eleajar ki acel giyero pi Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:7 Kwir mukwoŋo opoto i kom Yekoyarib, ki me aryo i kom Jedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 me adek i kom Karim, me aŋwen i kom Ceorim," 
1Chronicles24:9 me abic i kom Malkija, me abicel i kom Mijamin," 
1Chronicles24:10 me abiro i kom Kakoj, me aboro i kom Abija," 
1Chronicles24:11 me aboŋwen i kom Yecwa, me apar i kom Cekania," 
1Chronicles24:12 me apar wiye acel i kom Eliacab, me apar wiye aryo i kom Jakim," 
1Chronicles24:13 me apar wiye adek i kom Kupa, me apar wiye aŋwen i kom Jecebeab," 
1Chronicles24:14 me apar wiye abic i kom Bilga, me apar wiye abicel i kom Imer," 
1Chronicles24:15 me apar wiye abiro i kom Kejir, me apar wiye aboro i kom Kapijej," 
1Chronicles24:16 me apar wiye aboŋwen i kom Petakia, me pyeraryo i kom Jekejikel," 
1Chronicles24:17 me pyeraryo wiye acel i kom Jakin, me pyeraryo wiye aryo i kom Gamul," 
1Chronicles24:18 me pyeraryo wiye adek i kom Delaya, me pyeraryo wiye aŋwen i kom Maajia." 
1Chronicles24:19 Dog tic ma giyero jo magi iye obedo me donyo i ot pa Rwot, kun gilubo cik ma yam kwarogi Aron oketo pigi, ‘macalo Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael yam ociko en kwede." 
1Chronicles24:20 Lok kom likwayo pa Levi mudoŋŋe: i kin likwayo pa Amram giyero Cubael; ki i kin likwayo pa Cubael giyero Jedeya. 
1Chronicles24:21 Likwayo pa Rekabia: i kin likwayo pa Rekabia giyero Icia ma laditgi. 
1Chronicles24:22 I kin likwayo pa Ijar giyero Celamot; i kin likwayo pa Celamotgiyero Jakat. 
1Chronicles24:23 I kin likwayo pa Kebron giyero Jeria ma laditgi, me aryone Amajia, me adek Jakajiel, me aŋwen Jekameam." 
1Chronicles24:24 I kin likwayo pa Ujiel giyero Mika; i kin likwayo pa Mika giyero Camir," 
1Chronicles24:25 Umin Mika en aye Icia; i kin likwayo pa Icia giyero Jekaria. 
1Chronicles24:26 I kin likwayo pa Merari giyero Makali ki Muci. I kin likwayo pa Jajia giyero Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Likwayo pa Merari gin aye Jajia, Beno, Cokam, Jakur ki Ibri." 
1Chronicles24:28 I kin likwayo pa Makali giyero Eleajar ma pe onywalo awobe. 
1Chronicles24:29 I kin likwayo pa Kic giyero Jeramel. 
1Chronicles24:30 I kin likwayo pa Muci giyero Makali, Eder ki Jerimot. Magi gin aye likwayo pa jo Levi, kun lubo dog odi pa kwarogi." 
1Chronicles24:31 Jo magi bene, ludito kaka ma i dog odi pa kwarogi acel acel gubolo kwir, kun ladit bolo kacel ki utmegine matino, macalo utmegigi ma likwayo pa Aron gubolo ki i nyim kabaka Daudi, Jadok, Akimelek ki ludito kaka ma i dog odi pa kwaro pa ajwagi ki pa Lulevi," 
1Chronicles25:1 Daudi ki ludito ma loyo tic gubolo tic ki jo mogo ma i kin likwayo pa Acap, pa Eman ki pa Jedutun, wek gutit lok pa Lubaŋa macalo lunebi ki opuk ki naŋa ki atego agoya-gu, Nyiŋ jo ma yam gitiyo tic man, ki dog ticgi gin ene:" 
1Chronicles25:2 i kin litino pa Acap, Jakur, Yucepu, Netania ki Acarela, ma litino pa Acap, Acap aye telogi i wer, kun tito lok ma a ki bot Lubaŋa, i te cik pa kabaka." 
1Chronicles25:3 Litino pa Jedutun gin Gedalia, Jeri, Jecaya, Cimei, Kacabia ki Matitia, gin abicel, ma wongi Jedutun aye telogi i wer, kun tito lok a ma ki bot Lubaŋa ki opuk pi miyo pwoc bot Rwot." 
1Chronicles25:4 Litino pa Eman gin Bukia, Matania, Ujiel, Cebuel, ki Jerimot, Anania, Kanani, Eliata, Gidalti, ki Romamtiejer, Jocebekaca, Maloti, Kotir ki Makajiot." 
1Chronicles25:5 Magi ducu aye litino pa Eman ma lanen pa kabaka, macalo Lubaŋa yam ociko bote ni ebipilo wiye; pien Lubaŋa omiyo ki Eman litino awobe apar wiye aŋwen ki anyira adek." 
1Chronicles25:6 Gin ducu yam wongi aye telogi i wer i ot pa Rwot, kun giwero ki atego agoya, naga ki opuk pi konyo lega ma i ot pa Lubaŋa, Acap, Jedutun ki Eman yam gitiyo i te loc pa kabaka." 
1Chronicles25:7 Wei jo man giribo ki utmegigi ma yam gipwonyogi ki wer bot Rwot, jo ducu ma yam luryeko, giromo miya aryo ki pyeraboro wiye aboro." 
1Chronicles25:8 Gin ducu gipokogi i dog tic kun gibolo kwir, kun jo matino ki jo madito, lupwony ki jo ma gipwonyogi, gitimogi ducu marom." 
1Chronicles25:9 Kwir mukwoŋo opoto i kom Yucepu, ma jo pa Acap; me aryone opoto i kom Gedalia, ci okwako en ki omegine, ki litino awobene, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:10 me adekke opoto i kom Jakur kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:11 me aŋwenne opoto i kom Ijri kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:12 me abicce opoto i kom Netania kacel ki litino awo bene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:13 me abicelle opoto i kom Bukia kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:14 me abirone opoto i kom Jecarela kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:15 me aborone opoto i kom Jecaya kacel ki litino awo bene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:16 me aboŋwenne opoto i kom Matania kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:17 me aparre opoto i kom Cimei kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:18 me apar wiye acelle opoto i kom Ajarel kacel ki litino awo bene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:19 me apar wiye aryone opoto i kom Kacabia kacel ki litino awo bene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:20 me apar wiye adekke opoto i kom Cubael kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:21 me apar wiye aŋwenne opoto i kom Matitia kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:22 me apar wiye abicce opoto i kom Jeremot kacel ki litino awo bene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:23 me apar wiye abicelle opoto i kom Anania kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:24 me apar wiye abirone opoto i kom Jocebekaca kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:25 me apar wiye aborone opoto i kom Kanani kacel ki litino awo bene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:26 me apar wiye aboŋwenne opoto i kom Maloti kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:27 me pyeraryone opoto i kom Eliata kacel ki litino awo bene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:28 me pyeraryo wiye acelle opoto i kom Kotir kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:29 me pyeraryo wiye aryone opoto i kom Gidalti kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:30 me pyeraryo wiye adekke opoto i kom Makajiot kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo;" 
1Chronicles25:31 me pyeraryo wiye aŋwenne opoto i kom Romamtiejer kacel ki litino awobene ki omegine, gin ducu apar wiye aryo," 
1Chronicles26:1 Lok kom dul pa lugwokdoggola. I kin jo pa Kora guyero Mecelemia ma wod pa Kore ma i kin likwayo pa Acap. 
1Chronicles26:2 Mecelemia onywalo awobe magi: Jekaria ma latin kayone, ka dok me aryone Jediael, me adekke Jebadia, me aŋwenne Jatiniel," 
1Chronicles26:3 me abicce Elam, me abicelle Yekokanan, me abirone Eliekoenai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obed-edom onywalo awobe magi: Cemaya ma latin kayo, ka dok me aryone Yekojabad, me adekke Joa, me aŋwenne Cakar, me abicce Netanel," 
1Chronicles26:5 me abicelle Amiel, me abirone Icakar, me aborone Peuletai; pien Lubaŋa omiye gum." 
1Chronicles26:6 Ki wode Cemaya bene onywalo awobe ma gubedo rwodi i dog odi pa kwarogi, pien gubedo jo makwiri atika." 
1Chronicles26:7 Litino awobe pa Cemaya gin aye Otini, Repael, Obed ki Eljabad, ma omegigi gubedo jo makwiri, nyiŋgi Eliu ki Cemakia." 
1Chronicles26:8 Jo magi ducu gin aye likwayo pa Obed-edom kacel ki awobegi ki omegigi, jo makwiri ma giromo tic; jo pa Obed-edom giromo pyerabicel wiye aryo," 
1Chronicles26:9 Mecelemia bene obedo ki awo bene ki omegine ma gikwiri, gin apar wiye aboro." 
1Chronicles26:10 Ki Koca ma i kin likwayo pa Merari onywalo awobe magi: Cimri aye laditgi; kadi pe en aye latin kayo, ento wonne okero en odoko ladit;" 
1Chronicles26:11 ka dok me aryone Ilkia, me adekke Tebalia, me aŋwenne Jekaria; awobe pa Koca kacel ki omegine, ducu giromo apar wiye adek." 
1Chronicles26:12 Dul magi pa lugwok-doggola, ma dul acel acel tye ki laditte, gipokogi tic, kit ma yam gipoko ki utmegigi bene ma gubedo ka tic i ot pa Rwot;" 
1Chronicles26:13 dok gibolo kwir ma lubo dog odi pa kwarogi, pi noŋo doggola ma gibigwoko, kun dog odi matino ki maditone gitimogi marom." 
1Chronicles26:14 Kwir ma gibolo pi doggola ma tuŋ wokceŋ opoto i kom Celemia. Gibolo kwir bene pi wode Jekaria, ma en lami-tam ma ŋeyo piny mada, ci mere opoto pi doggola ma tuŋ acam." 
1Chronicles26:15 Pa Obed-edom opoto pi doggola ma tuŋ acuc, ci pa awobene obedo ot kano jami." 
1Chronicles26:16 Pa Cupim ki Koca opoto pi doggola ma tuŋ potoceŋ, kacel ki doggola ma gilwoŋo Caleket ma i yo ma dok tuŋ malo. Lugwok-doggola gukemme ki luwotgi." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ki tuŋ wokceŋ gubedo jo abicel i nino acel acel, ki tuŋ acam jo aŋwen i nino acel acel, ki tuŋ acuc bene jo aŋwen i nino acel acel, kacel ki jo aryo aryo i ot kano jami." 
1Chronicles26:18 I ot ma tere aperu ma yo tuŋ potoceŋ onoŋo giketo jo aŋwen i ŋet yo, ki aryo i ŋet ot ma tere aperu." 
1Chronicles26:19 Magi aye dul pa lugwok-doggola ma i kin jo pa Kora ki likwayo pa Merari. 
1Chronicles26:20 I kin Lulevi giketo Akija obedo ladit ma gwoko odi me kano lim ma i ot pa Lubaŋa, ki odi me kano lim me mot ma gidyero bot Rwot." 
1Chronicles26:21 I kin likwayo pa Gercon likwayo pa Ladan aye gubedo ludito kaka i dog odi pa kwarogi. Laditgi aye Jekieli. 
1Chronicles26:22 Litino awobe pa Jekieli, ma gin aye Jetam ki ominne Joel, gubedo ludito ma gwoko odi me kano lim ma i ot pa Rwot." 
1Chronicles26:22 Litino awobe pa Jekieli, ma gin aye Jetam ki ominne Joel, gubedo ludito ma gwoko odi me kano lim ma i ot pa Rwot." 
1Chronicles26:23 I kin jo pa Amram, pa Ijar, pa Kebron ki pa Ujiel," 
1Chronicles26:24 Cebuel, ma lakwar Gercom ma wod pa Moses, en aye rwot madit ma giketo pi gwoko odi me kano limo" 
1Chronicles26:25 Omegine gin ene: i kin likwayo pa Eliejer obedo wode Rekabia, ma wode Jecaya, ma wode Joram, ma wode Jikri, ma wode Celomot." 
1Chronicles26:26 Celomot man ki omegine gubedo ludito ma gwoko odi me kano mot ducu ma yam kabaka Daudi odyero bot Rwot, ki mot ma ludito kaka ma i odi pa kwarogi ki ludito ma giloyo buca mony me jo alip, ki buca mony me jo miya, ki lutel wi mony yam gudyero bene." 
1Chronicles26:27 Gin yam gudyero mot mua i lim ma giyako i lweny me yubo ot pa Rwot. 
1Chronicles26:28 Dok bene lim ducu ma yam Camuel ma lanen-piny, ki Caulo wod pa Kic, ki Abneri wod pa Ner, ki Joab, wod pa Jeruya yam gudyero bot Rwot; mot ducu ma gidyero Celomot ki omegine gubedo ka gwokone." 
1Chronicles26:29 I kom jo pa Ijar, giketo Kanania ki awobene pi tic ma woko ma i Icrael me bedo jagi ki luŋolkop." 
1Chronicles26:30 I kom jo pa Kebron giketo Kacabia ki omegine ma gikwiri ma romo alip acel ki miya abiro me ne no tic ma i Icrael ma loka Jordan yo tuŋ potoceŋ, pi tic pa Rwot ducu ki pi tic pa kabaka bene." 
1Chronicles26:31 I kom jo pa Kebron laditgi obedo Jerija ma loyo jo pa Kebron ducu ma ocoko dog odi pa kwarogi ducu. I mwaka me pyeraŋwen me loc pa Daudi yam gibedo ka yenyo, ci ginoŋo jo makwiri atika ma i kingi i Jajer ma i Gilead." 
1Chronicles26:32 Kabaka Daudi oketo en ki omegine, jo makwiri ma romo alip aryo ki miya abiro, ma gin ludito kaka ma i odi pa kwarogi, me neno tic pa jo pa Reuben, jo pa Gad ki nucu kaka pa Manace pi lok ducu ma mako tic pa Lubaŋa ki pi lok pa kabaka." 
1Chronicles27:1 Man aye nyiŋ jo Icrael ma ludito kaka ma i odi pa kwarogi, ludito ma giloyo buca mony pa jo alip ki buca mony pa jo miya, ki luditogi ma yam gitiyo bot kabaka i kom lok ducu ma mako dul pa jo ma gibino ki ma gicito dwe ki dwe pi mwaka ducu, kun dul acel acel welle romo jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen:" 
1Chronicles27:2 Jacobeam ma wod pa Jabdiel en aye ladit ma loyo dul mukwono ma tiyo i dwe mukwono; i dulle tye iye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen," 
1Chronicles27:3 En yam lakwar Perej, en yam ladit ma loyo luwi mony ducu pa mony ma gitiyo i dwe mukwoŋo." 
1Chronicles27:4 Dodai ma jo Akoki aye ladit ma loyo jo ma tiyo i dwe me aryo; i dulle tye iye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen," 
1Chronicles27:5 Ladit me adekke, ma loyo jo ma tiyo i dwe me adek, en aye Benaya wod pa ajwaka Yekoyada, en aye laditgi; i dulle tye iye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen." 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaya man en aye twon oteka ma i kin jo pyeradek ca, dok en aye ma loyo jo pyeradek-ku; wode Amijabad aye ladit ma loyo lwak ma i dulle." 
1Chronicles27:7 Me aŋwenne obedo Acael ma omin Joab, pi dwe me aŋwen; ŋat ma olube obedo Jebadia ma wode. I dulle tye iye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen." 
1Chronicles27:8 Ladit me abicce, pi dwe me abic, en aye Camkut ma jo pa Ijra; i dulle tye iye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen." 
1Chronicles27:9 Me abicelle pi dwe me abicel en aye Ira ma wod pa Ikec ma jo Tekoa; i dulle tye iye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen," 
1Chronicles27:10 Me abirone, pi dwe me abiro, en aye Kelej ma jo Pelon, ma i kin likwayo pa Epraim; i dulle tye iye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen," 
1Chronicles27:11 Me aborone, pi dwe me aboro, en aye Cibekai ma jo Kueat, pa jo pa Jera; i dulle tye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen," 
1Chronicles27:12 Me aboŋwenne, pi dwe me aboŋwen, en aye Abiejer ma jo Anatot, ma Labenjamin; i dulle tye iye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen," 
1Chronicles27:13 Me aparre, pi dwe me apar, en aye Makarai ma jo Netopa, ma jo Jera; i dulle tye iye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen," 
1Chronicles27:14 Me apar wiye acelle, pi dwe me apar wiye acel, en aye Benaya ma jo Piraton, ma i kin likwayo pa Epraim; i dulle tye i iye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen." 
1Chronicles27:15 Me apar wiye aryone, pi dwe me apar wiye aryo, en aye Keldai ma jo Netopa, likwayo pa Otiniel; i dulle tye iye jo alip pyeraryo wiye aŋwen." 
1Chronicles27:16 Jo ma loyo kaka pa Icrael gin ene: ladit ma loyo jo pa Reuben en aye Eliejer ma wod, pa Jikri; pi jo pa Cimeon, Cepatia ma wod pa Maaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 pi jo pa Levi, en Kacabia ma wod pa Kamuel; pi jo pa Aron, Jadok;" 
1Chronicles27:18 pi jo pa Juda, Eliu, ma ŋat acel ma i kin omegi Daudi; pi jo pa Icakar, Omri ma wod pa Mikael;" 
1Chronicles27:19 pi jo pa Jabulon, Icmaya ma wod pa Obadia; pi jo pa Naputali, Jeremot ma wod pa Ajriel;" 
1Chronicles27:20 pi jo pa Epraim, Kocea ma wod pa Ajajia; pi nucu kaka pa Manace, Joel ma wod pa Pedaya;" 
1Chronicles27:20 pi jo pa Epraim, Kocea ma wod pa Ajajia; pi nucu kaka pa Manace, Joel ma wod pa Pedaya;" 
1Chronicles27:21 pi nucu kaka pa Manace ma i Gilead, Iddo ma wod pa Jekaria; pi jo pa Benjamin, Jaciel ma wod pa Abneri;" 
1Chronicles27:22 pi jo pa Dan, Ajarel ma wod pa Jerokam. Magi aye ludito ma loyo kaka ducu ma i Icrael." 
1Chronicles27:23 Daudi yam pe okwano wel jo ma mwaka me ditogi pe romo pyeraryo, pien Rwot yam ociko ni ebimiyo jo Icrael gibedo mapol macalo lwak lakalatwe me polo." 
1Chronicles27:24 Joab ma wod pa Jeruya yam ocako kwano welgi ento pe ocobo; kadi bed kumeno akemo opoto i kom Icrael pi roc man, welgi bene pe gicoyo i buk me tekwaro pa kabaka Daudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Ŋat ma loyo odi me kano lim pa kabaka en aye Ajimavet ma wod pa Adiel; ki ma loyo odi lim ma i lobo, ma i gaŋi madito ki matinone, ki i odi matego ma ocudo malo liŋ aye Yonacan ma wod pa Ujia;" 
1Chronicles27:26 ki ma loyo jo ma gitiyo tic me pur i poto en aye Ejiri ma wod pa Kelub; 
1Chronicles27:27 ki ma loyo poto olok en aye Cimei ma jo Rama; ki ma loyo gin ma ocek i poto olok ma gikano i odi me kano kono yino en aye Jabdi ma jo Cipmi. 
1Chronicles27:28 Ŋat ma loyo yadi jeituni ki olam ma i bar Cepela en aye Baal-kanan ma jo Geder, dok ŋat ma loyo ot kano moo jeituni en aye Yoaci." 
1Chronicles27:29 Ŋat ma loyo lwak dyaŋi ma gikwayogi i Caron aye Citrai ma jo Caron; ki ma loyo lwak dyaŋi ma i nota ducu aye Capat ma wod pa Adlai. 
1Chronicles27:30 Ŋat ma loyo kinaga aye Obil ma jo Icmael; ki, ma loyo megi kana aye Jedeya ma jo Meronot. Ŋat ma loyo romi ki dyegi aye Jajij ma jo Agri." 
1Chronicles27:31 Jo magi ducu gin lugwok-lim pa kabaka Daudi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonacan ma okeyo Daudi aye lami-tam, pien obedo dano ma niaŋ matut, dok karan bene; en ki Jekiel ma wod pa Kakmoni gubedo lugwok litino awobe pa kabaka." 
1Chronicles27:33 Akitopel obedo lami-tam pa kabaka, ki Kucai ma jo Arki obedo larem kabaka." 
1Chronicles27:34 Jo ma guleyo ka tyen Akitopel aye Yekoyada ma wod pa Benaya, ki Abiatar. Joab aye ladit me mony pa kabaka." 
1Chronicles28:1 Daudi ocoko ludito pa jo Icrael ducu i Jerucalem, ludito ma loyo kaka ducu, ludito ma loyo dul tic ducu ma gitiyo i te loc pa kabaka, ludito ma loyo buca mony me jo alip, ki buca mony me jo miya, ludito ma gwoko jami ducu ki lim makwo ducu pa kabaka ki pa awo bene, kacel ki ludito ma loyo gaŋ kai, ki jo ma twoni oteka, ki jo ducu ma gunyebbe ki lweny." 
1Chronicles28:2 Ci kabaka Daudi oa malo, ocuŋ, ocako waco ni, “Wuwiny an, wun utmega ki wun lwakka. Yam abedo ki tam i cwinya me gero ot ka ma canduk me gicikke pa Rwot biywe iye, ki ka ma gibiketo iye kom pa Lubaŋa me teno tyene; ci abedo ka yubo kit me gerone ducu." 
1Chronicles28:3 Ento Lubaŋa ojuka kun wacca ni. ‘In pe ibigero ot mo pi nyina, pien in lalweny, dok ityeko oyo lwak remo madwoŋ.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 Kadi bed kumeno, ci Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael yam oyero an ki i kin doggola pa kwarina ducu me bedo kabaka ma loyo jo Icrael matwal; pien yam oyero Juda wek obed ladit, ki i ot pa Juda oyero ot pa wora, ki i kin litino awobe pa wora cwinye okwanyo an me bedo kabaka ma loyo Icrael ducu." 
1Chronicles28:5 I kom litino awobena ducu, macalo Lubaŋa omiya litino awobe mapol, en oyero iye woda Solomon me bedo i wi komker ma i te ker pa Rwot ma loyo Icrael." 
1Chronicles28:6 En rwacca ni, ‘Wodi Solomon aye bigerra ot ki dye kalle ducu, pien ayero en wek obed woda, ki an bene abibedo wonne." 
1Chronicles28:7 Abimoko kerre bedo matwal, ka ce cwinye omoko matek me lubo cikka ki lok ma aŋolo ducu kit ma en tye kwede i kare-ni.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 Doŋ acikowu i nyim jo Icrael ducu, ki i nyim lwak pa Rwot ducu, ma kun Lubaŋa bene winyo, wun wubed ka gwoko ki ka yenyo cik pa Rwot Lubaŋawu ducu, wek wubed wegi lobo man maber-ri, ci wuwek obed ginaleya matwal bot likwayowu ma gibilubo newu." 
1Chronicles28:9 “In woda Solomon bene, ber iŋe Lubaŋa pa wora, iti ki en ki cwinyi ducu ki kero komi ducu; pien Rwot niyo cwiny dano ducu, dok ŋeyo gin ma cwiny dano yubo ducu ki tamme ducu. Ka ce iyenyo en, ci in ibinoŋo kome; ento ka ce ibwoto en woko, en bitenyi woko matwal." 
1Chronicles28:10 Ber igwokke matek, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko yero in pi gero ot me kabedo maleŋ; bed laco, wek itim woko.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Ci Daudi omiyo bot wode Solomon cal kicika ot me donyo i ot pa Lubaŋa ma yam gicoyo, ki cal odine ducu, ki cal odi kano lim, ki me kicika ma malo ducu, ki me kicika odi matino ducu ma i iye, ki me kicika ma kom me kica bedo iye." 
1Chronicles28:12 Dok omiye cal ma nyuto dyekal me ot pa Rwot ducu kit ma yam cwinye otamo, ki kicika odi matino ma orumo ot ducu, ki odi me kano lim ducu ma i ot pa Lubaŋa, ki odi me kano lim me mot ma gidyero bot Rwot." 
1Chronicles28:13 Onyutte bene dul tic pa ajwagi ki Lulevi, ki kit kwa tic ducu ma gitiyo i ot pa Rwot; ki kit kwa jami ducu ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Rwot," 
1Chronicles28:14 ki pek pa jabu ma mitte pi jami me jabu ma i dog tic acel acel, ki pek pa jami me ryal pi dog tic acel acel," 
1Chronicles28:15 ki pek pa okar-mac me jabu, ki mac laputgi, pek me jabu ma mitte pi okar-mac acel acel ki lwak laputte ducu, ki pek pa ryal ma mitte pi okar-mac acel acel ki lwak laputte ducu, muporo kit tic pa okarmac acel acel ma gitiyo kwede," 
1Chronicles28:16 ki pek me jabu ma mitte pi meja acel acel me mugati me aketa i nyim Rwot, ki pek me ryal ma mitte pi tiyo meja me ryal ducu," 
1Chronicles28:17 ki jabu ma giliyo maberre pi gin lacob riŋo, ki becen ducu, ki kikopo ducu; dok pi atabo jabu ducu, ki pekgi acel acel; pi atabo ryal ducu ki pekgi acel acel;" 
1Chronicles28:18 ki pi keno tyer me wano odok eceta ma gitiyo ki jabu ma giliyo maleŋŋe, ki pekke. Ka doki onyutte cal gadigadi mejabu pa lukerubi ma giyaro bwomgi me umo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot." 
1Chronicles28:19 Man ducu en onyuto ka maleŋ pi gin ma yam Rwot ocoyo pire ki cine: tic ducu myero giti ma lubo kit cal meno. 
1Chronicles28:20 Daudi dok owaco bot wode Solomon ni, “Bed laco ma cwinyi nwaŋ, wek itim woko. Pe ilwor, pe cwinyi oryanne: pien Rwot Lubaŋa, ma en aye Lubaŋana, tye kwedi. En pe bibwoti ata, dok pe bitenyi, nie-ka tic ducu ma gitiyo i ot pa Rwot bitum." 
1Chronicles28:21 Nen, it ye ki lwak dul pa ajwagi ki pa Lulevi pi tiyo tic ducu me ot pa Lubaŋa; jo ducu ma ludiro i kwa tic ducu, ma gitye ki miti, gibinywako tic kwedi; ki ludito ki lwak ducu gibiwinyo dogi i lok ducu.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Kabaka Daudi dok owaco bot lwak ducu ma gucokke ni, “Latinna Solomon ma Lubaŋa gire aye oyero en, pud tidi, peya tye ki ŋec mo, dok tic bene dit; pien gaŋ kai man pe bibedo pa dano ento pa Rwot Lubaŋa," 
1Chronicles29:2 Pienno doŋ atyeko yubo jami ducu pi ot pa Lubaŋana kit munoŋo atwero, jabu pi jami me jabu, ryal pi jami me ryal, mola pi jami me mola, nyonyo pi jami me nyonyo, bao pi jami me bao, kun amedo iye lwak kidi onik mapol mada, ki litino kidi me amwona i kom jabu, ki akuku-gu, ki godi ma ranigi patpat, godi me wei ma kitgi patpat, ki kidi matarre bene." 
1Chronicles29:3 Dok pien cwinya obedo yom i kom ot pa Lubaŋana, omiyo amiyo jami magi me jabu ki me ryal mua i ciŋa pi ot pa Lubaŋana, kun amedo i kom lwak jami ducu ma atyeko yubo pi ot maleŋ," 
1Chronicles29:4 gin ene: jabu ma pekke romo talanta adek, en aye jabu me Opir, ki ryal ma giliyo maleŋŋe ma pekke romo talanta alip abiro pi mwono kom ot pa Rwot," 
1Chronicles29:5 ki pi tic ducu ma ludiro gibitiyo, jabu pi jami me jabu, ki ryal pi jami me ryal. Aŋa ma bikelo jami ma cwinye opwoyo-ni, ma tin kwerre kene i nyim Rwot?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Ci ludito kaka ma i odi pa kwarigi gucako tyero mot ma igi opwoyo, ki ludito ma loyo kaka bene gumiyo kit meno, ki ludito ma loyo buca mony me jo alip ki buca mony jo miya, ki ludito ma loyo tic pa kabaka." 
1Chronicles29:7 Gumiyo jami magi pi tic me ot pa Lubaŋa: jabu ma romo talanta alip abic ki darik alip apar, ki ryal ma romo talanta alip apar, ki mola ma romo talanta alip aboro, ki nyonyo ma romo talanta alip miya acel." 
1Chronicles29:8 Ki ŋat ma tye ki godi me wei omiyogi i ot kano lim ma i ot pa Rwot, ma Jekiel ma jo pa Gercon aye gwoko." 
1Chronicles29:9 Cwiny lwak obedo yom pien jo magi gumiyo mot ma cwinygi opwoyo, pien gutyero mot bot Rwot ki cwinygi ducu. Kabaka Daudi bene cwinye obedo yom matek." 
1Chronicles29:10 Mumiyo Daudi opwoyo Rwot i nyim lwak mucokke ducu, kun wacci, “Gipwo in Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarowa Icrael, nino ma pe tum," 
1Chronicles29:11 Ai Rwot, dit ki tek ki deyo ki loc ki woro ducu meri, pien jami ducu ma tye i polo ki ma tye i ‘lobo ducu meri. Ker bene meri, ai Rwot, in gipilo wii pien iloyo jami ducu." 
1Chronicles29:12 Lonyo ki deyo ducu a ki boti, dok in aye iloyogi ducu. Twero ki tek ducu tye i ciŋi, dok ciŋi aye miyo dano dit dok miyo tek ki jo ducu." 
1Chronicles29:13 Wan doŋ wapwoyi, in Lubaŋawa, kun wapako nyiŋi me deyo matek." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Ento an aŋa, ki lwakka kono gin aŋo, niumiyo wabedo ki twero kit man me miyo jamiwa kit ma iwa opwoyo-ni? Pien jami ducu a ki boti, dok wadwokki giri." 
1Chronicles29:15 Pien wan wawelo i nyimi, ki lubedo, kit ma yam kwarowa tye kwede; ninowa me bedo i lobo Lokke calo tipo, kabedowa pe iye." 
1Chronicles29:16 Ai Rwot Lubaŋawa, lwak jami man ducu ma wamiyo pi gerri ot pi nyiŋi maleŋ gua ki i ciŋi, ducu jamini giri." 
1Chronicles29:17 An aŋeyo, ai Lubaŋana, in itemo cwiny dano, ipwoyo dano ma cwinye atir; pi cwinya ma tye atir omiya atyero boti mot me jami magi ducu; doŋ atyeko neno lwakki ki waŋa, gin ma gitye kany-nyi, ka gityero jamigi boti kit ma cwinygi omito ki yomcwiny madwoŋ." 
1Chronicles29:18 Ai Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarowa Abraim ki Icaka ki Icrael, mi cwiny lwakki okem tam ma kit ennu nakanaka, dok imi cwinygi okem boti keken." 
1Chronicles29:19 Dok mi bot woda Solomon gum me mako cikki ki cwinye ducu, ki lok ma ibolo, ki lok ma iciko-gu, kun cobogi ducu; kun imiye gum me gero gaŋ kal ma doŋ atyeko yubo jami pire-ni.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Lacen Daudi owaco bot lwak ducu mucokke ni, “Wupwo Rwot Lubaŋawu.” Lwak mucokke ducu gucako pwoyo Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarigi, ci gukulo wigi piny, guworo Rwot, dok gumiyo woro bot kabaka bene," 
1Chronicles29:21 Gutumo gitum bot Rwot, dok orwone bene gutyero gitum awaŋa bot Rwot, twoni alip acel, nyogi romi alip acel ki litino romi alip acel, kacel ki gityer amata ma otiko kit gityer acel acel, ki lwak gitum mukene mapol pi jo Icrael ducu." 
1Chronicles29:22 Gucamo dok gumato i nyim Rwot i nino meno ki yomcwiny madwoŋ twatwal. Guketo Solomon wod pa Daudi me bedo kabaka tyen me aryone, kun giwire ki moo me bedo laker pi Rwot, dok giwiro Jadok bene me bedo ajwaka pa Lubaŋa," 
1Chronicles29:23 Lacen Solomon obedo kabaka i wi komker pa Rwot ma ka wonne Daudi; ci obedo ki gumkom, kun jo Icrael giworo doge." 
1Chronicles29:24 Ci ludito ducu ki twoni oteka lweny ducu, kacel ki litino awobe pa kabaka Daudi ducu, gucikke pi woro kabaka Solomon." 
1Chronicles29:25 Ci Lubaŋa omiyo Solomon yweka madit i nyim jo Icrael ducu, ci ocako onyo deyo me loc i kome madwoŋ ma yam pe onen i kom kabaka me Icrael mo nia wa con." 
1Chronicles29:26 Daudi wod pa Yece yam oloyo Icrael ducu kit meno. 
1Chronicles29:27 Obedo ka loyo jo Icrael pi mwaka pyeraŋwen kulu; obedo ka loc i Kebron pi mwaka abiro, ka dok i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyeradek wiye adek." 
1Chronicles29:28 Daudi oto ma doŋ oti woko likon, i kare maber mupoŋ ki lonyo ki deyo; ci wode Solomon oleyo ka tyene." 
1Chronicles29:29 Lok kom kabaka Daudi ducu nia i acakkine nio i agikkine gicoyogi i buk me Tekwaro pa Camuel ma lanen ki i buk me Tekwaro pa lanebi Natan, ki i buk me Tekwaro pa Gad ma lanen," 
1Chronicles29:30 kacel ki lok kom locce ducu, ki tekke ducu, ki lok ducu ma otimme i kome, ki i kom Icrael ki i kom ker ducu ma i lobo." 
2Chronicles1:1 Solomon wod pa Daudi omoko kerre matek, kun Rwot Lubaŋane bene onoŋo tye ‘kwede, ma omiyo en obedo madit twatwal." 
2Chronicles1:2 Solomon oloko ki jo Icrael ducu, bot ludito ma loyo buca mony me jo alip ki buca mony me jo miya, ki bot luŋokop ki ludito ducu ma i Icrael ducu, ma gin aye ludito wi kaka ki i odi pa kwarogi ducu." 
2Chronicles1:3 Solomon kacel ki lwak mucokke ducu gucito I kabedo me woro Lubaŋa i wi got ma i Gibeon; pien kema me rwatte pa Lubaŋa, ma yam Moses latic pa Rwot otiyo ki i tim, onoŋo pud bedo kunnu." 
2Chronicles1:4 (Ento Daudi yam okwanyo canduk pa Lubaŋa ki i Kiriat-jearim, okelo i kabedo ma ceŋ en oyubo pire, pien onoŋo oguro kema pire i Jerucalem,)" 
2Chronicles1:5 Onoŋo keno mola ma yam Bejalel wod pa Un, ma wod pa Kur otiyo-ni, pud tye wa kunnu bene i nyim kema pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles1:6 Solomon ocito cok ki keno mola ma i nyim kema me rwatte, wa i nyim Rwot, ci otyero iye gitum awaŋa alip acel kulu." 
2Chronicles1:7 I dyewor meno Lubaŋa onen Iye bot Solomon, owacce ni, “Peny gin ma abimiyo boti,”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomon ogamo doŋ Lubaŋa ni, “In yam myuto mar meri madwoŋ ma pe lokke bot wora Daudi, dok iketo an adoko kabaka pi leyo ka Tyene." 
2Chronicles1:9 Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, wek lok ma yam iciko bot wora Daudi tin doŋ ocobbe kakare, pien iketo an adoko kabaka me loyo rok madit ma gipol ma rom ki apwa me ŋom." 
2Chronicles1:10 Ber tin imiya ryeko ki ŋeyo piny, wek aŋe kit me loyo rok man, pien aŋa ma twero loyo lwakki man, madwoŋ ma rom manni?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Lubaŋa ogamo dog Solomon ni, “Ka meno aye gin ma tye i cwinyi, macalo in pe ilego lim nyo lonyo nyo deyo, kadi pi jo ma gidagi ni myero ginekgi woko, pe bene ilega, ni ami iri wi lobo nakanaka, ento ilego ryeko ki ŋeyo piny piri keni, wek ilo lwakka ma aketo in ibedo kabakagi," 
2Chronicles1:12 ryeko ki ŋeyo piny doŋ amiyogi boti. Dok abimiyi lwak lonyo ki lim ki deyo, ma acana i nyim Rwot jwijwi, ki pi tyero pe tye ŋat acel mo i kin luker ma gukwoŋo nyimi ma yam olimo gin ma rom meno, kadi wa kabaka mo ma bilubo kori pe bilimo kumeno.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Solomon ocako a woko ki i kabedo me woro Lubaŋa ma i wi got ma tye i Gibeon, kun oa woko ki i nyim kema me rwatte, odok i Jerucalem, ci obedo ka loyo jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles1:14 Solomon yam ocoko gadigadi lweny ki lulweny ma riŋo ki aguragura, Obedo ki gadigadi lweny alip acel ki miya aŋwen, ki wegi aguragura alip apar wiye aryo, Oketo mogo i kingi i gaŋi me gadigadi lweny, ki mukene gubedo bote i Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles1:15 Kabaka Solomon yam omiyo ryal odoko gin ma lam ma rom ki gweŋ-gu i Jerucalem, dok okelo yadi cedar mapol ata ma rom ki olam ma i bar Cepela." 
2Chronicles1:16 En yam limo aguragura ma a ki i Ejipt ki Kuc; lucat-wil pa kabaka gamogi ki i Kuc i wel lim ma onoŋo giyubo. 
2Chronicles1:17 Gadigadi ma gia ki i Ejipt welgi onoŋo romo cekel me ryal miya abicel, ki aguragura acel welle cekel miya acel ki pyerabic; ka dok lucat-wil pa kabaka catogi bot luker ducu pa jo Kit, ki bot luker me Ciria." 
2Chronicles2:1 Solomon otamo pi gero ot pa Lubaŋa pi nyiŋ Rwot, kacel ki gaŋ kalle kikome." 
2Chronicles2:2 Solomon oyero jo alip pyerabiro me yweko yec, ki jo alip pyeraboro me muko godi i lobo ma obedo gotgot, ki jo alip adek ki miya abicel me bedo ludito ma loyo lutic." 
2Chronicles2:3 Solomon dok ocwalo lok bot Kuram kabaka me Turo ni, “Kit ma yam ibedo ki wora Daudi kun icwalle bao cedar me gero ode me bedone, ber ibed kweda bene kit meno." 
2Chronicles2:4 Nen, ayubbe pi gero ot pi nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋana, ci abidyero bote pi waŋo iye odok eceta ma ŋwece kur i nyime, ki pi tyero iye mugati me gitum awaŋa odiko ki otyeno, ki i ceŋ cabit ducu, ki i por dwe, ki i nino madito ma Rwot Lubaŋawa oketo, ma yam en ociko pi jo Icrael matwal." 
2Chronicles2:5 Ot ma abigero-ni bibedo dit mada, pien Lubaŋawa du makato lubaŋa’ mukenegu ducu." 
2Chronicles2:6 Ento aŋa ma twero gero ot pi Lubaŋa? Kadi polo kulu ma tye malo twal-li, pe twero romo en bedo iye. An kono an aŋa ma atwero gero ot pire? Ento kono atwero tiyo ot mo macalo kabedo me waŋo odok eceta i nyime keken." 
2Chronicles2:7 Pienno amito icwalla dano mo makwiri ma twero tic i kom jabu, ki ryal, ki mola, ki nyonyo, ki boŋo ma lamar lamar, ki makwar ki ma bulu, ki dano ma gipwonyo ki goro kom jami, wek oti ki lutic makwiri ma gitye kweda i Juda ki i Jerucalem, ma yam wora Daudi oyubogi." 
2Chronicles2:8 Dok icwalla bao cedar, ki ciprec, ki bao algum ma gia i Lebanon, pien aŋeyo ni luticci giŋeyo toŋo yadi ma i Lebanon. Dok luticca gibibedo ki luticci," 
2Chronicles2:9 wek guyubba bao madwoŋ, pien ot ma abigero-ni bibedo dit dok me aura." 
2Chronicles2:10 Abimiyo bot joni ma gitiŋo bao ŋano ma nyige ma romo guniya alip pyerabicel, ki cayiri ma romo guniya alip pyerabicel, ki koŋo ŋino ma romo debe alip pyeraŋwen, ki moo jeituni bene debe alip pyeraŋwen, obed pi luticci me acamagi.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Kuram kabaka me Turo odok iye ki waraga ma ocwalo bot Solomon ni, “Pien Rwot maro jone omiyo oketo in ibedo kabaka ma loyogi.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Kuram dok owacci, “Gipwo Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ma con otiyo polo ki lobo, ma omiyo ki Daudi wode maryek, ma tye ki niaŋ matut, ma bigero ot pi Rwot, kacel ki gaŋ kalle kikome." 
2Chronicles2:13 “An doŋ acwalli dano ma ladiro ma tye ki ŋec matut, en Kuram-abi," 
2Chronicles2:14 ma wod pa dako ma anyira Dan, ma wonne dano me Turo, Gipwonyo en ki tic i kom jabu, ki ryal, ki mola, ki nyonyo ki godi, ki bao, ki boŋo ma lamar lamar, ki ma bulu ki makwar ki camanini maberre, En ŋeyo bene tic ducu me goro coc i kom jami, ŋeyo lubo kit cal mo me tic ma gimiye, kun tiyo kacel ki ludironi, ki ludiro pa rwoda Daudi ma woru." 
2Chronicles2:15 Pienno gin ma rwoda owaco-ni, doŋ ocwal ki luticce, ŋano ki cayiri, ki moo ki koŋo yiŋo;" 
2Chronicles2:16 Ci wan wabitoŋo kit bao ducu ma imito ki i Lebanon, wabitweyogi ci gibikwan i wi pii macalo bwoda nio wa i Jopa, wek in doŋ iom iter i Jerucalem.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Solomon dok ocako kwano wel jo ducu me rok mukene ma gibedo i lobo Icrael, kit ma yam wonne Daudi koŋ okwanogi-ni. Ginoŋo ni welgi romo jo alip miya acel ki pyerabic wiye adek ki miya abicel." 
2Chronicles2:18 En oyero jo alip pyerabiro ki i kingi me yweko yec ducu, ki jo alip pyeraboro me muko godi i lobo ma obedo gotgot, ki jo alip adek ki miya abicel me bedo ludito ma loyo lutic, pi cuko cwiny dano wek guti tic." 
2Chronicles3:1 Solomon ocako gero ot pa Rwot i Jerucalem i wi got me Moria, ka ma yam Rwot onyutte iye bot wonne Daudi, i kabedo ma yam Daudi oyero, i kom laro moyo pa Oman ma jo Jebuc." 
2Chronicles3:2 En ocako gerone i dwe me aryo i mwaka me aŋwen me locce. 
2Chronicles3:3 Solomon opimo ot pa Lubaŋa ma en omito gerone-ni kit man: borre romo futi pyeraboŋwen, ki lacce futi pyeradek." 
2Chronicles3:4 Ki kicika ma i doggola me donyo ma i nyim kicika me ot lacce romo futi pyeradek, ma roni ki lac me ot maditte; borre tuŋ malo roma futi miya acel ki pyeraboro. Omwono iye woko ki jabu ma giliyo maber." 
2Chronicles3:5 Solomon oguro kor ot me kicika maditte ki bao ciprec, ci omwono kom bao woko ki jabu maberre, ma gigoro iye cal yadi otit ki nyor." 
2Chronicles3:6 Odeyo i ot mamwonya mada ki godi matino me wel ma gimwono i kom jabu. Jabune obedo jabu ma gikelo ki i Parvaim. 
2Chronicles3:7 Kit meno en omwono i ot ducu ki jabu, riine, rii doggolane, kor kicika ot ducu, ki doggolane; ka dok ogoro cal lukerubi i kor kicika ot." 
2Chronicles3:8 En dok otiyo kabedo maleŋ makato ducu; borre futi pyeradek, ma rom ki lac me kicika ot maditte, ki lacce bene futi pyeradek. Omwono kome woko ki jabu maberre ma romo talanta miya abicel." 
2Chronicles3:9 Pek me mucumar me jabu ma giguro kwede obedo cekel pyerabic. En dok omwono kicika ma malo ducu ki jabu. 
2Chronicles3:10 I kabedo maleŋ makato ducu en oketo iye cal lukerubi aryo me bao ma gipayo, ci omwono komgi woko ki jabu." 
2Chronicles3:11 Bwom lukerubi ducu borre muyarre romo futi pyeradek. Bwomgi acel acel borre romo futi abiro ki nucu. Wi bwom lakerubi acel ogudo kor ot, kun bwome tuŋcel ma borre futi abiro ki nucu, wiye ogudo wi bwom lakerubi wadi;" 
2Chronicles3:12 ki bwom lakerubi man bwome acel ma borre futi abiro ki nucu-ni, wiye bene ogudo kicika ot, ki bwome mukene, ma romo futi abiro ki nucu-ni, wiye orwatte ki bwom lakerubi mukwoŋo-ni." 
2Chronicles3:13 Bwom cal lukerubi magi borgi muyarre oromo futi pyeradek. Gucuŋ ki tyengi ma gineno tuŋ kicika ot maditte. 
2Chronicles3:14 Okwoyo boŋo kicika ki boŋo ma bulu ki ma lamar lamar ki makwarre, ki boŋo camanini maberre, ma odero ki callukerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 En dok otiyo wir aryo ma bocogi romo futi pyerabic wiye aryo, ki lalukana i wigi ma bocogi romo futi abiro ki nucu, ci oketogi i nyim ot." 
2Chronicles3:16 Ka dok otiyo nyor macalo tiko nut, ci oketogi i wi wir aryo ducu, ka dok otimo cal nyig okwer pomegranat miya acel, ci oketogi i kom nyor." 
2Chronicles3:17 Ocibo wir magi i nyim ot pa Lubaŋa, acel yo tuŋ acuc, ki mukene yo tuŋ acam. Ocako nyiŋ ma yo tuŋ acuc-ci ni, Jakin, ki ma yo tuŋ acam-mi olwoŋo ni Boaj," 
2Chronicles4:1 Otiyo keno tyer me mola ma borre romo futi pyeradek, ki lacce bene futi pyeradek; borre ma dok malo romo futi apar wiye abic," 
2Chronicles4:2 Ka dok otiyo nam me mola ma giliyo ma otwodde aduno, ma lacce romo futi apar wiye abic, nia i doge tuŋcel nio i doge tuŋcel; borre tuŋ malo romo futi abiro ki nucu. Gipimo doge ki tol ci oromo futi pyeraŋwen wiye abic." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ki i tere piny tye iye cal keno munyak ma orumo kom nam ducu, ma borre futi pyeraŋwen wiye abic; cal keno magi giryeyogi latyeŋ aryo, I kare ma gitiyo nam, gitiyo ki cal keno i kome lawanace!." 
2Chronicles4:4 Gicibo nam ocuŋ i wi cal twoni dyaŋi apar wiye aryo; giketo adek gineno yo tuŋ acam, adek gineno yo tuŋ potoceŋ, adek gineno yo tuŋ acuc, ki adek gineno yo tuŋ wokceŋ. Gicibo nam ocun i ŋe twoni-nu, kun ŋegi ducu odok tuŋ iye." 
2Chronicles4:5 Kome kinoŋ maromo incic adek; ki doge bene calo dog kikopo, ma, rom ki cal ature lena, Piine romo debe makato alip abicel." 
2Chronicles4:6 Ka dok otiyo otako apar me lwok, oketo abic yo tuŋ acuc, ki abic yo tuŋ acam. Magi obedo me lako jami ducu ma gitiyo kwedgi pi gitum awaŋa: nam giketo me lwok pa ajwagi." 
2Chronicles4:7 Dok otiyo okar-mac me jabu apar kit ma giciko-ni, oketogi i ot pa Lubaŋa; oketo abic yo tuŋ acuc ki abic yo tuŋ acam." 
2Chronicles4:8 En dok otiyo meja apar, oketogi i ot pa Lubaŋa, abic yo tuŋ acuc ki abic yo tuŋ acam. Dok otiyo becen me jabu miya acel." 
2Chronicles4:9 Ka dok oyubo dyekal pa ajwagi, ki dyekal maditte, ki kika me dyekal, omwono kom ki ka ducu ki mola;" 
2Chronicles4:10 ka oketo nam i twok ot i kin tuŋ acuc ki tuŋ wokceŋ," 
2Chronicles4:11 Kuram ocweyo agulu mapol bene, ki akwaya, ki becen-gu, Kit meno Kuram otyeko tic i kom ot pa Lubaŋa pi kabaka Solomon." 
2Chronicles4:12 Otiyo wir aryo, ki lalukana aryo ma oluŋŋe macalo agulu ma giketo i wi wir, ki obwo aryo me umo kom lalukana aryo ma oluŋŋe ma obedo i wi wir-ri." 
2Chronicles4:13 Dok otiyo cal okwer pomegranat miya aŋwen pi obwo aryo-nu, kun cal pomegranat giryeyo latyeŋ aryo i kom obwo acel acel me umo kom lalukana aryo ma oluŋŋe ma obedo i wi wir." 
2Chronicles4:14 Otiyo bene litino gadigadi apar, ki otakomola apar ma giluto i litino gadigadi," 
2Chronicles4:15 ki nam acel, ki cal twoni dyaŋi apar wiye aryo ma i te namo" 
2Chronicles4:16 Lwak agulu ki akwaya latokke-gu, ki gin lacob riŋo, ki jami ducu ma mitte pi tic ki jami magi ma Kuram-abi otiyogi pi ot pa Rwot ki pi kabaka Solomon obedo me mola ma gijwane maleŋ." 
2Chronicles4:17 Kabaka omiyo giliyo mola meno i pwor kulu Jordan, ka ma lobo agulu tye iye, i kin Cukot ki Jereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Solomon otimo gin lwak jami-nu madwoŋ twatwal, ma pek pa molane pe gikwano." 
2Chronicles4:19 Solomon otiyo jami ducu ma tye i ot pa Lubaŋa kit man: keno tyer me jabu, ki lwak meja me caŋo mugati ma giketo i nyim Rwot," 
2Chronicles4:20 okar-mac ki lwak laputgi me jabu ma giliyo maber, ma myero gubed ka lyel i kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo, kit ma giciko-ni;" 
2Chronicles4:21 ki lwak cal ature, ki laput-gu, ki boyi lakar mac, ducu me jabu ma giliyo maber makato." 
2Chronicles4:22 Magac-gu, becen-gu, atabo me odok eceta, ki weer me waŋo mac otiyogi ki jabu ma giliyo maber; ki pata me ot pa Lubaŋa ma giketo i kom kika me kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo, ki i kika me kicika maditte bene, gubedo me jabu," 
2Chronicles5:1 Tic ma Solomon otiyo i kom ot pa Rwot otum kit meno. Solomon okelo jami ma yam wonne Daudi odyero ki Rwot-ti, ci okano ryal, ki jabu, ki jami tic-gu ducu i ot kano lim ma i ot pa Lubaŋa." 
2Chronicles5:2 Solomon ocoko ludoŋo pa jo Icrael ki ludito wi kaka ducu, ma gin aye lutel wi doggola pa kwarogi ma i kin jo Icrael, ci gubino i Jerucalem pi kwanyo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot ki i gaŋ kal pa Daudi, ma gilwoŋo ni Cion." 
2Chronicles5:3 Ci lwak jo Icrael ducu gucokke i nyim kabaka pi nino madito ma tye i dwe me abiro-ni. 
2Chronicles5:4 Ludoŋo pa jo Icrael ducu gubino, ci Lulevi gucako tino canduk me gicikke." 
2Chronicles5:5 Gutero canduk ki kema me rwatte, kacel ki jami maleŋ ducu ma yam tye i kema; ajwagi ki Lulevi gukelogi." 
2Chronicles5:6 Kabaka Solomon ki lwak jo Icrael ducu ma gucokke bote-ni, gubedo i nyim canduk kun gitumo romi ki twoni-gu mapol ma welgi pe kwanne dok pe nene bene." 
2Chronicles5:7 Kit meno ajwagi gucako kelo canduk me gicikke pa Rwot wa i kabedone ma i tyelo me ot, en aye kabedo maleŋ makato ducu-ni, ci guketo piny i te bwom lukerubi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Lukerubi guyaro bwomgi ka wi kabedo me canduk wek lukerubi guum wi canduk woko kacel ki tal latiŋŋe ducu. 
2Chronicles5:9 Dok tal latiŋŋe yam wigi nen ki i kabedo maleŋ ma i nyim kabedo maleŋ ma i tyelo-ni; ento pe gitwero nenogi ki woko; pud gitye kunnu nio wa onyoo. 
2Chronicles5:10 Gin mo onoŋo pe tye i canduk, kono kidi aryo ma apada keken ma yam Moses oketo i iye ki i Koreb, ka ma yam Rwot oketo iye gicikke ki jo Icrael, i kare ma gia ki i lobo Ejipt." 
2Chronicles5:11 Ajwagi gukato woko ki i kabedo maleŋ, pien ajwagi ducu ma onoŋo gitye-ni doŋ gutyeko lonnye kekengi, ma pe giparo pi dul ticgi;" 
2Chronicles5:12 ci Lulevi ducu ma gin luwer, Acap ki Eman, ki Jedutun, ki awobegi, ki utmegigi, onoŋo gurukke ki boŋŋi camanini mabecone, ci gimako atego agoya, ki nana ki opuk. Kacel kwedgi obedo ajwagi ma giromo miya acel ki pyeraryo ma gin lukut tumo" 
2Chronicles5:13 Tic pa lukut tum ki luwer en aye me ribo dwangi kacel ka pako ki ka pwoyo Rwot, ki dwangi ma winnye maloŋo. I kare ma gucako wer, kacel ki tum ki atego agoya ki jami mukene ducu me wer, pi pako Rwot kun giwero ni, “Pien en ber, mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka,” ci deyo pa Rwot opoŋo i ot woko, en ot pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles5:14 Pienno omiyo ajwagi pe gitwero cuŋ ka tiyo ticgi, pi pol meno, pien deyo pa Rwot noŋo opoŋo i ot pa Lubaŋa woko." 
2Chronicles6:1 I nino meno Solomon owacci, “Rwot otyeko wacci en ebibedo i pol macollicuc." 
2Chronicles6:2 Agerri doŋ ot ma ocudo malo, wek obed kabedoni ma ibedo iye matwal.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Ka dok kabaka olokke, ci olamo gum i kom lwak jo Icrael ma gucokke ducu, kun jo Icrael ma gucokke-ni gucuŋ mot." 
2Chronicles6:4 En ocako lamo gum ni, “Gipwo Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ma doŋ cine otyeko cobo gin ma “am oloko ki doge bot wora Daudi-ni, kun wacci," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Nia wa i kare ma akwanyo ki jona jo Icrael ki i Ejipt, peya ayero gaŋ mo ma i kaka ma i Icrael pi gero iye ot mo, wek nyina obed iye. Dok pe ayero laker mo me loyo jona jo Icrael;" 
2Chronicles6:6 ento doŋ atyeko yero Jerucalem wek nyina obed kenyo, ka dok ayero Daudi me bedo lalo lwakka jo Icrael.’" 
2Chronicles6:7 I kare-nu onoŋo wora Daudi obedo ki tam i cwinye me gero ot pi nyiŋ Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
2Chronicles6:8 Ento Rwot aye owaco bot wora Daudi ni, ‘Kit macalo onoŋo doŋ tam tye i cwinyi me gero ot pi nyina, itimo ber pi keto lok meno i cwinyi." 
2Chronicles6:9 Ento pe in aye dok ibigerra ot, ento wodi ma ibinywalo aye bigero ot pi nyiŋa.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 I kare-ni Rwot doŋ otyeko cobo gin ma en ociko i cikkene; pien an doŋ atyeko leyo ka tyen wora Daudi, doŋ atyeko bedo i wi komker pa Icrael, kit ma yam Rwot ociko-ni, dok atyeko gero ot pi nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
2Chronicles6:11 Doŋ atyeko keto iye kabedo pa canduk pa Rwot, ma tye iye gicikke ma Rwot con oketo ki jo Icrael.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Solomon dok ocuŋ i nyim keno tyer pa Rwot ki i nyim lwak jo Icrael ma gucokke ducu, ocako taŋo ciŋe aryo ducu malo," 
2Chronicles6:13 Solomon onoŋo otiyo abam mola ma borre futi abiro ki nucu, ki acee futi abiro ki nucu, ki borre nia piny dok malo futi aŋwen ki nucu, ocibo i dyekal; en ocuŋ i wiye. Ka dok orumo coŋe piny i nyim lwak jo Icrael ducu ma gucokke, ka ocako taŋo ciŋe aryo ducu malo okemo polo," 
2Chronicles6:14 kun wacci, “Ai Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, pe tye Lubaŋa mo macalo in, kadi malo i polo nyo piny i wi lobo, ma tye ka gwoko gicikkene macalo in, ma inyuto mar meri ma pe lokke bot luticci ma bedo ka lubi ki cwinygi ducu." 
2Chronicles6:15 Ibedo ka lubo kit gin ma yam itito bot wora Daudi, iyo, gin ma yam iloko ki dogi, icako doŋ tiyo i kare man ki ciŋi, ci ico bo ducu maber." 
2Chronicles6:16 Kombeddi ai Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, doŋ ilub gin ma yam iciko ki laticci wora Daudi, kun iwacci, ‘Pe ibibedo laboŋo danoni mo i nyima ma bibedo i wi komker pa Icrael, tekke awobeni gugwoko kitgi maber, kun gilubo cikka kit macalo ibedo kwede i nyimani.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 Ai Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, kombeddi mi lokki doŋ omok matek, kit ma cen iloko ki wora Daudi ma laticci." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Ento Lubaŋa bibedo i wi lobo-ni kacel ki dano ada? Nen, kadi oolo bene kutu ma malone twatwal-li pe romo in me bedo iye, ci ot ma agero-ni tidine rom mene kono!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Dok in pud iciko iti ka winyo legana, an laticci, ki kit ma abako kwede doga, ai Rwot Lubaŋana, doŋ iwiny koko ki lega ma atye ka lego i nyimi tin;" 
2Chronicles6:20 wek waŋi obed twolo onen ot man dyeceŋ ki dyewor, en aye kabedo ma yam iwaco pire ni ibiketo iye nyiŋi, wek ibed ka winyo legana ma akelo boti kun alokke akemo kabedo man atir." 
2Chronicles6:21 Dok iwiny bako dog laticci ki pa joni jo Icrael, i kare ma walego wakemo kabedo man atir; iyo, in doŋ ibed ka winyone ki i polo ka ma ibedo iye-ni; ci ka doŋ ityeko winyone, doŋ iwek balwa." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Ka ce dano mo otimo bal i kom wadi mo, ci gimiye okwono kwon mo pire, ka obino ce okwoŋo kwoŋŋe ki i nyim keno tyerri ma i ot man," 
2Chronicles6:23 ci in Lubaŋa iwiny ki i polo, iket i tic; ŋol kop pa laticci-ni, imi kop olo dano mutino alii, kun iketo gin ma en otimo i wiye kene, dok imi dano ma pe obalo olo kop, kun itime ber muporo leŋcwinye." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Ka ce mony pa lumerok guloyo jonijo Icrael pi balgi ma gutimo i komi, ka ce guŋut gudwogo boti, ci gucako tuco nyiŋi, ma gilego in ka gibako doggi boti ki i ot man," 
2Chronicles6:25 ci iwinygi ki polo, iwek bal pa joni jo Icrael, ka dok idwokgi cen wa i lo bo ma yam i miyo bot kwarogi." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Ka ce polo ocegge woko, ma kot mo pe ocwer pi lakit balgi mo i komi, ka ce lwakki gucako lega kun gukemo kabedo man, kun gituco nyiŋi, ka guŋut ci gubwoto balgi, ki i kare ma iketo can i komgi-ni," 
2Chronicles6:27 ci in Lubaŋa iwinygi ki i polo, iwek bal pa luticci, gin joni jo Icrael, dok ipwonygi ki yo maber ma myero gulubi; ci doŋ imi kot ocwer i loboni-ni ma yam imiyo bot lwakki obed megi." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Ka ce kec opoto i lobo, ka two gemo opoto, nyo ka bel obwarre nyo odoko ocone, nyo ka bonyo opoto nyo okwil obino, ka ce merokgi orumogi i gaŋigi mogo nyo kadi bed kit gemo aŋo, nyo kit two mo-ni," 
2Chronicles6:29 ka ce lwakki gucako lega nyo bako doggi, kadi bed dano acel kok boti, nyo joni jo Icrael ducu, kun dano acel acel ŋeyo kit atwomme kene, ki cwercwinye bene, ka ce otaŋo ciŋe okemo ki ot man;" 
2Chronicles6:30 ci in Lubaŋa iwinygi ki i polo ka ma ibedo iye-ni, iwek balgi. Tim dano acel acel kit ma iŋeyo kwede cwinye, ma rwatte ki kit kwone ducu, pien in aye, in keni, iŋeyo kit cwiny pa dano ducu;" 
2Chronicles6:31 meno bimiyo gibedo ka lworo in kun gilubo yo meri nino ducu ma gibedo, iye i lobo ma yam imiyo bot kwarowa." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Obed kit meno bene ka ce larok mo, ma pe joni jo Icrael, obino kany ma oa ki i lobo mo mabor, ma obino pi nyiŋi madit-ti, ki badi matek-ki, ki ciŋi ma iryeyo, ka ce larok obino ce ocako lega ma okemo ot man," 
2Chronicles6:33 ci in Lubaŋa iwiny ki i polo ka ma ibedo iye-ni, itim kit gin ducu ma larok-ki okok kwede i nyimi, wek rok ma wi lobo ducu guŋe nyiŋi, gucak lwori, kit ma I wakki jo Icrael gilwori-ni, dok wek guŋe maber ni, ot man ma agero-ni, gilwoŋo ki nyiŋi keken." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Ka ce lwakki gucito ka lwenyo i kom lumerokgi i kabedo mo ducu ma icwalogi iye, ka ce gukelo legagi boti ma gukemo gaŋ man ma in iyero, ki ot man ma agero pi nyini-ni," 
2Chronicles6:35 ci in iwiny legagi ki bako doggi ki i polo, ci ikony korgi macalo ineno ni lokgi tye atir." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Ka ce gutimo bal i komi, pien pe tye dano mo ma pe balo, ka ce kiniga omaki i komgi, ci imiyogi i ciŋ lamerok mo, ma oyakogi ci oterogi i opii wa i lobo mo ka mabor nyo ka ma cok;" 
2Chronicles6:37 ento ka cwinygi otamo lok ki i lobo ma giterogi iye i opii-ni, ce guŋut ci gubako doggi boti ki i lobo ma gitye iye i opii, kun gikok ni, ‘Wabalo, watyeko ŋak woko ata, watiyo lwak bal-gu mapol’," 
2Chronicles6:38 ka ce gutyeko nut Ici tamgi ducu ki cwinygi ducu, ki i lobo ka ma giterogi iye i opii-ni, kun doŋ gilego i nyimi ma gukemo lobogi, ma yam imiyo bot kwarogi-ni, ki gaŋ ma nene iyero, ki ot ma atyeko gerone pi nyiŋi," 
2Chronicles6:39 in Lubaŋa iwiny legagi ki bako doggi ki i polo ka ma ibedo iye-ni, ci iye konyo korgi ka ce ineno ni lokgi tye atir, dok iwek bal pa joni ma gubalo i komi." 
2Chronicles6:40 Ai Lubaŋa, kombeddi doŋ wek waŋi obed twolo ci icik iti iwiny lega ma gilego i kabedo man." 
2Chronicles6:41 “A malo, ai Rwot Lubaŋa, ci idony i kabedo me yweyoni, in ki canduk me tekki. Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, wek ajwagini gurukke ki larre, wek joni maleŋ cwinygi obed yom pi berri." 
2Chronicles6:42 Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, pe ikwer lega pa lakerri ma giwiro! Po pi mar meri ma pe lokke i kom laticci Daudi.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Ka Solomon doŋ otyeko legane, ci mac obino piny ma a ki i polo, owaŋo gitum awaŋa ki gitum mu kene ducu, ci deyo pa Rwot opoŋo i ot pa Lubaŋa woko." 
2Chronicles7:2 Ajwagi doŋ pe gitwero donyo i ot pa Rwot, pien deyo pa Rwot opoŋo i ot pa Rwot woko." 
2Chronicles7:3 Ka jo Icrael ducu guneno mac obino piny, ki deyo pa Rwot oboyo kom ot pa Lubaŋa woko, gukulo wigi piny aryeba ic i dyekal ma gipeto iye godi, gumiyo woro ki pwoc bo! Rwot, kun giwacci, “Pien en ber, mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Ka dok kabaka ki jo Icrael ducu gucako tyero gitum i nyim Rwot. 
2Chronicles7:5 Kabaka Solomon otyero gityer ma romo twoni dyaŋi alip pyeraryo wiye aryo, ki romi alip miya acel ki pyeraryo. Kabaka ki jo Icrael ducu gukwero ot pa Lubaŋa kit meno." 
2Chronicles7:6 Ajwagi gucuŋ i kabedogi, kacel ki Lulevi ma gumako jami me wer megi me pako Rwot, kit ma yam kabaka Daudi oyubo pi miyo pwoc bot Rwot, ni, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka. Meno timme i kare ducu ma yam Daudi pako iye Lubaŋa, kun gin gikonye ki jami wergi. Ki jo ma gucuŋ ma’ gukemogi gin ajwagi ma gikuto tum, kun noŋo jo Icrael ducu gucuŋ mot." 
2Chronicles7:7 Solomon dok ocako kwero kabedo ma i cwiny dyekal ma tye i nyim ot pa Rwot-ti. En otyero kunnu gitum awaŋa, ki moo dwolo-gu me gityer lakwecwiny, pien keno tyer me mola ma Solomon otiyo-ni onoŋo tidi twatwal, pe romo keto iye gitum awaŋa kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki dwolo-gu." 
2Chronicles7:8 I kare meno Solomon okwero nino madito pi nino abiro kulu, kacel ki jo Icrael ducu. Onoŋo lwak gucokke madwoŋ, kun gua wa i yo ma donyo i Kamat nio wa i nota ora me Ejipt," 
2Chronicles7:9 I nino me aborone gubedo ki cokke madit; pien gubedo ki lega me kwero keno tyer nino abiro kulu, ki nino madito mukene bene nino abiro." 
2Chronicles7:10 I kom nino dwe pyeraryo wiye adek i dwe me abiro en aye Solomon ocwalo lwak gudok woko tugi. Lwak gudok i pacogi ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, ma igi okwe pi gin ducu mabeco ma Rwot otimo pi Daudi ki pi Solomon ki pi lwakke jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles7:11 Kit meno Solomon otyeko gero ot pa Rwot ki ode en kabaka bene; tic ducu ma yam en oyubo me atiya i ot pa Rwot ki i ode en ocobo maber twatwal. 
2Chronicles7:12 Ci Rwot onen bot Solomon i dyewor kun wacce ni, “Atyeko winyo legani, doŋ atyeko yero kabedo man obed mera me bedo ot ka ma gibityero iye gitum bota." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ka ce acego polo ma kot doŋ pe cwer, nyo ka ce aciko ni bonyo ocam cam ma i lobo otyek woko, nyo ka ce acwalo two gemo opoto i kom lwakka," 
2Chronicles7:14 ka ce lwakka ma gilwoŋogi ki nyina-ni gumwolle woko, ce gulego ma gimito an kikoma, ka guweko kit timgi maraco, ci dok abiwinyogi ki i polo, ci abikwanyo gin ma tye ka balo lo bogi, ka dok abiweko balgi." 
2Chronicles7:15 Cakke tin waŋa bibedo twolo, dok abiciko ita ka winyo lega ma gibilego i kabedo man." 
2Chronicles7:16 Pien tin an doŋ atyeko yero ot man, dok atyeko lonyone odoko maleŋ, wek nyiŋa obed iye matwal; dok waŋa ki cwinya bikemo kunnu matwa!’" 
2Chronicles7:17 Ki ma tuŋ boti, ka ce ibibedo ki kit kwo i nyima ma yam woru Daudi obedo kwede-ni, ce ka itiyo gin ma aciko ducu, kun igwoko cik ma aketo, ki gin ma doŋ aŋolo," 
2Chronicles7:18 ci an Lubaŋani abimoko komkerri me loyo Icrael matwal, kit ma yam aciko bot woru Daudi kun awacce ni, ‘Pe ibibedo laboŋo danoni mo ma biloyo jo Icrael.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 “Ento ka ce wunak woko, ma wubwoto lubo cikka ki mako lok ma aciko ma aketogi i nyimwu, ce wukobo woko ka tiyo bot lubaŋa mogo mukene kun wuworogi," 
2Chronicles7:20 ci miyo abiputowu woko ki i lobo ma yam amiyowu-ni; dok abikwanyo waŋa woko, pe dok neno kom ot man ma atyeko lonyo odoko maleŋ pi nyiŋa-ni; miyo nyiŋ Icrael bi doko carolok ki lok aboka i kin rok ducu," 
2Chronicles7:21 Jo ducu ma bikato ki ka ŋet ot man madit twatwal-li gibiuro ki jwat kun giwacci; ‘Kit lok aŋo mumiyo Rwot otimo lobo-ni ki ot man ki tim macalo man?’ 
2Chronicles7:22 Ka dok gibiwacci, ‘Pien gubwoto Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarogi ma yam okwanyogi ki, i lobo Ejipt, ci gukobo bot lubaŋa mogo mukene, dok gubedo ka worogi ma kun gitiyo botgi bene; en aye lok mumiyo Rwot omiyo can opoto i komgi magwa-ni.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Gero odi aryo-ni ma Solomon ogero, gin aye ot pa Rwot ki ot pa kabaka, otero mwaka pyeraryo kulu," 
2Chronicles8:2 Solomon dok ogero gaŋi odoco ma yam Kuram omiyogi bote, ci omiyo jo Icrael gubedo i igi." 
2Chronicles8:3 Solomon dok ocito i Kamat-joba, ci omako woko." 
2Chronicles8:4 En ogero Tadmor ma i tim, ki gaŋi ducu me kano cam ma ogerogi i Kamat." 
2Chronicles8:5 Dok en ogero Bet-koron Mamalo ki Bet-koron Mapiny orumo gaŋi magi ki cel gogo, oketo iye doggola ma gicego ki rii." 
2Chronicles8:6 Ogero Baalat bene, ki gaŋi ducu me kano cam ma yam Solomon tye kwedgi, ki gaŋi me keto gadigadi mony, ki gaŋi pa lulweny ma giriŋo ki aguragura, ki kit gedo ducu ma yam Solomon omito gerogi i Jerucalem, ki i Lebanon, ki i lobo ma en loyo ducu." 
2Chronicles8:7 Jo ducu ma yam gubwot ci gudoŋ ki i kom jo Kit, jo Amor, jo Periji, jo Kiv ki jo Jebuc, ma pe gin jo Icrael," 
2Chronicles8:8 gin aye Solomon oketo tic muroni i wigi, kit macalo tye-ni nio wa onyoo," 
2Chronicles8:9 Ento Solomon pe odiyo jo Icrael i tic me opii; gin gubedo askari, ki luditone, ki ludito me gadigadi monnye, ki lulweny ma giriŋo ki aguragurane." 
2Chronicles8:10 Jo magi gin aye ludito tic pa Kabaka: Solomon ma giloyo dog tic ducu; giromo miya aryo ki pyerabic, gin aye giloyo lwak." 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomon okelo nya pa Parao nia ki i gaŋ kal pa Daudi otero i ot ma en ogero pire, pien owacci, “Dakona pe bibedo i ot pa Daudi kabaka me Icrael, pien kabedo ducu ma doŋ canduk pa Rwot obino iye-ni odoko kabedo maleŋ.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Dok Solomon obedo ka tyero gitum awaŋa i wi keno tyer pa Rwot ma yam en ocano i nyim kicika ot ma i doggola me ot pa Rwot. 
2Chronicles8:13 En obedo ka miyo gityer kit ma tic me nino acel acel mito kwede, kun lubo cik pa Moses i cen cabit ducu, ki i por dwe, ki i nino madito adek me mwaka ki mwaka-ni, ma gin aye nino madito me Mugati ma Tobi Pe Iye, nino madit me kwero Agikki Cabit Abiro, ki nino madito me Bolo." 
2Chronicles8:14 Kit macalo yam wonne Daudi ociko, en oketo lwak dul pa ajwagi ki dog ticgi, ki Lulevi gi dog ticgi me pako Lubaŋa ki me tic i nyim ajwagi, muporo tic me nino acel acel. Opoko bene tic pi lugwok doggola ducu ki dulgi i doggola acel acel, kit ma Daudi ma dano pa Lubaŋa yam ociko." 
2Chronicles8:15 Gin gubedo ka lubo cik ma kabaka ociko ki ajwagi ki Lulevi, pe guweko gin mo ma mako lok ducu, ki ma mako kano limo" 
2Chronicles8:16 Solomon otyeko ticce ducu kit meno, cakke i nino ma giketo iye guti me te ot pa Rwot nio ka otum, Ot pa Rwot otum kit meno." 
2Chronicles8:17 Solomon dok ocito wa i Ejiongeber ki i Elot ma i dog nam, ma i lobo Edom." 
2Chronicles8:18 Kuram yam ocwalo luticce ki mel bot Solomon; en ocwalo luticce ma guŋiyo ki nam, ci gucito wa i Opir kacel ki lutic pa Solomon, guomo jabu ma romo talanta miya aŋwen ki pyerabic ki kunnu, gukelo bot kabaka Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:1 I kare ma kabaka ma dako me lobo Ceba owinyo pi yweka pa Solomon, en obino bote i Jerucalem ka temo iye ki peny matego, Obino ki lwak jo madito mapol ma gicom i kore, kacel ki lwak kinaga-gu ma giyweyo aŋwece, ki jabu madwoŋ twatwal, ki litino godi me wel-gu. Ka obino bot Solomon, ci ocako titte lok ducu ma onoŋo tye i cwinye." 
2Chronicles9:2 Solomon odok iye i pennye ducu; pe onoŋo tye lok mo wacel ma okanne ki bot Solomon ma pe romo tucone bot dako-nu," 
2Chronicles9:3 Ka kabaka ma dako me Ceba oneno ryeko pa Solomon ducu, ki ot ma en ogero," 
2Chronicles9:4 ki cam ma i wi mejane, ki kit kabedo pa luditone, ki tic pa luticce, ki boŋŋime arukagi, ki lutin kikopo-gu, ci tam otum woko ki i cwinye." 
2Chronicles9:5 Owaco bot kabaka ni, “Lok ducu ma i komi ma yam gitero bota ki i lobona, ki lok i kom ryekoni bene, onoŋo lokke tye kakare," 
2Chronicles9:6 ento yam pe aye lok ma gitero bota ducu, nio ka abino aneno ki waŋa. Ci nen, kadi wa nucu ryekoni maditte onoŋo pe gititta kulu, pien ryekoni ki lonyoni kato lok dog ma giterra awinyo-ni." 
2Chronicles9:7 Monni gitye ki yomcwiny kuman! Luticci magi ducu gitye ki yomcwiny ma rom mene, ma gibedo ka cuŋ i nyimi jwijwi ka winyo lok me ryekoni!" 
2Chronicles9:8 Gipwo Rwot Lubaŋani ma cwinye opwoyo in ci oketi i wi komker me bedo kabaka pi Rwot Lubaŋani! Pien Lubaŋani omaro jo Icrael matwal, dok omito mokogi gubed matek, en aye omiyo en oketi ibedo kabaka ma loyogi, wek ibed ka ŋolo kop atir dok kakare.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 En omiyo bot Solomon jabu madwoŋ ma romo talanta miya acel ki pyeraryo, ki lwak aŋwece mapatpat madwoŋ twatwal, ki lwak litino godi me wel, I kare ca onoŋo pe tye aŋwece mukene macalo meno ma kabaka me Ceba omiyo bot Solomon-ni." 
2Chronicles9:10 Ka dok lutic pa Kuram ki lutic pa Solomon ma onoŋo gukelo jabu nia ki i Opir, gukelo wa ki bao yat algum ki lwak godi matino me wel." 
2Chronicles9:11 Kabaka otiyo ki bao yat algum pi jeŋo kor ot pa Rwot ki kor ot pa kabaka. Otiyo kwede opuk bene ki nana pa luwer. Kit jami macalo meno onoŋo peya yam onen kulu i lobo Juda. 
2Chronicles9:12 Kabaka Solomon omiyo bot kabaka ma dako me Ceba jami ducu ma cwinye omito, omiye gin ducu ma openyo, ma pe giribo iye jami ma onoŋo en okelo bot kabaka. Kit meno kabaka me Ceba ocako wot me dok wa i lobone kikome, kacel ki luticce ducu." 
2Chronicles9:13 Lwak jabu ma obino bot Solomon i mwaka acel acel pekke oromo talanta miya abicel ki pyerabicel wiye abicel 
2Chronicles9:14 ma pe giribo iye ma lucat-wil gukelo; luker pa jo Arabia, ki ludito ma loyo lobo bene gukelo jabu ki ryal bot Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:15 Kabaka Solomon otiyo lwak kwodi madoŋo miya aryo me jabu, ma gitetogi ki nyol; i kom kwot acel acel odonyo iye jabu ma pekke romo cekel miya abicel." 
2Chronicles9:16 Dok otiyo kwodi matinone miya adek me jabu ma gitetogi ki nyol, kun kwot acel acel giteto ki jabu ma pekke cok romo ratili apar, Kabaka oketogi i ot ma gilwoŋo ni, Buŋa me Lebanon." 
2Chronicles9:17 Kabaka dok otiyo komker madit me lak lyec, ci omwono kome woko ki jabu ma giliyo maber." 
2Chronicles9:18 Komker meno onoŋo tye ki rwomme abicel ki kom me jabu me teno tyen, ma gikubogi i kom komker. Ka ŋete tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi giketo iye ka teno ciŋ dano, ki labwor aryo gucuŋ ka ŋet bad kom me teno ciŋ," 
2Chronicles9:19 kun tye bene lwak labwor apar wiye aryo ma gucuŋ i agikki rwom abicel-li, tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi. Pe tye kom mo ma gitiyo ma cal ki meno i te ker ducu." 
2Chronicles9:20 Jami ducu ma yam kabaka Solomon mato kwede onoŋo me jabu keken, wa jami ducu ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot Buŋa me Lebanon yam gitiyogi ki jabu ma giliyo maber; i kare pa Solomon pe tye ŋatti mo ma tamo pi ryal." 
2Chronicles9:21 Onoŋo kabaka tye ki lwak mel ma giwoto Tarcic kacel ki mel pa Kuram, Mel me Tarcic yam dwogo cen ka mwaka okato adek adek kun gikelo lwak jabu ki ryal ki lak lyec-gu, ki ayom-gu ki gunya-gu." 
2Chronicles9:22 Kabaka Solomon obedo dit makato lwak luker ma wi lobo ducu pi lonyone ki pi ryekone. 
2Chronicles9:23 Lwak luker ducu me wi lobo gubedo ka yenyo kit yo me neno waŋ Solomon ki pi winyo kit ryekone-gu ma Lubaŋa oketo i cwinyeni," 
2Chronicles9:24 Dano acel acel yam tero motte bote, kun gitero jami me ryal ki me jabu-gu, ki ginaruka-gu, ki odok murra, ki aŋwece, ki aguragura-gu, ki kana-gu, mwaka ki mwaka," 
2Chronicles9:25 Solomon tye ki loc aguragura alip aŋwen pi aguragura ki gadigadi lwennye, ki lulweny ma giriŋo ki aguragura alip apar wiye aryo, En yam oketo mogo i gaŋi me gadigadi lweny ki mukene gubedo bot kabaka i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles9:26 En oloyo luker ducu cakke wa i kulu Euprate nio kwede i lobo pa jo Piliciti, ki i wan lobo me Ejipt." 
2Chronicles9:27 Kabaka yam omiyo ryal odoko gin ma lam ma rom ki gweŋ-gu i Jerucalem, dok okelo yadi cedar mapol ata ma rom ki olam ma i bar Cepela." 
2Chronicles9:28 Solomon yam limo aguragura ma a ki i Ejipt ki i lobo ducu. 
2Chronicles9:29 Lok kom Solomon mudoŋŋe ducu, nia i acakki nio i agikkine, gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro ma lanebi Natan ocoyo, ki i kin lok pa Lubaŋa ma Akija ma jo Cilo otito, ka dok i buk me lok kom gin ma Iddo ma lanen oneno ma okemo kom Jeroboam wod pa Nebat." 
2Chronicles9:30 Kare ma Solomon oloyo kwede jo Icrael kun bedo i Jerucalem oromo mwaka pyeraŋwen," 
2Chronicles9:31 Solomon oto ci oywe kacel ki kwarine, ka giyike i gaŋ kai pa wonne Daudi. Rekoboam ma wode aye oleyo ka tyene." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rekoboam ocito i Cekem, pien onoŋo jo Icrael gumol gucito i Cekem ka keto en me bedo kabaka," 
2Chronicles10:2 Ka Jeroboam wod pa Nebat owinyo pire, ci oa ki i Ejipt odok cen; pien onoŋo Jeroboam yam pud tye i Ejipt ka ma yam oriŋo iye kabaka Solomon," 
2Chronicles10:3 Gicwalo lukwena ka lwoŋe, ci Jeroboam ki lwak jo Icrael ma gucokke ducu guwaco bot Rekoboam ni," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Woru oketo yec mapek i komwa. In doŋ ilok tic matego ma woru omiyowa, ki yec mapek ma en oketo i komwa-ni, obed mayot, ci wan wabibedo luticci.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 En ogamo ni, “Wudwog bota kany i ŋe nino adek.” Ci lwak gudok cen." 
2Chronicles10:6 Kabaka Rekoboam ocako yubo lok ki ludoŋo muteggi, ma yam gicuŋ i nyim wonne Solomon i kare ma en pud kwo, ci openyogi ni, “Wun wumiya kit tam aŋo wek adok iye ki lwak man?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Gin guwacce ni, “Ka ce kica bimaki i kom lwak man, ma ikweyo cwinygi, kun iloko botgi lok ducu mabeco, ci gin bene gibibedo Luticci matwal.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Ento en obwoto tam pa ludoŋo muteggi woko, ocako dok yubo lok ki awobe ma yalwakke, ma gicuŋ i nyime." 
2Chronicles10:9 Openyogi ni, “Wun wumiya kit tam aŋo wek adok iye ki lwak man ma gupenya ni, ‘Wek yec ma woru oketo i komwa mapek-ki obed yot’?”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Ci awobe ma yalwakke guwacce ni, “Ibidok iye ki lwak ma gupenyi kit man ni, ‘Woru yam omiyo yecwa odoko pek, ento in imi obed yot botwa’; in ibidok iye ki gin kit man ni, ‘Nyig ciŋa kinoŋ makato pyer wora." 
2Chronicles10:11 Doŋ abitiyo kit man: wora yam oketo yec mapek i komwu, an dok abimedone bedo mapek. Wora yam opwodowu ki del anino, an abipwodowu ki yib otoŋ.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Jeroboam ki lwak ducu gubino bot Rekoboam i kom nino me adekke, kit ma yam kabaka ociko ni, “Wudwog cen bota i nino me adekke.”" 
2Chronicles10:13 Kabaka ocako dok i peny pa lwak ki gero, pien oweko tam ma ludoŋo muteggi gumiye." 
2Chronicles10:14 Kabaka Rekoboam oloko ki lwak kit ma awobe guyubo kun wacci, “Wora yam omiyo yecwu odoko pek, ento an abimedone bedo mapek; wora yam pwodowu ki del anino, an abipwodowu ki yib oton.’" 
2Chronicles10:15 Kabaka pe owinyo lok pa lwak; pien Rwot aye omiyo okwero, wek lokke ocobbe kakare ma, yam en oloko bot Jeroboam wod pa Nebat kun ocwalo Akija ma jo Cilo ocito otitte-ni," 
2Chronicles10:16 Ka jo Icrael ducu guneno ni kabaka pe owinyogi, ci lwak gudok iye ki kaba ka ni, “Wan watye ki waŋ pokwa aŋo i kom Daudi? Pe watye ki dul mo i kom latin pa Yece. Wun jo Icrael wudok i kemawu! In Daudi, doŋ inen odi keni.’ Ci jo Icrael gucako pokke woko, gudok i pacogi." 
2Chronicles10:17 Ento Rekoboam pud loyo jo Icrael ma gibedo i gaŋi ma i Juda. 
2Chronicles10:18 Kabaka Rekoboam ocwalo Adoram, ladit ma loyo tic muroni, ci jo Icrael ducu gucako cele ki got, guneke woko, Kabaka Rekoboam orune oito i wi gadigadi lwennye, ci oriŋo kwede woko wa i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles10:19 Kit meno jo Icrael gucako jemo woko i kom ot pa Daudi nio kwede wa onyoo. 
2Chronicles11:1 Ka Rekoboam odwogo cen i Jerucalem, ci ocoko jo ma giyero ki i ot pa Juda ki i kin jo Benjamin, twoni lweny alip miya acel ki pyeraboro, pi lweny i kom jo Icrael wek gidwok ker bot Rekoboam." 
2Chronicles11:2 Ento lok pa Rwot obino bot dano pa Lubaŋa ma nyiŋe Cemaya, kun wacci," 
2Chronicles11:3 “Wac ki Rekoboam wod pa Solomon ma kabaka me Juda, ki bot jo ducu me ot pa Juda ki jo Benjamin ni," 
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Rwot owaco kuman ni, Wun pe wubicito ka lweny i kom lutuwu ma gin jo Icrael. Wek dano acel acel odok cen i pacone, pien lok man oa ki bota.’’’ Gin ducu guwinyo lok pa Rwot, ci gudok cen i pacogi, pe dok gucito ka lweny i kom Jeroboam." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rekoboam obedo i Jerucalem, ogero gaŋi gogo me mony i Juda." 
2Chronicles11:6 Ogero Beterekem, Etam, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Bet-jur, Coko, Adulam," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gat, Mareca, Jip," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoraim, Lakic, Ajeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Jora, Aijalon, ki Kebron, gin ducu gaŋi ma girumo ki cel gogo ma gitye i Juda ki i Benjamin." 
2Chronicles11:11 En oyubo cel gogo ducu obedo matek, oketo ludito mony i igi, okano iye cam, ki moo ki koŋo vino." 
2Chronicles11:12 Ka dok oketo kwodi ki toni i gaŋi ducu, ci omiyogi gubedo matek mada. Kit meno Juda ki Benjamin gudoŋ i te locce." 
2Chronicles11:13 Ajwagi ducu pa Lubaŋa ki Lulevi ma yam gitye i lobo Icrael gua ki i kabedogi ducu, gubino ka bedo i ŋete." 
2Chronicles11:14 Lulevi gubwoto lobo ma gibedo iye gudok wa i Juda ki i Jerucalem, pien Jeroboam ki likwayone gukwero woko ni pe doŋ guti tic macalo ajwagi pa Rwot," 
2Chronicles11:15 Jeroboam oketo ajwagine ma en oyero me tic i wan jogi ma i wi godi, ki bot jogi ma calo nyogi dyegi, ki bot cal litino twoni ma en otiyo." 
2Chronicles11:16 Jo ma yam guketo cwinygi ka cito bot Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael gulubo kor ajwagi pa Rwot ki Lulevi, nia ki i kaka pa jo Icrael ducu, guwoto Jerucalem ka tyero gitum bot Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarogi." 
2Chronicles11:17 Gujiŋo ker pa Juda matek, gumiyo Rekoboam wod pa Solomon obedo matek pi mwaka adek, pien gubedo ka lubo kit pa Daudi ki Solomon pi mwaka adek." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rekoboam onyomo Makalat nya pa Jerimot wod pa Daudi, Min Makalat obedo Abikail nya pa Eliab ma wod pa Yece." 
2Chronicles11:19 Makalat onywalo ki Rekoboam litino awobe magi, Jeuc, Cemaria ki Jakam," 
2Chronicles11:20 Ka dok ki i ŋeye en onyomo Maaka nya pa Abcalom ci onywalo kwede Abija, Atai, Jija, ki Celomit." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rekoboam omaro Maaka nya pa Abcalom makato monne ducu ki mon aŋecane-gu. En yam onyomo mon apar wiye aboro ci obedo ki mon aŋecane pyerabicel kulu; onywalo awobe pyeraryo wiye aboro ki anyira pyerabicel. 
2Chronicles11:22 Rekoboam oketo wode Abija latin pa Maaka me bedo ladit ma loyo wi omegine, pien yam onoŋo omito keto en me bedo kabaka." 
2Chronicles11:23 Rehoboain obedo ka tic ki ryeko, opoko awobene mogo i dul lobo ducu ma i Juda ki Benjamin, oketogi i gaŋi me cel gogo ducu, opoko botgi cam madwoŋ, dok bene onyomo botgi mon." 
2Chronicles12:1 Ka ker pa Rekoboam doŋ omoko maber, kun medde ki cuŋ matek, en kacel ki jo Icrael ducu gucako bwoto cik pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles12:2 I mwaka me loc pa Rekoboam me abicce, en aye Cicak kabaka me Ejipt obino kwede ka lweny i kom jo Jerucalem, pien gubwoto Rwot woko." 
2Chronicles12:3 Gubino ki gadigadi lweny alip acel ki miya aryo, ki lulweny ma giriŋo ki aguragura alip pyerabicel. Lwakjo ma welgi pe kwanne gubino kwede ma gua ki i Ejipt, jo Libya, jo Cukiim, ki jo Etiopia," 
2Chronicles12:4 Ci omako gaŋi ma girumo ki cel gogo ma i Juda ducu nio kwede wa i Jerucalem. 
2Chronicles12:5 Cemaya ma lanebi ocito bot Rekoboam ki bot rwodi me Juda, ma onoŋo gucokke i Jerucalem pi Cicak owaco botgi ni, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘Wun wuryeko bwoto an woko, pi meno an bene atyeko miyowu i ciŋ Cicak.’’’" 
2Chronicles12:6 Rwodi me Icrael kacel ki kabaka gumwolle woko, omiyo guwacci, “Rwot lokke tye kakare.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Ka Rwot oneno ni gumwolle kengi, lok pa Rwot obino bot Cemaya ma wacci, “Gin gumwolle kengi; pe doŋ abityekogi woko, ento doŋ abilarogi, pe doŋ abitoyo akemona i kom Jerucalem ki cin Cicak."
