2Chronicles12:8 Ento gibibedo luticce, ka wek guŋe tic kweda ki dok me tic ki luloc me lobo mukene bene,”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Kit meno Cicak kabaka me Ejipt ocako bino ka lweny i kom Jerucalem, ci oyako jami ma gikano i ot lim pa Rwot, ki jami ma gikano i ot lim pa kabaka. En oyako woko ducu, dok oyako lwak kwodi me jabu ma yam Solomon otiyogi." 
2Chronicles12:10 Kabaka Rekoboam dok otiyo lwak kwodi mukene; otiyo kwodi mola, ci omiyogi i ciŋ ludito pa lugwok kabaka ma gigwoko doggola ot pa kabaka." 
2Chronicles12:11 I kare ducu ma noŋo kabaka cito i ot pa Rwot, lugwok en yam gimako kwodi, ka dok gidwoko kakagi i ot kicika pa lugwok kabaka," 
2Chronicles12:12 Ka doŋ en omwolle kene ci akemo pa Rwot oa woko i kome, ci pe miyo gityekogi woko liweŋ, dok piny onoŋo ber i Juda." 
2Chronicles12:13 Kit meno Rekoboam omoko ker mere matek i Jerucalem dok obedo ka loc bene, Rekoboam ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte romo pyeraŋwen wiye acel, obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka apar wiye abiro, Jerucalem ma en aye gaŋ ma yam Rwot oyero ki i kin kaka ducu me lerael pi keto iye nyiŋe. Nyiŋ minne Naama ma anyira Ammon." 
2Chronicles12:14 En con obedo ka tiyo gin marac, pien pe oketo cwinye ka yenyo Rwot." 
2Chronicles12:15 Lok kom Rekoboam mudoŋŋe ducu, nia i acakki nio i agikkine, gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro ma lanebi Cemaya ocoyo, ki i buk pa Iddo ma lanen, Lweny yam obedo tye i kin Rekobo am ki Jeroboam pi kare ducu ma pe gik." 
2Chronicles12:16 Rekoboam oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyiko kacel ki kwarine i gaŋ kai pa Daudi; wode Abija aye oleyo ka tyene." 
2Chronicles13:1 I mwaka me apar wiye aboro me loc pa kabaka Jeroboam, en aye Abija ocako loyo iye jo Juda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka adek, Nyiŋ minne Mikaya ma nya pa Uriel me Gibea. Lweny obedo tye i kin Abija ki Jeroboam." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abija yam ocito ka lweny kun woto ki monnye ma gin oteka lweny, ma giromo alip miya aŋwen ma giyerogi ayera, Ci Jeroboam orwayo monnye cok ka lweny i ko me ki jo ma giyerogi matego alip miya aboro, ma gin twoni lweny," 
2Chronicles13:4 Abija ocuŋ i wi got Jemaraim ma tye i lobo gotgot ma i lobo Epraim, kun wacci, “Winy lokka, in Jeroboam ki wun jo Icrael ducu!”" 
2Chronicles13:5 Pe wuŋeyo mono ni Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael omiyo ker bot Daudi ki likwaye i gicikke ma gimoko ki kado, me loyo Icrael matwal?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Jeroboam wod pa Nebat, ma latic pa Solomon wod pa Daudi, pud dok ojemo woko i kom rwode," 
2Chronicles13:7 Jo mogo ma konygi pe ma kitgi obedo atata gucokke bote, ci gubalo Rekoboam wod pa Solomon woko. Pien onoŋo Rekoboam pud t idi ma timme bene pud woto atata, dok pe otwero kwero tamgi." 
2Chronicles13:8 “Nen kombeddi wumito kwanyo ker pa Rwot woko ki i cin likwayo pa Daudi, pien wun wutye lwak madwoŋ, dok wutye bene ki cal litino twoni me jabu ma Jeroboam otiyo me bedo lubaŋawu." 
2Chronicles13:9 Wun pe doŋ wuryemo ajwagi pa Rwot woko, ma gin likwayo pa Aron, ki Lulevi, ka dok wuketo ajwagi piwu kenwu macalo jo ma i lobo mukene-ni? Ka ŋat mo obino, tekke okwero ko me kekene ki wod twon nyo nyogi romi abiro, ci tugi doko ajwaka cut pi jogiwu ma pe gin Lubaŋa kikome," 
2Chronicles13:10 Ento ki tun botwa, Rwot en aye Lubaŋawa, peya wabwoto en, Wan watye ki ajwagi ma gitiyo ki Rwot ma gin aye likwayo pa Aron, ki Lulevi ma gikonyogi ki tic." 
2Chronicles13:11 Odiko odiko ki otyeno otyeno, giwaŋo gitum awaŋa ki odok eceta ma ŋwece kur, gicano mugati i nyim Rwot i wi meja me jabu ma giliyo maber, dok gigwoko okar mac me jabu wek macce obed ka lyel otyeno otyeno; wan watye ka gwoko cik ma mako tic pa Rwot Lubaŋawa, ento wun wutyeko bwoto en woko." 
2Chronicles13:12 Nen, Lubaŋa tye kwedwa, tye ka telo wiwa, ki ajwagine gitye ki tum ma gikuto me ywayo mony me lweny i komwu, Aa wun awobe pa Icrael, pe wulweny i kom Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwariwu: pien pe wutwero loyo mony.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Jeroboam onoŋo ocwalo dul mony gukanne woko me bino i komgi ki yo ŋegi; kit meno onoŋo monnye tye i nyim jo Juda, ki jo mubuto gurumo piny woko tye yo tuŋ ŋegi." 
2Chronicles13:14 Ka jo Juda guneno, gunoŋo ni mony tye i nyimgi ki i ŋegi bene; ci gucako kok bot Rwot, kun ajwagi gikuto tum." 
2Chronicles13:15 Jo Juda gucako wayo me lweny. I kare ma jo Juda gudaŋŋe, Lubaŋa oloyo Jeroboam woko, omiyo jo Icrael ducu guriŋo woko i nyim Abija ki jo Juda," 
2Chronicles13:16 Jo Icrael guriŋo woko, ci Lubaŋa omiyogi i ciŋ Abija." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abija ki jone gunekogi ki nek malit twatwal; jo ma guto giromo alip miya abic ki i kom jo ma giyerogi ayera ki i kin jo Icrael. 
2Chronicles13:18 Giloyo jo Icrael kit meno, pien jo Juda ma oloyogi onoŋo gujeŋŋe i kom Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarigi." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abija olubo kor Jeroboam ci omayo gaŋi mogo pa jo Icrael woko ki bote, Betel ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, Jecana ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, ki Epron ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete," 
2Chronicles13:20 Jeroboam pe dok olimo tek mo wacel i kare pa Abija; dok Rwot opwode, ci oto woko." 
2Chronicles13:21 Ento Abija omedde odoko tek, Onyomo mon apar wiye aŋwen, onywalo kwedgi litino awobe pyeraryo wiye aryo ki anyira apar wiye abicel." 
2Chronicles13:22 Lok kom Abija mudoŋŋe ducu, ma nyuto kite ma yam oloko, gityeko coyone i lok pa lanebi Iddo." 
2Chronicles14:1 Abija oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyike i gaŋ kal pa Daudi; wode Aca aye oleyo ka tyene. I karene lobo oywe mot ki kuc pi mwaka apar." 
2Chronicles14:2 Aca yam obedo ka tiyo gin maber dok ma nen atir i wan Rwot Lubaŋane. 
2Chronicles14:3 En okwanyo keno tyer ki waŋ jogi ma i wi godi pa lurok woko, omuko wir jogigi bene, ka dok otono yadi ma gicomo pi woro lok ma dako ma gilwoŋo Acera ducu oreto woko piny," 
2Chronicles14:4 ka dok ociko jo Juda ni gubin bot Rwot, ma Lubaŋa pa kwarigi, dok gugwok cikke ki gin ma en ociko." 
2Chronicles14:5 En bene yam omuko waŋ jogi ma i gaŋi ducu ma i Juda, okwanyo keno tyer me waŋo odok eceta ducu, Ker okwe mot i karene." 
2Chronicles14:6 Ogero gaŋi ma girumo ki cel gogo i Juda, pien lobo onoŋo okwe mot. Pe obedo ki lweny i lwak mwaka-nu ducu, pien Rwot omiyo kuc." 
2Chronicles14:7 En owaco bot jo Juda ni, “Wageru gaŋi magi, warumogi woko ki cel ma wagero i kome odi matego ma ocudo malo, waket bene doggola iye ma gicego ki rii; lobo doŋ pud mewa, pien wabedo ka bino bot Rwot Lubaŋawa, wabedo ka bino bote ci en omiyowa kuc i kabedo ducu.” Gugedo dok gubedo ki lonyo madwoŋ." 
2Chronicles14:8 Aca obedo ki lumony ma gua ki i Juda ma giromo alip miya adek, ma gitye ki kwodi ki toni, ki lumony ma gua ki i Benjamin ma giromo alip miya aryo ki pyeraboro ma gutiŋo kwodi, ma gin bene lucel atum; gin ducu twoni oteka lweny ma gitego." 
2Chronicles14:9 Jera ma Laetiopia obino ka lweny i komgi ki mony ma romo jo milion acel ki gadigadi miya adek; gubino guo cok ki Mareca. 
2Chronicles14:10 Ci Aca ocito ka rwatte kwede, kun monygi oryeyo i nota Jepata i Mareca." 
2Chronicles14:11 Aca okok bot Rwot Lubaŋane ni, “Ai Rwot, pe tye lakony mo macalo’ in, ma ‘koriyo jo magoro ka lweny i kom jo matego, Konywa, ai Rwot Lubaŋawa, pien wageno in, wabino ka lweny i kom lwak man madwoŋ-ŋi pi nyiŋi. Ai Rwot, in aye Lubaŋawa; pe iye dano mo oloyi.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Kit meno omiyo Rwot oryemo jo Etiopia woko ki i nyim Aca ki i nyim jo Juda, omiyo jo Etiopia guriŋo woko," 
2Chronicles14:13 Aca ki monnye guryemo korgi nio wa i Gerar, ci guneko jo Etiopia matek ma dano mo acel pe obwot makwo; pien guket woko ata ki i nyim Rwot ki monnye. Jo Juda gutiŋo lwak jami madwoŋ ma guyako gucito kwede." 
2Chronicles14:14 Guturo gaŋi ducu ma gurumo Gerar, pien Rwot omiyo lworo opoto i komgi. Guyako gaŋi ducu, pien onoŋo jami me ayaka dwoŋ i igi twatwal." 
2Chronicles14:15 Guputo kema pa jo ma yam wegi dyaŋi, guyako romi madwoŋ twatwal ki kinaga-gu, Gudok kwede cen i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles15:1 Cwiny pa Lubaŋa obino i kom Ajaria wod pa Oded," 
2Chronicles15:2 omiyo en ocito orwatte ki Aca, ci otitte ni, “Winy an, Aca, ki jo Juda ki Benjamin ducu. Rwot tye kwedwu, ka ce wun wutye kwede. Ka wuyenyo en, ci wubinoŋo en, ento ka wubwoto en, en bene bibwotowu." 
2Chronicles15:3 Jo Icrael onoŋo gubedo laboŋo Lubaŋa me ada pi kare malac, wa ajwaka ma pwonyogi bene onoŋo pe, dok gubedo laboŋo cik;" 
2Chronicles15:4 ento i kare ma arubaruba madwoŋ odiyogi gulokke bot Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, kun giyenyo en, omiyo gunoŋo en," 
2Chronicles15:5 I kare meno ducu onoŋo nar mo pe tye ki kuc me kato woko nyo kadi me dwogo gaŋ, pien cwiny dano orubbe woko pi can mapatpat ma obedo ka poto i kom jo ma gibedo i lobo ducu," 
2Chronicles15:6 Kingi opokke woko atata, rok lwenyo ki rok wadi ki gaŋ i kom gaŋ wadi, pien Lubaŋa odiyogi ki can i kit yo mapatpat." 
2Chronicles15:7 Ento wun, cwinywu obed nwaŋ! Pe wuwek badwu okwe woko, pien Lubaŋa biculo waŋ ticwu.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Ka Aca owinyo lok meno ducu, ma lanebi Ajaria wod pa Oded otito-ni, ci cwinye odoko nwaŋ, ocako jwero cal jogi me kipyeda woko ducu ki i lobo Juda ki Benjamin ki i gaŋi ducu ma en omayogi i lobo godi ma i Epraim, ci oyubo keno tyer pa Rwot ma yam tye i nyim kicika ma gidonyo kwede i ot pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles15:9 En ocoko jo Juda ducu ki jo pa Benjamin, ki jo ma gua i Epraim ki Manace ki Cimeon, ma onoŋo gibedo i kingi, pien onoŋo jo mapol gudak gua ki i Icrael gukobo bote pien guneno ni Rwot Lubaŋa tye kwede." 
2Chronicles15:10 Gucokke i Jerucalem i dwe me adek i mwaka me apar wiye abic me loc pa Aca," 
2Chronicles15:11 Gutyero gitum bot Rwot i nino meno, kun gikwanyo ki i kom jami ma gukelo, ma yam guyako, twoni ma romo miya abiro ki romi alip abiro." 
2Chronicles15:12 Ci gucako keto gicikke me cito bot Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarigi, ki cwinygi ducu ki tipogi ducu;" 
2Chronicles15:13 dok guciko matek ni ŋat ma pe bicito bot Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, myero ginek woko, kadi bed dano matidi nyo dano muteggi, laco nyo dako." 
2Chronicles15:14 Gucako kwoŋo kwoŋ bot Rwot ki dwan maloŋo, kun gidaŋŋe, ma gikuto tum-gu ki tuŋ romi-gu." 
2Chronicles15:15 Ci jo Juda ducu cwinygi obedo yom pi kwoŋo kwoŋ; pien gukwoŋo kwoŋ ki cwinygi ducu, gubedo ka yenyo Rwot ki mitgi ducu, ci gunoŋo en, ka Rwot ocako miyogi yweyo i kabedo ducu." 
2Chronicles15:16 Kabaka Aca oryemo wa minne Maaka woko, pe oye ni omed bedo daker pien en otiyo cal me kipyeda pi Acera ma jok ma dako. Aca otoŋo cal jokke oŋido woko, ci owaŋo woko i nota kulu Kidron," 
2Chronicles15:17 Ento waŋ jogi ma i wi godi pe gimukogi woko ki i Icrael’ Kadi bed kumeno, Aca obedo ki leŋic i kom Rwot pi kare me kwone ducu," 
2Chronicles15:18 En okelo i ot pa Rwot mot ma wonne odyero, kacel ki mere kikome bene ma odyero, ryal ki jabu ki weer-gu," 
2Chronicles15:19 Lweny koŋ dok obedo pe nio kwede wa i mwaka me pyeradek wiye abic me loc pa Aca. 
2Chronicles16:1 I mwaka me pyeradek wiye abicel me loc pa Aca, Baaca kabaka pa jo Icrael ocito ka monyo jo Juda, ci orumo gaŋ me Rama ki cel matek, wek ogeŋ dano cito woko nyo bino bot Aca kabaka me Juda," 
2Chronicles16:2 Ci Aca okwanyo ryal ki jabu ma i ot kano lim pa Rwot ki ma i ot pa kabaka, ci ocwalo bot Ben-adad kabaka me Ciria, ma yam bedo i Damaciko, kun wacci," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Wek an ki in waribbe kacel, kit macalo ribbe obedo tye i kin wora ki woru-ni, Nen, acwalli ryal ki jabu; cit wek icitur ribbe ma tye i kin in ki Baaca kabaka me Icrael-li woko, wek en oa woko ki bota.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Ben-adad owinyo lok pa kabaka Aca, ci ocwalo ludito monnye ka monyo gaŋi pa jo Icrael, ci guloyo Ijon, Dan, Abelmaim, ki gaŋi ducu me kano cam ma i lobo pa jo Naputali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Ka Baaca owinyo lokke ci oweko gero cel Rama woko, ogiko ticce iye," 
2Chronicles16:6 Kabaka Aca owoto ki jo Juda ducu, guyweko litino godi ducu ma i Rama kacel ki lwak baone, ma yam Baaca obedo ka gedo kwede, ci ogero kwede cel i Geba ki Mijpa," 
2Chronicles16:7 I kare meno Kanani ma lanen obino bot kaba ka Aca, owacce ni, “Pien in doŋ igeno kabaka me Ciria, pe igeno Rwot Lubaŋani, omiyo mony pa kaba ka me Ciria guriŋo woko ki boti." 
2Chronicles16:8 Onoŋo mony pa jo Etiopia ki pa jo Libya yam dit twatwal ma gitye ki lwak gadigadi lweny ki wegi aguragura-gu? Ento in ibedo ka geno Rwot, oweko omiyogi i ciŋi." 
2Chronicles16:9 Pien wan Rwot neno lobo ducu, me nyuto tekke bot jo ma gibedo ki leŋic i kome. In itimo lok me miŋo mada i lok man; pienno cakke tin in ibibedo ki lweny.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Cut kiniga omako Aca i kom lanen, ci okete i mabuc, otweye ki okol, pien ojul i kome pi lok meno, Ka dok oketo can i kom jo mogo ma i kin lwak bene i kare meno." 
2Chronicles16:11 Lok kom Aca nia i acakkine nio i agikkine gityeko coyone i buk pa Luker me Juda ki me Icrael. 
2Chronicles16:12 I mwaka pyeradek wiye aboŋwen me loc pa Aca, en aye two omako iye tyene, ci twone omedde marac mada; ento i twone-ni en pe oyenyo kony bot Rwot, obedo mere ka yenyo kony ki bot ludaktar." 
2Chronicles16:13 Aca oto i mwaka me pyeraŋwen wiye acel me locce, oywe kacel ki kwarine." 
2Chronicles16:14 Giyike i lyel ma onoŋo en okwinyo pire kene i gaŋ kal pa Daudi, Gupyelo kome i wi kitara ma giketo iye lwak aŋwece mapatpat ma giyubo ki diro pa luyub aŋwece; ka dok gumoko mac madit mada pi miye deyo." 
2Chronicles17:1 Yekocapat ma wode aye oleyo ka tyen Aca, ci odoko tek mada i kom Icrael." 
2Chronicles17:2 Oketo mony i gaŋi ma girumo ki cel gogo ma i Juda ducu, ka dok oketo ludito wi mony oromo i lobo Juda ducu ki gaŋi ma i Epraim ma yam wonne Aca omayogi-ni." 
2Chronicles17:3 Rwot ogwoko Yekocapat, pien en obedo ka lubo kit pa wonne ma con-ni; pe obedo ka yenyo kony ki bot lwak Baal-gu," 
2Chronicles17:4 En obedo ka yenyo kony ki bot Lubaŋa pa wonne ki lubo cikke ducu, pe obedo ka lubo kit pa jo Icrael," 
2Chronicles17:5 Pienno omiyo Rwot omoko ker matek i cine; ki jo Juda ducu gubedo ka kelo lim ajog bot Yekocapat; onoŋo en tye ki lonyo madwoŋ wa ki deyo bene. 
2Chronicles17:6 Obedo ki tekcwiny pi lubo yo pa Rwot; dok omuko waŋ jogi ma i wi godi woko ki i Juda, kacel ki yadi ma gicomo pi woro Acera ma jok ma dako-ni." 
2Chronicles17:7 I mwaka me adek me locce ocwalo rwodine Ben-kail, Obadia, Jekaria, Netanel ki Mikaya ka pwony i gaŋi ma i Juda," 
2Chronicles17:8 Medo i komgi dok ocwalo Lulevi magi, Cemaya, Netania, Jebadia, Acael, Cemiramot. Yekonatan, Adoniya, Tobiya ki Tobadoniya; ki ajwagi ma onoŋo guwoto kwedgi obedo Elicama ki Jekoram," 
2Chronicles17:9 Gucako pwony i Juda, ma gitye ki buk me cik pa Rwot; gubedo bene ka wot i gaŋi ducu me Juda kun gipwonyo dano." 
2Chronicles17:10 Lworo ocako mako ker ducu me lobo ma gurumo Juda, ci pe guero lweny i kom Yekocapat." 
2Chronicles17:11 Lupiliciti mogo gukelo mot bot Yekocapat, guculo bote ryal, Jo Arab bene gutero bote nyogi romi alip abiro ki miya abiro, ki nyogi dyegi alip abiro ki mi ya abiro," 
2Chronicles17:12 Yekocapat ocako doŋo medde doko madit mada. En ogero cel gogo ki gaŋi me kano jami i Juda. 
2Chronicles17:13 En obedo ki odi madito me kano jami i Juda, Obedo ki lwak askari i Jerucalem ma gin twoni oteka lweny." 
2Chronicles17:14 Man aye onoŋo welgi ma giryeyo ma lubo dog odi pa kwarogi. I ot pa Juda ludito mony ma loyo jo alip gin ene: Adna ladit me mony, kacel ki twoni oteka lweny alip miya adek;" 
2Chronicles17:15 ki ma lubo en obedo Yekokanan ladit me mony, ma loyo jo alip miya aryo ki pyeraboro;" 
2Chronicles17:16 ki ma olube obedo Amacia wod pa Jikri, ma odyero kome pi tic pa Rwot, kacel ki jo alip miya aryo ma gin twoni oteka lweny." 
2Chronicles17:17 I ot pa Benjamin onoŋo tye Eliada, ma en twon oteka lweny, kacel ki jo alip miya aryo ma gitye ki atum ki kwodi;" 
2Chronicles17:18 ki ŋat ma olubo en obedo Yekojabad, kacel ki jo alip miya acel ki pyeraboro ma gurukke pi lweny," 
2Chronicles17:19 Magi aye jo magubedo lutic pa kabaka, medo i kom jo ma yam kabaka oketogi i gaŋi ma girumo ki cel gogo ma i Juda." 
2Chronicles18:1 Yekocapat onoŋo tye ki lwak lonyo madwoij wa ki deyo bene; ocako ribbe ki Akab, ci omiyo wode onyomo nya pa Akab," 
2Chronicles18:2 Lacen i ne mwaka mogo manok ocito bot Akab i Camaria. Akab oneko lwak romi ki twoni dyaŋi mapol ata pire ki pi lwak ducu ma onoŋo gitye kwede, Man oti mo pi bito en wek ocit kwede ka lweny i kom Ramot-gilead." 
2Chronicles18:3 Akab kabaka me Icrael open yo Yekocapat kabaka me Juda ni, “Ibicito kweda ka lweny i kom gaŋ Ramot-gilead?” Yekocapat ogamo dog kabaka me Icrael kun wacce ni, “An ki in wan acel, lwakka gin aye lwakki. Wabibedo kwedi i mony.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Yekocapat owaco bot kaba ka me Icrael ni, “Koŋ ikwon penyo lok ki bot Rwot.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Kabaka me Icrael ocoko lwak lunebi ducu kacel, gucokke miya aŋwen, En owaco botgi ni, “Wacit ka lweny i kom Ramot-gilead, nyo pa aciti?” Gin lu ne bi gugamo ni, “Tugi cito cut, kabaka, pien Lubaŋa bimiyo i ciŋi.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Ento Yekocapat dok owaco ni, “Lanebi mo mukene pa Rwot pe tye ka ny, wek koŋ dok wapeny doge?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Kabaka me Icrael ogamo dog Yekocapat ni, “Pud tye dano mo ma myero wapenye wek wawiny dog Rwot ki bote, en Mikaya wod pa Imla; ento cwinya dage matek, pien peya otitta kit lok mo maber, en titta lok maracce keken.” Yekocapat ogamo ni, “Pe kumene, kabaka, wek lok kit meno obedi.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Kabaka me Icrael ocak o lwoŋo ladit mo ci owacce ni, “Cit icikel Mikaya wod pa Imla oyotoyot.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Onoŋo kabaka me Icrael ki Yekocapat kabaka me Juda gubedo wi komkergi, ma guruko jor kergi mabeco; gubedo kwede i laro moyo me dino bel ma i ŋet dogcel ma gidonyo kwede i Camaria, kun lunebi ducu gitye ka tito lok i nyimgi." 
2Chronicles18:10 Jedekia wod pa Kenaana otiyo cal tuŋ lee me nyonyo pire kene, ci owacci, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘Ibitwomo jo Ciria ki magi nio ka ityekogi woko ducu.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Ci lunebi ducu gutito lok ma kit meno, kun giwacci, “Tugi cito i Ramot-gilead, ci ibiloyo; Rwot bimiyo i ciŋi, kabaka.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Lakwena ma ocito ka lwoŋo Mikaya-ni obino owacci, “Nen ba, lok pa lunebi ducu obedo me cuko cwiny kabaka; pienno wek lokki bene obed ma rom ki megi, lokki bene obed lok me cuko cwmy.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Mikaya ogamo doge ni, “Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, gin ducu ma Lubaŋana owacca, en aye abilokone.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Ka Mikaya oo bot kabaka, kabaka openye ni, “Mikaya, wacit ka lweny i kom Ramot-gilead, nyo pe aciti?” En ogamo ni, “Tugi cito cut, ci ibiloyo; Rwot bimiyogi i ciŋi.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Ento kabaka dok owacce ni, “An mono abiciki i nyiŋ Lubaŋa tyen adi ni ilokka lok ada keken i nyiŋ Rwot?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Ci Mikaya owacci, “Anene jo Icrael ducu guket woko lijayi i wi godi, macalo romi ma gipe ki lakwat; dok Rwot bene owacci, ‘Jo-ni laditgi peke; wek ŋat acel acel odok gire i pacone ki kuc.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Kabaka me Icrael owaco ki Yekocapat ni, “An pe onoŋo awacci ni, Mikaya pe bitito lok mo maber ma otika, ento bitito maracce?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaya ogamo ni, “Pi meno koŋ dok iwiny lok pa Rwot mono. Abedo ka neno Rwot ma obedo i wi komkerre, kun lwak mony me polo ducu gucuŋ ka ŋete ki yo tuŋ bade malacuc ki yo tuŋ bade malacam." 
2Chronicles18:19 Rwot owacci, ‘Aŋa mono ma bibito Akab kabaka me Icrael, wek ocit oto i Ramot-gilead?’ Ci giwaco lok mapatpat." 
2Chronicles18:20 Lacen kit cwiny mo obino ci okato anyim ocuŋ wa i nyim Rwot, kun wacci, ‘An aye abibito en.’ Rwot openye ni, ‘Ibibito en niŋniŋ?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 En ogamo ni, ‘An abicito, ci abibedo cwiny ma lagoba kun aloko ki i dog lunebine ducu.’ Rwot ogamo ni, ‘In ibibite, ci biye lokk i; doŋ icitim kumeno.’" 
2Chronicles18:22 Kombeddi in doŋ inen ka Rwot ‘otyeko keto cwiny ma lagoba i dog lunebini magi ducu; Rwot doŋ otyeko ciko pi kelo lok marac i komi.” 
2Chronicles18:23 Ci Jedekia wod pa Kenaana ocito bot Mikaya cok ci odoŋo leme ki ciŋe, kun wacci, “Cwiny Rwot dok oa ki i koma niŋniŋ ka okobo oloko boti?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaya owaco ni. “Meno ibiniaŋ iye i nino ma ibidonyo i kicika ma i tyelo wek ikanne iye.” 
2Chronicles18:25 Kabaka me Icrael owacci, “Wumak Mikaya woko, wudwoke cen wa bot Amon ma laloyo me gaŋ, ki bot Yoaci ma wod pa kabaka." 
2Chronicles18:26 Iciwacogi ni, ‘Kabaka owaco kuman ni, Wuket dano man i mabuc, dok wumiye ocam cam me mabuc, mugati ki pii keken, nio ka abidwogo paco ki kuc.’’’" 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaya ogamo ni, “Ka ce idwogo paco ki kuc, ci pe Rwot aye oloko ki i doga.” Dok owacci, “Wun rok ducu doŋ wuwiny!”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Kit meno kabaka me Icrael ki Yekocapat kabaka me Juda gucako cito i Ramot-gilead. 
2Chronicles18:29 Kabaka me Icrael owaco bot Yekocapat ni, “An abirukke macalo dano mo ata ka doŋ acako cito ka lweny, ento in iruk jorri me ker.” Kabaka ocako rukke macalo dano mo ata, ka ocito kwede i mony." 
2Chronicles18:30 Onoŋo kabaka me Ciria otyeko ciko ludito mony ma giloyo gadigadine me lweny ni, “Pe wucilweny i kom dano mo matidi nyo madit, ento wucilweny i kom kabaka me Icrael keken.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Ka ludito mony ma giloyo gadigadi lweny guneno Yekocapat, ci guwacci, “Meno aye kabaka me Icrael kikome.” Ci gulokke ka lweny i kome. Yekocapat ocako daŋŋe ki mwoc, ci Rwot okonye. Ci Lubaŋa okwanyogi woko ki bote." 
2Chronicles18:32 Ka ludito mony guneno ni pe en kabaka me Icrael, ci gulokke gudok woko cen gubwoto lubo kore." 
2Chronicles18:33 Ento dano mo otelo atumme ocelo ata, ci ocelo kwede kabaka me Icrael atura; atero obaro kin nyonyo me geŋo kore ki nyonyo mukene me geŋo kome ma obedo macalo pok rec. Kabaka owaco ki laryem gadigadine ni, “Lokke idok cen wek icikwanya woko ki i waŋ lweny, pien ret otyeko maka woko.”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Ci lweny odoko malyet i nino meno, kabaka me Icrael obedo ojeŋŋe i gadigadine kun waŋe okemo jo Ciria nio wa otyeno, ka ocako to ma ceŋ cito ka poto," 
2Chronicles19:1 Yekocapat kabaka me Juda odok cen maber wa i ode i Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles19:2 Ento Yeko wod pa Kanani ma lanen-piny aye ocito ka rwatte kwede, ci owaco bot kabaka Yekocapat ni, “In imyero ka konyo jo maraco, ki maro jo ma gidag Rwot? Akemo pa Rwot doŋ otyeko bino ka lweny i komi." 
2Chronicles19:3 Ento gin maber tye i kin jami ma itiyogi, pien ityeko jwero yadi ma gicomo pi woro jok Acera woko ducu ki i lobo, ma iketo cwinyi ka yenyo Lubaŋa.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Yekocapat obedo i leruealem; dok owoto i kin dano cakke ki i Beer-ceba nio kwede wa i lobo godi me Epraim, odwoko cwiny dano i kom Lubaŋa pa kwarigi." 
2Chronicles19:5 Dok oyero lunoklop ki i gaŋi ducu ma girumo ki cel gogo ma tye i Juda, gaŋ ki gaŋ," 
2Chronicles19:6 ka ociko luŋolkop ni, “Wubed ki tam i kom gin ‘ma wutiyo, pien pe wubinolo kop pi dano ento pi Rwot; en tye kwedwu ka wuŋolo kop," 
2Chronicles19:7 Pi meno wulwor Rwot kun wugwokke bene i kom gin ducu ma wutiyo, pien Rwot Lubaŋawa pe mito giŋol kop ki go ba ma noŋo lok pe tye atir, nyo kadi dworo kor dano, ki dok pe mito gigam lim me wilo loyo kop.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Ki i Jerucalem Yekocapat dok oyero Lulevi mogo, ajwagi, ki ludito wi kaka ma i Icrael ducu, me bedo luŋolkop pi Rwot ki me winyo pido ma pyem tye iye ma ŋolo koppe tek. Gubedo ka tic i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles19:9 Ocikogi ni. “Wubitiyo kun wulworo Rwot, ki gen, dok ki cwinywu ducu." 
2Chronicles19:10 Ka ce utmegiwu ma gibedo i gaŋigi gukelo lok me pido mo ma mako lok me oyo remo, ki ma mako cik pa Lubaŋa, nyo lok mo ma Lubaŋa ociko nyo oŋolo, wun aye wubipwonyogi, wek pe gutiŋ alii mo i nyim Rwot, wek akemo pa Lubaŋa pe obin i komwu ki i kom utmegiwu. Wubitiyone kit meno, wek pe wutin bal alii mo." 
2Chronicles19:11 Dok wunen, Amaria ajwaka madit en aye ma loyowu i kom lok pa Rwot ducu; Jebadia wod pa Icmael, ma laloyo ma i ot pa Juda, en aye ma loyo lok ma bot kabaka ducu; ki Lulevi gibitic botwumacalo lukaraniwu, Wuti ki tekcwinywu ducu, Rwot myero okony jo ma cwinygi atir!”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Lacen jo Moab ki jo Ammon ki jo mogo me Meun gubino ka lweny i kom Yekocapat," 
2Chronicles20:2 Jo mogo gucito gutito bot Yekocapat ni, “Mony madwoŋ tye ka bino ka lweny i komi ma gia ki i Edom, gua ki loka nam; nen, doŋ gitye wa i Kajajon-tamar” (en aye En-gedi)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Lworo ocako mako Yekocapat, en kikome ocako yenyo kony ki bot Rwot cut, ka dok ociko pi ri kec oromo i lo bo Juda ducu," 
2Chronicles20:4 Ci jo Juda gucokke kacel pi yenyo kony ki bot Rwot; dano ma gua ki i gaŋi ducu me Juda gucito ka yenyo kony ki bot Rwot. 
2Chronicles20:5 Yekocapat oa malo ocuŋ i nyim jo Juda ki jo Jerucalem ma gucokke, ocuŋ i ot pa Rwot, ki i nyim dyekal manyen," 
2Chronicles20:6 olego ni, “Ai Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwariwa, in aye pe Lubaŋa ma i polo-ni? Pe in aye iloyo lwak ker ducu ma i lwak rok-ki ducu? Tek ki twero tye i ciŋi, pienno pe tye ŋatti mo ma twero cuŋ i nyimi." 
2Chronicles20:7 Pe in aye Lubaŋawa, ma oryemo jo ma i lobo-ni ki i nyim joni jo Icrael, ci omiyo bot likwayo pa Abraim laremi matwal-li?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Ka gubedo iye, ci gugero piri kabedo maleŋ pi nyiŋi, kun giwacci," 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Ka gin mo marac opoto i komwa, macalo lweny nyo lok ma iŋolo i komwa, nyo two gemo, nyo kec, ci wan wabicuŋ i nyim ot man, pien nyiŋi tye i ot man, ci wabikok boti pi aroma can wa i nyimi; in ibiwinyo ci ilarowa.’" 
2Chronicles20:10 Doŋ inen jo Ammon, jo Moab, ki jo Lugot Ceir, ma yam in pe iye Icrael omonyogi i kare ma gua ki i lobo Ejipt, ma yam gubwoto odoŋ ma pe gijwerogi woko-ni." 
2Chronicles20:11 Nen ka doŋ giculowa waŋe ki bino ka ryemowa woko ki i loboni ma wacamo ma yam imiyowa me bedo ginaleyawa. 
2Chronicles20:12 Ai Lubaŋawa in pe ibinologi kop? Pien wan pe watye ki tek me lweny i kom mony man madwoŋ ma gubino ka lweny i komwa-ni. Pe waneyo gin ma watiyo, ento waketo waŋwa i komi.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 I kare-nu onoŋo jo Juda gucuŋ i nyim Rwot, ki jo ma gikwo i komgi, mongi ki litinogi." 
2Chronicles20:14 Cwiny Rwot obino opoto i kom Jakajiel wod pa Jekaria, wod pa Benaya, wod pa Jeyel, wod pa Matania, ma Lalevi ma jo pa Acap; onoŋo en tye i dye cokke." 
2Chronicles20:15 En owaco ni, “Wuwiny, wun jo Juda ki jo Jerucalem, ki in kabaka Yekocapat: Rwot owaco botwu kuman ni, ‘Pe wulwor, dok bene cwinywu pe opoti pi kom lwak man madwoŋ-ŋi; pien lweny man pe mewu ento pa Lubaŋa gire." 
2Chronicles20:16 Diki wucit ka lweny i komgi; nen, gibibino kun giwok ki i wi cere me Jij; wubinonogi wa ka ma nota ogik iye, yo tuŋ wokceŋ me tim Jeruel." 
2Chronicles20:17 Lweny man pe wun aye wubilwenyo, wun wubed i kabedowu, wucuŋ iye mot, wek wunen kit ma Rwot bilarowu kwede tin, wun jo Juda ki Jerucalem.’ Pe wulwor, pe cwinywu opoti, diki wucit ka lweny i komgi, Rwot bibedo kwedwu.”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Yekocapat okulo wiye oluŋo waŋe piny i ŋom, ci jo Juda ducu ki jo Jerucalem guryebbe piny i nyim Rwot, kun giworo Rwot." 
2Chronicles20:19 Lacen Lulevi ma jo pa Kokat ki jo pa Kora, gucuŋ ka pako Rwot. Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ki dwangi maloŋo," 
2Chronicles20:20 Gua malo odiko con ci gucito i tim Tekoa. I kare ma gicito, Yekocapat ocuŋ ci owacci, “Wuwiny an, wun jo Juda kacel ki wun jo ducu ma wubedo i Jerucalem! Wuye Rwot Lubaŋawu, ci wubicuŋ matek; wuyelok pa lunebine, ci wubiloyo.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Ka otyeko noŋo tam ki bot lwak, ocako yero jo ma myero gubed ka wer bot Rwot kun gipake ma guruko bone maleŋ kun gitelo kwede nyim mony, ma giwero kuman ni, “Wumi pwoc bot Rwot, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Ka gucako wer ki pwoc, Rwot oketo mony ma gubuto pi kuro lweny ki jo Ammon, ki jo Moab, ki jo got Ceir, ma gubino i kom Juda-ni, ci giloyogi woko." 
2Chronicles20:23 Pien jo Ammon ki jo Moab gubino ka lweny i kom jo ma gibedo i lobo godi me Ceir, gujwerogi woko liweŋ. I kare ma lweny tum i kom jo ma gibedo i Ceir, gin bene gucako nekke kekengi." 
2Chronicles20:24 Ka jo Juda gua malo guito wa i wi lubele ma yo tuŋ tim, ka guneno tuŋ bot lwak mony-nyi, guneno lwak kom dano muto ka guradde piny; acel mo pe obwot." 
2Chronicles20:25 Ka Yekocapat ki lwakke gucito ka yako jamigi, ci gunoŋo dyaŋ i mapol, ki jami ki boŋŋi ki jami me wel-gu, ma gubedo ka yako ne me bedo megi nio ka tiŋone oloyogi. Gubedo ka yako jami pi nino adek, ento jami obedo dwoŋ mukato kare," 
2Chronicles20:26 I nino me aŋwenne gucokke i nota Beraka, pien gubedo ka pwoyo Rwot ki kenyo; mumiyo nyiŋ kabedo meno gilwoŋo ni nota Beraka nio wa onyoo." 
2Chronicles20:27 Dano gudok cen, jo Juda ducu ki jo Jerucalem kun Yekocapat telo wigi; gudok cen i Jerucalem ki nyatte, pien Rwot omiyo gubedo ki nyatte pi loyo lumerokgi." 
2Chronicles20:28 Gubino i Jerucalem ki nanagi ki opuk ki obute wa i ot pa Rwot. 
2Chronicles20:29 Lubaŋa omiyo lworo omako ker ducu ma i lobo mapatpat i kare ma guwinyo ni Rwot obedo ka lweny ki lumerok pa jo Icrael. 
2Chronicles20:30 Kit meno ker pa Yekocapat obedo mupye mot, pien Lubaŋa omiye yweyo i kabedo ma orumo ŋete ducu," 
2Chronicles20:31 Kit meno Yekocapat oloyo lobo Juda. Yekocapat ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeradek wiye abic, ci obedo, ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyeraryo wiye abic. Nyiŋ minne Ajuba ma nya pa Cilki." 
2Chronicles20:32 En obedo ka lubo k it pa wonne Aca ducu; pe olokke oweko lubo kore; en obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen atir i wan Rwot. 
2Chronicles20:33 Ento wan jogi ma i wi godi pe gimuko woko; lwak ducu onoŋo pud peya guketo cwinygi i kom Lubaŋa pa kwarigi. 
2Chronicles20:34 Lok kom Yekocapat mudoŋŋe ducu, nia i acakkine nio i agikkine, gityeko coyo i lok me tekwaro pa Ye ko wod pa Kanani, ma gicoyo i buk pa Luker me Icrael." 
2Chronicles20:35 Lacen Yekocapat kabaka me Juda oribbe gin ki Akajia kabaka me Icrael, ma yam obedo ka tiyo bal maraco." 
2Chronicles20:36 Oribbe kwede pi payo mel mapol me cito i Tarcic; gubedo ka payo mel i Ejion-geber," 
2Chronicles20:37 Eliejer wod pa. Dodayaku me Mareca otito lok ma kemo Yekocapat, kun wacci, “Rwot bijwero gin ma wutiyo-ni woko, pien ityeko ribbe ki Akajia.” Ci mel ducu gutur woko, pe gucito i Tarcic," 
2Chronicles21:1 Yekocapat ote, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyiko kacel ki kwarine i gaŋ kal pa Daudi; wode Jekoram aye oleyo ka tyene." 
2Chronicles21:2 En yam tye ki omegine, ma gin awobe pa Yekocapat: Ajaria, Jekiel, Jekaria, Ajaria, Mikael, ki Cepatia; gin ducu onoŋo awobe pa Yekocapat kabaka me Juda." 
2Chronicles21:3 Wongi omiyogi mot madito, me ryal, me jabu, ki me jami mabeco me wel, ki gaŋi mogo ma i Juda ma girumogi ki cel gogo; ento-en omiyo ker bot Jekoram, pien Jekoram obedo latin kayone." 
2Chronicles21:4 Ka Jekoram obedo wi komker pa wonne ma doŋ kerre omoko matek, ci oneko omegine woko ducu ki pala lucwan, kacel ki rwodi mogo ma i Icrael," 
2Chronicles21:5 Jekoram ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeradek wiye aryo, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka aboro." 
2Chronicles21:6 Obedo ka lubo kit pa luker me Icrael, kun tiyo kit macalo jo me ot pa Akab gutiyo; pien dakone nya pa Akab. Obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot." 
2Chronicles21:7 Ento Rwot pe omito tyeko Juda woko ducu, pi laticce Daudi, kit ma con ocikke bote ni ebimiye bedo ki mac tara, en ki likwaye matwal." 
2Chronicles21:8 I karene en aye jo Edom gujemo iye woko i kom loc pa Juda, ci guketo kabakagi pigi kengi." 
2Chronicles21:9 Jekoram okato loka kacel ki ludito monnye ki ludito ma giloyo gadigadi lwennye ducu; en oa woko i dyewor olwenyo i kom jo Edom. Jo Edom onoŋo gurumo en woko kacel ki ludito ma giloyo gadigadi lwennye. 
2Chronicles21:10 Kit meno Edom ojemo woko i kom loc pa Juda nio wa onyoo. Ka dok Libna bene ocako jemo woko i kom locce i kare-nu, pien en otyeko bwoto Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarine." 
2Chronicles21:11 Dok bene en ogero waŋ jogi i wi godi i lobo godi me Juda; en omiyo jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem gucako woro jogi, ma pe doŋ gitye ki gen i kom Rwot, omiyo Juda oŋak," 
2Chronicles21:12 Cut olimo waraga ma oa ki bot lanebi Elia, ma wacce ni, “Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwaru Daudi owaco kuman ni, ‘In pe ilubo kit pa woru Yekocapat, nyo kit pa Aca kabaka me Juda," 
2Chronicles21:13 ento ibedo ka lubo kit pa luker me Icrael, ityeko miyo jo Juda ki jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem guworo jogi, macalo jo me ot pa Akab gumiyo jo Icrael guworo jogi; dok bene ityeko neko omegini woko ducu, jo me ot pa woru, ma onoŋo gibeco gikato in." 
2Chronicles21:14 Nen, Rwot bikelo can madwoŋ i kom lwakki, i kom litinoni, i kom monni, ki i kom jamini ducu;" 
2Chronicles21:15 in kikomi ibibedo ki two matek two ma i cin ii-gu ducu, nio ka min ii bikatti woko jwijwi pi two meno.’ ”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Rwot omiyo kiniga omako jo Piliciti ki jo Arab ma gibedo cok ki jo Etiopia; ci gubino gulwenyo i kom Jekoram. 
2Chronicles21:17 Ka gubinoka lweny i kom Juda gumonyo lobogi, ci guyako jami ducu ma gunoŋo, Gutero jami ma i of pa kabaka, ki awo bene ki monne, guweko wode acel keken mudoŋ, en aye Yekoakaj, ma wode matidine." 
2Chronicles21:18 I ŋe magi ducu Rwot opwode omiye two i cin iye ma pe twero can. 
2Chronicles21:19 Ka omedde i ŋe mwaka aryo, ci min iye obino woko pi two meno, ci oto ki arem kom madwoŋ. Lwakke pe gumoko mac wacel pi miye deyo kit ma gimoko kwede mac pi kwarine." 
2Chronicles21:20 En ooamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeradek wiye aryo, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka aboro; cwiny dano mo pe ocwer pi tone. Giyike i gaŋ kai pa Daudi, ento pe giyiko kome i Lyel pa luker." 
2Chronicles22:1 Jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem guketo Akajia ma wode matidine odoko kabaka ma oleyo ka tyene; pien mony pa jo ma yam gubino i gony kacel ki jo Arab gutyeko neko awobe madito woko ducu. En gin mumiyo Akajia wod pa kabaka Jekoram me Juda ocamo ker. 
2Chronicles22:2 Akajia onoŋo ditte romo mwaka pyeraŋwen wiye aryo ka ocamo ker, ci obedo ka loci Jerucalem pi mwaka acel. Minne nyiŋe Atalia; en yam lakwar Omri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Akajia bene obedo ka lubo kit pa jo me ot pa Akab, pien minne aye obedo ka miye tam me tiyo gin maraco," 
2Chronicles22:4 Obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot, kit macalo jo me ot pa Akab gubedo ka tiyone; pien gin aye gubedo ka miye tam me tiyo gin marac i kare ma wonne doŋ oto, ci gutere i to." 
2Chronicles22:5 En bene oye tamgi, ocito gin ki Jekoram wod pa Akab kabaka me Icrael ka lweny ki Kajael kabaka me Ciria i Ramot-gilead. Jo Ciria guketo ret i kom Joram," 
2Chronicles22:6 ci en odwogo ka mado rette i Jejreel, en aye waŋ ret ma jo Ciria guketo i kome ki i Rama i kare ma en olwenyo i kom Kajael kabaka me Ciria. Akajia wod pa Jekoram kabaka me Juda ocito ka limo Joram wod pa Akab i Jejreel, pien onoŋo kome lit." 
2Chronicles22:7 Lubaŋa onoŋo doŋ otyeko yubo ni Akajia bito i kare ma en bicito ka limo Joram. Pien ka ocito kunnu ci onywako wot gin ki Jekoram pi rwatte ki Yeko wod pa Nimci, ma Rwot onoŋo owiro wek omuk jo me ot pa Akab woko." 
2Chronicles22:8 I kare ma Yeko tye ka cobo lok ma Rwot oŋolo i kom jo me ot pa Akab, en orwatte ki ludito me Juda bene ki awobe pa omegi Akajia, ma gitiyo bot Akajia, ci onekogi woko." 
2Chronicles22:9 En obedo ka yenyo Akajia, ci gimako en ki i Camaria ka ma okanne iye, gikelo en bot Yeko ci Yeko oneke woko, Guyike, pien guwacci, “En lakwar Yekocapat, ma yam obedo ka yenyo Rwot ki cwinye ducu.” Dano mo pe odoŋ i ot pa Akajia ma romo camo ker," 
2Chronicles22:10 Ka Atalia min Akajia oneno ni wode oto woko, ci en ocako jwero jo me dog ot ker pa Juda woko ducu." 
2Chronicles22:11 Ento Yekocabeat nya pa kabaka, otiŋo Yoaci wod pa Akajia, ci okwalo woko ki i kin awobe pa kabaka ma gibenekogi-ni, ci okano en ki lapidine i kicika mo me buto. Yekocabeat, ma nya pa kabaka Jekoram obedo dako pa ajwaka Yekoyada, en lamiŋ Akajia; okano Yoaci woko ki bot Atalia kit meno, omiyo Atalia pe oneke." 
2Chronicles22:12 En obedo kwedgi mwaka abicel, kun gikano en i ot pa Lubaŋa i kare ma Atalia tye ka loyo lobo." 
2Chronicles23:1 Ento i mwaka me abirone Yekoyada obedo ki tekcwiny, oketo gicikke ki ludito ma lulo buca mony pa jo miya, Ajaria wod pa Jerokam, Icmael wod pa Yekokanan, Ajaria wod pa Obed, Maceya wod pa Adaya, ki Elicapat wod pa Jikri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Ci guket i lobo Juda, gubedo ka coko Lulevi ki i gaŋi me Juda woko ducu, ki ludito wi kaka ma i dog odi me Icrael ducu, ci gubino wa i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles23:3 Lwak mucokke ducu guketo gicikke ki kabaka ki i ot pa Lubaŋa, Ci Yekoyada owaco botgi ni, “Nen, wod pa kabaka ene! Wuwek en aye obed laloc, kit ma yam Rwot oloko i kom likwayo pa Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Man aye gin ma wubitiyo: ki tuŋ botwu wun ajwagi ki Lulevi ma wua woko ki i dog tic i nino me cabit, dul acel me adek gubed lugwok doggola," 
2Chronicles23:5 ki dul acel me adekke mukene gibikuro ot pa kabaka, ki dul acel me adek gubed i doggola ma gilwoŋo ni Guti ot; ki lwak ducu gubed i dyekalme ot pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles23:6 Pe wuwek dano mo-odony i ot pa Rwot, kono ajwagi ki Lulevi ma lutic keken aye wuwek gudony, pien gin jo maleŋ; ento lwak ducu gibigwoko cik pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles23:7 Lulevi gibirumo kabaka dyere, kun dano acel acel omako jami lwennye i ciŋe; ento dano mo ma odonyo i ot gibineko woko. Wubibedo ki kabaka ka ma en bicito iye ducu.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 Lulevi ki jo Juda ducu gutiyo gin ducu kit macalo ajwaka Yekoyada ociko botgi. Dano acel acel okelo lwakke, ma onoŋo giweko dog ticgi i nino me cabit, gubino kacel ki jo ma gibino ka tic i nino me cabit; pien ajwaka Yekoyada pe oye ni guwek dog ticgi ducu." 
2Chronicles23:9 Ajwaka Yekoyada ocako miyo ki ludito me mony lwak toni ki kwodi madito ki matino ma onoŋo yam pa kabaka Daudi, ma onoŋo tye i ot pa Lubaŋa," 
2Chronicles23:10 En oketo lwak ka gwoko kabaka, kun dano acel acel omako jami lwennye i ciŋe, cakke wa yo tuŋ acuc me ot ki nio kwede wa yo tuŋ acam me ot, kun girumo keno tyer ki ot bene." 
2Chronicles23:11 Ka doŋ ocako kelo wod pa kabaka, oketo lalukana i wiye, ka omiye lok me caden pa Lubaŋa i ciŋe, ka gituco atir ni en doŋ kabaka. Yekoyada ki awo bene guwiro en ki moo, ci dano gudaŋŋe ni, “Kabaka obed kwo nakanaka!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Ka Atalia owinyo woo pa lwak ma giriŋo kun gipako kabaka, ci en ocito bot lwak wa i ot pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles23:13 Ka oniyo piny, ci oneno kabaka Ocuŋ ka ŋet wir ki i dog ot, kun ludito me mony ki lukut-tum gurumo kabaka, ki lwak jo ducu ma gua ki i kin gaŋ gubedo ka wo ki tum kun cwinygi yom, ki luwer ma gumako jami wergi gutelo wer me kwero eno Atalia ocako yeco boŋone kun kok ni, “Roro yai! Roro!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Ajwaka Yekoyada okelo ludito mony ma gubedo kacel ki mony, ocikogi ni, “Wukel dako-nu woko ki i kin tyenwu. Ka ŋatti mo o lubo kore, ci wuneke woko ki pala lucwan.” Pien ajwaka onoŋo tamo ni, “Pe myero gineke ki i ot pa Rwot.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Gucako keto ciŋgi i kom Atalia, ci guwok kwede ki i doggola ma aguragura donyo kwede, guo wa i ot pa kabaka ci guneke kenyo." 
2Chronicles23:16 Yekoyada ocako keto gicikke i kin en ki lwak ducu ki kabaka wek gubed lwak pa Rwot. 
2Chronicles23:17 Lwak ducu gucako mol gucito i ot pa jok Baal, ci gumuko gureto woko piny; guturo keno tyerre ducu, dok guŋido cal jogine woko ducu matitino, ci guneko Matan ajwaka pa Baal ki i nyim kena tyer." 
2Chronicles23:18 Lacen Yekoyada oketo lukurpiny me gwoko ot pa Rwot i te twero pa ajwagi ma Lulevi, ki Lulevi ma yam Daudi opoko tic botgi pi bedo lugwok ot pa Rwot, kun gityero gitum awaŋa bot Rwot, macalo gicoyo i cik pa Moses, ki yomcwiny kacel ki wer, kit ma yam Daudi oyubo-ni," 
2Chronicles23:19 Oketo lugwok doggola i doggola ot pa Rwot, wek dano mo ma ko me ki keni pe odony iye." 
2Chronicles23:20 En dok okwanyo ludito mony, ki rwodi, ki lulo wi lwak, kacel ki lwak ducu, ci gucako kela ka baka woko ki i ot pa Rwot kun gidorre giwok ki i doggola ma malo nio kwede wa i ot pa kabaka, Ci guketo kabaka obedo piny i wi komker pa luker." 
2Chronicles23:21 Kit meno lwak ma i lobo-nu ducu cwinygi obedo yom; gaŋ ocako kwe mot ki i ŋe to pa Atalia ma gineko ki pala lucwan. 
2Chronicles24:1 Yoaci ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte abiro, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyeraŋwen, Nyiŋ minne Jibia me Beer-ceba," 
2Chronicles24:2 Yoaci obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋ Rwot pi kare me kwo pa ajwaka Yekoyada ducu. 
2Chronicles24:3 Yekoyada onyomo bote mon aryo, onywalo kwedgi litino co ki anyira." 
2Chronicles24:4 Lacen Yoaci obedo ki tam pi yubo ot pa Rwot. 
2Chronicles24:5 Ocoko ajwagi ki Lulevi, ocako waco botgi ni, “Wucit wa i gaŋi pa jo Juda, wek wucok lim ki bot jo Icrael ducu pi yu bo ot pa Lubaŋawu mwaka ki mwaka; ber wunen ni wutiyo tic man oyotoyot.” Ento Lulevi pe guruyo tiyone oyotoyot," 
2Chronicles24:6 Mumiyo kabaka olwoŋo Yekoyada ajwaka madit, openye ni, “Piŋo pe iweko Lulevi gujogo lim ki bot jo ma bedo i Juda ki Jerucalem kit ma yam Moses latic pa Rwot ociko ni myero gigam ki bot lwak jo Icrael pi tic me kema lok me caden?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Pien jo pa Atalia, ma en dako ma latim marac-ci, onoŋo yam guturo ki donyo i ot pa Lubaŋa, ci gutero jami ducu ma yam gidyero pi ot pa Rwot, gutiyo kwedgi pi woro Baal-gu." 
2Chronicles24:8 Pi meno kabaka ociko ni myero gipaa canduk, ci giguro ki woko i nyim doggola me ot pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles24:9 Gitito lok oromo i Juda ki Jerucalem ducu, ni myero dano gukellim ajog pa Rwot kit ma Moses latic pa Lubaŋa ociko ki jo Icrael i kare ma gitye i tim." 
2Chronicles24:10 Pienno rwodi kacel ki lwak ducu cwinygi obedo yom, ci gukelo lim ajog megi, gubolo i canduk nio ka gin ducu gumiyo." 
2Chronicles24:11 I kare ducu ma Lulevi gikelo canduk bot ludito ma kabaka ocimo, ka ce guneno ni lim tye i canduk madwoŋ, ci karan pa kabaka, kacel ki ajwaka madit, gibino gikwanyo lim woko ki i canduk gicito kwede, ka gidwoko canduk kakare i kabedone. Gubedo ka timo kit meno nino ki nino, ci gucoko lim madwoŋ." 
2Chronicles24:12 Kabaka ki Yekoyada gumiyo lim i ciŋ lutic ma giloyo dog tic me ot pa Rwot, giculo ki lupa-godi ki lupa bao pi yu bo ot pa Rwot, giculo kwede bene lutic ki nyonyo ki mola pi yu bo ot pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles24:13 Jo ma gimiyogi tic gutiyo ticgi matek ci yubone owoto oyot i ciŋgi maber, ci guyubo ot pa Rwot odoko maber kit ma yam con, odoko tek kakare." 
2Chronicles24:14 Ka doŋ gutyeko ticgi, ci gukelo lim mudoŋŋe bot kabaka ki Yekoyada, ka gutiyo ki jami ot pa Rwot, pi tic mapatpat ki pi gitum awaŋa, ki atabo me waŋo odok eceta, ki jami me jabu ki me ryal. Gutyero gitum awaŋa i ot pa Rwot jwijwi i kare me kwo pa Yekoyada ducu." 
2Chronicles24:15 Ento ka Yekoyada doŋ oteggi, oti woko, ci oto; i kare ma en to onoŋo mwakane romo miya acel ki pyeradek." 
2Chronicles24:16 Giyike i gaŋ kal pa Daudi i kin luker, pien en obedo ka tiyo tic maber i Icrael, kun tiyo pi Lubaŋa ki pi ot legane." 
2Chronicles24:17 Lacen i ŋe to pa Yekoyada, rwodi me Juda gubino guryebbe i nyim kabaka, ci kabaka owinyo lokgi." 
2Chronicles24:18 Gucako bwoto ot pa Rwot, ma Lubaŋa pa kwarigi, gudok ka woro Acera ma jok ma dako-ni, ki cal jogi apaya-gu. Cut akeca pa Rwot obino i kom jo Juda ki Jerucalem pi bal meno." 
2Chronicles24:19 Ento pud omedde ki cwalo lunebi mogo botgi, wek gudwokgi cen bot Rwot, ci gutito lokke botgi, ento dano gukwero winyo." 
2Chronicles24:20 Cwiny pa Lubaŋa obino i kom Jekaria wod pa ajwaka Yekoyada ocuŋ i nyim lwak ci owaco botgi ni, “Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, ‘Piŋo wun wukalo wi cik pa Rwot, miyo pe wulimo gum? Pierr wutyeko bwoto Rwot woko, en bene doŋ otyeko bwotowu.’ ”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Ento gubedo ka libo en, ci gucele ki got pi cik pa kabaka, guneke i dyekal me ot pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles24:22 Kabaka Yoaci pe opo pi kica ki pi ber ma Yekoyada won Jekaria yam onyuto i kome, ento dok oneko wode woko. I kare ma en to, Jekaria owacci, “Ber Rwot onen gin mutimme, ci ocul kworra!”" 
2Chronicles24:23 I kare me tum mwaka mony pa jo Ciria obino ka lweny i kom Yoaci. Gubino i kom Juda ki Jerucalem, gujwero rwodi pa lwak woko ducu ki i kin dano, ka dok gucwalo jamigi ma guyako ducu bot kabaka me Damaciko." 
2Chronicles24:24 Kadi bed mony pa jo Ciria obino ki jo manok, ento Rwot omiyo mony madit pa jo Juda i ciŋgi, pien onoŋo gubwoto Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarogi. Kit meno gucobo kop ma Rwot oŋolo i kom Yoaci." 
2Chronicles24:25 Ka jo Ciria gua woko ki bote, gubwoto en ma doŋ guketo ret marac twatwal i kome, Luticce gupiro lok i kome pi culo kwor pi remo pa wod pa ajwaka Yekoyada, ci guneke woko i ot i wi kitandane. En oto kit meno, ci giyike i gaŋ kal pa Daudi, ento pe giyiko en i Lyel pa luker," 
2Chronicles24:26 Jo ma gujemo i kome gin ene: Jabad wod pa Cimeat ma nya jo Ammon, ki Yekojabad wod pa Cimrit ma nya jo Moab." 
2Chronicles24:27 Lok kom litino awobe pa Yoaci, ki lok mapol ma lunebi guloko i kome, ki lok kom gero ot pa Lubaŋa odoco gityeko coyone i Buk Lagony-lok ma i buk pa Luker. Wode Amajia aye oleyo ka tyene." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amajia ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeraryo wiye abic, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyeraryo wiye aboŋwen, Nyiŋ minne Yekoadan me Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles25:2 En obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋ Rwot, ento pe ki cwinye ducu." 
2Chronicles25:3 Ka ker omoko matek i cine, ci ocako neko luticce ma yam guneko wonne ma kabaka-ni." 
2Chronicles25:4 Ento pe oneko litino pa lunek-ki, kit macalo gicoyo i buk me cik pa Moses ka ma yam Rwot ociko ni, “Won latin pe gibineko pi bal pa wode, nyo latin pi bal pa wonne; ento dano acel acel bito pi balle kikome," 
2Chronicles25:5 Amajia dok ocoko lwak me Juda, ci oketogi muporo dog odi pa kwarogi i te ludito ma giloyo buca mony pa jo alip ki pa jo miya, pi jo Juda ki jo Benjamin ducu, Okwanojo ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo dok kwede malo, ci onoŋo ni jo ma giyero ma gin twoni oteka lweny giromo alip miya adek, ma giyerogi ayera ma giromo lweny, ma giŋeyo mako toŋ ki kwot." 
2Chronicles25:6 Dok onoŋo twoni oteka lweny alip miya acel mu kene ki bot jo Icrael kun owilogi ki talanta me ryal miya acel. 
2Chronicles25:7 Ento dano pa Lubaŋa obino bote owacce ni, “Rwoda kabaka, pe iye mony pa Icrael ocit kwedwu, pien Rwot pe tye ki jo Icrael, pe tye ki jo Epraim magi ducu," 
2Chronicles25:8 Ento ka in itamo ni ibilimo tek me lweny pi lok meno, ci Lubaŋa bireti woko piny ki i nyim lumerokki; pien Lubaŋa tye ki tek me miyo kony ki me reto piny.’" 
2Chronicles25:9 Amajia ogamo dog dano pa Lubaŋa ni, “Wabitimo aŋo pi talanta mi ya acel ma doŋ atyeko miyone bot mony pa Icrael-li?” Dano pa Lubaŋa odok iye ni, “Rwot twero miyi lim madwoŋ makato man,”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Amajia ocako cwalo mony ma oa ki i Epraim gubino bote-ni, me dok woko cen i pacogi doki. Ci kiniga omakogi matek i kom jo Juda, gucako dok i gaŋgi ki kiniga mager." 
2Chronicles25:11 Ento Amajia odiyo cwinye, ci otero lwakke, ocito kwedgi wa i nota me Kado, ci oneko jo Ceir ma giromo alip apar." 
2Chronicles25:12 Jo Juda gumako jo mukene makwo ma giromo alip apar bene, ci guterogi i wi got ka gucorogi woko piny ki i wi got kunnu; gin ducu gupoto gunyot woko." 
2Chronicles25:13 Ento jo mony ma Amajia okwerogi ni pe gucit i lweny kwedgi-ni, ma ocwalogi gudok cen-ni, gumonyo gaŋi me Juda, cakke ki i Camaria, nio kwede i Bet-koron, ci guneko jo alip adek ki kunnu, dok guyako jami mapol." 
2Chronicles25:14 Ka Amajia odwogo ki ka neko jo Edom, okelo ki lwak lubaŋa pa jo Ceir, ci ocibogi gucuŋ macalo lubaŋane cut, ocako worogi, kun tyero gitum botgi." 
2Chronicles25:15 Pi meno kiniga omako Rwot i kom Amajia ci ocwalo lanebi mo bote, ma owacce ni, “Piŋo icako lubo kor lubaŋa me rok mukene, ma pe gutwero laro lwakgi kikome ki i ciŋi-ni?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Ka pud tye ka lok kwede kabaka openye ni, “Wan waketo in me bedo lami-tam pa kabaka bo? Tugi liŋ! Piŋo imito ni gineki woko?” Lanebi ocako liŋ, ento owacci, “Aŋeyo ni Lubaŋa otyeko yubo me neki woko, pien in itiyo lok man ma pe iwinyo tamma.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Amajia kabaka me Juda dok openyo tam ki bot jo mukene ci ocwalo lukwena bot Yoaci wod pa Yekoakaj, wod pa Yeko, kabaka me Icrael, kun wacce ni, “Bin wacam co wanenne waŋ ki waŋ.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Yoaci kabaka me Icrael odwoko lok bot Amajia kabaka me Juda kun waco ni, “Yam okuto mo ma i wi Lebanon ocwalo kwena bot yat cedar me Lebanon, kun wacci, ‘Miya nyari wek anyom ki woda.’ Ci lee tim mo me Lebanon ma owok ki kunnu onyono okuto woko piny." 
2Chronicles25:19 In iwacci, ‘Doŋ atyeko neko Edom woko,’ ci cwinyi otiŋimalo ki wakke madwoŋ. Bed ki deyo meno rommi, ci ibed kwede i paconi: piŋo irobo dog dano me kelo ayela i komi, miyo ipoto wa ki Juda kacel kwedi.”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Ento Amajia pe owinyo; pien onoŋo Lubaŋa oyubo ni, wek emigi i ciŋ lumerokgi, pien gulokke bot lwak lubaŋa pa jo Edom." 
2Chronicles25:21 Yoaci kabaka me Icrael ocito; ci en ki Amajia kabaka me Juda gucamo co gunenne kekengi i lweny i Bet-cemec, ma gaŋ me Juda." 
2Chronicles25:22 Icrael ocako loyo Juda, ci dano acel acel oriŋo woko i pacone." 
2Chronicles25:23 Yoaci kabaka me Icrael omako Amajia kabaka me Juda wod pa Yekoac, ma wod pa Akajia, ki i Bet-cemec, ka otere wa i Jerucalem, ci omuko cel me Jerucalem ma romo yadi miya aryo kulu, nia ki i dogcel ma gilwoŋo ni pa Epraim nio kwede wa i dogcel ma i twok gaŋ." 
2Chronicles25:24 En oyako jabu ki ryal ducu ki atabo-gu ducu ma onoŋo i ot pa Lubaŋa, kacel ki Obed-edom; oyako lim ki i ot kano lim pa kabaka, kacel ki jo ma gimako me akoka, ci odok kwede wa i Camaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amajia wod pa Yoaci kabaka me Juda koŋ dok obedo kwo ki i ŋe to pa Yoaci wod pa Yekoakaj, kabaka me Icrael pi mwaka apar wiye abic." 
2Chronicles25:26 Lok kom Amajia mudoŋŋe ducu, nia i acakkine nio i agikkine, gityeko coyone i buk pa Luker me Juda ki Icrael." 
2Chronicles25:27 Cakke i kare ma en obwoto Rwot woko jo mogo ‘gucako piro lok i kome ki i Jerucalem, ci olwi oriŋo woko i Lakic. Ento gucwalo dano i kore wa i Lakic ci guneke woko ki kunnu," 
2Chronicles25:28 Gukelo kome ki aguragura, ci giyiko kacel ki kwarine i gaŋ kal pa Daudi." 
2Chronicles26:1 Lwak ducu gutiŋo Ujia, ma mwaka me ditte romo apar wiye abicel, ci guketo en kabaka me leyo ka tyen wonne Amajia." 
2Chronicles26:2 En aye ogero Elot ci odwoko cen bot Juda, ki I ne to pa kabaka ma oywe kacel ki kwari ŋe." 
2Chronicles26:3 Ujia ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte romo apar wiye abicel, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyerabic wiye aryo. Nyiŋ minne Yekolia me Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles26:4 Obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋ Rwot, kun lubo gin ducu ma yam wonne Amajia otiyo." 
2Chronicles26:5 I kare pa Jekaria, en oketo cwinye ka yenyo Lubaŋa, pien Jekaria opwonyo en ki kit me lworo Lubaŋa. Pi kare ducu ma en obedo ka keto cwinye i kom Rwot, Lubaŋa omiye gum." 
2Chronicles26:6 En ocito ka lweny ki jo Piliciti, ci oturo cel me Gat woko, ki cel me Jabne ki me Acidod; ka ogero gaŋi mukene i lobo ma i ŋet Acidod, ki i kabedo mukene ma i kin jo Piliciti," 
2Chronicles26:7 Lubaŋa obedo ka konye ki lweny i kom jo Piliciti, ki i kom jo Arab ma gibedo i Gurbaal, ki i kom jo Meun." 
2Chronicles26:8 Jo Ammon gubedo ka culo mucoro bot Ujia; nyiŋe oywek oo wa i waŋ lobo Ejipt, pien onoŋo odoko tek mada." 
2Chronicles26:9 Ujia dok ogero odi matego ma ocudo malo i Jerucalem. Ogero acel i dogcel ma i twok gaŋ, acel i dogcel ma cito i no ta ki acel i twoke mukene; ogerogi matek twatwal." 
2Chronicles26:10 Ka dok ogero odi matego ma ocudo malo i tim, dok okwinyo lwak waŋ pii mapol, pien onoŋo tye ki lim makwo madwoŋ; obedo ki lim i Cepela ki i bar bene, dok obedo ki lupur ki lupur olok i lobo godi ki i lobo ducu ma ceko cam, pien en maro pur." 
2Chronicles26:11 Ujia dok obedo ki mony pa askari ma giromo lweny, i lwak buca mapatpat, kit macalo Jeyel ma karan-ni oryeyo kwede welgi gin ki ladit mony Maaceya, i te loc pa Anania, ma en ŋat acel i kin ludito ma giloyo mony pa kabaka." 
2Chronicles26:12 Wel twoni oteka lweny ducu ma gin ludito kaka i odi pa kwarogi yam oromo alip aryo ki miya abicel. 
2Chronicles26:13 I te loc pa ludito mony magi onoŋo tye iye mony ma romo jo alip miya adek ki abiro, ki miya abic magitwero lweny, ma komgi tek ka lweny pi konyo kabaka ki lweny i kom lumerokke," 
2Chronicles26:14 Ujia oyubo kwodi pi lumony ducu, ki toŋi, ki otaŋwic, ki koti nyonyo, ki lwak atum, ki laliŋliŋ me latandiyo." 
2Chronicles26:15 Dok oketo bao me lacel atero i Jerucalem ma luryeko guroto, wek guket i wi odi matego ma ocudo malo i twok cel ducu, pi celo atero ki pi bayo lakidi madito-gu, Nyiŋe oywek oromo lobo ducu, pien Lubaŋa obedo ka konye i yo me aura, nio ka odoko tek." 
2Chronicles26:16 Ento kadi bed en obedo tek, obedo ki cwiny me wakke i iye, ma okelo can i kome kene. Pien en oŋayo waŋ Rwot Lubaŋane; oette odonyo i ot pa Rwot ka waŋo odok eceta i keno tyer me wano odok eceta." 
2Chronicles26:17 Ento ajwaka Ajaria olubo kore odonyo bote, kacel ki ajwagi pyeraboro ma gin twoni matego," 
2Chronicles26:18 Ci gucuŋ gupyem ki kabaka Ujia kun giwaco bote ni, “Man pe ticci, me waŋo odok eceta bot Rwot, man tic pa ajwagi ma gin likwayo pa Aron, ma yam gikwerogi me waŋo odok eceta. Kat woko ki i kabedo maleŋ; pien ityeko timo bal, pe ibinoŋo iye deyo mo ma a ki bot Rwot Lubaŋa.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Cutcut kiniga omako Ujia woko, ma onoŋo pud tye ki atabo weer me waŋo odok eceta i ciŋe. I kare ma kiniga omake i kom ajwagi, cut dobo opoto i kome ma ajwagi bene gineno ma onoŋo gitye i ot pa Rwot, i ŋet keno tyer me odok eceta." 
2Chronicles26:20 Ajaria ajwaka madit, ki ajwagi ducu, gubedo ka neno en, ci guneno dobo tye i tur nyime! Gucwale woko cen oyotoyot, en bene orune me cito woko, pien Rwot otyeko pwode." 
2Chronicles26:21 Kabaka Ujia obedo ladobo nio wa i nino me tone; pi bedo ladobo omiyo opokke obedo i ot ka ikene, pien pe giye ni en odony i ot pa Rwot. Yocam ma wode aye obedo ladit ma loyo jo me ot pa kabaka, kun loyo kwede lwak me lobo meno," 
2Chronicles26:22 Lok kom Ujia mudoŋŋe ducu, nia i acakkine nio i agikkine, lanebi Icaya ma wod pa Amoj aye ocoyo." 
2Chronicles26:23 Ujia oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyike kacel ki kwarine i kabedogi me yik ka ma yam giyiko iye luker, kun guwacci, “En ladobo.” Wode Yocam aye oleyo ka tyene." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yocam ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeraryo wiye abic, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka apar wiye abicel. Nyiŋ minne Yeruca ma nya pa Jadok," 
2Chronicles27:2 En obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋ Rwot, kun lubo gin ducu ma yam wonne Ujia otiyo, ento pe obedo calo en pien pe omedo ki donyo i ot pa Rwot. Ento onoŋo lwak pud gimedde ki timgi maraco." 
2Chronicles27:3 En ogero doggola ma malo me ot pa Rwot, ka dok obedo ka gedo i kom cel me Opel matek twatwal." 
2Chronicles27:4 Omedde ki gero gaŋi i lobo gotgot me Juda, ki cel gogo-gu ki odi matego ma ocudo malo i wi cere ma yadi dwoŋ iye." 
2Chronicles27:5 En olwenyo i kom kabaka pa jo Ammon ci oloyogi, jo Ammon gumiye ryal ma romo talanta miya acel i mwaka meno, ki naŋo guniya alip apar, ki ‘cayiri guniya alip apar. Jo Ammon gubedo ka culo bote wel marom i mwaka me aryo ki me adekke." 
2Chronicles27:6 Yocam omedde odoko tek pien obedo ka lubo yo ma atir i nyim Rwot Lubaŋane," 
2Chronicles27:7 Lok kom Yocam mudoŋŋe ducu, ki mony ducu ma en olwenyo, ki kite ducu, nen, gityeko coyone i buk pa Luker me Icrael ki me Juda." 
2Chronicles27:8 En ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeraryo wiye abic, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka apar wiye abicel." 
2Chronicles27:9 Yocam oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyike i gaŋ kal pa Daudi, Wode Akaj aye oleyo ka tyene." 
2Chronicles28:1 Akaj ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeraryo, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka apar wiye abicel. Pe obedo ka tiyo gia ma nen atir i wan Rwot, kit ma kwarone Daudi yam otiyo-ni," 
2Chronicles28:2 ento obedo ka lubo kit pa luker me Icrael. En otiyo cal jok aliya pi lwak Baal-gu; 
2Chronicles28:3 obedo ka waŋo odok eceta i nota pa wod pa Kinom, dok owaŋo wode me gityer, kun lubo kwede tim me kwer pa rok ducu ma Rwot yam oryemogi woko ki i nyim jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles28:4 En obedo ka tyero gitum ki waŋo odok eceta i waŋ jogi ma i wi godi, ki i wi cere, ki i waŋ ayweya ducu ma po te oluk-gu." 
2Chronicles28:5 Pienno Rwot Lubaŋane omiyo en i ciŋ kabaka me Ciria, ma oloyo en ci oyako jo mapol ki i kin lwakke oterogi woko wa i Damaciko. Dok gimiyo en i ciŋ kabaka me Icrael, ma oloyo en kun oneko lwak jone madwoŋ." 
2Chronicles28:6 Pien Peka wod pa Remalia oneko jo alip miya ki pyeraryo i Juda i nino acel, gin ducu gubedo twoni lweny matego, pien onoŋo doŋ gutyeko bwoto Rwot woko, ma Lubaŋa pa kwarogi." 
2Chronicles28:7 Ka Jikri twon oteka me Epraim, oneko Maaceya wod pa kabaka, ki Ajrikam ma ladit ma loyo i gaŋ kal, ki Elkana ma en aye lawaŋ kabaka." 
2Chronicles28:8 Jo Icrael guyako jo alip mi ya aryo ki i kin utmegigi, mon, awobe, ki anyira; dok guyako jamigi mapol ci gutero i Camaria." 
2Chronicles28:9 Ento lanebi pa Rwot onoŋo tye kunnu, ma nyiŋe Oded; en ocito ka rwatte ki mony ma onoŋo ocito i Camaria, ci owaco botgi ni, “Nenu, kiniga omako Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwariwu i kom jo Juda ci omiyogi i ciŋwu, ento wun wunekogi ki akemo madwoŋ mada ma pire owinnye wa i polo." 
2Chronicles28:10 Kombeddi tamwu tye ka rido lwak ma i Juda ki Jerucalem, co ki mon, wek gubed opiiwu. Pe wutye ki bal ma okemowu i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Doŋ wuwiny lokka, ci wucwal jo ma wukwanyogi-ni gudok cen; gin utmegiwu, wudwokgi ka ma wukwanyogi ki iye-ni, pien akemo pa Rwot tye i komwu madwoŋ.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Ludito mukene me Epraim, gin aye Ajaria wod pa Yokanan, Berekia wod pa Mecilemot, lekijikia wod pa Calum, ki Amaca wod pa Kadlai, gucuŋ gujuko jo ma gua i mony," 
2Chronicles28:13 kun giwacci, “Pe wubikelo jo ma giyakogi wa kany, pien tamwu tye me tiŋo alii bot Rwot kun wamedo i kom balwa ki alii ma doŋ watyeko tiŋone-ni. Aliiwa doŋ tye dwoŋ, dok bene akemo pa Rwot magwar tye i kom Icrael.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Kit meno jo ma gin lumony-nyi guweko dano ki jami ducu ma guyakogi i nyim rwodi ki i nyim lwak mucokke ducu. 
2Chronicles28:15 Jo ma gicoyo nyiŋgi malo-nu gua gutero dano ma giyakogi-ni, kacel ki jami, ci guruko jo ducu ma i kingi ma gitye no no munero ki boŋŋi ma lumony onoŋo guyako. Gurukogi ki boŋŋi, ka gimiyogi war tyen wa ki cam bene ki ginamata-gu, dok guwiro komgi ki moo. Lacen gutiŋo jo magoro i kingi ki kana, guterogi wa bot jo tugi ma i Jeriko, gaŋ me otit, ka gudok cen i Camaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 I kare meno kabaka Akaj ocwalo kwena bot kabaka me Aciria kun lego kony ki bote; 
2Chronicles28:17 pien onoŋo jo Edom gumonyo jo Juda ci guloyogi bene, guyako jo mogo i kingi, guterogi i opii." 
2Chronicles28:18 Jo Piliciti bene gumonyo gaŋi ma i Cepela ki Negeb me Juda, Betcemec, Aijalon, Gederot, Coko ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete ducu, Timna ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete ducu, Gimjo ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete ducu; ci gubedo iye." 
2Chronicles28:19 Rwot odwoko Juda woko piny pi Akaj kabaka me Icrael, pien obedo ka timo tim mogo me carocaro i Juda, pien onayo wan Rwot woko." 
2Chronicles28:20 Pi meno omiyo Tiglat-pilecer kabaka me Aciria obino ka lweny i kome, ci otime malit ma kaka miye kony ma twero miye tek." 
2Chronicles28:21 Akaj okwanyo jami ma i ot pa Rwot ki ma i ot pa kabaka ki ma i ot pa rwodi, ci oculo mucoro bot kabaka me Aciria; ento pe omedo ki noŋo iye kit kony mo." 
2Chronicles28:22 I kare ma doŋ can odiye en kabaka Akaj acel-li omedde ameda ki ŋayo waŋ Rwot. 
2Chronicles28:23 En otyero gitum bot lwak lubaŋa pa jo Damaciko ma onoŋo guloye, kun wacci, “Pien lwak lubaŋa pa luker me Ciria okonyogi, an abityero gitum botgi wek gukonya bene,” Ento gukelo can ma otyeko en ki jo Icrael ducu." 
2Chronicles28:24 Ci Akaj ocoko jami ducu ma gitiyo kwede i ot pa Lubaŋa ocako ŋido woko matitino gin jami magi ma onoŋo gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Lubaŋa, ka dok oloro doggola me ot pa Rwot woko; cut otiyo keno tyer mapol pire kene ma romo i Jerucalem ducu," 
2Chronicles28:25 I gaŋ acel acel ma i Juda oketo iye waŋ jogi ka ma giwaŋo iye odok eceta bot lwak lubaŋa mukene-gu, ma omiyo kiniga omako Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarine." 
2Chronicles28:26 Lok kom Akaj mudoŋŋe ducu, ki kite ducu, nia i acakkine nio i agikkine, gityeko coyone i buk pa Luker me Juda ki me Icrael." 
2Chronicles28:27 Akaj oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyiko en i gaŋ, i Jerucalem, pien pe gutere i lyel pa luker me Icrael. Ci wode Kejekia aye oleyo ka tyene." 
2Chronicles29:1 Kejekia ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeraryo wiye abic, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyeraryo wiye aboŋwen, Nyiŋ minne Abija ma nya pa Jekaria," 
2Chronicles29:2 Kejekia obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋ Rwot, kun lubo gin ducu ma yam kwarone Daudi otiyo," 
2Chronicles29:3 I mwaka mukwoŋo me locce, i dwe me acel, en aye en oyabo iye doggola me ot pa Rwot, dok oyubogi." 
2Chronicles29:4 En okelo ajwagi ki Lulevi, omiyo gucokke kacel i dyekal yo tuŋ wokceŋ," 
2Chronicles29:5 ocako waco botgi ni, “Wuwiny lokka, wun Lulevil Kombeddi wulonnye kenwu, dok wulony ot pa Rwot. Lubaŋa pa kwariwu, obed maleŋ, wukwany cilo woko ki i kabedo man maleŋ," 
2Chronicles29:6 Kwariwu guŋayo waŋ Rwot woko. Gubedo ka timo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot Lubaŋawa: gutyeko bwoto en woko, ma guloko wangi ka mukene ma cwinygi pe i kom Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:7 Gin bene gucego doggola me kicika ma gidonyo kwede i ot, ka guneko mac tara woko, pe guwaŋo odok eceta nyo kadi ki tyero gitum awaŋa i kabedo maleŋ bot Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
2Chronicles29:8 Pi meno akemo omako Rwot i kom Juda ki Jerucalem, ci omiyogi gudoko jo ma kela lworo, ur ki jwat bot dano, macalo wun wutye ka nenone ki wanwu-ni," 
2Chronicles29:9 Nen ba, kwariwa ginekogi woko liweŋ ki pala lucwan dok awobewa, anyirawa ki monwa ducu gitye i opii pi lok man." 
2Chronicles29:10 Tam ma tye i cwinya kombeddi en aye me keto cikke i kinwa ki Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, wek kinigane magwar-ri oa woko ki i komwa." 
2Chronicles29:11 Pe wubed ata litinona, Rwot otyeko yerowu me cuŋ i nyime, ka tic bote, ki me bedo lutic ma mere ma wuwaŋo odoko eceta bote.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Cutcut Lulevi magi gua, gin aye Makat wod pa Amacai, ki Joel wod pa Ajaria, ma gin likwayo pa Kokat; ki likwayo pa Merari, ma gin aye Kic wod pa Abdi, ki Ajaria wod pa Jekalelel; ki likwayo pa Gercon, ma gin aye Joa wod pa Jimma, ki Eden wod pa Joa;" 
2Chronicles29:12 Cutcut Lulevi magi gua, gin aye Makat wod pa Amacai, ki Joel wod pa Ajaria, ma gin likwayo pa Kokat; ki likwayo pa Merari, ma gin aye Kic wod pa Abdi, ki Ajaria wod pa Jekalelel; ki likwayo pa Gercon, ma gin aye Joa wod pa Jimma, ki Eden wod pa Joa;" 
2Chronicles29:13 ki i kom likwayo pa Elijapan ma gin aye Cimri ki Jeuel; ki likwayo pa Acap, ma gin aye Jekaria ki Matania;" 
2Chronicles29:14 ki likwayo pa Keman, ma gin aye Jekuel ki Cimel; ki likwayo pa Jedutun, gin aye Cemaya ki Ujiel." 
2Chronicles29:15 Gucoko utmegigi kacel ci gulonnye kengi, ka doŋ gucako donyo i ot kit macalo onoŋo kabaka ociko ma lubo lok pa Rwot, wek gulony ot pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:16 Ajwagi gudonyo gucito wa i kicika ma i tyelo ma i ot pa Rwot ka lonyone, ci gukatti woko ki jami maraco me kwer ma gunoŋo i ot pa Rwot, gukelo guketo i dyekal ma i ot pa Rwot; ka doŋ Lulevi gutiŋo gutero guonyo woko wa i laora kulu Kidron." 
2Chronicles29:17 Gucako lonyo ot i nino dwe acel me dwe me acel, ka dok i nino dwe aboro me dwe me acel gubino i kicika ma gidonyo kwede i ot pa Rwot, ka lacen gibedo ka lonyo ot pa Rwot pi nino aboro, ci gutyeko ticgi i nino dwe apar wiye abicel me dwe meno." 
2Chronicles29:18 Lacen gucito gudonyo bot Kejekia ci guwacce ni, “Doŋ watyeko lonyo ot pa Rwot woko ducu, keno tyer me gitum awaŋa ki jami me tic ducu, ki meja ma giketo iye mugati ma giketo i nyim Rwot, wa jami tic ducu." 
2Chronicles29:19 Dok jami tic ducu ma yam kabaka Akaj obolo woko i kare me locce ma onoŋo pe ogwoko cik pa Rwot, wayubogi dok walonyo; nen, gitye i nyim keno tyer pa Rwot.”" 
2Chronicles29:20 Lacen kabaka Kejekia opuk woko con ci ocoko ludito ma giloyo gaŋ kacel, ocito kwedgi i ot pa Rwot," 
2Chronicles29:21 Gucako kelo twoni abiro, nyogi romi abiro, litino romi abiro ki nyogi dyegi abiro pi itum me bal pi ker, pi kabedo maleŋ ki pi Juda. Ci ociko ajwagi ma gin likwayo pa Aron me tyerogi i wi keno tyer pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:22 Kit meno gucako neko twoni, ci ajwagi gukwanyo remone gucoro i kom keno tyer, Ka dok guneko nyogi romi ci remone bene gucoro i kom keno tyer; i ŋeye guneko litino romi ci remone gucoro i kom keno tye bene." 
2Chronicles29:23 Lacen gikelo nyogi dyegi bot kabaka ki jo ma gucokke ducu, pi gitum pi bal, ci guketo ciŋgi i komgi;" 
2Chronicles29:24 ajwagi guneko nyogi dyegi ka gutyero gitum pi bal ki remogi i wi keno tyer, me lakwany bal ki i kom jo Icrael ducu. Kabaka onoŋo ociko ni myero gityer gitum awaŋa ki gitum pi bal pi jo Icrael ducu." 
2Chronicles29:25 Kejekia omiyo Lulevi gucuŋ i ot pa Rwot gumako atego agoya-gu, ki naŋa-gu, ki opuk-gu, kun olubo cik pa Daudi, ki Gad ma lanen-piny pa kabaka, ki cik pa lanebi Natan. Cik man oa ki bot Rwot ma en omiyo owok ki bot lunebine." 
2Chronicles29:26 Lulevi gucuŋ gumako jami wer pa Daudi, kun ajwagi gumako tumgi." 
2Chronicles29:27 Cutcut Kejekia ociko ni myero gityer gitum awaŋa i wi keno tyer. I kare ma gicako tyero gitum awaŋa, gicako wer me pako Rowt cut, kun gikuto tum-gu, ma gigoyo bene jami Icrael." 
2Chronicles29:28 Lwak ma gucokke ducu gumiyo woro bot Lubaŋa, luwer guwero wer, ki lukut tum gukuto tumgi; gumedde kwede nio waŋ ma tyero gitum awaŋa otum." 
2Chronicles29:29 Ka doŋ tyero gitum otum, ci kabaka kacel ki jo ma onoŋo gitye kwede ducu guryebbe piny gumiyo woro bot Lubaŋa." 
2Chronicles29:30 Kabako Kejekia ki rwodine gucako ciko Lulevi me wero wer me pak bot kun gilubo lok pa Daudi ki pa Acap ma lanen-liny. Ci guwero wer pak ki yomcwiny, ka dok guryebbe piny gumiyo woro bot Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:31 Kejekia dok owacci, “Doŋ wutyeko kwerre kenwu bot Rwot; wunyik cok, wukel gitum ki gityer me pwoc i ot pa Rwot.” Ci jo ma gucokke ducu gukelp gitum mapol ki gityer me pwoc; ki jo ducu ma cwinygi aye opwoyo gukelo gitum awaŋa." 
2Chronicles29:32 Wel jami me gitum awaŋa ma lwak ma gucokke gukelo onoŋo tye twoni pyerabiro, nyogi romi miya acel, ki litino romi miya aryo; magi ducu gikelogi me gitum awaŋa bot Rwot." 
2Chronicles29:33 Doŋ gityer ma gikwero onoŋo obedo twoni miya abicel ki romi alip adek. 
2Chronicles29:34 Ento ajwagi onoŋo ginok twatwal ma pe gitwero yaŋo gitum awaŋa magi ducu, omiyo utmegigi ma Lulevi gucako konyogi nio waŋ ma ajwagi mukene gulonnye kengi nio ka gutyeko tic ducu pien Lulevi onoŋo cwinygi leŋ ma kato ajwagi i lonnye kengi." 
2Chronicles29:35 Medo i kom wel gitum awaŋa madit twatwal-li, moo dwolo bene onoŋo tye me gityer lakwecwiny, ki dok gubedo ka liyo koŋo vino pi gitum awaŋa. Gidwoko kit me tic i ot pa Rwot kit meno." 
2Chronicles29:36 Omiyo Kejekia kacel ki lwak gubedo ki yomcwiny pi gin ma Lubaŋa otyeko tiyo pi lwak; pien lokke obino atura. 
2Chronicles30:1 Kejekia ocwalo kwena bot jo Icrael ducu ki jo Juda, ka dok ocoyo waraga ocwalo bot jo Epraim ki Manace, ma tito botgi ni myero gubin i ot pa Rwot ma tye i Jerucalem, ka kwero nino madito me Kato (Paska) bot Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
2Chronicles30:2 Onoŋo kabaka ki rwodine kacel ki jo ducu ma obedo i cokke i Jerucalem gutyeko moko tam me kwero nino madito me Kato (Paska) i dwe me aryo; 
2Chronicles30:3 pien pe onoŋo gitwero kwero nino man i karene kikome pien ajwagi mapol onŋo pud peya gulonnye kekngi, ki lwak bene pe gucokke i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles30:4 Yub meno onen atir twatwal i waŋ kabaka kacel ki lwak ducu me gubedo i cokke. 
2Chronicles30:5 Ci giciko kwede pi yweko lok man wek orom i lobo Icrael ducu cakke ki i Beer-ceba nio kwede i Dan, kun gitito ni lwak myero gubin ka kwero nino madito me Kato (Paska) bot Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, i Jerucalem; pien lwak mapol onoŋo pe gubedo ka kwero nino man kit macalo giciko kwede." 
2Chronicles30:6 Kit meno lukwena gutero waraga pa kabaka ki rwodine guwoto i lobo Icrael ki Juda ducu macalo kabaka ociko, kun giwaco ni, “Wun lwak me Icrael, wudwog cen bot Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Abraim, pa Icaka ki pa Icrael, wek en odwog bot jo mudoŋ i kinwu ma gubwot ki i cin luker me Aciria." 
2Chronicles30:7 Pe wubed macalo kwariwu ki utmegiwu, ma guŋayo waŋ Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarigi-ni, pi meno Lubaŋa omiyo lobogi odoko obur kit macalo wutye ka nenone." 
2Chronicles30:8 Pe wubed ma ŋutwu nwaŋ kombeddi macalo yam kwariwu gubedo kwede, ento wun wumi kwowu bot Rwot, wubin i kabedo man maleŋ ma en otyeko lonyo matwal, kun wutiyo bot Rwot Lubaŋawu, wek kinigane mager-ri oa woko ki i komwu," 
2Chronicles30:9 Ka ce wulokke wudwogo cen bot Rwot, ci kica bimako jo ma guyako utmegiwu ki litinowu, ci gibiye gidwogo i lobo man. Myero wuŋe Rwot Lubaŋa en ber dok lakica, ma pe bi loko waŋe ki i komwu, ka wulokke wudwogo cen bote.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Kit meno lukwena gucako wot i gaŋ ki gaŋ ma i lobo Epraim ki Manace, dok gumedde ki wotgi nio wa i lobo Jebulun, ento dano gibedo ka nyerogi kun gicayogi dok ginalogi," 
2Chronicles30:11 Jo manok keken ma i lobo pa Acer, pa Manace ki Jebulun aye gumwolle kengi gubino i Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles30:12 Lubaŋa oketo ciŋe i kom jo Juda omiyo gubedo ki cwiny acel kun gitiyo gin ma kabaka ki rwodine onoŋo guciko pire ma gulubo lok pa Rwot. 
2Chronicles30:13 Lwak jo mapol gucokke kacel gubino i Jerucalem i cokke madit twatwal ka kwero nino madito me Mugati ma Tobi Pe Iye i dwe me aryo. 
2Chronicles30:14 Ka gucako tic ci gumuko keno tyer ducu ma yam tye i Jerucalem, ka dok gumuko keno tyer ducu ka ma giwaŋo iye odok eceta gutero gubolo woko i laora kulu Kidron." 
2Chronicles30:15 Ci guneko latin romo me Kato (Paska) i nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen me dwe me aryo. Man omiyo lewic omako ajwagi ki Lulevi, oweko gucako lonnye kengi, ka doŋ gukelo gitum awaŋa i ot pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles30:16 Gucako mako dog ticgi kit me kare ducu kun gilubo cik pa Moses ma en dano pa Lubaŋa, Ajwagi ticgi obedo me coro remo ma gigamo ki i ciŋ Lulevi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Onoŋo tye jo mapol i cokke ma pe gulonnye kengi; pi meno omiyo Lulevi guneko latin romo me Kato (Paska) pi ŋat acel acel ma pe olonnye, wek obed leŋ pi Rwot." 
2Chronicles30:18 Jo mapol i kom lwak onoŋo gua ki i lobo Epraim, Manace, Icakar ki Jebulun, ma pud peya gulonnye kengi, ento gubedo ka camo karama me Kato (Paska) i yo mu kene mapat ki ma giciko con. Kadi bed kumeno, Kejekia olego pigi, kun wacci, “In Rwot maber tim kica ki dano acel acel" 
2Chronicles30:19 ma oketo cwinye ka bino bot Lubaŋa, Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarine, kadi bed pe ogwoko cik me kabedo maleŋ ma mako lok kom lonnye.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Rwot owinyo dog Kejekia, ci ocaŋo lwak." 
2Chronicles30:21 Ci jo Icrael ducu ma onoŋo gitye i Jerucalem i kare meno gucako kwero nino madito me Mugati ma Tobi Pe Iye ki yomcwiny madwoŋ pi nino abiro; kun Lulevi ki ajwagi gubedo ka pako Rwot nino ki nino, ma giwero wer bot Rwot ki tekgi ducu." 
2Chronicles30:22 Kejekia oloko lok me cuko cwiny bot Lulevi ducu ma gunyuto diro maber i tic pa Rwot. Kit meno lwak gubedo ka cam me kwero nino madito pi nino abiro, kun gityero gityer lakwecwiny-gu, ma gimiyo pwoc bot Lubaŋa pa kwarigi." 
2Chronicles30:23 Lacen lwak ducu ma gucokke guye lawaŋacel me medde ki kwero nino madito pi nino abiro mukene; ci gumedde kwede kit meno ki yomcwiny madwoŋ pi nino abiro mukene. 
2Chronicles30:24 Onono Kejekia kabaka me Juda omiyo twoni alip acel ki romi alip abiro bot lwak ma gucokke pi gityer. Ka dok rwodine bene gumiyo twoni alip acel ki romi alip apar bot lwak ma gucokke. Omiyo ajwagi mapol gulonnye kengi. 
2Chronicles30:25 Lwak jo Juda ducu ma i cokke, kacel ki ajwagi ki Lulevi, medo ki jo ma i cokke ma gua ki i lobo Icrael, kadi wa lubedo ma gua ki i lo bo Icrael, kacel ki jo ma gin lubedo ma gibedo i Juda, ducu gubedo ki yomcwiny madit." 
2Chronicles30:26 Kit meno lwak gubedo ki yomcwiny madit i Jerucalem, pien nia wa i kare pa Solomon ma wod pa Daudi kabaka me Icrael onoŋo gin macalo man kulu pe onen i Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles30:27 Lacen ajwagi ki Lulevi gua malo gucuŋ ci gumiyo gum ki lwak, Lubaŋa owinyo dwangi, dok legagi bene oo bote i kabedone maleŋ ma i polo." 
2Chronicles31:1 Ka man otum, jo Icrael ducu ma onoŋo gitye gucito i gaŋi ducu ma i Juda gucako ŋido wir jogi woko i dul matitino, gutoŋo yadi ducu ma yam gicomo pi woro jok ma dako ma gilwoŋo Acera, ki waŋ jogi ma i wi godi kacel ki keno tyer ducu ma gunoŋo i Juda, Benjamin, Epraim ki Manace, nio ka gubologi woko ducu. Lacen lwak jo Icrael ducu gucako dok i gaŋigi, kun dano acel acel odok i pacone kikome." 
2Chronicles31:2 Kejekia ocako keto ajwagi ki Lulevi i dul ticgi, oketogi i dul ki dul, ŋat acel acel macalo ticce tye, ma gin ajwagi ki Lulevi ticgi obedo me tyero gitum awaŋa ki gityer lakwecwiny, kun gitiyo bene i dog gaŋ mapatpat me ot pa Rwot pi miyo pwoc ki pak." 
2Chronicles31:3 Jami ma kabaka okwanyo me amiya ki i kom jamine kikome obedo pi gitum awaŋa-gu: gitum awaŋa me odiko ki me otyeno, ki gitum awaŋa pi cabit-gu, por dwe, ki pi nino madito ma giciko, ma gilubo kit macalo gicoyo i cik pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles31:4 En bene ociko lwak ducu ma gibedo i Jerucalem ni gumi dul ma giciko me amiya bot ajwagi ki Lulevi, wek gumi kwogi me tiyo ticgi kun gilubo cik pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles31:5 Cutcut ma cik man oket oromo i lobo ducu, ci jo Icrael gucako miyo jami mapol ata, bel me wi mwaka, kono yino, moo, moo kic ki kit jami mukene ducu ma guceko i pottigi; dok gukelo acel me apar me jami acel acel madwoŋ makato." 
2Chronicles31:6 Lwak jo Icrael ki jo Juda ma gibedo i gaŋi me Juda bene gukelo acel me apar me dyaŋi ki romi, ki jami mukene ma gityeko dyerogi bot Rwot Lubaŋagi, ci gubakogi lipim i odur mapol." 
2Chronicles31:7 Gucako pano jami magi i odur ki odur i dwe me adek, ci gutyeko paijogi i dwe me abiro." 
2Chronicles31:8 Ka Kejekia ki rwodi gubino guneno odur me jami ma gipaŋo, ci gupwoyo Rwot kacel ki lwakke jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles31:9 Kejekia openyo ajwagi ki Lulevi pi odur magi. 
2Chronicles31:10 Ci Ajaria ajwaka madit, ma en dano me ot pa Jadok, odokke iye ni, “Nia ma lwak gucako kelo jami me motgi i ot pa Rwot pe tye gin mo ma orem; wabedo ka camo cam muromo dok mudoŋŋe obedo pol ata; pien Rwot omiyo gum ki jone, en aye meno mumiyo watye ki lwak cam man ducu mudoŋ.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Kejekia dok ocikogi ni guyub kicika mogo i ot-pa Rwot; ci cut giyubo. 
2Chronicles31:12 Lwak gukelo gityer me motgi, acel me apar ki jami ma gidyero, ducu gukelo ki cwinygi ducu. Rwot madit ma loyo wigi obedo Konania ma en Lalevi, ki ominne Cimei obedo ŋat ma lube," 
2Chronicles31:13 kun giketo Jekiel, Ajajia, Nakat, Acael, Jerimot, Jojabad, Eliel, Icmakia, Makat, ki Benaya me bedo lunen-tic pi konyo Konania ki ominne Cimei. Jo magi kabaka Kejekia ki Ajaria ma en ladit ma loyo tic i ot pa Lubaŋa en aye guyerogi." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kore ma wod pa Imla ma Lalevi giketo en lagwok dog gaŋ ma yo tuŋ wokceŋ; en ticce obedo me loyo gityer ma ic pwoyo bot Lubaŋa, me poko tyer ma gimiyo bot Rwot ki gityer maleŋ makato." 
2Chronicles31:15 Eden, Miniamin, Yecwa, Cemaya, Amaria ki Cekania aye gubedo ka konyo en ki gen madit i gaŋi pa ajwagi, pi poko dul jami bot utmegigi, jo muteggi ki-jo matino ducu ma romrom kun lubo dul ticgi," 
2Chronicles31:16 pe lu bo kit ma gicoyogi i buk me tekwaro. Gipoko bot co ma ditogi romo pyeradek dok kwede malo, jo ducu ma gidonyo i ot pa Rwot kit macalo tic me nino acel acel tye kwede, ma gitiyo tic ma lubo dog ticgi ki dul ticgi." 
2Chronicles31:17 Gicoyo ajwagi kun lubo dog odi pa kwarogi; ento Lulevi cakke i kom dano ma ditte mwaka pyeraryo dok kwede malo olu bo dog tic megi ki dul ticgi. 
2Chronicles31:18 Gicoyo ajwagi kacel ki jo ducu ma tye botgi, mongi, awobe, ki anyiragi, ki lwakgi ducu; pien onoŋo gubedo lugen kun gigwokke kengi pi bedo maleŋ." 
2Chronicles31:19 Doŋ pi likwayo pa Aron, ajwagi ma onoŋo gibedo i lobo ma orumo gaŋigi, giyero nyiŋ co mogo ki i gaŋigi acel acel bene me poko dul jami mogo bot laco acel acel ma i kin ajwagi, ki bot dano acel acel ma i kin Lulevi ma gityeko coyo eno" 
2Chronicles31:20 Kejekia otiyo ticce kit meno oromo i lobo Juda ducu; en obedo ka tiyo gin maber, ma nen atir ki ma nyuto gen i nyim Rwot Lubaŋane," 
2Chronicles31:21 Kit tic acel acel ma en obedo ka tiyone ma mako tic i ot pa Lubaŋa ma lubo cik ki gin ma giciko ducu, otiyo ki cwinye ducu, dok obedo ka yenyo Lubaŋane; ticce owoto maber twatwal." 
2Chronicles32:1 I ŋe lok magi ki tic magi ducu me gen-gu, Cenakerib kabaka me Aciria obino ka lweny i gaŋi ducu me Juda ma girumogi ki cel gogo, kun otamo me loyogi woko wek gubed mere." 
2Chronicles32:2 Ka Kejekia oneno ni Cenakerib otyeko bino ma mito lweny i kom Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles32:3 ocako bedo ki yub gin ki rwodine kacel ki oteka lweny ducu me juko wan pii ma i ŋe gaŋ; ci gin gukonye. 
2Chronicles32:4 Ci lwak mapol gucokke, gucako juko wan it kacel ki ora kulu ma yam piine mol wok ki i lobo meno, kun giwacci, “Piŋo waweko luker me Aciria gibino kany gilimo pii madwoŋ?”" 
2Chronicles32:5 En ocako tic matek cut ci ogero cel matek ma yam orette woko piny-nyi, ka dok oketo lubele i wiye, ki yo tuŋ wokone ogero cel mukene; ci omiyo Millo ma en kabedo ma i gaŋ kal pa Daudi ocuŋ matek, En bene otiyo jami lweny ki kwodi mapol ata," 
2Chronicles32:6 Ka dok ocako keto ludito luwi mony me loyo lwak, ocokogi ducu kacel i kabedo mo malac ma i nyim dog gaŋ, ci oloko botgi lok me cuko cwiny, kun wacci," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Wubed tek dok jo macir. Pe wubed lwor, cwinywu bene pe myero oballe i nyim kabaka me Aciria ki lwak ducu ma tye kacel kwede; pien ŋat madit makato en tye kwedwa," 
2Chronicles32:8 En tye ki dul mony pa dano ma gigeno tekogi; ento wan watye ki Rwot Lubaŋawa ma konyowa dok lwenyo piwa.” Lwak gucako bedo ki gen pi lok pa Kejekia kabaka me Juda. 
2Chronicles32:9 Lacen Cenakerib kabaka me Aciria kacel ki dul monnye ducu ma onoŋo gumonyo Lakic, ocwalo lukwenane gucito i Jerucalem bot Kejekia kabaka me Juda ki lwak ducu me Juda ma onoŋo gitye i Jerucalem, kun giwacci," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Cenakerib, kabaka me Aciria, owaco kuman ni, ‘In ijeŋo genni i kom gin aŋo, ma miyo pud icuŋ matek i Jerucalemmi?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Kejekia mono pe tye ka umo waŋwu wek wuto woko ki kec kacel ki orwo pii, ma noŋo en tito botwu ni, “Rwot Lubaŋawa tika bilarowa ki i cin kabaka me Aciria”?" 
2Chronicles32:12 En Kejekia acel-li aye pe ojwero waŋ jogine ma i wi godi kacel ki keno tyerre woko ducu, kun ociko jo Juda ki jo Jerucalem ni, “Myero wubed ka woro Lubaŋa i nyim keno tyer acel keken, dok wuwaŋ gitum mewu iye”?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Tika wun wuŋeyo gin ma an kacel ki kwarina watyeko tiyone i kom lwak ducu me lo bo mukene? Wuneno lwak lubaŋa pa rok me lobo magi gutwero laro lwak me lobo meno ki i ciŋa? 
2Chronicles32:14 Tye lubaŋa mo acel ki i kin lwak lubaŋa mukene-ni ma yam kwarina gujwero wo ko liweŋ-ŋi ‘ma twero laro lwakke ki i ciŋa, mumiyo wutamo ni Lubaŋawu bene twero larowu ki i ciŋa?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Pi meno, kombeddi pe wuwek Kejekia obwolwu nyo oum waŋwu kit man, dok pe wuye lokke, pien pe tye lubaŋa me rok nyo ker mo ma yam olaro lwakke ki i ciŋa nyo ki i ciŋ kwarina. Ci Lubaŋawu bitwero larowu ki i ciŋa niŋniŋ?’ ”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Lukwena pa Cenakerib dok gumed de ki loko lok mapol i kom Rwot Lubaŋa ki i kom laticce Kejekia. 
2Chronicles32:17 Ci Cenakerib kikome ocoyo waraga ma nyuto cac madwoŋ i kom Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael ki loko 1ok marac i kome, kun wacci, “Kit macalo lwak lubaŋa me rok mukene pe gutwero laro lwakgi ki i ciŋa, ci Lubaŋa pa Kejekia bene pe bitwero laro lwakke ki i ciŋa.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Gucako daŋŋe i kom jo Jerucalem ma onoŋo gitye wi cel ki dwan maloŋo i leb pa Lujudaya, kun giburogi ma gimiyogi lworo, ka wek gima gaŋ pa jo Jerucalem woko." 
2Chronicles32:19 Gubedo ka loko lok i kom Lubaŋa pa jo Jerucalem kit macalo koŋ gubedo ka loko i kom lwak lubaŋa pa lurok me wi lobo-ni, ma dano aye gutiyogi ki ciŋgi." 
2Chronicles32:20 Lacen kabaka Kejekia kacel ki lanebi Icaya, wod pa Amoj, gulego pi lok man kun gicwalo kokogi i polo." 
2Chronicles32:21 Ci Rwot ocwalo lamalaika cut, ma otyeko twoni oteka lweny ki ludito wi mony ki ludito mukene woko ducu ki i gony pa kabaka me Aciria, Kit meno en odok i lobone ki lewic ma waŋe olwal woko. I kare ma en obino odonyo i ot pa lubaŋane, litinone ma en onywalogi gutone ki pala lucwan guneke woko kenyo." 
2Chronicles32:22 Meno en aye kit ma Rwot olaro kwede Kejekia ki jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem ki i ciŋ Cenakerib kabaka me Aciria, ka dok ki i ciŋ lumerokgi ducu. Rwot omiyogi yweyo i kabedo ducu." 
2Chronicles32:23 Jo mapol gucako kelo mot mapol bot Rwot i Jerucalem kun gikelo bene jami mabeco me wel bot Kejekia kabaka me Juda; cakke i kare meno wot kwede anyim gimiye woro madit twatwal i nyim rok me lobo ducu. 
2Chronicles32:24 I kare meno two omako Kejekia ma onoŋo cok to woko, ci olego Rwot; Rwot odokke iye kun omiye lanyut." 
2Chronicles32:25 Ento Kejekia pe otimo gin mo macalo adwoggi me gin maber ma gitiyo bote, pien obedo ki wakke i cwinye. Pi meno akemo omako Rwot i kome kacel ki jo Juda ki jo Jerucalem."
