2Chronicles32:26 Ento Kejekia omwolle kene oweko wakke ma i cwinye, en kacel ki jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem, omiyo akemo pa Rwot pe obino i komgi i kare pa Kejekia." 
2Chronicles32:27 Kejekia onoŋo tye ki lonyo kacel ki yweka madwoŋ mada. En ogero ot kano lim pi keto ryal, jabu, litino godi me wel, aŋwece, kwodi ki pi jami me wel-gu ducu." 
2Chronicles32:28 Ogoyo bene dero me kano cam, ka ma en keto iye bel, koŋo vino, ki moo, ogoyo bene dwol pi kit kwa dyaŋ i ducu, ki dwol romi bene." 
2Chronicles32:29 En ogero gaŋi mapol pire kene, ocoko romi ki dyaŋi mapol ata; pien Lubaŋa onoŋo omiye jami madwoŋ twatwal." 
2Chronicles32:30 En Kejekia acel-li aye oloro wan pii ma tye yo tuŋ malo ka ma pii ma a i Gikon mol kato kwede woko, en dok oyubo omiyo pii omol okemo yo tuŋ potoceŋ i ŋet gaŋ kal pa Daudi. Kejekia obedo ki gum maber kacel ki lonyo i kom ticce ducu ma en otiyo." 
2Chronicles32:31 Doŋ i lok ma dok i kom lukwena pa luker me Babilon, ma gicwalogi bote me penyo en pi lanyut ma onoŋo Lubaŋa otiyo i lobone, Lubaŋa oweko gire pire kene, pi temo en ki pi ŋeyo lok ducu ma tye i cwinve." 
2Chronicles32:32 Lok kom Kejekia mudoŋŋe ducu, ki tic mabeco ma en otiyo, nen, gityeko coyone i lok kom ginanyuta ma lanebi Icaya wod pa Amoj oneno, i buk pa Luker me luca ki Icrael." 
2Chronicles32:33 Kejekia oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine ci giyike i lyel ma malo ma i kin lyel pa likwayo pa Daudi. Jo Juda ki jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem ducu gumiye deyo i kare me tone. Ci wode Manace aye oleyo ka tyene." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manace ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte romo apar wiye aryo, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyerabic wiye abic." 
2Chronicles33:2 Manace obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot, kun lubo kwede tim mer kwer pa rok ducu ma yam Rwot oryemogi woko ki i nyim jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles33:3 En dok oroco waŋ jogi ma i wi godi, ogero odoco ka ma yam wonne Kejekia ojwerogi woko-ni. Ocano keno tyer pi lwak Baal-gu, ka dok ocomo yadi pi woro Acera ma jok ma dako-ni, ocako woro mony ma i polo ducu, kun tiyo botgi." 
2Chronicles33:4 Dok ocano keno tyer pa jogi-gu i ot pa Rwot, ka ma yam Rwot owacci, “Abiketo nyiŋa bedo i Jerucalem matwal.”" 
2Chronicles33:5 Ka dok ocano lwak keno tyer pa mony ma i polo ducu i dyekal aryo me ot pa Rwot. 
2Chronicles33:6 Ocako wano awobene ki mac me gityer i nota pa wod pa Kinom, dok obedo ka tyet ki ajaa ki ŋiyo i dyel-gu kun uyo ki lutal ki lukor tipo-gu ki megi jogi. Obedo ka tiya gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot, kun miyo kiniga mako Rwot." 
2Chronicles33:7 Ka dok omiyo gipayo cal jok, ocibo i ot pa Lubaŋa, ma yam Lubaŋa owaco i kome bot Daudi ki bot wode Solomon ni, “I ot man, ki i Jerucalem, ma yam ayero ki i kin kaka ma i Icrael ducu, abiketo nyiŋa bedo iye matwal." 
2Chronicles33:8 Pe doŋ abimiyo tyen jo Icrael bedo ka wirre woko i ŋe lobo ma yam amiyo bot kwariwu-ni, tekke gibigwokke gilubo kit lok ducu ma atyeko cikogi kwede, kun gilubo cik ducu ma yam laticca Moses ocikogi kwede.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Manace obito jo Juda ki jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem, omiyo gubedo ka timo gin marac, makato lurok ma Rwot yam ojwerogi woko ki i nyim jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles33:10 Rwot oloko ki Manace kacel ki lwakke, ento gin pe guwinyo lokke." 
2Chronicles33:11 Pi meno Rwot ocwalo ludito ma loyo mony pa kabaka me Aciria, gumako Manace ki goli, gutweye ki nyor mola ci gutere kwede i Babilon." 
2Chronicles33:12 I kare ma en tye i can obako doge, olego kica ki bot Rwot Lubaŋane ci omwolle kene mada i nyim Lubaŋa pa kwarine." 
2Chronicles33:13 En olego, ci Lubaŋa owinyo legane dok owinyo lega me bako doge, ka ocako dwoko en doki i Jerucalem i kerre kikome. Ci Manace oneyo atir ni Rwot aye Lubaŋa." 
2Chronicles33:14 Lacen en ogero cel ma woko me gaŋ kal pa Daudi ki yo tuŋ potoceŋ me Gikon, i nota, ogero oo wa i yo ma wok ki i dog gaŋ ma gilwoŋo ni dog gaŋ me Rec, orumo ki Opel, ogero ma ocudo malo likuŋ; dok bene oketo ludito ma loyo mony i gaŋi ducu ma girumo ki cel gogo ma i Juda." 
2Chronicles33:15 En ojwero lwak lubaŋa me rok-gu kacel ki cal jok-gu woko ki i ot pa Rwot, ka dok omuko keno tyer ducu ma yam en ocano ka ma gigero iye ot pa Rwot, ki ma onoŋo gitye i Jerucalem, ocokogi ducu obologi woko i ŋe gaŋ," 
2Chronicles33:16 En dok ocano keno tyer pa Rwot odoco, ka otyero iye gitum me gityer lakwecwiny ki gityer me miyo pwoc; ci ociko jo Juda me woro Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
2Chronicles33:17 Lwak pud gumedde ki tyero gitum i wi godi, ento gityerogi bot Rwot Lubaŋagi keken." 
2Chronicles33:18 Lok kom Manace mudoŋŋe ducu, legane bot Lubaŋane, ki lok pa lunene ma guloko bote i nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael," 
2Chronicles33:19 ki lagam me legane ma Lubaŋa odwoko bote, balle ki kit ma en onayo kwede waŋ Rwot, ki kabedo ma en ogero iye waŋ jogi i wi godi, ka doŋ ocibo lwak yadi me woro Acera ma jok ma dako-ni, ki cal jogine ma ocibo ma onoŋo pud peya omwolle kene, nen, gityeko coyone i buk Lok pa Lunen." 
2Chronicles33:20 Kit meno Manace oto, oywe kacel ki kwarine, ci giyike i ode; wode Amon aye oleyo ka tyene." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amon ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeraryo wiye aryo, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka aryo." 
2Chronicles33:22 Amon obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot, kit macalo wonne Manace obedo ka tiyo. Amon obedo ka tyero gitum bot cal lubaŋa-gu ma yam wonne Manace otiyo, kun worogi bene." 
2Chronicles33:23 En pe omwolle kene i nyim Rwot, kit macalo wonne Manace yam omwolle kwede, ento Amon obedo ka tiŋo alii makato teretere." 
2Chronicles33:24 Luticce gupiro lok i kome, ci guneko en woko i ode." 
2Chronicles33:25 Ento lwak me lo bo-nu guneko jo ducu ma onoŋo gupiro lok i kom kabaka Amon; ci gin lwak me lobo-nu guketo wode Yocia me bedo kabaka ma kakare. 
2Chronicles34:1 Yocia ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte aboro, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka pyeradek wiye acel." 
2Chronicles34:2 Y ocia obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen atir i waŋ Rwot, obedo ka lubo kit pa kwarone Daudi ducu, pe obedo ka cabbe yo tuŋ acuc nyo yo tuŋ acam." 
2Chronicles34:3 I mwaka me aboro me locce, ma onoŋo en pud awobi matidi, Yocia ocako keto cwinye ka yenyo Lubaŋa pa kwarone Daudi; ki i mwaka me apar wiye aryone ocako lonyo Juda ki Jerucalem kun omuko waŋ jogi ma i wi godi woko ducu, ojwero yadi ma gicomo pi woro jok Acera ducu, ki cal ma gipayo, ki cal jogi ma gicweyo-gu ducu." 
2Chronicles34:4 Omiyo gimuko keno tyer pa lwak Baal-gu ducu ma en neno; ka dok omuko keno tyer ma gucudo malo i wigi ka ma giwaŋo iye odok eceta, Ci dok ojwero yadi me woro jok Acera ducu, ki cal apaya, ki cal jogi ma giliyo aliya, onidogi woko matitino, ka orego odoko apwa, ka ocako onyone i wi lyel pa jo ma yam gubedo ka tyero gityer bot cal jogi magi." 
2Chronicles34:5 En bene owaŋo cogo pa ajwagi i wi keno tyergi, pi lonyo Juda ki Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles34:6 Ki i gaŋi pa jo Manace, Epraim ki Cimeon, nio kwede wa i gaŋi pa jo Naputali, ki i wi oburgi murumo kenyo," 
2Chronicles34:7 en omuko keno tyer pa jogi, ki cal jok Acera-gu ducu, ki cal jogi mukene, oluro matitino twatwal, ka dok omuko bene lwak keno tyer ka ma giwaŋo iye odok eceta ki i lobo Icrael ducu. Ka lacen odok cen i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles34:8 I mwaka me apar wiye aboro me locce, ma doŋ onoŋo en otyeko kwanyo gin marac woko ki i lo bo kacel ki i ot pa Lubaŋa Yocia ocwalo Capan wod pa Ajalia, ki Maaceya laloc me gaŋ, ki Joa wod pa Joakaj, ma en laco lok ma timme, ka yubo ot pa Rwot Lubaŋane." 
2Chronicles34:9 Gubino bot Ilkia ajwaka madit ci gumiyo bote lim ma yam gikelo i ot pa Lubaŋa, ma Lulevi ki lukur doggola yam gujogo ki bot jo Manace ki Epraim dok ki bot jo Icrael ducu mudoŋ, ki bot jo Juda ki Benjamin ducu, ki bot jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles34:10 Gumiyo lim man bot ludito tic i ot pa Rwot; ci gin lutic magi ma gitiyo i ot pa Rwot gumiyo lim man pi yubo ot pa Rwot ka ma oballe, ki rocone odoco." 
2Chronicles34:11 Gumiyo lim man bot lu pa-bao ki bot lugedo wek guwil ki godi ma gipayo, ki me wilo yadi pi gin latwe bao, ki pi rii pi odi ducu ma yam luker me Juda guweko oballe odoko wi obur-ni." 
2Chronicles34:12 Ci co magi gutiyo tic ki gen. Jo ma loyogi onoŋo giketo Jakat ki Obadia ma gin Lulevi, ma jo me ot pa Merari, ki Jekaria ki Meculam, ma jo me ot pa Kokat, giketogi me bedo lulo dog tic i ot pa Rwot. Lulevi ducu ma yam guŋiyo ki jami me wer" 
2Chronicles34:13 giketogi me bedo lulo jo ma tiŋo yec, ma dok bene ticgi me cuŋu dano i dog tic mapatpat; Lulevi mukene gubedo lucoc, lunyampara ki lugwok doggola ot pa Lubaŋa." 
2Chronicles34:14 I kare ma gitye ka kwanyo lim ma onoŋo gikelo i ot pa Rwot, ci Ilkia ajwaka madit otugi noŋo buk me cik pa Rwot ma yam omiyo ki Moses," 
2Chronicles34:15 Cutcut Ilkia owaco bot Capan ma karan ni, “Atyeko noŋo buk me cik i ot pa Rwot.” Ilkia ocako miyo buk man bot Capan." 
2Chronicles34:16 Capan okelo buk man bot kabaka, ka omedde ki tito lok bot kabaka ni, “Tic ducu ma iciko ni luticci guti, gin gitye ka tiyone." 
2Chronicles34:17 Gukwanyo lim ma gunoŋo i ot pa Rwot gumiyo i ciŋ lulo dog tic ki lutic.” 
2Chronicles34:18 Ka dok Capan karan otito bot kabaka ni, “Ajwaka Ilkia otyeko miya buk mo.” Ci Capan ocako kwanone i nyim kabaka." 
2Chronicles34:19 Ka kabaka owinyo lok me cik, ci oyeco boŋŋine woko." 
2Chronicles34:20 Omiyo kabaka ociko Ilkia, Akikam wod pa Capan, Abudon wod pa Mika, Capan ma karan, ki Acaya ma latic pa kabaka, kun waco ni," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Wucit, wupeny dog Rwot pira ki pi jo ma gudoŋ i Icrael ki i Juda, pi lok ma i buk man ma gityeko nono-ni, Akemo pa Rwot kara olyetto i komwa matek, pien kwariwa pe gubedo ka woro lok ducu ma i buk man, pi tic kwede i kit ducu ma yam gicoyo kwede ma mako komwa.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Kit meno Ilkia kacel ki jo ma kabaka ocwalogi gucito bot Kulda ma lanebi ma dako ma cware Calum wod pa Tokat, ma wod pa Kacra, ma lagwok boŋŋi pa kabaka. Dako-nu onoŋo bedo i Jerucalem i dul gaŋ ma gilwoŋo Dul gaŋ me Aryone; ci guloko kwede lok i kom gin mutimme." 
2Chronicles34:23 En owaco botgi ni, “Rwot Lubaŋa owaco ku man ni, ‘Wutit ki dano ma ocwalowu bota ni," 
2Chronicles34:24 Rwot owaco kuman ni, Nen ba, abikelo gin marac poto i kom kabedo man, ki i kom jo ma gibedo iye, pi co bo lok ducu ma giceno ki dano ina gicoyoi buk ma gikwano i nyim kabaka me Juda." 
2Chronicles34:25 Gin gutyeko bwota woko kun giwaŋo odok eceta bot lwak lubaŋa mukene, wek gimi kiniga obed ka maka pi jogi ducu ma gitiyo ki ciŋgi-ni. Pienno akemona bilyetto matek i kom kabedo man ma pe doŋ bikwe." 
2Chronicles34:26 Ento lok ma dok i kom kabaka me Juda ma ocwalowu ka penyo dog Rwot, wun wubiwacce kit man ni, Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco kit man ni, i kom lok ma iwinyo-ni," 
2Chronicles34:27 doŋ ityeko ŋut ki i cwinyi ci imwolle keni i nyim Rwot i kare ma iwinyo lok ma yam aloko i kom kabedo man ki i kom jo ma gibedo iye, imwolle woko keni i nyima, ci icako yeco boŋŋini woko kun ikok kwede i nyima; pienno an bene atyeko winyo kokoni, man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
2Chronicles34:28 Nen ba, an abidwoki i kin kwarini, ci gibiyiki i lyelli ki kuc, dok waŋi pe bineno gin marac ducu ma abikelo i kom kabedo man ki i kom jo ma gibedo iye.’ ” Ci gin gudwoko lok bot kabaka." 
2Chronicles34:29 I ŋe meno kabaka ocwalo kwena bot ludoŋo me Juda ki me Jerucalem ci gucokke kacel. 
2Chronicles34:30 Kabaka ocako cito i ot pa Rwot kacel ki jo Juda ducu, jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem ajwagi kacel ki Lulevi ki lwak ducu, jo madito ki jo matino; ci okwano botgi buk me gicikke ma ginoŋo i ot pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles34:31 Kabaka ocuŋ i kabedone ocako keto gicikke i nyim Rwot ni, ebilubo gin ma Rwot mito dok ebigwoko cikke ki gin ma en ociko ducu, ki cwinye ducu, ki tipone ducu, kun etiyo lok me gicikke ma gicoyo i buk meno." 
2Chronicles34:32 En ociko dano ducu ma onoŋo gitye i Jerucalem ki i Benjamin i kare meno ni gulub gicikke meno. Jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem gubedo ka lubo gicikke pa Lubaŋa, ma Lubaŋa pa kwarigi." 
2Chronicles34:33 Ka dok Yocia ojwero jami me kipyeda woko ducu ma i dul lobo ducu pa jo Icrael, omiyo jo ducu ma i Icrael guworo Rwot Lubaŋagi, I karene ducu pe gulokke guweko lubo kor Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarigi." 
2Chronicles35:1 Yocia okwero nino madit me Kato (Paska) pa Rwot i Jerucalem. Ci guneko litino romi me Kato (Paska) i nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen me dwe mukwoŋo. 
2Chronicles35:2 En oyero ajwagi ci oketogi i dog ticgi, dok ocuko cwinygi i kom tic ma i ot pa Rwot." 
2Chronicles35:3 Dok owaco bot Lulevi ma gin aye gupwonyo jo Icrael ducu-ni, ma gin jo maleŋ i nyim Rwot, ni, “Wuket canduk maleŋ i ot ma Solomon wod pa Daudi, kabaka me Icrael, yam ogero; pe myero dok wubed ka tinone i wi gwokwu. Wun doŋ wuti bot Rwot Lubaŋawu ki lwakke jo Icrael." 
2Chronicles35:4 Wuyubbe kun wulubo dog odi pa kwariwu ki dulwu, kun wulubo bene gin ma yam Daudi kabaka me ‘Icrael ociko ki gin ma wode Solomon ociko." 
2Chronicles35:5 Dok wucuŋ i kabedo maleŋ, wucuŋ kun wulubo dog odi pa kwari utmegiwu ma gin jo me lobo-ni, kun dul acel acel pa Lulevi ocuŋ pi dog ot acel acel pa lwak." 
2Chronicles35:6 Kit meno doŋ wunek litino romi me Kato (Paska), wulonnye kenwu, wuyub gin ma mitte pi utmegiwu, wek gulub lok pa Rwot ma Moses ociko.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Yocia omiyo litino romi ki litino dyegi alip pyeradek, ki twoni alip adek, bot lwak pi gityer me Kato (Paska) pi lwak jo ducu ma onoŋo gitye kenyo. Jami magi ducu jami ma oa i kom jami pa kabaka." 
2Chronicles35:8 Ki rwodi bene gumiyo gin ma cwinygi opwoyo bot lwak, bot ajwagi ki bot Lulevi. Ilkia, Jekaria ki Jekiel, ma gin ludito ma giloyo tic ma i ot pa Lubaŋa, gumiyo bot ajwagi litino romi ki dyegi alip aryo ki miya abicel ki twoni miya adek me gityer me Kato (Paska)." 
2Chronicles35:9 Konania ki omegine, ki Cemaya ki Netanel, ki Kacabia, Jeyel ki. Jojabad, ma gin ludito pa Lulevi, gumiyo litino romi ki dyegi alip abic, ki twoni miya abic, bot Lulevi me gityer me Kato (Paska)." 
2Chronicles35:10 I kare ma doŋ giyubo jami ducu kakare, ajwagi gucako cuŋ i kabedogi, ki Lulevi bene gucuŋ i dul ki dul i dog ticgi kun gin ducu gilubo gin ma kabaka ociko." 
2Chronicles35:11 Guneko litino romi me Kato (Paska), ci ajwagi ticgi obedo me coro remo ma gigamo ki bot Lulevi ina gitye ka yaŋo riŋo." 
2Chronicles35:12 I kare ma gitimo man giketo dul mukene me gitum awaŋa cen, ma gibipoko i kin lwak kun gilubo dog odi pa kwarigi, wek gutyer bot Rwot, macalo gicoyo i buk pa Moses. Ci gutiyo ki twoni bene kit meno." 
2Chronicles35:13 Gubulo litino romi me Kato (Paska) ki mac kun gilubo cik ma yam giciko; ento jami me gityer maleŋ gutedo ateda ki otako ki agulu, ki cupuriya, ka gucako tinone gutyero bot lwak oyotoyot." 
2Chronicles35:14 I ne meno gubedo ka yubo jami pigi kengi ki pi ajwagi, pien ajwagi ma gin likwayo pa Aron onoŋo gitye ki tic madwoŋ twatwal me waŋo gitum awaŋa-gu ki moo dwolo-gu nio wa i wor, Kit meno Lulevi guyubo jami pigi kengi ki pi ajwagi bene ma gin likwayo pa Aron." 
2Chronicles35:15 Likwayo pa Acap ma gin luwer, gubedo i kabedogi macalo Daudi, Acap, Keman, ki Jedutun ma lanen pa kabaka onoŋo guciko; ki lugwok doggola ot pa Rwot ducu gubedo i doggola acel acel. Pe gumito weko ticgi pien guniaŋ ni utmegigi ma Lulevi gubedo ka yubbe pigi bene." 
2Chronicles35:16 Meno aye kit ma giyubo ki tic pa Rwot i nino-nu, pi kwero nino madit me Kato (Paska) ki pi tyero gitum awaŋa i kom keno tyer pa Rwot, kun gilubo lok ma kabaka Yocia ociko," 
2Chronicles35:17 Jo Icrael ducu ma onoŋo gitye kunnu gukwero nino madit me Kato (Paska) i kare meno, ki dok gukwero bene nino madito me Mugati ma Tobi Pe Iye pi nino abiro." 
2Chronicles35:18 Pe tye nino mo madit me Kato (Paska) ma gikwero kit man i Icrael nia i kare pa lanebi Camuel. Dok pe tye laker mo i kin luker me Icrael ma yam okwero nino me Kato (Paska) macalo Yocia okwero, kacel ki ajwagi ki Lulevi, jo Juda ki jo Jerucalem ducu ma onoŋo gubedo tye, ki jo ducu ma gibedo i Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles35:19 I mwaka me apar wiye aboro me loc pa Yocia en aye gikwero iye nino man madit me Kato (Paska). 
2Chronicles35:20 I ŋe man ducu, ma doŋ Yocia otyeko yubo ot pa Lubaŋa, Neko kabaka me Ejipt ocito ka lweny i Karkemic ma cok ki kulu Euprate, ki Yociaa bene ocrto ka lweny i kome cut." 
2Chronicles35:21 Ento Neko ocwalo kwena bot Yocia ma guwacci, “Imito, watimme niŋniŋ: kaba ka me Juda? Tin an pe abino ka lweny i komi, ento abino ka lwenyo i kom jo ma atye ka lweny i komgi; dok Lubaŋa ociko me tiyo man oyotoyot. Wek pyem ki Lubaŋa ma tye kweda-ni miyo neki woko,”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Ento Yocia pe oloko ŋeye ki kabaka Neko, ci orukke macalo dano mo ata wek elweny kwede. Yocia pe owinyo lok pa Neko ma oa ki i dog Lubaŋa kadi ki acel ento ocerre ocito ka lweny kwede iba; Megido," 
2Chronicles35:23 Cutcut gutugi celo kabaka Yocia woko; ci kabaka owaco bot luticce ni, “Wukwanya woko ki i wan lweny, pien doŋ gutyeko keto ret marac twatwal, i, koma,”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Ci luticce gukwanye woko ki I gadigadine gukete i gadigadine me aryone ka gutere i Jerucalem. Yocia oto, ci giyike i lyel pa kwarine. Jo Juda ki jo Jerucalem ducu gukumo matek pi Yocia." 
2Chronicles35:25 Jeremia bene okok matek pi Yocia; co kacel ki mon ma gubedo ka wer guloko pi Yocia i kokogi cakke i kare ca nio wa onyoo. Guketo man odoko cik i Icrael ducu: nen gityeko coyone i buk me Koko. 
2Chronicles35:26 Lok kom Yocia mudoŋŋe ducu, ki tic mabeco ma en otiyo ducu kit ma gicoyo kwede i buk me cik pa Rwot," 
2Chronicles35:27 gin ma yam en otiyo ducu, nia i acakkine nio i agikkine, nen, gityeko coyone I buk pa Luker me Icrael ki me Juda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Lwak ma gin wegi lobo gukwa nyo Yekoakaj wod pa Yocia, ci guketo en kabaka me leyo ka tyen wonne i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yekoakaj ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeraryo wiye adek, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi dwe adek." 
2Chronicles36:3 Lacen Kabaka me Ejipt oryemo Yekoakaj woko ki i ker ka oketo wel ajog mapek i kom jo Juda i wel me kilo alip abic me ryal ki kile pyerabic me jabu. 
2Chronicles36:4 Kabaka me Ejipt oketo Eliakim omin Yekoakaj obedo kabaka me Juda ki me Jerucalem ci ocako loko nyiŋe Yekoyakim; ento Neko okwanyo Yekoakaj otero woko i Ejipt. 
2Chronicles36:5 Yekoyakim ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeraryo wiye abic, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka apar wiye acel. Obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot Lubaŋane," 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon obino ka lweny i kome, CI omake otweye ki nyor ka otere kwede woko i Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadnejar bene okwanyo jami mogo ki i kin jami ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Rwot oterogi i Babilon, ci oketogi i gaŋ kalle i Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:8 Lok kom Yekoyakim mudoŋŋe ducu, ki tim me kipyeda ducu ma yam otiyo, kacel ici lok ma ginoŋo i kome, nen, gityeko coyone i buk pa Luker me Icrael ki me Juda, Wode Yekoyakin aye oleyo ka tyene," 
2Chronicles36:9 Yekoyakin ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte aboro, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi dwe adek ki nino apar. Obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen marac i wan Rwot." 
2Chronicles36:10 I dog oro en aye Nebukadnejar ocwalo luticce ka ome ci gutere wa i Babilon. Otero wa jami mabeco ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Rwot. Ci oketo ominne Jedekia obedo kabaka me loyo jo Juda ki Jerucalem," 
2Chronicles36:11 Jedekia ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeraryo wiye acel, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka apar wiye acel." 
2Chronicles36:12 Obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot Lubaŋane. En pe omwolle i nyim lanebi Jeremia, ma oloko kwede lok ma oa ki bot Rwot." 
2Chronicles36:13 Jedekia bene ojemo i kom kabaka Nebukadnejar ma yam omiyo en ekwono kwon ki nyiŋ Lubaŋa; omiyo cwinye obedo nwaŋ ma pe mito lokke bot Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
2Chronicles36:14 Ajwagi ma gin lutel kacel ki lwak mukene-gu ducu pe gugeno Rwot matwal, gubedo ka lubo gin me kwer pa rok mukene, omiyo gubalo kwede ot pa Rwot wo ko ma yam Rwot otyeko lonyo obedo leŋ i Jerucalem." 
2Chronicles36:15 Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarigi, obedo ka cwalo lok botgi teretere kun oro lukwenane me tito botgi, pien kica omako en i kom lwakke ki pi kabedo mere;" 
2Chronicles36:16 ento gin gubedo ka ŋalo lukwena pa Lubaŋa, ma gicayo lokke-gu, dok gijwiyo lunebine bene, nio ka akemo omako Rwot i kom lwakke, ma gin mo ma romo jukone doŋ pe," 
2Chronicles36:17 Rwot ocako kela kabaka pa jo Kaldaya ka lweny i komgi, ci oneko awobe ki pala lucwan ki i kabedo maleŋ ma i ot pa Lubaŋa, pe obedo ki kica i kom awobi nyo nyako, jo muteggi nyo jo muti; magi ducu Lubaŋa omiyogi woko i ciŋe." 
2Chronicles36:18 Ki jami ducu ma yam gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Lubaŋa, jami madito ki matinone, ki lonyo ma gikano i ot pa Rwot, ki lonyo ma kabaka okano ki pa rwodine ducu, kabaka pa jo Kaldaya otero woko ducu i Babilon." 
2Chronicles36:19 Giwaŋo ot pa Lubaŋa woko, ka dok gimuko cel murumo Jerucalem, ci giwaŋo odi ma gibedo iye woko ducu ki mac, kun gibalo bene wa jami ma pigi tego," 
2Chronicles36:20 En otero jo ma guloyo ki i lak to i Babilon, ci gudoko opiine ki pa litinone nio ka ker me Percia ocuŋ matek." 
2Chronicles36:21 Man obedo pi cobo lok pa Rwot ma yam oloko ki i dog Jeremia, nio wan ma lobo otyeko kwero cabitte ducu. Pi kare ducu ma lobo giweko ata noŋo tye ka kwero karene me yweyo mot macalo i ceŋ cabit, nio ka wel mwaka ocobo kakare ma oromo pyerabiro." 
2Chronicles36:22 I mwaka mukwoŋo me loc pa Ciro kabaka me Percia, wek lok pa Rwot ma yam oloko ki i dog Jeremia ocobbe kakare, cutcut Rwot otugo cwiny Ciro kabaka me Percia omiyo en otito lok oromo i lobo ma i te kerre ducu. En ocoyo lok man bene ki waraga ni," 
2Chronicles36:23 “Ciro kabaka me Percia owaco kuman ni, ‘Rwot, ma en Lubaŋa me polo, otyeko miyo ker ducu ma i wi lobo i ciŋa, dok ocika ni ager ot pire i Jerucalem, ma tye i Juda. Bot ŋat mo keken ma i kinwu ma i kom lwakke ducu awaco ni, Rwot Lubaŋane myero obed kwede. Wek en oa ociti.’ ”" 
Ezra1:1 I mwaka mukwoŋo me loc pa Ciro kabaka me Percia, wek lok pa Rwot ma yam oloko ki i dog Jeremia ocobbe kakare, cutcut Rwot otugo cwiny Ciro kabaka me Percia omiyo en otito lok oromo i lobo ma i te kerre ducu. En ocoyo lok man bene ki waraga ni," 
Ezra1:2 “Ciro kabaka me Percia owaco kuman ni, Rwot, ma en Lubaŋa me polo, otyeko miyo ker ducu ma i wi lobo i ciŋa, dok ocika ni ager ot pire i Jerucalem ma tye i Juda." 
Ezra1:3 Bot ŋat mo keken ma i kinwu ma i kom lwakke ducu awaco ni, Lubaŋane myero obed kwede. Wek en oa ocit i Jerucalem, ma tye i Juda, ka gero ot pa Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, en Lubaŋa ma gaŋ kalle Jerucalem." 
Ezra1:4 Pienno dano acel acel ma pud odoŋ i kabedo mo ma en bedo iye, wek jo ma i kabedo meno gumiye kony me ryal ki jabu, kacel ki jami-gu ki lim makwo, kun gimedo i kom gityer ma igi opwoyo ma gimiyo pi ot pa Lubaŋa ma tye i Jerucalem.”" 
Ezra1:5 Ludito ma giloyo dog odi pa kwarogi ma tye i kaka pa Juda ki Benjamin, kacel ki ajwagi ki Lulevi ma Lubaŋa otugo cwinygi, gucako yubbe me cito ka gero ot pa Rwot ma tye Jerucalem odoco." 
Ezra1:6 Jo ducu murumogi gumiyogi kony me jami me ryal, jabu, ki lwak jami mapatpat, kacel ki lim makwo-gu, ki mot ma welgi doŋo, medo i kom lim ducu ma dano gutyero ma cwinygi opwoyo me miyone." 
Ezra1:7 Kabaka Ciro bene okwanyo jami ma yam gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Rwot woko ma yam Nebukadnejar oyako ki i Jerucalem ci otero oketo i ot jok pa lwak lubaŋane," 
Ezra1:8 Ciro kaba ka me Percia okelogi ci omiyogi i cin Mitredat ma lakan lim, en ma okwano lwak jami meno ducu i nyim Cecbajar ma en rwot me Juda." 
Ezra1:9 Wel jami onoŋo yam tye kit man: Becen me jabu alip acel, becen me ryal alip acel, ata bo weer me waŋo odok eceta pyeraryo wiye aboŋwen," 
Ezra1:10 atabo me jabu pyeradek, atabo me ryal alip aryo ki miya aŋwen ki apar, ki jami mukene alip acel;" 
Ezra1:11 jami me jabu ki me ryal ducu oromo alip abic ki miya aŋwen ki pyerabicel wiye aboŋwen, Jami magi ducu Cecbajar odwokogi i Jerucalem i kare ma jo ma yam giterogi i opii i Babilon gidwokogi kwede cen i Jerucalem." 
Ezra2:1 Magi gin aye jo me dul lobo Juda ma yam giyakogi ci giterogi i opii i lobo Babilon ma Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon con otweyogi kunnu: ci gudwogo i Jerucalem ki i Juda, kun dano acel acel dok i gaŋŋe kikome." 
Ezra2:2 Gin gudwogo kacel ki Jerubabel, ki Yecwa, ki Nekemia, ki Ceraya, ki Rcelaya, ki Mordekai, ki Bilcan, ki Micpar, ki Bigvai, ki Rekum, ki Baana. Man aye wel co ma i kin jo Icrael:" 
Ezra2:3 Likwayo pa Paroc, alip aryo ki miya acel ki pyerabiro wiye aryo." 
Ezra2:4 Likwayo pa Cepatia, miya adek ki pyerabiro wiye aryo," 
Ezra2:5 Likwayo pa Ara, miya abiro ki pyerabiro wiye abic," 
Ezra2:6 Likwayo pa Pakat-moab, ma gin aye likwayo pa Yecwa ki Joab, alip aryo ki miya aboro ki apar wiye aryo." 
Ezra2:7 Ki likwayo pa Elam, alip acel ki miya aryo ki pyerabic wiye aŋwen." 
Ezra2:8 Likwayo pa Jatu, miya aboŋwen ki pyeraŋwen wiye abic," 
Ezra2:9 Likwayo pa Jakai, miya abiro ki pyerabicel." 
Ezra2:10 Likwayo pa Bani, miya abicel ki pyeraŋwen wiye aryo." 
Ezra2:11 Likwayo pa Bebai, miya abicel ki pyeraryo wiye adek," 
Ezra2:12 Likwayo pa Ajgad, alip acel ki miya aryo ki pyeraryo wiye aryo." 
Ezra2:13 Likwayo pa Adonikam, miya abicel ki pyerabicel wiye abicel." 
Ezra2:14 Likwayo pa Bigvai, alip aryo ki pyerabic wiye abicel." 
Ezra2:15 Likwayo pa Adin, miya aŋwen ki pyerabic wiye aŋwen." 
Ezra2:16 Likwayo pa Ater, ma en aye likwayo pa Kejekia, pyeraboŋwen wiye aboro." 
Ezra2:17 Likwayo pa Bejai, miya adek ki pyeraryo wiye adek," 
Ezra2:18 Likwayo pa Jora, miya acel ki apar wiye aryo." 
Ezra2:19 Likwayo pa Kacum, miya aryo ki pyeraryo wiye adek." 
Ezra2:20 Likwayo pa Gibar, pyeraboŋwen wiye abic," 
Ezra2:21 Jo Beterekem, miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye adek." 
Ezra2:22 Jo Netopa, pyerabic wiye abicel." 
Ezra2:23 Jo Anatot, miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye aboro." 
Ezra2:24 Jo Ajimavet, pyeraŋwen wiye aryo," 
Ezra2:25 Jo Kiriatarim, jo Kepira, ki jo Beerot, miya abiro ki pyeraŋwen wiye adek." 
Ezra2:26 Jo Rama ki jo Geba, miya abicel ki pyeraryo wiye acel." 
Ezra2:27 Jo Mikmac, miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye aryo." 
Ezra2:28 Jo Betel ki Ai, miya aryo ki pyeraryo wiye adek." 
Ezra2:29 Jo Nebo, pyerabic wiye aryo," 
Ezra2:30 Jo Magbie, miya acel ki pyerabicel wiye abicel." 
Ezra2:31 Jo Elam mukene-ne, alip acel ki miya aryo ki pyerabic wiye aŋwen," 
Ezra2:32 Jo Karim, miya adek ki pyeraryo." 
Ezra2:33 Jo Lod, jo Kadid, ki jo Ono, miya abiro ki pyeraryo wiye abic." 
Ezra2:34 Jo Jeriko, miya adek ki pyeraŋwen wiye abic." 
Ezra2:35 Jo Cenaa alip adek ki miya abicel ki pyeradek. 
Ezra2:36 Man aye wel ajwagi: likwayo pa Jedaya, ma i dog ot pa Yecwa, miya aboŋwen ki pyerabiro wiye adek." 
Ezra2:37 Likwayo pa Imer, alip acel ki pyerabic wiye aryo." 
Ezra2:38 Likwayo pa Packur, alip acel ki miya aryo ki pyeraŋwen wiye abiro." 
Ezra2:39 Likwayo pa Karim, alip acel ki apar wiye abiro." 
Ezra2:40 Man aye wel Lulevi: Likwayo pa Yecwa ki Kadmiel, ma i kin likwayo pa Kodavia, pyerabiro wiye aŋwen," 
Ezra2:41 Luwer ma likwayo pa Acap, miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye aboro." 
Ezra2:42 Likwayo pa lugwok-doggola ma gin likwayo pa Calum, likwayo pa Ater, likwayo pa Talmon, likwayo pa Akub, likwayo pa Katita, ki likwayo pa Cobai, gin ducu onoŋo giromo miya acel ki pyeradek wiye aboŋwen." 
Ezra2:43 Magi aye lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa: likwayo pa Jika, likwayo pa Kacupa, likwayo pa Tabaot," 
Ezra2:44 likwayo pa Keroc, likwayo pa Ciaka, likwayo pa Padon," 
Ezra2:45 likwayo pa Lebana, likwayo pa Agaba, likwayo pa Akub," 
Ezra2:46 likwayo pa Kagab, likwayo pa Camlai, likwayo pa Kanan," 
Ezra2:47 likwayo pa Gidel, likwayo pa Gakar, likwayo pa Re-aya," 
Ezra2:48 likwayo pa Rejin, likwayo pa Nekoda, likwayo pa Gajam," 
Ezra2:49 likwayo pa Uja, likwayo pa Pacea, likwayo pa Becai," 
Ezra2:50 likwayo pa Acna, likwayo pa Meunim, likwayo pa Nepicim," 
Ezra2:51 likwayo pa Bakbuk, likwayo pa Akupa, likwayo pa Arur," 
Ezra2:52 likwayo pa Bajlut, likwayo pa Mekida, likwayo pa Arca," 
Ezra2:53 likwayo pa Barkoc, likwayo pa Cicera, likwayo pa Tema," 
Ezra2:54 likwayo pa Nejia, ki likwayo pa Atipa." 
Ezra2:55 Likwayo pa lutic pa Solomon gin ene: likwayo pa Cotai, likwayo pa Kaeoperet, likwayo pa Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 likwayo pa Jaala, likwayo pa Darkon, likwayo pa Gidel," 
Ezra2:57 likwayo pa Cepatia, likwayo pa Katil, likwayo pa Poceret-kajebaim, ki likwayo pa Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Jo ma gitiyo i ot pa Lubaŋa ki likwayo pa lutic pa Solomon onoŋo welgi romo miya adek ki pyeraboŋwen wiye aryo. 
Ezra2:59 Magi aye jo ma gubino ma gua ki i Tel-mela, Tel-karca, Kerub, Adan ki Imer, kadi bed pe gitwero nyuto dog odi pa kwarogi, ka onoŋo yam gin jo Icrael:" 
Ezra2:60 gin likwayo pa Delaya, likwayo pa Tobia, ki likwayo pa Nekoda, gin ducu miya abicel ki pyerabic wiye aryo." 
Ezra2:61 Dok jo magi gitye i kin likwayo pa ajwagi: likwayo pa Kabaya likwayo pa Kakoj, ki likwayo pa Barjilai. En yam onyomo dakone ki kin anyira pa Barjilai ma jo Gilead; yam gilwoŋo en ki nyiŋgi." 
Ezra2:62 Gin gubedo ka yenyo nyiŋgi i kin lwak nyiŋ ma gicoyogi i buk me tekwaro, ento pe gunoŋo iye nyiŋgi, omiyo gikwanyogi woko ki i kin ajwagi calo jo ma komgi ki keni." 
Ezra2:63 Laloyo otito botgi ni gin pe gunywak camo cam maleŋ maka to, nio wan ma ajwaka binen ma bipenyo dog Rwot ki Urim ki Tumim." 
Ezra2:64 Lwak ma gucokke ducu welgi romo alip pyeraŋwen wiye aryo ki miya adek ki pyerabicel," 
Ezra2:65 ma pe gikwano iye lwak luticgi ki anecagi ma welgi romo alip abiro ki miya adek ki pyeradek wiye abiro. Onoŋo gitye bene ki luwer ma co ki ma mon miya aryo. 
Ezra2:66 Aguraguragi yam tye miya abiro ki pyeradek wiye abicel, ki kanagi maditone mi ya aryo ki pyeraŋwen wiye abic," 
Ezra2:67 kinagagi romo miya aŋwen ki pyeradek wiye abic, ki kanagi romo alip abicel ki miya abiro ki pyeraryo." 
Ezra2:68 I kare ma jo mogo ma i kin ludito wi kaka, gubino i ot pa Rwot ma tye i Jerucalem, gutyero gityer ma cwinygi opwoyo pi gero ot pa Lubaŋa, i kabedone macon kikome." 
Ezra2:69 Gumiyo lim i ot kano lim me tic kit macalo gitwero, darik me jabu alip pyerabicel wiye acel, mina me ryal alip abic, ki boŋŋi aruka pa ajwagi miya acel." 
Ezra2:70 Ajwagi ki Lulevi ki jo mogo mukene gubedo i Jerucalem ki i kabedo ma cok kwede; luwer, lugwok-doggola, ki lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa i gaŋigi, ki jo Icrael ducu bene gubedo i gaŋigi." 
Ezra3:1 Ka dwe me abiro oromo, onoŋo doŋ jo Icrael gubedo mot i gaŋigi, ci lwak gucokke i Jerucalem ki cwiny acel." 
Ezra3:2 Cutcut Yecwa wod pa Jojadak kacel ki ajwagi luwote, ki Jerubabel wod pa Cealtiel ki lutugi, gucako caŋo keno tyer pa Lubaŋa pa Icrael, pi tyero iye gitum awaŋa, kit macalo yam gicoyo i cik pa Moses ma dano pa Lubaŋa-ni." 
Ezra3:3 Gucano keno tyer i kabedone kikome, kadi bed lworo omakogi pi lwak jo mukene ma gitye i lobo-nu, ci gutyero iye gitum awaŋa bot Rwot, kun giwaŋo gitum odiko ki otyeno." 
Ezra3:4 Ka gukwero nino madito me Bolo, kit ma con gicoyo, kun gityero gitum awaŋa nino ducu kun welle lubo cik ma mitte pi nino acel acel." 
Ezra3:5 Ka doŋ i ne meno gimedde ki tyero gitum awaŋa nino ducu, gityer me por dwe ki me nino madito ma Rwot ociko ducu, ki gityer ma dano acel acel miyo bot Rwot kit ma iye opwoyo." 
Ezra3:6 Cakke i kom nino dwe mukwoŋo me dwe me abiro en aye gucako tyero iye gitum awaŋa bot Rwot, Ento guti me te ot pa Rwot onoŋo pud peya giketo." 
Ezra3:7 Pienno gumiyo lim bot lupa-godi ki bot lupac. Dok gumiyo cam ki ginamata-gu, ki moo bot jo Cidon ki jo Turo wek gukel yadi cedar ki i Lebanon wa i dog nam, i Jopa, pi twero ma Ciro kabaka me Percia omiyo botgi." 
Ezra3:8 I mwaka me aryone ma lubo dwogogi i Jerucalem i ot pa Lubaŋa, i dwe me aryo, en aye Jerubabel wod pa Cealtiel ki Yecwa wod pa Jojadak gucako kwede tic, kacel ki utmegigi mukene, kacel ki ajwagi ki Lulevi ki jo ducu ma yam gudok i Jerucalem ma gua ki i lobo ka ma giterogi iye i opii. Guyero Lulevi, ma mwaka me ditogi romo pyeraryo ki makato pi ketogi me bedo ludito ma giloyo tic i kom ot pa Rwot." 
Ezra3:9 Yecwa ki awobene ki lutugi, ki Kadmiel ki awo bene ma likwayo pa Juda, gin ducu guloyo lutic ma i ot pa Lubaŋa, kacel ki awobe pa Kenadad ki Lulevi, ki litinogi kacel ki lutugi." 
Ezra3:10 Ka doŋ lugedo guketo guti me te ot pa Rwot, ajwagi guruko ginaruka me tic megi gukato kwede anyim ma gumako tumgi; ki Lulevi ma likwayo pa Acap onoŋo gitye ki atego agoya-gu me pako Rwot, kit ma yam Daudi kabaka me Icrael ociko." 
Ezra3:11 Guwero wer kun gileyo aleya, ma gipako Rwot dok gimiyo pwoc bote, kun giwero ni, “Pien en ber, mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka bot jo Icrael.” Lwak ducu gudaŋŋe ki woo madwoŋ, ka gipako Rwot, pien doŋ giketo guti me te ot pa Rwot." 
Ezra3:12 Ento lwak jo mapol ki i kin ajwagi ki Lulevi ki ludito ma giloyo dog odi pa kwarogi, jo muteggi ma yam guneno ot pa Rwot mukwono ca, gukok matek ki dwan maloŋo i kare ma guneno ka gitye ka keto guti me te ot man, kadi ka jo mapol onoŋo gubedo ka daŋŋe ki yomcwiny;" 
Ezra3:13 mumiyo dano pe gutwero poko kin dwan ma jo gidaŋŋe kwede pi yomcwiny ki dwan me daŋŋe ma jo gikok kwede akoka-ni, pien onoŋo lwak gubedo ka daŋŋe matek twatwal, dok dwangi bene owinnye wa ka mabor." 
Ezra4:1 Ka lumerok pa jo Juda ki jo pa Benjamin guwinyo ni jo ma gudwo go ki i opii i rok gitye ka gero ot pa Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael," 
Ezra4:2 ci cut gubino bot Jerubabel ki ludito ma giloyo dog odi pa kwarogi kun giwaco botgi ni, “Wuwek waribbe kwedwu i gedo man, pien wan bene waworo Lubaŋawu-ni macalo wun, dok wan bene wabedo ka tyero gitum bote cakke wa i kare pa Ecar-kadon kabaka me Aciria ma yam okelowa kany-nyi.”" 
Ezra4:3 Ento Jerubabel, ki Yecwa, ki ludito mukene ma giloyo dog odi pa kwarogi ma i Icrael gugamo doggi ni, “Wun pe wutwero ribbe kwedwa me gero ot mo pi Lubaŋawa; wan kenwa watwero gero ot pi Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, macalo kabaka Ciro kabaka me Percia yam ociko ki wan.”" 
Ezra4:4 Ka dok lwak jo mukene ma gitye i lobo-nu gucako balo cwiny jo Juda woko, omiyo gubedo ki lworo me gedo." 
Ezra4:5 Jo meno guwilo lumi-tam pa kabaka mogo me balo ticgi woko, i kare pa Ciro kabaka me Percia, nio kwede wa i kare me loc pa Dario kabaka me Percia." 
Ezra4:6 I kare me loc pa Akacwero, i acakki me locce, gucoyo lok me adot i kom jo ma gibedo i Juda ki i Jerucalem." 
Ezra4:7 I kare me loc pa Aritakcec, jo magi Biclam ki Mitredat ki Tabcel ki ludito wadgi ducu, gucoyo waraga bot Aritakcec kabaka me Percia; yam gicoyo ki leb Aram ka giloko." 
Ezra4:8 Rekum ma en ladit me mony ki Cimcai ma karan gucoyo waraga bot kabaka Aritakcec ma tito lok i kom Jerucalem kit man ni. 
Ezra4:9 Rekum ma ladit me mony, ki Cimcai ma karan gucoyo waraga man kacel ki ludito wadgi ducu, luŋolkop, ki luloc me lobo, ki ludito, pa jo Percia ki jo Erek, ki jo Babilon, ki jo Cuca, ma gin aye jo Elam," 
Ezra4:10 kacel ki lwak rok mukene ducu ma yam laker madit me awora Ocnapar okobogi woko omiyo gubedo i gaŋi ma i lobo Camaria ki i kabedo mukene mapatpat ma i dul lobo ma gilwoŋo Loka Kulu Euprate," 
Ezra4:11 Man aye kopi me waraga ma gucwalo bote-ni, lokke kwanne kit man, “Bot kabaka Aritakcec: Wan luticci ma wabedo i lobo me Loka Kulu, wacwalo motwa boti." 
Ezra4:12 Wek kabaka one ni Lujudaya ma gua ki boti gudwogo botwa, koni gutyeko cito woko i Jerucalem, Gitye ka gero gaŋ pa jo ma lujemo ma gin jo maraco-ni odoco; gicok doŋ ka tyeko tic i kom cel murumo gaŋ dok gitye ka yubo te gutine." 
Ezra4:13 Myero kabaka one lok man ni, ka ce gaŋ man gigero odoco, ka gigero cel otum, ci pe doŋ gibimiyo ajog dok pe gibiculo kit mucoro mo. Dok lim ma gibicwalo bot kabaka bene bijwik woko." 
Ezra4:14 Kit macalo wan lutic i gaŋ kal pa kabaka, pe bedo ber ka waweko gituro twero pa kabaka woko ma kun wan waneno anena, mumiyo wacwalo lok man pi titone boti in kabaka," 
Ezra4:15 wek koŋ ginen dok giyeny lok i buk ma gicoyo iye lok mutimme i kom kwarowu. Ibinoŋo i lok ma gicoyo i buk me lok mutimme ma bimiyo iniaŋ atir ni gaŋ man kara gaŋ me jemo ada, ma miyo can ki arem i kom luker ki luloc me lobo, pi atubegi ma ocakke magwa i gaŋ meno nia wa con. Meno aye gin mumiyo yam gimuko gaŋ man woko." 
Ezra4:16 Wamito kabaka one ni, ka ce gaŋ man gigero odoco, ki cel bene otum, in doŋ pe ibibedo ki twero mo i lobo ma i Loka Kulu.”" 
Ezra4:17 Kabaka ocwalo botgi lagam me waraga kit man, “Bot Rekum ladit me mony ki Cimcai karan, ki lwak ducu ma gin ludito wadiwu ma gibedo i Camaria ki i lobo ducu me Loka Kulu, amotowu." 
Ezra4:18 Doŋ amito wune ni waraga ma wucwalo botwa kany gikwano ducu maber i nyima. 
Ezra4:19 Ci doŋ amiyo twero, kun bene giniyo ma giyenyo i buk, ci ginoŋo ada ni gaij man nia wa i kare macon obedo ka jemo woko i kom luker ducu, dok ni jemo kacel ki atube obedo ka timme iye." 
Ezra4:20 Ki luker matego yam gubedo ka loyo Jerucalem, ma guloyo bene wa ki lobo ducu me Loka Kulu, ma lwak gubedo ka culo ajog ki mucoro ducu botgi." 
Ezra4:21 Pienno myero wuket cik wek gijuk jo meno woko, wek gaŋ man pe dok giger odoco, nio wan ma an kikoma aketo cik." 
Ezra4:22 Wuket cwinywu i kom lok meno, pe wubed ata ma pe wuŋeyo ticwu, Piŋo wumito weko lim pa kabaka ki twer mere balle woko ata?”" 
Ezra4:23 I kare ma doŋ gikwano waraga pa kabaka Aritakcec i nyim Rekum ki Cimcai ma karan ki bot ludito wadgi ducu, gucako cito oyotoyot bot Lujudaya ma onoŋo gitye i Jerucalem ci gujukogi woko ki tek." 
Ezra4:24 Tic i kom ot pa Lubaŋa ma tye i Jerucalem ocun woko; ticce ocun nio wa i mwaka me aryo me loc pa Dario kabaka me Perci 
Ezra5:1 I kare meno, lunebi magi, Aggai ki Jekaria wod pa Iddo, gutito lok bot Lujudaya ma gitye i Juda ki i Jerucalem, i nyiŋ Lubaŋa pa Icrael ma en aye loyogi-ni," 
Ezra5:2 Ka dok Jerubabel wod pa Cealtiel ki Yecwa wod pa Jojadak gucako gero ot pa Lubaŋa ma tye i Jerucalem odoco; onoŋo lunebi pa Lubaŋa bene tye kacel kwedgi ma konyogi ki tic. 
Ezra5:3 I kare meno kikome en aye Tatenai ma laloc me dul lobo me Loka Kulu ki Cetar-bojenai ki ludito wadgi gubino botgi ci guloko kwedgi kit man ni, “Aŋa mumiyowu twero me gero ot man ki me tyeko gedo man?”" 
Ezra5:4 Gin bene gupenyogi kit man ni, “Lugedo ma gitye ka gedo-ni nyiŋgi aŋagi?”" 
Ezra5:5 Ento wan Lubaŋa yam tye ka neno ludoŋo pa Lujudaya, omiyo pe gijuko ticgi nio wan ma lok ma gicwalo-ni oo bot Dario, ma kun gikuro lagam me waraga ma gibidwoko pi lok meno." 
Ezra5:6 Man aye lok ma i waraga ma Tatenai ma en laloc me dul lobo ma tye Loka Kulu ki Cetar-bojenai ki ludito wadgi ducu gucoyo ci gucwalo bot Dario; 
Ezra5:7 gucwalle lok ma gicoyo kit man ni, “Bot kabaka Dario, kuc obed boti." 
Ezra5:8 Myero kabaka one ni wan wacito i lobo Juda, wao wa i ot pa Lubaŋa madit. Gitye ka gerone ki godi apaya madoŋo, ki dok giguro bao bene me umo kom ot nia ki i dye ot piny nio kwede wa i kwori me dan ot ducu; tic man tye ka wot mot maber twatwal dok ticce ye ciŋgi maber." 
Ezra5:9 Wan wapenyo ludoŋo ma kunnu ka waloko botgi kit man ni, ‘Aŋa mumiyowu twero me gero ot man ki me tyeko cel murumo ducu?’" 
Ezra5:10 Ka dok wapenyo wa nyiŋgi bene, wek watit boti, ka wacoyo nyiŋ ludito ma gitelo wigi." 
Ezra5:11 Gin gugamo dogwa kit man ni, ‘Wan lutic pa Lubaŋa me polo ki lobo, wan watye ka gero ot man odoco, en ot ma yam gigero i lwak mwaka mapol mukato anec, ma con kabaka madit pa jo Icrael ogero nio ka otyeko," 
Ezra5:12 Ento ka kwarowa yam gumiyo kiniga omako Lubaŋa me polo i komgi, ci omiyogi i ciŋ Nebukadnejar ma Lakaldaya, kabaka me Babilon, ma obalo ot man woko ka oterogi wa I lobo Babilon." 
Ezra5:13 Ento i mwaka mukwono me loc pa Ciro kabaka me Babilon, Ciro oketo cik ma miyo twero ni ot pa Lubaŋa man myero giger odoco." 
Ezra5:14 Dok bene jami me jabu ki me ryal ma yam gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Lubaŋa, ma yam Nebukadnejar oyako ki i ot pa Lubaŋa ma yam tye i Jerucalem ci oterogi oketogi i ot pa lubaŋa ma i Babilon, jami magi ducu kabaka Ciro acel-lu aye yam okwanyogi woko ki i ot pa lubaŋa ma tye i Babilon, ka omiyogi bot dano ma nyiŋe Cecbajar, ma yam Ciro oketo obedo laloc;" 
Ezra5:15 ka dok ocike ni, “Kwany jami magi itergi iciketgi i ot pa Lubaŋa ma tye i Jerucalem, ka dok iwek giger ot pa Lubaŋa odoco i kabedone kikome.”" 
Ezra5:16 Cecbajar man yam obino ci oketo te guti me ot pa Rwot Lubaŋa ma i Jerucalem; cakke wa i kare ca nio wa koni gubedo ka gerone, ma pud bene peya otum.’" 
Ezra5:17 Ka ce kabaka oneno ni tye atir, wek koŋ giyeny lokke i ot kano lok ma gicoyo ma tye i Babilon, wek ginen atir ka yam kabaka Ciro oketo cik ma omiyo twero me gero ot pa Lubaŋa man ma i Jerucalem-mi odoco. Koŋ kabaka onen kit ma en ŋolo kwede lokke ci ocwal botwa.”" 
Ezra6:1 Kabaka Dario omiyo twero, ci giyenyo lokke i Babilon ki i ot me kano lok ka ma gigwoko iye buk me lok ma yam gicoyo." 
Ezra6:2 Ginoŋo buk ma yam gicoyo iye lok i Ekbatana gaŋ kai me loko Media, ma gicoyo iye ni, “Lok mutimme:" 
Ezra6:3 I mwaka mukwoŋo me loc pa kabaka Ciro, kabaka Ciro omiyo twero ni, lok ma mako gedo ot pa Lubaŋa ma i Jerucalem, wuwek ot meno giger odoco, en aye kabedo ka ma gityero iye gitum ki ka ma gityero iye gitum awaŋa-ni, borre obed futi pyeraboŋwen" 
Ezra6:4 ki lacce futi pyeraboŋwen bene, ki godi apaya madoŋo, latyeŋ adek ma gurumo ot woko ducu ki bao tyen acel. Lim ma gibiculo pi tic bia ki i kom lim pa kabaka." 
Ezra6:5 Dok bene wuwek jami me jabu ki me ryal me ot pa Lubaŋa, ma yam Nebukadnejar oyakogi ki i ot pa Lubaŋa ma tye i Jerucalem ci okelogi i Babiloni-ni, gidwokgi cen wek giketgi i ot pa Lubaŋa ma tye i Jerucalem, kun jami acel acel giketo i kabedone kikome; ibiketogi i ot pa Lubaŋa.”" 
Ezra6:6 “Pi meno in Tatenai, laloc me lobo me Loka Kulu, ki Cetar-bojenai, ki ludito wadwu luloc mukene ma gitye i lobo me Loka Kulu, wunyik woko cen ki i ot pa Lubaŋa:" 
Ezra6:7 wuwek tic me ot pa Lubaŋa owot anyim kit ma mitte. Wuwek laloc pa Lujudaya ki ludoŋo pa Lujudaya guger ot pa Lubaŋa odoco i kom kabedone macon kikome. 
Ezra6:8 Dok acikowu me konyo ludoŋo magi pa Lujudaya pi gero ot pa Lubaŋa odoco; myero gicul lim ma mitte bot jo magi laboŋo galle, kun gikwanyo Iimme ki i kom lim me ker ma gijogo, mua ki i lobo me Loka Kulu." 
Ezra6:9 Ka ce gimito litino twoni, ki nyogi romi, nyo romi me gitum awaŋa me atyera bot Lubaŋa me polo, nyo ŋano, kado, ki koŋo vino, nyo moo, macalo ajwagi pa Lubaŋa ma gitye i Jerucalem gimito, myero wumi gin meno botgi nino ducu ma pe wuken," 
Ezra6:10 Wubitimo kir man wek gutyer gityer ma Lubaŋa me polo bipwoyo, ki lego pi kwo pa kabaka ki litinone." 
Ezra6:11 Dok amiyo twero ni ka ce dano mo oturo cik man, ci rii wi ot mere gibiwoto woko, gipayo girobe kwede, ode bi doko odur yugi." 
Ezra6:12 Ka kabaka mo nyo rok mo oette otemo loko cik man, nyo obalo ot pa Lubaŋa man ma tye i Jerucalem, Lubaŋa ma yam oyero kabedo meno wek eket iye nyiŋe myero otur twerogi woko. An Dario amiyo twero; giwek tic otine kakare ki mitkom kun gilubo cik man maber.”" 
Ezra6:13 Ka kabaka Dario ocwalo kop, ci Tatenai, ma laloc me dul lobo me Loka Kulu, ki Cetar-bojenai, ki ludito wadgi, gutiyo tic ki mitkom kit ma kabaka Dario ociko." 
Ezra6:14 Ludoŋo pa Lujudaya gugedo gedo ma tic bene omedde owoto anyim maber, pi lok me cuko cwiny ma lanebi Aggai ki Jekaria wod pa Iddo gutito. Gutyeko tic me gedo kit macalo ceŋ Lubaŋa pa Icrael ocikogi kwede ki pi cik pa Ciro, Dario ki pa Aritakcec kabaka me Percia." 
Ezra6:15 Gutyeko tic me gedo me ot pa Lubaŋa man i nino dwe adek me dwe me Adar, i mwaka me abicel me loc pa kabaka Dario." 
Ezra6:16 Lacen jo Icrael, ajwagi ki Lulevi, kacel ki jo mu kene ma yam gudwogo cen ki i opii i rok, gukwero ot pa Lubaŋa ki yomcwiny," 
Ezra6:17 I nino me kwero ot pa Lubaŋa kikome gutyero twoni miya acel, ki nyogi romi miya aryo, litino romi miya aŋwen, ki nyogi dyegi apar wiye aryo, ma oporo wel kaka pa jo Icrael pi gitum me bal pi jo Icrael ducu." 
Ezra6:18 Gipoko ajwagi ki Lulevi i dul, pi ‘tic pa Lubaŋa i Jerucalem, kun gilubo gin ma gicoyo i buk pa Moses," 
Ezra6:19 Jo ma gudwogo cen ki i opii gukwero nino madit me Kato (Paska) i nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen me dwe mukwoŋo," 
Ezra6:20 Onoŋo ajwagi ducu kacel ki Lulevi doŋ gutyeko lonnye kekengi; gin ducu gudoko leŋ. Omiyo guneko litino romi me gitum pi jo ducu ma yam gudwogo gua ki i opii, ki pi ajwagi luwotgi, ki pigi kengi." 
Ezra6:21 Jo Icrael ma gudwogo ma gua ki i opii i rok aye gubedo ka camone, kacel ki jo ducu ma doŋ guweko kwo me kafiri ma gupokke woko ki i kin lwak ma gin wegi lobo, gubino ka woro Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
Ezra6:22 Ka dok gukwero nino madito me Mugati ma Tobi Pe Iye ki yomcwiny pi nino abiro; pien Rwot omiyogi yomcwiny, dok oloko cwiny kabaka me Aciria i komgi, wek okonygi ki tic me gero ot pa Lubaŋa, Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
Ezra7:1 Lacen ki i ne lok man, ma onoŋo Aritakcec kabaka me Percia aye loyo lobo, Ejira yam oa ki i lo bo Babilon ocito i Jerucalem. En yam obedo wod pa Ceraya, wod pa Ajaria, wod pa Ilkia," 
Ezra7:2 wod pa Calum, wod pa Jadok, wod pa. Akitub," 
Ezra7:3 wod pa Amaria, wod pa Ajaria, wod pa Merayot," 
Ezra7:4 wod pa Jerakia, wod pa Uji, wod pa Buki," 
Ezra7:5 wod pa Abicua, wod pa Finekaci, wod pa Eleajar, wod pa Aron ajwaka madit." 
Ezra7:6 En aye Ejira ma yam obedo karan dok laryeko i cik pa Moses ma con Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael omiyo ki Moses; kabaka omiye jami ducu ma yam en olego, pien Rwot Lubaŋane onoŋo tye ka konye," 
Ezra7:7 Jo ma gucito kwede i Jerucalem bene i mwaka me abiro me loc pa Aritakcec, obedo ajwagi ki Lulevi, luwer, lugwok-doggola, ki lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa." 
Ezra7:8 En oo i Jerucalem i dwe me abic, me mwaka me abiro me loc pa kabaka." 
Ezra7:9 Gua woko ki i lobo Babilon i nino dwe acel me dwe me acel bene, ci guo i Jerucalem i dwe me abic ninone acel, pien Rwot Lubaŋane onoŋo tye ka konye." 
Ezra7:10 Ejira yam oketo cwinye ka kwano ki niaŋ cik pa Rwot, kun tiyo, lubo, dok pwonyo cikke ki gin ma en ociko ducu bot jo Icrael." 
Ezra7:11 Man aye kopi me waraga ma kabaka Aritakcec yam omiyo bot ajwaka Ejira, ma lapwony-cik pa Lubaŋa, dano ma opwonnye i tyen lok me cik pa Rwot ki cik ma en ociko pi jo Icrael:" 
Ezra7:12 ni, “An Aritakcec kabaka ma loyo luker ducu, amiyo waraga man bot ajwaka Ejira, ma lapwony-cik pa Lubaŋa me polo." 
Ezra7:13 An kombeddi amiyo twero ni dano mo keken ki i kom jo Icrael nyo ajwagigi nyo Lulevigi ma gitye i te locca ma oye mine kene me cito i Jerucalem, myero ocit kacel kwedi." 
Ezra7:14 An kabaka kacel ki lumi-tam ma mera abiro aye wacwalli wek icipeny lok ma tye i Juda ki i Jerucalem, me neno kit macalo cik pa Lubaŋawu, ma yam omiyo i ciŋini, gitye ka lubone kwede." 
Ezra7:15 Myero iter ryal ki jabu ma an kacel ki lumitamma wamiyo ki yomcwiny me atyera bot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ma ode tye i Jerucalem." 
Ezra7:16 Dok bene myero iter ryal ki jabu ma in icoko ki i lobo Babilon ducu, ki gityer ma ic opwoyo ma jo Icrael kacel ki ajwagi gumiyo, ma gukwoŋo kwoŋ me miyo gin mo kit macalo cwiny dano acel acel omito pi ot pa Lubaŋagi ma tye i Jerucalem," 
Ezra7:17 Doŋ myero igwokke iti ki lim man maber me wilo twoni dyaŋi, nyogi romi, ki gityer me moko kwon ki koŋo vino, ka icak tyerogi i kom keno tyer ma i ot pa Lubaŋawu ma tye i Jerucalem." 
Ezra7:18 Dok in ki utmegi wutwero tic ki ryal ki jabu mogo ma odon kit macalo wuneno ni ber, kun wulubo cik pa Lubaŋawu," 
Ezra7:19 Dok myero iter lwak jami tic ma gimiyo boti me tic kwedgi i ot pa Lubaŋa-ni, ibiterogi ducu i nyim Lubaŋa me Jerucalem." 
Ezra7:20 Ka tye gin mo mukene ma mitte pi ot pa Lubaŋawu, ma myero in inoŋ, ci itwero wilone ki lim ma gikwanyo ki i ot kano lim pa kabaka." 
Ezra7:21 “An kabaka Aritakcec, amiyo twero bot lukan lim ducu ma gitye i lobo me Loka Kulu ni, Gin ducu ma ajwaka Ejira, ma lapwony-cik pa Lubaŋa me polo, bimito ki botwu, myero wumi bote oyotoyot ki mitkom," 
Ezra7:22 ma welle pe kato talanta me ryal miya acel, guniya nano miya adek, ki koŋo vino debe miya aryo, ki debe me moo miya aryo, ki kado ma welle pe ginyuto," 
Ezra7:23 Gin ducu ma Lubaŋa me polo ociko, wuti kakare kikore i tic i kom ot pa Lubaŋa me poto, wek akemo pe omake i koma ki i kom jo ma bibedo i loc i anyim ki i neya." 
Ezra7:24 Dok bene wagenowu ni pe myero wujog lim me mucoro mo ki bot ajwagi, Lulevi, luwer, lugwok-doggola, ki lutic ma gitiyo i ot pa Lubaŋa, nyo lutic mukene ma gitiyo i ot pa Lubaŋa." 
Ezra7:25 “In, Ejira, ti ki ryeko ma Lubaŋani omiyi, ket luŋolkop madito ki luŋolkop matino wek gubed ka ŋolo kop pa lwak ducu ma gibedo i lobo me Loka Kulu; myero gubed jo ma ŋeyo cik pa Lubaŋawu. Jo ma pe giŋeyo cik pa Lubaŋawu, in ipwonygi wek guŋe." 
Ezra7:26 Ka ce ŋat mo pe bilubo cik pa Lubaŋawu kacel ki cik me lobona, myero gimiye pwod magwar, macalo kop me to, nyo kop me ryeme woko ki i lobo-ni, nyo me yako jamine woko, nyo pi tweyo en i mabuc.”" 
Ezra7:27 Gipwo Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarowa! En aye muketo gin maca lo man i cwiny kabaka, pi deyo ot pa Rwot ma i Jerucalem maber." 
Ezra7:28 Dok onyuto bota mar mere ma pe lokke i nyim kabaka kacel ki lumi-tamme ducu, ki i nyim ludito ma gin twoni oteka pa kabaka. Abedo ki tekcwiny pien Rwot Lubaŋana onoŋo tye ka konya dok abito ludito wi kaka pa jo Icrael adwogo kacel kwedgi." 
Ezra8:1 Magi aye nyiŋ ludito ma giloyo dog odi pa kwarogi, ma gudwogo kacel kweda ki i lobo Babilon, i kare me loc pa kabaka Aritakcec:" 
Ezra8:2 ma gicoyo nyiŋgi i buk me tekwarogi: Gercom, ki i kin likwayo pa Finekaci. Daniel, ki i kin likwayo pa Itamar. Katuc, ki i kin likwayo pa Daudi," 
Ezra8:2 ma gicoyo nyiŋgi i buk me tekwarogi: Gercom, ki i kin likwayo pa Finekaci. Daniel, ki i kin likwayo pa Itamar. Katuc, ki i kin likwayo pa Daudi," 
Ezra8:3 ma i kin likwayo pa Cekania. Jekaria, ki i kin likwayo pa Paroc, kacel jo megi ma gicoyo nyiŋgi giromo miya acel ki pyerabic." 
Ezra8:4 Eliekoenai wod pa Jerakia, ki i kin likwayo pa Pakat-moab, kacel ki jone ma welgi oromo miya aryo." 
Ezra8:5 Cekania wod pa Jakajiel, ki i kin likwayo pa Jatu, kacel ki jone miya adek," 
Ezra8:6 Ebed wod pa Yonacan, ki i kin likwayo pa Adin, kacel ki jone pyerabic." 
Ezra8:7 Jecaya wod pa Atalia, ki i kin likwayo pa Elam, kacel ki jone pyerabiro." 
Ezra8:8 Jebadia wod pa Mikael, ki i kin likwayo pa Cepatia, kacel ki jone pyeraboro." 
Ezra8:9 Obadia wod pa Jekiel, ki i kin likwayo pa Joab, kacel ki jone miya aryo ki apar wiye aboro." 
Ezra8:10 Celomit wod pa Jocipia, ki i kin likwayo pa Bani, kacel ki jone miya acel ki pyerabicel." 
Ezra8:11 Jekaria, wod pa Bebai, ki i kin likwayo pa Bebai, kacel ki jone pyeraryo wiye aboro." 
Ezra8:12 Yokanan wod pa Kakatan, ki i kin likwayo pa Ajgad, kacel kijone miya acel ki apar," 
Ezra8:13 Elipelet, Jeuel, ki Cemaya, ki i kin likwayo pa Adonikam, jo ma gucito lacen, kacel ki jo megi pyerabicel." 
Ezra8:14 Utai ki Jakur, ki i kin likwayo pa Bigvai, kacel ki jo megi pyerabiro." 
Ezra8:15 An yam acokogi kacel i dog kulu ma mol dok yo tuŋ Akava, wagony iye wabedo kunnu pi nino adek. Ka abedo ka ŋiyo dano anoŋo ni ajwagi gitye, ento Lulevi pe gitye kadi ki acel mo." 
Ezra8:16 Ka dok acwalo kwena me lwoŋo jo magi, Eliejer, Ariel, Cemaya, Elnatan, Jarib, Elnatan, Natan, Jekaria, ki Meculam, gin aye ludito wi lwakgi dok alwoŋo Joyarib ki Elnatan ma yam gin jo ma fye ki niaŋ matut," 
Ezra8:17 ka acwalogi bot Iddo, ma en ladit ma loyo kabedo me Kacipia, kun atito botgi lok ducu ma myero gin gucilok bot Iddo ki utmegine ma gin lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa ma i kabedo me Kacipia, me cwalo botwa dano ma gibitic i ot pa Lubaŋawa." 
Ezra8:18 Pi Rwot Lubaŋawa ma onoŋo tye ka konyowa omiyo gucwalo botwa Cerebia dano ma ŋeyo piny, ma en tye i kin likwayo pa Makali ma en lakwar pa Levi dok lakwar Icrael bene; en obino ki litinone kacel ki utmegine, gin ducu apar wiye aboro;" 
Ezra8:19 ka dok gucwalo Kacabia ki Jecaya ma gitye i kin likwayo pa Merari, kacel ki utmegigi, ki litinogi gin ducu pyeraryo." 
Ezra8:20 Doŋ medo i kom lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa miya aryo ki pyeraryo, ma con Daudi ki luditone guketo pi tic bot Lulevi, gin ducu gicoyo nyiŋgi woko piny kikore." 
Ezra8:21 An dok aciko pi ri kec kunnu, ki i dog kulu Akava, wek wamwolle kenwa i nyim Lubaŋawa, wek waleg en omiwa wawot maber, wan kikomwa, litinowa, kacel ki jamiwa ducu." 
Ezra8:22 Kono nene apenyo kabaka ni omiya lwak askari ki wegi aguragura me gwokowa i kom lumerokwa ma iyo, lewic onoŋo twero maka; pien onoŋo doŋ watito bot kabaka woko ni, “Lubaŋawa bibedo ki jo ma giyenye pi konyogi, ki tek me akemone bedo i kom jo ducu ma gibwoto en woko.”" 
Ezra8:23 Wari kec kun walego Lubaŋawa ni ogwokwa, ci en owinyo legawa bene." 
Ezra8:24 Ka dok aketo ludito magi apar wiye aryo ma giloyo ajwagi: Cerebia, Kacabia, ki jo apar mukene ma gin utmegigi kacel kwedgi." 
Ezra8:25 Ci apimo botgi ryal ki jabu ki jami me tic, amiyogi gityer me ot pa Lubaŋawa ma con kabaka ki lumi-tamme ki luditone ki jo Icrael ducu ma gitye i kare-nu gumiyo." 
Ezra8:26 Apimo ryal ma romo talanta miya abicel ki pyerabic, ki jami mukene ma romo talanta miya acel, ki jabu ma romo talanta miya acel," 
Ezra8:27 ki atabo jabu pyeraryo ma acel acel peke romo darik alip acel, ki atabo mola aryo ma giliyo maber ma rom ki jami me jabu." 
Ezra8:28 Awaco botgi ni, “Wun dano maleŋ i nyim Rwot, ki jami ducu bene leŋ; ryal ki jabu ducu gin aye mot me gityer ma cwiny dano opwoyo me miyone bot Rwot, Lubaŋa pa kwarowu." 
Ezra8:29 Wugwokgi, wunengi maber nio ka wupimogi i nyim ajwagi madito ki Lulevi kacel ki ludito ma giloyo dog odi pa kwarogi ma i Jerucalem, kun wupimo ki i kicika ma i ot pa Rwot.”" 
Ezra8:30 Ajwagi ki Lulevi gutiŋo ryal ki jabu ma gupimo kacel ki jami mukene ducu, guterogi guketo i ot pa Lubaŋawa i Jerucalem." 
Ezra8:31 Lacen wacako wot ki i dog kulu Akaya i nino me apar wiye aryo me dwe me acel, me cito i Jerucalem; Lubaŋawa aye obedo ka konyowa, dok ogwokowa ki i ciŋ lumerok ki i ciŋ luli bo ma gubuto ka kiyowa iyo." 
Ezra8:32 Ka wao i Jerucalem, ci wabedo kunnu pi nino adek." 
Ezra8:33 I nino me aŋwenne, wacito i ot pa Lubaŋawa, wacako pimo iye ryal ki jabu ki jami tic ducu wamiyogi i ciŋ ajwaka Meremot, ma wod pa Uria. Onoŋo en tye kacel ki Eleajar wod pa Finekaci, kacel ki Lulevi ma gitye kwedgi, ma gin aye Jojabad wod pa Yecwa ki Noadia wod pa Binui." 
Ezra8:34 Gikwano jami woko liweŋ, dok gipimogi bene ka gicoyo pekgi i buk i cawa meno." 
Ezra8:35 I kare meno jo ma yam gudwogo ki i opii i rok, gucako tyero gitum awaŋa bot Lubaŋa pa Icrael. Gutyero twoni dyaŋi apar wiye aryo pi jo Icrael ducu, ki nyogi romi pyeraboŋwen wiye abicel, ki litino nyogi romi pyerabiro wiye abiro, ki nyogi dyegi apar wiye aryo pi gitum me bal; meno ducu obedo gitum awaŋa bot Rwot." 
Ezra8:36 Gin gumiyo cik pa kabaka bot rwodi ki bot luloc ma gitye i lobo me Loka Kulu; gin bene gukonyo dano kacel ki ot pa Lubaŋa. 
Ezra9:1 I kare ma gin meno gityeko timone, ludito gubino bota gutitta ni, “Jo Icrael, ajwagi, kacel ki Lulevi, pud peya gupokke woko ki i kom jo mukene ma gibedo i lobo-nu me bedo kengi ki pi tim me kipyedagi jo Kanaan, jo Kit, jo Periji, jo Jebuc, jo Ammon, jo Moab, jo Ejipt, ki jo Amor." 
Ezra9:2 Co ma gin Lujudaya gubedo ka nyomo anyiragi mogo gubedo mongi kikomgi ki mon pa litinogi; omiyo kwa jo maleŋ pa Lubaŋa guribbe woko kacel ki jo mukene ma gibedo i lobo-nu ma gin jo maraco. Ludito ma giloyo lwak kacel ki rwodi aye gubedo lubal madoŋo i lok man.” 
Ezra9:3 Ka awinyo lok meno, ci ayeco ginarukana woko, ka aputo yer wiya ki i wiya ki dok aputo yer tika ki i tika bene, acako bedo ma piny orem kweda woko." 
Ezra9:4 Lacen jo ducu ma komgi omyel ka guwinyo lok pa Lubaŋa pa Icrael, pi ŋayo waŋ Lubaŋa ma jo ma gudwogo ki i opii gubedo kwede, ci gucako gurre guruma woko dyere ma abedo ma piny orem kweda woko nio wa i kare ma gityero gitum me otyeno." 
Ezra9:5 I kare meno ma gityero gitum me otyeno en aye aa woko kwede ki ka ma onoŋo abedo ka ri kec iye-ni, ma ginarukana ducu guyec woko, ka arumo coŋa piny ma atano ciŋa bot Rwot Lubaŋana," 
Ezra9:6 kun awacce ni, “Ai Lubaŋa, lewic maka mada me ilo wiya ka atye i nyimi, ai Lubaŋana, pien bal ma wan watimo odurre madit lipim ma kato wiwa woko, ki alii mewa otorre madit lipim malo oo wa i polo." 
Ezra9:7 Cakke i kare pa kwarowa nio wa kombeddi wan ki lwakki wabedo ka timo lwak bal mapol, Doŋ pi balwa, omiyo wan ki lukerwa, ki ajwagiwa yam gimiyowa i Ciŋ luker ma i lobo pa lurok, ginekowa ki pala lucwan, ki i rok kunnu giyakowa, dok gitimowa ki tim me lewic, macalo watye i kare man." 
Ezra9:8 Ento pi kare manok keken Rwot Lubaŋawa, kica omaki i komwa, ci imiyo jo mukene ki i kinwa gubwot dok gubedo i kabedo maleŋ-ŋi mot maber. Lubaŋawa iweko wabwot ki i opii dok imiyowa kwo manyen." 
Ezra9:9 Onoŋo wan opii, ento in Lubaŋawa pe yam iwekowa ata i kare ma watye i opii, Dok inyuto mar meri ma pe lokke i nyim luker me Percia, omiyo guwekowa makwo dok guye ni wager ot pa Lubaŋawa odoco, ki yubo jami muballe i oburre, gumiyo gigwokowa bene maber i Judaya ki i Jerucalem." 
Ezra9:10 “Kombeddi ai Lubaŋawa, wan dok wawaco aao ki i ŋe lok man mutyeko timme-ni? Doŋ wabwoto lubo cikki woko ducu," 
Ezra9:11 gin cik ma yam iciko dok imiyo owok ki i dog luticci ma lunebi, kun iwacci, ‘Lobo ma wubidonyo iye ka camone me bedo mewu matwal-li, en aye lobo pa jo ma komgi ki keni, pien jo ma gibedo iye gupoŋo lobo meno woko ki tim me kipyeda nia tuŋcel nio kwede i agik lobo tuŋcel dok gubedo jo ma komgi ki keni." 
Ezra9:12 Mumiyo wun pe wumi litinogi gunyom anyirawu, ki litinowu bene pe gunyom anyiragi, wun pe myero wuyeny kuc ki lonyogi ma gitye kwede; wek wubed jo matego, ki dok wucam gin maber ma i lobo, ma wubiweko bene bot litinowu me bedo ginaleyagi matwal.’" 
Ezra9:13 Lacen i ŋe lok magi ducu ma opoto i komwa pi balwa ma watimogi ki pi alii madit ma watiŋo, kadi bed in, ai Lubaŋawa ineno maber, ci doŋ iketo can i komwa manok ma pe oporo lwak bal ma watimo, dok ikonyowa omiyo wabwot watye makwo-ni." 
Ezra9:14 Wan dok pud wabituro cikki aye kun wamedde ki nyom i kinwa ki jo ma gitiyo bal kipyeda-ni? Ka watimo meno, kiniga pe bimaki i komwa matek nio ka Ityekowa ducu, ma dano mo acel i kinwa pe bibwot?" 
Ezra9:15 Ai Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, in iporre, pien imiyo wabwot ki i lak to. Nen, watuco bal aliiwa boti, pe watye ki kit twero mo me cuŋ i nyimi pi bal man.”" 
Ezra10:1 I kare ma Ejira tye i ot ka lega kun tuco bal, kun kok, poto kwede piny, dok Lwak jo Icrael mapol, co, mon ki litinogi gucokke gukok matek twatwal." 
Ezra10:2 Cutcut Cekania wod pa Jekiel, ma i kin likwayo pa Elam, owaco bot Ejira ni, “Waŋayo waŋ Lubaŋawa woko pi nyomo mon ma gin lurok ma gitye i lobo-ni, ento kadi bed kumeno jo Icrael pud gitye ki gen i kom Lubaŋa kadi lok meno otimme." 
Ezra10:3 Wan koŋ doŋ waketu gicikke ki Lubaŋawa me ryemo mon magi woko ducu kacel ki litinogi. Wabitiyo gin ma in kacel ki jo mukene ma giworo cik pa Lubaŋawa wutito botwa ni wati; wabitiyo gin ducu ma cik pa Lubaŋa mito. 
Ezra10:4 In ia malo, pien man ticci, wan bene wacuŋ i ŋeyi; myero ibed tek dok itim kumeno.”" 
Ezra10:5 Ka Ejira oa malo ci omiyo lutel pa ajwagi ki pa Lulevi ki pa jo Icrael ducu gukwoŋo kwoŋ ni gibitiyo gin ma Cekania doŋ oyubo ni giti. Kit meno gucako kwoŋo kwoŋ. 
Ezra10:6 Ejira oa woko ki i nyim ot pa Lubaŋa, odonyo i kicika pa Yekokanan wod pa Eliacib, obuto kunnu nino acel, kun pe camo gin mo kadi wa mato pii bene. Dok obedo ka kumo pi jo ma gua ki i opii ma guŋayo waŋ Lubaŋa woko." 
Ezra10:7 Ka doŋ gitito lok oromo i lobo Juda ki Jerucalem ki bot jo ducu ma cen gudwogo ki i opii ni gin ducu myero gucokke i Jerucalem. 
Ezra10:8 Giciko ni ka dano mo pe obino i kin nino adek-ki, ludito ma giloyo lwak ki ludoŋo guwacci jamine ducu myero giyak gidyer ki Lubaŋa, ki en kikome bene myero giryeme oa woko ki i kin lwak ma gudwogo ki i opii." 
Ezra10:9 Cutcut jo Juda ki jo Benjamin ducu gucokke i Jerucalem i kin nino adek-ki, i nino dwe pyeraryo me dwe me aboŋwen, Lwak ducu gubedo i dyekal ma i nyim ot pa Lubaŋa. Onoŋo kot obedo ka cwer matek; pi lok man ma pire tek ki pi ŋico, omiyo kom dano acel acel obedo ka myel amyela," 
Ezra10:10 Ajwaka Ejira oa Ocuŋ owaco bot lwak ni, “Wun wuturo cik pa Lubaŋa omiyo wukelo alit wumedo i kom bal alii pa jo Icrael pi nyomo mon ma gin lurok." 
Ezra10:11 Wutuc balwu kombeddi i nyim Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarowu, kun wutiyo gin ma en mito; dok myero wupokke woko pat ki i kom jo ma gibedo i lobo-ni, wuryem monwu ma gin lurok-ki bene woko.”" 
Ezra10:12 Lwak ducu gugamo ki dwan maloŋo ni, “Obed kit meno, wabitiyo gin ducu ma doŋ iwaco-ni.”" 
Ezra10:13 Gin gumedde guwacce ni, “Lwak tye dwoŋ mada dok bene obedo kare ma kot cwer iye madwoŋ; pe watwero cuŋ i dyekal ata kit man. Man pe gin ma gitwero tiyo nino acel nyo aryo keken, pien wan watyeko timo bal madit twatwal i lok man." 
Ezra10:14 Wek ludito ma giloyowa aye gucuŋ pi nyiŋ lwak ducu ma gucokke; wek gicik jo ducu ma gibedo i gaŋiwa ma gunyomo mon ma gin lurok gubin i nino mo ma giciko, kacel ki ludoŋo ma loyogi ki luŋolkop ma i gaŋi ducu, nio waŋ ma gikwanyo kiniga pa Lubaŋa mager ki i komwa pi lok man.”" 
Ezra10:15 Ŋat mo onoŋo pe okwero yub man, ento kono Yonacan wod pa Acakel ki Jakijeya wod pa Tikva keken aye gukwero, dok Meculam ki Cabetai ma gin Lulevi bene gukonyo korgi iye." 
Ezra10:16 Jo ma gudwogo ki i opii gutimo kit meno. Ajwaka Ejira oyero dano, ludito ma loyo dog odi pa kwarogi, dano acel acel ma giyero en ocoyo nyiŋe woko piny, kun lubo dog odi pa kwarogi. I kom nino dwe acel me dwe me apar en aye gubedo iye piny ka neno lok meno;" 
Ezra10:17 i nino dwe acel me dwe me acel onoŋo doŋ gutyeko yenyo lok i kom co ducu ma yam gunyomo mon ma gin lurok. 
Ezra10:18 Magi aye nyiŋ co ma yam gunyomo mon ma gin lurok ma gitye i kin likwayo pa ajwagi, gin aye Maceya, Eliejer, Jarib, ki Gedalia, ma gitye i kin likwayo pa Yecwa wod pa Jojadak kacel ki utmegine." 
Ezra10:19 Gin gucikke pigi kengi me ryemo mongi woko, ki dok gutyero gitum pi tiŋo aliigi ma obedo nyok romo ma gukwanyo ki i kom romigi pi tino aliigi." 
Ezra10:20 Ki i kin likwayo pa Imer gin aye Kanani ki Jebadia. 
Ezra10:21 Ki i kin likwayo pa Karim: gin aye Maceya, Elija, Cemaya, Jekiel, ki Ujia." 
Ezra10:22 Ki i kin likwayo pa Packur gin aye Elioenai, Maceya, Icmael, Natanel, ki Elaca." 
Ezra10:23 Jo ma i kin likwayo pa Lulevi: gin aye Jojabad, Cimei, Kelaya ma gilwoŋo bene ni, Kelita, ki Petakia, Juda, ki Eliejer." 
Ezra10:24 Ki i dul pa luwer gin aye Eliacib. Ki i dul pa lugwokdoggola gin aye Calum, Telem, ki Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Ki i kom likwayo pa jo Icrael: Ki i kin likwayo pa Paroc gin aye Ramia, Ijia, Malkija, Mijamin, Eleajar, Kacabia, ki Benaya." 
Ezra10:26 Ki i kin likwayo pa Elam gin aye Matania, Jekaria, Jekiel, Abdi, Jeremot, ki Elija." 
Ezra10:27 Ki i kin likwayo pa Jatu gin aye Elioenai, Eliacib, Matania, Jeremot, Jabad, ki Ajija," 
Ezra10:28 Ki i kin likwayo pa. Bebai gin aye Yekokanan, Anania, Jabai, ki Atlai." 
Ezra10:29 Ki i kin likwayo pa Bani gin aye Meculam, Maluk, Adaya, Jacub, Ceal, ki Jeremot." 
Ezra10:30 Ki i kin likwayo pa Pakatmoab: gin aye Adna, Celal, Benaya, Maceya, Matania, Bejalel, Binui, ki Manace." 
Ezra10:31 Ki i kin likwayo pa Karim gin aye Eliejer, Icija, Malkija, Cemaya, Cimeon," 
Ezra10:32 Benjamin, Maluk, ki Cemaria." 
Ezra10:33 Ki i kin likwayo pa Kacum gin aye Matenai, Matata, Jabad, Elipelet, Jeremai, Manace, ki Cimei." 
Ezra10:34 Ki i kin likwayo pa Bani gin aye Madai, Amram, Uel," 
Ezra10:35 Benaya, Bedeya, Keluki," 
Ezra10:36 Vania, Meremot, Eliacib," 
Ezra10:37 Matania, Matenai, ki Jacu." 
Ezra10:38 Ki i kin likwayo pa Binui gin aye Cimei," 
Ezra10:39 Celemia, Natan, Adaya," 
Ezra10:40 Maknadebai, Cacai, Carai," 
Ezra10:41 Ajarel, Celemia, Cemaria," 
Ezra10:42 Calum, Amaria, ki Yucepu," 
Ezra10:43 Ki i kin likwayo pa Nebo gin aye Jeyel, Matitia, Jabad, Jebina, Jadai, Joel, ki Benaya." 
Ezra10:43 Ki i kin likwayo pa Nebo gin aye Jeyel, Matitia, Jabad, Jebina, Jadai, Joel, ki Benaya." 
Ezra10:44 Jo magi ducu onoŋo yam gunyomo mon ma gin lurok, ci guryemogi woko kacel ki litinogi ducu." 
Nehemiah1:1 Man lok pa Nekemia wod pa Kakalia. I dwe me Kiclev, i mwaka me pyeraryo me loc pa kabaka Aritakcec, an Nekemia onoŋo atye i gaŋ madit me Cuca," 
Nehemiah1:2 ci Kanani, ma ŋat acel ma i kom utmegina, obino bota kacel ki jo mogo ma gua ki i Juda. An apenyogi lok i kom Jerucalem ki i kom jo ma gubwot, ma yam giterogi i opii ci gudok cen kunnu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Gm guwacca ni, “Jo ma gitye i lobowa kunnu ma gubwot ma yam giterogi i opii gitye ki peko madit ma jo mukene cayogi bene; ki dogcel me Jerucalem gimuko opoto woko piny, dok dog gaŋŋe ducu giwaŋo woko ki mac.”" 
Nehemiah1:4 Ka awinyo lok meno ducu, ci abedo piny akok matek. Abedo ka kumo pi nino mapol; kun ari kec ma pe acamo cam ento abedo ka lego Lubaŋa me polo." 
Nehemiah1:5 Alego kun awacci, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa me polo, in idit, dok wabedo ki lworo i nyimi. In Lubaŋa me ada dok igwoko gicikkeni ki mar meri ma pe lokke pi jo ma gimari dok ma gilubo cik meri." 
Nehemiah1:6 Rwot, nen an, dok iwiny legana, ma atye ka legone dyeceŋ ki dyewor pi luticci, lwak me Icrael. Atuco balwa i nyimi ni, wan jo Icrael, watyeko timo bal i nyimi. Iyo, an ki jo me doggola pa kwara watimo bal." 
Nehemiah1:7 Wan watimo gin marac mada nyimi, pe wabedo ka tiyo gin ma iciko, pe walubo cik meri ma yam imiyo botwa kun wok ki bot laticci Moses." 
Nehemiah1:8 Po i kom lok ma yam iciko ki laticci Moses, kun iwacci, ‘Ka pe wulubo cikka; ci abikeyowu woko ata i kin lurok;" 
Nehemiah1:9 ento ka wulokke wudwogo bota kun wulubo cikka, kadi bed gikeyowu giketowu woko ata nio wa i agikki piny, an abicokowu adwokowu cen wa i kabedo ma doŋ atyeko yerone pi nyiŋa wek wuwora iye." 
Nehemiah1:10 Rwot, jo man gin luticci, dok gin lwakki ma yam ilarogi ki tweroni madwoŋ dok ki tekki." 
Nehemiah1:11 Ai Rwot, kombeddi winy legana ki lega pa luticci mukene-gu ma gitye ki cwiny me woro in, Mina gum tin, imi kica omak kabaka i koma.” I kare meno onoŋo an abedo ladit ma loyo lok i kom kono yino ma kabaka mato." 
Nehemiah2:1 I dwe me Nican, i mwaka me pyeraryo meloc pa kabaka Aritak cec, ma onoŋo kabaka tye ka cam, akwanyo koŋo vino atero bote. Onoŋo yam peya abedo ki cwercwiny mo i nyime." 
Nehemiah2:2 Kabaka ocako penya ni, “Piŋo waŋi nen ki can, inen calo komi yot do? Man can mo aye tye i cwinyi.” Cutcut lworo ocako maka woko marac," 
Nehemiah2:3 Ci agamo dog kabaka ni, “Kabaka obed kwo nakanaka! Waŋa pe twero nen ki can piŋo, ma kun kono gaŋ kal ka ma giyiko iye kwarowa ducu doŋ odoko obur, ma dog gaŋŋe giwaŋo woko liweŋ ki mac?”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Kabaka dok openya ni, “Doŋ imito gin aŋo kono?” Cutcut alego Lubaŋa me polo," 
Nehemiah2:5 Ka doŋ agamo dog kabaka ni, “Ka ce ineno ni ber, laditta kabaka, ka itwero ye legana, wek acit i lobo me Juda i gaŋ kal ka ma kwarowa giyikogi iye, wek aciyub gaŋ meno odoco.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Kabaka odokka iye ma onoŋo daker mere obedo ka ŋete, owacci, “Wot meno biteri kare ma rom mene, dok ibidwogo awene?” Ci atitte bene nino ma abia iye kikome; kabaka oye pi citona kunnu." 
Nehemiah2:7 Ka dok awaco bot kabaka ni, “Ka ce ineno ni ber, myero gico waraga ci imiya ater bot luloc ma i lobo ma tye Loka Kulu, ma tito botgi ni myero guye akat acit i Juda." 
Nehemiah2:8 Dok apenyo kabaka bene ni myero oco waraga omiya ater bot Acap, ma lagwok buŋa pa kabaka, wek omiya yadi wek giti ki bao pi dogcel me gogo ma gwoko ot pa Lubaŋa, ki pi cel ma orumo gaŋ, ki pi ot ma an abibedo iye.” Kabaka oye ci omiya gin ducu ma alege pire, pien Lubaŋa onoŋo tye ka konya." 
Nehemiah2:9 Kabaka ocwalo an kacel ki ludito me mony ki dul pa wegi aguragura, ci acito i lobo ma tye Loka Kulu tuŋ potoceŋ, ci amiyo waraga pa kabaka bot luloc me lobo." 
Nehemiah2:10 Ento Canbalat ma jo Bet-koron, ki Tobia ma en jo Ammon, ka guwinyo lok man, ci gubedo ki keco i cwinygi matek pien guŋeyo ni dano mo obino pi konyo kor jo Icrael." 
Nehemiah2:11 Acito i Jerucalem ci ari kunnu pi nino adek," 
Nehemiah2:12 ma pe atito bot ŋat mo tam ma Lubaŋa otyeko keto i cwinya ma myero ati kwede pi Jerucalem. Cutcut i cwiny dyewor aa malo wacako wot kacel ki lurema mogo. Pe onoŋo watye ki lee mo mukene kono kana ma abedo i wiye-ni keken. 
Nehemiah2:13 Akato acito woko i dyewor kun awok i dogcel me cito i nota nio kwede i waŋ It pa Too ki i dogcel ma cito wi odur, ci acako niyo cel me Jerucalem ducu ma yam gimuko opoto woko piny, kacel ki dogcel ducu ma yam giwaŋo woko liweŋ ki mac-ci." 
Nehemiah2:14 Ka dok alokke acito i Dogcel me Wan It ki i Kut pa Kabaka. Kana ma abedo i wiye-ni onoŋo pe twero noŋo yo mo ma myero ekat ki iye. 
Nehemiah2:15 Kit meno aa i dyewor acito ka ŋiyo cel kun awok ki i nota; ka adok cen i gaŋ ki i dogcel ma ci to i nota, ki yo ma acito kwede." 
Nehemiah2:16 Pe tye ŋat mo i kin ludito ma giloyo lwak ma oneyo ka ma acito iye ki gin ma abedo ka tiyone. Onoŋo peya atito gin mo bot Lujudaya, ajwagi, ludito ma giloyo lwak ducu, kadi ki bot jo mukene ma onoŋo myero guti tic meno." 
Nehemiah2:17 Ka doŋ awaco botgi ni, “Wunen kit ayela ma watye kwede kombeddi, wunen Jerucalem doŋ odoko obur, wa dog celle ducu giwaŋo woko. Wubin wacaku gero cel me Jerucalem odoco, wek lewic pe obed ka makowa.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Ka dok atitogi kit macalo Lubaŋa obedo kweda dok okonya maber,’ kacel ki lok ducu ma cen kabaka owacca. Gin gugamo ni, “Wacaku gerone odoco.” Ci guyubbe me cako tic cut, gujiŋo badgi me tiyo tic maber." 
Nehemiah2:19 Ento ka Canbalat ma jo Bet-koron, Tobia ma latic, ma jo Ammon, ki Gecem ma Laarab guwinyo pi gin ma watye ka tiyone, gucako nywarowa kun gicayowa bene ma giwacci, “Man gin aŋo ma wutye ka tiyone-rii? Wun wumito jemo i kom kabaka?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 An adok iye botgi ni, “Lubaŋa me polo aye bikonyowa, wan luticce, wabicako gedo. Ento pe tye dul mo ma gipoko ki wun i Jerucalem, kadi wa twero mo, nyinwu bene pe gipo pire.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Eliacib ma ajwaka madit, ki ajwagi ma gin utmegine, gugero Dogcel me Romo, Gukwero wek obed maleŋ dok guketo kikane. Gugero nio wa i lubele me Miya ki Lubele ma gilwoŋo Kananel." 
Nehemiah3:2 Jo Jeriko gugero dul mukene ma cok kwede ki Jakur wod pa Imri ogero bene dul ma lubo enno. 
Nehemiah3:3 Likwayo pa Acena gugero dogcel me Rec; guriyo baone ka guketo kikane, bolti, ki rii me doggola me lorone." 
Nehemiah3:4 Dano ma olubogi obedo Meremot wod pa Uria, ma wod pa Kakoj, ma oyubo dul ma i ŋete. Dano ma oyubo dul ma i ŋete obedo Meculam wod pa Berekia ma wod pa Mecejabel. Dano mukene ma oyu bo dul ma i ŋete obedo Jadok wod pa Baana." 
Nehemiah3:5 Jo ma guyubo dul mukene ma i ŋete malubo gin aye jo Tekoa, ento luditogi me awora pe guye tiyo tic mapek ma jo ma loyogi gumiyogi." 
Nehemiah3:6 Ka dok Joyada wod pa Pacea, ki Meculam wod pa Beeodeya guyubo Dogcel Macon: guriyo baone ka guketo kikane, ki bolti ki rii me doggola me lorone." 
Nehemiah3:7 Jo ma guyubo dul mukene ma i ŋete obedo Melatia jo Gibeon, ki Jadon jo Meronot kacel ki jo ma i gaŋi me Gibeon ki Mijpa, ma gitye i te loc pa laloc me lobo ma Loka Kulu." 
Nehemiah3:8 Ujiel wod pa Karaya ma en latet jabu bene oyubo dul mukene ma i ŋete. Ŋat mukene ma olube obedo Anarua ma layub moo ma ŋwece kur, oyubo dul mukene; ci guroco Jerucalem odwogo kakare nio kwede wa i kom cel malaece." 
Nehemiah3:9 Ŋat mukene ma olubogi en aye Repaya wod pa Kur, ma en loyo nucu lobo ma orumo Jerucalem, en bene oyu bo dul nukene." 
Nehemiah3:10 Ŋat mukene ma olubo obedo Jedaya wod pa Karumap, en oyubo mere dul ma okemo ode; ki ŋat ma olube obedo Katuc wod pa Kacabneya, en oyubo dul mukene." 
Nehemiah3:11 Ki Malkija wod pa Karim ki Kacub wod pa Pakat-moab guyubo dul mukene ki cel Gogo me Keno me tedo mugati ducu. 
Nehemiah3:12 Ŋat mukene ma olubo obedo Calum wod pa Kalokeci, ma loyo nucu lobo ma orumo Jerucalem, en oyu bo dul mukene ki anyirane bene gukonye." 
Nehemiah3:13 Kanun ki jo ma gibedo i Janoa guyubo dogcel ma cito i nota. Guroco cel odok kakare ka guketo kikane, ki bolti ki rii me doggola me lorone, ka guyubo cel gogo ma borre romo yadi miya abic, nio kwede wa i dogcel ma cito wi odur." 
Nehemiah3:14 Malkija wod pa Recab, ma laloc me lobo ma orumo Bet-akerem, oyubo dogcel ma cito wi odur; ogero odoco ka oketo kikane, ki bolti ki rii me doggola me lorone ducu." 
Nehemiah3:15 Calum wod pa Kolkoje, laloc me lobo Mijpa, oyubo Dogcel me Waŋ It; ogero odoco dok oumo wiye ka oketo kikane, ki bolti ki rii me doggola me lorone ducu; ka dok en ogero cel orumo Kut Cela ma cok ki po to pa kabaka, nio kwede wa i rwom ma lor piny nia ki i gaŋ kal pa Daudi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Ŋat ma olubo en obedo Nekemia wod pa Ajbuk, ma laloc me nucu lobo Bet-jur; en oyubo ka ma okemme ki Lyel pa Daudi, ma cok ki kut ma gikwinyo akwinya ki ciŋ, yo tuŋ odi pa twoni oteka lweny," 
Nehemiah3:17 Jo ma olubo en obedo Lulevi magi: Rekum wod pa Bani, ki ŋat ma olube obedo Kacabia, ma laloc me nucu lobo ma orumo Keila; guyubo pi nyiŋ lobone." 
Nehemiah3:18 Lacen utmegigi bene guyubo, gin ene: Bavai wod pa Kenadad, ma laloc me nucu lobo ma orumo Keila." 
Nehemiah3:19 Ŋat ma lubo en obedo Ejer wod pa Yecwa, ma laloc me Mijpa; en oyubo dulle me aryone mukene mukemme ki ot kano jami lweny me mony ma i twok cel." 
Nehemiah3:20 Dano ma olubo en obedo Baruk wod pa Jabai; en oyubo dulle mukene nia ki i twokke ma yo tuŋ doggola me ot pa Eliacib ajwaka madit. 
Nehemiah3:21 Dano ma olubo en obedo Meremot wod pa Uria, ma wod pa Kakoj; oyubo dul ot mukene nia ki i doggola me ot pa Eliacib nio wa i agikki ot." 
Nehemiah3:22 Jo ma gulube obedo ajwagi, jo ma gibedo i lobo bar; guyubo dul mukene." 
Nehemiah3:23 Jo ma olubogi obedo Benjamin ki Kacub; guyubo dul mukemo ot megi. Ŋat ma olubogi obedo Ajaria wod pa Maceya, ma wod pa Anania ma oyubo mere ki yo tuŋ ode kikome." 
Nehemiah3:24 Dano ma olubo en obedo Binui wod pa Kenadad; en oyubo dul mukene, nia ki i kom ot pa Ajaria nio kwede i twok cel" 
Nehemiah3:25 nio kwede ka ma ogonne. Ka Palal wod pa Ujai oyu bo gulle ma i iye, kacel ki cel ma ocudo malo mukemo ot pa kabaka ma i dyekal pa: lukur-piny, Dano ma olubo en obedo Pedaya wod pa Paroc." 
Nehemiah3:26 Lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa ma gibedo i kom Opel, guyubo dulle mu kene mukemo Dogcel me Pii tuŋ wokceŋ, mukemo dul cel ma ocudo malo," 
Nehemiah3:27 Jo ma gulubo en obedo jo Tekoa; guyubo dul mukene mukemo cel gogo madit ma wiye ocudo malo likuŋ nio kwede wa i kom cel ma cok ki Opel. 
Nehemiah3:28 Ajwagi guyubo ka wi Dogcel me Aguragura, kun ŋat acel acel yu bo mukemo tuŋ ode kikome." 
Nehemiah3:29 Ŋat ma olubogi obedo Jadok wod pa Imer ma oyubo mere ka ma okemo ode kikome. Ŋat ma olubo en obedo Cemaya wod pa Cekania, ma lagwok dogcel ma tuŋ wokceŋ: en oyubo bene dul mu kene." 
Nehemiah3:30 Jo ma gulube obedo Anania wod pa Celemia, ki Kanun wod pa Jalap me abicelle; guyubo dul mukene, ŋat ma olubo en obedo Meculam wod pa Berekia ma oyubo ka ma okemo kicikane." 
Nehemiah3:31 Ŋat mulubo en obedo Malkija, ŋat acel i kom lutet jabu; en oyubo dul mu kene nia ki i ot pa lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa ki pa lucat-wil, ma okemo dogcel me coyo nyiŋ jo nio kwede wa i kicika ma malo ma i twoke." 
Nehemiah3:32 I kin kicika ma malo ma i twoke ki Dogcel me Romo, jo ma giliyo jabu, ki lucatwil aye guyubo dul mukene," 
Nehemiah4:1 I kare-nu ka Canbalat owinyo ni wan Lujudaya watye ka gero cel me Jerucalem odoco, ci kiniga ki akemo madwoŋ omake, ocako cayowa." 
Nehemiah4:2 Ki kinigane-ni en ocako nywarowa ki i nyim luwote ki i nyim mony me Camaria kun waco ni, “Man Lujudaya ma gigoro-ni gitye ka tiyo aŋo kaa? Gitamo ni gitwero gero gaŋ man odoco? Gibityero gitum mo? Gitwero tyeko tic man i nino acel keken? Gitwero payo godi me gedo ducu ki i kom godi ma gudurre i wi odur yugi ma giwaŋo-ni?”" 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobia ma Laammon onoŋo ocun ka ŋete, owacci, “Kit cel aŋo ma gin twero gerone? Kadi too mamwa-ni ka owoto ki i wiye, ci muko cel gotgi-ni reto woko piny!”" 
Nehemiah4:4 Ai Lubaŋawa, winy ka gicayowa ba; lok cac ma gicayo ki wan odok i wigi, imi giyak jamigi woko ducu dok gimakgi gitergi i opii i lobo pa lurok." 
Nehemiah4:5 Pe iwek bal megi, dok wii pe myero owil i kom balgi, pien guyetowa wan ma watye ka gedo-ni." 
Nehemiah4:6 Kit meno wan wamedde ki gero cel; ci watyeko gero cel woko oyotoyot oo wa malo i nucu me borre ma yam con ca, Man otimme pien lwak onoŋo gitye ki cwiny me tic kikome." 
Nehemiah4:7 Ento i kare ma Canbalat ki Tobia ki jo Arab, jo Ammon ki jo Acidod guwinyo ni watye ka wot anyim ki tic me yubo cel me Jerucalem ki dok ni wacako culo ka ma twolone woko ducu, ci kiniga omakogi matek." 
Nehemiah4:8 Ci gucokke kacel ka piro lok me cito ka lweny i kom Jerucalem, ki kelo anyobanyoba bot dano ma gitye kunnu." 
Nehemiah4:9 Ento wan wamedde ki lego Lubaŋawa, dok waketo co me kuro piny me gwokowa dyeceŋ ki dyewor ki i komgi." 
Nehemiah4:10 Ento jo Juda gubedo ka wacci, “Kero kom luywek godi doŋ otum woko; dok yugi bene odurre iye lipim; pe doŋ watwero gero cel.”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Lukworwa gutamo ni wan pe wabitwero nenogi dok pe wabitwero ŋeyo gin ma tye ka timme, nio ka gibio wa botwa kany, ci ginekowa dok gigiko ticwa woko," 
Nehemiah4:12 Lujudaya ma gibedo i kin lumerokwa gubedo ka bino botwa kare ki kare kun gitito botwa tyen ma romo apar kulu yub ma lumerokwa gitye kwede i komwa; kun gibino ma gia ki i kabedo ducu ka ma gibedo iye. 
Nehemiah4:13 Oyotoyot acako poko jami lweny magi bot lwak, pala lucwan, toŋi ki atum, ci aketogi gubedo i kabedo mo ma i ŋe cel kun lubo doggolagi, ka ma pud odoŋ twolo," 
Nehemiah4:14 Aneno gin ma tye ka timme, ci aa malo awaco bot ludito ma gin lutel wic, ki ludito ma giloyo lwak, ki bot lwak ducu ni, “Pe wubed ki lworo mo i kom lukworwa. Wupo ni Rwot dit dok gilworo; pienno wun wulweny matek pi jo me lobowu, pi litinowu, pi monwu, ki pi pacowu.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Ka lumerokwa guwinyo ni lok me yubgi otyeko winnye botwa ci guniaŋ ni Lubaŋa oturo yubgi woko, ci wan ducu wacako dok cen ka tic i kom cel, dano acel acel odok i dog ticce." 
Nehemiah4:16 Cakke i kare meno nucu pa lwakka gubedo ka’ gedo, ki nucugi mukene gumako toni, kwodi, ki atum-gu, ka guruko koti me nyonyo pi lweny, kun ludoŋo pa lwak gucwako jo me ot pa Juda ducu," 
Nehemiah4:17 ma onoŋo gitye ka gero cel odoco. Jo ma gin lutin yec bene gabedo ka tic kit man, dano acel acel tiŋo jami ma mitte pi gedo ki cine acel, ki jami lwennye noŋo omako i cine tuŋ cel." 
Nehemiah4:18 Ka dok dano acel acel i kinjo ma gin lugedo bedo ki pala lucwanne ma otweyo woko i pyere kun noŋo tye kwede ka gedo. Dano ma en lakut tum onoŋo bedo mere cok ka ŋeta. 
Nehemiah4:19 Atito ki rwodi kacel ki ludito ma giloyb lwak i dog tic ni, “Tic doŋ onya odoko dwoŋ twatwal, omiyo kinwa odon malac ki kinwa opokke woko ki i kom cel, kin dano odoko bor ki lawote." 
Nehemiah4:20 I kabedo ma wuwinyo tum okok iye, myero wucokke botwa kunnu. Lubaŋawa bilweny piwa.”" 
Nehemiah4:21 Kit meno nino ducu cakke okogweno nio i dyewor ka lakalatwe otuc wabedo ka tic i kom cel, ma noŋo nucu pa lwakwa mukene gucuŋ ki toŋi i ciŋgi gikuro piny." 
Nehemiah4:22 An dok awaco ki lwak i kare-nu ni, “Wek dano acel acel ki laticce gudoŋ gubut i Jerucalem, ci gubed ka kuro piny piwa i dyewor ka dok guti tic i dyeceŋ.”" 
Nehemiah4:23 Pe tye dano mo i kinwa, kadi an kikoma nyo utmegina nyo lukur-piny ma gulubo kora ma olunyo boŋŋine. Dano acel acel obedo ki jami lwennye i ciŋe." 
Nehemiah5:1 Lacen jo mapol, co kacel ki mongi, gucako ŋur i kom Lujudaya wadigi." 
Nehemiah5:2 Jo mogo guwacci, “Wan kacel ki litino awobewa ki anyirawa doŋ wadoko dwoŋ; wamito kal me acama wek wabed kwo.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Jo mukene bene guwacci, “Wan wajeŋo pottiwa, potti olokwa, kacel ki odiwa ducu, wek wanoŋ kal wacam, pien kec tye marac.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Dok jo mukene bene guwacci, “Wan doŋ watyeko deno lim me culo mucoro pa kabaka kun wajeno pottiwa ki potti olokwa pire." 
Nehemiah5:5 Wan mono pe wamito jami ma rom aroma ki jami ma Lujudaya wadiwa gimito? Litinowa kono pe giber ma rom ki litinogi? Ento watye ka miyo litinowa gibedo opii. Doŋ watyeko cato anyirawa mukene woko macalo opii. Wan pe watye ki twer mo, pien doŋ gityeko kwanyo pottiwa ki potti olokwa woko ducu ki botwa.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 I kare ma an Nekemia awinyo koko megi kacel ki lok pa lwak," 
Nehemiah5:7 kiniga omaka matek, abedo ka lwodo lok ki i cwinya kekena, acako laro lok ki rwodi kacel ki ludito ma giloyo lobo, kun awaccigi ni, “Wun wutye ka noŋo magoba i kom omegiwu.” Alwoŋo cokke madit me neno lok i komgi," 
Nehemiah5:8 kun awaco botgi ni, “Wabedo ka koko omegiwa ma gin Lujudaya ki lim kit macalo watwero, ma yam gicatogi woko bot lurok. Ento wun wutye ka cato omegiwu kikome ni wan Lujudaya wadigi aye dok wawilgi!” Ludito guliŋ aliŋa litik, ma pe gitwero noŋo lok mo ma myero guwaci." 
Nehemiah5:9 Ka dok awaccigi ni, “Gin ma wutye ka tiyone-ni pe ber. Wun pe myero wulwor Lubaŋawa i timwu ducu? Ka pe wulworo Lubaŋawa, ci miyo lumerokwa gicayowa," 
Nehemiah5:10 Ento an kacel ki utmegina ki luticca ducu wamiyo gideno lim ki kai ki botwa. Wan waweku tam ducu me limo magoba-ni obedi.
