Nehemiah5:11 Tin wudwok pottigi odok i ciŋgi, potti olokgi, potti jeitunigi kacel ki odigi ducu, Dok wuŋol banya ma gitye kwede botwu macalo me lim ryalgi, kai, kono vino, nyo moogu ma wubedo ka jogone ki botgi-ni.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Ludito gugamo ni. “Wan wabitiyo kit ma iwaco-ni, wabidwoko jami magi ducu botgi, dok pe wabipenyogi ni gucul banyawa.” Alwoŋo ajwagi, ci amiyo ludito gukwoŋo kwoŋ ma moko ni gibigwoko cikkegi." 
Nehemiah5:13 Acako yeno kitambara ki i pyera kun adoŋo taca ma awacci, “Man aye kit ma Lubaŋa biyeŋo kwede dano mo ma i kinwu ma pe bicobo kwoŋ kun gwoko cikke. Ci Lubaŋa biyeŋo odiwu ki jami ducu ma wutye kwede, biweko wudoŋ noŋo laboŋo gin mo.” Jo ducu ma onoŋo gitye i cokke gugamo ni, “Amen” dok gupako Rwot. Lwak gutiyo kit macalo gucikke kwede." 
Nehemiah5:14 Pi mwaka apar wiye aryo ma onoŋo an laloc me lobo Juda, cakke i mwaka me pyeraryo nio kwede i mwaka pyeradek wiye aryo me loc pa kabaka Aritakcec, pe tye utmegina mo kadi ki an mucamo kit cam ma giyubo ni gimi bota macalo laloc me lobo." 
Nehemiah5:15 Luloc ma yam gubedo i loc ma gutelo nyima guketo peko madwoŋ i kom lwak pi jogo lim me ryal pyeraŋwen, ki koŋo vino, ki cam. Luticgi guloko lwak gudoko opiigi, guketo peko madwoŋ bene i kom lwak. Ento an pe atimo kumeno, pien an abedo ka lworo Lubaŋa." 
Nehemiah5:16 An aketo tekona ducu ka tero cel meno odoco, pe alimo dullobo mo me bedona. Dok luticca ducu gucokke kunnu gubedo megi ka tiyo tic me gedo." 
Nehemiah5:17 Dok onoŋo atye ki jo ma romo miya acel ki pyerabic, ma gin Lujudaya ki ludito ma loyo lwak, ma wabedo kwedgi dok ma wacamo kwedgi cam kacel i wi me jana, medo i kom jo ma gubino bota ma gua ki i kin lurok ma gurumowa." 
Nehemiah5:18 Nino acel acel onoŋo aneko twon acel, ki romi mabeco abicel, ki dok gineko gweni mapol pira kit meno dok pi nino apar apar aonyo koŋo vino manyen. Ento i kom jami magi ducu ma atiyo pe abedo ki miti mo ni gim iya dul cam mo ma giciko ni laloc myero onon, pien onoŋo lwak doŋ gitye ki peko madwoŋ atika ma obwoyo komgi woko." 
Nehemiah5:19 Alegi, ai Lubaŋana, po pi gin ducu ma atiyo pi lwak man, wek anon pwoc pire." 
Nehemiah6:1 Ka Canbalat, Tobia, Gecem, kacel ki jo ducu ma gin lukworwa guwinyo ni atyeko gero cel woko, dok ni ka mo ma omuk ma twolone doŋ pe, i kare meno onoŋo pud peya aketo rii me doggola me loro dog gaŋ ducu," 
Nehemiah6:2 ci Canbalat ki Gecem gucwalo lok bota, kun giwacci, “Bin wek wabed kacel i gaŋ mo ma i bar me Ono.” Ento gin onoŋo gimito timma marac." 
Nehemiah6:3 An acwalo kwena botgi kun awaccigi ni, “An atye ka tiyo tic mo ma pire dit mada, pe atwero bino kunnu ka rwatte kwedwu. Pe atwero weko tic man Ccuŋ pi bino me nenowu keken.”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Gubedo ka cwalo kwena bota ma rom kit meno tyen aŋwen kulu, an bene adwoko botgi lagam lakite acel." 
Nehemiah6:5 Dok Canbalat ocwalo laticce bota ki waraga i ciŋe ma pe gimwono doge lakite acel-lu pi tyen me abicce. 
Nehemiah6:6 Lok ma gicoyo iye tye kit man ni, “Gecem otitta ni cwinyo lok tye ka wot i kin lwak ma gicok kwedwa ni meno, in kacel ki lwak pa Lujudaya wumito jemo; meno aye gin mumiyo wutye ka gero cel odoco-ni, Lok man tito bene ni in ikette keni me bedo kabakagi." 
Nehemiah6:7 Dok bene lok man otittiwa ni in doŋ ityeko keto lunebi me tuco lok atyer i Jerucalem i komi ni, ‘Kabaka doŋ tye i Juda.’ Lok meno doŋ gibitito bot kabaka, Pienno ber ibin warib tam wayub lokke kacel kwedi.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 An dok adwoko lok bote, kun awacce ni, “Pe tye gin mo macalo meno ma otimme, lok meno wun wunwaro ki wiwu.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Onoŋogutemme me burowa wek wagik tic, kun gitamo ni, “Komgi bidoko nyap i tic, ci bimiyo tic doŋ pe bitine.” Ento kombeddi, ai Lubaŋa, doŋ imiya abed matek." 
Nehemiah6:10 Ka acito wa i ot pa Cemaya wod pa Delaya, ma wod pa Meketabel, ma pe twero weko ode, ci cut an acito ka Lime. En owacca ni, “Wek wacit kwedi kacel i kabedo maleŋ ma i ot pa Lubaŋa, ci walor doggola me ot pa Lubaŋa woko; pien gin bibino ka neki woko. I dyewor mo keken gibibino gineki woko.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Ento an agamo doge ni, “An pe acal ki dano ma riŋo lawote ci kanne woko. In itamo ni abitemo laro kwana ki kanne i ot pa Lubaŋa? Pe atwero cito.”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Ka abedo ka tamo lok man, lacen, ci aniaŋ atir ni Lubaŋa onoŋo pe oloko kwede, ento onoŋo Tobia ki Canbalat aye kara guwile ki lim wek otit lok macalo meno me bito an." 
Nehemiah6:13 Guwile ki lim wek obur an abed ki lworo apot i bal, wek gicak balo nyiŋa kun gicaya kwede-gu." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ai Lubaŋana, po i kom Tobia ki Canbalat, pi gin ma gubedo ka timone i koma, ci iket can i komgi. Dok ipo i kom lanebi ma dako ma nyiŋe Noadia kacel ki lwak lunebi mukene ducu ma yam gutemo buro an ki miya lworo." 
Nehemiah6:15 I ŋe tic pi nino pyerabic wiye aryo tic me gero cel otum woko, i nino dwe pyeraryo wiye abic me dwe me Elul.”" 
Nehemiah6:16 I kare ma lumerokwa ma gibedo i rok murumowa guwinyo lok man, ci lworo omakogi ma komgi oto woko lirut; pien dano acel acel onoŋo oneyo atir ni tic man otine pi kony pa Lubaŋa," 
Nehemiah6:17 Ento i kare-nu ducu ludito pa Lujudaya gubedo ka coyo waraga mapol gucwalo bot Tobia, ki Tobia bene coyo waraga cwalo botgi." 
Nehemiah6:18 Lwak mapol ma i Juda onoŋo gitye tuŋ bote ma gucikke bote ki kwoŋo kwoŋ, dok en onoŋo obedo oro Cekania ma wod pa Ara. Dok wode Yekokanan bene onoŋo yam onyomo nya pa Meculam wod pa Berekia." 
Nehemiah6:19 Jo mogo bene guloko i nyima lok kom tic maber ma Tobia yam otiyo, ka gidwoko bote lok ducu ma an awaco botgi, Tobia yam omedde ki cwalo waraga bota pi miyo lworo bota." 
Nehemiah7:1 Ka tic me gero cel doŋ otum, ma aketo doggola lalor dogcel ducu, aketo lugwok-doggola, ki luwer, ka dok ayero Lulevi aketogi i dog ticgi," 
Nehemiah7:2 ci aketo jo aryo me loyo gaŋ me Jerucalem, omera Kanani, ki Anania, ma ladit wi mony ma loyo gaŋ me cel gogo. Anania obedo dano ma genne, dok ŋat ma lworo Lubaŋa makato lwak mukene-gu ducu." 
Nehemiah7:3 Ci awaco botgi ni, “Pe wuwek giyab dogcel me Jerucalem nie ka ceŋ doŋ odoko lyet, ka dok gilor dogcel woko giceggi ki rii ma noŋo pud peya lukur-piny guweko dog ticgi ma ceŋ cito ka poto. Ka dok bene atito botgi ni guyer lukur-piny ki i kin lwak ma gibedo i Jerucalem, ci guketgi i dog tic ma mitte, dano acel acel myero obed i kabedone, kun kuro piny ka ma okemme ki ode kikome.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Gaŋ meno onoŋo lac dok dit mada, ento jo ma gibedo iye onoŋo pe gidwoŋ, dok onoŋo pud peya gigero odi mapol iye." 
Nehemiah7:5 Lubaŋa dok oketo tam i cwinya me guro lwak, rwodi ki ludito ma giloyo wi lwak kacel, wek gico nyiŋgi i buk me tekwarogi. Ci anoŋo i buk me tekwaro nyiŋ jo ma gilubo jo mukwoŋo dwogo cen ki i opii, anoŋo gicoyo nyiŋgi kit man:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Magi gin aye lwak ma gibedo i lobo Juda ma ceŋ gudwogo cen ki i opii ka ma yam Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon oterogi iye macalo lumabuc," 
Nehemiah7:7 Gin gudwogo kacel ki Jerubabel, ki Yecwa, Nekemia, Ajaria, Raamia, Nakamani, Mordekai, Bilcan, Micperet, Bigvai, Nekum, ki Baana. Man aye wel co ma i kin jo Icrael." 
Nehemiah7:8 Likwayo pa Paroc, alip aryo ki miya acel ki pyerabiro wiye aryo." 
Nehemiah7:9 Likwayo pa Cepatia, miya adek ki pyerabiro wiye aryo." 
Nehemiah7:10 Likwayo pa Ara, miya abicel ki pyerabic wiye aryo." 
Nehemiah7:11 Likwayo pa Pakat-moab, ma gin aye likwayo pa Yecwa ki Joab, alip aryo ki miya aboro ki apar wiye aboro." 
Nehemiah7:12 Likwayo pa Elam, alip acel ki miya aryo ki pyerabic wiye aŋwen," 
Nehemiah7:13 Likwayo pa Jatu, miya aboro ki pyeraŋwen wiye abic." 
Nehemiah7:14 Likwayo pa Jakai, miya abiro ki pyerabicel." 
Nehemiah7:15 Likwayo pa Binui, miya abicel ki pyeraŋwen wiye aboro." 
Nehemiah7:16 Likwayo pa Bebai, miya abicel ki pyeraryo wiye aboro." 
Nehemiah7:17 Likwayo pa Ajgad, alip aryo ki miya adek ki pyeraryo wiye aryo." 
Nehemiah7:18 Likwayo pa Adonikam, miya abicel ki pyerabicel wiye abiro." 
Nehemiah7:19 Likwayo pa Bigvai, alip aryo ki pyerabicel wiye abiro." 
Nehemiah7:20 Likwayo pa Adin, miya abicel ki pyerabic wiye abic." 
Nehemiah7:21 Likwayo pa Ater, ma en aye likwayo pa Kejekia, pyeraboŋwen wiye aboro." 
Nehemiah7:22 Likwayo pa Kacum, miya adek ki pyeraryo wiye aboro." 
Nehemiah7:23 Likwayo pa Bejai, miya adek ki pyeraryo wiye aŋwen." 
Nehemiah7:24 Likwayo pa Karip miya acel ki apar wive aryo. 
Nehemiah7:25 Likwayo pa Gibeon, pyeraboŋwen wiye abic." 
Nehemiah7:26 Jo Beterekem kacel ki jo Netopa, miya acel ki pyeraboro wiye aboro." 
Nehemiah7:27 Jo Anatot, miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye aboro." 
Nehemiah7:28 Jo Betajimavet, pyeraŋwen wiye aryo." 
Nehemiah7:29 Jo Kiriatarim, jo Kepira, ki jo Beerot, miya abiro ki pyeraŋwen wiye adek." 
Nehemiah7:30 Jo Rama ki jo Geba, miya abicel ki pyeraryo wiye acel." 
Nehemiah7:31 Jo Mikmac, miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye aryo." 
Nehemiah7:32 Jo Betel ki jo Ai, miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye adek." 
Nehemiah7:33 Jo Nebo mukene-ne, pyerabic wiye aryo." 
Nehemiah7:34 Jo Elam mukene-ne, alip acel ki miya aryo ki pyerabic wiye aŋwen," 
Nehemiah7:35 Likwayo pa Karim, miya adek ki pyeraryo." 
Nehemiah7:36 Jo Jeriko, miya adek ki pyeraŋwen wiye abic." 
Nehemiah7:37 Jo Lod, jo Kadid, ki jo Ono, miya abiro ki pyeraryo wiye acel." 
Nehemiah7:38 Jo Cenaa, alip adek ki miya aboŋwen ki pyeradek." 
Nehemiah7:39 Man aye wel ajwagi: likwayo pa Jedaya, ma i dog ot pa Yecwa, miya aboŋwen ki pyerabiro wiye adek." 
Nehemiah7:40 Likwayo pa Imer, alip acel ki pyerabic wrye aiyo." 
Nehemiah7:41 Likwayo pa Packur, alip acel ki miya aryo ki pyeraŋwen wiye abiro." 
Nehemiah7:42 Likwayo pa Karim, alip acel ki apar wiye abiro." 
Nehemiah7:43 Man aye wel Lulevi: likwayo pa Yecwa ki Kadmiel, ma i kin likwayo pa Kodeva, pyerabiro wiye aŋwen. 468" 
Nehemiah7:44 Luwer ma gin likwayo pa Acap, miya acel ki pyeraŋwen wiye aboro." 
Nehemiah7:45 Likwayo pa lugwok-doggola ma gin aye likwayo pa Calum, likwayo pa Ater, likwayo pa Talmon, likwayo pa Akub, likwayo pa Katita, likwayo pa Cobai, gin ducu onoŋo giromo miya acel ki pyeradek wiye aboro." 
Nehemiah7:46 Magi gin aye lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa: likwayo pa Jika, likwayo pa Kacupa, likwayo pa Tabaot," 
Nehemiah7:47 likwayo pa Keroc, likwayo pa Cia, likwayo pa Padon," 
Nehemiah7:48 likwayo pa Lebana, likwayo pa Agaba, likwayo pa Camlai," 
Nehemiah7:49 likwayo pa Kanan, likwayo pa Gidel, likwayo pa Gakar," 
Nehemiah7:50 likwayo pa Reaya, likwayo pa Rejin, likwayo pa Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 likwayo pa Gajam, likwayo pa Uja, likwayo pa Pacea," 
Nehemiah7:52 likwayo pa Becai, likwayo pa Meunim, likwayo pa Nepucecim," 
Nehemiah7:53 likwayo pa Bakbuk, likwayo pa Akupa, likwayo pa Arur," 
Nehemiah7:54 likwayo pa Bajlit, likwayo pa Mekida, likwayo pa Arca," 
Nehemiah7:55 likwayo pa Barkoc, likwayo pa Cicera, likwayo pa Tema," 
Nehemiah7:56 likwayo pa Nejia, ki likwayo pa Katipa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Likwayo pa lutic pa Solomon gin ene: likwayo pa Cotai, likwayo pa Coperet, likwayo pa Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 likwayo pa Jaala, likwayo pa Darkon, likwayo pa Gidel," 
Nehemiah7:59 likwayo pa Cepatia, likwayo pa Katil, likwayo pa Poceret-kajebaim, ki likwayo pa Amon." 
Nehemiah7:60 Jo ma gitiyo i ot pa Lubaŋa ki likwayo pa lutic pa Solomon, onoŋo welgi romo miya adek ki pyeraboŋwen wiye aryo." 
Nehemiah7:61 Magi aye gin jo ma gubino ma gua ki i Tel-mela, Tel-karca, Kerub, Adon ki Imer, ento onoŋo pe gitwero nyuto dog odi pa kwarogi, ka ce onoŋo yam gin jo Icrael:" 
Nehemiah7:62 likwayo pa Delaya, likwayo pa Tobia, ki likwayo pa Nekoda, gin ducu miya abicel ki pyeraŋwen wiye aryo." 
Nehemiah7:63 Dok jo magi gitye i kin likwayo pa ajwagi: likwayo pa Kobaya, likwayo pa Kakoj, likwayo pa Baŋilai ma yam onyomo dakone ki i kin anyira pa Baŋilai ma jo Gilead; yam gilwoŋo en ki nyiŋgi," 
Nehemiah7:64 Gin gubedo ka yenyo nyiŋgi i kin lwak nyiŋ ma gicoyogi i buk me tekwaro, ento pe gunoŋo iye nyiŋgi, omiyo gikwanyogi woko ki i kin ajwagi calo jo ma komgi ki keni." 
Nehemiah7:65 Laloyo otito botgi ni gin pe gunywak camo cam maleŋ makato, nio waŋ ma ajwaka binen ma bipenyo dog Rwot ki Urim ki Tumim." 
Nehemiah7:66 Lwak ma gucokke ducu welgi romo alip pyeraŋwen wiye aryo ki miya adek ki pyerabicel," 
Nehemiah7:67 ma pe gikwano iye lwak luticgi ki anecagi ma welgi romo alip abiro ki miya adek ki pyeradek wiye abiro. Onoŋo gitye bene ki luwer ma co ki ma mon miya aryo ki pyeraŋwen wiye abic. 
Nehemiah7:68 Aguraguragi yam tye miya abiro ki pyeradek wiye abicel, ki kanagi maditone miya aryo ki pyeraŋwen wiye abic" 
Nehemiah7:69 kinagagi romo miya aŋwen ki pyeradek wiye abic, ki kanagi romo alip abicel ki miya abiro ki pyeraryo." 
Nehemiah7:70 I kare meno jo mogo ma i kin ludito wi kaka ma giloyo dog odi pa kwarogi gumiyo ‘kony me lim pi gero ot pa Lubaŋa. Laloyo omiyo lim i ot kano lim ma romo darik me jabu alip acel, becen pyerabic, ki boŋŋi aruka pa ajwagi ma romo miya abic ki pyeradek." 
Nehemiah7:71 Jo mogo ma i kin ludito wi kaka ma giloyo dog odi pa kwarogi bene gumiyo lim i ot kano lim pi tic, lim ma roino darik me jabu alip pyeraryo ki mina me ryal alip aryo ki miya aryo." 
Nehemiah7:72 Jo mukene mudoŋŋe gumiyo lim ma romo darik me jabu alip pyeraryo, ki mina me ryal alip aryo, ki boŋŋi aruka pa ajwagi ma romo pyerabicel wiye abiro." 
Nehemiah7:73 Ajwagi, Lulevi, ki lugwok-doggola, luwer, ki jo mogo mukene, lutic i ot pa" 
Nehemiah8:1 I kare ma dwe me abiro oromo, onoŋo jo Icrael doŋ gitye i gaŋigi. Ci lwak gucokke ki cwiny acel i dyekal ma i nyim Dogcel me Pii; ci gutito bot Ejira ma lapwony-cik pa Lubaŋa ni okel buk me cik pa Moses ma yam Lubaŋa omiyo bot jo Icrael." 
Nehemiah8:2 Ci Ejira okelo buk me cik i nyim cokke, ma tye iye co ki mon ki jo ducu ma yam giromo winyone ki niaŋ iye maber, i nino dwe mukwoŋo me dwe me abiro." 
Nehemiah8:3 Ejira ocako kwanone i nyimgi, kun ocuŋ okemo dyekal ma i nyim Dogcel me Pii-ni, ocako kwanone odiko nio wa dyeceŋ, kun kwano i nyim co ki mon ducu ki jo ma gitwero niaŋ lokke maber, kun dano ducu guciko itgi ka winyo lok ma i buk me cik," 
Nehemiah8:4 Ejira ma lapwony-cik pa Lubaŋa ocuŋ i wi abam bao ma gitiyo pi kwano lok meno, Jo magi yam gucuŋ ka ŋete tuŋ lacuc, Matitia, Cema, Anaya, Uria, Ilkia, ki Maceya; ka dok jo magi gucuŋ ka ŋete tuŋ lacam, Pedaya, Micael, Malkija, Kacum, Kacbadana, Jekaria, ki Meculam." 
Nehemiah8:5 I kare ma Ejira ocuŋ malo ka maleŋ i kabedo me kwano buk, lwak ducu guciko waŋgi i kome, Oyabo buk ci dano ducu gua malo gucuŋ," 
Nehemiah8:6 Ejira okwoŋo ki pwoyo Rwot, Lubaŋa madit; ci lwak ducu gugamo ni, “Amen, Amen,” kun giriŋo ciŋgi malo; ka dok guryebbe piny, ci guworo Rwot ma gukulo wigi piny i ŋom," 
Nehemiah8:7 Ka dok lwak gucuŋ i kabedogi, ci Lulevi magi: Yecwa, Bani, Cerebia, Jamin, Akub, Cebetai, Kodia, Maceya, Kelita, Ajaria, Jojabad, Kanan, ki Pelaya, gukonyo lwak me niaŋ te cik maber, kun onoŋo lwak gubedo i kabedogi mot." 
Nehemiah8:8 Gukwano lok me cik nia ki i buk me cik, en aye buk me cik pa Lubaŋa, dok gugonyo te lokke matir bot lwak, wek guniaŋ lok ma gikwano." 
Nehemiah8:9 Ka lwak doŋ guwinyo lok ma gikwano ki i buk me cik, gucako koko cut. Ci Nekemia ma onoŋo en laloc, ki Ejira ma onoŋo ajwaka dok bene lapwony-cik pa Lubaŋa, kacel ki Lulevi ma gupwonyo lwak guwaco bot lwak ni, “Man aye nino maleŋ bot Rwot Lubaŋawa; pe wukum dok bene pe wukoki.”" 
Nehemiah8:10 Dok owaco botgi ni, “Doŋ wuwot, wucit wucam moo ki wumat koŋo vino maliŋo, wucwal cam mogo bot dano mo ma pe ki cam; pien tin aye nino maleŋ bot Rwotwa; pien yomcwiny pa Rwot en aye tek mewu.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Lulevi gujuko dano guliŋ mot, kun giwacci “Wubed mot laliŋ, pien man aye nino maleŋ; pe wubed ki cwercwiny.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Lwak guket gucito i gaŋigi ka cam ki ka mat, dok gucwalo cam mogo ma gitye kwede bot luwotgi mukene, pi bedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, pien guwinyo lok ma gikwano gitito botgi ci guniaŋ maber." 
Nehemiah8:13 I kom nino me aryone ludito ma giloyo dog odi pa kwarogi ma i kin lwak ducu, kacel ki ajwagi ki Lulevi, gucito bot Ejira ma lapwony-cik pa Lubaŋa pi niyo lok ducu ma tye i buk me cik." 
Nehemiah8:14 Ci gunoŋo ka ma gicoyo i buk me cik ni Rwot yam ociko Moses ni jo Icrael myero gubed i bolo pi kwero nino madito me dwe me abirone," 
Nehemiah8:15 dok myero guywek lokke wek gutit i gaŋigi ducu ki i Jerucalem, kun giwacci, “Wucit i wi godi ka kela jaŋ jeituni, ki jeituni ma i tim, ki yadi ma ŋwecgi kur, yat otit ki yadi ma potgi oluk wek wayub bolo mapol, kit ma gicoyo i buk me cik.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Lwak ducu gucito ka kelo jami ma gitito pire-ni ci gutiyo bolo mapol me bedogi, kun dano acel acel timo mere, i wi odigi, i dyekalgi, ki i dyekal me ot pa Lubaŋa, ki i dyekal ma i Dogcel me Pii, ki i dyekal ma i dogcel ma gilwoŋo ni pa Epraim." 
Nehemiah8:17 Ki cokke pa lwak ma con gudwogo ki i opii i rok mukene gutiyo bologi ci gubedo iye; cakke i kare pa Yocwa wod pa Nun nio kwede wa i nino meno jo Icrael pe gutiyo kit meno. Ci gubedo ki yomcwiny madit twatwal. 
Nehemiah8:18 Dok nino ki nino gikwano lok ma tye i buk me cik pa Lubaŋa i kom nino mukwoŋo nio kwede wa i nino me agikkine. Gukwero nino me cokke maleŋ pi nino abiro; i kom nino me aborone ci gubedo ki cokke maleŋ, ma lubo cik kikome." 
Nehemiah9:1 I dwe man ninone pyeraryo wiye aŋwen jo Icrael gucokke, kun giri kec ma guruko boŋo cola, ma gunywano wigi ki lobo ma nyuto cwercwinygi." 
Nehemiah9:2 Jo Icrael gupokke woko kengi ki i kom lurok ducu, ka gucuŋ ka tuco balgi kacel ki bal pa kwarogi ma yam gutimo," 
Nehemiah9:3 Gucuŋ i kabedogi, kun gikwano botgi lok ma tye i buk me cik pa Rwot Lubaŋagi pi cawa adek; ka i ŋeye gutuco balgi ci guworo Rwot Lubaŋagi pi cawa adek mukene." 
Nehemiah9:4 Lulevi magi gucuŋ i wi abam, Yecwa, Bani! Kadmiel, Cebania, Buni. Cerebia, Bani ki Kenani; gin ducu gudaijŋe ki dwan maloŋo bot Rwot Lubaŋagi," 
Nehemiah9:5 Dok gin Lulevi magi, Yecwa, Kadmiel, Bani, Kacabneya, Cerebia, Kodia, Cebania ki Petakia guwacci, “Wua malo wupak Rwot Lubaŋawu; wupake nakanaka. Wek dano acel acel opak nyiŋi me deyo makato ducu, ai Rwot, kadi bed pwoc ki pak pa dano pe rom ki ditti.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 Ka doŋ gulego lega man ni, “In aye i Rwot, in keni; in ma iketo polo ma malo makato ducu, ki lwak lakalatwe ma tye i polo-gu ducu, dok iketo lobo ki nam ki jami ducu ma tye i igi; in aye imiyo kwo botgi ducu; ki mony me polo ducu giryebbe piny ka woro in." 
Nehemiah9:7 In aye i Rwot, Lubaŋa ma yam iyero Abram ci ikwanyo en woko ki Or lobo pa Lukaldaya, ka icako miyo bote nyiŋ man Abraim." 
Nehemiah9:8 Dok con inoŋo ni en ŋat ma lagen, ka doŋ iketo gicikke kwede pi miyo lo bo pa jo Kanaan, lobo pa jo Kit, lobo pa jo Amor, lobo pa jo Periji, lobo pa jo Jebuc ki lobo pa jo Girgac, me bedo lobo ma likwaye gibibedo iye, In ico bo lok ma iciko, pien in Lubaŋa muporre." 
Nehemiah9:9 “In yam ineno atwom ma kwarowa gubedo kwede i Ejipt, dok bene iwinyo kokogi ki i dog Nam Makwar," 
Nehemiah9:10 in itiyo bene lanyut ki taŋo me aura i kom Parao ki luticce ducu, ki i kom jo ducu ma i lobone, pien in onoŋo iŋeyo kit ma gubedo kwede ka uno kwarowa; ma omiyo in ilimo iye yweka, macalo tye kwede nio wa onyoo." 
Nehemiah9:11 In yam ipoko i dye nam pi lwakki, ka itelogi imiyo gukato ki iye i wi ŋom mutwo. Dok ibolo merok ma gulubo korgi woko i pii, imiyo gumwony ci gulwiny woko i kut matut, macalo gweŋ ma lwiny piny i i pii mager." 
Nehemiah9:12 In yam itelo nyimgi i dyeceŋ ki pol mucuŋ macalo wir, ka dok itelo wigi i dyewor ki mac mucuŋ macalo wir me menyo botgi yo ka ma myero guwot gucit iye." 
Nehemiah9:13 In ilor ibino piny i kom got Cinai, ci iloko ki lwakki ki kunnu ki i polo; ka imiyo botgi cik maber ki pwony ma myero gin gulubi kacel ki gin ma iciko ducu." 
Nehemiah9:14 In ipwonyogi ni gugwok cabitti obed maleŋ, ka dok imiyogi cik kacel ki gin ma in iciko ni gugwoki, kun wok ki bot laticci Moses." 
Nehemiah9:15 I kare ma kec onekogi in ipitogi ki kwon mua ki i polo, ka dok imiyo gumato pii mua ki i kom pata got i kare ma orwo pii onekogi. Itito botgi bene ni gudony gucam lobo ma yam ikwoŋo pire ni ibimiyo botgi." 
Nehemiah9:16 “Ento gin kacel ki kwarowa wigi obedo tek ci gubedo ki wakke, omiyo gukwero lubo cikki." 
Nehemiah9:17 Gukwero lubone; dok wigi owil woko i kom tano mapol me aura ma ibedo ka tiyo i kingi; wigi obedo tek ci guyero dano mo acel me bedo laditgi wek otel wigi odwokgi cen i opii i Ejipt. Ento in Lubaŋa ma weko bal pa danoi in iber dok lakica, kiniga pe maki oyot, mar meri dwoŋ ma pe lokke, yam pe ibwotogi ata." 
Nehemiah9:18 Kadi bed yam gucweyo cal wod twon dyaŋ ma giliyo aliya, kun giwacci, ‘Man aye Lubaŋawa mukwanyowa woko ki i Ejipt,’ gin ma gutiyo gutiyo me yeto in," 
Nehemiah9:19 ento in pe ibwotogi ata Him pi kicani; ki pol mucuŋ macalo wir ma obedo ka telo wigi iyo-ni, onoŋo pe orwenyo woko ki botgi i dyeceŋ, kadi mac mucuŋ macalo wir ma obedo ka menyo botgi yo ma giwoto iye i dyewor bene pe orwenyo woko ki botgi." 
Nehemiah9:20 In imiyo Cwiny meri maber me pwonyogi, dok pe iweko pitogi ki manna, imiyogi bene gumato pii me kweyo orwo." 
Nehemiah9:21 In yam igwokogi maber i tim pi mwaka pyeraŋwen, kun imiyo botgi gin ducu ma gin mito, dok boŋŋigi yam pe guti guyec woko ducu, ki tyengi bene yam pe okwot." 
Nehemiah9:22 In imiyo gulwenyo ci guloyo lwak rok mapol, ipoko botgi lobo ma cok ki wan apokki lobogi, kun gumayo lobo pa Cikon kabaka me Kecibon kacel ki lobo pa Og kabaka me Bacan." 
Nehemiah9:23 In imiyo likwayogi gunya mapol gudoko macalo lwak lakalatwe ma i polo, in yam imiyogi lobo ma myero gubed iye, en lobo ma yam ikwoŋo pire ni ibimiyo bot kwarogi wek gucam obed megi." 
Nehemiah9:24 Likwayogi gudonyo ci gumayo lobo pa jo Kanaan woko; dok in iloyo wegi lobo ma gibedo kunnu, ci i niyogi i ciŋgi gin kacel ki lukergi ki lwakgi ducu wek guti kwedgi gin ma gimito." 
Nehemiah9:25 Lwakki yam gumako gaŋi cel gogo kacel ki lobo ma ceko cam, ka gukwanyo odi ki lonyo ducu ma tye iye, ki bur pii ma gituco odonyo i nom piny, ki potti me yadijeituni ki lwak yadi ducu ma nyako nyiggi, kacel ki potti olok ma ginyako nyiggi madwoŋ; ma yam gucamo guyeŋ kwede ka gucako cwe ma cwinygi obedo yom twatwal pi jami mapol mabeco ma imiyogi-ni." 
Nehemiah9:26 “Ento lwakki gujemo dok gukwero lubo cikki; gubolo cikki odok yo tuŋ i ŋegi, kun gineko lunebini, ma gujukogi ni gulokke gudwog boti, ci pe guwinyo, gubedo ka yeti kare ducu." 
Nehemiah9:27 Pi meno omiyo iweko lukworgi oloyogi i lweny, dok gudiyogi matek; gukok boti i kare ma gitye i can ni ikonygi bene, ci in iwinyo kokogi ki i polo. Doŋ pi kicani madwoŋ omiyo icwalo botgi jo ma myero otel wigi, gin jo ma yam olarogi ki i ciŋ lumerokgi-ni." 
Nehemiah9:28 Ento i kare ma kuc dok odwogo botgi, gin gucako timo bal dok aye i nyimi, oweko in dok imiyogi i ciŋ lumerokgi, guloyogi. Kadi bed kumeno i kare ma guŋut gulokke gudwogo gukok boti, ci iwinyo kokogi ki i polo pi tyen mapol ci ilarogi pi kicani madwoŋ." 
Nehemiah9:29 In itito botgi ni gulokke gudwog cen boti dok gulub cikki. Ento gin gubedo ki wakke ci gukwero lubo cikki ducu, kadi bed nene atir ni mako cikki aye miyo dano bedo ki kwo, ento gin gutimo bal i kom gin ma in iciko. Gubedo ki tekwic gukwero lubo cikki." 
Nehemiah9:30 Ibedo ka jukogi pi mwaka mapol, kun ijukogi ki Cwiny meri ma con otiyo i i lunebini; ento gin pe guwinyo. Omiyo iwekogi gubedo i te loc pa lwak me lobo me rok mukene." 
Nehemiah9:31 Ento pi kicani madwoŋ omiyo pe ityekogi woko, dok bene pe ibwotogi ata; pien onoŋo in Lubaŋa ma i won kica madwoŋ, ma kica maki twatwal." 
Nehemiah9:32 “Kombeddi, ai Lubaŋawa madit, ma won twero, dok in Lubaŋa ma gilworo, pien igwoko gicikkeni ki mar meri ma pe lokke, can mapek twatwal-li pe iwek obed gin matidi mo ki tuŋ boti, can meno opoto i komwa, ki i kom lukerwa, ki i kom rwodiwa, ki i kom ajwagiwa, ki i kom lunebiwa, ki i kom kwarowa, ki i kom lwakki ducu, nia wa i kare pa luker me Aciria nio kwede wa onyoo." 
Nehemiah9:33 Ento in itimo gin ma tye atir pi pwodowa kit meno; in ibedo ka tic kwedwa ki ada, ento wan aye ma watyeko timo bal." 
Nehemiah9:34 Lukerwa, rwodiwa, kacel ki ajwagiwa, ki kwarowa ducu yam pe gugwoko cikki, dok, pe gulubo gin ma iciko kadi wa jukki ducu ma onoŋo ijukogi kwede." 
Nehemiah9:35 Luker guloyo lwakki pi gum madit ma imiyo botgi, i kare ma gubedo ka malac i ŋom maber ma ceko cam ma imiyo botgi, ento gin pe gulokke, pe guweko timgi marac wek guti gin ma imito." 
Nehemiah9:36 Nen, kombeddi wan doŋ wadoko opii i lobo ma yam imiyowa ni wacam gin ma ocek i potone ki yomcwiny, kacel ki jami ducu mabeco ma nonne iye." 
Nehemiah9:37 Lonyo me lobo ducu wamiyo bot luker ma in iketogi me loyowa pi balwa; gin gitye ki tek me loyo komwa ki Umwa makwo ducu, kit ma gimito, omiyo wan kombeddi watye ki atwom madwoŋ.”" 
Nehemiah9:38 Pi gin ducu ma doŋ otyeko timme, wan Lujudaya kombeddi waketo ciŋwa i cikke ma wacoyo acoya i buk, dok rwodiwa, Lulevi ki ajwagiwa ducu guketo ciŋgi i cikke man me mokone matwal." 
Nehemiah10:1 Ŋat mukwoŋo keto ciŋe obedo Nekemia wod pa Kakalia, ma en laloc me lobo, ka i ŋeye Jedekia bene oketo ciŋe," 
Nehemiah10:2 Jo ma guketo ciŋgi bene obedo ajwagi magi: Ceraya, Ajaria, Jeremia," 
Nehemiah10:3 Packur, Amaria, Malkija," 
Nehemiah10:4 Katuc, Cebania, Maluk," 
Nehemiah10:5 Karim, Meremot, Obadia," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Gineton, Baruk," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Gineton, Baruk," 
Nehemiah10:7 Meculam, Abija, Mijamin," 
Nehemiah10:8 Maajia, Bilgai, Cemaya." 
Nehemiah10:9 Lulevi ma guketo ciŋgi obedo Yecwa wod pa Ajania, Binui ma i kin likwayo pa Kenadad, Kadmiel;" 
Nehemiah10:10 ki utmegigi, Cebania, Kodia, Kelita, Pelaya, Kanan," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, Rekob, Kacabia," 
Nehemiah10:12 Jakur, Cerebia, Cebania," 
Nehemiah10:13 Kodia, Bani, Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Jo magi aye gubedo ludito ma loyo lwak: Paroc, Pakat-moab, Elam, Jatu, Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, Ajgad, Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adoniya, Bigvai, Adin," 
Nehemiah10:17 Ater, Kejekia, Ajur," 
Nehemiah10:18 Kodia, Kacum, Bejai," 
Nehemiah10:19 Karip, Anatot, Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magpiac, Meculam, Kejir," 
Nehemiah10:21 Mecejabel, Jadok, Jadua," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatia, Kanan, Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:23 Kocea, Anania, Kacub," 
Nehemiah10:24 Kalokeci, Pilka, Cobek," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rekum, Kacabna, Maaceya," 
Nehemiah10:26 Akia, K anan, Anan," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluk, Karim, Baana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Wan jo Icrael, ajwagi, Lulevi, lugwok-doggola me ot pa Lubaŋa, luwer, ki lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa ki jo mukene ducu ma wapokke woko kenwa ki i kom jo ma gibedo i lobo meno, wek walub cik pa Lubaŋa, wan kacel ki monwa ki litinowa awobe ki anyira ducu ‘ma doŋ gin dito ma giromo niaŋ lok," 
Nehemiah10:29 kombeddi waribbe ki utmegiwa, ki luditowa kun wakwoŋo kwoŋ ma walamme kekenwa ni wek can opot i komwa ka ce pe wabilubo cik man, kun pe walubo cik pa Lubaŋa ma yam Moses latic pa Lubaŋa omiyo botwa. Wakwoŋo ni wabibedo kun watiyo gin ma Rwot ma en R wotwa yam ociko, ki dok ni wabigwoko cikke ducu ki gin ma en mito." 
Nehemiah10:30 Wan pe wabimiyo lurok ma gibedo i lobowa ginyomo anyirawa, ki wan bene pe wabinyomo anyiragi bot awobewa." 
Nehemiah10:31 Ka ce lurok ma gitye i lobo man gukelo jamigi mo nyo kai, nyo kit nyig cam mo me catone botwa i nino me cabit, nyo i nino mo maleŋ, ci wan pe wabiwilo jamigi. Dok pe wabipuro pur i mwaka me abirone, i kare meno bene wabiŋolo banya ducu ma myero gicul." 
Nehemiah10:32 Wan waye me miyo dul me adek i cekel acel mwaka ki mwaka me konyo tic i ot pa Lubaŋawa. 
Nehemiah10:33 Wabimiyo jami magi pi woro Lubaŋa; mugati me aketa i nyim Rwot, gityer me moko kwon pi nino ducu, ki gityer me gitum awaŋa me nino ducu, gityer maleŋ pi nino me cabit ducu, nino madito me por dwe, nino madito ma giciko ducu, jami maleŋ-gu ducu, ki gitum me bal pi kwanyo bal pa jo Icrael, ki jami ma mitte pi tic ducu ma gitiyo i ot pa Lubaŋa," 
Nehemiah10:34 Wan lwak, kacel ki ajwagi, ki Lulevi, wabibolo kwir mwaka ki mwaka me moko kaka mene ma myero gukel yen i ot pa Lubaŋa me wano gitum awaŋa ma gityero bot Rwot Lubaŋawa, kit macalo cik mito, kun gilubo dog odi pa kwarogi, i kare ma giciko." 
Nehemiah10:35 Wan waye me tero kai manyen ma wakayo, kacel ki nyig yadi ducu mukwoŋo cek, macalo gityer i ot pa Lubaŋa mwaka ki mwaka." 
Nehemiah10:36 Dok bene ŋat acel acel i kinwa bitero latin laco ma en latin me kayone, miyo bot ajwagi gin lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa, me dyerone bot Lubaŋa, ki dok bene wabimiyo litino dyaniwa me kayo ma dyaŋiwa gunywalo ki litino kayo romi nyo dyegi ma romiwa nyo dyegiwa gunywalo, kit macalo cik mito." 
Nehemiah10:37 Wabitero mo ko kwon me kai manyen mukwoŋo cek wamiyo bot ajwagi, kacel kijami me kony mewa ma wamiyo, ki gityer mukene ducu macalo me koŋo vino, moo nyig yat jeituni ki kit kwa nyig yadi ducu mapatpat, mwaka ki ki mwaka, kun waketo i kicika odi matino me ot pa Lubaŋa, Wabimiyo dul acel me apar me kwa cam mapatpat ma wapuro bot Lulevi ma gin lujog dul acel me apar ki bot lupur ma tye i gaŋiwa," 
Nehemiah10:38 Ajwagi ma gin likwayo pa Aron gubed kacel ki Lulevi i kare ma noŋo gigamo dul acel me apar. Lulevi myero gutyer dul acel me apar me jami ma gijogo i ot pa Lubaŋa, i kicika me odi matino, ki i odi me kano jami." 
Nehemiah10:39 Jo Icrael kacel ki Lulevi myero gumi kai, koŋo vino, ki moo me nyig jeituni gukel i odi me kano jami, ka ma gigwoko iye jami ma gitiyo kwedgi i kabedo maleŋ, ka ma ajwagi gitye iye i dog tic, lugwok-doggola, ki dul pa luwer. Wan pe wabibwoto ot pa Lubaŋawa ata." 
Nehemiah11:1 Lutel wi lwak onoŋo gibedo i Jerucalem, ki lwak mukene-gu gubolo kwir me yero ŋat acel i kom jo apar me cito ka bedo i gaŋ maleŋ me Jerucalem, ma kun noŋo jo mukene mudoŋŋe gibedo i gaŋi mukene." 
Nehemiah11:2 Lwak gupwoyo jo ma gumine pigi kengi me bedo i Jerucalem. 
Nehemiah11:3 Magi aye ludito me lobo Juda ma gubedo i Jerucalem. Ento i gaŋi mukene ducu ma i Juda dano acel acel con obedo i lobone ma i gaŋigi, jo Icrael, ajwagi, Lulevi, lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa, ki likwayo pa lutic pa Solomon." 
Nehemiah11:4 Likwayo pa Juda ki likwayo pa Benjamin bene gubedo i Jerucalem. Magi aye likwayo pa Juda ma gubedo i Jerucalem: Ataya ma wod pa Ujia, ma wod pa Jekaria, ma wod pa Amaria, ma wod pa Cepatia, ma wod pa Makalalel, ma i kin likwayo pa Perej;" 
Nehemiah11:5 ki Maaceya wod pa Baruk, ma wod pa Kolkoje, ma wod pa Kajaya, ma wod pa Adaya, ma wod pa Joyarib, ma wod pa Jekaria, ma i kin likwayo pa Cela," 
Nehemiah11:6 Likwayo pa Perej ducu ma gubedo i Jerucalem onoŋo giromo miya aŋwen ki pyerabicel wiye aboro ma gin twoni oteka. 
Nehemiah11:7 Magi aye likwayo pa Benjamin: Calu wod pa Meculam, ma wod pa Joed, wod pa Pedaya, ma wod pa Kolaya, ma wod pa Maaceya, ma wod pa Itiel, ma wod pa Jecaya." 
Nehemiah11:8 Jo ma gulubo en obedo Gabai, Calai, ki jo miya aboŋwen ki pyeraryo wiye aboro." 
Nehemiah11:9 Joel wod pa Jikri obedo laditgi: ki Juda wod pa Kacenua obedo ladit me aryo ma loyo gaŋ. 
Nehemiah11:9 Joel wod pa Jikri obedo laditgi: ki Juda wod pa Kacenua obedo ladit me aryo ma loyo gaŋ. 
Nehemiah11:10 Magi aye likwayo pa ajwagi: Jedaya wod pa Joyarib, Jakin," 
Nehemiah11:11 Ceraya wod pa Ilkia ma wod pa Meculam ma wod pa Jadok, ma wod pa Merayot, ma wod pa Akitub, laloc me ot pa Lubaŋa," 
Nehemiah11:12 ki utmegigi ma gutiyo tic i kom ot, gin ducu miya aboro ki pyeraryo wiye aryo; ki Adaya wod pa Jerokam, ma wod pa Pelalia, ma wod pa Amji, ma wod pa Jekaria, ma wod pa Packur, ma wod pa Malkija," 
Nehemiah11:13 ki utmegine, ma giloyo dog odi pa kwarogi, gin ducu giromo miya aryo ki pyeraŋwen wiye aryo; ki Amacai, ma wod pa Ajarel, ma wod pa Imer," 
Nehemiah11:14 ki utmegigi, ma gin twoni oteka ma nene, gin ducu grromo miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye aboro. Jabdiel wod pa Kagedolim aye obedo laditgi." 
Nehemiah11:15 Magi aye likwayo pa Lulevi: Cemaya wod pa Kacub, ma wod pa Ajrikam, ma wod pa Kacabia, ma wod pa Buni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 ki Cabetai, ki Jojabad, ma gin ludito i kin ludito pa Lulevi, ma gubedo ka loyo dano i dog tic ma yo tuŋ woko ma gitiyo i kom ot pa Lubaŋa;" 
Nehemiah11:17 ki Matania wod pa Mika, ma wod pa Jabdi, ma wod pa Acap, ma obedo latel ma cako lega me pwoc, ki Bakbukia, ma en dano me aryone i kin utmegine; ki Abda wod pa Camua, ma wod pa Galal, ma wod pa Jedutun," 
Nehemiah11:18 Lulevi ducu ma gubedo i gaŋ maleŋ giromo miya aryo ki pyeraboro wiye aŋwen. 
Nehemiah11:19 Lugwok-doggola me ot pa Lubaŋa obedo Akub, Talmon ki utmegigi ma yam gigwoko doggola; onoŋo giromo miya acel ki pyerabiro wiye aryo." 
Nehemiah11:20 Jo Icrael mukene ma gudoŋ kacel ki Lulevi ki ajwagi gubedo i dul lobo ma yam gimiyo me bedo megi matwal i gaŋi mukene ma tye i Juda. 
Nehemiah11:21 Ento lutic i ot pa Lubaŋa gubedo i kabedo ma tye i Jerucalem ma gilwoŋo ni Opel; kun ludito ma loyogi i dog tic gin aye Jika ki Gicpa. 
Nehemiah11:22 Ladit ma obedo lanen ma onoŋo loyo Lulevi i dog tic i Jerucalem obedo Uji wod pa Bani, ma wod pa Kacabia, ma wod pa Matania, ma wod pa Mika, ma i kin likwayo pa Acap, ma gin yam luwer pi tic ma i ot pa Lubaŋa." 
Nehemiah11:23 Kabaka onoŋo oketo cik ma t iko gin luwer kun tito botgi kit macalo kaka mapatpat myero guwer kwede wer i ot pa Lubaŋa, kun gileyo aleya nino ki nino." 
Nehemiah11:24 Petakia wod pa Mecejabel, ma en ŋat acel i kin likwayo pa Jera ma i kaka pa Juda, yam obedo lami-tam pa kabaka i kom lok ducu ma mako lwak." 
Nehemiah11:25 Jo mapol ma i kom lwak gubedo i gaŋi matino ma cok kipottigi. Jo Juda gubedo i gaŋ ma gilwoŋo ni Kiriat-arba ki i gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, ki i Dibon ki i gaŋi matino ma i ŋete, ki i Jekabjeel ki i gaŋi matino ma i ŋete." 
Nehemiah11:26 Gin bene gubedo i gaŋi magi: Yecwa, Molada ki Bet-pelet," 
Nehemiah11:27 Kajacual ma i Beer-ceba ki i gaŋi matino ma i ŋete," 
Nehemiah11:28 Jiklag Mekona ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete," 
Nehemiah11:29 En-rimmon, Jora, Jarmut," 
Nehemiah11:30 Janoa, Adulam ki gaŋi matinoma i ŋetgi ducu, Lakic ki poto ma i ŋete, ki Ajeka ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete. Gin gugony gubedo nia Beer-ceba nio kwede wa i no ta pa Kinom." 
Nehemiah11:31 Jo Benjamin bene gubedo i Geba nio kwede yo tuŋ anyim, i Mikmac, Aija, Betel ki gaŋi matino ma i ŋete," 
Nehemiah11:32 Anatot, Nob, Anania," 
Nehemiah11:33 Kajor Rama, Gitaim," 
Nehemiah11:34 Kadid, Jeboim, Nebalat," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lod, ki Ono, nota pa lutic diro." 
Nehemiah11:36 Dok dul jo pa Lulevi mukene ma i Juda giribogi woko i kom jo Benjamin. 
Nehemiah12:1 Magi aye ajwagi pa Lubaŋa ki Lulevi ma yam gua ki i opii ma gudwogo kacel ki Jerubabel wod pa Cealtiel ki Yecwa: Ceraya, Jeremia; Ejira," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, Maluk, Katuc," 
Nehemiah12:3 Cekania, Rekum, Meremot," 
Nehemiah12:4 Iddo, Ginetoi, Abija," 
Nehemiah12:5 Mijamin, Maadia, Bilga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Cemaya, Joyarib, Jedaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 Calu, Amok, Ilkia, Jedaya. Jo magi aye gubedo ludito pa ajwagi ki pa utmegigi i kare pa Yecwa." 
Nehemiah12:8 Jo magi aye Lulevi: Yecwa, Binui, Kadmiel, Cerebia, Juda, ki Matania, ma en ki utmegine obedo ŋat acel ma loyo lok i kom wer me lega me pwoc ma giwero bot Lubaŋa." 
Nehemiah12:9 Bakbukia, ki Uno ma utmegigi bene gicuŋ tuŋcel ma gikemme kwedgi i kare me ‘Lega," 
Nehemiah12:10 Yecwa onywalo Joyakim, Joyakim onywalo Eliacib, Eliacib onywalo Joyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Joyada onywalo Yonacan; ki Yonacan onywalo Jadua. 
Nehemiah12:12 I kare ma Joyakim obedo ajwaka madit, ajwagi magi aye onoŋo gin ludito ma loyo doggola pa kwarogi: i kaka pa Ceraya, Meraya, i kaka pa Jeremia, Anania;" 
Nehemiah12:13 i kaka pa Ejira, Meculam, i kaka pa Amaria, Yekokanan;" 
Nehemiah12:14 i kaka pa Maluki, Yonacan; i kaka pa Cebania, Yucepu;" 
Nehemiah12:15 i kaka pa Karim, Adna; i kaka pa Merayot, Kelkai;" 
Nehemiah12:16 i kaka pa Iddo, Jekaria; i kaka pa Gineton, Meculam;" 
Nehemiah12:17 i kaka pa Abija, Jikri; i kaka pa Miniamin, i kaka pa Moadia, Peletai;" 
Nehemiah12:18 i kaka pa Bilga, Camua; i kaka pa Cemaya, Yekonatan;" 
Nehemiah12:19 i kaka pa Joyarib, Matenai; i kaka pa Jedaya, Uji;" 
Nehemiah12:20 i kaka pa Calai, Kalai; i kaka pa Amok, Eber;" 
Nehemiah12:21 i kaka pa Ilkia, Kacabia; i kaka pa Jedaya, Netanel." 
Nehemiah12:22 Gicoyo nyiŋ ludito ma giloyo jo me doggola pa kwaro pa Lulevi woko ducu kikore, i kare me kwo pa Eliacib, Joyada, Yokanari, ki Jadua. Dok bene gicoyo nyiŋ ajwagi ducu nio wa i kare me loc pa kabaka Dario me Percia." 
Nehemiah12:23 Likwayo pa Levi ma giloyo doggola pa, kwarogi gicoyo nyiijgi woko i buk me Tekwaro nio wa i kare pa Yokanan wod pa Eliacib." 
Nehemiah12:24 Lulevi onoŋo giribogi woko gubedo i dul mapatpat ma lulocgi i dog tic obedo Kacabia, Cerebia, ki Yecwa wod pa Kadmiel. Dul aryo gipako Lubaŋa ki wer lawaŋacel kun giloco wer aloca, ma gimiyo pwoc bot Lubaŋa, kun gilubo cik ma kabaka Daudi ma en dano pa Lubaŋa yam ociko," 
Nehemiah12:25 Jo magi aye gubedo lugwok-doggola me ot: pa Lubaŋa, dok bene onoŋo gikuro ot kano jami ki i doggola me ot pa Lubaŋa: Matania, Bakbukia, Obadia, Meculam, Talmon, ki Akub." 
Nehemiah12:26 Jo magi gubedo i kare pa Joyakim, wod pa Yecwa ma en wod pa Yekojadak, ki i kare pa Nekemia ma obedo laloc, ki i kare pa Ejira ma en obedo ajwaka dok bene obedo lapwony-cik pa Lubaŋa," 
Nehemiah12:27 I kare me kwero cel me Jerucalem, gikelo Lulevi ducu ki i kabedo ducu ma yam gibedo iye, wek dano acel acel okwer nino man ki yomcwiny, ki wer me miyo pwoc, kacel ki wer ma gigoyo ki atego agoya-gu, ki naŋa ki opuk-gu," 
Nehemiah12:28 Jo me doggola pa luwer gua ki i kabedo ducu murumo Jerucalem, ki i gaŋi ducu pa jo Netopa;" 
Nehemiah12:29 ki jo mukene gua ki i Bet-gilgal ki i lobo murumo Geba ki Ajimavet, ka ma onoŋo yam doŋ gugero iye pacogi murumo Jerucalem." 
Nehemiah12:30 Ajwagi kacel ki Lulevi gulonnye kekengi; ka dok gulonyo lwak ki dogcel ducu ki cel me gaŋ bene," 
Nehemiah12:31 An akelo rwodi me Juda aketo gucuŋ malo i wi cel me gaŋ, ka acako ketogi i dul madito aryo guwoto gurumo gaŋ, kun giwero wer me miyo pwoc bot Lubaŋa. Jo ma i buca acel guwoto ki i wi cel me gaŋ nio kwede wa i dogcel ma cito wi odur;" 
Nehemiah12:32 ki Kocaya owoto kun lubo ŋegi, ka dok nucu pa rwodi me Juda gulube." 
Nehemiah12:33 Ajwagi magi ma gubedo ka kuto tum aye dok gulubo: Ajaria, Ejira, Meculam," 
Nehemiah12:34 Juda, Benjamin, Cemaya, ki Jeremia," 
Nehemiah12:35 Ka dok ajwagi ma gubino gulubogi ma gubedo ka kuto tum obedo Jekaria wod pa Yonacan, ma wod pa Cemaya, ma wod pa Matania, ma wod pa Mikaya, ma wod pa Jakur, ma wod pa Acap," 
Nehemiah12:36 kacel ki jo magi ma gin jo me kaka ne ma gulube: Cemaya, Ajarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Netanel, Juda ki Kanani; gubino ma gumako jami me wer pa Daudi ma en dano pa Lubaŋa. Ejira ma en lapwony-cik pa Lubaŋa owoto mere anyim obedo ka telo wigi," 
Nehemiah12:37 Ka guo i Dogcel me Waŋ It guwoto atir guito i kom rwom ma cito i gaŋ kai pa Daudi, ci gukato ot kai pa Daudi woko guwok ki malo, ka gudok cen i kom cel ma cok ki Dogcel me Pii ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ me Jerucalem." 
Nehemiah12:38 Jo ma i dul mu kene ma gubedo ka miyo pwoc bot Lubaŋa guwoto gudok yo tuŋ lacam, ka doŋ an, kacel ki nucu pa lwak wacako lubogi. Wawoto ki i wi cel ma malo i nyim Lubele me Keno, wao kwede i kom cel malac," 
Nehemiah12:39 ki kunnu wawoto wakato ki i wi dogcel pa Epraim wawok ki i dog gaŋ macon, ka wao kwede i Dogcel me Rec, ka wawok ki i ŋet Lubele ma gilwoŋo Kananel ki i ŋet Lubele ma gilwoŋo Miya, ka wacito wao kwede wa i Dogcel me Romo; ka doŋ wabino wagiko wotwa cok ki dogcel pa lukurpiny," 
Nehemiah12:40 Kit meno lwak ducu ma gitye i dul aryo-ni ma gubedo ka miyo pwoc bot Lubaŋa guo i kabedo ka ma ot pa Lubaŋa tye iye, an kacel ki nucu ludito pa lwak onoŋo watye kacel." 
Nehemiah12:41 Ajwagi magi onoŋo gitye i dul ma mera: Eliakim, Maaceya, Miniamin, Mikaya, Elioenai, Jekaria ki Anania, ma gumako tum;" 
Nehemiah12:42 ki Maaceya, Cemaya, Eleajar, Uji, Yekokanan, Malkija, Elam ki Ejer, Luwer guwero wer ki dwangi maloŋo adada ma Jejrakia aye obedo ka telogi ki wer." 
Nehemiah12:43 I nino meno gityero gitum mapol, dok lwak bene gubedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, pien Lubaŋa omiyo cwinygi obedo yom twatwal. Mon kacel ki litino bene cwinygi obedo yom matek i kare meno me kwero cel me gaŋ. Mumiyo woo me yomcwiny ma jo gubedo ka daŋŋe kwede i Jerucalem owinnye wa i kabedo ma tye ka mabor." 
Nehemiah12:44 I kom nino meno giyero jo ma giloyo kicika odi me kano jami, ka ma gigwoko iye jami ma gimiyo me kony pi ot pa Lubaŋa, kal manyen ki nyig yat mukwoŋo cek i mwaka acel acel, kacel ki dul acel me apar, me keto i igi jami ducu kit macalo cik mito pi konyo ajwagi ki Lulevi, kun lubo kit wei potti ma i gaŋi matino. Jo Juda cwinygi obedo yom twatwal i kom ajwagi ki Lulevi ma gubedo ka tic." 
Nehemiah12:45 Gin gutiyo gin ma Lubaŋagi ocikogi, dok bene gutiyo tic me lonyo dano, kit macalo yam luwer ki lugwok-doggola gutimo, kit macalo con Daudi ki wode Solomon guciko," 
Nehemiah12:46 I kare pa Daudi ki Acap ma onoŋo ladit me wer, luwer onoŋo giwero wer me pak ki me miyo pwoc bot Lubaŋa." 
Nehemiah12:47 I kare pa Jerubabel ki i kare pa Nekemia jo Icrael ducu gubedo ka miyo jami macalo mot nino ducu pi konyo luwer me ot pa Lubaŋa, ki pi lugwok ot pa Lubaŋa. Lwak gumiyo gityer maleŋ bot Lulevi, ki Lulevi Pene gumiyo dul ma mitte bot ajwagi ma gin likwayo pa Aron." 
Nehemiah13:1 I kare meno gikwano cik pa Moses bot lwak wek guwiny; ci gunoŋo i dul mo ka ma gicoyo ni pe giye dano mo ma en jo Ammon kadi ki jo Moab mo me donyo i cokke pa lwak ma gin jo pa Lubaŋa. 
Nehemiah13:2 Lok man gicoyo pien onoŋo jo Ammon ki jo Moab yam gukwero miyo cam ki pii bot jo Icrael i kare ma gia woko ki i Ejipt. Gin guwilo Balaam me ceno jo Icrael, ento Lubaŋawa oloko cenowaŋi odoko gum botwa." 
Nehemiah13:3 I kare ma jo Icrael doŋ guwinyo gikwano cik, ci gucako poko jo ma gin likwayo pa lurok woko ducu ki i kom jo Icrael." 
Nehemiah13:4 I kare ma lok man peya otimme, onoŋo ajwaka Eliacib ma yam giketo en me loyo kicika ma i ot pa Lubaŋa, omako larem gin ki Tobia." 
Nehemiah13:5 En oyu bo kicika acel malac pi Tobia, ma yam onoŋo obedo me gwoko jami macalo gityer me moko kwon ki odok luban ma gityero, jami ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Lubaŋa, ki dul acel me apar me kal, koŋo vino ki moo ma yam gimiyo bot Lulevi ki luwer ki lugwok-doggola pi lubo cik, kacel ki jami me mot pi konyo ajwagi," 
Nehemiah13:6 I kare ma lokke timme onoŋo an ape i Jerucalem, pien i mwaka me pyeradek wiye aryo me loc pa Aritakcec kabaka me Babilon onoŋo acito ka tito lok man bot kabaka. I kare mo alego kabaka ni adok cen," 
Nehemiah13:7 ci en oye omiyo adok cen i Jerucalem, ci cut anoŋo ni Eliacib otimo bal me ye ni Tobia obed i kicika acel i dyekal ma i ot pa Lubaŋa," 
Nehemiah13:8 Kiniga omaka matek, ci abolo jami pa Tobia me ot woko ducu ki i kicika meno," 
Nehemiah13:9 Dok amiyo cik cut me lonyo kicika ducu; ka doŋ acako dwoko iye jami ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Lubaŋa, kacel ki gityer me moko kwon ki odok luban." 
Nehemiah13:10 Dok bene anoŋo ni Lulevi kacel ki luwer ma gubedo ka tic gua woko ki i Jerucalem gudok cen i pottigi, pien lwak pe gumiyo dul ma giciko me amiya ki Lulevi." 
Nehemiah13:11 Ci an acako da i kom ludito ma giloyo lwak kun awacci, “Piŋo wuweko gibwoto ot pa Lubaŋa?” Acako coko Lulevi kacel ki luwer adwokogi cen i ot pa Lubaŋa ci aketogi i dog ticgi i kabedogi." 
Nehemiah13:12 Jo Juda ducu gukelo dul acel me apar me kai, kono yino ki moo i kicika odi me kano jami." 
Nehemiah13:13 Aketo jo magi me loyo tic i kom kicika odi me kano jami: Celemia ma en ajwaka, Jadok ma lapwony-cik ki Pedaya ma en Lalevi. Dok aketo Kanan wod pa Jakur, ma wod pa Matania, me bedo lakonygi, pien onoŋo dano ducu giŋeyo ni gin jo ma lugen; ticgi obedo me poko jami bot utmegigi." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ai Lubaŋana, po pira i kom lok man, pe ijwa ticca mabeco ma doŋ atyeko tiyone me yubo ot pa Rwot Lubaŋana ki pi ticce woko." 
Nehemiah13:15 I kare meno abedo ka neno jo mapol ma i Juda gubedo ka biyo kono yino i bur ka ma gibiyo iye i nino me cabit, kun jo mukene guyweko nyig kai, kono yino, nyig olok, nyig oduro ki kit kwa yec ducu mapatpat gutweyo i wi kana gutero i Jerucalem, i nino me cabit. Ci an ajukogi bene ni pe gucat cam i nino meno." 
Nehemiah13:16 Jo mogo ma gua ki i lobo ma orumo lobo Turo onoŋo bene yam gibedo i Jerucalem, ci gukelo rec ki kwa jami ducu me acata, ci gucato bot jo Juda ki i Jerucalem i nino me cabit." 
Nehemiah13:17 Omiyo akeco matek i kom ludito me Juda kun awaco botgi ni, “Man kit gin marac aŋo ma wutye ka tiyone-ni, ma wupvedo kwede cen cabit-ti?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Lubaŋawa mo no pe okelo can man i komwa ki i kom gaŋ man ni pien kwarowa bene yam gutiyo kit meno? Wun dok wutye ka medo akemo pa Lubaŋa ni obin i kom jo Icrael pi pyedo cen cabit.” 
Nehemiah13:19 Amiyo cik ni i acakki cabit ducu, tekke piny doŋ mito yuto, dogcel ducu myero gilor woko, ma pe dok myero giyabgi nio wan ma nino me cabit oka to, Aketo jona mogo ka kuro dog gaŋi me neno ni yec mo pe gikelogi i gaŋ i cen cabit." 
Nehemiah13:20 Lucat-wil ki lucat jami ducu ma kitgi patpat ma gukelo jamigi gubuto i ne gaŋ me Jerucalem, kicel nyo kiryo." 
Nehemiah13:21 Ento ajukogi kun apenyogi ni, “Piŋo wun wubuto woko i ne gaŋ i nyim cel? Ka dok wumedde ka timo kit meno ci abilweny kwedwu ki tek.” Nia i kare meno pe dok gudwogo cen i cen cabit." 
Nehemiah13:22 Amiyo cik bot Lulevi ni myero gulonnye kekengi ci gucit ka kuro dogcel ducu, me neno ni gigwoko nino me cabit obedo maleŋ, Ai Lubaŋana, po pira, ki pi lok man bene, dok ilar kwena pi dit me mar meri ma pe lokke." 
Nehemiah13:23 I kare-nu bene aneno co mapol ma gin Lujudaya gunyomo anyira Acidod, Ammon ki Moab, gudoko mongi." 
Nehemiah13:24 Omiyo nucu pa litinogi gubedo ka loko leb pa jo Acidod, ki leb oa jo mukene ma doŋ pe gitwero loko, Leb Ibru ma en leb pa jo Juda." 
Nehemiah13:25 Akeco i komgi omiyo acenogi woko kun apwodo jo mogo ki i kingi, dok aputo yer wigi woko; amiyo gukwoŋo kwoŋ i nyiŋ Lubaŋa, kun awacci, “Wun pe wubimiyo anyirawu bot awobegi ni gunyom, dok gin bene pe gukwany anyirawu me anyoma pi awobegi kadi wun pe myero wunyomme kwedgi." 
Nehemiah13:26 Solomon yam pe otimo bal pi lok pa mon ma gin anyira rok? I kin rok mapol onoŋo pe tye kabaka mo macalo Solomon pien Lubaŋa omaro Solomon makato omiyo Lubaŋa oketo en obedo kabaka ma loyo Icrael; ento kadi bed kumeno mon ma gin anyira rok mukene gumiyo en opoŋo i bal. 
Nehemiah13:27 Wun bene wumito wan walub lanen me gin marac ma wun wutimo, wek pe walub cik pa Lubaŋawa, pi nyomo anyira pa lurok me bedo monwa?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Dok dano mo acel i kom likwayo pa Yekoyada, wod pa Eliacib ajwaka madit, onoŋo onyomo nya pa Canbalat ma jo Bet-koron, ci aryemo en woko ki bota." 
Nehemiah13:29 Ai Lubaŋana, in ipo pigi, pien doŋ gubalo nyiŋgi woko me bedo ajwagi, dok bene gubalo gicikke ma iketo i kin in ki ajwagi kacel ki Lulevi." 
Nehemiah13:30 An doŋ alonyo jo Icrael woko kit meno i kom gin ducu ma obedo pa lurok, ka acako moko tic pa ajwagi ki Lulevi, kun dano acel acel ŋeyo dog ticce ma myero eti." 
Nehemiah13:31 Ka dok ayubo kit ma myero gikel iye yen me gityer i kare ma mitte kikome, kacel ki gityer me cam me wi mwaka ma okwoŋo cek. Ai Lubaŋana, doŋ ipo pira, itima maber." 
Esther1:1 Man lok mutimme i kare pa Akacwero ma yam loyo piny nia ki i India nio kwede wa i lobo Etiopia, kun loyo dul lobo mapat-pat ma romo miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye abiro kulu," 
Esther1:2 I kare meno kabaka Akacwero obedo i wi kom kerre i gaŋ kalle i Cuca. 
Esther1:3 I mwaka me adek me locce en ocako tedo karama pi rwodine ki ludito wi ticce ducu; ludito wi mony me Percia ki me Media gubino iye, kacel ki ludito me awora ki lulo dullobo mapatpat ducu." 
Esther1:4 En obedo ka nyuto botgi lonyo ki deyo ma tye i te kerre ki dit me locce, ki woro ma lwak omiye, pi lwak nino mapol, nino miya acel ki pyeraboro kulu." 
Esther1:5 Ka kare meno ducu doŋ otum, kabaka ocako tedo karama pi jo ducu ma gibedo i gaŋ madit me Cuca, jo madoŋo ki matino. Obedo kwedgi pi nino abiro i dyekal ki i poto me ka namo ma tye i ŋet ot mere." 
Esther1:6 Dyekalle gidero ki cuka boŋo pamba matarre ki boŋo ma bulu ma gitweyo ki tol uci camanini ki tol ma lamar lamar ma girwako i agit me ryal ma i kom wir ma gitiyo ki got mapwot me wel. Gi-bedo onoŋo tye ma gitiyo ki jabu ki ryal. Ka ma gicibogi iye onoŋo gipeto iye godi ma gidero ki kidi matino makwar ki matar, ki gin mukene ma ryeny ki ki di matino me wel." 
Esther1:7 Gikelo ginamata i kikopo mejabu ma kitgi patpat; kabaka onoŋo omiyo gionyo koŋo vino mabup twatwal muporo lonyone. 
Esther1:8 Koŋo vino bene gimato ma lubo cik, kun pe gidiyo dano mo tektek; pien onoŋo kabaka omiyo cik bot ludito tic ducu ma i gaŋ kalle ni dano acel acel omat kit ma cwinye mito." 
Esther1:9 Vasti ma en aye daker otedo karama bene pi mon, obedo kwedgi i gaŋ kal pa kabaka Akacwero." 
Esther1:10 I nino me abiro me karama meno, ma cwiny kabaka doŋ odpko yom ki mat, en ociko Meuman, Bijita, Karbona Bigita, Abagita, Jetar ki Karkac, ma gin aye ludito kal abiro ma gikologi ma gitiyo bot kabaka Akacwero," 
Esther1:11 ni myero gukel Vasti ma daker mere i nyime, kun girwako lalukanane me ker i wiye, wek onyute bot lwak jo ma rokgi patpat ki bot rwodi wek gunen kit ma dakone ber kwede, pien mwonya mada me anena." 
Esther1:12 Ento Vasti okwero lubo cik pa kabaka ma onoŋo ooro ludito kalle bote-ni, ci pe obino. Pienno omiyo kiniga omako kabaka mada, cwinye owaŋ matek." 
Esther1:13 Ci kabaka ocako lok ki luryeko ma giŋeyo lok me kare mapatpat, pien meno obedo kit pa kabaka; kare ducu en penyo lok bot jo ma giŋeyo cik ki kit me ŋolo kop," 
Esther1:14 Jo ma cok kwede gin aye Karcena, Cetar, Adimata, Tarcic, Merec, Marcena ki Memukan, ma gin rwodi pa jo Percia ki Media ma gitye ki twero me bino bot kabaka i kare mo keken, ludito ma gikwoŋo nyim jo mukene ducu ma i kerre pi ditogi." 
Esther1:15 Openyogi ni, “I te cik myero gitim gin aŋo i kom daker Vasti, pien pe olubo cik pa kabaka Akacwero ma onoŋo ooro ludito kalle bote pi lwone?”" 
Esther1:16 Ci Memukan odok iye i nyim kabaka ki rwodi ni, “Daker Vasti pe otimo bal bot kabaka keken, ento bot rwodi ducu me rok ducu ma i dul lobo ducu ma kabaka Akacwero loyo-ni;" 
Esther1:17 pien tim man ma daker otimo-ni lokke binene bot mon ducu, miyo gibicayo coggi ki i waŋgi atyer kun giwacci, ‘Kabaka Akacwero owacci gikel daker bote, ento dako okwero bino woko.’" 
Esther1:18 Wa tin kikome mon madito pa jo Percia ki Media ma gutyeko winyo tim pa daker gibitito pire bot rwodi ma i te locpa kabaka, ci meno binyayo cac ki kiniga madwoŋ mada." 
Esther1:19 Ka ce ineno ni ber, wek gicwal cik ma iketo pi ditti in kabaka, dok wek gico i kin cik pa jo Percia ki jo Media ma pe doŋ gitwero lokoneni, daker Vasti doŋ pe myero oo i nyim kabaka Akacwero. Dok wek kabaka omi ditte me bedo daker bot dako mukene ma dok ber kato en woko." 
Esther1:20 Ka cik ma kabaka biketo-ni gibitito pire romo lobo ducu ma i te kerre, kit macalo ditte tye kwedeni, ci bimiyo mon ducu woro coggi, jo me rwom ma malo ki me rwom ma piny.”" 
Esther1:21 Lok meno oyomo cwiny kabaka ki rwodi, ci kabaka otiyo kit macalo Memukan owaco." 
Esther1:22 Ocwalo waraga i kabedo ducu ma en loyo, kun onoŋo gicoyo bot jo me dul lobo acel acel ki kit nukuta ma jo kunnu giŋeyo, ki i leb mapatpat ma oporo rok mapatpat ducu. Ocoyo ni laco acel acel myero obed rwot i ode, dok ni olok lok kun lubo leb pa lutugi." 
Esther2:1 Lacen ki i ŋe lok man, i kare ma kiniga pa kabaka Akacwero doŋ opye, en ocako po pi Vasti ki gin ma ceŋ otimo, ki gin ma giciko i kome." 
Esther2:2 Ci lutic pa kabaka ma gitiyo bote guwacci, “Myero giyeny anyira pi kabaka, anyira ma mwonya ma pud gudoŋo adoŋa," 
Esther2:3 Wek kabaka oyer ludito oketgi i dul lobo acel acel ma en loyo, gucok anyira magi ducu i ot pa mon i gaŋ kalle Cuca, gibed i te Loc pa Egai ladit kai ma gwoko mon pa kabaka. Myero gipok botgi moo ma ŋwece kur me wirregi," 
Esther2:4 ci wek nyako mo ma oye waŋ kabaka odok daker ma ka Vasti.” Lok man oyomo cwiny kabaka, ci otimo kumeno." 
Esther2:5 Onoŋo tye Lajudaya mo ma bedo i gaŋ madit me Cuca ma nyiŋe Mordekai. Wonne obedo Jair, wod pa Cimei ma wod pa Kic me kaka pa jo Benjamin." 
Esther2:6 I kare ma Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon otero Yekonia kabaka me Juda i opii, kun otere i kin lwak jo mukene ma okwanyogi ki i Jerucalem onoŋo Mordekai obedo i kin jo ma gitero," 
Esther2:7 En onoŋo opito Adaca, ma en aye Esta, nya omin wonne, pien onoŋo pe tye ki wonne kadi minne. Nyako-ni onoŋo ber dok mwonya mada; i kare ma wonne ki minne guto woko Mordekai oloko en odoko macalo nyare." 
Esther2:8 Doŋ i kare ma kabaka oketo cikke lokke oywek, ma doŋ gicoko anyira mapol i gaŋ madit me Cuca, giketogi i cin Egai ma lagwok mon pi kabaka, Esta bene gitero i gaŋ kai kunnu, gikete i cin Egai," 
Esther2:9 Ci nyako-ni oyomo cwinye twatwal, cwinye opwoye mada, omiyo en omine moo wirre mapatpat oyotoyot, kacel ki cam muromo pi en, dok oyero aŋeca abiro ki i gaŋ kal pa kabaka pi konyo en, ci omiyo en ki aŋecane kabedo maber makato i gaŋ pa mon pa kabaka." 
Esther2:10 Esta pe onyuto rokke, kadi ki wat mere, pien Mordekai ociko en ni pe onyuti." 
Esther2:11 Doŋ nino ducu Mordekai woto i ŋe cel me gaŋ pa mon wek ene kit ma Esta tye kwede ki gin ma timme ikome. 
Esther2:12 Kare ma giciko pi gwoko mon pi yubo bergi oromo mwaka acel kulu; pi dwe abicel giwirre ki moo murra, dok pi dwe abicel mukene gitiyo ki moo mapatpat ma ŋwecgi kur ki moo ma mon wirre kwede. Ka lacen gitero nyako acel acel bot kabaka Akacwero ka karene oromo." 
Esther2:13 Ka kare pa nyako mo oromo me cito ka nenne ki kabaka, giye en tero kit jami ducu ma iye mito ma en a kwede ki ka ma gigwoko iye mon cito kwede i gaŋ kai pa kabaka." 
Esther2:14 En ci to otyeno ci dwogo cen odiko cito i kabedo me aryo ma gigwoko iye mon, ma lagwok mon ma kakany nyiŋe Ca-acgaj. En dano ma gikolo ma gwoko mon aŋeca pa kabaka. Ka nyako doŋ odwogo pe dok dok cen bot kabaka, kono nyo ka kabaka doŋ mito en ce olwoŋo en ki nyiŋe." 
Esther2:15 Ka nino pa Esta nya pa Abikail omin won Mordekai, ma Mordekai oloko en odoko nyare, oromo me cito ka neno kabaka en pe ocokke ki gin mo openyo mere ladit Egai ma gikolo ma en aye lagwok mon pa kabaka, ci olubo tamme. Dano ducu ma guneno Esta gupwoye mada." 
Esther2:16 I kare ma gitero Esta bot kabaka Akacwero i gaŋ kai kerre i dwe me apar, ma en aye dwe me Tebet, i mwaka me abiro me loc pa kabaka," 
Esther2:17 kabaka ocako maro Esta makato mon mukene-gu ducu. Esta onoŋo kica ki gum madit mada ki bote, makato anyira mukene ducu. Ci doŋ kabaka otugi kwanyo lalukana oruko i wiye, oketo en me bedo daker ka-ka Vasti." 
Esther2:18 Ci kabaka otedo karama madit mada ki rwodine ki ludito wi ticce ducu; man obedo karama me woro Esta, Omiyo bene yweyo i dul lobo ducu ma en loyo, dok opoko mot kit macalo lonyo me kerre tye kwede." 
Esther2:19 I kare ma gicoko anyira kacel tyen me aryone, gimiyo bot Mordekai dit i te loc pa kabaka." 
Esther2:20 Esta onoŋo pe otito kit watte nyo rokke, kit ma Mordekai onoŋo ocike kwede; pien Esta onoŋo winyo Mordekai kit ma yam opite kwede." 
Esther2:21 I nino mo onoŋo Mordekai obedo i dog tic pa kabaka, Bigitan ki Terec, jo aryo ma gikologi ma gigwoko doggola pa kabaka gubedo ki kiniga, ci guyenyo yo me neko kabaka Akacwero woko." 
Esther2:22 Lok man Mordekai oneyo woko ci otito woko ki Esta daker, ci Esta otito ki kabaka kun waco ni Mordekai aye otitte." 
Esther2:23 Ka giyenyo tyen lok man ginoŋo ni ada, ci jo aryonu ducu giyutogi woko i yat me deyo dano. Lok man gicoyo i buk me Lok Mutimme i nyim kabaka." 
Esther3:1 Lacen ki i ŋe meno kabaka Akacwero omiyo dit ki Aman ma jo Agag, wod pa Amedata, omedo rwomme omiye tic me loyo rwodi ducu ma i te locce." 
Esther3:2 Doŋ lutic pa kabaka ma gitiyo tic i te locce gikulle piny giworo Aman, pien kabaka onoŋo ociko kumeno. Ento Mordekai pe okulle piny pi wore," 
Esther3:3 Ci lutic ma gitiyo i te loc pa kabaka gupenyo Mordekai ni, “Piŋo ituro cik pa kabaka?”" 
Esther3:4 Gubedo ka lok bote nino ki nino ento en pe owinyo, mumiyo gucako tito bot Aman me neno ka en twero ye ni Mordekai otim kumeno, pien Mordekai onoŋo otito botgi ni en Lajudaya," 
Esther3:5 Ka Aman oneno ni Mordekai pe kulle piny pi wore, kiniga ocako make mada." 
Esther3:6 Ento pe omito ni enek Mordekai kene; macalo doŋ oniaŋ ni Mordekai Lajudaya, omito ni enoŋ yo me neko Lujudaya ducu ma i te loc pa kabaka Akacwero." 
Esther3:7 I dwe mukwoŋo, ma en aye dwe me Nican, i mwaka me apar wiye aryo me loc pa kabaka Akacwero, gicako bolo kwir ma gilwoŋo ni Pur i nyim Aman nino ki nino, Gibedo ka bolone dwe ki dwe, nio ka ogik i kom dwe me apar wiye aryo, ma en aye dwe me Adar." 
Esther3:8 Ci Aman ocako tito bot kabaka Akacwero ni, “Tye rok mo ma guket woko ata i kin rok mu kene mapatpat ma i dul lobo ducu ma i te kerri. Cikgi pat ki cik pa rok mukene ducu, dok pe gigwoko cikki, in kabaka; doŋ kony mo pe boti me weko ni jo meno gubedi." 
Esther3:9 Ka kabaka oye, myero oket cik me tyekogi woko, ci abiculo talanta alip apar me ryal bot jo ma giloyo tic pa kabaka, wek guket i ot kano lim pa kabaka.”" 
Esther3:10 Ci kabaka owoto agit ki i ciŋe, omiyo bot Aman ma jo Agag, wod pa Amedata, lamerok pa Lujudaya." 
Esther3:11 Ci kabaka owaco bot Aman ni, “Lim ducu gibimini, ki rok meno bene, wek iti kwedgi kit ma ii mito.”" 
Esther3:12 Gicako lwoŋo lukaran pa kabaka i nino dwe apar wiye adek me dwe mukwoŋo, ci gucako coyo cik kitmacalo Aman ociko ducu bot luloyo madoŋo pa kabaka, ki bot lulo dul lobo mapatpat ducu, ki bot rwodi ma loyo rok mapatpat ducu, kun onoŋo gicoyo bot jo me dul lobo acel acel ki kit nukuta ma jo kunnu giŋeyo, ki i leb mapatpat ma oporo rok mapatpat ducu. Gicoyo i nyiŋ kabaka Akacwero, ci gimwono kun gidiyo agit pa kabaka i kom odok." 
Esther3:13 Gimiyo luter-waraga guriŋo ki waraga i dul lobo ducu ma i te loc pa kabaka ni myero ginek, gityek dok gijwer Lujudaya wo ko ducu, jo matino ki madoŋo, mon wa litino, i nino acel keken, i nino dwe apar wiye adek me dwe me apar wiye aryo, ma en aye dwe me Adar, ci giyak jamigi woko bene," 
Esther3:14 Gipoko kopi me waraga meno i dul lobo acel acel me yeko lok man doŋ obed macalo cik, wek rok ducu gubed ma guterre pi nino meno," 
Esther3:15 Luterwaraga guriŋo oyotoyot mada pi cik pa kabaka, dok cik meno gimiyo oneŋe i gaŋ madit me Cuca bene, Aman ki kabaka gubedo megi piny ka mat, ento jo ma tye i gaŋ me Cuca gubedo ka cabbe megi acaba." 
Esther4:1 Ka Mordekai oŋeyo gin mutimme ducu, oyeco boŋŋine woko ci ocako ruko boŋo cola ki onyo buru i wiye, ocito kwede i dye gaŋ madit, kun daŋŋe ki koko ki cwercwiny." 
Esther4:2 Ocito kwede wa i dogcel pa kabaka; noŋo cik okwero ni dano ma oruko boŋo cola pe odony i cel pa kabaka. 
Esther4:3 I dul lobo acel acel, ma lok pa kabaka oo botgi ki cik man, obedo kumo madit mada i kin Lujudaya, Guri kec, gukok, gukumo, ci polgi guruko boŋo cola kun gubuko wigi ki buru." 
Esther4:4 I kare ma aŋeca pa Esta ki luticce ma gikolo gubino gutitte, daker oniŋnye mada ki cwercwiny, ci en ocwalo boŋŋi ni Mordekai oruki wek oluny boŋo cola woko, ento Mordekai pe ogamogi." 
Esther4:5 Lacen Esta olwoŋo Atak, ŋat acel i kom lutic pa kabaka ma gikolo, ma onoŋo gimiyo bote me bedo laor, ci ocwale ka penyo Mordekai gin aŋo mutimme, pi ŋo en timo kumeno," 
Esther4:6 Atak ocito bot Mordekai i dye bar malac me gaŋ madit, i nyim dogcel pa kabaka." 
Esther4:7 Mordekai otitte gin ducu mutimme i kome, ki wel lim kikome ma Aman ocikke me culone i ot kano lim pa kabaka pi neko Lujudaya." 
Esther4:8 Mordekai bene omine kopi me waraga me cik ma gipoko i Cuca pi nekogi, wek en onyut ki Esta, oniaŋ lok meno, wek ocik Esta ni ocit bot kabaka obak doge, wek kabaka otim kica ki jo me rokke." 
Esther4:9 Ci Atak ocito otito lok man ki Esta kit ma Mordekai owacce-ni. 
Esther4:10 Cutcut Esta oloko ki Atak kun cwalo kwena bot Mordekai ni," 
Esther4:11 “Lutic pa kabaka ducu ki dano ma i dul lobo ducu ma i te locce giŋeyo ni kit dano mo, laco nyo dako, ma ocito bot kabaka, ka odonyo wa i dyekal ma i iye ma pe gilwoŋe alwona, tye mere cik acel keken ma omako dano ducu, ni, dano-nu myero ginek woko, kono nyo ka kabaka oilo odoo kerre me jabu tuŋ bote, en aye twero kwo, Ento an pud peya gilwoŋa i nyim kabaka pi nino pyeradek kulu.”" 
Esther4:12 Ci gitito ki Mordekai lok ma Esta owaco," 
Esther4:13 Mordekai odwoko lok ni gitit bot Esta ni, en pe otam ni etye i gaŋ kal pa kabaka nyo miyo ebiloyo makato Lujudaya mukene ducu." 
Esther4:14 Pien ka eliŋ i kare ma kit man kony ki lar bibino bot Lujudaya ki i kabedo mukene, ento en ki ot pa wonne gibito woko. Aŋa kono ma ŋeyo ka nyo gimiyo en odoko daker pi kare macalo man?" 
Esther4:15 Esta owacci, “Titu ki Mordekai ni," 
Esther4:16 ocit ogur Lujudaya ducu ma gitye i Cuca kacel, gucak ri kec pira, pe gucam gin mo dok pe gumat gin mo pi nino adek dyewor ki dyeceŋ. An bene ki aŋecana wabiri kit macalo gin giri-ni. Ci doŋ abicito bot kabaka kadi bed cik okwero. Ka doŋ ato, ci wek ato.”" 
Esther4:17 Mordekai ocito otiyo ducu kit ma Esta ocike kwede, kwede," 
Esther5:1 I nino me adekke Esta oruko jor me kerre ocuŋ kwede i dyekal ma iye ma i gaŋ kal pa kabaka, ma opimme ki ot malac me cokke, En kabaka kono obedo i wi komkerre i gaŋ kalle ma opimme ki dog cel me gaŋ kal." 
Esther5:2 I kare ma kabaka oneno daker Esta ocuŋ i dyekal, obedo ki yomcwiny madit twatwal, oilo odoo kerre me jabu ma onoŋo tye i ciŋe tuŋ bot Esta. Ci Esta onyiko oboŋo wi odoo ker." 
Esther5:3 Kabaka ocako penye ni, “Kop aŋo, daker Esta? Imito atimmi gin aŋo? Gitwero mini kadi bed nucu kerra.”" 
Esther5:4 Ci Esta owaco ni, “Ka onoŋo ber piri, kabaka, amito ni wubin wun ki Aman i cam ma ayubo piri tin.”" 
Esther5:5 Ci kabaka owacci, “Wukel Aman oyot, wek, wati gin ma Esta mito-ni.” Ka kabaka gin ki Aman gucako bino ka cam ma Esta oyubo," 
Esther5:6 I ka re ma gucako mato koŋo vino, kabaka openyo Esta ni, “Gin aŋo ma myero piri? Gitwero mini. Gin aŋo ma ilego? Kadi wa nucu kerra, jami ducu gitwero cobo kakare.”" 
Esther5:7 Ento Esta owacci, “Legana ki gin ma apenyo en aye ni," 
Esther5:8 ka in kabaka itwero tima ber me ye lokka ki cobo gin ma alego, myero in kabaka idwog kany wun ki Aman diki ka cam ma abiyubo piwu, ci diki abitimo macalo in kabaka iwaco.”" 
Esther5:9 Ci Aman ocito ma cwinye yom mada i nino meno, Ento Aman ka oneno Mordekai i dogcel pa kabaka pe oa malo, pe kome bene oryaŋŋe pire, kiniga omake matek twatwal ri kom Mordekai." 
Esther5:10 Kadi bed kit ennu, Aman ociro dok odiyo cwinye, ci ocito paco. Ooro dano ka lwoŋo lureme ki dakone Jerec," 
Esther5:11 Aman ocako boko pi lonyone kit ma dwoŋ kwede, ki kwano wel awobene, rwom mapatpat ma, kabaka omiye me wore, ki kit ma omiye kwede twero mamalo ma kato rwodi ki lutic pa kabaka mukene ducu." 
Esther5:12 Aman omedo doki ni, “Wa cam ma daker Esta oyubo pe oye ŋatti mo me bi no iye, kono wan ki kabaka keken. Dikini doki olwoŋa ka cam aye wan ki kabaka," 
Esther5:13 Ento magi ducu pud peya berra kit macalo aneno Mordekai Lajudaya pud bedo i dogcel pa kabakani,”" 
Esther5:14 Ci dakone Jerec ki lureme ducu guwacci, “Yub yat me deyo dano mabor twatwal ma romo futi pyerabiro wiye abic, wek di ki odiko itit ki kabaka ni myero gide Mordekai iye; ka wek icit ki yomcwiny ka cam ma giyubo piwu wun ki kabaka.” Tam man oyomo i Aman twatwal; otugi yubo yat me deyo dano wok" 
Esther6:1 I dyewor meno kabaka pe onino; ci en omiyo cik ni myero gikel buk me po gin mabeco ma jo mogo gutiyo, buk me tekwaro, ci gikwano i nyim kabaka." 
Esther6:2 Ci gucako noŋo ka ma yam Mordekai otito iye lok i kom Bigitana ki Terec, jo aryo ma gikologi ma gigwoko doggola pa kabaka ma guyenyo yo me neko kabaka Akacwero." 
Esther6:3 Ci kabaka openyo ni, “Woro aŋo nyo dit aŋo ma gimiyo ki Mordekai pi gin ma en otiyo-ni?” Lutic pa kabaka gugamo ni, “Pe gimiye gin mo,”" 
Esther6:4 Ci kabaka openyo ni, “Aŋa ma tye i dyekal?” Aman aye pud odonyo i dyekal ma woko i gaŋ kal kun mito tito ki kabaka pi deyo Mordekai, i yat ma en oyubo pi deyone." 
Esther6:5 Lutic pa kabaka gugamo ni, “Aman ocuŋ i dyekal ca.” Kabaka owacci, “Wulwoŋe obin kany.”" 
Esther6:6 Ci Aman obino, kabaka openye ni, “Myero gitim aŋo ki dano ma kabaka maro keto deyo i kome?” Aman otamo ni, “Man aŋa ma kabaka twero maro miye deyo makato an-ni?”" 
Esther6:7 Aman odok iye ki kabaka ni, “Dano ma kabaka maro kelo deyo i kome," 
Esther6:8 myero gikel jor me ker ma kabaka oruko ki aguragura me ker ma kabaka riŋo kwede, ma giruko lalukana i wiye giruke kwede." 
Esther6:9 Jor ki aguragura myero giket i ciŋ dano madit me awora pa kabaka, wek en oruk dano ma kabaka maro keto deyo i kome-ni, ci ocit kwede i dye bar malac me gaŋ madit, kun noŋo obedo i wi aguragura, ka tito i nyim dano ducu ni, ‘Man aye kit ma gibitimo ki dano ma kabaka maro keto deyo i kume:”" 
Esther6:10 Kabaka owacci, “Rune oyot, Aman, iom jor ki aguragura kit macalo iwaco, tugi tiyo kit meno i kom Mordekai Lajudaya ma bedo i dog ticca-ni, Pe iwek gin mo odoŋ i kom jami ducu ma ikwanogini.”" 
Esther6:11 Ci Aman okwanyo jor ki aguragura, ocako ruko Mordekai, ocito kwede i aye bar malac me gaŋ madit, kun Mordekai obedo wi aguragura, ci obedo ka tito ki dwan maloŋo ni, “Man kit ma gibitimo ki dano ma kabaka maro keto deyo i kome!”" 
Esther6:12 Lacen Mordekai odok i dogcel pa kabaka. Ento Aman orune me dok i gaŋe kun kumo, ma oumo wiye woko." 
Esther6:13 Ci Aman ocako tito ki dakone Jerec ki bot lureme ducu gin ducu mutimme i kome. Lacen jo ma miye ryeko, kacel ki ki dakone, guwacce ni, “Ka Mordekai ma koni doŋ ocako loyi ki dit obedo Lajudaya, pe itwero pyem kwede, ento ibipoto i rwom ma piny twatwal i nyime.”" 
Esther6:14 Ma pud giloko kwede, cutcut luor pa kabaka ma gikologi gutuc guwacci, “Gimiti oyot twatwal pi karama ma Esta oyubo piri.”" 
Esther7:1 Kabaka gin ki Aman gucito i karama bot daker Esta. 
Esther7:2 Doŋ i nino man me aryone doki, ka gitye ka mato koŋo vino, kabaka dok openyo Esta ni, “Gin aŋo ma myero piri, daker Esta? Gin aŋo ma ilego? Kadi wa nucu kerra, jami ducu gitwero cobo kakare.”" 
Esther7:3 Ci daker Esta owacci, “Ka in kabaka itwero tima ber me ye lokka, abako doga ni pe ineka, dok pe inek jo me rokka, Man aye gin ma alego ki boti." 
Esther7:4 Pien wan doŋ gicatowa woko, an ki jo me rokka, ni myero ginekwa woko, gityekwa, gijwerwa woko. Kono nene gicatowa woko, co ki mon, macalo opii, kono pe awaco lok mo, pien can wa pe myero gipor ki rwenyo lim pa kabaka.”" 
Esther7:5 Ci kabaka Akacwero openyo daker Esta ni, “Aŋa ma owaco lok meno? En kono tye kwene ma ette ka timo lok ma kit meno-ni?”" 
Esther7:6 Ci Esta owacci, “A wayi latim aranyi, lamerok! Aman ma kite rac-ci yo!” I kare meno Aman obedo ki lworo madit mada i nyim kabaka ki daker." 
Esther7:7 Kabaka oa woko ki i karama ki kiniga madit mada, okato wa i dyekal ma i ŋet ot ker; ento Aman odoŋ ka lego pi kwone bot daker Esta, pien oneno ni kabaka doŋ oyubbe me keto can i kome." 
Esther7:8 Ka kabaka odwogo ki i dyekal i ŋet ot ker, ka odonyo i ot ka ma onoŋo gubedo iye ka mato koŋo vino, onoŋo Aman orumo coŋe i ŋet ki tanda ka ma Esta obedo iye. Ci kabaka owacci, “Imito timo anywar i kom daker ki i waŋa, wa i oda kikoma?” Ma pud kabaka loko aloka, gitweyo wan Aman woko cut." 
Esther7:9 Ci Karbona ma en aye ŋat acel i kin dano ma gikologi ma lugwok kabaka owacci, “Tye yat me deyo dano ma Aman oyubo pi deyo Mordekai, dano ma lokke olaro kwo pa kabaka-ni, tye ocuŋ i gaŋ pa Aman, borre romo futi pyerabiro wiye abic kulu.”" 
Esther7:10 Kabaka owacci, “Wude en iye.” Ci gucako deyo Aman i wi yat meno ma en oyubo pi deyo Mordekai. Ci kiniga pa kabaka doŋ ocako kee." 
Esther8:1 I nino-nu kabaka Akacwero omiyo ot pa Aman ma en lamerok pa Lujudaya bot daker Esta. Ci Mordekai obino i nyim kabaka, pien Esta doŋ onoŋo otyeko tito pi wat ma tye i kingi ki Mordekai." 
Esther8:2 Kabaka owoto agit ma yam omiyo ki Aman woko ki i ciŋe, ci omiyo ki Mordekai. Ci Esta oketo ot pa Aman i ciŋ Mordekai." 
Esther8:3 Lacen Esta dok ocako lok ki kabaka; opoto piny i tyen kabaka, ka ocako bako doge kun kok ki pig waŋe, ni myero ojuk yub marac woko ma Aman ma jo Agag oyubo pi neko Lujudaya." 
Esther8:4 Kabaka oilo odoo kerre me jabu tuŋ bot Esta," 
Esther8:5 ci Esta oa ocuŋ i nyim kabaka. Ci owaco ni, “Ka onoŋo ber piri, kabaka, dok ka itwero tima ber, ka in kabaka ineno ni ber, ka an ayomo cwinyi, kono gicoyo cik mejuko ‘waraga ma Aman ma jo Agag, wod pa Amedata ocoyo-ni, kun onoŋo oyubo lok ni myero ginek Lujudaya ma i dul lobo ducu ma i te loc pa kabaka," 
Esther8:6 Atwero ciro niŋniŋ ma aneno can madwoŋ tye ka bino i kom rokka-ni? Atwero ciro niŋniŋ ma aneno giemito tyeko wadina woko?” 
Esther8:7 Ci kabaka owaco ki daker Esta ki Mordekai ma Lajudaya ni, “Nen, doŋ atyeko miyo ot pa Aman woko bot Esta, dok bene gityeko deyo Aman woko kun gilyere i wi yat me deyo dano, pien onoŋo mito neko Lujudaya. 484" 
Esther8:8 Doŋ wutwero coyo kit ma iwu mito i kom Lujudaya i nyiŋ kabaka, kun wudiyo agit pa kabaka i kom odok ma gimwono kwede waraga; pien cik ma gicoyo i nyiŋ kabaka, ki ma gidiyo iye agit pa kabaka, pe gitwero lokone.”" 
Esther8:9 Gicako lwoŋo lukaran pa kabaka cut i kare-nu i dwe me adek ma en aye dwe me Civan, i nino dwe pyeraryo wiye adek, ci gucako coyo cik kit ma Mordekai ociko ducu i lok kom Lujudaya bot luloyo madoŋo, bot lulo dano, ki bot rwodi ma loyo dul lobo mapatpat ducu, nia ki i India nio kwede wa i lobo Etiopia, dul lobo mapatpat ma romo miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye abiro kulu. Gicoyo bot jo me dul lobo acel acel ki kit nukuta ma jo kunnu giŋeyo, ki i leb mapatpat ma oporo rok mapatpat ducu, ki bot Lujudaya ducu i kit cocgi ki lebgi." 
Esther8:10 Gicoyo i nyiŋ kabaka Akacwero kun gidiyo agit pa kabaka i kom odok ma gimwono kwede, Gicwalo ki luter-waraga ma giriŋo ki aguragura, aguragura madwir twatwal ma gitiyo kwede pi tic pa kabaka, ma ginywalogi i ot pito aguragura me ker," 
Esther8:11 Pi waraga man kabaka omiyo twero bot Lujudaya i gaŋ ducu ma gubedo iye me ribbe kacel ka gwoko komgi i kom I ukworgi kun gineko, gityeko dok gijwero kit mony mo keken woko, nyo dul lobo mo keken, ma mito poto i komgi ki litinogi ki mongi, ka doki ma gimito yako jamigi," 
Esther8:12 i nino acel mo, i dul lobo ducu liweŋ ma i te loc pa kaba ka Akacwero, i nino dwe apar wiye adek me dwe me apar wiye aryo, ma en aye dwe me Adar." 
Esther8:13 Gipoko kopi me waraga meno i dul lobo acel acel me yweko lok man obed macalo cik bot rok ducu, wek Lujudaya gubed ma guterre mada i nino meno pi culo kwor i kom lumerokgi," 
Esther8:14 Kit meno luter-waraga ma giriŋo ki aguragura madwirre ma gitiyo kwede pi tic pa kabaka, gucako riŋo oyotoyot mada pi cobo cik pa kabaka; dok cik meno gimiyo onene i gaŋ madit me Cuca bene." 
Esther8:15 Mordekai okato woko ki i nyim kabaka kun oruko ruk me ker ma obedo bulu ki matar, ki twon lalukana me jabu, ki jor ma gikwoyo ki boŋo camanini maber ki boŋo ma lamar lamar, ma inoŋo mere gaŋ madit me Cuca opoŋ ki woo me yomcwiny." 
Esther8:16 Lujudaya gubedo ki leŋo ki yomcwiny ki pwoc ki woro. 
Esther8:17 I dul lobo acel acel ki i gaŋ madito ducu ka ma lok pa kabaka oo botgi ki cik man, Lujudaya gubedo ki yomcwiny madit mada, gutedo karama dok gubedo ki yweyo. Jo mapol i kin rok mapatpat ma i lobo guwacci gin Lujudaya, pien gubedo ki lworo" 
Esther9:1 Ci nino dwe apar wiye adek me dwe me apar wiye aryo oromo, ma en aye dwe me Adar. Meno aye nino kikome ma lumerok pa Lujudaya gimito ni gilogi iye pi lok me cik ma kabaka oketo, ento onoŋo olokke odoko nino ma Lujudaya aye myero gulo iye lumerokgi." 
Esther9:2 I nino meno Lujudaya gucokke kacel i gaŋgi i dul lobo ducu liweŋ ma i te loc pa kabaka Akacwero, me neko jo-nu ma onoŋo mito timo aranyi i komgi. Pe tye ŋatti mo ma romo cuŋ i nyimgi, pien lworo omako rok ducu i komgi." 
Esther9:3 Rwodi ducu me dul lobo mapatpat, ki luloyo madoŋo, ki lulo dano, ki lutic pa kabaka, gukonyo Lujudaya, pien lworo madit mada omakogi i kom Mordekai." 
Esther9:4 Pien onoŋo Mordekai odoko dano me awora mada i ot pa kabaka, doŋ ywekane oromo dul lobo ducu, Twero pa Mordekai owoto ki medde mada." 
Esther9:5 Ci Lujudaya gucako lweny i kom lumerokgi ducu; gunekogi ki pala lucwan, gutyekogi woko, gutimo gin ma igi mito i kom jo ma onoŋo gidag wangi-ni." 
Esther9:6 I gaŋ kal madit me Cuca kikome, Lujudaya guneko dano ma romo miya abic, gutyekogi woko." 
Esther9:7 Guneko bene Parcandata, Dalpon ki Acapata," 
Esther9:8 Porata, Adalia ki Aridata," 
Esther9:9 Parmacata, Aricai, Aridai ki Vaijata," 
Esther9:10 ma gin aye awobe apar pa Aman wod pa Amedata, lamerok pa Lujudaya; ento pe guyako jami mo." 
Esther9:11 I nino-nu kikome jo ma ginekogi i gaŋ kai me Cuca ginyuto welgi ki kabaka. 
Esther9:12 Kabaka otito ki daker Esta ni, “Lujudaya guneko lumerokgi miya abic i gaŋ kai me Cuca ki awohe apar pa Aman bene, Gin doŋ gutimo gin aŋo i dul lobo mukene ma i te kerra-ni? Gin aŋo ma myero piri? Gitwero mini, Gin aŋo ma pud ipenyo? Gitwero cobone.”" 
Esther9:13 Ci Esta ogamo ni, “Ka kabaka oye, myero giket cik ni diki doki Lujudaya ma tye i Cuca gutim macalo tin-ni. Ki awobe apar pa Aman doki myero gilyer komgi i wi yat me deyo dano.”" 
Esther9:14 Kabaka oye ni myero gitim kumeno; girriiyo cik meno onene i Cuca ci gulyero kom awobe apar pa Aman i wi yat me deyo dano. 
Esther9:15 Lujudaya ma onoŋo gitye i Cuca gucokke kacel doki i nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen me dwe me Adar, ci guneko dano miya adek i Cuca, ento pe guyako jami mo." 
Esther9:16 Lujudaya mukene ma gibedo i dul lobo mapatpat ma i te Loc pa kabaka guŋbbe kacel bene pi gwoko komgi. Guneko dano alip pyerabiro wiye abic i kom jo ma daggi-ni, mumiyo gunoŋo yweyo i kom lumerokgi; ento pe guyako jami mo." 
Esther9:17 Meno otimme i nino dwe apar wiye adek me dwe me Adar. I nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen en aye guywe iye, ci giloko odoko nino me tedo karama ki me yomcwiny," 
Esther9:18 Ento Lujudaya ma onoŋo gitye i Cuca gukkeco i nino dwe apar wiye adek ki apar wiye aŋwen, mumiyo gin guywe i nino dwe apar wiye abic, ci guloko nino meno odoko nino me tedo karama ki me yomcwiny." 
Esther9:19 Pi meno Lujudaya ma gibedo i caro, i kin gaŋ, gikwero nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen me dwe me Adar macalo nino me yomcwiny ki me tedo karama ki me yweyo, ki nino ma dano poko iye mot me jami mabeco bot luwotgi." 
Esther9:20 Mordekai ocoyo lok magi ducu, ocwalo waraga bot Lujudaya ducu ma gibedo i dul lobo ducu ma i te loc pa kabaka Akacwero, ma gitye cok ki ma gitye ka mabor." 
Esther9:21 Ocikogi ni myero gikwer nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen me dwe me Adar, ki nino dwe apar wiye abic bene me dwe meno, mwaka ki mwaka," 
Esther9:22 ni gin aye nino ma Lujudaya gunoŋo iye yweyo i kom lumerokgi, dwe ma gua kwede ki i cwercwiny medwogo kwede i yomcwiny, ma gua kwede ki i kumo me dwogo kwede i kuc; wek gulok nino magi gubed nino me tedo karama ki me yomcwiny, nino me cwalo jami mabeco bot luwotgi, ki me cwalo mot bot lucan." 
Esther9:23 Lujudaya guye me timo kit ma onoŋo doŋ gucako kwede ki kit ma Mordekai ocoyo botgi-ni. 
Esther9:24 Pien Aman ma jo Agag wod pa Amedata, lamerok pa Lujudaya ducu, opiro lok i kom Lujudaya me nekogi woko, ci obolo kwir ma gilwoŋo ni Pur me loyo tekogi wek etyekgi woko." 
Esther9:25 Ento ka Esta obino i nyim kabaka omiyo twer i coc ni lok marac ma en opiro i kom Lujudaya myero gidwok i wiye, dok ni awobe pa Aman myero gidegi woko i wi yat me deyo dano," 
Esther9:26 Pienno nino-ni gilwoŋo ni Purim, pi lubo nyiŋ kwir ma gilwoŋo ni Pur. Pienno, pi lok ducu ma gicoyo i waraga-nu dok pi can ma gineno pi lok meno ki gin ma otimme i komgi," 
Esther9:27 Lujudaya guye lok man ni myero obed i wigi, ki i wi likwayogi, ki i wi jo ducu ma gibiribbe kwedgi; myero gikwer nino magi aryoni, kun gilubo lok ma gicoyo i kare ma giciko mwaka ki mwaka ma pe gikeŋ." 
Esther9:28 Nino magi myero gipo pigi dok gikwergi wa i kare pa likwayogi ducu i doggola acel acel, i dul lobo ducu ki i gaŋ madito ducu. Lujudaya pe myero guwek gwoko nino magi me Purim, po iye pe myero ogiki i kin likwayogi." 
Esther9:29 Ci daker Esta nya pa Abikail, ocoyo waraga gin ki Mordekai ma Lajudaya, kun moko waraga man me aryo-ni i kom Purim ki twerone ducu." 
Esther9:30 Gicwalo waraga bot Lujudaya ducu ma i dul lobo miya acel ki pyeraryo wiye abiro ma i te loc pa kabaka Akacwero ki lok me kuc ki ada," 
Esther9:31 ni meno nino magi me Purim myero gikwer i kare ma giciko, kit ma Mordekai Lajudaya ki daker Esta guciko bot Lujudaya, ki kit ma Lujudaya onoŋo guciko pigi kengi ki pi likwayogi i kom lok ma mako kare me ri kecgi ki kokogi." 
Esther9:32 Cik pa daker Esta omoko lok man me Purim, ci gicoyo gigwoko i buk." 
Esther10:1 Kabaka Akacwero oketo tic muroni i lobo ki i dog namo. 
Esther10:2 Gin ducu ma Akacwero otiyo pi twerone ki tekone, ki lok ducu i kom deyo madit ma kabaka omiyo ki Mordekai pi medo rwomme gityeko coyone i buk me Tekwaro pa luker me Percia ki Media." 
Esther10:3 Pien Mordekai Lajudaya obedo dano me aryo ma lubo kabaka Akacwero. Obedo dano madit mada i kin Lujudaya, pol lutugi gimare, pien obedo ka yenyo yo me medo berbedo pa jo me rokke, doki loko pi kuc keken i kin lutugi ducu." 
Job1:1 Yam tye dano mo ma i lobo Uj ma nyiŋe Yubu. Dano man onoŋo pe ki bal mo, dok dano ma cwinye leŋ; en lalwor Lubaŋa, ma dag tim marac." 
Job1:2 En onywalo awobe abiro ki anyira adek. 
Job1:3 Lim ma yam tye bote obedo romi ki dyegi alip abiro, kinaga alip adek, twoni pur alip acel, megi kana miya abic, kacel ki lwak luticce mapol mada; en obedo dano madit makato jo ducu ma yo tuŋ wokceŋ." 
Job1:4 A wobene yam gimaro cito ka camo karama i ot pa ŋat acel acel i ninone; ci gicwalo kwena gilwoŋo nyimegigi adek-ki ka cam ki ka mat kwedgi," 
Job1:5 Ka kare me karamagi otum, ci Yubu yam cwalo kwena, Iwoŋogi ci lonyogi. En a malo odiko con, tyero gitum awaŋa muporo welgi ducu, pien Yubu noŋo tamo ni, gwok nyo awobene gubalo, pi yeto Lubaŋa la i cwinygi. Yubu yam timo kit meno jwijwi." 
Job1:6 I nino mo acel awobe pa Lubaŋa gubino gucuŋ i nyim Rwot, ci Catan bene obino i kingi." 
Job1:7 Rwot owaco bot Catan ni, “In ia ki kwene?” Catan ogamo dog Rwot kun wacci, “An aa ka wirre wi lobo, ki ka wot i kin piny i lobo.”" 
Job1:8 Ci Rwot dok owaco bot Catan ni. “Itamo pi maticca Yubu ni meno pe tye ŋat mo macalo en i wi lobo, dano ma pe ki bal mo, dano ma cwinye atir, ma lworo Lubaŋa, dok dag tim marac?”" 
Job1:9 Catan ogamo dog Rwot kun wacci, “tamo ni Yubu lworo Lubaŋa noŋo?" 
Job1:10 Pe in aye irumo kome ki cel, ki ode, ki gin ducu ma en tye kwede, tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi? In imiyo gum i kom tic me ciŋe, limme bene omedde i lobo." 
Job1:11 Ento tugi keto ciŋi cut koni, igud gin ducu ma en tye kwede, ci en yeti ki i nyimi,”" 
Job1:12 Ci Rwot owaco bot Catan ni, “Nen, gin ducu ma en tye kwede tye i tweroni; kono nyo i kom en keken aye pe iket ciŋi.” Kumeno Catan oa ocito woko ki i nyim Rwot." 
Job1:13 Onoŋo tye nino mo ma awobe ki anyira pa Yubu gubedo ka cam ki ka mato koŋo vino i ot pa omingi maditte; 
Job1:14 ci fakwena mo obino bot Yubu ma wacci, “I kare ma twoni gitye ka pur, ki kana bene gicamo ka ŋetgi," 
Job1:15 ci jo Ceba gupoto i komgi, guyakogi, guneko lukwat woko ki pala lucwan: ci an kena aye abwot me bino ka titti.”" 
Job1:16 Ka onoŋo pud tye ka lok, ŋat mukene dok obino ma wacci, “Mac pa Lubaŋa oa ki i polo, ci owaŋo romi ki lukwat, otyekogi woko ducu; ci an kena aye abwot me bino ka titti.”" 
Job1:17 Ka onoŋo en pud tye ka lok, ŋat mukene dok obino ma wacci, “Jo Kaldaya gupokke i buca adek, ci guturre i kom kinaga, guyakogi, ci guneko lukwat ki pala lucwan; ci an kena aye abwot me bino ka titti.”" 
Job1:18 Ka en pud tye ka lok, ŋat mukene dok obino ma wacci, “Awobeni ki anyirani onoŋo gitye ka cam ki ka mato koŋo yino i ot pa omingi maditte," 
Job1:19 ci nen, yamo madit obino, oŋolle ki tuŋ tim, oyoko twok ot aŋwen, ot opoto i kom litino omiyo guto; ci an kena aye abwot me bino ka titti.”" 
Job1:20 Yubu oa malo, oyeco jorre, olyelo wiye, opoto piny i ŋom, oworo Lubaua." 
Job1:21 Ci owaco ni, “Yam abino noŋo nia ki i i maa, dok abidok bene noŋo. Rwot ceŋ omiyo, ci Rwot otyeko kwanyo gire; gipwo nyiŋ Rwot.”" 
Job1:22 I kom lok man ducu, Yubu pe obalo, pe owaco ni Lubaŋa otimo rac." 
Job2:1 I nino mo mukene awobe pa Lubaŋa dok gubino gucuŋ i nyim Rwot, ci Catan bene obino i kingi ka cuŋ i nyim Rwot." 
Job2:2 Rwot owaco bot Catan ni, “In ia ki kwene?” Catan ogamo dog Rwot kun wacci, “Aa ka wirre wi lobo, ki ka wot i kin piny i lobo.”" 
Job2:3 Ci Rwot dok owaco bot Catan ni, “Itye ka tamo pi laticca Yubu, ni meno, pe tye ŋat mo macalo en i wi lobo, dano ma pe ki bal mo, dano ma cwinye leŋ, ma lworo Lubaŋa, dok dag tim marac? En pud ocuŋ matek laboŋo bal mo, kadi bed ipiya i kome wek it yeke woko laboŋo tyen lok mo.”" 
Job2:4 Catan ogamo dog Rwot kun wacci, “Del pi del! Gin ducu ma dano tye kwede en bimiyo pi kwone." 
Job2:5 Ento tugi keto ciŋi koni, igud cogone ki riŋo kome, ci en yeti ki i nyimi.”"
