Job2:6 Ci Rwot owaco bot Catan ni, “Nen, en doŋ tye i tweroni; ento myero igwok kwone keken.”" 
Job2:7 Kumeno Catan oa ocito woko ki i nyim Rwot, ocako yelo Yubu ki bur maraco muonyo cakke ki i dye tyene nio kwede wa i cwiny wiye." 
Job2:8 Ci en okwanyo labaltak me cwero kome, ocito obedo i buru." 
Job2:9 Mumiyo dakone owacce ni, “Pud ibicuŋ matek ma pe ibalo bal mo? Yet Lubaŋa, ci ito.”" 
Job2:10 Ento Yubu ogamo dog dakone ni, “In aye iloko lok macalo mon mamiŋ ma pe giŋeyo Lubaŋa. Wabigamo gin maber ki i cin Lubaŋa, ci pe wagamo gin marac?” I can man ducu Yubu pe obalo ki doge." 
Job2:11 Ka lurem Yubu adek guwinyo pi gin marac man ducu mubino i kome gubino kun ŋat man a ki i kabedone, Erifaji Lateman, Bildad Lacua ki Jopar Lanaamat. Kumeno gurwatte kacel wek gucinyut cwercwinygi bot Yubu ki kweyo cwinye." 
Job2:12 Ci guilo waŋgi ka pud gitye ka mabor, pe guniaŋ maber ka dano ma gineno-nu aye Yubu; ci gucako koko ki dwan maloŋo, guyeco jorgi, gujuko wigi ki ŋom." 
Job2:13 Ci gubedo piny i ŋom guri bote nino abiro dyeceŋ ki dyewor, ŋat mo ma loko kwede pe, pien guneno ni aremme onoŋo dit mada." 
Job3:1 Ka man otum Yubu oŋamo doge, olamo nino ma yam ginywale iye" 
Job3:2 Yubu owacci," 
Job3:3 “Wek nino ma yam ginywala iye orweny woko matwal, ki wor ma yam giloko iye ni, ‘Doŋ gigamo latin laco.’" 
Job3:4 Wek en nino ca obed macol! Lubaŋa ma tye malo pe oyeny, lenpiny mo pe omeny nino-nu." 
Job3:5 Wek mutu ki piny ma ocido licuc aye ogam. Wek pol obed i wiye, cido piny me dyeceŋ bene omiye lworo." 
Job3:6 Wor meno, wek piny ma ocido licuc omake, wek pe olim yomcwiny i kin nino me mwaka, pe obin i kin weI dwe." 
Job3:7 Eyo, wek wor meno obed lalur, dwan daŋŋe me yomcwiny pe owinnye iye," 
Job3:8 Wek jo ma gilamo nino gulam en, gin jo ma gitwero lwoŋo Min Kulu." 
Job3:9 Wek lakalatwe me kwarpiny gudok col, okur lenpiny ento pe onoŋ, pe onen waŋ cen me odiko;" 
Job3:10 pien yam pe oloro doggola ma i i maa woko, kadi kano ayelayela ki i waŋa." 
Job3:11 “Piŋo pe ato i kare me nywala? Piŋo kwona pe otum cut ka aa ki i ic? 
Job3:12 Piŋŋ yam apoto i wi coŋ maa?’ Piŋo tunone ogama, wek adote?" 
Job3:13 Pienno do kono ceŋ abuto piny mot lilwe, kono anino, dok kono noŋo atye ka yweyo," 
Job3:14 kacel ki luker ki luryeko me lobo, ma yam gugero odigi mabeco," 
Job3:15 nyo ki rwodi ma yam gitye ki lonyo, ma gupoŋo odigi ki limo" 
Job3:16 Piŋo yam pe abedo macalo latin abwoga ma gikano, macalo latin ma pe oneno der cen?”" 
Job3:17 Ki kunnu jo maraco pe doŋ gikelo ayela, ki kunnu jo muol gitye ka yweyo." 
Job3:18 Kunnu lumabuc gibedo mot kacel, ma pe doŋ giwinyo dwan ladit tic." 
Job3:19 Jo matino ki ludito gitye kunnu, opii noŋo gigonyo woko ki i twer pa rwotgi." 
Job3:20 “Piŋo gimiyo lenpiny bot ŋat ma tye ki can, piŋo gimiyo kwo bot jo ma cwinygi kec?" 
Job3:21 Giparo pi to, ento to pe bino, gikwinyo ŋom pire makato pi lim mukanne." 
Job3:22 Jo-nu cwinygi kwe atika, ci cwinygi bedo yom ka giyikogi i lyel." 
Job3:23 Piŋo gimiyo lenpiny bot dano ma yo orwenye, ma Lubaŋa orume ki cel?" 
Job3:24 Pien aomo cwinya macalo acamo kwon, curra mol woko macalo pii." 
Job3:25 Pien gin maca ma alworo-ni bino i koma, kit giri ma poto cwinya oetimme i koma." 
Job3:26 Kwecwiny pe bota, kadi bedo mot; pe atye ki yweyo, ento aye" 
Job4:1 Eritaji Lateman ogamo doge ni," 
Job4:2 “Ka ŋat mo otemo lok kwedi, ibijul? Ento aŋa ma twero jukke owek lok?" 
Job4:3 Nen, in ibedo ka pwonyo jo mapol, ci ibedo ka jiŋo ciŋ jo manyap." 
Job4:4 Dano ma oyokke mito poto in yam ijolo ki lokki, ci ibedo ka yubo dano muloc obed matek." 
Job4:5 Ento koni can doŋ obino i komi, ci pe idiyo cwinyi; ogudi, ci doŋ ibaŋŋe woko." 
Job4:6 Lworoni i kom Lubaŋa pe kwanyo par woko ki i cwinyi mono? Leŋcwinyi pe miyo ibedo ki gen? 
Job4:7 “Koŋ itam, aŋa ma pe ki bal ma yam oto? Jo ma cwinygi teŋ ginekogi woko ki ka kwene?" 
Job4:8 Macalo atyeko neno-ni, jo gipuro bal ci gicoyo ayelayela macalo kodi, gikayo bene marom." 
Job4:9 Gito ki yamo yweyo pa Lubaŋa, alur doge me kinigane tyekogi." 
Job4:10 Mor pa labwor, ki dwan labwor mager doŋ oliŋ; lak litino labwor doŋ otur." 
Job4:11 Labwor matek to, pien gin ma edwar pe, litino pa min labwor guket woko ata." 
Job4:12 “Yam gikelo lok bota i muŋ, ita owinyo ka gikwilo akwila," 
Job4:13 i kin tam mua ki i lek me dyewor, i cawa ma dano nino matek." 
Job4:14 Lworo madwoŋ obino i koma, ki myelkom, omiyo cogona ducu oyeŋŋe." 
Job4:15 Tipo okato i waŋa, ci yer koma ducu oa." 
Job4:16 Lacen ocuŋ mot, ento pe apoko kit ma nen kwede. Cal gin mo onoŋo tye i nyima, piny oliŋ woko litik; lacen awinyo dwan ma wacci," 
Job4:17 ‘Tika dano ma to-ni bedo ma kite atir i nyim Lubaŋa? Dano twero bedo ma olony i nyim Lacwecee? 
Job4:18 Lubaŋa pe geno kadi wa luticce, ki lumalaikane bene en ŋolo bal." 
Job4:19 Jo ma komgi calo odi me lobo, ma gutigi gicibo i kweyo, ma ginyotogi macalo nyenye, gibedo niŋniŋ kono?" 
Job4:20 I kin odiko ki otyeno gityekogi woko, girwenyo matwal kun ŋat ma paro pe." 
Job4:21 Gito woko oyot, kun peya ginoŋo ryeko, macalo kema poto ka gigonyo tolle.’" 
Job5:1 “Lwoŋ ba; tye ŋat mo ma bidokki iye? Ibilokke bot aŋa ki i kin jo maleŋ? 
Job5:2 Atika cwercwiny miyo lamiŋ to, nyeko neko dano ma tamme nok." 
Job5:3 Atyeko neno lamiŋ ma ocuŋ matek, ento oyotoyot aceno kabedone." 
Job5:4 Kuc doŋ bor ki litinone; ginyotogi woko i dog gaŋ, kun ŋat ma larogi pe." 
Job5:5 Cam ma en okayo, dano ma kec nekogi gicamo, kun gikwanyo wa i kin okuto; pi mitgi madwoŋ gilaro lonyone alara." 
Job5:6 Pien can pe a i apwa, ayelayela pe twi ki i ŋom;" 
Job5:7 dano ginywalo kun kemo can macalo mac kir malo," 
Job5:8 “Ki tuŋ bota kono do ayenyo kony ki bot Lubaŋa, kono aketo lokka i ciŋe." 
Job5:9 En tiyo tic madito ma tere pe tatte, ticce me aura ma welgi pe kwanne." 
Job5:10 En miyo kot i wi lobo, cwalo pii i bar kwat." 
Job5:11 En keto jo ma tye piny i kabedo ma malo, tiŋo jo ma kumo, cibogi malo ka maber." 
Job5:12 En balo tam pa luryeko me goba, kumeno pe gicobo ticgi kakare." 
Job5:13 En mako luryeko i ryekogi kengi, macalo i owic, yub pa jo ma tamgi ogom balle woko oyot." 
Job5:14 Gin donyo i colpiny dyeceŋ, gipaŋŋe apaŋa i cwiny dyeceŋ macalo dyewor." 
Job5:15 Ento en laro litino kic ki i twergi, mayo jo ma piny obwoyo ki i cin jo magwa." 
Job5:16 Kumeno lucan gibedo ki gen, jo maraco gimiyo doggi woko." 
Job5:17 “Tye ki yomcwiny, dano ma Lubaŋajuko; pi meno pe ikwer pwony pa Won Twer Ducu." 
Job5:18 Pien en miyo ret, dok tweyo; goyo dano, ci caŋo," 
Job5:19 En bilari i kom ayela abicel, wa i me abirone bene gin marac mo pe bigudi." 
Job5:20 I kare me kec en bikoki i kom to, ki i mony en bilari ki i lak pala lucwan." 
Job5:21 En bikani ki bot anino leb, pe ibilworo layak ka obino." 
Job5:22 Kec cam ki yako jamini bimiyo inyero anyera, dok pe ibilworo lee tim." 
Job5:23 Pien in ibicikke ki gweŋ ma i poto, lee tim bibedo kwedi ki kuc." 
Job5:24 Ibiŋeyo ni kemani tye maber, ibiŋiyo dwolli ci gin mo pe ma orem." 
Job5:25 Ibiŋeyo bene ni likwayu gibibedo mapol, litino anywallini bibedo calo lum ma i tim." 
Job5:26 Ibito ma doŋ iti maber, ma komi pud tek, macalo bel ma gitero i laro ka dinone ka karene oromo," 
Job5:27 Nen, watyeko yenyo te lok man, tye ada. Winy, wek in bene iŋe piri keni.”" 
Job6:1 Yubu odok iye kun wacci," 
Job6:2 “Kono ceŋ gipimo cwercwinya, kono giporo i mijan ki can ma opoto i koma!" 
Job6:3 Pien kono obedo pek ma kato kweyo dog nam; en gin mumiyo cen aloko lok ata ta. 
Job6:4 Atero pa Won-Twer Ducu doŋ otuco koma, cwinya tye ka mato kwirgi; Lubaŋa doŋ o kelo i koma kit ticce ducu ma kelo lworo." 
Job6:5 Kana me tim kok ka en tye ki lum i doge? Twon dok kok ka doŋ giketo camme i nyime? 
Job6:6 Gin mabot twero camme laboŋo kado? Pig otigo lweka bille mamit? 
Job6:7 Iya pe mito wa bilone; gin calo cam ma lemo cwinya. 
Job6:8 “Ka nene Lubaŋa omiya gin ma alego bote! Kono omiya gin ma cwinya mito! 
Job6:9 Do kono Lubaŋa oye nyota woko matwal; kono oweko ciŋe otiyo ticce otyeka woko. 
Job6:10 Kono otimo kumeno, kono cwinya okwe; kono apye ki yomcwiny, kadi bed remkoma pe tima kica; pien onoŋo yam pe akwero lok ma ŋat Maleŋ owaco." 
Job6:11 Atye ki teko aŋo ma miya pud akuro? Agikki me kwona bibedo niŋniŋ, ni kono abedo ka ciro?" 
Job6:12 Tekona rom ki teko me got mono? Riŋo koma rom ki mola ce? 
Job6:13 I ada pe atye ki kony mo iiya, kit gin me konya doŋ oa woko ki bota." 
Job6:14 “Ŋat ma kwero timo lawote kica noŋo oweko doŋ lworo Won Twer Ducu," 
Job6:15 Omega gubwola macalo laora kulu ma ka opoŋ, piine mol woko, two oyot;" 
Job6:16 piine col pien orubbe ki pee, pee mua ki i wi got okanne iye." 
Job6:17 I kare me oro piine rwenyo woko, ka piny doko lyet pe doŋ nen." 
Job6:18 Luwot giweko yogi, giwirre ata pi yenyo pii, gicoro dye tim, girwenyo wo ko matwal." 
Job6:19 Luwot mua ki i Tema guciko waŋgi me neno lakit kulu-nu, jo mua ki i Ceba gumoko gengi i kome," 
Job6:20 Gubedo ki gen madwoŋ ento gengi oballe noŋo, ka guo kunnu, ci lewic omakogi." 
Job6:21 Wun ki tuŋ bota wurom ki laora kulu meno; wuneno can mupoto i koma, ci lworo omakowu cut." 
Job6:22 Onoŋo yam alego gin mo ki tuŋ botwu? Yam awacci wumi limwu pira me lawil loyo kop? 
Job6:23 Nyo awaco ni wulara ki i ceŋ lakworra? Nyo ni wukoka ki i ciŋ jo ma gitye ka una? 
Job6:24 “Ber wupwonya, ci abiliŋ woko litik; wunyuta bal ma apoto iye." 
Job6:25 Lok ma tye atir mit twatwal! Ento wun ka wujuka nyuto aŋo? 
Job6:26 Wumito juko lok ma giwaco awaca, kun lokka calo yamo noŋo pien piny doŋ oloya." 
Job6:27 Kono do wubol kwir i kom litino kic, nyo wulok luremwu gudok gin me acata pi lim." 
Job6:28 “Ento koni wutim ber, wunen waŋa, pien pe abiloko lok goba ki i nyimwu." 
Job6:29 Wuwek doŋ meno obedi ba, wuwek ŋolo kop i koma ma pe atir. Wulok tamwu, pien kop pe twero loya." 
Job6:30 Pud wutamo ni aloko lok goba? Can mapek poto i koma ci pe aromo poko kine? 
Job7:1 “Kwo me lobo man tek calo tic matek pa lumony; dano tyeko karene macalo lapakaca," 
Job7:2 En cal ki opii ma paro bedo i tipo, rom ki lapakaca ma tamme okemo mucara," 
Job7:3 Kumeno an gimiya abedo abeda noŋo pi lwak dwe mapol, nino ki nino aciro ayela dyewor," 
Job7:4 Ka abuto piny apenyo ni, ‘Abia malo awene?’ Ento dyewor ri nakanaka, kun abedo ka pwodde apwoda nio wa okogweno." 
Job7:5 Kwidi ki cilo ma odille kacel oboyo koma woko, del koma tal woko ci dok cwer tut" 
Job7:6 Nino acel acel kato madwir makato yat cweyo boŋo, ci tum woko kun weka laboŋo gen mo." 
Job7:7 “Lubaŋa, po ni kwona rom ki yamo; waŋa pe dok bineno gin maber wacel." 
Job7:8 Ŋat ma waŋe onena pe binena doki; ibiciko waŋi pi nena, ci inoŋo an ape," 
Job7:9 Macalo pol ket ci pe dok nen, kumeno ŋat mucito piny i lyel pe kato woko." 
Job7:10 En pe dok aye i ode, kadi kabedone pe ŋeyo en doki." 
Job7:11 “Kumeno pe dok abijuko doga. Awinyo arem i cwinya, myero aloki; myero akok, pien iya kec." 
Job7:12 An abedo nam bo, nyo min kulu, mumiyo imito tweya woko?" 
Job7:13 Ka awaco ni, ‘Kabutona bikweyo cwinya,’ nyo ni, ‘Arem koma bikwe ka abuto piny,’" 
Job7:14 ci in iryaŋo koma ki lwak lek ma bino i wiya, imiyo lworo maka matek pi gin ma anene dyewor." 
Job7:15 Kono do gideya woko! Twora ata awek bedo ki arem man," 
Job7:16 Adag bedo kit man; pe amito kwo nakanaka. Wek abedi, pien nino me kwona calo yamo noŋo," 
Job7:17 “Dano obedo gin aŋo, mumiyo pire bedo tek boti-ni? Piŋo iketo cwinyi i kome kuman?" 
Job7:18 Ibedo ka lime odiko odiko, kun iteme teretere." 
Job7:19 “Ibibedo ka nena pi kare ma rom mene, ma pe iloko waŋi ineno cen ka mukene? Pe koŋ iweka kare manok ma rom, ma mwonyo laa keken?" 
Job7:20 Ka abalo, ci atimo gin aŋo i komi, in lagwok dano? Piŋo ibaya ki toŋŋi kare ducu, macalo dano ma pwonyo lweny? Piŋo adoko calo yec mapek boti?" 
Job7:21 Piŋo pe itima kica pi rocca? Dok pe ijwayo balla woko pi ŋo? Pien koni doŋ gibiyika woko; ibiyenya ento pe ibinoŋa.” 
Job8:1 Bildad Lacua ogamo doge kun waco ru," 
Job8:2 “Lok magi ibiloko nio wa awene, kun lokki winnye calo yamo madit ma kodo matek?" 
Job8:3 Lubaŋa pe twero ŋolo kop atir? Won Twer Ducu timo gin ma pe kakare? 
Job8:4 Nen, litinoni gubedo ka timo bal i kome, oweko en omiyo can opoto i komgi ma oporo balgi." 
Job8:5 Ka ibiyenyo Lubaŋa, kun ibako dogi bot Won Twer Ducu," 
Job8:6 ka ii leŋ ma cwinyi atir, adada en bia ci konyi, bidwoko odi kakare pi kiti ma atir." 
Job8:7 Kadi bed yam i acakki ibedo ki jami manok, ento i agikki me kwoni ibibedo ki lim mabup." 
Job8:8 “Pienno alegi, peny kwarowa macon, ci it am ni gin aŋo ma yam kwarogi gubedo ka yenyo;" 
Job8:9 pien waŋ wabedo jo ma laworo keken, pe waŋeyo gin mo, ninowa me bedo i lobo lokke calo tipo." 
Job8:10 Kono iwinyo pwony pa ludoŋo, ki lok ma giwaco pi ŋecgi matut." 
Job8:11 “Togo twero doŋo ka ma daba pe iye? Lagada doŋo ka ma pii pe iye? 
Job8:12 Ka pud gilot alota, ma peya gitoŋogi, giner woko oyot makato ginapita ducu ka pii pe." 
Job8:13 Meno aye yo pa jo ducu ma wigi wil i kom Lubaŋa; gen pa dano ma pe lworo Lubaŋa bitum. 
Job8:14 Gin ma en geno rom ki uci ma cot woko oyotoyot, nyo rom ki obwo oboropyen." 
Job8:15 En jeŋŋe i kom ode, ento ode pe cuŋ; en keto cine me makone, ento pe cun matek." 
Job8:16 Nyo en rom ki doo ma lot matek ka cen oryeny, ma jaŋe lak, rumo po to woko," 
Job8:17 Lwite odwalle i kom odur gweŋ, en bedo i kin pata," 
Job8:18 Ka gipuro woko ki kakare, kabedone bikwere woko, kun waco ni, ‘An yam peya aneni,’" 
Job8:19 ci doo mukene twi i ŋom leyo kakare cut. Meno aye yomcwiny pa dano ma pe lworo Lubaŋa," 
Job8:20 “Nen, Lubaŋa pe kwero dano ma pe ki bal; en pe mako cin jo maraco." 
Job8:21 En pud bimiyo dogi poŋ ki nyero, miyo ibidoŋo oduru me yomcwmy." 
Job8:22 Lewic bimako jo ma dagi, ki kema pa lutim maraco pe dok binen.”" 
Job9:1 Yubu ogamo ni meno," 
Job9:2 “Adada aŋeyo ni tye kit meno; ento dano twero loyo kop niŋniŋ i nyim Lubaŋa? 
Job9:3 Ka ce dano mo mito pyem kwede, ci twero penyo peny alip acel kulu ma pe dano mo twero dokke iye kicel keken." 
Job9:4 Lubaŋa ryek i cwinye, dok tekone dwoŋ; aŋa ma tye ki tekcwiny ma romo loye?" 
Job9:5 En kobo godi woko ma pe giŋeyo, ci lokogi woko ki kiniga." 
Job9:6 En cwalo oyeŋyeŋ yeŋo ŋom, ci puto woko ki i kabedone, dok miyo wir me te lobo ducu yeŋŋe." 
Job9:7 En ciko ceŋ, miyo pe tuc; en umo lakalatwe woko i dyewor wek pe guryeny." 
Job9:8 En oyaro polo kene, ka onyono biamwonyi me nam woko," 
Job9:9 En aye ma otiyo Oluma ki Lyeronyim, Yoggo ki lakalatwe ma ginen yo tuŋ acuc," 
Job9:10 En tiyo tic madito ma niaŋ iye tek bot dano, ki tic me aura ma welgi pe kwanne." 
Job9:11 Nen, en kato ki i ŋeta, kun pe aneno; en medde ki wot anyim, ento an pe aŋeyo." 
Job9:12 En kwanyo jami ma iye mito cito kwede woko aŋa ma twero juke? Aŋa ma twero penye ni, ‘Itimo aŋo?’" 
Job9:13 “Lubaŋa pe biloko kinigane; wa lukony pa Rakab, ma min kulu, gukulle piny i nyime," 
Job9:14 Kara man atwero gamo doge niŋniŋ, nyo yero lok ma abipido kwede i nyime?" 
Job9:15 Kadi bed balla pe, pe atwero gamo doge; myero aleŋ ŋat ma odota otima kica keken." 
Job9:16 Ka ce nene ogamo doga i kare ma alwone, kono pe aye ni obedo ka winyo lokka." 
Job9:17 En bedo ka nyona ki yamo matek, ci medo ret i koma laboŋo tyen lok mo." 
Job9:18 En pe ye miya kare me yweyo, ento miyo abedo ki keccwiny keken." 
Job9:19 Ka ce obedo lweny me pyem me nyuto teko, ci nen en! Aŋa ma twero lwoŋe ka amito pido kwede?" 
Job9:20 Kadi bed balla pe, ento lok ma aloko miyo kop loya; kadi bed balla pe, en twero miyo anen calo dano muŋak woko." 
Job9:21 An balla pe, omiyo pe doŋ aparo; doŋ pe amito ni abed kwo." 
Job9:22 Lokke tye acel keken; pienno omiyo awaco ni, Lubaŋa tyeko jo ducu, jo mubalo ki jo ma pe gubalo." 
Job9:23 Ka can mo opoto i kom jo ma pe ki bal, ci en nyero mere anyera, kun neno ni man keckom mukelo to atura kit meno," 
Job9:24 Gimiyo lobo i cin jo maraco; en umo waŋ luŋolkop woko; ka ce pe en, ci aŋa kono?" 
Job9:25 “Nino me kwona riŋo oyotoyot kato laŋwec woko, gilwi girwenyo woko, pe gineno gin mo maber." 
Job9:26 Gicito oyot calo yeya ma gitiyo ki togo, calo ocur ma lyanne i kom lee ma en dwaro." 
Job9:27 Ka atamo ni, ‘Wiya biwil woko i kom pekona, abibedo ki yomcwiny kun abunyo abunya,’" 
Job9:28 pud dok abedo ki lworo pi arem ducu ma atye kwede, pien aŋeyo ni ibitera macalo dano ma laba!." 
Job9:29 Macalo doŋ iŋolo ni kop oloya, ayelle kono dok piŋo?" 
Job9:30 Kadi bed alwokke ki pee, kadi bed alwok ciŋa ki cabun magwa," 
Job9:31 pud ibibola i bur aye, ci boŋŋina bikwero koma woko." 
Job9:32 “Lubaŋa gire pe dano calo an, ma myero agam doge, kono obedo dano, kono wapido dwede," 
Job9:33 Ŋat mo pe ma twero ŋolo lok i kinwa, ma myero oket ciŋe i komwa waŋ aryo ducu," 
Job9:34 Wek Lubaŋa pe opwoda ki odoone wek pe koma oryaŋŋe me lworo en. 
Job9:35 Miyo atwero lok laboŋo lworo mo i nyime, kun aŋeyo ni pe atye kit ma jo mogo gitamo kwede," 
Job10:1 “Adag doŋ kwona, pe abijuko kokona; abiloko lok ducu, pien cwinya doŋ odoko kec," 
Job10:2 Abiwaco bot Lubaŋa ni, pe iŋol ni kop oloya; titta gin mumi yo it ye ka pyem kweda," 
Job10:3 Tika nen ber ki boti me una, ki me ca yo tic ma in doŋ itiyo, kun tammi rwatte ki tam pa jo maraco?" 
Job10:4 Waŋi rom ki waŋ dano? Ineno piny kit ma dano neno kwede? 
Job10:5 WeI nino me kwoni rom ki pa dano? Ibiri pi mwaka manok calo dano," 
Job10:6 mumi yo it ye ka roto bal i koma-ni, wek inen ka ma apoto iye?" 
Job10:7 Kono iŋeyo ni an pe abalo, dok ni pe tye dano mo ma twero lara ki i ciŋi." 
Job10:8 In yam icweya ki ciŋi, ci koni doŋ ilokke, imito neka?" 
Job10:9 Po ni yam icweya ki lobo; dok ibidwoka i apwa aye? 
Job10:10 Cen pe ionya woko macalo cak, ci imiyo adoko calo cak lukulu?" 
Job10:11 In ceŋ iumo koma ki del ki ler riŋo, ci ikubo an kacel ki cogo ki Jer" 
Job10:12 Imiyo bota kwo ki mar meri ma pe lokke ci iyelle pira, igwoko cwinya." 
Job10:13 Ento onoŋo ikano lok macalo man i cwinyi; doŋ aniaŋ ni gin mutimme-ni onoŋo ityeko yubo con. 
Job10:14 Ka apoto i bal, in ibedo ka kiya, ci pe iye weko balla mo wacel." 
Job10:15 Ka at imo gin marac can obed i koma! Ento kadi balla pe, pe atwero tino waŋa malo, pien lewic omaka, canna obwoya woko," 
Job10:16 Ka ce atiŋo wiya in itugi dwara cut, macalo labwor, ci itiyo tic me aura i koma," 
Job10:17 In ibedo ka kelo cadenni manyen pi nyutc balla, kinigani medde ameda i koma, kun ikelo buca mony manyen ka lweny i koma," 
Job10:18 “Piŋo iweko aa ki i i maa? Kono ceŋ aŋuko to ma peya waŋ dano onena, kono ber." 
Job10:19 Kono ceŋ gitiŋa nia ki i ic gitera wa i lyel, wek abed macalo ŋat ma pe yam obedo kwo," 
Job10:20 Nino me kwona pe odoŋ manok keken? Wek abedi, wek abed ki yomcwiny manok," 
Job10:21 ma peya acito ka ma pe doŋ abidwogo ki iye, i lobo me mutu ki piny macollicuc," 
Job10:22 i lobo me colpiny munyobbe ata, ka ma dero ceŋ rom ki piny macol.”" 
Job11:1 Jopar ma Lanaamat ogamo ni meno," 
Job11:2 “Lwak lok mapol ma rom meno pe gigamo ce? Lalok mada aye ma lokke tye atir? 
Job11:3 Dog dano myero otwo woko pi lokki ma tere pe-ni? Iloko lok me ŋala, ci dano mo pe bimaki ki lewic?" 
Job11:4 Pien iwaco ni, ‘Pwonnya tye maleŋ, i waŋ Lubaŋa balla pe.’" 
Job11:5 Ento kono Lubaŋa oloko lok mo, kono oŋamo doge boti!" 
Job11:6 En kono oyabo boti muŋ mapol me ryekone, pien tim mua ki i ryekone bedo me aura, Koŋ iŋe ni can ma Lubaŋa oketo i komi pe oporo balli ducu." 
Job11:7 “In itwero niaŋ ryeko ki dit pa Lubaŋa? Itwero noŋo ka ma twer pa Won Twer Ducu gik iye? 
Job11:8 Tye malo kato polo, in itwero timo gin aŋo? Tut makato lyel, in iŋeyo iye gin aŋo?" 
Job11:9 Bor makato lobo ducu, lac makato nam." 
Job11:10 Ka en obino ci omako dano, ce olwoŋe i nyim kop, aŋa ma twero juke?" 
Job11:11 En ŋeyo jo ma pe gigenne; ka oneno bal, pe keto iye cwinye?" 
Job11:12 Ento dano ma lamiŋ binono ryeko, ka kana me tim onywalo dano," 
Job11:13 “Kono ibedo ki cwiny maber, kono itaŋo ciŋi bote!" 
Job11:14 Ka yam itimo tim marac, pe doŋ igudi; pe iwek jo ma i odi gutim gin mo marac." 
Job11:15 Atika doŋ ibitiŋo waŋi malo kun bal mo pe i komi; ibicuŋ matek, pe ibilworo." 
Job11:16 Wii biwil i kom canni; bibedo boti mucalo pii ma doŋ omol orwenyo woko. 
Job11:17 Kwoni bibedo ka maleŋ makato cwiny dyeceŋ; kadi bed itye i piny macol bibedo macalo rupiny," 
Job11:18 In doŋ ibibedo ma cwinyi opye, kun iŋeyo ni nyimi leŋ; ibiywe mot ki kuc kun Lubaŋa tye ka gwoki," 
Job11:19 Ibibuto piny, ci ŋat mo pe bimiyi lworo; jo mapol gibibino boti wek ginoŋ gum ki boti." 
Job11:20 Ento piny biloyo jo maraco matwal; pe gibinoŋo ka kanne, gibiparo pi to keken.”" 
Job12:1 Yubu ogamo ni meno," 
Job12:2 “Adada wun jo ma tye ki ŋec, ka wuto, ryeko bene birwenyo woko," 
Job12:3 Ento an aniaŋ lok bene macalo wun, wun pe wuloya wacel. Aŋa ma pe ŋeyo lok macalo magi?" 
Job12:4 Adoko gin anyera bot lurema; an ma ceŋ alwoŋo Lubaŋa ci en gamo doga, an ma kita atir, ma bal mo pe i koma, adoko gin anyera." 
Job12:5 Lagumkom cayo ŋat ma kome kec, en mito goyo jo ma tyengi ocer," 
Job12:6 Kema pa luyak tye ki kuc; jo ma miyo kiniga mako Lubaŋa gibedo mot mupye, gin jo ma guloko tekgi odoko lubaŋagi." 
Job12:7 “Peny wa bot lee, ci gibipwonyi; peny winyo me polo, ci gibitittr," 
Job12:8 Gin ma lak alaka i nom gibipwonyi; rec me nam bene gibitucone boti. 
Job12:9 Aŋa i kin magi ducu ma kwiya ni ciŋ Rwot aye otiyo man? 
Job12:10 Tipo pa gin makwo ducu tye i ciŋe, dano acel acel mato yamo pi twerone," 
Job12:11 It dano pe ye lok ducu, ento bilo abila, macalo dano bilo cam ki lebe." 
Job12:12 Ryeko bedo bot jo muti, ri i wi lobo miyo dano niaŋ i te lok mapol." 
Job12:13 Lubaŋa tye ki ryeko dok ki twer; en tye ki tam matut ki twer me cobone. 
Job12:14 Ka en omuko ot, ŋat mo pe dok gero odoco; ka en oloro wi dano, ŋat mo pe dok yabo," 
Job12:15 Ka en ojuko kot pe cwer, ci lobo two woko; ka en cwalo pii, ci corre i wi lobo." 
Job12:16 En tye ki teko ki ryeko me cobo ticce; laŋak dano ki ŋat ma giŋako gin ducu mere," 
Job12:17 En tero lumi-tam woko munero, en loko luŋolkop doko lumino," 
Job12:18 En gonyo jo ma luker gutweyo ki i buc, ci tweyo dura i pyer luker macalo opii." 
Job12:19 En tero ajwagine woko munero, ci miyo wegi twer poto." 
Job12:20 En twoyo dog jo ma yam gigenogi, ci miyo gikwiya poko gin maber ki gin marac," 
Job12:21 En miyodano gicayo rwodi, dok geŋo wegi twer i tiyo ticgi," 
Job12:22 En yabo muŋ ma gikanne i piny macol, ci kela piny macol licuc i der ceŋ." 
Job12:23 En miyo rok mo-ni doko madit, ka dok tyeko woko; miyo rok mukene nyayo locce, ka dok tenyo woko ata." 
Job12:24 En kwanyo ryeko woko ki bot lutel wi lwak, miyo gimal ata i tim ka ma yo pe iye." 
Job12:25 Gin leyo piny i colpiny laboŋo der ceŋ; miyo gicatte macalo lamero. 
Job13:1 “Nen, atyeko neno man ducu, atyeko winyo, ci aniaŋ iye." 
Job13:2 Gin ma wun wuŋeyo, an bene aŋeyo wun pe wuloya wacel." 
Job13:3 Ento kono do aloko bot Won Twer Ducu; amito laro lokka ki Lubaŋa," 
Job13:4 Wun wuumo lok ada woko ki goba; wun ducu ludaktar ma konywu pe. 
Job13:5 Kono Wuliŋ aliŋa do, ci mi yo wunen jo maryek." 
Job13:6 Koŋ wuwiny kit ma atamo kwede, wuter itwu i pidona." 
Job13:7 Wubiloko lok goba pi Lubaŋa? Wubilok ŋire kun wubwolo dano abwola? 
Job13:8 Wun wudworo kor Lubaŋa? Wudoko lupido pire ce? 
Job13:9 Wubibedo maber mono ka en oŋiyo tamwu? Wutwero bwolo en macalo wubwolo dano? 
Job13:10 Atikane en bijukowu, ka wucwako kore i muŋ." 
Job13:11 Ditte pe biryaŋo komwu, ci miyo lworo makowu i nyime?" 
Job13:12 Oŋon ma wubolo rom ki buru mamwa, lok ma wupido rom ki lobo ma nidde woko oyot." 
Job13:13 “Koŋ Wuliŋ mot, ci abilok, ci gin ma mito bino i koma obin." 
Job13:14 Wek acam tona, ajalo kwona woko," 
Job13:15 Wek en oneka gire, pe atye ki gin mo’ kadi bed kumeno pud abilaro lok kom kita i nyime." 
Job13:16 Man aye bimiyo aloyo kop, ni meno, dano ma pe lworo Lubaŋa pe o i nyime." 
Job13:17 Wuwiny lokka mot mupye, wek lok ma atiro odony i itwu." 
Job13:18 Atyeko yu bo lok ma abipido; aŋeyo ni abiloyo kop. 
Job13:19 Aŋa ma bipyem kweda? Wek obin, an mera abiliŋ woko ci ato." 
Job13:20 “Alegi lok aryo keken, Lubaŋa, ci ka iye, pe abikanne gira ki nyimi;" 
Job13:21 pe iwek ciŋi oguda, pe iwek lworona i komi oryan koma." 
Job13:22 Eno, lwoŋa, ci abigamo dogi; nyo weka aloki, ci ibidwoko lok bota," 
Job13:23 Balla ki rocca tve adi? Nyutta tim aranyina," 
Job13:24 Piŋo doŋ ilokke woko i koma? Piŋo itera macalo lakworri? 
Job13:25 Imito imi lworo omaka ce, kun arom ki oboke ma yamo tero? Iryemo kor cuŋ kai mutwo?" 
Job13:26 Pien icoyo lok makec marac i koma, pud imito ni anen can pi bal me tinona." 
Job13:27 In irwako tyena i okol, iniyo ka ma acito iye ducu; iketo waŋ co ka ma tyena myero ogik iye," 
Job13:28 Ci miyo adoko rom ki gin mutop woko, nyo boŋo ma nyenye ocamo," 
Job14:1 “Dano ma dako onywalo nino me kwone nok, opoŋ ki ayelayela." 
Job14:2 En bi no calo ature ci ner woko oyot; en rwenyo calo tipo, pe ri nakanaka," 
Job14:3 Ci in dok iciko waŋi i kom ŋat macalo meno, ikela i nyimi wek inolla kop?" 
Job14:4 Aŋa ma twero kelo gin maleŋ ki kom gin ma pe leŋ? Pe tye ŋat mo wacel. 
Job14:5 Gityeko ŋolo wei nino me kwone, in iŋeyo wel dwe ma imiye; ityeko nyuto ka ma kwone bigik iye pe dok kato," 
Job14:6 Lok waŋi inen ceŋ, wek en obedi, wek otyek ninone ki kuc macalo latic pi mucara." 
Job14:7 “Dano twero bedo ki gen pi yat, ni meno ka gireto piny ci dok binyuro, pud dok bilot aye." 
Job14:8 Kadi Lwite ori oteggi i lobo, kadi ajutte yam oto la i nom," 
Job14:9 ento tekke pii tye bicwico woko, bolo jaŋe calo yat ma pud gipito apita." 
Job14:10 Ento dano to mere ci pe doŋ a malo; kwone gik woko, ci en doŋ tye kwene?" 
Job14:11 Macalo pii tum wo ko ki i nam, ki kulu dwoŋ two woko," 
Job14:12 kumeno dano bene buto piny ci pe dok a; en pe dok bico nio waŋ ma polo doŋ pe, pe bico ki i waŋ ninone." 
Job14:13 Kono do ikana i lyel, kono ikana waŋ ma kinigani doŋ okato! Kono icikka kare wek ipo pira doki!" 
Job14:14 Ka dano doŋ oto, pud dok bibedo kwo? Kono icikka kare, kono atyeko kare me waŋ ticca ducu, kun akuro nino ma myero gigonya iye." 
Job14:15 Ka lacen ibilwona, ci abigamo dogi; pira bibedo mitti mada, pien in aye iketo an," 
Job14:16 Lacen ibineno ka ma acito iye ducu, ento pe ibikiya pi neno balla;" 
Job14:17 ibitweyo balla woko i kicaa, ibiumo wi rocca ducu." 
Job14:18 “Ento got madit poto ci nidde woko, pata gikobo woko ki i kakare." 
Job14:19 Pii mudo gweŋ woko, kot ma cwer matek molo lobo woko; in bene ityeko gen pa dano woko kit meno." 
Job14:20 In ibwoye woko matwal, ci en cito gire; imiyo waŋe lokke, ci iryeme woko." 
Job14:21 Litinone ginoŋo deyo, ci en pe ŋeyo; gidwokogi piny, ci en pe niaŋ gin mo iye." 
Job14:22 En bedo ka winyo mere arem me kome keken, en koko cwercwiny ma mere kene,” ne,”" 
Job15:1 Erifaji Lateman ogamo owaco ni meno," 
Job15:2 “Dano ma Laryeko gamo lok ki yamo noŋo, kun noŋo iye opoŋ ki yamo wokceŋ laboŋo ŋec mo?" 
Job15:3 En myero opyem ki lok ma pe konyo, nyo ki lok ma pe kelo gin mo maber?" 
Job15:4 Ento in igeno dano ni pe gulwor Lubaŋa, igenogi ni pe gubed ka lwodo lok i nyime." 
Job15:5 Pien balli aye pwonyo dogi, iloko lok pa jo ma bwolo dano ki ryeko," 
Job15:6 Dogi keni miyo kop loyi, pe an, dogi aye ma okelo lok i komi." 
Job15:7 “In aye dano ma gicako nywalone ce? Meni onywali ma peya giketo godi? 
Job15:8 Yam iwinyo yub me muŋ i cokke pa Lubaŋa? Imito ryeko ducu obed meri keni ce? 
Job15:9 Gin aŋo ma in iŋeyo ma waŋ wakwiya? Iniaŋ i gin aŋo ma waŋ pe waŋeyo ducu-ni? 
Job15:10 Dano muti ki dano ma wiye ki lwar gitye i kinwa, gin aye guri i wi lobo makato woru," 
Job15:11 Lok ma Lubaŋa okweyo ki cwinyi ki lok ma giloko kwede mot mupye, obedo gin mo manok ki tuŋ boti ce?" 
Job15:12 Piŋo cwinyi oarre woko? Piŋo waŋi tur ki kiniga? 
Job15:13 Piŋo iloko kinigani i kom Lubaŋa kun iweko lok macalo meno a ki i dogi? 
Job15:14 Dano gin aŋo, ma miyo en twero bedo ma iye leŋ? ŋat ma dako onywalo en gin aŋo, ma miyo twero bedo laboŋo bal mo?" 
Job15:15 Nen, Lubaŋa pe geno wa jone maleŋ-gu, polo kulu pe leŋ ki i waŋe," 
Job15:16 Ci dano kono, ma en keni mukwokki bibedo niŋniŋ i nyime, ma oloko bal odoko macalo pii me amatane-ni?" 
Job15:17 “Winy lokka, wek atitti, ci abinyutti gin ma doŋ aneno," 
Job15:18 en aye lok ma yam luryeko gubedo ka titone, ki kwarogi bene yam pe gumuno lokke." 
Job15:19 Lobowa ceŋ gimiyo botgi gin kengi, ci larok mo pe mubedo i kingi," 
Job15:20 Dano marac pwodde ki arem nino ducu me kwone, pi mwaka ducu ma gimiyo bot dano ma pe lakica." 
Job15:21 En bedo ka winyo dwan ma kelo lworo; i kare me kuc layak bibino i kome," 
Job15:22 En pe tye ki gen me dwogo woko ki i ka macol, pien gitye ka kiye ki pala lucwan me neke," 
Job15:23 En bedo ka mal ata pi yenyo kwon, kun waco ni, ‘Tye kwene?’ En ŋeyo ni i nyime tye iye to." 
Job15:24 Peko ki can gibedo ka ryaŋo kome; gibwoye woko macalo kabaka ma oyubbe pi mony. 
Job15:25 “Dano-nu oryeyo ciŋe kom Lubaŋa, obutte ni etwero lweny ki Won Twer Ducu," 
Job15:26 kun riŋo i kome macalo twon ki kwot molane ma kinoŋ. 
Job15:27 Waŋe obedo mununy, pyere oyarre malac." 
Job15:28 En obedo i gaij i mogo ma yam odoŋ noŋo, i odi ma dano pe myero gubed iye, ma giciko ni odoŋ obur." 
Job15:29 Pi meno en pe bibedo lalonyo, lonyone pe biri, pe bicuŋ matek macalo yat ma Lwite odonyo piny i ŋom;" 
Job15:30 pe bibwot ki i colpiny. En bibedo rom ki yat ma mac oroyo pote woko ma pud olot alota, ki ma yamo otero ture woko." 
Job15:31 Wek en pe ogen piny nono, kun bwolle kene, pien piny nono aye bibedo bakacic ma en bilimo." 
Job15:32 En bibedo rom ki yat ma gilwero jaŋe ma karene peya oromo, ma pote pe doŋ lot." 
Job15:33 Bibedo rom ki olok ma nyige oo ma peya ocek, nyo yai jeituni ma ture oo woto." 
Job15:34 Lwak “jo ma pe gilworo Lubaŋa girom ki lulur; mac waŋo kema pa lugam lim me wil i muŋ; 
Job15:35 Giyaco aranyi ci ginywalo tim marac, gipiro lok goba ki i" 
Job16:1 Yubu ogamo ni meno," 
Job16:2 “Atyeko winyo lok mapol ma rom ki meno; wun ducu wun lukwecwiny ma kela ayela keken," 
Job16:3 Lok ma obedo yamo noŋo ka gikke pe? Aŋo ma oŋeto ii, omiyo igamo doga?" 
Job16:4 An bene ceŋ atwero loko macalo wun, kono ceŋ wubedo ki kit ma rom ki mera-ni; an onoŋo ceŋ atwero rwado lok pi jukowu, kun ayeŋo wiya botwu," 
Job16:5 Cen atwero jiŋo cwinywu ki lokka, ki kweyo aremwu ki mit doga," 
Job16:6 “Ka an aloko-ni arem koma pe okwe; ci ka aliŋ woko, pe dok cen." 
Job16:7 Adada, Lubaŋa koni doŋ oolo koma woko, oruto jona woko ducu," 
Job16:8 En doŋ otyeko maka woko, ci odoko caden me nyuto balla; jony me koma odoko macalo lakworra, ma loko lok me caden i nyima." 
Job16:9 Iye okwera, otima malit macalo labwor ma kido kom lee, okayo lake woko i koma ki kiniga, lamonena gaya ki waŋe macalo ŋat ma pako toŋŋe me neko dano," 
Job16:10 Jo guŋamo doggi i koma, gudoŋo lema me anywar, gudille i koma likiŋ." 
Job16:11 Lubaŋa doŋ omiya i ciŋ jo ma kitgi pe atir, obola i ciŋ jo maraco." 
Job16:12 Onoŋo abedo mot mupye, ci onyono koma woko, omaka ki ŋuta, oŋinya matitino. Obedo ka baya ki toŋŋe" 
Job16:13 wegi atumme guruma dyere. Otuco olaŋa pil, laboŋo kica, ooyo pig kedana i ŋom," 
Job16:14 Oketo can i koma teretere macalo lamony ma bedo ka riŋo i kom ot pi mu kone woko. 
Job16:15 Akwoyo boŋo gunia me arukana, tekona ducu doŋ obuto i apwa." 
Job16:16 Waŋa doŋ obok ki koko, del waŋa ocido macol licuc," 
Job16:17 kadi bed pe atimo gin mo me bwami, dok kadi legana bal mo pe iye," 
Job16:18 “In lobo, pe ium remona, ci wek kokona pe onoŋ kabedo me yweyo." 
Job16:19 Kadi koni, nen, cadenna tye i wi polo, cadenna tye malo." 
Job16:20 Lurema gicaya, ento pig waŋa cwer kun akok kwede bot Lubaŋa," 
Job16:21 ni kono en olar lok pa dano i nyim Lubaŋa, macalo dano laro lok kun cuŋ pi lawote." 
Job16:22 Pien ka mwaka man ok doŋ okato, abicito ka ma pe doŋ abidwogo ki iye." 
Job17:1 Cwinya doŋ otum, kwona doŋ mito gik woko, lyel doŋ tye ka kura." 
Job17:2 Adada lunywar guruma dyere, abedo ka neno kit ma gikeco kwede i koma." 
Job17:3 “In kikomi myero icuŋ pira i nyimi keni, ai Lubaŋa; pien aŋa ma dok twero mine me cuŋ pira?" 
Job17:4 Macalo doŋ imiyo gukwero yabo tamgi wo ko wek guniaŋ lok, pienno pe ibiye ni guloya." 
Job17:5 Ŋat ma tero lok roro i kom lawote wek enoŋ dul me limgi, piny biloyo litinone." 
Job17:6 “En omiyo nyiŋa odoko lok aboka pa lwak; adoko ŋat ma jo giŋule ki laa. 
Job17:7 Waŋa doŋ ocido woko pi kumo, dul koma ducu ojony woko likaŋ." 
Job17:8 Pi meno jo ma cwinygi atir giuro ki jwat, ci dano ma pe ki bal cako mwomme i kom ŋat ma pe lworo Lubaŋa." 
Job17:9 Ŋat ma kite atir pud medde ki kite macon, ŋat ma cwinye leŋ tekke medde ameda." 
Job17:10 Ento wun dok wubin, wun ducu, ci pe abinoŋo dano mo maryek i kinwu." 
Job17:11 Karena doŋ okatu, lok ma yam ayubo doŋ otur woko, en aye lok ma yam cwinya tye iye twatwal." 
Job17:12 Guloko wor odoko dyeceŋ, kun giwacci, ‘Der ceŋ cok ki piny macol.’" 
Job17:13 Akuro doŋ lyel wek obed oda, wek apet kabutona i piny macol." 
Job17:14 Bur lyel doŋ alwoŋo ni wora, kwidi ma bicamo koma alwoŋo ni maa, nyo lamera." 
Job17:15 Gen mera kono dok tye kwene kaa? Aŋa ma dok neno gin maber ma myero akur? 
Job17:16 En bicito kweda wa i lyel? Wan wabilor kwede kacel i apwa?” 
Job18:1 Bildad ma Lacua ogamo ni meno," 
Job18:2 “Ibibedo Ka lok pi kare ma rom mene? Koŋ itam mot ci dok wabilok. 
Job18:3 Piŋo itimowa macalo lee? Piŋo inenowa macalo jo mamiŋ? 
Job18:4 In ikilo komi keni i kinigani macalo labwor. Lobo myero giwek odoŋ noŋo piri? Got myero okobbe woko ki i kabedone piri? 
Job18:5 “Iyo, tara pa dano marac bito woko, leb macce pe biryeny." 
Job18:6 Mac ma menyo i kemane bidoko ribiribi, tara ma giŋabo ka wiye bito woko," 
Job18:7 Kalo wotte ki tek bijwik, lok ma en kikome oyubo birete piny." 
Job18:8 En moko i obwo ki tyene kene, nyo woto i wi bur ma gikunyo pi mako lee." 
Job18:9 Layuta mako opunye, owic ma giciko dwalo tyene." 
Job18:10 Giciko uno i noŋ pire, giciko kinu i yo pi make," 
Job18:11 Lworo nyono kome tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi, lubo kore ka ma en cito iye ducu," 
Job18:12 Kec bibwoyo tekke woko, can kuro me poto i kome tek oyoko tyene." 
Job18:13 Two bibalo del kome ducu, two marac mada biŋuno dul kome woko." 
Job18:14 Gibiywaŋe woko ki i kemane ma yam egeno, gitere bot rwot ma loyo kit gin ducu ma dano lworo." 
Job18:15 Ŋat ma pe mere aye bibedo i kemane; gibipworo buru calfa i pacone," 
Job18:16 En bibedo rom ki yat ma lwite otwo woko ki piny, ki ma jaŋe oner woko ki malo," 
Job18:17 Dano pe doŋ bipo pire i lobone, nyiŋe pe doŋ biwinnye i waŋa yo," 
Job18:18 Gibicwale wo ko ki i piny maleŋ, obed i colpiny, gibiryeme woko ki i wi lobo." 
Job18:19 En pe bibedo ki latin nyo likwayo i kin jone, ŋat mo pe bidoŋ makwo ka ma yam en bedo iye." 
Job18:20 Jo me tuŋ potoceŋ bibaŋŋe woko pi gin mutimme i kome, atiba bipoto i kom jo ma tye tuŋ wokceŋ bene," 
Job18:21 Adada, gaŋ pa lubalo bibedo kumeno, meno gin ma bitimme i kom dano ma kwiya Lubaŋa.”" 
Job19:1 Yubu ogamo ni," 
Job19:2 “Wubiyela nio wa awene, kun wukeko ita ki lok?" 
Job19:3 Man doŋ tyen me aparre ma wunala; lewic pe makowu me tima marac kuman? 
Job19:4 Kadi bed doŋ aŋak woko ada, balla pe gik doŋ i koma kena?" 
Job19:5 Ka ada wun wunyatte i koma, kun wuwaco ni lewic ma giketo i koma onyuto ni an labal," 
Job19:6 doŋ myero wune ni Lubaŋa aye omiyo lok oloya, ci otweya woko ki obwone," 
Job19:7 Nen, akok ni, ‘Gineka woko do!’ ento pe gigamo doga; adaŋŋe matek, ento ŋat mo pe ma ŋolo koppa atir." 
Job19:8 En ocego yo woko bota, pe atwero kato, oketo colpiny woko i nyima ka ma acito iye ducu." 
Job19:9 Otyeko kwanyo deyo woko ki ikoma, oweka adoŋ noŋo laboŋo dit mo." 
Job19:10 Adoko macalo ot ma en omuko woko ma otwomo tunŋi ki tuŋŋi ci arwenyo woko; genna bene en oputo woko macalo oputo yar. 
Job19:11 Kiniga omake i koma, en tera macalo lakworre." 
Job19:12 Monnye gubino i koma kacel, gutoro cel lobo guruma wo ko dyere, gugony gurumo kemana." 
Job19:13 “Opoko omegina woko ka mabor kweda, jo ma cen giŋeya ducu adoko welo ki botgi." 
Job19:14 Wadina ki lurema gurwenyo woko; 
Job19:15 welo ma i oda doŋ wigi owil woko i koma; aŋecana gibedo kweda calo an a welo ki tun botgi, adoko larok ki i waŋgi." 
Job19:16 Ka alwoŋo laticca, en pe gamo doga, an myero abak doga bote." 
Job19:17 Yweyo doga odoko rac wa bot dakona, omegina ma litino pa maa gidag ŋwec koma," 
Job19:18 Kadi wa litino matino gicaya; ka aa, gin loko lok marac i koma," 
Job19:19 Lurema ma giŋeya ducu igi doŋ okwera woko, jo ma yam amarogi doŋ gulokke i koma." 
Job19:20 Cogona doŋ omakke woko ki del koma ki riŋo koma, anen ki laka keken." 
Job19:21 Kica omakwu i koma ba, wun lurema, pien ciŋ Lubaŋa doŋ otyeko gudo koma," 
Job19:22 Piŋo wubedo ka una macalo Lubaŋa? Can ma aneno, ki arem koma peya oromowu?" 
Job19:23 “Lokka ducu kono gicoyo woko cut! Kono cen gicoyo i buk! 
Job19:24 Kono cen gigoro lokka ki kalam nyonyo i kom pata, gimwono ki nyonyo macol, wek ori matwal." 
Job19:25 Pien aŋeyo ni Lacunudwarra tye, ci lacen en bicuŋ pira i wi lobo;" 
Job19:26 lacen ka doŋ del koma oballe woko kuman, abineno Lubaŋa laboŋo koma-ni," 
Job19:27 Abinene kun ocuŋ pira, abinene ki waŋa, pe bibedo welo ki tuŋ bota, Cwinya opoto ni liŋ!" 
Job19:28 Ka wuwaco ni, ‘Wabiryemo kore niŋniŋ?’ dok ni, ‘Te lok kikome onen ki bote”" 
Job19:29 myero wulwor pala lucwan, pien kiniga aye kelo can me to, wek wuŋe ni ŋolo kop tye.”" 
Job20:1 Jopar Lanaamat ogamo kit man ni," 
Job20:2 “Pi lok meno tamma odiya, omiya adok iye, pi rucurucu ma atye kwede i cwinya." 
Job20:3 Awinyo juk ma miya lewic, ento cwiny ma omiya abedo ki niaŋ matut miyo agamo." 
Job20:4 “In pe iŋeyo lok man nia wa con, i kare ma giketo dano i wi lobo," 
Job20:5 ni, kijira pa dano marac winnye pi kare manok, yomcwiny pa dano ma pe lworo Lubaŋa ri pi dakika acel keken?" 
Job20:6 Kadi en bor, o wa i polo, kadi wiye gudo pol," 
Job20:7 birwenyo woko matwal macalo cette; jo ma yam gunene gibiwaco ni, ‘En tye kwene?’" 
Job20:8 En bilal wo ko macalo lek; gibiryeme woko macalo ginanyuta me dyewor. 
Job20:9 Jo ma yam ginene pe dok gibinene aye, kadi kabedone pe dok binen matwal." 
Job20:10 Litinone gibiyenyo kony ki bot lucan, en bidwoko lonyone cen ki ciŋe." 
Job20:11 Cogo kome tye mupoŋ ki teko me awobine, ento gibiyike kwede i apwa." 
Job20:12 “Kadi doge lim pi tim marac, kadi bed en kano i te lebe," 
Job20:13 kadi pe ye ŋulone, kun kano pud bedo kwede i doge," 
Job20:14 ento lokke ki i cin iye, doko kec macalo kwir twol." 
Job20:15 En mwonyo lim ci noko woko odoco; Lubaŋa cwalo woko ki i iye," 
Job20:16 En bidoto kwir twol gola, leb ororo bineke." 
Job20:17 En pe bineno kulu mo, laora ma mol kic ki cak lukulu." 
Job20:18 En bidwoko gin ma en onoŋo pi ticce matek, pe bimwonyo; magoba ma en olimo pi cato wille, pe bilimo iye yomcwiny mo." 
Job20:19 Pien odiyo lucan ci otenyogi woko ata omayo odi ma ceŋ en pe ogerogi. 
Job20:20 “Pe bigwoko gin mo wacel ma pire mitte, pien iye pe okwe." 
Job20:21 Berbedo pe biri, pien ceŋ pe weko gin mo doŋ ka en camo." 
Job20:22 I kare ma jamine doŋ nya mapol, piny biloye woko, ciŋ jo ducu ma tye ki can bikemo en," 
Job20:23 Lubaŋa bicwalo kinigane malyet i kome, miyo cwer i kome macalo kot ma ka camme, wek oyen kwede likiŋ." 
Job20:24 En biriŋo gi-lweny me nyonyo, ento atero mola bicele woko pil." 
Job20:25 Giputo ki tuŋ ŋeye, lebe ma ryeny kato woko ki pig kedane; kome nyonne ki lworo." 
Job20:26 Lim ma en okano, colpiny malik bibalo woko; mac ma pe dano okuto bityeke woko; biwaŋo wa jami ducu mudoŋ i ode," 
Job20:27 Polo binyuto balle, lobo bikelo lok me caden i kome." 
Job20:28 Pii lalele bitero ode woko, bimolo woko i nino me kiniga pa Lubaŋa," 
Job20:29 Man en aye pok pa dano marac ma a ki bot Lubaŋa, man ginaleya ma Lubaŋa ociko pire.”" 
Job21:1 Yubu dok ogamo ni meno," 
Job21:2 “Wuwiny lokka maber, meno aye kit ma wubikweyo ki cwinya." 
Job21:3 Wudi cwinywu, ci abilok, lacen ma doŋ aloko otum, ci wumedde giwu ki nyara." 
Job21:4 Atye ka koko i kom dano bo? Myero adi cwinya piŋo? 
Job21:5 Wunena ci dogwu bitwo woko, wuket ciŋwu i dogwu." 
Job21:6 Ka atamo pire cwinya poto, ci koma onyo koyo woko." 
Job21:7 Piŋo jo maraco gibedo kwo, giri dok tekogi woto ki medde?" 
Job21:8 Litinogi doko dito ma lunyodogi pud kwo, likwayogi doŋo kun gineno ki waŋgi." 
Job21:9 Odigi tye ki kuc laboŋo lworo, odoo pa Lubaŋa pe o i komgi." 
Job21:10 Twonigi nywal ma pa gikeŋ, dyaŋigi bene pe gibwogo litino abwoga." 
Job21:11 Litinogi mol calo lwak romi, ka gicito ka tuko." 
Job21:12 Giwero ki ajaa ki opuk, ginyuto yomcwinygi ki dwan nyamulere." 
Job21:13 Gityeko kare ki berbedo keken, gimedo ki to ki kuc." 
Job21:14 Giwaco ki Lubaŋa ni, A woko ki botwa! Pe wamito ŋeyo yoni." 
Job21:15 Won Twer Ducu en aŋa ma myero wati bote? Ka walego en wabinoŋo koni aŋo?’ 
Job21:16 Nen ya, berbedogi gigi ginoŋo ki ciŋgi kengi. Ento pe atwero ye tam pa jo maraco." 
Job21:17 “Tara pa jo maraco gineko woko tyen adi? Can poto i komgi tyen adi? Lubaŋa poko arem botgi pi kini gane tyen adi? 
Job21:18 Gibedo macalo reŋ ka ma yamo tero ada? Nyo macalo cuŋ kal ma yamo kot kuto? 
Job21:19 Wuwaco ni, ‘Lubaŋa kano can me balgi pi litinogi? Wek ocul botgi gin kikomgi guniaŋ." 
Job21:20 Wek gunen ki waŋgi ka can poto i komgi, gubil kiniga pa Won Twer Ducu." 
Job21:21 Gin kono giparo aŋo pi likwayogi, ka doŋ gityeko ŋolo wel dwegi woko?" 
Job21:22 Ŋat mo bipwonyo Lubaŋa ki ryeko, kun kono en ŋolo kop pa jo ma gitye malo?" 
Job21:23 Ŋat man to ma pud kome tek, ma tye maber ki kuc madwoŋ;" 
Job21:24 agulune opoŋ ki cak, i cogone opoŋ ki moo mapwot." 
Job21:25 Ŋat mukene to ki cwercwiny madwoŋ, ma naka yam pe obilo gin maber." 
Job21:26 Gibuto kacel i apwa, kwidi poŋ i komgi woko." 
Job21:27 “Nen, aŋeyo tamwa, ki yubwu me timo gin marac i koma." 
Job21:28 Pien wuwacci, ‘Ot pa kadit tye kwene? Kema ma yam jo maraco bedo iye tye kwene?" 
Job21:29 Wun pe wubedo ka penyo jo ma giwoto i yo? Pe wuye oŋon ma gobolo botwu," 
Job21:30 ma nyuto ni dano marac giweke i nino me can, gilare woko i kare me kiniga?" 
Job21:31 Aŋa ma twero nyutte kite ka maleŋ? Doki aŋa ma twero cule pi timme marac? 
Job21:32 Ka gitero kome i bur, dano gikuro lyelle." 
Job21:33 Ŋom ma i nota obedo mit bote; jo ducu gilubo kore, lwak jo ma gitelo nyime pa kwanne." 
Job21:34 Wun dok wubikweyo cwinya niŋniŋ ki lok ma tere pe? Gin mo pe odoŋ i kom lagamwu kono goba keken.” 
Job22:1 Erifaji Lateman dok ogamo ni," 
Job22:2 “Dano twero bedo ki kony bot Lubaŋa? Atikane ŋat ma tye ki ryeko konnye pire kene. 
Job22:3 Won Twer Ducu cwinye bedo yon ka kiti atir? En noŋo kony mo ka bal mo pe i komi? 
Job22:4 Nyo itamo ni pien ilwore ma miyo en juki, ci donyo kwedi i ŋolo kop?" 
Job22:5 Pe tim marac ma itimo aye pol? Balli ka gikke pe. 
Job22:6 Pien imiyo omegeni gijeŋo jamigi nononono, ci ilunyo boŋo woko ki i kom dano iweko gudoŋ munero." 
Job22:7 In ceŋ pe imiyo pii amata bot ŋat mo muol, itwono ŋat ma kec neko woko ki kwon." 
Job22:8 Oteka aye ceŋ obedo won lobo, dano ma gipwoyo aye bedo iye." 
Job22:9 In ceŋ iryemo mon to woko ke ciŋgi noŋo, ceŋ ituro bad litino kic." 
Job22:10 Pienne girumi ki owic, lworo onyoŋo komi woko oyotoyot." 
Job22:11 Dero ceŋ odoko col, pe itwero neno piny, lalele pii omwonyi woko." 
Job22:12 “Lubaŋa pe tye wa malo i polo? Nen lakalatwe ma gitye malo kit ma gibor kwede! 
Job22:13 Pi meno iwaco ni, ‘Lubaŋa ŋeyo gin aŋo? Waŋe romo tuco pol mapek pi ŋolo kop?" 
Job22:14 Pol mucido oboyo kome woko, pi meno en pe twero neno bal. En woto mere wa i dan polo.’" 
Job22:15 Pud imoko i yo macon ma jo maraco yam gubedo ka lubone-ni? 
Job22:16 Ceŋ giceyogi woko ma peya karegi oromo, gutigi pii omolo woko." 
Job22:17 Ceŋ guwaco bot Lubaŋa ni, ‘A woko ki botwa,’ doki ni, ‘Gin aŋo ma Won Twer Ducu twero timo i komwa?" 
Job22:18 Kun en aye ma yam opoŋo odigi ki jami mabeco. Pe atwero ye tam pa jo maraco! 
Job22:19 Jo ma kitgi atir gineno ki yomcwiny, jo ma pe ki bal nyero anyera," 
Job22:20 kun giwaco ni, ‘Lukworwa doŋ gityekogi, jamgi mudoŋ mac owaŋo woko.’" 
Job22:21 “Ribbe ki Lubaŋa, ci ibibedo ki kuc; en aye bimiyo gin maber bino boti." 
Job22:22 Gam pwony ma a i doge, ci iket lokke i cwinyi." 
Job22:23 Dwog bot Won Twer Ducu, ci ibed mwol, bol tim ma pe atir woko ka mabor ki i paconi." 
Job22:24 Bol jabu apwa, Ki jabu me Opir i kin gweŋ laora kulu," 
Job22:25 wek Won Twer Ducu aye obed jabuni, ki ryal ma pire tek boti." 
Job22:26 Kumeno cwinyi bibedo yom pi Won Twer Ducu, ibitiŋo waŋi malo bot Lubaŋa." 
Job22:27 Ibilego en, ci biwinyo legani, ci ibicobo kwoŋŋi bote." 
Job22:28 Gin ducu ma itamo bicobbe maber, nyimi bibedo leŋ." 
Job22:29 Pien Lubaŋa dwoko lukwakke piny, ento en laro jo mamwol." 
Job22:30 En laro dano ma pe tiyo gin marac, ci bilare pi leŋ ciŋi.”" 
Job23:1 Yubu ogamo kun waco ni meno 
Job23:2 “Tin bene aloko ma iya kec; kadi bed atye ka cur, ciŋe pud nura." 
Job23:3 Kono ceŋ aŋeyo ka ma atwero noŋe iye, wek ao wa i kabedone!" 
Job23:4 Kono ayeko lokka i nyime wek oŋol, anyuto kore kikore ki lok mapol mada," 
Job23:5 miyo aŋeyo gin ma en bigamma, kono aniaŋ gin ma en owaco bota." 
Job23:6 En kono opyem kweda ki twerone madit? Pe kumeno; en kono oketo cwinye ka winya. 
Job23:7 Dano ma kite atir twero pyem kwede ki kunnu, ci laŋolkoppa kono miyo aloyo kop naka." 
Job23:8 “Nen mono, acito anyim, ento pe tye kunnu; adok cen, ento pe anoŋe." 
Job23:9 Ayenye tuŋ acam, ento pe amedo ki nene, alokke tuŋ acuc, pe anene bene." 
Job23:10 Ento en noŋo ŋeyo yo ma acito iye; ka en otema, abikatti macalo jabu maleŋ." 
Job23:11 Abedo ka lubo kore kikome, pe aŋak ka mukene." 
Job23:12 Pe adok cen aweko cik ma en ociko; lok ma en owaco akano i cwinya macalo lonyona. 
Job23:13 Ento en pe lokke, aŋa ma twero wiro en? En t iyo gire gin ma iye mito." 
Job23:14 Pien en bicobo gin ma en oyubo pira, ki lwak lok macalo meno ma en tye kwede i cwinye." 
Job23:15 Pienno koma onyo koyo i nyime, ka atamo, atye ka lworo eno" 
Job23:16 Lubaŋa omiyo koma obaŋŋe woko, Won Twer Ducu otyeko miyo koma onyo koyo." 
Job23:17 Pe colpiny aye orida woko, kadi piny macol licuc ma oumo waŋa." 
Job24:1 “Piŋo Won Twer Ducu pe kano kare me ŋolo kop? Piŋo jo ma giŋeyo en pe gineno ninone? 
Job24:2 Dano gidiro waŋ co lobo pi medo nomgi, gimayo lim pa jo mukene, ci gikwayogi." 
Job24:3 Giryemo kana pa litino kic, gikwanyo twon pa daa-to pi den." 
Job24:4 Gicoro lucan gidirogi cen ki iyo; lucan ma i lobo gikanne woko liweŋ. 
Job24:5 Nen, giwoto macalo kana me tim gicito ka canne ki tic matek; giyenyo camgi i tim ata, obed kwon pa litinogi." 
Job24:6 Gigwero obot cam ma i poto, gibeko nyig olok ki i pot ti pa jo maraco." 
Job24:7 Dyewor gibuto nono ma pe giumme, pe giumme, kadi piny nie twatwal." 
Job24:8 Kot ma a ki wi got pwodogi, gipadde i kom pata pien kagwokgi pe," 
Job24:9 Jo maraco gimayo litino kic ki i kor mon, gigamo litino pa lucan me den." 
Job24:10 Ento lucan giwirre noŋo, laboŋo ginaruka; giyeyo bel ma gikayo, kun gitye ki kec," 
Job24:11 Gibiyo moo jeituni i potti pa jo maraco, ginyobo nyig olok vino ki laa doggi." 
Job24:12 Jo ma tye ka to gicur ki i gaŋ, dano ma olimo retgi kok ki cwinygi ducu, ento Lubaŋa pe ciko ite i legagi." 
Job24:13 “Tye jo mogo ma igi dag ceŋ; pe guŋiyo tic kwede, pe gimaro lubo yone." 
Job24:14 Lanek a kwarpiny wek enek lacan ki dano ma piny oloyo; dyewor en doko lakwo. 
Job24:15 Lakwele bene kuro piny ma ribiribi, kun wacci, ‘ŋatti mo pe ma nena’; ci kano waŋe woko." 
Job24:16 Ka piny col gituro odi; ka dyeceŋ ci gicego wigi i ot; pe gimaro lenpiny," 
Job24:17 Pien ka piny col, meno aye rupiny ki tuŋ botgi; piny macol ma dano lworo-ni en aye laremgi." 
Job24:18 “Iwaco ni, ‘Pii mologi woko oyotoyot; dullobogi giceno woko; lapakaca mo pe yenyo tic i poto olokgi." 
Job24:19 Macalo pee mee woko pi cen ki lyeto, kit meno lubalo bene rwenyo woko i lyel." 
Job24:20 Wic biwil i komgi i dye gaŋ; ŋat mo ma bipo i nyiŋgi doŋ pe; kumeno lutim maraco gibitur calo yat.’ 
Job24:21 “Giuno mon ma lulur ma litinogi pe, pe gikonyo mon to." 
Job24:22 Ento Lubaŋa weko jo matego giri i wi lobo pi twerone; gia malo, kadi bed onoŋo pe gitye ki gen me bedo kwo." 
Job24:23 En weko gicuŋ kun gitamo ni gitye maber, ento en bedo ka ŋiyo gin ducu ma gitimo." 
Job24:24 Giille malo pi kare manok, lacen girwenyo woko, macalo doo ma ner ci two woko, nyo macalo wit bel ma gimworo woko." 
Job24:25 Ka pe kumeno, aŋa ma twero nyuto ni an lagoba? Aŋa ma waco ni lok ma awaco-ni mwa?" 
Job25:1 Bildad Lacua ogamo ni meno," 
Job25:2 “Loc tye bot Lubaŋa, myero gilwor en; en miyo kucce nya malo i polo." 
Job25:3 Mony pa Lubaŋa twero kwanne? Jo mene ma ceŋŋe pe menyogi? 
Job25:4 Dano twero bedo ma kite atir niŋniŋ i nyim Lubaŋa? Ŋat ma dako onywalo twero bedo leŋ i ki te aŋo? 
Job25:5 Nen, i waŋe dwe pe ryeny, lakalatwe bene pe gileŋ;" 
Job25:6 dano kono bedo niŋniŋ i nyime ma en kwidi mamwa-ni?” 
Job26:1 Yubu dok ogamo ni," 
Job26:2 “Kit ma ikonyo kwede dano ma pe tye ki twero! Kit ma ilaro kwede bad dano ma pe tye ki tek! 
Job26:3 Kit ma ikonyo kwede ŋat ma pe ki ryeko ki tam, kun itito bote lok me ŋec maber mapol!" 
Job26:4 Aŋa ma okonyi ki waco lok meno? Cwiny ma it ye ka lok kwede-ni ilimo ki bot aŋa? 
Job26:5 “Tipo pa jo muto ma gitye piny komgi myel, pii ki gin ma bedo iye bene gitye ki lworo." 
Job26:6 Lyel tye nono i nyim Lubaŋa, lobo pa jo muto pe tye ki gi-umo wiye." 
Job26:7 Lubaŋa oyaro but piny tuŋ acam i dye yamo noŋo, pe oŋabo lobo i kom gin mo." 
Job26:8 En tweyo pii malo i pol mere mucido licuc, pol pe tyer woko pi pek pa pii," 
Job26:9 En umo waŋ dwe, yaro polle i wiye," 
Job26:10 En oluŋo lawala i wi pii i waŋ co ma poko leŋo ki mutu. 
Job26:11 Wir ma otiŋo pol giyeŋŋe, gibedo ka uro ka en ojukogi." 
Job26:12 Nam oliŋ pi twerone, ogoyo min kulu Rakab pi ryekone." 
Job26:13 Yamone omiyo polo owarre onen maleŋ; en aye ocobo twol ma tye ka mol riŋo woko. 
Job26:14 Nen, man pud doge, pe kom ticce kikome, wawinyo macalo lok ma gikwilo akwila ma winyone tek, ento aŋa ma niaŋ i kom twerone ka mor calo mor kot" 
Job27:1 Yubu dok omedde ki lokke kun waco ni," 
Job27:2 “Akwoŋo ki nyiŋ Lubaŋa makwo, ma Won Twer Ducu, ma omiyo cwinya odoko kec pi kwero ŋolo koppa atir," 
Job27:3 ni, pi kare ducu ma pud atye ki yweyo, ma cwiny pa Lubaŋa pud tye i uma," 
Job27:4 doga pe biloko goba, ki leba bene pe biloko lok me bwolo dano." 
Job27:5 Pe abiye lokwu matwal ni gin ma wuloko tye kakare; nio waŋ ma ato, ento pud abiwacci cwinya leŋ." 
Job27:6 Pud abicuŋ matek kun awacci kita tye atir, pe abilokke; aŋeyo ki i cwinya kena ni pe tye nino mo i kwona ducu ma lewic myero omaka iye." 
Job27:7 “Wek lukworra gunen can macalo jo maraco! Wek jo ma gimito lweny kweda gitimgi macalo lubalo! 
Job27:8 Dano ma pe lworo Lubaŋa tye ki gen aŋo ka kwone otum woko, ka Lubaŋa okwanyo kwone woko?" 
Job27:9 Lubaŋa biwinyo kokone ka ayela mo obino i kome? 
Job27:10 Cwinye bibedo yom i kom Won Twer Ducu? Bilego Lubaŋa kare ducu? 
Job27:11 Atye ka pwonyowu ki lok ma dok i kom twer pa Lubaŋa, pe aumo kit tam ma Won Twer Ducu tye kwede," 
Job27:12 Nen, wun ducu doŋ wutyeko nenone piwu kenwu; piŋo dok wuloko lok ma konnye pe?" 
Job27:13 “Man can ma Lubaŋa poko bot dano marac, man gin ma jo ma giuno jo mukene ginoŋo ki bot Won Twer Ducu." 
Job27:14 Ka litino pa dano marac ginya, ginekogi woko ki pala lucwan; litino ma en onywalo pe gibedo ki cam ma romogi." 
Job27:15 Litinone ma pud gikwo two gemo aye nekogi, ci mongi pe kokogi." 
Job27:16 Kadi bed oguro lim odurre calo kweyo, kadi ocoko boŋŋi obako lipim," 
Job27:17 en twero cokone mere, ento dano ma kite atir aye ma birukogi, dano ma pe ki bal aye ma bipoko limme." 
Job27:18 Ot ma en ogero bibedo calo obwo oboropyen, nyo ot aduc ma giyubo pi kuro cam ma tye i poto," 
Job27:19 Cen mo bibuto piny ma noŋo pud olony, ento ka oyabo waŋe odiko ci noŋo gin mo doŋ pe." 
Job27:20 Gin ma kelo lworo bimwonye woko macalo pii lalele; yamo lapiru bitine woko cwiny dyewor. 
Job27:21 Yamo ma a wokceŋ bitine wo ko tere matwal; kun kwanye woko ki i kabedone," 
Job27:22 bicorre i kome laboŋo kica, miyo en riŋo woko ki tekke ducu wek ebwot ki i twerone." 
Job27:23 Yamo kok macalo ŋat ma doŋo ciŋe pi nyware, ŋur calo ŋat ma tye ka jwiye ki i kabedone.”" 
Job28:1 “Bur tye ka ma gikwinyo iye ryal, kabedo tye ka ma giliyo iye jabu." 
Job28:2 Nyonyo gikwinyo ki i ŋom, mola ginoŋo ki i gweŋ ka gilenyo." 
Job28:3 Dano giroto i nom i colpiny, kun giyenyo gweŋ nyonyo nio wa i agikkine i mutu ki piny macollicuc." 
Job28:4 Gikwinyo bur i nota ka ma dano pe bedo iye; luwot i yo wigi wil woko i komgi, Gilutogi i bur ki tol ci gilyerre iye ka ma dano mukene pe," 
Job28:5 Cam cek ki i lobo, ento i tere piny gibedo ka mukone woko calo gimuko ki mac." 
Job28:6 I kin gweŋ tye iye godi matino ma bulu me wel, ma tye iye luru jabu." 
Job28:7 “Yo ma cito kunnu acut mo pe ma ŋeyo, ocecu peya oneno," 
Job28:8 Lee tim ma, ginyatte yam peya gunyono; labwor bene peya owok ki iye." 
Job28:9 “Dano cwalo ŋine wa i kom pata matek, muko wa got madit ki i tere piny." 
Job28:10 En baro yo pii ki i gweŋ,’ ci neno gin me wei ducu." 
Job28:11 Culo kor pii woko wek kulu pe gumol; gin mukanne en kela woko ka maleŋ," 
Job28:12 “Ento ryeko gibinoŋo ki kwene? Niaŋ matut kabedone tye kwene? 
Job28:13 Dano pe ŋeyo yo ma cito iye, pe noŋŋe i lobo pa jo makwo." 
Job28:14 Kut wacci, ‘Pe tye iiya,’ nam bene waco ni, ‘Pe bota.’" 
Job28:15 Lonyo madwoŋ pe twero wilone, pe tye wellim mo ma giromo culo pire." 
Job28:16 Pe gitwero kwaŋo welle i jabu me Opir, pe giporo ki kidi me wel macalo onik nyo capir." 
Job28:17 Jabu ki madara pe twero rom kwede, pe gibilokone kadi wa ki atego me jabu maber." 
Job28:18 Pe gibipo pi tiko me wel makwarre nyo matarre: wel ryeko tye malo kato jami mukene me wel woko ducu. 
Job28:19 Kidi ma obedo atworo me Etiopia pe gitwero porone kwede, wa jabu ma giliyo maber bene pe romo wilone." 
Job28:20 “Ci doŋ ryeko a ki kwene ce? Niaŋ matut bedo kwene? 
Job28:21 Okanne woko ki i waŋ gin makwo ducu, oumme woko ki bot winyo me polo." 
Job28:22 Lyel ki to giwaco ni, ‘Lok i kome wawinyo awinya keken.’" 
Job28:23 “Lubaŋa aye ŋeyo yone, en ŋeyo kabedone," 
Job28:24 pien en neno wa i agikki me lobo, neno wa jami ducu ma tye i te polo." 
Job28:25 I kare ma yam en omoko kit ma teko me yamo myero obed kwede, kun nyuto bene ka ma pii me nam myero ogik iye;" 
Job28:26 i kare ma cen en oketo cik pi kot, dok ocimo yo ma wil pa kot ma mor myero olubi;" 
Job28:27 i kare meno Lubaŋa oneno ryeko, oniyo maber, omiyo ocuŋ ci otato tere," 
Job28:28 Ci owaco bot dano ni meno, ‘Nen, lworo Rwot en aye ryeko; bwoto timo gin maracaye ke lo niaŋ matut.’ ”" 
Job29:1 Yubu dok omedde ki lokke kun waco ni," 
Job29:2 “Ayaa, kono ceŋ atye kit ma abedo kwede i kare macon ca, i kare ma Lubaŋa obedo ka gwoka!" 
Job29:3 I kare meno tarane obedo ka lyel malo ka wiya, ceŋ pa Lubaŋa obedo ka menya ka awoto i piny macol." 
Job29:4 I kare meno onoŋo atye maber ki lim mabup, mar pa Lubaŋa gwoko kemana;" 
Job29:5 Won Twer Ducu onoŋo tye kweda, onoŋo litinona bene gurumo ka ŋeta woko," 
Job29:6 Ka ma acito iye ducu anoŋo cak mabup, anoŋo moo madwoŋ wa i kom yadi ma apito i kin gweŋ," 
Job29:7 I kare ma acito i dog gaŋ ka ma ludoŋo gicokke iye, ka ayubo kabedona i dye gaŋ ka ma giporo iye lok," 
Job29:8 ka awobe gunena ci gudirre woko cen, ludoŋo gua gucuŋ;" 
Job29:9 rwodi bene gujuko lokgi woko, guketo ciŋgi i doggi;" 
Job29:10 dwan ludito olin, lebgi bene omoko woko i dangi." 
Job29:11 Dano ma winyo lok i koma yam lwona ni lagumkom, ŋat ma onena ki waŋe obedo caden me pwoya:" 
Job29:12 pien onoŋo yam alaro lucan ka gukok, dok akonyo litino kic ma lukonygi pe." 
Job29:13 Jo ma onoŋo doŋ gicok to giiegga gum, dok amiyo mon ma coggi oto giwero wer pi yomcwiny." 
Job29:14 Onoŋo arukke woko ki kit ma atir macalo rukka me kare ducu, anyebbe ki ŋolo kop kakare macalo jor ki tok ma pe rwenyo ki bota." 
Job29:15 Yam abedo ma ka waŋ jo ma waŋgi oto, akonyo luŋolo amiyo guwoto ki tyengi." 
Job29:16 Yam akonyo lucan macalo gin litinona kikome; kadi dano ma onoŋo pe aŋeyo, ayelle pi cwako pidone." 
Job29:17 Alwenyo matek ki lubwami macalo alwenyo ki ŋuu, alaro dano ki botgi macalo alaro ki i dog labwor." 
Job29:18 Yam onoŋo atamo ni abito mot i pacona, ma nino me kwona pol ma rom ki kweyo," 
Job29:19 ma noŋo arom ki yat ma oyaro Lwite i ŋet pii, ma toyo luk i jaŋe dyewor," 
Job29:20 kun deyo pe rweny ki bota, dok tekona obedo ka roc odoko nyen." 
Job29:21 “Dano yam winyo lokka, ci gilir; mot, kun gikuro tam ma an aye amiyo botgi." 
Job29:22 Ka doŋ aloko, pe giloko lok mo, lokka obedo macalo kot ma cwer," 
Job29:23 Gibedo ka kuro lokka macalo gikuro poto kot, gigamo tamma macalo gimato kot me cwir." 
Job29:24 Ka yam abwonyo, pe gitwero ye; ento pe gitwero balo yomcwinya." 
Job29:25 Yam anyuttigi gin ma myero gutim, kun abedo macalo rwotgi, nyo macalo kabaka ma bedo i dye monnye, dok macalo ŋat ma kweyo cwiny jo ma koko lyel." 
Job30:1 “Ento koni doŋ gitye ka nyera, gin jo ma pud gin litino ki tuŋ bota, ma wegigi yam acayogi, pe atwero ketogi wa i kin gwogi ma gikuro romina." 
Job30:2 Kit kony aŋo ma atwero noŋo i kom teko me badgi, gin jo ma kero komgi doŋ otum woko-ni?" 
Job30:3 Gujony pi can ki kec ma nekogi, gigweno gin mutwo i tim ka ma dano pe;" 
Job30:4 giŋwedo pot yat me tim ki oboke me buŋa, giboko lwit lyonno me acamagi." 
Job30:5 Giryemogi woko ki i kin dano; gidaŋŋe i korg i macalo gidaŋŋe i kor lakwo. 
Job30:6 Yam gibedo i laora kulu ka ma rac, ki i bur ma i ŋom nyo i boro got," 
Job30:7 Gikok ki i buŋa macalo lee-gu, gigurre kacel i te ok uto." 
Job30:8 Gin jo ma k itgi raco ma pe gmeyo ka ma gua iye; ceŋ giryemogi woko ki i lobowa. 
Job30:9 “Ento koni jo-nu gucako wer i koma, nyiŋa odoko lok aboka ki tuŋ botgi," 
Job30:10 Gidaga, pe gimaro bino cok kweda, giŋulo laa wa i waŋa," 
Job30:11 Lubaŋa obalo tekona woko, omiyo pe doŋ atwero timo gin mo i komgi; en meno gin mumi yo pe gijukke kengi i nyima." 
Job30:12 Lwakgi otwarre i koma tunacuc, gucako ryema woko cut, gitye ka yubo yo me kelo can i koma macalo mony ma oguro gaŋ." 
Job30:13 Gituro yo ma kono ariŋo alarre iye, gimedo can i koma ameda; ŋat ma jukogi pe," 
Job30:14 Gimuko waŋ cel malac, gikatti i koma, gibedo ni kelkel i wi obur." 
Job30:15 Lworo obaŋo koma woko; deyona otum woko macalo gin ma yamo okolo, berbedona bene orwenyo woko macalo po!." 
Job30:16 “Koni doŋ cwinya tye ka cwer matek; kare me ayelayela doŋ obino i koma. 
Job30:17 Koma mwoda amwoda dyewor, awinyo arem ma pe aywe," 
Job30:18 Lubaŋa omako ginarukana ki tek, otweya woko macalo nut kanyina." 
Job30:19 Obola woko piny i daba, adoko calo apwa ki buru." 
Job30:20 Lubaŋa, abedo ka kok boti, ci pe igamo doga; acuŋ ka lega ento pe iketo cwinyi," 
Job30:21 Doŋ ilokke idoko ger woko i koma, itye ka una ki tekki ducu." 
Job30:22 Imiyo yamo tiŋa malo wek ariŋ kwede macalo ariŋo ki gadigadi, kun yamo kot tye ka bola ata ki mor madwoŋ." 
Job30:23 Iyo, aŋeyo ni ibitera i to, i kabedo ka ma jo makwo ducu gigurre iye," 
Job30:24 “Ŋat ma ocuŋ i wi obur mono pe taŋo cine? Ka tye ki keckom pe kok pi kony? 
Job30:25 Ceŋ pe akok pi jo ma tye ki peko? Cwinya bene pe ocwer pi jo ma piny obwoyogi? 
Job30:26 Ento ka yam ageno ni abibedo maber, ci gin marac ocako bino; i kare ma ageno ni piny bibedo leŋ, col piny aye obino." 
Job30:27 Cwinya obedo ka poto, ci pe omedo ki kwe; kare me aroma keken aye doŋ tye i nyima." 
Job30:28 Awirre ma aruko boŋo cola, ento ŋat mo ma kweyo cwinya pe; aa malo i kacokke akok pi kony." 
Job30:29 Too gudoko omegina, ki udu-gu gudoko luwota." 
Job30:30 Del koma ocido woko, ci waŋye woko awaŋya ki i koma, cogona tye ka waŋ ki lyeto." 
Job30:31 Dwan opukka doŋ odoko wer me koko lyel, ki dwan nyamulerena winnye calo dwan dano ma kok." 
Job31:1 “Atyeko cikke con, waŋ ki waŋa; dok atwero neno nyako mo niŋniŋ iyo marac?" 
Job31:2 Lubaŋa ma tye malo poko ki dano kit gin aŋo? Gin aŋo ma dano noŋo ki bot Won Twer Ducu ma tye i polo? 
Job31:3 En pe kelo can i kom lubalo? Pe miyo keckom ma ko lutim maraco? 
Job31:4 En pe neno kit kwona ducu? Pe kwaŋo gin ducu ma atimo? 
Job31:5 “Ka yam abedo ka loko lok goba, ka yam koma obedo mit ka bumo dano:" 
Job31:6 wek gipima ki mijan ma pimo kakare, wek Lubaŋa oŋe ni cwinya leŋ." 
Job31:7 Ka yam tyena oŋak woko ki iyo, ka yam cwinya oparo gin ma aneno, ka yam ton me bal mo onen i ciŋa;" 
Job31:8 myero jo mukene aye gucam bel ma an acoyo, gin ma ocek i potona myero giput woko." 
Job31:9 “Ka cwinya yam otera i kom dako mo, ka yam akanne i ŋet doggola pa lawota," 
Job31:10 wek dakona oreg bel pi laco mukene, wek ŋat mukene aye obed kwede," 
Job31:11 Meno onoŋo kono obedo bal marac atika; ma luŋolkop myero gunol can iye. 
Job31:12 Rom ki mac ma waŋ nakanaka nio wa i bur lyel, ma kono owaŋo wa Lwit cam ki i potona wo ko ducu," 
Job31:13 “Ka cen akwero pi do pa opiina nyo aŋecana, ka ce gukelo lok i koma," 
Job31:14 abitimo aŋo ka Lubaŋa ocuŋ pi ŋolo kop i koma? Ka en obino pi penyo lokke ci abigamo doge niŋniŋ? 
Job31:15 Dat ma oketa i i maa en aye ma oketo opiina bene, Pe ŋat acel aye ma ocweyowa ki i ic?" 
Job31:16 “Yam atwono lucan ki gin mo ma gimito, kun amiyo mon to kuro kony ki bota kwe?" 
Job31:17 Cen acamo camma kena, ci latin kic oken?" 
Job31:18 Nia i waŋ tinona Lubaŋa obedo ka gwoka macalo wora, obedo ka tela nia ki i i maa." 
Job31:19 Cen abedo ka neno anena ka ŋat mo mito to pi can boŋo, nyo dano ma lacan obedo laboŋo gi-um, ma pe akonye?" 
Job31:20 Ceŋ pe olegga gum ki cwinye ducu, kun noŋo amiye boŋo me yer romo mapek pi miyelyeto?" 
Job31:21 Ka yam atiŋo ciŋa pi goyo ŋat ma pe ki bal, pien aneno ni gitwero konya wek alo kop;" 
Job31:22 ka yam atimo kumeno myero kwaya bada opot woko ki i wi gwoka, myero giput bada ki i waŋ mwotte woko," 
Job31:23 Pien yam alworo can ma a ki bot Lubaŋa; pe atwero timo meno ducu, pi woro ditte ki deyone," 
Job31:24 “Yam pe amoko genna i kom lim, pe onoŋo ajeŋŋe i kom lonyo me jabu;" 
Job31:25 ceŋ cwinya pe obedo yom pi lonyona mabup, nyo pien acoko gipiny mapol." 
Job31:26 Yam pe aneno ceŋ ka ryeny, nyo dwe kun woto ki deyo madit," 
Job31:27 ma dok aweko gibita me worogi i muŋ, kun aryeyo ciŋa pi motogi," 
Job31:28 Meno bene kono onoŋo obedo bal ma luŋolkop myero gunol can iye, pien onoŋo adoko lagoba bot Lubaŋa ma tye malo," 
Job31:29 “Yam pe abedo ki yomcwiny ka keckom omako lakworra, pe anyatte ka gin marac opoto kome." 
Job31:30 Yam pe aweko doga obalo bal, kun alamo pi kwone ki kwon," 
Job31:31 Jo ma i oda yam guwacci, ‘Aŋa ma pe oyen ki riŋo lee ma laditwa oneko?’" 
Job31:32 Larok mo pe yam obuto i dye gaŋ ata, pien ajolo luwot ducu i oda," 
Job31:33 Yam pe amuŋo gin marac ma atimo ki bot dano, kun akano balla i cwinya kena," 
Job31:34 pi lworo lok pa lwak. Yam pe aliŋ mot kun pe akato woko ki i oda pi lworo cac pa jo me doggola mukene. 
Job31:35 Kono nene ŋat ma winyo lokka tye! Nen, doŋ aketo ciŋa en! Wek Won Twer Ducu ogam lokka." 
Job31:36 Kono lakworra ocoyo lok ma odota kwede acoya, kono anyatte kwede ma noŋo atiŋo i wi gwoka, nyo adwalo i wiya macalo tok me dito." 
Job31:37 Kono atitte gin ducu kikore, kun anyiko cok kwede calo abedo laker." 
Job31:38 “Ka yam lobo ma apuro okok i koma, ma kokone winnye i kor kweri pa lapur;" 
Job31:39 ka yam acamo cam mucek laboŋo culo waŋe, kun aweko wegine guto woko;" 
Job31:40 wek okuto odoŋ iye ma ka gaya, ki doo labika ma ŋwece coo ma ka kal.”" 
Job32:1 Jo meno adek guweko gamo dog Yu bu pien en ŋeyo ki i cwinye kene ni lokke tye atir. 
Job32:2 Lacen Eliu wod pa Barakel ma jo Buj, me doggola pa Ram, ocako jul. En onoŋo okeco i kom Yubu pien otamo ni en aye lokke tye atir, pe Lubaŋa." 
Job32:3 Okeco bene i kom lurem Yubu adek-ki, pien pe gunoŋo lagam mo, kadi bed ceŋ gutito ni Yubu aye oroco," 
Job32:4 Eliu okuro ka jo-nu gitye ka lok ki Yubu, pien onoŋo gin doŋ guteggi makato en," 
Job32:5 Ento ka en oneno ni gamo dog Yubu oloyo jo-nu adek-ki kiniga ocako make," 
Job32:6 Eliu wod pa Barakel ma jo Buj ocako waco ni meno, “An pud latin, wun doŋ wuteggi; pi meno nanen abedo ki lworo, pe atwero diyo cwinya wek atit botwu gin ma aŋeyo," 
Job32:7 Ceŋ atamo ni, ‘Wek dito aye oloki, wek lwak mwaka onyut ryeko.’" 
Job32:8 Ento cwiny ma tye i i dano, yweyo pa Won Twer Ducu, aye gin ma miyo dano niaŋ i lok mo," 
Job32:9 Enno pe ni ludito aye giryek, nyo ni jo muteggi giŋeyo gin ma tye atir." 
Job32:10 Pi meno awacci, ‘Wuwiny lokka; wek an bene anyut tamma.’" 
Job32:11 “Nen, ceŋ abedo ka kuro lok ma wubiwaco, aciko ita wek awiny ryeko ma wubedo ka lokone, kun wuyenyo kit lok ma myero wuwaci." 
Job32:12 Onoŋo aketo cwinya ka winyo lokwu, ci nen, onoŋo pe tye ŋat mo i kinwu muloyo Yubu, nyo ma ogamo lokke." 
Job32:13 Wugwokke, wuwek waco ni, ‘Wan doŋ walimo ryeko.’ Lubaŋa aye twero loye, pe dano." 
Job32:14 Lokke ceŋ pe okemo an, ci pe abigamo doge ki kit lok macalo mewu-ni:" 
Job32:15 Doggi otwo woko, pe doŋ gugamo doge, pien pe gitye ki lok mo ma myero guwaci." 
Job32:16 An myero akur pierr gin pe giloko, pien gin ducu gucuŋ acuŋa, ma pe doŋ gigamo lok mo?" 
Job32:17 An ki tuŋ bota abigamo; dok abinyuto tamma bene," 
Job32:18 Pien atye ki lwak lok mapol, cwinya tye ka ruya ki iiya," 
Job32:19 Nen, cwinya tye macalo kono ma giumo wiye woko, calo kicaa kono yino manyen ma mito yec." 
Job32:20 Myero aloki, wek aywe maber; myero olo aŋam doga, agam lokke." 
Job32:21 Pe abidworo kor dano mo, pe abikoro dano mo bene." 
Job32:22 Pe aŋeyo ki r me koro, dano; kono atemo, kono Lacwec otugi neka woko cut." 
Job33:1 “Ento koni doŋ in Yubu, winy lokka, cik iti i kom lok ducu ma abiwaco." 
Job33:2 Nen, doŋ anamo doga, leba ma i doga doŋ ocako lok." 
Job33:3 Lokka nyuto ni cwinya tye atir, aloko gin ma aŋeyo ni tye atir." 
Job33:4 Cwiny pa Lubaŋa aye ma oketa, yweyo pa Won Twer Ducu omiyo abedo makwo." 
Job33:5 Gam doga, ka ce itwero, can lokki ducu kikore i nyima; noŋ kom lok ma icuŋo iye." 
Job33:6 Nen, arom kwedi i nyim Lubaŋa; an bene gicweya ki lobo." 
Job33:7 Nen, lworo i koma pe myero oryaŋ komi, lokka pe binuri mukato kare." 
Job33:8 “Adada, ityeko loko lok kun awinyo, doŋ awinyo lok ma iwaco." 
Job33:9 Cen iwaco ni meno, ‘An aleŋ, bal mo pe i koma; cwinya olony, pe atimo gin mo marac." 
Job33:10 Nen, Lubaŋa bedo ka yenyo lok i koma, en tima macalo lakworre;" 
Job33:11 orwako tyena i okol, en ŋiyo ka ma acito iye ducu.’" 
Job33:12 “Nen, ka iloko kumeno noŋo ipoto i bal, an agamo kumeno, Lubaŋa aye dit makato dano." 
Job33:13 Piŋo imito pyem kwede kun iwacci, ‘Pe ogamo lwak lokka-ni wacel’?" 
Job33:14 Lubaŋa loko i yo mapatpat, ento dano pe niaŋ i lokke," 
Job33:15 waŋ lek, i ginanyuta me dyewor, ka dano onino matek, kun nino oyuto waŋgi i kabutogi," 
Job33:16 meno aye kare ma en lokokwede i it dano, ci ryaŋo komgi ki lok me jukogi," 
Job33:17 wek emi dano olokke, owek timo tim marac, dok wek okwany wakke woko ki i cwiny dano." 
Job33:18 Kumeno en gwoko dano wek pe opot i bur lyel, en gwoko kwone, giwek neko en ki pala lucwan." 
Job33:19 “Lubaŋa pwodo dano bene ki arem i kabutone, kun miyo kome rem kare ducu," 
Job33:20 ma miyo cwinye dag cam, iye kwero wa cam mamit." 
Job33:21 Kome mok ma riŋo kome pe doŋ nen, cogone ma yam pe nen woko ka maleŋ nen woko ligaŋ." 
Job33:22 Nono en doŋ cok ci to piny i bur, kwone doŋ cok poto i ciŋ Lunek dano." 
Job33:23 “Ento ka ce onoŋo lamalaika tye ma cun pire, ŋat acel i kin lumalaika alip ki alip, ma giribo Lubaŋa ki dano, pi nyuto bot dano gin ma myero otim," 
Job33:24 ci lamalaika twero time kica kun wacci, ‘Weke, owek cito piny i bur, pien doŋ anoŋo gin lakok kwone.’" 
Job33:25 Ci riŋo kome biroc, bi doko nyen macalo pa latin, tekone bidwogo macalo i kare me awobine." 
Job33:26 Lacen ka dano lego bot Lubaŋa, Lubaŋa gamo legane, ci dano bi no i nyim Lubaŋa ki yom cwiny, kun tito pi larrene bot dano." 
Job33:27 En wero i nyim lwak kun wacci, ‘Ceŋ abalo, aŋak woko aweko timo gin ma tye atir, ento Lubaŋa pe oculla ma rom ki tim ma atimo." 
Job33:28 Okoka, pe doŋ abicito piny i bur, pud abibedo kwo kun aneno der ceŋ.’" 
Job33:29 “Nen, Lubaŋa tiyo meno ducu kare ki kare bot dano," 
Job33:30 pi miyo en odwog cen, wek pe olor i bur, ento onen ceŋ me kwo." 
Job33:31 Cik iti, Yubu, iwiny lokka, liŋ mot, wek an aloki." 
Job33:32 Ka it ye ki lok mo me awaca, gam doga; loki, pien cwinya bibedo yom ce onen ni lokki tye atir." 
Job33:33 Ento ka pe, winy lokka; liŋ mot, ci abipwonyi ki ryeko.”" 
Job34:1 Eliu dok oloko ni meno," 
Job34:2 “Wuwiny lokka, wun luryeko, wucik itwu ka aloko, wun jo ma wuŋeyo lok;" 
Job34:3 pien dano temo lok ki ite macalo en bilo cam ki doge," 
Job34:4 Wek wayer gin ma tye atir, waniaŋ waŋ kwedwu lok mene ma tye kakare." 
Job34:5 Pien Yubu owaco ni iye leŋ, dok ni Lubaŋa okwero ŋolo koppe atir." 
Job34:6 Owacci, ‘Kadi bed lokka tye atir, pud giwaco ni an lagoba; ret ma giketo i koma pe twero caŋ, kadi bed pe abalo bal mo.’" 
Job34:7 Dano mukene twero nen ma cal ki laco man Yubu? En ŋalo Lubaŋa macalo emato pii-gu," 
Job34:8 Omako lurem ki lutim aranyi, dok woto kacel ki jo maraco." 
Job34:9 Pien en owacci, ‘Kony mo pe bot dano me tiyo gin ma yomo cwiny Lubaŋa.’" 
Job34:10 “Pi meno wuwiny lokka, wun jo ma tye ki niaŋ matut, Lubaŋa pe twero timo gin marac kadi ki acel. Won Twer Ducu pe timo gin mo ma pe tye atir." 
Job34:11 En culo ki dano ma rom ki kit gin ma en otimo, en timo dano acel acel muporo kit kwone," 
Job34:12 Ada, Lubaŋa pe timo gin mo marac, Won Twer Ducu pe ŋolo kop ma pe atir." 
Job34:13 Aŋa ma yam oketo lobo i te locce? Aŋa ma ceŋ oketo lobo ducu i ciŋe? 
Job34:14 Kono ceŋ mo en dwoko cwinye cen, kun guro yweyone ducu bote kene," 
Job34:15 ci miyo gin makwo ducu to woko lawaŋacel, ci dano dok gire i apwa." 
Job34:16 “Ka it ye ki niaŋ matut, ci winy lok-ki mono, cik iti i lok ma awaco-ni," 
Job34:17 Ŋat ma dag ŋolo kop atir dok bedo laloc ce? Ŋat ma kite atir, ma won twero bene, dok iwaco ni kite rac?" 
Job34:18 En mere waco bot kabaka kulu ni, ‘In konnyi pe,’ dok waco bot ladit ni, ‘In i dano marac.’" 
Job34:19 En pe dworo kor luker, pe paro pi lulonyo maka to pi lucan, pien gin ducu en mucweyogi ki ciŋe." 
Job34:20 I dakika acel keken gin gito woko cwiny dyewor, en goyo rok mo-ni ci rwenyo woko, dok kobo wa dano matek twatwal woko i kabedone kun ciŋ dano mo pe ogudo." 
Job34:21 “En ciko waŋe pi neno gin ma dano tiyo, ci neno ka ma en cito iye ducu," 
Job34:22 Pe tye mutu mo nyo piny ma ocido Licuc ka ma Lutim maraco gitwero kanne iye. 
Job34:23 Lubaŋa pe ociko kare ki dano mo me cito i nyime wek enol kop i kome," 
Job34:24 En turo dit pa wegi twer laboŋo niyo lokgi, ci keto jo mukene i wi komgi." 
Job34:25 Kit meno, macalo en ŋeyo ticgi con, en retogi piny dyewor ci twerogi kec woko," 
Job34:26 En pwodogi i nyim lwak pi timgi maraco," 
Job34:27 pien onoŋo gubarre woko ki ka lubo kore, pe doŋ guketo cwinygi ka timo kit ma en mito," 
Job34:28 Kit meno gumiyo koko pa lucan oo wa bot Lubaŋa, en owinyo koko pa jo ma giunogi," 
Job34:29 “Ka Lubaŋa obedo mot, aŋa ma waco ni en otimo bal? Ka okano waŋe woko, aŋa ma twero nene, kadi rok mo kadi dano mo?" 
Job34:30 Pe gitwero geŋo dano ma pe lworo Lubaŋa ki i loc, nyo me bedo macalo owic ki bot lwak," 
Job34:31 “Tye dano mo ma owaco bot Lubaŋa ni, ‘Apoto i bal, ento pe dok abitimo gin marac." 
Job34:32 Gin ma pe aneno, in giri ipwonya; ka yam abalo, pe dok abitimo aye’?" 
Job34:33 Ki tuŋ boti myero Lubaŋa ocul lakit dano-nu pi balle, in ma idag gin ma Lubaŋa otimo? In myero iyer, ma pe an, Pi meno tit gin ma iŋeyo," 
Job34:34 Jo maryek ma giniaŋ lok ka guwinyo lokka gibiwaco bota ni," 
Job34:35 ‘Yubu tye ka lok laboŋo ŋec mo, lokke pe oa ki i ryeko ma odonyo matut.’" 
Job34:36 Kono gibedo ka temo Yubu nakanaka, kono ber, pien en gamo lok macalo jo maraco." 
Job34:37 En lacerre, pud medde ameda i bal, doŋo ciŋe i kinwu pi nywaro Lubaŋa, dok nyayo lokke me yete.”" 
Job35:1 Eliu dok owaco ni meno," 
Job35:2 “Onoŋo itamo ni lok ma kit enno tye atir, nyo ni ibedo laboŋo bal mo i nyim Lubaŋa, mumiyo iwacci," 
Job35:3 ‘Kony aŋo ma doŋ anoŋo? At ye doŋ maber niŋniŋ koni makato ma kono abedo ka timo bal?’ 
Job35:4 Abigamo lokki kit man, in kacel ki luremi," 
Job35:5 Nen polo, ci iŋi, nen pol ma gitye lamal makato in," 
Job35:6 Ka ibalo, noŋo itimo gin aŋo i kom Lubaŋa? Kadi bed inyayo bal anyaya, meno noŋo itimo en niŋniŋ?" 
Job35:7 Ka timmi tye atir, noŋo imiyo gin aŋo bote? Gin aŋo ma en gamo ki i ciŋi?" 
Job35:8 Timmi marac gudo dano ma rom ki in, timmi ma atir bene itimo bot dano." 
Job35:9 “Dano gikok pi aroma mapol ma giunogi kwede, wek gilargi ki i twer pa jo matek ma tye ka unogi." 
Job35:10 Ento pe tye ŋat mo ma wacci, ‘Lubaŋa ma ocweya tye kwene? En miyo wawero wer me pake wa dyewor." 
Job35:11 En pwonyowa makato lee ma i wi lobo, ci miyo wabedo ryek makato winyo me polo.’" 
Job35:12 Gikok bote ki kunnu, ento en pe gamo doggi, pi wakke pa jo maraco," 
Job35:13 Adada, Lubaŋa pe winyo koko nonoŋo, Won Twer Ducu pe keto iye cwinye." 
Job35:14 “In Yubu doŋ ibibedo niŋniŋ, kun iwaco ni, pe inene, dok ni koppi doŋ tye i nyime me aŋola, ento ibedo ka kure nakanaka." 
Job35:15 Itamo ni koni ka kiniga omake pe keto can i kom dano, dok ni pe paro twatwal pi tim aranyi." 
Job35:16 Meno gin mumi yo Yubu onamo doge pi loko lok ma tere pe; en onyato lwak lok mapol pi kwiya piny.” 
Job36:1 Eliu omedde ki lokke kun waco ni," 
Job36:2 “Kura koŋ manok, wek anyutti, pien pud atye ki lok me aloka pi Lubaŋa," 
Job36:3 At ye ki ŋec malac mada, ci abitiyo kwede, pi nyuto ni tim pa Dat ma ocweyowa tye atir." 
Job36:4 Pien adada lokka goba pe iye; ŋat ma tye ka lok kwedi tye ki ŋec ma oromo maber. 
Job36:5 “Nen, Lubaŋa tye ki twero, ci pe cayo ŋat mo; tekone ocuŋ i kom ryekone matut." 
Job36:6 En pe weko jo maraco bedo kwo nakanaka, ento ŋolo kop kakare pi jo ma giunogi." 
Job36:7 En pe kwanyo waŋe woko ki i kom jo ma kitgi atir, ento ketogi ka loc macalo luker, ci gibedo ki dit nakanaka." 
Job36:8 Ento ka gitweyogi ki pinno, ma ayela otweyogi macalo ogwil," 
Job36:9 ci en nyuto botgi gin ma gutimo, tim aranyigi ki kit ma guwakke kwede." 
Job36:10 En miyo gituco itgi me winyo pwony, en cikogi wek gulokke, guwek timo gin marac." 
Job36:11 Ka giwinyo doge ci gicako tiyo gin ma en mito, gityeko kare me kwogi ducu ki yomcwiny kun gitye maber." 
Job36:12 Ento ka gikwero winyo, ginekogi woko, gito ma peya giŋeyo gin mo," 
Job36:13 “Jo ma pe gilworo Lubaŋa ki i cwinygi gibedo ki kiniga, pe gikok bote pi kony ka en otweyogi." 
Job36:14 Gito ma pud gitiŋo, kwogi tum woko i tim me lewic." 
Job36:15 En laro jo ma giunogi kun tiyo ki aromagi, pwonyo dano ki can ma poto i komgi." 
Job36:16 “In Yubu bene obiti, omiyo la woko ki i atwom, oteri i kabedo malac ka ma gin mo pe odiyi, cam ma icamo jwijwi obedo ma mi yu twa twal," 
Job36:17 En can ma giketo i kom jo maraco opoŋ boti, can ma giketo pi ŋolo kop i komi doŋ omaki matek." 
Job36:18 Gwokke wek kiniga pe oteri i anywar; pe iwek gi-kok mapek ma giŋolo i komi omiyi iŋak woko," 
Job36:19 Kokoni pe twero geŋo aroma ma bi no i komgi, kadi bed iyelle ki tekoni ducu," 
Job36:20 Pe imit ni dyewor obin; meno aye kare ma rok mapol gibirwenyo wo ko ki i kabedogi. 
Job36:21 Gwokke, pe ilokke ka timo bal, pien meno aye gin ma okelo ayela i komi." 
Job36:22 “Nen, twer pa Lubaŋa dit twatwal; aŋa ma obedo lapwony ma rom kwede?" 
Job36:23 Aŋa ma ocimme yo ma myero olubi? Aŋa ma twero waco bot Lubaŋa ni, ‘In itimo rac’ ’!" 
Job36:24 Po pi pako ticce ma dano cen gikoro ki wer. 
Job36:25 Jo ducu guneno gin ma en otimo, ento dano neno ki ka mabor," 
Job36:26 Lubaŋa dit, waŋ pe waŋeye; wel mwaka ma en ori kwede pe rotte," 
Job36:27 “Pien en miyo pii duny dok malo, ci tono lupune calo kot;" 
Job36:28 kot corre piny ki i pol, ci cwer i kom dano madwoŋ atika." 
Job36:29 Ŋat mo twero niaŋ kit ma pol giyarre kwede, nyo kit ma kot mor kwede i kema pa Lubaŋa?" 
Job36:30 En miyo lutkot wil tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi, ci umo wi godi woko." 
Job36:31 Kit meno en pito jo me rok ducu, kun miyogi cam madwoŋ twatwal." 
Job36:32 En wiro cine ki mac me lutkot, ci ciko ni myero ocel ka ma gibayo iye," 
Job36:33 Mor me kot tito pi Lubaŋa ma nyeko omake ki kiniga pi bal. 
Job37:1 “Meno aye gin ma miyo cwinya poto, ma adunona mito tiŋŋe woko ki i kabedone." 
Job37:2 Wuwiny mor me dwane ki lok ŋuruŋuru ma katti ki i doge. 
Job37:3 En cwalo mor kot i te polo ducu, lut-kotte wil wa i twok lobo ducu." 
Job37:4 Lacen dwane cako mor; mor winnye maloŋo macalo dwan laker; pe juko wil kot i kare ma dwane pud winnye. 
Job37:5 Lubaŋa miyo dwane mor i kit me aura; en tiyo jami madoŋo ma waŋ pe waromo niaŋ iye. 
Job37:6 En ciko pee ni opot i ŋom, dok ciko kot wek ocorre madwoŋ twatwal’" 
Job37:7 En tweyo ciŋ dano acel acel gene tic, wek jo ducu guŋe ticce," 
Job37:8 Lee-gu ducu gudok i ka-kannegi, gibedo mot i borogi." 
Job37:9 Lapiru a ki i ode, yamo ma kodo ki tuŋ malo kelo koyo manic." 
Job37:10 Yweyo pa Lubaŋa miyo pii makke, doko pee; pii malac makke ci doko tek calo nyonyo." 
Job37:11 En poŋo pol mapek ki pii; ci lutkot wil meny ki i pol," 
Job37:12 Gibedo ka wirre tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi kun Lubaŋa aye telogi, pi cobo gin ducu ma en ocikogi kwede, i wi lobo ducu ka ma dano twero bedo iye." 
Job37:13 En aye ma miyo timme, kadi pi pwodo dano, nyo pi konyo lobone, nyo pi nyuto mar mere ma pe lokke," 
Job37:14 “Winy lok man, Yubu, cuŋ mot, itam pi tic me aura ma Lubaŋa timo," 
Job37:15 Iŋeyo kit ma Lubaŋa miyogi kwede cik, ci mi yo lutkot meny ki i pol?" 
Job37:16 Iŋeyo kit ma pol lyerre kwede? Meno aye tic me aura mada, pa ŋat ma dirone dwoŋ mukato kare." 
Job37:17 In meri iwinyo lyeto me boŋŋini keken, ka yamo a ki tuŋ piny ci miyo kom dano ducu bedo wac," 
Job37:18 In iromo yaro polo kit ma en otimo-ni, ma omiyo obedo matek macalo mola?" 
Job37:19 Pwonywa ki lok ma myero wawac bote; pe waromo ca no timwa maber pi kwiya piny ma watye kwede," 
Job37:20 Myero gitit bote ni amito lok? Dano yam owaco pire kene’, ni gineke woko?" 
Job37:21 “Kombeddi doŋ cen caro waŋwa, tye ka ryeny maleŋ twatwal i polo; yamo doŋ okodo, pol doŋ owarre woko." 
Job37:22 Der ceŋ tuc woko ki tuŋ malo ma ryeny calo jabu; Lubaŋa doŋ orukke ki deyone ma kelo lworo. 
Job37:23 En Won Twer Ducu, pe watwero roto tamme; tekone dwoŋ, ŋolo kop atir, timme ducu tye atir mada, pe uno dano mo," 
Job37:24 Pi meno dano gilwore; en pe paro pi jo ma gin luryeko i tamgi kengi.” 
Job38:1 Rwot ogamo dog Yubu kun lok ki i yamo lapiru, owaco ni." 
Job38:2 “Meno aŋa ma mito umo tamma woko keto i colpiny kun loko lokke laboŋo ŋec mo? 
Job38:3 Bed ma iyubbe macalo laco, abipenyi ci in aye igam doga." 
Job38:4 “I kare ma acibo guti me te lobo onoŋo in mono it ye kwene? Titta, ka iniaŋ matut kuman." 
Job38:5 Aŋa ma omoko kit ma borre ki lacce bibedo kwede? Aŋa ma oryeyo tol me pimone? 
Job38:6 Tedi te gutine gigurogi i kom gin aŋo? Aŋa ma ocibo got me twokke kakare," 
Job38:7 ma onoŋo lakalatwe ducu me odiko giwero kacel, dok awobe pa Lubaŋa ducu gidaŋŋe ki yomcwiny?" 
Job38:8 “Aŋa ma oketo kika me geŋo nam, ikare ma okatti woko ki i ot nyodo?" 
Job38:9 I kare ca amiyo pol odoko boŋo me arukane, aboye woko ki pol ma ocido woko licuc." 
Job38:10 Ceŋ atoŋo waŋ co ka ma myero ogik iye, aketo doggola ma gicego ki rii me geŋone," 
Job38:11 maawacci, ‘Ibio wa kany, ento pe ibikato,’ biamwonyini ma iwakke kwede-nu bigik kany.’" 
Job38:12 “I kare me kwoni ducu yam imiyo cik bot odiko, nyo inyuto ki rupiny kabedone?" 
Job38:13 Ipwonyo rupiny ki mako but lobo macalo ŋat ma teno boŋo, wek jo maraco guyekke woko ci gitengi woko ata?" 
Job38:14 Ka piny oru lobo lokke woko, jami ducu cako nen ka maleŋ, macalo lobo agulu ma lacwec diyo ajiŋa i kome; ki ranine bene cako nen calo boŋo aruka ma ŋwalaŋwa la." 
Job38:15 Lenpiny pa jo maraco rwenyo woko ki botgi; pe doŋ gitwero tiŋo badgi pi goyo dano. 
Job38:16 “Yam io wa i waŋ it me nam ce? Yam iwoto ki tyeni i te kut nam wek iroti? 
Job38:17 Yam ginyuto boti doggola me to, nyo ineno doggola me kabedo-nu ma ocido I icuc?" 
Job38:18 Doŋ iniaŋ kit ma piny lac kwede? Ka iŋeyo meno ducu doŋ iwaci. 
Job38:19 “Yone tye kwene ma o i kabedo me lenpiny? Ki mutu bene kabedone tye kwene? 
Job38:20 Itwero Iwoke itere wa i dul lobone, nyo Iniaŋ i kom yo ma cito gaŋŋe?" 
Job38:21 In myero iŋe, pien i kare ca onoŋo doŋ gityeko nywali! Wel mwaka me kwoni pol twatwal!" 
Job38:22 “Yam idonyo i odi me kano pee mayom? Ineno odi me kano pee matek calo gweŋ," 
Job38:23 ma an pud agwoko pi kare me ayela, pi kare me lweny ki me mony?" 
Job38:24 Yo mene ma cito dok tuŋ ka ma gipoko iye leŋo? Yamo wokceŋ ket i wi lobo kun a ki kwene? 
Job38:25 “Aŋa ma yam obaro waŋ lalele pi kot ma corre matek twa twa!? Aŋa ma oyubo yo pi lutkot wek olubi," 
Job38:26 omi kot ocwer i lobo ka ma ŋat mo pe iye, i tim ka ma dano pe bedo iye?" 
Job38:27 Aŋa ma cwalo kot muromo i lobo ma odoŋ obur, ci miyo lum twi doŋo iye?"
