Job38:28 “Ŋat munywalo kot tye mono? Aŋa munywalo toyo ma ton-ni? 
Job38:29 Pii ma omakke calo pee oa ki kwene? Aŋa ma min bwoyo pee ma opune i lobo, kun a ki i polo?" 
Job38:30 Pii doko matek macalo got, wa pii ma i kut nam makke woko likiŋ." 
Job38:31 “Itwero tweyo Yoggo ki nyor, nyo tuko ogwil ma gitweyo ki Lyeronyim?" 
Job38:32 Iromo kela lakalatwe mukene woko wek ginen i karegi, nyo telo Oluma ki litinone i wotgi?" 
Job38:33 Iŋeyo cik ma giciko ki polo? Itwero moko cikgi i wi lobo kany? 
Job38:34 “Itwero miyo dwani winnye wa i polo, wek imi pii kot ocorre, oumi woko?" 
Job38:35 Itwero cwalo lutkot wek owil, tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi, ci waco boti ni, ‘An ene, ora’?" 
Job38:36 Aŋa ma oketo ryeko i pol mapek? Aŋa ma omiyo niaŋ matut okanne i lupu? 
Job38:37 Aŋa ma twero kwano wel pol ki ryekone? Aŋa ma twero leŋo dog opoko pii me polo wek kot ocwer," 
Job38:38 ci miyo apwa doko daba, ŋom makke kacel doko matek." 
Job38:39 “Itwero dwaro lee pi labwor, ci imiyo litinone giyeŋ ki cam," 
Job38:40 ma girikke i borogi, nyo ma gibuto mot kun gikanne pi mako lee?" 
Job38:41 Aŋa ma miyo cam bot agak, i kare ma litinone gikok bot Lubaŋa, ma gimal ata pi nok pa cam?" 
Job39:1 “Iŋeyo kare me nywal pa dyegi ma gibedo i wi got? Yam ineno ka til nywalo litinogi? 
Job39:2 Iŋeyo kwano wel dwe me durugi, wek iŋe kare ma gibinywal iye," 
Job39:3 kare ma giturre piny pi nywal kun gicolle, ci ginywalo litinogi?" 
Job39:4 Litinogi doŋo i bar ma komgi yot, ci gicito gigi matwal ma pe dok gidwogo cen botgi," 
Job39:5 “Aŋa ma oweko kana me tim olone kene? Aŋa ma omiyo twero bot lagwar me cito ka ma iye mito? 
Job39:6 Atyeko miyogi bar mutwo wek obed pacogi, ki lobo ma obedo punu wek gubed iye." 
Job39:7 Gin cayo woo me gaŋ madito, pe tye ŋat mo ma burogi nyo ma miyogi gitiyo tic mo." 
Job39:8 Wi godi odoko oletgi ma gin wirre iye ata, kun giyenyo gin mutwi ducu me acama." 
Job39:9 “Jobi biye tic mo piri? Nyo bibuto i dwolli dyewor? 
Job39:10 Itwero tweyo jobi i kom kweri dyaŋ wek opur potoni? En bilubi kun loko potoni ma i luŋ? 
Job39:11 Ibigene ni pien tye ki teko madwoŋ? Ibiweko en tiyo ticci ducu? 
Job39:12 Igeno ni en bidwogo paco, ci kela belli i laro me adina?" 
Job39:13 “Udu goyo bwome ki yomcwiny: ento kono lacarre rom ki pa winyo acebe ma lakica-ni? 
Job39:14 Pien en weko toŋe i ŋom, wek lyeto me kweyo omur komgi." 
Job39:15 Wiye wil woko, pe niaŋ ni lee tim mo twero nyonogi." 
Job39:16 En tiyo ki litinone ki gero, calo pe gubedo mere kikome, kadi bed ticce balle noŋo, en pe lworo;" 
Job39:17 pien Lubaŋa otwonne ryeko, pe omiye ryeko mo me niaŋ i lok." 
Job39:18 Ka inen ocako ŋwec, ci en nyero aguragura ki rwode ma obedo i wiye-ni anyera." 
Job39:19 “In aye ma imiyo tekkom ki aguragura? In aye ce ma iruko ŋute ki yer maboco? 
Job39:20 In aye ma imiyo calo bonyo? Daŋŋe mere macalo won twer ci gilworo. 
Job39:21 En nyono piny i luŋ ma wakke awaka pi tekkome, ci riŋo anyim pi rwatte ki toŋi pa lulweny." 
Job39:22 En cayo lworo acaya, cwinye pe poto; pala lucwan bene pe miyo en lokke dok cen." 
Job39:23 Juru atero pa rwode yeŋŋe kok ni tak tak tak, toŋine wil calo mac." 
Job39:24 En riŋo anyim oyot mada ki gero ki kiniga; pe twero cuŋ mot ka buriji okok. 
Job39:25 Tekke buriji kok, en bene kok ki yomcwiny; Ŋweyo ŋwec lweny ki ka mabor, winyo daŋŋe pa lutel ki lulweny ma gimwoc." 
Job39:26 “Pi ryekoni aye omiyo olwilwit tuk malo, ka yaro bwone kemo piny i ŋom?" 
Job39:27 In aye ma iciko ocur ni otuk malo wek oger ode lamal i wi got? 
Job39:28 En bedo i pata got, buto kunnu bene, i kakannene matye i kor got ma oculle." 
Job39:29 En yenyo camme ki kunnu, waŋe neno piny ki ka mabor," 
Job39:30 wek litinone gunoŋ remo me amata; ka ma kom dano muto noŋŋe iye, en pe rwenyo ki kunnu.”" 
Job40:1 Rwot openyo Yubu ni meno," 
Job40:2 “Lajuk bal bipido lok ki Won Twer Ducu? In ma ipyem ki Lubaŋa-ni, gam lok-ki.”" 
Job40:3 Ci Yubu ogamo dog Lubaŋa kun wacci," 
Job40:4 “Nen ba, an pe a gin mo ada, ci abigamo lokki niŋniŋ? Pe doŋ abiŋamo doga ka lok." 
Job40:5 Doŋ aloko tyen acel keken, pe doŋ abidok iye; iyo, aloko doŋ tyen aryo, ci pe dok abimedde.”" 
Job40:6 Rwot dok ogamo dog Yubu kun loko ki i yamo lapiru ni," 
Job40:7 “Koŋ iyubbe, icuŋ matek calo laco; abipenyi ki lok, ci in ititta." 
Job40:8 Itamo ni ibinyuto ni bal tye koma ce? Ibimiyo kop loya pi nyuto ni lokki tye atir? 
Job40:9 Badi tek rom ki pa Lubaŋa? Dwani mor winnye maloŋo calo mere? 
Job40:10 “Ber doŋ irukke ki ditti ki deyone, wek tweroni ki woro ma gimiyi onen." 
Job40:11 Wek kinigani madwoŋ-ŋi okatti woko; nen jo ducu ma wakke, ci imi wakkegi okwe woko." 
Job40:12 Nen lyerregi ci idwokgi woko piny, dok inyon jo maraco woko piny ka ma gucuŋo iye." 
Job40:13 Yikgi woko ducu piny i ŋom, twe waŋgi woko i lyel." 
Job40:14 Ka itimo kumeno an bene abiye ni iromo cobo pekoni ducu ki tekki. 
Job40:15 “Nen Raa mono, lee madit ca, ma an aye akete macalo aketo in; en camo lum twon." 
Job40:16 Nen kit ma pyere tek kwede. Nen kit ma ler iye nwaŋ kwede. 
Job40:17 Yobe cuŋ matek likiŋ macalo yat kijiŋ, ler eme okubbe kacel." 
Job40:18 Cogone tek rom ki oceke mola kulu, tyene rom ki rii nyonyo." 
Job40:19 “En tye ginaura madit i kin jami ma Lubaŋa oketo; ŋat mucweye-ni keken aye romo tiŋo pala lucwan i kome. 
Job40:20 Gikelo cam bote wa ki i wi godi ka ma lee tim ducu gituko iye. 
Job40:21 En buto i te okuto ma i dog kulu, ci kanne i lagada ki i daba." 
Job40:22 Okuto ma i dog kulu giume ki tipogi, yat oget ma i ŋet kulu gurume woko dyere." 
Job40:23 Nen, kadi bed kulu mol matek ki biamwonyi, en pe lworo; kadi bed pii ma i kulu Jordan corre i doge, en pud bedo ma cwinye opye." 
Job40:24 Ŋatti mo twero golo waŋe ki goli wek omake? Gitwero tuco ume ki toŋ twok? 
Job41:1 “Itwero ywayo Min Kulu ki goli? Itwero diyo lebe kun itweyo ki tol? 
Job41:2 Itwero rwako tol ogwil i ume, nyo tuco cwake ki goli?" 
Job41:3 En bibako doge boti? Bilok kwedi ki mwolo? 
Job41:4 En bicikke kwedi wek ebed opiini matwal? 
Job41:5 Ibituko kwede calo winyo? Ibitweyo tyene ki tol wek obed me galo waŋ anyirani? 
Job41:6 Lumak rec wadiwu gibilaro wei me wilone? Lucat-wil bipoko woko i kingi me acata? 
Job41:7 Ibicobo ki dim mabit ma romo kome ducu? Nyo ibicobo wiye ki atero mabit lacob rec? 
Job41:8 Ka onoŋo yam igudo ki ciŋi, pe ibinwoyo; wii pe biwil i kit ma en olwenyo kwede kwedi." 
Job41:9 “Ŋat ma tamo ni etwero timo gin mo noŋo bwolle abwola kene; tekke onene keken, ci bipoto woko piny." 
Job41:10 Ka gituge, ger mukato kare; aŋa ma romo cun i nyime?" 
Job41:11 Aŋa ma twero poto i kome, ci bwot? Pe tye ŋat mo i wi lo bo-ni ducu," 
Job41:12 “Wek koŋ atitti lok i kom tyen min kulu, ki tekone madwoŋ, ki kit ma dul kome ducu gikubogi kacel maber mada." 
Job41:13 Aŋa ma twero woto ginarukane woko? Aŋa ma twero tuco kotine me mola? 
Job41:14 Aŋa ma twero yabo doggola doge? Lake ma gurumo doge kelo lworo mada. 
Job41:15 Dye ŋeye giumo ki kwodi ma giryeyogi i tyeŋ, oculle cokcok calo gimwono amwona." 
Job41:16 Gukubbe cokcok kacel, yamo pe twero kate ki i kingi." 
Job41:17 Guribbe kacel ŋat man omoko i kom lawote, ma gumoko woko likiŋ, gin pe twero poko kingi." 
Job41:18 Ka ojiro, piine mil ma ryeny aryenya calo ceŋ waŋe kwar calo ceŋ ma tye ka tuc." 
Job41:19 Leb mac macalo mac raa a ki i doge, mac kir katti woko ki i doge," 
Job41:20 Yito duny ki i ume calo pii ma tye ka walo i i agulu, nyo macalo togo ma tye ka waŋ." 
Job41:21 Yamo doge miyo mac lyel, dok miyo bilo twako lodi mac mucek adada." 
Job41:22 Ŋute tek twatwal, ŋat mo ka orwatte kwede ci bedo ki lworo madwoŋ," 
Job41:23 Dul kome ojuŋŋe kacel, ojiŋ woko matek, tek calo nyonyo ma pe wotte." 
Job41:24 Adunone tek calo got, tek calo min kidi rego." 
Job41:25 Ka otiŋŋe malo, oteka ducu gilworo; cwinygi doko nyap, tipo komgi to woko." 
Job41:26 Kadi dano toŋ ki pala lucwan, pe donyo, kadi toŋ, nyo atero kadi dim mabit," 
Job41:27 En waco ni-nyonyo obedo reŋ kai, mola kono mere rom ki yat mutop." 
Job41:28 Atero pe twero miyo en riŋo; ki tuŋ bote lagwen ma gibaye kwede lokke doko lum mutwo. 
Job41:29 Odoo kor en lwoŋo ni tyen gaya; ka gibaye ki toŋ nyero mere anyera. 
Job41:30 Tuŋ iye piny cal ki labaltako ma lake bit; ka woto goro daba madyak agora. 
Job41:31 En miyo kut yenyo calo pii ma tye ka walo awala; nam yenyo bwoyo ma obedo calo bwoyo ma i i agulu pa lated moo wir. 
Job41:32 Ka tye kia kwaŋ, kore ryeny woko matar, miyo kut kwor woko matar calo lwar wic," 
Job41:33 Pe tye gin mo ma rom kwede i wi lobo, en aye gin ma gicweyo ma pe tye ki lworo wacel." 
Job41:34 En cayo lee ducu, wa maditone, enrwot’ ‘pa lee ducu kadi bed giwakke.”" 
Job42:1 Yubu ogamo dog Rwot kun waco ni," 
Job42:2 “Aŋeyo ni itwero tiyo gin ducu; pe tye lok mo ma iyubo ma pe bicobbe kakare. 
Job42:3 Ceŋ iwacci, ‘Meno aŋa ma mito umo tamma woko, kun loko laboŋo ŋeyo gin mo?’ Ada, doŋ awaco lok ma pe aniaŋ tere, aloko i kom gin me aura ma ŋeyogi loya woko." 
Job42:4 Ceŋ iwacci, ‘Winy, ci abilok; abipenyi ci myero igam doga.’" 
Job42:5 Yam onoŋo awinyo piri awinya keken, ento kombeddi doŋ aneni ki waŋa," 
Job42:6 Pi meno acane kekena, aŋut ma abuku koma woko ki apwa ki buru.”" 
Job42:7 Lacen ma Rwor doŋ oloko lok magi ducu bot Yubu, ‘ocako waco bot Erifaji Lateman ni meno, “Kiniga omaka i komi ki i kom luremi aryo-nu, pien pe wuloko lok me ada i koma, kit ma ceŋ laticca Yubu oloko-ni." 
Job42:8 Kombeddi doŋ wukwany twoni abiro ki nyogi abiro, wucit kwede bot laticca Yubu, wutyer me gitum awaŋa piwu kenwu. Laticca Yubu bilego piwu, ci an abigamo legane, pe abiketo lewic i komwu muporo lokwu; pien pe wuloko lok me ada i koma kit macalo laticca Yubu oloko-ni.”" 
Job42:9 Kumeno Erifaji Lateman, Bildad Lacua ki Jopar Lanaamat gucito, gutiyo kit ma onoŋo Rwot ocikogi kwede; ci Rwot ogamo Lega pa Yubu." 
Job42:10 Rwot odwoko gum pa Yubu, i kare ma en doŋ olego pi lureme; omiyo bote lim ma dodo maca ma yam en tye kwede ryen aryo." 
Job42:11 Kumeno omegine ki Iumegine ki jo ma guŋeyo wacon, gucamo cam bo te i ode. Gunyuto cwercwinygi bote, gukweyo cwinye pi gin marac ducu ma yam Rwot okelo i kome. Dano acel acel i kingi omiye dul lim ki agit jabu." 
Job42:12 Rwot omiyo gum ki Yubu i agikki me kwone makato i acakkine. En obedo ki romi alip apar wiye aŋwen, kinaga alip abicel, twoni pur alip aryo, ki megi kana alip acel." 
Job42:13 Obedo bene ki awobe abiro ki anyira adek. 
Job42:14 Ocako nyiŋ nyako mukwoŋone ni Yemima, nyiŋ me aryone Kejia, ki nyiŋ me adekke Kerenapuk." 
Job42:15 I lobo meno ducu pe onoŋo tye iye mon ma yam gibeco calo anyira pa Yubu; wongi opoko botgi ginaleya i kin omegigi. 
Job42:16 Lacen i ŋe lok meno ducu Yubu ori i lobo dok mwaka miya acel ki pyeraŋwen, ci oneno awobene ki litino pa awobene, yalwak me aŋwen kulu." 
Job42:17 Ci Yubu oto muti adada, ma onoŋo karene bene doŋ oromo maber." 
Psalms1:1 Dano ma kwero lubo tam pa jo maraco, ma pe lubo kit pa lubalo, ki ma pe bedo kacel ki luŋala, bedo ki yomcwiny." 
Psalms1:2 En maro kwano cik pa Rwot, en bedo ka lwodo lok i kom cikke dyeceŋ ki dywor." 
Psalms1:3 En bedo macalo yat ma odoŋo i ŋet kulu, ma nyako nyige i karene kikome, ma pote bene pe two woko. Gin ma en tiyo ducu, en limo iye gum," 
Psalms1:4 Ento jo maraco pe gitye kit meno; gin calo cun kal ma yamo kolo tero woko. 
Psalms1:5 Pi meno jo maraco Gibiŋolo kop loyogi; ki jo ma lubalo pe gibiribogi ki jo ma kitgi atir. 
Psalms1:6 Rwot paro pi dano ma kite atir, ento dano marac birwenyo mere woko matwal." 
Psalms2:1 Piŋo lurok gitye ka wo kacel? Piŋo rok mapol gipiro lok ma konnye pe? 
Psalms2:2 Lukergi ducu gijemo woko, ki lulocgi bene gipiro lok kacel, i kom Rwot ki i kom ŋat ma en doŋ otyeko wiro, kun giwacci," 
Psalms2:3 “Wek wacodu nyorgi ma gutweyowa kwede-ni woko, dok wabolu twerogi me loc woko ki i komwa.”" 
Psalms2:4 Rwot ma obedo i wi komkerre i polo tye ka nyero; en ŋalogi aŋala. 
Psalms2:5 En loko kwedgi ki kiniga, dok miyogi lworo ki akemone mager, kun wacci," 
Psalms2:6 “An doŋ atyeko keto kabakana i wi Cion, ma en got mera maleŋ.”" 
Psalms2:7 Abitito cik pa Rwot, ma en owaco bota ni, “In latinna, tin doŋ atyeko nywali." 
Psalms2:8 Legga, ci abimiyi lurok me bedo ginaleyani, ki lobo ducu bene bibedo meri." 
Psalms2:9 Ibiloyogi ki odoo nyonyo, ibiŋidogi woko matitino macalo agulu pii pa lacwe agulu.”" 
Psalms2:10 Kombeddi doŋ wuwiny lokka, wun luker, wubed ryek; myero wuwiny pwony man, wun luloc me lobo." 
Psalms2:11 Wuti bot Rwot ki lworo ki myel kom," 
Psalms2:12 wurum coŋwu i nyime; wek kinigape omake i komwu miyo wuto woko i yo: pien akemo make oyotoyot mada. Gitye ki gum jo ducu ma giriŋo gilaro bote. 
Psalms3:1 Ai Rwot, lukworra gitye mapol, gipol mada ma giero lweny i koma." 
Psalms3:2 Giloko lok i koma ma giwacci, “Lubaŋa pe twero laro en!”" 
Psalms3:3 Ento in, ai Rwot, in kwot ma gwoka ki i gin marac; in imiya abedo ki deyo, dok imiya tekcwiny bene," 
Psalms3:4 Akok bot Rwot matek, ci en gamo ki i wi got mere maleŋ." 
Psalms3:5 Abuto piny anino woko, dok aco aa malo ma koma yot, pien Rwot gwoka." 
Psalms3:6 Pe alworo jo alip apar ma guruma woko dyere pi lweny i koma. 
Psalms3:7 Bin, ai Rwot! Lara do, ai Lubaŋana! In aye ma idono lem lukworra woko ducu, ituro lak jo maraco woko liweŋ." 
Psalms3:8 Lar a ki bot Rwot; mi gummi obed i kom joni! 
Psalms4:1 Ai Lubaŋa, gam doga ka akok boti, in aye ma igwoka! I kare ma atye i can, in ceŋ ibino ikonya. Kombeddi doŋ ibed ki kica i koma, dok iwiny legana," 
Psalms4:2 Wun co mono, wubibedo ka yeta pi kare ma rom mene? Wun mono wubimaro lok ma konnye pe pi kare ma rom mene, ma wulubo lok me goba-ni?" 
Psalms4:3 Wuŋe ni Rwot doŋ otyeko yera me bedo dano mere kikome; ka akok bo te en winyo kokona," 
Psalms4:4 Kadi bed kiniga omakwu, ento pe wutim bal; wutam tam matut mada ki i cwinywu, wubed kenwu dok laliŋ i wi kitandawu." 
Psalms4:5 Wutyer gitum ma myero bot Rwot, dok wuket gen mewu i kome," 
Psalms4:6 Tye jo mapol ma giwacci, “Wamito walim gum!” Nenwa ki kica, ai Rwot!" 
Psalms4:7 Yomcwiny ma in imiya dwoŋ, kato yomcwiny pa jo ma gitye ki kal ki koŋo madwoŋ ata." 
Psalms4:8 Cutcut ka abuto piny, acako nino woko mot liyoo ki kuc; ai Rwot, in keni aye ma igwoka miyo abedo maber." 
Psalms5:1 Cik iti iwiny lokka, ai Rwot; dok iwiny curra," 
Psalms5:2 Kabakana ki Lugaŋana, winy kokona ilara. Abilego kun abako doga boti, ai ai Rwot." 
Psalms5:3 I odiko iwinyo dwana; ka ceŋ doŋ tuc akelo gitumma boti, ci doŋ akuro lagam ma a boti." 
Psalms5:4 In pe Lubaŋa ma cwinye bedo yom pi tim maraco; in pe iye nywako kabedo ki gin marac. 
Psalms5:5 Pe iye ni jo ma gin luwakke gucuŋ i nyimi; idag lutim maraco ducu. 
Psalms5:6 Ityeko lugoba woko liweŋ, in Rwot icayo jo ma gin lutim, bwami ma gineko dano kun gin lubwola kwede." 
Psalms5:7 Atwero donyo i ot meri, pi mar meri madwoŋ ma pe lokke; abiworo in i ot meri maleŋ, kun aryebbe piny i nyimi ki lworo madwoŋ." 
Psalms5:8 Ai Rwot, lukworra gitye pol; tela wek ati gin ma tye atir i nyimi, dok imi yoni ma alubo obed atir." 
Psalms5:9 Lok ma lukworra giwaco pe me ada’ cwinygi opoŋ ki tam me nek keken, guŋamo doggi calo lyel ma twolo, kun giloko lok mamit me bwolo dano." 
Psalms5:10 Pwod gidok idwok balgi i wigi, ai Lubaŋa; mi yubgi maraco ma giyubo-gu pe ocobbe. Ryemgi woko ki i nyimi gucit cen, pien gutimo lwak bal mapol, dok gujemo wo ko i komi." 
Psalms5:11 Ento mi jo ma giriŋo ‘gilaro boti gubed ki yomcwiny, gibiwero wer kare ducu pi yomcwiny. Dok igwokgi gin jo ma gimari; pi in omiyo cwinygi yom adada." 
Psalms5:12 Imiyo gum ki jo ma kitgi atir, ai Rwot; kicani geŋo komgi woko calo kwot." 
Psalms6:1 Ai Rwot, kiniga pe omaki, pe ijuka, dok pe ipwoda ma itye ki akemo." 
Psalms6:2 Kica omaki i koma do, ai Rwot, pien tipo koma doŋ oto woko lirut; ai Rwot, caŋa, pien koma ducu doŋ mwodde amwoda wa i cogo," 
Psalms6:3 Kwona ducu opoŋ ki can. Ai Rwot, i bigalle pi kare ma rom mene?" 
Psalms6:4 Bin ilara, ai Rwot; lara ki i to, pien imara ki mar meri ma pe lokke." 
Psalms6:5 Pe gipo piri i lobo pa jo muto; ŋat mo ma paki ki i lyel kunnu pe! 
Psalms6:6 Doŋ aol woko ki kumo; i dyewor ducu noŋo pig waŋa oluk i kabutona woko, koko ma omiyo kabutona odyak woko." 
Psalms6:7 Waŋa okwot woko pi koko me cwercwiny, waŋa ocido woko, pe doŋ aneno piny maber; man ducu otimme pien lukworra giliba." 
Psalms6:8 Wua wucit woko cen, wun lutim maraco; pien Rwot otyeko winyo dwana ka akok." 
Psalms6:9 Rwot otyeko winyo ka abako doga; dok Rwot ogamo Legana. 
Psalms6:10 Lewic bimako lukworra ducu dok gibibedo ki cwercwiny madit’ twatwal; gibilokke gidok cen cut ki lewic. 
Psalms7:1 Ai Rwot Lubaŋana, ariŋo alaro boti; lara ki i ciŋ lukworra ducu ma giryemo kora, ci ikonya;" 
Psalms7:2 ka pe, ci gibikila woko calo labwor ma kilo lee, gibiywaya woko ka ma ŋal o doŋ pe ma twero lara." 
Psalms7:3 Ai Rwot Lubaŋana, ka ce onoŋo atiyo gin mo i kin jami magi, ka ce atimo bal i kom ŋat mo," 
Psalms7:4 nyo ka atimo bal bot larema pi dwoko bote gin marac kom gin marac, nyo ka atimo bwami ayako jami pa lakworra woko laboŋo tyen lok mo," 
Psalms7:5 ci mi lukworra guryem kora gumaka woko iyo, wek gureta piny i nom ci guneka woko, ka gibwota i ŋom kenyo ma doŋ ato woko." 
Psalms7:6 Ai Rwot, a malo ki akemoni, ci ilweny i kom lukworra ma gubino magwa i koma-ni; ai Lubaŋana, co woko, pien in aye iciko pi nino me ŋolo kop." 
Psalms7:7 Wek lwak me rok ducu gucokke gurumi woko dyere; ci ibed malo i kabedoni ka icak loyogi ki kunnu. 
Psalms7:8 Rwot, in laŋolkop pa jo me rok ducu; ai Rwot, ŋol koppa muporo kit ma atir ma atye kwede, dok ma lubo kit ma cwinya leŋ kwede." 
Psalms7:9 Gik tim marac ma jo maraco gitiyo woko, ento mok jo ma kitgi atir. In Lubaŋa ma kiti tye atir, in itemo tam pa dano kacel ki mitigi." 
Psalms7:10 Lubaŋa aye kwot mera, en laro jo ma cwinygi atir," 
Psalms7:11 Lubaŋa laŋolkop ma ŋolo kop atir, en Lubaŋa ma tye ki kiniga nino ducu i kom lubalo." 
Psalms7:12 Ka ce dano mo pe oŋut, ci Lubaŋa bipako pala lucwanne. En doŋ otyeko ciko atumme dok otero;" 
Psalms7:13 en doŋ oyubo jami lewny maraco me nek, oroyo lak aterone-gu ducu i mac gucek woko makwar." 
Psalms7:14 Nen, latim marac tamo tam marac ki i cwinye opoŋ ki yub me kelo ayela keken, kun loko lok gobagoba me bwolo dano." 
Psalms7:15 En kwinyo bur matut i ŋom, ka dok lokke poto i bur ma en okwinyo-ni kekene." 
Psalms7:16 Doŋ tamme marac-ci miyo en poto i can, ki tim bwamine dwogo gire i kome kene," 
Psalms7:17 Abipwoyo Rwot pien kite atir mada, dok abiwero wer me pako nyiŋ Rwot, ma en ŋat Mamalo Twal." 
Psalms8:1 Ai Rwot, in i Rwotwa, dit me nyiŋi nen i wi lobo ducu! Pak ma gikori kwede o malo i polo," 
Psalms8:2 wer ma litino lukere ki litino ma pud dot giwero me paki. Ityeko gero cel gogo me gwokkeni pi geŋo lukworri, wek ilo lukworri ki jo ma lewnyo i komi." 
Psalms8:3 Ka aneno polo, ma in itiyo ki ciŋi, ki dwe ki lakalatwe ma iketogi i kabedogi likiŋ;" 
Psalms8:4 dano kono gin aŋo ma miyo itamo pire, dano adana ma mwa-ni gin aŋo ma miyo iparo pire?" 
Psalms8:5 Ento imiye dit ma in Lubaŋa keken aye iloye, ka doŋ iketo lalukana me dit ki deyo i wiye," 
Psalms8:6 Iketo en obedo Laloc ma loyo gin ducu ma iketogi; iketo en obedo lalo jami ducu," 
Psalms8:7 romi ki dyaŋi, ki lee tim-gu," 
Psalms8:8 winyi kacel ki rec me nam, ki kit gin ducu ma wok i dye nam." 
Psalms8:9 Ai Rwot, in i Rwotwa, dit me nyiŋi nen i wi lobo ducu!" 
Psalms9:1 Abipaki, ai Rwot, kun amiyi pwoc ki cwinya ducu, abitito pi jami me aura-gu ducu ma itiyo." 
Psalms9:2 Abiwero wer ki yomcwiny kun anyatte piri. Abiwero wer me pako nyiŋi, in ŋat Mamalo Twal." 
Psalms9:3 Lukworra gilokke gidok cen ka guneno in ituc; gigatte gipoto piny gito woko. 
Psalms9:4 In laŋolkop ma oolo kop atir, ibedo i wi komkerri, ci iŋolo koppa kakare." 
Psalms9:5 In ijuko lurok, dok ityeko jo maraco woko liweŋ; ityeko jwayo nyiŋgi woko ducu, pe doŋ gibipo i komgi matwal." 
Psalms9:6 Lukworra doŋ gutum woko matwal; ijwero gaŋigi woko ducu, wi dano doŋ otyeko wil woko i komgi adada," 
Psalms9:7 Ento Rwot en kabaka ma bedo i wi komkerre nakanaka; en ocibo komkerre pi oolo kop. 
Psalms9:8 En loyo lobo ki kit ma atir, ci oolo kop pa lwak me rok ducu kun tiyo ki dano maromrom." 
Psalms9:9 Rwot en ka larre pa jo ma piny obwoyogi, en cel matek ma gwokogi maber i kare me ayela." 
Psalms9:10 Rwot, jo ma neyi gibiketo gengi i komi; pien in pe ibwoto jo ma gibino boti." 
Psalms9:11 Wuwer wer me pak bot Rwot, ma tye ka loc i Cion! Wutuc gin ma en otiyo bot lwak me rok ducu!" 
Psalms9:12 Lubaŋa ma lacul kwor me remo po pi jo ma can omakogi; wiye pe wil i kom kokogi, dok pwodo jo ma gitimogi rac." 
Psalms9:13 Kica omaki i koma do, ai Rwot! Nen kit atwom ma jo ma gidaga gutyeko keto i koma! In aye ma ilara iila malo ki i to," 
Psalms9:14 wek imiya acuŋ i nyim jo Jerucalem, wek atit botgi gin ducu mumiyo apako nyiŋi. Abibedo ki yomcwiny pien doŋ ilara." 
Psalms9:15 Lurok gukwinyo bur ka dok gupoto iye kekengi; guciko obwo ci tyengi kekengi aye omoko iye. 
Psalms9:16 Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo nyiŋe oŋene pi ŋolo kop atir, jo maraco gimoko i owic pi tim ma gin aye gutimo." 
Psalms9:17 Jo maraco ducu gibito giyikogi i lyel, gin lurok ducu ma gikwero Lubaŋa," 
Psalms9:18 Jo ma piny obwoyogi pe gibiwekogi ata kare ducu; ki gen pa lucan bene pe birwenyo woko matwal. 
Psalms9:19 Bin, ai Rwot! Wek dano pe oloyi! Lwoŋ lurok gucokke i nyimi wek iŋol kop i komgi." 
Psalms9:20 Ai Rwot, mi lworo omakgi; wek guŋe ni gin dano adana mamwa." 
Psalms10:1 Piŋo icuŋ cen ka mabor, ai Rwot? Piŋo ikanne woko i kare me can?" 
Psalms10:2 Jo maraco giwakke ma gidwaro lucan me aneka; mi yub ducu maraco ma guyuboni aye otyekgi. 
Psalms10:3 Dano marac nyatte pi mitine maraco ma tye i cwinye; dano ma wor ma mito enoŋ magoba yeto Rwot dok kwere woko bene. 
Psalms10:4 Dano marac tamo ki cwiny me wakke kun wacci, “Lubaŋa peke.” En pe paro, dok pe bino bot Lubaŋa." 
Psalms10:5 Gin marac ma en tamo ducu tiyo co bo kakare. En pe niaŋ i ŋolo kop pa Lubaŋa pien malo twatwal; en neno lukworre ci jwiyogi woko ajwiya. 
Psalms10:6 En ta mo ki i cwinye kun wacci, “Gin mo pe ma biloya; i kare me kwona ducu pe abineno can,”" 
Psalms10:7 Lokke ducu ma en loko opoŋ ki ceno dano acena, bwola ki bura me diyo dano ki tek; en pe galle me loko lok marac ki lok ma kelo adagadaga." 
Psalms10:8 En kanne woko i dye gaŋi ka kiyo piny; en libo dano kunnu ci neko jo ma gipe ki bal. 
Psalms10:9 En neno piny kun roto dano ma can omako adada ma piny oloyo; en kanne woko i muŋ ka kiyogi calo labwor. En kanne woko pi kiyo lacan wek emak woko, en mako lacan noŋo doŋ oleko wiye okelo omoko i obwone." 
Psalms10:10 Dano ma can omako adada gininyo woko, ci donyo woko piny i ŋom, pien teko pa lakworre noŋo oloyo mere woko." 
Psalms10:11 Dano marac tamo ki i cwinye ni, “Wi Lubaŋa doŋ otyeko wil woko, omiyo waŋe woko, pe bitwero nena.”" 
Psalms10:12 Bin ilara do, ai Rwot! wii pe myero owil i kom ŋat ma tye ki can, ai Lubaŋa!" 
Psalms10:13 Piŋo dano marac kwero Lubaŋa, kun tamo ki i cwinye ni, “In pe ibipwoda?”" 
Psalms10:14 Ento in iŋeno, dok iŋeyo can ki cwercwiny ma dano tye kwede, kare ducu it ye ka yubbe me miyo kony, Dano ma tye ki can-ni miyo kwone boti, pien yam ibedo ka konyo litino kic." 
Psalms10:15 Myero itur twero pa jo maraco ki lutim maraco woko; yeny balgi ducu nio waŋ ma pe doŋ ibinoŋo bal mo kadi ki acel. 
Psalms10:16 Rwot aye’ kabaka ma bedo nakanaka; lurok ducu gibito gitum woko ki i lobone," 
Psalms10:17 Ai Rwot, iwinyo lega pa jo mamwol: ibimiyo gibedo ki tekcwiny, ibiciko iti." 
Psalms10:18 Iŋolo kop pa litino kic ki jo ma giunogi, wek dano mo me lobo man pe dok okel lworo." 
Psalms11:1 Ariŋo alaro bot Rwot. Piŋo wuwaco bota ni. “Lwi woko calo winyo ici bed i wi godi; 
Psalms11:2 pienjo maraco gitero atum, dok guketo te aterogi i kom tol atum, wek gicel jo ma cwinygi atir woko i colpiny," 
Psalms11:3 Pe tye gin mo ma dano ma kite atir twero timo, ka te guti ducu doŋ gibalo wako”?" 
Psalms11:4 Rwot tye i ot mere maleŋ; komkerre tye i polo. En neno dano ducu ma i lobo, dok ŋiyo gin ma gin tiyo." 
Psalms11:5 Rwot temo jo ma kitgi atir ki jo maraco, en dag ŋat ma maro timo tim bwami." 
Psalms11:6 En bionyo lodi mac ki gweŋ calfa i kom jo maraco; en bipwodogi ki yamo oro malyet. 
Psalms11:7 Rwot kite tye atir, dok maro tim ma atir; jo ma cwinygi atir gibineno waŋe." 
Psalms12:1 Konya, ai Rwot, pien ŋat mo maber ma geni doŋ pe; pien jo ma lugen doŋ guto gurwenyo woko ki i kin dano." 
Psalms12:2 Dano acel acel loko lok goba bot lawote, ma noŋo lok ma a ki i doggi mit ata ento cwinygi opokke woko dul aryo." 
Psalms12:3 Rwot, myero ijuk lok me bitagi-ni woko, en lok ma a ki i doggi me nyatte-ni!" 
Psalms12:4 Gin giwacci, “Wabiloyo lok ki lebwa, wabiloko gin ducu kit macalo wamito, pien pe tye ŋat mo ma en ladit ma loyowa.”" 
Psalms12:5 “Ento kombeddi abibino,” Rwot ma owaco, “pien doŋ giyako jami pa lucan woko, dok jo ma piny obwoyogi gitye ka cur acura ki arem. Abigwokogikit ma gimito-ni.”" 
Psalms12:6 Lok pa Rwot ma en ciko ber, gitwero genone, obedo calo ryal ma giliyo maber ki mac piny i ŋom, ma giliyo tyen abiro kulu." 
Psalms12:7 Gwoka maber kare ducu, ai Rwot, gwokwa ki i kom yalwak me kare man." 
Psalms12:8 Jo maraco gitye ka wirre i kabedo ducu giyenyo dano, kit macalo dano ducu pako kwede tim marac ma gitiyo i kin dano ma i lobo." 
Psalms13:1 Ai Rwot, wii mono biwil woko i koma pi kare, ma rom mene? Wii biwil woko matwal bo? Ibikanne woko ki bota pi kare ma rom mene?" 
Psalms13:2 Myero abed ki arem i cwinya pi kare ma rom mene, dok bene myero abed ki cwercwiny dyeceŋ ki dyewor benebene? Lukworra kono gibiloya, wigi pil i koma pi kare ma Tom mene?" 
Psalms13:3 Nen tuŋ bota ci igam doga, ai Rwot Lubaŋana. Meny waŋa, wek pe anin nino me to," 
Psalms13:4 miyo lukworra giwacci, “Watyeko loyo en woko!” Dok pe iwek lukworra gubed ki yomcwiny ni pien doŋ apoto i can," 
Psalms13:5 Ento an doŋ atyeko geno mar meri ma pe lokke; abibedo ki yomcwiny pi lar meri," 
Psalms13:6 Abiwero wer bot Rwot, pien otima maber atika." 
Psalms14:1 Dano ma lamiŋ waco ki, i cwinye ni, “Lubaŋa gire pe,” Gin jo ma kitgi raco ma gitimo gin me kwer; pe tye ŋat mo ma tiyo gin maber." 
Psalms14:2 Rwot neno dano ducu kun neno piny ki i polo, me neno ka ce tye jo mogo i kingi ma gitiyo ki ryeko, ma gimito Lubaŋa." 
Psalms14:3 Gin ducu doŋ guŋak woko, gudoko jo ma kitgi raco; pe tye ŋat mo ma tiyo gin maber, pe tye, kadi ki acel." 
Psalms14:4 Gin lutim maraco-ni, pe gitye ki ŋec? Giyako lim pa jona calo gicamo kwon, ma pe bene gilwoŋo nyiŋ Rwot." 
Psalms14:5 Gibibedo kunnu ki lworo madwoŋ, pien Lubaŋa tye ki jo ma kitgi atir." 
Psalms14:6 Wun wumito balo yub pa lacan, ento Rwot aye ka Larrene." 
Psalms14:7 Iyo, kono bedo ber ka larre pa jo Icrael bi no ki i Cion! Ka Rwot bidwoko gum bot jone, Yakobo bibedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, ki Icrael bene cwinye bibedo yom." 
Psalms15:1 Ai Rwot, aŋa ma bibedo i kemani? Aŋa ma bibedo i wi got meri maleŋ?" 
Psalms15:2 Dano ma cwinye leŋ; dok ma tiyo ginma atir, ma loko bene lok me ada ki cwinye ducu;" 
Psalms15:3 ma pe coko lok me kwot i lok ma en loko, dok en pe timo gin marac mo i kom lareme, dok pe balo nyiŋ lawote." 
Psalms15:4 En cayo jo ma pe giworo Lubaŋa, ento en woro jo ma gilworo Rwot. Pe loko kwoŋ ma yam okwoŋo kadi bed kwoŋŋe-ni kelle can," 
Psalms15:5 En pe mito enoŋ magoba i kom lim ma en konyo ki dano, dok pe gamo lim ma giwile kwede i muŋ wek giwe lok odok i kom dano ma pe ki bal, ŋat ma tiyo kumeno pe gidiro woko cen." 
Psalms16:1 Gwoka, ai Lubaŋa, pien ariŋo alaro boti." 
Psalms16:2 Awaco bot Rwot ni. “In i rwoda; gin maber mo ma atye kwede pe, laboŋo in.”" 
Psalms16:3 Jo maleŋ ma i lobo gin jo me awora, ma giyomo cwinya mada." 
Psalms16:4 Jo ma giyero lubaŋa mukene ginyayo cwercwinygi gimedo ameda; pe abionyo gityergi me remo, dok bene pe abilwoŋo nyiŋ jogigi ki doga." 
Psalms16:5 Rwot aye dulla ma gipokka, en kikopo ma abimato; kwona ducu tye i ciŋi." 
Psalms16:6 Waŋ apokki me potona opoto i kabedo ma yo mo cwinya; iyo, doŋ anoŋo ginaleya maber ma romma," 
Psalms16:7 Apwoyo Rwot ma omiya ryeko; cwinya bene pwonya kadi ki i dyewor," 
Psalms16:8 Kare ducu aŋeyo ni Rwot tye kweda: pe gibidira woko cen, pien en tye yo tuŋ ciŋa ma lacuc." 
Psalms16:9 Pi meno omiyo abedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, nino ducu abedo maber ki kuc;" 
Psalms16:10 pien in pe ibitenya ata i lobo pa jo muto, pe ibiweko danoni ma geni donyo i bur lyel." 
Psalms16:11 In doŋ ibinyutta yo ma tera i kwo; bedoni kweda miyo abedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ mada, i tuŋ ciŋi lacuc tye iye gin ma yomo cwiny dano nakanaka." 
Psalms17:1 Ai Rwot, winy kokona pien lokka tye atir; cik iti iwiny kokona! Winy legana, pien pe tye lok me bwola mo ma a ki i doga." 
Psalms17:2 Ibimiyo aloyo kop, pien iŋeyo kop ma tye atir." 
Psalms17:3 Ka iŋiyo cwinya, dok ka ilima i dyewor, kadi itema, pe ibinoŋo gin marac mo tye iiya; dok pe abalo i lok ducu ma aloko," 
Psalms17:4 Dok ka iniyo tic pa dano, ibinoŋo ni alubo cikki, pe alubo kit pa jo ma gin lubwami." 
Psalms17:5 Kare ducu abedo ka lubo yoni, ma pe aŋak woko ki iye," 
Psalms17:6 Alegi kun akok boti, ai Lubaŋa, pien ibigamo doga; cik iti bota, iwiny lok ma aloko." 
Psalms17:7 Nyut mar meri ma pe lokke i yo me aura, in Lalar pa jo ma giyenyo ka larre i ciŋi yo tuŋ lacuc, pien igwokogi woko maber ki i kom lukworgi." 
Psalms17:8 Gwoka macalo igwoko nyig waŋi kikome; kana i te tipo me bwomi," 
Psalms17:9 ki i kom jo maraco ma giyako limma, gin lukworra ma giraco twatwal ma giruma woko dyere." 
Psalms17:10 Cwinygi odoko tek ma kica pe makogi; lok ma giloko bene giloko ki nyatte," 
Psalms17:11 Gilubo kora; kombeddi guruma woko; guciko waŋgi me noŋo kare ma myero gireta kwede woko piny i ŋom," 
Psalms17:12 Lukworra calo labwor ma owor, gimito kido koma woko, ma giliba kun gikura i kabedo ka ma gukanne iye calo latin labwor." 
Psalms17:13 A malo, ai Rwot, ci icirwatte ki lukworra, lweny kwedgi ci ilogi woko! Lara ki i ciŋ jo maraco ki pala lucwanni;" 
Psalms17:14 lara ki i ciŋgi ki tweroni, ai Rwot, ki i ciŋ jo ducu ma doŋ gitye ki jami ducu ma igi mito i kwo man. Wek guyeŋ ki gin ma yam ikano pigi; mi litinogi gunoŋ can muromo makato; dok myero guwek mogo odoŋ pi litinogi ma pud lukere." 
Psalms17:15 Kit macalo an kita tye atir-ri, abineni, bedoni kweda miyo aco ki i waŋ nino ma noŋo apoŋ ki yomcwiny." 
Psalms18:1 Amari, ai Rwot, pien in i tekka." 
Psalms18:2 Rwot aye gotta en cel gogona matek, en lalarra; en Lubaŋana, ki gotta, ariŋo alaro bote, en gwoka macalo kwot, en kalarrena matek; en geŋo ŋeya woko ci gwoka miyo abedo maber laboŋo ayela," 
Psalms18:3 Akok bot Rwot, ci en lara ki i ciŋ lukworra, Pi meno myero gipak Rwot." 
Psalms18:4 To otelo tolle ci otweya woko aduno, biamwonyi me to otwagge oruma woko dyere, kulu ma piine, ger ma neko dano ocorre woko i wiya limuk." 
Psalms18:5 Tol Lyel odwala woko, owic me to bene orine woko i nyima." 
Psalms18:6 I kare ma atye i can akok bot Rwot; akok gira bot Lubaŋa pi kony, Owinyo dwana ki i ot mere maleŋ, kokona pi kony odonyo i ite," 
Psalms18:7 Cutcut lobo oyeŋŋe ma morre pe twerre, te godi bene ducu guyegge woko ma giyeŋŋe matek, pien kiniga onoŋo omako Lubaŋa." 
Psalms18:8 Yito oduny okatti ki i ume, mac ma waŋ malyet okatti ki i doge, ma lodine bene olyel, olyel matek mada." 
Psalms18:9 Oywayo polo odwoko cen, ci olor obino piny, kun piny macol mapek oryene i te tyene." 
Psalms18:10 Oito i wi lakerubi ci otuk kwede, oriŋo madwir i dye yamo." 
Psalms18:11 Oketo piny macol orume dyere, kemane obedo pol mapek mupoŋ ki pii." 
Psalms18:12 Pee ki lodi mac ma lyel gunen i piny ma ryeny maleŋ ki i nyime, otuco dye pol macol licuc-ci woko." 
Psalms18:13 Rwot omiyo polo omor, dwan ŋat Mamalo Twal owinnye, ocwalo pee ki lodi mac." 
Psalms18:14 Obayo aterone, okeyo lumerok woko; omiyo lutkot owil, ci orwadogi woko piny." 
Psalms18:15 Dye nam opokke, tere onen, guti me te lobo bene odoŋ twolo, i kare ma ijukogi, ai Rwot, i kare ma ikutogi ki yweyo ma okatti ki i umi." 
Psalms18:16 Rwot ocwalo ciŋe piny ki i polo, ci omaka, oywaya okela woko ki i pii matut." 
Psalms18:17 Olara ki i ciŋ lakworra matek, olara ki i ciŋ jo ma gidaga, pien onoŋo gitek mada giloya woko." 
Psalms18:18 Gupoto i koma i kare ma can obwoya matek, ento Rwot aye obedo ka kenya." 
Psalms18:19 Okwanya woko okela i kabedo malac; olara pien onoŋo ayomo cwinye. 
Psalms18:20 Rwot omiya bakacic pien oneno ni kita atir, oculla muporo leŋcwinya;" 
Psalms18:21 pien abedo ka lubo cik pa Rwot, pe apokke woko ki bot Lubaŋa pi bal mo." 
Psalms18:22 Alubo cikke ducu, pe aŋak aweko gin ma en ociko." 
Psalms18:23 Pe atimo bal mo i nyime, dok agwokke mada pe atimo bal alii mo," 
Psalms18:24 Mumiyo Rwot omiya bakacic pien oneno ni kita atir, oculla muporo leŋcwinya ma abedo kwede i nyime." 
Psalms18:25 Rwot, in lagen bot jo ma lugen; bot ŋat maber ma pe ki bal inyutte bote bene calo ŋat maber ma pe ki bal." 
Psalms18:26 Cwinyi leŋ i kom jo ma cwinygi leŋ, ento iger i kom dano ma tamme ogom," 
Psalms18:27 Ilaro jo mamwol, ento jo ma luwakke idwokogi woko piny." 
Psalms18:28 Iyo, in aye ma icwinyo mac tarana; Rwot Lubaŋana aye menya ki colpiny." 
Psalms18:29 Iyo, atwero tyeko buca mony kulu kaikonya; pi teko pa Lubaŋana miyo apye akalo wi cel." 
Psalms18:30 Lubaŋa man, gin ducu ma en tiyo tye atir, lok pa Rwot ma en cikke me tiyo bedo ada; en tye macalo kwot pa jo ducu ma giriŋo gilaro bote." 
Psalms18:31 Aŋa ma Lubaŋa, kono Rwot kene? Aŋa ma got, pe Lubaŋawa aye keken gire?" 
Psalms18:32 En aye Lubaŋa ma oruka ki tek, en aye ma omiyo awoto ki kuc." 
Psalms18:33 Oketo tyena obedo macalo tyen til, ociba malo ka ma acuŋ iye matek." 
Psalms18:34 En pwonyo ciŋa pi lweny, mumiyo atwero gomo wa atum mola," 
Psalms18:35 Doŋ ityeko miya kwot me larri, kun ijola ki ciŋa lacuc; kony ma in imiya omiya adoko dit." 
Psalms18:36 Imiya kabedo malac ka ma awoto iye ducu, omiyo tyena pe ocer," 
Psalms18:37 Aryemo kor lukworra ci amakogi wako iyo; pe alokke adok cen nio, ka atyekogi ducu," 
Psalms18:38 Acobogi woko pil ci gupoto piny ka tyena; ma pe doŋ gitwero a malo. 
Psalms18:39 In aye iruka ki tek pi lewny; imiyo lulweny i koma guto gutum woko ka tyena. 
Psalms18:40 Imiyo lumerokka guloko ŋegi bota, imiyo atyeko jo ma gidaga woko." 
Psalms18:41 Gukok pi kony, ento ŋat mo pe ma olarogi, gukok bot Rwot, ento en pe ogamo doggi." 
Psalms18:42 Adinogi woko gudoko macalo apwa me yom ma yamo kolo; anyonogi macalo coto ma tye i yo gudo-gu. 
Psalms18:43 Yam ilara ki i kom rok mapol ma gilwenyo kweda; iketa abedo ladit ma loyo rok ducu; jo ma yam pe aŋeyogi gudoko jona ma an aye aloyogi. 
Psalms18:44 Cutcut ka lurok giwinyo pira ci gubino bota ma gimwolle amwola, ci gilubo cikka." 
Psalms18:45 Tekcwiny orwenyo woko ki botgi, gua ki ka ma gukanne iye gubino ma komgi myel amyela." 
Psalms18:46 Rwot tye kwo; gipwo gotta, gipil wi Lubaŋa ma en lalarra." 
Psalms18:47 En Lubaŋa ma omiya aculo kwor i kom lukworra, dok ma obwoyo rok mapol, omiyo gubedo i te Locca;" 
Psalms18:48 ci olara ki i ciŋ lumerokka; iyo, ipilo wiya makato lukworra, ilara ki i cin lulweny ma lubwami," 
Psalms18:49 Pi meno abikori i kin lurok, ai Rwot, dok abiwero wer me pako nyiŋi." 
Psalms18:50 Lubaŋa miyo deyo me loc madit bot kabakane, dok nyuto mar mere ma pe lokke i kom danone ma en oyero ka giwiro, bot Daudi ki likwaye ducu matwal." 
Psalms19:1 Polo ki jami ducu ma tye iye ginyuto deyo pa Lubaŋa; dan polo bene nyuto tic me cine. 
Psalms19:2 Nino acel acel tuco pire bot nino ma lube, dyewor acel acel nwoyo tucone bot dyewor mukene wek oŋe." 
Psalms19:3 Leb ma giloko pe, ki lokgi bene pe; dwangi won pe winnye." 
Psalms19:4 Ento dwangi winnye teretere i wi lobo ducu, ki lok ma giloko owa i agikki piny. Lubaŋa oguro kema i polo pi cen," 
Psalms19:5 ma bino macalo lanyom ma a woko ki i kicikane, macalo laco ma kome tek ma riŋo i ŋwec ki yomcwiny." 
Psalms19:6 Tuc ki i acakki polo yo tuŋcel, woto rumo woko ducuo wa iagikkine; gin mo pe liweŋ ma twero kanne pi Iyetone." 
Psalms19:7 Cik pa Rwot ber, dok tye atir; miyo kwo manyen bot dano; gin ma Rwot ociko tye me ada, miyo ryeko bot lumiŋ." 
Psalms19:8 Pwony pa Rwot tye atir, yomo cwiny dano; cik pa Rwot tye maleŋ, miyo dano niaŋ maber." 
Psalms19:9 Lworo Rwot ber, ci pe bigik matwal, ŋolo kop pa Rwot tye kakare, dok bedo atir ma romrom kare ducu." 
Psalms19:10 Pigi tek ma myero gimak makato jabu, kato bene jabu ma giliyo maberre, Gilim gikato moo kic woko, kato bene kadi ki moo ma cwer ki i peda kic," 
Psalms19:11 Gimiyo ŋec bot laticci; ŋat ma ogwoko cikki limo mot madit. 
Psalms19:12 Aya ma twero neno balle kene? Lara ki i kom balla ducu mukanne. 
Psalms19:13 Juka bene pe apot i bal mo ma obino pi cwiny me wakke; pe iwek oloya! Ci abibedo laboŋo bal mo i koma, abibedo ma pe atimo bal mo madit:" 
Psalms19:14 Mi lok ma a ki i doga ki tam ducu ma tye i cwinya obed ma in ipwoyo, ai Rwot, in gotta dok lakokka." 
Psalms20:1 Rwot ogam dogi i nino ma it ye ki can! 
Psalms20:2 En ocwal kony boti ki i kabedone maleŋ, okony kori ki i Cion!" 
Psalms20:3 En ogam mot ducu ma ityero bote, dok opwo gitum awaŋani ducu ma itumo bote." 
Psalms20:4 En omiyi gin ma cwinyi mito, dok omi yub meri ducu ocobbe kakare." 
Psalms20:5 Wek wawer wer me pak ki yomcwiny pi Locci; wek waŋab benderawa malo i nyiŋ Lubaŋawa! Rwot omiyi gin ducu ma-ilege pire! 
Psalms20:6 Kombeddi aŋeyo ni Rwot bikonyo kabakane ma giwiro; bigamo doge ki i polone maleŋ, bimiye loyo lweny." 
Psalms20:7 Jo mogo ginyatte pi gadigadi lewny, ki pi aguragura; ento wan wanyatte pi nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋawa," 
Psalms20:8 Gibiyokke ci gipoto woko piny; ento wan wabia malo wacuŋ atir. 
Psalms20:9 Mi loc bot kabaka, ai Rwot; gam dogwa ka wakok boti." 
Psalms21:1 Kabaka tye ki yomcwiny, ai Rwot, pien in aye imiye tek; dok opoŋ ki yomcwiny madwoŋ pi loc ma imiye." 
Psalms21:2 Ityeko miye gin ma cwinye mito, dok igamo doge imiye gin ma en olegi pire." 
Psalms21:3 Iŋolo wiye ki mot mabeco me gum; iketo bene lalukana me jabu ma giliyo maber i wiye," 
Psalms21:4 En olegi ni imiye kwo, ci imiye; imiye kwo ma ri nakanaka pi kare malac." 
Psalms21:5 Deyone dit pi konnyi; imiye deyo ki dit me Loc," 
Psalms21:6 Iyo, imiyo gum bedo i kome matwal; bedoni kwede miye yomcwiny." 
Psalms21:7 Kabaka geno Rwot; pi meno pe gibidire cen, pi mar ma pe lokke pa ŋat Mamalo Twal." 
Psalms21:8 Ibicwalo ciŋi imako lukworri woko ducu; ibimako jo ducu ma gidagi ki ciŋi lacuc. 
Psalms21:9 Ka ibinen botgi, ci ibilokogi gidoko calo keno ma mac tye ka lyel iye. Rwot bimwonyogi woko ki kinigane; ci mac biwaŋogi woko." 
Psalms21:10 Ibineko litino ityeko woko liweŋ ki i lobo, ibineko likwayogi woko ducu," 
Psalms21:11 Gipiro lok i komi kun giyubo me timi marac, ento kadi gibed ki yub me timo gin marac, yubgi pe bicobbe kakare." 
Psalms21:12 Ibitelo atummi ibayo atero kun imito icel waŋgi woko; ci ibimiyo gin ducu giriŋo woko," 
Psalms21:13 Gidwori pi tekki, ai Rwot! Wabiwero wer kun wapako tweroni." 
Psalms22:1 Lubaŋana, Lubaŋana, itenya woko piŋo? Piŋo ibedo ka mabor ma pe iromo lara, dok bene pe iwinyo ka acur acura?" 
Psalms22:2 Akok boti dyeceŋ, ai Lubaŋana, ento pe igamo doga; akok boti dyewor bene, ento pe anoŋo kit yweyo mo." 
Psalms22:3 Ento giketi i wi komker macalo ŋat, Maleŋ, in aye Lubaŋa ma jo Icrael gipako." 
Psalms22:4 Kwarowa yam gigeni; gugeni, ci omiyo ilarogi." 
Psalms22:5 Gukok boti, ci ilarogi; gugeni, omiyo pe gubedo ki cwercwiny dok lewic pe omakogi." 
Psalms22:6 Ento an mera a kwidi, pe adano; jo ducu giŋala dok gicaya." 
Psalms22:7 Jo ducu ma ginena giŋala aŋala, gicima ki lebgi, kun giyeno wigi." 
Psalms22:8 Gin giwacci, “En omiyo kwone bot Rwot; wek Rwot olare, wek Rwot olare, pien cwinye yom i kome!”" 
Psalms22:9 In aye yam ikonya omiyo ginywala; i kare ma an pud latin lakere igwoka maber," 
Psalms22:10 Cakke ma ginywala abedo ka jeŋŋe i komi, cakke i kare ma maa onywala iye in ibedo Lubaŋana." 
Psalms22:11 Pe ibed bor kweda, pien can tye cok; pe tye ŋat mo ma myero okonya." 
Psalms22:12 Lukwor mapol guruma woko macalo twoni, gin ducu guruma woko dyere, calo twoni ma komgi tek ma gua ki i lobo Bacan." 
Psalms22:13 Giŋamo doggi malac i koma, calo labwor mager ma tye ka koko." 
Psalms22:14 Tekka otum woko macalo pii ma gionyo i ŋom, cogona ducu guwotte woko ki i waŋ mwot; cwinya leny calo odok kic ma tye ka leny, tye ka leny ki iiya," 
Psalms22:15 Tekka otwo woko calo tako mutwo, ki leba bene omoko woko i cwaka; imiya apoto piny i apwa macalo ŋat muto." 
Psalms22:16 Iyo, dul pa jo ma gin lutim maraco gugura woko dyere, gicalo lwak gwogi ma gugura woko doŋ gucobo ciŋa ki tyena wo ko ducu," 
Psalms22:17 Atwero kwano wel cogona ducu, ginena ma guciko waŋgi i koma;" 
Psalms22:18 gipoko ginarukana woko i kingi, gibolo kwir pi boŋona." 
Psalms22:19 Ento in, ai Rwot, pe ibed ka mabor kweda! In Lalarra, rune ibin oyot ikonya!" 
Psalms22:20 Lara ki i lak pala lucwan, lar kwona ki i teko pa gwogi!" 
Psalms22:21 Lara ki i dog labwor, kwany kwona wo ko ki i tuŋ twoni mager-gu!" 
Psalms22:22 Abitito pi gin ma itiyo bot utmegina; abipaki i dye lwak ma gucokke kacel: 
Psalms22:23 Wun jo ma wulworo Rwot, wupake! Wun likwaye pa Yakobo ducu wumiye deyo, wuwore, wun jo Icrael ducu!" 
Psalms22:24 En pe ocayo can pa jo ma can opoto i komgi; iye pe dag neno cangi, ento owinyo kokogi, i kare ma gukok bote." 
Psalms22:25 Abipaki i dye lwak madwoŋ ma gucokke kacel; abicobo kwonna i nyim jo ducu ma gilwori. 
Psalms22:26 Jo ma can opoto i komgi gibicamo cam giyeŋ; ki jo ma giyenyo Rwot gibipake! Myero gibed ki kwo maber nakanaka! 
Psalms22:27 Rok ducu ma i lobo gibipo i kom Rwot; gibia ki i kabedo ducu gidwogo bote; kaka ducu me rok mapatpat gibibino ka wore. 
Psalms22:28 Rwot aye kabaka, en loyo jo me rok ducu." 
Psalms22:29 Iyo, jo ducu ma gin luwakke lobo-ni gibiguno piny bote; ki jo muto ma gibidok i ŋom gibiguŋo piny i nyime, jo ducu ma giŋeyo ni gibito." 
Psalms22:30 Yalwak me kare me anyim ducu gibitiyo bote; dano gibitito lok i kom Rwot bot yalwak ma lubogi," 
Psalms22:31 kun gituco larre bot jo ma pud peya ginywalogi, ni Rwot aye ma olaro jone." 
Psalms23:1 Rwot aye lakwat ma kwayo an; pe tye gin mo ma birem bota. 
Psalms23:2 En miyo abuto i olet maber, en tera i waŋ pii manic." 
Psalms23:3 En roco kwona doko nyen. En tela miyo abedo ki kit kwo ma atir pi nyiŋe kene keken. 
Psalms23:4 Kadi bed awoto i nota me tipo to, pe abilworo gin marac mo; pien in it ye kweda; toŋŋi ki odooni me kwat gimiyo cwinya bedo tek." 
Psalms23:5 Iketo meja me cam i nyima ma onoŋo lukwor mera bene gineno; ijola maber kun iwiro wiya ki moo, ki kopona bene opoŋ woko libyeny." 
Psalms23:6 Adada, berri ki kicani bibedo i koma pi kare me kwona ducu; dok an abibedo i ot pa Rwot matwal." 
Psalms24:1 Lobo kacel ki jami ducu ma tye iye gin jami pa Rwot; lobo kacel ki jo ducu ma gibedo iye bene mere. 
Psalms24:2 En con oketo lobo i wi nam, dok oketo te gutine ocuŋ matek i dye pii me nam matut." 
Psalms24:3 Aŋa ma tye ki twero me ito malo i wi got pa Rwot? Aŋa ma twero cuŋ i kabedone maleŋ? 
Psalms24:4 Ŋat ma tiyo gin ma atir, dok ma cwinye leŋ, ŋat ma pe miyo kwone me woro cal lubaŋa-gu, dok ma pe kwoŋo kwoŋ ki goba." 
Psalms24:5 Rwot bimiye gum, Lubaŋa lalarre bimiyo en loyo kop." 
Psalms24:6 Meno gin aye jo ma giyenyo en, gin jo ma gibino i nyim Lubaŋa pa Yakobo," 
Psalms24:7 Wutiŋŋe, wuyabbe malac, wun dog cel! Wuyabbe, wun doggola macon, wek kabaka me deyo odony." 
Psalms24:8 Aŋa ma kabaka me deyo? En Rwot matek ma tye ki twer, en Rwot matek ma loyo lewny!" 
Psalms24:9 Wutiŋŋe, wuyabbe malac, wun dog cel! Wuyabbe, wun doggola macon, wek kabaka me deyo odony." 
Psalms24:10 Kabaka me deyo man en aŋa? Rwot me mony aye kabaka me deyo! 
Psalms25:1 Atiŋo kwona amiyo boti, ai Rwot." 
Psalms25:2 Ageno in, ai Lubaŋana, pe iwek lewic omaka; pe iwek lukworra guŋala," 
Psalms25:3 Iyo, pe iwek lewic omak jo ma gikuri; ento wek lewic omak jo ma gijemo woko i komi nonono." 
Psalms25:4 Pwonya wek aŋe yoni ducu, ai Rwot; mi anegi maber." 
Psalms25:5 Tela i ada meri, dok ipwonya, pien in Lubaŋa Lalarra, Abedo ka kuri dyeceŋ jwi." 
Psalms25:6 Po pi kicani, ai Rwot, ki pi mar meri ma pe lokke, ma yam inyuto nia wa con," 
Psalms25:7 Pe ipo pi roc ki bal ma yam atimo i kare me tinona. Ento po pira pi mar meri ma pe lokke, ki pi berri, ai Rwot." 
Psalms25:8 Rwot ber, dok cwinye atir; pi meno en pwonyo lubalo yo ma myero gulubi." 
Psalms25:9 En telo jo mamwol me tiyo gin ma atir, dok pwonyogi wek guŋe gin ma en mito." 
Psalms25:10 Yo pa Rwot ducu opoŋ ki mar ma pe lokke, ki gen, pi jo ma gigwoko gicikkene ki lok me cadenne." 
Psalms25:11 Pi ber me nyiŋi, ai Rwot, wek balla, pien dwoŋ." 
Psalms25:12 Dano mene mono ma lworo Rwot? Rwot bipwonye yo ma myero en olubi," 
Psalms25:13 En kikome bibedo ki lonyo ma ri nakanaka, dok litinone bene gibicamo lobo." 
Psalms25:14 Rwot bedo larem jo ma gilwore, dok bene en mi yo giŋeyo gicikkene." 
Psalms25:15 Aneno bot Rwot kare ducu, pien en bigonyo tyena woko ki i obwo." 
Psalms25:16 Lokke idwog bota, dok inyutta berri; pien doŋ adoŋ kena, dok can odiya woko." 
Psalms25:17 Kwany cwercwiny woko ducu ki i cwinya, dok ilara ikwanya woko ki i lwak can ma atye iye." 
Psalms25:18 Tam pi canna ki ayela ma atye kwede, ci iwek balla ducu." 
Psalms25:19 Tam lukworra gitye adi, ma gidaga kun giger matek!" 
Psalms25:20 Gwok kwona, dok ilara; pe iwek giket lewic i wiya, pien ariŋo alaro boti." 
Psalms25:21 Mi berra ki cwiny ma atir ma atye kwede gugwoka, pien akuro in." 
Psalms25:22 Ai Lubaŋa, lar jo Icrael ki i can megi ducu." 
Psalms26:1 ŋol koppa, ai Rwot, pien abedo ka tiyo gin ma atir, kun ageno in ki cwinya ducu ma pe akalo akala wacel." 
Psalms26:2 Nena maber, ai Rwot, dok itema; nen cwinya ki tamma ducu." 
Psalms26:3 Pien aneno mar meri ma pe lokke, dok abedo i adani." 
Psalms26:4 Pe abedo kacel ki jo ma lugoba, dok pe aribbe ki jo ma lubwola." 
Psalms26:5 Adag ribbe ki lutim maraco, pe bene abibedo kacel ki jo maraco." 
Psalms26:6 Ai Rwot, alwoko ciŋa pi nyuto ni ape ki bal mo, awoto arumo kwede ke no tyerri," 
Psalms26:7 dok awero wer me pwoc ki dwana maloŋo, kun atito bene pi tic me aura ma itiyo." 
Psalms26:8 Ai Rwot, amaro odi ka ma ibedo iye, ma en kabedo ka ma deyoni tye iye." 
Psalms26:9 Pe it yeka woko kacel ki lubalo, dok pe ineka woko kacel ki jo ma gioyo remo pa dano." 
Psalms26:10 Gin jo ma cwinygi tye pi timo gin marac, ma jabagi opoŋ woko ki lim mewil i muŋ." 
Psalms26:11 Ento an atiyo gin ma atir; lara, dok iyutta berri." 
Psalms26:12 Abedo ki kuc ma gin marac mo pe ma gudo koma; abipako Rwot i dye lwakke ma gucokke. 
Psalms27:1 Rwot aye ceŋ mera ki lalarra; abilworo aŋa? Rwot gwoka-ki igin marac ducu: pi meno abibedo ki lworo it, kom aŋa" 
Psalms27:2 Ka lutim maraco gipote i koma ma gitemo neka woko, ma giloko lok maraco me kwot i koma, gin lukworra ki lumonena, gibicato ci gipoto woko piny." 
Psalms27:3 Kadi dul mony mo ruma woko dyere, pe abibedo ki lworo i cwinya; kadi gier Iweny i koma, pud abibedo ki gen aye i kom Rwot." 
Psalms27:4 Onoŋo alego Rwot pi jami acel, abiyenyo en jami acel-li keken, ni, myero abed i ot pa Rwot pi kare me kwona ducu wek abed ka neno ber pa Rwot, dok apeny doge ki i ode." 
Psalms27:5 En bikana i ode, dok gwoka, i kare me can; biuma woko i kemane, dok biketa acuŋ malo i kom got." 
Psalms27:6 Pi meno abiloyo lukworra woko ducu ma giruma woko dyere-ni; dok abi tyero gitum i kema pa Rwot kun adaŋŋe ki yomcwiny madwoŋ; abiwero wer kun apako Rwot ki dwan mamit. 
Psalms27:7 Winya, ai Rwot, ka akok boti matek nyut berri bota dok igam doga!" 
Psalms27:8 Iwaco ni, “Bin bota.” Agamo ki i cwinya kun awacci ni, “Abibino boti, ai Rwot.’ ”" 
Psalms27:9 Pe ikanne WOKO ki bota, Pe iryem laticci woko ki kiniga; in aye ibedo lakonya. Pe ibola woko, dok pe ibwota, ai Lubaŋa lalarra!" 
Psalms27:10 Wora ki maa dok gubwota woko, ento Rwot gire bigwoka." 
Psalms27:11 Pwonya wek aŋe yoni, ai Rwot, tela awot i yo ma opirre maber, wek lukworra pe guliba." 
Psalms27:12 Pe imiya bot lumonena; pien lucaden ma lugoba gucuŋ ka loko lok gobagoba i koma, ma giloko lokke ducu ki gero." 
Psalms27:13 Aye ni abineno ber pa Rwot ma pud abedo i kin jo makwo i lobo. 
Psalms27:14 Kur Rwot; bed matek, dok ibed ki tekcwiny; iyo, kur Rwot!" 
Psalms28:1 Akok boti do ai Rwot; pe idiŋ iti woko ka winyo kokona do, in gotta, pien ka iliŋ woko ma pe igamo doga, miyo adoko ŋat acel i kin jo ma gidonyo piny i bur." 
Psalms28:2 Winy dwan me lega me bako doga boti, ka akok boti pi kony, kun ataŋo ciŋa malo boti ma akemo kwede kabedoni maleŋ twarwal-Ii." 
Psalms28:3 Pe imaka itera woko kacel ki jo maraco, ki jo ma timo gin marac, gin jo ma giloko ki luwotgi lok ma kelo kuc kun gitamo ki i cwinygi me timo tim aranyi," 
Psalms28:4 Culgi muporo kit timgi, mi gunoŋ can pi gin marac ma gutimo." 
Psalms28:5 Pe giparo pi gin ma Rwot otimo, kadi pi jami ma en oketo; pi meno en biiyekogi woko ma calo ot magimuko ma pe dok gigero matwal." 
Psalms28:6 Gipak Rwot pien doŋ otyeko winyo kokona me bako dog," 
Psalms28:7 Rwot aye tekka dok kwotta; agene ki cwinya ducu, En okonya omiyo cwinya opoŋ ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, awero wer me pak kun amiyo pwoc bote." 
Psalms28:8 Rwot aye tek pa lwakke, en aye ŋat ma danone ma giwiro riŋo laro bote," 
Psalms28:9 Lar lwakki, dok imi gum i kom jo ma gin meri. Bed lakwatgi, dok igwokgi nakanaka." 
Psalms29:1 Wupak Rwot, wun gin makwo ducu ma wubedo i polo, wupak Rwot pi deyone ki pi tekke," 
Psalms29:2 Wupak nyiŋ Rwot ma tye ki deyo; wuwor Rwot kun wuruko ginaruka maleŋ. 
Psalms29:3 Dwan Rwot mor winnye wa i wi pi i: dwan Lubaŋa me deyo tye ka mor, Rwot dwane tye ka winnye i wi nam madoŋo," 
Psalms29:4 Dwan Rwot winnye ma opoŋ ki tek dok ki dit me loc. 
Psalms29:5 Dwan Rwot baro wa yadi cedar woko, kadi wa yadi cedar madoŋo me Lebanon." 
Psalms29:6 En miyo godi me Lebanon pye calo laroya dyaŋ, ki Cirion bene en miyo pye calo wod jubi ma i tim." 
Psalms29:7 Dwan Rwot meny ci miyo leb mac puk woko lipil. 
Psalms29:8 Dwan Rwot miyo tim yeŋŋe, Rwot yeŋo tim Kadec," 
Psalms29:9 Dwan Rwot miyo til nywal, dok jwero yadi me buŋa wo ko ducu; dano ducu ma gicokke i ode gidane ni, “Deyo obed bot Lubaŋa!”" 
Psalms29:10 Rwot aye ma loyo pii matut ducu ma tye i nam; en bedo i wi komkerre matwal macalo kabaka," 
Psalms29:11 Rwot myero omi teko bot lwakke! En myero omi gum me kuc i kom jone! 
Psalms30:1 Amito paki, ai Rwot, pien doŋ ilara, dok pe imiyo lukworra gubedo ki yomcwiny pira." 
Psalms30:2 Ai Rwot Lubaŋana, onoŋo akok boti ni ikonya, ci in doŋ ityeko caŋa woko." 
Psalms30:3 Ai Rwot, in aye ma ilara ikwanya woko ki i lobo pa jo muto, iroco kwona odoko nyen ki i kin jo ma gudonyo piny i bur." 
Psalms30:4 Wuwer wer me pako Rwot wun jone ma gene, dok wumiye pwoc pi nyiŋe maleŋ." 
Psalms30:5 Kinigane pe ri, bedo pi kare manok keken, ento berre bedo pi kare me kwowa kulu. Gwok koko twero bedo i dyewor, ento yomcwiny bino i odiko." 
Psalms30:6 Doŋ an i kare ma atye ki lonyo awacci, “Pe gibidira cen.”" 
Psalms30:7 Pi berri bota, ai Rwot, omiyo iciba acuŋ likiŋ macalo got matek. Ento i kare ma ikanne woko ki bota, abedo ki lworo madwoŋ," 
Psalms30:8 Akok boti, ai Rwot, dok alego lega me bako dog bot Rwot kun awaco ni," 
Psalms30:9 “Kit kony aŋo ma tona twero miyo boti ka adonyo piny i bur? Apwa me ŋom mono bipaki? Dok binyuto berri ki adani? 
Psalms30:10 Ai Rwot, winy kokona, wek kica omaki i koma! Ai Rwot, bed lakonya!”" 
Psalms30:11 Ityeko loko kumo ma atye kwede odoko myel me yomcwiny madwoŋ: igonyo bene boŋo colana woko ka doŋ iruka ki yomcwiny. 
Psalms30:12 Pi meno pe abibedo liŋ; abiwero wer me pak boti. Ai Rwot Lubaŋana, abimiyi pwoc nakanaka." 
Psalms31:1 Ai Rwot, ariŋo alaro boti wek igwoka; pe iwek giket lewic i wiya. In Lubaŋa ma kiti atir, alegi, lara do!" 
Psalms31:2 Cik iti, iwiny legana, lara oyotoyot! Bed got ma ariŋo alaro iye, dok ibed cel gogona matek ma laro an!" 
Psalms31:3 Iyo, in aye i gotta ki cel gogona; tela dok igwoka pi nyiŋi," 
Psalms31:4 Gonya woko ki i obwo ma giciko gikano pira, in aye ka larrena." 
Psalms31:5 Amiyo kwona doŋ i ciŋi; ai Rwot, in doŋ ityeko koka, in Lubaŋa me ada." 
Psalms31:6 In idag jo ma giworo cal lubaŋa mamwa-ni; ento an ageno mera Rwot. 
Psalms31:7 Abibedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ pi mar meri ma pe lokke, pien doŋ ityeko neno can ma omaka, dok ityeko winyo koko me can ma odiya." 
Psalms31:8 Pe imiyo lukworra gumaka; imiya abedo i kabedo malac. 
Psalms31:9 Ai Rwot, kica omaki i koma do, pien atye i can; waŋa doŋ olwal woko pi koko madwoŋ, koma ducu doŋ oloc woko marac," 
Psalms31:10 I kwona ducu abedo ki cwercwiny, dok mwaka me bedona opoŋ ki cur keken. Tekona otum woko pi ayelayela ma atye kwede, cogona ducu guballe woko." 
Psalms31:11 Lumonena ducu giŋala aŋala, ki luwota bene gicaya; jo ma giŋeya doŋ gilwora alwora, ka ginena i gudo ci giriŋo woko ki bota." 
Psalms31:12 Luwota doŋ wigi owil woko i koma calo doŋ onoŋo ato woko atoya; alokke adoko calo otako agulu ma oto. 
Psalms31:13 Iyo, awinyo jo mapol gikwoto nyiŋa; omiyo lworo bene ogura woko dyere! Guribbe gitye ka yubo lok i koma, ma gipiro lok me neka woko." 
Psalms31:14 Ento genna pud tye i komi, ai Rwot, kun awaco ni, “In Lubaŋana.”" 
Psalms31:15 Kare me kwona tye i ciŋi; lara ki bot lukworra, ki i cin jo ma giketo ayela, i koma." 
Psalms31:16 An laticci, nena ki waŋ me kica; lara pi mar meri ma pe lokke!" 
Psalms31:17 Akok boti, ai Rwot, pe iwek lewic omaka; wek lewic omak jo maraco, wek guto gucit i lobo pa jo mu to gubed mot laliŋ." 
Psalms31:18 Juk gin jo ma loko lok goba-ni woko, ma giloko lok marac i kom jo ma kitgi atir ki wakke kacel ki cac." 
Psalms31:19 Berri dit rom kwene, ma igwoko pi jo ma gilwori! Gin ma itiyo bedo me aura rom kwene i waŋ ŋat acel acel, ma itiyo pi jo ma giriŋo gilaro boti!" 
Psalms31:20 Igwokogi woko maber i kabedo ma it ye iye, igwokogi bene ki i piro lok ma dano gipiro; ikanogi woko gibedo mol ki kuc i odi ki i yet pa lukworgi." 
Psalms31:21 Gipwo Rwot, pien doŋ otyeko nyuto marre bota i yo me aura, ka onoŋo gigura woko dyere macalo gaŋ ma girumo." 
Psalms31:22 I kare ma adoŋo oduru awaco ni, “Doŋ giryema woko ki i nyimi ka mabor.” Ento in iwinyo lega me bako dogga, i kare ma akok boti pi kony." 
Psalms31:23 Wumar Rwot, wun lwakke ducu ma gene! Rwot gwoko jo ma lugen, ento pwodo jo ma gilyerre ma giwakke awaka." 
Psalms31:24 Wubed tek, dok wubed ma cwinywu nwaŋ, wun jo ma wukuro Rwot!" 
Psalms32:1 Dano ma doŋ giweko balle tye kigum, ma balle doŋ gikwanyo woko," 
Psalms32:2 Dano ma Rwot pe doŋ kwano bal mo i wiye tye ki yomcwiny, ma pe tye ki bwola i cwinye." 
Psalms32:3 I kare ma akwero tuco balla, anoŋo ni koma oballe woko pi cur ma abedo ka cur dyeceŋ jwi." 
Psalms32:4 Imiya pwod malit i dyeceŋ ki i dyewor; tekona ducu otwo woko macalo toyo two woko ki Lyeto me oro. 
Psalms32:5 Cut atuco balla boti, pe amuŋo gin marac ducu ma onoŋo atimo; awaco ni, “Abituco balla ducu bot Rwot”; ci in bene iweko balla ducu." 
Psalms32:6 Pi meno wek jo ducu ma gigeni gukel legagi boti; i kare me can ma noŋo lalele me pii madwoŋ mito mwonyogi woko, pii meno pe bio i komgi." 
Psalms32:7 In aye kakannena, igwoka ki i ayela; igura woko dyere ki larri." 
Psalms32:8 Abipwonyi dok abicimmi yo ma myero ilubi; abimiyi ryeko dok abineni. 
Psalms32:9 Pe ibed calo aguragura nyo kana ma pe niaŋ, ma myero gitwe doge ki wiye, wek olub gin ma iwaco." 
Psalms32:10 Jo maraco gibilimo arem madwoŋ; ento jo ma gigeno Rwot en gwokogi ki mar mere ma pe lokke. 
Psalms32:11 Wubed ki yomcwiny madwoŋ i Rwot, wun jo ma kitwu atir, wudaŋŋe pi yomcwiny, wun jo ducu ma cwinywu atir!" 
Psalms33:1 Wuwer matek ki yomcwiny i Rwot, wun jo ma kitwu atir! Myero wupake, wun jo ducu ma cwinywu leŋ." 
Psalms33:2 Wumi pwoc bot Rwot kun wupake ki opuk, wupake ki wer naŋa ma tolle tye apar." 
Psalms33:3 Wuwer wer manyen bote, wugo naŋa ki kit kwiriwu ducu kun wuwero ki dwanwu maloŋo." 
Psalms33:4 Lok pa Rwot tye ada, dok ticce ma en tiyo ducu tiyo ki gen," 
Psalms33:5 Rwot maro kit ma atir ki ŋolo kop atir; lobo opoŋ ki mar mere ma pe lokke. 
Psalms33:6 Rwot oketo polo pi lokke, ka oketo cen, dwe ki lakalatwe ki lok ma en oloko ki doge." 
Psalms33:7 Ocoko pii me nam woko ducu oguro kacel i kabedo acel calo opiko i opoko; ka okano nam madoŋo bene i kicika odine me kano jami. 
Psalms33:8 Wek lobo ducu omi woro bot Rwot, wek jo ducu ma Jibedo i lobo gulwore." 
Psalms33:9 I kare ma en olok, ci lobo okette; gin ma en ociko otiŋe, dok ocuŋ matek likiŋ." 
Psalms33:10 Rwot geŋo yub pa lurok pe cobbe, dok geŋo lwak me rok mapol me keto yubgi i tic," 
Psalms33:11 Yub pa Rwot bedo matwal; yub ducu ma en tamo ki i cwinye bedo matwal i kare pa yalwak ducu. 
Psalms33:12 Lwak me rok ma Rwot aye Lubaŋagi tye ki gum, gin aye jo ma en oyero me bedo jone kikome!" 
Psalms33:13 Rwot neno piny ki i polo; en neno dano ducu. 
Psalms33:14 En lworo waŋe ki i wi komker ka ma obedo iye, neno jo ducu ma gibedo i lobo." 
Psalms33:15 En aye ma oketo cwinygi ducu, dok en neno gin ducu ma gitiyo." 
Psalms33:16 Kabaka pe twero loyo lweny pi dul mony matek ma en tye kwede; lalweny pe twero loyo Lweny pi tekkom madit ma en tye kwede. 
Psalms33:17 Pe gitwero geno aguragura ‘me lweny ni romo miyo loc; tekke-ni ducu pe twero laro dano. 
Psalms33:18 Nen, Rwot nenojo ma giwore, gin jo ma gigeno mar mere ma pe lokke," 
Psalms33:19 wek olargi ki i to, dok ogwokgi gubed makwo i kare me kec." 
Psalms33:20 Genwa ducu tye i kom Rwot en lakonywa, dok en kwot ma gwokowa." 
Psalms33:21 Iro, wabedo ki yomcwiny pi en, pien wageno nyiŋe maleŋ." 
Psalms33:22 Ai Rwot, wek mar meri ma pe lokke obed i komwa, kit macalo wageno in-ni." 
Psalms34:1 Abipwoyo Rwot kare ducu; dok abibedo ka pake nakanaka. 
Psalms34:2 Abipako en pi gin ma doŋ otyeko tiyo; wek jo ma gitye ki can guwiny dok gubed ki yomcwiny. 
Psalms34:3 Wuribbe kweda me pako dit pa Rwot, wek wapaku nyiŋe kacel!" 
Psalms34:4 Ayenyo Rwot, ci en ogamo legana dok olara ki i kit lworo ducu ma onoŋo atye kwede." 
Psalms34:5 Wuŋen bote, wek wanwu oryeny ma noŋo cwinywu yom, wek lewic pe omakwu." 
Psalms34:6 An lacan akok bot Rwot, ci en ogamo doga, dok olara ki i canna ducu," 
Psalms34:7 Lamalaika pa Rwot cuŋ kun gwoko jo ma gilworo Rwot, dok larogi bene woko ki i can." 
Psalms34:8 Tem koŋ inen ni Rwot oor. Dano mariŋo laro bote bedo ki yomcwiny! 
Psalms34:9 Wulwor Rwot, wun jo maleŋ mere ducu, gin mo pe ma rem bot jo ma gilwore." 
Psalms34:10 Litino labwor kare mogo camgi pe, dok kec nekogi; ento jo ma giyenyo Rwot gin mabeco mo pe birem botgi." 
Psalms34:11 Wubin litinona, wuwiny lokka, abipwonyowu kit me woro Rwot." 
Psalms34:12 Aŋa ma maro kwo, ma paro ni eri pi kare malac wek enoŋ yomcwiny i kom jami mabeco?" 
Psalms34:13 Gwok lebi pe ilok gin marac, dok dogi bene pe olok lok me bwola." 
Psalms34:14 A woko ki i gin marac, ci iti gin maber; yeny kuc, dok iti matek macalo itwero wek inoŋ." 
Psalms34:15 Rwot neno jo ma kitgi atir, dok ciko ite winyo koko ma gikok bote pi kony." 
Psalms34:16 Rwot dag neno jo ma lutim maraco; en miyo wi dano wil woko i komgi matwal i lobo-ni. 
Psalms34:17 Ka jo ma kitgi atir okok bote pi kony, en winyo kokogi, dok larogi bene woko ki i cangi ducu." 
Psalms34:18 Rwot tye cok ki jo ma cwinygi goro, eci laro jo ma gitye ki arem madwoŋ i cwinygi." 
Psalms34:19 Dano ma kite atir limo can madwoŋ; ento Rwot lare ki i canne ducu. 
Psalms34:20 En gwoko cogo ma i kome ma ber wek kadi acel mo pe otur woko. 
Psalms34:21 Gin marac bineko jo maraco; dok jo ma gidag jo ma kitgi atir gibipwodogi. 
Psalms34:22 Rwot koko kwo pa luticce; en pe miyo pwod bot ŋat mo i kom jo ma giriŋo gilaro bote. 
Psalms35:1 Ai Rwot, pid ki jo ma gidota; dok ilweny ki jo ma gilwenyo i koma," 
Psalms35:2 Mak kwot ki gin me geŋo kori, ci ibin ikonya." 
Psalms35:3 Bed ma iyubbe ki toŋ ki latoŋ me lweny me rwatte ki jo ma giryemo kora. Titta ni, “An lalarri.”" 
Psalms35:4 Wek lewic omak jo ma gimito neka woko dok alee myero otwodgi. Wek ‘gin jo ‘ma gipiro lok marac i koma gulokke gudok cen ki lewic madwoŋ! 
Psalms35:5 Wek gubed calo cuŋ kal ma yamo tiŋo woko, ma kun lamalaika pa Rwot tye ka ryemogi." 
Psalms35:6 Mi yogi ocid woko dok obed pwot ma cerogi acera, dok iwek lamalaika pa Rwot oryem korgi." 
Psalms35:7 Guciko obwo gukano woko pira laboŋo balla mo; dok bene gukwinyo bur wek apot iye ate woko. 
Psalms35:8 Wek can opot i komgi atura otyekgi woko; ki obwo ma gukano-ni bene omakgi, gupot i bur gutum woko!" 
Psalms35:9 Abibedo ki yomcwiny i Rwot, abibedo ki yomcwiny pien Rwot olara." 
Psalms35:10 Abiwaco lok man ki cwinya ducu ni, “Ai Rwot, aŋa mono ma calo in, in ma ilaro dano magoro ki i cin jo ma gitek giloye woko? Ilaro ŋat magoro ki ma piny obwoyo ki i ciŋ jo ma yako jamine woko.”" 
Psalms35:11 Caden ma cwinygi rac gikatti ka maleŋ pitito lok i koma, kun gipenya pi gin ma pe aŋeyo." 
Psalms35:12 Giculla gin marac pi gin maber; piny doŋ orem kweda woko. 
Psalms35:13 Ento an aruko boŋo cola i kare ma onoŋo komgi lit, dok amine kena i can me ri kec. Alego ma agoyo kora akulo wiya piny," 
Psalms35:14 macalo onoŋo akumo pi larema nyo pi omera. Abedo ka wot atata macalo dano ma koko minne, kun akulle piny ka kumo," 
Psalms35:15 I kare ma ayokke gin ducu gubedo ki yomcwiny, gucokke kacel i koma; luput ma yam pe aŋeyogi gucokke i koma ka yeta ma pe gitwero liŋ." 
Psalms35:16 Gumedde ka ŋala ma noŋo doggi bit i koma, ma gukayo lakgi wo ko likiŋ." 
Psalms35:17 Ai Rwot, ibibedo ka nena anena pi kare ma rom mene? Lara woko ki i gerogi, lar kwona ki i dog labwor." 
Psalms35:18 Abimiyi pwoc madit mada i cokke madit; abipaki ka ma lwak jo mapol gugurre iye," 
Psalms35:19 Pe iwek lukworra ma gin lutim marac gubed ki yomcwiny ikoma, pe iwek jo ma gimiyo wangi lirwitrwit guloya, gin jo ma daga laboŋo bal mo-ni." 
Psalms35:20 Pe giloko lok ma kelo kuc, ento gipiro megi lok maraco i kom jo ma gibedo mot i lobo, gupoŋ ki lok me bwola keken," 
Psalms35:21 Giŋamo doggi malac me lok i koma, kun giwacci, “Aa! Aa! Watyeko neno gin ma itimo!”" 
Psalms35:22 Ai Rwot, doŋ iŋeno, pe myero iliŋ aliŋa do! Pe ibed bor kweda, ai Rwot!" 
Psalms35:23 Co woko, cukke me ŋolo koppa; pid pita, in Rwoda ki Lubaŋana!" 
Psalms35:24 In iporre, ai Rwot, pi meno kwany kop woko ki i wiya; pe iwek lukworra gunoŋ yomcwiny i koma do, Lubaŋanal" 
Psalms35:25 Pe iwek gulok kekengi kun giwacci, “Aa! Doŋ wanoŋo gin ma cwinywa mito.” Dok pe iwek guwacci, “Doŋ watyeko mwonye woko.”" 
Psalms35:26 Wek lewic omakgi dok gubed ki anyobanyoba lawaŋacel, gin jo ma gibedo ki yomcwiny pi can ma omaka! Wek gupoŋ ki lewic ma alee bene otwodgi, gin jo ma giwakke i koma-ni!" 
Psalms35:27 Wek jo ma cwinygi mito ni alo kop gudaŋŋe pi yomcwiny kun giwaco nakanaka ni, “Rwot dit, cwinye yom ka neno ni laticce bedo ki kuc!”" 
Psalms35:28 Abitito pi porreni, dok abipako nyiŋi dyeceŋ jwi." 
Psalms36:1 Bal me turo cik tye loko ka matut i cwiny dano marac; en pe neno gin ma miyo elworo Lubaŋa. 
Psalms36:2 Bal miyo en bwolle kekene dok umo waŋe woko kun tamo ni pe gibinoŋo gin marac ma en otimo, miyo dano kwere woko." 
Psalms36:3 Lok ma en loko obedo lok me tim aranyi ki me bwola keken; pe doŋ tye ki ryeko mo ma: romme tiyo gin maber. 
Psalms36:4 En piro lok me timo gin marac ma obuto i wi kitandane; oloko kite wo ko i yo mapat ma pe doŋ ber; dok pe kwero kit gin mo marac. 
Psalms36:5 Ai Rwot, mar meri ma pe lokke o wa i polo, dok adani bene o i pol." 
Psalms36:6 Porreni ocuŋ matek likiŋ macalo godi madoŋo, ki ŋolo koppi tye calo tut-piny madit. Ai Rwot, igwoko dano kacel ki lee ducu." 
Psalms36:7 Ai Rwot, ber me mar meri ma pe lokke dit rom mene! Jo ducu riŋo gilaro ka kanne i te bwomi." 
Psalms36:8 Giyeŋ ki lwak cam madwoŋ ma tye i odi, mnyo gimato pii mua i kulu me yomcwiny ma tye boti." 
Psalms36:9 In aye i waŋ it me kwo ducu, i ceŋŋi wan bene waneno iye ceŋ," 
Psalms36:10 Med mar meri ma pe lokke bot jo ma giŋeyi, dok imed lar meri bot jo ma cwinygi atir," 
Psalms36:11 Pe iwek dano ma lawakke onyona ki tyene, pe iwek dano marac oryema woko ki ciŋe." 
Psalms36:12 Lutim maraco gibuto kunnu aryeba ic, gidiyogi woko piny ma pe dok gitwero a malo." 
Psalms37:1 Pe myero ibed ka paro pi jo maraco; pe ibed ki mone i kom jo ma gitiyo gin marac; 
Psalms37:2 pien gibitwo woko calo lum, dok gibiner woko calo pot dek madyak." 
Psalms37:3 Gen Rwot, dok iti gin maber; bed i lobo ki kuc." 
Psalms37:4 Bed ki yomcwiny i Rwot, ci en bimiyi gin ducu ma cwinyi mito." 
Psalms37:5 Mi kwoni bot Rwot; gen en, ci en bikonyi." 
Psalms37:6 En bikwanyo kop woko ki i wii miyo berri ryeny calo ceŋ, doŋ loyo koppi bibedo calo ceŋ ma ryeny i cwiny dyeceŋ," 
Psalms37:7 Bed mot i nyim Rwot, dok idi cwinyi ikure. Pe ipar pi ŋat ma tye ka lony oyotoyot, kadi pi ŋat ma cobo yubbe me timo gin maraco." 
Psalms37:8 Pe iwek kiniga omaki, dok ibwot akemo obedi; pe ibed ki par iye, pien tim ma kit meno kelo gin marac keken." 
Psalms37:9 Lutim maraco gibityekogi woko; ento jo ma gigeno Rwot gibicamo lobo. 
Psalms37:10 Odoŋ kare manok, ci dano marac doŋ bibedo pe matwal; kadi iŋi i kabedone maber, ibinoŋo ni en doŋ pe kunnu." 
Psalms37:11 Ento jo mamwol aye gibicamo lobo; gibibedo ki yomcwiny pi lonyo madwoŋ ma gibilimo. 
Psalms37:12 Dano marac piro lok i kom dano ma kite atir, dok kayo lake i kome matek." 
Psalms37:13 Ento Rwot nyero dano marac anyera, pien neno ni nino me ŋolo kop i kom dano marac doŋ tye ka bino." 
Psalms37:14 Jo maraco giwoto pala lucwangi dok gitelo atumgi, me neko lucan kacel ki jo ma piny obwoyogi, ki pi neko jo ma cwinygi atir." 
Psalms37:15 Pala lucwangi bicobo komgi kekengi, ki atumgi bene gibituro woko." 
Psalms37:16 Gin mo manok ma dano ma kite atir tye kwede ber kato lonyo madwoŋ ma jo maraco mapol gitye kwede. 
Psalms37:17 Twero ma jo maraco gitye kwede gibituro woko; ento Rwot bigwokojo ma kitgi atir. 
Psalms37:18 Rwot gwoko jo ma lubo cikke; dok gipinygi biri nakanaka. 
Psalms37:19 Lewic pe bimakogi i kare me can, dok gibibedo ki cam madwoŋ i kare me kec." 
Psalms37:20 Ento jo maraco, ma gin lukwor pa Rwot, gibito gitum woko macalo lum i olet dyaŋ, gibiduny woko calo yito ma duny." 
Psalms37:21 Dano marac mako banya, ento pe twero culo waŋe, ento dano ma kite atir lakica, miyo mere jami amiya noŋo." 
Psalms37:22 Jo ma Rwot omiyo gum botgi aye gibicamo lobo, ento jo ma doŋ en ocenogi gibityekogi woko." 
Psalms37:23 Ka Rwot telo dano i kit kwo ma myero en obed kwede, ci en moko dano ma kwone yomo cwinye," 
Psalms37:24 Kadi oyokke, ci pe bipoto piny aryeba ic, pien Rwot tye jole woko ki ciŋe." 
Psalms37:25 Yam abedo latin, ento man doŋ adit; pud peya aneno gibwoto dano ma kite atir, kadi ki litinone bene pe aneno ka gilego kwon alega." 
Psalms37:26 En nino ducu ber, miyo jami amiya, dok dano gimako banya bote, ki litinone bene gidoko joma kelo gum bot dano," 
Psalms37:27 A woko ki i gin marac, iti gin maber, ci ibibedo iri nakanaka." 
Psalms37:28 Rwot maro ŋolo kop atir; pe bibwoto jo ma gigeno eno En bigwoko jo ma kitgi atir matwal, ento gibityeko litino pa jo maraco woko ducu." 
Psalms37:29 Jo ma kitgi atir gibicamo lobo, dok gibibedo iye matwa!’" 
Psalms37:30 Dano ma kite atir loko lok me ryeko, dok loko gin ma tye atir." 
Psalms37:31 En gwoko cik pa Lubaŋane i cwinye; pe ŋak woko ento bedo ki kit maber kare ducu. 
Psalms37:32 Dano marac neno ŋat ma kite atir, ci yenyo yo me neke woko." 
Psalms37:33 Ento Rwot pe bibwoto en ata i ciŋ lakworre, nyo ni giŋol kop oloye ka gikelo en ka pido." 
Psalms37:34 Kur Rwot, dok ilub cikke, en bimiyi twero me camo lobo; ibineno bene ka gityeko jo marac woko." 
Psalms37:35 Aneno dano marac tye ka keto gero mukatŋ kare, kun tye ka doŋo medde ameda calo yat cedar me Lebanon." 
Psalms37:36 Lacen ka akato ki kenyo, anoŋo ni en doŋ pe matwal; kadi bed ayenye, ento pe doŋ twero noŋŋe," 
Psalms37:37 Nen dano ma pe ki bal mo, dok inen dano ma cwinye atir; dano ma kelo kuc Likwaye bedo tye." 
Psalms37:38 Ento jo ma lubalo gibityekogi woko liweŋ; ki likwayo pa jo maraco bene gibijwerogi woko. 
Psalms37:39 Rwot aye ma laro jo ma kitgi atir; en bene ma gwokogi i kare me can. 
Psalms37:40 Rwot konyogi, dok larogi ki bot jo maraco, pien giriŋo gilaro bote." 
Psalms38:1 Ai Rwot, pe ijuka ki kiniga, dok pe ipwoda ki akemo!" 
Psalms38:2 Ateroni doŋ gucela, gumwony woko iiya, kun in bene icwalo ciŋi piny idiya kwede woko." 
Psalms38:3 Pi kinigani omiyo atwo matek, pe atye ki yotkom i cogona ducu; man obino pi balla." 
Psalms38:4 Balla doŋ oketo koma woko; gipek calo yec ma pe aromo tiŋone," 
Psalms38:5 Waŋ burra kwok maŋwe pi minona," 
Psalms38:6 atyeko kulle woko piny adada ma abuto i ŋom aryeba cwiny; dyeceŋ jwi awoto kun akumo akuma. 
Psalms38:7 Pyera bene waŋŋe awaŋa calo mac, koma pe tye ki kit yotkom mo wacel." 
Psalms38:8 Koma oloc dok onyonne woko adada; acur pien atye ki remcwiny madwoŋ twatwal. 
Psalms38:9 Ai Rwot, iŋeyo gin ma amito ducu, gin ma abedo ka cur pire-ni pe obedo me muŋ ki boti." 
Psalms38:10 Adunona tye ka gone matek lituktuk, miyo tekone bene tum woko waŋa bene ocor woko, pe neno piny doŋ maber." 
Psalms38:11 Lurema ki luwota ma wabedo kwedgi gicuŋ cen ka mabor pi bur ma oonyo: i koma, ki lutuwa bene gicuŋ cen ka mabor adada." 
Psalms38:12 Jo ma giyenyo yo meneka guciko owicgi pira, jo ma gimito keto ret i koma giloko lok me tyeko kwona woko, gibedo ka piro lok marac i koma dyeceŋ jwi." 
Psalms38:13 Ento an abedo macalo ladinit, pe awinyo lokgi, dok abedo calo ladoge-oto ma pe ŋamo doge ka lok." 
Psalms38:14 Iyo, adoko calo dano ma pe winyo, ma pe loko kit lok mo me juk." 
Psalms38:15 Ento genna ducu tye i komi, ai Rwot; ai Rwot Lubaŋana, in aye ma ibigamo doga." 
Psalms38:16 Alegi alega keken ni, “Pe iwek jo ma ginyatte i koma ka tyena ocer, gunoŋ yomcwiny i koma!”" 
Psalms38:17 Doŋ acok poto, atye ka winyo arem i koma kare ducu." 
Psalms38:18 Atuco balla, kun cwinya cwer mada pire." 
Psalms38:19 Lukworra ma gidaga noŋo laboŋo gin mo ma abalo botgi gitek, jo ma gidaga laboŋo te lok mo gipol." 
Psalms38:20 Jo ma giculo gin maber pi gin marac gudoko lukworra, pien amito ni ati gin maber." 
Psalms38:21 Ai Rwot, pe ibwota: ai Lubaŋana, pe ibed bor kweda!" 
Psalms38:22 Bin oyot ikonya, ai Rwot, lalarra!" 
Psalms39:1 Awaco ni, “Abigwokke i kit gin ducu ma anyo, wek pe atim bal ki lok ma aloko; abiliŋ ma pe aŋamo doga ka waco lok mo, ka ce atye kacel ki jo maraco.”" 
Psalms39:2 Aliŋ aliŋa ma pe awaco lok mo, dok bene ajukke kekena kadi me waco gin mo maber; ento cwercwinnya dok omedde ameda marac," 
Psalms39:3 cwinya olyetti woko dok owaŋ matek. I kare ma pud alwodo lok, ci mac olyel; ci acako lok maber laboŋo lworo." 
Psalms39:4 “Rwot, mi aŋe agikkina, dok imiya aŋe wel ninona; wek aŋe bene kit macalo kwona rwenyo kwede oyot." 
Psalms39:5 Nen, Iŋolo ninona obedo manok, dok kare me kwona pe gin mo ki boti. Adada dano acel acel cuŋ mere macalo yweyo nono!" 
Psalms39:6 Adada dano woto wirre calo tipo! Adada gicanne nono pi gin ma pe konyo; dano kano lonyo madwoŋ, kun pe ŋeyo aŋa ma bileyo," 
Psalms39:7 “Doŋ kombeddi mono, Rwot, akuro gin aŋo? Genna tye i komi." 
Psalms39:8 Lara ki i balla ducu. Pe imi adok gin aŋala pa lumiŋ. 
Psalms39:9 Aliŋ woko litik, pe aromo ŋamo doga ka lok; pien in aye ma imiya peko ma kit man." 
Psalms39:10 Pe dok imedde ka pwoda ki odooni; adoŋ me ciŋi ma idoŋa kwede doŋ mito neka woko. 
Psalms39:11 Ka ipwodo dano kun ijuke pi bal, ityeko berre woko macalo nyenye ma camo gin mo ma pire tek bot dano meno; adada dano obedo mere rom ki yweyo mamwa." 
Psalms39:12 “Ai Rwot, winy legana, icik iti iwiny kokona; pe iliŋ woko aliŋa ka akok boti! An a weloni pi kare manok, dok an labedo macalo kwarowa ducu." 
Psalms39:13 Pe inena, nen ka mukene, wek koŋ abed ki yomcwiny mo, ma pud peya aa aweko lobo man woko matwal.”" 
Psalms40:1 Akuro Rwot kun adiyo cwinya; ci en okulle piny owinyo kokona. 
Psalms40:2 En owota woko ki i bur marac, ki i coto manwaŋ, ci oketa acuŋ i wi got, omiyo abedo ka wot atir." 
Psalms40:3 Opwonya ki wer manyen, en wer me pak bot Lubaŋawa. Jo mapol gibineno ci lworo makogi woko, ci gibigeno Rwot." 
Psalms40:4 Tye ki gum dano ma geno Rwot, ma pe lokke ribbe ki jo ma luwakke, dok ma pe ribbe ki jo ma ŋak woko kun giworo cal lubaŋa-gu!" 
Psalms40:5 Ai Rwot Lubaŋana, itiyo tic madito me aura mapol, dok iyubo lwak tam mapol pi konyowa; pe tye ŋat mo macalo in! Ka onoŋo ne ne atuc dok atit pigi, onoŋo gibedo pol makato ma pe gitwero kwano welgi." 
Psalms40:6 Pe imito gitum kadi gityer; ento ityeko yabo ita wek awiny. In pe ipenyo pi gitum awaŋa nyo pi gitum me bal," 
Psalms40:7 Ka doŋ agamo ni, “Nen, an a en; gicoyo lok ma mako koma i buk adolani." 
Psalms40:8 Cwinya bedo yom me tiyo gin ducu ma imito, ai Lubaŋa; amako cikki dok agwoko tye cwinya." 
Psalms40:9 Doŋ atyeko tito lok maber me yomcwiny me larri i dye lwak i cokke madit; nen, pe am iyo doga woko aliŋ aliŋa, kit macalo in bene ineyo-ni, ai Rwot." 
Psalms40:10 Pe akano lok me larri pira kena, e nto aloko pi ada ki pi larri; dok pe amuŋo mar meri ma pe lokke kacel ki adani bot lwak ma i cokke madit." 
Psalms40:11 Ai Rwot, pe itwonna kicani, wek mar meri ma pe lokke, ki adani, gugwoka nakanaka." 
Psalms40:12 Gin marac ma welgi pe kwanne guruma woko dyere; balla doŋ obwoyo koma woko, miyo pe doŋ aneno piny; gipol gikato yer wi ya woko; tekcwiny doŋ orwenyo woko ki bota." 
Psalms40:13 Ai Rwot, mi cwinyi obed yom me lara! Ai Rwot, bin oyotoyot ikonya!" 
Psalms40:14 Wek lewic omak jo ma gimito neka, dok gubed ki anyobanyoba bene; wek gidwokgi cen, wek alee otwodgi, gin jo ma mito tima marac-ci!" 
Psalms40:15 Wek gubed ma piny orem kwedgi woko pi lewic ma doŋ omakogini, gin jo ma giwacca ni, “Aa, Aa!”" 
Psalms40:16 Ento mi jo ducu ma giyenyo in gubed ki yomcwiny madwoŋ komi; dok imi jo ma gimaro larri gumedde ki waco nakanaka ni, “Rwot dit!”" 
Psalms40:17 An gira lacan, dok piny obwoya woko; ento Rwot tamo pira. In aye lakony ki lalarra; ai Lubaŋana, pe igalle!" 
Psalms41:1 Tye ki gum dano ma paro pi lucan! Rwot lare woko i kare me can," 
Psalms41:2 Rwot bigwoko en dok miyo bedo kwo; gilwoŋe ni ŋat ma kome gum i lobo; pe ibimiyo en bot lukworre wek gutime rac macalo gitwero. 
Psalms41:3 Rwot gwoke ka two ma tye i wi kitanda; en caŋo twone woko liweŋ maber. 
Psalms41:4 Ento an, awaco ni, “Ai Rwot, kica omaki i koma; cana, pien atimo bal i komi!”" 
Psalms41:5 Lukworra giwaco lok marac i koma, ni, “En bi to awene, wek nyiŋe orweny woko?”" 
Psalms41:6 Ka ŋat mo obino ka lima, ci loko lwak lok ma tere pe, kun noŋo cwinye opoŋ ki lok me tim aranyi; ka doŋ okato ocito woko, ci tito lokke woko ka maleŋ." 
Psalms41:7 Jo ma daga ducu gigurre kacel ka kwoto nyiŋa; dok gipiro lok marac i koma," 
Psalms41:8 Giwaco ni, “Two marac adada doŋ omake, pe doŋ bitwero a ki i kabuto kadi ki acel.”" 
Psalms41:9 Kadi larema maber atika ma yam ageno, ma ocamo kwonna bene, en aye dok olokke ka timo gin marac i koma." 
Psalms41:10 Ento in, ai Rwot, kica omaki i koma, cana i kom twona-ni wek aa malo, ci abiculo kwor i komgi." 
Psalms41:11 Ka ce lakworra pe loya dok bedo ki wakke i koma, ci miyo aŋeyo ni in kara cwinyi yom i koma." 
Psalms41:12 Ento doŋ ityeko konya pi leŋcwinya, ka doŋ iketa me bedo i nyimi matwal." 
Psalms41:13 Gipak Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, gipake nakanaka! Amen, dok Amen." 
Psalms42:1 Kit macalo til yenyo kwede kulu ma piine tye ka mol, an bene atye ka yenyo ki i cwinya kit meno, ayenyo in, ai Lubaŋa," 
Psalms42:2 Cwinya mito anen Lubaŋa, en Lubaŋa makwo-ni Abicito ka neno waŋ Lubaŋa awene wek awore?" 
Psalms42:3 Pig waŋa doŋ odoko camma i dyeceŋ naka wa i dyewor ducu, ma noŋo dano gipenya teretere ni, “Lubaŋani tye kwene?”" 
Psalms42:4 Cwinya dem woko, ka apo i kom lok magi: kit macalo acito kacel ki lwak kun atelo wigi, ma wawoto i rek ma gurye aryeya me cito i ot pa Lubaŋa, kun lwak gidaŋŋe ki yomcwiny ma giwero wer me pwoc, i kare me kwero nino madito," 
Psalms42:5 Piŋo cwinya poto, dok abedo ki cwercwiny? Dok piŋo awinyo lwak par madwoŋ i cwinya? Pud abigeno Lubaŋa aye, dok abipake bene, Lalar mera ki Lubaŋana," 
Psalms42:6 Cwinya poto, miyo apo piri ki i lobo me Jordan ki Kermon, ki i got Mijar." 
Psalms42:7 Nam madoŋo matut lwoŋo nam wadigi ki i mor pii ki i waŋ acurcurri; biamwonyini ducu me pii ma twagge doŋ otyeko mwonya woko licwic. 
Psalms42:8 Rwot miyo mar mere ma pe lokke ryeny i koma i dyeceŋ; ci i dyewor awero wer me pake, kun alego Lubaŋa ma miyona kwo." 
Psalms42:9 Abiwaco bot Lubaŋa ni, “In gotta; piŋo wii owil woko i koma? Piŋo awoto ma akumo akuma kun lakworra bene una twatwal?”" 
Psalms42:10 Nen calo atye ki bur marac twatwal mudet i koma pien lukworra gibedo ka yeta, kun gipenya teretere ni, “Lubaŋani-ni tye kwene?”" 
Psalms42:11 Piŋo cwinya poto, dok abedo ki cwercwiny? Piŋo awinyo lwak par madwoŋ i cwinya? Pud abigeno Lubaŋa aye, dok abipake bene. Lalar mera ki Lubaŋana." 
Psalms43:1 Ai Lubaŋa, pid pira dok imi alo kop i kom lwak me rok ma pe giŋeyi; lara ki i cin jo maraco ma lubwola." 
Psalms43:2 In aye Lubaŋa ma ariŋo alaro boti; piŋo ibola woko cen ka mabor? Piŋo awoto ma akumo akuma kun lakworra una twatwal? 
Psalms43:3 Doŋ icwal ceŋŋi ki adani; wek gutela, wek gukela i kom got meri maleŋ, wa i odi ka ma ibedo iye!" 
Psalms43:4 Ci abicito wa i kom keno tyer pa Lubaŋa, bot Lubaŋa ma yomo cwinya mada; ka doŋ abipaki ki opul agoya, ai Lubaŋa, Lubaŋana." 
Psalms43:5 Piŋo cwinya poto, dok abedo ki cwercwiny? Piŋo awinyo lwak par madwoŋ i cwinya? Pud abigeno Lubaŋa aye, dok abipake bene, Latar mera ki Lubaŋana." 
Psalms44:1 Ai Lubaŋa, doŋ watyeko winyone ki itwa, dok kwarowa bene gutito botwa, tic ducu ma yam itiyo i karegi, i kare macon muka to:" 
Psalms44:2 iryemo lurok woko ki twero ii kikomi, imiyo joni gubedo i lobogi macalo yadi ma ipito; iuno lwak me rok mapol ento imiyo kwarowa gubedo ki kuc." 
Psalms44:3 Lwakki pe guloyo lobo meno ki pala lucwangi, pe gulimo Loc pi twerogi; ento meno obedo pi tweroni ki pi tekki, dok pi ceŋŋi ma oryeny i komgi; pien onoŋo in cwinyi yom i komgi." 
Psalms44:4 In keken aye Kabakana ki Lubaŋana, ma yam iciko pi loc bot Yakobo." 
Psalms44:5 Pi konnyi miyo wabiryemo lukworwa gidok piny, dok wabinyono jo ma gibino ka monyowa pi nyiŋi." 
Psalms44:6 Pe ageno atumma, dok pala lucwanna bene pe twero Lara." 
Psalms44:7 Ento in aye ma ilarowa ki i cin lukworwa, ci imiyo lewic omako jo ma gidagwa." 
Psalms44:8 Wabedo ka nyatte i Lubaŋa teretere, dok wabimedde ka pwoyo nyiŋi matwal." 
Psalms44:9 Ento in doŋ ityeko bolowa woko dok imiyo wadoko mayot, pe inywako yo me ci to ka lweny kacel ki monywa." 
Psalms44:10 Imiyo walokke ki bot lumerokwa wadwogo woko cen; ci imiyo lukworwa guyako jami mapol ata.’ 
Psalms44:11 Imiyo wadoko calo romi meaneka, dok ikeyowa woko i kin lurok." 
Psalms44:12 Icato lwakki i wel manok mo, pe imito ni gicul wel madwoŋ pigi." 
Psalms44:13 Imiyo luwotwa ma gibedo cok kwedwa giloko lok aŋec i komwa, imiyo jo ma gibedo i kabedo murumowa gicayowa dok giŋalowa." 
Psalms44:14 Imiyo wadoko lok aboka i kin lurok, wadoko ginanyera i kin rok ducu." 
Psalms44:15 Abedo ki cwercwiny dyeceŋ jwi, ma noŋo waŋa olwal woko ki lewic," 
Psalms44:16 pi winyo lok cac pa jo ma giloko lok aŋec i komwa, ki lok pa jo ma ginywarowa, dok pi neno lukworwa ma gin lucul kwor ma gubino ka lewny i komwa," 
Psalms44:17 Man ducu doŋ otimme i komwa, kadi bed wiwa pe owil i komi, dok bene kadi pe watero gicikkeni." 
Psalms44:18 Cwinywa pe oa ki i komi wacel, dok bene pe waŋak wabwoto lubo cikki." 
Psalms44:19 Itenyowa woko liyak i kabedo pa too, iumowa woko lipuk ki colpiny mapek." 
Psalms44:20 Ka ce nene wiwa owil woko i kom nyiŋ Lubaŋawa,’ nyo ka onoŋo wacako woro lubaŋa mukene ma yam pe waŋeyo," 
Psalms44:21 kono Lubaŋa mono pe oroto man oŋeyo woko? En ŋeyo muŋ ducu ma tye i cwiny dano. 
Psalms44:22 En to gibedo ka nekowa dyeceŋ jwi piri, gikwanowa macalo romi me aneka." 
Psalms44:23 Co woko, ai Rwot! Piŋo inino anina? Co woko! Pe ibolwa woko matwal!" 
Psalms44:24 Piŋo ikanne woko ki botwa? Piŋo wii wil woko i kom can ma watyekwede kun iŋeno anena ka giunowa? 
Psalms44:25 Wapoto woko ducu piny i ŋom; waryebbe piny i apwa pien tipowa doŋ ool. 
Psalms44:26 A malo, bin ilarwa! Larwa pi mar meri ma pe lokke!" 
Psalms45:1 Cwinya opoŋ ki lok mabeco adada; lok magi ducu atye ka lokone bot kabaka; leba bit calo leb kal am pa karan ma ladiro. 
Psalms45:2 In keken aye iber ikato co mukenegu woko, pien lok ma iloko ducu obedo me kica keken; pi meno Lubaŋa doŋ otyeko miyi gum woko matwal." 
Psalms45:3 Twe pala lucwanni i emi, in twon oteka, i deyoni ki dit meri!" 
Psalms45:4 Rin ŋwec me loc kikome ki deyo ka lweny pi ada dok pi gwoko kit ma atir; wek ciŋi malacuc otim tim ma kelo lworo. 
Psalms45:5 Ateroni bit, icelo ateroni tllco aduno pa lukworri woko pil; lwak me rok ducu gipoto i te locci,"
