Psalms45:6 Komkerri cal ki komker pa Lubaŋa ci bedo nakanaka, Odoo kerri aye odoo me kit ma atir" 
Psalms45:7 imaro kit ma atir, idag tim maraco. Pi meno Lubaŋa, ma Lubaŋani, doŋ, otyeko wiri ki moo, owiri ki moo me yomcwiny ma kato luwoti mukene ducu." 
Psalms45:8 Ginarukani ducu gikiro iye murra ma ŋwece kur, ki kit moo makur ducu, ki kacia mamit. I gaŋ kaili ma gideyo ki lak Lyec wer pa lugo naŋa-gu miyo cwinyi bedo yom." 
Psalms45:9 Anyira pa kabaka bene gitye i kin monni me awora; daker ocuŋ yo tuŋ ciŋi malacuc ma oruko ruk ma gidero ki jabu me Opir. 
Psalms45:10 Nyara, koŋ iwiny, ci itam mot, dok icik iti; wii myero owil woko i kom lutuwu ki i kom jo me doggola pa kwaru." 
Psalms45:11 Berri bimiyo kabaka miti; en obedo rwodi, gun i nyime iwore." 
Psalms45:12 Jo Turo gibikelo mot mapol boti pi ber ma itimo bot dano, jo ma lulonyo gibilego kony ki boti kun gikelli lwak lonyo mapatpat." 
Psalms45:13 Nyako ker orukke woko maber ki i kicikane ki boŋo ma gideyo maber ki jabu. 
Psalms45:14 Oruko boŋŋi ma raŋigi patpat ma gitere kwede bot kabaka, kun anyira luwote ma gilwoke gilubo kore." 
Psalms45:15 Gitelo wigi kun gitye ki yomcwiny madwoŋ i kare ma gicito ka donyo i gaŋ kal pa kabaka. 
Psalms45:16 Ma ka kwaru ibibedo ki litino awobe; ibiketogi gibedo rwodi i lobo ducu," 
Psalms45:17 Abimiyo gipo pi ywekani i yalwak ducu; dok lwak me rok ducu gibipaki nakanaka. 
Psalms46:1 Lubaŋa aye ka-larrewa dok tekwa bene, en oyubbe me konyowa i kare me can," 
Psalms46:2 Pi meno pe wabibedo ki lworo mo kadi bed lobo lokke, kadi bed godi gupot woko i dye nam" 
Psalms46:3 kadi bed pii me nam mor dok twagge, kadi bed godi giyeŋŋe pi twagge mere matek." 
Psalms46:4 Tye kulu mo ma litino orane kelo yomcwiny i gaŋ pa Lubaŋa, i kabedo maleŋ pa ŋat Mamalo Twa!" 
Psalms46:5 Lubaŋa bedo i dye gaŋŋe, pi meno pe gibitwero balone wacel; Lubaŋa konye woko oyotoyot okogweno." 
Psalms46:6 Rok ducu komgi oonyo koyo, ki ker-gu ducu oyeŋŋe woko; Lubaŋa daŋŋe ki dwan maloŋo, ci lobo leny woko." 
Psalms46:7 Rwot me mony tye kwedwa; Lubaŋa pa Yakobo aye ka-larrewa. 
Psalms46:8 Bin inen gin ma Rwot otiyo, kit macalo omiyo lobo odoŋ obur." 
Psalms46:9 En juko lweny woko i wi lobo ducu; turo atum-gu dok ninyo wa ton woko, waŋo lwak kwot woko liweŋ ki mac." 
Psalms46:10 “Wubed mot, dok wuŋe ni an Lubaŋa, At ye malo i wi rok ducu, dok gidwora i wi lobo ducu!”" 
Psalms46:11 Rwot me mony tye kwedwa; Lubaŋa pa Yakobo aye ka-larrewa. 
Psalms47:1 Wudoŋ ciŋwu, wun lwak ducu me wi lobo ducu! Wudaŋŋe kun wuwero wer me yomcwiny bot Lubaŋa ki dwan maloŋo!" 
Psalms47:2 Rwot, ma en ŋat Mamalo Twal, aye myero gilwor, en kabaka madit ma loyo wi lobo ducu." 
Psalms47:3 En aye omiyo waloyo lwak me rok ducu, oketowa me bedo luloc pa lurok." 
Psalms47:4 En aye ma oyero lobo man ma wabedo iye-ni piwa, man aye gipiny me wakke pa Yakobo ma en maro." 
Psalms47:5 Lubaŋa doŋ oito malo kun lwak gidaŋŋe matek, Rwot oito malo ma lwak gikuto tum-gu." 
Psalms47:6 Wuwer wer me pako Lubaŋa, wuwer wer me pake! Wuwer wer me pako Kabakawa, wuwer wer me pake!" 
Psalms47:7 Lubaŋa aye kabaka ma loyo wi lobo ducu; wuwer wer me pak ki jabuli! 
Psalms47:8 Lubaŋa loyo rok ducu; Lubaŋa bedo i wi komkerre maleŋ," 
Psalms47:9 Rwodi ma giloyo lwak me rok ducu gucokke ma guribbe kacel ki jo pa Lubaŋa pa Abraim. Kwot me wi lobo ducu obedo jami pa Lubaŋa; gidwore matek twatwal! 
Psalms48:1 Rwot dit, pi meno myero gipake matek i gaŋ pa Lubaŋawa!" 
Psalms48:2 Got mere maleŋ ber, dok wiye bor, ma yomo cwiny lwak me wi lobo ducu, en got Cion ma tye ka mabor tun acam, en aye gaŋ pa Kabaka madit." 
Psalms48:3 Ki i gogone Lubaŋa onyutte ni en aye cel matek ma gwoko dano maber. 
Psalms48:4 Nen, luker gucokke, gubino gugurre kacel." 
Psalms48:5 I kare ma guneno, cutcut gubedo ki ur madit mada, lworo omakogi marac, ci guriŋo woko ata." 
Psalms48:6 Komgi omyel matek ki kunnu, arem madwoŋ macalo pa dako ma rem ka nywal omakogi." 
Psalms48:7 Ituro mel me Tarcic ki yamo ma oa tuŋ wokceŋ. 
Psalms48:8 Kit ma watyeko winyone, doŋ bene waneno i gaŋ pa Rwot me mony, i gaŋ pa Lubaŋawa, ma Lubaŋa miyo cuŋ likiŋ nakanaka." 
Psalms48:9 Wabedo ki tam i kom mar meri ma pe lokke, ai Lubaŋa, i dye odi." 
Psalms48:10 Kit macalo nyiŋi oywek kwede-ni, ai Lubaŋa, omiyo pak ma gipaki kwede oromo wi lobo ducu. Ciŋi malacuc opoŋ ki twero meloc;" 
Psalms48:11 wek got Cion obed ki yomcwiny! Wek gaŋi ma i Juda gubed ki yomcwiny pi kit ma iŋolo kwede kop! 
Psalms48:12 Wucit i Cion, wuwot wurum celle woko, wukwan wel lubelene," 
Psalms48:13 ka dok wutam maber i kom celle, wucit wuwot wa i gogone bene; wek wutit bot yalwak ma bilubowu ni," 
Psalms48:14 man aye Lubaŋa, en Lubaŋawa ma bedo nakanaka. En bibedo latelwa matwal." 
Psalms49:1 Wuwiny lok man, wun lwak me rok ducu! Wuwiny, wun jo ducu ma wubedo i wi lobo," 
Psalms49:2 jo ma tye ki rwom ma malo ki jo me rwom ma piny, lulonyo kacel ki lucan." 
Psalms49:3 Abibedo ka tamo tam wek aniaŋ maber ki i cwinya, dok abiloko lok me ryeko keken." 
Psalms49:4 Abiciko ita me winyo carolok; abigonyo te lok me koc-lit ki wer ma agoyo agoya ki opuk. 
Psalms49:5 Omyero abed ki lworo piŋo i kare me can, ma kun noŋo lumonena ma gitima marac guruma woko dyere," 
Psalms49:6 gin jo ma geno lonyogi, ma ginyatte pi lwak lonyo madwoŋ ma gitye kwede?" 
Psalms49:7 Adada, pe tye dano mo ma twero kokke kekene, nyo ma twero miyo wel mo bot Lubaŋa me wilo kwone," 
Psalms49:8 pien gin kok me kwo pa dano welle dit mada, dok pe twero romo" 
Psalms49:9 me miyo en medde ki bedo nakanaka, wek pe ocit i bur." 
Psalms49:10 Iyo, en bineno ki waŋe ni kadi wa jo maryek bene gito, lamiŋ kacel ki ŋat ma wiye odiŋ bene gito kit meno, ci giweko lonyogi doŋ bot jo mukene." 
Psalms49:11 Lyelgi bedo pacogi matwal, bibedo kabedogi pi kare pa yalwak ducu, kadi bed gucak nyiŋ lobo ma gibedo iye ni megi kikomgi." 
Psalms49:12 Dano pe bedo ki deyone matwal; en obedo macalo lee tim ma gito gitum woko. 
Psalms49:13 Man aye can ma poto i kom jo ma tye ki gen me miŋo; man agikki pa jo ma cwinygi yom pi dul jami ma gitye kwede. 
Psalms49:14 Giyerogi giterogi i lyel macalo romi; to aye ma bibedo ka kwayogi. Gibicito atir gidonyo wa i lyel, ci komgi bitop woko; lyel bibedo pacogi." 
Psalms49:15 Ento Lubaŋa bikoko tipona ki i twero pa lyel, pien en gire bigama," 
Psalms49:16 Pe myero lworo omaki ka ce iŋeno ŋat mo doko lalonyo, kadi bed deyo me jami ma i ode tye ka medde ameda." 
Psalms49:17 Pe bitiŋo gin mo cito kwede i kare ma en to; deyo ma en obedo kwede pe bicito lube i bur kunnu. 
Psalms49:18 Kadi bed en tamo ni etye ki yomcwiny i kare ma pud ekwo, ci kadi bed dano gipake pi ticce ma konyo en keken," 
Psalms49:19 en bicito ka bedo kacel ki yalwak pa kwarine i lyel ma pe doŋ gibimedo ki neno cen matwal. 
Psalms49:20 Dano pe bedo ki deyone matwal; en obedo macalo lee tim ma gito gitum woko. 
Psalms50:1 Lubaŋa Matwero-ducu, ma en Rwot, doŋ oloko; en lwoŋo jo me wi lobo ducu cakke ki tuŋ wokceŋ nio kwede tuŋ potoceŋ." 
Psalms50:2 Lubaŋa tye ka ryeny ki i Cion, en gaŋ maber twatwal-li." 
Psalms50:3 Lubaŋawa tye ka bino, en pe biliŋ, mac mager tye ka waŋ i nyime, yamo magwa ma kodo matek orume woko dyere." 
Psalms50:4 En Lwoŋo polo ki malo, ka dok lwoŋo lobo, wek doŋ ecak ŋolo kop i kom lwakke." 
Psalms50:5 En wacci, “Wucok jona ma lugen, wukelgi bota, jo ma guketo gicikke kweda ki gitum!”" 
Psalms50:6 Polo otuco ni Lubaŋa oporre, pien Lubaŋa aye laŋolkop." 
Psalms50:7 “Wuwiny, wun jona, an doŋ abilok, wun jo Icrael, abimiyo lok me caden i komwu. An Lubaŋa, Lubaŋawu," 
Psalms50:8 Pe ajukowu pi lwak gitumwu mapol, ki gitum awaŋa ma wutyero bota kare ki kare." 
Psalms50:9 Pe abigamo twon mo ma wukelo ki i gaŋwu, kadi nyok dyel ma wukwanyo ki i dwolwu." 
Psalms50:10 Lee me buŋa ducu mera, wa lwak dyaŋi ma gitye i wi cere alip kulu-ni bene mera." 
Psalms50:11 Aŋeyo winyo ducu ma gitpk i dye yamo, ki gin mak wo ma gibedo i tim ducu mera." 
Psalms50:12 “Ka ce nene kec neka” pe onoŋo atwero tito botwu; pien lobo ki jami ducu ma tye iye mera. 
Psalms50:13 An mono acamo riŋo twoni, nyo wuneno amato remo nyogi romi?" 
Psalms50:14 Wutyer gityer me miyo pwoc bot Lubaŋa, wucob kwoŋwu bot En Mamalo Twal." 
Psalms50:15 Wukok bota i kare me can; abilarowu, ci wubipaka.”" 
Psalms50:16 Ento bot dano marac Lubaŋa owacci, “Kit twer aŋo ma it ye kwede me kwano cikka, ki me bedo ka loko lok i kom gicikkena?" 
Psalms50:17 In ikwero ni pe myero gijuki, dok ibolo lok ma aciko odok yo tuŋ ŋeyi." 
Psalms50:18 Ka ce iŋeno lak wo, ci imak o doko laremi; dok ibedo kacel ki lutim abor." 
Psalms50:19 “Kare ducu iyubbe me loko gin marac; lok ma a ki i dogi obedo lok goba. 
Psalms50:20 Ka ma ibedo iye icako loko lok marac i kom omeru; ikwoto omeru kikome ma latin pa meru. 
Psalms50:21 Meno ducu itiyo ento an aliŋ aliŋa: itamo ni gwok abedo ŋat mo ma kite rom ki meri-ni. Ento kombeddi ajuki, dok anyutti balli kore kikore." 
Psalms50:22 “Koŋ wutam man, wunjo ma wiwu wil woko i kom Lubaŋa-ni, wek pe atyekwu woko, ci doŋ ŋat mo ma bilarowu bibedo pe." 
Psalms50:23 Ŋat ma miya pwoc macalo gitumme noŋo keto deyo i koma; ki ŋat ma bedo ki kit atir kun lubo cikka abinyuto larra bote.” 
Psalms51:1 Ai Lubaŋa, tima kica pi mar meri ma pe lokke; dok pi kicani madwoŋ jwa balla woko ducu," 
Psalms51:2 Lwok gin marac woko ki i koma, dok ilonya i kom balla." 
Psalms51:3 Aŋeyo balla ducu maber, dok kare ducu wiya po i kom bal ma atimo." 
Psalms51:4 Doŋ atyeko timo bal i komi, i komi keken, kun atimo gin ma nen marac i waŋi; pi meno lok ma iwaco tye atir, dok kop ma iŋolo i kuma tye kakare." 
Psalms51:5 Nen, abedo labalo cakke i kare ma ginywala, i kare ma maa ogamo ic onoŋo an doŋ atye ki bal." 
Psalms51:6 Nen, in imito ni dano obed ki ada i iye; pi meno pwonya ki lok me ryeko wek odony matuti cwinya." 
Psalms51:7 Lonya ki anyero, ci abidoko leŋ; lwoka ci abidoko tar makato pee." 
Psalms51:8 Miya abed ki yomcwiny madwoŋ; mi cogo koma ducu ma yam ituro woko gubed ki yomcwiny bene. 
Psalms51:9 Mi waŋi woko, pe inen rocca, dok ijwa balla woko ducu," 
Psalms51:10 Ai Lubaŋa ma Lacwec, miya abed ki cwiny mulony, ket cwiny manyen ma pe lokke obed iiya." 
Psalms51:11 Pe iryema woko ki i nyimi, dok pe ikwany Cwiny meri maleŋ woko ki bota." 
Psalms51:12 Lara, ci imi dok abed ki yomcwiny; miya cwiny me lubo cikki wek acuŋ matek." 
Psalms51:13 Ci abipwonyo lujemo me lubo yoni, lubalo gibilokke gidwogo boti." 
Psalms51:14 Ai Lubaŋa, lara ki i kom bal alii me oyo remo, in Lubaŋa lalarra, dok abiwero wer me paki ki dwan maloŋo pi kiti ma atir." 
Psalms51:15 Ai Rwot, yab doga, ci abiwero wer me paki." 
Psalms51:16 Gitum ma dano kelo pe mini yomcwiny mo; kadi bed atyer boti gitum awaŋa, pe ibipwoyo." 
Psalms51:17 Gitum ma Lubaŋa pwoyo aye cwiny ma oŋut; ai Lubaŋa, in pe ibicayo ŋat ma cwinye cwer ki ma oŋut." 
Psalms51:18 Tim ber ki Cion muporo bercwinyi, dok icwe cel me Jerucalem odoco." 
Psalms51:19 Ci doŋ cwinyi bibedo yom pi gitum ma atir, pi gitum awaŋa ki gitum ma giwaŋo woko ducu ki berre; ka doŋ gibityero twoni i wi keno tyerri." 
Psalms52:1 In twon oteka, piŋo inyatte pi gin marac ma itimo i kom jo ma ŋeyo Lubaŋa?" 
Psalms52:2 Ipiro lok me tyeko jo mukene woko dyeceŋ jwi. Lebi bit calo lyedi, imaro loko lok goba." 
Psalms52:3 Imaro timo gin marac makato timo gin maber, dok imaro loko lok goba makato loko lok ada." 
Psalms52:4 Imaro miyo arem i kom dano ki lok maraco ma iloko, in dano ma lagoba." 
Psalms52:5 Ento Lubaŋa biŋinyi woko piny matwal; en bimaki ci ywayi woko ki i kemani; biputi woko ki i lobo pa jo makwo. 
Psalms52:6 Jo ma kitgi atir bineno ci gibedo ki lworo, gibinyere kun giwacci," 
Psalms52:7 “Nen, man aye dano ma onoŋo pe mito riŋo ka larre bot Lubaŋa, ento obedo ka geno lwak lonyone madwoŋ-ŋi, dok ogeno ni limme aye kalarrene!”" 
Psalms52:8 Ento an abedo macalo yat jeituni mujany ma tye i ot pa Lubaŋa, Abedo ma ageno mar pa Lubaŋa ma pe lokke nakanaka." 
Psalms52:9 Abipwoyi nakanaka, pien doŋ ityeko tiyo man. Nyiŋi ber, abibedo ka tucone i nyim joni ma giŋeyi," 
Psalms53:1 Dano ma lamiŋ waco ki i cwinye ni, “Lubaŋa gire pe,” Gin jo ma kitgi raco ma gitimo gin me kwer; pe tye ŋat mo ma tiyo gin maber." 
Psalms53:2 Lubaŋa neno dano ducu kun neno piny ki i polo, me neno ka ce tye jo mogo i kingi ma giryek, ma gimito Lubaŋa." 
Psalms53:3 Gin ducu doŋ guŋak woko, gudoko jo ma kitgi raco; pe tye ŋat mo ma tiyo gin maber, pe, kadi ki acel," 
Psalms53:4 Gin lutim maraco-ni, pe gitye ki ŋec? Giyako lim pa jona calo gicamo kwon, ma pe bene gilwoŋo nyiŋ Lubaŋa." 
Psalms53:5 Gitye kunnu ki lworo madwoŋ kit lworo ma yam peya onen! Lubaŋa biketo cogo pa jo ma pe giŋeyo en woko ata; lewic bimakogi, pien Lubaŋa doŋ okwerogi woko." 
Psalms53:6 Iyo, kono bedo ber ka larre pa jo Icrael bino ki i Cion! Ka Lubaŋa bidwoko gum bot jone. Yakobo bibedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, ki Icrael bene cwinye bibedo yom." 
Psalms54:1 Ai Lubaŋa, lara pi nyiŋi, dok imi alo kop pi tweroni." 
Psalms54:2 Winy legana, ai Lubaŋa; cik iti iwiny lok ma awaco." 
Psalms54:3 Jo ma luwakke gubino ka lweny i koma, jo mager gimito neka woko; gin jo ma pe tamo pi Lubaŋa." 
Psalms54:4 Aŋeyo ni Lubaŋa aye lakony mera; Rwot aye ma gwoko kwona. 
Psalms54:5 En biculo kwor i kom lukworra ki gin marac; tyekgi woko liweŋ pien in Lubaŋa ma genne. 
Psalms54:6 Abityero gityer boti pi yomcwiny; abimiyi pwoc, ai Rwot, pien in iber." 
Psalms54:7 Nen doŋ ityeko lara ki i kit can ducu, mumiyo aneno lukworra macalo jo ma doŋ aloyogi woko." 
Psalms55:1 Cik iti iwiny legana, ai Lubaŋa; pe ikanne woko ka abako doga boti!" 
Psalms55:2 Winya, dok igam doga; can doŋ obwoya woko." 
Psalms55:3 Cwinya oballe woko pi winyo woo pa lukworra, ki pi aroma ma jo maraco giuna kwede. Gin aye ma gikelo can i koma kiniga omakogr i koma, guloka adoko lamonegi." 
Psalms55:4 Atye ki arem madwoŋ i cwinya, lworo me to doŋ opoto woko ikoma." 
Psalms55:5 Lworo omaka dok koma bene myel amyela, doŋ tipo koma oto woko lirut," 
Psalms55:6 Omiyo awacci, “Kono nene atye ki bwoma calo akuri! Kono atuk acito woko wek aywe." 
Psalms55:7 Ada, kono atuk acito wa ka mabor, onoŋo atwero buto i dye tim ata," 
Psalms55:8 Onoŋo kono arune oyotoyot pi noŋo kalarre, wek agwokke ki yamo laprru mager ki yamo ma kodo matek.”" 
Psalms55:9 Ai Rwot, bal yubgi ducu, dok irub lebgi woko; pien atye ka neno tim bwami ki lweny ma tye i gaŋ," 
Psalms55:10 Dyeceŋ ki dyewor giwoto ki i wi cel girumo gaŋ woko; dok tim aranyi ki can madwoŋ tye ka nen iye. 
Psalms55:11 Nek tye ka nen i kabedo ducu; wa i cuk-gu gitye ka uno dano ki tim aranyi ki bwola. 
Psalms55:12 Pe lamonena aye ma loko lok aŋec ikoma, ka kumeno kono atwero cirone; pe lakworra aye ma tye ka nywara, ka kumeno kono aa ki bote akanne woko." 
Psalms55:13 Ento man in, ma warom kwedi-ni, ŋat ma wabedo kwede kacel, larema kikome ma doŋ waŋiyo kwede." 
Psalms55:14 Yam wabedo ka boko lok mamit kwedi kacel; i ot pa Lubaŋa bene wawoto ma waribbe kacel. 
Psalms55:15 Wek to obin onekgi woko; wek gulor piny i lyel ma pud gikwo, pien tim maraco tye i dye pacogi," 
Psalms55:16 Ento akok bot Lubaŋa, ci Rwot bilara." 
Psalms55:17 Akok bote kun acur bene, odiko, dyeceŋ ki otyeno; pi meno en biwinyo dwana." 
Psalms55:18 En bilara dok miyo abedo ki kuc ki i lweny ma abedo ka lwenyone, pien jo mapol guero lweny i koma." 
Psalms55:19 Lubaŋa ma obedo i wi komker nia wa con biwinyo kokona, dok bimiyo lewic makogi; pien pe gigwoko cik, dok bene pe gilworo Lubaŋa." 
Psalms55:20 Lawota ma yam ca olwenyo i kom lureme, oturo cikkene ma yam ocikke kwede woko." 
Psalms55:21 Lokke onoŋo pwot makato moo dyaŋ, ento cwinye onoŋo opoŋ mere ki mony; lokke ducu onoŋo kweyo cwinydano macalo moo, ento giŋolo dano macalo pala lucwan." 
Psalms55:22 Kel pekoni ducu bot Rwot, ci en bikonyi; en pe biye ni myero gidir dano ma kite atir woko wacel." 
Psalms55:23 Ento in, ai Lubaŋa, ibiretogi woko piny i bur matut adada; gin jo ma oyo remo pa jo mukene ma gin luroro bene, pe gibibedo ma gicobo nucu kare me kwogi. Ento an abigeno mera in." 
Psalms56:1 Kica omaki i koma, ai Lubaŋa, pien dano doŋ ginyona gidiya woko piny; lumonena giuna dyeceŋ jwi." 
Psalms56:2 Lukworra ginyona woko dyeceŋ jwi, pien jo mapol gilwenyo i koma ma giwakke awaka." 
Psalms56:3 Ka lworo omaka, ai Lubaŋa, agano mera in." 
Psalms56:4 Ageno Lubaŋa, dok apake pi lokke, ageno Lubaŋa laboŋo lworo mo. Dano mamwa-ni kono timo gin aŋo bota?" 
Psalms56:5 Lukworra giketo ayela dyeceŋ jwi i gin ducu ma atiyo; tamgi ducu tye marac pi keto arem i Koma. 
Psalms56:6 Gigurre woko kacel kun giliba, dok guketo cwinygi me neno kit gin ducu ma atimo. Kit macalo gubedo ka kiya kun gimito neka woko," 
Psalms56:7 kumeno myero ipwodgi, iculgi pi balgi; ret lwak man woko piny ki akemoni, ai Lubaŋa," 
Psalms56:8 In doŋ iŋeyo lwak ayelayela ma abedo kwede; dok ibedo ka neno kit ma pig waŋa cwerkwede! Meno ducu pe gicoyo i bukki? 
Psalms56:9 I nino ma abikok iye boti, lukworra gibilokogi gidok cen. Man gin ma aŋeyo, ni, Lubaŋa tye ka lewny pira." 
Psalms56:10 Ageno Lubaŋa, dok apake pi lokke; ageno Rwot, dok apake pi lok ma en oloko;" 
Psalms56:11 ageno Lubaŋa laboŋo lworo mo. Dano mamwa-ni kono twero timo gin aŋo bota? 
Psalms56:12 Abicobo kwonna boti, ai Lubaŋa; abityero gityer me miyo pwoc boti." 
Psalms56:13 In aye ma ilara ki i to, pe iweko tyena ocer apoto piny, Pi meno abedo ka wot i nyim Lubaŋa i ceŋ ma ryeny i kom gin makwo ducu." 
Psalms57:1 Tima kica, ai Lubaŋa, tima kica do, pien ariŋo ka larre boti. Abirino ka larre i te tipo bwomi, nio ka yamo kot ma tyeko dano okato." 
Psalms57:2 Akok bot Lubaŋa Mamalo Twal, bot Lubaŋa ma cobo gin ma en oyubo pira." 
Psalms57:3 Lubaŋa bicwalo mar mere ma pe lokke, kacel ki adane, en bicwalo ki i polo ci lara; en biloyo lukworra ma ginyona woko piny-nyi, dok miyo lewic makogi bene." 
Psalms57:4 Abuto piny i kin labwor ma guwor atika ka mwodo dano. Lakgi bit calo toŋ ki atero, lebgi bene bit calo pala lucwan." 
Psalms57:5 Ai Lubaŋa, nyut ditti malo i polo, dok imi deyoni oryeny i wi lobo ducu!" 
Psalms57:6 Lukworra guciko obwo, gimito maka; cwinya doŋ ool woko ki can. Gukwinyo bur i yo ka ma awoto ki ive, emo gin dok gupoto iye kekengi." 
Psalms57:7 Cwinya omoko i komi, ai Lubaŋa, cwinya omoko i komi ma pe lokke! Abiwero wer kun apaki ki dwan maloŋo!" 
Psalms57:8 In tipona, co woko! Wun naŋa ki opuk bene wuco woko! An bene abicoyo rupiny miyo ceŋ tuc!" 
Psalms57:9 Abimiyo pwoc boti i kin lwak me rok ducu, ai Rwot; abiwero wer me paki i kin lurok." 
Psalms57:10 Mar meri ma pe lokke dit, o wa i polo, dok ada meri bene dit, o wa i pol." 
Psalms57:11 Ai Lubaŋa, nyut ditti malo i polo, dok imi deyoni oryeny i wi lobo ducu!" 
Psalms58:1 Wun tika wumoko lok ma atir, wun luloc? Wun tika wuŋolo kop pa dano ducu ki cwiny ma atir?" 
Psalms58:2 Pe wacel, wupiro lok maraco ki cwinywu; dok wutimo bal ki tim aranyi lobo." 
Psalms58:3 Jo maraco giŋak woko i kare me kwogi ducu, gibalo nia i kare ma ginywalogi iye kun giloko lok goba keken." 
Psalms58:4 Gitye ki kwir marac macalo kwir pa twol, gidiŋo itgi woko akaka calo twol uwu ma diŋo ite," 
Psalms58:5 ni wek pe cwiny dwan lutim yatyat i kom twol, wek pe cwiny dwan latim jokjok maryek." 
Psalms58:6 Ai Lubaŋa, tur lakgi woko; dok iput lak litino labwor mager-ri woko, ai Rwot!" 
Psalms58:7 Wek gutum woko macalo pii ma mol cito woko; wek ginyongi piny calo lum ci gutwo woko. 
Psalms58:8 Wek gubed macalo okoro ma obab woko, nyo macalo latin ma gibwogo abwoga ma pe oneno cen," 
Psalms58:9 Ma pud peya guŋeyo myero gitoŋgi woko macalo yadi okuto; Lubaŋa omi yamo okolgi otergi woko ki kiniga madwoŋ! 
Psalms58:10 Jo ma kitgi atir gibibedo ki yomcwiny ka guneno culo kwor man; dok gibilwoko tyengi ki remo pa jo maraco. 
Psalms58:11 Dano gibiwacci, “Adada jo ma kitgi atir gilimo bakacic; adada Lubaŋa ma ŋolo kop i lobo bene tye.”" 
Psalms59:1 Lara ki i ciŋ lukworra, ai Lubaŋa, gwoka ki i kom jo ma bino ka lweny i koma;" 
Psalms59:2 lara ki bot jo ma lutim maraco, ki i kom jo ma gioyo remo pa dano," 
Psalms59:3 Nen, gubuto gikiya gimito neka woko; gin jo mager-ri guribbe woko ka lweny i koma. Pe pi gin marac mo nyo bal ma an atimo, ai Rwot," 
Psalms59:4 pe atimo kit roc mo, ma omiyo giriŋo oyotoyot i kakannegi," 
Psalms59:5 A ibin, in Rwot Lubaŋa me mony ci ilara; dok inengi piri keni, Lubaŋa pa Icrael! Co woko ipwod lwak me rok ducu; pe myero itrm kica ki ŋat mo kadi ki acel ki i kom lutim roro ma gipiro lok me timo tim maraco," 
Psalms59:6 Otyeno otyeno gidwogo cen kun gikok calo gwogi, ka giwoto girumo kwede gaŋ." 
Psalms59:7 Koŋ iwiny gin ma giwaco! Lok ma i doggi bit calo pala lucwan. Gttamo tam ki i cwinygi ma giwacci, “Aŋa kono ma biwinyo lok ma wawaco?”" 
Psalms59:8 Ento in inyerogi anyera, ai Rwot; dok inalo rok ducu aŋala." 
Psalms59:9 In i tekka, abiwero wer me paki; pien in i cel gogona, ai Lubaŋa," 
Psalms59:10 Lubaŋana ma mara ki mar mere ma pe lokke bibino bota; en bimiyo aneno lukworra macalo jo ma doŋ aloyogi woko. 
Psalms59:11 Pe inekgi woko, miyo lutuwa wigi wil; ketgi woko ata ki tweroni ci ityekgi woko, ai Rwot, in kwotwa!" 
Psalms59:12 Doggi opoŋ ki bal, giloko lok me bal keken; mi gumok woko i owic pi wakkegi! Pi lok me ceno dano ki goba ma giloko," 
Psalms59:13 myero ityekgi woko ki akemoni; tyekgi waŋ ma gutum woko liweŋ. Man bimiyo lwak ducu ŋeyo ni, Lubaŋa aye ma loyo jo pa Yakobo nio i agikki lobo." 
Psalms59:14 Otyeno otyeno gidwogo cen, kun gikok calo gwogi, ka giwoto girumo kwede gaŋ." 
Psalms59:15 Giwoto atata giyenyo cam, gibedo ka ŋur aŋura ka peya guyeŋ," 
Psalms59:16 Ento an abiwero wer ma apaki kwede pi tekki, abiwero wer matek odiko con pi mar meri ma pe lokke. In aye ibedo cel gogona, dok in kalarrena i nino ma atye ki can." 
Psalms59:17 In i tekka, abiwero wer me paki, pien in i cel gogona, ai Lubaŋa, in Lubaŋa ma imara ki mar ma pe lokke." 
Psalms60:1 Ai Lubaŋa, ikwerowa dok iloyowa woko do; kiniga ceŋ omaki i komwa; aya, ye wadwog boti do!" 
Psalms60:2 Imiyo lobo oyeŋŋe, ibaro dyere woko; yub ka ma obarre-ni, pien yeŋŋe, mito poto woko." 
Psalms60:3 Imiyo lwakki gulimo arem me can matego; imiyowa koŋo vino wama to, wamer, wabaŋŋe woko." 
Psalms60:4 Iŋabo bendera malo pi jo ma gilwori, wek guriŋ iye gularre ki i lak atum." 
Psalms60:5 Larwa ki tekki imi walo lukworwa, dok igam legawa, wek lwak ma imaro gubwot." 
Psalms60:6 Lubaŋa oloko ki i kabedone maleŋ ni,’ “Abipoko Cekem woko ki deyo madit me loc, dok abipoko nota me Cukot woko i dul i dul bot jona." 
Psalms60:7 Gilead mera, ki Manace bene mera; Epraim aye tok nyonyo me wiya, ki Juda mere odoo kerra." 
Psalms60:8 Ento Moab aye becen me lwokka; ki Edom mera, obedo ka bolo warra; dok abidaŋŋe matek me loc i kom jo Pilciti.”" 
Psalms60:9 Aŋa ma bikela i gaŋ man ma girumo ki cel gogo? Aŋa ma bitelo wiya tera i Edom? 
Psalms60:10 In pe doŋ ikwerowa woko, ai Lubaŋa? In pe doŋ inywako yo ki dul monywa me cito ka lewny, ai Lubaŋa." 
Psalms60:11 Konywa me lewny i kom lukworwa, pien kony ma dano miyo pe gin mo!" 
Psalms60:12 Ka Lubaŋa tye ka lewny kacel kwedwa ci wabiloyo; en aye ma binyono lukworwa diyogi woko piny. 
Psalms61:1 Winy kokona, ai Lubaŋa, dok iwiny legana." 
Psalms61:2 Akok boti ki ka mabor, ki i agikki lobo, ka cwinya doŋ odem woko. Tela itera i kom got mabor ma kata;" 
Psalms61:3 pien in aye ka larrena, in cel matek ma igwoka i kom lukworra." 
Psalms61:4 Wek abed i kemani nakanaka! Wek akanne i te bwomi abed ki kuc! 
Psalms61:5 In doŋ ityeko winyo lokka, ai Lubaŋa, dok ityeko miya gipiny pa jo ma gilworo nyiŋi," 
Psalms61:6 Med mwaka mapol i kom nino me kwo pa kabaka; wek obed nakanaka i kare pa yalwak ducu! 
Psalms61:7 Mi en obed i wi komker nakanaka i nyimi, ai Lubaŋa; dok igwoke ki mar meri ma pe lokke, ki adani." 
Psalms61:8 Pi meno abiwero wer kun apa ko nyiŋi, kun acobo bene kwonna ma akwoŋo i nyimi nino ki nino." 
Psalms62:1 Ageno mera Lubaŋa keken kun abedo aliŋ gira mot; pien larra a ki bote. 
Psalms62:2 En kene aye got ki Lalarra, en cel gogo ma gwoka, pe gibidira cen wacel." 
Psalms62:3 Wun ducu mono wubiero lweny i kom dano pi kare ma rom mene, wek wuloye wo ko calo cel ma doŋ cok poto?" 
Psalms62:4 Giyubo lok me kwanye woko ki i rwom me dit wek gidwoke piny. Ginoŋo yomcwiny i loko lokgoba, Gulamo gum i kom dano ki lok doggi nono, ento ki i cwinygi giceno dano acena." 
Psalms62:5 Ageno mera Lubaŋa keken kun abedo aliŋ gira mot, pien genna ducu a ki bote." 
Psalms62:6 En aye got ki Lalarra, en cel gogo ma gwoka, pe gibiyena wacel." 
Psalms62:7 Lar kacel ki deyona ducu tye bot Lubaŋa; en aye gotta matek, dok en aye kalarrena." 
Psalms62:8 Wun dano, wugen Lubaŋa kare ducu, wuyab cwinywu woko ducu bote; Lubaŋa aye kalarrewa," 
Psalms62:9 Dano ma rwomgi piny gubedo calo yamo me yweyo mamwa, dok jo ma tye ki rwom ma malo bene obedo gin ma pe genne. Ka gipimogi i mijan gitiŋŋe malo, ma gin ducu kacel noŋo giyot makato yamo me yweyo nono." 
Psalms62:10 Pe wuket genwu i kom tim me bumo dano, pe wugen tim me yak, pien konnye pe; kadi bed lonyowu tye ka medde, pe wuket cwinywu iye." 
Psalms62:11 Lubaŋa oloko lok makato tyen acel woko ni, en a ye e won twero;" 
Psalms62:12 dok ni in Rwot aye i won mar ma pe lokke. In, giri iculo dano acel acel muporo kit ticce." 
Psalms63:1 Ai Lubaŋa, in Lubaŋana, atye ka yenyi, kwona ducu ocuŋ piri; koma doŋ ool woko pi miti, calo abedo i lobo mutwo, muti, ma pii pe iye." 
Psalms63:2 Pi meno abedo ka yenyi i kabedoni maleŋ, pi neno tweroni kacel ki deyoni." 
Psalms63:3 Mar meri ma pe lokke ber kato kwo, pi meno abipaki gira kare ducu." 
Psalms63:4 Abipwoyi pi kare me kwona ducu; abikok boti kun ataŋo ciŋa," 
Psalms63:5 Ayeŋ calo acamo moo ma ii cogo ki moo dwolo, abiwero wer kun apaki ki yomcwiny madwoŋ." 
Psalms63:6 Kadi ka atye i wi kitandana wiya po i komi, dok abedo ka lwodo lok i komi dyewor benebene;" 
Psalms63:7 pien ibedo lakonya kare ducu, dok akanne i tipo te bwomi kun awero wer pi yomcwiny." 
Psalms63:8 Amoko i komi woko Iikiŋ, ci ikwaka woko maber ki ciŋi malacuc." 
Psalms63:9 Ento jo ma giyenya ma gimito neka gibidonyo gicito piny i te ŋom matut. 
Psalms63:10 Gibinekogi woko i lweny ki pala lucwan, gibidoko cam pa too me tim." 
Psalms63:11 Ento kabaka bibedo mere ki yomcwiny pi Lubaŋa; jo ducu ma gikwoŋo kwoŋ ki nyiŋe gibipake; ento jo ma lugoba gibiumo doggi woko lipuk. 
Psalms64:1 Winy dwana ma akok kwede boti, ai Lubaŋa; atye ki lworo, lara do ki i cin lukworra!" 
Psalms64:2 Gwoka ki i kom lok pa jo maraco ma gipiro i koma i muŋ, konya i kom lwak lutim maraco." 
Psalms64:3 Gipako lebgi calo gipako pala lucwan, ma giketo cwinygi i loko lok makec calo atero ma gimito celone." 
Psalms64:4 Gikanne, gibayo aterogi kun gicelo ki dano ma pe ki bal mo, gibayo aterogi gicelo woko oyotoyot laboŋo lworo mo," 
Psalms64:5 Tamgi omoko likiŋ i kom gin marac ma giparo me timone; gitye ka lok kekengi pi ciko owicgi i muŋ, kun gitamo ni, “Aŋa ma twero nenowa?" 
Psalms64:6 Aŋa kono ma ‘twero yenyo balwa wek enoŋ? Wabedo ki tam, omiyo wapiro lok me ryeko ma pe wacce.” Gin ma tye i tam ki i cwiny dano niaŋ Iye tek, pien tye ka matut!" 
Psalms64:7 Ento Lubaŋa bicelo aterone cito i komgi; ci gibilimo ret woko oyotoyot. 
Psalms64:8 En bityekogi woko matwal pi lokgi ma giloko; dano ducu ma binekogi gibiyeŋo wigi. 
Psalms64:9 Bimiyo jo ducu gibedo ki lworo; ci gibitito pi gin ma Lubaŋa otimo, kun gitamo bene mot pi gin ma en otyeko tiyone." 
Psalms64:10 Wek jo ma kitgi atir gubed ki yomcwiny i Rwot, dok guriŋ gular bote, wek jo ducu ma cwinygi atir gupake!" 
Psalms65:1 Dano myero gupaki i Cion, ai Lubaŋa; dok myero gumini gin ducu ma yam gukwoŋo pire," 
Psalms65:2 pien in aye ma igamo Iega-gu ducu. Dano ducu gibibino boti 
Psalms65:3 pi balgi ma gutimo. I kare ma timwa marac doŋ obwoyowa, in itimowa kica iweko bal wa." 
Psalms65:4 Dano ma iyero ka ikelo cok boti tye ki gum, me bedo i dyekal me kabedoni maleŋl Wabiyen ki jami ducu mabeco ma tye i odi, ma en aye kabedoni maleŋl" 
Psalms65:5 Igamo legawa, ai Lubaŋa Lalarwa, ilarowa kun itiyo jamimadito me aura ma kelo lworo. Jo ducu ma gibedo ilobo gigeno in, kadi wa jo ma gibedo ka ma lobo ogik iye, ki jo ma gibedo ka mabor wa i agikki nam" 
Psalms65:6 Iciba godi ocuŋ i kabedogi ki tekki, ma irukke woko ki tweroni madwoŋ." 
Psalms65:7 In aye ma ijuko mor pa nam ki twagge pa biamwonyi bene; dok ijuko woo pa lwak me rok ducu," 
Psalms65:8 Mumiyo dano ducu ma gibedo ka mabor i wan apokki me agikki lobo gitye ki lworo pi lanyut ma itiyo; dok Imiyo lwak gigoyo kijira pi yomcwiny cakke tuŋ wokceŋ o kwede wa i tuŋ potoceŋ. 
Psalms65:9 Ibino i lobo ci imiyo kot cwer iye, imiyo lobo cekocam mabup; kuluni ducu ma iketo Poŋ woko ki pii; in bene ma imiyo bel cek, pien in yam iyubo kumeno." 
Psalms65:10 Imiyo kot cwer bino i potti ma gipuro ki kweri dyaŋ, dok ipiro ŋom mutiŋŋe ma i dyere woko maber, imiyo kot cwer iye madwoŋ obido woko, dok imiyo gum i kom kodi ducu ma i poto gitwi gidoŋo maber." 
Psalms65:11 Mwaka ki mwaka imiyo cam cek bot dano madwoŋ pi gum ma imiyo; yo ma gadigadini wok ki iye mol moo keken. 
Psalms65:12 Olet ma i tim ducu opoŋ ki dyaŋi keken, jo ma gibedo i ŋet godi ducu gitye ki yomcwiny madwoŋ," 
Psalms65:13 Bar kwat ducu opoŋ ki lwak romi ma pe wacce, nota-gu ducu opoŋ ki kal ma tye ka doŋo iye, gigoyo kijira ma giwero wer kacel ki yomcwiny." 
Psalms66:1 Wun jo ducu ma wubedo i wi lobo, wugo kijira bot Lubaŋa ki yomcwiny;" 
Psalms66:2 wuwer wer pi pako deyo me nyiŋe, wupake ki pak me deyo adada!" 
Psalms66:3 Wuwac bot Lubaŋa ni, “Gin me aura ducu ma itiyo ma kelo lworo ditte rom mene! Tweroni giri dit mada, miyo lumoneni ducu gimwolle amwola i nyimi." 
Psalms66:4 Dano ducu ma i lobo giworo in; giwero wer me paki, kun giwero wer gipako nyiŋi.”" 
Psalms66:5 Wubin, wunen gin ma Lubaŋa otiyo; otiyo gin ma kela lworo mada i kin dano." 
Psalms66:6 Oloko nam odoko ŋom mutwo; omiyo dano guwoto ki tyengi ki i dye kulu gukato loka tuŋcel, mumiyo wabedo ki yomcwiny pi gin ma en otiyo kunnu." 
Psalms66:7 En loyo loc nakanaka ki tek me twerone, dok ciko waŋe me neno rok ducu. Jo ma gin lujemo myero pe gukette malo pigi kengi." 
Psalms66:8 Wupwo Lubaŋa, wun lwak me rok ducu, wuwek dwan me pak ma wupake kwede owinnye." 
Psalms66:9 En mugwokowa omiyo pud wakwo, dok pe oweko tyenwa ocer kadi ki acel." 
Psalms66:10 In doŋ ityeko temowa, ai Lubaŋa; doŋ itemowa macalo ryal ma giliyo i mac." 
Psalms66:11 Ikelowa imiyo wamoko i obwo; dok bene icibo yec mapek me can I ŋewa ni watiŋ," 
Psalms66:12 Iweko lukworwa giŋweco ginyono wiwa woko piny; wawotoki i dye mac wa i dye pii, ento in doŋ ikelowa wao i kabedo malac me kuc." 
Psalms66:13 Abibino i odi kun akelo boti gityer me gitum awaŋa; abicobo kwonna i nyimi kun amiyi gin ma yam acikke pire. 
Psalms66:14 Abimiyo gin ma doŋ awaco ki doga ni abimini, gin ma acikke pire i kare ma onoŋo atye i can." 
Psalms66:15 Abityero boti gitum awaŋa me lim makwo ma gucwe, dok abidunyo boti yito mac ma giwaŋo ki gitum me nyogi romi; abityero boti twoni dyaŋi kacel ki dyegi." 
Psalms66:16 Wubin wuwiny, wun jo ducu ma wulworo Lubaŋa, ci abitito botwu gin ma Lubaŋa otiyo pira." 
Psalms66:17 Cen akok bote matek, dok bene apake ki wer pi dworo nyiŋe." 
Psalms66:18 Ka nene aumo balla i cwinya, kono Rwot pe owinyo kokona wacel." 
Psalms66:19 Adada Lubaŋa doŋ owinyo kokona; doŋ owinyo legana ducu," 
Psalms66:20 Gipwo Lubaŋa, pien pe okwero winyo legana, dok bene pe okwanyo mar mere ma pe lokke woko ki i koma." 
Psalms67:1 Lubaŋa onyutwa kicane dok omiwa gum, ci onenwa bene ki waŋ me kica," 
Psalms67:2 wek dano ma i lobo ducu guŋe kiti; nyut bene twero me larri bot rok ducu. 
Psalms67:3 Mi rok ducu me wi lobo gupaki, ai Lubaŋa: wek lwak me rok ducu gupaki!" 
Psalms67:4 Wek lurok ducu cwinygi obed yom kun giwero wer me pwoc, pien in aye iŋolo kop pa rok ducu maromrom, dok in aye ma it ye ka telo rok ducu me wi lobo," 
Psalms67:5 Mi rok ducu me wi lobo gupaki, ai Lubaŋa; wek lwak me rok ducu gupaki!" 
Psalms67:6 Lobo doŋ oceko cam mabup: Lubaŋa ma Lubaŋawa doŋ omiyowa gum. 
Psalms67:7 Lubaŋa doŋ omiyowa gum; pi meno dano ma i lobo ducu myero guwore. 
Psalms68:1 Wek Lubaŋa oa malo, ci oket lukworre woko atata; wek jo ma kwere ducu gurin woko ki i nyime!" 
Psalms68:2 Macalo yito duny cito woko, gin bene gibirwenyo woko kit meno; macalo odok kic leny woko ka giketo i ŋet mac, wek jo maraco bene guto woko i nyim Lubaŋa kit meno!" 
Psalms68:3 Ento wek jo ma kitgi atir gubed ki yomcwiny; wek gunyatte ki yomcwiny madwoŋ i nyim Lubaŋa; wek gudaŋŋe ma yomcwiny mito nekogi woko! 
Psalms68:4 Wuwer bot Lubaŋa, wuwer wer wupak nyiŋe; wuil dwanwu malo ki wer bot en ma tye ka ŋwec ki gadigadine i wi pol; nyiŋe Rwot, wudwore, dok wubed ki yomcwiny i nyime." 
Psalms68:5 En won jo ma wongi pe, dok en bene magwoko mon to; en Lubaŋa ma bedo i ot mere maleŋ." 
Psalms68:6 Lubaŋa miyo paco bot jo mudoŋ kengi ma piny oloyo, wek gubed iye; en aye ma kwanyo lumabuc woko ki i ot kol mot maber miyo gibedo ki kuc; ento jo ma gin lujemo gibedo i lobo mutwo." 
Psalms68:7 Ai Lubaŋa, i kare ma itelo wi lwakki, i kare ma iwoto kwedgi ki i dye tim," 
Psalms68:8 ŋom oyeŋŋe, kot bene oa ki i polo ocorre i lobo, got Cinai bene oyeŋŋe i nyim Lubaŋa; oyeŋŋe i nyim Lubaŋa ma en Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael." 
Psalms68:9 Imiyo kot madwoŋ ocwer i lobo, ai Lubaŋa; iroco loboni muol-li woko odoco." 
Psalms68:10 Lwakki gubedo iye macalo pacogi; dok bene pi berri, ai Lubaŋa, ipito jo ma piny obwoyogi ki cam." 
Psalms68:11 Rwot omiyo cik, doŋ mon mapol gutiŋo lok maber miyo nya kun giwacci," 
Psalms68:12 “Luker kacel ki monygi gitye ka riŋo woko ariŋa!” Mon ma gudoŋ paco gupoko jami ma giyako woko i kingi. 
Psalms68:13 Kadi gibuto i dwol romi, ginen calo akuri ma gidero bwome ki ryal, dok yece gidero ki jabu ma obedo alumalum." 
Psalms68:14 Ka Lubaŋa Matwero-ducu oketo luker woko i wi got Jalmon, ci omiyo pee bene ocwer kunnu." 
Psalms68:15 Got Bacan kara tek kuman, got ma lacol wiye pol, en got me Bacan!" 
Psalms68:16 In got ma lacol wii dwon-ni, piŋo iŋeno piny ki nyeko, wa i wi got ma Lubaŋa oyero me bedo iye-ni? Iyo, Rwot bibedo kunnu matwal!" 
Psalms68:17 Rwot oa ki i got Cinai bino i kabedone maleŋ ki lwak gadigadi matego ma romo alip ki alip. 
Psalms68:18 Iito wa i wi got malo, kun icoko lwak opii cito kwedi, dok ibedo ka gamo mot ki bot dano, kadi wa ki bot jo ma yam gujemo woko. Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ bibedo kunnu." 
Psalms68:19 Gipwo Rwot, pien nino ki nino en tinowa wa ki pekowa ducu i kore; Lubaŋa aye Lalarwa." 
Psalms68:20 Lubaŋawa en Lubaŋa me lar; en Rwot Lubaŋawa, ma larowa ki i to," 
Psalms68:21 Ento Lubaŋa bigoyo wi lukworre turo woko, bigoyo wi dano ma yer wigi boco-gu ma gilubo timgi me bal." 
Psalms68:22 Rwot owacci, “Abidwokogi cen ki i Bacan, abiwotogi ka maleŋ ki i te nam matut," 
Psalms68:23 wek wubin wulwok tyenwu ki remogi, wek gwogiwu bene gunaŋ remo pa lukwor madwoŋ macalo gimito.”" 
Psalms68:24 Ai Lubaŋa, jo ducu gitye ka neno wotti, wot pa Lubaŋa ma Lakerra, ma cito kwede i kabedone maleŋ," 
Psalms68:25 Luwer gutelo nyim, lugo wer gudoŋ i ŋec, ka doŋ anyira ma gigoyo ajaa gubedo i dyere." 
Psalms68:26 “Gipwo Lubaŋa i cokke madit pa lwakke, wupak Rwot, wun likwayo pa Icrael ducu!”" 
Psalms68:27 Mutelo yo bino ca-ni aye Benjamin, ma en kaka matidi, ka rwodi me Juda ki lwakgi madwoŋ gulubo, ka doŋ rwodi me Jabulon ki rwodi me Naputali i korgi." 
Psalms68:28 Nyut tweroni, ai Lubaŋa; nyut tekki, ai Lubaŋa, en tek ma itiyo kwede piwa-ni." 
Psalms68:29 Pi odi ma tye i Jerucalem, omiyo luker gikelo mot gityero boti" 
Psalms68:30 Juk lee tim mager ma gibedo i kin lagada, gin lwak twoni ki litino dyaŋi pa lurok. Nyon jo ma yenyo lim ajog woko piny ki tyeni; ket lwak me rok ma cwinygi yom pi lweny-gu woko ata." 
Psalms68:31 Wek gikel mola ki i Ejipt; dok wek jo Etiopia gubin oyotoyot ka ryeyo ciŋgi bot Lubaŋa. 
Psalms68:32 Wuwer wer bot Lubaŋa, wun ker ducu ma i wi lobo; wuwer wer me pak bot Rwot;" 
Psalms68:33 Wuwer wer bot en ma tye ka wot i wi polo, en wi polo macon; winy, en tye ka daŋŋe ki dwan matek adada." 
Psalms68:34 Wutit pi twero pa Lubaŋa, ma dit me locce tye i Icrael, ma twerone bene tye malo i polo." 
Psalms68:35 Lubaŋa me aura ma kelo lworo tye i kabedone maleŋ, en Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ma miyo twero ki tek bot jone. Gipwo Lubaŋal" 
Psalms69:1 Lara, ai Lubaŋa! Nen pii doŋ omwonya woko oo wa i ŋuta." 
Psalms69:2 Alwiny woko i coto ka matut, ka ma gin mo pe ma atwero cuŋ i kome; amwony woko i pii matut, ki biamwonyi me pii ma tagge bene kato ki i wiya." 
Psalms69:3 Doŋ aol woko ki koko pi kony; dwana doŋ okak woko. Waŋa-gu bene doŋ ocido woko pi kuro kony ma a ki bot Lubaŋana 
Psalms69:4 Jo ma daga nonono laboŋo tyen lok mo gipol ma gikato yer wiya woko; jo ma gin lukworra ma giloko lok goba pi lweny i koma gitek dok gimito neka woko. Gimito adwok jami ma pe akwalo akwala cen, kun pe akwalo gin mo." 
Psalms69:5 Ai Lubaŋa, iŋeyo minona; dok balla ducu ma atiyo pe okanne ki boti wacel." 
Psalms69:6 Pe iwek aket lewic i kom jo ma geno in, ai Rwot Lubaŋa me mony. Dok pe iwek akel can i kom dano ma giworo in, ai Lubaŋa pa Icrael." 
Psalms69:7 Aciro yet madwoŋ mada pi nyiŋi, omiyo lewic oumo waŋa woko lipuk." 
Psalms69:8 Adoko calolarok not utmegina, dok macalo ŋat ma labedo ki bot litino awobe pa maa." 
Psalms69:9 Arima pi odi mito neka woko, dok yet pa dano ma giyeti kwede bene doŋ otyeko poto i koma," 
Psalms69:10 Ikare ma amwolle kena i cwinya kun ari kec, meno odoko lok anywar i koma." 
Psalms69:11 Ikare ma abedo ka rukke ki boŋo cola, alokke adoko lok aboka i kin dano." 
Psalms69:12 Jo ma bedo i dog cel gibedo ka loko lok i koma ma pe wacce, lumero bene giwera awera ki wer." 
Psalms69:13 Ento ki tuŋ bota, ai Rwot, akelo legana mere boti. Gam Legana i kare ma iyero, ai Lubaŋa, pi mar meri madwoŋ ma pe lokke, pien igwoko cikkeni pi Laro joni." 
Psalms69:14 Lara wek pe alwiny woko i coto: lara ki i ciŋ lukworra, lara bene ki i pii matut." 
Psalms69:15 Pe iwek biamwonyi otagge omwony wiya woko, pe iwek amwony woko i pii matut, kadi ki donyo piny i bur lyel." 
Psalms69:16 Gam doga, ai Rwot, pien mar meri ma pe lokke ber; lokke bota pi kicani madwoŋ." 
Psalms69:17 Pe ikanne woko ki bot laticci; gam doga oyotoyot kombeddi, pien atye i can," 
Psalms69:18 Nyik cok bota ikoka, lara ki i ciŋ lukworra." 
Psalms69:19 Iŋeyo kit anywar ducu ma ginywara kwede, ki kit ma gimiya kwede lewic marac mada; doŋ in iŋeyo lumonena ducu." 
Psalms69:20 Cwinya oballe woko pi yet ma giyeta kwede, omiyo doŋ pe atye ki kit gen mo. Ayenyo ŋat ma twero nyuto kicane i koma, ento pe anoŋo; ayenyo jo ma myero gukwe cwinya, ento ŋat mo pe." 
Psalms69:21 Gumiya kwir marac ma kaka cam, dok i kare ma orwo pii oneka gumiya koŋo vino mawac ni amati." 
Psalms69:22 Wek karamagi ma gicamo-ni otyekgi woko macalo owic; karama me gityer ma gicamo-ni myero olokke odok owic ma makogi. 
Psalms69:23 Mi waŋgi ocor woko, wek pe gunen piny; mi pyergi onyonne obed ka myel amyela nakanaka." 
Psalms69:24 To akemoni woko ducu i komgi, mi kinigani malyet-ti otyekgi woko." 
Psalms69:25 Mi gonygi odok obur, pe iwek ŋat mo odoŋ obed i kemagi." 
Psalms69:26 Giyelo dano ma in doŋ ityeko pwodo, dok giketo can gimedo ameda i kom jo ma yam doŋ ityeko keto ret i komgi." 
Psalms69:27 Medde ki keto can i komgi muporo balgi, pe ikwany kop woko ki i wigi kadi ki acel," 
Psalms69:28 Jwa nyiŋgi woko ki i buk ma nyiŋ jo makwo ducu gicoyo iye-ni; pe iwek gico nyiŋgi i kin nyiŋ jo ma kitgi atir. 
Psalms69:29 An doŋ atye i can ki arem madwoŋ: wek larri oketa malo, ai Lubaŋal" 
Psalms69:30 Abipako nyiŋ Lubaŋa ki wer; abidworo nyiŋe kun amiye pwoc. 
Psalms69:31 Pwoc man biyomo cwiny Rwot makato twon dyaŋ, nyo twon ma tuŋe olot, ma oboŋe dito," 
Psalms69:32 Wek jo ma giunogi gunen, gubed ki yomcwiny; wun jo ma wutye ka yenyo Lubaŋa, wubed ki kwo manyen i cwinywu." 
Psalms69:33 Rwot winyo koko pa dano ma piny obwoyogi, dok pe cayo jone kikome ma gitweyogi i mabuc." 
Psalms69:34 Wek polo ki lobo ducu gupake, nam ki jami makwo ducu ma tye ka wot iye." 
Psalms69:35 Lubaŋa bilaro jo Cion dok bigero gaŋi me Juda odoco; luticce gibibedo kunnu, gibicamo doko megi;" 
Psalms69:36 litino pa luticce gibileyo doko megi, dok jo ma mare gibibedo iye." 
Psalms70:1 Ai Lubaŋa, mi cwinyi obed yom me lara’ Ai Rwot, bin oyotoyot ikonya!" 
Psalms70:2 Wek Lewic omak jo ma gimito neka dok gubed ki anyobanyoba bene; wek gidwokgi cen, wek alee otwodgi, gin jo ma mito tima marac-ci!" 
Psalms70:3 Wek gubed ma piny orem kwedgi woko pi lewic ma doŋ omakogini, gin jo ma giwacca ni, “Aa, Aa!”" 
Psalms70:4 Ento mi dano ducu ma giyenyo in gubed ki yomcwiny madwoŋ i komi; dok imi jo ma gimaro larri gumedde ki waco nakanaka ni, “Lubaŋa dit!”" 
Psalms70:5 An gira lacan, dok piny obwoya woko; bin bota oyotoyot, ai Lubaŋal In aye lakony ki lalarra; ai Rwot, pe igalle!" 
Psalms71:1 Ariŋo alaro boti, ai Rwot; pe imi lewic omaka!" 
Psalms71:2 Kit macalo in kiti at ir-ri, lara dok ikonya; cik iti iwiny legana, ci ilara!" 
Psalms71:3 Bed got me kalarrena, dok ibed cel gogo matek ma gwoka; pien in i got ki cel gogona." 
Psalms71:4 Lara ki i ciŋ jo maraco do, ai Lubaŋana, lara ki i twero pa jo mager ma lubwami." 
Psalms71:5 Genna ducu tye i komi, ai Rwot; abedo ka geno in cakke wa ka tinona." 
Psalms71:6 Cakke ma ginywala abedo ka jeŋŋe i komi; in aye ma yam ikwanya ki i ot nyodo pa maa. Abibedo ka pako in nino ducu," 
Psalms71:7 Abedo ginaura bot jo mapol, ento in aye kalarrena matek." 
Psalms71:8 Abedo ka paki dyeceŋ jwi, dok amiyi deyo bene." 
Psalms71:9 Pe ibola woko i kare ma doŋ ati woko kuman; pe ibwota bene i kare ma tekka doŋ otum woko. 
Psalms71:10 Lukworra gipiro lok mapol i koma, gin jo ma mito neka woko-ni gicokke kacel ka yubo lok i koma." 
Psalms71:11 Giwacci, “Lubaŋa doŋ otyeko bwote woko; wuriŋ i kore wumake woko, pien pe tye ŋat mo ma myero olar en.”" 
Psalms71:12 Ai Lubaŋa, pe ibed bor kweda; ai Lubaŋana, bin oyotoyot ilara!" 
Psalms71:13 Mi lewic omak jo ma gidota-gu, dok gityekgi woko liweŋ; wek gicagi dok can omakgi malit, gin jo ma mito keto can i koma-ni." 
Psalms71:14 Ento pud abimedde ki bedo ki gen i komi, abimedde ki paki nakanaka." 
Psalms71:15 Abituco pi tic ma atir ducu ma itiyo, abituco bene pi tic me larri dyeceŋ jwi, pien welgi doŋ pe kwanne, okato ŋecca woko." 
Psalms71:16 Abibino pi tito pi tic madit me aura pa Rwot Lubaŋa, abipaki pi porreni keken." 
Psalms71:17 Ai Lubaŋa, ibedo Ka pwonya cakke ka tinona, pi meno pud atuco pi ticci me aura ducu ma itiyo." 
Psalms71:18 Pe ibwota ata, ai Lubaŋa, kadi bed i kare ma doŋ ati ma: wiya otwi lwar; ento bed kweda nio Ka atuco pi tekki bot yalwak ducu me kare me anyim," 
Psalms71:19 Ai Lubaŋa, twerri ki timmi ma atir doŋ otyeko o wa malo i polo. In aye ma itivo jami madito ducu, pe tye ŋat mo macalo in, ai Lubaŋa!" 
Psalms71:20 In aye ma icwalo ayelayela ki arem madwoŋ i koma, in giri ma ibidwoko tek i koma; dok ibiwota woko ki i te ŋom ka matut, ibikela woko ka maleŋ doki." 
Psalms71:21 Ibimiya abedo ki dit makato, dok bene ibikweyo cwinya." 
Psalms71:22 Dok bene abipaki ki naŋa pi genni, ai Lubaŋana; abiwero wer me paki kun agoyo agoya ki opuk, in ŋat Maleŋ pa jo Icrael." 
Psalms71:23 Abidanne matek pi yomcwiny, i kare ma noŋo atye ka wero wer me paki; abipaki ki tipo koma ducu, pien doŋ ilara." 
Psalms71:24 Dok abitito pi timmi ma atir ma ik onya kwede dyeceŋ jwi, pien lewic ki can doŋ otyeko makogi woko, gin jo ma onoŋo giyenya wek giket can i koma." 
Psalms72:1 Pwony kabaka wek Oŋol kop atir macalo in, ai Lubaŋa, dok inyut porreni bot latin ker," 
Psalms72:2 wek oŋol kop pa lwakki atir, dok olo lucan ki kit ma atir," 
Psalms72:3 Wek godi ki cere-gu gukel kuc bot dano, ma en tye ka loyo lwak ki kit ma atir." 
Psalms72:4 Myero kabaka owiny pido pa lucan dok oŋol kopgi kakare, olar bene jo ma piny obwoyogi; ento oŋiny jo ma uno dano mukenegu woko!" 
Psalms72:5 Lwakki myero guwori nakanaka i kare pa yalwakgi ducu pi kare ducu ma cen ki dwe pud tye! 
Psalms72:6 Kabaka obed macalo kot ma cwer i kom lum ma doŋ gilwero, calo ŋido kot ma cwer bido ŋom." 
Psalms72:7 Wek kit ma atir omedde ameda i kare me locce, dok kuc bene obed i lobone nakanaka nio wa i kare ma ‘dwe doŋ bibedo pe!" 
Psalms72:8 En biloyo lo bo cakke i dog nam tuŋŋi nio kwede wa i nam tuŋ cel, dokbiloyo cakke ki i kulu Euprate o kwede wa i agikkipiny." 
Psalms72:9 Lumonene ducu gibiguno i nyime ka wore, lukworre gibibuto aryeba ic ci gibimoko apwa." 
Psalms72:10 Luker me Tarcic ki pa jo ma bedo i cula nam, myero gucul mucoro bote, dok luker me Ceba ki me Seba gukel mot bote." 
Psalms72:11 Luker ducu myero guryebbe piny i nyime, dok rok ducu myero guti bote!" 
Psalms72:12 En laro dano ma piny obwoyo ka okok bote, konyo Lucan ki jo ma pe gitye ki ŋat ma konyogi." 
Psalms72:13 Kica make i kom jo magoro ki ma piny obwoyogi, ci laro kwo pa jo ma piny oloyo." 
Psalms72:14 En kokogi ki i tim bwami ki i un ma gibedo ka unogi kwede; kwogi pire tek bote ma pe wacce. 
Psalms72:15 Kabaka obed kwo nakanaka! Myero gimi jabu ma gikelo ki i Ceba bot kabaka; dok gibed ka lega pire kare ducu ma pe gikeŋ, gileg Lubaŋa wek oony gum i kome kareducu!" 
Psalms72:16 Cam bene myero ocek mabup i lobone, opoŋ wa wi godi-gu woko ducu; wek onyak nyig mabeco calo godi me Lebanon; wek gaŋi ducu opoŋ ki lwak dano madwoŋ ala, ma gipol calo lum ma i tim!" 
Psalms72:17 Wek nyiŋ kabakaori nakanaka, ki ywekane onya omedde ameda kit macalo cen ri kwede, Jo me rok ducu myero gulwoŋi ni lagumkom, dok myero guleg Lubaŋa ni omi gum i komgi ma rom ki gum ma omiyo i kom kabaka!" 
Psalms72:18 Gipwo Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ma en keken aye ma tiyo gin me aura." 
Psalms72:19 Gipak nyiŋe me deyo-ni nakanaka, wek deyone bene opoŋ lobo woko ducu! Amen ka dok Amen!" 
Psalms72:20 Lega pa Daudi wod pa Yece gugik kany. 
Psalms73:1 Adada Lubaŋa ber bot dano ma cwmygi anr, en ber bot jo ma cwinygi leŋ," 
Psalms73:2 Ento an, tyena ogwaŋŋe onoŋo doŋ acok poto tyena onoŋo doŋ cok cer mada." 
Psalms73:3 Nyeko onoŋo omaka woko i kom jo ma luwakke, dok aneno jo maraco gilony alonya." 
Psalms73:4 Pe gitye ka winyo kit arem mo liweŋ; komgi yot dok pwot apwota," 
Psalms73:5 Pe gibedo ka neno can kit ma jo mukene gineno kwede; pe gitye ka keto ayela i komgi macalo giketo i kom jo mukene. 
Psalms73:6 Pi meno wakke odoko calo gin deyo me ŋutgi; tim bwami bene oboyogi woko calo gubone ki boŋo," 
Psalms73:7 Waggi nen mupoŋ ki yub me tim maraco, ki cwinygi bene opoŋ ki tam me miŋo keken." 
Psalms73:8 Giŋalo jo mukene kun giloko lok maraco; giburo dano dok giunogi bene. 
Psalms73:9 Giloko lok marac i kom Lubaŋa ma tye i polo-ni, lok ma a i doggi romo i lobo woko ducu," 
Psalms73:10 Pi meno omiyo lwak pa Lubaŋa gibedo ka pakogi; pe gineno bal mo i iwmgi kadi ki acel. 
Psalms73:11 Giwacci, “Lubaŋa kono twero ŋeyone niŋniŋ? En ŋat Mamalo Twal tye ki kit ŋec mo?”" 
Psalms73:12 Nen, meno aye kit pa jo maraco; kare ducu gilimo lwak jami mapol, dok pud gimedde ameda ki noŋo lonyo makato." 
Psalms73:13 Abedo ma cwinya leŋ mere noŋo, dok alwoko ciŋa ma pe abalo." 
Psalms73:14 Gibedo ka keto ayela i koma dyeceŋ jwi, kun gipwoda nino ducu odiko odiko." 
Psalms73:15 Kono nen aloko lok macalo meno, kono pe abedo ki ada bot yalwak pa litino pa Lubaŋa." 
Psalms73:16 Ento atemo ki tekka ducu me niaŋ lok man, kadi bed oolo koma twatwal," 
Psalms73:17 nio ka acito i ot maleŋ pa Lubaŋa; ka doŋ acako niaŋ gin ma bitimme i kom jo maraco. 
Psalms73:18 Ada yam ik etogi i kabedo mapwot ma gicer acera ki iye; imiyo gipoto gitum woko ducu. 
Psalms73:19 Ityekogi woko oyotoyot laboŋo galle, irwenyogi woko oyotoyot ki gin maraco ma kelo lworo." 
Psalms73:20 Jo-nu gibedo macalo lek ma ka ŋat mo oco ki i waŋ nino ci tamo pire; ka doŋ ico, ci calgi rwenyo woko i waŋi ki i tammi." 
Psalms73:21 I kare ma abedo ki keccwiny, ma cwinya oton adada," 
Psalms73:22 onoŋo amiŋ dok akwiya piny, alokke adoko macalo lee i komi." 
Psalms73:23 Ento kare ducu abedo kwedi; in ibedo ka mako ciŋa lacuc bene. 
Psalms73:24 Itela ki tam ma ibedo ka miya, i agikkibene ibijola ki deyo." 
Psalms73:25 Gin aŋo mukene ma dok atye kwede i polo, kono in keken? Pe tye gin mo i lobo kany ma amito twatwal makato in." 
Psalms73:26 Koma ki cwinya twero doko goro, ento Lubaŋa aye miya tekcwiny, dok en aye lonyona ma abigwoko matwal." 
Psalms73:27 Adada jo ma tye ka mabor kwedi gibito gitum woko; dok ibijwero jo ducu ma pe gigeno in. 
Psalms73:28 Ento ki tun bota, bedo cok ki Lubaŋa aye ber; in Rwot Lubaŋa aye doŋ idoko kalarrena, wek atit pi tic ducu ma in itiyo." 
Psalms74:1 Ai Lubaŋa, piŋo ibolowa woko matwal? Piŋo imiyo akemoni duny i kom romini ma in aye ikwayogi?" 
Psalms74:2 Po pi lwakk i ma yam iyerogi cakke wa con, gin jo ma yam ikokogi ki i can wek gubed joni kikome. Po pi got Cion, kabedo ma yam ibedo iye." 
Psalms74:3 Bin iwot i kabedo man ma doŋ odoko obur matwal-li; lukwor gujwero jami woko ducu ki i kabedoni maleŋi 
Psalms74:4 Lukworri gudaŋŋe matek ka ma yam jo gucokke iye ka wori; guketo benderagi malo me nyuto ni doŋ odoko megi. 
Psalms74:5 Gicalo luton-yat ma i buŋa ma gitye ka toŋo yadi ki latongi. 
Psalms74:6 Gutoŋo bao iye ducu ma yam gipayo maber, gubaro gubalo woko ki laton ki nyol." 
Psalms74:7 Gucwinyo ot pa Lubaŋa woko ki mac’ gupyedo ot meno maleŋ ka ma yam dano giworo iye nyiŋe, gumuko gureto woko piny." 
Psalms74:8 Guwacci, “Wabiŋinyo jo-ni watyekogi woko matwal”; guwaŋo kabedo ducu woko liweŋ ki i lobowa ka ma yam lwak cokke iye ka woro Lubaŋa," 
Psalms74:9 Pe doŋ waneno kit lanyut ma yam gimiyowa-ni; pe doŋ tye lanebi mo, pe tye ŋat mo i kinwa ma nevo kare ma can man bitero." 
Psalms74:10 Ai Lubaŋa, lukworwa mono gibibedo ka ŋalowa pi kare ma rom mene? Lukworwa myero gubed ka yeto nyiŋi nakanaka, Lubaŋa?" 
Psalms74:11 ‘Piŋo idolo ciŋi woko pe ikonyowa? Idolo ciŋi idwoko yo tuŋ ŋeyi piŋo? 
Psalms74:12 Ento in Lubaŋa, ibedo kabakawa cakke wa con, ibedo ka tiyo ticci me laro dano i wilobo." 
Psalms74:13 Ipoko dye nam woko ki tekki; inyoto wi megi kulu-gu woko ducu i pii. 
Psalms74:14 Ininyo wi Leviatan ma min kulu-ni woko ducu, ka imiyo odoko cant pa Lee ma gibedo i tim." 
Psalms74:15 Iyabo waŋ it, imiyo piine obedo ka gunnye odoko ora, ci imiyo pii otwo woko liweŋ ki i kuln mukene ma yam gimol." 
Psalms74:16 Dyeceŋ meri ki wor bene meri; in aye iketo ceŋ ki dwe i kabedogi. 
Psalms74:17 Iketo waŋ apokki ducu me lobo; in bene ma iketo oro ki cwir gubedo tye. 
Psalms74:18 Ai Rwot, po i kit ma lukworwa giŋali kwede, gin jo ma pe gilwori giyeti noŋo." 
Psalms74:19 Pe imi joni ma rom ki akuri-ni bot lukwor magi mager-ri ma rom ki lee tim; wii pe myero owil matwal i kom lwakki ma gin lucan-ni," 
Psalms74:20 Po i kom gicikkeni ma yam icikke kwede ki wan; pien tim bwami tye i kabedo macol ducu ma tye i lobowa-ni. 
Psalms74:21 Pe iwek lewic omak jo ma doŋ ginyonogi woko piny-nyi; wek lucan ki jo ma’ piny obwoyogi gupak nyiŋi. 
Psalms74:22 A malo, ai Lubaŋa, ipid pidoni; po bene kit ma jo ma pe gilwori giŋali kwede dyeceŋ jwi!" 
Psalms74:23 Wii pe owil i kom daŋŋe me kiniga ma lumoneni gidaŋŋe kwede matek-ki, en woo pa gin lukworri ma gimedde kwede ameda ma pe giliŋ-ŋi." 
Psalms75:1 Wapwoyi, ai Lubaŋa, wapwoyi! Watito pi dit me nyiŋi ki pi tic me aura ducu ma doŋ ityeko tiyogi." 
Psalms75:2 “Atyeko yero kare me ŋolo kop”, Lubaŋa ma owaco, “abiŋolo kop atir dok kakare." 
Psalms75:3 Kadi bed lobo oyeŋŋe, kacel ki jo ma bedo iye ducu, ento an abegwoko wir ma lobo ocuŋ iye ducu cuŋ matek kakargi." 
Psalms75:4 Awaco bot luwakke ni, ‘Pe wuwakke’, bot jo maraco bene awacci, ‘Pe wulyerre ma wuwakke awaka.’" 
Psalms75:5 Dok atito botgi ni pe myero gukette kengi malo twatwal, dok bene gugik loko lok anywar woko.”" 
Psalms75:6 Medo rwom pa dano pe bino kun a ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ nyo potoceŋ, kadi ki yo tuŋ tim nyo yo tuŋ godi;" 
Psalms75:7 ento Lubaŋa kene aye ma ŋolo kop pa dano, dwoko ŋat man piny dok tino dano mukene malo." 
Psalms75:8 Rwot omako kikopo i ciŋe ma opoŋ ki koŋo vino, ma yenyo ayenya ki bwoyo, ma girubo maber; en miyo jo maraco ducu ma tye i lobo gimato, gimato nio waŋ ma gityeko WOKO ducu." 
Psalms75:9 Ento an abibedo ki yomcwiny nakanaka, abiwero wer kun apako Lubaŋa pa Yakobo." 
Psalms75:10 En bityeko twero pa jo maraco woko liweŋ, ento bimedo twero bot jo ma kitgi atir." 
Psalms76:1 Dano giŋey Lubaŋa maber twatwal i Juda, nyiŋe bene dit i Icrael." 
Psalms76:2 Giketo kabedone tye i Calem, ki kabedo ma en bedo iye tye i Cion," 
Psalms76:3 En oturo atero ma lakke wil awila woko ki kunnu, oturo wa kwodigi, pala lucwan ki jami lweny-gu ducu." 
Psalms76:4 It ye ki deyo makato, ai Lubaŋa, ki dit me loc tye i ciŋi, makato godi ducu ma ri nakanaka," 
Psalms76:5 Askarigi macir ducu giyako jamigi woko; gitye ka nino nino matut adada; pe tye ŋat mo mudoŋ ki i kin gin lumony ma twero tic ki jami lweny. 
Psalms76:6 I kare ma ijukogi, ai Lubaŋa pa Yakobo, aguragura ki jo ma ŋweco kwedgi gupoto guwille woko; ducu," 
Psalms76:7 Ento in, dano lwori matek! Aŋa ma twero cun i nyimi ka onoŋo kiniga doŋ omaki woko?" 
Psalms76:8 In doŋ iŋolo kop woko ki i polo; jo ducu ma bedo i lo bo gulworo, omiyo guliŋ mot," 
Psalms76:9 i kare ma ia malo ka ŋolo kop, pi laro jo ducu ma giunogi i lobo-ni," 
Psalms76:10 Adada akemo pa dano miyo jo gilokke gidok ka paki; jo mudoŋ ma gubwot ki i lweny ibikelo bedo cok kwedi. 
Psalms76:11 Wukwoŋ kwon bot Rwot Lubaŋawu, dok wucob gin ma wukwoŋo; wek dano ducu ma gibedo cok, i ŋete gukel bote mot; Lubaŋa myero gilwor," 
Psalms76:12 pien en dwoko rwodi ma luwakke woko piny, dok miyo luker me lobo gibedo ki lworo madwoŋ." 
Psalms77:1 Akok matek bot Lubaŋa, akok bote, matek, ci en winyo kokona." 
Psalms77:2 Ayenyo Rwot i kare ma atye ki can; i dyewor ataŋo ciŋa bote kun alego ma pe aol; ento meno ducu mwa, cwinya pe romokwe." 
Psalms77:3 Aparo pi Lubaŋa kun acur; alwodo lok, dok cwinya oballe woko," 
Psalms77:4 Pe imiyo nino mako waŋa: atye ki par mapol twatwal omiyo pe atwero loko 
Psalms77:5 Abedo ka tamo pi kare macon, dok apo i kom lwak mwaka ducu ma okato." 
Psalms77:6 Abedo ka tamo lam matut ki i cwinya i dyewor; alwodo lok dok apennye kekena ki i cwinya ni," 
Psalms77:7 “Rwot mono bikwerowa woko matwal? Cwinye doki pe bibedo yom ikomwa? 
Psalms77:8 En doŋ pe marowa ki mar mere ma pe lokke-ni? Cikkene ducu mono doŋ ogik woko pi kare ducu? 
Psalms77:9 Lubaŋa mono doŋ wiye owil woko pi nyuto kicane i kom dano? En doŋ mono pe romo timo kica, pi kiniga ma omake?”" 
Psalms77:10 Dok awacci, “Gin ma cwero cwinya makato ducu en ene ni, twero pa en ŋat Mamalo Twal-li doŋ olokke woko.”" 
Psalms77:11 Abipo, Rwot, abipo i kom ticci madit ma itiyo; ada, abipo i kom ticci ducu me aura ma yam itiyo i kare macon." 
Psalms77:12 Abibedo ka tamo pi gin ducu ma doŋ itimo, dok abilwodo lok i kom ticci madito ducu ma yam itiyo." 
Psalms77:13 Kit gin ducu ma itiyo leŋ, ai Lubaŋa! Pe tye kit lubaŋa mo madit calo in!" 
Psalms77:14 In keken aye Lubaŋa ma tiyo taŋo me aura; dok inyuto tekki i kin lwak me rok ducu. 
Psalms77:15 Yam ikoko lwakki ki i can pi tweroni, gin likwayo pa Yakobo ki Yucepu." 
Psalms77:16 Ka pii me nam oneni, ci obedo ki lworo, ai Lubaŋa, ka oneni obedo ki lworo adada, dok nam matut ducu oyeŋŋe." 
Psalms77:17 Kot oa ki i pol ocwer i lobo; piny omor ki i pol matek, ci lutkot owil i kabedo ducu." 
Psalms77:18 Dwani omor owinnye wa i yamo lapiru mager; lutkotti bene omeny ocaro lobo woko ducu; lobo oyeŋŋe ki jo ma bedo iye ducu komgi omyel," 
Psalms77:19 Iwoto ikato ki i dye nam, iŋolo ki i dye nam madoŋo matut; ento ojwe tyeni pe omedo ki nen." 
Psalms77:20 Itelo wi lwakki macalo lakwat romi, kun imiyo Moses ki Aron me gwokogi." 
Psalms78:1 Wucik itwu, wuwiny lok ma apwonyowu kwede, wun lwakka; wucik itwu, wuwiny lok ma abecito ka lokone-ni." 
Psalms78:2 Abiwaco botwu lok i carolok; abitito botwu lok macon me koc lit," 
Psalms78:3 lok ma wan kikomwa wawinyo dok waŋeyo, ma kwarowa yam gutito botwa," 
Psalms78:4 Pe wakano lok man bedo me muŋ bot likwayogi, ento wabitito bot yalwak ma lubowa; wabitito “bi twero pa Rwot, ki pi tic matego ma en otiyo ducu, ki pi taŋo mapol me aura ma en doŋ otiyo." 
Psalms78:5 En omiyo lok me caden bot jo Icrael, dok omiyo cik bot likwayo pa Yakobo. En yam omiyo cik bot kwarowa me pwonyo ki litinogi;" 
Psalms78:6 wek yalwak ma lubo i anyim bene guŋe cik magi, gin litino ma yam pud peya ginywalogi, wek gin bene gua gutit lok man bot litinogi." 
Psalms78:7 Ka guwinyo lok man gugen Lubaŋa, wek wigi pe owil i kom tic ducu pa Lubaŋa, dok bene gugwok cikke ducu." 
Psalms78:8 Gin pe myero gubed macalo kwarogi, gin yalwak ma cwinygi opoŋ ki jemo, ma pe wuwinyo cik pa Lubaŋa, yalwak ma tamgi pe omoko matek ma pe gigeno Lubaŋa ki cwinygi ducu." 
Psalms78:9 Jo Epraim ma gulwenyo ki atum ki atero gulokke gudok woko cen i nino me lweny. 
Psalms78:10 Pe gugwoko gicikkegi ki Lubaŋa, gukwero lubo cikke woko." 
Psalms78:11 Wigi bene owil woko i kom tic ma yam en otiyo, kadi ki lwak taŋo mapol ma yam onyuto botgi." 
Psalms78:12 Lubaŋa yam otiyo lwak taŋo me aura ma kwarogi gineno i bar me Joan, i lobo Ejipt," 
Psalms78:13 Opoko dye nam woko aryo, omiyo gukato ki iye wa loka tuŋ cel, en omiyo pii otiŋŋe malo likuŋ." 
Psalms78:14 Obedo ka telo wigi ki i dyeceŋ ki pol, ento i dyewor obedo ka telo wigi ki mac ma lyel." 
Psalms78:15 Obaro got i dye tim, omiyo gumato pii madit adada macalo pii ma tye i kut matut." 
Psalms78:16 Omiyo ora kulu mapol gumol ki i got mubar-ri, omiyo pii ocako mol ki iye cito piny macalo kulu madit." 
Psalms78:17 Ento pud gumedde ki timo bal i kom Lubaŋa, gujemo woko i kom ŋat Mamalo Twal-li i dye tim." 
Psalms78:18 Gutemo Lubaŋa i cwinygi kun gilege ni ominigi cam ma igi opukke iye. 
Psalms78:19 Guloko lok marac i kom Lubaŋa kun giwacci, “Lubaŋa twero yubo meja i dye tim kany?" 
Psalms78:20 Kono ada en obaro got ci pii okatti ki iye, kulu ducu gupoŋ woko libyeny wa i wi tura. En dok twero miyowa cam, nyo twero miyo bene Rino bot lwakke wek gucam!”" 
Psalms78:21 Pi meno akemo omako Rwot matek i kare ma owinyo lok meno; omiyo olwenyo i kom jo pa Yakobo ki mac, kinigane onya omedde ameda i kom jo Icrael," 
Psalms78:22 pien pe gubedo ki niye i kome, dok pe gugeno ni en twero larogi." 
Psalms78:23 En ociko pol ma tye malo, dok oyabo doggola me polo;" 
Psalms78:24 ka doŋ ocako cwalo botgi manna me acama, omiyo botgi kal mua ki i polo." 
Psalms78:25 Dano gucamo kwon ma lumalaika gicamo; ocwalo botgi cam madwoŋ ata. 
Psalms78:26 Omiyo yamo ma a tuŋ wokceŋ okodo ki i polo, dok bene otelo yamo ma kodo yo tuŋ acuc ki twerone." 
Psalms78:27 Ocwalo lwak winyo opye i komgi calo apwa, gipol ma girom ki kweyo ma i dog nam;" 
Psalms78:28 omiyo gupoto woko i dye gonygi, i kabedo ducu ma orumo kemagi." 
Psalms78:29 Lwak gucamo ci guyeŋ bene matek, pien Lubaŋa doŋ omiyo botgi gin ma igi opukke iye." 
Psalms78:30 Ento ma pud kee riŋogi tye, ma peya guyeŋ maber, ma onoŋo cam bene pud tye i doggi," 
Psalms78:31 kiniga omako Lubaŋa matek i komgi, ci oneko jo matego woko ki i kingi, ojwero twoni oteka ma giyerogi ki i kin jo Icrael-li woko." 
Psalms78:32 Kadi bed kumeno, jo Icrael pud gimedde ameda ki timo bal; kadi bed Lubaŋa otiyo jami tano mapol, gin pe guye." 
Psalms78:33 Pi meno ogiko nino me kwogi woko calo yweyo, ka orwenyo kwogi woko bene ki can madwoŋ ma opoto atura." 
Psalms78:34 Ka oneko jo mogo, jo mudoŋ gilokke giyenye gidwogo bote; giŋut ci giyenyo Lubaŋa ki cwinygi ducu." 
Psalms78:35 Gucako po ni Lubaŋa aye kalarregi, Lubaŋa Mamalo Twal yam okokogi ki i can." 
Psalms78:36 Ento gubedo ka bwole abwola ki lok doggi noŋo, lok ducu ma gubedo ka loko bote obedo goba keken." 
Psalms78:37 Pe gimare ma gimoko i kome ki cwinygi ducu; pe bene gubedo ki ada me gwoko gicikke ma tye i kingi ki Lubaŋa. 
Psalms78:38 Ento kica omako Lubaŋa i kom lwakke. En oweko balgi, omiyo pe otyekogi woko. Obedo ka juko kinigane pi tyen mapol, pe obedo ka tugo akemone ducu." 
Psalms78:39 En opo oŋeyo ni gin dano mamwa, gubedo calo yamo ma kodo cito mere matwal ma pe dok dwogo cen." 
Psalms78:40 Gujemo i kome i tim pi kare mapol; gucwero cwinye i aroo. 
Psalms78:41 Gubedo ka temo Lubaŋa teretere, gumiyo kiniga omako ŋat Maleŋ pa Icrael." 
Psalms78:42 Wigi owil woko i kom twerone, kadi i kom nino ma en okokogi kwede ki i ciŋ lukworgi-ni," 
Psalms78:43 i kare ma en otiyo lanyut me jami taŋo mapol, i bar Joan, i lobo Ejipt." 
Psalms78:44 Oloko pii ma i kulu pa jo Ejipt ducu odoko remo, wek pe gumat piine ma i ora kulu." 
Psalms78:45 Ocwalo Iwaŋi i kingi ocamogi matek, ocwalo ogwal bene ma obalo lobogi." 
Psalms78:46 Omiyo okwil ocamo ginapitagi woko, ki camgi ma doŋ guyelle kwede i poto omiyo bonyo ocamo woko ducu." 
Psalms78:47 Omiyo pee ogoyo olokgi obalo woko, ki yadi olamgi obalo woko ki ŋico." 
Psalms78:48 Omiyo pee oneko dyaŋigi woko, ki lutkot bene ocelo romigi," 
Psalms78:49 Obaŋogi woko ki akemone magerri, ki kiniga, mone ki can, kun ocwalo lumalaika me jwerogi woko." 
Psalms78:50 En pe ojuko kinigane; pe oye laro kwogi ki i to, ento omiyo two gemo onekogi woko." 
Psalms78:51 Oneko litino kayo ducu ki i Ejipt, ma gin jo ma gukwoŋo nywalo ki tekogi ki i kema pa Kam." 
Psalms78:52 Ka doŋ otelo wi lwakke okelogi woko macalo lakwat romi, obedo ka telogi kun gwokogi i tim macalo lwak lim" 
Psalms78:53 Otelogi Ki kuc, omiyo pe gubedo ki lworo; ento nam aye omwonyo lukworgi woko." 
Psalms78:54 Okelogi i lobone maleŋ, i got ma en omayo ki twerone i lweny ma en oloyo." 
Psalms78:55 Oryemo lurok woko ki i nyimgi; opoko dul lobo i kingi ma myero gucam obed megi, ci omiyo jo me kaka pa Icrael ducu gubedo doŋ mot i kemagi." 
Psalms78:56 Ento gutemo Lubaŋa Mamalo Twal dok gujemo woko i kome, kun pe gilubo lokke me caden," 
Psalms78:57 gulokke guŋayo waŋe woko macalo yam kwarogi gutimo; guminne woko, gubwole macalo atum ma pe celo atir." 
Psalms78:58 Gumiyo kiniga omake pi waŋ jogigi ma giketo i wi godi-gu; gumiyo nyeko omake pi callubaŋa ma gupayo. 
Psalms78:59 Akemo omako Lubaŋa matek i kare ma owinyo lok meno, ci okwero jo Icrael woko marac twatwal." 
Psalms78:60 En obwoto kemane ma en bedo iye i eilo-ni woko, ma en aye gaŋ ma en yam bedo iye i kin dano." 
Psalms78:61 Omiyo canduk me twerone woko wek giter i opii, lanen me deyone omiyo woko bot lumerok," 
Psalms78:62 Akemo noŋo omake twatwal i kom lwakke, omiyo lukworgi gunekogi woko ki pala lucwan." 
Psalms78:63 Mac owaŋo awobegi otyekogi woko liweŋ, ki anyiragi bene pe doŋ giwero wer nyommo." 
Psalms78:64 Gineko ajwagigi woko ki pala lucwan, ci mongi pe gukokogi." 
Psalms78:65 Lacen Rwot opo litaku calo oco ki i waŋ nino, calo oteka mumer ki koŋo yino ka doŋ daŋŋe." 
Psalms78:66 Oryemo lukworre gudok cen, dok lewic ma bedo nakanaka opoto i komgi." 
Psalms78:67 En okwero kema pa Yucepu woko, pe oyero kaka pa Epraim," 
Psalms78:68 Ento oyero kaka pa Juda, ki got Cion ma en maro-ni." 
Psalms78:69 Ogero kabedone maleŋ kunnu, calo gaŋŋe ma tye i polo; ocibo ocuŋ matek liliŋ calo lobo, ma en doŋ oketo bedo matwal-li." 
Psalms78:70 Oyero laticce Daudi, ci okwanye woko ki ka kwayo romi;" 
Psalms78:71 Okwanye okele woko ki ka gwoko megi romi ki litinogi, okete obedo lakwat pa jone Icrael, odoko kabaka pa likwayo pa Yakobo ma lwak pa Lubaŋa." 
Psalms78:72 Daudi ogwokogi ki leŋcwinye, dok otelogi ki diro mada." 
Psalms79:1 Ai Lubaŋa, lurok gubino gumayo lobo pa lwakki woko; gubalo ot meri maleŋ-ŋi woko; gujwero Jerucalem woko odoŋ obur." 
Psalms79:2 Gubwoto kom luticci muto me acama pa winyo me polo, dok gubwoto kom joni ma geni bot lee tim wek gucam." 
Psalms79:3 Guonyo remogi woko macalo gionyo pii, orumo Jerucalem woko, dok dano mo pe odoŋ ma onoŋo myero oyikgi." 
Psalms79:4 Rok ma gibedo i ŋetwa giloko lok aŋec i komwa, ma giŋalowa dok gijwiyowa." 
Psalms79:5 Ai Rwot, kiniga bimaki nakanaka? Nyo pi kare ma rom mene? Akemoni ma nyek-ki bimedde kun waŋ macalo mac?" 
Psalms79:6 Kiniga myero omaki i kom rok ma pe giŋeyi, ki i kom ker ducu ma pe gilwoŋo nyiŋi!" 
Psalms79:7 Gutyeko jo pa Yakobo woko, gumiyo lobowa doŋ odoko obur." 
Psalms79:8 Pe icul kwor i komwa pi bal pa kwarowa; wek kica omaki i komwa oyotoyot, pien piny doŋ obwoyowa woko." 
Psalms79:9 Konywa, ai Lubaŋa lalarwa, pi deyo me nyiŋi; larwa, dok iwek balwa, wek dano gupak nyiŋi." 
Psalms79:10 Piŋo lurok myero gupeny ni, “Lubaŋagi tye kwene?” Cul kwor i kom lurok i nyimwa ma waneno pi oyo remo pa luticci!" 
Psalms79:11 Winy cur pa lumabuc; gwok jo ma doŋ giŋolo kop me to i wigi ki tweroni madit-ti! 
Psalms79:12 Ai Rwot, cul kwor ma romo tyen abiro i kom jo, ma gibedo i ŋetwa pi lok aŋec ma giyeŋ kwede." 
Psalms79:13 Ci wan lwakki, ma wan romini ma ikwayowa-ni, wabimiyo pwoc boti nakanaka; wabipako nyiŋi nakanaka, wan ki likwayowa ducu." 
Psalms80:1 Winywa, in lakwat pa jo Icrael, in ma itelo wi jo pa Yucepu macalo itelo wi lwak romi! In ma ibedo i wi komkerri i kom lukerubi, ryeny menypiny" 
Psalms80:2 I nyim kaka pa Epraim, pa Benjamin ki pa Manace! Nyut tekki, ci ibin ilarwa!" 
Psalms80:3 Dwokwa cen boti, ai Lubaŋa; nenwa ki waŋ me kica ci wabilarre!" 
Psalms80:4 Ai Rwot Lubaŋa me mony, ibibedo ki kiniga i kom lega pa lwakki pi kare ma rom mene?" 
Psalms80:5 Imiyo wacamo pig wanwa macalo wacamo kwon, imiyowa pig waŋ poŋ kikopo madit niwamati." 
Psalms80:6 Imiyo jo ma bedo i ŋetwa doŋ gicayowa marac; ki lukworwa bene ginyerowa anyera i kingi kengi," 
Psalms80:7 Dwokwa cen boti, ai Lubaŋa; nenwa ki wan me kica ci wabilarre!" 
Psalms80:8 In aye ma yam ikelo tyen olok ki i Ejipt; ka iryemo lurok woko ki, i lobogi ci ipito iye olokki," 
Psalms80:9 Ipurokakare woko maber, ci oroyo Lwite odonyo matut i ŋom, omiyo odoŋo oumo lobo woko ducu." 
Psalms80:10 Tipone oumo godi woko ducu, oumo bene wa yadi cedar madito ki jaŋe-gu," 
Psalms80:11 Jaŋe ojany oo wa i nam, ki pote ma pud lot alota oo wa i kulu Euprate." 
Psalms80:12 Piŋo imuko cel marumo-gu woko, iweko jo ducu ma kato ki kenyo gupwono nyige?" 
Psalms80:13 Opego ma gibedo i buŋa ginyono woko piny, ki lee tim ducu gicamo." 
Psalms80:14 Lokke idwog botwa, ai Lubaŋa me mony! Nen piny ki i polo ci inenwa; bed ki tam i kom olok man," 
Psalms80:15 bin ilar tyen olok man ma in aye ipiro-ni," 
Psalms80:16 Gutyeko wanone woko ki, mac, dok bene gutoŋo gureto woko piny; nengi ki kiniga ityekgi woko!" 
Psalms80:17 Ket ciŋi i kom dano ma tye i ŋeti tuŋ lacuc, en dano ma imiyo odoŋo odoko matek-ki!" 
Psalms80:18 Pe doki wabilokke-wabwoto in; gwokwa wabed kwo, ci wabipako nyiŋi." 
Psalms80:19 Dwokwa cen boti, ai Rwot Lubaŋa memony, nenwa ki waŋ me kica ci wabilarre!" 
Psalms81:1 Wuwer wer ki dwan maloŋo bot Lubaŋa ma en tekwa; wuwer wer me pak ki yomcwiny bot Lubaŋa pa Yakobo! 
Psalms81:2 Wuwer ci wugo ajaa-gu bene, wugo ki opuk ki naŋa-gu." 
Psalms81:3 Wukut tum i kare ma dwe pud opor apora, dok ka doŋ ogudo got, ki i ninowa madit." 
Psalms81:4 Pien man obedo cik i Icrael, gin ma Lubaŋa pa Yakobo yam ociko." 
Psalms81:5 En oketo cik man i kaka pa Yucepu, i kare ma en owoto ocito ka lewny i kom lobo Ejipt. Awinyo dwan ma yam oc aneyo, ma wacci" 
Psalms81:6 “Atiŋo yec mapek woko ki i gwoki; amiyo iketo aduku woko piny. 
Psalms81:7 Ikok bota i’ kare ma it ye i can, ci alarl; agamo dogi ki mor piny ki i kabedo me muŋ ma akanne iye, atemi bene i ŋet pii me Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Wuwiny, wun jona, ka ajukowu; wun jo Icrael, amito ni wuwinv gin ma awacowu-nil" 
Psalms81:9 Pe myero ginoŋ i kinwu kit lubaŋa mo ma pe ŋene, pe wuryebbe piny ka woro lubaŋa pa lurok." 
Psalms81:10 An a Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma akwanyowu, akelowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt. Wuŋam dogwu malac, ci abipitowu ki cam." 
Psalms81:11 “Ento jona pe guwinyo lok ma yam aloko botgi; ro Icrael onoŋo doŋ pe gitwero lubo cikka kadi ki acel. 
Psalms81:12 Pi meno omiyo awekogi woko pi tek wigi, wek guti gin ma cwinygi mito." 
Psalms81:13 Kono nene jona guwinyo lokka, kono jo Icrael gulubo cikka!" 
Psalms81:14 Onoŋo kono aloyo lukworgi woko oyotoyot, kono aryeyo ‘ciŋa atayo lumerokgi woko ducu," 
Psalms81:15 Onoŋo kono jo ma daga gimwolle amwola i nyima, dok can ma bipoto i komgi kono obedo matwal." 
Psalms81:16 Onoŋo atwero pitowu ki ŋano maber twatwal, dok onoŋo atwero miyo wuyeŋ ki moo kic ma tye im got.”" 
Psalms82:1 Lubaŋa doŋ obedo i wi komme i kacokke i wi polo, ci ŋolo kop i dye lwak lubaŋa ma gugurre, kun wacci," 
Psalms82:2 “Pe wubinolo kop kakare pi kare ma rom mene, kun wudworo kor jo maraco?" 
Psalms82:3 Wuŋol kop pa lugoro ki pa jo ma wongi pe; wutim jo ma tre ki can ki jo ma doŋ piny obwoyogi adada muporo kwogi. 
Psalms82:4 Wular lugoro ki jo ma piny obwoyogi; wulargi ki i ciŋ jo maraco.” 
Psalms82:5 Pe gitye ki ŋec, dok niaŋ mo bene pe, giwoto megi ata i colpiny; te guti me lobo ducu tye ka yeŋŋe." 
Psalms82:6 Awacci, “Wun wubedo lubaŋa, wun ducu litino pa ŋat Mamalo Twa!" 
Psalms82:7 Kadi bed kumeno, wubito macalo dano, dok bene wubipoto macalo rwot mo keken.”" 
Psalms82:8 A malo, ai Lubaŋa, iŋol kop i kom lobo; rok ducu ma i wi lobo-ni meri." 
Psalms83:1 Ai Lubaŋa, pe iliŋ; pe ibed mot ki kuc ma iliŋ woko, ai Lubaŋa!" 
Psalms83:2 Nen lukworri gitye ka timo gin marac; jo ma gidagi-ni doŋ gujemo woko. 
Psalms83:3 Gitye ka yubo yub mogo i muŋ i kom lwakki; gicokke kacel giporo lok i kom joni ma doŋ igwokogi woko-ni. 
Psalms83:4 Giwacci, “Wubin, wek watyek rokgi woko; wek pe doŋ gipo pi nyiŋ Icrael matwal!”" 
Psalms83:5 Iyo, gin ducu gipiro lok ki cwiny acel; dok bene giketo gicikke i kingi me lweny i komi." 
Psalms83:6 Gin jo Edom, ki jo Icmael, jo Moab ki jo Agri," 
Psalms83:7 jo Gebal, jo Ammon ki jo Amalek, jo Piliciti ki jo ma gibedo i Turo." 
Psalms83:8 Jo Aciria bene onoŋo guribbe kwedgi; gin aye dul mony matek pa likwayo pa Lot. 
Psalms83:9 Tim gin ma itimo i kom jo Midian-ni i komgi, macalo itimo i kom Cicera ki Jabin i dog kulu Kicon," 
Psalms83:10 ma gityekogi woko i En-dor, ma gudoko macalo cet dyaŋ ma gionyo i poto." 
Psalms83:11 Mi luditogi me awora gubed calo Oreb ki Jeeb, dok ilo rwodigi woko macalo iloyo Jeba ki Jalmuna;" 
Psalms83:12 ma guwacci “Wek wakwanyu obed piwa kenwa, en olet pa Lubaŋa-ni.”" 
Psalms83:13 Ai Lubaŋana, mi gubed macalo apwa ma yamo lapiru kolo, calo cuŋ kaŋ ma yamo tero." 
Psalms83:14 Kit macalo mac waŋo kwede buŋa, dok macalo leb mac ma tye ka lyel i wi godi," 
Psalms83:15 in bene ibiryemogi ki yamo matek gicito woko kit meno, ci ibimiyo yamo lapiru mager kodo miyogi lworo ki myelkom." 
Psalms83:16 Mi lewic omakgi, ai Rwot; wek gulokke guyenyi ci guti boti." 
Psalms83:17 Wek giket lewic i komgi dok omi cwinygi oballe woko, wek guto i can ki lewic madwoŋ," 
Psalms83:18 Wek guŋe ni, in keni aye ma nyiŋi Rwot, in aye ŋat Mamalo Twal ma loyo wi lobo-ni ducu." 
Psalms84:1 Odi ber twatwal ar Rwot me mony! 
Psalms84:2 Cwinya mito mada ni abed kunnu, dok olwoko pi donyo ka bedo i dyekal pa Rwot. Awero wer mepako Lubaŋa makwo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ kun amiyo iye kwona ducu." 
Psalms84:3 Kadi ki lakalagwec bene tye ki ode, ki aliboro bene tye ki ode ka ma en buto iye, en ka ma etwero bolo iye toŋe, ma cok ki keno tyerri, ai Rwot me mony, kabakana ma Lubaŋana," 
Psalms84:4 Jo ma bedo i odi gitye ki gum, ma gibedo ka wero wer kun gipaki, kare ducu!" 
Psalms84:5 Jo ma gigeno tek ma tve boti gitye ki gum, gin jo ma tye ki cwiny me cito wa i Cion." 
Psalms84:6 I kare ma giwok i nota me Baka mutwo-ni, gimiyo doko waŋ it; kot me poto kot bene cwer iye miyo pii poŋ i kabedo ducu." 
Psalms84:7 Gimedde gidoko tek i kare ma giwoto; Lubaŋa ma loyo lwak lubaŋa ducu binen i Cion. 
Psalms84:8 Winy legana, ai Rwot Lubaŋa me mony; cik iti iwiny, ai Lubaŋa pa Yakobo!" 
Psalms84:9 In aye i kwotwa, ai Lubaŋa; nen danoni ma giwiro ma in aye iyero!" 
Psalms84:10 Bedo i dyekalli pi nino acel keken ber kato bedo ka mukene pi nino alip. Twora abedo lagwok doggola ot pa Rwot, kato ma abedo i kema ka ma tim maraco tye iye." 
Psalms84:11 Rwot Lubaŋa aye cen mewa dok kwotwa; en onyo kicane i komwa dok miyo wabedo ki deyo. Rwot pe, twono dano ma gilube ma cwinygi Ien, ki gin mo maber," 
Psalms84:12 Ai Rwot me mony, dano ma geno in tye ki gum madwoŋ!" 
Psalms85:1 Rwot, yam ibedo ki kica i kom loboni, idwoko gum i kom jo pa Yakobo." 
Psalms85:2 Yam iweko bal pa lwakki, dok itimogi kica i kom roc ducu ma gutiyo," 
Psalms85:3 Yam idwoko akemoni woko cwinyi, ilokke ibwoto kinigani malyet-ti," 
Psalms85:4 Dwokwa cen boti, ai Lubaŋa lalarwa, cwinyi pe myero doŋ obed ka waŋ i komwa!" 
Psalms85:5 Kiniga mono bimaki i komwa matwal? Ibimedo kinigani bedo i kom yalwak ducu? 
Psalms85:6 Pe ibidwoko cwinywa i komi doki aye, wek wan lwakki wabed ki yomcwiny piri?" 
Psalms85:7 Ai Rwot, nyut botwa mar meri ma pe lokke, dok imiwa larri." 
Psalms85:8 Wek awiny gin ma Rwot Lubaŋa biloko. Biloko lok me kuc bot lwakke, bot jone ma gene, ma gilokke ki i cwinygi gidwogo bote." 
Psalms85:9 Adada, en tye oyubbe pi laro jo ma lwore, wek deyo obed i lobowa." 
Psalms85:10 Mar ma pe lokke ki gen gibiribbe kacel, kit ma atir ki kuc bene gibirwatte." 
Psalms85:11 Gen bia ki i lobo doŋo malo, kit ma atir bene bineno piny ki i polo." 
Psalms85:12 Iyo, Rwot bimiyo botwa gin maber, ki lobowa ‘bene biceko cam madwoŋ." 
Psalms85:13 Kh ma atir bitelo nyim Rwot, dok biyubo yo ma en biwoto iye." 
Psalms86:1 ‘Yiny legana, ai Rwot, dok igam doga, pien an lacan, piny bene obwoya woko." 
Psalms86:2 Lar kwona ki i to, pien atye ki mar me ada i komi, lara, pien an laticci dok ageno in." 
Psalms86:3 In Lubaŋana, pi meno bed ki kica i koma, ai Rwot, akok boti dyeceŋ jwi." 
Psalms86:4 Mi cwiny laticci obed yom, ai Rwot, pien legana cito malo boti kun amiyi tipona ducu." 
Psalms86:5 Ai Rwot, in iber dok iweko bal pa dano, dok mar meri ma pe lokke dwoŋ pi jo ducu ma kok boti." 
Psalms86:6 Cik iti iwiny legana, ai Rwot; winy kokona ma abako kwede doga boti." 
Psalms86:7 I kare ma atye i can akok boti, pien igamo doga." 
Psalms86:8 Pe tye lubaŋa mo i kin lubaŋa mukene-gu macalo in, dok pe tye kit tic mo ma rom ki ticci." 
Psalms86:9 Rok ducu ma iketogi gibibino gibiryebbe piny i nyimi, ai Rwot, ci gibipako nyiŋi." 
Psalms86:10 In i dit dok itiyo jami tano me aura mapol, in Lubaŋa keni." 
Psalms86:11 Pwonya ki cikki ai Rwot, wek alub adani; mi abed ki cwiny acel me lworo in." 
Psalms86:12 Amiyo pwoc boti ki cwinya ducu, ai Rwot Lubaŋana, abibedo ka miyo deyo boti kun atuco nyiŋi nakanaka." 
Psalms86:13 Mar meri ma pe lokke dit twatwal i koma, in aye ma ilara ma onoŋo atye ka matut i te bur lyel." 
Psalms86:14 Ai Lubaŋa, jo ma lunywar guero lweny i koma; dul pa jo ma lubwami gimito neka woko, kun bene pe giketi anyim me telogi i gin ducu." 
Psalms86:15 Ento in, ai Rwot, in Lubaŋa ma lakica dok imaro dano, kiniga pe maki oyot, dok mar meri ma pe lokke, ki genni, dwoŋ," 
Psalms86:16 Lokke inena ci kica omaki i koma; miya tek dok ilara, pien atiyo boti, kit macalo yam maa otiyo kwede boti," 
Psalms86:17 Nyutta lanyut ma tito berri bota, ai Rwot, wek lewic omak jo ma gidaga ka gibineno ni in doŋ ityeko kweyo cwinya dok ikonya." 
Psalms87:1 Rwot ogero gaŋŋe i wi got maleŋ; 
Psalms87:2 en maro dog gaŋ me Cion makato kabedo mukene ducu ma jo pa Yakobo gibedo iye. 
Psalms87:3 Winy, in gaŋ pa Lubaŋa, lok me aura me deyo-gu ma gitye ka lokone i komi." 
Psalms87:4 I kin jo ma ŋeya abituco nyiŋ Rakab ki Babilon; dok abiloko i kom Piliciti, Turo ki Etiopia. Giwacci, “Ŋadi ginywalo ki kunnu.”" 
Psalms87:5 I kom Cion gibiwaco ni;: “Dano man ki maca ducu ginywalogi iye”; pien ŋat Mamalo Twal aye bimiyo Cron cuŋ likiŋ. 
Psalms87:6 Rwot bicoyo nyiŋ rok woko ducu ki kore, kun coyo ni, “Man, ginywalo kunnu. Man ginywale-kunnu.”" 
Psalms87:7 Luwer ki lumyel ducu giwaco ni, “Waŋ it mera ducu tye i in.”" 
Psalms88:1 Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, akok: dyeceŋ jwi pi kony; kadi i dyewer bene akok boti." 
Psalms88:2 Winy’ legana, cik iti iwiny kokona!" 
Psalms88:3 Lwak can mapol opoto i koma,’ omiyo kwena doŋ onyiko cok ki to," 
Psalms88:4 An doŋ gikwana i kin jo ma gicok to, ma gibidonyo piny-i bur; tekona ducu otum woko." 
Psalms88:5 Acalo ŋat mo ma gibwoto i’ kin jo muto; adoko calo jo ina ginekogi ma doŋ gibuto ilyelgi, calo jo ma wii doŋ pe PO i komgi matwal, ma doŋ gitye ka mabor ma pe iromo konyogi," 
Psalms88:6 In doŋ ityeko bola woko i te bur ka matut, ka macol dok matut adada." 
Psalms88:7 Akemoni tye mapek i koma, imiyo amwony woko i biamwonyi me akemoni boti" 
Psalms88:8 Imiyo lurema gutenya woko liyak; imiyo adoko gin malik botgi. Giloro wiya woko i ot ma pe atwero lwi akato ka mo; 
Psalms88:9 waŋa doŋ ocido woko pi cwercwiny. Ai Rwot, akok boti nino ducu; alegi kun ataŋo ciŋa boti." 
Psalms88:10 In mono itiyo taŋo pi jo muto? Tipogi mono gra malo ka paki? 
Psalms88:11 Tika gitito pi mar meri ma pe lokke wa i lyel, kadi ki pi genni bene gibitito i lobo pa jo muto?" 
Psalms88:12 Taŋo me aura ma itiyo-gu ducu nen kunnu i kabedo macol-li, nyo kony me larri binen i lobo me wil-wic?" 
Psalms88:13 Ai Rwot akok boti pi kony, odiko odiko ducu akelo legana i nyimi," 
Psalms88:14 Ai Rwpt, piŋo ibola woko? Piŋo ikanne woko ki bota?" 
Psalms88:15 Cakke ma pud atidi abedo ki arem madwoŋ ma, onoŋo doŋ acok to; abedo ka ciro tim maitimo i koma ma kelo lworo, koma doŋ oloc woko," 
Psalms88:16 Akemoni ouma woko lipuk; lwennyi i koma ma miyo lworo otyelca woko," 
Psalms88:17 Akemoni ki Lwennyi giruma woko dyere dyeceŋ jwi calo lalele me pii, ma giuma woko lipuk tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi." 
Psalms88:18 Imiyo lurema ma cok kweda ma amaro ducu gutenya woko liyak; luwota doŋ gin jo ma tye i colpiny. 
Psalms89:1 Ai Rwot, abiwero wer nakanaka pi mar meri ma pe lokke; abituco pi genni ki doga bot jo me yalwak ducu." 
Psalms89:2 Aŋeyo ni mar meri ma pe lokke bedo matwal, genni bene tye ocuŋ woko likiŋ calo polo," 
Psalms89:3 Iwacci, “Doŋ aketo gicikke ki dano ma ayero, akwoŋo kwoŋ bot laticca Daudi ni," 
Psalms89:4 ‘Abimoko likwayi gibedo matwal, dok abiketo komkerri cuŋ pi kare pa yalwak ducu.’" 
Psalms89:5 Ai Rwot, wek lwak ma i polo gupaki pi taŋo me aura ma doŋ ityeko tiyogi-ni, wek guwer bene pi genni i cokke pa joni maleŋ!" 
Psalms89:6 Pe tye ŋat mo i polo ma gitwero poro ki Rwot; pe tye mo kadi acel i kin lwak me polo ma rom kwedi, Rwot." 
Psalms89:7 In aye Lubaŋa ma gilworo i cokke pa jo maleŋ, in idit dok iger iloyo jo ducu ma gurumi woko-ni.’" 
Psalms89:8 Ai Rwot Lubaŋa me mony, aŋa ma tek calo in? In lagen ijami ducu, ai Rwot." 
Psalms89:9 Iloyo wa biamwonyi me nam ma twagge; ka biamwonyine otwagge, ikweyogi woko cut," 
Psalms89:10 Inyono Rakab piny ineko woko calo inyono geŋ lee muto, ikeyo lukworri woko ducu pi tek me badi." 
Psalms89:11 Polo ki lobo ducu meri; lobo ki jami ducu ma tye iye in aye ma iketogi. 
Psalms89:12 In aye ma iketo lobo ma tuŋ acam ki ma tuŋ acuc; got Tabor ki got Kermon gipako nyiŋi ki yomcwiny madwoŋ. 
Psalms89:13 It ye ki twero madit mada; tekki dwoŋ, ciŋa ma lacuc oille malo." 
Psalms89:14 Icibo komkerri i kom kit ma atir ki ŋolo kop kakare; mar ma pe lokke, ki gen, tye i gin ducu ma itiyo." 
Psalms89:15 Gitye ki gum jo ma giwori kun giwero boti wer ki dwan maloŋo, ma giwoto i ceŋ me kicani, ai Rwot." 
Psalms89:16 Gibedo ki yomcwiny piri dyeceŋ jwi, ma gidwori pi kiti muporre." 
Psalms89:17 In aye ma imiyogi tek miyo gibedo ki deyo; pi berri botwa miyo tekwa bene tiŋŋe malo. 
Psalms89:18 In aye i kwot ma gwokowa, ai Rwot; in ŋat Maleŋ pa Icrael imiyo botwa kabaka." 
Psalms89:19 Yam con iloko ki laticci ma lagen i lek, kun iwacci, “Aketo lalukana i kom dano ma tye ki tek, amiyo ŋat ma ayero ki i kin lwak obe do i wi komker." 
Psalms89:20 Ayero laticca Daudi, awire kimoona maleŋ, aketo obedo kabakawu." 
Psalms89:21 Tekka bibedo bote kare oucu, twerona bimiyo en bedo tek." 
Psalms89:22 Lukworre pe gibibwole, dok jo maraco pe gibiloye bene." 
Psalms89:23 Abinyono lukworre woko piny ki i nyime, dok aneko jo ma dage woko liweŋ," 
Psalms89:24 Abibedo kwede ki gen kun amare ki mar mera ma pe lokke, dok abimiye tek me loyo lukworre pi nyiŋa," 
Psalms89:25 Abimedo kerre nia ki i nam madit nio wa i kulu Euprate. 
Psalms89:26 En bilwoŋa ni, ‘In i Wora, ki Lubaŋana; in aye Got me kalarrena.’" 
Psalms89:27 Abiloko en bedo latin kayo, kabaka madit makato luker ducu ma i wi lobo-ni." 
Psalms89:28 Abigwoko mar mera ma pe lokke nakanaka pire, dok gicikkena pire bicuŋ likiŋ." 
Psalms89:29 Abimiyo lakwarre bedo kabaka kare ducu; dok abimoko komkerre bedo matwal macalo pol. 
Psalms89:30 “Ka ce likwaye gibibwoto cikka, ma gibedo kun pe gilubo gin ma aciko;" 
Psalms89:31 ka ce guturo cikka ma pe gilubo cik ma amiyogi," 
Psalms89:32 ci abipwodogi ki odoo pi balgi; can madwoŋ adada bipoto i komgi pi balgi. 
Psalms89:33 Ento pe abikwanyo mar mera ma pe lokke woko ki i kome, pe abibwoto adana me kwanyo genna woko ki i kome." 
Psalms89:34 Pe abituro gicikkena, nyo kadi loko kit lok ma yam doŋ atyeko lokone."
