Psalms89:35 “Doŋ akwoŋo kwon kicel ma bedo matwal ki nyina maleŋ; pe abiloko lok goba bot Daudi. 
Psalms89:36 Kare ducu Likwaye bibedo tye, dok abigwoko kerre bedo nakanaka calo ceŋ ma ryeny i nyima." 
Psalms89:37 Bibedo nakanaka ma omoko woko likiŋ calo dwe ma tye i kabedone, bicuŋ woko matek likiŋ calo polo ma oyarre malo.”" 
Psalms89:38 Ento kombeddi kiniga omaki i kom kabaka ma in aye iwiro ki moo; doŋ itenye woko liyak dok ikwere woko adada. 
Psalms89:39 Ityeko weko gicikkeni woko ki laticci, ibolo lalukanane i apwa ibalo woko." 
Psalms89:40 Ityeko muko cel me gaŋŋe woko ducu; cel gogone-gu ducu doŋ ireto woko piny odoko obur. 
Psalms89:41 Jo ma giwok ki i ŋete giyako jamine; doŋ odoko gin me aŋala bot luwote ma gibedo cok kwede. 
Psalms89:42 In doŋ imiyo loc woko bot lumonene; imiyo gin ducu gubedo ki yomcwiny. 
Psalms89:43 Iyo, iloko lak pala lucwanne odoko gin ma konnye pe, imiyo giloye woko i lewny." 
Psalms89:44 Ikwanyo odoo kerre woko ki i ciŋe, ka ikwanyo komkerre ituro ibolo woko piny i nom." 
Psalms89:45 Imiyo oteggi oti woko ma pud en tidi, ci ileyo wiye woko." 
Psalms89:46 Ai Rwot, ibikanne woko matwal? Nyo pi kare ma rom mene? Dok akemoni bibedo ka waŋ calo mac pi kare ma rom mene?" 
Psalms89:47 Ai Rwot, po i kom kit ma kare me kwo pa dano nok kwede, dok ipo ni dano ma iketo-gu ducu mwa!" 
Psalms89:48 Aŋa ma twero bedo kun pe to? Dok aŋa ma twero larre kene ki i twer me Lyel? 
Psalms89:49 Rwot, tic ducu ma yam itiyo, ki mar meri ma pe lokke-ni, doŋ gitye kwene? Genni ma ikwoŋo kwede kwon bot Daudi-ni kono tye kwene?" 
Psalms89:50 Ai Rwot, po i koma an laticci, nen kit maginala kwede. Nen kit ma atye ka ciro kwede yet pa lwak me rok ducu." 
Psalms89:51 Ai Rwot, nen kit ma lukworri giloko kwede lok aŋec, kun bene giŋalo dano ma in aye iwiro ki moo i kabedo ducu ma en woto iye." 
Psalms89:52 Gipwo Rwot nakanaka! Amen dok Amen! 
Psalms90:1 Rwot, in aye ibedo kalarrewa ma con ki con." 
Psalms90:2 In Lubaŋa ma bedo nakanaka; ma pud peya iketo godi ki lobo, onoŋo in doŋ it ye." 
Psalms90:3 Iloko dano doko apwa, kun iwacci, “Wudok cen, wun litino pa dano!”" 
Psalms90:4 Mwaka alip kulu ki boti rom ki nino ma okato laworo; nyo rom ki cawa acel ma i dyewor. 
Psalms90:5 Ijwero dano woko, gikato calo lek, gicalo lum ma lot odiko." 
Psalms90:6 Odiko lot, doŋo; otyeno ner, ci two woko." 
Psalms90:7 Akemoni otyekowa woko; kinigani omiyowa lworo madwoŋ. 
Psalms90:8 Ityeko keto gin marac ma watimo ducu i nyimi, wa balwa ma watimo i muŋ ducu onen i waŋi ka maleŋ." 
Psalms90:9 Kare me kwowa kato akata i te akemoni, mwakawa tum woko i kare manok twatwal." 
Psalms90:10 Kare me kwowa romo mwaka pyerabiro, nyo pyeraboro ka komwa yot; ento gin ducu kelo can ki ayelayela keken, pien gikato oyot, waŋ bene warwenyo woko." 
Psalms90:11 Aŋa ma paro pi tek me akemoni, ki pi lworo ma kinigani kelo?" 
Psalms90:12 Pwonywa me kwano nino me kwowa, wek wabed ki cwiny me ryeko." 
Psalms90:13 Lok cwinyi, ai Rwot! Imito wanen can pi kare ma rom mene? Wek kica omaki i kom luticci!" 
Psalms90:14 Kwe cwinywa odiko ki mar meri ma pe lokke, wek wawer wer wabed ki yomcwiny pi kare me kwo mewa ducu." 
Psalms90:15 Miwa yomcwiny pi kare ma rom ki nino ma imiyowa iye can; ma rom bene ki mwaka ma walimo iye ayelayela. 
Psalms90:16 Wek wan luticci wanen tic meri, wek deyo me tek meri onen bot litinowa." 
Psalms90:17 Rwot Lubaŋawa, wek gum meri obed i komwa; mok ticwa ducu ma watiyo wek obed maber! Iyo mok tic mewa ducu ma watiyo wek obed maber!" 
Psalms91:1 Dano ma bedo i kakanne pa En Mamalo Twal, ki ma bedo i te gwok pa Won Twer Ducu," 
Psalms91:2 biwaco bot Rwot ni, “In kalarrena ki cella, in Lubaŋana ma ageno.”" 
Psalms91:3 En aye ma bilari ki i owic pa ladwar, ki i two gemo marac ma neko dano." 
Psalms91:4 En biumi ki bwome, ibiriŋo ka larre i te bwome, adane en kwot ki gin ma geŋo kori." 
Psalms91:5 Pe ibilworo gin marac i dyewor, nyo kadi atero ma gicelo dyeceŋ," 
Psalms91:6 kadi two gemo ma neko dano atura i colpiny, nyo can ma poto nekogi i dyeceŋ." 
Psalms91:7 Jo alip apar gitwero to ka ŋeti, ki jo alip i tuŋ ciŋi ma lacuc; ento gin mo pe bigudo komi." 
Psalms91:8 Ibibedo caden keken, ibineno kwor ma giculo i kom lutim maraco ki waŋi." 
Psalms91:9 Inoŋo Rwot doŋ odoko kalarreni, En Mamalo Twal doŋ odoko kabedoni." 
Psalms91:10 Can mo pe bipoto i komi, kit gemo mo bene pe bibino cok ki kemani." 
Psalms91:11 Lubaŋa biciko lumalaikane piri me gwoki ka ma iwoto iye ducu. 
Psalms91:12 Gibijoli ki ciŋgi, wek pe iyok tyeni i kom got." 
Psalms91:13 Ibinyono labwor ki ororo, ibitoro latin labwor ki twol piny i nom ki tyeni." 
Psalms91:14 Kit macalo en onyuto marre i koma, abilare; abigwoke, pien en ŋeya." 
Psalms91:15 Ka okok bota, abigamo doge; abibedo kwede i kare me ayelayela, abilare dok abiketo deyo i kome." 
Psalms91:16 Abikweyo cwinye kun amiye eri i lobo pi mwaka mapol, abimiyo en ŋeyo ni an lalar dano." 
Psalms92:1 Miyo pwoc bot Rwot en gin maber, wero wer me pako nyini bene en gin maber, ai In Mamalo Twal." 
Psalms92:2 Tuco mar meri ma pe-lokke odiko, ki nyuto adani otyeno bene ber," 
Psalms92:3 kun gigoyo naŋa ki gitta, ma gilubo dwan opuk bene." 
Psalms92:4 Pien in, ai Rwot, pi ticci me aura ma itiyo omiya yomcwiny, pi tic ma itiyo miyo awero wer ki yomcwiny," 
Psalms92:5 Ticci dit tom mene, ai Rwot! Dok tammi tut rom mene!" 
Psalms92:6 Dano ma lamiŋ pe twero ŋeyo lok man, dano ma wiye odiŋ pe twero niaŋ i kom lok man, ni," 
Psalms92:7 kadi lubal gidoŋo macalo lum, dok kadi lutim maraco gibedo ki kwo maber, ento gibityekogi woko matwal." 
Psalms92:8 Ento in, ai Rwot, ibedo dit nakanaka," 
Psalms92:9 Lumerokki, ai Rwot, ada gibinekogi woko liweŋ, jo ducu ma gin lutim maraco gibiketogi woko ata." 
Psalms92:10 Imiyo adoko tek macalo jubi ma i tim, ityeko wira woko ki moo manyen." 
Psalms92:11 Atyeko neno can ma poto i kom lukworra ki waŋa, dok atyeko winyo ki ita kit ma giloyo kwede jo maraco ma onoŋo gutinne i koma." 
Psalms92:12 Jo ma kitgi atir gidoŋo calo yadi otit, gidoŋo maboco calo yadi cedar me Lebanon." 
Psalms92:13 Gipitogi i ot pa Rwot, gituru i dyekal me ot pa Lubaŋawa." 
Psalms92:14 Kadi guti ento pud gibinyak, piggi bibedo dwoŋ miyo pe gibiner." 
Psalms92:15 Man binyuto ni Rwot cwinye atir en gotta ma pe tiyo gin mo marac. 
Psalms93:1 Rwot tye ka loc, orukke ki deyo me twer; Rwot orukke, ma otweyo pyere ki tek. Iyo, lobo doŋ ocuŋ matek, pe giromo dirone;" 
Psalms93:2 komkerri omoko matek; nia wa con onoŋo in doŋ it ye. 
Psalms93:3 Lalele doŋ otyeko mor, ai Rwot, lalele otyeko mor; lalele medde ki mol liwolwol," 
Psalms93:4 Rwot dit kato mor me pii madwoij, tye ki twer me: deyo ma kato biamwonyi me namo. Rwot ma bedo i polo tye ki deyo." 
Psalms93:5 Cikki obedo me ada, ai Rwot: odi myero obed maleŋ nakanaka." 
Psalms94:1 Ai Rwot, in Lubaŋa ma lacul kwor, in Lubaŋa ma lacul kwor, ryeny imeny piny," 
Psalms94:2 A malo, in laŋolkop me lobo; cul kwor i kom jo ma wakke muporo timgi." 
Psalms94:3 Jo maraco gibilyerre pi kare ma rom mene, pi kare ma rom mene, ai Rwot?" 
Psalms94:4 Giloko lok me cac ki wakke, lutim maraco ducu gin jo ma luwakke." 
Psalms94:5 Giŋinyo joni woko, ai Rwot, gibalo joni kikomi." 
Psalms94:6 Gineko mon to ki jo ma gin lubedo, gineko wa litinokic-gu." 
Psalms94:7 Giwaco ni, “Rwot pe neno; Lubaŋa pa Yakobo pe keto cwinye iye.”" 
Psalms94:8 Wuniaŋ, wun jo ma wiwu pe tiyo! Wun lumiŋ mono wubidoko ryek awene?" 
Psalms94:9 En ŋat muketo it mono pe winyo? En Ŋat mucweyo waŋ kono pe neno? 
Psalms94:10 En ma pwodo lurok, pe bipwodowu? En ma pwonyo dano ki ryeko, pe ŋeyo gin mo?" 
Psalms94:11 Rwot ŋeyo tam pa dano, ni gicalo alur dog me yweyo keken." 
Psalms94:12 Dano ma in itiro tye ki gum, ai Rwot, dano ma ipwonyo ki lok me cikki," 
Psalms94:13 wek oywe i kare me can, nio waŋ ma gikwinyo bur pi jo maraco." 
Psalms94:14 Rwot pe bibwoto jone, pe biweko jo ma gin mere kikome." 
Psalms94:15 Gibiŋolo kop atir pi jo ma kitgi atir, jo ma cwinygi atir gibilubo." 
Psalms94:16 Aŋa ma twero tiŋŋe i kom jo maraco? Aŋa ma bicuŋ ma kakara i kom lutim maraco? 
Psalms94:17 Ka kono Rwot pe okonya, tipona kono oliŋ woko licwic i lobo me liŋo." 
Psalms94:18 I kare ma atamo ni, “Tyena ocer,” mar meri ma pe lokke otiŋa malo, ai Rwot." 
Psalms94:19 Ka atamo pi jami mapol, in ikweyo cwinya ki kicani," 
Psalms94:20 Jo maraco ma gin luloc gitwero ribbe kwedi niŋniŋ, ma giloko lok marac doko cik?" 
Psalms94:21 Gicokke kacel ka neko dano ma kite atir, gujolo kop me to i kom dano ma pe ki bal." 
Psalms94:22 Ento Rwot aye doŋ cella, en got me kalarrena." 
Psalms94:23 En bidwoko balgi i wigi kengi, ci bityekogi woko pi timgi maraco; Rwot Lubaŋawa bityekogi woko." 
Psalms95:1 Wubin wawer bot Rwot; wek cwinywa yom kom got ma larowa! 
Psalms95:2 Wabin i nyime ka miyo pwocwa; Wawer bote wer me pak ki yomcwiny! 
Psalms95:3 Rwot aye en Lubaŋa madit, en kabaka madit makato lubaŋa-gu ducu." 
Psalms95:4 Nota me lobo tye i twerone; lacol wi godi gin mere bene. 
Psalms95:5 Nam mere pien en muti yo, lobo bene en ma ocweyo ki ciŋe." 
Psalms95:6 Wubin, waryebbe piny wawore, warumu conwa i nyim Rwot ma oketowa." 
Psalms95:7 Pien en aye Lubaŋawa, wan wa jone ma en aye ma kwayowa, dok wan romi ma en aye gwokowa. Ka kono tin wun wuwinyo dwane!" 
Psalms95:8 Pe myero wumi cwinywu obed nwaŋ macalo yam wutimo i Meriba, macalo wutimo i kare ma wutye i Maca i tim." 
Psalms95:9 I kare meno kwarowu yam gutema, guporo kit ma kwona tye kwede, kadi bed guneno tic ma atiyo pigi ki waŋgi," 
Psalms95:10 Cwinya okwero lwak meno woko pi mwaka pyeraŋwen; omiyo awacci, “Gin lwak ma guŋak woko ki i cwinygi, pe gilubo cikka.”" 
Psalms95:11 Mumiyo akwoŋo kwoŋ ki kiniga, ni pe myero gudony i lobo ka ma an abimiyogi iye yweyo." 
Psalms96:1 Wuwer bot Rwot wer manyen; wuwer bot Rwot, wun lobo ducu!" 
Psalms96:2 Wuwer bot Rwot, wupwo nyiŋe; wutit pi larre nino ducu." 
Psalms96:3 Wutuc deyone bot lurok wutit ticce me aura bot rok ducu! 
Psalms96:4 Rwot aye dit, myero gipake twatwal myero gilwore makato lubaŋa mukene-gu ducu," 
Psalms96:5 Pien lubaŋa pa lurok ducu gin cal jogi apaya, ento Rwot aye oketo polo." 
Psalms96:6 Deyo ki dit tye bote tek ki ber tye i kabedo mere maleŋ," 
Psalms96:7 Wun kaka me rok ducu, wumi deyo bot Rwot, wumi deyo ki tek bot Rwot!" 
Psalms96:8 Wumi deyo bot Rwot muporo nyiŋe; wukel gityer, wubin wa i dyekalle!" 
Psalms96:9 Wuwor Rwot ki, boŋo maleŋ; komwu omyel i nyime, wun lobo ducu!" 
Psalms96:10 Dano guwac i kin lurok ni, “Rwot tye ka loc! Ada, lobo ocuŋ matek ma pe yeŋŋe; en biŋolo kop i kom dano maromrom.”" 
Psalms96:11 Polo iye obed yom, lobo bene obed ma cwinye-yom, wek nam omor, ki jami ducu ma tye iye;" 
Psalms96:12 wek poto obed ki yomcwiny, ki jami ducu ma tye iye! Man bimiyo yadi ma i buŋa ducu, giwero wer pi yomcwiny" 
Psalms96:13 i nyim Rwot, pien obebino ka ŋolo kop ki lobo. En ‘biŋolo kop ma tye atir i kom lobo; biŋolo kop i kom rok ducu ki adane." 
Psalms97:1 Rwot tye ka loc; wek lobo obed ki yomcwiny; wek lobo ma i dog nam ducu cwinygi obed yom! 
Psalms97:2 Pol ki mutu mucido licuc ogure woko dyere; kit ma atir ki ŋolo kop ma tye atir aye miyo komkerre cuŋ matek. 
Psalms97:3 Mac telo nyime, waŋo lumerokke ma gugure dyereni woko." 
Psalms97:4 Lutkotte mil menyo lobo; lobo neno ci yeŋŋe. 
Psalms97:5 Godi leny i nyim Rwot calo odok kic, i nyim Rwot me lobo ducu." 
Psalms97:6 Polo tito porrene; lwak me rok ducu gineno deyone. 
Psalms97:7 Jo ducu ma woro cal jogi ma gipayo lewic omakogi, jo ma wakke pi cal jogi ma gupayo; lwak lubaŋa-gu ducu giryebbe piny i nyime." 
Psalms97:8 Jo Cion giwinyo ci gibedo ki yomcwiny, anyira Juda ducu cwinygi yom ma pe twerre, pi kop ma iŋolo, ai Lubaŋa." 
Psalms97:9 In ŋat mamalo twal i wi lobo ducu, ai Rwot; in i dit ikato lubaŋa-gu ducu." 
Psalms97:10 Rwot maro jo ma dag gin marac; en gwoko tipo pa jone ma gene; en larogi woko ki i ciŋ jo maraco. 
Psalms97:11 Ceŋ ryeny pi jo ma kitgi atir, yomcwiny bene tye pi jo ma cwinygi atir." 
Psalms97:12 Wubed ki yomcwiny i Rwot, wun jo ma kitwu atir, wupwo nyiŋe maleŋ!" 
Psalms98:1 Wuwer bot Rwot wer manyen, pien doŋ otyeko tiyo jami me aura! Ciŋe ma lacuc ki bade maleŋ okelo bote loc." 
Psalms98:2 Rwot doŋ omiyo locce oneŋe, doŋ otyeko nyuto porrene ka maleŋ i nyim lurok ducu." 
Psalms98:3 En opo i kom mar mere ma pe lokke kacel ki genne bot jo me ot pa Icrael, Agikki piny me wi lobo ducu doŋ oneno loc pa Lubaŋawa," 
Psalms98:4 Wudaŋŋe ki yomcwiny nyim Rwot, wun lobo ducu; wupake ki wer kun wudaŋŋe ki yomcwiny." 
Psalms98:5 Wuwer wer me pak bot Rwot ki opuk; wuwer kun wugoyo ki opuk ki dwan mamit! 
Psalms98:6 Wukut tum ki obute, wudaŋŋe ki yomcwiny i nyim kabaka, ma en aye Rwot!" 
Psalms98:7 Wek nam omor, ki gin mupoŋ iye, lobo kacel ki jo ducu ma bedo iye!" 
Psalms98:8 Wek lalele omol otagge, wek godi ducu guwer kacel ki yomcwiny" 
Psalms98:9 i nyim Rwot, pien obebino ka ŋolo kop i kom lobo. En biŋolo kop ma atir i kom lobo, biŋolo kop pa lwak me rok ducu maromrom." 
Psalms99:1 Rwot tye ka loc, wek rok ducu komgi omyel! En obedo i WI komker mere ma gicibo i wi lukerubi; wek lobo oyeŋŋe!" 
Psalms99:2 Rwot dit i Cion; en loyo lwak me rok ducu. 
Psalms99:3 Wek gin ducu gipak nyiŋi madit me deyo ma kelo lworo! En ŋat Maleŋ! 
Psalms99:4 Kabaka matek, ma maro ŋolo kop kakare, in aye ma ikelo ŋolo kop maromrom: ikelo ŋolo kop kakare ki kit ma atir, imiyo omoko matek i kin jo pa Yakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Wudwor Rwot Lubaŋawa, wuwore i nyim kom me teno tyene. En ŋat maleŋl" 
Psalms99:6 Moses ki Aron bene onoŋo gubedo tye i kin ajwagine, Camuel bene onoŋo tye i kin jo ma gilwoŋo nyiŋe, Gukok bot Rwot, ci Rwot ogamo doggi." 
Psalms99:7 Oloko kwedgi ki i wir pol; gugwoko lok me cadenne, ki cik ma en omiyo botgi." 
Psalms99:8 Ai Rwot Lubaŋawa, in ceŋ igamo doggi, ibedo botgi Lubaŋa ma lawek bal, ento ibedo laculkwor me gin marac ma gutiyo."

Psalms100:1 Wuwer ki dwan me yomcwiny bot Rwot, wun lobo ducu!" 
Psalms100:2 Wuti bot Rwot ki yomcwiny, wubin i nyime ki wer!" 
Psalms100:3 Wuŋe ni Rwot en Lubaŋa! En aye oketowa, wan wa danone, wan jone dok romi ma en kwayogi."

Psalms100:5 Pien Rwot ber; mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka, ki ada mere bedo nakanaka bot yalwak ducu." 
Psalms101:1 Abiwero wer pi ada ki pi ŋolo kop atir; abiwero wer boti, ai Rwot." 
Psalms101:2 Abiketo cwinya me lubo yo ma atir ma pe tera i bal. Ibibino bota awene? I oda abibedo ma cwinya leŋ; 
Psalms101:3 pe abiketo kit mo marac i nyima me aluba. Adag cic pa jo ma gilokke gibwoto Lubaŋa woko; pe abiye ni aribbe kwedgi wek kitgi oguda. 
Psalms101:4 Pe abibedo ki cwiny me ŋak woko ki i yo ma atir wacel, pe abitamo tam mo me timo gin marac." 
Psalms101:5 Abineko dano ma loko lok marac kun kwoto ki lawote woko; dok pe abiciro tim pa dano ma Lyerre kun nyatte i cwinye. 
Psalms101:6 Abineno jo ma bedo i lobo ma gigeno Lubaŋa ki kica, wek gubibed kacel kweda i gaŋ kaila; ŋat ma lubo yo ma atir ma pe tere i bal bitiyo tic bota." 
Psalms101:7 Dano ma lagoba pe bibedo i oda; dok ŋat ma loko lok goba atata pe bimedde ki tiyo ticce i nyima. 
Psalms101:8 Nino ki nino abityeko jo maraco woko ducu ki i lobo, kun ajwero lutim maraco woko liweŋ ki i gaŋ pa Rwot." 
Psalms102:1 Ai Rwot, winy legana; wek kokona owinnye boti!" 
Psalms102:2 Pe ikanne woko bota do i kare ma atye ki can! Cik iti iwiny lokka, gam doga oyotoyot i nino ma akok iye boti-ni!" 
Psalms102:3 Karena tye ka rwenyo woko calo yito, ma cogona ducu waŋ awaŋa calo ruk mac." 
Psalms102:4 Gipwoda woko calo lum mutwo, miyo wiya wil woko ka camo kwon." 
Psalms102:5 Acur matek kit man; riŋo koma omoko woko i kom cogona likiŋ," 
Psalms102:6 Abedo calo acut ma bedo i tim, calo tula ma bedo i wi obur." 
Psalms102:7 Abuto ma nino pe mako waŋa, atye calo winyo ma bedo kene i wi ot malo." 
Psalms102:8 Lukworra giloko lok aŋec i koma dyeceŋ jwi, jo ma nywara gilwoŋo nyiŋa kun giceno ki jo mukene," 
Psalms102:9 Buru doŋ olokke odoko camma, arubo pig waŋa ki ginamatana," 
Psalms102:10 pi lyeto me akemoni ki kinigani; in doŋ ityeko kwanya ibola woko. 
Psalms102:11 Kwona obedo calo tipo me otyeno ma cok rwenyo; alokke doŋ adoko calo lum mutwo. 
Psalms102:12 Ento in ibedo i wi komkerri matwal, ai Rwot; yalwak me kare ducu gibipo pi nyiŋi," 
Psalms102:13 Ibia ci kica maki i kom Cion; kare doŋ oromo me nyuto berri bote; kare ma iciko pire doŋ oromo. 
Psalms102:14 Luticci gimare, kadi bed onoŋo doŋ gedo ducu iye odoko odur godi, kica makogi i kome pien doŋ en odokoapwa." 
Psalms102:15 Rok ducu bilworo Rwot, luker ducu ma i wi lobo gibilwore pi deyone." 
Psalms102:16 Rwot bigero Cion odoco; en bituc kun nyuto deyone. 
Psalms102:17 En biwinyo lega pa jo ma piny doŋ obwoyogi woko adada, pe bicayo lega me bako dog ma gikelo i nyime." 
Psalms102:18 Wek gico lok man gigwok maber pi yalwak me kare ma bibino anyim, wek omi jo ma pud peya ginywalogi gupak Rwot, ni," 
Psalms102:19 Rwot oneno piny ki i kabedone maleŋ ma tye malo, en oneno piny i lobo ki i polo," 
Psalms102:20 wek cwiny koko pa lumabuc, dok wek egony jo ma doŋ gityeko ŋolo kop me to i wigi," 
Psalms102:21 Kumeno dano gibipako nyiŋ Rwot i Cion, gibipake i Jerucalem" 
Psalms102:22 i kare ma lwak me rok ducu cokke kacel, wa ker ducu, pi woro Rwot." 
Psalms102:23 Rwot oturo tekka woko ma pud atidi; ojwiko nino me kwona obedo manok. 
Psalms102:24 Awacci, “Ai Lubaŋana, pe ikwany kwona woko ma pud peya ati!” Rwot, in ibedo nakanaka i kare pa yalwak ducu." 
Psalms102:25 I kare macon mukato aŋec iketo guti me te lobo, dok in aye ma itiyo polo ki ciŋi," 
Psalms102:26 Gibito woko, ento in ibedo meri matwal; gibiti woko macalo boŋo. In ilokogi macalo ginaruka, ci gitum woko liweŋ;" 
Psalms102:27 ento in kiti acel, mwaka me kwoni bene pe gik." 
Psalms102:28 Ibitniyo litinowa, wan luticci, gibibedo ki kuc laboŋo peko mo; dok in aye ma ibigwoko likwayogi." 
Psalms103:1 Pwo Rwot, in tipona; kwona ducu myero opak nyiŋ Rwot maleŋ!" 
Psalms103:2 Pwo Rwot, in tipona; wii pe myero owil i kom mot ducu mabeco ma en omiyi." 
Psalms103:3 En ma weko balla ducu, en bene ma caŋo two ducu ki i koma." 
Psalms103:4 En olaro kwona omiyo pe adonyo i bur, oketo mar mere ma pe lokke kacel ki kicane i koma;" 
Psalms103:5 en miya jami mabeco pi kare me kwona ducu, kun roco tekona kare ki kare macalo pa ocur." 
Psalms103:6 Rwot ŋolo kop kakare dok maromrom, ŋolo bene kop pa jo ma giunogi atir." 
Psalms103:7 En otuco yubbe woko ducu bot Moses, omiyo jo Icrael guneno tic me aura ma en otiyo." 
Psalms103:8 Rwot lakica dok maro dano, kiniga pe make oyot, mar mere ma pe lokke dwoŋ," 
Psalms103:9 En pe bibedo ka jukowa kun juyowa kare ducu, kinigane bene pe ri nakanaka." 
Psalms103:10 En pe timowa kun poro bal ma watimo, dok pe culo kwor i komwa kun poro kit roc ducu ma watimo." 
Psalms103:11 Kit macalo polo tye malo i wi lobo, mar mere ma pe lokke bene dit kit meno bot jo ma lwore." 
Psalms103:12 Kit macalo tuŋ wokceŋ tye bor kwede ki tuŋ potocen-ni, en kwanyo balwa woko ducu ki i komwa cwalo ka mabor kit meno." 
Psalms103:13 Macalo wegi litino bedo ki kica i kom litinogi, Rwot bene kica mako kit meno i kom jo ma lwore." 
Psalms103:14 En ŋeyo kit gin ma ecweyowa kwede; en po ni wan apwa mamwa. 
Psalms103:15 Nino me kwo pa dano obedo calo lum; en lot, turu macalo ature ma tye i okan," 
Psalms103:16 Yamo kodo ŋeno, ci rwenyo woko liweŋ, kabedo ma en ocuŋ iye-ni doŋ pe bineye matwal." 
Psalms103:17 Ento mar pa Rwot ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka pi jo ma wore, dok berre bedo nakanaka bot jo me yalwak ducu," 
Psalms103:18 bot jo ma gwoko gicikkene, ma gipo pi tiyo gin ma en ociko." 
Psalms103:19 Rwot ocibo komkerre i polo; en kabaka ma loyo ducu. 
Psalms103:20 Wupak Rwot, wun lumalaika matek, ma wulubo cikke, kun wuwinyo lok ducu ma en waco botwu!" 
Psalms103:21 Wupak Rwot, wun lwak me monnye ducu ma wutye i polo, wun luticce ma wutiyo gin ma en mito!" 
Psalms103:22 Wupak Rwot, wun ginaketane ducu, i kabedo ducu ma en loyo! Pwo Rwot, in tipona!" 
Psalms104:1 Pak Rwot, in tiponal Ai Rwot Lubaŋana, in idit twatwal! Irukke ki dit ki deyo;" 
Psalms104:2 iumo komi woko ki ceŋ calo iruko boŋo, Iyaro polo woko macalo kema ma giyaro," 
Psalms104:3 dok igero kicika me otti malo i wi pii. Iloko pol odoko gadigadini, ituk iŋweco woko ki gadigadini i dye yamo." 
Psalms104:4 Iloko yamo odoko laorri, kun leb mac ma lyel gubedo luticci." 
Psalms104:5 Iketo lobo ocuŋ matek i kom gutine, ma pe biyeŋŋe wacel." 
Psalms104:6 Iumo woko ki nam matut calo giumo ki ginaruka, ki pii bene omwonyo godi woko ducu." 
Psalms104:7 Ento i kare ma ijuko pii, ci oriŋo woko; i kare ma owinyo dwani omor kun idaŋŋe natek, ci orwenyo woko liweŋ," 
Psalms104:8 Omol ki i wi godi okato ocito piny i luŋ, i kabedo ma yam iyero pire." 
Psalms104:9 Iketo ki pii waŋ lobo ma pe myero oŋol okat i ŋeye, wek pe dok oum lobo woko odoco." 
Psalms104:10 Imiyo pii nyette mol i luŋ, kun mol ki i kin godi." 
Psalms104:11 Lee tim ducu gimato pii meno, kana me tim bene gimato gineko ki orwo," 
Psalms104:12 Lwak winyi gigero odigi i wi yadi ki i ŋet kulu, ci gibedo ka koko i jaŋ yat." 
Psalms104:13 Icwalo kot ki i polo cwer piny i wi godi, lobo opoŋ ki jami ducu ma in itiyo." 
Psalms104:14 Imiyo lum lot doŋo me cam pa dyaŋ, ki ginapita ma myero dano oti kwedgi, wek dano opur lobo ci onoŋ cam," 
Psalms104:15 ki koŋo vino ma yo mo cwiny dano, ki moo me wir wek waŋe obed ma ryeny aryenya, ki dok ocam kwon ma miye teko." 
Psalms104:16 Yadi pa Rwot limo pii mabup, gin aye yadi cedar me Lebanon ma yam en opitogi-ni." 
Psalms104:17 Lwak winyi mapol gigero odigi i wi yadi-kunnu; winyi aramatala bene gibedo i wi yadi maboco," 
Psalms104:18 Dyegi me tim gibedo i wi godi ma malo twatwal, ki okile giriŋo gikanne i got." 
Psalms104:19 Iketo dwe me poko kare; ceŋ ŋeyo kare me potone. 
Psalms104:20 In aye ma iketo colpiny omiyo dyewor tye; i kare meno aye lee ma gibedo i buŋa gicako kwede wotgi. 
Psalms104:21 Litino labwor gidwaro lee ki koko, kun giyenyo cam ma Lubaŋa miyo botgi." 
Psalms104:22 Ka ceŋ otuc gidok woko cen, ci gibuto i gorogi," 
Psalms104:23 Dano kato woko cito ka tic ci tiyo ticce nio wa otyeno," 
Psalms104:24 Ai Rwot, in doŋ itiyo lwak jami mapol! Itiyogi ducu ki ryeko, omiyo lobo opoŋ ki ginaketani." 
Psalms104:25 Nam madit malac bene tye kuca, lwak ginaketa ma welgi pe kwanne bedo iye, gin makwo matino ki madito." 
Psalms104:26 Mel bene woto ki iye, dok twol ma min kulu ma iketo-ni bene tuko iye." 
Psalms104:27 Gin ducu gineno boti, gimito imigi cam i kare ma mitte kikome." 
Psalms104:28 Ka imiyogi cam, ci gigamo gicamo woko; ka iyabo ciŋi imiyogi cam, ci giyeŋ ki jami mabeco mada." 
Psalms104:29 Ka ikanne woko ki botgi, ci gineno can; ka ikwanyo yamo me yweyoni woko ki botgi ci gito woko, gidok i apwa ka ma’ yam gua ki iye." 
Psalms104:30 Ka iketo yamo me yweyoni i igi ci gibedo kwo; dok bene imiyo lobo doko nyen. 
Psalms104:31 Deyo pa Rwot myero ori nakanaka! Rwot myero obed ki yomcwiny pi gin ma en otiyo. 
Psalms104:32 Rwot neno lobo ci miyo yeŋŋe, en gudo godi ci giduny yito," 
Psalms104:33 Abiwero wer bot Rwot pi kare me kwona ducu; abiwero wer me pako Lubaŋana ka pud akwo. 
Psalms104:34 Wek lok ma alwodo ki i cwinya oyom cwiny Rwot, pien en aye ma miyo abedo ki yomcwiny." 
Psalms104:35 Wek gityek lubalo woko liweŋ ki i lobo, dok wek jo maraco bene gurweny woko matwal! Pwo Rwot, in tipona! Wupwo Rwot!" 
Psalms105:1 Wumi pwoc bot Rwot, wulwon nyiŋe, wumi ticce oneŋe i kin rok ducu!" 
Psalms105:2 Wuwer bote wer me pako en, wutit ticce me aura ducu!" 
Psalms105:3 Wuket deyo i kom nyiŋe maleŋ: jo ma yenyo Rwot cwinygi obed yom! 
Psalms105:4 Wubin bot Rwot wek wunoŋ tek ki bote, wubed i nyime nakanaka." 
Psalms105:5 Wupo i kom tic me aura ma en otiyo ducu, taŋo ma yam otiyo ki kop ma en oŋolo," 
Psalms105:6 wun likwayo pa Abraim ma yam laticce, wun litino pa Yakobo ma en oyerowu." 
Psalms105:7 En aye Rwot Lubaŋawa; kop ma en oŋolo romo i lobo ducu. 
Psalms105:8 En cwinye omoko I kom gicikkene ma bedo nakanaka, i kom lok ma yam ociko, pi yalwak alip ki alip," 
Psalms105:9 en gicikke ma oketo ki Abraim, ki lok ma yam okwoŋo ki Icaka," 
Psalms105:10 ma omoko odoko cik bot Yakobo, wek obed gicikke ki Icrael matwal," 
Psalms105:11 kun wacci, “Abimiyo lobo Kanaan botwu, obed lobo me aleyawu.”" 
Psalms105:12 I kare ma pud gin nok, ma welgi tidi, ma pud gin lubedo i lobo-nu," 
Psalms105:13 ma giwirre i kin rok mapatpat, ma gia ki i te ker acel gikobo i rok mukene," 
Psalms105:14 Lubaŋa pe oye ŋat mo odiyogi. Ojuko luker mapol pigi kun wacci," 
Psalms105:15 “Pe wugud kom jo ma an awirogi, pe wutim lunebina marac!”" 
Psalms105:16 I kare ma Rwot ocwalo kec opoto i lobogi, ci okwanyo camgi ma gikwo kwede woko ducu," 
Psalms105:17 noŋo en ocwalo Yucepu okwoŋo nyimgi, en dano ma yam gicato woko macalo opii-ni." 
Psalms105:18 Gitweyo tyene woko ki nyor matek, girwako atego nyonyo i ŋute," 
Psalms105:19 nio waŋ ma lok ma en oloko-ni ocobbe kakare; lok pa Rwot oteme onoŋo ni en tye atir. 
Psalms105:20 Kabaka ocwalo dano ci gigonye woko, laloc me lobo ogonyo nyor woko oweko en ocito gire." 
Psalms105:21 Kabaka oketo en obedo rwot ma loyo ode, ki ŋat ma loyo jamine ducu;" 
Psalms105:22 omiye bene twero me pwonyo rwodi kit ma cwinye mito, dok me pwonyo ludito ma gimiye tam ki ryeko." 
Psalms105:23 Omiyo Icrael obino i Ejipt, en Yakobo odoko labedo i lobo pa Kam." 
Psalms105:24 Rwot omiyo lwakke gunywalo litino mapol, dok omiyo gudoko tek ma kato lukworgi." 
Psalms105:25 Oloko cwiny jo Ejipt omiyo gukwero jone, ci gutiyo ki luticce i kit me bwolo." 
Psalms105:26 En ocwalo laticce Moses, ki Aron ma en aye oyero." 
Psalms105:27 Gutiyo lanyut pa Lubaŋa madito, gutiyo taŋo mapol i lobo pa Kam." 
Psalms105:28 Ocwalo colpiny, ci lobo ocido woko odoko collicuc; ento gujemo woko pe guwinyo lokke." 
Psalms105:29 Oloko pii ma i kulu megi odoko remo, omiyo rec ma tye iye ducu guto woko." 
Psalms105:30 Lobogi opoŋ ki lwak ogwal mapol ata, kadi wa gaŋ kal pa kabaka noŋo opoŋ ki ogwal keken." 
Psalms105:31 Lubaŋa oloko, ci omiyo lwak lwaŋi madwoŋ obino, ki nyoggi bene gucorre i lobogi ducu." 
Psalms105:32 Omiyo pee ocwer ma ka kot, ki lutkot bene owil mutyeko lobogi woko ducu." 
Psalms105:33 Ojwero olok ki yat odurogi ducu, ci oturo yadi ducu ma i lobogi." 
Psalms105:34 Dok oloko ci bonyo ocorre, lwak litino bonyo ma welgi pe kwanne;" 
Psalms105:35 gucamo ginapita woko liweŋ ki i lobo, gucamo kit kwa ginapita me cam ducu ma gupuro i lobogi." 
Psalms105:36 Oneko litino kayogi wa co woko ducu, ma gin aye jo ma gukwoŋo nywalo ki tekogi." 
Psalms105:37 Okwanyo jo Icrael okelogi woko ma gutiŋo ryal ki jabu; dano mo ma ogatte i kin kakane ducu obedo pe," 
Psalms105:38 I kare ma gua woko ki kunnu jo Ejipt cwinygi obedo yom, pien onoŋo gilworogi mada," 
Psalms105:39 En oyaro pol malo ka wi jone, dok omiyogi mac me menyo piny dyewor," 
Psalms105:40 Gulege ci ocwalo aluru, ocwalo kwon mabup ki i polo wek gucam guyeŋ." 
Psalms105:41 Obaro got ci pii onyette okatti ki iye, omol ki i dye tim aroo calo kulu," 
Psalms105:42 En opo i kom cikkene maleŋ, ki i kom Abraim ma laticce." 
Psalms105:43 En okwanyo jone otelogi ki yomcwiny, ma lwakke ma en oyero gidaŋŋe ki wer matek." 
Psalms105:44 Omiyogi lobo pa lurok, omiyo gukwanyo cam ki i poto ma jo me rok mukene guyelle iye," 
Psalms105:45 wek lwakke gulub cikke, dok gugwok gin ma en ociko ducu. Wupak Rwot!" 
Psalms106:1 Wupak Rwot! Wumi pwoc bot Rwot, pien en ber; Mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka!" 
Psalms106:2 Aŋa ma twero tito pi tic madito matek ma Rwot otiyo, dok aŋa ma twero pako en muromo maber?" 
Psalms106:3 Jo ma ŋolo kop atir tye ki yomcwiny, jo ma tiyo gin ma tye atir kare ducu!" 
Psalms106:4 Ai Rwot, po pira ka inyuto kicani bot lwakki; konya, bene, ka ibilarogi;" 
Psalms106:5 wek anen kit ma joni ma iyero gibibedo kwede maber, ci anywak bedo ki yomcwiny kacel ki rokki, wek awakke kacel ki joni ma gin aye gipinnyi," 
Psalms106:6 Wan kacel ki kwarowa ducu watyeko timo bal; wan watyeko timo roc, watimo gin maraco adada." 
Psalms106:7 Kwarowa pe gutamo pi tic meri me aura ma yam itiyo botgi, i kare ma gitye i Ejipt: pe gupo i kom bup me mar meri ma pe lokke, ento gujemo woko i kom En Mamalo Twal i dog Nam Makwar." 
Psalms106:8 Ento en pud olarogi aye pi nyiŋe, wek emi twerone madit onene." 
Psalms106:9 Ojuko Nam Makwar, ci nam otwo wokot otelo wigi i dye nam matut calo gitye ka wot i dye tim mutwo." 
Psalms106:10 Olarogi ki i ciŋ lukworgi, olarogi ki i twero pa lumerokgi." 
Psalms106:11 Pii omwonyo’ lumerokgi woko liweŋ; ŋat mo acel i kingi pe odoŋ. 
Psalms106:12 Lacen lwak guye lokke; guwero wer bene me pake. 
Psalms106:13 Ento wigi owil woko oyotoyot i kom tic ma en otiyo, gubedo ka tic ma pe doŋ gukuro ryeko ma a ki bote." 
Psalms106:14 Cwinygi opukke pi camo riŋo i dye tim, gutemo i Lubaŋa i tim aroo." 
Psalms106:15 En omiyogi gin ma gupenye pire, ento ocwalo kit two marac ma balo kom dano i komgi." 
Psalms106:16 I kare ma nyeko omakogi i kom Moses, ki i kom Aron ma en ŋat maleŋ ma Rwot oyero," 
Psalms106:17 ci lobo obar omwonyo Datan woko, ka oumo lwak pa Abiram woko bene." 
Psalms106:18 Mac oturo ki lyel i wi lwakgi; ci leb mac ma lyel-l i owano jo maraco woko ducu. 
Psalms106:19 Gucweyo cal-latin twon i Koreb, ci gubedo ka woro cal jabu ma guliyo-ni." 
Psalms106:20 Guloko deyo pa Lubaŋa woko, guwilo ki deyo pa cal twon dyaŋ ma camo lum." 
Psalms106:21 Wigi owil woko i kom Lubaŋa Lalargi, ma yam otiyo gin me aura madito i lobo Ejipt;" 
Psalms106:22 pe gupo pi gin me aura ma en otiyo i lobo pa Kam, ki gin maraco ma kelo lworo ma en otiyo i dog Nam Makwar." 
Psalms106:23 Mumiyo en owacci onoŋo ebetyekogi woko, ka nene pe Moses, ma en aye dano ma eyero, ocuŋ i nyime, i kin en ki lwakke, ci oloko akemone woko omiyo pe otyekogi." 
Psalms106:24 Gucayo lobo maber ma yomo cwiny dano-ni woko, ma pe gubedo ki niye wacel i kom gin ma Lubaŋa ociko," 
Psalms106:25 Gubedo i kemagi kun giŋur aŋura, dok pe guwinyo lok ma Rwot owaco botgi." 
Psalms106:26 Omiyo en otiŋo ciŋe malo okwoŋo kwoŋ botgi ni, ebimiyo gito i dye tim," 
Psalms106:27 dok ebikeyogi woko i kin rok mapatpat, kun eketogi woko atata i lobo mapol." 
Psalms106:28 Cutcut guribbe ki rok mukene ka, woro jok Baal i Peor, dok gucamo gitum ma gityero pi jo muto;" 
Psalms106:29 gumiyo kiniga omako Rwot pi gin ma gutimo, ki two gemo marac bene opoto i komgi." 
Psalms106:30 Finekaci oa malo, omine pi tyeko lokke, ci two gemo otuggi gik woko cut." 
Psalms106:31 Gibedo ka po pi lok man ni en dano ma kite atir, gibipo iye bene matwal pi kare pa yalwak ducu." 
Psalms106:32 Gumiyo kiniga omako Rwot i ŋet pii me Meriba pi meno omiyo Moses oneno can malit pigi. 
Psalms106:33 Gumiyo cwiny Moses odoko kec, omiyo oloko lok ma onoŋo myero pe en oloki," 
Psalms106:34 Pe guneko jo me rok mukene, kit macalo onoŋo Rwot ocikogi kwede," 
Psalms106:35 ento gurubbe woko ki lurok, gubedo ka lubo yo me woro cal jogi macalo lurok giworo." 
Psalms106:36 Lwak pa Lubaŋa gubedo ka woro cal jogi, ma olokke odoko owic botgi." 
Psalms106:37 Gubedo ka tyero litino awobegi ki anyiragi macalo gitum bot jogi. 
Psalms106:38 Guneko jo mapol ma gipe ki bal, ma gin aye litino awobegi ki anyiragi, ma yam gutyero bot cal jogi me Kanaan macalo gitum; ci pi remo pa dano ma guoyo omiyo lobo odoko gin me kwer." 
Psalms106:39 Gudoko jo ma keni pi gin: ma gutiyo; i gin ma gutiyo gubedo ka timo tim me kwele kwele. 
Psalms106:40 Mumiyo kiniga omako Rwot i kom jone, omiyo okwero jone woko, ma gin aye gipinnye-ni." 
Psalms106:41 Pi meno oweko omiyogi i ciŋ lurok, oweko lukworgi ma yam gidaggi aye gubedo ka loyogi." 
Psalms106:42 Lukworgi ounogi mada, gudiyogi piny i te locgi." 
Psalms106:43 Rwot olaro jone tyen mapol, ento gin gubedo ka jemo woko kome i gin ducu ma gutimo; gupoto piny twatwal pi balgi." 
Psalms106:44 Ento Rwot pud owinyo kokogi aye i kare ma gukok, oniaŋ ada ni gitye ki can," 
Psalms106:45 Omiyo opo pi gicikkene pigi; pi mar mere ma pe lokke omiyo Rwot oŋut oloko tamme. 
Psalms106:46 Omiyo jo ducu ma giloyogi macalo opii me bedo ki kica i komgi. 
Psalms106:47 Larwa, ai Rwot Lubaŋawa, cokwa woko ki i kin lurok, wek wapwo nyiŋi maleŋ, waum ka wapaki." 
Psalms106:48 Gipwo Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, gipake nakanaka! lo ducu myero guwac ni, “Amen!” Wupak Rwot!" 
Psalms107:1 Wumi pwoc bot Rwot, pien en ber; mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka!" 
Psalms107:2 Wek jo ma Rwot okokogi guwac kumeno, gin jo ma en okokogi ki i can," 
Psalms107:3 kun okwanyogi ki i lobo pa lurok odwokogi cen i lobogi, ma ocokogi ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ ki yo tuŋ potoceŋ, ki yo tuŋ acam ki yo tuŋ acuc." 
Psalms107:4 Jo mogo gubedo ka lak ata i tim aroo, pe gumedo ki noŋo yo ma cito i gaŋ ka ma myero gubed iye;" 
Psalms107:5 kec ki orwo pii onekogi matek, omiyo gen ducu orwenyo woko ki i cwinygi." 
Psalms107:6 I kare ma gitye ki can gukok bot Rwot, ci en olarogi ki i can megi." 
Psalms107:7 Otelogi guwoto ki yo matir, nio ka guo wa i gaŋ ka ma myero gubed iye," 
Psalms107:8 Myero gupwo Rwot pi mar mere ma pe lokke, ki pi tic me aura ma en otiyo pi dano!" 
Psalms107:9 En miyo jo ma orwo pii nekogi giyeŋ, ki jo ma kec nekogi bene en miyo giyeŋ ki jami mabeco." 
Psalms107:10 Jo mogo gubedo i mutu ki colpiny, lumabuc ma gitweyo ki nyor ma gitye ka winyo arem madwoŋ," 
Psalms107:11 pien gujemo woko pe gulubo lok ma Lubaŋa ocikogi kwede, dok gukwero pwony pa En Mamalo Twal." 
Psalms107:12 Cwinygi ool woko pi tic matek ma gubedo ka tiyone; gupoto piny, ci onoŋo ŋat mo pe ma myero okonygi," 
Psalms107:13 I kare ma gitye ki can gukok bot Rwot, ci en olarogi ki i cangi." 
Psalms107:14 Okwanyogi okelogi woko ki i mutu ki colpiny, ka ocodo nyor ma gitweyogi kwede woko lirwatrwat." 
Psalms107:15 Myero gupwo Rwot pi mar mere ma pe lokke, ki pi tic me aura ma en otiyo pi dano." 
Psalms107:16 Oturo kika mola woko ducu, oŋolo rii nyonyo me cego doggola opoko iye woko i dul aryo." 
Psalms107:17 Jo mogo komgi obedo lit pi balgi, gubedo ki can madwoŋ pi gin maraco ma gutimo." 
Psalms107:18 Gubedo ka kwero kit cam ducu; onoŋo doŋ gicok to. 
Psalms107:19 I kare ma gitye ki can gukok bot Rwot, ci en olarogi ki i cangi." 
Psalms107:20 Ocaŋogi ki lok ma en oloko aloka keken, ci olarogi ki i to." 
Psalms107:21 Myero gupwo Rwot pi mar mere ma pe lokke, ki pi tic me aura ma en otiyo pi dano." 
Psalms107:22 Myero gupwoye kun gityero gityer me pwoc, dok gutit pi tic ma en otiyo kun giwero wer me yomcwiny!" 
Psalms107:23 jo mogo guwoto ki mel i dye nam, ginjo ma ticgi terogi i nam madoŋo." 
Psalms107:24 Guneno gin ma Rwot twero tiyone, ticce me aura ma en tiyo i nam madoŋo-gu." 
Psalms107:25 En oloko, ci yamo matek okodo, omiyo pii me nam otwagge." 
Psalms107:26 Omiyo mel gutiŋŋe malo ma gicok gudo polo, ka dok gudwogo piny gumwony woko ka matut i te nam; tekcwinygi orwenyo woko i can marom-meno." 
Psalms107:27 Gucatte kun gipaŋŋe apaŋa macalo lumero koŋo, ma ryeko otum woko liweŋ ki i wigi." 
Psalms107:28 I kare ma gitye ki can gukok bot Rwot, ci en olarogi ki i cangi." 
Psalms107:29 Ojuko yamo matek ci nam opye mot, ki biamwonyi me nam ducu oliŋ woko mot." 
Psalms107:30 Cwinygi obedo yom pi piny ma oliŋ woko mot litik; en okelogi bene wa i waŋ wat ka ma gimito bino iye, ki lobo ma tar atara ligwek doko waŋ it ma gunnye." 
Psalms107:31 Myero gupwo Rwot pi mar mere ma pe lokke, ki pi tic me aura ma en otiyo pi dano." 
Psalms107:32 Myero gudwore i cokke pa lwak, kun gipake bene i gurre pa ludito." 
Psalms107:33 En loko kulu-gu ducu doko tim aroo mutwo, dok en juko waŋ it-gu woko ducu, pii doŋ pe mol ki iye," 
Psalms107:34 loko lobo mulony doko lobo mubedo kado ma konnye doŋ pe; man timme pi bal pa jo ma bedo i lobo meno," 
Psalms107:35 En loko tim aroo mutwo doko ka ma pii poŋ iye," 
Psalms107:36 En miyo jo ma kec nekogi gibedo kunnu, ci gigero gaŋ ma myero gibed iye;" 
Psalms107:37 gicoyo kodi i potti, gipito olok bene, camgi cek mabup." 
Psalms107:38 Ginya gidoko mapol pi gum ma Rwot omiyo botgi; en pe weko wel dyaŋigi dok piny. 
Psalms107:39 I kare ma giloyogi, ma gileyo wigi kun giunogi, giyelogi, ma gimiyo cwinygi bene cwer," 
Psalms107:40 en cayo rwodi ma unogi, miyo giwoto i dye tim ata ka ma yo pe iye." 
Psalms107:41 Ento en laro jo ma piny obwoyogi ki i cangi, ci medo wel pa jo me odigi macalo lwak romi," 
Psalms107:42 Jo ma cwinygi atir gineno ci gibedo ki yomcwiny; jo maraco ducu gijuko lok woko ki i doggi giliŋ litik. 
Psalms107:43 Jo maryek myero gubed ka tamo pi jami magi matut ki i cwinygi, wek dano opar pi mar pa Rwot ma pe lokke." 
Psalms108:1 Cwinya omoko i komi, ai Lubaŋa, cwinya omoko i komi ma pe lokke! Abiwero wer kun apaki ki dwan maloŋo! In tipona, co woko!" 
Psalms108:2 Wun naŋa ki opuk bene wuco woko! An bene abicoyo rupiny miyo ceŋ tuc! 
Psalms108:3 Abimiyo pwoc boti i kin lwak me rok ducu, ai Rwot; abiwero wer me paki i kin Lurok," 
Psalms108:4 Mar meri ma pe lokke dit, o wa i polo, dok adani bene dit, o wa i poI" 
Psalms108:5 Ai Lubaŋa, nyut ditti malo i polo, dok imi deyoni oryeny i wi lobo ducu!" 
Psalms108:6 Larwa ki tekki imi walo lukworwa, dok igam legawa, wek lwak ma imaro gubwot." 
Psalms108:7 Lubaŋa oloko ki i kabedone maleŋ ni, “Abipoko Cekem woko ki deyo madit me loc, dok abipoko nota me Cukot woko i dul i dul bot jona." 
Psalms108:8 Gilead mera, ki Manace bene mera; Epraim aye tok nyonyo me wiya, ki Juda mere odoo kerra." 
Psalms108:9 Ento Moab aye becen me lwokka; ki Edom mera, obedo ka bolo warra; dok abidaŋŋe matek me loc i kom jo Pilciti.”" 
Psalms108:10 Aŋa ma bikela i gaŋ man ma girumo ki cel gogo? Aŋa ma bitelo wiya tera i Edom? 
Psalms108:11 In pe doŋ ikwerowa woko, ai Lubaŋa? In pe doŋ inywako yo ki dul monywa me cito ka lweny, ai Lubaŋa," 
Psalms108:12 Konywa me lewny i kom lukworwa, pien kony ma dano miyo pe gin mo!" 
Psalms108:13 Ka Lubaŋa tye ka lweny kacel kwedwa ci wabiloyo; en aye ma binyono lukworwa diyo woko piny. 
Psalms109:1 Apaki, ai Lubaŋa, pe iliŋ mot!" 
Psalms109:2 Jo maraco ki lugoba gubino ka lweny i koma, kun giloko lok goba keken i koma." 
Psalms109:3 Gimiya cwercwiny pi lok maraco me adagadaga ma giloko i koma, gilwenyo i koma noŋo ma pe abalo gin mo." 
Psalms109:4 Gidota adota kadi bed amarogi, kadi wa i kare ma noŋo atye ka lego pigi." 
Psalms109:5 Gitimo gin marac i koma pi gin maber ma atiyo botgi, dok gidaga kadi bed amarogi." 
Psalms109:6 Yer dano marac wek opidkwede; wek ŋat mo i kin lukworre odote koŋ giteme. 
Psalms109:7 Myero giteme ci ginoŋ bal i kome; dok legane bene gikwan macalo bal ma en otimo! 
Psalms109:8 Gijwik nino me kwone woko obed manok, wek dano mukene aye obile jamine!" 
Psalms109:9 Litinone gudok litino kic, ki dakone bene odok daa-to" 
Psalms109:10 Wek litinone gubed lumalgan ma gilak ata kun gibedo ka lego jami alega; myero giryemgi woko bene ki i wi obur ka ma onoŋo gibedo iye! 
Psalms109:11 Won banya ma en yam odeno banya bote myero okwany jamine woko ducu ma etye kwede, dok dano ata-gu myero guyak jamine ma en olimogi ki tic matek-ki." 
Psalms109:12 Ŋat mo myero pe otim kica bote wacel, dok dano bene pe myero kica omake i kom litino kicce." 
Psalms109:13 Wek likwaye ducu guto woko, wek nyiŋe bene dano pe gupo pire i kare pa yalwak ma bilubo." 
Psalms109:14 Rwot opo i kom bal pa kwarone, dok pe ojwa bal pa minne woko wacel." 
Psalms109:15 Wek Rwot opo i kom balgi teretere, ento dano myero pe opo i komgi matwal i lobo kany." 
Psalms109:16 Pien dano meno pe otamo me bedo lakica, ento obedo ka ryemo kor lucan ki jo ma piny obwoyogi, ki jo ma cwinygi cwer ducu nio ka onekogi woko." 
Psalms109:17 Onoŋo en maro loko lok me ceno dano; wek lok me ceno danone-ni odok i wiye! En onoŋo dag lamo gum; pi meno ŋat mo pe myero olam gumi kome. 
Psalms109:18 Onoŋo lok me ceno dano odoko calo koti ma en ruko; wek doŋ obid kome woko macalo pii, dok macalo moo ma mido i cogone!" 
Psalms109:19 Wek obed calo boŋo ma en odwalo ikome; obed calo del pyer ma nino ducu en tweyo i pyere! 
Psalms109:20 Man aye myero obed kit pwod ma Rwot pwodo ki jo ma dota, gin jo ma loko lok maraco ma gimito rwenyo kwona woko!" 
Psalms109:21 Ento in, ai Rwot Lubaŋana, konya pi deyo me nyiŋi, dok ilara-pi mar meri ma pe lokke maber-ri!" 
Psalms109:22 An lacan, piny obwoya woko, cwinya bedo ka ton atona keken." 
Psalms109:23 Arwenyo woko calo tipo me otyeno; yamo kola woko macalo tero bonyo. 
Psalms109:24 Pi ri kec pi kare malac omiyo coŋa doŋ odoko nyap; omiyo bene amok woko adoko goro. 
Psalms109:25 Adoko doŋ ginaŋala pa jo ma gidota; ka gunena, ci giyeŋo wigi ayeŋa." 
Psalms109:26 Konya, ai Rwot Lubaŋana; lara pi mar meri ma pe lokke!" 
Psalms109:27 Wek lukworra guŋe ni, in aye ma ilare an, ai Rwot!" 
Psalms109:28 Wek gin gucen dano, ento in imiya meri gum. Wek alee otwod jo ma lewnyc i koma-ni woko, ci an laticci abed ma cwinya yom." 
Psalms109:29 Wek jo ma dota gulim can; wek lewic oumgi woko calo guruko boŋo. 
Psalms109:30 Abimiyo pwoc bot Rwot ki dwan maloŋo; abipake i dye lwakke ka ma gucokke iye. 
Psalms109:31 En cuŋ yo tuŋ lacuc i ŋet jo ma piny obwoyogi, pi Larogi ki i cin jo ma ŋolo kop me to i wigi." 
Psalms110:1 Rwot owaco bot rwoda ni, “Bed I ŋeta yo tuŋ acuc i kabedo me deyo, nio ka abimiyo lukworri gidoko kom, laten tyeni.”" 
Psalms110:2 Rwot bicwalo odoo ker me twerri ki i Cion. En bimiyo ibedo ka loc i dye lukworri. 
Psalms110:3 I nino ma ibilweny i kom lukworri lwakki gibimine kengi boti. Calo toyo ma luk odiko con, awobeni bene gibibino boti kit meno i wi godi maleŋ," 
Psalms110:4 Rwot doŋ okwoŋo kwoŋ, pe dokbiloko tamme, “In ibibedo ajwaka nakanaka i kit pa Melkijadek.”" 
Psalms110:5 Rwot tye yo tuŋ Iacucci; i nino ma kiniga omake en biloyo luker woko ducu. 
Psalms110:6 En biŋolo kop i kom jo me rok ducu dok bipoŋo bar me lewny ki kom jo muto; en biloyo luker ducu ma i wi loboni. 
Psalms110:7 Kabaka bimato pii ki i laora kulu ma tye i ŋet yo, meno bimiyo en ilo wiye malo." 
Psalms111:1 Wupak Rwot. Abimiyo pwoc bot Rwot ki cwinya ducu, i dul pa jo ma cwinygi atir, i dye lwak ma gucokke." 
Psalms111:2 Tic ma Rwot tiyo dito dok me aura mada; jo ducu ma ticce yomo cwinygi giketo cwinygi twatwal me niaŋ iye. 
Psalms111:3 Gin ducu ma en tiyo opoŋ ki deyo dok ki tek; dok porre mere bedo nakanaka," 
Psalms111:4 En pe weko wiwa wil i kom ticce me aura ma en otiyo; Rwot ber dok lakica. 
Psalms111:5 En miyo cam bot jo ma lwore; wiye bene po twatwal i kom gicikkene. 
Psalms111:6 En onyuto twero me ticce bot lwakke, omiyogi lobo pa lurok wek gucam obed megi." 
Psalms111:7 Tic ma en tiyo ducu obedo me ada dok tye atir, cikke ducu tye iye gen madwoŋ," 
Psalms111:8 Gimoko matwal dok giri nakanaka, ma myero gilubgi ki ada dok ki cwiny ma atir." 
Psalms111:9 En okelo lar bot jone, dok oketo gicikkene kwedgi me bedo matwal. En leŋ dok myero gilwore!" 
Psalms111:10 Lworo Rwot aye acakki me ryeko, doŋ jo ma lubo gin ma en ociko gibedo ki niaŋ maber. Dano gibipake nakanaka!" 
Psalms112:1 Wupak Rwot. Tye ki gum dano ma lworo Rwot, ma bedo ki yomcwiny mada ka lubo cikke." 
Psalms112:2 Likwayone gibibedo twoni oteka i lobo ma gibedo iye; likwayo pa ŋat ma cwinye atir gibimiyogi gum. 
Psalms112:3 Jone gibilony dok gibedo ki lwak jami mapul, dok kite ma atir-ri bene bibedo nakanaka," 
Psalms112:4 Ceŋ tuc, ryeny i colpiny pi jo ma cwinygi atir; Rwot ber, lakica, dok oporre." 
Psalms112:5 Dano ma cwinye yom, ma miyo banya bot luwote, bibedo maber, dano ma tiyo ki jo ducu ki gen," 
Psalms112:6 Dano ma kite atir pe gibidiro cen; gibipo pire nakanaka," 
Psalms112:7 En pe bedo ki lworo kadi ka owinyo lok marac me cwercwiny: bedo ma cwinye tek kun geno Rwot. 
Psalms112:8 En bedo ma cwinye opye mot, pe bilworo gin mo, nio waŋ ma oneno ka giloyo lukworre." 
Psalms112:9 En poko jami noŋo bot lucan; dok kite ma atir-ri bibedo nakanaka; en bibedo ki twer dok gibiwore. 
Psalms112:10 Dano marac ka oneno, ci kiniga mako woko; bibedo ka mwodo lake ma cwinye poto; gen pa dano marac rwenyo woko matwal." 
Psalms113:1 Wupak Rwot! Wun lutic pa Rwot wupake, wupak nyiŋ Rwot!" 
Psalms113:2 Gipak nyiŋ Rwot nakanaka nia tin nio nino ma pe tum! 
Psalms113:3 Cakke wokceŋ nio kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ myero gipak nyiŋ Rwot! 
Psalms113:4 Rwot tye malo i wi rok ducu, ki deyone bene tye malo okato polo woko." 
Psalms113:5 Aŋa ma calo Rwot Lubaŋawa, ma bedo i kabedone ma tye malo," 
Psalms113:6 ma kulle neno piny ka mabor ki kunnu, ma neno polo ki lobo?" 
Psalms113:7 En ilo lucan malo nia ki i apwa, dok tiŋo jo ma piny obwoyogi kwanyogi woko ki i wi odur," 
Psalms113:8 ci miyo gibedo kacel ki rwodi, ma gin aye rwodi pa lwakke." 
Psalms113:9 En miyo paco bot dako ma lalur, dok miyo noŋo litino ci doŋ bedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ. Wupak Rwot!" 
Psalms114:1 I kare ma jo Icrael gua woko ki I Ejipt, i kare ma likwayo pa Yakobo guweko lobo pa lurok ma jone loko leb mapat atika," 
Psalms114:2 Juda odoko kabedo maleŋ pa Rwot, ci Icrael odoko lobone ma en loyo." 
Psalms114:3 Nam oneno ci oriŋo woko, kulu Jordan ocuŋ woko ma pe mol." 
Psalms114:4 Godi gupye calo nyogi romi, ki cere-gu gupye calo litino romi." 
Psalms114:5 In nam, aŋo mutimme mumiyo iriŋo woko-ni? Dok in Jordan, icuŋ woko ma pe imol piŋo?" 
Psalms114:6 Wun godi kono, piŋo wubedo ka pye calo nyogi romi? Wun cere, piŋo wubedo ka pye calo litino romi?" 
Psalms114:7 In lobo, myero iyeŋŋe, pien Rwot doŋ cok bino; yeŋŋe i nyim Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Yakobo," 
Psalms114:8 ma loko pata got doko ka ma pii poŋ iye, ki got mabit-gu loko doko waŋ it ma gunnye agunya." 
Psalms115:1 Deyo obed boti keken, ai Rwot, ento pe obed botwa, pi mar meri ma pe lokke kacel ki adani." 
Psalms115:2 Piŋo lurok myero gupenywa ni, “Lubaŋawu tye kwene?”" 
Psalms115:3 Lubaŋawa tye i polo, en tiyo gin ma cwinye mito." 
Psalms115:4 Cal lubaŋagi gitiyo ki ryal dok ki jabu; meno gin ma dano gutiyo ki ciŋgi," 
Psalms115:5 Doggi tye, ento pe gitwero lok, waŋgi bene tye, ento pe gitwero neno piny." 
Psalms115:6 Itgi tye, ento pe gitwero winyo lok, umgi tye, ento pe gitwero ŋweyo piny." 
Psalms115:7 Ciŋgi tye, ento pe gitwero mulo piny, tyengi bene tye ento pe gitwero wot; dok pe tye gin mo ma twero winnye ki i dwangi." 
Psalms115:8 Jo ma gitiyo cal lubaŋa magi girom aroma kwedgi, ki jo ducu ma geno cal lubaŋa magi bene gitye kit meno." 
Psalms115:9 Wun jo Icrael, wugen Rwot! En aye ma konyowu dok gwokowu." 
Psalms115:10 Wun jo me ot pa Aron bene wugen Rwot! En aye ma konyowu dok gwokowu. 
Psalms115:11 Wun jo ma wulworo Rwot, wugen Rwot! En aye ma konyowu dok gwokowu." 
Psalms115:12 Rwot pud po i komwa dok bimiyowa gum; en bimiyo gum bot jo Icrael, ki bot jo me ot pa Aron ducu." 
Psalms115:13 Rwot bimiyo gum bot jo ducu ma gilwore, bot jo matino ki bot jo madito ducu maromrom." 
Psalms115:14 Rwot omed litino botwu, wun kacel ki likwayowu," 
Psalms115:15 Rwot myero omiwu gum, en muketo polo ki lobo!" 
Psalms115:16 Polo obedo jami pa Rwot kene, ento omiyo lobo bot dano, ni gubed iye." 
Psalms115:17 Jo muto pe gipako Rwot, kadi bed wa ŋat ma donyo piny ka ma piny oliŋ mot bene pe pako Rwot." 
Psalms115:18 Ento wan jo makwo wabimiyo pwocwa bot Rwot nia tin nio nino ma pe tum. Wupak Rwot! 
Psalms116:1 Amaro Rwot, pien en owinyo kokona; en owinyo dwana kacel ki legana me bako dog ma alege kwede." 
Psalms116:2 Kit macalo en ociko ite me winyo legana-ni, pi meno abibedo ka kok bote nino ki nino pi kare me kwona ducu." 
Psalms116:3 To ociko owicce oruma kwede woko dyere, arem me lyel bene otwene woko i koma likiŋ; abedo ki can dok ki remcwiny madwoŋ." 
Psalms116:4 Cutcut akok bot Rwot ni, “Ai Rwot, alegi, Lara do!”" 
Psalms116:5 Rwot lakica dok oporre; Lubaŋawa latim kica. 
Psalms116:6 Rwot gwoko jo ma kwiya piny; kare ma gidiya woko piny, en olara." 
Psalms116:7 In tipona, bed ki gen, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko nyuto bene bota." 
Psalms116:8 Rwot olara ki i to; ojuko pig waŋa woko, dok ogwoka omiyo tyena pe ogwaŋŋe atata." 
Psalms116:9 Atye ka wot i nyim Rwot i lobo pa jo makwo. 
Psalms116:10 Amedde ki ye en, kadi onoŋo awacci, “Can doŋ oketo koma woko”," 
Psalms116:11 ki i kare ma onoŋo abedo ki lworo ma awacci, “Dano ducu pe genne.”" 
Psalms116:12 Abimiyo gin aŋo bot Rwot pi gin maber ducu ma en otiyo pira? 
Psalms116:13 Abitiŋo gityer amata i kikopo akelo bot Rwot, abipwoye kun alwoŋo nyiŋe, pien olara." 
Psalms116:14 Abicobo kwoŋ ma yam akwoŋo bot Rwot, i nyim lwakke ducu ka ma gucokke iye." 
Psalms116:15 Ka ŋat acel ki i kin jo ma geno Rwot oto cwero cwiny Rwot mada. 
Psalms116:16 Ai Rwot, an laticci; an laticci, ma latin pa aŋecani, In doŋ ityeko gonyo nyor ma gitweya kwede woko." 
Psalms116:17 Abityero boti gitum me pwoc dok abikok boti kare ducu. 
Psalms116:18 Abicobo kwoŋ ma yam akwoŋo bot Rwot, i nyim lwakke ducu ka ma gucokke ‘iye," 
Psalms116:19 i dyakal me ot pa Rwot, i Jerucalem. Wupak Rwot." 
Psalms117:1 Wupak Rwot, wun rok ducu! Wudwore, wun lwak me rok ducu!" 
Psalms117:2 Mar mere ma pe lokke dit piwa, ki adane bene bedo matwal. Wupak Rwot!" 
Psalms118:1 Wumi pwoc bot Rwot, pien en ber, mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka!" 
Psalms118:2 Jo Icrael myero guwacci, “Mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka.”" 
Psalms118:3 Jo me ot pa Aron myero guwacci, “Mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka.”" 
Psalms118:4 Jo ma lworo Rwot bene myero guwacci, “Mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka.”" 
Psalms118:5 Akok bot Rwot ki i can; Rwot ogamo legana ci ogonya woko. 
Psalms118:6 Rwot tye kweda, pe abilworo gin mo. Dano kono twero timo gin aŋo bota?" 
Psalms118:7 Rwot tye kweda, en aye ma konya. Abineno jo ma daga ki wan me loc." 
Psalms118:8 Riŋo ka larre bot Rwot ber kato geno dano. 
Psalms118:9 Rino ka larre bot Rwot ber kato geno rwodi. 
Psalms118:10 Rok ducu onoŋo oruina woko dyere, ento atyekogi woko ducu i nyiŋ Rwot!" 
Psalms118:11 Guruma woko dyere, guruma woko dyere i kabedo ducu; ento atyekogi woko ducu i nyiŋ Rwot!" 
Psalms118:12 Guruma woko dyere calo nyig kic, gubino i koma oyotoyot macalo mac ma waŋo tim, ento atyekogi woko ducu i nyiŋ Rwot!" 
Psalms118:13 Gucora ‘matek ma onoŋo doŋ acok poto, ento Rwot okonya." 
Psalms118:14 Rwot aye tekka ma apako ki wer, en doŋ odoko lalarra." 
Psalms118:15 Wuwiny wer ma giwero me loc i kema pa jo ma kitgi atir: “Ciŋ Rwot ma lacuc lwenyo lweny matek! 
Psalms118:16 Twerone omiyo waloyo, twerone matek i lweny-nyi!”" 
Psalms118:17 Pe abito, ento abibedo kwo, kun atito pi gin ma Rwot doŋ otiyo," 
Psalms118:18 Rwot doŋ opwoda marac twatwal, e nto pe oneka woko gire." 
Psalms118:19 Yabba doggaŋ me kit ma atir, wek adony ki iye, ci ami pwoc bot Rwot." 
Psalms118:20 Man aye doggaŋ pa Rwot, jo ma kitgi atir gibidonyo ki iye." 
Psalms118:21 Apwoyi pien doŋ igamo legana, doŋ idoko lalarra." 
Psalms118:22 Got ma lugedo gukwero, en aye odoko got madit me twok ot." 
Psalms118:23 Man Rwot aye mutimo, obedo botwa lok me aura." 
Psalms118:24 Man aye nino ma Rwot omiyo botwa; wakweru nino man ki yomcwiny madwoŋ. 
Psalms118:25 Ai Rwot, walegi, ilarwa! Rwot walegi, mi ticwa ducu ocobbe kakare!" 
Psalms118:26 Lubaŋa omi gum i kom ŋat ma bino i nyiŋ Rwot! Walamo gum i komwu ki i ot pa Rwot. 
Psalms118:27 Rwot aye Lubaŋa en doŋ omiyo piny odoko leŋ botwa. Wumak jaŋ yat wuwot kwede ma wurye i tyeŋ, wuwot wurum kwede keno tyer," 
Psalms118:28 Abimiyo pwoc boti, pien in Lubaŋana; dok abidwori bene." 
Psalms118:29 Wumi pwoc bot Rwot, pien en ber, mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka!" 
Psalms119:1 Gitye ki gum jo ma pe tye ki bal mo, ma gibedo kun gilubo cik pa Rwot!" 
Psalms119:2 Gitye ki gum jo ma gwoko lok me cadenne, ma giyenyo en ki cwinygi ducu," 
Psalms119:3 jo ma pe timo gin marac, ento gibedo kun gilubo yo’ pa Rwot." 
Psalms119:4 Doŋ ityeko ciko pi pwonnyi ni gigwok maber ki leŋcwiny. 
Psalms119:5 Wek abed ma acuŋ matek i yona kun agwoko cikki! 
Psalms119:6 Bimiyo lewic pe maka, abiketo cwinya me lubo gin ducu ma ceŋ doŋ iciko." 
Psalms119:7 Abipaki ki cwiny ma tye atir, ka doŋ apwonyo cikki ma tye atir-ri." 
Psalms119:8 Abigwoko gin ma iciko; pi meno pe ibwota woko! 
Psalms119:9 Latin awobi bigwokke niŋniŋ yone ma pe balo? Gwokke i yone kun lubo lok ma in iciko. 
Psalms119:10 Ayenyo in ki cwinya ducu; gwoka wek pe aŋak woko ma abwoto lubo cikki. 
Psalms119:11 Doŋ akano lokki i cwinya, wek pe atim bal mo i nyimi," 
Psalms119:12 Apwoyi, ai Rwot; pwonya ki cikki!" 
Psalms119:13 Abituco ki doga ka maleŋ lok ducu ma yam iciko mua ki idogi. 
Psalms119:14 Cwinya okwe woko liyoo pi lok me caden meri ma inyuto, calo pi lonyo madwoŋ ma alimo ducu." 
Psalms119:15 Abilwodo lok me pwonnyi ki i cwinya, dok abiketo waŋa me ŋiyo kit yo me pwonnyi ducu." 
Psalms119:16 Abibedo ki yomcwiny pi cikki; wiya pe biwil i kom lokki wacel. 
Psalms119:17 Nyut berri bota an laticci, wek abed kun alubo lokki." 
Psalms119:18 Yab waŋa wek anen piny, anen jami me aura ma tye i cikki." 
Psalms119:19 An atye macalo labedo i wi lobo man; pe ikan cikki woko bota! 
Psalms119:20 Cwinya pukke i kare ducu kun amito niaŋ lok me cikki. 
Psalms119:21 Ijuko jo ma lunywar, ma gin aye jo ma doŋ gityeko ceno, jo ma ŋak ma gibwoto cikki." 
Psalms119:22 Kwany ŋala ki cacgi woko ki i koma, pien abedo ka gwoko lok me cadenni." 
Psalms119:23 Kadi bed rwodi gicokke kacel gibedo ka piro lok i koma, ento an laticci pud abimedde: ki lwodo lok i kom cikki ki i cwinya." 
Psalms119:24 Lok me cadenni yomo cwinya mada; tam ducu mabeco me ryeko anoŋo ki iye. 
Psalms119:25 Abuto piny i apwa ma doŋ giloya woko; roc kwona odoco kit macalo yam iciko! 
Psalms119:26 I kare ma atuco boti gin ducu ma ceŋ atiyo, in igamo doga; pwonya ki lok me cikki." 
Psalms119:27 Pwonya wek aŋe kit yo ma myero alub kwede cikki, ci abibedo ka lwodo lok i kom ticci me aura ma doŋ itiyo." 
Psalms119:28 Cwercwiny doŋ obwoya woko; miya teko, kit macalo yam iciko." 
Psalms119:29 Gwoka wek pe alub yo marac, ento pwonya ki cikki pi kicani." 
Psalms119:30 Ayero doŋ me bedo ki gen, kun aketo cwinya i kom cikki twatwal." 
Psalms119:31 Ai Rwot, atyeko mako lok me cadenni woko likiŋ; pe iwek lewic omaka." 
Psalms119:32 Abibedo ka lubo cikki ki mitkom, ka imedo niaŋ matut bota." 
Psalms119:33 Ai Rwot, pwonya wek aŋe kit yo ma myero alub kwede cikki, ci abigwoko nio wa i agiki." 
Psalms119:34 Miya aniaŋ i cikki, wek agwoki, ci abed ka lubone ki cwinya ducu." 
Psalms119:35 Tela i yo me cikki, pien yomo cwinya mada." 
Psalms119:36 Wek abed ki miti me lubo lok me cadenni, kato ma abedo ki cwiny me noŋo lonyo." 
Psalms119:37 Pe iwek abed ka neno jami atata ma konygi pe; ento miya kwo me lubo yoni. 
Psalms119:38 Mok cikkeni bota an laticci, ma icikke kwede bot jo ma gilworini." 
Psalms119:39 Kwany tim cac ma miya lworo woko ki i koma; pien cikki ducu beco. 
Psalms119:40 Nen, cwinya pukke pi noŋo cikki; in iporre, pi meno miya kwo!" 
Psalms119:41 Nyutta kit macalo mar meri ma pe lokke tye kwede i koma, ai Rwot, dok ilara, kit macalo yam iciko." 
Psalms119:42 Man bimiyo agamo dogjo ma loko lok agec i koma, pien ageno lokki." 
Psalms119:43 Pe ikwany lok me ada woko ki i doga, pien genna tye i cik me ŋolo koppi." 
Psalms119:44 Abigwoko cikki teretere ma pe akeŋ, abigwoko nakanaka!" 
Psalms119:45 Abibedo ka ma cwinya mito ki kuc, pien doŋ atemo lubo cikki." 
Psalms119:46 Abitito lok me cadenni bene i nyim luker, ma lewic pe bimaka wacel." 
Psalms119:47 Anoŋo yomcwiny i lubo cikki ducu, pien amarogi mada." 
Psalms119:48 Aworo cikki ducu, ma amarogi-ni, ci abilwodo lok me cikki ki i cwinya." 
Psalms119:49 Po i lok ma yam icikke kwede bota, an laticci, ma imiya doŋ aketo genna iye-ni." 
Psalms119:50 Kadi ka atye i can, lokki kweyo cwinya; pien cikkeni doŋ omiya kwo." 
Psalms119:51 Jo ma kwiya Lubaŋa ginywara anywara, ento pe alokke aweko cikki." 
Psalms119:52 Ka apo i kom cik ma yam ipwonya kwede i kare mukato aŋec, kweyo cwinya, ai Rwot." 
Psalms119:53 Akemo malyet omaka woko pi jo maraco, pien gibwoto cikki pe gilubo." 
Psalms119:54 I ot ma abedo iye ma bor ki pacona kikome, ayubo wer ma awero pi cikki." 
Psalms119:55 Apo piri i dyewor, ai Rwot, dok alubo cikki." 
Psalms119:56 Man aye gum ma alimo omiyo agwoko pwonnyi macon ducu. 
Psalms119:57 In aye gin ducu ma amito, ai Rwot acikke me lubo lokki ducu." 
Psalms119:58 Alegi ki cwinya ducu, tima kica, kit macalo yam icikke kwede." 
Psalms119:59 Ka atamo pi lubo yoni ci alokke acikke me lubo lok me cadenni. 
Psalms119:60 Arune woko oyotoyot ma pe agalle ka lubo cikki. 
Psalms119:61 Kadi bed jo maraco gitelo tolgi giciko giruma kwede dyere macalo owic, ento wiya pe biwil i kom cikki." 
Psalms119:62 Aa malo ka paki i dyewor pi cikki me ŋolo kop ma tye atir. 
Psalms119:63 An larem dano ducu ma lwori ki jo ma gilubo cikki. 
Psalms119:64 Ai Rwot, lobo opoŋ ki mar meri ma pe lokke; pwonya ki cikki!" 
Psalms119:65 Ai Rwot, igwoko cikkeni giri, dok itiyo kweda maber, an laticci." 
Psalms119:66 Pwonya ki ŋolo kop maber ki ŋec, pien ageno gin ma iciko." 
Psalms119:67 I kare ma pud peya imiya can, onoŋo aŋak woko ata; ento kombeddi doŋ agwoko lokki." 
Psalms119:68 In iber, dok itimo gin maber bene; pwonya ki cikki." 
Psalms119:69 Jo ma lunywar gimedo lok goba i koma, ento an alubo cikki ki cwinya ducu." 
Psalms119:70 Jo-nu cwinygi opune woko calo moo dwolo, ento an anoŋo yomcwiny i cikki." 
Psalms119:71 Can ma alimo-ni obedo ber bota matek, wek apwony lok me cikki." 
Psalms119:72 Lok me cik ma imiya ber bota makato lwak lim me jabu ki ryal alip ki alip. 
Psalms119:73 In aye ma iketa dok igwoka bene maber; miya niaŋ matut wek apwony lok me cikki. 
Psalms119:74 Jo ma lwori gibinena ci gibedo ki yomcwiny, pien doŋ ageno lokki." 
Psalms119:75 Ai Rwot, aŋeyo ni ŋolo koppi tye atir, imiyo aneno can pi ada ma itye kwede." 
Psalms119:76 Wek mar meri ma pe lokke obed pi kweyo cwinya, kit macalo yam icikke kwede bota an laticci." 
Psalms119:77 Tima kica wek abed kwo, pien anoŋo yomcwiny i cikki." 
Psalms119:78 Wek lewic omak jo ma lunywar pien gubita ki lok goba; ento an abibedo ka lwodo lok i kom pwonnyi. 
Psalms119:79 Wek jo ma gilwori gubin bota, ci guŋe lok me caden meri." 
Psalms119:80 Wek abed ma cwinya leŋ kun alubo cikki, wek lewic pe omaka." 
Psalms119:81 Tipona ool woko pi kuro lar meri: ageno lokki.’ 
Psalms119:82 Waŋa doŋ oballe woko pi neno gin ma icikke pire; apenyi ni, “Ibikweyo cwinya awene?”" 
Psalms119:83 Doŋ adoko calo opoko koŋo vino ma yito obalo woko, ento wiya pud peya owil i kom cikki." 
Psalms119:84 Imito an laticci akur pi kare ma rom mene? Ibiŋolo kop i kom jo ma gilwenyo i koma-ni awene? 
Psalms119:85 Jo ma lunywar ma pe gilubo cikkini gukwinyo bur ma myero apot iye. 
Psalms119:86 Cikki ducu tye ada; ento dano gilwenyo i koma ki loko lok goba; konya do! 
Psalms119:87 Onoŋo doŋ gicok tyeko kwona woko ki i lobo, ento an pe abwoto cikki." 
Psalms119:88 Miya abed kwo pi mar meri ma pe lokke, wek agwok lok me cadenni ma yam iloko ki dogi-ni." 
Psalms119:89 Ai Rwot, lokki bedo nakanaka; tye ma icibo ocuŋ woko likiŋ i polo." 
Psalms119:90 Gen ma itye kwede bedo bot yalwak me kare ducu; icibo lobo ocuŋ matek i kabedone," 
Psalms119:91 Jami ducu ocuŋ nio wa onyoo pi cikki; pien gin ducu luticci. 
Psalms119:92 Ka nene pe anoŋo yomcwiny i cikki, kono ato i canna." 
Psalms119:93 Wiya pe biwil i kom pwonnyi, pien igwoka pi cikki omiyo pud akwo." 
Psalms119:94 An a danoni, lara do! Atemo lubo cikki mada." 
Psalms119:95 Jo maraco gikanne gikiya wek gineka woko, ento an atamo pi lok me cadenni." 
Psalms119:96 Doŋ aneno ni jami ducu ma i wi lobo agikkigi tye, ento cikki pe tye ki agikkine." 
Psalms119:97 Amaro cikki twatwal! Abedo ka lwodo lok i kom cikki dyeceŋ jwi. 
Psalms119:98 Cikki miyo abedo ryek akato lukworra woko, pien atye kwede nino ducu." 
Psalms119:99 Doŋ atye ki niaŋ maber muromo, akato lupwonnya woko ducu, pien abedo ka lwodo lok i kom lok me cadenni kare ki kare." 
Psalms119:100 Aniaŋ bene aloyo jo muteggi, pien alubo gin ma iciko." 
Psalms119:101 Ajukke kena wek pe atim gin marac, pi gwokolokki." 
Psalms119:102 Pe aweko pwonnyi, pien in doŋ ityeko pwonya." 
Psalms119:103 Lokki bille mamit adada ki bota lim i doga makato moo kic woko! 
Psalms119:104 Alimo ryeko madwoŋ ki i cikki pi meno omiyo akwero yo ma bwola-gu ducu. 
Psalms119:105 Lokki calo tara ma menyo ka tyena, dok tye calo ceŋ ma menyo yo ma awoto iye." 
Psalms119:106 Doŋ atyeko kwoŋo kwoŋ dok amoko bene, me lubo pwonnyi ma tye atir." 
Psalms119:107 Arem me can ma atye kwede doŋ oketo koma woko; ai Rwot, gwoka abed makwo kit macalo yam icikke kwede." 
Psalms119:108 Gam pwocca me pak ma akelo boti, ai Rwot, dok ipwonya ki cikki." 
Psalms119:109 Kare ducu-ayubbe me miyo kweŋa i peko, ento wiya pe wil i kom cikki." 
Psalms119:110 Jo maraco guciko owic me maka, ento an pe aŋak aweko lubo cikki." 
Psalms119:111 Lok me cadenni gin aye gipinnya ma ri nakanaka; ada, gin aye gimiyo abedo ki yomcwiny." 
Psalms119:112 Aketo cwinya ada me tiyo gin ma iciko nakanaka, nio wa i kare me agik." 
Psalms119:113 Adag jo ma tamgi tye aryo, ento amaro cikki." 
Psalms119:114 In aye kalarrena ki kwotta, ageno lok ma iciko." 
Psalms119:115 Ayu woko ki ka ŋeta, wun lutim maraco, wek abed kun alubo cik pa Lubaŋana." 
Psalms119:116 Konya macalo yam, doŋ iciko, wek abed kwo, pe ibal cwinya woko pi gen ma doŋ atyeko geni kwede." 
Psalms119:117 Tiŋa malo ijola woko, ci abibedo maber ki kuc, miyo abiketo cwinya ka lubo cikki teretere." 
Psalms119:118 Ikwero jo ma ŋak woko ma giweko lubo cikki; ada, ryekogi-ni pe konyo gin mo." 
Psalms119:119 Itiyo ki jo maraco ducu ma tye i wi lobo-ni macalo yugi; pi meno an amaro lubo lok me cadenni. 
Psalms119:120 Koma ducu myel amyela pi lworo in, locci me ŋolo kop omiyo apoŋ ki lworo." 
Psalms119:121 Atiyo gin ma tye atir dok kakare; pe iweka i ciŋ lukworra ma giuna-ni. 
Psalms119:122 Cuŋ pira, an laticci, pi kelo kuc, wek jo ma lunywar pe guuna." 
Psalms119:123 Waŋa doŋ ool woko pi kuro larri, dok pi kit ma ibicobo kwede cikkeni ma tye atir-ri," 
Psalms119:124 Ti ki laticci ki mar meri ma pe lokke, dok ipwonya ki lok me cikki." 
Psalms119:125 An laticci, miya aniaŋ maber, ci wek aŋe lok me cadenni." 
Psalms119:126 Rwot, kare doŋ oromo myero iti ticci, pien lwak guturo cikki woko pe doŋ gilubo." 
Psalms119:127 Pi meno amaro cikki makato jabu, kadi ki jabu ma giliyo maberre." 
Psalms119:128 Aloyo kwona kun abedo ka lubo cikki; adag yo me bwola-gu ducu. 
Psalms119:129 Pwonnyi ducu tye me aura; pi meno alubogi ki cwinya ducu. 
Psalms119:130 Tito lokki miyo ceŋ bot dano, dok miyo niaŋ bot jo ma pe ki ŋec." 
Psalms119:131 Aŋamo doga, abedo ka omo cwinya ki yweyo, pien amito alub cikki." 
Psalms119:132 Bin bota, ci itima kica, kit macalo itimo kwede kica bot jo ma maro nyiŋi." 
Psalms119:133 Gwoka wek pe apoti, kit macalo yam doŋ iciko, pe iwek bal mo olo kwona." 
Psalms119:134 Lara woko ki i ciŋ jo ma giuna, wek abed kun agwoko cikki." 
Psalms119:135 Nen laticci ki waŋ me kica, dok ipwonya ki lok me cikki." 
Psalms119:136 Pig waŋa cwer dok mol matek, pien dano pe gigwoko cikki." 
Psalms119:137 In iporre, ai Rwot, dok kop ma iŋolo tye atir." 
Psalms119:138 Iyero lok me cadenni kun ilubo kiti ma atir, ki gen madwoŋ bene." 
Psalms119:139 Nyeko ki kiniga waŋo koma calo mac, pien lukworra wigi owil woko i kom lokki." 
Psalms119:140 Gitemo cikkeni adada, miyo an laticci amaro." 
Psalms119:141 An atidi mo, dok gicaya bene, ento wiya pe wil i kom lok me cikki." 
Psalms119:142 Porreni tye atir dok bedo nakanaka, ki cikki bene cik me ada." 
Psalms119:143 Can ki cwercwiny doŋ opoto woko i koma, ento cikki aye miya yomcwiny," 
Psalms119:144 Lok me cadenni tye atir dok bedo nakanaka; miya niaŋ maber ci abibedo kwo. 
Psalms119:145 Akok boti ki cwinya ducu, gam doga, ai Rwot! Abigwoko cikki," 
Psalms119:146 Akok boti; lara, ci abilubo lok me cikki." 
Psalms119:147 Aa malo ma pud peya piny oru akok boti pi kony; pud ageno lokki. 
Psalms119:148 Abuto i dyewor ci aco woko, waŋa bedo twolo, kun abedo ka lwodo pi cikki ki i cwinya." 
Psalms119:149 Ai Rwot, winy dwana pi mar meri ma pe lokke; roc kwona odoco i locci ma tye atir," 
Psalms119:150 Jo ma lwenyo i koma ginyiko cok kun gitamo me timo gin marac; gitye ka mabor adada ki cikki. 
Psalms119:151 Ento in icok kweda, ai Rwot, cikki ducu cik me ada," 
Psalms119:152 Apwonnye ki lok me caden meri ducu nia wa con, ni iketogi me bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms119:153 Nen canna dok i lara, pien wiya pe wil i cikki." 
Psalms119:154 Pid pira ci ikoka: miya kwo kit macalo yam iciko. 
Psalms119:155 Jo maraco pe gibiromo larre wacel, pien pe gitemo me lubo cikki." 
Psalms119:156 Ento kicani dit makato, ai Rwot; miya kwo kit macalo locci tye atir-ri." 
Psalms119:157 Jo ma lwenyo i koma ki lumerokka gipol, ento pe aleŋŋe aweko lubo pwonnyi." 
Psalms119:158 Ka aneno lutim roro, ci cwinya lemo alema i komgi, pien pe gigwoko cikki." 
Psalms119:159 Koŋ itam kit macalo amaro kwede lok me cikki! Gwok kwona pi mar meri ma pe lokke. 
Psalms119:160 Lokki ducu ocuŋ i kom ada, cikki ducu tye atir gibedo nakanaka." 
Psalms119:161 Rwodi gilwenyo i koma laboŋo tyen lok mo, ento abedo kun atye ki lworo i cwinya pi lokki," 
Psalms119:162 Abedo ki yomcwiny pi lokki calo dano ma onoŋo jami mapol ma giyako," 
Psalms119:163 Adag dok akwero lok goba, ento amaro cikki." 
Psalms119:164 Apaki nino ki nino tyen abiro pi cikki ma tye atir. 
Psalms119:165 Jo ma maro cikk i limo kuc madit; pe tye gin mo ma bimiyo giyokke atata," 
Psalms119:166 Ai Rwot, ageno larri, dok bene atiyo gin ma cikki mito." 
Psalms119:167 Agwoko lok me cikki ducu i cwinya, dok amarogi ma pe twerre." 
Psalms119:168 Agwoko cikki ki lok ma ipwonya kwede ducu; in bene ineno gin ducu ma atiyo. 
Psalms119:169 Wek kokona oo boti do, ai Rwot; miya abed ki niaŋ maber ma lubo kit ma lokki tye kwede." 
Psalms119:170 Wek lega me bako doga bene oo boti; lara kit macalo yam icikke kwede. 
Psalms119:171 Abiŋamo doga kun apaki, wek ipwonya ki cikki." 
Psalms119:172 Abiwero lokki awera ki doga, pien cikki ducu tye atir." 
Psalms119:173 Yubbe kun iketo ciŋi me konya, pien doŋ ayero me lubo cikki." 
Psalms119:174 Atye ka yenyo larri, ai Rwot, dok cikki aye miya yomcwiny." 
Psalms119:175 Miya abed kwo, wek abed ka paki, wek pwony me cikki bene okonya." 
Psalms119:176 Aŋak woko ata calo romo murwenyo; myero iyenya, an laticci, pien wiya pe wil i kom cikki." 
Psalms120:1 I kare ma atye i can akok bot Rwot, wek ogam doga, kun akok ni." 
Psalms120:2 “Lara do, ai Rwot, ki bot jo ma loko lok goba, ki bot jo ma bwolo dano ki lok doggi.”" 
Psalms120:3 Gibiminiwu gin aŋo kono? Dok gin aŋo makato ma gibitiyo i komwu, wun jo ma bwolo dano ki dogwuni?" 
Psalms120:4 Gibicwalo i komwu atero mabit pa lulweny, ki lodi mac yen opok ma otwak!" 
Psalms120:5 Aneno can adada, pien abedo Mecek macalo labedo, dok pacona tye i dye kema pa jo Kedar!" 
Psalms120:6 Abedo doŋ ari pi kare malac twatwal i kin jo ma dag kuc. 
Psalms120:7 Amito wabed ki kuc; ento tek aloko lok mo, gin gilokke gicuŋ pi lweny!" 
Psalms121:1 Atiŋo waŋa malo aneno yo tuŋ kom godi; kony ma amito-ni a ki kwene? 
Psalms121:2 Kony ma amito-ni a ki bot Rwot, muketo polo ki lobo." 
Psalms121:3 En pe biweko tyeni cer, ŋat ma gwoki pe bibuto nino woko ata," 
Psalms121:4 Nen, en aye ma gwoko jo Icrael, pe bibuto nino woko licwic ma kwiya kome," 
Psalms121:5 Rwot aye ŋat ma gwoki; dok tye calo tipo me ka yweyoni, tye yo tuŋ ciŋi ma lacuc." 
Psalms121:6 Ceŋ pe biwaŋi i dyeceŋ, kadi dwe bene pe biwaŋi i dyewor." 
Psalms121:7 Rwot bigwoki ki i gin maraco woko ducu, en bigwoko kwoni." 
Psalms121:8 Rwot bigwoki ka icito woko nyo kadi ka idwogo cen, nia i kare-ni cito kwede anyim nakanaka." 
Psalms122:1 Abedo ki yomcwiny i kare ma guwaco bota ni, “Wacitu i ot pa Rwot!”" 
Psalms122:2 Wabedo ka cuŋ acuŋa ki ‘tyenwa i dog gaŋ me Jerucalem! 
Psalms122:3 Jerucalem doŋ gigero odoco matek, ma ocuŋ nen maber atika!" 
Psalms122:4 Man aye ka ma kaka ma Rwot oyero gibino iye, gin aye jo Icrael; gibino ka miyo pwoc bot Rwot, kit macalo yam giciko kwede pigi." 
Psalms122:5 Komker me ŋolo kop giketo tye kunnu, gin komker me ot pa Daudi." 
Psalms122:6 Wuleg pi kuc me Jerucalem! “Wek gin jo ma mari gubed ki lonyo dok ki kwo maber! 
Psalms122:7 Kuc obed i i cel murumo gaŋŋi, dok kuc madwoŋ myero obed i odi ma wigi ocudo malo!”" 
Psalms122:8 Pi utmega ki pi luwota abiwacci, “Kuc obed botwu!”" 
Psalms122:9 Kit macalo Rwot Lubaŋawa bedo i ode kany-nyi, abilego ni ibed maber." 
Psalms123:1 Ai Rwot, ailo waŋa aneno boti, in ma ibedo i wi komkerri i polo!" 
Psalms123:2 Nen, macalo lutic gineno bot rwodigi, dok macalo aŋeca neno bot min ot ma en bedo bote, waŋ bene waneno bot Rwot Lubaŋawa, nio wan ma kica omake i komwa," 
Psalms123:3 Kica omaki i komwa, ai Rwot, kica omaki i komwa do, pien doŋ gicayowa twatwal!" 
Psalms123:4 Tipowa doŋ ool woko pi kare malac ki ŋala pa jo ma gitye ki kwo mayot, ki cac pa jo ma luwakke." 
Psalms124:1 Jo Icrael myero guwacci, “Ka kono Rwot pe obedo tuŋ botwa," 
Psalms124:2 ka kono Rwot pe obedo tuŋ botwa, i kare ma lukworwa gubino ka lweny i komwa," 
Psalms124:3 kono gumwonyowa woko makwo oyotoyot, i kare ma kinigagi olyetti woko marac twatwal i komwa;" 
Psalms124:4 kono nene lalele omolowa oterowa woko, kono biamwonyi me pii oumowa woko lipuk," 
Psalms124:5 kono omiyo pii otwagge i wiwa. 
Psalms124:6 Gipwo Rwot, ma pe omiyowa botgi macalo riŋo ma myero gukil woko ki lakgi!" 
Psalms124:7 Wabwot woko calo winyo ma obwot ki i owic pa ladwar; tol owic ocot, ci wan wabwot!" 
Psalms124:8 Kony ducu ma wamito a ki bot Rwot, muketo polo ki lobo." 
Psalms125:1 Jo ma geno, Rwot gitye macalo got Cion, ma pe gitwero dirone gikobo ka mukene, ento cuŋ mere kacel matwal." 
Psalms125:2 Kit macalo godi gurumo Jerucalem woko dyere-ni, Rwot bene orumo jone woko kumeno, nia i kare-ni cito kwede anyim nakanaka," 
Psalms125:3 Jo ma kitgi raco kadi gumak odoo ker me loc ci pe gibiloyo lobo ma gimiyo bot jo ma kitgi atir, wek jo ma kitgi atir pe gurye ciŋgi me timo gin marac." 
Psalms125:4 Tim ber bot jo ma kitgi beco, ki bot jo ma cwinygi tye atir." 
Psalms125:5 Ento jo ma lokke gilubo yogi mugom Rwot biterogi ribogi ki lutim maraco! Kuc obed i Icrael! 
Psalms126:1 I kare ma Rwot odwokowa cen i Cion, onoŋo wabedo calo jo ma leko lek," 
Psalms126:2 Onoŋo wanyero nyero, ma wadaŋŋe bene ki yomcwiny; ci lurok guwaco lok i komwa ni, “Rwot doŋ otyeko tiyo jami me aura pigi.”" 
Psalms126:3 Rwot doŋ otiyo jami me aura piwa, omiyo cwinywa yom." 
Psalms126:4 Ai Rwot, dwok gum botwa do, calo kulu ma tye i Negeb!" 
Psalms126:5 Wek jo ma coyo kodigi ma gikok akoka ki pig waŋgi guka camgi kun gidaŋŋe ki yomcwiny madwoŋ! 
Psalms126:6 ŋat ma woto kun kok, ma noŋo omako kodi cito ka coyone, bidwogo i pacone ma daŋŋe adaŋa ki yomcwiny, kun kelo kal ma okayo ki i poto." 
Psalms127:1 Ka pe Rwot aye ma ogero ot, jo ma gero gicanne nono. Ka pe Rwot aye ma okuro gaŋ, lakurpiny bedo dyewor ma waŋe twolo noŋo." 
Psalms127:2 Kadi ka wupuk con ka tic, ma wudok paco ka yweyo wa mot, kun wucamo kwon wuparo kwede pi tic ma wutiyo, meno ducu noŋo, pe konyowu; pien Rwot miyo jo ma en maro ginino." 
Psalms127:3 Nen, litino aye gin gipiny mua bot Rwot, gin aye mot ma ginywalogi anywala," 
Psalms127:4 Litino ma dano mo onywalo ma pud en awobi, gitye calo atero ma tye i ciŋ ŋat ma lalweny." 
Psalms127:5 Ŋat ma ajurune opoŋ ki lwak atero ma kit meno bedo ki yomcwiny! Pe giloye wacel i kare ma en bilok ki lukworre ki i dog gaŋ. 
Psalms128:1 Tye ki gum dano ma lworo Rwot, ma bedo kun lubo yone!" 
Psalms128:2 Ibicamo cam mua ki i tic ma itiyo ki ciŋi; ibibedo ki yomcwiny dok ilimo lwak lonyo madwoŋ. 
Psalms128:3 Dakoni bibedo calo olok ma nyak nyig madwoŋ i odi; ki litinoni gibibedo calo yat ma pote lot kun gibedo girumo mejani woko. 
Psalms128:4 Nen, meno aye kit gum ma poto i kom dano ma lworo Rwot," 
Psalms128:5 Rwot myero omini gum ki i Cion pi kare me kwoni ducu, wek inen lonyo ma tye i Jerucalem!" 
Psalms128:6 Wek bene ibinen likwayu! Kuc obed i kom Icrael! 
Psalms129:1 Jo Icrael myero guwacci, “Guketo can i koma marac twatwal nia wa ka tinona," 
Psalms129:2 guketo can i koma marac twatwal nia wa ka tinona, ento pe guloya kadi ki acel." 
Psalms129:3 Wegi kweri dyaŋ gipuro ŋeya; guryeyo pottigi obedo maboco.” 
Psalms129:4 Rwot oporre, en doŋ oŋolo tol pa jo maraco woko." 
Psalms129:5 Wek dano ducu ma kwero Cion giket lewic i wigi dok gidwokgi bene cen! 
Psalms129:6 Wek gubed macalo lum ma tye i wi ot malo, ma two woko ma noŋo peya odoŋo ocito malo," 
Psalms129:7 ma dano ma nyaro bene pe mako poŋo ciŋe, kadi ŋat ma tweyo kacel bene pe gwaro poŋ kore," 
Psalms129:8 ci miyo jo ma kato ki kenyo pe giwacci, “Gum pa Rwot obed i komwu! Walamo gum i komwu i nyiŋ Rwot!”" 
Psalms130:1 Ai Rwot, akok boti ki i te bur matut!" 
Psalms130:2 Rwot, winy kokona do! Cik iti iwiny legana me bako dog do!" 
Psalms130:3 Ai Rwot, ka nene onoŋo iparo balwa, aŋa munoŋo twero cuŋ i nyimi, in Rwot?" 
Psalms130:4 Ento in iweko balwa, wek giwori." 
Psalms130:5 Akuro Rwot ki cwinya ducu, ageno lokke bene." 
Psalms130:6 Kwona ducu ocuŋ i kom Rwot; akure makato lukur-piny ma gikuro nio wa odiko, makato lukur-piny ma gimito ni piny oru." 
Psalms130:7 Wun jo Icrael, myero wugen Rwot! Rwot tye ki mar ma pe lokke, dok lar madwoŋ bene tye bote," 
Psalms130:8 En bi koko jo Icrael ki i balgi ducu. 
Psalms131:1 Ai Rwot, pe atye ki miti ma malo twatwal i cwinya, dok bene waŋa pe neno malo twatwal. An pe atikke i kom lok madito ata ma gidito dok me aura makato ŋecca woko." 
Psalms131:2 Ento doŋ cwinya okwe, aywe doŋ gira mot, calo latin ma tye i kor minne ma oliŋ mot; cwinya doŋ okwe calo latin ma doŋ oliŋ." 
Psalms131:3 Wun jo Icrael, wugen Rwot! nia i kare man cito kwede anyim nakanaka!" 
Psalms132:1 Ai Rwot, po pi Daudi, ki pi can ducu bene ma yam en ociro;" 
Psalms132:2 ki kit macalo yam en okwoŋo kwede kwoŋ bot Rwot, ma okwono bot en ŋat Matek pa Yakobo ni," 
Psalms132:3 “Pe abidonyo i oda, nyo kadi me ito i wi kitandana;" 
Psalms132:4 nino bene pe bimako waŋa, dok pe abimiyo waŋa," 
Psalms132:5 nio ka anoŋo kabedo pi Rwot, kabedo ma en ŋat Matek pa Yakobo twero bedo iye.”" 
Psalms132:6 Nen, wawinyo pire ki i Eprata, wanoŋo tye i potti me Jaar." 
Psalms132:7 “Wucitu ka ma en bedo iye, wek wawore i nyim komkerre!”" 
Psalms132:8 Ai Rwot, a icit i kabedoni me yweyo, kacel ki canduk me tweroni." 
Psalms132:9 Wek ajwagini gurukke ki kit ma atir, wek joni ma gigeni gudaŋŋe ki yomcwiny." 
Psalms132:10 Pe myero ikwer kabaka ma in aye yam iyero ka giwiro, ento par pi laticci Daudi." 
Psalms132:11 Rwot okwoŋo kwoŋ me ada bot Daudi, ma en pe dok biloko, ni. “Abiketo latin awobi acel ki i kin awobeni bedo kabaka, en bibedo ka loc ki i neyi," 
Psalms132:12 Ka likwayu ducu gibigwoko gicikkena ki ada ki lok me caden ma apwonyogi kwede, ci a biketo litiilogi bene bedo i wi komkerri, gibibedo ka loc nakanaka.”" 
Psalms132:13 Pien Rwot doŋ oyero Cion; en mito ni obed pacone ka ma ebibedo iye. 
Psalms132:14 “Man aye kabedo me-yweyona ma abibedo iye matwal; abibedo kany, pien doŋ amito." 
Psalms132:15 Abimiyo gum i kom Cion ci noŋo cam mabup; dok abimiyo lucan ducu ma bedo iye giyeŋ ki kwon. 
Psalms132:16 Abimiyo ajwagine giruko lar, ki jone ma geno Rwot gibidaŋŋbe ki yomcwiny." 
Psalms132:17 Abiyero ŋat mo acel ki i kom likwayo pa Daudi me bedo kabaka; doŋ atyeko yubo mac tara pi danona ma giwiro. 
Psalms132:18 Abimiyo lewic umo lukworre woko limuk, ento en keken aye kerre bibedo maber dok bikelo, kuc bot lwakke.”" 
Psalms133:1 Nen kit macalo bedo ber ki me yomcwiny ka omego gibedo kacel ki mer i kingi! 
Psalms133:2 Rom ki moo ma ŋwece kur ma gionyo i wic, ma mol bino piny wa i tik dano, moo ma con omol ki i wi Aron obino piny Wa i tike, ma omol bene odyako wa ŋut boŋŋone woko liweŋ!" 
Psalms133:3 Dok rom ki toyo me got Kermon, ma luk i wi godi me Cion! Kunnu en aye ka ma Rwot ociko iye pi miyo gum, ki kwo ma bedo matwal." 
Psalms134:1 Wubin, wupwo Rwot, wun lutic pa Rwot ducu, ma wucuŋ i ot pa Rwot dyewor!" 
Psalms134:2 Wutiŋ ciŋwu malo wutaŋ i kabedo man maleŋ, ci wupwo Rwot!" 
Psalms134:3 Rwot omiwu gum ki i Cion, en muketo polo ki lobo!" 
Psalms135:1 Wupak Rwot! Wupak nyiŋ Rwot, wun luticce ducu," 
Psalms135:2 wun ma wucuŋ i ot pa Rwot, i dyekal me ot pa Lubaŋawa!" 
Psalms135:3 Wupak Rwot, pien en ber; wuwer wer me pako nyiŋe, pien en lakica." 
Psalms135:4 Rwot oyero Yakobo me bedo mere, ki jo Icrael me bedo lwakke kikome." 
Psalms135:5 Aŋeyo pira kena ni Rwot dit, dok aŋeyo ni Rwotwa loyo lwak cal lubaŋa ducu." 
Psalms135:6 Gin mo keken ma Rwot mito en tiyo, i polo ki i wi lobo, i nam kadi i pii matut ma tye piny i te lobo." 
Psalms135:7 En aye ma miyo pol tiŋŋe malo ki i agikki me lobo, en ma miyo lutkot wil, en bene ma cwalo yamo ki i odine me kano jami, ci kodo." 
Psalms135:8 En aye ma yam oneko litino kayo pa jo Ejipt woko, litino kayo pa dano ki pa lee." 
Psalms135:9 En otiyo lwak taŋo ki gin-aura mapol i Ejipt, kun pwodo Parao ki luticce ducu." 
Psalms135:10 Dok oneko lwak me rok mapol, ci oneko luker matego woko liweŋ," 
Psalms135:11 Cikon, kabaka pa jo Amor, ki Og, kabaka me Bacan, ki luker ducu ma tye i Kanaan." 
Psalms135:12 Omiyo lobogi woko me bedo gipiny, gipiny pa lwakke jo Icrael." 
Psalms135:13 Ai Rwot, nyiŋi bedo nakanaka, dok bene gibipo piri i kare pa yalwak ducu." 
Psalms135:14 Rwot bimiyo jone loyo kop, kica bimake i kom luticce." 
Psalms135:15 Cal lubaŋa pa lurok gitiyogi ki ryal ki jabu; man obedo tic ma dano gutiyo ki ciŋgi," 
Psalms135:16 Doggi tye, ento pe giloko, waŋgi bene tye, ento pe gitwero neno piny." 
Psalms135:17 Itgi tye, ento pe gitwero winyo lok, yamo me yweyo bene pe i doggi." 
Psalms135:18 Jo mutiyo cal lubaŋa magi bene girom aroma kwedgi, ki jo ducu ma geno cal lubaŋa magi bene gitye kit meno." 
Psalms135:19 Wun jo Icrael, wupak Rwot! Wun jo me ot pa Aron bene wupak Rwot!" 
Psalms135:20 Wun jo me ot pa Levi, wupak Rwot! Wun bene ma wulworo Rwot, wupake!" 
Psalms135:21 Gipwo Rwot ki i Cion, en ma bedo i Jerucalem! Wupak Rwot!" 
Psalms136:1 Wumi pwoc bot Rwot, pien en ber; mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:2 Wumi pwoc bot Lubaŋa ma loyo lwak lubaŋa-gu ducu, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:3 Wumi pwoc bot Rwot ma loyo rwodi ducu, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:4 En keken aye ma tiyo ginaura madito, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:5 En oketo polo ‘ki ryekone, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:6 En bene ma opeto lobo i wi pii matut, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:7 En muketo gin madito ma ryeny ma menyo piny, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:8 Oketo ceŋ me loyo dyeceŋ, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedonakanaka." 
Psalms136:9 Oketo dwe ki lakalatwe me loyo dyewor, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:10 Oneko litino kayo pa jo Ejipt ma co woko ducu, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:11 Ci okwanyo jo Icrael okelogi woko ki i kin jo Ejipt, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:12 Okelogi woko pi twero me bade ki ciŋe ma oryeyo, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:13 Opoko i Nam Makwar woko aryo i dyere, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:14 ci omiyo jo Icrael gukato ki i dyere wa loka tuŋcel, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:15 Ento omiyo Parao kacel ki dul monnye gumwony guto wok i Nam Makwar, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:16 En mutelo lwakke i dye tim, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:17 Oneko luker madito woko ducu, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:18 oneko wa luker ma guywek-gu woko mapol; pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka. 
Psalms136:19 Oneko Cikon, ma kabaka pa jo Amor, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:20 oneko bene Og, kabaka me Bacan, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:21 Omiyo lobogi woko bot lwakke me bedo gipinygi, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:22 omiyo bot luticce jo Icrael obed ginaleyagi, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:23 En opo piwa i kare ma doŋ giloyowa woko marac, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka;" 
Psalms136:24 ci olarowa ki i ciŋ lumerokwa, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:25 En miyo cam bot gin makwo ducu, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms136:26 Wumi pwoc bot Lubaŋa me polo, pien mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms137:1 Wabedo piny i ŋet kulu me Babilon, ci wakok matek i kare ma wapo pi Cion." 
Psalms137:2 Waŋabo opukwa malo i kor yadi ma i dog kulu kunnu. 
Psalms137:3 Jo ma gumakowa guterowa i opii gupenyowa ni myero wawer botgi; lulibowa gumito ni wawer wer me yomo cwiny, kun giwacci, “Wuwerwa wer mo ma loko lok i kom Cion!”" 
Psalms137:4 Watwero wero wer pa Rwot i lobo pa lurok niŋniŋ?
