Psalms137:5 Wek ciŋa ma lacuc otwo woko, ka ce wiya wil i komi, in Jerucalem!" 
Psalms137:6 Wek leba omok woko i dana, ka onoŋo pe apo piri, ka pe atamo piri, in Jerucalem, macalo gin ma miya yomcwiny makato!" 
Psalms137:7 Ai Rwot, po pi nino ma Jerucalem oneno can iye, ci icul waŋe i kom jo Edom. Po kit ma gubedo ka wacci, “Ret woko, ret woko piny wa i ŋom te gutine!”" 
Psalms137:8 In Babilon, inlayak! Ŋat ma biculo kworwa i komi ki gin ma itimo i komwa, bibedo ki yomcwiny.’" 
Psalms137:9 Dano-ma mako litinoni, ci jwatogi woko i kom got, bibedo ki yomcwiny!" 
Psalms138:1 Apwoyi ki cwinya ducu, ai Rwot; awero wer me paki i nyim cal lubaŋa-gu." 
Psalms138:2 Aryebbe piny akemo ot meri maleŋ, apako nyigi pi mar meri ma pe, lokke ki pi genni; pien itiŋo nyiŋi ki lokki ducu malo makato jami mukene-gu ducu." 
Psalms138:3 I nino ma akok bati, in igamo doga, ci imedo tekcwiny bota." 
Psalms138:4 Luker ducu ma wi lobo gibipaki, ai Rwot, pien dog guwinyo lokki ma icikke kwede." 
Psalms138:5 Gibiwero wer pi gin ma Rwot otiyo, ki pi deyo madit pa Rwot." 
Psalms138:6 Kadi bed Rwot bedo malo ka mabor twatwal, pud neno jo mamwol ma lucan i cwinygi; ento jo ma lyerre en ŋeyogi woko ki ka mabor." 
Psalms138:7 Kadi bed awoto ma can oruma woko dyere, in pud igwoko kwona; iryeyo ciŋi me juko akemo pa lukworra, ci ilara ki ciŋ i ma lacuc." 
Psalms138:8 Rwot bicoba yub ma mere ducu pira; ai Rwot, mar meri ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka. Pe ibwot gin ma itiyo ki ciŋi woko." 
Psalms139:1 Ai Rwot, in doŋ iŋiyo kwona CI Iŋeya woko!" 
Psalms139:2 Kadi abedo piny nyo kadi aa malo, in iŋeyo; iniaŋ tamma woko ki ka mabor," 
Psalms139:3 Iŋiyo yona ki ka butona piny, dok iŋeyo kit yo me kwona ducu." 
Psalms139:4 Kadi ma peya aloko lok mo, nen, ai Rwot, in doŋ iŋeyo lok ma abiloko ducu." 
Psalms139:5 In iruma woko tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi, kun igwoka ma iketo ciŋi i koma." 
Psalms139:6 Kit ŋec ma itye kwede tye me aura mada ki tuŋ bota; tye wa malo twatwal ma pe atwero o iye. 
Psalms139:7 Abicito kwene wek aa woko ki boti? Abia ki i nyimi ariŋo acito kwene? 
Psalms139:8 Kadi ka ait malo i polo, in bene itye kunnul Kadi ka abuto piny i lyel, in pud itye kunnu aye!" 
Psalms139:9 Kaatuk acito malo ma awoto macalo rupiny, nyo abed i kabedo mo i dog nam ma tye ka mabor adada," 
Psalms139:10 in pud ibibedo kunnu ka peya, dok bene ibimaka ki ciŋi malacuc." 
Psalms139:11 Ka awacci, “Wek colpiny ouma woko, ki Leŋo me ceŋ ma atye iye odok dyewor,”" 
Psalms139:12 colpiny bene pe col ki boti, ki dyewor bene leŋ aleŋa calo dyeceŋ; pien ki tuŋ boti colpiny rom ki leŋo." 
Psalms139:13 In aye ma iketo dul me koma ducu, dok icweyo woko kacel ki i i maa." 
Psalms139:14 Abipaki, pien in aye ma myero gilwori dok itye me aura. Ticci ducu ma itiyo obedo tic aura! Iŋeya maber twatwal." 
Psalms139:15 Yam ineno ka giribo cogo koma i kare ma gicweya i i maa, ma gicweyo koma piny i te lobo ka matut ki diro madwoŋ," 
Psalms139:16 Ineno koma ki waŋi ma pud peya gicweyo otum, wel ninona ma iciko pira ducu gicoyogi woko i bukki ma peya nino mo acel i kingi oo." 
Psalms139:17 Ai Lubaŋa, tammi beco bota kuman! Gin ducu mono gitye adi!" 
Psalms139:18 Ka awacci akwangi akwana, gipol gikato kweyo woko. Ka aco ki i waŋ nino, noŋo pud atye boti." 
Psalms139:19 Ai Lubaŋa, onoŋo amito inek jo maraco woko, wek jo ma oyo remo pa dano gurweny woko ki bota," 
Psalms139:20 gin jo ma gibedo ka loko lok marac i komi-ni, ma guille malo kun giloko lok marac me balo nyiŋi," 
Psalms139:21 Ai Rwot, an adagjo ma gidagi, dok bene iya okwerojo ma gijemo woko i komi." 
Psalms139:22 Adaggi adada ki adagadaga mutum, anenogi macalo lukworra." 
Psalms139:23 Ŋi kwona, ai Lubaŋa, wek iŋe gin ma tye i cwinya; koŋ itema, wek iŋe ka ma tamma tye iye." 
Psalms139:24 Inen ka kit mo marac tye iiya, ci doŋ itela i yo ma bedo nakanaka." 
Psalms140:1 Ai Rwot; lara ki bot jo maraco, gwoka bene ki i kom jo ma gin lutim bwami," 
Psalms140:2 ma giyubo lok maraco ki i cwinygi, ci gitugo lweny teretere-ni." 
Psalms140:3 Doggi bit calo lak twol-madoŋo, lok ma giloko obedo calo kwir pa twolororo." 
Psalms140:4 Ai Rwot, gwoka ki i ciŋ jo maraco; gwoka ki i kom jo ma gin lutim bwami, ma doŋ gupiro lok me dwalo tyena wek apoti." 
Psalms140:5 Jo ma nyatte guciko owicgi gukano woko pira, guciko obwo ki tol kun gimito maka kwede; i ŋet yo ducu noŋo guciko obwo tye ka kura akura." 
Psalms140:6 Awaco bot Rwot ni, “In Lubaŋana.” Winy legana me bako dog, ai Rwot!" 
Psalms140:7 Ai Rwot Lubaŋana, lalarra matek, igwoka maber i kare me lweny." 
Psalms140:8 Ai Rwot, pe myero imi bot jo maraco gin ma gimito; pe iwek tim maraco ma gupiro-ni ocobbe." 
Psalms140:9 Pe iwek lukworra guloya woko, wek tim aranyi ma gimito timone odok i komgi." 
Psalms140:10 Wek lodi mac ocorre i komgi owaŋgi woko; wek gi bolgi i bur matut, pe dok gunoŋ yo me katti woko!" 
Psalms140:11 Wek jo ma giloko lok gobagoba me balo nyiŋ luwotgi pe gubed i lobo; wek gin marac omak gin lutim bwami ci ityekgi woko. 
Psalms140:12 Aŋeyo ni Rwot pido pilucan, dok ŋolo kop kakare pi jo ma piny obwoyogi." 
Psalms140:13 Adada jo ma kitgi atir bimiyo pwoc boti; ki jo ma cwinygi atir gibibedo i nyimi. 
Psalms141:1 Ai Rwot, akok boti, bin bota oyotoyot do! Winy dwana ka akok boti!" 
Psalms141:2 Wek legana obed i nyimi macalo odok eceta ma giwaŋo ma duny makur; ki ciŋa ma ataŋo boti-ni myero obed calo gitum ma gityero boti otyeno. 
Psalms141:3 Ai Rwot, gwok doga, dok inen kit ma aŋamo kwede doga ka lok." 
Psalms141:4 Gwoka mi pe abed ki cwiny me timo gin marac, wek pe aribbe ki jo maraco pi timo bal, wek bene pe aribbe kwedgi me camo cam mamit ma gin guyubo!" 
Psalms141:5 Wek dano ma kite ber aye opwoda, dok ojuka ma kica omake i koma, ento pe iwek dano mo marac owir wiya ki moo; pien legana ma atye ka legi kwede teretere-ni tye pi dag gin marac ma gin gitimo." 
Psalms141:6 Ka inen gimiyogi i ciŋ dano ma myero guŋol kop i komgi, gibipwonyo atir ni lok pa Rwot kara tye ada." 
Psalms141:7 Gibiketo cogogi woko ata i dog lyel, macalo got ma dano tyero iye ci tyer poto woko acacacac i lobo." 
Psalms141:8 Ento an, ai Rwot, waŋa kemo boti; ayenyo kalarre boti, pe iweka ata ma pe igwoka!" 
Psalms141:9 Gwoka wek pe amok i owic ma guciko pira-ni, gwoka pe amok i obwo pa lutim maraco." 
Psalms141:10 Wek jo maraco gumok i obwogi kekengi, ento mi an abwot ma pe gin mo oguda." 
Psalms142:1 Akok bot Rwot pi kony, kun abako doga bene bote." 
Psalms142:2 Akelo lok me kokona ducu i nyime, dok atitte bene kit can ducu ma atye ka noŋone." 
Psalms142:3 Ka cwinya doŋ ool woko, in iŋeyo gin ma myero atim. Lukworra guciko o wic woko pira i yo ma awoto ki tye kare ducu-ni." 
Psalms142:4 Aloko waŋa tuŋ acuc aneno, ci anoŋo ni pe tye dano mo ma myero okonya: kalarre mo mudoŋ pira bene pe, pe tye ŋat mo ma paro pira." 
Psalms142:5 Ai Rwot, akok boti pi kony; Rwot, in aye kalarrena, in aye dul ma gipokka i lobo pa jo makwo." 
Psalms142:6 Winy kokona do, pien piny doŋ obwoya woko! Lara ki i ciŋ jo ma gitye ka liba, pien gitek giloya woko." 
Psalms142:7 Kwanya ikela woko ki i mabuc, wek ami pwoc boti. Jo ma kitgi atir gibiruma dyere, pien ibitiyo kweda i yo maber mada." 
Psalms143:1 Ai Rwot, winy legana; winy legana me bako dog ma akelo i nyimi! Gam doga pi genni, pien in iporre!" 
Psalms143:2 Pe iŋol kop i kom laticci, pien pe tye dano mo makwo ma kite atir i nyimi." 
Psalms143:3 Lakworra doŋ oryemo kora, oloya woko adada, omiyo abedo i colpiny calo jo ma yam doŋ guto wa con." 
Psalms143:4 Pi meno cwinya doŋ ool woko, gen bene doŋ orwenyo woko ki i cwinya." 
Psalms143:5 Apo i kom kare macon ma doŋ okato, ci abedo ka lwodo lok i kom gin ducu ma doŋ itiyo; gin ducu ma itiyo bino i tamma." 
Psalms143:6 Aryeyo ciŋa ataŋo boti ka alego, tipona tye ki orwo me neni calo lobo mutwo woko ma pii pe iye," 
Psalms143:7 Ai Rwot, gam doga oyotoyot! Cwinya mito tum woko! Pe ikanne woko ki bota, miyo abedo rom ki jo ma gicito gidonyo piny i bur." 
Psalms143:8 Ageni mada; wek awiny i odiko kun ipoyo wiya i kom mar meri ma pe lokke. Pwonya ki yo ma imito ni myero alubi, pien legana ducu acwalo malo boti kunnu." 
Psalms143:9 Ai Rwot, lara ki i ciŋ lukworra! An doŋ ariŋo ka larre boti," 
Psalms143:10 Pwonya wek ati gin ma imito, pien in Lubaŋanal Wek cwiny meri maber-ri otela iyo mupirre marom!" 
Psalms143:11 Lara, ai Rwot, pi deyo me nyiŋi; dok ikela woko ki i can pi porreni!" 
Psalms143:12 I mar meri ma pe lokke pira, nek lukworra ityekgi woko, pien an abedo laticci." 
Psalms144:1 Gipwo Rwot ma en aye gotta, ma opwonyo ciŋa pi lweny, dok oŋiyo lwet ciŋa woko ki lweny." 
Psalms144:2 En gotta ki cel gogona matek, en kakannena ki lalarra, en gwoka macalo kwot, ariŋo alaro bote, en ma obwoyo rok mapol, omiyo gubedo i te locca," 
Psalms144:3 Ai Rwot, dano gin aŋo ma miyo ipo pire? Dano adana ma mwa-ni piŋo ibedo ka tamo pire?" 
Psalms144:4 Dano obedo calo yamo me yweyo keken, nino me kwone bene obedo calo tipo ma kato woko oyotoyot," 
Psalms144:5 Ai Rwot, ywa polo idwok cen, ci ilor ibin piny! Gud kom godi ci wek guduny yito!" 
Psalms144:6 Mi lutkot owil omeny piny oket woko ata, celgi ki ateroni ci iradgi woko piny." 
Psalms144:7 Rye ciŋi piny ki i polo, ywaya ci ikwanya woko ki i pii matut, lara ki i ciŋ lurok," 
Psalms144:8 ma gibedo ka loko lok goba keken. Kadi bed gutiŋo ciŋgi me kwoŋo kwoŋ, ento pud inoŋo ni giloko lok goba." 
Psalms144:9 Abiwero wer manyen boti, ai Rwot; abigoyo naŋa ma giciko ki tol puc apar kun apaki kwede." 
Psalms144:10 In aye ma imiyo loc bot luker, dok ilaro laticci Daudi," 
Psalms144:11 Lara ki i lak pala lucwan mager, dok ilara ki i ciŋ lurok ma giloko megi lok goba keken-ni; kadi bed gutiŋo ciŋgi me kwoŋo kwoŋ, ento pud inoŋo ni giloko lok goba." 
Psalms144:12 Mi litino awobewa kakagi-ni gubed calo ginapita ma doŋ otyeko doŋo woko; ki anyirawa bene gubed macalo wir me twoke ma gitoŋo me gero gaŋkal madit. 
Psalms144:13 Mi derowa ducu gupoŋ woko libic ki kit wit cam mapatpat. Mi romiwa bene gunywal litinogi alip ki dok alip apar i oletwa. 
Psalms144:14 Mi dyaniwa bene guduru gunywal litinogi ma pe igi myero opot woko nyo gubwog litinogi abwoga. Pe imi koko me can mo owinnye i dye ganwal 
Psalms144:15 Gitye ki yomcwiny jo ma kit gum man bipoto i komgi! Gitye ki gum jo ma Rwot aye Lubaŋagi! 
Psalms145:1 Abidwori ki wer, in Lubaŋana ki kabakana, dok abipako nyiŋi nakanaka." 
Psalms145:2 Abipwoyi nino ducu, dok abipako nyiŋi nakanaka," 
Psalms145:3 Rwot dit, myero gipake twatwal, ditte pe romo titte, tere pe tatte." 
Psalms145:4 Lwak me kare ducu gibipako ticci bot litinogi; gibituco tic matego ma yam itiyogi. 
Psalms145:5 Abilwodo lok i kom deyo me dit me kerri, ki i kom tic me aura ma ceŋ itiyo." 
Psalms145:6 Jo gibilok i kom tek me ticci ma kelo lworo bot dano-ni, ki an bene abitito pi ditti." 
Psalms145:7 Gibimiyo pi berri madwoŋ ywek ŋene mada i kin dano, dok gibiwero wer ki dwan maloŋo pi porreni." 
Psalms145:8 Rwot lakica dok maro dano, kiniga pe mako oyot, mar mere ma pe lokke dwoŋ," 
Psalms145:9 Rwot ber bot dano ducu, dok kica make i kom gin ducu ma en oketo." 
Psalms145:10 Ai Rwot, jami ducu ma in icweyo gibimiyi pwoc, ki joni ma geni ducu gibipaki." 
Psalms145:11 Gibiloko i kom deyo me kerri, dok gibitito pi tweroni bene," 
Psalms145:12 wek dano ducu guŋe pi tic matego ma in doŋ itiyo, ki deyo me dit me kerri." 
Psalms145:13 Kerri en ker ma ri nakanaka, dok locci biri nakanaka i kare pa yalwak ducu. Rwot lagen i lokke ducu ma en ociko, dok bene lakica i ticce ducu ma en tiyo," 
Psalms145:14 Rwot kwako dano ma mito poto, dok ilo joma piny obwoyogi woko ada malo." 
Psalms145:15 Waŋ dano ducu neno boti, in aye ma iminigi cam i kare ma mitte kikome," 
Psalms145:16 In iyabo ciŋi, ci imiyo gin makwo ducu giyeŋ." 
Psalms145:17 Gin ducu ma Rwot tiyo tye atir, gin ma en timo ducu tiyo ki mar." 
Psalms145:18 Rwot tye cok bot jo ducu ma kok bote, ma gikok bote ki ada." 
Psalms145:19 En miyo jami ducu ma mitte bot jo ma lwore, dok winyo kokogi, ci larogi bene," 
Psalms145:20 Rwot, gwoko jo ducu ma mare; ento jo maraco ducu en binekogi tyekogi woko." 
Psalms145:21 Abipako Rwot kare ducu; wek gin makwo ducu ma tye ki kom gupak nyiŋ Rwot nakanaka. 
Psalms146:1 Wupak Rwot! Pak Rwot, in tipona!" 
Psalms146:2 Abipako Rwot pi kare ducu me kwona; abiwero wer me pako Lubaŋana ka pud akwo. 
Psalms146:3 Pe ibed ka geno rwodi, pe igen dano adana mamwa ma pe romo konyi-ni." 
Psalms146:4 Ka oto dok i nom ka ma yam oa ki iye; yubbe ducu mayam oyubo rwenyo woko liweŋ i nine-meno kikome," 
Psalms146:5 Tye ki gum dano ma geno Lubaŋa pa Yakobo me konye; ma genne ducu tye i kom Rwot Lubaŋane," 
Psalms146:6 ma oketo polo ki lobo, ki nam, ki jami ducu ma tye i igi, En gwoko cikkene nakanaka;" 
Psalms146:7 en ŋolo kop pa jo ma giunogi kakare, dok miyo cam bot jo ma kec nekogi. Rwot gonyo lumabuc woko;" 
Psalms146:8 Rwot yabo waŋ jo ma waŋgi oto. Rwot ilo jo ma piny obwoyogi woko ada malo, Rwot maro jo ma kitgi atir." 
Psalms146:9 Rwot gwoko jo ma gin lubedo i lobo mo-ni, en konyo mon to ki litino-kic: ento balo yub pa jo maraco woko, miyo pe cobbe matwal." 
Psalms146:10 Rwot bibedo ka loc nakanaka; Lubaŋani, in Cion, bibedo pi kare pa yalwak ducu. Wupak Rwot!" 
Psalms147:1 Wupak Rwot! Pien wero wer me pako Lubaŋawa ber, pien en lakica, mumiyo wer me pak myero kwede," 
Psalms147:2 Rwot tye ka gero Jerucalem odoco; en coko jo Icrael ma yam giterogi i opii kelogi paco. 
Psalms147:3 En caŋo jo ma cwinygi cwer, dok tweyo waŋ retgi woko," 
Psalms147:4 En omoko wel lakalatwe woko ducu, ocako nyiŋgi woko ducu liweŋ." 
Psalms147:5 Rwotwa dit, dok tek twatwal; tye ki niaŋ matut ma pe pimme." 
Psalms147:6 Rwot tiŋo jo ma ginyonogi piny, ilogi malo, ci reto jo maraco gipoto woko ducu i ŋom." 
Psalms147:7 Wuwer wer bot Rwot kun wumiye pwoc; wupak Lubaŋawa ki opuk agoya. 
Psalms147:8 En umo polo woko ki pol, dok miyo kot cwer i lobo; en miyo lum doŋo wa i wi godi-gu." 
Psalms147:9 En miyo cam bot lee tim, dok pito litino agak ma tye ka koko." 
Psalms147:10 Tek pa aguragura pe miye yomcwiny, ki tyen dano ma laŋwec bene pe yomo cwinye;" 
Psalms147:11 ento Rwot cwinye yom i kom jo ma gilwore, ki i kom jo ma geno mar mere ma pe lokke," 
Psalms147:12 Pak Rwot, in Jerucalem! Pak Lubaŋani, in Cion!" 
Psalms147:13 En aye ma gwoko dog gaŋŋi miyo cuŋ matek; en bene ma miyo gum i kom joni. 
Psalms147:14 En miyo waŋ apokki loboni bedo ki kuc, dok miyowu kal maber mabup adada weko wuyeŋ." 
Psalms147:15 En cwalo cikke bot lobo; lokke riŋo bino oyotoyot," 
Psalms147:16 En cwalo pee mayom calo yer romo; dok keto bwoyo pee woko atata calo buru. 
Psalms147:17 En bolo pee piny calo ŋinyoŋinyo cam ma poto i ŋom; aŋa ma twero cuŋ i ŋico ma en miyo? 
Psalms147:18 En dok cwalo lokke, ci lenyo pee woko; en miyo yamone kodo, ci pii bene mol." 
Psalms147:19 En tito lokke bot Yakobo; cikke ki gin ducu ma en ociko en tito bot jo Icrael. 
Psalms147:20 En pe obedo ka tic ki rok mo mukene kit meno; pe giŋeyo cikke ki gin ma en ociko ducu, Wupak Rwot!" 
Psalms148:1 Wupak Rwot! Wupak Rwot ki i polo, ki wun jo ma wubedo malo ka mabor bene wupake!" 
Psalms148:2 Wun lumalaikane ducu, wupake, ki wun dul monnye bene wupake!" 
Psalms148:3 Wun ceŋ ki dwe wupake, wun lakalatwe ma ryeny, wupake!" 
Psalms148:4 Wupake, wun polo ma tye malo twatwal, ki wun pii ma wutye malo i wi polo bene wupake!" 
Psalms148:5 Wek gin ducu gupak nyiŋ Rwot! En ociko acika keken ci gukette. 
Psalms148:6 En oketogi i kabedogi doŋ me bedo iye matwal, oketo Waŋ apokkigi bene ma pe gitwero kato ki iye." 
Psalms148:7 Wupak Rwot ki i lobo, wun nyaŋ madoŋo me nam, kacel ki nam madoŋo matut-gu," 
Psalms148:8 wun mac ki pee, toyo ki ŋico, ki yamo lapiru ma kodo matek pi cobo gin ma en ociko!" 
Psalms148:9 Wupake, wun godi ki cere-gu, wun yadi ma nyak ki yadi cedar ducu!" 
Psalms148:10 Lee tim-gu ki dyaŋi ducu, gin makwo ma lak alaka i ŋom ki winyo ducu ma tuk!" 
Psalms148:11 Wupake, wun luker me lobo kacel ki lwak me rok ducu, rwodi ki luloc ducu me lobo!" 
Psalms148:12 Awobe ki anyira kacel, jo muti ki litino!" 
Psalms148:13 Wek gupak nyiŋ Rwot, pien nyiŋe keken aye dit makato ducu; deyone bene kato polo ki lobo woko." 
Psalms148:14 En doŋ omiyo lwakke odoko tek, en mumiyo jone ducu gipake, gin jo Icrael ma pigi tek mada bote. Wupak Rwot!" 
Psalms149:1 Wupak Rwot! Wuwer wer manyen bot Rwot; wupake i cokke pa lwak ma gigene! 
Psalms149:2 Wun jo Icrael, cwinywu myero obed yom i kom Lubaŋa muketowu: wun jo Cion, wubed ki yomcwiny pi kabakawu!" 
Psalms149:3 Wupak nyiŋe ki myel; wugo bul ki naŋa-gu kun wupake kwede. 
Psalms149:4 Pien Rwot cwinye yom i kom lwakke; en miyo deyo bot jo mamwol, miyo giloyo." 
Psalms149:5 Wek jone ma gigene gugo kijira ki deyo; wek guwer wer me yomcwiny i karamagi," 
Psalms149:6 Wek gudaŋŋe matek ki dwan malogo ka gipako Rwot, dok gumak pala lucwan ma lebe bit ryoryo i ciggl," 
Psalms149:7 me culo kwor i kom lurok, ki dok me pwodo lwak me rok mapol," 
Psalms149:8 me tweyo lukergi woko ducu ki nyor, ki me tweyo luditogi me awora woko ducu ki nyor me nyonyo," 
Psalms149:9 ki me ŋolo kop i komgi kit ma yam gicoyo! Man aye deyo pi lwakke ducu ma gigene. Wupak Rwot! 
Psalms150:1 Wupak Rwot. Wupak Rwot i kabedone maleŋ; wupake bene i dan polone matek! 
Psalms150:2 Wupake pi tic matego ma en otiyo; wupake pi ditte madwoŋ makato ducu-ni. 
Psalms150:3 Wupake kun wukuto tum; wupake ki nyamulere ki ŋaŋa! 
Psalms150:4 Wupake ki myel ki ajaa agoya-gu; wupake ki naŋa-gu ki lukemme! 
Psalms150:5 Wupake ki bul ma kok maloŋo; wupake bene ki atego agoya-gu ma kok maloŋo! 
Psalms150:6 Wek gin makwo ducu ma ywe gupak Rwot! Wupak Rwot! 
Proverbs1:1 Carolok pa Solomon, wod pa Daudi, kabaka me Icrael." 
Proverbs1:2 Carolok magi konyo dano me ŋeyo ryeko ki pwony maber, ki me niaŋ lok ma miyo niaŋ matut," 
Proverbs1:3 dok gipwonyo dano me bedo ki ryeko i gin ducu ma en tiyo, bedo ki kit ma tye atir, ŋolo kop atir, kun tiyo ki dano ducu maromrom." 
Proverbs1:4 Gipwonyo dano ma pe tye ki kit ŋec mo, ci doko ryek; dok miyo ŋec bot jo matino me moko lok maber pigi kengi." 
Proverbs1:5 Carolok magi bene medo ŋec bot ŋat maryek, telo dano ma tye ki niaŋ matut i ticce," 
Proverbs1:6 miyo giniaŋ tyen lok me carolok ki cal gin ma giloko i kome, ki lok pa luryeko, ki ododo ma giboko." 
Proverbs1:7 Ka dano lworo Rwot, ci en cako noŋo ŋec; jo mamiŋ gicayo ryeko dok gikwero pwonnye woko." 
Proverbs1:8 Latin, winy lok ma woru pwonyi kwede, pe ikwer winyo pwony pa meni bene’" 
Proverbs1:9 pien pwonygi twero yubo kiti maber, tye calo tok maber me aketa i wii, dok calo gi-ŋut ma iketo i ŋuti miyo inen mwonya." 
Proverbs1:10 Latinna, ka lubalo giomo cwinyi ki lok mo, pe myero iye." 
Proverbs1:11 Gwok nyo gibiwacci, “Bin kacel kwedwa, wek waki dano mo wanek woko, wakur dano ma pe tye ki bal wanek woko;" 
Proverbs1:12 wek wamwonygi woko ducu makwo macalo lyel, gubed macalo jo ma donyo piny i bur." 
Proverbs1:13 Lonyo mapatpat ducu bidoko mewa, odiwa bipoŋ ki jami ma wayako;" 
Proverbs1:14 bin iribbe kwedwa, wan ducu wabitic ki kicaa, lim acel.”" 
Proverbs1:15 Latinna, pe iribbe ka wot ki jo macalo meno, gwokke pe ilub korgi;" 
Proverbs1:16 tyengi lyet me ŋwec ka timo bal, gin nino ducu gitye ma guyubbe me oyo remo pa dano." 
Proverbs1:17 Ciko obwo konyo aŋo ka winyo tye ka neni? 
Proverbs1:18 Ento jo macalo meno giciko owic pigi kengi, gin gibito i owicgi kengi." 
Proverbs1:19 Meno aye can ma mako jo ma gin lubwami, meno aye gin ma neko lakwo." 
Proverbs1:20 Wuwiny, ryeko tye ka lwoŋo i yo gudo-gu; en kok ma lwoŋo lwoŋo i cuk ki dwane maloŋo;" 
Proverbs1:21 en tye ka lwoŋo matek ki i wi cel; wa i dog gan-gu en bedo ka lok aloka ni," 
Proverbs1:22 “Wun jo ma lumiŋ, wumito wubed miŋ pi kare ma rom mene? Luŋala mono gibibedo ki yomcwiny pi kare ma rom mene ki ŋalagi-ni? Lumiŋ, wun wudag pwonnye ma miyowu ŋec?" 
Proverbs1:23 Wuwiny lok ma an awaco botwu; nen, abinyuto tamma ducu botwu; abimiyo wuŋeyo lokka." 
Proverbs1:24 Abedo ka lwoŋowu ni wubin, ento wun wukwero winyo lwoŋona; aryeyo ciŋa, ento pe tye ŋat mo ma oketo iye cwinye." 
Proverbs1:25 Wucayo tamma ducu ma amiyo botwu, wun pe wuye ni ayubwu." 
Proverbs1:26 Pi meno ka can opoto i komwu an abinyerowu anyera; abiŋalowu bene aŋala ka gin ma kelo lworo opoto i komwu ma obaŋowu woko. 
Proverbs1:27 I kare ma can man bibaŋowu woko macalo yamo me nam, can ma poto i komwu bene bino macalo yamo lapiru, en aye i kare meno wubibedo ki arem ki cwercwiny madwoŋ." 
Proverbs1:28 I kare meno aye gibicako lwona kwede, ento an pe abigamo doggi; gibiyenya ki cwinygi ducu ento pe gibinona." 
Proverbs1:29 Gukwero ŋec ma miyo gipwormye dok bene pe guye lworo Rwot," 
Proverbs1:30 pien gukwero winyo tamma, dok gucayo yub ma mera pi gin;" 
Proverbs1:31 pi meno gibikoko aŋee pi gin marac ma gutimo dok gibikumo pi timgi maraco," 
Proverbs1:32 Jo ma pe gitye ki ŋec gito pien gukwero yenyo ryeko, ki yomcwiny ma lumiŋ gitye kwede en aye tyekogi," 
Proverbs1:33 Ento ŋat ma biwinyo lokka bibedo ma ocuŋ matek; en bibedo ma pe lworo gin marac, laboŋo par mo.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Latinna, ka ce iketo lokka i cwinyi, ma igwoko bene cikka i tammi," 
Proverbs2:2 kun itero iti ka winyo lok me ryeko, iketo cwinyi bene me niaŋ," 
Proverbs2:3 iyo, kok pi gin ma ineno ki i cwinyi, dok ikok ki dwan maloŋo pi niaŋ." 
Proverbs2:4 Ka ce iyenyo macalo iyenyo lim, kun iyenyo bene macalo it ye ka yenyo lonyo ma gikano;" 
Proverbs2:5 ka itimo meno, ci ibiniaŋ i kit me lworo Rwot dok ibibedo ki ŋec i kom Lubaŋa," 
Proverbs2:6 Rwot aye ma miyo ryeko; ŋec ki niaŋ bene gia hote. 
Proverbs2:7 En kano ryeko maber twatwal pi jo ma cwinygi atir; en kwot ma gwoko jo ma cwinygi leŋ," 
Proverbs2:8 dok gwoko jo ma giŋolo kop atir, gwoko bene jo ma gumiyo kwogi bote." 
Proverbs2:9 Ibiniaŋ gin ma tye atir ki ŋolo kop ma atir, ci ibilubo yo ma tye atir keken;" 
Proverbs2:10 pi meno cwinyi bipoŋ ki ryeko, ki ŋec ma ibilimo bimiyo ibedo ki yomcwiny." 
Proverbs2:11 Tut cwinyi bigwoki, niaŋ maberri bikuri;" 
Proverbs2:12 bilari ki i yo me gin marac, dok bilari ki i ciŋ dano ma gikelo ayelayela, pi lok ma giwaco." 
Proverbs2:13 Gin jo ma gibwoto bedo ki kwo ma tye atir, ma gimito wot i piny macol," 
Proverbs2:14 kun cwinygi yom i timo gin marac dok ginoŋo yomcwinygi i gin marac ma kelo ayelayela: 
Proverbs2:15 gin jo ma yogi ogom, dok kitgi pe atir, gimaro timo gin maraco," 
Proverbs2:16 Bimiyo iloyo tam pa dako ma lakwele, ma noŋo biti ki lok mapwot me ywayo tammi." 
Proverbs2:17 En dako ma bwoto cware ma onyome ka tinone, kun pe gwoko gicikke ma Lubaŋane oketo;" 
Proverbs2:18 ma ka idonyo i ode ilwiny piny i to, yo pa dako-nu teri mere i lobo pa jo muto;" 
Proverbs2:19 pe tye ŋat mo ma donyo bote ma twero noŋo yone me dwogo cen, pe bene gitwero noŋo yo ma tero dano i kwo." 
Proverbs2:20 Myero ilub yo pa jo ma kitgi beco, kun ilubo yo pa jo ma kitgi atir." 
Proverbs2:21 Jo ma cwinygi atir gibibedo i lobo ki jo ma gin lugen ma pe gitye ki bal mo gibibedo iye matwal; 
Proverbs2:22 ento jo maraco gibityekogi woko ki i lobo meno, ki jo ma guŋayo waŋ Rwot pi bal me nek bene gibipujogi macalo giputo doo." 
Proverbs3:1 Latinna, pe myero wii owil i kom pwony ma apwonyi kwede, ento gwok cikka i cwinyi;" 
Proverbs3:2 pwonnya ducu bimiyi iri i lobo pi kare malac, pi mwaka mapol, ki dok bimiyo ibedo ki kuc ki lonyo madwoŋ." 
Proverbs3:3 Pe ibwot ada ki gen ma itye kwede; twegi gubed i ŋuti, dok icogi i cwinyi macalo icoyo i kom got." 
Proverbs3:4 Kit meno ibinoŋo gum ki kit maber i waŋ Lubaŋa kacel ki i waŋ dano. 
Proverbs3:5 Gen Rwot ki cwinyi ducu, pe ibed ka jeŋŋe i kom niaŋ ma itye kwede." 
Proverbs3:6 I kit kwoni ducu wii myero opo i kom Rwot, ci en bitiro yo ma iwoto iye bedo atir." 
Proverbs3:7 Pe myero ibed ka tamo kekeni ni iryek; lwor Rwot, ci ilokke iwek timo gin marac." 
Proverbs3:8 Meno aye yat ma bicano two ki i komi, dok bimiyo cogoni gibedo matek," 
Proverbs3:9 Wor Rwot ki lonyoni ma itye kwede ducu, dok ityer cam mukwono cek i potoni me wi mwaka;" 
Proverbs3:10 ci deroni bipoŋ ki cam madwoŋ, ki koŋo vino ma ipiko i opoko bityero opoko ci mol woko liweŋ." 
Proverbs3:11 Latinna, pe myero ica juk pa Rwot, myero imak lok ma en yubi kwede macalo lok me poyo wii," 
Proverbs3:12 pien Rwot pwonyo dok yubo ŋat ma en maro, en tye macalo wego ma pwodo latin ma cwinye maro adada." 
Proverbs3:13 Dano ma doŋ onoŋo ryeko tye ki yomcwiny, ki dano ma doŋ olimo niaŋ matut bedo kit meno," 
Proverbs3:14 pien kelo gin maber makato lonyo me ryal, ki magoba me lonyone bene kato me jabu," 
Proverbs3:15 Ryeko ber kato jami me wel-gu, pe tye gin mo ma imito ma gitwero poro kwede." 
Proverbs3:16 Ryeko tye ki kwo ma ri nakanaka i ciŋe tuŋ acuc; lonyo kacel ki deyo gitye i ciŋe tuŋ acam," 
Proverbs3:17 Yone yo ma miyo yomcwiny madwoŋ,’ ka iwoto i yone ducu inoŋo kuc keken," 
Proverbs3:18 Ryeko tye macalo yat me kwo bot, jo ma gumako matek likiŋ; Jo ma gumake matek likiŋ gilwonogi jo ma cwinygi yom." 
Proverbs3:19 Rwot oketo lobo ki ryekone; dok pi ŋecce omiyo en oketo polo i kabedone; 
Proverbs3:20 pii ma tye i te lobo ogunnye pi ŋecce, ki toyo bene oa ki i pol ocwer obino piny i lobo." 
Proverbs3:21 Latinna, gwok ryekoni kacel ki niaŋ matut ma it ye kwede; pe iwek gurweny woko ki i waŋi;" 
Proverbs3:22 gibimiyo ibedo ki kwo i cwinyi, dok gibibedo macalo gin mo ma iruko i nuti me deyo." 
Proverbs3:23 Doŋ ibiwoto i yoni ma cwinyi tek ma pe iparo gin mo, tyeni bene pe bigwamje atata." 
Proverbs3:24 Ka ce ibedo piny, pe ibilworo gin mo liweŋ; ka doŋ ibuto piny, ci ibinino nino mamit atika." 
Proverbs3:25 Pe myero ilwor ka ineno can opoto i kom jo maraco macalo yamo kot, kadi bed ka can opoto i kom jo maraco otyekogi woko liweŋ:" 
Proverbs3:26 pien Rwot aye bibedo ŋat ma igeno; dok en bigwoki, miyo owic pe mako tyeni." 
Proverbs3:27 Pe ikwer tiyo gin maber bot dano ma mito ni ikonye, ma noŋo it ye ki twero me tiyone," 
Proverbs3:28 Pe iwac ki lawoti ni, “Koŋ iciti, ka dok idwog kany aye, abimiyi diki,” ma kun noŋo tye boti en gin ma en mito-ni." 
Proverbs3:29 Pe myero ipir lok me timo gin marac i kom lawoti, ma kun noŋo en bedo ki gen i komi nino ducu," 
Proverbs3:30 Pe myero ipyem ki dano mo laboŋo tyen lok mo, ma kun noŋo en pe otimo gin mo marac i komi." 
Proverbs3:31 Pe iwek nyeko omaki i kom jo ma gin lubwami, dok pe ilub kitgi mo kadi ki acel;" 
Proverbs3:32 pien Rwot dag jo ma gitimo gin marac akaka, ento en tye ki gen i kom jo ma kitgi atir," 
Proverbs3:33 Rwot ceno gaŋi pa jo maraco, ento en miyo gum i kom gaŋi pa jo ma kitgr atir." 
Proverbs3:34 Rwot cayo jo ma luŋala, en nyuto kicane bot jo mawmol." 
Proverbs3:35 Jo ma gin luryeko giketo deyo madit i komgi, ento lumiŋ ginoŋo megi can keken," 
Proverbs4:1 Litino, wuwiny pwony ma wonwu pwonyowu kwede, wuket cwinywu ka winyone, miyo wubibedo ki niaŋ matut." 
Proverbs4:2 Gin ma atye ka pwonyowu kwede en gin maber mada; pe myero wubwoti, ento wiwu opo iye." 
Proverbs4:3 I kare ma onoŋo an pud latin matidi, ma pud abedo latin acel keken bot maa," 
Proverbs4:4 wora obedo ka pwonya, kun wacca ni, “Ket lok ma apwonyi kwede-gu ducu i cwinyi; lub cikka wek ibed kwo." 
Proverbs4:5 Wii pe owil, dok bene pe myero ibwot lok ma apwonyi kwede. Noŋ ryeko kacel ki niaŋ matut." 
Proverbs4:6 Myero imar ryeko, pe ikwer; pien en bigwoki miyo ibedo maber laboŋo ayela mo," 
Proverbs4:7 Kit ma itwero doko ryek kwede ene: Noŋ ryeko, ket cwinyi wek ibed ki cwiny me niaŋ makato jami mukene ducu." 
Proverbs4:8 Mar ryeko, ci en bimiyo idoko dit; ka ce imako maber, ci bimiyi deyo." 
Proverbs4:9 Ryeko bikelo deyo boti, bimiyo dano giwori.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Latin, koŋ iwiny lokka dok iket bene i cwinyi, ci ibiri i lobo pi mwaka mapol." 
Proverbs4:11 Doŋ atyeko pwonyi ki yo me ryeko, atyeko nyuto boti bene kit yo me bedo ki kwo ma tye atir." 
Proverbs4:12 Gin mo pe ma birine i nyimi ka ce it ye ka wot ki ryeko; ka ibinwec, ci pe ibitwomme atata." 
Proverbs4:13 Mak pwony ma gimiyoni-ni matek, pe iwek obwoti; gwok maber, pien meno aye kwoni." 
Proverbs4:14 Pe ilub yo pa jo maraco, pe ilub kit kwo pa jo ma gin lutim maraco." 
Proverbs4:15 Gwokke, pe iwot ki i yogi; lokke iwek timo gin marac, ci iwot meri anyim." 
Proverbs4:16 Jo maraco pe gitwero nino ka peya gutimo tim marac; dok pe gitwero nino ka ce peya gumiyo dano mo opoto i can. 
Proverbs4:17 Timo tim maraco odoko calo cam ki botgi ki timo bwami bene odoko calo koŋo vino ma gimato-ni. 
Proverbs4:18 Ento yo pa jo ma kitgi atir calo dero me rupiny, ma ryeny nio waŋ ma piny doŋ leŋ." 
Proverbs4:19 Yo pa jo maraco col calo dyewor; ka gupoto bene ci pe giniaŋ gin ma noŋo oyokogi. 
Proverbs4:20 Latinna, ket cwinyi i lokka; winy gin ma an awaco," 
Proverbs4:21 Pe myero iwek orweny woko ki boti; myero igwok i cwinyi. 
Proverbs4:22 Lok magi gimiyo kwo bot ŋat ma owinyogi, dok caŋo two ma i kome woko ducu." 
Proverbs4:23 Gwokke i kom tam ma itamo ki i cwinyi ducu; pien kwoni ducu a ki i lok ma icwinyi. 
Proverbs4:24 Pe myero ibed ka loko lok mugom, wek loko lok goba bene obedi." 
Proverbs4:25 Myero inen anyim atir, dok icik waŋi me neno jami ducu ma tye anyim." 
Proverbs4:26 Myero iŋi gin ma ilubo, ci bimiyo gin ma itiyo ducu bedo atir." 
Proverbs4:27 Pe iŋak idok tuŋ acuc nyo tuŋ acam; lokke, pe imar timo gin marac." 
Proverbs5:1 Latinna, ket cwinyi ka winyo lok me ryekona, cik iti bene ka winyo kit ma niaŋŋa tye kwede;" 
Proverbs5:2 miyo ibiŋeyo kit kwo ma mitte, dok lok ducu ma ibiloko binyuto ada ni, kara it ye ki ŋec," 
Proverbs5:3 Dako ma lakwele mere kite enu, lok doge lim calo kic, noŋo lokke bene pwot kato moo woko;" 
Proverbs5:4 ento i agikkine inoŋo doko kec macalo yat roka, ma noŋo bit ryoryo calo pala lucwan." 
Proverbs5:5 Dako-nu biteri wa i lyel; yo ma en woto ki iye cito i to keken. 
Proverbs5:6 En pe tye ka lubo yo ma tero dano ikwo; tye ka cabbe atata kwone kun en bene pe ŋeyo. 
Proverbs5:7 Litino, kombeddi doŋ wuwiny lokka; pe myero wuweki, dok wiwu pe owil i lok ma awaco," 
Proverbs5:8 Pe icit bot dako ma lakwele-ni, pe icit cok ki doggolane." 
Proverbs5:9 Ka itimo kumeno, ci woro ma yam gimiyo boti bidoko pa jo mukene, dok jo ma pe gin lukica gibineki woko ma noŋo mwaka me toni peya oromo." 
Proverbs5:10 Ji ata gibiyako lonyoni woko ducu, gin ma ibedo ka tic pire matek larok bitero woko ducu;" 
Proverbs5:11 meno bimiyo icur i kare ma noŋo doŋ icok to, ma noŋo riŋo komi kacel ki cogoni gibijuŋŋe woko." 
Proverbs5:12 Doŋ ibiwacci, “Piŋo akwero winyo lok me pwony, dok abedo ka cayo lok me juk ki i cwinya?" 
Proverbs5:13 Pe abedo ka winyo lok ma lupwonnya gubedo ka pwonya kwede, ada pe awinyo lokgi." 
Proverbs5:14 Cutcut anoŋo ni nyiŋa doŋ oballe woko, dok lwak ma gucokke ducu gicayo an acaya.”" 
Proverbs5:15 Mat pii ma a ki i taŋi meri kikomi, ki pii ma mol bene ma a ki i waŋ it meri kikome." 
Proverbs5:16 Pe myero iwek pii ma tye i waŋ it meri ducu omol oket woko ata, ma piine mol poŋ wa i yo-gu ducu." 
Proverbs5:17 Wek piine obed meri keken me konyi, ento pe obed me konyo ji ata." 
Proverbs5:18 Gum obed i kom dakoni ma inyomo ka tinoni ma en waŋ it meri, dok cwinyi myero obed yom i kome," 
Proverbs5:19 en dako ma nen mwonya mada, ma yomo cwinyi atika, Nen berre wek oyomcwinyi i kare ducu, kare ducu wek mar mere olo kwoni." 
Proverbs5:20 Latinna, piŋo imiyo gibwoli kun imaro dako ma malaya? Piŋo ikwako kor dako ma lakwele?" 
Proverbs5:21 Rwot ŋeyo kit kwo pa dano acel acel, dok neno ka ma en cito iye ducu." 
Proverbs5:22 Bal pa ŋat marac tye macalo owic ma mako tyene, bal ma en timo-ni aye mako en," 
Proverbs5:23 En to pien pe twero jukke kene, doŋ en rwenyo woko ki miŋo madit ma en tye kwede." 
Proverbs6:1 Latinna, ka in iye me cuŋ pi lawoti, dok ijeno jamini pi dano mo ata," 
Proverbs6:2 lokki ma iloko odoko owic piri, pien noŋo gimako lok ki i dogi." 
Proverbs6:3 Pi meno, latinna, tim kuman, ci ibilaro kwoni, pien kombeddi doŋ ipoto i ciŋ lawoti; cit oyotoyot ibak dogi bote." 
Proverbs6:4 Pe myero iniŋ, pe myero waŋi omak nino ma miyi yweyo matek;" 
Proverbs6:5 lar komi macalo til ma riŋo laro kome ki bot ladwar, macalo winyo ma tuk woko ki i owic pa ladwar," 
Proverbs6:6 In lawackom, nen kit ma ŋiniŋini tiyo kwede; mito koŋ ibed ki ryeko me neno kite." 
Proverbs6:7 Pe gitye ki rwot mo, kadi ladit nyo laloc mo;" 
Proverbs6:8 giyubo cam me akana i kare me oro, dok gicoko wit cam mapatpat i kare me kac." 
Proverbs6:9 In lawackom mono, ibibedo ka buto abuta pi kare ma Tom mene? Ibico awene ki i waŋ nino?" 
Proverbs6:10 Ka ibuto inino manok, dok idolo ciŋi woko omiyi yweyo," 
Proverbs6:11 man bimiyo can maki kit macalo layak mako kwede dano, ma noŋo orukke woko ki jami lweny." 
Proverbs6:12 Dano marac, ma konnye pe, woto mere atata ki lok me bwola keken," 
Proverbs6:13 kun gayo dano ki waŋe, dok gwelo ki tyene, ka doŋ cimo piny atata ki lwete," 
Proverbs6:14 ma noŋo en tye ki cwiny muŋak mupoŋ ki tam maraco keken, dok miyo en tubo dano teretere." 
Proverbs6:15 Pi meno can bipoto i kome atura; pi kare manok keken ret bimake ma pe doŋ bicaŋ. 
Proverbs6:16 Rwot dag jami ma romo abicel, tye jami abiro kulu ma gin ducu gin me kwer ki tuŋ bote:" 
Proverbs6:17 en dag dano ma tamo ni eryek pire kene, ma loko lok goba, en bene dag jo ma gioyo remo pa jo ma pe ki bal." 
Proverbs6:18 Rwot dag dano ma cwinye opoŋ ki yub me timo gin marac, ki jo ma giriŋo oyotoyot ka tiyo gin marac," 
Proverbs6:19 en dag bene caden ma loko lok goba, ki ŋat ma tubo omegine." 
Proverbs6:20 Latinna, myero ilub gin ma woru otito boti, dok pe ibwot pwony pa menni." 
Proverbs6:21 Ket lok magi ducu i cwinyi kare ducu; gwok lok magi macalo igwoko gin mo ma itweyo i ŋuti. 
Proverbs6:22 Lok magi gibiteli i wotti; kadi ka ibuto piny bene gibikuri i kom gin marac; dok ka ico ki i waŋ nino gibipwonyi kit ma myero ibed kwede. 
Proverbs6:23 Cik tye macalo tara, ki pwony bene tye macalo ceŋ ma ryeny, doŋ pwony me yubo kit pa dano en aye yo me kwo," 
Proverbs6:24 Lok magi gibimiyo igwokke ma pe ibedo ki dako ma kite rac, man bimiyo iloyo tam pa dako ma lakwele." 
Proverbs6:25 Pe myero cwinyi opar pi berre-ni, dok pe iwek waŋe ma en neni kwede oywa tammi." 
Proverbs6:26 Laco mo keken twero wilo dako ma lakwele ki mugati acel ci bedo kwede, ento tim me abor twero balo kwo pa laco ma bedo ki dako pa ŋat mukene." 
Proverbs6:27 Dano twero kwanyo mac keto i kore, ci mac pe waŋo boŋone woko?" 
Proverbs6:28 Aŋa ma twero wot i lodi mac ma tyene pe biwaŋ woko? 
Proverbs6:29 ŋat ma cito bedo ki dako pa lawote bene limo-can kit meno; pe tye ŋat mo ma bwot ma pe giketo can i kome, ka obedo ki dako pa lawote." 
Proverbs6:30 Dano pe gicayo lakwo ka okwalo cam ma noŋo kec neke kun mito eyeŋ? 
Proverbs6:31 ka ce gimako en lakwo-nu, en biculo cul ma romo wan abiro kulu; dok bimiyo jami ma i ode woko ducu pi cul." 
Proverbs6:32 Dano ma timo abor noŋo pe ryek; ŋat ma tiyo gin macalo meno kelo can i kome kene," 
Proverbs6:33 Dano gibiketo ret i kome dok gibicaye, dok cwercwiny me can ma en bilimo pe biwany ki i cwinye." 
Proverbs6:34 Dano ma tye ki nyeko bedo ki kiniga madwoŋ, ma ka oero lweny ci neko dano cut, noŋo pe ye juk." 
Proverbs6:35 En pe biye kit cul mo kadi ki acel, dok kadi gimiye lwak mot mapol, magi ducu pe twero juko kinigane." 
Proverbs7:1 Latinna, mak lokka, dok ikan gin ma an aciki kwede ducu macalo lonyo madit." 
Proverbs7:2 Lub cikka wek ibed kwo, gwok lok ma apwonyi kwede kit macalo igwoko kwede waŋi," 
Proverbs7:3 Gwokgi maber kare ducu, cogi woko ducu i cwinyi." 
Proverbs7:4 Myero iwac ki ryeko ni, “In lamera”, ki niaŋ matut bene myero ilwoŋ ni laremi ma imaro adada." 
Proverbs7:5 Man bigwoki me bedo ki tam i kom dako ma lakwele, man bimiyo iloyo tam pa dako ma lalak ata, kadi bed noŋ loko lok mamit calo gin aŋo." 
Proverbs7:6 I kare ma ayabo waŋ dirica me oda, ci aneno piny wa ki i waŋ dirica me kicikana." 
Proverbs7:7 Aneno lwak jo matino ma pe gitye ki ŋec mo wacel; aneno i kin jo magi matino, awobi mo ma lamiŋ atika." 
Proverbs7:8 En obedo ka wot ki i yo kun kato ki i twok ot pa dako ma lakwele, kun lubo yo ma cito i ot pa dako meno," 
Proverbs7:9 wi otyeno, ma piny aŋa kato-ni, i dyewor ma onoŋo piny doŋ col." 
Proverbs7:10 Nen, dako mo orwatte kwede, ma orukke calo lakwele kikome ma cwinye opoŋ ki lok me bwola." 
Proverbs7:11 En dano ma lewic pe make, lawot ata, kome pe ye bedo gaŋ kacel;" 
Proverbs7:12 ka pud ineno tye ka wot i gudo koni dok ineno noŋo opille wa i cuk, i twok yo ducu buto kuro piny." 
Proverbs7:13 Ka oneno laco ci mwomme mako woko likiŋ, noto leme, kun nenowaŋe atir laboŋo lewic mo, ka wacce ni," 
Proverbs7:14 “Atyeko tyero gitum tin, dok tin acobo kwoŋŋa;" 
Proverbs7:15 kombeddi an abino ka rwatte kwedi, ayenyi ki cwinya ducu, ci doŋ anoŋi." 
Proverbs7:16 Atyeko peto cuka i wi kitandana, boŋo cuka ma raŋigi patpat ma gikelogi ki i Ejipt;" 
Proverbs7:17 dok atyeko kiro moo murra I kom kitandana, akiro bene moo ma ŋwece kur ki cinamon mamit." 
Proverbs7:18 Bin, wek wabed kacel nio odiko ki mar keken; wek wabed ki yomcwiny pi mar ma watye kwede." 
Proverbs7:19 Cwara tin pe paco; ocito woko welo i wot mabor. 
Proverbs7:20 Omako lim ki kicaane ducu ocito kwede; en bidwogo paco kany ka dwe ogudo got.” 
Proverbs7:21 Dako-nu obedo ka bito nyer-ri ki lwak lok gobagoba mapol ata; olo twal odiyo laco meno ki lokke mapwot-ti. 
Proverbs7:22 Cutcut nyer-ri otuggi lubo kor dako-nu, calo twon ma gipeyo gitero ka nekone," 
Proverbs7:23 nyo macalo til ma omoko i owic, nio ka atero ocelo cin iye otuco woko pil. Bedo calo winyo ma riŋo laro i owic; en pe ŋeyo ni tim macalo meno bimiyo erwenyo kwone kulu." 
Proverbs7:24 Kombeddi wun litino, wuwiny lokka, wucik itwu maber ka winyo lok ducu ma katti ki i doga." 
Proverbs7:25 Pe myero iwek cwinyi obiti me lubo kit kwo pa dako-nu, pe iŋak ilub kore" 
Proverbs7:26 Dako-nu oneko lwak co mapol ata; ada, jo ma en onekogi welgi pe kwanne." 
Proverbs7:27 Ode ma en bedo iye-ni meno mere lyel, meno aye yo ma tero dano i to." 
Proverbs8:1 Pe wutye ka winyo ka ryeko daŋŋe matek, ki niaŋ matut bene mito ni giwiny dwane?" 
Proverbs8:2 I wi cere ducu ma i ŋet yo noŋo en ocuŋ i aŋakaŋaka yo-gu ducu. 
Proverbs8:3 I dogcel ma gidonyo kwede i gaŋ, en tye ka daŋŋe ki i dog gaŋ matek twatwal ni," 
Proverbs8:4 “Wuwiny, atye ka lwoŋo wun co, lwoŋona-ni tye pi dano ducu." 
Proverbs8:5 Wun jo ma pe ryek, wudok calo jo ma doŋ guteggi; wun lumiŋ bene wuket cwinywu me winyo lok man." 
Proverbs8:6 Wuwiny, pien gin ma abetito-ni obedo lok mabeco, dok lok ducu ma abiloko bibedo lok atir;" 
Proverbs8:7 pien abiloko ada keken; gin marac pe bikatti ki i doga, pien bedo me kwer ki tuŋ bota." 
Proverbs8:8 Lok ducu ma awaco tye atir; pe tye gin mo ma gidwalo tere nyo mugom i lokka. 
Proverbs8:9 Lokka ducu tye atir bot ŋat ma twero niaŋ, dok winnye maber bot jo ma gitye ki ŋec muromo." 
Proverbs8:10 Wumak pwony ma apwonyowu kwede ma ka kwanyo lim, dok wugam ŋec ma ka kwanyo lonyo." 
Proverbs8:11 Ryeko ber makato jami me wel-gu, kadi ki jami mukene ducu ma cwinywu malo pe giromo poro kwede," 
Proverbs8:12 An ryeko, atye ki tam matut, dok alimo ŋec ki tam maber me moko loko" 
Proverbs8:13 Gat ma lworo Lubaŋa pe tiyo gin marac. Wakke ki nyatte ki yo me tiyo gin marac ki lok ducu ma gidwalo tere ma pe tye atir ducu cwinya dagi. 
Proverbs8:14 Atye ki twero me miyo tam ki me keto yub ducu i tic, atye ki niaŋ matut dok atek." 
Proverbs8:15 Luker ducu giloyo loc pi twerona, dok pira miyo luloc giketo cik ma tye atir." 
Proverbs8:16 Rwodi ma giloyo lobo giloyo pi kony mera, ki ludito ducu ma giloyo lobo bene kit meno." 
Proverbs8:17 An amaro jo ma gimara, jo ma gibedo ka yenyo an ki cwinygi ducu bene gibinoŋa." 
Proverbs8:18 At ye ki lonyo kacel ki deyo, ki lonyo ma ri, ki kwo maber, ma abimiyo botgi." 
Proverbs8:19 Gin ma amiyo botwu ber kato jabu, kato kadi wa jabu maberre, dok gin ma wulimo ki bota kato ryal ma giliyo maber." 
Proverbs8:20 Alubo kit ma tye atir, eh aye yo me ŋolo kop kakare;" 
Proverbs8:21 abimiyo lonyo bot jo ma gimara, dok abipoŋo odi me kano limgi ki lim madwoŋ." 
Proverbs8:22 “Rwot oketo an ryeko macalo acakki ticce, man aye obedo ticce ma en otiyo i kare macon twatwal." 
Proverbs8:23 I kare meno macon giketo an kena, i acakki piny kikome ma peya giketo lobo." 
Proverbs8:24 Ginywala ma onoŋo nam maditogu bene pud gipe, dok waŋ it-gu bene onoŋo piine pud pe gunnye ma katti woko." 
Proverbs8:25 Ginywala ma onoŋo godi ducu pud pe ginen, ki cere-gu bene onoŋo pud gipe;" 
Proverbs8:26 ma pud peya Lubaŋa oketo lobo ki, potti ducu ma tye iye, kadi ki apwa me ŋom ma okwoŋo nen," 
Proverbs8:27 I kare ma en oketo polo onoŋo an doŋ atye, i kare ma Rwot oketo agikki obedo tye i dye nam madoŋo-gu," 
Proverbs8:28 i kare ma en omiyo polo ocuŋ i kabedone malo, ka dok omiyo waŋ pii me nam madono-gu gucako gunnye." 
Proverbs8:29 I kare ma en oketo kama nam myero ogik iye, wek pii pe omol oket woko ata miyo balo gin ma en eloko, i kare ma en oketo guti me te lobo ducu," 
Proverbs8:30 an onoŋo atye, abedo ka ŋete macalo ladiro tic. Dok cwinye obedo yom kare ducu pi an, an abedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ mada i nyime;" 
Proverbs8:31 ma cwinya okwe pi bedo i lobo ma en oketo-ni, dok cwinya obedo yom i kom litino pa dano." 
Proverbs8:32 Litinona, kombeddi wuwiny lokka: jo ma gitiyo gin ma awaco botgi aye gibedo ki yomcwiny," 
Proverbs8:33 Wuwiny pwonnya dok wubed maryek, pe myero wubwot pwonnye ata." 
Proverbs8:34 Dano ma winyo lokka bedo ki yomcwiny, en dano ma bedo i dog gaŋŋa nino ducu, ma kura i doggolana." 
Proverbs8:35 Ŋat munoŋo an meno onoŋo kwo, ci Rwot bibedo ki yomcwiny i kome;" 
Proverbs8:36 ento ŋat ma pe onoŋo an biketo ret i kome kekene; ki jo ducu ma gidaga noŋo gimaro to.” 
Proverbs9:1 Ryeko otyeko gero ode, ocibo iye wir ma romo abiro." 
Proverbs9:2 En oneko lee pi karama me donyo iye, oonyo koŋo vinone, dok oyubo jami ducu oketo i wi meja." 
Proverbs9:3 Doŋ ocwalo aŋecane ma gucito ka lwoŋo dano ki i kabedo ma tye malo twatwal ma i gaŋ madit, kun giwacci," 
Proverbs9:4 “Wubin kany, wun lumiŋ!” Bot ŋat ma wiye odiŋ en wacci," 
Proverbs9:5 “Bin icam kwonna, dok imat koŋo vino ma aonyo-ni." 
Proverbs9:6 Wek miŋ obedi, ci ibibedo kwo, dok bene ibibedo ki niaŋ matut.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Dano ma mito ni ejuk laŋala, laŋala nywaro woko anywara, ki ŋat ma mito ni ejuk latim marac, ci latim marac dok keto ret i kome." 
Proverbs9:8 Pe myero ijuk ŋat ma laŋala, pien miyo bikweri woko; juk dano maryek, ci bimari." 
Proverbs9:9 Pwony dano maryek, ci ryekone bimedde ameda; pwony dano ma kite tye atir ci en bimedde ameda ki pwony meno." 
Proverbs9:10 Ka dano lworo Rwot, ci cako noŋo ryeko; dano ma ŋeyo Ŋat Maleŋ bibedo ki niaŋ matut." 
Proverbs9:11 Ryeko bimiyo nino me kwoni nya doko mapol; dok bimedo mwaka me kwoni, miyo iri i lobo." 
Proverbs9:12 Ka ce iryek, ci in kikomi aye ma ibinoŋo berre; ento ka ibedo laŋala, ci meno bene biketo peko i komi keni." 
Proverbs9:13 Dako ma lamiŋ nino ducu wo twatwal; dok en ŋat ma waŋe tar ma pe lewic mako. 
Proverbs9:14 En bedo i doggolane, nyo i kabedo ma malo ma tye i gaŋ madit," 
Proverbs9:15 ci cako lwoŋo jo ducu ma gikato ki kenyo, ma noŋo gitye ka wot me cito anyim i yo wotgi, ni," 
Proverbs9:16 “Ŋat ma lamiŋ myero olokke obin kany!” Bot ŋat ma wiye odiŋ en waco ni," 
Proverbs9:17 “Pii akwala lim matek, ki kwon ma icamo i muŋ bene yomo cwinyi mada.”" 
Proverbs9:18 Ento laco meno pe ŋeyo ni jo ducu ma gicito bot dako-nu gito woko, jo ma gucito bot dako-nu ducu guto giyikogi i lyel." 
Proverbs10:1 Carolok pa Solomon. Latin laco ma ryek yomo cwiny wonne, ento latin laco ma miŋ cwero cwiny minne matek." 
Proverbs10:2 Lonyo ma inoŋo ki tim maraco pe konyi, ento bedo ki kit atir twero lari ki i to." 
Proverbs10:3 Rwot pe weko kec neko dano ma kite atir, en kwero dano marac, pe noŋo gin ma iye mito." 
Proverbs10:4 Ka in lawackom ci ibedo meri lacan, ento ka itiyo tic matek ci itwero lony." 
Proverbs10:5 Latin ma ryek coko cam woko ki i poto ka ocek, ento latin ma nino mere-anina i kare me kac kelo lewic i wiye kene." 
Proverbs10:6 Rwot miyo gum i kom dano ma kite atir, dano marac muŋo tim bwamine woko.," 
Proverbs10:7 Dano ma kite atir gipo pire pien en lakel gum, ento dano marac nyiŋe biballe woko, wi dano biwil woko i kome matwal." 
Proverbs10:8 Ŋat ma laryeko i cwinye twero lubo cik, ento dano ma lamiŋ ma loko lok me miŋmiŋ agikkine en aye can keken." 
Proverbs10:9 Dano ma cwinye leŋ bedo laboŋo lworo mo, ento dano ma loko kite atata biŋene woko." 
Proverbs10:10 Dano ma bedo ka miyo waŋe kun umo bal kelo ayela, ento ŋat ma juko dano atir kelo kuc." 
Proverbs10:11 Lok ma jo ma kitgi atir giloko en aye waŋ it me kwo, ento dano marac loko lok kun noŋo omuŋo tim bwamine woko." 
Proverbs10:12 Adagadaga nyayo lweny ki mone, ento bedo ki mar umo bal ducu." 
Proverbs10:13 Ŋat ma nino ducu tye ki niaŋ matut loko lok ki ryeko; ento dano ma wiye odiŋ mere ka oloko lok mo, gigoyo ogoya." 
Proverbs10:14 Jo ma luryeko gilimo ŋec ducu macalo gitwero, ento lamiŋ mere ka loko lokke lwoŋo can me nyiko cok bote." 
Proverbs10:15 Lonyo bedo calo gaŋ matek bot lulonyo, ento lucan can nekogi aneka." 
Proverbs10:16 Bakacic pa dano ma kite atir en aye kwo, ento magoba ma dano marac noŋo en aye medde ameda ki timo bal." 
Proverbs10:17 Dano ma winyo pwony tye ka lubo yo ma tere i kwo, ento dano ma dag juk ŋak mere ki yone pat." 
Proverbs10:18 Dano ma tye ki adagadaga nino ducu loko lok goba keken, ŋat ma loko lok me kwoto luwote noŋo en lamiŋ." 
Proverbs10:19 Ka dano mo bedo ka loko lok madwoŋ, ci twero timo bal i lok madwoŋ ma en loko-ni; dano ma ryek gire liŋ aliŋa." 
Proverbs10:20 Ŋat ma kite atir lokke bene leŋ calo ryal ma giliyo maber: ento tam pa dano marac konnye nok twatwal,." 
Proverbs10:21 Dano ma ki te atir pwonyo jo mapol ki lokke ma en loko, ento lumiŋ gito atoya pi diŋ wigi." 
Proverbs10:22 Ka Rwot omiyo gum, dano doko lalonyo; Rwot pe medo cwercwiny i kom gin ma en omiyo." 
Proverbs10:23 Tiyo gin marac obedo calo tuko ki bot lamiŋ, ento dano ma, tye ki niaŋ matut noŋo yomcwiny i ryeko ma en tye kwede." 
Proverbs10:24 Gin ma dano marac lworo mada bipoto i kome, ento dano ma kite atir gibicobo mitine." 
Proverbs10:25 Ka ce yamo mager okodo okato, ci tero wa ki dano marac-ci woko, ento ŋat ma kite atir moko bedo mere matwal." 
Proverbs10:26 Pe myero icwal dano ma lawackom ni oti tic mo piri; pien tye calo koŋo vino mawac, dok calo yito ma duny donyo i waŋi," 
Proverbs10:27 Lwor Rwot ci ibiri wi lobo pi mwaka mapol, ento dano marac mwakane me bedo i lobo bibedo manok." 
Proverbs10:28 Gen pa dano ma kite atir kelo bote yomcwiny, ento gen pa dano marac lal woko ata," 
Proverbs10:29 Rwot tye macalo cel gogo matek pa ŋat ma yo me kwone tye atir, ento jo ma gin lutim maraco en bityekogi woko liweŋ," 
Proverbs10:30 Pe tye ŋat mo ma bireto dano ma kite atir; dano marac aye pe bibedo i lobo. 
Proverbs10:31 Ŋat ma kite atir loko lok ki ryeko, ento ŋat ma loko lok munak me gobagoba Gibiŋolo lebe woko." 
Proverbs10:32 Ŋat ma kite atir loko lok mabeco ma dano pwoyo bene, kun dano marac noŋo loko mere lok munak ma rwenyo dano arwenya." 
Proverbs11:1 Rwot dag jo ma gipimo jami ki mijan ma pe pimo kakare, cwinye yom i kom jo ma gitye ki mijan ma pimo jami kakare." 
Proverbs11:2 Jo ma wakke gibibedo ki cwerwiny; ento jo mamwol gibibedo ki rveko. 
Proverbs11:3 Jo ma cwinygi atir leŋcwanygi telogi, ento jo ma gin lubal ma kitgi raco gito gitum woko." 
Proverbs11:4 I kare me akemo pa Rwot, lonyo doko gin ma konnye pe, bedo ki kit atir aye twero laro dano ki i to." 
Proverbs11:5 Dano ma pe ki bal mo, ma kite atir, woto i yo mapwot, ento ŋat marac poto pi racce." 
Proverbs11:6 Kit ma atir pa jo ma cwinygi tye atir twero larogi, ento lubal gilokke gidoko opii me bal ma gitimo pi tamgi maraco." 
Proverbs11:7 Ka dano marac oto, ci genne bene tum woko cut, ki gen pa dano ma pe ŋeyo Lubaŋa bene gik woko." 
Proverbs11:8 Dano ma kite atir gilaro ki i ayelayela, ma noŋo dano marac poto i can ma ka eno" 
Proverbs11:9 Jo ma pe gilworo Lubaŋa gibalo luwotgi ki lok doggi, ento jo ma kitgi atir gibwot pi ŋecgi," 
Proverbs11:10 Jo ma i gaŋ ducu gibedo ki yomcwiny, ka dano ma kite atir olimo gum odoko lalonyo; ka inen jo maraco aye guto, jo ma i gaŋ ducu giwo ki twon yomcwiny mo ma pe twerre." 
Proverbs11:11 Gum ma jo ma kitgi atir gilimo miyo gaŋ doko dit, kun jo maraco gibalo megi gaŋ abala ki lok ma giloko," 
Proverbs11:12 Dano ma wiye odiŋ cayo lawote acaya, ento dano ma tye ki, niaŋ matut liŋ mere aliŋa mot." 
Proverbs11:13 Ŋat ma woto ki lok me kwot i kin gaŋ tuco muŋ woko, ŋat ma lagen i cwinye kene aye kano lok me muŋ." 
Proverbs11:14 Ka ce ineno rok mo pe tye ki dano mo ma telogi maber, ci rok meno poto woko; bedo ki jo mapol ma gin lumi-tam kelo kuc ki bedo maber." 
Proverbs11:15 Ŋat ma cikke me culo banya pa dano mo ata bikoko aŋee, ŋat ma kwero cuŋ pi cul macalo meno bedo mere mot ki kuc laboŋo lworo mo." 
Proverbs11:16 Dako maber ma lakica dano giworo, jo ma kitgi pe atir ginoŋo lim ci gidoko lulonyo oyotoyot." 
Proverbs11:17 Dano ma lakica limo kony pire kene, ento dano mager keto ret i kome kene." 
Proverbs11:18 Dano marac noŋo mucara me bwolo, ma noŋo dano ma kite atir limo mere bakacic me ada." 
Proverbs11:19 Ŋat ma omoko likiŋ i bedo ki kit atir bibedo kwo, ento ŋat ma medde ki tiyo gin marac bito." 
Proverbs11:20 Rwot dag jo ma tamgi oŋak, cwinye yom i kom jo ma gipe ki bal mo." 
Proverbs11:21 Myero wuniaŋ ni, dano ma latim marac gibimiye can, kono jo ma kitgi atir keken aye gibilarogi." 
Proverbs11:22 Dako ma nen mwonya maber, ka ce pe romo poko kin gin maber ki marac, noŋo rom ki agit jabu ma girwako i um opego." 
Proverbs11:23 Jo ma kitgi atir gimito megi jami maber keken; tam pa ŋat marac tum mere i akemo. 
Proverbs11:24 Jo mogo ma gimiyo limgi kit ma cwinygi opwoyo, gilony gimedde ameda; jo mukene gikano limgi akana ma pe gimito miyone, ci gidoko lucan marac." 
Proverbs11:25 Dano ma cwinye yom i miyo mot gimedo lonyo madwoŋ bote, Ŋat ma konyo jo mukene en bene gibikonye." 
Proverbs11:26 Dano giceno ŋat ma kano kai woko ma kun noŋo gimito, ento gilamo gum i kom ŋat ma cato bel botgi." 
Proverbs11:27 Ŋat ma tamme tye me noŋo gin maber, dano gipwoye; ento ŋat ma yenyo gin marac, noŋo bene gin marac cut," 
Proverbs11:28 Ŋat ma geno lonyone, bipoto; dano ma kite atir bedo mere ki kwo maber macalo yat ma pote dyak." 
Proverbs11:29 Ŋat ma kelo ayela i kom jo ma i ode pe binoŋo gin mo matwal, ki ŋat ma lamiŋ bibedo latic pa dano maryek," 
Proverbs11:30 Ŋat ma kite atir limo kwo macalo adwoggi me bedone atir, doŋ bedo laboŋo lubo cik rwenyo kwo pa dano arwenya." 
Proverbs11:31 Ka ce dano ma kite atir gitwero miye bakacic i kare ma noŋo en pud tye i lobo kany, doŋ jo maraco kacel ki jo ma gin lubalo kono gibinoŋo can ma rom mene?" 
Proverbs12:1 Dano ma ye pwony noŋo maro ni ebed ki ŋec mo, ŋat ma kwero pwony noŋo miŋ." 
Proverbs12:2 Rwot bedo ki yomcwiny i kom dano ma kite ber, en ŋolo kop loyo latim marac." 
Proverbs12:3 Dano pe cuŋ matek pi timo gin marac, ento dano ma tiyo gin ma atir bedo calo lwit yat mudonyo matut i ŋom ma ŋat mo pe roma putone." 
Proverbs12:4 Dako makwiri ma kite ber miyo dano keto deyo i kom cware, dako ma kela lewic bedo calo bur adola mudet i tyen cware ma ogudo cogo." 
Proverbs12:5 Tam pa ŋat ma kite atir tye kakare ma rwatte ki cik; lok ma jo maraco giyubo bwolo dano abwola. 
Proverbs12:6 Lok ma dano marac loko nyayo to, ento lok pa ŋat ma cwinye atir laro dano." 
Proverbs12:7 Jo maraco gityekogi woko ducu pe mo doŋ, kun jo me doggola pa dano ma kite atir biri nakanaka." 
Proverbs12:8 Dano maryek ma tye ki ŋec jo gipwoyo, ento gicayo ŋat ma tamme oŋak," 
Proverbs12:9 Dano ma bedo ki mwolo ma tiyo tic wek enoŋ jami me gwoko kwone, ber kato ŋat ma poro bedo dano madit ma noŋo pe tye ki cam." 
Proverbs12:10 Dano ma kite atir gwoko lee ma tye i pacone maber, ma noŋo jo maraco gigerre agera i kom leegi laboŋo kica mo," 
Proverbs12:11 Ŋat ma lapur matek twero limo cam mabup; ŋat ma balo karene i timo tim ma konnye pe, noŋo en ŋat ma ryekone pe." 
Proverbs12:12 Cel gogo pa jo maraco bipoto woko piny, ento jo ma kitgi atir gicuŋ gigi matek likiŋ." 
Proverbs12:13 Dano ma latim marac gimake ki lok me bal ma en loko, ŋat ma kite atir bwot ki i ayela ducu ma opoto i kome." 
Proverbs12:14 Dano twero yeŋ ki jami mabeco ma en limo pi lok ma en loko, dok tic ma dano tiyo kelle bakacic bene." 
Proverbs12:15 Dano ma lamiŋ tamo ni gin ma en etiyo ducu tye atir, kun dano ma ryek winyo mere tam ma gimiye." 
Proverbs12:16 Ka kiniga omako lamiŋ giŋeyo woko cut, ento dano maryek pe paro yet ma giyete kwede." 
Proverbs12:17 Ŋat ma lagen tito lok me caden ma tye ada, caden ma lagoba tito mere lok goba me bwola keken." 
Proverbs12:18 Lok pa ŋat ma pe ki tam winnye malit macalo pala lucwan ka ocobo dano, ento lok ma a ki i leb ŋat maryek twero caŋo dano." 
Proverbs12:19 Lok goba ri pi kare manok keken, ento lok ada bedo matwal." 
Proverbs12:20 Jo ma giyubo lok me tiyo gin marac aye gikano lok me bwola i cwinygi, kun noŋo jo ma gitamo me tiyo gin maber gibedo ki yomcwiny." 
Proverbs12:21 Pe tye gin mo marac ma twero poto i kom ŋat ma kite atir; dano marac nino ducu noŋo mere ayelayela keken. 
Proverbs12:22 Rwot dag jo ma giloko lok goba, ento cwinye bedo yom i kom jo ma gitiyo ki gen." 
Proverbs12:23 Dano ma tye ki niaŋ matut liŋ gire mot kadi en ŋeyo gin mo-ni, jo ma gin lumiŋ ginyuto kwiya pinygi ka maleŋ bot dano." 
Proverbs12:24 Dano ma omiyo kwone me tiyo tic matek bedo ki twero me loyo luwote, ento ŋat ma lawackom gibikete ka tiyo tic muroni mapek," 
Proverbs12:25 Par mapol geŋo dano me bedo ki yomcwiny, lok maber me kica aye romo kweyo cwinye," 
Proverbs12:26 Dano ma kite atir ŋiyo kwone, miyo pe tiyo gin marac, kun jo maraco noŋo kitgi-nu ŋakogi girweny arwenya." 
Proverbs12:27 Dano ma kome wac pe mako lee mo, ento dano ma tiyo tic matek twero bedo ki lonyo mabup," 
Proverbs12:28 Bedo ki kit ma atir tero dano i kwo, ento lubo yo me bal tero mere dano i to." 
Proverbs13:1 Latin maryek winyo pwony ki juk pa wonne, ento latin ma Laŋala pe winyo lok ma gijuke kwede." 
Proverbs13:2 Jo ma kitgi beco gibilimo bakacic pi lok mabeco ma noŋo giwaco; miti pa jo ma lubal tye mere me timo tim bwami keken. 
Proverbs13:3 Ŋat ma gwekke i lok ma en loko gigwoko kwone; ento ŋat ma loko lok ata, can poto i kome cut." 
Proverbs13:4 Ŋat ma lawackom kadi bed cwinye omito jami mo-ni ma rom mene pe twero noŋone, kun dano ma omiyo kwone me tiyo tic matek gimedo bote lonyo ameda." 
Proverbs13:5 Dano ma kite atir dag goba, ento dano marac timo tim me lewic ki cac me bwola keken." 
Proverbs13:6 Kit ma atir gwoko ŋat ma pe ki bal mo, ento bal tyeko jo maraco woko at yeka ducu." 
Proverbs13:7 Jo mogo giporo bedo ki lonyo, ma noŋo pe gitye ki gin mo kadi ki acel; ki jo mukene giporo bedo lucan ma kun noŋo gitye ki lwak lonyo madit ata." 
Proverbs13:8 Dano ma lalonyo twero koko kwone ki lonyone; ŋat ma lacan, ma gire mo pe, pe tye ki yo mo me laro kwone," 
Proverbs13:9 Jo ma kitgi atir gimeny calo mac tara ma lyel maleŋ, jo maraco gibedo calo mac tara ma gineko woko." 
Proverbs13:10 Wakke kelo ayelayela keken, ento jo ma giwinyo lok me tam ma gimiyo botgi gibedo maryek." 
Proverbs13:11 Lonyo ma ginoŋo oyotoyot rwenyo woko, ŋat ma noŋo lonyo manoknok lonyone bimedde." 
Proverbs13:12 Gen ma pe gicobo miyo two i cwiny dano, doŋ mit ka ocobbe kakare tye macalo yat me kwo." 
Proverbs13:13 Ŋat ma cayo lok ma giwacce lwoŋo to i kome kene, ŋat ma lubo gin ma giciko bilimo bakacic." 
Proverbs13:14 Pwony ma jo maryek gipwonyo ki dano miyo kwo, miyo dano bene gibwot ki i owic pa to." 
Proverbs13:15 Ŋec ma dano tye kwede miyo jo mapol gipwonye, ento jo ma pe genne gilimo megi can keken." 
Proverbs13:16 Dano ma wiye tiyo cobo ticce ki ŋec muromo, ŋat ma lamiŋ bedo ka nyuto miŋone ka maleŋ," 
Proverbs13:17 Lakwena marac miyo dano gilimo peko, ento lakwena ma genne kelo kuc." 
Proverbs13:18 Dano ma kwero juk noŋo can ki cwercwiny; ento ŋat ma ye juk dano giworo. 
Proverbs13:19 Ka dano onoŋo gin ma en mito yomo cwinye mada; ento jo ma lumiŋ gidag bwoto tiyo gin marac. 
Proverbs13:20 Ŋat ma bedo kacel ki jo maryek pwonnye doko ryek bene, ento ŋat ma mako lurem ki lumiŋ kite biballe woko." 
Proverbs13:21 Gin marac lubo lubalo i kabedo ducu ma giwoto iye, jo ma kitgi atir gibimiyogi jami mabeco macalo bakacicgi," 
Proverbs13:22 Dano ma kite ber weko lonyone bot likwaye macalo ginaleyagi, kun noŋo ŋat ma labal kano mere lonyone pi ŋat ma kite at ir." 
Proverbs13:23 Poto okaŋ pa lacan ceko cam mabup, ento dano balo camme woko ki tim ma pe atir." 
Proverbs13:24 Dano ma pe pwodo latinne ki odoo noŋo pe mare, ŋat ma maro latinne keto cwinye me pwode ka noŋo abalo." 
Proverbs13:25 Ŋat ma kite atir bedo ki cam muromo, ento dano marac kec neko kare ducu." 
Proverbs14:1 Mon maryek miyo pacogi bedo maber ki kuc, mon ma lumiŋ aye giketo gaŋ woko aketa ki ciŋgi kengi." 
Proverbs14:2 Dano ma kwone tye atir aye lworo Rwot, ŋat ma yone ogom ma maro timo gin marac cayo Rwot acaya." 
Proverbs14:3 Lok pa lamiŋ calo odoo ma gigoye kwede, ento jo maryek lok ma giloko twero gwokogi." 
Proverbs14:4 Ka ma pe gipuro iye ki twoni dyaŋ, inoŋo bel pe, ento ka ma gipuro iye ki twoni dyaŋ inoŋo cam cek madwoŋ ata." 
Proverbs14:5 Ŋat ma lagen tito lok me caden ma tye ada, caden ma lagoba tito mere lok goba me bwola keken," 
Proverbs14:6 Laŋala pe twero doko ryek wacel, ŋat ma tye ki niaŋ matut twero noŋo ŋec oyotoyot." 
Proverbs14:7 A woko ki bot lamiŋ, pien pe tye lok mo me ŋec ma en romo pwonyi kwede," 
Proverbs14:8 Dano maryek tye ki niaŋ matut me noŋo kit ma myero ebed kwede, ento lumiŋ minogi telogi i yo marac miyo gibwolle abwola kengi." 
Proverbs14:9 Lubaŋa cayo jo maraco, ento timo kica ki jo ma cwinygi atir," 
Proverbs14:10 Yomcwiny ma itye kwede bedo meri keni; ki keccwiny bene meri; pe tye dano mo ma twero nywako gin-gu ducu kwedi," 
Proverbs14:11 Gibibalo ot pa dano marac woko, ento ot pa ŋat ma cwinye atir bicuŋ mere kakare." 
Proverbs14:12 Tye gin ma dano tamo ni en aye yo ma atir, kun noŋo yo ma kit ennu tero en i to." 
Proverbs14:13 Kadi bed ineno dano nyero nyero, noŋo cwinye bene tye ka cwer; ka yomcwiny doŋ otum, ci i ŋeye bino cwercwiny madit." 
Proverbs14:14 Dano ma cwinye odoko nyap poto i can pi gin marac ma en timo, ento dano maber limo mere bakacic maber pi gin maber ma en otiyo." 
Proverbs14:15 Dano ma lamiŋ ye jami ducu ayeya, ento ŋat maryek koŋ ŋiyo ka kwene ma en ecito iye." 
Proverbs14:16 Dano maryek wiye po lokke, kwero timo gin marac, ento dano ma lamiŋ ma lawackom, tiyo oyotoyot laboŋo par ma romo juke." 
Proverbs14:17 Dano ma kinigane lyetti oyotoyot timo gin me miŋo, ento dano ma tye ki ryeko diyo cwinye." 
Proverbs14:18 Lukwiya piny gilubo yo me miŋo, ento jo maryek ŋecgi miyo gibedo ki deyo madit." 
Proverbs14:19 Jo ma lutim maraco giryebbe piny i nyim jo ma kitgi beco, ki jo maraco giryebbe piny i dog gaŋ pa jo ma kitgi atir." 
Proverbs14:20 Pe tye ŋat mo ma mito dano ma lacan, kadi lawote kikome, ento jo ma lulonyo gitye ki lurem mapol." 
Proverbs14:21 Ŋat ma cayo lawote en labal; ŋat ma kica mako i kom lacan bedo ki yomcwiny. 
Proverbs14:22 Pe jo ma gibedo ki tam me timo gin marac aye giŋak woko adada? Ento jo ma gitye ki tam me tiyo gin maber gibedo ki mar me ada ki gen," 
Proverbs14:23 Kit tic ducu ma dano tiyo magoba tye iye, lok aloka keken ki dog kelo can." 
Proverbs14:24 Deyo pa jo maryek aye ryeko ma gitye kwede, ento jo ma lumiŋ gicayogi pi tim miŋogi." 
Proverbs14:25 Caden me ada laro kwo pa jo mapol, ento caden ma loko lok goba noŋo laroro." 
Proverbs14:26 Dano ma lworo Rwot bedo ma cwinye opye, dok litinone bene ginoŋo ka ma gilarre iye." 
Proverbs14:27 Lworo Rwot miyo kwo bot dano, miyo dano bwot ki i owic pa to." 
Proverbs14:28 Kabaka bedo ki deyo pi lwak dano mapol ma en loyogi; laboŋo dano rwot pe gin mo. 
Proverbs14:29 Ŋat ma kiniga pe mako oyot tye ki niaŋ matut, ento ŋat ma kiniga mako oyot nyuto miŋone keken." 
Proverbs14:30 Ka dano bedo ma cwinye opye, miyo kome bene bedo yot; ento nyeko tye macalo bur adola mudet ma ogudo cogo." 
Proverbs14:31 Ŋat ma uno dano ma lacan meno yeto Lubaŋama ocweyo dano-nu; ŋat ma bedo ki kica i kom jo ma piny obwoyogi noŋo woro Lubaŋa. 
Proverbs14:32 Dano marac can poto i kome pi timme marac, kun dano ma kite atir noŋo ka larre pien bal mo pe i kome." 
Proverbs14:33 Ryeko bedo i tam pa dano ma tye ki niaŋ, ento pe tye i cwiny lumiŋ." 
Proverbs14:34 Bedo ki kit ma atir miyo rok mo-ni nyiŋe ywek matek, ento bal kelo lewic bot lwak mo keken ma gibedo i wi lobo." 
Proverbs14:35 Kabaka bedo ki yomcwiny i kom latic ma tiyo ticce ki ryeko: kiniga make i kom latic ma tiyo tic ma miyo lewic bote. 
Proverbs15:1 Gam me mwolo kweyo kiniga woko, ento lok magwagwa tugo kiniga medo ameda." 
Proverbs15:2 Ka ce dano maryek tye ka lok, loko lokke mot maber ki ŋec, ento jo ma gin lumiŋ gicoro lok me miŋmiŋ keken." 
Proverbs15:3 Rwot neno kabedo ducu, en neno jo ma lutim maraco kacel ki jo ma kitgi beco." 
Proverbs15:4 Lok ma giloko mot ki kica tye macalo yat me kwo, ento lok mogo muŋak balo cwiny dano woko." 
Proverbs15:5 Dano ma lamiŋ cayo pwony ma wonne pwonye kwede, ŋat maryek ye lok mejuk." 
Proverbs15:6 Jo ma kitgi atir gikano lonyo madit iodigi, doŋ lonyo ma jo maraco gilimo kelo botgi can keken." 
Proverbs15:7 Lok pa jo maryek nyayo ŋec bot jo mukene, kun tam pa lumiŋ noŋo pe timo kit meno." 
Proverbs15:8 Rwot dag gitum ma jo maraco gityero bote, ento cwinye bedo yom i kom lega pa jo ma kitgi atir." 
Proverbs15:9 Rwot dag kit pa jo maraco, en maro ŋatma bedo ki kit kwo ma tye atir." 
Proverbs15:10 Ŋat ma bwoto lubo yo pa Rwot gibimiye pwod maracmada; dok ŋat ma dag winyo lok me juk bito woko. 
Proverbs15:11 Rwot ŋeyo gin ducu ma tye piny i lyel ki i lobo pa jo muto, doŋ dano ma mwa-ni gitwero kano muŋ mo ma Rwot pe ŋeyo?" 
Proverbs15:12 Dano ma laŋala pe mito gitire; en pe cito bot jo maryek. 
Proverbs15:13 Dano ma tye ki yomcwiny gineno ki i waŋe, ento dano ma cwinye cwer bedo ma cwinye ryaŋŋe aryaŋa," 
Proverbs15:14 Tam pa ŋat ma tye ki niaŋ matut tye me yenyo ŋec, lumiŋ mito giyeŋ megi ki lok me miŋo." 
Proverbs15:15 Jo ma giunogi gibedo marac nino me kwogi ducu; ento dano ma cwinye yom camo karama kare ki kare. 
Proverbs15:16 Bedo ber me bedo ki jami manok kun ilworo Rwot, kato ma ibedo ki lonyo madit kun noŋo it ye ki ayela keken." 
Proverbs15:17 Camo pot dek i paco pa jo ma gimari ber kato camo riŋo twon ma moo i paco pa jo ma gidagi. 
Proverbs15:18 Dano ma kinigane lyet tugo mere daa, ento ŋat ma diyo cwinye romo juko pyem." 
Proverbs15:19 Ŋat ma lawackom rwatte ki peko i kabedo ducu ma en cito iye, kun noŋo yo pa dano ma cwinye atir bedo yo gudo ma gigero maber," 
Proverbs15:20 Latin maryek yomo cwiny wonne, latin mamiŋ cayo minne acaya." 
Proverbs15:21 Ŋat ma wiye odiŋ cwinye bedo yom i kom lok me miŋo, ŋat ma tye ki niaŋ aye bedo ki kwo ma atir," 
Proverbs15:22 Yub mo ma giyubo laboŋo noŋo tam muromo pe twero cobbe maber, doŋ yub ma giyubo ma koŋ gipenyo tam bot jo mapol cobbe kakare." 
Proverbs15:23 Dano ma miyo lagam ma rwatte ki lok mo-ni bedo ki yomcwiny, ki lok ma en loko i kare ma mitte kikome, ber mada!" 
Proverbs15:24 Jo maryek gilubo yo ma dok tuŋ malo ma terogi i kwo, wek pe gidony i lyel," 
Proverbs15:25 Rwot keto ot pa ŋat ma lawakke woko, ento gwoko waŋ lobo pa daa-to." 
Proverbs15:26 Rwot dag tam pa jo maraco, cwinye yom i kom lok pa jo ma cwinygi leŋ." 
Proverbs15:27 Ŋat ma wor ma noŋo magoba i yo ma pe atir kelo can i kom jo ma i ode, ŋat ma kwero gamo lim me wil i muŋ bibedo kwo." 
Proverbs15:28 Dano ma kite atir koŋ bedo ki tam matut i kom lagam ma myero edok iye, dano marac coro mere lok marac keken." 
Proverbs15:29 Rwot tye cen ka mabor ki bot jo maraco, ento winyo lega pa dano ma kite atir." 
Proverbs15:30 Waŋ ma nen ma opoŋ ki bunyo miyo yomcwiny bot dano, doŋ winyo lok maber miyo ibedo maber." 
Proverbs15:31 Ŋat ma winyo lok maber ma gijuke kwede, bibedo i kin luryeko." 
Proverbs15:32 Ŋat ma weko lok me pwony, meno noŋo canne kekene; ento ŋat ma ye lok me juk me yubo kite twero niaŋ i lok matut." 
Proverbs15:33 Ka dano lworo Rwot, ci limo pwony me ryeko, dok bedo ki mwolo aye yo me limo woro." 
Proverbs16:1 Yub ma tye i tam, meno yub pa dano; ento Rwot aye ma loyo lok ma dano loko." 
Proverbs16:2 Dano neno ni gin ducu ma etimo tye atir ki tun bote, ento Rwot aye neno cwinye ka leŋ." 
Proverbs16:3 Leg Rwot okonyi i ticci ducu ma itiyo, ci yub ducu ma it ye kwede bicobbe maber dok kakare." 
Proverbs16:4 Kit jami acel acel ma “Rwot oketo tye ki tyen lokke, doŋ agikki pa jo maraco aye to." 
Proverbs16:5 Rwot dag jo ma luwakke; en pe biweko gibwot ma pe koŋ noŋo opwodogi. 
Proverbs16:6 Bed ki mar me ada dok ki gen ci Lubaŋa biweko balli; lwor Rwot ci gin mo marac pe bitimme i komi. 
Proverbs16:7 Ka inen kit pa dano yomo cwiny Rwot, ci Rwot bene cako miyo kuc bedo i kin dano meno ki lumonene." 
Proverbs16:8 Gin matidi ma inoŋo ki yo ma atir ber kato lim madwoŋ ma ilimo i yo me bwami. 
Proverbs16:9 Dano yubo yubbe ki i cwinye, Rwot aye ma telo en miyo cobo maber." 
Proverbs16:10 Kabaka loko lok kit ma noŋo Rwot omiye ni oloki; miyo doge bene pe cer ka ŋolo kop pa dano. 
Proverbs16:11 Rwot cwinye yom i kom jo ma gitye ki mijan ma pimo jami kakare; kidi lapim jami-me acata ducu en mutiyogi. 
Proverbs16:12 Luker pe gitwero ciro jo ma gitiyo gin marac, pien bedo ki kit ma atir aye miyo komker cuŋ matek." 
Proverbs16:13 Kabaka bedo ki yomcwiny i kom dano ma loko lok ki gen, dok en maro ŋat ma loko lok ada." 
Proverbs16:14 Dano maryek twero kweyo akemo pa kabaka; ka kiniga omako rwot, ci dano mo to woko." 
Proverbs16:15 Yomcwiny ma kabaka tye kwede nen wa i tur waŋe dok miyo kwo, ki kicane bene tye macalo pol ma miyo kot cwer i cwir." 
Proverbs16:16 Bedo ki ryeko ber kato lonyo ma dano tye kwede; dok bedo ki niaŋ matut ber kato noŋo lim," 
Proverbs16:17 Jo ma cwinygi atir giwoto i yo ma pe terogi ka timo gin marac; ŋat ma gwoko kite bilaro kwone bene. 
Proverbs16:18 Wakke tero dano i can, ki cwiny me nyatte miyo dano poto i can." 
Proverbs16:19 Bedo kacel ki lucan ki cwiny me mwolo ber kato poko jami ayaka ki jo ma luwakke. 
Proverbs16:20 Ŋat ma winyo lok me pwony ma gipwonye kwede bibedo ki kwo maber, dok ŋat ma geno Rwot bedo ki yomcwiny." 
Proverbs16:21 Dano maryek ki i cwinye giŋeyo ni tye bene ki niaŋ matut; en loko lok mamit ma bito ki tam pa dano. 
Proverbs16:22 Ryeko miyo kwo bot ŋat ma tye kwede, ento miŋo kelo can keken i kom lumiŋ." 
Proverbs16:23 Tam pa dano maryek miyo en loko lok maber ma nyuto niaŋ matut, dok gin ma en waco ducu bedo lok me pwony ma bito jo mukene." 
Proverbs16:24 Lok ma giloko ki kica lim calo moo kic, lim mada ma yomo cwiny dok miyo yotkom." 
Proverbs16:25 Tye gin ma dano tamo ni en aye yo ma atir, kun noŋo yo ma kit enu tero en i to." 
Proverbs16:26 Miti ma latic tye kwede miyo en tiyo matek; pien mito ni ecam eyeŋ kare ducu wek kec pe obed ka neke. 
Proverbs16:27 Dano ma latim bwami piro lok me neko jo mukene woko, dok lok ma en loko noŋo lyet calo mac," 
Proverbs16:28 Dano ma cwinye rac bedo kun keto lok ma nyayo mone i kin dano, ki ŋat ma maro kwoto dano, keyo larem pa jo mapol." 
Proverbs16:29 Dano ma labwami bwolo lawote, miyo lawote lubo yo ma pe ber ci poto woko i can." 
Proverbs16:30 Ŋat ma gayo lawote ki waŋe noŋo tye ki yub me limo gin marac ikome; dano ma miyo doge likiŋ bikelo gin marac. 
Proverbs16:31 Lwar wic aye lalukana me deyo pa ludoŋo, ka ce obino pi kwo ma tye atir." 
Proverbs16:32 Ŋat ma kiniga pe mako oyot ber loyo twon oteka, ŋat ma loyo tam ma i cwinye kene loyo ŋat ma omayo gaŋ kulu." 
Proverbs16:33 Kadi bed gibol kwir, ento Rwot aye ma ŋolo kop." 
Proverbs17:1 Kwon maŋic mo ma icamo ki kuc ber kato karama ma icamo i ot ma opoŋ ki daa. 
Proverbs17:2 Opii ma tiyo ticce ki ryeko twero bedo ki loc i kom latin ma tiyo gin me lewic, dok twero nywako ginaleyagi kwedgi macalo ŋat ace ma i kom omegigi." 
Proverbs17:3 Jabu ki ryal gitemo kun giliyo i ruk mac, ento Rwot temo cwiny dano." 
Proverbs17:4 Lutim maraco giwinyo lok pa jo maraco; ki lugoba bene giwinyo lok ma balo nyiŋ dano. 
Proverbs17:5 Ŋat ma ŋalo lacan meno yeto Lubaŋa ma ocweyo dano-nu; ki ŋat ma bedo ki yomcwiny pi can ma opoto i kom lawote pe bibwot ma noŋo pe koŋ gimiye pwod. 
Proverbs17:6 Ludito muti ginoŋo deyo pi likwayogi, ki litino bene ginoŋo deyo pi wongi." 
Proverbs17:7 Pe porre ki lamiŋ me loko lok maber, bene pe ber ki ladit me loko lok goba." 
Proverbs17:8 Lim me wil i muŋ nen bot lamiyone calo lwit ma dano otweyo i bade; en geno ni ebinoŋo gum i kabedo ducu ma ewoto iye. 
Proverbs17:9 Dano ma timo kica bot jo ma gitime marac noŋo mito gimare, ento ŋat ma wiye bedo ka po i kom bal ma lawote obalo bote, keto larem woko ki i kingi." 
Proverbs17:10 Dano ma niaŋ matut twero ye lok me juk ki cwinye ducu, kato lamiŋ ma kadi gidon tyen miya pe winyo lok mo-ni." 
Proverbs17:11 Dano ma latim marac tamo lok me jemo keken; pi meno gibicwalo lakwena mager wek olweny i kome. 
Proverbs17:12 Bedo ber ka dano orwatte ki ŋuu mager ma litinone gineko woko, kato ma orwatte ki lamiŋ ma tiyo gin me miŋomiŋo." 
Proverbs17:13 Ka ce dano timo gin marac bot ŋat ma otime ber, gin marac pe bia ki i ode wacel." 
Proverbs17:14 Lweny cakke matitidi ki lok me pyem macalo pii ma ka iyabo doge koŋ kwoŋo mol manoknok; pi meno myero ijukke woko ma pud peya daa ocakke. 
Proverbs17:15 Laŋolkop ma miyo dano marac loyo kop, ki laŋolkop ma ŋolo lok loyo dano ma lokke tye atir, gin aryo ducu Rwot daggi," 
Proverbs17:16 Kadi lamiŋ tye ki lim muromo ma romo wilo ryeko, meno kone konyo aŋo, ma kun noŋo wiye odiŋ woko?" 
Proverbs17:17 Ŋat ma larem bedo ki mar i kare ducu, ki dano ginywalo me nywako peko ki omegine." 
Proverbs17:18 Dano ma wiye odiŋ aye jeŋo jamine, kun mine me cuŋ ma ka lawote" 
Proverbs17:19 Dano ma maro bal noŋo maro kelo ayela bene; ki ŋat ma keto dog ode malac meno lwoŋo can keken. 
Proverbs17:20 Dano ma tamo lok marac pe twero limo gin maber, ki ŋat ma loko lok me rwenyo dano arwenya bipoto i can." 
Proverbs17:21 Latin ma lamiŋ cwero cwiny wonne; ŋat ma latinne miŋ pe bedo ki yomcwiny. 
Proverbs17:22 Yomcwiny kelo yotkom, cwercwiny miyo dano mok woko." 
Proverbs17:23 Laŋolkop marac ye gamo lim me wilo loyo kop i muŋ, ma balo ŋolo kop atir woko." 
Proverbs17:24 Dano ma tye ki niaŋ matut ŋeyo gin ma myero etim, ento dano ma lamiŋ bedo mere ma pe romo moko lok mo pire kene." 
Proverbs17:25 Latin mamiŋ miyo wonne bedo ki cwercwiny dok minne bene bedo ma cwinye kec adada. 
Proverbs17:26 Pe ber me ŋolo cul ki dano ma kite atir; dok pwodo jo ma kitgi beco bene rac mada. 
Proverbs17:27 Ŋat ma tye ki ŋec loko lok manok, ki ŋat ma cwinye opye mot en aye dano ma tye ki niaŋ matut." 
Proverbs17:28 Kadi bed ŋat ma lamiŋ, ka ce liŋ aliŋa gitwero tamo ni ryek; ma noŋo pe namo doge gitamo ni niaŋ te lok." 
Proverbs18:1 Ŋat ma pe ribbe ki jo mukene yenyo tyen lok mogo, kun kwero lubo tam pa jo ma ticgi nyuto ryekogi," 
Proverbs18:2 Lamiŋ pe paro pi niaŋ jami mo-ni; gin ma en mito aye me nyuto ka tamme kene. 
Proverbs18:3 Bal ki lewic giwoto kacel; ka woro orwenyo, ci yet bene cakke." 
Proverbs18:4 Lok ma dano loko cal ki pii matut; ryeko cal ki wan it ma gunnye doko kulu. 
Proverbs18:5 Dworo kor dano marac pe ber; ŋolo kop me loyo dano ma pe ki bal bene rac. 
Proverbs18:6 Lamiŋ loko gin ma nyayo daa ki pyem; pi lok maraco ma en loko aye miyo gigoye. 
Proverbs18:7 Lamiŋ kelo can i kome kene ki lok ma en loko, dok gin ma en loko ducu tye macalo owic ma twero mako en kekene." 
Proverbs18:8 Lok pa ŋat ma lakwot dano mit calo kwon ma gitedo makur atika, ma gimwonyo cito i ic kikome." 
Proverbs18:9 Dano ma kome wac ka tiyo ticce rom ki dano ma balo jami abala. 
Proverbs18:10 Nyiŋ Rwot obedo calo cel matek ka ma dano ma kite atir rio iye ci laro kwone," 
Proverbs18:11 Lonyo bedo calo gaŋ matek bot lalonyo, dok macalo cel ma gigero ocudo malo likuŋ me gwoko en:" 
Proverbs18:12 Ka can pud pe, dano bedo ki cwiny me lyerre; bedo ki mwolo aye yo me limo woro," 
Proverbs18:13 Myero koŋ iwiny lok ma noŋo peya igamo lok mo; ka pe, ci inyuto miŋŋi dok myayo yet i komi." 
Proverbs18:14 Dano twero ciro arem matek i kare ma noŋo en two, ento aŋa ma twero ciro ka cwinye odoko nyap?" 
Proverbs18:15 Tam pa ŋat ma tye ki niaŋ matut tye me yenyo ŋec, jo maryek bene gimito giwiny lok ma medo ŋecgi." 
Proverbs18:16 Mol ma dano miyo twero yabo yobote, dok miyo en o wa i nyim jo madito." 
Proverbs18:17 Dano ma kwoŋo tito lok i lukiko nen calo lokke tye atir, nio ka lawote ma gipido kwede openye ki peny madwoŋ." 
Proverbs18:18 Ka jo aryo ma gitego gitye ka pyem i lukiko, ci ka gibolo kwir tyeko daa ma i kingi." 
Proverbs18:19 Kony omeru ci en bigwoki macalo ibedo i cel me gaŋ matek, ento ka ibedo ka da kwede ci en lorri doggola woko." 
Proverbs18:20 Dano noŋo gin maber nyo marac pi lok ma en oloko; lok ma oa ki i doge tye ki adwoggine. 
Proverbs18:21 Lok ma iloko twero gwoko kwoni, nyo twero neki woko aneka; jo ma gimaro loko lok maraco gibineno can." 
Proverbs18:22 Ŋat munoŋo dako, meno onoŋo gin maber; en biniaŋ atir ni Rwot kara pwoye." 
Proverbs18:23 Dano ma lacan ka loko, bako doge ki mwolo; ento ŋat ma lalonyo gamo mere lok ki gero cut." 
Proverbs18:24 Tye jo mogo ma giporo bedo lurem apora, ento tye dano ma moko mere i kom lareme likiŋ ma loyo ominne kikome." 
Proverbs19:1 Dano ma lacan ma loko ada dok lagen ber kato ŋat ma loko lok gobagoba ma noŋo en lamiŋ kwede. 
Proverbs19:2 Miti ma dano tye kwede laboŋo ŋec rac, dano ma laro wot oyotoyot yone rwenyo woko." 
Proverbs19:3 Miŋ ma dano tye kwede kela can bote, ci cako cayo Rwot ki i cwinye marac." 
Proverbs19:4 Ŋat ma lalonyo noŋo lurem manyen mapol kare ki kare, ento dano ma lacan kadi lareme kikome bene noŋo otenyo woko liyak." 
Proverbs19:5 Caden ma lagoba pe gibiweko ma pe koŋ gipwodo, ki ŋat ma loko lok goba bene pe bibwot." 
Proverbs19:6 Jo mapol giyenyo gum ki bot dano ma cwinye yom; ŋat acel acel mito ebed larem dano mo ma maro miyo mot. 
Proverbs19:7 Dano ma lacan kadi ki omegine ducu gidage, ki lureme bene ducu giket gicito woko cen ka mabor kwede. Pe doŋ gitwero dwogo cen bote, kadi en obitgi ki lok mamit ma rom kwene." 
Proverbs19:8 Ŋat ma marre kekene noŋo ryeko; ki ŋat ma wiye tiyo i kom gin ma en opwonyo bibedo ki kwo maber. 
Proverbs19:9 Caden ma lagoba pe gibiweko ma pe koŋ gipwodo, ki ŋat ma loko lok goba bene bito." 
Proverbs19:10 Pe porre pi lamiŋ me bedo i kwo me lonyo, ci rac pa opii ma bedo ki twero me loyo rwodi bibedo rom kwene?" 
Proverbs19:11 Dano ma tye ki ryeko maber kiniga pe mako oyot, en bedo ma cwinye tye atir pi cayo bal ma ŋat mo otimo i kome." 
Proverbs19:12 Kiniga pa kabaka bedo calo koko pa labwor, ento berre calo toyo ma ton i kom lum." 
Proverbs19:13 Latin mamiŋ kelo can kom wonne, ki daa pa dako obedo calo ŋido kot ma pe cok." 
Proverbs19:14 Ot kacel ki lonyo gi Jeyogi ki bot kwaro, ento dako maryek Rwot aye miyo." 
Proverbs19:15 Wackom miyo dano nino nino matut; dano ma lawackom kec bineko matek. 
Proverbs19:16 Ŋat ma lubo gin ma Rwot ociko, meno noŋo tye ka gwoko kwone; ento ŋat ma cayo lokke bito." 
Proverbs19:17 Ŋat ma kica mako i kom lucan omiyo banya bot Rwot; pi meno Rwot bicule pi gin ma en otiyo. 
Proverbs19:18 Pwony litinoni me bedo ki kit kwo maber ma noŋo pud gin tino; pe iket cwinyi pi nekogi. 
Proverbs19:19 Dano ma kinigane Lyet bilimo pwod muporo kinigane; ka ikwanyo en woko ki i can kicel, en pud dok bimito ikonye aye i kare mukene." 
Proverbs19:20 Winy tam ma gimini dok imak pwony ma gipwonyi kwede, ci ibibedo dano ma laryeko i kare me anyim." 
Proverbs19:21 Dano twero bedo ki yub pi jami mapol i tamme, ento Rwot aye ma bicobo yubbe ki twerone." 
Proverbs19:22 Gin ma myero dano obed kwede aye mar me ada; dano ma lacan ber kato ŋat ma lagoba. 
Proverbs19:23 Lwor Rwot, ci ibibedo kwo; ŋat ma lworo Rwot bedo ki yweyo muromo i cwinye; gin marac bene pe twero gudo kome." 
Proverbs19:24 Lawackom luto ciŋe i atabo, ento kwanyo ciŋe me tero cam i doge loye," 
Proverbs19:25 Pwod jo ma gin luŋala, ci jo ma kwiya piny gibipwonnye; juk dano ma niaŋ, ci bilimo ŋec muromo." 
Proverbs19:26 Ŋat ma timo bwami i kem wonne, ma ryemo minne woko bene ki i gaŋ, meno latin ma kelo lewic ki cwercwiny bot lunyodone." 
Proverbs19:27 Latinna, ka iweko pwony ibiŋak ibwoto lok me ŋec ma doŋ it ye kwede con." 
Proverbs19:28 Caden ma konnye pe kelo ŋala i kom ŋolo kop atir, jo maraco bene guloko bal odoko camgi," 
Proverbs19:29 Pwod doŋ tye ma gitero woko pi jo ma gin luŋala, ki lumiŋ bene gibigoyo ŋegi ki odoo." 
Proverbs20:1 Mato koŋo vino makec madwoŋ mukato kare loki idoko lakolo dok miyo gicayi bene; ŋat ma mato koŋo vino mer kwede noŋo pe ryek. 
Proverbs20:2 Kiniga pa kabaka kelo lworo calo koko pa labwor; ŋat ma miyo kiniga mako kabaka gineko woko. 
Proverbs20:3 Dano ma bedo cen ki ka ma daa tye iye bedo ki deyo; ento lamiŋ mo keken bibedo mere ka da adaya. 
Proverbs20:4 Lapur ma lawackom pe puro potone i poto kot kikome; pi meno en pe binono cam mo ma myero eka i kare me kac. 
Proverbs20:5 Tam ma dano tye kwede i cwinye calo pii matut, ento dano ma tye ki niaŋ matut twero golo woko ka maleŋ." 
Proverbs20:6 Dano acel acel loko pi mar me ada ma etye kwede, ento aŋa ma twero noŋo dano ma genne?" 
Proverbs20:7 Likwayo pa dano ma cwinye leŋ dok ma tiyo gin ma tye atir, gitye ki gum!" 
Proverbs20:8 Kabaka ma bedo i wi komker me ŋolo kop waŋe yeko gin marac ducu. 
Proverbs20:9 Aŋa ma twero waco ni, “Doŋ atyeko lwoko cwinya odoko leŋ kombeddi atye maleŋ, balla ducu doŋ gijwayo woko”?" 
Proverbs20:10 Rwot dag jo ma gitiyo ki agwata ki mijan ma pe pimo jami kakare, ma gitiyo ki agwata lapor bel mapatpat me bwolo dano." 
Proverbs20:11 Kadi wa latin nyuto kit ma etye kwede i gin ma en tiyo, ka gin ma en tiyo-ni ber nyo tye atir." 
Proverbs20:12 Rwot aye mumiyowa it me winyo lok ki waŋ me neno piny, en muketo gin aryo-nu ducu." 
Proverbs20:13 Pe ibed ka nino anina, miyo idoko lacan; yab waŋi iti tic, ci ibibedo ki cam madwoŋ." 
Proverbs20:14 Lawil ŋur bot lacat-wil kun wacci, “Man rac, man rac” ento ka doŋ okato ocito woko ci nyatte matek." 
Proverbs20:15 Ka ce iŋeyo gin ma it ye ka lok ikome, ci it ye giri ki gin me wei makato jabu ki godi me wel-gu." 
Proverbs20:16 Gam ginaruka pa dano ma ojeŋo jamine pi banya pa dano mo ata, dok ber imak en kikome ka onoŋo ocibo jami mo pi jo ma gin lurok." 
Proverbs20:17 Kwon ma dano noŋo i yo me bwola lim alima bote, ento lacen bibedo kweyo mupoŋ i doge." 
Proverbs20:18 Yub ducu cobbe maber ka koŋ ityeko noŋo tam mabeco muromo’ bed ki ryeko ma teli ka icito i lweny. 
Proverbs20:19 Ŋat ma bedo ka wirre ki lok me kwot i kin dano tuco muŋ woko; pi meno pe myero iribbe ki ŋat ma loko lok i yo me miŋomiŋo. 
Proverbs20:20 Ka ce ŋat mo oceno wonne nyo minne, ci kwone bitum woko macalo mac tara ma to woko i colpiny." 
Proverbs20:21 Ginaleya ma ilimo oyotoyot i acakki pe ibilimo iye gum i agikkine. 
Proverbs20:22 Pe myero iwacci, “Abiculo waŋ gin marac ma gitimo i koma”; ber ikur Rwot, ci en bikonyi." 
Proverbs20:23 Rwot dag jo ma gitiyo ki lapim jami ma pe pimo kakare; ki mijan ma pe pimo jami kakare me bwolo dano per ber," 
Proverbs20:24 Rwot aye ma telo dano i yo me kwone; dano twero niaŋ kit kwo ma etye kwede niŋniŋ? 
Proverbs20:25 Dano ma waco oyotoyot ni, “Man adyero bot Rwot”, ka dok tamo lacen ma noŋo doŋ otyeko kwoŋo kwoŋ, rom ki winyo ma omoko i owic," 
Proverbs20:26 Kabaka maryek yeko jo maraco, macalo dano ma dino bel, ci yeko yugi pat." 
Proverbs20:27 Cwiny dano aye tara pa Rwot, ma menyo wa gin ducu mukanne ka madiŋ i iye." 
Proverbs20:28 Kabaka twero ri i loc ka ce tye ki mar me ada ki gen; dok bedo ki kit ma atir aye miyo komker cuŋ matek. 
Proverbs20:29 Deyo ma co matino gitye kwede aye tekkomgi, ento co muteggi giworogi pi yer lwar ma otwi i wigi." 
Proverbs20:30 Adoŋ ma keto ret i kom dano kwanyo gin marac woko; dok odoo ma gigoyo ki dano malit aye loko kwone. 
Proverbs21:1 Rwot aye ma loyo cwiny kabaka, macalo kulu ma mol, enloko piine mol cito ka ma en mito." 
Proverbs21:2 Dano neno ni gin ducu ma etimo tye atir ki tuŋ bote, ento Rwot aye neno cwinye ka leŋ." 
Proverbs21:3 Tiyo gin ma atir, ki ŋolo kop atir, yomo cwiny Rwot makato gitum." 
Proverbs21:4 Waŋ me lyerre, ki cwiny me wakke, magi ducu bal; ento gin tye macalo tara ki bot jo maraco." 
Proverbs21:5 Ŋat ma yubo yubbe ma noŋo koŋ oketo i tam, bilimo jami madwoŋ ata; ento ŋat ma tiyo jami oyotoyot bibedo lacan." 
Proverbs21:6 Lonyo ma inoŋo ki loko lok goba duny woko macalo lupu, dok tye calo owic ma tero dano i to." 
Proverbs21:7 Jo maraco bito pi tim bwamigi, pien gukwero tiyo gin ma atir."
