Proverbs21:8 Jo ma lubalo giwoto i yo mugom, gitiyo gin ma pe atir; ento jo mabeco ma gipe ki bal mo gitiyo gin ma atir." 
Proverbs21:9 Bedo i ot mukene tene ber kato bedo i ot kacel ki dako ma lapyem. 
Proverbs21:10 Dano marac bedo ki miti i cwinye pi timo gin marac, ma noŋo pe tye ki kica i kom lawote wacel." 
Proverbs21:11 Ka ce gimiyo pwod ki ŋat ma laŋala, ci ŋat ma kwiya piny bene cako doko ryek; dano ma laryeko mako pwony ma gipwonye kwede, ci medo ŋecce doko dwoŋ." 
Proverbs21:12 Dano ma kite atir neno odi pa jo maraco ki gin ma gitimo; jo maraco gityekogi woko matwal. 
Proverbs21:13 Ŋat ma diŋo ite woko ka winyo koko pa lucan, en bene ka bikok pi kony, ŋat mo pe biwinyo kokone wacel." 
Proverbs21:14 Mot ma gimiyo liŋ i muŋ kweyo cwiny dano ma tye ki kiniga; ki lim ma gimiyo i muŋ me wilo dano kwanyo akemo madit woko. 
Proverbs21:15 Ka ŋolo kop woto kakare, jo ma kitgi atir bedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, ento lutim maraco aye gibedo ki kumo." 
Proverbs21:16 Dano ma ŋak woko weko yo me niaŋ maber bito, giyiko woko nywako kabedo ki jo muto." 
Proverbs21:17 Ŋat ma maro yomcwiny madwoŋ bibedo lacan; ki ŋat ma maro mato koŋo vino ki camo cam ma obedo moo moo pe bilony. 
Proverbs21:18 Ŋat marac bedo gin kok pi ŋat ma cwinye leŋ, ki dano ma oŋayo waŋ Rwot bedo gin kok pi dano ma cwinye atir." 
Proverbs21:19 Bedo i tim aroo ber, kato bedo kacel ki dako ma lapyem ma lakel ayela." 
Proverbs21:20 Dano maryek bedo ki jami mabeco ki lonyo i pacone, ento dano mamiŋ tyeko limme woko ducu oyotoyot." 
Proverbs21:21 Ŋat ma bedo ki Lencwiny dok ki kica, bibedo ki kwo pi kare malac; ci jo mapol bene gibiwore." 
Proverbs21:22 Dano maryek twero mayo gaŋ pa jo ma gin oteka woko, dok muko cel gogogi ma gigeno-ni reto woko piny lirum." 
Proverbs21:23 Ŋat ma gwokke i kom lok ducu ma en loko, pe twero bedo ki ayela mo." 
Proverbs21:24 “Laŋala” meno aye nyiŋ dano ma lawakke dok ma lyerre, ma gin ma en tiyo ducu bedo tim me anywaranywar ki wakke marac." 
Proverbs21:25 Miti ma lawackom tye kwede twero neke bene, pien en dag tiyo tic pi noŋo gin ma emito." 
Proverbs21:26 Dano marac bedo ka paro jami pa jo mukene dyeceŋ ki dyewor benebene, ento dano ma kite atir miyo jamine me konyo jo mukene ma pe kano mo doŋ bote." 
Proverbs21:27 Gitum ma dano marac otyero en gin me kwer bot Rwot; racce bedo rom mene ka ce en tyerogitum bot Rwot ma noŋo tye ki tam marac i cwinye? 
Proverbs21:28 Caden ma lagoba bito; ento dano ma winyo lok ma giwacce, lokke bedo nakanaka." 
Proverbs21:29 Dano marac poro bedo ŋat macir, ento dano ma cwinye atir bedo ka tamo motmot gin ma myero etim i lobo." 
Proverbs21:30 Ryeko, niaŋ ki tam ma gimiyo me konyo dano, magi ducu pe konyo dano ma pyem ki Rwot." 
Proverbs21:31 Gitwero coko aguragura kacel ma doŋ giyubogi pi kuro nino me lweny, ento loyo lweny twerone tye bot Rwot." 
Proverbs22:1 Yer bedo ki nyiŋ maber, pien en aye ber kato lonyo madwoŋ, dok pwoc ma dano gipwoyi kwede ber loyo ryal nyo jabu." 
Proverbs22:2 Pe tye apokapoka i kin lalonyo ki lacan, pien Rwot aye muketo gin aryo-nu ducu." 
Proverbs22:3 Dano ma wiye tiyo ka oneno gin marac bino i kome, kanne woko; ento lakwiya piny medde mere ameda, ci neno can ada." 
Proverbs22:4 Bakacic ma dano limo pi bedo ki mwolo ki pi lworo Rwot, en aye lwak lonyo mapol, woro kacel ki kwo." 
Proverbs22:5 Okuto ki owic tye i yo pa jo muŋak: ento ŋat ma gwoko kome pe biwok i yo meno. 
Proverbs22:6 Pwony latin con ma noŋo en pud tidi kit yo ma myero en obed kwede, ci ka en odoŋo pe biweko lubone." 
Proverbs22:7 Ŋat ma lacan bedo i te loc pa dano mulony, ki ŋat ma deno lim bedo opii pa won limo" 
Proverbs22:8 Ŋat ma timo tim bwami limo can keken, agikki me ticce bibedo odoo ma konnye pe." 
Proverbs22:9 Ŋat ma waŋe leŋ i kom dano bilimo gum ma a bot Rwot, pien en poko camme mogo ki lucan." 
Proverbs22:10 Ryem ŋat ma lacac woko, ci lweny bene bibedo pe boti, dok daa kacel ki anywar bene bigik." 
Proverbs22:11 Ŋat ma bedo ki leŋcwiny, ma loko lok maber me kica, bimako kabaka bedo lareme." 
Proverbs22:12 Rwot tye ka neno ni lok me ŋec gigwoko maber, ento en bolo lok pa jo ma guŋayo waŋe woko." 
Proverbs22:13 Ŋat ma lawackom wacci, “Labwor tye woko! Ka akato woko miyo bineka woko i dye gudo!”" 
Proverbs22:14 Lok pa dako ma lakwele obedo calo bur matut; ŋat ma kiniga omako Rwot i kome bipoto woko i bur meno. 
Proverbs22:15 Miŋo aye gin ma tye i cwiny latin matidi, ento ka ipwonye ki odoo, ci miŋo a woko ki bote." 
Proverbs22:16 Ŋat ma diyo lucan ni wek lonyone omedde, nyo ma miyo jamine bot lulonyo keken, bidoko lacan. Gwoko cik ki gin ma luryeko yam guwaco" 
Proverbs22:17 Cik iti iwiny lok ma luryeko guwaco, dok myero iket cwinyi i kom ŋec ma apwonyi kwede." 
Proverbs22:18 Ka igwoku lok magi i cwinyi, ci bedo ber matek; ka ce ibipo i komgi ci ibibolo lok i komgi i kare ma mitte." 
Proverbs22:19 Doŋ amito igen Rwot, en aye gin mumiyo atito lok magi boti tin-ni." 
Proverbs22:20 Atyeko coyo lok ma romo pyeradek kun amiyi tam mabeco kacel ki ŋec muromo," 
Proverbs22:21 pi nyuto boti gin ma atir dok ada, wek in bene idwok lok ada bot jo mucwali." 
Proverbs22:22 Pe myero iyak jami pa lacan ni pien en lacan mamwa, nyo kadi me nyono jo ma gitye ki can woko i kabedo me ŋolo kop;" 
Proverbs22:23 pien Rwot bi pi do pigi, bineko jo ma guyakogi woko." 
Proverbs22:24 Pe myero imak larem ki dano ma kiniga mako oyotoyot; dok pe myero iwot kacel ki dano ma cwinye opoŋ ki akemo twatwal," 
Proverbs22:25 weko ibilubo kite ducu ci imoko i owic. 
Proverbs22:26 Pe myero ibed ŋat acel i kom jo ma gijeŋo jamigi, ma gicuŋ pi jo ma lubanya." 
Proverbs22:27 Ka ce pe it ye ki gin mo ma myero icul kwede banya, ci gimayo kitandani ma ibuto iye-ni woko," 
Proverbs22:28 Pe myero ikob got macon ma poko waŋ lobo ma yam kwarowu doŋ gutyeko ketone. 
Proverbs22:29 It ye ka neno dano makwiri i ticce? En bibedo ka tic wa i nyim luker: pe bitic i nyim dano ata-gu," 
Proverbs23:1 Ka ibedo ka cam kacel ki rwot, myero itemme twatwal me keto woro i kome;" 
Proverbs23:2 ka ce ineno ni in lacam madwoŋ, ci kwany pala iŋol ŋuti woko." 
Proverbs23:3 Pe myero imwony laa pi camme makur, meno cam ma bwolo dano noŋo." 
Proverbs23:4 Pe myero ibed ka tiyo tic matek ni wek inoŋ lonyo; bed ki ryeko muromo ci iwek kit tam macalo meno obedi. 
Proverbs23:5 I kare ma iloko waŋi ineno en lonyoni-ni, inoŋo ni otyeko cito con; pien bwome twi woko oyotoyot, ci tuk malo calo ocur ma kemo polo." 
Proverbs23:6 Pe myero icam kwon pa dano ma ladur; pe iket cwinyi i kom camme makur-ri. 
Proverbs23:7 En obedo calo ŋat ma lwodo lok ki i cwinye. En wacci, “Cam dok imat ba!” kun noŋo cwinye pe i komi." 
Proverbs23:8 Ibiŋoko kwon ma icamo-ni woko liweŋ, dok bibalo lokki mamit ma iloko bote-gu ducu." 
Proverbs23:9 Pe myero ilok lok me ryeko bot ŋat ma lamiŋ, pien en pe twero niaŋ ber pa lok ma iloko bote, cayo mere acaya keken." 
Proverbs23:10 Pe ikob got macon ma poko waŋ lobo nyo kadi donyo i potti pa jo ma wongi pe; 
Proverbs23:11 pien Lacunudwargi tek; en bipido pigi kwedi, ci miyo lok loyi," 
Proverbs23:12 Ket cwinyi me winyo pwony ma gipwonyi kwede, cik, iti bene me winyo lok me ŋec." 
Proverbs23:13 Pe ikal akala me pwonyo latin wek obed ki kit maber; ka igoye ki odeo pe bito. 
Proverbs23:14 Ka ce ipwonye kun igoye ki odoo kit meno, ci ibilaro kwone wek pe odony ilye!." 
Proverbs23:15 Latinna, ka ce ibedo ki ryeko icwinyi, an bene cwinya bibedo yom." 
Proverbs23:16 Abibedo ki yomcwiny ki tipo koma ducu, ka onoŋo iloko gin ma atir." 
Proverbs23:17 Pe myero ibed ki mone i cwinyi ‘i kom lubalo, ento medde ki lworo Rwot nino ki niŋo." 
Proverbs23:18 Adada kwoni ma tye anyim bibedo maber, dok genni bene pe gibibalo woko." 
Proverbs23:19 Latinna winy lokka, wek ibed ryek,’ dok iket tammi pi lubo yo ma mitte." 
Proverbs23:20 Pe ibed i kin jo ma gin lumero ki koŋo vino, kadi bedo i kin jo ma luworo ma gin lucam riŋo;" 
Proverbs23:21 pien lumero kacel ki luworo gibidoko lucan, nino bimako waŋgi woko miyo giruko boŋo muketoket." 
Proverbs23:22 Winy lok pa woru munywali, dok pe myero ica meni ka doŋ oti." 
Proverbs23:23 Wil ada, ento pe icat woko aye; dok iwil ryeko, pwony, ki niaŋ maber." 
Proverbs23:24 Latin ma kite atir miyo wonne hedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ; ŋat ma nywalo tatin maryek bedo ki yomcwiny pire. 
Proverbs23:25 Wek woru kacel ki meni gubed ma cwinygi yom, wek meni munywali obed ki yomcwiny." 
Proverbs23:26 Latinna, ket cwinyi ka mako lok ma awacci, dok inen kit kwona ducu wek obed lanyut ma biteli." 
Proverbs23:27 Dako ma lakwele obedo calo bur matut; en tye calo waŋ it madiŋ," 
Proverbs23:28 Dako-nu kanne woko pi libo dano calo layak, dok en medo wel jo ma guŋayo waŋ Rwot doko dwoŋ i kin dano." 
Proverbs23:29 Aŋa ma tye ki can? Aŋa ma tye ki cwercwiny? Aŋa ma tye ka da? Aŋa ma tye ka ŋur? Aŋa mulimo ret laboŋo gin mo mutimme? Aŋa ma waŋe ocek makwar? 
Proverbs23:30 Jo ma giri ka mato koŋo vino pi kare malac, jo ma cito ka mato koŋo vino ma girubo mamit." 
Proverbs23:31 Pe imat koŋo vino ka doŋ odoko kwar, ma noŋo tye ka ryeny aryenya i kikopo, dok donyo mapwot i i ŋat ma tye ka matone," 
Proverbs23:32 I agikkine kayo i dano calo twol, kayo calo twol ororo ma tye ki kwir marac." 
Proverbs23:33 Ibineno jami mapat ma yam peya inenogi, dok pe ibitwero tamo kadi ki loko gin mo ma atir." 
Proverbs23:34 Ibibedo calo ŋat ma obuto piny idye nam, calo ŋat ma oito malo i wi wir me mel." 
Proverbs23:35 Ibiwaco ni, “Gigoya, ento pe alimo ret mo; gigoya, ento pe awinyo arem mo wacel. Abico awene? Abicito ka mato kono yino mukene doki.’" 
Proverbs24:1 Pe myero nyeko omaki i kom jo ma gin lutim maraco, dok pe imar ribbe kwedgi;" 
Proverbs24:2 pien tamgi ducu opoŋ ki lok me tim bwami, ma noŋo giloko lok ma keto can keken i kom dano." 
Proverbs24:3 Gitwero gero ot pi ryeko, dok pi niaŋ matut miyo cuŋ matek likiŋ;" 
Proverbs24:4 pi ŋec ma dano tye kwede miyo poŋo ode ki kit jami mabeco me wel ki lwak jami ma yomo cwiny," 
Proverbs24:5 Dano maryek tek kato dano ma latekkom, dano ma tye ki ŋec bene kato ŋat ma tye ki teko." 
Proverbs24:6 Ka giteli ki ryeko ci itwero lweny maber, dok winyo tam mabeco ma dano gimiyo boti miyo iloyo lweny." 
Proverbs24:7 Ryeko nen calo gin mo ma tye malo twatwal bot ŋat mamiŋ; pe twero waco lok kadi ki acel ka gitye ka laro lok ma pire tek. 
Proverbs24:8 Ŋat ma bedo ki tam me timo gin marac gilwoŋe ni lakel-ayela. 
Proverbs24:9 Tam ma lamiŋ tamo bedo bal keken, dano ducu gidag ŋat ma laŋala." 
Proverbs24:10 Ka ce ibedo nyap i kare ma ayelayela tye, tekoni noŋo nok adada." 
Proverbs24:11 Myero ilar kwo pa jo ma gimakogi giterogi woko me aneka; gwok jo ma giywayogi giterogi i kabedo me nek. 
Proverbs24:12 Ka ce iwacci, “Nen, wan onoŋo pe waŋeyo lokke,” ento Lubaŋa ma neno cwiny dano-ni pe biromo niaŋ? En ŋat ma neno kwowu-ni pe ŋeyo? En pe biketo can i kom dano acel acel ma poro kit gin ma en otimo?" 
Proverbs24:13 Latinna, cam moo kic, pien ber, dok moo kic ma cwer ki i peda kic lim matek ka ibilo." 
Proverbs24:14 Myero iŋe ni ryeko bene tye kit meno pi kwoni; ka ce inoŋo ryeko, ci ibedo ki gen ni kwoni me anyim bibedo maber, dok genni pe bigik." 
Proverbs24:15 Pe ikanne i ŋet ot pa dano ma kite atir pi time rac; pe myero itim bwami i kom gaŋŋe; 
Proverbs24:16 pien dano ma kite atir kadi opot piny tyen abiro, dok pud twero a malo aye; ento jo maraco can retogi gipoto woko piny matwal." 
Proverbs24:17 Pe ibed ki yomcwiny ka ineno lakworri opoto i can, dok cwinyi pe obed yom ka ineno en yokke atata;" 
Proverbs24:18 gwok Rwot bineno gin ma itimo, ci pe biyomo cwinye, ci miyo kwanyo kinigane woko ki i kom dano-nu." 
Proverbs24:19 Pe myero cwinyi ocwer pi jo ma gin lutim maraco, dok pe ibed ki mone i kom jo maraco;" 
Proverbs24:20 pien dano ma latim marac pe tye ki gen pi kwone pi kare me anyim; mac tara pa jo maraco gibineko woko," 
Proverbs24:21 Latinna, lwor Rwot dok ilwor kabaka bene, pe myero ijem i komgi." 
Proverbs24:22 Ka ijemo ci gibiketo can i komi oyotoyot; dok aŋa ma ŋeyo kit can ma bia bot Lubaŋa ki kabaka? 
Proverbs24:23 Magi ducu obedo lok ma luryeko guwaco. Dworo kor dano i ŋolo kop rac. 
Proverbs24:24 Ŋat ma waco bot dano marac, “Pe it ye ki bal mo” jo me rok ducu gibicene, dok gibikwere woko;" 
Proverbs24:25 ento jo ma gijuko lutim maraco gibibedo ki yomcwiny, dok gibilimo gum maber makato ducu." 
Proverbs24:26 Ŋat ma miyo lagam ma atir meno aye larem me ada. 
Proverbs24:27 Mukwoŋo koŋ ikwoŋ tiyo ticci ma tye woko, pur poto dok ipit iye ginapita ducu ma mitte; ka lacen doŋ icak gero odi." 
Proverbs24:28 Pe ibed caden ma lagoba i kom lawoti ma pe ki bal; pe myero ibwol dano ki lok gobagoba. 
Proverbs24:29 Pe myero iwac ni, ‘Abitimo gin ma en otimo i koma-ni bene ikome; abiculo waŋ gin ma dano meno otimo.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Awoto akato ki i ŋet poto pa dano ma lawackom, ki i ŋet poto olok pa dano ma wiye odiŋ;" 
Proverbs24:31 nen, potone ducu obakke ki okuto keken; doo ayila oumo ŋom woko, celle ma gigero ki got bene omuk orette woko piny," 
Proverbs24:32 Ka aneno ci abedo ki tam matut pire; aneno dok omiya pwony madit. 
Proverbs24:33 Ka ibuto inino manok, dok idolo ciŋi woko omini yweyo," 
Proverbs24:34 ci can bimaki macalo layak ma mako dano, ma orukke woko ki jami lwennye ducu." 
Proverbs25:1 Lok magi bene gin carolok pa Solomon ma jo ‘pa Kejekia kabaka me Juda guloko gucoyo i buk. 
Proverbs25:2 Deyo pa Lubaŋa aye me kano jami woko i muŋ ma pe nen, ento deyo pa luker tye me tito lok woko bot lwak ka maleŋ." 
Proverbs25:3 Pe iŋeyo gin ma kabaka tye ka tamone, pien tamme bor calo polo, tut calo lobo." 
Proverbs25:4 Ka giliyo ryal maber laboŋo cette, ci latet ryal twero yubo kwede gin mo maber." 
Proverbs25:5 Ryem jo maraco woko ki i nyim kabaka, pien bedo ki kit ma atir miyo komkerre cuŋ matek." 
Proverbs25:6 Pe ikette keni me bedo dano madit i nyim kabaka, dok pe myero ibed i kabedo pa jo madito." 
Proverbs25:7 Bedo ber makato ka giwacci ni, “Nyik malo kany,” ber kato ma gidwoki i kabedo ma piny ma noŋo kun itye i nyim rwot." 
Proverbs25:8 pe myero ikel oyotoyot i nyim lukiko; i agikkine ibitimo gin aŋo ka lawoti mo oketo lewic i wii? 
Proverbs25:9 Ka lok mo tye i kinwu ki lawoti, myero wutyek lokke wun aryo; pe ituc muŋ pa jo mukene," 
Proverbs25:10 wek ŋat ma winyo lokki pe omi lewic omaki, miyo nyiŋi biballe woko matwal." 
Proverbs25:11 Lok ma giloko kakare obedo calo jabu ma gimwono i kom ryal. 
Proverbs25:12 Ŋat maryek ma juko dano ki pwony maber bot ŋat ma winyo lokke, obedo calo gin mo me jabu me deyo kom dano." 
Proverbs25:13 Lakwena ma genne kweyo cwiny jo ma guore calo ŋico pee i kare me kac; en kweyo cwiny ludito ma loye kumeno. 
Proverbs25:14 Dano ma nyatte ki mot ma en pe twero miyone obedo calo pol ki yamo ma bino laboŋo kot mo. 
Proverbs25:15 Itwero loko tam pa laloc ka idiyo cwinyi, dok lok ma iloko mot ki mwolo twero loko tam pa dano kadi bed onoŋo tek calo cogo," 
Proverbs25:16 Ka ce inoŋo moo kic, cam ma romo ii keken, pien ka icamo mukato kare miyo iŋoko woko." 
Proverbs25:17 Pe ibed ka wot me limo lawoti i ode kare ki kare, miyo en biol woko kwedi ci cako kweri woko." 
Proverbs25:18 Lacaden ma tito lok goba i kom lawote obedo macalo odoo me lweny, nyo pala lucwan, nyo atero mabit." 
Proverbs25:19 Bedo ki gen i kom dano ma pe genne i kare me ayela rom ki lak ma miyo arem ki dano, nyo tyen ma oŋol." 
Proverbs25:20 Ŋat ma wero wer bot dano ma tye ki kumo mapek i cwinye rom ki ŋat ma okwanyo ginaruka woko ki i kome i nino ma piny ŋie, dok tye macalo kado ma giketo i waŋ bur." 
Proverbs25:21 Ka kec neko lakworri, miye kwon ocam; dok ka orwo pii neke, miye pii omati." 
Proverbs25:22 Ka itimo kumeno, ci ibicoko lodi mac ibako i wiye, Rwot bene bimiyi bakacic." 
Proverbs25:23 Yamo ma kodo a ki tuŋ malo kelo kot; lok me kwoto dano kelo kiniga. 
Proverbs25:24 Bedo i ot mukene tene ber kato bedo i ot kacel ki dako ma lapyem. 
Proverbs25:25 Lok maber me yomcwiny ma dano owinyo ma oa ki i lobo mabor, calo pii manic ma kweyo cwiny dano ma orwo omako." 
Proverbs25:26 Dano ma kite atir ma oye tam pa jo maraco, cal ki wan it ma piine opoŋ coto, ki waŋ it ma oballe woko." 
Proverbs25:27 Pe bedo ber me camo moo kic madwoŋ, dok bene bito dano ki lok mapol ni wek gipwoyi pe ber." 
Proverbs25:28 Ka ce onoŋo pe itwero loyo kinigani, ci irom ki gaŋ ma gimonyo ma gimuko celle gireto woko." 
Proverbs26:1 Woro dano ma lamiŋ, cal ki pee i kare me oro nyo kot ma cwer i kare me kac." 
Proverbs26:2 Lok ma giceni kwede pe twero timo gin mo i komi ka ce pe ibalo, obedo calo winyo lakalagwec ma tuk yeŋŋe atata, dok calo aliboro ma tuk twarre cito woko." 
Proverbs26:3 Gigoyo aguragura ki del, gitweyo dog kana ki ogwil, odoo aye gigoyo ki ŋe dano ma Lamiŋ." 
Proverbs26:4 Pe idok i peny pa dano ma miŋ ma rom ki miŋone, miyo in bene ilokke idoko lamiŋ calo eno" 
Proverbs26:5 Dok i peny pa dano ma miŋ ma rom ki miŋone, wek pe otam pire kene ni eryek." 
Proverbs26:6 Ŋat ma oro lamiŋ me cwalo lok ka mo meno rom ma oŋuno tyene kekene dok tye ka yenyo ayela ni obin ikome. 
Proverbs26:7 Carolok ma lumiŋ giloko, cal ki tyen dano ma lanol ma lyero alyera ma konnye doŋ pe." 
Proverbs26:8 Ŋat ma woro lamiŋ rom ki dano ma otweyo gweŋ i latandiyo. 
Proverbs26:9 Carolok ma lumiŋ giloko, rom ki okuto ma cobo ciŋ dano ma lamero." 
Proverbs26:10 Won tic ma coyo lamiŋ nyo lamero me tic bote rom ki won atero ma bayo aterone ci celo dano ducu. 
Proverbs26:11 Ŋat ma lamiŋ ma nwoyo tim miŋone rom ki gwok ma lokke dok ka nano nokke kekene. 
Proverbs26:12 Ineno dano ma tamo ki i cwinye ni eryek pire kene? Itwero bedo ki gen i kom ŋat ma lamiŋ makato eno 
Proverbs26:13 Dano ma lawackom wacci, “Labwor tye i waŋa yo! Labwor tye i dye gudo!”" 
Proverbs26:14 Dano ma lawackom bedo ka lokke aloka i wi kitandane, macalo kika ma wirre i kom pete." 
Proverbs26:15 Lawackom luto ciŋe i atabo; ento kwanyo ciŋe me tero cam i doge loye. 
Proverbs26:16 Dano ma lawackom nenne kekene ni eryek ekato kadi wa dano abiro ma gitwero dok i peny ki ryeko. 
Proverbs26:17 Ŋat ma donyo i lok daa ma pe okemo en rom ki ŋat ma mako gwok ma tye ka kato akata ki ite," 
Proverbs26:18 Calo dano ma lapoya ma cwinyo mac i wi ot, nyo ma bayo atero ci neko dano," 
Proverbs26:19 en aye ŋat ma bwolo lawote kun waco ni, “An atye ka loko lok oree keken!”" 
Proverbs26:20 Pi nok pa yen miyo mac pe lyel maber, to woko; ka ma ŋat ma maro kwoto dano pe iye, daa bene gik woko cut." 
Proverbs26:21 Macalo bilo kano lodi mac, yen bene miyo mac lyel, dano ma maro daa bene tye kit meno, miyo daa medde ‘ameda." 
Proverbs26:22 Lok pa ŋat ma lakwot dano mit calo kwon ma gitedo makur atika, ma gimwonyo cito i ic kikome." 
Proverbs26:23 Dano ma loko lok mamit ki doge ma kun noŋo tve ki tam marac i cwinye rom ki atabo lobo ma gidero ki libi ma ryeny aryenya. 
Proverbs26:24 Ŋat ma lakworri twero loko boti lok mamit ki doge noŋo kun noŋo tye ki adagadaga i cwinye; 
Proverbs26:25 kadi ka loko lok mamit niŋo, pe iye lokke, pien cwinye opoŋ ki jami abiro ma gin ducu gin me kwer." 
Proverbs26:26 En twero umo adagadaga ma etye kwede i cwinye ki bwola, ento lwak ka ocokke gibineno gin marac ma en otiyo." 
Proverbs26:27 Ŋat ma kwinyo bur bipoto iye; ki ŋat ma cako loro got, got bipoto i kome." 
Proverbs26:28 Ŋat ma lagoba kwero jo ma en tye ka unogi, dok dano ma bwolo dano ki lok mamit kelo can keken." 
Proverbs27:1 Pe myero inyatte kekeni pi nino ma diki, pien pe iŋeyo gin ma bitimme tin." 
Proverbs27:2 Pe ipakke keni ki lok ma iloko; wek ŋat mukene aye opaki, kadi en larok." 
Proverbs27:3 Got pek, kweyo bene pek, ento ayela ma lamiŋ kelo pek makato ducu." 
Proverbs27:4 Akemo ger, dok kiniga nyayo nek; ento pe gitwero porogi ki nyeko." 
Proverbs27:5 Juko dano atyer ka maleŋ ber kato mar ma gikano woko. 
Proverbs27:6 Kadi bed laremi ogoyi pud itwero geno en, ento ka lakworri obino me kwako kori, myero igwokke." 
Proverbs27:7 Ŋat ma oyeŋ kwero camo moo kic, ento ŋat ma kec neko kadi gin makec noŋo lim alima i doge." 
Proverbs27:8 Dano ma weko gaŋŋe a cito woko ka mukene, rom ki winyo ma obwoto ode otuk ocito woko ka mabor." 
Proverbs27:9 Moo wir ki gin ma ŋwece kur miyo dano bedo ma cwinye yom, ento ayela balo cwiny dano woko marac." 
Proverbs27:10 Pe ibwot ŋat ma laremi, ki ŋat ma larem woru; dok i kare ma itye ki can pe myero icit i ot pa omeru. Lawoti ma tye cok twero konyi makato omeru ma tye ka mabor." 
Proverbs27:11 Latinna, bed ryek, wek iyom cwinya, wek anoŋ lagam ma myero adok iye i lok ki ŋat ma yeta." 
Proverbs27:12 Dano ma wiye tiyo ka oneno gin marac bino i kome, kanne woko; ento lakwiya piny medde mere ameda, ci neno can ada." 
Proverbs27:13 Gam ginaruka pa dano ma ojeŋo jamine pi banya pa dano mo ata, dok ber imak en kikome ka onoŋo ocibo jami mo pi jo ma gin lurok." 
Proverbs27:14 Ŋat ma a malo odiko con, ci cako lamo gum i kom lawote ki dwan maloŋo, gibiwaco ni en tye ka ceno lawoteni acena." 
Proverbs27:15 Dako ma lapyem ma nyayo ayela rom ki ŋido kot ma pe cok i kare me cwir. 
Proverbs27:16 Dako-nu jukone tek macalo juko yamo, dok tek macalo mako moo poŋcin." 
Proverbs27:17 Dano acel acel twero pwonyo lawote, macalo nyonyo twero pako nyonyo lawote doko bit." 
Proverbs27:18 Ŋat ma pito yat oduro ka ogwoko maber bicamo nyige, ki ŋat ma kuro piny kun gwoko laditte maber dano biwore." 
Proverbs27:19 Kit macalo dano ka okulo wiye i pii neno tur nyime, cwiny dano bene nyuto kit ma dano meno tye kwede." 
Proverbs27:20 Dano ma pe twero yeŋ ki gin ma iye mito, obedo calo lyel pa jo muto ma pe yeŋ." 
Proverbs27:21 Ryal ki jabu gitemo kun giliyo i ruk mac, doŋ ber pa dano nen i kit ma jo mukene gipake kwede." 
Proverbs27:22 Kadi bed igo lamiŋ ikwany iod woko ki lalek i pany, kun iketo kacel ki bel me aoda, ci pud miŋ ma tye i kome-ni pe bia wacel." 
Proverbs27:23 Myero igwok romini dok iŋegi maber, ket cwinyi bene ka gwoko dyaŋini:" 
Proverbs27:24 pien lonyo pe bedo matwal. Ineno ker ri nakanaka pi yalwak ducu? 
Proverbs27:25 Ka lum otum woko, ka ginapita cako lot manyen, ci gicako nyaro lum ma olot i wi godi." 
Proverbs27:26 Itwero yubo boŋo nia ki i kom yer romini, dok itwero wilo lobo ki cilir; ma inoŋo ki i kom dyegini;" 
Proverbs27:27 ibinoŋo cak muromo ma a ki i kom dyegini ma bibedo cammi, ibipito ki jo ma i odi ducu, dok biromo gwoko anyira ma gin aŋecani ducu." 
Proverbs28:1 Jo maraco giriŋo woko ariŋa kadi bed pe ŋat mo tye ka ryemogi, ento dano ma kite atir cwinye tek calo labwor." 
Proverbs28:2 Ka lobo obedo ka timo bal lulocce bedo mapol. Lobo twero cuŋ matek dok bedo ki kuc ma ri nakanaka ka ce onoŋo tye ki luloc maryek ma giniaŋ dok ma gitye ki ŋec maber. 
Proverbs28:3 Laloc ma uno lucan obedo calo kot ma cwer ki pee ci balo cam woko liweŋ," 
Proverbs28:4 Jo ma gibwoto cik pa Lubaŋa gipako jo maraco, ento jo ma gigwoko cik mere gilwenyo alwenya i kom jo maraco." 
Proverbs28:5 Jo ma Lutim gin marac pe giniaŋ i lok me ŋolo kop atir, ento jo ma giworo Rwot giniaŋ iye ducu maber." 
Proverbs28:6 Dano ma lacan ma loko lok ada dok lagen ber kato lalonyo ma kite pe atir. 
Proverbs28:7 Latin ma gwoko cik noŋo ŋat maryek, ento ŋat ma mako larem ki dano ma laworo kelo lewic i kom wonne." 
Proverbs28:8 Ŋat ma medo lonyone ki gamo magoba ki bot jo ma gitye ki peko noŋo tye ka cokone pi ŋat ma lakica ma konyo Lucan. 
Proverbs28:9 Ŋat ma pe tero ite ka winyo lok me cik ki lubone, Rwot bene bikwero winyo legane woko." 
Proverbs28:10 Dano ma telo ŋat ma cwinye atir me timo gin marac bipoto i burre kekene; ento ŋat ma pe ki bal gibimiye lobo maber me bedo ginaleyane. 
Proverbs28:11 Dano mulony tamo ki i cwinye ni en eryek, ento dano ma lacan ma tye ki niaŋ matut neno kit ma en tye kwede." 
Proverbs28:12 Ka jo ma kitgi atir aye guloyo, ci dano gibedo ki deyo madit; ka jo maraco guille malo, dano gikanne woko akana." 
Proverbs28:13 Ŋat ma kano balle ma pe tuco, pe bimedde ki bedo ki kwo maber; ento ŋat ma tuco balle ka bwoto timogi matwal aye kica bimako Lubaŋa i kome." 
Proverbs28:14 Dano ma lworo Rwot kare ducu tye ki gum; ento can bipoto i kom dano ma pe lubo cik pa Rwot. 
Proverbs28:15 Laloc ma en dano marac ma loyo lwak jo ma gin lucan obedo calo labwor ma kok nyo ŋuu ma tye ka Iibo lee. 
Proverbs28:16 Laloc ma pe ki niaŋ matut en ŋat mager ma uno dano; ento ŋat ma kwero lim ma ginoŋo i yo ma pe atir biri i lobo pi mwaka mapol. 
Proverbs28:17 Dano ma oneko lawote, myero ginek woko bene; pe myero ŋat mo okonye." 
Proverbs28:18 Ŋat ma loko lok ada dok lagen, Lubaŋa bilaro ki i gin marac ducu; ento ŋat ma ŋak woko ma pe Lubo cik bipoto i bur." 
Proverbs28:19 Ŋat ma lapur matek twero limo cam mabup, ento ŋat ma balo karene i timo tim ma konnye pe can bimako malit." 
Proverbs28:20 Dano ma lagen bilimo gum madwoŋ, ento ŋat ma laro ni elony woko oyotoyot pe bibwot ki pwod." 
Proverbs28:21 Poko kin dano pe ber; nen, dano twero timo roc kadi pi latin kwon mo matidi." 
Proverbs28:22 Dano ma lagem laro ni en aye ebed ki lonyo, ma pe ŋeyo ni can cok bimake." 
Proverbs28:23 Ŋat ma juko dano gibibedo kwede maber lacen, en loyo ŋat ma pwoyo dano ki doge noŋo." 
Proverbs28:24 Ŋat ma yako jami pa wonne nyo pa minne kun wacci, “Gin ma atimo-ni pe bal” en aye larem ŋat ma lanek dano." 
Proverbs28:25 Dano ma laworo tugo mere daa ento ŋat ma geno Rwot bilimo lonyo madwoŋ. 
Proverbs28:26 Ŋat ma genne kene ki i tamme, meno lamiŋ; ento ŋat ma lubo ryeko bilarre." 
Proverbs28:27 Ŋat ma konyo lucan Rwot bimedo bote jami mapol, ento ŋat ma pe ye ni can tye jo mapol bicene woko." 
Proverbs28:28 Ka jo maraco guille malo, dano gikanne woko akana, ento ka doŋ guto woko, jo ma kitgi atir ginya gimedde ameda," 
Proverbs29:1 Ŋat ma gipwonyo jwijwi, ka dok pud jiŋo ŋute, bitur atura ma pe dok biromo a malo," 
Proverbs29:2 Lwak gibedo ki yomcwiny, ka jo ma kitgi atir aye tye ka loc; ento ka jo maraco aye loyo, lwak cur marac," 
Proverbs29:3 Ŋat ma maro ryeko kweyo cwiny wonne, ento ŋat ma mako larem ki dako ma lakwele balo limme ducu i tim me carocaro." 
Proverbs29:4 Kabaka ma ŋolo kop kakare miyo kuc bedo tye i lobo, ento ŋat ma gamo lim ma dano gimiye balo lobo abala." 
Proverbs29:5 Ŋat ma bwolo lawote ki lok doge meno noŋo tye ka ciko obwo ma bimako en kekene. 
Proverbs29:6 Dano ma latim marac gire moko i owic me bal ma en timo, ento ŋat ma kite atir wero mere wer dok bedo ki yomcwiny," 
Proverbs29:7 Dano ma kite atir ŋeyo gin ma myero pi ŋat ma lacan; ento dano marac pe niaŋ kit gin macalo meno wacel. 
Proverbs29:8 Jo ma luŋala gitwero tugo ayela ma miyo gaŋ Lyetti woko, ma noŋo jo maryek gikweyo megi kiniga woko akweya." 
Proverbs29:9 Ka ce dano maryek tye ka pido gin ki lamiŋ, lamiŋ meno cako tim anywar anywar ma nyero gire anyera, dok pe twero liŋ." 
Proverbs29:10 Jo ma cwinygi kuto akuta pi oyo remo pa luwotgi, gidag neno ŋat ma pe ki bal; gin jo maraco-ni giyenyo yo me rwenyo kwone woko." 
Proverbs29:11 Lamiŋ loko ki teko me dwane ducu ka kiniga omako, ento dano maryek juko kinigane motmot." 
Proverbs29:12 Ka ce dano ma laloc bedo ka winyo lok gobagoba, ci luditone ducu gilibokke gidoko jo maraco." 
Proverbs29:13 Rwot aye ma omiyo waŋ bot gin aryo-ni me neno piny, bot dano ma lacan ki bot ŋat ma uno eno" 
Proverbs29:14 Ka ce kabaka ŋolo kop atir kun paro pi lucan, ci biri ka loc matwal." 
Proverbs29:15 Ka ce ipwonyo latin ki odoo ci bimiyo en doko ryek, ento ka itenyo latin liyak ma pe ipwonyo ci bikelo lewic i wi minne." 
Proverbs29:16 Ka jo maraco aye gitye ka loc ci dano gimedde ameda ki timo bal; ento jo ma kitgi atir gibineno can ma poto i komgi. 
Proverbs29:17 Pwony latinni me bedo ki kit maber, ci ibibedo ma pe iparo gin mo; dok en bikweyo cwinyi bene." 
Proverbs29:18 Ka dano pa Lubaŋa pe ma romo pwonyo lwak, gin lwak kikomgi ginuny woko ki ŋegi, ento ŋat ma gwoko cik pa Lubaŋa tye ki gum." 
Proverbs29:19 Ka ibedo ka lok aloka keken bot laticci miyo en pe pwonnye, kadi bed en niaŋ gin ma iloko bote, pe bilubo wacel." 
Proverbs29:20 Ineno dano ma laro lok oyotoyot ma kun pe tamo gin ma etye ka wacone? Itwero bedo ki gen i kom ŋat ma lamiŋ makato eno 
Proverbs29:21 Ŋat ma miyo jamine ducu bot laticce kit macalo laticce mito nia ka tino, i agikkine binono ni latic-cu doŋ odoko lale jamine." 
Proverbs29:22 Dano ma opoŋ ki akemo kare ducu tugo mere daa nyo lweny, ki ŋat ma kinigane Lyet kelo ayela dok timo bal mapol ata." 
Proverbs29:23 Wakke miyo dano poto i can, ento dano ma bedo mwol i cwinye jo mapol gibiworo." 
Proverbs29:24 Ŋat ma lawot lakwor meno lamonene kekene pien dag kwone; kadi bed en winyo lok ma giceno ki dano, pe twero tuco lok mo" 
Proverbs29:25 Lworo ma dano tye kwede i kom jo mukene tye macalo owic, ento ŋat ma geno Rwot bedo maber laboŋo ayela." 
Proverbs29:26 Jo mapol gimito ni laloc opwogi, ento Rwot aye timo gin ma myero ki dano acel acel." 
Proverbs29:27 Dano ma ki te atir dag ŋat ma labal, dok jo maraco gidag ŋat ma bedo ki kit kwo ma atir." 
Proverbs30:1 Magi aye gin lok ma Agur wod pa Jake me Maca oloko, Dano meno waco kit man bot Itiel, bot Itiel ki Ukal:" 
Proverbs30:2 Adada an doŋ amin makato ducu, pe aromo bedo dano. Pe atye ki kit niaŋ mo wacel macalo dano." 
Proverbs30:3 Pe apwonyo lok me ryeko, dok pe aŋeyo Lubaŋa ma en ŋat Maleŋ-ŋi," 
Proverbs30:4 Aŋa ma oito i wi polo ka dok odwogo piny i lobo kany? Aŋa ma otyeko mako yamo i ciŋe-ni? Aŋa ma oboyo pii ki boŋo? Aŋa ma oketo agikki lo bo ducu ma tye-ni? Nyiŋe aŋa, ki nyiŋ latinne kono aŋa, ka iŋeyo?" 
Proverbs30:5 Lubaŋa cobo lok ma en ociko ada; en tye macalo kwot pa jo ma giriŋo gilaro bote. 
Proverbs30:6 Pe imed lok mukene ma pe en owaco i kom lokke ma en owaco, miyo en bijuki dok nyuto ka maleŋ ni in lagoba." 
Proverbs30:7 Lubaŋa, alegi imiya jami a ryo ma pud peya ato:" 
Proverbs30:8 Kwany lok me bwola ki goba woko ki i doga; pe amito imiya abed lacan nyo lalonyo; ento amito imiya cam ma romo pita. 
Proverbs30:9 Ka abibedo ki cam madwoŋ mukato kare, miyo abikweri woko, kun awacci, “Rwot en aŋa?” dok pe myero abed lacan, miyo akwalo kwo, miyo abipyedo nyiŋ Lubaŋana." 
Proverbs30:10 Pe myero inoŋ latic bot rwode, miyo biceni, d ok miyo gibinoŋo bal i komi." 
Proverbs30:11 Tye jo mukene ma giloko lok me ceno wongi dok giloko lok marac i kom megigi. 
Proverbs30:12 Tye jo mukene ma ginenne kekengi ni gitye laboŋo bal mo i komgi, ento noŋo pe gilonyogi ki i kom cilo me bal ma gitye kwede." 
Proverbs30:13 Tye jo mukene ma gilyerre kun gitamo ni gin aye giber makato, dok gikette malo i rwom me dito pigi kengi!" 
Proverbs30:14 Tye jo mukene ma Lakgi bit calo pala lucwan, lakgi calo pala, ma gineko ki Lucan gityeko woko ducu ki i lobo, gijwero bene jo ma piny obwoyogi woko ducu ki i kin dano." 
Proverbs30:15 Kwidi karadini tye ki anyirane aryo, ma gikok ni, “Miwa, miwa.” Tye jami adek ma pe twero yeŋ; tye jami aŋwen kiilu ma pe giwacci, “Oromo”:" 
Proverbs30:16 lyel, dako ma lalur, ŋom ma cwiyo pii madwoŋ, ki mac ma lyel ma pe twero waco bene ni, “Oromo.”" 
Proverbs30:17 Dano ma ŋalo wonne ki ŋat ma cayo minne, agak ma i laora kulu gibitiŋe woko dok acut bicamo kome woko." 
Proverbs30:18 Tye jami aŋwen ma abedo ki ur madit i komgi; dok pe aniaŋ kitgi, gin ene:" 
Proverbs30:19 Kit ma ocur tuk kwede ki i polo, kit ma twol mol kwede ki i kom got, kit ma mel woto kwede i dye nam madit, ki kit ma laco gin ki nyako gibedo kwede." 
Proverbs30:20 Man aye kit pa dako ma lakwele: en timo abor, lwoko kome woko, ci wacci, “An pe atimo bal mo,”" 
Proverbs30:21 Tye jami adek ma miyo lobo yenne; tye jami aŋwen kulu ma lobo kikome pe twero ciro: 
Proverbs30:22 opii ka odoko kabaka, lamiŋ ka oyen ki cam," 
Proverbs30:23 nyako ma gidagi, ka ginyomo woko, ki nyako aŋeca ka oleyo ka tyen min ot." 
Proverbs30:24 Tye jami aŋwen i wi lobo-ni ma gitiŋo, ento gitye ki ryeko madwoŋ:" 
Proverbs30:25 Ŋiniŋini pe gitek, ento gicoko cam me acamagi kare me oro;" 
Proverbs30:26 okile pe gitwoni oteka, ento kabedogi tye i kom got;" 
Proverbs30:27 bonyo pe tye ki kabaka mo ento pud gitwarre kun gilubbe aluba i dul ki dul. 
Proverbs30:28 Itwero mako lagwe i ciŋi, ento pud ibinoŋo ni lagwe tye i gaŋ pa luker," 
Proverbs30:29 Tye jami adek ma nen me deyo ka gitye ka wot; tye jami aŋwen ma gurye aryeya i rek ka giwoto: 
Proverbs30:30 labwor keken aye ma tye twon oteka makato lee mu kene ducu dok pe loko ŋeye ki lee mo wacel; 
Proverbs30:31 twon gweno ma lanywar, nyok dyel, ki kabaka ma tye ka wot ma ŋatte aŋata i nyim lwakke." 
Proverbs30:32 Ka ce onoŋo miŋ omaki, ma ibedo ka kette malo piri keni, nyo ka ibedo ka tamo gin marac, myero ijuk lebi cut." 
Proverbs30:33 Ka ipwayo cak dyaŋ ci inoŋo moo, ka imako umi idiyo matek ci remo katti cut, dok ka itugo kiniga ki i cwiny dano mo, nyayo lweny cut." 
Proverbs31:1 Magi aye lok pa Lemuel, kabaka me Maca, ma minne onwonye kwede." 
Proverbs31:2 Latinna, gin aŋo, abiwacci lok aŋo? In latinna, an aye ma anywali, dok in lagam me kwonna bot Lubaŋa," 
Proverbs31:3 Pe myero ityek tekki woko i kom mon, pe iribbe kwedgi pien gin jo ma gineko luker gityeko woko." 
Proverbs31:4 Lemuel, mat pe oporre pi luker, luker myero pe gumat koŋo vino, kadi luloc pe myero gubed ki miti me mato mat makec;" 
Proverbs31:5 ka gumato miyo wigi wil woko i kom cik ma giketo, dok bimiyo ginako pido pa jo ma gitye ki can ki gin ma myero botgi." 
Proverbs31:6 Mi koŋo vino makec bot ŋat ma doŋ cok to, ki koŋo vino bot jo ma tye ki kumo pi can malit;" 
Proverbs31:7 wek gumat ci wigi owil woko i kom cangi, wek wigi pe opo i kom cwercwiny ma gubedo kwede." 
Proverbs31:8 Lok pi jo ma doggi oto, ki pi gin ma myero bot jo ma gudoŋ woko liyak ata." 
Proverbs31:9 Lok pigi, dok iŋol kopgi atir, myero igwok lucan ki jo ma piny obwoyogi. Dako makwiri ma kite ber" 
Proverbs31:10 Aŋa ma twero noŋo dako makwiri ma kite ber? En ber kato jami me wel-gu ducu. 
Proverbs31:11 Cware keto genne ducu i kome, pi meno cware pe bibedo lacan." 
Proverbs31:12 Dako-nu timo cware maber, pe miye peko mo, pi kare me kwone ducu." 
Proverbs31:13 En tiyo tic matek ki ciŋe, kun cweyo boŋŋi me yer romo, ki mukene ma a i kom pamba." 
Proverbs31:14 En tye macalo lwak mel pa lacat, kelo camme nia ki ka mabor." 
Proverbs31:15 En a malo wa con ma piny pud wor ci miyo cam ki jo ma i ode ducu, ka dok poko tic ki aŋecane." 
Proverbs31:16 En neno lobo ci wilo woko wek epur iye olokke; man en wilo ki lim ma en onoŋo mua i kom tic matek ma en otiyo. 
Proverbs31:17 En dako ma tye ki kero ma kome mit bene i ticce, en tye ki teko ma romme tic." 
Proverbs31:18 En bene tye ka neno ni ticce me cat kelo bote magoba maber. Dok mac tarane bedo ka lyel alyela wa i dyewor-gu ducu ma pe to. 
Proverbs31:19 En wiyo ucine pire kene, dok en kikome aye cweyo boŋone." 
Proverbs31:20 En gire konyo jo ma lucan, dok bene konyo jo ma piny obwoyogi." 
Proverbs31:21 En pe tye ki lworo mo pi jo ma i ode i kare me koyo, pien jo ma i ode ducu guruko boŋo mapek me uci makwar." 
Proverbs31:22 En cweyo boŋŋi me giumme; boŋŋine ducu obedo boŋŋi camanini maberre ki ma lamar lamar. 
Proverbs31:23 Cware doŋ nene mada bot jo ma i dog gaŋ, ka obedo i kin ludoŋo me lobo." 
Proverbs31:24 Dakone cweyo boŋo nia ki kom pamba ci catogi woko; en bene poko del me tweyo pyer bot lucat. 
Proverbs31:25 En rukke ki tek kacel ki deyo, ma noŋo nyero nino ma pud tye anyim-gu ducu anyera." 
Proverbs31:26 En loko lokke ducu ki ryeko, pwony ma en pwonyo ki dano bene obedo pwony me kica." 
Proverbs31:27 En tye ka gwoko jo ma i ode i kit yo ducu ma mitte, en pe lawackom." 
Proverbs31:28 Ka litinone gua malo gilwoŋe ni lagumkom; cware bene lwoŋe ni lagumkom, dok pake matek kun wacci," 
Proverbs31:29 “Mon mapol gutyeko tiyo tic mabeco makato, ento in itiyo doŋ ma ikatogi ducu.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Pe igen dako ma labuta, ki ber kom dano konnye pe; ento myero gipak dako ma lworo Rwot aye." 
Proverbs31:31 Myero gipwoye pi tic matek ducu ma en tiyo, dok myero jo ducu guwore pi ticce magi ducu." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Man aye lok pa latit-lok, wod pa Daudi, ma obedo kabaka i Jerucalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Latit-lok owacci, konygi pe, konygi pe! Gin ducu konygi pe," 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Dano twero noŋo kit magoba aŋo ki i kom tic matek ma en tiyo dyeceŋ jwi-ni? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Yalwak me kare man kato, dok yalwak mukene teyo kakare, ento lobo bedo mere matwal." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ceŋ tuc ci cito poto, ka dok lokke oyotoyot, dok ka ma en tuc ki iye," 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Yamo kodo dok tuŋ acuc, ka dok wirre kodo dok tuŋ acam; bedo ka kodo tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi, ka dok lokke rumo piny aruma." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Pii ma opoŋ i kulu ducu mol cito i nam, ento nam pe poŋ; pii dok cen ka ma kulu ocakke ki iye, ka cako mol ki kunnu dwogo i ŋamo" 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Kom dano doŋ ool woko ki jami ducu; dano liŋ aliŋa pe twero waco lok mo’ waŋ dano pe twero yeŋ ki gin ma dano neno, kadi ki it bene pe twero yeŋ ki gin ma dano winyo." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Gin ma doŋ otyeko timme en aye gin ma bitimme bene, ki gin ma gityeko tiyo en bene gin ma gibitiyo; pi meno pe tye gin mo manyen i wi lobo-ni kulu." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Tye gin mo ma giloko pire ni, “Nen, man gin manyen”? Man otyeko timme wa con, i kare ma onoŋo pud peya ginywalowa." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Pe tye ŋat mo ma po i kom gin mutimme yam wa con, dok pe tye ŋat mo ki i kin jo ma bilubogi ma bipo i kom gin ma bitimme i kare ma pud tye anyim." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 An latit-lok onoŋo abedo kabaka ma loyo jo Icrael i Jerucalem. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Amoko tamma me yenyo dok me niyo ki ryeko gin ducu ma dano gitye ka tiyone i te polo i lobo kany. Lubaŋa omiyo tic ma kelo cwercwiny keken bot dano ma myero gubed ka tiyone. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Atyeko neno gin ducu ma gitye ka tiyone i lobo kany: aneno gin ducu konygi pe, dok gibedo calo ryemo kor yamo ma kodo." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Gin mugom pe doŋ gitwero twenyone bedo atir, dok jami ma komgi pe nen, pe gitwero kwanogi." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Aloko kekena ni, “An doŋ alimo ryeko madit makato ryeko pa luker ducu ma gukwoŋo nyima ma gubedo ka loc i Jerucalem; dok kit ryeko ki ŋec ducu doŋ atyeko ŋiyo kwede.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Aketo cwinya me ŋeyo ryeko, ki me ŋeyo apoya ki miŋo. Anoŋo ni magi ducu bene obedo calo ryemo kor yamo ma kodo." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Bedo ki ryeko madwoŋ miyo dano bedo ki cwercwiny madwoŋ bene, ŋat ma ŋecce tye ka medde meno tye ka medo cwercwiny." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Aloko kekena ni, “Bin ba, amito koŋ atem yomo cwinya wek aniaŋ kit ma yomcwiny tye kwede.” Ento anoŋo ni man bene gin ma konnye pe." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ka aloko kekena ni nyero obedo gin me apoya, ki yomcwiny obedo gin ma pe konyo." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Atamo ni my ero koŋ atem mato koŋo vino wek olyet koma, kun noŋo tamma tye ka tela ki ryeko, dok ni koŋ atem niyo ki tim me miŋo, nio wan ma aneno gin maber atika ma myero dano guti i kare manok me kwogi ma gibedo kwede i lobo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Atiyo tic matego; agero odi, ka dok apito olok.," 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Ayubo potti mabeco me yomcwiny ma gicelogi woko ki cel, ci apito iye kwa yadi ducu ma nyak ma gicamo nyiggi," 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Dok akwinyo kut ka ma pii ogurre iye me aonya i te yadi ma gitye ka doŋo i kabedo ma giyubo me buŋa. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Awilo opii ki aŋeca; ka dok abedo ki opii ma ginywalogi ki i kin jo ma i oda. Abedo ki lwak dyaŋi kacel ki romi mapol, kun akato jo ducu ma gukwoŋo nyima ma gubedo ka loc i Jerucalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Acoko lwak ryal ki jabu ki lonyo pa luker kacel ki dul lobo ma yam giloyo odoko mera. Abedo bene ki luwer ma co ki ma mon, kacel ki mon mapol mapatpat ki gin ducu ma yomo cwiny dano." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Kit meno adoko twon dano mo madit ma pe wacce, kun aloyo bene wa jo ducu ma gukwoŋo nyima ma gubedo ka loc i Jerucalem; ryekona aye obedo ka konya." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Dok gin mo keken ma amito ka waŋa oneno anoŋo; dok pe akwero gin ma yomo cwiny dano, pien anoŋo yomcwiny madwoŋ i tic ducu ma abedo ka tiyone, doŋ meno aye obedo bakacicca pi tic ma atiyo." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Lacen alokke acako niyo jami ducu ma atiyo ki ciŋa ki kit ma ayelle kwede ka tiyone, ci nen, anoŋo ni man gin ma konnye pe, rom ki ryemo kor yamo ma kodo, dok ni pe tye kit magoba mo ma dano twero noŋo i lobo." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Kit meno alokke abedo ka tamo tam matut i kom ryeko, apoya ki miŋo, Ci anoŋo ni gin mo ma ŋat ma oleyo ka tyen kabaka twero timo pe. Myero en olub gin ma kabaka ma okwono nyime otiyo." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ci cutcut aniaŋ ni ryeko ber kato miŋo macalo cen kato colpiny," 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Dano maryek neno yo ka ma ecito iye, ma noŋo ŋat ma lamiŋ woto mere i colpiny; ento kadi bed kumeno kit gin acel bipoto i ko m gin aryo-nu ducu." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ka dok aloko kekena ni, “Gin ma bipoto i kom ŋat ma lamiŋ bipoto i koma bene; ka kumeno piŋo abedo maryek twatwal?” Ci adok iye kekena ni, man bene gin ma konnye pe." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Pe tye ŋat mo ma twero po pi dano ma laryeko kadi pi lamiŋ, pien i kare ma tye anyim noŋo wi dano doŋ otyeko wil woko wa con i kom gin aryo-nu ducu. Dano maryek ki dano ma lamiŋ ducu gito i yo ma rom aroma!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Kit meno acako kwero bedo kwo, pien gin ma gitye ka tiyone i lobo-ni obedo gin ma kelo can i koma keken; pien gin ducu ma gitiyo konnye pe, rom ki ryemo kor yamo ma kodo." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Cwinya ocako kwero ticca ducu ma atiyo i lobo man, kun aneno ni jami ducu ma anoŋo myero abwot ki ŋat ma bileyo ka tyena;" 
Ecclesiastes2:19 doŋ aŋa ma ŋeyo ka ce en bibedo dano ma laryeko nyo lamiŋ? Ento en bibedo ladit ma loyo jami ducu ma yam alimo kun atiyo pigi matek, ma ayelle kwede ka tiyone kun atiyo ki ryekona i lobo man. Man bene gin ma konnye pe." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ci alokke abedo ki cwercwiny ma iya oarre woko i kom ticca ma atiyo i lobo-ni," 
Ecclesiastes2:21 pien kare mogo dano ma otiyo tic matek ki ryekone, ki ŋec ma en tye kwede dok ki kwirine ducu myero owek jamine bot dano mo ma pe otiyo tic mo liweŋ pire wek ole olony kwede labedo. Man bene gin ma konnye pe, dok gin marac twatwal." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Kit gin aŋo ma dano noŋo ki i kom ticce ducu, ki kero ma en otiyo kwede tic i lobo-ni?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Mwaka me kwone ducu opoŋ ki arem, ki ticce bene kelo bote cwercwiny keken; kadi wa i dyewor wiye pe twero ywe ki tam. Man bene gin ma konnye pe." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Doŋ gin maber makato ma dano myero otim en aye ni en myero ocam cam dok omat mat, wek onoŋ yomcwiny i tic ma en tiyo. Ento aneno ni man bene Lubaŋa aye ma omiyo;" 
Ecclesiastes2:25 pien ka Lubaŋa pe, ŋat mo pe twero camo cam dok ŋat mo pe twero noŋo yomcwiny." 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Lubaŋa miyo ryeko, ŋec ki yomcwiny bot dano ma en pwoyo; ento bot dano ma labalo en miye tic me guro jami ki durogi kacel, me amiya bot ŋat ma onoŋo pwoc ki bote. Man bene gin ma konnye pe, rom ki ryemo kor yamo ma kodo." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Kit tim acel acel tye ki karene, dok kit lok mo keken tye ki karene i lobo man:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Kare ma ginywalo iye dano, ki kare ma en bito iye; kare me pito ginapita, ki kare me puto gin ma gipito-ni woko;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 kare me neko dano, ki kare me caŋo dano acaŋa: kare me muko ot ki reto woko piny, ki kare me gerone odoco;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 kare me koko, ki kare me nyero; kare me kumo, ki kare me myel;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 kare me bolo got atata, ki kare me gurone kacel; kare me kwako lawoti, ki kare ma pe ikwako iye lawoti;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 kare me yenyo gin mo-ni, ki kare ma jami rwenyo iye arwenya; kare me gwoko gin mo-ni, ki kare me bolone woko;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 kare me yeco boŋo ki kare me kwoyone woko doki; kare me liŋ aliŋa, ki kare me lok;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 kare me maro dano, ki kare me kwero dano akwera; kare me lweny, ki kare me bedo ki kuc." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Dano ma latic-ci mono noŋo kit magoba aŋo i kom tic ducu ma en otiyo? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Doŋ atyeko neno kit tic ma Lubaŋa omiyo bot dano ma myero gubed ka tiyone. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 En oketo jami ducu maber i karegi kikome; dok oketo dano me ŋeyo kare mukato anec ki kare ma pud tye anyim, ento kadi kumeno dano pe twero ŋeyo gin ma Lubaŋa otiyo nia i acakki nio i agikki." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Aniaŋ atir ni pe tye gin mo maber pi dano makato kono bedo ki yomcwiny pi kare me kwone ducu i lobo man. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Dok aniaŋ bene ni man obedo mot ma Lubaŋa omiyo bot dano, kun mito ni dano acel acel myero ocam cam, dok omat mat-gu, dok onoŋ yomcwiny ma a i kom ticce ducu ma en tiyo," 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Aŋeyo ni gin mo keken ma Lubaŋa tiyo bedo matwal; pe gitwero medo gin mo iye, dok pe gitwero kwanyo gin mo woko ki i kome. Lubaŋa oketo obedo kit meno, wek omi dano gubed ki lworo i nyime," 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Gin ma tye ka timme-ni doŋ yam otyeko timme con; ki gin ma bitimme i anyim bene doŋ otyeko timme woko; Lubaŋa yenyo kit gin acel-lu ma yam otimme, miyo dok timme aye." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Pe meno keken, anoŋo ni i lobo man ka ma myero tim ma atir obed tye iye inoŋo tim maraco, dok bene ka ma myero dano gubed ki kit ma atir inoŋo tim maraco iye." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Abedo ka lok kekena ki i cwinya ni, Lubaŋa biŋolo kop i kom jo ma kitgi atir kacel ki lutim maraco, pien doŋ otyeko yero kare pi kit lok acel acel, ki pi kit tic ducu." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Abedo ka tamo ki i cwinya ni, Lubaŋa tye ka temo dano atema wek enyut botgi ni kadi bed gin dano ento gin rom aroma ki lee tim," 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Can ma poto i kom dano ki gin ma timme i kom lee tim ducu rom aroma; gin ducu gito woko. Gin ducu gimiyogi yweyo me kwo maromrom, dano pe bedo maber makato lee; pien gin ducu konygi pe." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Gin aryo ducu gicito i kabedo acel; pien gin ducu gua ki i apwa, dok gibidok iye aye." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Aŋa ma ŋeyo ka ce tipo pa dano cito malo i polo, nyo ka tipo pa lee donyo piny i nom?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Kit meno aniaŋ ni gin maber makato ducu ma dano twero timo en aye me yomo cwinye ki gin ma en olimo ki i ticce ma en otiyo, pien meno aye dul ma gipoko bote. Aŋa ma twero nyutte gin ma bitimme lacen i anyim ma noŋo en doŋ eto woko?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Dok aneno kit macalo jo mukene tye ka uno ki luwotgi i lobo man. Nen, jo ma giunogi gikok akoka ki pig waŋgi, pien pe gitye ki ŋat mo ma myero okwe cwinygi! Pe gitye ki ŋat mo ma konyogi, pien jo ma unogi onoŋo gitye ki twero." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Omiyo atamo ni jo ma doŋ guto woko komgi gum kato jo makwo ma pud gudoŋ gibedo i lobo-ni," 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Ento ŋat ma kato gin-nu ducu en aye dano ma pud peya ginywalo, ma peya oneno tim maraco ma gitye ka timone i lobo-ni," 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Atyeko neno bene ni tic ducu ma dano tiyo ki dirone ducu, tiyo pi nyeko ma en tye kwede i kom lawote, ni myero en aye ebed ki jami makato lawote. Man bene gin ma konnye pe, dok rom ki ryemo kor yamo ma kodo." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Dano ma lamiŋ bedo abeda ma odolo ciŋe, pi meno kec bineko nio wan ma oto." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Ka it ye ki jami manok ma romo poŋciŋ keken, kun itiyo kwede inoŋo ni it ye ki kuc i cwinyi, ber kato jami ma tye poncin aryo ma kuc pe iye mupoŋ ki tic matek, dok ma rom ki ryemo kor yamo ma kodo." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Dok aniaŋ bene ni tye gin mo mukene ma konnye pe i lobo-ni: 
Ecclesiastes4:8 tye dano ma bedo kene ma pe tye ki lareme mo, latinne mo bene pe, kadi ominne mo-gu bene pe, ento pud inoŋo ni tye ka tiyo tic matek ma pe ywe, ento ki tuŋ bote nen ni lonyo ma etye kwede-ni pud pe romme, En bene pe twero pennye kekene ni, “Tic matek ma atye ka tiyone-ni mono atiyo pi aŋa, ma geŋa woko ki noŋo yomcwiny-nyi?” Man bene gin ma konnye pe, dok gin ma pe miyo yomcwiny bot dano." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Bedo jo aryo ber kato ma dano acel obedo kene, pien gin jo aryo-nu gitwero noŋo bakacic maber ma a i kom tic ma gitiyo." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 I kin jo aryo-ni ka ŋat acel opoto piny, ci lawote ilo woko malo; ento ŋat ma bedo kene tye ki can, pien ka opoto piny pe tye ŋat mo mukene ma twero ile woko malo." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Dok ka jo aryo gubuto i kabuto acel kacel, gin ducu komgi bedo lyet, ento ka dano acel obuto i kabuto kene, ci kome twero bedo Lyet niŋniŋ?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Kadi bed dano mo twero bwoyo ŋat ma tye kene-ni, ento jo aryo kulu bwoyo en woko marac twatwal. Pe tye ŋat mo ma twero codo tol adek ma giwiyogi kacel oyotoyot." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Awobi ma lacan dok maryek ber kato kabaka muti ma lamiŋ, ma pe doŋ winyo tam ducu ma gimiye," 
Ecclesiastes4:14 kadi bed giketo en me bedo kabaka kun oa ki i mabuc nyo kadi bed ginywalo en dano ma lacan i lobo ma lacen en oloyo. 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Abedo ka tamo bene pi jo ducu ma gibedo kwo i lobo man, kadi wa awobi meno matidi-ni bene, ma oleyo kakare." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Aneno ni lwak jo ducu pe kwanne; awobi matidi ca obedo ka loyogi ducu. Ento io ma gibinywalogi lacen pe gibibedo ki yomcwiny mo i kome. Adada man bene gin ma konnye pe, dok rom ki ryemo kor yamo ma kodo." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Myero igwok kiti ka icito ka donyo i ot pa Lubaŋa; pien nyiko cok ka winyo lok pa Lubaŋa ber kato gitum ma lumiŋ gimiyo bote, pien gin pe giŋeyo ni gitye ka timo bal." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Myero koŋ ikwoŋ tamo pi gin ma imito loko ma peya iloko gin mo, pe myero ilok lok oyotoyot i nyim Lubaŋa; myero ilok manok mo keken i nyime, pien en tye wi polo, ki in it ye i lobo." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Ka ibedo ka paro par mapol ci lek bino i wiyi, ci ibedo ka lok calo lamiŋ." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Pi meno ka ikwoŋo bot Lubaŋa pe igalle, dok myero igwok kwoŋŋi; pien Lubaŋa cwinye pe yom i kom lumiŋ. Myero icob gin ma in doŋ ikwoŋo," 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Onoŋo bedo ber ka in pe ikwoŋo kwoŋ mo, kato ma ikwoŋo kun pe icobo gin ma ikwoŋo," 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Pe iwek lok ma iloko oteri ka timo bal, dok pe myero iwac bot lukwena pa Lubaŋa ni meno dogi onoŋo ocer acera. Piŋo iweko kiniga mako Lubaŋa i komi pi lok ma iloko, ma miyo en balo ticci ducu ma yam itiyo ki ciŋi-ni?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Myero ilwor Lubaŋa, kadi bed lek mapol bimedde ki bino i wiyi, ma miyo iloko lok madwoŋ ata ma konygi pe." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Pe myero ibed ki ur mo ka ce ineno ni lucan ma gitye i dul lobo mo gitye ka unogi, ma kopgi pe giŋolo atir kun gitimogi ki tim me bwami; pien tye ŋat ma tye malo makato ladit ma loyo wi lwak, dok pud tye ŋat mo ma tye malo makato gin aryo-nu ducu." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Doŋ gin maber makato ducu, en aye kabaka mo ma omiyo lobo ma en loyo gipuro dok gipito iye cam madwoŋ," 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ŋat ma maro lim, lim pe twero romone wacel; ki ŋat ma maro lonyo bene kadi bed noŋ magoba madwoŋ, pud dok wacci peya oromme. Man bene gin ma konnye pe." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ka lonyo pa dano woto ki medde, ci jo ma gicamo ciŋe bene nya gimedde ameda. Doŋ kit kony aŋo ma lalonyo-ni tye kwede? En neno lonyone anena ki waŋe keken." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Ŋat ma latic matek nino mot liywi, kadi bed camo cam man ok nyo madwoŋ ento ŋat mulony mukato kare pe nino pien bedo ka paro lonyone." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Gin marac twatwal ma aneno i lobo en aye ni dano kano lwak lonyo madwoŋ, ci lacen dok lonyo meno kelo can i komgi," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 dok lwak lonyogi meno rwenyo woko liweŋ pi gum marac. Man miyo dano doŋ ki cine noŋo laboŋo gin mo ma etwero pito ki litinone," 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Pi meno kit macalo dano yam minne onywale i lobo man ma tye munero, en bene biweko lobo-ni dok ki ciŋe noŋo laboŋo gin mo, pe bikwanyo jami mo mua i kom ticce kadi ki acel ma bimako i cine kun cito kwede." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Man bene gin marac atika: kit macalo en obino i lobo noŋo laboŋo gin mo-ni, en bene bidok noŋo kit meno. Ci doŋ dano-nu noŋo kit magoba aŋo i kom ticce ma en otiyo? Otiyo tic me mako yamo keken," 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Pi kare me kwone ducu en obedo i colpiny ki can ki cwercwiny madwoŋ mukato kare, dok ki two wa ki keccwiny." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Doŋ gin maber ma aneno ma myero dano otim en ene, en myero ocam cam dok omat mat-gu wek onoŋ yomcwiny i kom ticce ducu ma en otiyo pi kare manok me kwone ma Lubaŋa omiye i lobo-ni, pien man aye dul ma gipoko bote." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Dano acel acel ma Lubaŋa omiye lonyo, kacel ki jami madwoŋ wa ki twero me yomo cwinye ki jami magi, mito ogam dul ma gipoko ni obed mere, wek onoŋ yomcwiny i kom ticce, pien man aye mot ma Lubaŋa omiyo." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Man miyo dano pe po pi kare me kwone mukato aŋec, pien Lubaŋa tye ka miyo cwinye bedo yom kare ducu." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Atyeko neno gin marac mapek ma obwoyo kom dano ducu ma bedo i lobo-ni woko. 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Lubaŋa twero miyo bot dano mo lonyo, lwak jami mapol ata, dok miyo dano giwore, wek dano-nu obed ma gin mo ducu ma en mito pe orem bote, ento ka Lubaŋa pe omiye twero me noŋo yomcwiny i kom lwak lonyone-ni, ci dano mo ata aye binoŋo yomcwiny i kom jamine ducu; man gin ma konnye pe. Man aye can marac mukato kare." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Kadi bed dano mo onywal litino ma romo miya acel kulu, kadi en obedo i lobo pi lwak mwaka mapol, ma mwakane bene doŋ dwoŋ, ento ka pe noŋo yomcwiny mo i kom jami mabeco me lobo man, ka pe bene giketo deyo me yiko en ka oto, awaco ni latin ma ginywalo ma doŋ otyeko to woko ki i ic ber kato eno" 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Kony me nywalo latin meno pe, en cito i colpiny, ka doŋ tye i colpiny ci wi dano wil woko pi nyiŋe," 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Dok latin meno pe one no cen, pe oneyo gin mo; ento en noŋo yweyo maber makato dano meno madit-ti." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Kadi bed dano-nu ori i lobo pi mwaka alip aryo kulu, ka pe bedo ki jami mabeco i lobo man, ci gin aryo-ni ducu pe gicito i kabedo acel?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Dano tiyo ticce ducu wek enoŋ gin ma myero ecam, ento pe romo yen ki cam ma en noŋo." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Dano maryek kato ŋat ma lamiŋ niŋniŋ? Ci dano ma lacan ma ŋeyo gwoko kwone i kin’ jo makwo bedo ki gin aŋo? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Bedo ber me tic ki jami ma it ye kwede, kato ma ibedo ki par madwoŋ pi jami mukene; man bene gin ma konnye pe, rom ki ryemo kor yamo ma kodo." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Gin ma tye ka timme onoŋo doŋ gityeko cako nyiŋe con, dok waŋeyo kit pa dano ni, en pe twero pyem ki ŋat matek makato eno" 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ka dano pyem kun loko lok madwoŋ, ci lokke ducu doko gin ma konnye pe, noŋo oyelle nono." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Aŋa ma ŋeyo gin maber pi dano ma kun noŋo en obedo pi kare manok ki kit kwo ma konnye pe, pien kwone rwenyo woko macalo tipo? Aŋa ma twero tito bot dano gin ma bitimme ki i ŋeye lacen i lobo man ma noŋo en doŋ oto woko?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Bedo ki nyiŋ maber ber kato moo me wel ma ŋwece kur; ki nino me to pa dano, ber kato nino ma ginywale iye." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Bedo ber me cito i ot ka ma dano tye iye ka kumo pi to, kato ma icito i ot ma giyubo iye karama; pien to aye agikki pa dano ducu, jo makwo gibipo i lok man dok gibiketo cwinygi iye." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Cwercwiny ber kato nyero, cwercwiny miyo waŋi nen ki can ento miyo niaŋ matut bot dano." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Tam pa dano ma ryek rwatte ki tam pa jo ma gitye ka kumo i ot; ento lumiŋ tamgi rwatte ki tam pa jo ma gitye i ot ka ma ginoŋo iye yomcwiny. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Ka dano owinyo juk pa ŋat maryek ber, kato ma en obedo ka winyo wer pa lumiŋ," 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Nyero pa lumiŋ obedo gin ma konynye pe; cal ki yen okuto ma girwako i mac i te agulu dek, ma waŋ mwoc lirwatrwat." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Dano maryek ka uno dano, lokke doko ŋat ma lamiŋ, dok gamo lim me wilo dano i muŋ balo tam pa dano woko." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Agikki me jami ber kato acakkine; dok dano ma diyo cwinye ber kato ŋat ma lawakke. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Pe myero iwek kiniga omaki oyotoyot; jo ma lumiŋ aye kano kiniga i cwinygi. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Pe myero iwac ni, “Piŋo jami me kare macon mukato ‘aŋec ber makato me kare man!” Peny macalo man nyuto ni ipe ki ryeko." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Dano acel acel ma bedo i lobo mito obed ryek, pien ryeko ber macalo ŋom ma dano oleyo ki bot kwarone." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Ryeko twero gwoko dano kit macalo lim gwoko ki ŋat ma tye kwede; ryeko gwoko kwo pa ŋat maryek, man aye ber me bedo ki ŋec." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Koŋ itam pi tic pa Lubaŋa; aŋa ma twero twenyo gin ma en oketo mugom wek obed atir? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Bed ki yomcwiny i kare ma itye maber, dok i kare ma piny rac ber ipo ni, Lubaŋa aye ma omiyo dano gibedo maber nyo marac, wek dano pe oŋe gin ma bitimme lacen ma noŋo doŋ guto woko." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Anoŋo ni kwona kara konnye pe, ento kono omiyo aneno jami ducu. Dok aneno ni dano ma kite atir to pi leŋcwinye, kun dano marac ma en latim marac bedo ri nakanaka i kom timme marac-ci." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Pe myero ibed dano ma kite atir twatwal, pe bene ikette keni me bedo ryek makato. Piŋo imito nekke woko kekeni?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Dok pe myero ibed dano marac mukato kare, pe ‘ibed lamiŋ bene. Imito ni ito woko piŋo, ma pud peya kareni oromo?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Bedo ber ka imako man, ento mukene-ni, bene pe ikwany ciŋi woko ki iye; pien ŋat ma lworo Lubaŋa kwone bibedo maber i yo aryo-ni ducu." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ryeko miyo teko bot dano maryek, kato gin ma luloc apar kulu twero tiyo i gaŋ ma gitye iye." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Adada pe tye dano mo ma kite atir i lobo man, ma timo gin maber keken ma pe balo." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Pe icik iti me winyo lok ducu ma dano giwaco, miyo iwinyo lok mogo maraco ma laticci loko me yeto in:" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 in bene iŋeyo ki i cwinyi kekeni ni yam ibedo ka loko lok maraco kun iyeto ki jo mukene pi tyen mapol. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Atiyo ki ryekona me temo man ducu, kun awacci, “Abibedo ryek”; ento pe atwero, pien ryeko noŋo tye ka mabor kweda." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Gin ma doŋ tye, tye ka mabor, dok tye ka matut, ka matut adada; pe tye ŋat mo ma twero niaŋ iye." 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Aloko tamroa me ŋeyo ki me yenyo ryeko, kun amito aniaŋ ka ma ryeko twero noŋŋe iye, dok me niaŋ tyen lok me jami ducu, ci aniaŋ atir ni tim maraco aye miŋo, ki tim miŋo aye apoya kikome." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Dok anoŋo ni tye kit dako mo ma cwinye tye calo owic nyo obwo ma kelo can makato to ma cine obedo calo nyor me tweyo dano. Ŋat ma tiyo gin ma Lubaŋa mito twero bwot woko ki bote, ento ŋat ma labalo aye dako-nu twero makone." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Nen, Latit-lok owaco ni, abedo ka noŋo man motmot i kare ma atye ka yenyo tyen lok ducu," 
Ecclesiastes7:28 ma obedo ka bino i tamma teretere, ento pe amedo ki noŋo gin mo. I kin jo alip acel anoŋo iye laco acel keken aye kite yomo cwinya, ento pe anoŋo dako mo kadi ki acel i kin jo magi ducu." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Nen man gin acel keken ma anoŋo ni, Lubaŋa gire onoŋo oketo dano ma cwinygi tye atir, ento dano guyenyo tam mapol mapatpat." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Aŋa ma calo dano maryek? Dok aŋa ma ŋeyo gonyo tyen lok mo? Ryeko miyo waŋ dano ryeny aryenya, dok miyo colwaŋ me adagadaga ma: en tye kwede lokke." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Myero ilub gin ma kabaka ociko, dok pi kwoŋŋi maleŋ ma ikwoŋo pe iwek cwinyi oballe woko;" 
Ecclesiastes8:3 pe igalle a woko ki i nyime oyotoyot ka lok doŋ odoko rac, pien kabaka twero timo gin mo keken ma en mito." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Lok ma kabaka lok loko ki twero, dok aŋa ma twero waco bote ni, “In itimo aŋo?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 ŋat ma lubo cik pe birwatte ki kit peko mo, dok dano maryek ŋeyo kare, kacel wa ki yo ma myero elubi." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Kit lok acel acel tye ki karene dok ki yone, kadi bed ayela tye mapek ma obwoyo kom dano woko." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Dano pe ŋeyo gin ma bitimme i anyim, pi meno aŋa ma twero tito bote kit ma bitimme kwede." 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Pe tye dano mo ma tye ki twero me gwoko tipone, kadi ki twero me geŋo ni en pe eto ka nino me tone oromo; pe watwero nuny ki newa pi lweny man, dok tim maraco bene pe bilaro jo ma gin lutim maraco." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Man ducu an aneno kun aporo ki jami ducu ma tye ka timme i lobo, kun dano ma tye ki twero loyo jo mukene ki tek." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Lacen aneno ka giyiko lutim maraco; yam gicito gidonyo i kabedo maleŋ ka gidok woko-gu, ma noŋo dano gipakogi mada i gaŋ ka ma yam gutimo iye tim maraco ma kit meno. Man bene gin ma konnye pe." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Lubaŋa pe keto can oyotoyot i kom dano ka otimo gin marac, omiyo dano ducu guketo cwinygi atika pi timo gin marac." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Kadi bed labalo otim gin marac ma romo tyen miya acel kun medo mwaka ma myero eri kwede i lobo, ento an aŋeyo atir ni jo ma gilworo Lubaŋa aye gibibedo maber, pien gibedo ki lworo i nyime;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 ŋat ma latim marac pe bibedo maber wacel, dok bene en calo tipo, pe biri i lobo pi kare malac, pien en pe tye ki lworo i nyim Lubaŋa." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Tye gin ma konnye pe ma tye ka timme i lobo; tye jo mogo ma kitgi atir ma can poto i komgi ma myero opot i kom lutim maraco, dok tye lutim maraco mogo ma ginoŋo gum maber ma oporre pi jo ma kitgi atir. Doŋ awaco ni man bene gin ma konnye pe." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Doŋ aniaŋ maber ni gin ma mitte ma myero dano otim en aye me bedo ki yomcwiny, pien pe tye gin mo maber i lobo kany pi dano, kono camo ki mato mat-gu, ki yomo cwinye macalo etwero, pien man aye gin ma ebiwot kwede i ticce ducu ma etiyo, i kare me kwone ducu ma Lubaŋa omiye i lobo-ni," 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ka aketo cwinya me niaŋ matut i kit yo ma ryeko tiyo kwede, ki dok me neno tic ma dano gitiyo i lobo, kun aneno dano pe miyo wane pi nino i dyeceŋ kadi i dyewor," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ci aneno tic ducu ma Lubaŋa otiyo, aniaŋ ni dano kara pe twero ŋeyo gin ma tye ka timme i lobo. Kadi bed dano mo oyelle ma rom mene me yenyone, pud pe binono; dok kadi bed dano ma laryeko tamo ni eneyo, pe twero noŋone bene." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ento lok man ducu aketo i cwinya, kun aŋiyo ducu maber, kit macalo jo ma kitgi atir ki jo ma luryeko kacel ki gin ma gutiyo ducu gitye i ciŋ Lubaŋa; kono obedo mar nyo adagadaga, pe tye dano mo ma ŋeyo. Dok gin ducu ma pud tye obedo gin ma konnye pe," 
Ecclesiastes9:2 pien kit can acel bipoto i komgi ducu, bipoto i kom jo ma kitgi atir kacel ki i kom jo ma gin lutim maraco, i kom jo mabeco ki i kom jo maraco, i kom jo maleŋ ki i kom jo ma komgi ki keni, i kom ŋat ma tyero gitum ki i kom ŋat ma pe tyero gitum. Can man poto i kom dano maber ma rom aroma ma opoto i kom ŋat ma labalo; ki ŋat ma kwoŋo kwoŋ rom ki ŋat ma lworo kwoŋo kwoŋ," 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Man aye gin marac ma nen i gin ducu ma tye ka timme i lobo-ni; kit can acel bino pi jo ducu. Dok cwiny dano ducu opoŋ ki gin marac, dok apoya bene tye i cwinygi i kare me kwogi ducu, ka lacen gin bene gito woko." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ento ŋat ma oribbe ki jo makwo ducu bedo ki gen, pien gwok makwo ber kato labwor muto." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Jo makwo giŋeyo ni gibito, ento jo ma doŋ guto woko pe giŋeyo gin mo, dok bene pe doŋ gitye ki bakacic ma gibilimo, dok wi dano wil i komgi woko matwal." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Pe doŋ gitye ki dul mo ma gibinywako ki jo mukene matwal i tic ducu ma gitye ka tiyone i lobo-ni, pien mar megi ki adagadagagi kacel ki miti ma onoŋo gitye kwede ducu otyeko gik woko licwic." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Doŋ icit icam kwonni ki yomcwiny, dok imat koŋo vinoni ma noŋo cwinyi yom ata; pien Lubaŋa otyeko pwoyo gin ma itiyo." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ruk ginaruka matar kare ducu, ma pe iken wiro wii ki moo bene." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Bed ki yomcwiny kacel ki dako ma imaro, i mwaka me kwoni ducu ka pud ikwo, ki i ticci ma gimiyi ma iri kwede i lobo-ni, pien meno aye dul ma gipoko boti i kwoni ma konnye pe-ni i ticci ma it ye ka tiyone i lobo." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Kit gin mo keken ma inoŋo oye ciŋi me atiya, ti ki tekki: pien tic nyo tam nyo ŋec nyo ryeko mo doŋ pe i lyel, ka ma ibecito iye-ni," 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Dok aneno ni ŋat madwir pe loyo ŋwec, ŋat matek bene pe en aye ma loyo lweny, pe ŋat maryek aye ma noŋo kwon ma myero ecam, kadi jo ma tye ki ŋec matut pe gin aye ma ginoŋo lonyo madwoŋ, nyo jo makwiri i tic pe gin aye jo ma gipwoyogi; ento kare kacel ki gumkom poto i komgi ducu." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Dano acel acel pe ŋeyo bino pa nino ma mere. Dano obedo macalo rec ma gimakogi ki obwo pi gum marac, dok calo winyo ma gimoko i owic; dano bene gimakogi ki owic i kare marac, ma tuggi poto i komgi woko oyotoyot." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Dok bene aneno kit labol man kit macalo ryeko tye kwede i lobo, ci onen madit mada ki tuŋ bota." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Yam tye gaŋ mo matidi ki jo manok keken ma gibedo iye; ci kabaka mo madit obino omonyo gaŋ meno kun mito mayone woko, ci ocako toro cel lobo matek orumo gaŋ meno woko dyere." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Ento dano ma lacan maryek i gaŋ meno aye ma olaro gaŋ meno ki ryekone. Ento pe tye ŋat mo kadi ki acel ma wiye opo i kom dano meno ma lacan. 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ento awaco ni ryeko loyo tekkom, kadi bed gicayo ryeko pa dano ma lacan ca, dok bene ŋat ma owinyo lokke peke." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Ka iwinyo lok pa ŋat maryek mot laliŋ, ber kato ma ibedo ka winyo lok pa laloc ma daŋŋe kwede adaŋa i kin lumiŋ." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Ryeko ber loyo jami lweny, ento labalo acel keken twero balo lwak jami mabeco mapol at" 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Lwaŋo muto miyo moo wir makur kwok doko maŋwe; miŋo matidi bene balo ryeko kacel ki deyo woko kit meno. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Dano ma laryeko paro ki i cwinye me tiyo gin ma tye atir, ento ŋat ma lamiŋ paro ki i cwinye me timo gin marac." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Kadi bed inen lamiŋ tye ka wot iyo, noŋo tye ma wiye odiŋ, dok miyo en waco bot dano ducu ni en lamiŋ." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ka ce inen kiniga omako laloc magwa i komi, pe iwek kabedoni pien gitwero timo kica pi bal madito ka onoŋo ibedo giri mot laliŋ," 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Tye gin marac ma aneno i lobo obedo calo bal ma oa ki bot laloc: 
Ecclesiastes10:6 jo mamiŋ aye gimiyo gibedo i kabedo me dito, kun lulonyo gibedo i kabedo ma piny adada," 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Aneno opii aye gitye ka ŋwec ki aguragura, kun rwodi giwoto awota ki tyengi calo gin opii." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ŋat ma okwinyo bur bipoto i bur ma en okwinyo; ki ŋat ma muko kicika me ot bene twol bikayo," 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ŋat ma mukogot, got biŋolo; ki ŋat ma baro yen, yen biketo ret ikome." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ka ce latoŋ lake olu, ka pe ipako lake, myero iti ki tekoni makato; ento ryeko ber konyo dano weko ticce woto maber." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ka ce twol okayo dano ma peya won yat okweyo, latim yatyat doŋ pe bedo ki kony mo." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Lok ma dano maryek loko miyo dano gipwoye, ento ŋat ma lamiŋ loko gin ma kelo can i kome kekene." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Acakki me lokke opoŋ ki miŋo keken, lokke me agikki bene loko calo ŋat ma tye ki apoya marac." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Lamiŋ medo lok nyayo doko dwoŋ, kadi bed dano mo pe ŋeyo gin ma bibedo i anyim; aŋa kono ma twero tito bote gin ma bitimme lacen i anyim ma noŋo en doŋ eto woko?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Lamiŋ aye kome nyonne woko ki tic ma en tiyo, miyo pe ŋeyo yo ma cito i gaŋ," 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Wubineno can wun jo me lobo, ma kabakawu obedo calo latin matidi, ki rwodiwu bene gicamo karama wa odiko!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Wutye ki yomcwiny wun jo me lobo ma kabakawu odoŋo i gaŋ kal, kun rwodiwu bene gicamo cam i kare ma mitte, wek gilim teko, ento pe pi mero!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ka won ot obedo dano ma lacarcar ci wi ode ryebbe woko, dok pi wackome miyo wi ot cwer ka kot ocwer." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Cam miyo dano bedo ki nyero, ki kono vino kelo yomcwiny bot jo ma gimato, lim aye ma miyo jami ducu twero tine." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Pe ilok lok marac i kom kabaka i tammi, dok bene pe ilok lok marac i kom lulonyo ka itye i ot butoni; miyo winyo me polo tino lok ma iwaco-ni tero woko, nyo kit gin mo ma bwome tye twero tuco lok meno woko ka maleŋ," 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Cwal cammi bot jo ma tye loka nam tuŋcel, ibinoŋo iye magoba i ŋe mwaka mapol ma pud tye anyim." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Pok jamini woko i dul abiro, nyo aboro, pien pe iŋeyo gin marac ma bitimme i lobo," 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ka ce kot doŋ opoŋ i pol, ci cwer bino piny i lobo; dok ka ce yat opoto odok tuŋ acuc, nyo tuŋ acam, doŋ kabedo ma yat opoto iye-ni, en aye yat bibuto iye." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ŋat ma kuro ni koŋ enen yamo, pe twero coyo kodi i ŋom; dok ŋat ma bedo ka neno mere pol, pe bikayo gin mo." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Kit macalo pe iŋeyo kit ma latin ma i ot nyodo pa dako dokokwede gin makwo, kumeno bene pe iŋeyo tic pa Lubaŋa ma tiyo jami ducu-ni." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Co kodini i odiko, dok i otyeno bene kit meno pe ijuk ciŋi ka tic; pien pe iŋeyo mene ma bicek mabup, man nyo maca, nyo ka gwok gin aryo ducu gibibedo marom ci gicek maber." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Leŋpiny gin maber, neno ceŋ yomo cwiny dano." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Ka ce dano mo obedo i lobo ori pi mwaka mapol, myero en obed ki yomcwiny pi lwak kare magi ducu; ento wiye myero opo ni nino me colpiny bibedo dwoŋ. Gin ma bino ducu gin ma konnye pe." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Bed ki yomcwiny i kare me tinoni ma pud in awobi, lub kit gin ducu ma cwinyi mito ki gin ma waŋi oneno. Ento ber iŋe ni pi jami magi ducu Lubaŋa biŋolo iye kop i komi." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Kwany tam me par mapol woko ki i tammi, wek pe ibed ki arem i komi; pien kare me tinoni ki acakki me kwoni gir Ducu konygi pe." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 I kare me tinoni, ber ipo kom Lacwec mucweyo In, ma pud peya kare ma opoŋ ki gin marac oo, ma mwaka-gu peya onyiko cok, en i kare ma ibiwacci, “Pe atye ki yomcwiny mo i komgi”;" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 ma pud peya ceŋ ki derone, dwe ki lakalatwe gucido woko, dok pol bene pe biwarre woko ma doŋ kot otyeko cwer." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 En i kare meno bene lugwok-ot komgi bimyel, ki jo ma komgi tek gibidoko goro, ki jo ma girego kal ticgi bigik pien gin nok, ki jo ma gineno piny ki i waŋ dirica pe dok gibimedde ki neno piny." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Dok doggola me yo ducu gicego woko; ma noŋo kidi rego pe winnye matek twatwal, ki dano bia malo ka owinyo dwan winyo ma kok, ki anyira ma gin jo ma luwer ducu gibidwokogi woko piny." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Dano tye ki lworo bene pi gin ma tye malo, ki pi gin marac ma twero poto i komgi; ki yat yaa bene tye ka turu, ocene tye ka lak alaka ento dano pe doŋ tye ki miti mo; pien dano cito gire i gaŋŋe ka ma ecibedo iye matwal, kun jo ma tye ki kumo giwoto i yo gudo." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Myero wii opo ni nyor me ryal bicot woko, dok atabo me jabu to ŋinnye woko, nyo agulu pii to woko i waŋ it, nyo gituro lawala woko ki tuŋ wiye," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 ki apwa bene dok i kom ŋom ka ma yam oa ki iye, ki cwiny dano dok “bot Lubaŋa ma yam omiyo-ni." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Konnye pe, konnye pe adada, Latit-lok ma waco; man ducu konnye pe," 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Medo i kom ryeko, Latit-lok bene opwonyo lwak ki gin ma en ŋeyo, ma pimo dok ŋiyo matut, ka doŋ ocano carolok ducu kikore kun gwokke matek." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Latit-lok otemo noŋo lok ma kweyo cwiny dano, ci en ocoyo lok me ada ki cwiny ma tye atir." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Lok ma dano maryek waco ducu obedo macalo dim, dok calo cumar ma giguro odonyo matek, en gin lok ma Lakwat acel loko." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Latinna, tye dok gin mo ma amedo i kom magi ma myero igwokke iye. Coyo buk mapol pe gik, dok kwan twatwal mukato kare olo kom dano noŋo." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Man aye agikki me, lok meno; lok ducu doŋ jo gutyeko winyone. Lwor Lubaŋa dok ilub cikke ducu;" 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Lubaŋa biŋolo kop pi kit tim ducu ma watiyo, wa ki gin ducu ma watimo i muŋ, kadi ber nyo rac." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Man wer pa Solomon ma yomo cwiny makato wer ducu. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Kono ikwako kora ki badi, mar meri ma it ye kwede i koma lim makato koŋo mamit." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Moo me wir meri kur adada, ka awinyo gilwoŋo nyiŋi ci wiya po piri; pi meno anyira ducu gimari." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Wek alub kori, ci wawot wacit woko oyotoyot; in kabakana tera wa i kicikani. Wabibedo ki yomcwiny ka it ye kacel kwedwa; wabidwori pi mar meri makato koŋo mamit ma wamato. Jo ducu gimari pien in imyero." 
SongOfSongs1:5 An acol matek, aber kwede, wun anyira Jerucalem; anen mwonya mada calo kema pa jo Kedar, anen maber calo boŋŋi me kicika pa Solomon." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Pe myero wucik waŋwu wunena pi raŋi del koma-ni, pien lyeto me ceŋ ocido koma woko. Kiniga omako omegina i koma, guketo an abedo ka tic i potti olok; ento pe abedo ki kare me tic i poto olokka an kikoma." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Titta, in ma amaro ki c winya ducu, ibitero romini ka cam tuŋ kwene? Gibiywe kwene i dyeceŋ? Imito abed macalo ŋat ma lak alaka piŋo i kin romi pa lukwat luwoti?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Ka pe iŋeyo, in nyako ma nen mwonya makato mon ducu-ni, cit ilub kor romi, wek inoŋ ka cam pa dyegini ka ma cok ki kema pa lukwat." 
SongOfSongs1:9 In nyako ma amaro, apori ki min aguragura ma riŋo ki gadigadi pa Parao." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Iruko ruk me deyo i iti ryoryo ducu ma miyo inen mwonya mada, iruko jami me wel-gu ma girubo ki tol i ŋuti." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Wabiyubo ruk me deyo kijabu piri, ma tiko ŋutte ducu bedo me ryal keken." 
SongOfSongs1:12 I kare ma kabaka obedo i ka yweyo, moona ma ŋwece kur ocako duny ma ŋwece otyeko piny woko." 
SongOfSongs1:13 En ŋat ma amaro-ni pire tek bota macalo pi adomo moo makur, ma aketo i kora." 
SongOfSongs1:14 En ŋat ma amaro-ni pire tekka calo pi ature me tim ma turu maber adada ma turu i potti olok ma tye i Engedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Nen, in ma amaro-ni inen mwonya mada; dok waŋi ryeny aryenya macalo komamam." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Nen, in ma amaro-ni, inen ber adada, adada neni yomo cwinya matek. Wabibuto i wi lum ma pud olot alota;" 
SongOfSongs1:17 jaŋ yadi me cedar aye bibedo rii me otwa, bao me ciprec aye bibedo kwori me dan ot." 
SongOfSongs2:1 An acal ki ature ma i bar Caron, nyo leŋa ma aturene kwar ma maro twi i nota." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Nyako ma amaro-ni rom ki ature leŋa ma odoŋo i kin okuto, i kin anyira luwote." 
SongOfSongs2:3 En laco ma amaro-ni calo yat acuga ma i kin yadi ma i buŋa, ka aporo ki co mukene. Amaro bedo i te tipone, ki kome bene noŋo lim alima i doga." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Okelo an i ot me karamane, ki benderane ma en otiŋo pira aye mar." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Miya acam olok mutwo-gu, dok wek acam acuga wek koma olim tek; pien mar omiya adoko latwo kombeddi." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Kono ateno wiya i kom ciŋe ma lacam, kun en noŋo okwaka ki ciŋe lacuc." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Acikowu matek, wun anyira Jerucalem, ki nyiŋ bure ki til me tim, ni pe wuco nyako ma amaro nio ka kare oromo." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Awinyo dwan laco ma amaro-ni. Nen, en tye ka bino, tye ka riŋo ariŋa ki i wi godi, tye ka riŋo ki i wi cere-gu laro tuŋ bota." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Laco ma amaro-ni obedo calo bure, nyo calo twon til Nen, en ocuŋ i ŋe celwa ca, ociko wane tye ka neno piny ki i wan ot, dok obedo ka nena ki i wan dirica." 
SongOfSongs2:10 En laco ma amaro-ni loko kweda kun wacci, “A ibin, in ma amaro, in nyako maber atika, bin waciti." 
SongOfSongs2:11 “Nen, kare me cwir doŋ okato ki kot bene ocok woko matwal." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Ature doŋ ocako turu i lobo, kare me wer doŋ en, akuri tye ka koko ma dwane winnye wa i pottiwa." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Oduro ocako nyako nyige, ki olok bene tye ka turu; ŋwec aturene tye ka duny makur. A ibin, in ma amaro-ni, laber-ri, bin wacit kacel kwedi." 
SongOfSongs2:14 In ikanne calo akuri i kin got mubar i ka-kanne ma tye i kor got ma wiye bit: wek anen waŋi ma neno ber-ri do, dok awiny dwani mamit twatwal-li." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Wumak too ducu, too matinone, ma pud peya gubalo olokwa woko ma doŋ tye ka turu-ni.”" 
SongOfSongs2:16 Laco ma amaro-ni mera kikome ki an bene a mere. En kwayo romine i kin lena ma oturu. 
SongOfSongs2:17 Lokke idwogi, in laco ma amaro-ni, calo bure nyo wod til ma pud tidi ma tye i wi godi, nio wan ma yamo me odiko ocako kodo manic, ki nio waŋ ma colpiny doŋ pe." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Abuto anino i kabutona dyewor, abedo ka leko lek i kom en ma amaro-ni: abedo ka yenyone, ento pe amedo ki noŋe; alwoŋo en, ento en pe ogamo doga." 
SongOfSongs3:2 “Abia kombeddi acito arumo gaŋ woko, abiwoto wa i dye gudo-gu ki wa i dye bar-gu: abibedo ka yenyo en ŋat ma amaro ni.” Ayenye, ento pe amedo ki none." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Lukur-piny ma onoŋo gitye ka wot me loŋo dye gaŋ gunoŋa, Ci an apenyogi ni, “Wuneno en ŋat ma amaro-ni?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 I kare ma akato lukur-piny manok, ci atugi noŋo en ma amaro-ni woko cut. Akwako kore, ma pe onoŋo atwero weko en ni ocit ka mo nio ka akelo en wa i ot pa maa, wa i kicika ot pa maa munywala-ni." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Acikowu matek, wun anyira Jerucalem, ki nyiŋ bure ki til me tim, ni pe wuco nyako ma amaro nio ka kare oromo." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Meno gin aŋo ma oa ki i tim ma tye ka bino-ni, calo yito ma duny ma a ki i mac ma giwaŋo kwede murra ki odok eceta, dok calo gin ma ŋwecgi kur-gu ducu ma lucat-wil gicato?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Nen, gitye ka tino kitara maber pi Solomon; jo ma gin oteka lweny ma romo pyerabicel aye gurumo, co ma gin oteka lweny ma i Icrael’" 
SongOfSongs3:8 Gin ducu jo makwiri i tic ki pala lucwan-gu, dok guŋiyo ki lweny, Dano acel acel i kingi tye ki pala lucwanne ma otweyo i eme, ma doŋ gikuro gin mo keken ma timme i wor." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Gitiŋo kabaka Solomon ki kitara ma giyubo ki bao mabeco adada me yadi me Lebanon. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Wir ma oketo pi lagon wiye ma ocuŋ, en otiyo ki ryal, ŋeye otiyo ki jabu, ki kabedone oumo ki boŋo ma obedo lamar lamar. Ki tuŋ iye gidero maber twatwal, ma anyira Jerucalem aye guyubo pi cwiny me mar ma gitye kwede." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Wun anyira Cion, wubin wunen kabaka Solomon. En oruko lalukana ma minne oketo i wiye i nino ma onyomo iye dakone, i nino ma en obedo kwede ki yomcwiny madw" 
SongOfSongs4:1 Nen, inen mwonya matek, in nyako ma amaro, pien in iber adada! Waŋi tye ka ryeny arvenya ki i ne kitambara me wii, Yer wii ocuŋ lijur calo lwak dyegi, ma giwoto gicito piny i kor got Gilead." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Laki tar calo megi romi matar ma giŋolo yer komgi woko, calo megi romi ma pud gia ka lwoko alwoka, Gin ducu gigwaro rut keken, pe tye mo acel i kingi ma orwenyo." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Del dogi kwar calo uci makwar, dok bedo me yomcwiny mada me winyo lok ma iloko. Lemi ducu noŋo opoŋ woko calo nyig pomegranat ma gipoko iye i dul aryo, ma nen ki i ŋe kitambara me wii." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Ŋuti bor calo ot pa Daudi ma wiye ocudo malo, ma gigero pi kano jami lweny, ma giŋabo iye kwodi ma romo alip acel kulu, ma gin ducu kwodi pa oteka lweny." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Tunoni ryoryo ducu nen calo bure aryo, calo litino til aryo ma gin rudi, ma gitye ka cam i kin lena ma oturu." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Abibedo i wi got me murra, ki i wi cere me odok luban, nio waŋ ma yamo me odiko ocako kodo maŋic, ki nio wan ma colpiny doŋ pe." 
SongOfSongs4:7 In inen mwonya mada, nyako ma amaro, pe it ye ki gin mo marac i komi." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Waa woko kwedi ki i wi got Lebanon, in nyako ger ma mera; waa woko kwedi ki i Lebanon. Lor ibin piny ki i wi got Amana, ki i got Cenir ki got Kermon, ka ma lwak labwor ki kwac gibedo iye," 
SongOfSongs4:9 Ka aneno waŋi, in gin amarana ki nyako ger ma mera, kadi ki nyig tiko acel i kom gin-ŋut ma iruko-ni, otyeko lok ki i cwinya woko liweŋ." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Mar ma ibedo kwede i koma miya yomcwiny madit, in gin amarana ki nyako ger ma mera, mar ma it ye kwede i koma kato kono mamit woko, dok ŋwec mooni kur kato aŋwece makur ducu." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Nyako ma amaro, dogi lim calo kic, lok ma iloko mit bota calo cak ki moo kic. Ŋwec boŋŋini dunv makur calo ŋwec got me Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Nyako ger ma mera ma amaro, en poto me muŋ, poto ma girumo woko ki cel, wan it ma gimwono woko maber." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Ginapita doŋo kunnu maber atika. Gidoŋo-calo yadi pomegranat ma ginyako nyig mabeco makato ducu, ki ature makur ki yadi me moo ma ŋwece kur," 
SongOfSongs4:14 moo ki lena ki lum ma ŋwecgi kur ki yadi me odok luban, murra ki moo ma ŋwece kur: ki kit yadi ducu mapatpat ma ŋwecgi kur." 
SongOfSongs4:15 En waŋ it ma piine bido ŋom ma i poto, ma piine gunnye molamola, ma mol a ki i kom got Lebanon cito piny i ora kulu." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Co woko, in yamo me tuŋ acam, inyamo me tuŋ acuc bene ibin, ikod i potona; wek ŋwec yamone obed makur ma duny o wa ka mabor. Wek laco ma amaro-ni obin i potone ocam kit nyig yadi ducu mabeco ma iye mito." 
SongOfSongs5:1 An doŋ atyeko bino i potona, In gin amarana, nyako ger ma mera. Atye kapwono murra ki aŋwece, atye ka camo moo kicca ki i peda kic: atye ka mato koŋo vinona kacel ki cak ma mera. Wun lurema, wumat mat, mo waŋ ma mar oromowu!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Abedo ka nino, ento cwinya bedo ka lwodo lok. Awinyo en ma amaro-ni ka dwono doggola. “Yabba doggola do in gin amarana, nyako ma amaro ma yomo cwinya, in ileŋ calo akuri, pe tye gin marac mo i komi. Toyo odyako wiya woko, ki lupu ma duny i dyewor bene omwono yer wiya woko.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 “Doŋ atyeko lunyo boŋona woko imito dok aruk aye? Doŋ atyeko lwoko tyena woko bene imito dok anywangi woko ki ŋom? 
SongOfSongs5:4 En ma amaro-ni orwako ciŋe i waŋ kika, ci cwinya opoto nilik." 
SongOfSongs5:5 I kare ma aa ka yabo doggola bot en ma amaro-ni, ci ciŋa odyak woko ki moo murra lweta-gu odyak woko ki pig murra maliyo, i kom lalor ma gimako ka giyabo kwede doggola." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ayabo doggola bot en ma amaro-ni, ento anoŋo ni doŋ olokke ocito woko. I kare ma nene en oloko-ni tipo koma oto woko lirut, Ayenye twatwal ento pe amedo ki none: alwoŋo bene kwe, pe ogamo doga." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Lukur-piny ma gubedo ka loŋo dye gaŋ gunona; gugoya dok guketo ret i koma, lukur-piny meno ma gikuro cel me gaŋ gulunyo boŋona lagen koyo woko ki i koma."
