SongOfSongs5:8 Acikowu matek, wun anyira Jerucalem, ka wunoŋo en ŋat ma amaro-ni, wutitte ni mar kombeddi omiya adoko latwo." 
SongOfSongs5:9 In nyako maber ma nen mwonya makato anyira ducu-ni, tittiwa kit ŋat ma imaro-ni. Kit gin aŋo ma miyo gitwero bedo ki ur pire, ma omiyo icikowa kuman-ni?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 En ŋat ma amaro-ni nen maber dok lome kwar, en ber kato jo alip apar." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Yer wiye boco dok ominne amina yeme col calo kom okur, tye me wel makato jabu woko." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Waŋe nen calo kom akuri ma tye i ŋet waŋ it ma piine mol, ginen calo akuri ma gikwan i cak, nyo ki di me wel ma gimwono maber," 
SongOfSongs5:13 Leme obedo calo poto ma gipito iye yat aŋwece, ma ŋwece kur mada, Doge nen maber calo ature leŋa, ma moo murra tye ka mol ki iye." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Bade calo jabu ma giluŋo adunu, en oruko jami me wel-gu, Kome pwot calo kom lak lyec, ma gideyo ki kidi capir." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Tyene obedo calo wir mapwot, ma gicibo i kom got ma gideyo ki jabu. Kite nen calo got Lebanon, ma nen maber mada ki yat cedar mabecone." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Lok ma en loko winnye ma mit twatwal, ki gin mo keken ma dok i kome yomo cwinya matek. Man aye ŋat ma amaro-ni ma en larema, wun anyira Jerucalem." 
SongOfSongs6:1 In nyako maber ma nen mwonya makato anyira ducu-ni, en ŋat ma imaro-ni kono ocito kwene? En olokke odok yo tuŋ kwene? Wacwa, wek wakonyi ki yenyone." 
SongOfSongs6:2 En ma amaro-ni ocito odok gire yo tuŋ piny i potone, ka ma yadi ma ŋwecgi kur doŋo iye. En tye ka kwayo romine i poto, en tye bene ka pwono ature lena." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Laco ma amaro-ni mera kikome ki an bene a mere. En kwayo romine i kin lena ma oturu. 
SongOfSongs6:4 In nyako ma amaro iber calo gaŋ Tiŋa, inen mwonya mada calo gaŋ Jerucalem, inen lik calo buca mony ma gutiŋo bendera." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Lok waŋi cen pe inena, pien miyo apari mada. Yer wii ocuŋ lijur calo lwak dyegi, ma giwoto’ gicito piny i kor got Gilead." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Laki tar calo megi romi matar ma giŋolo yer komgi woko, calo megi romi ma pud gia ka lwoko alwoka. Gin ducu gigwaro rut keken, pe tye mo acel i kingi ma orwenyo." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Lemi ducu noŋo opoŋ woko calo nyig pomegranat ma gipoko iye i dul aryo, ma nen ki i ŋe kitambara me wii." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Mon ker welgi romo pyerabicel ki mon aŋeca welgi pyeraboro, ki anyira doŋ welgi pe kwanne." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Ento nyako ma amaro en ŋat acel keken ma nen mwonya mada calo akuri. En latin nyako acel keken bot minne, en latin ma kite ber ma minne maro’ adada. Anyira ducu ginene ci gilwoŋe ni layomcwiny lwak mon ker ki mon aneca-gu giwero wer me pako eno" 
SongOfSongs6:10 “Man aŋa ma nen calo rupiny-nyi? En nen mwonya mada calo dwe ma ryeny, dok calo cen ma ryeny maleŋ, ma nen lik calo buca mony ma gutiŋo bendera.”" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Acito i poto ka ma gipito iye yadi ma nyak nyiggi calo yaa, ka aneno ginapita ma pud doŋo adoŋa ma tye i nota, dok acito ka neno ka olok doŋ ocako luro me keto nyige, ki me neno ka yadi pomegranat doŋ turu." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ma pud peya onoŋo ayubbe, abedo ka tamo ni wabedo kwedi atena i gadigadi me ker. Wer pa anyira me Jerucalem" 
SongOfSongs6:13 Dwog cen, dwog cen, in nyako me Culam, dwog cen, dwog cen, wek waneni. Wer pa lanyom Piŋo wumito neno nyako me Culam, kun myelo i nyim dul lumyel aryo ducu?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Tyeni ma iruko war iye-ni ber rommene, in nyako ma nen calo daker! Emi nen muluŋŋe calo tiko ŋut maber, ma bedo calo gin ma ladiro aye otiyo." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Peni obedo kiluka calo ŋut opoko ma gipiko iye koŋo vino mamit jwijwi. Ii obedo calo ŋano ma giduro kacel, ma ature lena orumo woko dyere." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Tunoni obedo calo litino til ma ginywalogi rudi, dok obedo calo litino bure aryo." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Ŋuti otonne calo wir lak lyec ma ocudo malo likuŋ, Waŋi nen calo kut ma i Kecibon, ma cok ki dog gaŋ me Bat-rabim. Umi ber calo lubele me Lebanon, ma okemo Damaciko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Wii omiyo inen maber calo got Karmel, yerre olot muluk ma nen maber calo boŋo ma obedo lamar lamar; pi neno ber me yer wii omiyo kabaka odoko macalo lamabuc." 
SongOfSongs7:6 In iber, inen mwonya mada, in nyako ma amaro adada imiyo abedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ." 
SongOfSongs7:7 In icalo yat otit, dok tuno ma i kori obedo calo tuga otit." 
SongOfSongs7:8 An awacci abiito yat otit ci amako jaŋe apwono nyige, Ki tuŋ bota tunoni nen calo tuga nyig olok, ki yweyo me dogi kur calo yat ma ŋwece kur," 
SongOfSongs7:9 lok ma a ki i dogi bene winyone mit rom ki koŋo vino mamit adada. Ka imato imwonyo cito i ii mapwot, ma kato ki i dogi ki i kin laki-gu." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Laco ma amaro-ni mera kikome, mitine ducu tye i koma." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Bin, in ma amari-ni, wek wacit kacel kwedi i potoni, ka doŋ wabibuto i dyewor i gaŋi ma tye kunnu." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Wabia malo wa con wacito i potti olok, wek wacinen ka ce olok doŋ ocako luro me keto nyige, dok me neno ka ce olok doŋ turu, me neno bene ka yadi pomegranat doŋ turu. Abinyuto mar mera boti ki kunnu." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Ŋwec yat nyodo tye ka duny makur, ki yadi mabeco ducu ma i ŋet doggolawa gutyeko nyak woko, In ma amaro agwoko nyig yadi ma yomo cwiny piri, maconne kacel ki manyenne" 
SongOfSongs8:1 Kono yam ibedo omera, ma idoto cak ki i tuno pa maa. Ka onoŋo arwatte kwedi i gudo, onoŋo atwero noto lemi ma ŋat mo pe twero caya." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Onoŋo atwero telo wii ateri i ot pa maa, wa i kicika pa en maa munywala-ni. Onoŋo atwero mini kono yino ma ŋwece kur imato, ki kono me pig nyig pomegranat mera." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Kono ateno wiya i kom ciŋe ma lacam, kun en noŋo okwaka ki ciŋe lacuc." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Acikowu matek, wun anyira Jerucalem, ni pe wuco nyako ma amaro nio ka kare oromo." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Meno aŋa ma oa ki i tim ma tye ka bino-ni, ma ojeŋŋe i kom laco ma en maroni? Acoyo in i kare ma it ye i te yat acuga, en i kabedo ma meni onywali iye ki arem madwoŋ-ŋi, i kabedo meno meni munywali-ni obedo iye ki arem madwoŋ," 
SongOfSongs8:6 Myero imar an keken ki cwinyi ducu, dok itiŋa i badi macalo gin ma meri kikome; pien mar tek calo to, ki nyeko bene ger calo lyel. Meny calo leb mac ma lyel, leb mac ma lyel ki tek makato ducu." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Pe tye pii mo kadi opoŋ madit ma twero balo mar woko, kadi lalele ma mol matek pe twero mwonyo mar woko. Ento ka dano mo otemo wilo mar ki lonyone ducu ma en tye kwede i ode, jo gibicaye matek makato." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Watye ki laminwa matidine, tunone pud peya ogulo. Wabitimo gin aŋo pi laminwa-ni, i kare ma awobi mo bilok kwede kun mito ni enyom?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Ka nen laminwa obedo macalo cel gaŋ, onoŋo watwero yubo lubele me ryal ma ocudo malo likuŋ i kome. Ka en obedo macalo doggaŋ, watwero lorone ki bao me yat cedar." 
SongOfSongs8:10 An abedo macalo cel, doŋ tunona gubedo calo wi cel ma ocudo malo. En ŋat ma mara-ni doŋ ŋeyo, atir ni an ŋat ma kelo kuc," 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomon yam tye ki poto olokke i kabedo ma gilwoŋo ni Baal-amon. En oyero lupur me gwoko poto olokke; ma dano acel acel myero ocul bo te lim me ryal alip acel pi olok mucek iye. 
SongOfSongs8:12 At ye ki poto olok ma mera kikoma ma tye pira kena; in Solomon, itwero gamo giri lim me ryal alipacel-li; ki lupur ma gigwoko olokki ibimiyo botgi lim me ryal miya aryo." 
SongOfSongs8:13 In ma ibedo i potti, luwota gimito winyo dwani; lok wek awiny." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Bin bota oyotoyot, in ma amaro-ni, bed calo bure nyo calo wod til ma bedo i wi godi ka ma yadi ma ŋwece kur doŋo iye." 
Isaiah1:1 Man aye lok ma Lubaŋa onyuto bot Icaya wod pa Amoj mukemo Juda ki Jerucalem i kare pa Ujia, Yocam, Akaj ki Kejekia ma gubedo luker me Juda." 
Isaiah1:2 Koŋ iwiny, in polo, ter iti in lobo; pien Rwot doŋ oloko ni, “Apito litino awobe, amiyo gudoŋo, ento doŋ gujemo woko i koma," 
Isaiah1:3 Twon ŋeyo rwode, kana ŋeyo ka ma rwode miye iye cam’ ento Icrael pe ŋeyo, lwakka pe giniaŋ.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Oii, rok ma lubalo, gubedo jo ma bal onurogi woko, likwayo pa lutim tim maraco, litino ma kitgi doŋ oballe woko! Doŋ gubwoto Rwot woko, gicayo ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael bene, gupokke kweda woko, gudok cen matek." 
Isaiah1:5 Piŋo pud dok wumito gimedde ki goyowu? Dok wumedde ameda ki jemo piŋo? Wunen bur doŋ oromo wiwu woko ducu, cwinywu bene doŋ odoko nyap." 
Isaiah1:6 Cakke ki i tyenwu piny o kwede wa i wiwu malo, ka mo maber pe kadi ki acel; ret ki bur dwoŋ iye ata, ma waŋ ret mogo bene remone pud tye ka cwer acwera; pe gibiyo tut ki iye, dok bene pe gitweyo waŋ rette, pe gibido bene ki moo." 
Isaiah1:7 Lobowu odoŋ nono, gaŋiwu ducu doŋ giwaŋo woko ki mac: lurok gumayo lobowu woko ma wun bene wuneno, lobowu odoŋ nono, rom ki lobo ma lurok guyako." 
Isaiah1:8 Guweko gaŋ me Cion odoŋ calo bolo ma giweko i poto olok, dok calo ka gony ma giweko i poto okono, calo gaŋ ma lumony doŋ gutyeko rumone woko." 
Isaiah1:9 Kono nene Rwot me mony pe oweko dano mogo gudoŋ, kono wabedo calo Codom, kono doŋ wadoko calo Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Wuwiny lok pa Rwot, wun luloc me Codom! Wuter itwu wuwiny pwony pa Lubaŋawa, wun jo Gomora!" 
Isaiah1:11 Gitumwu ma wutyero mapol kit meno-ni kono, konnye ŋo ki bota? Man Rwot aye owaco; nyogi romiwu ma wutyero me gitum awaŋa-ni doŋ oroma woko, kacel ki moo dwolo me limwu makwo ma gucwene; cwinya pe mito remo twoni, kadi remo nyogi romi nyo remo nyogi dyegi." 
Isaiah1:12 Ka wubino i nyima, aŋa muwaco botwu kono ni wunyon dyekalla?" 
Isaiah1:13 Pe wumedde ki kela gitum ma konnye pe bota, yito odok eceta ma ŋwece kur odoko gin me kwer mada ki tuŋ bota. Por dwe, cabit, ki lwoŋo dano i cokke, pe atwero ciro balwu i cokkewu madito me wora." 
Isaiah1:14 Por dwe mewu ki ninowu madito ma yam giciko pigi, gin ducu cwinya dagi; gudoko ter mapek twatwal bota, aol woko doŋ ki tinogi." 
Isaiah1:15 Ka wutaŋo ciŋwu, abiumo waŋa woko pe anenowu: kadi bed wulega tyen mapol ata, pe abiwinyo legawu wacel; pien ciŋwu obedo remo keken." 
Isaiah1:16 Koŋ wulwokke woko, wubed maleŋ, wubol timwu maraco woko cen ka mabor wek pe dok obed ka nen i nyima; wuwek doŋ timo gin marac," 
Isaiah1:17 wupwonnye me timo gin maber. Wulub ŋolo kop atir, wukony jo ma giunogi; wular litino ma wongi pe, dok wupid pi mon ma coggi oto." 
Isaiah1:18 “Wubin koŋ kombeddi, wek walar lok kacel, Rwot ma owaco; kadi bed doŋ balwu kwar ma rom mene, bidoko matar calo pee; kadi bed kwar calo pala, bidoko calo yer romo matar." 
Isaiah1:19 Ka ce wuye lok, ma wutye ki winy, ci wubicamo gin mabeco ma ocek i lobo." 
Isaiah1:20 Ento ka wukwero kun wujemo woko, pala lucwan bityekowu woko; pien man Rwot kikome aye ma owaco.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Gaŋ ma yam genne doŋ odoko malaya adada, gaŋ ma yam ŋolo kop ma atir tye iye-ni! Kit ma atir bene onoŋo tye iye, ento kombeddi doŋ opoŋ ki nek keken." 
Isaiah1:22 Ryalwu doŋ rom aroma ki cette, koŋo vinowu doŋ orubbe woko ki pii." 
Isaiah1:23 Rwodiwu ducu doŋ gudoko lujemo, gudoko bene lurem lukwo. Dano acel acel i kingi maro lim me wil i muŋ, cwinygi tye mere me noŋo mot keken. Pe giparo pi litino kic ma wongi pe, pido pa mon ma coggi oto pe o i nyimgi." 
Isaiah1:24 Meno omiyo Rwot, ma en Rwot me mony, Rwot ma en Won Twer me Icrael, owaco ni, “Oromo doŋ, cwinya doŋ bikwe i kom jo ma daga, abiculo kwor i kom lukworra." 
Isaiah1:25 Abilokke dok alwenyo i komgi; abitwako cet ryalwu ducu, abiliyo woko, abigwaro kit rac mo woko liweŋ ki i komwu." 
Isaiah1:26 Abidwoko luŋolkopwu gibedo kit macalo yam tye con, ki jo ma miyo tam botwu bene bedo kit macalo yam tye wi ati. Lacen gibilwoni ni in gaŋ ma kite atir, gaŋ ma genne.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Gibikoko Cion ki ŋolo kop atir, jo ma bedo iye ma giŋut gibikokogi pi kit ma atir." 
Isaiah1:28 Ento jo ma lujemo ki lubalo gibinekogi woko kacel, ki jo ‘ma bwoto Rwot woko, gibityekogi woko liweŋ." 
Isaiah1:29 Pien lewic bimakowu pi yadi kworo, ma cwinywu yom iye-ni: alee bitwodowu pi potti ma yam wuyerogi." 
Isaiah1:30 Pien wubidoko macalo kworo ma pote oner woko, dok bene macalo poto ma pii pe iye." 
Isaiah1:31 Dano matek bidoko calo lum mutwo ka mac ogudo, ki ticce bene bibedo cal ki mac ma mwoc kirre malo; gin aryo ducu gibiwan kacel, kun noŋo pe dok tye ŋat mo ma neko mac ki i komgi." 
Isaiah2:1 Man aye lok ma, Lubaŋa onyuto bot Icaya wod pa Amoj mukemo Juda ki Jerucalem." 
Isaiah2:2 Man bitimme i kare ma pud tye anyim: got me ot pa Rwot bicuŋ macalo got mabor makato godi ducu, borre bikato cere ducu; rok ducu gibimol gicito iye," 
Isaiah2:3 dok lwak lurok mapol gibibino gibiwacci, “Wubin, waitu i wi got pa Rwot, i ot pa Lubaŋa pa Yakobo; wek en opwonywa kit mere, ka wek walub yo mere.” Pien cik bia ki i Cion, lok pa Rwot bia ki i Jerucalem." 
Isaiah2:4 En biŋolo kop i kin rok mapol, dok biŋolo kop pa lwak rok mapol; gibiteto pala lucwangi doko lak kweri dyaŋ, ki toŋigi doko pala me ŋolo jaŋ olok; rok mo pe bitiŋo pala lucwan i kom rok wadigi, pe doŋ gibimedde ki pwonyo lweny." 
Isaiah2:5 Wun jo me ot pa Yakobo wubin wacitu kun ceŋ pa Rwot ryeny menyowa. 
Isaiah2:6 Pien in Rwot iweko lwakki woko ata, ibwoto jo me ot pa Yakobo, pien lutyet ma gua tuŋ wokceŋ gupoŋ iye mada, ki lutak dano macalo jo Piliciti, gitye ka yoko ciŋgi ki lurok." 
Isaiah2:7 Lobogi opoŋ ki ryal ki jabu, lonyogi pe twero tum; aguragura bene dwoŋ twatwal i lobogi, gadigadi lwenygi bene pe twero tum." 
Isaiah2:8 Cal jogi dwoŋ i lobogi twatwal, giworo tic ma gutiyo ki ciŋgi, gin ma gutiyo pigi kengi ki ciŋgi," 
Isaiah2:9 Meno omiyo doŋ gikwanyo dit pa dano woko, co doŋ gudoko jo ma rwomgi piny adada; pe itim kica botgi pi bal man!" 
Isaiah2:10 Dony i i got, kanne woko i i apwa, pi twon lworo madit i kom Rwot ki pi riŋo deyo me ditte." 
Isaiah2:11 Gibijuko bwono pa dano woko, wakke pa co bikwe woko. Gibipako Rwot keken i nino meno." 
Isaiah2:12 Pien Rwot me mony tye ki ninone, pi gin ducu ma wakke ki ma lyerre, pi gin ducu ma tye malo, ma oille malo;" 
Isaiah2:13 pi yadi cedar ducu me Lebanon, maboco ki ma tye malo; ki pi kworo ducu me Bacan;" 
Isaiah2:14 pi godi ducu ma gucuŋ likuŋ wa malo ki pi lobo ducumubedo cere," 
Isaiah2:15 pi gedo ducu mabocoboco, ki pi cel me gaŋ ducu ma gigero matek;" 
Isaiah2:16 pi mel ducu me Tarcic, ki pi yeya ducu ma giber me anena." 
Isaiah2:17 Gibijuko bwono pa dano woko, wakke pa co bikwe woko. Gibipako Rwot keken i nino meno." 
Isaiah2:18 Cal jogi ducu gibijwero woko. 
Isaiah2:19 Dano bidonyo i boro got, ki i bur ma gikwinyo i ŋom, pi twon lworo madit i kom Rwot ki pi riŋo deyo me ditte, ka en bia malo ka ryano kom jo ma bedo i lobo." 
Isaiah2:20 Inino meno cal jogt me ryal ki me jabu, ma dano gutiyo me aworagi, gibibolo woko bot buyu ki bot olik," 
Isaiah2:21 ci gibidonyo ii got ma obar, ki i kin got ma okak atata, pi twon lworo madit i kom Rwot, ki pi riŋo deyo me ditte, ka en bia malo ka ryano kom jo ma bedo i lobo." 
Isaiah2:22 Wek dano ma yweyo tye i ume-ni obedi: dano kono konyo aŋo? 
Isaiah3:1 Pien, koŋ inen, Rwot, ma en Rwot me mony, tye ka kwanyo woko ki bot Jerucalem ki jo Juda gin ducu ma yam kwogi ocuŋ i kome, cam ducu ma kwogi jeŋŋe iye, ki pii bene ma kwogi ojeŋŋe iye." 
Isaiah3:2 Tye ka kwanyo dano matek dok ma lamony, laŋolkop ki lanebi, latyet ki ladit," 
Isaiah3:3 lutel wi jo pyerabic ki jo me awora, lumi-tam ki lutak maryekke, ki luryeko ma gitiyo Lwit me gwoko kom." 
Isaiah3:4 Abimiyo awobe bedo rwodigi, litino matino aye ma biloyogi." 
Isaiah3:5 Dano gibibedo ka unne kekengi, kun ŋat man uno lawote, dano acel acel uno wadigi; awobi binywaro ladit, laboŋ ata binywaro dano ma giworo." 
Isaiah3:6 I nino meno dano bimako ominne i ot pa wonne, biwacci, “In it ye ki boŋo me aruka, in aye doŋ ibibedo ka loyowa, wi obur man bibedo i te locci.”" 
Isaiah3:7 I nino meno en bilok kun wacci, “An gira pe abibedo lacan-dano; kwon ki boŋo pe i oda; pe wubiketa me bedo ŋat ma loyo lwak.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Pien Jerucalem doŋ cok poto woko, Juda doŋ opoto mere woko; pien lok ma giloko ki gin ma gitimo kemo Rwot, gujemo woko i kome dok gubalo deyone woko," 
Isaiah3:9 Kitgi ma giyeko kwede kin dano-ni bibedo caden i komgi; ginyuto balgi woko ka maleŋ calo Codom, pe gikano akana, Can i wigi! Pien gin aye ma gukelo can i komgi kengi." 
Isaiah3:10 Wutit bot jo ma kitgi atir ni gibibedo maber, pien gibilimo bakacic me gin ma gitimo." 
Isaiah3:11 Can bipoto i kom jo maraco! Can ma bipoto i komgi bibedo marac mukato kare; pien gin ma ciŋgi otimo, en aye bene ma gibitimo i komgi." 
Isaiah3:12 Litino gitye ka uno lwakka, kombeddi doŋ gitye i te loc pa mon. Wun lwakka, lutelwu tye ka rwenyowu arwenya, gitye ka ŋakowu woko ki i yo ma myero wuwot iye." 
Isaiah3:13 Rwot doŋ obino woko ka pido, en ocuŋ ka ŋolo kop I kom lwakke." 
Isaiah3:14 Rwot doŋ oyabo pido woko i kom lwakke, ocako pido ki ludoŋo pa lwakke ki rwodigi. “Wun kikomwu aye ma wucamo poto olok, jami ma wuyako ki bot lucan tye i odiwu." 
Isaiah3:15 Wuninyo lwakka woko kono piŋo kun wutimo lucan malit mukato?” Man lok pa Rwot Lubaŋa me mony kikome. 
Isaiah3:16 Rwot owacci, “Pien anyira me Cion giwakke, giwoto ma gutono ŋutgi atona kun gineno dano ki waŋ me kwele, ginyedo wot anyeda ki wi tyengi kun gara ma i tyengi yeŋŋe, tye ka kok maloŋo;" 
Isaiah3:17 pi meno, Rwot bimiyo wi anyira Cion tokke woko doko bur Rwot bimiyo komgi bene doŋ noŋo ka maleŋ." 
Isaiah3:18 I nino meno Rwot bikwanyo atego me tyen monwu mabeco-ni woko ki tiko ma girubo me tur nyimgi, ki mola me cal dwe;" 
Isaiah3:19 mola ŋut ma ryeny aryenya, atego ŋut cin, ki kitambara me adwala i ŋut;" 
Isaiah3:20 boŋŋigi me atweya i wic, ogul me bad, del me tweyo pyer, cupa moo me wir, lwit ma gitweyo e gwoko kom;" 
Isaiah3:21 agit ciŋ, agit ma girwako lum;" 
Isaiah3:22 boŋŋigi mabeco ma giruko i nino madito, gomci, boŋŋi me ummegi, ki kicaa me ciŋ;" 
Isaiah3:23 ginaruka mogo ma mareprep, boŋŋi camanini kitambara ma gidwalo i wic ki kitam: bara me geŋo waŋ." 
Isaiah3:24 Ma ka moo ma ŋwece kur bibedo gin mukwok; ma ka del me tweyo pyer bibedo tol: ma ka yer ma gikedo akeda maber wigi bital woko; ma ka ruko boŋŋi mogo me wel, gibitweyo boŋo cola aye i pyergi; ma ka nen mwonya, gibibedo ki lewic." 
Isaiah3:25 Gibineko cogwu woko ki pala I ucwan, co ma gin oteka lwenywu gibito imony." 
Isaiah3:26 Kumo ki koko me can biwinnye i dogcel me Cion; bibedo calo dako ma giyako jamine woko ducu, ma obedo piny i nom." 
Isaiah4:1 I nino meno mon abiro gibipoto i kom laco acel kun gimake woko Iikin ma giwacce ni, “Wan giwa wabicamo camwa dok bene wabiyenyo ginarukawa kikomwa, ento in myero itrm ber ilwonwa ki nyiŋi; kwany lewic woko ki i wiwa.”" 
Isaiah4:2 I nino meno ginapita ma Rwot omiyo olot odoŋo bibedo maber kun bene noŋo tye ki deyone; gin mucek i lobo bimiyo jo Icrael mubwot gibiwakke kun bene noŋo gitye ki deyo. 
Isaiah4:3 Jo mudoŋ i Cion ki jo ma pud bedo! Jerucalem gibilwoŋo ni jo maleŋ, jo ducu ma doŋ gicoyo nyiŋgi ni myero gubed kwo i Jerucalem," 
Isaiah4:4 i kare ma noŋo Rwot doŋ olwoko cilo ki i kom mon me Cion woko, kun bene doŋ noŋo otyeko lonyo remo woko i dye Jerucalem pi cwiny me ŋolo kop atir ki cwiny me waŋo gin marac woko." 
Isaiah4:5 Rwot doŋ biketo pol dyeceŋ, ki yito ki mac ma caro piny Lyel dyewor, i kabedo ducu ma tye i wi got me Cion, ki i wi dano ducu ma gucokke iye; pien gin mo ma gitiyo macalo kema biumo wi deyone ducu." 
Isaiah4:6 Gin meno bibedo me geŋo lyeto dyeceŋ, ki me geŋo yamo ki kot." 
Isaiah5:1 Wek koŋ awer wer bot ŋat ma amaro-ni, wer me mar i kom poto olokke. Ŋat ma amaro-ni onoŋo opuro poto olokke i wi cere ka ma ceko cam twatwal." 
Isaiah5:2 Oboto poto, ka doŋ oteno, ocoko gweŋ bene woko ducu ki iye ka doŋ ocako pito iye olok mabeco ma oyero ayera; oketo lubele me neno pinyi dyere, ka dok okwinyo bur tye me jolo pige. En doŋ ocako bedo ki gen ni binyako nyige mabeco, ento dok onyako mere nyige calo olok me tim." 
Isaiah5:3 Kombeddi doŋ, wun jo ma bedo i Jerucalem, ki wun jo me Juda, wutim ber wuŋol kop, i kin an ki poto olokka." 
Isaiah5:4 Gin aŋo madog ma onoŋo myero atim i poto olokka ma pe atimo? I kare ma abedo ki gen ni olok binyako nyige mabeco, piŋo dok onyako mere nyige calo olok me tim?" 
Isaiah5:5 Wuwek koŋ doŋ atit botwu, gin ma abitimo i kom poto olokka. Abimuko cel woko ki i ŋete, wek doŋ oballe woko; abicoro lobo me celle areto woko piny, wek lee onyon lobo ma iye woko atata," 
Isaiah5:6 Abibwoto bakke ki doo liyuk, pe doŋ abiŋolo jaŋe, kadi wa doyo tere, okuto ki ocok bitwi, ci gidoŋo iye; abiciko pol ducu wek pe dok gumi kot ocwer iye." 
Isaiah5:7 Pien poto olok pa Rwot me mony, gin aye jo Icrael; ki jo Juda. Gin ducu gubedo gin ma en opito me yomo cwinye; onoŋo en tye ki gen ni Gibiŋolo kop atir, ento koŋ inen, gitye ka nekke woko kekengi; onoŋo tye ki gen ni gibibedo jo ma kitgi atir, ento koŋ iwiny, twon koko me can ma gikok kwede!" 
Isaiah5:8 Gibineno can, jo ma kubo odi i kom odi wadigi, ma gimedo potti i kom potti ma gitye kwede, nio waŋ ma ka mo doŋ pe odon ki jo mukene, kun noŋo doŋ gudoŋ kengi i lobo." 
Isaiah5:9 Rwot me mony okwonne ma awinyo ni, “Adada, odi mapol igi bidoŋ noŋo, odi madoŋo, mabeco bidoŋ laboŋo ŋat mo ma bedo i igi," 
Isaiah5:10 Poto olok eka apar, bia iye koŋo vino ma romo debe aryo keken; ki kodi kutiya adek kulu, bia iye debe aryo keken.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Gibineno can, jo ma puk odiko con, ka yenyo koŋo arege me amata, ki jo ma ri i te koŋo nakanaka wa dyewor, nio wan ma gumer matek." 
Isaiah5:12 Gibedo ki opuk, nana, ajaa ki nyamulere i karamagi, kun koŋo bene pe lwenyo iye; ento pe giparo pi tic ma Rwot otiyo wacel, kadi wa loko wangi me neno gin ma en otiyo ki ciŋe." 
Isaiah5:13 Meno aye gin mumiyo gitero lwakka i opii pi kwiya pinygi; co mogo i kingi ma giworo kombeddi gitye ka to ki kec, ki lwakgi mapol orwo pii onekogi matek." 
Isaiah5:14 Meno omiyo lyel tye ka mwonyo laa twatwal, kun oŋamo doge malac mukato kare, deyo pa Jerucalem ki lwak jone gidonyo iye, jo ma wo ma cwinygi yom bene." 
Isaiah5:15 Gikwanyo doŋ dit pa dano woko, co doŋ gudoko jo ma rwomgi piny adada, jo ma lyerre bene doŋ wakkegi ogik." 
Isaiah5:16 Ento Rwot me mony dit dok gidwore pi ŋolo kop atir, Lubaŋa Maleŋ nyutte ni elen i timo gin ma tye atir," 
Isaiah5:17 Romi gibibedo ka cam i Jerucalem macalo gicamo i oletgi, dok lim makwo mucwe ki dyegi gibicam i wi obur." 
Isaiah5:18 Gibineno can jo ma ywayo kit marac ki tol me goba, ma giywayo bal macalo tol ma ywayo gadigadi," 
Isaiah5:19 ma giwaco ni, “Wek en oru timone oyotoyot, wek oti ticce bene oyotoyot twatwal, wek wanen; wek gin ma Gat Maleŋ me Icrael oyubo ni ebitiyo obin cok, obin, wek wan bene waŋe.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Gibineno can, jo ma lwoŋo gin marac ni ber, kun dok gilokke gilwoŋo gin maber ni rac, ma giketo colpiny ma ka leŋo, ki leŋo ma ka colpiny, gin makec giloko doko gin malim, ki gin malim giloko doko gin makec!" 
Isaiah5:21 Gibineno can, jo maryek i wangi kengi, jo ma nenne kengi ni giryek." 
Isaiah5:22 Lumat koŋo madoŋo bineno can, ki jo ma gin ludiro i rubo boŋo mamit," 
Isaiah5:23 ma gimiyo ŋat mubalo loyo kop pi lim ma owilogi kwede i muŋ, ma pe dwoko jami pa ŋat ma pe ki bal mo cen bote." 
Isaiah5:24 Pi meno kit macalo leb mac wano kwede ren kal, ki kit ma lum mutwo mac gamo kwede, gin bene gibibedo macalo yat ma otop woko, nyo macalo yat ma ka ture otwo ci duny calo apwa: pien gukwero winyo cik pa Rwot me mony, kun gicayo lok ma ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael oloko." 
Isaiah5:25 Meno aye gin mumiyo akemo omako Rwot i kom lwakke, omiyo en oryeyo cine i komgi, ci onekogi woko; godi madoŋo guyeŋŋe, guto ma noŋo komgi oradde ata macalo yugi ma tye i dye gudo. Man ducu pe, okweyoakemopa Rwot en pud tye ka ryeyo ciŋe aryeya i komgi." 
Isaiah5:26 En bitiŋo benderane pi rok ma tye ka mabor, bilwoŋogi ki i agikki piny ki lwiyo; nen gin ca, gitye ka riŋo, gibino oyotoyot." 
Isaiah5:27 Dano mo muni ma tye ka gwanne atata pe i kingi, ŋat ma nur ki nino nyo ma onino pe i kingi, ŋat mo pe ma boŋo ma i pyere ogony woko, tol war bene pe ocot ki i tyen ŋat mo." 
Isaiah5:28 Aterogi bit twatwal, guciko atumgi ki tol ma doŋ gutelo woko matek, obon tyen aguraguragi obedo calo pata got, tyen gadigadigi wirre calo yamo lapiru." 
Isaiah5:29 Gin ducu gimor calo dwan labwor ma kok, gikok calo litino labwor; ginur ci gimako lee ma gitye ka dwarone, giywayo giterogi gigi laboŋo ŋat mo ma twero kwanyone woko ki botgi." 
Isaiah5:30 Gibinur i kome i nino meno, macalo nam ma mor. Ento ka ce iloko waŋi me neno lobo, ci ibineno colpiny ki can keken, kun noŋo pol oumo wan cen woko." 
Isaiah6:1 I mwaka ma kabaka Ujia oto iye, aneno Rwot mubedo i wi komkerre, kun onyedde malo, madit twatwal, ma dog boŋone opoŋo i ot pa Lubaŋa woko liweŋ," 
Isaiah6:2 Lucerapi gucuŋ malo ka wiye, ma lacerapi acel acel bwome tye abicel; aryo me umo wangi, aryo me umo tyengi, ki aryo mukene me tukgi malo." 
Isaiah6:3 Onoŋo gitye ka wer ma ŋat acel acel gamo dog lawote ni, “Rwot me mony leŋ, leŋ dok leŋ; lobo ducu opoŋ ki deyone.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Te guti me doggola ocako yeŋŋe pi wer ma guwero-ni, yito bene omwono i ot woko limuk." 
Isaiah6:5 Ka doŋ awacci, “Aneno can doŋ ba! Ato woko do! Pien an dano ma lok ma a i doga pe leŋ, dok bene abedo i kin rok ma lok ma giloko pe leŋ: ento aneno kabaka ki waŋa, ma en aye Rwot me mony.”" 
Isaiah6:6 Cutcut ŋat acel i kin lucerapi otuk obino bota, kun omako lodi mac i ciŋe, ma en okwanyo ki i keno tyer, kun okaro ki lakar mac." 
Isaiah6:7 Ogudo ki doga kun wacci. “Nen, gin man ogudo del dogi; gin maracci doŋ gikwanyo, ki balli doŋ giweko.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Cutcut awinyo dwan Rwot ma wacci, “Abioro aŋa mono? Aŋa ma bicito piwa?” Agamo ni, “An ene; ora.”" 
Isaiah6:9 Ka doŋ en owacca ni, “Cit iwac ki rok man ni, ‘Winyone mere wubiwinyo, ento pe wubinian te lokke; nenone wubineno, ento pe wubineyo gin ma tye.’" 
Isaiah6:10 Mi rok man cwinygi odok nwaŋ, mi itgi bene odiŋ woko, wek pe gunen ki waŋgi, pe bene guwiny ki itgi, pe bene guniaŋ iye ki cwinygi, wek omi pe gulokke gudwog bota acaŋgi.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Ka doŋ apenyo ni, “Pi kare ma rom mene, ai Rwot?” Ci en odokka iye ni, “Nio waŋ ma gaŋi ducu igi odoŋ nono, laboŋo dano mo ma bedo i igi, jo mogo ma gibedo i odi bene doŋ pe, lobo doŋ odoŋ nono laboŋo gin mo kadi ki acel," 
Isaiah6:12 kun Rwot doŋ ocwalo dano woko cen ka mabor, wi obur ma gibwoto doŋ dwoŋ ata i lobo." 
Isaiah6:13 Kadi bed acel me apar pa jo ma onoŋo gubedo kenyo gudoŋ iye, pud dok gibiwaŋogi woko aye, calo kworo nyo opok, ma ajutte odon, ma noŋo doŋ gityeko toŋo kom vat woko piny.” Ajutte aye bedo kodi maleŋ." 
Isaiah7:1 I kare pa Akaj wod pa Yocam, wod pa Ujia, kabaka me Juda, Rejin kabaka me Ciria, ki Peka wod pa Remalia, kabaka me Icrael, gin aryo ducu yam gubino i Jerucalem pi lweny i kome, ento pe gutwero loyone." 
Isaiah7:2 I kare ma gitito lokke bot likwayo pa Daudi ni, “Jo Epraim doŋ guribbe woko ki jo Ciria,” cwiny Akaj ki pa lwakke omyel twatwal kit macalo yamo yeŋo kwede yat ka tye ka kodo." 
Isaiah7:3 Rwot owaco bot Icaya ni, “Cit irwatte ki Akaj, in kacel ki wodi Cear-yacub. Cit irwatte kwede i agikki me yo pii ma mol a ki i joro ma malo, i yo gudo ma cito i poto pa lalwokboŋo," 
Isaiah7:4 ci iwacce ni, ‘Gwokke, bed mot laboŋo lworo mo, cwinyi bene pe opoti pi kiniga malyet ma omako Rejin ki jo Ciria ki wod pa Remalia, pi ajut aryo ma guwan woko ma yitogi tye Ica dunynyi." 
Isaiah7:5 Pien jo Ciria ki jo Epraim ki wod pa Remalia guporo lok marac ma myero gitim i komi, kun giwacci," 
Isaiah7:6 “Wacitu walwenyu i kom Juda, wami obed ki lworo madwoŋ, wek wamaa woko obed mewa, ci waketu wod pa Tabcel me bedo kabaka iye.”" 
Isaiah7:7 Meno omiyo Rwot. Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Cobo tamgi biloyogi woko, pe bicobbe ada." 
Isaiah7:8 Pien Damaciko aye gaŋ madit me Ciria, ki Rejin aye rwot me Damaciko. (Ma pud peya mwaka pyerabicel wiye abic otum, gibiŋinyo jo Epraim, bimiyo pe dok gimedde me bedo rok.)" 
Isaiah7:9 Camaria aye gaŋ madit me Epraim, ki wod pa Remalia aye rwot me Camaria. Ka ce pe wubiye, adada, pe wubicun matek.’ ”" 
Isaiah7:10 Rwot dok owaco ki Akaj ni," 
Isaiah7:11 “Peny pi Lanyut mo ki bot Rwot Lubaŋani; kadi lanyut ma tye piny ka matut i lyel nyo kadi ma tye malo i polo.” 
Isaiah7:12 Ento Akaj ogamo kun wacci. “Pe abipenyo Lanyut mo, dok pe abitemo Rwot.”" 
Isaiah7:13 En dok owaco ni, “Koŋ wuwiny wun likwayo pa Daudi! Yelo dano ma wuolo komgi pe romowu, mumiyo wutye ka olo kom Lubaŋana dok bene-ni?" 
Isaiah7:14 Pi meno, Rwot kikome aye ma bimiyo botwu lanyut. Nen, nyako mo ma peya oneyo laco biyac, ci nywalo latin laco, gibicako nyiŋ latin meno ni Immanuel." 
Isaiah7:15 Latin meno bimato cak lukulu ki moo kic, ka doŋ oneyo kwero gin marac ki yero gin maber." 
Isaiah7:16 Pien ma pud peya latin-nu ŋeyo kwero gin marac ki yero gin maber, lobo ma itye iye ki lworo madit i kom lukerre aryo-nu gibiweko doŋ noŋo." 
Isaiah7:17 Rwot bimiyo kare mo bino i komi ki i kom lwakki, ki i kom jo me doggola me ot pa kwaru ma yam peya onen cakke ma jo Epraim gupokke woko ki jo Juda; en bikelo kabaka me Aciria.”" 
Isaiah7:18 I kare meno, Rwot bilwoŋo lwaŋi ma bedo i acakki kulu me Ejipt, ki kic ma bedo i lobo Aciria ki lwiyo." 
Isaiah7:19 Gin ducu gibibino gio woko lirut i luŋ matut, ki i kin got ma obar, ki i wi okuto-gu ducu, ki i olet ducu," 
Isaiah7:20 I kare meno Rwot bikelo dano mo ki loka kulu Euprate, ma en kabaka me Aciria. En bitimowu malit calo dano ma gilyelo yer wiye ki yer kome woko ducu, bilyelo yer tik woko bene." 
Isaiah7:21 I kare meno dano bigwoko roya ki megi romi aryo," 
Isaiah7:22 doŋ pi cak madwoŋ twatwal ma gibimiyo bot dano-nu, miyo dano meno bimato cak lukulu ki moo kic." 
Isaiah7:23 I kare meno potti ducu ma yam ginoŋo iye tyen olok alip acel, ma poto acel acel gicato i wel me cekel me ryal alip acel bene, bibedo okuto ki ocok keken." 
Isaiah7:24 Dano bicito kunnu ki atum ki atero, pien okuto ki ocok biromo lobo ducu;" 
Isaiah7:25 ento lobo ducu ma bedo cerecere ma yam onoŋo gipuro ki kweri, pe dok wubicito iye pi lworo okuto ki ocok. Kabedo meno bidoko ka ma dyaŋi camo iye kengi; dok romi ki dyegi gibibedo ka nyono piny iye atata." 
Isaiah8:1 Rwot dok owacca ni, “Kwany got malac ci ico iye coc ki nukuta ma lwak ducu giŋeyo ma giromo kwanone, ‘Maer-calal-cak-baj.’ ”" 
Isaiah8:2 Cutcut anoŋo caden ma genne, ajwaka Uria ki Jakaria wod pa Yeberekia, me bedo lucadenna." 
Isaiah8:3 Adonyo bot lanebi ma dako ma obedo dakona, ci ogamo ic, onywalo latin laco. Cutcut Rwot owacca ni, “Cak nyiŋe ni Maer-calal-kacbaj;" 
Isaiah8:4 pien ma pud peya latin meno ŋeyo lwoŋo ni, ‘Aba,’ nyo ‘mama,’ gibigwaro lonyo pa jo Damaciko kacel ki jami ayaka pa jo Camaria gitero woko kwoŋo nyim kabaka me Aciria.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Rwot dok oloko bota aye ni," 
Isaiah8:6 “Pien jo man doŋ gukwero pii me Ciloa ma mol mot gulokke gigi gubedo ki myelkom i nyim Rejin ki i nyim wod pa Remalia; 
Isaiah8:7 pi meno, Rwot bimiyo pii me kulu Euprate ma mol matek dok bene dwoŋ twatwal corre i komgi, ma en kabaka me Aciria ki deyone ducu. Bipoŋ i wan lalele ducu, kun noŋo mol atata liyakyak;" 
Isaiah8:8 bimol kato cito i Juda, ma noŋo mol atata liyakyak, kato cito anyim, bipoŋ o wa malo i ŋut dano. Pien Lubaŋa tye kwedwa. En biyaro bwome me gwoko lobo man.”" 
Isaiah8:9 Wumwolle woko kekenwu, wun rok ducu, cwinywu myero opoti; wuter itwu, wun lobo ducu ma wutye ka mabor, wuyubbe bene ma cwinywu poto, wuyubbe pi lweny ma cwinywu poto." 
Isaiah8:10 Wupor lok kacel, ento gin mo pe ma bia iye; wulok lok, ento gin ma wumito pe bicobbe, pien Lubaŋa tye kwedwa." 
Isaiah8:11 Rwot oloko bota kit man pien onoŋo odiya woko matek ki ciŋe, dok bene ocika ni pe alub kit pa jo me rok man, kun waco ni," 
Isaiah8:12 “Pe wulwoŋ ni piro lok i muŋ gin ma jo me rok man lwoŋo ni piro lok i muŋ, pe wulwor bene gin ma gilworo, lworo mo ma onyo koyo i komwu bene obed pe." 
Isaiah8:13 Ento myero wuŋe ni Rwot me mony aye ŋat maleŋ, en aye ŋat ma myero wubed ka lworone, dok en aye ma myero omiwu lworo ma onyo koyo i komwu." 
Isaiah8:14 En oidoko kabedo maleŋ, ki got ma miyo dano yokke ka giwoto, bidoko ariya ki tuŋ botgi, makato jo me doggola pa luker aryo-nu ducu, me Juda ki me Icrael, dok bibedo owic ki kinu me ciko jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem." 
Isaiah8:15 Jo mapol gibiyokke iye; gibipoto gitur giŋinnye woko; gibicikogi ki kinu ci gimoko.” 
Isaiah8:16 Jo ma winyo lok ma apwonyo myero gugwok maber pe orweny woko. 
Isaiah8:17 Rwot okanne woko ki bot jone, ento an abikure kun atye ki gen i kome." 
Isaiah8:18 Nen an-kacel ki litino ma Rwot doŋ omiya, wabedo lanyut ki lanen bot jo Icrael ma oa ki bot Rwot me mony, ma komkerre tye i wi got Cion." 
Isaiah8:19 Ka ce guwaco botwu ni, “Koŋ wucit wupeny lutyet ki ajwagi ma giloko wee wee, calo ŋat ma dumo aduma,” gibiwaco ni, “Rok mo-ni myero gupeny Lubaŋagi; ento myero dok gupeny tipo pa jo muto pi jo makwo?”" 
Isaiah8:20 Ento wuwiny pwony ki lok ma atuco botwu! Adada, giloko lok man pien gitye i piny macol, piny peya oru botgi." 
Isaiah8:21 Dano biŋolo gikato ki i dye lobo ma noŋo gitye ki peko madwoŋ twatwal, ma kun noŋo kec onekogi matek. Gibitokke ki kiniga ma kun noŋo kec tye ka nekogi, ci gicako ceno kabakagi ki Lubaŋagi woko. Gibitiŋo wangi gineno malo i polo," 
Isaiah8:22 dok gibikulo wigi kun gineno piny i lobo, ento pe gibinoŋo gin mo, gibineno can ki ‘colpiny keken, ki mutu mucido licuc me arem madwoŋ: gibicwalogi i colpiny mucido Licuc. Yo mo bibedo pe me bwot ki i arem madwoŋ." 
Isaiah9:1 Dano yam gicayo lobo Jabulon ki lobo Naputali, ento en bimiyo piny ma neno yo tuŋ i nam, loka Jordan, Galilaya pa lurok, doko me deyo." 
Isaiah9:2 Jo ma yam gibedo i piny macol doŋ guneno dero cen madit; ki jo ma yam bedo i lobo me mutu me piny macollicuc, ceŋ doŋ oryeny omenyogi." 
Isaiah9:3 In doŋ imiyo jo me rokwa onya, imedo bene yomcwiny botgi; gibedo ki yomcwiny i nyimi, kit ma dano bedo kwede i kare me kac, kit ma dano bedo kwede ki yomcwiny ka gipoko jami ma guyako." 
Isaiah9:4 Pien okolgi mapek, ki odoo ma goyo gwokgi, ki odoo ma yam giburogi kwede tektek me tiyo tic, in doŋ iturogi woko ducu, macalo i nino pa jo Midian." 
Isaiah9:5 Pien war pa oteka lweny ducu ma ginyono ki piny i dye lweny, ki boŋŋi ducu ma ginywano woko ki remo, gibiwaŋogi woko ki mac ma ka yen." 
Isaiah9:6 Pien doŋ ginywalo botwa latin, gimiyo botwa latin laco; gibimiyo en tiŋo twero me Loc i wi gwoke, nyiŋe gibicako ni, “Lami-tam ma giuro, Lubaŋa Won Twer, Won ma bedo nakanaka, Laloc ma kelo kuc.”" 
Isaiah9:7 Doŋ medde me locce ki kuc ma bia iye ka gikke bibedo pe, i wi komker pa Daudi, ki i wi kerre, me mokone ocuŋ matek ki gwokone wek pe opoti, i ŋolo kop atir ki i kit ma atir, cakke tin dok me bedo matwal. Arima pa Rwot me mony bimiyo man cobbe." 
Isaiah9:8 Rwot ocwalo lok i kom Yakobo, lok meno bipoto i kom Icrael;" 
Isaiah9:9 lwak ducu biŋeyo, Epraim ki jo ma bedo i Camaria, ma gin jo ma luwakke ma gicayo dano ki i cwinygi kun giwaco ni," 
Isaiah9:10 “Matafali doŋ opoto woko piny, doŋ wabigero gedo ki got ma gipayo apaya; olam doŋ gitoŋo woko, ento wan wabileyo kakargi ki yat cedar.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Rwot tye ka kelo lumerok i komgi, dok tye ka tugo lukworgi." 
Isaiah9:12 Jo Ciria yo tuŋ wokceŋ ki jo Piliciti yo tuŋ potoceŋ guŋamo doggi, gitye ka mwodo jo Icrael woko. Man ducu pe okweyo kiniga pa Rwot, en pud tye ka ryeyo cine aryeya ikomgi." 
Isaiah9:13 Ento dano pe gulokke gudwogo bot ŋat ma opwodogi-ni, pe bene guyenyo Rwot me mony," 
Isaiah9:14 Pi meno omiyo Rwot oŋolo wi Icrael woko kacel ki yibe, oŋolo bene jaŋ otit ki lagada i nino acel." 
Isaiah9:15 Ludito kacel ki jo ma giworo gubedo lutel wi Icrael, doŋ lanebi ma pwonyo lok me goba en aye yib Icrael." 
Isaiah9:16 Jo ma telo rok man gurwenyo lwak me rok man woko, jo ma gitelogi tamgi oballe woko." 
Isaiah9:17 Meno omiyo Rwot pe obedo ki yomcwiny i kom awobegi, kica bene pe mako i kom litino ma wongi pe, ki mon ma coggi oto; pien ŋat acel acel i kingi pe woro Lubaŋa, dok gin ducu gudoko lutim tim maraco, lok ducu ma giloko obedo lok me miŋo keken. Man ducu pe okweyo kiniga pa Rwot, en pud tye ka ryeyo ciŋe aryeya i komgi." 
Isaiah9:18 Pien tim maraco waŋ woko calo mac, waŋ calo okuto ki ocok ma wan imac; gamo agaba ma i buŋa, kun gin ducu gidoko yito ma duny cito malo." 
Isaiah9:19 Pien akemo pa Rwot me mony omiyo lobo tye ka waŋ ki mac, jo ma gibedo iye ducu doŋ gudoko calo yen ma waŋ i mac; pe tye ŋat mo iye ma timo kica ki ominne." 
Isaiah9:20 Gimayo ki tuŋ lacuc, ento noŋo kec pud tye ka nekogi, gicamo ki tuŋ lacam, ento noŋo pud pe romogi; dano acel acel camo riŋo kom lawote." 
Isaiah9:21 Manace camo Epraim, ki Epraim bene camo Manace, gin aryo ducu guribbe kacel guero lweny i kom Juda. Man ducu pe okweyo kiniga pa Rwot en pud tye ka ryeyo ciŋe aryeya i komgi." 
Isaiah10:1 Jo ma keto cik ma pe atir gibineno can, ki lucoc ma gicoyo lok me uno dano;" 
Isaiah10:2 ma gigeŋo jo ma piny obwoyogi woko i ŋolo kop atir, ma gimayo jami pa lucan ma gibedo i kin lwakka; giyako jami pa mon ma coggi oto, ki jami pa litino kic bene gimayo woko." 
Isaiah10:3 Wubitimo gin aŋo i nino ma gibiketo iye can i komwu, i dye yamo kot ma bia ki ka mabor? Wubirtno wucito bot aŋa wek okonywu? Doŋ lonyowu kono wubiweko kwene?" 
Isaiah10:4 Gin mo pe ma bidoŋ, kono me ŋone me donyo i kin mabuc aye, nyo to atoya i kin jo ma ginekogi i lweny. Man ducu pe okweyokiniga pa Rwot, en pud tye ka ryeyo cine aryeya i komgi." 
Isaiah10:5 Jo Aciria gubedo odoo me nyuto kinigana, ki odoo me nyuto akemona mager." 
Isaiah10:6 Abicwalogi gicito ka lweny i kom rok ma gukwero woro Lubaŋa, abicikogi gicito i kom jo ma akemo omaka i komgi, pi yako jamigi ki coko jamigi ma guyako ki nyonogi woko piny i dye gudo calo coto." 
Isaiah10:7 Ento jo Aciria onoŋo pe guyubbe me timo kumeno, dok bene onoŋo pe gutamo tam macalo meno i cwin ygi; ento tamgi onoŋo tye pi nek ki pi jwero jo me rok mapol woko liweŋ." 
Isaiah10:8 Ladit latel wigi owacci, “Ludito wi monnya ducu pe gin luker?" 
Isaiah10:9 Kalno pe rom aroma ki Karkemic’! Kamat kono pe rom ki Arpad? Camaria kono pe rom ki Damaciko? 
Isaiah10:10 Kit macalo ciŋa doŋ ogudo kwede ker ducu ma giworo cal jogi, ma cal jogi ma gupayo onoŋo kato pa jo Jerucalem ki pa jo Camaria woko," 
Isaiah10:11 pe abitimo gin mo i kom Jerucalem ki cal jogine kit ma yam atimo i kom Camaria ki cal jogine?” 
Isaiah10:12 Ka Rwot doŋ otyeko ticce ducu ki i Wi got Cion, ki i kom Jerucalem, biketo can i kom kabaka me Aciria pi wakkene ki nyattene ki pi Iyerrene." 
Isaiah10:13 Pien kabaka me Aciria owacci, “Atimo man pi tek ciŋa, ki pi ryekona, pien atye ki ŋec ma oromo. Atyeko doŋ kobo waŋ co me lobo pa lurok woko, ayako bene lwak lonyogi woko ducu, areto jo ma gubedo i wi komker macalo twon ma coro jami." 
Isaiah10:14 Onoŋo ciŋa coko lonyo pa rok mapol ma obedo yot twatwal calo ot winyo; kit ma dano gicoko kwede ton winyo ma mingi doŋ oweko woko, an bene doŋ acoko lobo woko ducu kit meno; pe tye ŋat mo ma otiŋo ciŋe, dano mo bene pe onamo doge, pe okok.”" 
Isaiah10:15 Latoŋ twero wakke i kom ŋat ma tiyo kwede me toŋo yat? Nyo cumeno twero pakke kene i nyim ŋat ma tiyo kwede? Odoo pe twero tiŋo dano, dano aye tiŋo odoo, tal bene pe twero tiŋo dano malo, dano aye ma tiŋe malo." 
Isaiah10:16 Pi meno, Rwot ma en Rwot me mony bicwalo two ma jonyo kom dano woko i komjone ma gin lulweny, dok bicwinyo mac i te deyogi ci waŋ woko, bilyel calo mac." 
Isaiah10:17 Ceŋ pa jo Icrael bidoko mac, Lubaŋagi maleŋ-ŋi bidoko calo leb mac: biwaŋo okuto ki ocok tyeko woko i nino acel." 
Isaiah10:18 Deyo me buŋane ki lobo ma ceko cam matek, Rwot bityeko kwone ki kome woko ducu; bibedo calo latwo ma ojony," 
Isaiah10:19 Yadi ma bidoŋ i potone bedo nok twatwal ma latin bene bitwero coyo welgi. 
Isaiah10:20 I nino meno jo Icrael ma gudoŋŋe, ki jo me ot pa Yakobo ma doŋ gubwot, pe dok gibijenne i kom ŋat ma opwodogi-ni, ento doŋ gibijenne i kom Rwot, ma en ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael, i ada." 
Isaiah10:21 Jo ma gudoŋ gibidwogo cen bot Lubaŋa Won Twer, ma gin aye jo me ot pa Yakobo ma gudoŋŋe," 
Isaiah10:22 Kadi lwakwu jo Icrael gubed macalo kweyo me dog nam, jo mogo man ok keken ki i kingi ma gudoŋ aye gibidwogo cen. Lubaŋa doŋ omoko me tyekogi woko, pien-en gire kite atir," 
Isaiah10:23 Pien Rwot, ma en Rwot me mony, bityekogi woko ducu i lobogi kit ma en doŋ omoko," 
Isaiah10:24 Meno aye gin mumiyo Rwot, ma en Rwot me mony, owaco ni, “Wun lwakka ma wubedo i Cion, pe wulwor jo Aciria ka ce gigoyowu ki odoo, ma gitiŋo odoogi i komwu kit macalo jo Ejipt yam gutimo." 
Isaiah10:25 Pien doŋ odoŋ kare manoknok mo akemona bigik woko, kinigana bilokke i komgi, at yekogi woko." 
Isaiah10:26 Rwot me mony biyeŋo odoo i komgi, kit macalo yam otyeko kwede jo Midian i ŋet got Oreb; en biriyo odoone i wi nam, ci tiŋo malo bene kit macalo yam otino ki i Ejipt." 
Isaiah10:27 I nino meno ter mere bia woko i wi gwokwu, gibituro okolle woko ki i ŋutwu.’" 
Isaiah10:28 Lukwor doŋ gua woko ki i Rimon, doŋ guo i Ayat; kun giwok ki i Migron, gukano tergi i Mikmac." 
Isaiah10:29 Guŋolo ki i kin godi ka madin, ci gucito gubuto i Geba; jo Rama komgi myel, jo Gibea pa Caulo doŋ guriŋo woko." 
Isaiah10:30 Wudoŋ oduru matek, wun jo Gallim! Wuwiny, wunjo Laica! Wugam doggi ba, wun jo Anatot!" 
Isaiah10:31 Jo Madmena tye ka “riŋo woko, Ki jo ma bedo i Gebim giriŋo pi laro kwogi." 
Isaiah10:32 Lukwor onoŋo doŋ gitye i Nob i nino meno, gitye doŋ ka yeŋo ciŋgi i kom got Cion, ma en aye got me Jerucalem." 
Isaiah10:33 Nen, Rwot ma en Rwot me mony, bimiyo gipoto piny lirum ki tek ma kela lworo: jo madonone gibinunogi woko piny, ŋat mo pe ma bidoŋ ma ocuŋ malo." 
Isaiah10:34 Rwot bitoŋo agaba ducu ma i buŋa ki latoŋ, kadi yadi ma pigi tek ma tye i Lebanon, gin ducu gibiretogi woko piny." 
Isaiah11:1 Yat manyen bilot kun tuc ki i kom ajut pa Yece, jaŋe bituc ki i lwite ci doŋo." 
Isaiah11:2 Cwiny pa Rwot bibedo i-kome, cwiny me ryeko ki me niaŋ, cwiny me poro lok ki me tek, cwiny me ŋec ki me lworo Rwot." 
Isaiah11:3 Cwinye bibedo yom i lworo Rwot. En pe biŋolo kop pi gin ma en neno anena ki waŋe, nyo kadi ki ŋolo kop pi lok ma en winyo awinya ki ite;" 
Isaiah11:4 ento en biŋolo kop pa lucan atir, dok biŋolo kop atir pi jo mamwol me lobo. En bigoyo lobo ki odoo me doge, bineko jo maraco woko ki alur me yweyo me doge," 
Isaiah11:5 Del me tweyo pyere aye bibedo kit ma atir, ki kite ma genne-ni aye bibedo del me tweyo iye." 
Isaiah11:6 Orudi bibedo kacel ki latin romo, kwac ki latin dyel bene gi bi buto piny kacel, roya ki labwor gibidoŋo kacel, latin matidi aye ma bitelogi." 
Isaiah11:7 Dyaŋ ki ŋuu mager gibicam kacel, litinogi bene gibibuto piny kacel; labwor bicamo lum calo twon." 
Isaiah11:8 Latin ma dot bituko i dog ot twol, latin ma pud gikwanyo doge akwanya ki i dog cak, birwako ciŋe i ot twol ororo," 
Isaiah11:9 Tim mo marac me nek nyo me keto ret i kom dano, pe binen i wi gotta maleŋ, pien lobo ducu bipoŋ ki ŋec pa Rwot, macalo pii ma poŋ i nam," 
Isaiah11:10 I nino meno lakwar Yece bicuŋ calo bendera ma rok mapol twero nenone; lurok ducu gibipenyo tam ki bote, ka ma en bedo iye bibedo kabedo me deyo." 
Isaiah11:11 I nino meno Rwot bimedde ki ryeyo cine pi tyen me aryo me kwanyo jone ma gudoŋ i Aciria, i Ejipt, ki i Etiopia, ki i Elam, ki i Cinar, ki i Kamat, ki i dog nam." 
Isaiah11:12 En bitiŋo benderane malo pi lurok, ka doŋ coko jo Icrael ma giryemogi-ni; bicoko jo Juda ma onoŋo yamguket woko ata gurogi kacel, cokogi ki i twok lobo aŋwen ducu." 
Isaiah11:13 Nyeko pa Epraim i kom Juda bigik woko, jo ma giuno jo Juda gibimiyo girwenyo woko matwal; Epraim pe bibedo ki nyeko i kom Juda, Juda bene pe bibedo ka uno Epraim." 
Isaiah11:14 Gibimwomme giriŋo piny i kor got pa jo Piliciti ki tun potoceŋ, gibiribbe kacel giyako jo ma tye tuŋ wokceŋ. Gibilweny i kom jo Edom ki Moab, jo Ammon bibedo i te locgi," 
Isaiah11:15 Rwot bimiyo pii ma i jaŋ nam me Ejipt two woko liweŋ, biyeŋo ciŋe i wi kulu Euprate, bigoyo miyo pokke woko doko kulu abiro, dano biŋolo iye kun gin mo pe ma dyako wargi." 
Isaiah11:16 Yo gudo ma a i Aciria doŋ bibedo tye, pi jone ma gudoŋ, kit macalo yam otimme kwede pi jo Icrael i kare ma gia ki i lobo Ejipt." 
Isaiah12:1 I nino meno wubiwero ni, “Abipwoyi, ai Rwot, pien yam cwinyi owaŋ i koma, kinigani doŋ okwe woko, ka doŋ ikweyo cwinya." 
Isaiah12:2 “Nen, Lubaŋa aye Lalarra; abigeno en, pe dok abibedo ki lworo; pien Rwot Lubaŋa aye tekka, ma apako ki wer, en doŋ odoko lalarra.”" 
Isaiah12:3 Wubitwomo pii ki yomcwiny ki i waŋ it me larre. 
Isaiah12:4 I nino meno wubiwero wer ni: “Wupwo Rwot, wulwoŋ nyiŋe; wumi lurok guŋe gin ma co doŋ otiyo. Wutit pire, ni en Lubaŋa ma nyiŋe malo twatwal." 
Isaiah12:5 “Wuwer wer me pako Rwot, pien doŋ otiyo ticce ki deyo madit twatwal; wumi lok man onene i wi lobo ducu." 
Isaiah12:6 Wugo kijira, wuwer bene ki yomcwiny, wun jo ma wubedo i Cion, pien ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael dit i kinwu." 
Isaiah13:1 Man lok ma pire tek ma Lubaŋa owaco bot Icaya wod pa Amoj i kom Babilon," 
Isaiah13:2 Wutiŋ bendera malo ka maleŋ, wulwongi ki dwan maloŋo, wuyeŋ ciŋwu wek gudony, i dogcel pa ludito me awora," 
Isaiah13:3 An Rwot kikoma doŋ aciko lwakka woko pi lweny, doŋ alwoŋo co ma gin oteka lwenynya, me miyo kinigana ocob ticce, lwakka ma giwakke kun giŋatte aŋata." 
Isaiah13:4 Koŋ wuwiny woo ma tye malo i wi godi calo woo pa lwak dano ma gucokke lipim! Koŋ wuwiny kit ma jo me ker ducu, ki jo me rok mapatpat gitye ka kok kun gicokke kacel! Rwot me mony tye ka ywayo monnye pi lweny." 
Isaiah13:5 Gua ki i lobo ma tye ka mabor twatwal, gibino kun gia ki i agikki me te polo; Rwot tye ki akemo, oebino ki jami lwennye me tyeko lobo woko ducu." 
Isaiah13:6 Wukok, pien nino pa Rwot doŋ tye cok; bibino calo to-piny ma oa ki bot Won Twer Ducu!" 
Isaiah13:7 Meno bimiyo ciŋ jo mapol doko goro, dok dano acel acel cwinye bionyo koyo," 
Isaiah13:8 cwinygi biballe woko. Arem madit me lworo ki me kumo me can bimakogi matek; gibitwennye calo dako ma tye ka rem ki nywal. Gibinenne kekengi kun komgi myel; waŋgi bibokke woko calo mac. 
Isaiah13:9 Wunen, nino pa Rwot tye ka bino. En ger, dok akemo ki kiniga mo mager omake, ma bimiyo lobo doŋ obur, tyeko lubalo woko ducu ki iye." 
Isaiah13:10 Pien lakalatwe me polo ki kulgi mapatpat pe gibiryeny; ceŋ bicido woko macollicuc ma pud noŋo tuc atuca ki tuŋ wokceŋ, dwe bene pe biryeny," 
Isaiah13:11 Abiketo can i kom lobo pi timme marac, ki i kom jo maraco pi balgi; abigiko wakke pa jo ma ginyatte abimiyo jo ma lyerre ma pe gin lukica kwe woko." 
Isaiah13:12 Abimiyo co bedo me wei twatwal, makato jabu ma giliyo maberre; dano bene bibedo me wel twatwal, makato jabu me Opir woko." 
Isaiah13:13 Pi meno abimiyo polo yenne, lobo bene biyeŋŋe ki i kabedone, pi akemo pa Rwot me mony, i nino me kinigane mager twatwalli." 
Isaiah13:14 Macalo ruda ma giryemo, nyo romi ma ŋat mo pe ma cokogi, dano acel acel bidok bot lutugi, ŋat acel acel biriŋo dok i lobo tugi kikome." 
Isaiah13:15 Ŋat ma gibinoŋo, gibicobo iye gituco woko pil, ŋat ma gimako, gibineko woko ki pala lucwan." 
Isaiah13:16 Gibinyoto litino lukeregi woko ma noŋo gin bene gineno ki waŋgi; gibiyako odigi woko bene, dok gibimako mongi gibuto kwedgi tektek." 
Isaiah13:17 Nen, doŋ atugo jo Medi woko me bino ka lweny i komgi; gin jo ma pe paro pi lim, dok bene pe gibedo ki yomcwiny pi lonyo jabu." 
Isaiah13:18 Gibicelo awobe ki aterogi gineko woko; kica pe bimakogi i kom latin mo wacel; pe bene gibiparo pi litino ki cwiny me kica. 
Isaiah13:19 Doŋ Babilon ma deyone dit kato deyo pa luker mukene ducu, gaŋ maber ma jo Kaldaya giwakke iye twatwal-li, bibedo calo Codom ki Gomora i kare ma yam Lubaŋa oretogi woko." 
Isaiah13:20 Dano pe dok bibedo iye, dano mo me Arab pe biguro kemane kunnu, pe tye lukwat bene ma gibimiyo romigi buto piny kunnu." 
Isaiah13:21 Ento lee me tim aye bibuto kunnu, gin makwo ma kok bipoŋ woko i odigi; udu bene bibedo kunnu, kun jogi noŋo myelo amyela macalo dyegi." 
Isaiah13:22 Lanudi bikok i odigi ma ocudo malo likuŋ, ki too bene bikok i odigi mabeco me ker; Babilon doŋ pe biri, karene doŋ cok twatwal." 
Isaiah14:1 Rwot bitimo kica ki Yakobo, biyero jo Icrael doki, ci dwokogi i lobogi kikome, rok mukene biribbe kwedgi, ci doŋ gimoko matwal i kom ot pa Yakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Rok mapol bilwoko jo Icrael tero i kabedogi, ka doŋ jo Icrael lokogi woko gidoko opiigi ki aŋecagi i lobo pa Rwot; gibimako jo ma yam omakogi giloko gidoko opiigi, dok gibiloyo jo ma yam ounogi." 
Isaiah14:3 Kare ma Rwot bimiyowu iye yweyo i kom can mewu, ki i kom myelcwiny ma wubedo kwede ki tic mapek ma wubedo ka tiyone," 
Isaiah14:4 wubicako nywaro kabaka me Babilon ki wer kuman ni, “Koŋ inen kit ma ŋat ma uno dano doŋ okwe kwede, kit ma kolo mager pa won pala doŋ okwe kwede mot!" 
Isaiah14:5 Rwot doŋ oturo odoo pa jo maraco woko, kacel ki odoo ker pa luloc," 
Isaiah14:6 jo ma gubedo ka goyo lurok kun gitye ki akemo madit adada, ma pe gujuko ciŋgi i komgi; jo ma gubedo ka loyo lobo ki kiniga, ma pe giweko keto ayela i komgi." 
Isaiah14:7 Lobo doŋ oywe, tye ma okwe mot, jo ma bedo iye doŋ gimoro wer keken." 
Isaiah14:8 Yadi ciprec cwinygi yom piri, ki yadi cedar me Lebanon giwaco ni, ‘Cakke i kare ma gidwoki kwede piny, ŋat mo ma obino ka toŋowa pe.’" 
Isaiah14:9 Lyel bene otugge woko ki piny kuca, me rwatte kwedi ka ibino, tye ka coyo tipo pa jo muto me bino ka moti, jo ducu ma yam gubedo lutel i wi lobo; luker ducu ma yam guloyo rok mapatpat omiyogi ducu gua woko ki i wi komkergi." 
Isaiah14:10 Gin ducu gibilok, kun giwaco boti ni, ‘In bene doŋ idoko goro calo wan! Idoko doŋ calo wan!’" 
Isaiah14:11 Deyoni doŋ giketo woko piny i lyel, kacel ki koko naŋani; kwidi doŋ gudokokitanda ma ibuto i wiye, ki kwidi ma camo kom dano-ni doŋ gudoko giummi." 
Isaiah14:12 Kit ma imwomme ki i polo ipoto kwede piny, in lakalatwe me dyeceŋ, wod pa Ru-piny! Kit ma gitoni kwede woko piny, in ma ireto rok mapatpat-gu!" 
Isaiah14:13 Iwaco ki i cwinyi ni, ‘Abiito acito malo i polo; abicibo komkerra malo i wi lakalatwe pa Lubaŋa; abibedo i wi got me cokke ka mabor yo tuŋ acam;" 
Isaiah14:14 abiito malo twatwal i wi pol, doŋ abikette kena me bedo macalo ŋat Mamalo Twal.’" 
Isaiah14:15 Ento in doŋ gikeli giketi wo ko piny i lyel, i te bur ka matut adada." 
Isaiah14:16 Jo ma neni gibiciko waŋgi i komi, kun gilwodo lok i komi ni, ‘Man pe en ŋat ma nene omiyo kom lobo omyel twatwal-li, ma bene omiyo ker mapol oyeŋŋe?" 
Isaiah14:17 Pe en aye ma yam omiyo lobo odoko calo tim aroo, ma obedo ka reto gaŋi ma iye woko liweŋ, ma pe oye ni mabucce gucit paco?’" 
Isaiah14:18 Luker me rok mapatpat gibuto gigi piny i deyo, ŋat acel acel buto i lyelle ma giyike iye;" 
Isaiah14:19 ento in doŋ giboli woko cen, ka mabor mada ki lyelli, calo latin ma gibwogo abwoga ma dano gukwero, giumo komi ki kom dano ma gineko, jo ma gicobogi ki pala lucwan, jo ma donyo piny i gweŋ ma tye i te bur matut piny, macalo kom dano muto ma ginyono piny." 
Isaiah14:20 In pe ibiribbe kwedgi ka giyiki, pien in doŋ ibalo loboni woko, dok ineko lutuwu woko. “Likwayo pa lutim maraco pe myero doŋ gicak nyiŋgi matwal!" 
Isaiah14:21 Wuyub ka neko litinone pi bal alii pa kwarogi, wek pe dok gua gulo lobo, guger gaŋigi onya obed madwoŋ ata i wi lobo.”" 
Isaiah14:22 “Abia ka lweny i kom jo Babilon,” man lok pa Rwot me mony, “abimiyo nyiu dano rwenyo woko ki i Babilon, jo mo pe bidoŋ iye, kadi litino matino nyo likwayo,” Rwot ma owaco." 
Isaiah14:23 “Abimiyo coo leyo lobogi, dok bene ka ma pii poŋ gurre iye bibedo pol ata, abiyweyo woko maleŋ calo dako ma oyweyo ode maleŋ kun pe oweko gin mo iye.”" 
Isaiah14:24 Rwot me mony doŋ okwoŋo kwoŋ ni, “Kit ma doŋ atyeko yubone kwede con, bitimme bene kit meno, kit macalo atamo kwede bitimme bene doŋ kumeno." 
Isaiah14:25 Abituro jo Aciria ki i lobona woko, abinyonogi woko piny i wi gotta; okolle biluny woko bene ki i tyen jona, ki ter bene kumeno ki i wi gwokgi.”" 
Isaiah14:26 Man aye doŋ gin ma ayubo mukemo lobo ducu; dok man en-ni ciŋa ma doŋ atyeko ryeyone woko i wi rok ducu. 
Isaiah14:27 Pien Rwot me mony doŋ otyeko yubo yubbe woko, aŋa mo no ma dok bibalone? Doŋ bene oryeyo ciŋe woko, aŋa kono ma dok bidolone?" 
Isaiah14:28 Lok man yam obino oa ki bot Lubaŋa i mwaka ma kabaka Akaj oto iye, kun waco ni," 
Isaiah14:29 “Wun jo Piliciti ducu, cwinywu pe obed yom ni pien odoo ma yam gibedo ka goyowu kwede-ni doŋ otur woko, pien ororo bia ki i kin likwayo twol, tone bidoko twol ma tuk cito malo." 
Isaiah14:30 Rwot bikwayo jo ma lucan i kin lwakke, bimiyo jo ma piny obwoyogi buto piny ki kuc; ento in, abimiyo kec neko likwayi woko, joni mogo ma gudoŋŋe bene abinekogi woko." 
Isaiah14:31 Doŋ oduru, in dogcel, in gaŋ bene ikok ba; wun jo Piliciti ducu, wumi lworo ocak onyo koyo i komwu! Pien lukwor tye ka bino ki yo tuŋ acam, pe tye dano mo ma i kingi ma opokke kene.”" 
Isaiah14:32 Wubiwaco gin aŋo, bot lukwena pa rok meno? Wubiwaco ni. “Rwot omiyo Cion ocuŋ matek, jone ma giuno doŋ giuno gularre iye.”" 
Isaiah15:1 Man aye lok ma pire tek ma gitito i kom Moab. Pien Ar doŋ gijwero woko i dyewor acel keken omiyo Moab doŋ ogik woko; pien Kir bene gijwero woko i dyewor acel keken, omiyo Moab doŋ ogik woko.," 
Isaiah15:2 Jo Dibon doŋ gucito malo i wan jogigi ka koko kunnu; jo Moab tye ka kok pi Nebo ki pi Medeba, Wi dano ducu doŋ otal woko, yer tik-gu ducu bene doŋ gilyelo woko." 
Isaiah15:3 Dano giruko boŋo cola i dye gudo; ki i wi odigi kadi wa i dye gaŋgi jo ducu noŋo kok ma pig wangi mol amola i korgi. 
Isaiah15:4 Jo Kecbon kacel ki jo Eleale bene gitye ka koko, dwangi winnye ka mabor wa i Jakaj; meno omiyo lulweny me Moab gudoko lwor mada; cwinygi doŋ onabbe anaba," 
Isaiah15:5 Cwinya rem twatwal pi Moab; jo ma lurin-lweny ma yam gibedo iye doŋ guriŋo woko i Joar, guriŋo bene wa i Eglat-celicia, Guito cere me Lukit, gicito malo kun gikok ki pig waŋgi; ki i yo ma cito piny i Koronaim gukok pi neno kit macalo lobo doŋ gibalo kwede woko." 
Isaiah15:6 Pii ma i Nimrim doŋ otwo woko liweŋ; lum oner woko pe doŋ lot, gin mo ma twi bene doŋ pe matwal." 
Isaiah15:7 Meno omiyo jami mabup ma yam onoŋo ginoŋo, kacel ki jami ma yam gikano, gin ducu doŋ giyakogi gitero woko loka kulu Arabim." 
Isaiah15:8 Pien koko doŋ dwoŋ twatwal, doŋ owoto oromo i lobo Moab woko ducu; nen koko pa dano doŋ winnye wa i Elam, dok bene doŋ owinnye wa i Beerelim." 
Isaiah15:9 Pii me Dibon doŋ odoko remo keken; kadi bed kumene pud dok abimedo can mukene i kom Dibon, abikelo labwor kikome doŋ i kom jo Moab ma gubwot ma guriŋo woko, ki i kom jo ma gudoŋ i lobo meno." 
Isaiah16:1 Gucwalo litino romi bot luloc me lobo meno, gucwalo ki i Cela, obino owok ki i tim aroo, gitero i wi got Cion." 
Isaiah16:2 Gibedo calo winyo ma teŋo bwomgi, dok girom ki litino winyo ma gikeyogi woko atata ki i odigi, jo Moab gitye kit meno, gikuro piny i waŋ wat me kulu Amon." 
Isaiah16:3 “Mi tamwu i kom lok man, dok bene wuŋol kop kakare; wuwek tipowu obed calo dyewor i cwiny dyeceŋ malyet kilkil; wukan jo ma giryemogi woko iye, pe wudot jo ma doŋ guriŋo lweny." 
Isaiah16:4 Wuwek jo Moab ma giryemogi woko-ni gubed i kinwu; doŋ wubed macalo kalarregi kii ciŋ jo ma doŋ otimogi malit-ti. I kare ma noŋo jo ma yam unogi doŋ gipe, ki nek ki uno’ dano bene noŋo doŋ ogik wako, ki ŋat ma nyonogi diyogi piny doŋ orwenyo wokoki i lobo," 
Isaiah16:5 i kare meno aye gibicibo iye komker i kom mar ma pe lokke, dano ma gene aye bibedo i wiye i kema pa Daudi, ŋat ma ŋolo kop dok ma mito ŋolo kop kakare, ŋat ma kome mit ka tiyo gin ma tye atir.”" 
Isaiah16:6 Wan wawinyo pi wakke pa Moab, kit ma onoŋo giwakke kwede; wakkegi, lyerregi ki ŋalagi, nyattegi-nu ducu meno obedo goba keken." 
Isaiah16:7 Pi meno wekjo Moab gukoki, dano ducu myero gukok pi lobo Moab, Myero gukok matek pi poki olok mutwo me Kir-karecet ma yam gubedo ka camone-ni." 
Isaiah16:8 Potti ma i Kecbon ducu doŋ guballe woko, ki olok me Cibma; olok ma yam kono vinone mero rwodi me rok mapatpat-ti doŋ giretogi woko piny. Jaŋe yam ojany oo wa i Jajer: olak oo wa i tim; jaŋe matocone yam ojany matek, okato oŋolo dye nam woko ari," 
Isaiah16:9 Meno aye gin mumiyo atye ka kok pi olok me Cibma, kit macalo akok kwede pi gaŋ Jajer; pig waŋa cwer i komwu, in Kecbon ki Eleale; pien dano tye ka wo ki woo me lweny i kom olokwu ma yam wupwono-ni." 
Isaiah16:10 Yomic ki yomcwiny madwoŋ doŋ gikwanyo woko ki i potti ma yam olok nyak iye matek ca, dok bene pe doŋ giwero wer i potti olok, woo mo bene pe dok winnye iye, nyono olok i bur me biyo koŋo vino bene doŋ ogik; woo ma yam dano giwo kwede ka gipwono olok-ki doŋ pe." 
Isaiah16:11 Meno omiyo cwinya tugge twatwal me loko lok i kom Moab calo naŋa ma kok, cwinya tugge bene me loko lok i kom Kir-kerec." 
Isaiah16:12 Kadi bed mine kene me olo kome nonono me cito i waŋ jogi ma tye malo i wi godi ka woro lubaŋane i kabedo maleŋ, pe bitwero wacel." 
Isaiah16:13 Man aye lok ma yam Rwot oloko con i kom Moab. 
Isaiah16:14 Ento kombeddi Rwot owacci, “I mwaka adek ma obedo calo mwaka pa lapakaca-ni, deyo pa Moab bidoko gmacaya kadi bed en tye ki lwak jo mapol at; jo ma bidoŋ gibibedo nok twatwal, dok bene noŋo dok gin jo ma goro keken.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Man aye lok ma pire tek ma gitrto I kom Damaciko, Nen, Damaciko doŋ pe bimedde me bedo macalo gaŋ, doŋ bi doko obur matwal." 
Isaiah17:2 Gaŋine ducu doŋ gibiweko gidoko tim matwal; Bibedo ka cam pa romi ki dyani-gu, ma gibibuto piny kunnu laboŋo ŋat mo ma miyo lworo makogi." 
Isaiah17:3 Cel matek birwenyo woko ki i Epraim, ker bene birwenyo woko ki Damaciko; ento jo ma gudoŋ gibibedo macalo deyo pa jo Icrael. Man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome," 
Isaiah17:4 I nino meno deyo pa Yakobo bijwik woko, kome bene bijony woko." 
Isaiah17:5 Man bibedo kit macalo lakaa kac kayo kwede kal i poto, kun noŋo kayo wit kal ki ciŋe dok kit macalo en beko kwede wit kal ma odoŋ i luŋ me Repaim." 
Isaiah17:6 Nyo kit macalo gidino kwede yat jeituni, ma gin mo manoknok aye doŋ i kome, doŋ ma romo aryo nyo adek keken i wi jaŋe malo kunnu; aŋwen nyo abic keken en aye doŋ i jaŋ yat ma nyak. Man lok pa Rwot Lubaŋa me Icrael kikome." 
Isaiah17:7 Ka nino meno oromo, dano gibilokke bot Lacwecgi pi kony, gibiciko waŋgi kun gmeno ŋat Maleŋ ma en Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael." 
Isaiah17:8 Doŋ pe gibiketo gengi i kom keno tyer ma yam gutiyo ki ciŋgi, pe gibigeno gin ma gin kikomgi yam gutiyo, kadi yadi ma gipito ka ma grworo iyejok ma dako ma gilwoŋo Acera nyo keno tyer me waŋo odok eceta." 
Isaiah17:9 I nino meno gaŋigi matek bibedo calo wi obur pa jo Kiv ki pa jo Amor ma yam gua woko ki iye pi jo Icrael; lobogi doŋ bidoŋ nono. 
Isaiah17:10 Pien wun jo Icrael wiwu doŋ owil woko i kom Lubaŋa ma olarowu dok ma gwokowu macalo got, matek ka ma wuriŋo wularo iye. PI meno kadi bed wupit gin mogo ma yomo cwiny, dok bene kadi bed wupit yadi mogo ma gin yadi pa lubaŋa pa lurok," 
Isaiah17:11 kadi wumi gutwi i nino meno ma wupitogi iye-ni, dok kadi wumiyo gituru woko i odiko ma gipitogi iye, ento pe wubikayo iye gin mo, wubibedo ki can ki arem ma pe gik keken." 
Isaiah17:12 Koŋ wuwiny kit ma lwak me rok mapol dwangi mor kwede calo kot ma mor; gimwoc ki woo kit macalo pii nam wo kwede. Koŋ wuwiny woo pa lwak me rok mapol; giwo calo mor pa pii biamwonyi matek ma tye ka twagge. 
Isaiah17:13 Rok ducu gimor calo pii madit twatwal, ento Lubaŋa bijukogi, miyo giriŋo woko ka mabor; gibiryemogi woko calo cuŋ kal ma yamo tino tero i wi got malo, dok macalo apwa ma wirre i kare ma yamo kot tye ka kodo matek adada." 
Isaiah17:14 Koŋ wunen, lworo madit mada bimako dano otyeno, ento ma noŋo piny peya oru gibibedo pe! Meno aye can ma bipoto i kom jo ma giyako jamiwa ki i lobowa, meno aye dul ma gipoko botgi gin jo ma yakowa." 
Isaiah18:1 In lobo ma tye loka kulu Etiopia, in ma bwomi ŋur calo yamo lapiru;" 
Isaiah18:2 ma ioro lukwenani ma cuŋ pi loboni giwok ki i kulu Nail, kun giwoto ki yeya ma gitiyo ki togo ma kwan i wi pii! Wudok cen, wun lukwena madwir, wudok bot rok ma jone gudoŋo maboco dok ma komgi pwot, bot rok ma jone gilworogi i kabedo ducu, rok matek, ma jone aye loyo i lweny, ma kulu mapol opoko lobogi woko i dyere." 
Isaiah18:3 Wuwiny, wun jo ducu ma wubedo i wi lobo, wun jo ma wubedo i lobo, ka ce gitiŋo bendera malo i wi got, myero wunen! Ka ce bene gikuto buriji, myero wuwiny!" 
Isaiah18:4 Pien Rwot owacca ni, “Abineno liŋliŋ ki i kabedona, calo lyeto me ceŋ ma ryeny dyeceŋ, calo pol ma miyo toyo luk i kare me kac.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Pien ma pud peya kare me pwono olok oromo, ma ture doŋ ocako o woko, kun ture doŋ oluro odoko nyig olok ma doŋ ocako cek, en biŋolo olok ma tye ka lot woko ki pala me ŋolo olok, ki jaŋ olok ma ojany bene en toŋo woko." 
Isaiah18:6 Gibiweko kom jo ducu ma ginekogi ata, bot acut ma tye i wi got malo, ki bot lee me tim. Acut bicamogi woko i oro, ki lee me tim bicamogi woko i cwir." 
Isaiah18:7 I kare meno rok ma jone odoŋo maboco ma komgi pwot, gibikelo mot bot Rwot me mony. Gin rok ma jone gilworogi i kabedo ducu, rok matek, ma jone aye loyo i lweny, ma kulu mapol opoko lobogi woko i dyere-ni. Gibikelo motgi-nu i wi got Cion, ka ma giworo iye Rwot me mony." 
Isaiah19:1 Man aye lok ma pire tek ma gitito i kom Ejipt. Nen, Rwot tye ka wot madwir twatwal i pol, kun woto ki bino kwede i Ejipt; cal jogi me Ejipt komgi bimyel nyime, cwiny jo Ejipt bibedo ka ryaŋŋe aryaŋa," 
Isaiah19:2 Abitugo jo Ejipt me lweny i kom wadigi kekengi, dano acel acel bilwenyo gin ki ominne, ŋat acel acel bene bilwenyo gin ki lawote, gaŋ bilwenyo i kom gaŋ mukene, ki ker bene bilwenyo i kom ker wadigi." 
Isaiah19:3 Cwiny jo Ejipt doŋ bibarre woko matwal, tamgi ma yam gumoko-gu ducu bituro woko, gibicito ka penyo tam ki bot cal jogi apaya kibot lutyet, ki bot lukor tipo ki ajwagi." 
Isaiah19:4 Dok abimiyo jo Ejipt i ciŋ rwot ma locce gwa atika, kabaka mager twatwal aye ma biloyogi, Man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome." 
Isaiah19:5 Pii me kulu Nail bene bidwono woko, pii ma i cwiny kulu kikome bitwo woko," 
Isaiah19:6 yo pii ma gikwinyo akwinya bi doko ŋwe, jaŋ kulu Nail me Ejipt bidoko nok ci two woko bene, lagada kacel ki togo ducu ma tye iye gibitop woko." 
Isaiah19:7 Lobo ma tye i ŋet kulu Nail ducu bital woko doko bar, i dog kulu Nail kikome; ginapita ducu ma gicoyogi i ŋet Nail bitwo woko, yamo bitero woko matwal ma pe dok binen." 
Isaiah19:8 Lumakrec gibikumo dok gibikok, jo ducu ma yuto rec ki goli i kulu Nail; jo ducu ma giciko obwogi i dye pii gin ducu cwinygi biballe woko." 
Isaiah19:9 Jo ma cwero tol tworo ki jo ma cweyo boŋo matar cwinygi bia woko i kom ticgi," 
Isaiah19:10 Jo ma gubedo twoni pa jo madito i lobo, gibininyogi woko, dok jo ducu ma camo mucara cwinygi biballe woko." 
Isaiah19:11 Luloc me Joan gimin mada; luryeko ducu ma miyo tam bot Parao, gin ducu gimiye tam me miŋo keken. Itwero waco bot Parao niŋniŋ ni, “Kwarowa ducu yam gubedo jo maryek,” dok ni, “Kwarowa ducu yam gubedo luker?”" 
Isaiah19:12 Ci doŋ joni maryek-ki gitye kwene? Koŋ iwek gutitti lok dok gumi iŋe gin ma Rwot me mony oyubbe me timo i kom Ejipt," 
Isaiah19:13 Rwodi me Joan doŋ gulokke gudoko lumiŋ, ki me Mempic gibwologi woko; jo ma gubedo lutel wic i kakagi ducu aye mumiyo jo Ejipt oŋak." 
Isaiah19:14 Rwot doŋ oketo cwiny me adwala i igi; omiyo jo Ejipt doŋ gicatte acata i gin ducu ma gitiyo, kit macalo lamero cato kwede i nokke." 
Isaiah19:15 Dano mo pe bidoŋ i Ejipt dok pe tye gin mo ma dano mo bitiyo, kadi latel wic nyo kadi dano mo ata, kadi jaŋ otit nyo lagada." 
Isaiah19:16 I kare meno jo Ejipt bibedo calo mon, kun komgi myel amyela pi cin Rwot me mony ma en biyeŋo i komgi." 
Isaiah19:17 Lobo Juda bimiyo lworo bot jo Ejipt; jo ducu gibiwinyo nyiŋe gibibedo ki lworo pi lok ma Rwot me mony doŋ otyeko yubo con me timo i komgi," 
Isaiah19:18 I kare meno gaŋi abic bibedo i lobo Ejipt ma jo ma bedo i igiloko leb jo Kanaan, dok bene ma gikwoŋo kwoŋ i nyiŋ Rwot me mony. Doŋ gaŋ acel ki i kingi gibilwoŋo ni gaŋ me Ceŋ." 
Isaiah19:19 I kare meno keno tyer pa Rwot bibedo i dye lobo Ejipt, ki got ma gicibo ocuŋ atir pi po pi Rwot bicuŋ i waŋ lobone kikome." 
Isaiah19:20 Got man bibedo macalo lanen ma nyuto ni Rwot me mony tye i Ejipt. Ka ce jo kunnu bikok bot Rwot pi jo ma unogi, en bicwalo botgi ŋat ma bilarogi, ŋat ma bilok kun cuŋ pigi ka dok larogi." 
Isaiah19:21 Rwot binyutte kene bot jo Ejipt. I Kare meno jo Ejipt biŋeyo Rwot, gibiwore kun gityero bote gitum ki gitum awaŋa, dok bene gibikwoŋo kwongi i nyim Rwot ci gibicobo bene gin ma gukwoŋo." 
Isaiah19:22 Rwot bipwodo jo Ejipt kun goyogi dok canogi woko. Gibidwogo cen bot Rwot, ci biwinyo legagi dok bene bicaŋogi," 
Isaiah19:23 I kare meno yo gudo bia ki i Ejipt cito wa i Aciria. Jo Aciria bicito i Ejipt, jo Ejipt bene bicito i Aciria, doŋ jo Ejipt kacel ki jo Aciria, gin ducu biworo Lubaŋa kacel." 
Isaiah19:24 I kare meno jo Icrael bibedo me adek me bedo kacel ki jo Ejipt ki jo Aciria, ci gibimiyo lobo ducu gibedo ki gum." 
Isaiah19:25 Rwot me mony bimiyo botgi gum, kunwacci, “Oum obed i komjona jo Ejipt, ki i kom jo Aciria, ma gin aye jo ma an atiyogi ki ciŋa, ki i kom jo Icrael ma gin doŋ gudoko jona kikome.”" 
Isaiah20:1 I mwaka ma lawimony madit ma Cargon kabaka me Aciria ocwalo obino i Acidod, olwenyo i kom jone, ci omayo gaŋ woko," 
Isaiah20:2 i kare meno Rwot onoŋo yam omiyo Icaya wod pa Amoj otito lokke kun wacci “Cit igony boŋo cola woko ki i pyeri, ka igony war woko bene ki i tyeni.” Ci en ocito otimo kit meno, odoŋ munero ma war bene pe i tyene," 
Isaiah20:3 Yam Rwot dok owacci, “Kit macalo laticca Icaya owoto munero, kun tyene bene tye noŋo, pi mwaka adek kulu pi nyuto gin ma bitimme i kom jo Ejipt ki jo Etiopia" 
Isaiah20:4 kit meno bene kabaka me Aciria bitero jo Ejipt woko i opii, ki jo Etiopia bene; bitero jo matino ki jo madito kun giwoto munero, ma tyengi bene noŋo tye noŋo, ki dudgi nono tye nono, ma meno aye bikelo lewic i Ejipt." 
Isaiah20:5 Meno bibalo cwinygi woko, lewic bene bimakogi pi Etiopia ma yam onoŋo gigeno, ki pi Ejipt ma onoŋo yam ginyatte pire-ni." 
Isaiah20:6 I nino meno jo ma bedo i dog nam gibiwacci, ‘Koŋ doŋ wunen gin ma otimme i kom jo ma yam wageno, ma yam wariŋo walaro botgi wek gukonywa, wek bene gularwa ki i ciŋ kabaka me Aciria. Ci man doŋ wabibwot niŋniŋ?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Man lok ma pire tek ma gitito i kom Babilon, ma en aye lobo ma tye i dog namo Kit macalo yamo lapiru kodo kwede i Negeb, tye can mo ma bino kit meno kun a ki yo tuŋ i tim, kun a ki i lobo ma dano lworo twatwal." 
Isaiah21:2 Lubaŋa onyuto bota lok mapek mada; layak gire yako jami pa dano ayaka, ŋat ma balo lobo bene neko dano woko liweŋ ki i lobo. In Elam, cit malo i lweny, ki in Media, doŋ irum gaŋ woko! Kit can ducu ma Babilon okelo abityeko woko, abimiyo gik woko licwic." 
Isaiah21:3 Pi meno omiyo arem madwoŋ oketo pyera woko, omiyo koma ducu rem mwodde atata, calo dako ma rem ki nywal; odiya woko doŋ piny ma pe miyo aromo winyo kit gin mo; poyo koma apoya, ma pe doŋ aromo neno gin mo." 
Isaiah21:4 Tam doŋ oloya woko, lworo madit adada doŋ obalo wiya woko; ma abedo ka paro piny macol ma piny doŋ ribiribi-ni; meno dok okelo myelkom bota mada." 
Isaiah21:5 Doŋ giyubo meja woko gipeto mukeka bene doŋ woko, gitye doŋ ka cam kun gimato mat bene; Wun rwodi wua malo, wuwir kom kwot ki moo." 
Isaiah21:6 Pien Rwot owaco bota kuman ni, “Cit ikel lakur-piny, myero otit gin ma en tye ka nenone." 
Isaiah21:7 Ka en bineno wegi aguragura ma giriŋo aryo aryo, jo ma i wi kana ki jo ma i wi kinaga, myero en ocik ite matek, dok onengi maber twatwal.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Ŋat ma oneno odaŋŋe ni “Ai Rwot, acuŋ i wi Lubele malo dyeceŋ jwi, acuŋ i kabedona bene dyewor benebene." 
Isaiah21:9 Nen wegi aguragura gitye ka riŋo ki aryo aryo.” Cutcut gugamo doge ni, “Babilon doŋ opoto, opoto gire woko; cal jogi apaya-gu ducu gininyogi woko piny.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Wun jona, ma gidinowu woko ka gipyetowu woko calo kal, gin ma awinyo ki bot Rwot me mony, ma en Lubaŋa me Icrael en aye atito botwu." 
Isaiah21:11 Man lok ma pire tek ma gitito i kom Duma: ŋat mo tye ka lwoŋa ki i Ceir, kun penya ni, “Lakur-piny, dyewor obedo niŋniŋ? Lakur-piny, dyewor obedo niŋniŋ?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Lakur-piny ogamo ni, “Piny doŋ oru woko, dyewor dok bidwogo. Ka ce wumito penya pire, ci wutwero dwogo dok ka penya; wutwero dwogo cen kany gire pi tyen me aryo.” Lok ma gitito i kom lobo pa jo Arab" 
Isaiah21:13 Man lok ma pire tek ma gitito i kom lobo pa jo Arab: Wun jo Dedan ma wutye ka mol ki kinagawu-ni, wubibuto i dye okuto mutwe ma tye i lobo pa jo Arab." 
Isaiah21:14 Wumi pii amata bot jo ma orwo pii onekogi, wumi bene cam bot jo murino lweny, wun jo ma wubedo i lobo Tema." 
Isaiah21:15 Pien guriŋo pala lucwan, pala doŋ giwoto woko ki i i akura, ki atum ma giketo iye atero ma doŋ gitelo woko, ki can mogo ma lweny kelo." 
Isaiah21:16 Pien man aye lok ma Rwot owacca, ni, “Doŋ odoŋ mwaka acel keken, calo mwaka me tiyo pakaca, pi meno deyo me Kedar ducu bidoko ginacaya;" 
Isaiah21:17 dok jo me Kedar ma gin oteka ma gibidoŋ ki i kin jo ma celo atero, welgi bibedo nok; pien Rwot ma en Lubaŋa pa jo Icrael doŋ oloko man.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Man lok ma pire tek ma gitito i kom luŋ ma Lubaŋa onyuto iye ginanyuta mogo bot Icaya. Aŋo ma dok otimme ma wun ducu wutye malo i wi odiwu? 
Isaiah22:2 Piŋo dano ma i gaŋ ducu gitye ka daŋŋe ki woo, ma wuwoto wuŋatte aŋata ki yomcwiny? Joni ma gineko i lweny ca, pe ginekogi ki pala lucwan, pe bene ginekog i i lweny kadi ki acel." 
Isaiah22:3 Lulocci ducu onoŋo doŋ guriŋo woko kacel, giŋuko makogi woko ma peya gulwenyo. Jo ducu ma ginoŋogi gimakogi woko, kadi bed jo mogo i kingi guriŋo ka mabor twatwal." 
Isaiah22:4 Mumiyo awaco ni, “Wulok waŋwu cen, pe myerowunena, wuwek akok matek pi cwercwiny ma atye kwede. Ŋat mo pe oyelle ka kweyo cwinya, pien jona ma ginekogi pol twatwal.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Pien Rwot Lubaŋa me mony tye ki ninone, ma ninone obedo nino me woo, ki me nyono dano woko piny, ki nino me baŋo dano ducu i luŋ ma yam en onyuto iye ginanyuta mogo, ma en aye bene nino me muko cel gaŋ woko dok dano gibiwo iye atata i kin godi." 
Isaiah22:6 Mony mua ki i Elam guŋabo juru aterogi doŋ aŋaba, ki mony mua ki i Aram gutweyo aguraguragi i kom gadigadi, kun mony mua ki i Kir doŋ gitye ma guterre woko ki kwodigi." 
Isaiah22:7 Notawu mabeco-gu gupoŋ ki gadigadi lweny keken, dok wegi aguragura gitye gucuŋ woko i dogcel me gaŋ." 
Isaiah22:8 Gin ma yam jo Juda gigeŋo ki komgi doŋ orwenyo woko. I nino meno wuneno jami lweny ma tye i ot me Buŋa. 
Isaiah22:9 Wuneno kit ma gimuko kwede cel me gaŋ pa Daudi, dok wunoŋo yo bene me guro pii ma tye piny i ŋom i joro." 
Isaiah22:10 Wukwano odi ducu ki i Jerucalem, ka wureto odi mogo woko piny wek wunon gweŋ me gero cel matek," 
Isaiah22:11 wukwinyo bene joro me pii i kin cel aryo me jolo pii me joro macon. Ento yam koŋ noŋo pe wutamo pi Lubaŋa ma oyubo lok-ki con, dok ma omiyo otimme kit meno-ni." 
Isaiah22:12 I nino meno Rwot Lubaŋa me mony onoŋo tye ka lwonowu, me bino ka koko ki ka kumo, me bino ka lyelo yer wiwu ki ka ruko boŋo cola." 
Isaiah22:13 Koŋ wunen kit ma wunyero kwede ki yomcwiny, wuneko twoni dyaŋi ki romi ma pe wacce, wucamo riŋo dok wumato koŋo vino jwi. Wuwaco ni, “Wek wacamu cam, dok wamatu mat bene, pien diki wabito woko.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Rwot me mony onyutte kene bota kun waco ni, “Adada, pe gibitimo kica botgi pi bal man, nio waŋ ma guto.” Man lok ma Rwot Lubaŋa me mony aye owaco." 
Isaiah22:15 Rwot Lubaŋa me mony owaco ni, “Bin icit bot Cebna, lakan-jami, ma en aye lalo jami ma i ot pa kabaka, cit ipenye ni," 
Isaiah22:16 “Tic aŋo ma itiyo kany? Dok aŋa ma tye boti kany, ma omiyo it ye ka golo bur lyelli kekeni-ni? Piŋo kono itoŋo lyelli kekeni i wi got malo?" 
Isaiah22:17 Nen, Rwot bikwanyi ki tek boli woko cen, kadi bed onoŋo nene ibedo dano mo matek twatwal. En bimaki woko matek Iikin," 
Isaiah22:18 en biluni woko aduno calo odi lo ci boli woko cen i lobo mo malac mada. Ibito kunnu, i ŋet gadigadini ma onoŋo inyatte kwede twatwal-li, in giri ma ikelo lewic i ot pa laditti." 
Isaiah22:19 Abikwanyi woko ki i dog ticci, ci adwoki woko cen i rwom mapiny." 
Isaiah22:20 “I nino meno ka man doŋ otimme, abilwono laticca Eliakim wod pa Ilkia," 
Isaiah22:21 ci abimiyo en aye ruko boŋŋini me tic, ki del me tweyo pyer, ki kitambara me tweyo wic; tweroni ducu abidwoko i cine, En bibedo calo wego bot jo Jerucalem ki jo Juda," 
Isaiah22:22 Abimiyo twero ducu me ot pa Daudi bedo i wiye. Abimiye layab me loro doggola, ma ka en oloro, ci ŋat mo pe dok twero yabone; dok ka oyabo, ŋat mo pe twero lorone." 
Isaiah22:23 Abimiyo en bedo tek calo teke ma giguro matek, jo me ot pa wonne ducu binoŋo deyo pire." 
Isaiah22:24 “Jo me ot pa wonne ki wadine ducu bibedo ter mapek twatwal i wiye. Gin ducu gibinabbe i kome calo kikopo ki cupa ma giŋabo malo. 
Isaiah22:25 Ka man bitimme i nino meno, ci teke ma yam giguro matek-ki biyogge woko doko logologo poto woko piny, Meno aye bibedo agikki pa jami ducu ma yam guŋabbe i kome. Man lok ma Rwot doŋ otyeko waco.”" 
Isaiah23:1 Man lok ma pire tek ma gitito i kom Turo. Wukok ba, wun mel me Tarcic, pien Turo doŋ odoŋ nono, laboŋo ot mo kadi waŋ wat mo. Onyuto botgi lokke i yo i kare ma gidwogo ki i Caiprac." 
Isaiah23:2 Wucuŋ mot, wun jo ma wubedo i dog nam, wun Lucat-wil me Cidon. Lukwenawu yam guŋolo nam, gubedo i wi pii madwoŋ adada." 
Isaiah23:3 Lim ma yam gunoŋo aye obedo kal me Cikor, ma gukayo ki i dog kulu Nail. In onoŋo yam ibedo lacat-wil ma cato wil i rok mapol." 
Isaiah23:4 Lewic myero omaki, in Cidon, pien nam doŋ oloko, cel gogo matek me dog nam bene owaco ni, “Rem me nywal pe ocana gire, pe bene anywal, pe bene apito latin mo omedo ki doŋo, latin awobi nyo kadi latin nyako.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Ka lok man biwinnye i Ejipt, cwiny dano bicwer matek twatwal pi winyo lok i kom Turo." 
Isaiah23:6 Wukat wucit wa i Tarcic, wucit wukoki, wun jo ma wubedo i dog nam!" 
Isaiah23:7 Man gaŋ ma yam dano tye iye ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, gaŋ ma yam ocakke con twatwal, en aye gaŋ ma yam ocwalo lukwenane guŋolo nam, me cito ka bedo i lobo mogo mukene." 
Isaiah23:8 Aŋa ma oyubo lok man i kom Turo, gaŋ ma poko Lalukana me deyo me Loc, ma lucat-witle bene yam gubedo rwodi, ma gubedo jo ma pigi dito adada i lobo?" 
Isaiah23:9 Rwot me mony aye ma onoŋo oyubo, pi balo wakkegi me deyo woko ducu, dok pi miyo jo ma i lobo ducu ma yam giketo deyo i komgi doko mwol." 
Isaiah23:10 Wucit wupur lobo, wun jo ma wubedo i Tarcic; pien waŋwat me Turo doŋ pe," 
Isaiah23:11 Rwot doŋ oryeyo ciŋe woko i wi nam, en bene doŋ otyeko yeŋo ker ducu mapatpat; Rwot doŋ otyeko miyo cik i kom Kanaan, ni myero gitur waŋ apidiŋŋe matek-ki." 
Isaiah23:12 En owaco ni, “Yomcwiny ma yam wutye kwede doŋ ogik, wun jo Cidon; kombeddi doŋ gidiyowu woko matek, ma kadi bed wukat i Caiprac, kunnu bene pe wubinoŋo ka yweyo.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Koŋ wunen lobo pa jo Kaldaya! Gin aye rok ma onoŋo gumoko ni Turo bibedo kabedo pa lee tim, ento pe jo Aciria. Gin aye ma gutado lubele ma gucudo malo likuŋ kunnu, ka dok gumuko odi madito woko ducu ki kunnu, gumiyo dok ‘odoko wi obur." 
Isaiah23:14 Wukoki, wun mel me Tarcic, pien ka-kannewu ma yam tek-ki doŋ giketo woko." 
Isaiah23:15 I kare meno wi dano biwil woko i kom jo Turo pi mwaka pyerabiro kulu, ma rom aroma ki kare me kwo pa kabaka acel. Ka mwaka pyerabiro doŋ otum, ci Turo bibedo calo malaya ma giwero pire ni," 
Isaiah23:16 “Kwany opuk agoya, cit kwede i dye gaŋ, in dako ma malaya ma wi dano owil woko i komi-ni! Mi dwan opuk okok ma winnye mamit, wer bene wer mapol, wek dano gucak po piri.”" 
Isaiah23:17 I kare ma mwaka pyerabiro doŋ otum, Rwot dok bilimo Turo, ci dok bicako dwoke i dog ticce. En dok bitic i lobo mapatpat ma tye i wi lobo, kun tiyo kwedgi dok terogi macalo malaya." 
Isaiah23:18 Magoba ducu ma en binono i cato wille-nu, pe bigwoko, pe bene bikano mo kadi me mono, ento bityero ‘woko me bedo gin maleŋ bot Rwot, ci gibiwilo ki cam mabup ki boŋŋi mabeco pi jo ma bedo i nyim Rwot." 
Isaiah24:1 Nen, Rwot biweko lobo doŋ nono, bimiyo doko obur, dok en biloko lobo bedo okani, ci keyo dano woko me bedo iye." 
Isaiah24:2 I Kare meno can ma opoto i kom ajwaka bibedo rom ki can ma opoto i kom dano ata; can ma opoto i kom opii bedo rom ki can ma opoto i kom laditte; can pa aŋeca bene bedo rom ki can pa min ot ma en tiyo bote; can pa lacat-wil bibedo rom ki can pa lawil-wil; can pa lami-banya bibedo rom ki can pa laden-banya; can pa ŋat ma pido banya bedo rom ki pa ŋat ma tye ki banya. 
Isaiah24:3 Lobo bidoŋ nono laboŋo gin mo, kun noŋo giyako jami ma tye iye woko ducu; pien man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Isaiah24:4 Lobo tye ka kumo, tekone bene orwenyo woko, wi lobo ducu piny oballe woko, teko pa lobo orwenyo woko, polo ducu doŋ onyoŋŋe woko." 
Isaiah24:5 Lobo doŋ oballe gire woko i nyim Lubaŋa, pi jo ma bedo iye; pien dano doŋ guturo cik pa Lubaŋa woko, pe gulubo gin ma yam en ociko, guturo bene wa gicikke ma ri nakanaka-ni woko." 
Isaiah24:6 Meno omiyo Lubaŋa oceno lobo woko, jo ma bedo iye gitye ka neno can iye pi balgi; meno en gin mumiyo jo ma i lobo tye ka waŋ, jo manoknok keken aye gudoŋ," 
Isaiah24:7 Koŋo vino bene tye ka kumo, olok kikome bene doŋ oballe woko, jo ducu ma cwinygi yom tye ka cur acura." 
Isaiah24:8 Ajaa agoya ma kok maloŋo pi yomo cwiny dano doŋ oliŋ woko, woo pa jo ma daŋŋe ki yomcwiny madwoŋ doŋ olin woko, yomcwiny mo ma miyo dano goyo opuk bene doŋ pe." 
Isaiah24:9 Dano pe dok mato koŋo vino ki wer i doggikit ma yam con; lumat koŋo doŋ noŋo koŋo kec i doggi marac. 
Isaiah24:10 Jami ma i gaŋ ducu doŋ onyobbe woko, odi ducu ma tye iye giloro doggi woko wek dano pe gudony iye." 
Isaiah24:11 Dano tye ka daŋŋe ki koko pi koŋo vino ma doŋ orwenyo woko; kit yomcwiny ma yam gitye kwede doŋ ogik woko, yomcwiny mo doŋ pe i lobo." 
Isaiah24:12 Gaŋ doŋ giweko odoko obur, dog cel bene gituro, ci giŋidowoko matitino." 
Isaiah24:13 Bitimme kit meno i kin lurok ma gibedo i wi lobo, bibedo calo yaa ma doŋ gipwono nyige woko, nyo macalo olok ma doŋ gikoro nyige woko." 
Isaiah24:14 Dano ilo dwangi malo kun giwero wer me yomcwiny; woo ma gidaŋŋe kwede pi dit pa Rwot winnye wa yo tuŋ potoceŋ. 
Isaiah24:15 Pi meno wun jo ma wutye wokceŋ, wumi deyo bot Rwot; ki wun jo ma wubedo i dog nam, wumi deyo i nyiŋ Rwot me Icrael." 
Isaiah24:16 Cakke ki i agikki piny wawinyo dano giwero wer me pako Rwot, ŋat Maleŋ deyone dit rom mene! Ento an agamo ni, “Ajony likon, ajony likoŋ, can i wiya gira! Pien jo ma luroro doŋ gutany woko ki lok rorogi i kom dano, pi lok rorogi-ni omiyo gidoto dano marac twatwal.”" 
Isaiah24:17 Lworo ki bur, ki owic, bimakowu, wun jo ma wubedo i lobo," 
Isaiah24:18 ŋat ma oriŋo woo ma bikelo lworo, bipoto woko i bur; ka ce okatti woko kii bur, ci bimoko i owic. Pien polo doŋ oyabbe woko, acakki me te lobo bene, tye ka yeŋŋe." 
Isaiah24:19 Lobo doŋ oballe woko, lobo doŋ obar woko i dyere, lobo oyeŋŋe matek twatwal." 
Isaiah24:20 Lobo doŋ tagge calo lamero koŋo, yeŋŋe calo ot aduc; balle doŋ dwoŋ, onure woko, orette woko piny ma pe dok twero a malo." 
Isaiah24:21 I kare meno Rwot biketo can i kom mony me polo, ki i polo kunnu, ki i lobo kany, i kom luker me lobo." 
Isaiah24:22 Gin ducu gibidoko lumabuc, ka gicokogi woko kacel i but; gibiloro wigi woko i ot mabuc, ka doŋ gicako keto can i komgi ma noŋo doŋ koŋ kare okato malac." 
Isaiah24:23 Olee bitwodo dwe woko, lewic bene bimako cen; pien Rwot me mony aye bibedo kabaka i wi Cion, ki i Jerucalem, binyuto deyone i nyim ludoŋone." 
Isaiah25:1 Ai Rwot, in aye Lubaŋana; abidwori dok abipako nyiŋi, pien doŋ itiyo jami me aura twatwal, dok icobo gin ma yam iyubo con, ki gen ki ada." 
Isaiah25:2 Iloko gaŋ odoko obur; kadi wa gaŋi ducu ma yam girumogi ki cel matek; odi pa lurok bene gudoko obur; pe dok gibigero gedo mukene kakare. 
Isaiah25:3 Meno bimiyo lwak rok matego giketo deyo i komi; gaŋi pa lurok ducu ma kica pe iye gibilwori. 
Isaiah25:4 Pien in aye kabedo matek ma lucan giriŋo gilaro iye, in cel gogo matek ka ma jo ma piny obwoyogi bene giriŋo gilaro iye, in aye ka ma dano gwoko iye yamo kot ki lyeto me cen; pien alur yweyo dog dano ma gin pe lukica calo yamo kot ma kodo kun pyeto kot wa i kor cel," 
Isaiah25:5 nyo calo lyeto ka piny doŋ otwo. Doŋ ijuko woo pa lukwor woko, macalo tipo pol ma kweyo lyeto; meno omiyo jo ma pe lukica doŋ guliŋ, pe dok giwero wer." 
Isaiah25:6 Rwot me mony bitedo karama pi rok ducu i wi got Cion, karama ma gicamo iye riŋo mogo makur, ki mato koŋo vino ma ocek mamit adada, ki riŋo ma miyu, ma moo ma i cogo dwoŋ iye ata, ki koŋo vino ma giliyo woko maber ka doŋ ocek mamit adada." 
Isaiah25:7 Dok Rwot biyeco boŋo ma giumo ki rok woko ducu, i wi got man, ki kitambara ma gubedo ka rukone i kare me kwero cola." 
Isaiah25:8 Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ bimwonyo to woko matwal, dok en bidunyo pig waŋ dano woko ducu, ci kwanyo lewic woko ki i wi jone i nyim jo ducu i wi lobo; pien man lok ma Rwot aye owaco." 
Isaiah25:9 I nino meno gibiwaco ni, “Nen, man aye Lubaŋawa ma wabedo ka kurone pi larowa. Man aye Rwot ma wabedo ka kurone-ni; wabedu doŋ ki yomcwiny pi kit ma en olarowa kwede.”"
