Isaiah25:10 Pien ciŋ Rwot biywe i wi got Cion, ento Moab mere gibinyono woko piny i kabedone, kit macalo dyaŋ’ nyono kwede reŋ kal i bur mna gionyo iye cet dyaŋ," 
Isaiah25:11 Jo Moab biryeyo badgi i dyere kit ma dano mo ma tye ka kwaŋ ryeyo kwede bade me kwaŋ; ento Rwot bimiyo wakkegi gik woko kacel ki dito ma gitye kwede. 
Isaiah25:12 Celgi ma gugero ma ocudo malo likuŋ ca gibidwoko woko piny, ka gicoro gireto woko piny i lobo, poto wa i apwa." 
Isaiah26:1 I nino meno gibiwero wer man i lobo me Juda, ni, “Watye ki gag matek adada; Rwot aye omiyo larre tye, oketo celle oguro orumo piny woko." 
Isaiah26:2 Wuyab dogcel woko, wek rok ma kitgi atir, ma gigenne, gudony iye." 
Isaiah26:3 Ŋat ma tamme tye i komi, imiyo bedo ki kuc me ada, pien noŋo geni." 
Isaiah26:4 Gen Rwot nakanaka, pien Rwot Lubaŋa aye ma bigwokowa kare ducu." 
Isaiah26:5 Pien doŋ odwoko woko piny jo ma yam gibedo i gag ma otiŋŋe i wi cere malo. En ocorogi oretogi woko piny i lobo, oretogi piny i apwa." 
Isaiah26:6 Dano doŋ onyonogi ki tyengi, tyen lucan, ki tyen jo ma piny obwoyogi.”" 
Isaiah26:7 Yo pa dano ma kite atir obedo apyel, cere pe iye, yo-nu in aye ma iyubo." 
Isaiah26:8 Ai Rwot, wan wakuri i yo ma inyuto botwa i ŋolo koppi; cwinywa bene tye i kom nyigi, dok bene watamo piri twatwal." 
Isaiah26:9 Aparo piri dyewor, tipona ma tye iiya puk odiko con ka yenyi. Pien ka iŋolo kop ilobo, jo ma bedo iye pwonyo kit ma atir." 
Isaiah26:10 Dano marac kadi bed gitine gin maber, pe twero pwonnye me bedo dano ma kite atir; bedo mere ka timo tim mogo ma pe tye atir i lobo pa dano ma cwinygi atir, kun pe neno dit pa Rwot." 
Isaiah26:11 Ai Rwot, badi tye otiŋŋe malo, ento lukworri pe gineno. Mi lewic omakgi, ai Rwot. Mi gunen kit ma imaro kwede joni; cwal doŋ mac ma iyubo pi jo macalo meno, wek otyekgi woko." 
Isaiah26:12 Ai Rwot, ibimiyo wabedo ki kuc, pien ticwa ducu in aye ma itiyo piwa." 
Isaiah26:13 Ai Rwot Lubaŋawa, rwodi mukene ma pe in yam guloyowa, ento wan wabedo ka tuco nyiŋi keken." 
Isaiah26:14 Gin doŋ guto woko, pe dok gibibedo kwo! Doŋ gudoko tipo, pe dok gibitwero a malo! In icito ilimogi ci ityekogi woko, imiyo wi dano bene doŋ wil woko i komgi." 
Isaiah26:15 Ento doŋ imiyo rokwa onya, ai Rwot, in doŋ imiyo rokwa man onya; in aye ma imiyo dano guketo deyo i komi, imedo waŋ lobowa bene odoko malac." 
Isaiah26:16 Ai Rwot, wan wabedo ka legi i kare ma watye i can, i kare ma iketo can i komwa, wan wabedo ka yenyi." 
Isaiah26:17 Wabedo calo dako ma tye ka minne ki arem, kun twennye atwenya ki koko pi arem ma en tye kwede; wan bene yam wabedo kit meno i nyimi, ai Rwot." 
Isaiah26:18 Wan wabedo ka minne i arem, ento ka nywalo latin dano pe doŋ wanywalo gin mo. Pe tye loc mo ma wan waloyo pi lobowa, pe tye gin mo ma watiyo ci watyeko." 
Isaiah26:19 Joni ma yam doŋ guto woko, pud dok gibibedo kwo, komgi muto-ni dok bicer. Wun jo ma wubedo i apwa, wuco woko wek wuwer wer pi yomcwiny! Pien toyoni aye toyo me leŋo, pi meno ibimiyo toyo bedo tye i lobo pa jo ma yam doŋ guto woko." 
Isaiah26:20 Wubin, wun jona, wudony i kicikawu, ka wulor doggola woko; koŋ wukanne kunnu PI kare mo manoknok, nio waŋ ma akemo pa Rwot doŋ okato." 
Isaiah26:21 Pien nen, Rwot tye ka bino kun a ki i kabedone pi keto can i kom jo ma bedo i lobo pi balgi; remo ma doŋ oo i lobo binen woko ka maleŋ, lobo bene pe doŋ biumo kom jo muto." 
Isaiah27:1 I nino maca, Rwot biketo can i kom Leviatan, ma en aye twol ma ŋeyo paŋŋe twatwal me laro kwone; Rwot biketo can i kome ki twon pala lucwanne matek, mabit mada, dok bineko min kulu ma bedo i nam." 
Isaiah27:2 I nino maca, Rwot biwacci, “Wuwer wer i kom poto olok ma yomocwiny," 
Isaiah27:3 ma an Rwot aye agwoko; dok aonyo pii iye kare ducu. Agwoko dyeceŋ ki dyewor, wek ŋat mo pe obal woko;" 
Isaiah27:4 pe atye ki akemo. Ka kono nene okuto ki ocok tye iye, kono acito alwenyo kwedgi, ka awaŋogi woko ducu liweŋ." 
Isaiah27:5 Nyo ka ce gularo bota ni akonygi, myero gucikke me bedo kweda ki kuc, myero gucikke me bedo kweda ki kuc.”" 
Isaiah27:6 I Kare ma bino anyim Yakobo bicomo lwite i ŋom, Icrael bituru, dok bicako lot, ci nyige bipono lobo ducu." 
Isaiah27:7 Rwot mono yam ojwero Icrael woko lirwatrwat kit ma gijwero ki lukworgi ma gujwerogi ca? Nyo onekogi woko bene kit macalo en oneko ki jo ma onekogi ca? 
Isaiah27:8 Ai Rwot, yam ipyem kwedgi, ka iryemogi woko, kun ikutogi ki yamo dogi me nyiko woko cen, i kare ma yamo me oro tye ka kodo." 
Isaiah27:9 Man bimiyo igonyo Yakobo woko ki i balle, dok man aye bibedo adwoggi me kwanyo balle: en biloko godi ducu me keno tyer doko calo gweŋ ma giodo woko mapwot, kun Acera ma jok ma dako nyo keno tyer me wano odok eceta pe dok tye mo ma ocuŋ," 
Isaiah27:10 Gaŋ me cel gogo doŋ giweko odoŋ obur, kabedone doŋ giweko odoŋ nono calo tim ata; roci dyaŋ gicamo lum kunnu, gibuto ki kunnu kun gijwero pot oboke woko ducu ki i jaŋ yadi." 
Isaiah27:11 I kare ma jaŋ yadi doŋ otwo woko, ci gicako turone woko; mon toŋo woko me yen tedo. Pien gubedo rok ma pe niaŋ, Lubaŋa ma oketogi pe kica mo bimako i komgi wacel, Lubaŋa ma ocweyogi pe bitimogi maber." 
Isaiah27:12 I kare maca Rwot bidino kal cakke ki i kulu Euprate o kwede wa i kulu me Ejipt; Rwot bicokowu woko kacel wun jo Icrael. 
Isaiah27:13 Dok bene i nino meno, gibikuto iye tum madit mada, ka doŋ bimiyo jo ma yam onoŋo gurwenyo woko i lobo Aciria, ki mukene ma onoŋo giryemogi gucito i lobo Ejipt, gibidwogo cen ka woro Rwot i wi got maleŋ, i Jerucalem." 
Isaiah28:1 Tok me wakke pa lumero me lobo Epraim bineno can, kacel ki ature me deyone mamwonya mada, ma en aye deyo ma ner woko, ma tye malo i ŋet nota ma ceko twatwal, ma obedo pa jo ma koŋo vino doŋ oloyogi woko." 
Isaiah28:2 Nen, Rwot tye ki dano mo matek ma tye ki twero; macalo yamo kot ma kotte tye ka cwer ki pee, yamo ma balo piny woko abala, dok macalo yamo kot madit twatwal, ma piine mol lak woko ata, en bireto dano woko piny ki tek kit meno." 
Isaiah28:3 Tok me wakke pa lumero me lobo Epraim gibinyono woko piny ki tyen; 
Isaiah28:4 ki ature me deyone mamwonya mada-ni, ma en aye deyo ma ner woko, ma tye malo i ŋet kufu ma ceko cam twatwal bibedo ma rom aroma ki nyig oduro mukwoŋo cek, ma ŋolo kare me oro peya oo; dano ka oneno, ruyo camone oyotoyot tekke ka oo i ciŋe," 
Isaiah28:5 I nino meno Rwot me mony bibedo macalo deyo, ki lalukana maber twatwal, bot jone ma gudoŋ;" 
Isaiah28:6 en aye bibedo cwiny me ŋolo kop atir bot gat ma ŋolo kop, dok bibedo tek pa ŋat ma juko lweny i, dogcel me gaŋ." 
Isaiah28:7 Jo man bene doŋ gipaŋŋe apaŋa ki wot ki koŋo vino ma gumato, gitagge ki wot pien gumato koŋo vino makec mada; ajwagi ki lunebi gipaŋŋe ki wot pi mato koŋo mogo makec twatwal, koŋo vino ma gumato-ni doŋ obalo wigi woko, gipaŋŋe doŋ apaŋa pi mato koŋo mogo makec twatwal. Wigij doŋ pe mako ginanyuta ma Lubaŋa tye ka nyuto botgi maber, pe giŋolo kop kakare;" 
Isaiah28:8 pien wi meja ducu ŋolo opoŋ ki nok keken, pe tye kabedo mo ma gin mo marac pe iye." 
Isaiah28:9 “En bipwonyo aŋa doki? En dok bitito lokke bot aŋa? Bot litino ma pud gigenogi dot agena bo? Bot jo ma pud gikwanyo doggi akwanya ki i dog tuno bo? 
Isaiah28:10 Lokke ducu tere pe, pe waniaŋ lokke; en temo pwonyowa nukuta ki nukuta, iwinyo kany acel, dok iwinyo kuca acel.”" 
Isaiah28:11 Adada, Rwot doŋ bilok ki jo magi, ki leb pa jo ma dumo aduma, ki leb pa jo ma gin welo;" 
Isaiah28:12 ma yam guwaco botgi ni, “Man aye yweyo; wumi yweyo bot ŋat muol, kun en tye kany”; ento gin gigi gukwero winyo lokke woko." 
Isaiah28:13 Meno bimiyo lok pa Rwot doko gin ma tere pe botgi, pe gibiniaŋ lokke; bibedo macalo en opwonyogi nukuta ki nukuta, ma giwinyo kany acel, dok giwinyo kuca acel. Wek gin gudok gupot woko ki yo ŋegi, gutur woko, ka gieikgi ki owic gimakgi woko." 
Isaiah28:14 Pi meno wuwiny lok pa Rwot, wun luŋala, ma wutye ka loyo rok man i Jerucalem!" 
Isaiah28:15 Pien wuwaco ni, “Doŋ watyeko cikke woko ki to, dok bene doŋ waporo lok woko kacel ki lyel; ka ce can madit twatwal owok ki i kinwa, pe bigudo komwa, gire; pien doŋ wa-loko goba odoko kalarrewa, wakanne woko i lok ma pe ada”;" 
Isaiah28:16 pi meno omiyo Rwot Lubaŋa owacci, “Nen, doŋ aketo got me wel i Cion got ma gitemo ma okatti woko doŋ maber, ma en aye bibedo acakki me te guti: ŋat ma ye pe bibedo ki lworo mo ma baŋe woko." 
Isaiah28:17 Abiloko ŋolo kop atir doko tol me pimo ot, kun kit ma atir bedo birigi: pee bimolo kalarrewu ma opoŋ ki goba-ni woko, pii bene bipoŋ woko libyeny i kakannewu.”" 
Isaiah28:18 Meno bimiyo cikkewu ma wucikke ki to tur woko, ki lok ma wuporo kacel ki lyel bene pe bicuŋ: dok ka can madit biwok kii kinwu, can meno bigoyowu wupwodde piny lirwat." 
Isaiah28:19 Kare ducu ma can meno biwok ki i kinwu, ci terowu woko, pien biwok dyeceŋ ki dyewor nino kinino; doŋ niaŋ i lok meno bikelo lworo madit twatwal." 
Isaiah28:20 Pien bibedo rom ki dano ma otemo buto i kitanda macek, kun umme ki gium ma pe romme kadi ki acel." 
Isaiah28:21 Pien Rwot bia malo macalo yam koŋ otimo i wi got Perajim, akemo bimake kit macalo yam koŋ omake kwede i luŋ me Gibeon’ pi cobo ticce, ento ticce dok pat twatwal ba! Pi cobo ticce ento ticce weloba!" 
Isaiah28:22 Kombeddi doŋ wuwek ŋala obedi, wek pegitwewu dok matek twatwal; pien awinyo ka Rwot Lubaŋa me mony ociko pi tyeko lobo woko ducu:" 
Isaiah28:23 Wucik itwu, wuwiny dwana; wuter itwu, wuwiny lokka." 
Isaiah28:24 Ŋat ma puro potone wek eco iye kodi, bedo ka purone nakanaka ma pe giko purone? En bedo ka boto poto ki lokone nakanaka?" 
Isaiah28:25 Ka doŋ otyeko tenone, doŋ pe coyo iye toke, pito iye okwer, ka dok pito iye ŋano i tyeŋ ki tyen, ki cayiri bene pe pito kakare, ki ŋano matino i ŋet lak peto?" 
Isaiah28:26 Pien Lubaŋane pwonye maber, kun niaŋe bene maber kit ma myero en oti kwede." 
Isaiah28:27 Toke mere pe gidino ki yat me dino bel, okwer bene pe giloro tyen gadigadi ki iye; toke gire giteno atena ki odoo, ento okwer gityero atyera ki kidi me tyerone." 
Isaiah28:28 Kai kwon bene gidino adina, ento pe gidino matek twatwal ma gityero nyige woko. Kadi aguragura ywayo tyen gadigadi wok ki iye, pe tyero nyige gire." 
Isaiah28:29 Man bene oa ki bot Rwot me mony, en Rwot ma giuro i miyo tam, ryekone dit ma pe wacce." 
Isaiah29:1 Ariel doŋ oneno can ma rom mene? Ariel ma en aye gaŋ ma onoŋo Daudi oguro kemane iye-ni, Wuwek mwaka koŋ okat aryo nyo adek mo, kun wubedo ka kwero nino madito mapatpat i karegi kikome." 
Isaiah29:2 Ento abimiyo Ariel neno can; koko ki kumo bibedo tye iye, bibedo calo keno me waŋo gitum awaŋa," 
Isaiah29:3 Abiguro kemana i ŋeti kun arumi woko dyere, abirumi woko ki lubele ma gucudo malo likuŋ, abitoro lobo abako i nyimi calo cel." 
Isaiah29:4 Abidwoki piny i te lobo, ibilok ki piny i apwa, dwani bidonyo i te lobo calo dwanjok, ki lokki biwinnye liwewe kun donyo kwede i apwa." 
Isaiah29:5 Ento lukworri bibedo mapol calo apwa, ki jo ma kica pe i cwinygi bibedo calo cuŋ kai ma yamo tero. Dok cutcut i kare meno," 
Isaiah29:6 Rwot me mony bilimi, kun miyo kot mor mwoc atata, oyeŋyeŋ bedo tye ki woo bene bedo dit, ki yamo lapiru, yamo kot, kacel ki mac mager twatwal." 
Isaiah29:7 Lwak mony me rok mapatpat mubakke lipim ma lwenyo i kom jo Ariel, jo ducu ma gilwenyo i komgi ki i komkabedo matek me kalarregi, ma unogi, gin ducu gibidoko calo lek, gin ma Lubaŋa nyuto dyewor." 
Isaiah29:8 Kit macalo dano ma kec neko leko ni etye ka cam, ci cutcut co woko ma noŋo iye noŋo, nyo macalo dano ma orwo pii oketo leko ni etye ka mato pii, cutcut co woko ma noŋo orwo pii doŋ okete matek, kun mito mato pii; lwak rok ducu ma lwenyo i kom got Cion bene, gibibedo kit meno." 
Isaiah29:9 Wubaŋŋe giwu kekenwu wek wubed lumiŋ, wubal waŋwu woko kekenwu wek wubed lutowaŋ! Wumer, laboŋo mato koŋo vino mo; wupaŋŋe apaŋa ki wot laboŋo koŋo mo ma wumato!" 
Isaiah29:10 Pien Rwot doŋ oonyo i komwu cwiny me nino matek; omiyo waŋwu woko, ma gin aye lunebiwu; ki wiwu bene oumo woko ma gin aye jo ma neno piny." 
Isaiah29:11 Gin ma Lubaŋa nyuto bot lunebi ducu doŋ odoko calo buk ma gimwono doge woko ki tuŋ botwu, ma ka gimiyo bot dano mo ma ŋeyo kwan kun giwacce ni, “Bin ikwan man,” ci en gamo ni, “Pe atwero kwanone pien gimwono doge woko.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Dok bene ka gimiyo bot ŋat ma kwiya kwan, kun giwacce ni, “Bin ikwan man,” en gamo ni, “Pe aŋeyo kwan.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Ka doŋ Rwot owaco ni, “Rok man kara ginyiko cok kweda ki doggi noŋo, giketo deyo i koma bene ki doggi noŋo, cwinygi pe tye i koma wacel, lworo ma gilwora kwede-ni meno cik pa dano ma gipwonyogi kwede." 
Isaiah29:14 Pi meno, dok abitimo gin me aura i kom rok man, gin me aura dok me tano twatwal; mamiyo ryeko rwenyo woko bot jo maryek, ki ŋec pa jo megi ma giniaŋ matut bikanne woko.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Jo ma kano tamgi woko ki bot Rwot ka matut, jo ma tiyo ticgi ka macol, jo meno bineno can, dok ma giwaco ni, “Aŋa kono ma nenowa? Aŋa kono ma neyowa?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Koŋ wunen kit ma wun wuloko kwede kiloŋ! Gitwero poro lacwe-agulu ki lobo agulu ma en cweyo? Gin ma gitiyo atiya twero waco ki ŋat ma ocweye ni, “Pe in aye ma icweya”? Nyo gin ma gicweyo twero waco ki ŋat ma ocweye ni, “In pe iŋeyo gin mo?”" 
Isaiah29:17 Odoŋ kare manok twatwal Lebanon bidoko poto ma ceko cam mabup mada, kun poto ma yam ceko cam mabup twatwal-li doŋ olokke odoko buŋa," 
Isaiah29:18 I nino meno jo ma itgi odiŋ gibiwinyo lok ma gikwano ki i buk, lutowaŋ bene waŋgi biyabbe, kun gia woko ki i mutu ki colpiny," 
Isaiah29:19 Jo mamwol dok gibinoŋo yomcwiny i Rwot, lucan bene gibibedo ki yomcwiny i ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael." 
Isaiah29:20 Pien jo ma pe ki kica doŋ bibedo pe, jo ma gin luŋala bene gibitum woko, lulib dano dyewor me timo tim maraco gibityekogi woko liweŋ," 
Isaiah29:21 ki jo ma miyo kop loyo dano pi lokgi, ma giciko owic pi ŋat ma jukogi i kabedo me ŋolo kop, ma gicwalo ŋat ma kite atir woko pi lok mogo ma tere pe." 
Isaiah29:22 Meno omiyo Rwot, ma yam olaro Abraim, oloko lok i kom ot pa Yakobo ni, “Lewic pe dok bimako Yakobo, waŋe bene pe dok biballe." 
Isaiah29:23 Pien ka en bineno litinone, ma gin aye tic ma an atiyo ki ciŋa, kun gitye bote, gibimiyo nyiŋa bedo me awora; gibiŋeyo atir ni ŋat Maleŋ pa Yakobo gire leŋ, gibibedo ki lworo i kom Lubaŋa me Icrael." 
Isaiah29:24 Jo ma ŋak woko ki i cwinygi biniaŋ, ki jo ma bedo ka ŋur aŋura bene biye ni gipwonygi.”" 
Isaiah30:1 “Litino ma lujemo gibineno can,” Rwot ma owaco, “jo ma tiyo ki tamgi, ma pe mera; dok ma giribbe ki rok ma cwinya dagi, me medo bal i kom bal;" 
Isaiah30:2 ma gucako wotgi me cito i Ejipt, laboŋo penyo koŋ tam ki bota, pi laro bot Parao ni ogwokgi, dok pi yenyo ka kanne i tipo me Ejipt!" 
Isaiah30:3 Pi meno ka gwokkewu ki bot Parao bilokke miyowu lewic, dok tipo me kannewu i Ejipt bimiyo alee twodowu woko." 
Isaiah30:4 Pien kadi bed luditone tye i Joan, dok lukwenane o wa i Kanec," 
Isaiah30:5 ŋat acel acellewic bimako, pi rok ma pe twero konyogi, ma pe ginoŋo iye kony mo kadi gin mo maber, ento ginoŋo lewic ki cac keken.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Man lok ma Lubaŋa oloko i kom lee me Negeb. I dye lobo ma tye iye ayelayela madit ki can mapek, ka ma min labwor ki twon labwor gia iye, kacel ki twol ororo ki ma tuk cito malo, gutiŋo lwak lonyogi madwoŋ adada i ne lwak kana, ki lim akanagi i kom aruk pa kinaga, kun gitero bot rok ma pe twero konyogi." 
Isaiah30:7 Pien kony ma Ejipt miyo lam, dok gin mo maber pe iye; meno omiyo acako nyiŋe ni, “Rakab ma bedo abeda laboŋo tic mo,”" 
Isaiah30:8 Kombeddi doŋ icit igor coc i nyimgi i kom got ma apada, ka dok bene ico i buk, wek gigwok obed tye pi kare me anyim, macalo caden ma bedo nakanaka." 
Isaiah30:9 Pien gin gubedo lujemo ma lugoba, litino ma kwero winyo lok pa Rwot;" 
Isaiah30:10 ma giwaco bot jo ma neno piny ni, “Pe wunen piny.” Ki bot lunebi giwaco ni, “Pe wutit botwa lok ma tye atir; ento wutit botwa lok mabecone keken, wutit lok me goba keken," 
Isaiah30:11 wuŋak woko, wuwek yo, wek pe wamedde ki winyo lok mo pi ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael.”" 
Isaiah30:12 Meno omiyo ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael owaco ni, “Pien wun doŋ wucayo lok man, ento wuketo genwu i uno dano ki bwologi, kun wujeŋŋe i kom timwu meno ma wutimo;" 
Isaiah30:13 meno bimiyo balwu man bedo komwu, macalo cel ma ocudo malo likuŋ ma obar woko dok cok muk me poto woko piny, ma mukwoko-lipuny oyotoyot." 
Isaiah30:14 Mukke bedo rom ki to agulu ma gicweyo, ma giŋido woko laboŋo kica mo, kun otakone mo pe ma odon, ma gitwero tic kwede me karo mac ki i keno, nyo ma romo twomo pii ki i joro.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Man aye lok ma Rwot Lubaŋa owaco, ma en ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael, “Wudwog cen, wubed mot, wek wularre; ka wubedo mot ki gen, wubinoŋo teko.” Ento ceŋ wukwero woko," 
Isaiah30:16 kun wuwaco ni, “Pe, wan giwa wabiriŋo ki aguragura,” meno bimiyo wuriŋo oyot mada, dok ni, “Wabiriŋo madwir twatwal,” meno bimiyo jo ma ryemo korwu bedojo madwir adada," 
Isaiah30:17 Jo alip kulu biriŋo pi lworo dano acel keken, wun wubiriŋo pi lworo lukwor abic keken, nio waŋ ma wudoŋ calo yat bendera ma tye i wi got, calo bendera ma tye i wi cere malo." 
Isaiah30:18 Kadi bed kumeno, ento Rwot tye ka kuro me nyuto berre botwu; meno omiyo en oyubbe pi timowu kica. Pien Rwot aye Lubaŋa ma ŋolo kop atir, jo ducu ma gibedo kun gikure gitye ki gum." 
Isaiah30:19 Adada, wun jo Ci on ma wubedo i Jerucalem pe doŋ wubikok matwal. Rwot bitimowu kica ka ce owinyo kokowu; ka owinyo ci en bigamo dogwu." 
Isaiah30:20 Kadi bed Rwot omi wucam kwon me aroma, ki dokomi wumat pii me can, ento Lapwonywu pe dok bikanne, wubibedo ka neno Lapwonywu ki waŋwu," 
Isaiah30:21 Ka ce onoŋo wuŋak woko, ci wubiwinyo lok ma a ki yo tuŋ ŋewu, kun waco ni, “Yo ene, wulubi,” ka wulokke yo tuŋ lacuc nyo yo tuŋ lacam." 
Isaiah30:22 Ka dok wubicako balo cal jogiwu ma gipayo apaya ma wudeyo komgi ki ryal, kacel ki calwu ma giliyo aliya, ma wudeyo komgi ki jabu, wubibologi woko calo gubedo gin me kwer, kun wuwaco ni, “Wudirre cen!”" 
Isaiah30:23 Rwot bimiyo kot cwer botwu pi kodi ma doŋ wucoyo i potti ki pi cam ma tye ka cek i potti, bimiyo camwu cek maber dok mabup twatwal. I kare meno dyaŋiwu bibedo ka cam i bar olet malac;" 
Isaiah30:24 ci bimiyo twoniwu ki kanawu ma gipuro bicamo cam ma girubo ki kado, ma gipyeto woko ki odero." 
Isaiah30:25 Kulu me pii ma mol bibedo tye i wi godi ducu ki i wi cere ducu, i nino ma gibineko iye dano matek i kare ma gedo mogo ma ocudo malo likuŋ bimuk poto woko piny.," 
Isaiah30:26 Dok bene dwe biryeny maleŋ twatwal kun caro piny calo ceŋ maryeny, ento ceŋ bibedo ma rom meno tyen abiro, i nino ma Rwot bitweyo iye waŋ ret pa jone, ki caŋo waŋ bur ma en kikome aye oketo rette i kom jone." 
Isaiah30:27 Nen, nyiŋ Rwot bino kun a ki ka mabor, kun kinigane tye ka waŋ calo mac, ma yito ocido licuc duny cito malo ma oculle woko Iikiŋ; kun kiniga opoŋ woko i doge, ki lebe bene calo mac ma tye ka waŋo piny, kun ‘waŋo jami woko duculiweŋ;" 
Isaiah30:28 yamo doge calo kulu ma piine opoŋ libyeny mol atata liyakyak, ma mwonyo dano o wa i ŋute, me yeko rok mapatpat ki odero me to, ki pi keto del i dog dano ma miyo girwenyo woko." 
Isaiah30:29 Wubibedo ka wero we i macalo wuwero i dyewor me kwero nino madit pa Rwot; cwinywu bene bibedo yom calo ŋat ma woto kun dano tye ka kuto nyamulere, me cito i wi got pa Rwot, bot ŋat ma obedo Got pa jo Icrael." 
Isaiah30:30 Rwot bilok ci miyo dwane me deyo winnye, dok bene bimiyo bade nen ma en oryeyo okemo piny, kun tye ki akemo mo madit ma pe wacce, ki leb mac ma waŋo piny woko ducu, kacel ki kot ma mwoc kun cwer corre piny ki pee." 
Isaiah30:31 Lworo madit mada bimako jo Aciria, ka ce guwinyo dwan Rwot, kun en goyogi ki odoone." 
Isaiah30:32 Goco acel acel ma en goyogi kwede ki odoo ma Rwot biketo i komgi bimalle ki koko ajaa ki opuk; en bilwenyo kwedgi kun yeŋo bade pi lweny. 
Isaiah30:33 Pien ka wanoŋe doŋ gityeko yubone woko wa con; ada, doŋ gityeko yubone woko pi kabaka, kabedone giyubo matut dok malac twatwal, ma mac ki yen bene tye madwoŋ ata, yamo dog Rwot katti calo gweŋ ma giliyo woko i mac, en aye calfa, ma bimoko mac iye." 
Isaiah31:1 Jo ma cito i Ejipt ka yenyo kony gibineno can matek, jo ma guketo gengi i kom aguragura, ki i kom gadigadi me lweny, pien gipol, ki i kom wegi aguragura, pien gitek twatwal, ento pe gutiŋo waŋgi malo guneno Dat Maleŋ me Icrael, kadi ki penyo tam ki bot Rwot." 
Isaiah31:2 Ento kono en ryek, dok kelo can marac twatwal i kom dano, pe dok dwoko lok ma en oloko cen” en bia ‘malo i kom jo me odi pa lutim tim maraco, ki i kom lukony dano ma lutim bal." 
Isaiah31:3 Jo Ejipt mere gin dano, pe gubedo Lubaŋa; aguraguragi bene gubedo kom mamwa, pe gin cwiny. Ka Rwot oryeyo bade, ci lami-kony bipaŋŋe litamtam, ki ŋat ma gikonyo bipotowoko piny, gin ducu gibito kacel gitum woko," 
Isaiah31:4 Pien Rwot owacobota kuman ni, Kit ma labwor nyo latin labwor mor kwede i kom lee ma en omako, ma kadi ilwoŋ lwak lukwat mapol ka Lweny i kome, kome pe myel ka owinyo dwangi dok bene lworo pe mako kadi giwo matek twatwal, meno aye kit ma Rwot me mony bibino kwede piny ka lweny i kom got Cion ki i kom cerene-gu ducu," 
Isaiah31:5 Rwot me mony bigwoko Jerucalem: kit macalo winyo Lyerre kwede: en bigwoko dok bene bilaro, en bikoyo Jerucalem, miyo bwot." 
Isaiah31:6 Wun jo Icrael myero wudok cen bot ŋat ma wujemo i kome magwa twatwal-li," 
Isaiah31:7 Pien i nino meno dano acel acel bibolo cal jogine me ryal woko kacel ki cal jogine me jabu ma onoŋo wutimo bal pi tiyogi ki ciŋwu-ni," 
Isaiah31:8 “Gibineko jo Aciria woko ki pala lucwan ma pe pala pa dano; pala lucwan ma pe pala pa dano bijwerogi woko lirwatrwat; gibiriŋo woko pi lworo pala lucwan, gibidiyo awobegi tektek me tiyo tic muroni mapek," 
Isaiah31:9 Lworo bimiyo patagi rwenyo woko, myelkom bene biweko luditogi bolo bendera woko.” Rwot ma macce tye i Cion, ki ma tanurre otwak i Jerucalem aye ma owaco." 
Isaiah32:1 Nen, kabaka biloyo loc ki kit atir, rwodine bene gibibedo i loc kun giŋolo kop atir." 
Isaiah32:2 Ŋat acel acel bibedo macalo kagwok ka yamo tye, dok macalo ka-gwok ka kot ocorre piny, macalo kulu mapol ma piine mol i kabedo mutwo, dok macalo tipo got mo madit ma tye i lobo mutwo matar atara ligwek." 
Isaiah32:3 Jo ma neno piny pe gibiumo waŋgi, jo ma winyo bene gibiciko itgi," 
Isaiah32:4 Dano ma gitimo jami oyotoyot, gibiniaŋ iye dok gibiŋeyo maber, jo ma te lebgi odwalle biloko lok oyotoyot, dok atir laboŋo peko mo." 
Isaiah32:5 Ŋat mamiŋ pe gibilwoŋe ni dano me awora, ŋat ma kite rac bene pe gilwoŋo ni twon oteka." 
Isaiah32:6 Pien lamiŋ mere loko lok me miŋo, tamme tye me timo bal keken; gin ma en timo ducu pe yomo cwiny Lubaŋa, loko lok marac i kom Rwot; en dok medo kec amedda bot jo ma kec noŋo doŋ nekogi, dok twono jo ma orwo pii oneko woko ki pii me amata." 
Isaiah32:7 Dano ma kite rac, noŋo timme bene rac; en miyo tam me timo gin maraco, me balo lucan woko ki loko lok goba kadi bed lok pa ŋat ma can odiyo tye kakare." 
Isaiah32:8 Ento dano me awora kelo tam ma jo mukene woro bene, en cuŋ mere i kit me woro keken." 
Isaiah32:9 Wua malo, wun mon ma wutye ki kuc, wuwiny lokka; wuter itwu, wuwiny lok ma awaco, wun anyira ma pe wuparo gin mo-ni," 
Isaiah32:10 Nino ma odon pe dok romo mwaka acel, komwu bibedo ka po apoya, wun mon ma pe wuparo gin mo-ni; pien nyig olok bibedo pe, dok bene pe gibipwono nyig yadi." 
Isaiah32:11 Wubed ki myelkom wun mon ma wutye ki kuc, komwu bene myero obed ka po apoya, wun ma pe wuparo gin mo-ni; wugony boŋŋi woko ki i komwu, wutwe boŋo cola i pyerwu." 
Isaiah32:12 Wudoŋ korwu pi pottiwu ma yomo cwinywu, pi olok ma nyak matek twatwal," 
Isaiah32:13 pi lobo pa jona, ma okuto ki ocok bidoŋo iye; ki pi odi ducu ma gitye i gaŋ ma dano tye iye ki yomcwiny madwoŋ." 
Isaiah32:14 Pien kabaka bia ‘woko ki i ode, gaŋ ma dano pol iye bene bidoŋ noŋo; got Opel ki ka ma ocudo malo likuŋ me ŋiyo piny bidoko boro matwal; kana me tim cwinygi bibedo yom pigi, bidoko ka ma gikwayo iye romi ki dyegi;" 
Isaiah32:15 nio waŋ ma Lubaŋa oonyo Cwiny Maleŋ i komwa kun a ki malo, ma noŋo tim bene doŋ odoko poto ma ceko cam mabup twatwal, kun poto ma yam ceko cam doŋ olokke odoko buŋa," 
Isaiah32:16 I kare meno ŋolo kop atir bibedo i tim, kit ma atir bibedo mere i poto ma ceko cam." 
Isaiah32:17 Kit ma atir bikelo kuc, dok bikelo bene bedo mot ki gen ma bedo nakanaka." 
Isaiah32:18 Jona bibedo i kabedo me kuc, ka ma ayela mo pe iye, kabedo maber me yweyo mot." 
Isaiah32:19 Pee bicorre, miyo buŋa ducu lwer o woko piny, gaŋ bene gijwero woko rwatrwat." 
Isaiah32:20 Wutye ki yomcwiny, wun jo ma wucoyo kodi i dog kulu ducu, ma wumiyo twoni ki kana-gu giwoto ata." 
Isaiah33:1 Ibineno can, in ŋat ma ineko dano, ma kun in kikomi pe gineki, in ŋat ma doto dano, kun ŋat mo pud peya oketo lok roro i komi. Ka doŋ iweko neko dano woko, in bene doŋ gibijweri woko; ki ka doŋ iweko tim me doto dano woko, in bene doŋ gibiketo lok roro ikomi." 
Isaiah33:2 Ai Rwot, timwa ber, wan wakuri. Bed macalo bad wa piny ma ru ki piny ma ru, larwa i kare ma watye i can." 
Isaiah33:3 Rok mukene giriŋo woko ka guwinyo dwan dano ma wo; ka in ia malo ka lweny piwa, lurok giket woko atata." 
Isaiah33:4 Giyako jami calo okwil ma camo cam i poto; ma gipye apyeya iye calo bonyo," 
Isaiah33:5 Rwot dit adada, pien bedo malo; en bimiyo jo Cion ducu ŋolo kop atir, kun kitgi bene bedo atir;" 
Isaiah33:6 i karewu en bimiyo wucuŋ matek, dok bilarowu, miyowu ryeko ki ŋec madit; doŋ gin ma pire tek botwu en aye myero wulwor Rwot." 
Isaiah33:7 Koŋ wunen, kit ma jo ma gitek i lweny kok kwede! Dok lukwena me kuc bene gikok ki cwercwiny ma pe wacce!" 
Isaiah33:8 Yo gudo ducu doŋ gudoŋ noŋo, dano mo ma wote iye doŋ pe. Nen, gicikke doŋ gituro woko, caden ducu doŋ gicayogi acaya, pe doŋ bene giparo pi dano." 
Isaiah33:9 Lobo doŋ oballe woko; alee bene otwodo Lebanon, tekone bene tye ka rwenyo woko. Caron doŋ odoko calo tim aroo; Bacan ki Karmel pot yadigi doŋ tye ka o woko aoya piny." 
Isaiah33:10 Rwot owaco ni, “Kombeddi doŋ abia woko, abitiŋŋe malo; doŋ abikette gira abedo dit." 
Isaiah33:11 Wuyaco cuŋ kai, ento wunywalo ren kal; yweyo ma a ki i dogwu aye bibedo mac ma bityekowu." 
Isaiah33:12 Rok ducu bidoko calo buru mac ma odoŋ ka mac oto, macalo okuto ma gitoŋo ka doŋ giwaŋo i mac.”" 
Isaiah33:13 Wun jo ma wutye ka mabor wuwiny gin ma doŋ atimo, ki wun jo ma wutye cok, myero wuŋe twero ma atye kwede." 
Isaiah33:14 Lubalo ma tye i Cion doŋ lworo omakogi woko, jo ma kwero Lubaŋa komgi doŋ myel amyela. “Aŋa i kinwa ma twero bedo i ŋet mac ma wan neko dano? Aŋa i kinwa ma twero bedo i ŋet mac malyel nakanaka ma pe to?”" 
Isaiah33:15 ŋat ma kite atir i nyim Lubaŋa ma loko lok ada, ma cwinye tye atir, ma cwinye dag lonyo ma ginoŋo pi uno dano, ma bene teno cine pe ye gamo lim me wil i muŋ, ma culo ite woko bene, pe winyo lok me neko dano, ma miyo waŋe woko wek pe onen gin marac." 
Isaiah33:16 En bibedo malo ka gwokkene bibedo i cel gogo ma gicweyo ki got; gibimiye camme, ki pii amatane bene pe bijwik." 
Isaiah33:17 Wubineno kabaka ki wanwu ki deyone; wubineno lobo ma oyarre malac wa ka mabor," 
Isaiah33:18 Cwinywu bilwodo lok i kom lworo madit twatwal. “Lakwan wel kono tye kwene? Dano ma giculo mucoro bote kono tye kwene? Lakwaŋ lubele ma gucudo malo likuŋ-ŋi tye kwene?” 
Isaiah33:19 Pe dok wubineno rok ma luŋala, rok ma loko leb mapat atika, ma pe wuniaŋ i gin ma giloko, ma gidumo leb ma niaŋ iye tek." 
Isaiah33:20 Koŋ wunen Cion, gaŋ ma wukwero iye ninowu madito ma giciko! Wubineno Jerucalem ki wanwu, ma en gaŋ ma oliŋ mot calo kema ma pe gikobo ki kakare, ma teke ma giguro kwede pe giputo, dok tolle bene pe cot," 
Isaiah33:21 Ento Rwot binyuto deyone kunnu, ka ma kulu madoŋo ki matinone tye iye, ka ma mel ma gikwano ki pol pe wok ki iye, ki yeya me deyo bene pe wok ki iye." 
Isaiah33:22 Pien Rwot aye lanolkopwa, en lalocwa, Rwot aye kabakawa, en bilarowa." 
Isaiah33:23 Tol yeyawu ogony woko; pe mako te yat cuŋ matek i kabedone, pe bene gitwero yaro boŋo iye wek yamo okuti. I kare meno jami ayaka bibedo mubakke ata lipim ma dano bipoko i kingi; kadi wa luŋolo bene gibinoŋo jami mogo olo twal." 
Isaiah33:24 Pe tye dano mo ma bedo i lobowa ma biwaco ni, “An koma lit.” Jo ma bedo iye ducu gibitimo botgi kica pi balgi." 
Isaiah34:1 Wubin wunyik cok, wun rok ducu wek wucik itwu wuwiny! Jo ducu ma bedo i lobo, myero gubin guwiny." 
Isaiah34:2 Pien akemo doŋ omako Rwot i kom rok ducu, kiniga okete woko adada i kom monygi, en doŋ otenyogi wek gijwergi woko ki pala lucwan calo gineko lee." 
Isaiah34:3 Kom danogi ma doŋ gineko gibibolo woko ata, ŋwec komgi biduny maŋwe, remogi bene bimol i wi godi." 
Isaiah34:4 Lakalatwe me polo ducu bitop woko, polo bidolle woko calo buk adola. Monygi ducu bipoto woko piny, kit ma pot olok o kwede piny, kit ma pot oduro poto kwede piny ki i wi jaŋe," 
Isaiah34:5 Pien doŋ ayubo pala lucwanna woko ki i polo, abino piny ka ŋolo kop i kom jo Edom, i kom jo ma doŋ gimiyo me aneka." 
Isaiah34:6 Rwot tye ki pala lucwan ma remo opune woko i lake, moo dwolo bene doŋ odyako kome woko liweŋ, remo romi ki remo dyegi, moo dwolo olan pa nyogi romi. Pien Rwot bityero gitum i Bojra, dok bineko dano matek i lobo Edom." 
Isaiah34:7 Dano bitiŋŋe poto piny libut calo twonjubi. Lobogi bipoŋ ki remo ma mol liyakyak, dok moo dwolo bimiyo lobogi bedo ma miyu adada," 
Isaiah34:8 Pien Rwot tye ki nino me culo kwor, tye bene ki mwaka me koko Cion ki bot lukworre." 
Isaiah34:9 Kulu ducu me Edom bilokke doko calo odok Lam, lobone bene bidoko calo gweŋ calfa, doŋ lobo maca ducu bidoko calo odok Lam ma tye ka waŋ." 
Isaiah34:10 Mac bilyel dyeceŋ ki dyewor benebene ma pe to, yitone biduny mucido cito malo lituu nakanaka, I kare pa yalwak ducu lobo bidoŋ nono, dano mo pe ma biwok ki iye ma twal." 
Isaiah34:11 Olwit ki coo bileyo ci doko megi, dok tula ki agak bene gibibedo iye. Rwot biryeyo tol i kome, miyo jebbe woko atata, ki birigi ma miyo doŋ noŋo ma kelo anyobanyoba i kom ludito ducu." 
Isaiah34:12 Gibilwoŋo nyiŋe ni, Loc pe kunnu, dano madito bibedo pe iye." 
Isaiah34:13 Okuto bidoŋo i wi odine madito, ayila ki ocok bidoŋo i gaŋ gogone, too ki udu gibibedo iye," 
Isaiah34:14 Lee me tim birwatte ki lalur, cen mubedo calo dyegi bikok bot luwotgi, min lee muti ma nen dyewor keken bicito ka yenyo ka yweyo kunnu." 
Isaiah34:15 Tula bigero ode kunnu, ci bibolo iye toŋe, dok bitoko litinone bene ki kunnu, ka coko litinone woko i te bwome, Kwateŋ bene bicokke kunnu, kun acel acel i kingi tye ki cware," 
Isaiah34:16 Koŋ wuyeny wukwan ki i buk pa Rwot: pe tye mo i kin magi ma birwenyo, pe tye mo ma bibedo kene laboŋo cware. Pien Rwot doŋ ociko ni obed kit meno, en kikome aye bicokogi kacel." 
Isaiah34:17 En obolo kwir pigi, en kikome aye ma opoko botgi lobo kun pimo ki tel. Doŋ bibedo megi matwal, gibibedo iye i kare pa yalwak ducu." 
Isaiah35:1 Lobo mutwo kacel ki tim bibedo ki yomcwiny, ature bituru iye calo lena," 
Isaiah35:2 Ature bibedo iye calo jo ma cwinygi yom, kun giwero wer ki yomcwiny madwoŋ twatwal; deyone bene bibedo dit mada calo got me Lebanon, bibedo ma mwonya twatwal calo potti me Karmel ki Caron. Gibineno deyo pa Rwot, ki twer ma Lubaŋawa tye kwede." 
Isaiah35:3 Wujiŋ; ciŋ jo ma badgi okwe, wumi jo ma coŋgi goro odok matek." 
Isaiah35:4 Wuwac bot jo ma tye ki lworo i cwinygi ni, “Pe wubed lwor, wubed tek! Nen, Lubaŋawa bikokowu, en biculo kwor i kom lukworwu. En bibino ci larowu.”" 
Isaiah35:5 I kare meno lutowaŋ waŋgi biyabbe, jo ma itgi odiŋ bene itgi biyabbe." 
Isaiah35:6 I kare meno luŋolo bipye malo calo til, ki jo ma te lebgi oto gibicako wero wer ki yomcwiny. Pien pii bimwoco piny woko i dye tim, ki kulu bene piine bibedo ka mol i lobo mutwo;" 
Isaiah35:7 kweyo ma mil amila bigolle woko doko kut, pii bibedo ka gunnye atata i lobo mutwo likaŋ. Lum ki lagada bidoŋo madwoŋ twatwal, i kabedo ma yam too aye bedo iye." 
Isaiah35:8 Yo gudo madit bibedo kunnu, yo ma gibicako nyiŋe ni, “Yo Maleŋ.” Jo ma gin lubalo pe gibilubo yo meno, jo mamiŋ pe bimiyo jo ma lubo yo meno rwenyo." 
Isaiah35:9 Labwor mo pe bibedo kunnu, lee mo mager bene pe bicito kunnu, pe tye mo ma gibinoŋo kunnu; ento jo ma doŋ gikokogi aye bilubo yo meno." 
Isaiah35:10 Jo ma Rwot okokogi bidwogo cen i Cion, gibibino ma noŋo giwero wer licur. Yomcwiny ma ri nakanaka pe birwenyo ki i wigi, gibibedo maber ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, cwercwiny ki cur ma yam gubedo kwede doŋ bia woko ki i cwinygi." 
Isaiah36:1 I mwaka me apar wiye aŋwen me loc pa kabaka Kejekia, en aye Cenakerib kabaka me Aciria obino kwede ka lweny i kom gaŋi ducu me Juda ma girumogi ki cel gogo, ci omayogi ducu." 
Isaiah36:2 Kabaka me Aciria ocwalo Larabcake bot kabaka Kejekia i Jerucalem, kun Larabcake a ki i Lakic ki dul mony madit twatwal. Ci ocito ocuŋ i ŋet yo pii ma mol ki i joro ma malo, i yo gudo ma cito i poto pa Lalwok-boŋo." 
Isaiah36:3 Jo adek me Juda cutcut gubino me rwatte kwede: Eliakim wod pa Ilkia, ma en aye ladit ma loyo jami ma i ot pa kabaka, kacel ki Cebna ma karan, ki Joa wod pa Acap, laco lok matimme." 
Isaiah36:4 Larabcake owaco botgi ni, “Wuwac bot Kejekia ni, ‘Kabaka madit, kabaka me Aciria, owaco kuman ni, In igeno gin aŋo?" 
Isaiah36:5 In itamo ni lok me dog noŋo bedo rom ki ryeko me lweny ki mony madit me loyo lwennye. In kombeddi ijeŋŋe i kom aŋa, mumiyo ijemo woko i koma-ni?" 
Isaiah36:6 Neo, kombeddi iloko Ejipt odoko odoo ma’ ijeŋŋe i kome, kun en lagada ma otur otyer woko, ma bituco ciŋ dano mo ma ojeŋŋe i kome. Meno kit ma Parao kabaka me Ejipt bedo ka timo kwede jo ducu ma gijeŋŋe i kome." 
Isaiah36:7 Ento ka wuwacca ni, “Wan wajeŋŋe giwa i kom Rwot ma Lubaŋawa,” pe en aye wan jogine ma i wi godi, ki keno tyerre, ma Kejekia doŋ omukogi woko, kun waco bot jo Jerucalem ki Juda ni, “Wubiworo Lubaŋa i nyim keno tyer man ma i Jerucalem?”" 
Isaiah36:8 Koŋ ijeŋ gin me camme ki laditta kabaka me Aciria! An abimiyi aguragura alip aryo, ka ce in ki tuŋ boti bene itwero noŋo lubed i wigi." 
Isaiah36:9 In itwero dwoko ladit lweny acel mo cen ki i kin lutic pa laditta matinone, ka ce ijeŋŋe i kom Ejipt pi gadigadi lweny ki wegi aguragura?" 
Isaiah36:10 Dok bene in itamo ni abino ka lweny i kom kabedo man wek atyek woko laboŋo twero pa Rwot? Wai Rwot aye ma owacca ni, ‘Cit icilweny i kom lobo man ityek woko yo!’ ”" 
Isaiah36:11 Cutcut Eliakim ki Cebna, ka Joa guwaco bot Larabcake ni, “Walegi ilok ki wan luticci i leb Aram, pien wawinyo. Pe ibed ka lok kwedwa i leb Juda ma lwak ma gitye i wi cel bene giwinyo.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Ento Larabcake ogamo doggi ni, “itamo ni rwoda ocwala ka loko lok magi bot laditwu ki botwu keken bo, pe bot lwak ma gubedo i wi cel bene, ma gin kacel ki wun gukemo can me camo cetgi kengi ki mato lacgi?”" 
Isaiah36:13 Larabcake ocuŋ ocako daŋŋe ki dwan maloŋo i leb Juda ni, “Wuwiny lok pa kabaka madit, kabaka me Aciria!" 
Isaiah36:14 Kabaka owaco ku man ni, ‘Pe wuwek Kejekia obed ka bwolowu, pien en pe bitwero larowu." 
Isaiah36:15 Pe wuwek Kejekia omiwu wujenne i kom Rwot kun wuwacci, “Rwot aye bilarowa, gaŋ man pe gibimiyo i ciŋ kabaka me Aciria.”" 
Isaiah36:16 Pe wubed ka winyo lok pa Kejekia; pien man aye lok ma kabaka me Aciria owaco, ni meno wuyub lok me kuc kweda, ci wukatti woko bota; kit meno ŋat acel acel bicamo nyig olok ma i potone, ŋat acel acel bicamo nyig odurone, ki ŋat acel acel bimato pii ma i taŋine kikome;" 
Isaiah36:17 nio ka abiterowu wa i lobo ma rom ki mewu-ni, lobo ma ceko kal ki koŋo vino, lobo ma miyowu kwon, ma tye iye poto olok-gu." 
Isaiah36:18 Wugwokke, pe wubed ka winyo lok pa Kejekia ma tye ka bwolowu marac kun wacci, “Rwot bilarowa.” Tye Lubaŋa pa lurok mo ma yam olaro lobone ki i cin kabaka me Aciria?" 
Isaiah36:19 Lubaŋa pa jo Kamat ki Arpad gitye kwene kaa? Lubaŋa pa jo Ceparvaim gitye kwene? Gin yam gularo Camaria ki i ciŋa bo? 
Isaiah36:20 Lubaŋa me lobo mene ki i kin lubaŋa ducu ma gitye ki lobogi, ma yam koŋ olaro lobone ki i ciŋa mono, mumiyo wutamo ni Rwot bilaro Jerucalem ki i ciŋa-ni?’ ”" 
Isaiah36:21 Ento lwak ducu guliŋ aliŋa, pe gudokke iye lok mo kadi ki acel, pien onoŋo kabaka ociko ni, “Pe wubigamo doge.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Lacen Eliakim wod pa Ilkia ma en aye ladit ma loyo jami ma i ot pa kabaka, kacel ki Cebna ma karan, ki Joa wod pa Acap ma laco lok ma timme guyeco boŋŋigi gucito kwede wa bot Kejekia, gutitte lok ducu ma Larabcake owaco." 
Isaiah37:1 Ka kabaka Kejekia owinyo, ci oyeco boŋŋine woko, ocako umme ki boŋo cola, ocito kwede wa i ot pa Rwot." 
Isaiah37:2 Ci ooro Eliakim ma lalo jami ma i ode, kacel ki Cebna ma karan, ki ajwagi pa Lubaŋa ma guteggi ma guumo komgi woko ki boŋo cola, ocwalogi guwoto bot Icaya wod pa Amoj, ma lanebi." 
Isaiah37:3 Guwaco bote ni, “Kejekia owaco kuman ni, “Tin piny doŋ oloyowa woko, gibiburowa, lewic omakowa mada. Latin doŋ obino i yo nyodo, ci tek me nywalone aye peke." 
Isaiah37:4 Gwok nyo Rwot Lubaŋani doŋ otyeko winyo lok pa Larabcake, ma laditte kabaka me Aciria ocwale kwede ka nywaro Lubaŋa makwo-ni, ci bimiyo Rwot Lubaŋani juko lokke. Pienno, tin legani malo pi jo ma gubwot, ma gudoŋ-ŋi.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:5 Ka lutic pa kabaka Kejekia guo bot Icaya," 
Isaiah37:6 Icaya owaco botgi ni, “Wuwac bot laditwu ni, ‘Rwot owaco kuman ni, pe ibed ki lworo mo pi lok ma iwinyoni ma lutic pa kabaka me Aciria gubedo ka yeta kwede," 
Isaiah37:7 Nen, abiketo cwiny mo i iye, ci biwinyo lok mo ma oywek, ci dok woko wa i lobo tugi; ci abimiyo gineko en woko ki pala lucwan ki i lobo tugi kunnu.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Ka Larabcake odok, ci onoŋo kabaka me Aciria tye ka lweny i kom Libna; pien onoŋo owinyo ni kabaka otyeko a woko ki i Lakic." 
Isaiah37:9 Ka ce kabaka owinyo lok i kom Tiraka kabaka me Etiopia, ni otiŋo yo me bino ka lweny i kome, en dok ocwalo lukwena bot Kejekia kun wacci," 
Isaiah37:10 “Wubiwaco bot Kejekia kabaka me Juda kit man ni, ‘Pe iwek Lubaŋani ma igeno-ni obwoli ni pe ebimiyo Jerucalem i ciŋ kabaka me Aciria." 
Isaiah37:11 Nen, doŋ ityeko winyo gin ma kabaka me Aciria otimo i kom lobo ducu. Iwinyo kit ma en otyekogi kwede woko, ci in kono ibibwot niŋniŋ?" 
Isaiah37:12 Kwarowa yam gujwero gaŋi Gojan, Karan ki Recep, ci guneko jo Eden ma onoŋo yam gibedo i Telacar, ento jogigi mo pe olarogi." 
Isaiah37:13 Luker ma giloyo gaŋi magi gitye kwene? Kabaka me Kamat, ki me Arpad, kabaka me Ceparvaim, ki me Ena kacel ki me Iya, gin ducu kombeddi gitye kwene?’ ”" 
Isaiah37:14 Kejekia ogamo waraga ki i ciŋ lukwena-nu ci okwano. Ka oa ocito i ot pa Rwot, ci oyaro waraga meno woko i nyim Rwot." 
Isaiah37:15 Kejekia olego Rwot ni," 
Isaiah37:16 “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ma ibedo i wi komkerri ka wi lukerubi; in keni giri aye ibedo Lubaŋa ma iloyo dul lobo mapatpat ducu ma i wi lobo. In aye ma iketo polo ki lobo." 
Isaiah37:17 Tim ber icik iti iwinywa, ai Rwot, yab waŋi inenwa, dok bene iwiny lok ducu ma Cenakerib ocwalo kun ŋalo kwede Lubaŋa makwo." 
Isaiah37:18 Ada, ai Rwot, waŋeyo ni luker me Aciria guneko rok ducu ma omiyo lobogi doŋ noŋo," 
Isaiah37:19 dok bene guwaŋo lwak jogigi wo ko ki mac; pien onoŋo gin pe Lubaŋa kikome, gin tic me ciŋ dano, yen ki got-gu, mumiyo gityekogi woko." 
Isaiah37:20 Mumiyo kombeddi doŋ, ai Rwot Lubaŋawa, larwa ki i ciŋe, wek ker ma I WI lobo ducu guŋe ni in giri aye ibedo Lubaŋa keni.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Icaya wod pa Amoj odwoko lok bot kabaka Kejekia kun wacce ni “Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco kuman ni, Atyeko winyo legani ma icwalo bota pi Cenakerib kabaka me Aciria." 
Isaiah37:22 Man aye doŋ lok ma Rwot owaco i kome ni, ‘Jo Cion gicayi calo nyako ma obedo ka cayi kun jeri; jo Jerucalem bene gicayi, calo nyako ma tye ka yeŋo wiye ki i ŋeyi," 
Isaiah37:23 ‘In icayo aŋa, aŋa mono ma iyetoni? Imoro dwani i kom aŋa, ma itiŋo waŋi ki wakke-ni? I kom ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael kulu!" 
Isaiah37:24 In aye ma imiyo lukwenani giŋalo Rwot, dok iwaco ni in iito malo i wi godi kun itye ki lwak gadigadi lwennyi, nio wa malo i wi got Lebanon. Iwakke bene ni itoŋo yadi cedar maboco ki kunnu woko ki yadi ciprec mabecone mada-ni: dok iwaco ni, ‘Adonyo bene i buŋana ka mabor, ka ma yadi oculle iye likiŋ," 
Isaiah37:25 Akwinyo waŋ pii, amato pii pa lurok; anyono lobo Ejipt, atwoyo pii ma i jaŋ kulu Nail ducu." 
Isaiah37:26 ‘In peya iwinyo bo ni atyeko yubo wa con kuca? Gin ma atye ka timo kombeddi yam ayubo tamma wa i kare macon ca, ni in myero itur gaŋi ma gicelo ki cel gogo, ilokgi odok obur ma odurre lipim" 
Isaiah37:27 kun jo ma gibedo iye gidoko goro: cwinygi oballe, lewic omakogi, gudoko macalo ginapita ma i poto gicalo lum alita,’ gicalo lum ma otwi i wi ot ma obwarre woko ma pud otwi atwiya." 
Isaiah37:28 ‘Ento aŋeyo bedoni piny, ki citoru woko ki donyoni i ot ki jennyeni i koma.’" 
Isaiah37:29 Pien ibedo ka jennye i koma ki akemo, lok me nyatteni bene otyeko donyo i ita, mumiyo abirwako golina i umi, abiketo tolla i doggi, abidwoki cen i yo ka ma yam iwok ki iye.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:30 Lacen Icaya owaco bot kabaka Kejekia ni, “Man aye gin ma binyuto gin ma bitimme. I mwaka man ki i mwaka ma lubo wubicamo cam ma otwi kene, ento i mwaka me adekke wubicoyo kodi, dok wubikayo kac, wubipito olok, dok bene wubicamo nyige." 
Isaiah37:31 Jo ma, bibwot, ma gibidoŋ i ot pa Juda, gibibedo macalo yat ma oguro lwite odonyo piny i ŋom, dok ma nyako nyige lamalo." 
Isaiah37:32 Pienno jo ma gudoŋ gibikato woko ki i Jerucalem, lwak jo mubwot gibikato woko ki i wi got Cion. Man bitimme pi nyeko ma Rwot me mony tye kwede piwu," 
Isaiah37:33 “Pienno Rwot owaco lok kuman i kom kabaka me Aciria ni, En pe bidonyo I gaŋ man, pe bibayo atero mo iye, pe binyiko cok kwede ki kwot pe bene bitoro cel lobo me rumone:" 
Isaiah37:34 En bidok cen ki ŋeye kun lubo yo ma yam en obino kwede, pe bidonyo i gaŋ man, Man lok pa Rwot kikome," 
Isaiah37:35 An abilweny pi gaŋ man me larone pira kena ki pi laticca Daudi.’ ” 
Isaiah37:36 I dyewor meno lamalaika pa Rwot ocito, oneko jo Aciria alip miya acel ki pyeraboro wiye abic ki i gonygi. Ka dano gua malo odiko con nen gunoŋo kom jo Aciria muto oradde lirat." 
Isaiah37:37 Cenakerib ka baka me Aciria ocako a ocito, odok wa i gaŋŋe ci obedo i Nineve." 
Isaiah37:38 Ka yam en tye ka miyo woro i ot pa lubaŋane Nicirok, ci awobene, Adramelek ki Carejer guneke woko ki pala lucwan, ci guriŋo woko gularo komgi wa i Ararat. Wode Ecar-kadon aye oleyo ka tyene." 
Isaiah38:1 I kare meno two omako Kejekia ma onoŋo cok to woko. Lanebi Icaya wod pa Amoj ocito bote owacce ni, “Rwot owaco ku man ni, ‘Yub odi obed maber pien ibito woko, twoni pe bicaŋ.’’’" 
Isaiah38:2 Kejekia oloko waŋe i kom kicika ot olego Rwot," 
Isaiah38:3 kun wacci, “Tim ber, ai Rwot, koŋ ipo, inen kit kwo ma abedo kwede i nyimi, kun abedo ŋat ma geni, alubi ki cwinya ducu, kun abedo ka tiyo gin ma nen maber i waŋi.” Ci Kejekia ocako koko matek twatwal kun cwinye cwer." 
Isaiah38:4 Cutcut lok pa Rwot dok obino bot Icaya kun wacce ni," 
Isaiah38:5 “Cit iciwac bot Kejekia ni, Rwot Lubaŋa pa kwarowu Daudi owaco kuman ni, ‘Atyeko winyo legani, dok bene aneno pig waŋi; nen, abimiyo dok pud ibedo i lobo pi mwaka apar wiye abic." 
Isaiah38:6 Abilari kacel ki gaŋ man ki i cin kabaka me Aciria, dok bene abigwoko gaŋ man." 
Isaiah38:7 “Man larien ma binyuto ni Rwot bitiyo gin ma otyeko ciko pire: 
Isaiah38:8 En bicoro tipo cen dok cen tyen apar i kom gin me poro cen pa Akaj.” Tipo cen bene odok cen tyen apar kulu ma onoŋo okato i kom gi-porone," 
Isaiah38:9 I Kare ma doŋ Kejekia ocan ki i twone, ocako coyo wer man me pako Lubaŋa:" 
Isaiah38:10 Yam onoŋo atamo ni abito ma noŋo pud atektek, atamo ni onoŋo doŋ icwala woko i lobo pa jo muto, ka cito ka bedo kunnu doŋ matwal, kun pe aneno neya." 
Isaiah38:11 Onoŋo yam atamo ni pe doŋ abineno Rwot, i lobo pa jo makwo; pe dok abineno dano mo, ki i kinjo ducu ma gibedo i wi lobo." 
Isaiah38:12 Doŋ onoŋo giputo kwona woko, gitero ka mabor, calo kema pa lakwat ma giputo woko, adolo kwona woko calo lacwe-bono ma odolo, ma oŋolo woko ki i kom yat lacwe-boŋo. Rwot, onoŋo doŋ imiyo kwena-ni ogik woko, cakke odiko o kwede wa i dyewor." 
Isaiah38:13 Akok dyewor benebene pi kony kun atye ki arem madit twatwal; en turo cogona woko ducu calo labwor. Rwot, onoŋo doŋ imiyo kwena-ni ogik woko,’ cakke odiko o kwede wa i dyewor," 
Isaiah38:14 Dwana onoŋo doŋ winnye calo lakalagwec ma kok, nyo owalu, onoŋo doŋ akok calo akuri. Waŋa onoŋo doŋ ojony woko ki ne no malo, giuna doŋ marac; ai Rwot, lara do!" 
Isaiah38:15 An kone dok atwero loko gin aŋo? Pien oloko kweda, dok en kikome aye ma omiyo man otimme, i dyewor pe anino wacel, pi cwercwiny ma onoŋo atye kwede." 
Isaiah38:16 Ai Rwot; dano bedo kwo pi gin magi, an gira kwona ocuŋ i komi keken; cana woko wek abed kwo," 
Isaiah38:17 Nen cwercwiny madit ma onoŋo atye kwede, miya iye kuc; in aye ilaro kwona ki i dog bur me to, pien ibolo balla woko ducu yo tuŋ i neyi." 
Isaiah38:18 Pien pe tye ŋat mo i lobo pa jo muto, ma twero paki kun pwoyi bene; jo ma donyo piny i lyel pe dok gitye ki gen i kom adani." 
Isaiah38:19 Dano makwo aye twero pwoyi, kit macalo an tin apwoyi kwede-ni; won litino tito ki litinone, kit ma in igenne kwede." 
Isaiah38:20 Rwot doŋ cok lara, wabigoyo naŋa ki opuk-gu ci wapaki kwede, wabiwero wer me paki i odi ka ma giwori iye, pi kare me kwowa ducu." 
Isaiah38:21 Icaya onoŋo owaco bot kabaka ni gilun nyig oduro ci gimwon i waŋ odekene, wek burre ocaŋ woko." 
Isaiah38:22 Kabaka Kejekia onoŋo openyo ni, “Kit lanen aŋo ma nyuto ni abicito i ot pa Rwot?”" 
Isaiah39:1 I kare meno kabaka me Babilon, Merodak-baladan wod pa Baladan, owinyo ni kabaka Kejekia kome lit; ci owcalo lukwena gutero waraga kacel ki mot bote, pien onoŋo doŋ bene owinyo ni twone ocaŋ woko." 
Isaiah39:2 Kejekia ojologi maber, ocako nyuto botgi or kano Limme ducu; guneno ryal ki ‘jabu, aŋwece, moo me wel, ki ot kano jami lwennye ducu, onyuto botgi gin ducu ma onoŋo tye i ot kano jami mere. Pe tye gin mo ma odoŋ ma en pe onyuto botgi ma onoŋo tye i ode ki i lobo ducu ma onoŋo tye i te locce," 
Isaiah39:3 Lacen lanebi Icaya obino bot kabaka Kejekia, openyo ni, “Jo-nu guwacci lok aŋo? Gin kono gua ki kwene?” Kejekia ogamo ni, “Gua i lobo mabor, gua wa i Babilon.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Icaya dok openye ni, “Guneno gin aŋo ki i odi?” Kejekia ogamo ni, “Gutyeko neno jami ducu ma tye i oda; pe tye gin mo ma odoŋ ma tye i odi kano limma ma pe anyuto botgi.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Icaya dok owaco bot kabaka ni, “Koŋ doŋ iwiny lok ma Rwot me mony owaco:" 
Isaiah39:6 Nen ba, kare doŋ cok romo, ma jami ducu ma i odi, ki ma yam kwarini gukano nio wa onyoo, gibiterogi woko wa i Babilon; pe tye gin mo ma bidoŋ kadi ki acel, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Isaiah39:7 Ki awo beni mogo bene, ma in inywalogi, gibiterogi woko bene, gibikolo mangi woko, ci gidoko lutic i gaŋ kal me Babilon.”" 
Isaiah39:8 Kabaka Kejekia oniaŋ ni kuc bibedo tye i kare me locce laboŋo alokaloka mo, meno aye gin mumiyo en owaco bot Icaya ni, “Lok pa Rwot ma iwaco-ni ber mere.”" 
Isaiah40:1 Wukwe cwiny lwakka, wukwe cwinygi! Man lok ma Lubaŋawu owaco." 
Isaiah40:2 Wucuk cwiny jo Jerucalem, wuwac botgi ni, karegi me bedo opii doŋ ogik woko, doŋ gityeko timo kica botgi i kom balgi ducu. Can ma Rwot oketo i komgi obedo dit mada, rom ki bal ma gutimo tyen aryo kulu." 
Isaiah40:3 Dwan dano mo ma daŋŋe i tim ni, “Wuger yo pa Rwot, wutir yone ocuŋ atir i tim aroo pi Luban awa." 
Isaiah40:4 Luŋ ducu gibitoro woko, godi ki cere ducu gibidwokogi woko piny, ka ma ogonne gibitiro cuŋ atir, dok yo ma obedo burbur gibipiro woko," 
Isaiah40:5 Deyo pa Rwot doŋ binen ka maleŋ, dano ducu bineno kacel, pien Rwot kikome aye ma doŋ owaco.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Dano mo’ tye ka waco ni, “Daŋŋe!” Cutcut agamo ni, “Imito adaŋŋe niŋniŋ?” Gin mo ducu ma tye ki kom obedo calo lum, berre ducu rom ki ber pa ature me tim." 
Isaiah40:7 Lum ner, ature bene o woko, ka Rwot okuto iye ki yweyone; ada, dano mere gical ki lum." 
Isaiah40:8 Lum ner, ci aturene o woko, ento lok pa Lubaŋa bedo matwal," 
Isaiah40:9 In Cion ma ikelo lok maber, it malo i wi got mabor. In Jerucalem ma itito lok maber-ri, med dwani malo ki tek, med dwani malo, pe ilwor. Wac bot jo ma bedo i gaŋ me Juda ni, “Wunen Lubaŋawu ba!”" 
Isaiah40:10 Wunen Rwot Lubaŋawu tye ka bino ki tek, bade aye ma tye ka loc pire; nen, baka cicee tye bote, cul me ticce bene tye i nyime." 
Isaiah40:11 En bikwayo romine calo lakwat, bitiŋo litino romine i bade, en bitiŋogi i kore, ci mako litino romi ma dot, peyogi motmot." 
Isaiah40:12 Aŋa ma yam koŋ opimo pii i dye ciŋe, dok ma opimo polo ki ciŋe? Aŋa ma ojobo apwa me lobo ci oonyo i gi-pimo jami, nyo ma yam opimo godi i mijan, ki ka ma obedo cerecere i ratili?" 
Isaiah40:13 Aŋa ma yam koŋ obedo ka’ telo Cwiny Rwot, nyo aŋa ma yam koŋ obedo ka miye tam macalo lapwony mere?" 
Isaiah40:14 Aŋa ma yam koŋ Rwot onoŋo tam ki bote, nyo aŋa ma opwonye ki ŋolo kop atir? Aŋa ma yam koŋ opwonye me medo ŋecce, nyo ma onyutte yo me bedo ki niaŋ matut?" 
Isaiah40:15 Nen rok ducu rom ki pii ma oton kicel i agulu, dok gikwanogi macalo apwa ma tye i mijan; nen, en tiŋo cula woko ki i dye nam calo gin matidi mo." 
Isaiah40:16 Yen ducu ma gitoŋo ki i buŋa me Lebanon, pe romo waŋo gitum awaŋa, lee ma tye iye bene nok, pe giromo me atyera bot Lubaŋa," 
Isaiah40:17 Rok ducu pe gin mo i nyime, gin ducu pe gubedo gin mo ki tun bote, gin ducu mwa." 
Isaiah40:18 Doŋ ibiporo Lubaŋa ki aŋa, nyo itwero poro calle ki kit cal aŋo?" 
Isaiah40:19 Cal jok ma gitwako atwaka, latet t wero twakone, layub jabu mwono kome woko ki jabu, dok tiyo nyor ryal pire." 
Isaiah40:20 Ŋat ma can odiyo adada, yero yat matek ma pe top me gityer, yenyo lapac ma ladiro, wek opane cal apaya, ma pe dok giromo kwanyone ki ka ma giketo iye." 
Isaiah40:21 Pe wuŋeyo bo? Yam peya wuwinyo? Yam onoŋo pe gitito botwu pire con? Peya wuniaŋ nia wa i acakki keto lobo? 
Isaiah40:22 ŋat ma bedo i wi komkerre malo en aye ma oketo, en bedo wa malo twatwal i ŋe pol, jo ma bedo piny i lobo ginen matino calo ocene. En ryeyo polo calo boŋo kicika, dok yaro bene calo kema me bedo iye." 
Isaiah40:23 En miyo luloc me lobo gidoko gin ma konygi pe, en dwoko rwodi ducu me lobo woko piny lirwap." 
Isaiah40:24 Gin gubedo calo ginapita ma pud gipito apita, ma pud gicoyo acoya kun guryeyo Lwitgi pud aryeya i ŋom, ma ka Rwot ocwalo yamo i komgi ci giner woko; ka ce yamo lapiru okodo i komgi, ci tiŋogi calo cuŋ kal terogi woko." 
Isaiah40:25 Doŋ wubipora ki aŋo mono, wek abed cal kwede? Man peny ma ŋat Maleŋ openyo." 
Isaiah40:26 Koŋ wutiŋ waŋwu malo wunen polo, aŋa ma oketo jami magi? ŋat ma telo monygi, ŋeyo welgi ducu, dok bene lwoŋogi ki nyiŋgi, Tekone dwoŋ twatwal, meno aye gin mumi yo mo ki i kingi pe rwenyo." 
Isaiah40:27 Piŋo it ye ka koko, in Yakobo? Piŋo kono it ye ka waco ni, Rwot pe neni, in Icrael, kun iwaco ni Lubaŋa tika pe tye ka paro piri?" 
Isaiah40:28 Pud pe wuŋeyo bo? Yam peya wuwinyo? Rwot en Lubaŋa ma bedo nakanaka, en aye ma oketo wi lobo ducu. En pe ol, pe bene doko goro; ŋecce tut ma pe wacce, kadi tato tere bene pe twerre." 
Isaiah40:29 En miyo tek bot jo magoro, dok bene medo tek bot ŋat ma tekone odok woko piny," 
Isaiah40:30 Kadi ki awobe bene gitwero doko goro, gitwero ol bene ma giromo poto woko piny;" 
Isaiah40:31 ento jo ma neno bot Rwot, teko bidwogo cen i komgi. Gibituk gicito malo calo ocur, gibiriŋo ma pe giol, gibibedo ka wot nakanaka ma komgi pe biloc." 
Isaiah41:1 Wuliŋ mot, wuwiny lokka, wun lobo ma tye i dog nam; wek rok ducu gulim tek manyen; gucak bino wek gulok lokgi. Myero wan ducu wanyiku cok wek wanolu kop i kinwa kekenwa." 
Isaiah41:2 Aŋa ma otugo ŋat ma oa ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ, ma loyo lweny i kabedo ducu ma en woto iye? Aŋa ma miyo rok mapol i ciŋe, ka doŋ nyono luker maditodito woko i te tyene piny? Pala lucwanne miyo dano gidoko calo apwa, aterone nekogi, tiŋogi woko calo cuŋ kai ma yamo tero." 
Isaiah41:3 Ryemogi, ci kato i nyimgi ki kuc, ma noŋo dwir mada, kun tyene pe gudo piny," 
Isaiah41:4 Aŋa ma omiyo gin man otimme? Aŋa ma omiyo lwak jami mapatpat ma kombeddi tye-ni obedo tye kit macalo kombeddi tye kwede-ni nia i acakki piny? An Rwot aye abedo mukwoŋo nia i acakki piny, an Rwot Lubaŋa abibedo tye bene i agikki piny." 
Isaiah41:5 Lobo ma tye i dog nam doŋ guneno gin ma atiyo, lworo omakogi, komgi obedo ka myel amyela; gin ducu doŋ gubino gunyiko cok." 
Isaiah41:6 Dano acel acel konyo lawote, kun waco bot ominne ni, “Di cwinyi!”" 
Isaiah41:7 Lapac cuko cwiny latet jabu, ŋat ma yubo kom cal apaya wek obed pwot cuko cwiny ŋat ma goyo agoya i kom got ki nyono, kun waco ni, “Gin meno ma gimwononi ber”; ci giguro cal meno woko matek ki cumar wek pe dok oput woko." 
Isaiah41:8 Ento in laticca Icrael, in Yakobo ma doŋ atyeko yeri, lakwar Abraim ma en ŋat ma amaro;" 
Isaiah41:9 in ma ceŋ akeli ki i agikki lobo, nen alwoŋi ki i gul ka mabor adada, kun awacci ni, “In laticca, doŋ atyeko yeri, dok bene pe abiboli woko cen.”" 
Isaiah41:10 Pe ilwor, an atye kwedi, cwinyi pe opoti, pien an Lubaŋani; abimiyi tek, dok abikonyi, abimaki ki ciŋa lacuc, ma miyo aloyo lukworra-ni." 
Isaiah41:11 Wunen, jo ducu ma kiniga omakogi i komwu, gibimiyo lewic makogi, dok alee bene twodogi woko; jo ma pyem kwedwu, wun jona, gibidoko calo gin ma konnye pe, ci gito woko." 
Isaiah41:12 Wubiyenyo jo ma lwenyo kwedwu, ento pe wubinoŋogi: jo ma bicobo mony i komwu, gibidoko calo gin ma konnye pe." 
Isaiah41:13 Pien an a Rwot Lubaŋawu, doŋ amako ciŋwu ma lacuc woko likiŋ; an atye ka waco botwu ni, “Pe wulwor, an abikonyowu.”" 
Isaiah41:14 Pe ilwor Yakobo, kadi bed ibedo calo kwidi, pe wulwor, wun jo Icrael, kadi wugoro mada! Abikonyowu, Rwot ma owaco; ŋat ma bikokowu en aye ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael," 
Isaiah41:15 Nen, abimiyo wudoko dul me dino kal, mapek, dok manyen, ma dino kal maber twatwal; wubidino godi ci wuŋinyogi woko, dok wubiloko lobo ma gubedo cere gidoko calo cuŋ bel." 
Isaiah41:16 Wubipyetogi, ci yamo bitiŋogi woko, yamo lapiru me kot bikeyogi woko atata. Ento wun wubibedo ki yomcwiny i Rwot; wubiwakke bene mada pi ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael." 
Isaiah41:17 Ka ce lucan kacel ki jo ma piny obwoyogi gibiyenyo pii me amata, kun pii pe nen wacel, ma noŋo dwangi otwo dok ma lebgi omoko woko likaŋ, an Rwot abiwinyo legagi ci abidok iye bene, an Lubaŋa pa Icrael pe abitenyogi ata." 
Isaiah41:18 Abimiyo pii mol i wi godi ka ma pii pe iye, pii bibedo ka gunnye agunya ki piny i luŋ-gu; abimiyo pii poŋ i dye tim ka ma yam otwo woko, waŋ it doŋ bibedo tye i lobo mutwo." 
Isaiah41:19 Abimiyo yadi cedar doŋo i dye tim, ki okuto lacari ki yadi matino ma ŋwecgi kur, ki yaa; Abiketo yadi culle ‘doko buŋa i dye t im ka ma yadi pe iye, yadi ciprec kacel ki k it yadi mukene mapatpat." 
Isaiah41:20 Dano gibineno wek guŋe ni, Rwot Lubaŋa Maleŋ pa Icrael aye omiyo kit gin man otimme: gin gibitamo pire mtot lacen giniaŋ ni, Rwot aye ma tye ka timo man." 
Isaiah41:21 Rwot Lubaŋa mna en kabaka pa jo pa Yakobo owaco ni, “Wun lwak lubaŋa pa lurok, wunyut lok ma wutye kwede, dok wukel pidowu mogo matek bota." 
Isaiah41:22 Wubin wunyut botwa gin ma bitimme i anyim.’ Doŋ wutit bot lwak gin ma yam otyeko timme woko, wek koŋ watam; wutittiwa gin ma bia ki i kom gin ma doŋ otyeko timme-nu; wek wan bene waniaŋ i lok ma bi timme," 
Isaiah41:23 Wutittiwa gin ma bitimme i anyim, wek omi waye ni wun wubedo lubaŋa. Koŋ wutim gin maber nyo marac, ma poto cwinywa ma miyo bene lworo makowa." 
Isaiah41:24 Wun pe wugin mo kadi ki acel, gin ma wutiyo-gu ducu konnye pe; jo ma yerowu doko gin me kwer ki tuŋ bota." 
Isaiah41:25 Doŋ atyeko tugo ŋat ma bedo i lobo ma yo tuŋ acam ci en bene obino; atuge me bino ka lweny kun oa ki i yo tuŋ wokceŋ; en binyono luloc woko piny ki tyene calo nyono coto, calo lacwe agulu ma nyono lobo me ticce; en bilwoŋo nyiŋa," 
Isaiah41:26 Aŋa ma yam otito botwa lok macon ni waŋe, nyo ma otito botwa con ni lok macalo man bitimme, wek waye ni en oloko lok ma tye atir dok ada? ŋat mo ma otito botwa pe, dok bene ŋat ma otuco pe, pe tye ŋat mo ma owinyo ka wubedo ka loko gin mo." 
Isaiah41:27 An Rwot aye akwoŋo tito lok man bot jo Cion, dok bene acwalo lakwena ocito i Jerucalem wek otit lok maber bot jo ma bedo kunnu." 
Isaiah41:28 Ento ka aŋiyo piny aneno gin lwak lubaŋa-gu, pe anoŋo mo acel ma twero miyo tam, ma twero dok i peny ma apenyo." 
Isaiah41:29 Nen, gin ducu konygi pe, ticgi ma gitiyo ducu mwa; calgi ma gitiyo ki mola ma giliyo, ducu mwa calo yamo." 
Isaiah42:1 Rwot owaco ni, “Nen, laticca ma an akonyo, ma an kikoma aye ayero ma cwinya yom i kome. Doŋ atyeko keto cwiny Maleŋ i ko me, en doŋ bikelo ŋolo kop atir bot jo me rok ducu." 
Isaiah42:2 En pe bikok dok pe bidaŋŋe kun ilo dwane malo, pe gibiwinyo dwane i waŋa yo;" 
Isaiah42:3 en pe bituro lagada ma okak, dok pe bineko mac tara ma Lyel niminimi; en bikelo ŋolo kop atir ki gen." 
Isaiah42:4 En bibedo ki gen nakanaka ma cwinye pe balle nio ka doŋ omiyo ŋolo kop atir oromo lobo ducu; lobo ma i dog nam ducu gitye ka kuro cikke. 
Isaiah42:5 Rwot Lubaŋa ma oketo polo, ka doŋ oryeyo ocuŋ atir, ma oyaro wi lobo ki jami ma tye iye ducu, ma omiyo yweyo bot jo ducu ma bedo iye, ki kwo bot jo ducu ma woto iye, en owaco kuman ni," 
Isaiah42:6 “An Rwot, doŋ atyeko lwoni me bedo ki kit ma atir, amako ciŋi, dok bene agwok i: doŋ atyeko miyi woko bot lurok macalo gicikke, me bedo ceŋ ma menyogi." 
Isaiah42:7 In aye ibiyabo waŋgi, wek igonygi woko ki i mabuc ka ma gitweyogi iye, wek bene ikwanygi wo ko ki i piny macol ka ma onoŋo gibedo iye." 
Isaiah42:8 An nyiŋa Rwot, pe amiyo deyona bot ŋat mo mukene, kadi wa pak ma gipaka kwede bene pe abimiyo bot cal jogi ma gipayo apaya." 
Isaiah42:9 Nen, gin mukwoŋo ma yam atito pire doŋ otimme woko, kombeddi atito botwu pi gin manyen; ma pud peya ocako timme.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Wuwer wer manyen me pako Rwot, wupake wun lobo ducu! Wek nam omor kacel ki jami ducu ma tye iye, lobo ma tye i dog nam ki jo ducu ma bedo iye," 
Isaiah42:11 Tim aroo ki lwak gaŋi ducu ma tye iye myero gupak Rwot, jo Kedar ducu myero gupake! Wek jo ma gibedo i Cela guwer pi yomcwiny, wek bene gudaŋŋe ki woo ki i wi godi pi yomcwiny." 
Isaiah42:12 Dano ducu ma gibedo i dog nam ka mabor, myero bene gupak Rwot, kun gimiye deyo." 
Isaiah42:13 Rwot cito ka lweny calo oteka lweny, akemone tugge calo dano ma lalweny, en daŋŋe dok bene wo ki dwan maloŋo adada, ento nyuto tekke i kom lukworre, Rwot ocikke me konyo jone" 
Isaiah42:14 Lubaŋa owacci, “Aliŋ aliŋa doŋ pi kare malac twatwal, abedo ka diyo cwinya kun pe agamo dog jona; kombeddi doŋ abicako yelle pigi, myero doŋ acak omo cwinya ki yweyo calo dako ma tye ka colle ki arem me nywal." 
Isaiah42:15 Abibalo lobo ma obe to godi godi kacel ki godi ducu, dok bene abimiyo gill ducu ma otwi iye two woko; abimiyo kulu ma pii tye iye two tal woko Iikaŋ, abimiyo pii two woko liweŋ ki i kabedo ducu ma yam pii logo iye." 
Isaiah42:16 Abitelo lutowan, i yo ma gin pe ŋeyo, i yo ma yam peya guwok ki iye, en aye abipeyogi ki iye. Abimiyo colpiny ma-yam umogi woko-ni doko leŋo, ka ma obedo burbur abipiro woko doko mapwot. Magi aye gin ma abitimo, pe abitenyogi ata liyak." 
Isaiah42:17 Dano ducu ma gigeno cal jogi ma gipayo apaya, gin jo ma waco bot cal jogi ni, ‘Wun aye Lubaŋawa,’ gibidwokogi cen ki lewic madwoŋ twatwal.”" 
Isaiah42:18 Rwot dok owacci, “Wuwiny lokka wun ludiŋit, wun lutowaŋ bene wuyab waŋwu, wek wunen piny," 
Isaiah42:19 Tye ŋat mo ma wane oto calo waŋ laticca, nyo ite odin calo it lakwena ma aoro-ni? Aŋa ma waŋe oto calo waŋ danona ma doŋ otyeko dyero kwone pira, nyo ma waŋe oto calo waŋ laticca an Rwot?" 
Isaiah42:20 Icrael neno jami mapol twatwal, ento pe keto cwinye me nenogi maber, ite tye twolo ma romo winyo lok, ento pe winyo gin mo wacel." 
Isaiah42:21 Pi kit ma atir pa Rwot, en mito ni giwor cikke, wek obed ki deyo." 
Isaiah42:22 Ento man jo me rok ma doŋ giyakogi, dok gimayo limgi woko, gin ducu doŋ gicikogi woko ki bur, gikanogi woko i ot mabuc; gudoko doŋ ginayaka pa dano laboŋo ŋat ma larogi, gin doŋ mere ginayaka laboŋo ŋat mo ma waco ni, ‘Dwok cen kakare!’" 
Isaiah42:23 Aŋa i kinwu ma biciko ite ka winyo lok man, aŋa ma biketo cwinye wek cwiny pi kare ma tye anyim?" 
Isaiah42:24 Aŋa ma omiyo Yakobo i ciŋ ŋat ma oyake, ki Icrael i ciŋ luyak? Meno pe obedo Rwot ma wan watimo bal i nyime-ni? Pe en aye Rwot ma gukwero lubo yo ma en mito-ni; ma bene gukwero lubo cikke wokoni?" 
Isaiah42:25 Pi meno omiyo en ocoro Lyeto me akemone i komwa, ki tek me mony; macce olyel oromo i lobolcrael ducu, ento wan pe wamedo ki niaŋ gin ma tye ka timme, macce owaŋowa, ento pe waparo pire wacel.”" 
Isaiah43:1 Kombeddi doŋ Rwot Lubaŋa ma oketo in Yakobo, ma ocweyo in Icrael, owaco kuman ni, “Pe ilwor, pien doŋ atyeko koko in woko. An alwoŋi ki nyiŋi, in i mega." 
Isaiah43:2 Ka ibiwok ki i dye nam matut, abibedo kwedi, abigwoki; pii ma i kulu bene pe bimwonyi; kadi ibiwot iwok ki i dye mac, pe ibiwaŋ, leb mac pe bigudo komi." 
Isaiah43:3 Pien an a Rwot Lubaŋani, an ŋat Maleŋ pa Icrael ma lari. Abimiyo Ejipt calo lim mo me koko in, Etiopia ki Seba bibedo gin ma giwili kwede." 
Isaiah43:4 Pien in ibedo gin me wel mada bota, piri dit, dok amari adada, meno aye gin mumiyo amiyo dano me koko in, dok amiyo rok mapatpat pi laro kwoni." 
Isaiah43:5 Pe ilwor, an atye kwedi, abikwanyo likwayi woko ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ akelogi kany, dok abicoko joni woko ki yo tuŋ potoceŋ adwokogi kany bene." 
Isaiah43:6 Abiwaco bot jo ma tye yo tuŋ acam ni, ‘Doŋ wuweke,’ dok abiwaco bot jo ma tye yo tuŋ acuc ni, ‘Pe doŋ wumedde ki make” wek awobena kacel ki anyirana gudwog woko doŋ ki ka mabor, wek gua gudwog cen ki i lobo ducu." 
Isaiah43:7 Gin jona, gilwoŋogi ki nyiŋa, an ma aketogi dok acweyogi wek guket deyo i koma.” Jo Icrael gubedo caden pa Rwot" 
Isaiah43:8 Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Wukel lwakka i kabedo me ŋolo kop. Waŋgi tye, ento pe gineno piny; itgi tye, ento pe giwinyo loko" 
Isaiah43:9 Wek rok ducu gucokke kacel, mi dano ducu gucokke kunnu i ka ŋolo kop, Aŋa i kingi ma twero tito lok man, ma twero nyuto botwa gin ma yam doŋ otimme wa con? Myero gukel cadengi pi tito lok i komgi wek gulo lok, wek ka doŋ guwinyo lok, gumok kacel ni lokke kakare dok ada.”" 
Isaiah43:10 “Wun jo Icrael, wun cadenna,” Rwot ma owaco, “wun wubedo luticca ma an aye yam ayero, wek wuneya dok bene wuye an, wuniaŋ atir ni an aye Lubaŋa kena. Cakke yam con lubaŋa mo pe obedo tye, dok bene pe doŋ mo bibedo tye ma biluba." 
Isaiah43:11 “An kena aye a Rwot, pe dok tye ŋat mo mukene ma twero larowu." 
Isaiah43:12 An yam atito pire, alarowu dok atuco lokke Ka maleŋ bot dano, i kare ma onoŋo lubaŋa mo ma welo pud pe i kinwu; wun bene wubedo cadenna,” Rwot ma owaco." 
Isaiah43:13 “An Lubaŋa, pud bene abimedde me bedo Lubaŋa nakanaka; pe dok tye ŋat mo mukene ma twero larogi ki i ciŋa: pe tye ŋat mo ma twero geŋa tiyo ticca.”" 
Isaiah43:14 Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael ma larowu owaco kuman ni, “Me larowu, abicwale mony i kom jo Babilon; gibituro rii me dogcel woko ducu, woo my yomcwiny pa jo Kaldaya bilokke doko kumo." 
Isaiah43:15 An a Rwot Lubaŋawu Maleŋ, an aye ma acweyowu wun jo Icrael, dok an kabakawu.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Rwot yam oyabo yo i dye nam, en mumiyo yo obedo tye i dye pii ma katone tek adada," 
Isaiah43:17 En opeyo dul mony matek twatwal okelogi ci onekogi woko, ki lwak gadigadi kacel ki aguragura. Gin ducu gupoto piny ma pe dok giromo a malo, odiyogi woko licwic calo mac tara ma gineko.”" 
Isaiah43:18 En Rwot owaco ku man ni, “Wiwu myero doŋ owil woko i kom gin ma yam otimme con twatwal, pe wubed ka tamo gin ma yam doŋ otimme woko con." 
Isaiah43:19 Myero wucik waŋwu wunen gin manyen ma atye ka timone; kombeddi doŋ tye ka timme. Wun pe wuneno ce? Abituco yo baro ki i dye tim, ki kulu bicako bedo tye i tim aroo kunnu." 
Isaiah43:20 Lee tim ducu gibiwora, too ki udu gibipaka; pien amiyo pii onen i dye tim ata, ki kulu i tim aroo, pi miyo pii ki jona ma ayero wek gumati," 
Isaiah43:21 Gin rok ma an aye acweyogi pira kena, wek guwer wer me paka.”" 
Isaiah43:22 Rwot owaco ni, “Ento in yam pe iwora, in Yakobo, onoŋo doŋ iol kweda woko, in Icrael." 
Isaiah43:23 Onoŋo doŋ pe ikelo romini ityero bota me gitum awaŋa, onoŋo bene pe doŋ iwora ki gitummi. Anbene pe abedo ka yeli pi gitum, pe bene abedo ka olo komi pi odok luban." 
Isaiah43:24 Pe iwilo lum makur ki lim ikelo bota, dok pe imiya ayeŋ ki moo dwolo me gitumwu ma wubedo ka tyerone bota, Ento wumiya atiŋo peko me balwu kun wuolo koma ki balwu maraco twatwal-li." 
Isaiah43:25 “Myero wuŋe ni an a en, ajwayo balwu woko; atimo ku meno pi kit ma an atye kwede, pe doŋ abipo pi balwu." 
Isaiah43:26 Wupo wiya wek walar lok kacel kwedwu, wukel lok ma nyuto ni lokwu tye atir wek wulo giwu kop." 
Isaiah43:27 Kwarowu mukwoŋo bene obalo, lulocwu bene yam gutimo roc mapol i koma." 
Isaiah43:28 Pi meno amiyo kipwola i kom rwodi ma giloyo kabedo maleŋ woko, amiyo Yakobo odoŋ me aneka, Icrael doŋ odoko gin ayeta pa dano.”" 
Isaiah44:1 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “In laticca Icrael, winy ba, wun jona ma ayero, likwayo pa Yakobo." 
Isaiah44:2 An a Rwot ma aketi, ma acweyi nia ii meni, an aye ma abedo ka konyi i kare ma kwo doŋ cakke i komi, Pe ibed ki lworo Yakobo, pien in laticca, in Jecurun ma an aye ayero." 
Isaiah44:3 “Pien abionyo pii i lobo mutwo, ma pii pe iye, abimiyo ora kulu toŋŋe cako mol i lobo mutwo; abiketo Cwiny Maleŋ i kom likwayi, dok abimiyogum bene bot likwayi." 
Isaiah44:4 Gibibedo maber calo lum ma pii oromo kome, calo yat ma odono i ŋet kulu ma piine mol." 
Isaiah44:5 Jo mogo gibiwacci gin jo pa Rwot, gibicako bino bot jo pa Yakobo me ribbe kwedgi, jo mukene bicoyo nyiŋ Rwot i ŋut ciŋgi, doŋ gibilwonne kengi ni gin dano ma tye i kin jo pa Icrael.”" 
Isaiah44:6 Rwot ma en kabaka me Icrael, Rwot me mony ma laro jo Icrael owaco ni, “An aye abedo mukwoŋo ki me agikki; pe dok tye lubaŋa mo mukene kono an keken." 
Isaiah44:7 Aŋa ma calo an, ma twero tito kikore gin ma bitimme i kare me anyim, cakke ki i acakkine o kwede wa i agikkine? Wek gutit botwa gin ma bibedo i anyim." 
Isaiah44:8 Pe wulwor, komwu bene pe omyel; yam atito lok man botwu woko con, kun anyuto jami ducu ma bitimme. Wunyam wubedo cadenna, Dok tye Lubaŋa mo mukene ma pe an? Tye dok Lubaŋa mo matek twatwal ma an peya awinyo pire?”" 
Isaiah44:9 Dano ducu ma tiyo cal jogi gubedo jo ma konygi pe, dok cal jogi ma pigi tek botgi-ni pe konyo gin mo kadi ki acel. Jo ducu ma giworo cal jogi meno gin lutowaŋ ma pe giniaŋ; gin jo-nu gibimiyo lewic makogi matek." 
Isaiah44:10 Aŋa ma tiyo cal jok, nyo ma liyo cal me awora ma twero konyo gin mo?" 
Isaiah44:11 Nen, gibimiyo lewic mako jo ducu ma giworo cal jogi macalo meno. Jo ma tiyo cal jogi-nu gubedo dano adana mamwa. Myero gin ducu gucokke kacel, gubin gucuŋ i kabedo me ŋolo kop; lworo bimakogi, dok alee bene bitwodogi gin ducu," 
Isaiah44:12 Latet nyonyo tiyo ticce ki mac. Tek ma tye i bade en aye tiŋo kwede nyol me luŋo nyonyo. Kec neko, orwo pii bene make matek, ci miyo tekone cako dok woko piny." 
Isaiah44:13 Ento lapac cako pimo bao, ci cero ka waŋe woko ki kalam kalu, cwero ki rana, ka doŋ cako pimone ki gi-ticce. En yu bo calle-nu woko tiyo bedo calo dano kikome, ma noŋo nen maber bene twatwal calo dano, me aketa i ot me worone." 
Isaiah44:14 En twero toŋo yadi cedar, nyo twero yero yat mo ma tye i buŋa i tim, ci toŋo gire. Kare mukene en kikome pito yat cedar, ka kot ocwer ci miyo doŋo," 
Isaiah44:15 Lacen yat meno bikonyo dano macalo yen me awaŋa i mac, kun dulle mukene bedo me tiyo cal jok. Dulle tuŋcel bedo me kuto mac me aoya ki me tedo; dul mukene en doŋ bitiyo ki cal jok me aworane." 
Isaiah44:16 Nucu dulle en kuto ki mac, bulo ki riŋo me acamane ma miyo en limoteko. Ka doŋ tye ka oyo mac ci wacci, “Macce mit adada! Olyeto koma doŋ atika!”" 
Isaiah44:17 Ka dulle mudoŋŋe ‘ducu en tiyo ki caljokke me aworane; en woro calle-nu, kun lego ni; “In aye lubaŋana, lara do!”" 
Isaiah44:18 Jo-nu pe giŋeyo dok bene pe giniaŋ gin ma gitiyo, Pien cal jok ma giworo-ni oumo waŋgi woko, pe, giromo neno piny; tamgi bene oballe woko pe gitwero niaŋ i gin ma tye ada." 
Isaiah44:19 Pe tye ŋat mo i kin jo ma tiyo cal jogi ma tamo tam, nyo ma tye ki ŋec, ma twero niaŋ ci miyo wacci, “Nucu yat ma atiyo ki cal jok-k i mogo awaŋo woko i mac, lodine atedo ki mugati, abulo ki riŋo ci acamo woko; dulle mukene ma doŋ odoŋŋe en aye atiyo ki cal jokka me awora. An doŋ atye kany ka woro odul yat en.”" 
Isaiah44:20 En moko buru; tamme me miŋo ca omiyo en doŋ orwenyo woko matwal, ma pe doŋ romo larre kene, pe bene twero niaŋ ni cal jok apaya ma emako i cine-ni pe lubaŋa kadi ki acel." 
Isaiah44:21 Rwot owaco ni, “In Yako bo koŋ ipo i lok magi, myero ipo ni in laticca. An yam aketi ni ibed laticca, wiya pe biwil i komi wacel, in Icrael." 
Isaiah44:22 Doŋ ayweyo balli woko ducu calo pol, ki tim maraco ducu ma yam ibedo ka timogi doŋ aketogi woko bene macalo lupu. Doŋ idwog cen bota, pien doŋ atyeko koki woko," 
Isaiah44:23 “Wudaŋŋe ki wer me yomcwiny, wun lwak me polo, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko tiyo lok man! Wudaŋŋe ba, wun tut-piny! Wuwo ki wer, wun godi ducu, ki yadi ducu ma tye i buŋa i tim, Pien Rwot doŋ okoko Yakobo, deyone doŋ binen i kom Icrael.”" 
Isaiah44:24 Rwot ma oketi, ma ocweyi ki meni, ma en Rwot Lalar meri waco kuman ni, “An aye a Rwot ma oketo jami ducu, aryeyo polo kena; i kare ma atiyo lobo ŋat mo onoŋo pe ka neta, ma okonya ki tiyone." 
Isaiah44:25 Amiyo lanen pa lugoba odoko gin ma konnye pe, dok amiyo lutyet gudoko jo mamiŋ; acoro jo maryek adwokogi cen, amiyo guŋeyo ada ni ryeko kara pe gin mo," 
Isaiah44:26 Amiyo lok ducu ma luticca gutito ocobbe kakare, gin ma lukwenana guwaco bene amiyo ocobbe. A waco bot Jerucalem ni dano dok bibedo i iye kunnu, ki gaŋ me Juda ni dok gibigerogi odoco; ka ma yam wi obur doŋ bidoko gaŋ," 
Isaiah44:27 Aciko pii ma i nam matut ki ma i kulu ducu ni myero odwon woko, ci pii bene odwono woko." 
Isaiah44:28 Awaco bot Ciro ni en bibedo laloc ma kakara, ni en bitiyo gin ma amito ni otine; en bimiyo gigero Jerucalem, dok bimiyo giketo te guti ot me wora.”" 
Isaiah45:1 Rwot owaco ni, Ciro doŋ odoko kabaka ma doŋ atyeko wirone ki moo, amako ciŋe ma lacuc aketo en me loyo rok mapol, acwale wek ocit otur teko pa luker woko, atye ka yabo nyime ma pe dok biumme." 
Isaiah45:2 Rwot owaco bot Ciro ni, “Abitelo nyimi, abiyubo yo bedo mapwot piri, abituro doggola ma gitiyo ki mola woko liweŋ, abitoŋo nyonyo rii me dogcel-gu aturo woko bene," 
Isaiah45:3 Abimiyo boti lim ma gikano ka macol, ki jami mogo ma gikano i kabedo ma tye i muŋ, wek iŋe ni an Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, an aye ma atyeko yeri dok alwoni ki nyiŋi," 
Isaiah45:4 Aketi ni ikony laticca Yakobo, jo Icrael ma gin jona, meno aye gin mumiyo ayeri; alwoni ki nyiŋi, amiyi nyiŋ pak kadi bed pe iŋeya." 
Isaiah45:5 “An keken aye abedo Rwot, pe dok tye Rwot mo mukene, Lubaŋa mo mukene bene doŋ pe kono an keken; abimii teko kadi pe ineya," 
Isaiah45:6 Man atimo wek dano guŋe ni an kena aye a Rwot, cakke ki i but lobo tuŋ potoceŋ o kwede tuŋ ka mukene, pe dok tye lubaŋa mo mukene kono an keken." 
Isaiah45:7 An aye ma aketo leŋo ki colpiny, amiyo kuc bedo tye ki can bene bedo tye, an Rwot aye ma atiyo jami magi ducu." 
Isaiah45:8 Abionyo loc o piny i lobo kun a ki i polo, abimiyo cwer calo kot, lobo biyabbe pi gamo larrre, dok bedo ki kit ma atir bene bicakke i lobo; an Rwot abimiyo lok man timme ada." 
Isaiah45:9 “Dano ma pyem ki Lubaŋa ma okete bineno can. Agulu lobo twero pyem ki ŋat ma ocweye? Lobo twero penyo lacwe agulu gin ma en tiyo? Nyo agulu twero waco bot lacwe agulu ni pe gitiye maber? 
Isaiah45:10 Latin ma penyo wonne ni, ‘In inywalo aŋo?’ latin-nu bineno can; nyo ma penyo minne ni, ‘Gin aŋo ma miyo it ye ka winyo arem me nywal?’ ”" 
Isaiah45:11 Rwot, en ŋat Maleŋ ma oketo Icrael, owaco kuman ni, “Wun pe wuromo penya lok i kom litinona, dok bene pe wutye ki twero mo me titta gin ma myero ati." 
Isaiah45:12 An aye ma aketo lobo, ka doŋ aketo dano me bedo iye: aryeyo polo obedo tye kit macalo tye kwede-ni pi tekka, an bene aye ma aciko jami ma i polo ni gubed kit macalo gitye kwede-ni." 
Isaiah45:13 An aye ma aketo Ciro i ticce me loc, abimiyo en cobo tic ducu kakare, en bigero gaŋŋa, dok bigonyo jona woko ki i opii, pe pi cul nyo kadi pi pwoc mo ma abimiyo bote.” Man lok ma Rwot me mony aye owaco." 
Isaiah45:14 Rwot owaco ki Icrael ni, “Lonyo ducu me. Ejipt ki jami acata ducu me Etiopia, gin ducu bidoko meri, ki jo Seba ma gin twoni jo maboco, gin ducu gibibino boti ci gidoko opiini, gibilubo kori ma noŋo doŋ gitweyogi woko ki nyor, gibiryebbe piny i nyimi ka wori. Gin ducu gibimwolle woko i nyimi kun giwacci, ‘In keken giri aye it ye ki Lubaŋa, in keni, lubaŋa mo mukene doŋ pe kono meri-ni keken.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:15 Ada, in aye ibedo Lubaŋa ma kanne woko, ai Lubaŋa pa Icrael, in aye ma ilaro dano." 
Isaiah45:16 Lewic bimako jo ducu ma tiyo cal jogi, alee bitwodo gin ducu." 
Isaiah45:17 Ento jo Icrael Rwot bilarogi woko, lar ma en larogi kwede biri nakanaka; lewic pe bimakogi wacel, alee mo bene pe bitwodogi liweŋ." 
Isaiah45:18 Pien Rwot aye gire ma oketo polo, en bene aye ma obedo Lubaŋa! En ocako tic me keto lobo, ci otiyo otyeko, en omiyo ocuŋ omoko matek kakare. En yam pe oketo lobo ci oweko woko kun onyobbe atata, en oketo ni dano twero bedo iye. En Rwot aye ma owaco ni, “An a Rwot, pe dok tye Rwot mo mukene." 
Isaiah45:19 An yam pe aloko lok i muŋ, i lobo ma tye i piny macol, an gira yam pe awaco bot likwayo pa Yakobo ni, ‘Wubiyenya i kabedo ma obedo atata.’ An Rwot aloko lok ada, dok anyuto gin ma tye kakare.”" 
Isaiah45:20 Rwot owaco ni, “Wucokke kacel, ci wubin, wubin wunyik cok, wun jo me rok mapatpat ma doŋ wubwot. Jo ma bedo ka tiŋo cal jogi ma gipayo apaya gin jo ma pe giniaŋ gin mo kadi ki acel; gubedo ka lego cal jok ma pe twero larogi-ni." 
Isaiah45:21 Wubin wunyut lokwu i kabedo me pido; wek jo ma pido gupennye kengi. Aŋa ma oweko lok man oŋene cakke i kare macon? Pe an Rwot aye ma ceŋ atimo? Pe dok tye lubaŋa mo mukene kono an keken, an aye Lubaŋa ma kite atir, ma laro dano, pe dok tye mo mukene kadi ki acel." 
Isaiah45:22 “Wulokke wubin bota, wek alarwu, wun jo ma bedo i wi lobo ducu! Pien an Lubaŋa kena, pe tye mo mukene." 
Isaiah45:23 An doŋ atyeko kwoŋŋe ki nyiŋa kena, lok ma aloko tye atir; lok meno pe bipoto piny i ŋom ma noŋo pe ocobbe. ‘Jo ducu gibirumo coŋgi i nyima, dano ducu gibikwoŋo kwoŋ ki nyiŋa." 
Isaiah45:24 “Dano gibiwaco ni, kit ma atir ki tek gire noŋŋe ki bot Rwot; jo ducu ma yam cwinygi obedo ka waŋ i kom Rwot, gibibino bote ma noŋo lewic makogi mada." 
Isaiah45:25 Likwayo Icrael ducu gibiloyo kop pi Rwot, ci gicako doŋ bedo ki deyo.”" 
Isaiah46:1 “Jogi pa jo Babilon doŋ cok gik woko! Bel ki Nebo ma yam giworo-ni, kombeddi doŋ gudoko gin ma lee tiŋo, man doŋ gudoko yec mapek twatwal ma miyo lee ol adada." 
Isaiah46:2 Gin ducu doŋ gukulle piny, guguŋo kacel, cal jogi pe gitwero larre kengi; ento doŋ gimakogi woko gimito terogi i opii." 
Isaiah46:3 “Wuwiny lokka, wun jo me ot pa Yakobo, wun jo ma wudoŋ i ot pa jona Icrael. Abedo ka gwokowu cakke wa ki i i megiwu, atiŋowu cakke i kare ma ginywalowu," 
Isaiah46:4 An Lubaŋawu ma bigwokowu, abigwokowu nio waŋ ma wuti; abibedo ka tiŋowu kadi wa i kare ma noŋo lwar doŋ otwi i wiwu. An aye ma aketowu dok agwokowu bene, abikonyowu, dok abilarowu." 
Isaiah46:5 “Wupora ki aŋa mono? Tye ŋat mo ma rom kweda? Wupora do wek wabed calcal. 
Isaiah46:6 Jo ma jobo jabu ajoba ki i kicaa Em, ma gipimo ryal ki mijan, giculo lim bot latet jabu wek oti botgi cal jok, ka doŋ giryebbe piny i nyime ka worone." 
Isaiah46:7 Gitiŋo giketo i wi gwokgi, gicibo i kabedone, ci cuŋ iye matwal, kun pe twero a woko kene ki i kabedone-nu. Ka dano mo kok bote pi kony, en pe gamo doge, pe laro dano meno ma okok bote i kare me canne." 
Isaiah46:8 “Ber wupo i kom lok man, wun lubalo; koŋ wutam, wulwod lokke ki i cwinywu," 
Isaiah46:9 Wupo i kom gin ma yam otimme con, pien an Lubaŋa kena, pe dok tye mo mukene ma cal kweda." 
Isaiah46:10 Cakke con i acakki piny, anyuto kit ma gin ‘man bitimme kwede woko, ki kit ma bigik kwede bene. Awaco ni gin ducu ma ayubo bicobbe, dok abitimo gin mo keken ma ayubbe me tiyone." 
Isaiah46:11 Abilwoŋo dano calo acut ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ; dano meno bia ki ka mabor, me cobo gin ma doŋ atyeko yubo con. Doŋ aloko, dok abicobone, doŋ atyeko yu bone, dok bene abitimo." 
Isaiah46:12 “Wuwiny lokka, wun jo ma cwinywu nwaŋ, wun jo ma wutamo ni larre bor kwedwu twatwal." 
Isaiah46:13 Nino ma abilarowu iye doŋ cok, pe doŋ bor wacel, pe abigalle me laro dano, abilaro Cion, pi Icrael ma anoŋo deyona pire.”" 
Isaiah47:1 Rwot owaco ni, “In Babilon ma imwonya mada, in gaŋ pa jo Kaldaya ma irom ki nyako ma peya oneyo laco mo, bin ilor piny ibed i apwa! Bed piny i nom, pe i wi komker! Pien pe dok gibiwaco ni, in iyom twatwal, pe iromo tiyo gin man." 
Isaiah47:2 Kwany nya kidi wek ireg moko, gony kitambara woko ki i wii, luny boŋoni mabor-ri woko wek tyeni odoŋ noŋo, ŋol ki i dye kulu ikat loka tuŋcel." 
Isaiah47:3 Ibidoŋ munero, komi ma myero pe onen doŋ binen ka maleŋ. An doŋ aculo kwor, pe abiweko dano mo bwot kadi ki acel.”" 
Isaiah47:4 Ŋat ma kokowa nyiŋe Rwot me mony, en ŋat Maleŋ pa Icrael." 
Isaiah47:5 Wubed ma Wuliŋ mot, kun wutye i piny macol, wun jo Kaldaya; pien pe doŋ gibilwoŋo gaŋwu ni mego ma loyo rok mapol." 
Isaiah47:6 Kiniga yam omaka i kom jona, amiyo gubedo calo gin kipyeda; amiyo gubedo i te locci, ento kica pe omaki i komgi wacel; okol ma itweyogi kwede obedo mapek twatwal bot jo muteggi." 
Isaiah47:7 Onoŋo iwaco ni ibibedo ka loyo rok mapol nakanaka, omiyo pe giri iketo cwinyi i lok magi, kadi po pi kit ma bigik kwede bene pe ipo," 
Isaiah47:8 Pi meno winy lok man, in ma imaroyomcwiny twatwal-li, ibedo ka ramo ni pe tye ŋat mo ma rom kwedi, dok ni pe ibibedo macalo dato nyo ni kadi ki litinoni bene pe bito." 
Isaiah47:9 Kit can aryo-nu ducu bipoto i komi, i nino acel, i dakika mo manoknok; to pa litino ki doko dato, gin ducu bipoto i wii lawaŋacel magwa, kadi bed itim lwak tim jokjok mapol ata, kadi bed doŋ it yet tyet ma rom mene." 
Isaiah47:10 In noŋo doŋ itamo ni it ye ki kuc i kom tim maraco ma ibedo ka timone-gu, kun itamo ni ŋat mo pe ma neni, Ryekoni kacel ki ŋec ma it ye kwede gubedo ka rwenyi arwenya, ibedo ka tamo ki i cwinyi ni pe tye ŋat mo ma rom kwedi." 
Isaiah47:11 Ento gin marac bipoto i komi, ma pe itwero timo gin mo mejukone. Can bipoto i komi, ma pe ibitwero kwanyone wacel; to bene bipoto i komi oyot mada, ma in pe iŋeyo iye gin mo," 
Isaiah47:12 Cuŋ matek i tyet dok imedde ki timo tim me jokjok, ma yam ibedo ka timone cakke wa i tinoni; gwok nyo man twero konyi i yo mo, nyo bene twero miyo dano gilwori." 
Isaiah47:13 Tekoni doŋ otum woko, kadi bed gitye ka miyo boti tam twatwal; koŋ gin doŋ gubin gulari, gin jo ma ŋeyo poko polo, ki jo ma niyo lakalatwe kun giciko wangi malo ligan, jo ma ka i por dwe manyen ducu gitito gin ma bitimme i komi-ni." 
Isaiah47:14 Nen girom ki cuŋ kai, mac wanogi woko; pe gitwero laro kwogi pigi kengi, ki i tek me leb mac. Mac man pe obedo mac me aoya, pe bene mac ma gitwero bedo i ŋete." 
Isaiah47:15 Jo ma ibedo ka yelle kwedgi-ni tye kit meno ki tun boti, ma ibedo ka balo kareni botgi cakke wa ka tinoni. Gin ducu gibitenyi wokc ata liyak, kun ŋat acel acel cito i yone pat; ŋat mo ma bilari pe." 
Isaiah48:1 Koŋ wuwiny man, wun jo me ot pa Yakobo, ma gilwoŋowu ki nyiŋ Icrael, wun likwayo pa Juda, Wun wukwoŋo kwoŋ I nyiŋ Rwot, kun wutuco bene nyiŋ Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ento pe i ada, dok pe i yo ma atir." 
Isaiah48:2 Ento gilwoŋŋe kengi ni gin jo me gaŋ maleŋ, dok gijeŋŋe i kom Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ma nyiŋe Rwot me mony." 
Isaiah48:3 “Yam atito con gin ma bitimme i-anyim, lokke yam okatti ki i doga, ci amiyo dano guŋeyo woko; aruyugi me timme oyotoyot, ci bene otine ocobbe kakare." 
Isaiah48:4 Pien onoŋo aŋeyo ni cwinywu nwaŋ, kun wujino-ler ŋutwu woko bene matek calo nyonyo, dok tur nyimwu bene obedo macalo mola;" 
Isaiah48:5 en mumi yo yam atittiwu lokke con, atuco lok man botwu con ma peya otimme, wek ka otimme pe wuwac ni cal jogiwu aye mutimo, kun wumedde ki waco ni cal apayawu ki cal ma wuliyo aliya ki mac aye ma guwaco ni otimme." 
Isaiah48:6 “Doŋ wutyeko winyo lok man, kombeddi doŋ wuneno gin magi ducu; pe wubitito pire? Cakke kombeddi cito kwede anyim abimiyo wuwinyo jami mogo manyen, gin mukene ma pe wun wuŋeyo kadi acel." 
Isaiah48:7 Pud amiyo timme kombeddi, pe con twatwal; peya yam wuwinyo pigi kadi ki acel, wek pe wuwac ni yam onoŋo wuneyogi con." 
Isaiah48:8 Peya yam wuwinyo pigi, dok bene peya onoŋo wuŋeyogi, cakke wa con itwu onoŋo pud odiŋ woko. Pien onoŋo aŋeyo woko ni wubibedo ki tim aranyi me goba, dok bene cakke wa ki i ic, onoŋo wubedo jo ma lujemo." 
Isaiah48:9 “Koŋ abimiyo kinigana galle pi nyiŋa, koŋ abijuko kinigana woko piwu wek dano gupaka, wek pe atyekwu woko." 
Isaiah48:10 Nen, doŋ atyeko Iiyowu woko, ento pe macalo ryal, atemowu i mac buk me can magwa adada."
