Isaiah48:11 Man atimo pira kena, atimo pira kena, atwero weko gipyedo nyiŋa niŋniŋ? Pe atwero miyo deyona wacel bot lubaŋa mo mukene. Rwot bikoko jo Icrael" 
Isaiah48:12 “Wuwiny lokka, wunjo pa Yakobo wun jo Icrael ma an alwonowu. An a en, an aye abedo mukwoŋo dok abedo me agikki," 
Isaiah48:13 An aye ma aketo te guti me lobo ki ciŋa, ayaro polo ki ciŋa lacuc; ka alwoŋogi, ci gin ducu a kacel." 
Isaiah48:14 “Wun ducu wugurre kacel, wek wuwiny lokka. Aŋa i kingi ma otito ni gin magi bitimme? ŋat ma an Rwot amaro en aye abioro me cobo yubba i kom Babilon, en bilwenyo i kom jo Kaldaya." 
Isaiah48:15 An gira, an kikoma doŋ aloko, dok bene doŋ atyeko lwone woko, doŋ akele, nyime bibedo leŋ, bibedo bene maber." 
Isaiah48:16 Wunyik cok bota kany, wek wuwiny: cakke i acakki piny, pe aloko gin mo i muŋ, cakke i kare ma ocako timme, onoŋo atye kunnu.” Kombeddi Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ oora ki Cwiny Maleŋ." 
Isaiah48:17 Rwot ma en ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael, ma en aye okokowu ki i opii, owaco kuman ni, “An a Rwot Lubaŋawu amito pwonyowu wek wubed maber, kun atelowu i yo ma myero wuwot iye," 
Isaiah48:18 Kono yam wubedo ka winyo cikka, kono ber! Kono kucwu omol calo kulu ma moljwi, kono wuloyo lok calo nam ma piine mol laboŋo yweyo-ni." 
Isaiah48:19 Likwayowu kono calo kweyo, dano ma gua ki i komwu kono doŋ gidwoŋ calo apwa; kono nyiŋgi pe orwenyo kadi ki acel, kono bene pe gijwerowu woko liweŋ ki i nyima.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Wua woko ki i Babilon, wurin woko ki bot jo Kaldaya, wunyut lok man kun wugoyo kijira, dok wutit pire bene, wucwallokke ocit wa i agikki piny, kun wuwaco ni, “Rwot doŋ okoko laticce Yakobo woko!”" 
Isaiah48:21 I kare ma en obedo ka telogi i tim, orwo pii pe onekogi matek; omiyo pii otuc omol pigi, kun a ki i kom pata got, obaro got ci pii onyette woko ka maleŋ." 
Isaiah48:22 “Kuc pe pi jo ma gin lutim maraco” Man lok ma Rwot owaco. 
Isaiah49:1 Wuwiny lokka, wun lobo ma wutye i dog nam, wucik itwu wuwiny, wun rok ma wua ki ka mabor. Rwot olwoŋa ma onoŋo pud atye i ic, ocako nyiŋa ma onoŋo pud atye i kom maa." 
Isaiah49:2 En omiyo lok ma katti ki i doga obedo bit calo lak pala lucwan, okana woko i tipo ciŋe; en omiyo adoko calo atero ma gipako lake, okana woko i juro aterone." 
Isaiah49:3 En owaco ni, “In laticca, in Icrael ma abinoŋo deyo pire.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Ento an awacci, “Ayelle me tiyo tic noŋo, atyeko tekona woko ducu nonono, laboŋo kony mo; ento kadi bed kumeno, gin ma myero pira tye bot Rwot, Lubaŋa gire bicula pi tic ma atiyo.”" 
Isaiah49:5 Ma pud peya ginywala, onoŋo Rwot doŋ oyera woko, en oketa me bedo laticce ma bidwoko jo pa Yakobo cen bote, ki me coko jone jo Icrael ma yam guket woko ata, pien Rwot oketo deyo i koma, Lubaŋana aye miya teko." 
Isaiah49:6 En Rwot owaco ni, “Doko laticca obedo gin mayot twatwal me tiŋo kaka pa Yakobo mapatpat malo, ki me dwoko Icrael ma agwoko cen; an doŋ abiketi me bedo ceŋ bot lurok, wek imi larre oo wa i agikki piny ducu.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Rwot ma en ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael, ma en aye koko jo Icrael, en owaco kit man bot ŋat ma gicayo matek, ŋat ma rok papatpat doŋ okwero woko, ma tye macalo latic pa luloc: “Luker bineni ci gia woko malo, rwodi bineni ci giryebbe woko piny; man bitimme pi Rwot, ma en lagen, ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael ma oyeri.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Yam agamo dogi i kare me timo ber bot dano, yam akonyi i kare me laro dano, atyekogwoki bene, dok amiyoibedo macalo gicikke bot rok ducu, abimiyo doŋ ibedo i lobo pa kwarowu ma kombeddi doŋ odoko obur-ri." 
Isaiah49:9 Abiwaco bot lumabuc ni, ‘Wukatti woko,’ ki bot jo ma tye ka macol ni, ‘Wukatti woko ka maleŋ.’ Gibibedo calo romi ma camo lum i ŋet yo ducu, ka camgi bibedo i wi cere ducu ka ma yadi pe iye." 
Isaiah49:10 Kec pe binekogi, kadi orwo pii bene pe binekogi, yamo malyet ki cen bene pe biwaŋogi, pien ŋat ma kica omako i komgi aye ma bitelogi, bitelogi kelogi wa i ŋet waŋ it ma piine gunnye agunya ki i ŋom." 
Isaiah49:11 Abiketo yo wok ki i wi godina ducu, gibituco yo gudona cito malo i wi godi." 
Isaiah49:12 Nen, gibia ki ka mabor, kun gia ki tuŋ acam ki yo tuŋ potoceŋ, jo mukene gibia ki i lobo Ciene.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Wer wer ki yomcwiny, in polo, cwinyi obed yom ba in lobo; wumwoc ki wer, wun godi! Pien Rwot doŋ okweyo cwiny jone, kica bimake i kom jone ma guneno can twatwal." 
Isaiah49:14 Ento jo Cion guwacci. “Rwot doŋ obwotowa woko ata, wiye doŋ owil woko i komwa.”" 
Isaiah49:15 Ci Rwot ogamo cutcut ni, “Wi dako twero wii i kom latinne ma en doto, kica pe twero make i kom wode ma en onywalo? Kadi bed dano wiye twero wil, ento an wiya pe biwil i komwu." 
Isaiah49:16 Nen, in Cion doŋ atyeko goro nyiŋi woko ki coc i ci na, celli tye i nyima kare ducu." 
Isaiah49:17 “Lugedoni gibitic oyot twatwal, makato jo ma yam guyaki, jo ma muki amuka bia woko ki boti." 
Isaiah49:18 Tiŋ waŋi malo, nen kabedo ducu; gin ducu gicokke gibino boti. Rwot owaco ni, ‘Kit macalo atye kwo-ni, ibirukogi calo gin me deyo, ibitweyogi i komi kit macalo dako manyen tweyo ki tiko me wel i nute.’" 
Isaiah49:19 “Adada, wi oburri doŋ odoŋ noŋo, loboni doŋ otyeko balle woko; ento kombeddi doŋ bibedo madiŋ mada bot jo ma bibedo kunnu, jo ma yam gumwonyi woko-ni doŋ gibibedo ka mabor." 
Isaiah49:20 Litinoni ma ginywalogi i opii, pud dok ibiwinyo giwaco ni, ‘Kabedona diŋ twatwal; myero dok gimed kabedo botwa.’" 
Isaiah49:21 Ibicako pennye kekeni ki i cwinyi ni, ‘Aŋa ma onywalo jo magi? An yam abedo lalur, dok abedo ki cwercwiny madit, gikwanya gitera woko cen calo opii; aŋa kono dok ma opito litino magi? Koŋ inen, yam adoŋ kena, ento litino magi dok gua ki kwene kono?’”" 
Isaiah49:22 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco ki jone kuman ni, “Nen, abiryeyo ciŋa bot lurok, ci abitiŋo benderana malo bot rok mapol; gibikelo awobeni kun gikwakogi i korgi, dok bene gibitiŋo anyirani i wi gwokgi;" 
Isaiah49:23 luker bidoko wegi litinoni ci gipitogi, mon pa luker bibedo macalo megigi ma bidotogi. Gibiryebbe piny i nyimi ka wori, gibinano apwa ki i tyeni. Meno bimiyo iŋeyo ni an a Rwot; lewic pe bimako jo ma kura." 
Isaiah49:24 Gitwero kwanyo jami ayaka woko ki i ciŋ dano matek, nyo gitwero mayo opii woko ki i ciŋ dano mager?" 
Isaiah49:25 Ento Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Opii ma dano matek omakogi, gibimayogi woko ki bote, jami ayaka ma tye i ciŋ ŋat mager bene gibikwanyo woko ki bote, pien abipyem ki jo ma pyem kwedwu, ci abilaro litinoni woko." 
Isaiah49:26 Abimiyo jo ma unowu gicamo riŋo komgi kekengi, dok gibimato remogi kekengi gimer kwede calo gumato koŋo Vino. Meno bimiyo dano ducu ŋeyo ni, an a Rwot ma Lalarwu, ŋat Matek pa Yakobo ma kokowu.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Waraga me keto nyom ma yam aryemo ki minwu tye kwene, ma ceŋ amiye i kare ma onoŋo aryeme-ni? Yam acatowu bot aŋa i kin jo ma yam onoŋo acamo banyagi? Nen, yam gicatowu pi balwu, dok pi turo cik, en aye ma oweko giryemo minwu woko." 
Isaiah50:2 “Piŋo kono yam pe anoŋo dano mo i kare ma abino-ni? Dok i kare ma alwoŋo lwoŋo, piŋo ŋat mo kono pe ogamo doga? Wutamo ni ciŋa cek, pe twero koko wu? Tekona pe me larowu? Koŋ inen, nam otwo woko i kare ma ajuko, atwero loko kulu ducu doko tim aroo; rec ma i igi bidoko coo pi can pii, gito woko pi orwo pii." 
Isaiah50:3 Atwero bene loko polo doko macol licuc, ci aumo woko ki boŋo cola.”" 
Isaiah50:4 Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ opwonya i lok ma myero aloki, wek aŋe lok ma miyo teko bot dano ma ool. En coya woko ki i waŋ nino kare ducu odiko, en coya awiny gin ma en pwonya kwede." 
Isaiah50:5 Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ otyeko yabo ita woko, pe ajemo, pe bene alokke neya," 
Isaiah50:6 Aloko neya bot jo ma goya, dok bene aloko lema bot jo ma telo yer tika; pe akano waŋa woko ki lewic ki i laa ma giŋulo iye." 
Isaiah50:7 Pien Rwot Lubaŋa konya, mumiyo alee mo pe otwoda; meno omiyo waŋa obedo matek calo got, dok onoŋo aŋeyo bene ni pe gibiketo lewic i wiya;" 
Isaiah50:8 pien ŋat ma bimiyo aloyo kop tye cok kweda. Ŋat mo tye ma mito pido kweda? Owek wacuŋ kacel kwede i nyim lukiko. Aŋa ce ma lakworra-ni? En mono obin cok i ŋeta kany. 
Isaiah50:9 Nen, Rwot Lubaŋa konya, aŋa ma biŋolo kop loya ni an labal? Nen, gin ducu gibiti woko calo boŋo, nyenye bicamogi woko." 
Isaiah50:10 Aŋa i kinwu ma lworo Rwot, ma winyo lok ma laticce waco? Aŋa ma woto i piny macol ma pe neno yo ma en tye ka wot iye-ni, ento geno gire Rwot, kun jeŋŋe i kom Lubaŋane?" 
Isaiah50:11 Nen, wun jo ducu ma wumoko mac, wun jo ma moko mac i kom yen! Wuwot i dero mac ma doŋ wumokoni, kun noŋo mac ma wumoko i lak yen ca lyel menyo yo botwu. Gin ma wubinoŋo ki bota en ene: wubibuto piny ma noŋo wutye ki arem madit twatwal." 
Isaiah51:1 “Wuwiny lokka, wun jo ma wumito larre, wun jo ma yenyo Rwot; koŋ wunen got ma yam gipayowu ki iye, ki bur madit adada me gweŋ matek ma gikwinyowu ki iye." 
Isaiah51:2 Koŋ wutam pi kwarowu Abraim, ki Cara ma obedodawu; i kare ma alwoŋo Abraim onoŋo pe tye ki latin mo, ento lacen amiye gum, ci onywalo litino, dok anyayo likwaye odoko mapol twatwal." 
Isaiah51:3 Pien Rwot bikweyo cwiny Cion; bikweyo cwiny kabedone ducu ma gibalo woko, tim ma iye bibedo calo Eden, ki tim aroo mutwo bibedo calo poto pa Rwot; yomcwiny madwoŋ bibedo tye kunnu, kun dano giwero wer me pwoc ki me pak." 
Isaiah51:4 “Wuwiny lokka, wun jona, wuter itwu wuwiny lokka, wun rokka; pien abimiyowu cik, ki ŋolo kop atir ma bibedo macalo cen bot lurok." 
Isaiah51:5 Kare me locca doŋ onyiko cok twatwal, larre ma abikelo tye ka bino, an ki koma aye abiloyo rok ducu; lobo ducu ma tye i dog nam gitye ka kura, gitye ki gen ni abilarogi." 
Isaiah51:6 Wutiŋ waŋwu malo i polo, dok wukul waŋwu piny wunen lobo; pien polo ma wuneno-ni biket woko macalo yito, ento lobo biti woko calo boŋo, ka doŋ jo ma bedo iye gito woko calo ober; ento larre ma abikelo biri nakanaka, locca pe bigik wacel." 
Isaiah51:7 “Wuwiny lokka, wunjo ma wuŋeyo kit ma atir, wun jo ma doŋ wumako cikka i cwinywu; pi meno pe wubed ki lworo kadi dano cayowu, cwinywu bene pe myero oballe ka ce giyetowu." 
Isaiah51:8 Pien nyenye bicamogi woko calo boŋo, okok bene bicamogi woko calo yer romo, ento locca pe bigik wacel, larrena bibedo pi yalwak me kare ducu.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Co, co woko ki i waŋ nino, wek iruk teko, in ciŋ Rwot; co woko macalo i kare ma okato, ki lwak jo me kare macon. Pe in aye yam iŋolo Rakab iŋido woko matitino, icobo min kulu ineko woko?" 
Isaiah51:10 Pe in aye ma yam imiyo pii ma i nam otwo woko, pii madit ma onoŋo yam tut twatwal-li; pe imiyo yo obaro dye nam matut ca, wek jo ma gikokogi gukat ki iye wa loka nam tuŋcel?" 
Isaiah51:11 io ma Rwot okokogi bidwogo i Cion, gibibino kun giwero wer. Yomcwiny ma ri nakanaka pe birwenyo ki i wigi, gibibedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, cwercwiny ki cur bia woko ki botgi." 
Isaiah51:12 “An aye abedo ŋat ma kweyo cwinyi. Piŋo ilworo dano mamwa ma to woko-ni, latin pa dano ma giketo calo lummi?”" 
Isaiah51:13 Piŋo wii owil woko i kom Rwot ma oketi, ma oryeyo polo, dok bene ma ocibo te guti me lobo? Piŋo kono ibedo ki lworo nakanaka nino ducu, pi akemo malyet pa jo ma giuno dano wadigi, ka ce gucako ticgi me neko dano? Akemo malyet pa ŋat ma uno dano-ni kono tye kwene?" 
Isaiah51:14 ŋat ma onoŋo gitweyo macalo mabuc gibigonyo woko oyotoyot; en pe bito donyo piny i bur lyel, cam bene pe biremme." 
Isaiah51:15 Pien an a Rwot Lubaŋani, ma tugo pii ki i nam, miyo twagge kun mor, nyina Rwot me mony." 
Isaiah51:16 Doŋ atyeko keto lokka i dogi, akano waŋi woko bene doŋ i tipo ciŋa, aryeyo polo, aketo te guti me lobo, awaco bot jo Cion ni, ‘Wun wujona.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 Co woko ki i waŋ nino, co woko, a malo, in Jerucalem, in ma doŋ imato kikopo me akemo ma Rwot aye omiyo boti, i kare ma imato ducu, ci icako tagge." 
Isaiah51:18 Pe tye ŋat mo ma twero peye, i kin litinone ducu ma en onywaloni; pe tye ŋat mo ma twero mako ciŋe, i kin litino ducu ma en opitogi." 
Isaiah51:19 Can magi aryo-ni ducu opoto i komi lawaŋ acel, aŋa ma binywako kumo pi can magi kacel kwedi? Giyako loboni gibalo woko liweŋ, kec ki neko dano opoto iye magwa; man aŋa ma bikweyo cwinyi?" 
Isaiah51:20 Awobeni guwille woko, gubuto piny liraba ka ma yo ogik iye ducu, calo til ma omoko ki obwo; akemo pa Rwot doŋ oketo komgi woko, ki juk ma Lubaŋani obedo ka jukogi kwede." 
Isaiah51:21 Pi meno, wun jona ma giunowu doŋ wuwiny lok man, wun jo ma wumer, ento pe wumer ki koŋo vino." 
Isaiah51:22 Rwot Lubaŋawu ma pido lok pa jone owaco kuman ni, “Nen, doŋ atyeko kwanyo kikopo woko ki i ciŋwu, en kikopo ma miyo wumer wutagge-ni; agulu me akemona pe dok wubimedde ki matone." 
Isaiah51:23 Doŋ abimiyo i cin jo ma unowu, ma yam doŋ guwaco botwu ni, ‘Wuryebbe piny wek wukati’; omiyo wuloko ŋewu doŋ odoko ŋom me anyonagi, dok ŋewu onoŋo doŋ tye macalo yo ma gilubo.’" 
Isaiah52:1 Co woko, co woko ki i waŋ nino, ruk tekoni, in Cion; ruk boŋŋini mabecone, in Jerucalem, gaŋ maleŋ, pien dano mo ma pe giliro, ki jo ma komgi ki keni, pe dok gibidonyo boti." 
Isaiah52:2 Teŋ apwa woko ki i komi wek ia malo, in Jerucalem ma yam ibedo opii. Wugony tol woko doŋ ki i ŋutwu, wun jo Cion ma yam wubedo opii." 
Isaiah52:3 Pien Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Pe yam giculo lim mo me wilowu, dok bene pe gibiculo lim mo me kokowu." 
Isaiah52:4 Yam wuwoto wucito i lobo Ejipt macalo lubedo, lacen jo Aciria guunowu laboŋo bal mo." 
Isaiah52:5 Koŋ wunen kombeddi dok gitero jona woko i Babilon nonono; gitye ka ŋalo lulocgi, dano gitye ka cayo nyiŋa dyeceŋ jwi." 
Isaiah52:6 Pi meno jona doŋ gibineya, wubineyo ni an Lubaŋa, wubineyo ni an a en ma atye ka lok kwedwu.”" 
Isaiah52:7 Neno tyene ber mada i wi godi, ŋat ma kelo lok maber, ma tito pi kuc, ma kelo lok maber me gin maber, ŋat ma tito lok me larre, ma waco bot Cion ni, “Lubaŋani tye ka loc.”" 
Isaiah52:8 Koŋ iwiny, lukur gaŋŋi gitye ka wer ki dwan maloŋo, giwero wer me yomcwiny kacel; pien gitye ka neno Rwot ki wangi, kun tye ka dwogo cen i Cion." 
Isaiah52:9 Wumwoc ki wer lawaŋacel, wun ducu, wun wi obur Jerucalem; pien Rwot doŋ okweyo cwiny jone, doŋ okoko Jerucalem woko." 
Isaiah52:10 Rwot doŋ oyabo tekone maleŋ ka maleŋ i nyim rok ducu; dano ducu ma i wi lobo gibineno, kit ma Rwot Lubaŋawa olarowa kwede." 
Isaiah52:11 Wua, wua woko, wua woko ki kunnu, pe wugud gin mo ma kome ki keni; wua woko ki kunnu, wek wucit wulonnye kekenwu, wun jo ma tino jami pa Rwot." 
Isaiah52:12 Pe wubia oyotoyot ma komwu myel, pe bene wubiriŋo arina, pien Rwot bitelo nyimwu Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael bibedo i newu kun gwokowu cawa ducu," 
Isaiah52:13 Rwot owaco ni, “Nen, tic pa laticca tye ka wot maber, gibiwore ci gitiŋe malo: en bibedo dano mamalo twatwal." 
Isaiah52:14 Jo mapol ma gunene gubedo ki ur matek; waŋe onoŋo nen pat mada ki waŋ dano, ki kome bene onoŋo pe rom ki kom dano." 
Isaiah52:15 En bipoyo kom rok mapol kit meno, luker ducu doggi bitwo woko pire; pien gibineno gin ma yam pe gitittigi pire, dok gibinian i gin ma yam peya guwinyo pire.”" 
Isaiah53:1 Rwot, aŋa ma yam oye lok ma wan watito? Dok aŋa ma Rwot onyuto tekone bote?" 
Isaiah53:2 Pien odoŋo i nyime calo ginapita ma pud tye ka doŋo adoŋa, ma pud lwite donyo adonya i ŋom mutwo. En pe tye ki kom mo maber nyo deyo ma kono omi wacik waŋwa i kome, gin mo ma ywayo tam padano onoŋo pe bote kadi ki acel, dok gin mo ma twero miyo wabedo ki tam i kome bene pe." 
Isaiah53:3 Dano gicaye gikwere woko-gu, obedo ki cwercwiny madwoŋ ki arem madit ma okato kare, En bedo calo ŋat ma dano guumo waŋgi woko i kome, dano gicaye, ma pe waparo pire wacel." 
Isaiah53:4 Adada, en ociro can piwa, otiŋo aremwa ducu i kome; gigoye dok gitime marac atika, mumiyo wabedo ka tamo ni Lubaŋa aye ma oketo can man i kome." 
Isaiah53:5 Yam gicobe pi balwa, giketo ret i kome pi timwa marac; can ma giketo i kome-ni okelo kuc botwa, pi goc ma gigoye kwede omiyo wacan," 
Isaiah53:6 Wan ducu onoŋo yam waŋak warwenyo woko calo romi, ŋat acel acel onoŋo okwanyo yone kene, ento Rwot doŋ otiŋo balwa ducu oketo i kome." 
Isaiah53:7 Yam giune, giketo can i kome, ento en pe oŋamo doge me loko lok mo; calo latin romo ma gitero ka nekone, dok calo romo ma olin i nyim lunyar yerre, kit meno en pe onamo doge me loko." 
Isaiah53:8 Giune, giŋolo kop i kome, ka gikwanye woko; aŋa kono ma oparo pi gin ma otimme i kome, ni gikwanye woko ki i lobo pa jo makwo, gigoye pi bal pa jo me rokwa?" 
Isaiah53:9 Gikwinyo lyelle kacel ki lyel pa lutim maraco, dok kacel ki lulonyo i kare me tone, kadi bed onoŋo en pe otimo bwami mo, dok pe oloko lok goba ki doge," 
Isaiah53:10 Ento Rwot aye yam omito ni giket can i kome; omiyo obedo ki twon arem madit. I kare ma en bimine kene me bedo gitum pi bal, en bineno likwaye, ci bimedo nino me kwone bene. En bicobo gin ma Rwot doŋ mito yubo;" 
Isaiah53:11 bineno doŋ gin maber ma oa ki i cwercwiny ma yam owok ki iye; meno bikweyo cwinye. Laticca ma kite atir, bimiyo gikwano jo mapol ni kitgi atir; en bitiŋo balgi ducu i kome." 
Isaiah53:12 Meno bimiyo amiyo bote kabedo me woro i kin jo madito, en bene binywako jami ma giyako i lweny kacel ki jo matego. Pien en doŋ omine kene me to woko, mumiyo gikwane kacel ki lubalo; ento en otiŋo bal pa dano mapol, dok obako doge olego pi lubalo adada." 
Isaiah54:1 “Wer wer ki dwan maloŋo, in dako ma lalur ma pe yam inywalo latin mo-ni, mwoc ki wer kun idaŋŋe matek, in dako ma pud peya yam arem ogoyi! Pien litino pa dako ma giweko odoŋ kene bibedo pol makato litino pa dako ma ginyomo ma bedo kacel ki cware, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Isaiah54:2 Med kabedo me kemani obed malac, wek giyar boŋŋi aŋaba me kicikani woko i kabedoni; pe ibed ladur, med tolli obed maboco, dok bene gur teke me kemani ocuŋ matek likiŋ." 
Isaiah54:3 Pien waŋ loboni bimedde dok tuŋ lacuc ki tuŋ lacam, likwayu bileyo kabedo pa lurok dok gibinya gipoŋo gaŋŋi ducu ma yam gudoŋ obur-ri." 
Isaiah54:4 “Pe ilwor, pien lewic pe bimaki; pe iwek alee otwodi, pien pe gibiketo lewic i komi. Wii biwil woko i kom lewic ma yam onoŋo ibedo kwede me tinoni, pe dok ibipo i kom cac ma gibedo ka cayi kwede pi bedo keni macalo dato." 
Isaiah54:5 Pien ŋat ma ocweyi aye obedo cwari, nyiŋe Rwot me mony: ŋat mukoki ki i can en aye ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael, gilwoŋe ni Lubaŋa me wi lobo ducu." 
Isaiah54:6 “Pien Rwot doŋ otyeko lwoŋi woko, calo dako ma gibwoto odoŋ kene, kun tye ki cwercwiny, calo dako ma ginyomo ma onoŋo en pud nyako ka giryemo woko, man Lubaŋani ma owaco." 
Isaiah54:7 Yam onoŋo aweki keni pi kare mo manok keken, ento abidwoki woko bota ki kica madwoŋ," 
Isaiah54:8 Yam akano waŋa woko ki boti, pi kare manok ma onoŋo akemona dwoŋ twatwal, ento abitimo kica boti ki mar ma pe gik, man Rwot ma Lakok meri aye ma owaco." 
Isaiah54:9 “Pien man ki tuŋ bota rom aroma ki kare pa Nua: kit macalo akwoŋo ni pii pa Nua pe dok bimedde ki poŋ i wi lobo ducu, kit meno bene doŋ akwoŋo nikiniga pe doŋ bimaka i komi, dok bene pe abijuki." 
Isaiah54:10 Pien godi twero a, ki cere-gu gitwero kobo woko ka mukene, ento marra ma pe lokke pe bia ki i komi, dok cikkena me kuc pe gibidiro woko cen. Meno lok pa Rwot ma kica omake i komi." 
Isaiah54:11 “In gaŋ ma ineno can, ma yamo okodo i komi ki tek, ma pe gikweyo cwinyi, nen, abimwono got meri ki libi, dok abiketo te gutini ki capir." 
Isaiah54:12 Abitiyo wi labila odini ki tiko makwar me wel, dogcelli abitiyo ki got makwar ma mil amila, ki kor celli doŋ abideyo ki litino kidi me wel mapatpat." 
Isaiah54:13 “Litinoni ducu Rwot aye bipwonyogi, litinoni gibibedo maber twatwal." 
Isaiah54:14 Kit ma atir bimiyo ibedo icuŋ matek: pe gibiuni kadi ki acel, lworo mo pe bimaki pire; jo ma giuni pe gibinyiko cok ka ŋeti." 
Isaiah54:15 Ka ce dano biero daa i komi, meno noŋo pe oa ki bota; ŋat ma ero daa i komi bipoto gire pire kene." 
Isaiah54:16 “Nen, an ma aketo latet, ma buko lodi mac, ci teto jami lweny pi ticce; dok bene aketo ŋat ma labal lobo wek ojwer jami woko ducu." 
Isaiah54:17 Pe tye jami lweny mo ma giteto pi lweny i komi ma bicobo ticce, ibiloyo lok me adot ducu ma gikelo i komi. Man aye gum ma lutic pa Rwot binoŋo, loyo kopgi a ki bota, man lok pa Rwot kikome.”" 
Isaiah55:1 “Wubin wutwom pii, wun jo ducu ma orwo nekowu; ŋat ma limme mo pe, myero bene obin owil cam. Wubin wuwil koŋo vino ki cak laboŋo lim, laboŋo wel mo." 
Isaiah55:2 Piŋo wubalo limwu i kom gin ma pe kwon, piŋo kono wutyeko tekowu woko ka noŋo gin ma pe yeŋowu? Wucik itwu atika i lokka, ci wucam cam maber, dok wubed ki yomcwiny pi cam ma miyu ma amiyowu," 
Isaiah55:3 Wucik itwu wuwiny lokka, ci wubin bota; wuwiny lokka, wek wubed kwo; ci abicikke kwedwu i gicikke ma ri nakanaka, abimiyowu mar mera ma pe lokke, ma genne, ma yam aciko pi Daudi." 
Isaiah55:4 Nen, yam akete obedo caden bot lurok, latel ki lami-cik bot lurok." 
Isaiah55:5 Nen, wun wubilwono rok mapatpat ma pe wuŋeyogi, ki rok mapol mapatpat ma yam pe gineyowu gibiriŋo gibino botwu, pi Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma en ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael, pien en doŋ otyeko keto deyo i komwu." 
Isaiah55:6 “Wuyeny Rwot i kare-ma en pud twero noŋŋe, wukok bot Rwot ma pud en tye cok." 
Isaiah55:7 Latim marac myero obwot timme marac, ki dano ma pe kite atir bene owek tamme ma pe ber-ri; olokke odwog cen bot Rwot, wek Rwot otime kica, myero odwog cen bot Lubaŋawa, pien en biweko balle woko ducu." 
Isaiah55:8 “Pien tamma pe tamwu, ki yowu bene pe yona,” man Rwot ma owaco." 
Isaiah55:9 Kit macalo polo tye malo ka mabor makato lobo-ni, yona bene tye malo kit meno makato yowu, ki tamma bene tye malo kato tamwu woko." 
Isaiah55:10 “Kit macalo kot ki pee corre bino piny kun gia ki i polo, ma pe dok gidok malo kunnu, ento gikweyo lobo, miyo ginapita twi ci doŋo, mi yo kodi bot laeo-kodi ki miyo kwon bene bot dano me acama," 
Isaiah55:11 lok ma a ki i doga bene bibedo kit meno; pe bidwogo bota noŋo ma noŋo pe otiyo gin mo, lokka bitiyo gin ma amito ni oti, dok bicobo gin ma acwale pire." 
Isaiah55:12 ‘“‘Pien wubikato woko kun wucito ki yomcwiny, gibiterowu ki kuc; godi ducu ki cere ducu ma i nyimwu gibimwoc ki wer licur, ki yadi ducu me tim biyeŋŋe ki yomcwiny," 
Isaiah55:13 Yat ciprec bitwi ma ka okuto; ki yadi ma ŋwecgi kur bitwi ma ka ocok; meno bibedo gin me po nakanaka, ma pe birwenyo, me nyuto ni an Rwot aye ma cen atiyo man.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Rwot owaco bot jone kuman ni, “Myero wuŋol kop atir, dok wuti gin ma tye atir, pien doŋ acok larowu, lar ma alarowu kwede binen ka maleŋ," 
Isaiah56:2 Dano ma timo man tye ki gum madwoŋ, ki dano ma omako matek likiŋ, ma gwoko ceŋ cabit kun pe pyedo, dok gwoko ciŋe pe timo gin marac.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Larok mo ma obino oribbe ki Rwot pe myero owac ni, “Rwot bikoya woko matwal ki i komjone miyo abedo kaikena”; ki dano ma gikolo bene pe myero owac ni, “Nen, doŋ atye macalo yat ma otal.”" 
Isaiah56:4 Pien Rwot doŋ owaco kuman ni, “Jo ma gikologi ma gigwoko cen cabitta, ma giyero tiyo gin ma yomo cwinya, ma gumako gicikkena likiŋ," 
Isaiah56:5 abimiyo botgi gin mo me po nyiŋgi ma bibedo i ot ka ma giwora iye i dye gaŋŋa, maber makato bedo ki litino awobe nyo litino anyira; abimiyo botgi nyiŋ ma bedo matwal, ma pe birwenyo kadi ki acel." 
Isaiah56:6 “Doŋ lurok ma guribbe ki Rwot, me tic bote, kun gimaro nyiŋe, dok ma gimine me bedo luticce, dano ducu ma gwoko ceŋ cabit, kun pe pyedo, ma omako gicikkena woko likiŋ," 
Isaiah56:7 gin jo-nu aye abikelogi i got mera maleŋ, dok abiyomo cwinygi i ot me lega ka ma giwora iye. Abigamo gitum awanagi ki gityer ma gityero bota, magi ducu abigamo i wi keno tyerra; pien oda gibilwoŋo ni ot me lega pa jo me rok ducu.”" 
Isaiah56:8 Rwot Lubaŋa ma ocoko jo Icrael ma onoŋo giryemogi woko owaco kuman ni, “Dok abicoko jo mukene agurogi bota, amedo i kom jo ma doŋ atyeko cokogi-ni.”" 
Isaiah56:9 Wun lee tim ducu wubin, wumwod riŋo, wun lee ducu ma wubedo i buŋa." 
Isaiah56:10 Lukur-piny pa jo Icrael ducu wangi oto, gin ducu gipe ki ŋec kadi ki acel, gin ducu gicalo gwogi ma te lebgi oto, pe dok gitwero gweyo; gibuto piny gibedo ka lek aleka, gimaro nino nino matut keken." 
Isaiah56:11 Gin gwogi ma giwor twatwal ma cam pe romogi. Gin lukwat ma pe giniaŋ gin mo; ŋat acel acel i kingi kwanyo mere yone kene, ŋat acel acel bene yenyo magobane kit ma cwinye mito." 
Isaiah56:12 Gilwoŋŋe kekengi ni, “Wubin wacitu ka kelo koŋo vino, wubin wamatu kono makec wek wameru woko, diki dok binonne, madit makato ducu.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Dano ma kite atir to, ŋat mo pe ma keto iye cwinye. Jo ma maro Lubaŋa gikwanyogi woko; ŋat mo pe ma paro pigi. Pien dano ma kite atir noŋo gikwanyo woko ki i can," 
Isaiah57:2 en cako donyo i kuc; jo ma bedo kun cwinygi atir, giywe mot i kabutogi." 
Isaiah57:3 Ento wun wubin wunyik cok bota kany, wun litino pa dako ma latal, ma latim abor aye onywalo ki malaya." 
Isaiah57:4 Meno wutye ka nywaro aŋa ce? Wunamo dogwu malac kumeno i kom aŋa ma lebwu okatti woko kumeno-ni? Wun litino pa lutim bal, litino ma ginywalogi ki lok me goba," 
Isaiah57:5 wun jo ma mitiwu pe kwe i te yat kworo, i te yadi ducu ma pote olot liyuk; ma wuneko litinowu woko i luŋ-gu, i te pata got ma obar?" 
Isaiah57:6 Gin ma gibipoko botwu tye i kin got mapwot ma tye i luŋ piny, gin jami-nu ducu mewu; pien doŋ wutyeko tyero gityer amata woko botgi, wukelo bene gityerwu me mo ko kwon, wutyero. Cwinya bibedo yom pi kodi tim macalo meno?" 
Isaiah57:7 Doŋ wuketo kabutowu i wi got ma wiye bor, wun doŋ wutyeko cito kunnu ka tyero gitumwu bot jok." 
Isaiah57:8 Wuketo bene cal jok i ne kika ki i ne yat me doggola; pi weka woko, omiyo wupeto kabutowu. Wudonyo iye ka wuyaro obedo malac; wutyeko cikke kwedgi woko doŋ piwu kenwu, dok bene wumaro kabutowu, wuneno tim munero me lewic." 
Isaiah57:9 Wucito bot jok Molek ki moo, wumedo moowu ma ŋwece kur onya odoko mabup; wuoro lukwenawu gucito ka mabor, wucwalogi bene gucito wa piny i lyel." 
Isaiah57:10 Wot mabor oolo komwu woko, ento pe wuwaco ni, “Konnye pe”; wunoŋo kwo manyen ma medo tekowu, omiyo pe wuwillee giwu i waŋayo," 
Isaiah57:11 Aŋa ma onoŋo wulworo twatwal, ma omiyo komwu myel, ma oweko wuwaco lok goba, wiwu doŋ owil woko pewupo i koma, ma pe doŋ wutwero tamo pira? Pe atemo diyo cwinya pi kare malac, ma oweko pe wubedo ki lworo mo i koma?" 
Isaiah57:12 En kitwu ma wutamo ni tye atir-ri, ki gin ducu ma wutimo abituco woko ka maleŋ, ento magi ducu pe bikonyi." 
Isaiah57:13 Ka ce wukok matek pi kony, gin cal jogiwu-ni myero gularwu do! Yamo bitiŋogi terogi woko, aluu dog bicwalogi woko wa cen. Ento ŋat ma riŋo laro bota bileyo lobo, dok bene bibedo i kom got mera maleŋ." 
Isaiah57:14 Gibiwaco ni, “Wutor yo, wutor yo, wuyub yo, wuput ajut-gu woko liweŋ ki i yo pajona.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Lubaŋa ma en ŋat Mamalo Twal, ma bedo nakanaka i kabedo ma otiŋŋe malo, ma bedo matwal, ma nyiŋe len-ni, owaco ni, “An abedo i kabedo maleŋ ma otiŋŋe malo, dok bene abedo kacel ki ŋat mamwol, ma cwinye cwer, dok ma ŋut, pi miyo kwo manyen bot jo ma cwinygi cwer dok ma giŋut," 
Isaiah57:16 Pien pe abibedo ka pyem nakanaka, dok bene kiniga pe bimaka kare ducu, pien cwiny dano oa ki bota, an aye ma amiyogi yweyo me kwo, amiyo bedo tye." 
Isaiah57:17 Bal pa jona ki paro lim aye oweko akeco; omiyo agoyogi, akanne woko, kun kiniga maka, ento gumedde ameda ki jemo kun gitiyo gin ma cwinygi mito." 
Isaiah57:18 Doŋ atyeko neno kitgi, ento pud abicaŋogi; abitelogi, abiculogi bene ki gin ma kweyo cwinygi, kun amiyo jo ma kumo pigi giloko lok me pwoc." 
Isaiah57:19 Abimiyo kuc bot jo ma tye ka mabor ki jo ma tye ka ma cok, dok bene abicaŋo jona." 
Isaiah57:20 Ento jo maraco gubedo calo nam ma twagge, ma pe koŋ twero pye mot, kun piine kelo yugi ki coto keken." 
Isaiah57:21 Kuc mo pe pi jo ma gin lutim maraco.” Man lok ma Lubaŋawa owaco. 
Isaiah58:1 “Daŋŋe matek, pe iliŋ, yab dwani owinnye maloŋo calo koko tum, tit bot jona roc ma gin gutimo, tuc bot jo me ot pa Yakobo balgi." 
Isaiah58:2 Nen kono giyenya nino ducu ba, cwinygi bene yom me ŋeyo gin ma an amito ni guti, ginyutte macalo jo me rok ma kitgi atir, ma pe giweko lubo-cik pa Lubaŋagi: gipenya bene pi ŋolo kop aitr, cwinygi yom pi bedo cok ki Lubaŋa." 
Isaiah58:3 Dano gipenyo ni, ‘Piŋo wabedo ka ri kec, kun in pe ineno? Piŋo kono wabedo ka mwolle kenwa i nyimi, kun in pe iparo lok mo iye wacel?” Lubaŋa ogamo ni, “Koŋ wunen, i nino me ri kecwu, wuketo mere tamwu i timo gin ma yomo cwinywu keken, kun bene wuuno jo ma tiyo tic botwu." 
Isaiah58:4 Koŋ wunen, wun wuri kec ki daa dok ki lweny, wudoŋo dano bene ki ciŋwu ma wuŋino woko ki kolo pi lweny. Kit ri kecwu ma wutye ka ri i kare-ni, pe bimiyo dwanwu winnye malo i polo." 
Isaiah58:5 Wutamo ni kit ri kecwu-ni en aye gin ma an ayero, nino mo ma dano mwolle kekene? Ri kec ma dano kulo iye wiye piny calo lagada ma okulle, peto boŋo cola, pworo buru iye, ka doŋ cako buto iye, wulwoŋo man ni ri kec, ki nino ma Rwot Lubaŋawu pwoyo?" 
Isaiah58:6 “Kit ri kec ma an amito ene: gonyo tol me tim maraco woko, ki gonyo okol woko ki i tyen opii, weko jo ma giunogi guwot i kuc, ki turo okol woko ki i tyen dano." 
Isaiah58:7 Poko cam bot jo ma kec nekogi, kelo lucan ma pacogi pe i gaŋi; ka ineno dano ma tye munero myero iruk boŋo i kome, pe myero ikanne woko ki i nyim joni." 
Isaiah58:8 Ceŋ bituc boti calorupiny, waŋ bur ma tye i komi bicaŋ woko oyotoyot, Kit ma atir ma it ye kwede bitelo nyimi, deyo pa Rwot aye ma bigeno ŋeyi." 
Isaiah58:9 Dok bene ibilwoŋo, ci Rwot gamo dogi, ibikok bote, en bigamo ni; ‘An ene.’ “Ka ce, ibikwanyo okol woko ki i kinwu, cimo dano ki lwet ciŋ ki loko lok maraco," 
Isaiah58:10 ka ce ibimiyo kwori pi konyo jo ma kec nekogi, dok bene icobo miti pa jo ma giunogi, man bimiyo ceŋ tuc piri ki i piny macol, piny macol licuc boti bidoko macalo dyeceŋ," 
Isaiah58:11 Rwot biteli i kare ducu, en bicobo mitini ki jami mabeco, bimiyo cogoni bedo matek; ibibedo calo poto ma gionyo pi i oromo iye maber twatwal, ibibedo macalo pii ma gunnye agunya kare ducu, ma piine pe two kadi ki acel." 
Isaiah58:12 Gibigero gaŋ i wi oburri macon doki, ibigero i kom acakki te guti ma yam kwarowu gugero, gibilwoŋi ni in layub celma otur, ŋat ma yabo yo ma yam oballe ducu doko maber." 
Isaiah58:13 “Ka ce iworo ceŋ cabit macalo kabedo maleŋ, iweko timo gin ma yomo cwinyi i nino maleŋ, ka ce iworo ceŋ cabit macalo nino me yomcwiny, dok macalo nino ma Rwot olonyo ma obedo maleŋ me deyo; ka ce imiyo deyo bot Rwot, kun pe ilubo yoni keni, kadi ki yenyo gin ma yomo cwinyi, nyo loko lok atata;" 
Isaiah58:14 ci cwinyi bibedo yom i kom Rwot, abimiyo iriŋo i wi cere mutiŋŋe maloi lobo; ibibedo ki yomcwiny i lobo ma yam kwaru Yakobo oleyo, pien Rwot kikome aye ma doŋ owaco lok man.”" 
Isaiah59:1 Nen, bad Rwot pe odoko cek, ma pe doŋ twero laro dano, ite bene pe odiŋ ma pe romme winyo lok;" 
Isaiah59:2 ento timwu marac aye opokowu woko ki Lubaŋawu, balwu omiyo waŋe doŋ oumme woko i komwu, omiyo doŋ pe winyo kokowu," 
Isaiah59:3 Pien remo doŋ onywano ciŋwu woko, lwet ciŋwu opoŋ ki tim me bal keken; dok bene wuloko lokgoba ki dogwu, ki lebwu bene muno lok me timo tim maraco." 
Isaiah59:4 Pe tye dano mo ma doto lawote i lok ma tye ada, pe tye ŋat mo ma cito i lukiko ci pido pido kakare; dano ducu gijeŋŋe i lok ma tere pe kun giloko lok goba keken, giparo pi timo gin marac ma kela can." 
Isaiah59:5 Dano ducu ginywalo tim marac calo toŋ lacocodo, giciko obwogi calo oboropyen; ŋat ma camo toŋgi to woko, ento ka onyono anyona ororo a iye," 
Isaiah59:6 Ento obwogi macalo meno pe bikonyogi wacel, pe bikonyogi me aruka kadi ki me umme, Ticgi ma gitryo obedo tic me bal, ki ciŋgi bene timo tim bwami." 
Isaiah59:7 Tyengi yot giriŋo kwede madwir ka timo gin marac, giwille awila me cito oyotoyot ka neko jo ma pe ki bal. Gitamo megi tam me cito ka timo gin marac, yak ki balle me lobo tye yo gudogi ducu." 
Isaiah59:8 Pe giŋeyo yo me kuc, ŋolo kop atir bene pe i gudogi, gin gugomo yogi woko, pe tye ŋat mo ma wok ki iye ma ŋeyo kuc." 
Isaiah59:9 Meno omiyo ŋolo kop atir bor kwedwa, kit ma atir bene peya oo botwa; wayenyo leŋpiny, ci waŋono mutu, ma ka woto i ceŋ wawoto i colpiny." 
Isaiah59:10 Wabedo ka boŋo kor ot ki ciŋwa calo lutowaŋ, wabono calo jo ma waŋgi oto; wayokke ki wot ma piny pud leŋ calo watye ka wot i dyewor, wanen calo jo muto ki i kin jo ma komgi tek." 
Isaiah59:11 Nen doŋ watye ka ŋur aŋura calo lee, wabedo ka kok akoka calo amam, wakuro ŋolo kop atir ento pe wanoŋo; wakuro larre, ento tye ka mabor kwedwa." 
Isaiah59:12 Pien balwa doŋ odurre mapol i nyimi, roc ma watimo aye doŋ obedo caden i komwa; pud wapo i kom bal wa, waŋeyo gin marac ma watimo." 
Isaiah59:13 Wakalo wi cik, wakwero Rwot woko, waweko bene lubo kor Lubaŋawa, kun waloko lok me uno dano kijemo, wagamo lok goba bedo i cwinywa, ci waloko bene ka maleŋ," 
Isaiah59:14 Ento ŋolo kop atir gidwoko cen, kit ma atir bene pe doŋ nyiko cok i ŋetwa, ki ada bene opoto woko i kabedo Ducu i dye gaŋ, gin mo ma tye kakare pe doŋ noŋo yo me donyo." 
Isaiah59:15 Ada doŋ pe matwal, ŋat ma kwero timo tim marac giyako jamine woko." 
Isaiah59:16 Rwot oneno ci cwinye ocwer matek, pien ŋolo kop atir doŋ pe. En oneno ni dano mo doŋ pe; ouro mada pien ŋat mo doŋ pe ma twero laro pigi, En kikome aye doŋ bilarogi ki tekke kene, kit ma atir bimiyo en cuŋ matek." 
Isaiah59:17 Oruko kit ma atir macalo gin me geŋo kore, ki otaŋ nyonyo me lar bene oruko i wiye; cwiny me culo kwor bibedo macalo boŋo arukane, dok akemo biboyo kome woko calo jor." 
Isaiah59:18 En biculogi kun poro kit macalo timgi tye kwede, akemo bot lumonene, ki cul bot lukworre; dok biculo cul marac bot lobo ma tye i dog namo" 
Isaiah59:19 Meno bimiyo gilworo nyiŋ Rwot cakke ki yo tuŋ potoceŋ, ki deyone cakke ki i tuŋ wokceŋ; pien biruyo bino oyotoyot calo pii ma mol mager, ma yamo pa Rwot aye ma twago. Rwot owaco bot jone ni," 
Isaiah59:20 “An abibino i Cion ka kokowu ki i opii, wun jo pa Yakobo ma wuweko timo gin marac." 
Isaiah59:21 “Doŋ ki tuŋ bota, man en aye obedo gicikke ma acikke kwede kwedwu, Cwiny Maleŋ ma mera ma doŋ atyeko miyo botwu, ki lokka ma doŋ atyeko keto i dogwu, pe doŋ bia ki i dogwu, kadi ki i dog litinowu, nyo i dog litino pa litinowu, cakke tin cito kwede anyim kun bedo bene nakanaka.”" 
Isaiah60:1 A malo ba, in Jerucalem, pien ceŋŋi doŋ otuc woko, deyo pa Rwot doŋ otuc ocaro komi woko." 
Isaiah60:2 Nen, colpiny biumo lobo woko, mutu macol licuc biumo rok mukene woko, ento Rwot bituc pi caŋo komi, gibineno deyone i komi." 
Isaiah60:3 Lurok gibibino i Ieŋ pinnyi, luker bibino i dero ceŋ ma otuc i komi." 
Isaiah60:4 Tiŋ waŋi malo wek koŋ inen piny, jo ducu gibicokke kacel, gibibino boti; awobeni gibia ki ka mabor, anyirani gibitiŋogi atiŋa i kor." 
Isaiah60:5 Ibineno ci komi biryeny aryenya, cwinyi bimyel ci icako bedo ki yomcwiny; pien lim mabup me nam doŋ gibiweko i ciŋi, ki lonyo pa rok mapol gibikelo boti." 
Isaiah60:6 Lwak kinaga mapol biumi woko, litino kinaga me Midian ki me Epa; kadi wa jo me Ceba ducu gibibino boti. Gibibino gikelo jabu ki odok luban, gibitito ki pak pi gin mabeco ma Rwot otimo." 
Isaiah60:7 Romi ducu me Kedar gibicokogi boti, nyogi romi me Nebayot bikonyi; gibikelo macalo gitum i wi keno tyer me atyera bota, ci agamogi, dok abimedo deyo i kom oda me deyo." 
Isaiah60:8 Magi kono jo mene ma gituk calo pol-li, nyo macalo amam ma gidok i dog odigi?" 
Isaiah60:9 Pien rok ma tye i dog nam bikura, mel ma oa ki i Tarcic aye bitelo yo, me kelo Litinoni ki ka mabor kacel ki lonyo madwoŋ twatwal, pi nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋani ma en ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael, pien en doŋ oketo deyo i komi." 
Isaiah60:10 Lurok bigero celli, lukergi bikonyi ki tic; pien i kare ma yam akemo omaka, agoyi, ento pi mitina kena doŋ atyeko timo kica boti," 
Isaiah60:11 Dogcelli bibedo twolo kare ducu, pe gibiloro i dyeceŋ kadi i dyewor; wek dano gukel lonyo pa rok ducu boti, kun giwoto ma gidorre dorre me deyo kacel ki lukergi," 
Isaiah60:12 Pien rok ki ker ma pe biye locci bito; kodi rok macalo meno pud dok gibibalo lobogi woko aye. 
Isaiah60:13 Deyo me Lebanon bibino boti, ciprec ki yadi mabeco ducu, wek omi kabedona maleŋ onen ma mwonya; dok bene abimiyo kabedo me teno tyena poŋ ki deyo." 
Isaiah60:14 Litino pa jo ma yam giuni gibibino boti laguno; ki jo ma yam gubedo ka cayi gibiryebbe piny i te tyeni; gibilwoŋi ni in ibedo gaŋ pa Rwot, Cion ma obedo gaŋ pa ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael," 
Isaiah60:15 Ento kono yam koŋ giweki ata, gikweri woko, kun ŋat mo pe wok boti, abimiyo ibedo dit nakanaka, jo me kare ducu bibedo ki yomcwiny piri." 
Isaiah60:16 Ibibedo ka doto cak pa jo me rok ducu, ibidoto tuno pa luker; ibiŋeyo ni an a Rwot, anaye lalarri, dok an aye ma akoko in, an a Won Twero ma abedo Lubaŋa pa Yakobo." 
Isaiah60:17 Ma ka mola, an abikelo jabu, ma ka nyonyo, abikelo ryal, ma ka bao, abikelo mola, ma ka gweŋ abikelo nyonyo. Abimiyokucaye bedo maka ludoŋo ma loyo tic, kit ma atir aye bibedo nyamparani." 
Isaiah60:18 Tim me bwami pe dok biwinnye i loboni, kadi yak nyo kadi balle pa lobo pe binen i waŋ apokki loboni. Ibicako nyiŋ celli ni, Larre, ki dogcelli ibilwoŋo ni, Pak." 
Isaiah60:19 Ceŋ pe dok bimenyi dyeceŋ, kadi Leŋo me dwe bene pe bimenyi dyewor; Rwot aye ma bimenyi nakanaka, Lubaŋani aye ma bimiyo ibedo ki deyo." 
Isaiah60:20 Ceŋŋi pe dok bipoto, dwe bene pe birwenyo; pien Rwot aye ma bimenyi nakanaka, kare me kumoni bene bigik." 
Isaiah60:21 Joni ducu doŋ gibibedo jo ma kitgi atir; gibileyo lobo doŋ doko megi matwal, gibinen macalo jaŋ yat ma an aye apito, tic ma an kikoma aye atiyo wek dano gumiya deyo." 
Isaiah60:22 Doggola pa joni nok ento olo doŋ bidoko kaka, ŋat matidi mada bi doko twon rok mo matek. An a Rwot; abimiyo man timme oyot ka karene oromo." 
Isaiah61:1 Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ ocwalo Cwiny mere i koma, pien doŋ owira woko ki moo, wek ater lok me kwena maber bot jo ma giunogi. Oora bene me caŋo jo ma cwercwiny onurogi, ki me tito bot jo ma tye i opii ni gibigonyogi woko, ki jo ma gitweyogi i mabuc ni gibiyabo botgi doggola gibikatti woko;" 
Isaiah61:2 dok ni atit pi mwaka ma Rwot bitimo iye ber bot dano, ki kare me culo kwor pa Lubaŋawa; pi kweyo cwiny jo ma kumo." 
Isaiah61:3 Oora me miyo lalukana me deyo bot jo ma kumo i Cion ma ka buru, moo wir me yomcwiny ma ka kumo, ruk me pako Lubaŋa ma ka bedo ki cwiny magoro. Gibilwoŋogi ni yadi me kit ma atir, yadi ma Rwot opito, wek omiye deyo," 
Isaiah61:4 Gibigero gedo odoco i wi obur ma yam oballe con, ka ma yam giyako-gu ducu gibigero odoco; gibiyubo gaŋi ducu ma onoŋo gibalogi woko, ma onoŋo oballe con i kare pa yalwak mapol mukato anec," 
Isaiah61:5 Lurok gibicuŋ kun gikwayo romiwu, gin bene aye ma gibipuro potowu ki poto olokwu;" 
Isaiah61:6 ento wun gibilwonowu ni ajwagi pa Rwot, dano gibilwonowu ni wun lutic pa Lubaŋawa; wubicamo lonyo pa rok mapol, wu bibedo bene ki deyo pi limgi." 
Isaiah61:7 Ma ka lewic ma yam omakowu gibimiyowu lim mabup tyen kiryo, ma ka jerowu ki yet, wubibedo ki yomcwiny pi gin mabup ma doŋ tye i ciŋwu, Pi meno wubinono lim ma gipokkiwu i lobowu kiryo i wi wadigi; wubibedo doŋ ki yomcwiny nakanaka," 
Isaiah61:8 Rwot owaco ni, “An amaro ŋolo kop atir, adag yak ki tim marac; abiculo waŋ can ma opoto i komgi cakare, abicikke kwedgi i gicikke ma ri nakanaka." 
Isaiah61:9 Likwayogi binene matek i kin lurok, ki nyiŋ litino ma gin gunywalo biwinnye adada i kin rok ducu; jo ducu ma gibinenogi gibinian i komgi, ni gin gubedo rok ma Rwot omiyo botgi gum.”" 
Isaiah61:10 Cwinya bibedo yom matek i Rwot, abium pi Lubaŋana; pien doŋ otyeko ruka woko ki boŋo me larre, dok bene ouma woko ki jor me kit ma atir, macalo lanyom ma orukke maber ki tok me deyo, dok macalo dako manyen ma orukke ki ruk me wel." 
Isaiah61:11 Pien kit macalo jami mapatpat twi i lobo, ki poto bene weko gin ma gicoyo iye twi, kit meno Rwot Lubaŋa bene bimiyo kit ma atir, ki pak, twi i nyim rok ducu." 
Isaiah62:1 Pe abiliŋ pi Cion, pe bene abiywe pi Jerucalem, nio waŋ ma locce doŋ ocaro piny calo dero ceŋ dok larrene bene omenyo piny calo mac." 
Isaiah62:2 Rok ducu bineno locci, in Jerucalem, ki luker ducu gibineno deyoni; doŋ gibilwoni ki nyiŋ manyen ma Rwot kikome aye bicako." 
Isaiah62:3 Ibibedo calo tok me deyo ma tye i ciŋ Rwot, dok ibibedo macalo tok me ker ma nyuto loc pa Lubaŋani." 
Isaiah62:4 Pe doŋ gibimedde ki lwoŋi ni gaŋ ma doŋ gibwoto woko, loboni bene pe gibilwoŋo ni lobo ma odoŋ obur, ento gibilwoŋi ni gaŋ ma calo dako ma cwinya yom i kome, kun gilwoŋo loboni bene ni dako ma ginyomo; pien Rwot cwinye yom i komi, dok loboni bibedo macalo dako ma ginyomo." 
Isaiah62:5 Pien kit macalo awobi nyomo nyakoawobeni bene binyomi kit meno, dok kit macalo lanyom cwinye bedo yom pi nyako ger, Lubaŋani bene cwinye bibedo yom piri kit meno," 
Isaiah62:6 In Jerucalem, aketo lukur-piny i wi celli malo; pe gibilin dyeceŋ ki dyewor benebene, Wun jo ma poyo wi Rwot, pe wuywe," 
Isaiah62:7 dok bene pe wumiye kare me yweyo nio wan, ma en doŋ omiyo Jerucalem ocuŋ matek ma doŋ omiyo odoko gin ma gipako i wi lobo ducu." 
Isaiah62:8 Rwot doŋ okwoŋo kwoŋ matek twatwal, kun kwoŋo ki bade me twer ni, “Pe dok abimiyo lukworri gicamo kani, lurok bene pe dok gibimato koŋo vinoni ma in iyelle me tiyo tic pire;" 
Isaiah62:9 ento jo ma gukayo kal gibicamo ci gipako iye Rwot, ki jo ma gupwono olok gibimato koŋo vinone i dyekal me kabedona maleŋ,”" 
Isaiah62:10 Wuwok ki kunnu, wuwok ki i dogcel, wuyub yo pi lwak; wutor yo, wutor yo gudo-gu woko, wucok gweŋ woko bene ki fye, ka doŋ wuil bendera malo pi rok ducu," 
Isaiah62:11 Nen, Rwot doŋ otyeko tito lok man oo wa i agikki lobo, ni, wuwac bot jo Cion ni, “Nen larrewu doŋ tye ka bino; nen, bakacicce tye bote cul me ticce bene tye i nyime.”" 
Isaiah62:12 Gibilwoŋogi ni gin rok maleŋ, gin jo ma Rwot okokogi ki i can; dok bene gibilwoŋini, Gaŋ ma Rwot omaro, ma pe oweko woko ata." 
Isaiah63:1 Man aŋa ma bino ki i Edommi, ki i Bojra ma oruko boŋo makwarri, ma oruko ruk me deyo-ni, kun tye ka nyatte ki twon tekone madit-ti? “Meno an ennu atye ka tito lok me loyo kop, an atek, atwero laro dano.”" 
Isaiah63:2 Piŋo kono boŋoni ma iruko-ni kwar, kun nen calo boŋo pa ŋat ma nyono olok me biyo pige?" 
Isaiah63:3 “Anyono olok i bur me biyo pige an kena, kun ŋat mo mukene ma oa ki i rok rriapat onoŋo pe bota; anyonogi woko lirwatrwat ki akemo adada; pige makwar macalo remo obedo ka kir i koma matek, omiyo boŋona ducu onywane woko marac." 
Isaiah63:4 Pien nino me culo kwor onoŋo iye i cwinya, mwaka me koko jona bene doŋ oromo." 
Isaiah63:5 “Anene piny, ci anoŋo ni pe tye ŋat mo ma twero kenya; auro twatwal, ento onoŋo pe tye ŋat mo ma romo miya teko; meno omiyo ciŋa an kikoma aye loyo loc, akeca aye omiyo anoŋo teko." 
Isaiah63:6 Cen anyono rok mapol woko ducu piny ki kinigana, akemona omiyo gulimo atwom twatwal, dok aonyo remogi omol piny i ŋom.” Rwot onyuto berre bot jo Icrael" 
Isaiah63:7 Abitito pi mar pa Rwot ma pe lokke, kun anyuto pak pa Rwot bene, pi gin ducu mabe co ma en Rwot otimo piwa, ki twon ber madit ma en onyuto bot jo Icrael ma en otimo botgi pi kicane, kun lubo bene mar mere madwoŋ ma pe lokke." 
Isaiah63:8 Pien en owacci, “Adada, gin jona, litino ma pe gibibwola”; cutcut en odoko Lalargi." 
Isaiah63:9 1 cangi ducu en bene oneno iye can, en kikome aye olarogi, pe lakwenane mo nyo kadi ki lamalaika. En okokogi pi mar mere ki pi krcane; en otiŋogi, ci obedo ka byelogi nine ki nino i kare macon." 
Isaiah63:10 Ento gin gujemo woko i kome, omiyo kiniga omako Rwot, Cwiny mere maleŋ okumo twatwal. Pi meno en olokke odoko lakworgi, omiyo en kikome olwenyo kwedgi." 
Isaiah63:11 Dano dok gupo pi kare macon, i kare pa Moses, ma latic pa Rwot, ci gupenyo ni, “ŋat ma yam okwanyo lukwat romine ki i nam-mi tye kwene’! En ŋat ma oketo Cwiny mere maleŋ i kingi-ni kono tye kwene?" 
Isaiah63:12 ŋat ma yam omiyo ciŋe me deyo owoto i ŋet Moses tuŋ lacuc, ma omiyo pii opokke dul aryo i nyimgi wek enoŋ nyiŋ ma ri nakanaka," 
Isaiah63:13 ma otelogi kun giwok ki i dye nam matut-ti?” Gubedo calo aguragura ma woto i tim, pe gubedo ka gatte kadi ki acel." 
Isaiah63:14 Cwiny pa Rwot omiyo botgi yweyo, calo dyaŋi ma guo i luŋ. Yam itelo joni kumeno, wek inoŋ kwede nyiŋ me deyo. Lega pi kica ki kony" 
Isaiah63:15 Kul waŋi ki i polo inen piny i lobo, inen piny ki i kabedoni maleŋ me deyo. Arimani ki tekki kono doŋ tye kwene? Mar meri ki kicani kono tye kwene? Tim ber, pe ikwerwa woko." 
Isaiah63:16 Pien in aye i Wonwa, kadi bed Abraim pe neyowa, dok Icrael bene pe paro piwa; in Rwot giri ibedo Wonwa, dok ibedo lakokwa cakke yam con." 
Isaiah63:17 Piŋo imiyo waŋak woko ki i yoni, ai Rwot? Piŋo imiyo wadoko jo ma cwinywa nwaŋ kun pe walwori? Dwog cen botwa pi jo ma gitiyo piri, pi kaka ducu ma gubedo meri kikomi." 
Isaiah63:18 Joni maleŋ gubedo i kabedoni maleŋ pi kare manok mo twatwal, lukworwa doŋ gunyono kabedo man ki tyengi gubalo woko." 
Isaiah63:19 Doŋ wadoko calo jo ma yam in pe iloyogi, wadoko calo jo ma pe gilwoŋogi ki nyiŋi." 
Isaiah64:1 Kono ibaro polo woko likwak ilor piny, kono ber! Kono imiyo godi guyeŋŋe i nyimi," 
Isaiah64:2 kit macalo mac moko kwede i lak yen, dok bene miyo pii walo, wek omi lukworri guŋe nyiŋi, dok rok ducu komgi myero omyel i nyimi!" 
Isaiah64:3 Yam itiyo gin mogo ma kelo lworo madwoŋ ma wan kikomwa pe waromo tamo pire, yam ilor piny, ci godi guyeŋŋe i nyimi." 
Isaiah64:4 Cakke yam con ŋat mo gire pe owinyo, ŋat mo pe ma owinyo ki ite, ŋat mo bene pe oneno Lubaŋa mapat kono in keken, Lubaŋa ma tiyo tic pi jo ducu ma tye ka kure." 
Isaiah64:5 In irwatte ki ŋat ma tiyo tic ma atir ki yomcwiny, irwatte ki jo ma po piri i yoni ducu. Nen, kiniga ceŋ omaki, pien onoŋo wabalo; wabedo ka timo bal pi kare malac twatwal. Tika wan wabilarre ada?" 
Isaiah64:6 Wan ducu doŋ wadoko calo ŋat ma kome ki keni, gin ma atir ducu ma watimo doŋ nen calo boŋo ma onyobbe woko ki gin me kwer. Wan ducu waner woko calo pot yat, balwa bene terowa woko calo yamo ma kodo." 
Isaiah64:7 Pe tye dano mo ma lwoŋo nyiŋi, ma cukke ka maki Iikiŋ; pien in ikano want woko ki botwa, doŋ ibwotowa i balwa." 
Isaiah64:8 Ento kadi bed kumeno, ai Rwot, in pud i Wonwa; wan lobo agulu, in aye lacwewa: wan ducu wabedo gin ma in aye itiyowa ki ciŋi." 
Isaiah64:9 Ai Rwot, pe myero kiniga dok omaki matek, pe bene ibed ka po i kom balwa nakanaka, Koŋ inen, dok ipar, wan ducu wabedo joni." 
Isaiah64:10 Gaŋini maleŋ ducu doŋ gudoko tim, Cion doŋ odoko tim, Jerucalem doŋ odoko obur." 
Isaiah64:11 Otwa maleŋ, maber twatwal-li, ka ma yam kwarowa gipaki iye-ni, doŋ gityeko wanoŋe woko ki mac; kabedo ducu ma yam yomo cwinywa doŋ odoko obur." 
Isaiah64:12 Ibidiyo cwinyi i kom jami magi, ai Rwot? Ibiliŋ, kun iunowa matek?" 
Isaiah65:1 Yam ayubbe pi gamo lok pa jo ma pe gikok bota, ento gin gigi pe gumito penya. Ayubbe bene ni myero gunona, ento pe gigi gutemo yenya. Abedo ka waco botgi ni, “An atye en, an atye en.” Aloko bot rok ma onoŋo doŋ pe gilwoŋo nyiŋa." 
Isaiah65:2 Abedo ka ryeyo ciŋa dyeceŋ jwi bot jo ma gijemo woko ajema, jo ma woto i yo ma pe ber wacel, kun gilubo gigi ryekogi kengi," 
Isaiah65:3 Gibedo ka ŋeto cwinya kare ki kare, kun gibedo ka tyero gitum bot jogi i potti, giwaŋo odok eceta-gu i kom matafali;" 
Isaiah65:4 gibedo ka bedo i lyel-gu, i dyewor gibedo i kabedo mogo ma i muŋ; gibedo ka camo riŋo opego-gu, jami tedogi ducu onyobbe woko ki pig riŋo lee ma gikwero." 
Isaiah65:5 Gin jo ma giwaco ni, “Bed kaikeni kunnu, pe ibin cok kweda, pien an doŋ gipoka woko pat kwedi pien an aleŋ,” Jo magi calo yito ma duny i uma, gicalo mac ma pe to kadi ki acel." 
Isaiah65:6 Nen, doŋ gityeko coyo lok i nyima ni, “An pe abilin aliŋa, ento abiculo. Adada, abiculogi gire," 
Isaiah65:7 timgi maraco kacel ki tim maraco pa kwarogi, man Rwot ma owaco pien gubedo ka waŋo odok eceta i wi godi, dok gubedo ka yeta bene i wi ceregu ducu; abiporo culgi ma oromogi abiculogi pi balgi macon.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Kit macalo koŋo vino noŋŋe ki i nyig olok, doŋ dano giwaco ni, ‘Pe ibal woko, pien gum tye iye’, abitimo kit meno pi luticca, pe abityekogi woko ducu." 
Isaiah65:9 Abimiyo likwayo a ki i kom Yakobo, ki jo ma bileyo wi godi na a ki i Juda; jona ma ayero gibileyo bedo megi, doŋ luticca gibibedo kunnu." 
Isaiah65:10 Caron bidoko ka ma gikwayo iye romi, ki luk me Akor bidoko kabuto pa dyaŋi, bibedo pa jona ma gubedo ka yenya." 
Isaiah65:11 Ento wun jo ma doŋ wubwoto Rwot, ma wiwu doŋ owil woko i kom got mera maleŋ, ma wuyubo meja pa jok wek omiwu gum, ma wupiko kono ma ginyo bo poŋ kikopo pi jok wek nyimwu obed leŋ," 
Isaiah65:12 abimiyo ginekowu woko ki pala lucwan, wun ducu wubiguŋo aguŋa ka giŋolo ŋutwu, pien i kare ma yam alwonowu wun wukwero gamo doga woko, i kare ma abedo ka lok bene pe wuciko itwu ka winyo lokka, ento wubedo ka timo gin ma nen marac i nyima, wuyero bene gin ma pe yomo cwinya.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Meno omiyo Rwot Lubaŋa owaco ni, “Nen, luticca bicamo cam, ento wun kec binekowu; luticca bimato pii, ento wun orwo pii binekowu matek; luticca gibibedo ki yomcwiny, ento wun gibimiyo lewic makowu;" 
Isaiah65:14 yomcwiny bimiyo luticca giwera ento cwercwiny bimiyo wukok, dok bene bimiyo wudaŋŋe matek ki koko." 
Isaiah65:15 Nyinwu bidoŋ bot jona ma doŋ ayero giceno ki dano, Rwot Lubaŋa kikome aye ma binekowu; ento luticce doŋ en bilwoŋogi ki nyiŋ mapat." 
Isaiah65:16 Pi meno, ka ce ŋat mo lamo gum i kome kekene i lobo, en bilamo gum i kome kene ki nyiŋ Lubaŋa me ada, dok ŋat ma bikwoŋo kwoŋ i lobo man, bikwoŋo ki nyiŋ Lubaŋa me ada, pien wiwu doŋ biwil woko i kom can ma yam wuneno con, can meno doŋ birwenyo woko ki i wiwu.” Polo manyen ki lobo manyen" 
Isaiah65:17 Rwot dok owaco kuman ni, “Pien nen, aketo polo manyen ki lobo manyen; pe doŋ gibipo pi jami macon, pe bene dano mo bitamo pigi." 
Isaiah65:18 Ento myero cwinywu obed yom kun wubedo ki yomcwiny nakanaka i kom jami magi ma aketogi-ni; pien nen, Jerucalem ma aketo bibedo me yomcwiny, jone bene bibedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ." 
Isaiah65:19 Abibedo ki yomcwiny i Jerucalem, cwinya bibedo yom i kom jona; dwan mo me koko pe dok biwinnye iye, kadi koko mo me can bene pe biwinnye iye," 
Isaiah65:20 Latin mo ma ginywalo ma ri pi kare manoknok keken bene pe bibedo tye iye, kadi ladit mo muti ma pe bicobo karene, latin bito ma noŋo mwaka me ditte doŋ romo miya acel, labalo ma mwakane biromo miya acel noŋo giceno woko acena." 
Isaiah65:21 Dano gibigero odi ci gibedo i igi, gibipuro poto olokgi, ci gibicamo nyige bene." 
Isaiah65:22 Pe gibigero odigi ci giweko ŋat mukene aye bedo iye, pe gibipuro poto olokgi ci giweko ŋat mukene aye ma dok camo nyige, Jona gibiri ma rom aroma ki yat, jona ma an aye ayerogi gibibilo tic me ciŋgi pi kare malac." 
Isaiah65:23 Ŋat mo i kingi pe biyelle ki tic noŋo, dok bene pe gibinywalo latin ci dok neno can; pien gin doŋ gibibedo litinic pa jo ma Rwot doŋ otyeko miyogr gum, kun gumgi-ni mako bene wa litinogi." 
Isaiah65:24 Ma peya gulwoŋo lwoŋo, an abigamo doggi, ma pud gitye ka lok aloka, abiwinyo lokgi woko." 
Isaiah65:25 Orudi ki latin romo gibicam kacel, labwor bicamo lum calo twon; twol bene bimoko apwa. Pe gibiketo ret i kom dano nyo kadi ki nek, i wi got mera maleŋ ducu.” Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Isaiah66:1 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Polo aye komkerra, lobo obedo kom me teno tyena. Kit ot aŋo ma onoŋo wutwero gero pira? Ka yweyona kono onoŋo bedo kwene?" 
Isaiah66:2 Jami magi ducu atiyogi ki ciŋa, pi meno jami magi ducu gubedo mega. Man Rwot aye ma owaco. Doŋ man aye dano ma abiciko waŋa i kome, dano mamwol, ma ŋut bene i cwinye, dok ma kome myeli lok ma an awaco." 
Isaiah66:3 “Dano ma neko twon rom ki ŋat ma neko dano; ŋat ma tyero latin romo macalo gitum, rom ki ŋat ma turo ŋut gwok; ŋat ma kelo gityer me moko kwon tyero bota, rom ki ŋat ma tyero remo opego; ŋat ma waŋo odok luban macalo gityer me po rom ki ŋat ma lego gum i kom cal jok. Jo magi guyero yogi pigi kengi, cwinygi yom mere ayoma i timgi me-kipyeda." 
Isaiah66:4 An bene abiyero can ma myero omakgi, abiyero can ma miyo lworo makogi marac twatwal; pien i kare ma yam alwoŋogi, ŋat ma ogamo doga pe, i kare ma aloko kwedgi, ŋat mo pe ma owinyo lokka; ento gutimo gin ma neo marac i nyima, guyero gigi gin ma pe yomo cwinya.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Wuwiny lok pa Rwot, wun jo ma komwu myel i lokke, “Utmegiwu ma gidagwu, ma guryemowu wucito woko cen pi nyiŋa, doŋ giwaco ni, ‘Koŋ wumi doŋ deyo bot Rwot wek koŋ wanen yomcwinywu’; ento gin aye gigi ma gibiweko lewic makogi kekengi." 
Isaiah66:6 “Koŋ wuwiny woo madit ma tye i gaŋ; dwan mo ma a ki i ot pa Lubaŋa! Meno dwan Rwot, ma tye ka culo kwor i kom lukworre." 
Isaiah66:7 “Dako nywal cutcut ma peya mwoc ogoyo? En twero nywalo latin laco ma peya arem ocakke i kome? 
Isaiah66:8 Aŋa ma yam koŋ owinyo kit gin macalo meno? Aŋa kono ma yam oneno kit gin macalo meno? Gibinywalo lobo i nino acel kaken? Dok bene gitwero nywalo rok kulu i dakika mo manok keken? Pien i kare ma arem pud ocakke acaka i kom Cion, cutcut en onywalo litino awo bene woko." 
Isaiah66:9 itamo ni ka amiyo kare me nywalo jona oromo, ci pe aweko ginywalogi? An ma amiyo dano nywal-li aye dok abicego ot nyodo woko wek Cion pe onoŋ litino?” Man Rwot ma owaco," 
Isaiah66:10 “Cwinywu obed yom kacel ki Jerucalem, cwinywu bene obed yom pire, wun jo ducu ma wumare; wubed ki yomcwiny madwoŋ kacel kwede, wun jo ducu ma kumo pire;" 
Isaiah66:11 wek wudot cak ki i tunone okwe cwinywu, calo latin ma doto tuno pa minne, wek bene wumwony cakke ki yomcwiny, pien cak dwoŋ twatwal i kore.”" 
Isaiah66:12 Pien Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Nen, abinyayo kuc bedo dit bote calo kulu, ki lonyo pa lurok calo kulu ma opoŋ ma mol twatwal; wubidoto cak ki i tunone, en bitiŋowu woko i laknete, dok bene wubibedo ka tuko i eme." 
Isaiah66:13 Abikweyo cwinywu, calo latin ma minne kweyo cwinye; cwinywu bikwe i Jerucalem." 
Isaiah66:14 Wubineno, ci cwinywu cako bedo yom, komwu bibedo yot calo lum ma pud lot alota; meno bimiyo wuŋeyo ni, Rwot konyo jo ma tiyo pire ento akemone tye i kom lukworre." 
Isaiah66:15 “Pien nen, Rwot bibino ki mac, kun gadigadine ducu bedo madwir calo yamo lapiru; me coro akemone i komgi ki kiniga malyet adada, kun jukogi ki leb mac," 
Isaiah66:16 Pien Rwot biŋolo kop i kom dano kimac, dok bene en bineko jo mapol woko ki pala lucwan; jo ma en Rwot bineko bibedo pol mada." 
Isaiah66:17 “Jo ma gilonnye kekengi doŋ me bedo leŋ me cito i potti, kun gilubo dano mo ma tye i dyere, ma gicamo riŋo opego ki gin mogo me kwer ki oyoo adeŋ-gu, gin ducu gibitum woko kacel dok lawaŋacel,” man Rwot ma owaco." 
Isaiah66:18 “Pien aŋeyo ticgi ki tamgi, abibino me coko rok ducu ma loko leb maptpat kacel; gin gibibino ci gineno deyona," 
Isaiah66:19 abiketo lanyut i kingi. Abikwanyo jo mubwot ki i kingi kenyo, abicwalogi bot lurok, bot jo Tarcic, Put ki Lud, ma gin jo ma gitelo atum, bot jo Tubal ki Javan, ki i lobo ma tye i dog nam ka mabor, ma pud peya guwinyo kit ma nyiŋa oywek kwede, kadi neno deyona i kin lurok." 
Isaiah66:20 Gibikelo utmegigi ki i rok ducu macalo gityer me atyera bot Rwot, kun gikelogi ki aguragura, gadigadi, kitara, kana ki kinaga-gu wa i wi got mera maleŋ ma tye i Jerucalem, kit macalo jo Icrael kelo kwede gityergi me moko kwon i atabo maleŋ i ot pa Rwot." 
Isaiah66:21 Abikwanyo jo mukene i kingi bene me bedo ajwagi ki Lulevi, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Isaiah66:22 “Pien kit macalo polo manyen ki lobo manyen ma abitiyo, biri i nyima,” Rwot ma waco, “likwayowu kadiwa nyinwu bene biri kit meno." 
Isaiah66:23 Por dwe ki por dwe, cabit ki cabit jo ducu gibibino i nyima ka wora,” Rwot ma owaco." 
Isaiah66:24 “Gibikato woko gicito ka neno kom dano muto ma yam onon o, gujemo woko i koma; pien kwidi ma camo komgi-ni pe to, mac ma iye bene pe giromo nekone, gin gudoko gin ma i dano ducu okwero.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Man lok pa Jeremia wod pa Ilkia, ma en ŋat acel i kin ajwagi ma yam onoŋo gibedo i Anatot i lobo pa Benjamin." 
Jeremiah1:2 Lok pa Rwot obino bote i mwaka me apar wiye adek me loc pa Yocia wod pa Amon, kabaka me Juda." 
Jeremiah1:3 Lokke obino bene bote i kare me loc pa Yekoyakim wod pa Yocia kabaka me Juda, o kwede wa i agikki mwaka me apar wiye acel me loc pa Jedekia, wod pa Yocia, kabaka me Juda, o wa i kare ma doŋ gitero kwede jo Jerucalem woko i opii i dwe me abic." 
Jeremiah1:4 I kare meno lok pa Rwot obino bota ma wacci," 
Jeremiah1:5 “I kare ma onoŋo peya acweyi i i meni onoŋo doŋ aŋeyi, dok i kare ma peya ginywali onoŋo doŋ atyeko kweri woko ibed leŋ pi ticca, ayeri me bedo lanebi bot rok ducu,”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Ka doŋ agamo lokke kun awaco ni, “Aya, Rwot Lubaŋa! Nen, an pe aŋeyo lok, pien an pud latin mamwa.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Ento Rwot odok iye owacca ni, “Pe iwacci, ‘An latin mamwa’; pien ibicito bot jo ducu ma abicwali ni icit botgi, dok bene gin ma an abiciki kwede en aye in ibiloko," 
Jeremiah1:8 Pe ibed ki lworo mo i komgi, pien atye kwedi, abilari, man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah1:9 Cutcut Rwot ocwalo ciŋe ogudo doga; ka en Rwot owacca ni, “Nen, doŋ atyeko keto lokka i dogi." 
Jeremiah1:10 Nen, doŋ atyeko keti i nino man me loyo rok mapol ki ker mapol, pi putogi ki mukogi wo ko bene, pi balogi ki turogi woko bene, ka gerogi odoco ki ka pitogi bene,”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Lok pa Rwot dok obino bota ma penya ni, “Jeremia, it ye ka neno aŋo?” Ci agamo ni, “At ye ka neno yat otit.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Lacen Rwot owacca ni, “Ineno kara maber, pien atitti ni atye ka neno lokka, amito ni oti ticce ocob kakare.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Lok pa Rwot dok obino bota pi tyen me aryone, ma wacci, “It ye ka neno gin aŋo?” An adok iye awacci, “Anene agulu ma pii tye ka walo ki iye, ma doge olokke okemo yo tuŋ acam.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Ci Rwot owaco bata ni, “Gin marac bia ki yo tuŋ acam bino poto i kom jo ducu ma gibedo i lobo man." 
Jeremiah1:15 Pien nen, atye ka lwoŋo rok ducu ma gitye i te ker ducu ma yo tuŋ acam, gibibino ci ŋat acel acel bicibo komkerre i dog gaŋ me Jerucalem, ma girumo celle woko litit pi lweny i kome, ki pi lweny i kom gaŋi ducu me Juda, Man Rwot ma owaco," 
Jeremiah1:16 Dok abiŋolo koppa i kom jo Juda pi timgi maraco ducu ki pi bwota woko; gubedo ka waŋo odok eceta bot lubaŋa mogo mukene, kun gibedo bene ka woro gin ma gutiyo atiya ki ciŋgi." 
Jeremiah1:17 Ento in, di cwinyi matek; a malo, ci itit botgi kit gin ducu ma aciki kwede. Cwinyi pe myero oballe i komgi, wek an bene pe abal cwinyi i nyimgi." 
Jeremiah1:18 Doŋ inen, atye ka miyo ibedo macalo gaŋ me cel go go matek, macalo wir nyonyo, ki cel mola, pi gwoki i kom jo me lobo man ducu, pi gwoki ki i kom luker me Juda, rwodine, ajwagine, ki i kom lwak ducu me lobo man." 
Jeremiah1:19 Gibilweny i komi, ento pe gibitwero loyi, pien an atye kwedi pi lari.” Man lok pa Rwot kikome," 
Jeremiah2:1 Lok pa Rwot obino bota ma wacci," 
Jeremiah2:2 “Cit ituc lok man bot jo Jerucalem, wek guwiny. Rwot owaco kuman ni, Pud apo pi gen ma ibedo kwede i koma nia ka tinoni, mar ma ibedo kwede macalo nyako ger, kit ma ibedo ka luba kwede wa i dye tim, i lobo ma yam pe gicoyo iye kodi mo," 
Jeremiah2:3 Icrael onoŋo yam obedo rok ma gikwero obed maleŋ pi Rwot, macalo cam ma okwoŋo cek ma en okayo, Jo ducu ma gucamo cam meno gulokke gudoko lubal; gin maraco obino opoto i komgi, man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah2:4 Wuwiny lok pa Rwot, wun jo me ot pa Yakobo, ki wun jo me doggola ducu me ot pa Icrael." 
Jeremiah2:5 Rwot dok owaco kuman ni, “Kit gin aŋo marac ma kwarowu gunoŋo ni atimo ma omiyo gua woko ki bota gucito woko ka mabor kweda-ni, gubedo ka lubo gin ma konnye pe, omiyo gin bene gudoko jo ma konygi pe-ni?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Gin pe gupenyo ni, ‘Rwot ma okwanyowa woko ki i lobo Ejipt-ni mono tye kwene, ma otelo wiwa i dye tim, i lobo tim aroo ma tye iye lwak bur mapol, i lobo mutwo ki mutu me colpiny ma ocido licuc, ki lobo ma yam dano mo pe kato ki iye, ka ma dano mo bene pe bedo iye?’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ci akelowu i lobo ma ceko cam mabup adada wek wuyom cwinywu kun wucamo cam ma ocek iye ki gin mabeco ducu ma tye iye. Ento i kare ma wubino-ni wubalo lobona woko, wuloko gipinnya odoko gin me kwer." 
Jeremiah2:8 Ajwagi bene gupenyo ni, ‘Rwot mono tye kwene?’ Jo ma gin ludiro i cik bene onoŋo pe giŋeya; luloc gutimo roc i koma; lunebi gubedo ka tyeto lok i nyiŋ jok Baal, gubedo ka lubo kor cal jogi ma pe konyo.”" 
Jeremiah2:9 Rwot owaco ni, “Pud abipenyo dogwu, abipenyo bene wa dog likwayowu," 
Jeremiah2:10 Pi meno koŋ iŋol nam ikat loka Caiprac wek inen, nyo koŋ icwal dano ocit i Kedar wek ociŋi maber twatwal; nen ka ce gin ma kit meno yam obedo tye con." 
Jeremiah2:11 Tye rok mo ma oloko lubaŋane pi lubaŋa mo mukene, kadi bed onoŋo gin jogi mamwa? Ento jona doŋ guloko Deyogi woko pi gin ma pe konyogi kadi ki acel." 
Jeremiah2:12 In polo, bed ki ur pi lok man, bed ma inen, ma lworo obwoyo komi woko adada, man Rwot ma owaco," 
Jeremiah2:13 pien jona doŋ gutyeko timo bal aryo maraco; doŋ gubwota woko, kun-an aye abedo-wan it me pii me kwo, gin dok gukwinyo taŋi pii megi pigi kengi, taŋi mutur, ma pe twero jolo pii kadi matidi mo," 
Jeremiah2:14 “Icrael mono obedo opii? En latic ma ginywalo anywala i paco? En doŋ odoko macalo ginayaka kono niŋniŋ? 
Jeremiah2:15 Lwak labwor ducu doŋ gukok woko i kome matek, gubworo kun gikok ki dwangi maloŋo adada. Gubalo lobone woko odoŋ noŋo; gaŋine ducu doŋ gudoko wi obur, laboŋo dano mo ma bedo i igi." 
Jeremiah2:16 Medo i kom meno, jo Mempic ki jo Tapanec doŋ guketo ret i wiye woko." 
Jeremiah2:17 Pe wun giwu aye ma wukelo can man i komwu kekenwu pi bwoto Rwot Lubaŋawu, i kare ma yam en obedo ka telo yo botwu-ni?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Doŋ kombeddi ka wucito i Ejipt ci wunoŋo iye kit kony aŋo, kun wucito ka mato pii ma i kulu Nail? Nyo ka wucito i Aciria kono wuno-. Ŋo iye kit kony aŋo, kun wucito ka mato pii ma i kulu Euprate?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Balwu aye bikelo pwod i komwu, ki bwoto Lubaŋa woko aye bikelo can i komwu me jukowu. Wuŋe dok wunen ni man gin marac dok me cwercwiny pi wun me bwoto Rwot Lubaŋawu woko; kit lworo mo ma wulwora kwede pe i iwu wacel, man Rwot Lubaŋa me mony aye ma owaco." 
Jeremiah2:20 “Yam con wuturo okolwu woko dok bene wucodo ogwil ma gitwe-yowu kwede woko; ci wuwacci, ‘Pe abibedo laticci.’ Iyo, i wi cere mamalo ducu kadi i te yat ma pote oluk-gu wubedo ka ryebbe piny macalo malaya," 
Jeremiah2:21 An yam onoŋo apitowu kun wua ki i kom olok mamit, akwanyowu ki i kom olok ma nyige ducu beco adada. Wun dok wucako lokke niŋniŋ ci wudoko olok me tim-mi?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Kadi bed wulwok komwu ki cabun magwa kadi bed wulwokke ki cabun ma bwoyone dwoŋ, lwit bal aliiwu noŋo pud odoŋ tye i nyima, man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Jeremiah2:23 Wutwero waco niŋniŋ ni, ‘An gira pe anyobbe ki bal, pe bene abedo ka woro jogi Baal’? Koŋ inen ojwe tyeni ma iwoto kwede i luŋ; dok myero iŋe gin ma doŋ itimo. In ibedo calo roya kinaga ma woto lubo yone kene," 
Jeremiah2:24 calo kana me tim ma doŋ oniyo woko ki bedo i tim, ma ywayo yamo ki ume kun mito twon! Aŋa ma twero juko gin ma cwinye pyette iye? Jo ducu ma giyenye pe myero guol komgi; gibinoŋe i dwene kikome." 
Jeremiah2:25 Gwok tyeni pe iwot kwede laboŋo war, ki dwani bene wek pe otwo woko ki orwo pii. Ento in iwaco ni, ‘Pe doŋ konyo, pien doŋ amaro lubaŋa pa lurok, dok bene doŋ abiwoto alubo korgi.’" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Kit macalo lakwo lewic mako ka ce gimako ka kwalo gin mo, kit meno jo me ot pa Icrael lewic bene bimakogi: gin kikomgi, lukergi, rwodigi, ajwagigi, kadi wa lunebigi," 
Jeremiah2:27 ma giwaco ki yat mo-ni ni, ‘In i wora,’ dok giwaco ki got mo-ni ni. ‘In aye ma inywala.’ Pien onoŋo guloko ŋegi woko bota, pe onoŋo ginena ki waŋgi, Ento i kare ma gitye i can giwacci, ‘A malo ilarwa!’" 
Jeremiah2:28 Ento lwak lubaŋawu-gu, ma wutiyo piwu kenwu gitye kwene? Wek gua malo ka ce gitwero larowu, i kare ma noŋo wutye i can; pien lwak lubaŋawu gipol ma girom aroma ki wel gaŋiwu, Wun jo Juda.”" 
Jeremiah2:29 Rwot owacci, “Piŋo wuŋur i koma? Wun ducu doŋ onoŋo wujemo woko i koma." 
Jeremiah2:30 Yam apwodo litinowu kwe, pe kitgi oyubbe kadi ki acel; pala lucwanwu kekenwu aye ma oneko lunebiwu otyeko woko calo labwor ma owor ma tyeko dano woko." 
Jeremiah2:31 Doŋ wun jo me kare man, wuwiny lok pa Rwot. An mono onoŋo abedo macalo tim bot jo Icrael, nyo macalo lobo me mutu? Piŋo kono jona giwacci, ‘Wan wabibedo kit macalo wamito, pe wabibino boti matwal’?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Wutamo ni nyako mo wiye twero wil i kom ginaruka me deyone, nyo nyako ger wiye twero wil i kom gomcine me nyom? Ento jona wigi owil woko i koma pi lwak nino ma welle pe kwanne." 
Jeremiah2:33 “Kit ma dok iŋeyo yo maber me maro kit me tarwaŋ! Kadi wa mon ma kitgi raco in aye ma ipwonyogi ki tim me tarwaŋ. 
Jeremiah2:34 Dok bene i kom boŋo ma i pyeri gityeko noŋo iye remo pa lucan ma pe gitye ki bal alii mo; yam bene pe inoŋogi ka turo ot wek gidony iye. Doŋ i kom lok magi ducu 
Jeremiah2:35 in iwacci, ‘An ape ki bal mo; adada kinigane doŋ otyeko a woko ki i koma.’ Nen, abiŋolo kop i komi pi waco ni, ‘Pe onoŋo abalo.’" 
Jeremiah2:36 Piŋo ibedo ka wirre ki wot kun iloko yoni atata! Jo Ejipt gibimiyo lewic maki kit macalo yam jo Aciria guketo lewic i komi-ni. 
Jeremiah2:37 Ibia ki kunnu idwogo woko cen ma noŋo idodo ciŋi i wii, pien Rwot doŋ okwero jo ma it ye ka genogi-ni woko, dok gin pe gibikonyi miyo ibedo maber wacel.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 Rwot owaco ni, “Ka laco mo oryemo dakone woko, ce dakone oa ki bote ocito woko, ci doŋ odoko dako pa laco mukene, cware mukwoŋo-ni pud dok bidok bot dako-nu? Ci meno pe bimiyo lobo nyobbe woko ki bal twatwal? Ibedoka timotimkwele ki jo mapol; ci dok pud itwero dwogo bota adada?" 
Jeremiah3:2 “Tiŋ waŋi malo wek inen cere mutiŋŋe malo mabor-gul Wi cere mene mudoŋ ma pe co obuto kwedi iye? I ŋet yo ducu ibedo ka kuro pacogi ducu ma gimari-ni calo Laarab mo ma bedo i dye tim. Doŋ ibalo lobo woko ki tim kwele kwele me malayani-ni," 
Jeremiah3:3 Mumiyo kadi kot bene doŋ ojukke woko, ki kot me oro ma onoŋo myero ocwer bene doŋ pe; ento tarwaŋ pud omoro waŋi i tim me kwele, ikwero woko ni lewic pe omaki." 
Jeremiah3:4 Pud pe ilwoŋa kombeddi ni, ‘Wora, in ibedo larema nia wa ka tinona’?" 
Jeremiah3:5 Kun itamo ni, ‘En pe bibedo ki kiniga i koma nakanaka, pe bibedo ki akeca nio wa i agikki.’ Nen, in doŋ iloko, ento kono doŋ ityeko timo kit bal ducu macalo itwero.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 I kare pa kabaka Yocia, Rwot owaco bota ni, “Doŋ ineno gin ma Icrael ma pe genne-ni otiyo, kit macalo obedo ka cito kwede i wi godi maboco ki i te yadi muluk-gu kun timo iye tim kwele kwelene?" 
Jeremiah3:7 Abedo ka tamone, ni ‘Ka doŋ en otyeko timo timme ducu ci en bidwogo bota’; ento en pe omed de ki dwogo cen, kadi laminne Juda ma jone lugoba-ni bene oneno." 
Jeremiah3:8 Kadi bed Juda oneno ni laminne Icrael obedo ka timo abor twatwal i nyima, en gin mumiyo yam aryeme woko kun amiyo bote waraga ma nyuto ni doŋ apokke woko kwede, ento Juda lacarcar-ri pe obedo iye ki lworo mo wacel. En bene ocito obedo ka timo tim me kwele kwele." 
Jeremiah3:9 Pien onoŋo tim me kwele obedo gin mayot ki tuŋ bote, omiyo obalo lobo woko ki bedo ka timo abor ki got wa ki yat-gu," 
Jeremiah3:10 Ento pi lok man ducu Juda ma laminne ma lacarcar-ri pe olokke odwogo bota ki cwinye ducu, ento odwogo i nyima ki kome keken, man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah3:11 Rwot owacca ni, “Icrael ma pe genne-ni balle nen nok i waŋa kato pa Juda ma jone lugoba-ni," 
Jeremiah3:12 Cit ituc lok magi i but piny yo tuŋ acam, kun iwacci, ‘Dwog cen, in Icrael ma pe genne-ni, man Rwot ma owaco. Pe abineni ki kiniga, pien an lakica mada. Kiniga pe bimaka nakanaka. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah3:13 Ye balli keken, ni ityeko jemo woko i kom Rwot Lubaŋani, ci ikeyo berri woko i kin lubaŋa pa lurok, kun ibedo ka worogi i te yadi ducu muluk-gu, dok bene pe ibedo ka winyo lokka, man Rwot kikome ma owaco." 
Jeremiah3:14 “Wudwog cen, wun litino ma pe genne, Rwot ma owaco; pien an laditwu; abikwanyowu, kun akwanyo dano acel ki i gaŋ acel acel, ki jo aryo ki i kaka acel acel, ci abikelowu i Cion." 
Jeremiah3:15 “‘Abimiyo botwu bene lukwat ma yomo cwinya, wek gukwawu, ma gipitowu kun gitye ki ŋec wa ki niaŋ maber." 
Jeremiah3:16 Ka ce doŋ inen ni wunya i lobo ma welwu omedde i kare meno, man Rwot ma owaco, pe dok gibibedo ka lwoŋo nyiŋ canduk me gicikke pa Rwot. Pe dok wubitamo pire, pe wubipo pire, dok bene pe gibiyubo odoco." 
Jeremiah3:17 I kare meno doŋ gibilwoŋo Jerucalem ni komker pa Rwot, ci rok ducu gibicokke iye i nyim Rwot, kun pe dok gilubo tam maraco i cwinygi matwal, ŋutgi bene pe doŋ bibedo nwaŋ." 
Jeremiah3:18 I kare meno jo me ot pa Juda gibiribbe woko kacel ki jo me ot pa Icrael, ci gibia kacel ki i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam gibino i lobo ma yam amiyo bot kwarogi me bedo gipinygi." 
Jeremiah3:19 “‘Abedo ka tamo kit macalo abiketowu kwede i kin litinona, kun amiyowu bene lobo ma yomo cwinywu, gipiny maber makato lobo pa rok mukene ducu. Dok abedo ka tamo ni gwok wubilwoŋa ni an a Wonwu, dok ni pe wubilokke wuweko luba." 
Jeremiah3:20 Adada, kit macalo dako ma pe lagen weko kwede cware, wun bene wubedo laboŋo gen i koma kit meno, wun jo me ot pa Icrael, man Rwot ma owaco.’’’" 
Jeremiah3:21 Dwan dano ma kok tye ka winnye ki i wi cere mubedo barbar, kun pido kwede pi litino pa Icrael, pien guŋak woko ki i yogi, wigi doŋ otyeko wil woko i kom Rwot Lubaŋagi." 
Jeremiah3:22 “Wudwog cen bota, wun litino ma wupe ki gen, an aye ma abicaŋo cwinywu ma pe ki gen-ni woko.” “Nen, wabino boti; pien in aye i Rwot Lubaŋawa." 
Jeremiah3:23 Adada kony mo pe ginoŋo ki i wi got ka ma woo pa lwak dano winnye a ki iye-nu. Adada larre pa Icrael tye bot Rwot Lubaŋawa. 
Jeremiah3:24 “Ento cakke wa ka tinowa tim me lewic ocamo gin ducu ma yam kwarowa guyelle pigi, dyegigi ki romigi, dyaŋigi, awobegi ki anyiragi." 
Jeremiah3:25 Weku doŋ wabutu piny ki lewicwa-ni, wek tim maraco me lewic ma watimo aye oum komwa woko; pien doŋ watyeko timo bal i kom Rwot Lubaŋawa, waŋ kacel ki kwarowa, cakke wa ka tinowa o kwede wa onyoo. Dok bene pe wabedo ka lubo lok pa Rwot Lubaŋawa.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 “Ka ce wudwogo cen bota, wun jo Icrael, man Rwot ma owaco, myero wudwog giwu. Ka ce wukwanyo gin me kwerwu woko ducu ki i nyima, ma pe doŋ wu biŋak woko aye," 
Jeremiah4:2 dok bene ka ce wukwoŋo kwoŋ ni, ‘Kit macalo Rwot tye kwe-ni,’ myero wukwoŋ i ada, kun wulubo ŋolo kop atir, dok bene ki lencwiny, ci lurok ducu gibilego Rwot wek oony gum mere i komgi, doŋ gibibedo ka miye deyo.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Rwot owaco kuman bot jo Juda ki bot jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem ni, “Wucer poto botwu woko maber, pe wuco kit kodi mo i kin okuto," 
Jeremiah4:4 Wun doŋ myero wulirre woko pi tiyo tic pa Rwot, wulirre i cwinywu, wun jo Juda kacel ki jo ma wubedo i Jerucalem; wek akemona pe okatti woko ma lyel macalo mac, ma biwaŋo piny woko ma ŋat mo pe romo nekone, pi gin marac ma onoŋo wutimo.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Wutit lok man i Juda, kun wutuco pire bene i Jerucalem, ma wuwacci, “Wukut tum wek kokone orom i lobo woko ducu; wudaŋŋe matek kunwuwacci, ‘Wucokke kacel wek wacitu i gaŋi me cel gogo-gu!’" 
Jeremiah4:6 Wutiŋ benderawu malo wukem Cion, wuriŋ woko wular komwu, pe wubedi, pien amito kelo gin marac ki yo tuŋ acam, ki to-piny madit mada ma neko danotyeko wako." 
Jeremiah4:7 Labwor doŋ okatti woko ki i buŋa muculle likuŋ, lanek rok ducu doŋ okatti woko; oa woko ki i kabedone wek ebal lobowu woko odoŋ obur; gaŋiwu ducu doŋ bidoko wi obur laboŋo dano mo ma bedo i igi." 
Jeremiah4:8 Pi man wutwe boŋo cola i pyerwu, wukum kun wukok; pien kiniga mager pa Rwot pe olokke oa woko ki i komwa.”" 
Jeremiah4:9 Rwot owacci, “I nino meno tekcwiny pa luker ki pa rwodi bitum woko; ajwagi bibaŋŋe woko, ki lunebi bene gibiuro matek.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Cutcut agamo awacci, “Aya, Rwot Lubaŋa, adada in doŋ ibwolo lwak man ki jo Jerucalem marac mada, kun iwacci, ‘Wubibedo maber ki kuc’; kun doŋ onoŋo imiyo ginekogi woko ki pala lucwan.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 I kare meno gibiwaco bot lwak man ki bot jo Jerucalem ni, “Yamo malyet oa ki i wi cere ma yadi pe iye ma tye i tim aroo, kun kodo dok kwede yo tuŋ bot lwakka, pe pi pyetogi macalo kal wek gubed maleŋ;" 
Jeremiah4:12 yamo ma acwalo-ni ger mupoŋ mada, ma pe doŋ romo pyetogi apyeta wek gubed maleŋ, An aye kombeddi ma atye ka lok pi ŋolo kop i komgi.”" 
Jeremiah4:13 Nen, tye ka bino calo pol, gadigadi lwennye ducu gibedo calo yamo lapiru; aguragurane gidwir giloyo ocur woko. Can i wiwa, pien doŋ wato watum woko matwal!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Wun jo Jerucalem, myero wulwok cwinywu woko i timo tim maraco, wek wularre. Tamwu maraco-gu bibedo mono i cwinywu pi kare ma rom mene?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Dwan dano winnye kun a ki i Dan ma tito ki i wi got Epraim pi gin marac ma bitimme. 
Jeremiah4:16 Tit lok man bot rok ducu, ni en tye ka bino; tit ki Jerucalem bene ni. “Mony ma rumo gaŋ bino kun gia ki i lobo mabor; gidaŋŋe ki woo mapol i kom gaŋi me Juda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Gurumo Juda woko dyere calo lukur poto ma gurumo poto woko litit, pien onoŋo Juda ojemo woko i koma, man Rwot kikome ma owaco." 
Jeremiah4:18 Kitwu ki gin ma wutimo ducu aye okelo can man i komwu. Man aye kipwolawu, can makec bene atika; can man oton wa i cwinywu kikome.”" 
Jeremiah4:19 Arem doŋ omaka woko, omaka woko do! Arem doŋ wano koma adada. Oii, mil wa i pal cwinya kikome! Adunona tye ka gone atata matek lirimrim; pe atwero liŋ wacel; pien abedo ka winyo koko tum ma gikuto, pi oduru me lweny." 
Jeremiah4:20 Can madit poto dodde i kom can madit wadi, lobo ducu doŋ gibalo woko, piny odoŋ obur. Gijwero kemana woko oyotoyot mada, gimuko kicikana woko bene pi dakika manok keken." 
Jeremiah4:21 Abibedo ka neno bendera pi kare marom mene, kun abedo ka winyo koko tum?" 
Jeremiah4:22 “Pien jona-gu gin lumiŋ, pe giŋeya; gin litino ma wigi odiŋ, pe gitye ki kit niaŋ mo. Giryek megi i tiyo gin marac keken, ento pe giŋeyo tiyo gin maber.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Ka aneno lobo, ci aneno oballe woko odoko obur, laboŋo gin mo ma odon iye; ki malo i polo kuca, lakalatwe ki dwe bene pe giryeny." 
Jeremiah4:24 Aneno wi godi, ci aneno gitye ka yeŋŋe ayeŋa ni yegeyege, cere-gu noŋo tye ka wirre liwir ma gigwennye agweriya," 
Jeremiah4:25 Aneno ci anoao dano mo pe kunnu, winyo me polo ducu gutuk gucito woko." 
Jeremiah4:26 Aneno piny, ci anoŋo ni lobo ma yam ceko cam twatwal-li doŋ odoko tim aroo, gaŋi ma i iye ducu doŋ gibalo woko gudoko obur nyim Rwot ma onoŋo kiniga mager omako-ni." 
Jeremiah4:27 Pien Rwot onoŋo owaco kuman ni, “Lobo man ducu bidoko obur; ento pe abityekone woko liweŋ." 
Jeremiah4:28 Lobo bikumo pi lok man, ki polo bene bicido woko macol licuc. Pien doŋ atyeko tito ka maleŋ gin ma onoŋo ayubbe me timone; kica pe bimaka wacel, dok bene pe abiloko tamma.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 Jo ma i gaŋ ducu guriŋo woko pi woo pa wegi aguragura ki wegi atero; gudonyo woko i buŋa macol, gucito wa i kin got-gu; gaŋi ducu doŋ gibwoto woko, dano mo pe ma bedo i igi." 
Jeremiah4:30 In gaŋ ma doŋ idoko wi obur-ri, piŋo iruko boŋo makwar? Piŋo kono idero komi ki gin me deyo ma obedo jabu jabu, kun iwiro waŋi woko ki rani wek onen maber makato? Iyelle noŋo me deyo komi ni onen maber. Pacogi-gu ducu gicayi acaya; giyenyo yo me neki woko." 
Jeremiah4:31 Awinyo koko mo ma cal ki koko pa dako ma tye ka rem ki nywal, ma tye ki arem madwoŋ calo dako ma pud nywalo latin kayone anywala, Ci on tye ka koko kun kwitte pi noŋo yweyo, kun ryeyo ciŋe woko ma wacci, “Can i wiya gira! Awille woko i nyim lunek dano.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Wurir; kun wugwennye agwenya i dye yo me Jerucalem, wunen ci myero wuniaŋ iye maber! Wuyeny piny i dyekalle ducu wek wunen ka wutwero noŋo dano mo iye ma ŋolo kop kakare, ma yenyo ada bene; ka wek atim kica ki Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah5:2 Kadi bed gikwoŋo kwoŋ kun giwacci, “Kit macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni” ento noŋo gikwoŋo kwoŋ me goba goba." 
Jeremiah5:3 Ai Rwot, in mono pe iyenyo ni inen ada ki waŋi? Ipwodogi matek, ento pe guwinyo kit arem mo madwoŋ wacel; ityekogi woko bene, ento gin gukwero winyo pwonnyi. Gujiŋo cwinygi odoko matek makato got; gukwero nut woko." 
Jeremiah5:4 Dok awacci, “Magi lucan keken, pe gitye ki kit ŋec mo; pien pe giŋeyo yo pa Rwot, ma en aye cik pa Lubaŋagi." 
Jeremiah5:5 Abicito bot jo madito ma gin wegi twero, ci abiloko kwedgi; pien giŋeyo yo pa Rwot, ma en aye cik pa Lubaŋagi.” Ento gin bene onoŋo guturo okol woko, dok bene onoŋo gucodo ogwil woko." 
Jeremiah5:6 Pi meno, labwor mo bia ki i buŋa ci nekogi woko, orudi ma bedo i tim aroo bibino tyekogi woko, Kwac aye ma doŋ tye ka kuro gaŋigi, ŋat mo ki i kingi ka oa okato woko ci gibiŋido woko matitino; pien balgi doŋ odoko dwoŋ, tim me kwele bene doŋ omedde wo ko i kingi adada." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Atwero timowu kica niŋniŋ? Litinowu doŋ gubwota woko, kun gubedo ka kwoŋo kwoŋ ki nyiŋ lubaŋa mogo ma pe Lubaŋa kikome. I kare ma amiyo gucamo cam guyeŋ adada, gutimo abor, dok guwoto kacel gucito i odi pa malaya." 
Jeremiah5:8 Gipitogi guyeŋ maber macalo twon aguragura ma mito tigo, kun ŋat acel acel kok pi dako pa lawote." 
Jeremiah5:9 Pe abiketo can i komgi pi lok magi? man Rwot ma openyo; dok bene pe abiculo kwor i kom rok macalo man? 
Jeremiah5:10 “Kat icit i potone ki i kin olok ci ilwer, ento pe ityekgi woko liweŋ; Lwer jaŋe woko, pien gin pe gubedo pa Rwot," 
Jeremiah5:11 Pien jo me ot pa Icrael ki jo me ot pa Juda pe gubedo ki gen mo wacel i koma, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah5:12 Gubedo ka loko lok goba goba i kom Rwot, kun giwacci, ‘En pe bitimo gin mo; gin marac benepe bipoto i komwa; pe gibilweny i komwa ki pala lucwan, kadi ki kec bene pe bipoto i lobowa." 
Jeremiah5:13 Lunebi gibilokke gidoko yamo; ma lok pa Lubaŋa pe i igi. Meno gin ma bitimme i komgi!’ ” 
Jeremiah5:14 Pi meno Rwot Lubaŋa me mony owaco kuman ni, “Pien doŋ guloko lok man, nen, atye ka loko lokka ma tye i dogi-ni wek odok mac, ki lwak man aloko gidoko yen, ci mac biwaŋogi woko." 
Jeremiah5:15 Nen, abikelo rok mo ma a ki ka mabor i komwu, wun jo me ot pa Icrael, man Rwot ma owaco. Rokke rok matek, dok rokke rok macon, rok ma wun pe wuŋeyo loko lebgi, dok bene pe wuromo niaŋ gin ma giwaco." 
Jeremiah5:16 Aterogi ducu neko dano woko, Gin ducu gicogi oteka keken," 
Jeremiah5:17 Gibicamo kal ma wukayo ki camwu mukene woko liweŋ; gibicamo awobewu ki anyirawu woko; gibicamo dyegiwu ki romiwu kadi wa dyaŋiwu woko; gibicamo olokwu ki odurowu. Gaŋiwu ducu ma girumogi ki cel gogo ma wugeno-ni gibijwero wo ko ki pala licwan.” 
Jeremiah5:18 Rwot owacci “Ento kadi wa I kare meno pe abityekowu woko liweŋ. 
Jeremiah5:19 Ka ce lutuwu gibiwacci, ‘Piŋo Rwot Lubaŋawa otimo gin magi i komwa?’ in ibiwaco botgi ni, ‘Kit macalo wubwota woko kun wubedo ka tiyo bot lubaŋa pa lurok i lobowu, kit meno wubitiyo bene bot lurok i lobo ma pe mewu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Tuc lok man i ot pa Yakobo, tit pire i lobo Juda ni," 
Jeremiah5:21 “Wuwiny lok man, wun lumiŋ ki jo ma wiwu odiŋ, ma wanwu tye, ento pe wuneno, ma itwu tye, ento pe wuwinyo." 
Jeremiah5:22 Pe wulwora? Man Rwot ma owaco. Komwu bene pe myel i nyi ma? Aketo kweyo obedo waŋ apokki pi nam, apokki ma ri nakanaka ma en pe twero kato ki iye; kadi bed biamwonyi me nam twagge, pe bibalo woko, kadi piine mor, pe biromo kato ki i wiye." 
Jeremiah5:23 Ento lwak man gin jo ma ŋutgi tek dok lujemo ki i cwinygi; ci gulokke guŋak, gucito gigi, guweka woko," 
Jeremiah5:24 Pe giwaco ki i cwinygi ni, ‘Myero walworu Rwot Lubaŋawa, ma miyo kot i karene, kot me oro ki kot me poto kot, dok ma gwoko piwa lwak kare ma giciko me kac.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Balwu ma wutimo doŋ oryemo jami magi woko, balwu ogenowu noŋo jami magi mabeco." 
Jeremiah5:26 Pien jo maraco gitye i kin jona; gibedo ka kiyo piny calo ludwar winyo. Giciko owicgi; ci gimako dano," 
Jeremiah5:27 Odigi opoŋ ki lok roro, calo aduku ma opoŋ ki winyo; pi meno doŋ gudoko jo madito dok bene gulony," 
Jeremiah5:28 gucwe dok komgi nen liyu mada, Gitimo ballataya ma ka gikke pe; pe giŋolo kop atir, pe gikonyo litino kic wek gubed maber, dok bene pe gipido lok pa jo ma piny obwoyogi kakare," 
Jeremiah5:29 Rwot owacci, “Pe abiketo can i komgi pi lok magi? Dok bene pe abiculo kwor i kom rok macalo man?”" 
Jeremiah5:30 Man ginaura mada ma miyo lworo ma doŋ otimme i lobo: 
Jeremiah5:31 lunebi gitito lok goba goba, ki ajwagi bene gitye ka tiyo gin maigi mito; jona gimaro kit tim macalo meno, Ento gibitimme niŋniŋ ka agikkine doŋ oo?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Wun jo pa Benjamin, wuriŋ woko wular komwu! Wua woko ki i Jerucalem! Wukut tum okoki i Tekoa, ci wutiŋ bendera malo i Betakerem, pien gin marac tye ka bino a ki yo tuŋ acam, ma bityeko lobo woko liweŋ." 
Jeremiah6:2 Wun jo Cion, wubedo calo olet maber pi ka cam pa dyaŋ." 
Jeremiah6:3 Doŋ lukwat ki romigi ki dyegigi gibibino ka lweny i kome; ci giguro kemagi girume kwede woko dyere; gibikwayo lim makwogi kenyo, kun dano acel acel kwanyo kabedo ma en oyero." 
Jeremiah6:4 Gibiwacci, “Yub lweny doŋ ikome! Wuyubbe doŋ wabicito walwenyo i kome cwiny dyeceŋ!” Ci dok gibiwacci, “Can i wiwa, pien ceŋ doŋ oleŋo woko cok poto, pien tipo ma umo piny otyeno-ni doŋ olyanne woko mabor!”" 
Jeremiah6:5 “Wuyubbe, wek wacitu walwenyu i kome dyewor, wek wabalu kabedone woko!”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Pien Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, “Wutoŋ yadine-gu woko ducu piny; wutor cel lobo wurum ki Jerucalem woko. Man en aye gaŋ ma myero giket can i kome; pienjo ma iye gibedo ka uno dano."
