Jeremiah6:7 Kit macalo waŋ it gwoko piine bedo maleŋ, Jerucalem bene kit meno tye ka gwoko tim maraco. Awinyo tim bwami ki nek i dye gaŋ; aneno two ki waŋ bur keken iye." 
Jeremiah6:8 Wuwek lok man obed calo lok ma acikowu kwede, wun jo Jerucalem, wek pe aa awekwu woko; wek bene pe awek gaŋwu odok o bur, lobo ka ma dano mo pe bedo iye.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Rwot me mony owacci, “Gibikwanyo jo Icrael woko liweŋ calo gipwono nyig olok ki i jaŋe, ŋat mo ma bidoŋ pe, Pi meno myero ilar jo ma itwero larogi, calo lapur ma beko nyig olokke.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Agamo ni, “Abiloko bot aŋa wek acikgi, wek guwiny lokka? Nen, gudiŋo itgi woko, pe gitwero winyo loko Nen, gukwero winyo pwonnyi, gicayo lokki ma iloko-gu acaya, ai Rwot, pe giketo iye cwinygi," 
Jeremiah6:11 Pi meno doŋ aol woko ki akemo pa Rwot; doŋ aol woko ki tinone, “To akemoni i kom litino ma gitye i dye yo, ki i kom awobe ma gucokke kacel bene. Co kacel ki mon gibikwanyogi giterogi woko, jo muteggi ki jo muti." 
Jeremiah6:12 Gibimiyo odigi woko bot jo mukene, pottigi kacel ki mongi; pien abiketo can i kom jo ma gibedo i lobo-ni” man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah6:13 “Cakke i kom jo matino o kwede wa i kom jo madito dano acel acel owor woko pi lim pi noŋo magoba i yo ma pe atir; cakke i kom lunebi o kwede wa i kom ajwagi, gin ducu gitiyo ki goba keken ma pe gigenne," 
Jeremiah6:14 Gibedo ka tuko ki waŋ bur pa jona atuka ma pe gicano woko liweŋ, kun giwacci, ‘Kuc, kuc,’ ma noŋo kun kuc mo pe." 
Jeremiah6:15 Tika yam lewic omakogi i kare ma gutiyo gin me kwer? Pe gire, lewic mo pe omakogi wacel; pe gumiyo waŋgi omyeno wacel ki lewic. Pi meno gin gibipoto calo jo mukene ma doŋ gibipoto-ni i kare ma abiketo can i’ komgi gibitum woko ducu.” Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah6:16 Rwot owaco bot jone kuman ni “Wucuŋ ka ma yo oŋolle iye wek wunen, dok wupeny bene pi yo me kare macon, ka ma yo maber tye iye, wun bene wucak wot wulubi, wek wunoŋ yweyo ki kuc i cwinywu. Ento gin giwacci, ‘Wan pe wabilubo yone kadi ki acel.’" 
Jeremiah6:17 Aketo lukur-piny me kurowu kun awacci, ‘Wuwiny koko tum!’ Ento gin guwacci, ‘Pe wabiwinyone kadi matidi mo.’" 
Jeremiah6:18 Pi meno wuwiny wun lwak me rok ducu, dok wuŋe gin ma bipoto i komgi, wun lurok ma wucokke kany." 
Jeremiah6:19 Winy ba, in lobo, nen, atye ka kelo gin marac wek opot i kom lwak man, adwoggi me gin maraco ma yam gubedo ka timone pien gin ducu pe gubedo ka winyo lokka, dok bene gukwero lubo cikka woko." 
Jeremiah6:20 Piŋo gikelo odok luban bota ki i lobo Ceba, nyo lum malim ma ŋwece kur ki i lobo ma tye ka mabor? Gitum awaŋawu ducu pe abigamo kadi wa gityerwu-gu ducu pe yomo cwinya." 
Jeremiah6:21 Pi meno Rwot owaco kuman ni ‘Abicibo gin mayoko dano i waŋayo pa lwak man, ma ka gibiwot giyokke kwede matek; wego kacel ki litino, luwotgi kacel ki luremgi ducu gibito.’ ”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Rwot owaco kuman ni “Nen, lwak me lok mo-ni tye ka bino kun gia ki i lobo ma yo tuŋ acam, rok matek ma tye ka mabor mada tye ka yubbe pilweny." 
Jeremiah6:23 Doŋ gumako, atumgi ki tonigi woko Iikiŋ, giger adada, pe gitye ki ki ca mo wacel; woogi winnye calo nam ma tye ka mor. Giriŋo ki aguragura, ma gurye woko, calo jo ma doŋ kuro lweny akura, i komwu wun jo Cion!”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Doŋ watyeko winyo lok ma gikelo botwa pire, ciŋwa ducu okwe woko ma doŋ pe timo gin mo; remcwiny madwoŋ dok oketo komwa wokoducu, calo arem pa dako ma, tye ka rem ki nywal," 
Jeremiah6:25 Pe wukatwokowucit i dye bar, pe bene wuwot i yo; pien lukworwu gitye ki pala lucwan, i kabedo ducu inoŋo tye gin ma kelo lworo i kom dano." 
Jeremiah6:26 Wun jona, wutwe boŋo cola i pyerwu, dok bene wubed ka ŋenne i buru. Wukok kit macalo onoŋo wutwero kok kwede pi latin acel keken ka oto, wukok ki keccwiny kun pig waŋwu cwer adada; pien ŋat ma bino ka tyekowa-ni bibino oyotoyot poto woko i komwa." 
Jeremiah6:27 “Atyeko keti i kin jona me bedo ŋat ma niyogi dok ma temogi; temgi wek iŋe dok inoŋ kit ma gibedo kwede," 
Jeremiah6:28 Gin ducu jo ma lujemo ima ŋutgi nwaŋ, ma giwoto ki lok kwot keken i kabedo ducu; gubedo matek calo mola ki nyonyo, giri ducu lutim bal keken." 
Jeremiah6:29 Lutet gubuko mac olyetti okur adada ma mwoc matek, mac doŋ olenyo cet nyonyo woko, doŋ ŋat ma tye ka liyone yelle noŋo, pien jo maraco pe gikwanyogi giterogi woko cen." 
Jeremiah6:30 Gibilwoŋogi ni cet ryal ma gikwero, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko kwerogi woko.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Lok pa Rwot obino bot Jeremia ma wacci," 
Jeremiah7:2 “Cuŋ i doggola me ot pa Rwot, ci itit lok man kunnu, kun iwacci, Wuwiny lok pa Rwot, wun jo ducu ma wudonyo ki i doggola magi kun wucito ka woro Rwot." 
Jeremiah7:3 Rwot me mony, ma Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco kuman ni, Wuyub kitwu kacel ki tim mewu ducu, ci abiweko wubedo i kabedo man." 
Jeremiah7:4 Pe wubed ka geno lwak lok magi me bwola-gu, ni, ‘Man ot pa Rwot, ot pa Rwot, ot pa Rwot.’" 
Jeremiah7:5 “Pien ka ce wuyubo kitwu ki timwu ducu adada, ka ce wuŋolo kop ma atir i kinwu kekenwu," 
Jeremiah7:6 ka ce pe wuuno labedo mo, litino kic nyo mon to, dok bene pe wuneko dano ma pe ki bal i kabedo man, ma pe wuworo lubaŋa mukene ma miyo wupoto i can," 
Jeremiah7:7 ci abimiyo wubedo i kabedo man, i lobo ma yam amiyo bot kwarowu i kare macon me bedo megi matwal-li." 
Jeremiah7:8 “Nen, wuketo genwu i lok me bwola ma pe konyo-gu," 
Jeremiah7:9 Pud wukwalo kwo, pud wuneko dano, wutimo abor, wukwoŋo kwoŋ gobagoba, pud wuwaŋo odok eceta bot Baal, dok bene wuworo lubaŋa mogo ma yam pe onoŋo koŋ wuŋeyo." 
Jeremiah7:10 Wubedo ka timo gin ma iya dagi, dok bene wubino wucuŋ kwede i nyima i ot man, ma gilwoŋo ki nyiŋa, kun wuwacci, ‘Doŋ gilarowa woko!’ Ento pud dok wumedde ki timo gin magi me kwer i koma!" 
Jeremiah7:11 Wutamo ni oda ma gilwoŋo ki nyina-ni odoko boro pa luyak ki botwu? Nen, an kikoma aye doŋ atyeko nenone, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah7:12 Kombeddi doŋ wucit i Cilo i kabedona macon, ka ma yam aketo nyiŋa obedo iye mukwoŋo, wek wunen gin ma atiyo iye pi gin maraco ma jona Icrael gutimo." 
Jeremiah7:13 Wun doŋ wutimo gin magi ducu ma akwanogi-ni, Kadi bed abedo ka wacciwu lok teretere, ento wun wukwero winyone woko, dok bene i kare ma alwoŋowu, wun pe wugamo doga, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah7:14 Pi meno abitimo gin ma atimo i Cilo i kom oda ma gilwoŋo ki nyina ma wuketo iye genwu-ni. Abitiyo gin ma rom kit meno i kabedo man ma yam amiyo botwu ki bot kwarowu, kit macalo nene atiyo i Cilo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Abiryemowu woko ducu ki i nyima, kit macalo aryemo kwede lutuwu ma likwayo pa Epraim." 
Jeremiah7:16 “Doŋ in Jeremia, pe myero ileg pi lwak man, pe itiŋ dwani ka koko nyo ka lega pigi; pe ibak dogi bota pigi bene, pien pe abiwinyo lokki kadi ki acel." 
Jeremiah7:17 Pe ineno gin ma gitye ka tiyone i gaŋi me Juda ducu ki i dye yo me Jerucalem? 
Jeremiah7:18 Litino gicoko yen, wegigi gimoko mac, ki mon ginywaŋo moko me tedo mugati pi daker me polo; dok bene gionyo gityer amata-gu bot lwak lubaŋa, pi ŋeto cwinya wek kiniga omaka." 
Jeremiah7:19 Man an aye ma gitye ka ŋeto cwinya-ni? Man Rwot ma owaco. Pe gitye ka kelo can i komgi kengi, ma miyo lewic makogi?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Mumiyo Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, nen, abitoyo kinigana ki akemona woko i kom kabedo man, i kom dano ki i kom lee, i kom yadi ma i tim-gu ki ginapita ducu mucek i poto; macce biwaŋ adada ma pe gitwero nekone.”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Rwot me mony ma en Lubaŋa me Icrael owaco kuman ni, “Wurib gitum awaŋawu i kom gitum mukene-gu, dok wucam riŋone." 
Jeremiah7:22 Pien i kare ma akwanyo kwarowu akelogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt, pe acikogi pi lok i kom gitum awaŋa ki gitum mukene-gu," 
Jeremiah7:23 Ento acikogi ni myero guwiny lokka, wek abed Lubaŋagi, dok wek gin gubed jona. Dok acikogi me lubo kit ma acikogi me bedo kwede, wek gubed ma jami ducu woto maber botgi." 
Jeremiah7:24 Ento gin pe gulubo cikka, dok bene pe guciko itgi ka’ winyo lokka, ento gubedo ka lubo tamgi kengi ki nwaŋ cwinygi ma opoŋ ki gin marac, ci gujer gudok woko cen ki ŋegi ma pe gumedde guwoto anyim." 
Jeremiah7:25 Cakke i kare ma kwarowu gua kwede woko ki i lobo Ejipt o kwede wa ka onyoo, abedo ka cwalo botgi luticca ma gin lunebi teretere, nino ki nino;" 
Jeremiah7:26 ento gin pe guwinyo lokka, pe guciko itgi bene me winyone, ento gujiŋo ŋutgi odoko tek. Gutimo gin marac adad a ma okato gin ma yam kwarogi otimo-gu woko." 
Jeremiah7:27 “Kit meno, Jeremia, ibiloko lok magi ducu botgi, ento gin pe gibiwinyo lokki. Ibilwoŋogi bene, ento pe gibigamo dogi." 
Jeremiah7:28 Ci ibiwaco botgi ni, ‘Man aye rok ma pe nene jone gulubo lok pa Rwot Lubaŋagi, pe bene guye lok me pwony; lok ada doŋ otyeko rwenyo woko liweŋ, pe doŋ giloko pire matwal." 
Jeremiah7:29 Wulyel yer wiwu ci wubol yerre woko; wucak wo ki koko i kabedo ma odoŋ nono ma i wi godi, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko kwero dok obwoto jo me yalwak man ma akemo omake i komgi-ni.’" 
Jeremiah7:30 “Jo Juda doŋ gutimo gin marac i nyima. Guketo cal jogigi ma en gin me kwer ki tuŋ bota-ni i ot ma gilwoŋo ki nyiŋa, me balone woko. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah7:31 Guyubo waŋ jok i nota pa wod pa Kinom ma gilwoŋo ni Topet, ka ma gitwero waŋo iye awobegi ki anyiragi ki mac. Pe yam acikogi ni gutim kit meno, dok bene pe abedo ka tamo lok macalo meno wacel." 
Jeremiah7:32 Pi meno, nen, kare tye ka bino ma pe dok gibilwoŋo ni Topet, nyo nota pa wod pa Kinom. Gibilwoŋo ni nota me Nek: pien gibiyiko dano i Topet, pien kabedo mo pe tye ka mukene kadi ki acel." 
Jeremiah7:33 Doŋ kom jo magi ma guto-ni bidoko cam pa winyo ki pa lee me tim; ŋat mo pe ma biryemogi woko. 
Jeremiah7:34 Lobo bidoko tim aroo, doŋ i gaŋi me Juda ki i dye gudo me Jerucalem abijuko woo me yomcwiny ma dano gitye kwede, kadi wa dwan lanyom ki dwan nyako ger bene." 
Jeremiah8:1 “I kare meno cogo pa luker me Juda, cogo pa rwodine, cogo pa ajwagi, cogo pa lunebi, ki cogo pa jo ducu ma gibedo i Jerucalem gibikwanyo giwoto woko ka maleŋ ki i lyelgi. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah8:2 Ci gibimoyogi woko i nyim ceŋ ki dwe ki i nyim lakalatwe me polo, ma yam gumarogi kun gitiyo botgi-ni, ma yam gubedo ka lubo korgi, ma yam guyenyo tam ki botgi ka guworo-ni, Pe gibicokogi kacel kadi ki yikogi, gibibedo calo cet dyaŋ muket ata i nom." 
Jeremiah8:3 Jo ducu me rok man marac ma gubwot, ma gibedo i kabedo ka ma yam aryemogi gucito iye, gibimito ni twara kono gito woko loyo ma gibedo kwo. Man lok ma Rwot me mony aye owaco." 
Jeremiah8:4 “Ibiwaco botgi ni, Rwot owaco kuman ni, Ka dano gupoto piny, pe dok gia malo? Ka ce ŋat mo onak woko, ci en pe lokke dwogo cen?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Piŋo rok man kono guŋak woko ma gitye ka medde ameda ki weko yona? Gimoko woko Iikiŋ i lok me bwola, gikwero lokke woko me dwogo cen." 
Jeremiah8:6 Abedo ka tero ita ka winyo lokgi, ento gin pe guloko lok ma tye atir; dano ma ŋut i gin maraco ma en otimo pe, kun wacci, ‘Onoŋo atimo gin aŋo?’ Ŋat acel acel gire woto kit ma iye mito, calo aguragura ma tye ka ŋwec laro lweny." 
Jeremiah8:7 Kadi winyo acebe ma bedo malo i polo bene ŋeyo karene me dwogo cen; ki akuri, lakalagwec ki ogoro gigwoko karegi me binogi; ento jona gikwiya cik ducu ma Rwot yam omiyo." 
Jeremiah8:8 “Wutwero waco niŋniŋ ni, ‘Wan waryek, cik pa Rwot bene tye botwa’? Nen doŋ lupwony-cik ma pe gigenne gutyeko loko cik woko ki cocgi, guloko odoko lok goba." 
Jeremiah8:9 Lewic bimako luryeko, cwinygi biballe ci gimakogi woko. Nen, gutyeko kwero lok pa Rwot; kit ryeko aŋo ma dok gitye kwede?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Pi meno abimiyo mongi woko bot co mukene, ki pottigi bot jo ma otayogi ki lweny, pien cakke ki i kom jo matino o kwede wa i kom jo madito dano acel acel owor woko i noŋo magoba i yo ma pe atir; cakke ki i kom lunebi o kwede wa i kom ajwagi gin ducu gitiyo ki goba keken ma pe gigenne." 
Jeremiah8:11 Gibedo ka tuko ki waŋ bur pa jona atuka ma pe gicano woko liweŋ, kun giwacci, ‘Kuc, kuc,’ ma noŋo kun kuc mo pe." 
Jeremiah8:12 Tika yam lewic omakogi i kare ma gutiyo gin me kwer? Pe gire, lewic mo pe omakogi wacel; pe gumiyo waŋgi omyeno wacel ki lewic. Pi meno gin bene gibipoto calo jo mukene ma gibipoto; kare ma abiketo can i komgi gibitum woko ducu.” Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah8:13 “I kare ma onoŋo myero aeokgi, man Rwot ma owaco, nyig olok pe tye i wi yat olok, ki nyig oduro bene pe i wi yat oduro; pote-gu bene ducu otwo woko, ki gin ma yam amiyogi-ni bene doŋ otyeko kato woko ki botgi.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Piŋo pud dok wabedo mot? Wugurre kacel wek wacitu i gaŋi ma girumo ki cel gogo wek wacitoyu kunnu; pien Rwot Lubaŋawa doŋ oketoean i komwa ni wato, omiyowa bene pii ma tye iye kwir marac wamato, pien onoŋo doŋ watimo bal i kom Rwot." 
Jeremiah8:15 Wabedo ka yenyo kuc, ento gin mo maber ma wano ŋo pe, i kare ma onoŋo myero wacaŋ iye, wanoŋo gin ma kelo lworo keken." 
Jeremiah8:16 “Yweyo me kiniga pa aguragura pa lukworwa winnye wa i Dan; ka twoni aguraguragi okok ci lobo ducu yeŋŋe. Gubino ka balo lobowa woko kacel ki jami ducu ma tye iye, pi jwero gaŋwa woko kacel ki jo ma gibedo iye." 
Jeremiah8:17 Pien nen, atye ka cwalo twol ikinwu, twol uyu ma kwirre rac ma pe gitwero baŋone ki yat, ci gibikayowu malit,” man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah8:18 Can ma atye kwede doŋ dit ma pe romo caŋ, atye ki two madit me cwercwiny mada i cwinya." 
Jeremiah8:19 Koŋ iwiny, koko pa jona orumo i lobo woko ducu, kun gikok ni, “Rwot mono pe i Cion? Kabakane mono doŋ pe iye?” Rwot ma kabakagi ogamo ni, “Piŋo kono wuŋeto cwinya ki cal jogiwu, wumiyo kiniga omaka ki lubaŋa pa lurok mogo ma pe gikonyo-gu?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 Dano gikok ni, “Kare me kac doŋ okato woko, ki kare me oro bene dog ogik, ento pud pe gilarowa.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Cwinya rem calo bur odet iye pien jona doŋ giketo bur woko i komgi, akumo pi can, ma cwercwiny doŋ obwoyo koma woko." 
Jeremiah8:22 Yat me caŋo dano doŋ pe i Gilead bo? Daktar kono pe kunnu? Piŋo kono pe gicano jona? 
Jeremiah9:1 Ka twerre onoŋo myero wiya obed waŋ it me pii, ki waŋa noŋo myero obed. Waŋ it ma gunnye ki pig waŋ, wek omiya abed ka kok dyeceŋ ki dyewor benebene pi jona ma dog ginekogi woko-ni," 
Jeremiah9:2 Onoŋo amito ni kono nene kabedo mo obed tye ma abedo iye macalo ka gony pa luwot i tim aroo, kono aweko jona ci acito woko ka mabor kwedgi! Gin ducu lutim abor, gin ducu lutim tim aranyi." 
Jeremiah9:3 Gin kare ducu guyubbe woko me loko lok goba; bedo laboŋo gen doŋ oloyo lobo woko ma kaka tim me ada. Rwot owacci, “Sona gitimo gin marac teretere, dok bene pe giŋeya.”" 
Jeremiah9:4 Dano acel acel myero ogwokke i kom lawote, ki bene pe myero ogen ominne: pien omego acel acel obedo labwola calo Yakobo, dok dano acel acel bene kwoto lawote." 
Jeremiah9:5 Ŋat acel acel bwolo lawote, dano mo ma loko ada pe; doŋ gutyekopwonyo Lebgi woko me loko lok goba, gitimo bal giyelle iye adada ma pe giromo nut." 
Jeremiah9:6 Gibedo ka uno dano teretere, dok gitimo gin me bwola teretere, gikwero woko ni pe giŋeya, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah9:7 Mumiyo Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, “Nen, abitemogi macalo nyonyo ma giliyo. Jona doŋ gutimo gin marac, gin aŋo kono ma dok atwero tiyo kwedgi?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Lebgi obedo calo atero ma lake ki kwir marac; giloko lok me bwola keken. Dano acel acel loko lok mamit bot lawote, ento ki i cwinye noŋo tye ki yub me kanne wek eneke woko." 
Jeremiah9:9 An pe abiketo can i komgi pi lok magi? Pe abiculo kwor i kom rok macalo man?” Man Rwot ma owaco. 
Jeremiah9:10 Jeremia owacci, “Wek dog akok pi godi, dok abikok kun cwinya cwer pi olet-gu, pien doŋ gutwo woko, ŋat mo ma woto kun ŋolo ki iye doŋ pe. Koko pa dyaŋi bene pe doŋ winnye kunnu; winyo ki lee tim ducu doŋ guriŋo gurwenyo woko, doŋ gipe matwal.”" 
Jeremiah9:11 Rwot owacci, “Abiloko Jerucalem doko wi obur me gin ma gimuko ki iye, kabedo ma too-aye bedo iye: gaŋi me Juda ducu doŋ bidoko tim noŋo, ka ma ŋat mo pe bedo iye.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Dano mene maryek ma wacci etwero niaŋ lok man? Rwot mono oloko lok magi bot aŋa, ni wek otit lokke? Pmo lobo doŋ oballe woko odoko wi obur calo tim ma iye odoŋ nono, ma dano mo pe wok kato ki iye?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Rwot owacci, “Man otimme pien jona gubwoto cikka ma nene amiyo botgi-ni, dok bene pe guwinyo lokka, pe gubedo kun gilubo cikka." 
Jeremiah9:14 Ento ma ka timo meno gumiyo nutgi obedo nwaŋ, gubedo ka woro jogi Baal mapatpat, kit macalo kwarogi opwonyogi kwede." 
Jeremiah9:15 Pi meno Rwot me mony, ma en Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco kuman ni, Nen, abimiyo jo magi gimato yat roka, dok bene abimiyo gimato pii ma giketo iye kwir." 
Jeremiah9:16 Abikeyogi woko i kin lurok ma gin kikomgi pe giŋeyo, kadi wa kwarogi bene yam pe guŋeyo; abicwalo dul mony lubo korgi ki pala lucwan nio waŋ ma atyekogi woko liweŋ.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Rwot me mony owaco kuman, ni, “Koŋ wutam lok, ci wulwoŋ monma giŋeyo wer koko-gu gubin; wucwal lok wulwoŋ mon makwiri gubin;" 
Jeremiah9:18 wek gurune gubin oyotoyot ci guwo ki koko i komwa, wek pig waŋwa omo locit piny lipyaa, ma del waŋwa bene odyak woko ki pii." 
Jeremiah9:19 Koŋ wuwiny dwan me koko ma a ki i Cion, ‘Doŋ watum woko do! Lewic doŋ omakowa woko marac, pien doŋ waa woko ki i lobowa, pien aaniwa doŋ gijwero woko licwic.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Jeremia owacci, “Wun mon, wuwiny doŋ lok ma Rwot owaco, wucik itwu wek wuwiny lok ma oa ki i doge. Wupwony anyirawu ki koko, Ŋat acel acel opwony lawote ki wer lyel." 
Jeremiah9:21 To doŋ obino woko i komwa ki i waŋ dirica, ci odonyo woko i gaŋ kalwa ducu, oneko litino woko ducu ki i dye yo ki awobe-gu ki i dye bar." 
Jeremiah9:22 Kom jo muto gibikeyo woko ata gikeyo woko macalo odur cet dyaŋ muket ata i olet, calo kal ma lukac gukayo guweko odoŋ i poto, ma ŋat mo doŋ pe ma bicoko tero i gaŋ. Man aye gin ma Rwot owacca ni atiti.”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Rwot owacca kuman ni, “Dano maryek myero pe onyatte ki ryekone-ni, kadi ki dano matek bene pe myero onyatte ki tekone, ki dano mulony bene pe myero onyatte ki lonyone." 
Jeremiah9:24 Ento ka ŋat mo mito nyatte, myero onyatte ni eniaŋ dok eneyo an, ni an a Rwot ma atye ka tiyo gin ma nyuto mar ma pe lokke, anyuto bene ŋolo kop atir ki bedo ki kit ma atir i lobo. Magi gin aye jami ma cwinya mito. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah9:25 Rwot owacci, “Nen nino tye ka bino, en aye kare ma abiketo iye can i kom jo ma gilirogi ki i del komgi ki woko ento pe ki i cwinygi." 
Jeremiah9:26 Abiketo can i kom Jo Ejipt, jo Juda, jo Edom, jo Ammon, jo Moab ki jo ducu ma gibedo i tim aroo ma ginyaro yer wigi woko doŋ macego; rok magi ducu pe gulirre ki i cwinygi, ki jo me ot pa Icrael bene pe gulirre ki i cwinygi.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Wun jo Icrael wuwiny lok ma Lubaŋa tye ka lokone botwu. 
Jeremiah10:2 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Pe wupwony kit pa lurok, dok cwinywu bene pe myero oballe ka wuneno lanyut mo tye i polo, kadi bed rok mukene-gu cwinygi oballe woko pire." 
Jeremiah10:3 Pien kit pa lurok obedo gin me bwolo, pe ada. Gitoŋo yat gireto woko piny i buŋa, ci lapac payo woko maber ki koyone nyo ki jami mukene me pac." 
Jeremiah10:4 Dano gidero kome woko ki ryal nyojabu; gikwanyo nyono giguro ki cumari iye wek ocun matek likiŋ pe opot woko piny," 
Jeremiah10:5 Cal lubaŋagi-nu obedo calo wir yat ma gicibo ocun i poto okwer pi ryemo winyo, pe bene gitwero lok; gitiŋogi mege atiŋa, pien pe giwoto. Pe ilworgi, pe gitwero timo gin mo marac i komi, dok bene pe gitye ki twero mo me timo gin mo maber.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Pe tye lubaŋa mo macalo in, ai Rwot; in idit, dok nyiŋi bene dit ki tek." 
Jeremiah10:7 Aŋa mono ma pe mvero olwori, in kabaka ma loyo rok ducu? Man aye kiti, myero dano gulwori. Pe tye ŋat mo macalo in i kin luryeko ducu me rok mapatpat, kadi ki i te kergi ducu." 
Jeremiah10:8 Danogi ducu ma luryeko gubedo jo ma lumiŋ dok wigi bene odin. En bao ma giyubo ni cal lubaŋa-ni tika pwonyogi ki gin mo? 
Jeremiah10:9 Cal lubaŋagi gidero kome woko ki ryal ma gidino woko ma gikelo ki i Tarcic, ki jabu ma gikelo ki i Upaj, Gin ducu gubedo tic pa lupac ki dok bene tic ma latet jabu otiyo ki ciŋe: ginarukagi obedo makwar ki dok lamar lamar; gin ducu gubedo tic ma jo ma kwiri aye gutiyo." 
Jeremiah10:10 Ento Rwot aye Lubaŋa me ada, en Lubaŋa makwo, dok bene en Kabaka ma bedo nakanaka. Ka inen, ce akemo omake ci lobo yeŋŋe, rok ducu pe twero ciro kinigane." 
Jeremiah10:11 Ibiwaco botgi kit man ni, “Lubaŋa mogo-gu ma pe guketo polo ki lobo-ni gibijwerogi ‘woko. Pe doŋ gibibedo tye i kabedo mo i wi lobo ki i te polo.”" 
Jeremiah10:12 Rwot oketo lobo ki twerone, dok ocibo lobo ocuŋ matek pi ryekone, ki pi niaŋ matut ma en tye kwede omiyo oyaro polo woko." 
Jeremiah10:13 I kare ma dwane mor, ci pii twagge matek ki i polo, dok miyo lupu duny kun a ki i agikki lobo. En miyo lutkot wil ka kot cwer, dok bene miyo yamo kodo kun a ki i ot kano jamine." 
Jeremiah10:14 Dano ducu bedo lumiŋ dok bene ma wigi odiŋ; lewic mako latet jabu pi cal jokke ma en otiyo; pien cal jogine-gu ducu pe lubaŋa me ada, dok bene pe gitye ki kit kwo mo i igi." 
Jeremiah10:15 Konygi pe, gitiyogi mere me acaya keken; i kare ma Rwot bibino ka keto can i komgi gibito gitum woko." 
Jeremiah10:16 Lubaŋa pa Yakobo pe obedo calo cal jogi magi; pien en aye ŋat ma oketo jami ducu, dok bene en oyero jo Icrael wek gubed jone kikome, Nyiŋe gilwoŋo ni Rwot me mony. Gibitero dano i opii" 
Jeremiah10:17 Wun jo Jerucalem ma mony doŋ orumowu woko-ni, wutin yecwu woko ki i ŋom," 
Jeremiah10:18 pien kombeddi doŋ Rwot biryemowu woko ki i lobo-ni; en biŋinyowu waŋ ma wuwinyo litte. 
Jeremiah10:19 Jo Jerucalem gikok ni, “Giketo ret woko i komwa marac kuman! Waŋ burwa tye marac mada ma pe bicaŋ, Yam watamo ni man en aye gin ma watwero ciro, kara pe!" 
Jeremiah10:20 Kemawa doŋ gibalo woko, ki tol ducu ma onoŋo gitweyogi kwede gicodo woko; litinowa doŋ guwekowa, gin ducu doŋ gipe. Ŋat mo pe ma odoŋ ma myero ogur kemawa odoco kakare; pe tye ŋat mo ma myero otwe boŋo kicika megi malo.”" 
Jeremiah10:21 Jeremia ogamo ni, “Lutel doŋ gudoko lumiŋ; pe gipenyo Rwot wek otelgi. Meno aye gin mumiyo yam pe gubedo maber; lwakgi ducu doŋ guket woko ata." 
Jeremiah10:22 “Winy lok! Nen tye ka bino! Twon gin ma mor tye ka katti bino ki i lobo ma yo tuŋ acam, dul monnye bino me jwero gaŋi me Juda woko wek odoŋ obur, odok kabedo ka ma too bedo iye.”" 
Jeremiah10:23 Ai Rwot, aŋeyo ni dano pe loyo kwone kene nio i agikkine; pe tye ŋat mo ma tye ki twero me loyo kwoŋe." 
Jeremiah10:24 Ai Rwot, pwony lwakwa; ento pe itimwa marac aye. Pe ipwonywa i kare ma noŋo kiniga omaki; miyo wabito woko ducu." 
Jeremiah10:25 Kiniga myero omaki i kom rok ma pe giŋeyi, ki i kom lurok ma pe gilwoŋo nyiŋi-ni, Doŋ gityeko likwayo pa Yakobo woko; ci gubalo lobowa woko odoŋ obur." 
Jeremiah11:1 Rwot oloko ki Jeremia, ni," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Winy lok ma mako gicikke nan. Tit bot jo Juda ki jo ma gibedo Jerucalem ni," 
Jeremiah11:3 an, Rwot Lubaŋa pa crael, doŋ atyeko ceno dano ma pe winyo dok ma pe lubo lok ma mako icikke man." 
Jeremiah11:4 En gicikke ma yam keto ki kwarowu i kare ma akwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt, en lobo ma obedo alo buk mac me teto nyonyo ma otwak me waŋogi. I kare meno awaco otgi ni guwiny lokka dok guti gin ducu ma yam acikogi ni guti. Atito otgi ni ka gulubo ci gibibedo jona kin bene abibedo Lubaŋagi," 
Jeremiah11:5 Aciko botgi ni an bene abicobo kwoŋ ma am akwoŋo i nyim kwarogi kun miyo botgi lobo ma mol cak ki moo Ic, kit macalo gitye iye wa onyoo-ni.” Ci an Jeremia agamo ni, “Wek obed kumeno, Rwot.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Rwot dok owacca ni, “Tit lok magi ducu i gaŋi me Juda, ki i dye yo me Jerucalem. Tit lokka kunnu, kun iwaco bot lwak ni guwiny lok ma mako gicikke man dok bene gulubi kun gitiyo." 
Jeremiah11:7 I kare ma akwanyo kwarowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt, acikogi matek, kun bene abedo ka cikogi teretere, nio wa onyoo, kun awaco botgi ni gulub lokka." 
Jeremiah11:8 Ento gin pe gulubo dok pe guciko itgi me winyo lokka. Ma ka timo meno, dano acel acel omedde ameda ki bedo ki nwaŋ cwiny marac. Mumiyo acobo lok me gicikke man woko ducu i komgi, ma yam acikogi ni guti, ento pe gutiyo-ni.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Rwot dok owaco bota ni, “Jo Juda kacel ki jo ma bedo i Jerucalem gitye ka jemo woko i koma." 
Jeremiah11:10 Gulokke gudok cen ka timo bal pa kwarogi ma gukwero winyo lokka woko-ni; gubedo ka lubo lubaŋa mukene kun giworogi bene: Jo me ot pa Icrael ki jo me ot pa Juda doŋ guturo gicikkena woko ma yam acikke kwede ki kwarogi-ni. 
Jeremiah11:11 Pi meno Rwot owaco kuman ni, Nen, atye ka kelo gin marac wek aket i komgi ma pe gitwero loyo ki iye wacel. Ka gibikok bota pi kony, an pe abiwinyo kokogi." 
Jeremiah11:12 I kare meno jo Juda kacel ki jo ma bedo i Jerucalem gibicito gikok bot lubaŋa ma yam gibedo ka waŋo iye gitum botgi-ni, ento lubaŋa magi pe twero larogi i kare me can." 
Jeremiah11:13 Pien lubaŋawu doŋ gudoko pol ma guporo wel gaŋiwu, wun jo Juda; ki wun jo ma wubedo i Jerucalem bene doŋ wuyubo lwak keno tyer mapol ata ka ma wuwaŋo iye gitum me lewic bot jok Baal, ma rom ki wel yo ma tye i dye gaŋ me Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah11:14 “Pi meno Jeremia, pe ibed ka lega, pe bene ipid kweda pi lwak man. Ka inen ce gitye i can ka gukok bota pi kony, an pe abiwinyo kokogi.”" 
Jeremiah11:15 Rwot owaco ni, “Jona ma amaro-ni gitye ka timo tim kipyeda. Doŋ gitye ki kit twero aŋo ma weko gibedo i oda? Gitamo ni tyero lee me gitum ki kwoŋo kwoŋ mogo ma gicikke kwede atata twero geŋo can woko me poto i komgi? Gitamo ni gitwero bwot i yo ma kit man?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Yam alwoŋogi ni yat jeituni ma pote olot madwoŋ, ma nyige bene nen mwonya adada; ento abiwaŋo pote woko ki mac ma yamone mor mager, dok abituro jaŋe woko ducu," 
Jeremiah11:17 “An Rwot me mony ma yam apito jo Icrael ki jo Juda, macalo yat jeituni-ni, kombeddi doŋ awacci abiketo gin marac i komgi, Gukelo gigi can man i komgi pigi kengi pien gin gutimo gin marac. Guneto cwinya omiyo kiniga omaka pi waŋo gitum bot jok Baal.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 Rwot omiyo aŋeyo dok aniaŋ lok ma lukworra gupiro, ki gin marac ma onoŋo gimito timo i koma." 
Jeremiah11:19 Ento an abedo calo latin romo mamwol ma gitero woko ka nekone, onoŋo pe aŋeyo ni gupiro lok me timo gin marac i koma. Gubedo ka waco ni, “Watoŋu yat man waretu woko piny wa ki nyige ducu; waneke woko wek ŋat mo pe doŋ obipo i kome matwal i lobo-ni.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Lacen an Jeremia alego ni, “Ai Rwot me mony, in laŋolkop ma ŋolo kop atir, dok itemo tam pa dano ki gin ma giparo ki i cwinygi. Wek anen ka iculo kwor i kom lwak man, pien an doŋ atyeko keto lokka woko ducu i ciŋi.”" 
Jeremiah11:21 Pi meno Rwot owaco kuman, i kom jo Anatot, ma onoŋo gimito neko Jeremia woko kun giwacce ni ka ce en omedde ki tito lok i nyiŋ Rwot ci gibineke woko." 
Jeremiah11:22 Rwot me mony owaco lok i komgi ni, “Nen, abiketo can i komgi. Awobegi ducu gibinekogi woko i lweny ki pala lucwan; litinogi ducu bito woko ki kec." 
Jeremiah11:23 Ŋat mo ma bidoŋ pe ka kare oromo, en kare ma doŋ amoko me keto iye can i kom jo Anatot.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Ai Rwot, ka apido lokka kwedi, anoŋo ni in giri lokki tye atir. Ento myero pud dok apenyi lok ma mako ŋolo kop. Piŋo jo maraco gibedo maber dok gilony? Piŋo lutim aranyi kono gicobo tiyo gin ma cwinygi mito?" 
Jeremiah12:2 In aye ma yam ipitogi, mumiyo giroyo lwitgi donyo i ŋom gidoŋo ci ginyak bene. Kare ducu gin giloko lok maber i komi, ento ki i cwinygi noŋo gitye ka mabor, pe giparo piri." 
Jeremiah12:3 Ento in Rwot, iŋeya, ineno gin ma atiyo, dok itemo tamma pi neno kit macalo amari kwede. Makgi ikelgi woko ki tek calo romi me aneka, kogi woko iketgi pat nio ka nino me nekogi oromo." 
Jeremiah12:4 Lobowa mono bibedo mutwo pi kare ma rom mene, dok lum ducu ma i tim bitwo woko nio wa awene? Lee ki winyo gitye ka to pi tim maraco pa jo ma gibedo i lobo man, ma giwaco ni i, “In pe ineno kit ma gitye ka bedo kwede.”" 
Jeremiah12:5 Rwot owacci, “Jeremia, ka ce iol woko i ŋwec ma kun ipyemki dano, ci ibiŋweco ipyem ki aguragura niŋniŋ? Ka ce ipoto piny i lobo ma kuc tye iye, ci doŋ ibikwo niŋniŋ ka ibedo i kin yadi mukadde ma tye i ŋet Jordan?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Kadi ki omegini, ma gin jo me ot pa woru kikome, gin bene gutimo tim aranyi i komi, gin guribbe ka lweny i komi bene. Pe igengi, kadi bed giloko lok maber me larem boti.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 Lubaŋa owacci, “An doŋ aweko jona woko, doŋ akwero rok ma yam ayerogi-ni woko; doŋ atyeko miyo jona ma amaro-ni woko i ciŋ lukworgi." 
Jeremiah12:8 Jona ma ayerogi-ni doŋ gulokke woko i koma calo labwor ma tye i buŋa; gumor ki koko matek i koma pi meno omiyo adaggi. 
Jeremiah12:9 Jona ma ayerogi-ni gubedo calo tula, ma winyo wadigi lwenyo i kome i kabedo ducu. Wubin, wun lee tim; wubin wuribbe ka cam kacel." 
Jeremiah12:10 Lukwat mapol doŋ gutyeko balo poto olokka woko, gunyono dul lobo ma gipokka woko piny ki tyengi, guloko dul lobona ma yomo cwinyani odoko tim ma iye odoŋ noŋo." 
Jeremiah12:11 Gumiyo doŋ odoko tim ma konnye pe; odoko tim ma iye odoŋ noŋo i nyima. Lobone ducu doŋ gibalo woko odoŋ noŋo, ento ŋat mo ma paro pire pe." 
Jeremiah12:12 I wi cere ducu ma tye i tim aroo, jo ma lutyek piny doŋ gubino ka yako Doŋ an Rwot atyeko cwalo lweny me tyeko lo bo woko ducu; ŋat mo pe ma bitwero bedo ki kuc." 
Jeremiah12:13 Jona yam gucoyo bel ento gukayo okuto, gubedo ka tiyo tic matek guolo komgi woko, ento pe gulimo iye gin mo. Lewic bimakogi pien gin ma gucoyo ducu pe ocek pi kiniga mager pa Rwot.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “At ye ki lok mo ma myero awac bot jo ma gibedo ka ŋet jo Icrael ma doŋ gubalo lobo ma amiyo bot jona jo Icrael-li woko. Nen, abikwanyo rok man woko ki i lobogi, dok bene abilaro jo Juda akwanyogi ki i kingi." 
Jeremiah12:15 I kare ma doŋ akwanyogi woko, ci kica bimaka i komgi, Abikelo rok acel acel adwoko cen i lobone dok i kabedone kikome." 
Jeremiah12:16 Dok ka kare biromo, ka ce gipwonyo kit pa jona ki cwinygi ducu, ma kun gikwoŋo ki nyiŋa ni, ‘Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni,’ macalo yam gupwonyo jona me kwoŋo ki nyiŋ jok Baal, ci miyo gin ducu doŋ gibirubbe woko ki jona ci gibibedo maber." 
Jeremiah12:17 Ento ka ce tye rok mo ma pe biwinyo lokka, ci abiputo woko ki lwite ducu ci abalo woko licwic, man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah13:1 Rwot owacca kuman ni, “Cit iwil boŋo camanini me aruka i pyer, ci itwe i pyeri, ento pe ilut i pii.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Ci awilo boŋo me pyer kun alubo lok ma Rwot otitta-ni, ci aruko i pyera." 
Jeremiah13:3 Lok pa Rwot dok obino bota tyen me aryone ma wacci," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Kwany boŋo me pyer ma nene iwilo iruko i pyeri-ni, ci ia icit i dog kulu Euprate, ci icikan woko kunnu i kin got mubar.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 An aa acito ci akano woko i ŋet kulu Euprate kit macalo Rwot ocika kwede. 
Jeremiah13:6 I ŋe nino mapol Rwot dok owacca ni, “A malo icit wa i kulu Euprate ci ikwany boŋo me aruka ma yam aciki ni icikan kunnu-ni.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Cutcut aa acito i kulu Euprate ci akwinyo ŋom, ci akwanyo boŋo aruka me pyer ki i kabedo ka ma yam onoŋo akano iye-ni. Ento anoŋo ni boŋo ca doŋ oballe woko, pe dok ber pi gin mo." 
Jeremiah13:8 Lacen Rwot dok pud oloko bota aye. En oloko bota kuman ni," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Man aye kit macalo abityeko kwede wakke pa Juda ki wakke madit ma Jerucalem tye kwede. 
Jeremiah13:10 Lwak magi marac ma gukwero winyo lokka, ma gumiyo ŋutgi obedo nwaŋ gulubo gigi gin ma cwinygi mito, ma gubedo ki lubaŋa mukene kun gitiyo botgi, gibibedo calo boŋo pyer man ma pe doŋ ber me aruka." 
Jeremiah13:11 Kit macalo boŋo me atweya i pyer moko kwede i kom dano, kumeno bene aketo jo me ot pa Icrael ki jo me ot pa Juda aridogi woko i koma matek likiŋ, wek gubed lwak ma gibikelo nyiŋ maber bota, ma gibimiyo dano gipaka dok gimiya deyo, ento gin onoŋo pe gitwero winyo lok wacel.” Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah13:12 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Jeremia, in itit lok man bot jo Icrael ni, ‘Rwot Lubaŋa me mony owaco kuman ni, “Agulu acel acel bipoŋ woko ki koŋo vino.” Gibiwaco botwu ni, ‘Pe wamito waŋe ni agulu acel acel bipoŋ wo ko ki koŋo vino’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Ci lacen in ibiwaco botgi ni, ‘Nen, abipiko jo ducu ma gibedo i lobo man ki koŋo vino ci gidoko lumero, luker ma gibedo i wi komker pa Daudi, ajwagi, lunebi kacel ki jo ducu ma gibedo i Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah13:14 Abicanyo ŋat man ki lawote, wego ki litinogi kacel, man Rwot ma owaco, Pe abiparo pigi, pe abiweko gibedo kwo, kadi wa kica bene pe bimaka i komgi, wek pe atyekgi woko.’ ”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Wuter itwu, wuwiny; pe myero wubed ki wakke, pien Rwot doŋ otyeko loko." 
Jeremiah13:16 Wumi deyo bot Rwot Lubaŋawu ma pud peya okelo colpiny, ma pud tyenwu pe ogwaŋŋe i wi godi ma piny ribiribi; ma pud peya noŋo olokke odoko mutu macol licuc, en leŋpiny ma onoŋo wutye ka genone-ni." 
Jeremiah13:17 Ka ce pe wubiwinyo, ci abikok laliŋliŋ i muŋ pi wakkewu: abikok matek noŋo pig waŋa mol cito piny lipyaa, pienjo pa Rwot doŋ giterogi woko macalo opii." 
Jeremiah13:18 Rwor owaco bot Jeremia ni, “Tit bot kabaka gin ki minne ni gua ki i komkergi gubin woko i kabedo mapiny, pien lalukanagi maber twatwal doŋ opoto woko piny ki i wigi.”" 
Jeremiah13:19 Gaŋi me Negeb ducu doŋ gilorogi woko, pe tye ŋat mo ma myero oyabgi, Jo Juda ducu doŋ giterogi woko i lobo ma pe megi, gin ducu doŋ giterogi woko i opii." 
Jeremiah13:20 “Wun jo Jerucalem wunen! Lukworwu tye ka bino kun gia ki i lo bo ma tye yo tun acam! Jo ma miyogi i ciŋwu ni wugwokgini gitye kwene, danowu macalo lwak romi ki dyegi ma gibeco adada-ni?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Ibiwaco gin aŋo ka jo ma yam in kikomi aye ipwonyogi ni wek gubed luremi, aye giketogi me lovi? Arem matek pe biketo komi woko, calo arem pa dako ma tye ka nywal?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Doŋ ka ce ipenyo ni piŋo gin ma kit man obino i komi, piŋo boŋo ma i pyeri bene giyeco woko, dok ginywari kwede-gu; man otimme pien onoŋo balli doŋ rac ma okato kare." 
Jeremiah13:23 Laetiopia mo tika twero loko rani me del kome, nyo kwac bene twero kwanye rani ma i kome ma obedo kwicikwicini woko? Ka tye kit meno, wun ma wuniyo ki timo gin marac keken-ni, wutwero pwonnye me tiyo gin ma tye atir." 
Jeremiah13:24 Abikeyowu woko calo cuŋ kal ma yamo kodo ki i tim aroo ci tero woko. 
Jeremiah13:25 Man aye gin ma gipokki, dul ma doŋ atyeko pimone woko piri, man Rwot ma owaco, pien wii doŋ otyeko wil woko i koma ibedo ka geno lok goba keken." 
Jeremiah13:26 An Rwot kikoma aye ma abiwalo boŋoni woko ki i pyeri aumo ki waŋi, miyo lewicci nen woko ka maleŋ," 
Jeremiah13:27 Doŋ atyeko neno gin me kwer ma itimo, tim me abor ki mito tigoni, ki tim malayani marac adada, ma ibedo ka timone i wi cere i dye tim. Can i wiwu, wun jo Jerucalem! Gin man bitero kare ma rom mene ma noŋo pud peya gilonyowu wudoko leŋ?”" 
Jeremiah14:1 Rwot owaco bot Jeremia pi two pii ma okemo Juda woko ni," 
Jeremiah14:2 “Juda tye ka kumo gaŋine bene tye ka to woko. Jo Juda ducu gibuto piny ki twon cwercwiny mo ma pe wacce; ma noŋo jo Jerucalem gitye ka kok matek adada pi kony. 
Jeremiah14:3 Luditogi me awora gicwalo luticgi ka twomo pii; gicito i waŋ taŋi me pii, emo pe ginoŋo, gidwogo ki gin latwom piigi ma noŋo iye noŋo. Lewic makogi dok bene alee twodogi woko ci giumo wigi woko." 
Jeremiah14:4 Pien lobo doŋ oballe woko, kit macalo kot doŋ pe obedo ka cwer i lobo-ni, lewic omako lupur mada ma noŋo cwinygi cwer ma giumo wigi auma." 
Jeremiah14:5 Kadi bed wa megi til ma tye i tim bene no no gubwoto litinogi ma gunywalo woko pien lum mo ma myero gucam pe. 
Jeremiah14:6 Kana me tim-gu gicuŋ i wi cere matar atara ligwek, ginamo doggi malac me yweyo calo too; waŋgi olwal woko pien onoŋo pe tye lum mo ma myero gucam." 
Jeremiah14:7 “Kadi bed ka ce balwa dotowa, ai Rwot konywa kit macalo yam iciko. Wabedo ka lokke wabwoti woko tyen mapol; watyeko bene timo bal-gu i komi." 
Jeremiah14:8 In “keken aye ŋat ma jo Icrael gigeno, in aye ma ilarowa i kare ma noŋo watye i can. Piŋo ibedo macalo larok i lobowa, dok macalo lawot ma yenyo kabuto?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Piŋo ibedo macalo dano ma wiye onyobbe woko ma pe ŋeyo gin ma myero etim, calo ŋat mo ma en oteka ma pe twero laro dano ki i mony? Ento adada in Rwot it ye kwedwa, dok waŋ bene gilwonowa ki nyiŋi; pi meno pe ibwotwa woko.”" 
Jeremiah14:10 Rwot owaco kuman i komjone ni, “Yam gumaro wot atata kit meno, pe gujuko tyengi ka wot; pi meno omiyo Rwot pe gamogi. Kombeddi doŋ en bipo i kom bal megi ci biketo can i komgi pi balgi.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Rwot owaco bota ni, “Pe myero ilega ni an akony lwak man." 
Jeremiah14:12 Kadi bed giri kec, pe abiwinyo koko ma gikok kwede bota pi kony, dok kadi bed gutyer gitum awaŋa ki gityer me moko kwoŋ, pe abigamogi; ento abinekogi atyekogi woko liweŋ ki pala lucwan, ki kec malit mupoto i lobo, wa ki two gemo-gu.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Dok awacci, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, nen lunebi onoŋo doŋ gutyeko tito bot lwak man woko ni, ‘Pe gibinekowu ki pala lucwan, dok bene kec mo pe bipoto i lobowu, ento Rwot bimiyo botwu kuc me ada ma bedo nakanaka i kabedo man.’’’" 
Jeremiah14:14 Ento Rwot odokka iye owacca ni, “Lunebi gitye ka tito lok goba keken ki nyiŋa; an pe acwalogi, pe acikogi, dok bene pe bene pe aloko kwedgi. Gitye ka tito botwu ginanyuta me goba ki tyeto tyet ma konnye pe, kun gibwolo dano abwola ki tam ma gutamo pigi kengi," 
Jeremiah14:15 Pi meno an Rwot awaco kuman lok i kom lunebi ma gitito lok i nyina kadi bed an aye pe acwalogi, ma giwacci, ‘Pala lucwan ki kec madit pe bibino i kom lobo man wacel,’ awaco ni, Lunebi magi gibine-kogi ki pala lucwan kacel ki kec." 
Jeremiah14:16 Jo ma gin gubedo ka tito lok botgi bene gibibologi woko i dye yo me Jerucalem, ma noŋo ginekogi ki pala lucwan kacel ki kec; ŋat mo pe ma biyikogi. Man bitimme i komgi ducu, i kom mongi, litino awobegi, ki anyiragi bene, pien abimiyo gineno can pi tim maracogi." 
Jeremiah14:17 “In ibiwaco botgi lok man ni, ‘Wek pig’ waŋa omol ocit piny I kora lipyaa dyeceŋ ki dyewor benebene; wek pig waŋa pe ojwik woko, pien jona gityeko goyogi woko ki twon bur madit adada, ma giketo ret woko i komgi marac atika." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ka ce acito woko i tim, nen, anoŋo jo ma ginekogi ki pala lucwan dwoŋ ata! Dok ka ce adonyo i gaŋ, aneno lwak dano mapatpat gitye ka two ki two me kec! Pien lunebi kacel ki ajwagi giwoto kun gitiyo ticgi i lobo, kun pe gitye ki ŋec mo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:19 In doŋ mono ikwero Juda woko matwal, Rwot? Cwinyi bene doŋ ocido woko i kom Cion bo? Piŋo doŋ ipwodowa kuman ma pe doŋ waromo can? Wabedo ka yenyo kuc, ento gin mo maber ma wanoŋo pe; i kare ma myero wacan iye wanoŋo gin ma kelo lworo keken." 
Jeremiah14:20 Ai Rwot, waŋ doŋ waneyo gin maraco ma wabedo ka timone, kadi wa bal pa kwarowa ducu waneyo, pien ada, waŋ wabalo i komi." 
Jeremiah14:21 Pe cwinyi ocid woko i komwa, pi dit me nyiŋi; dok bene pe ibal woro me komkerri ma nen me deyo-ni woko. Po piwa, pe itur gicikkeni woko kwedwa." 
Jeremiah14:22 Tika tye kit lubaŋa mo i kin lubaŋa me gobagoba me rok ducu ma twero miyo kot cwer? Nyo polo kono twero miyo kot mo ŋido i lobo? Pe in aye ma itiyo magi ducu, ai Rwot Lubaŋawa? Wan ducu wageno in, pien in aye ma itiyo jami magi ducu." 
Jeremiah15:1 Lacen Rwot owacca ni, “Kadi bed Moses ki Camuel gubedo ka Cuŋ i nyima kun gipido kweda, an kica pe bimaka i kom lwak man wacel. Wek gua ki i nyima gucit woko." 
Jeremiah15:2 Ka ce inen gupenyo ka kwene ma myero gicit iye, wuwac botgi ni an Rwot awaco botgi ni, “Jo mogo bito woko ki two gemo, meno en aye ka ma gibicito iye! Jo mukene gibito i lweny ginekogi woko ki pala lucwan, meno en aye ka ma gibicito iye! Jo mogo kec aye ma binekogi meno en aye ka ma gibicito iye! Ki jo mogo gibimakogi giterogi woko macalo opii, meno en aye ka ma gibicito iye!" 
Jeremiah15:3 An Rwot, dok atyeko moko kit jami aŋwen maraco ma bityekogi: gibinekogi woko liweŋ ki pala lucwan, gwogi biywayo komgi muto-ni bedo me acamagi, winyo bene gibicamo komgi; ki lee mager me tim doŋ gibimwodogi gityekogi woko liweŋ," 
Jeremiah15:4 Dok abimiyo gibedo gin ma miyo ker me lobo ducu gibedo ki lworo, pi gin ma Manace wod pa Kejekia kabaka me Juda yam otimo i Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah15:5 “Aŋa ma kica bimako i komwu, wun jo Jerucalem, nyo aŋa kono ma bikumo piwu? Aŋa ma koŋ bilokke cuŋ pi kare malac pi penyo kit macalo wun wutye kwede?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Wun doŋ wutyeko kwera woko, man Rwot ma owaco, wumedde wubedo ka dok cen kare ducu. Pi meno aye mumiyo aryeyo ciŋa i komwu ci anekowu atyekowu woko; doŋ aol woko ki timo kica botwu," 
Jeremiah15:7 I gaŋi ducu ma i lobowu, abedo ka pyetowu ki oderona. Anekowu atyekowu woko, wun jona, pien pe wumedo ki lokke wuweko timo timwu marac-ci." 
Jeremiah15:8 Anyayo wel-mon-togi doŋ odoko dwoŋ makato kweyo me dog nam woko. Aneko awobewu woko ma komgi pud tek, dok amiyo megigi gubedo ki can ki arem malit adada. Amiyo bene remcwiny ki lworo madwoŋ opoto i komgi oyotoyot laboŋo galle." 
Jeremiah15:9 Dako ma onoŋo onywalo litinone abiro kulu cwinye odem woko; otemo yweyo ci pe romo ywe kadi matidi mo. Dyeceŋ ma en tye iye olokke odoko colpiny; obedo ki lewic ma noŋo cwinye opoŋ woko ki can. Doŋ jo megi mukene ma gudoŋ, abimiyo lukworgi nekogi woko ki pala lucwan, man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah15:10 Can i wiya! Piŋo maa onywala? Oweko alwenyo, nyo ada dok apyemo ki jo ducu ma i lobo. An cen pe amiyo limma me konyo ŋatti, kun amito magoba iye, dok bene nene pe adeno lim ki bot ŋat mo; ento inoŋo ni dano acel acel tye ka loko lok me cena woko acena." 
Jeremiah15:11 Ai Rwot, mi lok ma giloko kun gicena kwede-ni obed kumeno ka ce nene pe atiyo gin ma tye atir i nyimi, dok ka ce nene pe apido kwedi lok wa i kom lukworra i kare ma onoŋo gitye i can dok ki cwercwiny mukato kare." 
Jeremiah15:12 Dano twero turo nyonyo, nyonyo ma gikelo ki i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam kacel ki mola?" 
Jeremiah15:13 “Lonyowu kacel ki limwu ma yam wukano abimiyo giyako woko laboŋo wel, pi balwu ducu ma doŋ wutyeko timo ma oromo i lobowu-ni woko liweŋ," 
Jeremiah15:14 Abimiyo wubedo opii pa lumerokwu kun wutiyo tic botgi i lobo ma pe wuŋeyo, pien mac doŋ olyel ki i kinigana ma bibedo ka waŋ nakanaka.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Mumiyo Jeremia owacci, “Ai Rwot, in iniaŋ dok iŋeyo, Po pira dok ikonya, dok bene myero icul kwor i kom jo ma mito neka woko-ni. Pe myero idi cwinyi i kom jo ma gimito neka woko; myero iŋe bene ni piri omiyo atye ka ciro lok me cac matek." 
Jeremiah15:16 Ka yam lokki obino bota, ci acamo ki cwinya matek, lokki olokke odoko gin me yomcwiny bota, dok obedo gin ma yomo cwinya adada; pien an doŋ gilwoŋa a ki nyiŋi, ai Rwot Lubaŋa me mony." 
Jeremiah15:17 Yam pe abedo kacel ki jo ma nyero nyero ata pi noŋo yomcwiny me lobo-ni, an kikoma gira cwinya pe obedo yom wacel. Pi tic ma onoŋo in imiya, abedo kena, dok kinigani oketo koma woko." 
Jeremiah15:18 Piŋo mono aremma pe gik, ma burra bene doŋ odoko gin ma pe can, okwero gire Caŋ woko? In imito ilokke ibed bota calo kulu ma bwolo dano abwola, calo pii ma two woko-ni?”" 
Jeremiah15:19 Pi meno Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Ka ilokke idwogo bota, ci abigami doki, ci ibicuŋ i nyima kare ducu. Ka ce ibedo ka loko lok maber ma konnye tye, ma pe iloko gin mo ma konnye pe, abiloko in doŋ ibedo ma ka doga. Dano gibilokke gidwogo boti, ento in pe ibilokke idok botgi." 
Jeremiah15:20 Doŋ abiketo in ibedo bot lwak man macalo cel gogo me mola ma girumo maber; gin jo-nu gibilwenyo i komi, ento pe gibiloyi ki lweny, pien an atye kwedi abikoki dok abilari, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah15:21 Abilari woko ki i ciŋ jo maraco, dok abikoki woko ki i ciŋ jo ma tye laboŋo kica.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Rwot dok oloko bota owacci," 
Jeremiah16:2 “In pe ibinyomo dako mo, dok pe ibibedo ki litino awobe nyo kadi ki litino anyira i kabedo man." 
Jeremiah16:3 Pien Rwot owaco lok kuman i kom awobe ki anyira ma ginywalogi i kabedo-ni, dok bene oloko i kom mego ki wego ma gunywalo litino magi i kabedo man ni," 
Jeremiah16:4 Two maraco atika binekogi woko. Dano pe bikok pigi, dok bene pe gibiyikogi, ento gibibedo macalo cet dyaŋ muket ata i ŋom; Gibinekogi woko ki pala lucwan, ki kec bene binekogi woko, doŋ komgi muto-ni bidoko cam pa winyo ki lee me tim.”" 
Jeremiah16:5 Rwot dok owaco kuman ni, “Pe myero idony i ot ka ma dano tye iye ka kumo, pe myero icit ka koko nyo ka kumo pigi; pien doŋ atyeko kwanyo kucca woko ki bot lwak man, man Rwot ma owaco, kadi wa mar mera ma pe lokke ki kicana bene." 
Jeremiah16:6 Jo mulony kacel ki lucan gibito i lobo man, ento ŋat mo pe ma biyikogi nyo ma bikok pigi. Ŋat mo bene pe biŋolo kome kekene kun lyelo yer wiye woko pi nyuto can ma tye i cwinye." 
Jeremiah16:7 Pe tye ŋat mo ma binywako cam kacel ki dano ma tye ki kumo, wek okwe cwinye pi dano muto ca. Dano mo bene pe bimiyo ginamata mo ma nyuto cwiny me kica bot ŋat ma wonne nyo minne oto." 
Jeremiah16:8 Pe myero idony i ot ka ma dano tye ka camo iye karama, me bedo kwedgi kunnu ka cam ki ka mat." 
Jeremiah16:9 Rwot me mony ma en Lubaŋa me Icrael owaco kuman ni, Nen, i kabedo man en aye abijuko iye woo me yomcwiny woko matwal ki i waŋwu ma wun bene wuneno, ki i karewu, dwan me oree ki me yomcwiny, dwan lanyom kacel ki dwan nyako ger." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Ka doŋ itito lok magi ki lwak man, ce gupenyi ni, ‘Piŋo Rwot kono otimo gin marac macalo man i komwa? Wabalo aŋo? Kit bal aŋo ma waŋ watimo i kom Rwot Lubaŋawa?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 ci in ibitito botgi ni, ‘Kwarowu yam gubwota woko, man lok ma Rwot owaco, dok gubedo ka lubo kor lubaŋa mogo mukene, gutiyo botgi, gubedo ka worogi bene. Gubwota woko dok bene pe gugwoko cikka." 
Jeremiah16:12 Ento wun aye doŋ wutiyo gin marac atika ma kato gin ma yam kwarowu gutimo. Wun ducu wubedo jo ma ŋutwu nwaŋ ki ma kitwu rac, wukwero winyo lokka woko." 
Jeremiah16:13 Pi meno abikwanyowu woko ki i lobo man abolowu woko i lobo mukene ma yam wun nyo kadi kwarowu pe guŋeyo. Doŋ ka wutye kunnu en aye wubibedo ka woro lubaŋa mukene-gu dyeceŋ ki dyewor benebene, pe doŋ abinyuto botwu kicana wacel.’" 
Jeremiah16:14 “Pi meno wunen, kare tye ka bino, man Rwot ma owaco, ma pe dok ŋat mo biwaco ni, ‘Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, ma en aye okwanyo waŋ jo Icrael okelowa woko ki i lobo Ejipt,’" 
Jeremiah16:15 ento wubiwacci, ‘Macalo Rwot tye kwo-ni, ma okelo jo Icrael woko ki i lobo ma yo tuŋ acam, dok ki i lobo ducu ka ma yam en oryemogi gucito iye.’ Pien abikwanyogi adwokogi cen i lobogi kikome ma yam amiyo bot kwarogi." 
Jeremiah16:16 “Nen, atye ka cwalo dano mapol, man Rwot ma owaco, ma gibimakogi macalo gimako rec; lacen dok abicwalo jo ma gin ludwar mapol, ma gibidwarogi ki i wi godi-gu ducu kadi ki i wi cere-gu, kadi wa ki i kin got mubar." 
Jeremiah16:17 Pien aciko waŋa atye ka neno kitgi ducu; gin pe gukanne ki bota wacel, dok balgi mo ma tye macalo muŋ ma gikano woko ki tuŋ bota pe tye." 
Jeremiah16:18 Abiculo waŋ balgi ki bal ma gutimo kiryo, pien gupyedo lobona woko ki cal jogigi ma rom ki kom jo muto-gu, doŋ gupoŋo gipinnya ki timo gin me kwer keken.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Ai Rwot, in i tek mera ki cel gogona matek ka ma ariŋo alaro iye i kare me can, rok ducu gibia gibino boti, kun gia ki i agikki lobo, ma giwacci, “Kwarowa yam guleyo gin ma tere pe, lok goba keken, guleyo jami ma konygi pe ma pe gunoŋo iye magoba mo." 
Jeremiah16:20 Dano twero tiyo lwak lubaŋa pire kene? Kit gin macalo meno pe lubaŋa wacel.” 
Jeremiah16:21 “Pi meno, abimiyo giŋeyo, abimiyo giŋeyo twerona ki tekona kicel keken, ci doŋ gibiŋeyo ni an nyina Rwot.”" 
Jeremiah17:1 Rwot owacci, “Wun jo Juda, balwu doŋ gicoyo woko ki kalam nyonyo, gigoro woko bene i cwinywu ki kidi dayaman ma lake bit, ki i kom ten keno aŋwen ma tye i kom keno tyerwu," 
Jeremiah17:2 en ma miyo litinowu po i kom keno tyerwu ki i kom cal Acera ma jok ma dako ma wucibo i ŋet yadi ducu ma potgi oluk, i wi cere mabocogu," 
Jeremiah17:3 ki i wi godi ducu ma tye i dye tim. Lonyowu kacel ki limwu ma yam wukano abimiyo giyako woko, pi balwu ducu ma doŋ wutyeko timo ma oromo i lobowu-ni woko liweŋ." 
Jeremiah17:4 Wubikwanyo ciŋwu woko ki i kom gipiny ma yam amiyo botwu, abimiyo wubedo opii pa lumerokwu kun wutiyo tic botgi i lobo ma pe wuŋeyo, pien mac doŋ olyel ki i kinigana ma bibedo ka waŋ nakanaka.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Ŋat ma keto genne i kom dano giceno woko, ma keto genne i kom kero pa dano, ŋat ma loko cwinye woko ki i kom Rwot." 
Jeremiah17:6 En bedo calo yat ma i dye tim aroo, ma pe bineno gin mo maber ka bino. En bibedo mere i kabedo mutwo mubedo kado kado ma gir, mo pe doŋo iye, i kabedo ka ma dano pe bedo iye." 
Jeremiah17:7 “Dano ma geno Rwot tye ki gum, ma genne ducu ocuŋ i kom Rwot." 
Jeremiah17:8 En bedo calo yat ma gipito i ŋet kulu, ma cwalo lwite donyo woko piny wa i laora kulu. Ka i kare me lyeto ma piny otwo en pe lworo gin mo, pien pote bedo madyak kumeno, dok bene i mwaka ma cen ryeny teretere ma pii pe en pe paro gin mo, dok pe giko nyako nyige.”" 
Jeremiah17:9 Cwiny dano en aye gin ma bwolo dano ma kato gin mukene-gu ducu, opoŋ ki gin marac adada; aŋa ma twero niaŋ iye?" 
Jeremiah17:10 “An Rwot aŋiyo tam pa dano dok bene atemo cwiny dano, wek ami bot dano acel acel gin ma lubo kite, dok ma lu bo kit gin ma en otiyo.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Macalo ayweri ma coko litino i te bwome ma en kikome pe otoko, ŋat ma noŋo lonyo i yo ma pe atir bene tye kit meno; ka doŋ oteggi inoŋo ni lonyone rwenyo woko, i agikkine en gire doko lamiŋ." 
Jeremiah17:12 Kabedowa maleŋ me woro Lubaŋa nen calo kom me deyo adada, ma ocuŋ malo i wi got nia i acakkine." 
Jeremiah17:13 Ai Rwot, gen pa jo Icrael ducu tye i komi, jo ducu ma gibwoti woko lewic bimakogi matek; jo ma gilokke giweki woko gibirwenyo woko calo nyiŋ ma gicoyo i apwa, pien gin doŋ gutyeko bwoto Rwot woko, ma en aye waŋ it me pii me kwo. Jeremia okok bot Rwot" 
Jeremiah17:14 Caŋa, ai Rwot, ci abicaŋ woko maber; lara, ci bene abilarre; pien an apako in kare ducu." 
Jeremiah17:15 Nen, giwaco bota ni, “Lok pa Rwot tye kwene? wek lokke obin!”" 
Jeremiah17:16 An pe adiyo in ni myero icwal gin marac, dok bene an pe amito nino me can amita, meno in iŋeyo; gin ma oa ki i doga ducu ma aloko, aloko atyer ka waŋi." 
Jeremiah17:17 Pe ibed gin ma kelo lworo bota; in i kalarrena i kare ma noŋo piny rac. 
Jeremiah17:18 Wek lewic omak jo ma giketo ayela i koma, ento pe iwek lewic omaka; wek cwinygi aye oballe woko, ento in pe’ iwek meri cwinya oballe; mi kare ma gin marac myero opot kwede i komgi; tyekgi woko licwic ki nek ma iketo i komgi kiryo!" 
Jeremiah17:19 Rwot owaco bota kuman ni, “Cit icuŋ i dogcel pa Benjamin, en aye ka ma luker me Juda gidonyo kwede i i gaŋ dok bene yo ma gikato kwede woko; cuŋ bene i dogcel ducu me Jerucalem," 
Jeremiah17:20 ci iwac botgi ni, ‘Wuwiny lok pa Rwot, wun luker me Juda, ki jo Juda ducu, ki jo ducu ma gibedo i Jerucalem, ma gidonyo ki i dog gaŋi magi." 
Jeremiah17:21 Rwot owaco kuman ni, Ka wumaro kwo myero pe wutiŋ ter i ceŋ cabit; dok pe myero wukel gin mo kun wuwok ki i dog gaŋi ducu me Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah17:22 Dok bene pe myero wutin ter ki i otwu i ceŋ cabit, dok pe wuti tic mo, ento myero wukwer nino me cabit obed maleŋ kit macalo yam aciko ki kwarowu." 
Jeremiah17:23 Ento kwarowu yam pe guwinyo, gujiijo nutgi obedo matek, pe guciko itgi ka winyo lokka, wek pe guwiny dok gugam pwony ma mera." 
Jeremiah17:24 “‘Ento ka wuwinyo lokka, man Rwot ma owaco, ma pe wukelo ter mo ki i dogcel ducu me gaŋ man i ceŋ cabit, ento kun wukwero ceŋ cabit bedo nino maleŋ ma pe wutiyo tic mo i nino meno," 
Jeremiah17:25 doŋ lukerwu ki rwodiwu bidonyo ki i dogcel me Jerucalem ma gibedo i wi komker pa Daudi. Gin ki rwodigi ducu kacel ki jo Juda ki jo Jerucalem, gibiriŋo ki gadigadi ki aguragura, doŋ meno bimiyo gaŋ me Jerucalem bipoŋ ki lwak dano mapol matwal." 
Jeremiah17:26 Dano gibia gibino ki i gaŋi me Juda ki i gaŋi matitino ma i ŋet Jerucalem; gibibino ki i lobo pa Benjamin, ki i lobo me Cepela, ki i lobo ma obedo godigodi, dok bene gibia gibino ki i Negeb, kun gikelo gityer me gitum awaŋa, gityer me moko kwoŋ, ki odok luban, dok gikelo gityer me pwoc bene i ot pa Rwot." 
Jeremiah17:27 Ento ka wun pe wuwinyo lokka me kwero ceŋ cabit wek obed maleŋ, dok ni pe wutiŋ ter mo wudony kwede ki i dogcel me Jerucalem i ceŋ cabit, ci abimiyo mac lyel i dogcelle ducu biwaŋo odi madoŋo me Jerucalerri woko ducu ma macce pe doŋ gibiromo nekone matwal.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Rwot owacca ni," 
Jeremiah18:2 “A malo icit i ot pa lwacwe agulu, ci abimiyo iwinyo lokka ki kunnu.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Ci aa acito i ot pa lacwe agulu, ci anoŋo en tye ka cweyo agulune i kom lawala." 
Jeremiah18:4 Ci lobo agulu ma onoŋo lacwe agulu tye ka cweyone-ni oballe woko ki i cine, ci en oloko woko otiyo kwede gin mukene mapat kit macalo en lacwe agulu oneno ni ber bote me atima." 
Jeremiah18:5 Rwot dok owaco bota ni," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Wun jo me ot pa Icrael, pe atwero tiyo i komwu gin ma lacwe agulu otiyo-ni? Man Rwot ma owaco. Nen, wun jo Icrael bene wutye i ciŋa macalo lo bo ma tye i cin lacwe agulu." 
Jeremiah18:7 Ka ce i kare mo awaco pi rok mo ni abiputo dok aturo woko ci abityeko woko," 
Jeremiah18:8 ka ce doŋ rok meno ma aloko pire-ni olokke oweko timo gin marac, ci abinut pi gin marac ma onoŋo atamo ni atimo i kome ca," 
Jeremiah18:9 Dok bene ka ce onoŋo awacci abipito nyo agero rok nyo ker mo-ni," 
Jeremiah18:10 ce rok meno okwero winyo doga olokke ka timo gin marac, ci abiloko tamma i kom gin maber ma onoŋo awaco ni abitimo botgi-ni." 
Jeremiah18:11 Kombeddi doŋ itit bot jo Juda ki jo ma bedo i Jerucalem ni, ‘Rwot owaco kuman ni, Nen, atye ki yub marac piwu dok ayubbe me keto can i komwu. Wulokke wudwog cen, ŋat acel acel owek kit marac woko, dok oyub kite kun tiyo gin ma tye atir.’" 
Jeremiah18:12 “Ento gin gigamo ni, ‘Lokke pe konyo! Wabilubo yub ma waŋ kikomwa aye wayubo, ki ŋat acel acel bene bitiyo gin ducu ma oporo rac cwinye ma nwan-ni.’" 
Jeremiah18:13 “Mumiyo Rwot owaco kuman ni, Ka imito koŋ ipeny i kin lurok, aŋa ma yam owinyo lok mo ma cal ki man? Jo Icrael ma amaro doŋ gutimo gin marac adada." 
Jeremiah18:14 Pee me Lebanon mo no twero weko lacol got me Cirion? Kulu ma piine nie ma mol a ki i wi godi twero two woko liweŋ? 
Jeremiah18:15 Ento jona doŋ wigi otyeko wil woko i koma; gibedo ka wano odok eceta bot cal lubaŋa-gu; gubedo ka yokke atata i kit me wot megi, pe gulubo yo macon, dok bene guwoto ki i yo mogo ma wok ki cen, pe guwoto ki i yo gudo," 
Jeremiah18:16 ma guloko lobogi odoko gin ma miyo lworo bot dano, ma bibedo gin ma gijwat pire kun gicayo nakanaka. Jo ducu ma gibikato ki i ka ŋete gibibedo ki ur madit twatwal kun giyeno wigi." 
Jeremiah18:17 Abikeyo jona woko i nyim lukworgi, calo apwa ma yamo wokceŋ tye ka tinone. Abiloko neya woko botgi; pe abikonyogi ka can opoto komgi.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Lacen lwak guwacci, “Wubin wapiru lok i kom Jeremia! Kare ducu wabibedo ki ajwagi ma giromo pwonyowa, ki luryeko bene ma gibibedo ka miyo botwa tam, dok wabibedo ki lunebi ma gimedde anyim ki tito lok pa Lubaŋa, Wubin, wek wakelu lok me pido i kome, doŋ bene wagiku keto cwinywa i lok ducu ma en owaco-gu.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Pi meno Jeremia olego Lubaŋa, kun wacci, “Rwot, winy lok ma atye ka wacone-ni, ki dok bene iwiny lok ma lukworra gitye ka lokone i koma." 
Jeremiah18:20 Gin marac mono aye giculo ki ŋat ma timo gin maber? Doŋ gutyeko kwinyo bur woko ni myero apot iye. Koŋ ipo kit macalo abino kwede i nyimi kun apido pigi ma aloko lok maber, wek ikwany akemoni woko ki i komgi." 
Jeremiah18:21 Pi meno doŋ imi kec onek litinogi otyekgi woko; dok bene wek ginekgi woko i lweny ki pala lucwan. Wek mongi gudoŋ laboŋo litino dok bene gudok mon-to. Wek two gemo aye onek coggi otyekgi woko, ki awobegi bene myero ginekgi woko i mony ki pala lucwan." 
Jeremiah18:22 Cwal dul mony atura me yako gaŋigi woko, wek guwo ki koko ma kelo lworo. Doŋ gutyeko kwinyo bur woko wek apot iye, dok guciko owic woko wek amok iye." 
Jeremiah18:23 Ento in, ai Rwot, iŋeyo kit macalo gipiro kwede lok i koma wek gineka woko. Pe itimgi ki ca pi gin marac ma gitimo, pe bene ijwa balgi woko matwal ki i nyimi. Wek gibed ka loyogi kumeno i nyimi; ti kwedgi i kare ma noŋo kiniga omaki.”" 
Jeremiah19:1 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Cit iciwil abino ma lacwe agulu ocweyo, kwany ludoŋo pa lwak ki ajwagi ma guteggi ma doŋ guri i dog tic icit kwedgi," 
Jeremiah19:2 ci wucit wukat woko wa i nota pa wod pa Kinom, kun wudonyo ki i dogcel me Labaltak, ci icitit lok ma awaco boti-ni ducu ki kunnu." 
Jeremiah19:3 Ibiwacci, ‘Wuwiny lok pa Rwot, wun luker me Juda ki jo ma bedo i Jerucalem. Rwot me mony ma en Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco kuman ni, Nen, atye ka kelo gin marac twatwal i kom kabedo man, mi yo dano ducu ma gibiwinyo pire itgi bibedo ka wo awoya liwaŋ waŋ." 
Jeremiah19:4 Abitimo gin ma kit man pien dano gutyeko bwota woko, dok bene gubalo kabedo man woko, kun giwaŋo iye odok eceta bot lwak lubaŋa mukene ma gin kikomgi nyo kwarogi kadi ki luker me Juda onoŋo yam pe guŋeyo. Gupoŋo kabedo man woko ki remo pa jo ma gipe ki bal," 
Jeremiah19:5 dok bene gugero waŋ jogi pi jok Baal ka ma giwaŋo iye awobegi ki mac macalo gitum awaŋa bot jok Baa!. Meno gin ma yam pe awaco ni gutim, pe acikogi pire, dok bene pe atamo pire wacel ni gutim." 
Jeremiah19:6 Pi meno, nen, kare tye ka bino, man Rwot ma owaco, i kare meno kabedo man doŋ pe gibilwoŋo ni Topet nyo nota pa wod pa Kinom, ento doŋ gibilwoŋo ni nota me Nek," 
Jeremiah19:7 I kabedo man en aye abibalo iye yub pa jo Juda ki jo Jerucalem woko, Abimiyo lukworgi giloyogi woko, ci ginekogi woko ki pala lucwan i lweny. Abimiyo komgi muto bedo cam pa winyo ki pa lee me tim," 
Jeremiah19:8 Abibalo gaŋ man woko marac twatwal wek dano ducu ma gikato ki ka ŋete gubed ki jwat ki ur madit pi gin marac ma doŋ otyeko timme-ni. 
Jeremiah19:9 Abimiyo jo ma gubedo kunnu gicamo kom litino awobegi ki litino anyiragi, ma ŋat acel acel bicamo riŋo kom lawote, i kare ma noŋo mony doŋ orumogi woko, ma doŋ gitye ka madin pi can ma jo ma mito nekogi woko gukelo i komgi.’" 
Jeremiah19:10 “I kare meno en aye ibineko kwede agulu i nyim jo meno ma giwoto kwedi-ni," 
Jeremiah19:11 ci ibiwaco botgi ni, ‘Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Abituro jo magi woko kit meno wa ki gaŋ man, calo ŋat ma neko agulu, miyo pe dok gitwero yu bone wek odwog kakare. Gibiyiko dano ducu i Topet pien kabedo mo mukene me yik doŋ bibedo pe," 
Jeremiah19:12 Meno aye gin ma abitiyo i kabedo man, man Rwot ma owaco, man bene gin ma abitimo i kom jo ma bedo iye, dok abimiyo gaŋ man lokke nen calo Topet." 
Jeremiah19:13 Lwak odi ducu ma i Jerucalem ki odi pa luker me Juda, ma gin odi ma yam gibedo ka wano odok eceta i wigi botmony me polo, ki on yo gityer amata-gu bot lubaŋa mukene, gibimiyo balle woko macalo kabedo me Topet.””" 
Jeremiah19:14 Lacen Jeremia oa ki i Topet ka ma onoŋo Rwot ocwale iye ka tito lokke, obino ci ocuŋ i dyekal me ot pa Rwot, ci owaco bot lwak ducu ma gitye kenyo ni," 
Jeremiah19:15 Rwot me mony, ma en Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco kuman ni, “Nen, atye ka kelo gin marac ma yam aloko pire i kom gaŋ man, aketo i kome ki i kom gaŋi matino ma gurumo ka ŋete, pien gumiyo nutgi odoko nwaŋ, kun gikwero kwede winyo lokka.”" 
Jeremiah20:1 I kare meno ajwaka Packur wod pa Imer, ma onoŋo en aye ladit ma loyo ot pa Rwot, owinyo ka Jeremia tito lok magi." 
Jeremiah20:2 Cutcut Packur otugi go yo lanebi Jeremia woko, ‘ci otweye ki okol ma tye i dogcel ma malo pa Benjamin me ot pa Rwot." 
Jeremiah20:3 Orwone Packur ogonyo Jeremia ki i okol, ci Jeremia owacce ni, “Rwot pe lwoŋo nyiŋi ni Packur, ento lwoŋi ni Lworo tye i kabedo ducu." 
Jeremiah20:4 Pien Rwot owaco kuman ni, Nerr, abimiyo ibedo gin ma kelo lworo i komi kekeni ki i kom luremi ducu. Lukworgi gibinekogi woko ki pala lucwan ka ma in bene inenogi, Abimiyo jo Juda woko ducu i cin kabaka me Babilon; en biterogi woko i opii i Babilon, ci en binekogi woko ki pala lucwan." 
Jeremiah20:5 Dok bene abimiyo lonyo ducu me gaŋ man kacel ki magobane, ki jami ducu ma pigi tego botgi ducu, ki kit lonyo mapatpat pa kabaka me Juda i cin lukworgi, ma biyako jamigi, kun gimakogi, ci giterogi woko i Babilon." 
Jeremiah20:6 Doŋ in Packur, kacel ki jo ma gibedo i odi, gibiterowu woko i opii i Babilon; ci doŋ wubito kunnu, gibiyikowu bene kunnu, in kacel ki luremi ma yam ibedo ka tito lok gobagoba botgi-ni.”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Ai Rwot, in doŋ ibwola, oweko bene gibwola. In i tek ikata woko, doŋ ityeko loya woko. Doŋ adoko ginanyera pa dano dyeceŋ jwi; dano ducu giŋala aŋala." 
Jeremiah20:8 Ka atye ka loko lok mo ci aloko ki dwan maloŋo kun adaŋŋe matek ni, “Tim bwami ki balle me lobe!” Gicaya dok ginywara kare ducu pien ni atito lok pa Rwot." 
Jeremiah20:9 Ka ce awacci, “Pe doŋ abilwoŋo nyiŋ Rwot, nyo ni pe doŋ abiloko lok mo ki nyiŋe matwal,” ci i cwinya kuca noŋo tye iye gin mo ma waŋ calo mac, ma tye okanne woko i cogona, doŋ aol woko ki juko doga wek pe aloki, pe doŋ atwero." 
Jeremiah20:10 Awinyo lwak tye ka lok lawewe. Gilwoŋa doŋ ni, “Gin ma kela lworo i kabedo ducu.” Giwacci, “Dote woko! Wek wadote woko!” Man lurema ma aŋiyo kwedgi aye giwaco; gitye ka neno kit macalo abipoto kwede i can. Dok giwacci, “Gwok nyo gibibwole abwola, ci wabimake woko, waculo waŋ kworwa i kome.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Ento in, Rwot, it ye kweda, in oteka lweny ma gilworo, pi meno jo ma giketo ayelayela i koma gibiyokke atata; pe gibiloya kadi matidi mo. Lewic bimakogi matek mada, pien pe doŋ gitwero loyo. Lewic ma bimakogi-ni bedo matwal, wi dano pe biromo wil i kome wacel." 
Jeremiah20:12 Ai Rwot me mony, in itemo dano me neno ka kitgi tye atir, iŋeyo gin ma tye i cwinygi ki gin ma gitamo. Pi meno wek anen ka iculo kwor i kom lukworra, pien an doŋ anyuto lokka woko ducu boti." 
Jeremiah20:13 Wuwer wer bot Rwot! Wupak Rwot! Pien otyeko laro kwo pa jo ma piny obwoyogi ki i ciŋ lutim maraco. 
Jeremiah20:14 Gicen nino ma cen ginywala iye-ni! En nino ma yam maa onywala iye, wek gum obed pe i kom nino meno!" 
Jeremiah20:15 Gicen dano ma okelo lok maber bot wora ni, “Inywalo latin laco,” omiyo obedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ." 
Jeremiah20:16 Wek dano-nu obed calo gaŋi ma Rwot ojwero woko laboŋo kica; wek owiny koko i odiko ki oduru ma gigoyo i cwiny dyeceŋ," 
Jeremiah20:17 pien pe oneka ki i i maa; kono ot nyodo pa maa doŋ olokke odoko macalo lyella, kono ot nyodo pa maa obedo pek matwal." 
Jeremiah20:18 Piŋo akatti kono ki i ic ka noŋo tic matek ki cwercwiny, dok ka tyeko ninona ducu ki lewic keken?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Man aye lok pa Rwot ma obino bot Jeremia i kare ma kabaka Jedekia ooro Packur wod pa Malkia ki ajwaka Jepania wod pa Maceya bot Jeremia kun wacci," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Lok bot Rwot piwa, pien Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon tye ka ero lweny i komwa. Gwok nyo Rwot bitiyo jami taŋone mogo piwa, ci bimiyo. Nebukadnejar jer dok cen ki ŋeye.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Ci Jeremia otito ki jo ma onoŋo gicwalo bote-ni 
Jeremiah21:4 ni gucitit bot Jedekia ni Rwot, ma en Lubaŋa pa Icrael, doŋ otyeko waco ni, “Abecito ka ryemo askari ma Jedekia tye ka tic kwedgi me lweny i kom kabaka me Babilon ki dul monnye, ma doŋ gitye ka rumo cel me gaŋ woko ducu-ni adwokogi cen. Abicoko jami lwenygi aduro woko i dye gaŋ," 
Jeremiah21:5 An kikoma aye doŋ abilwenyo i komwu ki tekona ducu, ki kiniga, ki akeca madit." 
Jeremiah21:6 Abineko jo ducu ma gibedo i gaŋ man, dano kacel ki lee, gin ducu two gemo marac adada biketogi woko." 
Jeremiah21:7 Lacen abimiyo Jedekia kabaka me Juda, ki luticce, ki jo ma gitye i gaŋ man ma gubwot ma two gemo pe onekogi, jo ma pe ginekogi ki lweny ki pala lucwan, ma kec madit pe onekogi, abimiyogi woko i cin Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon, cin lukworgi ma gimito nekogi woko. Nebukadnejar binekogi woko ducu ki pala lucwan; kadi wa kica bene pe bimako en i komgi, pe bene biparo pigi, dok pe biwekogi gibedo kwo. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Lacen Rwot dok ociko Jeremia me tito ki lwak ni, “Wuwiny, an Rwot am iyo botwu twero me yero yo ma tero dano i kwo nyo yo ma tero dano i to." 
Jeremiah21:9 Ŋat ma pud bedo i gaŋ man gibineko woko ki pala lucwan i lweny, nyo kec bineko, nyo two gemo bibino neko woko. Ento ŋat mo ma bia cito woko kun mine bot jo Babilon ma doŋ kombeddi gurumo gaŋ woko, en aye bibedo kwo dok kwone bibedo bote macalo mot me lweny." 
Jeremiah21:10 Doŋ amoko tamma woko pe me bwoto gaŋ man, ento doŋ ayubbe me balone woko, Gibimiyo i cin kabaka me Babilon, ci en biwaŋo woko ki mac ŋinyiŋinyi. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah21:11 “Wac bot jo me ot pa kabaka me Juda ni, ‘Wuwiny lok pa Rwot," 
Jeremiah21:12 wun jo me ot pa Daudi! Rwot owaco kuman ni, “‘Wuŋol kop atir piny ma ru ki piny ma ru, dok myero wular dano ki i ciŋ ŋat ma unogi kadi ki ŋat ma doŋ gityeko yako jamine woko, wek pe akemona okatti wokomacalo mac ma lyel, ma waŋo piny ma ŋat mo pe romo nekone, pi gin marac ma wubedo ka timone.’ ”" 
Jeremiah21:13 “Nen, atye ki lok i komwu, wun jo ma wubedo i nota, kadi ki in got ma it ye i dye bar, man Rwot ma owaco; wun ma wuwacci, ‘Aŋa kono ma bilor piny bino ka lweny i komwa?’ dok bene wuwaco ni, ‘Aŋa ma bidonyo i kabedo ka ma wabedo iye?’" 
Jeremiah21:14 Abiketo can i komwu kun lubo kit gin ma wutimo, man Rwot ma owaco; abimoko mac i buŋawu, ci awaŋo gin ducu ma orumo ŋete atyeko woko liweŋ.”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Cit bot jo me ot pa kabaka me Juda, ci iciwac lok man kunnu," 
Jeremiah22:2 ni, ‘Winy lok pa Rwot, in kabaka me Juda, ma ibedo i wi komker pa Daudi, in kacel ki luticci, ki lwakki ma gidonyo ki i dogcel ducu me gaŋ man." 
Jeremiah22:3 Rwot owaco kuman ni, Wutim gin ma tye kakare dok ma atir, wular dano ma gibedo ka unogi ki i ciŋ ŋat ma oyako jamigi. Pe wutim gin marac nyo tim aranyi i kom larok mo, i kom litino kic ki mon to, dok bene pe wunek dano mo ma pe ki bal i kabedo man." 
Jeremiah22:4 Ka ce wulubo gin ma an doŋ acikowu ni wulubi, ci likwayo pa Daudi gibimedde ki bedo luker. Gin kacel ki luditogi ki lwak, gibimedde ki donyo i dogcel ducu me gaŋ kal man kun giriŋo ki gadigadi kacel ki aguragura." 
Jeremiah22:5 Ento ka ce pe wulubo lokka, an doŋ akwoŋŋe ni nyiŋa kena botwu ni gaŋ kal man bidoko wi obur. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah22:6 Pien Rwot owaco lok ma okemo ot pa kabaka me Juda ni: “‘In ibedo calo lobo Gilead ki tuŋ bota, calo wi got Lebanon mabit, ento kadi bed kumeno abiloki idoko tim aroo, gaŋ ka ma dano pe bedo iye." 
Jeremiah22:7 Abiyubo lulweny ma gibilweny komwu, ŋat acel acel bimako jami lwennye; gibitoŋo yadi cedarwu mabeco-gu gireto woko piny, ci gicoko gibolo woko i mac." 
Jeremiah22:8 “‘Lacen lurok mapol gibikato ki i ŋet gaŋ man, kun dano acel acel biwaco bot lawote ni, “Piŋo Rwot otimo gin macalo man i kom gaŋ man madit-ti?”" 
Jeremiah22:9 Gibidok iye kun giwacci, “Pien onoŋo gubwoto gicikke pa Rwot Lubaŋagi woko, dok gubedo ka woro lwak lubaŋa mukene-gu kun gitiyo botgi bene.”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Pe ikok pi Yocia ma doŋ oto woko, dok bene cwinyi pe myero oton pire; ento kok pi ŋat ma doŋ a cito woko doŋ matwal, pien en doŋ pe bidwogo cen wacel me neno lobo ma yam ginywale iye." 
Jeremiah22:11 Pien Rwot owaco lok kuman mukemo Calum wod pa Yocia kabaka me Juda, ma obedo ka loc ma ka wonne Yocia, ma onoijo oa woko ki i kabedo man ocito gire woko ni, “En doŋ pe bidwogo cen kany matwal," 
Jeremiah22:12 ento en bito mere i kabedo ka ma gitere iye i opii, pe dok bineno lobo man tyen me aryo.”" 
Jeremiah22:13 “Can i wi dano ma gero ode ki kit tim ma pe atir, ma ogero kicika odine ma malo-gu ki ŋolo kop ma pe atir, ma miyo luwote tiyo tic bote noŋo laboŋo cul mo, dok bene pe culo mucaragi." 
Jeremiah22:14 Can i wi ŋat ma wacci, ‘Abigero ot madit pira kena kun aweko kicikane ma malo bedo malac twatwal.’ Ci en biketo waŋ dirica i ode, bipeto bao cedar i kicika me ot, ka dero woko ki rani makwar." 
Jeremiah22:15 Itamo ni man bimiyo in idoko kabaka, me gero odi ki yadi cedar odi mabeco ma gikato odi ma gigero ki yadi mukene woko-gu? Woru aye yam ocamo kuc me lobeni mada. Kare ducu en obedo dano ma genne dok ma ŋolo kop atir, omiyo gin ducu ma en obedo ka tiyone owoto maber." 
Jeremiah22:16 Obedo ka ŋolo pido pa lucan ki jo ma piny obwoyo maromrom, omiyo en obedo ki kwo maber. Man aye tyen lok me ŋeyo Rwot." 
Jeremiah22:17 Ento ibedo ka neno mitini kekeni keken; wek inoŋ lonyo pi uno dano; ineno jo ma gipe ki bal mo, dok bene itimo tim bwami me uno lwakki. Man Rwot ma owaco," 
Jeremiah22:18 Pi meno Rwot owaco lok not Yekoyakim wod pa Yocia kabaka me Juda ni, “Ŋat me pe bikumo pi tone, kun wacci, ‘Omera do!’ nyo ni, ‘Lamera do!’ Ŋat mo ma bikok pe, kun wacci, ‘Rwoda do!’ nyo ni, ‘Kabakana do!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 Gibiyiko ki kit yik ma giyiko kwede kana, gibipeyo gitero ci gibolo woko i ŋe cel me Jerucalem.”" 
Jeremiah22:20 “Wun jo Jerucalem, wucit i wi got Lebanon ci wucidaŋŋe kunnu, dok wucit i lobo Bacan ci wucikok kunnu; wulwoŋ lwoŋo matek ki i Abarim, pien jo ma nene wumarogi-ni ducu doŋ gityekogi woko." 
Jeremiah22:21 Aloko kwedwu i kare ma onoŋo wutye ki lonyo madwoŋ, ento wun giwu wukwero winyo lokka woko. Man aye kit gin ma wubedo ka timone cakke wa ka tinowu; pe wulubo gin ma abedo ka waco botwu wacel." 
Jeremiah22:22 Yamo bikodo ci tero lutelwu woko ducu, jo ma wumarogi-ni gibiterogiwoko i opii, lewic bimakowu dok alee bitwodowu pi gin maraco ducu ma doŋ wutyeko timone," 
Jeremiah22:23 Wun jo ma wubedo i Lebanon, wubedo laboŋo lworo mo i kin yadi cedar; ento ka arem me can opoto i komwu wubicur marac calo dako ma tye ka rem ki nywal!” ŋolo kop pa Yekonia" 
Jeremiah22:24 Rwot owacci, “Kit macalo atye kwo-ni, kadi bed in Yekonia wod pa Yekoyakim kabaka me Juda, ibedo agit me diyo ciŋ ma tye i ciŋa tuŋ lacuc, pud abicori woko aye," 
Jeremiah22:25 ci abimiyi i ciŋ jo ma gimito neki woko, i ciŋ jo ma ibedo ki lworo i komgi-ni, Abimiyi bene i ciŋ Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon kacel ki jo Kaldaya." 
Jeremiah22:26 Abiboli woko i lobo mukene kacel ki meni ma onywali, ka ma yam pe ginywali iye, ci ibito woko ki kunnu." 
Jeremiah22:27 Ento pe doŋ ibidwogo cen i lobo ma imito ni kono ineno ki waŋi-ni.” 
Jeremiah22:28 Jeremia owacci, “En Yekonia mono doŋ olokke odoko macalo agulu muto ma doŋ gikwanyo gibolo woko, ma ŋat mo doŋ pe mito? Piŋo kono gikwanyo en kacel ki litinone gibologi i lobo ma gin pe giŋeyo lok i kome?" 
Jeremiah22:29 “In lobo, in lobo we, in lobo! Winy lok ma Rwot doŋ owaco:" 
Jeremiah22:30 “Giŋolo koo woko i kom laco man ni latinne mo bibedo pe, en dano ma pe obedo ki gumkom i kare me kwone ducu; likwayone mo pe ma bibedo ki gumkom me bedo i wi komker pa Daudi. Man lok pa Rwot kikome.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:1 “Can i wi lukwat ma gineko dok ma gikeyo romi ki i oletta!” Man Rwot ma owaco. 
Jeremiah23:2 Mumiyo an Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, awaco lok kuman ma okemo lukwat ma gigwoko romina ni, “Wun doŋ wukeyo romina woko, ci wuryemogi gucito woko, ento pe wubedo ka gwokogi wacel. Pi meno abiketo cwinya me keto can i komwu pi gin marac ma wutimo, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah23:3 Lacen abicoko romina ma gudoŋ woko liweŋ ki i lobo ducu ka ma yam aryemogi gucito iye, abidwokogi cen kany aketogi i dwolgi, ci gibinywal ginya matek." 
Jeremiah23:4 Abiketo lukwat ma bigwokogi, man miyo doŋ pe gibibedo ki lworo mo, dok cwinygi bene pe biballe, ki mo ma birwenyo bene bedo peke, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah23:5 “Nen, kare tye ka bino, man Rwot ma owaco, ma abiketo iye lakwaro Daudi kikome me bedo kabaka. En bibedo jaŋ yat ma bilot ki k it ma atir, ma biloyo loc ki ryeko, dok bitiyo gin ma tye atir dok kakare i lobo man," 
Jeremiah23:6 I kare ma onoŋo en tye kabaka, jo Juda gibibedo mot laboŋo lworo mo, ki jo Icrael bene doŋ gibibedo ki kuc. Gibilwoŋo kabaka meno ki nyiŋ ni, ‘Rwot aye ma miyowa kit ma atir.’" 
Jeremiah23:7 “Pi meno wunen, kare tye ka bino, man Rwot ma owaco, ma pe dok ŋat mo biwaco ni, ‘Macalo Rwot tye makwo-ni, ma en aye okwanyo waŋ jo Icrael okelowa woko ki i lobo Ejipt,’" 
Jeremiah23:8 ento wubiwacci, ‘Macalo Rwot tye kwo-ni, ma okelo jo Icrael woko ki i lobo ma yo tuŋ acam, dok ki i lobo ducu ka ma yam en oryemogi gucito iye.’ Pien abikwanyogi adwokogi cen i lobogi kikome ma yam amiyo bot kwarogi.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Jeremia otito lok ma okemo lunebi, “Cwinya oballe woko omiyo koma ducu tye ka myel amyela, Man otimme pi Rwot, kun bene lubo lok mere maleŋ; atye doŋ calo dano mumer ki koŋo, dano ma omato koŋo vino madwoŋ," 
Jeremiah23:10 Pien lobo doŋ opoŋ ki lutim abor keken; gibedo ki kit kwo marac dok bene gitiyo ki tekogi i yo marac. Lobo tye ka kumo pien Rwot doŋ oceno woko, ki olet-gu bene doŋ gutwo woko.”" 
Jeremiah23:11 Rwot owacci, “Lunebi kacel ki ajwagi pe giworo Lubaŋa; anonogi ma gitye ka timo gin marac i ot pa Lubaŋa kikome." 
Jeremiah23:12 Pi meno yo ma gilubo, yone bibedo pwot dok col; abimiyo giyokke ci gipoto. Abimiyo gin marac poto i komgi; kare me keto can i komgi tye ka bino, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah23:13 Doŋ atyeko neno bal pa lunebi me Camaria: gubedo ka tito lok i nyiŋ Baal, ci gutelo jona jo Icrael, gumiyo guŋak gubwota woko." 
Jeremiah23:14 Ento aneno lunebi ma i Jerucalem dok gitimo gin ma kelo lworo mukato kare: gitimo abor dok giloko lok goba; gikonyo lutim gin marac medde ki timo gin marac, wek ŋat mo pe olokke owek timo bal. Gin ducu gudoko calo Codom ki tuŋ bota, ma girac adada calo jo Gomora.”" 
Jeremiah23:15 Mumiyo Rwot me mony owaco lok ma kemo lunebi kuman ni, “Nen, abimiyo gimato yat roka, abimiyo bene gimato pii ma giketo iye kwir; pien gunyayo kit me woro jogi gumiyo oromo i lobo woko ducu.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Rwot me mony owaco kuman bot jo Jerucalem ni, “Pe wuwiny lok ma lunebi gitito, pien gitye ka pi ko gen mogo me gobagoba ma pe konyo i iwu. Gitito botwu ginanyuta mogo ma gin gutamo atama ki wigi, ento noŋo pe gin ma an Rwot aloko." 
Jeremiah23:17 Giwaco lok teretere bot jo ma gicayo lok pa Rwot ni, ‘Wubibedo maber laboŋo ayela mo’; gitito bene bot jo ma cwinygi nwaŋ ma gitiyo gigi gin ma igi mito ni, ‘Can mo pe bipoto i komwu wacel.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:18 Aŋa i kingi mono ma doŋ ocuŋ i cokke pa Rwot, ma gunene dok ma guwinyo lokke? Aŋa i kingi ma owinyo lokke ci olubo?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Nen, akemo pa Rwot okatti ocito woko calo yamo kot, calo yamo lapiru mager; bimwoc woko i wi lutim maraco." 
Jeremiah23:20 Kiniga pa Rwot pe bigik nio waŋ ma Rwot otiyo dok ocobo gin ma en oketo i tamme. I nino ma pud tye anyim wubiniaŋ iye maber adada. 
Jeremiah23:21 “An gira onoŋo pe aoro lunebi magi, ento gin guriŋo ariŋa oyotoyot. Pe aloko botgi bene lok mo, ento gubedo ka tito loko" 
Jeremiah23:22 Ka nene gucuŋ i cokkena, kono gutito lokka bot jona, kono guloko jona ki i kit kwo marac ma onoŋo gitye iye-ni, kono gulokke guweko timo gin marac.”" 
Jeremiah23:23 Rwot owacci, “An mono Lubaŋa ma atye ka macok keken, pe atye ka mabor?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Dano mo twero kanne woko i kabedo mo ma tye i muŋ ma pe atwero nene? man Rwot ma owaco. Pe an aye ma apoŋo polo ki lobo? man Rwot ma owaco. 
Jeremiah23:25 Doŋ atyeko winyo lok ma lunebi guwaco ma gitito lok goba ki nyina, kun giwacci, ‘Aleko lek, aleko lek!’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Lunebi magi gibikano goba i cwinygi ma gitito lok gobagoba me bwola ma giparo ki i cwinygi kengi pi kare ma rom mene? 
Jeremiah23:27 Gitamo ni lekgi ma gitito-ni bimiyo wi jona wil woko i koma, kit macalo kwarogi yam wigi owil woko i koma ci gulokke gudok ka woro jok Baal-li." 
Jeremiah23:28 Lanebi ma oleko lek myero otit lekke, ento lanebi ma doŋ owinyo lok myero otit lok meno ki gen adada. Ka giporo ren kal ki kal kikome mono berre nen niŋniŋ? man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah23:29 Lokka obedo calo mac dok calo nyol ma tyero gweŋ woko matitino, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah23:30 Pi meno, nen, atye ki lok i kom lunebi ma gikwalo lok ki bot luwotgi ki i kingi kekengi ka gitito kun giwacci gitito lokka." 
Jeremiah23:31 Dok bene atye ki lok i kom lunebi ma gitito gigi lokgi, kun giwaco ni, ‘Man Rwot ma owaco.’" 
Jeremiah23:32 At ye ki lok i kom lunebi ma gitito lekgi ma opoŋ ki goba keken-ni, man Rwot ma owaco, ma gitito lekgi-ni ci gitelo jona miyo giŋak gibwota woko pi gobagi ki kitgi me nyatte, ma kun noŋo pe acwalogi dok noŋo bene pe acikogi ni guciti; pe gitye ki kit kony mo wacel bot lwak man. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah23:33 “Jeremia, ka ŋat mo i kin jona, nyo kadi lanebi nyo ajwaka, openyi ni, ‘Lok mapek ma Rwot owaco mono en gin aŋo?’ Ci wubidok iye ni, ‘Wun aye gin mapek bot Rwot, pi meno en bikwanyowu bolowu woko matwal, man Rwot ma owaco.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Ka ce inen lanebi kadi ki ajwaka, nyo ŋat mo acel i kom lwak man ma biwaco ni, ‘Lok mapek ma Rwot owaco,’ an abiketo can i kom dano meno ki jo ma i ode ducu." 
Jeremiah23:35 Ma ka waco lok meno, myero ŋat man openy lawote nyo ominne ni, ‘Rwot mono doŋ odok iye niŋo?’ nyo ni, ‘Rwot mono oloko gin aŋo?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Ento lok man ni lok mapek ma Rwot owaco pe doŋ wubiloko matwal, pien lok mapek ma wuloko pire-ni en aye obedo lok pa dano acel acel ma en waco pire kene; pi meno wudwalo lok pa Lubaŋa makwo woko, ma en Rwot me mony dok Lubaŋawa." 
Jeremiah23:37 In Jeremia, peny lunebi ni, ‘Oin aŋo doŋ ma Rwot odok iye ki wun?’ Nyo ni, ‘Rwot oloko gin aŋo?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Ento ka guwacci, ‘Lok mapek ma Rwot owaco,’ ci itit botgi ni pien guwaco lok man, kun onoŋo acikogi woko matek ni pe gulok lok man," 
Jeremiah23:39 pi meno, adada abikwanyogi atiŋogi malo ci abologi woko cen ki i nyima, gin kacel ki gaŋ ma yam amiyo botgi ki bot kwarogi." 
Jeremiah23:40 Doŋ abikelo lewic marac ki cac ma bedo nakanaka aketo i komgi, ma wi dano pe biwil iye matwal.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Rwot onyutta aduku aryo mupoŋ ki nyig oduro ma giketo i nyim ot pa Lubaŋa, Man otimme lacen i ne kare ma Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon otero kwede Yekonia wod pa Yekoyakim kabaka me Juda me bedo opii, kun okwanyo ki i Jerucalem kacel ki lutel me Juda, ludito tic mapatpat kacel ki lutet ducu oterogi i Babilon." 
Jeremiah24:2 Aduku acel onoŋo opoŋ ki nyig oduro mabeco, ma gukwoŋo cekke; ento aduku mukene-ni opoŋ mere ki nyig oduro maraco keken, girac adada ma dano pe twero camone." 
Jeremiah24:3 Cutcut Rwot owacca ni, “Jeremia, ineno aŋo?” Ci adok iye ni, “Aneno oduro, oduro mabecone-ni gibeco adada, ki oduro maracone-ni giraco twatwal, ma pe gitwero camone.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Rwot dok owaco bota ni: 
Jeremiah24:5 “An Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, atamo ni jo ma acwalo woko i lobo pa jo Kaldaya-ni gubedo calo nyig oduro mabeco-gu, an abitic kwedgi kun kica maka i komgi." 
Jeremiah24:6 Abibedo ka gwokogi maber ci akelogi adwokogi cen i lobo man. Abigerogi calo ot ci gicuŋ matek, ma pe abimukogi aretogi woko piny; abipitogi calo ginapita, ento pe abiputogi woko." 
Jeremiah24:7 Abimiyo gibedo ki miti i cwinygi me ŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot. Lacen doŋ gibibedo jona, ki an bene abibedo Lubaŋagi, pien doŋ gibilokke gidwogo bota woko ki cwinygi ducu." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Ento Rwot owaco kuman ni, Jedekia kabaka me Juda, kacel ki rwodine, ki jo Jerucalem ma gudoŋ gubedo i lobo man, ki jo mukene ma gucito gubedo i lobo Ejipt, an Rwot abitic kwedgi kit macalo atiyo ki nyig oduro maraco twatwal ma pe gitwero camogi-ni." 
Jeremiah24:9 Abikelo can marac kit meno aketo i komgi ma bimiyo rok ducu gibedo ki lworo. Dano bicayogi, gibidoko lok aboka, kun dano giloko lok aŋec i komgi dok gi bitic ki nyiŋgi macalo lok lacen dano i kabedo ducu ma abiryemogi gicito iye." 
Jeremiah24:10 Abimiyo gilwenyo i komgi ki pala lucwan, abimiyo kec nekogi ki two gemo bene poto i komgi, nio ka guto gutum woko ducu ki i lobo ma yam amiyo botgi ki bot kwarcgi-ni.’" 
Jeremiah25:1 I mwaka me aŋwen me loc pa Yekoyakim wod pa Yocia kabaka me Juda, lok pa Rwot obino bot Jeremia ma okemo jo Juda ducu. (Man aye obedo mwaka mukwoŋo me loc pa Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon.)" 
Jeremiah25:2 Lanebi Jeremia owaco bot jo Juda ducu ki bot jo ducu ma bedo i Jerucalem ni," 
Jeremiah25:3 “Kombeddi doŋ odoko mwaka pyeraryo wiye adek kulu, cakke i mwaka me apar wiye adek me loc pa Yocia wod pa Amon kabaka me Juda nio kwede wa onyoo, Rwot oloko kweda dok an bene abedo ka tittiwu lokke teretere ma pe aliŋ; ento wun pe wuketo cwinywu ka winyo lokke." 
Jeremiah25:4 Wun pe wuwinyo dok pe wuciko itwu ka winyo lokke, kadi bed Rwot obedo ka cwalo luticce lunebi teretere botwu." 
Jeremiah25:5 Gin gutito botwu ni myero wulokke wuwek kitwu me timo gin marac, man bimiyo wubedo i lobo ma yam Rwot omiyo Wa con botwu ki bot kwarowu me’ bedo mewu matwal." 
Jeremiah25:6 Gin bene gutito botwu ni pe wuwor lubaŋa mukene dok pe wuti botgi bene, dok bene pe myero wuŋet cwiny Rwot wek kiniga omake ki cal lubaŋa ma wutiyo ki ciŋwu. Ka onoŋo nene wulubo gin ma Rwot oloko, kono nene en pe oketo can i komwu." 
Jeremiah25:7 Ento Rwot kikome owacci wun wukwero winyo lokke, Ma ka meno, wuŋeto cwinye wumiyo kiniga omake ki cal lubaŋa ma wutiyo atiya ki cinwu-ni, mumiyo wun aye ma wukelo can ma onoŋo en mito ketone i komwu, wukelo giwu i komwu kenwu." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Pi meno, kit macalo wukwero winyo lokke-ni, omiyo Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni," 
Jeremiah25:9 ‘Abecwalo rok ducu ma gibedo i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam ki laticca Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon i komwu. Abekelo lwak me rok ducu me lweny i kom rok man ki jone ducu, ki i kom rok ducu murumogi dyere. Abinekogi atyekogi woko liweŋ; abimiyo lworo mako dano kun gijwat pi gaŋi ma odoŋ obur, man bibedo macalo cac matwal."
