Jeremiah25:10 Dok bene abijuko dwan me woo me yomcwiny madwoŋ woko ki botgi, dwan nyako ger ki dwan lanyom, ki mor pa kidi rego, kun aneko mac taragi woko bene." 
Jeremiah25:11 Lobo man ducu bidoko obur ma iye odon noŋo, doŋ rok magi gibibedo i te loc pa Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon pi mwaka pyerabiro kulu." 
Jeremiah25:12 Lacen ka mwaka pyerabiro doŋ otum, abiketo can i kom kabaka me Babilon, ki i kom lobone lobo pa jo Kaldaya, pi balgi. Abibalo lobogi woko abiweko doŋ obur mwatwal. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah25:13 Abiketo can i kom rok meno ki gin ducu ma doŋ atyeko wacone, ki gin ducu ma gicoyo i buk man, ki gin ducu ma Jeremia oloko mukemo rok magi ducu." 
Jeremiah25:14 Rok mapol ki luker mapol gibiloko wa jo Kaldaya gidoko opii, ci abiculogi kun lubo gin ma gutimo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:15 Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael owacca ni, “Ene, gam kikopo kono yino ma opoŋ ki akemona. Gam ci imi jo me rok ducu ka ma abicwali iye gumati." 
Jeremiah25:16 Ka doŋ gumato, ci gibicato ki wot dok bene gibibedo mamiŋ i tamgi pi lweny ma abicwalo i komgi-ni.’" 
Jeremiah25:17 Kit meno agamo kikopo ki i ciŋ Rwot, ci amiyo jo me rok ducu ka ma Rwot ocwala iye gumato." 
Jeremiah25:18 Jerucalem ki gaŋi ducu me Juda, kacel ki lukergi ki rwodigi ducu gumato; pi meno lobogi doŋ bidoko tim aroo ma iye odoŋ noŋo, bimiyo dano gijwat kun giuru, miyo dano gibitic ki nyiŋgi macalo lok lacen dano kit macalo tye kwede wa onyoo-ni." 
Jeremiah25:19 Jo mukene bene ma gibimato akemo pa Rwot gin ene: Parao kabaka me Ejipt, luticce, rwodine, lwakke ducu;" 
Jeremiah25:20 ki jo me rok mukene ducu ma gibibedo i kingi; luker ducu me lobo Uj ki luker ducu me lobo Piliciti (Acikelon ki Gaja, Ekron, ki jo Acidod ducu ma gudoŋŋe);" 
Jeremiah25:21 ki jo ducu me Edom, Moab, ki jo Ammon;" 
Jeremiah25:22 luker ducu me Turo, luker ducu me Cidon, ki luker me lobo ma tye i dog nam;" 
Jeremiah25:23 jo ducu me gaŋi me Dedan, Tema, ki Buj; jo ducu ma ginyaro yer wigi doŋ macego;" 
Jeremiah25:24 luker me Arabia ducu ki luker me kaka mapatpat ma gurubbe aruba ma gibedo i tim aroo; 
Jeremiah25:25 luker ducu me Jimri, Elam, ki Media;" 
Jeremiah25:26 luker ducu me lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam, jo ma bedo ka mabor ki jo ma bedo ka macok, kun gin ducu gilubbe aluba kikore. Rok ducu ma tye i wi lobo bene myero gumati. Ka me agikkine doŋ kabaka me Babilon bimato.’" 
Jeremiah25:27 Lacen Rwot owaco bota ni, “Tit bot lwak ni an Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, acikogi me mato akemona nio waŋ ma gumer dok gunok, nio ka gupoto piny ma pe doŋ gitwero a malo pi lweny ma abecwalo i komgi-ni," 
Jeremiah25:28 “Ka ce gukwero gamo kikopo ki i ciŋi wek pe gimat akemona, tit botgi ni Rwot me mony owacci, Myero wumati." 
Jeremiah25:29 Pien nen, doŋ abecako timo gin marac i kom gaŋ ma gilwoŋo ki nyina-ni. Wun wutamo wubibwot ma pe aketo can i komwu? Pe kumeno, ento abiketo can i komgi, pien abecwalo lweny i kom jo ducu ma gibedo i wi lobo. Man an Rwot me mony kikoma aye ma awaco." 
Jeremiah25:30 “In Jeremia, myero itit lok magi ducu ma an awacci-ni, Myero itit bot jo magi ni, ‘Rwot bimoro dwane ki i polo, en bilok bene ki i kabedone maleŋ. En bimoro dwane matek adada i kom jone; bidaŋŋe calo dano ma tye ka nyono olok, pi meno jo ducu ma gibedo i wi lobo gibiwinyo lokke." 
Jeremiah25:31 Mor dwane biwinnye wa i agikki piny, pien Rwot tye ki pido i kom rok ducu. En biŋolo kop i kom jo ducu, ci bimiyo gineko jo maraco woko ki pala lucwan. Man Rwot ma owaco.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:32 Rwot me mony owaco ni can tye ka bino i kom rok ducu ki acel acel kun lubogi kikore kikore, ki yamo lapiru mager tye ka kodo kun a ki i agikki piny." 
Jeremiah25:33 I nino meno kom jo ma ginekogi gibikeyo woko ata i but lobo ducu. Pe gibikumo pigi, pe gibicokogi, pe bene gibiyikogi. Komgi biradde i ŋom lirwat macalo cet dyaŋ muket ata." 
Jeremiah25:34 “Wukoki, kun wudaŋŋe, wun lukwat, wuŋenne i buru wun lukwat romi, pien kare doŋ oromo me nekowu en, kare me ketowu ata, Gibiŋolo ŋutwu calo giŋolo nut nyogi romi mucwe." 
Jeremiah25:35 Kabedo mo ma lukwat giriŋo gilaro iye pe bidoŋ, kadi ki kabwot mo ma lutel pa romi gibibwot kwede pe bidoŋ," 
Jeremiah25:36 Winy koko pa lukwat, winy bene ka lutel pa romi gikok! Pien Rwot tye ka balo kakwat woko ki kiniga," 
Jeremiah25:37 oweko dwol romine ma onoŋo tye ki kuc-ci odon obur. 
Jeremiah25:38 Rwot doŋ otenyo jone woko calo labwor ma oweko borone, pien lobogi doŋ iye odoŋ nono pi pala lucwan pa joma giuno dano, ki pi kiniga mager pa Rwot.”" 
Jeremiah26:1 Cutcut i ŋe kare ma Yekoyakim wod pa Yocia odoko kabaka me Juda, Rwot owaco lok man bot Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah26:2 “Cuŋ i dyekal me ot pa Rwot, dok iwac lok bot jo ducu me Juda ma gibino ka woro Lubaŋa i ot pa Rwot. Tit botgi lok ducu ma doŋ aciki me lokone; pe ikan lok mo iwek odoŋ," 
Jeremiah26:3 Gwok nyo gibiwinyo lok man, ci miyo dano acel acel lokke we ko yone marac, wek an anut pi gin marac ma onoŋo atamo ni abitimo i komgi pi gin marac ma gin gubedo ka timone-ni," 
Jeremiah26:4 Ibiwaco botgi ni, ‘Rwot owaco kuman ni, Ka ce pe wubiwinyo lokka, kun wulubo cikka ma amiyo botwu," 
Jeremiah26:5 ki ka pe wuwinyo lok pa luticca lunebi ma acwalogi me bino botwu pi oyotoyot, kadi bed pe wuketo cwinywu ka winya," 
Jeremiah26:6 ci abibalo ot man woko kit macalo yam atimo i kom Cilo, dok abimiyo rok ducu ma gibedo i wi lobo gitiyo ki nyiŋ gaŋ man me ceno dano.’ ”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Ajwagi ki lunebi ki lwak ducu guwinyo ka Jeremia waco lok magi i ot pa Rwot. 
Jeremiah26:8 Ka Jeremia doŋ otyeko loko lok ma Rwot ocike me loko bot lwak ducu, ki bot ajwagi ki lunebi, ci lwak ducu gumake woko likiŋ, kun giwacce ni, “Myero ito woko!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Piŋo kono itito lok ki nyiŋ Rwot, kun iwacci, ‘Ot man bidoko calo Cilo, ki gaŋ man bene bidoko wi obur, bidoŋ noŋo laboŋo dano mo ma bedo iye’?” Lwak ducu gucokke gurumo Jeremia woko dyere i ot pa Rwot." 
Jeremiah26:10 Ka rwodi me Juda guwinyo lok magi, ci gua ki i ot pa kabaka gucito gubedo i kabedogi i ŋet doggaŋ manyen ma gidonyo kwede i ot pa Rwot." 
Jeremiah26:11 Ci ajwagi ki lunebi guwaco bot rwodi kacel ki lwak ni, “Dano man myero giŋol kop me to i wiye, pien oloko lok marac i kom gaŋwa, kit macalo wun bene wuwinyo ki itwu-ni.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Jeremia dok onwoyo loko lok bot rwodi kacel ki lwak ducu kun wacci, “Rwot oora me tito lok i kom ot man ki i kom gaŋ man, lok ducu ma wun doŋ wuwinyo atito botwu-ni." 
Jeremiah26:13 Pi meno kombeddi myero wuyub kitwu ki gin ma wutimo, ci wulub lok ma Rwot Lubaŋawu owaco botwu, ci Rwot biŋut i kom gin marac ma onoŋo en doŋ oyubbe me timone i komwu-ni." 
Jeremiah26:14 Doŋ an mera atye i te twerowu. Wuti i koma giwu gin ma wuneno ni ber dok tye atir. 
Jeremiah26:15 Lok acel keken ma amito wuŋe ni, en aye ni tekke wuneka woko, ci wubineko dano ma pe ki bal, dok bene alii me tona bibedo i wiwu ki i kom gaŋ man ki jo ducu ma bedo iye, pien i adane Rwot oora botwu pi loko lok magi ducu wek wuwiny ki itwu.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Lacen rwodi kacel ki lwak ducu guwaco bot ajwagi ki lunebi ni, “Dano man pe myero giŋol kop me to i wiye, pien en otito lok botwa ki nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋawa.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 I ŋe meno ludoŋo mogo i kin ludoŋo me lobo gua malo ci guwaco bot lwak ducu ma gucokke ni," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Mika ma en dano me Morecet yam otito lok i kare pa Kejekia kabaka me Juda, ma owaco bot jo ducu ni, ‘Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Cion gibipuro woko macalo poto; Jerucalem bidoko wi obur, ki got ma gigero ot pa Rwot i wiye bidoko buŋa.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 “Tika mono Kejekia kabaka me Juda kacel ki jo Juda guneko Mika woko? Kejekia pe olworo Rwot ci otemo tiyo gin maber ma Rwot pwoyo? Ci meno pe omiyo Rwot oŋut i kom gin marac ma onoŋo en oyubbe me timone i komgi? Ento wan kombeddi aye giwa wamito kelo can madit i komwa kekenwa.” 
Jeremiah26:20 Tye dano mo mukene bene ma otito lok nyiŋ Rwot, en aye Uria wod pa Cemaya me Kiriat-jearim. En otito lok i kom gaŋ man ki rok man i lok marom ki pa Jeremia-ni." 
Jeremiah26:21 I kare ma kabaka Yokoyakim ki twoni lwennye ki rwodi ducu guwinyo lokke, kabaka otemo miyo gineke kwede woko; ento i kare ma Uria owinyo lok man, ci lworo omake omiyo en olwi oriŋo woko i Ejipt." 
Jeremiah26:22 Mumiyo kabaka Yokoyakim ocwalo jo mogo kacel ki Elnatan wod pa Akbor ki jo mukene kacel kwede, oorogi me cito i Ejipt," 
Jeremiah26:23 ci gin gumako Uria wa ki i Ejipt gukelo bot kabaka Yekoyakim ma oneke woko i kabedo me yik ka ma giyiko iye dano ata-gu. 
Jeremiah26:24 Ento Akikam wod pa Capan ogwoko Jeremia maber, omiyo pe gimiye bot lwak wek guneke woko." 
Jeremiah27:1 Cutcut i ŋe kare ma Jedekia wod pa Yocia doŋ odoko kabaka me Juda, en aye lok pa Rwot obino kwede bot Jeremia." 
Jeremiah27:2 Rwot owaco bot Jeremia kuman ni myero en oyub del olir woko me tol kacel ki yat rii kweri dyaŋ ci oketgi otwegi i ŋute. 
Jeremiah27:3 Ka Rwot dok otitte me cwalo lok bot luker me Edom, Moab, Ammon, Turo ki Cidon, kun wok ki bot lukwenagi ma gubino i Jerucalem ka limo Jedekia kabaka me Juda." 
Jeremiah27:4 Rwot me mony, ma en Lubaŋa pa Icrael, otito bot Jeremia me ciko lukwena magi me waco bot lukergi ni Rwot doŋ otyeko waco kuman ni," 
Jeremiah27:5 “An aye ma acweyo lobo ki twerona dok ki tekona, wa dano ki lee ducu ma gitye i wi lobo; doŋ atwero miyogi bot ŋat mo keken ma ayero." 
Jeremiah27:6 Kombeddi doŋ atyeko miyo lobo magi woko ducu i ciŋ laticca Nebukadnejar, kabaka me Babilon, dok bene amiye wa lee tim ni guti bote." 
Jeremiah27:7 Rok ducu bitiyo bote, gibitiyo bot wode ki bot lakware, nio ka kare biromo ma labone doŋ gibiloyo woko. Lacen doŋ rokke bibedo opii, gibitiyo bot rok matego mapol ki luker madito." 
Jeremiah27:8 “Ka ce inen rok mo nyo ker mo pe bitic bot Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon, ma gibimine i te loc pa kabaka me Babilon macalo dyaŋ, abiketo can i kom rok meno kun aneko jone woko ki pala lucwan i lweny, amiyo kec nekogi, ki two gemo bene poto i komgi, nio waŋ ma amiyo gutum woko i te twero pa Nebukadnejar. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah27:9 Pi meno pe myero wuwiny lok pa lunebi, lutyet, lulek lek, lutyet ki ajaa ki lutal-gu, ma gibedo ka waco botwu ni, ‘Pe wubidoko opii pa kabaka me Babilon.’" 
Jeremiah27:10 Gitye ka bwolowu abwola, ma adwoggine en aye ni abimiyo gikwanyowu woko ki i lobowu giterowu woko ka mabor. Abiryemowu woko, ci wubito wutum woko ducu." 
Jeremiah27:11 Ento ka ce rok mo omine kene i te loc pa kabaka me Babilon kun tiyo bote, abiweko en doŋ bedo i lbone, kun puro iye, dok bedo kunnu bene, man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Jeremia owaco lakit lok acel-lu bot Jedekia kabaka me Juda ni, “Wumine kenwu i te loc pa kabaka me Babilon. Wuti bote kacel ki bot lwakke ci wubibedo kwo." 
Jeremiah27:13 Piŋo imito ni in kacel ki lutuwu ginekwu woko i lweny, nyo kec onekwu woko, ki two gemo bene opot i komwu? Man aye gin ma Rwot doŋ otyeko wacone ma bitimme i kom rok ma pe bimine kene i te loc pa kabaka me Babilon." 
Jeremiah27:14 Pe myero iwiny lok pa lunebi ma giwaco botwu ni pe wubitiyo bot kabaka me Babilonni. Gin gitye ka bwolowu abwola. 
Jeremiah27:15 Rwot kikome owacci en gire pe eorogi, gin gitye ka loko lok goba botwu ki nyiŋe, Doŋ adwoggine en aye ni en biryemowu woko ci wubito wutum woko, wun kacel ki lunebi ma giloko lok goba magi botwu-ni.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Ci Jeremia owaco bot ajwagi kacel ki lwak ni, “Rwot owaco kuman ni, Pe myero wuwiny lok pa lunebi ma gitito botwu ni jami ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Rwot doŋ cok gibidwokogi cen ki i Babilon. Lok meno ma gitye ka titone botwu-ni lok goba." 
Jeremiah27:17 Pe wuwiny lokgi; wuti mewu tic bot kabaka me Babilon wek wubed kwo. Piŋo gaŋ man gibal woko odok wi obur? 
Jeremiah27:18 Ka ce inen ni gin lunebi adada, dok ka lok ma gitito-ni obedo lokka, wek guleg Rwot me mony, ni wek pe oye gikwany jami ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Rwot ma gudoŋ i Jerucalem ki i ot pa kabaka me Juda, pe gitergi woko i Babilon.”" 
Jeremiah27:19 Rwot me mony owaco lok kuman mukemo wir-gu, nam, okar mac, ki mukemo jami mukene ma yam gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Lubaŋa ma gudoŋ i Jerucalem," 
Jeremiah27:20 ma yam Nebukadnejar pe okwanyogi oterogi woko, i kare ma en omako Yekonia wod pa Yekoyakim kabaka me Juda kacel ki ludito ducu me awora me Juda ki Jerucalem oterogi woko i opii i Babilon, owacci," 
Jeremiah27:21 “Wuwiny gin ma an Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, atye ka wacone mukemo jami ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Rwot ma giwekogi i ot pa Rwot ki i ot pa kabaka me Juda ki i Jerucalem ni," 
Jeremiah27:22 Gibikwanyogi giterogi woko i Babilon nio waŋ ma an dok atamo pigi. Ci abicokogi adwokogi cen aketogi kakargi i kabedo man. Man Rwot ma owaco.” 
Jeremiah28:1 I mwaka acel-lu, i dwe me abic me mwaka me aŋwen me loc pa Jedekia kabaka me Juda, Anania wod pa Ajur, ma en lanebi ma tugi Gibeon, oloko ki Jeremia i ot pa Rwot. En olok ki Jeremia i nyim ajwagi kacel ki lwak" 
Jeremiah28:2 ni Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco kuman ni, “Doŋ atyeko turo twero ki teko me loc pa kabaka me Babilon woko." 
Jeremiah28:3 Ma noŋo mwaka aryo peya otum, abikelo jami ducu ma yam gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Rwot ma yam Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon okwanyo ki i ot pa Lubaŋa otero woko i Babilon-ni, adwokogi cen i kabedo man." 
Jeremiah28:4 Dok bene abikwanyo Yekonia wod pa Yekoyakim kabaka me Juda, kacel ki jo Juda ma yam giterogi i opii i Babilon, akelogi adwokogi cen i kabedo man. Pien doŋ abituro twero ki teko me loc pa kabaka me Babilon woko. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Ka dok Jeremia oloko ki lanebi Anania i nyim ajwagi kacel ki i nyim lwak ducu ma onoŋo gucuŋ i ot pa Rwot; 
Jeremiah28:6 ci lanebi Jeremia owacci, “Amen! Ka Rwot bitimo man ci ber. Rwot myero omi lok ma ibedo ka titone-ni obed ada, wek okwany jami ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Rwot kacel ki jo ma giterogi i opii i Babilon odwokgi cen i kabedo man." 
Jeremiah28:7 Ento kombeddi koŋ wuwiny lok ma awaco botwu ki bot lwak ducu. 
Jeremiah28:8 Lunebi ma gukwoŋo nyimwu ki nyima i kare macon adada, onoŋo gunyuto ni i anyim lweny bibedo tye, kec bibedo tye, ki two gemo bipoto i kom rok mapol ki i kom ker matego." 
Jeremiah28:9 Mumiyo lanebi mo ma bitito lok kom kuc, ka lokke obedo ada, ci gibiŋian adada ni Rwot kara aye ma ocwalo lanebi meno ada.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Ci lanebi Anania ogonyo rii bao woko ki i ŋut lanebi Jeremia, ci oturogi woko." 
Jeremiah28:11 Anania oloko lok i nyim lwak kun waco ni, “Rwot owaco kuman ni meno aye bene kit ma ebituro kwede okol ma Nebukadnejar otweyo i ŋut jo me rok ducu ma onoŋo mwaka aryo peya otum.” Ento lanebi Jeremia oa gire ocito woko." 
Jeremiah28:12 Lacen i ne kare ma lanebi Anania onoŋo doŋ oturo kwede rii bao woko ki i ŋut lanebi Jeremia-ni, Rwot owaco bot Jeremia" 
Jeremiah28:13 ni ocit owac bot Anania ni, “Rwot owaco ni meno itwero turo rii bao kit macalo ituro-ni, ento en bileyo kakargi ki rii nyonyo." 
Jeremiah28:14 Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owa co ni, ‘Doŋ atyeko keto rii nyonyo i ŋut jo me rok ducu wek guti bot Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon; gibitiyo bote, pien doŋ bene atyeko miyo bote kadi wa lee me tim.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Ci lanebi Jeremia owaco bot lanebi Anania ni, “Anania, winy, onoŋo Rwot gire pe ocwali, ento in doŋ imiyo lwak gibedo ka geno lok goba ma itito botgi." 
Jeremiah28:16 Mumiyo Rwot owaco ni, ‘Nen, abikwanyi woko ki i lobo. I mwaka man kikome ibito iye woko, pien ibedo ka tito bot dano ni gujem woko i kom Rwot.’ ”" 
Jeremiah28:17 I mwaka meno cut i dwe me abiro, lanebi Anania oto woko." 
Jeremiah29:1 Lanebi Jeremia ocoyo waraga bot lutel ducu ma gitye i kin opii, ki bot ajwagi ki lunebi, ki bot lwak ducu ma yam Nebukadnejar omakogi ki i Jerucalem ci oterogi woko i opii i Babilon." 
Jeremiah29:2 En ocoyo waraga man lacen i kare ma onoŋo doŋ kabaka Yekonia kacel ki minne, jo ma gikologi, rwodi me Juda ki Jerucalem, ludiro tic mapatpat onoŋo doŋ gua woko ki i Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah29:3 Gimiyo waraga man bot Elaca wod pa Capan gin ki Gemaria wod pa Ilkia, ma yam Jedekia kabaka me Juda oorogi gucito i Babilon bot Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon. Waragane onoŋo lokke kwanne kit man ni," 
Jeremiah29:4 “Rwot me mony, ma en Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco kuman bot jo ducu ma en oweko Nebukadnejar omakogi ki i Jerucalem ci oterogi woko i Babilon ni," 
Jeremiah29:5 ‘Wuger odi ci wubed doŋ iye. Wupur poto ci wucam gin ma ocek iye. 
Jeremiah29:6 Wunyom mon wek wunywal awobe ki anyira. Wuwek awobewu bene gunyom, wek gin bene gunywal litino. Myero wunya, welwu omedde ma pe odok cen." 
Jeremiah29:7 Wuti tic maber pi berbedo me gaŋ ka ma amiyo giterowu iye me bedo opii. Wulega pi nyiŋ gaŋ meno, pien ka gaŋ meno kwone tye maber miyo wun bene wubibedo maber." 
Jeremiah29:8 Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco kit man ni, Pe wuwek lunebiwu ki lutyet ma gitye i kinwu gubwolwu, dok bene pe wuwiny lok me lek mogo ma gin leko-ni," 
Jeremiah29:9 pien lok ma gitye ka titone botwu ki nyiŋa-ni meno lok goba; an pe acwalogi gira, man Rwot ma owaco.’" 
Jeremiah29:10 “Rwot owaco kuman ni, Ka mwaka pyerabiro ma gimiyo ki Babilon doŋ otum, ci an abilimowu, abicobo cikkena piwu ci abikwanyowu adwokowu cen i kabedo man." 
Jeremiah29:11 An keken aye aŋeyo yub ma atye kwede piwu, man Rwot ma owaco, yub me berbedo ento pe yub pi gin marac, yub pi kelo botwu kare me anyim ma wutye ki gen pire-ni," 
Jeremiah29:12 Ci wubibino bota wulega, an abiwinyo legawu." 
Jeremiah29:13 Wubiyenya ci wubinoŋa bene, ka ce onoŋo wuyenya ki cwinywu ducu." 
Jeremiah29:14 Iyo, awacci wubinoŋa ci abidwoko gumwu botwu kun acokowu woko ki i rok ducu ki i kabedo ducu ka ma yam aryemowu wucito iye, ci abikelowu adwokowu cen i kabedo ka ma yam akwanyowu ki iye giterowu i opii-ni," 
Jeremiah29:15 “Pien wun doŋ onoŋo wuwaco ni, Rwot doŋ omiyowu lunebi ki i Babilon," 
Jeremiah29:16 koŋ wuwiny lok ma Rwot owaco i kom kabaka ma tye ka loc kun obedo i wi komker pa Daudi, ki dok lok ma okemo jo me gaŋ man, ki lutuwu ma yam pe gucito kacel kwedwu i opii-ni," 
Jeremiah29:17 Rwot me mony owaco kit man ni, ‘Abekelo lweny, kec ki two gemo, ci abimiyo gibedo calo nyig oduro mutop ma doŋ rac adada ma pe gitwero camone." 
Jeremiah29:18 Abilubo korgi ki lweny, kec ki two gemo, abimiyo gibedo ginacaya bot jo me rok me wi lobo ducu, gibitic ki nyiŋgi macalo lok lacen dano, gibibedo gin ma miyo lworo bot dano, ma kelo jwat matek, ki lok me cac i kin rok ducu ka ma onoŋo aryemogi gucito iye." 
Jeremiah29:19 Man bitimme i komgi pien gin pe gubedo ka keto cwinygi me lubo lok ma onoŋo acwalo botgi teretere kun wok ki bot luticca lunebi; ento gukwero winyo lokka woko. Man Rwot ma owaco.’ 
Jeremiah29:20 Wuwiny lok pa Rwot, wun jo ducu ma yam gimakowu ki i Jerucalem giterowu woko i opii I Babilon-ni:" 
Jeremiah29:21 ‘Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco lok ma okemo Akab wod pa Kolaya ki Jedekia wod pa Maceya ma gitito lok me goba botwu ki nyinani. En owaco ni ebimiyogi woko i ciŋ Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon, ci en binekogi woko ka maleŋ i nyimwu." 
Jeremiah29:22 Ka inen jo ma yam gikwanyogi ki i Jerucalem giterogi i opii i Babilon gimito ceno ŋat mo, ci gibiwaco ni, “Rwot myero oti kwedi kit macalo en otiyo kwede ki Jedekia gin ki Akab, ma kabaka me Babilon obulogi woko makwo ki mac-ci.”" 
Jeremiah29:23 Man aye bibedo can ma bipoto i komgi pien gubedo ka timo tim mogo ma pe myero, gutimo abor ki mon pa luwotgi, dok bene gubedo ka loko lok goba ki nyiŋa ma kun an pe acikogi ni guloki. An aye ma aŋeyo, dok bene atye macalo caden, man Rwot ma owaco.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco bot Jeremia me tito bot Cemaya me Nekelam ni," 
Jeremiah29:25 “In icwalo waraga i nyiŋi keni bot jo Jerucalem ducu, ki bot Jepania wod pa ajwaka Maceya, ki bot ajwagi mukene-gu ducu kun iwacci," 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Rwot oketi ibedo ajwaka ma ka ajwaka Yekoyada, wek ibed ladit ma loyo ot pa Rwot kun ineno lupoya ducu ma gitito lok, ci imakgi itwegi ki okol kun iroyo irwako ogul nyonyo i ŋutgi." 
Jeremiah29:27 Piŋo pe ijuko Jeremia ma en dano me Anatot ma tye ka tito lok botwu-ni? 
Jeremiah29:28 Pien en onoŋo ocwalo lok botwa i Babilon ma wacci, Kare me bedowu i opii bibedo dwoŋ; wuger odi ci wubed iye. Wupur poto ci wucam gin ma ocek iye.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Ajwaka Jepania okwano waraga man bot lanebi Jeremia wek en owiny. 
Jeremiah29:30 Rwot dok owaco bot Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah29:31 “Cwal lok bot jo ma giterogi i opii, kun iwacci, ‘Rwot owaco lok ma okemo Cemaya dano me Nekelam kuman ni, Kit macalo Cemaya doŋ otito lok botwu ma onoŋo an pe acwalo en-ni, dok bene omiyo doŋ wuketo genwu i lok me goba," 
Jeremiah29:32 pi meno Rwot owaco kuman ni, Nen, abiketo can i kom Cemaya dano me Nekelam kacel ki likwayone. Pe bidoŋ ki ŋat mo makwo ki i kom lwak man ma bineno gin maber ma abitimo bot jona, pien en oloko lok ma omiyo dano gujemo i kom Rwot. Man Rwot ma owaco.’’’" 
Jeremiah30:1 Man lok ma Rwot oloko ki Jeremia. 
Jeremiah30:2 Rwot ma en Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco ni, “Co lok ducu ma abedo ka loko boti-ni i buk," 
Jeremiah30:3 pien kare tye ka bino ma abidwoko iye gum bot jona jo Icrael ki jo Juda. Abikwanyogi adwokogi cen i lobo ma yam amiyo bot kwarogi, gibileyo doŋ bedo megi. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Magi gin aye lok ma Rwot oloko ma okemo Icrael ki Juda: 
Jeremiah30:5 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Wawinyo koko ma baŋo dano, koko ma kelo lworo, ento pe ma kelo kuc." 
Jeremiah30:6 Koŋ ipennye kekeni ci dok itam ni, laco mono twero nywalo latin? Piŋo kono aneno laco acel acel mako pyere ki ciŋe calo dako ma tye ka rem ki nywal? Piŋo waŋ dano olwal woko?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Maa do! Nino marac tye ka bino, pe tye nino mo ma rom kwede; en aye nino me can bot likwayo pa Yakobo; kadi bed kumeno gibilarogi ki i can meno.”" 
Jeremiah30:8 Rwot me mony owaco ni, “Ka nino meno oromo abituro rii bao woko ki i ŋutgi dok bene abicodo nyor ma gitweyogi kwede woko; cakke i kare meno pe doŋ gibibedo opii pa lurok matwal." 
Jeremiah30:9 Bnto gin gibitiyo bot Rwot Lubaŋagi, ki bot Daudi kabakagi, ma an aye abimiyo botgi me bedo kabakagi." 
Jeremiah30:10 “Pe wulwor, wun likwayo pa laticca Yakobo; wun jo Icrael, cwinywu pe myero oballe woko, Abilarowu ki i lobo ca ma tye ka mabor-ri, abilaro likwayowu bene ki i lobo ma yam giterogi iye i opii. Likwayo pa Yakobo gibidwogo cen ci gibibedo mot ki kuc; ŋat mo pe ma bimiyo gibedo ki lworo. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah30:11 Abibedo kwedwu pi larowu. Abijwero jo me rok ducu atyekogi woko, i kin jo ma yam akeyogi iye; ento wun pe abityekowu woko liweŋ. Abipwodowu maberber pe ki kiniga twatwal, ento pe abiwekowu ma pe aketo can i komwu. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Rwot owaco bot jone ni, “Waŋ retwu pe doŋ caŋ, waŋ burre odet marac." 
Jeremiah30:13 Ŋat mo pe ma twero cuŋ piwu, yat bene pe me aketa i waŋ burwu, waŋ burwu pe doŋ can." 
Jeremiah30:14 Jo ma gimarowu-ni ducu wigi doŋ owil woko i komwu; gin pe doŋ giparo piwu wacel. Pien alwenyo i komwu macalo lukworra; dok bene aketo can magwa i komwu laboŋo kica, pien balwu dwoŋ, ki gin marac ma wutimo bene pol." 
Jeremiah30:15 Piŋo pud wukok pi ret ma wulimo? Aremwu pe doŋ caŋ. Aketo can i komwu kit man, pren balwu dwoŋ, ki gin marac ma wutimo bene pol mada." 
Jeremiah30:16 Pi meno jo ducu ma tyekowu, gin bene gibitye kogi woko, lukworwu ducu bene gibimakogi giterogi woko i opii. Jo ducu ma unowu gin bene gibiunogi, ki jo ducu ma yako jamiwu gin bene gibiyako jamigi woko." 
Jeremiah30:17 Pien abimiyo wubedo doki ma komwu yot, abicano waŋ burwu woko bene, kadi bed lukworwu giwacci, ‘Cion doŋ odoko gin ma gibolo woko; ŋat mo doŋ pe ma paro pire.’ Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah30:18 Rwot owacci, “Nen, abidwoko likwayopa Yakobo cen i lobogi dok kica bimaka i kom jo me doggola acel acel; gibigero gaŋ acel acel odoco i kabedone macon, ki ot acel acel bene gibigero kakare." 
Jeremiah30:19 Jo ma kunnu doŋ gibiwero wer me pwoc; gibibedo ka daŋŋe bene pi yomcwiny. Abimiyo ginya gidoko pol ma pe welgi jwik, ci abikelo deyo botgi." 
Jeremiah30:20 Litinogi bibedo pol kit macalo yam gubedo kwede i kare macon, ki lwakgi bene bicuŋ i nyima matek likiŋ; abiketo can i kom jo ducu ma unogi." 
Jeremiah30:21 Ŋat ma bibedo laker ma loyogi bene bia ki i kingi, ŋat ma bibedo laloc gi bibedo dano me rokgi kikome. Ka alwoŋe, ci en binyiko cok bota; pien ŋat mo pe twero ette me bino cok bota ka pe alwone," 
Jeremiah30:22 Wun wubibedo jona, ki an abibedo Lubaŋawu.”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Koŋ inen yamo kot pa Rwot! Akemone bedo calo yamo lapiru mager, ma bimwoc woko lituc i wi jo maraco." 
Jeremiah30:24 Akemone pe bigik nio waŋ ma en ocobo tiyo gin ma onoŋo doŋ otamo me timone. I kare ma lacen, i nino ma pud tye anyim, jone gibiniaŋ maber makato." 
Jeremiah31:1 Rwot owacci, “Kare tye ka bino ma abibedo Lubaŋa pa jo me doggola ducu pa jo Icrael, ki gin bene gibibedo jona," 
Jeremiah31:2 Ceŋ anyuto kicana bot jo ma gubwot ki i lak to i dye tim. I kare ma jo Icrael giyenyo yweyo," 
Jeremiah31:3 an anyutte botgi ki ka mabor. Wun jo Icrael kare ducu abedo ka marowu, kit meno pud amedde ki nyuto botwu mar mera ma pe lokke." 
Jeremiah31:4 Abigerowu woko odoco wun jo Icrael, ci wubicuŋ. Doki wubikwanyo ajaa agoya-gu ci wubimyelo myel ki yomcwiny madwoŋ." 
Jeremiah31:5 Doki bene pud wubipito olok i wi cere me Camaria, doŋ jo ma pito olok meno, gibicamo mucekke." 
Jeremiah31:6 Ada, kare tye ka bino ma lukur-piny gibidanne gilwoŋo lwoŋo ki i wi cere me lobo Epraim ni, ‘Wubin kany! Wacitu malo i Cion, bot Rwot Lubaŋawa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Rwot owacci, “Wuwer wer ki dwan maloŋo ki yomcwiny pi jo pa Yakobo, wudaŋŋe matek pien gin rok madit i kin rok ducu. Wuwer wer me pak kun wuwaco ni, ‘Rwot doŋ olaro jone, olaro jo Icrael ducu ma yam gudoŋ.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Nen, abikelogi woko ki i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam, abicokogi bene ki ka mabor ki i agikki piny, Lutowaŋ ki luŋolo gibibino kacel kwedgi, mon ma guyac kacel ki mon ma doŋ gicok nywal; gibidwogo cen gibedo rok matek." 
Jeremiah31:9 Gibibino ki koko, gibibedo ka lega kun noŋo atelogi kwede me dok cen; abimiyo giwoto ki i ŋet laora kulu ma pii opoŋ iye, gibilubo yo atir ma pe gibiyoko tyengi wacel; pien atye macalo wego bot jo Icrael, Epraim aye obedo latin ma akwoŋo nywalone." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Wuwiny lokka, wun rok ducu, an Rwot, ci wutit lokka ka maboco i lobo ma tye i dog nam-gu, An ma akeyo jo Icrael woko-ni aye dok abicokogi adwokogi cen, abigwokogi woko maber kit macalo lakwat gwoko kwede romine." 
Jeremiah31:11 Doŋ atyeko koko jo pa Yakobo woko ki i opii, alarogi bene ki i ciŋ rok matek makatogi." 
Jeremiah31:12 Gibibino giwero wer matek pi yomcwiny i wi got Cion, mot ma an Rwot amiyogi-ni biyomo cwinygi mada, kal, koŋo vino, ki moo, romi ki dyani-gu. Gibibedo calo poto ma gionyo iye pii muromo kare ducu, pe gibiŋeyo cwercwiny doŋ matwal." 
Jeremiah31:13 Anyira bimyelo myel ci cwinygi bedo yom, awobe ki jo muteggi ducu gibibedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ. Abikweyo cwinygi ci aloko kumogi doko yomcwiny, cwercwiny ma git ye kwede bene bilokke doko yomcwiny." 
Jeremiah31:14 Abimiyo ajwagi gicamo cam mabeco mabup giyeŋ adada, aoŋ motta bityeko miti pa jona woko liweŋ, man Rwot ma owaco.” Kica omako Rwot i kom jo Icrael" 
Jeremiah31:15 Rwot owacci, “Koko tye ka winnye i Rama, koko ki kumo madwoŋ. Lakeri tye ka kok pi litinone; en okwero woko ni pe doŋ gikwe cwinye, pien litinone doŋ gipe." 
Jeremiah31:16 Wek koko obedi, duny pig waŋi bene woko. Ticci ducu ma itiyo bot litinoni gibimiyi bakacic pire; gibidwogo cen ki i lobo pa lukworwu. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah31:17 Gen tye pi karewu me anyim; litinowu gibia gidwogo cen lobogi kikome. Man Rwot ma owaco. 
Jeremiah31:18 Awinyo ka jo Epraim tye ka koko ki cwercwiny kun giwacci, ‘Rwot, waŋ wabedo calo dyaŋ mudin ma pe winyo lok, ento doŋ ipwodowa adada, ci ipwonyowa me lubo gin ma imito. Kwanywa idwokwa cen, ci waŋ bene wabidok; pien in i Rwot Lubaŋawa." 
Jeremiah31:19 Onoŋo walokke wabwoti woko, ento i ŋeye cutcut waŋut wabedo ki cwiny me dwogo cen. I kare ma doŋ ityeko keto can i komwa, wakulo wiwa woko ki cwercwiny me can. Lewic omakowa mada dok alee otwodowa woko, pien watimo bal i kare ma onoŋo pud watino.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 “Epraim, in latinna ma amaro adada, latin ma amaro makato ducu. Pien kare ducu ka alwoŋo nyiŋi, atamo piri ki mar madit. Cwinya kutte akuta i komi; abibedo ki kica i komi bene. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah31:21 Wuket lanyut ma nyuto botwu waŋa yo; wugur yat mogo i ŋet yo ma binyutowu yo; wutam pi yo gudo ma en yo ma wulubo i kare ma wubino-ni, Wudwog cen, wun jo Icrael, wudwog cen i gaŋ ma nene wuweko-ni." 
Jeremiah31:22 Wubibedo ka kalakala pi kare ma rom mene, wun jo ma pe genne? Pien Rwot doŋ oketo jami manyen i lobo: dako aye ma gwoko laco.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco kuman ni, “Ka doŋ adwoko lwak man i lobogi, gin doki gibiwaco ki i lobo Juda ki i gaŋine ducu ni, ‘Rwot myero omi gum i kom got maleŋ me Jerucalem, kabedo maleŋ ka ma en bedo iye.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Dano gibibedo i Juda ki i gaŋine ducu, lupur ki lukwat ki romigi bene gibibedo kunnu." 
Jeremiah31:25 Abimiyo jo ma guol gilimo tek, dok abimiyo jo ducu ma kec doŋ onyono komgi woko giyeŋ ki cam." 
Jeremiah31:26 Man bimiyo dano giwacci, ‘Anino woko ci odiko aco anoŋo atye maber ma koma yot.’" 
Jeremiah31:27 “An Rwot, doŋ awaco ni, Kare tye ka bino ma abipoŋo lobo Icrael ki Juda woko ki dano kacel ki lee." 
Jeremiah31:28 Kare bibino kit macalo agwokogi i kare me putogi, i kare me mukogi, i kare me turogi, i kare me tyekogi, ki i kare me keto can i komgi, kit meno bene abigwokogi ka pitogi ki ka gerogi wek gudoŋ malo. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah31:29 Ka kare meno oromo, dano pe dok gibimedde ka waco ni, ‘Kwarowa gucamo nyig olok mawac, man odiŋo lak lidiŋ woko.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 Ento dano acel acel bito pi balle en kikome; kit meno dano acel acel ma bicamo nyig olok mawac lake bidin woko.” 
Jeremiah31:31 Rwot owaco ni, “Nen, kare tye ka bino ma abiketo iye gicikke manyen ki jo Icrael ki jo Juda bene." 
Jeremiah31:32 Gicikke man pe bibedo calo gicikke ma yam aketo ki kwarogi i kare ma onoŋo akwanyogi woko ki i Ejipt akelogi woko ca. Gin guturo gicikke ma aketo kwedgi, kadi bed onoŋo an abedo cwargi. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah31:33 Ka kare meno oromo, man aye gicikke ma abiketo ki jo Icrael: Abimiyo gibedo ki cikka i tamgi, abicoyo bene bedo i cwinygi, An abibedo Lubaŋagi, ki gin gibibedo jona. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah31:34 Ŋat mo pe doŋ bipwonyo lawote, ŋat mo bene pe biwaco bot ominne nyo lutugi ni, ‘Ŋe Rwot,’ Gin ducu gibineya, cakke i kom jo matino o kwede wa i kom jo madito ma i kingi. Abiweko balgi, pe dok abibedo ka po i kom gin marac ma gubedo ka timone. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Rwot miyo ceŋ ryeny i dyeceŋ, dwe ki lakalatwe en miyo giryeny dyewor, En rubo pii me nam, ci miyo mor; nyiŋe gilwoŋo ni Rwot me mony." 
Jeremiah31:36 Rwot ocikke ni Icrael kare ducu bibedo rok, bibedo pi kare malac kun lubo kit ma cik ma eketo i lobo-ni biri kwede." 
Jeremiah31:37 Rwot owacci, “Ka ce onoŋo gitwero pimo pol, nyo ka gitwero roto te guti me lobo ki piny, meno keken aye bimiyo akwero jo Icrael pi gin ducu ma doŋ gutyeko timo. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah31:38 “Nen, kare tye ka bino, man Rwot ma owaco, ma gaŋ man gibigero odoco pi Rwot cakke ki i kom lubele ma gilwoŋo Kananel o kwede wa i dogcel ma i twok gaŋ." 
Jeremiah31:39 Doŋ tol me pimone gibimiyo cito wa ka mabor atir o kwede wa i got Gareb, ka bigono piny o kwede i Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Nota ka ma gicoro iye kom jo muto ki bu rin ki tim ducu ma i ŋet laora kulu me Kidron nio kwede wa i dogcel me Aguragura dok kwede tuŋ wokceŋ, bibedo gin maleŋ bot Rwot. Pe dok gibiputo nyo gituro woko matwal.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Rwot oloko ki Jeremia i mwaka me aparre me loc pa Jedekia kabaka me Juda, ma en aye bene obedo mwaka me apar wiye aboro me loc pa Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon." 
Jeremiah32:2 I kare meno dul mony pa kabaka me Babilon obedo ka lweny i kom Jerucalem, dok giloro wi lanebi Jeremia woko i dyekal pa lukur-piny ma tye i gaŋ kal pa kabaka me Juda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Kabaka Jedekia onoŋo otweye i mabuc kunnu pien gidote ni otyeto lok ni Rwot owaco ni, “Nen, abemiyo gaŋ man woko i ciŋ kabaka me Babilon, en bimayo woko bene doko mere." 
Jeremiah32:4 Kabaka Jedekia pe bibwot wacel ki i ciŋ jo Kaldaya, Gibimiye i ciŋ kabaka me Babilon; en binene waŋ ki waŋ dok bene bilok kwede atyer ka maleŋ," 
Jeremiah32:5 Gibitero Jedekia woko i Babilon, en bibedo kunnu nio waŋ ma an aye abilime. Kadi bed en bibedo ka lweny i kom jo Kaldaya, ento en pe biloyogi. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Jeremia owacci, “Rwot owacca ni" 
Jeremiah32:7 Kanamel, ma en wod pa nera Calum, bibino bota kun mito ni awil lobone ma tye i Anatot, pien an a watte macok kwede adada, dok atye ki twero me wilone." 
Jeremiah32:8 Cutcut kit macalo Rwot owaco, omara Kanamel obino bota i dyekal pa lukur-piny, ci owaco bota ni, ‘Willobona ma tye i Anatot i lobo pa Benjamin. In aye i watta ma cok kweda adada, it ye ki twero me kokone ki me bedo iye bene, In kikomi aye myero iwil.’ Ci i kare meno aŋeyo woko ni Rwot aye ma ocika ni atim gin macalo man." 
Jeremiah32:9 “Ci awilo poto meno woko ki bot omara Kanamel kun apimo lim woko bene bote ma welle oromo cekel me ryal apar wiye abiro. 
Jeremiah32:10 Aketo ciŋa i waragaŋe ci amwono woko, caden ma guneno obedo tye, ka apimo lim woko ki mijan." 
Jeremiah32:11 Ci akwanyo waragaŋe me wilo lobo ma onoŋo amwono doge woko, ma tito kit kare ma biri kwede ki cik ma myero gilubi, ki kopine ma onoŋo pe gimwono," 
Jeremiah32:12 ci amiyo bot Baruk wod pa Neria ma wod pa Maceya. Amiyogi ducu bote i nyim Kanamel, i nyim caden ma guketo ciŋgi i waraga me wilo poto ca, ki i nyim Lujudaya ducu ma onoŋo gubedo i dyekal." 
Jeremiah32:13 Aciko Baruk ki i nyimgi ducu kun awaco ni," 
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Rwot me mony, ma Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco kuman ni, Kwany waraga man me wil ma gimwono doge woko ki ma pe gimwono doge-ni, ci iketgi i abino ma gicweyo ki lobo, wek gigwokgi guri pi kare malac." 
Jeremiah32:15 Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco ni, odi ki potti ki poto olok pud doki gibiwilo ki i lobo man.’" 
Jeremiah32:16 “Lacen ma doŋ atyeko miyo waraga me wil bot Baruk, ci alego ni," 
Jeremiah32:17 ‘Ai Rwot Lubaŋa! In aye ma iketo po lo ki lo bo ki tweroni dok ki tekki! Pe tye gin mo matek ma in pe iromo tiyone. 
Jeremiah32:18 Ibedo ka nyuto mar meri ma pe lokke bot jo alip ki alip, ento in bene iculo kwor i kom dano, iketo can i komgi pi bal pa kwarogi. In Lubaŋa madit dok it ye ki twero ducu; nyiŋi Rwot me mony." 
Jeremiah32:19 Ibedo ki yub me aura, dok itiyo gin matego ma dano uro; ineno bene gin ducu ma dano tiyo, imiyo bakacic bot dano acel acel kun lubo kit kwo ma en obedo kw ede ki kit gin ma en obedo ka timone." 
Jeremiah32:20 Yam itiyo taŋo ki lanyut-gu i lobo Ejipt. Pud imedde bene ka tiyogi wa onyoo, itiyo i Icrael ki i kin rok mukene ducu, mumiyo kombeddi doŋ giŋeyi i kabedo ducu," 
Jeremiah32:21 Doŋ tano ki lanyut ma itiyo-gu omiyo lukworwa gubedo ki lworo marac, dok itiyo ki tweroni ki tekki ikelo joni jo lerael woko ki i lobo Ejipt." 
Jeremiah32:22 Imiyo botgi lobo man ma mol cak ki moo kic, kit macalo yam ikwoŋo ni ibimiyo bot kwarogi-ni." 
Jeremiah32:23 Ento i kare ma doŋ gubino gudonyo i lobo man dok gucamo obedo megi, pe gulubo gin ma icikogi kwede dok bene pe gulubo pwonnyi wacel, pe gutiyo gin mo kadi ki acel i kom gin ma yam icikogi ni guti-ni. Pi meno en aye mumiyo ikelo can man iketo i komgi." 
Jeremiah32:24 “‘Nen, jo Kaldaya doŋ gutoro cel lobo gurumo ki gaŋ litit wek gima woko, doŋ bene gitye ka lweny, Pi man lweny, kec ki two gemo biweko gimiyo gaŋ man woko i ciŋ jo Kaldaya ma gitye ka lweny i keme-ni. Gin ma yam iloko doŋ otimme, kun in bene it ye ineno giri." 
Jeremiah32:25 Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, in aye ma yam ibedo ka waco bota ni, Wil poto man ki lim, dok inoŋ lucaden, kadi bed gaŋ doŋ gimiyo woko i ciŋ jo Kaldaya.’ ”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Cutcut Rwot owaco ki Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah32:27 “An a Rwot Lubaŋa pa dano ducu, Tye gin mo matek bota ma pe aromo tiyone?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Pi meno abemiyo gaŋ man woko bot kabaka Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon ki jo Kaldaya, gibimonyo gaŋ gimayo woko," 
Jeremiah32:29 Jo Kaldaya ma gitye ka lweny i kom gaŋ-ŋi gibibino gicwinyo mac i kom gaŋ ci waŋ woko. Gibiwaŋo woko kacel wa ki odi ka ma yam giwaŋo iye odok eceta bot jok Baal i wi ot-gu, ki onyo gityer amata-gu bot lubaŋa mukene me neto cwinya oweko kiniga omaka." 
Jeremiah32:30 Cakke wa con i acakki me kwogi, jo Icrael ki jo Juda gubedo ka tiyo gin ma pe yomo cwinya keken; jo Icrael gumiyo kiniga omaka pi cal lubaŋa ma gutiyo ki cingi-ni, man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah32:31 Gaŋ man omiyo kinigana ki akemona obedo ka medde woko ameda, cakke i kare ma gigero kwede nio wa onyoo. Doŋ atyeko moko me kwanyone woko ki ka waŋa," 
Jeremiah32:32 pi gin marac ma jo magi gutimo: jo Icrael ki jo Juda, kacel ki lukergi, ki lutel megi, ajwagigi ki lunebigi, jo Juda ki jo Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah32:33 Guloko ŋegi bota ento pe nyimgi; dok bene kadi bed abedo ka pwonyogi teretere ento gin pe guwinyo pwony ma abedo ka pwonyogi kwede. 
Jeremiah32:34 Guketo cal lubaŋagi ma en gin me kwer-ri i ot ma gilwoŋo ki nyina, pi balone woko." 
Jeremiah32:35 Gugero waŋ jogi mapol me woro Baal i nota pa wod pa Kinom ka ma gityero iye awobegi ki anyiragi bot jok Molek. Pe awaco botgi ni gutim man, dok bene gin ma kit meno onoŋo pe odonyo i tamma ni gibitimo gin macalo meno ma bimiyo jo Juda timo bal.”" 
Jeremiah32:36 Rwot, ma en Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco lok mukemo gaŋ man kuman ni, “Jeremia, in doŋ itito bot lwak man ni lweny, kec ki two gemo biweko gimiyo gaŋ man woko i ciŋ kabaka me Babilon. Kombeddi winy lok mukene ma an aewaco." 
Jeremiah32:37 Nen, abecito ka coko lwak man woko ducu ki i lobo ducu ka ma yam aryemogi gucito iye i kare ma onoŋo kiniga ki akemo ki akeca omaka i komgi; abidwokogi i kabedo man, abimiyo gibedo maber ki kuc." 
Jeremiah32:38 Gin gibibedo jona, ki an bene abibedo Lubaŋagi," 
Jeremiah32:39 Abimiyo gibedo ki cwiny acel ki kit acel, wek gubed ka wora matwal, wek gin ki litinogi ma gi bilubogi i anyim gubed maber." 
Jeremiah32:40 Abiketo gicikke ma bedo nakanaka kwedgi, ni pe abilokke aweko timo gin maber botgi, dok bene abimiyo gibedo ka lwora ki i cwinygi, wek pe gulokke gubwota woko." 
Jeremiah32:41 Cwinya bibedo yom ka timo gin maber botgi, dok abiketogi gibedo i lobo man matwal ki gen madit kun aketogi ki cwinya ducu ki tipona ducu." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Kit macalo akelo can man aketo i kom lwak man, pi meno bene abecito ka miyogi jami ducu mabeco ma yam acikke ni abimiyo botgi." 
Jeremiah32:43 Gibiwilo potti ki i lobo man ma iwacci, doŋ odoko tim aroo ka ma dano ki lee doŋ pe gibedo iye, dok bene iwaco ni gibimiyo woko i cin jo Kaldaya." 
Jeremiah32:44 Potti gibiwilo pi lim, ki waraga me wilo lobo bene gibiketo iye cin ci gimwono woko kun caden bene noŋo tye i lobo pa Benjamin, i kabedo ducu ma gurumo Jerucalem, ki i gaŋi me Juda, i gaŋi me lobo godigodi, i gaŋi me Cepela ki i gaŋi me Negeb, Abidwoko gum pa jo man botgi kun adwokogi cen i lobogi kikome. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Lok pa Rwot doki obino bot Jeremia tyen me aryone ma onoŋo en pud gitweye woko i mabuc i dyekal pa lukur-piny. 
Jeremiah33:2 Rwot ma oketo lobo, ma ocweyo omiyo ocun i kabedone, oloko ki Jeremia. En ma nyiŋe gilwoŋo ni Rwot-ti owaco kuman ni," 
Jeremiah33:3 “Lwona, ci abigamo dogi; abititti pi gin madito dok ma giuro ma pud peya iŋeyo gin mo i komgi liweŋ," 
Jeremiah33:4 An Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, awaco ni odi ma i Jerucalem ki gaŋ kal pa luker me Juda gibimukogi giretogi woko piny. Konnye pe me cito ka lweny i kom cel lobo ma jo Kaldaya gutoro-ni," 
Jeremiah33:5 Jo Kaldaya gitye ka bino ka lweny ki ka poŋo gaŋ man woko ki kom jo ma guto, ma an kikoma aye abinekogi ki kinigana kacel ki akemona, An doŋ aloko neya woko i kom gaŋ man pi tim ducu maraco ma jo ma bedo iye gutimo." 
Jeremiah33:6 “Abicaŋo gaŋ man dok abimiyo gibedo ma komgi yot. Abicaŋo jo ma gibedo iye ci anyuto botgi kuc madit ma bimiyo gibedo laboŋo lworo. 
Jeremiah33:7 Abidwoko gum pa jo Juda botgi ki pa jo Icrael, abigerogi odoco kit macalo yam gubedo con." 
Jeremiah33:8 Abilonyogi woko maleŋ ki i kom bal aliigi ki bal ma yam gutimo i koma, abiweko bal aliigi ki lok me jemo ma yam gujemo kwede i koma." 
Jeremiah33:9 Pi meno gaŋ me Jerucalem bibedo gaŋ me yomcwiny, gaŋ me pak ki me deyo bota; dok rok ducu ma i wi lobo bilworo, dok komgi bene bimyel, ka onoŋo guwinyo pi gin maber ma atye ka tiyone pi jo Jerucalem, ki pi berbedo ma atye ka kelone i gaŋ man.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Dano giwacci kabedo man obedo calo tim aroo; dano kadi ki lee ma bedo iye pe. Obedo lok ada ni gaŋi me Juda ki yo me Jerucalem gitye noŋo; dano nyo lee mo pe ma bedo kunnu. Ento i kabedo magi doki wubiwinyo aye" 
Jeremiah33:11 dwan me yomcwiny ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, dwan anyira ger ki dwan lunyom. Wubiwinyo dano giwero wer ka gikelo gityer me pwoc i oda; gibiwacci, ‘Wumi pwoc bot Rwot me mony, pien Rwot ber, mar mere ma pe lokke bedo nakanaka.’ Abimiyo lobo man bedo lobo mulony kit macalo yam onoŋo tye kwede wa con, man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah33:12 Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, “I lobo man ka ma obedo calo tim aroo, dok ka ma kadi dano nyo Lee pe bedo iye, i kare me anyim lum dok bibedo tye iye ka ma lukwat gitero romigi iye ka cam." 
Jeremiah33:13 I gaŋi me lobo godigodi, i gaŋi me Cepela, ki i gaŋi me Negeb, i lobo pa Benjamin, i kabedo ducu ma orumo Jerucalem, ki i gaŋi me Juda, lukwat dok gibikwano romigi. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah33:14 “Nen, kare tye ka bino, en aye kare ma abicobo iye cikke ma yam aketa ki jo Icrael ki jo Juda." 
Jeremiah33:15 I nino meno ki i kare meno abiketo iye lakwaro Daudi kikome me bedo kabaka. En bibedo jaŋ yat ma bilot ki kit ma atir, ma biloyo loc ki ryeko, dok bitiyo gin ma tye atir dok kakare i lobo man." 
Jeremiah33:16 I kare ma noŋo en tye kabaka, jo Juda gibibedo mot laboŋo lworo mo, ki jo Icrael bene doŋ gibibedo ki kuc. Gibilwoŋo kabaka meno ki nyiŋ ni, ‘Rwot aye ma miyowa kit ma atir.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 “An Rwot, doŋ atyeko cikke ni kare ducu dano mo bibedo tye ma en Lakwar Daudi ma myero obed kabaka me Icrael," 
Jeremiah33:18 dok bene kare ducu ajwagi bibedo tye ma gia ki i kaka pa Levi ma gin aye gibicuŋ i nyima nakanaka ka tyero gitum awaŋa, gityer me moko kwoŋ, ki gitum mukene-gu ducu.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Rwot owaco ki Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah33:20 “Bedo tek me turo gicikkena ki ceŋ ki dyewor, wek pe omi ceŋ ki dyewor gubin i karegi ma mitte kikome." 
Jeremiah33:21 Kit meno bene bedo tek me turo gicikkena ki laticca Daudi, wek pe en obed ki lakware mo ma myero obed kabaka, ki dok bene me turo gicikkena ki ajwagi ma gua ki i kaka pa Levi ma gin aye gitye ka tic bota." 
Jeremiah33:22 Abimedo wei likwayo pa laticca Daudi ki wel ajwagi bene ma gua ki i kaka pa Levi ma gitiyo bota, wek bene kwanogi obed tek kit macalo kwano lakalatwe ma i polo nyo nyig kweyo me dog nam tek kwede.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Rwot owaco bot Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Tika iŋeyo kit ma dano gilok kwede ni an doŋ atyeko kwero Icrael ki Juda woko, gin kaka aryo ma onoŋo ceŋ ayerogi-ni? En meno gin mumi yo gineno jona ki waŋ me cac dok bene pe gitamo pigi ni gin rok," 
Jeremiah33:25 Ento an Rwot, aketo gicikkena ki ceŋ ki dwe, dok bene aketo cik ma tye ka loyo polo ki lobo." 
Jeremiah33:26 Doŋ kit macalo ada atyeko timo man, kit meno bene abigwoko gicikkena ki likwayo pa Yakobo ka dok ki laticca Daudi. Kare ki kare abiyero dano ki i kom likwayo pa Daudi me loyo likwayo pa Abraim, Icaka ki Yakobo. Abidwoko gumgi kakare botgi, dok kica bibedo ka maka i komgi.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Rwot oloko ki Jeremia i kare ma Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon ki dul monnye, ki dul mony pa lurok ducu ki jo me rok ducu mapatpat ma gitye i te locce, onoŋo gitye ka lweny i kom Jerucalem ki i gaŋi ducu ma gurumo macokcok kwede," 
Jeremiah34:2 Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco bot Jeremia ni ocit owac ki Jedekia kabaka me Juda ni, “Nen, abemiyo gaŋ man woko i cin kabaka me Babilon, ci en biwaŋo woko licwic ki mac." 
Jeremiah34:3 Pe ibibwot ki i ciŋe, Gibimaki woko ci gimii bote. Ibineno kabaka me Babilon ki waŋi dok bene ibilok kwede Waŋ ki waŋ; ci i kare meno gibiteri woko i Babilon." 
Jeremiah34:4 Kabaka Jedekia, winy gin ma an Rwot atye ka wacone mukemo in. Pe gibineki i lweny ki pala lucwan." 
Jeremiah34:5 In ibito ki kuc, dok kit macalo gu bedo ka wano aŋwece i kare ma giyiko kwarowu, ma onoŋo gin luker ma gukwoŋo nyimwu, kit meno dano bene gibiwaŋo gin ma ŋwece kur piri, Gibikoki kun giwacci, ‘Kabakawa doŋ oto woko do!’ An Rwot doŋ atyeko loko lok man.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Cutcut lanebi Jeremia otito lok man bot Jedekia kabaka me Juda ki i Jerucalem," 
Jeremiah34:7 i kare ma dul mony pa kabaka me Babilon tye ka lweny i kom Jerucalem ki i kom gaŋi ducu me Juda ma yam giweko gudoŋ, Lakic ki Ajeka; magi keken aye onoŋo gubedo gaŋi ma girumo ki cel gogo ma gudoŋ i Juda." 
Jeremiah34:8 Rwot oloko ki Jeremia lacen i kare ma doŋ kabaka Jedekia otyeko keto gicikke ki jo ducu ma i Jerucalem me tito pi gonyo opiigi woko," 
Jeremiah34:9 Guketo gicikke ni dano acel acel bigonyo opiine ma gin jo Ibru, laco kacel ki dako, wek ŋat mo pe olok Lajudaya lawote obed opii." 
Jeremiah34:10 Ci dano ducu kacel ki lutelgi gumoko gicikke meno pi gonyo opiigi woko, pe dok me makogi wek gubed opii tyen me aryo. Gugonyo opiigi woko guweko gucito gire." 
Jeremiah34:11 Ento lacen dok gumako opii ma co ki ma mon, gumakogi gudwokogi cen kun yam gugonyogi woko, ci gumiyo gudok i te locgi macalo opii." 
Jeremiah34:12 I kare meno en aye Rwot," 
Jeremiah34:13 Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco bot Jeremia ni, “Yam aketo gicikke ki kwarowu i kare ma akwanyogi ki i lobo Ejipt, ki i ot me can. Awaco botgi ni," 
Jeremiah34:14 i tum mwaka me abicel dano acel acel myero ogony Laibru lawote ma yam gicato bote macalo opii ma doŋ otyeko tic bote pi mwaka abicel; myero gugonygi woko wek doŋ pe guti botgi. Ento kwarowu yam pe guketo cwinygi i lokka dok bene pe guciko itgi me winyone. 
Jeremiah34:15 Ento i kare ma okato macokcok-ki onoŋo wun Wuŋut ci wutiyo gin ma tye atir i waŋa kun wutito lok me gonyo opiiwu, dano acel acel ki lawote, dok bene wuketo gicikke i nyima i ot ma gilwoŋo ki nyina-ni," 
Jeremiah34:16 Ento lacen dok wulokke ci wupyedo nyina kun dano acel acel dok okwanyo opii ma co ki ma mon odwokogi cen bote, ma’ onoŋo nene doŋ wugonyogi woko macalo mitgi tye, ci wukelogi wuketogi i te loc me opii doki aye." 
Jeremiah34:17 Pi meno, an Rwot awaco kuman ni, onoŋo pe wulubo cikka i kare ma wutito lok me gonyo opiiwu, pe wugonyo jo Ibru wadiwu woko ki i opii, Pi meno, an aye doŋ atito botwu ni, abigonyowu wek ginekwu woko i lweny, two gemo binekowu ki kec bene binekowu woko. Man Rwot ma owaco. Abimiyo wudoko gin ma kelo lworo bot ker ducu ma tye i wi lobo." 
Jeremiah34:18 Lutel me Juda ki Jerucalem kacel ki ludito ma giloyo gaŋ kal, ajwagi, ki jo me lobo meno ducu, guketo gicikke kweda kun giwoto ki i kin wod twon ma guŋolo i dul aryo. Ento guturo gicikke ‘ma gin guketo ki i nyima-ni, pe gugwoko gin ducu ma mako gicikke man. Kit meno abitimo i kom jo man gin ma gin gutimo i kom wod twon." 
Jeremiah34:19 Abimiyogi woko i ciŋ lukworgi. Abimiyogi woko i ciŋ jo ma mito nekogi, doŋ komgi muto-ni winyo ki ŋuu me tim aye ma bicamo." 
Jeremiah34:20 Abimiyo Jedekia kabaka me Juda kacel ki rwodine i cin lukworgi ma gimito nekogi. Abimiyogi woko bot dul mony pa kabaka me Babilon, ma gugiko lweny woko i komwu-ni." 
Jeremiah34:21 Nen, abicikogi, ci gidwogo cen i gaŋ man. Gibilweny i kome, gibimako, ci giwaŋo woko licwic ki mac. Abimiyo gaŋi me Juda ducu lokke doko macalo tim aroo ka ma dano mo pe bedo iye. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 I kare ma Yekoyakim wod pa Yocia onoŋo obedo kabaka me Juda, Rwot oloko ki Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Cit i kaka pa jo Rekab ci ilok kwedgi, Ka doŋ ikelgi i kicika ma tye i ot pa Rwot ci imi botgi kono yino gumati.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Ci Jeremia okwanyo Jajania wod pa Jeremia mukene, wod pa Kabajinia, ki omegine, ki awobene ducu, ki jo Rekab ducu," 
Jeremiah35:4 ci okelogi i ot pa Rwot. Oterogi i kicika pa awobe pa Kanan, wod pa Igdalia, ma en dano pa Lubaŋa, Kicika man onoŋo tye cok ki kicika pa rwodi, ina tye malo ka wi kicika pa Mecaya wod pa Calum, ma en dano ma lakur doggola me ot pa Rwot." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ci Jeremia oketo kikopo ki abino ma koŋo vino opoŋ iye i nyimgi, ka doŋ owaco botgi ni, “Wumat koŋo.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Ento gin gudok iye ni, “Wan pe wamato koŋo vino pien Jonadab wod pa Rekab, ma en kwarowa, otito ni waŋ kacel ki likwayowa ducu pe wabimato koŋo vino matwal." 
Jeremiah35:7 En bene otito botwa ni pe myero wager odi, pe wapur poto, pe bene wapit olok kadi ki wilone ki lim bene pe wawil. Ocikowa me bedo i kema pi kare me kwowa ducu, wek wabed ka medde ki bedo i lobo ma waŋ wawelo iye-ni pi kare malac." 
Jeremiah35:8 Wan walubo pwony pa Jonadab wod pa Rekab, ma en obedo kwarowa. Wan kikomwa pe wamato koŋo, kadi monwa, awobewa ki anyirawa bene pe gimato." 
Jeremiah35:9 Pe wagero odi ma myero wabed iye, pe watye ki poto olok mo, kadi ki potti mukene, kodiwa bene pe;" 
Jeremiah35:10 wan giwa wabedo i kema. Wan wabedo ka lubo kit cik ducu ma kwarowa Jonadab ocikowa kwede. 
Jeremiah35:11 Ento i kare ma Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon obino omonyo kwede lobo man, wamoko tamwa me bino i Jerucalem pi riŋo woko ki bot mony pa jo Kaldaya ki Ciria. Meno aye gin mumiyo kombeddi watye ka bedo i Jerucalem-mi.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael dok owaco bot Jeremia me cito ka waco bot jo Juda ki Jerucalem, ni" 
Jeremiah35:13 “An Rwot apenyowu ni piŋo wukwero gamo pwonnya ki winyo lokka? 
Jeremiah35:14 Likwayo pa Jonadab ducu gulubo dok gugwoko cik ma en ocikogi kwede, pe gumato koŋo vino, kadi wa onyoo pe tye ŋat mo i kingi ma mato koŋo, pien gilubo cik ma kwarogi ocikogi kwede. Abedo ka lok botwu teretere ento wun pe wuwinyo lokka." 
Jeremiah35:15 Abedo ka cwalo botwu luticca lunebi teretere, gin bene gubedo ka tito botwu ni wulokke wuwek kit yo mewu marac-ci dok wuti gin ma tye atir. Gin guciko bene matek ni pe myero wuwor lubaŋa mogc mukene dok pe wuti botgi, wek pud wumedde ki bedo i lobo ma yam amiyo botwu ki bot kwarowu. Ento wun pe wuciko itwu dok bene pe wuwinyo lokka." 
Jeremiah35:16 Likwayo pa Jonadab gire gulubo gin ma kwarogi ocikogi kwede, ento wun pe wulubo lokka wacel." 
Jeremiah35:17 Pi meno, an Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, abekelo can ma yam acikke pire ni aketo i kom jo Juda ki Jerucalem-mi. Abitimo man pien wun pe wuwinyo lokka i kare ma aloko kwedwu, dok bene ka alwoŋowu wun pe wugamo doga.”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Ci Jeremia owaco ki jo me kaka pa Rekab ni Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owacci, “Wun doŋ wutyeko lubo cik ma kwarowu Jonadab yam ocikowu kwede; wulubo pwonnye woko ducu liweŋ, dok bene wutiyo gin ducu ma onoŋo en ocikowu ni wuti." 
Jeremiah35:19 Pi meno, omiyo an Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, acikke ni Jonadab wod pa Rekab kare ducu bibedo ki lakware mo ma laco ma bitic bota.”" 
Jeremiah36:1 I mwaka me aŋwen me loc pa Yekoyakim wod pa Yocia kabaka me Juda, Rwot owaco bot Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Kwany buk adola ci ico iye lok ducu ma atito boti mukemo Icrael ki Juda, kacel ki rok ducu. Co gin ducu ma atito boti tyen mukwoŋo, i kare ma onoŋo Yocia aye kabaka o kwede wa onyoo." 
Jeremiah36:3 Gwok nyo ka jo Juda guwinyo pi can ma onoŋo ayubbe me kelo i komgi, miyo gin ducu gibilokke giweko yogi marac-ci. Ci abiweko balgi ki gin maraco ducu ma yam gutimo.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Kumeno Jeremia olwoŋo Baruk wod pa Neria, ci okwano bot Baruk gin ducu ma onoŋo Rwot owaco bote, kun Baruk obedo ka coyo woko liweŋ i buk adola." 
Jeremiah36:5 Ka doŋ Jeremia ociko Baruk kun wacce ni, “An doŋ gigeŋa woko ni pe adony i ot pa Rwot." 
Jeremiah36:6 Ento amito in icit kunnu i kare mo ma noŋo dano tye ka ri kec, ci ikwan lok ma i buk adola-ni woko matek ki dwan maloŋo, wek jo ducu ma gitye i ot pa Rwot guwiny lok ma Rwot onoŋo owaco bota, en lok ma an akwanogi boti icoyo i buk adola-ni, Myero ikwan lok magi bot jo Juda ducu ma gua ki i gaŋigi wek guwiny." 
Jeremiah36:7 Gwok nyo gibilego lega me bako doggi bot Rwot, ci gilokke giweko timo gin marac, pi lok ma Rwot doŋ oloko i kom lwak man ki kiniga kacel ki akemo mager.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Kit meno Baruk okwano lok pa Rwot i ot pa Rwot kit macalo lanebi Jeremia ocike kwede ni myero en oti. 
Jeremiah36:9 I dwe me aboŋwen i mwaka me abicce me loc pa Yekoyakim kabaka me Juda, dano gubedo ka ri kec wek Rwot okonygi, Jo ma gubedo ka ri kec onoŋo obedo jo ma gubedo i Jerucalem kacel ki jo ma gua ki i gaŋi ducu me Juda ci gubino kunnu." 
Jeremiah36:10 I kare ma dano guciko itgi ka winyo lok, ci Baruk okwano lok ducu ma Jeremia owacce ma en ocoyo i buk adola. Baruk otiyo man i ot pa Rwot i kicika pa Gemaria wod pa Capan ma karan. Kicikane onoŋo tye cok ki dyekal mamalo, i kabedo ma gidonyo kwede i dog gaŋ Manyen me ot pa Rwot." 
Jeremiah36:11 Mikaya wod pa Gemaria, wod pa Capan, owinyo ka Baruk kwano lok ma Rwot owaco ki i buk adola." 
Jeremiah36:12 Cutcut en oa ocito i gaŋ kal, ci odonyo i kicika pa karan pa kabaka, Onoŋo rwodi ducu gucokke kunnu: Elicama karan, Delaya wod pa Cemaya, Elnatan wod pa Akbor, Gemaria wod pa Capan, Jedekia wod pa Anania ki rwodi ducu." 
Jeremiah36:13 Ci Mikaya owaco botgi lok ducu ma en owinyo i kare ma Baruk okwano lok ki i buk adola i nyim lwak-ki," 
Jeremiah36:14 Ci rwodi guoro Jekudi wod pa Netania, wod pa Celemia, wod pa Kuci, me waco bot Baruk ni, “Kwany buk adola ma ikwano bot lwak-ki imak i ciŋi ci ibin.” Kit meno Baruk wod pa Neria okwanyo buk adola omako i ciŋe ci obino kwede botgi." 
Jeremiah36:15 Ci guwaco bote ni, “Bed piny ikwan buk meno.” Kit meno Baruk okwano botgi lok meno." 
Jeremiah36:16 I kare ma doŋ guwinyo lok magi woko ducu, ŋat acel acel olokke bot lawote ki lworo madwoŋ, ci guwaco bot Baruk ni, “Myero wuwac lok man woko bot kabaka.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Ka gupenyo Baruk ni, “Tittiwa, lok magi ducu icoyogi niŋniŋ i Jeremia aye ma obedo ka wacone boti ka in icoyo?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruk odok iye ni, “Jeremia obedo ka waco lok magi ducu bota ki acel acel, ka acoyogi i buk adola ki kalam vino.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Ci rwodi guwaco bot Baruk ni, “In kacel ki Jeremia myero wucit wukanne woko, pe wuwek ŋat mo oŋe ka ma wutye iye.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Lacen rwodi gucito guketo buk adola i kicika pa Elicama, ma karan, ka doŋ gucito i gaŋ pa kabaka, ci gutito lok woko ducu bot kabaka ki kunnu." 
Jeremiah36:21 Cutcut kabaka ooro Jekudi me cito ka gamo buk adola. Jekudi ocito okwanyo ki i kicika pa Elicama ka okwano bot kabaka kacel ki rwodi ducu ma onoŋo gucuŋ ka ŋete. 
Jeremiah36:22 I dwe me aboŋwen onoŋo kare me cwir, kabaka bene onoŋo tye i gaŋ kalle ma en bedo iye i cwir, ci onoŋo obedo ka oyo mac." 
Jeremiah36:23 I kare ma Jekudi kwano buk adola, ka okwano oo i dul coc me adek nyo me aŋwen, ci kabaka ŋolo woko cutcut ki pala matidi ci bolo woko i mac. Obedo ka timo man nio ka buk adola owan otum woko ducu." 
Jeremiah36:24 Ento ŋat mo kadi kabaka nyo luticce ma guwinyo lok magi ducu pe gubedo ki lworo, dok bene pe guyeco boŋŋigi," 
Jeremiah36:25 Kadi bed Elnatan, Delaya, kacel ki Gemaria gulego kabaka ni pe owaŋ buk adola-ni woko, kabaka pe oketo cwinye me winyo lokgi wacel." 
Jeremiah36:26 Lacen kabaka ociko wode Jeramel, kacel ki Ceraya wod pa Ajriel, ki Celemia wod pa Abdcel ni gumak Baruk karan kacel ki lanebi Jeremia, ento Rwot okanogi woko. Jeremia dok ocoyo buk adola mukene’" 
Jeremiah36:27 Lacen ma doŋ kabaka otyeko waŋo buk adola ma Jeremia aye owaco lokke bot Baruk ka Baruk ocoyo-ni, Rwot ociko Jeremia" 
Jeremiah36:28 ni okwany buk adola mukene ka oco iye lok ducu ma onoŋo tye i buk adola mukwoŋo ca ma kabaka Yekoyakim doŋ otyeko wano woko-ni. 
Jeremiah36:29 Rwot otitte me waco bot kaba ka Yekoyakim ni; “Doŋ ityeko wano buk adola ca woko, dok bene ipenyo Jeremia ni piŋo en ocoyo ni kabaka me Babilon bibino ada ci tyeko lobo man woko kun neko jo ducu kacel ki lee ma tye iye," 
Jeremiah36:30 Pi meno an Rwot, awaco bot in Yekoyakim ka baka me Juda ni, pe tye dano mo ki i kom Likwayu ma bibedo kabaka. Ka ito komi gibibolo woko ka ma Lyeto ceŋ biwaŋo ki dyeceŋ ki nico me pee dyewor." 
Jeremiah36:31 Abiketo can i komi kacel ki likwayu, ki luticci, pi balwu ducu ma wutye ka timone. Dok in, kadi ki jo Jerucalem nyo jo Juda, pe wubedo ka keto cwinywu me winyo lok ma abedo ka waco botwu teretere, pi meno abekelo can ma onoŋo yam doŋ aciko pire ni aketo i komwu-ni.”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Ci Jeremia dok okwanyo buk adola mukene ci omiyo bot Baruk karan, ci Baruk ocoyo lok woko ducu ki acel acel kit macalo Jeremia obedo ka wacce kwede. Baruk ocoyo lok ducu ma onoŋo tye i buk adola mukwoŋo ma kabaka Yekoyakim owaŋo woko ki mac-ci. Jeremia dok omedo iye lok mapol maromrom ki lok me wiati ca." 
Jeremiah37:1 Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon yam oketo Jedekia wod pa Yocia me bedo kabaka me Juda ma ka Yekonia wod pa Yekoyakim. 
Jeremiah37:2 Ento Jedekia ki luticce, ka wa lwak bene pe guwinyo lok pa Rwot ma Rwot omiyo bot lanebi Jeremia ni otit botgi-ni." 
Jeremiah37:3 Kabaka Jedekia ocwalo Yekukal wod pa Celemia, ki ajwaka Jepania wod pa Maceya bot Jeremia, kun giwacce ni, “Myero ileg Rwot Lubaŋawa-ni piwa.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 I kare meno onoŋo Jeremia pud tye ka wirre ata i kin dano, donyo i ot ci kato woko gire kit ma cwinye mito, pien onoŋo pud peya gitweye i mabuc." 
Jeremiah37:5 I kare meno bene mony pa Parao oa ki i Ejipt obino; i kare ma jo Kaldaya ma onoŋo gitye ka rumo Jerucalem guwinyo lok man, ci gucako dye woko ki i Jerucalem gudok woko cen ki ŋegi." 
Jeremiah37:6 Ka doŋ Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco bot lanebi Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah37:7 “Wac bot kabaka me Juda ma ocwali me lok kweda ni, ‘Dul mony pa Parao ma onoŋo bino ka konyi-ni doŋ bidok woko i lobo Ejipt." 
Jeremiah37:8 Ci jo Kaldaya bidwogo cen. Gibibino gilwenyo i kom gaŋ man, gimayo woko ka doŋ giwaŋo woko ki mac." 
Jeremiah37:9 An Rwot acikowu matek ni pe myero wubed ka bwolle kekenwu kun wutamo ni jo Kaldaya pe bidwogo cen, myero wuniaŋ ni gibidwogo." 
Jeremiah37:10 Kadi bed wuloyo dul mony pa jo Kaldaya ma gibino ka lweny i komwu-ni, ma noŋo doŋ jo mudoŋŋe keken, en aye jo ma noŋo giketo ret i komgi ma gibuto i kemagi, jo-nu bene pud gibiromo a malo ci giwaŋo gaŋ-ŋi woko ki mac.’ ”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Dul mony pa jo Kaldaya gudok woko cen ki i Jerucalem ki ŋegi pien onoŋo mony pa Parao doŋ onyiko cok mada. 
Jeremiah37:12 Ci Jeremia oa ki i Jerucalem ocito i lobo pa Benjamin ka gamo dul lobo ma gipoko bote ki i kin lutugi. 
Jeremiah37:13 Ento i kare ma Jeremia oo i dog gaŋ pa Benjamin, onoŋo ladit ma loyo askari tye ka tic kunnu, nyiŋe gilwoŋo Irija wod pa Celemia ma wod pa Anania; cutcut omako Jeremia woko kun wacce ni, “In it ye ka lwi woko icito bot jo Kaldaya.”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Jeremia odok iye ni, “Meno lok goba, an pe atye ka lwi woko acito bot jo Kaldaya.” Ento Irija onoŋo pe twero winyo lok pa Jeremia mumiyo omake otere bot rwodi." 
Jeremiah37:15 Ci kiniga omako rwodi matek i kom Jeremia, gugoye ka gutweye kwede woko i mabuc i ot pa Yonacan ma karan, pien onoŋo doŋ giloko odoko ot mabuc." 
Jeremiah37:16 Gitweyo Jeremia i ot ma obedo bur ma tye i te ŋom, ci giweko ori kunnu pi kare malac." 
Jeremiah37:17 Ci kabaka Jedekia ocwalo dano ka kelo Jeremia bote, ci gikelo, en ojolo Jeremia maber. Kabaka ocako penye ki i ot i muŋ kun penye ni, “Tye lok ma Rwot otitti?” Jeremia ogamo ni, “Lok tye.’, Dok omedo lok kun wacce ni, “Gibimiyi woko i ciŋ kabaka me Babilon.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Jeremia owaco bene ki kabaka Jedekia ni, “Gin marac aŋo ma an atimo boti nyo bot luticci kadi ki bot lwak man, mumiyo itweya woko i mabuc-ci?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Gin aŋo mutimme i kom lunebini ma yam gutyeto lok boti ni kabaka me Babilon pe bibino ka lweny i komi kadi ki i kom lobo man? 
Jeremiah37:20 Kombeddi doŋ, ai laditta, alegi iwiny kokona pe dok idwoka cen i ot pa Yonacan karan, weko abito woko ki kunnu.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Pi meno Jedekia omiyo cik, ci gukelo Jeremia guketo me bedo i dyekal pa lukur-piny, kun oye gibedo ka miye mugati nino ki nino, mugati ma gigamo ki i yo pa luted mugati, nio waŋ ma mugati doŋ otum woko liweŋ ki i gaŋ, Kit meno Jeremia obedo kunnu i dyekal pa lukur-piny," 
Jeremiah38:1 I kare-nu Cepatia wod pa Matan, Gedalia wod pa Packur, Jukal wod pa Celemia ki Packur wod pa Malkia gubedo ka winyo lok ma Jeremia obedo ka wacone bot lwak. En obedo ka waco botgi ni" 
Jeremiah38:2 Rwot owaco ni, “Ŋat mo ma bidoŋ bedo i gaŋ gibineko woko ki pala lucwan, kec bineko ki two gemo bene bipoto i kome neke wako. Ento ŋat ma bia cita ka mine kene bot jo Kaldaya pe gibineko, bibedo kwo; en bilaro kwone ci bedo bote macalo mot me lweny.”" 
Jeremiah38:3 Jeremia bene onoŋo obedo ka tito lok bot lwak ni Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Abemiyo gaŋ man woko i ciŋ dul mony pa kabaka me Babilon, ci en bimako woko.”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Ci rwodi guwaco bot kabaka ni, “Laco man myero ginek woko, pien en miyo cwmyaskari kacel ki lwak ma odoŋ i gaŋ doko lwor, pi lok ma en loko botgi-ni. Dano man pe tye ka yenyo yo me miyo kony pi berbedo pa lwak, ento mito kelo can i komgi aye.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Kabaka Jedekia owacci, “Nen, twero tye i ciŋwu, wutim gin ma wumito i kome; an pe atwero genowu gira.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Ci gumako Jeremia gubole woko i waŋ it pa Malkia, ma en wod pa kabaka, ma onoŋo obedo i dyekal pa lukur-piny, Gutweye ki tol gucwale kwede piny i waŋ it kunnu. Pii onoŋo pe i waŋ it, ento coto keken aye onoŋo odoŋ, ci Jeremia ocako mwony woko i coto." 
Jeremiah38:7 Kadi bed kumeno, Ebed-melek Laetiopia, dano ma gikolo, ma yam tiyo i gaŋ kal pa kabaka, owinyo ni gibolo Jeremia woko i waŋ it. I kare meno onoŋo kabaka obedo ki lukikone i dog gaŋ pa Benjamin." 
Jeremiah38:8 Ci Ebedmelek oa ki i gaŋ kal pa kabaka ocito bot kabaka owacce ni," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Laditta, jo magi gutimo gin marac atika. Gubolo Jeremia woko i waŋ it, ka ma ageno ni kec bi neke woko ki kunnu. Cam mo ma romo doŋ pe i gaŋ.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Ci kabaka omiyo twero bot Ebed-melek Laetiopia me kwanyo jo adek gucit kwede ka ywayo Jeremia woko ki i waŋ it ma peya noŋo oto. 
Jeremiah38:11 Ci Ebed-melek okwanyo jo meno adek ka ocito i ot pa kabaka, odonyo ka ma giketo iye boŋo i ot kano jami, ci okwanyo ketuketu boŋo muti ki boŋo mogo muyec, ci otweyo ki tol ocwalo piny i waŋ it bot Jeremia." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ci Ebed-melek owaco ki Jeremia ni, “Ket ketuketu boŋo ki boŋo muyec i te yweti ka iket tol i kome.” Jeremia otimo kit meno," 
Jeremiah38:13 ci guywaye ki tol ki i waŋ it gukele woko ka maleŋ, Ci Jeremia omedde ka bedo i dyekal pa lukur-piny," 
Jeremiah38:14 Kabaka Jedekia ocwalo dano gikelo Jeremia bote ki i doggola me adek me donyo i ot pa Rwot. Kabaka owaco bot Jeremia ni, “Abipenyi peny acel, doŋ pi meno pe amito imuŋ lok mo woko bota.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Jeremia owaco bot Jedekia ni, “Ka ce atitti lok ada, ibineka woko, dok bene ka ce amiyi tam, ci pe ibiketo cwinyi iye.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Pi meno kabaka Jedekia okwoŋne bot Jeremia i muŋ kun wacci, “Macalo Rwot tye kwe-ni, ma omiyowa kwo, pe abineki, dok bene pe abimiyi i cin jo ma gimito neki woko-ni.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Ci Jeremia owaco bot Jedekia ni Rwot Lubaua me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco kuman ni, “Ka ce ibimine keni bot rwodi pa kabaka me Babilon, ci gibiweki ibedo kwo, ki gaŋ man bene pe gibiwaŋo woko ki mac. Ento in kacel ki jo ma i odi wubikwo." 
Jeremiah38:18 Ento ka ce pe imine keni bot rwodi pa kabaka me Babilon, ci gaŋ man gibimiyo woko i ciŋ jo Kaldaya, gibiwaŋo woko, pi meno in pe ibibwot ki i ciŋgi wacel.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Kabaka Jedekia owaco bot Jeremia ni” “Alworo Lujudaya ma doŋ gumme woko kengi bot io Kaldayani, pien kare mukene gimiya woko i ciŋgi, ci gibitima ki tim anywar marac.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Jeremia owacce ni, “Pe gibimiyi botgi. Kombeddi doŋ ilub lok pa Rwot i gin ducu ma awacci, ci ibibedo maber, dok bene gibibwoti ibedo kwo." 
Jeremiah38:21 Ento Rwot doŋ onyutta ginanyuta i waŋ lek, gin ma bitimme ka ce ikwero mine woko keni botgi." 
Jeremiah38:22 Nen, mon ducu ma yam giweko gudoŋ i gaŋ kal pa kabaka me Juda doŋ gitye ka terogi woko bot rwodi pa kabaka me Babilon. Winy lok ma gitye ka wacone kun giwoto gicito kwede ni, ‘Luremi ma igenogi-ni doŋ gubwoli, dok bene guloyi woko, Doŋ kombeddi kit macalo tyeni omwony woko i coto-ni, gulokke guweki woko keni.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:23 Jeremia dok owaco ni, “Monni ducu kacel ki litinoni gibiterogi woko bot jo Kaldaya, ki bene pe ibibwot ki i ciŋgi, Kabaka me Babilon bimaki woko macalo opii, ki gaŋ man bene gibiwaŋo woko ki mac.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Jedekia owaco bot Jeremia ni, “Pe iwek gat mo oŋe lok ma wawaco, ci pe ibito." 
Jeremiah38:25 Ka ce rwodi guwinyo ni aloko kwedi, ka gubino boti guwacci ni, “Tit botwa gin ma in iwaco bot kabaka ki gin ma kabaka owaco boti, pe imuŋ lok mo botwa pien waŋ giwa pe wabineki,’" 
Jeremiah38:26 ibiwaco botgi ni, ‘Akok bot kabaka ki mwolo kun abako doga bote ni pe myero odwoka cen i ot pa Yonacan me to kunnu.’’’" 
Jeremiah38:27 Ci rwodi ducu gua gubino bot Jeremia gupenye ci en bene odok iye botgi kit macalo kabaka opwonye kwede. Mumiyo guweko lok kwede woko, pien lok ma gubedo ka lokone-ni gat mo muwinyo pe." 
Jeremiah38:28 Gigwoko Jeremia i dyekal pa lukur-piny nio waŋ ma Jerucalem gimayo woko," 
Jeremiah39:1 I mwaka me aboŋwen me loc pa Jedekia kabaka me Juda, i dwe me apar en aye Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon obino kwede ki monnye ducu i kom Jerucalem, ci orumo gaŋ woko." 
Jeremiah39:2 Gaŋ girumo kit meno nio wa i mwaka me apar wiye acel me loc pa kabaka Jedekia. I dwe me aŋwen, ninone aboŋwen, en aye gumuko kwede cel gag woko." 
Jeremiah39:3 I kare ma doŋ gimayo Jerucalem woko, ci rwodi ducu pa kabaka me Babilon gubino gubedo i dog gaŋ ma i dyere ma tye i gaŋ kai: gin aye Nergal-carejer, Camgar-nebo, Carcekim Larabcaric, Nergal-carejer ma Larabmag, ki ludito mukene ducu pa kabaka me Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:4 I kare ma Jedekia kabaka me Juda kacel ki askari ducu gunenogi, ci guweko gaŋ guriŋo woko i dyewor, kun giwok ki i dog gaŋ ma i kin cel aryo me gaŋ ma onoŋo guwok i poto pa kabaka; ci gucito gulubo yo ma dok tun Araba." 
Jeremiah39:5 Ento mony pa jo Kaldaya guryemo korgi, ci gumako Jedekia wa i bar me Jeriko; doŋ i kare ma gumake woko gukele bot Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon i Ribla, ma i lobo Kamat; ci oŋolle iye kop," 
Jeremiah39:6 Kabaka me Babilon oneko awobe pa Jedekia woko i Ribla ki i nyime ma waŋe neno, dok kabaka me Babilon oneko ludito me awora me Juda-gu woko ducu." 
Jeremiah39:7 Ci okolo waŋ Jedekia giloyo woko, ka gitweye ki nyor, gitere kwede wa i Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:8 Jo Kaldaya guwaŋo ot pa kabaka, ki odi pa lwak ducu, ci gumuko kicika cel ma orumo Jerucalem woko." 
Jeremiah39:9 Ki jo ma yam gudoŋ i gaŋ, ki jo ma yam gukobo gigi kengi bot kabaka me Babilon, kacel ki lwak ma gudoŋŋe ducu, Nebujaradan ma ladit pa lugwok kabaka oterogi woko i opii i Babilon." 
Jeremiah39:10 Ento Nebujaradan ladit pa lugwok kabaka yam oweko lu can mogo ma limgi pe gudoŋ i lobo, ci omiyogi poto olok ki potti mukene bene i kare meno." 
Jeremiah39:11 Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon omiyo cik mukemo Jeremia kun wok ki bot Nebujaradan, ladit pa lugwok kabaka kun wacci," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Tere, gwoke maber, pe itim gin mo marac i kome, ento ti kwede i yo ducu kit macalo en titti.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Ci Nebujaradan ladit pa, lugwok kabaka, Nebucajban Larabcaric, Nergal-carejer ma Larabmag, ki ludito madoŋo ducu pa kabaka me Babilon" 
Jeremiah39:14 gucwalo dano okelo Jeremia ki i dyekal pa lukur-piny, Ci gumiye bot Gedalia wod pa Akikam, ma wod pa Capan, wek otere paco. Ci omiyo en obedo i kin dano." 
Jeremiah39:15 Rwot oloko ki Jeremia i kare ma onoŋo gitweye woko i dyekal pa lukurpiny. Owaco bot Jeremia 
Jeremiah39:16 me tito bot Ebed-melek Laetiopia ni Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owacci, “Nen, abicobo lokka kun aketo can i kom gaŋ man, pe abitimo gin mo maber, lok man bicobbe i nyimi in kikomi i nino meno." 
Jeremiah39:17 Ento an Rwot abilari, pe gibimiyi i ciŋ jo meno ma it ye ka lworogi-ni." 
Jeremiah39:18 Pien adada an abilari, mumiyo pe gibineki woko ki pala lucwan, ento ibibedo kwo, ci kwoni bibedo boti macalo mot me lweny, pien iketo genni ducu i koma, man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Rwot oloko ki Jeremia i kare ma doŋ Nebujaradan, ladit pa lugwok kabaka ogonye woko ki i Rama. Onoŋo yam gitweyo Jeremia woko ki nyor kacel ki jo mapol ma gimakogi ki i Jerucalem ki Juda, ma giterogi woko i opii i Babilon." 
Jeremiah40:2 Ladit pa lugwok kabaka okwanyo Jeremia ci owacce ni, “Rwot Lubaŋani doŋ otytiko tito pi kit can ma bipoto i kabedo man;" 
Jeremiah40:3 Rwot doŋ otimo gin ma nene en owaco ni ebitimo-ni. Man ducu otimme pien lutuwu gutimo bal i kom Rwot dok bene pe guwinyo lokke. 
Jeremiah40:4 Kombeddi doŋ abegonyo nyor woko ki i ciŋi ci aweko icito laboŋo ayela mo. Ka ce imito wot kacel kweda me cito i Babilon, ci itwero, an abigwoki. Ka ce pe imito cito itwero bene bedo giri. Nen lobo-ni ducu tye en, yer ka mo ma itamo ni ber nyo oporre me cito iye.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Ento Jeremia pe ocito, mumiyo Nebujaradan owacce ni, “Dok cen bot Gedalia wod pa Akikam, ma wod pa Capan, ma nene kabaka okete me bedo laloc me gaŋi me Juda ducu. Itwero bedo kacel kwede i kin lwak, nyo itwero giri cito ka ma itamo ni ber me cito iye.” Ci ladit pa lugwok kabaka omiye cam ki mot mogo ka doŋ oweko en ocito gire." 
Jeremiah40:6 Jeremia ocito bot Gedalia wod pa Akikam i Mijpa, ci obedo kacel kwede i kin lwak ma onoŋo gudoŋ i lobo meno." 
Jeremiah40:7 Ludito mogo ki askari pa Lujudaya onoŋo pud gibedo i tim. Guwinyo ni kabaka me Babilon otyeko keto Gedalia wod pa Akikam me bedo laloc me lobo, dok oketo en me loyo jo ducu mudoŋ, co, mon kacel ki litino, ma yam pe giterogi i opii i Babilon, ma gin aye doŋ jo ma lucan adada i lobo meno." 
Jeremiah40:8 Ci Icmael wod pa Netania, Yokanan wod pa Karea, Ceraya wod pa Tanumet, likwayo pa Epai ma jo Netopa, ki Jejania ma Lamaaka gucito kacel ki lwak megi bot Gedalia i Mijpa." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedalia wod pa Akikam, ma wod pa Capan, okwoŋŋe botgi kacel ki lwakgi ducu kun wacci, “Pe myero wubed ki lworo me tic bot jo Kaldaya. Wubed kunnu ci wuti bot kabaka me Babilon, ci wubibedo maber ki kuc." 
Jeremiah40:10 An gira abibedo i Mijpa kun abedo macalo lawaŋwu ka jo Kaldaya gubino kany. Ento wun wutwero kano koŋo vino, nyig yat ki moo jeituni, ci wubed kwede i gaŋi ma doŋ wumayogi-ni.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Kit meno bene, Lujudaya ducu ma onoŋo yam gitye i lobo Moab, Ammon, Edom ki lo bo mukene ducu ma yam giryemogi gucito iye, guwinyo ni kabaka me Babilon oweko jo mukene odoŋ i Juda, dok bene en oketo Gedalia wod pa Akikam, ma wod pa Capan me bedo laloc ma loyogi." 
Jeremiah40:12 Ci Lujudaya ducu guweko lobo ka ma yam giryemogi gucito iye ni, gucako dwogo cen i Juda. Gubino bot Gedalia i Mijpa, ci gucoko koŋo yino madit ki nyig yadi me oro madwoŋ adada." 
Jeremiah40:13 I ŋe meno, Yokanan ki ludito ducu ma giloyo askari ma onoŋo gitye i tim gubino bot Gedalia i Mijpa," 
Jeremiah40:14 ci guwacce ni, “Tika iŋeyo ni Baalic kabaka pa jo Ammon otyeko cwalo Icmael wod pa Netania me neki woko?” Ento Gedalia wod pa Akikam pe oye lokgi." 
Jeremiah40:15 Ka doŋ Yokanan oloko ki Gedalia i muŋ i Mijpa, kun wacce ni, “Wek acit acinek Icmael wod pa Netania woko, pien ŋat mo pe biŋeyo lok man. Piŋo en mito neki woko, kun miyo Lujudaya ducu ma gurumi woko gibiket woko, dok bene miyo jo ma yam gudoŋ i Juda gito woko?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Ento Gedalia wod pa Akikam owaco ki Yokanan wod pa Karea ni, “Pe ibitimo gin ma kit meno, pien it ye ka loko lok goba keken i kom Icmael.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 I dwe me abiro, lcmael el wod pa Netania ma wod pa Elicama, ma ginywale i ot ker, ma en ŋat acel i kin ludito ‘pa kabaka, obino ki jo apar bot Gedalia wod pa Akikam i Mijpa. I kare ma gitye i Mijpa ka camo cam kacel," 
Jeremiah41:2 cutcut Icmael ki jo apar ma guwoto kwede-ni gua gutoŋo Gedalia wod pa Akikam, ma wod pa Capan woko ki pala lucwan ci guneke woko. En aye onoŋo ŋat ma kabaka me Babilon oketo me bedo laloc me lobo-ni," 
Jeremiah41:3 Icmael bene oneko Lujudaya ducu ma onoŋo gitye kacel ki Gedalia i Mijpa: kadi wa askari pa jo Kaldaya ma ginoŋogi kunnu. 
Jeremiah41:4 Orwone, ma pud peya ŋat mo oneyo pi aeko Gedalia," 
Jeremiah41:5 jo pyeraboro gua ki i Cekem ki Cilo ka Camaria gubino. Gubino ma gulyelo tikgi woko, guruko bene boŋŋi muyecoyec, komgi bene guŋolo woko. Gubedo ka kela gityer me moko kwoŋ ki odok eceta me atyera i ot pa Rwot." 
Jeremiah41:6 Icmael wod pa Netania oa ki i Mijpa obino ka rwatte kwedgi, kun woto ki koko. I kare ma en rwatte kwedgi owaco botgi ni, “Wubin wudony bot Gedalia wod pa Akikam.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 I kare ma doŋ gubino gudonyo i gaŋ, ci Icmael wod pa Netania ki jo ma onoŋo gitye kacel kwede gunekogi woko, ci gutiŋo komgi gubolo woko i waŋ it." 
Jeremiah41:8 Ento onoŋo tye jo apar i kingi ma guwaco bot Icmael ni, “Pe inekwa, watye ki naŋo, kal, moo jeituni, ki moo kic ma gikano i poto.” Ci ojukke kene pe onekogi ki luremgi ducu." 
Jeremiah41:9 Waŋ it ma onoŋo Icmael obolo iye kom dano ma en onekogi-ni onoŋo dit dok lac mada. En aye waŋ it ma kabaka Aca yam okwinyo me gwoko kwo pa dano ki i kom kabaka Baaca me Icrael. Icmael opoŋo waŋ it meno woko ki kom jo ma en onekogi-ni," 
Jeremiah41:10 Ci Icmael omako anyira pa kabaka ki jo ducu ma yam gudoŋ i Mijpa gudoko opiine, ginjo ma Nebujaradan, ladit pa lugwok kabaka, yam omiyogi I ciŋ Gedalia wod pa Akikam. Icmael wod pa Netania oterogi woko i opii kun giwoto gicito me ŋolo kulu pi kato loka bot jo Ammon." 
Jeremiah41:11 Yokanan kacel ki ludito monnye ducu guwinyo pi lok me nek ma Icmael otimo-ni. 
Jeremiah41:12 Ci gucoko jo ma megi, gucito ka lweny i kom Icmael wod pa Netania. Gubino ka lweny i kome i joro madit ma tye i Gibeon." 
Jeremiah41:13 I kare ma opii pa Icmael guneno Yokanan kacel ki ludito monnye, cwinygi obedo yom." 
Jeremiah41:14 Kit meno jo ducu ma yam Icmael omakogi macalo opii ki i Mijpa, gulokke gudwogo cen, ci gucito bot Yokanan wod pa Karea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Ento Icmael wod pa Netania olwi woko ki jo aboro, ci gucito bot jo Ammon." 
Jeremiah41:16 Lacen Yokanan wod pa Karea ki ludito monnye kacel kwede gukwanyo dano ma yam gudoŋ, ma Icmael wod pa Netania omakogi ki i Mijpa oterogi woko i opii i ŋe neko Gedalia wod pa Akikam, askari, mon, litino, ki jo ma gikologi, ma Yokanan odwokogi cen ki i Gibeon." 
Jeremiah41:17 Ci gucito gubedo i Gerut Kimam ma cok ki Beterekem. Onoŋo doŋ gitye ki tam me cito wa i Ejipt 
Jeremiah41:18 pien onoŋo gilworo jo Kaldaya. Gin gubedo ki lworo pien Icmael onoŋo oneko Gedalia, wod pa Akikam, ma kabaka me Babilon onoŋo oketo me bedo laloc me lobo." 
Jeremiah42:1 Ludito wi mony ducu, kacel ki Yokanan wod pa Karea ki Ajaria wod pa Kocaya, gubino ki lwak dano ma kitgi patpat, jo matino ki jo madito ducu, gubino cok," 
Jeremiah42:2 ci guwaco bot lanebi Jeremia ni, “Tim gin ma waŋ wabako dogwa boti pire! Leg Rwot Lubaŋawa piwa. Leg pi waŋ ducu ma wadon ‘lam onoŋo wadwoŋ, ento kit macalo ineno, kombeddi doŋ wadon jo manok keken." 
Jeremiah42:3 Legi, wek Rwot Lubaŋawa onyut botwa yo ma myero walubi ki gin ma myero watim.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Lanebi Jeremia odok iye botgi owacci, “Doŋ awinyo lokwu; pi meno abilego Rwot Lubaŋawa piwu kit macalo onoŋo wupenya, kit gin ducu ma Rwot bidok iye ki wun an abitito botwu. Pe abikano kit gin mo wacel ma pe atito botwu.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Ci guwaco bot Jeremia ni, “Rwot myero obed caden me ada dok ŋat ma genne i komwa me timowa rac ka ce pe wabilubo lok ducu ma Rwot Lubaŋani bicwali kwede botwa." 
Jeremiah42:6 Kadi bed gin maber nyo marac, waŋ wabilubo lok pa Rwot Lubaŋawa ma wacwali bote-ni. Ka walubo lokke ci wabibedo giwa maber.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Lacen i ŋe nino apar Rwot oloko ki Jeremia," 
Jeremiah42:8 Ci Jeremia olwon o Yokanan wod pa Karea, ki ludito wi mony ducu ma onoŋo gitye kacel kwede, ki lwak dano ducu, jo matino ki madito." 
Jeremiah42:9 Ka doŋ owaco botgi ni, “Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, ma wucwala hote ki lega me bako dogwu-ni owacci," 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Ka ce wumito bedo i lobo man abigerowu wucuŋ matek macalo ot, pe abiretowu woko piny; abipitowu pe abiputowu woko. Doŋ aŋut pi can ma onoŋo aketo i komwu ca." 
Jeremiah42:11 Pe doŋ wubed ki lworo i kom kabaka me Babilon. Pe wulwore, pien atye kwedwu; abilarowu dok abikwanyowu woko ki i ciŋe." 
Jeremiah42:12 Kica bimaka i komwu ci amiyo en bene kica make i komwu ci miyo wubedo i lobowu kikome.’ 
Jeremiah42:13 Ento wun jo ma wudoŋ i Juda pe myero wukwer winyo lok pa Rwot Lubaŋawu kun wukwero bene bedo i lobo man woko. 
Jeremiah42:14 Pe myero wuwacci, ‘Pe, waŋ giwa wabicito wabedo i Ejipt, ka ma pe wabineno iye lweny mo doki ki wanwa, dok bene pe wabiwinyo koko tum ma gikuto pi lweny, ki kec bene pe binekowa.’" 
Jeremiah42:15 Wuwiny lok pa Rwot, wun jo ma wudoŋ i Juda. Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco kuman ni, ‘Ka ce doŋ wumoko tamwu me cito me bedo i Ejipt," 
Jeremiah42:16 ci lweny ma wulworoni binoŋowu kunnu i lobo Ejipt; ki kec bene ma wulworo-ni bilubowu kunnu, ci wubito woko i lobo Ejipt." 
Jeremiah42:17 Jo ducu ma doŋ gumoko tamgi me cito me bedo i Ejipt gibito, nyo i lweny, nyo kec aye ma binekogi, kono two gemo gire. Pe tye ŋat mo i kingi ma bidoŋ bedo kwo, gat mo bene pe ma bibwot ki i can ma abikelo aketo i komgi-ni.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco kuman ni, Kit macalo yam atoyo kinigana ki akemona i kom jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem, kit meno bene abionyo akemona woko i komwu ka ce wucito i Ejipt. Wubidoko lok lacen dano, gin ma kelo lworo madwoŋ, ki gin ma dano gibedo ka loko lok aŋec i komgi. Pe dok wubineno kabedo man matwal." 
Jeremiah42:19 Rwot doŋ owaco botwu wun jo ma wudoŋ i Juda ni, ‘Pe wuciti i Ejipt.’ Myero wuŋe atikatika ni an doŋ atyeko cikowu i kare man" 
Jeremiah42:20 ni wun doŋ wuŋak woko ma doŋ wumito ada ni kwowu orweny woko. Wun wucwala ni acit bot Rwot Lubaŋawa kun wuwacca ni, ‘Leg Rwot Lubaŋa piwa! Tit botwa bene gin ducu ma en owaco ni wati, ci waŋ bene wabitiyo.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Nen, kombeddi dog atito botwu, ento wun wukwero lubo gin ducu ma Rwot Lubaŋawa oora ni atit botwu." 
Jeremiah42:22 Pi meno kombeddi myero wuŋe atikatika ni wubito i lweny, kec binekowu, ki two gemo bene binekowu i kabedo ma wumito twatwal me cito iye-ni.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 I kare ma Jeremia doŋ otyeko loko lok ducu bot lwak ducu ma gucokke, ma Rwot Lubaŋagi aye oore me tito botgi," 
Jeremiah43:2 ci Ajaria wod pa Kocaya ki Yokanan wod pa Karea, ki jo ducu ma yam gin luŋala guwaco bot Jeremia ni, “It ye ka tito lok goba. Rwot Lubaŋawa pe ocwali ni itit botwa ni, ‘Pe myero wucit ka bedo i Ejipt.’" 
Jeremiah43:3 Ento Baruk wod pa Neria aye opiyi i komwa, wek imiwa i ciŋ jo Kaldaya, wek gunekwa woko, nyo guterwa woko i opii i Babilon.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Kit meno Yokanan wod pa Karea ki ludito wi mony ducu kacel ki lwak ducu pe gulubo lok pa Rwot, me doŋ i lobo Juda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Ento Yokanan wod pa Karea ki ludito wi mony ducu gumako dano ducu gutero woko i Ejipt. Gutero jo ducu ma yam gudoŋ gudwogo ka bedo i Juda kun gua ki i rok mapatpat ka ma yam giryemogi guket iye," 
Jeremiah43:6 co, mon, litino kacel ki anyira pa kabaka. Gutero jo ducu ma yam Nebujaradan ladit pa lugwok kabaka owekogi bot Gedalia wod pa Akikam; ma wod pa Capan; guterogi kacel ki lanebi Jeremia ki Baruk wod pa Neria." 
Jeremiah43:7 Pe gulubo gin ma Rwot ociko, mumiyo gubino i lobo Ejipt wa i kabedo ma gilwoŋo ni Tapanec," 
Jeremiah43:8 Rwot owaco ki Jeremia i Tapanec ni," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Kwany gweŋ madito imak i ciŋi, ci iyikgi woko i te cementi ma i kin gweŋ ma gicano ma gidonyo kwede i gaŋ kal pa kabaka Parao i Tapanec, yikgi i nyim jo Juda ma gin bene gineno." 
Jeremiah43:10 Ci iwac botgi ni an Rwot me mony, abekelo laticca Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon, Abicibo komkerre i wi gweŋ man ma ayiko-ni, ka doŋ ayaro kema me ker woko i wigi." 
Jeremiah43:11 Nebukadnejar bibino ci loyo jo Ejipt woko. Jo ma myero guto ki two, two gemo binekogi woko, ki jo ma myero gitergi i opii, gibiterogi woko i opii, ki jo ma myero guto i lweny gibinekogi woko ki pala Lucwan," 
Jeremiah43:12 En bimoko mac i odi pa lwak lubaŋagi, ci biwaŋogi woko liweŋ, nyo tiŋogi cito kwede gire, Kit macalo lakwat yero nyugi ki i kom boŋone, ci kabaka me Babilon bene biyero kit-jami ducu ki i lobo Ejipt, bia kunnu cito ki kuc." 
Jeremiah43:13 En bimuko wir me got ma tye i Eliopolic ma tye i lobo Ejipt; dok en biwaŋo odi pa lwak lubaŋa me Ejipt-gu woko ducu ki mac.” 
Jeremiah44:1 Rwot oloko ki Jeremia lok ma kemo Lujudaya ducu ma gibedo i Ejipt, i gaŋi me Migdol, Tapanec, ki Mempic, ki i lobo Patroc."
