Jeremiah44:2 Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco kuman ni, “Wun kikomwu doŋ wutyeko neno kit can ducu ma aketo i kom Jerucalem ki i kom gaŋi ducu ma i Juda. Kadi wa kombeddi gitye macalo wi obur, ŋat mo pe ma bedo i igi." 
Jeremiah44:3 Atimo man pien onoŋo dano gutimo gin maraco dok bene guneto cwinya omiyo kiniga omaka. Gubedo ka waŋo odok eceta bot lwak lubaŋa mogo ma gin kikomgi pe giŋeyo, wun bene pe wuŋeyo kadi ki kwarowu bene yam pe guworo lwak lubaŋa macalo meno." 
Jeremiah44:4 Abedo ka cwalo luticca lunebi botwu teretere, kun gitito botwu ni pe myero wutim gin marac me kwer ma iya dagi-ni," 
Jeremiah44:5 Ento wun pe wuwinyo dok pe wuketo cwinywu i lokka. Pe bene wumedo ki weko timo gin marac wacel, kadi waŋo odok eceta bot lwak lubaŋa-gu." 
Jeremiah44:6 Pi meno omiyo aonyo kinigana ki akemona mager woko i kom gaŋi me Juda ki yo me Jerucalem ci awanogi woko ki mac. Gudoko obur kit macalo tye kwede wa onyoo-ni. 
Jeremiah44:7 “Pi meno an Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, kombeddi apenyowu gin aŋo mumiyo wutimo gin marac madit macalo man i komwu kekenwu. Wun wumito kelo can i kom co ki mon, i kom litino ki litino lukere, wek ŋat mo obed pe ma bidoŋ ki i kin lutuwu i lobo Juda?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Piŋo wuneto cwinya miyo kiniga maka ki cal jogiwu ma wutiyo atiya ki ciŋwu, ki dok pi waŋo odok eceta bot lwak lubaŋa mukene-gu i lobo Ejipt, ka ma doŋ wubino me bedo iye? Wutimo man ni wek wuto woko, wek rok ducu ma i wi lobo gulok lok aŋec i komwu, dok bene guti ki nyiŋwu macalo gin me ceno dano?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Wiwu mono doŋ owil woko i kom gin maraco ma gitimo i gaŋi me Juda ki I yo me Jerucalem, ma kwarowu gutimo, dok luker me Juda kacel ki mongi, ki wun bene kacel ki monwu wutimo?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Ento kadi wa onyoo pe wumedo ki mwolle kenwu pe wubedo ka lwora, dok bene pe wubedo ka lubo cikka ki gin ma an aciko ma amiyo botwu ki bot kwarowu." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Pi meno an Rwot Lubaŋa me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, abiketo can i komwu, abineko jo Juda woko ducu." 
Jeremiah44:12 Doŋ pi jo Juda ma onoŋo gumoko tamgi me cito me bedo i Ejipt, gin ducu gibinekogi woko, Gin ducu cakke i kom jo matino o kwede i kom jo madito, gibito i lobo Ejipt, i lweny nyo kec ma binekogi. Gibidoko lok lacen dano, dok gin ma kelo lworo madwoŋ bot dano; dano gibibedo ka loko lok aŋec i komgi kun gitiyo ki nyiŋgi macalo gin me ceno dano." 
Jeremiah44:13 Abiketo can i kom jo ma gibedo i Ejipt, kit macalo aketo can i kom Jerucalem, ki lweny, kec ki two gemo." 
Jeremiah44:14 Pe tye ŋat mo ki i kom jo Juda ma gudoŋ ma gubino ka bedo i Ejipt ma bibwot dok bedo kwo. Dano mo acel i kingi pe bidok cen i Juda, ka ma gitye ka tamo ni myero gidok cen gicibed iye-ni. Ŋat mo ma bidok cen pe, kono luriŋ ayeta mogo manok keken aye gibidok kunnu.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Lacen jo ducu ma guŋeyo ni mongi gutyero odok eceta bot lwak lubaŋa mukene, ki mon ma gucuŋ ka winyo lokke, cokke madit, jo ducu ma gubedo i Patroc i lobo Ejipt, gudok iye ki Jeremia ni," 
Jeremiah44:16 “Wadag winyo lok ma imito tito botwa i nyiŋ Rwot. 
Jeremiah44:17 Ento waŋ wabitiyo gin ducu ma doŋ watyeko kwoŋo kwoŋ pire, wabiwaŋo odok eceta bot daker me polo kun waonyo gityer amata-gu bene bote, kit macalo yam watimo, waŋ ki kwarowa, lukerwa ki rwodiwa, i gaŋi me Juda ki i yo ma tye i Jerucalem. I kare meno onoŋo watye ki cam madwoŋ, onoŋo walony, dok bene pe onoŋo waneno kit can mo." 
Jeremiah44:18 Ento i kare ma doŋ waweko waŋo odok eceta bot daker me polo ki onyo gityer amata-gu bote jami ducu doŋ ocako remowa woko, gicako nekowa woko i lweny, ki kec bene onekowa otyekowa woko.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Mon gumedde ki lokgi kun giwaco ni, “I kare ma watedo mugati ma porre ki cal pa daker me polo, kun wawaŋo bote odok eceta, dok waonyo bote gityer me amata, cogwa onoŋo guye dok guneno gin ma wabedo ka tiyone.”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Ci Jeremia owaco bot lwak ducu, mon kacel ki co ma gudokke iye kit man ni," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Odok eceta ma wubedo ka wanone i gaŋi me Juda ki i yo me Jerucalem, wun ki kwarowu, lukerwu ki rwodiwu, kacel ki jo me lobo meno, wutamo ni Rwot doŋ wiye owil woko i kom gin ma wutimo? Wutamo ni Rwot pe ŋeyo?" 
Jeremiah44:22 I kare-ni lobowu doŋ odoko obur laboŋo dano mo ma bedo iye. Odoko gin ma kelo lworo madwoŋ bot dano, ma dano gitiyo ki nyiŋe macalo gin me ceno dano, pien Rwot doŋ onoŋo pe twero ciro gin maraco ki gin me kwer ma wubedo ka timone." 
Jeremiah44:23 Can man opoto i komwu kit macalo tye wa onyoo-ni, pien wubedo ka waŋo odok eceta dok wutimo bal i kom Rwot. Pe wubedo ka lubo cikke ki gin ma en ociko kadi wa lok me cadenne.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Jeremia otito ki lwak ducu, makatone bot mon, gin ma Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, onoŋo owaco bot jo Juda ma gibedo i lobo Ejipt ni," 
Jeremiah44:25 “Wun kacel ki monwu wucikke acika bot daker me polo. Wucikke ni wubiwaŋo odok eceta bote, kun bene wuonyo gityer amata-gu bote, ci wun giwu wugwoko kwoŋ ma wukwoŋo, wucobo bene kakare. Pi meno wumok kwoŋwu wuti bene wucobi!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Ento wuwiny lok me cikke ma an Rwot doŋ atyeko ketone kun akwoŋŋe ki nyiŋa madit bot jo Juda ducu ma gibedo i lobo Ejipt ni, Pe dok amiyo ŋat mo kwoŋo kwoŋ ki nyiŋa kun wacci, ‘Macalo Rwot Lubaŋa tye kwe-ni.’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Nen, abene-to ni gunen can, pe gubed maber wacel; jo Juda ducu ma gitye i lobo Ejipt gibinekogi woko i lweny, kec binekogi, nio waŋ ma guto gutum woko liweŋ." 
Jeremiah44:28 Ento jo manok ki i kinwu gibibwot ki i lak to, en aye gibia ki i lobo Ejipt gidok i lobo Juda. Ci jo Juda ducu ma gudoŋ ki i kom jo ma yam gubino i Ejipt gibiŋeyo lok pa aŋa ma obedo me ada, mera nyo megi." 
Jeremiah44:29 An Rwot abinyuto botwu lanyut man ma nyuto ni abiketo can i komwu i kabedo man, wek wuŋe ni lok ma aloko me keto can i komwu bibedo ada." 
Jeremiah44:30 Abimiyo Parao Kopra kabaka me Ejipt woko i ciŋ lukworre ma gimito neke, kit macalo amiyo Jedekia kabaka me Juda woko i ciŋ Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon, ma onoŋo obedo lakworre ma omito neke woko.”" 
Jeremiah45:1 I mwaka me aŋwen me loc pa Yekoyakim wod pa Yocia kabaka me Juda, en aye Baruk wod pa Neria ocoyo iye lok ma Jeremia owaco bote kikore kikore. Ci lanebi Jeremia owaco bot Baruk ni," 
Jeremiah45:2 “Rwot, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco kuman ni, Baruk," 
Jeremiah45:3 in iwacci, ‘Can i wiya gira! Rwot dok omedo cwercwiny i kom arem ma atye kwede. Doŋ aol woko ki cur dok pe alimo yweyo mo wacel!’”" 
Jeremiah45:4 Pi meno Rwot owaco bot Jeremia me tito bot Baruk ni, “Abemuko gin ma yam agero dok aputo gin ma yam apito-ni woko. Abitimo man i kom lobo kulu." 
Jeremiah45:5 Itye ka yenyo gin mogo madito piri keni? Pe iyenygi. Pien nen, abekelo can i kom dano ducu ma bedo i lobo, ento olo twal ibibwot, abimiyo kwoni bedo boti macalo mot me lweny i kabedo ducu ma icito iye. An Rwot kikoma aye doŋ aloko man.”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Rwot oloko ki lanebi Jeremia lok ma okemo lurok. 
Jeremiah46:2 Man aye lok ma en owaco ma okemo Ejipt, Rwot oloko i kom mony pa Parao Neko, kabaka me Ejipt, ma yam Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon oloyo i lweny i Karkemic ma cok ki kulu Euprate i mwaka me aŋwen me loc pa Yekoyakim wod pa Yocia kabaka me Juda, kun wacci," 
Jeremiah46:3 “Ludito me Ejipt gidaŋŋe ni, ‘Wuruk nyonyo me geŋo korwu dok wuyubbe ki kwotwu bene, ci wucit i lweny!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Wutwe kom me bedo i ne aguragura; wubed i wigi, wun wegi aguragura! Wucuŋ i tyeŋ ci wuruk otan nyonyo! Wupak Leb toŋwu obed mabit! Wuruk koti nyonyowu i komwu!’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:5 Rwot openyo ni, “Aneno gin aŋo? Gitye ka lokke gidok woko cen ki lworo madwoŋ, kun cwinygi oballe woko. Twoni lwenygi ducu giketo ret i komgi, ci guriŋo woko oyotoyot; ma pe guneno ŋegi, pien lworo onoŋo oketo komgi woko!” Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah46:6 Jo ma gidwir i ŋwec pe gitwero bwot; ki lulweny matego bene pe gitwero bwot. Yo tuŋ acam i ŋet kulu Euprate giyokke atata ci gipoto woko. 
Jeremiah46:7 “Man aŋa ma tye ka tiŋŋe malo calo pii me kulu Nail-li, macalo pii ma opoŋ woko libyeny wa i dog geŋ ma mol amola?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ejipt aye tye ka tiŋŋe macalo pii me kulu Nail, calo kulu ma piine opoŋ woko libyeny wa i dog gen, Ejipt wacci, Abitiŋŋe aumo lobo woko, abijwero gaŋi kun aneko jo ducu ma bedo iye woko.’" 
Jeremiah46:9 Cok aguragura gucak wot, ki gadigadi bene gucak lorre! Cwallulweny gucit gukat anyim: jo Etiopia ki Put ma gumako kwot, wegi atum ma ludiro i mako atum ma gua ki i Lud." 
Jeremiah46:10 “Man aye nino pa Rwot Lubaŋa me mony; tin doŋ en biculo kwor, tin doŋ en biketo can i kom lukworre. Binekogi woko ki pala lucwan nio waŋ ma otyekogi woko liweŋ, ma noŋo leb palane doŋ opune woko ki remo keken; tin en aye Rwot Lubaŋa me mony tyero lukworre macalo gitum i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam, i ŋet kulu Euprate." 
Jeremiah46:11 Wun jo Ejipt, wucit i Gilead, ci wuyeny yat me caŋo two! Yatwu-gu ducu nen gin ma konnye pe; gin mo ma caŋowu pe." 
Jeremiah46:12 Lurok doŋ guwinyo pi kit lewic ma wutye kwede; jo ducu doŋ guwinyo kokowu oromo i lobo woko; pien lalweny acel acel doŋ tye ka yokke ki lawote, ci gin ducu gipoto woko i ŋom.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Rwot oloko ki lanebi Jeremia i kare ma Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon obino ka lweny i kom Ejipt, kun wuwacci," 
Jeremiah46:14 “Tuc lok man i gaŋi me Ejipt, kun itito i Migdol, Mempic, ki Tapanec ni, ‘Wucuŋ matek, doŋ wuyubbe me lweny; gin ducu ma wutye kwede gibibalo woko i lweny!’" 
Jeremiah46:15 Piŋo Apic doŋ owekowu woko? Cal twon ma wutiyo-ni kono pe ocuŋ piŋo? Pien Rwot ojwere woko lirwat piny. 
Jeremiah46:16 Lwakwu guyokke ci gupoto, kun dano acel acel waco bot lawote ni, ‘Wot oyotoyot! Wek wadok cen bot lutuwa, wek wabwot woko ki i lak pala pa lukworwa!’" 
Jeremiah46:17 “Lwon Parao, kabaka me Ejipt, ki nyiŋ manyen ni, ‘Ŋat ma wo twatwal omiyo karene okato.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 An a Rwot me mony, an aye kabaka. An Lubaŋa makwo, Calo got Tabor ma wiye bor kato wi godi ducu, ki got Karmel ma ocuŋ mabor dognam, tek pa ŋat ma bino ka lweny komwu tye kit meno." 
Jeremiah46:19 Wuyubbe kun wutweyo yecwu woko me cito i opii, wun jo Ejipt. Pien Mempic doŋ bidoŋ noŋo, bidoŋ wi obur, ma dano mo pe bedo iye." 
Jeremiah46:20 Ejipt nen calo laroya dyaŋ maber mucwe, ento lwaŋo ma gikayo dyaŋi ma gua yo tuŋ acam gitye ka lweny i kome." 
Jeremiah46:21 Kadi askarine-gu ma gipaŋogi apaŋa ki lim calo roya mucwe kun gimoo adada gudoko goro ma tekogipe. Gin gulokke guriŋo woko kacel, pe gucuŋ, pien nino me keto can i komgi onoŋo doŋ oromo,’ en bene aye nino me togi," 
Jeremiah46:22 Ejipt tye ka riŋo woko kun kok calo twol, pien lukworre gitye ka bino ki tek, ma gibino ka lweny i kome ki latoŋgu calo jo ma tye ka toŋo yadi." 
Jeremiah46:23 Gibitoŋo yadi me buŋane-gu woko, kadi bed onoŋo buŋane pe giromo kato ki iye, pien jone gidwoŋ mada ma pe gitwero kwano welgi, askarigi pol ma welgi kato wel bonyo woko." 
Jeremiah46:24 Wun jo Ejipt, lewic bimakowu, gibimiyowu woko i ciŋ jo ma gua ki i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam.” Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah46:25 Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owacci, “Abeketo can i kom Amon, ma en lubaŋa me Tebec, kacel ki Ejipt ki lwak lubaŋane ki lukerre ducu. Abeketo can i kom Parao kacel ki jo ducu ma gigeno eno." 
Jeremiah46:26 Abimiyogi i cin jo ma mito nekogi, abimiyogi i ciŋ Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon ki luditone, Ento lacen dano dok gibibedo i Ejipt aye, kit macalo yam gubedo i kare ma okato con. An a Rwot me mony doŋ aloko.”" 
Jeremiah46:27 “Pe wulwor, wun likwayo pa laticca Yackobo; wun jo Icrael, cwinywu pe myero oballe woko. Abilarowu ki i lobo ca ma tye ka mabor-ri, abilaro likwayowu bene ki i lobo ma yam giterogi iye i opii. Likwayo pa Yakobo gibidwogo cen ci gibedo mot ki kuc; ŋat mo pe bimiyo gibedo ki lworo." 
Jeremiah46:28 Pe wulwor, wun likwayo pa laticca Yakobo, man Rwot ma owaco, pien atye kwedwu. Abijwero jo me rok ducu atyekogi woko, ki ka ma yam aryemowu wuket iye, ento wun pe abityekowu woko liweŋ, Pe abiwekowu ma pe aketo can i komwu; abipwodowu maberber pe ki kiniga twatwal. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Ma pud peya Parao olwenyo i kom Gaja, Rwot oloko ki lanebi Jeremia lok ma okemo jo Piliciti." 
Jeremiah47:2 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Nen, pii otiŋŋe yo tuŋ acam, bimol calo kulu ma opoŋ woko libyeny ma piine mol calo lalele. Bimwonyo lobo woko calo pii aluka ki gin ducu ma tye iye, gaŋ kacel ki jo ma bedo i igi. Dano gibidanne matek, ki jo ducu ma gibedo i lobo gibikok." 
Jeremiah47:3 Gibiwinyo ojwe tyen aguragura, ki mor pa gadigadi lweny, ki koko pa lawala me gadigadi, Wego pe doŋ gibilokke me neno litinogi; ciŋgi bene noŋo doŋ okwe woko." 
Jeremiah47:4 Pien kare doŋ oo me tyeko jo Piliciti woko, me juko ki i Turo ki Cidon kit kony ducu ma onoŋo pud odoŋ. An Rwot kikoma aye ma abityeko Lupiliciti, jo ducu ma gua gubino ki i dog nam me Kaptor." 
Jeremiah47:5 Cwercwiny madit doŋ obino bot io Gaja, ki jo Acikelon guto gutum woko. Wun jo Anak mudoŋ wubikumo pi kare ma rom mene?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Wun wudaŋŋe ni, ‘Pala lucwan pa Rwot!’ Ibibedo ka jwerogi woko pi kare ma rom mene? Rwakke kekeni i akurani, wek iywe, ibed mot!’" 
Jeremiah47:7 Biywe niŋniŋ, ma kun an Rwot doŋ atyeko miyo tic woko bo te me atiya-ni? Atyeko cikone pi lweny i kom Acikelon ki i kom jo ma gibedo i lobo ma tye i dog nam.”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Man aye lok ma Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, owaco i kom Moab ni, “Can i wi jo Nebo, pien gaŋgi doŋ gijwero woko odoŋ nono! Kiriataim doŋ gimako woko, cel gogone matego-gu ducu doŋ gimukogi woko piny, ki jone giketo lewic i wigi matek;" 
Jeremiah48:2 deyo pa Moab doŋ orwenyo woko matwal. Lumerok tye ka piro lok me timo gin marac i kom Moab i Kecbon, ni, ‘Wek watyeku rok me Moab woko.’ In gaŋ Madmen bene ibilin woko liwic; dul mony biwoto kun cito ka lweny i komi." 
Jeremiah48:3 “Jo Koronaim tye ka daŋŋe ni, ‘Tim bwami! To-piny doŋ obino woko!’" 
Jeremiah48:4 Doŋ gijwero Moab woko; koko tye ka winnye ka mabor wa i Joar. 
Jeremiah48:5 Guito cere me Lukit, gicito malo kun gikok ki pig waŋgi; ki i yo ma ci to piny Koronaim gukok pi neno kit macalo lobo doŋ gibalo kwede woko." 
Jeremiah48:6 Giwacci, ‘Wuriŋ oyot! Wuriŋ, wular kwowu! Wurin calo kana me tim!’" 
Jeremiah48:7 Wun jo Moab, yam wugeno cel gogowu ki lonyowu, ento kombeddi doŋ gibiterowu woko; ki Kemoc ma lubaŋawu-ni gibitero kacel kwedwu i opii, kacel ki ajwagine ki rwodine ducu," 
Jeremiah48:8 Lamuk gaŋ bibino i kom gaŋi ducu, pe tye gaŋ mo ma bibwot; nota kacel ki bar gibibalowoko, kit macalo Rwot doŋ otyeko lokone." 
Jeremiah48:9 Wuket gweŋ me lyel pi Moab, pien doŋ gibijwero woko. Gaŋine ducu gibiweko doŋ obur, dano mo pe ma bibedo kunnu doki.”" 
Jeremiah48:10 Gicen dano ma pe tiyo tic pa Rwot ki cwinye ducu! Gicen ŋat ma pe neko dano ki pala lucwanne! 
Jeremiah48:11 Rwot owacci, “Moab yam obedo mot maber, dok bene yam pe gitero jone i opii. Moab obedo calo koŋo ŋino ma giweko ni ocek mot, ma pe giyelo, dok pe gionyo woko ki i opoko ma tye iye-ni i i opoko mukene. Mitte bene pe oballe, bille mere mamit kit macalo yam tye kwede con," 
Jeremiah48:12 “Pi meno, nen, kare tye ka bino, abicwalo dano gionyo Moab woko calo gionyo kono yino. Gibionyo koŋo vinone woko piny, ci gineko opokone giŋido woko matitino." 
Jeremiah48:13 Man bimiyo lewic mako jo Moab pi Kemoc ma lubaŋagi, kit macalo lewic yam omako jo Icrael pi Betel, ma en lubaŋa ma onoŋo yam gigeno twatwal-li." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Wun jo Moab, piŋo wunwette ka waco ni wun cogi oteka lweny, wun askari ma cwinywu tek dok wuloyo lweny?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Gibijwero Moab woko liweŋ ki gaŋine; awobene mabeco ma giyerogi ayera gibinekogi gityekogi woko. An kabaka, Rwot me mony, aye ma awaco man." 
Jeremiah48:16 Can ma biuo i kom Moab doŋ tye cok, to pinnye doŋ tye ka bino oyotoyot." 
Jeremiah48:17 Wukum pi rok meno, wun jo ma wubedo cok ka ŋete, wun ducu ma wuŋeyo ywekane. Wuwacci, ‘Doŋ gituro twero matek me locce woko do! deyone ki tekke doŋ pe matwal.’" 
Jeremiah48:18 “Wun jo ma wubedo i Dibon, wulor woko ki i kabedowu me deyo wubin woko piny, ci wubed i ŋom i apwa! Pien lamuk Moab doŋ obino i komwu, omuko cel gogone matego-gu ducu woko oweko odoŋ obur." 
Jeremiah48:19 Wun jo ma wubedo i Aroer, wucuŋ i ŋet yo koŋ wukur; wupeny co ki mon ma gitye ka lwi gicito woko wek gutit botwu gin mutimme." 
Jeremiah48:20 Ci gibidok iye botwu ni, ‘Moab doŋ otyeko poto; wukok pire, doŋ gityeko keto lewic woko i wiye. Tit lok man i ŋet kulu Amon ni Moab doŋ gijwero woko, iye odoŋ noŋo!’" 
Jeremiah48:21 “Ŋolo kop doŋ obino i kom lobo ma obedo barbar; obino i kom Kolon, Jakaja, Mepat," 
Jeremiah48:22 Dibon, Nebo, Betdiblataim," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriataim, Betgamul, Betmeon," 
Jeremiah48:24 Keriot, Bojra ki gaŋi ducu me lobo Moab ma tye ka mabor ki ma tye ka macok." 
Jeremiah48:25 Moab doŋ gininyo adada, tekone bene gityeko woko. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Wumi Moab omat mat omer, pien doŋ ojemo woko i koma, an Rwot. Moab bibedo ka nenne i nokke kekene, ci dano gibinyere kun gicaye." 
Jeremiah48:27 In Moab korr’ ipo kit macalo ibedo ka ŋalo kwede jo Icrael. Itimogi marac calo onoŋo imakogi kacel ki lukwo. 
Jeremiah48:28 “Wun jo ma wubedo i Moab myero wuwek gaŋi woko! Wucit wubed i kin got ma obar. Wubed calo akuri ma gero ode i kor got ma oculle. 
Jeremiah48:29 Moab wakke twatwal! Doŋ watyeko winyo kit wakke, nyatte, ki bwola ma dano gitye kwede i cwinygi kun gitamo pigi kengi." 
Jeremiah48:30 An Rwot, aŋeyo ŋalagi. Dok nyattegi bene obedo gin me bwolo, kadi gin ma gitiyo ducu bene obedo gin me bwolo." 
Jeremiah48:31 Pi meno, abikok pi Moab, kun akumo pi jo Moab ducu. Abikumo bene pi jo Kirkerec." 
Jeremiah48:32 Abikok pi jo Cibma makato ma akok pi jo Jajer. In gaŋ me Cibma ibedo calo yat olok ma jaŋe boco oŋolo nam oo wa loka tuŋcel, ma ocito oo wa i Jajer. Ento nyig yadiwu me oro ki nyig olokwu doŋ gibalo woko." 
Jeremiah48:33 Yom, cwiny ki yomic madwoŋ ma yam dano gitye kwede doŋ gikwanyo woko ki i lobo Moab ma onoŋo ceko cam-mi. Ajuko koŋo vino woko omiyo pe mol ki i bur ka ma ginyono nyig olok; pe tye ŋat mo ma nyono nyig olok kun daŋŋe pi yomcwiny." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Jo Kecbon ki Eleale gitye ka daŋŋe matek, dwangi winnye ka mabor wa i Jakaj; jo ma tye i Joar bene winyo dwangi, dok bene winnye ka mabor wa i Koronaim ki i Eglat-celiciya. Pii me Nimrim bene doŋ otyeko two woko liweŋ." 
Jeremiah48:35 Abijuko jo Moab pe dok gibityero gitum ki waŋo odok eceta i waŋ jogi bot lubaŋagi. An Rwot, doŋ aloko man." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Mumiyo atye ka kumo i cwinya pi Moab ki pi jo Kir-kerec calo dano ma tye ka kuto nyamulere ki wer lyel, pien lonyo ki jami ducu ma yam gulimo doŋ orwenyo woko matwal." 
Jeremiah48:37 Dano acel acel olyelo wiye dok onyaro yer tike woko pi kwero cola. Ciŋgi ducu giŋolo bedo bur, dok dano acel acel tye oruko boŋo cola i pyere." 
Jeremiah48:38 I wi odi ducu ma tye i Moab ki i dye gaŋi ducu iwinyo koko keken, pe gin mo mukene mapat. Doŋ atyeko neko Moab woko macalo agulu ma ŋat mo pe paro pire. An Rwot doŋ aloko," 
Jeremiah48:39 Kit ma gineko kwede Moab! Kit macalo gikok kwede! Kit macalo Moab oloko kwede ŋeye ki lewic! Moab doŋ odoko giriayeta, gin ma kelo lworo madwoŋ bot jo ducu ma gibedo ma gurumo en.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 “An Rwot, doŋ atyeko ciko woko ni tye rok mo ma bituk oyotoyot bino Lyanne piny i kom Moab calo ocur ma onoŋo oyaro bwome woko." 
Jeremiah48:41 Gaŋi kacel ki cel gogo ducu gibimakogi woko. I nino meno cwiny lulweny me Moab bipoŋ ki lworo calo dako ma tye ka rem ki nywal. 
Jeremiah48:42 Gibijwero Moab woko doŋ pe bibedo rok matwal, pien doŋ onoŋo ojemo woko i koma." 
Jeremiah48:43 Gin ma kelo lworo madwoŋ, bur ki owic doŋ tye ka kurowu wun jo Moab. An Rwot, doŋ aloko," 
Jeremiah48:44 Gat mo ma bitemo ni eriŋ gin man ma kelo lworo madwoŋŋi bipoto i bur, ki ŋat ma bia ki i bur katti woko bimoko i owic, pien doŋ atyeko keto kare me keto can i kom jo Moab. An Rwot, doŋ aloko." 
Jeremiah48:45 Luriŋ ayela ma doŋ gigoro gitye ka yenyo ka gwok i gaŋ me Kecbon. Ento Kecbon, ma en aye gaŋ ma yam kabaka Cikon obedo ka Joe iye, doŋ tye ka waŋ ki mac. Mac doŋ otyeko waŋo ka Cuŋo pa jo Moab ki wi godi maboco ma yam lulweny me Moab gimaro-ni." 
Jeremiah48:46 Can i wiwu, wun jo Moab! Gineko jo ma yam giworo Kemoc woko, dok awobegi ki anyiragi giterogi woko i opii." 
Jeremiah48:47 Ento I kare ma tye anyim, abidwoko gum pa Moab bote kakare. Man lok pa Rwot kikome.” Kop ma giŋolo i kom Moab ogik kany." 
Jeremiah49:1 Man aye lok ma Rwot owaco ma okemo jo Ammon ni, “Jo Icrael gitye kwene? Pe gitye ki laleyo mo ma, myero ocun i kom lobogi? Piŋo guweko jo ma giworo Milkom gukwanyo dul ma i kaka pa Gad dok gubedo iye kunnu?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Pi meno, nen, nino tye ka bino, en kare ma abimiyo jo me Raba winyo dwan me koko me lweny. Gaŋ pa jo Ammon gibiweko doŋ obur ki gaŋine matino ducu gibiwaŋogi woko ki mac. Lacen jo Icrael doŋ bimayo lobogi woko ki i ciŋ jo ma yam gumayo woko ki botgi ca. An Rwot, doŋ aloko." 
Jeremiah49:3 Wukoki, wun jo Kecbon! Pien Ai ma gaŋwu doŋ gijwero woko, iye odoŋ non! Wukoki, wun anyira Raba! Wuruk boŋo cola ci wubed ka kumo. Wubed ka ŋwec atata ki i wi cel-gu. Milkom ma lubaŋawu-ni gibitero i opii, kacel ki ajwagine ki rwodine bene." 
Jeremiah49:4 Piŋo wun jo ma pe wugenne-ni wutye ka nyatte pi notawu? Piŋo wugeno lonyowu kun wuwaco ni ŋat mo pe ma bitwero bi no ka lweny i komwu? 
Jeremiah49:5 Nen, abikelo gin ma miyo lworo madwoŋ makowu ki i kabedo ducu. Wun ducu gibiryemowu woko. Dano acel acel biriŋo laro kwone, ŋat mo bene bibedo pe ma bicoko luriŋ ayela dwokogi cen kacel. An Rwot me mony, doŋ aloko," 
Jeremiah49:6 “Ento lacen abidwoko gum pa jo Ammon botgi doki. An Rwot, doŋ aloko.”" 
Jeremiah49:7 Man aye gin ma Rwot me mony owaco ma okemo Edom ni, “Ryeko me ŋolo kop maber doŋ orwenyo woko ki bot jo Teman? Lumi-tamgi doŋ pe twero tito botgi gin ma myero gutim? Ryekogi mono doŋ orywenyo woko liweŋ?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Wun jo Dedan, wulokke wurin woko! Wucit wukanne woko ka matut! Abeneko likwayo pa Ecau woko, pien kare doŋ oo ma myero aket iye can i komgi." 
Jeremiah49:9 Ka dano gubino ka pwono olok, ci giweko mogo i wi yatte; dok bene ka lukwo gubino dyewor, giyako jami ma oromo kit ma gimito keken." 
Jeremiah49:10 Ento ajwero likwayo pa Ecau woko adada, dok ajwero kabedogi ma onoŋo gukanne iye abalo woko, man miyo doŋ pe gibikanne matwal. Jo Edom ki wadigi ki luwotgi ducu doŋ ginekogi woko, Gat mo pe odoŋ." 
Jeremiah49:11 Wuwek litino kicwu ma wegigi pe-ni bota, an abigwokogi. Mon towu ducu gibigeno an.”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Ka ce onoŋo jo ma pe myero giket can i komgi-ni gumato kikopo me can, doŋ wutamo ni wun wubibwot ma pe koŋ noŋo giketo can i komwu? Pe gire, myero koŋ wumat kikopo me can!" 
Jeremiah49:13 An doŋ atyeko kwoŋo kwoŋ woko ki nyina kekena ni gaŋ me Bojra bidoko gin marac ma dano uro, dok tim aroo ma iye odoŋ noŋo; dano gibiloko lok aŋec i kome kun gitiyo ki nyiŋe macalo gin me ceno dano. Gaŋi ma i ŋete-gu ducu bi doko wi obur matwal. An Rwot, doŋ aloko.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Jeremia owacci, “Anoŋo lok ma oa ki bot Rwot. En ooro lakwena me tito bot rok ducu ni, Wucok dul monywu ducu kacel wubin ka lweny i kom Edom! Wuyubbe doŋ pi lweny!" 
Jeremiah49:15 Rwot bimiyo rokwu bedo goro, dok dano gibicayowu mada." 
Jeremiah49:16 Wakke ma wubedo kwede obwolowu mere noŋo. Ŋat mo pe ma lworowu kit macalo wutamo ni gilworowu-ni. Wubedo i kin got ma obar, malo wa i wi got mabor; ento kadi bed wuger odiwu malo calo ocur ma gero ode malo, Rwot bikelowu woko ki kunnu wa piny. Man lok pa Rwot kikome.”" 
Jeremiah49:17 Rwot owacci, “Can marac kit man bipoto i kom Edom ma bimiyo jo ma gikato ki ka kenyo gibedo ki ur, dok lworo makogi marac pi gin ducu ma guneno ma doŋ otyeko timme i kom Edom-mi." 
Jeremiah49:18 Kit gin acel ma otimme i kom Codom ki Gomora-ni i kare ma gin ki gaŋi ma gitye i netgl-gu gityekogi woko bitimme bene i kom Edom. Ŋat mo ma bibedo kunnu pe, kadi bed pi kare mo manok keken. An Rwot, doŋ aloko," 
Jeremiah49:19 Nen, abibino macalo labwor ma bino i dye olet romi kun a ki i buŋa ma yatte oculle Likiŋ ma tye i dog kulu Jordan, abimiyo jo Edom giriŋo woko ki i lobogi, Doŋ lacen dano mo ma ayero ni obed latel aye biloyo rok meno. Aŋa ma gitwero poro ki an? Aŋa ma twero ette ka lwoŋa pi lweny? Kit lakwat aŋo mono ma twero cuŋ i nyima?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Pi meno, doŋ wuwiny kit yub ma an Rwot, doŋ atyeko yubone i kom jo Edom, ki gin ma doŋ ayubbe me timone i kom jo ma bedo i gaŋ me Teman. Kadi bed wa litinogi gibiywayogi woko, ci bimiyo dano ducu gibedo ki ur matek i kom can meno mupoto i komgi-ni." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ka Edom opoto ci morre bimiyo lobo yeŋŋe, ki koko oduru bene biwinnye ka mabor wa i Nam Makwar." 
Jeremiah49:22 Nen, lamerok bibino lwenyo i kom Bojra calo ocur ma tuk ki malo i pol Lyanne piny ma noŋo oyaro bwome woko. I nino meno lulweny me Edom cwinygi bibedo ki lworo calo cwiny dako ma tye ka reŋi ki nywal.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 Man aye lok ma Rwot oloko ma okemo Damaciko ni, “Jo ma i gaŋi me Kamat ki Arpad alee doŋ otwodogi woko, pien guwinyo lok marac. Cwinygi doŋ tye ma oŋabbe anaba ki lworo, calo nam ma twagge, ma pe twero limo yweyo mo wacel." 
Jeremiah49:24 Jo Damaciko ducu doŋ gudoko goro, doŋ gulokke me riŋo woko ki lworo madwoŋ. Gitye ki arem ki cwercwiny madwoŋ calo dako ma tye ka rem ki nywal," 
Jeremiah49:25 Gaŋ ma yam oywek ma onoŋo yomcwiny dwoŋ iyeni doŋ gibalo woko iye odoŋ noŋo. 
Jeremiah49:26 I nino meno awobe kacel ki askari ducu gibinekogi woko i dye gaŋ. An Rwot me mony, doŋ aloko." 
Jeremiah49:27 Abimoko mac i kom odi madoŋo me Damaciko, ci awaŋo gaŋ kal pa Benadad woko.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Man aye lok ma gitito i kom kaka me Kedar ki ker ducu me Kajor ma yam Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon olwenyo i komgi ci oloyogi woko-ni, Rwot owaco kuman ni, “A icit ka lweny i kom jo Kedar, ci inek jo me kaka ma tye wokcen-ni woko." 
Jeremiah49:29 Gibiyako kemagi, ki romigi, ki boŋo kicika me kemagi wa ki jami ducu ma tye i-kemagi. Gibiyako kinagagi kun gitito bot lwak ni, Lworo madwoŋ doŋ oromo i lobo ducu!”" 
Jeremiah49:30 Rwot owacci, “Wun jo Kajor, acikowu ni myero wurin wukanne woko ka mabor. Pien Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon doŋ otyeko yubo yub me timo gin marac i komwu, kun wacci doŋ bene etyeko piro lok woko i komwu." 
Jeremiah49:31 “Wua wubin, wucit ka lweny i kom rok ma yam bedo ki kuc laboŋo ayelayela mo-ni! Gaŋgi pe tye ki dog gaŋ kadi wa rii me lorone bene pe, pi meno tye kene, ŋat ma gwoko pe. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah49:32 “Kinagagi kacel ki dyaŋigi gibiyako woko! Abikeyo jo ma nyaro yer wigi doŋ macego-ni woko i kabedo ducu, dok bene abikelo can madit ki i kabedo ducu aketo i komgi. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah49:33 Kajor bidoko tim aroo matwal, kabedo ka ma too keken aye bedo iye. Ŋat mo pe bibedo kunnu, dok ŋat mo pe bicito kunnu me’ bedo iye.’ ”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Cutcut i acakki me loc pa Jedekia kabaka me Juda, Rwot oloko ki Jeremia lok i kom lobo Elam." 
Jeremiah49:35 Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, “Abineko wegi atum ma gumiyo lobo Elam odoko matek-gu woko ducu liweŋ." 
Jeremiah49:36 Abimiyo yamo a ki i twok piny aŋwen-ni kodo i kom Elam kun keyo jone woko ki i kabedo ducu, nio waŋ ma lobo mo pe odoŋ ka ma gin luriŋ ayela ma kit meno pe gularo iye." 
Jeremiah49:37 Abimiyo jo Elam gibedo ki lworo i kom lukworgi ma mito nekogi wokoni. Abikelo gin marac i komgi ki kinigana madit dok abicwalo mony i komgi nio waŋ ma gityekogi woko liweŋ. 
Jeremiah49:38 Abineko luker ki rwodi pa jo Elam woko, ci abicibo komkerra woko kunnu. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah49:39 Ento lacen abidwoko gum pa jo Elam botgi doki. Man Rwot ma owaco.” 
Jeremiah50:1 Man aye lok ma Rwot oloko bot lanebi Jeremia i kom Babilon ma en aye lobo pa jo Kaldaya ni," 
Jeremiah50:2 “Wutuc lok man bot rok ducu dok wutit pire bene. Wutiŋ bendera malo ka maleŋ ci wutit lok man. Pe wugwok lok man obed macalo lok me muŋ, ento wuwacci, ‘Babilon doŋ opoto! Bel ma lubaŋane doŋ lewic omako woko. Merodak bene cwinye oballe woko. Cal lubaŋane-gu ducu doŋ lewic omakogi woko, ki cal jogine doŋ gininyo woko!’" 
Jeremiah50:3 Rok ma oa ki i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam obino ka lweny i kom Babilon, bibalo lobo miyo doko tim aroo. Dano ki lee gibiriŋo woko, doŋ ŋat mo ma bibedo kunnu bedo pe.”" 
Jeremiah50:4 Rwot owacci, “Ka kare meno oo jo Icrael ki jo Juda gibibino ki koko, kun giyenya an Rwot Lubaŋagi," 
Jeremiah50:5 Gibipenyo pi yo ma cito i Cion, gibicito gikemo kunnu atir. Gibiketo gicikke ma bedo nakanaka ki Rwot ma pe gibiturone, dok wigi bene pe biwil iye." 
Jeremiah50:6 “Jona doŋ gitye macalo romi niurwenyo, ma lukwatgi aye oweko gurwenyo woko i wi godi. Gubedo ka wot ki i kom got man kun gicito i kom got mukene, ma wigi owil woko ka ma pacogi tye iye." 
Jeremiah50:7 Jo ducu ma onoŋogi gunekogi woko lukworgi doŋ wacci, ‘Onoŋo gutimo bal i kom Rwot ma en aye kabedogi me ada, ma kwarogi yam gigeno; pi meno gin ma watimo-ni pe rac wacel.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Wun jo Icrael wuriŋ woko ki i Babilon! Wuwek lobo pa jo Kaldaya! Wubed jo mukwoŋo me weko lobo macalo nyok dyel ma telo nyim dyegi! 
Jeremiah50:9 Nen, abetugo lwak pa rok ma gitego ma gitye yo tuŋ acam, am iyo gibino ka lweny i kom gaŋ me Babilon. Gibirye woko i tyeŋ pi lweny i kom gaŋ me Babilon ci gimako woko. Ci gicelo atero macalo lulweny ma gikwiri ma pe gicelo aterogi piny noŋo." 
Jeremiah50:10 Gibiyako lobo pa jo Kaldaya; jo ma biyako bene gibiyako gin ducu ma igi mito, man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Jeremiah50:11 “Wun jo Babilon doŋ wuyako rokka woko. Kadi bed cwinywu yom, kun wuwakke macalo laroya dyaŋ ma nyono bel, nyo macalo twon aguragura ma kok," 
Jeremiah50:12 gaŋwu doŋ bipoŋ ki lewic dok ki cac madit. Lobo Babilon ma en aye minwu doŋ bilokke doko rok mo matidi adada i kin rok ducu; bidoko lo bo mutwo dok tim aroo ma pii pe iye. 
Jeremiah50:13 Pi kinigana, ŋat mo pe ma bibedo i Babilon; lobo man ducu bidoko obur ma iye odoŋ noŋo. Jo ducu ma gibikato ki i ŋet Babilon gibibedo ki ur madit kun gijwat pi gin man ma otimmeni." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Wun wegi atum, wucuŋ i tyeŋ pi lweny i kom Babilon, wurum woko. Wucel aterowu ducu i kom Babilon, pien doŋ otyeko timo bal woko i koma, an Rwot." 
Jeremiah50:15 Wudaŋŋe ki woo me lweny kun wurumo kwede gaŋ woko. Babilon kombeddi doŋ omine woko kene. Celle ducu doŋ gimuko gireto woko piny. Man an Rwot aye atye ka culo kwor i kom jo Babilon, Pi meno wucul kwor i komgi, wutimgi kit macalo yam gin gutimo kwede jo mukene-ni," 
Jeremiah50:16 Pe myero wuwek lucoc guco kodi i Babilon, ki jo ma gimako pala me kayo kac bene obed pe. Larok mo keken ma bedo kunnu bibedo ki lworo i kom mony ma tye ka lweny ci bimiyo dok cen i lobone kikome." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Jo Icrael gubedo calo romi ma labwor odwaro ci oryemogi oketogi woko ata. Mukwoŋo kabaka me Aciria yam olwenyo i komgi, ka dok Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon omwodo cogogi woko." 
Jeremiah50:18 Pi meno, an Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, abiketo can i kom kabaka Nebukadnejar ki lobone, kit macalo yam aketo kwede can i kom kabaka me Aciria-ni." 
Jeremiah50:19 Abidwoko jo Icrael woko cen i lobogi. Gibibedo ka camo cam ma cek i wi got Karmel ki i dul lobo me Bacan, dok bene gibicamo gin ducu ma igi mito ma ocek i wi cere i lobo Epraim ki Gilead." 
Jeremiah50:20 Ka kare meno oromo, ci pe gibinoŋo bal mo i Icrael, kadi ki tim maraco bene pe gibinoŋo i Juda, pien pe abitimo kica bot jo ma aweko gibedo kunnu. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Wucit wulweny i kom jo Merataim, ki Pekod. Wunekgi wutyekgi woko liweŋ. Dok wuti gin ducu ma acikowu. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah50:22 Woo me lweny doŋ tye ka winnye i lobo ki to-piny madit adada doŋ obino woko. 
Jeremiah50:23 Babilon doŋ ogoyo lobo woko piny ki nyol, ento koni nyol meno doŋ onidde woko matitino. Rok ducu gitye ki ur madit pi gin ma doŋ otimme i kom Babilon-ni." 
Jeremiah50:24 Babilon, doŋ ityeko moko woko i owic ma aciko piri, kun pe onoŋo iŋeyo. Ginoni doŋ imoko woko pien onoŋo ilwenyo i koma." 
Jeremiah50:25 Doŋ ayabo kabedo ka ma akano iye jami lwennya, akwanyogi akelogi woko ki kiniga, pien an Rwot Lubaŋa me mony, atye ki tic ma myero ati i lobo Babilon." 
Jeremiah50:26 Wubin wacak lweny i kome i kabedo ducu; wuyab dero belle woko-gu ducu. Wucan jami ma giyako-ni wek odurre lipim calo kal ma giduro. Wujwer gaŋ woko rwatrwat! Pe wuwek gin mo odoŋ iye kadi ki acel. 
Jeremiah50:27 Wunek twonigi woko ducu! Wunekgi woko liweŋ. Can i wi jo Babilon, pien karegi doŋ oromo Kare doŋ oo me keto can i komgi!”" 
Jeremiah50:28 Luriŋ ayela ma gin jo ma gubwot ki i Babilon gubino i Cion, dok gutito kit macalo Rwot Lubaŋawa oculo kwede kwor pi gin ma yam jo Babilon otimo i kom ot mere." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Wulwon wegi atum me lweny i kom Babilon. Wucwal jo ducu ma giŋeyo telo atum ki celo atero guciti. Wurum gaŋ woko, pe wuwek ŋat mo obwoti. Wucul kwor i kome pi gin ducu ma yam en otimo, dok bene wutim en kit macalo yam en otimo kwede jo mukene-ni, pien en yam oette i koma ki wakke madit, an Rwot ŋat Maleŋ pa Icrael." 
Jeremiah50:30 Pi meno awobegi gibinekogi woko i dye gaŋ, ki askarine bene gibinekogi gityekogi woko i nino meno. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Nen, atye ki lok i komwu wun jo ma luwakke, man Rwot me mony ma owaco; pien ninowu doŋ oo, en aye kare ma abiketo iye can i komwu." 
Jeremiah50:32 Rokwu ma lawakke-ni biyokke ci poto woko, doŋ ŋat mo ma bikonyowu ilowu malo pe tye. Abicwinyo gaŋiwu woko ducu ki mac, dok gin ducu ma orumo gaŋi gibibalo woko liweŋ.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, “Gitye ka uno jo Icrael ki jo Juda matek mada. Jo ma doŋ gumakogi macalo opii gitye ka gwokogi adada, ma pe giye ni guciti wacel." 
Jeremiah50:34 Ento ŋat ma kokogi-ni tek, nyiŋe Rwot me mony. En kikome aye ma doŋ bipido lokgi, dok bikelo kuc i lobo, ento bikelo can i kom jo Babilon.”" 
Jeremiah50:35 Rwot owacci, “Ginek jo Babilon! Ginek jo Kaldaya woko! Ginek rwodine ki luryekone ducu woko." 
Jeremiah50:36 Ginek lutyet ma lugoba, ma gin coggi lumiŋ mogo ma pe twerre-ni. Ginek lulwennye, myero ginekgi gityekgi woko." 
Jeremiah50:37 Wunek aguragurane dok wubal gadigadi lwennye wutyek woko! Wunek jo me dul mony pa lurok ma giwilogi ki lim me bino ka lweny; doŋ gibidoko goro calo mon. Wubal lonyone-gu woko ducu, wuyak jamigi woko liweŋ." 
Jeremiah50:38 Can pii myero opot i lobone, wek piine otwo woko liweŋ! Babilon aye lobo ma opoŋ ki cal jogi maraco, ci oloko dano gudoko lupoya," 
Jeremiah50:39 “Pi meno lee me tim gibibedo kacel ki lanudi ki udu i Babilon, dano doŋ pe bibedo kunnu matwal, dok bene dano pe doŋ bibedo iye pi kare pa yalwak ducu." 
Jeremiah50:40 Kit gin acel-lu bitimme i kom Babilon, ma yam otimme i kom Codom ki Gomora-ni, ki i kom gaŋi pa luwotgi ma otumo ka ŋetgi ma Lubaŋa otyekogi. Dano mo pe bibedo kunnu, dok ŋat mo bene pe bibedo iye macalo welo. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Nen, lwak me rok mo-ni tye ka bino kun gia ki i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam; rok matek ki luker mapol ma tye ka mabor mada tye ka yubbe pi lweny." 
Jeremiah50:42 Doŋ gumako atumgi ki tonigi woko likiŋ; giger adada, pe gitye ki kica mo wacel; woogi winnye calo nam ma tye ka mor. Guriŋo ki aguragura, ma gurye woko calo jo ma doŋ kuro lweny akura, i komwu, wun jo Babilon!" 
Jeremiah50:43 Kabaka me Babilon bene doŋ otyeko winyo lok i komgi, cine bene doŋ okwe woko ma pe doŋ timo gin mo; remcwiny madwoŋ doŋ oketo kome woko, calo arem pa dako ma tye ka rem ki nywal." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Nen, abibino macalo labwor i olet romi kun aa ki i buŋa me Jordan ma yatte oculle likiŋ, ci abimiyo jo Babilon giriŋo woko ki i lobogi. Doŋ lacen dano mo ma ayero ni obed latel aye biloyo rok meno. Aŋa ma gitwero poro ki an? Aŋa ma twero ette ka lwona pi lweny? Kit lakwat aŋo mono ma twero cuŋ i nyima?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Pi meno, doŋ wuwiny kit yub ma an Rwot, doŋ atyeko yubone i kom jo Babilon, ki gin ma doŋ ayubbe me timone i kom lobo pa jo Kaldaya. Kadi bed wa litinogi gibiywayogi woko, ci abimiyo dano ducu gibedo ki ur matek i kom can meno mupoto i komgi." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ka Babilon opoto, ci morre bimiyo lobo yeŋŋe, ki koko oduru ma gigoyo pire bene biwinnye wa i kin rok mukene ducu.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Abekelo gin ma neko piny i kom Babilon ki i kom jo Kaldaya." 
Jeremiah51:2 Abicwalo lurok ka pyeto Babilon calo cuŋ kai ma gipyeto ma yamo kolo tero woko. Ka nino me can man obino ci gilwenyo i kom dano i kabedo ducu, gibiweko lobo doŋ noŋo." 
Jeremiah51:3 Pe wumi kare ki jo Babilon me celo aterogi nyo me ruko koti nyonyogi me lweny. Pe wubwot awobegi gubed makwo. Wutyek dul monygi woko licwic. 
Jeremiah51:4 Gibiketo ret i komgi ci gito woko i lobo pa jo Kaldaya ki i dye yo me gaŋigi," 
Jeremiah51:5 An Rwot Lubaŋa me mony, pe abwoto jo Icrael ki jo Juda, kadi bed onoŋo gutimo bal i koma, an ŋat Maleŋ me Icrael." 
Jeremiah51:6 Wuriŋ woko ki i Babilon! Wuriŋ wular kwowu! Pe myero ginekwu woko pi bal me Babilon. Pien man en aye kare me culo kworra ki me keto can i kom Babilon ma oporo gin ma en otimo. 
Jeremiah51:7 Babilon onoŋo obedo macalo kikopo jabu i ciŋa, ma omiyo lobo ducu omer. Rok ducu gumato koŋo vinone, ci gudoko lupoya woko." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babilon doŋ opoto woko oyotoyot, kun gijwero woko licwic. Wukok pire! Wukel yat wuket i waŋ rette, gwok nyo bimiyo can." 
Jeremiah51:9 Lurok ma onoŋo gibedo kunnu guwacci, ‘Watemo konyo Babilon ki yat wek ocan, ento onoŋo doŋ pe twero larre. Wubwote, wek wacitu wadoku cen paco, Lubaŋa doŋ otyeko keto can i kom Babilon ki tekke ducu, ci ojwero obalo woko adada.’’’" 
Jeremiah51:10 Rwot owacci, “Jona gidaŋŋe ni, ‘Rwot doŋ onyuto ni lokwa tye atir. Wubin wacitu watitu bot jo ma bedo i Cion gin ma Rwot Lubaŋawa doŋ otyeko timone-ni.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:11 Rwot doŋ otugo cwiny luker pa jo Medi woko, pien doŋ oyubbe me tyeko Babilon woko. Man aye kit macalo en biculo kwede kwor pi ot mere ma gimuko gireto woko piny-nyi. Ludito wi mony doŋ giwaco bot askari ni, “Wupak leb aterowu! Wumak kwotwu i ciŋwu!" 
Jeremiah51:12 Wutwe bendera ocuŋ ma nyuto lweny i kom cel me Babilon. Wucuk cwiny lukur-piny pe gubed lwor! Wupok lukur-piny woko i kabedo mapatpat. Wumi jo mukanne woko guki piny!” Rwot doŋ otyeko timo gin ma yam en oyubbe ni ebitimo, gin ma yam en oloko ni ebitimo i kom jo ma gibedo i Babilon." 
Jeremiah51:13 Babilon tye ki kulu madwoŋ ki lonyo mabup, ento karene doŋ otum, ki tol uci me kwone doŋ giŋolo woko." 
Jeremiah51:14 Rwot me mony doŋ okwoŋne ki nyiŋe kekene ni ebikelo lwak dano mapol calo bonyo ka lweny i kom Babilon, ka doŋ gibidaŋŋe ki dwan me woo me loyo lweny." 
Jeremiah51:15 Rwot oketolobo ki twerone; dok ocibo lobo ocuŋ matek pi ryekone, ki pi niaa matut ma en tye kwede omiyo oyaro polo woko." 
Jeremiah51:16 I kare ma dwane mor, ci pii twagge matek ki i polo, dok miyo lupu duny kun a ki agikki lobo. En miyo lutkot wil ka kot cwer, dok miyo yamo kodo kun a ki i ot kano jamine." 
Jeremiah51:17 Dano ducu bedo lumiŋ dok bene ma wigi odiŋ; lewic mako latet jabu pi cal jokke ma en otiyo, pien cal jogine-gu ducu pe lubaŋa me ada, dok bene pe gitye ki kit kwo mo i igi." 
Jeremiah51:18 Konygi pe, gitiyogi mere me acaya keken; i kare ma Rwot bibino ka keto can i komgi gibito gitum woko." 
Jeremiah51:19 Lubaŋa pa Yakobo pe obedo calo cal jogi magi; pien en aye ŋat ma oketo jami ducu, dok bene en oyero jo Icrael wek gubed jone kikome. Nyine Rwot me mony." 
Jeremiah51:20 Rwot owacci, “Babilon, in ibedo nyonona, ki jami lwennya. Atiyo kwedi me ŋinyo rok ducu woko atiyo kwedi me tyero ker woko ducu," 
Jeremiah51:21 atiyo kwedi nie neko aguragura ki jo ma riŋo kwede kun anyotogi woko, atiyo kwedi me turo gadigadi lweny kacel ki jo ma ŋweco kwedgi atyeko woko," 
Jeremiah51:22 atiyo kwedi me neko co wa ki mon, atiyo kwedi me neko co muti wa ki awobe-gu,’ atiyo kwedi me ooko awobe wa ki anyia," 
Jeremiah51:23 atiyo kwedi me nyoto lukwat ki romigi woko ninyininyi, atiyo kwedi me neko lupur wa ki twoni ma gipuro kwede, atiyo kwedi me neko luloc wa ki ludito wi mony-gu ducu." 
Jeremiah51:24 “Wubineno gin me culo kwor ma abitimo i kom Babilon ki i kom jo aldaya ducu pi gin marac ma gutimo i kom Cion. 
Jeremiah51:25 In Babilon, ibedo calo got ma otyeko lobo woko, ento an Rwot aye lakworri. Abimaki woko licwic, ci arudi woko i ŋom, ci abiweki idoŋ buru calo got ma owaŋ." 
Jeremiah51:26 Pe gibikwanyo gweŋ mo ki i komi wacel ma gibitic kwede pi gedo doki,’ me twok ot kadi ki me te guti me ot. Ibidoko doŋ macalo tim aroo matwal, Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Wugur bendera ocuŋ i ŋom pi lweny! Wukut tum wek rok ducu guwiny! Doŋ wulwoŋ rok woko ducu pi lweny i kom Babilon! Wuwac ki ker magi, Ararat, Mini, ki Acikenaj, gubin gulweny i kome. Wuket ladit ma loyo wi mony ducu me lweny i kome. Wukel aguragura-gu mapol calo lwak bonyo ma corre," 
Jeremiah51:28 Wuyub rok ducu, luker pa jo Medi, luloc me lobo ki ludito ma konyogi, ki lobo ducu ma tye i te locgi me lweny i kom Babilon." 
Jeremiah51:29 Lobo tye ka yeŋŋe dok jo ma iye tye ka kayo lakgi ki arem madwoŋ, pien Rwot doŋ tye ka cobo gin ma en oyubo, En biloko Babilon doko tim aroo, ka ma dano mo pe bedo iye." 
Jeremiah51:30 Lulweny me Babilon doŋ gugiko lweny woko, ci gubedo woko i cel gogogi. Tekcwinygi doŋ otum woko, doŋ gudoko calo mon. Dog gaŋ ducu doŋ gituro woko; dok odi-gu ducu doŋ gicwinyo woko ki mac tye ka waŋ." 
Jeremiah51:31 Luor giriŋo teretere me rwatte ki luwotgi, kun gicito ka tito bot kabaka me Babilon ni gaŋ doŋ gituro woko ki i kabedo ducu." 
Jeremiah51:32 Lukwor gumako mel ki yeya me ŋolo kulu woko dok gucwinyo lum-gu ki mac. Askari me Babilon ducu doŋ gubaŋŋe woko," 
Jeremiah51:33 Lukworgi cok jwerogi woko piny ci ginyonogi woko ki tyengi calo bel ma tye i laro moyo.” Man Rwot me mony, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, aye ma owaco." 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon ocama otyeka woko; oŋinya woko kicikici. Oweko gaŋ odoŋ ma iye noŋo calo i agulu; ci omwonya woko calo min kulu, Okwanyo gin ma iye mito, ci obolo gin mukene mudoŋŋe-gu woko." 
Jeremiah51:35 Wek jo Cion guwacci, “Alii myero obed i wi Babilon gire, pi tim bwami ma gitimo i komwa!” Wek jo Jerucalem guwacci, “Aliimyero obedi wi jo Kaldaya gire pi danowa ma ginekogi!”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Pi meno Rwot owaco bot jo Jerucalem kuman ni, “Abipido lokwu, dok abiculo kwor piwu bene. Abimiyo pii me nam me Babilon two woko, ki waŋ itte-gu ducu amiyo two woko." 
Jeremiah51:37 Babilon doŋ bidoko odur ma obakke lipim i wi obur ka ma too me tim gibedo iye. Bibedo kabedo marac ma miyo lworo, ŋat mo pe ma bibedo kunnu wacel, doŋ jo ducu ma gibinene gibijwat mada i kom kabedo man ma odoŋ nono laboŋo ŋat mo ma bedo iye-ni." 
Jeremiah51:38 Jo Babilon ducu gibikok calo labwor, dok gibiŋur calo litino labwor." 
Jeremiah51:39 Ka gin jo ma luworo, ci abitedo karama pigi, Abimiyo gimato mat gimer woko ci cwinygi bedo mayom. Gibinino woko, ento pe doŋ gibico wacel." 
Jeremiah51:40 Abiterogi woko macalo litino romi, macalo nyogi dyegi nyo nyogi romi. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah51:41 “Babilon ma en aye gaŋ ma wi lobo kulu pako-ni, doŋ gimako woko! Babilon doŋ odoko gin ma kelo lworo marac bot rok ducu!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Nam doŋ ocorre woko limuk i kom Babilon, ci biamwonyine ma mor oume woko lipuk." 
Jeremiah51:43 Gaŋine ducu doŋ odoko gin ma giuro ma kelo lworo marac, dok tye macalo tim aroo ma pii pe iye, ka ma dano mo pe bedo iye dok pe giwoto iye." 
Jeremiah51:44 Abiketo can i kom Bel, ma en lubaŋa me Babilon, dok abikwanyo jami ma yam en omwonyo-gu woko ducu ki i doge. Rok ducu pe gibicito ka wore kit ma yam con. “Cel me Babilon doŋ opoto woko. Wun jo Icrael wurin woko ki kunnu!" 
Jeremiah51:45 Dano acel acel tye ka riŋo woko laro kwone ki i kom kiniga mager pa Rwot. 
Jeremiah51:46 Pe myero cwinywu oballe woko, dok pe wubed ki lworo pi lok magi ma wuwinyo-ni. Mwaka ki mwaka lok mapat winnye ket i kabedo ducu, lok me tim bwami i lobo, ki dok lok i kom kabaka mo ma tye ka lweny ki kabaka lawote mukene." 
Jeremiah51:47 Pi meno, kare tye ka bino, en kare ma abitic kwede i kom cal jogi me Babilon. Lobo Babilon kulu bipoŋ ki lewic madwoŋ, ki jone ducu gibinekogi woko." 
Jeremiah51:48 Gin ducu ma tye i wi lobo ki i polo gibibedo ki yomcwiny kun giwero wer, ka ce Babilon opoto i ciŋ jo ma gubino ki i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam ka tyekone woko. Man Rwot ma owaco." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babilon aye ma okelo to i kom dano ducu ma bedo i wi lobo; kombeddi doŋ Babilon bipoto, pien omiyo jo Icrael mapol ata guto." 
Jeremiah51:50 “Wun jona ma wutye i Babilon doŋ wubwot ki i lak to! Kombeddi doŋ wuciti, pe dok wukur gin mo! Kadi bed wutye ka mabor ki paco myero wutam pira, an a Rwotwu, wiwu bene myero opo pi Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah51:51 Wuwacci, ‘Lewic omakowa pien wawinyo lok me cac ma gicayowa kwede; wadoko doŋ jo ma goro atika, pien lurok doŋ gubino i kabedo maleŋ ma i ot pa Rwot.’" 
Jeremiah51:52 Pi meno awacci, kare tye ka bino, en kare ma abitic kwede i kom jogi me Babilon, jo ma giketo ret i komgi gibibedo ka ŋur i kabedo mapol i lobone ducu." 
Jeremiah51:53 Kadi bed Babilon it malo wa i pol, kadi bed oger gaŋ me cel gogone kunnu, pud abicwalo dano aye me cito ka tyeke woko. An Rwot doŋ aloko. Can ma pud tye ka medde i kom Babilon" 
Jeremiah51:54 “Wuwiny dwan me koko ma tye i Babilon, wuwiny ka dano gidaŋŋe pi can ma doŋ opoto i lobo pa jo Kaldaya." 
Jeremiah51:55 Doŋ abejwero Babilon woko, amiyo tekke bene tum ci liŋ mot. Mony tye ka rune bino oyotoyot calo pii biamwonyi ma mor, gibino ka lweny i kome ki woo matek." 
Jeremiah51:56 Doŋ gubino woko ka keto can i kom Babilon, gimako lulwennye woko, ki atumgi bene gituro giŋido woko matitino. An Rwot Lubaŋa ma aketo can i kom dano pi bal, abiculo kwor aketo can i kom Babilon pi bal ma jone gutimo." 
Jeremiah51:57 Abimiyo rwodine gimer woko, jo maryek, luloc me lobo, ki ludito wi mony ducu, ki lulweny. Gibinino woko, ginino ento pe dok gibico wacel. An Kabaka doŋ aloko, an Rwot me mony." 
Jeremiah51:58 Cel me Babilon malac-ci gibimuko gireto woko i nom, ki dog gaŋŋe mamalo-gu gibiwaŋo woko ki mac. Tic ma lurok gutiyo-gu ducu obedo me noŋo; gin ma rok ducu guyelle iye ka tiyo ticce matek doŋ mac owaŋo woko.” Man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome. Gicwalo lok pa Jeremia i Babilon" 
Jeremiah51:59 Ceraya wod pa Neria ma wod pa Maceya, yam obedo ŋat ma gwoko kabaka Jedekia. I mwaka me aŋwen me loc pa Jedekia kabaka me Juda, Ceraya onoŋo cito i Babilon, ci Jeremia otitte kit lok mogo ma myero en owot kwede." 
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremia ocoyo i buk lok kom can ma bipoto i kom Babilon, ki lok mukene-gu ducu ma gicoyo ma okemo Babilon." 
Jeremiah51:61 Owaco bot Ceraya ni, “Ka io i Babilon nen ni ikwano lok magi ducu kit macalo gicoyo-ni bot lwak." 
Jeremiah51:62 Ci myero ileg ni, ‘Ai Rwot, yam onoŋo iwaco ni ibijwero kabedo man woko, wek pe gin makwo obed iye, dano nyo kadi lee, ci koŋ bibedo macalo tim aroo matwal.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Ka doŋ ityeko kwano buk man bot lwak, ci itwe gweŋ i kome, ka doŋ ibol kwede woko i dye kulu Euprate," 
Jeremiah51:64 kun iwacci, ‘Man aye kit macalo Babilon bimwony kwede woko, ma pe doŋ bikatti woko matwal, pi can ma abekelo ma abiketo i kome.’ ”" 
Jeremiah52:1 Jedekia ocamo ker ma mwaka me ditte pyeraryo wiye acel, ci obedo ka loc i Jerucalem pi mwaka apar wiye acel. Nyiŋ minne Kamutal, nya pa Jeremia me Libna." 
Jeremiah52:2 En obedo ka tiyo gin ma nen marac i waŋ Rwot, kun lubo gin ducu ma yam Yekoyakim otiyo." 
Jeremiah52:3 Pi kiniga ma omako Rwot, ka kare oromo, omiyo Rwot obayo Jerucalem ki Juda woko ki i nyime. Jedekia ocako jemo woko i kom kabaka me Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:4 I mwaka me aboŋwen me locce, i dwe me apar, i nino dwe apar, en aye Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon obino kwede ki monnye ducu i kom Jerucalem, ci orumo gaŋ woko, ka dok gutoro cel lobo orumo woko dyere." 
Jeremiah52:5 Gaŋ girumo kit meno nio wa i mwaka me apar wiye acel me loc pa kabaka Jedekia. 
Jeremiah52:6 I kom nino dwe aboŋwen me dwe me aŋwen onoŋo kec odoko marac i Jerucalem, ma omiyo cam pe dok nen pi lwak." 
Jeremiah52:7 Ka gumuko cel me gaŋ woko, ci lwak lulweny ducu gumol guriŋo ki i dyewor, kun giwok ki i dog gaŋ ma i kin cel cel aryo me Jerucalem, ma i ŋet poto pa kabaka, kadi onoŋo jo Kaldaya gurumo gaŋ woko. Gucito gulubo yo ma dok tuŋ Araba." 
Jeremiah52:8 Ento mony pa jo Kaldaya guryemo kor kabaka, ci gumake woko i bar me Jeriko; ci monnye guket woko ducu ki i kome." 
Jeremiah52:9 Ka gumako kabaka, ci gukelo en bot kabaka me Babilon i Ribla, ka ma oŋolle iye kop." 
Jeremiah52:10 Kabaka me Babilon ocako neko awobe pa Jedekia woko ki i nyime ma waŋe neno, dok bene oneko rwodi me Juda woko ducu ki i Ribla." 
Jeremiah52:11 En okolo waŋ Jedekia oloyo woko ka omiyo gitweye ki nyor, gitere kwede wa i Babilon, ci gikete i mabuc nio wa i nino me tone." 
Jeremiah52:12 I dwe me abic, i kom nino dwe apar, ma en aye mwaka me apar wiye aboŋwenne me loc pa kabaka Nebukadnejar, ma kabaka me Babilon, en aye Nebujaradan ma ladit pa lugwok kabaka, ma latic pa kabaka me Babilon, obino i Jerucalem." 
Jeremiah52:13 Ocako waŋo ot pa Rwot woko ki ot pa kabaka, ki odi ducu ma tye i Jerucalem; owaŋo odi madito woko ducu ki mac." 
Jeremiah52:14 Ki mony pa jo Kaldaya ducu, ma yam gitye kacel ki ladit pa lugwok kabaka, gumuko kicika cel murumo Jerucalem woko," 
Jeremiah52:15 Ki lwak ma yam gudoŋ i gaŋ, ki jo ma yam gukobo gigi “kengi bot kabaka me Babilon, kacel ki lwak ma gudoŋŋe ducu, Nebujaradan ma, ladit pa lugwok kabaka oterogi woko I opu," 
Jeremiah52:16 Ento oweko jo mogo ma gin lucan adada gudoŋ i lobo wek gubed lugwok poto olok ki lupur ki kweri dyaŋ," 
Jeremiah52:17 Ki wir mola ma yam gitye i ot pa Rwot ki litino gadigadi, ki nam me mola ‘ma yam gitye i ot pa Rwot, jo Kaldaya guturo gunido woko, ka gutero mola mere wa i Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:18 Gutero lwak agulu ducu ki akwaya; latokke-gu ki magac-gu, ki becen, ki atabo me odok eceta, ki jami me mola ducu ma yam gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Rwot" 
Jeremiah52:19 ki atabo matino ki weer me waŋo mac bene, ki atabo, me liyo gityer amata. Gin ma yam otiyo ki jabu ladit pa lugwok kabaka otero macalo jabu, gin ma yam otiyo ki ryal, otero macalo ryal." 
Jeremiah52:20 Lok ma dok i kom wir aryo-ni, ki nam acel, ki litino gadigadi ducu ma yam Solomon otiyo pi ot pa Rwot, pek me mola ma oa ki i kom jami magi ducu dwoŋ, pe pimme," 
Jeremiah52:21 Bor pa wir acel acel romo futi pyeraryo wiye abiro, gipimo kor wir ki tol ci ditte oromo futi apar wiye aboro. Iye onoŋo twolo, kome ducu kinoŋ ma romo nyig ciŋ aŋwen," 
Jeremiah52:22 I wiye yam giketo iye lalukana me mola, kun lalukana borre romo futi abiro ki nucu. I kom lalukana onoŋo giketo iye obwo ki cal nyig okwer pomegranat, ma gin ducu gitiyogi ki mola ma girumo lalu: kana dyere. Wir me aryo bene rom ki lawote, kun tye ki cal nyig pomegranat." 
Jeremiah52:23 Cal pomegranat onoŋo romo pyeraboŋwen wiye abicel ki yo tun ŋeye ducu ki woko; cal pomegranat ducu doŋ romo miya acel ma orumo obwo ma gitiyo orumo woko ducu-ni," 
Jeremiah52:24 Ladit pa Lugwok kabaka, otero Ceraya bene ma ajwaka madit, ki Jepania ajwaka me aryone, ki lukur doggola me ot pa Rwot gin adek." 
Jeremiah52:25 Ka dok okwanyo ladit ma loyo lumony ki i dye gaŋ, ki lumemba abic me lukiko pa kabaka ma onoŋogi i dye gaŋ; ki karan pa ladit me mony, ma yam coko jo me lobo pi lweny; ki jo pyerabicel i kin wegi lobo ma ginonogi i dye gaŋ." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebujaradan, ladit pa lugwok kabaka omakogi, oterogi wa i Ribla bot kabaka me Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:27 Kabaka me Babilon onekogi woko ducu ki i Ribla ma i lobo Kamat. Jo Juda ma gikwanyogi woko ki i lobogi giterogi woko i opii kit meno. 
Jeremiah52:28 Man aye wel dano ma yam Nebukadnejar omako otero woko i opii: i mwaka me abiro otero Lujudaya ma romo alip adek ki pyeraryo wiye adek. 
Jeremiah52:29 I mwaka me apar wiye aboro me locce en okwanyo dano ma romo miya aboro ki pyeradek wiye aryo ki i Jerucalem oterogi woko i opii. 
Jeremiah52:30 I mwaka me pyeraryo wiye adek me loc pa Nebukadnejar, Nebujaradan ladit pa lugwok kabaka otero Lujudaya ma romo dano miya abiro ki pyeraŋwen wiye abic i opii. Wel dano ducu ma giterogi i opii doŋ oribbe alip aŋwen ki miya abicel’" 
Jeremiah52:31 I kare me mwaka pyeradek wive abirone nia ma gitero kwede Yekoyakin kabaka me Juda i opii, i dwe me apar wiye aryo, i kom nino dwe pyeraryo wiye abic, en aye Evil-merodak, kabaka me Babilon, otimo kica ki Yekoyakin kabaka me Juda, ogonye woko ki i mabuc i mwaka ma en ocamo iye ker." 
Jeremiah52:32 Obedo ka lok kwede mot maber, oketo en obedo i kom madit makato ducu ki i kin kom pa luker ma yam gibedo kwede i Babilon." 
Jeremiah52:33 Kit meno Yekoyakin olunyo boŋo mabuc mere woko, obedo ka cam i wi meja pa kabaka jwijwi, pi kare me kwone ducu." 
Jeremiah52:34 Pi miye gin me konnye kwede, kabaka dok obedo ka miye lim me tic kwede jwijwi, nino ducu me kwone." 
Lamentations1:1 Gaŋ man ma yam dano gubedo iye-ni doŋ odoŋ nono niŋniŋ kaa! Onoŋo obedo gaŋ madit mada i kin lurok, doŋ odoko lam calo dako ma cware oto. En yam obedc daker i kin gaŋi-gu ducu, koni doŋ odoko ŋat ma giloyo." 
Lamentations1:2 En kok matek twatwal i dyewor, pig waŋe mol wa i leme cito piny; pe tye ŋat mo kadi ki acel i kin lureme ma romo kweyo cwinye; lureme ducu doŋ gulokke gudoko lukworre, ma timo en marac ki lok me roro." 
Lamentations1:3 Gutero jo Juda woko i opii ka neno can madwoŋ ki ka tiyo tic matego; kombeddi doŋ gitye ka mal i kin lurok ata, ma pe ginoŋo ka mo ma myero guywe iye; jo ma guryemo korgi gumakogi woko i waŋayo i kare ma onoŋo can doŋ obwoyogi woko marac." 
Lamentations1:4 Jo ma wok ki i yo ma cito i Cion tye ka kumo, pien ŋat mo pe ma cito ka kwero nino madito ma giciko; dog gaŋŋe ducu doŋ odoŋ noŋo, ajwagine gicur acura; anyirane cwinygi ton mada dok obalo tamgi woko, en kikome tye ki arem malit adada." 
Lamentations1:5 Lumerokke doŋ gudoko luloc, lumonene gibedo maber ki kuc; pien Rwot oye can ni opot i kome, pi lwak bane mapol; litinone doŋ gucito woko, gudoko opii pa lumerok ma oyakogi." 
Lamentations1:6 Deyo ki dit doŋ oa woko ki i kom Cion. Rwodine ducu doŋ gudoko calo til, ma pe ginoŋo olet mo ka ma myero gicam iye lum; guriŋo laboŋo teko mo, i nyim jo muryemo korgi." 
Lamentations1:7 I nino me can ki keccwiny ma ebedo kwede Jerucalem tye ka po pi jami me wel-gu ducu ma yam etye kwede nia wa con. Kare ma yam jone gupoto i cin lumerokgi; onoŋo pe tye ŋat mo ma myero okonye, lumerok gitiŋo waŋgi gunene, kun giŋalo can ma opoto i kome-ni aŋala," 
Lamentations1:8 Jerucalem otimo bal madito adada, omiyo odoko lacilo; jo ducu ma yam giwore doŋ gicaye acaya, pien guneno ni en doŋ tye munero; nen, en bene tye ka cur, kun oloko waŋe okemo ka mukene." 
Lamentations1:9 Kenine tye omoko i dog boŋone, yam pe obedo ki tam mo ni kwone bigik ki can. Can mupoto i kome-ni rac atikatika, ŋat ma kweyo cwinye pe; “Ai Rwot, nencan mupoto i koma magwa-ni, pien lukwor gitye ka waya i wiya ki wayo me loc!”" 
Lamentations1:10 Lamerok doŋ oryeyo ciŋe i kom jamine mabeco me wel-gu, iyo, en onoŋo oneno lurok ka gidonyo i kabedone maleŋ-ŋi, gin jo ma yam gigenogi woko ni pe gudony i cokke pa Lubaŋa," 
Lamentations1:11 Lwakke ducu tye ka cur acura kun giyenyo kwon: gicato jamigi mabeco woko liweŋ pi cam, wek komgi dok olim tek. “Nen, ai Rwot, pien doŋ gitye ka caya mada.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “Man pe gin mo ki tuŋ botwu, wun ducu ma wutye ka kato akata ki i ŋeta-ni? Wulok waŋwu wunen ka tye cwercwiny mo, ma rom ki cwercwinv ma gikelo i koma-ni ma Rwot omiyo opoto i koma, i kare ma kinigane olyetti woko marac i koma-ni." 
Lamentations1:13 “En ocwalo mac oa ki malo, opoto i kom cogona: ociko obwo wek tyena omok iye, ci oloka woko atataro; ka doŋ oweka ma abaŋŋe woko, kun abedo ma koma lit dyeceŋ jwi." 
Lamentations1:14 “Balla ducu gitweyogi woko i kom okol, otweyogi woko likiŋ ki ciŋe; ka doŋ orwakogi i ŋuta, omiyo tekona otum liweŋ; Rwot omiya i ciŋ jo ma pe aromo cuŋ i nyimgi." 
Lamentations1:15 “Rwot otuko ki oteka lwennya ducu ma i kin jona; olwoŋo cokke me neno lok i koma, wek ginid awobena woko; Rwot onyono jo Juda piny kit macalo ginyono kwede koŋo vino i bur." 
Lamentations1:16 “Akok pi lok magi ma pig waŋa mol adada; pien ŋat ma kweyo cwinya tye ka mabor, ŋat ma kono oteg cwinya; litinona doŋ gutum woko liweŋ, pien lamerok aye doŋ oloyo.”" 
Lamentations1:17 Cion oryeyo cine, ento pe tye dano mo ma kweyo cwinye; Rwot yam oywayo mony i kom Yakobo, wekjo ma girume gudoklumerokke’ Jerucalem olokke odoko gin ma cilo ma gicayo i kingi." 
Lamentations1:18 “Rwot lokke tye atir, pien ajemo akwero winyo lokke; ento wun lwak me rok ducu wuwiny, wunen arem ma atye kwede; pien anyirana ki awo bena doŋ giterogi woko i opii." 
Lamentations1:19 “Alwoŋo jo ma amarogi-ni, ento gubwola abwola; ajwagina ki ludoŋona ducu, guto gutum woko i gaŋ, i kare ma onoŋo giyenyo cam wek omi komgi dok olim tek." 
Lamentations1:20 “Ai Rwot, nen, atye ki can marac, cwinya doŋ orubbe woko marac; nen, cwinya tye ka poto lilin malit, pien abedo ŋat ma lajemo; gitye ka neko dano woko i waŋayo ki pala lucwan, kadi wa ki i ot bene to poto komgi." 
Lamentations1:21 “Koŋ iwiny ka acur, pe tye ŋat mo ma kweyo cwinya, Lukworra ducu doŋ guwinyo pi can ma opoto i koma; cwinygi yom ni itimo man i koma ber, Cwal nino ma yam doŋ itito pire-ni obin, wek gin bene gubed ki can calo an." 
Lamentations1:22 “Wek gin marac ducu ma gutiyo oo i nyimi, ci itim gin ma itimo i koma i kingi bene, gin ma itimo i koma, pi lwak balla ducu ma yam atimo; pien atye ka cur mada, tek doŋ otum woko ki i cwinya.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Rwot oumo Cion woko ki pol, kun onoŋo tye ki kiniga; okwanyo deyo pa Icrael ki i polo obolo woko piny i lobo; pe dok wiye opo i kom laten tyene, i kare ma doŋ onoŋo kiniga omake woko." 
Lamentations2:2 Rwot ojwero odi pa jo pa Yakobo woko ducu, laboŋo kica mo; omuko cel gogo pa jo Juda woko ducu ki kinigane okelogi wa piny i nom ki lewic, ker kacel wa ki lulocce ducu." 
Lamentations2:3 Odwoko tek pa Icrael woko ducu piny, ki kinigane mager okwanyo ciŋe ma lacuc woko ki i komgi, ki i nyim ukworgi; obedo ka waŋ i Yakobo calo mac ma lyel ma waŋo jami ma ka ŋete woko ducu." 
Lamentations2:4 En otelo atumme calo lamerok, ki ciŋe lacuc mujiŋo bade woko calo lakwor: oneke jo ma yam yomo cwinywa woko ducu ki i kema pa jo Cion; ocoro kirugane mage i kome calo mac." 
Lamentations2:5 Rwot doŋ odoko macalo lakwor, otyeko Icrael woko liweŋ; otyeko odi madoŋo mapol woko ducu, omiyo cel gogo ducu doŋ gudoko obur; doŋ onyayo kumo ki koko odoko dwoŋ bot jo Juda." 
Lamentations2:6 Oturo bolone woko piny macalo bolo mo ma i poto-ni, omiyo kabedo me kwero nino madito ma giciko odoŋ obur; Rwot doŋ omiyo kwero nino madiro ki cen me cadit ogik woko i Cion; pi akemone mager, omiyo ocayo kabaka ki ajwaka pa Lubaŋa." 
Lamentations2:7 Rwot doŋ ocayo keno tyerre mada, okuno bene kabedone maleŋ-ŋi woko: otyeko doŋ miyo odi madoŋo woko ducu i ciŋ lukworre; koko owo i ot pa Rwot, macalo i kare me kwero nino madit." 
Lamentations2:8 Rwot oyubbe pi muko cel me Cion woko wek kabedone doŋ obed wi obur; opimo woko ki tol, otyeko woko ma pe ojuko ciŋe; omiyo gogo ki cel ducu gukok, komgi ducu oloc woko kacel." 
Lamentations2:9 Dog gaŋŋe ducu gumwony woko piny i ŋom, omuko liweŋ, oturo wa kikane woko bene; kabakane ki rwodine gitye i kin lurok, cik doŋ pe matwal. Lunebine bene doŋ pe gineno ginanyuta ma a ki bot Rwot." 
Lamentations2:10 Ludoŋo pa jo Cion, gibedo piny laliŋ; guonyo apwa i wigi, doŋ guruko boŋo cola; anyira Jerucalem doŋ gukulo wigi piny." 
Lamentations2:11 Abedo ka koko ki pig waŋa, ma cwinya doŋ orubbe woko; cwinya opoŋ woko ligwik ki can, pi lwak jo Cion ma gityekogi woko-ni, pien litino matino ki litino lukere gutum woko i dye yo ma i gaŋ." 
Lamentations2:12 Gikok bot megigi ni, “Kwon ki kono yino kono tye kwene?” kun gitye ka wille woko calo jo ma ret omakogi, i dye yo ma i gaŋ, kun kwogi tum woko, ki i kor megigi." 
Lamentations2:13 Atwero loko gin aŋo, piri, dok atwero pori ki ŋo, in Jerucalem? Atwero waco ni ibedo calo aŋo, wek arom kweyo cwinyi, in Cion ma amaro-ni? Pien oburri doŋ lac calo nam; aŋa ma twero dwoko cwinyi cen?" 
Lamentations2:14 Lunebini yam guneno ginanyuta me go ba ki me bwolo piri, pe gunyuto balli kamalen pi dwoko gummi ducu boti; ento gubedo ka neno lok me go ba me teri i can." 
Lamentations2:15 Jo ma woto gikato ki i gudo gidoŋo ciŋgi piri; kun gijwat ma giyeno wigi pi Jerucalem, ni, “Man aye gaŋ ma yam gilwoŋo ni mwonya twatwal-li, ma yomo cwiny lobo ducu-ni?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Lukworri giŋali, gijwat ma gikayo lakgi; ma gidaŋŋe ni, “Doŋ watyeko neke woko! Iyo, man en aye kare ma yam wabedo ka paro pire-ni, doŋ oo, dok waneno ki waŋwa!”" 
Lamentations2:17 Rwot doŋ otiyo kit macalo en o yubo, ocobo gin ma yam en omoko, kit macalo yam oyubo wa con ca; omuko gaŋwu oreto woko laboŋo kica; omiyo lukwor gubedo ki yomcwiny madwoŋ i komwu, dok omiyo tek bot oteka lweny pa lumerokwu." 
Lamentations2:18 Kok matek bot Rwot, in Cion! Wek pig waŋi omol ocit piny macalo pii ma i kulu, ma mol dyeceŋ ki dyewor benebene, ma pe mii kare mo me yweyo, ma pig waŋi pe cok!" 
Lamentations2:19 A malo, kok matek i dyewor, i kare ducu ma nino doŋ kur doko mit! Ony can ma tye i cwinyi woko macalo pii i nyim Rwot! “Taŋ ciŋi malo bot Rwot, kun ikok bote pi kwo pa litinoni, ma kec nekogi miyo giwille woko i yo ducu ma tye i dye gaŋ." 
Lamentations2:20 Nen, ai Rwot, ci itam! Aŋa ma itimo calo man? Myero mon ocam litinogi, litino lukere ma gutiŋo i korgi? Imito ginek ajwagi ki lunebi i kabedoni maleŋ bo, Rwot?" 
Lamentations2:21 Litino ki ludito muti gubuto piny i apwa i dye yo-gu; anyirana ki litino awobena ginekogi woko liweŋ ki pala lucwan; inekogi i kare ma onoŋo it ye ki kiniga; inekogi woko laboŋo kica mo. 
Lamentations2:22 Ilwoŋo lukworra guruma woko dyere ma gumiya lworo twatwal i kare me kwero nino madit ma iciko pire. Ki i kare ma Rwot onoŋo kiniga omako, pe tye dano mo ma obwot nyo ma obedo kwo; lukwor guneko litino ma yam atiŋogi dok apitogi-ni." 
Lamentations3:1 An aye dano ma oneno can twatwal pien awinyo arem ma ogoya kwede ki akemo; 
Lamentations3:2 Oryema woko otera i colpiny ka ma leŋo pe iye. 
Lamentations3:3 Adada en bedo ka pwoda, pwoda dok pwoda dyeceŋ jwi." 
Lamentations3:4 En omiyo riŋo koma ki del koma oballe woko, oturo cogona woko bene." 
Lamentations3:5 Omonya ci ogura woko dyere, ma cwinye kec ki can ma mito keto i koma." 
Lamentations3:6 Oketa abedo i colpiny, calo dano muto yam wa con." 
Lamentations3:7 Ocweyo cel oruma kwede woko dyere wek pe alwi akat woko abwot pi laro kwona; otweyo okol i tyena ki nyor mapek adada. 
Lamentations3:8 Kadi bed alwoŋ lwoŋo ma kun akok ni gikonya, en juko legana woko pe winnye." 
Lamentations3:9 Otyeko cego yona woko ki godi ma gipayo, omiyo yona obedo mugomogom." 
Lamentations3:10 Obedo calo ŋuu ma obuto tye ka kiyo piny, calo labwor ma okanne woko." 
Lamentations3:11 Opeya woko ki i yona ci okila woko matitino, omiyo doŋ adoko gin ma konnye pe." 
Lamentations3:12 Otelo atumme, okema kwede omiyo adoko ginacela ki aterone." 
Lamentations3:13 Ocelo adunona woko ki atero ma okwanyo ki i jurone. 
Lamentations3:14 Doŋ adoko ginanyera pa lwak me rok ducu, nyiŋa odoko lok aboka dok giwera ki wer dyeceŋ jwi." 
Lamentations3:15 Omiya apon ki keccwiny madit mada, omiyo ayeŋ ki odir yat." 
Lamentations3:16 Omiyo amwodo kweyo ki laka, kun anyonne woko ki buru." 
Lamentations3:17 Gikwanyo kuc woko ki i cwinya, wiya doŋ owil woko i kit ma yomcwiny tye kwede." 
Lamentations3:18 Omiyo awacci, “Deyona doŋ otum woko, ki gin ma ageno ki bot Rwot bene pe doŋ otimme.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Po i kom canna ki keccwinya, ki camo odir yat ki keda makec!" 
Lamentations3:20 Cwinya nino ducu tamo pire, ci ŋur woko piny ki iiya." 
Lamentations3:21 Ento abekaoo lokke iiya, pi meno miyo dok pud abedo ki gen." 
Lamentations3:22 Mar pa Rwot ma pe lokke bedo matwal pe gik, ki kicane bene pe gik." 
Lamentations3:23 Giroc gidoko nyen rupiny ki rupiny; in igenne mada. 
Lamentations3:24 Awaco ki i cwinya ni, “Rwot aye dul ma gipokka, pi meno abigeno en.”" 
Lamentations3:25 Rwot ber bot jo ma kure, ki bot dano ma yenye ki i cwinye." 
Lamentations3:26 Bedo ber ka dano kuro lar pa Rwot mot. 
Lamentations3:27 Bedo ber ka dano oye juk pa Rwot ma noŋo pud en tidi. 
Lamentations3:28 Wek obed kene laliŋ ka giwacce lok me juk; 
Lamentations3:29 wek omok apwa ki doge, gwoknyo gen pud bibedo tye:" 
Lamentations3:30 wek olok leme bot ŋat ma odoŋe, wek oyeŋ ki lewic madwoŋ." 
Lamentations3:31 Pien Rwot gire pe bolo dano woko matwal," 
Lamentations3:32 ento kadi bed kel cwercwiny me can, pud kica mako aye macalo mar mere ma pe lokke dwon-ni;" 
Lamentations3:33 pien pe keto can nyo cwercwiny i kom dano akaka," 
Lamentations3:34 Ka ginyono lumabuc ma i wi lobo woko ducu piny i te tyen," 
Lamentations3:35 ka gikwanyo twer ma dano tye kwede woko i nyim ŋat Mamalo Twal," 
Lamentations3:36 ka gibalo te pido pa dano woko akaka, Rwot pe cwinye yom iye," 
Lamentations3:37 Aŋa muciko lok ci otimme bene, ka pe Rwot aye ma ociko?" 
Lamentations3:38 Gin maber ki gin marac ducu pe gia ki i dog ŋat Mamalo Twal? 
Lamentations3:39 Dano makwo kok piŋo? Dano myero okok ka can opoto i kome pi balle? 
Lamentations3:40 Koŋ watemu neno kitwa dok waŋiyu kwowa, ci walokke wadwog bot Rwot." 
Lamentations3:41 Myero watiŋu cwinywa ki ciŋwa, bot Lubaŋa malo i polo kun wawacci," 
Lamentations3:42 “Waŋ doŋ wabalo dok wajemo, in bene pe iweko bal wa." 
Lamentations3:43 “Imiyo kiniga oboyo komi woko omiyo iryemo korwa, inekowa woko laboŋo paro piwa," 
Lamentations3:44 Imiyo pol oboyi woko wek lega mo pe otuc oo boti," 
Lamentations3:45 Imiyo wadoko ginanyera ma gitaro, i kin lurok ducu." 
Lamentations3:46 “Lukworwa ducu doŋ gitye ka ŋalowa aŋala; 
Lamentations3:47 gin ma bano dano ki lworo opoto i komwa kacel ki to-piny ma obino ka tyekowa. 
Lamentations3:48 Pig waŋa mol calo pii ma i kulu pien jona doŋ ginekogi woko matwal. 
Lamentations3:49 “Pig waŋa bibedo ka mol ma pe cok, bimedde mere ameda," 
Lamentations3:50 nio waŋ ma Rwot oneno piny ki i polo; 
Lamentations3:51 waŋa miyo aneno piny ki can, ki keckom pa anyira ducu ma i gaŋŋa," 
Lamentations3:52 “Lukworra gibedo ka dwara macalo gidwaro winyo, kun tyen lok mo mumiyo gidwara pe;" 
Lamentations3:53 gibola woko makwo i bur, dok gubolo got woko i wiya;" 
Lamentations3:54 pii omwonyo wiya woko, omiyo awacci, ‘Ato do!’" 
Lamentations3:55 “Ai Rwot, alwoŋo nyiŋi, ki i bor piny ka matut;" 
Lamentations3:56 ci iwinyo koko na ma akok boti ni, ‘Pe idiŋ iti ka winyo kokona, kenya do!’" 
Lamentations3:57 Yamibino cok i kare maakok boti; in iwacca ni, ‘Pe ilwor!’" 
Lamentations3:58 “In doŋ icuŋ ka pido pira, ai Rwot ci ikoko kwona ki i to." 
Lamentations3:59 Ai Rwot, in bene doŋ ineno gin marac ma gitimo i koma; in aye iŋol koppa." 
Lamentations3:60 Ityeko neno culo kworgi ducu; lok ducu maraco ma gubedo ka porone i koma. 
Lamentations3:61 “Ai Rwot, iwinyo bene lok aŋec ma giloko, ki lok ducu maraco ma gubedo ka porone i koma," 
Lamentations3:62 Lok ki tam ma lulweny i koma gubedo kwede, gilwenyo i Koma dyeceŋ jwi." 
Lamentations3:63 Nen kit bedogi ki kit a malogi; adoko gin ma gicako wer i kome. 
Lamentations3:64 “Ai Rwot, in aye ma ibiculo kwor i komgi, kun lubo kit ma ticgi tye kwede." 
Lamentations3:65 Ibimiyo cwinygi bedo tek; ibicenogi woko. 
Lamentations3:66 Ibiryemo korgi ki kiniga ci ityekogi woko, ki i te poloni, ai Rwot.”" 
Lamentations4:1 Jabu kono dok ocido woko licuc niŋniŋ, jabu ma giliyo maber-ri doŋ kite olokke woko niŋniŋ! Godi me ot maleŋ guket woko piny atata; guromo yo woko ducu." 
Lamentations4:2 A wobe Cion, gubedo me wei calo jabu mapek mabeco; kombeddi doŋ ginenogi macalo agulu, tic ma lacwe agulu ocweyo ki lobo!" 
Lamentations4:3 Kadi too bene miyo tuno weko litino doto cak i tunone; ento jona doŋ gudoko ger woko, calo udu ma gibedo i tim." 
Lamentations4:4 Leb latin lakere ma romo dot omoko woko i dane pien doge otwo woko ki orwo pii; litino tye ka lego cam, ento ŋat mo ma miyo botgi pe." 
Lamentations4:5 Jo ma yam camo cam mabeco, gibito woko liweŋ i dye gudo; jo ma ginyebogi ki ruko boŋo ma lamar lamar, gibuto i wi odur." 
Lamentations4:6 Can ma giketo i kom jo tuwa, dit makato can ma giketo i kom Codom woko, ma yam gireto woko piny oyotoyot i waŋ ca wa mo manok keken-ni, kun dano mo pe ogudo kome ki ciŋe," 
Lamentations4:7 Rwodine yam komgi leŋ makato pee woko, komgi tar makato cak; komgi yam kwar makato gweŋ makwar me wel, yam ginen beco calo kidi capir mulil mapwot-ti," 
Lamentations4:8 Ento kombeddi waŋgi ocido woko licuc makato cuk bilo, dano pe gineyogi ka giwok ki i gudo; komgi ojony woko linok i kom cogogi, komgi otwo woko matek calo yen mutwo." 
Lamentations4:9 Jo ma ginekogi ki pala lucwan komgi gum makato jo ma kec aye tye ka nekogi, jo ma gujony linok ma komgi odoŋ geŋ noŋo, pien cam mo pe mucek i poto." 
Lamentations4:10 Mon ma lukica ma gimaro litinogi aye gutedo kom litinogi kikomgi; ci gudoko camgi me amwodagi i kare ma gituro iye jo tuwa-ni. 
Lamentations4:11 Rwot doŋ omiyo akemone olyetti woko marac, ocoro kinigane malyet i komgi; omoko mac i Cion, ma owaŋo te gutine otyeko woko liweŋ," 
Lamentations4:12 Luker me lobo yam pe guye, nyo kadi ŋat mo i kin jo ma bedo i wi lobo, ni lumerok nyolukwor twero donyo i dog gaŋ me Jerucalem." 
Lamentations4:13 Man obedo pi bal pa lunebine ki pi bal pa ajwagine, ma guneko jo ma kitgi atir woko i dye gaŋ," 
Lamentations4:14 Gubedo ka wot ata i dye gudo, ma waŋgi oto woko, gunyobo komgi woko ki remo, omiyo i dano doŋ dag gudo boŋŋigi ma odoko gin me kwer." 
Lamentations4:15 Dano gidaŋŋe i komgi kun giwacci, “Wulenwa yo! Wun jo ma komwu ki keni!” “Wulen yo! Wulen yo! Pe wugud komwa bene!” Guriŋo woko gubwot, gubedo ka mal ata i kin lurok, ci jo ma i rok guwacci, “Pe dok gibibedo kacel kwedwa kany wacel.”" 
Lamentations4:16 Rwot kikome aye ma doŋ okeyogi woko, pe doŋ biparo pigi matwal; deyo mo ma gimiyo bot ajwagi bene obedo pe, gin mo maber ma gutimo bot ludoŋo pe." 
Lamentations4:17 Waŋwa ocikke ka neno yo neno kun jo ma konyowa pe; wabedo ka kuro rok ma pe gitwero larowa. 
Lamentations4:18 Lumerok doŋ gudiŋo korwa woko omiyo pe doŋ watwero woto i dye gudowa; agikkiwa onoŋo doŋ onyikocok: wel ninowa bene doŋ gikwano woko; pien agikkiwa doŋ oo. 
Lamentations4:19 Jo ma guryemo korwa gubedo dwir ma gikato acut ma tuk cito malo, gulubo korwa wa i wi godi, gukanne gubedo ka kiyowa i dye tim." 
Lamentations4:20 Ŋat ma Rwot doŋ owiro woko ki moo, ma pire tek botwa macalo kwowa, gimako gitere woko i opii, en ma yam waloko pire ni, wabibedo i te bwome i kin lurok." 
Lamentations4:21 Wun jo Edom, wubed ki wakke, cwinywu bene obed yom, wun ma wubedo i lobo Uj; ento kikopo me can bene bimakowu; wubimer woko ci wulunyo bonniwu woko wudoŋ munero." 
Lamentations4:22 Wun jo Cion, can ma giketo i komwu pi balwu doŋ gicobo kakare, Rwot doŋ pe bibworowu i opii matwal; ento wun jo Edom, en biketo can i komwu bene pi balwu, en binyuto kom balwu woko ducu ka maleŋ." 
Lamentations5:1 Ai Rwot, koŋ ipo i kom gin ma opoto i komwa-ni; cik waŋi inen lewic ma watye kwede!" 
Lamentations5:2 Giloko gipinywa doŋ odoko pa jo mukene; ki gaŋiwa gudoko pa lurok. 
Lamentations5:3 Waŋ doŋ walokke wadoko calo litino kic, ma wegigi pe; megiwa doŋ gudoko calo mon ma coggi oto," 
Lamentations5:4 Myero wawil pii ma wamato-ni awila ki lim, yen bene ma wanoŋo myero wawil awila." 
Lamentations5:5 Giryemowa woko ki tek kun watye ki okol i ŋutwa: komwa oloc woko, pe gimiyowa kare me yweyo." 
Lamentations5:6 Wacikke ki jo Ejipt ki ciŋwa, ki bot jo Aciria, wek gumiwa cam maromowa." 
Lamentations5:7 Kwarowa yam gubalo, ci guto woko matwal; balgi aye ma doŋ okelo can i komwa." 
Lamentations5:8 Opii aye doŋ giloyowa; ŋat mo pe ma myero olarwa ki i ciŋgi. 
Lamentations5:9 Wadyero komwa pi noŋo cam, ma noŋo wawok ki i Lak pala lucwan i dye tim." 
Lamentations5:10 Del komwa doŋ odoko lyet calo keno ki lyeto me kec ma tye ka waŋowa. 
Lamentations5:11 Gimako mon i Cion ci gibuto kwedgi tektek, ki anyira ma peya co obedo kwedgi ma gitye i gaŋ me Juda." 
Lamentations5:12 Giguro luker woko i kom yat ki ciŋgi; woro mo ma gimiyo bot ludoŋo pe," 
Lamentations5:13 Gidiyo litino awobe tektek me rego kai awobe gicato ki yen mapek ma guyeyo i wi gwokgi. 
Lamentations5:14 Co muteggi pe doŋ gigurre i dog gaŋ, awobe bene pe doŋ gigoyo wer." 
Lamentations5:15 Gin ma yam yomo cwinywa doŋ ogik; myel ma yam wamyelo-ni doŋ olokke odoko kumo. 
Lamentations5:16 Lalukana opoto woko piny ki i wiwa’ waŋeno can, pien wabalo!" 
Lamentations5:17 Pi lok man omiyo cwinywa doŋ odoko goro, pi jami magi omiyo waŋwa bene doŋ ocido wako." 
Lamentations5:18 Got Cion ma doŋ odoŋ obur-ri; too aye ma doŋ gitye ka wot i wiye. 
Lamentations5:19 Ento in, ai Rwot, ibedo i loc nakanaka; komkerri bedo nakanaka i kare pa yalwak ducu." 
Lamentations5:20 Piŋo wii wil woko i komwa, ibwotowa woko liyak pi kare ma rom man piŋo?" 
Lamentations5:21 In aye giri idwokwa boti, ai Rwot, wek wadwogi! Roc kare me bedowa odok manyen kit macalo yam tye con ca!" 
Lamentations5:22 Gwok nyo doŋ ikwerowa woko matwal ba! Kiniga doŋ omaki i komwa mukato kare? 
Ezekiel1:1 I nino dwe abic me dwe me aŋwen i mwaka pyeradek noŋo, onoŋo atye abedo kacel ki Lujudaya ma gin opii i ŋet kulu Kebar i lobo Babilon, Ci aneno polo oyabbe, cut atugi neno Lubaŋa i ginanyuta," 
Ezekiel1:2 Man otimme i nino dwe abic i mwaka me abicce cakke ma gitero kabaka Yekoyakin kwede i opii," 
Ezekiel1:3 I kare ma atye i lobo pa jo Kaldaya i ŋet kulu Kebar, an Ejekiel wod pa ajwaka Buji, awinyo ka Rwot loko kweda dok awinyo ka Rwot oketo ciŋe i koma." 
Ezekiel1:4 I kare ma aneno piny, ci aneno yamo ma kodo mager oa ki i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam, kacel ki pol madit ma onoŋo lutkot tye ka wil ki iye, kun mac bedo ka lyel teretere. I dye mac onoŋo tye iye gin ma ryeny macalo mola." 
Ezekiel1:5 Doŋ i dye mac man aneno gin mo ma nen calo lee makwo aŋwen. Gubedo calo dano," 
Ezekiel1:6 ento ŋat acel acel onoŋo waŋe tye aŋwen, dok bene ŋat acel acel bwome onoŋo tye aŋwen." 
Ezekiel1:7 Tyengi ocuŋ atir, ki dye tyengi onoŋo nen calo dye tyen oboŋ wod dyaŋ, ma giryeny calo mola ma gijwayo maleŋ." 
Ezekiel1:8 I te bwomgi aŋwen-ni onoŋo tye iye ciŋ aŋwen macalo ciŋ dano, Doŋ gin lee aŋwen-ni onoŋo yam waŋgi ki bwomgi tye kit man:" 
Ezekiel1:9 bwomgi okubbe ogudo lawotgi, kun ŋat acel acel cito ma okemo nyime atir, giwoto ma kun pe gilokke ka mo." 
Ezekiel1:10 Kit macalo waŋgi nen kwede, lee acel acel onoŋo waŋe tye aŋwen mapatpat: ki tuŋ i nyime waŋe nen calo waŋ dano; ki yo tuŋ lacuc waŋe nen calo waŋ labwor, ki yo tuŋ lacam waŋe nen calo waŋ twon, doŋ ki yo tuŋ i ŋeye waŋe nen calo waŋ ocur." 
Ezekiel1:11 Waŋgi yam obedo kit meno. Lee acel acel bwome aryo onoŋo oyarre dok otiŋŋe malo kun ogudo wi bwom lee lawote mukene ma cok kwede, ki bwomgi aryo mukene oumo komgi woko." 
Ezekiel1:12 Lee acel acel woto kemo nyime atir; ka ma cwinygi onoŋo mito ni gucit iye, giwoto ma kun pe gilokke ka mo." 
Ezekiel1:13 I kin lee makwo-ni onoŋo yam tye iye gin ma lyel calo miri mac, ma obedo calo mac ma wirre i kin lee makwo, macce onoŋo lyel maleŋ, ki lutkot bene owil ki i mac kunnu," 
Ezekiel1:14 Lee magi bene onoŋo gitye ka wirre gidok tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi calo mil pa lutkot. 
Ezekiel1:15 I kare ma aneno lee magi aŋwen, aneno lawala aŋwen ma gudo ŋom, lawala acel acel ocuŋ i ŋet lee acel acel bene." 
Ezekiel1:16 Lawala acel acel onoŋo ryeny calo kidi me wel, ci gin lawala aŋwen-ni ducu ginen maromrom, Kit ma gitiyogi kwede nen calo lawala acel acel girwako odonyo i i lawala mukene." 
Ezekiel1:17 Ka doŋ gucako wot, gucito ma gukemo yo aŋwen mapatpat ma kun pe gilokke ka mo," 
Ezekiel1:18 Gin Lawala magi aŋwen-ni yam doggi tye, cili bene onoŋo tye i komgi, kun waŋ mapol orumo doggi woko ducu litit," 
Ezekiel1:19 Ka inen lee makwoni giwoto gicito anyim, ci lawala magi bene giwoto kacel kwedgi, ka ce inen lee gua malo ki i ŋom, ci lawala bene gitiŋŋe kwede malo." 
Ezekiel1:20 Ka ma cwiny mito ni gucit iye, gin bene gicito iye, ci lawala bene gitiŋŋe malo gicito kacel kwedgi; pien onoŋo cwiny lee aŋwen-ni tye i i lawala ducu." 
Ezekiel1:21 Ka lee tye ka wot, nyo ka gucuŋ woko, dok ka gua malo, ci lawala aŋwen-ni bene gitimo kit meno, pien cwiny lee-gu tye i igi ma miyo gitimo kumeno." 
Ezekiel1:22 Ki malo ka wi lee magi makwo-ni onoŋo giriyo iye gin mo ma nen calo pete me polo, ma ryeny aryenya calo pee, kun opette lamalo ka wigi." 
Ezekiel1:23 I te pete meno onoŋo guyaro iye bwomgi, kun bwomgi acel acel gukemme ki luwotgi; ki lee acel acel onoŋo tye ki bwome aryo me umo kome woko." 
Ezekiel1:24 Awinyo bwomgi ka ŋuro i kare ma gitye ka tuk, bwomgi mor calo mor pa pii ma corre, macalo mor pa Won Twer Ducu, ki dok macalo woo madwoŋ pa dwan jo me mony madit; ka gucuŋ mot, ci giumo bwomgi woko." 
Ezekiel1:25 Ci dwan owinnye kun oa ki malo i ne pete ma orine malo ka wigi-ni; i kare ma onoŋo gucuŋ mot, guumo bwomgi woko." 
Ezekiel1:26 Malo i wi pete ma tye ka wigi-ni onoŋo tye iye gin mo calo komker, ma nen calo got capir ma bulu; doŋ gin ma neno calo dano obedo i wi komker meno." 
Ezekiel1:27 Gin meno mubedo calo dano-ni onoŋo tye ka ryeny calo mola ocakke ki i pyere odok kwede malo, ma nen calo mac ma omoko orumo kome woko ducu; cakke ki i tuŋ pyere dok kwede piny, onoŋo nen calo mac, mac bene onoŋo tye ka lyel orume woko dyere." 
Ezekiel1:28 Nen calo danyu ma nen i kom pol ka i nino me kot, mac ma yam obedo ka lyel ma orume dyere-ni bene obedo kit meno. Meno aye kit ma yam cal me deyo pa Rwot nen kwede. I kare ma aneno ci atugi poto woko piny aryeba ic, cutcut awinyo dwan ŋat mo ma tye ka loko" 
Ezekiel2:1 Ŋat ma onoŋo tye ka lok-ki owaco bota ni, “Wod pa dano, a icuŋ, ci abilok kwedi.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 I kare ma tye ka lok kweda, Cwiny pa Lubaŋa odonyo i iya ci omiyo acuŋ; pud awinyo en omedde kun loko kweda ni," 
Ezekiel2:3 “Wod pa dano, abecwali icit bot jo Icrael, ma gujemo ci gulokke ka lweny i koma-ni. Gin pud lujemo wa onyoo kit macalo yam kwarogi gujemo ci gutimo bal i koma-ni." 
Ezekiel2:4 Gin aye io ma kitgi obedo acak dok ŋutgi bene nwaŋ pe giwora. Abecwali me tito botgi gin ma an Rwot Lubaŋa abewaco botgi. 
Ezekiel2:5 Ka gibiwinyo lokki nyo gikwero winyone, (pien gin jo ma lujemo) ento gibiŋeyo ni lanebi yam obedo i kingi." 
Ezekiel2:6 Doŋ in wod pa dano, pe myero ilworgi, pe bene ilwor lok ma gin waco. Gibirumi woko macalo okuto lano ma orumi, kun ibedo i wi oton mapol; pe ilwor lokgi, cwinyi bene pe myero oballe kadi gineni ki waŋ marac, pien gin jo ma lujemo." 
Ezekiel2:7 Ibiloko lokka botgi, kadi ka giwinyo nyo gikwero winyone; pien gin jo ma lujemo," 
Ezekiel2:8 “Ento in, wod pa dano, winy gin ma an awacci; pe ibed lajemo calo jo meno ma lujemo. Ŋam dogi ci icam gin ma abemiyo boti me acama.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 I kare ma aneno piny, ci aneno ciŋ mo ma giryeyo tuŋ bota; ci nen Onoŋo omako buk adola ma gicoyo iye coc." 
Ezekiel2:10 Ci oyaro buk-ki i nyima; aneno gicoyo ryoryo ducu, iye ki yo tuŋ i ŋeye bene. Aneno lok ma gicoyo iye onoŋo obedo lok me koko me can, kumo ki can." 
Ezekiel3:1 Lubaŋa owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, cam gin: ma doŋ gimiyi; cam buk adola man, ci icit ilok bot jo me ot pa Icrael.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Kit meno aŋamo doga, ci omiya buk adola ni acam." 
Ezekiel3:3 Ci owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, cam buk adola man ma amiyo boti, nio ka iyeŋ woko kwede ma ii odeŋ.” Ci acamo; anoŋo obedo lim mada i doga calo moo kic." 
Ezekiel3:4 Lubaŋa dok owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, cit io bot jo me ot pa Icrael ci it it botgi gin ducu ma atye ka wacci-ni," 
Ezekiel3:5 Pe atye ka twali ni icit i rok mo ma jone loko leb ma’ niaŋ iye tek. Ento abecwali bot jo me ot pa Icrael. 
Ezekiel3:6 Ka ce acwali bot rok ducu ma jone loko leb matek mapatpat ma in pe iniaŋ iye, ci kono guwinyo lok ma iwaco botgi." 
Ezekiel3:7 Ento jo me ot pa Icrael pe gibiwinyo lokki; dok bene pe gibiwinyo lokka. Pien gin’ ducu cwinygi nwaŋ dok wigi tek: 
Ezekiel3:8 Nen, kombeddi doŋ abimiyo cwinyi bedo nwaŋ calo cwinygi ki wii bene bedo tek calo wigi." 
Ezekiel3:9 Abimiyo wii bedo tek calo got lela matek makato got mabit woko; pe ilworgi, pe bene ilwor kit waŋ ma gineni kwede, pien gin jo ma lujemo.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Lubaŋa omedde ki lokke kun waco bota ni, “Wod pa dano, lok ducu ma abiwacci myero igam obed i cwinyi, dok iwiny bene ki iti." 
Ezekiel3:11 Ka doŋ ia icit bot jo ma gitye i opii, cit bot lutuwu kikome, ci iwac botgi ni, ‘Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni’; kadi giwinyo nyo gikwero winyone.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Cutcut Cwiny pa Lubaŋa otiŋa woko malo, ci awinyo dwan ki yo tuŋ ŋeya ma mor matek calo oyeŋyeŋ ma yeŋo piny, kun daŋŋe ni, “Gipwo deyo pa Rwot i kabedone!”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Awinyo bwom lee ka tye ka gone kacel i yamo, ki koko pa lawala bene mor matek calo oyeŋyeŋ ma yeŋo piny."
