Ezekiel3:14 I kare ma Cwiny pa Lubaŋa oila malo otera woko, ci abedo ki keco i cwinya, kiniga bene omaka woko, ci acito ma doŋ onoŋo Rwot tye ka diya matek ki cine," 
Ezekiel3:15 Acito i Tel Abib, ka ma onoŋo jo ma giterogi i opii gibedo iye, i ŋet kulu Kebar. Abedo kunnu i kingi pi nino abiro kun atye ki ur madit atikatika pi gin ma onoŋo aneno otimme i koma ca." 
Ezekiel3:16 Lacen i ŋe nino abiro-nu Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel3:17 En owacci, “Wod pa dano, doŋ aketi me bedo lakur-piny pi rok me Icrael. Ibitito botgi lok ducu ma acikogi kwede ma an awacci." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ka ce awaco ni dano ma latim marac bito ada, ento kun in pe ijuko en ma icike ni olokke owek timo gin marac, wek olar kwone, en bito i balle-ni; ento alii me tone abidwoko i wii." 
Ezekiel3:19 Ento ka ce onoŋo ijuko en latim marac meno, icike ni owek yo me tim maraco, ka pe olokke oweko timo gin maraco, nyo yo me tim maracone-ni, en bito i balle-nu; ento noŋo in giri ilaro kwoni." 
Ezekiel3:20 Dok bene ka ce dano ma kite atir olokke woko oweko timo gin ma tye atir, ce otimo bal, ce an aketo ariya mo i nyime, ci en bito, pien onoŋo in pe ijuke, en bito pi balle, ki tic ma atir ma yam en otiyo pe doŋ abipo pire; ento alii me tone abidwoko i wii." 
Ezekiel3:21 Dok bene ka ce ijuko dano ma kite atir ni pe otim bal, ka en owinyo lokki pe otimo bal, ci adada en bibedo kwo, pien owinyo lok ma ijuke kwede; ci in bene ibilaro kwoni.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Rwot oketo ciŋe i koma;’ ci owacca ni, “A malo, ci icit i dye bar, an abilok kwedi ki kunnu.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Ci aa malo acito i dye bar, ci aneno deyo pa Rwot ocuŋ kunnu ma rom ki deyo ma akwoŋo nenone i ŋet kulu Kebar; ci cutcut aryebbe woko piny," 
Ezekiel3:24 Ento Cwiny pa Rwot odonyo i koma, ci ociba acuŋ ki tyena; ci oloko kweda kun wacci, “Cit paco, ci ilor wii woko i odi." 
Ezekiel3:25 Ci in wod pa dano, gibitweyi woko ki tol, man bimiyo pe itwero cito woko i kin dano." 
Ezekiel3:26 Abimiyo te lebi dwalle woko ki i dogi, wek ibed ladogeoto ma pe doŋ itwero juko dano; pien gin jo ma lujemo." 
Ezekiel3:27 Ento ka ce doki aloko kwedi, ci abiyabo dogi, ci in ibiwaco botgi ni, ‘Rwor Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni’; ŋat ma biwinyo lok man wek owiny, ki ŋat ma kwero winyo lok man wek okwer; pien gin jo malujemo." 
Ezekiel4:1 “Doŋ in, wod pa dano, kwany matafali iket i nyimi, ci igo cal gaŋ i kome, cal Jerucalem kikome." 
Ezekiel4:2 Ci irum woko dyere, dok itor cel lobo orum woko dyere; ka iket gony orum woko bene, ci iket yadi latwom cel orum woko bene." 
Ezekiel4:3 Dok ikwany caniya nyonyo ci iket obed macalo cel nyonyo i kin in ki gaŋ me Jerucalem, kun waoi kemo gaŋ. Mony doŋ orumo gao woko. In aye ma doŋ irumo gaŋ woko pi lweny i kome. Man aye lanyut pi ot pa Icrael." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Dok ibut ma lakŋeti ma lacam odok piny, ci doŋ abiketo can me bal me ot pa Icrael-li i komi. Pi nino acel acel ma ibuto kwede ibitiŋo balgi," 
Ezekiel4:5 pi nino miya adek ki pyeraboŋwen, ma rom ki wel mwaka me can megi; in bene’ ibitiŋo can me ot pa Icrael pi kare ma rom meno." 
Ezekiel4:6 Ka doŋ ityeko tiyo meno, ibibuto piny doki pi tyen me aryone, ki lakŋeti ma lacuc, ci ibitiŋo can me ot pa Juda; amini nino pyeraŋwen, ma nino acel acel rom ki mwaka acel." 
Ezekiel4:7 Ibiciko waŋi ineno Jerucalem ma girumo woko-ni, kun badi tye noŋo; ci dok ibityeto lok kom gaŋ," 
Ezekiel4:8 Abitweyi woko ki tol ma pe doŋ ibitwero lokke tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi nio ka ityeko nino ma girumi iye dyere-ni liweŋ. 
Ezekiel4:9 “Kombeddi doŋ ikwany ŋano, cayiri, murana, ŋor, gaya ki kal. Rubgi ducu kacel ci ited ki mugati. Meno aye cam ma in ibicamo pi nino miya adek ki pyeraboŋwen ma noŋo it ye ka buto ki lakŋeti ma lacam-mi." 
Ezekiel4:10 Cam ma ibicamo gibipimo apima, ma romo cekel pyeraryo pi nino acel acel, dok bene i nino acel acel ibicamo cam kicel." 
Ezekiel4:11 Pii ma imato bene gibipimo boti apima, kikopo aryo i nino acel acel, dok ibimato kicel keken." 
Ezekiel4:12 Ibimoko mac i cet pa dano mutwo ki i nyimgi, ci ibitedo mugati macalo capat ka doŋ icamo.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Ka aryemo jo Icrael akeyogi woko i kin rok ducu man aye kit macalo gibicamo kwede cam ma cik okwero ni pe gucam.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Cutcut agamo ni, “Pe, Rwot Lubaŋa! An peya abalo koma kekena ki gin me kwer. Cakke i ka tinona nio kwede wa onyoo peya acamo riŋo lee mo muto kene nyo ma ŋuu okayo. Pud peya acamo kit riŋo lee mo ma gitamo ni obedo me kwer.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Lubaŋa dok owacci, “Nen, doŋ abimii cet dyaŋ ma ka cet dano en aye itwero tedo iye mugatini.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Dok omedde ki lok kun wacci, “Wod pa dano, nen, abijuko kit cam ducu woko doŋ pe binen i Jerucalem. Gibicamo mugati ma gipimo apima kun gicamo ki lworo; ki pii bene ma gimato gibipimo apima, gimato ma noŋo cwinygi oballe woko." 
Ezekiel4:17 Abitimo man wek pe doŋ gunoŋ mugati ki pii muromo, wek dano acel acel obed ka neno lawote ma noŋo cwinygi oballe woko, wek komgi olocwoko i cangi-ni,”" 
Ezekiel5:1 Lubaŋa owacci, “Wod pa dano, kwany pala lucwan mabit ci iti kwede macalo lyedi pa lalyel wic, lyel ki yer wii wa ki yer tiki bene; ka doŋ ikwany lapim, ci ipok yer woko i dul adek." 
Ezekiel5:2 Dul me adekke-ni ibiwaŋo woko i mac i dye gaŋ, kun iporo kare ma noŋo mony doŋ orumo gaŋ otum. Kwany dul me adek mukene ci itoŋ woko ki pala lucwanni i kare ma noŋo iwoto irumo gaŋ. Doŋ dul me adekke mudoŋ-ŋi kwany ibol i yamo ci an abilwenyo i kome ki pala lucwanna." 
Ezekiel5:3 Gwok yer mogo ci itwe woko i dog boŋoni. 
Ezekiel5:4 Dok ikwany yer mogo ki i kom yer ma onoŋo igwoko-ni, ci ibol woko i mac, wek owaŋ woko. Doŋ mac bia ki i kom yer man ci nya o kwede wa i kom ot pa Icrael.”" 
Ezekiel5:5 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Nen, Jerucalem. Doŋ atyeko kete i cwiny rok ducu, kun lobo mapol orume woko dyere." 
Ezekiel5:6 Ento Jerucalem ojemo woko i kom gin ma an aciko ci olokke ka timo gin maraco atika makato rok mukene-gu ducu, obedo gin mudiŋ ma pe lubo cikka makato rok mukene ma yam gurumo en dyere-gu ducu. Jo Jerucalem gukwero tiyo gin ma an aciko, gukwero bene lubo cikka." 
Ezekiel5:7 Mumiyo Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, wun aye doŋ rok ma luyela makato lurok ma gurumowu dyere-ni, en gin mumiyo pe wuye lubo cikka ducu ma aketo, dok bene pe wugwoko gin ma an aciko, ento wun dok wubedo ka lubo cik pa rok mukene ma gurumowu." 
Ezekiel5:8 Doŋ pi meno, an Rwot Lubaŋa atito botwu ni abiŋolo kop i komwu ma lwak me rok ducu gineno." 
Ezekiel5:9 Doŋ pi gin me kwer ducu ma doŋ wutyeko timone, abitimo gin ma yam pud peya atimo i komwu, en lakit gin acel-lu ma pe abitimo doki." 
Ezekiel5:10 Doŋ adwoggine aye ni wego ma i Jerucalem gibicamo awobegi woko, ki awobe bene gibicamo wegigi woko ki i dyewu. Dok bene abiŋolo kop i komwu acobo kakare, doŋ jo mogo ki i kinwu ma gibidoŋ gibedo kwo, abikeyogi woko ata." 
Ezekiel5:11 Pi meno, kit macalo an Lubaŋa makwo-ni, man lok pa Rwot Lubaŋa, adada, pien doŋ wubalo kabedona maleŋ woko ki tim me kwerwu-gu ducu, ki gin ducu ma obedo cilo ma cwinya dagi, pi meno abinekowu woko, pe abinenowu ki wan maber, dok bene kica pe bimaka i komwu wacel." 
Ezekiel5:12 Dul me adek pa lwak mewu, two gemo ki kec binekogi woko i dye gag; ki dul me adek mukene gibinekogi woko ki pala lucwan i ŋe gaŋ; doŋ dul me adek mudonne-ni abikeyo woko ata, doŋ abiwoto pala lucwan aye aryemogi kwede." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Kinigana bitum gire kene kit meno, doŋ abitoyo akecana i komgi ka doŋ cwinya bikwe. Ka man otimme gibiŋeyo ni an a Rwot, doŋ aloko ki nyeko, i kare ma atoyo akecana i komgi." 
Ezekiel5:14 Doŋ makato ducu abiweko pacowu doŋ obur wun wubibedo ginacaya i kin lurok ducu ma gurumowu dyere ki bot jo ducu ma gikato ki ka ŋet pacowu ma odon obur-ri. 
Ezekiel5:15 “I kare ma abiŋolo kop i komwu ma noŋo kiniga omaka ki akeca, abiketo can magwa i komwu. Rok ducu ma gurumowu gibibedo ki lworo madwoŋ. Gibicayowu kun giloko lok aŋec i komwu ci wubibedo lanen me pwonyogi." 
Ezekiel5:16 Abijuko kit cam ducu ma yam wunono-ni pe doŋ nen, man bimiyo kec nekowu matek. Wubiwinyo arem me kec matek mada calo atero ma lake bit ma gicelo i komwu wek otyekwu woko." 
Ezekiel5:17 Abicwalo kec ki guu-gu me neko litinowu woko, dok bene abicwalo two gemo ki tim bwami ki lweny me nekowu me tyekowu woko. An Rwot doŋ aloko.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Rwot ceŋ oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel6:2 En owacci, “Wod pa dano, cik waŋi inen godi me Icrael, ci itit lokka botgi." 
Ezekiel6:3 Wac bot godi me Icrael ni guwiny lok pa Rwot Lubaŋa, wek guwiny lok ma an Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka wacone bot godi, cere-gu, ki luŋ matut, ki notagu ducu: Nen, abikelo lweny ma gilwenyo i komwu ki pala lucwan, dok bene abijwero wan jogiwu woko liweŋ," 
Ezekiel6:4 Abimuko keno tyerwu woko, ki keno tyer ka ma wuwago iye odok eceta-ni bene abimuko woko. Lutuwu jo Icrael ma gitye kunnu gibinekogi woko i nyim cal jogiwu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Abipyelo kom jo Icrael muto i nyim cal jogigi; dok abikeyo cogogi arumo ki keno tyergi woko. 
Ezekiel6:6 I kabedo ducu ma wubibedo iye gaŋiwu ducu gibijwero woko doŋ obur, ki wag jogiwu ducu gibimuko woko, ki keno tyerwu ducu abimuko woko wuweko doŋ kene, ki cal jogiwu ducu gibitoŋo gibalogi woko, ki keno tyer me wano odok eceta bene gibitoŋo gireto woko piny, ki gin ducu ma wutiyo doŋ gibijwerogi woko liweŋ." 
Ezekiel6:7 Dok jo ma ginekogi komgi biradde ata, ci man miyo wun wubineyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel6:8 “Ento abimiyo jo mukene gibwot ki i lak to ci gibedo kwo. Ka doŋ jo mogo ma gubwot gibibedo i kin lurok, dok ka gikeyowu woko i rok ducu," 
Ezekiel6:9 ci doŋ lutuwu ma gubwot gibipo i koma ki i kin lurok ka ma noŋo giterogi iye i opii. Gibipo i koma ki kunnu kun giŋeyo ni yam aketo can i komgi wek ami lewic omakgi, pien cwinygi ma gen pe iye-ni onoŋo doŋ oa woko ki i koma pi tarwaggi, omiyo gumaro woro cal jogi makato an. Gibibedo ki keccwiny i komgi kekengi pi gin maraco me lewic ma gutimo-ni, ki pi gin me kwer ducu ma yam gutimo." 
Ezekiel6:10 Doŋ gibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot; dok lok ma yam aloko ni abitimo gin marac man i komgi-ni onoŋo pe aloko me noŋo.” 
Ezekiel6:11 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Wudoŋ korwu, wunyon tyenwu bene i ŋom kun wukok ni, Can madit doŋ opoto! Can man opoto pi bal me gin me kwer ma jo me ot pa Icrael gutimo. Pi meno, gibinekogi woko i lweny, kec ki two gemo bene binekogi woko." 
Ezekiel6:12 Jo ma gitye ka mabor two gemo aye ma binekogi; ki jo ma tye cok gibineko-gi woko ki pala lucwan; ki jo mudoŋ ma gubwot ki i lak to kec aye ma binekogi. Meno en aye kit macalo abitoyo kwede akecana i komgi. 
Ezekiel6:13 Kom jo muto biradde lirwat i kin cal jogi ki’ i kabedo ducu ma orumo keno tyergi, wa i wi cere-gu ducu, ki i wi godi maboco-gu, i te yadi ducu ma potgi oluk, ki i te yat kworo ma pote oluk, ki i kabedo ducu ka ma gityero iye gin ma ŋwece kur ma yomo cwiny bot cal jogigi. Ci gin ducu doŋ gibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel6:14 Abiryeyo ciŋa woko i komgi, ci abibalo lobogi woko, amiyo iye doŋ noŋo, i kabedo ducu ka ma gibedo iye, cakke ki i tim nio kwede wa i Ribla. Ci gin ducu doŋ gibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel7:2 En owacci, “Wod pa dano, an a Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ awaco bot lobo pa jo Icrael kuman ni, Agik! Agik doŋ obino woko i kom twok lobo aŋwen," 
Ezekiel7:3 “Jo Icrael, agik doŋ obino woko i komwu; abitoyo kinigana woko i komwu, pien abiŋolo kop i komwu kun poro kit gin ma wun wutimo. Dok bene abiketo can i komwu pi gin me kwer ducu ma wutimo." 
Ezekiel7:4 Pe doŋ abiparo piwu, kica doŋ pe bimaka i komwu. Ento abiketo can i komwu pi kit gin ducu ma wutimo, gin me kwer ma wumedde ki timogi-ni. Meno doŋ bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel7:5 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Can me to-paco bibino i komwu kun lubbe aluba i ne lawote cutcut." 
Ezekiel7:6 Agik doŋ obino, doŋ oo; doŋ otyeko corre woko i komwu. Nen, tye ka bino." 
Ezekiel7:7 Agik man bino piwu wun jo ma wubedo i lobo man; kare bene doŋ oromo, nino me woo me lweny doŋ cok, pe nino me yomcwiny ma wuwo kwede i waŋ jogi ma tye i wi godi." 
Ezekiel7:8 Kombeddi doŋ acok toyo akemona woko i komwu, kun atoyo kinigana i komwu, dok bene abiŋolo kop i komwu kun lubo kit gin ducu ma wutimo. Abiketo can i komwu pi gin me kwer ducu ma wutimo." 
Ezekiel7:9 Pe doŋ abiparo piwu, kica doŋ pe bimaka i komwu. Ento abiketo can i komwu pi kit gin ducu ma wutimo, gin me kwer ma wumedde ki timogi-ni. Meno doŋ bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot, ma apwodowu-ni." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Nen, nino tye ka bino! Topinywu doŋ obino woko. Tim bwami tye ka medde ameda, ki wakke bene doŋ omedde adada." 
Ezekiel7:11 Tim bwami doŋ onya omedde odoko odoo me tim maraco; doŋ ŋat mo pe bidoŋ ki i kin lutim maraco, kadi jami mabup ma gitye kwede, nyo lonyogi; dok bene dano mo madit pe bibedo tye i kingi." 
Ezekiel7:12 Kare doŋ oo, nino doŋ onyiko cok. Lawil jami myero cwinye pe obed yom, kadi lacat jami bene pe myero obed ki kumo, pien akemo pa Lubaŋa bipoto i komgi ducu maromrom." 
Ezekiel7:13 Lacat-wil doŋ pe bitwero dwoko jami ma yam en ocato-ni cen bote, ma noŋo en pud tye kwo. Pien akemo pa Lubaŋa bipoto i kom lwakgi ducu maromrom, pe bidok cen; dok gat ma bigwoko kwone pe pien gin ducu gubalo." 
Ezekiel7:14 “Gukuto tum, gin ducu doŋ gitye ka yubbe. Ento ŋat mo pe ma cito ka lweny, pien akemo pa Rwot opoto i kom lwakgi ducu maromrom." 
Ezekiel7:15 Lweny tye woko i dye gudo, two gemo ki kec tye i ot. Ŋat ma tye i tim gibineko woko ki pala lucwan; ki gat ma tye i gaŋ, kec ki two gemo bineko woko." 
Ezekiel7:16 Jo mogo ma gubwot gibilaro wi godi calo akuri me nota, ma gin ducu gibicur pi balgi." 
Ezekiel7:17 Ciŋ dano acel acel bidoko goro, ki coŋgi bene bimyel amyela calo pii ma milamila limakmak." 
Ezekiel7:18 Gibiruko boŋo cola i pyergi, ki lworo madwoŋ bimakogi; lewic bimakogi ducu, gin ducu gibilyelo wigi woko," 
Ezekiel7:19 Gibibolo ryalgi ki jabugi woko i dye gudo macalo gin ma pe leŋ, pien ryal ki jabu pe twero larogi i nino ma Rwot bionyo iye kinigane i komgi. Pe gibitiyo kwede me cobo mitigi, dok bene pe gibimiyo igi yen kwede. Ryal kijabu aye omiyo gupoto i bal." 
Ezekiel7:20 Yam onoŋo gubedo ka wakke pi ginarukagi me deyo ma giruko pi nyuto ditogi mamwa-ni, dok gutiyo kwede me yubo cal lubaŋagi me kwer ma giraco atika-ni. Meno aye gin mumiyo Rwot biloko lonyogi doko gin ma pe leŋ botgi." 
Ezekiel7:21 “Abimiyo lurok yakogi woko,” man Rwot ma owaco, “dok abimiyo lutim maraco ma tye i lobo yako jamigi ki lonyogi woko bene liweŋ, ci gibipyedo woko bene." 
Ezekiel7:22 Abiloko waŋa cen pe anenogi, wek gin gigi gupyed kabedona maleŋ twatwal-li: luyak bene gibidonyo iye ci gipyedo, ci gibiweko doŋ obur." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Lobo opoŋ ki nek ki gaŋi-gu ducu opoŋ ki tim bwami. 
Ezekiel7:24 Abikelo rok ma giraco makato ducu kany me leyo odigi me bedo iye. Abigiko tek me wakkegi woko ki kabedogi maleŋ-gu ducu gibipyedo woko. 
Ezekiel7:25 Ka remcwiny obino, cigibiyenyo kuc, ento pe gibimedo ki noŋone wacel." 
Ezekiel7:26 Can me to-paco bibino i komgi, kun lubbe aluba i ŋe lawote cutcut, ki ani bene bilubo lawote. Gibiyenyo ginanyuta ki bot lunebi kwe; ajwagi doŋ pe gibibedo ki kit gin mo ma myero gupwony ki dano, ki ludoŋo bene pe gibibedo ki tam mo ma myero gumi bot dano." 
Ezekiel7:27 Kabaka bikumo, rwot genne birwenyo woko, ki lwak bene komgi bimyel ki lworo madwoŋ. Abitimogi kun lubo kit timgi, abiŋolo kop i komgi kun lubo kit ma gin kikomgi giŋolo kwede kop i kom jo mukene. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 I nino dwe abic, dwe me abicel, mwaka me abicel ma doŋ wabedo kwede i opii, ludoŋo me Juda onoŋo gubedo i oda gitye ka lok kweda. Cutcut tek pa Rwot Lubaŋa obino opoto i koma." 
Ezekiel8:2 Aneno ci aneno gin mo ma nen calo dano. Cakke ki i pyere tuŋ piny, onoŋo nen calo mac, doŋ a i pyere dok kwede malo onoŋo ryeny aryenya calo mola." 
Ezekiel8:3 Ci ocwalo gin ma obedo calo ciŋ dano ci omako yer wiya otiŋa kwede malo. Doŋ i ginanyuta man Cwiny pa Lubaŋa otiŋa malo wa i kin polo ki lobo ci otera i Jerucalem. Otera i dog gaŋ ma i iye ma tye’ yo tuŋ acam me ot pa Lubaŋa, ka ma onoŋo cal jok mo tye iye, co ma miyo nyeko mako Lubaŋa," 
Ezekiel8:4 I kare ma atye kunnu aneno deyo pa Lubaŋa pa Icrael kit macalo onoŋo aneno kwede deyone i ginanyuta ma aneno i nota. 
Ezekiel8:5 Lubaŋa owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, tiŋ waŋi malo kombeddi inen yo tuŋ acam.” Atiŋo waŋa malo aneno yo tuŋ acam, ci aneno cal jok ma kelo nyeko tye cok ki keno tyer i dog gaŋ ka ma gidonyo ki iye." 
Ezekiel8:6 Lubaŋa dok owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, tika ineno gin ma jo Icrael gitye ka timoneni, gin me kwer madito keken wek giryema woko ki i kabedona maleŋ? Pud dok ibineno gin me kwer madit makato man ma gitimo.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Dok okela i doggola me dyekal; i kare ma aneno piny, ci anene kor ot ka ma otuc." 
Ezekiel8:8 Ci en owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, muk kor-ot kany.” Ka amuko kom ot, ci anoŋo doggola." 
Ezekiel8:9 En owacca ni “Dony i ot ci inen gin me kwer me lewic ina gitye ka timone kany-nyi.” 
Ezekiel8:10 Kit meno adonyo i dyere ci aneno kor ot ducu gigoyo iye kit cal ducu mapatpat. Cal gin ma lak alaka piny, ki cal lee mogo ma komgi ki, keni ma gikwero, ki kit cal jogi ducu me ot pa Icrael." 
Ezekiel8:11 Doŋ onoŋo tye kunnu jo pyerabiro i, kom ludoŋo me ot pa Icrael ma gucuŋ i nyim cal jogi-gu, kacel ki Jajania wod pa Capan ma ocuŋ i kingi. Dano acel acel onoŋo omako atabo weerre i ciŋe, kun yito me odok eceta ma giwaŋo duny cito malo macalo pol." 
Ezekiel8:12 Dok en owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, tika doŋ ineno gin ‘ma ludoŋo me ot pa Icrael gitye ka tiyone i, muŋ i colpiny ca? Gin ducu gitye ka woro jogi i kicika ma opoŋ ki cal lubaŋa-gu. Gin giloko kekengi ni, “Rwot pe nenowa, Rwot doŋ otyeko bwoto lobo man woko.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Rwot owacca ni, “Ibineno gin me kwer madito makato man ma gitimo.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Ci okela i doggola me dog gaŋ ma tye yo tuŋ acam me ot pa Rwot; ci anene mon gubedo kunnu gitye ka kok pi jok Tamuj. 
Ezekiel8:15 Ka openya ni, “Wod pa dano, doŋ ineno gin man?’ Pud dok ibineno gin me kwer madito makato: magi woko.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Ci otera i dyekal ma tye i ot pa Rwot. Ci aneno jo ma romo pyeraryo wiye abic tye cok ki doggola me ot pa Rwot, i kin keno tyer ki ka ma gidonyo kwede i ot. Gin jo-nu guloko ŋegi i kom ot pa Rwot, kun nyimgi okemo tuŋ wokceŋ, gitye ka ryebbe piny me woro ceŋ ma tye ka tuc ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ." 
Ezekiel8:17 Ci en openya ni, “Wod pa dano, doŋ ineno gin man? Man mono jo me ot pa Juda gineno ni lok matidi ki botgi ka gibedo ka timo gin me kwer kany, wek gubed ka miyo tim bwami omedde onya i lobo, kun gibedo ka neto cwinya jwi wek kiniga omaka doki aye? Nen kit macalo gitye ka nywara kwede i yo marac mukato kare." 
Ezekiel8:18 Pi meno, abitimogi ki akemo; pe abiparo pigi, dok bene kica pe bimaka i komgi, Kadi bed gukok bota kun gilego lega ki dwan maloŋo, pe abiwinyo kokogi.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Lacen awinyo Lubaŋa odaŋŋe ki dwan maloŋo kun wacci, “Wunyik cok, wun lunek ma wumito keto can i kom lubalo ma i gaŋ man. Wun ducu wukwany jami Lwenywu wubin kwede kun wumako i ciŋwu.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Cutcut jo abicel gubino ki i dog gaŋ ma malo ma tye yo tuŋ acam me ot pa Rwot; dano acel acel omako jami lwennye me nek i ciŋe, Dano mo bene ma oruko boŋo camanini owoto kacel kwedgi, en owoto ki gin mo ma eromo coc kwede. Gin ducu gudonyo i dyekal me ot pa Rwot ci gucuŋ i ŋet keno tyer me mola." 
Ezekiel9:3 I kare-nu onoŋo deyo pa Lubaŋa pa Icrael ma ryeny twatwal-li oa woko ki i kom lukerubi ka ma yam en bedo iye kun kato ocuŋ i doggola me ot pa Rwot; ci Rwot olwoŋo dano ma oruko boŋo camaniŋi-ni, ma onoŋo owoto ki gin me coc i laknete-ni." 
Ezekiel9:4 Rwot owacce ni, “Cit iwok ki i dye gaŋ me Jerucalem ducu, ci iket lanyut i tur nyim dano acel acel ma tye ki cwercwiny me can kun gicur pi gin me kwer ducu ma gitye ka timone i gaŋ me Jerucalem.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Awinyo bene ka Lubaŋa waco bot jo mukene ca ni, “Wulub kore kun wuwok ki i dye gaŋ ci wunek dano. Pe wupar pi ŋat mo, dok bene kica pe omakwu i kome." 
Ezekiel9:6 Wunek jo muti, awobe, anyira, mon ka litino matino, ento pe myero wugud kom ŋat ma doŋ gityeko keto lanyut i kome. Wucak ki kany ki i kabedona maleŋ.” Ci gucako ki ludoŋo ma onoŋo gucuŋ kunnu i ot pa Rwot." 
Ezekiel9:7 Lubaŋa owaco botgi ni, “Wubal ot pa Rwot woko. Wupoŋ dyekalle-gu ducu ki kom jo ma ginekogi-ni. Wucit mewu anyim.” Guwoto gucito anyim, ci gucako neko dano ma gitye i gaŋ." 
Ezekiel9:8 I kare ma gitye ka neko dano, an doŋ onoŋo adoŋ kena. Apoto piny i ŋom aryeba ic, ci akok ni, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋal Akemo doŋ omaki twatwal i kom Jerucalem mumiyo icito ka neko jo ducu liweŋ ma gudoŋ i Icrael-li?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Lubaŋa ogamo ni, “Jo Icrael ki jo Juda gutimo bal madito maraco adada. Gubedo ka neko dano i kabedo ducu ma’ i lobo igumiyo ŋolo kop ma pe atir: omedde onya i Jerucalem. Giwacci, ‘Rwot doŋ obwoto lobo man woko, dok Rwot bene pe neno.’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Doŋ ki tuŋ bota, pe abiparo pigi, kica bene pe bimaka, i komgi, ento abiculo kwor i komgi pi gin ducu ma yam gin gutimo.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Cutcut dano ma onoŋo oruko boŋo camanini, ma tye ki gin me coc i laknete-ni odwbko lok bot Rwot kun wacci, “Doŋ atyeko tiyo gin ma onoŋo icika ni acitim.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Aneno pete ma tye malo ka wi lukerubi, ci aneno gin mo ma tye ka wigi ma obedo calo komker ma gitiyo ki got capir ma bulu." 
Ezekiel10:2 Ci owaco ki dano ma oruko ooŋo camaniŋi-ni ni, “Wot idony wa i kin lawala ma tye ka wirre-ni, ki piny ka tyen lukerubi-ni, ci ijob bilo poŋ ciŋi ki i kin lukerubi, ci iket woko atata i dye gaŋ.” Aneno en ka cito gire." 
Ezekiel10:3 I kare meno onoŋo lukerubi gueun i ŋet ot yo tuŋ acuc, ka dano-nu doŋ odonyo i ot; ci pol ocako poŋo dyekal me ot woko." 
Ezekiel10:4 Ci deyo pa Rwot oa woko ki i kom lukerubi ocito wa i doggola me ot pa Rwot. Ci pol opoŋo ot pa Rwot woko, ki dyekal bene opoŋ woko ki deyo pa Rwot ma meny amenya." 
Ezekiel10:5 Mor pa bwom lukerubi owinnye wa i dyekal ma tye woko, calo dwan Lubaŋa Matwero Ducu ma onoŋo tye ka loko" 
Ezekiel10:6 Ka doŋ ociko dano ma oruko boŋo camaniŋi-ni ni. “Kwany mac ki i kin lawala ma tye ka wirre-ni, ki i kin lukerubi,” dano-ni ocito odonyo i kin lawala ci ocun ka ŋet lawala mo acel." 
Ezekiel10:7 Ci I akerubi mo oryeyo ciŋe ki i kin lukerubi wadigi okemo mac ma onoŋo tye i kin lukerubi, ci okwanyo lodi mac mogo, ka oketo i ciŋ dano ma oruko boŋo camaniŋi-ni; dano-nu ogamo ci okato kwede woko." 
Ezekiel10:8 Lakerubi acel acel onoŋo tye ki gin mo i te bwome ma nen calo ciŋ dano. 
Ezekiel10:9 Dok bene aneno ni i ŋet lukerubi onoŋo tye iye lawala aŋwen, ka ŋet lakerubi acel acel onoŋo tye iye lawala acel. Lawala ducu onoŋo giryeny calo kidi me wel." 
Ezekiel10:10 Gin ducu onoŋo ginen rom, calo onoŋo lawala acel acel giroyo odonyo ki i kin lawala wadi." 
Ezekiel10:11 Ka doŋ gucako wot, gicito ma gukemo yo aŋwen mapatpat ma kun pe gilokke ka mo, kit yo mo keken ma lawala ma anyim okemo ci lawala mukene-gu ducu gilubo ma pe gilokke ka mo ma noŋo gitye ka wot." 
Ezekiel10:12 Gin lawala magi aŋwen-ni yam doggi tye, cili bene onoŋo tye i komgi, kun Waŋ mapol orumo doggi woko ducu litit." 
Ezekiel10:13 Lawala magi awinyo ka gilwoŋo ni lawala ma wirre calo yamo lapiru. 
Ezekiel10:14 Lee acel acel onoŋo waŋe tye aŋwen mapatpat: waŋ mukwoŋo onoŋo nen calo wan lakerubi, waŋ me aryo onoŋo nen calo waŋ dano, waŋ me adek onoŋo nen calo wan labwor, ki me aŋwenne onoŋo nen calo waŋ ocur." 
Ezekiel10:15 Magi gin aye lee ma yam koo anenogi i ŋet kulu Kebar-ni. Lukerubi gua gutuk woko i yamo. 
Ezekiel10:16 Ka inen lukerubi giwoto gicito, ci lawala bene woto ki ka ŋetgi; ka inen lukerubi guilo bwomgi me tuk woko ki i ŋom, ci lawala pud woto kacel kwedgi." 
Ezekiel10:17 Ka ce inen lee gucuŋ nyo ka gua malo, ci lawala aŋwen-ni bene gitimo kit meno, pien cwiny lee-gu tye i igi ma miyo gitimo kit meno." 
Ezekiel10:18 Ci deyo pa Rwot oa woko ki i doggola me ot pa Rwot, onyiko ocuŋ lamalo ka wi lukerubi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Lukerubi guyaro bwomgi ci gutuk woko ki i ŋom gucito ma an bene aneno, lawala bene onoŋo tye ka wot kacel kwedgi; ci gucuŋ i doggola ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ me ot pa Rwot, ki deyo pa Lubaŋa pa Icrael onoŋo tye ka wigi." 
Ezekiel10:20 Magi gin aye lee makwo ma yam anenogi i ŋet kulu Kebar ma otiŋo Lubaŋa pa Icrael i wi komkerre-ni, Aniaŋ ni gin lukerubi." 
Ezekiel10:21 Lee acel acel onoŋo waŋe tye aŋwen, bwome aŋwen, ki gin ma nen calo ciŋ dano onoŋo tye i te bwome acel acel." 
Ezekiel10:22 Doŋ wangi onoŋo nen calo waŋ ma nene aneno i ŋet kulu Kebar-ni kikome. Gin ducu giwoto kacel kun ŋat acel acel woto kemo nyime atir. 
Ezekiel11:1 Cwiny pa Lubaŋa otiŋa malo, ci otera wa i doggola ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ me ot pa Rwot. Doŋ i kare ma atye kunnu ka ma cok ki doggola ci aneno jo pyeraryo wiye abic, ma onoŋo i kingi tye iye Jajania, wod pa Ajur, ki Pelatia wod pa Benaya, ma onoŋo gin rwodi ma giloyo lwak." 
Ezekiel11:2 Lubaŋa owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, magi gin aye lutim maraco ma gitye ka yubo lok me timo gin marac i gaŋ man." 
Ezekiel11:3 Giwacci, ‘Kare ma wabigero iye odi doŋ cok. Gaŋ man obedo calo agulu me tedo, wan wabedo calo riŋo ma tye iye.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Pi meno, wod pa dano, tit lok i komgi.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Cwiny pa Rwot opoto i koma, ci Rwot owaco bota ni atit lok man bot lwak ni, “Wun jo Icrael, aŋeyo gin ma wutye ka wacone, ki gin ma wutye ka yubone ki i tamwu." 
Ezekiel11:6 Wun doŋ wutyeko neko jo mapol i gaŋ kany mumiyo yo ma i gaŋ ducu opoŋ ki kom dano muto keken. 
Ezekiel11:7 “Mumiyo man en aye gin ma awaco botwu. Gaŋ man bidoko agulu me tedo, ento kom jo muto ma wunekogi ka wupyelogi i dye gaŋ gin aye riŋo me ateda. Ento wun gibikwanyowu woko ki i dye gaŋ," 
Ezekiel11:8 Yam wubedo ka lworo pala lucwan; ento abikelo dano ma gitye ki pala lucwan gilwenyo i komwu, man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel11:9 Abikwanyowu ki i dye gaŋ akelowu woko, ci amiyowu i ciŋ lurok. Doŋ atyeko ŋolo kop me to i wiwu;" 
Ezekiel11:10 gibinekowu woko i lweny ki pala lucwan i lobowu kikome. Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot. 
Ezekiel11:11 Gaŋ man pe bibedo agulu me tedowu ki wun bene pe wubibedo calo riŋo ma tye i agulu. Abiketo can i komwu ki i kabedo ducu ma wubedo iye ki i lobo Icrael. 
Ezekiel11:12 Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot, ki cik ma wuturo-ni meno cikka, ki gin ma giciko ni wuti-ni, ma pe wutiyo-ni, onoŋo an aye ma aciko, ento wubedo ka Lubo mewu cik pa lurok ma gurumowu.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 I kare-nu ma atye ka tito lok, cutcut Pelatiya wod pa Benaya opoto ci oto woko. Ci apoto piny aryeba ic kun akok ki dwan maloŋo ni, “Ai do, Rwot Lubaŋal Ibineko jo ma onoŋo gudoŋ i Icrael-li woko ducu?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Rwot oloko kweda kun wacci," 
Ezekiel11:15 “Wod pa dano, jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem gitye ka lok piri kadi wa Luicrael wadiwu bene ma giterogi i opii. Giwacci, ‘Opii doŋ gitye ka mabor ma pe gitwero woro Rwot. En omiyowa lobo man ni wacam obed mewa.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 Kombeddi doŋ tit lok ma atye ka wacone-ni bot opii wadiwu. Acwalogi me cito ka bedo i lobo pa lurok ma tye ka mabor, ci akeyogi woko i lobo mukene ducu. Aye ni guwora i lobo ka ma gucito iye, ento pi kare me tutunu." 
Ezekiel11:17 “Pi meno tit botgi gin ma an Rwot atye ka wacone. Abicokogi woko ki i lobo ka ma yam akeyogi gucito iye, ci abimiyogi lo bo Icrael adwoko cen botgi." 
Ezekiel11:18 Ka gudok kunnu, gibijwero gin ducu ma obedo cilo, ki gin me kwergu ducu." 
Ezekiel11:19 Abimiyogi cwiny acel dok abiketo cwiny manyen i igi; abikwanyo cwiny matek calo got-ti woko ki i komgi, ci amiyogi cwiny pa dano." 
Ezekiel11:20 Doŋ miyo gibigwoko cikka dok bene giwinyo lokka kun gin yo gin ma an aciko ducu. Gibibedo jona, ki an bene abibedo Lubaŋagi." 
Ezekiel11:21 Ento abiketo can i kom jo ducu ma giworo gin ducu ma obedo cilo ki gin me kwer-gu. Abiculo kwor i komgi kun poro gin ducu ma yam gin gutimo, man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Lukerubi gucako tuk me cito malo, ci lawala bene gucito kacel kwedgi. Deyo pa Lubaŋa pa Icrael onoŋo tye ka wigi." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ci deyo pa Lubaŋa oa woko ki i gaŋ ocito ocuŋ i wi got ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ me gaŋ. 
Ezekiel11:24 Cwiny pa Rwot otiŋa woko i ginanyuta, ci okela odwoka woko cen bot jo ma tye i opii i lobo Kaldaya. Lacen ginanyuta meno ma onoŋo aneno ocako rwenyo woko ki bota," 
Ezekiel11:25 ci atito gin ducu ma Rwot onyutta bot jo ma onoŋo gitye i opii. 
Ezekiel12:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel12:2 Owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, in it ye ka bedo i kin jo ma lujemo. Waggi tye, ento pe gineno gin mo. Itgi bene tye, ento pe giwinyo lok," 
Ezekiel12:3 pien gin jo ma lujemo. “Doŋ kombeddi, in wod pa dano, yubbe kun itweyo yecci macalo lariŋ ayela, ci icak wot me cito i opii ki i nyimgi ki dyeceŋ, Wek gin ducu guneni ka icako wot me cito i kabedo mukene. Gwok nyo gin jo ma lujemo-ni gibinian gin ma itimo." 
Ezekiel12:4 Twe yecci woko ki dyeceŋ macalo larin ayela ma tweyo yecce kun gin bene gineno, wek guneni ka doŋ icito ki otyeno calo doŋ icito woko i opii," 
Ezekiel12:5 Tuc kor cel ma gin bene gineno, ci idony iye ikat icit woko." 
Ezekiel12:6 Ibitiŋo yecci ki i nyimgi ma gin gineno, ci iketo i wi gwoki, ci icito kwede woko i colpiny ma noŋo iboyo waŋi woko, wek pe inen lobo ka ma icito iye. Doŋ atyeko keto in me bedo lanyut bot jo Icrael.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Atiyo gin ma Rwot nene ocika ni ati. Akwanyo yecca akelo woko ki dyeceŋ, calo yec pa lariŋ ayela; ka doŋ piny odoko otyeno ci atuco kom cel ki ciŋa. Ci akwanyo yecca ma atweyo-ni atiŋo i wi gwoka ma kun gin bene gineno, ci acito woko i colpiny," 
Ezekiel12:8 Orwone ki odiko Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel12:9 Owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, kombeddi Luicrael ma gin lujemo-ni gitye ka penyi ni in it ye ka timo gin aŋo." 
Ezekiel12:10 Tit botgi gin ma an Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka lok botgi. Lok man ma pire tek-ki kemo laker ma tye ka loc i Jerucalem ki jo Icrael ducu ma gibedo kunnu. 
Ezekiel12:11 Tit botgi ni gin ma doŋ itimo-ni tye macalo lanyut me gin ma bitimme i komgi; gibiterogi woko i opii i lobo mukene. 
Ezekiel12:12 Doŋ laker ma loyogini bitiŋo yecce i wi gwoke i colpiny ci lwi donyo ki i waŋ cel ma gituco i kom cel-li kato woko gire. En biboyo waŋe woko, wek pe enen lobo ka ma ecito iye." 
Ezekiel12:13 Abiciko obwona pire, ci en bibino moko i owicca. Ka doŋ akwanye atere woko wa i lobo Babilon, ma en lobo pa jo Kaldaya, en bito ki kunnu ma noŋo pe oneno lobo-nu." 
Ezekiel12:14 Abikeyo jo ducu ma onoŋo gurume woko dyere-ni, lumi-tamine, ki jo ma gwoko en i yo ducu mapatpat; lukworgi biyenyogi mada wek ginekgi woko ki pala lucwan." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Ka akeyogi woko i rokmukeneki i lobo pa lurok, gibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel12:16 Ento abiweko jo manok bwot ki i lweny, kec ki two gemo pe binekogi, wek guniaŋ ki i kin lurok kunnu, ci gutuc gin me kwer ma yam gutimo-ni, wek doŋ guŋe atir ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Rvot dok omedde oloko kweda," 
Ezekiel12:18 Owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, wek komi omyel ka it ye ka cam, wek komi bene omyel ki lworo ka it ye ka mato pii." 
Ezekiel12:19 Tit bot wegi lobo meno ni man aye lok pa Rwot Lubaŋa ma okemo jo Jerucalem ma pud gibedo i lobogi. Gibicamo cam ki lworo ma noŋ o komgi myel, dok bene gibimato pii ma cwinygi oballe woko. Gibiyako jami ducu ma tye i lobogi miyo i lobo doŋ noŋo, pien jo ducu ma gibedo iye gin lutim bwami keken." 
Ezekiel12:20 Gaŋi ducu ma dano gibedo iye gibijwero woko doŋ obur, ci lobo meno doŋ bidoko tim ata, Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel12:22 Owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, piŋo jo Icrael gimaro waco carolok man ni, ‘Kare tye ka kato, dok ginanyuta ma gineno i wan lek-ki ducu lokke pe ocobbe kakare’?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Kombeddi doŋ itit botgi gin ma an Rwot Lubaŋa amito wacone pi lok man. Abigiko tic ki carolok meno woko. Pe dok gibibedo ka tic kwede i Icrael matwal. Ento tit botgi ni, ‘Kare doŋ oo, ki ginanyuta ducu doŋ bicobbe kakare.’" 
Ezekiel12:24 “Ginanyuta me gobagoba ki lok tyet me bwolo ma ŋako dano doŋ bibedo pe matwal i kin jo Icrael. 
Ezekiel12:25 An Rwot, doŋ abiloko botgi, ci gin ma awaco bitimme, Lok man pe dok bigalle. Abitimo gin ma acikowu ni abitimo-ni i kare me kwowu, wun jo ma lujemo. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco.”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Rwot dok oloko kweda," 
Ezekiel12:27 kun wacci, “Wod pa dano, jo Icrael giwacci ginanyuta ma ineno-ni ki lok ma itito-ni tye pi kare me anyim ma pud ty bor." 
Ezekiel12:28 Pi meno tit botgi gin ma an Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka wacone ni, ‘Lok man pe dok bigalle. Gin ma awaco-ni bitimme.’ An Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ aloko.”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel13:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, tit lok i kom lunebi me Icrael, tit lok kun itito bot jo ducu ma gitito lok ma gutamo atama ki wigi ni, ‘Wuwiny lok pa Rwot?’" 
Ezekiel13:3 Man aye gin ma Rwot Lubaŋa owaco ni, Can i wi lunebi ma lumiŋ-ŋi! Gilubo mere tam ma gutamo atama ki i cwinygi kun noŋo pe guneno ginanyuta mo." 
Ezekiel13:4 Wun jo Icrael, lunebiwu gubedo macalo too ma tye i gaŋi ma i kin obur." 
Ezekiel13:5 Pe bene gigwoko kabedo ka ma gimuko cel woko ki iye-ni, pe gimito gero cel odoco; mumiyo Icrael pe bicuŋ ka lweny obino i nino pa Rwot." 
Ezekiel13:6 Ginanyutagi ducu ma guneno obedo me goba. Gityeto bene lok me goba. Giwacci, ‘Man lok pa Rwot’, ento an gira pe aorogi. Gibedo ka tamo ni myero acob lokgi kakare." 
Ezekiel13:7 Awaco botgi ni, ‘Ginanyuta magi ducu ma wuneno obedo me goba, ki lok ma wutyeto-gu ducu obedo lok me goba keken. Wuwaco ni lok magi ducu lokka, ento an gira pe aloko kwedwu,’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:8 Mumiyo Rwot Lubaŋa owaco botgi kuman ni, “Lokwu ducu obedo me bwolo ki ginanyuta ma wuneno-gu goba keken. Pi meno, atye ki lok i komwu. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel13:9 Abiketo can i komwu, wun lunebi ma wuneno ginanyuta me bwolo-gu, dok bene wutyeto lok goba keken. Pe wubibedo tye ka jona gucokke kacci; dok bene pe gibicoyo nyinwu kacel ki nyiŋ jo Icrael mukene-gu; pe wubidok i lobowu matwal. Wubineyo ni an aye a Rwot Lubaŋa." 
Ezekiel13:10 “Lunebi gumiyo jona guŋak woko kun giwacci, ‘Kuc tye,’ ento noŋo kuc mo pe. Jona gubino gugero cel ci lunebi gubino gubuko woko ki raŋi matar me buko kor ot." 
Ezekiel13:11 Wac bot jo ma tye ka bukone ki rani matar-ri ni, cel bipoto woko piny. Kot ma corre acora bicwer matek, pee madwoŋ bicorre piny, ki yamo lapiru matek bicako kodo i kom cel." 
Ezekiel13:12 Cel bimuk poto woko piny, ci dano ducu gibipenyowu gin aŋo ma wutimo pi buko kom cel ki raŋi matarri.”" 
Ezekiel13:13 Pi meno Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Abicwalo yamo matek cako kodo, kot ma corre acora bicwer, ki pee madwoŋ bicorre piny ki akemona ki kinigana, me muko cel woko." 
Ezekiel13:14 Abimuko cel ma wubuko ki rani matar-ri areto woko pinyi ŋom, ci aweko te gutiŋe doŋ noŋo. Ka cel opoto ci wuto woko ducu. Man bimiyo wun ducu wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel13:15 “Meno aye kit ma abitoyo kwede akemona i kom cel ki i kom jo ma gubuko cel ki rani matar-ri. Abiwaco botwu ni, ‘Cel doŋ pe matwal, kadi ki jo ma gubuko kome ki rani matar-ri bene gipe," 
Ezekiel13:16 kadi lunebi ma gubedo ka tito lok ma okemo Jerucalem ni kuc tye iye, kun onoŋo kuc pe-ni bene doŋ gipe.’ ” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel13:17 Rwot owacci, “Kombeddi in wod pa dano, nen mon ma gitye i kin lutuwu ma gitito lok ma gin tamo atama ki i cwinygi. Juk gin ma gitye ka titone-ni woko," 
Ezekiel13:18 kun itito botgi gin ma Rwot Lubaŋa tye ka waco botgi. “Can i wiwu wun mon ma wukwoyo lwit wutweyo i ŋut ciŋ dano, dok bene wukwoyo boŋo laum wic ma wuboyo iye lwit pi dano ducu kun wulubo kit bor pa ŋat acel acel, wutimo man ni wek gubed ki twero me rwenyo kwo pa dano woko! Imito tic ki twero me kwo ki me to i kom jona wek wuŋon giwu iye magoba ma cwinywu mito." 
Ezekiel13:19 Doŋ wutyeko pyeda woko i kin jona pi cayiri ma romo poŋ ciŋwu keken, ki pi kwon mogo matitino, kun wuneko dano ma onoŋo myero pe guto, ento wubwoto dano ma onoŋo myero guto aye gibedo kwo, pi gobawu ma wuloko bot jona, ma guwinyo lok gobawu-ni.”" 
Ezekiel13:20 Man aye gin ma Rwot Lubaŋa tye ka wacone ni, “Adag lwit ma wukwoyo i komwu me bedo ki twero i kom dano me kwo ki me to. Abicodo lwit meno-gu woko ki i ŋut ciŋwu ci abimiyo dano ma onoŋo wutye ki twero me loyo kwogi-ni gibwot gicito laboŋo ayela calo winyo," 
Ezekiel13:21 Abiyeco boŋo laum wiwu woko bene, ci alaro jona woko ki i ciŋwu, pe doŋ gibibedo i te twerowu matwal. Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel13:22 “Wun doŋ wubalo cwiny jo ma kitgi atir woko ki lok me bwolo, kadi bed onoŋo an pe abalo cwinygi, ento wun wucuko cwiny jo ma gin lutim maraco, wek gulokke ki i yo me timgi maraco gular kwogi." 
Ezekiel13:23 Pi meno, pe doŋ wubineno ginanyuta me gobagoba matwal, dok bene pe wubityeto tyet. Abilaro jona woko ki i ciŋwu. Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Jo mogo i kin ludoŋo pa jo Icrael gubino bota ci gubedo piny i nyima. 
Ezekiel14:2 Cutcut Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel14:3 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, jo magi doŋ gitye ki cwiny me woro cal jogi dok gimiyo cal jogi magi nakogi woko terogi ka timo bal. Tika gitamo ni abimiyogi lagam ma gitye ka mitoneni?" 
Ezekiel14:4 “Doŋ pi meno kombeddi lok kwedgi ci itit botgi gin ma an Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka wacone ni, ‘Laicrael mo ma tye ki cwiny me woro cal jogi dok ma bimiyo cal jogi magi nako en tere ka timo bal, ka obino bot lanebi ni okonye, ci an Rwot kikoma aye abimiye lagam. Lagam ma abimiyo bedo lagam ma okemo lwak cal jogine ma en otiyogu." 
Ezekiel14:5 Cal jogi magi ducu doŋ oloko cwiny jo Icrael woko ki i koma, ento ageno ni ki lagam man ma abimiyo botgi abidwoko cwinygi celi i koma miyo doŋ giwora.’" 
Ezekiel14:6 “Kombeddi doŋ itit bot jo Icrael gin ma an Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka wacone ni, ‘Wuŋuti wudwog cen bota wuwek woro cal jogiwu-ni. Dok bene wulokke wuwek timo gin me kwer ducu ma yam wubedo ka timogi-ni." 
Ezekiel14:7 “Ka inen dano mo ki i kin Luicrael nyo dano mo ki i kin lurok ma gibedo i kin jo Icrael ce olokke obwota woko kun doŋ tye ki cwiny me woro cal jogi, ka cal jogine oŋake otere ka timo bal, ka obino bot lanebi ni okonye, ci an Rwot kikoma aye abimiye lagam," 
Ezekiel14:8 Abikwero kit timme-nu woko, abimiyo en doko lanyut ki lok aboka pa dano. Abikwanye woko ki i kin jona, man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Ka ce inen gibwolo lanebi mo ci en omiyo lagam gobagoba, meno noŋo an Rwot aye ma abwole. Ci abiryeyo ciŋa i kom lanebi meno, aneko woko ki i kin jona jo Icrael." 
Ezekiel14:10 Doŋ lanebi kacel ki ŋat ma bino ka noŋo kony ki bote-ni ducu gibilimo lakit can acel. 
Ezekiel14:11 Abitimo man wek jo Icrael pe guŋak gubwota woko, wek bene pe gubal komgi ki balgi ducu ma gitimo. Ento amito ni gin gubed jona ki an bene abed Lubaŋagi.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel14:12 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel14:13 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, ka ce inen lobo timo bal i koma kun turo cikka, abiryeyo ciŋa ci ajwiko cam woko ki iye. Abicwalo kec neko dano ma gibedo iye kacel wa ki lee ducu." 
Ezekiel14:14 Kadi bed jo adek-ki, Nua, Daniel ki Yubu onoŋo gibedo kunnu, kitgi ma atir gire bilaro kwogi gin kengi,” man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel14:14 Kadi bed jo adek-ki, Nua, Daniel ki Yubu onoŋo gibedo kunnu, kitgi ma atir gire bilaro kwogi gin kengi,” man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel14:15 Ka acwalo lee me tim ka neko dano woko ducu ki i lobo meno, ci gibimiyo lobo doŋ balle woko doko marac ma ŋat mo doŋ pe twero ŋolo kato ki iye," 
Ezekiel14:16 kadi bed nene jo adek-ki gubed kunnu, kit macalo an a Rwot Lubaŋa makwo-ni, onoŋo pe gitwero laro kadi wa litinogi kikomgi, Onoŋo gitwero laro kwogi gin kengi, ento onoŋo lobo ‘twero lokke doko tim ‘ata." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Ka ce akelo lweny i kom lobo meno kun acwalo jami lweny maraco wek ginek ki dano kacel ki lee woko ducu," 
Ezekiel14:18 kadi bed onoŋo jo adek-ki, Nua, Daniel ki Yubu gibedo kunnu, macalo an Rwot Lubaŋa makwo-ni, onoŋo pe gitwero laro kadi wa litinogi kikomgi. Onoŋo gitwero laro kwogi keken." 
Ezekiel14:18 kadi bed onoŋo jo adek-ki, Nua, Daniel ki Yubu gibedo kunnu, macalo an Rwot Lubaŋa makwo-ni, onoŋo pe gitwero laro kadi wa litinogi kikomgi. Onoŋo gitwero laro kwogi keken." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Ka ce acwalo two gemo i lobo meno, ka aonyo akemona kun arwenyo kwo pa jo mapol, ma aneko dano kacel ki lee me tim," 
Ezekiel14:20 kadi bed onoŋo Nua, Daniel ki Yubu gibedo kunnu, kit macalo atye kwo-ni, man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco, onoŋo pe gitwero laro kadi wa litinogi. Onoŋo kitgi ma atir aye gire bilaro kwogi gin kengi.”" 
Ezekiel14:20 kadi bed onoŋo Nua, Daniel ki Yubu gibedo kunnu, kit macalo atye kwo-ni, man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco, onoŋo pe gitwero laro kadi wa litinogi. Onoŋo kitgi ma atir aye gire bilaro kwogi gin kengi.”" 
Ezekiel14:21 Man aye gin ma Rwot Lubaŋa tye ka wacone ni, “At ye ki can aŋwen ma abicwalo i kom Jerucalem, lweny, kec, lee tim-gu ki two gemo, wek onek dano woko ducu kacel ki lee ducu." 
Ezekiel14:22 Ka ce inen ŋat mo obwot obedo kwo ce olaro litinone, ka gubino botwu myero wunengi. Ci wubineno kit ma kitgi ki gin ma gitimo ducu rac kwede, man miyo wubiye ni can ma abiketo i kom Jerucalem tye kakare." 
Ezekiel14:23 Wubiye ka wuneno kitgi ki gin ma gitiyo kit ma rac kwede; ci bimiyo wuŋeyo ni onoŋo tyen lok ma atir mumiyo atimo gin ma doŋ atyeko timone-ni, man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco.”" 
Ezekiel15:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel15:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, gitwero poro yat olok ki yat mukene niŋniŋ? Doŋ yat olok ma giporo ki yat ma tye i buŋani berre rom mene?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Itwero toŋo yatte itiyo ki gin mo? Dano gitwero tono gipayo dok teke ci giguro i kor ot me ŋabo jami? 
Ezekiel15:4 Yatte ber me obo mac mere keken. Ka mac doŋ owano doge ryoryo ducu ma doŋ oweko bilo i dyere, pud dok itwero kwanyone itiyo ki gin mo?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Nen, ma pud pe yat meno owaŋ woko onoŋo konnye doŋ pe. Doŋ kit macalo mac owaŋo woko-ni kun oweko bilo bene i dyere, ci konnye doŋ bibedo pe rom mene, tika dok gitwero kwanyone gitiyo ki gin mo?”" 
Ezekiel15:6 Man aye gin ma Rwot Lubaŋa tye ka wacone ni, “Kit macalo yat olok gikwanyo ki i kin yadi me buŋa ci waŋ woko-ni, kit meno bene abikwanyo jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem ci aketo can i komgi." 
Ezekiel15:7 Abiciko waŋa i komgi, kadi bed gubwot ki i mac, mac pud biwaŋogi; ci man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot, ka doŋ aciko waŋa i komgi." 
Ezekiel15:8 Abimiyo lobo doŋ doko tim ata, pien pe gubedo ka lubo cikka, man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 Rwot doki oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel16:2 Owacci, “Mi Jerucalem one gin me kwer ducu ma en otimo." 
Ezekiel16:3 Tit ki Jerucalem gin ma Rwot Lubaŋa tye ka wacone bote: In yam ginywali i lobo pa jo Kanan; woru obedo jo Amor, ki meni obedo anyira Kit." 
Ezekiel16:4 Doŋ kit macalo ginywali kwede, i nino ma ginywali iye kikome tol peni pe giŋolo, pe bene gilwoko komi ki pii wek komi obed maleŋ, pe giwiro kado i komi, pe bene giboyi woko ki boŋo." 
Ezekiel16:5 Ŋat mo ma obedo ki kica muromo i komi pe me tiyo gin macalo magi ducu i komi. I kare ma ginywali gubedo ki mar manok twatwal i komi mumiyo guboli woko i dye bar ka maleŋ. 
Ezekiel16:6 “I kare ma akato ki ka ŋeti, aneni ibedo ka kwitte i remo ma ginywali kwede, ci awacci ma it ye i remoni ni, ‘Bed kwo," 
Ezekiel16:7 ci idoŋ giri malo calo ginapita ma i poto.’ Ci idoŋo woko mabor wa malo idoko nyako madit. Tunoni ocako poŋ maber, ki yer wii bene olot maboco, ento onoŋo it ye munero laboŋo boŋo mo i komi." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Ka doki akato ki ka ŋeti ci aneni anoŋo ni mwakani doŋ oromo me mar; ci ayaro boŋo ma onoŋo atye kwede woko i komi, omiyo pe doŋ ibedo munero. Ada, aketo gicikke kwedi, ci in doŋ idoko mera. Acikke mada ni abimari.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Akwanyo pii alwoko remo woko ki i komi, ka doŋ awiro komi woko ki moo." 
Ezekiel16:10 Aruki woko bene ki boŋo mabor ma gidero maber, ka amini war ma delle ber makato ducu, ki boŋo camanini me boyo wii ki boŋo aridi me umi." 
Ezekiel16:11 Dok aruki ki ruk me deyo, ci arwako ogul i ciŋi, kun arwako nyor bene i ŋuti," 
Ezekiel16:12 Dok arwako agit um bene i umi, ka arwako agit it i iti ryoryo ducu, ka doŋ arwako lalukana maber mada i wii." 
Ezekiel16:13 Onoŋo yam giruki ki ruk ma obedo jabu ki ryal, ginarukani onoŋo obedo boŋo camanini mabecone, ki boŋo aridi ki boŋo ma gidero maber. Ibedo ka camo kwon ma mokone pwot mada, ki moo kic kacel ki moo yaa. Idoŋo ma inen mwonya maber mada, ci idoko daker." 
Ezekiel16:14 Berri oywek mada i rok ducu. Onoŋo ibedo mwonya maber mada pi deyo ma aketo i komi, pien aketi ma inen mwonya mada.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa maowaco." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Ento in giri ibedo ka geno berri ki ywekani, ci ibedo ka timo abor ki jo ducu ma gikato ki ka ma in it ye iye." 
Ezekiel16:16 Ikwanyo boŋŋini mogo ci iyubo odi jogi ci idero komgi woko maber, ka doŋ imiyo komi woko bot jo ducu i tim me abor calo malaya. Kit tim macalo man pud pe onen, dok bene pe doŋ binen matwal." 
Ezekiel16:17 Dok bene ikwanyo jami me wel me jabu ki ryal ma yam amiyo boti, ci icako tiyo cal dano ka doŋ itimo abor kwedgi." 
Ezekiel16:18 Ikwanyo boŋŋini ma gidero maber-ri iumo ki kom cal dano-gu, ci ityero moona woko ki odok ecetana botgi." 
Ezekiel16:19 Yam amini cam, amiyo icamo kwon mamokone pwot adada, moo yaa kacel ki moo kic, ento in dok ityero woko bot cal jogi macalo gin ma ŋwece kur ma yomo cwinygi. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Lacen dok ikwanyo awobeni ki anyirani ma yam inywalogi kweda, ci ityerogi woko bot cal jogi me bedo gitum awaŋa. In itamo ni tim me abor ma itimo obedo lok matidi mo ki tun bota" 
Ezekiel16:21 mumi yo ineko litinona ci ityerogi woko bot cal jogi-gu me bedo gitum awana-ni? 
Ezekiel16:22 I kom tim me kwerri ducu ki tim aborri ducu ma itimo wii pe opo i kom kare me tinoni, en kare ma onoŋo it ye munero ma ginaruka mo pe i komi, ma onoŋo it ye ka kwitte i remo ma ginywali kwede-ni.”" 
Ezekiel16:23 Rwot Lubaŋa owacci, “Can i wii! Can i wii! Lacen ma doŋ ityeko timo tim maraco," 
Ezekiel16:24 ci igero kicika piri keru, ka igero kabedo ma otinne malo me woro cal jogi i ŋet yo ducu." 
Ezekiel16:25 I agikki yo ducu igero iye kabedo ma otiŋŋe malo ka doŋ icako nyuto berri kunnu calo malaya. Imiyo jo ducu ma gikato ki kenyo gibedo kwedi, ma imiyo tim me malayani onya omedde twatwal." 
Ezekiel16:26 Dok bene iweko luwoti ma gin lutarwaŋ ma gin jo Ejipt, gutimo abor kwedi, imiyo tim me aborri onya omedde, kun iŋeto ki cwinya ni wek kiniga omaka." 
Ezekiel16:27 “Nen, kombeddi doŋ aryeyo ciŋa woko me keto can i komi, ki dok me kwanyo dul me gum ma onoŋo yam apoko boti-ni woko. Doŋ atyeko miyi woko i ciŋ lukworri jo Piliciti, ma gidagi twatwal ma lewic omakogi mada pi tim me abor ma ibedo ka timone-ni." 
Ezekiel16:28 “Dok bene itimo abor ki jo Aciria, pien onoŋo abor ma itimo ki jo mukeneni pe orommi. Idoko malayagi, ento ducu mwa, gin ma gutimo i komi bene pud pe orommi." 
Ezekiel16:29 Imedde giri ki tim aborri ci itimo abor bene ki lucat-wil ma i lobo pa jo Kaldaya, ento kadi bed gubedo kwedi ci gin ma gutimo i komi bene pud pe orommi.”" 
Ezekiel16:30 Man gin ma Rwot Lubaŋa tye ka wacone ni, “Cwinyi doŋ odoko goro woko ki mar, aneno itimo gin magi ducu calo malaya ma lewic pe mako." 
Ezekiel16:31 Igero kicika i agikki yo ducu dok igero kabedo ma otiŋŋe malo i ŋet yo ducu. Ento in onoŋo pe ibedo calo malaya, pien onoŋo pe itimo abor pi noŋo limo" 
Ezekiel16:32 Ibedo calo dako ma timo abor ki lurok ma gin welo ma ka maro cware. 
Ezekiel16:33 Co aye ma gimiyo mot bot mon ma malaya, ento in aye doki imiyo mot bot co ma gimari-ni, kun iwilogi ki lim i muŋ ni gua ki i kabedo ducu gubin gubed kwedi." 
Ezekiel16:34 In dok ibedo malaya ma kite pat mada ki kit mon mukene ma gin malaya-gu. Ŋat mo ma onoŋo odiyo in me bedo malaya pe. Pe giculo gin mo boti, ento in aye dok iculo co ma onoŋo gimari-ni, Pi meno, in giri ki ti pat." 
Ezekiel16:35 “Pi meno doŋ, in malaya, winy lok ma Rwot tye ka wacone." 
Ezekiel16:36 Man gin ma Rwot Lubaŋa owaco ni, Ilunyo boŋŋini woko ki i komi ci imiyo co ma imarogi-ni gubedo kwedi, dok bene ineko litinoni ci ityero woko bot cal jogi me bedo gitum." 
Ezekiel16:37 Doŋ pi lok man omiyo abicoko jo ducu ma yam gimari, ma yam ibedo kwedgi ki yomcwiny, jo ducu ma onoŋo imarogi ki jo ducu ma onoŋo idaggi. Abicokogi ki i kabedo ducu ci amiyo gicuŋ girumi woko dyere, ka doŋ alunyo boŋo woko ki i komi idoŋ munero, wek guneni noŋo doŋ it ye munero." 
Ezekiel16:38 Abiŋolo kop i komi calo aŋolo kop i kom mon ma giketo nyom woko kun bene gineko dano. Ci abiŋolo kop i komi ki akemo ki nyeko madit miyo ito woko. 
Ezekiel16:39 Abimiyo ibedo i te twero pa co ma gimari, ci gibicoro kicikani gireto woko piny, dok bene gimuko kabedo ma otiŋŋe malo ma igero me woro cal jogi-ni woko. Gibilunyo boŋo woko ki komi ci gikwanyo jami me wel-gu woko ki boti, ka doŋ giweki idoŋ munero laboŋo boŋo mo i komi." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Gibikelo dul mony ka lweny i komi, gibiceli ki got ci giŋoli giŋidi woko matitino ki pala lucwangi." 
Ezekiel16:41 Gibiwaŋo odini-gu woko ducu, dok bene gibicobo kop ma aŋolo i komi ki i nyim mon mapol. Abijuki woko doŋ pe ibedo malaya, dok abimiyo doŋ igiko miyo mot bot co ma gimari-ni woko matwal." 
Ezekiel16:42 Abitoyo akemona woko i komi kit meno, ci nyeko ma onoŋo atye kwede bene doŋ bia woko ki i komi. Abibedo doŋ mamwol, kiniga bene pe doŋ bimaka i komi matwal." 
Ezekiel16:43 Onoŋo wii owil woko pe ipo kit macalo abedo ka timi kwede i ‘kare ma onoŋo in pud itidi, doŋ imiyo kiniga omaka pi gin magi ducu ma itimo-ni. Pi meno, abiculo kwor i komi ki gin ma itimo. Piŋo itimo tim me tarwaŋ imedo ki tim me kwer-gu ducu?” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel16:44 “Nen, dano ducu ma loko carolok, gibiloko carolok i komi ni, ‘Nyako cal ki minne.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 In giri i nya pa meni kikome. En okwero cware ki litinone woko. Inen calo lumegini ma gukwero coggi ki litinogi-ni. Meni yam Lakit ki woru mere onoŋo en Laamor. 
Ezekiel16:46 Lameru ma okwono nyimi en aye Camaria, ma tye yo tuŋ acam ki gaŋine, Lameru matidine ma tye ki gaŋine i ŋete yo tuŋ acuc, en aye Codom." 
Ezekiel16:47 In yam pe ibedo ka lubo kitgi keken, kadi ki timo kit gin me kwer gu macalo gin, ento pi kare manok mo keken kiti ocako balle woko marac makato kitgi i kit yo ducu." 
Ezekiel16:48 “Doŋ kit macalo an atye kwe-ni,” man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco, “lameru Codom ki gaŋi ma i ŋete pe gutimo kit gin ma in kacel ki gaŋini wutimo-ni." 
Ezekiel16:49 Nen, man aye obedo bal pa lameru Codom. En kacel ki anyirane gubedo luwakke mada, pien onoŋo gitye ki cam madwoŋ ma gicamo loyogi kun gibedo mot ki kuc, ento pe gumiyo kit kony mo bot lucan ki boŋo ma piny obwoyogi." 
Ezekiel16:50 Onoŋo gubedo jo ma Lyerre mukato kare, ci gutimo gin me kwer mapol i nyima; pi meno, i kare ma aneno gin ma gutimo, atyekogi woko." 
Ezekiel16:51 “Camaria pe otimo bal ma romo nucu bal ma in itimo. Itimo gin me kwer mapol makato gin me kwer ma en otimo. Dok bene imiyo lumegini ginen calo jo ma kitgi atir ka giporogi kwedi, ki kit gin me kwer ducu ma doŋ ityeko timogi-ni." 
Ezekiel16:52 Doŋ kombeddi, in myero icir lewic. Balli doŋ rac atikatika makato bal pa lumegini ducu ma miyo ginen calo jo ma gipe ki bal mo-ni. Gin lokgi tye atir ma okato lokki. Kit meno in bene myero lewic omaki, dok myero icir cac ma gicayi kwede pien imiyo lumegini ginen calo jo ma kitgi atir.”" 
Ezekiel16:53 Rwot owaco ki Jerucalem ni, “Abidwoko gumgi botgi, gum pa Codom ki gaŋi ma i ŋete, ki gum pa Camaria ki gaŋi ma i ŋete, Abidwoko gummi bene boti." 
Ezekiel16:54 Lewic bimaki i komi kekeni, dok bene cac ma gicayi kwede bikweyo cwiny lumegini." 
Ezekiel16:55 Gibibedo maber ki lonyo dok i, in bene kacel ki gaŋi ma i ŋeti ducu wubibedo maber kit ma yam con." 
Ezekiel16:56 I kare ma iwakke-ni onoŋo pe ibedo ka loko nyiŋ lameru Codom macalo lok aboka," 
Ezekiel16:57 i kare ma timmi maraco peya onen ka maleŋ-ŋi? Kombeddi doŋ ilokke idoko calo en, ginacaya pa jo Edom ki luwotgi ducu, ki pa jo Piliciti, jo ma gibedo cokcok ma gicayi-ni." 
Ezekiel16:58 Doŋ icir can malit pi bal me lewic ki gin me kwer mapol ma itimo.” Man Rwot ma owaco. 
Ezekiel16:59 Rwot Lubaŋa owacci, “Abitimi ma poro gin ma yam itimo, pien icayo kwoŋ meri dok bene ituro gicikke woko." 
Ezekiel16:60 Ento pud abipo i kom gicikkena ma aketo kwedi cakke i kare me tinoni. Doŋ abiketo gicikkena kwedi ma bedo nakanaka. 
Ezekiel16:61 Ibipo kit macalo ibedo kwede ducu, ci lewic bimaki ka akwanyo lameru madit ki lameru matidi adwokogi cen boti. Abimiyo doŋ gibedo macalo anyirani, ento pe pi gicikke man ma aketo kwedi-ni." 
Ezekiel16:62 Dok abimoko gicikkena kwedi, ci ibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel16:63 I kare ma abiweko bal ducu ma yam itimo, ibipo i komgi ci lewic bimaki matek mada ma pe bene doŋ ibinamo dogi ka lok.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel17:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel17:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, wac lok me koc lit, ci ilok carolok bot jo Icrael" 
Ezekiel17:3 wek guŋe gin ma an Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka wacone. Yam tye ocur mo madit ma tye ki bwome madito, ma oyaro woko malac. Onoŋo yec kome nen mwonya mada ma tye ki raŋi mapol ma kitgi patpat. Otuk ocito i Lebanon ci oturo wi yat cedar me Lebanon woko." 
Ezekiel17:4 Oturo cwiny wi lano cedar me agikkine, ci ocito kwede otero wa i lobo pa lucat-wil, ci oketo i gaŋ pa lucat-wil." 
Ezekiel17:5 Dok okwanyo jaŋ yat ki obokene ki i lobo Icrael ci opito i lobo maberre ka ma pii dwoŋ iye wek odoŋ. Opito kit macalo gipito kwede yat ma doŋo i dog kulu," 
Ezekiel17:6 ci odoko yat olok ma ojany oluk lapiny, Jaŋe ojany okemo yo tuŋ bot ocur, ki lwite obedo ka ma yat ocuŋ iye, Kit meno ocako doko yat olok, ci oketo jaŋe mapol wa pote doŋ ocako lot oluk mada." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Ento yam onoŋo tye ocur mo mukene madit ma tye ki bwome madit ki yecce madwoŋ, Nen, lwit yat olok man olot oket ki piny i ŋom okemo yo tuŋ bote, ci oloko jaŋe ma pote oluk bene okemo yo tuŋ bote kun geno ni bimiyo ecwiyo pii muromo makato pii ma en limo i kabedo ka ma onoŋo en doŋo iye-ni." 
Ezekiel17:8 Ento onoŋo yam gipito i ŋom maberre ma tye i ŋet pii madwoŋ, wek oket jaŋe muteggi mapol, onyak nyige, wek odok yat olok ma pire tek adada.”" 
Ezekiel17:9 Rwot Lubaŋa openyo kuman ni, “Yat olok man bidono maber ci bedo kwo? Ci ocur mukwoŋo-ni pe biputo woko ki lwite ducu, ci toŋo jaŋe woko, wek pote ma pud lot alota-ni otwo woko? Man pe bimito dano ma kome tek nyo lwak me rok ma gitek me putone woko ki lwite ducu." 
Ezekiel17:10 Ada, doŋ gipito, ento tika twero doŋo bedo kwo? Pe bitwo woko liweŋ ka ce yamo ma a yo tuŋ wokceŋ obino okodo matek i kome ci ocoro woko piny? Pe bitwo woko ki i kabedo ka ma onoŋo tye ka doŋo iye-ni?”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Rwot owaco bota ni," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Peny jo magi ma gin Lujemo-ni ka ce giŋeyo te lok me carolok man. Wac botgi ni kabaka me Babilon obino i Jerucalem ci omako kabaka ki rwodine ci odok kwedgi cen i Babilon. 
Ezekiel17:13 Ci okwanyo latin ker acel, oketo gicikke kwede, kun omiye okwoŋo kwoŋ ni ebigwoko cikke meno. Omako jo madito ma nene oterogi woko" 
Ezekiel17:14 wek ker doŋ okwe woko mot, pe dok oille malo, dok bene me neno ni gigwoko gicikkene wek ker ocuŋ." 
Ezekiel17:15 Ento kabaka me Juda ojemo woko ci ocwalo lukwena gucito i Ejipt, ka kelo bote lwak aguragura ki dul mony madit. Tika en biloyo lweny? En twero loyo pi timo gin ma kit meno? En twero turo gicikke ci riŋo bwot woko ma ps koŋ noŋo giketo can i kome?" 
Ezekiel17:16 “Doŋ adada kit macalo atye kwo-ni,” man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco, “Kabaka-nu bito i Babilon, pien ocayo kwoŋŋe, dok oturo gicikke ma onoŋo en oketo ki kabaka me Babilon, ma okete me bedo i wi komker." 
Ezekiel17:17 Kadi ki Parao ki dul monnye matek-ki ki buca mony madit pe gibitwero konye ki lweny ka jo Babilon gutoro cel lobo gurumo woko pi neko lwak Jo mapol ma gibedo kenyo. 
Ezekiel17:18 Doŋ kit macalo en ocayo kwoŋŋe, kun oturo bene gicikke ma onoŋo en oketo, dok otimo gin magi ducu, pi meno en pe bibwot.”" 
Ezekiel17:19 Mumiyo Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “An Lubaŋa makwo, pi meno abiketo can i kome pi kwoŋ ma okwoŋo i nyima ma en ocayo ki gicikkena bene ma en oturo woko-ni." 
Ezekiel17:20 Abiciko obwona wek omok iye, ci en bimoko i i owicca, abitere i Babilon ka doŋ acako ŋolo kop i kome ki kunnu pi lok roro ma en obedo ka ketone i koma." 
Ezekiel17:21 Lulweny ma giyerogi ayera gibinekogi woko ducu ki pala lucwan, ki jo ma gudoŋ makwo gibiket woko ata. Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an Rwot doŋ atyeko loko lok man.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “An kikoma aye ma abikwanyo cwiny yat cedar matocone-ni ki i lano wiye, abituro ki malo kunnu, an kikoma aye abipito," 
Ezekiel17:23 abipito i wi got mabor ma tye i Icrael-li; wek ojany iye mapol onyak nyige, ci odok yat madit wek kit kwa lee ducu me tim gubin gubed i tere; ki kit kwa winyo ducu gibigero odigi i tipo jaŋe ducu." 
Ezekiel17:24 Doŋ yadi ducu me tim biŋeyo ni an a Rwot aye ma amiyo yat madit ma odono mabor doko yat matidi, ki yat matidi amiyo doko yat madit ma odoŋo mabor, dok bene amiyo yat madyak two woko, ka amiyo yat mutwo pote lot ci luk mada. An Rwot doŋ atyeko loko lok man, dok bene abitiyo gin ma onoŋo doŋ awaco.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel18:2 Owacci, “Man kit carolok aŋo ma dano gibedo ka nwoyone teretere ma okemo lobo Icrael-li? ‘Kwarowa gucamo nyig olok mawac, man odino lak litino woko.’" 
Ezekiel18:3 “Doŋ kit macalo atye kwe-ni,” man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco, “pe doŋ wubiloko carolok man wunwoyo i Icrael matwal." 
Ezekiel18:4 Nen, kwo pa wego nyo pa latin ducu mera. Dano ma timo bal bito." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Koŋ itam pi dano ma kite atir, ma tiyo gin ma cik mito dok ma tye atir." 
Ezekiel18:6 En pe woro cal jogi pa Luicrael dok bene pe camo lee me gitum ma gityero i Waŋ jogi. En pe balo dako pa lawote, dok bene pe bedo ki dako i kare ma noŋo dako-nu twoyo two kwer." 
Ezekiel18:7 En pe uno dano mo dok bene pe yako jami pa ŋat mo. En kwanyo jami ma labanyane ojeŋo bote dwoko cen bot labanyane; miyo kwon bot jo ma kec nekogi, dok bene miyo boŋŋi me aruka bot jo ma tye munero." 
Ezekiel18:8 En pe miyo lim me den wek enon iye magoba., En kwero timo gin marac ento ŋolo kop ki ada ki gen i kin dano." 
Ezekiel18:9 En Lubo cikka ducu dok bene gwokke twatwal kun tiyo gin ma an aciko ducu. En kite atir doŋ pi meno adada en bibedo kwo,” man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Pi meno ka gwok nyo en onywalo wode ma layak dok lanek dano bene, meno noŋo en otimo gin ma yam wonne pe otimo." 
Ezekiel18:11 En camo riŋo lee ma gityero i Waŋ jogi, dok bene balo dako pa lawote woko," 
Ezekiel18:12 En uno lucan ki jo ma piny obwoyogi, en yako jami pa dano, dok gwoko gin ma labanyane oketo bote macalo gi-jeŋ pe kwanyo dwoko cen bote. En woro cal jogi, dok bene timo gin me kwer ma pe wacce," 
Ezekiel18:13 en bene miyo lim me den kun noŋo mito ni enoŋ iye magoba. En tika bibedo kwo? Pe bibedo kwo. En doŋ otyeko timo gin me kwer magi ducu, pi meno en bito pigi. Alii me tone bibedo i wiye gire kene." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Koŋ iket ni dano-ni onywalo wode. Latin-nu neno kit bal ducu ma wonne otimo, ci bedo ki lworo, pe timo lakodi bal ma wonne otimo-ni." 
Ezekiel18:15 En pe woro cal jogi pa Luicrael, dok bene pe camo riŋo lee me gitum ma gityero i waŋ jogi. En pe balo dako pa lawote," 
Ezekiel18:16 pe timo ŋat mo marac, pe bene yako jami pa ŋat mo. En pe kwanyo gin mo me aketa macalo st-ieo kadi ki acel. En miyo kwon bot jo ma kec nekogi dok bene miyo boŋŋi me aruka bot jo ma tye munero." 
Ezekiel18:17 En kwero timo gin marac, pe miyo lim me den wek enoŋ iye magoba. En lubo cikka dok bene gwoko gin ma an aciko ducu kun tiyo bene. Pi meno en pe bito pi bal pa wonne; ento adada en gire bibedo kwo." 
Ezekiel18:18 Ento wonne bito pi balle; pien otimo tim me bura, dok oyako ominne bene, otimo gin ma pe nen maber wacel i kin lutugi." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Doŋ in ipenyo ni, ‘Piŋo latin pe myero onen can pi bal pa wonne?’ Lagam me peny man tye kit man ni, latin otiyo gin ma cik mito dok ma tye atir, dok bene ogwokke twatwal kun tiyo gin ma an aciko ducu. Adada en gire bibedo kwo." 
Ezekiel18:20 Ento dano ma timo bal bito mere. Latin pe bineno can pi bal pa wonne, kadi ki wego bene pe myero olim can pi bal pa wode, Dano ma kite atir gire bilimu bakacic pi gin ma tye atir ma en otiyo, ki latim marac bene bilimo can pi gin maraco maen otimo." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Ento ka dano ma latim marac olokke oweko timo bal ducu ma yam en otimo, ce olubo cikka kun tiyo gin ma cik mito dok ma tye atir, adada, en bibedo kwo; pe bito." 
Ezekiel18:22 Balle ducu ma yam en otimo an abiwekogi ducu, ci en bibedo kwo, pien otiyo gin ma tye atir.”" 
Ezekiel18:23 Rwot Lubaŋa openyo ni, “Hamo ni cwinya bedo yom me neno ka latim marac to? Pe gire, amito en oŋuti owek timo bal ci olokke odwog bota wek obed kwo." 
Ezekiel18:24 “Ento ka ce dano ma kite atir olokke oweko tiyo gin ma tye atir woko ce ocako timo bal, kun timo bene gin me kwer kit ma latim marac timo-ni, tika en bibedo kwo? Doŋ gin ma tye atir ducu ma en otimo pe gibipo pire kadi ki acel. En bito pi lok roro ki pi bal mapol ma en otimo." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Ento wunjo Icrael wuwacci, ‘Gin ma Rwot tye ka timone-ni pe atir.’ Ento pe gin ma wun wutimo-ni aye ma pe atir dok pe kakare?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Ka dano ma kite atir olokke oweko tiyo gin ma’ tye atir ce ocako timo bal, en bito pi ballenu. En bito pi bal ma doŋ otyeko timone." 
Ezekiel18:27 Ka dano ma latim marac oŋut i kom tim maraco ma en otimo ce olokke ocako tiyo gin ma cik mito dok ma tye atir, ci en bilaro kwone." 
Ezekiel18:28 Doŋ kit macalo en obedo ka lwodo lok ki i cwinye ci oŋut olokke oweko timo bal ducu ma yam obedo ka timogi, adada en bibedo kwo, pe bito." 
Ezekiel18:29 Ento wun jo Icrael pud wuwacci, ‘Gin ma Rwot tye ka timone-ni pe atir dok pe kakare.’ Wutamo ni gin ma atye ka timone pe atir dok pe kakare? Ento gin ma wun wutimo-ni aye ma pe atir dok pe kakare." 
Ezekiel18:30 “Pi meno abiŋolo kop i komwu, wun jo Icrael, aŋolo kop pa dano acel acel kun lubo gin ma en otimo. Wuŋuti ci wulokke wuwek timo bal, pe wuwek balwu otyekwu woko." 
Ezekiel18:31 Doŋ wuwek bal ducu ma yam wubedo ka timone i koma-ni, wucak doŋ bedo ki tam manyen dok ki cwiny manyen bene. Piŋo wun jo Icrael wumito ni wuto woko?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Pe amito ni dano mo oto,” man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco. “Wulokke wuwek timo bal wek wubed kwo.”" 
Ezekiel19:1 Wucak wer me kumo pi rwodi me Icrael," 
Ezekiel19:2 kun wuwero ni, Meni nene ubedo macalo minlabwor i kin lwak labwor! Obuto i kin litino labwor, kun pito litinone." 
Ezekiel19:3 Opito latinne acel ci opwonyo ki dwar; odoko wod labwor madit, ci obedo ka mako dano kun camogi woko." 
Ezekiel19:4 Rok mapol guwinyo pire ci gudoŋo oduru i kome; ci gukwinyo bur guweko en opoto iye. Gugole woko ki goli gukete I canduk ci gutere i lobo Ejipt," 
Ezekiel19:5 Ka minne doŋ oneno ni gibodo wiye noŋo, ma genne doŋ orwenyo woko, okwanyo latinne mukene oloko odoko wod labwor." 
Ezekiel19:6 I kare ma doŋ odoŋo, obedo ka wot kacel ki labwor mukene-gu. Opwonyo dwar kit me mako lee; ci obedo ka mako dano kun camogi woko." 
Ezekiel19:7 Oturo cel gogogi otyeko woko ducu, oketo gaŋigi woko ducu omiyo odoko wi obur; mumiyo jo ma gibedo i lobo ineno gubedo ki ur dok ki lworo madwoŋ, i kare ma noŋo en koko" 
Ezekiel19:8 Jo me rok ducu gucokke ka lweny i kome; guciko owic woko i kabedo ducu me make, guciko obwogi gurume kwede woko; ci opoto woko i bur ma gin gukwinyo," 
Ezekiel19:9 Gugole woko ki goli ci gukete i canduk, ci gutere woko wa bot kabaka me Babilon. Gutere gukete i ot mabuc, wek pe doŋ giwiny kokone matwal i wi godi me Icrael." 
Ezekiel19:10 Meni yam obedo calo yat olok ma gipito i poto olok ma tye i ŋet pii. Pi pii madwoŋ ma onoŋo tye, omiyo oketo jaŋe mapol dok onyak nyige mabup." 
Ezekiel19:11 Jaŋ olok man onoŋo gitego mada, mumiyo odoŋo ci odoko odoo ker pa luloc. Olok man odoŋo mabor adada ma wiye mito gudo polo. Dano ducu guneno kit ma pote oluk kwede ki kit ma borre onoŋo tye kwede." 
Ezekiel19:12 Ento giputo olok woko ki lwite ducu ki kiniga, ci gibolo woko i ŋom. Yamo oa ki wokceŋ, okodo, ci otwoyo nyige woko. Gituro jaŋe-gu woko ducu; gutwo ci giwaŋo woko ki mac," 
Ezekiel19:13 Kombeddi dok ginako dok gipito i tim aroo, i lobo mutwo ma pii pe iye," 
Ezekiel19:14 Mac omoko ci olyel woko i kor yat olok; mac owaŋo jaŋe ki nyige-gu woko ducu liweŋ, Jaŋe ducu doŋ pe bibedo tek doki, odoo ker pa laloc pe doŋ bibedo iye. Man wer me kumo ma gibedo ka werone kare ki kare," 
Ezekiel20:1 Ludoŋo mogo ki i kin ludoŋo pa io Icrael gubino ka penyo dog Rwot i nino dwe apar dwe me abic, i mwaka me abiro, ci gubino i nyima." 
Ezekiel20:2 Rwot oloko kweda kun wacci," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Wod pa dano, lok ki ludoŋo pa Icrael-li, kun iwaco botgi ni, Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, ‘Man wun wubino ka penyo doga bo? Kit macalo atye kwe-ni, pe wubipenyo doga. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco.’" 
Ezekiel20:4 “Wod pa dano, ibiŋolo kop i komgi? Ci doŋ iŋol kop i komgi. Po wigi i kom gin me kwer ma yam kwarogi gutimo." 
Ezekiel20:5 Tit botgi lok ma atye ka wacone-ni. I kare ma ayero Icrael, akwoŋo kwoŋ bot likwayo pa Yakobo. Anyutte botgi i lobo Ejipt, kun awaco botgi ni, ‘An a Rwot Lubaŋawu.’" 
Ezekiel20:6 I kare meno bene en aye acikke kwedgi ni abikwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt ci aterogi i lobo ma ayero pigi, lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic, ma en aye lobo me deyo adada makato 1000 mukene-gu ducu," 
Ezekiel20:7 Awaco botgi bene ni gubol cal jogi me kwer ma gimaro-gu woko, dok ni pe myero gubal komgi ki lubaŋa mogo me gobagoba pa jo Ejipt, pien an aye a Rwot Lubaŋagi." 
Ezekiel20:8 Ento gin gujemo i koma gukwero winyo lokka. Gin ducu pe gubolo cal jogigi me kwer ma gimaro-gu woko dok bene pe gubwoto woro lubaŋa pa jo Ejipt me gobagoba-ni, “Mumiyo atamo ni onoŋo myero aony akemona i komgi dok ato kinigana woko i komgi ki i dye lobo Ejipt." 
Ezekiel20:9 Ento pe doŋ atimo gin ma onoŋo atamo ni abitimo-ni, pien meno onoŋo twero miyo pe giworo nyiŋa, miyo bene gipyedo nyina i kin lurok ka ma onoŋo jo Icrael gibedo iye; pien yam aloko bot jo Icrael ki i nyim jo ma gin gibedo i kingi ni abikwanyo jo Icrael ki i lobo Ejipt akelogi woko." 
Ezekiel20:10 “Kit meno akwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt ci akelogi wa i dye tim. 
Ezekiel20:11 Amiyogi cikka dok anyuto botgi gin ma an aciko ducu, kun noŋo ŋat ma gwoko cikka aye bedo kwo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Amiyo botgi ceŋ cabit ni gin gugwoki, ma en aye lanyut ma tye i kin an ki gin, wek guŋe ni an Rwot aye ma alonyogi miyo gibedo maleŋ," 
Ezekiel20:13 Ento jo Icrael gujemo woko i koma ki i tim, pe gulubo cikka dok bene gukwero tiyo gin ma an aciko ducu, kun noŋo ŋat ma gwoko cikka aye bedo kwo. Gupyedo cabitta woko marac adada. “Mumiyo atamo ni onoŋo myero aony akemona woko i komgi ki i dye tim, wek atyekgi woko liweŋ matwal." 
Ezekiel20:14 Ento pe doŋ atimo gin ma onoŋo atamo ni abitimo-ni, meno onoŋo twero miyo pe giworo nyiŋa, miyo bene gipyedo nyiŋa i kin lurok kun an akwanyo jo Icrael ki i lobo Ejipt akelogi woko ma gin bene gineno-ni." 
Ezekiel20:15 Dok bene yam akwoŋo kwoŋ botgi ki i tim ni pe doŋ abiterogi i lobo ma onoŋo doŋ atveko miyone botgi, lobo ma mol cak ki moo kic, ma en lobo me deyo adada makato lobo mukene-gu ducu." 
Ezekiel20:16 Akwoŋo kwoŋ pien onoŋo gukwero lubo cikka, dok bene pe gubedo ka tiyo gin ma an aciko ducu, gupyedo cabitta bene. Gumaro gigi woro cal jogigi." 
Ezekiel20:17 Ento kica omaka i komgi, Pe anekogi woko dok bene pe atyekogi woko ki i tim kunnu," 
Ezekiel20:18 Awaco bot litino ni, ‘Pe wulub cik ma yam kwarowu guketo; pe wulub kitgi, dok bene pe wubal komwu ki cal jogigi-ni," 
Ezekiel20:19 An Rwot aye Lubaŋawu. Wulub cikka dok bene wugwokke kun wutiyo gin ma an aciko ducu. 
Ezekiel20:20 Wugwok cen cabitta obed nino maleŋ, wek obed lanyut me cikke ma waketo i kin an ki wun, wuŋe ni an aye a Rwot Lubaŋawu.’" 
Ezekiel20:21 “Ento litinogi gujemo woko i koma; pe gulubo cikka dok bene pe gugwokke me tiyo gin ma an aciko ducu, kun noŋo ŋat ma gwoko cikka aye bedo kwo. Gupyedo cabitta woko. Mumiyo atamo ni onoŋo myero aony akemona i komgi dok ata kinigana woko i komgi ki i dye tim." 
Ezekiel20:22 Ento ajuko ciŋa, pe doŋ atimo gin ma onoŋo atamo ni abitimo-ni, meno noŋo twero miyo pe giworo nyiŋa, miyo bene gipyedo nyiŋa i kin lurok, ka ma an akwanyo jo Icrael ki i lobo Ejipt akelogi woko ma gin bene gineno-ni," 
Ezekiel20:23 Dok bene akwoŋo kwoŋ mukene ki i tim ni abiketogi woko i kin lurok, akeyogi wako i wi lobo ducu." 
Ezekiel20:24 Atimo man pien gukwero lubo cikka dok bene gukwero tiyo gin ma an aciko ducu, gupyedo cabitta, dok gubedo ka woro cal jogi ma yam kwarogi guworo-ni," 
Ezekiel20:25 Lacen dok amiyo botgi cik maraco kun acikogi ki kit cik mogo ma pe twero miyo dano bedo kwo. 
Ezekiel20:26 Amiyo gubalo komgi ki mot mapatpat ma gityero bot cal jogi, dok bene amiyo gutyero litino kayogi ma co calo gitum awaŋa, Atimo man pi miyogi lworo madwoŋ ki pi keto can i komgi; wek guŋe ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Mumiyo kombeddi doŋ in wod pa dano, lok ki jo Icrael kun itito lok ma atye ka wacone botgi, Yo mukene ma yam kwarogi guŋayo kwede waŋa en aye ni yam gutiyo gin ma pe atir i koma." 
Ezekiel20:28 Akelogi i lobo ma yam onoŋo acikke ni abimiyo botgi. I kare ma guneno cere ki yadi ma potgi oluk i kabedo ducu, ci gutyero gitum woko ducu kunnu. Guŋeto cwinya oweko kiniga omaka pi gitum awanagi ma guwaŋo, ki pi gityer amata ma gukelo guonyo kunnu-ni," 
Ezekiel20:29 Apenyogi ni, ‘Waŋ jogi magi ma wucito iye-ni gin gin aŋo?’ Mumiyo nyiŋe gilwoŋo ni Bama nio wa onyoo," 
Ezekiel20:30 Kombeddi doŋ itit lok ma an atye ka wacone-ni bot jo Icrael. Piŋo wumito ni wutim lakit bal acel ma yam kwarowu gutimo-ni kun bene wuŋak woko wubedo ka woro cal jogi? 
Ezekiel20:31 Kadi bed wa i kare man pud wutyero lakit mot acel-lu dok bene wutyero awobewu i wi mac me gitum awaŋa, mumiyo wubalo komwu kekenwu pi woro cal iogiwu-gu ducu. Wun jo Icrael pud dok wubibino ka penyo doga? Kit macalo atye kwe-ni, pe wubipenyo doga. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel20:32 Doŋ wutyeko moko tamwu eoko kun wumito wubed calo jo me rok mukene, wumito wubed calo jo me kaka ducu ma tye i wi lobo ducu, wek wuwor yadi ki godi, ento meno pe bitimme matwal.’" 
Ezekiel20:33 “Kit macalo atye kwe-ni, abilwenyo i komwu ki tekona ducu, ki akemona ma aonyo woko i komwu, ci doŋ abibedo kabaka ma loyowu. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel20:34 Abinyuto twerona botwu kun aonyo akemona woko i komwu ka acokowu woko ducu ki i kin lurok ma i wi lobo ducu ka ma yam gikeyowu wucito iye, ci akelowŋ aketowu kacel." 
Ezekiel20:35 Abikelowu i tim pa lurok, ka doŋ abiŋolo kop i komwu ki kunnu waŋ ki waŋ," 
Ezekiel20:36 Kit macalo yam aŋolo kop i kom kwarowu i dye tim i lobo Ejipt, abiŋolo kop i komwu bene kit meno.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Abimiyo wukato ki acel acel ki te odoo ker ma giriyo, abimiyo wugwoko gicikke ma aketo kwedwu." 
Ezekiel20:38 Abikwanyo jo ma gin lujemo ki jo ma gin lutim bal i koma woko ki i kinwu. Abikwanyogi akelogi woko ki i lobo ka ma yam gubedo ka wot iye macalo welo, ento pe gibidonyo i lobo pa jo Icrael. Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel20:39 Rwot Lubaŋa owacci, “Kombeddi doŋ wun jo Icrael, wun ducu wucit wuti giwu but cal jogiwu. Ento acikowu matek mada ni lacen i ŋe man myero doŋ wuwiny lokka, ma pe doŋ wupyedo nyiŋa maleŋ-ŋi matwal, dok pe doŋ wutyero motwu bot cal jogi bene.”" 
Ezekiel20:40 Rwot Lubaŋa owacci, “Wun jo Icrael ducu wubiwora ki kunnu i lobo meno, i wi got mera maleŋ, ki i wi got me lobo Icrael mabor-ri. Doŋ cwinya bibedo yom i komwu ki kunnu, ci abimito motwu, ki motwu mabeco makato ducu me gityer, ki gityerwu maleŋ." 
Ezekiel20:41 Lacen ka doŋ acokowu woko ducu ki i kin lurok ma i wi lobo ducu ka ma yam gikeyowu wucito iye akelowu aketowu kacel, abijolo gitum awaŋawu ma ŋwece kur me lakwe cwiny. Ci doŋ abinyutte botwu ni an aleŋ dok rok ducu gibineno man ki waŋgi." 
Ezekiel20:42 Ka doŋ akwanyowu adwokowu cen i lobo Icrael, en lobo ma yam akwoŋo pire ni abimiyo bot kwarowu-ni, ci wubineyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel20:43 Wubipo pi balwu ki gin ducu me kwer ma wutimo mumiyo wubalo komwu woko kekenwu. Wubibedo ki keccwiny i komwu kekenwu pi gin maraco me lewic ma wutimoni. 
Ezekiel20:44 Wun jo Icrael wubineyo ni an aye a Rwot, pien pe atiyo kwedwu kun lubo gin maraco ma wutimo, nyo muporo kitwu marac, ento atiyo kwedwu kun aawoko deyo me nyiŋa wek giwora.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa aye ma owaco." 
Ezekiel20:45 Rwot Lubaŋa oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel20:46 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, nen yo tuŋ acuc. Wac lok i kom kabedo ma tye yo tuŋ acuc, dok bene itit lok i kom lobo buŋa me Negeb." 
Ezekiel20:47 Wac ki buŋa me Negeb owiny gin ma Rwot tye ka wacone ni, Nen, abemoko mac, ci abiwaŋo yadi mutwo ki yadi madyak ducu woko ki i in! Gin mo ma bineko leb mac man ma lyel-li pe. Mac man biwaŋ nya cakke ki yo tuŋ acuc o kwede wa yo tuŋ acam ci waŋo kabedo ducu." 
Ezekiel20:48 Dano ducu gibineno ni an Rwot aye ma acwinyo mac man wek ŋat mo pe onek woko.” 
Ezekiel20:49 Ci awacci, “Rwot Lubaŋa, dano ducu giwaco lok i koma ni, ‘Piŋo en bedo ka lok kwedgi i carolok me koc-lit kare ducu?’ ”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel21:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, cik waŋi inen Jerucalem ci itit lok mukemo kabedone ducu maleŋ ka ma dano giworo iye Lubaŋa-ni, Tit lok bene mukemo lobo Icrael." 
Ezekiel21:3 Wac bot dano ducu ma gibedo i lobo Icrael ni, an a Rwot awacci, ‘At ye ki lok i komwu. Abiwoto pala lucwanna woko ki i akurane, ci anekowu woko ducu, jo ma kitgi atir ki jo ma gin lutim maraco ducu." 
Ezekiel21:4 Doŋ ka atiyo man, abitic ki pala lucwanna kun anekowu woko ducu, jo ma kitgi atir ki jo ma gin lutim maraco, cakke ki yo tuŋ acam o kwede wa yo tuŋ acuc." 
Ezekiel21:5 Dano ducu gibiŋeyo ni an a Rwot doŋ awoto pala lucwanna woko ki i akurane; pe doki gibidwoko i akurane matwal.’ 
Ezekiel21:6 “Wod pa dano, cur calo cwinyi mito dem kun noŋo gen mito rwenyo woko. Cur ki keccwiny madit mada i kabedo ka ma jo ducu twero neni." 
Ezekiel21:7 Ka inen dano gupenyi ni piŋo it ye ka cur, ci itit botgi ni pi lok man ma mito timme-ni. Tit botgi ni ka inen lok man bitimme cwinygi bipoŋ ki lworo. Ciŋgi bikwe woko doko goro. Tekcwiny ma yam gitye kwede bitum wako. Coŋgi bene bibedo ka myel amyela calo pii ma tagge. Nen, kare doŋ obino woko; lok man doŋ bicobbe kakare.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel21:8 Rwot owacca ni," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Wod pa dano, tit lokka. Tit lok ma an atye ka waconeni bot dano ni, ‘Palalucwan, palalucwan doŋ gipako lake woko mabit, dok bene gijwayo kome olil woko maber." 
Ezekiel21:10 Gipako lake mabit me neko dano, gijwayo ni wek omeny calo lutkot. Ŋat mo ma twero jukone pe; pien wun doŋ wukwero winyo tamma ma amiyo botwu." 
Ezekiel21:11 Doŋ gimiyo pala Lucwan gitye ka rudone, wek doŋ obed maber ma giromo makone. Doŋ gipako lake woko mabit dok bene gijwayo kome woko wek doŋ gimi woko i ciŋ lanek dano." 
Ezekiel21:12 Wod pa dano, daŋŋe matek kun ikok kwede, pala lucwan man gimiyo pi neko jona, ki pi neko rwodi ducu me Icrael. Gibinekogi woko kacel ki jona ma gudonne-gu ducu. Mumiyo myero idoŋ emi pi gen ma doŋ orwenyo woko!’" 
Ezekiel21:13 “Man gitye ka temowu atema. Ento ka pud wumedde ki kwero winyo tam ma gimiyo botwu, ci doŋ wutamo ni gin ma kit magi pe bitimme?” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma openyo." 
Ezekiel21:14 “Kombeddi doŋ, wod pa dano, tit lokka. Doŋ ciŋi, ci pala lucwan bibino piny kiryo nyo kidek. Man pala lucwan ma neko mere dano, pala lucwan ma miyo lworo dok ma neko dano tyeko woko ducu." 
Ezekiel21:15 Pala lucwan man miyo tekcwiny pa jona rwenyo woko, ki Jo mapol gibipoto i dog gaŋi ducu. Doŋ atyeko miyo pala lucwan ma mil amila; gijwayo meny calo lutkot ma wil, doŋ gityeko rudone woko bene pi neko dano." 
Ezekiel21:16 Ŋol tuŋ acuc ki tuŋ acam, in pala lucwan mabit-ti!" 
Ezekiel21:17 Ci an bene abidoŋo ciŋa, kinigana doŋ bitum woko. An Rwot ‘doŋ aloko.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Rwot doki oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel21:19 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, pur yo aryo ka ma kabaka me Babilon bibino ki iye ki pala lucwanne. Gin yo aryo ducu gia ki i lobo acel-lu, Doŋ icib bao aryo me lanyut yo i agikki yo ma cito ka donyo i gaŋ." 
Ezekiel21:20 Lanyut acel binyuto yo ma cito i Raba ma en aye gaŋ pa jo Ammon, ki mukenene-ni binyuto yo ma cito i Juda, ma cidonyo wa i dye Jerucalem kikome ma girumo woko ki cel gogo matek-ki." 
Ezekiel21:21 Kabaka me Babilon ocuŋ i aŋaka ŋaka yo aryo ka ma gicibo iye bao me lanyut yo-ni. Kabaka ocuŋ kenyo ka tyeto tyet, wek enen yo mene ma myero elubi; oyeno atero-gu, ka openyo cal lubaŋane, ci oŋiyo cwiny lee ma gityero me gitum." 
Ezekiel21:22 Doŋ kwir ma en omako i ciŋe lacuc nyuto Jerucalem. Man tito bote me ŋamo doge me koko, ki me daŋŋe ki dwan me mony, me keto yat latwom cel orum gaŋ woko bene; ki toro cel lobo orum gaŋ woko." 
Ezekiel21:23 Man binen macalo tyet me goba ki tuŋ bot jo Jerucalem, pi kwoŋ maleŋ ma doŋ gukwoŋo-ni, Ento lok man opoyo wigi i kom balgi ci nyuto ni gibimakogi woko." 
Ezekiel21:24 Man aye gin ma an Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka wacone. Wumiyo gipo i kom balwu, mumiyo balwu ginyuto giyaro ka maleŋ. Dano ducu giŋeyo ni wubalo. Dok wunyuto balwu woko i gin ducu ma wutiyo. Doŋ atyeko ŋolo kop woko i komwu, pi meno abimiyowu woko i ciŋ lukworwu." 
Ezekiel21:25 “Ninoni tye ka bino, in latim marac, rwot marac ma loyo Icrael, en aye nino ma gibiketo iye can i komi me agikki." 
Ezekiel21:26 An Rwot doŋ aloko. Kwany lalukana ki kitambara labo wic woko ki i wii. Pe tye gin mo ducu ma bibedo kit macalo gitye kwede-ni. Abitiŋo lucan malo ka maber! Jo ma gitye ki twero me loc-ci gibidwokogi woko piny! 
Ezekiel21:27 Abimiyo gaŋ man doŋ doko wi obur, wi obur, wi obur! Ento gin man pud pe bitimme nio wan ma ŋat ma doŋ ayero me keto can i kom gaŋ-ŋi obino. Lubaŋa biŋolo kop i kom jo Ammon" 
Ezekiel21:28 “In wod pa dano, tit lok kun iwacci, Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ owaco lok mukemo jo Ammon, ki kit ma gitye kwede ka yeto jo Icrael. Wac botgi ni, ‘Pala lucwan, pala lucwan doŋ giyubo woko me neko dano; doŋ gijwayo woko tye ka meny amenya calo lutkot ma wil.’" 
Ezekiel21:29 Tit bot jo Ammon ni ginanyuta ma gineno i waŋ lek-gu ducu goba, dok bene gityeto tyet me’ goba me bwologi. Ninogi tye ka bino, gin jo maraco, en aye nino ma gibiketo iye can i komgi me agikki, Gibiŋolo ŋutgi woko ki pala lucwan." 
Ezekiel21:30 “Dwok pala lucwan i akura kakare. Abiŋolo kop i komi i kabedo ka ma yam kwoni ocakke iye, i lobo ka ma yam ginywali iye." 
Ezekiel21:31 Abionyo kinigana i komi; dok bene abikuto mac me akemona i komi miyo iwinyo arem malit twatwal. Abimiyi woko i ciŋ jo mager ma gin lutim bwami marac ma giŋeyo neko dano twatwal, ci gibineki woko," 
Ezekiel21:32 Gibiwani woko ki mac. Gibineki woko i lobowu kikome, pi meno ŋat mo ma bipo piri doŋ bedo pe matwal. Pien an Rwot doŋ atyeko loko.”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Rwot dok oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel22:2 Owacci, “In wod pa dano, in tika iyubbe me ŋolo kop i kom gaŋ man ma opoŋ ki lunek mapol twatwal-li? Tit bot jo Jerucalem gin me kwer ducu ma doŋ gutyeko timone-ni." 
Ezekiel22:3 Wac botgi ni, Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Aya, doŋ wutyeko neko jo mapol ma gibedo i gaŋ man, dok bene doŋ wubalo komwu kekenwu pi woro cal jogi, pi meno karewu tye ka bino." 
Ezekiel22:4 Doŋ wutiŋo alii pi dano ma wunekoni, dok bene komwu oballe woko pi cal jogi ma wutiyogi-ni; mumi yo doŋ wudiro niŋowu onyiko cok, kare me mwakawu ma giciko doŋ oo pi meno amiyo wudoko ginacaya bot lurok ducu, ki ginaŋala bot jo me lobo ducu." 
Ezekiel22:5 Jo ma gitye cok kwedwu ki jo ma gitye ka maboco ducu gibinalowu, wun lo ma nyinwu doŋ oballe woko, ma tye ka koko licur-ri." 
Ezekiel22:6 Nen, rwodi ducu me Icrael ma gitye i gaŋ man, gigene tekogi ci gibedo ka neko dano." 
Ezekiel22:7 Pe tye ŋat mo i gaŋ man ma woro lunyodone Gibedo ka uno labedo; dok gitime litino kic ki monto marac twatwal 
Ezekiel22:8 Gubedo ka cayo jamina maleŋ-gu dok bene gupyedo cen cabitta. 
Ezekiel22:9 Tye jo mogo i kinwu ma giloko lok me toŋo dano wek ginek woko. Jo mukneu i kinwu gicamo cam ma gityero bot cal jogi i waŋ jogi ma tye i wi godi. Gitime tim kipyeda twatwal i dye gaŋ. 
Ezekiel22:10 Dano gibedo ki megigi ki ci-wegigi i Jeruca lem; dok bene gidiyo mon i kare ma noŋo gitwoyo two kwer tetek ci gibutu kwedgi. 
Ezekiel22:11 Gitimo gin me kwer bene kun gitimo abor ki mon pa luwotgi Jo mukene gitimo tim kipyeda i koo ci-wodgi, ki jo mukene gibalo k lumegigi ima anyira pa wegtgi kikome" 
Ezekiel22:12 jo mogo gineko dano pi lim ma noŋo giculogi kwede jo mukene limo magobi madwoŋ, ki noŋo lim mukene pi yako jami pa luwotgi tektek; mumiyo wigi doŋ owil woko i koma.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel22:13 “Nen, pi meno doŋ abiŋino Ciŋi me lweny i kom jo Jerucalem pi magoba ma gulimo i yo ma pe atir-ri, ki dok bene pi lok me neko dano ma wubedo ka nekogi i dye gaŋ man." 
Ezekiel22:14 Tika wubibedo ki tekcwiny me ciro lweny` ki ciŋwu kono bibedo tek ma romo lweny i nino ma abilweny iye i komwu’ An Rwot doŋ atyeko loko, dok bene abitiyo."
