Ezekiel22:15 Abikeyowu woko i kin lurok, dok amiyo wuket i wi lobo ducu ci doŋ abityeko tim marac woko Iiweŋ ki i gaŋ man." 
Ezekiel22:16 Nyiŋwu biballe ma lurok ducu gineno; ci man bimiyo in Jerucalem iŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.” 
Ezekiel22:17 Rwot owacca ni," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Wod pa dano jo Icrael doŋ gudoko gin ma konygi pe ki tuŋ bota. Gin ducu gudoko calo cet nyonyo, ryal, mola, koc, nyonyo ki racac mapek ma gitye ka liyone i ruk mac." 
Ezekiel22:19 Pi meno Rwot Lubaŋa owac kuman ni, Doŋ kit macalo wudoko cet ryal-li, pi meno, wunen abicokowu agurowu woko kacel i dye gaŋ me Jerucalem." 
Ezekiel22:20 Kit macalo dano coko ryal, mola, nyonyo, ki nyonyo racac mapek ki koc ci ketogi i ruk mac ci kuto mac i kome wek oleny woko, kit meno bene an abicokowu woko ki kinigana kacel ki akemona, ci abiketowu i mac ci alenyowu woko." 
Ezekiel22:21 Abicokowu ci akuto mac me akemona i komwu, ci wubileny woko i dye gaŋ." 
Ezekiel22:22 Kit macalo gilenyo ryal i ruk mac, wun bene gibilenyowu woko i dye gaŋ kumeno; ci wubiŋeyo ni an Rwot doŋ aonyo akemona woko i komwu.”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Rwot dok oloko kweda," 
Ezekiel22:24 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, tit ki jo Icrael ni gin jo ma pe leŋ, dok jo ma kot pe ocwer i komgi i kare me kinigana," 
Ezekiel22:25 Rwodigi ducu gicalo labwor ma kok kun tye ka kilo riŋo lee ma en omako. Guneko dano gutyeko woko; guyako lonyo kacel ki jami me wel-gu ducu. Gumiyo mon mapol gudoko mon-to i dye gaŋ me Jerucalem. 
Ezekiel22:26 Ajwagigi ducu gukwero lubo cikka, dok bene gupyedo jamina maleŋ-gu woko. Pe guketo nipoko i kin jami maleŋ ki jami me nino ducu. Pe bene gupwonyo dano ki nipoko ma tye i kin gin ma keni ki gin ma pe keni, dok bene pe gubedo ka gwoko cen cabitta, meno omiyo gitye ka pyeda i kin jona," 
Ezekiel22:27 Rwodi ma gitye i Jerucalem ducu gicalo orudi ma tye ka kilo riŋo lee ma gumako, ma gioyo remo pa dano, kun gineko dano woko liweŋ wek ginoŋ magoba i yo ma pe atir." 
Ezekiel22:28 Lunebigi bene gubedo ka buko cel woko ki rani matar, ma gineno bene ginanyuta me gobagoba, dok bene gityeto botgi tyet me goba keken kun giwacci, ‘Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman,’ ma kun noŋo Rwot gire pe oloko lok mo." 
Ezekiel22:29 Jo me lobo man doŋ gunyebbe ki timo buma ci giyako jami pa dano woko. Guuno lucan kacel ki jo ma piny obwoyogi, kun gibumo lurok ma gibedo i kingi marac twatwal." 
Ezekiel22:30 Onoŋo abedo ka yenyo dano mo ma myero oger cel mupoto-ni kun cuŋ i nyima ka mubar-ri pi lobo man, wek pe ajwer woko; ento pe amedo ki noŋo ŋat mo wacel." 
Ezekiel22:31 Pi meno omiyo aonyo kinigana woko i komgi; awanogi woko ki mac me ake-mo, ci aculo kwor i komgi pi gin ducu ma yam gutimo.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel23:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel23:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, yam tye mon aryo, ma gin anyira ma megigi acel." 
Ezekiel23:3 I kare ma onoŋo gin pud litino anyira, ma gibedo i Ejipt, gubedo ka timo tim kwele kwele; dano gibedo ka kwako korgi kun gimako tunogi ma ogulo-gu," 
Ezekiel23:4 Nyako maditte-ni onoŋo gilwoŋo nyiŋe ni Okola, ki laminne onoŋo nyiŋe gilwoŋo Okoliba. Anyomogi gudoko monna ici gunywalo litino co ki litino anyira. Okola aye Camaria, ki Okoliba aye Jerucalem." 
Ezekiel23:5 Okola otimo tim kwele kwele ma kun an doŋ anyome woko, ci cwinye omaro jo Aciria twatwal," 
Ezekiel23:6 ma lulweny ma guruko boŋo ma obedo lamar lamar, luloc me dul lobo ki ludito wi mony, gin ducu awobe mabeco ma ginen mwonya mada; gin wegi aguragura ma giriŋo ki aguragura." 
Ezekiel23:7 En omine kene ka timo tim kwele kwele kwedgi, gin oyita lweny me Aciria ma giyerogi ayera. Ci obalo kome, woko kekene ki woro cal jogi pa jo ducu ma en omarogi-ni." 
Ezekiel23:8 En yam pe oweko timo tim me malayane-ni ma en obedo ka timone ki i Ejipt i kare ma pud en nyako; co gubuto kwede gukwako kore gunyono tunone mugulo-ni, kun gutyeko mitigi woko i kome calo gubedo ki malaya," 
Ezekiel23:9 Pi meno, amiye i ciŋ pacoge, i ciŋ jo Aciria ma en omarogi-ni." 
Ezekiel23:10 Jo meno guweke odoŋ munero, gumako awobene ki’ anyirane; ento en guneke woko ki pala Lucwan. Ci odoko lok aboka i kin mon, i kare ma doŋ giŋolo kop woko i kome." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Laminne Okoliba oneno tim man, ento en dok onoŋo rac atika makato laminne Okola i marre ki i tim kwele kwelene, ma doŋ obedo rac ma okato pa laminne woko." 
Ezekiel23:12 En omaro jo Aciria luloc me dul lobo ki ludito wi mony, lulweny ma gurukke woko ki jami lweny ducu, wegi aguragura, ma giriŋo ki aguragura, gin ducu awobe mabeco ma ginen mwonya mada." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ci aneno en doŋ oballe woko, gin anyira aryo ducu gubedo ka timo tim kwele acel-lu," 
Ezekiel23:14 Ento en obedo ka medde ameda ki tim kwele kwelene-ni; ci oneno cal co ma gigoro i kom ot, ki cal lubaŋa pa jo Kaldaya ma gidero woko ki raŋi makwar," 
Ezekiel23:15 ma gutweyo pyergi ki del, ma gin ducu guboyo wigi woko ki kitambara maboco me boyo wic; gin ducu ginen calo jo ma tye ki rwom me tic madito; meno obedo cal pa jo Babilon ma lobogi kikome aye Kaldaya." 
Ezekiel23:16 Cutcut i kare ma en onenogi cwinye ocako pyette i komgi, ci ooro lukwena gucito hotgi i Kaldaya." 
Ezekiel23:17 Ci jo Babilon gubino bote gubuto kwede i wi kitanda me mar, gubale woko ki tim me abor ma gutimo i kome, lacen ma doŋ gimiyo en onyobbe woko ki bal, ci en olokke woko ki botgi ma onoŋo cwinye ocido woko marac twatwal." 
Ezekiel23:18 I kare ma en omedde ki tim kwele kwelene-ni kun timo atyer ka maleŋ ma bene onoŋo bedo munero, an bene alokke woko ki bote ma cwinya ocido woko, kit macalo alokke woko ki bot laminne-ni." 
Ezekiel23:19 Ento en pud omedde ameda ki tim me malayane, kun po pi kare ma onoŋo en pud nyako, i kare ma en obedo ka timo tim malayane i lobo Ejipt-ni." 
Ezekiel23:20 Ci cwinye opyette i kom co ma gimaro tim kwele kwele, ma komgi me co obedo calo pa kana, ma pig komgi bene obedo calo pa aguragura." 
Ezekiel23:21 Kit meno in Okoliba ibedo ka yenyo tim me tarwaŋ ma itimo ka tinoni, i kare ma jo Ejipt gukwako kori ci gunyoŋo tunoni ma onoŋo pud ogulo agula-ni." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Nen, mumiyo an Rwot Lubaŋa awaco boti in Okoliba, kuman ni, cwinyi doŋ ocido woko i kom pacogi ma yam imarogi-ni, abekelogi i komi, kun gia ki i kabedo ducu murumi:" 
Ezekiel23:23 jo Babilon ki jo Kaldaya ducu, jo Pekod, jo Coa ki jo Koa, ki jo Aciria ducu kacel kwedgi. Gin ducu awobe mabeco ma ginen mwonya mada, luloc me dul lobo ki ludito wi mony, ludito ki lulweny, gin ducu onoŋo giriŋo ki aguragura." 
Ezekiel23:24 Ci gibibino i komi, ki yo tuŋ acam ki gadigadi lweny ki gadigadi ma otino vec, ki lwak mony. Gibirumi woko dyere ki kwot ocal ki kwot bani ki otaŋ nyonyo, doŋ abimiyogi twer me ŋolo kop i komi kit macalo ŋolo kopgi tye kwede." 
Ezekiel23:25 Abimiyo kinigana kemi, wek gutwe-nyi malit. Gibiŋolo umi ki iti woko, ka doŋ i agikkine gibineki woko ki pala lucwan. Gibimako litino awobeni ki litino anyirani ci giwaŋogi woko makwo ki mac." 
Ezekiel23:26 Gibilunyo boŋo woko ki i komi ci gikwanyo jamini mabeco me wel-gu woko. 
Ezekiel23:27 Doŋ an abigiko tim kipyeda ki tim kwele kwele ma ikelo ki i Ejipt-ni woko. Pe ibineno jo Ejipt dok bene pe doŋ ibipo pigi matwal.” 
Ezekiel23:28 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Nen, abimiyi woko i ciŋ jo ma idaggi-ni, i ciŋ jo ma ilokke ki botgi ma cwinyi ocidc woko." 
Ezekiel23:29 Kit macalo gidagi-ni gibimayo jamini ma itiyo tic pire-gu woko ducu, ci gibiweki idoŋ munero, nono laboŋo gin mo; gibinyuti woko ka maleŋ i waŋ dano ma noŋo itye munero calo malaya, Tim kipyedani ki tim kwele kweleni" 
Ezekiel23:30 aye ma okelo can man i komi, pien itimo abor ki lurok, ci inyebo komi woko ki cal jogigi." 
Ezekiel23:31 In doŋ ilubo kit lameru, pi meno abiketo can acel-lu ma aketo i kemo-ni i komi.”" 
Ezekiel23:32 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Ibimato kikopo pa lameru kikopone lac dok iye tut. Dano binyeri kun gicayi acaya, pien kikoponi opoŋ woko ligwik." 
Ezekiel23:33 Ibimer woko ci ibedo ki cwercwiny, pien kikopo me lworo ki balle pa piny, en aye kikopo pa lameru Camaria." 
Ezekiel23:34 Ibimato gin ma i i kikopo ci icwiyo ducu, ibiputo yet wii, ka doŋ ibiŋolo tunoni ki ŋinyoŋinyo kikopo ma oto-ni. Pien an Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ atyeko loko.”" 
Ezekiel23:35 Pi meno Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Kit macalo wii doŋ owil woko i koma, dok bene doŋ ityeko bola woko yo ŋeyi, pi meno myero doŋ icir gin mua ki i tim kipyedani ki tim kwele kweleni.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Rwot owaco bota ni, “Wod pa dano, tika ibiŋolo kop i kom Okola ki Okoliba? Ci tuc botgi gin me kwer ducu ma gin gutimo." 
Ezekiel23:37 Gubedo ka timo abor dok bene guneko dano, gutimo abor ki cal jogigi-ni, dok bene litino awobegi ma gin kikomgi gunywalo kweda gutyero woko bot cal jogi me bedo camgi." 
Ezekiel23:38 Medo i kom meno gin dok gutimo gin magi: gubalo kabedona maleŋ i nino acel, dok bene gupyedo ceŋ cabitta." 
Ezekiel23:39 Ka doŋ guneko litinogi me gitum ci gutyero bot cal jogigi, en i nino acel-lu gua gubino kwede i kabedona maleŋ ci gupyedo woko. Doŋ inen, man aye gin ma gutimo i oda." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Gin bene gucwalo lukwena bot jo ma tye ka mabor ni gubin, ci nen, gubino. Ilwoko komi woko pigi, ka iwiro waŋi, dok bene idero komi woko ki ruk me deyo," 
Ezekiel23:41 Ci ibedo i wi kitanda me deyo, kun meja bene doŋ giketo ka kenyo ma gipeto kitambara maber woko i wiye, ci iketo iye odok ecetana ki moona." 
Ezekiel23:42 Woo pa lwak dano ma gutoyo tokgi ata onoŋo owinnye bote, io ma gubedo ka wo-ni onoŋo lumero me nino ducu-ni ma gikelogi ki i tim aroo. Guketo ogul i ŋut ciŋ mon, ki lalukana mabeco atika gurwako i wigi," 
Ezekiel23:43 Ka doŋ awacci, Co pe gitye ka timo abor ki dako ma doŋ oti oloc woko ma oŋiyo woko ki’ tim kwele kwele-ni?" 
Ezekiel23:44 Pien gucito bote gubedo kwede, kit macalo co gicito bot dako ma malaya ci gibedo kwede-ni, Kit meno bene gucito bot Okola ki Okoliba ka timo tim kipyeda." 
Ezekiel23:45 Ento jo ma kitgi atir biŋolo kop i kom gin mon ma lutim abor ki mon ma lunek dano-gu, pien gutimo abor kun gineko dano bene.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Kel mony obin olweny i komgi wek komgi omyel ki lworo madwoŋ dok giyakgi woko," 
Ezekiel23:47 Ci mony bicelogi ki gweŋ dok gibitonogi woko ki pala lucwan, gibineko awobegi ki anyiragi woko, kun bene giwaŋo odigi woko ki mac." 
Ezekiel23:48 Doŋ abityeko tim me tarwaŋ woko ki i lobo man, wek mon ducu guwiny cik ma acikowu kwede, pe gutim tim me tarwan kit macalo wun doŋ wutimoni." 
Ezekiel23:49 Abiketo can i komwu wun lumego aryo-ni pi timwu me tarwaŋ, dok bene wubilimo can malit pi balwu marac atika pi woro cal jogi, Ci doŋ wubineyo ni an aye a Rwot Lubaŋa.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Rwot oloko kweda i nino dwe apar, dwe me apar, i mwaka me aboŋwen." 
Ezekiel24:2 Owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, co nyiŋ nino matin-ni woko, en nino matin-ni kikome. Kabaka me Babilon doŋ otyeko rumo Jerucalem woko i nino man kikome." 
Ezekiel24:3 Tuc lok man woko atyer i lok abola i carolok bot jo ma lujemo kun iwaco botgi ni, Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Cib agulu i mac, cib i mac, ony iye pii bene;" 
Ezekiel24:4 ket iye riŋo ma giŋolo woko matino, ket riŋo ducu mabecone, riŋo em ki riŋo kwaya gwok, ket iye cogo mabeco ma iyero ayera wek opoŋ woko," 
Ezekiel24:5 Kwany riŋo romo maberre ki i kin romi luwotgi, ci irwak yen ma giŋunogi i dul dul i te agulu; ci ited riŋo ma iketo iye-ni, dok bene ited cogone iye.”" 
Ezekiel24:6 Pien Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ owaco kuman ni, “Can i wi gaŋ ma opoŋ ki remo, ki agulu ma nyal omako, ma nyalle bene pe twero kwannye ki iye! Kwany riŋo ma giŋido-ni woko ki iye ki acel acel, kun pe iyero ayera." 
Ezekiel24:7 Pien remo dano ma ginekogi i dye gaŋ-ŋi pud tye iye; remone oo wa i kom got bene, pe gineko dano i ŋom ka ma remogi onoŋo gitwero umone woko ki putu." 
Ezekiel24:8 Pi tugo akemona wek acul kwor, omiyo aketo remo dano ma en oneko-ni i kom got, wek pe gium woko.”" 
Ezekiel24:9 Pi meno Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Can i wi gaŋ ma opoŋ ki remo! An bene aye ma abiduro yen me tedo madit." 
Ezekiel24:10 Dok ican yen, ci imok mac, ci ited riŋo woko maber, ka doŋ iony pige woko wek cogo owaŋ." 
Ezekiel24:11 Lacen doŋ iket i wi lodi mac ma iye tye noŋo, wek olyetti, wek molane owaŋ woko, wek cilo ma tye iye bene oleny woko, ki nyalle bene owarre otum woko." 
Ezekiel24:12 Abedo ka olo koma noŋo, mac pe twero kwanyo nyal mapek ma tye iye-ni." 
Ezekiel24:13 Nyal meno ma tye iye-ni en aye tim macol me tarwaŋ ma wubedo ka timone, wun io Jerucalem. Onoŋo kono alonyowu wudoko maleŋ, ento pe doŋ gilonyowu i kom timwu macol, pe doŋ wubilonnye matwal nio waŋ ma atoyo akemona mager-ri woko i komwu kit macalc amito." 
Ezekiel24:14 An Rwot doŋ atyeko loko man; ka ce kare oromo, abitiyo, Pe abidok cen ki ŋeya, kica pe bimaka, dok bene pe abiŋuti kun alubo kitwu ki gin ma wutimo; ento abiŋolo kop i komwu,” man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel24:15 Rwot dok oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel24:16 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, nen, doŋ acok kwanyo ŋat ma yomo cwinyi ma nenone miti-ni woko ki boti kun adoni kicel keken. Ento pe ibikumo, pe ibikok, dok bene pig waŋi pe bimol cito piny lipyaa." 
Ezekiel24:17 Pe icur matek, ento cur laliŋliŋ; pe ikum pi dano muto. Twe kitambarani i wii, ci iruk warri i tyeni, pe ium dogi, pe bene icam kwon pa jo ma tye ka kumo.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Kit meno aloko bot lwak i odiko, ci oo otyeno dakona oto woko. Orwone odiko atiyo kit macalo-onoŋo gicika kwede," 
Ezekiel24:19 Ci lwak gupenya ni, “Pe itwero tito: botwa tyen lok me gin magi piwa, mumiyo in itiyo gin macalo man-ni?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Ci awaco botgi ni, “Rwot oloko kweda ci owacca ni" 
Ezekiel24:21 atit lok ma en eloko-ni botwu, wun io Icrael, Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, ‘Nen, abipyedo kabedona maleŋ-ŋi woko, ma en aye tekowu ma wutye ka wakke pire, ma wumaro nenone, dok ma yomo cwinywu twatwal-li. Doŋ awobewu ki anyirawu ma wuwekogi i ŋewu i Jerucalem-mi gibinekogi woko ki pala lucwan." 
Ezekiel24:22 Wubitiyo kit macalo an doŋ atyeko tiyone-ni; pe wubiumo dogwu, dok bene pe wubicamo kwon pa jo ma tye ka kumo." 
Ezekiel24:23 Wiwu bibedo atweya ki kitambara ki war bene bibedo i tyenwu; pe wubikumo, dok bene pe wubikok, ento komwu biballe woko pi balwu kun wucur kekenwu ma ŋat acel acel cur bot lawote." 
Ezekiel24:24 Kit meno Ejekiel doŋ bibedo botwu calo lanyut; kit gin ducu ma doŋ en otiyo wun bene wubitiyo. Ka man otimme, ci wubineyo ni an aye a Rwot Lubaŋa.’" 
Ezekiel24:25 “Doŋ in wod pa dano, i nino meno aye abikwanyo iye celgi matek-ki woko, yomcwinygi ki deyogi, gin ma gimaro nenone, kin gin ducu ma yomo cwinygi-ni. Abikwanyo bene awobegi ki anyiragi woko." 
Ezekiel24:26 I nino ma atimo lok man, ŋat mo ma obwot ki i lak to bibino ci titti pi gin ma otimme." 
Ezekiel24:27 I nino meno kikome en aye dogi binamme iye me lok bot dano mubwot-ti, ci ibiloko lok ma pe doŋ ibibedo ladoge-oto matwal. Kit meno ibibedo lanyut botgi; ci doŋ gibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Rwot oloko kweda," 
Ezekiel25:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, nen piny yo tuŋ bot jo Ammon, ci it it lok i komgi." 
Ezekiel25:3 Wac bot jo Ammon ni. Wuwiny lok pa Rwot Lubaŋa: Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Pien wun doŋ wuwacci, ‘Iyoya!’ i kom kabedona maleŋ i kare ma doŋ gipyedo woko, ki i kom lobo Icrael i kare ma doŋ gijwero woko odon obur, ki i kom jo Juda i kare ma giterogi woko i opii," 
Ezekiel25:4 pi meno an doŋ abemiyowu woko bot jo ma gitye yo tuŋ wokceŋ me bedo ginaleyagi. Gibigero gonygi i kinwu, dok gibiyubo kabedogi i dyewu. Gibicamo camwu ci gibimato cakwu bene." 
Ezekiel25:5 Abimiyo Raba bedo ka cam pa kinaga, ki gaŋi pa jo Ammon abiloko doko dwol ka ma romi ki dyegi gibibedo iye, Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel25:6 Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ owaco kuman ni, Pien doŋ wudoŋo ciŋwu dok wubedo ka nyono tyenwu matek i ŋom kun cwinywu obedo yom ki tim maraco ducu ma tye i iwu i kom lobo Icrael," 
Ezekiel25:7 pi meno, nen, abiryeyo ciŋa woko i komwu, ci abimiyowu woko bot lurok me bedo ginayaka botgi. Abityekowu woko liweŋ ki i kin jo ducu ma bedo i wi lobo, abimiyo wuto woko ki i wi lobo ducu; abinekowu woko. Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Jo Moab onoŋo yam guwacci, Nen, jo Juda doŋ gicalo jo me rok mukene-gu ducu." 
Ezekiel25:9 Pi meno abimiyo lweny poto i gaŋi murumo Moab ma gikuro waŋ lobo pa jo Moab-ni, kadi wa ki deyo me lobo Moab ma en aye Bet-jecimot, Baal-meon, ki Kiriataim." 
Ezekiel25:10 Abimiyo lobogi woko, kacel ki jo Ammon, bot jo ma tye wokceŋ me bedo megi, wek pe doŋ gipo i kome matwal i kin lurok." 
Ezekiel25:11 Dok bene abiŋolo kop i kom jo Moab. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.” 
Ezekiel25:12 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Kit macalo jo Edom gutimo tim me culo kwor i kom jo Juda mumiyo gutiŋo bal alii madit twatwal me culo kwor i komgi," 
Ezekiel25:13 pi meno omiyo Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Abiryeyo ciŋa alwenyo i kom jo Edom, abineko dano ducu kacel ki lee ma gibedo i lobo Edom. Abimiyo lobogi doŋ doko obur; nia i Teman nio kwede wa i Dedan jone ducu gibinekogi ki pala lucwan." 
Ezekiel25:14 Abimiyo jona jo Icrael culo kwor i kom jo Edom ma kakara, ci gibitiyo i Edom kit meno kun jo Edom giwinyo arem me kinigana ki akemona mager-ri. Ci jo Edom doŋ biŋeyo kwor ma aculo i komgi,” man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel25:15 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Kit macalo jo Piliciti gutimo tim me culo kwor dok bene guculo kwor ki raccwiny me neko nek ma kelo mone ma pe gik;" 
Ezekiel25:16 pi meno Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Nen, abiryeyo ciŋa alwenyo i kom jo Piliciti, abijwero jo Ceret ki lobo mukene ma tye i dog nam-gu woko." 
Ezekiel25:17 Abiculo kwor madit i komgi kun apwodogi ki akemo madwoŋ twatwal Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot, ka doŋ aculo kworra i komgi.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 I kom nino dwe mukwoŋo i mwaka me apar wiye acel, Rwot oloko kweda." 
Ezekiel26:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, kit macalo jo Turo giloko lok i kom Jerucalem ni, ‘Iyoya, dogcel pa lurok doŋ gituro woko, ma doŋ owirre oyabbe woko botwa-ni, doŋ abidoko lalonyo, pien doŋ gityeko balone woko,’" 
Ezekiel26:3 pi meno Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Nen, atye ki lok i komwu, wun jo Turo, abikelo jo me rok mapol ka lweny i komwu, kit macalo pii biamwonyi me nam twagge kwede-ni." 
Ezekiel26:4 Gibimu-ko cel me Turo gireto wo ko piny, ki lubelene gibituro gireto woko bene piny, Abiyweyo ŋomme woko ducu ci aweko got keken aye doŋ." 
Ezekiel26:5 En bibedo wa i dye nam macalo kabedo ka ma lumakrec gimoyo iye obwogi. Pien an Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ atyeko loko. Lurok doŋ gibiyako Turo woko," 
Ezekiel26:6 dok bene gibineko jone ma gibedo i lobone kikome woko liweŋ ki pala lucwan. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.” 
Ezekiel26:7 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco ku man ni, “Abikelo kabaka matek makato luker ducu, en aye Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon, ka lweny i kom Turo, En bibino ki lwak aguragura, gadigadi lweny, wegi aguragura, ki dul mony ma tye iye askari mapol." 
Ezekiel26:8 Jo ma bedo i gaŋi ma tye i wi tura gibinekogi woko i lweny. Ci lumerok doŋ gibigero cel girumowu kwede woko, dok bene gibitoro cel lobo i nyimwu, ka doŋ gibibino ma gutiŋo kwotgi ci giumo komgi kwede woko." 
Ezekiel26:9 En bitworo celwu ki twor latwom cel, ci bitcno lubele ki latoŋŋe reto woko piny." 
Ezekiel26:10 Aguragurane bibedo pol atikatika ma apwa tyengi biboyowu woko. Doŋ woo pa wegi aguragura ki mor pa gadigadi ma otino yec, ki lwak gadigadi lweny, biyeŋo celwu i kare ma noŋo gidonyo i dogcelwu macalo ŋat mo ma donyo i gaŋ ma doŋ mony oturo celle woko." 
Ezekiel26:11 Wegi aguragura biriŋo ki aguragura ki i yowu ducu, gibineko danowu woko ki pala lucwan. Gibireto wirwu matek-gu poto woko piny i ŋom," 
Ezekiel26:12 Gibiyako lonyowu ka gicoko jami acatawu. Gibimuko celwu gireto woko piny, dok bene gibibalo odiwu mabeco ma yomo cwinywu-ni woko. Gibikwanyo gweŋ, bao ki ŋom ma wuyubo pi gedo, gibolo woko i pii wa i dye namo" 
Ezekiel26:13 Abijuko wer ducu ma gigoyogi agoya, ki dwan opuk ma gigoyo bene doŋ pe biwinnye matwa!." 
Ezekiel26:14 Abimiyo in Turo doŋ idoko kabedo me moyo obwo pa lumak-rec ma ayweyo ŋomme woko ducu ci aweko got keken aye doŋ. Gaŋ man doŋ pe gibigero odoco matwal. An Rwot doŋ atyeko loko.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco. 
Ezekiel26:15 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco lok i kom gaŋ me Turo kuman ni, “I kare ma noŋo gitye ka monyi, jo ducu ma gibedo i dog nam gibibedo ki lworo madwoŋ pi cur pa joni ma gunoŋo ret ka doŋ ginekogi." 
Ezekiel26:16 Ci rwodi ducu me dog nam gibilor woko piny ki i wi komkergi, gibilunyo jorgi ki boŋŋigi ma gidero maber, ka doŋ gibedo piny i ŋom ki myelkom. Gibibanne woko ki lworo pi can ma opoto i komgi, miyo komgi bedo ka myel amyela i cawa ducu," 
Ezekiel26:17 Gibicako wer lyel i komi kun giwero ni, ‘In doŋ irwenyo woko matwal ki i nam niŋniŋ! In gaŋ ma yam iywek twatwal-li, ma onoŋo itek twatwal i kom nam-mi, in kacel ki jo ma gibedo i ii, ma ikelo lworo madwoŋ i kom jo ducu ma gibedo i dog nam!" 
Ezekiel26:18 I nino ma ipoto iye-ni kikome, cula ducu guyeŋŋe; ada, gin cula ma gitye i dye nam-mi, jo ma bedo i igi cwinygi oballe woko.’ ”" 
Ezekiel26:19 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Abimiyo in Turo iballe woko calo gaŋi ma dano pe bedo i igi. Dok bene abikelo pii aumi kwede woko miyo imwony woko ka matut i nam" 
Ezekiel26:20 Ci abiboli piny i bur lyel kacel ki jo ma cito i lobo pa io muto, me bedo kunnu kacel ki jo ma yam gubedo i lobo i kare ma con twatwal. Abimiyo ibedo i lobo ma i te ŋom i kin obur ma ori twatwal, kun noŋo it ye ka bedo kacel ki jo muto. Dano pe dok bibedo i ii dok bene pe ibinoŋo kabedo mo i lobo pa jo makwo." 
Ezekiel26:21 Abimiyo itum woko i yo ma kelo lworo, ibirwenyo matwal; kadi bed giyenyi, pe gibinoni.’ Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel27:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel27:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, kombeddi cak wer lyel" 
Ezekiel27:3 kun ikok kwede pi Turo, ma en gaŋ ma ocuŋ i dog nam, dok bene lacat-wil ki jo ducu ma gibedo i wanwat mapatpat ma orumo dog namo Tit ki Turo ni Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “In Turo, onoŋo iwaco ni, ‘An aber anen mwonya mada.’" 
Ezekiel27:4 Waŋ apokki loboni ducu tye wa i cwiny dye nam madit; jo ma gugeri gugeri woko maber ma inen mwonya ada calo mel. 
Ezekiel27:5 Gupayo bao me apeta mapol ki i kom yat odwon ma gukelo ki i got Cenir. Gutoŋo bene yat cedar ki i Lebanon ci guyubo ki yat me yaro boŋo mel wek yamo okuti. 
Ezekiel27:6 Gutoŋo kworo me Bacan ci guyubo pol me cero yeyani; gipeto dye kabedoni ki bao me yadi mabeco ma gikelo ki i lobo Caiprac, kun gidero woko bene ki lak lyec." 
Ezekiel27:7 Boŋo me ayara malo i wi yat me mel obedo boŋo camanini ma gidero maberre ma gikelo ki i Ejipt, gitwero neno ki cen ci giŋeyo oyotoyot. Kemani giyubo ki boŋo maberre, boŋo ma obedo bulu ki lamar lamar, ma gikelo ki i cula nam me Elica." 
Ezekiel27:8 Jo ma gibedo i Cidon ki i Arvad gin aye gubedo lucer yeyani, Joni ma gikwiri aye gubedo ludwo mel." 
Ezekiel27:9 Ludoŋo me Gebal ki jone ma gikwiri onoŋo bene gibedo i kin joni, ma giyubo mel me wot i nam; mel ducu me nam ki jo ma dwoyogi gubedo i kin joni, gubedo ka cat i dukanni." 
Ezekiel27:10 “Askari ma gua ki i Percia, Lud ki Put onoŋo gitye i dul monnyi macalo lulwennyi; gunabo kwot ki otaŋ-wic i gaŋ monnyi. Gin bene aye ma gumiyi deyo." 
Ezekiel27:11 Jo Arvad ki monygi guito i kom celli doŋ gurumo woko, ki jo Gamad guito malo i wi lubeleni ducu. Gunabo kwotgi i kom cel gurumo kwede woko. Gin aye ma gumiyo inen maber ma mwonya twatwal-li." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Ibedo ka cato wil i lobo Tarcic kun igamo ryal, nyonyo koc ki racac ma gimiyi pi wilo jamini mabeco madwoŋ ata." 
Ezekiel27:13 Jo Javan, Tubal, ki Mecek gubedo ka cato wil ki joni kun gimiyo danogi ki jami mola-gu giloko ki jami ma joni gicato." 
Ezekiel27:14 Joni gucato jamigi woko kun giloko ki aguragura me tiŋo yec, ki aguragura ma giŋweco kwedgi i lweny, ki kana-gu ma gikelogi ki i Bet-togarma." 
Ezekiel27:15 Jo Rodec bene gubedo ka cato wil ki joni; lobo mapol me dog nam gudoko cukki, ka ma joni giwilo iye lak lyec mapol ki poi kun gi loko ki jamigi." 
Ezekiel27:16 Jo Edom bene gubedo ka cato wil ki joni pi jamini madwoŋ-gu; gubedo ka lokogi ki emeradi ma en kidi me wel madwoŋ, boŋo ma lamar lamar, ki boŋŋi ma gidero komgi maber, boŋo camanini maberre, ki tiko makwar me wel." 
Ezekiel27:17 Jo Juda ki jo ma i lobo Icrael gubedo ka cato wil ki joni; guloko jamigi ki nano, nyig jeituni, ki nyig oduro me wi mwaka, moo kic, moo mukene-gu ki yat ma ŋwece kur." 
Ezekiel27:18 Jo Damaciko gubedo ka cato wil ki joni pi jamigi madwoŋ-gu, pi lwak lonyoni mapatpatti oweko gumini kono vino ma gikelo ki i Kelbon, ki yer romi matarre," 
Ezekiel27:19 ki kono yino ma gikelo ki i Ujal, gukelo ki jamini mabeco-gu; nyonyo ma giteto, kacia ki lum ma ŋwece kur guloko woko ki jami acatani." 
Ezekiel27:20 Jo Dedan gubedo ka cato wil ki joni kun gimiyo bot joni boŋŋi ma gitweyo i ŋe kana me bedo pa dano. 
Ezekiel27:21 Jo Arab ki rwodi ducu me Kedar yam gubedo jo ma yomo cwinyi mada pi cato boti litino romi ki nyogi romi ki dyegi-gu, i kare ma gubedo ka cato wil kwedi." 
Ezekiel27:22 Lucat-wil me Ceba ki Raama bene uibedo ka cato wil kwedi; gumiyo boti cit aŋwece ducu mapatpat mabeco makato ducu, ki kidi me wel-gu ki jabu, kun giloko ki jamini." 
Ezekiel27:23 Jo Karan, Kane, Eden, Acur, ki Ki lmad bene gubedo ka cato wil kwedi." 
Ezekiel27:24 Jo magi gubedo ka cato wil kwedi pi boŋŋi mabeco adada, ki pi boŋŋi ma bulu ki ma gikwoyo ki ciŋ ma gidero komgi woko maber, ki kapet ma gidero ki raŋi mapatpat, ma gitweyo woko matek likiŋ ki tol; gubedo ka cato wil boti pi jami meno." 
Ezekiel27:25 Mel me Tarcic obedo ka wot kun tiŋo jami acatani. “Ilokke doŋ idoko calo mel ma tye i dye nam ma gicano jami mapek opoŋo woko ligwik. 
Ezekiel27:26 Ludwo melli guteri woko wa ka mabor i dye namo Doŋ yamo ma a yo tuŋ wokceŋ okodo omiyo melli otur woko wa i cwiny dye nam. 
Ezekiel27:27 Lonyoni ducu, jami acatani ducu, lutic i mel ki ludwo mel, lumwon waŋ bao ka ma bao okubbe iye ki wadi, ki lucat-willi ma pigi tego, askarini ducu ma gin lu lweny ma gitye i mel, gin ducu ki dul monnyi ma gitye i dye joni, gumwony woko libuc i cwiny dye nam i kare ma melli otur woko-ni." 
Ezekiel27:28 I kare ma koko pa ludwo mel owinnye, lobo ma cokcok kenyo ducu guyeŋŋe." 
Ezekiel27:29 Wegi pol yeya gukatti woko ki mel kun gumako pol me cero yeya ciŋgi. Lutic i mel ki ludwo mel ducu ma woto i nam gucuŋ i wi tura i dog nam. 
Ezekiel27:30 Gin gidaŋŋe ki koko matek piri, kun gikok ma cwinygi kec adada. Gionyo putu i wigi kun giŋenne bene i buru pi cwercwiny." 
Ezekiel27:31 Gilyelo wigi doŋ maleŋ piri, dok giruko boŋo cola me kumo, gikok kwede piri ma cwinygi ton, kun bene gikumo ma cwinygi kec." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ka gikok ci giwero wer lyel piri gikok piri kun giwacci, ‘Aŋa ma gitwero poro ki Turo, ma gijwero oliŋ woko i dye nammi?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ka yam ikelo jami acatani ki bot jo ma tye loka nam, noŋo ico bo miti pa jo me rok ducu. Luker ducu me lobo gudoko lulonyo ki lonyoni ki lwak jami acatani madwoŋ-gu," 
Ezekiel27:34 Kombeddi doŋ mel otur woko i dye nam, i dye pii ka matut atika; jami acatam ki jo ducu ma gitiyo i mel gumwony woko i nam libuc kacel kwedi," 
Ezekiel27:35 Dano ducu ma gibedo i lobo ma orumo dog nam gubedo ki ur madit mada pi can man ma opoto i komi-ni; lukergi doŋ gudoko lwor twatwal, wangi olwal woko pi lworo." 
Ezekiel27:36 Lucat-wil ma gitye i kin lwak gujwat piri mada; doŋ io i agikki ma kelo lworo adada, doŋ ibirwenyo woko matwal ma pe dok ibinen.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel28:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, wac bot kabaka me Turo ni Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, ‘Itye ki wakke i cwinyi omiyo iwacci in lubaŋa. Dok iwacci kit macalo in ibedo lubaŋa-ni, ibedo i wi komker ma nam orumo woko dyere, Ento in i dano, in pe lubaŋa, kadi bed itamo ni in iryek calo Iubaŋa." 
Ezekiel28:3 Kono in iryek ikato Daniel, pe tye muŋ mo ma okanne ki boti ma pe iŋeyo." 
Ezekiel28:3 Kono in iryek ikato Daniel, pe tye muŋ mo ma okanne ki boti ma pe iŋeyo." 
Ezekiel28:4 Ryeko madit ki niaŋ ma it ye kwede, omiyo ilimo lonyo piri keni kun icoko jabu ki ryal i ot kano limmi." 
Ezekiel28:5 Ryeko madit me cat ma it ye kwede omiyo imedo lonyoni, kun ibedo ka noŋo magoba teretere. Mumiyo doŋ icako bedo ki wakke i cwinyi pi lonyoni-ni.’ ”" 
Ezekiel28:6 Pi meno Rwot Lubaŋa owaco ni, “Doŋ kit macalo itamo ni in iryek calo lubaŋa mo-ni," 
Ezekiel28:7 pi meno, nen, abikelo lumerok ma gin lurok ka lweny i komi. Gin jo me rok mager makato jo me rok mukene ducu. Gibiwoto pala lucwangi gilwenyo i komi ci gibalo ber me ryekoni ma nen mwonya-ni woko, ci gibalo deyoni me aura-ni woko." 
Ezekiel28:8 Gibineki woko ci gicori ipoto piny i bur lyel i cwiny dye nam 
Ezekiel28:9 Ka ce gubino ka neki, in pud ibimedde ki waco ki i nyimgi ni in lubaŋa? Ka ce doŋ jo ma gineki-ni gumaki woko i ciŋgi pud noŋo it ye dok dano, ento pe lubaŋa wacel." 
Ezekiel28:10 Ibito meri macalo dano ma pe gilirogi i ciŋ lurok ma pe giŋeyo Lubaŋa. An Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ atyeko loko lok man.” 
Ezekiel28:11 Rwot doki oloko kweda," 
Ezekiel28:12 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, kok pi kabaka me Turo, kun iwacce ni Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, ‘In onoŋo yam ibedo lanen me gin maber makato ducu. Onoŋo bene ir yek dok iber ma inen mwonya mada." 
Ezekiel28:13 Onoŋo ibedo i Eden, ma en aye poto pa Lubaŋa, ci ibedo ka rukke ki kit kidi me wel mapatpat ducu, ma gin aye: kamelian, topaj, ki jacipa, kurocolit, ki onik, capir, kabankel, ki emeradi; gin ma gidero ‘ducu onoŋo yam gitiyo ki jabu, ki gin ducu ma yam it ye kwede gigoro komgi woko. Giyubogi piri i nino ma giketi iye-ni kikome." 
Ezekiel28:14 Aketo lakerubi ma giwiro woko ki moo me gwoko in. Onoŋo ibedo i wi got maleŋ pa Lubaŋa dok bene iwoto ki i dye gaŋ ma lyel mac. 
Ezekiel28:15 Cakke i kare ma giketi iye, kiti onoŋo ber; onoŋo pe it ye ki bal mo nio wa i kare ma doŋ icako timo bal." 
Ezekiel28:16 Ibedo ka wilo jami teretere kun icato bene kumeno, omiyo icako timo tim bwamici itimo bal. Ci aryemi woko ki i wi got mera maleŋ calo gin ma gipyedo, dok lakerubi ma onoŋo gwoki ca bene oryemi woko ki i dye gweŋ ma lyel mac." 
Ezekiel28:17 Yam ibedo ka wakke ki i cwinyi pi berri; deyoni me aura-ni omiyo ibalo ryekoni woko. Areti woko i ŋom, ci am iyo inen woko ka maleŋ i nyim luker ducu, wek guneni, waŋgi oniaŋ woko tiktik i komi." 
Ezekiel28:18 Pi balli mapol ata ma itimo i cato wil i yo ma pe atir-ri omiyo ipyedo kabedoni maleŋ-gu woko ducu. Ci acwinyo gaŋ woko ki mac, owaŋ woko liruk, Aloki idoko buru i lobo i nyim jo ducu ma guneni." 
Ezekiel28:19 Jo ducu ma giŋeyi i kin lwak me rok ducu gitye ki ur madit mada i komi; doŋ io i agikki me toni ma kelo lworo, doŋ ibirwenyo woko matwal.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Rwot oloko kweda owacci," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Wod pa dano, cik waŋi koŋ inen yo tuŋ Cidon, ci itit lok i kome," 
Ezekiel28:22 kun iwaco bot jo ma gibedo iye ni Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Nen, atye ki lok i komwu, wun jo Cidon; abinyuto deyona woko ka maleŋ i dyewu. Man bimiyo jo ducu gipaka pi gin ducu ma atiyo botwu, ci gibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot, ka anyuto kit macalo aleŋ kwede kun aketo can i kom jo ma gibedo i gaŋ man," 
Ezekiel28:23 Pien abicwalo two gemo i gaŋ man, ki remo i dye gudone ducu. Gibi-lwenyoi komwu ki i kabedo ducu, jowu bene gibinekogi woko ki pala lucwan. Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel28:24 “Jo me ot pa Icrael okuto Lacar pe doŋ bicobogi matwal, nyo kadi ki kit okuto mo pe bicobogi ma minigi ret, i kin luwotgi ducu ma gutimogi marac kun gicayogi-ni. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot Lubaŋa.”" 
Ezekiel28:25 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Ka acoko jo Icraelki i kin lurok ka ma yam akeyogi gucito iye, dok bene ka anyuto bot rok ducu kit macalo aleŋ kwede, ci gibibedo i lobogi kikome, en lobo ma yam amiyo bot laticca Yakobo-ni," 
Ezekiel28:26 Gibibedo i lobo meno laboŋo lworo mo, dok gibigero odi kun gipuro” poto olok bene. Gibibedo laboŋo lworo mo, i kare ma abiŋolo kop i kom luwotgi ducu ma gutimogi marac kun gicayogi-ni, Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot Lubaŋagi.’" 
Ezekiel29:1 I nino dwe apar wiye aryo, dwe me apar, i mwaka me apar, Rwot oloko kweda kun wacci," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Wod pa dano, cik waŋi inen Parao kabaka me Ejipt, ci itit lok i kome ki i kom lobo Ejipt ducu." 
Ezekiel29:3 Lok kun iwacci, Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Nen, atye ki lok i komi, in Parao kabaka me Ejipt, ma ibedo calo nyaŋ ma min kulu ma buto i laora kulu-gu kun iwacci, ‘Kulu Nail mera, en mera kikome, an aye ma atiyo.’" 
Ezekiel29:4 Abigolo cwaki woko ki goli, ci amiyo rec ducu ma tye i kuluni gimoko woko i poki; ci abiywayi ki i dye kuluni atiŋi woko malo, kacel ki rec ducu me kuluni ma gumoko woko i kom poki-ni." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ci doŋ abiboli woko i tim, in kacel ki rec ducu ma gitye i kuluni, wubipoto i dye tim ka maleŋ, pe apicokowu dok bene pe gibiyikowu. Doŋ atyeko miyowu woko me bedo cam pa lee tim ki pa winyo me polo." 
Ezekiel29:6 “Man bimiyo jo ducu ma gibedo i lobo Ejipt giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot. Pien in ibedo calo odoo lagada bot jo me ot pa Icrael; 
Ezekiel29:7 i kare ma gumaki ki ciŋgi ci itur ityer, ci iŋolo gwokgi iyeco woko ducu. Ka dok gujeŋge i komi, ci itur, imiyo pyergi ducu omyel." 
Ezekiel29:8 Pi meno Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Nen, abekelo lweny i komwu, ci aneko dano kacel ki lee woko ducu ki i kinwu." 
Ezekiel29:9 Lobo Ejipt doŋ bidoko obur ma odoŋ oballe woko. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot. “Pien doŋ iwacci Nail meri in aye ma iketo," 
Ezekiel29:10 pi meno, nen, an doŋ atye ki lok i komi, dok bene atye ki lok i kom laora kuluni ducu, mumiyo abimiyo lobo Ejipt doko obur balle woko, iye doŋ noŋo, cakke ki i Migdol dok kwede yo tuŋ Ciene nio kwede wa i waŋ apokki lobo Etiopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Pe tye dano mo nyo lee ma biwoto kun kato ki iye, bibedo kumeno ma pe gibedo iye pi mwaka pyeraŋwen kulu," 
Ezekiel29:12 Abimiyo lobo Ejipt doko obur ma iye doŋ noŋo makato lobo mukene-gu duou; ki gaŋi murumo ducu igi bidoŋ noŋo pi mwaka pyeraŋwen ki i kin gaŋi ducu ma doŋ gityeko balogi woko-ni. Abikeyo jo Ejipt woko i kin rok ducu, dok bene abimiyo giket gicito i lobo ducu.”" 
Ezekiel29:13 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “I agikki me mwaka pyeraŋwen abicoko jo Ejipt woko ki i kin lurok ka ma yam akeyogi gucito iye-ni," 
Ezekiel29:14 ci abidwoko gum pa jo Ejipt botgi, kun akelogi aketogi gibedo i lobo Patroc, co aye lobogi macon ka ma ginywalogi iye kikome. Doŋ ki kunnu gibibedo ki ker magoro." 
Ezekiel29:15 Kergi bibedo ker magoro adada ki i kin ker ducu, man miyo pe doki gibiloyo lobo mukene ducu. Abimiyo gibedo jo ma pigi pe tek twatwal, dok bene pe doki gibiloyo lobo mukene-gu ducu." 
Ezekiel29:16 Jo Icrael doŋ pe gibijenne i komgi pi kit kony mo wacel. Doŋ can ma bipoto i kom jo Ejipt bipoyo wi jo Icrael ni gin onoŋo gitimo bal me jeŋŋe i kom jo Ejipt wek ginoŋ kony mogo, Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot Lubaŋa.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 I nino dwe acel, dwe me acel, mwaka pyeraryo wiye abiro, Rwot oloko kweda," 
Ezekiel29:18 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon omiyo dul monnye otiyo tic matek me lweny i kom Turo, omiyo wi dano ducu otal woko ki gwokgi bene ducu opwac woko, ento kadi bed kumeno, kabaka ki dul monnye pe gunoŋo kit gin mo pi tic ma gubedo ka yelle ka tiyone i kom Turo-ni," 
Ezekiel29:19 Pi meno, Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, ‘Nen, abimiyo lobo Ejipt woko bot Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon; en biyakogi kun mayo jamigi woko, ci bitiŋo lonyo me lobo Ejipt loko doko mucara me culo jo ma i dul monnye." 
Ezekiel29:20 Doŋ atyeko miyo bote lobo Ejipt me culo waŋ tic ma en obedo ka yelle me tiyone-ni, pien jo me dul monnye gubedo ka tic pira. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco.’" 
Ezekiel29:21 “I nino meno ka gin ma kit meno otimme, ci abimiyo jo Icrael gidoko tek, dok abimiyo’ in Ejekiel ilok woko ka maleŋ atyer ka ma dano ducu gitwero winyo lokki. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Rwot doki oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel30:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, tit lok kun iwaco gin ma an a Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka lokone kuman ni, “Wukok ni, ‘Tin aye nino ma kelo lworo!’" 
Ezekiel30:3 Ninone doŋ cok, en nino ma Rwot bitic iye-ni, Man bibedo nino ma opoŋ ki pol keken, en aye bene kare ma can bipoto kwede i kom rok ducu." 
Ezekiel30:4 Lweny bibedo i Ejipt, ki remcwiny madwoŋ bibedo i Etiopia. Jo ma gibedo i Ejipt gibinekogi woko; gibiyako lonyone ducu gitero woko, ci gibiweko doŋ obur." 
Ezekiel30:5 “I lweny meno gibineko askari ma giwilogi ki lim ma gua ki i Etiopia, Put ki Lud, Arabia, ki Libya, ki wegi lobona kikomgi.”" 
Ezekiel30:6 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Cakke i Migdol o kwede yo tuŋ Ciene, jo ducu ma gikonyo jo Ejipt gibinekogi woko i lweny. Dul mony pa jo Ejipt ma giwakke ni gitek-ki gibijwerogi woko ducu. Gibinekogi woko ki pala lucwan i dye gaŋ. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel30:7 Lobe Ejipt bidoko gin ma iye odoŋ nono, gaŋine igi bidoŋ nono ki i kin gaŋi ducu ma doŋ gityeko balogi woko." 
Ezekiel30:8 Ka acwinyo Ejipt woko ki mac, dok bene ka gineko jo ma konyogi woko, man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel30:9 “Ka nino meno oo, ma Ejipt doŋ gijwero woko, abicwalo lukwena ma gikwaŋo mel wek gumi lworo omak jo Etiopia ma cwinygi pe peto-ni; gibibedo ki remcwiny madwoŋ i nino ma can bipoto i kom jo Ejipt; pien niŋone tye ka bino!”" 
Ezekiel30:10 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Abitic ki Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon me giko te lonyo me Ejipt woko." 
Ezekiel30:11 En kacel ki jone, ma gin jo me rok mager adada, gibikelogi me balo lobo woko; ci gibilwenyo i kom jo Ejipt ki pala lucwan, man miyo lobo doŋ bipoŋ ki kom dano muto keken." 
Ezekiel30:12 Abimiyo pii kulu Nail two woko, dok bene abicato lobo woko bot jo maraco; abibalo lobo kacel ki jami ducu ma tye iye amiyo iye doŋ noŋo. Lurok gibijwero lobo woko ducu. An Rwot doŋ atyeko loko.”" 
Ezekiel30:13 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Abijwero cal jogi apaya ki cal lubaŋa mogo me goba ki i Mempic; laker mo doŋ pe bibedo i lobo Ejipt. Kit meno abimiyo lworo bedo tye i lobo Ejipt." 
Ezekiel30:14 Abimiyo lobo Patroc doŋ noŋo, dok bene abicwinyo mac woko i kom Joan, ci abiŋolo kop i kom jo Tebec kun alubo te cik kikome me ŋolo kop." 
Ezekiel30:15 Dok bene abionyo akemona i kom jo Pelucium, ma en aye cel gogo matek pa jo Ejipt, ka dok aneko lwak me Tebec woko ducu." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ci abiketo mac woko i kom Ejipt; ki jo Pelucium gibibedo ki toncwiny madit adada. Gibimuko cel me gaŋ Tebec gireto woko piny, ki gaŋ bene bipoŋ woko ki pii aluka." 
Ezekiel30:17 Awobe On ki awobe Pibecet gibinekogi woko i lweny, ki mon gibimakogi giterogi woko i opii," 
Ezekiel30:18 Piny bicido woko i Tapanec i kare ma abituro ker me Ejipt woko, ki tekke ma onoŋo jone giwakke k wede-ni bene doŋ bigik. Pol biumo Tapanec woko, ci jone gibiterogi woko i opii." 
Ezekiel30:19 Meno aye kit ma abiŋolo kwede kop i kom Jo Ejipt kun alubo te cik me ŋolo kop. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.” 
Ezekiel30:20 I nino dwe abiro dwe me acel, i mwaka me apar wiye acel, Rwot oloko kweda, owacci," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Wod pa dano, doŋ atyeko turo bad Parao ka baka me Ejipt woko. Doŋ inen ŋat mo ma otweyo ki bandej wek ocaŋ woko pe, wek dok odok tek me mako pala lucwan." 
Ezekiel30:22 Pi meno Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Nen, atye ki lok i kom Parao ka baka me Ejipt. Abituro bade ryoryo ducu, bade matekke-ni ki bade ma yam otur-ri; ci amiyo pala lucwan poto woko piny ki i cine." 
Ezekiel30:23 Abikeyo jo Ejipt woko i kin jo me rok ducu, abimiyo giket giromo wi lobo woko ducu." 
Ezekiel30:24 Doŋ abijiŋo bad kabaka me Babilon ryoryo ducu bedo matek, ci amiyo pala lucwanne i ciŋe en mako; ento abituro bad Parao ryoryo ducu woko, miyo en doŋ bibedo ka cur i nyim kabaka me Babilon calo dano ma doŋ gityeko keto ret woko i kome." 
Ezekiel30:25 Abijiŋo bad kabaka me Babilon bedo matek, ento bad Parao bipoto woko; ci bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot. Ka doŋ aketo pala lucwanna i ciŋ kabaka me Babilon, ci en biryeyo woko i kom lobo Ejipt;" 
Ezekiel30:26 ci akeyo jo Ejipt woko ducu i kin lurok, kun aketogi i wi lobo ducu. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 I nino dwe acel, dwe me adek, i mwaka me apar wiye acel, Rwot oloko kweda. Owacci," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Wod pa dano, wac bot Parao kabaka me Ejipt ki bot lwakke ni, “In mono giporo ditti ki dit pa aŋa?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Nen, abipori ki yat cedar me Lebanon, ma jaŋe oluk dok tipone bene calo buŋa, ma odoŋo mabor adada, wiye kikome bor oo wa i kin pol." 
Ezekiel31:4 Pii onoŋo tye omiyo yat meno odoŋo, dok bene obedo ka cwinyo pii ma tye i te ŋom. Gibedo ka onyo pil i kabedo ka ma onoŋo yat tye ka doŋo iye, ka gumiyo ora kulu-gu gumol, piine ocito i te yadi ducu ma i buŋa," 
Ezekiel31:5 En aye mumiyo yatte odoŋo woko mabor ma okato yadi ducu ma gidoŋo i buŋa woko; jaŋe odoŋo maboco dok mapek, pi pii mabup ma onoŋo tye i pote." 
Ezekiel31:6 Winyo ducu me polo gigero odigi i jaŋe; ki lee tim ducu ginywalo litinogi i te tipone, dok rok madito me wi lobo ducu giywe i te tipone." 
Ezekiel31:7 Onoŋo nen maber mada i ditte, ki i boco me jaŋe ducu; pien lwite odonyo piny i ŋom ka ma pii mabup tye iye." 
Ezekiel31:8 Yadi cedar ma gudoŋo i poto pa Lubaŋa pe gitwero pyem kwede, kadi ki yadi ma gudoŋo maboco bene pe gitwero poro kwede. Pe tye yadi ma komgi pwot ma giporo ki jaŋe wacel, Pe tye yat mo i poto pa Lubaŋa ma onoŋo nen ber calo eno" 
Ezekiel31:9 Aketo obedo ma nen maber, ma jaŋe ojany woko i kabedo ducu. Yadi ma i Eden ducu doŋ nyeko omakogi woko i kome, gin yadi ma onoŋo yam gitye i poto pa Lubaŋa-ni.”" 
Ezekiel31:10 “Pi meno, Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Kit macalo yat meno odoŋo mabor, wiye oo wa i kin pol, ka doŋ ocako wakke ki i cwinye pi berre-ni," 
Ezekiel31:11 mumiyo an doŋ akwero yat meno woko, am iyo woko bot laloc me rok mukene. En bitic ki yat man i kit yo ducu ma lubo rac kite." 
Ezekiel31:12 Lurok, ma gin jo mager adada ma gikato rok mukene ducu, gibitoŋo yat meno gireto woko i ŋom ka doŋ giweko kunnu. Jaŋe bipoto i wi godi ki i nota ducu, ci gibitur woko lirum i dye kulu ma gimol i lobo ducu. Mumiyo jo ducu ma gibedo i wi lobo gibia woko ki i te tipone giweko yat meno." 
Ezekiel31:13 Winyo bibino gibedo i kom yat mupoto-ni, ki lee tim bene gibibedo ka wot ki i wi jaŋe mutur-ri." 
Ezekiel31:14 Man ducu bitimme wek yadi ducu ma gidoŋo ka ŋet pii pe gudoŋ maboco twatwal, dok bene pe wigi oo wa i kin pol, wek yat mo ki i kin yadi ducu ma cwiyo pii pe odoŋ mabo cŋ calo gin. Gin ducu mere gin luto keken calo dano, ma ka guto myero gudony piny i lyel i lobo pa jo muto ka ribbe ki jo muto ma tye kunnu.”" 
Ezekiel31:15 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “I nino ma yat ‘meno doŋ odonyo piny i lobo pa jo muto, abimiyo pii ma tye ii te ŋom ume ci kumo pire. Abijuko kulu madoŋo-gu woko ducu, miyo ora kulu ducu doŋ pe bimol kato woko, Pi yat meno abimiyo piny cido woko i kom got Lebanon ci amiyo yadi ducu ma doŋo i buŋa two woko." 
Ezekiel31:16 I kare ma abicwalo en kwede me cito i lobo pa jo muto, mor me potone keken bimiyo rok ducu yenne, Yadi ducu me Eden, ki yadi ducu me Lebanon ma gibeco adada, ki yadi ducu ma gicwiyo pii, gibikweyo cwinygi i lo bo ma tye piny," 
Ezekiel31:17 Gin bene gibicito piny kacel kwede, me bedo ki jo ma yam doŋ gityeko nekogi woko i lweny-nyi, Iyo, jo ducu ma gitye i kin lurok ma yam gibedo i te tipone gibito." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Yat ma giloko i kome-ni en aye kabaka me Ejipt ki lwakke ducu. Kadi bed yadi me Eden onoŋo pe gitye kit meno i deyo ki i bocogi, gibikelo in ibedo kacel ki yadi me Eden idonyo i lobo ma tye piny; ci ibiribbe ki jo ma pe gilirogi dok ki jo ma yam ginekogi i lweny.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel32:1 I nino dwe, acel, dwe me apar wiye aryo, i mwaka me apar wiye aryo, Rwot oloko kweda." 
Ezekiel32:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, daŋŋe ki koko pi Parao kabaka me Ejipt, kun iwacce ni, itamo ni ibedo calo labwor i kin rok ducu, ento in ibedo meri calo nyaŋ ma min kulu ma bedo i nam, kun baro dye pii ki i kulu. Irubo pii woko ki coto tyeni, miyo ibala pii ma i kulu-gu woko ducu." 
Ezekiel32:3 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Ka Tok ducu gucokke kacel, abiciko obwona ci amaki kwede woko, ka doŋ amiyo giywayi kwede i wi tura." 
Ezekiel32:4 Abiboli woko piny i ŋom, kun acanyi woko matek i ŋom ka maleŋ, ci doŋ amiyo winyo ducu gipye i komi ki lee ducu ma i lobo gibicami woko," 
Ezekiel32:5 Abipoŋo wi godi ki nota-gu ducu ki komi mutop. 
Ezekiel32:6 Abidyako lobo kadi wa godi bene ki remoni ma mol-li, ma ora kulu ducu bipoŋ woko ki remoni keken." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ka doŋ atyeko neki woko, ci abiumo pol woko, kun amiyo lakalatwene ducu gicido macol licuc; abimiyo pol umo ceŋ woko, ki dwe bene doŋ pe biryeny ma miyo derone caro piny." 
Ezekiel32:8 Abikwanyo dero me gin ma ryeny ducu ma tye i polo woko ci amiyo loboni doŋ i colpiny. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco. 
Ezekiel32:9 “Abiryano cwiny jo me rok mapol, ka aterowu i opii i kin lurok i wi lobo ducu ka ma yam onoŋo pe wuŋeyo." 
Ezekiel32:10 Abimiyo lwak me rok mapol gibedo ki ur twatwal i komi, ki lukergi bene komgi bimyel ki lworo piri. Ka atiŋo pala lucwanna i nyimgi i kare ma ibilimo iye can-ni, lurok kacel ki lukergi komgi bibedo ka myel amyela cawa ducu, kun noŋo dano acel acel paro pi kwone keken.”" 
Ezekiel32:11 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Kabaka me Babilon bibino ci lwenyo i komi ki pala lucwanne." 
Ezekiel32:12 Abiweko askari ma gua ki i rok mager ducu giwoto pala lucwangi ci gineko ki lwakki woko. Gibijwero jami ducu ma it ye ka wakke pigi-ni, ci gineko lwakki woko." 
Ezekiel32:13 Abineko dyaŋini woko ducu ki i waŋ pii’ mapatpat, Doŋ dano nyo lee mo bibedo pe matwal ma birubo pii balo woko ki coto doki." 
Ezekiel32:14 Abimiyo piine pye mot ci doko maleŋ, dok abimiyo pii ma i kuluni ducu mol mot calo moo ma mol. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel32:15 I kare ma amiyo lobo Ejipt odoko obur ma iye odoŋ nono, dok ka jami ducu ma yam opoŋo loboni doŋ gijwero woko, ka bene aneko jo ducu ma gibedo iye, man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel32:16 Man bilokke doko wer lyel. Mon me rok ducu gibiwero wer man me lyel-li, kun gikok kwede pi Ejipt ki lwakke ducu; gibigoyo wer lyel man ki jami agoya-gu. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco.”" 
Ezekiel32:17 I nino dwe apar wiye abic, dwe me acel, i mwaka me apar wiye aryo, Rwot oloko kweda." 
Ezekiel32:18 Owacci, “Wod pa dano kok pi lwak ma gibedo i Ejipt, ci icwalgi kacel ki mon me rok matego gudony piny i lobo pa jo muto, ka ribbe ki jo ma yam doŋ guto giyikogi i lyel kunnu-ni," 
Ezekiel32:19 Wac botgi ni, ‘Wun dok wubeco wunen mwonya wukato jo mukene woko? Wuciti, wudony piny wubut i lyel pa jo ma pe gilirogi.’" 
Ezekiel32:20 Gibito kacel ki jo ma ginekogi i lweny. Dok bene lweny ma tye-ni giyubo pi neko jo Ejipt ducu. 
Ezekiel32:21 Rwodi ma gin cogi oteka gibiloko pigi ki pi jo ma yam konyogi, ma noŋo doŋ gitye i dye lyel, kun giwacci, ‘Doŋ gutyeko donyo piny kany, gibuto woko mot, gin jo ma pe gilirogi ma ginekogi i lwenynyi.’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Aciria tye kunnu, ki lyel pa askari me monnye bene orume woko dyere. Gin askari-gu ducu ginekogi ki pala lucwan." 
Ezekiel32:23 Lyelgi tye piny wa i dye bur ka matut adada, ki askari dul monnye gurumo lyelle woko; gin ducu doŋ ginekogi woko ki pala lucwan, gin jo ma yam nyayo lworo marac i lobo pa jo makwo-ni." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Elam bene tye kunnu, kun lwakke ducu gurumo lyelle woko; gin ducu ginekogi woko ki pala lucwan. Ci gudonyo piny i lyel i lobo pa jo muto ma kun pe gilirogi. Gin aye jo ma ginyayo lworo marac i lobo pa jo makwo, ento gibedo ki lewic kacel ki jo ma gidonyo piny i bur." 
Ezekiel32:25 Gipeto kitanda pi jo Elam i kin jo ma ginekogi kacel ki lwakke ducu, dok lyel pa askarine orume woko dyere. Gin ducu jo ma pe gilirogi, ginekogi woko ki pala lucwan. Yam lworo i komgi onya i lobo pa jo makwo, ento koni doŋ gibedo ki lewic kacel ki jo ma gidonyo piny i bur; giketogi i kin jo ma ginekogi." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Mecek ki Tubal gitye kunnu, kacel ki lwakgi ducu, ki lyel pa askari monygi bene orumogi woko dyere. Gin ducu jo ma pe gilirogi ginekogi woko i lweny ki pala lucwan; pien gubedo ka nyayo lworo marac i lobo pa jo makwo." 
Ezekiel32:27 Dano pe miyo botgi woro i kare ma giyikogi, kit macalo gimiyo woro kwede i kare ma giyiko twoni oteka lweny macon, ma giketogi i lyel ma gurukke woko ki jami lwenygi, giteno wigi ki pala lucwangi dok giumo komgi ki kwotgi. Gin twoni oteka magi onoŋo yam gitego mada ma gubedo ka miyo lworo marac omako jo makwo." 
Ezekiel32:28 “Meno aye kit macalo jo Ejipt bibuto kwede ma noŋo doŋ ginyotogi woko i kin jo ma pe gilirogi, kacel ki jo ma ginekogi ki pala lucwan." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edom tye kunnu kacel ki lukerre ki rwodine ducu. Gin onoŋo gubedo askari matego mada, ento kombeddi doŋ giyikogi kacel ki jo ma pe gilirogi ma yam ginekogi i lweny." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Rwodi me lobo ma: yo tuŋ acam ducu gitye kunnu, ki jo Cidon ducu bene tye kunnu. Tekogi ma yam gitye kwede-ni onoŋo onyaye lworo mada, ento kombeddi doŋ gudonyo i lyel: ki lewic kacel ki jo ma ginekogi i lweny, gubuto doŋ ma pe gilirogi. Doŋ gibedo ki lewic kacel ki jo ma’ gidonyo piny i bur." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Ka Parao kabaka me Ejipt onenogi ducu, cwinye bikwe pi tone kekene ki pi to pa askari me monnye ma ginekogi woko i lweny-nyi.’ Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel32:32 “An aye ma amiyo kabaka me Ejipt onyayo lworo i kom jo makwo, ento kombeddi en kacel ki askari me monnye gibinekogi woko ci gipyelogi i lyel i kinjo ma pe gilirogi, ma ginekogi i lweny, Parao kacel ki lwakke ducu.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel33:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel33:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, tit bot lutuwu jo Icrael kun iwaco botgi gin ma timme ka akelo lweny i lobo mo-ni. Gin wegi lobo meno giyero dano ki i kingi me bedo lakur-pinygi." 
Ezekiel33:3 Ka ce oneno lukwor gibino i lobo, ci kutotum wek dano guŋe komgi;" 
Ezekiel33:4 Ka ce inen dano mo owinyo koko tum, ce pe oketo iye cwinye, ka lukwor gubino guneke, lok me tone bibedo i wiye kekene." 
Ezekiel33:5 Tone bedo balle gire, pien kadi en owinyo koko tum, ci pe oketo iye cwinye. Ka nene oketo iye cwinye, kono onoŋo olaro kwone." 
Ezekiel33:6 Ento ka ce lakur-piny oneno lukwor bino ce pe ‘okuto tum, wek otit bot dano guŋe komgi, ce lukwor gubino guneko ŋat mo ki i kingi; doŋ dano ma ‘kit meno bito i balle, mumiyo abidwoko alii me tone i wi lakur-piny." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Doŋ kombeddi, in wod pa dano, aketi me bedo lakur-piny pi rok me Icrael. Ibitito botgi lok ducu ma acikogi kwede ma an awacci," 
Ezekiel33:8 Ka ce awaco bot latim marac ni, In latim marac, ibito ada, ento ka pe iloko bote kun icike me lokke owek timo gin marac, ci dano meno ma latim marac bito i ballenu, ento alii me tone abidwoko i wii." 
Ezekiel33:9 Ento ka ce onoŋo ijuko en latim marac meno, kun icike ni owek yo me tim maraco, ka ce pe olokke oweko yo me tim maracone-ni, en bito i balle-nu, ento noŋo in giri ilaro kwoni," 
Ezekiel33:10 “Doŋ in, wod pa dano, wac bot jo me ot pa Icrael ni, Wun wuwaco kuman ni, ‘Tim aranyiwa ki balwa ducu gire tye i wiwa, doŋ gimiyo wato woko ata; dok watwero bedo kwo niŋ iniŋ?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Wac botgi ni, Macalo atye kwe-ni, man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco, cwinya pe bedo yom me neno ka latim marac to, ento amito en oŋuti owek timo bal ci olokke odwog bota wek obed kwo. Wulokke, wudwog cen wuwek timo bal; piŋo wumito ni wuto woko, wunjo me ot pa Icrael?" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Kombeddi, in wod pa dano, wac bot lutuwu jo Icrael ni, Ka dano ma kite atir otimo bal, ci gin maber ma en otiyo doŋ pe twero lare. Ka ce dano ma latim marac oweko timo gin marac, pe gibiketo can i kome, ento ka ce dano ma kite atir ocako timo bal, pe dok bimedde ki bedo kwo." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ento kadi bed awaco bot dano ma kite atir ni bibedo kwo ada, ento ka ce en ojeŋŋe i kom kite ma atir-ri ce ocako timo bal, ci pe abipo i kom gin mabeco ducu ma en otiyo kadi ki acel. En bito pi ballenu ma en otimo-ni." 
Ezekiel33:14 Doki kadi awaco ki dano ma latim marac ni, ‘In ibito ada,’ ento ka ce en olokke oweko timo bal, ce otiyo gin ma cik mito dok ma tye atir," 
Ezekiel33:15 Labolle tye kit man ni, ka ce latim marac meno okwanyo gin ma gijeŋo bote odwoko cen bot rwode, dok bene ka en odwoko gin ma yam en oyako ayaka cen, kun lubo cik ducu ma miyo kwo, ma pe doŋ timo kit bal mo; en bibedo kwo ada, pe bito gire." 
Ezekiel33:16 Doŋ abiweko bal ducu ma yam en otimo pe doŋ abipo pigi. En doŋ gire bibedo kwo ada pien otimo gin ma cik mito dok ma tye atir. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Ento lutuwu giwacci, ‘Gin ma Rwot tye ka timone pe atir!’ Meno pe kakare, gin ma gin timo aye pe atir." 
Ezekiel33:18 Ka ce dano ma kite atir olokke oweko timo gin ma tye atir, ce otimo bal, en bito pi balle-nu." 
Ezekiel33:19 Ento ka latim marac olokke oweko timme maraco, ce otiyo gin ma cik mito dok ma tye atir, en bibedo kwo pire." 
Ezekiel33:20 Ento wun wuwacci, ‘Gin ma Rwot tye ka timone pe atir. Abiŋolo kop i komwu kun Lubo gin ma wutimo wun jo Icrael.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 I nino dwe abic, dwe me apar, i mwaka me apar wiye aryo, ma onoŋo doŋ giterowa watye i opii, dano mo ma obwot ki i Jerucalem obino bota ci otitta ni gaŋ me Jerucalem doŋ opoto woko." 
Ezekiel33:22 Otyeno ma onoŋo dano-nu pud peya obino bota, onoŋo doŋ alimo tek ma nyuto ni Rwot onoŋo odiya ki ciŋe i cawa meno. I odiko ma doŋ dano-nu obino bota ci Rwot oyabo doga omiya teko me lok ci doga oyabbe, pe dok abedo ma doga oto." 
Ezekiel33:23 Rwot oloko kweda," 
Ezekiel33:24 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, jo magi ma gibedo i gaŋi magi ma doŋ odoŋ obur i lobo Icrael-li giwacci, ‘Abraim yam obedo dano acel keken, ento gimiye lobo man ocamo woko ducu obedo mere kene. Ento wan wapol, adada lobo-ni doŋ gimiyowa me bedo mewa.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 “Pi meno in myero itit botgi gin ma an Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka wacone kuman ni, Wun wucamo riŋo ma tye ki remo i kome, kun wuilo waŋwu malo wuworo cal jogi. Wuneko dano bene, ci wutamo ni lobo-ni wubicamo bedo mewu ada?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Wun doŋ wujeŋŋe mewu i kom pala Lucwan, wutimo gin me kwer mapol kun dano acel acel balo dako pa lawote; ci wutamo ni wubicamo-lobo-ni bedo mewu ada?" 
Ezekiel33:27 “Wac botgi ni Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Kit macalo atye kwe-ni, adada jo ma gibedo i kabedo ma doŋ odoko wi obur-ri gibinekogi woko ki pala Lucwan; ki jo ma ginoŋogi gibedo i tim ata abimiyo ŋuu mwodogi woko. Doŋ jo ma gibedo i gaŋi me cel gogo, ki jo ma gibedo i boro got-gu two gemo binekogi woko." 
Ezekiel33:28 Abimiyo lobo-ni doko obur dok kabedo ka ma dano mo pe bedo iye, Man bimiyo teko ma onoŋo giwakke pire-ni doŋ gik woko. Godi me Icrael doŋ bidoŋ noŋo ma ŋat mo pe dok bikato ki i kingi." 
Ezekiel33:29 Ka inen amiyo lobo odoko obur, dok ka ma dano pe bedo iye, pi tim me kwergi ducu ma gutimo, ci bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel33:30 Rwot owacci, “In, wod pa dano, lutuwu gitye ka lok piri ka gurwatte i ŋet cel me gaŋ nyo i dog odigi. Dano acel acel waco ki lawote ni, ‘Bin, waciwiny kit lok aŋo ma oa ki bot Rwot kombeddi.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Ci gibino boti kit macalo dano kare ducu gibino-ni, gibedo piny i nyimi macalo jona, kun giwinyo gin ducu ma in itito botgi, ento pe gicitiyo gin ma in itito botgi-ni. Ginyuto ni gitye ki mar madwoŋ ki lok goba ma giloko ki doggi keken, ento guketo cwinygi mere i noŋo lim i yo ma pe atir." 
Ezekiel33:32 Doŋ in inen botgi calo dano mo ma wero wer me mar ma noŋo winyo dwane mit, kun bene goyo agoya ki nana, Giwinyo lok ducu ma iwaco-gu, ento pe gilubo mo kadi ki acel." 
Ezekiel33:33 I kare ma lokki bitimme, ci bitimme ada, man bimiyo giŋeyo ni lanebi mo yam obedo i kingi.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel34:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, tit lok i kom lukwat pa jo Icrael, ma gin romina. Tit botgi lok ma an Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka wacone botgi kuman ni, Can i wiwu, wun lukwat me Icrael! Wugwoko komwu keken, ento pe wupito romina." 
Ezekiel34:3 Wumato cakgi, wuruko yer romo-gu, wuneko romi mucwe-gu me acamawu, ento pe wupito romina." 
Ezekiel34:4 Pe wubedo ka gwoko jo magoro, pe wucano jo ma komgi lit, pe wutweyo tyen jo ma gulimo ret, jo muŋak pe wudwokogi cen, pe wubedo ka yenyo jo ma gurwenyo, ento wubedo ka loyogi ki tek dok ki gero," 
Ezekiel34:5 Kit meno guket woko, pien lakwatgi mo onoŋo pe; mumiyo romi gudoko cam pa ŋuu ducu." 
Ezekiel34:6 Romina guket woko gubedo ka lak ata i wi godi ducu ki i wi cere maboco-gu ducu. Romina guket woko i wi lobo ducu, ento ŋat mo pe ma oyenyogi nyo ma otemme me nonogi." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Kombeddi wun lukwat, wuwiny gin ma an Rwot atye ka wacone botwu." 
Ezekiel34:8 Adada kit macalo an Rwot Lubaŋa makwo-ni, myero wuwiny lokka. Romina doŋ gudoko lee me amaka, gudoko cam pa ŋuu, pien onoŋo pe gitye ki lakwat mo. Lukwat pe guyenyo romina, ento gubedo ka pito komgi keken, ma pe gubedo ka pito romina." 
Ezekiel34:9 Pi meno, wuwiny lokka, wun lukwat." 
Ezekiel34:10 An Rwot Lubaŋa atuco botwu atyer ni atye ki lok i komwu. Abikwanyo romina woko ki botwu, abimiyo pe wubedo lukwatgi matwal, dok bene pe doŋ wubimedde ki pito komwu kekenwu. Abilaro romina woko ki i dogwu, pe doŋ wubibedo ka camogi." 
Ezekiel34:11 “An Rwot Lubaŋa, atito botwu ni an kikoma aye doŋ abiyenyo romina, dok abiketo cwinya me gwokogi." 
Ezekiel34:12 Kit macalo lakwat keto kwede cwinye me yenyo romine ma guket woko i kabedo ma tye ka maboco-gu, kit meno bene an abiketo cwinya me gwoko romina, abilarogi, akwanyogi woko ki i kabedo ducu ma yam guket iye i nino me pol ki mutu mapek macol licuc." 
Ezekiel34:13 Abikwanyogi ki i kin lurok, kun acokogi ki i wi lobo ducu, ci akelogi wa i lobogi kikome. Abimiyo gibedo ka cam i wi godi me Icrael, i ŋet waŋ it ma gunnye agunya, ki i kabedo ducu ma i lobo ka ma dano bedo iye." 
Ezekiel34:14 Abimiyo gicamo lum mabeco i kakwat maberre, ki i kabedo ma tye i wi godi maboco me Icrael; gibibuto kunnu i olet ma lobone ber me kakwat, dok gibicamo lum mabeco i wi godi me Icrael." 
Ezekiel34:15 An kikoma aye abibedo lakwat romina, ci abimiyo gibuto piny, man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel34:16 Abiyenyo romi ma gurwenyo, dok abikwanyo romi ma yam gitye ka lak ata adwokogi cen, abitweyo tyen romi ma ret tye iye, abimiyo romi magoro gijiŋ gidoko tek, dok abiketo waŋa me ne-no romi mucwe ki mategone; abipitogi i kit ma atir." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Kombeddi doŋ, wun romina, an Rwot Lubaŋa atittiwu ni abiŋolo kop i komwu wun ducu, kun apoko kinwu woko, aketo jo mabeco pat, ki jo maraco bene aketogi pat kaikengi; apoko romi woko ki i kom dyegi." 
Ezekiel34:18 Lum ma wucamo i kakwat maber-ri mono pe romowu, ma weko wunyono lum mukene wo ko piny ki tyenwu-ni? Dok bene wumato pii maleŋ, ento wurubo pii mukene ki tyenwu wubalo woko!" 
Ezekiel34:19 Wutamo ni myero romina gucam lum ma doŋ wunyono woko piny ki tyenwu, dok wumito gumat pii ma wurubo ki tyenwu wubalo wokoni?" 
Ezekiel34:20 “Pi meno, an Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ abiŋolo kop i kin romi mucwe ki romi mujony." 
Ezekiel34:21 Kitmacalo wubedo ka coro romi magoro ki lakŋetwu ki gwokwu, kun wutuco igi woko pil ki tuŋwu, wumiyo guket gucito woko wa ka maboco-ni," 
Ezekiel34:22 an abilarogi, pe gibibedo me amaka pa ŋuu; ci abiŋolo kop i kin romi ki romi luwotgi." 
Ezekiel34:23 Abiketo laticca Daudi bedo lakwatgi, lakwat acel keken; en bipitogi kun bene bedo lakwatgi." 
Ezekiel34:24 Doŋ an Rwot Lubaŋa abibedo Lubaŋagi, ki laticca Daudi bibedo rwot i kingi. An Rwot doŋ atyeko loko man," 
Ezekiel34:25 Abiketo gicikke me kuc kwedgi kun atyeko ŋuu ma yelogi-ni woko ducu ki i lobogi, wek doŋ gubed i dye tim laboŋo ayela mo, kun bene gibuto wa i buŋa." 
Ezekiel34:26 Abimiyo gum i komgi ki i kom kabedo ducu murumo got mera maleŋ, Dok abimiyo kot cwer botgi i kare ma noŋo gimito, kot kikome, ci bikelo gum botgi," 
Ezekiel34:27 Yadi ducu me tim binyako nyiggi, ki lobo bene bimiyo ginapita ma gipuro iye cek nya mabup, man miyo gibedo i lobogi laboŋo ayela mo. Ka doŋ alaro jona woko ki i ciŋ jo ma yam gulokogi gudoko opiigi, kun bene aturo rii okol ma yam gitweyogi kwede woko, ci doŋ gibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot," 
Ezekiel34:28 Pe doŋ gibibedo lee me amaka pa lurok matwal, kadi ki ŋuu me tim bene doŋ pe bimwodogi; gibibedo maber laboŋo ayela mo, dok bene ŋat mo pe ma bimiyo gibedo ki lworo." 
Ezekiel34:29 Abimiyogi ŋom maber ma ceko cam mabup atika, ma bimiyo kec doŋ pe binekogi matwal i lobogi, doŋ pe gibibedo ginacaya pa jo me rok ducu," 
Ezekiel34:30 Ci gin ducu gibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot Lubaŋa gi, atye ka gwokogi, dok bene gin jo me ot pa Icrael gin jona. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel34:31 Doŋ wunromina, an aye ma akwayowu i oletta, an Lubaŋawu,” man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel35:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel35:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, cik waŋi inen got Ceir, ci itit lok i kome." 
Ezekiel35:3 Wac bot jo ma gibedo kunnu ni, an Rwot Lubaŋa awaco kuman ‘ni, Nen, atye ki lok i komwu, wun jo ma i kom got Ceir. Abiryeyo ciŋa i komwu ci amiyo lobowu doko obur ka ma dano mo pe bedo iye." 
Ezekiel35:4 Abiweko gaŋiwu ducu doko obur, ki wun doŋ wubibedo i lobo ma oballe woko. Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel35:5 “Wun onoŋo wubedo lumone pa jo Icrael ducu, kun wumiyo gibedo ka nekogi woko ki pala lucwan i kare ma can opoto i komgi, ki i kare me keto can i komgi me agikki." 
Ezekiel35:6 Pi meno, kit macalo atye kwo-ni, man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco, doŋ abiyubo to aye ma binekowu, ma binekowu nakanaka tyekowu woko; pien wutye ki bal alii me nek, pi meno to bibedo ka nekowu nakanaka." 
Ezekiel35:7 Abimiyo got Ceir doŋ obur, ki lobone doŋ iye noŋo; doŋ abimiyo jo ma gibino ki jo ma gicito gikato ki kenyo gitum woko matwal." 
Ezekiel35:8 Abipoŋo wi godiwu ki kom dano ma ginekogi; ki jo ma ginekogi ki pala lucwan gibipoto i wi cerewu ducu ki i notawu ki loŋowu ducu. 
Ezekiel35:9 Abimiyo lobowu iye doŋ noŋo kare ducu, ki gaŋiwu bene ducu dano doŋ pe bibedo iye. Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel35:10 “Yam wubedo ka wacci rok magi aryo, Icrael ki Juda, ki lobogi ducu bidoko mewu, dok bene wubicamo bedo mewu, kadi bed an Rwot aye abedo Lubaŋagi." 
Ezekiel35:11 Pi meno, kit macalo atye kwo-ni, man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco, abitic kwedwu kun lubo kit kinigawu ki nyekowu ma doŋ wutyeko nyutogi woko ka maleŋ-ŋi, pien wubedo ki adagadaga i kom jona. Abimiyo wuneya i kinwu kekenwu, ka doŋ acako ŋolo kop i komwu pi gin ma wutimo i kom jona." 
Ezekiel35:12 Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an Rwot onoŋo awinyo lok ma wubedo ka wacone ki cac i kom godi me Icrael, kun wuwacci doŋ gudoŋ igi noŋo, dok ni doŋ gimiyo botwu ni wucam obed mewu," 
Ezekiel35:13 Dok bene wumine kenwu me bedo dit makato an woko, kun wunyatte kwede i koma ma wuloko lok mapol; ento meno an awinyo woko.”" 
Ezekiel35:14 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Abimiyo lobowu iye doŋ noŋo, wek jo me wi lobo ducu gubed ki yomcwiny pi can ma opoto i komwu." 
Ezekiel35:15 Kit macalo wubedo ki yomcwiny pi ginaleya pa jo me ot pa Icrael, ni pien lobogi doŋ odoŋ nono, an bene abitimowu kit meno, wun jo ma wubedo i got Ceir, ki jo Edom ducu. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel36:1 Rwot owacci, “In wod pa dano, tit ki godi me Icrael kun iwaco botgi ni guwiny lok ma an" 
Ezekiel36:2 Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka loko botgi ni, ‘Lukwor pa jo Icrael giwacci, Doŋ wuneno, cere macon-gu ducu doŋ gudoko mewa.’" 
Ezekiel36:3 “Tit lok kun ituco gin ma an Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka wacone. I kare ma rok ma cokcok ma gurumo lobo Icrael gulwenyo dok guyako godi me Icrael woko, gin ducu gubedo ka nywaro jo Icrael ki lok aŋec." 
Ezekiel36:4 Pi meno, wun godi me Icrael, wuwiny lok ma an Rwot Lubaŋa atye ka wacone bot godi ki cere, bot ora kulu ki nota, ki bot gaŋi ma yam doŋ giweko gudoŋ obur, ki gaŋi ma yam doŋ gitenyo woko, ma rok ducu ma gurumo ka ŋetgi guyako ci doŋ odoko ginacayagi." 
Ezekiel36:5 “Mumiyo an Rwot Lubaŋa dok aloko woko atyer ka maleŋ i kom rok ma gurumo Icrael ki kiniga malyet at ika, makatone alok i kom Edom. Pien gin jo-nu gubino ki yomcwiny madit kun gitye ki cac bene, ci gumako lobona gucamo odoko megi wek giyak jami ma tye iye woko ducu." 
Ezekiel36:6 Pi meno, tit lok ma kemo lobo Icrael, kun iwaco bot godi ki cere-gu, bot nota ki loŋo-gu ni Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Nen, atye ka lok ki nyeko ki akemo, pien doŋ wuciro cac pa lurok ma omiyowu lewic mada." 
Ezekiel36:7 “Mumiyo Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, Akwoŋŋe akwoŋa ni lurok ducu ma gurumowu dyere gin kikomgi gibicayogi mada kun lewic bene makogi marac." 
Ezekiel36:8 Ento wun godi me Icrael, yadi dok gibidoŋo i wiwu ci ginyako nyiggi pi jona jo Icrael; pien gin doŋ cok dwogo paco." 
Ezekiel36:9 Pien an atye piwu, wun jona, dok abineno ada ni lobowe gipuro dok gipito kodi iye bene." 
Ezekiel36:10 Abimiyo wunya wudoko mapol, wun jo me ot pa Icrael ducu, Wubibedo i gaŋi doki, ki kabedo ma yam gijwerogi gudoŋ obur-ri wubigerogi odoco," 
Ezekiel36:11 Abimiyo dano kadi wa lee ginya gimedde. Welwu bimedde wubedo pol makato kit ma yam wutye kwede con ca, kun wunywalo litino mapol. Abimiyo wubedo kunnu kit macalo yam koŋ wubedo i kare mukwoŋo ca ci abimiyowu lonyo mabup makato lonyo ma onoŋo yam wutye kwede. Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel36:12 Abikelowu adwokowu cen, wun jona jo Icrael, amiyo wuwoto i dye lobowu. Wubileyo lobo man doŋ bedo mewu, doŋ bedowu i lobo-ni pe doŋ bimiyo kec neko litinowu wacel." 
Ezekiel36:13 “An Rwot Lubaŋa, awacci ada, dano kara gilwoŋo godi ni, ‘Lucam dano’, kun giwaco bene’ ni godi gineko litino pa rok ma gibedo iye woko." 
Ezekiel36:14 Ento cakke tin cito kwede anyim pe doŋ gibibedo lucam dano, ma giyako litino ki botwu ci gimwodo wako. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel36:15 Dok bene abimiyo pe doŋ wuwinyo cac pa lurok matwal, pe doŋ wubibedo ki lewic i kin lurok, dok godi pe doŋ gibineko litino pa rok man matwal. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel36:17 Owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, i kare ma jo Icrael gubedo i lobogi gubalo woko ki kitgi ki gin ducu ma gubedo ka timone. Aneno kitgi obedo calo gin ma keni calo two kwer ma dako twoyo ka karene oromo." 
Ezekiel36:18 Mumiyo aonyo akemona woko i komgi pi dano ma gubedo ka nekone i lobo, dok bene pi cal jogi ma gutiyo ma gubalo kwede lobo woko-ni." 
Ezekiel36:19 Yam akeyogi woko i kin lurok, ci guket guromo wi lobo ducu. Yam aŋolo kop i komgi kun onoŋo alubo kitgi ki gin ducu ma onoŋo gutimo." 
Ezekiel36:20 Ento i kare ma gucito i kin lurok, i kabedo ducu ma gubedo ka cito iye, gupyedo nyiŋa maleŋ-ŋi, pien dano gubedo ka loko lok i komgi ni, ‘Magi dano pa Rwot, ento gin gua guweko lobo ma yam Rwot omiyogi-ni woko.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Ento an onoŋo abedo ka paro pi nyiŋa maleŋ-ŋi, ma jo Icrael gumiyo gibedo ka pyedone i kin lurok ma gin gucito gubedo i kingi-ni." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Pi meno, wac bot jo Icrael lok ma an Rwot Lubaŋa amito waco botgi, ni, ‘Gin ma aecito ka timone-ni pe pi wun jo Icrael, ento abetimo pi nyiŋa maleŋŋi, ma doŋ wun wupyedo woko i kin lurok ka ma wucito iye-ni," 
Ezekiel36:23 Abinyuto kit ma nyiŋa leŋ kwede, ma doŋ gityeko pyedone woko i kin lurok, ma wun wupyedo i kingi-ni. Ka anyuto kit ma aleŋ kwede-ni i komwu ma lurok bene gineno, ci bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot, Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel36:24 Abikwanyowu ki i rok ducu, dok acokowu woko liweŋ ki i wi lobo ducu, ci akelowu i lobowu kikome," 
Ezekiel36:25 Abikiro pii maleŋ i komwu miyo wulonnye woko i kom gin ma keni ducu, ki i woro cal jogiwu ducu, ci doŋ alonyowu miyo wubedo leŋ." 
Ezekiel36:26 Abimiyowu cwiny manyen dok aketo cwiny manyen i iwu; abikwanyo cwiny matek calo got-ti woko ki i komwu, ci amiyowu cwiny pa dano." 
Ezekiel36:27 Dok abiketo cwiny mera i iwu, kun am iyo wubedo ka lubo cikka kun wugwokke ka tiyo gin ma an aciko ducu." 
Ezekiel36:28 Wubibedo i lobo ma yam amiyo bot kwarowu, wun wubibedo jona, ki an abibedo Lubaŋawu," 
Ezekiel36:29 Abilarowu ki i gin ducu ma keni ma yam wutimo; ci abimiyo bel cek botwu mabup atika, doŋ pe abimiyo kec bedo ka nekowu." 
Ezekiel36:30 Abimiyo yadi nyak nyig mabup dok bene amedo cam ma i poto cek mabup, wek pe doŋ wubed ki lewic i kin lurok pi kec." 
Ezekiel36:31 Man bimiyo wupo i kom kitwu maraco, ki i kom gin maraco ma wutimo; mumiyo wubibedo ki keccwiny i komwu kenwu pi balwu me lewic ki gin me kwer ducu ma wutimo." 
Ezekiel36:32 Myero wuŋe atir ni gin ma abitimo-ni pe atimo piwu. Lewic omakwu dok alee bene myero otwodwu pi timwu maraco. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco.” 
Ezekiel36:33 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “I nino ma abilonyowu woko ki i kom balwu ducu, abimiyo dano doŋ gibedo i gaŋi, ki kabedo ducu ma yam gudoŋ obur-gu gibigerogi odoco." 
Ezekiel36:34 Doŋ lobo ma yam onoŋo iye odoŋ nono gibicako purone, miyo pe doŋ nen macalo lobo ma gibalo woko bot jo ma gikato ki ka ŋete," 
Ezekiel36:35 Gibiwacci lobo man ma yam odoko tim ata-ni, doŋ olokke odoko calo poto Eden, dok gaŋi ma yam gijwero igi odoŋ nono ma gudoko obur-ri kombeddi doŋ dano gibedo i igi dok bene gigero cel gogo orumogi woko dyere." 
Ezekiel36:36 Doŋ man bimiyo lurok ma gudoŋ gibedo ka ŋetwu ma gurumowu giŋeyo ni an Rwot doŋ agero kabedo magi ducu ma yam odoko obur-ri odoco, ka dok amiyo gipuro ka ma yam odoko tim ata-ni woko. An Rwot doŋ atyeko loko ni abitimo man, dok bene abitimo.”" 
Ezekiel36:37 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Abitiyo gin makato maca ma yam atiyo-ni. Abiweko jo Icrael gilega ni akonygi. Abimiyo ginya welgi medde calo lwak romi." 
Ezekiel36:38 Gaŋi magi ducu ma kombeddi doŋ gudoko obur-ri doŋ bipoŋ ki lwak dano mapol ata calo Jerucalem ma yam opoŋ ki lwak: romi ma onoŋo giterogi me atyera me gitum i nino madito ma giciko. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.” 
Ezekiel37:1 Rwot onoŋo odiya matek ki ciŋe, ci okela woko ki Cwiny mere, ci ociba piny i dye nota ma opoŋ ki cogo keken." 
Ezekiel37:2 Otela awoto arumo nota woko aduno i kin cogo; ci aneno lwak cogo mapol ata tye kunnu, dok onoŋo doŋ gutwo woko adada." 
Ezekiel37:3 Ci Rwot owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, cogo magi doki gitwero bedo kwo?” An adok iye ni, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, in giri aye iŋeyo.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Rwot dok owacca ni, “Tit lok bot cogo magi, kun iwaco botgi ni, Wun cogo mutwo, wuwiny lok pa Rwot." 
Ezekiel37:5 Wac botgi ni an, Rwot Lubaŋa, abewaco botgi kuman ni, ‘Abeketo yweyo me kwo i iwu ci amiyo doki wubedo kwo." 
Ezekiel37:6 Dok bene abiketo ler i komwu, ci amiyo riŋo bino i komwu, ci amiyo del kom umo komwu woko. Abiketo yweyo me kwo i iwu, ci wubibedo kwo doki. Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.’ ”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Kit meno atito lok kit macalo onoŋo giwacca ni atiti. I kare ma atye ka tito lok, awinyo woo, ci cogo gucokke guribbe woko kacel, ŋat man omoko i kom lawote." 
Ezekiel37:8 I kare meno abedo ka nenogi, ci aneno ler komgi, ki riŋo komgi bene doŋ obino i komgi, ka del-komgi doŋ oumogi woko. Ento yweyo onoŋo pe i igi." 
Ezekiel37:9 Rwot Lubaŋa owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, tit lok bot yamo. Tit ki yamo ni an aciko ni en yamo obin kun a ki tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi ducu, me kelo yweyo i kom dano magi ma guto-ni wek doki gucak bedo kwo.”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Atito lok kit meno kit macalo Rwot ocika kwede, ci yweyo me kwo odonyo i igi, ci gucako bedo kwo, gucuŋo ki tyengi. Onoŋo gin dano ma romo dul mony madit twatwal." 
Ezekiel37:11 Lubaŋa dok owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, cogo magi gin aye jo me ot pa Icrael. Giwaco ni cogogi doŋ otwo woko; ki gengi doŋ pe matwal pi kwogi me kare me anyim." 
Ezekiel37:12 Pi meno, tit lok bot jona jo Icrael ni an, Rwot Lubaŋa, abiyabo lyel woko. Abicero jona-ni woko ki i lyel, ci doŋ adwokogi cen paco i lobo Icrael." 
Ezekiel37:13 Gin jona gibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot, ka doŋ ayabo lyelgi, ma acerogi woko ki i lyel." 
Ezekiel37:14 Dok abiketo Cwiny mera i igi, ci miyo gibedo kwo, abiketogi bene gibedo i lobogi kikome. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot. Yam acikke ni abitimo man, ci doŋ atyeko timone. Man Rwot ma owaco.”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel37:16 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, kwany odoo yat mo ci ico coc i kome ni, ‘Pi Juda, dok pi jo Icrael ma yam guribbe kwede.’ Ka dok ikwany odoo yat mukene ci ico i kome ni, ‘Pi Yucepu ma koni doŋ tye i ciŋ Epraim dok pi jo Icrael ducu ma yam guribbe kwede.’" 
Ezekiel37:17 Ci doŋ irib odoo aryo-ni woko kacel wek doŋ gudok odoo acel ki i ciŋi," 
Ezekiel37:18 Ento lutuwu gibipenyi ni itit botgi pi odoo magi aryo-ni. 
Ezekiel37:19 In itit botgi ni an, Rwot Lubaŋa, abekwanyo odoo ma ocuŋ pi Icrael, ci aketo i kom odoo ma ocuŋ pi Juda-ni. Gin odoo magi aryo-ni abimiyo gidoko odoo acel kun amako i ciŋa bene." 
Ezekiel37:20 Ka doŋ inen imako odoo magi aryo ma icoyo coc i komgi-ni i ciŋi ma gin gineno," 
Ezekiel37:21 ci doŋ itit botgi kuman ni an, Rwot Lubaŋa, abekwanyo jo Icrael woko ki i kin lurok ka ma yam gucito gubedo i kingi-ni, abicokogi woko ki i kabedo ducu, akelogi aketogi i lobogi kikome." 
Ezekiel37:22 Abiribogi gidoko rok acel keken i lobogi, i wi godi me Icrael. Doŋ gibibedo ki kabaka acel keken ma loyo gin ducu, pe gibipokke gibedo rok aryo, dok bene pe gibipokke me bedo ki ker aryo," 
Ezekiel37:23 Pe dok gibibalo komgi kekengi ki cal lubaŋagi ki gin me kwer mogo maraco ma yam gitimo, pe bene gibibalo komgi ki kit balgi ducu. Abilarogi ki i yo ducu ma giŋak gidok kwede ka timo bal, mumiyo guŋayo waŋa woko, ci abilonyogi gibedo leŋ; gin doŋ gibibedo jona, ki an abibedo Lubaŋagi," 
Ezekiel37:24 Laticca Daudi aye doŋ bibedo kabaka ma loyogi. Gin ducu doŋ gibibedo ki lakwat acel. Gibilubo cikka dok bene gibigwoko gin ma an aciko ducu kun gitiyo bene," 
Ezekiel37:25 Gibibedo i lobo ma yam kwarowu gubedo iye, ma onoŋo amiyo bot laticca Yakobo. Gibibedo kunnu matwal kacel ki litinogi wa ki likwayogi bene ducu. Laticca Daudi biloyogi matwal." 
Ezekiel37:26 Doŋ abiketo gicikkena kwedgi; gicikke man ma aketo kwedgi-ni bedo gicikke me kuc ma ri matwal. Abimiyo gum botgi dok abimiyo ginya gimedde, ci doŋ abiketo kabedona maleŋ i dyegi matwal." 
Ezekiel37:27 Abibedo kunnu kacel kwedgi kun abedo Lubaŋagi, ki gin bene gibedo jona." 
Ezekiel37:28 Man bimiyo lurok doŋ giŋeyo ni an Rwot doŋ alonyo Icrael woko, ka guneno kabedona maleŋ ma bedo matwal-li tye i dyegi.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Rwot oloko kweda. 
Ezekiel38:2 Owacci, “Wod pa dano, cik waŋi inen Gog ma tye i lobo Magog, En aye laker madit me lobo Mecek ki Tubal. Tit lok i kome," 
Ezekiel38:3 kun iwacce ni Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, ‘Nen, atye ki lok i komi, in Gog, laker madit ma loyo Mecek ki Tubal." 
Ezekiel38:4 Abimiyo ilokke ineno ka mukene, ci aŋolo cwaki woko ki goli, apeyi kwede akeli ka maleŋ kacel ki monnyi ducu, aguragura ki jo ma nweco kwedgi, ma gin ducu gurukke woko ki jami lweny. Gin lwak ma gitye i dul mony madit, ma gin ducu gutnako kwot ocal ki kwot kikome, ki pala lucwan." 
Ezekiel38:5 Jo Percia ki Kuc, ki jo Put bene gitye kacel kwedgi, ma gin ducu gumako kwot kun bene guruko tok me lweny." 
Ezekiel38:6 Jo Gomer ki dul monygi ducu, ki jo Bet-togarma ma gua ki ka mabor i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam gubino ki dul monygi ducu, ki lwak me rok mukene bene ducu gubino gitye kacel kwedgi.’" 
Ezekiel38:7 “Tit bote ni en myero doŋ, en kacel ki dul monnye ducu ma gucokke bote gubed ma doŋ guyubbe woko pi winyo cikke." 
Ezekiel38:8 I ŋe mwaka mapol kare bibino ma abicwale ni ocit olweny i kom lobo mo ma dano doŋ gubedo iye laboŋo lworo mo me lweny, en lobo ka ma yam gikelo dano iye ma gicokogi ki i kin rok mapol, wek gubed i wi godi me Icrael ma onoŋo yam odoko titn ata-ni. Jone gikelogi woko ki i kin lurok ci kombeddi gin ducu doŋ gibedo maber laboŋo ayela mo." 
Ezekiel38:9 Doŋ en ki dul monnye kacel ki lwak me rok mapol ma gitye kacel kwede, gibibino calo yamo lapiru ka lweny, ma giumo lobo woko calo pol ma oumo piny.”" 
Ezekiel38:10 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman bot Gog ni, “I nino meno ibicako yubo tam i cwinyi me timo gin marac." 
Ezekiel38:11 Ci ibimoko tammi me cito ka lweny i kom lobo ma jone gibedo mot maber laboŋo ayela mo i gaŋi ma pe girumogi ki cel, rii nyonyo bene pe, kadi ki doggan-gu bene pe ma romo gwokogi ka lweny oturre." 
Ezekiel38:12 Ibiyako jami pa dano ma gibedo i gaŋi ma yam odoko obur-ri ci itero woko. Yam gicokogi ki i kin lurok mapatpat ci kombeddi doŋ gitye ki lwak dyaŋi, ki jami mapol, ci gibedo i dye lobo kikome." 
Ezekiel38:13 Jo Ceba, jo Dedan ki lucat-wil ma i gaŋi ma tye i Tarcic gibipenyi ni, ‘In ibino kara ka yako jami? Doŋ ityeko guro dul monnyi woko me tiŋo jami ma giyako, ibino pi coko ryal ki jabu, me coko dyaŋi ki lwak jami mapol, nyo me tiŋo jami madit ma giyako?’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:14 Pi meno, Rwot Lubaŋa oora ni atit ki Gog ni etye ka waco lok kuman ni, “I nino meno ka jona jo Icrael gibedo maber laboŋo ayela mo, ci cwinyi bitugge kekeni" 
Ezekiel38:15 kun ia ki i kabedoni ma tye ka mabor i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam. Ibibino kun itelo wi dul mony madit dok matek ma askari ma gitye iye gua ki i rŋk ducu, gin ducu jo ma nweco ki aguragura." 
Ezekiel38:16 In Gog ibibino ilwenyo i kom jona jo Icrael calo pol ma umo lobo. Lacen ka kare oromo, abicwali icito ka lweny i kom lobona, wek omi lurok guneya, dok pi nyuto ni an aleŋ pi gin ma atiyo ki ciŋi in Gog, kun gin bene gineno." 
Ezekiel38:17 In aye ŋat ma yam abedo ka loko pire i kare mukato con ca, i kare ma amiyo lokka bot luticca lunebi me Icrael, ma gutito lok ni i kare ma pud tye anyim abikeli me lweny i komgi.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel38:18 Rwot Lubaŋa owacci, “I nino ma Gog bibino ka lweny iye i kom Icrael, abidoko ger ma noŋo akemo omaka ma pe wacce." 
Ezekiel38:19 Atuco lok ka maleŋ ki nyeko me akemona ma lyel alyela ni, I nino meno oyeŋyeŋ biyeŋo lobo matek." 
Ezekiel38:20 Man bimiyo rec me nam ducu, winyo, lee tim, ki gin ducu ma lak alaka i ŋom-gu, ki jo ducu ma gibedo i lobo komgi myel pi lworo an. Godi ducu gibicorre gipoto woko piny, ki loŋo-gu bene bipoto woko, dok cel ducu gibicorre gipoto woko i nom." 
Ezekiel38:21 Abimiyo Gog bedo ki lworo madwoŋ atika, kun noŋo akelo kit can ducu mapatpat aketo i kome. An Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ aloko. Jone ducu gibinekke woko kekengi ki pala lucwan kun dano acel acel neko lawote." 
Ezekiel38:22 Abiketo can i kome kun akelo two gemo i kome ki neko dano. Abicoro kot ma cwer ki yamo matek, pee ma corre, gweŋ calfa ma mac oliyo woko, ma cwer i kome kacel ki i kom lwak me rok mapatpat ma onoŋo gitye kacel kwede." 
Ezekiel38:23 Kit meno abinyuto bot lwak me rok ducu ni an adit dok aleŋ, kun anyutte i nyimgi ni wek guŋe ya. Man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel39:1 Rwot Lubaŋa owacci, “In wod pa dano, tit lok i kom Gog, ma en laker madit ma loyo lobo Mecek ki Tubal, ci ititte ni atye ki lok i kome." 
Ezekiel39:2 Abimiyo en lokke neno ka mukene ci akwanye woko wa i lobo ma tye ka mabor yo tuŋ acam, nio waŋ ma en obino wa i godi me Icrael." 
Ezekiel39:3 Ci abigoyo atumme ki i ciŋe lacam poto woko, dok bene amiyo aterone poto woko ki i cine ma lacuc." 
Ezekiel39:4 Gog ki dul monnye ki lwak me rok mapatpat ma gitye kacel kwede gibipoto gito woko i wi godi me Icrael, ci abimiyo komgi doŋ doko cam pa kwa winyo ducu ma camo riŋo ki pa ŋuu-gu." 
Ezekiel39:5 Gibipoto i dye bar ka maleŋ gito woko. An Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ aloko man. 
Ezekiel39:6 Abicwalo mac i Magog dok i kom jo ma gibedo mot laboŋo ayela i lobo murumo dog nam, man bimiyo giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot." 
Ezekiel39:7 Abimiyo jona jo Icrael giŋeyo nyiŋa maleŋ-ŋi, doŋ pe abimiyo gipyedo nyina maleŋ-ŋi matwal. Ci rok ducu doŋ gibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot, Gat Maleŋ pa Icrael.”" 
Ezekiel39:8 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Nino ma aloko pire-ni ada doŋ tye ka bino." 
Ezekiel39:9 Jo ma gibedo i gaŋi me Icrael gibicito woko gicoko jami lweny ma giweko-gu giobo ki mac calo yen. Gibiobo mac i kom kwot, atum, atero, odoo madito ki toni, ma gibibedo ka obogi pi mwaka abiro kulu." 
Ezekiel39:10 Man doŋ pe bimiyo gibedo ka coko yen ki i tim, dok bene pe doŋ gibitoŋo yen ki i buŋa, pien doŋ gibimoko mac ki jami lweny ma giweko-gu. Gibiyako jami pa jo ma yam guyako jamigi gucito kwede.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel39:11 Rwot Lubaŋa owacci, “I nino meno abimiyo kabedo me yik bot Gog i lobo Icrael, i Nota pa Luwot, ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ me nam me Kado. Gog ki jo me dul monnye ducu gibiyikogi kunnu, ci notane doŋ gibilwoŋo ni Nota me Mony pa Gog." 
Ezekiel39:12 Jo Icrael gibibedo ka yiko kom jo muto-ni pi dwe abiro kulu, pi lonyo lobogi wek obed maleŋ kit ma yam con." 
Ezekiel39:13 Wegi lobo ducu gibibedo ka yiko kom jo-nu, man bimiyo giworogi pi gin ma gutimo i nino ma ali mo iye locca-ni. An Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ aloko." 
Ezekiel39:14 Gibiyero jo mogo ki i kingi bedo ka wot kun giwok gikato ki i lobogi teretere me yiko kom jo mogo ma yam noŋo pud gudoŋ, ma onoŋo pe giyikogi, pi lonyo lobogi wek dok obed maleŋ kit ma yam tye kwede con. Doŋ i ŋe dwe abiro gibibedo ka ŋiyo piny i kabedo ducu me neno ka doŋ giyiko jo muto ducu ki i lobo." 
Ezekiel39:15 I kare ma noŋo jo ma giyerogi-ni tye ka wot i lobo, ka ce ŋat mo onoŋo cogo dano, ci keto lanyut mo ka ŋet cogo-nu, nio waŋ ma luyik dano guyiko woko i Nota me Mony pa Gog." 
Ezekiel39:16 (Gaŋ mo tye kunnu ma, gilwoŋo ni Kamona.) Meno aye kit macalo gibilonyo ki lobo wek obed maleŋ kit ma yam con.”"
