Ezekiel39:17 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco bota kuman ni, “In wod pa dano, lwon kwa winyo ducu mapatpat ki lee tim ducu me cokke ka camo gitum ma atye ka yubone pigi. Man bibedo karama madit i wi godi me Icrael, ka ma gibicamo iye riŋo dok bene gimato iye remo." 
Ezekiel39:18 Gibicamo kom askari ma gin cogi oteka, dok gibimato remo pa luloc me lobo, remo nyogi romi ki pa litino romi, pa dyegi ki pa twoni, ma gin ducu lim makwo me Bacan ma gucwe." 
Ezekiel39:19 Ka aneko jo magi macalo lee me gitum, winyo kacel ki lee gibicamo kit moo ducu ma giromo noŋone, dok gibimato remo nio wan ma gumer woko." 
Ezekiel39:20 Gibicamo gin ducu ma gunoŋo i wi me jana ma giromo camone, aguragura ki jo ma giŋweco kwedgi, riŋo kom askari ki pa oteka lweny.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel39:21 Rwot Lubaŋa owacci, “Abinyuto deyona i kin lurok wek gunen, dok bene abinyuto botgi kit macalo atiyo ki twerona me ŋolo kop atir, ma noŋo aketo ciŋa i komgi," 
Ezekiel39:22 Cakke i nino meno cito kwede anyim, jo Icrael gibiŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot Lubaŋagi," 
Ezekiel39:23 Lurok doŋ gibigeyo ni jo Icrael yam giterogi i opii pi balgi, pien onoŋo gutimo bal maraco atika i koma, mumiyo aloko geya woko botgi ci amiyo Lukworgi gumakogi ka gunekogi ducu ki pala lucwan." 
Ezekiel39:24 Atimogi muporo balgi ki rocgi ma gutimo, ci alokke woko ki botgi.”" 
Ezekiel39:25 Rwot Lubaŋa owacci, “Pi meno kombeddi, kica bimaka I kom likwayo pa Yakobo, ma gin aye jo Icrael, ci abidwoko gumgi botgi. Abibedo ki nyeko kun agwoko nyiŋa maleŋ-ŋi," 
Ezekiel39:26 Wigi biwil woko i kom lewic ma yam gubedo kwede, ki bal me tim roro ma gubedo ka timone i koma, ka doŋ gibibedo i lobogi mot ma ŋat mo pe bimiyo gibedo ki lworo." 
Ezekiel39:27 Abikwanyogi ki i wi lobo ducu ka ma lukworgi gibedo iye ci adwokogi cen, kun anyuto bot rok mapol ni an aleŋ," 
Ezekiel39:28 Man bimiyo jona giŋeyo ni an aye a Rwot Lubaŋagi, pien yam amiyo giterogi i opii i kin lurok, ka dok acokogi adwokogi cen i lobogi kikome. Pe doŋ gibibwoto dano mo i kingi doŋ i kin lurok wacel." 
Ezekiel39:29 Pe doŋ abilokke woko ki botgi doki, ka doŋ atyeko onyo Cwiny mera i komgi gin jo Icrael.” Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel40:1 I nino dwe apar i acakki me mwaka manyen, i ŋe mwaka pyeraryo wiye abic ma doŋ wari kwede i opii, i mwaka me apar wiye aŋwen ma onoŋo gaŋ me Jerucalem doŋ gituro woko, i nino meno kikome Rwot odiya ki ciŋe," 
Ezekiel40:2 ci otiŋa woko i ginanyutane, okela i lobo Icrael, ka ociba piny i wi got mabor. Aneno lwak gedo mapol i nyima ma ginen calo gaŋ ma akemme kwede." 
Ezekiel40:3 I kare ma doŋ en okela kunnu, ci aneno dano mo ma nen calo mola, omako tol tworo ki lagada i ciŋe me pimo piny; en danonu onoŋo ocuŋ i doggaŋ," 
Ezekiel40:4 Ci dano-nu owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, nen piny ki waŋi, dok iwiny lok ki iti, ci iket cwinyi me tamo pi gin ducu ma abinyutti, pien gikeli kany ki tyen lok ni myero anyutti gin meno ducu; in doŋ ituc gin ducu ma inenogi-ni bot jo Icrael.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Gin ma aneno-ni aye ot pa Lubaŋa, ma girumo woko litit ki cel. Laco-nu okwanyo odoo lagadane me pimo piny ma borre romo futi apar, ci opimo cel. Onoŋo ni borre me dok malo romo futi apar, ki lacce nyo dit me kome bene romo futi apar." 
Ezekiel40:6 Lacen oa ocito i doggaŋ ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ. Ka oito rwom ocito malo, ci opimo doggola ki piny i ŋom, ci oromo futi apar." 
Ezekiel40:7 Ki i ŋeye onoŋo tye yo ma gikato kwede, onoŋo tye iye kicika pa lukurpiny ma romo adek i ŋete acel acel. Kicika acel acel borre onoŋo tye futi apar ki lacce bene futi apar, ki cel ma onoŋo tye i kingi, lacgi nyo dit komgi onoŋo romo futi aboro. I ŋe kicika pa lukur-piny onoŋo tye iye yo me wot ma borre romo futi apar, yone onoŋo cito donyo i kicika madit ma okemo ot pa Lubaŋa." 
Ezekiel40:8 Lacen opimo kicika meno ma okemo ot pa Lubaŋa-ni, onoŋo lacce romo futi apar wiye aryo." 
Ezekiel40:9 Cel ma i ŋet doggaŋ tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi onoŋo romo futi adek, kicika me donyo iye onoŋo tye cok ki ot pa Lubaŋa kikome." 
Ezekiel40:10 Onoŋo tye kicika adek tuŋŋi ki tunnl i doggola ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ; gin kicika adek-ku ducu onoŋo ditogi romrom, ki cel ma i kin kicika bene onoŋo ditogi romrom." 
Ezekiel40:11 Ka dok opimo lac me doggaŋ ma gidonyo kwede-ni, ci oromo futi pyeraryo wiye aryo, ki doŋ ka ma twolo i doggaŋ onoŋo futi apar wiye abicel." 
Ezekiel40:12 Doŋ ki i nyim kicika pa lukur-piny acel acel onoŋo tye cel macek ma borre romo incic pyeraryo, ki dit me kome bene onoŋo romo incic pyeraryo." 
Ezekiel40:13 Dok opimo lac me doggaŋ cakke ki i kor ot me kicika acel o kwede wa i kor ot me kicika mukene ma okemme ki lawote, ci oromo futi pyeraŋwen," 
Ezekiel40:14 Dano-nu dok opimo kicika me donyo ma gikato kwede i dyekal mukene, onoŋo oromo futi pyeradek wiye aryo." 
Ezekiel40:15 Doŋ bor pa yo ducu cakke ki woko i ne doggaŋ cito kwede atir wa i kicika me agikki onoŋo romo futi pyeraboro. 
Ezekiel40:16 Onoŋo waŋ dirica madiŋŋe tye i kicika acel acel ki i cel ma onoŋo tye i kingi. Kicika ma i doggola me donyo bene dirica onoŋo orumo woko ducu. Cel ma i kin kicika bene onoŋo gigoro iye cal yadi otit. 
Ezekiel40:17 Lacen dano-nu okwanya okela i dyekal ma tye yo tuŋ woko. Onoŋo tye kunnu kicika pyeradek ma orumo dyekal woko; i nyimgi tye ka ma gipeto ki gweŋ maber. 
Ezekiel40:18 Ka ma gipeto iye gwen-ni onoŋo omedde orumo dyekal woko. Man onoŋo borre rom ki bor pa doggaŋ; en aye dyekal ma woko ma tye piny ma gipeto iye gweŋ," 
Ezekiel40:19 Ka dok opimo bor piny me dyekal ma tye yo tuŋ iye ki i nyim doggaŋ ma piny, dok kwede i ŋe dyekal ma i iye, ci borre oromo futi miya acel ki pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel40:20 Ci lacen dano-nu otelo nyima ocito to tuŋ acam, ci nen, onoŋo tye kunnu doggaŋ ma okemo yo tuŋ acam, ma en aye doggaŋ me dyekal ma woko. Ci opimo borre ki lacce." 
Ezekiel40:21 Onoŋo tye kicika adek tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi kicika-ni, ki cel ma i kingi, ki kicika me donyo ma gikato kwede i dyekal mukene, gin ducu ditogi romrom ki dito pa gin ma tye doggaŋ mukene ca. Bor me doggaŋ onoŋo romo futi pyeraboro ki lacce onoŋo romo futi pyeraŋwen." 
Ezekiel40:22 Kicika madit, waŋ dirica, ki cal yadi otit ma gigorogi i kom kicika onoŋo girom kimukene me doggaŋ ma okemo yo tuŋ wokceŋ-ni. Kany bene onoŋo tye iye rwom abiro ma gicito kwede i doggaŋ ki kicika me donyo onoŋo tye ki yo tuŋ i iye." 
Ezekiel40:23 Dogcel ma donyo i dyekal ma i iye onoŋo okemo dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acam kit macala tye kwede yo tuŋ wokceŋ. Ci opimo nia ki i dogcel mukene o kwede wa i kom dogcel ma tye yo tuŋcel, oromo futi miya acel ki pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel40:24 Ka dok dano-nu otela tera yo tuŋ acuc; ka wao kunnu ci waneno dogcel mukene. Ci opimo cel ma i ŋet doggaŋ ki tuŋŋi, ki kicika me donyo; onoŋo ditogi rom ki mukene-gu." 
Ezekiel40:25 Onoŋo tye waŋ dirica i dogcel man ki i kicika me doggola me donyo, ma girom ki waŋ dirica mukene-gu. Borre onoŋo romo futi pyeraboro, ki lacce futi pyeraŋwen." 
Ezekiel40:26 Onoŋo tye kunnu rwom abiro ma gicito kwede i doggaŋ, ki kicika me doggola me donyo onoŋo tye ki yo tuŋ i iye. Onoŋo bene giciro cal otit i cel ma i ŋet doggolane; acel tye tuŋcel ki mukene tye tuŋcel." 
Ezekiel40:27 Dok bene onoŋo tye dogcel mo yo tuŋ acuc i dyekal ma i iye. Dano-nu opimo bor piny ma tye i kin dogcel aryo-nu okemo yo tuŋ acuc, ci borre oromo futi miya acel ki pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel40:28 Lacen dano-nu okela i dyekal ma i iye kun wadonyo ki i dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acuc. Ci opimo dogcel ma yo tuŋ acuc, onoŋo ni ditte rom ki dito pa dogcel mukene-gu." 
Ezekiel40:29 Kicika ma i ŋetegu, ki cel ma i ŋet doggolane, ki kicika ma doggola me donyo onoŋo ditogi romrom ki dito pa kicika mukene-gu. Onoŋo tye waŋ dirica mapol ma orumo ki yo tuŋ i iye ki i kicika me doggola me donyo; borre onoŋo romo futi pyeraboro, ki lacce onoŋo romo futi pyeraŋwen." 
Ezekiel40:30 Dok bene kunnu onoŋo tye iye mapol ma i doggola me donyo ma gurumo woko; borgi onoŋo romo futi pyeraŋwen ki lacgi onoŋo romo futi aboro. 
Ezekiel40:31 Kicika ma i doggola me donyo onoŋo okemo dyekal ma woko, ki cal yadi otit onoŋo gitye i kom cel ma i ŋet doggolane, ki yone me ito onoŋo tye ki rwom aboro." 
Ezekiel40:32 Ka dok okela i dyekal ma i iye kun wawok ki i dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ. Opimo dogcel, ci onoŋo ni ditte rom ki mukene-gu ducu." 
Ezekiel40:33 Kicika ma i ŋete-gu, cel ma i ŋet doggolane, ki kicika ma i doggola me donyo onoŋo ducu rom ki mukene-gu. Onoŋo tye waŋ dirica mapol ma orumo woko ki tuŋ i iye, ki kicikane ma i doggola me donye borre onoŋo romo futi pyeraboro, ki lacce onoŋo romo futi pyeraŋwen." 
Ezekiel40:34 Kicica ma i doggola me donyune onoŋo okemo yo tuŋ dyekal ma woko. Onoŋo cal yadi otit ma gogorogo i kom cel ma ŋet doggolane ducu, acel tye yo tuŋcel ki mukene yo tuŋcel ki yone me ito malo onoŋotye ki rwom aboro." 
Ezekiel40:35 Dok okela i dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acam, ci opimo, onoŋo ditte obedo rom ki dito pa mukene-gu." 
Ezekiel40:36 Kicika ma ŋete-gu, ki cel ma i ŋet doggolane ki kicika ma i doggola me donye onoŋo ditogi ducu rom ki dito pa mukene-gu, onoŋo bene tye iye waŋ dirica mapol ma orumo woko dyere. Borre onoŋo romo futi pyeraŋwen." 
Ezekiel40:37 Kicika ma doggola me donyo onoŋo okemo yo tuŋ dyekal ma woko. Onoŋo cal yadi otit tye ma gigoro i kom cel ma i ŋet doggolane ducu, acel tye yo tuŋcel, ki mukene tye yo tuŋcel ki yone ma ito malo onoŋo tye ki rwom aboro." 
Ezekiel40:38 I dyekal ma woko onoŋo tye iye kicika mo ki doggolane ma okubbe ki kicika me doggola me donye-ni, ka ma onoŋo gilwoko iye riŋo lee ma gityero me gi tum awaŋa." 
Ezekiel40:39 Onoŋo tye meja aŋwen i kicika me doggola me donyo, aryo tye tuŋcel ki aryo mukene gicibo tuŋcel, ma lee me gitum awaŋa ki gitumme bal kigitum me tiŋo alii onoŋo giŋolo gi i wi meja magi," 
Ezekiel40:40 Doŋ yo tuŋ i ne kicika me doggola me donyo ka ma gidonyo iye i dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acam, onoŋo tye iye meja aryo; ki dok i ŋet kicika ma i doggola me donyo onoŋo bene tye iye meja aryo." 
Ezekiel40:41 Pi meno i i kicika onoŋo tye iye meja aŋwen, ki tuŋ woko bene onoŋo tye iye meja aŋwen, magi ducu doŋ ribbe doko meja aboro, ma lee ma gityero me gitum awaŋa ducu giŋologi i wigi," 
Ezekiel40:42 Dok bene onoŋo tye meja aŋwen me got ma gipayo apaya ma gitiyo kwedgi pi yubo lee me gitum awaŋa, Onoŋo borgi romo incic pyeraryo ki lac wigi onoŋo romo incic pyeradek i twokke acel acel ducu. Doŋ jami tic ma gitiyo kwedgi me ŋolo lee me gitum awaŋa onoŋo giketo i wigi." 
Ezekiel40:43 Goli ducu ma bocogi rom ki lac ciŋ, onoŋo gigurogi gurumo i kicika woko ducu. Riŋo ma gimito tyerone me gitum koŋ giketo i wi meja magi." 
Ezekiel40:44 Ka dok okwanya ki i dyekal ma woko okela i dyekal ma i iye, ci aneno onoŋo tye kunnu kicika aryo; acel onoŋo tye i ŋet dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acam, okemo yo tuŋ acuc, ki acel onoŋo tye yo tuŋ dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acuc, okemo yo tuŋ acam." 
Ezekiel40:45 Ci danonu otitta ni kicika ma okemo yo tuŋ acuc-ci meno pa ajwagi ma giloyo tic i ot pa Lubaŋa. 
Ezekiel40:46 Ento kicika ma okemo yo tuŋ acam meno pa ajwagi ma giloyo tic i kom keno tyer. Ajwagi magi ducu gin Lulevi ma gin aye likwayo pa Jadok; ma gin keken ki i kin likwayo pa Levi aye giyegi me cito i nyim Rwot ka tic bote. 
Ezekiel40:47 Ci dano-nu opimo dyekal ma i iye, borre onoŋo romo futi miya acel ki pyerabicel i twokke acel acel. Keno tyer onoŋo tye i nyim ot pa Lubaŋa kikome." 
Ezekiel40:48 Lacen otera i i kicika ma tye i doggola ma gidonyo kwede i ot pa Lubaŋa, Ci opimo doggola me donyo; borre obedo futi aboro ki lacce futi pyeraryo wiye adek, ki dit me kom cel onoŋo romo futi abic i ŋete ryoryo ducu." 
Ezekiel40:49 Bor pa kicika ma i doggola me donyo, ki lacce, onoŋo romo futi apar wiye aboŋwen, onoŋo bene tye rwom apar me ito malo iye. Dok bene onoŋo wir tye kunnu i ŋet doggola me donyo tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi." 
Ezekiel41:1 Lacen dok dano-nu okela i kicika ma i dyere, Ci opimo yo ma gikato ki iye onoŋo borre romo futi apar," 
Ezekiel41:2 ki lacce onoŋo futi apar wiye abicel, ki dit me kom cel onoŋo romo futi aboro yo tuŋ ryoryo ducu. Ka dok opimo kicika onoŋo borre romo futi pyerabicel wiye aŋwen, ki lacce romo futi pyeradek wiye aryo," 
Ezekiel41:3 Lacen dano-nu odonyo i kicika me agikkine. Ci opimo doggola me donyo, bone futi ‘adek ki lacce futi apar, ki dit kom kicika yo tuŋ ryoryo ducu onoŋo romo futi apar wiye acel." 
Ezekiel41:4 Ka opimo kicika borre oromo futi pyeradek wiye aryo ki lacce futi pyeradek wiye aryo, Ka lacen owacca ni, “Man aye kabedo maleŋ makato ducu.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Dano-nu opimo cel me ot pa Lubaŋa ci ditte oromo futi apar, Doŋ i kom cel man ma orumo ot pa Lubaŋa woko ducu, onoŋo tye iye kicika matitino, ma lacgi onoŋo romo futi abicel." 
Ezekiel41:6 Kicika ma i ŋete onoŋo tye i dul adek ma gukubbe gudok malo, ma acel acel onoŋo ododde i wi wadi kun dul odi acel acel tye ki kicika pyeradek. Onoŋo bene tye gin me latyel kor kicika ducu ma orumo cel me ot pa Lubaŋa woko me teno kicika ducu, wek pe gutenne i kom cel me ot pa Lubaŋa," 
Ezekiel41:7 Doŋ kicika ma i nete-gu gudoko malac kun gutinne woko malo likuŋ i wi odi wadigi ki dul odi acel acel, ma guporo lac pa gin latyel kor kicika a i kom dul ot acel o kwede i kom dul ot mukene ma gurumo ot pa Lubaŋa, Onoŋo bene tye yo ma giito kwede malo i ŋet ot pa Lubaŋa, kit meno dano-nu twero a ki i dul odi ma piny dok malo i dul odi ma tye i wiye me agikki, kun kato ki dul odi ma tye i dyere." 
Ezekiel41:8 Ci aneno kabedo murumo ot pa Lubaŋa bene otinne malo i kabedo ducu. Ci gipimo te guti ma i ŋete ducu ginoŋo ni borre oromo bor pa lagada acel ma rom ki futi apar. 
Ezekiel41:9 Doŋ dit me kom cel ma woko me kicika ma i ŋete ducu oromo futi aboro; ki dul abam ma gibwoto tye noŋo onoŋo romo futi aboro bene. Dok me a i kin abam me ot pa Lubaŋa 
Ezekiel41:10 o kwede i kicika me dyekal ma gurumo ot pa Lubaŋa woko, onoŋo lacce romo futi pyeradek wiye aryo." 
Ezekiel41:11 Doggola me kicika ma i nete-gu ducu gukemo abam ma onoŋo gibwoto tye nono-ni. Doggola acel okemo yo tuŋ acam, ki doggola mukene okemo yo tuŋ acuc, doŋ lac pa dul ma gibwoto odon nono-ni onoŋo romo futi aboro ma orumo ot woko ducu," 
Ezekiel41:12 Ot mo ma onoŋo okemme ki ot pa Lubaŋa ki tun potoceŋ onoŋo lacce romo futi miya acel ki apar wiye aryo, ki cel ma orumo onoŋo ditte romo futi aboro; ki borre onoŋo romo futi miya acel ki pyeraŋwen wiye aŋwen," 
Ezekiel41:13 Lacen dano-nu dok opimo ot pa Lubaŋa, borre obedo futi miya acel ki pyerabicel. Dok opimo piny ki yo tuŋ i ŋe ot pa Lubaŋa dok kwede ariari yo tuŋ i dyekal, medo ki gedo ki celle, borre oromo futi miya acel ki pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel41:14 Nyim ot pa Lubaŋa ma okemo yo tuŋ wokceŋ ki dyekalle, onoŋo romo futi mi ya acel ki pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel41:15 Ka dok opimo bor pa gedo ma onoŋo okemme ki dyekal ma onoŋo tye yo tuŋ potocenni, ki celle ducu ryoryo, oromo futi miya acel ki pyerabicel. Kicika maditte ma gidonyo kwede i ot pa Lubaŋa, ki kicika ma i iye, ki kicika ma i doggola me donyo ma tye yo tuŋ woko," 
Ezekiel41:16 onoŋo gipetogi woko maber ki bao ma oumo kor ot woko ducu; gin adek-ki ducu onoŋo gitye ki wan dirica mapol madin, Ki malo ka wi dye ot i doggola me ot pa Lubaŋa onoŋo giguro kome ducu girumo ki bao, cakke ki i dye ot piny dok kwede malo wa i waŋ dirica (waŋ dirica onoŋo giumogi woko)" 
Ezekiel41:17 nio wa i kabedo ma tye malo ka wi doggola, wa i kicika ma i iye ki yo tuŋ woko bene. Doŋ ki i kom cel murumo woko ducu ki i kicika ma i iye ki kicika maditte, onoŋo gigoro cal lukerubi ki cal yadi otit." 
Ezekiel41:18 Giketo cal yat otit i kin lukerubi ma gigwennye agwenya. Lakerubi acel acel onoŋo waŋe tye aryo," 
Ezekiel41:19 waŋ mo ma nen calo waŋ dano onoŋo okemo otit ki yo tuŋcel, ki tuŋcel bene waŋ ma nen calo wan labwor okemo otit, Gigorogi girumo kwede ot pa Lubaŋa woko litit;" 
Ezekiel41:20 cakke ki i dye ot piny dok kwede malo ka wi doggola gigoro iye cal lukerubi ki cal otit i kor ot," 
Ezekiel41:21 Bao me doggola ducu obedo latwoke aŋwen: ki i nyim kabedo maleŋ onoŋo tye iye gin mo 
Ezekiel41:22 ma obedo calo ke no tyer ma gitiyo ki bao, Onoŋo borre romo futi abic ki lacce futi adek. Twoke ducu, ki tedi tere ki murumo ducu onoŋo gitiyo ki bao. Lacen dano-nu owacca ni, “Man aye meja ma gicibo cuŋ i nyim Rwot.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Onoŋo tye doggola la iye aryo i agikki me yo ma donyo i kicika madit, dok bene onoŋo tye doggola la iye aryo i agikki yo ma cito i kabedo maleŋ makato ducu-ni." 
Ezekiel41:24 Doggola acel acel onoŋo giyubo laiye aryo ma giwirre giyabbe i dye ot ka maleŋ," 
Ezekiel41:25 Dok i kom doggola me kicika maditte onoŋo gigoro iye cal lukerubi ki cal yadi otit, kit macalo onoŋo koŋ gigoro i kor ot me kicika ducu-ni. Ki yo tuŋ woko onoŋo tye iye bolo me bao me geŋo tipo ma tye i nyim doggola me donyo." 
Ezekiel41:26 Dok bene onoŋo tye waŋ dirica madin tuŋcel, ki yadi otit tye tuŋcel ki tuŋcel, i kom cel ma i ŋet kicika ma i doggola me donyo." 
Ezekiel42:1 Dano-nu dok otelo nyima otera i dyekal ma i iye ma tye yo tuŋ acam-mi, ci okela wa i kicika mapol ma onoŋo gukemme ki dyekal me ot pa Lubaŋa ma onoŋo okemme ki ot ma tye yo tuŋ acam-mi." 
Ezekiel42:2 Ot man ma onoŋo tye yo tuŋ acam-mi borre onoŋo romo futi miya acel ki pyerabicel, ki lacce onoŋo romo futi pyeraboro." 
Ezekiel42:3 Ki tuŋcel onoŋo okemo kabedo ma lacce romo futi pyeradek wiye aryo ma i ŋet ot pa Lubaŋa, ki tuŋcel onoŋo okemo kabedo ka ma gicano iye gweŋ ma i dyekal ma woko. Ot man onoŋo yam gigero i dul adek ma gukubbe malo i wi wadi, dul ot acel acel onoŋo tye ki yo mukemo yo wadi ma donyo i odi ma gukubbe malo i dul adek-ki." 
Ezekiel42:4 I nyim kicika magi onoŋo yo tye iye me donyo i ot ki yo tuŋ i iye kunnu, lacce onoŋo romo futi apar wiye abicel ki borre futi miya acel ki pyerabicel; doggolagi ducu onoŋo tye yo tuŋ acam," 
Ezekiel42:5 Kicika ma malo onoŋo gigero madin, pien kicika ma piny ki ma i dyere onoŋo gumayo kabedo malac woko ki piny." 
Ezekiel42:6 Pien onoŋo gitye odi ma gukubbe malo i dul adek, onoŋo wir bene pe i igi calo wir ma onoŋo tye i dyekal ma woko-ni, Mumiyo kicika ma malo gidiyo woko obedo madin makato kicika ma gucuŋ i ŋom ki ma i dyere-gu." 
Ezekiel42:7 Onoŋo bene tye cel ki woko ma opimme ki kicika ducu atir, kun okemo yo tuŋ dyekal ma woko, doŋ ka ma okemme ki kicika onoŋo borre romo futi pyeraboro." 
Ezekiel42:8 Kicika ma onoŋo tye i kom dyekal ma woko onoŋo bocogi romo futi pyeraboro, kun kicika ma okemo ot pa Lubaŋa-gu bocogi onoŋo romo futi miya acel ki pyerabicel." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ki yo tuŋ piny i te kicika magi onoŋo tye iye doggola me donyo yo tuŋ wokceŋ, ka onoŋo dano gidonyo i igi ki yo tuŋ i dyekal ma woko," 
Ezekiel42:10 ka ma cel ma tye yo tuŋ woko ocakke ki iye. Onoŋo tye kicika mogo bene yo tuŋ acuc ma gukemme ki dyekal dok gukemme ki ot madit-ti," 
Ezekiel42:11 onoŋo yo bene tye i nyimgi. Onoŋo giromrom ki kicika ma gitye yo tuŋ acam, ma bocogi ki lacgi bene rom, ki kit ma gigerogi kwede bene rom, wa doggolagu ducu girom," 
Ezekiel42:12 Onoŋo tye doggola me donyo yo tuŋ wokceŋ ki piny i te kicika ma gitye yo tuŋ acuc, ka ma dano donyo ki iye tuc i yo, ki dok cel ma opoko kingi onoŋo okemme kwedgi." 
Ezekiel42:13 Dano-nu dok owacca ni, “Kicika magi ducu ma tye yo tuŋ acam ki kicika ma gitye yo tuŋ acuc ma gukemme ki dyekal-li gin aye kicika maleŋ, I kicika magi en aye ajwagi ma gidonyo ka tic i nyim Rwot gicamo iye gityer maleŋ makato ducu, Kunnu aye giketo iye gityer maleŋ makato ducu, gityer me moko kwon, gitum pi bal, ki gitum pi tino alii, pien kabedo meno aye kabedo maleŋ." 
Ezekiel42:14 Ka inen ajwagi doŋ gudonyo i kabedo maleŋ, pe gibia gikato woko ki iye gicito i dyekal ma woko laboŋo weko boŋŋigi ma giruko ka gitye ka tic kunnu, pien boŋŋi magi gileŋ. Gibiruko boŋŋi mukene ma pud peya noŋo gucito cok ki kabedo ka ma lwak gicokke iye.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Lacen ka doŋ dano-nu otyeko pimo kabedo ma tye yo tuŋ i iye murumo ot pa Lubaŋa, ci otelo nyima otera wadonyo ki i dogcel ma okemo yo tuŋ wokceŋ, ci ocako pimo kabedo ma orumo ot pa Lubaŋa ki woko," 
Ezekiel42:16 Opimo kabedo ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ ki lagada me pimo piny, ci opimo ki lagada meno oromo futi miya aboro." 
Ezekiel42:17 Ka olokke dok opimo kabedo ma tye yo tuŋ acam, opimo ki lagada me pimo piny oromo futi miya aboro." 
Ezekiel42:18 Ka dok olokke opimo kabedo ma tye yo tuŋ acuc, opimo ki lagada me pimo piny oromo futi miya aboro," 
Ezekiel42:19 Lacen olokke yo tuŋ potoceŋ ci opimo ki lagada lapim piny oromo futi miya aboro. 
Ezekiel42:20 Opimo twoke aŋwen ducu. Onoŋo bene tye cel murumo woko, ma borre romo futi mi ya aboro ki lacce bene futi mi ya aboro, wek opok kin kabedo maleŋ ki kabedo me nino ducu." 
Ezekiel43:1 Lacen dok dano-nu okela wa i dogcel ma okemo yo tuŋ wokceŋ. 
Ezekiel43:2 Nen, deyo pa Lubaŋa pa Icrael oa ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ, kun mor calo mor pa pii ma corre; omiyo lobo obedo ka ryeny aryenya ki deyone," 
Ezekiel43:3 Dok aneno ginanyuta ma obedo rom ki ginanyuta ma yam aneno ma onoŋo Rwot obino ka jwero gaŋ woko-ni, dok bene obedo calo ginanyuta ma yam aneno i ŋet kulu Kebar-ni. Ci cutcut apoto aryebbe woko piny." 
Ezekiel43:4 Deyo pa Rwot okato ki i dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ ci odonyo i ot pa Lubaŋa. 
Ezekiel43:5 Ci Cwiny pa Rwot otiŋa woko malo, okela i dyekal me ot pa Lubaŋa ma i iye; ci aneno deyo pa Rwot opoŋo ot pa Lubaŋa woko." 
Ezekiel43:6 I kare ma onoŋo dano-nu pud ocuŋ ka neta, awinyo ŋat mo tye ka lok kweda ki i ot pa Lubaŋa," 
Ezekiel43:7 kun wacca ni, “Wod pa dano, man aye kabedo ka ma komkerra bedo iye, dok bene en aye kabedo ka ma ateno iye tyena; en aye ka ma abibedo iye i kin jo Icrael matwal. Doŋ jo Icrael, nyo lukergi, pe gibimedde ki balo nyiŋa maleŋ-ŋi, kun giwoi o lubaŋa mukene nyo gucibo gin me po lukergi mogo ma doŋ guto woko-gu," 
Ezekiel43:8 Lukergi yam guyubo doggolagi okemme ki doggolana ki dok guketo yat doggolagi okemme ki mera, man omiyo doŋ tye cel acel keken ma opoko kinwa kwedgi. Gubalo nyiŋa maleŋ-ŋi ki gin me kwer-gu ma gutimo, omiyo kiniga omaka atyekogi woko liweŋ." 
Ezekiel43:9 Kombeddi doŋ myero gukwany cal lubaŋagi-gu gubol woko, ki gin me po lukergi ma yam doŋ guto woko-gu, gubol woko ka mabor ki ka ŋeta, ci an abibedo i dyegi matwal.”" 
Ezekiel43:10 Ci Rwot dok omedde ki lokke owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, tit kit me ot pa Lubaŋa bot jo Icrael, tit botgi kit ma nen kwede ki kit yubbe, wek omi lewic omakgi pi balgi." 
Ezekiel43:11 Ka doŋ ineno lewic omakogi pi bal ducu ma yam gutimo, ci doŋ itit botgi yub ma gigero ki ot pa Lubaŋa-ni, kit ma gigero kwede doggolane me donyo ki dogcel ka ma gikato ki iye ki ka ma gidonyo ki iye, ki kit ma gedo me ot pa Lubaŋa ducu ocuŋ kwede, Dok bene imi guŋe kit me lubo cikke ducu, ki gin ma Rwot ociko ducu; co woko piny i nyimgi ma gin bene gineno, wek omi gin gugwok dok guti gin ma giciko ducu kun gilubo cik ducu." 
Ezekiel43:12 Man aye cik me ot pa Lubaŋa: Kabedo ducu murumo ma tye i wi got bibedo kabedo maleŋ makato ducu. Man aye cik me ot pa Lubaŋa.” 
Ezekiel43:13 Magi aye kit pim ma gipimo kwede keno tyer, kun gitiyo ki gin me pimo piny ma rom ki kit macalo gipimo kwede ot pa Lubaŋa-ni, Ka ma orumo te tedi me keno tyer wo ko ducu onoŋo tye futi acel ki incic aboro, ki lacce bene futi acel ki incic aboro, ki rii ma tye ka wiye borre romo incic apar. Meno aye bor me keno tyer tuŋ malo," 
Ezekiel43:14 Dul kom keno tyer ma pinnye makato ducu onoŋo borre romo futi adek. Dul mukene ma lubo onoŋo giketo ocun cen manok tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi oromo futi acel ki incic aboro, ki borre onoŋo romo futi abiro. Ki dul mukene ma tye i wi meno ma giketo ocuŋ cen manok tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi oromo futi acel ki incic aboro." 
Ezekiel43:15 Meno aye wi keno tyer ka ma giwaŋo iye gitum awaŋa; onoŋo borre bene romo futi abiro. Ten keno aŋwen-gu ducu onoŋo giboco gikato wi keno tyer mukene-gu ducu. 
Ezekiel43:16 Wi keno tyer onoŋo tye latwoke aŋwen ma romrom, ma twoke acel acel onoŋo romo futi pyeraryo," 
Ezekiel43:17 Ki dul ma i dyere bene onoŋo obedo latwoke aŋwen, ma romrom, ma acel acel onoŋo romo futi pyeraryo wiye adek; ki rii ma giketo orumo ducu borre onoŋo romo incic apar. Tedi te re onoŋo lacce ducu romo futi acel ki incic aboro, Ki rwom me cito malo i kom keno tyer onoŋo tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ." 
Ezekiel43:18 Rwot Lubaŋa dok owacca kuman ni, “Wod pa dano, magi gin aye cik me keno tyer: Ka doŋ gityeko gerone me tyero lee me gitum awaŋa i wiye ki pi coro remo i kome," 
Ezekiel43:19 ci ibimiyo twon me gitum pi bal bot ajwagi ma gin Lulevi ma gin jo me dog ot pa Jadok, ma gibino cok kweda ka tic bota," 
Ezekiel43:20 Ibikwanyo remo mogo ki i kom remo pa twon ca, ci iket i ten keno tyer aŋwen-gu ki i kom twok doge aŋwen, ka dok i kom rii ma giketo orumo woko-ni, Meno aye kit macalo ibilonyo kwede keno tyer wek obed maleŋ, imiyo bedo laboŋo bal mo i kome." 
Ezekiel43:21 Dok bene ibikwanyo twon me gitum pi bal, gibiwaŋo woko i kabedo ma giyero ma i ŋet ot pa Lubaŋa, ki yo tuŋ woko me kabedo maleŋ," 
Ezekiel43:22 Ka dok i kom nino me aryone ibityero nyok dyel ma kome pe ki mwonyo me gitum pi bal, ci gibilonyo keno tyer bene kit meno macalo gikwoŋo lonyo ki twon-ni," 
Ezekiel43:23 Ka doŋ ityeko lonyone, ci doŋ ibityero twon ma kome pe ki mwonyo ki nyok romo ma gikwanyo ki i kin lwak romi ma kome pe ki mwonyo." 
Ezekiel43:24 Ibityero bot Rwot, ki ajwagi gibikiro kado i komgi ka doŋ gicako tyerogi bot Rwot macalo gitum awaŋa." 
Ezekiel43:25 Dok ibimiyo dyel pi nino abiro me gitum pi bal, kun i nino acel acel noŋo imiyo dyel acel. Dok bene gibimiyo twon ki nyok romo ma gikwanyo ki i kin lwak romi ma kome pe ki mwonyo." 
Ezekiel43:26 Gibityero gitum lakwany bal pi keno tyer pi nino abiro kun gilonyo, dok gikwero bene." 
Ezekiel43:27 Ka doŋ gutyeko nina magi abiro, ci doŋ cakke i nino me aborone cito kwede anyim, ajwagi gibityero gitum awaŋawu ki gityer lakwecwiny i kom ke no tyer, ci an abigamowu, An Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ atyeko loko man.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Lacen dano-nu odwoka cen i dogcel ma woko me kabedo maleŋ, ma onoŋo tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ; ento onoŋo giloro woko." 
Ezekiel44:2 Ci owacca ni, “Dogcel man bibedo alora kare ducu, pe gibiyabo, dok bene ŋat mo pe bidonyo ki iye; pien Rwot, ma en Lubaŋa pa Icrael, doŋ otyeko donyo ki iye. Pi meno bibedo alora kare ducu," 
Ezekiel44:3 Laker keken gwok bibedo iye ka camo kwon i nyim Rwot; en bidonyo ki i yo ma wok ki i kicika ma i doggola me donyo, dok bene bikato ci to woko ki i yo acel-lu.”" 
Ezekiel44:4 Ci dano-nu okela kun wok kweda ki i dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acam wa i nyim ot pa Lubaŋa. Ka aneno piny ci aneno ni deyo pa Rwot opoŋo ot pa Lubaŋa woko, Cutcut apoto aryebbe woko piny," 
Ezekiel44:5 ci Rwot owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, ket cwinyi me niaŋ maber i gin ducu ma ineno ki ma iwinyo ki iti, Abetitti cik ducu me ot pa Lubaŋa ki gin ducu ma myero dano guti dok gulubi. Dok iket cwinyi me niaŋ maber i kom kit dano ma giyegi me donyo i ot pa Lubaŋa, ki jo ducu ma pe giyegi me donyo i kabedo maleŋ." 
Ezekiel44:6 “Doŋ iwac bot jo Icrael ma gin jo ma lujemo-ni ni, an Rwot Lubaŋa awaco kuman ni, Gin jo Icrael myero doŋ gugik kit tim me kwergi-gu woko ducu." 
Ezekiel44:7 Gupyedo oda pi ye lurok ma pe gilirogi i cwinygi ki i komgi me bedo i kabedona maleŋ, ka doŋ gutyero bota camma, moo dwolo ki Temo, Pi meno jona doŋ gutyeko turo gicikkena woko, medo i kom gin me kwer-gu ducu ma yam gutimo." 
Ezekiel44:8 Pe bene gubedo ka gwoko kit ma gitiyo kwede ki jamina maleŋ-gu ducu; ento guketo lurok aye me tic i kabe dona maleŋ. 
Ezekiel44:9 “Mumiyo an Rwot Lubaŋa, awaco kuman ni, Pe tye larok mo ma pe giliro i cwinye ki i kome ma bidonyo i kabedona maleŋ, kadi bed larok mo ma i kin lurok ducu ma gibedo i kin jo Icrael." 
Ezekiel44:10 “Ento Lulevi ma yam gua woko ki bota gucito woko ka mabor, ma guŋak gubwota woko calo jo Icrael ma yam guŋak woko gubedo ka woro jogi, kombeddi doŋ atye ka keto can i komgi." 
Ezekiel44:11 Gin gibibedo luticca i kabedona maleŋ, kun gigwoko dogcel me ot pa Lubaŋa, kun gitiyo bene tic i ot pa Lubaŋa. Gin aye ma gibineko lee ma dano gikelo me atyera me gitum awaŋa ki gitum pi lwak, dok bene gibibedo i dog ticgi kun gitiyo bot lwak." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ento kit macalo gubedo ka telo, jo Icrael ka woro cal jogi ma gipayo apaya ma en aye gin mumiyo jo Icrael gupoto i bal, pi meno an Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ akwoŋo kwoŋ woko mukemogi ni abiketo can i komgi." 
Ezekiel44:13 Pe doŋ gibibedo ka tic bota macalo ajwagi, dok bene pe gibinyiko cok i kom jamina maleŋ-gu ki i kom jami ma gileŋ gikato ducu-gu, Ento lewic bimakogi pi gin me kwer ma yam gutimo-gu." 
Ezekiel44:14 Kadi bed kumeno pud abiyerogi aketogi me tic i ot pa Lubaŋa, kun gitiyo kwa ticce ducu ki kwa tic ducu ma mitte ma myero giti iye.”" 
Ezekiel44:15 Rwot Lubaŋa owacci, “Ajwagi ma gin Lulevi, ma gin likwayo pa Jadok, ma gubedo ka tiyo tic i kabedona maleŋ i kare ma jo Icrael guŋak gubwota woko, gin aye gibibino cok bota ka tic bota. Gin aye gibitiyo bota kun gityero bota moo dwolo ki remo." 
Ezekiel44:16 Gin aye gibidonyo i kabedona maleŋ, kun bene ginyiko cok ki mejana, pi tiyo tic bota, ki pi lubo gin ma an aciko ducu." 
Ezekiel44:17 Ka gudonyo i dogcel me dyekal ma woko, ci gibiruko boŋŋi camanini. Pe gibibedo ki ginaruka mo me yer romo i komgi i kare ma noŋo gitye ka tic i dogcel me dyekal ma i iye, ki bene i ot pa Lubaŋa kikome." 
Ezekiel44:18 Gibiboyo wigi ki kitambara me boŋo camanini, dok bene gibiruko pali boŋo camanini i pyergi; pe gitweyo nyo giruko gin mo ma miyo kwok makogi." 
Ezekiel44:19 Ka inen gikato gicito woko bot lwak i dyekal ma woko, gibilunyo boŋŋi ma gubedo ka tic kwedgi-ni woko ki i komgi, ci giketo bedo i kicika maleŋ-gu, Doŋ gibiruko boŋŋi mukene, wek pe gunyob lwak ki boŋŋigi maleŋ-gu," 
Ezekiel44:20 Ajwagi pe gibilyelo wigi woko doŋ maleŋ, dok bene pe gibiweko yer wigi lot maboco; ento gibinyaro yer wigi woko anyara keken," 
Ezekiel44:21 Ajwaka mo pe bimato koŋo yino ka cito ka donyo i dyekal ma i iye ma i ot pa Lubaŋa," 
Ezekiel44:22 Ajwagi pe gibinyomo daa-to mo, nyo dako ma cware oryemo woko, ento gibinyomo nyako ma pe oŋeyo laco i dog ot pa jo Icrael kikome, Dok bene gitwero nyomo daato mo ma onoŋo yam koŋ cware obedo ajwaka," 
Ezekiel44:23 “Gibipwonyo jona me ŋeyo apokapoka ma tye i kin jami maleŋ ki jami me nino ducu-gu, kun ginyuto botgi bene kit ma myero gupok kwede kin gin ma keni ki gin ma pe keni," 
Ezekiel44:24 Ka ce lok daa nyo pido mo tye, ci gin ajwagi gibibedo luŋolkop, ci giŋolo kop kun gilubo kit ma an aŋolo kwede kop, Gibigwoko cikka ki gin ma an aciko, i kwero nino madito ma giciko ducu, dok bene gibigwoko ceŋ cabitta ducu bedo nino maleŋ." 
Ezekiel44:25 “Ajwagi pe bibalo komgi kekengi pi cito cok ki kom dano muto; gwok nyo gitwero balo komgi ka ce kom dano mo muto obedo wegigi nyo megigi, kom latin awobi liyo nyako, kom omegigi nyo kom lumegigi ma pe ginyomogi," 
Ezekiel44:26 Lacen ma noŋo doŋ ajwaka mo obalo kome woko kekene, ci en bikwano nino abiro ma myero ebed kwede, ka doŋ i ŋeye lonnye woko bedo leŋ." 
Ezekiel44:27 I nino ma en cito i kabedo maleŋ, i dyekal ma i iye, ka tic kunnu, en ajwaka bityero gitum pi balle, Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel44:28 “Dul pa ajwagi i kom gin ma amiyo bot jo Icrael me aleyagi en aye ticgi me bedo ajwagina, Gin ajwagi pe gibibedo ki kit jami mo i Icrael; lonyo ma gimiyo pigi me agwoka aye an," 
Ezekiel44:29 Ajwagi gibicamo gityer me moko kwon, gitum pi bal, ki gitum me tiŋo alii; ki gin ducu ma gidyero i ciŋa i Icrael bibedo megi." 
Ezekiel44:30 Ajwagi myero gimi botgi cam ducu mukwoŋo cek i potti ki kit kwa gin mukene-gu ma gityero bota. Pi tyen mukwoŋo ma noŋo lwak gitedo mugati myero gukwany mugati ma gikwoŋo tedone gumi bot ajwagi, wek gumma obed i pacogi," 
Ezekiel44:31 Ajwagi pe gibicamo kit gin mo ma oto kene nyo lee mo ma ŋuu aye okayo, kadi winyo nyo lee tim." 
Ezekiel45:1 “Ka ce wupoko lobo kun wumiyo dul ki kaka acel acel, ci dul acel myero giket cen pat obed gin maleŋ pa Rwot, Bor pa dul lobo man myero obed mairo apar ki lacce mairo aboro. Doŋ dul lobo meno woko ducu bibedo kabedo maleŋ." 
Ezekiel45:2 Dul lobo mo ma twoke aŋwen ducu romrom myero giwek pi ot pa Lubaŋa, ma twoke acel acel noŋo romo futi miya aboro, Kabedo ma giweko noŋo bene bibedo tye murumo kabedo meno woko dyere ma lacce romo futi pyeraboro." 
Ezekiel45:3 I kom dul lobo man maleŋ-ŋi myero gipim dul mo ma borre romo mairo apar ki lacce mairo aŋwen, gipok waŋe woko obed pat, at pa Lubaŋa bibedo i kabedo man, ma en aye kabedo maleŋ makato ducu." 
Ezekiel45:4 Man bibedo dul lobo maleŋ dok bene bibedo pi ajwagi ma gitiyo i kabedo maleŋ, kun ginyiko cok bot Rwot me tic bote. Man bene bibedo kabedo ka ma odigi bibedo iye ki kabedo maleŋ pi ot pa Lubaŋa." 
Ezekiel45:5 Dul mukene ma borre romo mairo apar ki lacce mairo aŋwen, gibiketo pat bedo dul pa Luleyi ma gitiyo tic i ot pa Lubaŋa, Dullobo man Luleyi gibicamo bedo megi matwal, dok bene i kabedo man aye gibigero iye gaŋi ka ma gibibedo iye," 
Ezekiel45:6 I ŋet dul lobo ma giketo pat me bedo kabedo maleŋ-ŋi, myero gipim kabedo ka ma gibigero iye gaŋ, ma borre romo mairo apar ki lacce mairo aryo. Kabedo man bibedo pa jo Icrael ducu." 
Ezekiel45:7 “Myero bene gipim dul lobo giket pi laker, Cakke i kom kabedo murumo kabedo maleŋ ki i kom gaŋ, lobone bidok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ i waŋ apokki ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ. Cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ o kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ borre bibedo rom ki bor pa dul lobo ma gipoko gimiyo ki kaka me Icrael-li," 
Ezekiel45:8 Meno bibedo dul lobo pa laker i lobo Icrael. Doŋ lukerra ma gin luloc pe doŋ gibiuno jona matwal; ento gibimiyo jo Icrael gigamo lobo kun lubo kakagi ducu.” 
Ezekiel45:9 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Wun luloc me Icrael doŋ wutimo bal oromo! Wugik tim bwami ki uno dano woko. Wutim gin ma tye atir dok kakare, Pe myero dok wuryem jona woko ki i lobogi, An Rwot Lubaŋa aye ma atye ka waco botwu lok man." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Wun ducu, ŋat acel acel myero obed ki ratili maber ma en pimo kwede jami ki gen dok kakare." 
Ezekiel45:11 Epa ma gipimo ki jami mutwo bibedo rom ki bat ma gipimo kwede jami ma pige. Bat rom ki acel me apar me komer, ki epa bene rom ki acel me apar me komer; doŋ komer aye bibedo gin ma dano ducu myero gupim ki jami." 
Ezekiel45:12 Cekel acel bibedo rom ki gera pyeraryo; cekel abic bibedo cekel abic, ki cekel apar bibedo cekel apar, ka doŋ mina acel bibedo rom ki cekel pyerabic," 
Ezekiel45:13 “Man aye gityer ma wubikelo me atyera: acel me abicel me epa ma oa ki i kom komer acel acel me ŋano, ki acel me abicel ma oa ki i kom komer acel acel me cayiri." 
Ezekiel45:14 Kit dul ma gimoko me pimo moo tye kuman: acel me apar me bat ma oa ki i kom kor acel acel (kor obedo calo komer, tye iye bat apar)." 
Ezekiel45:15 Dok bene wubikwanyo romo acel ki i kin lwak romi miya aryo, kun wukwanyogi ki boŋo me dog ot pa Icrael ducu. Man aye gityer ma gibityero pi gityer me moko kwon, gitum awaŋa, ki gityer lakwecwiny, pi timo gin me lakwany bal woko ki i komgi. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel45:16 “Lwak ducu me lobo man gibimiyo gityer man bot laker ma tye i Icrael. 
Ezekiel45:17 Doŋ ŋat ma tye ka loc aye ma bimiyo lee me gitum awaŋa, gityer me moko kwon, ki gityer amata i kare me kwero nino madito, i por dwe, ki nino me cabit ducu, ki i kare me kwero nino madito ducu ma giciko pi jo Icrael. En laloc meno bimiyo lee me gitum pi bal, gityer me moko kwon, gitum awaŋa, ki gityer lakwecwiny, pi timo gin me lakwany bal woko ki i kom jo Icrael.”" 
Ezekiel45:18 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “I nino mukwoŋo me dwe mukwono, wubikwanyo latin twon ma kome pe ki mwonyo, ci wulonyo kwede kabedo maleŋ." 
Ezekiel45:19 Ajwaka bikwanyo remo manok me gitum pi bal ci keto i kom doggola me ot pa Lubaŋa; biketo bene i twok keno tyer aŋwen-ni, ki i kom yat me dogcel me dyekal ma i iye." 
Ezekiel45:20 Ibitimo kit meno i nino me abiro me dwe mukwoŋo pi dano mo ma otimo bal pi roc mo nyo pi kwiya piny. Ibitimo gin lakwany bal woko pi lonyo ot pa Lubaŋa wek obed maleŋ. 
Ezekiel45:21 I nino dwe apar wiye aŋwen me dwe mukwoŋo, en aye wubikwero iye nino me Kato (Paska), kun wubedo ka camo mugati ma tobi pe iye pi nino abiro." 
Ezekiel45:22 I nino meno laloc bikwanyo latin romo miyo me gitum pi bal pi en ki pi lwak ducu me lobowu. 
Ezekiel45:23 Dok i nino acel acel i kom nino abiro me kwero nino me Kato-ni en bimiyo litino twoni abiro ki nyogi romi abiro ma komgi pe ki mwonyo, tyero me gitum awaŋa bot Rwot. En bene bibedo ka tyero nyok dyel acel acel nino ki nino me gitum pi bal." 
Ezekiel45:24 En dok bimiyo gityer me moko kwon ma romo agwata adek pi twon acel acel, ki dok agwata adek pi nyok romo acel acel, ki moo ma romo cupa apar pi moko kwon ma romo agwata adek adek." 
Ezekiel45:25 “I nino dwe apar wiye abic me dwe me abiro ki pi nino abiro ma gibedo ka kwero nino madito me Bolo-ni, en pud dok bimedde ki miyo gitum pi bal, gitum awaŋa, ki gityer me moko kwon, ki moo bene i kit acel-li.”" 
Ezekiel46:1 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Dogcel me dyekal ma i iye ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ gibiloro woko pi nino abicel, ma en aye kare ma noŋo dano gitye ka tic, Ento gibiyabo i nino me cabit ki i nino me por dwe," 
Ezekiel46:2 Doŋ laloc bidonyo kun wok ki i kicika ma i doggola me donyo ma tye yo tuŋ woko, ci bicuŋo cok ki yat me dogcel. Ka doŋ ajwagi gicako tyero gitum awaŋane ki gityer lakwecwiny ma en okelo, ci en doŋ cako woro Lubaŋa i dyekal ma tye cok ki dogcel. Ka i ŋeye doŋ en bia kato woko, ento dogcel pe gibiloro nio wa otyeno." 
Ezekiel46:3 Lwak me lobo gibibedo ka woro Rwot i kabedo ka ma gidonyo ki iye ma tye i dogcel meno i nino me cabit ducu ki i nino me por dwe-gu ducu. 
Ezekiel46:4 Gitum awaŋa ma laloc bityero bot Rwot i nino me cabit bibedo litino romi abicel ma komgi pe ki mwonyo, ki nyok romo acel ma kome pe ki mwonyo." 
Ezekiel46:5 En bikelo gityer me moko kwon pi nyok romo ma romo epa acel, gityer me moko kwon pi litino romi en bikelo kit macalo en twero, kacel ki cupa apar me moo pi agwata adek adek me moko." 
Ezekiel46:6 I kare me por dwe en bityero latin twon ma kome pe ki mwonyo, litino romi abicel ki nyok romo acel, ma gin ducu myero komgi pe obed ki mwonyo." 
Ezekiel46:7 Gin ma en bityero macalo gityer me moko kwon aye agwata adek pi wod twon, ka dok agwata adek pi nyok romo, ki pi litino romi moko kwon kit macalo en twero noŋone, kacel ki cupa apar me moo pi agwata adek adek me moko." 
Ezekiel46:8 Ka laloc donyo i ot pa Lubaŋa, ci en bidonyo kun wok ki i kicika ma i doggola me donyo me dogcel, dok bene en bia kato woko ki yo acel-lu," 
Ezekiel46:9 “Ka inen lwak me lobo meno gubino ka woro Rwot i nino madito ma giciko, jo ma gibidonyo ki i dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acam, ka gutyeko woro Rwot ci gibikato woko ki i dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acuc. Jo ma bidonyo ki i dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acuc, gibikato woko ki i dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acam. Ŋat mo pe bidok cen ki ŋeye ki i dogcel ma onoŋo en odonyo kwede-ni, ento dano acel acel bicito atir kato woko ki i dogcel ma i nyime." 
Ezekiel46:10 Ka inen lwak gidonyo ka woro Rwot, ci laloc bene donyo kacel kwedgi, ka gikato woko, en bene bikato woko kacel kwedgi." 
Ezekiel46:11 I kare me kwero nino madito ki kare ma giciko, gibikelo gityer me moko kwon ki latin twon ma rom ki epa acel, ki nyok romo ma rom ki epa acel, ki litino romi ki moko kwon kit macalo dano mo-ni twero miyone kwede; kacel ki cupa apar me moo pi ‘epa acel acel me moko." 
Ezekiel46:12 “Ka ce laker mito miyo gityer ma iye opwoyo, kadi gitum awaŋa nyo gityer lakwecwiny calo gin ma iye opwoyo bot Rwot, ci gibiyabo bote dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ-ni, en donyo ki iye, Ka doŋ en cako tyero gitum awaŋane nyo gityer lakwecwiny kit macalo en tyero i nino me cabit. Lacen en doŋ a kato woko, ki i ŋeye ma en doŋ noŋo okato woko gibiloro dogcel woko kakare." 
Ezekiel46:13 “Laloc dok bimiyo latin romo acel me mwaka acel ma kome pe ki mwonyo me gitum awaŋa bot Rwot nino ki nino, i odiko." 
Ezekiel46:14 Dok bene myero omi gityer me moko kwon kacel ki gitum awaŋa i odiko odiko, acel me abicel me epa, ki moo cupa adek wek okwe moko woko, ma gimiyo calo gityer me moko kwon bot Rwot. Man aye cik ma myero gilubi pi gitum awaŋa ma gityero nino ducu." 
Ezekiel46:15 Gityer ma gikelo pi gitum awaŋa me nino ducu odiko odiko, tye kit man, latin romo ki gityer me moko kwon ki moo.”" 
Ezekiel46:16 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Ka ce inen laker mito miyo mot bot latinne mo ki i kin awo bene bene, kun poko ki kom dul lobo ma yam gimiyo me bedo ginaleyane, meno bibedo ginaleya pa awo bene ducu, meno doŋ odoko jamigi." 
Ezekiel46:17 Ento ka ce okwanyo dul ma gipokke omiyo me mot bot luticce, lacen bibedo jami pa laloc ka mwaka me kuc doŋ oo, Pien ginaleya-ni doŋ mere, kono litinone keken aye gitwero gamone bedo megi matwal." 
Ezekiel46:18 Laloc pe bikwanyo kit dul mo ki i kom ginaleya pa lwak, pe bikwanyo jamigi woko ki botgi. En myero omi dul mo bot litinone me bedo megi kun kwanyo ki i kom lobo ma doŋ gimiye me bedo mere, wek pe en oun dano mo ki i kom jona kun kwanyo lobogi woko.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Lacen dano-nu dok otera wa i doggola ka ma gidonyo kwede i kicika mapol ma tye cok ki dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acam me dyekal ma i iye. Magi aye kicika maleŋ ma giyubo pi ajwagi. En ocimo bota kabedo mo ma tye wa i agikki me kicika magi ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ-ni, ci aneno." 
Ezekiel46:20 Ci en owacca ni, “Man aye kabedo ka ma ajwagi myero guted iye gitum me tino alii ki gitum pi bal, ki ka ma bene gitedo iye gityer me moko kwon, wek pe gutiŋ gin mo maleŋ gukel i dyekal ma woko ka ma gitwero nyobo lwak kwede.”" 
Ezekiel46:21 Lacen okela i dyekal ma woko, ci otela otera i twok dyekal aŋwen-ni; i twoke acel acel onoŋo dyekal matidi tye iye." 
Ezekiel46:22 I twok dyekal aŋwen-ni onoŋo tye iye dyekal matitino, ma acel acel borre romo futi pyerabicel wiye aŋwen ki lacce futi pyerabic, gin aŋwen-ni ducu onoŋo ditogi rom," 
Ezekiel46:23 Dyekal acel acel onoŋo girumo woko ki cel ma gigero ki got, ki keno ka ma gikuto iye mac bene giyubo i ŋet cel." 
Ezekiel46:24 Ci dano-nu owacca ni, “Magi aye cokon ka ma lutic ma gitiyo i ot pa Lubaŋa myero guted iye gitum ducu ma lwak gityero.”" 
Ezekiel47:1 Dano-nu dok otela odwoka cen i doggola ka ma gidonyo ki iye i ot pa Lubaŋa. Ci aneno pii tye ka mol kun katti ki i te doggola dok yo tuŋ wokceŋ (pien ot pa Lubaŋa bene onoŋo tye okemo yo tuŋ wokceŋ). Pii onoŋo tye ka mol bino piny kun a ki piny yo tuŋ acuc i te doggola me ot pa Lubaŋa, kun wok kwede i ŋet keno tyer yo tun acuc." 
Ezekiel47:2 Lacen okela woko kun wok kweda ki i dogcel ma tye yo tuŋ acam, ci owoto kweda orumo cel ki yo tuŋ woko obino kwede i dogcel ma woko ma okemo yo tun wokceŋ, Laora kulu onoŋo tye ka mol katti woko i ŋet dogcel yo tuŋ acuc." 
Ezekiel47:3 I kare ma wacito wadok yo tuŋ wokceŋ dano-nu omako lagada lapim piny i ciŋe, ci opimo piny yadi miya abic kun lubo i laora yo tuŋ piny dok kwede yo tuŋ wokceŋ, ci omiyo akato ki i dye pii. Piine onoŋo tut o wa i odilo tyena." 
Ezekiel47:4 Ka dok opimo piny yadi ‘miya abic, ci omiyo awoto ki i pii ki tyena; piine onoŋo tut o wa i waŋcoŋ, Dok opimo piny yadi miya abic, ci omiyo anyono dye pii; piine onoŋo doŋ tut o wa i pyera." 
Ezekiel47:5 Ka doki opimo yadi miya abic, ci laora doŋ odoko kulu mo ma pe doŋ atwero kato ki i dyere, pien pii onoŋo doŋ opoŋ omedde woko. Kulunu onoŋo doŋ tut ma pe gitwero ŋolo ne ki tyen kono ka gikwaŋ iye akwaŋa aye romo katte." 
Ezekiel47:6 Ci owacca ni, “Wod pa dano, ityeko neno gin man ducu?” Ka doŋ odwoka cen kun woto kweda ki i dog kulu." 
Ezekiel47:7 I kare ma atye ka wot me dok cen, aneno yadi mapol twatwal i dog kulu tunŋi ki tuŋŋi." 
Ezekiel47:8 Ci en owacca ni, “Pii man tye ka mol kemo lobo ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ ci cito wa i Araba. Ka pii doŋ oo i pii me nam ma ocuŋ mot liywii ma pe mol, ci pii me nam doŋ cako doko leŋ." 
Ezekiel47:9 I kabedo ducu ma kulu man mol cito iye, gin ma corre limuk ma gibedo i pii gibibedo kwo, rec bene bibedo pol ata. Pii man mol cito kunnu wek pii me nam odok leŋ; dok bene gin makwo ducu gibibedo kwo ka ma kulu-ni mol cito iye ducu." 
Ezekiel47:10 Cakke ki i Engedi dok kwede yo tuŋ i waŋ pii En-eglaim, lumak-rec bibedo kunnu i dog nam, ci gibimoyo obwogi ka two kunnu. Kwa rec mapatpat bibedo kunnu calo rec ma gibedo i Nam Madit." 
Ezekiel47:11 Ento pii ma tye i kabedo ma obedo dagodago ki i joro-gu pe bidoko leŋ. Gibiweko piine ducu bedo pii me kado. 
Ezekiel47:12 Doŋ i dog kulu ryoryo ducu, yadi ducu ma kitgi patpat bidono iye kun ginyako nyiggi me acama pa dano. Potgi bene pe bitwo dok bene pe gibigiko nyak. Gibibedo ka nyak dwe ki dwe, pien gilimo pii ma mol a ki i kabedo maleŋ-ŋi, Nyiggi bibedo me acama pa dano, ki potgi bibedo yat me caŋo two ki i kom dano.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Magi aye waŋ apokki lobo ma ibilubo ka ipoko lobo i kin kaka apar wiye aryo me Icrael me bedo ginaleyagi, Ento jo me kaka pa Yucepu ibipoko botgi dullobo ma do do pa jo mukenegu kiryo." 
Ezekiel47:14 Yam onoŋo akwoŋo kun acikke bot kwarowu ni abimiyo lobo man botgi gicamo doko megi; pi meno kombeddi myero ipok woko marom i kinwu," 
Ezekiel47:15 “Waŋ apokki lobo bibedo kit man: Yo tuŋ acam, cakke ki i Nam Madit kun wok ki i Ketlon cito kwede i yo ma donyo i Kamat, o kwede wa i Jedad," 
Ezekiel47:16 Berota, Cibraim (ma tye i waŋ apokki i kin Damaciko ki Kamat), dok medde cito kwede wa yo tuŋ Kajer-atikon; ma tye i wan apokki me Kauran." 
Ezekiel47:17 Kit meno waŋ apokki lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam bicakke ki i nam cito kwede yo tuŋ Kajar-enon, ma tye i waŋ apokki me Damaciko, ki waŋ apokki me Kamat tye yo tu acam." 
Ezekiel47:18 “Waŋ apokki lobo ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ bicakke ki i Kajar-enon i kin Kauran ki Damaciko, ma lubo kulu Jordan i kin Gilead ki lobo Icrael, dok kwede i nam ma tye yo tuŋ wokceŋ kun o kwede wa i Tamar." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Waŋ apokki lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acuc bicakke ki i Tamar cito wok kwede ki i pii me Meriba-kadec, ka doŋ lubo laora kulu me Ejipt o kwede wa i Nam Madit." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Waŋ apokki lobo ma tye yo tuŋ potoceŋ bicakke i dog Nam Madit cito i kabedo ma okemme ki yo ma donyo i Kamat. Man aye bibedo waŋ apokki ma tye yo tuŋ potoceŋ," 
Ezekiel47:21 “Ibipoko lobo man woko i kinwu kit meno kun lubo kit macalo wel kaka pa Icrael tye kwede. 
Ezekiel47:22 Ibipoko lobo man kun ibolo ki kwir me bedo ginaleyawu kikome, ki pi lurok ma gin lubedo ma gibedo i kinwu, ma doŋ bene gutyeko nywalo litinogi i kinwu. Wubitic kwedgi macalo gin anywalli me Icrael kikome, ma gin bene gibibolo kwir kacel kwedwu wek ginoŋ dullobo mo me bedo ginaleyagi ki i kin kaka pa Icrael." 
Ezekiel47:23 Larok acel acel ma labedo gibimiye dul lobo me bedo ginaleyane, kacel ki lwak me kaka mo-ni ma en bedo i kingi. An Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ atyeko loko." 
Ezekiel48:1 “Magi aye nyiŋ kaka ducu: Cakke ki i waŋ apokki lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam, kun a ki i nam wok ki i Ketlon cito kwede i yo ma donyo i Kamat, nio kwede wa i Kajar-enon (ma tye yo tuŋ acam me waŋ apokki lobo me Damaciko ki yo tuŋ malo i kom Kamat), kun medde kwede a ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kenyo gimiyo iye dul lobo acel bot Dan." 
Ezekiel48:2 I waŋ lobo murwatte ki lobo pa Dan, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, gimiyo iye dullobo acel bot Acer." 
Ezekiel48:3 I waŋ lobo murwatte ki lobo pa Acer, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kenyo gimiyo iye dul lobo acel bot Naputali." 
Ezekiel48:4 I waŋ lobo murwatte ki pa Naputali, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kenyo gimiyo iye dul lobo acel bot Manace." 
Ezekiel48:5 I waŋ lobo murwatte ki lobo pa Manace, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kenyo gimiyo iye dul lobo acel bot Epraim." 
Ezekiel48:6 I waŋ lobo murwatte ki Epraim, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kenyo gimiyo iye dul lobo acel bot. Reuben," 
Ezekiel48:7 I waŋ lobo murwatte ki lobo pa Reuben, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kenyo gimiyo iye dul lobo acel bot Juda." 
Ezekiel48:8 “I waŋ lobo murwatte ki lobo pa Juda, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, bibedo dul ma ipoko bedo pat ma lacce romo mairo apar ki borre bibedo rom ki bor pa dul lobo ma doŋ gityeko pokogi bot jo me kaka pa Icrael-li, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kun noŋo kabedo maleŋ tye i dyere." 
Ezekiel48:9 “Lobo ma ibipoko bedo pat pi Rwot-ti borre bibedo mairo apar ki lacce bibedo mairo aboro. 
Ezekiel48:10 Magi aye bibedo kit macalo gipoko kwede dul lobo maleŋ: Ajwagi gibimiyo botgi dullobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam ma borre romo mairo apar, ki yo tuŋ potoceŋ lacce romo mairo aŋwen, ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ bene lacce romo mairo aŋwen, ki borre yo tuŋ acuc romo mairo apar, kun kabedo maleŋ pa Rwot tye i dyere." 
Ezekiel48:11 Kabedo ducu murumo kabedo man maleŋ-ŋi bibedo pa ajwagi ma gin likwayo pa Jadok. Gin gutiyo bota ki ada, pe guŋak gubwota woko i kare ma jo Icrael guŋak woko ca, kit macalo Lulevi gutimo." 
Ezekiel48:12 Dul lobo man bibedo botgi calo dullobo ma gipoko ki i kom dul lobo maleŋ, ma en aye kabedo maleŋ makato ducu, murwatte ki lobo pa Lulevi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Doŋ i ŋet lobo pa ajwagi, gipoko iye dul lobo bot Lulevi, ma borre romo mairo apar ki lacce mairo aŋwen. Borre ka giribo ducu doŋ bedo mairo apar ki lacce mairo aboro." 
Ezekiel48:14 Dul lobo ma gidyero bot Rwot-ti obedo dul maber makato ducu, pe tye mo ma gitwero cato nyo lokone ki gin mo, dok bene pe gitwero kobone bot larok mo, Pien man dul lobo maleŋ, doŋ odoko pa Rwot." 
Ezekiel48:15 “Ento dul lobo mudoŋ ma borre romo mairo apar ki lacce mairo aryo, meno lwak ma gibedo i gaŋ gibitic kwede kit me nino ducu; gitwero bedo iye dok bene gitwero weko mukene bedo macalo bar. Gaŋ bibedo i dyere," 
Ezekiel48:16 dok bibedo latwoke aŋwen ma bocogi romrom ma twoke acel acel borre romo yadi alip adek ki miya aryo ki pyeraryo. 
Ezekiel48:17 I kabedo ducu murumo gaŋ i twoke acel acel, bar bibedo tye iye ma borre ari romo yadi miya acel ki pyerabic." 
Ezekiel48:18 Dul lobo mudoŋŋe ma orabo ŋet dul lobo maleŋ, borre bibedo mairo aŋwen yo tuŋ wokceŋ, ki mairo aŋwen yo tuŋ potoceŋ, Cam ducu ma bicek iye bibedo cam pa lutic ma gitiyo i gaŋ." 
Ezekiel48:19 Lutic ducu ma gitiyo i ‘gaŋ, ma gua ki i kaka ducu pa Icrael, gibipuro lo bo meno." 
Ezekiel48:20 Dul lobo ma ibipoko bedo pat bibedo latwoke aŋwen, ma bor pa twoke acel acel bibedo mairo apar; meno noŋo oribo dullobo maleŋ wa ki lobo pa jo ma gibedo i gaŋ." 
Ezekiel48:21 “Lobo ma odoŋ i ŋet dul lobo maleŋ ki lobo pa jo ma gibedo i gaŋ en aye lobo ma odoŋ tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi i ŋet dul lobo ma latwoke aŋwen ma borre ki lacce romo mairo apar, bibedo pa laloc, Waŋ apokkine bibedo wan apokki me lobo kikome tuŋ wokceŋ ki tuŋ potoceŋ, Dullobo maleŋ-ŋi, ki kabedo maleŋ ma ot pa Lubaŋa tye i dyere-ni," 
Ezekiel48:22 ki lobo pa Lulevi kacel ki lobo pa jo ma gibedo i gaŋ, meno ducu bibedo i dye lobo ma doŋ gipoko me bedo pa laloc. Lobo pa laloc bibedo i kin dul lobo ma gipoko bot kaka, kun waŋ lobo pa jo Juda tye yo tuŋ acam ki wan lobo pa jo Benjamin tye yo tuŋ acuc." 
Ezekiel48:23 “Doŋ poko dul lobo bot kaka mudoŋŋe tye kit man: cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ nio kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kenyo gipoko iye dul lobo acel bot Benjamin." 
Ezekiel48:24 I waŋ lobo murwatte ki lobo pa Benjamin, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kenyo gimiyo iye dul lobo acel bot Cimeon." 
Ezekiel48:25 I waŋ lobo murwatte ki lobo pa Cimeon, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kenyo gimiyo iye dul lobo acel bot Icakar," 
Ezekiel48:26 I waŋ lobo murwatte ki lo bo pa Icakar, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kenyo gimiyo iye dul lobo acel bot Jabulon." 
Ezekiel48:27 I waŋ lobo murwatte ki lobo pa Jabulon, cakke ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede yo tuŋ potoceŋ, kenyo gimiyo iye dul lobo acel bot Gad." 
Ezekiel48:28 Ka doŋ i waŋ lobo murwatte ki lobo pa Gad, waŋ lobone biwoto kun cakke ki i Tamar ka wok ki i pii Meriba-kadec, kun wok kwede ki i ŋet laora kulu me Ejipt cito o kwede i Nam Madit." 
Ezekiel48:29 “Man aye lobo ma ibipoko i kin kaka pa Icrael me bedo ginaleyagi, doŋ magi aye gin dul mapatpat ma gipoko. Man Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco." 
Ezekiel48:30 “Magi aye bibedo dogcel ma gidonyo kwede i gaŋ. Yo tuŋ acam gipimo romo yadi alip adek ki miya aryo ki pyeraryo. 
Ezekiel48:31 Onoŋo tye iye dogcel adek, dogcel pa Reuben, dogcel pa Juda, ki dogcel pa Levi. Dogcel me gaŋ onoŋo gicako nyiŋgi ki nyiŋ kaka pa Icrael." 
Ezekiel48:32 Yo tuŋ wokceŋ bene onoŋo gipimo yadi alip adek ki miya aryo ki pyeraryo, Onoŋo bene tye iye dogcel adek, dogcel pa Yucepu, dogcel pa Benjamin, ki dogcel pa Dan." 
Ezekiel48:33 Yo tuŋ acuc bene gipimo oromo yadi alip adek ki miya aryo ki pyeraryo. Onoŋo tye iye dogcel adek, dogcel pa Cimeon, dogcel pa Icakar, ki dogcel pa Jabulon." 
Ezekiel48:34 Me agikkine yo tuŋ potoceŋ gipimo oromo yadi alip adek ki miya aryo ki pyeraryo. Onoŋo tye iye dogcel adek, dogcel pa Gad, dogcel pa Acer, ki dogcel pa Naputali." 
Ezekiel48:35 Doŋ bor pa cel murumo gaŋ ducu onoŋo romo yadi alip apar wiye aryo, ki miya aboro ki pyeraboro. Cakke i kare man cito kwede anyim, nyiŋ gaŋ doŋ gibilwoŋo ni, Rwot tye kany.”" 
Daniel1:1 I mwaka me adekke me loc pa Yekoyakim kabaka me Juda, Nebukadnejar kabaka me Babilon obino i Jerucalem ci orumo woko," 
Daniel1:2 Rwot omiyo Yekoyakim kabaka me Juda i ciŋe, ci Nebukadnejar okwanyo jami mo go ma gitiyo kwedgi i ot pa Lubaŋa, oterogi woko i lobo Cinar, oketogi i ot pa lubaŋane, ka oketo jami magi i ot kano lim pa lubaŋane," 
Daniel1:3 Cutcut kabaka ociko Acipenaj ma en ladit ma loyo jo ma gikologi, me kelo dano mogo ki i kom jo Icrael, jo ma gin litino ker kacel ki litino pa jo ma gin luye," 
Daniel1:4 awobe ma komgi pe ki mwonyo, jo mabeco ma gupwonnye i kit ryeko ducu, dok ma gikwiri, ki jo ma tye ki ŋec muromo, ma gitwero tic i gaŋ kal pa kabaka, ki me pwonyogi ki nukuta ki leb pa jo Kaldaya," 
Daniel1:5 Kabaka omiyogi ca mo cam maheco nino ducu, kit cam ma en ecamo-ni, ki mato koŋo yiŋo ma yam en mato-ni, Myero gibed ka pwonyogi pi mwaka adek; i agikki mwaka meno ka doŋ gikelgi gucuŋ i nyim kabaka." 
Daniel1:6 I kin jo magi onoŋo tye iye Daniel, Anania, Micael, ki Ajaria ma gin ducu dano me kaka pa Juda." 
Daniel1:7 Ci ladit ma loyo jo ma gikolo ocako nyiŋgi kit man: Daniel olwoŋo ni Beltecajar, Anania en olwoŋo ni Cadrak, Micael olwoŋo ni Mecak, ki Ajaria doŋ en olwoŋo ni Abednego." 
Daniel1:8 Ento Daniel omoko tamme pe me camo gin me kwer me cam mabeco pa kabaka-ni, kadi ki me balo kome ki koŋo viŋo ma kabaka mato-ni; pi meno openyo ladit ma loyo jo ma gikologi ni oye tamme-ni wek pe ebal kome kekene," 
Daniel1:9 Ci Lubaŋa omiyo gum ki kica bot Daniel i nyim ladit ma loyo jo ma gikolo," 
Daniel1:10 Ento ladit ma loyo jo ma gikolo owaco ki Daniel ni, “Alworo rwoda kabaka, ma oyero cam ma myero wucam ki ginamata-gu; ka oneno ni komwu pe yot ma rom ki kom awobe wadiwu ma mwaka me ditogi bene rom ki mewu, ci wubimiyo kabaka neka woko,”" 
Daniel1:11 Lacen Daniel owaco ki lakan jami ma onoŋo ladit ma loyo jo ma gikolo oyero me gwoko Daniel, Anania Micael ki Ajaria ni," 
Daniel1:12 “Koŋ itemwa pi nino apar, ladit, wek gibed ka miyowa dek ŋor aye wacam ki pii amata keken," 
Daniel1:13 Ka wek lacen doŋ inen komwa ci ipor ki kom awobe ma gicamo cam mabeco ma kabaka bene camo-ni, ka doŋ iti giri kwedwa kit macalo ineno,”" 
Daniel1:14 Ladit ma loyo jo ma gikolo owinyo lok meno ma gititte-ni, ci otemogi kumeno pi nino apar." 
Daniel1:15 I agikki me nino apar gineno ni komgi leŋ dok gucwe bene makato awobe ma ca ma gicamo cam pa kabaka mabeco-ni," 
Daniel1:16 Cutcut lakan jami okwanyo cam mabeco-gu ki koŋo vino ki botgi, ci omiyo dek ŋor botgi wek gucam." 
Daniel1:17 Lubaŋa omiyo pwonnye ma malo bot awobe magi aŋwen, i kit kwa nukuta ducu, omiyo gubedo kwiri i lok ducu ki i ryeko ducu, kun Daniel onoŋo niaŋ i ginanyuta ki lek-gu ducu," 
Daniel1:18 I agikki me kare meno, ma kabaka doŋ ociko ni gikelgi i nyime, ci ladit ma loyo jo ma gikolo okelogi i nyim kabaka Nebukadnejar." 
Daniel1:19 Gubino gucuŋ i nyim kabaka, ci kabaka oloko kwedgi; i kingi ducu pe ginoŋo ŋat mo kadi ki acel ma rom ki Daniel, Anania, Micael ki Ajaria." 
Daniel1:20 Doŋ i kwa lok ducu ma kabaka openyogi kwede, onoŋo ni gikato lutyet ki lukor tipo ducu ma tye i te kerre tyen apar kulu." 
Daniel1:21 Ci Daniel omedde ki bedo kunnu nio wa i mwaka mukwoŋo me loc pa Ciro. 
Daniel2:1 I mwaka-me aryo me loc pa kabaka Nebukadnejar, Nebukadnejar oleko lek; obedo ka yelo cwinye mada ma nino bene pe mako waŋe," 
Daniel2:2 Ci kabaka ociko ni gilwoŋ lutyet, lukoi tipo-gu ki lutal ducu kacel ki jo Kaldaya ka gonyo te lekke. Ci gubino gudonyo i ot gucuŋ i nyim kabaka." 
Daniel2:3 Kabaka ocako waco botgi ni, “Aleko lek, ento cwinya obedo ka yelle mada ma amito ni aŋe te lekke.”" 
Daniel2:4 Cutcut jo Kaldaya guwaco ki kabaka ni, “In kabaka bed kwo nakanaka! Doŋ itit lek meno botwa wan luticci ci wabigonyo tere boti.”" 
Daniel2:5 Kabaka odok iye bot jo Kaldaya ni, “Lok ma aloko bedo me ada. Ka ce pe wumiyo aŋeyo lek man, kacel ki tyen lokke, ci gibinidowu woko matitino, dok bene gibimuko odiwu wo ko ducu doko wi obur." 
Daniel2:6 Ento ka wumiyo aŋeyo lek man kacel ki tyen lokke, ci wubigamo mot ki bakacic ki bota kun wulimo bene woro madwoŋ, Pi meno myero wunyutta lek man ki tyen lokke.”" 
Daniel2:7 Gudok iye tyen me aryone ni, “Wek kabaka koŋ onyut botwa lekke wan luticce, ci wabinyuto tyen lok me lekke bene.”" 
Daniel2:8 Kabaka ogamo ni, “Aŋeyo adada ma pe akalo akala ni wun wumito medo kare ameda, pien wuneno atir lok ma aloko bedo me ada." 
Daniel2:9 Ka pe wumiyo aŋeyo lek man, tye mere cik acel keken mumakowu. Wun doŋ wutyeko ye me loko bota lok goba ma nyayo tim me bal keken nio wan ma kare olokke. Pi meno wutitta lek man, ci miyo abiŋeyo ni wun kara wutwero nyutta tyen lok me lekke.”" 
Daniel2:10 Jo Kaldaya gudok iye ki kabaka ni, “Pe tye dano mo kadi ki acel i lobo ma twero co bo miti pa kabaka; dok bene pe tye kabaka mo madit nyo matek twatwal ma openyo lutyet, lukor tipo nyo jo Kaldaya mo ki kit peny macalo meno." 
Daniel2:11 Lok ma kabaka openyo-ni lokke tek, pe tye nar mo ma twero nyuto bot kabaka kono lubaŋa-gu ma kabedogi pat ki pa dano.”" 
Daniel2:12 Lok man omiyo kiniga omako kabaka, odoko ger marac; cutcut ociko ni ginek co maryek ma gibedo i Babilon woko liweŋ." 
Daniel2:13 Ci gitito pi cik man oromo i lobo ducu ni myero ginek co maryek woko, guyenyo Daniel ki lureme bene wek ginekgi woko," 
Daniel2:14 Lacen Daniel oloko lok ki ryeko ki tam maber bot Ariok, ma onoŋo en aye ladit ma loyo askari ma gigwoko kabaka, ma onoŋo okato woko ocita ka neko luryeko ma i Babilon," 
Daniel2:15 Daniel openyo Ariok ni, “Piŋo cik pa kabaka bedo magwa kit man?’ Ci Ariok otito lok meno bot Daniel." 
Daniel2:16 Lacen Daniel ocito odonyo bot kabaka olege me miye kare mo, wek enyut te lok me lek meno bot kabaka." 
Daniel2:17 Lacen Daniel odok cen i ode ci ocako tito lokke bot luwote Anania, Micael ki Ajaria," 
Daniel2:18 Otito botgi ni guleg kica ki bot Lubaŋa me poloma mako lok me muŋ man, wek en Daniel ki luwote-gu pe ginekgi woko kacel ki luryeko mu kene me Babilon." 
Daniel2:19 Lacen ginyuto lok me muŋ man bot Daniel i ginanyuta i dyewor. Mumiyo Daniel opwoyo Lubaŋa me polo mada. 
Daniel2:20 Daniel owacci, “Gipwo Lubaŋa ki nyiŋe nakanaka, pien ryeko ki tek tye bote." 
Daniel2:21 En aye ma loko cawa ki kare me cwir nyo me oro, en aye ma kwanyo luker woko ki i kergi ci keto luker manyen me leyo ka tyengi; en miyo ryeko bot jo maryek dok miyo ŋec bot jo ma twero niaŋ maber." 
Daniel2:22 En nyuto gin ma tye ka matut’ ki gin mukanne i muŋ en nyuto woko ka maleŋ; dok ŋeyo gin ma tye i colpiny, ki leŋo bene bedo bote." 
Daniel2:23 Ai Lubaŋa pa kwarowa, amiyo pwoc ki pak boti, pien in aye ma imiya ryeko ki tekkom, kombeddi doŋ imiyo waŋeyo gin ma onoŋo wapenyo pire bati, pien doŋ imiyo waŋeyo lok pa kabaka.”" 
Daniel2:24 Mumiyo Daniel ocito bot Ariok, ma en dano ma kabaka oyero ni onek luryeko me Babilon otyek woko ducuni; ci owaco bo te ni, “Pe inek luryeko me Babilon ityekgi woko; tera i ot i nyim kabaka, ci abinyuto bot kabaka te lok me lekke.”" 
Daniel2:25 Ariok orune oyotoyot ki myelkom otero Daniel i ot i nyim kabaka, ci owaco bot kabaka ni, “Anoŋo dano mo ki i kin opii ma gikelogi ki i Juda ma twero gonyo te lok me lekki-ni.”" 
Daniel2:26 Kabaka openyo Daniel ma gilwoŋo bene ni Beltecajar ni, “Itwero nyutta gin ma aneno i lekke, dok itwero gonyo te lok me lekka-ni?”" 
Daniel2:27 Daniel odok iye ki kabaka ni, “Pe tye luryeko mo, lukor tipo, nyo lutyet kadi ki wa jo ma niyo lok kom lakalatwe ma gitwero nyuto kit muŋ mukanne macalo man bot kabaka ma onoŋo kabaka openyo pire-ni." 
Daniel2:28 Ento tye Lubaŋa mo i polo ma nyuto kit muŋ ducu mukanne, en aye mumiyo kabaka oneyo lok ducu ma bitimme i kare ma pud tye anyim. Doŋ lek ma ileko-ni ki ginanyuta ma obino i wii i kare ma ibuto piny i wi ki tanda gin ene:" 
Daniel2:29 I kare ma ibuto i wi kitanda, ai kabaka, tam obino i wii ma nyutti gin ma bitimme i kare me anyim, doŋ en ŋat ma yabo muŋ ducu mukanne woko ka maleŋ-ŋi, onyuto boti omiyo iŋeyo gin ma bitimme." 
Daniel2:30 Ento ki tuŋ bota ginyutta muŋ man mukanne, pe te lokke ni an aryek akato gin makwo ducu, ento wek agony te lok me lek man wek in kabaka iŋe, ki dok bene wek iŋe tam ma tye i cwinyi." 
Daniel2:31 “Ai kabaka, yam ineno cal mo ma gitiyo ki cin. Cal man dit dok ryeny matek mukato kare, Ocuŋ i nyimi; doŋ kit ma nen kwede mi yo lworo ma ko dano." 
Daniel2:32 Wi cal man gitiyo ki jabu ma giliyo maberre, kore ki bade ducu gitiyo ki ryal, ki doŋ iye ki eme gitiyo ki mola." 
Daniel2:33 Ooto tyene gitiyo ki nyonyo, ki’ tyene ma gicibo kwede piny gitiyo dulle mogo ki nyonyo ki mogo gicweyo ki lobo." 
Daniel2:34 I kare ma ineno, got obar ci otyer woko kekene ma pe dano aye otyero ki ciŋe, ci cutcut ocelo cal meno woko i tyene ka ma gitiyo ki nyonyo ki ma gicweyo ki lobo, ci oŋidogi woko matitino." 
Daniel2:35 Meno omiyo nyonyo, lobo, mola, ryal ki jabu ducu guŋinnye woko matitino, ci gudoko calo cun kai ma i laro moyo me oro, ma yamo doŋ otinogi oterogi woko, ma pe dok gitwero yenyo yogi ginoŋo. Ento got meno ma ocelo cal-li olokke odoko twon got madit mada ma poŋo lobo woko ducu." 
Daniel2:36 “Meno aye lekke; kombeddi doŋ wabigonyo te lek bot kabaka," 
Daniel2:37 Doŋ in kabaka, in aye kabaka ma loyo luker ducu, dok Lubaŋa me polo aye mumiyo icamo ker, en mumiyi twero ki tek, wa ki deyo bene," 
Daniel2:38 dok omiyo dano ducu, lee tim ki winyo me polo ducu i ciŋi, ka ma gibedo iye ducu; omii twero me loyogi liweŋ, in aye ibedo latel wic me jabu," 
Daniel2:39 Lacen i ne locci, ker mo matidi twatwal bicakke, ma kabakane tidi in iloyo ki dit, ka lacen bibedo ker me adek me mola, ma biloyo lobo ducu." 
Daniel2:40 Ka dok ker me aŋwenne bicakke ma bibedo matek calo nyonyo, pien nyonyo turo jami ducu, dok nidogi woko matitino, ci tyekogi woko liweŋ; kit macalo nyonyo ŋinyo kwede jami, en bene bituro ci ŋinyo ker mukwoŋo-gu woko ducu." 
Daniel2:41 Kit macalo ibedo ka neno dul tyene ki lwet mogo gitiyo ki lobo pa lacwe agulu, ki dulle mogo gitiyo ki nyonyo, meno ker mupokke; ento nyonyo mogo ma miyo cuŋ matek bibedo i kine, kit macalo wuneno nyonyo ma orubbe ki lobo daba-ni." 
Daniel2:42 Kit macalo Lwet tyene dulle mukene gitiyo ki nyonyo ki mukene gitiyo ki lobo, kit meno bene ker man bibedo matek i kare mogo ki dok bibedo goro adada ci tur woko i kare mukene." 
Daniel2:43 Kit macalo ineno nyonyo orubbe woko ki lobo daba-ni, gibirubbe woko bene kit meno kun ginyomme i kingi kekengi, ento bedo maber kacel pe bibedo tye i kingi, kit macalo nyonyo bene pe rubbe ki lobo-ni." 
Daniel2:44 Dok i kare pa luker meno Lubaŋa me polo biketo ker mukene ma ri nakanaka ma pe gitwero balone, kadi dit me locce bene pe gibiweko i ciŋ rok mukene. Ker meno manyen-ni bituro ker magi ducu ŋidogi woko matitino, ci tyekogi woko ducu, en aye doŋ bicuŋ bedo matwal," 
Daniel2:45 kit macalo ineno maca obar otyer woko ki i kom got madit ma pe dano aye otyero ki cine, ci oturo nyonyo, mola, lobo, ryal ki jabu oŋidogi woko ducu matitino. Lubaŋa madit doŋ otyeko nyuto bot kabaka gin ma bitimme i kare me anyim. Lekke obedo alfu ki te lokke bene tye atir.’ ”" 
Daniel2:46 Cutcut kabaka Nebukadnejar oryebbe piny, omiyo woro bot Daniel, ka doŋ ociko ni myero gikel gityer ki odok eceta gibed ka tyerone bot Daniel." 
Daniel2:47 Kabaka owaco bot Daniel ni, “Ada, Lubaŋani-ni aye Lubaŋa ma loyo lwak lubaŋa-gu ducu, dok en bene Rwot ma loyo luker ducu, en ŋat ma nyuto muŋ ducu mukanne woko ka maleŋ, pien in bene ibedo ki twer me nyuto muŋ man mukanne-ni.”" 
Daniel2:48 Lacen kabaka omiyo deyo mamalo ki mot madwoŋ bot Daniel, ka okete me bedo laloc i lobo ducu me Babilon, dok bene me bedo ladit ma loyo luryeko ducu ma tye i Babilon." 
Daniel2:49 Daniel olego kabaka, ci kabaka bene oye legane omiyo en oyero Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego, oketogi me bedo ludito ma loyo lwak ki ne no lok ducu ma timme i lobo Babilon. Ento Daniel obedo mere i gaŋ kal pa kabaka." 
Daniel3:1 Kabaka Nebukadnejar otiyo cal lubaŋa ki jabu; borre obedo futi pyeraboŋwen ki lacce futi aboŋwen Ci ocibo ocuŋ i bar me Dura, i lobo Babilon." 
Daniel3:2 Cutcut kabaka Nebukadnejar ocwalo lok me lwoŋo luloyo madoŋo, ludito pa lwak, ki luloc me dul lobo mapatpat, lumi-tam, lugwok-lim, luŋolkop madito ki matino, ki ludito ducu me dul lobo mapatpat, gubin ka kwero cal lubaŋa ma kabaka Nebukadnejar yam otiyo ocibo ocuŋ likuŋ-ŋi," 
Daniel3:3 Lacen luloyo madoŋo, ludito pa lwak, ki luloc me dul lobo mapatpat, lumitam, lugwok-lim, luŋolkop madito ki matino, ki ludito ducu me dul lobo mapatpat gucokke kacel ka kwero cal lubaŋa ma kabaka Nebukadnejar otiyo ci ocibo ocuŋ likuŋ-ŋi; ci gin ducu gucuŋ i nyim cal lubaŋa ma Nebukadnejar ocibo-ni," 
Daniel3:4 Gicwalo kwena ki lok ma winnye maloŋo bot lwak ducu ni, “Wun lwak me rok ducu, ki rok ducu mapatpat, gicikowu ducu ni," 
Daniel3:5 ka wuwinyo bila nyo obute okok, lwere ma gikuto, opuk, aduŋu, naŋa ki nyamulere-gu, ki kit wer ducu ma gigoyo, myero wun ducu wuryebbe piny wuwor cal lubaŋa man me jabu ma kabaka Nebukadnejar otiyo ci ocibo ocuŋ likuŋ-ŋi." 
Daniel3:6 Doŋ ŋat mo ma pe biryebbe pmy ka woro cal lubaŋa man, gibimake woko oyot gibole i ruk mac mukur malyet-ti.”" 
Daniel3:7 Pi meno, i kare ma lwak me rok ducu guwinyo koko bila, koko nyamulere, ki koko opuk, ki adunu, nana, obute, ki kit wer ducu mapatpat ma gigoyo agoya, ci lwak me rok mapol, rok ducu mapatpat, ki jo ma loko leb mapatpat ducu guryebbe piny guworo cal lubaŋa me jabu ma kaba ka Nebukadnejar otiyo ci ocibo ocuŋ likuŋ-ŋi." 
Daniel3:8 I kare meno jo Kaldaya mogo ma onoŋo gitye ki tam maraco gutyerre ka maleŋ, gucako doto Lujudaya." 
Daniel3:9 Guwaco bot Nebukadnejar ni, “In kabaka myero ibed kwo nakanaka!" 
Daniel3:10 In kabaka, onoŋo doŋ ityeko keto cik ni, ka dano ducu guwinyo koko bila, koko nyamulere, ki koko opuk, ki aduŋu, naŋa, obute, ki kit wer ducu mapatpat ma gigoyo agoya, ci guryebbe piny ka woro cal lubaŋa me jabu;" 
Daniel3:11 doŋ ka dano mo pe biryebbe piny ka worone, gibimake woko oyot gibole woko i ruk mac mukur malyet-ti." 
Daniel3:12 Ento tye Lujudaya magi, Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego ma iyerogi iketogi me bedo ludito ma loyo lwak dok ma neno lok ducu ma timme i lobo Babilon. Ai kabaka, jo magi adek-ki pe gilubo cikki wacel. Pe giworo lubaŋani, dok bene pe giworo cal lubaŋa me jabu ma itiyo ci ici bo ocuŋ likuŋ-ŋi.”" 
Daniel3:13 Cutcut kiniga omako Nebukadnejar woko, omiyo ociko ki keccwiny ni myero gicikel Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego koŋ bote. Ci gicito gikelo jo magi adek-ki i nyim kabaka." 
Daniel3:14 Ci cutcut Nebukadnejar openyogi ni, “Lok ma gititta-ni mono ada, ni, wun Cadrak ki Mecak ka Abednego, pe wuworo lubaŋana, dok bene pe wuworo cal lubaŋa me jabu ma an aye atiyo ci acibo ocuŋ Iikun-ni?" 
Daniel3:15 Ka ce kombeddi doŋ wuwinyo koko bila, ki koko nyamulere, ki koko opuk, ki aduŋu, naŋa, obute ki kit wer mapatpat ma gigoyogi agoya, ka wuyubbe dok wuye me ryebbe piny ka woro cal lubaŋa man ma an aye atiyo-ni, ci noŋo ber adada; ento ka ce pe wuworo, ci gibimakowu oyotoyot laboŋo galle, gibolowu woko i ruk mac mukur malyet-ti; ci lubaŋa mene ma bilarowu kwanyowu woko ki i ciŋa-ni?”" 
Daniel3:16 Pi meno, Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego gugamo lok gudok iye ki kabaka ni, “Ai Nebukadnejar, pe wamito walok boti gin mo pi lok man," 
Daniel3:17 Ka lok doŋ tye kumeno, ci Lubaŋawa ma waworo-ni bitwero larowa ki i ruk mac mukur malyet-ti; dok en bene bilarowa kwanyowa woko ki i ciŋi, in kabaka," 
Daniel3:18 Ento ka ce pe, myero in kabaka iŋe maber ni, wan pe wabiworo lubaŋani dok pe wabiworo cal lubaŋa me jabu ma itiyo ci ici bo Ocuŋ likuŋ-ŋi.”" 
Daniel3:19 Cutcut akemo mager omako Nebukadnejar woko, omiyo waŋe bene olokke wo ko mapat i kom Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego. Oyotoyot ociko ni gimed mac olyetti tyen abiro kulu makato kit munoŋo lyet kwede wi ati ca," 
Daniel3:20 Ka doŋ ociko jo mogo ma gin twoni oteka ma gitye i dul monnye ni gutwe Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego woko, ci gubolgi i ruk mac mukur malyet." 
Daniel3:21 Ci gutweyo jo-nu woko ma onoŋo gitye ki ginaruka magi i komgi, jor, kanyi, tok me wigi, ki boŋŋigi mu kene ducu, gibologi kwede woko ducu i ruk mac mukur malyet-ti." 
Daniel3:22 Cik pa kaba ka onoŋo obedo gwa matek, ki ruk mac bene onoŋo doŋ odoko lyet matek, ma leb macce ma lyel bene oneko jo meno ma gutero Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego ka bologi woko i mac." 
Daniel3:23 Jo magi adek-ki, Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego, gibologi gupoto wa i dye ruk mac ma doŋ gitweyogi woko gulugulu." 
Daniel3:24 Lacen kabaka Nebukadnejar obedo ki ur madit omiyo oa malo oyotoyot, Ci openyo lumi-tamme ni, “Pe wabolo jo adek i mac ma onoŋo doŋ gitweyogi woko?” Gudokke iye ni, “Ada, kabaka, iloko kakare.”" 
Daniel3:25 Kabaka dok ogamo kun wacci, “Ento kombeddi atye ka neno jo aŋwen ma pe gitweyogi gitye ka wot awota i dye mac, kun mac bene pe waŋogi; dok aneno dano me aŋwenne-ni nen calo lubaŋa mo.”" 
Daniel3:26 Ci Nebukadnejar obino onyiko cok ki doggola me kabedo ka ma ruk mac tye ka lye iye-ni, ci owacci, “Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego, wun lutic pa Lubaŋa Mamalo Twal, wukatti woko, wubin kany!” Cutcut Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego gukatti woko ki i mac," 
Daniel3:27 Ci luloyo madoŋo, ki ludito pa lwak, ki luloc me dul lobo mapatpat kacel ki lumi-tam pa kaba ka gucokke kacel, ci guneno ni mac pe owaŋo jo-nu; yer wigi mo ma mac oroyo pe tye, ginarukagi bene mac pe ogudo, dok ŋwec mac bene obedo pe i komgi." 
Daniel3:28 Mumiyo Nebukadnejar otuggi wacci, “Gipwo Lubaŋa pa Cadrak, ki Mecak ka Abednego ma ocwalo lamalaika ci olaro luticce woko, ma gigeno en, ma gubalo bene cik pa kabaka woko, gudyero kwogi me to ma ka woro lubaŋa mo ata ma pe Lubaŋagi kikome." 
Daniel3:29 Pi meno doŋ aketo cik kombeddi ni, Lwak me rok ducu nyo rok ducu mapatpat, nyo leb mo ma biloko lok mo marac i kom Lubaŋa pa Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego gibiŋidogi wo ko matitino, ki odigi bene gibimuko woko doŋ obur; pien doŋ pe tye lubaŋa mo mukene ma twero laro dano kit man,”" 
Daniel3:30 Mumiyo kabaka ocako medo rwom me tic pa Cadrak, Mecak ki Abednego i lobo Babilon." 
Daniel4:1 An kabaka Nebukadnejar acoyo lok man botwu, wun lwak me rok ducu, nyo rok ducu mapatpat, ki jo ma loko Leb mapatpat, ma wubedo i wi lobo ducu, Awaco botwu ni, Kuc omedde madwoŋ botwu!" 
Daniel4:2 Onoŋo onen ber ki tuŋ bota ka anyuto lanyut mogo ki taŋo mogo ma Lubaŋa Mamalo Twal otyeko tiyo i koma," 
Daniel4:3 Lanyut ducu ma en onyuto-ada dit rom mene, ki tano ma en otiyo tekke rom mene! Kerre en aye ker ma ri nakanaka ki locce bene bedo i kare pa yalwak ducu." 
Daniel4:4 An Nebukadnejar onoŋo yam abedo mot i oda ma piny okwe, dok abedo ki gum me noŋo lonyo madwoŋ ki i gaŋ kaila." 
Daniel4:5 I kare ma abuto i wi kitanda aleko lek ma omiya lworo marac; dok ginanyuta mogo obino i wiya omiyo apo woko lirikrik. 
Daniel4:6 Pi meno omiyo aketo cik ma wacci myero gikel luryeko ducu ma i Babilon i nyima, wek gumiya aŋe tyen lok me lek ma aleko-ni." 
Daniel4:7 Cutcut lutyet ki lukor tipo, Lukaldaya ki jo ma tyeto lok kom lakalatwe gubino gudonyo bota; ci atito botgi lek ma aleko-ni, ento pe gutwero gonnya te lekke." 
Daniel4:8 Lacen i agikkine Daniel obino odonyo ocun i ima, en ŋat ma nyiŋe mukene gilwoŋo Beltecajar-ni, macalo nyiŋ lubaŋana, en dano ma cwiny pa lubaŋa maleŋ bedo i iye, ci atito bo te lek ma aleko kun awa cecni," 
Daniel4:9 “In Beltecajar, ladit ma loyo lutyet ducu, doŋ atyeko ŋeyo ni cwiny pa lubaŋa maleŋ-gu bedo i ii, dok aniaŋ ni pe tye muŋ mo mukanne ma nyutone woko ka maleŋ tek ki boti. Lek ma onoŋo aleko-ni en ene; gonnya te lokke." 
Daniel4:10 Ginanyuta mubino i wiya i kare ma abuto i wi kitanda gin ene: nen, aneno yat mo ma Ocuŋ i dye lobo; maber mukato kare woko." 
Daniel4:11 Yat tu odoŋo ci odoko tek, ki wiye bene ogudo polo, dok onoŋo nen woko liweŋ ki i agikki lobo ducu." 
Daniel4:12 Pote ducu onoŋo nen mabeco, ki nyige bene onoŋo pol mada, obedo cam ma yam gin makwo ducu camo. Lee ducu me tim giywe i te tipone, ki winyo me polo bene gibedo i jaŋe ducu, doŋ gin makwo ducu gikwo pi camo nyige," 
Daniel4:13 “I kare ma abuto i wi kitanda dok ginanyuta mogo obino i wiya, ci aneno lakur-piny mo maleŋ, ma olor piny oa ki i polo." 
Daniel4:14 Odaŋŋe matek kun waco ni, ‘Toŋ yat meno iret woko piny, ci itoŋ jaŋe bene woko ducu, ka ilwer pate woko ducu, dok iket nyige woko atata; wek lee gua ki i tere gurin woko, ki winyo bene gua woko ki i jaŋe," 
Daniel4:15 Ento myero iwek ajutte ki lwite mucuŋ i ŋom-mi, ci itwe ajutte woko ki rubota nyonyo, ki mola, obed i dye lum alita i tim. Wek toyo ma a ki i polo odyak kome woko, dok wek obed i kin lee ma gibedo i lum i lobo." 
Daniel4:16 Wek gilok tamme woko ki i tam pa dano, ci gimiye obed ki tam pa lee; wek ori mwaka abiro." 
Daniel4:17 Lukur-piny aye gumoko lok man, kun gulubo lok pa jo maleŋ, wek i agikkine omi gin makwo ducu guŋe ni, Ŋat Mamalo Twal aye ma loyo ker pa dano, dok tye kt twero me miyone bene bot ŋat ma en mito, kun keto kadi wa dano ma rwomgi piny adada me loyo lwak.’" 
Daniel4:18 Man aye lek ma an kabaka Nebukadnejar aneno. Doŋ kombeddi Beltecajar, myero ituc te lok me lek man, pien luryeko ducu ma gitye i te kerra pe gutwero gonyo te lek man bota, ento in itwero, pien cwiny pa lubaŋa maleŋ-gu bedo i ii,”" 
Daniel4:19 Daniel ma nyiŋe mukene Beltecajar koŋ dok cwinye oballe woko pi cawa mo manok, ki tamme ducu opoyo tipo kome woko. Ci kabaka owacce ni, “Beltecajar, pe iwek lek man nyo gonyo tere opo tipo komi.” Beltecajar odokke iye ni, “Rwoda, lek man myero obed pi jo ma gidagi, ki te lokke bene obed pilukworri!" 
Daniel4:20 Yat ma onoŋo ineno ma odoŋo odoko matek, ma wiye ogudo polo, ma onoŋo nen wa ki i agikki lobo ducu-ni," 
Daniel4:21 ma pote ducu onoŋo nen mabeco ki nyige bene onoŋo pol mada, obedo cam ma yam gin makwo ducu camo, ma lee ducu me tim giywe i te tipone, ki winyo me polo bene gibedo i, jaŋe ducu," 
Daniel4:22 en aye in kabaka ma doŋ idoŋo idoko tek. Ditti bene doŋ odoŋo oo wa i polo, ki locci bene oyarre oo wa i agikki lobo." 
Daniel4:23 Onoŋo kabaka mere oneno lakurpiny, ma en ŋat maleŋ-ui, ka oa ki i polo lor piny kun wacci, ‘Toŋ yat meno iret woko piny, ci ibal woko, ento wek ajutte ki lwite mucuŋ i ŋom-mi, ci itwe ajutte woko ki rubota nyonyo, ki mola, obed i dye lum alita i tim. Wek toyo ma a ki i pol odyak kome, dok wek obed mere i kin lee ma gibedo i lum i lobo, nio Waŋ ma mwaka abiro okato.’" 
Daniel4:24 Man aye te lok me lekke, ai kabaka: Man aye cik pa Ŋat Mamalo Twal, ma obino i kom rwoda kabaka," 
Daniel4:25 man nyuto ni gibiryemi woko ki i kin dano, doŋ ibibedo kacel ki lee me tim; gibimiyo icamo lum calo twon, dok toyo ma a ki i polo bene bidyako komi woko, ci ibiri mwaka abiro, nio wan ma iŋeyo ni ŋat Mamalo Twal aye loyo ker pa dano, dok en tye ki twero me miyone bot ŋat ma en mito." 
Daniel4:26 Kit macalo onoŋo giciko ni giwek ajut yat ki lwite, ada ker bibedo meri matwal cakke i kare ma in doŋ iŋeyo kwede ni Polo aye laloc." 
Daniel4:27 Pi meno in kabaka, myero iye tamma-ni; nut iwek balli woko ducu ci icak bedo ki kwo ma atir, kun iweko balli kitimo kica bot jo ma giunogi, wek gwok nyo kare me locci ibimedde ki bedo ki kuc ki yweyo muromo.”" 
Daniel4:28 Lok magi ducu otimme i kom kabaka Nebukadnejar," 
Daniel4:29 I ne dwe apar wiye aryo kabaka doŋ onoŋo tye ka wot i wi ot me gaŋ kal me Babilon," 
Daniel4:30 ci en kabaka owacci, “Man aye pe Babilon madit-ti, ma an aye agero ki tek me twerona wek obed gaŋ me bedo pa luye, ki pi deyo me ditta?”" 
Daniel4:31 I kare ma kabaka pud tye ka lok, dwan oa ki i polo ma wacci, “Ai kabaka Nebukadnejar, lok man giwaco boti ni, ker doŋ gikwanyo woko ki boti," 
Daniel4:32 dok gibiryemi woko ki i kin dano, doŋ ibibedo kacel ki lee me tim; gibimiyo icamo lum macalo twon, pi mwaka abiro, nio waŋ ma ipwonnye ni Dat Mamalo Twal aye ma lo yo ker pa dano, dok tye ki twero me miyone bene bot ŋat ma en mito.”" 
Daniel4:33 Oyotoyot lok man ocobbe kakare i kom Nebukadnejar. Ci cutcut giryeme woko ki i kin dano, ocako camo lum calo twon, ki toyo ma oa ki i polo bene odyako kome woko nio waŋ ma yer kome ducu olot maboco macalo yec kom ocur, ki lwete bene olot maboco calo Lwet winyo." 
Daniel4:34 I agikki me kare meno ducu, an Nebukadnejar, ailo waŋa aneno polo, ci tipo koma ocako dwogo, omiyo apwoyo En ŋat Mamalo Twal mada, ka dok apake kun aketo deyo i kome en ma bedo kwo nakanaka-ni. Locce bedo matwal, ki kerrebene bedo i kare pa yalwak ducu;" 
Daniel4:35 jo ducu ma bedo i lobo bene gin pe gin mo; en tiyo gin ma cwinye mito i mony me polo ki i kin jo ma bedo i lobo bene; ŋat mo pe ma twero juke, nyo ma twero wacce ni, “Itimo aŋo?”" 
Daniel4:36 I kare meno kikome bene en aye tipo koma ocako dwogo kwede ki deyo me kerra, ki ditta ki berra ducu odwogo i koma. Lumi-tamma ki luye mera guyenya, ci gidwoka dok i kerra, ki dit mukene makato dok gimedo bota." 
Daniel4:37 Mumiyo kombeddi an, Nebukadnejar, apako, adworo dok aworo Kabaka me polo; pien ticce ducu tye atir, ki kwo me bedone ducu tye atir; jo ma luwakke en twero kwanyogi ci dwoko rwomgi woko piny." 
Daniel5:1 Kabaka Belcajar otedo karama madit pi luditone me awora ma welgi romo alip acel, ci omato koŋo vino i nyimgi." 
Daniel5:2 I kare ma doŋ Belcajar obilo koŋo, ociko ni gikel kikopo jabu ki me ryal-gu ma yam wonne Nebukadnejar ocoko woko ki i ot pa Lubaŋa ma tye i Jerucalem-mi, wek en kabaka ki luditone me awora, kacel ki monne ki mon aŋecane ducu giti kwede me mato koŋo," 
Daniel5:3 Ci gikelo jami magi me ryal ki me jabu ma yam giyakogi ki i ot pa Lubaŋa ma tye i Jerucalem; ci kabaka ki lwak luditone me awora, ki monne, ki mon aŋecane gumato kwede." 
Daniel5:4 Gumato koŋo vino, kun gipako lwak lubaŋa me jabu ki me ryal, me mola, me nyonyo, me yat ki me got." 
Daniel5:5 Cutcut gineno lwet cin dano mo ka tye ka coyo coc i kor ot ma i gaŋ kal pa kabaka, ma okemme ki okar mac; kabaka oneno ka ciŋ dano-nu tye ka coc." 
Daniel5:6 Man omiyo wan kabaka olokke woko ki tamme bene omiyo cwinye opoto lilin; pyere otoŋŋe woko, ki coŋe aryo ducu gubedo ka gone kacel." 
Daniel5:7 Omiyo kabaka okok ki dwan maloŋo ni gikel lukor tipo ki jo Kaldaya ki jo ma Jjiyo lok kom lakalatwe. Kabaka owaco bot luryeko ducu ma i Babilon ni, “ŋat mo ma bikwano coc man, ce ogonnya te lokke, gibiruko ki boŋo ma obedo lamar lamar, gibirwako nyor me jabu bene i ŋute, ci doŋ bibedo laloc me adek i te ker man.”" 
Daniel5:8 Ci luryeko pa kabaka ducu gubino gudonyo i ot bote, ento pe gutwero kwano coc ma i kor ot kadi ki gonyo te lokke bot kabaka bene oloyogi." 
Daniel5:9 Man omiyo cwiny kabaka Belcajar opoto liliŋ, wa kome ducu oballe woko, ci luditone me awora guuro guŋeŋ woko ata." 
Daniel5:10 I kare ma daker owinyo lok pa kabaka ki pa luditone me awora-gu ducu, obino odonyo i ot ka ma gitye iye ka camo karama; ci owaco ni, “Ai kabaka, bed kwo nakanaka! Pe myero iwek tammi omi cwinyi obed ka poto, dok pe iwek komi oballe." 
Daniel5:11 Tye dano mo i te kerri kany ma cwiny pa lubaŋa maleŋ-gu bedo i iye. I kare pa woru onoŋo yam ginanyuta me muŋ ducu ki niaŋ wa ryeko, macalo ryeko pa lubaŋa-gu ducu, ginoŋo ni en tye kwede, mumiyo woru, kabaka Nebukadnejar, okete me bedo dano ma loyo lutyet, lukor tipo, jo Kaldaya ki luryeko ducu ma ŋiyo lok i kom lakalatwe." 
Daniel5:12 Dano man Daniel, yam kabaka ocako nyiŋe ni Beltecajar, onoŋo tye ki cwiny maber makato, onoŋo bene tye ki ŋec wa ki niaŋ muromo me gonyo te lok me lek ducu, kun gonyo wa te lok macalo koc Lit-gu woko bene, dok cobo lok me peko mogo ma dano tye kwede. Kombeddi myero ilwoŋ Daniel obin, ci en aye bigonyo te lok man.”" 
Daniel5:13 Cutcut gikelo Daniel i nyim kabaka, Kabaka ocako lok ki Daniel kun penye ni, “In aye Daniel, ŋat acel i kin jo Juda ma yam wora omakogi ki i Juda ci okelogi kany-nyi?"
