Daniel5:14 Awinyo lok i komi ni cwiny pa lubaŋa maleŋ-gu tye i komi, dok bene ni it ye ki ryeko me nyuto muŋ mogo, ki niaŋ wa ki ryeko makato pa jo mukene." 
Daniel5:15 Kombeddi onoŋo gikelo luryeko ki lukor tipo-gu i nyima ni gukwan coc man dok gumiya aŋe te lokke; ento pe gutwero nyutta te lokke. 
Daniel5:16 Ento onoŋo awinyo ni itwero gonyo te lok mapol, dok bene icobo lok me peko ma dano tye kwede. Doŋ kombeddi ka ce itwero kwano coc man ki gonyo te lokke wek aŋe, ci gibiruki ki boŋo ma lamar lamar, gibirwako nyor me jabu bene i ŋuti, dok bene ibibedo laloc me adek i te ker man.”" 
Daniel5:17 Ci Daniel odok iye ki kabaka ni, “Gwok motti ducu obed piri giri, dok imi bakacic ma imito miya bot ŋat mukene; kadi bed pe agamo gin mo ma imiya pud abikwano coc man boti, kabaka, dok bene abigonyo te lokke iŋeyo." 
Daniel5:18 Ai kabaka, Lubaŋa ma En Ŋat Mamalo Twal yam omiyo woru obedo kabaka ma loyo lobo, omiye bene dit ki deyo wa ki twero ducu." 
Daniel5:19 Pi dit ma yam gimiye, oweko lwak me rok ducu ki rok mapatpat ducu ki jo ma loko leb mapatpat komgi omyel dok gubedo ki lworo i nyime. Ka yam cwinye omito ni enek dano mo ci neko mere aneka, ka omito ni ewek dano mo-ni obed kwo, ci weko bedo kwo; ka omito ni emi dit bot ŋat mo ci miyo, ka omito ni edwok rwom pa dano mo-ni piny ci dwoko bene." 
Daniel5:20 Ento i kare ma doŋ en ocako kette malo kekene ki i cwinye, omiyo cwinye odoko nwaŋ ci ocako loc ki wakke marac, omiyo gikwanye woko ki i wi komkerre, wa ki deyone bene gikwanyo woko ki i kome." 
Daniel5:21 Giryeme woko ki i kin dano ci giloko tamme odoko macalo tam pa lee me tim, obedo ka camo lum calo twon, toyo ma a ki i po lo obedo ka dyako kome, nio ka oneyo ni Lubaŋa Mamalo Twal aye ma loyo ker pa dano, dok en bene aye ma keto ŋat ma cwinye mito me bedo laloc iye." 
Daniel5:22 Doŋ in Belcajar, in wode kikome, ento pe ibedo mwol i cwinyi, kadi bed onoŋo iŋeyo lok man ducu." 
Daniel5:23 Ento ikette malo kekeni ci iette giri i kom Rwot me polo; dok jami ma yam gitiyo kwede i ode ducu gikelogi giketogi i nyimi, ci in kacel ki ludito me aworani, monni, ki mon aŋecani ducu wutiyo kwede me mato koŋo vino. Wubedo bene ka pako lwak lubaŋa me jabu, me ryal, me mola, me nyonyo, me yat ki me godi-gu, ma pe gineno piny, pe giwinyo lok, dok ma pe giŋeyo gin mo-ni. Ento in pe ibedo ka woro Lubaŋa ma omiyo kwo ki yweyo boti-ni, kun en bene aye ma gwoki i kit bedoni ducu." 
Daniel5:24 “Doŋ gicwalo ciŋ dano ki i nyime, ci ocoyo coc man." 
Daniel5:25 Coc ma gicoyo-ni onoŋo tye kit man: MENE MENE TEKEL PARCIN. 
Daniel5:26 Doŋ te lok man tye kit man: MENE, Lubaŋa doŋ otyeko kwano wel nino me kerri woko, dok onyuto bene ni agikkine doŋ cok." 
Daniel5:27 TEKEL, doŋ gipimi i mijan, ci ginoŋo ni pud iyot;" 
Daniel5:28 PEREC, kerri gipoko iye woko ci gimiyo bot jo Medi ki bot jo Percia.”" 
Daniel5:29 Cutcut Belcajar omiyo twero, ci giruko Daniel ki boŋo ma lamar lamar, ka girwako nyor me jabu i ŋute, ci gitito lok i kome oromo piny ducu ni en aye doŋ bibedo laloc me adekke i te ker me Babilon." 
Daniel5:30 I dyewor me nino meno kikome gineko kabaka Belcajar woko. 
Daniel5:31 Ci Dario ma jo Medi oleyo ker, ma doŋ mwaka me ditte romo pyerabicel wiye aryo." 
Daniel6:1 Dario omoko tamme me keto luloyo madoŋo miya acel ki pyeraryo me bedo luloc i te kerre i kabedo ducu mapatpat. 
Daniel6:2 Ka dok oketo luloc madito adek me loyogi; i kin jo-nu onoŋo Daniel bene tye iye, dok luloyo madoŋo ducu myero guter lok ma mako ticgi bot luloc madito adek-ki, wek lim pa kabaka pe olannye ata." 
Daniel6:3 Lacen ginoŋo ni Daniel dok kwiri mada makato luloc mukene madito aryo-ni woko, loyo wa rwodi-gu ducu, pien cwiny maber makato onoŋo tye i kome; doŋ omiyo kabaka obedo ki yub me keto en me loyo lobo ma i te kerre ducu." 
Daniel6:4 Mumiyo luloc madito kacel ki rwodi gubedo ka yenyo yo ma myero ginoŋ ki bal i kom Daniel ma mako lok ker; ento pe gunoŋo ka cuŋo mo me dot kadi ki roc mo, pien Daniel onono obedo dano ma lagen, ma pe tye ki kit roc mo, dok lok mo me bal bene pe ginoŋo i kome." 
Daniel6:5 Lacen jo meno guwacci, “Pe wabinono lok me doto Daniel nio ka wayenyo kit lok ma lubbe ki cik pa Lubaoŋne-ni.”" 
Daniel6:6 Ci luloc madito kacel ki rwodi magi guporo lok kacel ci guye woko lawaŋacel ka gua gubino bot kabaka guwacce ni, “Ai kabaka Dario, bed kwo nakanaka!" 
Daniel6:7 Luloc ducu madito me ker man, kacel ki ludito pa lwak, rwodi, lumitam ki luloc me dul lobo mapatpat guye lawaŋacel ni kabaka myero omok cik ki miyo twero ma pe gitwero lokone ni, ka ce gibinoŋo ŋat mo ka lego lubaŋa mo nyo ka woro dano mukene ma pe in kabaka, pinino pyeradekrdano macalo meno gibibolo woko i kin lwak labwor." 
Daniel6:8 Pienno kombeddi in kabaka myero imok cik ci iket ciŋi i buk ma gicoyo iye cik ma pe giloko atata, kit macalo cik pa jo Medi ki Percia tye kwede, ma pe giloko atata-ni.”" 
Daniel6:9 Pi meno kabaka Dario oketo ciŋe i buk me cik kun moko cik man. 
Daniel6:10 I kare ma doŋ Daniel oŋeyo ni giketo cin i buk me cik, oa ocito i ode odonyo i kicikane ma tye malo ma tye ki waŋ dirica, ci oyabo dirica ma okemo yo tuŋ Jerucalem; ci obedo ka rumo coŋe piny ka lega kun miyo pwoc bot Lubaŋane tyen adek nino ki nino, kit macalo yam con koŋ obedo ka timone-ni." 
Daniel6:11 Lacen jo-nu ‘gucako bino bot Daniel kit macalo onoŋo doŋ gutyeko yubone-ni, ci gunoŋo Daniel tye ka lega kun bako doge bot Lubaŋane." 
Daniel6:12 Ka gudok cen gucito i nyim kabaka, gunyiko cok ci gucako wacce lok ma dok i kom cik ma pe lokke-ni ni, “Ai kabaka, onoŋo mono pe iketo ciŋi i buk me cik ma pe lokke atata-ni, kun iciko ni ka ce gibinoŋo ŋat mo ka lego lubaŋa mo nyo ka woro dano mo mukene ma pe in kabaka, pi nino pyeradek, dano macalo meno gibibolo woko i kin lwak labwor?” Kabaka odok iye botgi ni, “Lok meno pud ocuŋ matek kit macalo cik pa jo Medi ki Percia tye kwede, ma pe gitwero lokone atata-ni.”" 
Daniel6:13 Ci gumedde ki tito lok bot kabaka ni, “Wanoŋo Daniel ma en ŋat acel i kin jo ma yam giyakogi ki i Juda, pe lubo cikki, ai kabaka, kadi wa cik ma pe lokke ma iketo iye ciŋi i buk-ki, ento bedo mere ka lego Lubaŋane tyen adek nino ki nino.”" 
Daniel6:14 I kare ma doŋ kabaka owinyo lok magi ducu, cwinye ocwer mada, obedo ki tam pi laro Daniel; ci obedo ka yelle matek ki tam i cwinye nio ka cen opoto, pi yenyo kit yo ma myero el are kwede." 
Daniel6:15 Lacen jo magi dok gubino kacel bot kabaka, kit macalo onoŋo doŋ guyubo kwede, ci guwaco bot kabaka ni, “Ai kabaka, myero iŋe ni, man aye cik pa jo Medi ki jo Percia ni, cik mo ma kabaka doŋ omoko pe twero lokke.”" 
Daniel6:16 Cutcut kabaka omiyo twero, gicito gikelo Daniel ci gibolo woko i kin lwak labwor. Ci kabaka owaco bot Daniel ni, “Myero Lubaŋani ma iworo jwijwi-ni tin koŋ olari ba!”" 
Daniel6:17 Gikelo got acel madit ci giloro ki dog boro pa lwak labwor-ri woko, ka kabaka bene odiyo agit cine i odok ma gimwono ki got meno kacel ki agit ciŋ pa luditone me awora, ma moko ni myero pe gilok gin mo pi lok kom Daniel." 
Daniel6:18 Lacen kabaka ocako dok i gaŋ kalle, obedo ka ri kec dyewor benebene; gin mo pe ma gitero bote me yomo cwinye, nino bene okwero mako waŋe woko." 
Daniel6:19 I kare ma piny doŋ oyabbe odiko, kabaka oa malo ci okato woko ocito oyotoyot twatwal i dog boro pa labwor." 
Daniel6:20 Ka doŋ oo cok ki boro ka ma onoŋo Daniel tye iye-ni, ci odaŋŋe kun kok matek pi remcwiny, ci owaco bot Daniel ni, “Ai Daniel, latic pa Lubaŋa makwo, en Lubaŋani ma iworo jwijwi-ni mono doŋ otwero lari ki i dog lwak labwor magi?”" 
Daniel6:21 Daniel odok ki kabaka ni, “Ai kabaka, bed kwo nakanaka!" 
Daniel6:22 Lubaŋana ocwalo Lamalaika otweyo dog lwak labwor magi woko, mumiyo pe gumwoda woko, pien ginoŋo ni pe atye ki bal mo i nyime, kadi wa i nyimi bene, ai kabaka, pe atimo gin mo marac kadi ki acel.”" 
Daniel6:23 Lok meno omiyo kabaka obedo ki yomcwiny matek, ci omiyo twero ni gikwany Daniel woko Kii boro pa labwor gikel woko ka maleŋ. Pe ginoŋo kadi latin ret mo i kome wacel, pien onoŋo en obedo ka geno Lubaŋane." 
Daniel6:24 Cutcut kabaka ociko ni gikel jo ma gudoto Daniel-li, ci gibologi woko i boro i kin lwak labwor, gin ducu kacel ki mongi wa ki litinogi. Doŋ ma pud peya gupoto piny i te boro, labwor ogamogi woko lamal likapkap ci gumwodogi gutyero ocogogi woko lipwacpwac." 
Daniel6:25 Lacen kabaka Dario ocoyo waraga bot lwak me rok ducu, ki rok mapatpat, kadi wa bot jo ma loko leb mapatpat ma gibedo i lobo ducu kun wacci, “Kuc myero onya omedde botwu." 
Daniel6:26 Aketo kombeddi cik ni, i kabedo ducu ma i te locca madit-ti dano ducu myero komgi omyel dok gubed ki lworo i nyim Lubaŋa pa Daniel, pien en aye Lubaŋa makwo, ma bedo nakanaka; kerre bene pe gituro, locce bene pe bigik." 
Daniel6:27 Lubaŋane laro dano dok konyogi bene, tiyo lanyut ki tano-gu i polo ki i lobo, en aye ma olaro Daniel ki i teko pa lwak labwor.”" 
Daniel6:28 Mumiyo Daniel olimo gum ki lonyo madwoŋ i kare me loc pa Dario ki i kare me loc pa Ciro ma jo Percia. 
Daniel7:1 I mwaka mukwoŋo me loc pa Belcajar kabaka me Babilon, Daniel oleko lek dok bene ginanyuta obino i wiye i kare ma en obuto i wi kitandane. Ci ocoyo gin ma en oleko-ni woko piny, dok otito kit lokke woko bene." 
Daniel7:2 Daniel owacci, “Man aye gin ma aneno i ginanyuta i dyewor ki i waŋ lek; aneno yamo aŋwen ducu gubedo ka rubo pii me nam madit." 
Daniel7:3 Ci cutcut aneno lee madito aŋwen gukatti woko ki i nam, kun lee acel acel nen pat mada ki lawote." 
Daniel7:4 Lee mukwoŋo nen calo labwor, dok onoŋo tye ki bwome macalo bwom ocur. I kare ma abedo ka neno ci giputo bwome woko giilo woko ki i nom giketo Ocuŋ ki tyene aryo calo dano; ci gimiye bene cwiny pa dano." 
Daniel7:5 Dok aneno lee mukene me aryone, nen calo ŋuu, Otino tyene tuŋcel malo; tye ki cogo riŋo ‘lakŋet adek i doge i kin lake. Ci gititte ni, ‘A malo, imwod riŋo madwoŋ.’" 
Daniel7:6 I ŋe man aneno piny, ci aneno dok lee mukene mubedo calo kwac, ma tye ki bwome aŋwen macalo bwom winyo i ŋeye; onoŋo wiye tye aŋwen, dok bene gimiye loc." 
Daniel7:7 I ŋe man oo i dyewor aneno ginanyuta, ci aneno lee me aŋwenne, ger miyo kom dano myel marac ma lworo noŋo oketo komgi woko, dok tekone dwoŋ ma pe wacce; lake ducu obedo nyonyo matek; obedo ka mwodo riŋo lee otyero woko lipwacpwac, ka doŋ onyono gin mudoŋŋe woko piny ki tyene. Onoŋo nen pat dok twatwal ki lee mukene ma gukwoŋo nyime ca, onoŋo tuŋe tye apar kulu." 
Daniel7:8 Abedo ka tamo lok i kom tune apar-ri, ci aneno tuŋe mukene dok otwi olot ki i kin luwote; tye matidi mo. Ka otwi, ma onoŋo giputo tune adek i kom gin mukwoŋo twi-ni woko ki tergi ducu pi wekke kabedo, ci aneno waŋ tye i tun lee man ma obedo calo wan dano, ma doge onoŋo tye ka loko lok mogo me wakke adada." 
Daniel7:9 “I Kare ma abedo ka nenone, ci aneno, gicibo komker mogo ci Ŋat ma yam okwoŋo bedo kwo wa con obino obedo i wi komker acel. Boŋone tar calo pee, dok bene yer wiye rom ki yer romo ma gilwoko odoko matar adada; komkerre obedo leb mac ma lyel keken ki lawalane obedo mac ma tye ka wan," 
Daniel7:10 Laora kulu me mac ocako mol, ka mol a ki i nyime katti woko. Dano alip ki alip gitiyo bote; ki jo alip apar tyen alip apar gibedo ka cuŋ i nyime, ci laŋolkop ocako bedo ki lukiko pi ŋolo kop, ci omiyo oyabo buk." 
Daniel7:11 “Abedo ka neno piny i cawa meno pi lok me wakke ma tuŋ lee onoŋo tye ka lokone. I kare ma abedo ka nenone, ci gineko lee-nu woko, ka giwaŋo kome ki mac gityeko woko liweŋ," 
Daniel7:12 Doŋ lee mukene-ne-gu gikwanyo locgi woko ki botgi, ento giwekogi ni koŋ gubed kwo i lobo pi oro ki kare manok." 
Daniel7:13 I dyewor aneno ginanyuta macalo magi: cutcut aneno ŋat mo macalo dano, kun lor bino piny ki pol me polo. Ci obino bot ŋat ma yam okwoŋo bedo kwo wa con-ni, gitere bene wa i nyime." 
Daniel7:14 Gitiŋo loc ducu gimiyo i ciŋe, kacel ki ker ducu ki deyone, wek lwak me rok ducu ki rok ducu, ki jo ma loko leb mapatpat-gu ducu, gubed luticce. Locce aye loc ma bedo matwal, locce pe bigik, ki kerre bene pe gitwero turone." 
Daniel7:15 “An Daniel, cwinya onoŋo oballe woko pi lek ma obino i wiya opoyo tipo koma." 
Daniel7:16 Ci acito anyiko cok bot ŋat mo acel i kin jo ma onoŋo gucuŋ ka kenyo, ci apenye kun amito en otitta ada me lok magi ducu. En otitta, omiyo aŋeyo te lokke ducu, kun wacci," 
Daniel7:17 ‘Lee tim magi aŋwen madito-gu gin aye luker aŋwen ma gibia ki i lobo. 
Daniel7:18 Ento jo maleŋ pa ŋat Mamalo Twal aye gibicamo ker, dok gibibedo wegi ker nakanaka.’" 
Daniel7:19 “Dok amito twatwal me ŋeyo lok ada ma dok i kom lee me aŋwenne ma onoŋo nen mapat ki lee mukene-gu, ma onoŋo ger ma miyo kom dano myel marac, ma lworo noŋo oketo komgi woko-ni. Lake ducu obedo nyonyo, ki Lwete ducu obedo mola, ma obedo ka mwodo riŋo lee tyero cogone woko lipwacpwac, ka doŋ onyono gin mudoŋŋe woko piny ki tyene." 
Daniel7:20 Abedo ka tamo lok i kom tuŋe apar ma onoŋo tye i wiye-ni, ki i kom tuŋe mukene ma dok otwi olot ki i kin luwote, kun otwi ma onoŋo giputo tuŋe adek i kom gin ma gukwoŋo twi-ni pi wekke kabedo. En tuŋ lee ma onoŋo waŋe tye ma obedo calo waŋ dano-ni, kun doge bene tye ma obedo ka loko kwede lok me wakke adada. Onoŋo en dit makato lee luwote mukene-gu woko." 
Daniel7:21 I kare ma abedo ka nenone, ci aneno tuŋ lee meno oero lweny i kom jo maleŋ, ci otayogi woko," 
Daniel7:22 nio waŋ ma ŋat ma yam okwoŋo bedo kwo wa con-ni obino, ci oŋolo kop pa jo maleŋ pa ŋat Mamalo Twal, ka doŋ kare oo ci jo maleŋ gugamo ker woko." 
Daniel7:23 “En dok owaco kuman ni, ‘Lok i kom lee me aŋwenne tye kit man: Ker me aŋwen bibedo tye i lobo; kerre bibedo pat ki ker mukene-gu ducu. Ker man bicamo jo me lobo tyeko woko ducu, binyonogi woko piny ki tyene, dok ŋinyogi woko matitino." 
Daniel7:24 Doŋ lok i kom tuŋ lee apar-ri tye kit man: Tye luker apar ma gibia ki i te ker man, dok kabaka acel mukene bia ki i ŋegi: en bibedo pat mada ki luker ma gukwoŋo nyime-gu, dok bene bituro ker pa luker adek woko." 
Daniel7:25 En biloko lok marac i kom ŋat Mamalo Twal, biuno jo maleŋ pa ŋat Mamalo Twal-li, Bitemo loko karegi me woro Lubaŋa, ki cik ma en omiyogi. Gibimiyo jo maleŋ i ciŋe pi mwaka adek ki nucu." 
Daniel7:26 Lacen gibibedo ki lukiko pi ŋolo kop i kome, ci gikwanyo locce woko ki bote, kun gibalo dok gityeko woko matwal nio wa i agikkine." 
Daniel7:27 Doŋ ker ki loc ki dit me ker ducu ma tye i te polo gibimiyo woko bot lwak pa jo maleŋ pa ŋat Mamalo Twal. Kergi bibedo ker ma bedo nakanaka, kun loc me lobo ducu bibedo ka worogi dok gibilubo cikgi.’" 
Daniel7:28 “Doŋ agikki me lok man tye kit man. An Daniel, tamma omiyo cwinya opoto matek, ki koma bene oballe woko; ento akano lok man i cwinya pira kena.”" 
Daniel8:1 I mwaka me adek me loc pa kabaka Belcajar, an Daniel aneno ginanyuta i waŋ lek, i ŋe ginanyuta mukwoŋo ca." 
Daniel8:2 I kare ma aneno ginanyuta ki i waŋ lek anoŋo ni doŋ atye wa i gaŋ kal madit me Cuca, ma tye i lobo Elam; dok bene aneno ni atye wa i dog kulu Ulai." 
Daniel8:3 Ailo waŋa malo ci aneno nyok romo ocuŋ i wi tera i dog kulu. Nyok romo-nu onoŋo tuŋe tye aryo; tuŋe aryo-ni ducu giboco, ento acel onoŋo dok bor kato lawote; en me aryone-ni otwi lacen." 
Daniel8:4 Aneno nyok romo ka witte ki tek kun loko tuŋe tuŋ potoceŋ ki yo tuŋ acam, ka lokke yo tuŋ acuc bene, ma lee tim mo onoŋo pe twero cuŋ i nyime. Onoŋo ŋat mo bene pe ma twero larogi ki i tekone; en yam otimo gin ma iye mito kun dworre kekene bene." 
Daniel8:5 I kare ma abedo ka lwodo lok cutcut aneno nyok dyel obino kun oa ki yo tuŋ potoceŋ ma ŋolo dye lobo ducu arii, ma tyene pe gudo ŋom; nyok dyel-lu onoŋo tye ki tuŋe i kin waŋe ma nen wa ki cen." 
Daniel8:6 Nyok dyel oa obino bot nyok romo ma tye ki tune aryo-ni, ma onoŋo aneno Ocuŋ i wi tera i dog kulu ca, ci ocako riŋo ka lweny i kom nyok romo ki akemo madit adada." 
Daniel8:7 Aneno obino odirre cok twatwal ki nyok romo, ci kolo ocako mako i kom nyok romo ci otwomo nyok romo oturo oputo tuŋe aryo ca woko; nyok romo onoŋo pe tye ki teko mo liweŋ me cuŋ i nyim nyok dyel, ci orete woko piny i ŋom ka onyone ki tyene; onoŋo pe tye ŋat ma twero laro nyok romo ki i teko pa nyok dyel." 
Daniel8:8 Meno omiyo nyok dyel odworre kekerie mukato kare; ento i kare ma onoŋo en pud tek-ki, tuŋe madit-ti otur woko. Cutcut dok aneno tuŋe aŋwen mukene gutwi ma ginen ki cen ma gukemo yamo aŋwen me polo." 
Daniel8:9 Dok aneno tuŋe mo matidi otwi okatti ki i kom tuŋe acel ki i kingi, olot mabor okemo yo tuŋ acuc, ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ, ma okemo kwede lobo me deyo." 
Daniel8:10 Odoŋo madit oo wa i kom mony me polo; ento obolo lakalatwe mogo woko piny i ŋom, ci onyonogi woko ki tyene." 
Daniel8:11 Ocako dworre kekene o kwede wa i kom Laker me mony meno; ci okwanyo gitum awaŋa me nino ducu-ni woko ki bote, ka ojwero ode maleŋ-ŋi obalo woko." 
Daniel8:12 Gitiŋo mony kacel ki gitum awaŋa me nino ducu gimiyo i ciŋe pi bal; ci gibolo lok ada woko piny i ŋom, ci tuŋe obedo ka tic omedde matek twatwal." 
Daniel8:13 Cutcut awinyo ŋat maleŋ tye ka loko ki ŋat maleŋ mukene owaco bote ni. “Ginanyuta ma aneno i wan lek ma okemo gitum awaŋa me nino ducu biri pi kare ma rom mene, ma okemo bene bal ma nyayo gin malik, ki ma okemo miyo ot pa Lubaŋa ki mony me polo me anyona woko ki tyen-ni?”" 
Daniel8:14 Ci ŋat maleŋ ma obedo ka lok-ki owacce ni, “Biri pi nino alip, acel ki miya acel ki pyerabic ma pe gibityero iye gitum me odiko ki otyeno, ka lacen gibiroco ot pa Lubaŋa gidwoko i kit ma myero.”" 
Daniel8:15 I kare ma onoŋo an Daniel aneno ginanyuta, abedo ka yenyo yo me niaŋ iye; ci cutcut aneno ŋat mo ma ocuŋ i nyima ma nen calo dano." 
Daniel8:16 Ci awinyo dwan dano ma lok oa ki i kin kulu Ulai, ci olwoŋo ni, “Gabriel, mi danonu one te lok me ginanyuta ma en oneno-ni.”" 
Daniel8:17 Ci ocako bino cok ki ka ma onoŋo acuŋ iye; i kare ma obino abedo ki lworo ci apoto aryebbe woko piny, Ento en owacca ni, “In wod pa dano doŋ iniaŋ ni, ginanyuta ma inenoni nyuto gin ma bitimme kale me agik.”" 
Daniel8:18 I kare ma en tye ka lok kweda, nino omako waŋa woko acako nino nino matut kun akulu waŋa i ŋom; ento en oguda ci ociba acuŋ ki tyena." 
Daniel8:19 Owaco bota ni, “Nen, abinyutti gin ma bitimme lacen i kare me agik me akemo pa Lubaŋa; pien lokke kemo nino me agik ma yam giciko pire con." 
Daniel8:20 Doŋ lok ma dok i kom nyok romo ma ineno ma tuŋe tye aryo-ni, magi gin aye luker me Media ki me Percia." 
Daniel8:21 Ento nyok dyel meno kabaka pa jo Grik; doŋ tune madit ma i kin wane-ni meno aye kabaka mukwoŋo," 
Daniel8:22 Doŋ tuŋe ma gituro-ni, ma tune aŋwen mukene otwi kakare ca, meno ker aŋwen ma bia ki rokke, ento tekogi pe bibedo rom ki mere." 
Daniel8:23 Ento lacen ki i ŋe locgi, i kare ma noŋo lubalo welgi onya omedde, ci kabaka mo ma waŋe ocwiny bia cako loc, ŋat ma niaŋ i lok me koc lit-gu," 
Daniel8:24 Tekone bibedo dit twatwal, en bitiyo gin ma tyeko piny woko ma miyo lworo, gin ma en bitiyo ducu biwoto maber, bineko jo ma gin twoni oteka kacel ki rok pa jo maleŋ." 
Daniel8:25 Pi ryekone marac, miyo bwola bimedde ameda i ciŋe, dok bibedo ka dworre ke kene ki i tamme. En bineko jo mapol tyekogi woko atura; dok bene bia lwenyo kadi wa i kom Laloc madit ma loyo luker ducu; ento gibiture woko laboŋo ciŋ dano mo ma ogudo kome." 
Daniel8:26 Pi meno ginanyuta ma loko i kom gitum me odiko ki otyeno gire obedo ada; doŋ imwon ginanyuta meno ikan woko, pien pud kare tye bor.”" 
Daniel8:27 Dok an Daniel, ryeko onoŋo orwenyo woko ki bota, omiyo two omaka abuto kwede pi nino mapol manoknok; ka lacen aa acito ka tiyo tic pa kabaka; ento abedo ka uro ginanyuta meno ma aneno i waŋ lek-ki, dok pe amedo ki niaŋ iye wacel." 
Daniel9:1 I mwaka mukwoŋo me loc pa Dario wod pa Akacwero, ma en anywalli pa jo Media, en aye Dario odoko iye kabaka, ci oloyo ker pa jo Kaldaya." 
Daniel9:2 An Daniel onoŋo akwano i buk lok ma yam Rwot onyuto bot lanebi Jeremia, gin ma myero okwoŋ timme ma noŋo Jerucalem bibedo obur; ci anoŋo kare meno ginyuto wel mwakane ni biromo pyerabiro kulu." 
Daniel9:3 Lacen aloko waŋa bot Rwot Lubaŋa, kun ayenye, alego dok abako doga bote, kun ari kec ma aruko boŋo cola ma abuko koma ki buru bene." 
Daniel9:4 Abedo ka lega i nyim Rwot Lubaŋana kun atuco balwa ma awacci, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, in idit, dok wabedo ki lworo i nyimi. In Lubaŋa me ada dok igwoko gicikkeni ki mar meri ma pe lokke pi jo ma gimari dok ma gilubo cik meri." 
Daniel9:5 Watyeko balo, wabedo ka timo roc mapol kun watimo bene gin maraco adada, dok wajemo woko i komi, waloko ŋewa woko boti, pe walubo cikki; dok bene pe watiyo gin ducu ma yam iciko." 
Daniel9:6 Pe wabedo ka winyo lok pa luticci ma gin lunebi, ma gubedo ka tito lok ducu ki nyiŋi bot lukerwa, rwodiwa, ki bot kwarowa kacel ki bot lwak ducu ma gibedo i lobowa." 
Daniel9:7 Ai Rwot, kit ma atir gire tye boti keken, ento ki tuŋ botwa Lewic doŋ obalo wanwa woko, kit macalo otimme kwede i nino man i kom jo Juda, i kom jo ma bedo i Jerucalem, ki i kom jo Icrael ducu, jo ma bedo ka macok ki jo ma gibedo ka mabor, i lobo ma yam iryemogi iterogi iye ducu, pi tim me roro ma onoŋo gubedo ka timone i komi." 
Daniel9:8 Ai Rwot nen lewic abalo wanwa woko, wan ducu kacel ki lukerwa, rwodiwa, ki kwarowa, pien onoŋo watimo bal i komi." 
Daniel9:9 Kica ki weko bal tye bot Rwot Lubaŋawa, kadi bed onoŋo wajemo woko i kome." 
Daniel9:10 Pe wabedo ka winyo lok dog Rwot Lubaŋawa, dok pe walubo cik ma onoŋo en oketo piwa kun wok ki bot luticce lunebi." 
Daniel9:11 Jo Icrael ducu gubalo cikki woko, ka guloko ŋegi woko boti, gukwero winyo lok dogi ma ibedo ka loko botgi. Pi meno oweko lok me ceno dano ki lok me lamo dog ma yam gicoyo i buk pa Moses ma en laticci, gikwanyo gionyo woko i komwa, pien doŋ watimo bal i komi." 
Daniel9:12 In doŋ icobo gin ma yam oloko i komwa ki i kom luloc ma onoŋo giloyowa, ci ikelo can madit i komwa; kit tim man pud peya nen i piny ma tye i te polo, en kit gin acel-lu ma yam gitimo i kom Jerucalem." 
Daniel9:13 Kadi bed can madit man opoto i komwa, kit macalo gicoyo i buk me cik pa Moses, ento pe walego kica bot Rwot Lubaŋawa, pe waweko balwa ducu, kun wamine kenwa me lubo ada meri." 
Daniel9:14 Meno aye gin mumiyo Rwot okano can madit piwa, ka lacen oketo i komwa; pien Rwot Lubaŋawa oporre i gin ducu ma en tiyo, ento wan aye pe wabedo ka winyo lokke." 
Daniel9:15 Kombeddi doŋ, ai Rwot Lubaŋawa, yam ikwanyo joni woko ki i lobo Ejipt ki tek me badi, yam imiyo nyiŋi oywek iye, kit macalo tye kwede i kare man, ento onoŋo wabalo, dok watimo gin maraco adada." 
Daniel9:16 Ai Rwot, kit macalo gin ducu ma itiyo tye atir, jwa kinigani ki akemoni woko ki i kom Jerucalem ma en aye gaŋ kaili ki gotti maleŋ, pien pi bal mewa aye, ki pi bal mapol ma yam kwarowa gutimo, omiyo Jerucalem kacel ki lwakki gudoko lok aboka i kin rok ducu ma gibedo ka netwa ma gurumowa dyere," 
Daniel9:17 Pi meno kombeddi, ai Lubaŋawa, winy legana an laticci, ki lega me bako dog ma akelo i nyimi; dok bene ai Rwot, mi waŋi oryeny i kom ot meri maleŋ, ma doŋ odoŋ obur-ri." 
Daniel9:18 Ai Lubaŋana, cik iti iwiny, yab waŋi ci inen to-piny ma opoto i komwa, ki i kom gaŋ ma gilwoŋo ki nyini-ni. Pe wabako dogwa boti kun wageno ni kitwa tye atir, ento pi geno kica meri madwoŋ." 
Daniel9:19 Ai Rwot, winywa ba; ai Rwot, wek balwa; ai Rwot, cukke ci iti gin mo, pe igalle, pi nyiŋi keni keken, ai Lubaŋana, pien gaŋ man kacel ki lwak ducu ma gibedo iye gilwonŋgi ki nyiŋi.”" 
Daniel9:20 Kumeno abedo ka lok kun alego, atuco balla ki pa lutuwa jo Icrael, kun bene akelo lega me bako doga i nyim Rwot Lubaŋana pi got mere maleŋ." 
Daniel9:21 I kare ma atye ka lok kun alego kwede, cutcut atuggi neno dano ma nyiŋe Gabriel, dano ma onoŋo doŋ atyeko nenone i waŋ lek i ginanyuta mukwoŋo ca; aneno obino bota kun ŋweco madwir adada i cawa me gitum me otyeno," 
Daniel9:22 En obino ci owacca ni, “Daniel, kombeddi abino ka miyo boti ryeko ki niaŋ muromo." 
Daniel9:23 I acakki lega me bako doggi lok mo okatti ma oa ki bot Lubaŋa, kombeddi abino ka titti pire, pien Lubaŋa mari matek twa twal. Pi meno tam tyen lok man wek iniaŋ i te lok me ginanyuta ma ineno." 
Daniel9:24 “Mwaka miya aŋwen ki pyeraboŋwen en aye kare ma giciko ma okemo lutuwu ki gaŋwu maleŋ, pi tyeko bal me kalo wi cik, pi giko bal woko doŋ matwal, ki pi kwanyo bal woko ki i komwu doŋ wulim kit ma atir ma bedo nakanaka, wek ginanyuta kacel ki lok ma yam lanebi oloko ocobbe kakare, dok bene pi wiro kabedo maleŋ makato ducu-ni ki moo." 
Daniel9:25 Doŋ amito iŋe dok iniaŋ maber ni, nia i kare ma lok man cito kwede woko pi roco ki pi gero Jerucalem odoco, nio wa i bino pa dano ma giwiro ma en laker, bibedo mwaka pyeraŋwen wiye aboŋwen. Ci gaŋ bibedo mwaka miya aŋwen ki pyeradek wiye aŋwen ma doŋ gigero odoco ki dyekalle ki cel lobo ma gitoro atora, ento meno bibedo i kare ma noŋo ayelayela dwoŋ adada." 
Daniel9:26 I ne mwaka miya aŋwen ki pyeradek wiye aŋwen, ŋat mo ma giwiro gibikwanye woko ma pe dok gibiketo ŋat mo me leyo kakare; ci lwak pa laker ma gikuro binone-ni bijwero gaŋ kacel ki kabedo maleŋ gibalo woko. Agikkine doŋ bibedo macalo pii aluka, ka doŋ lweny bibedo teretere nio wa i agikki; en aye to-piny ma yam gicikoni." 
Daniel9:27 Ci en dano-nu bimoko gicikke ki jo mapol pi mwaka abiro; ki pi mwaka adek ki nucu, en bijuko tyero gitum ki gityer woko. Dano ma bikelo to-piny-nyi bibino kun noŋo obone woko i tim me kwer ma dano gitye ka timone, nio waŋ ma agikkine ma yam giciko-ni doŋ gionyo woko i kome.”" 
Daniel10:1 I mwaka me adek me loc pa Ciro kabaka me Percia Lubaŋa onyuto lok mo bot Daniel, ma nyiŋe mukene Beltecajar. Lokke obedo lok ada, dok okelo ayelayela madwoŋ adada ci Daniel oniaŋ i lok, obedo ki niaŋ matut bene i ginanyuta ma en oneno." 
Daniel10:2 I kare meno ducu, onoŋo an Daniel abedo ka kumo pi cabit adek kulu." 
Daniel10:3 Pe abedo ka camo cam mo mamit, pe acamo riŋo kadi ki kono vino bene pe odonyo i doga, dok pe awiro koma ki moo wacel, pi cabit adek-ki kulu." 
Daniel10:4 I nino dwe pyeraryo wiye aŋwen me dwe mukwoŋo, anoŋo ni acuŋ i dog kulu madit, ma en aye Tigric." 
Daniel10:5 Atiŋo waŋa aneno malo ci aneno dano mo ma oruko boŋo camanini, ma otweyo pyere ki del jabu me Upaj." 
Daniel10:6 Kome onoŋo obedo calo got berul ma mil amila, ki tur nyime nen calo lutkot ma wil, ki wane ryeny calo mac, bade ki tyene-gu ducu nen calo mola ma girudo maleŋ adada, ki lokke ma en loko-ni winnye calo woo pa lwak dano mapol." 
Daniel10:7 An Daniel keken aye ma aneno ginanyuta; jo ma onoŋo gitye kacel kweda pe guneno, ento myelkom madit opoto i komgi, omiyo guriŋo ka kanne woko." 
Daniel10:8 Guweka adoŋ kena, ci aneno ginanyuta man madit. I kare ma doŋ aneno tek mo pe odon i koma; kit ber me koma olokke woko ma lworo maki woko cut." 
Daniel10:9 Ka doŋ awinyo dwane ki lok ma en obedo ka lokone, ci apoto piny aryeba-ic anino nino matut adada kun pe aŋeyo koma." 
Daniel10:10 Cutcut ciŋ dano mo-ni oguda omiyo ciŋa ki coŋa ducu gumyel matek. 
Daniel10:11 En dano-nu owacca ni, “Daniel, in dano ma gimaro adada, gwok lok ducu ma atye ka lokone boti. A itirre icuŋ atir, pien an kombeddi giora boti.” I kare ma onoŋo pud en tye ka loko lok meno, aa malo acuŋ ma koma myel amyela likwakkwak." 
Daniel10:12 Ka lacen owaco ni, “Daniel, pe ilwor, pien cakke i nino mukwoŋo ma iketo kwede cwinyi ka niaŋ ki ka mwolle woko keni i nyim Lubaŋani, lokki ducu doŋ onoŋo Lubaŋa otyeko winyone, nen an doŋ atyeko bino pi lokki." 
Daniel10:13 Lamalaika ma rwot me ker me Percia ogena woko pi nino ma romo pyeraryo wiye acel kulu; ento Mikael, ŋat acel madit i kin rwodi ducu, oa obino ka konya ci aweke kunnu gin ki rwot me ker me Percia," 
Daniel10:14 abino ka niani wek iŋe can ma bipoto i kom rokwu i kare me lacen. Pien ginanyuta man ma ineno-ni bene lokke bitimme i kare ma tye anyim.” 
Daniel10:15 I kare ma doŋ oloko bota kit lok macalo magi ducu, akulo waŋa piny i ŋom adoko calo ladoge oto." 
Daniel10:16 Nen, ŋat mo acel ma obedo calo dano ogudo del doga; ci aŋamo doga aloko bene. Awaco bote en ŋat ma onoŋo ocuŋ i nyima-ni ni, “Ai rwoda, pi tyen lok me ginanyuta man ma aneno omiyo arem mapol obino i koma, pe doŋ atye ki teko mo wacel." 
Daniel10:17 An laticci atwero ŋwette ka lok ki rwoda niŋniŋ? Pien kombeddi teko mo doŋ pe odoŋ i koma liweŋ, dok bene yweyo mo ma odon i cwinya pe.”" 
Daniel10:18 Lacen doki ŋat ma nen calo danoni oguda tyen me aryo ci omiya teko. 
Daniel10:19 Ka doŋ owacca ni, “In dano ma gimaro adada, pe ilwor; ibibedo maber dok ki kuc. Bed tek ki tekcwiny.” I kare ma oloko kweda, alimo teko kun awaco ni, “In rwoda aye doŋ iloki, pien doŋ ityeko miya teko.”" 
Daniel10:20 En openya ni, “In iŋeyo tyen lok mumiyo abino boti-ni? Ento kombeddi doŋ abilokke adok ka lweny i kom rwot me Percia. Ka doŋ atyeko lweny kwede, nen, rwot pa jo Grik bibino." 
Daniel10:21 Ento an abitito bote gin ma gicoyo i buk me lok ada: pe tye ŋatti mo ma tye ka ŋeta ma dok lwenyo ki jo man kono Mikael keken, ma en aye rwotwu." 
Daniel11:1 “I mwaka mukwoŋo me loc pa Dario ma en jo Medi, Mikael oa malo ka konya ki ka miya tek." 
Daniel11:2 “Kombeddi doŋ abinyutti lok me ada. Nen, lobo Percia dok bibedo ki luker mu kene adek; ento kabaka me aŋwenne bibedo lalonyo makatogi ducu; ka doŋ inen odoko tek pi lwak lonyonegu, en bitugo rok ducu pi lweny i kom ker pa jo Grik." 
Daniel11:3 Lacen kabaka matek bituc, ma biloyo lobo ki loc madit kun tiyo gire gin ducu kit ma iye mito." 
Daniel11:4 Ka doŋ ineno en ocako loc kit meno ci kerre bitur gipoko iye woko i kin yamo aŋwen me polo, ento pe bibedo pi likwaye, dok pe bilubo kit loc ma onoŋo en loyo kwede lobo; pien gibitiŋo kerre woko ki berre gimiyo bot jo mukene ma pe likwaye." 
Daniel11:5 “Dok kabaka ma loyo lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acuc bibedo matek, ento ŋat acel ki i kin rwodine bibedo tek makato en, dok locce bene bibedo loc madit." 
Daniel11:6 I ŋe mwaka mogo gibiribbe woko, ci nya pa kabaka me lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acuc bibino bot kabaka ma loyo lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam pi yubo lok me kelo kuc; ento teko pa dako-nu aye birwenyo woko, man miyo kabaka kacel ki likwaye pe gibiciro nakanaka, gibicayo pire gitenye woko ata ki luticce, ki latinne bene, wa ki cware kadi ki ŋat ma ocamo lobone-ni bene." 
Daniel11:7 “I kare meno nya pa kabaka binywalo latin calo yat ma olot ki i kom ajut, en aye bileyo ka tyen wonne; en bibino ka lweny i kom dul mony ci donyo wa i gaŋ ma girumo ki cel gogo pa kabaka me lobo ma yo tuŋ acam; en bilwenyo i komgi ci biloyogi bene." 
Daniel11:8 En bicoko lwak lubaŋa megi ki cal jogigi ma giliyo aliya ki jami me wel ma gitiyo ki ryal ki jabu, ci terogi i Ejipt; ka doŋ pi mwaka mogo en koŋ doŋ bibedo ma pe lwenyo i kom kabaka ma loyo lobo ma tye yo tun acam." 
Daniel11:9 Lacen kabaka ma loyo lobo bibino donyo i lobo pa kabaka ma yo tuŋ acuc, ento bidok gire i lobone kikome." 
Daniel11:10 “Awobene gibiero mony ci gibiguro lwak dano me mony madito kacel, ma gibibino i kom lukworgi ci giretogi woko ka gikato giwok ki i dye lobone gimedde ki tero mony wa i cel gogone." 
Daniel11:11 Ci kiniga bimako kabaka me lobo ma yo tuŋ acuc matek, miyo en bibino ka lweny i kom kabaka me lobo ma yo tuŋ acam; biguro lwak mony madit, ci gibimiyo lukworre i ciŋe bene." 
Daniel11:12 Ka doŋ owaro lwak woko, ci doŋ bibedo ki wakke i cwinye; en bineko jo alip ki alip, ento pe biloyo." 
Daniel11:13 Kabaka me lobo ma yo tuŋ acam pud bimedde ki coko lwak dano me mony, ma loyo jo ma wiati ca; ka doŋ i ne mwaka mogo en cako bino ki mony madit ki lwak jami me lonyo adada." 
Daniel11:14 “I kare meno ducu dul mony mapol bicako lweny i kom kabaka me lobo ma yo tuŋ acuc; dok lutim bwami ma i kin lutuwu kikome gibinwette me cobo te lok me ginanyuta ma ineno i waŋ lek, ento pe gibitwero." 
Daniel11:15 Dok kabaka me lobo ma yo tuŋ acam bibino rumo gaŋ, ci mako gaŋ meno ma girumo ki cel gogo maber adada. Ento dul lulweny ma gua ki i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acuc pe gibicuŋ, kadi wa twoni lweny ma giyerogi ayera, pien teko mo me cuŋ bibedo pe." 
Daniel11:16 Doŋ ŋat ma oebino ka lweny i kome bitimo kit ma cwinye mito, ŋat mo ma bicuŋ i nyime peke; en bicuŋ i lobo me deyoni, lobo meno ducu doŋ bibedo i te twerone." 
Daniel11:17 En biciko waŋe me bi no ki tek i te kerre ducu, en bikelo lok me kuc ci tiyo dok cobo bene. En bene bimiyo nya pa dako mo aye jwero ker woko; ento lobone pe bicuŋ kadi wa meddene bene doŋ bibedo pe." 
Daniel11:18 Lacen biloko waŋe kemo yo tuŋ lobo ma tye i dog nam, ci mako jo mapol ki i kingi; ento latel wi mony bikanne woko pi lewic; ada, en dok bidwoko lewicce cen i kome." 
Daniel11:19 Ci bilokke i ŋeye neno cel gogo me lobone kikome; ento en biyokke poto woko piny, ci pe dok gibinoŋo." 
Daniel11:20 “Lacen ŋat mo dok bibino leyo kakare ma bicwalo lajog lim madit kun wok ki i deyo me ker; ento pi kare manok keken gibituro woko, pe ki kiniga nyo kadi ki lweny mo." 
Daniel11:21 Ci dano mo malam ma yam pe gimiye dit me ker bibino leyo kakare; en bibino atura ci gamomerekerwoko ki lok bita. 
Daniel11:22 Mony ducu gibijwerogi giturogi woko i nyime, kadi wa ladit me gicikke pa Lubaŋa bene gibineko woko." 
Daniel11:23 Cakke i kare ma en biye cikke me ribbe kwede, bibedo ka tic ki lok me bwola keken; en bimedde doko tek ki jo mogo manok." 
Daniel11:24 En bio atura i dul lobo ma lonyo dwoŋ iye, ci bitiyo gin mo ma kwarine ducu ka wegi kwarine yam pe gutiyo, me keyo luyak woko ki i kingi liweŋ, ki jami ma yam giyako ayaka ki jami mapatpat ducu. En biyubbe me lweny i kom gaŋi me cel gogo matego, ento man bibedo pi kare manok mo keken." 
Daniel11:25 “En bitugo tekone ki tekcwinye i kom kabaka me lobo ma yo tuŋ acuc ki mony madit; ci kabaka me lobo ma yo tuŋ acuc biero lweny ki dul mony madit matek adada; ento en pe bitwero cuŋo, pien piro lok ki yub mapol gibibedo ka yubone twatwal i kome." 
Daniel11:26 Kadi ki jo ma camo camme mabeco-ni gin aye jo ma bineke gibijwero monnye woko, ci gineko lwak jo mapol ma komgi biradde piny i nom lirat." 
Daniel11:27 Doŋ luker aryo-ni gibibedo ka paro lok me kwarcwiny keken; gibibedo ka loko lok goba kadi bed gicamo i meja acel. Ento lokke pe bikonyo; pien kare me cobo lokke peya oromo, ento bitimme i kare ma giciko." 
Daniel11:28 En bidok i lobone ki lwak jami madwoŋ, co to pud bibedo ki kwarcwiny i kom gicikke maleŋ, En bitiyo kit ma cwinye mito, ci dok i lobone kikome." 
Daniel11:29 “I kare ma giciko en bilokke dwogo yo tuŋ acuc; ento i kare man, pe bibedo kit macalo yam obedo kwede wiati." 
Daniel11:30 Dano mo mua ki yo tuŋ potoceŋ bibino ki lwak mel mapol ka lweny i kome, Lworo bimake ci jukke woko kene; ci bidok cen ki ŋeye, cako lweny ki akemo madit i kom gicikke maleŋ. En bidok cen ka konyo jo ma doŋ gibwoto gicikke maleŋ woko." 
Daniel11:31 Dul mony ma a ki bote bibino dok pyedo ot pa Lubaŋa ki cel gogo woko, ci bikwanyo gitum ‘awaŋa ma gityero nino ducu woko gicako keto gin me kwer malik." 
Daniel11:32 En biywayo lweny i kom jo ma gibalo gicikke kun bitoŋi abita keken; ento jo ma giŋeyo Lubaŋagi gibicuŋo likiŋ ci gilwenyo bene matek pi niyegi. 
Daniel11:33 Doŋ jo mogo ma luryeko ma gitye i kin lwak gibimiyo jo mapol giniaŋ, kadi bed gibinekogi woko ki pala lucwan, dok giwaŋogi woko bene ki mac, nyo giterogi i opii, ma giyako jamigi woko pi kare mogo." 
Daniel11:34 Ka gitimogi marac, ci gibilimo kony mo manok. Doŋ jo mapol gibiribbe kwedgi ki lok bita." 
Daniel11:35 Ci luryeko mogo ma i kingi bipoto woko, ento meno bimiyo lwak gilonnye gidoko leŋ macalo jabu ma giliyo maber, ci mi yo gidoko matar laboŋo cilo, nio waŋ ma kare me agik oromo, ma en kare ma yam giciko." 
Daniel11:36 “Kabaka gire bitiyo gin ducu kit macalo cwinye mito; en binwette me bedo dit makato lubaŋa ducu, ka cako loko lok mogo ma giuro i kom Lubaŋa ma loyo lwak lubaŋa ducu. En bimedde kun pud bedo ki dit wic nio ka tic me akemo pa Lubaŋa doŋ otum woko liweŋ; pien gin ma Lubaŋa omoko bitimme." 
Daniel11:37 Kabaka pe bibedo ki winy mo woko liweŋ i kom lwak lubaŋa pa kwarine, nyo bot jok ma mon maro adada-ni; pe bimiyo kit winy mo bot lubaŋa mukene, pien en bikette kene me bedo dit ma loyo jami ducu." 
Daniel11:38 Kaka woro magi en bibedo ka woro lubaŋa me cel gogo ma en aye lubaŋa ma yam kwarine pe guŋeyo-ni; en bityero bote jabu kacel ki ryal, ki kidi matino me wel, ki mot ma welgi malo adada." 
Daniel11:39 En biketo lurok ma giworo lubaŋa mapat pi gwoko cel gogo mere; jo ma guye ditte en biketogi i rwom me dito ki deyo. En biketogi gibedo luloc ci giloyo jo mapol, dok bipoko lobo botgi me awila." 
Daniel11:40 “I kare me agikki kabaka me lobo ma yo tuŋ acuc bilwenyo i kome; ento kabaka me lobo ma yo tuŋ acam birune bi no i kome woko oyotoyot calo yamo lapiru, kun bino ki lwak gadigadi ki wegi aguragura-gu, ki lwak mel madwoŋ ata; en bibino donyo i lobo mapatpat ci gimol ki wot gikato ki iye." 
Daniel11:41 En bibino wa i lobo me deyo. Jo alip apar gibinekogi, woko, ento jo magi aye gibilarogi ki i cine: jo Edom ki jo Moab; ki jo Ammon ma gudoŋ," 
Daniel11:42 En biryeyo ciŋe me lweny i kom lobo mapol, kadi ki lobo Ejipt bene pe bibwot." 
Daniel11:43 En bi doko laloc ma loyo lonyo me jabu ki me ryal, ki jami me wel ma i Ejipt-gu ducu; doŋ jo Libya ki do Etiopia gibilubo kore." 
Daniel11:44 Ento lok ma biwinnye kun a ki yo tuŋ wokceŋ ki yo tun acam bi mi yo cwinye poto; en bia cito kunnu ki twon akeca madit ka jwero dano woko ki neko jo mapol bene," 
Daniel11:45 En biguro kemane madito i kin nam ki got maleŋ me deyo; ci kare me tone biromo ma noŋo ŋat mo ma konye doŋ pe. 
Daniel12:1 “I kare meno Mikael bibino, ma en rwot madit ma loyo rokwu. Dok kare me can bibedo tye, kit can macalo man peya onen cakke wa con i kare pa rok mo-ni nio kwede wa i kare meno. I kare meno aye gibilaro iye rokwu, jo ma gibinoŋo yam gicoyo nyiŋgi i buk." 
Daniel12:2 Dok jo mapol i kom jo ma gibuto i apwa me ŋom gibico woko, jo mukene gibidonyo i kwo ma bedo nakanaka, ento jo mukene gibinoŋo megi lewic ki cac ma bedo nakana ka," 
Daniel12:3 Jo maryek biryeny macalo pete me polo; ki jo ma loko jo mapol dwogo i kit ma atir, gibidoko calo lakalatwe matwal." 
Daniel12:4 Ento in Daniel, um lok man woko, ci imwon buk-ki woko, nio wa i kare me agik. Jo mapol gibibedo ka riŋo tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi, ki ŋec bene bimedde.”" 
Daniel12:5 Cutcut ki i ne meno an Daniel aneno piny, ci aneno jo mukene aryo gucuŋ i dog kulu, acel ocuŋ i dog kulu tuŋŋi ki acel ocuŋ i dog kulu tuŋcel." 
Daniel12:6 Ci owaco bot dano ma onoŋo oruko boŋo camanini, ma obedo malo i wi pii ma i kulu ni, “Man bitero kare ma rom mene nio ka agikki me ginaura magi bio?”" 
Daniel12:7 Dano ma onoŋo oruko boŋo camaniŋi-ni ma obedo malo i wi pii ma i kutu, otiŋo ciŋe aryo ducu okemo polo; ci awinyo en ka kwoŋo kwoŋ ki nyiŋ ŋat ma bedo matwal-li ni gin meno bibedo pi mwaka adek ki nucu, Ka doŋ ineno nino me turo tek pa jo maleŋ otum ci jami magi ducu bene bitimme cobo kakare," 
Daniel12:8 Awinyo, ento onoŋo pe aniaŋ. Mumiyo awaco ni, “Ai rwoda, agikki me jami magi bibedo niŋniŋ?”" 
Daniel12:9 Odok iye ni, “In icit meri citoni Daniel, pien pud giumo lokke dok gimwono woko kuro kare me agik." 
Daniel12:10 Jo mapol gibilonnye, gibilokke gidoko tar, kun bene gilonyogi odoco; ento jo maraco gibibedo megi ka timo gin maraco. Pe tye ŋat mo i kin lutim maraco ma biniaŋ iye; ento jo maryek aye biniaŋ iye." 
Daniel12:11 Cakke i kare ma gikwanyo iye gitum awaŋa me nino ducu ca, kun doŋ giketo gin me kwer malik, bibedo nino alip acel ki miya aryo ki pyeraboŋwen." 
Daniel12:12 Ŋat ma kuro nio ka nino alip acel ki miya adek ki pyeradek wiye abic oromo bedo ki gum. 
Daniel12:13 Kombeddi cit giri nio ka kare me agik oromo; ento i agikki me kare meno ibiywe ci ibicuŋ i kabedo ma gipoko boti.” 
Hosea1:1 Man lok pa Rwot ma yam obino bot Kocea, wod pa Beeri i kare pa Ujia, Yocam, Akaj ki Kejekia ma gin luker me Juda, ki i kare pa Jeroboam wod pa Yoaci kabaka me Icrael." 
Hosea1:2 I kare ma Rwot okwoŋo lok ki i dog Kocea, Rwot owaco bot Kocea ni, “Cit icinyom nyako ma lakwele, wek inywal kwede litino me kwele, pien lobo tye ka timo tim kwele pi kwero lubo Rwot.”" 
Hosea1:3 Kocea ocito onyomo Gomer nya pa Diblaim, ci Gomer ogamo ic, onywalo latin laco." 
Hosea1:4 Rwot owaco bot Kocea ni, “Cak nyiŋe Jejreel, pien odoŋ kare manok, abiketo can i kom ot pa Yeko pi remo ma oonyo i Jejreel, dok abimiyo ker me ot pa Icrael doŋ gik woko." 
Hosea1:5 Dok i nino meno abituro atum pa Icrael woko ki i nota me Jejreel.” 
Hosea1:6 Gomer doki ogamo ic, ci onywalo latin nyako, Rwot owaco bot Kocea ni, “Cak nyiŋe Lo-rukama, pien pe dok abimedde ki timo kica i kom ot pa Icrael, pe abiweko balgi kadi ki acel." 
Hosea1:7 Ento abitimo kica ki ot pa Juda, abilarogi pi tok pa Rwot Lubaŋagi; pe abilarogi ki atum, kadi ki pala lucwan, nyo ki lweny, nyo ki aguragura, kadi ki wegi aguragura.”" 
Hosea1:8 Ka doŋ Gomer ogeŋo latin doto cak, ci ogamo ic, onywalo latin laco." 
Hosea1:9 Rwot owacci, “Cak nyiŋe, Lo-ammi, pien wun pe wujona, dok an pe Lubaŋawu.”" 
Hosea1:10 Ento wel jo Icrael bibedo macalo kweyo me dog nam, ma pe pimme, ma pe kwanne bene; dok i kabedo ka ma ceŋ giwaco botgi ni, “Wun pe wujona” gibiwaco botgi ni, “Wun litino pa Lubaŋa makwo.”" 
Hosea1:11 Jo Juda ki jo Icrael gibicokke kacel, ci gibiketo ŋat acel ma bi telo wigi; ci gibia woko ki i lobo meno, pien nino pa Jejreel bibedo dit twatwal." 
Hosea2:1 Wuwac bot ominwu ni, “Ammi,” ki bot laminwu ni, “Rukama.”" 
Hosea2:2 “Wupyem ki minwu, wupyem kwede, pien en pe dakona, an bene pe a cware, wek okwany tim kwele woko ki i waŋe, dok okwany abor woko ki i kin tunone." 
Hosea2:3 Ka pe kumeno, abimiyo kome doŋ munero abimiyo en bedo noŋo macalo i nino ma yam ginywale iye; abiloke doko calo tim, abimiye bedo calo lobo mutwo, abineke woko ki orwo pii." 
Hosea2:4 Pe abitimo litinone kica, pien gin litino me kwele." 
Hosea2:5 Pien mingi obedo lakwele, pien oyac pi timo tim me lewic. Pien owacci, ‘Abilubo kor meya, ma gimiya kwonna ki piina, yer romona, pambana, moona ki ginamatana.’" 
Hosea2:6 Pi meno abicelo yone woko ki okuto, abigero cel arume kwede woko wek pe onoŋ yo wotte." 
Hosea2:7 En biryemo kor meye, pe bimakogi i waŋayo; en biyenyogi, ento pe binoŋo komgi. Lacen en biwacci, ‘Abilokke, adok bot cwara mukwoŋo ca, pien onoŋo abedo maber makato ma kombeddi.’" 
Hosea2:8 En yam pe oneyo ni an aye amiye kai, ki koŋo vino ki moo, pe oniaŋ ni an aye amiyo ryal onya bo te, ki jabu ma gitiyo kwede bot jok Baal." 
Hosea2:9 Pi meno ka kare biromo abitwonne ki kaila, ki koŋo vinona ka kare oromo; abikwanyo yer romona ki pambana, ma onoŋo oumo nyime ma tye munero-ni." 
Hosea2:10 Koni abimiyo en moyo timme me lewic i nyim meye, ŋat mo pe bilare ki i ciŋa." 
Hosea2:11 Abimiyo yomcwinye gik woko, ninone madito, por dwe, ki cabitte, ki nino madito ducu ma yam aciko pigi," 
Hosea2:12 Abibalo olok ki odurone, ma en loko i komgi ni, ‘Magi aye motta ma meya gumiya.’ Abilokogi gidoko buŋa, lee tim bicamogi woko." 
Hosea2:13 Abiketo can i kome pi nino madito pa Baal, ma en waŋo iye odok eceta botgi, kun rukke maber ki agit ki tiko ŋut me wel-gu, ka lubo kwede kor meye, kun wiye wil woko i koma, man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Hosea2:14 “Pi meno, nen, abibite mot, ci abitere woko wa i tim, kun adweko ki lok mamit." 
Hosea2:15 Abimiye poto olokke ki kunnu, abiloko nota Akor doko doggola me gen. Ci en bidokka iye ki kunnu kit ma yam en loko kwede ka tinone, ma rom ki lok ma oloko ma onoŋo a ki i lobo Ejipt." 
Hosea2:16 “I nino meno, man lok pa Rwot kikome, ibilwona iye ni, ‘Cwara,’ pe dok ibilwoŋa ni, ‘Baal mera.’" 
Hosea2:17 Pien abikwanyo nyiŋ Baal woko ki i doge, dano pe gibilwoŋo nyiŋgi matwal." 
Hosea2:18 Dok i nino meno abiketo gicikke piwu kun acikke ki lee tim, kacel ki winyo me polo, ki gin ma lak alaka i ŋom; dok abijuko atum, ki pala lucwan, kacel ki mony i wi lobo, wek ami wubut piny ki kuc." 
Hosea2:19 Abinyomi ibedo mera matwal; abinyomi atir, ki lencwiny, ki mar ma pe lokke, kacel ki kica." 
Hosea2:20 Abinyomi ki gen ma pe lokke, dok ibiŋeyo Rwot." 
Hosea2:21 “I nino meno, man lok pa Rwot kikome, abidok iye bot polo ki polo bidok iye bot lobo;" 
Hosea2:22 ki lobo bidok iye bot kai, ki bot koŋo vino, ki bot moo, ci gin gibidok iye bot Jejreel;" 
Hosea2:23 ci an ki koma aye abicoyo kodine piny i lobo. Abitimo kica ki Lo-rukama abiwaco bot Lo-ammi ni, ‘Wun jona;’ en biwacci, ‘In Lubaŋana.’ ”" 
Hosea3:1 Rwot owacca ni, “Dok icimar dako ma meye maro, ma latim abor; macalo Rwot maro jo Icrael, kadi bed gulokke gudok bot jogi kun gimaro poki olok mutwo.”" 
Hosea3:2 Ka doŋ awile pi cekel apar wiye abic me ryal, ki cayiri ma romo guniya aŋwen ki nucu," 
Hosea3:3 Ci awacce ni, “Myero ibed macalo dakona pi kare malac, kun pe ibedo lakwele, pe ibed ki laco mo; an bene abibedo kwedi kit meno.”" 
Hosea3:4 Pien jo Icrael biri pi kare malac laboŋo kabaka mo nyo laker mo, laboŋo gitum nyo wir me aworagi, laboŋo cal lubaŋa mo me tyet." 
Hosea3:5 Lacen jo Icrael bilokke, gibicako yenyo Rwot Lubaŋagi, ki kabakagi Daudi; pi meno ber pa Rwot bimiyo gidwogo bote ki woro i kare ma tye anyim." 
Hosea4:1 Wuwiny lok pa Rwot, wun jo Icrael; pien Rwot tye ki da i kom jo ma bedo i lobo man; pien ada pe, mar pe, ki ŋec mo i kom Lubaŋa bene pe i lobo." 
Hosea4:2 Gin ma tye en aye kwon, goba, nek, kwalo kwo ki timo abor;" 
Hosea4:3 Pi meno lobo tye ka kumo, jo ducu ma bedo iye komgi oloc woko, ki lee tim bene, kacel ki winyo me polo; wa rec me nam bene guto woko." 
Hosea4:4 Ento dano mo pe okel lok me da, dano mo pe odot lawote pien in aye ŋat ma ada kwede, in ajwaka." 
Hosea4:5 Ibitwomme dyeceŋ, lanebi bene bitwomme kwedi, dyewor, dok abineko meni woko," 
Hosea4:6 Jona gitye ka to pi ŋecgi manok, pien in ikwero bedo ki ŋec, omiyo akwero ni pe ibed ajwakana. In wii owil woko i kom cik pa Lubaŋani, an bene wiya biwil woko i kom litinoni." 
Hosea4:7 Ka wei ajwagi omedde mapol, ci gimedde ki bali koma; abiloko deyogi doko me lewic," 
Hosea4:8 Giloko bal pa jona doko camgi, kun cwinygi yom kom roc pa jona." 
Hosea4:9 Abimiyo ajwagi bedo calo dano ata; abiketo can ikomgi pi kitgi, abiculogi pi timgi." 
Hosea4:10 Gibicam, ento pe gibiyeŋ; gibitimo kwele, ento pe gibinya; pien guweko Rwot woko, pi miyo kwogi i tim kwele." 
Hosea4:11 Koŋo vino ki koŋo vino maliŋonc, rwenyo tam pa dano." 
Hosea4:12 Jona gicito ka penyo dog kac, odoogi aye nyuto botgi lok. Pien cwiny me kwele omiyo guŋak woko, omiyo guweko Lubaŋagi pi timo tim kwele." 
Hosea4:13 Gitumo gitum malo i wi godi, giwaŋo gitumgi i wi cere malo, i te kworo, atega ki olwedo, pien tipogi ber, Pi meno mumiyo anyirawu gitimo kwele, ki anyira gerwu gitimo abor." 
Hosea4:14 Pe abiketo can i kom anyirawu ka gitimo kwele, kadi i kom anyira gerwu ka: gitimo abor; pien co kikomgi gitye ka nywako yo ki lukwele, dok gitumo gitum-gu kacel ki malaya me ot jogi. Rok ma pe giniaŋ, pinygi bito woko." 
Hosea4:15 Kadi bed in, Icrael, itimo kwele, pe Juda odok labal. Pe wudony i Gilgal, pe wuwot i Bet-awen, pe bene wukwon ni, “Macalo Rwot tye ma kwo-ni.”" 
Hosea4:16 Icrael bene lapele; calo roya ma lapele, Rwot tika kombeddi twero pitogi, macalo latin romo ma gikwayo i olet malac-ci?" 
Hosea4:17 Epraim oribbe ki cal jogi, wek doŋ obed gire." 
Hosea4:18 Gin lwak ma lumero, komgi mit ka timo kwele; gimaro lewic makato deyogi." 
Hosea4:19 Yamo oboyogi woko i bwome, lewic bimakogi pi keno tyergi." 
Hosea5:1 Wuwiny lok man, wun ajwagi pa Lubaŋa, wuket cwinywu, wun ot pa Icrael. Wucik itwu, wun ot pa kabaka. Pien kop ma giŋolo otiko komwu; pien wun wubedo owic i Mijpa, ki obwo ma giciko i wi Tabor." 
Hosea5:2 Gikwinyo bur matut i Citim, ento abiketo can i komgi ducu." 
Hosea5:3 Aŋeyo Epraim, Icrael pe okanne ki bota. In Epraim kombeddi idoko latim kwele, Icrael bene doŋ oballe gire woko." 
Hosea5:4 Tim megi genogi dwogo bot Lubaŋa; pien cwinygi me timo kwele doŋ tye i igi, genogi ŋeyo Rwot." 
Hosea5:5 Wakke pa Icrael odoko caden ma tye i nyime; Epraim bitwomme pi balle; Juda bene binywako twomme kwedgi. 
Hosea5:6 Gibiwoto ki romi ki dyaŋigi me gitum pi yenyo Rwot, ento pe gibinoŋo kome; pien Rwot doŋ otyeko a woko ki botgi." 
Hosea5:7 Gin pe gubedo lugen bot Rwot, pien ginywalo litinogi ki lurok ata. Koni por dwe binekogi woko, kacel ki pottigi ducu." 
Hosea5:8 Wukut bi la i Gibea, wukut gwara i Rama. Wugo oduru i Bet-awen; komi omyel, in Benjamin!" 
Hosea5:9 Epraim bidoko obur i nino ma giketo can i kome. Anyuto lok me ada ma bitimme i kin kaka ma i Icrael ducu. 
Hosea5:10 Luker me Juda gubedo macalo jo ma gikobo got ma poko wan lobo; abicoro kinigana i komgi macalo pii. 
Hosea5:11 Epraim doŋ gidiyo matek, pe giŋolle kop kakare, pien otyeko mine ka lubo kor gin ma konnye pe." 
Hosea5:12 Pienno adoko calo nyenye ma naŋo kom Epraim, dok abedo calo tut ma camo ot pa Juda." 
Hosea5:13 Kare ma Epraim oneno twone, kit ma Juda bene oneno wan burre-ni, omiyo Epraim owoto wa i Aciria, ci ocwalo kwena bot kabaka madit. Ento en pe twero caŋowu, kadi ki bur mewu bene pe twero caŋo." 
Hosea5:14 Pienno abibedo macalo labwor bot Epraim, dok abibedo macalo latin labwor i kom ot pa Juda. An, an kikoma aye abikilo komwu woko, ka doŋ abiwot gira; abitinowu woko, ŋat ma bilarowu pe." 
Hosea5:15 Abidok gira i kabedona, nio waŋ ma guniaŋ balgi ka doŋ gicako yenyo koma, gibiyenyo i kare ma gitye i can, kun giwacci," 
Hosea6:1 “Wubin wek wadoku bot Rwot; pien en okilo komwa woko; wek en aye ocaŋwa; en otyeko pwodowa matek, dok bitweyo waŋ retwa." 
Hosea6:2 Ka nino okato aryo, en bicerowa woko, i nino me adekke bimiyowa kwo, wek dok wabed ma komwa yot i nyime." 
Hosea6:3 Weku doŋ waŋeyu Rwot, wacuku cwinywa ka ŋeyo en; en bidwogo ada macalo rupiny; en bibino botwa macalo kot oma moyo, calo kot me cwir ma bido lobo.”" 
Hosea6:4 Abitimi niŋniŋ, in Epraim? Abitimi niŋniŋ in Juda? Mar mewu rom ki pol ma umo piny odiko, rom ki toyo ma two woko oyot." 
Hosea6:5 En mumiyo amiyo lunebi otoŋogi woko, anekogi ki lok mua i doga; kop ma aŋolo i komgi ryeny calo ceŋ," 
Hosea6:6 An cwinya mito mar ma pe lokke, pe lee me gitum, ŋeyo Lubaŋa ber, kato gitum awaŋa." 
Hosea6:7 Ento gin gukalo wi gicikke macalo i Adam, gutiyo gin ma pe atir i koma ki kunnu," 
Hosea6:8 Gilead aye gaŋ pa lutim aranyi, ma remo doŋ i obot tyengi." 
Hosea6:9 Macalo luyak gikiyo dano, ajwagi bene gicokke kacel kumeno; gineko dano i yo ma cito i Cekem, kun gitimo gin marac twatwal." 
Hosea6:10 Aneno gin mo marac makato i ot pa Lubaŋa pa Icrael, Tim kwele pa Epraim tye kunnu, Icrael bene oballe woko." 
Hosea6:11 In bene Juda, kare me kac doŋ ginyuto woko." 
Hosea7:1 I kare ma amito dwoko gum bot jona, ki i kare ducu ma amito caŋo iye Icrael, ci bal pa Epraim otugi nen woko cut, ki tim maraco ma jo Camaria gutimo; pien gitimo bwami, lakwo turo ot, kun luyak giyako dano ki i gudo." 
Hosea7:2 Ento pe giparo ni an apo i kom gin maraco ducu ma gitiyoni. Koni timgi doŋ orumogi woko i dyere, doŋ timgi tye i nyima." 
Hosea7:3 Giyomo cwiny kabaka ki timgi mareco-ni kun giyomo cwiny rwodigi ki bwolagi. 
Hosea7:4 Gin ducu lutim abor; girom ki keno malyet, ma lated mugati pe dok cwako iye mac, nia i kare ma en orubo iye tobi ki moko nio ka oyenyo, ocako kwot." 
Hosea7:5 I nino pa kabaka mewa, rwodi ducu gucako two pi lyeto koŋo vino; kabaka ocako ryeyo ciŋe malo kacel ki luŋala." 
Hosea7:6 Pien cwinygi obedo malyet calo keno; pi lok ma gubedo ka piro; kinigagi okur calo mac dyewor benebene, odiko obedo ma lyel calo mac arum." 
Hosea7:7 Gin ducu gidoko lyet macalo keno, guneko lulocgi woko ducu, Lukergi ducu guto woko, pe tye ŋat mo i kingi ma okok bota." 
Hosea7:8 Epraim orubbe woko i kin lurok; Epraim en mugati capat ma pe giloko. 
Hosea7:9 Rok mukene gutyeko tekke woko, ento en pe oneyo; lwar okwaŋ i wiye, ento en pe ŋeyo," 
Hosea7:10 Wakke pa Icrael odoko caden i kome; ento pe gudwogo bot Rwot Lubaŋagi, kadi bed gineno can, pe giyenyo Lubaŋa." 
Hosea7:11 Epraim min rom ki amam ma wiye bene pe tiyo; gikok mere bot Ejipt, dok cito mere wa i Aciria." 
Hosea7:12 Abiciko obwona i yo ma gicito iye ducu, aretogi piny macalo winyo ma tuk malo, abipwodogi pi timgi maraco-ni." 
Hosea7:13 Gibineno can, pien guŋak guweka woko! Gityekgi woko, pien gujemo koma! Onoŋo amito larogi, ento giloko lok goba i koma." 
Hosea7:14 Pe gikok bota ki cwinygi ducu, ento gibedo ka cur ki i wi kitandagi; giŋolo komgi kekengi ki pala pi kal ki koŋo vino, kun gijemo kwede i koma." 
Hosea7:15 Kadi bed yam apwonyogi kun amiyo badgi bedo matek, ento gin gidok ka yubo lok marac i koma." 
Hosea7:16 Gilokke gidok bot jok Baal; girom ki atum ma bayo piny. Rwodigi bi to ki pala lucwan, pi ŋala ma i doggi. Man bimiyo gicayogi wa i lobo Ejipt." 
Hosea8:1 Wukut gwara! Pien acut tye malo i wi ot pa Rwot; pien guturo gicikkena, gukalo wi cikka." 
Hosea8:2 Gikok bota ni, “Lubaŋawa, wan jo Icrael waŋeyi.”" 
Hosea8:3 Icrael doŋ obolo gin maber woko, lumerok doŋ biryemo kore." 
Hosea8:4 Guketo lukergi laboŋo twerra, guketo rwodigi laboŋo ŋecca. Gutiyo cal jogigi ki ryal ki jabugi; gutiyo gin ma neko gin kikomgi." 
Hosea8:5 Abwono latin twonni, in Camaria. Kinigana otedde i komgi calo mac. Jo Icrael bitero kare ma rom mene kaa ka doŋ gibibedo laboŋo bal?" 
Hosea8:6 Gibiŋido latin twon me Camaria woko matitino, pien ladiro tic otiyo gin ma pe Lubaŋa kikome." 
Hosea8:7 Pien gucoyo yamo, miyo gikayo lapiru. Kal ma i poto pe oŋok, moko pe bia iye; ka nene mogo ocek, kono lurok guyako woko ducu." 
Hosea8:8 Icrael doŋ gimwonyo woko; gin doŋ gitye i dye lurok, macalo gin ma konnye pe." 
Hosea8:9 Pien Icrael ocito wa i Aciria macalo kana me tim ma woto kene; Epraim owilo meye ki lim. 
Hosea8:10 Kadi bed guwilo mecgi i kin lurok, abidwokogi woko oyotoyot. Bimiyo koŋ giweko wiro kabakagi ki rwodigi ki moo pi kare mo manok." 
Hosea8:11 Pien jo Epraim gunyayo lwak keno tyer mapol pi tiyo bal, omiyo keno tyergi odoko gin me tiyo bal." 
Hosea8:12 Kadi kono aco cikka alip apar botgi, gibineno macalo gin ma welo." 
Hosea8:13 Gimaro gitum; gin gitumo lee pi camo riŋone; ento cwiny Rwot pe yom komgi: I kare man Rwot bipo pi timgi maraco-ni, biketo can i komgi pi bal megi; gibidok cen wa i Ejipt," 
Hosea8:14 Pien Icrael wiye doŋ owil woko i kom ŋat mucweyo en, ocako gero gaŋ kal madoŋo; Juda ogero gaŋi mony mapol ma girumogi ki cel gogo; ento abicwalo mac i kom gaŋi mere, ci biwaŋo gaŋi mony maditone woko ducu." 
Hosea9:1 Pe ibed ki yomcwiny, in Icrael! Cwinyi pe obed yom macalo rok mukene; pien in iweko Lubaŋani ci idoko lakwele, imaro timo kwele pi noŋo lim, wa i laro moyo ducu," 
Hosea9:2 Laro moyo ki bur koŋo Vino, pe bipitogi, kono Vino manyen bene biremogi." 
Hosea9:3 Pe gibibedo i lobo pa Rwot ento Epraim bidok cen i Ejipt, dok gibicamo cam ma cik ogeno ki Aciria." 
Hosea9:4 Pe gibiliyo koŋo vino me gitum amata bot Rwot pe gibiyomo cwinye ki gitum megi. Mugati megi bibedo calo mugati pa jo ma kwero cola; jo ducu ma gucamo gudoko keni. Pien kwongi bibedo me lanek kec keken, pe myero gikel wa i ot pa Rwot." 
Hosea9:5 Wubitimo gin aŋo i nino madit ma giciko pire, ki i nino madit me woro Rwot?" 
Hosea9:6 Koŋ inen ka gicito wa i lobo Aciria, jo Ejipt aye bicokogi kacel, Mempic aye biyikogi, Jamigi ducu me ryal ma yomo cwinygi, doo bimayo woko, okuto bitwi wa i odigi." 
Hosea9:7 Kare me keto can doŋ obino, kare me culo adwoggi me bal doŋ oromo; Icrael biŋeyo. Lanebi en aye dano ma lamiŋ, dano ma tye ki Cwiny pa Lubaŋa odoko lapoya, pi bal mewu madwoŋ ki adagadaga madwoŋ." 
Hosea9:8 Lanebi en aye lakur-piny pa Epraim, ma gin jo pa Lubaŋana, ento giciko owic pa ladwar i waŋayone ducu, ki adagadaga tye i ot pa Lubaŋane." 
Hosea9:9 Gin gudonyo i bal matut twatwal, macalo i kare me Gibea. En bipo pi tim megi maraco-ni, dok biketo can i kcmgi pi bal megi." 
Hosea9:10 I kare ma yam anoŋo Icrael, acob kome macalo nyig olok ma, i tim. Con aneno kwarowu obedo calo nyig oduro ma ocako cek aceka, Ento ka cen guo i Baal-peor, ci gucako mine kengi bot cal jogi, omiyo gudoko gin ma cwiny dano dagi ma tom ki gin ma gin gimaro." 
Hosea9:11 Deyo pa Epraim biket woko ata, macalo winyo ma twarre, nywal bibedo pe, wa gamo ic bibedo pe ki doŋo ic bene pe." 
Hosea9:12 Dok kadi bed gupit litinogi, abityekogi woko ducu, mo pe bidoŋ I kare ma abia woko ki botgi, gibineno can madit twatwal!" 
Hosea9:13 Dok litino pa Epraim, kit macalo anenogi kwede, gibinekogi woko macalo lee tim; Epraim myero ocwal litino awobene bot lunekgi." 
Hosea9:14 Migi ba, ai Rwotibimiyogi gin aŋo kaa? Migi poto ic, ki tunogi obed mutwo libeŋ," 
Hosea9:15 Racgi ducu tye i Gilgal, ka ma yam cwinya ocako kwerogi iye. Pi gin maraco ma gubedo ka timone, abiryemogi woko ki i oda. Pe dok abimarogi matwal; rwodigi ducu gubedo jo ma lujemo." 
Hosea9:16 Epraim rom ki yat ma doŋ gireto woko piny, ma lwite oner woko, pe doŋ binyako nyige. Dok kadi bed ginywal, abineko litinogi ma gimaro-ni woko." 
Hosea9:17 Lubaŋana bibayogi woko pien gukwero winyo lokke; gibibedo lumalgaŋ i kin rok ducu. 
Hosea10:1 Icrael obedo calo olok ma nyige onyak ma mwonya, ci ocek mabup. Ka nyige omedde ki nyak madwoŋ, en bene medo ki caŋo keno tyer mapol; kalo bone omedde odoko maber, en bene omedde ki yubo wir jogi me aworane mabeco." 
Hosea10:2 Cwinygi opoŋ ki lok me miŋo; kombeddi myero doŋ gunen can pi balgi. Rwot kikome aye bimuko keno tyergi woko dok en bene bitoŋo wir jogigi woko ducu ma gucibo me aworagi. 
Hosea10:3 Koni doŋ gibipennye ni, “Pe watye ki kabaka, pien wan pe walworo Rwot, dok kabaka twero timowa kit gin aŋo?”" 
Hosea10:4 Giloko lok doggi noŋo, gimoko gicikke ki kwon me goba; kumeno gimiyo ŋolo kop twi doŋo macalo yat to ma neko dano ma lot i poto ma gipuro." 
Hosea10:5 Jo ma gibedo i Camaria komgi omyel, pi latin twon me Bet-awen. Jo mere gibikwero colane, ajwagine ma giworo cal jok gibikok pire, pi deyone ma doŋ oa woko ki bote." 
Hosea10:6 Cal twon meno kikome aye gibitero woko wa i Aciria, macalo mot ma gitero bot kabaka madit. Gibimiyo lewic mako Epraim, ki Icrael bene lewic bimako pi cal jokke." 
Hosea10:7 Kabaka me Camaria pe binen, gibitero woko macalo yat munidde ma kwan i wi pii." 
Hosea10:8 Kabedo madito me woro Lubaŋa ma tye i wi got me Awen, en aye ka ma Icrael tiyo iye bal, gibijwero woko. Okuto ki ocok gibitwi i wi keno tyergi, ci gibiwaco ki godi madoŋo ni, “Umwa” ki bot godi matino ni, “Wupot i komwa.”" 
Hosea10:9 In Icrael ibedo ka bal nia wa i kare me Gibea; nia wa i kare ca wubedo ka medde ameda. Mony pe bipoto i komgi i Gibea; 
Hosea10:10 An abibino ka pwodo jo mujemo; lurok bene bicokke kacel i komgi i kare ma abipwodogi pi bal megi aryo-nu. 
Hosea10:11 Epraim yam roya ma gipwonyo, ma maro dino bel, ento’ aketo rii kweri i ŋute maber-ri. Abiketo Epraim ka ywayo kweri, ki Juda myero opur pire kene. Yakobo myero onud poto botte kene." 
Hosea10:12 Wuco kodi me kit ma atir, wek wuka nyig me mar ma pe lokke wucer poto bot woko, pien man aye kare me yenyo Rwot, wek en obin omi lar mere ocwer i komwu macalo kot." 
Hosea10:13 Yam wupuro bal, ci wukayo kit ma pe atir, omiyo wucamo nyig gobawu. Pien wubedo ka geno gadigadi lwenywu, ki lwak twoni otekawu," 
Hosea10:14 pi meno oduru me lweny biwo i kinjowu, odiwu ma girumo ki cel gogo gibimuko woko liweŋ, macalo Calman yam omuko Betarbel i kare me mony, megi litino yam ginyotogi woko kacel ki litinogi." 
Hosea10:15 Meno en kit ma gibitimowu kwede, wun ot pa Icrael, pi balwu madit twatwal-li. Kabaka me Icrael gibinekone woko kwar-piny." 
Hosea11:1 I kare ma Icrael pud latin, onoŋo amare, yam alwoŋo woda nia ki i Ejipt." 
Hosea11:2 Ka yam amedde ki lwoŋogi gin bene gimedde ki a woko ki bota; gubedo gigi ka tumo gitum bot jok Baal, kun bene giwaŋo odok eceta bot cal jogi." 
Hosea11:3 Kun kono an aye cen apwonyo jo Epraim ki wot, yam atiŋogi i kora; ento pe guŋeyo ni an aye acaŋogi." 
Hosea11:4 Yam abedo ka telogi ki tol, ki twon mar madwoŋ ma atweyogi kwede, Dok abedo ka tiŋogi macalo latin, ma abolo i wi gwoka, kun akulle piny botgi ka pitogi," 
Hosea11:5 Gibidok woko wa i lobo Ejipt, Aciria aye bibedo kabakagi, pien gukwero dwogo bota." 
Hosea11:6 Pala lucwan bilweny i kom gaŋigi ducu, bitoŋo rii doggola me dog celgi woko, dok bene binekogi woko ki i cel gogogi." 
Hosea11:7 Jo mera doŋ gumoko tamgi me a woko ki bota; pi meno gibiketogi woko i kol, pe tye dano mo ma bigonyogi." 
Hosea11:8 Atwero weki woko, in Epraim? Atwero miyi bot ŋat mukene niŋniŋ, in Icrael? Atwero miyo idoko calo Adma niŋniŋ? Abitimo in macalo Ceboim niŋniŋ? Cwinya doŋ odwogo woko i komi, iya doŋ okwe woko pi mari." 
Hosea11:9 Pe doŋ abitic ki kiniga malyet, pe dok abineko Epraim atyeko woko; pien an Lubaŋa, pe a dano, an a ŋat Maleŋ i kinwu, pe abibino pi tyekowu woko." 
Hosea11:10 Gibilubo kor Rwot, ci en bimor macalo labwor; eyo, en bimor, litinone gibibino gia ki tuŋ potoceŋ ma komgi myel;" 
Hosea11:11 gibia ki i Ejipt gibino ma komgi myel calo winyo, dok gibia ki i Aciria macalo amam, ci abidwokogi wa i pacogi, man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Hosea11:12 Epraim doŋ ogura dyere ki gobane, dok ot pa Icrael obedo ka bwola abwola. Ento Lubaŋa pud ŋeyo Juda, ni en pud tye ka geno Ŋat Maleŋ." 
Hosea12:1 Epraim kwayo yamo ma ka dyegi, leko kor yamo ma tuŋ wok ceŋ dyeceŋ benebene; ticgi me nyayo goba ki tim bwami; gicikke ki jo Aciria, dok gitero moo wa i Ejipt." 
Hosea12:2 Rwot tye ki lok i kom Juda, en biketo can i kom Yakobo ma poro kite, dok bicule ma rom ki tim mere," 
Hosea12:3 Kare ma en tye i ic, omako opuny tyen ominne, ka doŋ oteggi, olwenyo ki Lubaŋa." 
Hosea12:4 Olwenyo ki lamalaika, ci oloyo, obako doge bot lamalaika ki pig waŋe. Dok orwatte ki Lubaŋa i Betel, Lubaŋa ocako lok kwede ki kunnu." 
Hosea12:5 En Rwot Lubaŋa me mony, ma nyiŋe Rwot, owacci," 
Hosea12:6 “Pi meno in doŋ idwogi, Lubaŋani tye ka konyi, mok i kom mar ki ŋolo kop atir, kun ikuro Lubaŋani kare ducu.”" 
Hosea12:7 En lacat-wil ma tye ki mijan ma pe pimo kakare, en maro bumo dano." 
Hosea12:8 Epraim owacci, “Nen an lalonyo, anoŋo limma gira ki wiya”; ento lonyone pe romoculo balle ma obalo-ni." 
Hosea12:9 An a Rwot Lubaŋawu, nia wa ki i lobo Ejipt; abimiyo doki wubuto i kema, macalo i kare me kwero nino madito ma aciko." 
Hosea12:10 Yam aloko bot lunebi, an aye ma amiyo ginanyuta onya madwoŋ, dok amiyo carolok katti ki bot lunebi." 
Hosea12:11 Ka ce bal mo tye i Gilead ci gibitum woko ducu ada; ka ce gityero twoni me gitum i Gilgal, keno tyergi bene bidoko calo gweni ma giguro i poto ma gipuro." 
Hosea12:12 Yakobo yam oriŋo ocito wa i lobo Aram, Icrael con otiyo tic kunnu pi nyomo dako, en yam okwayo romi wek enon dako." 
Hosea12:13 Rwot yam omiyo lanebi okwanyo Yakobo woko ki i Ejipt, dok omiyo lanebi ogwoke." 
Hosea12:14 Epraim doŋ oŋeto cwiny Rwot matek; omiyo Rwotte biweko remo balle bedo i wiye, dok bidwoko cacce ducu i wiye." 
Hosea13:1 Epraim ka yam oloko, kom dano myel; Epraim yam dit matek i Icrael; ento en okelo bal i kome pi jok Baal, ci oto woko." 
Hosea13:2 Kombeddi balgi doŋ tye ka medde ameda, gitye ka tiyo gigi cal ryal ma giliyo pigi kengi, kun gitiyo lwak cal jogi ki diro; magi ducu obedo tic pa ludiro, Gin guwaco ni, “Wutum gitum bot jogi magi.” Dano gunot lem latin twon dyaŋ!" 
Hosea13:3 Pi meno gibibedo calo lupu ma poto odiko, calo toyo ma o woko oyotoyot, calo cuŋ kal ma yamo kolo woko ki i laro, onyo yito ma duny ki i wan dirica." 
Hosea13:4 An a Rwot Lubaŋani, nia wa ki i lobo Ejipt; pe tye Lubaŋa mukene ma iŋeyo, kono an keken, lalar mo mukene pe tye, kono an keken." 
Hosea13:5 An aye yam aneyowu wa ki i tim, i lobo ma can pii dwoŋ iye." 
Hosea13:6 Ento i kare ma gicamo giyeŋ, ka guyeŋ, ci cwinygi ocako wakke matek; omiyo wigi ocako wil woko i koma." 
Hosea13:7 Abilokke botgi adoko macalo labwor, dok abibedo ka kiyogi i ŋet yo macalo kwac." 
Hosea13:8 Abipoto i komgi macalo ŋuu mager ma litinone gineko woko, abiyeco korgi adado woko, abimwodogi ki kunnu macalo labwor; kit ma lee tim twero kilo ki komgi." 
Hosea13:9 In Icrael, abityeki woko; aŋa ma bikonyi?" 
Hosea13:10 Kabakani doŋ tye kwene, ma romo lari; rwodini ducu gitye kwene ma lucundwarri, jo ma nene iwaco pigi ni, “Miya ka baka ki rwodi”?" 
Hosea13:11 Cen amiyi luker ki kiniga, ka dok akwanyogi woko ki akemona." 
Hosea13:12 Bal pa Epraim maraco ducu gicoyo woko piny, balle doŋ gikano woko." 
Hosea13:13 Arem macalo me nywalo latin doŋ opoto i kome, ento en latin ma pe ryek; pien i kare-ni obuto ari, wiye pe otikke ki yo nyodo." 
Hosea13:14 Myero alargi ki i twer me Lyel? Abikokogi woko ki i dog to? In lo, two gemoni tye kwene? In Lyel, to-pinnyi kono tye kwene? Kica doŋ pe maka i komgi." 
Hosea13:15 Kadi bed en nya matek macalo lagada, yamo oro ma Rwot ocwalo bibino ki i tim, ci waŋ piine ma gunnye-ni bitwo woko ki itte bene bidwono woko; yamo bimayo jamine mabeco ducu ma yam yomo cwinye, ma onoŋo okano-ni," 
Hosea13:16 Camaria bineno can pi bane, pien en ojemo woko i kom Lubaŋane’ pala lucwan aye binekogi woko, litinogi gibijwatogi woko piny, ginyotogi woko, ki mongi ma giyac gibiryeko igi woko." 
Hosea14:1 In Icrael, doŋ idwog bot Rwot Lubaŋani, pien doŋ itwomo tyeni pi balli," 
Hosea14:2 Wuwot ki lok me dogwu, wudok bot Rwot; wuwac bote ni, “Kwany balwa woko ducu; gam motwa maber-ri, wek wacul waŋ balwa ki lok ma i dogwa," 
Hosea14:3 Aciria pe bilarowa, pe wabirino ki aguragura; pe doŋ wabiwaco ki tic me ciŋwa ni, ‘Wun Lubaŋawa.’ Latin kic noŋo kica ki boti.”" 
Hosea14:4 Abimiyo niyegi magoro-ni doko tek, abimarogi pi bercwinya, pien kinigana doŋ oa woko i komgi." 
Hosea14:5 Abibedo macalo toyo bot jo Icrael; en bituru macalo leŋa bicwalo lwite piny macalo atega. 
Hosea14:6 Bilot, ci jany, bibedo ber macalo jeituni, dok ŋwece bibedo kur macalo ŋwec Lebanon." 
Hosea14:7 Gibidwogo ci gibibedo i te tipona, gibinywal macalo kal ma i poto; gibituru calo olok, ŋwecgi bibedo makur macalo ŋwec koŋo vino me Lebanon." 
Hosea14:8 In Epraim, cal jogi konyi ki gin aŋo kaa? An keken aye ma agamo dogi, dok an aye agwoko in. An abedo calo yat ciprec ma pote pe ner; an aye amiyo nyak." 
Hosea14:9 Ŋat ma ryek biniaŋ lok magi; dano ma cwinye lwodo lok aye bineyogi; pien yo pa Rwot ducu tye atir, jo ma cwinygi atir aye gilubo yone, ento jo ma gikalo wi cik pa Lubaŋa gitwomo iye tyengi." 
Joel1:1 Man lok pa Rwot ma yam obino bot Joel wod pa Petuel. 
Joel1:2 Wuwiny lok man, wun ludoŋo muteggi, wuter itwu, wun jo ducu ma wubedo i lobo man, Gin macalo man yam otimme i karewu, nyo i kare pa kwarowu?" 
Joel1:3 Wutit pire bot litinowu, wek litinowu gutit bot litinogi, ki likwayogi bene guwac bot yalwak ma bilubogi." 
Joel1:4 Gin ma bonyo adwek ocamo odon, bonyo abum ocamo woko, Gin ma abum ocamo odoŋ, bonyo lagara ocamo woko, gin ma lagara ocamo odon, labar ocamo otyeko woko liweŋ," 
Joel1:5 Wuco woko, wun jo ma lumero, wukoki; wukok matek, wun jo ducu ma mato koŋo vino, pi koŋo vino malino-ni, pien doŋ gityeko jukone woko ki i dogwu." 
Joel1:6 Pien rok mo doŋ obino ka lweny i kom lobona, mony matek ma pe kwanne, Lakgi calo lak labwor, lakgi boco calo lagili lak min labwor." 
Joel1:7 Gubalo olokka ducu, odurona bene gunido woko; gupaco poke, gubolo piny, jaŋgi okwor matar." 
Joel1:8 Wukok, macalo nyako ma oruko boŋo cola, ma kumo pi cware ma pud onyome anyoma." 
Joel1:9 Gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata gigiko kelogi woko i ot pa Rwot. Ajwagi ma lutic pa Rwot, gitye ka kumo," 
Joel1:10 Potti oballe, piny oto woko do, pien kal doŋ oballe, koŋo vino doŋ pe, moo doŋ pe nen." 
Joel1:11 Lewic omakwu, wun lupur, wukok matek, wun lupur olok pi naŋo ki cayiri; pien cam me poto doŋ olal woko." 
Joel1:12 Olok oner, oduro bene oballe woko; Okwer pomegranat, ki otit ki acuga, yadi ducu ma i poto guner woko; yomcwiny doŋ pe bot litino pa dano." 
Joel1:13 Wuruk boŋo cola, wun ajwagi, wukok can, wukok matek, wun lutic i keno tyer. Wudony i ot, wubut i boŋo cola, wun lutic pa Lubaŋana. Pien gityer me moko kwon ki gityer amata doŋ gijuko kelogi woko i ot pa Lubaŋawu." 
Joel1:14 Wukwer kare me ri kec, wulwoŋ cokke madit me woro Lubaŋa, Wucok ludoŋo ki jo ducu ma gibedo i lobo man, gubin i ot pa Rwot Lubaŋawu, gukok bot Rwot." 
Joel1:15 Oyi, nino-ni do! Pien nino pa Rwot doŋ cok, bino macalo to-piny ma Won Twer Ducu ocwalo." 
Joel1:16 Cam doŋ gibalo ki i nyimwa ma wan waneno. Yomcwiny ki um dok tye i ot pa Lubaŋawa? 
Joel1:17 Kodi otuŋ i ŋom ka ma gicoyogi iye, dula odoŋ noŋo; dero ducu oballe woko, pien kal pe ocek." 
Joel1:18 Kit ma lee cur kwede! Piny oloyo dyaŋi woko, pien kakwayogi doŋ pe; wa romi bene gujony woko," 
Joel1:19 Akok boti, ai Rwot, pien mac doŋ owano olet ma i tim, leb mac doŋ owaŋo yadi ducu ma i poto." 
Joel1:20 Wa lee me tim ducu gikok boti, pien pii ma i nota doŋ otwo woko, mac doŋ owaŋo olet ma i tim." 
Joel2:1 Wukut gwara i Cion, wugo oduru i wi got mera maleŋ! Wuwek jo ducu ma bedo i lobo komgi omyel, pien nino pa Rwot tye ka bino, doŋ cok," 
Joel2:2 nino me colpiny ki me mutu, nino me pol ki mutu macol licuc. Rok madit, ma jone tego, gumone i wi got macalo piny macollicuc; rok mo macalo man peya onen nia wa con, dok pe binen i anyim i kare pa yalwak ducu." 
Joel2:3 Mac waŋ i nyimgi, ki tuŋ ŋegi bene mac tye ka lyel. I nyimgi lobo nen calo poto Eden, ento tuŋ ŋegi calo tim ma odoŋ nono; gin ma obwot iye pe," 
Joel2:4 Calgi nen calo aguragura, giriŋo macalo aguragura me lweny." 
Joel2:5 Gipye i wi lacol godi, kun gimor calo gadigadi lweny, gimor calo leb mac ma waŋo reŋ kal mutwo; gical ki dul mony matek ma oyubbe pi lweny." 
Joel2:6 Rok ducu gitye ki remcwiny madwoŋ i nyimgi, waŋ jo ducu oballe woko." 
Joel2:7 Gimwomme ki ŋwec macalo lulweny matek, giito ki i wi cel calo askari. Ŋat acel acel lubo yone kene pe giwirre giweko tyen megi." 
Joel2:8 Pe tye ŋat mo i kingi ma twomo lawote, ŋat acel acellubo yone kene; gicorojami lweny magibayogikwede, gin mo pe ma jukogi," 
Joel2:9 Gimwomme i kom gaŋ, giriŋo i wi cel; giito malo i odi, giito ki i waŋ dirica macalo lakwo." 
Joel2:10 Lobo yenne i nyimgi ka giwoto, polo bene yeŋŋe, Cen ki dwe gucido macol, lakalatwe bene doŋ pe giryeny," 
Joel2:11 Dwan Rwot mwoc, winnye ki i nyim monnye; monnye tek makato, ŋat ma cobo lok ma en oloko noŋo tek twatwal. Pien nino pa Rwot dit, kelo atiba i kom dano; aŋa mono ma twero ciro?" 
Joel2:12 Rwot kikome owacci, “Kadi bed kombeddi, doŋ wudwog bota ki cwinywu ducu, kun wuri kec, ki koko, dok ki kumo madwoŋ;" 
Joel2:13 pe wuyec ginaruka mewu, ento wulok cwinywu aye,” Wudwog bot Rwot Lubaŋawu, pien en latim kica, en won kica madwoŋ. Kiniga pe make oyot, mar mere ma pe lokke dwoŋ, dok ŋut, pe timo gin marac." 
Joel2:14 Aŋa ma ŋeyo ka pe bilokke, ci ŋut kun weko gum doŋ i yo ŋeye, gityer me moko kwon kigityer amata pi Rwot Lubaŋawu?" 
Joel2:15 Wukut gwara i Cion, wukwer kare me ri kec; wulwoŋ cokke madit me woro Lubaŋa," 
Joel2:16 wucok dano kacel. Wulony lwak mucokke; wugur ludoŋo kacel; wucok litino bene, wa lukere ma gitye i kor. Lanyom oa woko owek ode, nyako ger bene owek kicikane," 
Joel2:17 Wek ajwagi ma lutic pa Rwot gukok, i dye doggola ot pa Rwot ki keno tyer, kun giwacci, “Ai Rwot, tim kica ki joni, pe imi giyet ginaleyani, pe imi nyiŋgi odok carolok me abola i kin lurok. Piŋo iweko rok mukene giwacci, ‘Lubaŋagi tye kwene?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Omiyo nyeko omako Rwot pi lobone, kica omake i kom jone." 
Joel2:19 Rwot odok iye ki jone ni, “Nen abecwalliwu kal ki koŋo vino ki moo, ma wubiyen kwede; pe dok abiweko giyetowu i kin lurok." 
Joel2:20 “Abicwalo jo ma tuŋ acam ka mabor ki wun, abiryemo monygi woko wa i lobo ma otwo ma odoŋ nono; jo mutelo yo bicorre i nam ma tuŋ wokceŋ, jo ma i ŋegi bicorre i nam ma tuŋ potoceŋ. Komgi mukwok ma nwe biduny ma coo, pien gutiyo tic madito." 
Joel2:21 “Pe ilwor, in lobo; bed ki yomcwiny ki um, pien Rwot doŋ otiyo tic madito!" 
Joel2:22 Pe wulwor, wun lee me tim, pien olet ma i tim doŋ olot. Yadi tye ka nyak, oduro ki olok gitye ka nyak maber." 
Joel2:23 “Cwinywu ohed yom, wun litino me Cion, cwinywu obed yom i kom Rwot Lubaŋawu; pien omiyowu kot me cwir me kwanyo kop i komwu, omiyo kot ocwer piwu madwoŋ, omiyowu kot me cwir ki me oro, kit macon." 
Joel2:24 “Laro bipoŋ ki kal me adina, bur me koŋo vino ki me moo ducu, gibipon woko libyeny." 
Joel2:25 Abiculo waŋ mwaka ducu ma bonyo abum ocamo, ki bonyo adwek, ki lagara, ki labar, mony mera madit ma cen acwalo i dyewu," 
Joel2:26 “Wubicamo cam madwoŋ dok wubiyen, wubipako nyiŋ Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma otiyo kwedwu i kit me aura. Jona pe dok gibiketo lewic i komgi." 
Joel2:27 Wubineyo ni an atye i dye Icrael, dok ni an Rwot an Lubaŋawu, pe dok tye mukene. Jona pe dok gibiketo lewic i komgi." 
Joel2:28 “Lacen abionyo Cwiny mera Maleŋ i kom jo ducu; litino awobewu ki anyirawu gibitito lok pa Lubaŋa, jowu muti gibileko lek, awobewu gibineno ginanyuta." 
Joel2:29 I kare meno abionyo Cwiny mera wa i kom lutic ma co ki ma mon. 
Joel2:30 “Abinyuto taŋo i polo ki i wi lobo, remo ki mac ki yito ma duny," 
Joel2:31 Cen bicido woko macol, dwe bidoko remo ma noŋo nino pa Rwot madit ma kelo lworo peya oo." 
Joel2:32 I kare meno jo ducu ma gilwoŋo nyiŋ Rwot gibilarogi; pien jo mubwot gibibedo i wi got Ci on ki i Jerucalem, macalo Rwot yam owaco; i kin jo mudoŋŋe bibedo iye jo ma Rwot olwoŋo." 
Joel3:1 “Pien nen, i nino meno, ki i kare maca, i kare ma abidwoko gum me Juda ki me Jerucalem," 
Joel3:2 abicoko rok ducu, abikelogi i nota pa Yekocapat. Ci abinologi kop ki kunnu, pi jona Icrael ma ginaleyana, pien gukeyogi woko i kin lurok, dok gupoko lobona woko," 
Joel3:3 gubedo ka bolo kwir pi jo mera, kun gicato awobi pi malaya, dok gicato nyako wek ginoŋ koŋo vino, ci gumato." 
Joel3:4 “Wun jo Turo ki jo Cidon, ki wun jo ducu ma i lobo Piliciti, wun kono wudoko gin aŋo ki bota? Wun wumito cula pi gin mo ma atiyo? Ka ce wucula, ci abidwoko cul me tim mewu i wiwu kenwu oyotoyot dok aruya bene." 
Joel3:5 Pien wukwanyo ryal mera ki jabuna, dok wutero jamina mabeco ma pigi tego bota, ci wuketogi i ot jogiwu." 
Joel3:6 Wucato Lujuda ki jo me Jerucalem bot jo Grik, kun wuterogi ka mabor ki wan lobo megi." 
Joel3:7 Ento koni abitwarogi malo wek gua woko ki i kabedo ka ma yam wucatogi iye; ci abidwoko cul me tim mewu i wiwu kenwu. 
Joel3:8 Abicato litino awobewu ki anyirawu bot jo Juda. Ci gin gicatogi bot jo Ceba, en rok ma tye ka mabor; pien Rwot doŋ owaco.”" 
Joel3:9 Wutit lok man i kin rok ducu! Wuywa mony, wulyet cwiny oteka lweny, Wek lulweny ducu gurwa cok, gubin wa malo kany," 
Joel3:10 Wutet kweri dyaŋ gudok pala I ucwan, wutet pala lanol olok odok toni; wek lagoro owacci, “An laco.”" 
Joel3:11 Wurune, wubin oyot, wun rok ducu ma orumo kany-nyi; wucit, wugurre kunnu. Rwot, doŋ ikel cogi coni!" 
Joel3:12 Wek rok ducu doŋ gumukke, gubin, gubin kany wa i nota pa Yekocapat; an abibedo piny kunnu ka ŋolo kop ki rok ducu ma orumo kany." 
Joel3:13 Wumak pala kac, pien kal doŋ ocek. Wuwot ka nyono olok, pien bur doŋ opoŋ woko. Bur koŋo vino ducu opoŋ woko libyeny, pien balgi doŋ dwoŋ twatwal." 
Joel3:14 Lwak madwoŋ, lwak madwoŋ gucokke, i nota me moko tam. Pien nino pa Rwot doŋ tye cok, i nota me moko tam." 
Joel3:15 Cen ki dwe bicido woko licuc, lakalatwe bene pe gibiryeny." 
Joel3:16 Rwot mor ki i Cion, dwane winnye ki i Jerucalem, polo ki lobo giyeŋŋe. Ento Rwot aye ka-larre pa jone, en ka ma jo Icrael gibwot iye," 
Joel3:17 “Kit meno wubiŋeyo ni an a Rwot Lubaŋawu, ma abedo i Cion ma got mera maleŋ, Jerucalem bene bibedo maleŋ, ci lurok doŋ pe gibibaro dyere matwal." 
Joel3:18 “I nino meno koŋo vino maliŋo bicwer ki i godi, cak bimol ki i wi cere ducu, pii bipoŋ, mol ki i kulu ma i Juda ducu; wan it bigunnye ki i ot pa Rwot, ci bibido nota me Citim." 
Joel3:19 “Ejipt bidoŋ obur, Edom bi doko tim ata, pi timgi me gero i kom jo Juda, pien guonyo remo pa jo ma pe ki bal i lobogi." 
Joel3:20 Ento dano doŋ bibedo i Juda matwal, ki i Jerucalem pi kare ducu," 
Joel3:21 Abiculo kwor me remogi pe abikwanyo kop woko ki i kom lutiŋ alii, pien Rwot bedo i Cion.”" 
Amos1:1 Man aye lok pa Amoc, ma en yam ŋat acel i kin lukwat romi me Tekoa, gin ma en oneno i kom Icrael i kare pa Ujia kabaka me Juda, ki i kare pa Jeroboam wod pa Y oaci kabaka me Icrael, ma odoŋ mwaka aryo ma peya oyeŋyeŋ oyeŋo lobo." 
Amos1:2 Amoc owacci, “Rwot mor ki i Cion, dwane winnye ki i Jerucalem; olet pa lukwat otwo woko, got Karmel bene wiye oner.”" 
Amos1:3 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Pi lwak bal mapol pa jo Damaciko, pe abidwoko cwinya cen i can ma abimiyogi, pien gudiŋo Gilead ki nyonyo ladin bel." 
Amos1:4 Kumeno abicwalo mac i kom ot pa Kajael, biwaŋo odi madoŋo i gaŋ pa Benadad." 
Amos1:5 Abituro larii doggaŋ me Damaciko, abityeko jo ma bedo i nota Awen, ki lamak odoo ker ma i Bet-eden; jo Ciria gibiterogi i opii i lobo Kir,” man Rwot aye owaco." 
Amos1:6 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Pi lwak bal mapol pa jo Gaja, pe abidwoko cwinya cen i can ma abimiyogi; pien gutero rok woko kulu i opii, gumiyo i ciŋ Edom." 
Amos1:7 Kumeno abicwalo mac i kom cel me Gaja, biwaŋo odine madoŋo ducu," 
Amos1:8 Abityeko jo ma bedo i Acidod woko, ki lamak odoo ker ma i Acikelon; abitiŋo ciŋa i kom Ekron, jo Piliciti mudou gibitum,” man Rwot Lubaŋa aye owaco." 
Amos1:9 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Pi lwak bal mapol pa jo Turo, pe abidwoko cwinya ceŋ i can ma abimiyogi; pien gin gumiyo rok woko kulu i cin jo Edom, wigi pe opo i kom gicikke me omego," 
Amos1:10 Kumeno abicwalo mac i kom cel me Turo, biwaŋo odine madoŋo ducu.”" 
Amos1:11 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Pi lwak bal mapol pa jo Edom, pe abidwoko cwinya cen i can ma abimiyogi; pien oryemo kor ominne ki pala lucwan, obolo kica woko ducu, kinigane obedo lyet nakanaka, en kano akemone bedo matwal." 
Amos1:12 Kumene abicwalo mac i kom Teman, biwaŋo odi madoŋo me Bojra.”" 
Amos1:13 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Pi lwak bal mapol pa jo Ammon, pe abidwoko cwinya cen i can ma abimiyogi; pien gubaro i mon Gilead ma gitye ki ic, pi medo wan lobogi." 
Amos1:14 Kumeno abicwinyo mac i kom cel me Raba, biwaŋo odine madoŋo ducu, ki woo madwoŋ i kare me lweny, dok ki yamo mager i kare pa lapiru;" 
Amos1:15 kabakagi gibitero i opii, en kacel ki lukalle bene,” man Rwot aye ma owaco." 
Amos2:1 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Pi lwak bal mapol pa jo Moab, pe abidwoko cwinya cen i can ma abimiyogi; pien owano cogo pa kabaka me Edom omiyo odoko buru," 
Amos2:2 Kumeno abicwalo mac i kom Moab, biwaŋo odi madoŋo ducu me Keriot. Moab bito i lweny ki woo madwoŋ, kun dano gidaŋŋe, obute kok maloŋo," 
Amos2:3 Abikwanyo laloyo ki i dyere, abineko lukalle ducu kacel kwede,” man Rwot aye ma owaco." 
Amos2:4 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Pi lwak bal mapol pa jo Juda, pe abidwoko cwinya cen i can ma abimiyogi; pien gikwero lubo cik pa Rwot, pe gigwoko lok ma en ociko. Jokgi me goba ma yam kwarogi gulubo, orwenyogi woko ki iyo," 
Amos2:5 Kumeno abicwalo mac i kom Juda, biwaŋo odi madoŋo ducu me Jerucalem.”" 
Amos2:6 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Pi lwak bal mapol pa io Icrael, pe abidwoko cwinya cen i can ma abimiyogi; piengicato dano ma kite atir pi lim, dano ma piny obwoyo giwilo ki war tyen," 
Amos2:7 Ginyono wi lucan i apwa me ŋom, gigeŋo yo ki jo ma gineno can; dano ribbe ki wonne pi donyo bot dako acel, miyo nyiŋa maleŋ-ŋi balle," 
Amos2:8 Gibuto girumo ŋet keno tyer woko ducu i kom boŋŋi ma gijeŋo botgi; gimato kono pa jo ma guŋolo cul i komgi i ot pa Lubaŋagi. 
Amos2:9 “Ento yam atyeko jo Amor ki i nyimgi, ma yam giboco calo yat cedar, ma gitego calo kworo, Atyeko nyige ki malo, ki lwite piny." 
Amos2:10 An kono cen akwanyowu woko ki i lobo Ejipt, atelowu i tim pi mwaka pyeraŋwen kulu, wek wucam lobo pa jo Amor," 
Amos2:11 Akwanyo litinowu mogo pi bedo lunebi, ayero awobewu mogo pi bedo litino ajulana. Ada onoŋo pe tye kumeno, wun jo Icrael?" 
Amos2:12 “Ento wuloko litino ajulana gudoko lumat kono, wuciko lunebi kun wuwacci, ‘Pe wutit lok pa Lubaŋa.’" 
Amos2:13 “Nen, abidiyowu piny i kabedowu, calo gadigadi mupoŋ ki kal ma kal diyo piny." 
Amos2:14 Ŋwec biloyo ŋat madwir, latekkom tekone birwenyo, twon oteka pe bilaro kwene." 
Amos2:15 Lamak atum pe bicuŋ, ŋat ma tyene dwir pe bilarre, kadi ŋat ma riŋo ki aguragura pe bilaro kwone;" 
Amos2:16 ki ŋat ma cwinye nwaŋ i kin oteka binweco woko munero i nino meno.” Man lok pa Rwot kikome. 
Amos3:1 Wuwiny lok ma Rwot doŋ oloko i komwu, wun jo Icrael, i kom kaka ducu ma yam akwanyogi woko ki i lobo Ejipt:" 
Amos3:2 “Wun keken aye aŋeyowu i kin kaka ducu ma wi lobo; pi meno abiketo can i komwu pi balwu ducu. 
Amos3:3 “Jo aryo giwoto kacel, ka pe gucikke?" 
Amos3:4 Labwor kok i buŋa, ka pe omako lee? Latin labwor kok ki i boro, ka pe ocamo gin mo?" 
Amos3:5 Winyo pye moko ki tol i ŋom, ka pe gitero owic pire? Owic tuk noŋo ki i Bom, ka pe omako gin mo?" 
Amos3:6 Obute ka gikuto i gaŋ, lworo pe mako dano? Gin marac poto i gaŋ, ma Rwot aye pe otiyo?" 
Amos3:7 Adada Rwot Lubaŋa pe timo gin mo, laboŋo yabo muŋŋe bot luticce ma lunebi." 
Amos3:8 Labwor doŋ okok; aŋa ma lworo pe mako? Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ oloko; aŋa ma pe tito lokke?”
