Amos3:9 Wutuc lok bot odi madoŋo ma i Aciria, ki odi madoŋo ma i lobo Ejipt. Wuwac ni, “Wugurre kacel i wi godi me Camaria, wunen arubaruba madwoŋ ma iye, ki kit ma giuno kwede-dano i gaŋ meno.”" 
Amos3:10 “Pe giŋeyo timo gin ma atir,” man lok pa Rwot kikome, “jo meno gikano ‘gero ki yak i odigi madoŋo.”" 
Amos3:11 Pi meno Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Lakwor birumo lobowu, bidwoko tekwu woko piny; odiwu madoŋo gibiyako woko.”" 
Amos3:12 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Macalo lakwat laro tyen romo aryo, nyo dul it, ki i dog labwor, jo Icrael ma gibedo i Camaria gibilarogi kit meno, kacel ki but kom mo ki dul kitanda.’" 
Amos3:13 “Wuwiny, ci wubed caden i kom ot pa Yakobo,” Rwot Lubaŋa ma owaco, Lubaŋa me mony." 
Amos3:14 “I kom nino ma amiyo can ki Icrael pi balgi, abiketo can i kom keno tyer me Betel, Ten keno me keno tyer gibiturogi woko ci poto piny i ŋom." 
Amos3:15 Abigoyo ot cwir wa ki ot oro; odi ma gideyo ki lak lyec gibityekogi woko, odi madoŋo bigik.” Man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Amos4:1 “Wuwiny lok man, wun dyaŋi me Bacan, ma bedo i wi got me Camaria. Wun mon ma wuburo lucan, ma wuninyo jo ma piny obwoyogi, wun ma wuwaco bot cogwu ni, ‘Kel, wek wamati!’" 
Amos4:2 Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ okwoŋo kwoŋ ki kite maleŋ, owaco ni, Nen, kare oebino i komwu, gibiywayowu woko ki goli, wa jowu me lacen bene gibiywayogi ki goli lamak rec." 
Amos4:3 Wubikato woko ki i wan cel ma gimuko, kun dako acel acel woto atir i nyime, ci gibibolowu woko i Armon,” Man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Amos4:4 “Wubin i Betel, ci wutim bal; wubin i Gilgal, ci wumedde ki bal; wukel gitumwu rupiny ki rupiny, wumi dul acel me aparwu nino adek adek;" 
Amos4:5 wutyer gitum me pwoc ki mugati ma girubo iye tobi, wutit pi gityerwu ma iwu opwoyo wek lwak guwiny; pien wun jo Icrael wumaro timo kumeno!” Man lok pa Rwot Lubaŋa kikome." 
Amos4:6 “Yam amiyo kec opoto i gaŋiwu ducu, amiyo kwon oremowu i kabedowu ducu, ento wun pe wumedo ki dwogo bota.” Man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Amos4:7 “An bene yam atwonowu ki kot i kare ma kac onoŋo pud odoŋ dwe adek; amiyo kot ocwer i gaŋ acel, kun pe amiyo cwer i gaŋ mukene; poto acel kot cwer iye, poto ma pe kot ocwer iye otwo woko," 
Amos4:8 Jo me gaŋi aryo nyo adek gubedo ka wirre i gaŋ acel keken, ka mato pii, ci pe oromogi; ento wun pe wumedo ki dwogo bota,” Man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Amos4:9 “Yam apwodowu, abwaro belwu, amiyo odoko ocone, aweko pottiwu ki poto olokwu otwo woko, bonyo gucamo oduro ki yadi jeituniwu; ento wun pe wumedo ki dwogo bota.” Man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Amos4:10 “Yam acwalo two gemo i komwu macalo two gemo me Ejipt; aneko awobewu ki pala lucwan, ayako aguragurawu mapol; am iyo ŋwec gonywu oduny i umwu ma ŋwe; ento wun pe wumedo ki dwogo bota,” Man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Amos4:11 “Yam areto jo mogo ma i kinwu, kit macalo yam Lubaŋa oreto kwede Codom ki Gomora; wun onoŋo wubedo calo dog yen ma gikwanyo ki i mac; ento pe wumedo ki dwogo bota.” Man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Amos4:12 “Pi meno, wun jo Icrael, abitimowu kit man; doŋ wuyubbe pi rwatte ki Lubaŋawu, wun jo Icrael, pien abitimo man i komwu.”" 
Amos4:13 Pien nen ba, ŋat ma lacwe godi dok laket yamo, ma tito tamme bot dano, nar ma loko rupiny doko piny macol, ki ma nyono wi lobo malo, nyiŋe Rwot, Lubaŋa me mony!" 
Amos5:1 Wuwiny lok man ma awero i komwu macalo wer kumo, wun jo me ot pa Icrael:" 
Amos5:2 “Otyeko poto, pe dok bia, en nyako Laicrael; gikwere woko i lobone, ŋat mo pe ma ile malo.”" 
Amos5:3 Pien Rwot Lubaŋa owaco kuman ni, “Gaŋ ma otero jo alip i lweny bidoŋ ki dano miya keken; gaŋ ma otero jo miya bidoŋ ki dano apar keken, wun jo me ot pa Icrael.”" 
Amos5:4 Rwot owaco bot jo me ot pa Icrael kuman ni, “Wubin bota, wek wubed kwo;" 
Amos5:5 pe wubed ka wot i Betel, wuwek donyo i Gilgal, pe wukat wa i Beer-ceba; pien Gilgal gibitero woko i opii, ki Betel pe bibedo gin mo.”" 
Amos5:6 Wubin bot Rwot, wek wubed kwo, wek pe omwoc i ot pa Yucepu calo mac, ci waŋogi woko, kun ŋat mo pe i Betel ma romo nekone," 
Amos5:7 wunjo ma ŋolo kop kikiniga, ma ka ŋolo kop atir, kun wubolo kit ma atir woko piny." 
Amos5:8 Ŋat ma otiyo lakalatwe, Yoggo ki Lyemyim, ŋat ma loko colpiny doko odiko, ma ci do dyeceŋ doko wor, ŋat ma lwoŋo pii me nam, ci coro woko i wi lobo, nyiŋe Rwot." 
Amos5:9 En balo gedo matek ŋinyo woko macalo lutkot, miyo gituro cel gogo gininyo woko." 
Amos5:10 Gin gidag ŋat ma jukogi i ka ŋolo kop, cwinygi kwero ŋat ma loko lok ada." 
Amos5:11 Pien wunyono wi lucan kun wujogo kal ki botgi tektek, pi meno kadi bed wugero odiwu ki gweŋ apaya, pe wubibedo i igi; dok kadi bed wupito olok i pottiwu ma yomo cwinywu, pe wubimato koŋo vinone." 
Amos5:12 Pien aŋeyo ni wutimo bal mapol, aŋeyo kit balwu madoŋo, kit ma wuyelo ki jo ma kitgi atir, kun wugamo lim lawilwu, ci wuryemo jo ma piny obwoyo ki i kabedo me ŋolo kop." 
Amos5:13 Pienno ŋat ma laryeko bilin aliŋa i kare ma kit meno, pien karene rac mada." 
Amos5:14 Wulub gin maber, pe gin marac, wek wubed kwo; kumeno Rwot, ma en aye Lubaŋa me mony, bibedo kwedwu, kit macalo doŋ wuwaco." 
Amos5:15 Wukwer gin marac, wumar gin maber, wumi giŋol kop atir i dog gaŋ; gwok nyo noŋo Rwot, ma Lubaŋa me mony, bibedo ki kica bot jo pa Yucepu ma gudoŋ," 
Amos5:16 Pi meno Rwot, Lubaŋa me mony ma en Rwot, owaco kuman ni, “Koko bibedo i dyekal ducu; i waŋa yo ducu dano bikok ni, ‘Aya! Aya!’ Gibilwoŋo lupur ni gubin ka kumo, ki jo ma ŋeyo wer lyel wek gubin, gukoki." 
Amos5:17 Koko bibedo wa i poto olok ducu, pien abikato awok ki i dyewu,” man Rwot aye owaco." 
Amos5:18 Wun jo ma wumito nino pa Rwot komwu kec! Piŋo wumito nino pa Rwot? Piny bibedo col i nino meno laboŋo leŋo mo. 
Amos5:19 Bibedo rom ki dano ma oriŋo labwor, dok orwatte ki kwac; nyo odonyo i ot ojeŋo bade i kom ‘kicika, ci twol dok okaye." 
Amos5:20 I nino pa Rwot piny bibedo col aye, ma leŋo mo pe, piny bicido woko licuc, gin mo ma ryeny iye pe," 
Amos5:21 “Akwero ninowu madito, acayogi woko, cokkewu me wora pe yomo cwinya wacel." 
Amos5:22 Kadi bed wutyero bota gitum awaŋa ki gityer me moko kwon, pe abigamogi; gityer lakwecwinywu me lim mucwe pe abiciko iye waŋa." 
Amos5:23 Woo me werwu wukwany woko ki bota; pe abiwinyo dwan naŋawu kadi mit. 
Amos5:24 Ento wuwek ŋolo kop atir aye omol macalo pii, kitwu obed atir calo kulu ma mol nakanaka." 
Amos5:25 “Yam wubedo ka kela bota gitum ki gityer i tim pi mwaka pyeraŋwen, wun jo me ot pa Icrael?" 
Amos5:26 Pe kumeno, ento koni doŋ wutibino Cakkut ma kabakawu, ki Kaiwan, lubaŋawu ma lakalatwe, ki cal jogiwu ducu ma wupayo piwu kenwu." 
Amos5:27 Pi meno abikobowu woko i opii i ŋe Damaciko,” man Rwot aye" 
Amos6:1 “Gibineno can, jo meno ma komgi okwe i Cion, ki gin ma gitamo ni gitye ki kuc i wi got me Camaria, jo-nu jo me rok madit ma ginene i kin rok ducu, ma jo me ot pa lerael gibedo ka bino botgi." 
Amos6:2 Wukat wa i Kalne, ci wunen; wua ki kunnu, wuwok wa i Kamat, ma en gaŋ madit-ti; ka dok wucit piny i Gat pa jo Piliciti, Gin gibeco makato kerwu woko ce? Nyo lobogi lac makato lobowu ‘?" 
Amos6:3 Wun wumito diro nino marac cen, ento wutye ka kelo loc magwa cok:" 
Amos6:4 “Can i wi jo ma gibuto i wi ki tanda ma gidero ki lak lyec! Wuryene i wi komwu mayom, wucamo litino romi, ki roci ma gipito i dwol;" 
Amos6:5 wuwero werwu kun wulubo dwan naŋa, wuroto gin-wer manyen me agoya calo Daudi;" 
Amos6:6 wumato koŋo vino ki becen me keno tyer, wuwiro komwu ki moo mabecone, ento cwinywu pe cwer pi waŋ ret pa Yucepu." 
Amos6:7 Pienno koni wun jo ma gibikwoŋo terogi i opii, karama pa jo ma ryene i kom bitum woko.”" 
Amos6:8 Rwot Lubaŋa doŋ okwoŋŋe ki nyiŋe kene ni. “Iya okwero wakke pa Yakobo, akwero odine madoŋo; abimiyo gaŋŋe bot lukwor, kacel ki gin ducu ma tye iye.” Man lok pa Rwot kikome, Lubaŋa me mony." 
Amos6:9 Ci ka jo apar gudoŋ i ot acel gibito. 
Amos6:10 Lacen wat pa dano mo-ni, ma en dano ma myero owaŋ kome, bitiŋo kome pi kelo cogone woko ki i ot, ci en biwaco bot ŋat ma tye i tyelo ni, “Pud odoŋ ŋat acel mo boti kenyo?” Ci en bigamo ni, “Pe.” Dok biwacci, “Liŋ! Pe myero walok nyiŋ Rwot.”" 
Amos6:11 Pien nen, Rwot biciko ci gibitwomo ot madit gituro woko, ot matidi gibiŋinyo matitino." 
Amos6:12 Aguragura giriŋo i kom pata? Gipuro nam apura ki kweri dyaŋ? Ento wun wuloko ŋolo kop atir odoko kwir, adwoggi me tim ma atir wumiyo odoko yat makec," 
Amos6:13 wun jo ma wutye ka um pi Lodebar, ki ma waco ni, “Wamako Kamaim pi tekowa kenwa keken.”" 
Amos6:14 Pien nen, abiilo rok mukene i komwu, wun jo me ot pa Icrael ci gibiunowu nia ki i yo me donyo i Kamat nio kwede wa i kulu ma i Araba. Man lok pa Rwot kikome, Lubaŋa me mony." 
Amos7:1 Rwot Lubaŋa onyutta man: nen, en cen rye ka cweyo lwak bonyo i kare ma bel ma gicoyo me aryo ocako twi, en bel ma gicoyo ka doŋ gikayo pa kabaka." 
Amos7:2 I kare ma doŋ gutyeko camo lum woko ki i lobo, awacci, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, timgi kica do! Yakobo twero cuŋ niŋniŋ, ma kun en tidi kumeno!”" 
Amos7:3 Ci Rwot oŋut i kom lok man kun wacci, “Man pe doŋ bitimme.”" 
Amos7:4 Rwot Lubaŋa dok onyutta man: nen, Rwot Lubaŋa onoŋo tye ka ciko ni giŋol kop i kom jone ki mac; ci mac owaŋo kut matut otyeko woko, obedo ka waŋo lobo-ni." 
Amos7:5 Ci awacci, “Ai Rwot Lubaŋa, doŋ iwek do! Yakobo twero cuŋ niŋniŋ, ma kun en tidi kumeno?”" 
Amos7:6 Ci Rwot Lubaŋa oŋut i kom man kun wacci, “Man bene pe doŋ bitimme.”" 
Amos7:7 Dok onyutta man: nen, Rwot yam ocuŋ i ŋet cel me gaŋ ma gigero kun gipimo ki birigi,” kun omako birigi i ciŋe." 
Amos7:8 Ci Rwot owacca ni, “Amoc, ineno gin aŋo?” Ci agamo ni, “Birigi.” Dok Rwot awacca ni, “Nen, aeketo birigi i dye jona jo Icrael, pe dok abikato ki ka ŋetgi," 
Amos7:9 Kabedo pa Icaka ma yam giwora iye i wi godi gibidoŋ noŋo, ki kabedo pa jo Icrael maleŋ gibidoŋ obur; ci abipoto i kom ot pa Jeroboam ki pala lucwan.”" 
Amos7:10 Ci doŋ Amajia, ajwaka me Betel, ocwalo lok bot Jeroboam, kabaka me Icrael, ni, “Amoc opiro lok i komi i dye jo me ot pa Icrael; lobo-ni pe twero ciro lwak lok ducu ma en owaco." 
Amos7:11 Pien Amoc doŋ owaco kumeno ni, ‘Jeroboam gibineko ki pala lucwan, jo Icrael gibikwanyogi ki i lobogi giterogi i opii.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Ci Amajia owaco bot Amoc ni, “In lanen, citi iriŋ woko i lobo Juda, icam kwonni kunnu, it yet lok lanebi lanebi ki kunnu." 
Amos7:13 Ento pe dok it yet lok i Betel, pien kany kabedo maleŋ pa kabaka, man ot woro Lubaŋa me ker man.”" 
Amos7:14 Amoc odok iye ki Amajia ni, “An pe lanebi, an bene pe latin pa lanebi mo; ento yam an lakwat, ki layub nyig olam me acama." 
Amos7:15 Ci Rwot okwanya ki ka lubo kor romi, ci owacca ni, ‘Cit itit lokka boŋonajo Icrael.’" 
Amos7:16 “Pi meno, koni doŋ iwiny lok pa Rwot. In iwacci, ‘Pe it it lok pa Lubaŋa i kom Icrael,’ dok ni, ‘Pe ibed ka lok i kom ot pa Icaka.’" 
Amos7:17 Pi meno, Rwot owaco kuman ni, ‘Dakoni bibedo malaya i gaŋ, awobe ki anyirani gibinekogi ki pala lucwan, pottiwu gibipoko woko kun gipimo ki tol; in kikomi ibito i lobo ma keni, ci jo Icrael gibikwanyogi woko ki i lobogi, giterogi i opii ada.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Rwot Lubaŋa onyutta man: nen, aduku ma tye iye nyig yadi me acama ma gicek i agikki mwaka." 
Amos8:2 Ci owacca ni, “Amoc, ineno gin aŋo?” Agamo ni, “Aduku ma tye iye nyig yadi me acama ma gicek i agikki mwaka.” Rwot dok owacca ni, “Agikki doŋ oo i kom jona jo Icrael; pe dok abikato ki ka ŋetgi." 
Amos8:3 Wer me ot pa Lubaŋa bidoko me koko i nino meno. Kom jo muto gibibedo mapol; gibibologi woko laliŋ i kabedo ducu.” Man lok pa Rwot Lubaŋa kikome. 
Amos8:4 Wuwiny man, wun ma wunyono jo ma piny obwoyogi, ki ma wumito tyeko lucan woko ki i lobo," 
Amos8:5 ma wuwacci, “Kwero por dwe bitum awene, wek wacat bel? Cabit bitum awene, wek wakel ŋanowa me acata?” Dok ni, “Wek wacat belwa ki agwata matidi, wapim limgi ki cekel mapek, kun wabumu dano ki mijan ma pe pimo kakare," 
Amos8:6 wek wawil lucan ki ciliŋ, wacat jo ma piny obwoyogi pi war tyen, wacatu wa ki cuŋ bel bene.”" 
Amos8:7 Rwot otyeko kwoŋo kwoŋ ki nyiŋ gin ma jo pa Yakobo giwakke iye ni, “Wiya pe biwil i kom timgi mo acel ma gitimo." 
Amos8:8 Lobo pe biyeŋŋe pi lok man, kun ŋat acel acel ma obedo iye koko can? Lobo ducu biille malo macalo kulu Nail ka opoŋ, biyeŋŋe dok piny calo kulu Nail ma i Ejipt.”" 
Amos8:9 Man lok pa Rwot Lubaŋa kikome, ni, “I nino meno abimiyo Ceŋ poto cwiny dyeceŋ, abicido lobo woko i kare ma cen ryeny." 
Amos8:10 Abiloko ninowu madito doko nino me kwero cola, ki werwu ducu doko me kumo. Abimiyo jo ducu tweyo boŋo cola i pyergi, wi dano ducu gibilyelo woko; abimiyo bedo calo koko pi latin ma dano onywalo acel keken, agikkine bibedo nino me cwetcwiny madwoŋ.”" 
Amos8:11 Man lok pa Rwot Lubaŋa kikome, ci, “Nen, kare obebino ma abicwalo kec i lobo-ni, pe kec kwon, kadi ki orwo pii, ento kec me winyo lok pa Rwot." 
Amos8:12 Dano bimal ata nia ki i nam man nio wa i nam mukene, ki nia ki tuŋ acam nio tuŋ wokceŋ; gibiriŋo ata pi yenyo lok pa Rwot, ento pe gibinoŋo." 
Amos8:13 “I nino meno anyira ma gibeco ki litino awobe komgi biloc woko pi orwo pii. 
Amos8:14 Jo meno ma gikwoŋo kwon ki nyiŋ Acima me Camaria, ma giwaco ni, ‘Macalo lubaŋani tye kwo, in Dan,’ dok ni, ‘Macalo yo Beer-ceba tye makwo-ni,’ gibipoto piny" 
Amos9:1 Yam aneno Rwot ocuŋ i ŋet keno tyer, owacci, “Go lalukana wi wir, wek larii doggo la oyeŋŋe, turgi woko wek guŋinnye i wi jo-nu ducu. Jo mudoŋ i komgi abinekogi kipala lucwan, ŋat acel mo pe biriŋo, ŋat acel mo pe bibwot." 
Amos9:2 “Kadi bed gukwiny piny wa i Lyel, abikwanyogi ki kunnu ki ciŋa; kadi bed guito malo i polo, abiomogi woko ki kunnu adwokogi piny;" 
Amos9:3 kadi bed gukanne i wi got Karmel, abiyenyogi ki kunnu, amakogi woko; kadi bed gukanne ki ka waŋa wa i te nam, abiciko twol ki kunnu toŋogi," 
Amos9:4 Kadi bed giterogi i opii i nyim lukworgi, abiciko ginekogi woko ki kunnu ki pala lucwan, ci abiciko waŋa i komgi pi timo gin marac, pe pi timo gin maber.”" 
Amos9:5 Rwot Lubaŋa me mony, ka ogudo lobo, ci leny woko, jo ducu ma gibedo iye gikok; lobo ducu iile woko calo kulu Nailka opoŋ, ci dok piny calo kulu Nail ma i Ejipt." 
Amos9:6 En gero kicikane ma malo i polo, kun miyo daŋŋe gulle i wi lobo; en lwoŋo pii me nam, ci coro woko i wi lobo; nyiŋe Rwot." 
Amos9:7 “Wun pe wurom ki jo Etiopia ki tuŋ bota, wun jo Icrael?” Man lok pa Rwot kikome. “Yam pe akwanyo jo Icrael ki i lobo Ejipt, ki Lupiliciti ki i Kaptor, ki jo Ciria ki i Kir bene?" 
Amos9:8 Nen, Rwot Lubaŋa tye ka neno ker ma tye ki bal, ci abijwero woko ki i wi lobo; kono ot pa Yakobo pe abityeko ducu.” Man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Amos9:9 “Pien nen, abiciko, ci abiyeŋo ot pa Icrael i kin rok mukene ducu, calo ŋat ma kiyo moko ki keikei, ento nyig gweŋ acel mo pe bipoto i ŋom." 
Amos9:10 Lubalo ducu ma i kin jona gibinekogi ki pala lucwan, gin jo ma giwacci, ‘Gin marac mo pe bipoto i komwa, ariya mo pe binen i nyimwa.’" 
Amos9:11 “I nino meno abigero aduc pa Daudi ma yam opoto, abiyubo guti ma yam omuk, ka ma yam oballe abiilo malo, abiroco odoco bedo kit macalo yam con;" 
Amos9:12 wek gucam lobo pa jo Edom ma yam odoŋ, ki rok ducu ma yam gilwonogi ki nyiŋa.’ Man lok pa Rwot kikome ma bitimo man." 
Amos9:13 Man lok pa Rwot kikome, ni, “Kare oebino ma kare me kac bilubo kare me pur oyot, kare me nyono olok bilubo kare me coyo kodi oyot; koŋo vino manyen bicwer ki i wi godi, bimol i wi litino godi ducu." 
Amos9:14 Abidwoko gum pa jona jo Icrael botgi, ci gibigero gaŋi ma yam oballe odoco, gibedo iye, gibipito olok, ci gibimato koŋo vinone, gibipuro potti, ci gicamo cam ma ocek iye." 
Amos9:15 Abipitogi i lobogi, gimoko calo yat, ci pe dok gibiputogi woko ki i lobo ma doŋ amiyo botgi.” Man lok pa Rwot Lubaŋawu kikome." 
Obadiah1:1 Man en lok ma Lubaŋa onyuto bot Obadia, Rwot Lubaŋa owaco lok man ma okemo Edom. Wan doŋ wawinyo lok mua ki bot Rwot, gityeko cwalo lakwena me cito bot lurok ka waco ni. “Wua malo! Wek wacitu ka lweny kwede!”" 
Obadiah1:2 Rwot owaco bot jo Edom ni, “Nen, abimiyo wudoko jo manok i kin lurok, ma jo ducu bicayowu matek mada," 
Obadiah1:3 Wakke ma tye i cwinywu onoŋo obwolowu, wun jo ma wubedo i kin got mubar, ma wubedo i kabedo ma tye malo twatwal-li, ka doŋ wuwaco ki i cwinywu ni, ‘Aŋa kono ma twero dwoka piny i ŋom!’" 
Obadiah1:4 Kadi bed wubed malo calo ocur, kadi wuger odiwu malo i kin lakalatwe, ento pud abicorowu woko piny aye ki kunnu. Man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Obadiah1:5 “Ka ce lukwo ma gin luyak gubino botwu dyewor, kadi bed giyak jamiwu mukato kare, gin pe gibikwalo ka jami ma romogi keken? Ka ce lupwon nyig olok gubino botwu, nyig olok mogo pe twero doŋ ma dok wubibekone lacen?" 
Obadiah1:6 Giyako Ecau marac twatwal guyenyo wa lonyo ducu ma yam en okano! 
Obadiah1:7 Jo ducu ma yam wuribbe kwedgi gubwolowu abwola, guryemowu guterowu wa i waŋ lobo; gin jo ma yam wubedo kwedgi ki kuc-ci doŋ guloyowu woko; ki luremwu ma yam wugenogi bene guciko owic ka ma wuwoto iye, ma niaŋ iye tek mada," 
Obadiah1:8 I nino meno en aye abityeko iye jo ma ryek woko ki i Edom, kacel ki jo ma giniaŋ bene ma gibedo i got Ecau, Man lok ma Rwot kikome aye oloko," 
Obadiah1:9 Dok in Teman, jo ma gin twoni lwennyi komgi bionyo koyo woko lirut, dok dano acel acel ma bedo i got Ecau gibineko woko." 
Obadiah1:10 Pi tim me bwami ki nek ma itimo i kom omeru Yakobo, lewic bimaki pire matek, in bene gibineki dok nyiŋi birwenyo woko matwal. Gin mumiyo giketo can i kom jo Edom" 
Obadiah1:11 “I nino ma onoŋo wucuŋ cen ca, i nino ma welo mogo guyako iye lonyone gucito kwede woko-ni, kun lurok bene gudonyo i dogcelle ka gubolo kwir pi Jerucalem, wun bene wubedo rac calo gin." 
Obadiah1:12 Onoŋo pe bedo ber botwu me bedo ki yomcwiny i nino meno pi gin marac ma otimme i kom omegiwu; pe ber onoŋo me um i kom jo Juda, i nino ma gijwerogi iye. Dok pe obedo ber wun me wakke awaka i nino ma can opoto i komgi." 
Obadiah1:13 Onoŋo myero pe wudony i dogcel pa lwakka i nino ma onoŋo can opoto i komgi; pe onoŋo myero wubed ki um pi can mumakogi i nino me can madwoŋ mupoto i komgi; onoŋo myero pe wugud jamigi mo i nino ma can madwoŋ opoto ikomgi. 
Obadiah1:14 Pe onoŋo myero wucuŋ i aŋakaŋaka yo me ŋolo jo munoŋo giriŋo woko me laro komgi; dok pe onoŋo myero doŋ wumak danogi ma gubwotte ki miyogi i cin lukworgi, i nino me can." 
Obadiah1:15 Pien nino pa Rwot doŋ cok bino i kom rok ducu. Gin ma wun doŋ wutyeko timo, gibitimo i komwu bene, tim mewu bidwogo i wiwu gire." 
Obadiah1:16 Kit gin ma wubedo ka matone i wi got mera maleŋ, rok ducu ma orumowu bene gibimato; gibimato matek dok gibimwonyo woko, ci gibidoko macalo jo ma yam gipe. Jo ‘Icrael ma gubwot gibilogi malo" 
Obadiah1:17 “Ento jo mubwot gibibedo i wi got Cion, ci bibedo kabedo maleŋ; jo me ot pa Yakobo gibibedo ki lobo ma megi kikome." 
Obadiah1:18 Jo me pt pa Yakobo gibidoko mac, ki jo me ot pa Yucepu gibibedo leb mac, jo me ot pa Ecau gibibedo megi ren kaal; gibiwaŋogi ci gibityekogi woko ducu, pe tye dano mo me ot pa Ecau ma, bidoŋ; pien Rwot doŋ otyeko loko." 
Obadiah1:19 Jo Negeb gibileyo got Ecau, jo Cepela bileyo lobo pa jo Piliciti; gibileyo lobo Epraim ki lobo Camaria ento Benjamin bileyo Gilead." 
Obadiah1:20 Jo Icrael ma giterogi i opii i Kalak, gibileyo Kanaan nio wa Jarepat; ki opii ducu ma yam gimakogi ki i Jerucalem ma gitye i Ceparad gibileyo gaŋi ducu me Negeb." 
Obadiah1:21 Lular dano gibibino giito malo i wi got Cion me loyo got Ecau; Rwot aye bibedo lakergi.” 
Jonah1:1 Lok pa Rwot cen obino bot Yona wod pa Amittai, kun wacci," 
Jonah1:2 “A, icit Nineve, ma en gaŋ madit, itit lok i kom jone, pi tim megi marac ma doŋ otyeko ŋene wa bota.”" 
Jonah1:3 Ento Yona oa me lwi woko ki i nyim Rwot pi wot Tarcic. En ocito i Jopa ka onoŋo mel ma cito Tarcic; ci oculo lim ma mitte pi wot, odonyo i mel, me cito kwedgi Tarcic, wek ca woko ki i nyim Rwot." 
Jonah1:4 Ento Rwot ocwalo yamo madwoŋ twatwal i nam, omiyo pii me nam otagge matek twatwal, ma mel onoŋo doŋ cok tur woko." 
Jonah1:5 Cutcut lukwaŋ mel gudoko lwor, omiyo dano acel acel ocako kok bot lubaŋane, kun gibolo jami ma onoŋo tye i mel woko i nam, wek mel odon mayot. Ento Yona ocito mere wa i gul mel, obuto piny kunnu, ci onino matek." 
Jonah1:6 Ladit me mel obino bote ocako penye ni, “itamo gin aŋo, in lanino-ni? A malo, ileg lubaŋani! Gwok nyo lubaŋani bitamo piwa miyo pe wato.”" 
Jonah1:7 Ci guloko kekengi kun giwacci, “Koŋ wabolu kwir, wek waŋe aŋa ma oweko gin marac man opoto i komwa.” Gubolo kwir, ci kwir opoto i kom Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Guwacce ni, “Tittiwa, aŋa ma oweko gin marac man opoto i komwa? Ticci tic aŋo? la ki kwene? Loboni gilwoŋo nino? In dano me rok mene?”" 
Jonah1:9 En ogamo doggi ni, “An Laibru; alworo Rwot Lubaŋa me polo, ma oketo nam ki lobo.”" 
Jonah1:10 Ci lworo omako jo-nu matek, omiyo gupenye ni, “Man gin aŋo ma itimoni?” Pien jo-nu onoŋo guŋeyo ni en tye ka lwi woko ki i nyim Rwot, pien onoŋo koŋ otittigi." 
Jonah1:11 Dok guwacce ni, “Watim gin aŋo i komi, wek nam ojukke okwe mot piwa?” Pien nam onoŋo tiŋŋe medde ameda." 
Jonah1:12 En ogamo doggi ni, “Wutiŋja, wubola woko i nam, ka wek nam okwepiwu; pien aŋeyo ni tagge me nam man matek twatwal-li obino i komwu pi an,”" 
Jonah1:13 Kadi bed kumeno jo-nu gukwaŋo mel matek me dok cen i wi tera, ento pe gutwero, pien tagge me nam obedo ka medde ameda i komgi." 
Jonah1:14 Pi meno omiyo gukok bot Rwot kun giwaco ni, “Wabako dogwa boti, in Rwot, pe iwek wato ka waneko laco man, pe imi temo pa ŋat ma pe ki bal odok i wiwa; pien in Rwot doŋ ityeko timo kit macalo imito.”" 
Jonah1:15 Kumeno gutiŋo Yona, ci gubole woko i nam, omiyo tagge me nam otuggi kwe woko." 
Jonah1:16 Omiyo jo-nu gulworo Rwot twatwal; dok gumiyo gitum bot Rwot kun gikwoŋo kwoŋ. 
Jonah1:17 Rwot omiyo rec madit omwonyo Yona woko i iye; ci Yona ori i i rec meno pi nino adek dyeceŋ ki dyewor. 
Jonah2:1 Yona olego Rwot Lubaŋane ki ii rec 
Jonah2:2 kun wacci, “Ceŋ akok bot Rwot i canna, ci en ogamo doga; ceŋ akok ki i i lyel, ci iwinyo dwana." 
Jonah2:3 “Pien onoŋo ibola ka matut, i cwiny dye nam, pii ma mol oruma woko dyere; tagge me pii ki correne, omol okato ki i wiya." 
Jonah2:4 Ka dok awacci, ‘Giryema woko ki i nyimi; abineno dok ot meri maleŋ niŋniŋ?’" 
Jonah2:5 “Pii omwonya woko, kut matut oruma dyere; tiro okadde woko i wiya;" 
Jonah2:6 kun alwiny piny i te godi. Alor acito piny wa i lobo ca, giloro dogganne i wi ya woko matwal. Kadi bed kumeno idwoko kwona nia ki i bur, in Rwot Lubaŋana." 
Jonah2:7 Ka tipo koma ool woko ci doŋ apo i kom Rwot; ki legana owinnye boti i ot meri maleŋ," 
Jonah2:8 Jo ma giworo cal jogi mamwa-ni gibalo mar me ada. 
Jonah2:9 Ento an abimiyi gitum mera ki dwan me pwoc; gin ma doŋ atyeko kwoŋo pire bene abicobo. Lar tye bot Rwot.” 
Jonah2:10 Rwot oloko ki rec, ci rec oŋoko Yona woko i wi tera." 
Jonah3:1 Lacen lok pa Rwot dok obino bot Yona pi tyen me aryone, ma wacci," 
Jonah3:2 “A icit Nineve ma en gaŋ madit, itit iye lok ma aciki pire.”" 
Jonah3:3 Yona oa ocito Nineve, kit macalo Rwot owacce. Nineve onoŋo gaŋ madit twatwal, ma ŋolo dyere ari keken teri wot me nino adek." 
Jonah3:4 Yona ocako donyo i gaŋ, oterre wot me nino acel. Ka odaŋ;mŋe ni, “Odoŋ nino pyeraŋwen, Nineve gibiketo woko.”" 
Jonah3:5 Ci jo me Nineve guye Lubaŋa; guciko bene pi kare me ri kec, kun giruko boŋo cola, cakke ki i kom jo madoŋo, o kwede wa i kom jo matino." 
Jonah3:6 Ka lok oo bot kabaka me Nineve, ci en oa malo ki i wi komkerre, ogonyo jorre ki i kome, oruko boŋo cola ka obedo kwede i buru." 
Jonah3:7 Dok omiyo lok oket i dye Nineve ducu ni, “Pi cik pa kabaka ki luditone: Pe dano mo, kadi lee, kadi dyaŋ, kadi romo, obil gin mo; pe gucam, dok pe gumat pii." 
Jonah3:8 Ento wek dano ki lee giumgi ki boŋo cola, wek gukok matek bot Lubaŋa; iyo, wek ŋat acel acel olokke owek kit marac-ci, ki bene tim me yak ma en bedo ka timone." 
Jonah3:9 Aŋa ma ŋeyo ka Lubaŋa bijuko cwinye, bilokke weko kinigane mager-ri, wek pe wato?”" 
Jonah3:10 Ka Lubaŋa oneno gin ma gutiyo, kit ma gulokke kwede, guweko tim megi marac, Lubaŋa ojuko cwinye i kom gin marac ma onoŋo nene en owaco ni ebitimo i komgi, ci pe doŋ otiyo." 
Jonah4:1 Ento man owaŋo i Yona matek, omiyo kiniga omake." 
Jonah4:2 Ci Yona olego Rwot, kun owacci, “Akwayi, in Rwot, man pe en aye gin ma nene awaco i kare ma onoŋo pud atye i lobona? Meno en aye gin mumiyo alwi woko oyotoyot me cito Tarcic; pien aŋeyo ni in Lubaŋa ma latim kica, ma timo kica bot dano, kiniga pe maki oyot, mar meri dwoŋ ma pe lokke, dok ijuko cwinyi i tim marac." 
Jonah4:3 Koni doŋ in Rwot, kwany kwona woko ki i koma, akwayi, pien bedo ber ka ata kato ma abedo kwo.”" 
Jonah4:4 Ci Rwot ogamo ni, “itamo ni ber me bedo ki kiniga?”" 
Jonah4:5 Lacen Yona oa woko ki i Nineve, ci ocito obedo koŋ wokceŋ me gaŋ; kunnu otiyo iye bolo pire kene. En obedo piny i tipo i te bolone, wek koŋ enen gin ma bitimme i kom gaŋ." 
Jonah4:6 Ka dok Lubaŋa omiyo keno otwi odoŋo olak ka wi Yona, wek tipone ogen ka wiye, pi kweyo cwinye i canne. Kumeno Yona cwinye obedo yom twatwal pi keno-nu." 
Jonah4:7 Ento ka piny oru nino mukene, Lubaŋa omiyo kwidi ocobo keno-nu, ci oner woko." 
Jonah4:8 I kare ma cen doŋ otuc, Lubaŋa omiyo yamo malyet okodo twatwal ki koŋ wokceŋ, ci ceŋ owaŋo wi Yona nio ka kome oloc woko; omiyo Yona okwayo ni twora eto, kun wacci, “Bedo ber ka ata kato ma abedo kwo.”" 
Jonah4:9 Ento Lubaŋa odok iye ki Yona ni, “Hamo ni ber me bedo ki kiniga pi keno-nu?” Yona ogamo ni, “Atamo ni ber me bedo ki kiniga, kiniga ma romma to.”" 
Jonah4:10 Rwot dok owaco ni, “Kica omaki i kom keno ma in pe itiyo tic mo pire-ni, in ma pe imiyo odoŋo, ma otwi i dyewor acel ka dok oto woko i dyewor acel." 
Jonah4:11 An pe myero kica omaka pi Nineve ma en gaŋ madit, ma tye iye jo makato alip miya acel ki pyeraryo ma pe giŋeyo poko kin ciŋgi ma lacuc ki ma lacam, ki dok bene dyaŋi mapolgu?”" 
Micah1:1 Man lok pa Rwot ma ceŋ obino bot Mika Lamorecet ma en oneno okemo Camaria ki Jerucalem, i kare pa Yocam, Akaj, ki Kejekia, luker me Juda." 
Micah1:2 Wuwiny, wun rok, wun ducu; cik iti in lobo, ki gin ducu ma tye iye, wek Rwot Lubaŋa obed caden ma nyuto bal i komwu, kun lokke winnye ki i ot mere maleŋ," 
Micah1:3 Pien nen, Rwot tye ka bino nia ki i kabedone, bibino piny, binyono wi cere mutiŋŋe i wi lobo." 
Micah1:4 Godi bileny i te tyene luŋ bibarre, macalo odok kic ma i ŋet mac, macalo pii ma corre cito i luŋ." 
Micah1:5 Man ducu bibino pi tim aranyi pa Yakobo ki pi bal me ot pa Icrael. Tim aranyi pa Yakobo en gin aŋo? Pe en aye Camaria? Ki bal me ot pa Juda en gin aŋo? Pe en aye Jerucalem? 
Micah1:6 Pi meno abiloko Camaria doko obur ma i dye tim, bidoko kabedo me pito olok; dok abicoro gweŋine piny i luŋ, ka doŋ abiyabo te gutine." 
Micah1:7 Cal apayane ducu gibiŋido woko matitino, mucarane bene ducu gibiwaŋo ki mac, ki cal jogine-gu ducu abibalo woko; pien ocokogi ki lim ma giculo ki malaya, gibidok ceŋ i mucara pa malaya." 
Micah1:8 Pi man abikumo, dok abikok; abiwot ki tyena noŋo, kun atye munero; abikok calo too, dok abikumo macalo udu." 
Micah1:9 Pien waŋ rette doŋ pe twero caŋ; otyeko bino i Juda, doŋ oo i dogcel pa jona, wa i Jerucalem." 
Micah1:10 Pe wutit pire i Gat, pe wukoki; wuŋenne piny i apwa i Bet-le-apra." 
Micah1:11 Wucit anyim, wun jo Capir, kun wuwoto munero ma lewic omakowu marac; wun jo ma bedo i Jaanan pe wukat woko; koko ma winnye a ki i Bet-ejel nyuto ni ka-larrewu doŋ pe kunnu," 
Micah1:12 Jo ma bedo i Marot gitye ka kuro gin maber ki par madwoŋ, pien gin marac ma oa ki bot Rwot doŋ oo wa i dogcel me Jerucalem," 
Micah1:13 Wutwe aguragura i kom gadigadi lweny madwir, wun jo Lakic; wun aye mukwoŋo kelo bal i kom jo Cion, tim aranyi pa jo Icrael ceŋ ginoŋo i komwu." 
Micah1:14 Pi meno wubimiyo mot me pokke bot Morecet-gat; odi me Akijib bidoko gin bwola bot luker me Icrael. 
Micah1:15 Dok abikelo i komwu dano ma bwoyowu, wun jo Mareca; deyo pa Icrael bicito i Adulam." 
Micah1:16 Wulyel yer wiwu woko, wek wiwu obed maleŋ, pi litino ma yomo cwinywu; wuwek wiwu otal woko macalo wi acut, pien litino gibiwekowu, gibiterogi woko i opii." 
Micah2:1 Gibineno can, jo ma paro pi timo gin marac, ma giparo pi timo bal i wi kabutogi! Ka piny oru, ci gitimo, pien twerone tye i ciŋgi." 
Micah2:2 Giparo potti, ci gigamo tektek; giparo odi-gu, ka dok gimayogi woko; gidiyo dano ki bura, gimayo ode, kadi wa lobo ma oleyo ki bot wonne." 
Micah2:3 Pi meno Rwot owaco kuman ni, Nen, aparo lok marac i kom ot man, ma pe dok wubiwoto ŋutwu ki iye; pe dok wubiwot kun wuŋatte ki wakke, pien kare meno bibedo kare marac." 
Micah2:4 I nino meno gibiwerowu ki wer aŋec, dok bene gibikoko koko me can, kun giwacci, “Giyakowa doŋ atika; lobo ma yam opoko botwa Rwot omiyo woko ki jo mukene; iuro aura kit ma en ogamo kwede ki botwa! En opoko pottiwa woko i kin jo ma guterowa i opii.”" 
Micah2:5 Pi meno pe wubibedo ki ŋat mo i cokke pa Rwot, ma bibolo tol me poko nom me apura bot wu," 
Micah2:6 Gitito lok kun giwacci, “Pe wutit lok, at mo pe myero otit kit lok macalo magi; lewic pe bimakowa.”" 
Micah2:7 Myero giwac man, wun jo me ot pa Yakobo? Rwot pe twero diyo cwinye? Magi ducu gin ticce? Lokka pe timo ber bot ŋat ma cwinye atir?" 
Micah2:8 Ento wun wutwarre i kom jona macalo lukwor; wumayo kanyi-gu woko ki i kom jo ma gibedo mot, jo ma gikato ki i netwu ki gen, ma pe gitye ki tam mo me lweny." 
Micah2:9 Wuryemo mon pa jona woko ki i odigi ma yomo cwinygi-ni; wukwanyo deyona woko matwal ki i kom litinogi matino. 
Micah2:10 Wua, doŋ wuciti, pien man pe ka yweyo; pi gin ma keni ma balo dano, ma kelo bal marac twatwal." 
Micah2:11 Ka ce dano mo woto atata, kun tye ki cwiny me goba, ma wacci, “Abitittiwu pi koŋo vino ki mat mogo makec,” en bibedo latit-lok bot jo man!" 
Micah2:12 Adada abicoko wun ducu, wun jo pa Yakobo, abicoko jo Icrael mudoŋ; abigurogi kacel macalo romi ma tye i dwolgi, macalo lwak romi ma gitye i olet, lwak jo ma giwo." 
Micah2:13 Ŋat ma yabo yo bitelo nyimgi; gibituro, ka gibikato woko ki i dogcel. Kabakagi bikato i nyimgi, kun noŋo Rwot telo wigi." 
Micah3:1 Awacci, Wuwiny, wun ludito ma telo wi jo pa Yakobo ki wun luloc me ot pa Icrael! Pe ticwuaye me ŋeyo ŋolokop atir?" 
Micah3:2 Wun wuk wero ber ento wumaro rac, wupwaco del kom jona, dok wudano riŋo korugi ki ikom cogogi;" 
Micah3:3 wun wucamo riŋo kom jona, kun bene wuyaŋo del komgi, dok wuŋido cogogi matitino, ka doŋ wuŋwekogi woko macalo riŋo ma tye i agulu, nyo macalo riŋo ma tye i cupuriya." 
Micah3:4 Lacen wubikok bot Rwot, ento en pe bigamo dogwu; i nino maca pe wubineno waŋe, pien timwu rac twatwal." 
Micah3:5 Man lok ma Rwot owaco i kom lunebi ma ginako jona, ma gidaŋŋe ni, “Kuc” i kare ma noŋo gitye ki ginacama, ento pud giero lweny i kom ŋat mo ma pe pitogi ki’ cam." 
Micah3:6 Meno omiyo Rwot owaco ni, Piny bibedo mutu, pe wubineno ginanyuta mo, dok piny bidoko col kun pe wunono lagam me gin ma wutyeto. Ceŋ bipoto i wiwu, wun lunebi, piny bicido woko botwu;" 
Micah3:7 lewic bimako lunen piny, ki lutyet bene gibiketo lewic i wigi; gin ducu gibimiyo doggi woko, pien Lubaŋa pe bimiyo botgi lagammo." 
Micah3:8 Ento ki tuŋ buta, atye ki tek, ki Cwiny pa Rwot, dok ki ŋolo kop atir, ki teko, pi tito ki Yakobo tim aranyine, ki pi nyuto balle bot Icrael." 
Micah3:9 Wuwiny man, wun lutel wi jo pa Yakobo ki wun luloc me ot pa Icrael, ma wudag ŋolo kop atir kun wubalo te kop ducu ma tye atir," 
Micah3:10 ma wugeto Cion ki remo ki Jerucalem bene ki tim marac. 
Micah3:11 Lutel wi jo Jerucalem giŋolo kop pi lim wil me muŋ, ajwagine gipwonyo pwony pi mucara, lunebi bene gityeto tyet pi lim; ento pud gijeŋŋe i kom Rwot kun giwacci,’’ “Rwot pe tye i kinwa? Rac mo pe bibino i komwa.”" 
Micah3:12 Pi meno, pi tim mewu, Cion gibipuro woko macalo poto; Jerucalem bidoko obur, ki got ma gigero ot pa Rwot i wiye bi" 
Micah4:1 Man bitimme i kare ma pud tye anyim: got me ot pa Rwot bicuŋ macalo got mabor makato godi ducu, borre bikato cere ducu; rok ducu gibimol gicito iye," 
Micah4:2 dok lwak lurok mapol gibibino, gibiwacci, “Wubin, waitui wi got pa Rwot, i ot pa Lubaŋa pa Yakobo; wek en opwonywa kit mere, ka wek walub yone.” Pien cik bia ki i Cion, lok pa Rwot bia ki i Jerucalem," 
Micah4:3 En biŋolo kop i kin rok mapol, dok biŋolo kop pa lwak rok matego ma gitye ka mabor; gibiteto pala lucwangi doko lak kweri dyaŋ, ki toŋigi doko pala me ŋolo jaŋ olok; rok mo pe bitiŋo pala lucwan i kom rok wadigi, pe doŋ gibimedde ki pwonyo lweny;" 
Micah4:4 ento ŋat acel acel bibedo i te olokke ki i te odurone, pe tye ŋat mo ma bimiyo gibedo lwor; pien dog Rwot me mony doŋ otuco." 
Micah4:5 Pien rok ducu giwoto kun ŋat acel acel woto nyiŋ lubaŋane, ento wan wabiworo Rwot Lubaŋawa nakanaka. Koko jo Icrael ki i opii" 
Micah4:6 Rwot owaco kuman ni, I nino maca abicoko luŋolo, dok abicoko jo ma giryemogi woko, ki jo ma an kikoma doŋ atyeko unogi." 
Micah4:7 Abimiyo luŋolo gidoko jo mubwot, ki jo ma yam giryemogi gucito woko ceŋ gibidoko rok matek; Rwot biloyogi i got Cion nia i kale man nio nino ma pe tumo" 
Micah4:8 In lubele me dwol romi, dok in cere pa jo Cion, locci macon bidwogo i ciŋi, ma en aye ker pa jo Jerucalem." 
Micah4:9 Koni ikok matek piŋo? Pe tye kabaka mo liŋ? Lami-tammi doŋ oto woko, mumiyo immne ki arem calo dako ma rem ki nywal?" 
Micah4:10 Wubed ki arem, kun wucur, wun jo Cion, macalo dako ma rem ki nywal; pien koni wubia woko ki i gaŋ wubibedo i tim ata; dok wubicito i Babilon. Rwot bilarowu ki kunnu, en bilarowu ki i ciŋ lukworwu." 
Micah4:11 Koni rok mapol gucokke ka lweny i komwu, kun giwacci, “Wek wabalgi woko wek wanen Cion.”" 
Micah4:12 Ento gin pe giŋeyo tam pa Rwot pe giniaŋ yubbe bene, ni en aye ocokogi macalo wit kal ma i laro moyo." 
Micah4:13 Wua malo wudin kal, wun jo Cion, macalo twon dyaŋ ma nyono wit kal me dinone, pien abimiyo tuŋwu doko nyonyo ki obon tyenwu bidoko mola; wubituro rok mapol i dul i dul, wubidyero limgi bot Rwot, doŋ bidoko lonyo pa Rwot me wi lobo ducu." 
Micah5:1 Koni cel orumowa woko dyere, lukwor doŋ gurumowa woko; doŋ gitye ka goyo lem laloc me Icrael ki odoo. Loc pa lalar bia ki i Beterekem" 
Micah5:2 Ento in, Beterekem Eprata, in itidi pe iporre me bedo i kin kaka me Juda, dano ma bibedo laloc i Icrael bibmo pi an kun a ki i in: acakki me binone obedo con, iua i kare macon mada." 
Micah5:3 Pi meno en biwekogi ata nio ka kare biromo nio ka dako ma tye ka rem ki nywal doŋ onywal; lacen utmegine ducu ma gudoŋ gibidwogo bot jo Icrael. 
Micah5:4 En bicuŋ, dok bikwayo romine pi tek pa Rwot, ki i dit me nyilj Rwot Lubaŋane. Dok gibibedo ki kuc, pien koni en bibedo dit nio i agik me lobo." 
Micah5:5 Pien dano-nu bikelo kuc, i kare ma jo Aciria gibibino i lobowa, maginyono lobowa bene ki tyengi. Wabicwalo lukwat abiro ka lweny i komgi, kun rwodi aboro aye ma gibitelo wi lwak;" 
Micah5:6 gibiloyo lobo me Aciria ki pala lucwan, ki lobo pa Nimulodi ki pala lucwan ma gitiŋo; gibilarowa ki i cin jo Aciria ka gubino i lobowa, ma tyengi onyono apokki me wan lobowa." 
Micah5:7 Lacen jo pa Yakobo ma gudoŋ gibibedo i dye rok mapol, macalo toyo ma oa ki bot Rwot, calo kot ma ŋido i kom lum, ma pe twero dikke pi dano, kadi wa kuro litino pa dano." 
Micah5:8 Jo pa Yakobo ma gudoŋ gibibedo i kin lurok, i dye rok mapol, macalo labwor ma i kin lee me buŋa, macalo latin labwor ma i kin romi ma gucokke; ka owok ki i kingi, ci nyonogi piny, dok kilogi woko, pe tye ŋat mo ma larogi." 
Micah5:9 Ciŋi bitiŋŋe malo i kom lukworri, lumoneni ducu ibityekogi woko." 
Micah5:10 I nino maca, abikwanyo aguragurawu woko ki botwu, dok abityeko gadigadi lweny mewu woko, man Rwot aye ma owaco." 
Micah5:11 Abikwanyo gaŋiwu ducu ma i lobowu, dok abimuko cel mewu matek-gu ducu;" 
Micah5:12 abikwanyo tim jokjok woko ki i ciŋwu, pe dok wubibedo ki lutyet i kinwu;" 
Micah5:13 abikwanyo cal apaya mewu ki wir jogi mewu ma tye i kinwu, pe dok wubimedde ki guno piny ka woro tic me ciŋwu;" 
Micah5:14 abiputo yadi woko ducu ma wucomo pi woro jok ma dako ma gilwoŋo ni Acera, dok abibalo gaŋiwu ducu." 
Micah5:15 Doŋ i akemo ki kiniga aye abiculo kwedekwor i kom lurok ma yam pe guwinyo 
Micah6:1 Wuwiny gin ma Rwot owaco: Wua, wupid lokwu i nyim godi, wek cere ducu owiny dwanwu." 
Micah6:2 Wun godi, wuwiny daa pa Rwot, ki wun guti me te lobo ducu ma ri nakanaka; pien Rwot tye ki daa i kom jone, en bilaro lok ki jo Icrael." 
Micah6:3 “Wunjona, atimo gin aŋo i komwu? Ceŋ amiyo wuol i gin aŋo? Wudokka iye!" 
Micah6:4 Pien ceŋ akwanyowu ki i lobo Ejipt, dok akokowu ki i ot me opii; kun acwalo Moses i nyimwu kacel ki Aron ki Miriam bene." 
Micah6:5 Wun jona, wupo lok ma Balak kabaka me Moab oporo, ki gin ma Balaam wod pa Beor odokke iye, ki gin ma ceŋ otimme nia i Cittim nio i Gilgal, wek wuŋe kit ma Rwot otiyo kwede pi larowu.”" 
Micah6:6 “Abibino i nyim Rwot ki gin aŋo, ka wek aguŋ i nyim Lubaŋa ma tye malo? Abibino i nyime ki gitum awaŋa, nyo ki roci me mwaka acel acel?" 
Micah6:7 Tika Rwot bibedo ki yomcwiny kom nyogi romi alip, ki dok i kom kulu alip apar ma moo opoŋ i igi? Abimiyo latin kayona pi tim aranyina, ami latinna ma an kikoma aye anywalo pi bal ma i cwinya?”" 
Micah6:8 Rwot doŋ onyutti gin maber, in dano; gin ma Rwot mito ki boti en aye timo tic ma nen atir, ki maro kica, ki wot kacel ki Lubaŋani ki mwolo." 
Micah6:9 Rwot daŋŋe ki dwan maloŋo bot wegi gaŋ, dok bedo me ryeko mada me lworo nyiŋe: “Wuwiny, wun kaka ki wun jo mucokke i gaŋi" 
Micah6:10 Wiya pe twero wil i kom lonyo ma tye i ot pa dano ma latim marac, kacel ki lapim jami ma pe pimo kakare, ma cwinya dag nenone." 
Micah6:11 Myero awek dano ma tye ki mijan marac ma kicaane opoŋ ki kidi me bwola ma pe pimo kakare-ni? 
Micah6:12 Jowu ma gulony gin jo mager mada; jo ma gibedo i gaŋiwu giloko lok goba, lebgi aye kelo lok goba i doggi." 
Micah6:13 Pi meno doŋ acako pwodowu, kun awekowu wudon wi obur ata pi balwu." 
Micah6:14 Jowu gibicamo cam, ento pe gibiyeŋ, kec binekowu; wubikano ento pe wubigwoko, dok gin ma wugwoko abimiyo ki pala lucwan." 
Micah6:15 Wubicoyo kodi, ento pe wubikayo; wubinyono jeituni, ento pe wubiwirre ki moone; wubibiyo olok, ento pe wubimato koŋo vinone." 
Micah6:16 Pien wugwoko cik pa Omri, ki tic ducu me ot pa Akab; kun wulubo tamgi; wek ami gaŋwu odoŋ obur, ki jowu gibibedo me acaya; pi meno wubiciro anywar pa lurok.”" 
Micah7:1 Doŋ aneno can! Pien alokke adoko macalo i kare ma gityeko coko nyig yat me oro, ma doŋ gityeko gwero obot olok, nyige me acama mo doŋ pe, oduro mo ma okwoŋo cek ma cwinya mito pe tye." 
Micah7:2 Dano pa Lubaŋa doŋ guto woko ducu ki i lobo, pe tye ŋat mo ma cwinye atir ki i kin dano; gin ducu gitye ka libo jo me aneka, dano acel acel dwaro ominne ki obwo." 
Micah7:3 Ciŋgi tye i kom gin marac, gimito timone ki cwinygi ducu; rwot ki laŋolkop gipenyo pi lim wil me muŋ, dano madit trto miti marac ma tye i cwinye; kit meno timgi ducu rwatte kacel." 
Micah7:4 Ŋat maber i kingi calo ocok, ŋat ma cwinye atir i kingi calo cel okuto. Nino pa lukur-piny megi, ki me keto can i komgi, doŋ obino; kare me cabbe acaba i tamgi doŋ cok." 
Micah7:5 Pe iket genni i kom lawoti, pe ibed ki gen i kom laremi; gwok dogi i kom ŋat ma buto i kori;" 
Micah7:6 pien latin laco pe keto deyo i kom wonne, latin nyako bene pyem ki minne, ci-wod bene pyem ki daane; lukwor pa dano gin aye jo ma i ode." 
Micah7:7 Ento ki tuŋ bota, abineno bot Rwot, abikuro Lubaŋa lalar mera; Lubaŋana biwinyo lokka." 
Micah7:8 Pe ium i koma, in lakworra; ka apoto, abia; ka abedo i colpiny, Rwot bibedo ceŋ ma menya." 
Micah7:9 Abiciro kiniga pa Rwot, pien abalo i nyime, nio waŋ ma en opido lokka, ka omiya aloyo loko En bikela i ceŋ; abineno lar mere." 
Micah7:10 Lakworra bene bineno, dok lewic bimako ŋat ma yam penya ni, “Rwot Lubaŋani tye kwene?” Abinene ki waŋa ka gitye ka nyone piny, macalo coto ma tye i dye yo." 
Micah7:11 Nino me gero cel gaŋwu bibino! I nino maca gibimedo wan lobowu cito ka mabor. 
Micah7:12 I nino maca gibibino botwu nia ki i Aciria nio wa Ejipt, dok nia ki i Ejipt nio i kulu Euprate, nia i nam ki nio i nam, nia i got dok nio i got." 
Micah7:13 Ento lobo bidoŋ noŋo pi jo ma gibedo iye, pi gin marac ma gin timo. Kica pa Rwot i kom jo Icrael." 
Micah7:14 Kwa joni ki odooni, ai Rwot, ma gin romi ma gimiyi me bedo meri matwal, ma gibedo kengi i buŋa i dye lobo ma ceko cam; wek gikwagi i Bacan ki i Gilead macalo i kare macon." 
Micah7:15 Macalo i kare ma yam wua kwede ki i lobo Ejipt abinyuto botgi jami me aura. 
Micah7:16 Lurok gibineno, dok lewic bimakogi i kom twer megi ducu; gibiumo doggi ki ciŋgi; itgi bidin woko;" 
Micah7:17 gibimoko apwa macalo twol, macalo jami ma mol i wi lobo; gibia ki i kabedogi ma gicelo matek, ma noŋo komgi myel amyela, gibilokke bot Rwot Lubaŋa ki lworo madwoŋ, gibibedo ki lworo i nyimi." 
Micah7:18 Aŋa ma dok Lubaŋa calo in, ma gonyo bal, ma weko bal pa jone kikome ma gudoŋ? Pe moko kinigane bedo matwal, pien cwinye yom i mar mere ma pe lokke," 
Micah7:19 En dok bibedo ki kica i komwa, en binyono balwa piny i te tyene. Ibibolo balwa ducu i kut me namo." 
Micah7:20 In ibinyuto gen bot Yakobo ki mar meri ma pe lokke bot Abraim, macalo ceŋ ikwoŋo bot kwarowa nia i kare macon." 
Nahum1:1 Man lok ma pire tek ma gicoyo ma okemo Nineve; ma Lubaŋa onyuto bot Nakum, ma en dano me Elkoc." 
Nahum1:2 Rwot en Lubaŋa ma lanyeko dok lacullakwor, Rwot culo kwor kun tye ki akemo madwoŋ; Rwot culo kwor i kom lukworre dok kano akemone pi jo ma gin lumonene." 
Nahum1:3 Rwot kiniga pe mako oyot, en tye ki tek madwoŋ twatwal, dok pe kwanyo kop i kom lubalo. Yo me wotte tye i yamo lapiru ki i yamo kot, pol obedo apwa me tyene." 
Nahum1:4 En juko nam, ci piine two woko, en miyo pii ma i kulu ducu dwoŋ woko. Olet ma i Bacan two woko, got Karmel ner bokke woko, ature me Lebanon bene ner woko." 
Nahum1:5 Godi ducu giyeŋŋe ka Rwot onen, cere-gu leny i nyime; piny doŋ noŋo matar ligwek, lobo ki jo ducu ma gibedo iye komgi myel." 
Nahum1:6 Ka ce akemo omako Rwot, aŋa twero cuŋ i nyime? Aŋa ma twero ciro kinigane malyetti? En onyo akemone calo mac, dok ‘muko gweŋ, ŋido woko matitino." 
Nahum1:7 Rwot gire ber, en aye ka kanne i kare me caŋ; dok en ŋeyo jo ma riŋo laro bote." 
Nahum1:8 Ento en bijwero lukworre doki ki lalele me pii ma mol ki teko madwoŋ twatwal; en biryemo lumonene naka wa i colpiny. 
Nahum1:9 Wun jo Nineve wutye ka piro lok aŋo i kom Rwot? En bityekowu woko liweŋ; en biculo kwor kiryo i kom lukworre. 
Nahum1:10 Gibiwaŋogi woko macalo okuto ma okadde, macalo reŋ kal mutwo." 
Nahum1:11 Dano mo nene oa ki i kinwu, ma opiro lok marac i kom Rwot, dok omiyo tam marac bot jo mukene." 
Nahum1:12 Rwot owaco kuman ni, “Kadi bedjo Aciria gitekmagidwoŋ niŋo, gibityekogi woko dok nyiŋgi birwenyo woko matwal. Kadi bed yam aunowu, pe dok abiunowu aye." 
Nahum1:13 Kombeddi abituro okol ma jo Aciria gurwako i ŋutwu abicodo nyor ma gutweyowu kwede bene.” 
Nahum1:14 Man aye cik ma Rwot oketo pi jo Aciria: “Nyiŋwu pe dok biwinnye matwal. Abijwero cal jogi woko liweŋ ki i ot pa lubaŋawu, abikwinyo bur lyel me yikowu, pien konywu doŋ pe.” Lok kom turo gau me Nineve" 
Nahum1:15 Koŋ wunen, tyen ŋat ma kelo lok maber tye i wi godi en tuco lok me kuc. Wun jo Juda, wukwer nino madito, dok wucob kwoŋwu, pien jo maraco pe dok gibimedde lo bino i komwu, pien doŋ gijwerogi woko matwal." 
Nahum2:1 Lanek piny doŋ obino i komwu eno. Wugwok cel me gaŋ maber; wubed ka neno yo; wutwe pyerwu ki del; wubed ma doŋ wuyubbe pi lweny. 
Nahum2:2 Rwot doŋ tye ka dwoko dit bot Yakobo ma rom ki dit pa Icrael, pien luyak onoŋo guyako jamigi ducu girom ki yat ma gibalo jaŋe woko." 
Nahum2:3 Co ma gin twoni oteka lwennye gumako kwodi mubok, askarine ducu guruko boŋo makwar. Gadigadi lwenygi meny calo leb mac ka giryeyogi i tyen aguragura lwenygi loco ŋwec aloca." 
Nahum2:4 Gadigadi lwenygi riŋo ata i dye yo, gimwomme ki ŋwec tuŋŋi ki tuŋŋi i dyekal me gaŋ; gimeny lipilpil calo mac lak raa, gibedo ka mil amila calo lutkot." 
Nahum2:5 Doŋ gityeko lwoŋo ludito ma giloyo lwak, gitye ka paŋŋe apana ki wot ca, girune, gicito i kom cel gogo, kun gumako kwot me lagen komgi," 
Nahum2:6 Yo kulu ducu giyabo woko, jo ma i gaŋ kal pa kabaka cwinygi oballe woko." 
Nahum2:7 Ci-abila gitero i opii, kun anyirane gitye ka kok ma gikumo akuma calo amam, ma gidoŋo korgi ki cwercwiny." 
Nahum2:8 Nineve obedo calo pii dam ma omuk, ma piine mol cito woko liweŋ, Gidaŋŋe ni, “Cuŋ ba! Cuŋ!” ento pe tye ŋat mo ma lokke dwogo cen." 
Nahum2:9 Wuyak ryal, wuyak jabu-gu! Lonyo ma gikano dwoŋ, pe tum, ki jami me wel mabeco ma yomo cwiny dano." 
Nahum2:10 Nineve doŋ gijwero woko odoŋ obur! Cwinygi poto kun coŋgi myel amyela, arem doŋ omako pyer dano ducu waŋgi ducu olwal woko!" 
Nahum2:11 Boro pa labwor tye kwene kaa, ka cam pa litino labwor, ka ma yam labwor tero iye lee ma omako, ka ma ceŋ litinone bedo iye laboŋo ŋat mo ma yelogi?" 
Nahum2:12 Twon labwor yam mako lee kilo woko matitino pi megi labwor ki litinogi; poŋo borone ki lee ma omako, ki riŋo ma okilo oŋido woko." 
Nahum2:13 Rwot me mony owaco ni, Nen, an abedo lakworwu, abiwaŋo gadigadi lwenywu woko ducu, yitone biduny. Dok pala lucwan bene bityeko litino labworwu woko liweŋ; abimiyo lee ma wucamo doŋ tum woko ki i lobo, ki dwan lukwenani bene pe doŋ biwinnye matwal." 
Nahum3:1 Can bipoto i kom gaŋ ma oyo remo pa dano, en gaŋ ma opoŋ ki goba ki jami magiyako, tim me yak pegik ki iye!" 
Nahum3:2 Koŋ wuwiny kit ma del anino cot kwede, ki mor pa lawala, kit ma aguragura pye kwede, kacel ki mor gadigadi ma giriŋo." 
Nahum3:3 Koŋ inen kit ma wegi aguragura gitye ka ŋwec kwede, ma noŋo pala lucwangi meny amenya lipilpil, ki tonigi bene ryeny aryenya! Lwak dano ma guneko, komgi odurre lipim; dano tye ka to medde ameda, dano woto ma giyokke ayoka ki kom jo muto!" 
Nahum3:4 Man ducu tye ka timme pi bit waŋ pa dako ma lakwele-ni, en yomo cwiny co ki timme me yatyat, en aye ma kelo can i kom rok mapol pi timme me kwele kwele, rwenyo jo mapol ki timme me yatyat." 
Nahum3:5 Rwot me mony owaco ni, Nen, an doŋ abipwodo in gaŋ Nineve, abiwalo boŋo woko ki i pyeri aumo ki wii; abimiyo lurok gineni ka doŋ it ye munero, lewic bimaki pien ker ducu bineni." 
Nahum3:6 Abinywano komi ki gin me kwer, dok abitimo tim me cac i komi; abimiyo dano giciko waŋgi i komi." 
Nahum3:7 Jo ducu ma bineni gibijer woko ki boti kun giwaco ni, Nineve odoŋ obur; aŋa ma bikumo pire? En binoŋo jo ma kweyo cwinye kwene?" 
Nahum3:8 In mono iber ikato gaŋ Tebec ma yam tye i ŋet kulu Nail, ma pii orumo woko dyere, kun gwoke macalo cel mere?" 
Nahum3:9 Tek mere yam ocun i kom Etiopia, ki i kom Ejipt ma tekogi onoŋo pe gik; Put ki Libya bene yam gubedo ka konye," 
Nahum3:10 Kadi bed kumeno, jo Tebec yam giterogi woko, giterogi woko i opii; Litinone ducu ginyotogi woko i agikki yo ducu; dok gibolo kwir pi luditogi ma giworo, jo madito ducu gitweyogi woko ki nyor," 
Nahum3:11 In ibimer, dok ibibaŋŋe woko; ibiyenyo ka larre ki i ciŋ lukworri." 
Nahum3:12 Cel gogoni ducu bibedo macalo yat oduro ma nyige pud cek aceka, ka giyeno yatte ci nyige poto piny i dog jo ma camo." 
Nahum3:13 Nen, lulwennyi girom ki mon mamwa. Dogcel me lo boni giyabo malac i nyim lukworri, mac doŋ owaŋo rii me dogcelli woko." 
Nahum3:14 Twom pii, iyub celli obed matek, lukworri gibibino girumi woko; pye i bur lobo inyon lobo, mak bao igo matafali!" 
Nahum3:15 Mac biwaŋi woko ki kunnu, pala lucwan bene bitoŋi woko, macalo bonyo tyeko kwede cam. Wunya wumedde giwu calo bonyo, wunya wumedde calo ocene!" 
Nahum3:16 Imedo lucat-willi doŋ gudoko mapol ma gikato lakalatwe ma i polo. Bonyo-yaro bwome, tuk cito woko." 
Nahum3:17 Rwodini gipol macalo ocene, karani meri gidwoŋ calo lwak bonyo ma gicorre i wi cel i kare ma koyo ŋic. Ka cen doŋ otuc, ci gituk gicito woko; ŋat mo ma ŋeyo ka ma gitye iye pe." 
Nahum3:18 In kabaka me Aciria, lukwatti gunino woko; luditoni me awora guywe woko matwal. Lwakki guket woko ata i wi godi ŋat mo ma romo cokogi kacel pe." 
Nahum3:19 Ret ma giketo i komi pe twero caŋ, waŋ burre odet marac twatwal. Jo ducu ma giwinyo lok man i komi gidoŋo ciŋgi piri ki yomcwiny. Rac ma itimo dikdik-ki peya opoto i kom aŋa?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Man lok pa Lubaŋa ma pire tek ma lanebi Kabakuk oneno," 
Habakkuk1:2 Rwot, imito akok boti pi kare ma rom me ne pi kony, ka wek iwiny kokona? Dok kadi akok boti pi tim bwami, in pe ilarowa." 
Habakkuk1:3 Piŋo imiyo aneno tim maraco kun waŋa neno tim aranyi? To-piny ki bwami guruma woko dyere, lweny ki daa ocakke i kabedo ducu," 
Habakkuk1:4 Pi meno omiyo cik doŋ odoko goro dok gin ma konnye pe, ŋolo kop atir bene doŋ pe. Jo maraco gudiyo jo ma kitgi atir, omiyo ŋolo kop atir doŋ oballe woko." 
Habakkuk1:5 Wuŋi i kin lurok murumowu, wunen; wubibedo ki ur matek twatwal. Atye ka tiyo tic mo i karewu-ni ma pe wubiye ka gitito botwu lacen." 
Habakkuk1:6 Wunen, atye ka kela jo Kaldaya, gin rok mager, ma girune me bino oyotoyot, ma giwoto giŋolo dye lobo arii, wek gimak kabedo pa jo mukene ma pe megi," 
Habakkuk1:7 Gin jo ma kelo lworo ki myelkom madwoŋ; ŋolo kopgi ki rwom me ditogi bedo megi kengi gigi. 
Habakkuk1:8 Aguraguragi dwir makato kwac, giger gikato orudi muwor; luriŋ ki aguraguragi giŋweco gicito anyim ki wakke. Iyo, luriŋ ki aguraguragi gia ki ka mabor; gituk oyotoyot macalo ocur ma Lyanne piny ka ceyo camme." 
Habakkuk1:9 Gin ducu gucorre magwa; dano acel acel bedo ki lworo marac ka gunyiko cok. Gimako opii ina welgi pe kwanne, calo kweyo." 
Habakkuk1:10 Giŋalo luker, ginyero luloc kun gicayogi. Cel gogo ducu ginyero anyera, pien gitoro ŋom i ŋete ci gimako woko oyot." 
Habakkuk1:11 Gikato calo yamo ma kodo, ma gicito mere matwal. Lubalo magi guloko tekkomgi odoko lubaŋagi." 
Habakkuk1:12 Rwot, in ma ibedo tye nia i acakki piny! In Lubaŋana, ŋat Maleŋ, pe wabito. Ai Rwot, in yam iyerogi pi keto can i komwa; in Got, ityeko cikogi me cobo gin ma iŋolo i komwa," 
Habakkuk1:13 In waŋi leŋ, pe romo neno gin marac, cwinyi dag neno jo ma timo dano marac, Piŋo iketo cwinyi ka neno jo ma guŋayo waŋi woko-ni, kun iliŋ aliŋa ka jo maraco gimwonyo jo ma kitgi atir ma katogi?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Iketo dano gubedo macalo rec me nam, macalo gin ma gila k alaka ma rwotgi pe." 
Habakkuk1:15 En yutogi woko ducu ki goli, ywayogi woko ki obwo, ci cokogi i ogwane; cako doŋ myel ki yomcwiny pi rec ma omako." 
Habakkuk1:16 Pi meno en tyero gitum i nyim obwone, waŋo odok eceta i nyim ogwane; pien pi timo kumeno en bedo ki lonyo, dok bedo ki cam madwoŋ," 
Habakkuk1:17 Myero en omedde ameda ki lweny ki pala lucwan, kun neko rok mapol ki nek marac laboŋo kica?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Abicuŋ i kabedona kun akiyo, abiito malo i wi lubele, abikuro wek anen gin ma Rwot bitito bota, ki gin ma abidok iye bote ma kemo ŋurona." 
Habakkuk2:2 Rwot omiya lagam man ni, “Co gin ma ineno; co maber i kom got ma apada ma twero kwanne bene, wek ŋat ma okwano oniaŋ oyotoyot." 
Habakkuk2:3 Ginanyuta man tye kuro kare ma Rwot ociko; en ginanyuta me ada, kare me cobone doŋ cok, tye ka wot oyotoyot mada. Kadi bed nen ni bino motmot, bed ikur; kare man bibino ada, pe dok bigalle." 
Habakkuk2:4 Nen, ŋat ma pe cwinye atir pe bikwo, ento ŋat ma kite atir bibedo kwo pi niyene i kom Lubaŋa, Can ma bipoto i kom jo ma pe kitgi atir" 
Habakkuk2:5 “Kadi bed kumeno, lonyo en gin ma bwolo dano; dano ma lawakke pe biri. En laworo calo lyel; rom ki to dok pe yen. En coko rok ducu pire kene, en guro rok ducu bedo lwakke kikome.”" 
Habakkuk2:6 Gin ducu gibiloko lok agec i kome, ma giŋale ki lok makec kun giwacci, “Ibineno can, in ŋat ma icoko gin ma pe meri ci iduro kacel lipim. Ibibedo ki jami man pi kare ma rom mene? Ibineno can in dano ma icoko jami madwoŋ ma gijeŋo boti pi lim!”" 
Habakkuk2:7 Jo ma gitye ki banyani pe gibia gijemo woko i komi? Jo ma wangi twolo pe gibiburi ki myelkom matek? Ci in ibidoko ginayaka botgi. 
Habakkuk2:8 Pien doŋ iyako rok mapol, rok mudoŋŋe ducu gibiyako in, kit macalo ibedo lanek dano ki latim bwami i lobo, ki i kom gaŋi ki jo ducu ma gibedo iye." 
Habakkuk2:9 Ibineno can, in dano ma inoŋo magoba ki bwami pi konyo ki jo meri, wek iger ki odi malo i wi cere, ka ma gin marac pe twero o iye boti!" 
Habakkuk2:10 In aye ikelo lewic i kom jo ma i odi, pien ineko rok mapol; omiyo ilanyo kwoni nono." 
Habakkuk2:11 Godi ma gigero ki kom ot gibikok matek, ci bao me ri ot ducu gibigamo kokogi." 
Habakkuk2:12 Ibineno can, in ŋat ma igero gaŋ madit kun ibedo ka oyo remo pa dano, ma iketo te guti me gaŋ i kom bal!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Tic ma lurok gitiyo mac biwaŋo woko. Rok ducu gitye ka olo komgi nono pi gin ma konnye pe. Rwot me mony aye omiyo obedo kumeno. 
Habakkuk2:14 Ento lobo bipoŋ ki ŋec me deyo pa Rwot macalo pii ma poŋ i nam 
Habakkuk2:15 Ibineno can in ŋat ma itoyo kinigani i kom luwoti, ma miyo gidoko macalo lumero, wek icik waŋi inen kit ma lewic omakogi kwede!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Ibibedo ki lewic madwoŋ ma ka bedo ki deyo. In kikomi aye myero imati, wek ipaŋŋe ki wot! Ki kopo pa Rwot ma tye i ciŋe tuŋ lacuc bibino boti, ma biloko deyo me locci doko lewic." 
Habakkuk2:17 Bwami ma ityeko timone i kom Lebanon biumi woko lipuk; nek ma ineko ki lee tim bimiyi lworo madwoŋ, man bitimme i komi pi bedo lanek dano ki latim bwami i kom lobo, ki i kom gaŋi ki jo ducu ma gibedo iye." 
Habakkuk2:18 Cal jok apaya tye ki kony aŋo? En gin ma dano opayo, cal nyonyo mamwa, ki lapwony ma lagoba. Kony aŋo ka lapa cal jok keto genne i kom gin ma en otiyo? En cal lubaŋa ma doge oto ma pe loko-ni." 
Habakkuk2:19 Ibineno can, in ŋat ma iwaco ki cal yat ma ipayo ni, “Co woko.” Ki dok bot got ma pe loko ni, “A malo!” Cal meno twero pwonyo dano mo? Nen, gideyo kome ki jabu ki ryal, ento yamo me yweyo pe tye i iye wacel." 
Habakkuk2:20 Ento Rwot tye i ot mere maleŋ; wek jo ducu ma i lobo guliŋ mot i nyime. 
Habakkuk3:1 Lega pa lanebi Kabakuk. 
Habakkuk3:2 Rwot, atyeko winyo pi gin ma itiyo, tic ma itiyo omiya lworo ki myel kom. Dok iti aye i karewa tic madito ma yam ibedo ka tiyogi i kare mukato, wek ticci onene i dye mwaka ducu; bed lakica kadi bed kiniga maki." 
Habakkuk3:3 Lubaŋa obino ki i Teman, Ŋat Maleŋ oa ki i wi got Paran. Deyone oumo pol woko, derone oryeny oromo lobo ducu." 
Habakkuk3:4 En bino ma ryeny calo ceŋ, derone wil a ki i ciŋe; en kano twerone kunnu." 
Habakkuk3:5 En cwalo two gemo i nyime, ka ociko to me lubo kore." 
Habakkuk3:6 I kare ma ocuŋ, lobo oyeŋŋe; ka oneno piny, rok ducu guket woko ata; lacen godi ma ri nakanaka gumuk woko liweŋ, ki cere ma bedo matwal gidik gidonyo piny, ki i yo ma en yam woto iye i kare macon." 
Habakkuk3:7 Aneno kema pa jo Kucan tye ki can’ boŋo kicika pa jo Midian gubaŋŋe woko ducu. 
Habakkuk3:8 Rwot, akemo mono onoŋo omaki i kom kulu, kinigani onoŋo tye i kom kulu? Gwok nyo ibedo ki akemo i kom nam ba, i kare ma irino ki aguragurani, ki i wi gadigadini me kelo loc bot joni?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Doŋ ityeko telo atummi me celo piny, dok juruni opoŋ ki atero madwoŋ. Imiyo kulu obaro i lobo opoko woko." 
Habakkuk3:10 I kare ma godi guneni, guyeŋŋe matek, pii ocako mol ki lalele marac twatwal; pii matut ma i te lobo omor matek, wa biamwonyme ducu oille malo adada." 
Habakkuk3:11 Ceŋ ki dwe gucuŋ mot i kabedogi pi dero me ateroni ma doŋ ibayogi, ki wil pa tonni ma ryeny twatwal-li." 
Habakkuk3:12 Iwoto i dye lobo ki akemo magwa, dok inyono rok woko piny ki kiniga." 
Habakkuk3:13 Icito ka lweny pi laro lwakki, ki pi laro kabakani ma iwiro. Ininyo latel wi jo maraco woko, kun iweke odoŋ munero cakke ki i eme o wa i ŋute." 
Habakkuk3:14 Icobo wi lulwennye woko ki jami lwennyi, ma onoŋo gubino macalo yamo lapiru ma gimito keta woko, gupoŋ ki yomcwiny madwoŋ ma gimito neko lucan woko i muŋ." 
Habakkuk3:15 Inyono nam ki aguragurani, kun iŋolo ki i dye pii matek ma gunnye agunya." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ka awinyo man, ci koma omyel marac, del doga bene omyel pi morre. Cogona ducu oŋo odoko pii keken, noŋo tyena myel amyela ka awoto. At ye ka kuro nino me can mot en nino ma bibino i kom jo ma gulwenyo i komwa-ni." 
Habakkuk3:17 Kadi bed yat oduro pe gituru, ki olok bene pe ginyak, dok yat jeituni bene pe twero ceko ginmo potti ducu pe doŋ ceko cam, kadi bed romi ma i dwol gityekogi woko ma dyaŋi bene doŋ pe i dwol," 
Habakkuk3:18 pud abibedo ki wakke pi Rwot, abinyatte ki yomcwiny madwoŋ pi Lubaŋa lalarra." 
Habakkuk3:19 Lubaŋa, ma en Rwot, aye tek mera; en miyo tyena bedo yot calo tyen til, en bigwoka ka awoto i wi cere-gu." 
Zephaniah1:1 Man lok pa Rwot ma yam obino bot Jepania wod pa Kuci, wod pa Gedalia, wod pa Amaria, wod pa Kejekia i kare pa kabaka Yocia me Juda, wod pa Amon." 
Zephaniah1:2 “Abijwero jami ducu ki i wi lobo,” Rwot ma owaco." 
Zephaniah1:3 “Abijwero dano wa ki lee; abijwero winyo me polo ki rec me namo Abireto jo maraco; dok abityeko dano woko ki i wi lobo,” Rwot ma owaco." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Abiryeyo bada i kom Juda, ki i kom jo ducu ma gibedo i Jerucalem; abijwero jo pa Baal ma gudoŋ woko ki i kabedo man, ki nyiŋ ajwagi me cal jogi bene abiŋolo woko." 
Zephaniah1:5 Dok abityeko jo ma ryebbe piny i wi ot ka woro mony me polo; ki jo ma giryebbe piny ka kwoŋo kwoŋ oot Rwot ma kun kono gikwoŋo ki nyiŋ Milkom; 
Zephaniah1:6 jo ma gudok cen, ma pe gilubo Rwot, ma pe gicito bot Rwot kadi wa penyo doge.”" 
Zephaniah1:7 Wuliŋ mot i nyim Rwot Lubaŋa! Pien nino pa Rwot doŋ tye cok; Rwot doŋ otyeko yubo gitum, dok olonyo welene." 
Zephaniah1:8 I nino ma Rwot bitumo iye gitumme, “Abiketo can i kom luloc ki litino pa kabaka ki i kom jo ducu ma giruko ruk pa rok mukene." 
Zephaniah1:9 I nino meno abiketo can i kom jo ducu ma gikalo larii doggola, jo ma gumiyo bwami ki goba opoŋ i ot pa laditgi.”" 
Zephaniah1:10 “I nino meno,” man lok pa Rwot, “koko biwinnye ki i Dogcel me Rec, koko me can biwinnye ki i dul gaŋ me Aryo, mor piny madwoŋ biwinnye ki i wi cere." 
Zephaniah1:11 Wukok can, wun jo ma wubedo i Pany! Pien lucat-wil doŋ gipe, jo ma pimo lyal doŋ gityekogi woko." 
Zephaniah1:12 I kare meno abiŋiyo Jerucalem ki mac tara, abiketo can i kom jo ma gibedo abeda macalo koŋo yino ma ori, ma atinyane opoto woko, jo ma giwaco ki i cwinygi ni, ‘Rwot pe bitiyo gin maber, dok pe bitimo gin marac.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Jamigi gibiyako woko, odigi bene gibiketogi woko. Kadi bed guger odi, pe gibibedo i igi; kadi bed gupit olok, pe gibimato kono vinone.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Nino madit pa Rwot tye cok, tye cok dok tye ka bino oyotoyot; dwan me nino pa Rwot, dwan magwar, dano matek kok iye ki dwan maloŋo." 
Zephaniah1:15 Nino meno aye nino me akemo, nino me can ki me remcwiny madwoŋ, nino me ninyo ki me balo piny, nino me colpiny ki mutu, nino me pol ki colpiny mapek," 
Zephaniah1:16 nino me koko gwara ki woo me lweny i kom gaŋi ma gicelo matek ki i kom cel ma gigero maboco. 
Zephaniah1:17 Abikelo can i kom dano, ma bimiyo giwoto calo lutowaŋ, pien gubalo i nyim Rwot; gibionyo remogi woko macalo apwa, ki riŋo komgi gibibolo calo cet." 
Zephaniah1:18 Kadi ryalgi nyo jabugi pe bilarogi i nino me akemo pa Rwot. Mac me akemo me nyekone bi waŋo lobo ducu; en bityeko dano ducu ma gibedo i lobo magicel dok oyotoyot. 
Zephaniah2:1 Wubin, wucokke kacel, wun rok ma lewic pe makowu," 
Zephaniah2:2 ma pud peya giryemowu woko macalo cuŋ kail ma yamo tiŋo, ma peya kiniga mager pa Rwot obino i komwu, ma peya nino me akemo pa Rwot obino i komwu." 
Zephaniah2:3 Wuyeny Rwot, wun jo ducu mamwol me lobo man, ma wucobo cikke; wulub kit ma atir wubed ki mwolo; gwok nyo gibibwotowu i nino me akemo pa Rwot." 
Zephaniah2:4 Pien Gaja bidoŋ nono, Acikelon bidoko obur, jo Acidod gibiryemogi woko dyeceŋ, Ekron gibiputo woko." 
Zephaniah2:5 Wubineno can wun jo ma wubedo i dog nam, wun rok me Keret! Lok pa Rwot otikowu, in Kanaan, lobo pa jo Piliciti; abityek i woko nio waŋ ma ŋat mo pe bidoŋ bot i." 
Zephaniah2:6 In dog nam, ibidoko olet, bar pa lukwat ki dwol romi." 
Zephaniah2:7 Lobo dog nam bidoko pa jo Juda ma gudoŋ, gibikwayo romigi iye; gibibuto piny otyeno i odi me Acikelon. Pien Rwot Lubaŋagi biparo pigi, bidwoko gum botgi." 
Zephaniah2:8 “Doŋ awinyo lok aŋec pa jo Moab ki yet pa jo Ammon, kit ma giŋeco ki jona, kun ginyuto wakke i kom lobogi," 
Zephaniah2:9 Pi meno, macalo atye makwo-ni, “Rwot me mony ma owaco, Lubaŋa pa Icrael, “Moab bidoko calo Codom, jo Ammon bidoko calo Gomorra, lobo ma opoŋ ki ayila ki bur kado, ma oballe doŋ matwal. Jona ma gudoŋ biyakogi, jona ma gubwot ki i kin rokka bileyo lobogi.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Man bitimme i komgi macalo adwoggi me wakkegi, pien guŋalo jo pa Rwot me mony dok bene guwakke i komgi." 
Zephaniah2:11 Rwot bikelo lworo madwoŋ i komgi bineko lwak lubaŋa me wi lobo ducu ki kec, lobo pa lurok ducu gibiryebbe piny i nyime, rok acel acel i kabedone." 
Zephaniah2:12 Wun jo Etiopia bene, gibinekowu ki pala lucwanna." 
Zephaniah2:13 En biryeyo ciŋe tuŋ acam, ajwagine gicido gin maleŋ woko, bityeko Aciria woko; en bi loko Nineve doko obur kun otwo calo tim aroo." 
Zephaniah2:14 Lim makwo bibuto i dyere ki lee tim ducu; acut ki coo gibibedo i wir odine; tula bikok ki i waŋ dirica agak bikok i larii doggola; pien tic bao cedar doŋ bigik woko. 
Zephaniah2:15 Man aye gaŋ ma yam nyatte-ni, ma obedo ki kuc, ma oloko kekene ni, “An atye, dok pe tye ŋat mo mukene.” Kit ma en odoko kwede obur, ki boro pa lee tim! Ŋat acel acel ma kato ki i ŋete jwiye kun yeŋo ciŋe ma oŋino-ni." 
Zephaniah3:1 Can bipoto i kom gaŋ ma lajemo, ma oballe woko, dok uno dano!" 
Zephaniah3:2 En pe winyo dwan ŋat mo, Pe ye juk pa ŋat mo, Pe geno Rwot, pe nyiko cok ki Lubaŋane." 
Zephaniah3:3 Ludito ma gitye iye gin twoni labwor ma mor; luŋolkoppe gin orudi me dyewor ma pe giweko gin mo doŋ nio wa odiko. 
Zephaniah3:4 Lunebine gin jo ma wor, jo ma pe genne; gitimo tim bwami me balo cik." 
Zephaniah3:5 Rwot ma bedo iye oporre, pe tiyo gin marac; odiko odiko ducu en ŋolo kop kakare, en pe ken ticce rupiny ki rupiny, ento ŋat ma labal pe ŋeyo lewic." 
Zephaniah3:6 “Atyeko jwero rok mapol; celgi matek odoko obur; atyeko balo yogi woko, ma miyo ŋat mo pe woto iye; gaŋigi odoŋ obur, laboŋo dano, kadi ki ŋat mo ma bedo iye." 
Zephaniah3:7 Awacci, ‘Adada Jerucalem bilwora, biye juk; wiye pe biwil i kom lok ducu ma acike kwede.’ Ento gimedde ameda ki mitkom me balo kit timgi ducu.”" 
Zephaniah3:8 “Pi meno, wukura,” Rwot ma owaco, “wukur nino ma abia iye malo ka dot. Pien amoko tamma me coko rok ducu, ki pi guro ker mapol kacel, wek ata kinigana i komgi, wek akemona malyet-ti otum; pien akemo me nyekona biwaŋo lobo ducu." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Ada, i kare meno abimiyo rok ducu doggi bedo maleŋ, kun giloko lok kakare, wek gin ducu gulwoŋ nyiŋ Rwot, dok guti bote ki cwiny acel." 
Zephaniah3:10 Jo ma gikelo kwacgi bota, jona ma guket woko ata-ni, gibikella motta kun gia ki loka kulu me Etiopia." 
Zephaniah3:11 “I nino meno pe gibiketo lewic i komi pi tim ma ijemo kwede i koma; i ka re meno abikwanyo woko ki i kinwu jo ma yam giŋatte ma gikette malo; pe dok wubimedde ki lyerre i wi gotta maleŋ. 
Zephaniah3:12 Jo mamwol ma lucan abiweko doŋ i kinwu, Gin jo ma gudoŋ i Icrael," 
Zephaniah3:13 gibiyenyo kalarre i nyiŋ Rwot; pe gibitimo gin marac, dok pe gibiloko lok goba; leb ma bwolo dano pe binoŋŋe i doggi. Gibicam, dok gibibuto piny, pe tye ŋat mo ma bimiyogi lworo.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Wuwer ki dwan maloŋo, wun jo Cion; wugo kijira, wun jo Icrael! Wubed ki yomcwiny wuŋatte ki cwinywu ducu, wun jo Jerucalem." 
Zephaniah3:15 Rwot doŋ okwanyo kop woko ki i komwu, dok bene otyeko ryemo lukworwu. Rwot tye i kinwu, en kabaka me Icrael; pe dok wubilworo gin marac." 
Zephaniah3:16 I nino meno gibiwaco ki Jerucalem ni, “Pe wulwor, wun jo Cion; pe wuwek ciŋwu odok nyap," 
Zephaniah3:17 Rwot Lubaŋawu tye i kinwu, en twon oteka lweny ma bikelliwu loc, En bium i komwu ki yomcwiny, pi mar mere botwu en birocowu wudoko manyen, binyuto yomcwiny madit i komwu ki wer maloŋo" 
Zephaniah3:18 macalo i nino madito. “Abikwanyo can woko ki i komwu, wek pe giyetwu pire." 
Zephaniah3:19 Nen, i kare meno abitiyo ticca i kom dano ducu ma yam giunowu. Abilaro luŋolo, dok abicoko jo ma yam giketogi woko, abiloko lewicgi doko pak, ci nyiŋgi biwinnye i lobo ducu." 
Zephaniah3:20 I kare meno abikelowu paco, i kare ma abicokowu kacel. Iyo, abimiyo wuŋene-dok gibipakowu, i kin jo ducu ma gibedo i lobo, i kare ma abidwoko gum botwu kun wuneno ki waŋwu,” Rwot ma owaco." 
Haggai1:1 I mwaka me aryo me loc pa kabaka Dario, i nino dwe acel me dwe me abicel, lok pa Rwot obino bot Aggai, ma myero en otit bot Jerubabel wod pa Cealtiel, ma onoŋo laloc pa jo Juda, ki bot Yocwa wod pa Yekojadak, ma en ajwaka madit, ni," 
Haggai1:2 “Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Rok man giwacci, kare peya oromo me gero ot pa Rwot odoco.”" 
Haggai1:3 Lok pa Rwot obino kun owok ki i dog lanebi Aggai, ma wacci," 
Haggai1:4 “Man aye kare ma myero wubed i odiwu ma wugero wigi mabeconi, ma kun wuneno ot man oket woko?" 
Haggai1:5 Pi meno omiyo, Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Koŋ wutam pi kit kwowu." 
Haggai1:6 Wucoyo kodi madwoŋ, ento wukayo manok; wucamo cam, ento pe wuyeŋ; wumato mat-gu, ento pe romowu; dok wurukke, ento ŋat mo ma kome bedo lyet bene pe; dok ŋat ma camo mucara camo mucara me aketa i kicaa ma tere otuc." 
Haggai1:7 “Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Koŋ wutam pi kit kwowu." 
Haggai1:8 Wuit i wi godi, wukel yadi me gedo, wek wuger ki ot ma yomo cwinya, wek anyut deyona iye, man Rwot aye owaco." 
Haggai1:9 Wubedo ka geno ni wunoŋ cam mabup, ento wucoko manok; dok ka wukelo paco, amiyo rwenyo woko. Piŋo? Man Rwot me mony aye ma openyo, kun dok gamo ni, Pien oda tye ma oket woko, kun ki tuŋ botwu, ŋat acel acel tye ka bolle abola i tic ode." 
Haggai1:10 Meno aye gin mumi yo polo ki malo okwero miyo toyo, dok lobo bene okwero ceko cam." 
Haggai1:11 An bene aciko ni can pii myero obed tye i lobo, ki i kom godi, i kom kal, i kom koŋo vino manyen, i kom moo, ki i kom ginapita ducu ma doŋo i lobo, i kom dano, ki i kom dyaŋi, ki i kom ticgi ducu ma gitiyo,”" 
Haggai1:12 Meno omiyo Jerubabel wod pa Cealtiel, ki Yocwa wod pa Yekojadak, ajwaka madit pa Lubaŋa, kacel ki jo ducu ma gudoŋ, guwinyo lok pa Rwot Lubaŋagi, ki lok pa lanebi Aggai, kit macalo Rwot Lubaŋagi oore kwede; lwak gucako bedo ki lworo i nyim Rwot." 
Haggai1:13 Lacen Aggai, lakwena pa Rwot, otito lok pa Rwot bot lwak ni, “An atye kwedwu, man lok pa Rwot kikome.”" 
Haggai1:14 Rwot otugo cwiny Jerubabel wod pa Ceahiel, laloc me Juda, ki cwiny Yocwa wod pa Yekojadak, ajwaka madit, ki cwiny jo ducu ma gudoŋ; cut gubino ci gucako tic i kom ot pa Rwot me mony, ma Lubaŋagi." 
Haggai1:15 Gin gucako tic i nino dwe pyeraryo wiye aŋwen me dwe me abicel. 
Haggai2:1 I mwaka me aryo me loc pa kabaka Dario, i nino dwe pyeraryo wiye acel me dwe me abiro, lok pa Rwot obino bot lanebi Aggai ni," 
Haggai2:2 “Tit bot Jerubabel wod pa Cealtiel, laloc me Juda, ki bot Yocwa wod pa Yekojadak, ajwaka madit, ki bot jo ducu ma gudoŋ, kun iwacci," 
Haggai2:3 ‘Tye ŋat mo ma pud odoŋ i kinwu ma ceŋ oneno ot man ki deyone macon? Kombeddi wuneno tye niŋniŋ? Pe nen ki i waŋwu macalo gin ma konnye pe? 
Haggai2:4 Kadi kumeno, in Jerubabel, kombeddi myero ibed ki tekcwiny, man lok pa Rwot kikome; bed ki tekcwiny, in Yocwa, wod pa Yekojadak, ajwaka madit; ki wun jo ducu ma wubedo i lobo-ni, wubed ki tekcwiny, man lok pa Rwot kikome; wuti tic, pien atye kwedwu, man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome," 
Haggai2:5 macalo ceŋ acikke kwede kwedwu i kare ma wua ki i Ejipt, Cwiny mera bedo i kinwu; pe wulwor." 
Haggai2:6 Pien Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Odoŋ kare man ok keken, abiyeŋo polo ki lobo, nam ki ŋom mutwo," 
Haggai2:7 Dok abiyeŋo rok ducu, wek lonyo me rok ducu obin iye, ka doŋ abipoŋo ot man ki deyo, man Rwot me mony aye owaco." 
Haggai2:8 Ryal aye mera, jabu bene mera, man lok pa Rwot me many kikome." 
Haggai2:9 Deyo me ot man ma lacen bikato mukwoŋo; dok abimiyo kabedo man bedo ki kuc, man Rwot me mony aye owaco.’ ”" 
Haggai2:10 I mwaka me aryo me loc pa Dario, i nino dwe pyeraryo wiye aŋwen me dwe me aboŋwen, lok pa Rwot obino, kun owok ki i dog lanebi Aggai, ma wacci," 
Haggai2:11 “Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Peny ajwagi wek gugam peny man," 
Haggai2:12 ‘Ka ce dano mo otiŋo riŋo ma gityero gilonyo odoko maleŋ i dog boŋone, ce dog boŋone-nu ogudo kwon, nyo dek, nyo koŋo vino, nyo moo, nyo kit cam mo keken, ci lonyo cam meno doko leŋ?’ ” Ajwagi gugamo ni, “Pe kumene.”" 
Haggai2:13 Aggai dok openyo ni, “Ka ce dano mo ma kome ki keni pi gudo kom dano muto, ogudo gin mo i kin jami magi, gin bene doko gin ma keni?” Ajwagi gudok iye ni, “Doko gin ma keni.”" 
Haggai2:14 Aggai dok owacci, “Lok pa jo man ki lok pa rok ma tye i nyima tye kit meno, man lok pa Rwot kikome. Man bene mako tic ciŋgi ducu; dok gin ma gityero kunnu gin ma keni," 
Haggai2:15 Koŋ wutam pi gin ma bitimme cakke tin. Ma noŋo peya gidodo kidi i wi wadi i ot pa Rwot, yam kwowu obedo niŋniŋ?" 
Haggai2:16 I kare meno ka nar ma obino i odur kal ka ma myero onoŋ iye adita pyeraryo, noŋo ma romo adita apar keken; ka ŋat ma obino i bur koŋo vino pi twomo opoko pyerabic, noŋo opoko pyeraryo keken." 
Haggai2:17 Yam apwodowu, abwaro camwu, amiyo pee ogoyo; ki tic ciŋwu ducu atimo kumeno; ento pe wumedo ki dwogo bota, man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Haggai2:18 Koŋ wutam cakke tin, i nino dwe pyeraryo wiye aŋwen me dwe me aboŋwen cito kwede anyim. Dok wutam, nia i kare ma giketo te guti me ot pa Rwot," 
Haggai2:19 kodi pud tye i dero? Olok, oduro, okwer pomegranat peya ginyak? Cakke tin cito kwede anyim, abimiyowu gum.”" 
Haggai2:20 Lok pa Rwot dok obino bot Aggai tyen me aryo i nino dwe pyeraryo wiye aŋwen ma wacci," 
Haggai2:21 “Tit bot Jerubabel, laloc me Juda, ni, Acok ka yeŋo polo ki lobo," 
Haggai2:22 abituro rok mapol; dok acok tyeko teko me ker pa lurok, abireto gadigadi kacel ki jo ma ŋweco kwedgi, aguragura ki wegigi, ŋat acel acel bipoto piny ma noŋo pala lucwan pa lawote aye oneko." 
Haggai2:23 I nino meno, Rwot me mony ma owaco, abitero in Jerubabel, wod pa. Cealtiel, laticca, Rwot ma owaco, abiloki wek ibed macalo agit ciŋ ma gidiyo me lanyut, pien doŋ atyeko yeri, man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Lok pa Rwot yam obino bot lanebi Jekaria wod pa Berekia, wod pa Iddo, i dwe me aboro, i mwaka me loc pa Dario me aryone, kun wacci," 
Zechariah1:2 “Kiniga yam omako Rwot matek i kom kwariwu," 
Zechariah1:3 Pienno in iwac botgi ni, Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Wudwog bota, an bene abidwogo botwu, man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome," 
Zechariah1:4 Pe wubed macalo kwariwu ma yam lunebi macon gibedo ka tito botgi lok ni, Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, ‘Wuwek kit mewu maraco ki tim mewu maraco ducu.’ Ento yam pe gumedo ki winyone, pe guketo cwinygi i koma, man lok pa Rwot kikome," 
Zechariah1:5 Kwariwu kombeddi gitye wa kwene mono? Ki lunebi gibedo kwo nakanaka ce? 
Zechariah1:6 Ento lokka ki cikka ma con aciko ki luticca ma lunebi pe ceŋ gumako kwarowu i waŋayo? Omiyo gin guŋut kun giwacci, Rwot me mony doŋ otiyo kit ma yam en oyubo kwede pi timowa muporo kitwa ki tim mewa.”" 
Zechariah1:7 Lok pa Rwot con obino bot Jekaria wod pa Berekia, wod pa Iddo, i kom nino dwe pyeraryo wiye aŋwen, i dwe me apar wiye acel, ma gilwoŋo ni Cebat, i mwaka pa Dario me aryone Jekaria ocako wacci," 
Zechariah1:8 “Aneno dano mo i dyewor, ma oyito wi aguragura makwar, ocuŋ kwede i kin yadi ma ŋwecgi kur ma gitye i luŋ; ki tuŋ yo ŋeye onoŋo tye iye lwak aguragura makwar ki ma opilopilo, ki matarre," 
Zechariah1:9 Acako penyo ni, ‘Magi gin aŋo, ladit?’ Ci lumalaika ma onoŋo obedo ka lok kweda-ni owacca ni, ‘Abinyuto kit ma gitye kwede boti.’" 
Zechariah1:10 Dano ma onoŋo ocuŋ i kin yadi ma ŋwecgi kur-ri ocako gamo ni, ‘Magi gin aye lwak jo ma Rwot oorogi ka wirre pi loŋo i lobo ducu.’" 
Zechariah1:11 Gin gucako dwoko lok bot lamalaika ma onoŋo ocuŋ i kin yadi ma ŋwecgi kur kun giwacci, ‘Doŋ watyeko wirre ka loŋo i lobo ducu; nen, i lobo ducu tye mukwe gire mot.’" 
Zechariah1:12 Lacen lamalaika pa Rwot dok openyo ni, ‘Ai Rwot me mony, ibitero kare ma rom mene ma noŋo peya itimo kica ki Jerucalem, kacel ki gaŋi ma i Juda-gu, ma in doŋ ikeco i komgi pi mwaka pyerabiro kulu-ni?’" 
Zechariah1:13 Rwot odok iye ki lamalaika mubedo ka lok kweda-ni, kun wacce lok mabeco me kica bene," 
Zechariah1:14 Omiyo lamalaika mubedo ka lok kweda-ni owacca ni, ‘Tit lok man kun idaŋŋe matek ni, Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Nyeko tye ka maka matek ma kato ducu pi Jerucalem ki pi Cion." 
Zechariah1:15 Kiniga maka matek i kom rok mapol ma gitye ki kuc; pien i kare ma kiniga maka iye manoknok-ki, en aye dok kare ma gin bene gimedo iye lwak can mapol." 
Zechariah1:16 Pienno omiyo Rwot owacci, An doŋ atyeko dwogo cen i Jerucalem ki kica madwoŋ, gibigero iye oda, man lok pa Kwot me mony kikome, doŋ gibicako ryeyo tol me pimo Jerucalem." 
Zechariah1:17 Dok imed daŋŋe ki lok man ni, Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Gaŋina ducu gin mabeco bidurre iye lipim doki, ci Rwot dok bikweyo cwiny Cion ka dok biyero Jerucalem aye.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:18 Atiŋo waŋa malo ci aneno tuŋ lee aŋwen! 
Zechariah1:19 Ci apenyo lamalaika ma obedo ka lok kweda-ni ni, “Magi kit gin aŋo?” En odokka iye ni, “Magi gin aye tuŋ lee ma gukeyo i Juda woko atata, ki Icrael ki Jerucalem bene.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Rwot dok onyutta lutet aŋwen," 
Zechariah1:21 Acako penyo ni, “Jo-nu gubino ka timo kit gin aŋo kaa?” En ogamo ni, “Magi gin aye tuŋ lee ma yam gukeyo i Juda woko atata-ni, omiyo ŋatti mo pe oette ka tiŋo iye wiye. Jo-nu gubino pi miyogi lworo, ki pi reto tuŋ rok ducu woko piny ma yam gutiŋo tuŋgi me twomo ki lobo Juda wek iye oket woko atata.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Atiŋo waŋa malo ci aneno dano mo ma tye ki tol lapim piny i ci;ŋe! 
Zechariah2:2 Dok apenye ni, “In mono ibicito wa kwene kaa?” En owacca ni, “Acito ka pimo Jerucalem, wek anen kit ma lacce tye kwede ki kit ma borre tye kwede.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Lamalaika ma obedo ka lok kweda-ni ocako bino, ki lamalaika mukene bene obino ka rwatte kwede." 
Zechariah2:4 Ci owaco bot lawote ni, “Rin icit wa bot awobi ca iciwacce ni, ‘Jerucalem bibedo apero laboŋo cel murume, pi lwak dano ki lim makwo madwoŋ ma bibedo iye." 
Zechariah2:5 Pien an kikoma aye abibedo macalo cel gogo me mac ma orumogi, an aye abibedo deyone ma nen ki i iye kunnu, man lok pa Rwot kikome.’ ”" 
Zechariah2:6 Wun jo-ni! Wun jo-ni! Wuriŋ, wua woko ki i lobo ma yo tuŋ acam, man lok pa Rwot kikome, pien con aketo iwu woko atata macalo yamo aŋwen me polo, man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Zechariah2:7 Wun jo-ni, wulwi, wuriŋ woko wa i Cion, wun jo ma wubedo i Babilon." 
Zechariah2:8 Pien ŋat ma ogudo komwu noŋo ogudo pal cwiny Rwot me mony, I kare ma en Won Deyo oora bot lurok mapatpat ma yam guyakowu, en Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni," 
Zechariah2:9 “Koŋ wunen ba, abiyeŋo ciŋa i wigi ci gin lurok gibidoko ginayaka pa jo ma yam koŋ gubedo opii-gi. Tim macalo meno bimiyo wuŋeyo ni, Rwot me mony aye muora." 
Zechariah2:10 Doŋ wuwer ki yomcwiny, wun jo Cion; pien nen an doŋ abino ka bedo i dyewu, man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Zechariah2:11 Rok mapol gibiribbe i kom Rwot i nino meno, ci doŋ gibidoko jona. An bene abibedo i dyewu, dok wubineyo ni, Rwot me mony aye muora botwu." 
Zechariah2:12 Rwot bigamo Juda macalo dul ma gipokke ki i lobo maleŋ; en dok biyero Jerucalem aye.” 
Zechariah2:13 Wuliŋ mot i nyim Rwot wun jo ducu, pien en doŋ oco woko ki i kabedone maleŋ." 
Zechariah3:1 En dok onyutta Yocwa, ajwaka madit, ma onoŋo ocuŋ i nyim lamalaika pa Rwot, ma onoŋo Catan bene ocuŋ tuŋ ciŋe malacuc ka doto eno" 
Zechariah3:2 Rwot ocako waco ki Catan ni, “Rwot myero ojuki, in Catan! Rwot ma ceŋ oyero Jerucalem myero ojuki! Man pe en aye dog yen ma gikwanyo woko ki i mac?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Yocwa onoŋo ocuŋ i nyim lamalaika kun oruko boŋŋi ma cilo omakogi marac. 
Zechariah3:4 Lamalaika ocako waco ki jo ma ocuŋ i nyime ni, “Wuluny boŋŋi ma cilo omakogi marac-ci woko ki i kome.” Ka dok owaco bote ni, “Nen, ka doŋ atyeko kwanyo balli woko ki i komi, doŋ abiruki ki ginaruka me deyo.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Dok owaco ni, “Wek gidwal kitambara maleŋ i wiye.” Ci gucako dwalo kitambara maleŋ i wiye, ka dok giruke ki boŋŋi, ma kun lamalaika pa Rwot ocuŋ ka ŋete." 
Zechariah3:6 Lamalaika pa Rwot dok ociko Yocwa matek kun waco ni," 
Zechariah3:7 “Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Ka ce ibilubo yona, kun igwoko lok ma aciko, ci ibiloyo oda, kun igwoko dyekalla bene, dok abimiyi twer me bino wa bota i kin jo ma gucuŋ kanynyi." 
Zechariah3:8 Winy ba, Yocwa, ajwaka madit, in kacel ki luremi ma gibedo piny i nyimi, pien wun aye lanyut ma cimo gin ma bitimme i anyim. Nen, an doŋ abikelo laticca, en aye Jaŋ Yat." 
Zechariah3:9 Pien nen, kidi ma aketo i nyim Yocwa, kidi acel ma tye ki twoke abiro, en aye abigoro coc mere i kome, man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome, dok abikwanyo alii me bal me lobo-ni woko i nino acel keken." 
Zechariah3:10 I nino meno, ŋat acel acel ma i kinwu bilwoŋo lawote wek obin ginywak bedo kwede i te olokke ki i te odurone, man lok pa Rwot kikome.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Lamalaika ma ceŋ obedo ka lok kweda dok obino bota, ocako co na woko, macalo gicoyo ki dano ki i waŋ nino." 
Zechariah4:2 Ocako penya ni, “Ineno gin aŋo?’ Ci agamo doge ni, “Aneno okar mac tara ma kome ducu obedo jabu ki bakul i i wiye, ki tara abiro gicibo i wiye, kun tara acel acel ma gicibo i wiye-ni tye ki doge abiro." 
Zechariah4:3 Yadi jeituni aryo tye i ŋete, acel tuŋ malacuc me bakuli, ki acel mukene tuŋ acam.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Cutcut apenyo lamalaika ma obedo ka lok kweda ni, “Magi gin aŋo kaa, ladit?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Ci lamalaika ma obedo ka lok kweda odokka iye ni, “In pe iŋeyo jami magi?” An dok agamo bote ni, “Pe aŋeyo gira, ladit.”" 
Zechariah4:6 En dok ogamo doga ni, “Man en aye lok ma Rwot owaco bot Jerubabel, ni, ‘Pe ki twer kadi ki teko, ento pi Cwiny mera, man lok pa Rwot me mony k ikome." 
Zechariah4:7 In gin aŋo kaa, in got madit?’ Ibidoko bar i nyim Jerubabel. En bikelo got me wi ot kun dano giwo ni, ‘Gum obed bote, gum obed bote!’’’." 
Zechariah4:8 Lok pa Rwot dok omedde ki bino bota kun wacca ni," 
Zechariah4:9 “Cin Jerubabel doŋ oketo guti me ot man; cine bene aye bityekone, Man bimiyo wuŋeyo ni Rwot me mony en aye muora botwu." 
Zechariah4:10 Pien ŋat ma cayo nino me lok man ok, bibedo ki yomcwiny, dok bene bineno birigi i ciŋ Jerubabel. Magi abiro-ni gin aye waŋ Rwot ma gibedo ka ŋiyo lobo ducu.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Anwoyo penye dok ni, “Ento yadi jeituni ma gitye tuŋ acuc ki tuŋ acam-mi ca kono gubedo gin aŋo?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Ka dok apenye tyen me aryone ni, “Jaŋ yadi jeituni aryo-ni kono gubedo gin aŋo, ma tye i ŋet paipo aryo me jabu ma moo tye ka mol ki i igi-nu?” Ka dok en openya ni, “Pe iŋeyo jami magi?”" 
Zechariah4:13 An adokke iye ni, “Pe aŋeyo, ladit.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Ka en otitta ni, “Magi jo aryo ma gityeko wirogi ki moo ma gicuŋ i ŋet Rwot me lobo ducu.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Ka atiŋo waŋa malo, ci aneno buk adola ma twarre!" 
Zechariah5:2 Lamalaika openya ni, “Ineno gin aŋo?” An adokke iye ni, “Aneno buk adola ma twarre; borre romo futi pyeradek, ki lacce romo futi apar wiye abic.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Ka lamalaika dok owacca ni, “Man en lok me ceno dano, ma woto i lobo ducu, pien gicoyo tuŋ cel ni jo ducu ma kwalo kwo gibiryemogi woko cakke tin, dok gicoyo i tuŋ mukene ni, jo ducu ma kwoŋo kwoŋ me go ba gibiryemogi woko bene cakke tin," 
Zechariah5:4 Doŋ abicwalo buk man me ceno dano me wot woko, wek ocidony i ot pa lakwo ki i ot pa ŋat ma kwoŋo kwoŋ i nyiŋa go ba goba; bibedo i ode kun tyeko woko, kadi wa bao ki godi ducu ma gigero kwede.” Man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome." 
Zechariah5:5 Lacen lamalaika ma obedo ka lok kweda obino owacca-ni, “Tiŋ waŋi malo koŋ inen gin ma tye ka kato woko-ni.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Ka apenye ni, “Man kono gin aŋo?” En odokka iye ni, “Man aduku ma kato woko.” Ka dok owacci, “Man bal ma tye i lobo-ni ducu.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Nen, gitiŋo nyonyo racac mapek ma onoŋo giumo ki doge, ci aneno dako mo onoŋo tye obedo i aduku!" 
Zechariah5:8 Lamalaika owaco ni, “Man aye tim marac.” Odiyo wi dako odwoko i aduku, dok odiro nyonyo mapek ca ocego ki doge woko." 
Zechariah5:9 Atiŋo waŋa dok malo, ci aneno mon aryo ma gitye ka twarre ma gibino kun yamo tye i bwomgi; onoŋo gitye ki bwomgi macalo bwom acebe. Gucako tiŋo aduku gitero i kin lobo ki polo." 
Zechariah5:10 Ka dok apenyo lamalaika ma tye ka lok kweda ni, “Gitero aduku-ni kono kwene?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Lamalaika odokka iye ni, “I lobo me Cinar, wek giger ot pire; ka man doŋ gigero otum, gibicibo aduku i kabedo ma giyubo pire kunnu.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Dok atiŋo waŋa malo, ci aneno gadigadi lweny aŋwen ma gua ki i kin godi aryo; godine onoŋo gubedo godi me mola." 
Zechariah6:2 Gadigadi mukwoŋo tye ki aguragura makwar, me aryone tye ki aguragura macol," 
Zechariah6:3 me adekke tye ki aguragura matarre, ki gadigadi me aŋwenne tye ki aguragura ma ɣubedo abacabac." 
Zechariah6:4 Apenyo lamalaika ma obedo ka lok kweda ni, “Magi gin aŋo, ladit?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Lamalaika odokka iye ni, “Magi gubecito i yamo aŋwen me polo, kun onoŋo gukwoŋo cuŋ i nyim Rwot me lobo ducu."
