Zechariah6:6 Gadigadi ma tye ki aguragura macol-li woto dok mere kemo lobo ma tye tye yo acam, aguragura matarre gicito megi gidok yo tun potoceŋ, ki ma gubedo abacabac-ci giwoto gidok tuŋ lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acuc.”" 
Zechariah6:7 I kare ‘ma aguragura gikatti woko, gurune oyotoyot me cako wotgi me loŋo lobo. Ka doŋ ocikogi ni, “Citu, wuloŋ lobo.” Gin bene guwoto guloŋo lobo." 
Zechariah6:8 En olwoŋa ki dwan maloŋo owacca ni, “Nen gin jo ma gudok i lobo ma tye yo tuu acam gukweyo Cwinya ki i lobo ma tye yo tuŋ acam.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Lok pa Rwot dok obino bota ni," 
Zechariah6:10 “Kwany jo magi ki i kin jo ma yam giterogi i opii, Keldai, Tobiya ki Jedaya, ma doŋ gudwogo ki i Babilon; wot kacel kwedgi nio wa i ot pa Yocia wod pa Jepania," 
Zechariah6:11 Gam ryal ki jabu ki botgi, ci iti kwede lalukana me ker, Rwak lalukana i wi Yocwa wod pa Yekojadak, ajwaka madit." 
Zechariah6:12 Dok ititte ni, ‘Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni. “Nen dano ma nyiŋe Jaŋ Yat ene, En bidoŋo i kabedo ka ma en tye iye, dok en bigero ot pa Rwot." 
Zechariah6:13 En kikome aye bigero ot pa Rwot; en bibedo ki deyo ma porre pi kabaka, bibedo i wi komkerre, ka bicako loyo piny. Ajwaka bicuŋ i ŋet komker mere, niaŋŋe ma kelo kuc bibedo tye i kingi gin aryo.”" 
Zechariah6:14 Lalukana meno bibedo i ot pa Rwot macalo gin me poyo wic bot Keldai, Tobiya, Jedaya ki Yocia wod pa Jepania." 
Zechariah6:15 “Jo ma tye ka mabor gibibino, gibikonyo jo ma gigero ot pa Rwot; meno bimiyo wuŋeyo ni Rwot me mony muora botwu. Man bitimme ka ce wubiketo" 
Zechariah7:1 Lok pa Rwot obino bot Jekaria i mwaka me loc pa kabaka Dario me aŋwenne, i nino dwe aŋwen, me dwe me aboŋwen ma gilwoŋo Kiclev." 
Zechariah7:2 Jo me Betel onoŋo ceŋ guoro Carejer ki Regem-melek kacel ki lwakgi wek gucit ka lego gum ki bot Rwot 
Zechariah7:3 dok bene me penyo ajwagi me or pa Rwot me mony kacel ki lunebi ni, “Myero abed ka koko, dok ari kec i dwe me abic kit macalo yam abedo ka timo kwede pi lwak mwaka mapol-li?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Lok pa Rwot me mony obino bota ni," 
Zechariah7:5 “Peny jo ducu me lobo kacel ki lunebi ni, I kare ma yam wubedo ka ri kec ki ka koko i dwe me abic ki me abiro, pi mwaka pyerabiro ma okato-ni, yam onoŋo wubedo ka ri kec pira?" 
Zechariah7:6 I kare ma wutye ka cam ki ka mat, pe noŋo wucamo dok bene wumato piwu kenwu?" 
Zechariah7:7 I kare ma jo gibedo i Jerucalem, kun gibedo ki kuc, kacel ki i gaŋi ma gurume ducu, ma jo gibedo wa i Negeb bene ki i pwor-gu, pe meno aye lok ma Rwot otito ki i dog lunebi me kare macon?”" 
Zechariah7:8 Lok pa Rwot dok obino bot Jekaria ni," 
Zechariah7:9 “Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Wuŋol kop kakare, wutim ber ki kica ŋat man bot ominne," 
Zechariah7:10 pe wubur da to, latin kic, labedo nyo lacan; pe myero ŋatti i kinwu oyub lok marac ki i cwinye i kom ominne.”" 
Zechariah7:11 Ento gin gukwero winyo, kun gicerre acera;: ma guloko ŋegi, gudiŋo itgi woko ni wek pe giwiny," 
Zechariah7:12 Jo gumiyo cwinygi odoko tek calo got wek pe giwiny cik ki lok pa Rwot me mony ma yam ocwalo ki Cwiny mere Maleŋ ki i dog lunebi me kare macon. Omiyo kiniga madit mada obino ma oa ki bot Rwot me mony," 
Zechariah7:13 “Kit macalo alwoŋogi gin pe guwinya, i kare ma gin bene gilwoŋa, ci an bene akwero winyogi,” man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome." 
Zechariah7:14 “Aketogi woko ki yamo lapiru ma oterogi i kin rok ducu ma yam pe giŋeyo. Kit meno omiyo lobo ma guweko oballe woko, pe tye ŋatti mo ma bedo ka wirre iye, omiyo lobo ma yomo cwiny dano odoŋ obur.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Lok pa Rwot me mony obino bota, kun wacci," 
Zechariah8:2 “An nyeko omaka pi Cion ki twon nyeko mo madwoŋ, an nyeko omaka pire ki twon akemo madwoŋ-gu." 
Zechariah8:3 Rwot owaco kuman ni, Abidwogo wa i Cion, ci abibedo wa i dye Jerucalem, pienno Jerucalem gibilwoŋo ni gaŋ me agena, got pa Rwot me mony, got maleŋ." 
Zechariah8:4 Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Co muti ki mon muti dok gibibedo piny i dye Jerucalem, ki jo muti gibikomo ki tal ma ŋat acel acel omako i ciŋe," 
Zechariah8:5 Yo ducu ma i dye Jerucalem bipoŋ ki awobe ki anyira ma gituko i dye yo. 
Zechariah8:6 Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Ka ce lokke obedo me aura i nyim jo ma gudoŋ i kare man, myero lokke obed me aura wa i nyima bene? Man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome," 
Zechariah8:7 Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, Nen ba, an abilaro jona ki i lobo ma yo tuŋ wokceŋ ki i lobo ma yo tuŋ potoceŋ bene;" 
Zechariah8:8 ci abikelogi gibibedo wa i dye Jerucalem; gin gibibedo jona ki an bene abibedo Lubaŋa megi, me agena ki muporre.”" 
Zechariah8:9 Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, “Jiŋ badwu obed matek, wun jo ma i kare man wubedo ka winyo lok ma lunebi gitye ka waco, nia wa i kare ma gicako keto kwede guti me ot pa Rwot me mony, wek gicak gero iye ot mere." 
Zechariah8:10 I kare ma con ca yam pe giculo mucara ki dano mo, wa pi lee bene pe giculo, dok bene onoŋo kuc pe tye bot dano mo me kato ki me dwogo, pi lumerok; pien onoŋo amiyo ŋat acel acel mon ki lawote." 
Zechariah8:11 Ento i kare man pe doŋ abitimo jo ma gudoŋ-ŋi kit ma yam atimo i kom jo ma con ca, man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome." 
Zechariah8:12 An abimiyo kuc romo kabedo ducu, olok binyako nyige, lobo biceko cam, ki polo bene bimiyo toyo luk i kome; abimiyo jo ma gudoŋ-ŋi camo jami magi ducu." 
Zechariah8:13 Wun jo me ot pa Juda ki me ot pa Icrael, yam nyinwu odoko me lacen dano i kin rok ducu; kombeddi doŋ abilarowu, wek wubed lukel gum i kom jo mukene bene. Pe wulwor, wujiŋ badwu obed matek.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Pien Rwot me mony owaco kuman ni, “Kit macalo yam doŋ ayubbe me timowu marac, nia wa i kare ca ma kwarowu gumiyo akemo omaka, akayo iye laka, Rwot me mony ma owaco," 
Zechariah8:15 kit meno i kare man bene dok ayubbe me timo Jerucalem maber ki ot pa Juda bene; pe doŋ wulwor. 
Zechariah8:16 Man gin ma myero wutim: ŋat man olok lok me ada bot lawote; wuŋol kop me ada i dog gaŋwu, ma kelo kuc i kin dano;" 
Zechariah8:17 pe myero ŋat mo i kinwu oyub lok marac ki i cwinye i kom ominne; pe wumar kwoŋo kwoŋ me goba, pien lok meno ducu cwinya dag matek, man lok pa Rwot kikome.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Lok pa Rwot me mony obino bota, kun waco ni," 
Zechariah8:19 “Ri kec me dwe me aŋwen, ki ri kec me dwe me abic, ki ri kec me dwe me abiro, ki ri kec me dwe me apar, gibibedo nino madito me yomcwiny ki kwe ic pi ot pa Juda, ki me karama me yomcwiny; pienno wumar ada ki kuc." 
Zechariah8:20 “Rwot me mony owaco ku man ni, Rok mapatpat pud gibimedde ki bino, wa jo ma gibedo i gaŋi mapol-gu;" 
Zechariah8:21 jo ma gibedo i gaŋ acel gibiwot i gaŋ mukene, kun giwacci, ‘Wubin wacitu ka lego gum bot Rwot, waciyenyu Rwot me mony; an doŋ abecito.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Rok mapol ki rok matego gibibino i Jerucalem ka yenyo Rwot me mony ki me lego kica bote. 
Zechariah8:23 Rwot me mony owaco ku man ni, I kare meno jo apar ma gua ki i lwak rok ma lebgi patpat gibimako dog kanyi pa Lajudaya, kun giwacci, ‘Wek wanywak wot kwedi, pien wawinyo ni Lubaŋa tye kwedwu.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Lok ma pire tek Lok pa Rwot opoto i lobo Kadrak, ci bipye i kom Damaciko, Pien gaŋi ma i Aram gitye i ciŋ Rwot, kacel ki kaka me Icrael ducu mere;" 
Zechariah9:2 Kamat bene ma tye i waŋ apokki lobone, Turo ki Cidon bene, kadi bed giryek mada." 
Zechariah9:3 Turo ogero celle pire kene gire, oguro ryal oyido malo calo kweyo, ki jabu bene macalo daba ma i gudo." 
Zechariah9:4 Ento, nen ba, Rwot biyako jamine woko, bicoro lonyo mere ducu i nam, en Turo kikome gibiwaŋo ki mac." 
Zechariah9:5 Acikelon bineno, dok lworo bimake; Gaja bene bineno, ci biminne i arem; Ekron bene kit meno, pien lewic bi make i genne. Kabaka birwenyo woko ki i Gaja; Acikelon bidoŋ noŋo laboŋo dano mo." 
Zechariah9:6 Likwayo pa lurok ata gibibedo i Acidod; abigiko wakke pa lobo Piliciti. 
Zechariah9:7 Abikwanyo remo mere woko ki i doge, cam me gipyeda ma en camo abikwanyo woko ki i kin lake; gibidoko jo ma gudoŋ pi Lubaŋawa; gibidoko macalo kaka ma tye i Juda, Ekron bidoko calo jo Jebuc." 
Zechariah9:8 Abiguro kemana i ŋet oda macalo lakur-piny, wek ŋat mo pe obed ka kato ki i ŋete; ŋat mo ma burogi pe dok bidonyo i kingi, pien kombeddi an kikoma aye aneno ki waŋa." 
Zechariah9:9 Wubed ki yomcwiny madwoŋ, wun jo Cion! wugo kijira, wun jo Jerucalem! Wunen ka kabakawu bino botwu; ki waya me loyo lweny, kun obedo wi kana ki mwolo, i wi latin kana," 
Zechariah9:10 Abijwero gadigadi lweny woko ki i Epraim, ki aguragura lweny ki i Jerucalem, atum me lweny ducu gibiturogi woko. En aye bitito lok me kuc bot rok ducu; kerre biloyo piny nia i nam tuŋcel nio i nam mukene, kun a ki i kulu Euprate o wa i agikki lobo." 
Zechariah9:11 Ki tuŋ boti bene, an aketo remo me gicikke wan kwedi, abiwoto joni ma giterogi i opii ki i bur ma pii pe iye." 
Zechariah9:12 Wudok cen wa i cel gogowu, wun lumabuc ma tye ki gen, tin atuco atir ni abiculo waŋe kiryo." 
Zechariah9:13 Pien doŋ atyeko gomo Juda macalo atum; aketo Epraim odoko aterone. Abitugo kin awobewu wun jo Cion, i kom awobewu, wun jo Grik, abitinowu macalo oteka lweny ma mako pala lucwan." 
Zechariah9:14 I kare meno Rwot binen lamalo kawigi, aterone biwil macalo lutkot, ci Rwot Lubaŋa bikuto tum matek, biwot ki yamo lapiru ma tuŋ acuc." 
Zechariah9:15 Rwot me monyaye bigwokogi, gibiteŋo lataŋdiyo ma gicelo woko, gibinyono lacelone woko piny; gibimato remogi macalo koŋo vino, ci gibiyeŋ macalo becen mupoŋ, calo remo ma gicoro i gul keno tyer," 
Zechariah9:16 I nino meno Rwot Lubaŋa bilarogi macalo romine, pien gin jone; macalo litino kidi me wel ma ryeny i kom lalukana gibibedo ka ryeny i lobone kit meno." 
Zechariah9:17 Berre ki mwonyane dit ma rom mene! Kom awobe bibedo bulubulu pi kal agwe, ki kom anyira bibedo bulub" 
Zechariah10:1 Wugat kot ki bot Rwot i potokot, ka wugat bote i dye cwir, wek oa ki bot Rwot ma miyo pol mapek, ma miyo kot ma ŋido i lobo, ka dok miyo dek twi i poto pa dano ducu," 
Zechariah10:2 Pien cal jogi-gu giloko lok ma konnye pe, ki lutyet gineno gin ma bwolo dano, jo ma leko gitito lek me goba, gikweyo cwiny dano nono. Omiyo lwak gilak ata macalo romi; gineno can pien lakwatgi pe," 
Zechariah10:3 “Kinigana olyetto twatwal i kom lukwat, abiketo can i kom lutel-wic; pien Rwot me mony paro pi romine, ma en aye ot pa Juda, bilokogi gidoko calo aguragurane ma wakke i lweny." 
Zechariah10:4 “Got me twoke bia i kingi, teke me guro kema bene bia ikomgi, atum me lweny bene bia i komgi, dok luloc ducu bene gibia i komgi." 
Zechariah10:5 Gin ducu gibibedo macalo oteka lweny, kun ginyono lukwor piny i daba ma i dye yo; gibilweny pien Rwot tye kwedgi, gibimiyo lewic mako jo ma giriŋo ki aguragura." 
Zechariah10:6 “Abimedo tek bot jo me ot pa Juda, dok abilaro ot pa Yucepu. Abidwokogi cen pien kica omaka i komgi, gibibedo macalo jo ma yam pe akwerogi, pien an a Rwot Lubaŋagi, abigamo doggi." 
Zechariah10:7 Erpaim bidoko macalo twon oteka lweny, cwinygi bibedo yom calo lumat koŋo vino. Litinogi binenone, ci yomo cwinygi, gibibedo ki yomcwiny i kom Rwot." 
Zechariah10:8 “Abilwoŋogi ki lwiyo kun acokogi kacel, pien doŋ atyeko kokogi, gibibedo mapol kit ma ‘yam con ca." 
Zechariah10:9 Kadi bed akeyogi woko i kin lurok, ento gibipo pira ki i lobo ducu ma tye ka mabor, gin kacel ki litinogi gibibedo kwo, dok gibidwogo." 
Zechariah10:10 Abidwokogi paco ki i lobo Ejipt, dok abicokogi woko ki i Aciria, abikelogi wa i lobo me Gilead ki Lebanon, nio waŋ ma kabedo biremogi woko." 
Zechariah10:11 Gibiŋolo ki i dye nam me Ejipt, gibigoyo biamwonyi ma tagge i nam, kut ducu ma i kulu Nail bitwo woko, Gibijuko wakke pa jo Aciria woko, odoo ker me Ejipt birwenyo." 
Zechariah10:12 Abimiyo gibedo matek i Rwot, gibinyatte ki wot i nyiŋe,” man lok pa Rwot kikome." 
Zechariah11:1 Yab doggolani, in Lebanon, wek mac owaŋ yadi cedami woko!" 
Zechariah11:2 Kok ba, in ciprec, pien yat cedar doŋ gireto woko piny, pien yadi mabecone doŋ guballe woko! Wukok ba, wun kworo me Bacan, pien buŋa muculle doŋ gijwero woko!" 
Zechariah11:3 Koŋ doŋ iwiny koko pa lukwat, pien deyogi doŋ peke! Koŋ iwiny mor pa labwor-gu, pien yadi mukadde i dog Jordan doŋ pe!" 
Zechariah11:4 Rwot Lubaŋana owaco kuman ni, “In myero idok lakwat romi ma gipitogi me aneka." 
Zechariah11:5 Jo ma giwilo romi ginekogi ento pe giketo can mo i komgi, Jo ma gicato romi giwacci, ‘Gipwo Rwot pien doŋ adoko lalonyo’; wa lukwatgi bene kica pe makogi i komgi." 
Zechariah11:6 Pien kica dok pe bimaka i kom jo ma gibedo i lobo-ni, man lok pa Rwot kikome. Nen, abimiyo ŋat acel acel poto i ciŋ lakwatte, dok ŋat acel acel bipoto i ciŋ kabakane; gibibalo lobo, giweko doŋ noŋo, pe abilaro dano mo ki i ciŋgi.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Kit meno adoko lakwat pi lukwat romi ma giwilogi me aneka-ni. Akwanyo odoo aryo, ci acako nyiŋ acel ni Kica, ki mukene acako nyiŋe Ribbe, Ci acako kwayo romi," 
Zechariah11:8 Yam aneko lukwat meno adek-ki i dwe acel. Ento onoŋo pe doŋ atwero diyo cwinya i komgi, ki gin bene igi doŋ okwera woko." 
Zechariah11:9 Lacen awaco ni, “An gira pe abibedo lakwatwu. Romi ma myero oto, wek oto; romi ma myero gineki, wek gineki, ka wek mudoŋŋe, ŋat acel acel omwod riŋo kom lawote.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Ka akwanyo odoona ma nyiŋe Kica, ci aturo woko, kun aturo kwede gicikke ma nene acikke kwede ki rok ducu," 
Zechariah11:11 Kit meno gicikke-nu gituro woko i nino meno; lucat romi ma gubedo ka nena, guŋeyo ni meno obedo lok pa Rwot." 
Zechariah11:12 Ka doŋ awaccigi ni, “Ka ce wuneno ni ber, wumiya mucarana; ka kono pe, wuwek obedi.” Ci gupimo cekel pyeradek me ryal me mucarana." 
Zechariah11:13 Rwot ocika ni, “Bol i ot me kano lim,” en lim ma gin gucula kwede i wel maber twatwal-li. Kit meno atero cekel pyeradek-ku abolo ‘i ot kano lim ma i ot pa Rwot." 
Zechariah11:14 Lacenne dok aturo odoo me aryone, ma’ nyiŋe Ribbe-ni, kun bene aturo kwede ribbe ma tye i kin Juda ki Icrael." 
Zechariah11:15 Rwot dok ocika ni, “Dok igam jami tic pa lakwat ina konnye pe-ni." 
Zechariah11:16 Pien nen, abeyero lakwat mo ki i lobo-ni ma pe biparo pi romi ma gito gitum woko-ni, pe bene biyenyo romi ma rwenyo, dok pe bicano romi ma olimo ret, kadi pita gin ma komgi yot, ento en bimwodo riŋo pa romi ma ocwe-ne, kun yeco riŋo wa i oboŋ tyengi ducu." 
Zechariah11:17 “Lakwatta ma konnye pe bineno can, ma weko romi mere ata! Pala lucwan myero oton bade, dok ocob waŋe malacuc! Wek bade otal woko matwal, ki waŋe malacuc bene myero oto woko libok!”" 
Zechariah12:1 Lok ma pire tek. Man lok pa Rwot i kom Icrael: Rwot ma cen oryeyo polo, dok oketo guti me te lobo, ma oketo cwiny dano i i dano, owaco kuman ni," 
Zechariah12:2 “Nen acok miyo Jerucalem doko kikopo ma mero rok ducu ma tye i ŋete, I Juda bene lukwor gibirumo Jerucalem," 
Zechariah12:3 I nino meno abimiyo Jerucalem bedo got mapek twatwal bot rok ducu; jo ducu ma gibitiŋo gibilimo ret marac. Rok ducu me wi lobo biribbe kacel me lweny i kome. 
Zechariah12:4 I nino-nu abibano kom aguragura ducu, ki jo ma riŋo kwedgi gibidoko lupoya. Ento abiyabo waŋa i kom ot pa Juda i kare ma abicoro waŋ aguragura pa lurok ducu." 
Zechariah12:5 Ka doŋ kaka me Juda bilok i cwinygi kekengi ni, ‘Jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem gitye ki tek ma oa bot Rwot me mony ma Lubaŋagi.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “I nino meno abimiyo kaka me Juda bedo macalo otako ma mac tye ka lyel iye i dye yen, nyo macalo mac raa ma lyel i kin ren kal. Gibiwaŋo rok ducu ma tye i ŋetgi, ma tye tuŋ lacuc ki tuŋ lacam, ento Jerucalem pud bidoŋ kakare kun jo mere gibedo iye." 
Zechariah12:7 “Rwot bikwoŋo miyo loc i kema pa Juda, wek deyo me ot pa Daudi ki deyo pa jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem pe obed dit makato pa Juda," 
Zechariah12:8 I nino meno Rwot bigeno jo ma bedo i Jerucalem ki kwot, mi yo dano magoro i kingi bibedo calo Daudi, ki ot pa Daudi bibedo calo Lubaŋa, macalo lamalaika pa Rwot ma telo nyimgi," 
Zechariah12:9 Doki nino meno abiketo tek me jwero rok ducu ma gibino ka lweny i kom Jerucalem. 
Zechariah12:10 “Abionyo cwiny me kica ki cwiny me bako dog i kom ot pa Daudi ki i kom jo ma bedo i Jerucalem, wek ka gineno ŋat ma gicobo, ci gikum pire, macalo ŋat ma kumo pi latinne acel keken ma en onywalo, kun kok matek macalo dano ma koko latin kayo." 
Zechariah12:11 I nino meno kumo bibedo dit twatwal i Jerucalem ma rom ki kumo pi Adad-rimmon i bar me Megido. 
Zechariah12:12 Lobo bikumo, kun jo me doggola acel acel kumo pigi kengi; jo me ot pa Daudi pat kun noŋo mongi bene kumo pat; jo me ot pa Natan pat kun mongi bene kumo pat;" 
Zechariah12:13 jo me ot pa Levi pat kun mongi bene kumo pat; jo me doggola pa Cimei pat kun mongi bene kumo pat. 
Zechariah12:14 Ki jo ducu me doggola mukene ma gudoŋ, acel acel bikumo pigi kengi, kun mongi bene gikumo kengi pat." 
Zechariah13:1 “I nino meno gibituco waŋ it pi jo me ot pa Daudi kacel ki pi jo ma gibedo i Jerucalem, wek gilwok bal ki keni ducu woko ki i komgi." 
Zechariah13:2 “I nino meno, man lok pa Rwot me mony kikome, abiŋolo nyiŋ cal jogi ducu woko ki i lobo, wek wi dano pe dokopo i komgi; dok bene abikwanyo lunebi kacel ki cen maraco woko ki i lobo." 
Zechariah13:3 Ka ce ŋat mo pud tito lok macalo lanebi, ci wonne ki minne ma gunywale gibiwacce ni, ‘Pe ibibedo kwo, pien iloko lok me goba i nyiŋ Rwot’; ci wonne ki minnema gunywale gibicobe woko pil ka ce en bitito lok macalo lanebi." 
Zechariah13:4 I nino meno lewic bimako lanebi acel acel pi ginanyutane ma en tito pire macalo lanebi. En pe biruko boŋo ma obedo yer yer me bwolo jo," 
Zechariah13:5 ento en biwaco ni, ‘An gira pe lanebi, an abedo lapur poto, pien poto man obedo mera ocakke wa ka tinona.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Ka ŋat mo openye ni, “Lwak bur ma tye i ŋeyi-ni kono, gin aŋo mutimo?” En bidok iye ni, ‘meno ducu ret me waŋ odoo ma gigoya kwede ki i ot pa lurema.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 “In pala lucwan, co woko lweny i kom lakwatta i kom dano ma ocuŋ ka ŋeta,” man Rwot me mony aye owaco. Go lakwat, wek romi guket woko ata. Abicwalo ciŋa wa i kom jo matinone." 
Zechariah13:8 I lobo man ducu, man Rwot aye owaco, dul jo aryo me adek gibinekogi woko, acel me adekke aye bidoŋ makwo." 
Zechariah13:9 Dul man me acel me adek abiketo imac, abiliyo kit ma dano liyo ki ryal, abitemogi kit ma dano temo ki jabu. Gibilwoŋo nyiŋa, ci abigamo doggi. Abiwacci, ‘Gin aye jo mera’; gin gibigamo ni, ‘Rwot en aye Lub" 
Zechariah14:1 Nen ba, nino pa Rwot tye obebino, ma jami ma onoŋo giyako ki botwu gibipokogi woko i kinwu." 
Zechariah14:2 Pien abicoko rok ducu kacel ka lweny i kom Jerucalem. Gibimayo gaŋ woko, gibiyako odi, gibimako mon gibuto kwedgi tektek, nucu jo ma i gaŋ gibiterogi woko i opii, ento jo mukene ma gudoŋ pe gibiryemogi woko ki i gaŋ," 
Zechariah14:3 Lacenne Rwot bicito ka lweny i kom rok meno ducu, kit ma lwenyo i nino me lweny." 
Zechariah14:4 I nino meno tyene bicuŋ i wi got me Jeituni, ma tye i nyim Jerucalem tuŋ wokceŋ; got me Jeituni bibarre iye aryo, cakke ki tuŋ wokceŋ dok kwede tuŋ potoceŋ, kun weko luŋ malac twatwal. Nucu got tuŋ cel bidok tuŋ acam, ki nucune mukene-ni bidok tuŋ acuc." 
Zechariah14:5 Luŋ me godina bitorre woko, pien luŋ me godi biwok ki i ŋete. Wubirino macalo ceŋ wuriŋo oyeŋyeŋ i kare pa kabaka Ujia me Juda. Lacenne Rwot Lubaŋawu bibino kacel ki jo mere maleŋ ducu." 
Zechariah14:6 I nino meno ŋico ki koyo bibedo pe. 
Zechariah14:7 Piny bibedo dyeceŋ nakanaka, Rwot ŋeyo man, pe dyeceŋ kadi dyewor, pien i otyeno ceŋ biryeny." 
Zechariah14:8 I nino meno pii makwo bimol kun a ki i Jerucalem, nucune bimol cito i nam ma tye tuŋ wokceŋ ki nucune mukene mol cito i nam ma tye tuŋ potoceŋ; bibedo ka timme kumeno i oro kit macalo timme kwede i cwir." 
Zechariah14:9 Rwot bidoko kabaka ma loyo lobo ducu. I nino meno Rwot bibedo acel kun nyiŋe bene bedo acel. 
Zechariah14:10 Lobo ducu bidoko bar, cakke i Geba o wa i Rimmon ma tye i ŋet Jerucalem yo tuŋ acuc. Ento Jerucalem bidoŋ ma odyedde kakare cakke ki i dogcel pa Benjamin o kwede wa i dogcel macon, nio i dogcel ma i twok gaŋ, ki dok cakke i lubele ma gilwoŋo Kananel o wa i bur ka ma gibiyo iye pig olok pa kabaka." 
Zechariah14:11 Dano bibedo iye, pien pe dok gibidyero me ajwera woko. Jerucalem doŋ dano bibedo iye ki kuc." 
Zechariah14:12 Man bibedo two gemo ma Rwot bipwodo ki rok ducu ma ywayo mony i kom Jerucalem: riŋo komgi bitop ma noŋo pud gicuŋ ki tyengi, wangi bitop woko ki i opoko waŋgi, ki lebgi bitop ki i doggi." 
Zechariah14:13 I nino meno, atiba madwoŋ ma oa ki bot Rwot bibaŋo komgi woko, man bimiyo ŋat acel acel bimako ciŋ lawote, ci doŋo lawote ki ciŋe, Ci bimiyo ŋat acel acel tiŋo ciŋe i kom lawote." 
Zechariah14:14 Koŋ inen, kadi Juda bene bilweny i kom Jerucalem. Gibicoko lonyo pa rok ducu ma tye i ŋete, macalo jabu, ryal ki ginaruka mapol ata." 
Zechariah14:15 Kit gemo macalo man bipoto i kom aguragura, kana, kinaga, ki i kom loo ducu ma i gony meno." 
Zechariah14:16 Ŋat acel acel ma obwot ki i kom rok ducu ma gubino ka lweny i kom Jerucalem, bibedo ka wot i Jerucalem mwaka ki mwaka ka woro Kabaka, ma en Rwot me mony, ki pi kwero nino madito me bolo." 
Zechariah14:17 Ka ce jo me kaka mo me wi lobo pe bicito i Jerucalem ka woro Kabaka, Rwot me mony, kot pe bicwe botgi." 
Zechariah14:18 Ka ce jo me doggola me Ejipt pe ocito, ma pe onen kunnu, gemo ma yam Rwot ouno ki rok ma pe gucito ka kwero nino madito me bolo-ni bipoto i komgi." 
Zechariah14:19 Man aye kit ma gibiculo ki bal me Ejipt, ki kit ma gibiculo ki bal pa rok ducu ma pe gucito ka kwero nino madito me bolo." 
Zechariah14:20 I nino meno gibigoro coc i kom olaŋ pa aguragura ni, “Maleŋ pi Rwot.” Agulu ma tye i ot pa Rwot bibedo macalo becen ma tye i nyim keno tyer," 
Zechariah14:21 Agulu ducu ma tye i Jerucalem ki Juda gibikwerogi bedo maleŋ pi Rwot me mony, wek jo ducu ma gityero gitum bot Lubaŋa gubin gukwany ki i kingi, guted ki riŋo lee ma gityero bot Lubaŋa, Lacat-wil mo pe dok binen i ot pa Rwot me mony i nino meno." 
Malachi1:1 Man lok ma pire tek ma Rwot oloko bot jo Icrael ma Malaki otito. 
Malachi1:2 “Doŋ atyeko marowu,” man Rwot aye owaco. Ento wun wuwacci, “In ityeko marowa niŋniŋ?” Rwot ogamo ni, “Ecau pe omin Yakobo? Ento yam amaro Yakobo" 
Malachi1:3 akwero Ecau; abalo lobone ma obedo gotgot, dok amiyo lobo ma en oleyo bot too me tim.”" 
Malachi1:4 Ka jo Edom guwacci, “Giŋinyowa woko piny, ento wabigedo odoco i wi obur,” Rwot me mony odok iye ni, “Gwok nyo gibigero gaŋi, ento an abireto odigi ducu woko piny, nio waŋ ma gibilwoŋo ni, lobo pa lubalo, ki jone gibilwoŋo jo ma kiniga bimako Rwot i komgi nakanaka.”" 
Malachi1:5 Wubineno man ki waŋwu, dok wubiwaco ni, “Rwot dit, wa i ŋe apokki waŋ lobo me Icrael.”" 
Malachi1:6 “Latin woro wonne, ki opii woro laditte. Ka an a wonwu, piŋo pe wuwora? Ka an ladit, ci piŋo pe wulwora? Man: lok ma Rwot me mony aye oloko botwu, wun ajwagi, ma wucayo nyiŋa. Wuwaco ni, ‘Wacayo nyiŋi niŋniŋ?’" 
Malachi1:7 Pi tyero cam me kwer i wi keno tyerra, Dok wuwaco ni, ‘Watimo tim me kwer iye niŋniŋ?’ Kun wutamo ni meja pa Rwot myero obed gin acaya." 
Malachi1:8 Ka wutyero lee ma waŋgi oto me gitum, meno pe bal? Dok wutyero gin ma oŋol nyo ma two, meno pe bal? Ka wumiyo meno bot laloc mewu, cwinye bibedo yom i komwu? Dok bitimowu ber? Man lok ma Rwot me mony aye oloko." 
Malachi1:9 Doŋ kombeddi wukwa kica pa Lubaŋa, wek otimwa ber. Ki ka wukelo mot macalo meno bote, en binyuto ber mere bot ŋat mo i kinwu? Man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi1:10 Kono onoŋo tye ŋat mo i kinwu ma bieego doggola, wek pe wumok mac i keno tyer mera nononono! Cwinya pe yom i komwu, dok pe abigamo gityer ki i ciŋwu. Man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi1:11 Pienno wuŋe ni cakke tuŋ wokceŋ nio tuŋ potoceŋ nyiŋa dit i kin lurok, dok i kabe do acel acel giwaŋo iye gin ma ŋwece kur, pi nyiŋa, ki gityer maber ma myero; pien nyiŋa dit i kin lurok, man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi1:12 Ento wun wupyedo nyiŋa, ka wuwaco ni, meja pa Rwot odoko gin me kwer, dok kadi wa cam ma wutyero iye wucayo acaya." 
Malachi1:13 Dok wun wuwaco ni, ‘Nen, gin man olo dano rom kwene!’ Dok bene wujwiya, man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco. Wukelo gin ma gimayo tektek, nyo ma oŋol, nyo gin ma two, wukelo macalo gityerwu, Abigamo gityer ma kit meno ki i ciŋwu? Man lok ma’ Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi1:14 Ŋat ma laram myero gicen, ka tye ki nyok i kin romine, kun kwoŋo ni ebityero, ento tyero bot Rwot gin ma roc tye i kome; pien an kabaka madit, nyiŋa bene gilworo i kin lurok. Man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi2:1 “Doŋ koni wun ajwagi, cik man tye piwu." 
Malachi2:2 Ka pe wubiwinyo, ka pe wubiketo cwinywu iye pi miyo deyo i nyiŋa, miyo abicwalo can i komwu, dok abiceno gum mewu; adada doŋ atyeko ceno, pien pe wuketo iye cwiny, wu. Man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi2:3 Nen, abijuko likwayowu, dok abipuyo waŋwu ki wee, en wee me gitum mewu, abiryemowu woko ki i nyima." 
Malachi2:4 Kit meno wubiniaŋ ni ceŋ acwalliwu cik man, wek cikkena ki Lulevi omok matek, man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi2:5 Cikkena ma acikke kwede ki gin yam obedo cikke me kwo ki me kuc. Amiyo botgi wek gubed ki lworo; ci gulwora, gubedo ki woro i nyiŋa," 
Malachi2:6 Gibipwonyo lok me ada, pe ginoŋo bal mo i doggi. Yam gibedo kweda ki kuc, kun cwinygi tye atir, gumiyo jo mapol gulokke guweko timo bal." 
Malachi2:7 Ajwaka myero opwony dano guŋe Lubaŋa, dano myero guyeny pwony ma a ki i doge, pien en lakwena pa Rwot me mony." 
Malachi2:8 Ento wun wuweko yo-meno; wumiyo jo mapol gigatte pi pwony mewu; wubalo bene gicikke ma yam acikke kwedwu, man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi2:9 Pi meno amiyo wubedo me acaya dok mayot i nyim jo ducu, pien pe wulubo yona, ento wuyeko kin dano i pwony mewu.”" 
Malachi2:10 Wan ducu pe wonwa acel? Pe Lubaŋa acel-li aye ma ocweyowa? Piŋo dok ŋat acel acel i kinwa bwolo ominne, kun wapyedo gicikke ma Lubaŋa oketo i kin en ki kwarowa?" 
Malachi2:11 Jo Juda guŋayo waŋ Rwot, ci gutimo gin me kwer i Icrael ki i Jerucalem; pien jo Juda gupyedo kabedo maleŋ pa Rwot ma en maro, gunyomo anyira pa jo ma giworo lubaŋa me rok mukene." 
Malachi2:12 Rwot myero ojwer jo ducu ma gitimo man ki i kema pa Yakobo, pe dok gukel gityer bot Rwot me mony!" 
Malachi2:13 Dok wutimo man. Wudyako keno tyer pa Rwot ki pig waŋwu, kun wukok, wucur, pien en pe dok keto cwinye pi gityer, pe gamo bene ki yomcwiny ki i ciŋwu." 
Malachi2:14 Wupenyo ni, “Piŋo en pe gamo?” Pien Rwot obedo caden me cikke i kin in ki dako ma inyomo i kare me awobini, ma doŋ pe igene-ni, kadi bed en lawoti, en dako ma yam icikke kwede." 
Malachi2:15 Pe Lubaŋa acel-li aye ma otiyo dok ogwoko cwiny me kwo piwa? En mito aŋo? Litino ma giworo Lubaŋa, Pi meno wugwokke kenwu, ŋat mo pe myero obed ma pe geno dako ma en onyomo i kare me awobine." 
Malachi2:16 “Pien adag gonyo nyom, man lok ma Rwot Lubaŋa pa Icrael owaco, ki ŋat ma ryemo dakone woko tektek. Man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco. Pi meno wugwokke kenwu, dok pe myero wubed laboŋo gen.”" 
Malachi2:17 Wutyeko olo kom Rwot ki lokwu. Ka pud dok wuwaco ni, “Waolo kome niŋniŋ?” Pi waco ni, “Ŋat ma timo gin marac i nyim Rwot en aye ber, iye bene yom i kome.” Nyo gwok pi penyo ni, “Lubaŋa ma ŋolo kop atir tye kwene?”" 
Malachi3:1 Lubaŋa owacci, “Nen, acwalo lakwenana ocito anyim ka yubo yo ma peya abino, doŋ Rwot ma wuyenyo-ni bibino oyotoyot i ot mere. Lakwena me gicikke ma cwinywu yom i kome, nen, en bibino, man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi3:2 Ento na ma twero ciro nino me binone, dok aŋa ma twero cuŋ ka en binen? “Pien en tye macalo mac lali ryal, ki dok calo cabun pa lalwok boŋŋi;" 
Malachi3:3 en bibedo piny macalo ŋat ma liyo ryal wek obed maleŋ, bilonyo likwayo pa Levi, dok bilonyogi gidoko leŋ macalo dano ma liyo ryal ki jabu, nio waŋ ma gibityero gityer ma myero bot Rwot." 
Malachi3:4 Lacenne gityer pa jo Juda ki gityer pa jo Jerucalem biyomo cwiny Rwot macalo i kare macon ki i mwaka mapol mukato aŋec. 
Malachi3:5 “Abinyiko cok botwu pi ŋolo kop; abibedo caden ma kome mit i kom lutal, i kom lutim abor, i kom jo ma kwoŋo kwon goba, i kom jo ma buro lupakaca pi mucaragi, ki ma buro mon-to ki litino kic, i kom jo ma ryemo lubedo ma i kingi gicwalogi cen, kun pe gilwora, man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi3:6 “Pien an a ‘Rwot, pe alokke; pi meno wun likwayo pa Yakobo peya gityekowu." 
Malachi3:7 Nia i kare pa kwarowu wunak ki i cik mera, pe wugwokogi. Wudwog bota, an bene abidwogo botwu, man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco. Ento wuwacci, ‘Wabidwogo niŋniŋ?’" 
Malachi3:8 Dano twero yako Lubaŋa? Ento wun wuyaka. Dok wuwaco ni, ‘Wayaki niŋniŋ?’ I dul acel me apar ki gityer mewu." 
Malachi3:9 Gicenowu ki cen, pien wun wa ki rok mewu ducu wutye ka yaka." 
Malachi3:10 Wukel dul acel me apar i ot kano cam, wek cam obed tye i oda; dok wutema, ka pe abiyabo botwu waŋ dirica me polo, wek aony gum ma opoŋ madwoŋ i komwu,” man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi3:11 “Abijuko bonyo, wek pe otyek cam ma ocek i pottiwu; nyig olokwu pe biballe, man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi3:12 Miyo lurok ducu gibilwoŋowu ni jo ma komgi gum, pien wubibedo i lobo me yomcwiny,” man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi3:13 “Wuloko lok marac i koma,” man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco. “Wun wuwaco ni, ‘Walok i komi nino?’" 
Malachi3:14 Wuwaco ni, ‘Woro Lubaŋa konnye pe. Dok cobo cikke nyo bedo i nyim Rwot me mony macalo jo ma kwero cola konyo gin aŋo?" 
Malachi3:15 Nia koni walwoŋo jo ma wakke ni lugumkom; lutim maraco gin aye limgi nya; pe meno keken, ka gitemo Lubaŋa, gibwot.’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 I kare meno jo ma gilworo Rwot guloko ki luwotgi; Rwot otero ite, ci owinyogi, Gicoyo buk me po i kom jo ma yam gilworo Rwot dok ma gitamo pire." 
Malachi3:17 Ci Rwot owacci. “Gibibedo mera, mera kikome, i nino ma abitic iye, dok abitimogi kica macalo dano timo kwede kica ki wode ma tiyo bote." 
Malachi3:18 Miyo doki wupoko kin jo ma kitgi atir ki jo maraco, kin ŋat ma tiyo bot Lubaŋa ki ŋat ma pe tiyo bote." 
Malachi4:1 “Pien nen, nino bibino ma waŋ calo keno ma mac tye iye; jo ma wakke, ki lutim maraco ducu gidoko macalo ren kal; nino ma bino-ni biwaŋogi woko, pe dok biwekogi lwite kadi jaŋe, man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Malachi4:2 Ento pi wun jo ma wulworo nyiŋa cen me Lar mera bituc ma tye ki gin me caŋo dano i bwome. Wun wubikato woko kun wupye macalo roci ma gua ki i dwol. 
Malachi4:3 Wubinyono jo maraco piny, gibidoko macalo butu i te tyenwu, i nino ma abitic iye." 
Malachi4:4 “Wupo pi cik pa laticca Moses, cik ki gin ma yam acike kwede i Koreb pi jo Icrael ducu." 
Malachi4:5 “Nen, abicwalo lanebi Elia botwu” ma peya nino pa Rwot oo, nino madit ki ma kelo lworo." 
Malachi4:6 En biloko cwiny wegi litino i kom litinogi ki cwiny litino i kom wegigi, wek pe abin abal lobogi woko macalo gin ma giceno.” Man lok ma Rwot me mony owaco." 
Matthew1:5 Calmon ki Rakab gunywalo Boaj, ci Boaj ki Ruth gunywalo Obed, ki Obed onywalo Yece;" 
Matthew24:15 “Doŋ ka wubineno gin mo me kwer, malik, ma balo cwiny dano, ma yam Daniel otito pire, kun ocuŋ i kabedo maleŋ (dano ma kwano myero oniaŋ iye)," 
Acts2:16 Ento man aye lok ma yam lanebi Joel oloko pire kun wacci, Lubaŋa owaco ni,"
